Genesis1:1 Agege Obaŋa oketo polo kede lobo. 
Genesis1:2 Lobo onwoŋo orubere atata kun ginnoro mom iye, colpiny onwoŋo owumo pii atut oko; Cuny Obaŋa olyero i wi pii." 
Genesis1:3 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Lero myero bed tye”; lero daŋ te bedo tye." 
Genesis1:4 Obaŋa te neno ni ber; te poko akina lero kede colpiny. 
Genesis1:5 Obaŋa te cako nyiŋ lero ni Iceŋ, te cako nyiŋ colpiny ni lwor Otyeno piny te yuto dok piny te ru, mannono te bedo nino me agege." 
Genesis1:6 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Gin opette myero bed tye malo ame poko pii kede pii.”" 
Genesis1:7 Obaŋa te tiyo gin opette, te poko pii ame tye piny i te gin opette kede en ame tye malo i wi gin opette, eka te timere amannono." 
Genesis1:8 Obaŋa te cako nyiŋ gin opette ni Polo. Otyeno piny te yuto dok piny te ru, mannono te bedo nino ame aryo." 
Genesis1:9 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Pii ame tye piny i te polo myero cokere poŋ karacel i kabedo acel, me piny otwo nen”; eka te timere amannono." 
Genesis1:10 Obaŋa te cako nyiŋ piny otwo ni Lobo, te cako nyiŋ pii ocokere opoŋ karacel ni Nam; Obaŋa te neno ni ber." 
Genesis1:11 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Lum kede ginapita ame kotigi tye, kede yen adoŋo a nyako nyiggi ame kotigi tye i yigi, acalo eponegi tye i wi lobo, myero tu i lobo”; eka te timere amannono." 
Genesis1:12 Lum kede ginapita ame kotigi tye i yigi, kede yen adoŋo a nyako nyiggi, ame kotigi tye i yigi, acalo eponegi tye, te tu i lobo; Obaŋa te neno ni ber." 
Genesis1:13 Otyeno piny te yuto dok piny te ru, mannono te bedo nino me adek." 
Genesis1:14 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Gigi mogo aryeny myero bed tye i gin opette i polo me poko Iceŋ kede lwor; me gin bed gin me anena ame cimo kare kede nino kede mwaka," 
Genesis1:15 dok me gin bed gin aryeny i gin opette i polo menyo piny”; eka te timere amanono. 
Genesis1:16 Obaŋa te tiyo gin aryeny aryo adoŋo, en adwoŋŋere me loyo dyeceŋ, en atidi mere me loyo dyewor; te tiyo daŋ acer." 
Genesis1:17 Obaŋa te cibogi i kom gin opette i polo me menyo piny," 
Genesis1:18 kede me loyo dyeceŋ kede dyewor, kede me poko lero kede colpiny; Obaŋa te neno ni ber." 
Genesis1:19 Otyeno piny te yuto dok piny te ru, mannono te bedo nino me aŋwen." 
Genesis1:20 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Gin ame tye kede kwo myero corre, nya i pii; kede winy ame twarre malo i wi lobo i nyim gin opette i polo.”" 
Genesis1:21 Obaŋa te keto nyaŋ adoŋo me nam, kede ginnoro ducu ame tye i kwo, ame mol corre, nya i pii acalo eponegi tye, kede kit winy luŋ ame tye kede bwomgi acalo eponegi tye; Obaŋa te neno ni ber." 
Genesis1:22 Obaŋa te miyogi winyo kun kobo ni, “Nywal, imedde, ipoŋ wunu pii me nam, wun winy daŋ medde wunu i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis1:23 Otyeno piny te yuto dok piny te ru, mano te bedo nino me kany." 
Genesis1:24 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Lobo myero nywal gin akwo acalo eponegi tye: leyi me paci, kede gin ame lak alaka, kede leyi me tim acalo eponegi tye”; eka te timere amannono." 
Genesis1:25 Obaŋa te tiyo leyi me tim acalo eponegi tye, kede leyi me paco acalo eponegi tye, kede gin ame lak alaka piny acalo eponegi tye; Obaŋa te neno ni ber." 
Genesis1:26 Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Oti wunu dano ame cal kedwa, me gin lo rec me nam, kede winy a twarre malo, kede leyi me paco, kede wi lobo luŋ, kede gin ducu ame lak alaka piny i lobo.”" 
Genesis1:27 Eka Obaŋa te keto dano i callere, oketogi co kede mon." 
Genesis1:28 Obaŋa te miyogi winyo kun kobo ni, “Nywal, imdede, ipoŋ wunu lobo, ilo wunu daŋ; dok ilo wunu daŋ rec me nam, kede winy ame twarre malo, kede gin ducu akwo ame tye i wi lobo,”" 
Genesis1:29 Obaŋa te kobbegi ni, “Nen, atyeko miyowu ginapita ducu me wi lobo luŋ ame kotigi tye, kede yen adoŋo ducu ame nyako nyiggi ame kotigi tye i yigi; gin luŋ bino bedo camwu." 
Genesis1:30 Dok leyi ducu me tim kede winy ducu ame twarre malo, kede gin ducu ame lak alaka i wi lobo, ame tye kede kwo, atyeko miyogi pot jami ducu me bedo camgi”; eka te daŋ timere amannono" 
Genesis1:31 Obaŋa te neno jami ducu ame en otio, nen, onwoŋo ber meicel. Otyeno piny te yuto dok piny te ru, mannono te bedo nino me kanyape." 
Genesis2:1 Polo kede lobo rik oketo otum kite-nono, kede jami ducu ame tye iye." 
Genesis2:2 Obaŋa ogiko ticcere ame rik otio i nino me abiro, eka te weo i nino me abiro i tic ducu ame rik en otio." 
Genesis2:3 Obaŋa te miyo nino me abiro gum, omio obedo acil, pien i nino-nono en Obaŋa rik owe iye i ticcere ducu ame en obedo tiyo i keto lobo." 
Genesis2:4 Man en kite ame polo kede lobo ocakere kede i kare ame oketogi iye. I nino ame Rwot Obaŋa rik otio iye polo kede lobo," 
Genesis2:5 yattoro me tim onwoŋo mom ru tye i lobo, kit lummoro daŋ onwoŋo mom ru otu; pien Rwot Obaŋa onwoŋo mom ru omio kot ocwe i lobo, dano ame puro lobo daŋ onwoŋo pwod pe," 
Genesis2:6 ento ekuna te cako duny malo, bido wi lobo ducu." 
Genesis2:7 Rwot te cweyo dano kede apua me lobo, okuta yamo me kwo i wume, dano te doko gin ame tye kede kwo." 
Genesis2:8 Rwot Obaŋa te yiko poto i Eden tuŋ kide, te keto iye dano ame en ocweo." 
Genesis2:9 Eka Rwot Obaŋa te miyo kwon yen ducu abeco me anena kede me acama tu i lobo, kede yat me kwo daŋ i dye poto, kede yat me poko gin aber kede gin arac." 
Genesis2:10 Kulo ame onwoŋo mol ya iyi Eden kelo pii i poto, yie te, pokere i kuno, te doko kulo aŋwen." 
Genesis2:11 Me agege omano lobo Kavila ducu, kan ame tye iye jabu, nyiŋe Picon." 
Genesis2:12 Jabu me lobo-nu beco; odok yat ame olwoŋo ni bedola onwoŋo tye iye, kede gweŋ onik." 
Genesis2:13 Kulo me aryo, omano lobo Kuc luŋ, nyiŋe Gikon." 
Genesis2:14 Kulo me adek ame mol dok tuŋ kide me Acuria, Tigiric. Kulo me aŋwen, nyiŋe Efurate." 
Genesis2:15 Rwot Obaŋa okwanyo dano te keto i poto me Eden, me en pur dok gwoki," 
Genesis2:16 Rwot Obaŋa te ciko dano ni, “Yen ducu ame tye i poto itwero camo giri aboŋo lworo," 
Genesis2:17 cite yat me poko gin aber kede gin arac, kur icam, pien i nino ame ibino camo iye, ibino to.”" 
Genesis2:18 Rwot Obaŋa te dok kobo ni, “Pe ber dano ibedo kene; abino tiyo ŋat ame konye ame oporre pire.”" 
Genesis2:19 Rwot Obaŋa te cweyo leyi ducu me tim kede winy ducu a twarre malo kun cweo kede lobo. Eka te kelogi baŋ dano me nen kite ame ebino cako kede nyiŋgi; doŋ nyiŋŋoro ducu ame dano ocakki gin akwo acel acel, doko doŋ nyiŋe." 
Genesis2:20 Dano ocako nyiŋ leyi ducu me paco, kede winy a twarre malo, kede leyi me tim; cite ŋat ame myero kony dano ame oporre pire onwoŋo pwod pe." 
Genesis2:21 Rwot Obaŋa te miyo nino mako waŋ dano atek meicel; i kare ame en onino, Rwot Obaŋa te kwanyo amara mere acel oko, te mwono kakare kede riŋo." 
Genesis2:22 Amara mere ame Rwot Obaŋa okwanyo-nono, otio odoko dako, te kelo baŋ dano." 
Genesis2:23 Dano te kobo ni, “Man en cogo ame oya i cogona, kede riŋo me riŋo koma. Obino lwoŋe ni Dako, pien okwanye i kom Ico.”" 
Genesis2:24 Man en gin omio dano weko pappere kede tottere, te moko i kom dako mere, gin aryo ote doko kom acel." 
Genesis2:25 I karenaca ico kede dako mere onwoŋo tye onoro, lewic gire onwoŋo mom makogi." 
Genesis3:1 Twol rik onwoŋo ryek ame okato leyi ducu ame Rwot Obaŋa otio. En openyo dako ni, “Mom Obaŋa okobo ni kur icam wunu yattoro ame tye i poto?”" 
Genesis3:2 Dako okobbi twol ni, “Otwero camo nyig yen ducu i poto-ni," 
Genesis3:3 cite Obaŋa okobo ni kur ocam nyig yat i dye poto, kur ogud kome, me kur oto.”" 
Genesis3:4 Twol te kobbi dako ni, “Pe ibino to wunu gire," 
Genesis3:5 Obaŋa ŋeo ni ka icamo wunu, waŋwu bino yabere, ibino doko wunu calo Obaŋa kun iŋeo poko wunu gin aber kede gin arac.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ka dako oneno ni yattono ber me acama, dok kao waŋ, dok yattono mitte, pien mio dano doko ryek, opwono nyige, te camo; te miyo mogo baŋ cware, te camo." 
Genesis3:7 Gin aryo ducu waŋgi te yabere oko, ote ŋeyo ni otye onoro; gin te kwoyo pot olam karacel me aruka i pyergi." 
Genesis3:8 Tuŋ otyeno ame piny okwe, gin te winyo dwon Rwot Obaŋa kun woto i poto, eka dano kede dako mere te pono oko i nyim Rwot Obaŋa i akina yen ame tye i poto." 
Genesis3:9 Rwot Obaŋa te lwoŋo dano kun kobbe ni, “Itye kwene?”" 
Genesis3:10 En te gamo ni, “Awinyi ka iwoto i poto, lworo te maka, pien atye gira onoro, ate pono gira oko.”" 
Genesis3:11 Dok te penye ni, “Ŋa okobbi ni itye onoro? Icamo ce yat ame aciki ni kur icam?”" 
Genesis3:12 Dano te gamo ni, “Dako ame imio ni bed keda, en omia nyig yat, ate camo.”" 
Genesis3:13 Rwot Obaŋa te penyo dako ni, “Man ŋo ame yin, itimo-ni?” Dako te gamo ni, “Twol obwola, ate camo.”" 
Genesis3:14 Rwot Obaŋa te kobbi twol ni, “Pien itimo tim man, oceni akato i akina leyi ducu me paco, kede i akina leyi ducu me tim. Ibino mol kede yii, dok ibino camo apua nino ducu me kwoni," 
Genesis3:15 Abino keto amone i akina yin kede dako, kede i akina ikwai kede ikwae. Akware bino goyo wii, yin ibino toŋo opuny tyene.”" 
Genesis3:16 Baŋ dako te kobo ni, “Abino medo rem i kom atek kare me yac; ibino nywalo itino kede rem. Ento mitti bino bedo tye i kom cwari, dok en bino loyi.”" 
Genesis3:17 Baŋ Adam te kobo ni, “Pien yin iwinyo kop a cegi, icamo nying yat ame an aciki in kur icam, oceno lobo, oko piri; ibino camo gin ame ya iye kede aroma nino ducu me kwoni." 
Genesis3:18 Bino nyayo okuto kede ocokocok, ibino camo pot dek me tim." 
Genesis3:19 Ibino camo kwon pi kwok olworo nyim, ituno ka idok i lobo, pien akwanyi iye. Yin apua, ibino dok iyi apua.”" 
Genesis3:20 Dano te cako nyiŋ dako mere ni Kawa, pien en tota a jo ducu ame kwo." 
Genesis3:21 Rwot Obaŋa te yiko lao, te miyo Adam kede cege me aruka." 
Genesis3:22 Rwot Obaŋa te kobo ni, “Nen, dano doŋ odoko cal kedwa, kun ŋeo poko gin aber kede gin arac. Aman doŋ pe dok omi rye ciŋe pwon nyig yat me kwo, ocam, mio doŋ bino perakino atwal.”" 
Genesis3:23 Man omio Rwot Obaŋa oryeme oko i poto i Eden, me wot puro lobo ame rik okwanye iye." 
Genesis3:24 En oryemo dano oko; te keto okerubi kede pala romo ame lyel mac, wirre tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, i yo tuŋ kide me poto Eden, me gwoko yo ame woto i yat me kwo." 
Genesis4:1 Adam rik te ŋeye gin kede dako mere Kawa, te yac nywalo Kain kun kobo ni, “Rwot okonya omio anwoŋo atin ico.”" 
Genesis4:2 Dok te nywalo ominnere Abel. Abel te bedo akwarommi, Kain apur-poto." 
Genesis4:3 A doŋ otyeko kare, Kain okelo cammogo ame ocek i poto mere, omio baŋ Rwot." 
Genesis4:4 Abel te kelo mege itino rommi me kao kede dwolgi. 
Genesis4:5 Rwot te neno Abel kede mottere i yomcuny. Cuny Kain te waŋ atek, waŋe te bale oko." 
Genesis4:6 Rwot te penyo Kain ni, “Cunyi owaŋ piŋo? Dok waŋi oballe piŋo?" 
Genesis4:7 Ka ce itimo ber, mom obino pwoyi? Ka ce mom itimo ber, bal buta i doggola, cunye pyepyeta i komi, cite myero iloe.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kain te kobbi ominnere Abel ni, “Owot i poto.” Ame doŋ gin tye i poto, Kain ocako romo ominnere, te neko oko." 
Genesis4:9 Obaŋa te kobbi Kain ni “Kara Abel tye kwene?” En te gamo ni, “Pe aŋeo; an abedo agwok ominna bo?”" 
Genesis4:10 Obaŋa te kobbi Kain ni, “Ŋo ame itimo? Nen, remo ominni ame oony tye a koko i lobo kun winyere baŋa. Aman doŋ oceni oko" 
Genesis4:11 i lobo ame oŋamo doge te gamo remo ominni ame yin ionyo. 
Genesis4:12 Lobo mom dok bino cekki cam ka ipuro; ibino bedo aloŋ-piny kun iwowota atata i wi lobo.” 
Genesis4:13 Kain te kobbi Rwot ni, “Can ame imia pek meicel ame mom aromo yeyo." 
Genesis4:14 Nen tin doŋ iryema oko i poto, mom abino dok nen i nyimi; abino bedo aloŋpiny kun awowota atata i lobo, ame ŋattoro keken ka onwoŋa bino neka oko.”" 
Genesis4:15 Rwot te dok kobbe ni, “Mom amannono gire! Ka ŋattoro oneko Kain, abino culo kwor i kome tyen abiro. Rwot te keto anen i kom Kain, me ŋattoro ka onwoŋe kur neke.”" 
Genesis4:16 Kain te ya oko i nyim Rwot, te wot bedo i lobo Nod, tuŋ kide me Eden." 
Genesis4:17 Kain rik te ŋeye gin kede dako mere; oyac te nywalo Enoka. Te gero boma, te cako nyiŋ boma-nono ni Enoka bala nyiŋ wode." 
Genesis4:18 Enoka te nywalo Irad; Irad te nywalo Mekujael; Mekujael te nywalo Metucael; Metucael te nywalo Lamek. 
Genesis4:19 Lamek te nyomo mon aryo; acel nyiŋe Ada, acel nyiŋe Jilla." 
Genesis4:20 Ada onywalo Jabal ame rik obedo kwaro a jo ducu ame bedo i kema, kun okwao lim." 
Genesis4:21 Ominnere nyiŋe Jubal, ame rik obedo kwaro a jo ducu ame goo naŋa opuk kede ame kuto nyamulere." 
Genesis4:22 Jilla daŋ te nywalo Jubal-kain, atet jami tic ducu me mola kede nyonyo. Amin a Tubal-kain obedo Naama," 
Genesis4:23 Lamek te kobbi monnere ni, “Yin Ada kede Jilla winy wunu koppa; wun mon a Lamek cik yitwu i gin ame akobo. Pien aneko dano pi waŋa, acobo awobi ame ogoa," 
Genesis4:24 Ka ce obino culo kwor a Kain tyen abiro, Lamek obino culo kworrere tyen pyerabiro wie abiro twal.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adam rik dok te ŋeye gin kede dako mere, eka dako te nywalo awobi, te cako nyiŋe Ceji, pien okobo ni. “Obaŋa doŋ oye miya atin okene me leyo ka Abel ame Kain oneko.”" 
Genesis4:26 Ceji daŋ te nywalo atin awobi, ote cako nyiŋe Enoci. I karenono jo te cako lwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot." 
Genesis5:1 Man en coc ame nyuto ikwae Adam, I kare ame Obaŋa keto dano, ocweo dano i callere." 
Genesis5:2 Oketogi co kede mon, omiogi gum, dok te cako nyiŋgi ni Dano i nino ame oketogi iye-nono." 
Genesis5:3 Kare ame Adam doŋ ori oromo mwaka mia acel kede pyeradek, onywalo awobi ame cal kede en ikome; te cako nyiŋe Ceji." 
Genesis5:4 Mwaka Adam i kare ame en doŋ otyeko nywalo Ceji rik oromo mia aboro, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:5 Pi mannono, mwaka Adam luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te doŋ to, romo mia aboŋwen kede pyeradek." 
Genesis5:6 Kare ame Ceji doŋ ori oromo mwaka mia acel kede abic, onywalo Enoci." 
Genesis5:7 I ŋe nywalo Enoci, Ceji ori mwaka mia aboro kede abiro, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:8 Pi mannono, mwaka a Ceji luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboŋwen kede apar wie aryo." 
Genesis5:9 Kare ame Enoci doŋ ori oromo mwaka pyeraboŋwen, onywalo Kenan." 
Genesis5:10 I ŋe nywalo Kenan, Enoci ori mwaka mia aboro kede apar wie abic, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:11 Pi mannono mwaka Enoci luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboŋwen kede abic." 
Genesis5:12 Kare ame Kenan ori oromo mwaka pyerabiro, onywalo Maalalel." 
Genesis5:13 I ŋe nywalo Maalalel, Kenan ori mwaka mia aboro kede pyeraŋwen, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:14 Pi mannono mwaka a Kenan luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboŋwen kede apar." 
Genesis5:15 Kare ame Maalalel doŋ ori oromo mwaka pyerabicel wie abic, onywalo Jared." 
Genesis5:16 I ŋe nywalo Jared, Maalalel ori mwaka mia aboro kede pyeradek, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awo be kede anyira." 
Genesis5:17 Pi mannono mwaka a Maalalel luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboro kede pyeraboŋwen wie abic." 
Genesis5:18 Kare ame Jared doŋ ori oromo mwaka mia acel kede pyerabicel wie aryo, onywalo Enoka." 
Genesis5:19 I ŋe nywalo Enoka, Jared ori mwaka mia aboro, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:20 Pi mannono mwaka a Jared luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboŋwen kede pyerabicel wie aryo." 
Genesis5:21 Kare ame Enoka doŋ ori mwaka pyerabicel wie abic, onywalo Metucela." 
Genesis5:22 I ŋe nywalo Metucela, Enoka obedo tiyo gin ame Obaŋa mito pi mwaka mia adek, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:23 Pi mannono mwaka Enoka luŋ ame ori kede i lobo romo mia adek kede pyerabicel wie abic. 
Genesis5:24 Enoka obedo tiyo gin ame Obaŋa mito; eka te rwenyo atwal, pien Obaŋa otere oko." 
Genesis5:25 Kare ame Metucela doŋ ori oromo mwaka mia acel kede pyeraboro wie abiro, onywalo Lamek." 
Genesis5:26 I ŋe nywalo Lamek, Metucela ori mwaka mia abiro kede pyeraboro wie aryo, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:27 Pi mannono mwaka a Metucela luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboŋwen kede pyerabicel wie aboŋwen." 
Genesis5:28 Kare ame Lamek doŋ ori oromo mwaka mia acel kede pyeraboro wie aryo, onywalo wode," 
Genesis5:29 ame te cako nyiŋe Nua, kun kobo ni, “Man bino kelliwa weo i tic me ciŋwa ame ocanne iye, i lobo ame Rwot oceno.”" 
Genesis5:30 I ŋe nywalo Nua, Lameki ori mwaka mia abic kede pyeraboŋwen wie abic, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis5:31 Pi mannono mwaka a Lamek luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia abiro kede pyeraboro wie abiro." 
Genesis5:32 Kare ame Nua doŋ ori mwaka mia abic onywalo Cem, Kam, kede Yafeci." 
Genesis6:1 Kare ame dano ocako medde i lobo, kun daŋ onywalo anyira," 
Genesis6:2 awobe Obaŋa ocako neno ni anyira a dano beco. Gin ocako yero mogo i akinagi, ote nyomo me bedo mongi." 
Genesis6:3 Rwot te kobo ni, “Cunya mom bino ri i kom dano nakanaka, pien en obedo kom nono, ento en bino ri pi mwaka mia acel kede pyeraryo keken.”" 
Genesis6:4 Jo Nepili onwoŋo tye i lobo i kare-nono; icennere doki, i kare ame awobe Obaŋa odonyo baŋ anyira a dano, te nywalligi itino, onwoŋo gin daŋ tye. Magi gin twoni jo otego me kare-naca, ame nyingi rwo meicel." 
Genesis6:5 Rwot te neno ni bal ajo dwoŋ i lobo, dok pargi ducu me cuny opoŋ ka i paro pi timo gin arac keken." 
Genesis6:6 Cuny Rwot mom te bedo ayom pi tiyo dano i lobo, te cwero cunye meicel." 
Genesis6:7 Rwot te kobo ni, “Abino jwero dano ame rik aketo i lobo oko; dano kede leyi kede gin ame lak alaka, kede winy ame twarre malo; pien cunya doŋ mom yom pi ketogi.”" 
Genesis6:8 Cite Rwot te pwoyo Nua. 
Genesis6:9 Man ikwae a Nua. Nua rik onwoŋo obedo dano a kite atira, ame ballere moro mom i akina jo me kare mere; Nua obedo tiyo gin ame Obaŋa mito." 
Genesis6:10 Nua rik tye kede awobe adek: Cem, Kam, kede Yafeci." 
Genesis6:11 Lobo onwoŋo doŋ oballe oko i nyim Obaŋa, lobo onwoŋo olunyo poŋ i byemi." 
Genesis6:12 Obaŋa te neno lobo, onwoŋo doŋ oballe oko, pien ginnoro ducu ame onwoŋo tye kede kom onwoŋo oballe oko i kite ame gin bedo kede i lobo." 
Genesis6:13 Obaŋa te kobbi Nua ni, “Doŋ atyeko moko oko me tyeko ginnoro ducu ame tye kede kom, karacel kede lobo daŋ; pien lobo doŋ opoŋ i byemi pirgi." 
Genesis6:14 Paa yeeni adwoŋ i yat gofer, pok icika i yie, ite mwono yie kede yo ŋec ducu kede odok." 
Genesis6:15 Man en kite ame myero iti kede: bor a yee myero bed yadi mia acel kede pyerabic, eka borrere me malo te bedo futi pyeraŋwen wie kany." 
Genesis6:16 Tuc wan dirica i ye kun iweko malo odoŋ futi acel kede nucu. Ket doggola i laŋet yee, eka ite poko yie adek, kabedo i pinnyere, kabedo me aryo mere kede kabedo me adekkere." 
Genesis6:17 Pien abino coro abwal pii adwoŋ meicel i lobo, me tyek ginnoro ducu i te polo, ame tye kede kom, ame tye kede weo me kwo, me gin luŋ ame tye i lobo, to oko." 
Genesis6:18 Ento an abino cikere kedi; ibino donyo i yee, yin karacel kede itinoni kede dakoni, kede mon itinoni." 
Genesis6:19 Dok daŋ i kom ginnoro ducu ame tye kede kwo, ame tye kede kom, kwany aryo aryo i kom epone acel acel, ite cwayogi i yee, me gin bed kwo karacel kedi; twon kede mine." 
Genesis6:20 Winy acalo eponegi tye, leyi acalo oponegi tye, gin ame lak alaka piny acalo eponegi tye, gin bino bino baŋi aryo aryo i kom epone acel acel, me gi bed kwo," 
Genesis6:21 Dok ter daŋ epone cam ducu ame ocamo, ite gwoko; mannono bino konyowu karacel kede gin, me acamawu.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nua daŋ te timo kittono; otio ginnoro ducu ame Obaŋa ocike tiyo. 
Genesis7:1 Rwot te kobbi Nua ni, “Dony doŋ i yee, yin karacel kede jo me odi ducu, pien atyeko doŋ neno ni yin kiteni atira i nyima i akina jo me kare man." 
Genesis7:2 Ter leyi ame ocamo abiro abiro, twonnere kede mine; kede leyi a mom ocamo aryo aryo, twonnere kede mine." 
Genesis7:3 Ter daŋ winy ame twarre malo abiro abiro, co kede mon me gwoko eponegi bed kwo i lobo ducu." 
Genesis7:4 Pien odoŋ doŋ nino abiro, abino miyo kot cwe i lobo pi nino pyeraŋwen, dyeceŋ kede dyewor; ginnoro luŋ ame kwo ame rik atio, abino rweyogi oko i lobo.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nua te tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame Obaŋa ocike tiyo. 
Genesis7:6 I kare ame twon abwal pii ocorre i lobo, Nua onwoŋo doŋ oromo mwaka mia abicel me dittere." 
Genesis7:7 Eka Nua kede dako mere, kede awobe mere te donyo i yee me bwot i twon abwal pii," 
Genesis7:8 Leyi ducu ame ocamo kede a mom ocamo, kede winy, kede gin ame lak alaka piny," 
Genesis7:9 gin ducu odonyo iyi yee karacel kede Nua, kun odonyo aryo aryo, en ico kede en a dako, kite ame Obaŋa rik ociko kede Nua." 
Genesis7:10 I ŋe nino abiro, twon abwal pii te corre i lobo." 
Genesis7:11 I mwaka me mia abicel me dit a Nua, i dwe me aryo, nino dwe apar wie abiro, i nino-nono waŋ pii atut luŋ ame tye piny te tutuca oko, polo daŋ te tutuca oko." 
Genesis7:12 Kot te corre i lobo nino pyeraŋwen, dyeceŋ kede dyewor benebene." 
Genesis7:13 I nino-nono ikome, Nua kede awobe mere Cem, Kam kede Yafeci, kede dako mere en Nua, karacel kede mon awobe mere adek, odonyo iyi yee," 
Genesis7:14 gin karacel kede leyi ducu me tim acalo eponegi tye, kede leyi ducu me paco acalo eponegi tye, kede ginnoro luŋ ame lak alaka acalo eponegi tye, kede winy ducu acalo eponegi tye, winy ducu ame papat." 
Genesis7:15 Kom ducu ametye kede weo me kwo odonyo iyi yee aryo aryo karacel kede Nua. 
Genesis7:16 Co kede mon me kit ginnoro ducu ame odonyo iyi yee, odonyo i kite ame Obaŋa ociko kede Nua; eka Rwot tecegogi oko iyiyee." 
Genesis7:17 Twon abwal pii te bedo corre i lobo pi nino pyeraŋwen. Pii omedde poŋ, te tiŋo yee malo ame bor abora kede lobo." 
Genesis7:18 Pii te cerre, te medde poŋ adwoŋ meicel i lobo; eka yee te bedo lyero alyera i wii pii." 
Genesis7:19 Pii te cerre atek meicel i lobo, ame te wumo kiddi adoŋo ducu ame tye piny i te polo." 
Genesis7:20 Pii te medde cerre malo i wi kiddi adoŋo kun kato kiddi adoŋo yadi abiro kede nucu twal. 
Genesis7:21 Ginnoro ducu ame onwoŋo tye kede kom, ame onwoŋo woto i lobo te to oko: winy, leyi me paco kede leyi me tim, kede ginnoro ducu ame nya corre i lobo, karacel kede dano daŋ, gin ducu oto oko." 
Genesis7:22 Ginnoro ducu ame onwoŋo tye kede kwo, ame bedo i wi tela oto oko." 
Genesis7:23 Obaŋa orweo ginnoro ducu ame tye kede kwo, ame onwoŋo tye i lobo, dano, kede leyi, gin ame lak alaka kede winy ame twarre malo; gin luŋ orweogi oko i lobo. Nua keken kede jo ame rik tye kede iyi yee en ame odoŋ." 
Genesis7:24 Pii te ri i lobo pi nino mia acel kede pyerabic twal. 
Genesis8:1 Obaŋa te po ni Nua karacel kede leyi ducu me tim, kede leyi ducu me paco, ame onwoŋo tye karacel kede iyi yee. Obaŋa omio yamo okodo i lobo eka pii te ero dwono oko." 
Genesis8:2 Pii atut ame tye piny, kede kan otutuca i polo, te cegere oko, kot ame onwoŋo corre i polo te cok oko," 
Genesis8:3 pii i lobo te medde dwono. I agikki me nino mia acel kede pyerabic, pii onwoŋo doŋ owaye odok piny." 
Genesis8:4 I dwe me abiro, nino mere apar wie abiro, yee te gem oko i wi kidi adwoŋ me Ararat." 
Genesis8:5 Pii omedde dwono naka i dwe me apar. I dwe me apar, wi kiddi aboco mege te cako nen oko." 
Genesis8:6 Kare ame nino pyeraŋwen doŋ akato, Nua oyabo waŋ dirica a rik etuco i yee," 
Genesis8:7 te cwayo agak oko. Agak te bedo twarre kun wirre tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi tuno waŋ ame pii otwo oko i wi lobo. 
Genesis8:8 Nua dok te cwayo amam me wot neno ka pii odwono oko i wi lobo. 
Genesis8:9 Ento amam mom te nwoŋo kakannoro ame etwero cibo iye tyene, te dok gire oko iyi yee baŋ Nua; pien onwoŋo pii pwod tye okwaŋ i wi lobo luŋ. Nua te ryeyo ciŋe, make dwoke iyi yee baŋe." 
Genesis8:10 Nua dok te kuro nino pyeraŋwen ocele, te cwayo amam oko doki iyi yee." 
Genesis8:11 Amam te dok baŋe a doŋ piny oyuto, kun otiŋo pot jeituni adyaka i doge. Mannono omio Nua oniaŋ ni pii doŋ odwono oko i wi lobo." 
Genesis8:12 Nua dok te medo kuro pi nino abiro ocele, te dok cwayo amam, cite naka mom omedo i dwogo baŋe atwal." 
Genesis8:13 I mwaka me mia abicel kede acel me dit a Nua, i dwe me agege, nino dwe acel, onwoŋo pii doŋ otyeko dwono oko i wi lobo. Nua te cako puto wi yee oko, te neno piny, oneno wi lobo doŋ otwo oko." 
Genesis8:14 I dwe me aryo, nino dwe pyeraryo wie abiro, ame onwoŋo lobo doŋ otwo oko," 
Genesis8:15 Obaŋa okobbi Nua ni," 
Genesis8:16 “Ya doŋ iyi yee oko, yin kede cegi kede awobeni kede mongi." 
Genesis8:17 Kel jami ducu ame kwo ame tye baŋi, winy, leyi me paco kede ginnoro ducu ame lak alaka i lobo, me gin nya, medde, dok onywal ocorre apipim i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis8:18 Mannono te miyo Nua donyo oko kede awobe mere, kede dako mere, kede mon awobe mere;" 
Genesis8:19 kede leyi ducu, kede ginnoro luŋ ame lak alaka, kede winy luŋ. Gin jami nono luŋ ame woto i wi lobo, te ya oko iyi yee, ote ciro donyo oko kun olubere eponegi." 
Genesis8:20 Nua te cano keno me miyo lam baŋ Rwot eka te yero leyi kede winy ame ocamo, te waŋogi i kom keno me lam, yalo Rwot." 
Genesis8:21 Ka Rwot oŋweo gin a ŋwece kur, okobo i cunye kene ni, “Mom dok abino medo ceno lobo pi dano ame tammere ogom oko i rac cakere i tino mere; mom dok abino medo neko gin akwo luŋ kite ame doŋ atyeko timo." 
Genesis8:22 Ka lobo pwod bino bedo tye, kare me coc kede kare me kac, kare me koyo kede kare me lyeto, kare me oro kede kare me iporo, dyeceŋ kede dyewor mom bino gik.”" 
Genesis9:1 Obaŋa omio Nua kede awobe mege winyo kun kobo ni, “Nywal, imedde, ipon wunu lobo." 
Genesis9:2 Leyi ducu me tim kede winy a twarre malo bino lworowu i myelkom, karacel kede ginnoro luŋ ame lak alaka, kede en ame mol amola i wi lobo, kede rec luŋ me nam; gin luŋ otyeko miyogi i ciŋwu." 
Genesis9:3 Gin akwo luŋ ame woto, bino bedo me acamawu; acalo rik amiowu pot dek, amiowu doŋ jami ducu." 
Genesis9:4 Kadi amonnono, mom myero icam wunu riŋo ame remo pwod tye iye, pien remo en kwo mere." 
Genesis9:5 Ka ce oonyo remowu, an abino pido pire; abino pido pire baŋ lee moro keken kede baŋ dano. Ŋat ame okwanyo Olev. Lodo kwo a ŋat ocele, an daŋ abino mito kwo mere." 
Genesis9:6 Ŋattoro ducu ame oonyo remo a dano, obino miyo dano daŋ onyo remo mere, pien Obaŋa ocweo dano i callere ikome." 
Genesis9:7 Wun nywal, inya, imedde wunu i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis9:8 Obaŋa dok te kobbi Nua karacel kede awobe mere ni," 
Genesis9:9 “Nen, an ikoma amoko cikerena kedwu karacel kede ikwaewu ame bino lubowu," 
Genesis9:10 kede ginnoro akwo luŋ ame tye baŋwu; winy a twarre malo, leyi me paco kede me tim, kede ginnoro ducu ame tye kede kwo ame idonyo karacel kedgi iyi yee." 
Genesis9:11 Amoko doŋ cikerena kedwu, me mom dok medde tyeko jami ducu ame tye kede kom kun atyeko kede twon abwal pii. Pii mom dok bino medde poŋ, ame balo lobo luŋ.”" 
Genesis9:12 Obaŋa dok te kobo ni, “Man en gin anyuto cikerena ame acikere kede kedwu, kede ginnoro akwo luŋ ame tye baŋwu. Cikere ame bino ri atwal pi lwagi jo me kare luŋ ame tye i nyim." 
Genesis9:13 Atyeko keto etaloka i pol ame bino nyuto cikerena kede lobo. 
Genesis9:14 Ka ce abino miyo polo wumere oko i pol, etaloka bino nen i pol," 
Genesis9:15 mannono bino poyo wia i cikerena ame tye i akina an kede wun, kede gin akwo ducu, kede ginnoro luŋ ame tye kede kom i lobo. Pii mom dok bino wukere ame romo tyeko lobo." 
Genesis9:16 Etaloka bino bedo i pol, ame ka an aneno abino poyo cikere ame bino bedo nakanaka i akina an kede gin akwo luŋ ame tye kede kom i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis9:17 Obaŋa te kobbi Nua ni, “Man en gin a nyuto cikere ame amoko i akina an kede ginnoro luŋ ame kwo i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis9:18 Itino a Nua ame oya iyi yee onwoŋo Cem, Kam kede Yafeci, Kam en ame rik obedo papa a Kanaan." 
Genesis9:19 I kom itino a Nua adek-ki en ame lwak luŋ me wi lobo oya i komgi. 
Genesis9:20 Nua rik en ogeo bedo apur. En opito poto olok," 
Genesis9:21 te mato koŋo olokkere, te mer oko, eka te buto onoro i kema mere." 
Genesis9:22 Kam, papa a Kanaan, te neno pappere onoro, eka te titti omego mere aryo ame onwoŋo tye oko." 
Genesis9:23 Cem kede Yafecite kwanyo boŋo keto i wi gwokgi gin aryo luŋ, ote wot kun ojer i ŋegi, ote wumo papagi oko ame onwoŋo tye onoro; kun gin gigi mom oneno papagi onoro pien waŋgi onwoŋo oneno teŋe." 
Genesis9:24 Ka Nua oco kun koŋo oket oko i kome, te niaŋ gin ame wode me cogo otimo i kome," 
Genesis9:25 okobo ni, “Kanaan oceno oko; en bino bedo opii meicel i akina opii omego mere.”" 
Genesis9:26 Dok te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, mi winyo koma Cem; mi Kanaan bed opii mere." 
Genesis9:27 ‘Obaŋa nyayi Yafeci kabedo, me en bed i kema a Cem; Kanaan bed daŋ opii mere.’ ”" 
Genesis9:28 A doŋ abwal pii ame ocorre i lobo ogik oko, Nua dok omedde ri i lobo pi mwakki mia adek kede pyerabic." 
Genesis9:29 Mwaka a Nua luŋ ame ori kede i lobo te to, romo mia aboŋwen kede pyerabic nono." 
Genesis10:1 Ikwae a Cem, Kam kede Yafeci itino a Nua ame gin onywalo ame doŋ twon pii abwal ogik oko, gin ene:" 
Genesis10:2 Itino a Yafeci ame awobe mege obedo: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Yavan, Tubal, Mecek kede Tirac." 
Genesis10:3 Itino a Gomer ene: Acikenaj, Repa kede Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Itino a Yavan ene: Elica, Tarcic, Kittim kede Dodanim." 
Genesis10:5 Rok me dog nam onya i kom jo-ni. Magi gin itino a Yafeci ame awobe kede lobogi, kun acel acel kobo lebgi pat, acalo itekeregi kede rokgi tye kede." 
Genesis10:6 Itino a Kam ene: Kuc, Miciri, Put, Kanaan," 
Genesis10:7 Itino a Kuc ene: Seba, Kavila, Cabta, Raama, kede Cabteka, Itino a Rama ene: Ceba kede Dedan," 
Genesis10:8 Kuc onywalo Nimulodi, ame en dano ame ogeo bedo twon lo moro atek me wi lobo," 
Genesis10:9 I nyim Rwot daŋ en rik obedo twon adwarroro ame oken; en omio okobo ni, “Calo Nimulodi ame twon adwar oken i nyim Rwot.”" 
Genesis10:10 Loccere rik ogeye i Babel, Erek, Akkad kede Kalne, ame gin tye i lobo me Cinar." 
Genesis10:11 Ya i lobo-nono, en dok okato Acuria, te gero Nineve, Rekobot-Ir, Kalak," 
Genesis10:12 kede Recen, ame tye i akina Nineve kede Kalak; mannono en ame boma adittere," 
Genesis10:13 Miciri onywalo jo Lud, jo Anam, jo Lekab, jo Naptuk," 
Genesis10:14 jo Patruc, jo Kacluk kede jo Kator, ame jo Piriciti oya i komgi." 
Genesis10:15 Kanaan onywalo Cidon, ame obedo atinnere me kao, Ket te lubo," 
Genesis10:16 kede jo Jebuc, jo Amor, jo Girgac," 
Genesis10:17 jo Kivi, jo Ark i, jo Cin," 
Genesis10:18 jo Arvad, jo Cemar, kede jo Kemat. Icennere atekere a jo Kanaan te cako ket oko," 
Genesis10:19 Waŋ lobo a jo Kanaan ocakere i Cidon dok kede naka i yo adok tutuŋ Gergar, tuno naka i Gaja; kede dok iyo ame dok tutuŋ Codoma kede Gomora, kede Adma, kede Jeboim, tuno naka i Laca." 
Genesis10:20 Magi gin itino a Kam awobe kun lubo kite ame itekeregi, lebgi lobogi kede rokgi tye kede." 
Genesis10:21 Cem ame obedo omin a Yafeci adittere, en ame obedo kwaro itino Eber luŋ, en daŋ onywalo itino," 
Genesis10:22 Itino a Cem ame awobe mege obedo, Accur, Arpakcad, Lud, Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Itino Aram ene: Uc, Kul, Geter kede Mac," 
Genesis10:24 Arpakcad onywalo Cela, Cela onywalo Eber," 
Genesis10:25 Eber onywalo itino awobe aryo; ŋat acel rik olwoŋo ni Peleg, pien i kare mere en ame rik opoko iye lobo, kede ominnere rik nyiŋe Yokotani," 
Genesis10:26 Yokotani onywalo Almodad, Celep, Kacarmavet, Yera," 
Genesis10:27 Adoram, Ujal, Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimael, Ceba," 
Genesis10:29 Opir, Kavila, kede Yobab; magi luŋ obedo itino a Yokotani ame awobe." 
Genesis10:30 Lobo ame gin obedo iye, waŋe ocakere i Meca, te dok kede i yo ame dok tutuŋ Cepar tuno kede i lobo obedo kidi kidi ame tye tutuŋ kide." 
Genesis10:31 Magi gin itino a Cem ame awobe mege kun lubo kite ame itekeregi, lebgi, lobogi kede rokgi tye kede." 
Genesis10:32 Man en itekere me itino a Nua, kite ame nywalogi obedo lubere kede i rokgi; cakere i komgi, rok ocako ket romo lobo luŋ kun cakere a doŋ twon abwal pii ame ocorre i lobo ogik oko." 
Genesis11:1 Jo wi lobo luŋ rik onwoŋo kobo ka leb acel keken ame kop a gin kobo onwoŋo mom ru pol wok. 
Genesis11:2 Kare ame gin obedo dak kun odok tutuŋ kide, gin rik te nwoŋo lobo obedo babar i lobo Cinar, gin doŋ te bedo kuno." 
Genesis11:3 Gin te kop gigi kengi kengi ni, “Biye wunu, me ogo wunu matafali ote waŋo wunu aber.” Gin te tic i matafali me gedo akaka gweŋ, kede odok lam acalo gin ame ribo akina matafali." 
Genesis11:4 Dok ote kobo ni, “Biye wunu, me ogeru boma karacel kede gedo abor ame wie gudo polo, me omi wunu nyiŋwa rwo, me kur oket wunu oko i wi lobo ducu.”" 
Genesis11:5 Kare ame Rwot oyito piny me neno boma karacel kede gedo abor ame dano ogero. 
Genesis11:6 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen, gin obedo rok acel kun okobo leb daŋ acel; man pwod en ageyi me gin a gin bino timo; cakere amanni wot kede anyim, mom tye ginnoro ame timo bino loyogi." 
Genesis11:7 Biye wunu me oyit wunu piny, me owot orurubo wunu lebgi oko, me dano acel kur niaŋ kop a ŋat ocele.”" 
Genesis11:8 Mannono te miyo Rwot ketogi oko i kuno, ote lal romo wi lobo luŋ; ote doŋ weko gero boma-nono oko." 
Genesis11:9 Mannono omio nyiŋ boma-nono ocako ni Babel, pien kannono en ame Rwot orurubo iye leb me wi lobo luŋ, dok daŋ kannono en ame Rwot okeketogi iye, ote lal romo wi lobo luŋ." 
Genesis11:10 Magi gin ikwae a Cem. Kare ame Cem doŋ oromo mwaka mia acel me dittere, onywalo Arpakcad a doŋ mwaka aryo okato ame twon pii abwal ame ocorre i wi lobo ogik." 
Genesis11:11 A doŋ en onywalo Arpakcad oko, ori mwaka mia abic, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:12 Ka Arpakcad doŋ otyeko ri mwaka pyeradek wie abic me dittere, onywalo Cela," 
Genesis11:13 Arpakcad ori mwaka mia aŋwen kede adek a doŋ otyeko nywalo Cela, dok rik daŋ omedo nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:14 Ka Cela doŋ otyeko ri mwaka pyeradek me dittere, onywalo Eber." 
Genesis11:15 Cela ori mwaka mia aŋwen kede adek a doŋ otyeko nywalo Eber, dok rik daŋ te medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:16 Ka Eber doŋ otyeko ri mwaka pyeradek wie aŋwen me dittere, onywalo Peleg." 
Genesis11:17 Eber ori mwaka mia aŋwen kede pyeradek a doŋ otyeko nywalo Peleg, dok rik daŋ te medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:18 Ka Peleg doŋ otyeko ri mwaka pyeradek me dittere, onywalo Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Peleg ori mwaka mia aryo kede aboŋwen a doŋ otyeko nywalo Reu, dok rik daŋ te medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:20 Ka Reu doŋ otyeko mwaka pyeradek wie aryo me dittere, onywalo Cerug." 
Genesis11:21 Reu ori mwaka mia aryo kede abiro a doŋ otyeko nywalo Cerug, dok rik daŋ te medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:22 Ka Cerug doŋ otyeko ri mwaka pyeradek me dittere, onywalo Nakor." 
Genesis11:23 Cerug ori mwaka mia aryo a doŋ otyeko nywalo Nakor, dok rik daŋ te medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:24 Ka Nakor doŋ otyeko mwaka pyeraryo wie aboŋwen me dittere, onywalo Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Nakor ori mwaka mia acel kede apar wie aboŋwen a doŋ otyeko nywalo Tera, dok rik daŋ te medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
Genesis11:26 Ka Tera doŋ otyeko ri mwaka pyerabiro me dittere, onywalo Abram, Nakor kede Aran." 
Genesis11:27 Magi gin ikwae a Tera. Tera onywalo Abram, Nakor kede Aran; Aran oywalo Lot." 
Genesis11:28 Aran en ate geyo toyi pappere Tera i lobo ame rik onywale iye, i paco me Ur ame paco ajo Kaldaya." 
Genesis11:29 Abram kede Nakor te nyomo mongi; dako Abram nyiŋe Carai aco dako a Nakor nyiŋe Mirika, ame en nyaka Aran pappa Mirika kede Icika." 
Genesis11:30 Carai rik oraŋa, atiŋŋere moro onwoŋo gire pe." 
Genesis11:31 Tera te tero wode Abram, kede akware Lot wot a Aran, kede ci-wode Carai, dako a Abram; gin luŋ rik ote wot karacel kun oya i Ur ame paco a jo Kaldaya me wot i lobo me Kanaan; ento ka gin otuno i Karan, koŋ ote bedo gigi kannono." 
Genesis11:32 Mwaka a Tera luŋ ame ori kede i lobo oromo mia aryo kede abic; Tera te to i Karan. 
Genesis12:1 Rwot okobbi Abram ni, “Ya oko i lobo turwu, i akina jowu, kede i ot a pappi, iwot i lobo ame an abino nyutti." 
Genesis12:2 An abino miyi idoko rok adwoŋ meicel, dok daŋ abino miyi winyo kun amio nyiŋi rwo meicel; mano bino miyo ibedo akel winyo." 
Genesis12:3 Abino miyo winyo i kom jo a lammi winyo, aco jo ame ceni acena, an daŋ abino cenogi; dok atekere me wi podo luŋ bino nwoŋo winyo piri.”" 
Genesis12:4 Abram te cako wot amannono, kit ame Rwot okobbe kede, kun Lot daŋ woto karacel kede. Abram onwoŋo doŋ mwaka me dittere oromo pyerabiro wie abic i kare ame en ya i lobo Karan." 
Genesis12:5 Abram owoto karacel i dako mere Carai, kede Lot atin ominnere, kede limgi luŋ, kede jogi luŋ ame gin onwoŋo i Karan. Gin te ero wotgi me wot i lobo Kanaan; ote tuno daŋ anaka i Kanaan." 
Genesis12:6 Abram oŋolle i dye lobo, obino naka i kabedo ame tye i Cekem, tuno anaka ite kworo me More. I kare-nono onwoŋo jo Kanaan pwod bedo i lobo-nono." 
Genesis12:7 Rwot te nen baŋ Abram kun kobbe ni, “Abino miyo lobo man baŋ ikwai.” En te cano keno me miyo lam baŋ Rwot ame onen baŋe kuno." 
Genesis12:8 En dok te dak oko i kuno, jer i lobo obedo kidi kidi ame tye tuŋ kide me Betel. En te guro kema mere kuno oweko Betel tye tuŋ to, eka Ai te bedo tuŋ kide. En te cano keno lam kuno, te kwayo Rwot." 
Genesis12:9 Abram dok te medde i wottere i nyim tutuŋ Negeb. 
Genesis12:10 Kec rik onwoŋo opoto i lobo; keccono rik onwoŋo gwa atek, ormo Abram owoto piny i Miciri eka te bedo koŋ kuno pi kare moro." 
Genesis12:11 Kare ame en doŋ ceggi donyo i Miciri, en te kobbi dako mere Cerai ni, “Nen, ba, an aŋeo ni yin ibedo dako amwonya meicel;" 
Genesis12:12 jo Miciri ka bino neni, gin bino kobo ni, ‘Man dako mere’; gin obino neka ote weki yin bedo kwo." 
Genesis12:13 Doŋ yin myero ikob ni ibedo aminna, mano bino miyo gin bedo keda aber, dok mom obino neka piri.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ka Abram odonyo i Miciri, jo Miciri oneno dako mere mwonya atek meicel." 
Genesis12:15 Kare ame otic a Parao adoŋo mege onene, opwoc meicel baŋ adwoŋgi Parao, te miyo tero Carai i ot a Parao." 
Genesis12:16 Mannono omio Parao te bedo kede Abram aber pire; Abram te nwoŋo twoni, romi, kede twoni kana, opii kede aŋeca ecipan, kede megi kana, kede inaga apipim." 
Genesis12:17 Ento Rwot te wuno Parao kede jo me ode etak i twoni too mogo a mom kobere pi Carai dako Abram. 
Genesis12:18 Omio Parao te lwoŋo Abram baŋe, te penye ni, “Itima aman piŋo? Piŋo rik mom ititta atira ni en dakoni?" 
Genesis12:19 Piŋo dok ikobo ni, ‘En aminna’ ame omio an atere obedo dakona? Aman doŋ cegi en ba! Game iwot giri doŋ oko.”" 
Genesis12:20 Parao te ciko jo mere pire, ni myero gin lwoke ewoti karacel i cege kede jami mere a rik tye baŋe luŋ." 
Genesis13:1 Abram te ya i Miciri gin i cege kede jami luŋ a rik tye baŋe me wot i Negeb; Lot daŋ onwoŋo tye karacel kede. 
Genesis13:2 I kare-nono onwoŋo Abram doŋ olony atek i dok, kede ryal, kede jabu daŋ," 
Genesis13:3 En obedo medde iwottere kun ya i Negeb, dak i Betel, kan ame en rik koŋ ogeo guro iye kema mere, ame tye i akina Betel kede Ai," 
Genesis13:4 kan ame en rik koŋ ocano iye keno me lam con. Abram te kwayo Rwot kuno. 
Genesis13:5 Lot ame onwoŋo woto karacel Abram; rik onwoŋo daŋ tye i lim akwo adoŋo kede atino mege karacel kede kema daŋ apol ata. 
Genesis13:6 Lobo rik doŋ onwoŋo mom romogi kwat ka gin aryo luŋ obedo karacel pien gin luŋ rik limgi bup meicel a mom rommigi bedo karacel. 
Genesis13:7 Okwa-lim Abram kede okwa-lim a Lot onwoŋo doŋ da meicel. I kare-nono onwoŋo jo Kanaan kede jo Periji en ame obedo i lobo-nono. 
Genesis13:8 Mannono omio Abram okobbi Lot ni, “Mom amito ni daa moro bed tye i akinawa kede i akina okwatwa, pien wan luŋ obedo jo me ot acel." 
Genesis13:9 Lobo mom gire tye omoo ata ame myero iyer moro iye? Wan myero doŋ opokere oko; ka ce yin iyero ni idok tutuŋ cam an abino dok gira tutuŋ cem, aco ka yin iyero dok tutuŋ cem, an abino dok tutuŋ cam.”" 
Genesis13:10 Lot te tiŋo waŋe malo niyo lobo luŋ ame ceggi i kulo Jordan, en te neno ni pii opoŋ iye luŋ aber meicel tuno anaka i Joar kun calo bala poto a Rwot, ame calli lobo me Miciri. Man otimere ame Rwot mom ru ojwero Codom kede Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Lot te doŋ yero gire kene lobo luŋ ame ceggi i kulo Jordan, en te wot oko tuŋ kide; gin te pokere oko kengi kengi." 
Genesis13:12 Abram odoŋ i lobo me Kanaan, ento Lot obedo i akina boma luŋ ame ceggi i kulo Jordan, eka dok te kobo kema mere tuno naka Codoma." 
Genesis13:13 Jo me Codoma rik onwoŋo jo areco, balgi rik dwoŋ okato kare i nyim Rwot." 
Genesis13:14 A doŋ Abram opokere oko kede Lot, Rwot okobbe ni, “Tiŋ waŋi malo iŋiŋio piny naka kan ame waŋi twero gik iye kun icuŋ i kakari-nono, nen tuŋ anyarodi kede tuŋ anyarolum, tuŋ kide kede tuŋ to;" 
Genesis13:15 pien lobo ame inenonono luŋ abino miyo oko baŋi kede baŋ ikwai atwal. 
Genesis13:16 Abino miyo ikwai bedo apol bala apua me lobo; me wek kwano ikwai mom twerre baŋ ŋattoro bala kwano apua me lobo. 
Genesis13:17 Koŋ i ya iwot iloŋ lobo-ni, inen borrere kede laccere, pien abino miyo oko baŋi.”" 
Genesis13:18 Pi mannono Abram te kobo kema mere, dak oko naka i ŋet kworo me Mamre ame ceggi kede Kebron. En dok te cano keno me miyo lam baŋ Rwot kuno." 
Genesis14:1 Kare Amrapel rwot me Cinar, kede Ariok rwot me Ellacar, kede Kedor-loamer rwot me Elam, kede Tidal rwot me Goim," 
Genesis14:2 rwode magi luŋ rik ote notte me lweny i kom Bera, rwot me Codom, kede Birca rwot me Gomora, kede Cinad rwot me Adma, kede Comeber rwot me Jeboim, kede rwot me Bela (ame en Joar)." 
Genesis14:3 Jo-ni luŋ rik ote notte me lweny i luŋ me Ciddim (ame en Nam me kado). 
Genesis14:4 Gin-ni luŋ rik obedo i te loc a Kedor-laomer mwakki apar wie aryo, ento ote jem oko i mwaka me apar wie adekkere." 
Genesis14:5 I mwaka me apar wie aŋwennere, Kedor-loamer karacel kede rwode ame onwoŋo rik onotte kede, te dok bino ero lweny, ote loyo jo Repa i Acitero-Karnaim kede jo me Julin i Kam, kede jo Emin i Ceve-Kariataim," 
Genesis14:6 kede jo me Kori i kidigi me Cer, tuno naka i El-paran i waŋ apokki ame ceggi i tim." 
Genesis14:7 Kare ame man otum, gin te lokere dwogo cen, ote wot naka i En-minipat (ame en Kadec), gin te loyo lobo ducu me a jo Amalek, kede jo me Amor daŋ, ame bedo i Kajajon-tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Icennere doki rwot me Codoma, kede rwot me Gomora, kede rwot me Adma, kede rwot me Jeboim, kede rwot me Bela (ame en Joar), ote wot ero lweny i luŋ me Ciddin," 
Genesis14:9 Oero i kom Kedor-laomer rwot me Alam, kede Tidal rwot me Goim, kede Amrapel rwot me Cinar, kede Ariok rwot me Ellacar; rwode magi aŋwen onotte karacel me lweny i kom rwode abic." 
Genesis14:10 Luŋ me Ciddim onwoŋo rik tye iye burrogo me odok acol. Kare ame rwode me Codoma kede Gomora oriŋo oko, jogi ocele mege te rette i bure-nono, jo odoŋŋege te riŋo laro wi kidi." 
Genesis14:11 Okwor te yako jo Codoma kede Gomora ducu karacel kede camgi, ote ciro wot gigi kede." 
Genesis14:12 Rik ote mako daŋ Lot ame obedo atin omin Abram ame rik bedo i Codoma kun oyako daŋ jami mere luŋ owoto kede. 
Genesis14:13 Cite dano moro acel ame obwot, te riŋo kelo kop man baŋ Abram ame en dano me Eburania a rik bedo i ŋet kworo me Mamre; lo a rik obedo dano me Amor, ominna Ecikol kede Aner, jonnono luŋ rik owoto ocikere me notte kede Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Ka Abram owinyo ni atin ominnere mony omako otero oko, en obelo monnyere, te telo wi jo ame onywalo i paco mere ame opwonyo i lweny, jo ame romo mia adek kede apar wie aboro ote lubo yorgi naka i Dan." 
Genesis14:15 Abram kede monnyere te cobogi dyewor kun ogurogi tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, ote twarogi, ryemogi tuno naka i Koba ame tye tuŋ cam me Damaciko." 
Genesis14:16 Gin te yako limgi luŋ dwogo kede, ote mayo daŋ Lot atin omin Abram oko kede jami mere luŋ, kede mon, kede jo ocele daŋ." 
Genesis14:17 A doŋ Abram odwogo i kan ame en oloo iye Kador-laomer kede rwode luŋ ame rik onotte kede, rwot me Codoma rik te wot me rwatte kede i luŋ me waŋa yo i luŋ me Cave (ame en luŋ abaka)" 
Genesis14:18 kan ame Melkijedek rwot me Calem okelo iye ogati kede koŋo olok; en rik onwoŋo alamdog Obaŋa Amalo Meicel. 
Genesis14:19 Rik en te lammi Abram winyo kun kobo ni, “Obaŋa Amalo Meicel ame oketo polo kede lobo myero mi Abram winyo!" 
Genesis14:20 Myero pwo Obaŋa Amalo Meicel, ame omio okwor i ciŋi!” Abram te miye acel me apar me jami eyako luŋ i baŋ okwor." 
Genesis14:21 Rwot me Codoma te dok kobo ni, “An luny miya ka jo ame imao, yin giriter jami luŋ bed megi.”" 
Genesis14:22 Ento Abram te dok iye ni, “An doŋ atyeko kwoŋ oko baŋ Rwot Obaŋa Amalo Meicel, ame oketo polo kede lobo," 
Genesis14:23 ni mom dok abino gamo ginnoro dwogo baŋa, kadi atin uci del amukkoro, me kur ibed kobo ni, ‘Amio Abram olony.’" 
Genesis14:24 Mom dok abino medo gamo ginnoro pira kono ka gin ame jona ocamo, kede dul lim ame apokki jo ame owoto keda-ni; wek Aner, kede Ecikol kede Mamre ter meggi.”" 
Genesis15:1 A doŋ man otum, Rwot dok te nyuto baŋ Abram koppere kun kobo ni, “Kur ilwor, Abram, an abino bedo kwotti, abino miyi mot adwoŋ meicel.”" 
Genesis15:2 Ento Abram te gamo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, ŋo kara ame ibino miya? Nen anaka atinna moro daŋ pwod pe, ale oda bino bedo Eliezer me Damaciko.” Abram te dok medo ni," 
Genesis15:3 “Nen, yin mom ru imia atinnoro; amiro ame onywalo i oda en ame bino leyo oda.”" 
Genesis15:4 Kop a Rwot te bino baŋe ni, “Mom dano-ni gire en ame bino leyo, ento wodi ikome en ame bino leyo odi.”" 
Genesis15:5 Te kelo Abram oko, te kobbe ni, “Koŋ inen polo, kwan wel acer, nen ka iromo kwano welgi ityeko!” Te medo kobbe ni, “Ikwai daŋ bino bedo apol amannono.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abram te medde kede iyee mere i kom Rwot; omio ote kwane ni kite atira. 
Genesis15:7 Dok te kobbe ni, “An a Rwot ame okeli i boma me Ur ame tye i lobo a jo Kaldaya, me miyi loboni bed megi.”" 
Genesis15:8 Abram ogamo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, kara atwero ŋeyo nino ni lobo-ni bino bedo mega?”" 
Genesis15:9 Okobbe ni, “Kella atin roa moro me mwaka adek, kede akale dyelloro me mwaka adek, kede nyok romo me mwaka adek, kede atin awele, kede amam.”" 
Genesis15:10 En te ke lo jami-nono luŋ baŋe, te nununo yigi oko aryo kun poko acel atira i dul aryo, eka te canogi kun dul acel acel tenne kede awottere, ento winy mom te nuno yigi." 
Genesis15:11 Ka acut obino me camogi, Abram ryemogi oko." 
Genesis15:12 Otyeno ame cen doŋ ceggi donyo, nino te mako waŋ Abram atek meicel. Lworo omake twon pinnyoro acol icuc te wume oko." 
Genesis15:13 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Myero iŋe ateni ni, ikwai bino bedo wele i lobo a mom meggi; dok obino miyogi odoko opii kuno eka ote wunogi pi mwakki mia aŋwen." 
Genesis15:14 Cite an abino ŋolo kop i kom rok ame bino wunoginono, icennere gin bino ya wot oko i kuno kun otye i lwak lim apipim." 
Genesis15:15 Aco yin giri ibino buto karacel i kwarini i kuc, obino yiki ame doŋ iteggo aber abera." 
Genesis15:16 Ikwai ame obino nywalo, ame gin lwagi me aŋwennere, gin bino dwogo kan, pien bal a jo Amor mom ru romma ke to can i komgi.”" 
Genesis15:17 Otyeno ame ceŋ doŋ opo to, piny doŋ odoko acol oko, gulu ame yito aduny iye kede mac ame alyel i rao te bea i dye riŋo ame onununo ca," 
Genesis15:18 Ninonono en ame Rwot oketo iye cikere mere kede Abram, kun kobo ni, “Amio lobo man baŋ ikwai, cakere i kulo me Miciri tuno anaka i kulo adwoŋ ame en kulo me Efurat." 
Genesis15:19 Lobo a jo Keni, kede jo Keniji, kede jo Kadmon," 
Genesis15:20 kede jo Kitti, jo Periji kede jo Repa," 
Genesis15:21 kede jo Amor, kede jo Kanaan, kede jo Girgac, kede jo Jebuc.”" 
Genesis16:1 Carai dako Abram onwoŋo mom onywalle atinnoro. En rik onwoŋo tye kede aŋeca mere ame nyiŋe Agar, nyako me Miciri." 
Genesis16:2 Carai rik te kobbi Abram ni, “Nen, an Rwot mom omia anywalo atinnoro, yin myero iwot idony baŋ aŋecana, me atot ya nywalliwa atinnoro.” Abram daŋ te ye kop ame cege akobo," 
Genesis16:3 Carai dako Abram te tero aŋeca mere Agar, nyako me Miciri, te miyo baŋ cware Abram me bed dako mere. Man otimere i kare ame Abram doŋ onwoŋo obedo mwaka apar i Kanaan." 
Genesis16:4 Abram daŋ te cako bedo kede Agar, eka te yac oko. A doŋ en oneno ni etye kede yic, te ero acae oko i kom dako adwoŋ Carai kun ŋe ŋe i wan arac," 
Genesis16:5 Eka Carai te kobbi Abram ni, “Rac ame otimere i koma bed gire i wii. An rik amio aŋecana i kori, aman ka en doŋ oneno ni eyac, te ero caya kun ŋe na i waŋ arac. Rwot doŋ ŋol kop i akina an kede yin.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abram te gamo dog Carai ni, “Nen ba, aŋecani tye i te locci, yin giri tim gin ame yii mito I kome.” Carai te bedo wuno aŋeca atek meicel, omio te riŋo oko." 
Genesis16:7 Amalaika a Rwot te nwoŋe i ŋet waŋ pii ame tye i tim, en waŋ pii ame tye i yo ame woto i Cur." 
Genesis16:8 Eka te penye ni, “Agar we, aŋeca a Carai, kara iya i kwene? Iwot kwene?” En te gamo ni, “An kom ariŋo Carai, dako ame onwoŋo loa, ame abedo baŋe.”" 
Genesis16:9 Amalaika a Rwot te kobbe ni, “Yin dok baŋ dako ame loi-nono, miye ite loccere." 
Genesis16:10 Abino miyo ikwai nya, doko apol meicel, ame kwanogi bino loyo jo oko, pi polgi." 
Genesis16:11 Nen ba, yin iyac, ibino nywalo atin awobi, ibino cako nyiŋe Icmael; pien Rwot doŋ ociko yite i kom canni." 
Genesis16:12 En bino bedo acalli kana me tim. En bino bedo ager ame ryeo ciŋe i kom dano ducu, dok jo luŋ bino ryeyo ciŋgi i kome. En bino bedo kun dagere omego mere ducu.”" 
Genesis16:13 Agar te cako nyiŋ Obaŋa ame okobo kede kuno ni, “Yin Obaŋa ame neno;” pien okobo ni, “An kara ateteni aneno Obaŋa ame ŋe na kare luŋ.”" 
Genesis16:14 Mannono omio ocako nyiŋ waŋ pii-nono ni Beer-lakairoi, tye i akina Kadec kede Bered." 
Genesis16:15 Agar te nywalli Abram atin awobi. Abram te cako nyiŋ wode ame Agar onywalo ni Icmael. 
Genesis16:16 Abram onwoŋo doŋ mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraboro wie abicel i kare ame Agar onywalo iye atin baŋ Abram. 
Genesis17:1 A doŋ Abram oromo mwaka pyeraboŋwen wie aboŋwen me dittere, Rwot dok te nen baŋ Abram, te kobbe ni, “An Obaŋa ame Won Twer Ducu. Wot i nyima aboŋo balloro," 
Genesis17:2 cite abino keto cikerena wan kedi, dok abino miyi inya meicel.”" 
Genesis17:3 Abram oryebere piny eka Obaŋa te kobbe ni," 
Genesis17:4 “Nen ba, cikerena kedi bino bedo kit man, yin ibino doko kwaro a rok apol meicel." 
Genesis17:5 Cakere tin nyiŋi doŋ mom bino bedo Abram, ento bino bedo Iburaim, pien doŋ aketi me doko kwaro a rok apol." 
Genesis17:6 Abino miyo ikwai nya atek meicel, dok abino miyo idoko rok apol, rwode adoŋodoŋo daŋ bino ya i komi." 
Genesis17:7 Abino moko cikerena wan kedi, karacel kede ikwai ame bino lubi icennere, kede ikwaegi daŋ luŋ nakanaka, me bed cikere ame perakino atwal, me an abed Obaŋawu, yin kede ikwai ame bino lubi." 
Genesis17:8 Dok lobo ame ibedo iye acalo welo-ni, ame en lobo Kanaan luŋ, abino miyo baŋi kede baŋ ikwai ame bino lubi, me bed meggi atwal; dok an abino bedo Obaŋagi.”" 
Genesis17:9 Obaŋa dok te kobbi Iburaim ni, “Aco yin ba, myero igwok cikerena, yin kede ikwai ame bino lubi luŋ aluŋa." 
Genesis17:10 Cikerena ame ibino gwoko, ame bino bedo i akina wan kedi, kede ikwai ame bino lubi, en ene: Itino awobe luŋ ame tye i akinawu obino lirogi oko." 
Genesis17:11 Obino liro del komgi me co, me bed gin ame nyuto cikerena ame tye i akina an kede wun." 
Genesis17:12 Atin ame ico ka oromo nino aboro obino liro del kome me co; co ducu i akina ikwai obino lirogi. Cakere i kom itino ame onywalo i odi, tuno kede i kom itino ame iwilo awila kede lim i baŋ rok ocele, ame mom onywalogi i akina ikwai." 
Genesis17:13 Gin luŋ obino lirogi, co ame onywalo i odi, anaka en ame iwilo awila kede lim; me cikerena bed i del komwu me co nakanaka." 
Genesis17:14 Ico moro ame mom oliro del kome me co waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi, pien onwoŋo en oturo cikerena.”" 
Genesis17:15 Obaŋa dok te kobbi Iburaim ni, “Aco dakoni Carai nyiŋe mom dok bino bedo Carai, ento nyiŋe doŋ bino bedo Cara." 
Genesis17:16 An abino miye winyo, dok abino miyo nywalli atin awobi. Abino miye winyo, en bino doko tota a rok apol meicel, rwode adoŋodoŋo me rok apol daŋ bino ya i kome.”" 
Genesis17:17 Cite Iburaim oryebere piny i nyime te nyero kun kobo i cunye ni, “Dano ame mwaka me dittere doŋ romo mia acel twal, dok pwod bino nywalo atin awobi? Cara daŋ mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraboŋwen twal, dok pwod twero nywalo atin?”" 
Genesis17:18 Mannono omio Iburaim okobo baŋ Obaŋa ni, “Icmael gire en a doa myero bed kwo i nyimi!”" 
Genesis17:19 Obaŋa te dokke iye ni, “Pe gire amannono, ento dakoni Cara en ame bino nywalo atin ico, dok ibino cako nyiŋe Icaka, dok abino moko cikerena kede me bed cikere ame bino ri nakanaka baŋ ikwae luŋ ame bino lube." 
Genesis17:20 Aco kwacci pi Icmael, atyeko winyo, nen ba, abino miye winyo, abino miyo en nywal, nya apol meicel. Abino miyo en nywalo oloc apar wie aryo, dok daŋ abino miyo en bedo rok adwoŋ." 
Genesis17:21 Ento abino moko cikerena kede Icaka, atin ame Cara en abino nywalli i kodi kare acalo man mwaka a bino.”" 
Genesis17:22 Kare ame doŋ otyeko kop kede, Obaŋa te ya gire oko i baŋ Iburaim, te dok malo." 
Genesis17:23 Iburaim te tero Icmael karacel kede lwak opii luŋ ame onywalo i ode, kede ame owilo awila i lim; itino a co luŋ ame tye i akina itino ame tye i ot Iburaim, te liro del komgi me co oko i nino-nono ikome, kite acalo Obaŋa ocike kede." 
Genesis17:24 Iburaim oliro del kome me co i kare ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraboŋwen wie aboŋwen. 
Genesis17:25 Aco wode Icmael onwoŋo doŋ mwaka me dittere tye apar wie adek i kare ame oliro del kome me co. 
Genesis17:26 Iburaim kede wode Icmael oliro del komgi i nino-nono ikome," 
Genesis17:27 karacel kede jo luŋ a rik tye i ode. Itino ame onywalo i ode kede jo ame owilo awila kede lim i baŋ rok ocele, gin daŋ olirogi karacel kede." 
Genesis18:1 Rwot dok te nen baŋ Iburaim i te kworo ame tye i Mamre kun onwoŋo en obedo i dog kema mere i kare ame piny lyet. 
Genesis18:2 Iburaim otiŋo waŋe malo te neno jo adek tye ocuŋ i nyime. Ka onenogi oriŋo kun ya i dog kema mere, te wot rwatte kedgi, te ryebere piny," 
Genesis18:3 kun kobo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, ka ce doŋ berra onen i nyimi, myero kur doŋ ikat an amironi akata." 
Genesis18:4 Koŋ iwek kelliwu pii moro atitidi me ilwok wunu i tyenwu, eka ite koŋ we wunu i te yat man." 
Genesis18:5 Awot koŋ kelliwu ogati moro me idwok wunu i lao ite kato giwu; kite a doŋ ibino wunu baŋ amirowu-ni.” Gin te gamo doge ni, “Wot itim kite ame ikobo-nono.”" 
Genesis18:6 Iburaim te ru wot oko baŋ Cara i kema, te kobbe ni, “Juk moko apwottere ame romo dita adek, ijeb, me ited kede capattoro atitino.”" 
Genesis18:7 Eka Iburaim te riŋo iyi awi, te kwanyo atin twon etobayit ame riŋo mere pwod yom dok mit, te miyo baŋ awo be mere, awobe mere te ru yiko oko oyotoyot." 
Genesis18:8 Iburaim te tero cak awac kede en alepa, kede riŋo ame doŋ otedo oko, eka te ke to i nyimgi; en te cuŋ i laŋetgi ite kworo kuno pi konyogi, kun gin tye acem." 
Genesis18:9 Gin te penye ni, “Dakoni Cara kara tye kwene?” En ogamo ni, “En tye i kema.”" 
Genesis18:10 En te kobo ni, “Abino dwogo baŋi i kare me cwir, dakoni Cara te nywalo wode.” Cara onwoŋo tye i ŋec i dog kema kun awinyo kopgi." 
Genesis18:11 I karenono onwoŋo doŋ mwaka Iburaim kede Cara me ditogi dwoŋ; dok Cara daŋ onwoŋo mom doŋ two two me dwe bala mon wadgi. 
Genesis18:12 Man omio Cara onyere kene kene kun kobo ni, “En ame doŋ ati rom man-ni, kara pwod dok abino nwoŋo yomcuny?”" 
Genesis18:13 Rwot te kobbi Iburaim ni, “Cara kara onyero piŋo kun kobo ni, ‘An kara dok abino nywalo atin aman doŋ ati oko-ni?’" 
Genesis18:14 Tye ginnoro ame loo Rwot? Ka kare oromo, an abino dwogo dok kan i cwir. Cara te nywalo wode.”" 
Genesis18:15 Cite Cara te kwero oko pi lworo kun kobo ni, “An gira mom anyero.” Ogamo doge ni, “Pe, me nyero inyero gire.”" 
Genesis18:16 Kare ame jo-nono ocako ya oko i kuno, gin otiko yo a dok tutuŋ Codoma, eka Iburaim te lwokogi iyo," 
Genesis18:17 Rwot te tamo ni, “An myero amuŋŋi Iburaim gin ame awot tiyo oko?" 
Genesis18:18 Aco kun en Iburaim bino doko rok adwoŋ atek, ame rok luŋ me wi lobo bino nwoŋo winyo pire." 
Genesis18:19 Pe gire, an doŋ atyeko yere oko, pi mannono, myero en doŋ pwony itino mere kede jo me ode ame bino lube, me bedo jo a wapo yo a Rwot kun otio gin atye atira dok daŋ oŋolo kop atira; me wek icennere Rwot cob gin a rik ociko baŋ Iburaim.”" 
Genesis18:20 Rwot doŋ te kobbi Iburaim ni, “Koko i kom Codoma kede Gomora doŋ akato kare oko, dok balgi doŋ dwon atek;" 
Genesis18:21 abino wot kuno me awot anen ka ce kit koko ame awinyo i komgi-ni tye ka timere ateni; amito ŋeyo.” 
Genesis18:22 Jo-naca doŋ te cako wotgi i Codoma, ento Iburaim omedde cun i nyim Rwot." 
Genesis18:23 Icennere Iburaim te noko ceggi, te kobo ni, “Yin ateni ibino tyeko jo a kitegi atira karacel i jo areco?" 
Genesis18:24 Ka kono jo a kitegi atira bino nwoŋere i boma-nono pyerabic, ibino tyekoboma-nono oko, mom ibino wekoboma-nono pi jo pyerabic ame kitegi atira a tye iye-nono?" 
Genesis18:25 Pe amannono gire! Yin pe myero itim kittono, neko jo a kitegi atira karacel obalo kun imio jo a kitegi atira bedo rom aroma i jo obalo. Pe amannono! Aŋolkop me lobo luŋ mom doŋ bino ŋolo kop atira bo?”" 
Genesis18:26 Rwot te gamo ni, “Ka ce abino nwoŋo jo a kitegi atira pyerabic i Codoma, ame bedo i bomanono, abino weko kabedo-nono luŋ pirgi.”" 
Genesis18:27 Iburaim dok te gamo ni, “Nen, an kom a pua kede buru keken-ni, ento amiye gira doŋ oko me kop kedi yin Rwot." 
Genesis18:28 Ka kono bino rem jo abic kono me romo pyerabic? Ibino tyekoboma-nono oko pi abic ame orem-mi?” Ogamo ni, “An mom abino tyeko ka kono anwoŋo jo pyeraŋwen wie abic tye kuno.”" 
Genesis18:29 Dok omedo penyo ni, “Ka kono inwoŋo jo pyeraŋwen keken kono?” Ogamo ni, “Pi jo pyeraŋwen-ni, mom abino timo ginnoro iye.”" 
Genesis18:30 Dok omedo kobo ni, “Akemo kur maki ba, Rwot, an pwod amedo kop kedi. Ka kono i bino nwoŋo jo pyeradek kono?” En ogamo ni, “Ka abino nwoŋo jo pyeradek kuno; mom abino timo ginnoro.”" 
Genesis18:31 Iburaim dok okobo ni, “Nen an amiye gira doŋ me kop kedi, yin Rwot. Ka kono ibino nwoŋo jo pyeraryo kuno kono?” Ogamo ni, “Pi jo pyeraryo-nu, mom abino tyekobomanono.”" 
Genesis18:32 Iburaim dok okobo ni, “Akemo kur maki ba, Rwot, an doŋ akop kedi tyen acel keken. Ka kono ibino nwoŋo jo apar keken kono kuno?” Rwot ogamo ni, “Pi jo aparrono mom abino tyekoboma-nono.”" 
Genesis18:33 A doŋ Rwot otyeko kop oko gin Iburaim, te wot oko; Iburaim daŋ te dok i kabedo mere." 
Genesis19:1 Omalaika aryo otuno Codoma otyeno adoŋ piny oyuto oko, gin onwoŋo Lot obedo piny i dog boma me Codoma. Kare ame Lot onenogi, oya malo te wot jologi, te ryebere piny worogi." 
Genesis19:2 Okobo ni, “Odoŋena, tim wunu ber ibin wunu i oda an amirowu, ibut wunu iye, ilwok tyenwu; odiko ite medde giwu i wotwu.” Gin te kwero oko kun okobo ni, “Pe gire amannono; wan piny bino ruyiwa i dye boma kan.”" 
Genesis19:3 Lot te diyogi atek meicel, omio gin te ye, ote donyo i ode. En te teddigi arama, kede ogati ame mom orubo i tobi, eka gin te camo." 
Genesis19:4 Cite ame mom ru gin obu to, co me Codoma ecipan, awobe kede jo adoŋo daŋ, te gwarre luŋ aluŋa bino guro ot a Lot oko." 
Genesis19:5 Gin te penyo Lot ni, “Jo ame obino baŋi otyeno ni tye kwene? Kelgi oko baŋwa kan me obut kedgi.”" 
Genesis19:6 Lot te donyo baŋgi oko, te lokere cego doggola oko," 
Genesis19:7 te kobbigi ni, “Omegona, akwaowu, kur itim wunu tim araccono." 
Genesis19:8 Nen an atye kede anyirana aryo ame mom ru oribere kede ico moro, wek aluny kelogi baŋwu me itimgi wunu kite a yiwu amito; cite kur itim wunu ginnoro i kom jo man, pien gin doŋ odonyo oko i oda.”" 
Genesis19:9 Gin odok iye ni, “Jer teŋe lo-ni!” Dok ote medo kobo ni, “Lo-ni obino kan acalo welo, en dok mito doko aŋolkop bo! Ŋit imio otimi rac ak atogi.” Gin luŋ ote nyiggo baŋ Lot ikome, ote diye atek kun otorre karacel ame omito turo-kika me doggola oko." 
Genesis19:10 Cite omalaika te cwayo ciŋgi wayo Lot oko ke lo baŋgi i ot, eka ote ce go doggola oko." 
Genesis19:11 Gin te miyo waŋ jo i doggola luŋ to oko, jo adoŋo kede awo be daŋ, waŋgi te to oko. Gin te bedo babaŋa ababaŋ me yenyo doggola, ote ol oko." 
Genesis19:12 Omalaika te kobbi Lot ni, “Tye dok wati moro ocele kan? Cog anyirani, itinoni awobe kede anyira, onyo nauoro ame tye i paco kan, ya kedgi oko i kabedo man." 
Genesis19:13 Wan doŋ oyikere me tyek o boma man oko, pien jo iye, koko i komgi doŋ dwoŋ okato kare i nyim Rwot. Rwot doŋ ocwaowa me tyeko oko.”" 
Genesis19:14 Man omio Lot owoto olwoŋo awobe ame rik anyomo anyira mere kun kobbigi ni, “Ya wunu oko i kabedo man, pien Rwot atyekoboma man oko.” Cite jo-nono otamo ni en arate kedgi arata." 
Genesis19:15 Kare ame piny doŋ oru, omalaika odio Lot kun kobo ni “Ya malo, iter dakoni kede anyirani aryo ame tye kan, me gin kur to i can ame aketo i kom boma man.”" 
Genesis19:16 Cite en te bedo gal, ento Rwot obedo kede kica i komgi, omio amalaika te mako ciŋgi, en kede dako mere kede anyira mere aryo, te peyogi, kelogi naka i ŋe boma oko," 
Genesis19:17 Adoŋ gin okelogi oko, ocikogi ni, “Riŋ wunu me ilar wunu kwowu; ŋattoro myero kur lokere nen ŋec ba, daŋ kur igik wunu kannoro i luŋ-ŋi, ento riŋ ilar wunu wi kidi, me kur ito wunu.”" 
Genesis19:18 Lot te gamo ni, “Pe amannono odoŋena!" 
Genesis19:19 Nen, berra an amironi doŋ onen i nyimi, yin daŋ doŋ itima kica meicel pi laro kwena. Ento mom myero alar wi kidi, mio gin arac-ci dok maka te neka oko." 
Genesis19:20 Nen boma ame ceggi ca tye loka tuŋ ca, boma-nono daŋ gire titidi, bino miyo abwot.”" 
Genesis19:21 Omalaika te dok iye ni, “Nen ba, kwaeci-nono doŋ aye, mom doŋ abino rero boma ame ikobo-nono." 
Genesis19:22 Cite myero iru riŋo ilar kuno, pien mom atwero limo ginnoro ka yin mom ru ituno kuno.” Mannono en omio ocako nyiŋ paco-nono ni Joar." 
Genesis19:23 Lot te tuno i Joar odiko ame ceŋ doŋ adonyo. 
Genesis19:24 Rwot te onyo mac kede gweŋ calufa ame mac olio, kun ya i polo, te miyo corre i Codoma kede Gomora," 
Genesis19:25 eka te reto boma-nono ducu kede luŋ ducu ame tye iye, anaka jo kede ginapita luŋ ame onwoŋo tye iye." 
Genesis19:26 Ento dako a Lot ame rik onwoŋo odoŋ ceŋ i ŋe, olokere te neno yo ŋe, omio te makere doko kado, te cuŋ oko ikiŋ." 
Genesis19:27 Iburaim te dilo odiko con, te wot kan a rik ecuŋ iye i nyim Rwot." 
Genesis19:28 En te neno tutuŋ Codoma kede Gomora kede lobo luŋ ame tye i luŋ kuno, en te neno yito tye aduny kuno balo yito mac arum." 
Genesis19:29 Kare ame Obaŋa Teloboma ducu ame tye i luŋ, en opo pi Iburaim, eka te laro Lot i kare ame en tye areto boma luŋ ame rik Lot bedo iye." 
Genesis19:30 Lot rik te bino ya oko i Joar, te wot bedo i wi kidi kede anyira mere aryo, pien onwoŋo lworo bedo i Joar. En obedo i gorogoro kidi karacel kede anyira mere aryo ca." 
Genesis19:31 Nyare me kao te kobbi aminnere atidi ni, “Papawa doŋ oti oko, lonnoro daŋ doŋ mom i lobo ame kono ribere kedwa acalo kite me lobo tye." 
Genesis19:32 Biye, omi papawa mat koŋo olok, me ote miye buto kedwa, wek en papawa miwa onywal itino.”" 
Genesis19:33 Gin daŋ ote miyo papagi mato koŋo olok dyeworrono. Nyako me kao en ate miyo pappere geyo buto kede, ento kun pappere mom oŋeo kare ame en obuto kede i laŋete kede kare me ya mere." 
Genesis19:34 Odiko ocele nyako me kao te kobbi en atidi ni, “Nen ba, an aworo be amio pappa obuto keda dyewor; tin dok omie koŋo olok me yin daŋ imie ebut kedi, me wek en papawa nywal kedwa wan aryo ducu.”" 
Genesis19:35 Dyeworrono, gin dok te miyo papagi koŋo olok, eka nyako atidi daŋ te wot miyo pappere buto kede, ento kun pappere daŋ mom oŋeo kare ame en obuto kede i laŋete kede kare me ya mere." 
Genesis19:36 Anyira a Lot aryo-nu te yac oko i papagi. 
Genesis19:37 Nyako adwoŋŋere te nywalo wode, ame te cako nyiŋe ni Moab, ame en kwaro a jo Moab naka tin" 
Genesis19:38 Nyako atidi daŋ te nywalo awobi, te cako nyiŋe Ben-ammi, ame en kwaro ajo Ammon naka atot tin." 
Genesis20:1 Iburaim oya i kuno te wot tutuŋ Negeb, te bedo i akina Kadec kede Cur, te bedo koŋ pi mwakki mogo i Gerar." 
Genesis20:2 Iburaim te cako kop i kom Cara ame onwoŋo cege ni, “En aminna”; pi mannono Abimereki ame onwoŋo rwot me Gerar omio okelo Cara baŋe." 
Genesis20:3 Ento i dyeworrono Obaŋa te bino baŋ Abimereki i waŋ lek, te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, yin doŋ i dano ame ito oko pi dako ame ikelo-ni, pien cware tye.”" 
Genesis20:4 Kare-nono onwoŋo Abimereki mom ru oribere kede, omio en te kobo ni, “Rwot, ibino neko jo a mom i balloro?" 
Genesis20:5 Nen, en ikome okobo ni ‘En aminna’. Dako daŋ okobo ni, ‘En ominna.’ Man an gira atimo kun yia cil, ciŋa daŋ balloro mom iye.”" 
Genesis20:6 Obaŋa te dokke iye i lek ni, “An aŋeo ni itimo man kun yi gire cil, an daŋ ageni oko me kur itim balloro baŋa: man en gin omio mom aye igude kadi acel." 
Genesis20:7 Aman doŋ dwok dako-nono oko baŋ cware. Dano-nono obedo adwarpiny, en bino kwaya piri me wek ibwot i to. Ento ka ce yin mom idwoko dakonono, yin karacel kede joni luŋ ibino to wunu oko.”" 
Genesis20:8 Mannono omio Abimereki odilo odiko con te lwoŋo omiro mere luŋ, eka te tittigi kop ducu. Gin luŋ ote bedo i lworo atek meicel." 
Genesis20:9 Abimereki olwoŋo Iburaim te penye ni, “Omio itimowa aman kono? Aballi ŋo kara, omio yin ite kelo bal adwoŋ rom man i koma kede i kom locca? Gin ame yin itimo i koma mom romo atima kadi acelloro.”" 
Genesis20:10 Abimereki te medo kobo ni, “Rik kara onwoŋo itamo ŋo omio ite timo man?”" 
Genesis20:11 Iburaim te gamo ni, “Gin omio atimo amannono, pien onwoŋo an atamo ni jo me kabedo man mom lworo Obaŋa, gin bino neka oko pi dakona." 
Genesis20:12 Kono ateni mere, en obedo aminna, wan kede papo acel, ento totowa mom acel, ento en odoko cega." 
Genesis20:13 Kare ame Obaŋa doŋ omio aya oko i ot a pappa ate cako loŋo piny, an akobbe ni, ‘Man en yo ame itwero nyuto kede mari i koma, i kabedo luŋ ame wan obino wot iye, yin myero ikob ni an abedo ominni.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abimereki te miyo Iburaim rommi, dok, opii ame co kede ame mon, me mot; te daŋ dwoko dako mere Cara." 
Genesis20:15 Abimereki te kobo ni, “Lobona obedo gire megi ame itwero yero kannoro keken iye, ite bedo kan ame yii mito.”" 
Genesis20:16 Te kobbi Cara ni, “Nen, amio doŋ ominni cekel me ryal ame romo tutumia, me culo kit cannoro luŋ ame otimere i komi; cite yin giri naka mom itimo balloro.”" 
Genesis20:17 Iburaim te kwayo Obaŋa, Obaŋa te cano Abimereki kede dako mere, karacel kede aŋeca mege luŋ, te miyogi nywalo itino." 
Genesis20:18 Rwot onwoŋo omio dako acel acel ame tye i ot Abimereki omwato oko pi Cara dako Iburaim. 
Genesis21:1 Rwot dok te limo Cara acalo rik en okobo, Rwot daŋ te timo Cara acalo rik ociko." 
Genesis21:2 Cara oyac te nywalli Iburaim atin ico kun onwoŋo en rik doŋ oti oko, kite a rik Obaŋa ocike kede-ni." 
Genesis21:3 Iburaim te cako nyiŋ wode ame onywalo ni Icaka. 
Genesis21:4 Kare ame Icaka doŋ oromo nino aboro me dittere, Iburaim olire oko kite a rik Obaŋa ocike kede." 
Genesis21:5 Mwaka Iburaim me dittere onwoŋo doŋ oromo mia acel i kare ame en nywalo wode Icaka. 
Genesis21:6 Cara te kobo ni, “Obaŋa omio anyero, anaka ŋat ame bino winyo daŋ bino nyera." 
Genesis21:7 Ŋa ame yam koŋ okobbi Iburaim ni Cara waŋŋoro doto atin? Nen ka doŋ onywalli Iburaim atin awobi ame doŋ en oti oko-ni.” 
Genesis21:8 Atin odoŋo eka ote ryemo oko i cak. Iburaim rik te tedo arama adwoŋ meicel i nino me ryemo Icaka i cak. 
Genesis21:9 Cara ka oneno wot a Agar, nya jo Miciri ame rik Iburaim onywal kede tye atuko atinnere Icaka," 
Genesis21:10 en okobbi Iburaim ni, “Ryem aŋeca-ni wot karacel i wode, pien wot aŋeca-ni mom bino leyo jamiwa karacel i woda Icaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Kop man owaŋo cuny Iburaim atek, pi wode." 
Genesis21:12 Ento Obaŋa te kobbi Iburaim ni “Cunyi kur waŋ pi atinni kede aŋecani; ginnoro luŋ ame Cara okobo, yin lubi i kite ame en okobo kede, pien itino Icaka en ame obino cwano ni ikwaeni." 
Genesis21:13 Wot aŋeca daŋ abino miyo doko rok, pien en daŋ obedo atinni.”" 
Genesis21:14 Iburaim te dilo odiko con, kwanyo kwon kede pii ame opiko iyi opoko, omio Agar, eka te lwoke, tere iyo; ocibo jami kede atin i wi gwok Agar, te doŋ cike. Agar te wot bedo loŋo tim me Beer-ceba." 
Genesis21:15 Kare ame doŋ pii a rik tye i opoko otum oko, Agar opyelo atinnere piny i te yat," 
Genesis21:16 te weko gire kannono, te wot bedo kannabor i nyim, ya i baŋ atin tuno kan ame en obedo iye borrere rom i kan ame dano twero bayo atero te gik iye; pien en onwoŋo okobo ni, “Mom myero anen kite ame atinna ato kede.” En gire te bedo i nyim kan ame ebedo iye pinnyaca, ento atin te ero delle oko i koko," 
Genesis21:17 Obaŋa te winyo koko atin, amalaika a Rwot te lwoŋo Agar i polo kun kobbe ni, “Agar we, kara ŋo awuni? Wek lworo bedi, pien Obaŋa doŋ otyeko winyo koko atin i kan ame ipyelo iye." 
Genesis21:18 Myero doŋ iya malo, i wot itin atiŋ, kwake aber i ciŋi, pien abino miyo en doko rok adwoŋ.”" 
Genesis21:19 Obaŋa te yabo waŋ Agar, en te neno akoŋ, te wot twomo pii piko iyi opoko poŋ kwic, te miyo wode mato." 
Genesis21:20 Obaŋa te bedo kede atinnono; en te doŋo, te bedo gire i tim, te doko twon adwarroro ame dwaro kede atero." 
Genesis21:21 Obedo i tim me Paran; tottere te nyomme nya jo Miciri. 
Genesis21:22 I kare-nono Abimlereki kede Pikol adwoŋ me monnyere okobbi Iburaim ni, “Obaŋa tye kedi i ginnoro luŋ ame yin itio." 
Genesis21:23 Pi mannono, aman myero ikwoŋ i nyim Obaŋa ni mano mom ibino dwala kadi acelloro, kadi atinna, onyo ikwaa. Kite acalo an atimo ber baŋi, yin daŋ tim ber baŋa karacel kede lobona ame ibedo iye-ni.”" 
Genesis21:24 Iburaim te gamo ni, “Abino kwoŋ.”" 
Genesis21:25 Iburaim te nyuto koko mere baŋ Abimereki pi akoŋŋoro ame onwoŋo omiro mere omao oko," 
Genesis21:26 Abimereki te gamo ni, “An naka gira mom aŋeo ni ŋattoro otimo kittono, yin daŋ mom ititta. Tin tyen me agege an me winyo kop man.”" 
Genesis21:27 Iburaim te kwanyo rommi kede twoni miyo baŋ Abimereki, eka gin aryo luŋ ote keto cikere i akinagi." 
Genesis21:28 Iburaim te yero akale rommi abiro keto pat. 
Genesis21:29 Abimereki te penyo Iburaim ni, “Kara piŋo iketo akale rommi abiro ca pat?”" 
Genesis21:30 Iburaim ogamo ni, “Akale rommi abiro-ni ame ibino gamo i ciŋa, ibino terogi me bedo cadenna ame nyuto ni an en a rik akunyo akoŋ man.”" 
Genesis21:31 Man en omio kabedo-nono olwoŋo ni Beer-ceba, pien gin aryo luŋ okwoŋo kwoŋgi iye." 
Genesis21:32 Rik gin obin oketo cikeregi i Beer-ceba kittono. Abimereki gin kede Pitol adwoŋ me mony, te doŋ ya dok i lobo a jo me Piriciti." 
Genesis21:33 Iburaim te pito anaŋa i Beer-ceba, te lwoŋo iye nyiŋ Rwot, ame en Obaŋa ame Perakino Atwal." 
Genesis21:34 Iburaim te ri i lobo a jo Piriciti kare alac. 
Genesis22:1 A doŋ kop man otum, Obaŋa oomo cuny Iburaim. En olwoŋe ni. “Iburaim!” Iburaim te gamo ni. “An ene.”" 
Genesis22:2 Okobbeni, “Ter wodi Icaka, ame en wodi acel keken ame imaro, wot kede i lobo me Moria, me iwot iŋole oko kuno, iwaŋ me yala kede, i wi kidi moro ame abino nyutti.”" 
Genesis22:3 Iburaim te dilo odiko con, tweyo gi-bedo mere i ŋe kana, te kwanyo awobe mere aryo wot kedgi karacel kede wode Icaka; otoŋo yen me waŋo gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa, te cako wottere i kabedo kan ame Obaŋa otitte." 
Genesis22:4 I nino me adekkere, Iburaim te tiŋo waŋe neno kabedonaca i kannabor." 
Genesis22:5 Iburaim te kobbi awobe mere aryo ni, “Wun bed wunu koŋ kan karacel kede kana, an karacel kede atin-ni owot loka ca, owot owor Obaŋa, ote dwogo baŋwu.”" 
Genesis22:6 Iburaim te tiŋo yen cibo i wi wode kaka, en te mako mac kede pala i ciŋe; gin te cako wotgi karacel." 
Genesis22:7 Icaka te lwoŋo pappere Iburaim ni, “Apap!” Iburaim te gamo ni, “An en woda.” Icaka te penye ni, “Nen, yen kede mac tye, kara romo ame owot waŋo me yalo Obaŋa tye kwene?”" 
Genesis22:8 Iburaim ogamo ni, “Obaŋa en ame bino miyowa romo me awaŋa, atinna.” Gin gigi ote medde i wotgi anyim." 
Genesis22:9 I kare ame gin otuno i kabedo ame Obaŋa onwoŋo ociko, Iburaim ocano keno lam, te daŋ cano yen i wie, te tweyo wode Icaka pyelo, buto i wi yen." 
Genesis22:10 Iburaim te cwayo ciŋe kwanyo pala me neko wode oko. 
Genesis22:11 Amalaika a Rwot te lwoŋe i po lo ni, “Iburaim! Iburaim!” En te gamo ni, “An ene.”" 
Genesis22:12 Okobbe ni, “Kur igud atinnono, kur itim ginnoro i kome kadi acel; tin doŋ atyeko niaŋ ateni ni yin kara ilworo Obaŋa, pien pe itwonna wodi, ento imia, aco kono en acel keken.”" 
Genesis22:13 Iburaim te tiŋo waŋe malo, te neno nyok romo tye i laŋete kun tuŋe omoko iyi agaba; Iburaim te wot kelo nyok romo-nono ŋolo me yalo Obaŋa akaka wode." 
Genesis22:14 Iburaim te cako nyiŋ kabedonono ni, Rwot en abino miyo; kite a jo kobo kede naka atot onyoni, ni, “Obino nwoŋo i wi kidi a Rwot.”" 
Genesis22:15 Amalaika a Rwot dok te lwoŋo Iburaim tyen me aryo mere," 
Genesis22:16 kun kobo ni, “Rwot okobo ni, Doŋ atyeko kwoŋ oko i nyiŋa kena kena ni, pi tim man ame itimo, me mom twonna wodi, aco kono en wodi acel keken," 
Genesis22:17 abino miyi winyo ateteni. Abino miyo ikwai nya, medde apol a cal i lwak acer apipim ame tye i polo, dok a rom i kwoyo me dog nam. Ikwai en ame bino loyo okworgi." 
Genesis22:18 Rok luŋ ame tye i wi lobo bino nwoŋo winyo i kom ikwai pien yin iwinyo doga.” 
Genesis22:19 Iburaim doŋ te dok cen baŋ awobe mere; te ya i kuno karacel kedgi anaka i Beer-ceba, te bedo kuno." 
Genesis22:20 Kare ame kop man doŋ otum, otero kop baŋ Iburaim ni, “Nen Mirika doŋ otyeko nywali ominwu Nakor itino;" 
Genesis22:21 Atin kao obedo Uj, omego mere Buji, Kemuel papa Aram," 
Genesis22:22 Keced, Kaja, Pildac, Yidlap kede Betuel.”" 
Genesis22:23 Betuel te nywalo Lebeka, Mirika onywali Nakor omin Iburaim itino magi aboro." 
Genesis22:24 Dako a Nakor ame aŋeca daŋ, ame nyiŋe Reuma, onywalo Tebak, Gakam, Takac kede Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Cara ori i lobo mwakki mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aboro. Man en mwaka ame Cara operakino kede i lobo. 
Genesis23:2 Cara oto i Kiriat-arba, ame en Kebron, ame tye i lobo Kanaan. Iburaim te kwero cola kun koko Cara kede pig waŋe." 
Genesis23:3 Iburaim te ya oko i nyim dako mere oto, te wot kobbi jo Kitti ni," 
Genesis23:4 “An arok ame abedo i akainwu acalo welo. Mia wunu ba dullobo moro baŋwu kan me bed mega me yiko jo; me ayik iye kom dakona ame oto oko ca, me kur doŋ abed neno kome.”" 
Genesis23:5 Jo Kitti te gamo dog Iburaim ni," 
Genesis23:6 “Winy ba, adwoŋwa, yin aloc adwoŋ meicel i ikinawa kan. Yik giri kom dakoni i lyelloro aber ame yin iyero i akina lyellewa ecipan ame tye kan-ni. Mom tye ŋattoro i akinawa ame bino twoni lyellere, onyo ame bino kwero ni kur iyik kom dakoni iye.”" 
Genesis23:7 Iburaim te ya malo, oryebere i nyim jo Kitti ame gin obedo wegi lobo-nono," 
Genesis23:8 kun kobo ni, “Ka imito wunu ni ayik kom atona, me kur dok abed neno kome, winy wunu koppa, ikwaya wunu Epron ame wot a Joar," 
Genesis23:9 me en ye miya gorogoro kidi mere ame tye i Makpela, ame obedo mere ame tye iyi agikki poto mere. Me en ŋolla wellere ame romo, me awil, en te miya i nyimwu, me bed mega me yik.”" 
Genesis23:10 I kare-nono onwoŋo Epron tye obedo i akina jo Kitti; Epron ame en dano me Kitti te gamo dog Iburaim kun jo Kitti luŋ karacel i jo luŋ ame donyo i dog boma me Kitti daŋ tye awinyo. 
Genesis23:11 Okobo ni, “Adwoŋ, mom amannono gire, yin winy koppa. An amii poto, dok amii daŋ gorogoro kidi ame tye iye-nono. Amii giri nono i nyim itino a jona luŋ. Yin yik iye kom dakoni.”" 
Genesis23:12 Iburaim dok te ryebere i nyim wegi lobo-nono," 
Genesis23:13 te kobbi Epron ame wegi lobo-nono luŋ tye awinyo, ni, “Pe gire, ka twerre ye koppa. Myero yin iye an aculli limmoro pi lobo ame imia. Ye gamo lim i ciŋa me ayik kom atona kuno.”" 
Genesis23:14 Epron te gamo ni," 
Genesis23:15 “Adwoŋ, winy doga, poto-nu romo cekel me ryal mia aŋwen keken, kara mannono ŋo i tuŋ baŋi kede baŋa? Yin yik giri kom atoni.”" 
Genesis23:16 Iburaim te ye kop Epron, te pimo ryal ame okobo i nyim jo Kitti, ame romo cekel mia aŋwen, kun pimo i kidi mijan ame ocat wil tio kede." 
Genesis23:17 Mannono te miyo poto a Epron ame tye i Makpela, ame rik tye tutuŋ kide me Mamre, te doko me Iburaim. Poto karacel kede gorogoro kidi a rik tye i poto-nono, ote moko luŋ," 
Genesis23:18 i nyim jo Kitti kede jo luŋ ame donyo i dog boma me Kitti. 
Genesis23:19 A doŋ man otum, Iburaim te yiko kom cege Cara i gorogoro kidi ame tye i poto me Makpela, i yo tutuŋ kide me Mamre, ame en Kebron, ame tye i lobo a jo Kanaan." 
Genesis23:20 Jo me Kiti te moko i poto-nono karacel kede gorogoro kidi a rik tye iye, myero bed me Iburaim me yik." 
Genesis24:1 I kare ame Iburaim doŋ oti oko, ame mwaka me dittere doŋ bup, dok Obaŋa daŋ doŋ otyeko miye winyo i jami luŋ." 
Genesis24:2 Iburaim okobbi amiro mere ame rik bedo baŋe kun loo jami mere luŋ, ni, “Rwak ciŋi i te amuruna," 
Genesis24:3 me ami ikwoŋ i nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋa me polo kede lobo, ni mannono mom ibino nyommi woda nyannoro ame tye i akina anyira me Kanaan, ame an abedo i akinagi-ni." 
Genesis24:4 Ento ibino wot i lobo me turwa, baŋ atekerewa, me iwot i nyommi woda Icaka dako mere i kuno.”" 
Genesis24:5 Amiro mere te gamo ni, “Kara ka dako mom bino ye bino keda i lobo-ni kono? Myero an adwokwodi i lobo me turwu, ame rik ibino iye?”" 
Genesis24:6 Iburaim te kobbe ni, “Nen aber ni mom iwoto i woda idwoko kuno." 
Genesis24:7 Rwot Obaŋa me polo ame rik okwanya i ot a pappa, i lobo ame onywala iye, ame okobo keda kun kwoŋo ni, ‘Abino miyo lobo man baŋ ikwai’, en bino cwayo amalaika mere i nyimi, bino miyo i nyommi woda dako i kuno." 
Genesis24:8 Cite ka dako en ame okwero bino kedi, kwoŋŋa-ni mom bino maki giri; cite woda en a mom myero i dok kede kuno.”" 
Genesis24:9 Amiro-nono daŋ te rwako ciŋe i te amuru adwoŋŋere Iburaim, te kwoŋ baŋe i koppono." 
Genesis24:10 Amiro te kwanyo inaga adwoŋŋere ame romo apar nono, te cako wottere kun tero daŋ jami ocele abeco apapat me mot oya ibaŋ adwoŋŋere. En te wot i Mecapotamia i paco a Nakor." 
Genesis24:11 Otyeno ame mon ciro twomo pii-ni, en omio inaga mere luŋ orumo coŋgi piny i dog akoŋ ame tye i boma." 
Genesis24:12 En te kwayo Obaŋa kit man ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa adwoŋŋa Iburaim, mi kop luŋ aluŋa tin cobere baŋa aber. Nyut marri a mom lokere i kom adwoŋŋa Iburaim." 
Genesis24:13 Nen, an abino cuŋ i dog akoŋ kan kun mon me boma-ni bino me twomo pii;" 
Genesis24:14 mi nyan ame abino kwayo pii me amata ni, ‘Ama koŋ icib ba guluni piny imia pii amati,’ en bino dok iye ni, ‘Mati, me ami inagani daŋ mati,’ en abed nyan iyero pi amironi Icaka. Mannono bino miyo aŋeo ni yin doŋ inyuto marri a mom lokere baŋ adwoŋŋa.”" 
Genesis24:15 Ame en mom ru otyeko koppere, nen Lebeka nyaka Betuel wot a Mirika, dako a Nakor ame obedo omin Iburaim te bino oko i dog akoŋ kun oketo gulu pii i wii gwoke." 
Genesis24:16 Nyannono onwoŋo mwonya atek, dok daŋ onwoŋo mom ru oŋeye i lo moro. En owoto okato i akoŋ, te twomo pii mere poŋ gulu, te yeye dwogo kede." 
Genesis24:17 Amiro Iburaim te riŋo ŋolle i kome, te kobbe ni “Tima ber imia ba koŋ pii i guluni-nono a mati?”" 
Genesis24:18 Nyannono te gamo ni, “Mat adwoŋŋa”; en te ru tiŋo gulu pii mere oko i ciŋe, te miye mato." 
Genesis24:19 Kare ame en doŋ otyeko mato, nyannono te kobo gire kene ni, “Abino twomo pii amio inagani daŋ, naka ka gin omato oromogi.”" 
Genesis24:20 Oyotoyot en te ru onyo pii i weer, te riŋo dok me omo pii iyi akoŋ, en te bedo twomo pii, naka oromo inaga ducu." 
Genesis24:21 Amiro Iburaim onwoŋo oliŋ mot kun tye aneno nya-nu, me eniaŋ ka ce Rwot doŋ omio wottere ocobere oko aber, onyo pe." 
Genesis24:22 Ame inaga luŋ doŋ otyeko mato pii oko, amiro Iburaim te kwannyi nyannono atem me jabu, me um, ame pekkere romo nucu cekel, kede atem ocele aryo me jabu daŋ, mannono me ŋut ciŋ, ame pekgi romo cekel apar," 
Genesis24:23 kun penye ni, “Yin i nyaka ŋa? Kabuto moro twero nwoŋere turwu pirwa?”" 
Genesis24:24 En te gamo ni, “An a nyaka Betuel ame obedo wot a Mirika ame onywalli Nakor.”" 
Genesis24:25 Dok te kobo ni, “Reŋ kal tye adwoŋ ata kede cam ocele ame romo daŋ inagani; kabuto daŋ twero nwoŋere pirwu.”" 
Genesis24:26 Amiro Iburaim te kulo wie piny woro Rwot," 
Genesis24:27 kun kobo ni, “Rwot ame en Obaŋa adwoŋŋa Iburaim, myero pwoc, pien mom oweko mar mere a mom lokere kede gennere i kom adwoŋŋa. An daŋ Rwot doŋ otyeko tela naka i ot atekere adwoŋŋa ikome.”" 
Genesis24:28 Nyako te riŋo tito kop ame otimere luŋ baŋ jo ame tye i ot a tottere. 
Genesis24:29 Lebeka rik tye kede ominnere ame nyiŋe Laban. Laban oriŋo baŋ danonono i dog akoŋ. 
Genesis24:30 Ka oneno atem me um kede me ŋut ciŋ baŋ aminnere, eka dok te winyo kop aminnere Lebeka ni, “Lonnono okobba kit man,” en owoto baŋ lonnono, te nwoŋo ocuŋ ceggi kede inaga mege i dog akoŋ." 
Genesis24:31 Te kobbe ni, “Biye, yin ame Rwot otyeko miyi winyo, piŋo dok icuŋ i ŋe boma? Pien doŋ atyeko yiko ot kede kabuto daŋ.”" 
Genesis24:32 Dano-nono te bino donyo i ot; Laban te gonyo del oko i kom inaga luŋ, te miyogi reŋ kal kede cam ocele; te daŋ kelo pii me lwoko tyen amiro Iburaim karacel kede jo owoto kede." 
Genesis24:33 A doŋ okelo cam ocibo i nyime ni en cam, en okobo ni, “An pwod pe acem ka mom ru atito kop ame oora pire.” Laban te gamo ni, “Koŋ doŋ ikob do.”" 
Genesis24:34 En te kobo kit man ni, “An abedo amiro Iburaim," 
Genesis24:35 Rwot otyeko miyo winyo adwoŋ meicel baŋ adwoŋŋa, omio en onwoŋo lim akwo atino kede adoŋo mege, tye i ryal kede jabu, opii kede aŋeca apipim, inaga kede kana daŋ ecipan." 
Genesis24:36 Dok Cara dako adwoŋŋa otyeko nywalle atin awobi; Iburaim te miyo jami mere luŋ baŋ wode-nono.
