Genesis24:37 Adwoŋŋa te miya kwoŋ kit man ni, ‘Mom ibino yerri woda nyannoro i akina anyira me Kanaan ame an abedo i akinagi-ni." 
Genesis24:38 Ento ibino wot i ot a pappa, i akina atekerewa, en ame ibino nyommi woda dako iye.’" 
Genesis24:39 An rik abin agamo dog adwoŋŋa ni, ‘Kara ka dako mom bino ye bino keda i lobo-ni kono?’" 
Genesis24:40 En te gamo ni, ‘Rwot ame tela i wotta bino cwalo amalaika mere nywako yo karacel kedi, bino miyo wotti cobere aber; bino miyo inyommi woda dako i ot a pappa ikome." 
Genesis24:41 Kwoŋŋa-ni mom bino bedo i wii ka ce yin giri iwoto i ot a pappa eka gin en ate kwero miyi nyako.’ 
Genesis24:42 I kare ame atuno i dog akoŋ tin, akwao Obaŋa ni, ‘Ama Rwot Obaŋa, ame yin Obaŋa adwoŋŋa Iburaim, ka ibino miyo wotta-ni cobere aber," 
Genesis24:43 nen, an en doŋ acuŋ i dog akoŋ kan; nyan ame bino twomo pii, an abino kobbe ni, “Tim ber imia ba pii iyi guluni-nono, me amati,”" 
Genesis24:44 nyannono bino gamo ni, “Mati, me ami inagani daŋ mati,” mi nyannono bed dako ame Rwot oyero me bedo dako a wot adwoŋŋa Iburaim.’" 
Genesis24:45 “I kare ame mom ru akobo kop i cunya otum, Lebeka obino oko kun oketo gulu pii mere i wi gwoke, te wot twomo pi i iyi akoŋ. An ate kwaye ni, ‘Mia ba pii amati!’" 
Genesis24:46 En te ru tiŋo gulu pii mere oko i wi gwoke, te kobo ni, ‘Mati, me ami inagani daŋ mati.’" 
Genesis24:47 Dok ate penye ni, ‘Yin kara i nyaka a ŋa?’ En te gamo ni, ‘An a nyaka a Betuel ame wot a Nakor, totta Mirika!’ An doŋ ate keto atem me jabu oko i ume kede i ŋut ciŋe ryoryo," 
Genesis24:48 ate kulo wia piny woro Rwot Obaŋa, ame en Obaŋa adwoŋŋa Iburaim, ame otela aber i yo, te miya nwoŋo nyako omin adwoŋŋa me atera baŋ wode." 
Genesis24:49 Doŋ aman titta wunu ka ce ibino nyuto wunu mar kede ateni baŋ adwoŋŋa; ka pe, daŋ ititta wunu me adok tuŋ ocele.”" 
Genesis24:50 Laban kede Betuel te gamo ni, “Kop man oya i baŋ Rwot, wan giwa mom otye i kopporo iye." 
Genesis24:51 Nen, en Lebeka en tye i nyimi-nono, yin tere iwot wunu kede, me en wot bed ci-wot adwoŋŋi kite ame Rwot otyeko kobo.”" 
Genesis24:52 Kare ame amiro Iburaim doŋ owinyo kopginono, oryebere piny i lobo i nyim Rwot." 
Genesis24:53 Okwanyo atem me ryal kede jabu ecipan, kede boŋŋi, te miyo baŋ Lebeka; te dok miyo daŋ mottogo me wel baŋ ominnere kede tottere." 
Genesis24:54 En karacel kede jo ame tye baŋe te doŋ cako cem kede mat; gin te buto nino acel kuno. Odiko gin te ya kwayogi ni, “Lwoka wunu doŋ adok baŋ adwoŋŋa.”" 
Genesis24:55 Omin a Lebeka kede tottere te gamo ni, “Koŋ iwek ba nyako bed kedwa pi nino aparroro keken, te wot gire.”" 
Genesis24:56 En ogamo okobo ni, “Kur dok imia wunu agal ba, kite acalo Rwot doŋ omio wotta ocobere oko-ni; weka wunu doŋ awoti, adok baŋ adwoŋŋa.”" 
Genesis24:57 Gin te gamo ni, “Koŋ iwek olwoŋe en nyako openye.”" 
Genesis24:58 Kare ame olwoŋo Lebeka, openye kun okobo ni, “Iye wot wun i dano-ni?” En te gamo ni, “Awot.”" 
Genesis24:59 Gin doŋ te cako lwoŋo nyargi Lebeka karacel kede apidi mere, kede amiro Iburaim, kede jo mere daŋ." 
Genesis24:60 Gin te lammi Lebeka winyo kun okobbe ni, “Aminwa bed totta jo tutumia tyen tutumia apar, dok ikwae myero lo okworgi.”" 
Genesis24:61 Ka man otum, Lebeka kede aŋeca mere, te ya cako wotgi; gin oyito, ote bedo i wi inaga kun olubo yo amiro Iburaim. Man en kit ame amiro Iburaim otero kede Lebeka." 
Genesis24:62 Icaka onwoŋo rik bedo i Negeb, ame i kare-naca onwoŋo ceggi kede Beer-lakai-roi." 
Genesis24:63 Otyeno moro acel Icaka onwoŋo owoto lat i dye bar, oyotoyot en te tiŋo waŋe malo, te neno inaga mogo tye abino." 
Genesis24:64 Ka Lebeka daŋ otiŋo waŋe malo, oneno Icaka, te yito oko piny i wi inaga." 
Genesis24:65 Openyo amiro Iburaim ni, “Maca kara lonnene ame abino i loka tuŋ ca, me bino rwatte kedwa cae?” Amiro te gamo ni, “Adwoŋŋa-ni ennono.” Lebeka te kwanyo boŋo wumo oko i wie." 
Genesis24:66 Amiro te titti Icaka kop ducu ame otimere. 
Genesis24:67 Icaka te kelo Lebeka i kema, me bedo dako mere kun daŋ mare. Omio cuny kaka te kwe oko pi to a tot tere." 
Genesis25:1 Iburaim dok te nyomo dako ocele a nyiŋe Ketula," 
Genesis25:2 te nywalo Jimram, Jokocan, Medan, Midian, Icibak kede Cuak," 
Genesis25:3 Jokocan te nywalo Ceba kede jo Dedan. Dedan te nywalo jo Acurim, jo Letuc, kede jo Leummin." 
Genesis25:4 Aco awobe a Midian rik te bedo: Epa, Eper, Kanok, Abida kede Eldaa. Gin luŋ rik obedo itino a Ketula." 
Genesis25:5 Iburaim te miyo jami mere luŋ baŋ Icaka. 
Genesis25:6 Ento Iburaim daŋ te poko mot baŋ itino ame aŋeca onywalo kun en pwod kwo, te cwayogi oko teŋe i laŋet wode Icaka; gin te wot tuŋ kide." 
Genesis25:7 Mwaka Iburaim me dittere ame obedo kede i lobo, rik oromo mia acel i pyerabiro wie abic." 
Genesis25:8 Iburaim oto ame mwaka mere doŋ bup, a doŋ oteggo atek; en te wot nywako kabedo kede kwari mere," 
Genesis25:9 Awobe mere, Icaka kede Icmael te yike i gorogoro kidi ame tye i Makpela, i poto Epron wot a Cokar, dano me Kitti, ame tye tuŋ kide me Mamre," 
Genesis25:10 ame en poto ame rik Iburaim owilo i baŋ jo Kitti. Oyiko Iburaim kuno karacel kede dako mere Cara," 
Genesis25:11 A doŋ Iburaim oto, Obaŋa te miyo wode Icaka winyo. Icaka te bedo i Beer-lakai-roi." 
Genesis25:12 Man en nyiŋ ikwae Icmael ame wot Iburaim, ame Agar nya jo Miciri, a rik obedo aŋeca a Cara, onywalli Iburaim:" 
Genesis25:13 Nebayot, en obedo atin kao, jo olube te bedo Kedar, Adbeel, Miboam," 
Genesis25:14 Micima, Duma, Macca," 
Genesis25:15 Kadad, Tema, Jetur, Napic, kede Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Man nyiŋ oloc apar wie aryo mea jo Icmael kun lubere atekeregi kede kabedogi. 
Genesis25:17 Mwaka Icmael me dittere ame ori kede i lobo rik oromo mia acel kede pyeradek wie abiro, en te to oko, te wot nywako kabedo i kwari mere." 
Genesis25:18 Lobo a jo Icmael rik ocakere i Kavila te tuno naka i Acuria ame tye tutuŋ waŋ apokki me Miciri. En rik obedo nyim omego mere luŋ. 
Genesis25:19 Man en ikwae Icaka wot Iburaim: Iburaim onywalo Icaka. 
Genesis25:20 Icaka te nyomo dako mere Lebeka kun onwoŋo mwaka me dittere tye pyeraŋwen; Lebeka rik obedo nyaka a Betuel, ame en dano me Aram, ame tye i lobo me Padan-aram, am in a Laban me Aram." 
Genesis25:21 Icaka rik te kwayo Obaŋa pi dako mere ame onwoŋo oraŋa: RWOT te winyo kwaccere, te miyo Lebeka yac." 
Genesis25:22 Itino te bedo twotwoma kengi kengi i yie, omio en te kobo ni, “Piŋo kara man tye atimere i koma?” En te wot penyo pire baŋ Rwot." 
Genesis25:23 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Rok aryo tye iyii, jo aryo-nono bino cako pokere oko iyii; acel bino bedo atek kato awottere oko; atin atidi bino loyo atin kao.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ka kare me nywallere oromo, en onywalo rude." 
Genesis25:25 Atinnere ame ogeo donyo, onywalo ame kome rema, dok kome luŋ obedo yeyer bala boŋo yer; omio ocako nyiŋe ni Ecau." 
Genesis25:26 Icennere ominnere dok te donyo kun omako opuny tyen Ecau, omio ote cako nyiŋe ni Yakobo. Kare ame onywalo itinonono onwoŋo mwaka kaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyerabicel nono." 
Genesis25:27 I kare ame awobe-nono odoŋo, Ecau obedo twon okennoro atek i dwar i tim; Yakobo obedo amwol kun bedo mot i kema." 
Genesis25:28 Icaka rik maro Ecau pi camo riŋo ame en odwaro, ento Lebeka rik maro Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 I kare ame Yakobo rik onwoŋo tye atedo ŋor, Ecau odwogo i tim ame kec oneko atek meciel." 
Genesis25:30 Ecau te kwayo Yakobo ni, “Mia ba dekki arema wokkono acam, kec aneka meicel!” Koppono omio olwoŋo Ecau ni Edom." 
Genesis25:31 Ento Yakobo te kobbe ni, “Koŋ ige catta ditti me kao.”" 
Genesis25:32 Ecau te gamo ni, “Nen an aceggi to oko, dit me bedo kao kara konnyere ŋo?”" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo ogamo ni, “Koŋ ige kwoŋ baŋa.” Ecau daŋ te kwoŋ baŋe, te cato dittere me kao oko baŋ Yakobo." 
Genesis25:34 Yakobo te miye kwoŋ kede dek ŋor; en ocamo te mato pii i wie, te ya malo wot gire oko. Mannono en kite ame Ecau ocao kede dittere me bedo atin kao." 
Genesis26:1 Kare ame kec doŋ opoto i lobo, kec ame pat i maca a rik pot i kare Iburaim, Icaka owoto i Gerar baŋ Abimereki, rwot a jo Piriciti." 
Genesis26:2 Rwot te nen baŋe kun kobbe ni, “Kur iwot i Miciri, ento myero ibed i lobo ame an abino titti." 
Genesis26:3 Koŋ ibed i lobo-ni tutuno, an abino bedo kedi, dok daŋ abino miyi winyo, pien lobo man luŋ abino miyo baŋ i kede baŋ ikwai. Abino cobo kwoŋ ame rik akwoŋo baŋ pappi Iburaim." 
Genesis26:4 Abino miyo ikwai nya bedo apol bala acer apipim ame tye i polo, abino miyo ikwai lobo man luŋ; dok rok luŋ me wi lobo bino nwoŋo winyogi i komgi;" 
Genesis26:5 pien Iburaim yam owinyo doga te cobo jami luŋ ame aciko me wora kun mako icwilla kede cikka.” 
Genesis26:6 Icaka te bedo i Gera. 
Genesis26:7 Ka jo kuno openye kop i kom dako mere, en ogamo ni, “En aminna.” En onwoŋo olworo kobo ni, “Dakona,” pien onwoŋo tamo ni, “Me wegi lobo-ni kur neka pi Lebeka,” pien en rik dako amwonya meicel." 
Genesis26:8 Kare ame en doŋ ori kuno kare alalac, Abimereki rwot a jo Piriciti oroo waŋe i dirica, te neno Icaka kun tye atuko kede dako mere Lebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimereki te lwoŋo Icaka kobbe ni, “Nen, man dakoni, piŋo yin rik ikobo ni en aminni?” Icaka te dokke iye ni, “Pien onwoŋo atamo ni, ‘Me kur neka oko pire’.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimereki ogamo ni, “Kara itimowa aman piŋo ba? Nen kono rik dano moro obuto i dakoni, kono ikelo bal i komwa nono.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abimereki te kwenyoro jo mere luŋ, kun kobo ni, “Ŋat ame bino gudo dano-ni onyo dako mere obino neko aneka.”" 
Genesis26:12 Icaka rik te coyo koti i poto i lobo-nono, te cek atek meicel i mwakanono, nyige acel acel oya iye nyige ocele mia acel. Rwot omie winyo," 
Genesis26:13 Icaka te doko twon alonyo moro a mom kobere, jami mere te bedo nya, medde kare ducu, omio en te doko twon alonyo moro a mom kobere." 
Genesis26:14 Lim akwo rik te bedo abup meicel i ciŋe, en atino kede adoŋo mege, kun jo me ode daŋ welgi bup atek. Man omio nyeko omako jo me Piriciti i kome." 
Genesis26:15 I kare-ni onwoŋo doŋ jo Piriciti oculo waŋ akoŋ luŋ ame rik pappere Iburaim okunyo i kare mere, gin otoro oko i lobo," 
Genesis26:16 Abimereki te kobbi Icaka ni, “Ya oko i baŋwa iwoti, pien yin doŋ idoko atek meicel iloowa oko.”" 
Genesis26:17 Icaka te ya oko, te wot guro kema mere i luŋ me Gerar, te bedo kuno." 
Genesis26:18 Icaka doŋ te cako wado waŋ pii akoŋ ame rik okunyo i kare a pappere Iburaim; ame onwoŋo rik jo Piriciti obin otoro oko i kare ame Iburaim oto. En dok te lwoŋo akoŋŋogo i nyiŋ a rik pappere ocakkigi. 
Genesis26:19 Ento i kare ame omiro Icaka tye akunyo akoŋ i luŋ me Gerar, gin onwoŋo akoŋŋoro ame pii mere mol kun mit atek." 
Genesis26:20 Okwat a jo me Gerar te ero da iye kede okwat Icaka, kun gin kobo ni, “Pi i-ni gire megwa.” Daa-nono te miyo Icaka cako nyiŋ pii-nono Ecek, pien obedo da kede iye." 
Genesis26:21 Gin dok te kunyo akoŋ ocele, mannono daŋ dok ote ero da iye; omio Icaka dok te cako mannono ni Citna." 
Genesis26:22 Icaka doŋ te weko macinaca oko, te dok kunyo en ocele. Mannono da moro mom doŋ te bedo tye iye; omio en te cako nyiŋ mannono ni Rekobot, kun kobo ni, “Pien tin doŋ Rwot oyabbiwa kabedo alac, wan doŋ obino nya i lobo-ni.”" 
Genesis26:23 Icaka te ya oko i Gerar, te dak i Beer-ceba." 
Genesis26:24 Rwot dok te medo nen baŋe i dyeworrono kun kobbe ni, “An Obaŋa a pappi Iburaim; kur ilwor, pien an atye kedi, an abino miyi winyo, ikwai bino nya apol meicel pi amirona Iburaim.”" 
Genesis26:25 En te cano keno me miyo lam baŋ Rwot kuno, te lwoŋo iye nyiŋ Rwot. En oguro kema mere kuno, omiro mere dok te kunyo akoŋ kuno." 
Genesis26:26 Abimereki rik te wot baŋ Icaka kun oya i Gerar, owoto karacel kede Akugat ami-tam, kede Pikol ame obedo adwoŋ me mony." 
Genesis26:27 Icaka te kobbigi ni, “Ibino wunu baŋa kara pi kop aŋo ba, aco kun idaga wunu, dok daŋ iryema wunu oko i lobowu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Gin te gamo ni, “Wan otyeko niaŋ atira ni Obaŋa tye kedi, en omio wan obino ni myero kwoŋ bed tye i akina yin kede wan me oket cikere kedi," 
Genesis26:29 me kur ibin itimwa rac, kite acalo wan daŋ rik giwa mom ogudo komi, mom daŋ otimo ginnoro arac i komi, ento otimo gin abeco keken, dok daŋ oryemi iya i akinawa kede kuc. Aman doŋ Rwot omii winyo.”" 
Genesis26:30 Icaka te teddigi arama, gin ote cam dok daŋ ote mate." 
Genesis26:31 Gin te ya idiko con, ote kwoŋo kwoŋ i akinagi. Icaka te lwokogi me dok turgi, gin te pokere i kuc." 
Genesis26:32 I nino-nono i kome, omiro Icaka obino baŋ te titte pi pii ocele ame gin okunyo, kun okobbe ni, “Wan otyeko nwoŋo pii.”" 
Genesis26:33 Icaka te cako nyiŋ pii nono ni Ciba, mannono en omio olwoŋo nyiŋ boma-nono ni Beer-ceba atot onyoni." 
Genesis26:34 Kare ame mwaka Ecau me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraŋwen, en onyomo Judit nyaka a Beeri, ame en dano me Kitti, kede Bacemat nyaka a Elon, ame daŋ dano me Kitti." 
Genesis26:35 Gin te miyo Icaka kede Lebeka waŋcuny meicel. 
Genesis27:1 Kare ame Icaka doŋ oti, waŋe doŋ ocoro oko, ame mom doŋ neno piny, olwoŋo atinnere me kao Ecau te kobbe ni, “Atinna.” Ecau te gamo ni, “An ene.”" 
Genesis27:2 Okobbe ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ ati oko, mom aŋeo nino ame ato iye." 
Genesis27:3 Kwany jami me dwarri kede cao atero kede akud ateroni, wot i tim, me iwot idwarra lee," 
Genesis27:4 ibin icella riŋo akur kite ame amito kede, ikella acam, me alammi winyo a mom ru ato.”" 
Genesis27:5 Kare ame Icaka onwoŋo tye akop i wode Ecau, Lebeka onwoŋo tye awinyo. Kare ame Ecau doŋ owoto oko i dwaro lee me kelli pappere," 
Genesis27:6 Lebeka te kobbi wode Yakobo ni, “An aya winyo pappi kun akobbi wode Ecau ni," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Wot ikella riŋo, me ibin icella akur, ikella acami me alammi winyo i nyim Rwot ame mom ru ato.’" 
Genesis27:8 Pi mannono atinna, tim ber iwiny koppa, iti gin aciki iye amanni." 
Genesis27:9 Wot ikella akale dyegi aryo amwonya i akina dyegi kuca, me ateddi pappi akur, a yomoro cunye," 
Genesis27:10 me yin ibin iterri pappi cam, me lammi winyo ame en mom ru oto.”" 
Genesis27:11 Ento Yakobo ogamo dog tottere Lebeka kun kobbe ni, “Nen ba, ominna Ecau kome obedo yeyer, aco an mega mom obedo yeyer." 
Genesis27:12 Kare ocele pappa twero boboŋo koma, man bino miyo nen calo an awoto nyware anywara, bino miyo en cena acena, mom te lamma winyo.”" 
Genesis27:13 Tottere te gamo doge kun kobbe ni, “Cen ame obino ceni kede myero bed i wia, atinna; yin ti gin ame akobbi. Tim ber iwot ikellagi.”" 
Genesis27:14 En owoto okelo akale dyegi aryo baŋ tottere, tottere te celo riŋo akur kite ame pappere maro ikome." 
Genesis27:15 Lebeka te kwanyo boŋo aber meicel, boŋo a wode Ecau me kao, ame rik onwoŋo tye i ot baŋ tottere, te miyo Yakobo wode atidi ruko." 
Genesis27:16 Eka te tweyo lao dyegi aryo-nu luŋ i bad Yakobo, kede i ŋute kan ame yer onwoŋo mom iye;" 
Genesis27:17 te doŋ tiŋo riŋo ame en ocelo akur, kede kwon ame omyeno, te miyo wode Yakobo." 
Genesis27:18 Yakobo te wot kede i nyim pappere, te kobbe ni, “Apap”; en te ye ni, “An ene; yin iŋa, atinna?”" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo te gamo dog pappere ni, “An Ecau atin kaoni. Atyeko doŋ tiyo gin ame woki ititta ca, cukere doŋ iya malo me icam riŋo ame adwaro akelli, me ilamma winy.”" 
Genesis27:20 Ento Icaka te kobbi wode ni, “Atinna, inwoŋo riŋo oyotoyot aman-ni i yore aŋo ba?” Yakobo te gamo ni, “Rwot Obaŋani omio yora obedo aber.”" 
Genesis27:21 Icaka dok te kobbi Yakobo ni, “Koŋ inoka aceggi kan, me aboŋ komi atinna, aniaŋ ka yin atinna Ecau ennono ateni onyo mom.”" 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo te noko pappere ceggi, pappere oboŋo kome te kobo ni, “Dwoni cal i mea Yakobo, ento badi mea Ecau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Mannono omio naka en gire mom oŋee, pien bade onwoŋo yeyer bala bad ominnere Ecau. Omio en te lamme gire winyo oko." 
Genesis27:24 Openye ni, “Yin i woda Ecau ateni?” Yakobo ogamo ni, “An ennono ta,”" 
Genesis27:25 Pappere doŋ te kobo ni, “Aco doŋ kel riŋo-nono baŋa kan woda me acam ate lammi winyo.” En te keto cam i nyime. Kare ame en doŋ otyeko camo, te kelle daŋ koŋo olok, te mato," 
Genesis27:26 Pappere Icaka doŋ te kobo ni, “Nyiggo baŋa kan, me inot lema, atinna.”" 
Genesis27:27 En te nyiko a ceggi baŋe, te noto leme; Icaka te ŋweyo ŋwec ruk a Yakobo, te lamme winyo kun kobo ni, “Nen, ŋwec kom woda kur, calo ŋwec poto ame Rwot omio winyo!" 
Genesis27:28 Obaŋa myero mii toyo ame luk kun ya i polo, kede lobo ame ceko cam abup; mi kaili kede olokki cek abup," 
Genesis27:29 Lwak jo apipim myero bed omironi rok apol daŋ ryebere piny i nyimi. Yin en ibed rwot ame loo omegoni luŋ. Itino a totti luŋ daŋ myero ryebere i nyimi. Cen myero bed i wi jo luŋ ame ceni, jo luŋ a lammi winyo, winyo myero bed i komgi.”" 
Genesis27:30 A doŋ Icaka otyeko lammi Yakobo winyo, kun en pwod ojer anok anoka iya i baŋ pappere, ominnere Ecau daŋ te dwogo oko i ka dwarrere." 
Genesis27:31 En te celo riŋo akur, te tero baŋ pappere. En te kobbi pappere ni, “Apap, cukere me iya malo icam riŋo ame atinni okelo, me ilamma winyo.”" 
Genesis27:32 Pappere Icaka te penyo ni, “Yin iŋa-nono dok i?” En te gamo ni, “An Ecau wodi me kao ennono.”" 
Genesis27:33 Kom Icaka te cako myel oko atek ateka kun kobo ni, “Ŋa a woki koŋ odwaro lee, te kela nie? Ame mom ru ŋin idwogo an acamo cammere, ate daŋ lamme-gu winyo oko. Amie doŋ gum luŋ oko.”" 
Genesis27:34 Ecau tekki winyo kop a pappere, omwoco koko malo amala kun kabo ni, “Apap, lamma an daŋ winyo ba!”" 
Genesis27:35 Ento pappere okobbe ni, “Ominni Yakobo obino kan obwola, en gire doŋ otero gum a kono amii oko.”" 
Genesis27:36 Ecau te kobo ni, “Ocako ni Yakobo kakare, pien en doŋ aman omao gumma odoko iryo twal. Yam koŋ ogeo i me bedo atin kao, tin dok omedo tero gumma oko. Apap doŋ mom ikanna moro aduno?”" 
Genesis27:37 Icaka ogamo kop a wode Ecau ni, “Nen ba atinna, an doŋ atyeko kete oko me bedo rwotti, omego mere luŋ daŋ atyeko miyogi oko me bedo omiro mere, kal kede koŋo luŋ amio oko me pite. Kara gin aŋo a myero dok amii?”" 
Genesis27:38 Ecau dok te kobbi pappere ni, “Apap wee, doŋ winyo moro acel keken daŋ mom odoŋŋa? Lamma an daŋ winyo, apap!” Ecau te mwoco koko oko." 
Genesis27:39 Pappere Icaka te doŋ kobbe, ni “Nen ba, paconi bino bedo abor i lobo a ceko cam, dok daŋ abedo abor i toyo ame luk ya i polo," 
Genesis27:40 Ibino kwo i pala romoni, ibino bedo i te loc ominni. Ento ka ce ibino jem i kome i kare moro, ibino turo loccere oko i ŋuti.”" 
Genesis27:41 Ecau te cako dago ominnere Yakobo oko pi winyo ame pappere olammi ominere. Omio en te kobo i cunye ni, “Kare me to a pappa doŋ ceggi, kare-nono en ame abino neko iye ominna Yakobo daŋ oko.”" 
Genesis27:42 Ento rik ote titti Lebeka oko, kop ame wode me kao Ecau okobo; omio en te cwayo dano wot lwoŋo Yakobo wode atidi, te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, ominni Ecau oyikere me neki oko." 
Genesis27:43 Pi mannono, yin myero iti gin akobbi; yin myero ilwi, iriŋ oko i Karan, baŋ ominna Laban." 
Genesis27:44 Koŋ iwot ibed baŋe kuno naka waŋ ame akemo ominni okwe," 
Genesis27:45 Ka akemo mere doŋ okwe, ame wie doŋ owil oko i gin ame yin itimo i kome, an abino cwayo dano omi i kuno. Mom ber wun aryo luŋ irwenyo wunu i waŋa ni no acel.”" 
Genesis27:46 Lebeka te kobbi Icaka ni, “An gira kite anyira a jo Kitti doŋ oola oko. Ka Yakobo daŋ dok bino nyomo nya jo Kitti, ame rom aroma i mon ocele me lobo man, kwona doŋ konnyere bino bedo mom.”" 
Genesis28:1 Icaka te lwoŋo Yakobo lamme winyo, eka te doŋ cike ni, “Yin doŋ myero kur dok inyom nyannoro i akina anyira me Kanaan." 
Genesis28:2 Wot i Paddan-aram i ot a kwarowu Betuel, ame en papa a totti, iwot inyom nyako omin totti." 
Genesis28:3 Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu myero mii winyo, mi ikwai nya bed apipim, me idok lwak jo apol," 
Genesis28:4 dok mi yin kede ikwai ibed wunu bala Iburaim, me ilo lobo ame ibedo iye acalo welo-ni, lobo ame rik Obaŋa omio baŋ Iburaim.”" 
Genesis28:5 Icaka te cwayo Yakobo wot oko i Paddan-aram baŋ Laban wot a Betuel me Aram, ame obedo omin a Lebeka tota a Yakobo kede Ecau." 
Genesis28:6 Ecau oneno ni Icaka doŋ otyeko lammi Yakobo winyo, dok daŋ ocwao oko i Paddan-aram, me wot nyomo nyako me kuno, dok daŋ olamme winyo ocike ni myero mom nyom nyako moro me Kanaan," 
Genesis28:7 dok Yakobo daŋ owinyo kop a pappere kede tottere, te wot oko i Paddan-aram." 
Genesis28:8 Ecau ka onenno ni kite anyira me Kanaan mom yomoro cuny pappere Icaka," 
Genesis28:9 en daŋ te wot baŋ Icmael, te wot nyom iye, medo i kom monne acon ca. Onyomo Makalat, nyaki Icmael wot Iburaim, amin a Nebayot." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo oya i Beer-ceba te dok tutuŋ Karan. 
Genesis28:11 A doŋ piny oyuto, en otuno i kabedo moro te buto kuno dyeworrono. En okwanyo gweŋŋoro acel te keto me teno wie, te buta i kabedo-nono." 
Genesis28:12 Lek te bino i wie ame omie oneno acoge ame ocuŋ piny kun wie ogudo polo. Omalaika Obaŋa onwoŋo tye a lolle iye kun oyito malo, odwogo piny." 
Genesis28:13 En te neno Rwot kun tye ocuŋ tuŋ wie kun kobo ni, “An a Rwot Obaŋa a kwarowu Iburaim, kede Obaŋa Icaka; abino miyi loba ame ibuto iye-ni, abino miyo baŋi kede baŋ ikwai." 
Genesis28:14 Ikwai bino bedo apol bala apua me lobo, dok daŋ ibino nya imedde wunu tuŋ to kede tuŋ kide, tuŋ anyarodi kede tuŋ anyarolum. Dok rok luŋ me wi lobo bino nwoŋo winyo i komi kede i kom ikwai." 
Genesis28:15 Nen ba, an atye kedi, abino gwoki i kabedo luŋ ame yin ibino wot iye, dok abino dwoggo yin cen naka i lobo man. Mom abino boli kadi acelloro tuno wan ame acobo gin ame akobbi luŋ.”" 
Genesis28:16 A doŋ Yakobo oco i waŋ nino, okobo ni, “Ateni, Rwot kara tye i kabedo man, an onwoŋo mom aŋeo.”" 
Genesis28:17 Lworo te make atek kun en kobo ni, “Kabedo man kara iyiliyili kit man! Man gire ot Obaŋa ikome, man doggola me polo.”" 
Genesis28:18 Yakobo oya odiko con, te tiŋo gweŋ ame eteno i wie, te cibo cuŋ atira, eka te onyo moo i wi gweŋŋono." 
Genesis28:19 En te cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Betel, ento nyiŋ kabedo-nono yam koŋ obedo Luj." 
Genesis28:20 Yakobo te kwoŋ ni, “Ka ce Obaŋa bino bedo keda, kun gwoka i wotta-ni, dok bino miya cam me acama, kede boŋo me aruka," 
Genesis28:21 dok bino miya adwogo i ot a pappa i kuc, Rwot doŋ bino bedo Obaŋana." 
Genesis28:22 Gweŋ ame acibo ocuŋ atira kan-ni, bino doko ot Obaŋa, dok daŋ abino dwoko baŋi acel me apar me jami luŋ ame ibino miya.”" 
Genesis29:1 Yakobo dok te medde i wottere naka i lobo a jo ame tye tuŋ kide. 
Genesis29:2 Kare ame en obedo neneno piny, oneno akoŋŋoro i dye bar, rommi onwoŋo tye obuto piny kuno i dul adek apapat i ŋet akoŋŋono, pien rommi rik mato pii kannono. Dog akoŋŋono rik onwoŋo ocego i twon gweŋŋoro." 
Genesis29:3 Kare i kare ka rommi doŋ ocokere kuno, okwat cokere te loro gweŋ oko i dog akoŋ, eka daŋ dok ote dwoko kakare ka rommi doŋ otyeko mato pii." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo te kobbi jo a rik tye kuno ni, “Omegona, kara iya wunu i kwene?” Gin te gamo ni, “Wan oya i Karan.”" 
Genesis29:5 Yakobo te penyogi ni, “Iŋeo wunu Laban wot a Nakor?” Gin te gamo ni, “Wan oŋee.”" 
Genesis29:6 En dok te penyogi ni, “En tye aber?” Gin te gamo ni, “En gire tye aber. Neno nyare Lakeri ca bino i rommi ca!”" 
Genesis29:7 En te kobo ni, “Kara ceŋ pwod tye do, caa mom ru oromo me coko lim akwo karacel. Mi wunu rommi mat pii me iwot ikwagi wunu doki.”" 
Genesis29:8 Cite gin te dokke iye ni, “Pe otwero miyogi ituno ka lim akwo ocokere karacel, gweŋ daŋ doŋ ocoro oko teŋe i dog akoŋ, en amio ote miyogi mato pii.”" 
Genesis29:9 A kun Yakobo pwod tye akop kedgi, Lakeri te pello kun okelo rommi a pappere, pien onwoŋo rik en a kwaogi." 
Genesis29:10 Yakobo ka oneno Lakeri nya nero mere Laban kede rommi a nero mere Laban, en owoto, te coro gweŋ oko i dog akoŋ, te miyo rommi pii mato." 
Genesis29:11 Yakobo te noto lem Lakeri kun cunye yom atek. 
Genesis29:12 Yakobo te titti Lakeri ni en obedo omaro mere ikome, tottere Lebeka. Lakeri te riŋo paco wot kobbi pappere." 
Genesis29:13 Kare ame Laban owinyo pi atin aminnere, oriŋo te wot jole, okwako kore kun noto leme, eka te tere i ode. Yakobo te titti Laban kop luŋ ame otimere." 
Genesis29:14 Laban te kobbe ni, “Yin kom cogona kede riŋo koma!” En te bedo baŋe dwe acel." 
Genesis29:15 Laban te kobbi Yakobo ni, “Kadi yin ibedo okeona, myero iti baŋa aboŋo culloro? Yin myero ikobba gin ame imito ni kono amii pi ticci.”" 
Genesis29:16 Laban onwoŋo tye anyira mere aryo, nyare adittere nyiŋe onwoŋo Lea, eka en atidi mere te bedo Lakeri." 
Genesis29:17 Lea rik nyako a waŋe obedo dimidimi, ento Lakeri onwoŋo mwonya atek meicel, ame ber me anena." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo onwoŋo maro Lakeri, en omio en te kobbi Laban ni, “Abino tic mwaka abiro pi Lakeri nyari atidi.”" 
Genesis29:19 Laban te gamo ni, “Bedo ber ka amie baŋi kato ame amie baŋ ŋattoro ocele; yin bed baŋa.”" 
Genesis29:20 Yakobo te tic mwakki abiro pi Lakeri, ento mwakki-nono luŋ obedo kom aduno aduna i baŋ Yakobo pien en rik onwoŋo maro Lakeri atek." 
Genesis29:21 Yakobo te doŋ kobbi Laban ni, “Mia ba doŋ dakona me abed kede, pien kare a rik omoko doŋ otum oko,”" 
Genesis29:22 Laban te tedo arama, te lwoŋo iye jo luŋ a rik tye i kabedo-nono." 
Genesis29:23 Otyeno en te kelo nyare Lea baŋ Yakobo, Yakobo te cako buta kede acalo cege." 
Genesis29:24 Laban te daŋ miyo aŋeca mere Jilpa baŋ nyare Lea, me kony Lea." 
Genesis29:25 Cite odiko ka piny oru, Yakobo onwoŋo ni dok elunyo nyomere i Lea. Omio en te penyo Laban ni, “Kara omio dok itima aman kono? An rik mom onwoŋo abedo tic gira pi Lakeri? Ibwola kara piŋo, nera?”" 
Genesis29:26 Laban ogamo ni, “Turwa kan mom otimo amannono. Mom ogeo miyo nyako atidi nyomere kun en adwoŋ adoŋ i ot." 
Genesis29:27 Yin koŋ ityek cabit me nyomerewu-ni oko, ate dok bino miyo Lakeri daŋ baŋi pi tic ame ibino tiyo pi mwakki abiro ocele.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo daŋ te ye tyeko cabit acel me nyomeregi, eka Laban te miye dok nyomo Lakeri." 
Genesis29:29 Te miyo aŋeca mere Bila baŋ Lakeri, me kony Lakeri." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo te cako buta daŋ i Lakeri acalo cege kun maro Lakeri kato Lea. En dok te medde tic pi mwakki abiro ocele. 
Genesis29:31 Ka Rwot oneno ni Lea mom omaro, oyabo ot nyodo mere kun Lakeri pwod oraŋa." 
Genesis29:32 Lea oyac eka te nywalo atin awobi, te cako nyiŋe Reuben, kun kobo ni, “Pien Rwot oneno canna, man doŋ bino miyo cwara mara.”" 
Genesis29:33 En dok te yac, te nywalo atin awobi, te cako nyiŋe Cimeon, kun kobo ni, “Pien Rwot owinyo ni an odaga, omio en dok omedo miya atin-ni.”" 
Genesis29:34 Dok te medo yac, te nywalo atin awobi, te kobo ni, “Aa, man doŋ bino miyo cwara dwogo i koma, pien doŋ anywale awobe odoko adek twal.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Levi," 
Genesis29:35 Dok te medo yac te nywalo atin awobi, te kobo ni, “Man doŋ abino pako Rwot.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Juda. I ŋe man, en koŋ dok te cuŋ oko." 
Genesis30:1 Ka Lakeri oneno ni mom enywalo atinnoro baŋ Yakobo, nyeko ocako make i kom aminnere. En te kobbi Yakobo ni, “Mia an daŋ itino, ce ka mom itwero miya itino, an adeye gira oko.”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo yie te waŋ oko i kome, te kobo ni, “An adoko Obaŋa bo? Obaŋa gire en ame ogeŋi nywal.”" 
Genesis30:3 Lakeri te kobo ni “Kara po aŋecana Bila eneo, yin doŋ donnye me en nywal atinnoro i coŋa, me atot ya an daŋ anwoŋ itino pire.”" 
Genesis30:4 En te miyo aŋeca mere Bila baŋ Yakobo, te gamo acalo cege." 
Genesis30:5 Bila oyac, te nywalli Yakobo atin awobi." 
Genesis30:6 Lakeri te kobo ni, “Obaŋa doŋ otyeko ŋolo kop aber baŋa, owinyo daŋ kwacca, omia atin awobi.” En te cako nyiŋe ni Dan." 
Genesis30:7 Bila, aŋeca a Lakeri dok te yac, te nywalli Yakobo atin awobi." 
Genesis30:8 Lakeri te kobo ni, “Aromo atek meicel wan aminna, ento doŋ aloc.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Naputali." 
Genesis30:9 Ka Lea doŋ oneno ni etyeko cuŋ doŋ oko, kun mom dok enywalo atinnoro, en daŋ omio aŋeca mere Jilpa baŋ Yakobo wek bed cege." 
Genesis30:10 Aŋeca a Lea daŋ te nywalli Yakobo atin awobi. 
Genesis30:11 Lea te kobo ni, “An yora i gum ba.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Gad." 
Genesis30:12 Jilpa aŋeca a Lea dok te nywalli Yakobo atin awobi me aryo. 
Genesis30:13 Lea te kobo ni, “An winyona tye, pien mon bino lwoŋa ni, A kome iwinyo!” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Acer." 
Genesis30:14 I kare me kayo ŋano, Reuben owoto i poto te nwoŋo iye yat nyodo te kwanyo kelo baŋ tottere Lea. Lakeri te kobbi Lea ni, “Ama nyeka, duta ba yat nyodo a wodi aduno.”" 
Genesis30:15 Ento Lea te dokke ni, “Cwara ame imao-nono mom doŋ rommi? Imito dok tero daŋ yat nyodo a woda?” Lakeri ogamo ni, “Aco ka amanno ba, en tin doŋ bino buto baŋi dyewor me imia yat a wodi.”" 
Genesis30:16 Otyeno ame Yakobo onwoŋo tye abino kun oya i poto, Lea owoto ojole i waŋa yo, te kobbe ni, “Myero tin yin doŋ idony i oda, pien atyeko wili oko i yat nyodo a woda.” Yakobo te buta baŋ Lea dyeworrono." 
Genesis30:17 Obaŋa owinyo kwac a Lea, omio oyac, te nywalli Yakobo atin awobi me abiccere." 
Genesis30:18 Lea te kobo ni, “Obaŋa doŋ oculo waŋ miyo aŋecana baŋ cwara oko.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Icakar." 
Genesis30:19 Lea te dok yac, te nywalli Yakobo atin me abicellere." 
Genesis30:20 Lea te kobo ni, “Obaŋa doŋ omia mot aber i nyomere, aman doŋ cwara bino mara, pien doŋ onywalo otino abicel twal wan kede.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Jabulon." 
Genesis30:21 Icennere dok te nywalo nyare, te cako nyiŋe ni Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Obaŋa te dok cako paro pi Lakeri, te winyo kwaccere, te yabo ot nyodo mere." 
Genesis30:23 Lakeri te yac, te nywalo atin awobi, te kobo ni, “Obaŋa doŋ otyeko kwanyo lewic i koma,”" 
Genesis30:24 En te cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Yucepu, kun kobo ni, “Myero Obaŋa omedda dok atin awobi ocele.”" 
Genesis30:25 A doŋ Lakeri onywalo Yucepu oko, Yakobo okobbi Laban ni, “Amito doŋ iweka adok i lobowa." 
Genesis30:26 Mia monna kede itinona ame an atio pirgi atia baŋi, me iweka doŋ awoti; pien yin iŋeo kit ame atio kede baŋi.”" 
Genesis30:27 Laban te gamo ni, “Ka ce ber an ikobo, atyeko tyeto aniaŋ ateni ni Rwot omia winyo piri." 
Genesis30:28 Doŋ ba, yin myero ititta gin ame imito ami baŋi me ocarani, an abino miyi.”" 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo odokke ni, “Yin ikomi iŋeo kite ame atio kede baŋi, kite ame agwoko kede limmi" 
Genesis30:30 Limmi rik nok atek, koŋ inen kite ame doŋ omedde kede wok; Rwot obedo miyi winyo kannoro luŋ ame an alokere iye. Kara doŋ aman an abino nwoŋo lim pi jona awene?”" 
Genesis30:31 Laban te penye ni, “Kara doŋ myero amii ŋo ba?” Yakobo te gamo ni, “Ginnoro ame yin ibino miya mom tye; ento ka ce iye, mia dok amedde kwayo limmi." 
Genesis30:32 Yeya tin abebea i dye limmi akwo luŋ, ayer rommi luŋ agiragira onyo en apecel, kede itino rommi acollege, karacel kede dyegi luŋ ame obedo agiragira onyo en apecel; magi-nono bino bedo me ocarana." 
Genesis30:33 Kittono, cil a cunya bino nen icen ka ce yin ibino ŋiyo ocarana. Dyelloro ame ibino nwoŋo tye baŋa ame mom agiragira onyo apecel kede romo moro a mom col, gin luŋ ibino tero ni akwalo akwala.”" 
Genesis30:34 Laban te kobo ni, “Koŋ doŋ bed kit ame ikobo-nono.”" 
Genesis30:35 I ninonono Laban te yero nyogi dyegi luŋ ame obedo agiragira onyo apecel, kede akale dyegi luŋ agiragira onyo apecel, dyegi luŋ ame tye kede tonnoro atar i komgi; kede itino rommi luŋ acol, te miyogi baŋ awobe mere," 
Genesis30:36 te daŋ poko akinagi oko i Yakobo kun borrere romo wot me nino adek twal. Yakobo doŋ te kwayo lim ame adoŋ baŋ Laban. 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo te jako jaŋ yago kede yao, kede ogali, te liliŋo kun dadano pokgi, weko kome kan atar doŋ olaŋara." 
Genesis30:38 En te pyelo jaŋ yen elilino-nono i nyim rommi kede dyegi i weer ame pii mol iye, ame lim akwo mato iye pii, pien nyogi kwaro en a monnege ka gin abino mato pii." 
Genesis30:39 Megi dyegi kede megi rommi ame okwaro i nyim jaŋ yen aliŋalina-nono, jo-nono nywalo itino agiragira onyo apecel kede aliŋaliŋa." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo te poko itino rommi-ni pat. En te leleko megi dyegi kede megi rommi dwoko i mea Laban agiragira. 
Genesis30:41 Kare luŋ ka nyogi dyegi kede rommi atekkege kwaro megi dyegi kede megi rommi, Yakobo wie mom wil iketo jaŋ yennere ame aliŋaliŋa ca, i pii ame amol i nyimgi, me gin yac i akina jaŋ yennerenono." 
Genesis30:42 Ento en mom keto jaŋ yennerenono i nyim en agorogoro mege; mannono te miyo en agorogoro mege bedo mea Laban, cite en a komgi yot te bedo mea Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Mannono te miyo Yakobo doko twon alonyo moro a mom kobere, kun odurre i lim akwo, aŋeca, opii, inaga kede kane." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobo te bedo winyo awobe a Laban kun kobo ni, “Yakobo doŋ omao lim a papa wa luŋ, aman en doŋ odoko twon alonyo moro a mom kobere kede lim a papawa.”" 
Genesis31:2 Yakobo te neno Laban mom dok nene i waŋ aber bala a yam con," 
Genesis31:3 Rwot te kobbi Yakobo ni, “Dok doŋ i lobo a kwariwu, baŋ jowu, an abino bedo kedi.”" 
Genesis31:4 Yakobo te lwoŋo Lakeri kede Lea i bar kan a limmere tye iye. 
Genesis31:5 Te kobbigi ni, “An doŋ aneno ni papawu mom dok nena i waŋ aber bala a yam con, cite Obaŋa a papawa obedo gwoka gira." 
Genesis31:6 Wun daŋ iŋeo wunu kite ame abedo tic kede baŋ papawu kede tek koma luŋ," 
Genesis31:7 ento kadi amannono, en obedo bwola abwola kun loloko ocara me ticca tyen apar twal, cite Obaŋa mom oye en timo ginnoro arac i koma." 
Genesis31:8 Ka ce en okobo ni, ‘Lim akwo luŋ aliŋaliŋa bino bedo megi’, gin luŋ onywalo aliŋaliŋa. Ka en dok oloko doge ni, ‘Rommi kede dyegi luŋ ame obino nywalo agiragira en ame bino bedo me ocarani’, gin luŋ dok onywalo en agiragira keken." 
Genesis31:9 I yore-nono Obaŋa okwanyo lim i ciŋ papawu oko te miyo baŋa. 
Genesis31:10 I kare ame rik nyogi tye akwaro megi dyegi kede megi rommi, atiŋo waŋa malo i waŋ lek ate neno nyogi ame atepo obedo agiragira, kede aliŋaliŋa kede apecel." 
Genesis31:11 Amalaika Obaŋa te lwoŋa i waŋ lek ni, ‘Yakobo’, an ate gamo ni, ‘An ene.’" 
Genesis31:12 Eka te kobba ni, ‘Koŋ itir; waŋi inen nyogi ame atepo, gin luŋ obedo aliŋaliŋa, onyo apecel onyo agiragira, pien doŋ atyeko neno ginnoro ducu ame Laban tye ka timo i komi." 
Genesis31:13 An Obaŋa me Betel kan ame rik ionyo iye moo i wi kidi ca, eka ite daŋ kwoŋ baŋa. Amito iru ya oko i lobo-ni idok i lobo ame rik onywali iye’.”" 
Genesis31:14 Lakeri kede Lea te gamo ni, “Tye dok dul limmoro i ot a papawa?" 
Genesis31:15 Mom doŋ en nenowa acalo rok ocele? En doŋ otyeko catowa oko, dok daŋ tye acamo lim ame imie pirwa oko." 
Genesis31:16 Lim luŋ ame Obaŋa doŋ okwanyo oko baŋ papa wa doŋ megwa kede me itinowa. Doŋ pi mannono ba, gin ame Obaŋa okobo, en a myero doŋ itim.”" 
Genesis31:17 Yakobo te ya keto awobe mere kede monnere i wi inaga," 
Genesis31:18 en te kolo limmere luŋ, kede jami mere ducu ame enwoŋo i Padan-aram, te cako wottere me dok baŋ pappere Icaka i lobo Kanaan." 
Genesis31:19 Kare ame Laban owoto mworo yer rommi mere, Lakeri okwalo jogi a pappere ducu i ot." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo obwolo Laban kun mom otitte pi wottere. 
Genesis31:21 Mannono omio en olwi oko i jami mere luŋ, te wot ŋolo kulo Efurate, kun dok tutuŋ kidi me Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 A doŋ nino okato adek twal, ote titti Laban ni, “Yakobo olwi owoto gire oko.”" 
Genesis31:23 Laban te mukere i wati mere luŋ, oryemo yorgi niŋa abiro, eka ote nwoŋe i kidi me Gilead." 
Genesis31:24 Cite dyewor Obaŋa te bino baŋ Laban, dano me Aram, i wan lek, te kobbe ni, “Gwokere kur iwot ikob ginnoro baŋ Yakobo.”" 
Genesis31:25 Laban rik te mako Yakobo iyo. En onwoŋo Yakobo doŋ oguro kema mere i akina kiddi, cite Laban kede wati mere te guro megi i wi kidi me Gilead." 
Genesis31:26 Laban te penyo Yakobo ni, “Kara piŋo itima kit man ba? Ibwola kit-ti, ite tiŋo anyirana kede jamina lwi kedgi bala imaogi i mony?" 
Genesis31:27 Ŋo kara okeli lwi i muŋ kun mom ititta? Aco kono onwoŋo rik atwero ciki i yomcuny kun owero wer ajaa kede naŋa opuk. 
Genesis31:28 Ŋo kara omoni miya ciko anyirana kun anoto lemgi kede me itinogi? Itimo tim me miŋo meicel. 
Genesis31:29 Onwoŋo atwero timi lit, cite Obaŋa a pappi okobo keda tin iwor ni, ‘Gwokere kur iwot ikob kopporo baŋ Yakobo.’" 
Genesis31:30 Nen ba, kadi bed yin iya oko me wot pi paro dok i ot a pappi, piŋo kara dok ikwalo cal jogina?”" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo ogamo dog Laban ni, “An onwoŋo abedo kede lworo, pien rik an atamo ni yin ibino mayo anyirani oko i baŋa." 
Genesis31:32 Doŋ ba, ŋat ame ibino nwoŋo cal jogini i akina jami mere, mom bino bedo kwo. Yin nyut giri moro ame tye baŋa i nyim jowa kan, me ikwany giri.” Yakobo onwoŋo mom ŋeo ni Lakeri okwalo cal jogi." 
Genesis31:33 Laban te donyo i kema a Yakobo, kede mea Lea kede mea mon aŋeca aryo luŋ, cite mom naka onwoŋo cal jogi mere. En te ya i kema a Lea te donyo i mea Lakeri." 
Genesis31:34 I kare-nono onwoŋo Lakeri orwako cal jogi i te lao ame obedo kede i wi inaga ame onwoŋo obedo kede piny. Laban te ŋiŋio jami luŋ a tye i kema ento naka mom onwoŋogi iye. 
Genesis31:35 Lakeri te kobbi pappere ni, “Adwoŋŋa, kur cunyi waŋ ba i koma, pien mom atwero ya malo i nyimi kun atwo twowa me mom.” Laban naka mom te nwoŋo cal jogi mere kadi bed oyenyo atek." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo te ŋo oko, te da i Laban kun penye ni, “Kara doŋ ane gin ame abalo? Abalo ŋo, en ame omio yin iryemo yora atek ateka-ni?" 
Genesis31:37 Yin doŋ iyenyo jamina luŋ, ka ce tye giri moro ame inwoŋo, kel iket i nyim joni kede jona, me gin ŋol kop i akina wan aryoni." 
Genesis31:38 An atyeko baŋi mwakki pyeraryo, ento min romo onyo min dyelloro mom gire yie oony, mom daŋ amwodo nyok romoni moro kadi acel." 
Genesis31:39 Limmi luŋ ame lee tim omwodo mom adwoggo baŋi, an en ame alunyo culo waŋe. Mom tye moro ame orwenyo dyeceŋ onyo dyewor ame mom ipenya pire." 
Genesis31:40 Ceŋ rik ŋwaŋa dyeceŋ kede koyo daŋ ocira dyewor, nino daŋ obedo remma." 
Genesis31:41 Mwakki pyeraryo ame abedo kede i odi, atio baŋi mwakki apar wie aŋwen pi anyirani kede mwakki abicel pi lim, cite i mwakki-nono luŋ ibedo loloko ocarana oromo tyen apar twal." 
Genesis31:42 Kono mom Obaŋa a kwarona, Obaŋa Iburaim, kede Obaŋa ame pappa Icaka lworo obedo keda, kono tin icwaa awoto turwa i ciŋa nono. Obaŋa oneno peko ame abeo iye kede tic ame atio gira i ciŋa, omio tin iwor en ojuki.”" 
Genesis31:43 Laban te gamo dog Yakobo ni, “Anyira mega, itinogi mega, lim luŋ mega, kede jami luŋ ame ineno-ni gin luŋ mega. Kara ŋo ame myero tin atim pi anyirana kede itinona?" 
Genesis31:44 Biye, me oket cikere moro i akinawa me bedo caden i akina wan kedi.”" 
Genesis31:45 Yakobo te tiŋo kidi cibo cun atira. 
Genesis31:46 Yakobo te kobbi jo mere ni, “Cok wunu gweŋe.” Gin te depo gweŋe coko karacel, eka gin te cem i ŋet gweŋe ocoko karacellono." 
Genesis31:47 Laban te cako nyiŋ kabedonono ni Jegar-cakaduta, ento Yakobo te cako mege ni, Gilead." 
Genesis31:48 Laban te kobo ni, “Gweŋe ame ocoko karacel-li obedo caden i akina wan kedi.” Mannono en omio ocako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Gilead." 
Genesis31:49 Kidi ame ocibo ocuŋ atira ocako nyiŋe ni Mijipa, pien okobo ni, “Rwot myero gwok kinwa, ka doŋ opokere oko." 
Genesis31:50 Ka ce ibino wuno anyirana onyo ibino nyomo dok mon ocele dodo i komgi, kadi bed amanni ame cadennoro a dano mom i akinawa kan, ento Obaŋa bino bedo caden i akinawa.”" 
Genesis31:51 Laban dok te kobbi Yakobo ni, “Nen gweŋ ame ocoko karacel-li kede man ocuŋ atira-ni ame otyeko keto i akina wan kedi." 
Genesis31:52 Gweŋ ocoko-ni, kede kidi ocuŋ atira-ni, gin caden. An mom dok abino kato gweŋ ame ocokoni kede kidi ocuŋ atira-ni me bino baŋi, yin daŋ mom ibino kato gweŋ ame ocokere-ni me bino baŋa, me bino timo ginnoro arac." 
Genesis31:53 Obaŋa Iburaim kede Obaŋa a Nakor kede Obaŋa a pappi obed aŋolkop i akinawa.” Yakobo te kwoŋ i nyiŋ Gat a rik pappere Icaka olworo. 
Genesis31:54 Yakobo te ŋolo lee me yalo Obaŋa i wi kidi, te lwoŋo jo mere luŋ bino camo kede. Kare ame gin doŋ ocamo cem otum, gin te buta i kidi kuno dyeworrono." 
Genesis31:55 A doŋ piny oru, Laban oya te noto lem ikwae kede me anyira mere, te lammigi winyo; te doŋ pokere kedgi dok paco tuŋe." 
Genesis32:1 Yakobo omedde i wottere, omalaika a Rwot te rwatte kede." 
Genesis32:2 Ka Yakobo onenogi, okobo ni, “Man mony a Rwot.” Omio en te cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Makanaim." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo te cwayo kwena i nyim baŋ ominnere Ecau, i lobo me Ceir, ame obedo lobo a jo Edom." 
Genesis32:4 Opwonyo okwena me kobbi Ecau ni, “Amironi Yakobo obedo bedo baŋ Laban kare luŋ naka tuno i kare-ni." 
Genesis32:5 Aman atye i twoni, kana ecipan, kede lim akwo apipim, opii kede aŋeca daŋ ecipan; acwao kwena baŋi yin adwoŋŋa, me aton ya berra nen i nyimi.”" 
Genesis32:6 Okwena ame ocwao ka odwogo baŋ Yakobo, gin okobbe ni, “Wan otuno naka baŋ ominni Ecau, en tye abino i yo i jo mia aŋwen me bino joli.”" 
Genesis32:7 Lworo te mako Yakobo atek, koyo daŋ te onyere oko i kome. En te poko jo mere oko i dul aryo, anaka limmere luŋ, dyegi kede rommi, kede dok kede inaga," 
Genesis32:8 pien en onwoŋo otamo i cunye ni, “Ka ce Ecau bino lweny i dul acel, te rweyo oko luŋ, dul acel” odoŋŋere bino bwot." 
Genesis32:9 Yakobo te kwayo Obaŋa ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa a kwarona Iburaim, Obaŋa a pappa Icaka, yin giri ame ikobba ni, ‘Doŋ idok paco turwu baŋ atekerewu, an abino bedo kedi aber.’" 
Genesis32:10 An gira mom a myero kadi acelloro i mar meri kede kica meri luŋ a mom lokere ame inyuto baŋ amironi; pien rik abin aŋolo kulo Jordan kun atye kom ka abiro keken i ciŋa, ento aman doŋ apokere dul aryo twal." 
Genesis32:11 Akwai me lara i ciŋ ominna, lara i ciŋ Ecau; pien alwore, onyo ca en obino me nekowa oko luŋ, mon karacel kede itinogi." 
Genesis32:12 Aco yin rik ikobo ni, ‘Abino bedo kedi aber, abino miyo ikwai bedo acal i kwoyo me dog nam, ame mom romo akwana pi pollere’.”" 
Genesis32:13 Yakobo te buto kannono i ninonono, te kwanyo dul limmogo cwayo i nyim baŋ ominnere Ecau me mot." 
Genesis32:14 Ocwao megi dyegi mia aryo kede nyogi dyegi pyeraryo, megi rommi mia aryo kede nyogi rommi pyeraryo," 
Genesis32:15 megi inaga ame onyeto cakgi pyeradek kede itinogi, megi dok pyeraŋwen kede twoni apar, megi kana pyeraryo kede twoni mere apar." 
Genesis32:16 Oketo magi luŋ i ciŋ omiro mere, kun dul acel acel bedo papat. Okobbi omiro mere ni, “Wun wot wunu i nyima, myero iwek akinawu lagoro ya i kom dul acel acel.”" 
Genesis32:17 Okobbi ŋat otelo yo ni, “Ka ominna Ecau orwatte kedi te penyi ni, ‘Yin kara i dano aŋa? Iwot kwene? Lim i nyimi-ni luŋ me aŋa?’" 
Genesis32:18 yin myero idokke ni, ‘Man lim amironi Yakobo, gin luŋ obedo mot ame en ocwao baŋ adwoŋŋa Ecau, en daŋ tye alubo yorwa.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Dano me aryo kede me adek, kede jo luŋ ame akolo lim ocikogi luŋ i kop acellono, ni, “Wun daŋ ibino kobo wunu amannono ka ce irwatte wunu kede Ecau," 
Genesis32:20 kun imedo wunu daŋ ni, ‘Amironi Yakobo daŋ tye alubo yorwa.’ ” Pien en onwoŋo otamo ni, “Koŋ abino geyo kweyo cunye i mot ame acwao i nyima; wek icennere ka doŋ abino neno waŋe, atoŋ ya twero miye jola aber.”" 
Genesis32:21 En te miyo mot geyo telo nyime, ento en ikome te buto kan ame oguro iye kema." 
Genesis32:22 En te ya oko i dyeworrono, kun woto kede monnere aryo kede aŋeca mege aryo, karacel kede itino mege apar wie acel. Gin te wot ŋolo kulo Jabok." 
Genesis32:23 En te tero jo mere ŋolo kulo, karacel, i jami mere luŋ a rik tye baŋe." 
Genesis32:24 Kare ame Yakobo odoŋ kene, lo moro te bino wutte kede naka kaibai." 
Genesis32:25 Kare ame lonnono oneno ni mom eromo loyo Yakobo, odoŋo awaŋmac a Yakobo, em Yakobo te wil oko oyotoyot, kun pwod tye awutte kede." 
Genesis32:26 En lonnono te kobo ni, “Weka doŋ awot ba, nen piny doŋ ceggi ru oko.” Cite Yakobo te gamo ni, “Mom aweki kadi acel tuno ka koŋ ilamma winyo.”" 
Genesis32:27 Lonnono te gamo ni, “Nyiŋi ce ŋa?” En te gamo ni, “Yakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Lonnono te kobbe ni, “Cakere tin nyiŋi mom doŋ obino lwoŋo ni Yakobo, ento Icrael, pien yin ibedo romo wun Obaŋa, kede dano daŋ naka iloo.”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo te penye ni, “Aco koŋ doŋ itima ber itucca nyiŋi.” En te gamo ni, “Piŋo kara imito ŋeyo nyiŋa?” Lonnono doŋ te lamme winyo kuno." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo te cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Peniel, kun en kobo ni, “Pien atyeko neno Obaŋa waŋ i waŋ, ento pwod amedde bedo kwo.”" 
Genesis32:31 Ceŋ odonnyo onwoŋo Yakobo pwod tye i Peniel, kun doŋ awot ame akomo akoma pi eme ame onwoŋo owil oko." 
Genesis32:32 Man omio atot onyoni jo Icrael mom camo riŋo amuru me awaŋmac, pien lonnaca onwoŋo odoŋo em Yakobo i ler me awaŋmac." 
Genesis33:1 Yakobo otiŋo waŋe malo te neno Ecau tye abino i jo mere mia aŋwen. En te cako popoko itino mere baŋ Lea kede Lakeri, kede baŋ aŋeca mere aryo." 
Genesis33:2 Aŋeca mere aryo kede itinogi, en te cwayogi i nyim, Lea kede itino mere te lubogi, eka Lakeri kede wode Yucepu te doŋ coko tere," 
Genesis33:3 En ikome te ru yutte wot i nyim, i kare ame en doŋ ceggi ominnere, oryebere piny tyen abiro." 
Genesis33:4 Cite Ecau ocelo ŋwec, oriŋo me jole. Opoto i kome kun kwako kore, mako daŋ ŋute, eka te noto leme; gin luŋ ote cako koko." 
Genesis33:5 Ka Ecau dok otiŋo waŋe malo, oneno mon kede itinogi, te penyo Yakobo ni, “Maka kono jo mene abino cae?” En ogamo ni, “Magi-nono itino ame Obaŋa omio baŋ amironi pi kica mere.”" 
Genesis33:6 Aŋeca aryo karacel itinogi ka otuno ceggi baŋgi, oryebere piny." 
Genesis33:7 Lea daŋ amannono, karacel kede itino mere, ka gin otuno aceggi, oryebere piny. Yucepu kede Lakeri, ame gin en onwoŋo doŋ ogiko te jo, gin daŋ ka otuno ceggi, oryebere piny." 
Genesis33:8 Ecau te penye ni, “Kara lwak jo ecipan ame abedo rwatte kedgi-ca te koppere ŋo?” Yakobo ogamo ni, “Gin-nono luŋ me yomoro cuny adwoŋŋa, wek en pwoa.”" 
Genesis33:9 Ento Ecau te gamo ni, “Ominna, an atye i mega a romma, wek limmono luŋ bed gire megi.”" 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo ogamo ni, “Pe amannono adwoŋŋa, tim ber igam mot ame an amii-ni ka ce ineno ni ayomoro cunyi, pien iyi ateni, cuny ame ijola kede-ni, omio ka aneno waŋi, rom aroma ame aneno waŋ Obaŋa." 
Genesis33:11 Tim ber igam mot ame doŋ atyeko kelo oko baŋi, pien Obaŋa doŋ onyuto kica mere baŋa, dok daŋ atye i mega ame roma.” Yakobo te bedo diye atek i koppono tuno ka en oye, te gamo mottere-nono." 
Genesis33:12 Ecau doŋ te kobo ni, “Aco wek doŋ onywak wunu yo karacel kun an atelliwu yo.”" 
Genesis33:13 Cite Yakobo te kobo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, yin iŋeo aber ni itino pwod tino, dok daŋ atye i rommi kede dok ame itinogi pwod dot; mano bino miyo ka amiogi owoto atek ateka kadi kono pi nino acel keken, gin bino ol te bino miyo limma luŋ to oko." 
Genesis33:14 Pi mannono, myero yin iwot itel nyim amironi, kun an alubo yori momot ame rommi lim kede itino wot aboŋo peko moro naka ka atuno baŋi i Ceir.”" 
Genesis33:15 Ecau te gamo ni, “Wek koŋ aweki jo moro i akina jo ame abino kedginie”. Cite Yakobo te kobo ni, “Piŋo kara adwoŋŋa? Tim ber iwek koŋ doŋ abed amannono.”" 
Genesis33:16 Ecau gire doŋ te cako wottere oko i nino-nono ikome, me dok i Ceir." 
Genesis33:17 Yakobo te wot dok tutuŋ Cukot, te gero ode pire kene kede kabuto a limmere. En omio nyiŋ kabedo-nono olwoŋo ni Cukot." 
Genesis33:18 Icennere Yakobo doŋ te tuno gire i kuc i boma me Cekem ame tye i Kanaan, kun onwoŋo oya i Paddan-aram. En te guro kema mere i nyim bomanono." 
Genesis33:19 Dul lobo ame en onwoŋo oguro iye kema mere-nono onwoŋo owilo ciliŋ ame romo mia i baŋ itino a Kamor, ame papa a Cekem." 
Genesis33:20 En te cano keno me lam kuno, te cako nyiŋe ni El-Eloe-Icrael." 
Genesis34:1 Dina nyaka a Lea ame onwoŋo onywalo gin kede Yakobo rik owoto limo monnogo me lobo-nono. 
Genesis34:2 Cekem wot a Kamor, dano me Kivi, ame onwoŋo aloc me lobo-nono, ka onene, omake te buto kede tetek, te miye lewic." 
Genesis34:3 Mittere i kom Dina nyaka a Yakobo omedde meicel, omio en te mare atek, te kop kede i mwolo meicel." 
Genesis34:4 Cekem te doŋ penyo pappere Kamor ni, “Nyomma nyako-ni bed cega.”" 
Genesis34:5 Yakobo ka owinyo ni obalo nyare Dina, kun i kare-nono onwoŋo awobe mere tye akwat i bar. Yakobo odio cunye, oliŋ gire iti, naka waŋ ame awobe mere odwogo." 
Genesis34:6 Kamor papa a Cekem te wot baŋ Yakobo me wot penyo nyom. 
Genesis34:7 Awobe a Yakobo ka owinyo koppono, gin te dwogo oko i bar. Akemo onwoŋo omakogi atek miecel, pien timmono onwoŋo mom ber kadi acel me timere i akina Icrael; pi buto i nyaka a Yakobo. Kodi timmono mom ber me atima." 
Genesis34:8 Kamor te kop kedgi kun kobo ni, “Woda Cekem omaro nyarwu atek, tim wunu ber, iwek wunu en nyom nyarwu me bed cege," 
Genesis34:9 me wan onyomere kedwu. Miwa onyom anyirawu, me wun daŋ inyom wunu anyirawa." 
Genesis34:10 Bed wunu kedwa, kun ibedo wunu i lobo ame imito wunu. Bed wunu iye i kuc kun iwoto icato wunu iye wil, me inwoŋ wunu jami.”" 
Genesis34:11 Cekem daŋ te kobo baŋ papa a Dina kede omego mere ni, “Tima wunu ber i gin ame an atimo; yeya wunu anyom Dina, an abino culo jami luŋ ame ibino wunu ŋolo." 
Genesis34:12 Ŋol wunu gin ame imito wunu luŋ me nyom, kede me mot; an abino culo ducu, ento myero iye wunu anyom Dina bed cega.”" 
Genesis34:13 Awobe a Yakobo te gamo dog Cekem kede pappere kun gin obwologi obwola, pien en onwoŋo obalo amingi Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Gin okobbigi ni, “Mannono gin ame wan mom oromo timo ginnoro iye, pien mom otwero miyo aminwa baŋ dano a mom oliro; mano twero kelliwa lewic." 
Genesis34:15 Tye gin acel keken ame ka otimere twero miyowa oye, ginnono ene, wun myero iye lirre wunu me idok wunu calo wan." 
Genesis34:16 Mano bino miyo wan omiowu anyirawa, wan daŋ obino nyomo anyirawu, dok daŋ obino bedo kedwu; ote doŋ doko rok acel." 
Genesis34:17 Aco ka wun ikwero wunu winyo kopwa, mom ilirre wunu, wan obino tero giwa nyarwa, ote ya wot oko.”" 
Genesis34:18 Kopgi-nono te yomoro cuny Kamor karacel kede wode Cekem. 
Genesis34:19 Awobi-nu mom dok ogal, otio gin ame okobo i caa-nono cutu, pien nyaka a Yakobo onwoŋo oyomoro cunye okato kare. En onwoŋo rik dano ame omio kwogo adwoŋ meicel akato jo luŋ me ot a pappere." 
Genesis34:20 Kamor kede wode Cekem owoto i dog bomagi te poro kop i jo me bomagi kun okobo ni," 
Genesis34:21 “Jo ame bedo kedwa aber, myero wan owek wunugi bed i lobowa, ocat wil iye, pien lobowa gire lac ame romogi; wek wan onyom anyiragi, wan daŋ omigi megwa." 
Genesis34:22 Doŋ ba, tye kop acel keken ame twero miyo gin bino ye bedo kedwa, odoko rok acel kedwa, koppono ene: jowa luŋ a co myero lir del komgi me co bala gin." 
Genesis34:23 Man mom bino miyo limgi, jamigi kede leyigi luŋ doko megwa? Wan myero oye wunu kopgi me gin bed kedwa.”" 
Genesis34:24 Jo luŋ ame rik beo i dog bomagi-nono oye kop a Kamor kede wode Cekem, eka co luŋ ame beo i dog boma-nono te lirre oko." 
Genesis34:25 I nino me adekkere, ame doŋ bur a jo ame oliro okwok, Cimeon kede Levi, omego a Dina te mako pala me romogi, ote wot donyo i bomagi kun otuogi atua, ote neko co ducu." 
Genesis34:26 Kamor kede wode Cekem daŋ ote neko oko i pala romo, ote kwanyo Dina oko i ot a Cekem tero oko." 
Genesis34:27 Itino a Yakobo te bino i boma a jo ame oneko, ote yako jamigi pi balo amingi." 
Genesis34:28 Oyako rommi, dok kede kane-gu luŋ kede ginnoro luŋ ame gin onwoŋo tye i boma kede i bar." 
Genesis34:29 Abargi karacel kede itinogi kede mongi luŋ gin oyako oko, anaka jami ame onwoŋo tye i udigi, ote wot kede oko." 
Genesis34:30 Yakobo te kobbi Cimeon kede Levi ni, “Wun doŋ ikelo wunu can oko i koma, ibalo wunu doŋ nyiŋa oko baŋ wegi lobo-ni, jo Kanaan kede jo Periji. Kit acalo an jona nok, ka gin bino notte karacel te cako lweny i koma, gin bino nekowa tyekowa oko.”" 
Genesis34:31 Gin te dok iye ni, “Yin onwoŋo imito wan owekgi otim aminwa bala alaya?”" 
Genesis35:1 Obaŋa okobbi Yakobo ni, “Ya iwot ibed i Betel iyik keno lam kuno pira an Obaŋa ame rik anen baŋi i kare ame riŋo ominni Ecau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Yakobo te kobbi jo ode kede jo luŋ ame bedo baŋe ni, “Bol wunu kit obaŋa luŋ ame obedo mea rok ocele, ilonyere wunu kenwu, ite loko wunu rukwu oko." 
Genesis35:3 Ya owot wunu i Betel, owot oyik wunu keno me lam kuno, pi Obaŋa ame rik ogamo doga i kare ame atye i can, dok obedo gwokowa i kabedo luŋ ame owoto iye.”" 
Genesis35:4 Gin te miyo baŋ Yakobo kit obaŋa luŋ ame obedo mea rok ocele, ame onwoŋo tye baŋgi karacel kede atem luŋ me yitgi. Yakobo te yikogi i te kworo ame onwoŋo tye ceggi i Cekem." 
Genesis35:5 Kare ame gin tye iyo, lworo adwoŋ meicel ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa omakoboma luŋ ame onwoŋo doŋ ceggi kedgi, omio mom ote ryemo yo itino a Yakobo," 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo kede jo a rik tye baŋe luŋ te bino i Luj, ame en Betel, a rik tye i lobo Kanaan," 
Genesis35:7 te cano keno me lam kuno, eka te cako nyiŋ kabedonono ni El-betel; pien kabedo-nono obedo kan ame rik Obaŋa onyutte gire kene baŋ Yakobo i kare ame en riŋo ominnere." 
Genesis35:8 Debora apidi a Lebeka te to oko, ote yike i te kworo ame tye tuŋ piny me Betel. Nyiŋ kabedonono ote cako ni Allon-bakut." 
Genesis35:9 Obaŋa dok omedo nyutte baŋ Yakobo i kare ame en oya i Padan-aram, te lamme gum." 
Genesis35:10 Obaŋa okobbe ni, “Nyiŋi Yakobo, ento mom dok obino lwoŋi ni Yakobo; nyiŋi doŋ bino bedo Icrael.”" 
Genesis35:11 Obaŋa okobbe ni, “An Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu. Nywal, inya, imedde; rok luŋ bino ya i komi, kede lwak rok ecipan, kede rwode adoŋodoŋo daŋ bino ya i komi." 
Genesis35:12 Lobo ame rik amio baŋ Iburaim kede baŋ Icaka abino miyo baŋi, abino miyo baŋ ikwai en lobo-nono.”" 
Genesis35:13 Obaŋa te ya oko i baŋe i kabedo ame okobo kede iye-nono, te yito malo," 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo te cibo kidi cuŋ atira kan ame Obaŋa okobo kede iye-nono, te liyo gi-yalo Obaŋa me amata i kom kidi ame ecibonono, eka te onyo moo i kome." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobo te cako nyiŋ kabedo ame Obaŋa okobo kede iye-nono ni Betel. 
Genesis35:16 Gin te ya oko i Betel, medde i wot anyim; ame onwoŋo gin mom ru otuno Eparat, kun onwoŋo pwod bobor, rem me nywal te goyo Lakeri oko, nywallere te bedo atetek." 
Genesis35:17 Kare ame onwoŋo en tye alolle atek ateka i colle, dako ame onwoŋo acole te kobo ni, “Kur ilwor, pien amanni dok inwoŋo atin awobi ocele.”" 
Genesis35:18 A doŋ kwo mere cegi tum (pien oto), ocako nyiŋe ni Benoni, ento pappere ocako ni Benjamin." 
Genesis35:19 Lakeri oto ote yiko iyo Eparat (ame en Beterekem). 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo te cibo kidi cuŋ atira i wi lyellere, kidi ame ocuŋ atira i wi lyella Lakeri-nono pwod tye naka atot tin." 
Genesis35:21 Icrael te medde i wottere anyim, oguro ke ma mere i pem me Eder loka tuŋ ca." 
Genesis35:22 Icrael te bedo i lobo-nono, Reuben te wot buto aŋeca a pappere Bila, Icrael te winyo timerenono oko. Awobe a Yakobo rik tye gin apar wie aryo." 
Genesis35:23 Itino a Lea onwoŋo ene: Reuben ame obedo atin kao a Yakobo, Cimeon, Levi, Juda, Icakar kede Jabulon." 
Genesis35:24 Aco mea Lakeri onwoŋo ene: Yucepu kede Benjamin," 
Genesis35:25 Itino a Bila aŋeca a Lakeri ene: Dan kede Naputali. 
Genesis35:26 Itino a Jilpa aŋeca a Lea te bedo ene: Gad kede Acer. Magi gin itino a Yakobo ame en onywalo i Paddan-aram. 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo obino baŋ pappere Icaka ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Mamre, ame en Kiriat-arba kede Kebron, kan ame kwaro mere Iburaim kede Icaka yam obedo iye con," 
Genesis35:28 Mwaka Icaka me dittere onwoŋo doŋ oromo mia acel kede pyeraboro 
Genesis35:29 kwo Icaka te tum oko, en oto te wot nywako kabedo kede kwari mere, kun onwoŋo mwaka mere doŋ bup, a doŋ oteggo atek. Itino mere Ecau kede Yakobo te yiko kome." 
Genesis36:1 Magi gin ikwae Ecau (ame en Edom). 
Genesis36:2 Ecau onyomo anyira a jo Kanaan: Ada nyaka Elon, dano me Kitti, Olibama, nyaka Ana wot a Jibeon, dano me Kivi," 
Genesis36:3 kede Bacemat nyaka Icmael, amina Nebayot." 
Genesis36:4 Ada onywalli Ecau Elifaji, Bacemat onywalo Rewel," 
Genesis36:5 Olibama onywalo Jeuc, Jalam, kede Kora. Magi gin itino Ecau ame onywalo i lobo Kanaan." 
Genesis36:6 Ecau otero monnere kede itino mere awobe kede anyira, kede jo luŋ me ode, karacel ilimmere, leyi kede jami luŋ ame en onwoŋo i Kanaan, owoto kede i lobo ocele kun pokere oko ominnere Yakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Pien limgi a leyi onwoŋo dwoŋ atek ame mom rommigi bedo karacel, lobo ame gin rik onwoŋo bedo iye acalo wele onwoŋo mom romogi me kwat; pien limgi onwoŋo bup." 
Genesis36:8 Ecau te wot bedo i Ceir ame en lobo obedo kidikidi. Ecau en ame daŋ olwoŋo ni Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Magi gin ikwae Ecau kwaro a jo Edom ame bedo i Ceir, i lobo ame obedo kidikidi." 
Genesis36:10 Nyiŋ itino Ecau ene: Erifazi wot Ada, dako Ecau, kede Rewel wot a Bacemat, dako Ecau." 
Genesis36:11 Itino Erifazi ene: Teman, Omar, Jepo, Gatam kede Kenaj." 
Genesis36:12 Timna rik dako aŋeca Erifazi wot Ecau. En onywalo Amalek baŋ Ecau. Magi-nono gin itino Ada dako Ecau. 
Genesis36:13 Aco itino a Rewel ene: Nakat, Jera, Camma, kede Mijja. Magi-nono gin itino a Bacemat dako Ecau." 
Genesis36:14 Aco itino Olibama nyaka Ana wot a Jibeon dako Ecau, gin ene: en onywalli Ecau Jeuc, Jalam kede Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Magi gin ikwae Ecau ame obedo rwode. Itino awobe meca Erifazi wot Ecau me kao, gin ene: rwot Teman, rwot Omar, rwot Cepo rwot Kenaj," 
Genesis36:16 rwot Kora, rwot Gatam kede rwot Amalek; mannono gin itino Erifazi ame obedo rwode i lobo Edom. Gin luŋ obedo itino Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Magi gin itino a Rewel wot Ecau obedo rwode: rwot Nakat, rwot Jera, rwot Camma, kede rwot Mijja; mannono gin itino a Rewel ame obedo rwode i lobo Edom. Gin luŋ obedo itino a Bacemat dako Ecau." 
Genesis36:18 Magi gin itino Olibama dako Ecau ame obedo rwode: rwot Jeuc, rwot Jalam, kede rwot Kora. Magi gin rwode ame obedo itino Olibama, nyaka Ana, dako Ecau." 
Genesis36:19 Magi gin itino Ecau ame en Edom; rwodegi daŋ ennono. 
Genesis36:20 Magi gin itino a Ceir ame dano me Kori, ame gin obedo wegi lobo-nono: Lotan, Cobal, Jibeon, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dicon, Ejer, kede Cican; maginono gin rwode a jo Kori ame tye i lobo Edom, ame gin obedo itino a Ceir," 
Genesis36:22 Itino a Lotan ene: Kori kede Eman; amin a Lotan obedo Timma. 
Genesis36:23 Itino a Cobal ene: Alvan, Manakat, Ebal, Cepo kede Onamo" 
Genesis36:24 Itino a Jibeon awobe mege ene: Aiya, kede Ana. Mane en Ana ame rik bin onwoŋo akoŋ akukunya alyet i tim i kare ame en tye akwayo kana a pappere Jibeon." 
Genesis36:25 Itino Ana awobe mege ene: Dicon kede nyare Olibama. 
Genesis36:26 Itino a Dicon awobe mege ene: Kemdan, Eciban, Itran kede Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Itino Ejer ene: Bilan, Javan kede Akan." 
Genesis36:28 Itino a Dican ene: Uji kede Aran," 
Genesis36:29 Rwode a jo Kori ene: rwot Lotan, rwot Cobal, rwot Jibeon, rwot Ana," 
Genesis36:30 rwot Dicon, rwot Ejer kede rwot Dican; magi-nono gin rwode a jo Kori acalo atekeregi tye kede i lobo Ceir." 
Genesis36:31 Magi gin rwode ame oloo Edom, ame onwoŋo abaka moro mom ru oloo jo Icrael." 
Genesis36:32 Bela wot a Beor onwoŋo loo Edom, nyiŋ boma mere adwoŋ olwoŋo ni Dinkaba." 
Genesis36:33 Kare ame Bela oto, Jobab wot a Jera me Bojra oleo tyene." 
Genesis36:33 Kare ame Bela oto, Jobab wot a Jera me Bojra oleo tyene." 
Genesis36:34 Kare ame Jobab oto, Kucam ame oya i lobo a jo Teman oleo tyene." 
Genesis36:34 Kare ame Jobab oto, Kucam ame oya i lobo a jo Teman oleo tyene." 
Genesis36:35 Kare ame Kucam oto, Kadad wot a Bedad, a rik olwenyo te loyo jo Midian ame tye i Moab, en ate leyo tyene; nyiŋ boma mere adwoŋ rik olwoŋo ni Avit." 
Genesis36:36 Kare ame Kadad oto, Camla me Macireka oleo kakare, odoko rwot kakare." 
Genesis36:37 Kare ame Camla oto Caul me Rekobot ame tye i ŋet kulo me Efurate, odoko rwot kakare." 
Genesis36:38 Kare ame Caul oto, Baal-kenan wot a Akbor oleo kakare, odoko rwot." 
Genesis36:39 Kare ame Baal-kenan wot Akbor oto, Adar oleo kakare, odoko rwot; nyiŋ boma mere adwoŋŋere rik Pau. Dako mere nyiŋe rik Meetabel, ame obedo nyaka Matred, Matred, ame nyaka a Mejaab." 
Genesis36:40 Magi gin rwode ame oya i baŋ Ecau, kun lubere kede atekeregi kede kabedogi, kede nyiŋgi, rwot Timna, rwot Alwa, rwot Yetet," 
Genesis36:41 rwot Olibama, rwot Ela, rwot Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 rwot Kenaj, rwot Teman, rwot Mibjar," 
Genesis36:43 rwot Magdiel kede rwot Iram. Magi-nono gin rwode me Edom, acalo kabedogi tye kede i lobogi i komgi; mannono en Ecau papa Edom." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo obedo i lobo Kanaan, i lobo ame yam pappere koŋ obedo iye-ni," 
Genesis37:2 Man en kop i kom ikwae a Yakobo. Kare ame Yucepu doŋ oromo mwaka apar wie abiro me dittere onwoŋo rik en doŋ kwao lim karacel kede omego mere. En obedo karacel itino awobe a Bila kede Jilpa, ame gin onwoŋo mon a-pappere; Yucepu rik te dotogi baŋ papagi," 
Genesis37:3 Icrael onwoŋo maro Yucepu atek kato itino ocele luŋ; pien onywale kun en doŋ oti, te kwoye boŋo abor, dok bade daŋ boco." 
Genesis37:4 Omego mere ka oneno ni papagi maro Yucepu katogi oko, gin te cako dage oko; cakere i kare-nono mom doŋ ote kop kede i kuc." 
Genesis37:5 Kare ame Yucepu oleko lek, en otito baŋ omego mere, omego mere doŋ te medde ameda i dage." 
Genesis37:6 En okobbigi ni, “Winy wunu koŋ kit lek ame aleko:" 
Genesis37:7 aleko ni onwoŋo otye i poto otweyo ŋano ame okwao, arita ŋanona te ya malo cuŋ atira; arita ŋanowu te cokere gure dyere, eka ote ryebere piny me woro aritana.”" 
Genesis37:8 Omego mere te gamo ni, “Yin ibino loyowa ateni? Yin en a doŋ ibino bedo adwoŋ ame loowa?” Gin doŋ te medde dage atek ateka pi lekkere-nono kede pi koppere." 
Genesis37:9 Yucepu dok te medo leko lek ocele, te daŋ tito baŋ omego mere, kun kobo ni, “Jo-ni omegona, dok aleko lek ocele. Aleko ni ceŋ kede dwe kede acer apar wie acel obedo ryebere piny i nyima.”" 
Genesis37:10 Kare ame en otito lek man baŋ pappere kede baŋ omego mere, pappere ocoke, te juke atek ateka kun kobbe ni, “Kodi lek aŋo ame ileko amannono-nono. Yin itamo ni an kede totti kede omegoni obino bino ote ryebere piny i nyimi?”" 
Genesis37:11 Nyeko te mako omego mere atek meicel i kome, ento pappere te kano kop mano luŋ i cunye." 
Genesis37:12 Kare ame omego mere onwoŋo owoto kwayo lim a papagi i ŋet Cekem. 
Genesis37:13 Icrael okobbi Yucepu ni, “Omegoni mom tye akwat ceggi i Cekem? Biye me aori baŋgi.” En ogamo doge ni, “An ene, adwoŋ.”" 
Genesis37:14 Pappere te kobbe ni, “Wot koŋ inen ka omegoni kede lim tye aber, me ite dwoggo an kop.” En te cwaye ya i luŋ me Kebron, te wot naka i Cekem." 
Genesis37:15 Lonnoro te nwoŋo Yucepu tye awiwira atata i dye bar, te penye ni, “Yin kara iyenyo ŋo?”" 
Genesis37:16 En ogamo ni, “Ayenyo omegona. Tim ber ba ititta kan ame gin tye akwat iye.”" 
Genesis37:17 Lonnono te kobbe ni, “Gin doŋ otyeko ya oko i kan, pien awinyo ka gin kobo ni, ‘Owot wunu naka i Docan.’ ” Yucepu te cako wopo yorgi, te nwoŋogi i Docan." 
Genesis37:18 Kare ame gin onene i kannabor, kun onwoŋo en mom ru otuno ceggi baŋgi, gin te cako yiko kop me neke oko," 
Genesis37:19 kun okobo ni, “Won lek ca bino ca." 
Genesis37:20 Biye wunu me tin oneke wunu oko, obole wunu i burroro kan, wan obino kobo ni, ‘Lee moro me tim en omake, te mwode oko’, me koŋ onen kit ame lekkere bino cobere kede.”" 
Genesis37:21 Kare ame Reuben owinyo yikgi-nono, olare oko i ciŋgi, kun en kobbigi ni, “Mom ber wan ikomwa ikwanyo kwo mere.”" 
Genesis37:22 Reuben dok te kobbigi ni, “Pe myero wan oony remo mere kadi acel, ento obole wunu i bur ame tye kan-ni; myero ciŋwa kur gude kadi acel.” En onwoŋo oyikere me kwanyo oko i ciŋgi, wek edwok baŋ pappere." 
Genesis37:23 Kare ame Yucepu otuno baŋ omego mere, gin opoto i kome, ote gonyo koti mere oko i kome, koti ame onwoŋo en oruko abor dok bade daŋ boco." 
Genesis37:24 Gin omake ote tere wot bole i bur. Burrono onwoŋo yie tye nono, pii pe iye." 
Genesis37:25 Gin gigi doŋ te bedo piny cem. I kare ame gin otiŋo waŋgi malo, ote neno jo Icmael ame oya i Gilead, karacel kede inaga ecipan ame otino odok, moo yat ecoma, kede murra, kun owoto kede i Miciri." 
Genesis37:26 Juda dok te kobbi omego mere ni, “Konyo kara ŋo wan me neko ominwa eka ote wumo remo mere?" 
Genesis37:27 Biye wunu me ocate wunu baŋ jo Icmael, mom myero wan oneke kede ciŋwa, pien en ominwa, obedo komwa ikokome.” Omego mere te ye koppere-nono." 
Genesis37:28 Ocat wil me Midian te bino beo kannono, omego a Yucepu te waye oko i bur, gin te cate baŋ jo Icmael, pi cekel me ryal pyeraryo. Gin te tero Yucepu naka i Miciri." 
Genesis37:29 Kare ame Reuben odwogo i bur, oneno Yucepu doŋ mom tye i bur, en te yeco boŋo mere oko," 
Genesis37:30 Odok cen baŋ omego mere te kobbigi ni, “Atin ca pe i bur do! Kara man an tin adok kwene ba!”" 
Genesis37:31 Gin te neko dyel, ote kwanyo koti a Yucepu luto i remo mere." 
Genesis37:32 Gin te kelo koti aborrono, dok a bade daŋ bocoboco-nono baŋ papagi kun okobbe ni, “Wan en onwoŋo koti-ni, koŋ inen, ŋi aber ka koti a wodi ennono onyo pe.”" 
Genesis37:33 Kare ame en doŋ otyeko ŋiyo, okobo ni, “Man kom koti atinna ennono; lee tim doŋ omwodo atinna oko do, ateteni, lee tim doŋ okikilo oko.”" 
Genesis37:34 Yakobo te yeco boŋo mere oko, te tweyo boŋo cola i pyere, te bedo koko wode pi kare alalac." 
Genesis37:35 Awobe mere luŋ kede anyira te ya malo wot kweyo cunye, ento en te kwero oko ni kur kwe cunye, kun kobo ni, “Mom amannono gire; an gira abino lubo yo atinna i koko naka i lyel.” Pappere te bedo koke amannono" 
Genesis37:36 Jo Midian te cato Yucepu oko i Miciri baŋ Potipar ame en adwoŋ tic a Parao, kun loo ocirikale luŋ ame kuro piny." 
Genesis38:1 Kare-nono Juda te ya oko i baŋ omego mere, te dak baŋ lonnoro me dullam ame nyiŋe Kira." 
Genesis38:2 A doŋ Juda tye kuno, en oneno nyaka a dano moro me Kanaan a nyiŋe Cua; en onyomo te daŋ cako donyo baŋe." 
Genesis38:3 Dako-nono te yac, te nywalo atin awobi, pappere te cako nyiŋe ni Er." 
Genesis38:4 Dako dok te yac, te dok nywalo atin awobi, ote cako nyiŋe ni Onan." 
Genesis38:5 En dok te nywalo awobi ocele, ote cako nyiŋe ni Cela. Atinnono en onywalo i Kejib." 
Genesis38:6 Juda te nyommi wode me kao Er nyako ame nyiŋe Tamali. 
Genesis38:7 Ento Er atinnere me kao-nono rik onwoŋo mom ber i nyim Rwot, omio Rwot te neke oko." 
Genesis38:8 Juda te kobbi wode Onan ni, “Yin myero ilak amuni, ibed cware, wek inywalli ominni atinnoro.”" 
Genesis38:9 Ento Onan oŋeo ni atinnono mom bino bedo mere; omio i kare ame en donyo baŋ ci-ominnere, koŋ ogeo onyo koti mere piny me kur enywalli ominnere atin." 
Genesis38:10 Gin a en otimo-nono mom onen aber baŋ Rwot, omio Rwot te neke en daŋ oko." 
Genesis38:11 Juda te kobo baŋ ci-wode Tamali ni, “Yin myero doŋ ibed i ot baŋ pappi bala dako a cware mom, naka waŋ ame woda Cela odoko dwoŋ”; pien onwoŋo en tye i lworo ni kare ocele en daŋ bino to bala omego mere. Tamali te dok bedo baŋ pappere." 
Genesis38:12 Ka kare okato, dako a Juda ame onwoŋo nyaka a Cua-ni te to oko. A doŋ cuny Juda opye, en owoto i Timna, baŋ onyar yer rommi mere. En owoto karacel awottere Kira, dano me Adullam." 
Genesis38:13 Kare ame otitti Tamali ni, “Kwaroni owoto i Timna pi nyaro yer rommi mere.”" 
Genesis38:14 Tamali ogonyo rukkere a nyuto ni cware oto oko, te wumere boyo kome luŋ kede atambala, te wot bedo piny i ŋet yo ame woto Enaim, ame tye i yo Timna; pien oneno ni Cela doŋ odoko dano adwoŋ oko, ento mom olake." 
Genesis38:15 Kare ame Juda onene, en otamo ni alaya ennono, pien owumo waŋe oko." 
Genesis38:16 Juda owoto baŋe i ŋet yo, te penye ni, “Wek abut ba kedi,” pien onwoŋo en mom oŋeo ni ci-wode ennono. Tamali te penye ni, “Ibino ce miya ŋo ka aye yin ibuto keda?”" 
Genesis38:17 Juda ogamo ni, “Abino cwayi akale dyel i akina dyegina.” En ogamo ni, “Ibino jeŋo giri moro koŋ iye, tuno ka icwao?”" 
Genesis38:18 Juda te gamo ni, “Kara ajeŋ ŋo?” Tamali okobbe ni, “Atem ame tye iye ginnoro ame nyuto ni megi, kede tol kede abironi ame tye i ciŋi.” Juda te miye jami-nono luŋ, te buto kede; Tamali te yac oko." 
Genesis38:19 En te dok paco wot kwanyo atambala oko i kome, te doŋ dwoko rukere ame nyuto ni en dako ame cware oto." 
Genesis38:20 Juda te oro awottere ame dano me Adullam, me tero akale dyel, wek gam jami mere a rik ejeŋo baŋ dako ca dwogo, ento naka mom te nwoŋo dakonono," 
Genesis38:21 Dano ame oro te penyo jo kannono ni, “Kara alaya moro ame yam bedo i ŋet yo me Enaim, tye aman kwene?” Gin ogamo ni, “Alaya moro gire yam mom bedo kan.”" 
Genesis38:22 En te dokwot kobbi Juda ni, “Mom anwoŋe gira, dok daŋ jo me kuno okobo ni, ‘Alaya moro gire yam mom bedo kan’.”" 
Genesis38:23 Juda te dok iye ni, “Wek en doŋ ter jami-nono bed mere, me kur bed nyerowa. Koŋ inen an acwaye dyel yin mom ite nwoŋe.”" 
Genesis38:24 Kare ame dwe doŋ okato adek, oterri Juda kop ni, “Ci-wodi Tamali obedo yaya bo waŋe atata, omio aman en doŋ oyac oko pi tar waŋe-nono.” Juda te kobo ni, “Kele wunu, me waŋe oko,”" 
Genesis38:25 Kare ame onwoŋo otye akele, en ocwao kop baŋ kwaro mere ni, “Won jami magi en oyac keda.” Dok daŋ te medo ciko ni, “Koŋ ŋi, nen won jami magi: atem, tol kede abiro.”" 
Genesis38:26 Juda oŋio jami-nono, te kobo ni, “En omio kop oloa oko, pien mom amie baŋ woda Cela.” Pe dok te medo buto kede." 
Genesis38:27 A doŋ kare mere me nywal oromo, onwoŋo rut tye i yie." 
Genesis38:28 A doŋ en tye alolle, atin acel te cwayo bade oko, dako ame acole te tweyo uci arema i ciŋe kun kobo ni, “Mam en ogeo pello.”" 
Genesis38:29 Ento kare ame mannono odwoko ciŋe oko, nen, ominnere en a dok te geyo pelo, omio okobo ni, “Iyabo yoni tetek piŋo?” Mannono te miyo cako nyiŋe Perej." 
Genesis38:30 Ominnere doŋ te pello i cen kun uci arema tye i ciŋe, ote cako nyiŋe ni Jera." 
Genesis39:1 Otero Yucepu i Miciri, eka Potipar adwoŋ tic a Parao ame onwoŋo loo ocirikale a kuro piny luŋ, ame en dano me Miciri, te wile oko i baŋ jo Icmael ame otere kuno-ni." 
Genesis39:2 Rwot rik onwoŋo tye kede Yucepu, te miyo en doko lo ame kome i gum. En te bedo i ot adwoŋŋere, ame onwoŋo dano me Miciri-nono;" 
Genesis39:3 adwoŋŋere daŋ te neno oko ni Rwot tye kede, pien Rwot omio ginnono luŋ ame en otio i ciŋe bedo abeco." 
Genesis39:4 Mannono omio adwoŋ a Yucepu opwoc kun en tio baŋe; adwoŋŋere te kete bedo alo ode luŋ karacel kedejami mere luŋ. 
Genesis39:5 Cakere i kare ame okete kede me loyo ode kede jami mere Rwot omio winyo i ot a dano me Miciri-nono pi Yucepu. Winyo a Rwot obedo i kom jami mere ducu i ot kede i poto. 
Genesis39:6 Omio Potipar te jalo jami mere luŋ i te twer a Yucepu; bedo a Yucepu baŋe, omio en mom dok paro pi ginnoro kadi acel kono cam keken ame en camo. Yucepu rik onwoŋo atin awobi amwonya, dok neno ber meicel." 
Genesis39:7 Icennere dako adwoŋŋere cunye te cako pyepyeta i kome, omio te penye ni, “But ba keda.”" 
Genesis39:8 Ento Yucepu te kwero oko, kun kobbi cik a adwoŋŋere ni, “Nen ba, bedona baŋ cwari omio adwoŋŋa mom dok paro pi ginnoro kadi acel ame tye i ot man, dok daŋ en doŋ otyeko jalo jami mere luŋ i te twerra," 
Genesis39:9 En mom kata oko i ot man; pe tye dok ginnoro ocele ame en mom omio i te twerra kono ka yin keken, pien yin ibedo dako mere. Kara ka amannono, an dok atwero mukere niŋo me timo twon bal arom man-ni, me balo i nyim Obaŋa twal?”" 
Genesis39:10 Kadi dako-nono obedo penyo Yucepu piny a ru, piny a ru, Yucepu mom gire oye winyo koppere, mom oye buto kede, kadi bedo kede." 
Genesis39:11 Ento i nino moro acel ame onwoŋo Yucepu tye atiyo ticcere i ot kun piny oliŋ iti aboŋo ŋattoro ocele i ot kuno," 
Genesis39:12 dako-nu omakoboŋo mere kun kobbe ni, “But keda.” Ento Yucepu te mwomere oko kun wekoboŋo mere i ciŋe, te donyo oko." 
Genesis39:13 Ka en oneno ni Yucepu owekobono mere i ciŋe te mwomere okato gire oko," 
Genesis39:14 en olwoŋo jo ame bedo i ode, te kobbigi ni, “Koŋ inen wunu adwoŋ man okelo dano me Eburania-ni kan me palowa; nen en kom omito buya tetek ni ebut keda twal, ento an ate redo atek meicel," 
Genesis39:15 cite en ka oneno ni an awoto dwona akuku duru, en ojalo rukkere oko baŋa, te mwomere gire oko.”" 
Genesis39:16 En te kano boŋo a Yucepunono baŋe ituno ka won ot odwogo. 
Genesis39:17 En te pore kop acellono kun kobo ni, “Opii ame obedo dano me Eburania ame yin ikelo i akinawa kan-ni, obino i ot baŋa me palla;" 
Genesis39:18 ento i kare ame an awoto dwona aredo atek, en te jalo rukkere oko baŋa, te mwomere donyo oko.”" 
Genesis39:19 Adwoŋŋere ka owinyo kop ame dako mere oporre, ni, “Man en kit ame otima kede,” akemo omake atek meicel." 
Genesis39:20 Adwoŋ a Yucepu te make kete i buc, i kan ame rik otweo iye obuc abaka; ote tweye en daŋ kuno." 
Genesis39:21 Cite Rwot onwoŋo tye kede Yucepu, onyutte marrere a mom lokere, omio agwok abuc opwoc." 
Genesis39:22 Agwok obuc dok te miyo Yucepu twer me gwoko obuc luŋ ame rik tye i buc; anaka ginnoro luŋ ame rik otio kuno, en Yucepu a rik tio." 
Genesis39:23 Agwok obuc mom dok te bedo i tammoro pi ginnoro luŋ a doŋ etyeko keto i ciŋ Yucepu me gwoko, pien Rwot rik onwoŋo tye kede; doŋ ginnoro luŋ ame en rik tio, Rwot mio iye winyo." 
Genesis40:1 Icennere a doŋ man otimere oko, adwoŋ poko koŋo kede adwoŋ tedo ogati abaka me Miciri te timo balloro baŋ adwoŋgi, abaka me Miciri." 
Genesis40:2 Akemo te mako Parao i kom oticcere adoŋo aryo-nono: adwoŋ poko koŋo kede me tedo ogati. 
Genesis40:3 En te ketogi i ot adwoŋ a loo cirikale ame okur piny, kan ame rik onwoŋo otweo iye Yucepu." 
Genesis40:4 Adwoŋ a loo cirikale te miyogi i ciŋ Yucepu, en te gwokogi; gin koŋ te bedo i buc pi kare moro." 
Genesis40:5 I dyeworroro acel gin te lek, gin aryo luŋ ame otweogi i buc, apok koŋo kede ated ogati abaka me Miciri, kun ŋat acel acel lekkere pat tere daŋ pat." 
Genesis40:6 Odiko ka Yucepu obino baŋgi, onwoŋo gin aryo luŋ waŋgi oballe." 
Genesis40:7 En te penyo odoŋe me tic a Parao a rik onwoŋo tye kede i buc, ame oketogi i ot adwoŋere-ni, ni, “Waŋwu kara tin oballe piŋo?”" 
Genesis40:8 Gin te gamo ni, “Tin wan oleko lek, ento mom tye ŋattoro a twero gonyiwa tere.” Yucepu te gamo ni, “Mom Obaŋa gire en agonyo tere? Koŋ ititta wunu lekwu-nono.”" 
Genesis40:9 Adwoŋ poko koŋo te cako poro lekkere baŋ Yucepu, kun kobbe ni, “Nen ba, an aleko ni olok onwoŋo tye i nyima," 
Genesis40:10 kun jaŋe tye adek. Ame onwoŋo pwod oluro me cako turo, oru nyako nyige oko, te daŋ cek oko." 
Genesis40:11 An onwoŋo amako ikopo a Parao i ciŋa; apwono nyig olokkono ate biyo iyi ikopo a Parao, ate miyo ikopo-nono i ciŋ Parao.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yucepu te kobbe ni, “Lekki-nono te koppere ene: jaŋ olok adek cimo nino adek;" 
Genesis40:13 odoŋ nino adek Parao bino dwoki i ticci, ite bino miyo Parao ikopo i kite a yam itimo con i kare ame ipoko koŋo mere." 
Genesis40:14 Ento myero ipo pira ka doŋ idok idog ticci; tim ber yin daŋ itam pira ba, ititti Parao kop i koma, me en daŋ gonya oko i ot man." 
Genesis40:15 Pien an rik okwala akwala i lobo a jo Eburania; aman daŋ dok oketa i buc kan nono kun mom abalo ginnoro.” 
Genesis40:16 Ka adwoŋ tedo oneno ni ogonyo lek awottere aber, en daŋ oporri Yucepu mege kun kobo ni, “Nen ba, an daŋ aleko ni onwoŋo adodo ditti me ogati adek i wia." 
Genesis40:17 Iya dita i malo mere onwoŋo tye iye kwon ogati apapat pi Parao, cite winy onwoŋo tye dok acamo oko iyi dita ame ayeonono.”" 
Genesis40:18 Yucepu te gamo ni, “Lekkinono te koppere ene: ditti adek, cimo nino adek;" 
Genesis40:19 i nino me adekkere, Parao bino toŋo wii ŋuno oko, te ŋabi i kom yat, winyo te camo riŋo me komi.”" 
Genesis40:20 Kare ame nino me adekkere oromo, ame en nino a rik onywalo iye Parao, Parao otedo arama pi oticcere ducu, en te kelo adwoŋ poko koŋo kede adwoŋ ogati nyim omiro mere." 
Genesis40:21 En te dwoko adwoŋ poko koŋo i dog ticcere me poko koŋo: en te miyo ikopo i ciŋ Parao. 
Genesis40:22 Ento adwoŋ tedo ogati en te ŋabo malo i kite ame Yucepu ogonyo kede lekkere. 
Genesis40:23 Adwoŋ poko koŋo naka mom te po gire pi Yucepu, wie te will oko i kome atwal." 
Genesis41:1 A doŋ mwaka aryo twal okato, Parao te lek ni, onwoŋo etye ecuŋ i ŋet kulo Nail," 
Genesis41:2 eka ete neno dok abiro ocwe a komgi opipira, oya i kulo Nail kun gin acamo ogada." 
Genesis41:3 Dok ocele abiro ame omok, ojony atek ateka daŋ te bino i kulo Nail kun lubo yorgi, ote daŋ bino cuŋ i ŋet dok ame okwoŋo bino, ame tye i ŋet kulo Nail." 
Genesis41:4 Dok ame omok, ojony atek ateka-ca te camo dok ocwe a komgi apipira-ca oko. Parao te doŋ co oko i waŋ nino." 
Genesis41:5 En dok te nino oko, te dok leko lek me aryo mere. Oleko ni eneno wit kal abiro ame oluŋere ocek abeco i tyen kal acel keken." 
Genesis41:6 I ŋegi dok onwoŋo tye iye wit kal ocele abiro ame olot, odoŋo arecoreco, kun yamo alyet me oro onerogi oko;" 
Genesis41:7 eka wite abiro arecoreco ca te mwonyo maca abeco ca oko. Parao te dok co oko i waŋ nino, te nwoŋo ni dok emedo lek." 
Genesis41:8 Odiko ka piny oru, yie te bedo waŋ atek; omio en te cwalo okwena lwoŋo otyet kede oryeko luŋ me Miciri. Parao te tittigi lekkere, ento ŋattoro mom te nen i akinagi ame romo gonyo lek a Parao." 
Genesis41:9 Adwoŋ poko koŋo te kobbi Parao ni, “Tima ber adwoŋ, tin apo bala." 
Genesis41:10 I kare ame rik Parao cunye waŋ i koma an amiro mere eka te tweya i buc karacel kede adwoŋ tedo ogati, i ot a loo cirikale luŋ ame kuro piny," 
Genesis41:11 wan aryo luŋ rik ote lek i dyewor acel, lekwa wan aryo luŋ rik tergi papat." 
Genesis41:12 Awobi moro me Eburania onwoŋo tye kedwa. En rik te gonyo lekwa kun gonyo me a ŋat acel acel kite ame lekkere tye kede. 
Genesis41:13 Kite ame en rik ogonyo kede lekwa, daŋ obino otimere kittono. An obin odwoka i dog ticca, ento adwoŋ tedo ogati ote ŋabo kome malo.”" 
Genesis41:14 Parao te cwayo kwena lwoŋo Yucepu, ame daŋ ote ru kelo oko oyotoyot i buc. Yucepu te lyelo wie, te daŋ lokoboŋo mere, te doŋ donyo baŋ Parao." 
Genesis41:15 Parao te kobbi Yucepu ni, “An onwoŋo aleko lek ento ŋattoro mom te nwoŋere kadi acelloro ame romo gonnya tere. An abedo winyo kop i komi, ni yin ka iwinyo lekkoro itwero gonyo tere.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yucepu te gamo dog Parao ni, “Amaa, mom an gira, Obaŋa gire en ame gonnyi Parao lekkere a yomoro cunye.”" 
Genesis41:17 Parao te doŋ kobbi Yucepu ni, “An aleko ni onwoŋo acuŋ i ŋet kulo Nail," 
Genesis41:18 dok abiro ame ocwe a komgi apipira te ya i kulo Nail, ote bedo camo ogada." 
Genesis41:19 Dok ocele abiro daŋ te bino lubo yorgi, magi-nono onwoŋo omok, ojony ikokoro, ame kodi dokkono an yam mom ru aneno i Miciri luŋ." 
Genesis41:20 Dok ame onwoŋo omok, dok ojony ikokoroni te camo dok abiro ocwe ca oko." 
Genesis41:21 Cite akadi i kare ame gin doŋ ocamo dok ocwe ca oko, mom tye ginnoro ame twero cimo ni gin ocamo dok ocwe oko, pien onwoŋo gin pwod ojony ikokoro, bala kite ame onwoŋo gin tye kede con. Ka mannono otum, an doŋ ate co oko i waŋ nino." 
Genesis41:22 Nino dok te yuto waŋa oko, ate dok neno wit kal abiro ame doŋo i tyene acel keken, kun obeco meicel." 
Genesis41:23 Dok ate neno wit kal ocele abiro arecoreco, ame lyeto yamo me oro onero oko, kun tye olot i ŋet en abeco mege ca." 
Genesis41:24 Wit kal arecoreco te mwonyo wit kal abiro abeco ca oko. Aporo lek man baŋ otyet, cite ŋattoro mom onen ame romo gonyo tere.”" 
Genesis41:25 Yucepu te kobbi Parao ni, “Lek a Parao gire acel keken, Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Parao gin ame ebino tiyo." 
Genesis41:26 Dok abiro abeco kede wit kal abiro abeco, gin ducu nyuto mwaka abiro, lekkono tye acel gire." 
Genesis41:27 Aco dok abiro omok, ojony atekateka kede wit kal abiro ame yamo a lyet me oro onero oko, gin daŋ cimo mwaka abiro ame kec bino ri kede i lobo." 
Genesis41:28 Doŋ ba, bino bedo gire kite ame atitti Parao, Obaŋa doŋ onyutti Parao oko gin ame ebino tiyo." 
Genesis41:29 Pi mwakki abiro, cam bino cek abup meicel i lobo Miciri luŋ." 
Genesis41:30 Cite i ŋe mannono, mwakki abiro ocele bino lubo ame kec bino bedo tye iye. Wi jo bino wil oko i kom cam abup ame rik ocekkigi i Miciri. Keccono bino balo lobo me Miciri meicel." 
Genesis41:31 Twon cam abup ame jo bino bedo kede-ni mom dok obino poyo kadi acel pi kec agwa ame bino lubo, pien keccono bino bedo alyet meicel." 
Genesis41:32 Lek a Parao ame eleko iryo twal-li, nyuto ni Obaŋa en omoko kop man, dok Obaŋa bino miyo cobere i kare a mom bor." 
Genesis41:33 Omio Parao myero nen ni eyero dano moro aryek, a wie tio me eket loo lobo Miciri luŋ." 
Genesis41:34 Dok Parao myero ket odoŋe ame loo lobo, me gin ra acel me abic me cam ame bino cek i lobo Miciri, pi mwakki abiro ame cam bino cek iye abup." 
Genesis41:35 Myero gin cok cam i mwakki ame cam bino cek iye abup-pi luŋ, ote gwoko i bomagi i te loc a Parao." 
Genesis41:36 Cammono bino bedo me mono pi lobo man, me kuro mwakki abiro ame kec bino poto iye i Miciri, me kec kur nek jo i lobo-ni oko.”" 
Genesis41:37 Tam man Parao kede oticcere luŋ oneno ni ber. 
Genesis41:38 Parao te kobbi omiro mere ni, “Otwero nwoŋo wunu dano ocele acalo man, ame tye i cuny Obaŋa acalo en?”" 
Genesis41:39 Parao te kobbi Yucepu ni, “Kite acalo Obaŋa doŋ onyutti kop man luŋ, mom dok tye dano moro aryek, a wie tio bala yin." 
Genesis41:40 Yin en a doŋ ibino loyo oda, karacel kede jona luŋ, gin luŋ bino tiyo gin ame iciko, an abino loyi pi kom loc ame abedo iye keken.”" 
Genesis41:41 Parao dok te kobbi Yucepu ni, “Nen ba, doŋ atyeko ketti me loyo lobo Miciri luŋ.”" 
Genesis41:42 Parao te woto atemmere oko i nyako ciŋe, te rwako i mea Yucepu, te miye ruko boŋŋi camanini abeco, te rwako nyor me jabu abeco i ŋute." 
Genesis41:43 Parao te miye ŋwec i gadigadi me aryo kun jo wo i redo i nyime ni, “Rum conwu!” Mannono kite ame okette kede me loyo lobo Miciri luŋ."
