Genesis41:44 Parao dok te medde kobbi Yucepu ni, “An Parao, mom tye dano moro ame bino tiŋo ciŋe onyo tyene i lobo Miciri luŋ ka ce yin mom iye.”" 
Genesis41:45 Parao te cako nyiŋ Yucepu ni Japenat-panea, te miye nyomo Acinaci nyaka a Potipera ame onwoŋo alamdog me On. Yucepu te loyo lobo me Miciri." 
Genesis41:46 Mwaka me dit a Yucepu onwoŋo doŋ oromo pyeradek nono i kare ame en donyo i tic a Parao, abaka me Miciri. Yucepu oya oko i nyim Parao te wot loŋo lobo me Miciri luŋ," 
Genesis41:47 Cam rik te cek i lobo abup meicel pi mwakki abiro," 
Genesis41:48 rik daŋ ote coko cam luŋ ame ocek i lobo Miciri pi mwakki abiro-nu, ote kano i dere me mono i boma luŋ. I boma acel acel rik okano iye cam ame oya i potti luŋ a ceggi ceggi kede." 
Genesis41:49 Yucepu te kano cam abup meicel i dere me mono. Cam te bedo-adwoŋ bala kwoyo me dog nam, ame omio ote weko pimo oko pien onwoŋo doŋ mom pimer." 
Genesis41:50 Ame mwaka me kec mom ru oromo, Yucepu onwoŋo doŋ tye itino awobe aryo ame Acinaci nyaka a Potipera alamdog me On onywalo." 
Genesis41:51 Yucepu ocako nyiŋ atinnere me kao ni Manace, kun kobo ni, “Pien Obaŋa doŋ omio wia owil oko i kom can ducu kede i kom ot a pappa.”" 
Genesis41:52 Atin me aryo te cako nyiŋe ni Epraim, kun kobo ni, “Pien Obaŋa omia anywal i lobo ame aneno can iye.”" 
Genesis41:53 Kare ame mwakki a rik cam ocek iye abup wok-k i otum oko," 
Genesis41:54 mwakki me kec te doŋ cakere, kite ame Yucepu rik okobo kede. Kec te diyo jo me lobo luŋ, cite i Miciri luŋ cam onwoŋo tye." 
Genesis41:55 A doŋ cam otum oko i lobo Miciri luŋ pi kec ame onwoŋo doŋ okur, jo te cako koko baŋ Parao. Parao te kobbi jo Miciri ni, “Wot wunu baŋ Yucepu itimu gin ame en bino kobbiwu.”" 
Genesis41:56 Kare ame kec doŋ odio jo luŋ me Miciri, Yucepu te cako yabo dog dere me mono luŋ, te cato kal baŋ jo Miciri, pien kec onwoŋo doŋ okur atek meicel i lobo Miciri." 
Genesis41:57 Jo me lobo ocele luŋ te cako ciro i Miciri baŋ Yucepu pi wilo kal, pien kec onwoŋo doŋ okur atek meicel i lobo ducu." 
Genesis42:1 Ka Yakobo owinyo ni kal tye i Miciri, okobbi awobe mere ni, “Piŋo kara ibedo wunu nenne anena kenwu kenwu?”" 
Genesis42:2 Eka te kobbigi ni, “Nen, an awinyo ni kal tye i Miciri, wotu iwilliwa wunu kal i kuno, me obed wunu kwo, kec kur nekwa oko.”" 
Genesis42:3 Omego a Yucepu apar te wot i Miciri me wot wilo kal. 
Genesis42:4 Benjamin, omin a Yucepu, Yakobo mom ocwalo owoto karacel omego mere, pien obedo i lworo ni ginnoro arac dok twero timere i kome." 
Genesis42:5 Awobe Icrael te wot kittono karacel i jo ocele ame daŋ onwoŋo awot kuno, pien kec onwoŋo rik oromo lobo me Kanaan luŋ." 
Genesis42:6 I kare-nono onwoŋo Yucepu odoko aloc i lobo me Miciri; en a rik cato kal baŋ jo me lobo-nono. I kare-nono omego a Yucepu daŋ te bino, gin ote onyere piny i nyime aryeba cuny, kun nyimgi gudo lobo." 
Genesis42:7 Yucepu oneno omego mere, te ru ŋeyogi oko, cite te terogi koŋ bala orok, kun kobo kedgi agwa, penyogi ni, “Kara wun iya wunu i kwene?” Gin ogamo ni, “Wan oya i lobo me Kanaan, obino wilo cam.”" 
Genesis42:8 Yucepu rik te ŋeyo omego mere kittono, cite gin naka mom oŋee." 
Genesis42:9 Yucepu te po lek ame rik oleko i komgi, eka te kobbigi ni, “Wun orot piny, ibino wunu neno kannoro a tye nono i lobo-ni!”" 
Genesis42:10 Gin ogamo ni, “Amaa adwoŋwa, mom amannono gire, wan omironi obino giwa wilo cam." 
Genesis42:11 Wan ducu obedo itino a dano acel, yiwa daŋ gire cil, wan mom orot piny.”" 
Genesis42:12 Yucepu te kobbigi ni, “Pe gire, wun ibino wunu me neno kannoro a tye nono i lobe-ni.”" 
Genesis42:13 Gin dok te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, wan gire wan omironi, wan onwoŋo otye wan omego apar wie aryo, wan luŋ obedo itino a dano acel ame tye i lobo Kanaan; awobi atidi odoŋ paco baŋ papawa, acel en ame doŋ mom tye.”" 
Genesis42:14 Yucepu te kobbigi ni, “An kara akobo kakare, wun ibedo wunu orot piny." 
Genesis42:15 Pi mannono, myero koŋ nen ni onenowu aber kit man: Acalo Parao tye kwo-ni, wun mom ibino ya wunu i kan ka ce ominwu me cogo mom obino kan." 
Genesis42:16 Wun myero icwal wunu dano moro acel i akinawu me wot kel ominwu-naca, kun nwoŋo wun it ye wunu i buc kan, me koŋ mok ka ce wun ikobo wunu kop ateni. Ka ce man mom otimere, acalo Parao pwod kwo-ni, nwoŋo kara wun orot piny ateteni,”" 
Genesis42:17 Gin luŋ ote ketogi i ot kol pi nino adek. 
Genesis42:18 A doŋ nino adek otum, Yucepu okobbigi ni, “Tim wunu kit man me ikwo wunu, pien an alworo Obaŋa." 
Genesis42:19 Ka ce wun jo ame yiwu cil ateni, wek wunu dano acel doŋ i buc kan, jo ocele wot ter kal baŋ jo odoŋ paco, me largi i kec," 
Genesis42:20 Gin jonnono wot kel ominwu atidi baŋa kan; mannono bino nyuto ni wun kara onwoŋo ikobo wunu kop ateni, bino miyo ibwot wunu i to.” Gin daŋ te timo amannono." 
Genesis42:21 Gin te ero kop kengi kengi ni, “Me ateni, myero oye ni kop oloowa pi ominwa, can ame obino i komwa-ni tye pire, pien kare a rik en bako doge baŋwa, wan oneno can i cunye, ote kwero winyo oko.”" 
Genesis42:22 Reuben te kobbigi ni, “Rik mom akwenyorowu ni mom itim wunu balloro i kom atin ca? Ento wun ite kwero wunu oko, mannono en omio apido remo mere i komwa-ni.”" 
Genesis42:23 Gin gigi mom oniaŋ ni Yucepu tye awinyo kopgi-nono, pien dano ame agonyo lebgi en onwoŋo tye i akinagi." 
Genesis42:24 Kare ame Yucepu oya oko i baŋgi, okok, te dok baŋgi bedo kedgi. Omako Cimeon i akinagi te tweyo i nyimgi." 
Genesis42:25 Yucepu te ciko ni pik kal poŋ iyi icaogi luŋ dok daŋ dwok lim a ŋat acel acel iyi cao mere, myero daŋ migi ginnoro me dwoko lao i yo. Magi-nono luŋ ote timo pirgi." 
Genesis42:26 Gin te tweyo kal i ŋe kanegi, ote doŋ wot gigi." 
Genesis42:27 Kare ame ŋat acel oyabo dog icao mere kan ame gin obuto iye, me emi kana mere cam, en oneno lim tye oketo i dog icao mere." 
Genesis42:28 En te kobbi omego mere ni, “Limma odwoko tye iyi cao, tye iye kan!” Gin ka owinyo, cunygi opoto meicel, ŋat acel acel te lokere baŋ awottere a kome amyel amyela, kun kobo ni, “Obaŋa kara otimowa aman piŋo ba?”" 
Genesis42:29 Kare ame gin odwogo baŋ papagi Yakobo i lobo me Kanaan, gin otitte gin ducu ame otimere i komgi, kun okobo ni," 
Genesis42:30 “Dano ame obedo adwoŋ me lobo ca obedo kop kedwa i gero, olokowa odoko orot piny." 
Genesis42:31 Cite wan otitte ni, ‘Wan giwa obedo jo ame yiwa cil, wan mom obedo orot piny kadi acel;" 
Genesis42:32 wan onwoŋo otye wan omego apar wie aryo ame papawa acel i lobo Kanaan.’ 
Genesis42:33 Eka dano-nono ame en adwoŋ a loo lobo-nu te kobbiwa ni, ‘Man en gin ame bino miyo an aniaŋ ni wun ibedo wunu jo ame yiwu cil ateni, wun wek wunu ominwu acel kan, ter wunu kal me koŋ iwot ilar wunu jo me paco i kec." 
Genesis42:34 Wot ikelu ominwu atidi baŋa kan, mannono bino miyo aŋeo ni wun kara mom orot piny, ento wun jo a yiwu cil, ate doŋ bino miyowu ominwu, dok ibino wunu doŋ cato wil i lobo man.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Kare ame gin aonyo kal iyi caogi, ŋat acel acel onwoŋo lim ame rik eboo i dog icao mere; kare ame gin karacel kede papagi oneno lim ame oboo, lworo omakogi." 
Genesis42:36 Papagi Yakobo te kobo ni, “Ityeko wunu itinona oko do! Yecupu doŋ pe, Cimeon daŋ doŋ pe, dok imito tero wunu Benjamin; man luŋ cannere maka.”" 
Genesis42:37 Reuben okobbi pappere ni, “Ibino neko itino awobena aryo-ni ka ce ineno ni an mom adwoggo en baŋi.”" 
Genesis42:38 Yakobo ogamo kun kwero oko ni, “Woda gire mom bino wot karacel kedwu, pien ominnere doŋ oto oko, en kene a doŋ odoŋ. Ka ce ginnoro arac dok bino timere i wotwu-ni, ibino tero wunu lwar wia i lyel i twon cannoro a mom kobere.”" 
Genesis43:1 Kare ame kec doŋ okur atek i lobo," 
Genesis43:2 kun daŋ doŋ gin ocamo kal a rik okelo i Miciri otum oko papagi okobbigi ni, “Dok wunu i Miciri iwot iwilliwa wunu cammoro aduno.”" 
Genesis43:3 Juda te dok iye ni, “Dano ca rik ocikowa atek ni, ‘Pe ibino wunu neno waŋa ka ominwu atidi mom tye karacel kedwu.’" 
Genesis43:4 Doŋ ka iye ni ominwa wot karacel kedwa, wan obino wot;" 
Genesis43:5 cite ka ce yin ikwero oko, wan giwa mom obino wot, pien dano ca rik ocikowa ni, ‘Pe ibino neno wunu waŋa ka ce ominwu atidi mom tye karacel kedwu.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Icrael te kobo ni, “Kara itima wunu arac aman piŋo, me kobbi wunu dano-naca ni ominwu ocele tye?”" 
Genesis43:7 Gin te kobbe ni, “Dano ca openyowa i peny apol meicel, i komwa kede i kom atekerewa, kun penyowa ni, ‘Papawu pwod tye kwo? Ominwu ocele tye?’ Wan giwa odokke i pennyere. Wan rik otwero ŋeyo ni en bino kobo ni, ‘Kel ominwu?’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Juda te kobbi pappere Icrael ni, “Ye awobi-ni wot keda, me wan oya owoti, me kur oto ento obed kwo, wan karacel kede yin kede itinowa," 
Genesis43:9 An amiye me gwoke, yin ibino penya pire. Ka ce an mom abino dwoggo en baŋi ate kete i ciŋi, ballere luŋ bino bedo i wia." 
Genesis43:10 Pien kono onwoŋo mom wan dok ogal, kono nyo doŋ odok kuno iryo.”" 
Genesis43:11 Papagi Icrael te kobbigi ni, “Myero doŋ bed amannono ba, tim wunu kit man: terri wunu dano-nono nyig yennogo ame iyero wunu me mot, rwak iyi icaowu moo yat ecoma aduno kede moo kic daŋ aduno, odok kede murra, kede nyig yen ocele apapat." 
Genesis43:12 Ter wunu daŋ lim abup aromo wilo iryo kun idwoko wunu daŋ lim a rik gin orwako i dog caowu, pien kare ocele rik wigi owil awila," 
Genesis43:13 Ya iwot wunu doki baŋ dano-naca, iter ominwu daŋ." 
Genesis43:14 Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu myero miwu winyo i nyim dano-naca me gony ominwu ocele ca dwog karacel kede Benjamin. Ka ce atinna oto, nwoŋo an daŋ doŋ ato!”" 
Genesis43:15 Gin te ya wot i Miciri kun otero mot, lim abup a romo wil iryo, kede Benjamin. Gin te wot cuŋ i nyim Yucepu." 
Genesis43:16 Ka Yucepu oneno ni Benjamin tye i akinagi, okobbi akan jami mere me ot ni, “Kel jonnono i ot, ite neko lee moro iyiki, pien gin bino cam karacel keda dyeceŋ.”" 
Genesis43:17 Dano-nono te timo gin ame ocike tiyo; okelo jonnono i ot a Yucepu. 
Genesis43:18 Kare ame oterogi i ot a Yucepu, lworo omakogi atek, gin te kobo ni, “Man kop me lim a rik ket i dog icayiwa i kare ame ogeo bino kan, en omio okelowa kan, me enwoŋ kop i komwa, ete makowa doko opii mere kede mayo kanewa luŋ oko.”" 
Genesis43:19 Koppono te miyogi wot baŋ akan jami me ot a Yucepu, ote wot kop kede i doggola." 
Genesis43:20 Gin ote kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, wan rik obino kan pi wilo cam tyen me agege," 
Genesis43:21 ento kare ame wan otuno kan ame obuto iye, ogonyo dog cayiwa ote nwoŋo limwa luŋ tye ame moro mom orwenyo i dog icao a ŋat acel acel, oman daŋ tye odwoggo luŋ." 
Genesis43:22 Okelo daŋ dok lim ocele me wilo cam. Pe oŋeo.” 
Genesis43:23 En te gamo ni, “We wunu giwu ame cunywu opye, kur ibed wunu kede lworo moro; gwok onyo Obaŋawu kede Obaŋa a papawu en oketo lim iyi icayiwu. An gira rik agamo limwu.” En te kelo Cimeon baŋgi." 
Genesis43:24 Dano-nono te terogi i ot a Yucepu te miyogi pii me lwoko tyengi, te daŋ miyo kanegi cam." 
Genesis43:25 Gin te yiko motgi me amia baŋ Yucepu ka bino dwogo baŋgi otyeno, pien gin onwoŋo owinyo ni gin ocam kuno." 
Genesis43:26 Kare ame Yucepu odwogo paco, gin otero motgi baŋe ote ryebere piny i nyime." 
Genesis43:27 Yucepu te penyogi ka ce gin otye aber, kun daŋ medo ni, “Papawu, adwoŋ oti a rik ikobo wunu ca tye aber? Pwod kwo?”" 
Genesis43:28 Gin te gamo ni, “Amironi ame papawa tye aber, pwod kwo.” Gin te kulo wigi piny, ote ryebere piny i nyime." 
Genesis43:29 En te tiŋo waŋe neno ominnere Benjamin, atin tottere, te penyogi ni, “Man ominwu me cogo arik ititta wunu pire-nie? Obaŋa omii winyo atinna!”" 
Genesis43:30 Yucepu te ru wot oyotoyot oko, pien cunye onwoŋo tye i kom ominnere meicel. Owoto te wot yenyo kan ame myero ekok iye, te donyo iyi icika mere wot kok iye." 
Genesis43:31 Ologo waŋe te dwogo baŋgi. Odio cunye te kobo ni, “Tok doŋ cam.”" 
Genesis43:32 Ote toko cammere pat, me omego mere daŋ pat, kede mea a jo Miciri a rik cemo kede daŋ otoko megi pat, pien jo Miciri rik mom cemo i jo Eburania; pien mano me kwer baŋ jo Miciri." 
Genesis43:33 Gin te bedo piny i nyime kun olubere i ditogi me anywalli; gin te bedo nenne kengi kengi kun owuro. 
Genesis43:34 Ote pokkigi cam kun otoko i meja a Yucepu, ento mea Benjamin ote toko adwoŋ okato me owote mere oko tyen abic twal. Gin rik ote bedo i Yucepu i yomcuny kun omatte." 
Genesis44:1 Yucepu ociko akan jami me ot ni, “Pik cam adwoŋ, poŋ icao a jonnono, ame gin twero yeyo; dok daŋ ket lim a ŋat acel acel i dog icao mere." 
Genesis44:2 Ket daŋ ikopona me ryal i dog icao awobi atidi, karacel i limmere me wilo kal.” En otio kit ame Yucepu okobbe kede." 
Genesis44:3 Odiko ame piny doŋ oru oko, olwoko jonnono owoto i kanegi." 
Genesis44:4 Kare ame gin doŋ oya i boma cite mom ru owoto abor wok, Yucepu okobbi akan jami mere ni, “Lub doŋ yo jo-nu, ka imakogi, kobbigi ni, ‘Piŋo kara iculo wunu gin aber kede gin arac? Piŋo ikwalo wunu ikopo ryalla oko?" 
Genesis44:5 Mannono mom en ikopo ame rwotta tio kede me mat? Ikopo tyettere daŋ mom ennono? I timo wunu rac me timo wunu gin acalo man.’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Kare ame omakogi iyo, okobbigi koppono." 
Genesis44:7 Gin ogamo doge ni, “Ŋo omio adwonwa okobo kodi kop man? Wan omironi pe otwero timo tim acalo man!" 
Genesis44:8 Koŋ inen lim ame rik wan onwoŋo i dog icaowa, rik obin odwogo baŋi i Kanaan twal; wan dok otwero kwalo ryal onyo jabu i ot adwoŋŋi niŋo?" 
Genesis44:9 Adwoŋ, ka ce ibino nwoŋo tye baŋ amironi moro iyi akinawa kan, myero en to, dok wan daŋ obino bedo opiini.”" 
Genesis44:10 En ogamo ni, “Wek wunu koŋ doŋ bed kit ame ikobo wunu-nono: ŋat ame abino nwoŋo baŋe, en bino bedo opiina, ento jo ocele balloro gire bino bedo mom i wigi.”" 
Genesis44:11 Oyotoyot ŋat acel acel te ru cibo cao mere piny, te daŋ ru yabo doge." 
Genesis44:12 En te cako yenyo ikopo kun cako i kom awobi adwoŋ dwogo kede piny naka i kom awobi atidi, cite te nwoŋo ikopo i dog icao a Benjamin," 
Genesis44:13 Gin te yeyeco boŋnigi, ote tweyo yecgi i ŋe kanegi, ote dok cen i boma." 
Genesis44:14 Ka Juda kede omego mere odok cen i ot a Yucepu, gin oŋuke kuno, ote ony ducu ryebere i nyime." 
Genesis44:15 Yucepu te kobbigi ni, “Piŋo kara itimo wunu kodi tim acalo man? Mom iŋeo wunu ni dano acalo an-ni ŋeo tyet?”" 
Genesis44:16 Juda te gamo ni, “Amaa, adwoŋ, kara wan otwero dok kobbi ŋo ba? Gin aŋo ame dok otwero kobo? Otwero kwanyo kop i komwa niŋo? Amaa adwoŋwa, Obaŋa gire doŋ otyeko nwoŋo bal oko i komwa wan omironi, wan luŋ doŋ opiini karacel i ŋat ame onwoŋo ikopo iyi icao mere.”" 
Genesis44:17 Cite Yucepu te gamo ni, “An gira mom atwero timo amannono kadi acel! Ŋat ame onwoŋo ikopo baŋe, en ame bino bedo opiina, ento wun giwu wot baŋ papawu i kuc.”" 
Genesis44:18 Juda owoto baŋ Yucepu te kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, tim ber iye an amironi akob kedi kopporo anonok, cunyi kur waŋ i koma an amironi atek ateka, pien yin i cal i Parao ikome." 
Genesis44:19 Adwoŋŋa rik obin openyowa ni, ‘Papawu tye, onyo ominwu?’" 
Genesis44:20 Wan ote gamo dogi ni, ‘Papawa tye doŋ oti oko, ominwa daŋ tye obedo atinnere me cogo, ame en onywalo i tio mere; ominnere me toto yam oto oko, en doŋ odoŋ kene, dok pappere mare.’" 
Genesis44:21 Rik yin ite kobbiwa ni, ‘Wot ikele wunu baŋa me anene.’" 
Genesis44:22 Cite wan ote kobbi ni, ‘Awobi atidi ca mom twero ya i ŋet pappere, ka opokere i pappere, pappere to oko.’" 
Genesis44:23 Ento yin rik ite kobbiwa ni, ‘Ka ce ominwu atidi mom obino kan karacel kedwu, mom dok ibino neno wunu waŋa.’" 
Genesis44:24 Kare ame wan odok paco baŋ papawa ame en amironi, wan otitte kop ame yin ikobo, adwoŋ." 
Genesis44:25 Kare ame papawa okobbiwa ni, ‘Wot dok iwilla wunu cam aduno’," 
Genesis44:26 wan okobbe ni, ‘Wan giwa mom odok. Ka iye ominwa atidi owoto karacel kedwa, wan obino dok pien mom obino neno wan dano ca ka ominwa atidi mom tye i akinawa.’" 
Genesis44:27 Amironi papawa te kobbiwa ni, ‘Wun iŋeo wunu ni dakona onywalo itino awobe aryo;" 
Genesis44:28 acel oto oko, an yam doŋ akobo ni, Ateteni lee tim yam doŋ okikilo gire oko, mom dok abino nene atwal." 
Genesis44:29 Ka dok ikwanyo wunu man oko i baŋa, eka ginnoro arac te timere i kome, ibino tero wunu lwar wia i lyel i twon cannoro a mom kobere.’" 
Genesis44:30 Kwo mere ocuŋ i kom atin awobi-ni, doŋ ka ce abino dok baŋ amironi pappa aboŋo atin awobi-ni i akinawa," 
Genesis44:31 ka bino neno ni en mom tye i akinawa, en bino to oko, wan obino tero lwar wi papawa i lyel i twon cannoro a mom kobere." 
Genesis44:32 An rik ate miye baŋ pappa me gwoko atin man, kun akobbe ni, ‘Ka ce an mom abino dwoggo en baŋi, ballere bino bedo i wia i nyim pappa pi kare me kwona luŋ.’" 
Genesis44:33 Adwoŋ, man en gin omio akwai, tim ber iye an amironi adoŋ kaka awobi man, me an abed opiini; me atin man luny dok paco karacel kede omego mere." 
Genesis44:34 Pien atwero dok baŋ pappa paco niŋo ka atin awobi-ni mom tye?” 
Genesis45:1 Yucepu onwoŋo mom doŋ romo diyo cunye i nyim lwak jo ame ocuŋ i laŋete: omio en oredo kun kobo ni “Mi jo luŋ ya oko i baŋa wot oko teŋe.” Mannono te miyo ŋattoro mom dok obedo tye i kare ame Yucepu nyutte kene baŋ omego mere. 
Genesis45:2 En ogeo kok atek meicel, ame jo Miciri kede jo i paco a Parao daŋ owinyo." 
Genesis45:3 Yucepu te doŋ kobbi omego mere ni, “An a Yucepu; pappa pwod tye kwo?” Omego mere te liŋ aliŋa pien koppere opoo komgi atek i nyime." 
Genesis45:4 Yucepu te kobbi omego mere ni, “Tim wunu ber inokka wunu aceggi.” Gin te nokke ceggi. Okobbigi ni, “An ominwu Yucepu ame yam icato wunu i Miciri-ni." 
Genesis45:5 Kur doŋ ibed wunu i waŋcunnyoro, onyo kede waŋ yiccoro i komwu kenwu kenwu pi cata kan, pien Obaŋa gire a rik ocwaa i nyimwu me alar kwo a joo" 
Genesis45:6 Pien aman doŋ otyeko mwakki aryo, pwod dok odoŋ mwakki ocele abic ame jo mom bino pur kadi kayo ginnoro." 
Genesis45:7 Obaŋa ocwala i nyimwu me gwokowu wun jo ame bino doŋ i wi lobo, pi laro kwo a jo apol ame bino bwot." 
Genesis45:8 Pien mom wun en a rik icwaa wunu kan ento Obaŋa gire. Obaŋa doŋ omia adoko pappo baŋ Parao, an adwoŋ ame loo ode kede lobo mere luŋ." 
Genesis45:9 Wot wunu oyot, iru wunu dok baŋ papa, ikobbe wunu ni, ‘Wodi Yucepu okobo ni, Obaŋa doŋ otyeko keto me bedo aloc a jo Miciri luŋ ru doŋ bino baŋa kan." 
Genesis45:10 Ibin ibed cok keda kan i lobo me Gocen, yin karacel kede itinoni kede ikwai ducu, anaka limmi luŋ kede jamini ducu," 
Genesis45:11 An abino piti kuno, pien mwakki me kec pwod odoŋ kany twal i nyim; me yin kede jo me paconi, kede gin ame itye kede luŋ, mom inen wunu can.’" 
Genesis45:12 Wun doŋ ineno wunu i waŋwu, ominna Benjamin daŋ doŋ oneno i waŋe ni an en ame akop kedwu-nono ikokome." 
Genesis45:13 Wun doŋ myero iwot ititti wunu pappa kit kwogo ame an atye kede i Miciri, kede ginnoro luŋ ame doŋ ineno wunu. Wot wunu oyot, i ru kela wunu pappa kan.”" 
Genesis45:14 Eka en te kwako ŋut ominnere Benjamin kun kok, ominnere Benjamin daŋ te kwako ŋute kun kok." 
Genesis45:15 Yucepu te noto lem omego mere luŋ kun kok, pig waŋe cwer i komgi, eka omego mere te cako kop kede." 
Genesis45:16 Kare ame kop man owinyere i ot a Parao ni, “Omego a Yucepu obino,” koppere oyomoro cuny Parao kede omiro mere atek meicel." 
Genesis45:17 Parao te kobbi Yucepu ni, “Cik omegoni ni, ‘Tim wunu kit man: twe yecwu i ŋe leyiwu, idok wunu i lobo me Kanaan," 
Genesis45:18 wot ikel wunu papawu kede jo me pacowu, ibin wunu baŋa; an abino miyowu jami abeco ame tye i lobo Miciri, ibino camo wunu cam abeco ame tye i lobo-ni.’" 
Genesis45:19 Cikgi daŋ dok otim kit man, ‘Ter wunu daŋ gadigadi mogo i Miciri me loro itinowu kede monwu, me ikel wunu papawu, ibin wunu kan," 
Genesis45:20 Kur ipar wunu pi jamiwu, pien jami abeco luŋ me Miciri bino bedo megwu’.”" 
Genesis45:21 Awobe Icrael daŋ te tiyo kittono. Yucepu omiogi gadigadi kite ame abaka ocikogi kede, te daŋ miyogi ginnoro me dwoko lao iyo." 
Genesis45:22 Te dok miyo ŋat acel acel boŋŋi abeco me aruka i nino adoŋo; cite Benjamin ote miyo cekel me ryal mia adek kede boŋŋi abeco me nino adoŋo. 
Genesis45:23 Te cwayo baŋ pappere jami magi: kane apar ame oyeo jami abeco me Miciri, kede megi kane apar ame oyeo kal kede cam, kede dok cammogo ocele me dwoko lao iyo, pi papagi." 
Genesis45:24 Yucepu te doŋ cwayo omego mere wot. A doŋ gin aya, Yucepu te cikogi ni, “Kur ida wunu i yo ba.”" 
Genesis45:25 Gin te ya oko i Miciri, dwogo baŋ papagi i Kanaan." 
Genesis45:26 Gin te titte ni, “Yucepu pwod tye kwo, en aloc me Miciri luŋ.” Tipo kome te riŋo oko, pien onwoŋo mom ru oye kopgi." 
Genesis45:27 Cite i kare ame gin doŋ otitte kop luŋ i kom Yucepu, kede kite ame ocikogi kede, kede dok ka oneno gadigadi ame Yucepu ocwao me tiŋe, tipo kom papagi doŋ te cako dwogo." 
Genesis45:28 Icrael doŋ te kobo ni, “Doŋ otum, woda Yucepu kara pwod tye kwo; abino wot nene a mom ru ato.”" 
Genesis46:1 Icrael te cako wot kun tero jami mere luŋ a rik etye kede. Obino i Beer-ceba omio iye gi-tum me yalo Obaŋa a pappere Icaka. 
Genesis46:2 Obaŋa te kop Icrael i lek kun lwoŋe ni, “Yakobo, Yakobo.” En te gamo ni, “An ene.”" 
Genesis46:3 Okobbe ni, “An Obaŋa, Obaŋa a pappi, kur ilwor wot i Miciri, pien abino miyo idoko rok adwoŋ kuno." 
Genesis46:4 Abino wot kedi naka i Miciri, dok daŋ abino dwoggo yin; ciŋ Yucepu bino wumo waŋi.”" 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo te doŋ ya wot oko i Beer-ceba, kun awobe mere tiŋe kede gadigadi a rik Parao ocwao me tiŋe, karacel kede itino atino, kede mon," 
Genesis46:6 Gin otero limgi kede jamigi luŋ a rik gin onwoŋo i lobo me Kanaan, owoto kede i Miciri; gin otero Yakobo kede itino mere kede ikwae ducu." 
Genesis46:7 Awobe me re kede awobe awobe mere, kede anyira mere, kede anyira awobe mere. Itino mere kede ikwae, gin luŋ rik oterogi i Miciri." 
Genesis46:8 Man nyiŋ ikwae Icrael a rik owoto i Miciri, Yakobo kede awobe mere: atin a Yakobo me kao, Reuben." 
Genesis46:9 Itino a Reuben ene: Kanok, Pallu, Kejeron, kede Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Itino a Cimeon ene: Jemeul, Jamin, Okad, Jakin, Jokar kede dok Caul, ame obedo awobi a dako me Kanaan." 
Genesis46:11 Itino a Levi ene: Gercon, Kokat, kede Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Itino a Juda ene: Er, Onan Cela, Perej, kede Jera (ento Er kede Onan te to oko i Kanaan). Itino a Perej ene: Kejeron kede Kamul." 
Genesis46:13 Itino Icakar ene: Tola, Puwa, Iob, kede Cimeon." 
Genesis46:14 Itino a Jabulon ene: Cered, Elon, kede Jaleel." 
Genesis46:15 Magi-nono gin itino awobe ame Lea onywalo baŋ Yakobo i Paddan-aram karacel i nyare Dina; wel itino awobe kede anyira onwoŋo romo pyeradek wie adek. 
Genesis46:16 Itino a Gad ene: Jipion, Kaggi, Cuni, Ejibon Eri, Arodi, kede Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Itino Acer ene: Imuna, Icva, Icvi, Beria kede amingi Cera. Itino a Beria ene: Keber kede Malkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Magi itino a Jilpa, aŋeca ame Laban rik omio baŋ nyare Lea. En onywali Yakobo itino apar wie abicel." 
Genesis46:19 Itino a Lakeri dako a Yakobo ene: Yucepu kede Benjamin. 
Genesis46:20 Yucepu onywalo Manace kede Epraim i lobo me Miciri, ame Acinaci nyaka a Potipera alamdog me On onywalo." 
Genesis46:21 Itino a Benjamin ene: Bela, Beker, Acibel, Gera, Naaman, Eki, Roc, Muppim, Kuppim kede Arud." 
Genesis46:22 Magi-nono gin itino ame Lakeri onywalo baŋ Yakobo; itino awobe luŋ apar wie aŋwen. 
Genesis46:23 Wot a Dan obedo Kucim. 
Genesis46:24 Itino a Naputali ene: Jajeel, Guni, Jejer kede Cillem." 
Genesis46:25 Magi gin itino ame Bila onywalo baŋ Yakobo, aŋeca ame Laban rik omio nyare Lakeri. Itino awobe luŋ rik gin abiro." 
Genesis46:26 Jo ot a Yakobo luŋ ame rik en owoto kedgi i Miciri, a rik itino mere kede ikwae ikokome, kun mom okwano iye mon itino awobe a Yakobo, gin luŋ rik oromo pyerabicel wie abicel." 
Genesis46:27 Itino awobe ame rik Yucepu onywalo i Miciri rik tye aryo. Jo ot a Yakobo a rik owoto i Miciri luŋ rik doŋ oromo pyerabiro. 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo ocwao Juda i nyim, baŋ Yucepu, me nyuttigi yo awoto Gocen; gin te tuno i Gocen." 
Genesis46:29 Yucepu te yiko gadigadi mere me wot rwatte i pappere i Gocen, eka te wot nyutte kene baŋ pappere, te kwako ŋute pi kare alalac kun kok." 
Genesis46:30 Icrael okobbi Yucepu ni, “To gire doŋ bin, pien doŋ aneno waŋi, aniaŋ doŋ ni kara pwod itye kwo.”" 
Genesis46:31 Yucepu te kobbi omego mere kede jo me ot a pappere ni, “Adok, awot titti Parao, abino kobbe ni, ‘Omegona kede jo me ot a pappa a rik tye i lobo Kanaan, doŋ otyeko bino baŋa." 
Genesis46:32 Jonono gin okwat, pien yam gin gigi okwat cakere con, dok aman daŋ gin obino i limgi kede jamigi luŋ.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ka Parao bino lwoŋowu, te penyowu ni, ‘Wun itio wunu tic aŋo?’" 
Genesis46:34 Wun myero idokke wunu ni, ‘Omironi okwat cakere con i kare me tinowa tuno kede atot onyoni, wan karacel kede kwariwa.’ Man bino miyo ibedo wunu i Gocen; pien jo ame okwat luŋ obedo me kwer baŋ jo Miciri.”" 
Genesis47:1 Yucepu te wot titti Parao ni, “Pappa kede omegona, karacel i limgi luŋ, gin doŋ obino oko i lobo Kanaan; aman doŋ gin tye i Gocen.”" 
Genesis47:2 En otero jo abic i akina omego mere, onyutogi baŋ Parao." 
Genesis47:3 Parao openyogi ni, “Wun itio wunu tic aŋo?” Gin ogamo ni, “Wan omironi wan okwat gire bala kwariwa.”" 
Genesis47:4 Gin dok te kobbi Parao ni, “Wan doŋ obino me bedo i lobo-ni pien kan ame omironi myero kwa iye limgi mom tye; kec doŋ onwoŋo okur atek meicel i Kanaan, aman doŋ timwa ber, iwek wan omironi obed i Gocen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Parao te kobbi Yucepu ni, “Pappi kede omegoni doŋ obino baŋi." 
Genesis47:6 Lobo Miciri tye i ciŋi, ket pappi kede omegoni bed i lobo aber akato luŋ; migi obed i Gocen. Ka ce iŋeo jo moro i akinagi ame ryek, migi obed jo ame gwoko limma.”" 
Genesis47:7 Yucepu dok te kelo pappere i nyim Parao, Yakobo te lammi Parao winyo." 
Genesis47:8 Parao te penyo Yakobo ni, “Yin ce doŋ iri i lobo mwakki adi?”" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo ogamo ni, “An doŋ a perakino i lobo mwakki mia acel i pyeradek, mwakana luŋ ame abedo kede kwo i lobo pwod nok dok daŋ opoŋ i can; mom rom i mwakki ame kwarina ori kede i lobo kun oloŋo piny.”" 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo te lammi Parao winyo, te ya oko i nyim Parao." 
Genesis47:11 Yucepu te miyo pappere kede omego mere kabedo i lobo Miciri, kan ame ber meicel kato kan ocele, i Ramecec, kite ame Parao ociko, kun miogi lobogi" 
Genesis47:12 Yucepu te poko cam baŋ pappere, omego mere, kede jo me ot a pappere, kun lubo wel jo ame gin tye kede." 
Genesis47:13 I kare-nono onwoŋo cam doŋ mom i lobo luŋ, kec onwoŋo doŋ okur atek meicel, man omio kec onyono jo luŋ me Miciri kede me Kanaan." 
Genesis47:14 Yucepu ocoko lim luŋ ame tye i Miciri kede i Kanaan, ame jo obedo wilo i cam, te tero luŋ baŋ Parao." 
Genesis47:15 Kare ame lim doŋ otum oko i ciŋ jo Miciri kede Kanaan, jo Miciri luŋ te ciro baŋ Yucepu, te kobbe ni, “Miwa cam; wan otwero to niŋo kun yin inenowa? Pien limwa doŋ otum oko.”" 
Genesis47:16 Yucepu te gamo ni, “Miwa wunu lim akwo me an aluny miyowu cam, ka centewu doŋ otum oko.”" 
Genesis47:17 Gin te cako kelo lim akwo baŋ Yucepu, Yucepu te lunyo miyogi cam pi aguraguragi, rommigi, dokgi kede kanegi. Yucepu te miyogi cam i mwakanono, pi limgi luŋ aluŋa." 
Genesis47:18 A doŋ mwaka-nono otum, gin dok odwogo baŋe i mwaka a lubo mannono, ote kobbe ni, “Adwoŋwa, wan mom doŋ otwero munŋi kopporo kadi acel, limwa acalo cente doŋ otum oko iweŋ, limwa akwo daŋ doŋ odoko me adwoŋwa oko, ginnoro ame doŋ odoŋ i ciŋwa mom tye kadi acel kono ka komwa kede lobowa." 
Genesis47:19 Wan karacel i lobowa myero oto kun yin itye inenowa anena? Yin myero i wilwa i cam karacel kede lobowa daŋ, wan giwa oye bedo opii a Parao. Miwa koti me kur oto ento obed kwo; me lobo kur doŋ nono.”" 
Genesis47:20 Mannono omio Yucepu owilo lobo me Miciri luŋ obedo mea Parao, pien jo Miciri luŋ ocato pottigi oko, pi kec ame onwoŋo rik okur atek. Lobo luŋ te doko doŋ mea Parao." 
Genesis47:21 Jo luŋ doŋ te doko opii, cakere i ŋet lobo tuŋ cel tuno kede tuŋ ocele." 
Genesis47:22 Lobo olamdog keken en a rik odoŋ a mom owilo, pien olamdog rik onwoŋo tye i camgi ame Parao en ame mio; gin obedo camo gin ame Parao miogi nono, en omio mom ote cato lobogi." 
Genesis47:23 Yucepu dok te kobbi jo ni, “Nen, i kare ni an doŋ awilowu kede lobowu ducu pi Parao. Aman doŋ gam wunu koti icoo wunu." 
Genesis47:24 I kare me kac, ibino wunu miyo acel me abic me gin ocek baŋ Parao, aŋwen me abic bino bedo megwu, me koti me acoa i pottiwu, kede me acamawu, wun karacel i jo me udiwu kede itinowu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Gin te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, doŋ ilaro kwowa oko, berwa en a doŋ myero nen i nyimi, wan giwa doŋ obino bedo opii a Parao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Yucepu omio man odoko cik i lobo Miciri naka atot onyoni, Parao pwod tero acel me abic me ginnoro luŋ ocek. Lobo olamdog keken en ame mom odoko mea Parao." 
Genesis47:27 Icrael obedo i lobo Miciri, i lobo me Gocen, limmere omedde, onya apol meicel kuno." 
Genesis47:28 En obedo kuno mwakki apar wie abiro, mannono omio mwakki a Yakobo luŋ, ame en ori kede i lobo, oromo mia acel kede pyeraŋwen wie abiro." 
Genesis47:29 A doŋ kare me to Icrael ceggi, olwoŋo wode Yucepu te kobbe ni, “Ka doŋ berra onen i nyimi, rwak ciŋi i te amurana wek icikere me bedo i gen kede ateni i koma. Kur iyika a Miciri," 
Genesis47:30 ento imia abut karacel kede kwarina; tiŋ koma oko i Miciri iwot iyika kan ame oyikogi iye.” Yucepu te gamo ni, “Abino tiyo kit ame ikobo-nono”" 
Genesis47:31 Icrael dok te kobo ni, “Aco doŋ kwoŋ ba.” Yucepu te kwoŋ, eka Icrael te kulo wie piny i wi tanda mere." 
Genesis48:1 Icennere ote titti Yucepu ni, “Nen, pappi kome lit;” en te tero itino mere aryo Manace kede Epraim." 
Genesis48:2 Ote kobbi Yakobo ni, “Wodi Yucepu obino baŋi.” Icrael te cukere ya malo bedo i wi tanda." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo te kobbi Yucepu ni, “Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu yam onen baŋa i Luj, i lobo Kanaan, te miya iye winyo," 
Genesis48:4 kun kobba ni ‘Nen, abino miyi inya, imedde apol meicel, dok abino miyi idoko lwak rok apol, abino miyo lobo man baŋ ikwai kede baŋ jo ame bino lubi, me bedo megi atwal.’" 
Genesis48:5 Doŋ aman, itino awobeni aryo-ni, ame inywalo i Miciri kun an mom ru abino baŋi i Miciri, gin daŋ bino bedo mega; Epraim kede Manace, gin luŋ obino bedo itinona, a rom aroma kom i Reuben kede Cimeon." 
Genesis48:6 Itino ame ibino nywalo iŋegi bino bedo megi giri. Gin obino nwoŋo lobo me alea i wi omegogi. 
Genesis48:7 Pien i kare ame rik aya i Paddan-aram, cunya obin owaŋ atek pien Lakeri oto oko iyo, kun onwoŋo Eparat pwod bobor, ate yike i yo ame woto Eparat (ame en Beterekem).”" 
Genesis48:8 Ka Icrael oneno itino awobe a Yucepu, openyo ni, “Man kara jo mene nie?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yucepu te gamo dog pappere ni, “Magi-nono awobena ame Obaŋa omia kan.” Yakobo te gamo ni, “Kelgi baŋa kan me alammigi winyo.”" 
Genesis48:10 I kare-nono onwoŋo Icrael doŋ oti, waŋe daŋ doŋ ocoro oko, mom doŋ neno piny. Kare ame Yucepu doŋ okelogi aceggi, en onoto lemgi, kun kwakogi kede bade." 
Genesis48:11 Icrael okobo baŋ Yucepu ni, “Onwoŋo yam atamo ni mom dok abino neno waŋi; nen, Obaŋa dok omio aneno anaka waŋ itinoni.”" 
Genesis48:12 Yucepu te miyogi jer i ŋet coŋe teŋeteŋe, eka en te ryebere piny i nyim Yakobo." 
Genesis48:13 Yucepu te mako ciŋgi gin aryo luŋ terogi aceggi i Yakobo, kun Epraim tye i ciŋe tuŋ cem, ame otikere kede ciŋ Icrael tuŋ cam, kede Manace i ciŋe tuŋ cam, ame otikere kede ciŋ Yakobo tuŋ cem." 
Genesis48:14 Icrael te tiŋo ciŋe tuŋ cem keto i wi Epraim atin atidi, kede ciŋe tuŋ cam i wi Manace, kun luluco ciŋe aluca, pien Manace en onwoŋo obedo atin kao." 
Genesis48:15 Olammi Yucepu winyo kun kobo ni, “Obaŋa ame yam kwariwa Iburaim kede Icaka obedo wot i nyime, Obaŋa ame obedo tela pi kare me kwona luŋ, tuno kede naka atot anyoni," 
Genesis48:16 amalaika ame yam olara i gin arac, myero mi awobe-ni winyo; me lwoŋ nyiŋa pirgi, kede nyiŋ kwarona Iburaim kede Icaka; me gin nya atek meicel, odok lwak apipim i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ka Yucepu oneno ni pappere olunyo keto ciŋe tuŋ cem i wi Epraim, cunye mom obedo yom. En omako ciŋ pappere, me ekwany oko i wi Epraim, eket i wi Manace," 
Genesis48:18 En okobbi pappere ni, “Mom amannono adwoŋ, pien man en atin kao, ket ciŋi me tuŋ cem i wie.”" 
Genesis48:19 Cite pappere te kwero oko, kun kobo ni, “Atinna, an aŋeo; en daŋ bino bedo rok, en daŋ bino doko dwoŋ, cite ominnere atidi bino bedo dwoŋ kate oko, ikwae bino doko lwak rok apol”" 
Genesis48:20 En te lammigi winyo kun kobo ni, “Jo Icrael bino lamo winyo i nyinwu ni, ‘Obaŋa omi ibed bala Epraim kede Manace’ ”; Yakobo oketo Epraim i nyim Manace kittono." 
Genesis48:21 Icrael okobbi Yucepu ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ aceggi to, cite Obaŋa bino bedo kedwu, dok daŋ dwokowu i lobo a kwarowu." 
Genesis48:22 Dok atyeko poko kor kidi amio baŋi adwoŋ akato omegoni ducu, ame rik amao i ciŋ jo Amor, i pala lweny kede atero.”" 
Genesis49:1 Yakobo olwoŋo itino awobe mere te kobbigi ni, “Cokere wunu karacel, me ati tiwu gin ame bino timere i komwu i kare ame tye i nyim." 
Genesis49:2 “Cokere wunu iwiny wunu, wun awo be a Yakobo, winy wunu kop a papawu Icrael." 
Genesis49:3 Yin Reuben ibedo atin kaona, yin itekona, i nyig tekona me agege, yin iloo pi wakere kede pi twer." 
Genesis49:4 Pi corre bala pii, mom ibino loyo pien yin iyito naka i wi kabuto a pappi; itimo-gu tim me kir iye, iyito kom i wi tandana!" 
Genesis49:5 Cimeon kede Levi gin omego; pala lwenygi en a bino bedo gi-lwenygi. 
Genesis49:6 Tipona, kur iribere kedgi i cokeregi, yin cunya daŋ, kur inotte kedgi; pien akemogi omio oneko jo apol meicel, dok daŋ oŋoŋolo-glu odone a twoni me akaka." 
Genesis49:7 Akemogi-nono cen oko, pien gwa; akemogi oceno oko, pien ger! Abino popokogi i akina jo a Yakobo, abino keketogi atata i akina jo Icrael." 
Genesis49:8 Juda, yin omegoni bino paki; ciŋi bino bedo i ŋut okworri; itino a pappi bino ryebere piny i nyimi." 
Genesis49:9 Juda obedo atin eŋatu; atinna, iya mwodo lee, ite yito malo. En onyoŋo piny, obuto calo eŋatu, acalo min eŋatu, na kara a cunye tek me tuge?" 
Genesis49:10 Abiro me loc mom bino ya i baŋ Juda, abiro loc mom bino ya i akina tyene, ituno ka wonnere bino tuno; en ame rok luŋ bino winyo koppere." 
Genesis49:11 En tweo atin kana mere i kom olok, atin twonnere tweo i kom olok aberrere, atin twonnere tweo i kom olok aberrere, en lwoko rukkere i kono olok." 
Genesis49:12 Kono olok bino miyo waŋe bok pee, cak bino miyo lake doko tar kia." 
Genesis49:13 Jabulon bino bedo i dog nam, en bino doko ka dokoro a mele, wan lobo mere bino bedo Cidon twal." 
Genesis49:14 Icakar en kana atek, buto i akina anok rommi;" 
Genesis49:15 oneno ka weo-nono ber, lobo mere daŋ ber; omio en onyogere me tino yec, odoko opii ame odio i tic atek." 
Genesis49:16 Dan bino ŋolo kop i kom jo mere acalo ŋat acel i akina atekere me Icrael. 
Genesis49:17 Dan bino bedo twol i ŋet yo, codocodo i dye yo, en bino toŋo opuny aguragura, kun mio ŋat obedo i wie rette ataro," 
Genesis49:18 Akuro lari giri, ama Rwot." 
Genesis49:19 Oyak jo bino yako Gad, cite Gad daŋ bino ryemogi, te yakogi." 
Genesis49:20 Acer bino camo moo, en bino kelo cam ame mit oporre pi aloc." 
Genesis49:21 Naputali obedo min atil ame otwaro, en kobo kop amit." 
Genesis49:22 Yucepu en jaŋ yat onyak, en jaŋ yat onyak meicel i ŋet akoŋ, jaŋe jany lak i cel." 
Genesis49:23 Wegi atero oromo kede romo agwa meicel, gin ocelo en dok daŋ ololle meicel," 
Genesis49:24 ento akud atero mere ocuŋ gire mot ikiŋ, omio ciŋe odoko amit oko, pi ciŋ Twon Ateko a Yakobo, pi nyiŋ akwat rommi, ame Kidi Icrael," 
Genesis49:25 pi Obaŋa a pappi ame bino konyi pi Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu ame, bino winyo. Winyo ame ya i polo, winyo ame ya i kut atut oyabere i te lobo, winyo ame ya i tuno kede winyo ame ya i yic." 
Genesis49:26 Winyo a pappi dwoŋ, loo winyo a kiddi ame parakino nakanaka oko, kede jami abeco a tye i wi tur a ri nakanaka. Gin luŋ bed i wi Yucepu, kede i tur nyime, en ŋat a rik opokere oko i akina omego mere," 
Genesis49:27 Benjamin obedo epet ager, camo lee ame oneko odiko, otyeno poko lim ame omao.”" 
Genesis49:28 Magi-nono gin atekere Icrael apar wie aryo; kop ame papagi okobbigi ennono, i kare ame lammigi winyo, kun lammi ŋat acel acel gummere otike." 
Genesis49:29 Yakobo te doŋ cikogi ni, “An doŋ adok nywako kabedo i kwarina, myero iwot iyika wunu baŋ kwarina i gorogoro ame tye i poto a Epron, dano me Kitti," 
Genesis49:30 i gorogoro a tye i Makpela tuŋ kide me Mamre, i lobo me Kanaan, a rik Iburaim owilo karacel kede poto, i baŋ Epron, dano me Kitti, te doko mere me yik." 
Genesis49:31 Rik oyiko Iburaim kede dako mere Cara kuno. Icaka kede dako mere Lebeka daŋ oyiko kuno, an daŋ ayiko Lea kuno." 
Genesis49:32 Poto-nono kede gorogoro a tye iye yam owilo i baŋ jo Kitti.” 
Genesis49:33 Kare a Yakobo otyeko ciko awobe mere odolo tyene malo i tanda te omo cunye tyen me agikki mere, te to oko; owoto onywako kabedo i kwari mere." 
Genesis50:1 Yucepu te rette i nyim pappere, okok i pig waŋe kun noto leme." 
Genesis50:2 Yucepu ociko omiro mege a daktar me wiro kom pappere i yat talo kom; odaktar daŋ te wiro kom Icrael. 
Genesis50:3 Wiro kome otyeko nino pyeraŋwen, ame en kit kare a myero wir kede kom dano oto, ka ce awiro i yat me talo kom. Jo Miciri okoke nino pyerabiro." 
Genesis50:4 Kare ame nino me kwero cola doŋ otum, Yucepu okobbi jo a Parao ni, “Ka ce berra doŋ onen i nyimwu, tim wunu ber ikobbi wunu Parao ni mano," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Papa omio akwoŋo kun akobo ni, An doŋ aceggi to, ibino yiko wunu koma i lyel ame an ikoma rik akunyo i lobo me Kanaan.’" 
Genesis50:6 En omio akwai ni itim ber iye awot ayik pappa, eka ate dwogo.” Parao te gamo ni, “Ber, wot iyik pappi, kit acalo en rik omi ikwoŋo akwoŋa-ni,”" 
Genesis50:7 Yucepu te wot yiko pappere, owoto karacel omiro a Parao ecipan, odoŋe me ot a Parao kede odoŋe me Miciri luŋ," 
Genesis50:8 kede jo me ot a Yucepu, kede omego mere, kede jo me ot li pappere luŋ, itino keken kede limgi luŋ en ame odoŋ i Gocen." 
Genesis50:9 Owoto i gadigadi ecipan, kede wegi aguragura, karacel kede lwak jo ecipan." 
Genesis50:10 Kare ame gin otuno i laro moro me dino kal ame tye i Atad loka Jordan, gin okok kuno kun otye i waŋcuny kede kumo adwoŋ meicel; ote kwero cola nino abiro," 
Genesis50:11 Ka wegi lobo-nono, ame gin jo Kanaan oneno kwero colagi i laro moyo kal, ame tye i Atadi, gin okobo ni, “Man kwero cola me waŋcuny meicel baŋ jo me Miciri.” Mannono omio nyiŋ kabedo-nono olwoŋo ni, Abel-micraim; ame tye loka Jordan." 
Genesis50:12 Awobe mere te timo jami luŋ kit a rik en ocikogi kede," 
Genesis50:13 pien gin otero kome i lobo Kanaan, ote daŋ yiko i gorogoro ame tye i poto i Makpela tuŋ kide me Mamre, ame rik Iburaim owilo i baŋ Epron, dano me Kitti, karacel kede poto, me bed me yik." 
Genesis50:14 A doŋ Yucepu otyeko yiko pappere, en odok i Miciri karacel omego mere, kede jo luŋ a rik owoto kedgi me yiko pappere." 
Genesis50:15 Ka omego a Yucepu oneno ni papagi doŋ oto oko, gin te tamo ni, “Gwok onyo Yucepu doŋ bino cako dagowa, te culo kwor i komwa pi roccoro luŋ a yam wan otimo i kome.”" 
Genesis50:16 Omio gin te cwayo kwena baŋ Yucepu kun okobo ni, “Pappi i kare ame mom ru oto ocikowa ni," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Kobbi wunu Yucepu tim omego mere kica, timgi kica i bal luŋ ame rik gin otimo i komi, pien gin rik otimmi rac!’ Aman okwai, tim omiro Obaŋa a pappi kica.” Kare ame gin tye a kop kede, Yucepu okok," 
Genesis50:18 Omego mere owoto te wot ryebere piny i nyime, ote kobbe ni, “Nen ba, wan giwa doŋ wan omironi,”" 
Genesis50:19 Cite Yucepu te dokkigi iye ni, “Kur ibed wunu kede lworo moro; an abedo Obaŋa bo?" 
Genesis50:20 Wun onwoŋo imito wunu ti mo gin arac i koma, cite i tuŋ baŋ Obaŋa, en oyiko timo gin aber, ame omio jo apol obedo kwo, kite acalo gin tye kede-ni," 
Genesis50:21 Pi mannono, kur ibed wunu kede lworo moro kadi acel; an abino pitowu karacel kede itinowu luŋ.” Koppono te miyo cunygi dwogo, yigi daŋ doŋ te bedo ayom." 
Genesis50:22 Yucepu rik obedo i Miciri kittono, en kede jo ot a pappere. Yucepu ori i lobo mwakki mia acel kede apar." 
Genesis50:23 En oneno itino Epraim, tuno nakai kom ikwae me adekkere. Itino a Makir wot a Manace daŋ onywalogi ame Yucepu tye kun gamogi acalo mege." 
Genesis50:24 Yucepu okobbi omego mere ni, “An doŋ aceggi to; ento Obaŋa bino limowu, dok bino kwanyowu oko i lobo man, bino dwokowu i lobo ame en rik okwoŋo iye baŋ Iburaim kede icaka kede Yakobo,”" 
Genesis50:25 Yucepu te miyo awobe Icrael kwoŋ kun okobo ni, “Obaŋa bino limowu, eka ite tero wunu cogona oko i kan.”" 
Genesis50:26 Yucepu oto ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo mia acel kede apar. Owiro kome i yat talo kom, ote pyele i canduk yik i Miciri." 
Exodus1:1 Nyiŋ awobe Icrael ame obino i Miciri karacel i Yakobo, kun ŋat acel acel bino i jo ode, gin ene:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Cimeon, Levi, Juda," 
Exodus1:3 Icakar, Jabulon, kede Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan kede Naputali, Gad kede Acer." 
Exodus1:5 Itino a Yakobo kede ikwae ikokome luŋ rik romo pyerabiro, kun Yucepu a rik doŋ tye i Miciri day tye iye." 
Exodus1:6 Icennere Yucepu kede omego mere luŋ te to oko, karacel kede olwakkigi luŋ." 
Exodus1:7 Cite ikwae Icrael onya, omedde atek meicel, ote poŋo lobo oko." 
Exodus1:8 Icennere abaka anyen a mom ŋeo Yucepu te cako loyo Miciri. 
Exodus1:9 En te kobbi jo mere ni, “Jo-nie, koŋ inenu ba jo Icrael, aman opol dok daŋ otek meicel, oloowa oko." 
Exodus1:10 Biye oŋol wunu ryeko moro me tic kedgi, ogeŋ wunu nyagi oko. Pien joni ka monnyoro bino cobowa, gin bino notte okworwa ote romo kedwa, eka gin gigi te ŋwec oko i lobowa.”" 
Exodus1:11 Mannono omio jo Miciri oketo odoŋe a loo tic, me ronogi i tic atek kun omiogi oyeo yee apek. Gin te gerri Parao boma me Pitom kede Ramecec, me kano cam." 
Exodus1:12 Cite ka oketo can i komgi, gin gigi dok omedde ameda inya, me poŋo lobo. Mannono omio jo Miciri omedde dago jo Icrael kede lworogi." 
Exodus1:13 Gin ote lido jo Icrael i tic agwa meicel," 
Exodus1:14 kun omiogi otio tic apek okato kare, me nyono lobo kede goyo matafali, kede kit tic ocele atek luŋ me poto. I ticcoro luŋ a rik gin tio, rik otio kedgi agwa meicel." 
Exodus1:15 Abaka me Miciri dok te ciko ocolmon a jo Eburania aryo, Cipira kede Pua, ni," 
Exodus1:16 “Ka it ye wunu ka colo mon a jo Eburania, ŋi wunu kit atin ame onywalo. Ka ce atin awo bi, nek wunu oko, ento ka nyako, wek wunu bed kwo.”" 
Exodus1:17 Ocolmonnaca onwoŋo rikobedo mon a lworo Obaŋa; gin mom ote tiyo gin ame abaka me Miciri ocikogi iye. Gin gigi mom ote neko itino awobe. 
Exodus1:18 Abaka me Miciri te lwoŋo ocolmon, penyogi ni, “Kara piŋo itimo wunu kit man? Nen, wun mom ineko wunu itino a co!”" 
Exodus1:19 Ocolmon te kobbi Parao ni, “Mon a jo Eburania pat meicel i mon a jo Miciri. Gin cunygi tek meicel, onywal ame ŋat a cologi mom ru otuno.”" 
Exodus1:20 Obaŋa rik te timo ocol-monnono ber, jo te medde ameda inya bedo apol." 
Exodus1:21 Pien ocolmon rik olworo Obaŋa, Obaŋa omiogi gin daŋ onwoŋo jo me pacogi ikokomgi." 
Exodus1:22 Parao dok te ciko jo mere luŋ ni, “Atin awobi moro keken ame jo Eburania bino nywalo, myero ibol wunu oko i kulo Nail, cite anyira myero iwek wunu bed kwo.”" 
Exodus2:1 Lo moro me ot a Levi rik te nyomo nyaka Levi. 
Exodus2:2 Nyako-nono oyac, te nywalo atin ico. Ka en oneno ni atinnono ber meicel, okano oko pi dwete adek." 
Exodus2:3 A doŋ oneno ni mom romo kanne, en okwanyo ijaŋa ame ocweo alado, te puyo kome odok lam kede odok yat. Otiŋo atin te pyelo i yie, te tero wot royo i dye alugaluga i dog kulo Nail." 
Exodus2:4 Aminnere te cuŋ i teŋe me neno ŋo ame bino timere i kom atin. 
Exodus2:5 Kare ame nyaka a Parao obino lwok i kulo Nail, anyira ame konye te bedo koŋ loloŋo ŋet kulo. En oneno ijaŋa tye i akina alugaluga, te cwayo aŋeca mere acel omo." 
Exodus2:6 En oyabo te nwoŋo atin tye i yie; atin te kok. Kica omake i kom atin, te kobo ni, “Man atin a dano moro me Eburania.”" 
Exodus2:7 Amin a Muca te penyo nyaka a Parao ni, “Imito awot alwoŋŋi dako moro me Eburania me wot pitti atin man?”" 
Exodus2:8 Nyaka a Parao te gamo ni, “Apee woti.” Nyannono te wot kelo totta atin ikome," 
Exodus2:9 Nyaka Parao te kobbe ni, “Ter atinni iwot ipitta. An abino culi pire.” Dako-nono te tero atin wot gwoko." 
Exodus2:10 Kare ame atin doŋ odoŋo, en otero baŋ nyaka Parao, te game acalo wode. Nyannono te cako nyiŋe ni Muca, kun kobo ni, “Pien alabe gira i pii.”" 
Exodus2:11 Kare a Muca doŋ odoŋo, i nino moro acel en owoto baŋ jo mere, te neno peko a gin tye kede. En oneno lo moro me Miciri tye anomonomo dano me Eburania ame dano acel i akina rokkere." 
Exodus2:12 Kare a en onoloro kabedo luŋ mom oneno dano moro, oneko dano me Miciri oko eka te yiko i kwoyo." 
Exodus2:13 Odiko ocele en dok owoto, te neno jo Eburania aryo tye aromo kengi, te kobbi lo ame abal ni, “Kara icipocipo ominni adoŋ piŋo?”" 
Exodus2:14 En ogamo doge ni, “Ŋa kara oketi me bedo aloc kede aŋolkopwa? Imito neka bala dano me Miciri ame ineko?” Lworo omako Muca, te tamo i cunye ni, “Jo kara doŋ oŋeo gin otimere oko ba!”" 
Exodus2:15 Ka Parao owinyo kop man, omito ni enek Muca oko. Cite Muca gire te lwi oko i baŋ Parao te wot i lobo Midian. En owoto obedo piny i dog akon." 
Exodus2:16 Alamdoggoro me Midian onwoŋo rik tye kede anyira mere kany wie aryo. Anyira-nono obino te twomo pii; a doŋ gin otwomo pii opoŋ weer oko me miyo lim a papagi mato. 
Exodus2:17 Okwat ocele te bino ryemogi oko, Muca te ya konygi, te miyo dokgi mato pii," 
Exodus2:18 Kare a gin odwogo paco, papagi Reuel openyogi ni, “Kara tin idwogo wunu con piŋo?”" 
Exodus2:19 Gin ogamo ni, “Lo moro me Miciri en olarowa i ciŋ okwat, en a daŋ otwommiwa pii te daŋ miyo limwa mato.”" 
Exodus2:20 Reuel te penyo anyira mere ni, “Aman en tye kwene? Piŋo kara iweke wunu kuno? Lwoŋe wunu ebin ecem.”" 
Exodus2:21 Muca rik te ye bedo tuŋ a dano-nono, en te miyo Muca nyomo nyare Jipola." 
Exodus2:22 Nyannono te nywalo awobi, Muca te cako nyiŋe Gerecom kun kobo ni, “Pien an doŋ abedo welo i lobo a mom megwa.”" 
Exodus2:23 Kare te kato alalac, abaka me Miciri te daŋ to oko i kine-nono. Jo Icrael onwoŋo pwod tye ka cur kun okok pi bedogi opii opii; kokoginono te winyere baŋ Obaŋa." 
Exodus2:24 Kare ame Obaŋa owinyo cucuragi, opo pi cikere mere baŋ Iburaim, kaka kede Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Obaŋa te neno jo Icrael i waŋ me kica, te daŋ ŋeyo kit ame gin bedo kede." 
Exodus3:1 Kare moro ame onwoŋo Muca rik tye akwayo romi a ore, Yecero papa a cege, alamdog me Midian, en otero romi i tim kan abobor tuŋ to, te wot tuno naka i Koreb, ame obedo kidi Obaŋa," 
Exodus3:2 Amalaika a Rwot rik te nen baŋe i leb mac alyel i yat obunere; Muca ociko waŋe iye, pien kadi bed mac rik tye alyel i yat obuŋere-nono, ento ginnoro iye onwoŋo mom awan," 
Exodus3:3 Muca te kop i cunye ni, “Mito koŋ aŋi twon ginnoro-ni i ceggi, me aniaŋ gin omono yat obuŋere-ni waŋ.”" 
Exodus3:4 Ka Rwot oneno ni Muca abino neno, Obaŋa olwoŋe i yat obunere-nono ni, “Muca, Muca.” Muca ogamo ni, “An ene.”" 
Exodus3:5 Obaŋa te kobbe ni, “Kur ibin aceggi kan. Gony amuk oko i tyeni, pien kan icuŋ iye-nono obedo lobo acil.”" 
Exodus3:6 Dok te medo ni, “An Obaŋa a kwaroni, Obaŋa Iburaim, Obaŋa Icaka kede, Obaŋa Yakobo.” Muca te wumo waŋe oko, pien onwoŋo alworo neno kom Obaŋa." 
Exodus3:7 Rwot te kobo ni, “Atyeko doŋ neno can a jona i Miciri, awinyo kokogi i kom odoŋe a loogi tic; aŋeo canginono, daŋ atye aparo pire," 
Exodus3:8 An doŋ abino piny me larogi oko i ciŋ jo Miciri, abino kwanyogi oko i lobo Miciri, ate terogi i lobo aber, alac ata, dok opoŋ i cak kede moo kic. Lobo-nono obedo lobo a jo Kanaan, jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kivi kede jo Jebuc," 
Exodus3:9 Nen, koko a jo Icrael doŋ owinyere baŋa, atyeko daŋ neno kit a jo Miciri wunogi kede," 
Exodus3:10 Aman yin doŋ yikere ibin acwai baŋ Parao. Amito iwot ikwany jona, jo Icrael, ya oko i lobo Miciri.”" 
Exodus3:11 Muca okobbi Obaŋa ni, “An ana ame atwero wot i nyim Parao, onyo ame aromo kwanyo jo Icrael me ya oko i Miciri?”" 
Exodus3:12 Obaŋa ogamo ni, “An abino bedo kedi, gin abino nyuto ni an aori ene: kare a doŋ ikwanyo jona oya oko i Miciri, ibino woro Obaŋa i wi kidi man.”" 
Exodus3:13 Muca te penyo Obaŋa ni, “Kara ka an abino wot baŋ jo Icrael ate kobbigi ni Obaŋa a kwariwu ocwaa baŋwu an abino kobbigi ŋo ka ce gin dok openya ni, ‘Nyiŋe kara ŋa?’ ”" 
Exodus3:14 Obaŋa te dokki Muca ni, “Atye Gira Acalo Atye. Kobbi jo Icrael ni ‘Atye ocwaa baŋwu.’" 
Exodus3:15 Obaŋa dok te kobbi Muca ni, ‘Myero ikobbi jo Icrael ni, “Rwot ”, ame en Obaŋa a kwariwu, Obaŋa Iburaim, Obaŋa Icaka kede Obaŋa Yakobo, ocwaa baŋwu.’ Mannono bino bedo nyiŋa atwal; ibino lwoŋa wunu amannono i ka re ducu, naka ikwaewu daŋ luŋ." 
Exodus3:16 Wot icok odoŋe a jo Icrael ite tittigi ni, ‘Rwot ame Obaŋa a kwariwu, Obaŋa Iburaim, Obaŋa Icaka kede Obaŋa Yakobo, onyutte kene baŋa kun kobba ni, An ikoma doŋ atyeko neno gin a jo Miciri tye atimo i komwu," 
Exodus3:17 doŋ atyeko moko me kwanyowu oko i lobo me Miciri, kan ame otye ka wunowu iye. Abino terowu i lobo a jo Kanaan, jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc, lobo ame opoŋ i cak kede moo kic.’" 
Exodus3:18 Odoŋe me Icrael bino gire ye koppi. Yin myero doŋ iwot karacel kedgi baŋ abaka me Miciri ite wot kobbe ni, ‘Wan orwatte kede Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Eburania. Tim ber iyewa owot wot me nino adek i tim, me owot omi motwa ame oŋolo me yalo Rwot Obaŋawa.’" 
Exodus3:19 Aŋeo ni abaka me Miciri mom bino ye iwoto wunu ka mom odio adia i ciŋ atek," 
Exodus3:20 pi mannono, an abino ryeyo ciŋa, abino pwodo jo Miciri i kite kwone taŋo luŋ ame abino tiyo i komgi. Icennere gin bino ye iwoto wunu." 
Exodus3:21 Dok abino miyo cuny jo Miciri bedo yom i kom jowu. Mom obino miyo iwoto wunu ciŋwu nono i kare me yawu i Miciri. 
Exodus3:22 Dako acel acel bino kwayo dako wadgi, kede dako ame bedo i ode, wel me ryal kede me jabu kede boŋŋi abeco a myero irukki itinowu awobe kede anyira. Man bino miyo iyako wunujami ajo Miciri.”" 
Exodus4:1 Muca ogamo ni, “Kara abino timo ŋo ka ce jo Icrael mom bino ye winyo kop akobbigi. Kare ocele gin twero kobo ni, ‘Rwot gire mom onyutte baŋi.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Rwot okobo ni, “Mano ŋo imako i ciŋi-nue?” Muca ogamo ni, “Abiro ennono,”" 
Exodus4:3 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Bol koŋ piny.” Kare ame en obolo piny olokere odoko twol, eka Muca te pye oko teŋe iceny." 
Exodus4:4 Cite Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Koŋ dok irye badi imak yibe.” Muca oryeo ciŋe omako yibe, eka te ru lokere oko doko abiro." 
Exodus4:5 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Mano bino miyo gin ye in Rwot ame Obaŋa a kwarigi. Obaŋa Iburaim, Obaŋa kaka kede Obaŋa Yakobo, onyutte baŋi.”" 
Exodus4:6 Rwot dok okobbe ni, “Koŋ dok irwak ciŋi i kori.” Muca daŋ te rwako ciŋe i kore; kare ame en okwanyo ciŋe i kore, nen, dobo onwoŋo orwatte i ciŋe luŋ atar bala pee." 
Exodus4:7 Rwot dok te kobbe ni, “Koŋ dok idwok ciŋi i kori.” Kare ame en odwoko ciŋe i kore te kwanyo oko, nen, ciŋe onwoŋo odoko gire aber kakare." 
Exodus4:8 Rwot te kobo ni, “Ka ce gin mom bino ye koppi, dok daŋ mom oye a doŋ inyuttigi anyut me agege oko, anyut me aryo bino miyogi oloko tamgi." 
Exodus4:9 Ka ce anyut aryo-ni luŋ mom omiogi oye, dok daŋ okwero winyo koppi, ibino twomo pii i kulo Nail, ionyo i lobo ka otwo; pii ame itwomo i kulo Nail-nono bino lokere doko remo i lobo.”" 
Exodus4:10 Muca te kobbi Rwot ni, “Ama Rwotta, an gira leba oto oto anaka cene, kadi ame itye ikop keda-ni, pwod gire tye kite acellono. Atye ka omo kop aomo kun atelle kede atela.”" 
Exodus4:11 Rwot te penye ni, “Ŋa a mio dano kobo? Ŋa kara a dwalo leb dano onyo a mio dano bedo adiŋyit, a mio dano neno aber onyo bedo atowaŋ? Mom an Rwot?" 
Exodus4:12 Yin myero iwoti, an abino konyi me kop aber, dok abino kobbi gin a myero ikob.”" 
Exodus4:13 Cite en dok te gamo ni, “Ama Rwotta, tim ber icwa ŋat ocele.”" 
Exodus4:14 Akemo a Rwot te tugere oko i kom Muca kun kobo ni “Ominni Aron ame jo Levi mom tye kuno? An aŋeo ni en kobo aber meicel. Nen ba, en daŋ doŋ tye abino me rwatte kedi, yie bino bedo yom meicel ka oneni." 
Exodus4:15 Yin ibino kop kede kun ititte gin a myero en kobi. An abino konyi me kop aber, dok daŋ abino konye. Wun luŋ, an abino kobbiwu gin a myero iti wunu." 
Exodus4:16 En bino kop i lwak kakari. Aron bino bedo ŋat a kobo piri, ento kop Obaŋa ame en bino kobo bino ya i baŋi." 
Exodus4:17 Ter abironi iwot kede, pien bino konyi kuno me tiyo taŋo.”" 
Exodus4:18 Kare ame Muca odok baŋ Yecero, ame papa a dako mere, en okwae ni “Tim ber koŋ iwek adok baŋ omegona ame tye i Miciri, me awot anen ka ce gin pwod tye kwo.” Yecero te gamo ni, “Wot giri i kuc, atinna.”" 
Exodus4:19 Kare ame Muca rik pwod tye i Midian Rwot okobbe ni, “Dok ceŋ i Miciri: Jo luŋ a rik mito neki doŋ ototoa oko.”" 
Exodus4:20 Muca te keto dako mere kede awobe mere i wi kana, te cako wottere me dok cen i Miciri kun omako abiro Obaŋa i ciŋe." 
Exodus4:21 Rwot okobbi Muca ni “Ka doŋ ityeko dok cen i Miciri, myero inen ni itio taŋo luŋ ame atyeko miyi twer me tiyo i nyim Parao; cite an abino miyo cunye bedo nwaŋ, mom bino ye jo woto." 
Exodus4:22 Doŋ ba, yin myero ikobbi Parao ni, ‘Man en kop ame Rwot ikome okobo: Icrael obedo awobina me kao." 
Exodus4:23 Atyeko kobbi ni, “Myero iye woda woti, me en wot cob ticcere a myero en ti baŋa”; ento yin ikwero oko; nen, aman an doŋ abino neko wodi me kao oko.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 I kare ame gin tye i wotgi, Rwot orwatte kede Muca kan a gin obuto iye kun mito neke oko." 
Exodus4:25 Jipola te kwanyo kidi abit, te liro i kom awobe mere, te gudo i tyen Muca kun kobo ni, “Aman doŋ yin i cwara pi remo!”" 
Exodus4:26 Rwot doŋ te weke. I kare ame dako okobo ni, “Yin i cwara meremo”, onwoŋo okobo pi kop me lirre." 
Exodus4:27 Rwot okobbi Aron ni “Wot irwatte i Muca i tim.” En oya, te rwatte kede i wi kidi Obaŋa, te mote kun noto leme." 
Exodus4:28 Muca te kobbi Aron kop luŋ a Rwot rik okobbe i kare ame oore kede taŋo luŋ ame Obaŋa ociko ni eti kede. 
Exodus4:29 Muca kede Aron te wot i Miciri coko odoŋe a jo Icrael luŋ karacel. 
Exodus4:30 Aron te kobbigi kopporo ducu ame Rwot okobo baŋ Muca, te daŋ nyuto taŋo luŋ i nyim lwak." 
Exodus4:31 Jo oye koppere; kare ame gin owinyo ni Rwot doŋ olimo jo Icrael, dok daŋ neno can luŋ ame Icrael tye ka neno, gin luŋ ote kulo wigi piny woro Obaŋa." 
Exodus5:1 Icennere Muca kede Aron te wot baŋ Parao, ote kobbe ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, ‘Wek jona woti, me gin wot kwer nino adwoŋ i tim me wora.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Parao te gamo ni, “Rwot en ŋa-nono kara? Ŋo a mia awinyo gin a en okobo? Piŋo kara a mio aye Icrael iwot? An gira mom aŋeo Rwottono, daŋ mom abino ye Icrael woto.”" 
Exodus5:3 Gin dok te kobbe ni, “Wan otyeko rwatte Obaŋa a jo Eburania. Tim ber iwekwa owoti, wot me nino adek i tim, me owot omi mot ame oŋolo me yalo Rwot Obaŋawa; pien ka wan mom owoto, en Rwot bino pwodowa kede two edeke onyo pala lweny.”" 
Exodus5:4 Cite Parao abaka me Miciri te kobo ni, “Muca kede Aron, piŋo ikwanyo wunu jo oko i dog ticgi? Wun dok wunu i dog ticwu.”" 
Exodus5:5 Dok te kobo ni, “Nen jo-in doŋ pol meicel, wun dok imito miyogi wunu we i dog ticgi?”" 
Exodus5:6 I nino-nono Parao te ciko odoŋe a loo tic a lwak, kede onyamparagi, ni," 
Exodus5:7 “Kur dok imedde kelligi wunu ocwici me goyo matafali kit a yam itimo wunu con, gin ikomgi en a doŋ myero om-mi." 
Exodus5:8 Wel matafali bed kit a yam ogoo kede, kur idwok wunu wellere piny; pien komgi wac, en omio gin kok ni, ‘Wekwa owot omi mot oŋolo me yala Obaŋawa i tim.’" 
Exodus5:9 Migi wunu tic atek me ololle kede, me owek winyo kop goba goba bedi.”" 
Exodus5:10 Odoŋe a loo tic a lwak, kede onyamparagi, te wot kobbi jo ni, “Parao okobo ni, ‘An mom dok abino keliwu ocwici." 
Exodus5:11 Wun doŋ myero iwot iyeny wunu ikomwu, kan ame itwero nwoŋo wunu iye; ento ticwu bino bedo kit acon aboŋo dwoko piny kadi acel.’ ”" 
Exodus5:12 Mannono te miyo jo ket i Miciri luŋ pi coko reŋ kal me ocwici. 
Exodus5:13 Odoŋe a loo tic te bedo cunyogi ni, “Ru wunu tyeko ticwu me nino i nino kite a yam con ame itye wunu ocwici.”" 
Exodus5:14 Odoŋe a loo tic a Parao te bedo pwodo onyampara a jo Icrael ame gin oketo kun openyogi ni “Piŋo tin mom ityeko ticwu me goyo matafali i kite a yam con?” 
Exodus5:15 Eka onyampara a jo Icrael te wot kok baŋ Parao ni “Piŋo kara itimo omironi amanne? 
Exodus5:16 Nen, ocwici mom doŋ okelligi, aco okobbiwa ni, ‘Go wunu matafali!’ Obedo pwodo-gu omironi apwoda, aco kono bal tye baŋ joni.”" 
Exodus5:17 Cite Parao ogamo ni, “Wun komwu wac, wun komwu wac; en omio wun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Wekwa owot omi mot oŋolo me yalo Rwot.’" 
Exodus5:18 Dok wunu i tic. Ocwici gire mom obino miyowu kadi acel, dok daŋ ibino goyo wunu matafali i wei a yam con aboŋo alokaloka moro.”" 
Exodus5:19 Onyampara a jo Icrael oneno ni doŋ otye arac meicel i kare ame okobo ni, “Mom obino dwoko wel matafali me nino i nino piny kadi acel.”" 
Exodus5:20 Gin te rwatei Muca kede Aron a rik onwoŋo tye a kurogi i kare a gin dwogo i baŋ Parao. 
Exodus5:21 Gin te kobbigi ni, “Rwot myero nenwu, dok daŋ ŋolliwu kop, pien imio wunu nyiŋwa odoko aŋwe i nyim Parao kede omiro mere, dok imiogi wunu pala lweny me nekowa.”" 
Exodus5:22 Muca te lokere baŋ Rwot, te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, itimo jo-ni arac aman piŋo kara ba? Icwaa kan piŋo?" 
Exodus5:23 Cakere ame abino baŋ Parao, me kop kede i nyiŋi, en te cako timo jo-ni arac meicel, yin mom ru ilaro joni.”" 
Exodus6:1 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Tin doŋ ibino neno gin ame abino timo i kom Parao; ciŋ atek bino miyo en wekogi owoto oko, kun ryemogi aryema i lobo mere.”" 
Exodus6:2 Obaŋa okobbi Muca ni, “An a Rwot." 
Exodus6:3 Rik anen baŋ Iburaim, baŋ Icaka kede baŋ Yakobo, kun gin ŋeo ni an Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu, cite rik mom amiogi oŋeo ni nyiŋa Rwot." 
Exodus6:4 Rik daŋ amoko cikerena kedgi kun acikere me miyogi lobo me Kanaan, ame en lobo a rik gin obedo iye acalo wele." 
Exodus6:5 Dok daŋ atyeko winyo ŋuŋura a jo Icrael ame jo Miciri doŋ olokogi odoko opii-ni, daŋ doŋ apo i cikerena." 
Exodus6:6 Pi mannono, kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, ‘An a Rwot, abino kwanyowu oko i peko ame jo Miciri oketo i komwu. Abino larowu oko i bedo me opii opii. Abino lakorowu i bada ame aryeo, kede cannogo adoŋo ame abino ŋolo i komgi." 
Exodus6:7 Abino terowu ibedo wunu jona, an abedo Obaŋawu. Ibino ŋeyo wunu ni an a Rwot Obaŋawu ame akwanyowu i peko ame jo Miciri oketo i komwu." 
Exodus6:8 Eka ate bino kelowu i lobo a rik akwoŋo pire ni abino miyo baŋ Iburaim, kede Icaka, kede Yakobo, abino miyowu me bedo lobowu; an a Rwot’.”" 
Exodus6:9 Muca te kobo koppono baŋ jo Icrael; ento gin mom te winyo kop a Muca, pien cunygi onwoŋo oballe oko pi tic apek okato kare me opii opii." 
Exodus6:10 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus6:11 “Dony baŋ Parao abaka me Miciri, iwot ikobbe ewek jo Icrael ya oko i lobo mere.”" 
Exodus6:12 Ento Muca okobbi Rwot ni, “Nen, jo Icrael okwero winyo koppa oko kara Parao bino winyo koppa nino, an a dano a doga mom cil-li?”" 
Exodus6:13 Rwot okobo i Muca kede Aron, ocikogi baŋ jo Icrael kede baŋ Parao abaka me Miciri, pi kwanyo jo Icrael oko i lobo Miciri." 
Exodus6:14 Magi gin odoŋe me doggola a kwarigi: itino awobe a Reuben ame obedo atin kao Icrael, gin ene; Kanok, Pallu, Kejeron kede Karmi; jo me doggola a Reuben ennono." 
Exodus6:15 Itino a Cimeon awobe ene; Jemuel, Jamin, Okad, Jak in, Jokar, kede Caul, awobi a dako me Kanaan; jo doggola a Cimeon ennono," 
Exodus6:16 Magi gin nyiŋ itino a Levi awobe, kun lubere i lwakigi: Gercon, Kokat kede Merari; mwaka a Levi me dittere ame ori kede i lobo, rik oromo mia acel i pyeradek wie abiro," 
Exodus6:17 Itino a Gercon awobe ene: Libni kede Cimei, kit acalo doggolagi tye kede." 
Exodus6:18 Itino a Kokat awobe ene: Amuram, Ijar, Kebron, kede Ujiel; mwaka a Kokat me dittere ame ori kede i lobo oromo mia acel i pyeradek wie adek." 
Exodus6:19 Itino a Merari awobe ene: Makali kede Muci. Jo me doggola a Levi ennono kun lubere i lwakigi 
Exodus6:20 Amuram onyomere i Yokobedi amin pappere, te nywalo Aron kede Muca; mwaka Amuram me dittere ame ori kede i lobo oromo mia acel i pyeradek wie abiro," 
Exodus6:21 Itino a Ijar awobe ene: Kora, Nepeg kede Jikri," 
Exodus6:22 Itino a Ujiel awobe ene: Micael, Elijapan kede Citri." 
Exodus6:23 Aron onyomo Eliceba nyaka Aminadab, amin a Nacon, te nywalo Nadab, Abiku, Eleajar kede Itamar." 
Exodus6:24 Itino a Kora awobe ene: Acir, Erukana kede Abiacap; doggola a Kora ennono." 
Exodus6:25 Eleajar wot a Aron, onyomo dako i akina anyira a Putiel, te nywalo Finekaci. Odoŋe me doggola a kwari a jo Levi ennono, kit a doggolagi tye kede." 
Exodus6:26 Aron kede Muca ennono, ame Obaŋa okobbigi ni, “Kwany wunu jo Icrael oko i Miciri kun owoto atekere, atekere." 
Exodus6:27 Gin en a rik okobo abaka me Miciri pi kwanyo jo Icrael oko i lobo Miciri; Muca kede Aron-nono, gin ennono.”" 
Exodus6:28 I nino ame Rwot okobo kede baŋ Muca i Miciri," 
Exodus6:29 Rwot ociko Muca ni, “Ana a Rwot; kob abaka me Miciri kop ducu ame atitti.”" 
Exodus6:30 Muca te kobbi Rwot ni, “Nen, an gira doga mom cil; Parao bino winya niŋo?”" 
Exodus7:1 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Nen ba, an atyeko keti me bedo acalo Obaŋa baŋ Parao, aco ominni Aron bino bedo calo adwarpinnyi." 
Exodus7:2 Yin ibino kobo kop luŋ ame aciki iye, eka ominni Aron te kobo baŋ Parao me weko jo Icrael ya oko i lobo mere." 
Exodus7:3 Ento abino miyo cuny Parao bedo nwaŋ, abino medde tiyo anyut kede taŋo apopol i lobo Miciri." 
Exodus7:4 Ento Parao mom gire bino winyo koppi. Icennere abino keto ciŋa i kom jo Miciri ate kwanyo gira monnya oko, ame gin jona Icrael, abino miyogi ya oko i lobo Miciri kun nwoŋo koŋ cannogo adoŋo ame aŋolo i kom jo Miciri otimere." 
Exodus7:5 I kare ame abino ryeyo ciŋa i kom jo Miciri pi kwanyo jo Icrael oko i akinagi, gin bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Exodus7:6 Muca kede Aron te tiyo daŋ kite a Rwot ocikogi kede. 
Exodus7:7 Muca onwoŋo doŋ tye i mwaka a romo pyreraboro me dittere, aco me Aron onwoŋo tye pyreraboro wie adek i kare ame gin kobo i Parao." 
Exodus7:8 Rwot dok te kop i Muca kede Aron ni," 
Exodus7:9 “Ka ce Parao okobbiwu ni, ‘Koŋ inyuttiwa wunu taŋo moro me onen ka ikobo wunu kop ateni,’ yin ibino kobbi Aron ni, ‘Kwany abironi ibol piny i nyim Parao, me lokere dok twol.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Muca kede Aron rik te wot baŋ Parao, ote daŋ wot tiyo kit a Rwot ocikogi kede. Aron obolo abiro piny i nyim Parao kede omiro mere, abiro te lokere doko twol." 
Exodus7:11 Parao te lwoŋo oryeko ame obedo ojogi ojogi, ame gin rik emuroko me Miciri; gin daŋ ote timo amannono i ryekogi me jojok." 
Exodus7:12 Pien dano acel acel i akinagi obolo abiro mere piny te daŋ lokere doko twol, cite abiro Aron te mwonyo megi luŋ." 
Exodus7:13 Cuny Parao gire pwod omedde ameda bedo anwaŋ, mom oye winyo kopi, kite ame Rwot onwoŋo okobo." 
Exodus7:14 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Cuny Parao pwod nwaŋ, okwero weko jo wot oko." 
Exodus7:15 Wot baŋe idiko con ame en pwod aya ayaa me wot i kulo; wot ikure i ŋet kulo, mak abironi a rik lokere dok twol ca i ciŋi." 
Exodus7:16 Eka ite bino kobbe ni, ‘Rwot ame Obaŋa a jo Eburania ocwaa baŋi kun kobo ni, wek jona woti me gin wot ti pira i tim, koŋ inen yin mom ru iwinyo koppa." 
Exodus7:17 Aman Rwot doŋ okobo ni mano. Man en a bino miyo iŋeo ni an a Rwot: abino goyo pii i kulo Nail kede abiro a tye i ciŋa-ni, pii bino lokere doko remo." 
Exodus7:18 Rec luŋ i kulo Nail bino to oko, kulo Nail bino doko acoo meicel, yi jo Miciri mom bino mito mato pii i kulo Nail.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kob baŋ Aron ni, ‘Kwany abironi ite ryeyo ciŋi i wi pii luŋ me Miciri; i wi kulli, i wi yo pii okukunyo, i wi atapara luŋ kede i wi kabedo luŋ ame pii poŋ iye, me gin luŋ aluŋa lokere dok remo; meremo rom lobo Miciri luŋ, naka i ginnoro luŋ otio i yat onyo i gweŋ ame jolo pii.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Muca kede Aron daŋ te tiyo kit a Rwot ocikogi kede. Aron otiŋo abiro mere malo i nyim Parao kede omiro mere, te goyo pii i kulo Nail, pii luŋ i kulo Nail te lokere doko remo." 
Exodus7:21 Kit rec luŋ i kulo Nail te cako to oko, ŋwec kulo daŋ te doko acoo meicel. Mannono te miyo jo Miciri doŋ mom dok romo mato pii i kulo Nail, dok remo daŋ doŋ te romo lobo Miciri luŋ." 
Exodus7:22 Emuroko me Miciri daŋ ote timo amannon i ryekogi me jojok; te miyo cuny Parao bedo anwaŋ, mom te ye winyo kopgi, kit ame Rwot onwoŋo okobo." 
Exodus7:23 Parao te dok gire tuŋe kun mom daŋ tye aparo gire kop man i cunye. 
Exodus7:24 Jo Miciri luŋ te bedo kunyo pii amatagi i ŋet kulo Nail, pien onwoŋo mom doŋ oromo mato pii i kulo Nail." 
Exodus7:25 I ŋe nino abiro a doŋ Rwot ogoo kulo Nail. 
Exodus8:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Dony baŋ Parao iwot ikobbe ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni, Wek jona woti, me owot oti pira." 
Exodus8:2 Aco ka ce ikwero wekogi wot, nen ba, abino coro ogwalogwal i loboni luŋ." 
Exodus8:3 Ogwalogwal bino corre apipim i kulo Nail, te bino naka i udini, naka atot iyi icikani kede i wi tandani; bino wot daŋ atot i udi omironi kede meajoni, naka atot i keno tedogi, kede i tako kwon." 
Exodus8:4 Ogwalogwal bino pye-gu anaka i komi kede i kom joni kede omironi.’ ” 
Exodus8:5 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kob baŋ Aron ni, ‘Rye doŋ ciŋi kede abironi i ciŋi i wi kulli, yo pii okukunyo, kede atapara luŋ, me ogwalogwal corre i lobo Miciri apipim!’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Aron te daŋ reyeyo ciŋe i wi pii luŋ a tye i lobo Miciri, ogwalogwal te corre apipim wumo lobo Miciri oko," 
Exodus8:7 Emuroko me Miciri daŋ ote timo amannono i ryekogi me jojok, gin daŋ te miyo ogwalogwal apipim corre i Miciri." 
Exodus8:8 Icennere Parao te lwoŋo Muca kede Aron, te kobo ni, “Kwa wunu Rwot me kwany ogwalogwal oko i koma kede i kom jona, me awek jo wot mi mot oŋolo me yalo Rwot.”" 
Exodus8:9 Muca te dokki Parao ni, “Mano gire ber; aco yin doŋ myero imia kare ame imito ni akwa iye Rwot piri, kede pi omironi kede joni, me ogwalogwal to oko ducu i komi kede i udini, me doŋ en i kulo Nail keken.”" 
Exodus8:10 Parao te gamo ni, “Kom diki adika-ni.” Muca te kobo ni “Aco doŋ bed kit ikobo-nono, me yin ine ni mom dok tye ŋattoro ocel a calli Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Exodus8:11 Ogwalogwal bino ya oko i komi, kede i udini, kede i kom omironi kede joni; obino weko ka en i kulo Nail keken.”" 
Exodus8:12 Muca kede Aron te doŋ ya oko i nyim Parao; Muca te kok baŋ Rwot pi ogwalogwal kit acalo onwoŋo eye kede baŋ Parao. 
Exodus8:13 Rwot daŋ te timo kit ame Muca okobo kede, ogwalogwal daŋ te totoa oko i udi kede i dyekal kede i potti ducu." 
Exodus8:14 Ote cokogi luŋ karacel awu awu, ŋwece te kuto aŋwe i kabedo ducu." 
Exodus8:15 Cite Parao ka oneno ni pwod dok cwe, cunye te doko anwaŋ oko, mom oye winyo kopgi, kit ame Rwot onwoŋo okobo." 
Exodus8:16 Rwot te dok kobbi Muca ni “Kob Aron ni, ‘Tir abironi malo me igo kede apuwa me lokere dok ober ame bino lal romo lobo Miciri luŋ.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Gin daŋ te timo amannono, Aron te tiro ciŋe malo kun abiro mere tye i ciŋe, te goyo apuwa, ober te wukere bino i kom jo kede i kom leyi ducu." 
Exodus8:18 Emuroko daŋ i ryekogi me jojok ote temo ni ober myero bin, cite te loyogi oko. Pi mannono, ober rik te bedo i kom jo kede i kom leyi luŋ." 
Exodus8:19 Emuroko te kobbi Parao ni, “Man gire ciŋ Obaŋa.” Cite cuny Parao pwod omedde ameda ibedo nwaŋ, mom oye winyo kopgi, kit ame Rwot onwoŋo okobo." 
Exodus8:20 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Dil idiko con iwot ikur Parao i kare ame en awot i kulo, i te kobbe ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni mano, Wek jona woti, owot oti pira." 
Exodus8:21 Ka ce mom ibino weko jona wot, nen ba, abino coro lwak lwaŋi apipim i komi, i kom omironi kede i kom joni luŋ, bino wot atot i udini; lwak lwaŋi bino ŋinne apipim i udi a jo Miciri daŋ, anaka i lobo ame gin ocuŋ iye." 
Exodus8:22 I ninonono abino poko lobo Gocen pat, kan ame jona bedo iye, me lwaŋi kur corre kuno, me iŋe wunu ni an a Rwot a tye i dye lobo luŋ," 
Exodus8:23 Abino poko akina jona kede joni kittono. Anyut man bino timere diki.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Rwot daŋ te tiyo kittono; omio lwak lwaŋi apipim ocorre i udi a Parao kede me omiro mere, anaka i lobo Miciri luŋ; lwaŋi apipim-mi te balo gire lobo oko." 
Exodus8:25 Icennere Parao te lwoŋo Muca kede Aron, te kobbigi ni, “Wot imi wunu mot oŋolo me yalo Obaŋawu i lobowa kan.”" 
Exodus8:26 Cite Muca te gamo ni, “Mom gire otwero timo kittono; pien leyi a waŋ obino ŋolo me yalo Obaŋawa obedo me kwer baŋ jo Miciri. Ka ce wan obino ŋolo leyi me yalo Obaŋawa ame obedo me kwer baŋ jo Miciri kun gin aneno i waŋgi, gin mom bino napowa oko i gweŋe?" 
Exodus8:27 Wan myero owot giwa i tim wot me nino adek, me owot omi mot oŋolo me yalo Rwot Obaŋawa kit a en ocikowa kede.”" 
Exodus8:28 Omio Parao te kobo ni, “Abino wekowu iwoto wunu i tim me iwot imi wunu mot oŋolo me yalo Obaŋawu, ento mom ibino wot wunu kannabor. Kwa koŋ doŋ pira.”" 
Exodus8:29 Muca te kobo ni, “Nen an doŋ aya oko i nyimi, awot kwayo Rwot me lwaŋi diki ya oko i komi, kede i kom omironi kede joni, cite Parao myero kur dok bwolwa te kwero ye jo wot miyo mot oŋolo me yalo Rwot.”" 
Exodus8:30 Muca te ya oko i nyim Parao, te wot kwayo Rwot." 
Exodus8:31 Rwot daŋ te tiyo kite a Muca okwao kede, te miyo lwaŋi ya oko i kom Parao kede i kom omiro mere kede jo mere; acelloro mom odoŋ." 
Exodus8:32 Cite cuny Parao pwod dok omedde ameda ibedo nwaŋ, mom gire oye jo owoto." 
Exodus9:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Wot ikobbi Parao ni, ‘Rwot ame Obaŋa a jo Eburania okobo ni mano. Wek jona woti me wot ti pira." 
Exodus9:2 Ka ce ikwero ni gin kur woti, kun pwod imedde ameda geŋogi," 
Exodus9:3 nen ba, Rwot bino ryeyo ciŋe bedo i kom limwu luŋ a tye i bar kun kelo edeke apek i kom aguragura luŋ, inaga luŋ, kana luŋ kede dok, dyegi kede romi," 
Exodus9:4 Ento Rwot bino poko lim a jo Icrael kede meajo Miciri, lim ajo Icrael mom bino to kadi acelloro.’ ”" 
Exodus9:5 Rwot te nyuto kare kun kobo ni, “Rwot bino timo man diki.”" 
Exodus9:6 Orwo mere Rwot te tiyo kittono; lim a jo Miciri luŋ te to oko, ento lim a jo Icrael mom te to kadi acelloro." 
Exodus9:7 Parao te cwayo dano, nen, lim a jo Icrael moro mom oto kadi acelloro. Cite cuny Parao gire pwod omedde ameda ibedo nwaŋ, mom oye jo owoto." 
Exodus9:8 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca kede Aron ni, “Job wunu buru i ka waŋo matafali poŋ ciŋwu, mi wunu Muca cor malo tuŋ polo i nyim Parao." 
Exodus9:8 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca kede Aron ni, “Job wunu buru i ka waŋo matafali poŋ ciŋwu, mi wunu Muca cor malo tuŋ polo i nyim Parao." 
Exodus9:9 Bino lokere doko apuwa ame te duny romo lobo Miciri, luŋ, bino miyo odeke kwokwota atata i kom jo kede i kom leyi luŋ me Miciri.”" 
Exodus9:10 Gin daŋ ote jobo buru i ka waŋo matafali, ote cuŋ kede i nyim Parao. Muca te coro malo, eka te lokere doko odeke, kom jo luŋ kede leyi te kwokwota atata i two odeke." 
Exodus9:11 Emuroko mom doŋ romo cuŋ i nyim Muca, pien odeke onwoŋo okwokwota anaka i komgi kede i kom jo Miciri luŋ." 
Exodus9:12 Ento Rwot omio cuny Parao obedo nwaŋ, mom oye kopgi, kit ame Rwot onwoŋo okobo kede baŋ Muca." 
Exodus9:13 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Dil idiko con iwot icuŋ i nyim Parao, ikobbe ni, ‘Rwot ame Obaŋa a jo Eburania okobo ni mano. Wek jona woti, me owot oti pira." 
Exodus9:14 Pien man doŋ abino miyo cunyi cwer atek pi kit can apapat ame abino pwodowu kede, yin kede joni luŋ, me ineni mano mom dok tye ŋattoro ocele i lobo luŋ ame rom keda." 
Exodus9:15 Pien kono nyo doŋ aryeo ciŋa agoi oko i too edeke agwa, karacel i lwakki luŋ, kono nyo doŋ i mom wunu i lobo;" 
Exodus9:16 cite pi kop man omio aweki kwo, me anyutti te kona, nyiŋa te rwo i lobo luŋ." 
Exodus9:17 Yin giri pwod itye iyon i kom jona, ikwero wekogi wot oko." 
Exodus9:18 Nen ba, diki i kodi caa-ni, abino coro lwak pee apekkege i lobo, pee a yam mom ru onen i lobo Miciri, cakere a jo ocako bedo iye, tuno kede atot onyoni." 
Exodus9:19 Pi mannono, aman myero icwa kop me cok limmi luŋ kede jamini ducu ame tye i bar, me kelgi i ot; pien pee bino pwodo jo ducu kede leyi luŋ ame tye oko, bino neko jami ducu a tye i bar.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Jo mogo i akina omiro a Parao ame lworo kop a Rwot, omio opiigi kede limgi oriŋo olaro ot." 
Exodus9:21 Ento jo a mom winyo kop a Rwot oweko opiigi kede limgi i bar. 
Exodus9:22 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Rye ciŋi malo i polo, me pee corre i lobo me Miciri luŋ, i kom jo, leyi kede ginapita luŋ a tye i lobo Miciri.”" 
Exodus9:23 Muca te tiŋo abiro mere malo tuŋ polo. Rwot te miyo polo mor, pee te corre i lobo kun orubere kede mac; Rwot te miyo pee oony romo lobo Miciri luŋ." 
Exodus9:24 Pee kede mac a meny teretere i dye pee obedo tye i lobo Miciri kit a yam mom ru onen, geye amejo i lobo Miciri odoko rok acel." 
Exodus9:25 Pee te pwodo ginnoro duc ame onwoŋo tye i potti i lobo Miciri luŋ karacel i jo kede leyi. Pee te lwero jami luŋ ame opito i potti, te daŋ yeyeco yen i bar ducu." 
Exodus9:26 Lobo me Gocen keken, kan ame jo Icrael bedo iye, en ame pee mom ogudo." 
Exodus9:27 Parao dok te cwayo kwena lwoŋo Muca kede Aron, te kobbigi ni, “Man dok abalo, kop a Rwot gire tye kakare, ento an kedejona, wan otimo rac." 
Exodus9:28 Kwa wunu doŋ Rwot, pien pee kede mor a kot doŋ oromo; abino wekowu iwoto wunu, pe dok ibino medde bedo wunu kan.”" 
Exodus9:29 Muca te kobo ni, “Amanni tekki abino kato i ŋe boma, abino ryeyo ciŋa malo baŋ Rwot, mor a kot kede pee bino gik oko, me iŋe wunu ni lobo luŋ obedo mea Rwot." 
Exodus9:30 An kono aŋeo ni yin kede omironi mom ru ilworo wunu Rwot Obaŋa.” 
Exodus9:31 Pee obalo pamba kede cayiri oko, pien cayiri onwoŋo doŋ oŋokoko, pamba daŋ ocako turo oko." 
Exodus9:32 Ento ŋano atar kede en arema, pee mom obalo, pien ocoogi icen." 
Exodus9:33 Muca te ya oko i baŋ Parao kato oko i ŋe boma, eka te ryeyo ciŋe malo baŋ Rwot; mor a kot kede pee te gik oko, kot mom dok te medde cwe i lobo." 
Exodus9:34 Cite ka Parao oneno ni kot kede pee kede mor a kot ogik oko, dok te medde poto oko i bal, en karacel kede omiro mere, cunygi te bedo anwaŋ oko." 
Exodus9:35 Parao cunye te bedo anwaŋ kittono, mom oye jo Icrael owoto, kit ame Obaŋa rik omio Muca okobo." 
Exodus10:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Wot baŋ Parao, pien amio cunye dok odoko nwaŋ oko, karacel kede cuny omiro mere daŋ, me wek anyut anyutta magi i akinagi;" 
Exodus10:2 me yin ibin ititti itinoni kede ikwai kite ame aloko kede jo Miciri obedo gi-tukona kede anyuttogo ame abedo tiyo i akinagi, me ine wunu ni an a Rwot.”" 
Exodus10:3 Muca kede Aron daŋ ote wot donyo baŋ Parao, ote kobbe ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Eburania okobo ni mano, ‘Yin ibino kwero mwolle i nyima pi kare arom mene? Wek jona woti me owot oti pira." 
Exodus10:4 Pien ka ce ikwero ni gin kur woti, nen ba, diki abino miyo lwak bonyo apipim wukere i loboni," 
Exodus10:5 te wumo lobo oko ipuk, ŋattoro mom tye ame bino neno lobo; bonyo bino camo ginnoro luŋ ame pee oweko, dok daŋ bino camo yenwu adoŋo i potti." 
Exodus10:6 Bonyonono bino daŋ poŋ i udiwu kede me omironi luŋ, naka i me a jo Miciri ducu: mannono bino bedo gin a welo meicel a yam papawu kede kwariwu mom oneno, cakere i nino ame onywalogi iye tuno naka atot tin.’ ” Eka en te lokere ya gire oko i nyim Parao." 
Exodus10:7 Cite amiro a Parao te kobbe ni, “Lo-ni kara bino bedo wunowa aman naka awene? Wek jo-ni woti, me owot oti baŋ Rwot Obaŋagi; yin mom ru iŋeo ni Miciri doŋ oballe oko?”" 
Exodus10:8 Omio ote dwoko Muca kede Aron baŋ Parao, Parao te kobbigi ni, “Wot wunu doŋ, iwot iti wunu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, ento kara jo mene ame imito wunu ni woti?”" 
Exodus10:9 Muca te gamo ni, “Wan luŋ obino wot, karacel itinowa kede odoŋewa, awobe kede anyirawa; obino tero daŋ limwa luŋ, dok kede dyegi kede kit lim ocele luŋ pien myero okwer nino adwoŋ baŋ Rwot.”" 
Exodus10:10 Parao te gamo ni, “Rwot bed kedwu ka ce abino ye iwoto wunu karacel itinowu! Cite nen ba, wun itye wunu i tammoro arac i yiwu." 
Exodus10:11 Pe twere, co keken ame tye i akinawu en abino wot woro Rwot pien mano en ame cunywu tye ka myel iye wok.” Ote ryemogi oko i nyim Parao." 
Exodus10:12 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Rye ciŋi i wi lobo me bonyo wukere i lobo Miciri, cam ginnoro duc otu i lobo Miciri ame rik pee oweko.”" 
Exodus10:13 Muca daŋ te tiŋo abiro mere malo i wi lobo me Miciri, Rwot te cwayo yamo pello i tuŋ kide te kodo i lobo dyeceŋnono kede dyeworrere benebene; kare ame piny oru, yamo me tuŋ kidenono onwoŋo okelo bonyo apipim." 
Exodus10:14 Bonyo te corre i lobo Miciri luŋ, lwak bonyo owukere apipim ame mom ru onen, dok mom daŋ bino nen." 
Exodus10:15 Pien bonyo mere owukere te wumo lobo oko ipuk ame piny te doko acol icuc, gin te camo ginnoro luŋ ame otu i lobo kede nyig yen luŋ ame pee yam oweko; ginnoro adyaka mom te doŋ kadi acel, kadi yat onyo ginnoro keken ame otu i poto moro i lobo me Miciri luŋ." 
Exodus10:16 Parao dok te ru lwoŋo Muca kede Aron, te kobbigi ni, “An doŋ abalo gira oko baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, kede baŋwu." 
Exodus10:17 En omio tin akwaowu me tima kica; tima wunu doŋ ber icel-li keken, ikwa wunu Rwot Obaŋawu me kwany to man oko i koma.”" 
Exodus10:18 Muca te ya oko i nyim Parao, to wot kwayo Rwot." 
Exodus10:19 Rwot te miyo yamo kodo atek kun opello i tuŋ to, te joyo bonyo coro i Nam Arema, bonyo moro mom odoŋ i lobo Miciri kadi acel." 
Exodus10:20 Cite Rwot dok omio cuny Parao obedo nwaŋ, mom oye jo Icrael owoto." 
Exodus10:21 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca kede Aron ni, “Rye ciŋi malo i polo, me piny dok acol oko icuc i lobo me Miciri luŋ, colpiny ame dano twero winyo naka i kome.”" 
Exodus10:22 Muca te ryeyo bade malo i polo, piny daŋ te doko acol icuc atek ateka pi nino adek kun oromo lobo Miciri luŋ." 
Exodus10:23 I kare-nono ŋattoro onwoŋo mom romo neno awottere, dok ŋattoro daŋ mom oya i kakare pi nino adekkono. Ento kan ame jo Icrael bedo iye piny gire onwoŋo tye aler." 
Exodus10:24 Parao dok te lwoŋo Muca, te kobbe ni, “Wot iti wunu baŋ Rwot, itinowu daŋ myero wot karacel kedwu; cite limu luŋ, dok, dyegi kede kit lim ocele luŋ myero doŋ,”" 
Exodus10:25 Muca te gamo ni, “Yin doŋ myero imiwa mot me aŋola kede me awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa, me wan owot oyalli Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Exodus10:26 Limwa luŋ myero owot kede, moro acel mom bino doŋ iŋewa, pien myero owot okwany mogo i akinagi me woro Rwot Obaŋawa; pien wan mom oŋeo gin a myero owot oti kede baŋ Rwot, tuno ka doŋ otuno kuno.”" 
Exodus10:27 Cite Rwot dok te miyo cuny Parao bedo nwaŋ, mom te yegi wot." 
Exodus10:28 Parao te gamo ni “Ya oko i nyima, cite myero igwokere ba; kur dok imedde neno waŋa, pien nino ame ibino neno iye waŋa, nino-nono en ame ibino to iye.”" 
Exodus10:29 Muca te kobo ni, “Ka amannono, an gira mom dok abino neno waŋi.”" 
Exodus11:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Pwod odoŋ can acel ame dok abino pwodo kede Parao kede jo Miciri; icennere doŋ bino wekowu iya wunu oko i kan. Kare ame en bino wekowu me wot, en bino ryemowu aryema." 
Exodus11:2 Aman yin doŋ myero ikobbi jo ni, ico acel acel myero kwa ico wadgi ame ceggi kede, dako daŋ kwa dako wadgi ame ceggi kede me gin miwu wel me ryal kede me jabu.”" 
Exodus11:3 Rwot te miyo cuny jo Miciri bedo ayom i komgi. Dok daŋ dano-nono Muca rikobedo twon lo moro adit meicel i nyim omiro a Parao, kede i nyim jo luŋ." 
Exodus11:4 Muca te kobo ni, “Rwot okobo ni mano, Tin dyewor ka idiŋ, abino beo i dye Miciri;" 
Exodus11:5 eka itino kao luŋ ame tye i Miciri te to oko, geye i kom atin kao a Parao ame bedo i wi kommere me loc, tuno kede i kom atin kao aŋeca ame bedo i ŋet kidi rego, anaka itino kao a limgi luŋ." 
Exodus11:6 Koko bino bedo dwoŋ meicel i lobo Miciri luŋ i kite a yam mom ru otimere, dok daŋ mom bino timere wannoro." 
Exodus11:7 Cite i kom jo Icrael, akadi dano onyo lee, gwokkoro mom bino ŋweyo, me ine wunu ni Rwot kara poko akina a jo Miciri kede jo Icrael." 
Exodus11:8 Omironi luŋ bino bino baŋa, obino ryebere i nyima kun okobba ni, ‘Wot giri karacel i jo luŋ a lubi.’ Icennere an doŋ abino wot.” Muca te ya oko i nyim Parao i twon akemo adwoŋ meicel." 
Exodus11:9 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Parao gire mom bino winyo koppi, me taŋona medde rom lobo Miciri luŋ.”" 
Exodus11:10 Muca kede Aron te tiyo taŋo-nono luŋ i nyim Parao; ento Rwot omio gire cuny Parao obedo nwaŋ, mom oye jo Icrael oya i lobo mere." 
Exodus12:1 Rwot okobo i Muca kede Aron i lobo Miciri ni," 
Exodus12:2 “Dwe man bino bedo dwe me agege a geo mwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Titti wunu jo Icrael luŋ ni nino dwe apar me dwe man, dano acel acel bino kwanyo atin romo, kit ame doggola a kwarigi tye kede, atin romo acel acel pi ot acel acel." 
Exodus12:4 Ka ce ottoroni tidi, ame mom romo tyeko riŋo atin romo luŋ, won ottono kede aŋete, ame ode ceggi i mege, gin bino kwanyo romo ame romo wel jo ame tye baŋgi. Ibino kwanyo wunu atin romo ame romo kit a dano acel acel twero camo kede." 
Exodus12:5 Atin romo ame akwanyo myero bed aber, ame roccoro mom i kome, nyok me mwaka acel. Ibino kwanyo wunu i akina romi onyo i akina dyegi." 
Exodus12:6 Gwok wunu naka i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe man, icennere lwak jo Icrael luŋ bino neko romi megi oko otyeno." 
Exodus12:7 Dok myero jol remo moro ote kiro i yen doggola ryoryo kede i kom yen aria i malo mere, i udi ame bino camogi iye." 
Exodus12:8 Riŋo myero cam oko i dyeworrono kun abula abula; myero cam ogati a tobi mompe iye kede pot dekkogo akec.
