Exodus12:9 Kur mwod riŋo moro anumu onyo ame otedo i pii, ento myero butl ducu abula, anaka wie, tyene kede jami yie luŋ." 
Exodus12:10 Kur wek ginnoro doŋ tuno idiko; ka ce ginnoro odoŋ ame otuno naka odiko, myero waŋ oko." 
Exodus12:11 Ibino camo wunu kit man: ibino wunu tweyo pyerwu, kun iruko wunu amuk i tyenwu, kun abiro daŋ tye i ciŋwu; ibino camo wunu abunyebunye. Mannonoen Kato a Rwot." 
Exodus12:12 Pienabino bea i dye lobo Miciri dyeworrono, ate neko itino kao luŋ ame tye i lobo Miciri, mea dano kede mea leyi, kun acobo kop luŋ ame doŋ aŋolo i kom kit obaŋa ocele luŋ me Miciri; an a Rwot." 
Exodus12:13 Remo bino bedo gin a nyuto udi ame wun itye wunu iye; ce aneno remo, abino kato gira akata i wiwu malo. Cannoro mom bino poto i komwu ame twero nekowu, i kare ame abino pwodo kede lobo Miciri." 
Exodus12:14 “Nino man bino bedo nino me poyo wiwu, ame ibino gwoko wunu bedo nino adwoŋ baŋ Rwot; ibino kwero wunu karacel kede ikwaewu luŋ, me bed cik ame ibino gwoko wunu nakanaka.”" 
Exodus12:15 Ibino wunu camo ogati a tobi mompe iye pi nino kany wie aryo; i nino me agege, myero ikwany wunu tobi luŋ i ot, iony wunu oko. Ka ce ŋattoro bino camo ogati a tobi tye iye, cakere i nino me agege-nono tuno kede i nino me abiro, dano-nono waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo Icrael." 
Exodus12:16 I nino me agege ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil; i nino me abiro daŋ ibino bedo wunu i cokere acil. I nino-nono luŋ mom ibino wunu tiyo ticcoro; kono ka gin ame jo luŋ camo, en ame itwero wunu yiko." 
Exodus12:17 Ibino wunu kwero ecuban me ogati a tobi pe iye, pien nino-nono ikome en a rik akwanyo iye atekerewu luŋ i lobo Miciri; pi mannono, myero ikwer wunu nino-nono obed cik ame ibino gwoko wunu nakanaka, wun karacel kede ikwaewu." 
Exodus12:18 I dwe me agege, i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen otyeno, ibino wunu camo ogati a mompe orubu i tobi naka i nino dwe pyeraryo wie acel otyeno." 
Exodus12:19 I nino kany wie aryo-nono myero tobi moro kur nwoŋere i udiwu; pien ŋat ame bino camo ginnoro ame tobi tye iye, dano-nono waŋe bino rewnyo oko i akina jo Icrael, kadi en welo onyo dano ame onywalo i lobowu." 
Exodus12:20 Mompe ibino wunu camo cemmoro a tobi tye iye; kan ame ibino wunu bedo iye luŋ, ibino wunu camo ogati a tobi mom iye." 
Exodus12:21 Muca te lwoŋo odoŋe me Icrael ducu, te kobbigi ni, “Apee wot iyer wunu itino romi acalo doggolawu tye kede, me inek wunu atin romo me Kato." 
Exodus12:22 Tur wunu jaŋ ogudo, ite luto wunu i remo ame tye i gwata; kir wunu i kom yen aria i malo mere kede i yen doggola ryoryo. Ŋattoro i akinawu kur donnyo oko i ode tuno ka piny oru." 
Exodus12:23 Pien Rwot bino bebea kato pi neko jo Miciri; ka Rwot bino neno remo i kom yen aria me doggola kede i kom yen aryo me doggola, Rwot bino kato i wi doggola malo, mom bino ye anek donyo i udiwu me nekowu." 
Exodus12:24 Gwok wunu kop man bed cik ame ibino wunu gwoko karacel kede ikwaewu nakanaka. 
Exodus12:25 Ka ibino tuno wunu i lobo ame Rwot bino miyowu kit a rik ociko, myero ibed wunu tiyo tic man pira." 
Exodus12:26 Ka ce itinowu bino penyowu ni, ‘Kodi timmi kara te koppere ŋo?’" 
Exodus12:27 Wun ibino wunu dokkigi iye ni, ‘Man mot ame oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa pi Kato mere, pien Rwot rik okato akata i malo i wi udi a jo Icrael i lobo Miciri i kare ame nek kede jo Miciri, eka te weko gire udiwa.’ ” Jo te kulo wigi piny woro Obaŋa." 
Exodus12:28 Jo Icrael te wot daŋ timo kittono; otimo kite acalo Rwot ociko i Muca kede Aron. 
Exodus12:29 I dye idiŋ, Rwot oneko itino kao luŋ me Miciri; ogeo i kom atin kao a Parao ame yam bedo i kommere me loc, tuno kede i kom atin kao opii ame tye i buc, karacel itino kao a leyigu." 
Exodus12:30 Parao te ya malo iwor karacel omiro mere luŋ kede jo Miciri luŋ. Koko rik te wo atata i lobo Miciri luŋ pien mom tye ottoro a rik odoŋ a mom dano oto iye. 
Exodus12:31 Parao te lwoŋo Muca kede Aron i dyeworrono, te kobbigi ni, “Ya iwot wunu oko i akina jona, wun karacel i jo Icrael luŋ; wot iti wunu baŋ Rwot, acalo rik ikwao wunu." 
Exodus12:32 Wotu i limwu luŋ: dok kede dyegi kede kit lim ocele luŋ, kit a rik ikobo wunu kede; wotu, lamma wunu daŋ gum!”" 
Exodus12:33 Jo Miciri te bedo bunyo jo Icrael abunya, kun omito ni gin ru ya oko i lobogi. Gin obedo kobo ni, “Nen, wan ducu doŋ oto oko.”" 
Exodus12:34 Pi mannono, omio jo Icrael te kwanyo moko a mom orubo i tobi, kede tako me rubo moko ogati ame onwoŋo gin oboo i gi-wumgi, ote ryoŋo i wi gwokgi." 
Exodus12:35 Jo Icrael te tiyo kite a rik Muca ocikogi kede; ote kwayo wei me ryal kede me jabu, kede boŋŋi i baŋ jo Miciri." 
Exodus12:36 Rwot te miyo cuny jo Miciri bedo ayom i kom jo Icrael, jo-nono te mimiogi jami ame gin okwao. Gin te yako jo Miciri kittono." 
Exodus12:37 Jo Icrael te cako wotgi i Ramecec naka i Cukot; co ame owoto i tyengi romo tutumia mia abicel kun mon kede itino mom okwano iye. 
Exodus12:38 Jo ocele apipim ame rokgi papat daŋ owoto kedgi, karacel i lim daŋ ecipan, dyegi kede dok, kede kit lim ocele luŋ." 
Exodus12:39 Gin te tedo capat i moko ame ojebo aboŋo tobi i tako me rubo moko ogati, pien obedo bunyogi abunya me ya oko i lobo Miciri, omio gin mom oyiko ginnoro me dwoko lao doggi iyo." 
Exodus12:40 Kare ame jo Icrael obedo kede i Miciri oromo mwaka mia aŋwen kede pyeradek. 
Exodus12:41 A doŋ mwaka mia aŋwen kede pyeradek otum, i nino me agikki mere ikome, en ame mony a Rwot oya kede i lobo Miciri." 
Exodus12:42 Dyeworrono en ame Rwot obedo kuro iye kare me kwanyogi oko i lobo me Miciri. Dyewor acellono daŋ en ame jo Icrael kede ikwaegi pwod kwero pi kuro Rwot. 
Exodus12:43 Rwot te kobbi Muca kede Aron ni, “Man en cikkogo ame mako Kato: arokkoro mom bino camo;" 
Exodus12:44 ento opii luŋ ame yam owilo i lim, gin bino camo ka ce onwoŋo doŋ olirogi." 
Exodus12:45 Welo moro onyo apakaca moro mom bino camo. 
Exodus12:46 Obino camo i ot acel keken; mom daŋ ibino wunu donnyo i riŋo moro oko kun iya kede i ot, dok mom daŋ obino turo cogo moro iye." 
Exodus12:47 Jo Icrael luŋ bino kwero nino man. 
Exodus12:48 Ka ce arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu mito kwero Kato baŋ Rwot, myero kon ge liro co luŋ ame tye baŋe, en amio en daŋ doŋ te nyiggo cako kwero; en doŋ bino bedo arom i dano onywalo i lobowu. Cite ŋat a mom oliro, myero mom cam." 
Exodus12:49 Cik bino bedo acel keken pi anywalli kede orok ame bedo i akinawu.” 
Exodus12:50 Jo Icrael luŋ te daŋ timo kittono; kite acalo Rwot yam ociko i Muca kede Aron, gin otimo kittono." 
Exodus12:51 I kom nino-nono ikokome en ame Rwot rik okwanyo iye jo Icrael oko i lobo Miciri, kun owoto olubere atekere atekere." 
Exodus13:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus13:2 “Kwer itino kao luŋ bed mega; dano moro onyo lee moro keken iyi Icrael ame ogeo yabo ot nyodo, ginnono luŋ mega.”" 
Exodus13:3 Muca okobbi jo ni, “Myero ipo wunu nino man ame iya wunu iye i Miciri, i ot me opii, pien Rwot okwanyowu i kan pi teko me ciŋe. Mom ibino wunu camo ogati ame orubo i tobi." 
Exodus13:4 I dweni, ame en dwe me Abic, wun doŋ ibino wot wunu oko," 
Exodus13:5 Doŋ ka Rwot bino terowu i lobo a jo Kanaan, jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Kivi kede jo Jebuc, ame en yam ocikere pire baŋ kwariwu ni ebino miyowu, lobo ame opoŋ i cak kede moo kic, ibino tiyo wunu tic man pira i dwe-ni." 
Exodus13:6 Ibino wunu camo ogati a tobi mompe iye pi nino kany wie aryo; eka i nino me abiro mere ite kwero wunu nino adwoŋ baŋ Rwot. 
Exodus13:7 Ogati a tobi mompe iye en ame ibino camo wunu pi nino kany wie aryo. Ogati ame orubo itobi, anaka tobi daŋ, mom bino nen baŋwu i lobowu luŋ." 
Exodus13:8 I nino-nono ibino kobo wunu baŋ itinowu ni, ‘Man otimere pi gin a rik Rwot otimo pira i kare acon ame aya i lobo me Miciri.’" 
Exodus13:9 Doŋ me poyo wiwu i gin otimere-nono, kop man obino coyo te bino bedo acalo anyut i ciŋwu, dok daŋ ibino tweyo wunu i tur nyimwu me ibed wunu kobo cik a Rwot; pien Rwot okwanyowu i Miciri pi ciŋe atek." 
Exodus13:10 Pi mannono, gwok wunu cik man mwaka i mwaka i kare ame ociko ikome." 
Exodus13:11 “Ka Rwot bino terowu i lobo a jo Kanaan, acalo rik okwoŋo baŋwu kede baŋ kwariwu, te miyowu," 
Exodus13:12 ibino miyo wunu itino luŋ ogeo yabo ot nyodo baŋ Rwot. Itino kao a limwu daŋ luŋ ame twoni, bino bedo mea Rwot." 
Exodus13:13 Atin kana me kao obino lakoro i nyok romo, onyo ka ce mom olakoro, obino mojoro ŋute oko. Atin awobi me kao acel acel ame tye i akina itinoni, ibino daŋ lakoro." 
Exodus13:14 Doŋ ka waŋŋoro anyim atinni bino penyi ni, ‘Man kono kara te koppere ŋo?’ ibino kobbe ni, ‘Rwot rik okwanyowa oko i lobo Miciri i ot me opii i ciŋe atek." 
Exodus13:15 Pien i kare a rik Parao okwero oko atek ateka ni wan kur owoti, Rwot oneko itino kao luŋ me Miciri, itino kao mea dano kede mea leyi. Mannono en omio amio baŋ Rwot twoni luŋ ame ogeo yabo ot nyodo; ento awobena me kao luŋ alakoro oko,’" 
Exodus13:16 Bino bedo acalo anen i ŋut ciŋi onyo gin ame otweo i tur nyimi; pien Rwot yam okwanyowa oko i Miciri kede ciŋe atek.” 
Exodus13:17 Kare a doŋ Parao oweko jo owoto, Obaŋa mom otelogi i yo a dok tutuŋ lobo a jo Piriciti, kadi bed rik yo mere onwoŋo ceggi; pien Obaŋa okobo ni, “Ka jo-ni bino rwatte i mony, cunygi bino bale oko, ote lokere dokoko ceŋ i Miciri.”" 
Exodus13:18 Ento Rwot otelogi kun mano kedgi piny i yo a dok tutuŋ tim ame otikere i Nam Arema. Jo Icrael rik te ya oko i lobo Miciri kun daŋ oyikere i jami lweny. 
Exodus13:19 Muca te kwanyo cogo kom Yucepu te wot kede; pien rik onwoŋo Yucepu omio jo Icrael okwoŋo kwoŋ atek, kun okobo ni, “Obaŋa bino limowu; myero itiŋ wunu cogona oko i kan, iwot wunu kede.”" 
Exodus13:20 Gin oya i Cukot ote wot guro kemagi i Etam i dog tim. 
Exodus13:21 Rwot otelo nyimgi i pagi me pol dyeceŋ ame ocuŋ malo kun nyuttigi yo, eka dyewor te telo nyimgi i mac ame ocuŋ malo me menyo piny; me gin bed wot dyeceŋ kede dyewor;" 
Exodus13:22 kun pagi me pol telogi icen kede me mac dyewor, ame mom oya i nyim lwak." 
Exodus14:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus14:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael dok ceŋ i ŋegi me owot ogur kemagi i nyim Pikakirotiakina Migdol kede nam, i nyim Baal-jepon, iwot igur kemawu tikere kede, i dog nam," 
Exodus14:3 Pien Parao bino kobo kop i kom jo Icrael ni, ‘Neno doŋ otye owiwira atata; tim daŋ tye ocegere oko i nyimgi.’" 
Exodus14:4 Abino dok miyo cuny Parao bedo nwaŋ, en bino ryemo yorwu; mano bino miyo anwoŋo kwogo i kom Parao karacel i monnyere luŋ, te miyo jo Miciri ŋeyo ni an a Rwot.” Gin daŋ te timo kittono." 
Exodus14:5 Kare ame otitti abaka me Miciri ni jo Icrael doŋ olwi, oriŋo oko, Parao abaka me Miciri kede omiro mere te dok loko cunygi oko i kom jo Icrael, te kobo ni, “Gin aŋo ame wan otimonie, me weko jo Icrael ya oko i dog ticwa, ote wot oko?”" 
Exodus14:6 Tammono omio en oyiko gadigadi mere me lweny, te telo monnyere." 
Exodus14:7 Owoto i gadigadi ame oyero mia abicel, kede dok gadigadi ocele me a jo Miciri kun woto daŋ odoŋe a telogi luŋ." 
Exodus14:8 Obaŋa te miyo cuny Parao abaka me Miciri bedo nwaŋ, te ryemo yo jo Icrael ame onwoŋo owoto oko apala apala." 
Exodus14:9 Jo Miciri oryemo yorgi kun Parao woto aguragura mere luŋ, kede gadigadi ecipan, karacel i wegi aguragura kede monnyere ducu; gin te mako jo Icrael kan ame gin oguro kemagi iye i ŋet nam, ame ceggi i Pi-kakirot, a tye i nyim Baal-jepon." 
Exodus14:10 A doŋ Parao ceggi kedgi, jo Icrael otiŋo waŋgi malo, ote neno jo Miciri tye aciro i ŋegi. Lworo te makogi atek meicel; ote kok atek baŋ Rwot," 
Exodus14:11 eka ote kobbi Muca ni, “Pien lyelle me yiko jo onwoŋo mom i Miciri bo, omio yin ikelowa me bino to i tim kan? Kara itimowa aman piŋo ba, me miyowa ya oko i Miciri?" 
Exodus14:12 Mom rik okobbi i Miciri ni, ‘Wekwa obedi, otiyi jo Miciri’? Tikatika rik oti giwa baŋ jo Miciri, kato ame oto nono i tim ata kan.”" 
Exodus14:13 Muca te kobbi lwak ni, “Kur ilwor wunu, cuŋ wunu atek, me inen wunu kit ame Rwot bino larowu kede tin; pien jo Miciri ame tin ineno wununi, mom dok ibino neno wunu atwal." 
Exodus14:14 Rwot bino lweny pirwu, wun bedu ka mot.”" 
Exodus14:15 Rwot te penyo Muca ni, “Ikok kara baŋa piŋo? Kobbi jo Icrael wot anyim." 
Exodus14:16 Tiŋ abironi malo, ite ryeyo ciŋi i wi nam, me pokere aryo wek jo Icrael be i dye nam otwo." 
Exodus14:17 An abino miyo cuny Parao bedo nwaŋ, gin daŋ ote lubo yorwu; man bino miyo anwoŋo kwogo i kom Parao karacel i monnyere, kede gadigadi mere kede wegi aguragura mere." 
Exodus14:18 Ka doŋ atyeko nwoŋo kwogo i kom Parao kede gadigadi mere kede wegi aguragura mere, jo Miciri bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Exodus14:19 Icennere amalaika a Rwot ame onwoŋo rik telo nyim mony a jo Icrael te ya oko i nyimgi dok i ŋegi karacel i pagi me pol daŋ te dwogo i ŋegi," 
Exodus14:20 gin luŋ ote cuŋ i akina mony a jo Miciri kede mea jo Icrael. Pol kede piny acol icuc daŋ te bedo tye. Dyeworrono luŋ monnyoro i akinagi mom onoko wadgi i ceggi naka piny oru. 
Exodus14:21 Muca te ryeyo ciŋe i wi nam, Rwot te miyo yamo okodo atek dyewor benebene kun oya i tuŋ kide coro dye nam; te miyo pii i nam dokoko ceŋ, te loko nam doko kan otwo, kun pii opokere tuŋi i tuŋi." 
Exodus14:22 Jo Icrael te wot beo gigi kan otwo, kun pii ocuŋ bala cel i ciŋgi tuŋ cem kede tuŋ cam." 
Exodus14:23 Jo Miciri daŋ te luba yorgi, ote donyo daŋ i dye nam, karacel aguragura a Parao luŋ, kede gadigadi mere kede wegi aguragura mere." 
Exodus14:24 Kare ame onwoŋo gin tye akuro rupiny, Rwot onwoŋo gire tye i pagi me mac kede me pol kun neno mony a jo Miciri. En obabaŋo mony a jo Miciri oko," 
Exodus14:25 kun mako tyen gadigadigi, te miyogi doŋ ŋwec nyudunyudu. Jo Miciri te koko ni, “Oriŋ wunu oko i nyim mony a jo Icrael; pien Rwot tye alweny pirgi i kom jo Miciri.”" 
Exodus14:26 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Rye ciŋi i wi nam me pii dwog corre i kom jo Miciri kede i kom gadigadigi, kede wegi aguraguragi.”" 
Exodus14:27 Muca daŋ te tiŋo ciŋe i wi nam, pii daŋ te cako dokoko kakare ka ibayi-ni. Jo Miciri onwoŋo tye ka ŋwec, Rwot te loro wigi luŋ i dye nam." 
Exodus14:28 Pii odwogo te mwonyo gadigadi, wegi aguragura, kede mony a Parao luŋ a rik olubo jo Icrael i nam; ŋattoro acel i akinagi mom gire obwot." 
Exodus14:29 Ento jo Icrael owoto gigi kan otwo i dye nam, kun pii odoko celgi ame ocuŋ i ciŋgi tuŋ cem kede tuŋ cam." 
Exodus14:30 Rwot rik olaro jo Icrael i ciŋ jo Miciri kittono, i nino-nono, eka jo Icrael te neno kom jo Miciri ame oto oradde i dog nam." 
Exodus14:31 Kare ame jo Icrael oneno tic atek ame Rwot otio i kom jo Miciri, gin olworo Rwot; ote daŋ geno Rwot karacel kede amiro mere Muca." 
Exodus15:1 Muca karacel i jo Icrael te doŋ wero wer man baŋ Rwot kun okobo ni, “Abino wer baŋ Rwot, pien doŋ otiŋeree malo i kwogo; oonyo aguragura kede wegigi i nam." 
Exodus15:2 Rwot en ka ŋwecca kede akonnya, en doŋ Lalar mera Man en Obaŋana ame abino pako, en Obaŋa a kwarona ame abino dworo nyiŋe." 
Exodus15:3 Rwot en twon a romo atek meicel, ame nyiŋe Rwot.”" 
Exodus15:4 “En oonyo gadigadi a Parao karacel i monnyere i nam, twoni ame oyero luŋ omwonyere oko i Nam Arema." 
Exodus15:5 Pii atut omwonyogi oko; gin luŋ olwiny oko i te kut bala gweŋ.” 
Exodus15:6 “Ciŋi me tuŋ cem tek meicel, ama Rwot, ciŋi me tuŋ cem ŋinyo okwor oko, ama Rwot." 
Exodus15:7 Pi dit me kwogoni, omio ireto okwor oko piny; icwao akemoni owawaŋogi oko bala yugi." 
Exodus15:8 Ewura me wumi omio pii otiŋere malo, pii amol oyenyo te cuŋ igun; pii atut omakere ocuŋ karacel ikiŋ i cuny nam." 
Exodus15:9 Okwor rik onwoŋo kobo ni, ‘Abino ryemo yorgi, amakogi, abino poko lim ayako, te yomoro cunya, abino woto pala romona, ate tyekogi kede oko.’" 
Exodus15:10 Yin rik imio yamoni okodo, nam te mwonyogi oko; gin omwonyere i te twon pii adwoŋ bala atyeŋ kidi." 
Exodus15:11 Ŋa i akina obaŋa ocele luŋ ame rom kedi, ama Rwot? Ŋa ocele ame tye i kwogo dok daŋ cil bala yin? Gin itio obedo me kwogo kede me awura ame kela myelkom." 
Exodus15:12 Rik iryeo ciŋi me tuŋ cem, lobo te mwonyogi oko," 
Exodus15:13 Pi marri a mom lokere itelo rok a yam ilaro, pi tekoni igwoko, ite kelogi i kabedoni acil." 
Exodus15:14 Jo owinyo pire komgi te myel; rem me lworo doŋ ociro jo Piriciti oko," 
Exodus15:15 Kare-nono cuny rwode me Edom oŋabere aŋaba, lworo oonyo koyo oko i kom odoŋe me Moab, jo Kanaan onwoŋo doŋ onyobere luŋ aluŋa." 
Exodus15:16 Myelkom me lworo onwoŋo doŋ ocirogi oko, teko me ciŋi omio gin ocuŋ mot bala kidi, tuno ka joni okato oko i ŋetgi, ama Rwot, tuno ka jo ame iwilo doŋ okato." 
Exodus15:17 Ibino iterogi ite wot pitogi i wi kidini acalo yat, kan ame iyiko me kabedoni, ama Rwot, kabedo acil ame yam ciŋi omoko." 
Exodus15:18 Rwot gire bino bedo abaka nakanaka.” 
Exodus15:19 Pien kare ame aguragura a Parao kede gadigadi mere kede wegigi ocako donyo i nam. Rwot oweko pii nam odwogo i komgi; aco jo Icrael obeo kan otwo i dye nam. 
Exodus15:20 Eka Miriam am in Aron ame obedo adwarpiny a dako te kwanyo ajaa i ciŋe; mon ocele luŋ te daŋ kwanyo ajaagi joye kede i yore kun omyelo. 
Exodus15:21 Miriam te cakkigi wer ni, “Wer wunu baŋ Rwot, pien doŋ otiŋere malo i kwogo; obolo aguragura kede wegigi i nam.”" 
Exodus15:22 Muca dok otelo jo Icrael kun ya kedgi i Nam Arema, woto kedgi i nyim, eka gin te wot naka i tim me Cur. Gin owoto i timmono wot me nino adek, mom ote nwoŋo pii." 
Exodus15:23 Kare ame gin otuno i Mara, mato pi i kuno te loyogi oko, pien pii mere onwoŋo kec akeca; en omio olwoŋo ni Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Jo te bedo ŋuŋura i kom Muca, kun okobo ni, “Wan obino mato ŋo?”" 
Exodus15:25 Muca te kok baŋ Rwot, eka Rwot te nyutte yattoro, en te bolo yatono i pii, eka pii te doko amit. Rwot te miyogi icwil kede cik kuno, eka daŋ te omo yigi kuno," 
Exodus15:26 kun kobo ni, “Ka ce ibino wunu winyo kop a Rwot Obaŋawu i cunywu luŋ, kun itio wunu gin a tye atira i nyime, dok daŋ igwoko wunu gin a en ociko kun imako wunu cikkere kede icwillere luŋ, two moro mom bino makowu bala en a rik ami mak jo Miciri; pien an a Rwot, an acaŋo twowu.”" 
Exodus15:27 Kare ame gin dok otuno Elim, kan ame rik tye iye akoŋ apar wie aryo, kede otit pyerabiro, gin oguro kemagi i ŋet pii-nono." 
Exodus16:1 Gin te ya oko i Elim, jo Icrael luŋ te donyo i tim me Cin, ame tye i akina Elim kede Cinai; gin odonyo iye i nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me aryo mere ame gin oya kede i Miciri." 
Exodus16:2 Jo Icrael luŋ te ŋuŋura i kom Muca kede Aron i tim," 
Exodus16:3 kun okobbigi ni, “Kono rik Rwot onekowa i Miciri, kan ame rikobedo iye i ŋet weer rinowa, dok daŋ ocamo giwa kwon oyen; ento yin ikelowa kan i tim mene ko wan lwak joni luŋ i kec.”" 
Exodus16:4 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Nen ba, abino cwayiwu kwon i polo kun cwer bino baŋwu bala kot. Jo bino wot coko nino luŋ ame romo me nino acel acel, me koŋ anengi kede kace gin bino gwoko cikka onyo pe." 
Exodus16:5 Cite i ceŋ me abicel ka gin bino yiko gin ame ocoko, gin bino coko adwoŋ ame kato me nino ducu tyen aryo.”" 
Exodus16:6 Muca kede Aron daŋ te kobbi jo kittono, kun okobo ni, “Tin otyeno ibino wunu ŋeyo ni Rwot kara en a yam okelowu iya i Miciri," 
Exodus16:7 kede odiko daŋ ibino wunu neno kwogo a Rwot, pien en otyeko winyo ŋuŋurawu ikome. Kara wan odoko na ba, ame iŋuŋura wunu i komwa-ni?”" 
Exodus16:8 Muca te kobo ni, “Ka Rwot tin bino miyowu riŋo me acama otyeno, dok daŋ bino miyowu kwon ame romo yeŋowu odiko, mano nwoŋo otimere pien Rwot nwoŋo owinyo ŋuŋurawu ame iŋur wunu kede i kome. Wan kara odoko na ba, ame iŋuŋura wunu i komwa-ni? Ŋuŋurawu mom tye i komwa ento i kom Rwot gire.”" 
Exodus16:9 Muca te kobbi Aron ni, “Kob baŋ lwak jo Icrael luŋ ni, ‘Biye wunu ceggi i nyim Rwot, pien otyeko winyo ŋuŋurawu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 I kare ame rik Aron onwoŋo tye akop i jo Icrael luŋ, gin rik te neno tuŋ tim, cite nen, kwogo a Rwot te nen i pol." 
Exodus16:11 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus16:12 “Doŋ atyeko winyo ŋuŋura a jo Icrael. Kobbigi ni, ‘Tin otyeno gin bino camo riŋo, kede diki odiko gin bino camo kwon ote yeŋ, ame bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot Obaŋagi.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Wi otyeno aluru te bino ame omwono ka gonygi oko, eka odiko daŋ toyo te luk guro ŋet gonygi oko." 
Exodus16:14 Kare ame toyo doŋ oony oko, ginnoro te doŋ piny ame oŋiŋida atitino bala pok rec, kun tye atitino bala bwoo pee ame odoŋ i lobo." 
Exodus16:15 Ka jo Icrael oneno, gin okobo kengi kengi ni, “Man kara gin aŋo?” Pien onwoŋo gin rik mom ru oniaŋ kittere. Muca te kobbigi ni, “Man en kwon ame Rwot omiowu me acama." 
Exodus16:16 Gin ame Rwot ociko ene: ‘Dano acel acel myero cok mege a romo acama mere; myero job i gwata omer acel pi dano acel acel, ame romo wel jo ame dano acel acel tye kede i kema mere.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 Jo Icrael daŋ te timo kittono; jo mogo te coko anonok, jo mogo ocoko adwoŋ adwoŋa." 
Exodus16:18 Cite i kare ame oporo iyi omer, ŋat ame ocoko mege abup, moro mom odoŋŋe, ŋat ocoko aduno, moro mom orem, pien ŋat acel acel onwoŋo ocoko ame eromo camo." 
Exodus16:19 Muca te kobo baŋgi ni, “Ŋattoro kur wek moro doŋ tuno naka odiko.”" 
Exodus16:20 Cite gin mom te winyo kop a Muca; jo mogo te weko doŋ tuno naka odiko, eka ote nwoŋo ocako nywalo kudi oko, kun okwok aŋwe meicel; akemo te mako Muca atek i komgi." 
Exodus16:21 Gin te bedo coko amannono nino luŋ odiko, kun ŋat acel coko oromo acama mere; cite ka ceŋ odoko alyet, meye gire oko." 
Exodus16:22 I nino me abicellere, gin ocoko kwon adwoŋ ame kato me nino luŋ tyen aryo, ame romo gwata omer aryo aryo. Kare ame otelgi luŋ obino otito koppere baŋ Muca." 
Exodus16:23 Muca okobbigi ni, Rwot rik onwoŋo ociko ni mano, “Nino a diki-ni, obedo nino me weo mot, en cabit acil a Rwot. Bul wunu gin ame imito wunu bu lo oko, ted wunu daŋ gin ame ibino mito wunu tedo oko; en ame odoŋŋere ite kano wunu, me igwok wunu naka diki odiko.”" 
Exodus16:24 Gin daŋ te timo amannono; ote kano, gwoko tuno naka odiko kite a Muca ocikogi kede, cite mom gire te kwok aŋwe kun kudi onywal iye." 
Exodus16:25 Muca te kobo ni, “Cam wunu tin mannono, pien tin obedo cabit a Rwot; mom tin ibino nwoŋo wunu moro ocele i bar." 
Exodus16:26 Ibino wunu coko pi nino abicel keken, ento i nino me abiro, mom bino bedo tye; nino-nono obedo cabit.”" 
Exodus16:27 I nino me abiro jo ocele owoto ni owot coko, ento mom ote nwoŋo." 
Exodus16:28 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Ibino kwero wunu gwoko koppa kede cikka naka awene?" 
Exodus16:29 Nen ba! Rwot doŋ omiowu ceŋ me cabit; en gin omio i nino me abicel en miowu kwon ame romo acama nino aryo. I nino me abiro, myero dano acel acel bed mot i kabedo mere, ŋattoro kur ya i kabedo mere te wot kan ocele i nino me abiro.”" 
Exodus16:30 Pi mannono, jo luŋ owe mot i nino me abiro." 
Exodus16:31 I kare-nono, jo me ot Icrael te cako nyiŋ kwonnono ni manna; rik onwoŋo cal i ocere atar, kun mit dok lim bala moo kic onwano i nino." 
Exodus16:32 Muca dok te kobo ni, “Rwot ociko ni ba, ‘Myero gwok moro ame romo gwata omer acel tuno naka i kare ikwaewu, me gin daŋ bin nen kit kwon ame rik apitowu kede i tim, i kare ame rik akwanyowu oko i lobo Miciri.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Muca te kobbi Aron ni, “Kwany gulu, ite onyo iye manna ame romo gwata omer acel, me iket i nyim Rwot, wek bed me agwoka naka i kare ikwaewu.”" 
Exodus16:34 Aron daŋ te tiyo kit a Rwot ociko kede Muca, te keto i nyim canduk kop me caden, me bed me agwoka." 
Exodus16:35 Jo Icrael te camo manna mwakki pyeraŋwen twal, naka ka gin otuno i lobo ame oromo bedo iye; gin ocamo manna naka i waŋ apokki me lobo Kanaan." 
Exodus16:36 (Omer rommi acel me apar me epa.) 
Exodus17:1 Jo Icrael luŋ te ya oko i tim me Cinai, kun owoto oko koba kit a Rwot ocikogi kede. Gin te guro kemagi i Repidim, cite pii ame myero jo mat te bedo pe." 
Exodus17:2 Mannono te miyo yi jo waŋ i kom Muca, ote kobbe ni, “Miwa pii me amata, loni.” Muca te gamo doggi ni, “Piŋo kara yiwu awan ikoma? Piŋo itye wunu ka omo yi Rwot?”" 
Exodus17:3 Cite oryo pii te ciro jo atek, jo te bedo ŋuŋura i kom Muca kun okobbe ni, “Piŋo kara rik ikwanyowa oko i Miciri me miyowa to pi oryo pii, karacel itinowa kede limwa?”" 
Exodus17:4 Omio Muca te kok baŋ Rwot ni, “Abino kara ti mo jo-ni nadi? Nen, gin doŋ oyikere me nanapo an i gweŋ”" 
Exodus17:5 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Wot i nyim jo, yer odoŋe mogo a jo Icrael iwot kedgi; kwany daŋ abironi ame rik igoo kede kulo Nail, imak i ciŋi, me iwot kede." 
Exodus17:6 Nen ba, an abino cuŋ i nyimi, i kom kidi me Koreb; yin ibino goyo kor kidi, eka pii te mollo iye, me jo mali.” Muca daŋ te timo kittono i nyim odoŋe ma Icrael." 
Exodus17:7 Nyiŋ kabedo-nono ote cako ni Maca kede Meriba, pien jo Icrael yigi owaŋ ikome dok pien gin oomo yi Rwot kun okobo ni, “Rwot tye i akinawa onyo pe?”" 
Exodus17:8 Jo Amalek te bino lweny i jo Icrael i Repidim. 
Exodus17:9 Muca te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Yer co mogo i akinawu, me iwot ilweny i jo Amalek; diki an abino cuŋ i wi kidi kun abiro Obaŋa tye i ciŋa.”" 
Exodus17:10 Yocwa daŋ te timo kite ame Muca okobbe, olwenyo i jo Amalek; eka Muca kede Aron kede Kur te yito malo i wi kidi." 
Exodus17:11 Ka Muca tye otiŋo ciŋe malo, jo Icrael loo lweny, cite ka en odwoko ciŋe piny, jo Amalek en a loo." 
Exodus17:12 A doŋ ciŋ Muca ojony oko, otino kidi, eka ote miyo Muca bedo i wie, Aron kede Kur te tiŋo ciŋe malo, kun ŋat acel tiŋo tuŋ cel, ŋat acel tino tuŋ cel; ciŋ Muca te bedo ame otiŋere kittono naka piny oyuto." 
Exodus17:13 Yocwa te jwero Amalek karacel i jo mere luŋ i pala romo. 
Exodus17:14 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Co kop man i buk obed me poyo wic, eka ite wot kwano atek i yit Yocwa, ni, An abino miyo wi jo luŋ ame tye piny i te polo wil oko i kom jo Amalek.”" 
Exodus17:15 Muca te cano keno me lam me miyo mot oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa, te lwoŋo ni, Rwot en benderana," 
Exodus17:16 kun kobo ni, “Ciŋwa omako bendera a Rwot! Rwot gire bino lweny i jo Amalek kare luŋ.”" 
Exodus18:1 Yecero, alamdog a jo Midian, papa a dako a Muca, rik te winyo jami luŋ ame Obaŋa obedo tiyo pi Muca kede jo mere Icrael, kit ame Rwot okwanyo kede jo Icrael i Miciri." 
Exodus18:2 Yecero, papa a dako a Muca, onwoŋo ogamo Jipola dako a Muca i kare ame en koŋ onwoŋo ocwae paco," 
Exodus18:3 karacel awobe mere aryo. Nyiŋ awobi acel Gerecom, pien onwoŋo rik en okobo ni, “Pien an doŋ abedo welo i lobo a mom megwa.”" 
Exodus18:4 Nyiŋ awobi ocele Eliejer, pien onwoŋo rik en okobo ni, “Obaŋa a pappa gira en okonya, olara i pala lweny a Parao.”" 
Exodus18:5 Kare ame Yecero papa a dako a Muca obino baŋ Muca i tim i kidi Obaŋa kan ame onwoŋo gin oguro kemagi iye, kun en onwoŋo obino karacel awobe a Muca aryo kede dako mere," 
Exodus18:6 dano moro te wot kobbi Muca ni, “Nen, Yecero papa a cegi kede cegi kede awobeni tye abino baŋi.”" 
Exodus18:7 Muca te ya wot jolo papa a cege, te ryebere piny i nyime, eka te noto leme; gin doŋ te cako mote kun opepenyo kite a gin obedo bedo kede, ote donyo kede i kema." 
Exodus18:8 Muca te titti papa a dako mere jami duc ame Rwot otimo i kom Parao kede jo Miciri pi jo Icrael kede peko ame gin orwatte kede iyo, karacel kede kit a rik Rwot olarogi kede." 
Exodus18:9 Cuny Yecero te bedo yom pi jami ducu ame Rwot otimo baŋ jo Icrael, ame olarogi kede i ciŋ jo Miciri." 
Exodus18:10 Yecero te kobo ni, “Rwot ame olarowu iciŋ jo Miciri kede iciŋ Parao, myero mi pwoc." 
Exodus18:11 Aman doŋ aŋeo ni Rwot dwoŋ atek kato kit obaŋa ocele luŋ, pien olaro jo mere i ciŋ jo Miciri ame yam obedo tic kedgi agwa meicel.”" 
Exodus18:12 Yecero papa a dako a Muca te miyo mot awaŋa kede kit mot ocele me yalo Obaŋa. Aron kede odoŋe a jo Icrael luŋ te bino cam i nyim Obaŋa karacel i papa a dako a Muca. 
Exodus18:13 Orwo mere Muca te bedo ŋolo kop a jo, jo te bedo cuŋ guro Muca cakere odiko naka ceŋ iyul." 
Exodus18:14 Ka papa a dako a Muca oneno jami luŋame en obedo timo pi jo, okobo ni, “Yin it ye ka tero jo man niŋo? Piŋo yin ibedo keni kun jo ocuŋ oguri cakere odiko naka ceŋ iyul?”" 
Exodus18:15 Muca te dokki papa a cege ni, “Pien jo bino baŋa me penyo koppogo baŋ Obaŋa." 
Exodus18:16 Ka ce gin tye i kopporo ame olaro, gin bino kede baŋa, an ate ŋolo kop i akinagi kun amiogi oŋeo cik Obaŋa kede gin a en oŋolo.”" 
Exodus18:17 Papa a cege te kobbe ni, “Gin ame yin itiyo mom kakare." 
Exodus18:18 Nen yin kede jo luŋ iol wunu oko pien ticcere onwoŋo pek atekateka ame yin keni mom iromo tyeko. 
Exodus18:19 Doŋ akwai me winyo koppa, me amii ryeko, dok Obaŋa bed kedi! Yin ibino bedo akwe na a jo i nyim Obaŋa kede me tero kopgi baŋ Obaŋa." 
Exodus18:20 Yin myero ipwonygi cik kede kite me ŋolo kop, kun imiogi oŋeo kite a myero gin ogwokere kede, kede kite a myero gin oti kede." 
Exodus18:21 Ento yin yer jo aryek i akina jo, jo ame lworo Obaŋa, ame genne dok ame mom mito lim me wil; wek iket jonono loo lwak, me gin bed jo ame loo jo tutumia kede jo mia, kede jo pyerabic kede jo apar." 
Exodus18:22 Wek jo-nono ŋol kop a jo kare luŋ; kun okelo baŋi kop atekkege keken, cite en atitino mere gin myero tyek gigi oko i kuno. Mannono bino miyo gin mii kare me weo dok bino miyo inywako kedgi tic man apekki." 
Exodus18:23 Ka ce ibino timo kit man, dok Obaŋa daŋ ociki amannono, bino miyo ikanyo ite miyo jo man tuno i kabedogi i kuc.”" 
Exodus18:24 Muca te winyo kop a papa a cege, te timo ginnoro luŋ ame en okobbe." 
Exodus18:25 Muca te yero jo aryek i akina jo Icrael luŋ, te ketogi me bedo otel a lwak, oketo jo ame loo jo tutumia, kede mia, kede pyerabic kede mea jo apar." 
Exodus18:26 Jonnono te bedo ŋolo kop i kare luŋ, kono ka pido mogo atek en ame otero baŋ Muca, aco en atitino mege, gin tyeko oko i kuno." 
Exodus18:27 Muca te lwoko papa a cege weko iyo, en doŋ te medde i wot anyim naka paco." 
Exodus19:1 I dwe me adekkere cakere kare ame jo Icrael oya kede Miciri, i nino-nono ikokome, gin otuno tim me Cinai." 
Exodus19:2 Gin onwoŋo oya i Repidim, ote bino i tim me Cinai, eka gin te guro kemagi i nyim kidi me Cinai." 
Exodus19:3 Muca te yito malo i wi kidi baŋ Obaŋa, Rwot te lwoŋe i wi kidi kun kobbe ni, “Wot ikobbi ot a Yakobo, ititti itino Icrael ni," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Doŋ ineno wunu gin ame atimo pirwu i kom jo Miciri, kede kite ame atiŋowu kede i bwom cur ate kelowu baŋa." 
Exodus19:5 Doŋ ba, ka ibino winyo wunu koppa kun igwoko wunu cikerena, wun ibino bedo wunu jona ikoma i akina rok luŋ, pien lobo luŋ obedo mega." 
Exodus19:6 Wun doŋ ibino bedo wunu lwak ame an en aloo, kun ibedo wunu olamdog, dok ibino bedo wunu rok acil.’ Mannono en kop ame ibino ko bo baŋ jo Icrael.”" 
Exodus19:7 Muca daŋ te timo amannono, olwoŋo odoŋe a loo lwak te kobbigi kop ame Rwot okobo-nono." 
Exodus19:8 Jo luŋ te gamo i dwon acel ni, “Ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot okobo, wan obino tiyo.” Muca te dwoko kop a lwak baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus19:9 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Nen ba, an abino baŋi ipol oculle acula, me jo winy dwona i kare ame akop kedi, me oye yin doŋ atwal.” Muca te kobbi Rwot kop ame jo okobo." 
Exodus19:10 Rwot te ciko Muca ni, “Wot imi jo lonyere tin kede diki, me jo bed acil, dok daŋ olwok rukgi," 
Exodus19:11 me nino me adekkere nwongi doŋ oyikere oko, pien i nino me adekkere, Rwot bino yitto bino piny i wi kidi me Cinai i nyim jo luŋ." 
Exodus19:12 Dok daŋ myero imi jo ŋe ka kwene a myero gin gik iye tuŋi i tuŋi, kun ikobbigi ni, ‘Gwokere wunu, kur iyit wunu i wi kidi, dok daŋ kur igud wunu kidi, ŋat ame bino gudo kidi, obino neko oko." 
Exodus19:13 Ciŋ ŋattoro mom bino gudo kome, obino nape i gweŋ; onyo celo kede atero, kadi dano onyo lee mom bino bedo kwo.’ Ka opel bino kok ame koŋ ri ri, jo bino yito malo i kor kidi.”" 
Exodus19:14 Muca te yitto piny i wi kidi, te bino baŋ lwak, eka te miyo jo lonyere, ote daŋ lwoko rukgi," 
Exodus19:15 Te doŋ kobbi jo ni, “Nino me adekkere myero nwoŋ doŋ iyikere wunu oko, kur ibed wunu ceggi i mon.”" 
Exodus19:16 I nino me adekkere odiko, piny te bedo momora kun daŋ memenya atata, pol oculle acula te wumo wi kidi oko, opel te kok aloŋo meicel, omio jo luŋ te bedo i gonygi kun komgi amyel amyela." 
Exodus19:17 Icennere Muca te kelo jo oko me rwatte Obaŋa; jo te cuŋ piny i te kidi. 
Exodus19:18 Yito te wumo kom kidi me Cinai oko ipuk pien Rwot oyitto piny i mac; yito mere onwoŋo duny woto malo bala yito mac me waŋo gulu, kidi daŋ te yeŋere atek." 
Exodus19:19 Kare ame dwon opel omedde kok aloŋo, Muca te bedo kop kun Obaŋa gamo doge i mor kot." 
Exodus19:20 Rwot te yito piny i wi kidi me Cinai, te lwoŋo Muca i wi kidi malo, eka Muca te wot baŋe kuno," 
Exodus19:21 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Yit piny iwot ikwenyoro jo, me kur obed cerre acera pi mito neno Rwot, pien bino miyo jo apol to." 
Exodus19:22 Dok anaka olamdog ame obino ceggi baŋ Rwot myero lonyere kengi obed acil, me akemo kur mak Rwot te mukere i komgi.”" 
Exodus19:23 Muca te gamo ni, “Jo mom bino yito malo i wi kidi Cinai, pien yin ikomi icikowa kun ikobo ni, ‘Myero imi jo ŋe ka kwene a myero gin gik iye i te kidi, eka ite lonyo bedo acil.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Yit piny, me iwot idwog malo kan wun kede Aron; cite kur imi olamdog kede lwak cerre me bino baŋa, an a Rwot, naka mio cunya waŋ ate mukere i komgi.”" 
Exodus19:25 Muca daŋ te timo amannono, te yitto piny baŋ lwak wot tittigi kop a Rwot." 
Exodus20:1 Obaŋa rik okobo kop man luŋ, kun kobo ni," 
Exodus20:2 “An a Rwot Obaŋani, ame rik akwanyi oko i lobo me Miciri, i ot me opii." 
Exodus20:3 “Kur dok ibed Obaŋa moro ocele kono ka an keken. 
Exodus20:4 “Kur iti cal ginnoro ame ipao piri keni, kadi cal ginnoro ame tye malo i polo, onyo ame tye piny i wi lobo, onyo ame tye i pii ame tye piny i te lobo;" 
Exodus20:5 kur iryebere piny i nyimgi, kur iworgi; pien an a Rwot Obaŋani, an Obaŋa ame nyek; aketo can i kom ikwae a jo ame daga pi bal a kwarogi naka tuno i kom lwagi me adek kede me aŋwen i kom ikwaegi," 
Exodus20:6 ento anyuto marra a mom lokere baŋ jo tutumia kede tutumia ame mara, ame mako cikka." 
Exodus20:7 “Kur ilok nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋani odok gi-tuko; pien Rwot bino miyo kop loo ŋat a tuko kede nyiŋe. 
Exodus20:8 “Po pi nino me cabit, ikwer bed acil." 
Exodus20:9 Ibino tic atek pi nino abicel, kun itio ticci ityeko luŋ;" 
Exodus20:10 ento nino me abiro en cabit a Rwot Obaŋani Ninonono kur igud ticcoro, kadi yin ikomi, onyo wodi, onyo nyari, kadi opiini onyo aŋecani, kadi dyaŋŋi, onyo arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu;" 
Exodus20:11 pien Rwot yam otio polo kede lobo, kede nam kede jami ducu ame-tye iye pi nino abicel, ento i nino me abiro owe iye; en omio Rwot omio winyo i kom nino me abiro, te lonyo bedo acil." 
Exodus20:12 “Wor pappi kede totti me iperakino i lobo a yam Rwot Obaŋani omii. 
Exodus20:13 “Kur inek. 
Exodus20:14 “Kur icod cot. 
Exodus20:15 “Kur ikwal ginnoro. 
Exodus20:16 “Kur ikob kop goba i kom ŋattoro. 
Exodus20:17 “Kur ibed paro ot a ŋattoro, kur ipar dako a ŋattoro, kadi opii mere, onyo aŋeca mere, onyo twonnere, onyo kana mere, kadi ginnoro ducu ame tye baŋe.”" 
Exodus20:18 Kare a doŋ jo oneno piny obedo momora kede memenya atata, opel tye akoko, dok yito daŋ owumo kom kidi oko ipuk, lworo omakogi atek, komgi daŋ te bedo myel amyela. Jo te cuŋ i teŋe kannabor." 
Exodus20:19 Ote kobbi Muca ni, “Yin en ikob kedwa, wan obino winyo; ento kur imi Obaŋa en a kob kedwa; bino miyo wan oto oko,”" 
Exodus20:20 Muca te kobbi jo ni, “Kur ilworu pien Obaŋa obino me temo cunywu, me ibed wunu i lworo i kome, wek kur ibal wunu.”" 
Exodus20:21 Jo te cuŋ teŋe kannabor, kun Muca en owoto ceggi i pol ocido icuc, kan ame Obaŋa tye iye." 
Exodus20:22 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kobbi jo Icrael ni ba, ‘Doŋ ineno wunu giwu kenwu ni Rwot okobo kedwu kun tye i polo." 
Exodus20:23 Mom ibino wunu tiyo obaŋa moro me ryal me nywako kabedo keda, pe daŋ ibino wunu tiyo obaŋa moro me jabu pirwu kenwu" 
Exodus20:24 Tiya wunu keno me lam kede lobo, ŋolla wunu iye mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny, romi, kede twonniwu. I kabedo luŋ ame abino miyo jo po iye nyiŋa, abino bino iye me miyowu gum." 
Exodus20:25 Ka itio wunu keno me lam pira kun itio wunu i kiddi kur icanu iye kiddi ame opao; pien ka ibino keto iye jami ticci, nwoŋo doŋ ibalo oko." 
Exodus20:26 Dok daŋ kur iyit wunu i keno me lamma kede kiddi ame ocano me yito, mio komwu bino nen oko i kare iyito wunu." 
Exodus21:1 “Cik ame myero iket wunu i nyim lwak ene: 
Exodus21:2 Ka ce iwilo opiini ame obedo dano me Eburania, en bino tic baŋi pi mwakki abicel, i mwaka me abiro mere ibino gonyo woto aboŋo culo limmoro me lakoro en." 
Exodus21:3 Ka ce onwoŋo rikobino en kene, en daŋ bino wot kene, aco ka onwoŋo obino ame onyomo, en bino wot i dako mere." 
Exodus21:4 Aco ka adwoŋŋere en ame omie dako, eka en te nywalo awobe kede anyira, dako kede itino mere bino doŋ baŋ adwoŋŋere, en bino wot gire kene." 
Exodus21:5 Cite ka opii-nono bino kobo kannaler ni, ‘An gira amaro adwoŋŋa, kede dakona, kede itinona; mom daŋ amito ni gonya,’" 
Exodus21:6 adwoŋŋere bino tere baŋ Obaŋa, te tere naka i ŋet kika, onyo i kom yat me doggola; eka adwoŋŋere te tuco yite kede atero, en doŋ te tic baŋe nakanaka." 
Exodus21:7 “Ka ce dano moro ocato nyare oko acalo aŋeca, nyannono mom obino gonyo bala opii." 
Exodus21:8 Ka ce en mom oyomoro cuny adwoŋŋere a rik onwoŋo oyere me bedo mere ikome, en myero ye ŋattoro lakoro kede lim; cite danonono mom bino bedo i twerroro me cate baŋ arokkoro ocele, pien obwole nono." 
Exodus21:9 Ka ce onwoŋo en rik oyero nyannono pi wode, en myero gwok nyannono a rom aroma i kite ame en gwoko kede nyare." 
Exodus21:10 Ka ce en onyomo dako mere ocele, myero mom jwik cam a nyannono, onyo rukkere, onyo kare ame en bedo kede baŋe." 
Exodus21:11 Ka mom bino cobo jami adek-ki, obino gonyo dako-nono aboŋo culo limmoro me lakoro." 
Exodus21:12 “Ka ŋattoro ogoo dano, ce oto oko, en daŋ obino neke oko," 
Exodus21:13 Cite ka onwoŋo mom obedo kiye akia, ento Obaŋa omio dano-nono opoto i ciŋe, abino yero kabedo moro a myero en riŋ lar," 
Exodus21:14 Aco ka dano moro oero lweny me akaka i kom ŋattoro ocele kun tye i cuny me neko oko i ryeko, obino kwanyo dano-nono oko i kom keno me lam ma, ote neko oko." 
Exodus21:15 “Ka ŋattoro ogoo pappere onyo tottere, obino neko oko." 
Exodus21:16 “Ka ŋattoro okwalo dano, te cato oko baŋ dano ocele onyo onwoŋo gire baŋe, obino neko dano-nono oko." 
Exodus21:17 “Ka ce ŋattoro oceno pappere onyo tottere, dano-nono obino neko oko." 
Exodus21:18 “Ka ce jo moro obedo da, ce ŋattoro onapo awottere i kidi onyo odoŋo adoŋa i ciŋe mom te to, ento obedo twoye i kabuto," 
Exodus21:19 icennere ka dano-nono oya malo ame woto kun komo akoma kede abiro, kop mom bino loyo ŋat ame ogoo-nono ento en bino culo kare mere ame obalo me tic, dok bino miyo dano-nono can aber." 
Exodus21:20 “Ka ce ŋattoro ogoo opii mere onyo aŋeca mere kede abiro, ka oto oko i caa-nono, obino keto can i kome." 
Exodus21:21 Aco ka opii-nono koŋ dok ori pi nino acel onyo aryo te to, mom obino keto cannoro i kome; pien opii-nono obedo limmere gire." 
Exodus21:22 “Ka ce co onwoŋo tye alweny, eka ŋat acel ciŋe te cer i kom dako ame yie doŋ otego oko, ce yie-nono oony oko, kun cannoro ocele mom onen iye, dano ame ogoo dannono bino culo kwor i wel lim ame won dako bino ŋolo, kun culo kit ame aŋolkop omoko." 
Exodus21:23 Aco ka ce cannoro onen iye, obino culo kwo kede kwo," 
Exodus21:24 waŋ kede waŋ, lak kede lak, ciŋ kede ciŋ, tyen kede tyen," 
Exodus21:25 mac kede mac, awano kede awano, apwoda kede apwoda." 
Exodus21:26 “Ka ce ŋattoro ogoo waŋ opii mere onyo mea aŋeca mere, ce oloo toŋ waŋe oko, en doŋ bino gonyo opii-nono onyo aŋeca-nono woto oko pi waŋe-nono." 
Exodus21:27 Aco ka otwomo lak opii onyo mea aŋeca te muko oko, en bino gonyo opii-nono onyo aŋeca-nono weko woto pi lake-nono." 
Exodus21:28 “Ka ce twonnoro ocobo dano moro i tuŋe, onyo dako, ce oneko oko, twonnono obino napo oko i gweŋ, dok riŋo mere mom obino camo ento kop pe bino loyo wonnere." 
Exodus21:29 Cite ka twonnono onwoŋo yam maro cobo jo i tuŋe con, dok yam doŋ ociko wonnere oko pire, cite wonnere gire mom te gwoko, ka ce twonnono oneko dano, onyo oneko dako moro, twonnono obino napo oko i gweŋ, wonnere daŋ obino neko oko," 
Exodus21:30 Aco ka oŋolle cul, en bino culo lim luŋ ame oŋolle pi lakoro kwo mere," 
Exodus21:31 Aco ka ocobo awobi onyo nyaka a lo moro, obino daŋ tic i cik acellono," 
Exodus21:32 Aco ka ocobo opii onyo aŋeca moro, wonnere bino miyo cekel me ryal pyreradek baŋ won opii-nono, kun twon onapo oko i gweŋ." 
Exodus21:33 “Ka ce ŋattoro oweko wi bur twolo kun mom owumo, onyo ka ŋattoro okunyo bur eka pe te wumo wie oko, ka ce twon onyo kana moro opoto iye," 
Exodus21:34 won bur bino culo. En bino culo lim baŋ wonnere, en te tero riŋo lee opoto i bur." 
Exodus21:35 “Ka ce twonnoro otwomo twon ocele te neko oko, obino cato twon akwo-ni oko ote poko limmere. Riŋo twon oto daŋ obino poko apoka." 
Exodus21:36 Aco ka twonnono onwoŋo yam oŋeo ni en maro twomo twoni wadgi, kun wonnere daŋ mom ogwoko, en bino culo twon kede twon wadgi kun en oto-ni bedo mege." 
Exodus22:1 “Ka ce ŋattoro akwalo twonnoro onyo romo moro, ce oneko oko onyo ocato oko, dano-nono bino culo twoni abic pi twon acel, romi aŋwen pi romo acel. En bino culo waŋe. Aco ka gire moro mom, obino cate en ikome oko, me ote culo kede lim ame okwalo." 
Exodus22:2 Aco ka lim ame okwalo-ni onwoŋo kun kwo baŋ ŋat okwalo, kadi obedo twon onyo kana, onyo romo, en bino culo iryo. “Ka ce onwoŋo akwo moro tye aturo ot, eka ote goyo neko oko, mom obino culo kworrere; cite ka onwoŋo ceŋ doŋ odonyo oko, obino culo kworrere." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Ka dok onyo dyegi onyo kit limmoro luŋ akwo ocamo poto a ŋattoro, onyo olokkere, onyo wonnere ogonyo te wot camo poto a ŋattoro, won lim bino culo kede mere abeco ame tye i poto mere kede iyi poto olokkere." 
Exodus22:6 “Ka ce maccoro owaŋ eka te ŋamo okuto, te waŋo kai ame onwoŋo ocoko karacel, onyo en ame mom ru okao, onyo owaŋo kai i poto luŋ, ŋat ocwinyo mac bino culo ducu." 
Exodus22:7 “Ka ce ŋattoro omio limmere baŋ awottere ni kanne onyo gwokke, eka ote kwalo oko i ot a dano-naca, dok daŋ ote nwoŋo ŋat ekwalo oko, obino culo ginnoro a rom kede tyen aryo." 
Exodus22:8 Aco ka mom onwoŋo akwo, won ot bino wot i nyim Obaŋa, pi nyuto ni en gire ciŋe mom ogudo jami awottere." 
Exodus22:9 “Ka ce jo moro tye alaro ginnoro i akinagi kadi ginnono obedo twon, onyo kana, onyo romo, onyo boŋo, onyo ginnoro keken ame orwenyo, eka ŋattoro i akinagi te kobo oko ni, ‘Neno wunu en ene,’ kop ame onwoŋo tye i akina jonnono obino tero i nyim Obaŋa. Ŋat ame Obaŋa oŋolo kop oloo bino culo awottere a doko ginnaca tyen aryo." 
Exodus22:10 “Ka ce ŋattoro onwoŋo ojoko kana baŋ awottere, onyo twon, onyo romo, nyo kit lee moro ocele, eka te to oko, onyo ogoo agoa onyo oryemo te rwenyo atwal, kun ŋattoro gire mom oneno," 
Exodus22:11 ŋat ojokke bino kwoŋ i nyiŋ Rwot me nen ka en ikome ciŋe mom ogudo jami awottere. Ka ce en okwoŋo, won jami myero ye kwonnere-nono, en mom bino culo." 
Exodus22:12 Cite ka ekwalo akwala i baŋe, en bino culo won jami." 
Exodus22:13 Ka ce lee tim en omwodo, ka en okelo ginnoro ame nyuto, en mom bino culo gin ame lee tim omwodo." 
Exodus22:14 “Ka ce ŋattoro onwoŋo oomo dyaŋ, dyel onyo kit limmoro akwo i baŋ awottere, eka te wanne onyo to oko kun wonnere mom tye, dano-nono myero culi." 
Exodus22:15 Ka ce onwoŋo wonnere daŋ tye, mom obino culo waŋe; ka rik onwoŋo okelo pi tic me awak cul me awak bino romo." 
Exodus22:16 “Ka ce lo moro obedo bibito nyannoro a pwod tidi a mom ru oneye ico, a mom ru daŋ ocako nyomo, eka te buto kede, en myero doŋ cul lim me nyomo obed cege." 
Exodus22:17 Aco ka papa a nyako okwero oko i nyare, en bino culo lim ame romo nyomo nyako a mom ru oŋeye i co." 
Exodus22:18 “Myero kur wek dako ame ajok bed kwo. 
Exodus22:19 “Ŋattoro obu to i lee daŋ myero nek oko. 
Exodus22:20 “Ŋat ame oyalo obaŋa moro ocele a mom Rwot, myero nek oko bala gin me kwer." 
Exodus22:21 “Kur itim arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu arac, kur daŋ iwune, pien wun daŋ rik ibedo wunu wele i lobo me Miciri." 
Exodus22:22 Kur iwun wunu dako moro a cware oto onyo atin kiccoro. 
Exodus22:23 Ka ce iwuno wunugi, eka gin te kok baŋa, an gira abino winyo kokogi." 
Exodus22:24 Akemo bino maka atek ate nekowu oko i pala lweny, eka monwu daŋ le doko mon a coggi oto, itinowu daŋ te doko itino kice." 
Exodus22:25 “Ka ce imio acannoro i akina jona ame bedo baŋi okoporo ginnoro i baŋi, mom ibino tere kite ame omi-banya tero kede jo, mom daŋ ibino mito magoba moro i baŋe." 
Exodus22:26 Ka ce awotti ojeŋo boŋo mere baŋi, myero idwokke oko ame ceŋ mom ru opoto;" 
Exodus22:27 pien mannono gin ame en wum kede eno keken, boŋo ame wumo kome, en bino buto kara i gin aŋo? Ka ce dano moro bino kok baŋa, an abino winyo koko mere, pien an gira akica." 
Exodus22:28 “Kur iyet Obaŋa, kadi ceno nattoroame loo lwak." 
Exodus22:29 “Kur ibed gal i gin ame ikaa opoŋ deroni karacel i kono olok kede moo ame opon guluni. Mi moro oko oyot me mot baŋa. “Itinoni me kao awobe ibino miyogi baŋa. 
Exodus22:30 Twonni kede romini daŋ ibino timo kittono. Gin bino bedo baŋ totogi pi nino kany wie aryo, cite i nino me aboro ibino miyogi baŋa." 
Exodus22:31 “Ibino wunu bedo jo acil ame okwero pira; pi mannono kur icam wunu riŋo ame lee tim omwodo; myero ibolli wunu gwogi. 
Exodus23:1 “Kur ibed lalo kop anike. Kur iribere i dano arac ame maro kobo goba pi timo jo rac. 
Exodus23:2 Kur ilub lwak jo a wot timo gin arac. Kur daŋ iletjere baŋ lwak jo ame apido goba pi balo ŋolo kop kakare. 
Exodus23:3 Kur daŋ idwor acan i pido mere. 
Exodus23:4 “Ka ce icop i kom twon onyo kana akworri ame orwenyo, myero idwok baŋe." 
Exodus23:5 Ka ce ineno kana a lon adagi obuto piny ame yec obwoo kur iweke amannono, myero ikonye me ya malo." 
Exodus23:6 “Kur igen acan loyo koppere. 
Exodus23:7 Kur ilutte i kopporo me goba. Kur daŋ imi nek ŋattoro aber a mompe i bal, pien an mom abino ye obalo loo kopgi." 
Exodus23:8 Kur igam ginnoro me wili, pien kodi willono wumo anaka wan jo ame neno aber, eka te balo pido a jo ame atira." 
Exodus23:9 “Kur iwun arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu; yin iŋeo aber kite me bedo arok, pien yin daŋ rik kon ibedo arok i Miciri." 
Exodus23:10 “Ibino puro potoni pi mwakki abicel kun ikaa gin ocek iye," 
Exodus23:11 cite i mwaka me abiro mere, ibino weko potoni we kun mom opuro. Ginnoro luŋ ame bino cek i potoni i mwaka-nono bino bedo me ocan ame tye i akina joni, eka en adoŋŋere te bedo mea leyi me tim. Cik acellono en ame daŋ ibino lubo pi poto olokki kede poto jeituni meri." 
Exodus23:12 “Ibino tiyo tic meri pi nino abicel, ento i nino me abiro mere, ibino weo; me twoni kede kanani daŋ nwon weo, wot aŋecani kede arokkoro ame bedo baŋi daŋ nwon dok teko me komgi." 
Exodus23:13 Mak wunu kop luŋ ame atyeko doŋ kobbiwu. Kur ilwon wunu nyiŋ obaŋa moro ocele; kodikoppono myero kur winyere i dogwu kadi acelloro. 
Exodus23:14 “Ibino kwero wunu ecuban adoŋo adek i mwaka acel. 
Exodus23:15 Ibino kwero wunu ecuban me Ogati a Tobi Mom iye kite a rik acikowu kede. Ibino wunu camo ogati a mom orubo i tobi pi nino kany wie aryo, i kare a rik aciko, i dwe me Abic, pien mannono en kare a rik iya wunu kede i Miciri. Ŋattoro myero kur bin i nyima i ciŋe nono." 
Exodus23:16 Ibino daŋ kwero wunu ecuban me wi mwaka kun imio wunu motwu me cam ocek pi ticwu i kom gin onwoŋo icoo wunu i pottiwu. Dok daŋ ibino kwero wunu ecuban me nyono cam i dero i agikki mwaka ame nwoŋo doŋ icoko kit cammoro luŋ ame ipuro i mwakanono. 
Exodus23:17 Co luŋ a tye baŋi bino bino i nyim Rwot Obaŋa tyen adek i mwaka acel. 
Exodus23:18 “Kur imi remo me gin oŋolo me yala karacel ogati a tobi mom tiye. Dwol leyi ame oŋolo me yala i kare me ecuban, myero kur wek moro ri tuno naka odiko ocele." 
Exodus23:19 “Cam me wi mwaka ogeo cek abeco i potoni, myero ikel i ot a Rwot Obaŋani. Kur ited riŋo atin dyel kede cak a tottere." 
Exodus23:20 “Nen, abino cwalo amalaika i nyimi me gwoki iyo, dok me teli teri naka i kabedo ame rik ayiko piri." 
Exodus23:21 Myero iwore, iwinye, kur daŋ ipyem kede, pien mom bino timmi kica ka ijem. Twerra luŋ tye i ciŋe." 
Exodus23:22 “Cite ka ibino winye kede cunyi luŋ, kun itio gin ame en okobbi luŋ, abino bedo akwor okworri dok abino dago jo a dagi." 
Exodus23:23 Amalaika bino telo nyimi kun teri baŋ jo Amor, jo Kitti, jo Periji, jo Kanaan, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc; eka ate jwerogi oko." 
Exodus23:24 Kur iryebere wunu piny i nyim obaŋegi, kur iworgi wunu, kur iti wunu bala gin, ento ibino wunu turo wunugi oko kun imumuko wunu gweŋegi ame ocucuna me awora." 
Exodus23:25 Ibino woro wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, cite en bino miyowu winyo, ite nwoŋo wunu cam abup kede pii. Abino miyo two moro bedo mom i akinawu." 
Exodus23:26 Lee moro mom bino bwogo dok dako moro daŋ mom bino bedo oraŋa i lobowu. Abino miyo kwo meri cobere aber kakare. 
Exodus23:27 Abino miyo jo i nyimi luŋ bedo lwor, dok daŋ abino babano jo luŋ ame bino rwatte kedi. Abino miyo okworri luŋ riŋo oko i nyimi." 
Exodus23:28 Abino miyo pipino ager corre i nyimi te ryemo jo Kitti, jo Kanaan, jo Kivi oko i nyimi." 
Exodus23:29 Mom abino ryemogi luŋ i nyimi i mwaka acel keken, mio lobo doŋ oko nono, eka leyi me tim tte nya, medde, te yelowu." 
Exodus23:30 Abino ryemogi momot, tuno wan ame yin inya iromo lobo." 
Exodus23:31 Wan loboni bino ya i Nam Arema tuno naka i Nam a jo Piriciti, cakere i tim naka i kulo Efurate. Abino daŋ miyo wegi lobonono i ciŋwu, yin ibino ryemogi oko i nyimi." 
Exodus23:32 Myero kur icikere kedgi, kadi baŋ obaŋegi." 
Exodus23:33 Dok gin myero kur bed i loboni, bino miyo yin itimo bal baŋa. Pien woro obaŋagi bino doko kumma me cikowu.”" 
Exodus24:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Biye malo baŋa kan wun kede Aron, kede Nadab, kede Abiku karacel kede odoŋe a jo Icrael pyerabiro, bin iwora wunu i kannabor." 
Exodus24:2 Muca kene en ame myero nok Rwot ceggi, ento jo Icrael ocele luŋmom myero bin aceggi. Jo myero mom yit karacel kede malo.”" 
Exodus24:3 Muca te dwogo baŋ jo, te daŋ tittigi kop a Rwot okobo luŋ karacel kede cikkere luŋ. Jo luŋ te gamo i dwongi acel ni, “Wan obino tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot ociko.”" 
Exodus24:4 Muca te coyo kop a Rwot luŋ. Orwo mere en te dilo odiko con, te cano keno me lam i te kidi, te daŋ cibo gweŋe apar wie aryo kuno ame oporo wel atekere apar wie aryo me Icrael." 
Exodus24:5 En te cwayo awobe Icrael me wot yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa alutu kede twoni me mot me kweyo cuny. 
Exodus24:6 Icennere Muca te kwanyo nucu meremo leyi oŋolo, te onyo i weer, kede dok nucu mere, te coro i kom keno me lam." 
Exodus24:7 Te dok kwanyo buk me cikere kwano baŋ jo. Jo te gamo ni, “Wan obino tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot ociko, dok daŋ obino winyo koppere.”" 
Exodus24:8 Muca dok te tino remo coro i kom lwak, kun kobo ni, “Nenu remo me cikere ame Rwot ocikere kedwu, ame rwatte ikop magi luŋ.”" 
Exodus24:9 Muca, Aron, Nadab, Abiku ka race I kede odoŋe a jo Icrael pyerabiro te wot malo," 
Exodus24:10 te neno Obaŋa a jo Icrael. I te tyene piny rik tye iye ginnoro acalli capir ame opeto kun ryeny bala polo ikokome. 
Exodus24:11 Cite Obaŋa mom ogudo kom odoŋe me Icrael i ciŋe; gin oneno Obaŋa, ote cam dok daŋ ote mat." 
Exodus24:12 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Biye baŋa malo i wi kidi, me ibed ikura kuno. Me abin amii kiddi apada ame acoo iye kede gin aciko me pwonyo lwak.”" 
Exodus24:13 Muca te ya malo karacel kede Yocwa ame onwoŋo konye. Muca te wot i wi kidi Obaŋa. 
Exodus24:14 En okobbi odoŋe ni, “Bed ikura wunu kan, tuno ka an adwogo baŋwu. Nen, aweko Aron kede Kur odoŋ baŋwu, ka ce ŋattoro tye kede kopporo myero wot nengi.”" 
Exodus24:15 Kare ame Muca doŋ oyito oko malo i wi kidi, pol te wumo kidi oko," 
Exodus24:16 Kwogo a Rwot te bedo i kom kidi me Cinai, pol te wumo oko pi nino abicel, cite i nino me abiro, Rwot te lwoŋo Muca i dye pol." 
Exodus24:17 I karenono kwogo a Rwot te nen baŋ jo Icrael bala mac arum ame awaŋ alyet i wi kidi. 
Exodus24:18 Muca te wot donyo i dye pol, te bedo kuno nino pyeraŋwen, dyeceŋ kede iwor." 
Exodus25:1 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus25:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael raya mot; ibino rayo wunu gin ame dano acel acel bino ye miyo i cuny aber. 
Exodus25:3 Mot ame ibino wunu rayo i baŋ jo ene: jabu, ryal, mola," 
Exodus25:4 uci ame obedo bululu kede amaramar, kede are ma, kede boŋo me camanini aber; yer dyegi," 
Exodus25:5 lao nyogi romi ame onyoŋo kede me dyegi; bao me yat okuto alwi; 
Exodus25:6 moo me mac tara, gin a ŋwece kur me yiko moo wir kede me odok akur me awaŋa," 
Exodus25:7 gweŋe alilia me onik kede en ocele mere me amwona i kom jabu, pi epod kede pi icao kor." 
Exodus25:8 Jo myero yikka kabedo acil me abed i akinagi. 
Exodus25:9 Ibino yiko wunu kema kede jami luŋ ame bino bedo iye kite ame abino nyuto baŋi. 
Exodus25:10 “Obino payo canduk bao okuto alwi; borrere myero bed futi aŋwen, laccere futi aryo, kede borrere me malo futi aryo." 
Exodus25:11 Mwon kome oko i jabu ame olio aber, mwon yie kede ŋec; eka ite dolo doge oko i jabu." 
Exodus25:12 Ti atem me jabu aŋwen, ite keto i tyene aŋwen luŋ; atem aryo tuŋ cel kede aryo tuŋ ocele." 
Exodus25:13 Yik daŋ ludi aryo me yat okuto alwi, ite mwono komgi oko i jabu." 
Exodus25:14 Rwak ludi iyi atem luŋ ame tye i ŋet canduk, me tiŋo canduk." 
Exodus25:15 Ludinono bino bedo i kom atem ame tye i kom caduknono nakanaka, mom myero kwany kadi acel." 
Exodus25:16 Kiddi apada ame ocoo kop me caden i komgi, ame amii-ni, ibino keto iyi canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye." 
Exodus25:17 Ibino daŋ dok tiyo kom-me-kica i jabu ame olio aber: borrere myero bed futi aŋwen kede laccere futi aryo. 
Exodus25:18 Ti daŋ okerubi me jabu aryo i kom agikki kom-me-kica aryo ducu, kun iteto kede anyul." 
Exodus25:19 Ti okerubi acel i agikki mere tuŋ cel kede acel tuŋ cel; mi okeru bi ku bere i kom-me-kica, i agikki mere aryo ducu." 
Exodus25:20 Ibino miyo okerubi yaro bwomgi malo kun wumo kom-me-kica; kun waŋ acel acel neno me awottere, ame gin aryo luŋ oneno kom-me-kica." 
Exodus25:21 Ibino cibo kom-mekica cuŋ i wi canduk, eka ite keto kop me caden ame abino miyi-ni iyi canduk." 
Exodus25:22 An abino rwatte kedi kuno, ate kop kedi malo i wi kcm-me-kica, kede i akina okerubi ame tye malo i wi canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye kun akobo kedi i kom cik luŋ ame abino miyo jo Icrael." 
Exodus25:23 “Ti daŋ meja kede bao okuto alwi; borrere myero bed futi adek kede laccere futi acel kede nucu, eka borrere me malo te bedo futi aryo." 
Exodus25:24 Mwon kome oko i jabu ame olio aber, dok idol daŋ laŋete luŋ kun imwono oko i jabu," 
Exodus25:25 Ket arii mere ame laccere rom aroma i cuny ciŋ; dol daŋ lak arii luŋ i jabu. 
Exodus25:26 Ti daŋ atem me jabu aŋwen pire, eka ite mwono atemmono i twoke aŋwen luŋ, i tyene aŋwen." 
Exodus25:27 Atem bino buto i kom arii, eka ite rwako iye lut me tino meja." 
Exodus25:28 Ludi me tino meja daŋ ti kede bao okuto alwi, ite daŋ mwono komgi oko i jabu; ludi-nono obino tiŋo kede meja." 
Exodus25:29 Ti daŋ cani mere kede bakuli mere me keto odok akur; ti daŋ cupa kede tabbi me liyo mot amata ame omio me yalo Obaŋa; ti kede jabu ame olio aber. 
Exodus25:30 Ogati me aketa i nyim Rwot ibino cano i wi meja didik. 
Exodus25:31 “Ibino daŋ tiyo gi-cibo tara me jabu kun itio i jabu ame olio aber. Tere kede bollere myero tet kede anyul; ikopo mere, ame en wene kede ature, bino kubere kede karacel." 
Exodus25:32 Jaŋe bino bedo abicel ame oryeye i ŋete luŋ kun adek tye tuŋ cel kede adek tuŋ cel. 
Exodus25:33 Ikopo adek ame otio bala tur yao bino bedo i jane tuŋ cel, kun ikopo acel acel tye kede wene kede ture, tuŋ ocele daŋ bino bedo iye ikopo adek ame otio bala tur yao, kun acel acel tye i wene kede ature. Jane abicel luŋ ame oryeye i ŋet gi-cibo tara gin luŋ bino bedo kittono." 
Exodus25:34 I kom gi-cibo tara ikome bino bedo iye ikopo aŋwen, ame daŋ otio bala tur yao, kun otye i wengi kede turgi." 
Exodus25:35 I te jaŋe abicel ame oryeye ryoryo bino bedo iye wene ame okubere i kom gi-cibo tara. 
Exodus25:36 Wengi kede jaŋgi myero bed okubere karacel kun kome luŋ obedo jabu ame olio aber ote teto kede anyul. 
Exodus25:37 Icennere ite doŋ tiyo tara kany wie aryo pire; ibino cibo tara-nono iye, me meny kabedo luŋ i nyime." 
Exodus25:38 Makaccere kede cani mere myero bed me jabu ame olio aber. 
Exodus25:39 Gi-cibo tara kede jami ticcere luŋ myero ti i jabu ame olio aber, ame pekkere romo ratili mia acel." 
Exodus25:40 Nen aber ni itio luŋ kun ilubo kit ame anyutti kede i wi kidi ca. 
Exodus26:1 “Dok daŋ ibino tiyo kema, kun itio i cuka tomon me camanini ame owio uci mere abeco, kede uci bululu bululu kede en obedo amaramar kede arema, ibino kwoyo kun ideo i cal okerubi ame oyiko i twon diro." 
Exodus26:2 Cuka acel acel borrere myero obed yadi apar wie aŋwen, laccere obed yadi aryo. Gin cuka-nono luŋ bino bedo arorom." 
Exodus26:3 Cuka abic obino ribo karacel, kede cuka abic ocele daŋ obino ribo karacel." 
Exodus26:4 Ibino kwoyo waŋ jarara kede uci ame obedo bululu bululu i agikki cuka me dul me acel ame ikubo karacel, eka daŋ ite dok kwoyo waŋ jarara i agikki cuka me dul me aryo ame rom aroma i maca ocele ca." 
Exodus26:5 Dok ikwo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka acel a tye i dul me acel, eka ite daŋ dok kwoyo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka acel ame tye i dul me aryo, kun waŋ jarara acel acel tikere awottere." 
Exodus26:6 Ibino tiyo agod jarara pyerabic kun itio i jabu; ibino tiyo mannono me ribo dog cuka acel acel i kom awottere kun agod en a nonotogi, me kema doŋ te bedo ame okubere oko karacel." 
Exodus26:7 “Ibino daŋ tiyo cuka me yer dyegi me wumo wi kema; ibino tiyo cuka me yer dyegi apar wie acel. 
Exodus26:8 Cuka acel acel borrere bino bedo yadi apar wie abic, kun lacgi tye yadi aryo aryo. Cuka apar wie acel-li luŋ myero bed ame rorom." 
Exodus26:9 Ibino noto cuka abic kengi karacel, eka cuka abicel daŋ ite noto kengi pat, kun cuka me abicellere idolo yie aryo i tuŋ nyim kema." 
Exodus26:10 Kwo waŋ jarara pyerabic i agikki me dul me acel ame inoto karacel, eka ite daŋ kwoyo en ocele pyerabic i agikki me dul ocele me aryo." 
Exodus26:11 “Ibino daŋ dok tiyo agod jarara me mola me arwaka i waŋ jarara me noto kema karacel. 
Exodus26:12 Lak cuka ke ma ame odoŋŋere, bino pyelle wumo ke ma i tuŋ ŋec." 
Exodus26:13 Lak cuka kema ame odonuono, borrere tuŋ cel futi acel i nucu kede tuŋ cel daŋ acel i nucu, mannono bino pyelle wumo kema ryoryo." 
Exodus26:14 Kwo daŋ dok lao romo ame onyoŋo kede lao dyegi, me wumo wi kema." 
Exodus26:15 “Ibino tiyo bayi me okuto alwi ame ocuŋ atira, me kema." 
Exodus26:16 Bor a bao acel acel myero obed futi apar wie abic, eka lacerre te bedo futi aryo." 
Exodus26:17 I kom bao acel acel mi tyene bed tye aryo me kubogi karacel. Bayi me kema ocuŋ atira-nono ibino tiyogi ducu kittono. 
Exodus26:18 Ibino tiyo bayi me ke ma pyeraryo me tuŋ anyarolum; 
Exodus26:19 dok iti acib tergi me ryal pyreraŋwen pi bao ke ma pyeraryo-nono, kun bao acelacel tye kede acib tere aryo aryo me rwako tyene." 
Exodus26:20 Ti daŋ me kema tuŋ ocele, tuŋ anyarodi, bao ocuŋ atira pyeraryo," 
Exodus26:21 kede acib tergi me ryal ame romo pyeraŋwen, acib tergi aryo aryo pi bao acel acel." 
Exodus26:22 Ti daŋ dok mene kema ame tye tuŋ to, ti me mannono bao abicel." 
Exodus26:23 Ti bao aryo me twoke ame tye tuŋ ŋec. 
Exodus26:24 Akinagi i tuŋ piny ibino poko oko ento i tuŋ malo ibino ribo doggi i kom atem me agege, gin aryo luŋ bino bedo kittono, twoke bino bedo aryo." 
Exodus26:25 Bao ke ma ocuŋ atira bino bedo aboro, kede acib tergi apar wie abicel ame otio kede ryal, kun acib tere aryo aryo tye pi bao atira acel acel." 
Exodus26:26 “Dok ibino daŋ tiyo arii me bao kun itio okuto alwi, ibino tiyo abic pi bao me kema tuŋ cel," 
Exodus26:27 kede dok arii ocele abic me tuŋ ocele, kede dok abic mene kema i tuŋ to." 
Exodus26:28 Arii me dyere, ame ŋolle i kor bayi ame ocuŋ atira, mannono bino ya i kom lake tuŋ cel tuno i lake tuŋ cel." 
Exodus26:29 Ibino mwono kom bao kema oko kede jabu. Ibino daŋ tiyo atem me rwako arii, ibino daŋ mwono komgi oko i jabu." 
Exodus26:30 Myero igur kema kun ilubo kite a rik onyutti kede i wi kidi. 
Exodus26:31 “Ibino kwoyo boŋo icika kede uci bululu bululu, amaramar, kede en arema. Ibino kwoyo i boŋo camanini ame uci mere owio abeco kun odeo i cal okerubi ame oyiko i twon diro." 
Exodus26:32 Ibino nabo boŋo icika-nono kede agod me jabu i kom pagi aŋwen me okuto alwi ame omwono komgi oko i jabu, ame ocuŋ i kom acib tergi aŋwen me ryal." 
Exodus26:33 Ŋab boŋo icikanono kede agod jarara, eka ite kela canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye keto iyi boŋo icika, eka boŋo me icika te poko akina kabedo acil kede Kabedo Acil Meicel." 
Exodus26:34 Eka ite doŋ keto kom-me-kica i wi canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye i Kabedo Acil Meicel. 
Exodus26:35 Ket meja oko i ŋe boŋo me icika kun iketo gi-cibo tara tuŋ anyarolum me kema, mi tikere kede meja. Ket meja tuŋ anyarodi." 
Exodus26:36 “Kwo cuka me wumo doggola me kema; kwo kede uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar, kede arema; kwo kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco, dok daŋ odeo aber." 
Exodus26:37 Ti pagi abic me boŋo me wumo doggola, kede yat okuto alwi, eka ite mwono komgi oko kede jabu. Agodgi bino bedo me jabu kun acib tergi tye abic me mola ame olio alia." 
Exodus27:1 “Ibino tiyo keno me lam kun itio i bao me okuto alwi. Borrere myero obed futi abiro kede nucu, eka laccere te bedo daŋ futi abiro kede nucu. Borra keno-nono kede laccere bino bedo arorom, aco borrere me malo myero bed futi aŋwen kede nucu." 
Exodus27:2 Ibino tiyo tuŋ i twoke aŋwen luŋ kun tuŋ aŋwennono luŋ kubere kede karacel, kome daŋ ibino mwono oko kede mola." 
Exodus27:3 Ibino yiko tako me jobo buru, kede atok buru, becan, gi-cobo riŋo, kede weer; jami ticcono luŋ ibino tiyogi kede mola." 
Exodus27:4 Yik daŋ keikei me mola, ket atem aŋwen ame otio i mola i twoke aŋwen luŋ." 
Exodus27:5 Ket keikei mola-nono i te arii me keno lam, me wek keikei but i kor keno lam." 
Exodus27:6 Ti daŋ ludi me keno lam kun itio i okuto alwi eka ite mwono komgi oko kede mola. 
Exodus27:7 Ibino rwako lut iyi atem luŋ me lut riye i kor keno me lam tuŋi kede tuŋi me tiŋo. 
Exodus27:8 Keno me lammono ibino tiyo ame yie twolo kun itio kede bao. Ti kite a rik anyutti kede i wi kidi. 
Exodus27:9 “Ibino daŋ yiko dyekal me kema. Ibino nabo cuka me camanini ame owio uci mere abeco i dyekal tuŋ cem; borrere tuŋ anyarolum myero bed yadi pyerabic. 
Exodus27:10 Pagigi bino bedo pyeraryo, kede acib tergi daŋ pyeraryo, gin ducu myero bed me mola, cite agod pagi kede otacgi luŋ myero bed me ryal." 
Exodus27:11 Borrere tuŋ anyarodi myero daŋ bed amannono; ibino daŋ nabo cuka ame borrere romo yadi pyerabic tunnaca. Pagigi daŋ bino bedo pyeraryo kede acib tergi pyeraryo, gin ducu daŋ myero bed me mola, cite agod pagi kede otacgi luŋ myero bed me ryal." 
Exodus27:12 Eka i ŋete ame tye tuŋ to, obino daŋ nabo iye cuka ame borrere romo yadi pyeraryo wie abic; pagigi bino bedo tomon kede acib tergi daŋ apar." 
Exodus27:13 Aco tuŋ nyime ame tye tuŋ kide, laccere bino bedo yadi pyeraryo wie abic." 
Exodus27:14 Ibino daŋ nabo cuka ame borrere romo yadi abiro kede nucu i ŋet dog dyekal tuŋ cel; pagigi bino bedo adek kede acib tergi adek. 
Exodus27:15 Tuŋ ocele daŋ ibino nabo iye cuka ame tye yadi abiro kede nucu; pagigi bino bedo adek kede acib tergi daŋ adek. 
Exodus27:16 Yo ame donyo i dyekal obino wumo oko kede cuka ame borrere romo yadi apar, boŋo-nono myero bed me camanini ame owio uci mere abeco, dok daŋ odeo aber; pagi mere bino bedo aŋwen kede acib tergi daŋ aŋwen." 
Exodus27:17 Pagi luŋ ame oguro i dyekal bino bedo iye otac ame otio kede ryal; agodgi daŋ myero bed me ryal, eka acib tergi te bedo me mola." 
Exodus27:18 Bora dyekal bino bedo yadi pyerabic kun laccere tye yadi pyeraryo wie abic, borrere malo futi abiro kede nucu. Obino nabo iye cuka me camanini ame uci mere owio abeco. Acib te pagi bino bedo me mola." 
Exodus27:19 Jami me tic luŋ ame tye i kema me konyo tic apapat, karacel kede te ke me guro kema, kede teke ame amano dyekal luŋ, bino bedo me mola." 
Exodus27:20 “Ibino ciko jo Icrael luŋ me ke lo moo me jeituni ame oodo, ote liyo acil, me menyo piny, me ony i tara ote weko bedo lyel nino ducu kun mom to." 
Exodus27:21 Aron kede awobe mere myero can mac me lyel i nyim Rwot cakere otyeno naka odiko i kema me rwatte, oko i ŋe boŋo icika ame tye i nyim canduk me kop me caden. Man en cik ame jo Icrael bino gwoko nakanaka, naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ." 
Exodus28:1 “Kel ominni Aron karacel kede awobe mere ceggi baŋi, gin ya oko i akina jo Icrael, me wek gin oti tic me olamdog baŋa. Jo-nono ene: Aron kede awobe mere Nadab, Abiku, Eleajar kede Itamar." 
Exodus28:2 Ibino kwoyo bomji acil pi ominni Aron, boŋi me kwogo dok abeco meicel." 
Exodus28:3 Dok ibino kobbi jo luŋ ame akitti, ame amiogi ryeko adwoŋ, ni myero gin kwo boŋo me aruka Aron, ame obino kwere kede i tic me bedo alamdog mera." 
Exodus28:4 Boŋi me aruka ame ibino kwoyo gin ene: icao kor, epod, jor abor ilul, kanyi ame oŋweŋweko kome, kede itambara adwala i wie, kede itambara me tweyo pyer; myero kwo boŋi magi me aruka acil pi ominwu Aron kede awobe mere, pi ticgi me bedo olamdogga." 
Exodus28:5 “Gin bino gamo jabu, uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco." 
Exodus28:6 Gin bino kwoyo epod kede jabu kede uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco, dok daŋ ame okwoo kede twon diro." 
Exodus28:7 Gin me wi gwoke bino bedo aryo ame okubo i doge ryoryo, me kubere karacel." 
Exodus28:8 Lati me tweyo ame tye i ko me ame otoko i diro, obino tiyo i kite tic acellono kun daŋ otio i kite jami acellono: jabu, uci bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco." 
Exodus28:9 Ibino kwanyo gweŋe alilia me onik aryo ite goro iye nyiŋ awobe Icrael," 
Exodus28:10 nyiŋ awobe abicel i kom kidi acel, kede mea awobe abicel odoŋŋere i kom ocele mere-ni, kun imiogi lubere i ditogi me anywalli." 
Exodus28:11 Ibino goro nyiŋ awobe Icrael i kom kidi aryo-nu, i kite adiro goro kede coc i kom kidi. Ibino mwonogi i kom jabu ame oŋweŋweko kede diro me kwako tere." 
Exodus28:12 Eka ite doŋ keto itino kiddi aryonono i kom gin me wi gwok epod, me gin bed kiddi me poyo awobe Icrael. Aron bino tiŋo nyingi-nono i wi gwoke ryoryo me poyo pirgi i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus28:13 Ti gin me kwako tere i jabu ame oŋweŋweko kome i diro. 
Exodus28:14 Ti daŋ nyor aryo me jabu ame omino calo tol, ti kede jabu olio aber; mwon nyorrono i kom gi-kwako tere." 
Exodus28:15 “Ibino daŋ kwoyo icao kor me ŋolo kop, kwo daŋ i diro. Ticcere bino bedo bala me kom epod; ibino tiyo i jabu, kede uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar, kede arema karacel kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco." 
Exodus28:16 Ibino dolo yie aryo kun borrere kede laccere rorom kede yi ciŋ. 
Exodus28:17 Ibino mwono gweŋe alilia i kom icao-nono kun iryeogi i yore aŋwen. I yore me agege, ibino keto iye cadiuc, tobaj kede kabankel." 
Exodus28:18 I yore me aryo, ibino keto iye emeradi, capir kede dayaman." 
Exodus28:19 Eka i yore me adekkere, te keto iye jatcint, agat kede ameticito." 
Exodus28:20 I yore me aŋwennere, ket iye berul, onik kede jacipa. Ibino mwonogi luŋ i jabu ame oŋweŋweko i diro." 
Exodus28:21 Gweŋe alilia-nono luŋ bino bedo gin apar wie aryo kun ogogoro nyiŋ awobe Icrael i komgi, dok gin luŋ bino bedo bala kidi ame ogogoro me atem ciŋ, kun kidi acel acel tye kede nyiŋ ame ogoro i kome ame oporo atekere apar wie aryo." 
Exodus28:22 Ti daŋ dok nyor aryo ame omino calo tol, kun itio kede jabu ame olio aber, me tweyo icao kor." 
Exodus28:23 Ti daŋ atem me jabu aryo pi icao kor, eka ite keto atem aryo-nono i dog icao kor aryo." 
Exodus28:24 Rwak nyor me jabu aryo-nu me dony iyi atem aryo ame tye i kom icao kor. 
Exodus28:25 Dog nyor aryo-nono ibino mwono oko i kom gi-kwako tere aryo ame otio i jabu kun oŋweŋweko kede diro-ca, me tweyo icao kor i gin me wi gwok epod tuŋ nyime." 
Exodus28:26 Ti dok atem me jabu aryo, ite ketogi i twok icao kor aryo ducu i kom doge ame tye i yie ame ceggi kede epod." 
Exodus28:27 Ti dok atem ocele me jabu, eka ite kubogi i gin me wi gwok epod aryo ame tye i nyim i tuŋ tere piny kan ame okubere tuŋ malo i wi lati me epod ame otoko i diro." 
Exodus28:28 Icao kor kede atemmere obino tweyo i kom atem me epod kede tol ame bululu bululu, me wek twe pyelle i wi lati me epod ame otoko i diro, me icao kor gonnyere oko i kom epod." 
Exodus28:29 Aron otiŋ nyiŋ awobe Icrael iyi cao me ŋolo kop i dog cunye i kare luŋ ame en donyo i kabedo acil, wek bed me po i komgi kare luŋ i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus28:30 Ibino keto Urim kede Tumim iyi cao me ŋolo kop, mannono daŋ bino bedo i dog cuny Aron i kare luŋ ame en donyo i nyim Rwot; mannono bino miyo Aron tino nolo kop a jo Icrael i dog cunye i nyim Rwot nino ducu." 
Exodus28:31 “Dok daŋ ibino tiyo jor abor ilul me epod ame kome luŋ obedo bululu bululu. 
Exodus28:32 Myero mi doge bed tye me rwako wic; ibino cweyo kun idolo doge bala dog boŋo aruka ame odolo doge luŋ, me kur yeci." 
Exodus28:33 Ibino luŋo ginnoro a rom okwer anyak i lak boŋo, ibino kwoyo ginnono kede uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema. Kwo ginnono i lak jor luŋ kun icuculo i akinagi olan me jabu." 
Exodus28:34 Olaŋ jabu kede gin acalli okwer myero rom lak jor ducu irit kun oculle acula. 
Exodus28:35 Mannono daŋ Aron bino ruko i dog ticcere cite olaŋŋono bino kok winyere i kare ame en adonyo i nyim Rwot i kabedo acil kede i kare ame en dwogo oko, me en kur to." 
Exodus28:36 “Ibino daŋ tiyo ginnoro acalo akwaa kede jabu ame olio aber, eka ite goro akwaa-nono kite ame ogoro kede atem ciŋ, ni, ‘Okwero obedo acil pi Rwot.’" 
Exodus28:37 Twe akwaa-nono irid i kom itambara me adwala i wic, kede tol obedo bululu bululu; ket i nyim itambara adwala me wic." 
Exodus28:38 Ket cuŋ i tur nyim Aron, mannono bino miyo Aron uno bal me jami acil ame jo Icrael otero me miyo acalo motgi acil; bino cuŋ i tur nyime didik, me Rwot gamgi." 
Exodus28:39 “Ibino daŋ dok tiyo kanyi, kun itio i boŋo camanini aber ame oŋweŋweko kome, i te tiyo daŋ itambara me adwala i wic i boŋo camanini aber, kede atambara me tweyo pyer ame odeo aber." 
Exodus28:40 “Aco pi awobe Aron ibino kwoyo kanyi kede itambara me tweyo pyer, kede tok atitino. Ibino tiyogi wek gin bed me kwogo dok abeco meicel." 
Exodus28:41 Yin ibino ruko ominwu Aron kede awobe mere luŋ kede rukkono; ibino wirogi kede moo eka ite kwerogi, ite ketogi i dog tic acil, me wek gin ti tic me olamdog baŋa." 
Exodus28:42 Ibino daŋ dok kwoyigi pale me wumo komgi cakere i pyergi naka iyi amurugi, kun ikwoo kede boŋo camanini," 
Exodus28:43 Aron kede awobe mere bino ruko i kare ame gin adonyo i kema me rwatte, i kare ame gin awot ceggi i keno me lam me tic i kabedo acil, me bal kur bed i komgi, te miyogi to oko. Man doŋ bino bedo cik ame en kede ikwae bino gwoko nakanaka." 
Exodus29:1 “I kare me kwerogi me tiyo tic me olamdog baŋa, ibino timo kit man. Ibino kwanyo atin twon acel kede nyogi romi aryo ame roccoro mom i komgi," 
Exodus29:2 kede ogati a tobi mom iye, kede capat daŋ a tobi mom iye kun orubo kede moo, kede dok capat areppere ame daŋ tobi mom iye kun oweweo moo iye. Magi-nono luŋ yin yikgi kede moko ŋano apwottere." 
Exodus29:3 Ketgi luŋ iyi dita acel, eka ite kela ditanono, kede atin twon kede nyogi romi aryo ca." 
Exodus29:4 Mi Aron kede awobe mere bin i nyim dog kema me rwatte, eka ite lwoko komgi oko kede pii." 
Exodus29:5 Kwany doŋ boŋi me rukogi, ite ruko Aron i kanyi, jor abor me epod, epod, kede icao kor, twe pyere kede lati me epod ame otoko kede diro." 
Exodus29:6 Dwal itambara i wie, ite keto tok kwogo acil ocuŋ i wi tambara me adwala." 
Exodus29:7 Kwany doŋ moo me wir iony i wie, me iwire kede." 
Exodus29:8 Kel dok awobe mere, irukgi kede kanyi," 
Exodus29:9 twe pyergi kede itambara, rwak tok atitino ca i wigi; tic me olamdog doŋ bino bedo ticgi. Man doŋ cik ame obino lubo nakanaka. Ibino keto Aron kede awobe mere i dog ticgi kittono." 
Exodus29:10 “Ibino dok kelo twon i nyim kema me rwatte, Aron kede awobe mere te keto ciŋgi i wi twonnono." 
Exodus29:11 Nek doŋ twonnono i nyim Rwot, i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Exodus29:12 Gwel remo twonnono me itotono i tuŋ aŋwen me keno me lam kun itotono kede nyako ciŋ; remo ame adoŋŋere ony i te keno lam. 
Exodus29:13 Wawaro dwolo luŋ ame owuwumo amonten, okene, emany kede aŋalura aryo, kede dwolo luŋ i komgi, ite wanogi luŋ i wi keno me lam." 
Exodus29:14 Cite riŋo twonnono, kede pyennere, kede wee yie, myero iwaŋ i mac i ŋe gony oko. Mannono bino bedo mot oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa pi bal." 
Exodus29:15 “Ka man otum, kwany nyok romo acel, mi Aron kede awobe mere ket ciŋgi i wie," 
Exodus29:16 nek doŋ nyok romonono, jol remo mere ite cocoro rom kom keno lam luŋ." 
Exodus29:17 Popoko riŋo nyokkono dul i dul, eka ite lwoko jami me yie, tyene ducu; ketgi i kom man ame ipopokoni karacel kede wie." 
Exodus29:18 Waŋ oko luŋ iwi keno me lam aboŋo gito moro iye. Mannono obedo mot ame oŋolo ote waŋo alutu baŋ Rwot; en mot a ŋwece kur me kweyo cuny, mot ame oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa ote waŋo oko i mac i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus29:19 “Icennere ibino dok kwanyo nyok romo ocele, Aron kede awobe mere te keto ciŋgi i wie." 
Exodus29:20 Nek dok nyok romo-nono oko, gwet remo romo-nono aduno ite cwicwinyo i alago yit me tuŋ cem Aron kede me awobe mere, kede i kom twon ciŋgi kede twon tyengi me luŋ cem; cor remo odoŋŋere rom keno me lam luŋ." 
Exodus29:21 Dok ikwany remo i kom keno me lammono aduno kede moo wir, eka ite kikiro i kom Aron kede i kom rukkere kede i kom awobe mere kede rukgi; mannono mio en kede rukkere bedo acil karacel kede awo be mere kede rukgi." 
Exodus29:22 “Wawaro dwolo i kom nyok romo kede moo yibe kede en owuwumo amonten, okene, aŋaluru aryo karacel kede dwolo ame tye i komgi, kede me amuru mere me tuŋ cem, pien mannono obedo nyok romo me keto dano i dog tic aciŋ," 
Exodus29:23 kede ogati acel kede capat daŋ acel ame gin luŋ orubogi kede moo, kede capat arep acel ame okwanyo luŋ i akina ogati a tobi mom iye ame tye i dita i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus29:24 Ketgi luŋ i cuny ciŋ Aron kede i cuny ciŋ awobe mere, ote yoko me bed mot ayoka i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus29:25 Kwany dokoko i ciŋgi, ite waŋo i kom keno me lam me ameda i kom mol yalo Obaŋa ame oŋolo ote wano alutu, me bed gin a ŋwece kur ame yomoro cuny Rwot. Mannono en mol ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus29:26 “Kwany ogok a nyok romo me kwero Aron pi ticcere ite yoko me bed mol ayoka i nyim Rwot; mannono en ame bino bedo iner a dok baŋi. 
Exodus29:27 Ibino daŋ kwero mot ayoka me ogok, kede amuru ame omio me mot pi olamdog, ame doŋ oyoko oko, kun okwanyo i nyok romo me keto jo i dog tic, ote miyo acalo mot ayo ka, pien inerrono me Aron kede awobe mere." 
Exodus29:28 Mannono bino bedo iner Aron kede awobe mere ame myero jo Icrael mi baŋgi kare ducu; pien mannono obedo iner ame myero jo Icrael mi baŋ olamdog i kom motgi me kweyo cuny, en motgi baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus29:29 “Boŋŋi Aron luŋ acillege bino bedo me ikwae ame bino lube. Gin bino ruko i kare ame owirogi kede moo me ketogi i dog tic. 
Exodus29:30 Atin awobi ame bino leyo tyene i tic me alamdog, bino ruko boŋŋi-nono nino kany wie aryo, i kare ame en donyo i kema me rwatte, me tic i kabedo acil." 
Exodus29:31 “Wot ited riŋo romo me ketogi i dog tic i kakannoro acil. 
Exodus29:32 Aron kede awobe mere myero cam riŋo romo-nono kede ogati ame tye i dita; gin myero cam i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Exodus29:33 Gin bino camo gin ame otio kede me kwanyo bal, ame oketogi kede i dog tic i kare me kwerogi; cite ŋattoro ata mom bino camo, pien jami-nono obedo jami acil." 
Exodus29:34 Ka ce riŋo moro ame otio kede me ketogi i dog tic Odoŋ, onyo ogati odoŋ te tuno naka odiko, en odoŋŋere myero doŋ waŋ oko i mac. Mom dok reyero cam, pien cil." 
Exodus29:35 “Man ibino limo i kom Aron kede i kom awobe mere daŋ amannono, kite ame aciki kede luŋ; ibino tiyo tic me ketogi i dog ticgi nino kany wie aryo." 
Exodus29:36 Nino acel acel ibino ŋolo twon acel me yalo Obaŋa pi kwanyo bal. Ibino daŋ miyo mot oŋolo me bal pi keno me lam i kare ame itio tic me lam i kare ame itio tic me kwanyo bal i kome, eka ite wiro kede moo me kwero." 
Exodus29:37 Ibino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom keno me lam, ite kwero nino kany wie aryo; man bino miyo keno lam doko acil meicel, eka ginnoro keken ame bino gudo kom keno lam bino doko acil." 
Exodus29:38 “Gin ame ibino miyo me mot i wi keno lam ene: nyogi rommi aryo me mwaka acel acel en ame ibino miyo nino ducu. 
Exodus29:39 Nyok romo acel ibino miyo odiko, eka acel ite bino miyo otyeno." 
Exodus29:40 Ibino miyo daŋ moko kwon apwottere karacel kede romo ame ibino geyo miyo; moko kwon apwottono myero bed a romo gwata acel ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame oodo aoda cupa aryo kede nucu, karacel kede koŋo yino ame romo cupa aryo kede nucu, magi-nono bino bedo me mot amala," 
Exodus29:41 Nyok romo ocele ibino miyo otyeno kun imio karacel kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amala acalo bala me odiko, me bedo gin a ŋwece kur ame yomoro cuny, mot owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus29:42 Mannono bino bedo mot yalo Obaŋa ame owaŋo i kare ducu, naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ, i dog ke ma me rwatte i nyim Rwot. Abino rwatte kedwu kuno me kop kedwu." 
Exodus29:43 Abino rwatte i jo Icrael kuno, eka kwogona te lonyo bedo acil." 
Exodus29:44 Abino lonyo kema me rwatte kede keno me lam bedo acil, eka dok ate kwero Aron kede awobe mere pi ticgi me bedo olamdog mera." 
Exodus29:45 Dok abino bedo i akina jo Icrael, abino bedo Obaŋagi." 
Exodus29:46 Gin bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot Obaŋagi, a rik akwanyogi oko i lobo me Miciri, wek abed i akinagi, an a Rwot Obaŋagi." 
Exodus30:1 “Ibino tiyo keno lam me waŋo odok akur; ibino tiyo i bao okuto alwi. 
Exodus30:2 Borrere myero bed futi acel kede nucu, laccere daŋ futi acel kede nucu; borrere kede laccere myero bed a rorom. Borrere me malo myero bed futi adek; kun tye i tuŋ aŋwen ame okubere kede karacel." 
Exodus30:3 Mwon kome oko kede jabu ame olio aber; mwon wie kede laŋete luŋ kede tuŋ aŋwen luŋ; eka ite dolo doge oko i jabu. 
Exodus30:4 Ti atem me jabu aryo pire. Ket atemmono piny i te doge ame idolo-ni, kun atem acel acel otikere awottere ame tye tuŋ ocele; gin bino bedo me rwako ludi me tiŋo." 
Exodus30:5 Ti ludi kede yat okuto alwi, mwon komgi oko kede jabu." 
Exodus30:6 Ket i nyim boŋo me icika ame owumo canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye, i nyim kom-me-kica, kan ame abino rwatte kedi iye." 
Exodus30:7 Aron bino waŋo odok a ŋwece kur kuno. Nino luŋ ka en ayiko mac tara odiko, en bino waŋo;" 
Exodus30:8 dok ka Aron keto tara malo otyeno, daŋ bino waŋo. Obino waŋo odok akur kittono nino ducu i nyim Rwot, naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ," 
Exodus30:9 Mom obino miyo iye mottoro me kit odokkoro ocele, kadi mot awaŋa, kadi mot me moko kwon; dok daŋ kur iony iye mot amata." 
Exodus30:10 Aron myero ti gin me kwanyo bal i kome i tuŋ aŋwen luŋ i mwaka acel tyen acel. En bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome kede remo me mot oŋolo me kwanyo bal i mwaka acel tyen acel naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ. Mannono en gin acil meicel baŋ Rwot.” 
Exodus30:11 Rwot okobbi Muca ni 
Exodus30:12 “Ka icako kwano wet jo Icrael, ŋat acel acel bino miyo ginnoro baŋ Rwot me lakoro kwo mere i kare ame ikwanogi, me cannoro arac kur pot i komgi i kare ame ikwanogi." 
Exodus30:13 Ŋat acel acel ame okwano bino miyo jami-ni: nucu cekel me kabedo acil (cekel acel rom kede gera pyeraryo); nucu cekellono bino bedo me mot baŋ Rwot. 
Exodus30:14 Jo luŋ aluŋa ame doŋ okwano welgi, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, gin luŋ bino miyo mot baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus30:15 Ŋat olony mom bino miyo adwoŋ akato nucu cekel, acan daŋ mom bino miyo an ok i te nucu cekel, i kare me miyo mot baŋ Rwot me kwanyo bal i komwu." 
Exodus30:16 Ibino gamo lim me kwanyo bal i kom jo Icrael; limmono luŋ bino bedo me konyo tic me kema me rwatte, me bed me po pi jo Icrael i nyim Rwot pi kwanyo bal i komgi.”" 
Exodus30:17 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus30:18 “Ibino daŋ tiyo tako me mola, kede akwak tere daŋ me mola, me bed me lwokere. Cib cuŋ i akina kema me rwatte kede keno me lam; ony doŋ iye pii." 
Exodus30:19 Kannono en ame Aron kede awobe mere bino lwoko iye ciŋgi kede tyengi. 
Exodus30:20 I kare ame gin woto i kema me rwatte, onyo owoto ceggi i keno me lam me tic iye, me waŋo mot ame owaŋo i nyim Rwot, gin koŋ bino geyo lwok kede pii, me pe oto." 
Exodus30:21 Gin bino lwoko ciŋgi kede tyengi me mom oto. Man bino bedo cik baŋwu nakanaka, baŋ Aron kede baŋ ikwae naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ.”" 
Exodus30:22 Rwot dok te medde kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Exodus30:23 “Kwany gin a ŋwece kur meicel: murra ame olio acil ame pekkere romo cekel mia abic, cinamon ame ŋwece ŋweye amit, a romo cekel mia aryo kede pyerabic, ame mannono en nucu mere, lum ame ŋwece kur ame romo cekel mia aryo kede pyerabic," 
Exodus30:24 kacia cinamon cekel mia abic, ame opimo i cekel me kabedo acil, kede moo jeituni ame romo cupa apar." 
Exodus30:25 Jami magi en ame ibino yiko kede moo acil me wir ame orubo kite ame orubo kede moo a ŋwece kur; moonono bino bedo moo wir acil.
