Exodus30:26 Ibino wiro kede kema me rwatte kede canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye," 
Exodus30:27 kede meja, kede jami me ticcere luŋ, kede gicibo tara kede jami ticcere luŋ, kede keno lam me odok akur," 
Exodus30:28 kede keno lam me waŋo mot me yalo Obaŋa, kede jami ticcere luŋ, kede tako lwok kede akwak tere." 
Exodus30:29 Ibino kwerogi me obed jami acil meicel, ame ginnoro luŋ ame bino gudo kome doko oko acil." 
Exodus30:30 Ibino daŋ wiro Aron kede awobe mere, me kwerogi me gin oti baŋa tic me olamdog." 
Exodus30:31 Dok ibino kobbi jo Icrael ni, ‘Man bino bedo moona acil me wir, naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ." 
Exodus30:32 Mom obino onyo i kom dano moro atata, mom daŋ ibino wunu rubo moro a rom kede; en moo acil, bino bedo acil baŋwu daŋ," 
Exodus30:33 Ŋat ame bino rubo moro kittono onyo ŋat ame bino wiro dano moro atata, waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Kwany gin a ŋwece kur, citakte kede onika kede galbani, gin a ŋwece kur kede odok me luban ame olio aber (mi pekgi luŋ bed arorom)" 
Exodus30:35 eka i te yiko kede odok akur acil ame olio aber, kun orubo kit ame orubo kede gin a ŋwece kur, pwor daŋ iye kado aduno." 
Exodus30:36 Cacanyo mogo ilur oko atitino, i te keto mogo i nyim canduk me kop me caden ame tye i kema me rwatte kan ame abino rwatte iye kedi. Mannono bino bedo gin acil meicel baŋwu," 
Exodus30:37 Mom dok ibino timo wunu odok akurroro ame orubo kittono pirwu kenwu. I tuŋ baŋwu odokkono bino bedo gin ame okwero obedo acil pi Rwot. 
Exodus30:38 Ŋat ame bino rubo ginnoro me anwea kittono, waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi.”" 
Exodus31:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus31:2 “Nen, atyeko yero Bejaleri wot a Uri, ame wot a Kur, me itekere a Juda." 
Exodus31:3 Atyeko doŋ miyo cuny Obaŋa opoŋ i yie, karacel kede ryeko me tic, kede niaŋ atut, kede ŋec, kede tic luŋ me diro," 
Exodus31:4 me roto callogo anyen me tic me diro ame kwongi papat, ame otio i jabu, ryal kede mola;" 
Exodus31:5 karacel kede ŋoŋolo gweŋe alilia me amwona i kom jabu, kede ryeko me payo bao kede tiyo kit tic ocele luŋ me diro." 
Exodus31:6 Nen, atyeko daŋ keto Okoliab ame wot Akicamak, me itekere a Dan, me tic karacel kede. Atyeko daŋ miyo ryeko me tic baŋ jo ame kwiri, me gin ti jami luŋ ame aciki iyeni:" 
Exodus31:7 kema me rwatte, kede canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye, kede kom-me-kica, ame bedo i wie, kede jami me yi kema luŋ;" 
Exodus31:8 meja kede jami ticcere, gi-cibo tara me jabu olio aber karacel i jami ticcere luŋ, keno lam me odok akur," 
Exodus31:9 keno lam me waŋo mot oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa karacel i jami ticcere luŋ, tako lwok karacel kede akwak tere;" 
Exodus31:10 boŋŋi aruka ame otio abeco, boŋŋi aruka acil pi Aron alamdog, karacel kede boŋŋi aruka pi awobe mere, pi ticgi me bedo olamdog;" 
Exodus31:11 moo wir kede odok a ŋwece kur pi kabedo acil. Gin obino tiyo i kite ame doŋ atyeko ciki kede.” 
Exodus31:12 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus31:13 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, ‘Ibino wunu gwoko cabit mera, pien en gin ame nyuto, ame tye i akina an kede wun naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ, me gin ŋe ni an a Rwot, ame alonyowu ibedo wunu acil." 
Exodus31:14 Gwok wunu cabit, pien nino-nono cil baŋwu; ka ce ŋattoro obalo ninonono, myero nek oko, ŋat ame tio ticcoro iye, waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi." 
Exodus31:15 Ibino wunu tic pi nino abicel, cite nino me abiro obedo cabit me weo mot, nino acil baŋ Rwot. Ŋat ame tio ticcoro i cabit myero nek oko." 
Exodus31:16 Pi mannono, jo Icrael myero gwok cabit naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ, acalo cikere ame ri nakanaka," 
Exodus31:17 Mannono anyut ame bino ri atwal ame tye i akina an kede jo Icrael, ni, Rwot rik otio polo kede lobo nino abicel, owe mot i nino me abiro, kome te pye.’ ”" 
Exodus31:18 Kare ame doŋ otyeko kop kede Muca i wi kidi me Cinai, omie kidi apada aryo me kop me caden, kidi apada aryo ame Obaŋa en ocoo i ciŋe." 
Exodus32:1 Kare ame jo oneno ni Muca ori, kun mom dwogo piny i wi kidi, gin ocokere kengi baŋ Aron, ote kobbe ni, “Ya malo itiyiwa obaŋa, ame bino telo nyimwa; pien Muca moro-ni, ame yam okwanyowa i Miciri, wan mom doŋ oŋeo gin ame otimo.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aron te kobbigi ni, “Gwegweto wunu atem me jabu ame tye i yit monwu kede awobewu kede i mea anyirawu, me ikelgi wunu baŋa.”" 
Exodus32:3 Jo luŋ daŋ te timo amannono, ogwegweto atem i yitgi oko ote kelo baŋ Aron." 
Exodus32:4 En te gamo jabu i baŋgi, te luto kome anyul me tet, eka te tiyo atin twon ame otwako atwaka. Gin te kobo ni, “Jo Icrael we, obaŋawu ennu ame okwanyowu i lobo Miciri!”" 
Exodus32:5 Ka Aron oneno amannono, ocano keno me lam i nyime; eka te cako rabo kannaler ni, “Dik i obino kwero ecuban a Rwot.”" 
Exodus32:6 Gin rik ote dilo odiko con, ote miyo mot awaŋa apol atata, eka gin te kelo motgi me kweyo cuny; jo doŋ te bedo piny cam kede mat, ote ya malo me tuko." 
Exodus32:7 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Wot piny, pien joni a rik ikwanyo i lobo me Miciri oballe doŋ oko." 
Exodus32:8 Gin oweko cik a rik acikogi kede oko oyotoyot, olunyo tiyo atin twon ame otwako atwaka pirgi kengi, ocako daŋ doŋ woro oko kun daŋ oyalo gigi, dok daŋ okobo ni, ‘Jo Icrael, neno obaŋawu ame rik okwanyowu i lobo me Miciri!’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “An doŋ aneno joni, gin obedo jo ame ŋutgi nwaŋ;" 
Exodus32:10 pi mannono, koŋ doŋ iweka gira kena, me akemona koŋ yeny i komgi, me ami wigi two oko; cite yin abino miyi idoko rok adit.”" 
Exodus32:11 Cite Muca te bako doge baŋ Rwot Obaŋa mere kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, piŋo akemo omaki atek ateka i kom joni ame yin en ikwanyogi i lobo me Miciri kede te ko adwoŋ i twero me ciŋi." 
Exodus32:12 Piŋo omio jo Miciri kobo ni, ‘Oterogi kara pi rac me wot tyekogi oko i akina kiddi kuca, kede miyo wigi two oko i wi lobo.’ Tim ber ilok cunyi i akemoni ager-ri oko, me kur dok itim joni arac." 
Exodus32:13 Po i kom Iburaim, Icaka kede Icrael omironi, ame rik yin ikomi ikwonere kede nyiŋi keni keni baŋgi. Rik yin ikobo baŋgi ni, ‘Abino miyo ikwaewu nya apol bala acer me polo, dok daŋ lobo-ni luŋ ame rik acikere pire, abino miyo baŋ ikwaewu, gin bino leyo me bedo megi atwal.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Rwot te jwayo tammere oko me timo gin arac i kom jo mere. 
Exodus32:15 Muca te ya i wi kidi dok piny kun omako kiddi apada aryo me kop me caden i ciŋe; kiddi magi onwoŋo ocoo tuŋi kede tuŋi, yigi kede ŋegi," 
Exodus32:16 Kiddinono Obaŋa gire en onwoŋo otio, coc iye daŋ Obaŋa en onwoŋo ocoo kun ogoro i kom kiddi." 
Exodus32:17 Kare ame Yocwa owinyo dwon lwak ame awo, okobbi Muca ni, “Woo tye adwoŋ meicel i gony bala me lweny.”" 
Exodus32:18 Cite Muca te gamo ni, “Mannono gire mom woo me loyo lweny, dok daŋ mom koko a jo oloo, ento an awinyo dwon jo a wer awera.”" 
Exodus32:19 Kare ame en doŋ ceggi i gony, eka te neno atin twon kede myel, akemo alyet te mako Muca atekateka, omio en te reto kiddi apada aryo piny ame onwoŋo en omako i ciŋe, eka te ŋiŋida oko i te kidi me Cinai." 
Exodus32:20 Te kwanyo atin twon ame onwoŋo lwak otio-ni, te wot waŋo oko i mac, te rerego oko ayom, onyo i pii, te miyo jo Icrael luŋ mato oko." 
Exodus32:21 Muca te penyo Aron ni, “Jo-ni kara otimi niŋo ba, omio yin ikelo bal adwoŋ rom man i komgi-nie?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aron te gamo ni, “Kur twon akemo alyet nui oko, adwoŋŋa; yin giri iŋeo ni jo-ni cunygi gire mito ka timo gin arac." 
Exodus32:23 Pien gin okobba ni, ‘Tiyiwa obaŋa ame bino telo nyimwa; pien Muca moro-ni, ame yam okwanyowa i lobo Miciri, wan mom doŋ oŋeo gin ame otime.’" 
Exodus32:24 An ate kobbigi ni, ‘Dano acel acel ame tye kede jabu myero gwet oko.’ Gin te miya, ate onyo i mac, doŋ atin twon-ni oya iye.”" 
Exodus32:25 Kare ame Muca oneno ni jo doŋ ogak oko, pien Aron en omiogi ogak, kun omio lewic omakogi i akina okworgi," 
Exodus32:26 Muca ocuŋ i dog gony, te penyo lwak ni, “Ŋa ame pwod tye tuŋ baŋ Rwot? Dano-nono bin baŋa.” Awobe a Levi te cokere karacel bino baŋe." 
Exodus32:27 Muca te kobo baŋgi ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, ‘Dano acel acel myero ket pala romo mere i laŋete, eka te donyo kede i gony kun wiwira kede i dog gony tuŋi kede tuŋi kun mano yie luŋ ame ŋat acel acel neko ominnere, neko awottere, dok neko a laŋete.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Awobe a Levi te tiyo kite a Muca ocikogi kede. Gin te neko jo i nino-nono ame romo tutmia adek. 
Exodus32:29 Muca te kobo ni, “Tin wun doŋ ikwerre wunu kenwu me tiyo tic a Rwot, kun ŋat acel acel lokere neko wode kede ominnere, me Rwot tin miwu winyo.”" 
Exodus32:30 Orwo mere Muca te kobbi jo ni, “Wun itimo wunu bal adwoŋ meicel, aman an awot malo baŋ Rwot, gwok onyo abino timo ginnoro me kwanyo bal i komwu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Muca daŋ te dok baŋ Rwot, te kobo ni, “Oi do! jo man otimo twon bal adwoŋ meicel, otio obaŋa me jabu pirgi kengi." 
Exodus32:32 Cite ka ibino timogi kica i kom balgi amanni, timgi kica; aco ka mom, akwai ni kono doŋ iweo nyiŋa oko ame icoo i bukki.”" 
Exodus32:33 Cite Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Dano ame otimo balloro i nyimna en ame awee nyiŋe oko i bukka," 
Exodus32:34 Ento yin wot giri itel jo Icrael, itergi kan ame yam akobbi ca; nen ba, amalaikana bino telo nyimi. Ento tye kare ame abino limogi, kare-nono en ame abino keto kede can i komgi pi balgi-ni.”" 
Exodus32:35 Rwot te miyo two apek gwaro jo luŋ pi atin twon ame gin omio Aron otio. 
Exodus33:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Ya wunu oko i kan, yin karacel kede jo luŋ ame rik ikwanyogi i lobo Miciri me terogi i lobo ame rik akwoŋo pire baŋ Iburaim, Icaka, kede Yakobo, kun acikogi ni abino miyo baŋ ikwaegi." 
Exodus33:2 Dok daŋ abino cwayo amalaikana telo nyimi, cite bino ryemo jo Kanaan oko, kede jo Amor, jo Kitti, jo Periji, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc." 
Exodus33:3 Wot malo lobo opoŋ i cak kede moo kic; ento an mom abino wot kedwu kuno, me kur ami wiwu two oko iyo, pien wun ibedo wunu jo ame ŋutgi nwaŋ.”" 
Exodus33:4 Kare ame lwak owinyo kop arac-ci gin okumo; dano moro mom orukere i ruk me kwogo," 
Exodus33:5 Pien Rwot onwoŋo okobbi Muca ni, “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, ‘Wun jo ame ŋutwu nwaŋ; ka abino wot kedwu kuno pi kare moro anonok keken, abino miyo wiwu two oko. Aman doŋ myero igony rukwu oko me kwogo i komwu, me anen gin ame abino timowu kede.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Mannono en omio gin ogonyo rukgi oko me kwogo cakere i kom kidi me Koreb wot kede anyim. 
Exodus33:7 I kare-nono luŋ Muca obedo tero kema kun guro i ŋe gony kan ame bor i gony, eka te lwoŋo ni kema me rwatte. Doŋ ŋat ame mito ŋeyo kopporo I baŋ Rwot woto oko kan ame kema me rwatte tye iye, ame rik onwoŋo tye i ŋe gony." 
Exodus33:8 Kare luŋ ka Muca tye awot i kema me rwatte, jo luŋ ya malo, kun ŋat acel acel cuŋ i dog kema mere, me neno yo Muca tuno waŋ ame doŋ odonyo i kema me rwatte." 
Exodus33:9 Ka Muca doŋ odonyo i kema me rwatte, pagi pol dwogo piny te cuŋ i doggola kema me rwatte, eka Rwot te kop i Muca." 
Exodus33:10 Jo luŋ ka doŋ oneno pagi pol ogurre i dog kema, gin luŋ oya malo ote woro Obaŋa kun ŋat acel acel tye gire i dog kema mere." 
Exodus33:11 Mannono en kit a rik Rwot okobo kede i Muca wan i waŋ, kite acalo dano kobo kede awottere. Kare ame Muca odok i gony, Yocwa wot a Nuni ame rik en awobi ame konye, doŋ i kema me rwatte." 
Exodus33:12 Muca te kobbi Rwot ni, “Nen ba, yin onwoŋo rik ikobba ni, ‘Kwany jo-ni oko,’ cite mom ite miya ŋat ame ibino cwayo woto keda. Ento yin ikobo ni ‘Anei kom i nyiŋi, dok daŋ yin iyomoro cunya.’" 
Exodus33:13 Doŋ ka an onwoŋo ayomoro cunyi, tim ber inyutta yo meri, me aŋei, ate nwoŋo winyo i baŋi. Dok myero ine ni rok man obedo joni.”" 
Exodus33:14 Rwot te gamo ni, “An i koma abino wot kedwu, ate bino miyi weo.”" 
Exodus33:15 Muca dok te kobo ni, “Kace mom yin ikomi ame iwot kedwa, kur giri imiwa oya i kan." 
Exodus33:16 Kara doŋ obino ŋeyo niŋo ni an anwoŋo gum i baŋi, an karacel kede lwaki? Mom wot ame iwot kedwa-ni en ame miowa opokere i rok ocele? An karacel kede joni, wan opat apata i rok acele ame tye i wi lobo.”" 
Exodus33:17 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “An abino tiyo gin ame ikoko-nono ikome, pien iyomoro cunya, dok daŋ aŋei kom i nyiŋi.”" 
Exodus33:18 Muca te gamo ni, “Tim ber inyutta kwogoni.”" 
Exodus33:19 Rwot te gamo ni, “Abino miyo ineno berra luŋ i nyimi, dok abino tuco nyiŋa ni, ‘Rwot,’ i yiti. Abino nyuto berra baŋ ŋat ame abino nyuto berra baŋe, dok abino timo kica baŋ ŋat ame abino timo kica baŋe.”" 
Exodus33:20 Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Cite mom ibino neno waŋa, pien dano mom twero neno waŋa eka te dok bedo kwo.”" 
Exodus33:21 Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Nen ba, kabedo moro tye i ŋeta kan i wi kidi, en ame yin ibino cuŋ iye." 
Exodus33:22 Kare ame kwogona bino beo kato kannono, abino miyo yin ibedo i akina kidi obarre, eka ate wumi oko i ciŋa tuno ka doŋ atyeko kato oko;" 
Exodus33:23 ate doŋ kwanyo ciŋa oko, yin doŋ ite neno ka ŋea keken, cite mom ibino neno waŋa.”" 
Exodus34:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Tyeŋ kon kiddi apada aryo ame calli maca me agege ca, me aco iye kop a rik acoo i kiddi me agege ca, ame rik ibin ireto ite ŋiŋido oko." 
Exodus34:2 Yikere odiko, eka ite bino cuŋ i nyima i wi kidi me Cinai." 
Exodus34:3 Ŋattoro ocele kur bin kedi i wi kidi malo, ŋattoro daŋ myero kur nen kakannoro ducu i wi kidi; romi kede dok mom daŋ bino cam i ŋet kidi.”" 
Exodus34:4 Muca daŋ te tyeŋo kiddi apada aryo ame calli maca me agege ca; en te ya malo idiko con, te yito i wi kidi malo kite a rik Rwot ocike kede; owoto daŋ i kiddi apada kun omako i ciŋe." 
Exodus34:5 Rwot te bino piny kede pol, te cuŋ karacel kede kuno, eka te tuco nyiŋ Rwot." 
Exodus34:6 Rwot te kato i nyime kun lwoŋo nyiŋe kene ni, “Rwot, Rwot, Obaŋa ame akica, dok a timo jo ber, ame akemo mom mako oyotoyot, Obaŋa ame marrere dwoŋ dok mom lokere, dok ame genne meicel." 
Exodus34:7 Obaŋa ame gwoko marrere a mom lokere pi jo tutumia kede tutumia, kun timogi kica i rocgi, i timgi me turo cik, kede i balgi. Ento en gire mom kwanyo kop i kom obalo, cite keto can i kom ikwae kede dok i kom ikwae ikwaegi, pi bal a kwarogi naka i lwagi me adekkere kede me aŋwennere.”" 
Exodus34:8 Muca te ru kulo wie piny i lobo, te woro Obaŋa," 
Exodus34:9 Eka te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, ka ce aman doŋ ayomoro cunyi, tim ber yin Rwot en iwot kedwa, kadi wan jo ame ŋutwa nwaŋ; itimwa kica i gin a wan oroco dok obalo, miwa obed joni.”" 
Exodus34:10 Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Nen ba, aketo cikere. Abino tiyo gin me awura apol ata ame mom ru yam otimere i lobo ducu onyo i rokkoro, abino timo i nyim lwakki luŋ; eka jo luŋ ame ibedo wunu i akinagi bino neno tic a Rwot. Gin ame abino tiyo kedwu-nono, bino bedo a mio jo lworo." 
Exodus34:11 “Kop ame aciki iye tin-ni myero igwok. Nen abino ryemo jo Amor oko i nyimi karacel kede jo Kanaan, jo Kitti, jo Periji, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc." 
Exodus34:12 Gwokere ba, kur icikere i jo ame bedo i lobo ame iwot wunu iye-nono, me gin kur dok kumma me cikowu i akinawu." 
Exodus34:13 Ento mumuko wunu kenogi me yalo jogi oko, ret wunu kiddigi ame ocibo me awora piny, toŋu Acerimgi oko," 
Exodus34:14 (pien mom myero dok iwor wunu obaŋa moro ocele, pien Rwot ame nyiŋe Nyeko, en Obaŋa ame nyek)." 
Exodus34:15 Kur icikere wunu i jo ame bedo i lobo-nono, pien ka ce gin bino doko alaya pi lubo yo obanagi, eka ote daŋ miyo mot me yalo obaŋagi, mio ŋattoro bino lwoŋowu, ite camo wunu gin ame gin oŋolo oyalo obaŋagi." 
Exodus34:16 Dok ka inyommi wunu awobewu anyiragi, ka ce anyiragi odoko alaya pi lubo yo obaŋagi, bino miyo awobewu daŋ doko alaya i lubo yo obaŋagi." 
Exodus34:17 “Kur iti obaŋa moro me nyonyo ame itwako piri keni. 
Exodus34:18 “Ibino kwero wunu ecuban me Ogati a Tobi mom iye. Ibino camo wunu ogati a tobi mom iye pi nino kany wie aryo i kare a rik aciko, i dwe me Abib, kite a rik acikowu kede; pien rik iya wunu i lobo me Miciri i dwe me Abib." 
Exodus34:19 Itino kao luŋ mega, twonini luŋ me kao, mea dok kede me rommi." 
Exodus34:20 Kao a kana ibino lakoro atin nyok romo, aco ka mom ilakoro, obino mojo ŋute oko. Itinoni me kao luŋ awobe mege, ibino lakorogi. Dano moro myero kur bin i nyima ciŋe nono." 
Exodus34:21 “Ibino tiyo tic meri pi nino abicel, ento i nino me abiro mere ibino weo iye; ibino wunu weo kadi i kare me pur onyo i kare me kac." 
Exodus34:22 Ibino wunu daŋ kwero ecuban me cabit abiro, mannono en wi mwaka me kayo ŋano ame ogeo cek, kede dok nino adito me nyono cam i dero i agikki mwaka." 
Exodus34:23 Joni ame co luŋ bino bino tyen adek i mwaka acel i nyim Rwot Obaŋa, ame Obaŋa Icrael." 
Exodus34:24 Pien abino ryemo rok ocele oko i nyimwu, wan lobo abino miyo bedo alac. Ŋattoro daŋ mom gire bino bedo i mit i lobowu i kare ame ibino wunu wot i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu tyen adek i mwaka acel." 
Exodus34:25 “Kur imi remo me gin oŋolo me yala karacel i tobi. Kur iwek gin oŋolo me yala me nino adoŋo me Kato bed naka tuno odiko. 
Exodus34:26 Cam me wi mwaka ame ogeo cek i potowu myero ikel i ot a Rwot Obaŋani. Kur ited riŋo atin dyel i cak a tottere.” 
Exodus34:27 Rwot dokokobbi Muca ni, “Co kop me cikere magi luŋ, pien doŋ acikere kedwu, yin karacel kede jo Icrael.”" 
Exodus34:28 Muca ori baŋ Rwot kuno nino pyeraŋwen, icen kede iwor kun mom daŋ camo kadi mato ginnoro. En te coyo kop ame ocike iye-nono i kom kiddi apada, gin cik tomon." 
Exodus34:29 Icennere Muca doŋ te yitto oko piny i wi kidi kun omako kiddi ame apada aryo i ciŋe, ame ocoo iye kop me caden. I kare ame en yito piny i wi kidi, Muca onwoŋo mom ŋeo ni tur nyime tye apapara, pien onwoŋo obedo kop gin Obaŋa." 
Exodus34:30 Kare ame Aron kede jo Icrael luŋ oneno Muca, nen ba, gin oneno nyime tye apapara apapar jo te lworo noke aceggi oko." 
Exodus34:31 Ento Muca te lwoŋogi. Aron karacel kede otel a lwak te cako wot baŋe, Muca te kop kedgi." 
Exodus34:32 Icennere jo Icrael luŋ te wot baŋe ceggi. Muca te miyogi cik luŋ ame Rwot otitte i wi kidi me Cinai. 
Exodus34:33 Kare ame Muca doŋ otyeko kop kedgi oko, owumo tur nyime kede boŋo." 
Exodus34:34 Cite kare luŋ ka Muca woto i nyim Rwot me wot kop kede, en kwanyo boŋo oko i tur nyime, tuno waŋ ame en doŋ adwogo; ka en okato oko, titti jo Icrael kop ame Rwot ocike iye." 
Exodus34:35 Jo Icrael ka oneno tur nyim Muca, gin oneno ni del me tur nyim Muca tye apapara apapar, omio Muca dok te wumo tur nyime oko kede boŋo, naka waŋ ame en dok awot kop i Rwot." 
Exodus35:1 Muca ocoko jo Icrael luŋ, eka te kobbigi ni, “Man en gin ame Rwot ociko ni itim wunu." 
Exodus35:2 Ti wunu ticwu pi nino abicel, ento i nino me abiro mere, bed wunu kede cabit acil me weo mot baŋ Rwot. Dano ame bino tiyo ticcoro i nino-nono obino neko oko." 
Exodus35:3 Mom ibino wunu kuto mac i pacciwu luŋ i nino me cabit.” 
Exodus35:4 Muca dok te kobo baŋ lwak jo Icrael luŋ ni, “Gin ame Rwot ociko ene:" 
Exodus35:5 Raa wunu mot me amia baŋ Rwot i akinawu kun ŋat acel acel tero mottere baŋ Rwot i cuny aler: jabu, ryal kede mola," 
Exodus35:6 uci bululu bululu kede en amaramar, kede arema mere, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere aber; yer dyegi," 
Exodus35:7 kede lao nyogi rommi ame onyoŋo, lao dyegi; bao okuto alwi," 
Exodus35:8 moo me mac tara, gin a ŋwece kur me yiko moo wir kede pi odok a ŋwece kur me awaŋa;" 
Exodus35:9 gweŋe alilia me onik kede gweŋe ocele mege me amwona i kom jabu pi epod kede me icao kor. 
Exodus35:10 “Dok jo luŋ i akinawu ame ryek i tic, gin myero bin ti jami ducu ame Rwot ociko ni gin ti: myero gin oti kema," 
Exodus35:11 akemmere kede gi-wumo wie, akoddere, tere, ari mere, pagi mere kede acib tere;" 
Exodus35:12 canduk me cik kede ludi me tiŋo, kom me kica kede boŋo me icika mere;" 
Exodus35:13 meja kede ludi me tiŋo, kede jami ticcere luŋ kede ogati me aketa i nyim Rwot;" 
Exodus35:14 gi-cibo mac kede jami ticcere kede tara mere kede moo mere; 
Exodus35:15 keno lam me odok kede ludi me tiŋo, kede moo wir, kede odok a ŋwece kur kede cuka me geno doggola kema;" 
Exodus35:16 keno lam me yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa karacel kede keikei me mola kede ludi me tiŋo, kede jami me ticcere luŋ, kede tako lwok kede akwak tere;" 
Exodus35:17 cuka me aŋaba i dyekal, kede pagi mege kede acib tergi kede cuka me geŋo doggola me dyekal," 
Exodus35:18 teke me guro kema kede teke me dyekal kede tollege; 
Exodus35:19 boŋŋi aruka me tic ame okwoo abeco me tic i kabedo acil kede boŋŋi aruka acil pi alamdog Aron kede me awobe mere me ticgi me olamdog.” 
Exodus35:20 Jo Icrael luŋ te ya oko i nyim Muca. 
Exodus35:21 Ŋat acel acel te cako dwogo kede mottere ame en oyero kun daŋ ŋat acel acel bino ame cunye ler; gin te kelo motgi baŋ Rwot me tiyo kema me rwatte kede me ticcere luŋ, kede me boŋŋi aruka acil." 
Exodus35:22 Jo-nono te ciro co kede mon; jo luŋ obino ame cunygi ler kun okelo jarara, atem me yit, atem me ciŋ, kede mola ŋut ciŋ, kede kit jabu luŋ kun dano acel acel mio mot me jabu baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus35:23 Jo luŋ ame tye kede uci obedo bululu bululu onyo en amaramar onyo en arema, onyo boŋo camanini aber, onyo yer dyegi, onyo lao me nyogi rommi ame onyono, onyo lao dyegi, okelo luŋ baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus35:24 Ŋat ame romo kelo mot me ryal, onyo me mola, gin okelo te miyo me mot baŋ Rwot, kede jo luŋ ame tye kede bao me yat okuto alwi ame romo tiyo ticcoro keken, gin daŋ okelo." 
Exodus35:25 Mon ame ryek i tic ciŋ luŋ obedo wiyo uci i ciŋgi, ote kelo uci ame gin owio obedo bululu bululu, kede en amaramar, kede en arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere aber." 
Exodus35:26 Mon ame cunygi omito tic i ryekogi, owio yer dyegi." 
Exodus35:27 Otel wi lwak daŋ te kelo gweŋe alilia me onik kede en ocele mege me amwona i jabu, pi epod kede pi icao kor," 
Exodus35:28 kede gin a ŋwece kur, kede moo me mac tara, kede me moo wir, kede me odok a ŋwece kur." 
Exodus35:29 Jo Icrael luŋ, co kede mon okelo ginnoro me tiyo gin a rik Rwot ociko iye Muca ni ti, kun ŋat acel acel kelo gin ame yie omito baŋ Rwot." 
Exodus35:30 Muca te kobo baŋ jo Icrael ni, “Nen, Rwot otyeko lwoŋo nyiŋ Bejaleri wot a Uri, ame wot a Kur, me itekere a Juda." 
Exodus35:31 Dok daŋ otyeko miyo cuny Obaŋa opoŋ i yie, karacel kede ryeko me tic, kede niaŋ atut, kede ŋec, kede tic luŋ me diro," 
Exodus35:32 me roto callogo anyen me tic diro ame kwongi papat, ame otio i jabu, kede ryal, kede mola;" 
Exodus35:33 karacel kede ŋoŋolo gweŋe alilia me amwona kom jabu, kede ryeko me payo bao kede tiyo kit tic ocele luŋ me diro." 
Exodus35:34 Omie daŋ cuny me pwony, en karacel kede Okoliab wot a Akicamak, me itekere a Dan." 
Exodus35:35 En doŋ otyeko miyogi ryeko me tiyo kwone tic luŋ me diro, kede me roto callogo anyen me diro, kede me liliŋo boŋo i uci ame bululu bululu, kede en amaramar, kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere aber, kede me cweyo boŋo kede me tiyo kwone tic luŋ, kede roto callogo apapat ame otio i diro." 
Exodus36:1 “Bejaleri kede Okoliab kede jo aryek i tic, ame Rwot omiogi ryeko me tic kede niaŋ atut, me ŋeyo kede tiyo tic luŋ me kabedo acil, gin bino tiyo kun olubo kite a rik Rwot ociko.”" 
Exodus36:2 Muca te lwoŋo Bejaleri kede Okoab karacel kede jo luŋ ame ryek i tic, ame Rwot onwoŋo omio yigi opoŋ i ryeko me tic, jo luŋ ame cunygi omito bino i tic." 
Exodus36:3 Jo-nono te gamo mot luŋ ame jo Icrael omio me tic i kabedo acil, gin ogamo i baŋ Muca. Jo onwoŋo pwod tye amedde ameda me kelo motgi ame cunygi omito kun okelo didik odiko." 
Exodus36:4 Omio oryeko ame tiyo tic i kebado acil obino, kun ŋat acel acel oya i ticcere ame etio," 
Exodus36:5 Gin okobbi Muca ni, “Jo doŋ okelo mot adwoŋ meicel ame okato en onwoŋo mitte me tiyo tic a rik Rwot ocikowa ni oti,”" 
Exodus36:6 Mannono omio Muca te miyo rabo kop romo gony luŋ ni, “Ico onyo dako moro kur doŋ medde timo ginnoro me amia pi kabedo acil.” Eka jo mom dok te kelo;" 
Exodus36:7 pien ame onwoŋo okelo, onwoŋo doŋ oromo me tiyo tic luŋ te dok doŋ adoŋa." 
Exodus36:8 Oryeko me tic ame rik onwoŋo tye i akina otic te tiyo kema kede cuka tomon, kun otio i boŋo me camanini ame uci mere owio abeco, kede uci obedo bululu bululu, kede en amaramar, kede arema mere, kun daŋ odeo i cal okerubi ame oyiko i twon diro." 
Exodus36:9 Cuka acel acel borrere onwoŋo tye yadi apar wie aŋwen, eka laccere te bedo yadi aryo. Cuka-nono luŋ onwoŋo rorom." 
Exodus36:10 Oribo cuka abic karacel, kede abic ocele daŋ amannouo." 
Exodus36:11 Eka ote kwoyo waŋ jarara ame bululu bululu i agikki cuka me acel, ote dok kwoyo daŋ i agikki cuka me dul me aryo ame rom aroma i maca ocele ca." 
Exodus36:12 Dok ote kwoyo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka acel, dok ote daŋ kwoyo i dog cuk a acel ame tye i dul me aryo, kun waŋ jarara acel acel tikere awottere." 
Exodus36:13 Dok ote riyo agod jarara me jabu pyerabic, eka gin te ribo dog cuka kede agod jarara-nono, kema doŋ te bedo ame okubere karacel." 
Exodus36:14 Dok ote tiyo cuka me yer dyegi me wumo wi kema; gin otio kodi cukanono apar wie acel. 
Exodus36:15 Cuka acel acel onwoŋo borrere tye yadi apar wie abic, laccere yadi aryo kun gin apar wie acel luŋ ororom." 
Exodus36:16 Eka gin te noto cuka abic kengi karacel, kun abicel ocele ca daŋ onoto kengi pat." 
Exodus36:17 Ote kwoyo waŋ jarara pyerabic i agikki cuka me dul me acel, ote dok kwoyo daŋ i agikki cuka me dul me aryo mere." 
Exodus36:18 Dok ote tiyo agod jarara me mola pyerabic me ribo dog kema karacel, me bed ame okubere karacel." 
Exodus36:19 Dok ote kwoyo lao me nyogi rommi ame onyoŋo, kede lao dyegi, me wumo wi kema." 
Exodus36:20 Gin te dok tiyo bayi me okuto alwi ame ocuŋ atira me kema. 
Exodus36:21 Bao acel acel borrere onwoŋo tye futi apar wie abic, kun laccere tye futi aryo." 
Exodus36:22 Bao acel acel Onwoŋo tye i tere aryo me kubogi karacel. Bayi me kema ocuŋ atira-nono rik gin te tiyo kittono. 
Exodus36:23 Gin rik otiogi kit man: bayi me kema pyeraryo tuŋ cem. 
Exodus36:24 Dok ote tiyo tergi me ryal pyeraŋwen me kubo bao kema pyeraryo ca, tere aryo aryo tye pi bao kema acel acel." 
Exodus36:25 Dok ote tiyo me kema tuŋ ocele ca, me tuŋ cam, otio daŋ bao pyeraryo," 
Exodus36:26 kede tergi me ryal pyeraŋwen, kun tyene aryo aryo daŋ tye pi bao kema acel acel." 
Exodus36:27 Dok ote tiyo me kema, ame tye tuŋ to, otio bao kema abicel." 
Exodus36:28 Ote dok tiyo aryo me twok kema ame tye tuŋ ŋeye. 
Exodus36:29 Gin te poko akinagi i tuŋ pinnyere, cite ote noto doggi i tuŋ malo mere, kun onoto i kom atem me agege; gin otio aryo kittono pi twoke daŋ aryo." 
Exodus36:30 Bao kema ocuŋ atira rik Onwoŋo tye aboro, kede acib tergi daŋ ame otio i ryal. Acib tergi rik onwoŋo tye apar wie aryo, kun bao kema acel acel tye iye acib tere aryo." 
Exodus36:31 Dok ote daŋ tiyo arii me bao abic pi bayi me kema tuŋ cel, kun otio kede okuto alwi," 
Exodus36:32 kede arii bayi abic pi bayi me kema tuŋ ocele, kede dok arii bao abic me kema tuŋ neye, ame tye tuŋ to." 
Exodus36:33 Te dok tiyo arii bao me dyere ame ya i agikki tuŋ cel tuno i agikki tuŋ ocele, kun ŋolle i kor arii bao ame ocuŋ atira," 
Exodus36:34 Eka ote mwono kom bao kema tuŋ cel oko kede jabu, ote dok tiyo atem me jabu me rwako bao iye. Arii me bao daŋ omwono komgi oko i jabu." 
Exodus36:35 Dok ote kwoyo boŋo me icika ame uci mere bululu bululu, amaraamar kede arema me boŋo camanini me uci mere owio aber, kun daŋ odeo kede cal okerubi ame oyiko i twon diro." 
Exodus36:36 Eka ote tiyo pagi aŋwen me okuto alwi pire, ote mwono komgi oko i jabu, kun agodgi daŋ me jabu; ote liyo ryal tiyo acib tergi aŋwen." 
Exodus36:37 Dok ote tiyo cuka boŋo me geŋo dog kema kun otio i cuka ame uci mere bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema, dok uci cukanono daŋ owio abeco, ote daŋ deyo aber meicel." 
Exodus36:38 Dok ote tiyo pagi abic karacel kede agodgi, eka ote mwono wigi, kun otac wigi obedo me jabu, ento acib tergi abic obedo me mola." 
Exodus37:1 Bejaleri te payo canduk i bao oku to alwi, kun borrere tye futi aŋwen, laccere futi aryo kede borrere malo futi aryo." 
Exodus37:2 Te mwono ŋec kede yie oko i jabu ame olio aber, eka te dolo doge oko i jabu." 
Exodus37:3 Te tiyo atem me jabu aŋwen me twoke aŋwen luŋ; atem aryo pi tuŋ cel kede aryo tuŋ ocele. 
Exodus37:4 Dok ote tiyo daŋ ludi aryo me okuto alwi, ote daŋ mwono komgi oko i jabu," 
Exodus37:5 ote rwako ludi iyi atem luŋ ame tye i ŋet canduk, me tiŋo canduk." 
Exodus37:6 Dok te tiyo kom-me-kica kun tio i jabu ame olio aber; borrere futi aŋwen kede laccere futi aryo. 
Exodus37:7 Te dok tiyo okerubi aryo kun tio i jabu ame oteto anyul, te ketogi i agikki kom-me-kica ryoryo luŋ." 
Exodus37:8 Okerubi acel i agikki tuŋ cel kede acel ocele i agik ki tuŋ cel kun gin luŋ okubere i kom-me-kica, i agikki mere ryoryo luŋ," 
Exodus37:9 kun okerubi oyaro bwomgi malo i wie, owumo kom-me-kica i bwomgi, dok daŋ wan acel acel neno me awottere. Gin luŋ oneno kom-me-kica." 
Exodus37:10 Dok te tiyo meja kede bao okuto alwi; meja ame borrere tye futi adek, laccere futi acel kede nucu, eka borrere me malo te bedo futi aryo." 
Exodus37:11 Te mwono kome oko i jabu ame olio aber, eka te dolo daŋ laŋete luŋ kun mwono oko kede jabu." 
Exodus37:12 Eka te keto arii mere ame laccere rom aroma i cuny ciŋ, kun dolo daŋ lak arii luŋ i jabu." 
Exodus37:13 Te doŋ tiyo atem aŋwen me jabu pire, eka te mwono atem aŋwennono i twoke aŋwen luŋ i kom tyene aŋwen." 
Exodus37:14 Atem acel acel oketo ceggi arii me rwako lut tiŋo meja. 
Exodus37:15 Dok te tiyo ludi kede bao okuto alwi, te mwono komgi oko i jabu." 
Exodus37:16 Otio dok jami me aketa i wi meja kun tio i jabu ame olio aber; otio cani, tabbi me keto odok akur, weer, kede cupa me liyo mot amata." 
Exodus37:17 En dok te tiyo gi-cibo mac tara kun tio i jabu ame olio aber. Oteto tere kede bollere ateta kede nyonyo. Ikopo mere ame en wene kede ature luŋ okubere kede karacel. 
Exodus37:18 Otio jaŋe abicel kun oryeye i ŋete luŋ, adek tuŋ cel kede adek tuŋ cel." 
Exodus37:19 I kom jaŋe tuŋ cel otio iye ikopo adek ame calo tur yao, kun acel acel tye kede ature kede wene. I kom jaŋe tuŋ ocele daŋ otio iye ikopo adek ame calo tur yao, kun acel acel daŋ tye ature kede wene. Jaŋe abicel ame oryeye i ŋet gi-cibo maccono onwoŋo obedo kittono." 
Exodus37:20 Eka i kom gi-cibo tara ikokome ote tiyo iye ikopo aŋwen ame calo tur yao, kun tye i wengi kede turgi," 
Exodus37:21 kede wene ame okubere i kom gi-cibo tara, i te jaŋe abicel ame oryeyo oromo ŋete tuŋi i tuŋi." 
Exodus37:22 Wengi kede jaŋgi okubere karacel, kun kome luŋ me jabu olio aber eka ote teto kede anyul." 
Exodus37:23 Icennere doŋ te tiyo tara kany wie aryo pire, kede makaccere, kede cani mere kun tiogi luŋ i jabu ame olio aber" 
Exodus37:24 Gi-cibo tara kede jami me ticcere luŋ en otio kede jabu ame olio aber ame pekkere romo ratili mia acel. 
Exodus37:25 Dok te tiyo keno me waŋo odok akur kun tio i okuto alwi; borrere futi acel i nucu, laccere daŋ futi acel i nucu kun twoke aŋwen luŋ rorom. Borrere me malo tye futi adek kun tye i tuŋ aŋwen ame okubere kede karacel." 
Exodus37:26 Kome ducu omwono oko i jabu ame olio aber; wie kede laŋete kede tuŋe luŋ odolo oko eka ote dolo doge oko i jabu. 
Exodus37:27 Otio daŋ atem me jabu aryo, ote keto i te doge ame odolo-ni, kun atem acel acel otikere kede awottere, me rwako lut me tiŋo." 
Exodus37:28 Eka ote tiyo ludi i bao okuto alwi, ote mwono komgi oko i jabu." 
Exodus37:29 Eka ote tiyo moo acil me wir, kede odok a ŋwece kur ame olio daŋ aber, kun orubo kite ame orubo kede gin a ŋwece kur." 
Exodus38:1 Dok te tiyo keno lam me yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa kun tio i bao me okuto alwi; borrere futi abiro kede nucu, laccere futi abiro kede nucu, ame twoke aŋwen luŋ rorom, borrere me malo te bedo futi aŋwen kede nucu." 
Exodus38:2 Otio tuŋ aŋwen i twoke aŋwen luŋ, kun tuŋŋono luŋ okubere karacel kede, dok daŋ omwono komgi oko i mola." 
Exodus38:3 Te tiyo daŋ jami me keno me lam luŋ: tako, atok buru, becan, acob riŋo kede weer me waŋo mac. Jami ticcono luŋ otio kede mola." 
Exodus38:4 Te yiko daŋ keikei me keno lam; ame bwo mola okakado, te keto buto i kore i te arii mere." 
Exodus38:5 Eka te twako mola tiyo atem aŋwen me keikei mola ca, me rwako ludi me tiŋo." 
Exodus38:6 Te tiyo ludi kede bao okuto alwi, te mwono komgi oko i mola." 
Exodus38:7 Te rwako tol donyo iyi atem ame tye i ŋet keno me lam, wek bed me tiŋo. Otio ame yie twolo kun otio i bao." 
Exodus38:8 Dok te tiyo tako me mola kede akwak tere me mola, kun tio kede dabaraŋ mon ame tio tic i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Exodus38:9 Te yiko dyekal me kema. Oŋabo cuka me camanini ame uci mere owio abeco i dyekal tuŋ anyarolum borrere onwoŋo tye yadi pyerabic," 
Exodus38:10 Pagigi onwoŋo tye pyeraryo kede acib tergi daŋ pyeraryo, kun gin luŋ otio i mola. Ento agod pagi kede otac wigi otio kede ryal." 
Exodus38:11 Me tuŋ anyarodi daŋ ote tiyo amannono; otio cuka ame borrere romo yadi pyerabic, kede pagi mere kede acib tergi daŋ pyeraryo ame daŋ otio i mola. Ento pagigi kede otac wigi otio daŋ me ryal." 
Exodus38:12 Eka i ŋete tuŋ to ote ŋabo iye boŋo ame borrere tye yadi pyeraryo wie abic, pagi mere tye apar, kede acib tergi daŋ apar. Agod me pagi kede otac wigi otio kede ryal." 
Exodus38:13 Aco tuŋ nyime ame tye tuŋ kide ote ŋabo iye cuka ame laccere tye yadi pyeraryo wie abic. 
Exodus38:14 Boŋo ame oŋabo i ŋet doggola tuŋ cel onwoŋo tye yadi abiro kede nucu, kun tye i pagi adek kede acib tergi daŋ adek." 
Exodus38:15 Ŋete tuŋ ocele daŋ onwoŋo otio amannono, i ŋet dog paco tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi oŋabo iye cuka ame romo yadi abiro kede nucu, kun tye i pagi adek kede acib tergi daŋ adek." 
Exodus38:16 Cuka luŋ ame oŋabo i ŋet paco onwoŋo me camanini owio uci mere abeco. 
Exodus38:17 Acib pagi luŋ onwoŋo otio kede mola, cite agod pagi kede otac wigi onwoŋo me ryal, kun daŋ omwono wigi i ryal, karacel i pagi luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i dyekal oketo otac me ryal i wigi." 
Exodus38:18 Cuka me geŋo yo ame donyo i dyekal rik odeo kome aber kede uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema kun boŋo-nono me camanini ame owio uci mere abeco. Borrere onwoŋo tye yadi apar, eka borrere me malo te bedo futi abiro kede nucu, ame rom aroma i cuka me aŋaba i dyekal." 
Exodus38:19 Pagi onwoŋo tye aŋwen kede acib tergi daŋ aŋwen ame otio i mola, cite agodgi me ryal, kun wigi omwono oko i ryal, kun otac wigi daŋ me ryal." 
Exodus38:20 Teke me guro kema luŋ kede teke ame omano dyekal luŋ onwoŋo otio i mola. 
Exodus38:21 Jami ame otio i kema wellere ene, ame kema me kop me caden, kite a rik okwanogi kede i kare a Muca ociko, pi tic a jo Levi kun adwoŋ ticgi rik Itamar ame obedo wot a Aron ame alamdog." 
Exodus38:22 Bejaleri wot a Uri ame wotta Kur, me itekere a Juda, rik otio jami luŋ ame Rwot ociko baŋ Muca." 
Exodus38:23 En rik tye karacel kede Okoliab wot Akicamak, me itekere a Dan, lo ame onwoŋo adiro, ame roto kite me tic anyen, dok obedo ŋat a deo jami kede uci bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco." 
Exodus38:24 Jabu luŋ ame rik otio kede pi kabedo acil, kede jabu luŋ ame rik oya i mot ame omio, pekkere rik oromo talanta pyeraryo wie aboŋwen, kede cekel mia abiro kede pyeradek, kun onwoŋo opimo i cekel me kabedo acil." 
Exodus38:25 Aco ryal ame oya ibaŋ lwak rik okwano ote nwoŋo pekkere romo talanta mia acel kede cekel tutumia acel, kede mia abiro, kede pyerabiro wie abic, kun daŋ nwoŋo opimo i cekel me kabedo acil." 
Exodus38:26 Dano acel acel onwoŋo okelo beka acel (mano en nucu cekel me kabedo acil), mano pi dano acel acel ame rik onwoŋo okwano, cakere i kom jo ame mwakagi me dito tye pyeraryo, dok kede malo. Jo tutumia mia abicel kede adek, kede mia abic kede pyerabic." 
Exodus38:27 Talanta mia acel me ryal onwoŋo obedo me twako acib pagi me kabedo acil, kede acib pagi me boŋo icika; acib tergi ame romo mia acel oya i kom talanta mia acel, talanta acel pi acib pagi acel acel." 
Exodus38:28 Eka cekel tutumia acel kede mia abiro i pyerabiro wie abic, ote tiyo kede agod pagi luŋ, kun omwono daŋ i wigi ducu, eka ote tiyo daŋ otac wigi." 
Exodus38:29 Mola ame omio onwoŋo oromo talanta pyerabiro kede cekel tutumia aryo kede mia aŋwen. 
Exodus38:30 Mannono otio kede acib pagi me doggola kema me rwatte, kede keno lam me mola, kede keikei me mola, kede jami luŋ me tic i keno lam," 
Exodus38:31 kede acib pagi ame omano dyekal, kede acib pagi me dog paco me dyekal, karacel i teke me guro kema kede en omano dyekal." 
Exodus39:1 Gin te kwoyo daŋ boŋŋi me aruka abeco kun okwoo kede uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar, kede arema, me tic i kabedo acil; okwoo boŋŋi acil pi Aron kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:2 Otio daŋ epod kun tio i jabu kede uci ame obedo bululu bululu, amaramar kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco." 
Exodus39:3 Eka ote papado jabu arep kun odidino anyul, ote liro acalli tol me deyo boŋo karacel kede uci bululu bululu, amaramar, kede arema, me camanini owio uci mere abeco, kun daŋ otio i twon tic me diro." 
Exodus39:4 Ote daŋ kwoyo gin me wi gwok epod, kubo i doge ryoryo." 
Exodus39:5 Lati mere me tweyo ote cweyo i diro, kun okwoo i kit jami acellono, kede kodi tic acellono daŋ. Otio i jabu, uci obedo bululu bululu, amaramar, kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame uci mere owio abeco, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:6 Gin dok te yiko gweŋe alilia me onik, ote mwomwono i kom jabu ame oŋweŋweko i diro kun doŋ onwoŋo ogogoro nyiŋ awobe Icrael i komgi kite ame adiro goro kede kom kidi." 
Exodus39:7 Eka ote mwomwonogi i kom gin me wi gwok epod, me bed kiddi me poyo awobe Icrael, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:8 Dok te tiyo icao me kor kun tio daŋ i tic me diro, acalli en a tye i kom epod. Otio kede jabu, uci bululu bululu, amaramar, kede en arema, kede boŋo camanini boŋo camanini ame uci mere owio aber." 
Exodus39:9 Twoke onwoŋo tye aŋwen arorom, kun odolo kor i cao-nono aryo; borrere kede laccere te bedo arommi lac ciŋ ame oryeo, ka doŋ odolo yie." 
Exodus39:10 Eka ote mwomwono iye gweŋe alilia ame oryeo i yore aŋwen. I yore me agege omwono iye cadiuc, topaj kede kabankel." 
Exodus39:11 I yore me aryo mere ote mwono iye emeradi, capir kede dayaman." 
Exodus39:12 Eka i yore me adekkere, ote mwono iye jacint, agat kede ameticito." 
Exodus39:13 I yore me aŋwennere ote mwono iye berul, onik, kede jacipa. Gin luŋ omwomwonogi kede jabu ame oŋweŋweko kede diro." 
Exodus39:14 Gweŋe alilianono onwoŋo tye apar wie aryo, ame oporo nyiŋ awobe Icrael, ocalli i kidi ame ogoro me atem, kun kidi acel acel ogoro iye nyiŋ ame rom aroma atekere apar wie aryo." 
Exodus39:15 Dok ote tiyo nyor, kun otio i jabu ame olio aber, omino bala tol." 
Exodus39:16 Dok ote tiyo gi-kwako tere aryo, kun daŋ otio i jabu ame oŋweŋweko i diro, kede atem me jabu aryo, eka ote kwoyo atem aryo-nono i dog icao kor aryo daŋ." 
Exodus39:17 Eka dok ote rwako tol jabu aryo-nu donyo i atem aryo ame tye i dog icao kor. 
Exodus39:18 Dog tol aryo-nono ote mwono luŋ i kom akwak tere aryo ame oŋweŋweko i diro ca, ote tweyo kede i kom gin me wi gwok epod." 
Exodus39:19 Dok ote tiyo atem aryo me jabu, ote kwoyo i twok icao kor aryo ducu, i doge ame tye tuŋ yie ame ceggi kede epod." 
Exodus39:20 Dok ote timo atem aryo me jabu, ote kubogi i gin me wi gwok epod aryo aryo i tergi tuŋ nyim, kan ame okubere malo i wi lati me epod ame ocweo i diro ca." 
Exodus39:21 Eka ote tweyo icao kor kede atemmere i kom atem ame tye i dog tol a bululu bululu, me but pyelle i kom lati me epod ame ocweo i diro ca, me wek icao kor kur gony oko i kom epod, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:22 Dok ote tiyo jor me epod ame ocweo kome ducu kede uci a bululu bululu," 
Exodus39:23 ote tuco bedo bala me ŋut boŋo me aruka, kun odolo ŋute luŋ me kur yeci." 
Exodus39:24 Eka lak jor i piny ote luluŋo iye gin ame cal i okwer ame okwoo kede uci bululu bululu, amaramar, kede arema, kede boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco," 
Exodus39:25 Dok ote tiyo olaŋ jabu ame olio aber, ote kwoyo olan kun ocuculo i akina okwer, ame omano lak jor luŋ," 
Exodus39:26 kun oculle acula i lak jor aruka me tic, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:27 Dok ote tiyo kanyi ame ocweo i boŋo camanini aber, kede pali me boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere abeco pi Aron kede awobe mere," 
Exodus39:28 kede itambara me adwala i wic me boŋo camanini aber, kede tok atitino mere me boŋo camanini, kede pali me boŋo camanini ame owio uci mere aber," 
Exodus39:29 kede itambara me tweyo pyer me boŋe camanini owio uci mere abeco, kede uci bululu bululu, kede en amaramar kede arema, ame odeo aber meicel, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:30 Dok ote tiyo akwaa jabu me tok kwogo acil, kun otio i jabu ame olio acil, eka ote goro kome agora kite ame ogoro kede i kom atem me ciŋ, ni, “Okwero obedo acil pi Rwot.”" 
Exodus39:31 Eka ote tweyo tol a bululu bululu i kome me rid kede i kom itambara adwala i wic, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus39:32 Rik gin doŋ onwoŋo otyeko tiyo kema oko, ame en kema me rwatte, gin rik otyeko ticcere kittono. Jo Icrael otyeko tic luŋ kite a Rwot ociko kede Muca; gin otio luŋ kittono." 
Exodus39:33 Okelo kema baŋ Muca, kema kede jami me ticcere luŋ; okelo akod me bayi mere atira, kede arii mere, pagi mere, kede acib tergi;" 
Exodus39:34 lao nyogi rommi ame onyoŋo, kede lao dyegi ame okwoo me wumo wi kema, kede boŋo ici ka me geŋo kema;" 
Exodus39:35 kede canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye, kede ludi me tiŋo, kede kom-me-kica," 
Exodus39:36 kede meja karacel i jami me ticcere luŋ, kede ogati me aketa i nyim Obaŋa," 
Exodus39:37 kede gi-cibo tara me jabu olio aber, kede tara mere, kun oketo tara malo i wie karacel i jami tici g luŋ, kede moo tara;" 
Exodus39:38 kede keno lam me jabu, kede moo wir, kede odok a ŋwece kur, kede boŋo me wumo doggola kema;" 
Exodus39:39 kede keno lam me mola, kede keikei mere me mola, kede ludi me tiŋo, karacel i jami ticcere luŋ, kede tako lwok karacel akwak tere;" 
Exodus39:40 boŋo cuka ame oŋabo guro dyekal, pagi karacel acib tergi, kede boŋo geŋo dog dyekal, kede toli kede teke daŋ apipim me guro, karacel i jami me tic i kema me rwatte;" 
Exodus39:41 boŋŋi aruka ame otio abeco me tic i kabedo acil, boŋŋi aruka acil me aruka alamdog Aron karacel kede boŋŋi aruka pi awobe mere, me ticgi me olamdog," 
Exodus39:42 Kite a rik Rwot ociko i Muca, jo Icrael otio ticgi luŋ kittono ikome." 
Exodus39:43 Muca te neno jami luŋ ame otio, nen, ticcere onwoŋo tic ikokome; kite a rik Rwot ociko ikome, tic luŋ otiye kakare. Muca doŋ te lamo winyo i komgi." 
Exodus40:1 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Exodus40:2 “Cak guro kema i dwe me agege ame en kema me rwatte," 
Exodus40:3 Ket canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye i yie, eka ite ŋabo boŋo me icika me wumo canduk." 
Exodus40:4 Ter doŋ meja iye, ite cano jami luŋ iye yore i yore, dok ite kelo gicibo tara, cibo tara i wie." 
Exodus40:5 Ket dok keno me lam me waŋo odok akur, ame otio i jabu, ket i nyim canduk ame kop me caden bedo iye, eka ite nabo boŋo me geŋ dog kema." 
Exodus40:6 Ibino keto keno lam me waŋo mot oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa i nyim kema, ame en kema me rwatte." 
Exodus40:7 Ket tako me lwok cuŋ i akina kema me rwatte kede keno me lam, eka ite onyo pii i yie." 
Exodus40:8 Ŋab dok cuka me dyekal malo ogur dyekal dyere, eka ite ŋabo cuka me geŋo dog dyekal." 
Exodus40:9 Kwany moo wir, wir meja kede jami luŋ ame tye iye kun ikwero meja-nono kede jami mere luŋ me bed acil." 
Exodus40:10 Wir daŋ dok keno me lam me mot awaŋa, wir kede moo, karacel kede jami me ticcere luŋ. Kwer keno me lam oko, bino doko acil meicel." 
Exodus40:11 Wir moo daŋ i kom tako lwok kede akwak tere, eka ite kwerogi." 
Exodus40:12 Kel doŋ Aron kede awobe mere i doggola me kema me rwatte, eka ite lwokogi kede pii." 
Exodus40:13 Ruk Aron kede rukkere acil, eka ite wire kede moo me kwere me tiyo ticca me alamdog." 
Exodus40:14 Kel dok awobe mere, rukgi kede kanyigi," 
Exodus40:15 wirgi kede moo kite ame iwiro kede papagi me gin ti ticca me olamdog. Wirogi kede moo bino miyo gin bedo olamdog atwal naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ.” 
Exodus40:16 Muca te timo kite a rik Rwot ocike kede-nono, otimo jami luŋ kittono ikome." 
Exodus40:17 I dwe me agege, me mwaka me aryo, i nino dwe acel, en ame oguro iye kema." 
Exodus40:18 Muca oguro kema, oryeo acib tere, te cibo iye yen, eka te rwako arii iye, te tiŋo malo," 
Exodus40:19 Eka te dok peto boŋo i wi kema, te keto awum kema i wie, kite a rik Rwot ocike kede." 
Exodus40:20 Dok te tero kop me caden keto iyi canduk, te rwako ludi i kor canduk, te keto kom-me-kica i wi canduk," 
Exodus40:21 te tero canduk doŋ i kema. Oŋabo boŋo me icika malo te geŋo kede kom canduk ame kop caden bedo iye oko, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus40:22 Dok te keto meja i kema me rwatte tuŋ cem, kun mio bedo i oko i ŋe boŋo icika ame ogeŋo canduk." 
Exodus40:23 Te doŋ cano ogati i nyim Rwot kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca. 
Exodus40:24 Dok te keto gi-cibo tara i kema me rwatte tuŋ cam, kun otikere i meja," 
Exodus40:25 te cibo tara i wie malo i nyim Rwot, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus40:26 Dok te keto keno lam me jabu i kema me rwatte, i nyim boŋo me icika," 
Exodus40:27 te waŋo odok a ŋwece kur i wie, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus40:28 Dok te ŋabo boŋo me geŋo dog kema. 
Exodus40:29 Eka dok te keto keno lam me waŋo mot awaŋa aceggi i doggola me kema me rwatte, te cako miyo iye mot awaŋa kede me moko kwon, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Exodus40:30 Dok te keto tako lwok i akina kema me rwatte kede keno me lam, te onyo iye pii me lwok;" 
Exodus40:31 kannono en ame Muca kede Aron kede awobe mere olwoko iye tyengi. 
Exodus40:32 Gin doŋ te wot i kema me rwatte, ote daŋ noko doŋ keno me lam, ote lwokere i kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca," 
Exodus40:33 Oguro dyekal me kema kede keno me lam, te ŋabo boŋo me geŋo dog dyekal. Muca te tyeko ticcere kakare kittono." 
Exodus40:34 Icennere pol te bino wumo wi kema me rwatte oko, kwogo a Rwot te poŋ oko i kema." 
Exodus40:35 Muca onwoŋo doŋ mom romo donyo i kema me rwatte, pien pol onwoŋo owumo oko, dok kwogo a Rwot onwoŋo opoŋ yi kema oko." 
Exodus40:36 I kare me wotgi luŋ, ka pol owarre oko i wi kema, eka jo Icrael te cako wotgi anyim." 
Exodus40:37 Aco ka pol mom owarre oko, gin daŋ mom medde i wotgi anyim; gin kuro naka i nino ame pol owarre iye i wi kema." 
Exodus40:38 I kare me wotgi luŋ, pol a Rwot wumo wi kema dyeceŋ kede mac bedo iye dyewor. Man luŋ obedo timere kun jo Icrael luŋ neno." 
Leviticus1:1 Rwot rik olwoŋo Muca te kop kede i kema me rwatte, okobo ni," 
Leviticus1:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, ‘Ka dano moro i akinawu kela limmere akwo me amia baŋ Rwot, ibino kela wunu motwunono kun ikwanyo wunu i akina dok onyo i akina romi kede dyegi.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Ka ce mottere-nono obedo mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa ame okwanyo i akina dok, en bino miyo twon ame roccoro mom i kome; en bino kela i doggola kema me rwatte, me wek Rwot ogame;" 
Leviticus1:4 en dano-nono bino keto ciŋe i wi mot awaŋa, eka ote gamo pire, me kwanyo ballere." 
Leviticus1:5 Icennere, en bino neko twonnono i nyim Rwot, eka awobe Aron, ame gin olamdog, gin bino kelo remo-nono, ote cocoro romo kom keno lam luŋ ame tye i doggola kessssma me rwatte," 
Leviticus1:6 Dano-nono bino yaŋo mot awaŋa mere-nono, te ŋoŋolo dul i dul." 
Leviticus1:7 Awobe Aron ame gin olamdog, bino kuto mac i wi keno lam, ote cano yen i maccono i yore yore;" 
Leviticus1:8 awobe Aron ame gin olamdog, bino cano riŋo ame oŋoŋolo dul i dul ca, kede wie kede dwollege i wi yen ame tye i mac i keno lam, kun ketogi i yore i yore;" 
Leviticus1:9 ento amontennege kede tyene luŋ wonnere bino lwoko kede pii, alamdog te waŋo oko luŋ i keno lam, me bed mot awaŋa alutu me yalo Obaŋa, mot ame owaŋo kede mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus1:10 “Ka ce mottere me awaŋa-nono okwanyo i akina rommi onyo dyegi en bino miyo nyok ame roccoro mom i kome. 
Leviticus1:11 Bino neko i tuŋ anyarodi me keno lam, eka awobe Aron, ame gin olamdog te cocoro remo mere romo kor keno lam luŋ." 
Leviticus1:12 Dano-nono bino ŋoŋolo i dul i dul karacel kede wie kede dwollege, alamdog te cano i keno lam kun ketogi i yore i yore," 
Leviticus1:13 ento amontennege kede tyene luŋ wonnere bino lwoko kede pii, alamdog te miyo luŋ kun waŋo i keno lam Mano en mot awaŋa alutu me yalo Obaŋa, mot awaŋa i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus1:14 “Ka ce mottere ame emio baŋ Rwot tono obedo winnyi me mot awaŋa, en myero kel amam onyo itino awele me mottere." 
Leviticus1:15 Alamdog bino kelo i keno me lam te mojo ŋute oko, te waŋo i wi keno lam; bino dwidwinyo remo mere cwer i ŋet keno lam." 
Leviticus1:16 En dok bino kwanyo cukuru mere karacel kede yeye, te oonyogi i ŋet keno lam tuŋ kide, kan ame oonyo iye buru." 
Leviticus1:17 En bino yeco winyo-nono i bwome, cite myero kur pok yie, eka alamdog te waŋo oko i keno lam, kun waŋo i wi yen ame tye i mac. Mano en mot awaŋa alutu me yalo Obaŋa, mot awaŋa i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:1 “Ka ŋattoro okelo mot me moko kwon me yalo Rwot, mottere myero bed moko kwon apwottere. En bino onyo moo iye, dok te keto iye odok luban," 
Leviticus2:2 te kela baŋ awobe Aron, ame gin olamdog. Dano acel i akinagi bino juko moko kwon apwot kede moo poŋ ciŋe, karacel odok lubannere luŋ; alamdog bino waŋo man i wi keno lam, wek obed me po i kome, mot me awaŋa i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:3 Gin ame odoŋ i kom moko kwon me yalo Obaŋa bino bedo me Aron kede awobe mere; mano en dul acil meicel i kom mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot. 
Leviticus2:4 “Ka ikelo wunu mot me yalo Obaŋa, me moko kwon ame otedo i keno myero bed capat a tobi mom iye, me moko kwon apwottere ame orubo i moo, onyo me capat areppere a tobi mom iye, ame owiro moo i komgi." 
Leviticus2:5 Dok ka motti obedo me moko kwon ame otedo i tako nyonyo, myero bed me moko kwon apwottere a tobi mom iye, ame orubo kede moo;" 
Leviticus2:6 yin ibino nyinyilo atitino eka ite onyo moo iye; mano me mot me moko kwon. 
Leviticus2:7 Dok ka motti obedo me moko kwon otedo i cupuria, ibino tedo i moko kwon apwottere karacel kede moo." 
Leviticus2:8 Ibino kela mot me moko kwon ame otedo kede jami-nono baŋ Rwot; ka doŋ omio oko baŋ alamdog, alamdog bino kela i keno lam." 
Leviticus2:9 Alamdog bino kwanyo moko kwon me po iye, te waŋo i wi keno lam, me mot awaŋa i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:10 Gin ame odoŋ i kom moko kwon me yalo Obaŋa bino bedo me Aron kede awobe mere; mano en dul acil meicel i kom mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot. 
Leviticus2:11 “Mot me moko kwon ame okelo baŋ Rwot, myero mom ted i tobi, pien mom ibino wunu waŋo tobi onyo moo kic me mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus2:12 Aco ka obedo mot me cam ogeo cek i wi mwaka, itwero wunu kelo baŋ Rwot, cite mom myero migi i wi keno lam me bedo gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny." 
Leviticus2:13 Ibino keto kado i motti me moko kwon luŋ; mom ibino miyo kado me cikere Obaŋani rwenyo i motti me moko kwon; motti luŋ ame ibino miyo, ibino miyo karacel i kado." 
Leviticus2:14 “Ka ce imio mot me moko kwon me cam me wi mwaka baŋ Rwot, ibino miyo wit kal anyen ame oodo, ote celo i mac, obed mot me moko kwon me cam me wi mwaka." 
Leviticus2:15 Ibino keto moo iye, kun daŋ iketo iye odok luban; mano en mot me moko kwon." 
Leviticus2:16 Alamdog bino kwanyo kallogo ame oodo, kede moo karacel kede odok lubanner luŋ, te waŋo me po i kome; mano en mot awaŋa i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus3:1 “Ka mot a dano amiyo me yalo Obaŋa obedo mot aŋola me kweyo cuny, ka ce en amiyo mot ame okwanyo i akina dok, twon onyo minne, en bino miyo i nyim Rwot kun roccoro mom i kome." 
Leviticus3:2 Dano-nono bino keto ciŋe i wi mottere-nono, te neko i doggola kema me rwatte; awobe Aron, ame gin olamdog, bino cocoro re mo mere romo kor keno lam luŋ." 
Leviticus3:3 I kom mot aŋola me kweyo cuny, en bino miyo me bed mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot; dwol luŋ ame owumo amonten kede dwol luŋ ame tye i kom amonten," 
Leviticus3:4 kede aŋaluru aryo kede dwol luŋ a tye i pyere, kede okene ame tye i kom emany, en bino kwanyo oko karacel kede aŋaluru aryo." 
Leviticus3:5 Awobe Aron te waŋogi i wi keno lam i kom mot awaŋa ame nwoŋo tye i wi yen i kom mac. Mano en mot awaŋa i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus3:6 “Ka ce mottere me yalo Rwot me kweyo cuny obedo lee ame okwanyo i akina romi, nyok onyo akale en bino miyo ame roccoro mom i kome." 
Leviticus3:7 Ka ce en amiyo atin romo acalo en bino miyo i nyim Rwot. 
Leviticus3:8 En te keto ciŋe i wi mottere, te neko oko i nyim kema me rwatte; awobe Aron te cocoro remo mere romo kor keno lam luŋ." 
Leviticus3:9 Eka i kom mot aŋola me kweyo cuny, en bino miyo jami magi me bed mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot: dwollege kede moo yibe luŋ, ame oŋolo aceggi kede cogo me oguro ŋee, kede dwol luŋ ame owumo amonten kede dwol luŋ ame tye i kom amonten," 
Leviticus3:10 kede aŋaluru aryo kede dwol luŋ a tye i pyere, kede okene ame tye i kom emany ame en bino kwanyo oko karacel kede aŋaluru aryo," 
Leviticus3:11 Alamdog te waŋo i wi keno lam me bed cam ame omio i mac baŋ Rwot. 
Leviticus3:12 “Ka ce mottere me yalo Obaŋa obedo dyel, en bino miyo i nyim Rwot," 
Leviticus3:13 eka te keto ciŋe i wie, te neko oko i nyim kema me rwatte; awobe Aron te cocoro remo mere romo kor keno me lam luŋ." 
Leviticus3:14 Dano-nono bino miyo moro iye me mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot, dwol luŋ ame owumo amonten kede dwol luŋ ame tye i kom amonten," 
Leviticus3:15 kede aŋalura aryo luŋ, kede dwol luŋ a tye i pyere, kede okene a tye i kom emany ame en bino kwanyo oko karacel aŋalura aryo." 
Leviticus3:16 Alamdog te waŋo i wi keno lam, me bed cam ame omio i mac ame ŋwece kur. Dwol luŋ obedo me a Rwot." 
Leviticus3:17 Man bino bedo cik atwal, i tuno i kare ikwaewu luŋ, mom ibino camo wunu dwolo onyo remo.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus4:2 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, Ka ce dano moro obalo, kun mom obalo me akaka i kom ginnoro ame Rwot rik ociko ni myero kur tim, ka ce en otimo moro i akinagi," 
Leviticus4:3 ka ce alamdog ame owiro kede moo en obalo, te kelo bal i wi lwak luŋ pi ballere ame en obalo-nono, myero en yal Rwot kede atin twon etobayit ame roccoro mom i kome, me bed mot me bal." 
Leviticus4:4 Alamdoggono bino kelo twon i doggola kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot, eka te keto ciŋe i wi twonnono, te neko twonnono i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus4:5 Alamdog ame owiro kede moo bino jolo remo twonnono mogo te kelo i kema me rwatte; 
Leviticus4:6 alamdog te luto nyako ciŋe i remo, te totono remo-nono mogo i nyim Rwot tyen kany wie aryo i nyim boŋo icika me kabedo acil." 
Leviticus4:7 Alamdog dok te bino totono remo-nono mogo i kom tuŋ aŋwen ame tye i keno waŋo odok akur, ame tye i kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot. Remo twon odoŋŋere luŋ, en bino onyo i te keno lam me mot awaŋa, ame tye i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus4:8 En bino wawaro dwol luŋ i kom twon ame omio pi bal, dwol ame owumo amonten, kede dwol luŋ ame tye i kom amonten," 
Leviticus4:9 kede aŋalura aryo kede dwol luŋ ame tye i pyere, kede okene ame tye i kom emany ame bino kwanyo oko karacel kede aŋalura aryo," 
Leviticus4:10 kite ame okwanyo kede i kom twon ame oŋolo me mot me kweyo cuny; alamdog bino waŋo i wi keno me mot awaŋa. 
Leviticus4:11 Ento pyen me twonnono kede riŋo mere luŋ, karacel kede wie kede tyene luŋ kede amontennere, kede wee iye," 
Leviticus4:12 en bino tero luŋ teŋe i ŋe gony, kan acil, kan ame oonyo iye buru, te waŋo kuno i mac me yen. Obino waŋo kan ame oonyo iye buru." 
Leviticus4:13 “Ka ce lwak jo Icrael luŋ otimo bal, kun nwoŋo gin otio ginnoro ame Rwot rik ociko ni kur tim, kun mom obalo me akaka, dok lwak jo luŋ mom oŋeo ginnono;" 
Leviticus4:14 kare ame gin doŋ oŋeo balgi, lwak bino yalo Obaŋa kede atin twon etobayit me mot me bal, gin bino kelo i nyim kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus4:15 Odoŋe a lwak bino keto ciŋgi i wi twonnono i nyim Rwot, eka daŋ ote neko twonnono i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus4:16 Alamdog ame owiro kede moo bino tero remo twonnono mogo i kema me rwatte. 
Leviticus4:17 Alamdog te luto nyako ciŋe i remo, te totono remo-nono mogo i nyim Rwot tyen abiro i nyim boŋo icika." 
Leviticus4:18 Alamdog dok bino totono remo-nono mogo i kom tuŋ aŋwen ame tye i keno lam, ame tye i kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot. Remo twon odoŋŋere luŋ en bino onyo i te keno lam me mot awaŋa, ame tye i doggola ke ma me rwatte." 
Leviticus4:19 En bino wawaro dwol luŋ i kome te waŋo i wi keno lam. 
Leviticus4:20 En bino timo twonnono kittono; kite ame etimo kede i kom twon me yalo Obaŋa pi bal, bino timo daŋ kittono i kom man; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal pirgi, Rwot daŋ bino weko balgi." 
Leviticus4:21 En doŋ bino tero twonnono i ŋe gony, te waŋo kuno kite ame owaŋo kede twon me agege ca; mano en mot me bal a lwak." 
Leviticus4:22 “Aco ka aloccoro en obalo i ginnoro acel i kom ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋa mere ociko ni kur tim, kun mom obalo me akaka;" 
Leviticus4:23 ka ce ŋattoro omie eŋeo bal ame ebalo-nono, en bino kelo nyok dyel a roccoro mom i kome me bed mottere me yalo Obaŋa," 
Leviticus4:24 En bino keto ciŋe i wi dyellono, te neko kan ame oneko iye mot awaŋa i nyim Rwot; man en mot me bal." 
Leviticus4:25 Alamdog bino gweto remo me mot ballono i nyako ciŋe, te totono i kom tuŋ aŋwen ame tye i keno lam me mot awaŋa te onyo remo ame odoŋŋere luŋ i te keno lam me mot awaŋa." 
Leviticus4:26 Dwollege luŋ obino waŋo i wi keno lam kite ame owaŋo kede dwol me mot aŋola me kweyo cuny; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus4:27 “Ka dano moro keken i akina jo obalo, ce otio ginnoro acel ame Rwot rik ociko ni kur tim, kun mom obalo me akaka;" 
Leviticus4:28 ka ce ŋattoro omie eŋeo bal ame en obalo-nono, en bino kelo akale dyel a roccoro mom i kome me bed mottere me yalo Obaŋa pi ballere ame etimo," 
Leviticus4:29 en bino keto ciŋe i wi mot me bal, te neko kan ame oneko iye mot awaŋa." 
Leviticus4:30 Alamdog bino gweto remo mere mogo kede nyako ciŋe, te totono i tuŋ aŋwen ame tye i keno lam me mot awaŋa, te onyo en odoŋŋere luŋ i te keno lam." 
Leviticus4:31 En bino wawaro dwollege luŋ kite ame owawaro kede dwol i mot aŋola me kweyo cuny; alamdog te waŋo i wi keno lam me bed gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny RWOT; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus4:32 “Aco ka ce en okelo atin romo me mottere me yalo Obaŋa pi mot me bal, en bino kelo akale romo a roccoro mom i kome." 
Leviticus4:33 En bino keto ciŋe i wi mot me bal, te neko kan ame oneko iye mot awaŋa." 
Leviticus4:34 Alamdog bino gweto remo mogo kede nyako ciŋe i kom mot me ballono, te totono i tun aŋwen ame tye i keno lam me mot awaŋa, te onyo remo odoŋŋere luŋ i te keno lam." 
Leviticus4:35 En bino wawaro dwollege luŋ kite ame owawaro kede dwol me atin romo ame omio me mot aŋola me kweyo cuny; alamdog te waŋo i keno lam, i kom mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome pi bal ame en otimo, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus5:1 “Ka ce dano moro obalo i yore magi: ka ce en owinyo alama ame olamo i kom lwak ni jo myero mi caden, kun en daŋ caden ame oneno onyo oniaŋ koppere, eka mom te tuco, ballere bino dok i wie." 
Leviticus5:2 Onyo ka dano moro ogudo gina me cik ogeŋo, kadi mom lee tim oto, onyo kom lee me paco ame cik ogeŋo, onyo kom ginnoro ame nya corre i lobo ame cik ogeŋo, kun mom oŋeo, ame en te doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo, en nwoŋo oroco." 
Leviticus5:3 Onyo ka ogudo ginnoro ame cik ogeŋo i kom dano, kadi bed kodi ŋo-nono ame nwoŋo cik ogeŋo ame mio dano doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo, kun en gire mom oŋeo, ka doŋ oniaŋ iye, en nwoŋo oroco." 
Leviticus5:4 Onyo ka ŋattoro oruye kwoŋo kwoŋŋoro kun mom koŋ otamo tere, pi timo gin arac onyo aber, kite kwoŋŋere-nono, ka en doŋ oniaŋ iye, en nwoŋo oroco, ka ce en otimo moro acel i akina magi." 
Leviticus5:5 Ka ŋattoro otimo bal i akina magi, myero en tuc bal ame etimo-nono oko," 
Leviticus5:6 en te kelo mottere me walakino i roc baŋ Rwot pi ballere ame etimo. Bino kelo akale romo onyo akale dyel, me bed mottere me bal; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal a dano-nono i keme." 
Leviticus5:7 “Ento ka en acan a mom twero nwoŋo romo, en bino kelo baŋ Rwot amam aryo onyo itino awele aryo me mottere me walakino i roc pi ballere ame en otimo; acel bino bedo mot me bal, eka en ocele te bedo mot me awaŋa." 
Leviticus5:8 En bino kelogi luŋ baŋ alamdog, alamdog bino geyo yalo Rwot i mot me bal. En bino mojoro ŋute oko, cite mom bino ŋuno wie;" 
Leviticus5:9 en bino totono remo mogo me mot me balloro i ŋet keno lam; remo odoŋŋere luŋ en bino dwidwinyo oko kun mio cwer i te keno lam; mano en mot me bal. 
Leviticus5:10 Icennere alamdog bino yalo Rwot i me aryo mere me mot awaŋa kun waŋo kite ame ociko; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal a dano-nono, pi ballere ame en otimo, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus5:11 “Ento ka en acan a mom twero nwoŋo amam aryo onyo itino awele aryo, en bino kelo moko kwon apwottere gwata acel me yalo Rwot pi ballere ame etimo, me bed mot me bal; en mom bino onyo moo moro iye, kur daŋ ket iye odok luban, pien mano en mot me bal." 
Leviticus5:12 En bino kelo baŋ alamdog; eka alamdog te juko poŋ ciŋe acel te waŋo me po i kome i keno lam i kom mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot; mano en mot me bal. 
Leviticus5:13 Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal a danonono i kome kittono pi balloro ame en otimo i akina magi, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere. Moko odoŋŋere bino bedo me olamdog, kite ame timere kede i mot me moko kwon.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus5:15 “Ka ce dano moro obwolo Rwot, mom omio ginnoro acil ame myero mi baŋe, kun mom obalo me akaka, en bino kelo baŋ Rwot nyok a roccoro mom i kome ame okwanyo i akina rommi me bed mottere me walakino i roc, ame wellere yin iŋolo i cekel me ryal kun ilubo kit cekel ame otio kede i kabedo acil; mano en mot me walakino i roc." 
Leviticus5:16 En myero daŋ cul waŋ gin ame en obalo i kom jami acil, kun medo iye acel me abic, eka te miyo baŋ alamdog. Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome i nyok romo me walakino i roc, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus5:17 “Ka dano moro obalo kun otio ginnoro acel ame Rwot rik ociko ni kur tim, kadi bed mom oŋeo, nwoŋo en oroco, ballere bino dok gire i wie." 
Leviticus5:18 En bino kelo nyok a roccoro mom i kome baŋ alamdog, nyok ame en okwanyo i akina rommi, ame wellere yin iŋolo, i wel a mot me walakino i roc. Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome, pi bal ame en opoto iye, kun mom otimo me akaka, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus5:19 Mano en mot me walakino i roc; en nwoŋo oroco i nyim Rwot.” 
Leviticus6:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus6:2 “Ka ce dano moro otimo bal me abwole i nyim Rwot, kun obwolo awottere i ginnoro a rikokano baŋe, onyo ojeŋo baŋe, onyo ka omao jami mere onyo oburo awottere," 
Leviticus6:3 onyo onwoŋo ginnoro ame orwenyo eka te kobo goba iye, kun kwoŋo kwoŋ me goba i kom ginnoro keken ame jo tio, te timo bal iye;" 
Leviticus6:4 ka ŋattoro obalo eka te niaŋ ni eroco, en bino dwoko gin ame onwoŋo emao-nono, onyo gin ame onwoŋo ereboro kede ebure-nono, onyo gin ame onwoŋo okano baŋenono, onyo gin ame orwenyo en te nwoŋo-nono," 
Leviticus6:5 onyo gin ame en okwoŋo iye kwoŋ me goba-nono; myero en dwok i berrere, dok daŋ bino medo iye acel me abic, eka te miyo baŋ wonnere i nino ame en mio iye mottere me walakino i roc." 
Leviticus6:6 En bino kelo baŋ Rwot mottere me walakino i roc kun kelo baŋ alamdog nyok ame roccoro mom i kome ame okwanyo i akina rommi, ame yin iŋolo wellere i wel a mot me walakino i roc." 
Leviticus6:7 Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome i nyim Rwot, Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere i ginnoro ame dano twero tiyo eka te niaŋ ni eroco.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus6:9 “Cik Aron kede awobe mere ni, Man cik a mako mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa. Mot awaŋa bino ri i keno lam dyewor benebene tuno naka odiko, kun mac lyel iye nakanaka." 
Leviticus6:10 Alamdog bino ruko rukkere me boŋo camanini, te daŋ ruko pali mere me camanini i pyere, eka te jobo buru ame mac owaŋo i mot awaŋa i wi keno lam, te keto i ŋet keno lam." 
Leviticus6:11 En te gonyo rukkere-nono oko, te ruko ruk ocele, te tero buru-nono naka i ŋe gony i kakannoro acil." 
Leviticus6:12 Mac ame tye i wi keno lam myero mi lyel nakanaka, kur to oko. Alamdog bino waŋo iye yen nino luŋ odiko, dok daŋ bino cano iye mot awaŋa i yore i yore, te waŋo dwol me mot me kweyo cuny i wie." 
Leviticus6:13 Mac ame tye i wi keno lam myero mi medde lyel nakanaka; kur to oko. 
Leviticus6:14 “Man en cik a mako moko kwon me yalo Obaŋa. Awobe Aron en a bino miyo i nyim Rwot, i nyim keno lam." 
Leviticus6:15 Ŋat acel i akinagi bino juko moko kwon apwottere kede moo poŋ ciŋe acel kun juko i kom mot me moko kwon, karacel kede odok lubannere luŋ ame tye i kom mot me moko kwon, te waŋo i wi keno lam, me obed me po i kome, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cunyn Rwot." 
Leviticus6:16 En odoŋŋere luŋ Aron kede awobe mere bino camo; obino camo kun tobi mom iye i kakannoro acil; gin bino camo i dyekal me kema me rwatte. 
Leviticus6:17 Myero kur ted kede tobi. Atyeko doŋ miyogi acalo dulgi i kom motta ame owaŋo kede mac; mano en gin acil meicel, rom aroma i mot me bal kede mot me walakino i roc," 
Leviticus6:18 Ikwae Aron luŋ ame co twero camo, acalo cik ame bino ri atwal, i tuno i kare ikwaewu luŋ, i kom mot owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot; ŋattoro keken ogudo bino doko acil.”" 
Leviticus6:19 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus6:20 “Man en mot ame Aron kede awobe mere bino miyo baŋ Rwot i nino ame obino wire iye kede moo: gwata moko kwon acel me moko kwon apwottere, myero obed mot me moko kwon me yalo Obaŋa kare ducu, kun nucu mere omio odiko kede nucu mere otyeno." 
Leviticus6:21 Obino tedo kede moo i tako nyonyo; ibino kelo kun nwoŋo doŋ orubo oko aber, ame daŋ doŋ oŋiŋido oko atitino bala mot me moko kwon, eka i te yalo Obaŋa, me bed gin a ŋwece kur me yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus6:22 Alamdog ame obino kwero me leyo kaka Aron, ame nwoŋo oya i akina itino mere, bino yalo kede Rwot acalo cik ame bino ri atwal; obino waŋo luŋ i berrere." 
Leviticus6:23 Mot me moko kwon ame alamdog yalo kede Obaŋa, myero waŋ luŋ i berrere; mom myero cam kadi acel.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus6:25 “Kob baŋ Aron kede awobe mere ni, Man en cik a mako mot me bal me yalo Obaŋa. Kan ame oneko iye mot me awaŋa, en ame daŋ obino neko iye mot me bal i nyim Rwot; mano en gin acil meicel." 
Leviticus6:26 Alamdog ame omio mot me bal, en ame bino camo; obino camo kakannoro acil i dyekal me kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus6:27 Ginnoro keken ame bino gudo riŋo mere, bino doko acil; ka ce remo mere moro okir i kom ruk, myero lwok boŋo ameremo okir iye-nono i kakannoro acil." 
Leviticus6:28 Gulu lobo ame otedo kede myero nekoko, aco ka otedo weer me mola, myero rud kome aruda ote lako kede pii." 
Leviticus6:29 Co luŋ ame gin olamdog twero camo; mano en gin acil meicel. 
Leviticus6:30 Ento myero kur cam mot me bal ka ce remo mere moro otero i kema me rwatte pi tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kabedo acil; myero waŋ awaŋa i mac. 
Leviticus7:1 “Man en cik a mako mot yalo Obaŋa pi walakino i roc. Mano en gin acil meicel; 
Leviticus7:2 Kan ame oneko iye mot awaŋa, en ame daŋ obino neko iye mot me walakino i roc; ote cocoro remo mere romo kor keno me lam luŋ." 
Leviticus7:3 Dwollege luŋ obino yalo Obaŋa, moo yibe, dwol luŋ ame owumo amonten," 
Leviticus7:4 kede aŋalura aryo luŋ, kede dwol luŋ ame tye i pyere, kede okene ame tye i kom emany ame obino kwanyo oko karacel aŋaluru aryo." 
Leviticus7:5 Alamdog te waŋogi luŋ i keno me lam me mot ame omio kede mac baŋ Rwot; mano en mot me walakino i roc," 
Leviticus7:6 Co luŋ ame gin olamdog twero camo; gin bino camo kakannoro acil; mano en gin acil meicel. 
Leviticus7:7 Mot me walakino i roc rom aroma i mot me bal, cikgi tye acel; alamdog ame otio kedgi tic me kwanyo bal, en ame bino tero." 
Leviticus7:8 Dok daŋ alamdog ame omio mot awaŋa a ŋattoro, en a daŋ bino tero pyen me mot awaŋa ame en omio-nono." 
Leviticus7:9 Mot me moko kwon luŋ ame otedo i keno kede en ocele mere luŋ ame otedo i cupuria onyo i tako nyonyo bino bedo me alamdog ame omio-nono. 
Leviticus7:10 Mot me moko kwon luŋ, ame orubo kede moo, kede en a mom orubo bino bedo me awobe Aron luŋ: ŋat man bino tero ame rom aroma i me awottere." 
Leviticus7:11 “Man en cik a mako mot yalo Obaŋa me kweyo cuny ame dano moro twero miyo baŋ Rwot. 
Leviticus7:12 Ka ce en amiyo me pwoc, en myero mi capat karacel i mot me pwoc, capat a tobi mom iye ame orubo kede moo, capat arep a tobi mom iye ame oweo moo i komgi, kede dok capat me moko kwon apwottere a tobi mom iye ame orubo aber kede moo." 
Leviticus7:13 Ka en yalo Obaŋa i mottere me kweyo cuny me miyo pwoc, en myero med iye mottere me capat a tobi mom iye." 
Leviticus7:14 Doŋ i kodi ennono, en bino miyo capat acel i kom mot acel acel me mot me yalo Rwot; mano bino bedo me alamdog ame ococoro remo me mot me kweyo cuny." 
Leviticus7:15 Riŋo me gin oŋolo me mottere me kweyo cuny pi miyo pwoc myero cam oko i nino ame omio iye-nono; myero kur wek moro iye doŋ naka tuno odiko. 
Leviticus7:16 Ento ka gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa-nono obedo mot me cobo kwoŋ onyo mottoro me ber a yic, obino camo i nino ame en oŋolo iye gi-yalo Obaŋa-nono, eka en odoŋŋere ote camo orwo mere." 
Leviticus7:17 Ento riŋo odoŋ i kom gin oŋolo-nono naka i nino me adekkere, myero doŋ waŋ awaŋa i mac," 
Leviticus7:18 Aco ka ocamo riŋo odoŋ i kom gin oŋolo-nono i nino me adekkere, mom obino pwoyo ŋat omio, dok daŋ mom obino kwano ni en omio ginnoro. Bino bedo gin me kwer, ŋat ame ocamo ballere bino bedo i wie." 
Leviticus7:19 “Riŋo ame ogudo ginnoro ame cik ogeŋo, myero kur cam; obino waŋo awaŋa kede mac. Jo ame cikkoro mom ogeŋo twero camo riŋo;" 
Leviticus7:20 ento ka ŋattoro ocamo riŋo me gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa me mot me kweyo cuny Rwot, kun ginnoro a cik ogeŋo tye i kome, dano-nono obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Leviticus7:21 Dok ka ŋattoro ogudo ginnoro ame cik ogeŋo, kadi dano a tye i ginnoro i kome ame mio cik geŋe onyo lee moro ame cik ogeŋo, onyo kadi ginnoro me kwer ame cik ogeŋo, eka te camo riŋo me gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa me mot me kweyo cuny, dano-nono obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus7:23 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, Myero kur icam wunu kit dwolo moro luŋ, kadi me twon, onyo me romo, onyo me dyel." 
Leviticus7:24 Dwolo lee oto kene kede dwolo ame lee tim omwodo, otwero tic kede i yore moro keken, cite myero kur cam kadi acel." 
Leviticus7:25 Pien ŋattoro keken ame bino camo dwolo lee me mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Leviticus7:26 Dok daŋ kur icam wunu remo ginnoro kakannoro keken ame ibedo wunu iye, kadi bed me winyo onyo me lee." 
Leviticus7:27 Ŋattoro keken ame bino camo kit remo moro, danonono obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus7:29 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, ŋat ame omio gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa me mottere me kweyo cuny, en bino kelo mottere baŋ Rwot. I kom gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa me mottere me kweyo cuny," 
Leviticus7:30 en bino kelo gire kede ciŋe mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot. En bino kelo dwollege kede ogok, me yok ogokkono me mot ayoka i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus7:31 Alamdog bino waŋo dwollono i wi keno lam, ento ogok bino bedo me Aron kede awobe mere." 
Leviticus7:32 Amuru mere me tuŋ cem ibino miyo baŋ alamdog me bed mottere ame oya i gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa me mot me kweyo cuny; 
Leviticus7:33 ŋat ame omio remo kede dwolo me mot me kweyo cuny i akina awobe Aron, bino tero amuru me tuŋ cem obed iner mere." 
Leviticus7:34 Pien ogok ame oyoko kede amuru atyeko doŋ miyo oko me mot alamdog kun ya i kom mot a jo Icrael me kweyo cuny ame gin oŋolo me yalo Obaŋa. 
Leviticus7:35 Mano doŋ enere ame tye pi Aron kede awobe mere, ame jo Icrael bino miyogi kare ducu. Man en iner ame tye pi Aron kede awobe mere ame oya i kom mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot. Rikokwero me bedo megi i nino ame rikokelogi baŋ Rwot me gin oti tic me olamdog baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus7:36 Rwot rik onwoŋo ociko i nino ame rik owirogi i moo, ni jo Icrael myero migi man; man bino bedo enere ame gin bino camo nakanaka, tuno naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ.”" 
Leviticus7:37 Man en cik a mako mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa, mot moko kwon, mot me bal, mot me walakino i roc, mot me keto alamdog i dog tic, kede mot me kweyo cuny," 
Leviticus7:38 ame rik Rwot onwoŋo ociko baŋ Muca i wi kidi me Cinai, i nino a rik ociko iye jo Icrael ni kel motgi baŋ Rwot, i tim me Cinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus8:2 “Ter Aron kede awobe mere, kede boŋŋi me arukagi, kede moo wir, kede twon me aŋola me mot me bal, kede nyogi romi aryo, kede dita ame tye iye ogati a tobi mom iye;" 
Leviticus8:3 eka i te coko jo luŋ karacel i doggola ke ma me rwatte.” 
Leviticus8:4 Muca daŋ te timo kite ame Rwot ocike kede; ocoko lwak luŋ i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Leviticus8:5 Muca te kobo baŋ lwak ni, “Man en gin ame Rwot ociko ni myero tim.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Muca te kelo Aron kede awobe mere, te lwoko komgi kede pii." 
Leviticus8:7 Eka te rwako kanyi i kom Aron, te tweyo pyere kede itambara me tweyo pyer, te dok ruke kede jor, te daŋ keto epod i kome, otweo pyere kede lati me epod ame otoko kede diro, te tweyo, lido kede i kome." 
Leviticus8:8 Te keto cao kor i kome, te daŋ keto Urim kede Tumim iyi cao kor." 
Leviticus8:9 Odwalo itambara i wie, eka te dok tweyo akwaa jabu i kom itambara me wic i tuŋ nyime, me bed tok kwogo acil, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus8:10 Muca te kwanyo moo wir, te wiro i kema kede jami luŋ ame tye iye, te kwerogi." 
Leviticus8:11 Okikiro moo mogo i kom keno lam tyen abiro, te wiro keno lam karacel kede jami me ticcere luŋ kede moo, karacel kede tako lwokere kede akwak tere, me kwerogi." 
Leviticus8:12 Oonyo moo wir anok i wi Aron, te wire me kwere." 
Leviticus8:13 Muca dok te kelo awobe Aron aryo, te rukogi kede kanyi, otweo pyergi kede itambara me tweyo pyer, orwako tok atitino i wigi, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus8:14 Icennere doŋ te kelo twon me yalo Obaŋa pi bal, eka Aron kede awobe mere te keto ciŋgi i wi twonnono me yalo Obaŋa pi bal." 
Leviticus8:15 Muca te neko oko, te jolo remo, gweto kede nyako ciŋe te totono romo tuŋ keno lam aŋwen luŋ, te lonyo keno lam, eka te onyo remo i te keno lam me kwero pi kwanyo bal i kome." 
Leviticus8:16 Muca dok te wawaro dwol luŋ i kom amonten, kede i kom okene ame tye i kom emany kede aŋaluru, kede dwol luŋ, te waŋogi luŋ i wi keno lam." 
Leviticus8:17 Ento riŋo twonnono kede pyennere kede wee ame tye i yie, en owaŋo awaŋa kede mac teŋe i ŋe gony, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus8:18 Icennere a doŋ man otum, okelo nyok romo me yalo Obaŋa me mot awaŋa; Aron kede awobe mere te keto ciŋgi i wi nyok romo-nono." 
Leviticus8:19 Muca te neko oko, te cocoro remo mere romo kor keno lam luŋ." 
Leviticus8:20 Kare a doŋ otyeko ŋoŋolo riŋo romo-nono dul i dul, Muca te waŋo oko karacel kede wie, kede dwollege." 
Leviticus8:21 Amontennere kede tyene ducu ote lwoko kede pii, Muca te waŋo nyok romo-nono luŋ i berrere i wi keno lam, me bed mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny, en mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus8:22 Icennere doki Muca te kela nyok romo ocele, nyok romo me keto dano i dog tic; Aron kede awobe mere te keto ciŋgi i wi nyok romo-nono." 
Leviticus8:23 Muca te neko oko, te gweto remo mere mogo cwicwinyo i yit Aron me tuŋ cem kede i twon ciŋe me tuŋ cam, kede daŋ i twon tyene me tuŋ cem." 
Leviticus8:24 Eka ote kelo awobe Aron, Muca te gweto remo romo mogo, te cwicwinyo i yitgi me tuŋ cem kede twon ciŋgi me tuŋ cem, kede i twon tyengi me tuŋ cem Muca te cocoro remo mere romo kor keno i lam luŋ." 
Leviticus8:25 Muca te kwanyo dwollege, moo yibe kede dwol luŋ i kom amonten, kede okene ame tye i kom emany, kede aŋaluru aryo luŋ, karacel kede dwolgi, kede amuru mere me tuŋ cem;" 
Leviticus8:26 te kwanyo capat acel a tobi mom iye iyi dita me ogati a tobi mom iye ame onwoŋo tye i nyim Rwot, kede capat acel me ogati oweo moo i kome, kede dok capat acel areppere; te ketogi i wi dwol kede i wi amuru me tuŋ cem." 
Leviticus8:27 Muca te keto magi-nono i cuny ciŋ Aron kede i cuny ciŋ awobe mere, te yokogi me bedo mot ayoka i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus8:28 Icennere en te kwanyogi oko i ciŋgi, te waŋo i wi keno lam karacel i mot awaŋa, me bed mot me keto dano i dog tic, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny, ame en mot owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus8:29 Muca te kwanyo ogok, te yoko, me bed mot ayo ka i nyim Rwot; Mano en enere ame Muca camo, ame oya i kom nyok romo me ketogi i dog tic, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus8:30 Muca te kwanyo moo wir kede remo mogo i wi keno lam te kikiro i kom Aron kede i kom rukere, kede i kom awobe mere kede rukgi; Muca te kwero Aron kede rukere, kede awobe mere kede rukgi kittono, gin te doko acil." 
Leviticus8:31 Muca te kobbi Aron kede awobe mere ni, “Ted wunu riŋo i doggola kema me rwatte, ite camo wunu kuno, karacel kede ogati ame tye iyi dita me mot ketowu i dog tic, kite a rik aciko kede kun akobo ni, ‘Aron kede awobe mere en a myero cam.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Riŋo kede ogati ame odoŋ myero waŋ awaŋa kede mac. 
Leviticus8:33 Kur iwot wunu oko i doggola kema me rwatte pi nino abiro, tuno ka kare me ketowu i dog tic ocobe re kakare, pien ketowu i dog tic bino tero nino kany wie aryo." 
Leviticus8:34 Kite ame obedo tiyo kede tin, yam Rwot onwoŋo ociko ni myero tim me kwanyo bal i komwu." 
Leviticus8:35 Wun ibino bedo wunu i doggola kema me rwatte dyeceŋ kede dyewor naka tyeko nino kany wie aryo, kun ilubo wunu gin ame Rwot ociko; me kur i to wunu, pien ocika kittono.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Aron kede awobe mere te tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot rik ociko kun kobo baŋ Muca. 
Leviticus9:1 I nino me aboro mere Muca olwoŋo Aron kede awobe mere karacel kede odoŋe a jo Icrael," 
Leviticus9:2 eka te kobo baŋ Aron ni, “Kel atin twon etobayit me yalo Obaŋa me mot me bal, kede nyok romo me mot awaŋa, gin luŋ roccoro myero bed mom i komgi, kelgi i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus9:3 Dok daŋ kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, ‘Kel wunu nyok dyel me yalo Obaŋa me mot me bal karacel kede atin twon etobayit kede atin romo me mot awaŋa, gin aryo luŋ myero mwaka me ditogi bed acel acel, kun roccoro daŋ mom i komgi." 
Leviticus9:4 Kel wunu daŋ twon kede nyok romo me mot kweyo cuny, gin luŋ me aŋola i nyim Rwot, kede mot me moko kwon ame orubo kede moo; pien Rwot bino nen baŋwu tin.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Gin daŋ te kelo gin a Muca ociko i nyim kema me rwatte; lwak luŋ te noko aceggi, te cuŋ i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus9:6 Muca te kobo ni, “Man en gin ame Rwot ociko ni myero tim, eka kwogo a Rwot te nen baŋwu.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Muca dok te kobbi Aron ni, “Nok keno lam aceggi, me iyal Obaŋa i mot me bal meri, kede motti me awaŋa, i te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i komi kede i kom lwak. Yal daŋ Obaŋa i mot a lwak, ti tic me kwanyo bal i komgi kite a rik Rwot ociko kede.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aron te noko keno lam aceggi, te neko atin twon me mot me bal ame onwoŋo tye pire en i kome." 
Leviticus9:9 Awobe Aron te miyo remo baŋe, en te luto nyako ciŋe i remo, te totono i tuŋe ame tye i keno lam, eka te onyo remo i te keno lam," 
Leviticus9:10 Cite dwollege kede aŋaluru aryo kede okene ame tye i kom emany ame onwoŋo okwanyo i mot oŋolo me bal, en owaŋo oko i wi keno lam, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus9:11 Riŋo mere kede pyennere en owaŋo awaŋa kede mac teŋe i ŋe gony. 
Leviticus9:12 En dok te neko mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa, awobe mere te miyo remo baŋe, en te cocoro romo kor keno lam luŋ." 
Leviticus9:13 Awobe mere te doŋ miyo mot awaŋa baŋe, kun omie dul i dul, karacel kede wie en te waŋogi i wi keno lam." 
Leviticus9:14 Eka te lwoko amontennere kede tyene luŋ, te waŋogi karacel i mot awaŋa i wi keno lam." 
Leviticus9:15 Kare ame man otum, en dok te miyo mot a lwak. Okelo dyel ame rik tye pi lwak me yalo Obaŋa pi bal, te neko yalo Obaŋa pi bal, bala mot bal me agege," 
Leviticus9:16 Eka dok te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa kun lubo cik. 
Leviticus9:17 Dok te yalo Obaŋa i mot me moko kwon, ojuko poŋ ciŋe, te waŋo i wi keno lam kun medo i kom mot awaŋa me odiko." 
Leviticus9:18 Dok te neko twon kede nyok romo daŋ, ame gin obedo mot aŋola me kweyo cuny ame rik tye pi lwak. Awobe mere te miyo remo baŋe, en te cocoro romo kor keno lam luŋ," 
Leviticus9:19 Dok ote miye dwol me twon kede me romo, kede moo yibe, kede dwol ame owumo amonten kede aŋaluru aryo, kede okene ame tye i kom emany." 
Leviticus9:20 Gin te keto dwollono i wi ogok twon kede me romo, eka ote waŋo dwollono i wi keno lam," 
Leviticus9:21 Ento ogok kede amuru mere me tuŋ cem Aron oyoko me bedo mot ayoka i nyim Rwot, kite a Muca ociko." 
Leviticus9:22 Aron dok te tino ciŋe malo tuŋ kun a lwak tye iye, te lammigi winyo; en doŋ te dwogo piny i ka yalo Obaŋa i mot me bal kede mot awaŋa kede mot luŋ me kweyo cuny."
