Leviticus9:23 Muca kede Aron te doŋ donyo i kema me rwatte; kare ame gin odonyo oko, gin olamo winyo i kom lwak, eka kwogo a Rwot te nen baŋ jo luŋ." 
Leviticus9:24 Mac te ya i nyim Rwot, te bino waŋo mot awaŋa kede dwol luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i wi keno lam, te tyeko oko luŋ. Kare ame lwak luŋ oneno, gin owo, ote oonyere piny i nyime." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadab kede Abiku, awobe Aron ŋat acel acel okwanyo tabo mere me waŋo odok akur, te keto iye mac, te daŋ keto iye odok akur, eka ote waŋo i mac i nyim Rwot kun owaŋo i mac a rik mom ocikogi me tic kede." 
Leviticus10:2 Mac te ya i nyim Rwot, te waŋogi oko, gin te to oko i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus10:3 Muca te kobbi Aron ni, “Man en gin ame Rwot okobo, ni, ‘Abino nyutte kena i akina jo ame ceggi keda ni acil, dok daŋ abino mito ni gin ket kwogo i koma i nyim lwak ducu.’ ” Aron te liŋ gire mol." 
Leviticus10:4 Muca te lwoŋo Micael kede Elijapan, awobe a Ujiel ame obedo omin papa Aron, te kobo baŋgi ni, “Nyiggo wunu ceggi, tin omegowu oko i nyim kabedo acil, tergi wunu oko i ŋe gony.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Gin te nyiggo, ote tiŋogi kede kanyigi, terogi oko i ŋe gony, kite ame Muca okobo." 
Leviticus10:6 Muca te kobbi Aron kede awobe mere Eleajar kede Itamar ni, “Kur igony yer wiwu iwek wunu ony iyak, kur daŋ iyec wunu rukwu, me kur ito wunu, dok me akemo a Rwot kur kat i kom lwak luŋ. Ento omegowu ame gin luŋ me ot Icrael twero kok pi mac ame Rwot owaŋogi kede." 
Leviticus10:7 Kur ikat wunu oko i doggola kema me rwatte, me kur ito wunu; pien moo wir a Rwot tye i komwu.” Gin daŋ te tiyo kite ame Muca okobo." 
Leviticus10:8 Rwot te kobbi Aron ni," 
Leviticus10:9 “Yin, akadi awobeni ame tye kedi, myero kur imat wunu koŋo olok onyo kit mattoro ocele ame mero jo i kare ame iwot wunu i ke ma me rwatte, me kur ito wunu; mano bino bedo cik atwal naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ." 
Leviticus10:10 Myero iŋe poko wunu jami acil kede jami ocele, kede kin jami ame cik ogeŋo kede jami a cik oye." 
Leviticus10:11 Dok daŋ ibino pwonyo wunu jo Icrael cik luŋ ame Rwot ociko kun kobo baŋ Muca.” 
Leviticus10:12 Muca te kobbi Aron kede awobe mere a rik odoŋ: Eleajar kede Itamar ni, “Kwany wunu moko kwon me yalo Obaŋa ame odoŋ i kom mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, icam wunu i ŋet keno lam kun mom orubo i tobi, pien mano en gin acil meicel." 
Leviticus10:13 Cam wunu i kakannoro acil, pien mano en gin a myero yin icam kede gin a myero awobeni cam i kom mot ame owaŋo me yalo Rwot; pien rik ocika kittono." 
Leviticus10:14 Ento ogokkere ame oyoko kede amuru atyeko doŋ miyo oko me mot olamdog ame oya i kom mot me kweyo cuny ame jo Icrael oyalo kede Obaŋa. Mano itwero wunu camo kakannoro acil, yin karacel kede awobeni kede anyirani, pien mano obedo iner ame myero yin icam kede iner ame awobeni myero cam." 
Leviticus10:15 Amuru ame amio olamdog kede ogokkere ame oyoko me kweyo cuny myero kelgi karacel kede mot awaŋa i mac, ame obedo dwollege, me ayoka i nyim Rwot, eka te bedo megi karacel kede me awobeni; mano en iner ame myero migi kare ducu kite a Rwot rik ociko kede.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Muca te penyo pi dyel me yalo Obaŋa pi bal kun penyo momot, en te nwoŋo ni doŋ owaŋo oko! Akemo te mako Muca atek i kom Eleajar kede Itamar, awobe Aron ame rik onwoŋo odoŋ, te kobo ni," 
Leviticus10:17 “Piŋo kara mom icamo wunu gin oŋolo oyalo Obaŋa pi bal i kabedo acil? Pien mano en gin acil meicel ame omiowu, me itiŋ wunu bal a lwak, me tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i komgi i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus10:18 Koŋ inen remo mere mom doŋ otero i kabedo acil. Rik onwoŋo myero icam wunu i kabedo acil, kite a rik ociko kede.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aron te gamo dog Muca ni, “Nen ba, tin doŋ gin oyalo Obaŋa i motgi me bal kede motgi me awaŋa i nyim Rwot; kadi amano, gin acalo man opoto i koma. Kono ce onwoŋo tin acamomot me bal, kono Rwot opwoa.”" 
Leviticus10:20 Kare ame Muca owinyo, yie doŋ te kwe." 
Leviticus11:1 Rwot okobbi Muca kede Aron ni," 
Leviticus11:2 “Kobbi wunu jo Icrael ni, Magi en gin ame tye kede kwo ame ibino wunu camo i kom leyi luŋ ame tye i wi lobo." 
Leviticus11:3 Leyi luŋ ame lwet tyengi okaro aryo, kun akina tyengi okaro aryo, dok daŋ omedo nyamo cem a koŋ omwonyo oko i yigi, ame tye i akina leyi, itwero camo wunu." 
Leviticus11:4 Kadi amanno, i akina leyi ame medo nyamo cem a koŋ omwonyo oko i yigi, onyo ame lwet tyengi okaro aryo, myero kur icam wunu magi: Inaga, pien kadi bed medo nyamo cem a koŋ omwonyo, cite lwet tyene mom okaro aryo, mano cik mom oyewu camo." 
Leviticus11:5 Anyeri daŋ, en daŋ medo nyamo cem a koŋ omwonyo, cite lwet tyene mom okaro aryo, mano daŋ cik mom oyewu camo." 
Leviticus11:6 Apwoo daŋ, en daŋ kadi medo nyamo cem a koŋ omwonyo, cite lwet tyene mom okaro aryo, mano daŋ cik mom oyewu camo." 
Leviticus11:7 Puno daŋ, kadi bed lyet tyene mom okaro aryo kun akina tyene okaro aryo, mom medo nyamo cem a koŋ omwonyo, mano daŋ cik mom oyewu camo." 
Leviticus11:8 Kur icam wunu rinogi, kur daŋ igud wunu komgi ka ce oto, cik mom oyewu gudo." 
Leviticus11:9 “I kom gin akwo luŋ a bedo i pii ibino wunu camo magi: Itwero wunu camo gin i pii luŋ ame tye kede icikigir kede pok komgi, en a tye i nam kede en a tye i kulo." 
Leviticus11:10 Ento gin luŋ ame tye i nam kede i kulo ame mom tye kede icikigir kede pok komgi, i akina gin ame corre nya i pii, kede i akina gin akwo a bedo i pii, gin luŋ obedo me kwer baŋwu." 
Leviticus11:11 Gin bino bedo me kwer baŋwu nakanaka; mom ibino wunu camo riŋogi, dok daŋ komgi oto obedo me kwer baŋwu." 
Leviticus11:12 Ginnoro luŋ ame tye i pii ame mom tye kede icikigir kede pok komgi, obedo me kwer baŋwu." 
Leviticus11:13 “I akina winy, gin ame bino bedo me kwer baŋwu ame mom ibino wunu camo, gin ene ame bino bedo me kwer: cur, acut, ekokom," 
Leviticus11:14 ogole, ocecu kede eponegi luŋ," 
Leviticus11:15 kite agak luŋ kede eponegi," 
Leviticus11:16 udo, ojoro, jigijigijur olwit kede kite epone mere luŋ," 
Leviticus11:17 tula, alwinyalwiny, adyeladyel." 
Leviticus11:18 Okumbere, etolo, ewuma," 
Leviticus11:19 araptela, ogoro kede kite epone mere luŋ, otebakori kede olikolik." 
Leviticus11:20 “Kite kudi luŋ ame tye kede bwomgi ame woto i tyengi aŋwen, gin luŋ obedo me kwer baŋwu." 
Leviticus11:21 Kadi bed amannono, i akina kudi ame woto kede tyengi aŋwen, itwero camo wunu en ame tyengi ame opye kede i wi lobo bocoboco." 
Leviticus11:22 I akinagi itwero camo wunu: bonyo kede kite eponegi luŋ, ocenne kede kite eponegi luŋ, odir kede kite eponegi luŋ, kede otwoŋo kede kite eponegi luŋ," 
Leviticus11:23 Ento kudi ocele luŋ ame tye kede bwomgi, dok tyengi daŋ tye aŋwen, gin luŋ bino bedo me kwer baŋwu." 
Leviticus11:24 “Ginnono luŋ, bino miyo idoko wunu jo a cik ogeŋo; ŋattoro ame bino gudo komgi oto, bino doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno otyeno," 
Leviticus11:25 dok daŋ ŋat ame bino mako kakannoro i komgi, bino lwoko boŋo mere eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Leviticus11:26 Leyi luŋ ame lwet tyengi okaro aryo, ento akina tyengi mom okaro aryo onyo mom omedo nyamo cem a kon omwonyo i yigi, gin luŋ obedo me kwer baŋwu, ŋat ogudo komgi bino bedo ŋat acik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus11:27 Leyi luŋ daŋ ame woto i wi tyengi, ame tye i akina leyi luŋ ame woto i tyengi aŋwen, gin luŋ cik ogeŋowu oko iye. Ŋat ame bino gudo komgi a doŋ oto, bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Leviticus11:28 Dok daŋ ŋattoro keken ame bino tiŋo komgi a doŋ oto, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno; gin luŋ obedo gin ame cik ogeŋowu iye oko." 
Leviticus11:29 “I akina gin a corre nya i wi lobo, magi obedo gin ame cik ogeŋowu iye oko: oculi, oyoo, agwedegwede adoŋo mege kede kite eponegi luŋ," 
Leviticus11:30 amwomwol, ŋec, agwedegwede, agwedegwede me kwoyo, kede agogo." 
Leviticus11:31 Magi luŋ obedo gin ame cik ogeŋowu iye oko i akina gin a corre, nya luŋ; ŋattoro keken ame bino gudo komgi ka doŋ oto, bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Leviticus11:32 Dok ginnoro keken ame kom moro i akinagi a doŋ oto orette iye, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo, kadi bed obedo ginnoro ame otio i yat onyo boŋo aruka, onyo lao, onyo puku, kadi ginnoro keken ame otio kede i yore moro; myero lut i pii, eka te bedo gin a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno; icennere doŋ twero bedo gin a cik oye." 
Leviticus11:33 Dok ka moro i akinagi orette i kom gin ame otio kede lobo, gin onwoŋo tye iyi ginnono luŋ bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo, dok obino ne ko ginnono oko." 
Leviticus11:34 Cammoro ame onwoŋo tye i yie ame romo acama, ame otwero onyo iye pii, bino bedo gin ame cik ogeŋo; kede ginnoro me amata ame onwoŋo tye i kodi jamini ame romo amata, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus11:35 Dok ginnoro luŋ ame dulloro keken me kom ginnoro oto ogudo, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo; kadi keno onyo tuke keno, obino babaro oko atitino; gin doŋ bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋowu i komgi oko." 
Leviticus11:36 Kadi bed amanno, waŋ akoŋ onyo bur ame pii poŋ iye bino bedo gin a cik mom ogeŋo; ento ginnoro keken ame bino gudo kodikommono a doŋ oto, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus11:37 Ka komgi a doŋ oto orette i kom kotimoro me acoa ame onwoŋo myero co, koti-nono cik mom bino geŋo;" 
Leviticus11:38 ento ka kotinono onwoŋo tye i pii, eka kodikom oto-nono te rette gudo kakannoro i kom koti-nono, bino miyo koti-nono bedo gin a cik ogeŋowu iye oko." 
Leviticus11:39 “Ka ce lee moro ame icamo wunu oto, ŋat ogudo kome oto-nono bino bedo a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Leviticus11:40 Doŋ ŋat ame ocamo riŋo mere oto-nono bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno. Ŋat a daŋ otiŋso kom oto-nono bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Leviticus11:41 “Ginnoro luŋ ame corre nya i wi lobo obedo gin me kwer baŋwu; mom ibino camo wunu," 
Leviticus11:42 Ginnoro luŋ ame mol amola kede korgi kede ginnoro luŋ ame wo to i tyengi aŋwen onyo ame tye i tyengi apipim, ginnoro luŋ ame corre nya i wi lobo, mom ibino camo wunu; pien gin obedo gin me kwer baŋwu." 
Leviticus11:43 Kur ilokere idok wunu gin me kwer kenwu pi gin a corre, nya; dok daŋ kur iballe wunu kenwu kedgi, naka mio idoko wunu gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus11:44 Pien an a Rwot Obaŋawu, pi mannono kwerre wunu kenwu ibed wunu acil, pien an daŋ acil. Kur iballe wunu kenwu i ginnoro a corre, nya, ame lak alaka i wi lobo." 
Leviticus11:45 Pien an a Rwot ame akwanyowu i lobo Miciri, me abed Obaŋawu; pi mannono myero ibed wunu jo acil, pien an daŋ acil.”" 
Leviticus11:46 Man en cik a mako leyi kede winnyi kede gin akwo luŋ ame kwaŋ i pii, kede ginnoro luŋ ame corre, nya i wi lobo," 
Leviticus11:47 me poko gin a cik ogeŋo kede gin a cik oye, kede gin akwo ame myero cam kede a mom myero cam." 
Leviticus12:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus12:2 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, Ka ce dako oyac, te nywalo atin awobi, en bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi nino abiro; en bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo calo i kare me twoyo two dwe." 
Leviticus12:3 I nino me aboro mere obino liro del kom atin me co. 
Leviticus12:4 Icennere daŋ-nu dok medo bedo pi nino pyeradek wie adek ocele tuno ka doŋ olony i remo mere; en mom bino gudo kom ginnoro acil, daŋ mom bino tuno i ot Obaŋa ituno ka nino me lonyere mere otum." 
Leviticus12:5 Ento ka ce en onywalo atin a nyako, en bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi cabit aryo acalo i kare me two twoyo two dwe; en dok te medo bedo pi nino pyerabicel wie abicel ocele tuno ka doŋ olony i remo mere." 
Leviticus12:6 “I kare ame nino me lonyere mere doŋ otum, kadi me atin awobi onyo nyako, daŋ-nu bino kelo atin romo a dittere romo mwaka acel kun kelo baŋ alamdog i doggola kema me rwatte me mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa, bino kelo daŋ atin awele onyo amam me mot me bal." 
Leviticus12:7 Alamdog doŋ bino miyo i nyim Rwot, eka te tiyo ticcere me kwanyo bal i kome; dako doŋ te doko ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo pien doŋ olony i kom remo mere ame obedo cwer. Man en cik a mako dako ame onywalo awobi onyo nyako." 
Leviticus12:8 Cite ka ce en acan a mom twero nwoŋo romo, en bino tero amam aryo onyo itino awele aryo, acel me mot awaŋa, eka en ocele te bedo me mot bal. Alamdog doŋ te tiyo ticcere me kwanyo bal i kome, en doŋ te doko ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Rwot okobbi Muca kede Aron ni," 
Leviticus13:2 “Ka dano moro del kome okwot, onyo oluro onyo ococola, eka te lokere doko two dobo i del kome, obino kelo dano-nono baŋ Aron, alamdog onyo baŋ dano moro acel i akina awobe mere ame gin daŋ olamdog." 
Leviticus13:3 Alamdog bino ŋiyo two i del kome-nono; ka yer kome i kan ame ococola-nono olokere odoko atar calo lwar kun kan ame two tye iye-nono nen ame ogolle atut kato kome oko, mano nwoŋo two dobo. Kare ame alamdog doŋ otyeko ŋiyo kome, en bino tuco kannaler ni dano-nono doŋ ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:4 Ento ka kan ococolanono tar ame kato del kome kun daŋ nen ni mom ogolle atut akato kome, dok daŋ yer ame tye kannono mom olokere atar, alamdog bino cego danonono ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:5 I nino me abiro mere myero alamdog dok med ŋiyo kome, cite ka en oŋio te neno baŋe ni two-nono mom dok omedde nya i del kome kan ocele, alamdog myero dok medde cego dano-nono i ot pi nino ocele abiro." 
Leviticus13:6 I nino me abiro mere alamdog myero dok med ŋiyo kome, cite ka en onwoŋo ni two ame ococola i kome-nono doŋ arwenyo arwenya, dok daŋ mom omedde nya i del kome kan ocele, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni dano-nono gire mom cik ogeŋo; kome gire oluro alura keken. Atwo bino lwoko boŋŋi mere eka te doŋ bedo ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:7 Ento ka ce kome odugo-nono onya i del kome kan ocele i ŋe nyutte mere baŋ alamdog pi neno ka ce two mere-nono mom mio cik gene, en dok bin i nyim alamdog." 
Leviticus13:8 Alamdog dok bino ŋiyo kome; ka ce onwoŋo ni kome odugonono doŋ onya i del kome kan ocele, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni danonono doŋ ŋat a cik ogeŋo; mano two dobo." 
Leviticus13:9 “Ka dano moro two dobo omako, myero kel dano-nono baŋ alamdog." 
Leviticus13:10 Alamdog bino ŋiyo kome; ka alamdog onwoŋo ni tye kan okwot atar i del kome kun oloko yer i kannono odoko atar dok kannono mito lokere doko bur," 
Leviticus13:11 mano nwoŋo dobo a mom caŋ en a tye i kome-nono. Alamdog myero tuc kannaler ni dano-nono doŋ ŋat a cik ogeŋo; mom bino cego dano-nono i ot pein en dano a cik ogeŋo oko. 
Leviticus13:12 Aco ka two i kome-nono onwoŋo doŋ ocorre i del kome luŋ, cakere i wie tuno anaka i tyene piny, ame alamdog twero neno," 
Leviticus13:13 alamdog bino ŋiyo kome. Ka en onwoŋo ni two-nono doŋ oromo kome luŋ, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni two-nono gire mom mio cik geŋe; pien doŋ olokere odoko atar luŋ aluŋa, en doŋ bedo ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:14 Cite ka burroro dok onen i kome, en doŋ bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:15 Alamdog bino ŋiyo bur anyennono te tuco kannaler ni en doŋ ŋat a cik ogeŋo; burrono nwoŋo cik ogeŋo, pien mano nwoŋo two dobo." 
Leviticus13:16 Cite ka burrono dok olokere odoko atar, en myero dok bin baŋ alamdog;" 
Leviticus13:17 alamdog dok bino ŋiyo kome. Ka ce onwoŋo two nono olokere odoko atar, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni two mere-nono mom gire mio cik geŋe, en doŋ bedo ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:18 “Dok ka odeke onwoŋo okwot i kom ŋattoro eka te caŋ oko," 
Leviticus13:19 icennere doki kaka odeke-nono te kwot atar onyo ococola atar me iremarema, myero onyut baŋ alamdog." 
Leviticus13:20 Alamdog bino ŋiyo, ento ka onen ni ogolle atut akato del kome, dok daŋ yer i kannono olokere atar, alamdog doŋ bino tuco kannaler ni en doŋ ŋat a cik ogeŋo, mano nwoŋo two dobo ame ocorre kaka odeke." 
Leviticus13:21 Ento ka ce alamdog oŋio te nwoŋo yer i kannono mom gire tar, dok daŋ kakare mom ogolle atut akato del kome, cite tye arwenyo arwenya, alamdog bino cego dano-nu i ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:22 Ka ce omedde nya i del kome, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni en doŋ dano a cik ogeŋo, pien nwoŋo two." 
Leviticus13:23 Cite ka kan ococolanono omedde bedo i kabedo acel keken kun mom nya, mano gire nwoŋo waŋ poo me odeke; alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni dano-nono gire mom ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:24 “Onyo ka dano moro mac owaŋo te bwato kome oko, eka waŋ bur me maccono te dok cocola atar me iremarema onyo atar," 
Leviticus13:25 alamdog bino ŋiyo two-nono. Ka onwoŋo yer ame tye kan ococola-nono olokere odoko atar, kun kakare nen ame ogolle akato del kome oko, mano nwoŋo two dobo. Dobo nwoŋo ocorre kan a mac owaŋo, mano bino miyo alamdog tuco kannaler ni en ŋat a cik ogeŋo; mano nwoŋo two dobo." 
Leviticus13:26 Cite ka alamdog oŋio, te nwoŋo yer i kan ococola-nono mom olokere atar, dok daŋ mom ogolle atut akato del kome, ento tye arwenyo arwenya, alamdog bino cege i ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:27 I nino me abiro mere alamdog dok bino ŋiyo kome; ka ce en onwoŋo tye amedde nya i del kome kan ocele, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni en dano a cik ogeŋo; mano nwoŋo two dobo." 
Leviticus13:28 Ento ka kan ococola-nono omedde bedo i kabedo acel kun mom nya i del kome, cite tye arwenyo arwenya, mano nwoŋo okwot gire akwota kan a mac owaŋo. Alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni en gire ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo; pien mano nwoŋo waŋ poo me kan a mac owaŋo." 
Leviticus13:29 “Ka lo moro onyo dako moro tye kede two i wie onyo i yer tike," 
Leviticus13:30 alamdog bino ŋiyo two-nono. Ka ce en onwoŋo ni ogolle atut akato del kome kun yer a tye kannono olokere odoko acalo ocokocok dok daŋ ojwerojwer, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni en ŋat a cik ogeŋo. Mano nwoŋo two akukuc, ame en dobo me wic onyo yer tik." 
Leviticus13:31 Ka alamdog oŋio two me akukuccono, te nwoŋo ni mom gire ogolle atut akato del kome kun yerroro acol mom iye, alamdog bino cego won two akukuccono i ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:32 I nino me abiro mere alamdog bino dok ŋiyo two-nono; ka ce onwoŋo ni akukuccono mom omedde nya, dok daŋ mom tye iye yer ame calo ocokocok, dok akukuccono daŋ mom ogelle atut akato del kome," 
Leviticus13:33 dano-nono myero lyel wie oko kun mom lyelo kan obedo akukuc. Alamdog myero dok med cego won two akukuccono i ot pi nino ocele abiro. 
Leviticus13:34 I nino me abiro mere alamdog bino ŋiyo two mere; ka ce onwoŋo ni akukuc mom omedde nya i del kome dok daŋ mom ogolle atut akato del kome, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni en gire mom ŋat a cik ogeŋo. En bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te bedo ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:35 Cite ka akukuc omedde nya i del kome kun en doŋ odoko ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo," 
Leviticus13:36 alamdog bino dok ŋiyo kome. Ka onwoŋo akukuc omedde nya i del kome, alamdog mom dok bino yenyo yer acalo ocokocok; en doŋ dano a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:37 Ento ka onwoŋo ni akukuc mom omedde nya, dok daŋ yer acol tye alot iye, kun akukuc doŋ ocaŋ oko, dano-nono nwoŋo doŋ ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo; alamdog bino doŋ tuco kannaler ni en gire ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:38 “Ka ce del kom ico onyo dako ococola atatar," 
Leviticus13:39 alamdog bino ŋiyo kom dano-nono. Ka en onwoŋo ni del kome ococola-nono mom tar wok, mano nwoŋo del kome gire odugo aduga; en mom ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:40 “Ka ce yer wi lo moro olwer oko, en odoko lon a wie otal, ento en gire mom bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:41 Dok ka yer wi lo moro olwer oko i tuŋ nyime, en obedo lon a wie otal i tur nyime, cite en gire mom ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:42 Cite ka tye two moro ame ococola atatar me iremarema i wie otallono onyo i tur nyime otallono, mano nwoŋo two dobo en ocorre i wie otallono." 
Leviticus13:43 Alamdog bino ŋiyo kom dano-nono, cite ka onwoŋo ni two okwokwota i wie onyo i tur nyime otallono obedo atatar me i remarema, kun calo dobo a tye iyedel kom," 
Leviticus13:44 dano-nono nwoŋo won dobo, en ŋat a cik ogeŋo. Alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni en obedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo. Two mere tye i wie." 
Leviticus13:45 “Won dobo myero ruk boŋŋi oketoket, gony daŋ yer wie oko, dok myero daŋ wum del doge i malo mere oko te redo ni, ‘An cik ogeŋa oko; an cik ogeŋa oko.’" 
Leviticus13:46 En bino bedo ŋat cik ogeŋo pi kare luŋ ame two pwod tye i kome; en obedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo. En bino bedo i ode kene teŋe i ŋe gony. 
Leviticus13:47 “Ka ce two dobo onen i boŋo moro ame oruko, kadi bed boŋo yer romo onyo boŋo camanini," 
Leviticus13:48 i kom uci oryeye atira tira onyo i kom uci oryeye aria ria me boŋo camanini onyo me yer romo, onyo i kom lao, onyo i kom ginnoro ame otio i lao," 
Leviticus13:49 ka two-nono nen calo tworo tworo onyo i remarema i kom rukkoro onyo i kom uci oryeye atira tira onyo aria ria, onyo i kom lao, onyo i kom ginnoro ame otio i lao, mano nwoŋo two dobo, myero nyut baŋ alamdog." 
Leviticus13:50 Alamdog bino ŋiyo two-nono eka te cego gin a two tye iye-nono i ot pi nino abiro. 
Leviticus13:51 I nino me abiro mere en bino dok ŋiyo two-nono. Ka onwoŋo two omedde nya i rukkono i kom uci atira onyo i kom uci ariye aria, onyo lao me tiyo ticcoro keken, two-nono nwoŋo obedo dobo ame ŋoŋolo jami, ginnono obedo gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus13:52 Alamdog bino waŋo rukkono oko, kadi bed two tye i kom uci atira mere onyo i kom uci oriye aria i boŋo yer romo onyo i boŋo camanini, onyo i kom ginnoro ame otio i lao; pien mano two dobo ame ŋoŋolo jami; obino waŋo i mac." 
Leviticus13:53 “Ka alamdog oŋio te nwoŋo two mom omedde nya i rukkono, i kom uci atira onyo i kom uci oriye aria, boŋo yer romo onyo i boŋo camanini onyo i kom ginnoro ame otio i lao," 
Leviticus13:54 alamdog myero mi lwok gin a two tye iye-nono, en dok te cego i ot pi nino ocele abiro." 
Leviticus13:55 Alamdog bino dok ŋiyo gin a two tye iye-nono i ŋe lwoko. Ka en onwoŋo raŋi mere mom olokere i kan ame two tye iye-nono, kadi bed two-nono mom omedde nya, ginnono obedo gin a cik ogeŋo; obino waŋo i mac, kadi two onwoŋo oŋolo yoŋee onyo yie." 
Leviticus13:56 “Cite ka alamdog oŋio te nwoŋo ni two mom gire nen iye atek kun doŋ olwoko oko, en myero yee kakannono keken i kom rukkono onyo i kom lao, i kom uci atira onyo i kom uci oriye aria." 
Leviticus13:57 Ka dok two-nono omedo nen i kom rukkono icennere onyo i kom uci atira onyo i kom uci oriye aria onyo i kom ginnoro ame otio i lao, kun medde nya; obino waŋo gin a two tye iye-nono i mac." 
Leviticus13:58 Ruk a two oya iye oko i kare a doŋ olwoko, kadi i uci atira onyo i uci oriye aria, onyo i ginnoro ame otio i lao, myero dok lwok tyen me aryo, eka te bedo doŋ gin a cik mom ogeŋo.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Man cik a mako two dobo ame tye i kom ruk me boŋo yer romo onyo boŋo camanini, i uci atira mere onyo i uci aria mere, onyo i kom ginnoro ame otio i lao, pi moko ka cik ogeŋo onyo cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus14:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus14:2 “Man bino bedo cik a mako won two dobo i nino ame myero en lonyere iye. Obino kele baŋ alamdog; 
Leviticus14:3 eka alamdog te ya wot oko i ŋe gony, te ŋiyo kome. Ka onwoŋo ni two dobo doŋ ocaŋ oko i kome," 
Leviticus14:4 alamdog bino miyogi okelo winyo a kwo aryo a cik mom ogeŋo pi ŋat ame omito lonyo karacel kede yat cedar kede uci arema kede yat ogudo. 
Leviticus14:5 Alamdog bino miyogi otwomo pii amol ote onyo i tako lobo, ote neko winyo acel i wi pii-nono." 
Leviticus14:6 Alamdog bino mako winyo akwo karacel kede yat, cedar kede uci arema ca kede ogudo, te lutogi luŋ karacel i winyo akwo iyi remo winyo ame oneko malo i wi pii amol." 
Leviticus14:7 En bino kiro tyen abiro i kom dano ame obino me lonyere i two dobo; alamdog doŋ te tuco kannaler ni en doŋ olony oko, eka en te weko winyo akwo ca twarre wot i tim." 
Leviticus14:8 Ŋat ame obino me lonyerenono bino doŋ lwoko boŋŋi mere te daŋ lyelo yer luŋ i kome, te lwokere kede pii, en doŋ doko dano olony ame cik mom ogeŋo. I ŋe mano en doŋ twero bino i gony, cite pwod bino buto oko i ŋe kema mere pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus14:9 I nino me abiro mere, en bino lyelo yer wie ducu kede tike kede yer i del waŋe karacel kede yer i kome luŋ. En dok bino lwoko boŋŋi mere kede kome daŋ i pii, en doŋ te lony." 
Leviticus14:10 “I nino me aboro, en bino tero itino nyogi rommi aryo ame roccoro mom i komgi kede akale romo ame dittere romo mwaka acel, a daŋ roccoro mom i kome kede mot yalo Obaŋa me moko kwon ame romo gwata adek me moko apwottere orubo kede moo, kede dok moo ame romo cupa acel." 
Leviticus14:11 Alamdog ame alonyo dano-nono, en ame bino tero dano-nono karacel kede jami mere, te ketogi i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus14:12 Alamdog bino kwanyo nyok romo acel te yalo Obaŋa me wal akino i roc, karacel i moo cupa acel, bino yokogi me mot ayoka i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:13 En bino neko atin romo-nono kan ame oneko iye mot me bal kede mot awaŋa, i kan acil; pien mot me walakino i roc rom aroma i mot bal, gin luŋ bedo me alamdog; mano en dul acil meicel." 
Leviticus14:14 Alamdog bino gweto remo me mot oŋolo me walakino i me te cwicwinyo i yit dano ame alonyo-nono tuŋ cem kede i twon ciŋe tuŋ cem kede i twon tyene tun cem. 
Leviticus14:15 Alamdog te kwanyo moo ame romo cupa acel ca, te tono aduno i cuny ciŋe tun cem," 
Leviticus14:16 te luto nyako ciŋe tuŋ cem i moo ame tye i cuny ciŋe tuŋ cam, eka te kikiro moo i nyako ciŋe-nono tyen abiro i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:17 Moo odoŋ i ciŋe, en bino cwicwinyo i alago yit dano ame olonyo tuŋ cem, kede i twon ciŋe tun cem, kede i twon tyene tuŋ cem, i kom remo mot oŋolo me walakino i roc." 
Leviticus14:18 Moo ame odoŋ i ciŋ alamdog, en bino weweo i wi ŋat ame alonyo. Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:19 Alamdog bino yalo Obaŋa i mot me bal, me kwanyo bal i kom dano ame alonyo me mom dok bed ŋat a cik ogeŋo. I ŋe mannono, en doŋ bino neko mot awaŋa," 
Leviticus14:20 eka alamdog te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa karacel kede mot me moko kwon i wi keno lam. Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome kittono, en doŋ te lony bedo ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus14:21 “Cite ka en acan ame mom romo nwoŋo mannono luŋ, en bino kelo atin nyok romo acel me mottere me walakino i roc, me ayoka me kwanyo bal i kome, kede moko kwon apwottere gwata acel ame orubo kede moo me mot moko kwon, kede moo cupa acel." 
Leviticus14:22 Dok daŋ bino kelo amam aryo onyo itino awele aryo, kite ame en romo nwoŋo kede; acel bino bedo me mot bal, acel me mot awaŋa." 
Leviticus14:23 I nino me aboro en bino kelo baŋ alamdog pi lonyere mere i doggola kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot. 
Leviticus14:24 Alamdog bino tero atin romo me mot walakino i roc karacel kede moo ame romo cupa acel, bino yokogi me ayoka i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:25 En doŋ te neko atin romo me mot walakino i roc; bino gweto remo mot oŋolo me walakino i roc, te cwicwinyo i alago yit dano ame alonyonono tuŋ cem kede twon ciŋe tuŋ cem, kede i twon tyene tuŋ cem." 
Leviticus14:26 Alamdog te tono moo aduno i cuny ciŋe tuŋ cem," 
Leviticus14:27 te kikiro moo i cuny ciŋe-nono i nyako ciŋe me tuŋ cem tyen abiro i nyim Rwot. 
Leviticus14:28 Alamdog bino cwicwinyo moo mogo i cuny ciŋe-nono i alago yit dano ame alonyo-nono tuŋ cem kede i twon ciŋe tuŋ cem kede i twon tyene tuŋ cem, kan ame ocwicwinyo iye remo mot walakino i roc." 
Leviticus14:29 Moo ame odoŋŋere luŋ i ciŋ alamdog, en bino weweo i wi dano ame alonyo me kwanyo bal i kome i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:30 En bino miyo moro acel i kom amam onyo itino awele kite ame en romo nwoŋo," 
Leviticus14:31 me mot bal, acel me mot awaŋa, karacel kede mot me moko kwon; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom dano ame alonyo-nono i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:32 Man en cik a mako lon ame two dobo ame mom romo nwoŋo mot me lonyere mere.” 
Leviticus14:33 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Leviticus14:34 “Ka doŋ ituno wunu i lobo me Kanaan, ame amiowu me bedo megwu, ka ce abino keto two dobo i ottoro i lobo ame ibino wunu gamo-naca," 
Leviticus14:35 won ot bino wot tito baŋ alamdog kun kobo ni, ‘Two moro nen calo tye i oda.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Alamdog bino miyo ocoko jami i ottono okelo oko, me ot doŋ yie nono ame en alamdog pwod mom ru odonyo iye me ŋiyo two, me kur tuc kannaler ni jami luŋ i ottono cik ogeŋo oko; icennere alamdog doŋ bino donyo ka ŋiyo ot." 
Leviticus14:37 En bino ŋiyo two; ka onwoŋo two-nono tye i kor apama a kun obedo tworo tworo, onyo tye arema rema, ka ce onen ni odonyo atut i kor apama," 
Leviticus14:38 alamdog bino donyo i ottono woto i doggola, te cego dog ottono oko pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus14:39 I nino me abiro mere alamdog dok bino dwogo neno. Ka onwoŋo two onya omedde i kor apama," 
Leviticus14:40 alamdog bino miyo omuko matafali gweŋe ame two tye iye-nono oko, ote bolo i ŋe boma kan a mom cil." 
Leviticus14:41 Dok daŋ bino miyo ocwero kor apama iyi ot luŋ, eka lobo ame ocwero i kor apama ote wot onyo oko i ŋe boma kan a mom cil." 
Leviticus14:42 Eka ote doŋ kelo matafali me gweŋe ocele, ote keto kan ame okwanyo iye maca, ote daŋ dok kelo lobo ocele puyo kede kor apama-nono luŋ." 
Leviticus14:43 “Ka two dok obelle i ottono kun onwoŋo doŋ omuko gweŋe ca oko, dok daŋ ocwero kor apama, ote puyo daŋ oko," 
Leviticus14:44 alamdog dok bino dok wot neno. Ka onwoŋo two onya omedde i ottono, mano nwoŋo two dobo ame ŋoŋolo jami ame tye i ot; ottono doŋ ot ame cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus14:45 En bino mumuko ot tu reto oko piny; gweŋe mere, yennere kede lobo ame opuo kede luŋ, obino tero oko i ŋe boma kan a mom cil." 
Leviticus14:46 Dano ame bino donyo i ot-tu kare ame ocego oko, bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Leviticus14:47 Dano ame obuto piny i ot-tu, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere; ŋat ame ocemo i ot-tu, daŋ bino lwoko boŋŋi mere." 
Leviticus14:48 “Cite ka alamdog obino te ŋiyo ot-tu, eka mom te nwoŋo two onya omedde geye i kare ame opuo kede, alamdog bino tuco kannaler ni ot-tu gire mom cik ogeŋo, pien two iye ocaŋ oko." 
Leviticus14:49 Doŋ me lonyo ot tu, en bino kelo itino winy aryo karacel kede yat cedar, kede uci arema kede yat acalo ogudo." 
Leviticus14:50 Alamdog bino miyo otwomo pii amol i tako lobo, ote neko winyo acel malo i wi pii-nono." 
Leviticus14:51 Alamdog bino mako yat cedar kede ogudo kede uci arema karacel kede winyo akwo, te lutogi luŋ i remo winyo ame oneko malo i wi pii amol, te kikiro i kor apama tyen kany wie aryo." 
Leviticus14:52 En bino lonyo ot i remo winyo, karacel kede pii amol, kede winyo akwo kede yat cedar, kede yat acalo ogudo kede uci arema kittono," 
Leviticus14:53 En te weko winyo akwo ca twarre wot i tim i ŋe boma. En bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom ot kittono, ot te doŋ bedo ame olony.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Man en cik a mako kit two dobo luŋ; two akukuc," 
Leviticus14:55 two dobo me ruk onyo me ot," 
Leviticus14:56 onyo me kan okwot, onyo odugo, onyo del kom ococola," 
Leviticus14:57 me nyuto ka cik ogeŋo onyo mom ogeŋo Man en cik a mako two dobo. 
Leviticus15:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Leviticus15:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka lo moro tut mollo i kome, tut ame mollo-nono mio ebedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:3 Doŋ man en cik a mako ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi cwer a tut, kadi tutu mollo i kome onyo tut ame mollo i kome doŋ ogikoko; mano mio cik geŋe." 
Leviticus15:4 Itanda moro keken ame ŋat a tut mollo i kome obuto iye, bino doko itanda ame cik ogeŋo, kede ginnoro luŋ a en obedo iye, bino doko gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:5 Ŋat ame bino gudo itanda mere, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko kome daŋ kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:6 Ŋat ame obedo i ginnoro ame ŋat a tut mollo i kome obedo iye, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede i pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:7 Ŋat ame ogudo kom ŋat a kome mollo tut, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:8 Ka ŋat ame tut mollo i kome oŋulo lao i kom dano moro ame cikkoro mom ogeŋo, danonono bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:9 Kommoro ame obedo kede i wi inaga ame ŋat a kome mollo tut obedo iye, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:10 Ŋat ame ogudo ginnoro ame en obedo iye, onyo obuto iye, bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno; kede ŋat ame otiŋo kodi ginnono, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:11 Ka dano a tut mollo i kome ogudo kom dano moro kun mom ologo ciŋe kede pii, dano ame ogudo bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:12 Ka dano a kome mollo tut ogudo gulu lobo moro, obino neko gulu lobo-nono oko; ginnoro me amaka luŋ ame otio kede yat, obino lwoko komgi kede pii." 
Leviticus15:13 “Ka dano moro ame tut mollo i kome doŋ olony oko, en bino kwano nino kany wie aryo me lonyere mere pire kene, te lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome i pii ame mol, te doŋ bedo ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:14 I nino me aboro mere en bino tero amam aryo onyo itno awele aryo, te bino i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte, te miyogi baŋ alamdog." 
Leviticus15:15 Alamdog miogi kun mio acel me mot bal, acel me mot awaŋa, alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome kittono i nyim Rwot, pi tut ame onwoŋo obedo mollo i kome." 
Leviticus15:16 “Ka remo a lo moro me co oony i kome, en bino lwoko kome luŋ kede pii, te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:17 Rukkoro onyo pyennoro ameremo me co omol iye, obino lwoko kede pii, te bedo gin a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:18 Ka ico obuto kede dako eka remo mere me co te ŋolle ony oko i komgi, gin aryo luŋ bino lwokere kede pii, gin te bedo jo a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:19 “Ka ce remo me kwer me two dwe ocwer i kom dako i kite me nino ducu, en bino bedo nino kany wie aryo pi kwerrere-nono, ŋat ame ogudo kome bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:20 Ginnoro keken ame en obuto iye i kare ame en tye ikwer, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo, dok ginnoro luŋ ame en obedo iye, gin luŋ bino bedo jami a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:21 Ŋat ogudo itanda mere myero lwok boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:22 Ŋat ogudo kom gin ame en obedo iye, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:23 Kadi itanda onyo ginnoro ame en obedo iye, ŋat ogudo bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:24 Ka lo moro obuto kede, eka remo two mere te gudo kome, en bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo nino abiro, dok itanda moro keken ame en obuto iye, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:25 “Ka ce remo obedo cwer i kom dako moro pi kare alac kun mom cwer i kare me two dwe keken, onyo ka ce remo mere me kwer cwer kare alac alaca, dannono bino medde bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo i kare luŋ ameremo mere tye ka cwer i kome bala i kare ame two too dwe." 
Leviticus15:26 Itanda moro keken ame en obuto iye i kare ameremo mere tye ka cwer, bino bedo baŋe acalo itanda me twoyo two kwerrere, dok ginnoro luŋ ame en obedo iye, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo kite ame cik geŋe kede i kare me two dwe." 
Leviticus15:27 Ŋat ogudo jami magi bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo; bino lwoko boŋŋi mere te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno." 
Leviticus15:28 Cite ka dako ameremo kwer cwer i kome doŋ olwoko two mere oko en bino kwano nino abiro me lonyere mere pire kene, icennere en bino bedo dako a cik mom ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:29 I nino me aboro mere en bino tero amam aryo onyo awele aryo, te kelo baŋ alamdog i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus15:30 Alamdog bino miyo acel me mot me bal, acel me mot awaŋa; alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome kittono i nyim Rwot pi remo ame obedo cwer i kome te miyo en bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus15:31 “Ibino poko wunu jo Icrael ame cik ogeŋo kittono, me gin kur to kun cik pwod ogenogi pi balo kemana ame tye i akinagi.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Man en cik a mako ico ame tut mollo i kome kede ico ameremo mere me co oony i kome te miyo en doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo," 
Leviticus15:33 kede dako ame two too me kwer. Man en cik a mako ŋattoro keken, ico onyo dako, ame tut mollo i kome onyo remo cwer i kome, kede ico ame obuto i dako ame cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus16:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca i kare ame awobe Aron aryo doŋ oto oko, pien i kare a rik gin onwoŋo onoko nyim Rwot aceggi, gin rik te to oko." 
Leviticus16:2 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kobbi ominni Aron ni myero kur ebed donyo i kabedo acil i kare luŋ, kan ame boŋo icika owumo i nyim kom-me-kica ame tye i wi canduk me kur eto; pien abino nen i pol i wi kom-me-kica." 
Leviticus16:3 Ento en bino donyo i kabedo acil i jami magi: atin twon me mot me bal kede nyok romo me mot awaŋa. 
Leviticus16:4 En bino ruko kanyi acil me boŋo camanini, kun daŋ oruko pali me boŋo camanini i kome, te tweyo pyere kede itambara me boŋo camanini, dok daŋ otweo wie itambara adwala i wie. Magi-nono gin boŋŋi me aruka acil; en bino lwoko kome kede pii eka te rukogi." 
Leviticus16:5 En bino daŋ gamo i baŋ lwak jo Icrael nyogi dyegi aryo me mot bal kede nyok romo acel me mot awaŋa. 
Leviticus16:6 Aron bino yalo Obaŋa i twon me bed mot me ballere en ikome, kun tio tic me kwanyo bal i kome kede i kom jo me ode." 
Leviticus16:7 En dok bino kelo dyegi aryo-ca, te keto i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus16:8 En bino bolo kwir i kom dyegi aryo-nono, kwir acel me a Rwot kede ocele me Ajajal." 
Leviticus16:9 Dyel ame kwir a Rwot opoto i kome, Aron bino kela te yalo Obaŋa me bed mot me bal." 
Leviticus16:10 Cite dyel ame kwir Ajajel opoto i kome obino tero akwo i nyim Rwot me ti tic me kwanyo bal i kome, eka ote cwaye wot oko i tim baŋ Ajajel." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aron bino yalo Obaŋa i twon me mot me ballere en ikome, kun tio tic me kwanyo bal i kome kede i kom jo me ode. En bino neko twon me bed mot me ballere en ikome." 
Leviticus16:12 En bino kwanyo tabo me waŋo odok akur ame lodi mac tye iye poŋ kun kwanyo i wi keno lam ame tye i nyim Rwot, dok daŋ bino juko odok akur ame ocacanyo oluro atitino poŋ ciŋe aryo, eka te kelogi i tyelo kan ame boŋo icika owumo." 
Leviticus16:13 En bino onyo odok akur i mac i nyim Rwot me yitto odok akurrono adwoŋŋere duny mwon kom kom-me-kica oko, ame bedo i wi canduk me kop me caden, me kur eto." 
Leviticus16:14 En dok bino tero remo twonnono mogo, te totono i nyako ciŋe i kom kom-me-kica tuŋ nyime, te dok totono remo-nono i nyako ciŋe tyen kany wie aryo kun totono piny i nyim kom-mekica." 
Leviticus16:15 “Kare ame man otum, en bino neko dyel ame rik tye pi lwak me yalo Obaŋa pi bal, te tero remo mere i tyelo kan ame boŋo icika owumo, eka te tic i remo-nono kite ame otimo kede i kom remo twon. En bino totono remo-nono i wi kom-me-kica kede i nyim kom-mekica," 
Leviticus16:16 Aron bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom kabedo acil kittono, pi gigi mogo ame mio jo Icrael bedo jo a me mom olony ame cik ogeŋo, kede pi timgi mogo areco kede kit balgi ocele luŋ. Dok bino daŋ timo amannono i kema me rwatte ame bedo i akinagi kede i dyegi gin luŋ miogi obedo jo ame mom olony ame cik geno." 
Leviticus16:17 I kare ame en donyo i kabedo acil pi tiyo tic me kwanyo bal, ŋattoro myero kur bed i kema me rwatte ituno ka en doŋ otyeko donyo oko kun doŋ otyeko tiyo tic me kwanyo ballere en ikome kede bal i kom jo me ode kede i kom jo Icrael luŋ ame ocokere." 
Leviticus16:18 En te wot i nyim keno lam ame tye i nyim Rwot, te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom keno lam. En bino kwanyo remo twon mogo, kede remo dyel te cwicwinyo i tuŋ aŋwen ame tye i keno lam, bino cwicwinyo romo komgi luŋ." 
Leviticus16:19 En dok bino totono remo iye tyen kany wie aryo kun lonyo, kwero doko acil kun kwanyo gigi mogo luŋ ame mio jo Icrael bedo jo a mom olony ame cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus16:20 “Kare ame en doŋ otyeko tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom kabedo acil, kede i kom kema me rwatte, kede keno lam, en bino kelo dyel akwo;" 
Leviticus16:21 eka Aron te keto ciŋe ryoryo luŋ i wi dyel akwo, kun tuco bal luŋ ame jo Icrael otimo, kede timgi mogo areco kede kit bal luŋ ame gin otimo. En bino ketogi luŋ i wi dyellono, te cwayogi wot oko i tim, kun dano ame oyero en ame tero." 
Leviticus16:22 Dyel bino tiŋo balgi i kome, woto kede i tim ata; dano otero-nono bino gonyo dyel woto gire i tim." 
Leviticus16:23 “Aron dok bino donyo i kema me rwatte, te gonyo boŋŋi camanini ame onwoŋo en oruko i kare ame donyo i kabedo acil, te weko oko kuno." 
Leviticus16:24 En bino lwoko kome kede pii i kakannoro acil te ruko boŋŋi mere i kome, eka te doŋ donyo oko yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa ame tye pire, kede mot awaŋa ame tye pi lwak, kun tio tic me kwanyo bal i keme kede i kom lwak." 
Leviticus16:25 Dwol me mot awaŋa en bino waŋo i wi keno lam. 
Leviticus16:26 Ŋat otero dyel te wot cwayo baŋ Ajajel bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, tec lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, i ŋe mano en doŋ twero bino i gony." 
Leviticus16:27 Twon kede dyel me yalo Obaŋa pi bal ame onwoŋo otero remogi i kabedo acil me tiyo tic me kwanyo bal, obino tero i ŋe gony; pyengi kede riŋogi kede weegi obino waŋo i mac." 
Leviticus16:28 Ŋat owaŋo bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, i ŋe mano en doŋ twero donyo i gony." 
Leviticus16:29 “Man bino bedo cik baŋwu nakanaka ni, dwe me kany wie aryo nino dwe tomon, ibino bedo wunu kede kumo kun cunywu cwer. Kur igud wunu ticcoro, kadi anywali me lobo, kadi arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu." 
Leviticus16:30 Pien i nino-nono en ame abino tiyo iye tic me kwanyo bal i komwu me ibed ame ilony wunu. Myero ibed ame ilonyere wunu i kom balwu luŋ i nyim Rwot. 
Leviticus16:31 Nino-nono bino bedo cabit me weowu mot, ibino wunu bedo i kumo kun cunywu cwer. Man en cik ame bino bedo atwal." 
Leviticus16:32 Alamdog ame obino wiro kede moo i kare me kete i dog ticcere me alamdog kun leo kaka pappere, en bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal kun oruko boŋŋi acil me camanini." 
Leviticus16:33 En bino tiyo ticcere me kwanyo bal i kom kabedo acil, dok te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom kema me rwatte i kom keno lam. Eka dok te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom olamdog kede i kom jo luŋ ocokere." 
Leviticus16:34 Man bino bedo cik baŋwu ame perakino atwal ni myero ti tic me kwanyo bal i kom jo Icrael mwaka acel icel, pi balgi luŋ.” Muca daŋ te limo kite a Rwot ocike kede." 
Leviticus17:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus17:2 “Kobbi Aron kede awobe mere kede jo Icrael luŋ ni, Man en gin a Rwot ociko." 
Leviticus17:3 Ka ce dano moro me ot Icrael oneko twon onyo atin romo onyo dyel i gony onyo oneko i ŋe gony oko," 
Leviticus17:4 kun mom okelo i doggola kema me rwatte me mot baŋ Rwot i nyim kema a Rwot, remo me roc a dano-nono bino bedo gire i wie. Dano-nono waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi pien oonyo remo," 
Leviticus17:5 Man ociko me jo Icrael kel leyi aŋolagi ame obedo neko i dye bar, gin kelgi baŋ Rwot, baŋ alamdog i doggola kema me rwatte, me aneka me mot me kweyo cuny baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus17:6 Alamdog bino kikiro remo mere i keno lam a Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte, bino waŋo dwolo obed gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus17:7 Kite-nono gin mom dok obino miyo mot me yalo jogi me tim ame gin otimo, tim me coco baŋgi kun olubo yorgi. Man bino bedo cik baŋgi atwal tuno naka i kare i kwaegi luŋ." 
Leviticus17:8 “Ibino kobbigi ni, Dano moro me doggola Icrael, onyo i akina orok ame bedo i akinagi, ame oyalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa, onyo mottoro ame oŋolo," 
Leviticus17:9 kun mom okelo i doggola kema me rwatte me aŋola baŋ Rwot, dano-nono abino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi." 
Leviticus17:10 “Ka dano moro me doggola Icrael, onyo i akina orok ame bedo i akinagi, ocamo remo, abino ciko waŋa i kom dano ocamo remo-nono, dok daŋ obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi." 
Leviticus17:11 Pien kwo a riŋo tye i remo, an doŋ atyeko miyo oko pirwu i wi keno lam me kwanyo bal i kom tipowu; pien remo obedo gin ame kwanyo bal, pi kwo ame tye iye-nono." 
Leviticus17:12 En omio akobo baŋ jo Icrael ni. Dano moro i akinawu myero kur cam remo, arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu daŋ myero kur cam remo." 
Leviticus17:13 Dok dano moro i akina jo Icrael onyo i akina orok ame bedo i akinagi, ame omako lee onyo winyo moro ame ocamo, kare ame en owoto i dwar, bino onyo remo mere i lobo, te wumo oko kede kwoyo." 
Leviticus17:14 “Pien kwo a gin Obaŋa oketo luŋ en remo mere; en omio aciko jo Icrael luŋ ni, Myero kur icam wunu remo me ginnoro luŋ ame Obaŋa oketo, pien kwogi en remogi; ŋat ame ocamo, abino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko." 
Leviticus17:15 Dok dano moro keken ame ocamo gin ame oto kene, onyo lee ame ŋuu omwodo, kadi bed ŋat onywalo i lobowu-nono, onyo arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu, bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii eka te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno; te doŋ bedo ŋat olony." 
Leviticus17:16 Ento ka mom olwoko, onyo mom olwoko daŋ kome kede pii, ballere bino bedo gire i wie.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni 
Leviticus18:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, An a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus18:3 Mom ibino timo wunu kite ame otimo kede i lobo me Miciri a rik ibedo wunu iye; dok daŋ mom ibino timo wunu kite ame otimo i lobo me Kanaan kan ame aterowu iye-ni. Mom ibino lubo wunu cikgi. 
Leviticus18:4 Ibino wunu tiyo gin ame aciko kun igwoko wunu icwilla, dok daŋ ilubo wunu. An a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus18:5 Pi mannono ibino wunu gwoko icwilla kede gin ame aciko. Timo kittono bino miyo dano kwo; An a Rwot. 
Leviticus18:6 “Dano moro i akinawu mom bino noko laŋet wattere me buto kede; an a Rwot. 
Leviticus18:7 Mom ibino buto i totti, pappi gire en a buto kede; mano obedo totti, yin mom ibino buto kede." 
Leviticus18:8 Mom ibino buto i ci-pappi, pappi gire en a buto kede." 
Leviticus18:9 Mom ibino buto aminni ame obedo nyaka a pappi onyo nyaka a totti, kadi onywalo paco onyo onywalo kun ocele." 
Leviticus18:10 Mom ibino buto i nyaka a wodi onyo nyaka a nyari, pien komgi obedo komi yin i komi." 
Leviticus18:11 Mom ibino buto i nyaka ci-pappi, ame pappi en onywalo, pien en obedo aminni." 
Leviticus18:12 Mom ibino buto amin pappi, pien en obedo wat a pappi." 
Leviticus18:13 Mom ibino buto amin totti, pien en obedo wat a totti." 
Leviticus18:14 Mom ibino buto i dako omin a pappi, kur inok laŋet cege, pien en obedo dako omin pappi." 
Leviticus18:15 Mom ibino buto i dako a wodi, pien en obedo ci-wodi; mom ibino buta kede." 
Leviticus18:16 Mom ibino buto i dako ominni, pien ominni gire en a buto kede." 
Leviticus18:17 Mom ibino buto i dako moro eka dokite buto daŋ i nyare; mom daŋ ibino tero nyaka wode kadi nyaka a nyare me wot buto kede. Gin gire obedo watini; mano tim me ipyeda. 
Leviticus18:18 Mom ibino nyomo amuni me bedo nyek aminnere, kun ibuto kede ame aminnere pwod kwo." 
Leviticus18:19 “Mom ibino noko laŋet dako me buto kede i kare ame en tye kede two dwe, kun mom ru olony." 
Leviticus18:20 Mom daŋ ibino buto i dako awotti, bino miyo iballe oko." 
Leviticus18:21 Mom ibino miyo atinni moro me awŋa i mac baŋ Molek, me pyedo nyiŋ Obaŋani; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus18:22 Mom ibino buto ico wadwu bala ibuto i dako; mano tim me kwer. 
Leviticus18:23 Mom daŋ ibino balle keni pi buto kede lee moro; dako moro daŋ myero kur mi lee but kede; mano tim me ipyeda. 
Leviticus18:24 “Kur iballe wunu kenwu i ginnoro i kom jami magi pien rok luŋ ame atyeko ryemogi oko i nyimwu-ni, gin obedo balle kengi i kodi timmono," 
Leviticus18:25 te miyo lobo balle, te miya keto can i kome pi ballere, eka lobo te noko jo a bedo iye oko." 
Leviticus18:26 Ento wun myero igwok wunu icwilla kede cikka, kun mom itimo wunu ginnoro me kwer i kom jami magi luŋ, kadi ŋat onywalo i lobowu, onyo welo onyo arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu." 
Leviticus18:27 Pien jami me kwerrono luŋ wegi lobo-nono obedo tiyo, ame gin jo a yam otelo nyimwu; mano te miyo lobo balle oko." 
Leviticus18:28 Kur itim wunu timmoro ame balo lobo, naka mio lobo ŋokowu oko, kite ame onoko kede rok ame otelo nyimwu." 
Leviticus18:29 Ŋat ame bino timo ginnoro i kom jami magi me kwer, ŋat otimo-nono obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Leviticus18:30 Doŋ ba, myero igwok wunu gin ame aciko, kur iti wunu ticcoro me kwer ame yam obedo timo i nyimwu, kur iballe wunu kenwu kedgi; an a Rwot Obaŋawu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus19:2 “Kobbi lwak jo Icrael ni, Bed wunu jo acil, pie an abedo Rwot Obaŋawu ame acil." 
Leviticus19:3 Ŋat acel acel i akinawu myer wor tottere kede pappere, dok myero gwok cabitta luŋ; an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:4 Kur ilokere idok wunu baŋ cal jogi, ite tiyo wunu obaŋa mogo me nyonyo ame itwako wunu atwaka pirwu kenwu; an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:5 “Ka iyalo wunu Rwot i motwu me kweyo cuny, ibino wunu miyo i yore ame mio Obaŋa ye gamowu." 
Leviticus19:6 Myero cam oko i nino ame oŋolo iye-nono, onyo orwo mere; en odoŋŋere naka i nino me adekkere, obino waŋo awaŋa kede mac." 
Leviticus19:7 Ka ce dok ocamo i nino me adekkere, bino doŋ doko gin me kwer; Obaŋa mom dok bino ye gamo." 
Leviticus19:8 Ŋat ame ocamo-nono ballere gire bino dok i wie, pien opyedo gi a Rwot ame cil; dano-nono obino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Leviticus19:9 “Ka ikaa wunu cam ame oceki lobowu, myero kur ika wunu yi poto luŋ aluŋa tuno naka i laŋaete;" 
Leviticus19:10 dok daŋ kur irarao wunu en obwoto wanwu luŋ aluŋa i tyene, dok kur idep wunu nyig olok opoto piny i poto olok; ibino weko wunu magi-nono me konyo ocan kede orok ame bedo i akinawu; an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Kur ikwal wunu ginnoro, kadi timo tim me goba goba, onyo bwolle wunu kenwu kenwu." 
Leviticus19:12 Kur ikwoŋ wunu kwoŋ me goba kede nyiŋa, ame mio ipyedo nyiŋ Obaŋani; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:13 “Kur ibur awotti, dok daŋ kur ima jami mere. Kur imi ocara apakaca ri baŋi tuno naka odiko." 
Leviticus19:14 Myero daŋ kur iyet adiŋyittoro, kur daŋ iri dulloro i nyim atowaŋ, ento myero ilwor Obaŋani, an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:15 “Kur ileŋere wunu i ŋolo kop; kur daŋ idwor wunu ocan i pido mere, kadi lo moro adit, ento ŋol kop atira i kom awotti." 
Leviticus19:16 Kur ibed rimo piny i akina jo turwu me yeyeto jo kur daŋ ikel kopporo pi neko awotti; an a Rwot. 
Leviticus19:17 “Kur idag ominni i cuny, ento juk awotti ajuka, me ballere kur bed i wii." 
Leviticus19:18 Kur icul kwor, kur daŋ ibed akemo moro i cunyi i kom jo me turwu; ento mar dano wadwu acalo imarre keni; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:19 “Ibino gwoko wunu icwilla. Mom ibino miyo wunu limwu akwo nywal i kit lee moro ocele a mom epone mere; mom daŋ ibino wunu coyo koti aryo apapat i poto acel; dok daŋ kur iruk wunu boŋo moro ame ocweo i kit uci aryo apapat. 
Leviticus19:20 “Kacelo moro obuto i nyannoro ame obedo aŋeca, ame doŋ onwoŋo otyeko moko me miyo baŋ ŋat ocele, kun nyannono mom ru oculo limmoro me lakoro onyo ogonyo, obino poro koppere apora. Mom obino nekogi pien nyannono onwoŋo mom loye kene." 
Leviticus19:21 En lonnono bino tero mottere me walakino i roc baŋ Rwot, i doggola kema me rwatte, bino tero nyok romo me mot me walakino i roc." 
Leviticus19:22 Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome i nyim Rwot kun tio i nyok romo me mot walakino i roc, pi bal ame etimonono; Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Leviticus19:23 “Ka doŋ ituno wunu i lobo-naca, eka ite pito wunu iye kwone yen luŋ me acama, ibino wunu koŋ geyo tero wunu nyiggi acalo gin ogeŋo ni kur cam; ogeŋowu camo nyiggi oko pi mwakki adek, myero kur icam wunu." 
Leviticus19:24 I mwaka me aŋwennere, nyiggi luŋ bino bedo gin acil, mot ame omio me pako Rwot." 
Leviticus19:25 Cite i mwaka me kannyape, itwero wunu doŋ camo nyiggi, me nyiggi nyak abup pirwu; an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Kur icam wunu riŋo moro kun remo tye iye. Mom daŋ ibino wunu tyet, mom ibino wunu lamo amuk." 
Leviticus19:27 Kur ilyel wunu te wiwu, kur daŋ ilyel wunu laŋet tikwu." 
Leviticus19:28 Mom daŋ ibino ŋoŋolo wunu komwu pi kwero cola a jo oto, kadi kekedo komwu; a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:29 “Kur imi anyirawu dok ipyeda pi bedo alaya, mio lobo balle oko i tim me, ipyeda." 
Leviticus19:30 Gwok wunu cabit mera, wor wunu daŋ kabedona acil; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:31 “Kur ilokere idok wunu baŋ okor tipo onyo emuroko; kur iyenygi wunu; mio iballe wunu oko pirgi, an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Ibino wunu ya malo i nyim dano a wie obuko lwar; dok myero iwor wunu ŋat oti; lwor wunu daŋ Obaŋawu; an a Rwot. 
Leviticus19:33 “Ka ce arokkoro bedo i akinawu, mom ibino wunu timo ginnoro arac i kome." 
Leviticus19:34 Arok me bedo i akinawu, ibino bedo kede calo anywalli me lobowu, ibino wunu mare acalo imarre kenwu; pien wun daŋ yam ibedo wunu orok i lobo me Miciri; an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Kur itim wunu ginnoro arac i ŋolo kop, i pimo bor a ginnoro, onyo pek a ginnoro, onyo dit a ginnoro." 
Leviticus19:36 Myero ibed wunu i mijan ame pimo jami kakare, kede ratili abeco, kede dita me pimo kal aber, kede tabo me pimo moo aber; an a Rwot Obaŋawu ame rik akwanyowu i lobo Miciri." 
Leviticus19:37 Myero igwok wunu icwilla luŋ, kede gin ame aciko luŋ; dok daŋ icob wunugi; an a Rwot.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus20:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Dano moro i akina jo Icrael onyo arok ame bedo i akina jo Icrael ame omio atinnere baŋ Molek, obino neko oko; lwak bino nanapo ananap kede gweŋe." 
Leviticus20:3 An ikoma abino ciko waŋa i kom dano-nono, abino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi, pien omio atinnere baŋ Molek, kun balo i kabedona acil, dok pyedo daŋ nyiŋa acil." 
Leviticus20:4 Ka ce lwak mom ociko waŋgi i kom dano-nono kun en mio atinnere baŋ Molek, eka mom daŋ ote neko gigi dano-nono," 
Leviticus20:5 an ikoma abino ciko waŋa i kom dano-nono kede i kom jo me doggola mere, abino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi, en karacel kede jo luŋ ame lube i timo tim me coco baŋ Molek." 
Leviticus20:6 “Ka cedano moro olokere odoko baŋ okor tipo kede baŋ emuroko kun timo tim me coco dok lubogi daŋ, abino ciko waŋa i kom dano-nono, abino miyo waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Leviticus20:7 Kwerre wunu kenwu ibed wunu jo acil, pien an a Rwot, Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus20:8 Gwok wunu i cwilla luŋ kun daŋ icobo wunu, pien an a Rwot, an ame alonyowu idoko wunu acil." 
Leviticus20:9 Pi mannono dano moro ame bino ceno tottere onyo pappere, obino neko oko; pien nwoŋo en oceno pappere onyo tottere, remo mere gire bino bedo i wie." 
Leviticus20:10 “Ka lo moro ocodo dako awottere, ico kede dako ame ocode-nono obino neko oko." 
Leviticus20:11 Dano ame obuto i ci-pappaere, nwoŋo okelo lewic i kom pappere, obino neko gin aryo luŋ, remogi bino dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:12 Ka ce lo moro obuto i ci-wode, obino neko gin aryo luŋ; gin nwoŋo otimo tim me kwer, remogi bino dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:13 Ka lo moro obuto ico wadgi acalo dako, gin aryo luŋ nwoŋo otimo tim me kwer, gin aryo luŋ obino nekogi oko, remogi bino dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:14 Ka lo moro onyomo dako eka dok te buto i totta a dako mere, manno nwoŋo otimo tim me kwer; obino waŋogi luŋ kede mac, ico kede mon aryo-nono luŋ, me wek timmoro me kwer kur timere i akinawu." 
Leviticus20:15 Ka ce dano moro obuto kede lee obino neko oko; lee daŋ obino neko oko. 
Leviticus20:16 Ka dako moro onoko laŋet lee te miyo buto kede, obino neko dako-nono oko karacel kede lee daŋ; obino nekogi oko, remogi bino bedo i wigi." 
Leviticus20:17 “Ka ce lo moro otero aminnere ame obedo nyakka a pappere onyo nyakka a tottere, ce en oneno kome me mon, nyako daŋ te neno mege me co, gin nwoŋo otimo tim me lewic, obino nekogi kun jo me turgi tye anene. Pien en obuto aminnere, ballere gire bino bedo i wie." 
Leviticus20:18 Ka ce lo moro obuto i dako ame tye kede two dwe, en nwoŋo mom oworo remo ame acwer i kom dako-nono, dako daŋ lewic mom omako i remo mere ame onwoŋo cwer; gin aryo luŋ waŋgi bino rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Leviticus20:19 Kur ibut amin totti onyo amin pappi; mannono nwoŋo ibuto i wattini; balgi bino bedo i wigi. 
Leviticus20:20 Ka ce lo moro obuto i dako omin pappere, mannono nwoŋo obuto i dako omin pappere ame omin pappere gire en ame buto kede; balgi bino dok i wigi, gin bino to aboŋo atinnoro." 
Leviticus20:21 Ka lo moro obuto i ci-ominnere, nwoŋo otimo tim me kwer; nwoŋo obuto i dako ame ominnere gire en ame buto kede, gin daŋ bino to aboŋo atinnoro." 
Leviticus20:22 “Pi mannono myero igwok wunu i cwilla luŋ kede gin ame aciko ducu, myero icob wunugi, me lobo ame aterowu iye-nono kur ŋokwu oko." 
Leviticus20:23 Wun myero kur ilub wunu kite a rokkoro ame atye ka ryemo oko i nyimwu-ni; pien gin otimo kodi ginnono luŋ, en omio yia okwerogi oko." 
Leviticus20:24 Cite atyeko kobo baŋwu ni, ‘Ibino wunu leyo lobogi, an abino miyo baŋwu me bed megwu, lobo ame opoŋ i cak kede moo kic’ An a Rwot Obaŋawu, ame apokowu oko i kom rok ocele." 
Leviticus20:25 En omio myero wun ipok wunu gin akwo a myero cam kede a mom myero cam, kede winy ame ocamo kede en a mom ocamo. Myero kur iballe wunu idok wunu gin me kwer pi lee moro onyo pi winyo moro onyo pi ginnoro ame nya corre i wi lobo, i akina magi luŋ ame an doŋ atyeko pokogi oko pat pirwu, ni myero gin bed gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus20:26 Myero ibed wunu jo acil i nyima, pien an Rwot acil. An doŋ atyek o pokowu oko i kom rok ocele luŋ wek ibed wunu mega." 
Leviticus20:27 “Ico moro onyo dako moro ame obedo akor tipo onyo emuroko, obino neko oko; obino nanapogi oko kede gweŋe, remogi bino dok i wigi.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Kob baŋ olamdog, awobe Aron, kob baŋgi ni, Ŋattoro i akinagi myero kur balle kene pi gudo kom ŋat oto i akina jo me turgi," 
Leviticus21:2 kono onyo kom wattoro keken ame ceggi kedgi, acalo pappere onyo tottere, wode, nyare, ominnere," 
Leviticus21:3 onyo aminnere a mom ru oŋeye kede ico moro. En nwoŋo pwod wattere aceggi, pien cware pwod mom; en twero balle pire te doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo." 
Leviticus21:4 Kadi bed en doŋ tye acalo won paco i akina jo turgi, myero en kur balle kene, te miyo en pyedde kene." 
Leviticus21:5 Myero gin kur lyel dye wigi; kur daŋ olyel laŋet yer tikgi, mom daŋ oŋolo komgi." 
Leviticus21:6 Gin bino bedo jo acil baŋ Obaŋagi, kun mom opyedo nyiŋ Obaŋagi, pien gin obedo jo ame mio mot owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, ame en cam Obaŋagi; pi mannono myero gin bed jo acil." 
Leviticus21:7 Gin myero mom nyom dako ame alaya, onyo dannoro ame doŋ ŋat ocele obalo oko; mom daŋ obino nyomo dako a cware oryemo; pien alamdog obedo ŋat acil baŋ Obaŋa mere." 
Leviticus21:8 Ibino gwoke wunu ebed acil, pien en mio cam Obaŋani; en bino bedo acil baŋi, pien an a Rwot ame alonyowu ibedo wunu acil, an daŋ acil." 
Leviticus21:9 Ka ce nyaka alamdoggoro odoko ipyeda pi timo tim me coco, nwoŋo opyedo pappere; obino waŋo nyannono oko kede mac." 
Leviticus21:10 “Alamdog ame adwoŋ i akina omego mere, ame otyeko daŋ kwero oko i kare ame okete i dog ticcere, wek oruk boŋŋi acillege mom bino gonyo yer wie ony iyak ata, dok daŋ mom bino yeco rukkere;" 
Leviticus21:11 mom daŋ bino donyo i ot ame kom dano oto tye iye, mom bino balle kene, kadi pi pappere onyo tottere." 
Leviticus21:12 Mom bino donyo oko i kabedo acil, mom bino pyedo kabedo Obaŋa mere ame cil, pien moo wir a rikokwere kede baŋ Obaŋa mere tye i kome, an a Rwot." 
Leviticus21:13 En bino nyomo nyako a mom ru oŋeye kede lo moro. 
Leviticus21:14 Myero kur nyom dako a cware oto, onyo dako a cware oryemo, onyo dako moro a doŋ lon ocele obalo oko, onyo dako ame alaya; en myero nyom nyako me turgi a mom ru oŋeye kede lo moro," 
Leviticus21:15 me wek en kur pyed itino mere i akina jo me turgi, pien an a Rwot ame alonye ebedo acil.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus21:17 “Kobbi Aron ni, Dano moro i akinawu a roccoro tye i kome mom bino noko Rwot aceggi me miyo cam Obaŋa mere naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ." 
Leviticus21:18 Pien dano a roccoro tye i kome mom bino noke aceggi, dano acalo atowaŋ, aŋwalo, onyo ŋattoro ame poo tye i waŋe, onyo ame tyene onyo bade tuncel bor okato kare," 
Leviticus21:19 onyo lon a tyene otur, onyo a bade otur," 
Leviticus21:20 onyo lon a kore ogunakino, onyo lon acek meicel, onyo lon ame two moro obalo oko, onyo ame two too gwenyo onyo oŋoloŋol, onyo ginnoro owaŋo mane." 
Leviticus21:21 Dano moro i akina ikwae Aron ame roccoro tye i kome mom bino noko Rwot aceggi, me miyo mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot; ka ce roccoro tye i kome, mom bino noko Rwot accegi me miyo cam Obaŋa mere." 
Leviticus21:22 En twero camo cam Obaŋa mere aryo luŋ, en acillere meicel kede jami acillere;" 
Leviticus21:23 cite myero kur nok boŋo icika aceggi, kur daŋ bin cok i keno lam, pien roc tye i kome; me en kur pyed kabedona acil, pien an a Rwot ame alonyogi obedo acil.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Muca daŋ te kobo kittono baŋ Aron kede awobe mere kede baŋ jo Icrael luŋ. 
Leviticus22:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus22:2 “Titti Aron kede awobe mere ni myero gin ogwokere i kom jami a jo Icrael acil ame gin doŋ okwero oko pira, me wek gin kur opyed nyiŋa acil; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus22:3 Kobbigi ni, ‘I kare ikwaewu luŋ ka ce ŋattoro i akinawu onoko ginnoro acil ame jo Icrael doŋ okwero pi Rwot, kun dano-nono tye kede ginnoro i kome ame mio en bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo, wan dano-nono bino rwenyo oko i nyima; an a Rwot.’" 
Leviticus22:4 Ŋattoro ame i akina ikwae Aron ame won dobo onyo ame tut mollo i kome, myero kur cam ginnoro acil tuno ka kome olony. Ŋat ame bino gudo ginnoro a cik ogeŋo pi gudo kom dano oto, onyo lo ameremo mere me co oony i kome," 
Leviticus22:5 onyo ŋat ame ogudo ginnoro ame lak alaka ame twero miyo en doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo, onyo ŋat ogudo dano ame cik ogeŋo ame twero miyo en daŋ doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo, onyo kit ginnoro keken ame twero miyo en doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo," 
Leviticus22:6 ŋat ame ogudo kodi ginnono bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo tuno naka otyeno, dok daŋ mom bino camo ginnoro acil ka mom ru olwoko kome kede pii." 
Leviticus22:7 En bino doko ŋat a cik mom ogeŋo ka cen doŋ opoto, icennere en doŋ twero camo gin acil, pien kodi cemmono mere." 
Leviticus22:8 Dano-nono myero kur cam lee oto kene onyo ame lee tim omwodo, me en kur balle kede kene; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus22:9 Pi mannono myero gin gwok gin ame aciko me bal kur bed i wigi, te miyogi to oko ka ce gin opyedde i kome; an a Rwot ame alonyogi obedo acil." 
Leviticus22:10 “Ŋattoro ata myero kur cam ginnoro acil. Ŋat a bedo baŋ alamdog onyo apakaca mere myero kur cam gin acil. 
Leviticus22:11 Ento ka alamdog onwoŋo owilo opii kede limmere, ame dok te doko calo jami mere ikome, en opiinono twero camo; opii ame onywalo i ode daŋ twero camo." 
Leviticus22:12 Ka ce lo moro ata onyomo nyaka alamdog, nyare-nono myero kur cam gin acil ame oyalo Obaŋa." 
Leviticus22:13 Cite ka nyaka alamdoggono cware doŋ oto oko, onyo oryemo oko kun mom ru onywalo atinnoro, eka en te dwogo tuŋ a pappere kite a rik en obedo kede iye i kare ame pwod tidi, en doŋ twero camo cam a pappere, cite ŋattoro myero kur cam." 
Leviticus22:14 “Ka ce ŋattoro ocamo gin acil kun mom ocamo me akaka, en bino culo waŋ gin ame ecamo-nono kun medo acel me abic iye, te doŋ dwoko gin acillono baŋ alamdog." 
Leviticus22:15 Olamdog myero kur pyed jami a jo Icrael acil ame gin doŋ otyeko miyo baŋ Rwot," 
Leviticus22:16 me bal kede roccere kur bed i wigi pi camo cemgi acil; pien an a Rwot ame alonyogi obedo acil.” 
Leviticus22:17 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus22:18 “Kobbi Aron kede awobe mere, karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ ni, Ka ce ŋattoro me doggola Icrael onyo ŋattoro ame bedo iyi Icrael, omio mottere me yalo Obaŋa, kadi bed omio me cobo kwon, onyo me ber a yic kun mio baŋ Rwot me mot awaŋa." 
Leviticus22:19 Rwot bino gamo ka ikelo wunu mot a roccoro mom i kome, kadi bed ikwanyo wunu i akina dok onyo romi onyo akina dyegi." 
Leviticus22:20 Kur ikel wunu ginnoro a roccoro tye i kome, pien Rwot gire mom bino gamo pirwu." 
Leviticus22:21 Dok ka dano moro omio mot baŋ Rwot me kweyo cuny, pi cobo kwoŋ onyo me ber a yic, kun okwanyo mottere-nono i akina dok onyo i akina romi onyo dyegi, Rwot bino gamo en ame balloro mom i komgi; myero roccoro kur bed i komgi." 
Leviticus22:22 Lee ame waŋe oto onyo ame tyene otur onyo oŋol oko, onyo ame tut mollo i kome, onyo oŋoloŋol omako, onyo kannoro odugo tye i kome, mom myero imi wunu baŋ Rwot; kur imi wunu me mot owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot i wi keno lam." 
Leviticus22:23 Twon onyo romo ame dul kome moro bor atek onyo cek atek itwero wunu miyo me mot me ber a yic; ento ka me mot me cobo kwoŋ, Rwot mom bino gamo." 
Leviticus22:24 Kur iyal wunu Rwot kede lee moro ame odino mane oko, onyo ame oroo oko, onyo ame okao mane akaa, onyo ame oŋolo mane oko, kur iyal wunu Rwot i kodi mannono i lobowu." 
Leviticus22:25 Dok daŋ kur iyal wunu Rwot i kodi lee-nono ame iwilo wunu i baŋ a rokkoro me cam Obaŋawu, Rwot gire mom bino gamo pirwu, pien komgi roc tye iye pi bal ame onwoŋo tye iye-nono.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Rwot dokokobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus22:27 “Ka onywalo atin twon onyo romo onyo dyel, myero koŋ bed baŋ tottere pi nino abiro; cakere i nino me aboro nwoŋo doŋ otwero gamo me bedo mot owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus22:28 Kadi tottere obedo min dyan onyo min romo, myero kur nekgi luŋ nino acel, tottere kede atinnere." 
Leviticus22:29 Ka iyalo wunu Rwot i mot me pwoc, myero itim wunu i yore ame mio Rwot twero pwoyowu." 
Leviticus22:30 Myero cam i nino ame omio iyenono; myero kur wek moro iye doŋ tuno naka odiko; an a Rwot. 
Leviticus22:31 “Pi mannono myero igwok wunu icwilla luŋ, dok daŋ icob wunugi; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus22:32 Kur ipyed wunu nyiŋa ame cil, jo Icrael myero ŋe ni an acil; an a Rwot ame lonyowu ite bedo wunu acil," 
Leviticus22:33 ame rik akwanyowu i lobo Miciri, me an abed Obaŋawu; an a Rwot.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus23:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ecuban a Rwot ame ociko pirgi ame ibino wunu rabo ni myero obed cokere acil, ecuban ame ociko pirgi gin ene." 
Leviticus23:3 Ibino wunu tiyo ticwu pi nino abicel, ento i nino me abiro mere en cabit me weo mot, en nino me cokere acil. Mom ibino wunu tiyo ticcoro; mano en cabit a Rwot kan ame ibino wunu bedo iye luŋ." 
Leviticus23:4 “Magi gin ecuban ame Rwot ociko, gin cokere acil ame ibino wunu rabo pirgi i kare ame Rwot ociko." 
Leviticus23:5 I dwe me agege, i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen otyeno, mano en Kato a Rwot." 
Leviticus23:6 I nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe acellono en nino a Rwot me ecuban me Ogati a Tobi Mom iye; ibino wunu camo ogati a tobi mom iye pi nino abiro. 
Leviticus23:7 I nino me agege mere myero ibed wunu i cokere acil; mom ibino wunu tiyo ticcoro ame tek. 
Leviticus23:8 Ento ibino wunu yalo Obaŋa i mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot pi nino abiro; i nino me abiro mere myero ibed wunu i cokere acil, kur iti wunu iye ticcoro atek.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus23:10 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ ituno wunu i lobo ame abino miyowu, ka ce ikaa wunu iye cam, ibino kelo wunu arita me gin ogeo cek me wi mwaka baŋ alamdog." 
Leviticus23:11 Alamdog bino yoko arita-nono i nyim Rwot, me en ye gamowu; en bino yoko i nino ame lubo cabit." 
Leviticus23:12 I nino ame oyoko iyenono, en ame daŋ ibino wunu tero iye atin romo ame dittere romo mwaka acel, ame roccoro mom i kome, me obed mot awaŋa baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus23:13 Mot yala Obaŋa me moko kwon ame oyalo kede Obaŋa karacel i nyok romo, myero bed me moko kwon apwottere ame romo gwata aryo ame orubo kede moo, ame obino yalo i Rwot kun owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot me bed gin a ŋwece kur ame yomoro cuny. Mot amata mere bino bedo vino ame romo cupa aryo kede nucu," 
Leviticus23:14 Kur icam wunu ogatimoro, dok daŋ kur imwod wunu nyig belloro ame ocelo onyo a mom ocelo tuno naka i nino-naca ikokome, tuno ka ikelo wunu mot me yalo Obaŋawu. Mano bino bedo cik atwal tuno naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ, i kabedo luŋ ame ibino bedo wunu iye." 
Leviticus23:15 “Ibino kwano wunu kun icako wunu i nino ame lubo cabit, en nino ame imio wunu iye arita me mot ayoka baŋ Rwot; bino bedo cabit abiro twal," 
Leviticus23:16 kun ikwano wunu nino pyerabic tuno i nino ame lubo cabit me abiro mere. Eka doŋ ite cako kelo wunu baŋ Rwot motwu me moko kwon kal anyen. 
Leviticus23:17 Ibino kelo wunu ogati aryo i kan ame ibedo wunu iye, ame otedo i moko a romo gwata aryo me bed me ayoka; obino tedogi i moko kwon apwottere ame orubo i tobi, obed cam me wi mwaka ame omio baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus23:18 Dok daŋ ibino wunu kelo itino rommi kany wie aryo ame mwaka me ditogi tye acel acel, dok roccoro daŋ mom i komgi, kun ikelo wunugi karacel ogati-nono, kede atin twon acel, kede nyogi romi aryo, ame bino bedo me mot oŋolo me awaŋa baŋ Rwot, karacel kede mot memoko kwon kede mot amata; gin luŋ mot ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Leviticus23:19 Dok ibino wunu daŋ miyo nyok dyel acel me mot aŋola pi bal, kede itino nyogi romi aryo ame mwaka me ditogi tye acel acel me mot aŋola me kweyo cuny." 
Leviticus23:20 Alamdog bino yokogi karacel kede ogati me wi mwaka, me gin bed mot ayoka i nyim Rwot, karacel kede itino nyogi romi aryo-nono; gin bino bedo gi a Rwot acil pi alamdog." 
Leviticus23:21 Ibino wunu rabo koppere kannaler i nino-nono ikokome; ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil. Mom ibino wunu gudo ticcoro atek, mannono bino bedo cik atwal tuno naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ, i kabedo luŋ ame ibino bedo wunu iye." 
Leviticus23:22 “Ka ikaa wunu cam ame oceki lobowu, myero kur ika wunu yi poto luŋ aluŋa tuno naka i laŋete, dok daŋ kur irarao wunu en obwoto waŋwu i kare me kac. Magi-nono ibino wunu weko me konyo ocan kede orok; an a Rwot Obaŋawu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Rwot okobbi Muca ni, “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni," 
Leviticus23:24 I dwe me abiro, nino dwe acel, ibino kwero wunu iye nino me weo mot, nino me po ame ibino wunu rabo pire i koko opel, nino me cokere acil." 
Leviticus23:25 Mom ibino wunu gudo ticcoro atek, dok ibino miyo wunu iye mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Rwot dokokobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus23:27 “I nino dwe apar me dwe abiro-ni, en ame bino bedo nino me kwanyo bal. Myero obed nino me cokere acil baŋwu; ibino kumo wunu kun cunywu cwer, dok ibino miyo wunu iye mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus23:28 Kur igud wunu ticcoro i nino-nono, pien nino-nono obedo nino me kwanyo bal, me tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i komwu i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus23:29 Ŋat ame mom bino kumo kun cunye cwer i nino-nono, waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi." 
Leviticus23:30 Ŋat ame bino gudo ticcoro i nino-nono ikokome, abino neko dano-nono oko me kur bed i akina jo turgi." 
Leviticus23:31 Mom ibino wunu gudo ticcoro; mano bino bedo cik atwal tuno naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ, i kabedo luŋ ame ibino bedo wunu iye." 
Leviticus23:32 Nino-nono en ame bino bedo cabit me weowu mot, ibino kumo wunu iye kun cunywu cwer. Ibino gwoko wunu cabitwu-nono cakere i nino dwe aboŋwen otyeno tuno naka orwo mere otyeno.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni;" 
Leviticus23:34 I nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me abiro-ni en ame ecuban me gonye a Rwot bino bedo iye, tyeko naka nino abiro." 
Leviticus23:35 I nino me agege myero bed iye cokere acil, mom ibino gudo wunu ticcoro atek." 
Leviticus23:36 Myero imi wunu mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot pi nino abiro. I nino me aboro mere, ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil, en ame ibino miyo wunu iye mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot; mano en cokerewu me woro, mom ibino gudo wunu ticcoro atek iye." 
Leviticus23:37 “Magi-nono en ecuban ame Rwot ociko, ame ibino wunu rabo pirgi ni gin aye kare me cokere acil, me miyo mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, mot awaŋa, mot me moko kwon, mot aŋola kede mot amata, kun acel acel iye tye kede nino mere." 
Leviticus23:38 Dok daŋ imedo wunu cabit a Rwot ocele mege, kede motwu ocele mege, kede motwu ocele luŋ me cobo kwoŋ, kede motwu ocele luŋ me ber a yic ame imio wunu baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus23:39 “I nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me abiro, ka doŋ ikao wunu gin ame oceki lobo, ibino wunu kwero ecuban a Rwot pi nino abiro; nino me agege bino bedo nino me weo mot, kede nino me abor mere daŋ bino bedo nino me weo mot." 
Leviticus23:40 I nino me agege ame ibino wunu coko iye nyig yen abeco mere, kede jaŋ otit, kede jaŋ yat obuŋere, kede ŋet me dog kulo; eka ite bedo wunu i yomcuny i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus23:41 Ibino kwero wunu me bed ecuban a Rwot pi nino abiro mwaka i mwaka; mannono bino bedo cik atwal tuno naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ; ibino wunu kwero i dwe me abiro. 
Leviticus23:42 Ibino wunu bedo i gonye pi nino abiro jo luŋ ame gin jo Icrael bino bedo i gonye," 
Leviticus23:43 me ikwaewu ŋe ni rik amio jo Icrael obedo i gonye i kare ame akwanyogi oko i lobo Miciri; an a Rwot Obaŋawu.” 
Leviticus23:44 Muca daŋ te tito baŋ jo Icrael kittono, pi ecuban luŋ ame Rwot ociko." 
Leviticus24:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Leviticus24:2 “Cik jo Icrael kel baŋi moo jeituni ame oodo, ote liyo acil, me ony i tara ote weko bedo lyel nino ducu kun mom to." 
Leviticus24:3 Aron ocan mac olyel i nyim Rwot didik cakere otyeno naka odiko, kun ocano i kema me rwatte, oko i ŋe boŋo icika ame tye i nyim canduk me kop caden; mano en cik atwal tuno naka i kare ikwaewu ducu." 
Leviticus24:4 En bino cano tara kakare i wi gi-cibo tara me jabu ame olio acil i nyim Rwot kare luŋ. 
Leviticus24:5 “Ibino dok juko moko apwottere, ite tedo kede ogati apar wie aryo, kun ogati acel acel donyo iye moko gwata aryo." 
Leviticus24:6 Ibino canogi yore aryo, kun iryeogi abicel abicel i wi meja me jabu olio acil." 
Leviticus24:7 Ket odok luban ame olio acil i yore acel acel, me bed karacel ogati acalo gin me po ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus24:8 I nino me cabit luŋ Aron bino ryeyogi kare luŋ i nyim Rwot pi po Icrael; en gin me cikere ame ri nakanaka. 
Leviticus24:9 Mano bino bedo pi Aron kede awobe mere; gin bino camo kakannoro acil, pien mano en gin acil meicel ame omie i kom mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, ame myero mi baŋe didik.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Doŋ nino moro wot a dako moro ame obedo nyaka lo moro me Icrael, ame pappere onwoŋo dano moro me Miciri, owoto i akina jo Icrael; eka en wot a dako moro ame obedo nyaka lo moro me Icraellono te ero da i gony gin i dano moro me Icrael." 
Leviticus24:11 Wot a dako ame nyaka lo moro me Icraellono te cako yeto nyiŋ Obaŋa, kun daŋ ceno-gu. Awobi-nono rik ote tero baŋ Muca. Nyiŋ tottere onwoŋo Celomit, nyaka Dibri me atekere a Dan." 
Leviticus24:12 Gin rik te kete i buc, tuno waŋ ame onyuto baŋgi gin a Rwot mito." 
Leviticus24:13 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus24:14 “Ter lon ame oceno cen ca oko i ŋe gony, mi jo luŋ ame rik owinyo koppere ket ciŋgi i wie, eka ite weko lwak luŋ nanapo en oko i gweŋe," 
Leviticus24:15 Yin doŋ kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ŋat oceno Obaŋa mere, ballere bino bedo gire i wie." 
Leviticus24:16 Ŋat oyeto nyiŋ Rwot obino neko oko; lwak luŋ bino nanapo en i gweŋe. Arok karacel kede anywalli, ka oyeto nyiŋ Obaŋa obino neko oko." 
Leviticus24:17 Ŋat oneko dano, obino daŋ neke oko." 
Leviticus24:18 Ŋat oneko lee bino culo waŋe acula; obino culo kwo kede kwo. 
Leviticus24:19 Ka ce ŋattoro obalo dul kom awottere, en daŋ obino time kittono;" 
Leviticus24:20 ka oturo cogo obino daŋ culo i turo cogo, wan kede waŋ, lak kede lak; kite acalo en obalo kede dul kom awottere en daŋ obino balo mege." 
Leviticus24:21 Ŋat oneko lee bino culo waŋe acula; ŋat ame oneko dano obino daŋ neko oko," 
Leviticus24:22 Cik bino bedo acel pi arok kede anywalli; pien an a Rwot Obaŋawu.” 
Leviticus24:23 Muca daŋ te cako kop baŋ jo Icrael; gin te tero lon oceno Obaŋanono oko i ŋe gony, ote nanapo oko i gweŋe. Jo Icrael daŋ otimo kittono, kite ame Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Leviticus25:1 Rwot rikokobo baŋ Muca i wi kidi me Cinai ni," 
Leviticus25:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ ituno wunu i lobo ame abino miyowu, lobo myero gwok cabit a Rwot." 
Leviticus25:3 Ibino wunu coyo pottiwu pi mwakki abicel, ibino wunu daŋ ŋolo jaŋ olokwu pi mwakki abicel kun icoko wunu nyige," 
Leviticus25:4 ento i mwaka me abiro mere en ame bino bedo cabit ame lobo bino weo iye mot, en cabit a Rwot; mom ibino coyo wunu ginnoro i pottiwu, dok daŋ mom ibino ŋolo wunu jaŋ olokwu." 
Leviticus25:5 Gin otu kene iyi okoŋ mom ibino kayo wunu, mom ibino coko wunu nyig olokwu a mom oŋolo jaŋgi; mwakanono bino bedo mwaka ame lobo bino weo iye mot." 
Leviticus25:6 Cabit a lobo-nono bino miyowu cam, bino miyo piri kede pi opiini kede aŋecani, kede opakacani, kede arok ame bedo baŋi;" 
Leviticus25:7 pi limwu luŋ akwo kede leyi me tim ame tye i lobowu, gin a cek iye luŋ bino bedo me acamagi." 
Leviticus25:8 “Dok daŋ ibino kwano wunu cabit abiro me mwakki, mwakki abiro tyen abiro; kare-nono me cabit abiro-nono me mwakki, bino bedo baŋi mwakki pyeraŋwen wie aboŋwen." 
Leviticus25:9 I mwakanono ibino miyo apel kok aloŋo i nino dwe apar me dwe me abiro; i nino me kwanyo bal ibino miyo apel kok winyere i lobowu luŋ. 
Leviticus25:10 Ibino kwero wunu mwaka me pyerabiccere obed acil, kun irabo wunu i lobowu luŋ ni kuc tye pi jo luŋ ame bedo iye. Mano en ame bino bedo kare me jubiliwu, kare ame dano acel acel bino dok gire i dul lobo mere, dok ŋat acel acel daŋ bino dok baŋ jo me doggola mere." 
Leviticus25:11 Mwaka me pyerabiccere en ame bino bedo kare me jubiliwu; mom ibino coyo wunu koti, mom ibino kayo ginnoro otu kene, dok daŋ mom ibino coko wunu nyig olok ame mom iŋolo wunu jaŋgi." 
Leviticus25:12 Pien kare nono obedo kare me jubili, kare-nono bino bedo acil baŋwu; ibino camo wunu gin ame oya i poto." 
Leviticus25:13 “I mwaka me jubili-nono, ŋat acel acel bino dok i dul lobo mere." 
Leviticus25:14 Ka ce icato lobo baŋ awotti onyo iwilo ginnoro i baŋe, myero kur itim balloro i akinawu kenwu kenwu." 
Leviticus25:15 Yin ibino wilo lobo ibaŋ awotti kun wellere lubo wel mwaka a lubo jubili, dok daŋ en bino cato baŋi kun lubo wel mwaka ame ibino nwoŋo iye cam." 
Leviticus25:16 Ka mwakki pwod odoŋ abup, ibino medo wel ame iculo, ka mwakki odoŋ anok, ibino dwoko wel ame iculo piny, pien gin ame en cato baŋi en aye mwakki ame cam bino cek iye." 
Leviticus25:17 Mom ibino timo wunu balloro i akinawu kenwu kenwu, ento ibino lworo wunu Obaŋawu; pien an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus25:18 “Pi mannono ibino wunu tic icwilla, kun igwoko wunu gin ame ociko luŋ dok daŋ icobo wunu, me ibed wunu i lobo kun okwe mot." 
Leviticus25:19 Pien lobo bino ceko cem, ibino camo iyeŋ wunu kede, ite bedo wunu iye kun okwe mot." 
Leviticus25:20 Ka ce ikobo wunu ni, ‘Obino camo ŋo i mwaka me abiro, ka mom ocoo koti dok daŋ mom okao kac?’" 
Leviticus25:21 an abino ciko gum mera poto i komwu i mwaka me abicellere, me wek cam cek a romo mwaka adek twal." 
Leviticus25:22 I kare ame icoo wunu koti i pottiwu i mwaka me aboro mere, nwoŋo pwod itye icamo wunu cam aconnere, tuno naka i mwaka me aboŋwen; i kare ame cam doŋ ocek, ote kayo, nwoŋo pwod icamo wunu en aconnere." 
Leviticus25:23 Lobo mom obino cato me atera atwal, pien lobo mega gira; pien wun ibedo wunu wele, dok daŋ wun orok iye." 
Leviticus25:24 I lobo luŋ ame ibino bedo wunu iye, ibino miyo wunu olakoro lobo." 
Leviticus25:25 “Ka ominwu moro can omako, te cato dul lobo mere moro, wattere moro aceggi kede en ame bino wot lakoro lobo ame ominnere ocato-nono." 
Leviticus25:26 Ka ce dano-nono mom tye i wattere moro ame twero lakoro, ka ce en ikome dok olony te nwoŋo yo moro ame rome lakoro," 
Leviticus25:27 en myero kwan wel mwaka kun geo i kare ame en ocato iye, en te culli dano a rik owilo-nono wel ame pwod odoŋ, lobo mere te doŋ dok i ciŋe." 
Leviticus25:28 Cite ka yo moro mom tye ame romo miyo en ikome dwoko lobo mere i ciŋe, poto-nono bino medde bedo me a ŋat owilo naka ka mwaka me jubili oromo; i kare me jubili obino weko poto mere doŋ dok i ciŋe." 
Leviticus25:29 “Ka ŋattoro ocato ode ame tye i boma ame ocelo i cel, en twero lakoro oko a mom ru mwaka acel okato. En bino bedo i twer pi mwaka luŋ me lakoro." 
Leviticus25:30 Ka ce mom olakoro ame mwaka acel mom ru okato, obino doŋ moko ni ot ame tye i boma ame ocelo i cellono doŋ me a ŋat owilo, mege doŋ atwal naka i kare ikwae luŋ; mom dok otwero dwoko i ciŋ wonnere i kare me jubili." 
Leviticus25:31 Ento udi ocele mege ame tye iyi caro ame mom ocelo i celloro, obino tero a rom aroma i potti ame tye iyi caro; otwero lakoro dok daŋ myero dwok i kare me jubili." 
Leviticus25:32 Kadi amannono, boma a jo Levi, udi ame omiogi me bedo megi, jo Levi twero lakoro kare ducu," 
Leviticus25:33 Ka ce dano moro i akina jo Levi mom olakoro ode obino cato ottono i boma moro ame omiogi me bedo megi, obino dwoko ottono i kare me jubili baŋ wonnere, pien udi ame tye i boma a jo Levi, magi-nono obedo jamigi ame omiogi i akina jo Icrael." 
Leviticus25:34 Ento barroro me kwat ame omano bomagi mom obino cato; mannono doŋ lobogi atwal. 
Leviticus25:35 “Ka ce ominni moro i laŋeti odoko acan ame mom romo konyere kene, yin ibino konye; en bino bedo baŋi acalo welo onyoarok ame bedo i akinawu." 
Leviticus25:36 Mom ibino gamo magoba moro i baŋe, dok daŋ mom ibino medo wi baŋya mere, ento myero ilwor Obaŋani, me ominni bed kwo i laŋeti."
