Leviticus25:37 Mom ibino miyo en koporo limmoro i baŋi pi mito nwoŋo magoba, kur daŋ imie cam kun imito ni en dwoggo kun nwoŋo koŋ omedo moro iye." 
Leviticus25:38 An a Rwot Obaŋawu ame rik akwanyowu i lobo me Miciri me wek amiwu lobo me Kanaan, an ate bedo Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus25:39 “Ka ce ominni moro i laŋeti odoko acan, te catte kene baŋi, mom ibino miyo en tio baŋi acalo opii," 
Leviticus25:40 En bino bedo baŋi acalo apakaca onyo arok. En bino tic baŋi naka i mwaka me jubili; 
Leviticus25:41 i ŋe eno en doŋ bino ya oko i baŋi karacel kede itino mere, bino dok baŋ jo me doggola mere i kome, i lobo a kwari mere." 
Leviticus25:42 Pien gin obedo omirona ame rik akwanyogi i lobo me Miciri, mom obino catogi me bedo opii." 
Leviticus25:43 Mom ibino loye i loc agwa, ento myero ilwor Obaŋani." 
Leviticus25:44 Aco kop i kom opiini kede aŋecani ame ibino bedo kedgi: itwero wilo opii kede aŋeca i baŋ orok ame omano laŋetwu-ni. 
Leviticus25:45 Itwero wilo wunu daŋ i akina orok ame bedo baŋwu, kede i akina jo me doggolagi ame bedo baŋwu, ame onywalo i lobowu; gin twero doko acalo jamiwu." 
Leviticus25:46 Itwero miyo wunu baŋ itino awobewu ame bino lubowu, me bed acalo gin ame gin leo atwal. Itwero wunu miyogi obedo opiiwu, cite omegowu ame obedo jo Icrael mom ibino loyo wunu kittono, ame ŋat man loo wadgi i loc agwa." 
Leviticus25:47 “Ka welo moro onyo arokkoro ame bedo baŋwu odoko alonyo, kun ominwu moro ame bedo i laŋete odoko acan, eka te catte gire kene baŋ welo onyo arok ame tye baŋi-nono, onyo ocate baŋ wattoro me doggola a welonono," 
Leviticus25:48 ka en doŋ otyeko catte oko, otwero lakoro; ŋattoro i akina omego mere twero lakoro en oko." 
Leviticus25:49 Omin pappere onyo atin omin pappere twero lakoro en, onyo watgi moro me doggolagi twero lakoro en; onyo ka en ikome odoko alonyo, twero lakere gire kene." 
Leviticus25:50 En bino kwano wel kun kwano i ŋat a rik owile-nono; bino cako kwano i mwaka ame rik owile iye tuno naka i jubili; wel me gonye bino lubo wel mwaka. Kare ame en obedo kede baŋ lon owile obino kwano acalo kare apakaca. 
Leviticus25:51 Ka ce mwaka odoŋ pwod bup, en bino culo lim me lakere mere kun poro i wel mwaka, kun kwanyo i kom lim ame rik owile kede." 
Leviticus25:52 Ka ce mwaka odoŋ anok me tuno i jabuli en bino kwano wel karacel i dano a rik owile-nono, te culo lim me lakere mere kun poro wel mwaka me ticcere ame pwod odoŋ." 
Leviticus25:53 En bino bedo baŋe acalo apakaca ame oculo mwaka i mwaka; mom obino loye i loc agwa kun yin ineno. 
Leviticus25:54 Ka ce mom olakoro en i yore acalo magi, obino gonye oko i mwaka me jubili, en karacel kede itino mere." 
Leviticus25:55 Pien jo Icrael obedo omiro mera; gin obedo omirona ame rik akwanyo i lobo Miciri; an a Rwot Obaŋawu. 
Leviticus26:1 “Mom ibino tiyo wunu cal obaŋa moro pirwu kenwu, dok daŋ kur icib wunu cal ginnoro ame opao apaa cuŋ i lobowu onyo kidi moro ame ocibo me awora, kadi kidi moro ame ogoro cal i kome, eka ite ryebere wunu piny i nyimgi, pien an a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Leviticus26:2 Myero igwok wunu cabit mera, iwor wunu daŋ kabedona acil; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus26:3 “Ka ibino gwoko wunu icwilla luŋ kede gin ame aciko ducu, kun daŋ icobo wunu," 
Leviticus26:4 an abino miyowu kot ame cwe i kare mere, lobo bino ceko cem, yen i potti daŋ bino nyako nyiggi." 
Leviticus26:5 Kare me dino kalwu bino ri naka i kare me pwono olok, kare me pwono olok bino ri naka i kare me coyo koti. Ibino wunu camo cam romowu, ite bedo wunu i lobo kun okwe mot." 
Leviticus26:6 Abino miyo kuc bedo i lobo, pala romo moro mom bino beo i lobowu." 
Leviticus26:7 Ibino ryemo wunu okworwu luŋ, pala lwenywu bino miyogi oto i nyimwu." 
Leviticus26:8 Jowu abic keken bino ryemo jo mia twal, jowu mia bino ryemo jo tutumia apar; pala romowu bino miyo okworwu to i nyimwu." 
Leviticus26:9 Abino paro pirwu abino miyowu inywal, inya wunu, dok daŋ abino mo ko cikerena kedwu." 
Leviticus26:10 Ibino camo wunu camwu acon ame ikano wunu pi kare alac, ite onyo wunu aonya me wekki en anyen kabedo." 
Leviticus26:11 Abino yiko kabedona i akinawu, yia daŋ mom bino kwerowu." 
Leviticus26:12 Abino wowota i akinawu, abino bedo Obaŋawu, wun daŋ ibino wunu bedo jo mera." 
Leviticus26:13 An a Rwot Obaŋawu ame rik akwanyowu i lobo me Miciri, me kur ibed wunu opiigi; an doŋ atuturo bayi loc ame oririo i ŋutwu, amio doŋ iwoto wunu atira." 
Leviticus26:14 “Ento ka mom ibino winyo wunu koppa, dok daŋ mom i ibino cobo wunu gin ame aciko-ni luŋ," 
Leviticus26:15 ka ce ibino cayo wunu icwilla, dok ka ce yiwu okwero cikka mom ite cobo wunu gin ame aciko-ni luŋ, ento ituro wunu cikerena," 
Leviticus26:16 abino timowu kit man: abino miyo lworo aŋolle aŋola makowu, kede aola owio, kede aburu ame cocoro waŋ jo kun balo komwu oko. Dok daŋ ibino wunu yelle coyo koti nono, pien okworwu gire en ame bino camo." 
Leviticus26:17 Abino ciko waŋa i komwu, obino pwodowu i nyim okworwu. Jo ame dagowu en ame bino loyowu; dok daŋ ibino ŋwec wunu kun ŋattoro gire mom aryemo yorwu." 
Leviticus26:18 Ka atimo mano luŋ mom daŋ ite winyo wunu koppa, abino medde goyowu tyen abiro pi balwu." 
Leviticus26:19 Abino turo teko me awakawu oko, abino miyo polowu luŋ bedo atek calo nyonyo, lobowu daŋ te bedo atek calo mola." 
Leviticus26:20 Tek komwu bino to nono, pien lobowu mom gire bino ceko cem, yen me lobowu daŋ mom bino nyako nyiggi." 
Leviticus26:21 “Ka ce dok pwod imedde wunu pyem keda, kun mom iwinyo wunu koppa, abino medde coro two mogo apek i komwu, kun pol bala balwu tyen abiro." 
Leviticus26:22 Dok daŋ abino cwayo leyi me tim areco mege i akinawu, ame bino mamako itinowu, tyeko limwu akwo oko i ciŋwu, eka te miyo welwu jwik doko anonok, yowu te yuggo oko." 
Leviticus26:23 “Ka ce cannono mom omio idwogo wunu baŋa, ka ce pwod imedde wunu pyem keda," 
Leviticus26:24 an daŋ abino pyem kedwu, an ikoma ate pwodowu tyen abiro pi balwu." 
Leviticus26:25 Abino kelo pala romo ikomwu me culo kwor pi cikerena. Ka icokere wunu i dye bomawu luŋ, abino cwayo too edeke agwa i akinawu, ote miyowu i ciŋ okworwu." 
Leviticus26:26 Abino miyo cam ame ikwo wunu kede rwenyo oko, mon apar bino tedo ogatiwu i keno acel, dok daŋ gin bino pokkiwu ogati kun opimo apima; ibino camo wunu cite mom ibino yeŋowu." 
Leviticus26:27 “Ka ce daŋ dok atimo man, ento mom daŋ ite winyo wunu koppa, kun imedde wunu pyem keda," 
Leviticus26:28 an daŋ abino pyem kedwu agwa meicel, an ikoma ate pwodowu tyen abiro pi balwu." 
Leviticus26:29 Ibino wunu camo riŋo kom awobewu, dok daŋ i ibino wunu camo riŋo kom anyirawu." 
Leviticus26:30 Abino turo ka woro jogiwu ame tye i wi kiddi malo, ate totoŋo keno lamwu me lamo odok akur oko, kun abolo komwu oto i kom obaŋewu a mom ikwo. Yia doŋ bino kwerowu oko." 
Leviticus26:31 Abino miyo bomawu doko wi obur, kabedowu acil daŋ bino doŋ nono, mom daŋ doŋ abino ŋweyo giwu a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny." 
Leviticus26:32 Abino balo lobowu odoco, me wekokworwu ame bino bedo iye bed kede wur pire." 
Leviticus26:33 Abino ketowu atata i akina rok ocele, ate woto pala romo iyi akure me ryemowu, lobowu doŋ te doŋ nono, bomawu luŋ daŋ te doko wi obur." 
Leviticus26:34 “I kare-nono lobo koŋ te gwoko cabittere luŋ pi kare luŋ ame pwod tye nono, kun wun nwoŋo itye wunu i lobo okworwu: lobo koŋ bino we kun gwoko cabittere luŋ." 
Leviticus26:35 Pi kare luŋ ame lobo pwod tye nono, lobo koŋ bino we, weo ame yam mom ru obilo i cabitwu luŋ i kare ame pwod onwoŋo ibedo wunu iye." 
Leviticus26:36 Aco jo mogo i akinawu ame bino doŋ, abino cwayigi lworo i cunygi i lobo okworgi luŋ, ame bino miyo oriŋo ka pot yat ame yamo oyeŋo. Gin bino riŋo bala lon a riŋo pala romo, ote rette piny kun ŋattoro gire mom aryemo yorgi." 
Leviticus26:37 Gin bino twomere kengi kengi, ŋat man i kom awottere, calo jo a riŋo leb pala romo, kadi bed ŋattoro gire nwoŋo mom aryemo yorgi; mom ibino bedo wunu i tekcunyoro me cuŋ i nyim okworwu." 
Leviticus26:38 Ibino to wunu luŋ i akina orok, lobo okworwu bino camo komwu luŋ." 
Leviticus26:39 Jo mogo i akinawu ame bino doŋ komgi bino gobere oko i lobo okworgi pi balgi; dok daŋ pi bal a kwarigi, komgi bino gobere oko calo gin." 
Leviticus26:40 “Cite ka gin bino tuco balgi kede bal a kwarigi pi timgi areco i koma, kede pi pyem keda," 
Leviticus26:41 te miyo an daŋ pyem kedgi, ate kelogi i lobo okworgi; ka ce jo-nono ame lirregi rik mom ru odonyo i cunygi doŋ odoko amwol, ote timo gin a culo balgi." 
Leviticus26:42 Bino miyo doŋ apo i kom cikerena wan i Yakobo, abino po i cikerena wan Icaka, dok daŋ abino po i cikerena wan Iburaim, dok abino po pi lobowu daŋ." 
Leviticus26:43 Cite gin bino weko lobo doŋ nono kun gwoko cabittere luŋ ame nwoŋo gire pwod odoŋ nono kun gin mom tye iye. Eka gin te timo gin a culo balgi, pien gin rik ocao gin ame aciko, dok daŋ yigi okwero icwilla." 
Leviticus26:44 Cite kadi amannono, kare a gin tye i lobo orok mom abino cayogi, yia daŋ mom bino kwerogi atek ateka ame romo miyo aturo cikerena kedgi, pien an a Rwot Obaŋagi." 
Leviticus26:45 Pirgi abino po pi cikerena a rik acikere kede i kwarigi ame rik akwanyo i lobo Miciri kun rok luŋ neno, me wek abed Obaŋagi; an a Rwot.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Magi en icwil luŋ kede gin a Rwot ociko, kede cik ame en oketo i akina en kede jo Icrael i wi kidi me Cinai, kun kobo baŋ Muca." 
Leviticus27:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Leviticus27:2 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, Ka dano moro okwoijo kwoŋ a pire tek baŋ Rwot ame otiko kom dano, kun lubo wel ame yin iŋolo," 
Leviticus27:3 wel ame iŋolo ame mako ico moro ame mwaka me dittere romo pyeraryo tuno kede naka i pyerabicel, wel ame iŋolo bino bedo cekel me ryal pyerabic, kun lubo cekel me kabedo acil." 
Leviticus27:4 Ka ce dano-nono obedo dako, ibino ŋolo cekel pyeradek." 
Leviticus27:5 Ka ce danonono mwaka me dittere romo abic tuno naka i pyeraryo, pi atin awobi ibino ŋolo cekel pyeraryo, me a nyako apar." 
Leviticus27:6 Ka ce dano-nono obedo atin me dwe acel tuno kede i mwaka abic, ibinonolo cekel me ryal abic pi atin awobi, me atin a nyako cekel me ryal adek." 
Leviticus27:7 Ka ce dano-nono mwaka me dittere romo pyerabicel dok kede malo, ibino ŋolo cekel apar wie abic pi ico, me a dako apar." 
Leviticus27:8 Ka dano moro acan okato kare ame mom twero nwoŋo wel ame iŋolle, en bino tero dano ame okwoŋo pirenono i nyim alamdog, alamdog doŋ en a bino ŋolle wel, kun lubo gin ame dano okwoŋo-nono twero nwoŋo." 
Leviticus27:9 “Ka ce kwoŋŋono otiko lee ame omio baŋ Rwot, lee moro keken ame ŋattoro omio baŋ Rwot, lee-nono myero bed acil." 
Leviticus27:10 En mom bino loko dok i ginnoro ocele onyo keto moro ocele kakare kadi bed emito keto en aberrere akaka en araccere onyo en araccere akaka en aberrere; ka ce en loko lee moro kede lee wadgi, gin aryo luŋ ame olokogi-nono myero bed acil." 
Leviticus27:11 Ka ce onwoŋo obedo lee moro ame cik ogeŋo, a mom otwero miyo me yalo Rwot, dano-nono bino tero lee-nono i nyim alamdog." 
Leviticus27:12 Alamdog bino ŋolo wellere ka lee-nono ber onyo rac; wellere bino bedo kite ame yin alamdog iŋolo kede. 
Leviticus27:13 Cite ka en mito lakoro, en bino medo acel me abic iye." 
Leviticus27:14 “Ka ce ŋattoro ojalo ode me bedo acil baŋ Rwot, alamdog en abino ŋolo wellere, ka ber onyo rac; wellere bino bedo kite ame alamdog oŋolo kede." 
Leviticus27:15 Ka ce ŋat ame omio ode-nono omito lakoro oko, en bino medo acel me abic iye, ode te bedo doŋ mege." 
Leviticus27:16 “Ka ce ŋattoro ojalo dullobo mere baŋ Rwot, kun mio i kom lobo ame en oleo i baŋ kwari mere, ibino ŋolo wellere kun lubo kit koti ame obino coyo iye; ka koti-nono romo coyo koti cayiri puku adek, wellere bino bedo cekel me ryal pyerabic." 
Leviticus27:17 Ka ce en omio poto mere i mwaka me jubili, wellere bino cuŋ i wel ame iŋolo-nono." 
Leviticus27:18 Cite ka omio poto mere iceŋ a doŋ jubili okato oko, alamdog bino ŋolo wel lim a myero en cul pire kun poro i wel mwaka ame pwod odoŋ me tuno i mwaka me jubili, ote dwoko wel a yam iŋolo piny." 
Leviticus27:19 Ka lon ame omio poto-nono mito lakoro oko, en bino medo acel me abic i kom wellere, poto mere doŋ te bedo mege." 
Leviticus27:20 Cite ka en mom mito lakoro poto-nono, onyo ka otyeko cato poto oko baŋ ŋat ocele, mom doŋ obino lakoro atwal." 
Leviticus27:21 Poto-nono ka ogonyo oko i kare me jubili, bino doŋ bedo acil baŋ Rwot, acalo poto ame doŋ ojalo oko atwal, alamdog en ame doŋ bino bedo wonnere." 
Leviticus27:22 “Ka ce en ojalo baŋ Rwot poto moro ame onwoŋo owilo awila, kun mom obedo dul lobo ame en oleo alea i baŋ kwari mere," 
Leviticus27:23 alamdog bino ŋolo wellere tuno naka i mwaka me jubili, dano-nono te culo wel ame oŋolo i ninonono me bed gin acil baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus27:24 I mwaka me jubili poto-nono bino dok i ciŋ ŋat a rik owilo i baŋe, ŋat ame poto-nono obedo mege ame eleo i baŋ kwari mere." 
Leviticus27:25 Wel luŋ ame oŋolo bino lubo wel cekel me kabedo acil, kun cekel acel romo gera pyeraryo." 
Leviticus27:26 “Ento itino kao me leyi mom obino jalo baŋ Rwot, pien itino kao luŋ obedo me a Rwot con; kadi twon onyo romo, obedo gire me a Rwot." 
Leviticus27:27 Ka ce lee a cik ogeŋo, en bino wilo i baŋi i wel ame yin iŋolo, kun medo iye acel me abic, aco ka mom olakoro, yin ibino cato acata kun icato i wel ame yin iŋolo." 
Leviticus27:28 “Ento gin ame dano ojalo baŋ Rwot i kom ginnoro ame tye baŋe, kadi dano onyo lee onyo poto ame oleo i baŋ kwari mere, mom ibino cato, dok daŋ mom obino lakoro; ginnoro luŋ ame ojalo baŋ Rwot nwoŋo en gin acil meicel baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus27:29 Ŋattoro ame ojalo baŋ Rwot me aneka, mom dok obino lakoro, obino neko gire aneka." 
Leviticus27:30 “Acel me apar luŋ ame oya i lobo, kadi gin ame oceki poto onyo nyig yen onyak, mannono luŋ jami a Rwot, gin acil baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus27:31 Ka ce dano moro mito lakoro ginnoro i kom acel me apar, en bino medo acel me abic iye," 
Leviticus27:32 Acel me apar me dok kede romi kede dyegi luŋ, acel me apar me leyi luŋ akato i te abiro akwat, gin luŋ bino bedo acil baŋ Rwot." 
Leviticus27:33 Wonnere mom bino penyo ka ber onyo rac, dok daŋ mom bino loko i moro ocele; ka ce en aloko, gin aryo luŋ ame olokogi-nono myero bed acil; mom obino lakoro.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Magi en cik a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca i wi kidi me Cinai pi jo Icrael. 
Numbers1:1 I nino me agege me dwe me aryo, i mwaka me aryo ame jo Icrael oya kede i Miciri, Rwot rik okobo i Muca i kema me rwatte, i tim me Cinai, kun kobbe ni," 
Numbers1:2 “Kwan wel jo Icrael luŋ kun ilubo i doggola a kwarigi, dok daŋ co nyiŋ co luŋ acel acel," 
Numbers1:3 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo dok kede malo, jo Icrael luŋ a romo lweny. Ibino kwanogi wunu kede Aron kun ikwano wunugi eryoŋet eryoŋet." 
Numbers1:4 Dano acel ame oya iyi atekere acel acel bino konyowu, kun dano-nono bedo acalo adwoŋ a loo doggola a kwarogi." 
Numbers1:5 Nyiŋ jo ame bino konyowunono ene: Jo a Reuben, Elijur wot a Edeur;" 
Numbers1:6 jo a Cimeon, Celumiel wot a Juricadai;" 
Numbers1:7 jo a Juda, Nacon wot a Aminadab;" 
Numbers1:8 jo Icakar, Netanel wot a Juar;" 
Numbers1:9 jo a Jabulon, Eliab wot a Kelon;" 
Numbers1:10 eka iyi awobe a Yucepu te bedo Elicama wot a Amikud pi jo Epraim, kede Gamaliel wot a Pedajur pi jo Manace;" 
Numbers1:11 jo a Benjamin, Abidan wot a Gideon;" 
Numbers1:12 jo a Dan, Akiejer wot Amicadai;" 
Numbers1:13 jo Acer, Pagiel wot Okaran;" 
Numbers1:14 jo a Gad, Eliacap wot a Deuel;" 
Numbers1:15 jo a Naputali, Akira wot Enan.”" 
Numbers1:16 Magi-nono gin jo ame oyero i akina lwak, gin obedo otel ame loo atekere a kwarogi kede odoŋe atekere me a jo Icrael." 
Numbers1:17 Muca kede Aron te kwanyo jo ame otuco nyiŋgi-nono," 
Numbers1:18 eka i nino me agege me dwe me aryo, gin te coko jo luŋ karacel; gin te bedo coye kengi kun olubo doggola a kwarigi dok daŋ olubo kite ame nyiŋ co luŋ ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo, dok kede malo," 
Numbers1:19 kite a Rwot rik ociko kede Muca. En okwanogi kittono i tim Cinai. 
Numbers1:20 Jo a Reuben, atin kao Icrael, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:21 wel jo me atekere a Reuben oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie abicel kede mia abic nono. 
Numbers1:22 Jo a Cimeon, ikwae mere ikokome ame lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:23 wel jo me atekere a Cimeon oromo tutumia pyerabic wie aboŋwen kede mia adek nono. 
Numbers1:24 Jo a Gad, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:25 wel jo me atekere a Gad oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie abic kede pyerabic nono. 
Numbers1:26 Jo a Juda, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:27 wei jo me atekere a Juda oromo tutumia pyerabiro wie aŋwen kede mia abicel nono. 
Numbers1:28 Jo Icakar, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi, kite ame nyiŋ ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny;" 
Numbers1:29 wel jo me atekere Icakar oromo tutumia pyerabic wie aŋwen kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers1:30 Jo a Jabulon, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:31 wel jo me atekere a Jabulon oromo tutumia pyerabic wie abiro kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers1:32 Jo a Yeeepu, ame obedo jo Epraim, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kile ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede, acel acel, cakere i komjo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:33 wel jo me atekere Epraim oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen nono kede mia abic nono. 
Numbers1:34 Jo a Manace, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:35 wei jo me atekere a Manace oromo tutumia pyeradek wie aryo kede mia aryo nono. 
Numbers1:36 Jo a Benjamin, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:37 wei jo me atekere a Benjamin oromo tutumia pyeradek wie abic kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers1:38 Jo a Dan, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:39 wel jo me atekere a Dan oromo tutumia pyerabicel wie aryo kede mia abiro. 
Numbers1:40 Jo Acer, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi, kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:41 wel jo me atekere Acer oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie acel kede mia abic nono. 
Numbers1:42 Jo a Naputali, ikwae mere ikokome kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi, kite ame nyiŋ co ocoye kede acel acel, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:43 wel jo me atekere a Naputali oromo tutumia pyerabic wie adek kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers1:44 Magi gin jo ame okwano welgi, ame rik Muca kede Aron okwano, kun otel a jo Icrael konyogi, jo apar wie aryo ame ŋat acel acel ocuŋ pi doggola a kwarogi." 
Numbers1:45 Mannono omio wei jo Icrael luŋ ame okwano kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, jo Icrael luŋ ame romo wot i lweny," 
Numbers1:46 welgi luŋ oromo tutumia mia abicel kede adek, kede mia abic pyerabic nono." 
Numbers1:47 Ento jo a Levi mom ibino kwano wunu welgi karacel kedgi kun lubere atekere a kwarigi. 
Numbers1:48 Pien Rwot onwoŋo okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers1:49 “Atekere a Levi keken en a mom ibino kwano welgi i akina jo ocele ca. 
Numbers1:50 Ento myero iketgi obedo olo kema me kop me caden; gin lo jami mere luŋ anaka ginnoro luŋ ame tye iye. Gin en ame bino tiŋo kema kede jami ame tye iye luŋ, gin bino tic iye; gonygi bino guro ke ma dyere." 
Numbers1:51 Kare ame kema me kop caden mito cako wot, gin jo a Levi en ame bino puto; dok ka omito guro kema, jo a Levi daŋ en ame bino guro. Ka ce ŋattoro ocele ata onoko ke ma aceggi, dano-nono obino neko oko." 
Numbers1:52 Jo Icrael bino guro kemagi eryoŋet eryoŋet, kun dano acel acel i gonnyere, dok ŋat acel acel bedo ite bendera atekere mere." 
Numbers1:53 Ento jo a Levi bino guro megi guro kema me kop caden dyere, me wek akemo moro kur pot i kom jo Icrael.” Jo Levi bino gwoko kema me kop caden," 
Numbers1:54 Jo Icrael rik daŋ te timo kittono; gin otio ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot ociko kede Muca. 
Numbers2:1 Rwot okobbi Muca kede Aron ni," 
Numbers2:2 “Jo Icrael bino guro kemagi, ŋat acel acel bino guro i te bendera atekeregi, kun gin tye kede anennoro me doggola a kwarigi. Gin bino guro mano kema me rwatte amano kun nyim kemagi tikere i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers2:3 Jo ame bino guro kemagi tuŋ kide, tuŋ ame ceŋ donnyo iye, bino bedo jo ame tye i te bendera a Juda kun oguro eryoŋet eryoŋet; atel a jo Nacon obedo wot Aminadab," 
Numbers2:4 ame jo mere okwa no oromo tutumia pyerabiro wie aŋwen kede mia abicel nono. 
Numbers2:5 Jo ame bino guro kemagi aceggi jo Icakar kede jo Jabulon bino bedo jo me atekere Icakar; atel obedo Natanel wot a Juar," 
Numbers2:6 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyerabicel wie aŋwen kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers2:7 Eka dok atekere a Jabulon; atelgi obedo Eliab wot a Kelon," 
Numbers2:8 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyerabic wie abiro kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers2:9 Wel jo luŋ onwoŋo tye i gony a Juda, kun lubere eryoŋetgi, oromo tutumia mia acel kede pyeraboro wie abicel kede mia aŋwen nono. Ka wot ocakere, jonnono bino telo yo." 
Numbers2:10 “Jo a Reuben en ame bino bedo i te benderagi tuŋ anyarolum, kun oguro eryoŋet eryoŋet; atel a jo Reuben obedo Elijur wot a Cedeur," 
Numbers2:11 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie abicel kede mia abic nono. 
Numbers2:12 Jo ame bino guro kemagi aceggi kedgi bino bedo jo me atekere a Cimeon; atel a jo Cimeon obedo Celumiel wot a Juricadia," 
Numbers2:13 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyerabic wie aboŋwen kede mia adek nono. 
Numbers2:14 Eka dok atekere a Gad; atel a jo Gad obedo Eliacap wot a Reuel," 
Numbers2:15 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie abic kede mia abicel i pyerabic nono. 
Numbers2:16 Wel jo luŋ onwoŋo tye i gony a Reuben, kun lubere eryoŋetgi, oromo tutumia mia acel kede pyerabic wie acel kede mia aŋwen i pyerabic nono. Ka wot ocakere, jonnono en ame bino ciro aryo i wot." 
Numbers2:17 “Eka kema me rwatte te doŋ cako wot karacel i jo me gony a jo Levi ame onwoŋo tye i dyere; kite ame onwoŋo rik gin oguro kede gonygi, en ame daŋ obino wot kede, kun ŋat acel acel bedo i kabedo mere ikome, ame daŋ olubere i bendera i bendera." 
Numbers2:18 Jo Epraim en ame bino bedo i te benderagi tuŋ to kun oguro eryoŋet eryoŋet; atel a jo Epraim obedo Elimaca wot Amikud," 
Numbers2:19 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen nono kede mia abic nono. 
Numbers2:20 Jo ame bino bino guro kemagi aceggi kedgi bino bedo jo me atekere a Manace; atel a Manace obedo Gamaliel wot a Pedajur," 
Numbers2:21 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyeradek wie aryo kede mia aryo nono. 
Numbers2:22 Eka dok atekere a Benjamin; atel a jo Benjamin obedo Abidan wot a Gideoni," 
Numbers2:23 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyeradek wie abic kede mia aŋwen. 
Numbers2:24 Wel jo luŋ onwoŋo tye i gony Epraim, kun lubere eryoŋetgi, oromo tututmia mia acel kede aboro kede mia acel nono. Gin bino ciro me adek i wot." 
Numbers2:25 “Eka jo a Dan te bedo i te benderagi tuŋ anyarodi kun oguro eryoŋet eryoŋet; atelgi obedo Akiejer wot Amacadai," 
Numbers2:26 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyerabicel wie aryo kede mia abiro nono. 
Numbers2:27 Jo ame bino guro kemagi aceggi kedgi bino bedo jo me atekere Acer; atel a jo Acer obedo Pagiel wot Okaran," 
Numbers2:28 ame okwano jo mere oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie acel kede mia abic nono. 
Numbers2:29 Eka dok atekere a Naputali; atel a jo Naputali obedo Akira wot Enan," 
Numbers2:30 ame jo mere okwano oromo tutumia pyerabic wie adek kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers2:31 Wel jo luŋ onwoŋo tye i gony a jo a Dan, kun lubere eryoŋetgi, oromo tutumia mia acel kede pyerabic wie abiro kede mia abicel nono. Gin bino ciro icen kun olubere i bendera i bendera." 
Numbers2:32 “Magi gin jo Icrael, kite ame okwanogi kede kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi; jo luŋ onwoŋo tye i gony ame okwano eryoŋet eryoŋet rik oromo tutumia mia abicel kede adek kede mia abic i pyerabic nono." 
Numbers2:33 Ento jo a Levi rik mom okwano i kom jo Icrael, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Numbers2:34 “Jo Icrael rik daŋ otimo kittono. Kit a Rwot rik ociko kede Muca luŋ, gin oguro daŋ kemagi kittono kun oguro i te benderagi; gin luŋ daŋ ote cako wot kun ociro kittono ŋat acel acel kede doggola mere, kite a doggola a kwarigi tye kede.”" 
Numbers3:1 Magi gin ikwae Aron kede Muca i kare ame Rwot obedo kop i Muca i wi kidi me Cinai. 
Numbers3:2 Nyiŋ awobe Aron ene: Nadab atinnere me kao, kede Abiku, Eleajar kede Itamar;" 
Numbers3:3 maginono nyiŋ awobe Aron, gin obedo olamdog ame owiro kede moo, ame rik oketogi i dog ticgi me bedo olamdog." 
Numbers3:4 Cite Nadab kede Abiku rik obin oto oko i nyim Rwot i kare a gin otio i mac a rik mom ocikogi me tic kede i nyim Rwot i tim me Cinai; gin rik onwoŋo pwod pe itino moro. Mano en omio Eleajar kede Itamar otio tic me olamdog kun papagi pwod kwo. 
Numbers3:5 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers3:6 “Kel atekere a Levi ceggi, ibin iketgi i nyim alamdog Aron me gin ti baŋe." 
Numbers3:7 Gin bino tiyo tic apapat pire kede pi lwak luŋ i nyim ke ma me rwatte, kare ame gin tio ticgi i kema," 
Numbers3:8 Gin en ame bino gwoko jami luŋ ame tye i kema me rwatte, dok daŋ otio tic pi jo Icrael i kare ame otio ticgi i kema." 
Numbers3:9 Ibino miyo jo a Levi baŋ Aron kede awobe mere; gin doŋ atyeko miyogi atwal baŋe kun akwanyogi oko i akina jo Icrael. 
Numbers3:10 Dok ibino keto Aron kede awobe mere, eka gin te tiyo ticgi me olamdog; cite ka ŋattoro ocele onoko aceggi, obino neko dano nono oko.”" 
Numbers3:11 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers3:12 “Nen, doŋ atyeko kwanyo jo a Levi i akina jo Icrael akaka itino kao luŋ ame ogeo yabo ot nyodo i akina jo Icrael. Jo a Levi bino bedo jona," 
Numbers3:13 pien itino kao luŋ mera. I nino ame rik aneko iye itino kao luŋ i Miciri ca, en ame daŋ rik akwero iye itino kao luŋ ame tye iyi Icrael me bedo mega, pien itino leyi kede me a dano, gin luŋ bino bedo mega; an a Rwot.”" 
Numbers3:14 “Rwot okobo baŋ Muca i tim me Cinai ni," 
Numbers3:15 Kwan wel awobe a Levi luŋ kun ilubo i doggolagi kede doggola a kwarigi, cakere i kom co ame ditogi doŋ oromo dwe acel wot kede malo,”" 
Numbers3:16 Muca daŋ te kwano welgi kite a Rwot okobo-nono, kite a yam ociko." 
Numbers3:17 Nyiŋ itino a Levi-nono ene: Gercon, Kokat kede Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Nyiŋ awobe a Gercon kun lubere i doggolagi ene: Libini kede Cimei. 
Numbers3:19 Awobe a Kokat kun lubere i doggolagi ene: Amuram, Ijar, Kebron kede Ujiel," 
Numbers3:20 Awobe a Merari kun lubere i doggolagi ene: Makali kede Muci. Magi gin doggola a Levi, kun lubo doggola a kwarigi." 
Numbers3:21 Jo a Gercon obedo jo me doggola a Libuni kede jo me doggola a Cemei; magi-nono gin jo a Gercon. 
Numbers3:22 Wel co iye ame okwano, cakere i kom jo ame ditogi oromo dwe acel wot kede malo oromo tutumia abiro kede mia abic nono." 
Numbers3:23 Jo doggola a Gercon rik oguro kemagi i ŋe kema a Rwot ame dok tutuŋ to," 
Numbers3:24 kun atel a jo Gercon obedo Eliacap wot a Lael. 
Numbers3:25 Tic awobe a Jo Gercon i kema me rwatte obedo tic me gwoko kema, akemmere kede gi-wumo wie, cuka me wumo doggola kema me rwatte," 
Numbers3:26 cuka aŋaba i dyekal, cuka wumo doggola me dyekal ame oguro kema kede keno me lam, kede tollege; kede dok tic ocele luŋ ame mitte i jami magi luŋ." 
Numbers3:27 Jo a Kokat obedo jo me doggola Amuram kede doggola a jo Ijar, kede doggola a jo Kobron, kede doggola a jo Ujiel; magi-nono gin doggola a jo Kokat." 
Numbers3:28 Wel jo iye ame okwano, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo dwe acel wot kede malo oromo tutumia aboro kede mia abicel nono, ame gin rik tio ticgi i kabedo acil." 
Numbers3:29 Jo doggola a Kokat rik oguro kemagi i ŋe kema ame dok tutuŋ anyarolum," 
Numbers3:30 kun atel a jo Kokat obedo Eliajapan wot a Ujiel. 
Numbers3:31 Ticgi rik obedo me gwoko canduk, meja, akara mac, keno lam, jami luŋ ame bedo i kabedo acil ame alamdog tio kedgi ducu kede boŋo me icika; kede dok tic ocele luŋ ame mitte i jami magi luŋ." 
Numbers3:32 Eleajar wot Aron, alamdog en ame bino bedo adwoŋ ame loo otel a jo Levi, dok en daŋ ame bino neno jo ame gwoko kabedo acil." 
Numbers3:33 Jo Merari obedo jo me doggola a Makali, kede doggola a Muci; maginono gin jo me doggola a Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Wel co iye ame okwano cakere i kom jo ame ditogi oromo dwe acel wot kede malo oromo tutumia abicel kede mia aryo nono," 
Numbers3:35 Atel a jo Merari obedo Juriel wot Abikail. Gin rik oguro kemagi i yo tutuŋ anyarodi me kema a Rwot. 
Numbers3:36 Tic ame omio baŋ awobe a Merari rik obedo tic me gwoko bayi luŋ me kema, arii mege luŋ, pagi mege luŋ, acib tergi luŋ kede ginnoro luŋ otiko ticcere; kede dok tic ocele luŋ ame mitte i jami magi luŋ;" 
Numbers3:37 karacel kede pagi luŋ i dyekal, kede acib tergi kede teke luŋ ame gurogi, kede tollege." 
Numbers3:38 Jo ame rik oguro kemagi i nyim kema tuŋ kide, i nyim kema me rwatte kun ame ceŋ donnyo iye, rik obedo Muca, Aron kede awobe mere. Gin onwoŋo otyeko ketogi me gwoko tic ducu ame mitte i kabedo acil, me tiyo tic luŋ ame mitte pi jo Icrael. Ka ce ŋattoro ocele ata onoko aceggi, danonono obino neko oko." 
Numbers3:39 Jo luŋ ame rik okwano welgi i kom jo Levi, ame Muca kede Aron okwano welgi pi lubo cik a Rwot, kun lubo kite a doggolagi tye kede, co luŋ ame ditogi oromo dwe acel wot kede malo oromo tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo." 
Numbers3:40 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni, “Kwan wel itino kao luŋ, ame co a tye i akina jo Icrael, cakere i kom itino ame ditogi doŋ oromo dwe acel wot kede malo; kwan welgi kun ilubo i nyiŋgi." 
Numbers3:41 Ibino tero jo a Levi bed mega, an a Rwot, akaka itino luŋ ame tye i akina jo Icrael, ter daŋ lim a jo Levi luŋ akwo akaka itino kao luŋ me lim akwo me a jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers3:42 Muca daŋ te kwano wel itino kao luŋ ame tye i akina jo Icrael kite a Rwot ociko kede. 
Numbers3:43 Wel itino a co luŋ ame okwano kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede cakere i kom en ame ditogi oromo dwe acel dok kede malo oromo tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo, kede mia aryo i pyerabiro wie adek." 
Numbers3:44 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers3:45 “Mi jo a Levi bed akaka itino kao luŋ ame tye i akina jo Icrael, ter daŋ lim a jo Levi luŋ akwo akaka limgi; jo a Levi bino bedo jona; an a Rwot." 
Numbers3:46 Pi lakoro itino kao a jo Icrael mia aryo kede pyerabiro wie adek ame odoŋ ame co a jo Levi orem oko pirgi 
Numbers3:47 ibino gamo cekel abic pi dano acel acel; ibino gamo kun ilubo cekel me kabedo acil, ame cekel acel acel romo gero pyeraryo." 
Numbers3:48 Lim ame olakoro i jo ame odoŋŋono ibino miyo baŋ Aron kede awobe mere.” 
Numbers3:49 Mano en omio Muca rik te gamo lim me lakere i baŋ jo a rik odoŋ, ame wel a jo Levi mom oromo me lakorogi." 
Numbers3:50 En rik te gamo lim me ryal ibaŋ itino kao a jo Icrael ame romo cekel tutumia acel kede mia adek kede pyerabicel wie abic, kun lubo cekel me kabedo acil." 
Numbers3:51 Muca te miyo lim me lakere-nono baŋ Aron kede awobe mere, kite ame Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Numbers4:1 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Numbers4:2 “Kwan wel awobe a Kokat i akina jo Levi kun ilubo doggolagi kede doggola a kwarigi 
Numbers4:3 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers4:4 Tic ame awobe a Kokat bino tiyo i kema me rwatte ene; gin bino tic i kom jami acil meicel. 
Numbers4:5 Kare ame kema doŋ bino cako wot. Aron kede awobe mere en ame bino donyo i kema me gonyo boŋo me gera: Nyiŋ lim me kare-nono icika kede wumo canduk me kop me caden. 
Numbers4:6 Gin bino dok lutogi iyi cao ame okwoo i lao dyegi eka ote peto boŋo ame kome luŋ obedo bululu bululu i kom mannono, gin doŋ te rwako ludi iye." 
Numbers4:7 Gin bino peto boŋo obedo bululu bululu i kom meja me ogati me aketa i nyim Rwot, gin doŋ te keto cani i wie, kede tabo me odok akur, kede weer, kede cupa me liyo mot amata; ogati me nino luŋ daŋ myero bed i wie." 
Numbers4:8 Eka ote doŋ peto boŋo arema i wie, ote dok luto i cao ame okwoo i lao dyegi, ote doŋ rwako ludi iye." 
Numbers4:9 Obino dok kwanyo boŋo obedo bululu bululu ote wumo i gicibo mac tara, karacel kede tara mere, kede makaccere, kede cani mere, kede tabo moo luŋ." 
Numbers4:10 Gin bino boyo oko karacel kede jami ticcere luŋ kun tye iyi cao okwo i lao dyegi ote doŋ keto i wi ludi me tiŋo. 
Numbers4:11 Obino peto boŋo obedo bululu bululu i kom keno lam me jabu, eka ote luto oko iyi cao ame okwo i lao dyegi, ote doŋ rwako ludi mere iye." 
Numbers4:12 Gin bino kwanyo jami ame otio kedgi i kabedo acil luŋ, te ketogi luŋ i boŋo ame obedo bululu bululu, ote dok wumo oko i lao dyel, ote doŋ pyelo i wi ludi me tiŋogi." 
Numbers4:13 Gin te jobo buru i keno me lam oko, ote peto boŋo ame obedo amaramar i wie;" 
Numbers4:14 ote daŋ keto iye jami tic i keno lam luŋ, jami ame otio kede, weer me waŋo mac, acob riŋo, atok buru kede becen, jami tic i keno me lam luŋ; ote dok wumo oko i lao dyel, ote doŋ rwako ludi mere." 
Numbers4:15 Kare ame Aron kede awobe mere doŋ otyeko wumo kabedo acil karacel i jami luŋ me kabedo acil i kare ame gin kobo gonygi oko, awobe a Kokat doŋ bino bino me tino, cite gin myero kur gudde i kom jami luŋ acil, me gin kur to. Maginono en jami me kema me rwatte ame awobe a Kokat bino tiŋo." 
Numbers4:16 “Eleajar wot Aron alamdog en ame bino loyo moo tara, odok akur, kede mot moko kwon me yalo Obaŋa nino ducu, kede moo wir, kun daŋ dok loo kom kema luŋ kede jami luŋ a bedo iye, kabedo acil kede jami luŋ ame otio kede.”" 
Numbers4:17 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Numbers4:18 “Kur iwek: atekere me doggola a jo Kokat to tum oko i akina jo Levi," 
Numbers4:19 ento myero itimgi kit man me wek gin bed kwo, kun mom oto i kare ame gin bino noko jami acil meicel aceggi: Aron kede awobe mere en ame bino donyo te wot nyutti ŋat acel acel ticcere kede yeccere ame en bino tiŋo." 
Numbers4:20 Ento gin myero kur dony iye me wot neno kom jami acil kadi acel, me gin kur to.”" 
Numbers4:21 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers4:22 “Kwan daŋ wel awobe a Gercon, kun ilubo i doggolagi kede doggola a kwarigi;" 
Numbers4:23 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi romo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi romo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers4:24 Tic ame jo doggola a Gercon bino tiyo ene, tic me atia kede tic me tino yec," 
Numbers4:25 Gin bino tiŋo cuka me kema, kede ke ma me rwatte kede gi-wumo wie, kede lao dyegi okwoo me wumo wie malo, kede cuka me geŋo doggola ke ma me rwatte," 
Numbers4:26 kede cuka me aŋaba me dyekal, kede cuka me geŋo doggola me dyekal ame oguro kema kede keno lam, kede lollege, kede me tic luŋ ame otio kede iye; gin bino tiyo tic luŋ ame mitte i kom jami-nono." 
Numbers4:27 Awobe a Gercon bino tiyo ticgi luŋ kite ame Aron kede awobe mere ocikogi kede i kom jami luŋ ame gin bino tiŋo, kede ginnoro luŋ ame gin bino tiyo; dok daŋ yin en ame ibino poko yecgi luŋ ame gin bino gwoko." 
Numbers4:28 Man en tic ame jo me doggola a Gercon bino tiyo i kema me rwatte; dok Itamar wot Aron alamdog, en ame bino loyo ticgi." 
Numbers4:29 “Awobe a Merari daŋ ibino kwano welgi kun ilubo i doggolagi doggola kede doggola a kwarigi; 
Numbers4:30 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers4:31 Man en gin ame gin bino tiyo, acalo ticgi luŋ i kema me rwatte; bayi me kema luŋ, kede arii mege luŋ, pagi mege luŋ, acib tergi luŋ," 
Numbers4:32 kede pagi luŋ ame oguro dyekal, kede acib tergi luŋ, kede leke luŋ me gurogi, kede tollege, kede jami me tic luŋ ame otio kede iye, kede ginnoro ocele luŋ ame otio i tic ducu. Yin ibino pokkigi jami ame omito ni gin tiŋ kun inyutogi i nyiŋgi." 
Numbers4:33 Man en tic ame jo me doggola a Merari bino tiyo i kema me rwatte; dok Itamar wot alamdog Aron, en a bino loyo ticgi.”" 
Numbers4:34 Muca kede Aron karacel kede otel a lwak okwano wel a jo Kokat kun lubo i doggolagi, kede doggola a kwarigi," 
Numbers4:35 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte;" 
Numbers4:36 welgi luŋ ame okwano kun olubo i doggola i doggola oromo tutumia aryo kede mia abiro kede pyerabic nono. 
Numbers4:37 Man en wel a jo me doggola a Kokat luŋ ame tio tic i kema me rwatte, ame Muca kede Aron okwano welgi, kite a Rwot rik ociko kun kobo baŋ Muca." 
Numbers4:38 Wel awobe a jo me doggola a Gercon kun lubere i doggolagi kede doggola a kwarigi," 
Numbers4:39 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte," 
Numbers4:40 welgi luŋ ame okwano kun olubo i doggola i doggola oromo tutumia aryo kede mia abicel kede pyeradek nono. 
Numbers4:41 Man en wel a jo doggola a Gercon luŋ ame tio tic i kema me rwatte, ame Muca kede Aron okwano welgi, kite a Rwot ociko kun kobo baŋ Muca." 
Numbers4:42 Wel awobe a jo me doggola a Merari kun lubere i doggolagi kede doggola a kwarigi," 
Numbers4:43 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte," 
Numbers4:44 welgi luŋ ame okwano kun olubo i doggola i doggola oromo tutumia adek kede mia aryo nono. 
Numbers4:45 Man en wel jo me doggola a Merari luŋ ame tio tic i kema me rwatte ame Muca kede Aron okwano welgi, kite a Rwot rik ociko kun kobo baŋ Muca." 
Numbers4:46 Jo luŋ ame okwano i akina jo Levi, ame rik Muca kede Aron karacel kede otel a jo Icrael okwano, kun lubere i doggolagi kede doggola a kwarigi," 
Numbers4:47 cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek naka i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, jo luŋ ame romo donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte," 
Numbers4:48 jo ame okwano i akinagi, welgi oromo tutumia aboro kede mia abic kede pyeraboro nono." 
Numbers4:49 Rik ore poko tic kite a Rwot ociko kun kobo baŋ Muca, ŋat acel acel ote miyo ticcere ame en tio onyo jami ame en tiŋo. Muca rik te kwano welgi kittono, kite a Rwot rik ocike kede." 
Numbers5:1 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers5:2 “Cik jo Icrael mi odobo ya oko i gony, kede ŋat acel acel ame tut mollo i kome kede ŋat acel acel ame odoko ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi gudo kom dano oto." 
Numbers5:3 Cwalgi owot oko, kadi co onyo mon, kun imiogi oya oko i gony, me gin kur bal gonygi ame an abedo iye i akinawunie.”" 
Numbers5:4 Jo Icrael daŋ te timo kittono, gin te ryemogi oko i gony; kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca, gin otimo kittono." 
Numbers5:5 Rwot dok okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers5:6 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka ce ico moro onyo dako moro otimo balloro ame jo balo kun gin oturo kede cik a Rwot, danonono nwoŋo oroco." 
Numbers5:7 En bino tuco bal ame etimo-nono; dok daŋ bino culo gin arac ame etimo-nono kun medo iye acel me abic, te miyo baŋ dano ame etimo gin arac baŋe-nono." 
Numbers5:8 Cite ka dano-nono mom tye i wattere moro ame myero cul waŋ gin arac ame otimo baŋe, obino doŋ culo waŋ gin arac ame otimo-nono baŋ Rwot pi alamdog, kun ogamo omedo i kom nyok romo me kwanyo bal ame otio i tic me kwanyo bal i kome." 
Numbers5:9 Mot luŋ onyo jami luŋ acil ame jo Icrael kelo baŋ alamdog bino bedo me alamdog. 
Numbers5:10 Jami luŋ acil ame dano acel acel mio, bino bedo mege; ginnoro luŋ ame dano-moro omio baŋ alamdog, bino bedo mege.”" 
Numbers5:11 Rwot dok okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers5:12 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka ce dako a lo moro ogak oko eka te timo timmoro ame turo cik me abor i nyim cware," 
Numbers5:13 ka omio lo moro obuto kede eka te bedo kun cware mom ŋeo, dok ŋattoro oneno daŋ gire mom kadi bed en oballe kene, acadennoro ame moko kop i kom dako-nono daŋ mom, pien ŋattoro onwoŋe iye mom tye;" 
Numbers5:14 ka ce cunnyoro me nyeko te mako ico, kun nyeko make i kom cege ame oballe kene-nono, onyo ka cunnyoro me nyeko omako ico i kom dako mere kun kono dako gire mom oballe." 
Numbers5:15 Ico bino tero dako mere baŋ alamdog, kun tero daŋ mot me yalo Obaŋa ame mitte pi dako mere-nono. En bino tero moko kwon gwata acel me moko cayiri; mom bino onyo moo iye, mom daŋ bino keto odok luban iye, pien mano mot me moko kwon ame omio me nyeko, en obedo mot moko kwon ame omio me poyo ballono." 
Numbers5:16 “Alamdog bino tero dannono aceggi, te keto i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers5:17 Alamdog dok bi no tero pii acil i gulu ame ocweo i lobo, eka te juko apua moro i piny i dye kema, te onyo i pii." 
Numbers5:18 Alamdog bino keto dako-nono i nyim Rwot, bino gonyo yer wi dako-nono weko ony iyak, te keto mot me moko kwon me me po i ciŋe, ame obedo mot moko kwon ame omio pi nyeko. Alamdog bino mako pii akec me ceno jo i ciŋe." 
Numbers5:19 Alamdog te miyo dako-nono kwon kun kobo ni, ‘Ka ce lo moro mom obuto kedi, ka ce mom igak oko ite bale keni kun yin itye i te loc a cwari, Obaŋa myero kur ye ginnoro arac timere i komi pi pii akec me ceno jo-ni." 
Numbers5:20 Cite ka ce onwoŋo igak oko kun pwod itye i te loc a cwari, ka ce iballe keni, ite miyo ico ocele a mom obedo cwari obuto kedi," 
Numbers5:21 (alamdog bino miyo dako-nono kwoŋo kwoŋ kun cenne kene, eka te kobbi dako-nono ni,) Rwot myero mi idok ŋat ame jo turwu tio kede nyiŋ i ka gin kwoŋere, i kare ame Rwot bino miyo amuruni twil oko kun yii daŋ deŋ;" 
Numbers5:22 wek pii me ceno jo-ni odony naka iyi amontenni, omi yii deŋ, eka te twilo amuruni oko.’ Dako te gamo ni ‘Amen, Amen.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Alamdog doŋ te coyo kop me kwoŋŋono i buk, te lwoko yino mere oko i pii akec ca," 
Numbers5:24 eka te miyo dakonono mato pii akeccono, pii ame oceno i jo, te donyo naka i yie, te miye twon rem a mom kobere." 
Numbers5:25 Alamdog dok te kwanyo mot moko kwon ame omio pi nyeko i ciŋ dako-nono, te yoko mot moko kwonnono i nyim Rwot, te doŋ tero i keno lam." 
Numbers5:26 Alamdog te juko moko kwonnono poŋ ciŋe acel, te waŋo i keno lam, obed me po i kome, en dok te miyo dako-nono mato pii." 
Numbers5:27 A doŋ otyeko miye mato pii oko, ka ce onwoŋo en otyeko bale kene kun otimo timmoro ame turo cik me abor i nyim cware, pii me ceno jo-nono bi no donyo iyi amontennere te miye twon rem a mom kobere; yie te den oko, anaka amuru mere daŋ te twil oko, dako-nono te doko ŋat ame jo tio kede nyiŋe i kwoŋere i akina jo me turgi." 
Numbers5:28 Cite ka dannono gire onwoŋo mom otimo bal, ginnoro arac mom bino timere i kome, dok daŋ bino nywalo itino.”" 
Numbers5:29 Man en cik a mako kop me nyeko, ka ce dako ame pwod tye i te loc a cware, ogak oko kun balle kene," 
Numbers5:30 onyo ka ce cunnyoro me nyeko omako ico, kun make i kom dako mere, en bino keto dako i nyim Rwot, alamdog bino tic i kom dako kun lubo cik man luŋ." 
Numbers5:31 Ico gire mom bino bedo i balloro, ento bal bino dok i wi dako ka ce onwoŋo obalo." 
Numbers6:1 Rwot dok okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers6:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka ce lo moro onyo dako moro okwoŋo kwoŋ a pire tek, kwoŋ me bedo dano akwera, ŋat ame opokere kene oko baŋ Rwot," 
Numbers6:3 en myero daŋ pokere oko i koŋo kede kit mat ocele luŋ ame mero dano; en myero kur mat koŋo olok awac onyo kit koŋo moro ocele ame mero dano, mom daŋ bino mato pig olok, akadi camo nyige adyaka onyo otwo." 
Numbers6:4 Pi kare luŋ ame nwoŋo en opokere kene baŋ Rwot, en mom bino camo ginnoro ame oya i kom olok, akadi nyige atitino mere i yie onyo poke." 
Numbers6:5 “Pi kare luŋ ame nwoŋo en pwod tye i kwonere me pokere kene baŋ Rwot, mom bino gudo wie, tuno ka kare me kwoŋŋere-nono doŋ otum, en gire bino bedo dano acil; bino weko yer wie yuggo ibim." 
Numbers6:6 “Pi kare luŋ ame nwoŋo en opokere kene baŋ Rwot, en mom bino noko kom dano oto ceggi." 
Numbers6:7 En mom bino bale te doko ŋat a cik ogeŋo kadi kom pi pappere, onyo tottere, onyo ominnere, onyo aminnere, ka ce gin oto, pien pokere mere kene baŋ Rwot nwoŋo pwod tye i wie." 
Numbers6:8 Pi kare luŋ ame nwoŋo en pwod opokere kene, nwoŋo en obedo dano acil baŋ Rwot." 
Numbers6:9 “Ka ce ŋattoro otulle atula i laŋete, ame te miyo en balo wie ame okwero, en bino lyelo wie oko i nino me lonyere mere; bino lyelo i nino me abiro." 
Numbers6:10 I nino me aboro mere en bino tero amam aryo onyo itino awele aryo baŋ alamdog i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Numbers6:11 Alamdog bino miyo acel pi mot me bal kede acel me mot awaŋa, kun tio tic me kwanyo bal i kom dano-nono, pien nwoŋo obalo pi gudo kom dano oto. En dok bino cako kwero wie i nino-nono ikome," 
Numbers6:12 te dok pokere pire kene me bedo dano a Rwot pi kare luŋ ame nwoŋo en pwod opokere, bino daŋ kelo atin nyok romo ame dittere oromo mwaka acel me bed mot yalo Obaŋa me walakino i roc; cite kare mere me agege ca nwoŋo doŋ oballe oko, pien en odoko ŋat a cik ogeŋo, pien pokere mere kene nwoŋo rik oballe oko." 
Numbers6:13 “Man en cik a mako dano akwera ame kare mere me pokere kene doŋ otum. Obino kelo i doggola kema me rwatte," 
Numbers6:14 en bino yalo Rwot i mottere, atin nyok romo acel ame dittere oromo mwaka acel me mot me bal kede nyok romo acel kun roccoro daŋ mom ikome, mano bino bedo mot awaŋa; kede akale acel kede nyok romo acel romo a roccoro mom i kome, me mot kweyo cuny," 
Numbers6:15 karacel i dita me ogati a mom orubo i tobi, capat me moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo, kede capat areppere ame mom orubo i tobi, ame oweo moo i komgi, kede mot me moko kwon kede motgi me amata." 
Numbers6:16 Alamdog bino terogi i nyim Rwot te miyo mot me ballere kede mot awaŋa," 
Numbers6:17 eka dok te miyo nyok romo me bed mot me kweyo cuny Rwot, karacel kede dita ogati a mom orubo i tobi. Alamdog dok te miyo mot me moko kwon kede mot amata." 
Numbers6:18 Dano okwero-nono bino lyelo yer wie ame onwoŋo okwero-nono i doggola kema me rwatte, te coko yer wie-nono keto i mac ame tye i te mot me kweyo cuny." 
Numbers6:19 Alamdog bino kwanyo bad nyok romo a doŋ otedo oko, kede capat acel a mom orubo i tobi iyi dita me ogati a tobi mom iye, kede capat areppere acel a mom orubo i tobi, te ketogi luŋ i cuny ciŋ dano akwera, kare ame nwoŋo doŋ olyelo yer wie me akwera oko." 
Numbers6:20 Alamdog bino yokogi luŋ me bedo mot ayoka i nyim Rwot; magi-nono iner alamdog acillege, karacel kede ogok ame oyoko, kede amuru ame omio; dano akwera doŋ twero mato koŋo olok." 
Numbers6:21 “Man en cik a mako dano akwera ame okwoŋo kwoŋ. En bino miyo mottere baŋ Rwot ame oporo kwoŋŋere ame en onwoŋo okwoŋo me bedo dano akwera, karacel kede gin ame en romo nwoŋo; en bino timo kun lubo cik me pokere mere acalo dano akwera kun daŋ lubere i kwoŋŋere.”" 
Numbers6:22 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers6:23 “Kobbi Aron kede awobe mere ni, Ibino wunu lamo gum i kom jo Icrael kit man: ibino wunu kobo baŋgi ni," 
Numbers6:24 Rwot myero omiwu gum, dok daŋ ogwokwu;" 
Numbers6:25 Rwot omi waŋe oryeny i komwu, otimwu ber;" 
Numbers6:26 Rwot otiŋ waŋe i komwu, omiwu kuc." 
Numbers6:27 “Gin bino keto nyiŋa kittono i kom j Icrael, an abino miyogi winyo.”" 
Numbers7:1 I nino ame rik Muca otyeko guro iye kema, owiro kede moo, dok daŋ okwero oko karacel kede jami mere luŋ." 
Numbers7:2 I kare-nono otel a jo Icrael ame gin odoŋe me doggola a kwarigi, otel me atekere ame loo jo ame okwano welgi," 
Numbers7:3 gin omio motgi ote kelo i nyim Rwot. Gin omio gadigadi abicel ame tye kede awum wigi, kede twoni apar wie aryo; otel aryo aryo omio gadigadi acel acel, kun ŋat acel acel mio twon acel acel; gin omio mano luŋ i nyim kema." 
Numbers7:4 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers7:5 “Gam jamigi-nono luŋ i baŋgi me ti kedgi pi tic ame tye i kema me rwatte; mi jami-nono luŋ baŋ jo Levi, kun imio baŋ ŋat acel acel kite a ticcere tye kede.”" 
Numbers7:6 Mano en omio Muca te gamo gadigadi luŋ kede twoni, te miyo baŋ jo Levi." 
Numbers7:7 Omio gadigadi aryo kede twoni aŋwen baŋ awobe Gercon ame oporo ticgi; 
Numbers7:8 dok te miyo gadigadi aŋwen kede twoni aboro baŋ awobe a Merari, ame oporo ticgi, kun gin luŋ tye i loc Itamar wot Aron alamdog." 
Numbers7:9 Ento mom omio moro baŋ awobe a Kokat, pien gin rik onwoŋo oketogi i tic me gwoko jami acil ame myero gin tiŋgi i wi gwokgi." 
Numbers7:10 Otel te miyo mot kwero keno lam i nino ame owiro kede moo-nono; otel omio motgi i nyim keno me lam. 
Numbers7:11 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Gin bino miyo motgi kun atel wic acel acel mio mere i nino mere kene, me kwero keno lam.”" 
Numbers7:12 Ŋat a rik te geyo miyo mottere i nino me agege obedo Nacon wot Aminadab, me atekere a Juda." 
Numbers7:13 En omio cani ryal ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becan ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, ka oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo, tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:14 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:15 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa" 
Numbers7:16 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:17 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel pi mot me kweyo cuny. Man en mot ame rik Nakucon wot Aminadab omio." 
Numbers7:18 I nino me aryo mere, Netanel wot a Juar ame obedo atel a jo Icakar en ate miyo mege." 
Numbers7:19 En rik te miyo me mottere, cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo kede cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon," 
Numbers7:20 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar ame odok akur opoŋ yie; 
Numbers7:21 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:22 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:23 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi rommi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic, ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi gin, mot ame rik Netanel wot a Juar omio." 
Numbers7:24 I nino me adekkere, Eliab wot a Kelon ame obedo atel a jo Jabulon te miyo mege." 
Numbers7:25 En rik te miyo mottere cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:26 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:27 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:28 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:29 En daŋ dok te miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi gin mot ame rik Eliab wot a Kelon omio." 
Numbers7:30 I nino me aŋwennere, Elijur wot a Cedeur ame obedo atel a jo Reuben te miyo mege," 
Numbers7:31 En rik te miyo mottere cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ nwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:32 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:33 kede atin twon acel, kede nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:34 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:35 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni abic, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Elijur wot a Cedeur omio." 
Numbers7:36 I nino me abiccere, Celumiel wot a Jericadai ame obedo atel a jo Cimeon, te miyo mege." 
Numbers7:37 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:38 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:39 kede atin twon acel, kede nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa" 
Numbers7:40 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:41 En te dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Celumiel wot a Jericadai omio." 
Numbers7:42 I nino me abiccellere Eliacap wot a Deuel ame obedo atel a jo Gad te miyo mege," 
Numbers7:43 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere rom cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:44 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:45 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:46 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:47 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi rommi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Eliacap wot a Deuel omio." 
Numbers7:48 I nino me kany wie aryo mere, Elicama wot a Amikud ame obedo atel a jo Epraim te miyo mege." 
Numbers7:49 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:50 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:51 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:52 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:53 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi gin mot ame rik Elicama wot Amikud omio." 
Numbers7:54 I nino me kany wie adekkere Gamaliel wot a Pedajur ame obedo atel a jo Manace te miyo mege. 
Numbers7:55 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo olubo cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opon yigi." 
Numbers7:56 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:57 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, me mot awaŋa; romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:58 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:59 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Gamaliel wot a Pedajur omio." 
Numbers7:60 I nino me kany wie aŋwennere, Abidan wot a Gideoni ame obedo atel a jo Benjamin te miyo mege," 
Numbers7:61 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo kede cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:62 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:63 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo mwaka acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:64 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:65 En te daŋ miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Abidan wot a Gideoni omio." 
Numbers7:66 I nino me tomonnere, Akiejer wot Amicadai ame obedo atel a jo Dan te miyo mege." 
Numbers7:67 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo kede cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:68 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:69 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:70 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:71 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni abic, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Akiejer wot Amicadai omio." 
Numbers7:72 I nino me apar wie acellere, Pagiel wot Okoran ame obedo atel a jo Acer te miyo mege." 
Numbers7:73 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:74 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:75 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:76 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:77 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo mwaka acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi gin mot ame rik Pagiel wot a Okoran omio." 
Numbers7:78 I nino me apar wie aryo mere, Akira wot Enan ame obedo atel a jo Naputali te miyo mege." 
Numbers7:79 En rik te miyo cani ryal acel ame pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen ryal ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro, kun nwoŋo oporo kede cekel me kabedo acil; gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo tye opoŋ yigi, me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:80 Dok te miyo daŋ tabo jabu acel ame pekkere romo cekel apar, ame odok akur opoŋ yie;" 
Numbers7:81 kede atin twon acel, nyok romo acel, kede atin nyok romo acel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo acel, me mot awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:82 kede dok nyok dyel acel me mot me bal. 
Numbers7:83 En te daŋ dok miyo twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic nyogi dyegi abic kede itino nyogi romi abic ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel, pi mot me kweyo cuny. Magi en mot ame rik Akira wot Enan omio." 
Numbers7:84 Magi en mot me kwero keno lam ame rik omio i nino ame owiro iye keno lam kede moo, ame otel a jo Icrael omio: cani ryal apar wie aryo, becen me ryal apar wie aryo, tabo jabu apar wie aryo," 
Numbers7:85 kun cani me ryal acel acel pekkere romo cekel mia acel kede pyeradek, kede becen acel acel pekkere romo cekel pyerabiro nono. Pek a ryal me jami-nono luŋ te romo cekel tutumia aryo kede mia aŋwen kun nwoŋo oporo kede cekel me kabedo acil." 
Numbers7:86 Tabo me jabu onwoŋo tye apar wie aryo ame odok akur opon yigi, kun acel acel pekkere romo cekel apar apar kun nwoŋo oporo i cekel me kabedo acil. Pek a jabu me tabo luŋ te romo cekel mia acel kede pyeraryo nono." 
Numbers7:87 Lim akwo luŋ me mot awaŋa te romo twoni apar wie aryo, nyogi romi apar wie aryo, kede itino nyogi romi apar wie aryo ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel karacel i motgi me moko kwon; kede nyogi dyegi apar aryo, me mot me bal." 
Numbers7:88 Lim akwo luŋ me mot me kweyo cuny te romo twoni pyeraryo wie aŋwen, nyogi romi pyerabicel, nyogi dyegi pyerabicel, kede itino nyogi romi pyerabicel ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel acel. Magi-nono en mot me kwero keno lam ame omio a doŋ otyeko wiro keno lam oko kede moo." 
Numbers7:89 I kare ame Muca owoto i kema me rwatte me kop i Rwot, en owinyo dwonnoro ame onwoŋo tye akop kede kun ya i malo i wi kom-me-kica ame onwoŋo ocibo ocuŋ i wi canduk me kop me caden, kun kobo kede winyere i akina okerubi aryo." 
Numbers8:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers8:2 “Kobbi Aron ni, Ka icibo tara malo, tara abiro bino lyel menyo nyim gi-cibo tara.”" 
Numbers8:3 Aron daŋ te timo kittono; en ocwinyo tara te cibogi malo wek meny kan a tye i nyim gi-cibo tara, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca," 
Numbers8:4 Man en kite ame otio kede gi-cibo tara. Rik otio i jabu ame oteto anyul; cakere i tere tuno kede naka iyi ature mere, onwoŋo oteto ateta kede anyul. Otio kun olubo cal a rik Rwot onyuto baŋ Muca." 
Numbers8:5 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers8:6 “Kwany jo Levi oko i akina jo Icrael, eka te lonyogi." 
Numbers8:7 Kare ame doŋ ilonyogi, tim kit man: kirgi i pii me lwoko bal, migi olyel komgi oko luŋ i lyedi, olwok daŋ boŋŋigi oko, ote lonyere kengi." 
Numbers8:8 Migi okwany atin twon ocele karacel kede mot me moko kwoŋŋere me moko apwottere ame orubo kede moo, eka dok ite kwanyo atin twon ocele me mot bal." 
Numbers8:9 Ibino tero jo Levi i nyim kema me rwatte, kun lwak jo Icrael luŋ ocokere karacel." 
Numbers8:10 Ka imio jo Levi me mot baŋ Rwot jo Icrael bino keto ciŋgi i wi jo Levi," 
Numbers8:11 eka Aron te miyo jo Levi i nyim Rwot me gin bed me mot ayoka ame oya i baŋ jo Icrael, me gin doŋ bed itiyo tic a Rwot." 
Numbers8:12 Jo Levi dok te keto ciŋgi i wi twoni, ote miyo acel me mot me bal, kede acel me mot awaŋa baŋ Rwot, me kwanyo bal i kom jo Levi." 
Numbers8:13 Ibino tero jo Levi i nyim Aron kede awobe mere, ite miyogi me mot, me gin bed acalo mot ayoka baŋ Rwot." 
Numbers8:14 “Ibino poko jo Levi i akina jo Icrael kittono, jo Levi doŋ bino bedo jo mera." 
Numbers8:15 Jo Levi doŋ bino donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte ame nwoŋo doŋ ityeko lonyogi oko, dok daŋ imiyogi oko acalo mot ayoka." 
Numbers8:16 Pien otyeko miyogi oko baŋa i akina jo Icrael, kun omiogi akaka itino kao a jo Icrael luŋ ame ogeo yabo ot nyodo, an doŋ agamogi me bedo mega." 
Numbers8:17 Pien itino kao luŋ i akina jo Icrael, me a dano kede me leyi luŋ obedo mega, rik akwerogi oko me bedo mega i nino ame rik anek iye itino kao luŋ i Miciri." 
Numbers8:18 Atyeko doŋ kwanyo jo Levi me leyo kakargi, gin itino kao luŋ i akina jo Icrael." 
Numbers8:19 Dok daŋ atyeko miyo jo Levi baŋ Aron kede awobe mere acalo mot, kun gin doŋ ya oko i akina jo Icrael me tiyo tic pi jo Icrael i kema me rwatte, kede dok pi kwanyo bal i kom jo Icrael, me two moro arac kur pot i kom jo Icrael, pi noko kabedo acil aceggi.”" 
Numbers8:20 Muca kede Aron karacel kede jo Icrael rik daŋ te timo kittono i kom jo Levi; kite ame Rwot rik ociko kede Muca luŋ i kop a dok i kom jo Levi, jo Icrael daŋ otimo kittono i komgi," 
Numbers8:21 Jo Levi te lonyere kengi kengi i kom balgi, ote daŋ lwoko boŋŋigi; Aron te miyogi acalo mot ayoka i nyim Rwot, Aron te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i komgi me wek gin bed ame olony." 
Numbers8:22 Jo Levi te donyo i tiyo ticgi ame tye i kema me rwatte, kun okonyo Aron kede awobe mere kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca i kom jo Levi; gin daŋ rik te timo kittono." 
Numbers8:23 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers8:24 “Man en kop a mako jo Levi. Jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wie abic dok kede malo, jo-nono bino donyo i tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers8:25 Ka mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, gin bino weko ticgi-nono oko, mom dok obino medde i ticgi atwal." 
Numbers8:26 Ento gin bino konyo omegogi ame tio i kema me rwatte me cobo ticgi kakare, cite mom obino tiyo tic ikome. Ibino timo jo Levi kittono i kom kop a mako ticgi.”" 
Numbers9:1 Rwot rik okobbi i Muca i tim me Cinai i dwe me agege me mwaka me aryo ame onwoŋo gin doŋ oya oko i lobo me Miciri kun kobbe ni," 
Numbers9:2 “Jo Icrael myero kwer ecuban me Kato i kare ame aciko. 
Numbers9:3 I nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe man otyeno, ibino kwero wunu i kare ame ociko. Ibino kwero wunu kun ilubo wunu icwillere luŋ kede gin ame ociko luŋ.”" 
Numbers9:4 Eka Muca daŋ rik te titti jo Icrael ni myero gin kwer Kato. 
Numbers9:5 Gin rik te kwero ecuban me Kato i dwe me agege, i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen otyeno i tim me Cinai; kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca luŋ, jo Icrael daŋ otimo kittono." 
Numbers9:6 Rik onwoŋo tye jo mogo ame cik onwoŋo ogeŋogi pi gudo kom dano oto, jo-nono rik mom twero kwero Kato i nino-nono. Gin rik te wot baŋ Muca kede Aron i ninonono," 
Numbers9:7 ote kobbe ni, “Wan giwa doŋ odoko jo a cik ogeŋo oko pi gudo kom dano oto, kara piŋo ogeŋowa miyo mot a Rwot karacel i jo Icrael i nino ame ociko?”" 
Numbers9:8 Muca rik te kobo baŋgi ni, “Koŋ ikur wunu, me koŋ awiny gin ame Rwot bino ciko i komwu.”" 
Numbers9:9 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers9:10 “Ka ce ŋattoro i akinawu onyo i akina ikwaewu odoko ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi gudo kom dano oto onyo onwoŋo owoto kannoro abor, en gire pwod bino kwero ecuban me Kato a Rwot." 
Numbers9:11 Gin bino kwero i dwe me aryo i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen otyeno; gin bino camo ogati a tobi mom iye kede pot dekkoro akec," 
Numbers9:12 Kur iwek wunu ginnoro doŋ tuno naka odiko, kur daŋ tur cogo mere moro; obino kwero kun olubo icwil luŋ a mako Kato." 
Numbers9:13 Cite dano ame cikkoro mom ogeŋo, dok daŋ mom owoto kannoro abor, ento mom dok te kwero ecuban me Kato, dano-nono waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo turgi, pien mom omio mot a Rwot i kare mere ame ociko, ballere gire bino bedo i wie." 
Numbers9:14 Ka ce arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu, mito daŋ kwero ecuban me Kato a Rwot, en twero kwero kun lubo icwil me Kato kede gin ame ociko. Cik bino bedo acel keken pi arok kede pi anywalli me lobo.”" 
Numbers9:15 I nino ame oguro iye kema a Rwot, en ame pol daŋ bino wumo iye kom kema oko, ame en kema me kop me caden; bino wumo wi kema oko otyeno kun nen calo mac naka odiko." 
Numbers9:16 Eka te bedo gire amanno didik, kun pol wumo wi kema dyeceŋ eka gin acalo mac te wumo dyewor." 
Numbers9:17 Ka pol owarre oko i wi kema, jo Icrael cako wotgi anyim, kan ame pol ocuŋ iye, jo Icrael guro kemagi kannono." 
Numbers9:18 Jo Icrael obedo cako wotgi kun olubo cik a Rwot dok daŋ obedo guro kemagi kun olubo cik a Rwot; ka ce pol pwod owumo wi kema a Rwot oko, gin omedde bedo gigi i gonygi." 
Numbers9:19 Kadi bed pol obedo wumo wi kemagi kare alac, gin jo Icrael daŋ medde gwoko gin a Rwot ociko, kun mom oya i kannono." 
Numbers9:20 Kare ocele pol wumo wi kema pi nino anonok meicel, cite pi gwoko gin a Rwot ociko, gin daŋ obedo i gonygi, eka dok pi lubo cik a Rwot, gin oya oko i kannono." 
Numbers9:21 Kare ocele pol twero wumo wi kema cakere otyeno naka odiko, te warre oko, gin daŋ ote cako wot oko, onyo ka ce dok omedde pi nino ocele acel, kadi iwor acel, kare ame pol owarre kede keken, en ame gin daŋ cako wot iye." 
Numbers9:22 Kadi bed ori i wi ke ma pi nino aryo, onyo dwe acel, onyo pi kare moro alalac ka ce pol pwod omedde wumo wi kema, kun bedo iye kannono, jo Icrael daŋ koŋ bedo i gonygi kun mom oya i kannono." 
Numbers9:23 Gin oguro kemagi pi lubo gin a Rwot ociko, dok daŋ ocako wotgi pi lubo gin a Rwot ociko, kun ogwoko gin a Rwot ociko kite a rik ociko Muca." 
Numbers10:1 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers10:2 “Ti apel me ryal aryo, tetgi ateta kede anyul: ticgi bino bedo me lwoŋo lwak i cokere kede me miyo lwak cako wot." 
Numbers10:3 Ka okuto apel aryo luŋ, lwak luŋ bino cokere baŋi i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Numbers10:4 Ento ka okuto apel acel keken, otel wic ame gin odoŋe ame tye i atekere luŋ me Icrael bino cokere baŋi." 
Numbers10:5 Aco ka okuto dwone okok icel keken idwon me cukkoro cuny mony, gony luŋ ame tye tutuŋ kide bino cako wot." 
Numbers10:6 Ka dok omedo kuto tyen me aryo, gony luŋ ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum bino cako wot. Obino kuto apel kok i dwon me cukkoro cuny mony ka ce jo acako wot." 
Numbers10:7 Cite ka imito lwoŋo jo karacel, obino kuto, ento myero kur mi kok i dwon me cukkoro cuny mony." 
Numbers10:8 Awobe Aron ame gin olamdog en ame bino kuto apel. Cik me kuto apel bino bedo cik atwal, ituno i kare ikwaewu luŋ." 
Numbers10:9 Ka onwoŋo iwot wunu lweny okworwu ame odiowu i lobowu, ibino goyo wunu duru kun apel luŋ kok, me wek po pirwu i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu, eka ote larowu oko i baŋ okworwu." 
Numbers10:10 I nino ame cunywu yom iye daŋ, kede iyi ecuban ame ocikowu pirgi, kede i kare me cako dwewu anyen, ibino kuto wunu apel i wi mot awaijawu kede i wi motwu me kweyo cuny; apel bi no kok me miyo po pirwu i nyim Obaŋawu; an a Rwot Obaŋawu.”" 
Numbers10:11 I mwaka me aryo, nino dwe pyeraryo nono, me dwe me aryo pol te cako warre oko i wi kema me kop me caden," 
Numbers10:12 jo Icrael te cako wot me ya oko i tim me Cinai kun okokoba akokob; pol rik te geyo cuŋ i tim me Paran. 
Numbers10:13 Man en tyen me agege ame gin ocako wot pi cik a Rwot ame Muca okobbigi," 
Numbers10:14 Bendera a jo Juda en ame otelo yo kun woto eryoŋet eryoŋet; kun Nakucon wot Aminadab en obedo atel wi monygi," 
Numbers10:15 Atel wi mony a jo Icakar obedo Natanel wot a Juar," 
Numbers10:16 kede atel wi mony me atekere a Jabulon te bedo Eliab wot a Kelon. 
Numbers10:17 Kare ame doŋ oputo kema oko, awobe a Gercon kede awobe a Merari, ame gin otiŋ kema, gin te cako wot." 
Numbers10:18 Bendera me gony a Reuben daŋ te cako wot eryoŋet eryoŋet, kun atel wi monygi obedo Elijur wot a Cedeur." 
Numbers10:19 Atel wi mony me atekere a Cimeon obedo Calamiel wot a Juricadai. 
Numbers10:20 Atel wi mony me atekere a Gad te bedo Eliacap wot a Deuel. 
Numbers10:21 Jo Kokat te dok cako wot, kun otiŋo jami acil luŋ; rik oguro kema oko kun gin mom ru otuno." 
Numbers10:22 Eka bendera me gony a Epraim te cako wot eryoŋet eryoŋet kun atel monygi Elicama wot Amikud. 
Numbers10:23 Atel wi mony me atekere a Manace te bedo Gamaliel wot a Pedajur. 
Numbers10:24 Atel wi mony me atekere a jo Benjamin te bedo Abidan wot a Gideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Eka icennere dok bendera me gony a jo Dan te cako wot luŋ eryoŋet eryoŋet, kun gin en a doŋ coko te gonye luŋ kun atel wi monygi Akiejer wot Amicadai." 
Numbers10:26 Atel wi mony me atekere a jo Acer te bedo Pagiel wot Okoran. 
Numbers10:27 Atel wi mony me atekere a Naputali te bedo Akira wot Enan. 
Numbers10:28 Man en kite a rik jo Icrael owoto kede, kun lubere eryoŋet eryoŋet i kare ame gin ciro me cako wotgi." 
Numbers10:29 Muca rik te kobo baŋ Kobab wot a Rewel, or Muca ame rik dano me Midian ni, “Wan doŋ ocako wotwa me wot i kabedo ame Rwot okobo pire ni, ‘Abino miyo baŋwu.’ Doŋ ba, myero iwot kedwa, wan obino timi ber, pien Rwot doŋ ociko oko ni ebino timo Icrael ber.”" 
Numbers10:30 Ento en te kobo ni, “An gira mom abino wot, an abino dok turwa, baŋ jowa.”" 
Numbers10:31 Ento jo te kobbigi ni, “Tim ber kur iwekwa, pien yin iŋeo ni wan obino guro kemawa i tim, yin ibino konyowa acalo waŋwa." 
Numbers10:32 Dok daŋ ka ce ibino wot karacel kedwa, ginnoro luŋ aber ame Rwot bino timo i komwa, wan daŋ obino timo baŋi kittono.”" 
Numbers10:33 Gin rik te cako ya oko i nyim kidi a Rwot, i wot me nino adek; adekkono onwoŋo canduk me cikere a Rwot en a woto telo nyimgi kun yenyo kede ka weogi," 
Numbers10:34 kun pol a Rwot woto i wigi malo dyeceŋ, i kare luŋ ame gin ocako ya i gonygi." 
Numbers10:35 Kare luŋ ka canduk cako wot, Muca kobo ni, “Ya doŋ malo ama Rwot, me imi okworri keketa atata; dok me jo a dagi riŋ oko i nyimi.”" 
Numbers10:36 Ento ka canduk cuŋ me weo, Muca kobo ni, “Dwog doŋ ceŋ ama Rwot, baŋ jo Icrael tutumia i tutumia.”" 
Numbers11:1 Jo Icrael rik te bedo ŋuŋura pi cangi kun Rwot winyo; kare ame Rwot doŋ owinyo, akemo omake, eka mac a Rwot rik te lyel i akinagi, te waŋo kakamogo oko i ŋet gonygi." 
Numbers11:2 Lwak te kok baŋ Muca, eka Muca te kwayo Rwot, mac ame onwoŋo alyel doŋ te cako to." 
Numbers11:3 Mano en omio ote cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni, Tabera pien mac a Rwot rik olyel i akinagi." 
Numbers11:4 I kare-nono jo ocele ame rokgi papat ame onwoŋo tye i akinagi rik obedo jo a cunygi pupuka meicel, omio jo Icrael daŋ dok te ero koko, kun okobo ni, “Koŋ inen ba, kono obedo giwa i riŋo me acamawa!" 
Numbers11:5 Pwod opoyo rec a rik ocamo me nono i Miciri, kede okwer, kede okono, atungulu aboco mege kede en atino mege karacel kede en a tikkege;" 
Numbers11:6 aco aman i kare-ni yiwa doŋ otwo imek, ginnoro doŋ mom tye kadi acelloro, kono ka manna ame orio neno-ni.”" 
Numbers11:7 Manna rik onwoŋo cal i koti bel, dok daŋ nen calo odok yat olwoŋo ni bedola," 
Numbers11:8 Jo rik coko ote rego kede kidi, onyo odo aoda kede apany, eka ote tedo i gulu, ote tedo i capat; capattere ka icamo, mittere calo capat otedo kede moo." 
Numbers11:9 Rik ka toyo oluk i gony dyewor, manna daŋ onwoŋo obino kede." 
Numbers11:10 Muca rik te winyo jo me doggola acel acel tye akoko, kun ŋat acel acel tye i dog kema mere; akemo rik te mako Rwot atek meicel, yi Muca mom te bedo yom." 
Numbers11:11 Muca te kobo baŋ Rwot ni, “Piŋo kara itimo amironi arac kit man? Dok piŋo kara mom anwoŋo pwoccoro i nyimi ame omio yin doŋ iyimo yec a lwak magi luŋ i wia?" 
Numbers11:12 An abedo totogi gin luŋ bo? An en anywalogi, omio yin ikobba ni, ‘Tiŋgi i kori kite ame apidi tiŋo kede atin ame dot, i lobo ame rik ikwoŋo ni ibino miyo baŋ kwarigi.’" 
Numbers11:13 Kara riŋo ame aromo miyo baŋ jo man luŋ abino nwoŋo kwene? Pien gin obedo kok i nyima kun okobo ni, ‘Miwa riŋo me ocam.’" 
Numbers11:14 An gira mom aromo yeyo lwak man luŋ pira kena, yeccere pek okato kare oko baŋa." 
Numbers11:15 Ka pwod ibino bedo timo kit man, tika doŋ iru neka gira oko, ka ce anwoŋo pwoccoro i nyimi, me kur doŋ abed neno canna.”" 
Numbers11:16 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni, “Cok ka jo pyerabiro i akina odoŋe a jo Icrael, ame yin iŋeo ni gin obedo odoŋe a lwak ame loogi; kelgi i kema me rwatte, migi ocuŋ kuno karacel kedi." 
Numbers11:17 An abino piny me kop kedwu kuno, abino kwanyo cunnyoro i komi, eka ate keto i komgi; gin bino konyi yeyo peko a lwak, me yin kur dok ibed yeyo keni." 
Numbers11:18 Kobbi lwak ni, ‘Lonyere wunu pi diki, ibino camo wunu riŋo; pien ibedo kok wunu kun Rwot winyo, ni, “Ŋa kara abino miyowa riŋo me acama? Pien wan giwa rik otye aber i Miciri.” Pi mannono Rwot bino miyowu riŋo, ibino wunu camo." 
Numbers11:19 Mom ibino wunu camo nino acel keken, onyo nino abic, onyo nino apar, onyo nino pyeraryo," 
Numbers11:20 ento pi dwe acel twal, tuno ka riŋo doŋ pello i wumwu, dok daŋ yiwu doŋ okwero oko, pien ikwero wunu Rwot ame bedo i akinawu, kun ikok wunu i nyime ni, “Piŋo kara rik oya oko i Miciri?” ’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Cite Muca te kobo ni, “Jo ame an abedo i akinagi ame woto i tyengi, welgi romo tutumia mia abicel; ento yin ikobo ni, ‘Abino miyowu me icam wunu pi dwe acel twal!’" 
Numbers11:22 Obino nekkigi dok kede dyegi wek romgi? Onyo obino cokkigi rece luŋ me nam me wek romgi?” 
Numbers11:23 Rwot ogamo dog Muca ni, “Ciŋ Rwot doŋ odoko acek oko bo? Ibino neno aman ka ce koppa bino cobere kakare baŋi onyo pe.”" 
Numbers11:24 Muca te wot oko, te wot tito kop a Rwot okobo baŋ jo; eka te coko jo pyerabiro i akina odoŋe me Icrael te canogi mano kema." 
Numbers11:25 Rwot rik te yitto piny i pol, eka te kop kedgi; te kwanyo cunnyogo ame onwoŋo tye i kom Muca, te keto i kom odoŋe pyerabiro-nono. Kare ame cuny opoto i komgi, gin ocako rabo kop Obaŋa acalo odwarpiny. Cite gin mom dok te medde timo kittono." 
Numbers11:26 Jo aryo rik onwoŋo odoŋ i gony, acel nyiŋe Eldad, en ocele nyiŋe Medad, cuny rik daŋ te poto i komgi. Gin daŋ onwoŋo rik tye i akina jo ame ocoo nyiŋgi, cite gin gigi rik mom onwoŋo owoto i kema, mannono omio gin obedo rabo kop acalo odwarpiny i gony." 
Numbers11:27 Atin awobi moro te riŋo wot kobbi Muca ni, “Eldad gin kede Medad tye i gony arabo kop Obaŋa acalo odwarpiny.”" 
Numbers11:28 Eka Yocwa wot a Nun, akony Muca, ame en ŋat acel i akina jo a rik oyero, te kobo ni, “Adwoŋŋa Muca, jukgi oko.”" 
Numbers11:29 Cite Muca te kobbe ni, “Yin nyeko omaki pira ce? Kono jo a Rwot luŋ onwoŋo obedo odwarpiny, kono ber, ame Rwot te onyo cuny i komgi!”" 
Numbers11:30 Muca kede odoŋe a jo Icrael te doŋ dok i gony. 
Numbers11:31 Yamo moro te kodo kun oya i baŋ Rwot, te kelo aluru apipim i nam, te corre piny i ŋet gony, kan ame oony iye laccere romo wot me nino acel tuŋ cel kede dok wot me nino acel tuŋ ocele, kun omano gony amana, ame opoŋ malo futi adek twal ya i piny." 
Numbers11:32 I nino-nono luŋ kede dyewor benebene, kede orwo mere daŋ, lwak obedo depo aluru. Ŋat odepo anok, mege oromo puku pyeradek; gin te moyo mano gony luŋ, me akannagi." 
Numbers11:33 I kare ame riŋo aluru pwod tye omomoka i lakgi, kun gin mom ru ocamo otum, akemo te mako Rwot i kom lwak, Rwot te goyogi kede too edeke agwa meicel." 
Numbers11:34 En omio nyiŋ kabedo nono olwoŋo ni, Kibrot-atava, pien oyiko iye kom jo a rik keo riŋo omako." 
Numbers11:35 Jo te ya i Kibrot-atava wot a Kajerot; gin te bedo i Kajerot. 
Numbers12:1 Miriam kede Aron te cako kobo kop arac i kom Muca pi dako mere nyaka a jo Kuc, ame onwoŋo en onyomo, pien onwoŋo rik en onyomo nyaka a jo Kuc." 
Numbers12:2 Gin obedo kobo ni, “Rwot obedo miyo Muca keken en ame kobo koppere bo? Mom obedo miyowa miyowa daŋ kobo koppere?” Rwot te winyo koppono oko." 
Numbers12:3 Muca rik onwoŋo dano a mwol meicel, ame kato jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye i wi lobo." 
Numbers12:4 Oyot Rwot te ru kobbi Muca kede Aron kede Miriam ni, “Wun adek ducu, wot wunu i kema me rwatte.” Gin adek luŋ daŋ ote wot." 
Numbers12:5 Rwot rik te yitto piny i pagi me pol, te cuŋ i doggola kema, eka te lwoŋo Aron kede Miriam; gin aryo luŋ ote kato anyim." 
Numbers12:6 Rwot te kobo ni, “Winy wunu koppa. Ka ce tye adwarpinnyoro i akinawu, an Rwot anyutte kena baŋe i anyut, akobo kede i wan lek." 
Numbers12:7 Mom atimo kittono baŋ amirona Muca; atyeko miyo oda luŋ i ciŋe. 
Numbers12:8 Akobo kede dog i dog, kun akobo atira, mom dok i kop a mom atira; dok en neno kite a Rwot cal kede. Piŋo kara mom ibedo wunu lworo me kobo kop arac i kom amirona Muca?”" 
Numbers12:9 Akemo omako Rwot i komgi, te wot oko." 
Numbers12:10 Kare ame pol owarre oko i wi kema, nen ba, dobo orwatte i kom Miriam atar calo pee. Aron te lokere baŋ Miriam, nen ba, dobo orwatte oko i kome." 
Numbers12:11 Aron te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa, kur iket can i komwa pien wan otimo tim me miŋo, daŋ doŋ obalo." 
Numbers12:12 Kur imi en bed calo atin ame oto iyi totere, ko me te cako top oko kun mom ru onywalo.”" 
Numbers12:13 Muca te kok baŋ Rwot ni, “Caŋe ba, ama Rwot, abako doga baŋi.”" 
Numbers12:14 Cite Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kono pappere rik onwoŋo oŋulo lao i waŋe, kono mom en obedo i lewic pi nino abiro? Myero koŋ cege i ot pi nino abiro; i ne mannono ote kele doŋ i gony.”" 
Numbers12:15 Rik daŋ ote cego Miriam i ot i ŋe gony pi nino abiro; jo Icrael mom omedde i wotgi tuno waŋ ame odwoggo Miriam i gony. 
Numbers12:16 I ŋe mannono, jo Icrael doŋ te cako wotgi kun oya oko i Kejerot, ote wot guro kemagi i tim me Padan." 
Numbers13:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers13:2 “Cwa jo wot rot lobo me Kanaan ame abino miyo baŋ jo Icrael. I kom jo ame icwayo, dano bino ya i atekere a kwarigi luŋ, kun ŋat acel acel nwoŋo atel acel i akinagi.”" 
Numbers13:3 Mannono omio Muca ocwaogi iya i tim me Padan, kite a Rwot ociko kede; gin luŋ onwoŋo obedo odoŋe a loo lwak jo Icrael." 
Numbers13:4 Nyiŋgi ene: Iyi atekere a Reuben rik oya iye Camma wot a Jakur;
