Numbers13:5 i atekere me a Cimeon te ya iye Capat wot a Kori; 
Numbers13:6 iyi atekere a Juda oya iye Kaleb wot a Jepune; 
Numbers13:7 iyi atekere Icakar oya iye Igal wot a Yucepu; 
Numbers13:8 iyi atekere Epraim oya iye Kocea wot a Nuni; 
Numbers13:9 iyi atekere a Benjamin oya iye Paloti wot a Rapu; 
Numbers13:10 iyi atekere a Jabulon oya iye Gadiel wot a Codi; 
Numbers13:11 iyi atekere a Yucepu ame obedo atekere a Manace, oya oye Gaddi wot a Cuci;" 
Numbers13:12 iyi atekere a Dan oya iye Amiel wot a Gemali; 
Numbers13:13 iyi atekere Acer oya iye Cetur wot a Mikael; 
Numbers13:14 iyi atekere a Naputal i oya iye Nabi wot a Vopci; 
Numbers13:15 iyi atekere a Gad oya iye Rewel wot a Maki. 
Numbers13:16 Mannono en jo ame Muca ocwao me roto lobo. Muca ocako nyiŋ Kocea wot a Nuni ni, Yocwa." 
Numbers13:17 Muca ocwaogi me wot roto lobo me Kanaan kun kobbigi ni, “Wot wunu naka i Negeb kuca, ite kato wunu malo i lobo obedo kidikidi," 
Numbers13:18 me inen wunu kite ame lobo-nono tye kede, ka ce jo ame bedo i lobo-nono obedo jo atek onyo jo agoro, ka ce ononok onyo opol," 
Numbers13:19 ka lobo ame gin obedo iye-nono ber onyo rac, ka ce pacci ame gin bedo iye obedo gonye gonye onyo pacci ame ocecelo oko i cel atek," 
Numbers13:20 ka ce lobo mere ceko cam onyo mom gire ceko cam, ka ce yen tye i lobo-nono onyo mom gire tye. Bed wunu jo ame cunywu nwaŋ, ikel wunu nyig yennogo me lobo-nono.” Pien kare-nono onwoŋo en kare ame nyig olok geo cek iye." 
Numbers13:21 Mannono omio gin owoto oroto piny kun ocako i tim me Jin tuno naka i Rekob, ame ceggi i dog yo me Kamat." 
Numbers13:22 Gin owoto naka i Negeb, ote tuno naka i Kebron; Akiman, Cecai kede Talmai ikwae Anak onwoŋo tye kuno, (Kebron rik onwoŋo ogero te ri mwaka abiro twal kun mom ru ogero Joan ame tye i Miciri.)" 
Numbers13:23 Orot-piny te tuno naka i luŋ me Ecikol, gin rik ote ŋolo etak acel me jan olok ame onyak onugo anuga, ame jo aryo i akinagi te dyelo adyela kede yat; ote daŋ kelo nyig yat e okwer pomegranat kede nyig oduro." 
Numbers13:24 Kabedo-nono rik olwoŋo ni luŋ me Ecikol pien jo Icrael oŋolo iye etak acel i jan olok onyak onugo anuga. 
Numbers13:25 Kare ame nino pyeraŋwen doŋ okato, gin ocako dwogo oko i roto piny i lobo-nono." 
Numbers13:26 Gin odwogo baŋ Muca kede Aron ame onwoŋo tye i tim me Padan i Kadec; gin okelligi kop i kom lobo-naca, baŋ lwak jo Icrael luŋ, dok daŋ ote nyuttigi gin ame ocek i lobo-naca." 
Numbers13:27 Gin otittigi ni, “Wan otuno i lobo ame rik icwaowa iye; cak kede moo kic mol amola iye, kit gin ocek iye ene." 
Numbers13:28 Aco kono jo ame bedo iye obedo jo atek, paccigi luŋ daŋ ocecelo oko atek kun daŋ doŋodoŋo; medo i kom ennono, oneno daŋ ikwae Anak kuno." 
Numbers13:29 Jo Amalek bedo i lobo me Negeb; aco jo Kitti, jo Jebuc, kede jo Amor, gin obedo i lobo obedo kidikidi; jo Kanaan te bedo i lobo ame omano dog nan, kede en ame omano dog Jordan.”" 
Numbers13:30 Ento Kaleb te juko jo liŋ i nyim Muca, te kobo ni, “Wan myero oru wot kuno me owot ogam wunu oko; pien wan giwa oromo loyogi oko oyot.”" 
Numbers13:31 Jo ame rik owoto kede kuno te gamo ni, “Wan kom mom oromo wot lweny i kom jo-nono; pien gin tek katowa oko.”" 
Numbers13:32 Mannono omio gin okelo kop arac baŋ jo Icrael i kom lobo ame gin oroto, kun okobo ni, “Lobo ame wan obe bea i yie me roto, lobo-naca rac neko jo ame bedo iye; dok jo luŋ ame wan oneno iye, obedo jo ame komgi pek atek." 
Numbers13:33 Oneno daŋ jo Nepili kuno (ame gin ikwae Anak, ame oya i baŋ jo Nepili); ame wan ikomwa doŋ onen ocalo ocenne; gin daŋ onenowa ocal kittono.”" 
Numbers14:1 Lwak luŋ te cako redo i koko; jo te kok dyeworrono luŋ. 
Numbers14:2 Jo Icrael te cako ŋuŋura i kom Muca kede Aron; lwak luŋ te kobbigi ni, “Kono rik giwa oto i lobo Miciri! Onyo kono rik giwa oto i tim." 
Numbers14:3 Piŋo kara Rwot okelowa i lobo man, me miyowa to i pala lweny? Monwa kede itinowa doŋ bino doko jo ame okworwa bino yako; onwoŋo mom twero bedo ber wan me dok ceŋ i Miciri?”" 
Numbers14:4 Gin te cako kop kengi kengi ni, “Oyer wunu ŋat ame telowa, me odok wunu cen i Miciri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Muca kede Aron te ryebere piny i nyim jo Icrael luŋ ame ocokere. 
Numbers14:6 Yocwa wot a Nuni kede Kaleb wot a Japune ame rik gin tye i akina jo ame oroto lobo-naca, gin oyeyecoboŋŋigi oko," 
Numbers14:7 kun okobbi lwak jo Icrael luŋ ni, “Lobo ame wan obe bea i yie me roto, lobo-nono onwoŋo ber odoco." 
Numbers14:8 Ka ce Rwot obedo i yomcuny i komwa, en bino terowa i lobo man, te miyo i ciŋwa, lobo ame cak kede moo kic mol amola iye." 
Numbers14:9 Jem i kom Rwot en a myero iwek wunu bedi; dok kur daŋ ilwor wunu jo me lobo-naca, pien gin obedo ogati me acanawa. Gin a geno negi doŋ mom, dok Rwot gire tye kedwa; kur ilwor wunugi.”" 
Numbers14:10 Cite lwak luŋ te kobo ni nanapogi oko i gweŋe. Kwogo a Rwot te nen i kema me rwatte i nyim jo Icrael luŋ. 
Numbers14:11 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Jo-ni kara bino bedo caya pi kare a rom mene? Obino kara kwero ye an pi kare a rom mene, kadi bed abedo tiyo anyut apol rom man i akinagi?" 
Numbers14:12 Abino goyogi kede too edeke, dok daŋ abino twonogi lobo ame kono onwoŋo amigi me bedo megi, ate miyi yin doko rok adwoŋ dok daŋ atek a katogi oko.”" 
Numbers14:13 Ento Muca te kobo ni. “Jo Miciri bino winyo, pien rik ikwanyo jo-ni kede tekoni i akinagi," 
Numbers14:14 gin bino tito koppere baŋ jo ame bedo i lobo man. Gin doŋ otyeko winyo ni yin Rwot itye i akina jo man; pien jo-ni obedo neni waŋ i waŋ kun pol meri bedo cuŋ i wigi malo. Yin Rwot ibedo telo nyimgi i pagi me pol dyeceŋ kede i pagi me mac dyewor. 
Numbers14:15 Doŋ aman ka ce yin ibino neko jo-ni luŋ awaŋe acel, rok ocele ame rik nyiŋi orwo owinyere baŋgi bino kobo ni," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Pien tero jo man oloo Rwot oko i lobo ame rik ekwoŋo ni ebino miyogi, en gin omio en doŋ onekogi oko i tim.’" 
Numbers14:17 Aman doŋ tim ber, wek onen ni tekoni dwoŋ, ama Rwot kite a rik iciko kun ikobo ni," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Rwot gire akemo mom mako oyotoyot, marrere mom lokere, kun timo kica i bal kede i tim me turo cik, cite mom gire kwanyo kop i kom jo obalo, cite keto can i kom ikwae kede dok i kom ikwae ikwaegi, pi bal a kwarogi naka i lwagi me adekkere kede me aŋwennere.’" 
Numbers14:19 Tim ber i tim jo-ni kica i balgi, kite acalo mar meri a mom lokere dwoŋ kede, dok kite ame ibedo timo kede jo man kica cakere i Miciri tuno kede naka atot i kare man.”" 
Numbers14:20 Rwot te gamo ni, “Doŋ atyeko timogi kica kite ame ikobo." 
Numbers14:21 Cite ateni, kite acalo an atye kwe-ni, dok kite acalo kwogo a Rwot bino poŋo lobo luŋ oko-ni," 
Numbers14:22 i kom jo ame oneno kwogona mede anyut ame rik atio i Miciri kede i tim, eka gin dok te bedo omo yia, ame man doŋ odoko tyen me tomonnere twal, kun daŋ mom owinyo koppa, mom tye moro i akinagi," 
Numbers14:23 ame bino ne no lobo ame rik akwoŋo ni abino miyo baŋ kwarigi; mom tye ŋattoro i akina jo luŋ ame ocaa ame bino neno lobo-naca. 
Numbers14:24 Ento amirona Kaleb, pien en obedo i cuny apat, dok daŋ obedo luba i yore ducu, abino tere i lobo ame en rik owoto iye-nono, eka ikwae te gamo lobo-nono." 
Numbers14:25 Doŋ aman ba, kite acalo jo Amalek kede jo Kanaan bedo i luŋ ducu, diki myero wun dok icak lokere wunu iwot wunu tuŋ tim i yo ame woto i Nam Arema.”" 
Numbers14:26 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Numbers14:27 “Lwak jo areco-ni kara bi no bedo ŋuŋura i koma naka awene? Atyeko doŋ winyo ŋuŋura a jo Icrael luŋ ame gin obedo ŋuŋura kede i koma. 
Numbers14:28 Kob baŋgi ni, ‘Kite acalo an atye kwo-ni, gin ame doŋ ikobo wunu, ame yita owinyo, abino ti mo i komwu." 
Numbers14:29 Komwu ame oto bino radde ata i tim; wun jo luŋ ame welwu rik okwano, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, gin luŋ ame obedo ŋuŋura i koma;" 
Numbers14:30 moro acel iye mom bino tuno i lobo ame rik akwoŋo ni abino miyowu ibedo wunu iye, kwanyo ka Kaleb wot a Jepune kede Yocwa wot a Nuni, gin en ame bino tuno kuno." 
Numbers14:31 Ento itinowu ame wun ikobo wunu ni bino doko jo me ayaka okworwu, gin en ame abino tero kuno, gin te ŋeyo lobo ame wun icao wunu." 
Numbers14:32 Aco wun, komwu ame oto bino radde ata i tim kano" 
Numbers14:33 Dok itinowu koŋ bino bedo okwat i tim pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, kun oneno can pi kite ame wun ibedo wunu turo cik a Rwot, tuno ka kom dano oto me agikki i akinawu doŋ odoŋ i tim kano" 
Numbers14:34 Ibino neno wunu can pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, ame oporo wei ni no ame rik iroto wunu kede lobo, nino pyeraŋwen, mwaka acel pi nino acel acel, ite ŋeyo wunu kite ame cunya ocwer kede.’" 
Numbers14:35 An Rwot doŋ akobo; ateteni abino timo man i kom lwak jo areco-ni luŋ ame ocokere karacel me pyem keda; gin luŋ biŋo tum i tim kan, gin bi no to kuno.”" 
Numbers14:36 Jo ame rik Muca ocwaogi me roto lobo, ame rik te dwogo miyo lwak luŋ ŋuŋura i kom Muca pi kela kop arac i kom lobo-naca," 
Numbers14:37 gin jo a rik okelo kop arac i kom lobo-naca, too edeke te nekogi oko i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers14:38 Ento Yocwa wot a Nuni kede Kaleb wot a Jepune odoŋ gigi akwo, i kom jo a rik owoto oroto lobo." 
Numbers14:39 Muca rik te kobo koppono luŋ baŋ jo Icrael, jo te kok meicel." 
Numbers14:40 Gin rik te dilo ibayi, ote wot kwaro lobo obedo kidikidi, kun okobo ni, “Koŋ inen doŋ wan otye kan, wan doŋ obino wot i lobo ame Rwot rik ociko pire; pien wan doŋ obalo.”" 
Numbers14:41 Cite Muca te kobbigi ni, “Piŋo kara aman dok ituro wunu cik a Rwot? Pien mano gire mom bino twerre." 
Numbers14:42 Kur iwot wunu kuno, naka mio obino timowu lit i nyim okworwu, pien Rwot gire mom tye i akinawu." 
Numbers14:43 Jo Amalek kede jo Kanaan tye i nyimwu kuno, pala lwenygi bino tyekowu oko; pien ikwero wunu lubo Rwot, Rwot gire mom bino bedo kedwa.”" 
Numbers14:44 Ento gin ote nwette ni owot kwaro lobo obedo kidikidi, akadi kono canduk cikere a Rwot kede Muca mom oya i gony." 
Numbers14:45 Eka jo Amalek kede jo Kanaan ame bedo i lobo obedo kidikidi kuno, te yitto piny, ote loyogi oko kun oryemogi naka i Korma." 
Numbers15:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers15:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ ituno wunu i lobo ame ibino wunu bedo iye, ame amiowu," 
Numbers15:3 ce imiyo wunu mot baŋ Rwot kun imiyo wunu dyaŋ onyo romo me mot owaŋo i mac onyo mot awaŋa, onyo mot aŋola, me cobo kwon onyo me ber a yic onyo i kare me ecubanwu ame ociko, me timo gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot," 
Numbers15:4 ŋat ame okelo mottere myero mi baŋ Rwot moko kwon apwottere a romo gwata acel ame orubo kede moo ame romo cupa aryo kede nucu, me bed mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers15:5 Dok daŋ ibino wunu yiko vino me mot amata pi mot awaŋa onyo mot ocele, ame romo cupa aryo kede nucu pi romo acel acel." 
Numbers15:6 Onyo ka pi nyok romo, ibino yiko moko kwon apwottere ame romo gwata aryo ame orubo kede moo ame romo cupa adek me mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers15:7 Pi mot amata ibino miyo vino ame romo cupa adek, me bed gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Numbers15:8 Aco ka iyiko twon me yalo Rwot me mot awaŋa, onyo me mot ocele ame oŋolo, onyo me cobo kwoŋ, onyo me kweyo cuny," 
Numbers15:9 mot me moko kwon a myero mi karacel i twon en moko kwon apwottere ame romo gwata adek ame orubo kede moo ame romo cupa abic, me bed mot me moko kwon;" 
Numbers15:10 ibino miyo vino ame romo cupa abic me mot amata, me bed mot ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Numbers15:11 “Obino timo kittono i kom twon acel acel, atin nyok romo onyo atin nyok dyel acel acel." 
Numbers15:12 Ibino wunu tiyo kun ilubo wunu wel leyi ame iyiko wunu; ibino timo wunu kittono i kom lee acel acel kite ame welgi tye kede. 
Numbers15:13 Jo ame gin obedo anywalli me lobo luŋ bino timo kittono ka gin mio mot ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Numbers15:14 Ka ce arokkoro odoko ŋat ame bedo i akinawu onyo ŋattoro keken ame bedo i akinawu, naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ, ka ce en mito miyo mot ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot, en daŋ bino timo kite ame wun itimo wunu kede." 
Numbers15:15 Cik bino bedo acel pi lwak ocokere, pirwu, kede pi arok ame bedo i akinawu; mannono bino bedo cik atwal, tuno i kare ikwaewu luŋ; arok ame bedo i akinawu bino bedo a rom kedwu i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers15:16 Cik bino bedo acel, icwil daŋ acel, pi wun kede arok ame bedo i akinawu.”" 
Numbers15:17 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers15:18 “Kob baŋ jo Icrael ni, Kare ame ibino tuno wunu i lobo ame aterowu iye-ni," 
Numbers15:19 ka doŋ icamo wunu cam me lobo-naca, ibino miyo wunu mot baŋ Rwot." 
Numbers15:20 I kom moko ogati ame igeo rubo wunu, ibino wunu miyo capat acel obed acalo mot me yalo Obaŋa, ibino miyo wunu kite ame omio kede mot ame oya i laro dino kal." 
Numbers15:21 Ibino wunu miyo mot baŋ Rwot i kom moko ogati ame ogeo rubo naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ. 
Numbers15:22 “Aco ka ce iroco wunu, kun mom igwoko wunu cik magi ame Rwot rik okobo baŋ Muca," 
Numbers15:23 ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot rik ocikowu iye kun kobo baŋ Muca, cakere i nino ame Rwot rik omio kede cik, wot kede anyim naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ," 
Numbers15:24 ka ce ŋat oroco mom otimo me akaka, kun lwak mom oŋeo, lwak luŋ bino yalo Obaŋa atin twon etobayit acel me mot awaŋa, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot, karacel i mottere me moko kwon kede mot amata kun olubo cik, karacel kede nyok dyel acel me mot me bal." 
Numbers15:25 Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom lwak jo Icrael luŋ, Rwot daŋ bino weko balgi, pien nwoŋo gin mom obalo me akaka, dok gin otyeko kelo motgi, mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot, dok okelo daŋ motgi me bal i nyim Rwot, pi balgi ame gin mom otimo me akaka," 
Numbers15:26 Obino weko bal a jo Icrael luŋ, karacel kede me orok ame bedo i akinagi, pien bal ame mom otimo me akaka-nono omako jo ducu." 
Numbers15:27 “Ka ce dano moro acel en obalo kun mom obalo me akaka, en bino kelo akale dyel acel ame dittere romo mwaka acel, me mot me bal." 
Numbers15:28 Alamdog bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kome i nyim Rwot pi bal ame en opoto iye kun mom otimo me akaka, me kwanyo bal i kome; Rwot daŋ bino weko ballere." 
Numbers15:29 Cik bino bedo acel pi dano otimo bal kun mom otimo me akaka kadi bed dano-nono anywalli me Icrael, onyo arokoro ame bedo i akinagi." 
Numbers15:30 Ento ka ce dano moro otimo bal me akaka, kadi bed en anywalli me lobo onyo arok, nwoŋo oyeto Rwot, dano-nono waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi." 
Numbers15:31 Pien ocao kop a Rwot, dok daŋ oturo cikkere, dano-nono wane bi no rwenyo odoco; ballere bino dok i wie.”" 
Numbers15:32 I kare ame jo Icrael tye i tim, gin onwoŋo dano moro ame onwoŋo tye amwodo yen i ceŋ cabit." 
Numbers15:33 Jo a rik onwoŋo en tye amwodo yen te kele baŋ Muca kede Aron, kede baŋ lwak luŋ." 
Numbers15:34 Gin te kete koŋ i buc, pien onwoŋo Rwot mom ru onyuto baŋgi gin a myero tim i kome." 
Numbers15:35 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Dano-nono obino neko oko; lwak luŋ bino nanapo en kede gweŋe oko i ŋe gony.”" 
Numbers15:36 Lwak luŋ te tere oko i ŋe gony, ote nanapo en kede gweŋe ote neke oko, kite ame Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Numbers15:37 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers15:38 “Kobbi jo Icrael kun icikogi ni okwo awula i dog bomŋigi, tuno naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ, dok daŋ oket tol obedo bululu bululu i kom awula acel acel ame tye i lak boŋo." 
Numbers15:39 Awula-nono bino bedo me anenawu, me poyo wiwu i cik a Rwot luŋ, me icob wunu, mom ilubo wunu tamwu kenwu kede gin ame waŋwu oneno, ame imaro wunu lobo pi mitwu kenwu." 
Numbers15:40 Ibino wunu po cikka ducu kun daŋ icobo wunu kittono, ite bedo wunu jo acil pi Obaŋawu." 
Numbers15:41 An a Rwot Obaŋawu ame akwanyowu i lobo me Miciri, me bedo Obaŋawu: an a Rwot Obaŋawu.”" 
Numbers16:1 Kora wot a Ijar, ame obedo wot a Kokat, wot a Levi, karacel kede Datan kede Abiram, awobe Eliab, kede On wot a Palet, awobe a Reuben," 
Numbers16:2 gin otero jo; gin te cako ayela i kom Muca, karacel kede jo mogo apopol i akina jo Icrael, otel a lwak mia aryo kede pyerabic ame oyero i akina jo ocokere ame gin jo a ŋeye meicel." 
Numbers16:3 Gin ocokere luŋ karacel i kom: Muca kede i kom Aron, ote kobbigi ni, “Iwoto wunu dok atut okato kare oko! Pien lwak luŋ cil, gin luŋ aluŋa, Rwot daŋ tye i akinagi. Kara piŋo wun dok ikette wunu malo amala ikato lwak a Rwot?”" 
Numbers16:4 Kare ame Muca owinyo, oryebere piny;" 
Numbers16:5 eka te kobo baŋ Kora kede lwakkere ni, “Diki odiko Rwot en ame bino nyuto dano mere, kede dano ame cil; bino miyo noke aceggi; ŋat ame en bino yero, en bino miyo noke aceggi." 
Numbers16:6 Doŋ gin a myero itim wunu ene: kwany wunu tabo me waŋo odok akur, Kora kede lwakkere luŋ." 
Numbers16:7 Ket wunu mac i yigi, ite daŋ keto wunu odok akur iye i nyim Rwot diki; doŋ ŋat ame Rwot bino yero, en bino bedo ŋat acil. Iwoto wunu dok atut okato kare, wun awobe a Levi!”" 
Numbers16:8 Muca dok te kobo baŋ Kora ni, “Koŋ iwiny wunu, wun awobe a Levi:" 
Numbers16:9 Wun ibwono wunu ni obedo ginnoro atidi moro Rwot a jo Icrael me pokowa i kom jo Icrael, te miyowu bino aceggi baŋe, me tiyo tic i kema a Rwot, kun icuŋ wunu i nyim lwak, itio wunu pirgi?" 
Numbers16:10 Dok ni en daŋ okelli aceggi baŋe, yin karacel kede omegoni luŋ ame gin obedo awobe a Levi? Aman doŋ dok iyenyo wunu yo me doko olamdog?" 
Numbers16:11 Man wun ijem wunu i kom Rwot, en omio yin karacel kede lwakki icokere wunu karacel. Aron kara gin aŋo ba ame iŋuŋura wunu i kome-ni?”" 
Numbers16:12 Muca dok te cwalo dano lwoŋo Datan kede Abiram ame gin awobe a Eliab; gin te kobbe ni, “Wan giwa mom obino wot." 
Numbers16:13 Pwod ibwono ni obedo ginnoro atitidi, yin me kwanyowa oko i lobo me Miciri, i lobo ame cak kede moo kic mol amola iye, me neko wa i tim? Myero yin dok ikette keni me bedo aloc me loyowa?" 
Numbers16:14 Dok daŋ mom ru ikelowa i lobo ame cak kede moo kic mol amola iye, akadi miyowa poto moro, onyo potti olok me bedo megwa. Yin ibino wumo waŋ jo-ni oko? Wan giwa mom obino tuno kuno.”" 
Numbers16:15 Akemo te mako Muca atek meicel, te kobo baŋ Rwot ni, “Kur igam motgi. An mom ru agamo kana moro kadi acel i baŋgi, daŋ mom atimo ginnoro arac i kom dano moro i akinagi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Muca dok te kobbi Kora ni, “Yin karacel kede lwakki myero ibin wunu i nyim Rwot diki, yin kede gin, karacel kede Aron;" 
Numbers16:17 kun nwoŋo ŋat acel acel i akinawu omako tabo mere me waŋo odok akur. Ket wunu odok akur i yigi, eka ŋat acel acel te kelo tabo mere me waŋo odok akur i nyim Rwot, tabo mia aryo kede pyerabic; yin daŋ karacel kede Aron, ŋat man myero bin kede tabo mere.”" 
Numbers16:18 Ŋat acel acel te kwanyo tabo mere, te keto mac iye, ote dok keto iye odok akur, gin te doŋ cuŋ i dog kema me rwatte, karacel kede Muca kede Aron." 
Numbers16:19 Kora ocoko lwak luŋ i komgi kittono, i dog kema me rwatte, eka kwogo a Rwot te nen baŋ lwak luŋ." 
Numbers16:20 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Numbers16:21 “Wun pokere wunu oko i akina lwak man, me wek aru tyekogi oko aman.”" 
Numbers16:22 Gin te ryebere piny kun okobo ni, “Ama Obaŋa, Obaŋa ame won tipo a jo luŋ, bal a dano acel mio akemo maki i kom lwak luŋ?”" 
Numbers16:23 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers16:24 “Kobbi lwak luŋ ni, ‘Ya wunu oko i kan ame jo a Kora bedo iye, kede Datan, kede Abiram.’ ”" 
Numbers16:25 Muca te ya wot baŋ Datan kede Abiram, odoŋe a jo Icrael daŋ te lubo yore," 
Numbers16:26 En te kobbi lwak ni, “Tim wunu ber iya wunu oko i kema a jo areco-ni, kur igud wunu gigi moro, naka mio wun daŋ oweowu oko karacel kedgi ibalgi luŋ.”" 
Numbers16:27 Omio lwak te ya oko i kan ame jo a Kora kede Datan kede Abiram tye iye; eka Datan kede Abiram te kato oko, ote cuŋ i dog kemagi, karacel kede mongi, kede awobegi kede itinogi atino." 
Numbers16:28 Muca te kobo ni, “Man en gin ame bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni Rwot Obaŋa kara ocwaa me tiyo tic man ducu, dok mom abedo tiyo pira kena." 
Numbers16:29 Ka ce jo man bino to kite a jo luŋ to kede me nino ducu, onyo ka ce cannoro a poto i kom jo luŋ en ame opoto i komgi, mom nwoŋo Rwot en oora." 
Numbers16:30 Ento ka Rwot bino keto ginnoro ocele anyen, eka lobo te ŋamo doge mwonyogi oko, karacel i jamigi luŋ, eka gin te donyo akwo i lyel me Ceol, ibino ŋeyo wunu ni jo-ni kara obedo cayo Rwot.”" 
Numbers16:31 Kare ame Muca doŋ otyeko kobo kop man ducu, lobo ame gin onwoŋo ocuŋ iye, te barre, yabere oko," 
Numbers16:32 lobo te ŋamo doge mwonyogi oko karacel kede jo me udigi, kede lwak a Kora luŋ, kede jamigi luŋ." 
Numbers16:33 Gin karacel kede jogi luŋ kede jamigi luŋ te donyo akwo i lyel me Ceol kittono; lobo te wumogi oko, gin doŋ te rwenyo oko i akina lwak." 
Numbers16:34 Jo Icrael luŋ ame rik omanogi te belle i rjwec pi winyo kokogi; pien gin obedo kobo ni, “Naka mio wan daŋ lobo mwonyowa oko!”" 
Numbers16:35 Mac daŋ dok te ya ibaŋ Rwot, te tyeko jo mia aryo i pyerabic ca oko, ame onwoŋo tye awaŋo odok akur." 
Numbers16:36 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers16:37 “Kobbi Eleajar wot Aron alamdog, okwany tabbi me waŋo odok akur oko i mac a lyel, eka te oonyo mac i yigi oko kun keketo atata. Pien gin obedo gin acil," 
Numbers16:38 magi-nono obedo tabbi a jo ame balgi okelligi to. Pi mannono, myero papadogi oko arep kun odidinogi anyul, me gin bed gi-wumo wi keno lam; pien rik gin doŋ omio oko baŋ Rwot, mannono mio gin bedo jami acil. Mannono bino miyo gin bedo anyut baŋ jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers16:39 Eleajar alamdog daŋ te kwanyo tabbi me mola kittono, ame rik jo ame mac owaŋo otyeko miyo baŋ Rwot, gin te papado me wumo wi keno lam," 
Numbers16:40 me bed gin me poyo wi jo Icrael, wek ŋattoro a mom obedo alamdog, ame mom obedo ikwae Aron, kur bin cok me waŋo odok akur i nyim Rwot, me gin daŋ kur bed bala Kora onyo acalo lwakkere, kite a Rwot omio Muca okobo kede baŋ Eleajar." 
Numbers16:41 Ento orwo mere lwak jo Icrael luŋ te dok ŋuŋura i kom Muca kede i kom Aron, kun okobo ni, “Wun ineko wunu jo a Rwot.”" 
Numbers16:42 Kare ame lwak doŋ ocokere me pyem i Muca kede Aron, gin olokere tutuŋ kema me rwatte; nen ba, pol onwoŋo owumo kome oko, kwogo a Rwot te nen." 
Numbers16:43 Muca kede Aron te wot i nyim kema me rwatte," 
Numbers16:44 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers16:45 “Ya oko i akina lwak man, me wek aru tyekogi oko aman.” Gin te ryebere piny." 
Numbers16:46 Muca te kobbi Aron ni, “Kwany taboni me waŋo odok akur me iket iye mac ame itoko i keno lam, eka ite keto iye odok akur, tin, ite ru tero baŋ lwak, iwot iti tic me kwanyo bal i komgi, pien akemo ame oya i baŋ Rwot doŋ obino oko, to edeke daŋ doŋ acakere oko.”" 
Numbers16:47 Aron daŋ te kwanyo kittono, kite ame Muca okobbe, te riŋo i akina lwak. En te keto odok akur i tabo, te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom lwak." 
Numbers16:48 En te cuŋ i akina jo oto kede akwo, to edeke te gik oko." 
Numbers16:49 Jo ame to edeke oneko obedo tutumia apar wie aŋwen, kede mia abiro, kun nwoŋo mom oribo iye jo ame oto pi tim a Kora," 
Numbers16:50 Kare ame too edeke ogik, Aron odok ceŋ baŋ Muca, i dog kema me rwatte." 
Numbers17:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers17:2 “Kobbi i jo Icrael, ite gamo abiro i baŋgi, kun igamo abiro acel i ot a kwarogi acel acel, i baŋ otelgi luŋ, kun lubo doggola a kwarigi, gin luŋ abiro apar wie aryo. Co nyiŋ dano acel acel i kom abiro mere," 
Numbers17:3 eka ite coyo nyiŋ Aron i kom abiro a jo Levi; pien adwoŋ acel acel a loo doggola me ot a kwarogi bino bedo kede abiro mere. 
Numbers17:4 Yin ibino ketogi iyi kema me rwatte i nyim canduk me kop caden, kan ame arwatte kedwu iye." 
Numbers17:5 Doŋ abiro a ŋat ame abino yero, bino lot; mannono bino miyo agiko ŋuŋura a jo Icrael i komwu.”" 
Numbers17:6 Muca daŋ te kobo baŋ jo Icrael; otelgi luŋ te miye abiro, kun atel acel acel mio abiro acel kun lubo doggola a kwarigi, gin luŋ abiro apar wie aryo; abiro Aron daŋ onwoŋo tye i akina megi." 
Numbers17:7 Muca te keto abiro luŋ i nyim Rwot i kema me kop me caden. 
Numbers17:8 Orwo mere Muca te donyo i kema me kop caden; nen ba, abiro Aron ame onwoŋo ocuŋ pi ot a jo Levi onwoŋo olot oko, onok, daŋ te keto ture, te nyak, te daŋ cek." 
Numbers17:9 Muca te kelo abiro luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i nyim Rwot oko, te tero baŋ jo Icrael, gin te neno, eka ŋat acel acel te kwanyo abiro mere," 
Numbers17:10 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Dwok abiro Aron kakare i nyim canduk me kop me caden, me gwok bed me anyut pi jo ame ojem, me ijuk ŋuŋuragi i koma, gik oko, me kur oto.”" 
Numbers17:11 Muca daŋ te timo kittono, kite ame Rwot ocike kede, en te timo kittono." 
Numbers17:12 Jo Icrael te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Nen ba, wan doŋ oto otum oko, wan luŋ doŋ otum oko," 
Numbers17:13 Ŋat acel acel ame noko ceggi, ame noko ceggi i ŋet kema a Rwot, to oko. Omito ni wan oto otum oko iweŋ bo?”" 
Numbers18:1 Rwot rik te kobo baŋ Aron ni, “Bal luŋ ame otiko kabedo acil bino bedo i wii kede i wi awobeni karacel kede i wi jo me doggola a kwaroni; dok daŋ bal luŋ ame otiko ticwu me olamdog bino bedo i wi kede i wi awobeni." 
Numbers18:2 Yin kel daŋ omegoni me atekere a Levi bin karacel kedi, jo me atekere a pappi, me gin notte kedi, okonyi, kun nwoŋo yin karacel kede awobeni itye wunu i nyim kema me kop me caden." 
Numbers18:3 Gin bino konyi kun otio tic luŋ ame mitte i kema; cite gin mom bino noko jami me kabedo acil onyo ame tye i keno lam, me wek yin karacel kede gin kur ito wunu." 
Numbers18:4 Gin bino notte kedi ote konyo tic i kema me rwatte, kun otio tic ducu i kema; ŋattoro ata myero kur nokwu aceggi." 
Numbers18:5 Wun ibino wunu konyo tic i kabedo acil kede i keno lam me akemo kur dok medde bedo tye i kom jo Icrael. 
Numbers18:6 Nen ba, an doŋ akwanyo omegowu, ame gin jo Levi, i akina jo Icrael; gin doŋ tye acalo mot ame omiowu, ame omio baŋ Rwot, me tiyo tic i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers18:7 Yin karacel kede awobeni ibino tiyo wunu ticwu me olamdog i kop ame mako keno lam, kede tyelo kan ame boŋo me icika owumo; ite tiyo ticwu. Amiowu ticwu me bedo olamdog acalo motwu; ka ce ŋatt ata onoko aceggi, obino neko oko.”" 
Numbers18:8 Rwot dok te kobbi Aron ni, “Nen ba, doŋ atyeko miyi jami luŋ ame okano i kom mot ame amia kede, ame en jami acil luŋ ame jo Icrael okelo; atyeko miyogi oko me bedo iner ame dok baŋi, kede baŋ awobeni, me bedo iner ame myero mi baŋi kare ducu." 
Numbers18:9 Magi-nono bino bedo meri i kom mot acil meicel ame okano i kom mot ame owaŋo i mac; motgi luŋ me moko kwon, motgi luŋ me bal, kede motgi luŋ me walakino i roc, ame gin mio baŋa, ibino tero wunu acalo gin acil meicel baŋi kede baŋ awobeni." 
Numbers18:10 Ibino camo wunu kakannoro acil meicel; co luŋ twero camo; mannono gire cil baŋwu. 
Numbers18:11 Medo i kom magi-nono, motgi luŋ ame gin omio, ame obedo mot ayoka ame jo Icrael omio; atyeko doŋ miyo oko baŋi, kede baŋ awo beni kede anyirani acalo iner ame ibino camo wunu nakanaka. Jo luŋ i odi, ame cikkoro mom ogeŋo twero camo." 
Numbers18:12 Moo abeco mere luŋ, kono olok amittege, kede kal abeco luŋ, motgi me wi mwaka luŋ, ame gin mio baŋ Rwot, atyeko doŋ miyo oko baŋi." 
Numbers18:13 “Cam luŋ a tye i lobogi ame ogeo cek, ame gin kelo baŋ Rwot bino bedo meri, jo luŋ ame tye i odi ame cikkoro mom ogeno twero camo." 
Numbers18:14 Ginnoro luŋ ame jo Icrael ojalo baŋ Rwot bino bedo meri. 
Numbers18:15 Atin ginnoro luŋ ame tye kede kwo, ame ogeo yabo ot nyodo, kadi mea dano onyo mea lee, ame omio baŋ Rwot, bino bedo meri. Kadi bed amannono, itino kao luŋ me dano obino lakoro alakara, karacel kede itino kao me leyi a cik ogeŋo, gin daŋ obino lakoro oko." 
Numbers18:16 Obino lakoro i kare ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo acel. Wel me i lakoro ibino miyo bedo cekel me ryal abic, kun lubo cekel me kabedo acil, ame cekel acel acel romo gera pyeraryo." 
Numbers18:17 Cite atin kao a dyaŋ, onyo atin kao a romo, onyo atin kao a dyel mom obino lakoro; gin cil. Ibino kikiro remogi i kom keno me lam, dok daŋ i bino waŋo dwolgi me bed mot ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Numbers18:18 Riŋogi bino bedo meri, acalo ogok ame oyoko kede amuru me tuŋ cem luŋ meri." 
Numbers18:19 Mot acil luŋ ame jo Icrael omio baŋ Rwot doŋ atyeko miyo oko baŋi, kede baŋ awobeni kede anyirani, me bed iner ame ibino camo wunu nakanaka. Man en cikere ame omoko doŋ oko atwal i kado, i nyim Rwot piri kede pi ikwae.”" 
Numbers18:20 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Aron ni, “Yin mom ibino nwoŋo lobo moro me bedo megi i lobogi, mom daŋ ibino bedo kede dulloro i akinagi. An en ame abedo dul ame meri kede gin ame inwoŋo me bedo meri i akina jo Icrael." 
Numbers18:21 “Atyeko miyo acel me apar luŋ i kom jami a jo Icrael baŋ jo Levi me bedo megi, me culo ticgi ame gin otio, ticgi i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers18:22 Dok cakere tin, jo Icrael mom bino noko kema me rwatte aceggi, naka mio bal dok i wigi ote to oko." 
Numbers18:23 Jo Levi keken en ame bino tiyo tic ame tye i kema me rwatte, ballere bino bedo i wigi. Man bino bedo cik atwal naka i kare ikwaegi; gin mom obino nwoŋo lobo moro me bedo megi i akina jo Icrael." 
Numbers18:24 Pien acel me apar mea jo Icrael ame gin mio me mot baŋ Rwot, atyeko doŋ miyo oko baŋ jo Levi me bedo megi; en omio akobo ni gin mom bino nwoŋo lobo moro me bedo megi i akina jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers18:25 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers18:26 “Kob baŋ jo Levi ni, ‘Ka igamo wunu acel me apar i baŋ jo Icrael, ame atyeko doŋ miyo baŋwu me bedo megwu kun ya baŋgi, wun daŋ dok ibino miyo wunu baŋ Rwot acel me apar i kom acel me apar ame igamo wunu." 
Numbers18:27 Motwu-nono obino kwano i wiwu acalo kal ame oya i larowu me dino kal, dok acalo oya i bur biyo olokwu." 
Numbers18:28 Wun daŋ ibino wunu miyo mot baŋ Rwot kittono, i kom acel me apar luŋ ame ibino gamo wunu i baŋ jo Icrael; ibino wunu kwanyo mot a Rwot iye, ite miyo wunu baŋ Aron alamdog," 
Numbers18:29 Mot luŋ ame omio baŋwu, en ame ibino kwanyo wunu iye mot ame tye pi Rwot. Ibino kwanyo wunu i kom mot abeco mere luŋ kun imio wunu en ame doŋ olonyo odoko acil.’" 
Numbers18:30 Pi mannono, yin ibino kobo baŋgi ni, ‘Ka doŋ ityeko miyo wunu en abeco mere oko, en odoŋnege doŋ bino bedo mea jo Levi, acalo gin ame oya i larogi me dino kal kede i bur olokgi me biyo olok." 
Numbers18:31 Itwero camo wunu i kabedo moro keken, wun karacel kede jo me odwu; pien mannono en gin ame oculowu kede pi ticwu i kema me rwatte," 
Numbers18:32 Balloro gire mom bino bedo i wiwu pirgi, ka ce onwoŋo doŋ imio wunu en abeco mere oko me mot. Myero kur ipyed wunu jami a jo Icrael acil, me kur ito wunu.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca kede Aron ni," 
Numbers19:2 “Man en icwil ame Rwot ociko: Kobbi jo Icrael kelli roya arema, ame kakannoro i kome mom oballe, ame roccoro daŋ mom i kome, dok ame lodi moro mom ru ogudo ŋute," 
Numbers19:3 Ibino miyo wunu baŋ Eleajar alamdog, eka ote tero wot neko oko i ŋe gony i nyim Eleajar." 
Numbers19:4 Eleajar alamdog bino gweto remo mere mogo i nyako ciŋe, te kikiro remo mo go tutuŋ nyim kema me rwate tyen abiro." 
Numbers19:5 Eka ote doŋ waŋo riŋo roya-nono i nyime; obino waŋo pyennere, riŋo mere, remo mere kede wee mere." 
Numbers19:6 Alamdog bino kwanyo yat cedar kede jaŋ yat acalo ogudo kede anyero kede uci arema, te bologi i dye mac ame awaŋo riŋo roya." 
Numbers19:7 Eka alamdog te lwoko boŋŋi mere, te daŋ lwoko kome kede pii, icennere, en doŋ te dwogu i gony; alamdog te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno." 
Numbers19:8 Ŋat owaŋo roa daŋ bino lwoko boŋŋi mere i pii karacel kede kome, te daŋ bedo ŋat a cik ogeno naka otyeno." 
Numbers19:9 Ŋattoro olony, a cikkoro mom ogeŋo, en ame bino jobo buru roa-nono, eka te onyo oko i ŋe gony i kabedo moro acil; obino gwoko pi lwak jo Icrael, me yiko pi me lwoko kwer, pi lwoko bal." 
Numbers19:10 Ŋat ojobo buru daŋ bino lwoko boŋŋi mere te bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno. Man doŋ cik i ame jo Icrael kede orok ame bedo i akinagi bino lubo nakanaka. 
Numbers19:11 “Ŋat ame ogudo kom dano moro oto bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo nino abiro. 
Numbers19:12 Bino lonyere kene kede piinono i nino me adekkere kede i nino me kany wie aryo mere, eka te bedo doŋ ŋat olony. Cite ka en mom olonyere kene i nino me adekkere kede i nino me kany wie aryo mere, en mom bino doko ŋat olony." 
Numbers19:13 Dano moro keken ame ogudo kom dano oto, kom ŋattoro keken ame oto, eka mom te lonyere kenekene, dano-nono balo kema a Rwot, dok dano-nono waŋe bino rwenyo oko i akina jo Icrael. En bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo, pien pii me lwoko kwer mom oonyo i kome; cik ame ogene nwoŋo pwod omake." 
Numbers19:14 “Man cik ame mako dano ame oto i kema: ŋat acel acel ame donyo i kema-nono, kede ŋat acel acel ame onwoŋo tye i kema-nono, bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi nino abiro." 
Numbers19:15 Dok tabo onyo kodi ginnoro ducu ame wie onwoŋo twolo, ame ginnoro owumo i wie mom tye, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo." 
Numbers19:16 Ka ce dano moro ame onwoŋo tye i dye tim ogudo kom dano ame oneko i pala lweny onyo dano moro ame oto, onyo cogo dano, onyo lyel a dano moro, dano-nono bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo nino abiro." 
Numbers19:17 Pi lonyo gin a cik ogeŋo, obino juko buru ame owaŋo i mot me bal, ote keto i tabo kun omedo iye pii ame mol." 
Numbers19:18 Dano moro ame olony ame cikkoro mom ogeŋo bino kwanyo jaŋ ogudo, te luto i pii, te kikiro i kom kema-nono, kede i kom jami luŋ ame tye iye, kede i kom jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye kannono, kede i kom ŋat ame ogudo cogo-nono, onyo kom ŋat ame oneko onyo kom ŋat oto, i kom lyellaca." 
Numbers19:19 Ŋat olony, ame cikkoro mom ogeno bino dok kiro pii i kem dano a cik ogeŋo i nino me adekkere kede i nino me kany wie aryo mere; en bino lonyo dano ame cik ogeŋo kittono i nino me kany wie aryo, dok dano-nono bino lwoko boŋŋi mere, te lwoko daŋ kome kede pii, otyeno en doŋ te doko ŋat olony." 
Numbers19:20 “Ento dano moro ame onwoŋo cik ogeŋo, eka mom te lonyere kenekene, dano-nono waŋe bino rwenyo oko i dye lwak ocokere, pien nwoŋo obalo kabedo a Rwot acil; en nwoŋo, ŋat a cik ogeŋo, pien pii me lwoko kwer mom oonyo i kome." 
Numbers19:21 Mannono bino bedo cik ame gin bino lubo nakanaka. Ŋat ame okiro pii me lwoko kwer bino lwoko boŋŋi mere; kede ŋat ame ogudo pii me lwoko kwer bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno. 
Numbers19:22 Ginnoro ducu ame dano ame cik ogeŋo-nono ogudo, bino bedo gin a cik ogeŋo i ŋat ame ogudo daŋ bino bedo ŋat a cik ogeŋo naka otyeno.”" 
Numbers20:1 Jo Icrael, lwakgi luŋ rik otuno i tim me Jin i dwe me agege, ote koŋ wot bedo i Kadec. Miriam rik te to kuno, ote daŋ yiko kuno." 
Numbers20:2 Pii ame myero jo mat te bedo pe; lwak luŋ te cokere karacel i kom Muca kede Aron. 
Numbers20:3 Jo te pyem i Muca, ote kobbe ni, “Kono rik giwa oto oko i kare ame omegowa to i nyim Rwot!" 
Numbers20:4 Piŋo kara ikelo lwak a Rwot itim kan, me wek wan karacel kede limwa oto oko?" 
Numbers20:5 Dok piŋo imiowa oya oko i Miciri, ite kelowa i kabedo arac-ci? Kabedo a mom ceko cam, akadi otit, onyo olok, onyo okwer pomegranat; pii moro me amata-gu daŋ mom iye.”" 
Numbers20:6 Muca kede Aron te ya oko i nyim jo ame ocokere, ote wot naka i doggola kema me rwatte, ote ryebere piny; eka kwogo a Rwot te nen baŋgi." 
Numbers20:7 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers20:8 “Kwany abiro ite coko lwak karacel, yin kede ominni Aron, ite kobbi kidi i nyimgi ducu ni mi pii mere mollo oko. Ibino miyo pii i kidi mollo pirgi kittono; ibino miyo lwak kede limgi pii amata kittono.”" 
Numbers20:9 Muca te kwanyo abiro oko i kan a tye iye i nyim Rwot, kite ame ocike kede." 
Numbers20:10 Muca kede Aron te dok coko lwak karacel i nyim kidi, Muca te kobo baŋgi ni, “Aman kon doŋ iwiny wunu, wun jo ame maro jem ajema-ni. Imito wunu ni omi pii mollo i kidi man pirwu?”" 
Numbers20:11 Muca te tiŋo ciŋe malo, te goyo kidi kede abiro mere tyen aryo twal; pii te wukere oko adwoŋ meicel, lwak karacel kede limgi te mato." 
Numbers20:12 Rwot te kobbi Muca kede Aron ni, “Pien wun mom iye wunu an, mom inyuto wunu i nyim jo Icrael ni an acil, pi mannono, wun mom doŋ ibino wunu tero lwak man i lobo ame amiogi.”" 
Numbers20:13 Pii me Meriba ennono, kan ame rik jo Icrael opyem i Rwot iye, en te nyutte kene i akinagi ni ecil." 
Numbers20:14 Muca ocwao kwena baŋ abaka me Edom iya i Kadec kun kobbe ni, “Omini Icrael okobo ni mannono, Yin iŋeo can luŋ ame opoto i komwa:" 
Numbers20:15 kite a rik kwariwa owoto kede i Miciri, eka ote bedo i Miciri pi kare alac, jo Miciri te wunowa atek meicel karacel kede kwariwa." 
Numbers20:16 Kare ame rik okok baŋ Rwot, en owinyo kokowa, te cwayo amalaika kwanyowa oko i Miciri; aman doŋ wan otye kan i Kadec, i boma ame doŋ ceggi i waŋ loboni." 
Numbers20:17 Myero doŋ itimwa ber obe i loboni. Wan giwa mom obino beo i poto moro, onyo i poto olok, akadi mato pii moro me akoŋ. Wan obino lubo ka yo abaka adittere, mom obino gak tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam, tuno ka okato giwa waŋ loboni.”" 
Numbers20:18 Ento Edom te kobbe ni, “Mom gire ibino beo, naka mio abino i komi i pala lweny.”" 
Numbers20:19 Jo Icrael te kobbe ni, “Wan giwa obino lubo yo adittere; ka ce waŋ kede limwa omato piini moro, obino culo waŋe. Tim ber imi abe ka i tyena keken, aboŋo mito ginnoro ocele.”" 
Numbers20:20 Cite en te kobo ni, “Mom gire ibino beo.” Edom te bino oko i komgi i lwak jo apol, ame daŋ tek meicel." 
Numbers20:21 Edom rik te kwero miyo jo Icrael beo i lobo mere kittono; Icrael doŋ te lunyo beo tuŋ ocele. 
Numbers20:22 Lwak jo Icrael luŋ rik te ya oko i Kadec, ote wot ite kidi me Kor." 
Numbers20:23 Rwot te kobbi Muca kede Aron i te kidi me Kor, i waŋ lobo me Edom, ni," 
Numbers20:24 “Aron en ame doŋ bino to oko, te wot nywako kabedo kede kwari mere; pien en mom bino donyo i lobo ame rik amio baŋ jo Icrael, pien wun rik ijem wunu i kom cikka i dog pii me Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Ter Aron kede wode Eleajar, ikelgi i wi kidi me Kor." 
Numbers20:26 Gony boŋŋi Aron luŋ i kome, rwakgi i kom wode Eleajar, pien Aron doŋ awot to oko kuno, awot nywako kabedo i kwari mere.”" 
Numbers20:27 Muca daŋ te timo kite ame Rwot ociko; gin owoto malo i wi kidi me Kor kun lwak luŋ anene. 
Numbers20:28 Muca te gonyo boŋŋi aruka Aron oko luŋ, te rwako i kom wode Eleajar. Aron te to oko i wi Kidi kuno. Icennere Muca kede Eleajar te yitto oko i wi kidi." 
Numbers20:29 Kare ame lwak doŋ oneno ni Aron doŋ oto oko, jo ot Icrael luŋ te koko Aron nino pyeradek." 
Numbers21:1 Rik onwoŋo tye abaka moro me Arad, ame dano me Kanaan, ame bedo i Negeb. Kare ame en owinyo ni jo Icrael tye abino kun olubo yo me Atarim, en olwenyo i kom jo Icrael, te mako jo ocele i akinagi." 
Numbers21:2 Icrael te kwon baŋ Rwot kun kobo ni, “Ka ce ibino miyo jo man i ciŋa, an abino jalo bomagi luŋ bed me ajwera acalo gin me kwer.”" 
Numbers21:3 Rwot rik te winyo Icrael, te miyo jo Kanaan baŋgi, gin te jwero oko luŋ pire acalo gin me kwer. Mannono en omio ote cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Korma." 
Numbers21:4 Gin rik te ya i te kidi me Kor, ote beo i yo me Nam Arema, kun omano lobo me Edom amana; cuny jo rik te bale oko iyo." 
Numbers21:5 Jo rik te kobo kop arac i kom Obaŋa kede i kom Muca, kun okobo ni, “Piŋo kara ikwanyowa wunu oko i Miciri me to i tim? Pien cam pe, pii-gu daŋ pe, cam a konnyere mom-mi doŋ okwero yiwa oko,”" 
Numbers21:6 Rwot te cwayo twole mogo a kwirgi rac meicel i akina lwak, gin te totoŋo jo, ame te miyo jo Icrael to adwoŋ meicel." 
Numbers21:7 Jo te bino baŋ Muca kun okobo ni, “Wan obalo, pien okobo kop arac i kom Rwot Obaŋa kede i komi. Kwa Rwot me kwany twole oko i baŋwa.” Muca rik daŋ te kwayo Rwot pi lwak." 
Numbers21:8 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Ti cal twol a kwirrere rac, ite ŋabo malo i kom pagi, me wek ŋat a twol otono, ka ce oneno, bedo kwo.”" 
Numbers21:9 Mannono te miyo Muca tiyo twol mola, te ŋabo malo i wi pagi; doŋ ka twol mola-nono otoŋo ŋattoro, ka ce en oŋao wane malo oneno twolmola-nono en bedo kwo." 
Numbers21:10 Jo Icrael dok te cako wot, ote wot guro gonygi i Obot." 
Numbers21:11 Gin dok te ya i Obot, ote wot guro gonygi i. Iyeabarim, i tim ame otikere i Moab, ame tye tutuŋ kide." 
Numbers21:12 Gin te ya i kuno, ote wot guro gonygi i luŋ me Jered." 
Numbers21:13 Gin dok te ya i kuno, ote wot guro gonygi i kulo me Amon tuŋ ca, ame tye i dye tim, ame oya i waŋ lobo me ajo Amor; pien Amon obedo waŋ lobo a jo Moab ame tye i akina Moab kede jo Amor." 
Numbers21:14 Man en kan ame okobo iye i Buk me lweny a Rwot, ni, “Wakeb ame tye i Cupa, kede luŋ me Amon ducu," 
Numbers21:15 kede lula me luŋ apol ame okato naka i kabedo me Ar, te jeŋere i waŋ loba me Moab.”" 
Numbers21:16 Gin oya i kuno, ote bino i Beer. Mannono en akoŋ ame Rwot okobo iye baŋ Muca ni, “Cok jo karacel, an abino miyogi pii.”" 
Numbers21:17 Jo Icrael rik te wero wer man: “Yin akoŋ yeye malo! Owerre wunu wer! 
Numbers21:18 Akoŋ ame oloc yam okunyo, ame jo adoŋo i lwak en oŋolo, kede abiro loc kede ludigi.” Gin dok te ya i tim, ote wot Matana." 
Numbers21:19 Eka i Matana ote wot Nakaliel, eka i Nakaliel ote wot Bamot." 
Numbers21:20 Eka i Bamot gin te wot i luŋ ame tye i loba me Moab, ame ceggi atenni kidi me Piciga, kan ame otwero bolo waŋgi ote neno tim ame tye piny." 
Numbers21:21 Icrael te cwayo okwena baŋ Cikon, abaka ajo Amor, kun kobo ni," 
Numbers21:22 “Myero itimwa ber obe i loboni. Wan giwa mom obino beo i poto moro, onyo i poto olok, mom daŋ obino mato pii moro me akoŋ. Waŋ obino lubo ka yo abaka adittere, tuno ka okato giwa waŋ loboni.”" 
Numbers21:23 Ento Cikon mom te ye ni Icrael be i lobo mere. En te coko jo mere luŋ karacel, te wot lweny i kom Icrael i tim. Obino i Jakaj, te lweny i kom Icrael." 
Numbers21:24 Icrael te nekogi i pala lweny, te mayo lobogi oko, cakere i Amon tuno naka i kulo Jabok, tuno naka i waŋ lobo a jo Ammon pien onwoŋo loba me Jajer en obedo waŋ lobo a jo Ammon," 
Numbers21:25 Icrael te mayo boma-nono luŋ, ote bedo i boma a jo Amor luŋ, i Kecbon kede pacci ame tye i ŋete ducu." 
Numbers21:26 Pien Kecbon onwoŋo obedo boma adwoŋ me Cikon, abaka a jo Amor, ame rik koŋ onwoŋo olwenyo i kom abaka a jo Moab occonnere eka te mayo loba mere luŋ i ciŋe, tuno naka i Amon." 
Numbers21:27 En omio odiro me cako wer te wer ni, “Biye wunu i Kecbon, me ger boma abaka Cikon, me yik cuni okon." 
Numbers21:28 Pien mac opello i tuŋ Kecbon, leb mac oya i boma a Cikon. Owaŋo Ar ame tye i Moab, oweo rwode me wi kidi me Amon oko," 
Numbers21:29 Ineno can meicel, yin Moab! Ito, itum wunu oko, wun jo a Kemoc! En omio awobe mere oriŋo olaro komgi, anyira mere ote yako oko, ote tero baŋ Cikon, abaka a jo Amor." 
Numbers21:30 Ikwaegi oneko otyeko kittono, cakere i Kecbon naka i Dibon, Obalo lobo-nono oko, tuno ka mac omedde naka i Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Jo Icrael rik obedo i lobo a jo Amor kittono. 
Numbers21:32 Muca dok te cwayo dano roto Jajer. Gin rik te mayo pacci iye oko, ote ryemo jo Amor oko iye." 
Numbers21:33 Gin dok te lokere dok malo i yo a woto Bacan; eka Og, abaka me Bacan, te bino lweny i komgi, en karacel kede lwakkere luŋ, ote lweny i Edrei." 
Numbers21:34 Cite Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni, “Kur ilwore, pien atyeko doŋ miye oko i ciŋi, karacel kede lwakkere luŋ, kede loba mere. Ibino time kite a rik itimo kede Cikon, abaka a jo Amor, ame rik bedo i Kecbon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Rik ote neke kittono, karacel kede awobe mere, kede lwakkere tuno waŋ ame ŋattoro acel iye mom odoŋ baŋe akwo ame obwot; gin te mayo loba mere bedo megi." 
Numbers22:1 Jo Icrael dok te cako wot, ote wot guro gonygi i bar me Moab, ame tye loka Jordan i Jeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balak wot a Jippor oneno ginnoro luŋ ame jo Icrael otimo i kom jo Amor. 
Numbers22:3 Jo Moab te bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel i komgi; pien gin rikopol. Lworo jo Icrael onwoŋo doŋ onyobo kom jo Moab oko. 
Numbers22:4 Jo Moab te kobbi odoŋe me Midian ni, “Lwak man abino cido ginnoro luŋ ame omanowa, kite ame twon cido kede lum i bar.” Mannono omio Balak wot a Jippor, ame rik onwoŋo obedo abaka me Moab i kare Balak nono," 
Numbers22:5 ocwao kwena baŋ Balaam wot a Peor i Petor, ame ceggi i kulo me Eufrate, i lobo me Amau, me wot lwoŋe, kun kobo ni, “Nen ba, rokkoro obino i Miciri, owumo lobo oko, aman gin obedo otikere keda." 
Numbers22:6 Tim ber ibin icen jo man oko pira, pien gin otek okata oko. Gwok onyo bino miyo aloogi, ate ryemogi oko i lobo-ni pien an aŋeo ni ŋat ame yin ilamme winyo, bedo daŋ awinyo, dok ŋat ame iceno nwoŋo daŋ doŋ oceno.”" 
Numbers22:7 Odoŋe me Moab karacel kede odoŋe me Midian te cako wotgi kittono kun daŋ otero lim me tyet. Gin owoto baŋ Balaam, ote titte kop ame Balak ocwaogi pire," 
Numbers22:8 En te kobbigi ni, “Aco doŋ tin koŋ ibut wunu kan, an abino dwoggiwu kop kite ame Rwot okobo kede baŋa.” Oloc me Moab daŋ te bedo baŋ Balaam kittono." 
Numbers22:9 Obaŋa te bino baŋ Balaam, te penye ni, “lo mene kara a tye baŋi nie?”" 
Numbers22:10 Balaam te kobbi Obaŋa ni, Balak wot a Jippor, ame obedo abaka me Moab, en ame ocwao kop baŋa kun kobo ni," 
Numbers22:11 “Nen ba, rokkoro obino i Miciri, owumo lobo oko. Tim ber ibin icen jo-nono oko pira. Gwok onyo bino miyo alwenyo kedgi, ate ryemogi oko.”" 
Numbers22:12 Obaŋa te kobbi Balaam ni, “Yin gire mom ibino wot kedgi, mom daŋ ibino ceno jo-nono, pien gin obedo jo ame doŋ amio winyo oko.”" 
Numbers22:13 Balaam rik te ya oko odiko con, te kobbi oloc a Balak ni, “Dok wunu i lobowu; pien Rwot mom oye ni an awot kedwu.”" 
Numbers22:14 Mannono te miyo oloc me Moab ya oko wot baŋ Balak, ote kobbe ni, “Balaam gire okwero bino kedwa oko.”" 
Numbers22:15 Balak dok te medo cwayo rwode ocele apol, dok ame obedo jo me awora kato maca me agege ca oko." 
Numbers22:16 Gin owoto baŋ Balaam, ote kobbe ni, “Balak wot a Jippor okobo ni, kur imi ginnoro geŋ i bino baŋa;" 
Numbers22:17 pien iyi ateni, abino twon kwogo adwoŋ meicel i komi, dok keto daŋ ginnoro luŋ ame ibino kobba, abino tiyo. Bye icenna jo man oko.”" 
Numbers22:18 Ento Balaam te dok iye kun kobbi jo ame Balak ooro ni, “Kadi bed Balak onwoŋo omia ode ame opoŋ i ryal kede jabu, onwoŋo mom atwero timo ginnoro a mom Rwot Obaŋana ociko, akadi i ginnoro ame titidi onyo i ginnoro ame dwoŋ," 
Numbers22:19 Tim wunu ber tin koŋ dok ibut wunu kaŋ, me koŋ dok amed ŋeyo gin ame Rwot bino kobo baŋa.”" 
Numbers22:20 Obaŋa te bino baŋ Balaam dyewor, te kobbe ni, “Ka ce jo man obino me lwoŋi, ya iwot kedgi; ento ibino tiyo ka gin ame an aciko keken.”" 
Numbers22:21 Mannono te miyo Balaam dilo odiko, te tweyo gi-bedo mere i ŋe kana, te wot karacel kede rwode me Moab." 
Numbers22:22 Cite akemo te mako Obaŋa pi wottere-nono; amalaika a Rwot te cuŋ oko i yo acalo akworrere. En onwoŋo rik tye i wi kana karacel kede omiro mere aryo. 
Numbers22:23 Kana rik te neno amalaika a Rwot ocuŋ oko i dye yo, kun omako pala lweny i ciŋe. Kana te wirre weko yo oko, te coro lum. Balaam te goyo kana me dwog iyo." 
Numbers22:24 Amalaika a Rwot dok te cuŋ i dye yo kan adiŋ i akina poto olok ame ogeŋo oko i cel tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi. 
Numbers22:25 Kare ame kana oneno amalaika a Rwot, odiye i kom cel, te miyo cel gwaro tyen Balaam; Balaam dok te medo goye." 
Numbers22:26 Amalaika a Rwot te dok medde wot anyim, te dok wot cuŋ kakannoro adiŋ, kan ame mom dok tye yo tuŋŋoro me lokere, akadi tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam." 
Numbers22:27 Kare ame kana oneno amalaika a Rwot, obuto oko piny kun Balaam tye i wie; akemo te mako Balaam oko, te goyo kana i lut." 
Numbers22:28 Rwot te yabo dog kana, kana te kobbi Balaam ni, “Atimi kara ŋo ba omio igoa odoko tyen adek twal-li?”" 
Numbers22:29 Balaam te kobbi kana ni, “Pien ibedo nywara, kono woki onwoŋo at ye i pala i ciŋa, kono aneki kede oko.”" 
Numbers22:30 Kana te kobbi Balaam ni, “An mom a kanani ame ibedo ŋwec kede kare luŋ tuno kede naka tin? Yam koŋ ineno abedo timere kittono baŋi?” En te gamo ni, “Pe gire.”" 
Numbers22:31 Rwot doŋ te yabo waŋ Balaam, en te neno amalaika a Rwot kun tye ocuŋ i yo kun omako pala lweny i ciŋe; en te kulo wie, te ryebere piny." 
Numbers22:32 Amalaika a Rwot te kobbe ni, “Piŋo kara igoo kanani tyen adek twal? Nen ba, an abino me juki, pien woti-nono mom oyomoro cunya," 
Numbers22:33 Tyen adek-ki luŋ kana onwoŋo obedo nena, en omio te wirre weko yo oko. Kono en mom owirre oweko yo oko i nyima, kono nyo doŋ aneki oko, ate lunyo weke en akwo.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balaam te kobbi amalaika a Rwot ni, “An doŋ abalo, pien onwoŋo mom aŋeo ni yin icuŋ i yo me lweny keda. Doŋ ba, ka ce wota ni rac i nyimi, an abino dok gira cen.”" 
Numbers22:35 Amalaika a Rwot ogamo dog Balaam ni, “Wot doŋ i jo-nono; ento ibino kobo kop ame an aciko keken.” Balaam doŋ te medde wot karaceli rwode a Balak." 
Numbers22:36 Kare ame Balak owinyo ni Balaam obino, en owoto me wot rwatte kede i boma me Moab, i waŋ lobo ame boma ame kulo Amon opoko, i waŋ apokki ikokome." 
Numbers22:37 Balak te kobbi Balaam ni, “An mom rik koŋ acwao jo me lwoŋi? Ŋo kara a rik ogeŋi bino baŋa? Itamo ni an mom aromo miyi kwogo?”" 
Numbers22:38 Balaam te gamo ni, “En doŋ abino oko baŋi ni! Itamo ni aman an atye i twer me kobo ginnoro? Kop ame Obaŋa oketo i doga, en ame myero akobi.”" 
Numbers22:39 Balaam te wot gin kede Balak, gin te wot naka i Kiriat-kujot." 
Numbers22:40 Balak te ŋolo twoni kede rommi te poko rinogi cwayo baŋ Balaam kede rwode a rik onwoŋo tye baŋe. 
Numbers22:41 Orwo mere Balak te tero Balaam naka i Bamot-baal, Balaam te neno jo Icrael mogo ame onwoŋo tye ceggi i kaci-naca." 
Numbers23:1 Balaam te kobbi Balak ni, “Canna keno lam abiro kan, ite daŋ kella twoni abiro kede romi abiro kan.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balak daŋ te timo kite ame Balaam okobe; eka Balak kede Balaam te bedo yalo Obaŋa i twon kede romo i wi keno lam acel acel. 
Numbers23:3 Balaam te kobbi Balak ni, “Cuŋ i ŋet mot awaŋani, me an koŋ awoti; gwok onyo Rwot twero bino me rwatte keda. Doŋ ginnoro luŋ ame en bino nyutta, an abino titti.” Balaam te wot malo i wi kidi." 
Numbers23:4 Obaŋa daŋ te rwatte i Balaam. Balaam te kobbe ni, “Doŋ atyeko yiko keno me lam abiro doŋ daŋ atyeko waŋo i wi keno lam acel acel mot me twon acel kede nyok romo acel.”" 
Numbers23:5 Rwot te keto kop i dog Balaam, eka te kobbe ni, “Aco doŋ dok baŋ Balak, iwot ikobbe kit man,”" 
Numbers23:6 Balaam te dok baŋ Balak, en te nwoŋo Balak kede rwode me Moab luŋ tye ocuŋ i ŋet mot awaŋa mere." 
Numbers23:7 Balaam te cako wero koppere, ni, “Balak okela i Aram, abaka me Moab olwoŋa i kiddi ame tye tuŋ kide: ‘Bin icenna Yakobo, bin ilucoro Icrael!’" 
Numbers23:8 Atwero ceno ŋat Obaŋa mom oceno niŋo? Alucoro niŋo ka Rwot mom olucoro? 
Numbers23:9 Pien anene kun atye i wi kidi, anene kun atye malo i wi atenni kidi, koŋ inen ba, jo abedo gigi kengi, jo a mom kwanne kengi i akina orok!" 
Numbers23:10 Ŋa ce a twero kwano apuwa a Yakobo? Onyo a twero kwano acel me aŋwen me Icrael? Weka gira ata kite a dano a kite atira to kede! Wek agikki kwona bed calo mege!” 
Numbers23:11 Balak te kobbi Balaam ni, “Ŋo kara ame yin itimo pira? An ateri me wot ceno okwora yin dok ilunyo lammigi winyo.”" 
Numbers23:12 Balaam te gamo ni, “Mom myero agwokere ikobo gin ame Rwot oketo i doga bo?”" 
Numbers23:13 Balak dok te kobo ni, “Koŋ dok ibin ateri i kabedo ocele, kan ame iromo nenogi. Mom ibino nenogi luŋ, ibino neno ka jo ame tye ceggi keken; eka ite cennagi oko i kuno.”" 
Numbers23:14 En rik te tere i poto me Jopim, naka i wi kidi me Piciga, eka ote cano keno lam abiro kuno, ote daŋ ŋolo mot me twon acel kede nyok romo acel i wi keno lam acel acel." 
Numbers23:15 Balaam te kobo baŋ Balak ni, “Cuŋ i ŋet mot awaŋa-ni kan, me an koŋ arwatte i Rwot kuca,”" 
Numbers23:16 Rwot daŋ rik te rwatte i Balaam, te keto kop i doge, eka te kobbe ni, “Dok doŋ baŋ Balak, iwot ikobbe kit man.”" 
Numbers23:17 Balaam te dok baŋ Balak, te nwoŋo Balak ocuŋ i ŋet mot awaŋa mere, kun daŋ rwode me Moab tye karacel kede. Balak te penyo Balaam ni, “Rwot okobo kop aŋo.”" 
Numbers23:18 Balaam te cako kobo koppere ni, “Balak, ya malo me iwiny, winy koppa, yin wot a Jippor;" 
Numbers23:19 Obaŋa gire mom obedo dano, me kobo kop goba, en mom obedo wot a dano, ame twero loko tammere. Gin a en dok okobo, itamo mom bino cobo? Onyo kite a en doŋ okobo, itamo ni mom bino cobo koppere-nono?" 
Numbers23:20 Nen ba, an onwoŋo ocika me lamo winyo; en doŋ otyeko miyo winyo oko, an mom dok atwero dwoko ceŋ." 
Numbers23:21 Cannoro mom nen i kom Yakobo, akadi ayela moro i kom Icrael. Rwot Obanagi tye gire kedgi, gin oredo me pwoye acalo abakagi." 
Numbers23:22 Obaŋa okwanyogi i Miciri, en tye i akinagi acalo tuŋ jobi ager." 
Numbers23:23 Pien mom tye cannoro ame omio i kom Yakobo Ŋattoro daŋ mom tye ame twero logoro Icrael. Aman doŋ abino kobo kop i kom Yakobo kede Icrael ni, ‘Man twon ŋo ame Obaŋa otimo nie?’" 
Numbers23:24 Koŋ inen jo-nono! Oya malo calo min eŋatu kite acalo eŋatu tirre kede malo; mom buto piny tuno waŋ omwodo lee ame omako, eka te mato remo a gin ame eneko.”" 
Numbers23:25 Balak ociko Balaam ni, “Kur doŋ icengi, kur daŋ ilammigi winyo.”" 
Numbers23:26 Cite Balaam te dok iye ni, “Rik mom akobbi ni. ‘Ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot okobo, an abino tiyo atia’?” Balak dok te kobbi Balaam ni," 
Numbers23:27 “Koŋ dok ibin ateri kan ocele; gwoko onyo Obaŋa bino ye ni icennagi i kuno,”" 
Numbers23:28 Balak dok te tero Balaam malo i wi atenni kidi me Peor, kan ame itwero neno tim ame tye i tere piny." 
Numbers23:29 Balaam te kobbi Balak ni, “Canna dok keno lam abiro kan, ite kela twoni abiro kede nyogi romi abiro kan.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balak daŋ te timo kite ame Balaam okobo, eka ote bedo ŋolo mot yalo Obaŋa me twon acel kede nyok acel i wi keno lam acel acel." 
Numbers24:1 Ka Balaam oneno ni Rwot mito miyo Icrael winyo, en mom owoto i tyet kite ame obedo timo i kare ocele ca, ento olunyo wiro waŋe neno tim." 
Numbers24:2 Balaam te tiro waŋe malo, te neno jo Icrael kun oguro kemagi atekere atekere. Cuny Obaŋa rik te bino i kome," 
Numbers24:3 en te cako wero koppere ni, “Man kop a Balaam wot a Beor, kop a dano a waŋe doŋ oyabere," 
Numbers24:4 dano ame winyo kop ame Obaŋa kobo, dano ame neno anyut ame Won Twer nyuto, dano amerette piny, cite mom gire mio waŋe:" 
Numbers24:5 Kemani luŋ mwonya meicel, Yakobo, gony Icrael luŋ daŋ mwonya kittono." 
Numbers24:6 Nen acalli i luŋ ame opette kuka kuka, calo potti ame tye i dog kulo; calo elwa ame Rwot opito, calo yen cedar ame oradde i dog pii." 
Numbers24:7 Pii bino bedo mollo i gulu mere, koti mere bino durre i ŋet kulli apipim, abaka mere bino bedo dit akato Agag oko, loccere bino bedo malo meicel." 
Numbers24:8 Obaŋa okwanye i Miciri, en tye i akinagi acalo tuŋ jobi ager. En bino camo orok ame okworrere oko, bino tuturo cogogi ŋido atitino, te celogi pel kede atero mere." 
Numbers24:9 En onyoŋo piny, obuto calo eŋatu, acalo min eŋatu; ŋa kara a cunye tek me tuge? Gum myero bed i kom jo luŋ ame lammi winyo dok jo luŋ ame ceni, ceŋ, myero bed i wigi.”" 
Numbers24:10 Akemo te mako Balak atek i kom Balaam, omio en te bapo ciŋe, te kobo baŋ Balaam ni, “An onwoŋo alwoŋi me ceno okwora, koŋ doŋ inen, aman yin dok ilunyo lammigi winyo odoko tyen adek twal." 
Numbers24:11 Pi mannono, yin doŋ myero iriŋ oko, idok i kabedoni. Rik an akobo ni, ‘Ateni, abino keto kwogo i komi’, cite Rwot gire ogeŋi limo kwogo-nono.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balaam te kobbi Balak ni, “Kara rik mom akobo baŋ okwena ame icwao baŋa ni," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Kadi bed Balak onwoŋo omia ode ame opoŋ i ryal kede jabu, onwoŋo mom atwero timo ginnoro a mom Rwot Obaŋana ociko, kun atimo gin aber onyo arac ame an amito; gin ame Rwot bino kobo, en ame an daŋ abino kobo?’ ”" 
Numbers24:14 Nen ba, an doŋ awot oko baŋ jo me turwa, bye koŋ, me abin ami iŋe gin ame jo man bino timo i kom jo meri i kare ame tye i nyim," 
Numbers24:15 Balaam te cako wero koppere ni, “Man kop a Balaam wot a Beor, kop a dano a waŋe doŋ oyabere," 
Numbers24:16 dano ame winyo kop ame Obaŋa okobo, dano ame ŋeo gin ame Ŋat Amalo Meicel ŋeo dano ame neno anyut ame Won Twer tio, dano amerette piny cite, mom gire mio waŋe" 
Numbers24:17 An anene, cite mom aman; anene, cite mom tye kan aceggi: acerroro waŋŋoro abino, ame bino ya i Yakobo, abiro loc bino ya iyi Icrael; bino tutuco tur nyim jo Moab, te tyeko teko awobe a Ceti luŋ," 
Numbers24:18 Lobo Edom obino mayo oko, jo Ceir ame okworrere, en bino mayo lobogi oko, kun Icrael tye ka lweny i tek meicel." 
Numbers24:19 Yakobo bino loyo loc jo ame obwot i boma Ar obino neko oko!” 
Numbers24:20 Eka te dok lokere neno Amalek, te cako wero koppere ni, “Amalek yam obedo rok me agege, cite i agikki obino tyeko oko luŋ.”" 
Numbers24:21 Te dok lokere neno jo Keni, te cako kobo koppere ni, “Iri wunu kare alac i kabedowu, ogero pacowu i wi lela;" 
Numbers24:22 ento jo a Kain obino yako iweŋ, Acur aterowu i opii pi kare a rom mene?”" 
Numbers24:23 Balaam te dok cako wer ni, “Oi do, jo ame oya i tuŋ anyarodi!" 
Numbers24:24 Mel apol bino tuno kun oya i Kittim, bino yelo Acur kede Eber atek; en daŋ obino neke oko.”" 
Numbers24:25 Balaam doŋ te ya oko dok ceŋ i kabedo mere, Balak doŋ te wot oko." 
Numbers25:1 I kare ame jo Icrael bino i Cittim, jo rik te cako timo tim me abor i kom anyira me Moab." 
Numbers25:2 Gin te bedo lwoŋo jo kan ame gin oyalo iye obaŋegi, jo daŋ te cam, ote daŋ ryebere piny i nyim obaŋegi." 
Numbers25:3 Icrael te miye me woro Baal Peor kittono. Akemo te mako Rwot atek meicel i kom Icrael. 
Numbers25:4 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kwany rwode luŋ i akina lwak, iwot iŋabgi i ceŋ i nyim Rwot me wek, Rwot lok cunye akemo mere ager i kom jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers25:5 Muca te kobbi oŋolkop me Icrael ni, “Ŋat acel acel i akinawu myero nek jo mere ame omiye me woro Baal me Peor pirgi kengi.”" 
Numbers25:6 Nen ba, dano moro me Icrael te bino kun okelo nyannoro me Midian, te tero i ode, ame Muca karacel kede lwak jo Aron, Icrael luŋ tye aneno. Lwak onwoŋo tye akok i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Numbers25:7 Pinekaci wot Eleajar, ame obedo wot Aron, alamdog, ka oneno, oya malo i baŋ lwak, te mako toŋ i ciŋe," 
Numbers25:8 te wot lubo yo dano me Icrael ca, naka iyi icika i tyelo, te wot cocobo gin aryo luŋ, dano me Icrael kede dako-naca, kun cocobo yie. Mannono te miyo too edeke ya oko i akina jo Icrael." 
Numbers25:9 Cite onwoŋo doŋ jo ame too edeke oneko romo tutumia pyeraryo wie aŋwen. 
Numbers25:10 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers25:11 “Pinekaci wot Eleajar ame obedo wot Aron alamdog otyeko doŋ miyo akemona dok oko ceŋ i kom jo Icrael, pien nyeko ame onwoŋo omaka, onwoŋo daŋ omaka i akinagi, omio mom doŋ ate tyeko jo Icrael oko pi nyekona." 
Numbers25:12 Pi mannono, yin doŋ kob ni, ‘Nen ba, atyeko doŋ miye cikerena me bedo i kuc," 
Numbers25:13 cikere-nono bino bedo baŋe, kede baŋ ikwae ame bino lube, cikere me bedo doŋ nakanaka i tic me olamdog, pien nyeko rik omake pi Obaŋa mere, eka te tiyo tic me kwanyo bal oko i kom jo Icrael.’ ”" 
Numbers25:14 Nyiŋ dano me Icrael ame oneko, ame rik oneko karacel kede nyako me Midian, onwoŋo obedo Jimri wot a Calu, ame obedo ŋat ame loo ot a kwarogi i akina jo Cimeon." 
Numbers25:15 Nyiŋ nyako me Midian ame rik oneko-nono onwoŋo Kojibi nyaka a Jur ame onwoŋo obedo ŋat ame loo ot a kwarogi i akina jo Midian. 
Numbers25:16 Rwot te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers25:17 “Cuny wot agwa i kom jo Midian, me iwot ilweny kedgi;" 
Numbers25:18 pien gin daŋ opoto agwa i kom bwolowu me poto i bal i kop i kom Peor, kede kop i kom Kojibi, nyaka aloc me Midian, ame obedo amingi a rik oneko i kare ame too edeke opoto pi kop i kom Peor.”" 
Numbers26:1 Kare a doŋ too edeke okato, Rwot okobbi Muca kede Eleajar alamdog, wot Aron, ni," 
Numbers26:2 “Kwan wunu wel lwak jo Icrael luŋ, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo dok kede malo kun ilubo i doggola a kwarigi, jo Icrael luŋ a romo lweny.”" 
Numbers26:3 Muca kede Eleajar alamdog te kop kedgi i bar me Moab, ame tye ceggi i Jordan i Jeriko, okobbigi ni," 
Numbers26:4 “Kwan wunu wel jo, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo dok kede malo”, kite a Rwot ociko kede Muca. Jo Icrael ame rik obino kun oya i lobo Miciri gin ene:" 
Numbers26:5 Reuben obedo atin kao Icrael; ikwae a Reuben ene: jo Kanok, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Kanok; jo a Pallu ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Pallu;" 
Numbers26:6 jo a Kejeron, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Kejeron; jo a Karmi, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Karmi;" 
Numbers26:7 Magi gin doggola a Reuben, welgi ducu rik oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie adek kede mia abiro i pyeradek nono," 
Numbers26:8 Ikwae a Pallu te bedo: Eliab," 
Numbers26:9 Itino Eliab te bedo Nemuel, Datan, kede Abiram. Magi gin Datan kede Abiram ame rik oyero i akina lwak ame ojem i kom Muca kede Aron ame rik tye i akina lwak i Kora, i kare ame gin ojem i kom Rwot," 
Numbers26:10 eka lobo te ŋamo doge mnwonyogi oko karacel kede Kora. I kare-naca lwakgi naca rik oto oko, i kare ame mac tyeko jo mia aryo kede pyerabic; eka gin te doko gin a kwenyoro jo." 
Numbers26:11 Itino a Kora rik gire mom obin oto i akinagi. 
Numbers26:12 Ikwae a Cimeon ene, kun lubere i doggolagi ene: jo a Nemuel, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Nemuel; jo a Jamin, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Jamin; jo a Jakin, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Jakin;" 
Numbers26:13 jo a Jera, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Jera; jo a Caul, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Caul;" 
Numbers26:14 magi gin doggola a Cimeon, welgi oromo jo tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo kede mia aryo nono." 
Numbers26:15 Ikwae a Gad kun lubere i doggolagi ene: jo a Jepon, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Jepon; jo a Kaggi, ame gin jo me doggola a Kaggi; jo a Cuni, ame gin obedo jo doggola a Cuni;" 
Numbers26:16 jo Ojini, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Ojini; jo a Eri, ame gin obedo jo coggola a Eri;" 
Numbers26:17 jo Arod, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Arod; me Areli, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Magi gin jo me doggola a Gad kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi tye kede acel acel, welgi oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen kede mia abic nono." 
Numbers26:19 Awobe a Juda obedo Er kede Onan; gin luŋ Er kede Onan obin oto oko i Kanaan. 
Numbers26:20 Ikwae a Juda kun lubere i doggolagi ene: jo a Cela, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cela; jo a Perej, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Perej; jo a Jera ame gin obedo jo me doggola Jera." 
Numbers26:21 Itino a Perej awobe ene: jo a Kejeron, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Kejeron; jo a Kamul, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Kamul;" 
Numbers26:22 Magi gin jo me doggola a Juda kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede acel acel, welgi oromo tutumia pyerabiro wie abicel kede mia abic-nono." 
Numbers26:23 Ikwae Icakar ene, kun lubere i doggolagi: jo a Tola, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Tola; jo a Pua ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Pua," 
Numbers26:24 jo a Jacub, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Jacub; jo a Cimron, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cimron." 
Numbers26:25 Magi gin jo me doggola Icakar kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede acel acel, welgi oromo tutumia pyerabicel wie aŋwen kede mia adek nono." 
Numbers26:26 Ikwae a Jabulon ene, kun lubere i doggolagi: jo Cered, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cered; jo Elon, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Elon; jo a Jaleel, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Jaleel." 
Numbers26:27 Magi gin jo me doggola a Jabulon kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede acel acel, welgi oromo tutumia pyerabicel kede mia abic nono." 
Numbers26:28 Ikwae a Yucepu ene, kun lubere i doggolagi: jo a Manace kede Epraim." 
Numbers26:29 Awobe a Manace ene: jo a Makir, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Makir; dok Makir rik daŋ obedo pappa a Gilead; jo a Gilead ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Gilead." 
Numbers26:30 Awobe a Gilead ene: Joa, Yejer, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Yejer; jo a Kelek, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Kelek;" 
Numbers26:31 kede jo a Aciriel, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Aciriel; kede jo a Cekem, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cekem;" 
Numbers26:32 kede jo a Cemida, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cemida; kede jo a Keper, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Keper." 
Numbers26:33 Jelopekad wot a Keper onwoŋo rik mom tye kede awobe mere, kono ka anyira keken, ame anyira mere-nono nyiŋgi ene: Makla, Noa, Kogla, Mirika, kede Tirja." 
Numbers26:34 Magi gin ikwae a Manace; welgi rik oromo tutumia pyerabic wie aryo kede mia abiro nono. 
Numbers26:35 Awobe Epraim ene, kun lubere i doggolagi; jo a Cutela, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cutela; jo a Becer, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Becer; jo Taan, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Taan." 
Numbers26:36 Magi gin ikwea a Cutela: jo a Eran ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Eran. 
Numbers26:37 Magi gin ikwae awobe Epraim kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede acel acel, wei gi oromo tutumia pyeradek wie aryo kede mia abic nono. Magi gin ikwae Yucepu kun lubere i doggolagi." 
Numbers26:38 Ikwae a Benjamin ene, kun lubere i doggolagi: jo a Bela, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Bela; jo Acibel ame gin obedo jo me doggola Acibel; jo Airam, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Airam;" 
Numbers26:39 jo Cepupam, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cepupam; jo a Kupam, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Kupam." 
Numbers26:40 Awobe a Bela onwoŋo Arud kede Naaman: jo Arud ame gin obedo jo me doggola Arud; jo a Naaman, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Naaman." 
Numbers26:41 Magi gin ikwae a Benjamin kun lubere i doggolagi; welgi rik oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie abic kede mia abicel nono. 
Numbers26:42 Magi gin ikwae a Dan kun lubere kede doggolagi: Cukam, ame gin jo me doggola a Cukam. Magi gin ikwae a Dan kun lubere kede doggolagi." 
Numbers26:43 Jo doggola a Cukam luŋ kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede acel acel, rik gin oromo tutumia pyerabicel wie aŋwen kede mia aŋwen." 
Numbers26:44 Ikwae Acer ene, kun lubere i doggolagi: jo Imuna ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Imuna; jo a Icivi, ame gin obedo jo me doggola Icivi; jo a Beria, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Beria." 
Numbers26:45 Ikwae a Beria ene: jo a Keber, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Keber; jo a Malkiel, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Malkiel." 
Numbers26:46 Nyiŋ nyaka Acer onwoŋo Cera. 
Numbers26:47 Magi gin jo me doggola Acer kun lubo kite ame nyiŋgi ocoye kede acel acel, welgi oromo tutumia pyerabic wie adek kede mia adek nono." 
Numbers26:48 Ikwae a Naputali ene kun lubere i doggolagi: jo a Jajeel, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Jajeel; jo a Guni, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Guni;" 
Numbers26:49 jo a Jejer, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Jejer; jo a Cillem, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Cillem." 
Numbers26:50 Magi gin ikwae a Naputali kun lubere i doggolagi; welgi oromo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie abic kede mia aŋwen nono. 
Numbers26:51 Man en wel jo Icrael luŋ, jo tutumia mia abicel kede acel, kede mia abiro i pyeradek nono." 
Numbers26:52 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers26:53 “Obino poko lobo baŋ jo-ni me bedo megi kun olubo kite ame nyiŋ ocoye kede. 
Numbers26:54 Atekere ame jo mere pol, ibino pokkigi lobo alac me bedo megi. Atekere ame wel jo mere nok, ibino pokkigi lobo anok, atekere ducu obino pokkigi lobo ame oporo welgi." 
Numbers26:55 Cite lobo obino poko kede kwir; gin bino nwoŋo lobo me bedo megi kun lubo kite ame nyiŋ atekere ocoye kede ame lubere i kwarigi. 
Numbers26:56 Lobogi ame gin bino nwoŋo me bedo megi obino poko i akina atekere adoŋo mege kede atino mege kun olubo kede kwir.” 
Numbers26:57 Magi gin jo Levi kite ame okwanogi kede kun lubere i doggolagi: jo Gercon, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Gercon; jo Kokat ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Kokat, jo Merari, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Marari." 
Numbers26:58 Magi gin jo me doggola a Levi: jo Libini ame gin obedo jo me doggola a Libini; jo Kebron ame gin obedo jo doggola a Kebron, jo dogola a Makali, jo me doggola a Muci, jo me doggola a Kora, Kokat rik obedo papa Amuram." 
Numbers26:59 Nyiŋ dako Amuram rik obedo Yokobedi, ame obedo nyaka Levi, ame rik Levi onywalo i Miciri; en rik te nywalli Amuram Aron kede Muca karacel kede amingi Miriam," 
Numbers26:60 Eka Aron te nywalo Nadab, Abiku, Eleajar kede Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 Ento Nadab kede Abiku rik te to oko i nyim Rwot i kare ame gin oyalo Rwot i mac a mom ociko ni ti kede," 
Numbers26:62 Jo Levi a rik okwano te doŋ romo tutumia pyeraryo wie adek, co luŋ ame mwaka me ditogi oromo dwe acel dok kede malo; pien gin rik mom okwanogi i akina jo Icrael, pien gin rik mom opokkigi lobo moro me bedo megi i akina jo Icrael." 
Numbers26:63 Magi gin jo ame rik Muca kede Eleajar alamdog okwano, ame gin okwano jo Icrael i bar me Moab ame ceggi i Jordan i Jeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Cite i akina jo-nono mom tye moro iye ame rik tye i akina jo ame Muca kede Aron alamdog okwano, i kare ame gin rik okwano jo i tim me Cinai." 
Numbers26:65 Pien Rwot rik okobo i komgi ni, “Gin bino to i tim.” Dano moro rik mom tye ame odoŋ i akinagi, kono ka Kaleb wot a Jepune kede Yocwa wot a Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 I kare-nono anyira a Jelopekad te bino ceggi. Jelopekad obedo wot a Keper, wot a Gilead, wot a Macir, wot a Manace, ame gin oya i doggola a Manace wot a Yucepu. Nyiŋ anyira mere-nono rik: Malka, Noa, Kogla, Mirika kede Tirja." 
Numbers27:2 Gin ocuŋ i nyim Muca kede i nyim Eleajar alamdog, kede i nyim otel wic, karacel kede i nyim lwak luŋ i doggola kema me rwatte, kun gin okobo ni," 
Numbers27:3 “Pappawa rik obin oto oko i tim; en gire rik mom tye i akina lwak a Kora, ame rik bin cokere karacel i kom Rwot, ento en oto gire pi bale re kene kun onwoŋo mom onywalo awobi moro." 
Numbers27:4 Piŋo kara omio okwanyo nyiŋ papawa oko i doggola mere, pien en rik mom onywalo awobe bo? Miwa wan daŋ onwoŋ lobo i akina omego a papawa.”" 
Numbers27:5 Muca rik te kelo kopgi i nyim Rwot. 
Numbers27:6 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers27:7 “Kop anyira a Jelopekad tye ateni, ibino miyogi onwoŋo lobo me bedo megi i akina omego a papagi, mano bino miyo lobo ame kono obed me a papagi bedo megi." 
Numbers27:8 Yin ibino kobo baŋ jo Icrael ni, ‘Ka ce ŋattoro oto kun mom tye kede atin awobi, obino miyo lobo ame myero bed mege baŋ nyare." 
Numbers27:9 Ka ce nyare moro daŋ mom, obino miyo lobo mere baŋ omego mere," 
Numbers27:10 Ka ce ominnere moro daŋ mom, obino miyo lobo mere baŋ omego a pappere." 
Numbers27:11 Ka ce omin pappere daŋ mom, obino miyo lobo moro baŋ wattere aceggi meicel me doggolagi, en bino tero lobo-nono bedo mege. Man bino bedo icwil kede cik baŋ jo Icrael kite ame Rwot rik ociko kede Muca.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Rwot okobo baŋ Yocwa ni, “Wot malo i wi kidi man me Abarim, me iwot inen lobo ame amio baŋ jo Icrael." 
Numbers27:13 Ka doŋ ityeko neno, yin daŋ doŋ ibino to, ite wot nywako kabedo i kwarini kite ame ominni Aron rik daŋ owoto kede," 
Numbers27:14 pien opyem keda yin daŋ rik mom iwinyo koppa i tim me Jin i kare ame lwak rik mom inyutta i nyimgi i dog pii ni anacil.” (Man en pii me Meriba me Kadec ame rik tye i tim me Jin.) 
Numbers27:15 Muca te kobbi Rwot ni," 
Numbers27:16 “Myero Obaŋa ame loo tipo a jo luŋ oket dano moro me loyo lwak," 
Numbers27:17 ame bino terogi i lweny dok daŋ bino dwoggogi paco, me wek lwak a Rwot kur bed calo romi ame akwatgi mom.”" 
Numbers27:18 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Kwany Yocwa wot a Nuni, ame en dano ame tye kede Cuny Obaŋa, me iket ciŋi i kome." 
Numbers27:19 Mie ecuŋ i nyim Eleajar alamdog, i nyim lwak luŋ, eka ite miye ticcere i nyimgi." 
Numbers27:20 Ibino daŋ miye twerri mogo, me wek lwak luŋ me Icrael bed i winy baŋe." 
Numbers27:21 En bino cuŋ i nyim Eleajar alamdog te penyo pire i nyim Rwot gin ame Urim oŋolo; jo bino wot oko kun olubo gin gin a en ociko, dok daŋ jo bino dwogo kun olubo gin a en ociko, en karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ, lwak luŋ me Icrael.”" 
Numbers27:22 Muca daŋ te tiyo kite ame Rwot ociko. En otero Yocwa, te miye cuŋ i nyim Eleajar alamdog, i nyim lwak luŋ," 
Numbers27:23 eka te ke to ciŋe i kome, te miye ticcere kite ame Rwot okobo kede baŋ Muca." 
Numbers28:1 Rwotokobo baŋ Mucani," 
Numbers28:2 “Cik jo Icrael kun ikobbigi ni, Myero ikella wunu motta i kare ame aciko i kome, ame en cam ame owaŋo awaŋa kede mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny." 
Numbers28:3 Dok daŋ kobbigi ni, Gin ame ibino wunu waŋo i mac me mot baŋ Rwot ene: nyogi romi aryo me mwaka acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi, en ame ibino miyo wunu me mot owaŋo awaŋa kede mac nino ducu." 
Numbers28:4 Nyok romo acel ibino miyo wunu odiko, eka acel ite miyo wunu otyeno." 
Numbers28:5 Ibino miyo daŋ moko kwon apwottere karacel kede romo-nono; moko kwonnono myero bed ame romo gwata acel ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame oodo aoda cupa aryo kede nucu, obed mot me moko kwon." 
Numbers28:6 Man en mot awaŋa me nino ducu ame rik ociko pire i wi kidi me Cinai, me bed gin a ŋwece kur, me mot awaŋa i mac baŋ Rwot;" 
Numbers28:7 karacel kede mot amata a romo cupa aryo kede nucu pi nyok romo acel acel; ibino onyo mot amata me vino akeccere i kabedo acil baŋ Rwot. 
Numbers28:8 Nyok romo ocele ibino miyo otyeno, kun imio kite ame imio kede mot moko kwon me odiko karacel kede mot amata; ibino miyo acalo mot ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot." 
Numbers28:9 “I ceŋ cabit obino miyo nyogi romi aryo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi, kede moko kwon apwottere ame romo gwata aryo, ame orubo kede moo jeituni, mot me moko kwon karacel kede mot amata mere." 
Numbers28:10 Man en mot awaŋa me ceŋ cabit acel acel, medo i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu karacel kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers28:11 “Iyi acakki dwewu, ibino miyo wunu mot awaŋa baŋ Rwot ibino miyo wunu itino twoni aryo, nyok romo acel kede itino nyogi romi abiro ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi;" 
Numbers28:12 karacel kede moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata adek pi mot me moko kwon pi twon acel acel; moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata aryo pi mot moko kwon pi nyok romo acel acel; 
Numbers28:13 kede dok moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata acel pi mot me moko kwon pi atin nyok romo acel acel; bino bedo mot awaŋa a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny, mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Numbers28:14 Mot amata ame ociko bino bedo vino ame romo cupa abic pi twon, cupa adek pi nyok romo, kede cupa aryo kede nucu pi atin romo. Man en mot awaŋa pi dwe acel acel, naka tyeko dwete luŋ ame tye i mwaka." 
Numbers28:15 Ibino daŋ miyo nyok dyel acel me mot me bal baŋ Rwot; ibino miyo mannono karacel kede mot awaŋa me nino ducu kede mot amata mere.” 
Numbers28:16 I dwe me agege, i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen, mano en Kato a Rwot." 
Numbers28:17 I nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me acellono, en nino a Rwot, me ceuban me Ogati a Tobi Mom iye, ibino camo wunu ogati a tobi mom iye pi nino abiro." 
Numbers28:18 I nino me agege mere, myero ibed wunu kede cokere acil; mom ibino wunu tiyo ticcoro ame tek." 
Numbers28:19 Ento myero iyal wunu Obaŋa i mot ame owaŋo i mac, mot ame owaŋo baŋ Rwot; ibino miyo wunu itino twoni aryo, nyok romo acel, kede itino nyogi romi abiro ame mwaka me ditogi romo acel acel; myero inen wunu ni roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers28:20 Mot yalo Obaŋa me moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni, ame tye pirgi ene: myero mi gwata adek pi twon acel acel gwata aryo pi nyok romo;" 
Numbers28:21 dok daŋ mi gwata acel pi atin romo acel acel. 
Numbers28:22 Ibino daŋ miyo wunu nyok dyel acel me mot me bal, me kwanyo bal i komwu." 
Numbers28:23 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot awaŋa me odiko, ame obedo mot awaŋa me nino ducu." 
Numbers28:24 Ibino miyo wunu cam ame owaŋo i mac kittono pi nino abiro, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot; ibino miyo wunu karacel i mot awaŋa me nino ducu kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers28:25 I nino me abiro mere, myero ibed wunu kede cokere acil; kur iti wunu iye ticcoro atek." 
Numbers28:26 I nino me miyo camwu me wi mwaka ogeo cek, ame ikelo wunu iye motwu baŋ Rwot, mot me moko kwon kal anyen, iyi ecubanwu me cabit abiro, ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil; kur iti wunu iye ticcoro atek," 
Numbers28:27 ento myero imi wunu mot awaŋa, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot. Ibino miyo wunu itino twoni aryo, nyok romo acel kede itino nyogi romi abiro ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel," 
Numbers28:28 karacel kede moko kwon apwottere, ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata adek pi twon acel acel, gwata aryo pi nyok romo," 
Numbers28:29 kede gwata acel pi atin nyok romo acel acel; 
Numbers28:30 Okaracel kede nyok dyel acel me mot me bal, me tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i komwu," 
Numbers28:31 Ibino miyogi wunu karacel i mot amata ame ociko, kun imedo wunu i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu kede mot me moko kwoŋŋere. Myero inen wunu ni roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:1 I dwe me kany wie aryo, nino dwe acel, ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil; mom ibino tiyo wunu ticcoro atek. Ibino miyo wunu apel kok i nino-nono," 
Numbers29:2 dok daŋ ibino miyo wunu mot owaŋo awaŋa, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot. Ibino miyo wunu atin twon acel kede nyok romo acel kede itino nyogi romi abiro ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi;" 
Numbers29:3 kun imio karacel kede moko kwon a pwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata adek pi twon, gwata aryo pi nyok romo," 
Numbers29:4 kede gwata acel pi atin nyok romo acel acel," 
Numbers29:5 karacel kede nyok dyel acel me mot me bal, me tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i komwu." 
Numbers29:6 Ibino miyo wunu kun imedo wunu i kom mot ame owaŋo awaŋa me por a dwe kede mot me moko kwon ame ociko, kede mot awaŋa me nino ducu, karacel kede mot amata ame ociko kun ilubo wunu cikgi, obed gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny, mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot." 
Numbers29:7 “I dwe me abiro, nino dwe tomon, ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil; ibino bedo wunu kede kumo kun cunywu cwer; mom ibino tiyo wunu ticcoro iye;" 
Numbers29:8 ento ibino miyo wunu mot awaŋa baŋ Rwot, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny. Ibino miyo wunu twon acel, nyok romo acel, itino nyogi romi abiro ame mwaka me ditogi romo acel acel; myero inen wunu ni roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:9 Ibino miyogi wunu karacel kede moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata adek pi twon, gwata aryo pi nyok romo," 
Numbers29:10 kede gwata acel pi atin nyok romo acel acel 
Numbers29:11 karacel kede nyok dyel acel me mot me bal, ame omedo i kom mot me kwanyo bal kede mot moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:12 “I nino dwe apar wie abic, me dwe me abiro, ibino wunu bedo kede cokere acil; kur iti wunu iye ticcoro atek. Ibino wunu kwero ecuban a Rwot pi nino abiro," 
Numbers29:13 dok daŋ ibino miyo wunu mot yalo Obaŋa ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot. Ibino miyo wunu itino twoni apar wie adek, nyogi romi aryo, itino nyogi romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:14 Ibino miyo wunu karacel i moko kwon apwottere ame orubo kede moo jeituni ame romo gwata adek pi twon acel acel, gwata aryo pi nyok romo acel acel," 
Numbers29:15 kede gwata acel pi atin nyok romo acel acel. 
Numbers29:16 Ibino miyo daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal, ame omedo i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:17 “I nino me aryo mere obino miyo itino twoni apar wie aryo, nyogi romi aryo, itino nyogi romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogo oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi," 
Numbers29:18 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot moko kwon, kede mot amata pi twoni, pi nyogi romi, kede pi itino nyogi romi, kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede." 
Numbers29:19 Ibino miyo daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal ame omedo i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amata mere ame ociko." 
Numbers29:20 “I nino me adekkere obino miyo itino twoni apar wie acel, nyogi romi aryo, kede itino nyogi romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:21 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amata pi twoni, pi nyogi romi kede pi itino nyogi romi, kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede." 
Numbers29:22 Ibino miyo daŋ nyok dyel acel me bal ame omio karacel kede mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot me moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:23 “I nino me aŋwennere obino miyo itino twoni tomon, nyogi romi aryo kede itino nyogi romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:24 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amata pi twoni, pi nyogi romi kede pi itino nyogi romi, kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede," 
Numbers29:25 Ibino miyo daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal ame omedo i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:26 “I nino me kannyere, obino miyo itino twoni aboŋwen, nyogi romi aryo kede itino nyogi romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:27 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amata pi twoni, pi nyogi romi kede pi itino nyogi romi, kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede." 
Numbers29:28 Ibino miyo wunu daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal ame omio karacel kede mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:29 “I nino me kanyape mere obino miyo twoni kany wie adek nyogi romi aryo, kede itino nyogi romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi."
