Numbers29:30 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot me moko kwon, kede mot amata pi twoni, pi nyogi rommi kede pi itino nyogi romi, kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede." 
Numbers29:31 Ibino miyo wun daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal ame omio karacel kede mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:32 “I nino me kany wie aryo obino miyo itino twoni abiro, nyogi romi aryo, kede itino romi apar wie aŋwen ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:33 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot moko kwon, kede mot amata pi twoni, pi nyogi romi kede pi itino nyogi romi kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede." 
Numbers29:34 Ibino miyo wunu daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal ame omedo i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:35 “I nino me kany wie adek mere ibino bedo wunu kede cokere acil; kur iti wunu iye ticcoro atek. 
Numbers29:36 Ento myero imi wunu iye mot yalo Obaŋa ame owaŋo i mac, gin a ŋwece kur a yomoro cuny Rwot. Ibino miyo wunu twon acel, nyok romo acel kede itino romi abiro ame mwaka me ditogi oromo acel acel, ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Numbers29:37 Ibino miyo wunu karacel kede mot me moko kwon kede mot amata pi twon, pi nyok romo kede pi itino nyogi romi acel acel kun lubo welgi kede kite a cik tye kede." 
Numbers29:38 Ibino miyo wunu daŋ nyok dyel acel me mot me bal, ame omedo i kom mot awaŋa me nino ducu, kede mot me moko kwon kede mot amata ame ociko." 
Numbers29:39 “Ibino miyo wunu mot magi baŋ Rwot i kare me ecubanwu ame ociko, kun imedo wunu iye motwu me cobo kwoŋ, kede motwu ocele luŋ me ber a yic, motwu me awaŋa, kede motwu me me moko kwon, kede dok motwu me amata kede motwu me kweyo cuny.”" 
Numbers29:40 Muca te titti lwak jo Icrael ginnoro luŋ, kite a rik Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Numbers30:1 Muca okobo baŋ otel a loo itekere a jo Icrael ni, “Gin ame Rwot ociko ene:" 
Numbers30:2 Ka ce lo moro okwoŋo baŋ Rwot onyo okwoŋo kwoŋŋoro ame mio cikere twee oko, en mom bino turo gin ame ekwoŋonono; myero en cob luŋ kun lubo kop ame oya i doge." 
Numbers30:3 Onyo ka dannoro okwoŋo baŋ Rwot, ame mio cikere twee oko, kun nwoŋo en pwod tye i ot a pappere, i kare mere me nyako," 
Numbers30:4 eka pappere te winyo pi kwoŋŋere-nono kede pi cikere ame en otweye kede, eka mom gire te kobbe ginnoro; kwoŋŋere luŋ bino moko kite ame en okwoŋo kede dok cikere ame twee bino daŋ bedo kite ame en ociko." 
Numbers30:5 Ento ka pappere okobe ni mom emoko kwoŋŋere-nono i nino ame en owinyo iye, kwoŋŋere-nono mom bino moko, gin a en ociko ame twee daŋ mom bino moko; Rwot daŋ bino weke, pien pappere mom oye." 
Numbers30:6 Dok ka nyannoro onyomere oko kun kwoŋŋere pwod tye i kome onyo okobo kopporo a mom koŋ otamo tere i kom gin ame en otweye kede kene," 
Numbers30:7 eka cware te winyo, mom te kobo iye ginnoro i nino ame cwinyo iye-nono; kwoŋŋere-nono bino moko kite ame en okwoŋo kede." 
Numbers30:8 Aco ka cware okobo kopporo ame nyuto ni en mom emoko ame en owinyo iye pire, cware bino miyo kwoŋŋere-nono mom moko i kome, kede kop ame onwoŋo en okwoŋo aboŋo tamo tere, ame otweye kede kene. Rwot daŋ bino weke." 
Numbers30:9 Ento ka dako moro a cware oto, onyo dako ame cware oryemo oko okwoŋo, ginnoro luŋ ame en otweye kede kene bino moko i kome atwal." 
Numbers30:10 Ka ce en okwoŋo kun pwod tye i ot a cware onyo okwoŋo kwoŋŋoro ame mio cikere twee," 
Numbers30:11 ka cware owinyo mom te kobbe ginnoro iye, kun daŋ mom okwero, kwoŋŋere-nono bino moko i kome kite ame en okwoŋo kede, dok cikere luŋ ame en otweye kede kene bino moko kite ame en ociko." 
Numbers30:12 Aco ka cware okwero oko i nino ame en owinyo iye pire, kopporo luŋ ame onwoŋo odonnyo i doge ame mako kwoŋ onyo gin ame en ociko, mom bino moko i kome, pien cware nwoŋo ogeŋo oko; Rwot daŋ bino weke." 
Numbers30:13 Kit kwoŋŋoro luŋ ame en okwoŋo kede kite cikkoro luŋ ame en otweye kede kene, cware twero moko, dok daŋ cware twero kwero." 
Numbers30:14 Ento ka cware mom okobo kopporo iye, kun obedo liŋ aliŋa cakere i nino-nono, en doŋ moko kwoŋ a dako mere luŋ ame nwoŋo tye i kome, pien mom okobo kopporo iye i nino ame owinyo iye pire." 
Numbers30:15 Aco ka cware okwero oko kun kare ame en owinyo koppere iye doŋ okato oko, bal a dako mere bino dok i wie.”" 
Numbers30:16 Magi en icwil ame Rwot ociko kede Muca ame mako ico kede dako mere, papa a nyako kede nyare i kare ame en pwod tidi, ame nwoŋo pwod tye i ot a pappere." 
Numbers31:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers31:2 “Cul kwor ajo Icrael i komjo Midian; eka ite doŋ to, wot nywako kabedo i kwarini.”" 
Numbers31:3 Muca te kobbi lwak ni, “Mi wunu jo me mony ame tye akinawu rukere i jami lwenygi, me gin wot lweny i kom jo Midian, me cul kwor a Rwot i kom jo Midian." 
Numbers31:4 Cwal wunu jo tutumia acel acel i kom atekere acel acel me Icrael, me gin wot i lweny.”" 
Numbers31:5 Mannono omio i kom lwak tutumia i tutumia me Icrael, oya iye jo tutumia apar wie aryo ame orukere i jami lweny, kun iyi atekere acel acel ya iye tutumia acel acel." 
Numbers31:6 Muca rik te cwayogi i lweny, jo tutumia acel acel ame oya i atekere acel acel, kun owoto karacel kede Finekaci wot Eleajar alamdog, ame otero jami me kabedo acil, kun daŋ omako apel me kwenyoro jo i ciŋe." 
Numbers31:7 Gin rik te lweny i kom jo Midian kite ame Rwot ociko kede Muca, ote neko co luŋ iye." 
Numbers31:8 Oneko obakki me Midian karacel kede jo ocele; obakki abic me Midian ame onekogi, gin ene: Evi, Rekem, Jur, Kur kede Rebe, Oneko daŋ Balaam wot a Boer oko i pala lweny," 
Numbers31:9 Jo Icrael te yako mon a jo Midian karacel kede itinogi, ote daŋ mayo limgi akwo luŋ, karacel kede jamigi luŋ." 
Numbers31:10 Gin te waŋo daŋ bomagi luŋ i kan a gin bedo iye, karacel kede gonyegi." 
Numbers31:11 Gin te tero ginnoro luŋ ame gin oyako karacel kede en ame gin omao, dano karacel kede leyi." 
Numbers31:12 Gin rik te tero jo ame gin oyako kede jami ame gin omao, kede ame gin oyako, ote kelo baŋ Muca kede Eleajar alamdog, kede baŋ lwak jo Icrael, i gonygi ame onwoŋo tye i bar me Moab i Jeriko i ŋet Jordan." 
Numbers31:13 Muca kede Eleajar alamdog, karacel kede otel a lwak luŋ, te wot me wot rwatte kedgi i ŋe gony." 
Numbers31:14 Akemo rik te mako Muca i kom otel wi mony, ame loo jo tutumia kede ame loo jo mia, ame onwoŋo odwogo i mony." 
Numbers31:15 Muca okobbigi ni, “Iweko wunu mon luŋ akwo?" 
Numbers31:16 Nen ba, mon magi en ame olubo tam a Balaam, ame te miyo jo Icrael oturo cik a Rwot i kop i kom Peor, ame te miyo too edeke poto i kom lwak a Rwot." 
Numbers31:17 Aco doŋ nek wunu itino aco luŋ ame tye i akina itinogi, nek wunu daŋ mon luŋ ame oŋeye ico, ame obuto kedgi." 
Numbers31:18 Ento anyira luŋ ame mom ru oŋeye kede co, a mom ru obuto kedgi, wek wunu bed kwo me gin bed megwu." 
Numbers31:19 Koŋ ibut wunu oko i ŋe gony pi nino abiro; jo luŋ i akinawu ame oneko dano kede jo luŋ ame ogudo kom jo oto, myero lonnyere kengi kengi i nino me adekkere kede i nino me kany wie aryo mere, karacel kede jo luŋ ame iyako wunu." 
Numbers31:20 Lony wunu ruk luŋ, ginnoro luŋ ame otio i lao, ginnoro luŋ ame otio i yer dyegi karacel kede ginnoro luŋ ame otio i yat.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleajar alamdog, rik te kobo baŋ lwak a rik onwoŋol owoto i mony ni, “Man en cik ame oketo, ame yam Rwot ociko kede Muca:" 
Numbers31:22 jami ame obedo jabu, onyo ryal, onyo mola, onyo nyonyo, kede kit nyonyo ocele acalo abati kede ricac keken," 
Numbers31:23 ginnoro luŋ ame mac mom obalo, ibino cwayo wunu beo i mac, eka te lony oko. Cite kadi bed amannono, pwod dok ibino medo lonyo wunu i pii me lwoko kwer; doŋ ginnoro luŋ ame mac twero balo oko, ibino cwayo wunu beo i pii." 
Numbers31:24 Myero ilwok wunu boŋŋiwu i nino me kany wie aryo mere, ite doŋ doko wunu jo olony; i ŋe ennono doŋ itwero dok wunu i gony.”" 
Numbers31:25 Rwot okobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers31:26 “Kwan doŋ wel jami ame oyako i mony, dano karacel kede leyi, yin karacel kede Eleajar alamdog kede odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarigi ame tye i akina lwak;" 
Numbers31:27 eka ite poko gin oyako i mony i dul aryo, acel bed me a jo ame owoto i mony, eka tuŋ ocele te bedo me a lwak luŋ," 
Numbers31:28 Eka ite miyo jo olwenyo kwanyo ocoro a Rwot i kom megi kun okwanyo acel me mia abic i kom dano, twoni, kana, kede romi onyo dyegi;" 
Numbers31:29 kwany i kom nucugi imi baŋ Eleajar alamdog acalo mot ame omio baŋ Rwot: 
Numbers31:30 Eka ite daŋ miyo jo Icrael kwanyo ocoro a Rwot i kom megi kun okwanyo acel me pyerabic i kom dano, twoni, kana, kede romi onyo dyegi, kede kit lim akwo ocele luŋ; magi-nono mi baŋ jo Levi ame gwoko kane a Rwot.”" 
Numbers31:31 Eka Muca kede Eleajar te daŋ timo kite ame Rwot ociko kede Muca. 
Numbers31:32 Jami ame jo olwenyo oyako, ame odoŋŋere obedo romi tutumia mia abicel kede pyerabiro wie abic," 
Numbers31:33 kede dok tutumia pyerabiro wie aryo," 
Numbers31:34 kede kane tutumia pyerabicel wie acel," 
Numbers31:35 kede jo tutumia pyeradek wie aryo, ame gin mon ame mom ru oŋeye kede co." 
Numbers31:36 Nucu mere ame opoko baŋ jo ame rik owoto i mony obedo romi tutumia mia kede pyeradek wie abiro, kede mia abic nono;" 
Numbers31:37 eka romi ame omio me ocoro a Rwot te romo tutumia abicel kede pyerabiro wie abic. 
Numbers31:38 Aco dok te romo tutumia pyeradek wie abicel; en ame omio me ocoro a Rwot te romo pyerabiro wie aryo. 
Numbers31:39 Kane te romo tutumia pyeradek kede mia abic nono, en ame omio me ocoro a Rwot te romo pyerabicel wie acel." 
Numbers31:40 Jo te romo tutumia apar wie abicel; jo ame omio me ocoro a Rwot te romo pyeradek wie aryo. 
Numbers31:41 Muca te miyo gin ame omio me ocoro a Rwot baŋ Eleajar alamdog, kite a Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Numbers31:42 Nucu mere ame omio jo Icrael, ame Muca opoko i kom nucu ame jo owoto i mony otero;" 
Numbers31:43 nucu a lwak kono rik te bedo daŋ romi tutumia mia adek kede pyeradek wie abiro kede mia abic nono; 
Numbers31:44 eka dok te bedo daŋ tutumia pyeradek wie abicel," 
Numbers31:45 kede kana tutumia pyeradek kede mia abic nono," 
Numbers31:46 kede jo daŋ tutumia apar wie abicel. 
Numbers31:47 Muca rik te miyo jo Icrael kwanyo acel me pyerabic i kom nucu ame opokkigi, i kom dano, kede i kom leyi, te miyogi baŋ jo Levi ame gin onwoŋo gwoko kema a Rwot, kite ame Rwot rik ociko kede Muca." 
Numbers31:48 Eka otel wi mony ame loo jo me lweny tutumia i tutumia, jo ame loo jo tutumia kede jo ame loo jo mia te bino ceggi baŋ Muca." 
Numbers31:49 Ote kobbi Muca ni, “Wan omironi otyeko kwano wel olweny ame tye i te locwa oko, onwoŋo ni mom gire tye ŋattoro i akinawa ame orwenyo." 
Numbers31:50 Wan doŋ okelo mot a Rwot, gin ame dano acel acel onwoŋo, okelo jabu, mola bat, mola ŋut ciŋ, atem, atem me yit, tigo ŋut, me kwanyo bal i komwa i nyim Rwot.”" 
Numbers31:51 Muca kede Eleajar alamdog te gamo jabu-nono i baŋgi; gin luŋ onwoŋo obedo jami ame otio atia. 
Numbers31:52 Jabu luŋ ame omio me mot baŋ Rwot ame oya i baŋ otel ame loo jo tutumia kede ame loo jo mia, gin luŋ pekgi oromo cekel tutumia apar wie abicel kede mia abiro i pyerabic nono." 
Numbers31:53 (Jo olwenyo onwoŋo oyako jami kun ŋat acel acel yako mere kene.) 
Numbers31:54 Muca kede Eleajar alamdog te gamo jabu i baŋ odoŋe ame loo jo tutumia kede i baŋ odoŋe ame loo jo mia, gin te tero i kema me rwatte, me wek bed gin me po i kom jo Icrael i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers32:1 I Jo Reuben kede jo Gad rik onwoŋo tye i lwak lim akwo apipim. Gin rik te neno lobo me Jajer kede lobo me Gilead, lobo mere onwoŋo ber me kwat," 
Numbers32:2 Omio jo Reuben kede jo Gad te wot baŋ Muca kede baŋ Eleajar alamdog, kede baŋ otel a lwak, eka gin te kobbigi ni," 
Numbers32:3 “Atarot, Dibon, Jajer Nimra, Kecibon, Eleale, Cebam, Nebo kede Beon," 
Numbers32:4 ame gin lobo ame rik Rwot en omao i nyim lwak jo Icrael, lobe-nono obedo lobo aber me gwoko lim akwo; wan omironi daŋ otye kede lim akwo.”" 
Numbers32:5 Gin te dok medde i kopgi ni, “Ka ce berwa onen i nyimi, wek omironi ter lobo man bed megi, kur dok iterwa imiwa oŋol Jordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 Ento Muca te kobbi jo Gad kede jo Reuben ni, “Omegowu bino wot lweny kun wun ibedo wunu kan?" 
Numbers32:7 Piŋo kara imito wunu balo cuny jo Icrael me wot loka i loba ame rik Rwot omiogi? 
Numbers32:8 Kwarowu rik daŋ koŋ otimo kittono, i kare ame rik ocwaogi i Kadec-barnea me neno lobo." 
Numbers32:9 Pien i kare ame gin owoto naka i luŋ me Ecikol, ote neno lobo, gin obalo cuny jo Icrael me wot i lobo ame Rwot omio baŋgi." 
Numbers32:10 I nino-naca akemo te mako Rwot meicel i komgi, te kwoŋ kun kobo ni," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Ateteni, mom tye ŋattoro i akina jo-ni ame yam oya i lobo Miciri, cakere i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo pyeraryo dok kede malo, ame bino neno lobo ame rik akwoŋo pire ni abino miyo baŋ Iburaim, kede Icaka kede Yakobo, pien gin mom obedo luba i yore ducu." 
Numbers32:12 Ŋattoro i akinagi mom bino neno, kono ka Kaleb wot a Jepune ame obedo jo Keniji kede Yocwa wot a Nuni, pien gin en obedo lubo Rwot i yore ducu.’" 
Numbers32:13 Akemo rik te mako Rwot i kom Icrael, eka te miyogi bedo wiwira i tim pi mwakki pyeraŋwen twal, naka waŋ ame lwagi jo luŋ a nwaŋ otimo bal i nyim Rwot otum oko luŋ." 
Numbers32:14 Koŋ dok inen wunu ba, wun daŋ dok icako timere wunu bala kwariwu, wun itino obalo, imito wunu medo akemo a Rwot me bed agwa i kom jo Icrael!" 
Numbers32:15 Pien ka ce iweko wunu lube oko, en dok bino lwak ata i tim kan; mano dok bino miyo imio wunu jo man to tum oko.”" 
Numbers32:16 Gin dok ote noke aceggi ote kobbe ni, “Wan obino celo ka-gwoko limwa kede boma me bedo itinowa," 
Numbers32:17 cite wan obino ruko jami lwenywa kun oyikere pi telo wi jo Icrael anyim, tuno ka doŋ oterogi i kabedogi, kun itinowa bedo i boma ame ocecelo atek pi okwor ame bedo i lobo-nono." 
Numbers32:18 Wan mom obino dwogo ceŋ i pacowa tuno ka doŋ jo Icrael onwoŋo lobogi me bedo megi, kun ŋat acel acel nwoŋo mege." 
Numbers32:19 Pien wan giwa mom obino nwoŋo lobo karacel kedgi i loka Jordan kuno, pien wan doŋ otyeko nwoŋo lobowa i ŋe Jordan kan, tuŋ kide.”" 
Numbers32:20 Mannono te miyo Muca kobbigi ni, “Ka ce ibino timo wunu man, ka ce ibino ruko wunu jami lwenywu ite telo wunu nyim Rwot pi lweny," 
Numbers32:21 kun ŋat acel acel i akinawu ame orukere i jami lweny bino kato i ŋe Jordan tuŋ ca, i nyim Rwot, tuno waŋ ame en oryemo okworrere oko i nyime," 
Numbers32:22 kun Rwot doŋ oloo lobo-nono oko; i ŋe mannono, wun giwu doŋ ite dwogo wunu bedo, kun mom doŋ itye wunu kede banya moro baŋ Rwot onyo baŋ jo Icrael, lobo man doŋ bino bedo megwu i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers32:23 Cite ka mom itimo wunu kittono, nen ba, nwoŋo itimo wunu bal i nyim Rwot; myero iŋe wunu ni balwu bino miyo itiŋo wunu megwu oromowu oko." 
Numbers32:24 Ger wunu boma itino kede ka-gwoko limwu akwo, ite timo wunu doŋ kite ame ikobo wunu-nono.”" 
Numbers32:25 Jo Gad kede jo Reuben te doŋ ye baŋ Muca ni, “Wan omironi obino timo kite ame yin adwoŋwa iciko," 
Numbers32:26 Itinowa kede monwa kede romiwa kede limwa akwo luŋ bino doŋ i boma ame tye i Gilead. 
Numbers32:27 Cite omironi bino kato loka ca, jo luŋ ame orukere me lweny, kun owoto i mony i nyim Rwot, kite ame adwoŋwa ociko kede.”" 
Numbers32:28 Mannono omio Muca omio cik ame makogi baŋ Eleajar alamdog kede baŋ Yocwa wot a Nuni, kede baŋ odoŋe a loo doggola a kwarigi ame tye iyi atekere luŋ me a jo Icrael." 
Numbers32:29 Muca okobo baŋgi ni, “Ka jo Gad kede jo Reuben, jogi luŋ ame orukere me lweny i nyim Rwot, bino kato kedwu loka Jordan, eka Rwot te miyowu loyo lobo-nono, ibino miyo wunu lobo me Gilead bedo megi." 
Numbers32:30 Cite ka gin mom bino ruko jami lweny te kato karacel, gin bino nwoŋo lobo megi karacel kedwu i lobo me Kanaan.”" 
Numbers32:31 Jo Gad kede jo Reuben te dok iye ni, “Wan obino timo kite ame Rwot okobo baŋ omiro mere-nono." 
Numbers32:32 Wan obino kato loka ca, naka i lobo Kanaan, i nyim Rwot kun oruko jami lweny, kun lobo ame wan onwoŋo me bedo megwa doŋ i ciŋwa i ŋe Jordan kan.”" 
Numbers32:33 Muca te miyo baŋ jo Gad kede baŋ jo Reuben kede baŋ nucu a jo Manace wot a Yucepu, lobo ame Cikon abaka a jo Amor yam loo, kede lobo ame Og, abaka me Bacan yam loo, omiogi lobo-nono luŋ kede boma luŋ ame tye i lobo-nono." 
Numbers32:34 Jo a Gad te gero Dibon, Atarot, Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-Copan, Jajer, Jogbeka," 
Numbers32:36 Bet-nimara kede Bet-karan, ame gin boma ame ocecelo atek kede anok me gwoko romi." 
Numbers32:37 Jo a Reuben ogero Kecbon Eleala, Kiriataim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo kede Baalmeon (nyiŋgi obino loko oko), kede Cibima; gin te cako nyiŋ boma ame ogero-nono apat." 
Numbers32:39 Jo a Makir wot a Manace te wot i lobo Gilead, ote mayo oko, ote ryemo jo Amor ame onwoŋo bedo iye oko," 
Numbers32:40 Muca te miyo Gilead baŋ Makir wot a Manace, en te cako bedo iye." 
Numbers32:41 Jair te wot mayo boma atitino luŋ, te cako nyiŋgi ni, Kavotjair." 
Numbers32:42 Noba te wot mayo Kenat kede paco atino luŋ a tye i ŋete, te cako nyiŋgi ni Noba, bala nyiŋe en ikome." 
Numbers33:1 Man en kite ame jo Icrael rik obedo kokoba kede wotgi i kare ame gin oya i lobo me Miciri, owoto atekere atekere, kun Muca kede Aron telo wigi," 
Numbers33:2 Muca rik obedo coyo nyiŋ kan ame gin ya iye kun omedde i wotgi, kite ame Rwot ocikogi kede. Man en kite ame gin obedo medde kede i wotgi, kun lubere i kabedo luŋ ame gin obedo ya iye." 
Numbers33:3 Gin oya i Ramecec i nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me agegi i kom nino ame lubo nino me Kato, en ame jo Icrael ocako wotgi iye kun owoto wot me loc, i nyim jo Miciri luŋ." 
Numbers33:4 Jo Miciri onwoŋo tye ayiko itino kaogi, ame Rwot obedo neneko ikinagi: Rwot daŋ oŋolo kop i kom obaŋegi luŋ." 
Numbers33:5 Jo Icrael rik te ya i Ramecec kittono, ote guro kemagi i Cukot." 
Numbers33:6 Gin oya i Cukot, ote wot guro kemagi i Etam, ame tye i pet tim." 
Numbers33:7 Gin oya i Etam, ote dok wirre dok cen i Pi-kakirot ame tye i tuŋ to me Baal-jepon; ote wot guro kemagi i nyim Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Gin te ya oko i nyim Kakirot ote beo i dye nam, ote tuno i tim. Gin owoto wot me nino adek i dye tim me Etam, ote wot guro kemagi i Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Gin oya i Mara, ote bino i Elim. Iyi Elim rik ote nwoŋo iye waŋ akoŋ apar wie aryo, kede otit pyerabiro, gin te guro kemagi kuno," 
Numbers33:10 Gin oya i Elim ote wot guro kemagi i Nam Arema. 
Numbers33:11 Gin oya i ŋet nam Arema, ote wot guro kemagi i ŋet tim i Cin." 
Numbers33:12 Gin oya i tim me Cin, ote wot guro kemagi i Dopika." 
Numbers33:13 Gin oya i Dopika, ote wot guro kemagi i Aluc." 
Numbers33:14 Gin oya i Aluc, ote wot guro kemagi i Repidim kan ame pii me amata a jo obedo mom iye." 
Numbers33:15 Gin oya i Ripidim, ote wot guro kemagi i tim me Cinai." 
Numbers33:16 Gin dok te ya i tim me Cinai, ote wot guro kemagi i Kibrot-atava." 
Numbers33:17 Gin oya i Kibrot-atava, ote wot guro kemagi i Kajerot." 
Numbers33:18 Gin te ya i Kajerot, ote wot guro kemagi i Ritma." 
Numbers33:19 Gin te ya i Ritma, ote wot guro kemagi i Rimmonperej." 
Numbers33:20 Gin oya i Rimmonperej, ote wot guro kemagi i Libini." 
Numbers33:21 Gin oya i Libna, ote wotguro kemagi i Ricca." 
Numbers33:22 Gin oya i Ricca, ote wot guro kemagi i Kekelata." 
Numbers33:23 Gin oya i Kekelata, ote wot guro kemagi i kidi me Ceper." 
Numbers33:24 Gin oya i kidi me Ceper ote wot guro kemagi i Karada. 
Numbers33:25 Gin oya i Karada, ote wot guro kemagi i Makelot." 
Numbers33:26 Gin oya i Makelot, ote wot guro kemagi i Takat." 
Numbers33:27 Gin oya i Takat, ote wot guro kemagi i Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Gin oya i Tera, ote wot guro kemagi i Mitka." 
Numbers33:29 Gin oya i Mitka, ote wot guro kemagi i Kacmona." 
Numbers33:30 Gin oya i Kacmona, ote wot guro kemagi i Mocerot." 
Numbers33:31 Gin oya i Mocerot, ote wot guro kemagi i Bene-jaakan." 
Numbers33:32 Gin oya i Bene-jaakan, ote wot guro kemagi i Koraggidgad." 
Numbers33:33 Gin oya i Koraggidgad, ote wot guro kemagi i Jotbata." 
Numbers33:34 Gin oya i Jotbata, ote wot guro kemagi i Abrona." 
Numbers33:35 Gin oya i Abrona, ote wot guro kemagi i Ejiongeber." 
Numbers33:36 Gin oya i Ejiongeber, ote wot guro kemagi i tim me Jin (ame en Kadec)." 
Numbers33:37 Gin oya i Kadec, ote wot guro kemagi i ŋet waŋ lobo me Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Aron alamdog te yitto malo i wi kidi me Kor kite ame Rwot onwoŋo ociko, te wot to oko kuno, i mwaka me pyeraŋwennere ame jo Icrael oya kede i Miciri, i nino dwe acel, me dwe me abic," 
Numbers33:39 Mwaka me dit Aron onwoŋo doŋ oromo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie adek i kare ame en to i wi kidi. 
Numbers33:40 Abaka Arad, ame en dano me Kanaan ame onwoŋo bedo i Negeb i lobo me Kanaan, te winyo pi bino a jo Icrael." 
Numbers33:41 Gin dok te ya ite kidi me Kor, ote wot guro kemagi Jalmona." 
Numbers33:42 Gin oya i Jalmona, ote wot guro kemagi i Punon." 
Numbers33:43 Gin oya i Punon, ote wot guro kemagi i Obot." 
Numbers33:44 Gin oya i Obot, ote wot guro kemagi Iyeabarim i lobo me Moab." 
Numbers33:45 Gin oya iyim, ote wot guro kemagi i Dibon-gad." 
Numbers33:46 Gin oya i Dibon-gad, ote wot guro kemagi i Almon-diblataim." 
Numbers33:47 Gin oya i Almondiblataim, ote wot guro kemagi i kidi me Abarim, ame tye i nyim Nebo," 
Numbers33:48 Gin te ya i lobo obedo kidikidi me Abarim, ote wot guro kemagi i bar me Moab i ŋet Jordan i Jeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Gin oguro kemagi i ŋet Jordan cakere i Bet-jecimot tuno naka i Abel-citim ame tye i bar me Moab. 
Numbers33:50 Rwot te kobbi Muca i bar me Moab i ŋet Jordan ame otikere Jeriko ni," 
Numbers33:51 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, ‘Ka idokoro wunu Jordan, ikato wunu i lobo me Kanaan," 
Numbers33:52 ibino wunu ryemo jo ame bedo i lobo-nono oko luŋ i nyimwu; ibino babalo wunu kidigi luŋ ogogoro cal i komgi, kede jogigi luŋ ame otwako atwaka ibino wunu daŋ mumuko ka woro jogigi me awora ame tye i wi kiddi." 
Numbers33:53 Lobo-nono doŋ te bedo megwu, ibino bedo wunu iye. Atyeko doŋ miyo lobo-nono oko me bedo megwu." 
Numbers33:54 Ibino poko wunu lobo-nono i kwir kun lubo kite ame doggolawu tye kede. Atekere ame jo mere pol bino nwoŋo lobo alac me bedo megi, eka atekere ame jo mere nok, te daŋ nwoŋo lobo anok me bedo megi; kan ame kwir opoto iye i kom dano moro, mannono bino bedo mege. Ibino nwoŋo wunu lobo kun lubo doggola a kwariwu." 
Numbers33:55 Cite ka mom iryemo wunu jo ame bedo i lobo-nono oko i nyimwu, jo ame wun iweko wunu odoŋŋono bino bedo calo gin acobo waŋwu dok acalo okuto ame cobo laŋetwu, gin bino yelowu i lobo ame ibedo wunu iye." 
Numbers33:56 Gin ame onwoŋo amito timo i komgi, en ame abino timo i komwu.’ ”" 
Numbers34:1 Rwot okobbi Muca ni," 
Numbers34:2 “Cik jo Icrael kun ikobbigi ni, Ka idonyo wunu i lobo me Kanaan (man en lobo ame ibino nwoŋo wunu me bedo megwu, ame en lobo me Kanaan naka i waŋ apoki mere luŋ)," 
Numbers34:3 waŋ apoki me lobowu i tutuŋ anyarolum bino cakere i tim me Jin ame omano ŋet Edom. Wan lobowu ikokome i tutuŋ anyarolum bino ya i tuŋ agikki nam me Kado ame tye tuŋ kide; 
Numbers34:4 eka waŋ lobo te dok wirre kun dok tutuŋ anyarolum, kun wirre i tur ame woto i Akarabim, eka te dok kato i Jin, te wot gik i Kadec-barnea tutuŋ anyarolum. Dok te wot medde kede naka i Kajaradar, te kato i Ajimon." 
Numbers34:5 Waŋ lobo dok te cako wirre iyi Ajimon, wot i Kulo me Miciri; eka te wot gik i dog nam." 
Numbers34:6 “Waŋ lobo ame oya i tutuŋ kide bino bedo i Nam Adwoŋ; nammono bino bedo waŋ lobowu i tutuŋ kide. 
Numbers34:7 “Man en ame bino bedo waŋ apoki i tutuŋ anyarodi; waŋ apoki bino ya i Nam Adwoŋ, ibino yeco wunu waŋ lobo woto naka i kidi me Kor." 
Numbers34:8 Eka cakere i kidi me Kor, ibino yeco wunu waŋ lobo naka i yo ame woto i Kamat, eka waŋ lobo te gik i Jedad." 
Numbers34:9 Waŋ lobo dok bino medde anyim naka i Jiporon, te wot gik i Kajar-enan. Man en ame bino bedo waŋ lobowu i tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Numbers34:10 “Waŋ lobo i tutuŋ kide ibino yeco wunu cakere i Kajar-enan, te tuno naka i Cepam." 
Numbers34:11 Waŋ lobo te dok lunere piny kun cakere i Cepam woto naka i Ribula ame tye i ŋet Ain, i yo ame tye tutuŋ kide. I kakannono wan lobo dok te luŋere piny wot naka i kor kidi me nam me Kineret, ame tye i yo tutuŋ kide," 
Numbers34:12 Waŋ lobo te dok lunere piny naka i Jordan, te wot gik i nam me Kado. Man en ame bi no bedo lobowu, kede waŋ apoki mere luŋ ame omane.”" 
Numbers34:13 Muca te ciko jo Icrael kun kobo ni, “Man en lobo ame bino bedo megwu kun ipoko wunu kede kwir, ame rik Rwot ociko ni mi atekere aboŋwen kede nucu;" 
Numbers34:14 pien atekere a jo Reuben, kede mea jo Gad gin otyeko nwoŋo lobogi oko kun lubo doggola me ot a kwarigi karacel kede nucu me atekere a Manace." 
Numbers34:15 Atekere aryo-nono kede nucu me atekere a Manace, gin otyeko nwoŋo lobogi me bedo megi loka Jordan ame otikere i Jeriko i yo tutuŋ kide, tuŋ ame ceŋ donyo iye.”" 
Numbers34:16 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni," 
Numbers34:17 “Man en nyiŋ jo ame bino pokkiwu lobo me bedo megwu: Eleajar alamdog, kede Yocwa wot a Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Ibino kwanyo jo me konyo tic me poko lobo i atekere acel acel dano acel. 
Numbers34:19 Nyiŋ jo-nono ene: Iyi atekere a Juda, ibino kwanyo Kaleb wot a Japune." 
Numbers34:20 Iyi atekere a Cimeon, ibino kwanyo Cemuel wot Amikud." 
Numbers34:21 Iyi atekere a Benjamin, ibino kwanyo Elidad wot a Ciclon." 
Numbers34:22 Iyi atekere a Dan, ibino kwanyo Bukki wot a Jogli." 
Numbers34:23 I kom awobe a Yucepu: i kom atekere ikwae a Manace, atel bino bedo Kanniel wot Epod." 
Numbers34:24 I kom ikwae Epraim, atel bino bedo Kemuel wot a Ciptan." 
Numbers34:25 Iyi atekere ikwae Jabulon, atel bino bedo Elijapan wot a Parnac," 
Numbers34:26 Iyi atekere ikwae Icakar, atel bino bedo Paltiel wot Ajan." 
Numbers34:27 Eka iyi atekere ikwae Acer, atel bino bedo Akiud wot a Celomi." 
Numbers34:28 Iyi atekere ikwae a Naputali, atel bino bedo Pedael wot Amikud." 
Numbers34:29 Magi gin lwak jo ame Rwot ociko ni pok lobo baŋ jo Icrael i lobo Kanaan.” 
Numbers35:1 Rwot okobbi Muca i bar me Moab ame tye i ŋet Jordan ame otikere i Jeriko ni," 
Numbers35:2 “Cik jo Icrael me mi jo Levi boma mogo, i kom lobo ame gin onwoŋo me bedo megi; eka ite miyo jo Levi barroro me kwat ame tye i ŋet boma-nogo." 
Numbers35:3 Boma ame bino bedo me a jo Levi me bedo kede bar ame bino bedo me kwayo dokgi kede limgi akwo karacel kede kit leyigi ocele luŋ. 
Numbers35:4 Bar luŋ ame imio wunu jo Levi, ame tye i ŋet bomagi, cakere i kom cel me bomagi, obino poro borrere bedo yadi mia abic, mano boma luŋ." 
Numbers35:5 Eka i oko i ŋe boma, obino poro ŋete ame tye tuŋ kide bedo yadi tutumia acel, eka laŋete me tutuŋ anyarolum yadi tutumia acel, kun nwoŋo boma tye i dyere; mannono bino bedo megi me kwat, pi bomagi luŋ." 
Numbers35:6 Boma ame ibino miyo baŋ jo Levi, bino bedo boma abicel me larre a jo ame oneko nek kan ame ibino yeyi wunu jo ame oneko nek riŋo laro, i bino daŋ medo miyo wunu boma ocele pyeraŋwen wie aryo i kom magi-nono." 
Numbers35:7 Boma luŋ ame ibino miyo wunu baŋ jo Levi, bino bedo pyerŋwen wie aboro, karacel kede bar me kwatgi." 
Numbers35:8 Ibino miyo wunu bomagi kun ikwanyo wunu i kom lobo ame omio jo Icrael me bedo megi; i baŋ atekere ame jo mere pol ibino kwanyo wunu abup, eka i baŋ atekere ame jo mere nok ite kwanyo wunu daŋ anok, kun atekere acel acel mio boma mere mogo baŋ jo Levi, kun mio ame poro kite ame gin omiogi kede lobo me bedo megi.”" 
Numbers35:9 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Muca ni. 
Numbers35:10 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ iŋolo wunu Jordan i kato wunu i Kanaan," 
Numbers35:11 ibino yero wunu boma mogo me bed me larre a jo oneko nek, me wek jo ame oneko owotegi kun mom oneko me akaka, twero riŋo laro kuno." 
Numbers35:12 Boma-nogo bino bedo ka larrewu i ciŋ ocul kwor meremo, me wek ŋat ame oneko ŋattoro kur to tuno ka koŋ ocuŋ i nyim lwak pi ŋolo koppere." 
Numbers35:13 I kom boma ame ibino miyo wunuginono, abicel iye bino bedo megwu me laro jo oneko nek." 
Numbers35:14 Mi wunu bomanogo adek bed loka Jordan, eka adek te bedo i lobo me Kanaan, gin bino bedo boma me larre a jo oneko nek." 
Numbers35:15 Boma abicellono bino bedo me larre a jo Icrael kede pi arok kede wele ame bedo i akinagi, me wek dano ame oneko ŋattoro kun mom oneko me akaka, myero riŋ lar kuno." 
Numbers35:16 “Cite ka ce ogoo dano i nyonyo, oreto piny te daŋ to oko, dano-nono nwoŋo anek; anek, obino neko oko." 
Numbers35:17 Aco ka ocelo dano i kidi ame onwoŋo omako i ciŋe, kidi ame onwoŋo romo neko dano, eka te celo neko oko, dano-nono daŋ anek, anek obino neko oko." 
Numbers35:18 Onyo ka ce ogoo ŋattoro kede yat ame onwoŋo omako i ciŋe, yat ame onwoŋo romo neko dano, danonono te to oko, mannono daŋ nwoŋo anek; anek, obino neko oko." 
Numbers35:19 Dano ame culo kwor meremo ata en ikome ame bino neko ŋat oneko danonaca; ka orwatte kede myero neke oko. 
Numbers35:20 Ka ce ocobo dano moro pi adagadaga moro, onyo ocele acela, kun nwoŋo okie akia, eka dano-nono te to oko," 
Numbers35:21 onyo odoŋe adoŋa kede ciŋe pi adagadaga moro ame onwoŋo tye i akinagi, eka dano-nono te to oko, ŋat ame odoŋe-nono obino neko oko; dano-nono anek. Ŋat ame culo kwor meremo ata ikome, en ikome ame bino neke ka ce orwatte kede." 
Numbers35:22 “Ento ka ce ocobe oyotoyot kun onwoŋo amone moro gire mom, onyo ka ocele i ginnoro kun mom okie akia," 
Numbers35:23 onyo ocele i gweŋŋoro ame onwoŋo romo neko dano, kun mom oneno, eka dano nono te to oko, ka yam en mom akworrere, dok daŋ onwoŋo mom oyiko kopporo arac i kome;" 
Numbers35:24 lwak bino ŋolo kop i akina ŋat oneko nek kede acul kwor meremo kun olubo cik megi. 
Numbers35:25 Lwak bino laro ŋat oneko nek i ciŋ acul kwor meremo ato. Lwak bino dwoke i boma ame en rik onwoŋo oriŋo olaro. En bino bedo kuno atwal, tuno waŋ ame alamdog adwoŋ ame owiro kede moo oto." 
Numbers35:26 Ento ka ce i nino moro anek oya oko i boma ame onwoŋo elaro te kato wan apokki me boma-nono," 
Numbers35:27 ka ce acul kwor meremo a ŋat a rik oto oneko dano man, roccoro meremo mom bino bedo i wie." 
Numbers35:28 Pien dano-nono myero bed i boma me larre tuno waŋ ame alamdog adwoŋ oto; i ŋe to alamdog adwoŋ, anek doŋ twero dok ceŋ i lobo ame rik onwoŋo obedo lobo mere me anywalli." 
Numbers35:29 “Magi luŋ doŋ bino bedo cik baŋwu kede kop ame doŋ otyeko ŋolo naka i kare ikwaewu luŋ i kabedo ame ibino bedo wunu iye luŋ. 
Numbers35:30 Ka ce ŋattoro oneko dano, obino neko ŋat oneko dano-nono kun nwoŋo ocuŋ i kop ocaden, cite mom obino neko dano moro pi kop acaden acel." 
Numbers35:31 Dok mom obino gamo limmoro me kokoro ŋat oneko dano ka ce balere onwoŋo romo to; obino neko dano-nono aneka. 
Numbers35:32 Dok daŋ myero kur gam limmoro me lakoro dano ame oriŋo olaro boma me larre, me wek kur ye en dwog i lobo mere kun alamdog adwoŋ pwod kwo." 
Numbers35:33 Mom ibino wunu balo lobo ame ibedo wunu iye; pien remo balo lobo, dok mom tye ginnoro ame twero kwanyo bal i lobo pi remo ame nwoŋo oony iye, kono ka remo a ŋat oneko dano-nono keken en ame twero kwanyo." 
Numbers35:34 Kur ibal wunu lobo ame ibedo wunu iye kun an daŋ abedo iye i akinawu; pien an a Rwot ame abedo i akina a jo Icrael.” 
Numbers36:1 Odoŋe a loo doggola a kwarigi ame tye i kwae awobe a Gilead wot a Makir ame obedo wot a Manace, ame tye i doggola me ot itino a Yucepu, gin onoko Muca aceggi ote kop i nyime kede i nyim odoŋe a loo doggola a kwari a jo Icrael." 
Numbers36:2 Gin okobo ni, “Rwot rik ociko adwoŋwa me pokki jo Icrael lobo me bedo megi kun opoko i kwir; dok Rwot rik ociko adwoŋwa me miyo lobo ame obedo me ominwa Jelopekad baŋ anyira mere." 
Numbers36:3 Cite ka ce gin onyomere awobe ame tye i akina atekere ocele me Icrael, obino kwanyo lobogi oko, i kom lobo a yam gin oleo me bedo megi i kom mea kwarogi, ote poko oko, medo i kom lobo atekere ame gin doŋ tye iye; obino kwanyo oko i kom me a kwarowa ote poko k ittono." 
Numbers36:4 Dok ka kare me jubili a jo Icrael oromo, lobo ame onwoŋo obedo megi, obino medo i kom me atekere ame gin doŋ otye iye-nono. Obino kwanyo oko i kom me kwarowa ote poko kittono.”" 
Numbers36:5 Muca rik te ciko jo Icrael kun lubo kop a Rwot okobo, kun kobo ni, “Kop i kom itekere ame obedo ikwae a Yucepu tye kakare." 
Numbers36:6 Mannono en gin ame Rwot ociko ame mako anyira a Jelopekad, en okobo ni, ‘Wekgi onyomere i ŋat ame gin otamo ni ber, cite gin myero nyomere i doggola ame tye i atekere a kwarogi." 
Numbers36:7 Lobo ame opoko baŋ jo Icrael, mom dok obino kokobo me ya i atekere man cwalo i atekere ocele; pien dano acel acel ame tye i akina jo Icrael bino moko doŋ atwal i lobo ame opokigi me bedo megi, ame tye i atekere a kwarogi." 
Numbers36:8 Dok ka ce nyako moro oleo lobo mere i akina atekere moro me Icrael, en doŋ bino bedo dako a dano moro i akina doggola me atekere a pappere me wek dano acel acel i akina jo Icrael le lobo a kwaro mere." 
Numbers36:9 Pi mannono, mom obino bedo kokobo lobo ame opoko me ya i atekere man, cwalo i atekere ocele; pien atekere acel acel me Icrael bino moko doŋ i lobogi ame gin oleo atwal.’ ”" 
Numbers36:10 Anyira a Jelopekad daŋ te timo kite ame Muca ocikogi kede; 
Numbers36:11 pien Malka Tirija, Kogla, Mirika kede Noa, ame gin obedo anyira a Jelopekad, gin luŋ onyomere kede awobe omego papagi." 
Numbers36:12 Onyomogi luŋ i doggola ikwae a Manace wot a Yucepu, lobo ame rikopokigi te bedo iyi atekere me doggola a papagi." 
Numbers36:13 Magi en cik kede icwil ame Rwot ociko kun mio Muca kobo baŋ jo Icrael i bar me Moab ame tye i ŋet Jordan ame otikere i Jeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Man en kop a Muca rik otito baŋ jo Icrael luŋ iŋe Jordan i tim, iyi Araba ame otikere i Cup, ame tye i akina Paran kede Topel, Laban, Kajerot kede Di-jaab," 
Deuteronomy1:2 Ya i Koreb wot i Kadecbarnea ka ilubo yo abeo i lobo obedo kidikidi me Ceir, onwoŋe romo wot me nino apar wie acel." 
Deuteronomy1:3 I nino dwe acel me dwe me apar wie acel me mwaka me pyeraŋwennere, en ame Muca otitti jo Icrael cik luŋ ame Rwot rik ociko ni ekobbigi," 
Deuteronomy1:4 Man en okobo i kare ame doŋ otyeko loyo Cikon abaka a jo Amor ame rik tye onwoŋo bedo i Kecbon, karacel kede Og abaka me Bacan ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Aciterot, kun loogi i lweny ame obedo i Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 I Moab loka Jordan, Muca omiye me gonyo te cik man kun kobo ni," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Rwot Obaŋawa rik okobo kedwa i Koreb ni ‘Doŋ ityeko bedo wunu ite kidi man pi kare alac meicel; 
Deuteronomy1:7 lokere wunu, icak wunu wotwu, idok wunu tutuŋ lobo obedo kidikidi mea jo Amor, kede jo luŋ ame ceggi kedgi, ame tye i Araba, i lobo otiŋere malo kede en a tye i te kidi, i Negeb kede i lobo ame omano dog nam, i lobo ajo Kanaan kede i Lebanon, tuno naka i kulo adwoŋ, ame en kulo Eufrate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Nen ba, doŋ atyeko keto lobo ame Rwot rik okwoŋo baŋ kwariwu Iburaim, Icaka, kede Yakobo, ni ebino miyo baŋ ikwae ame bino lubo ŋegi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “I kare-naca rik okobbiwu ni, ‘An gira mom aromo yeyo pekowu an kena;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Rwot obaŋawu doŋ omiowu inya wunu atek, ame omiowu aman doŋ ipol wunu calo acer ame tye i polo." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Myero doŋ Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarowu, omi imedde wunu apol kite a rik ociko kede." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kara doŋ atwero yeyo pekowu kena niŋo kun doŋ idoko wunu yec apek meicel, karacel kede pyem ame tye i akinawu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Yer wunu jo aryek, jo aniaŋ, dok ame tye i ŋec aromo, kun lubo kite ame atekerewu tye kede, an abino ketogi bedo odoŋe ame loowu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Wun rikite dokka wunu iye ni, ‘Gin ame ikobo ni wan oti-nono gire ber, myero oti.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Rik daŋ ate kwanyo odoŋe a loo itekerewu, jo a ryek a dok daŋ tye i ŋec oromo, ate ketogi me loyowu, odoŋe ame loo jo tutumia, odoŋe ame loo jo mia, odoŋe ame loo jo pyerabic kede odoŋe a loo jo tomon, karacel kede kite otel ocele i atekerewu luŋ." 
Deuteronomy1:16 I kare-nono rik ate ciko oŋolkopwu ni, ‘Winy wunu pido ame tye i akina omegowu, eka ite daŋ ŋolo wunu atira i akina dano kede ominnere, onyo kede arokkoro ame bedo baŋe." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Kur ileŋere wunu i ŋolokop; ibino winyo wunu kop a ŋat atidi kede me a ŋat adwoŋ daŋ; mom ibino wunu lworo waŋ ŋattoro, pien ŋolo kop obedo me Obaŋa. Ka ce inwoŋo wunu ni kopporo tekkiwu, ibino kela wunu baŋa, an abino winyo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 I kare-naca rik acikowu i ginnoro luŋ ame myero i tim wunu. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Doŋ kite a rik Rwot Obaŋawa ocikowa kede, omio wan ocako wotwa me ya oko i Koreb, ote wot coro yi dye twon tim alac kod iyiliyili ame rik ineno wunu, ame owoto i lobo a jo Amor ame obedo kidikidi, eka ote tuno i Kadec-barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 An rik ate kobbiwu ni, ‘Wun doŋ ituno wunu i lobo a jo Amor ame obedo kidikidi, ame Rwot Obaŋawa amiyowa." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Nen ba, Rwot Obaŋawu doŋ otyeko keto lobonono oko i nyimwu; wot wunu iye me iwot igam wunu bed megwu. Kite ame Rwot okobbiwu, Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarowu. Kur ilwor wunu dok cunywu daŋ kur poti.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Wun luŋ rik inoka wunu ceggi, eka ite kobo wunu ni, ‘Wek ocwa wunu jo wot i nyimwa, me wek gin wot rottiwa lobo-naca, eka gin te dwoggiwa kop i kom yo a myero olub me wot malo kuno, kede i kom boma ame obino bebea iye.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 An rik ate neno ni tammono ber, omio rik ate kwanyo jo apar wie aryo i akinawu, kun akwanyo dano acel i atekere acel acel." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Jo-nono rik te ya wot malo i lobo obedo kidikidi, ote tuno naka i luŋ me Ecikol, ote roto lobo-nono luŋ." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Gin rik ote kwanyo nyig yennogo me lobo-naca ote mako i ciŋgi, ote kela naka baŋwa, ote daŋ dwoggiwa kop kun okobo ni, ‘Lobo ame Rwot Obaŋawa amiyowa-nono obedo lobo aber.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Cite wun rik mom iye wunu wot malo kuno, kun ijem wunu i kom gin ame Rwot Obaŋawu ociko," 
Deuteronomy1:27 Rik daŋ ite ŋuŋura i kemawu kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Pien Rwot dagowa, en omio en okwanyowa i lobo me Miciri, me wek ebin emiwa i ciŋ jo Amor, me tyekowa oko." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Kara doŋ kit lobo aŋo ame wan owot iye? Omegowa rikomio koyo onyere i komwa pi kobo ni, “Jo-nono doŋodoŋo, dok obocoboco okatowa oko; bomagi daŋ doŋodoŋo kun daŋ ocecelo oko atek, ame wigi tye malo naka i polo twal; dok daŋ oneno jo Anak kuno”.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 An rik ate kobbiwu ni, ‘Kur inyobere wunu, akadi bedo i lworo moro i komgi." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Rwot Obaŋawu ame tye ka telo nyimwu en ame bino lweny pirwu, kite en obedo lweny kede pirwu i Miciri kun ineno wunu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 karacel kede i tim daŋ, kan ame ineno wunu iye kite ame Rwot Obaŋawu otiŋowu kede, kite ame dano tiŋo kede wode, obedo timo kittono i kabedo luŋ ame iwoto wunu iye, naka tuno kede i kabedo man,’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Cite kadi bed rik akobbiwu kittono wun giwu ikwero wunu geno Rwot Obaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 ame onwoŋo obedo telowu i yo me yenyo kan a myero igur wunu kemawu iye. En obedo telowu i mac dyewor kede pol dyeceŋ, me nyuttiwu yo me wotwu." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Kare ame Rwot rik owinyo kop ame ikobo wunu, akemo omako, omio te kwoŋ ni," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Mom tye ŋattoro i akina lwagi jo man areco-ni ame bino neno lobo aber ame rik akwoŋo ni abino miyo baŋ kwariwu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kono ka Kaleb wot a Jepune keken. En bino neno, dok daŋ abino miyo lobo ame yam tyene onyono baŋe kede baŋ itino mere, pien en obedo lubo Rwot iyore ducu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Akemo rik daŋ te mako Rwot naka i koma pirwu, eka te kobo ni, ‘Akadi yin daŋ mom ibino tuno i lobo-naca." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yocwa wot a Nuni ame konyi bino tuno iye; yin myero imi cunye bed tek, pien en bino miyo jo Icrael gamo lobo-naca me bedo megi." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Itino ame wun ikobo wunu ni bino doko gin ame okworwu bino yako, itino ame aman mom romo poko gin aber kede gin arac, gin en ame bino wot kuno; abino miyo lobo-naca baŋgi, eka te bedo megi." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Aco wun, lokere iwot wunu i dye tim tutuŋ Nam Arema.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Wun rikite gamo wunu doga ni, ‘Wan doŋ otyeko balo baŋ Rwot, obino wot lweny kite ame Rwot Obaŋawa ocikowa kede.’ Ŋat acel acel rik te tweye i jami mere me lweny kun tamo ni bedo yot me wot kwaro lobo obedo kidikidi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ento Rwot rik te kobbe ni, ‘Kob baŋgi ni, Mom ibino wot wunu kuno, dok daŋ mom ibino lweny wunu, pien an mom abino wot kedwu i akinawu; mannono bino miyo okworwu loowu oko." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Man en gin ame rik akobbiwu, cite wun giwu rikite jem wunu, kun ikwero wunu winyo gin ame Rwot ociko oko; rikite nwette wunu wot kwaro lobo obedo kidikidi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Jo Amor ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo obedo kidikidi kuno te bino i komwu, ote ryemowu calo kic, ote keketowu oko i Ceir tuno kede naka i Korma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Rik ibin idwogo wunu, ite bino kok wunu i nyim Rwot; cite Rwot mom daŋ te winyo kokowu, te daŋ kwero ciko yite oko i kopwu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Mannono te miyowu bedo ri i Kadec pi kare alac meicel. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Wan rik ote cako wotwa i tim kun odok tutuŋ Nam Arema, kite a rik Rwot onwoŋo ocika kede; rik ote bedo rorona i lobo me Ceir ame obedo kidikidi pi kare alac meicel." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Rwot te dok kobba ni," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Ibedo wunu doŋ rorona i lobo obedo kidikidi-ni pi kare alac meicel, doŋ oromowu oko; wirre wunu doŋ odok wunu tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Cik lwak ni, Nen doŋ iceggi beo wunu i lobo omegowu ame obedo ikwae Ecau, ame gin bedo i Ceir; gin bino bedo i lworo i komwu, doŋ myero igwokere wunu meicel." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Kur ilweny wunu i komgi, pien mom abino miyowu dul lobogi moro kadi acel, akadi dul lobo moro aduno ame dano romo cuŋ iye keken, pien doŋ atyeko miyo lobo obedo kidikidi me Ceir baŋ Ecau me bedo mere." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Itwero nwoŋo wunu cam kede pii baŋgi, cite ibino wilo wunu awila." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Pien Rwot Obaŋawu otyeko miyowu winyo i kom ginnoro luŋ ame ciŋwu ogudo; en kite ame iwoto wunu kede i dye twon tim alac-ci. I mwaka pyeraŋwen-ni luŋ Rwot Obaŋawu obedo bedo kedwu omio mom tye ginnoro ame oremowu.’ 
Deuteronomy2:8 Mannono omio wan okato oweko omegowa ame obedo ikwae Ecau, ame onwoŋo bedo i Ceir, mom obeo i yo me Araba, ame ya i Elat kede i Ejion-geber. “Eka dok ote wot tutuŋ tim me Moab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Rwot dok te kobba ni, ‘Kur iwot agwa i kom jo Moab, kur daŋ ilweny i komgi, pien mom abino miyi dul lobogi moro me bedo meri, pien doŋ atyeko miyo Ar baŋ ikwae a Lot me bedo megi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Jo Emim en a rik ogeo bedo kuno; gin obedo rok adwoŋ dok jo mere pol atek kun obocoboco calo Anak. 
Deuteronomy2:11 Jo man daŋ rik okwanogi i kom jo Repa calo jo Anak, ento jo Moab lwoŋogi ni, jo Emim." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Jo Kori rik con daŋ koŋ obedo i Ceir, ento ikwae Ecau rik te mayo lobogi oko bedo megi, gin te tyekogi oko i nyimgi, eka te leyo kabedogi kite a rik jo Icrael otimo i kom lobo ame odoko megi, ame Rwot rikomiogi.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 ‘Doŋ ba, ya wunu oko aman, iwot iŋol wunu luŋ me Jered’. Wan daŋ rik ote wot ŋolo luŋ me Jered," 
Deuteronomy2:14 Cakere i kare ame oya kede i Kadec-barnea tuno wan ame oŋolo luŋ me Jered, onwoŋo doŋ oromo mwakki pyeradek wie aboro. I kare-nono onwoŋo doŋ lwak luŋ ame romo lweny ototoa oko kite ame Rwot rik okwoŋo kede." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Pien ciŋ Rwot rik onwoŋo tye i komgi, me tyekogi oko i gonygi, tuno waŋ ame gin otum iweŋ." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Mannono omio i kare ame jo luŋ ame onwoŋo romo lweny otum oko i akina lwak. 
Deuteronomy2:17 Rwot okobba ni," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Tin doŋ ibino beo i kato i waŋ lobo me Moab kede Ar. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Kare a doŋ i ceggi i jo Ammon, kur iwot agwa i komgi, kur daŋ ilweny i komgi, pien mom abino miyo dul lobo a jo Amon moro me bedo meri, pien doŋ a tyeko miyo baŋ ikwae a Lot me bedo megi." 
Deuteronomy2:20 Mannono daŋ obino lwoŋo ni lobo a jo Repa rik koŋ obedo kannono, jo Ammon rik lwoŋogi ni, jo Jamjum." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Gin rik obedo rok adwoŋ dok jo mere pol atek kun obocoboco calo Anak, ento Rwot rik obino otyekogi luŋ i nyimgi, ote ryemogi oko, eka gin te leyo kabedogi," 
Deuteronomy2:22 kite ame rik otimo kede pi ikwae Ecau ame bedo i Ceir, i kare ame otyeko jo Kori oko i nyimgi, eka ikwae Ecau te mayo lobogi oko, ote leyo kabedogi; gin pwod bedo kuno naka atot onyoni." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Dok jo Avim daŋ ame rik onwoŋo bedo i pacci gi tuno naka i Gaja, jo Kaputor ame rik obino i Kaputor, en ame oryemogi, te leyo kaoedogi oko." 
Deuteronomy2:24 ‘Ya wunu doŋ iwot iŋol wunu luŋ me Arnon. Nen ba, atyeko doŋ miyo i ciŋwu Cikon abaka a jo Amor, abaka me Kecbon, karacel kede lobo mere; cak wunu gamo lobo mere bed megwu kun ilwenyo wunu i kome." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Tin abino cako miyo koyo onyere i kom rok luŋ ame tye piny i te polo kun olworowu. Ka gin bino winyo kop i komwu, komgi bino myel, kun cunygi ton atek pirwu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “En omio acwao kwena i tim me Kedemot baŋ Cikon abaka me Kecbon kede kop me kuc, kun akobbe ni," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Tim ber imia abe i loboni. Abino bea kun alubo ka yo keken, mom gira abino gak akadi tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Cam ame abino camo kede pi i ame abino mato, ibino miya awilo awila. Wek abe kom ka i tyena," 
Deuteronomy2:29 kite ame ikwae Ecau ame bedo i Ceir kede Moab ame bedo i Ar rik otimo kede, tuno waŋ ame aŋolo Jordan akato naka i lobo ame Rwot Obaŋawa bino miyowa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Ento Cikon abaka me Kecbon mom oye ni wan obe i lobo mere; pien Rwot Obaŋawu omie tekcuny, cunye te bedo nwaŋ, me wek emie i ciŋwu, acalo lobo mere pwod tye i ciŋwa naka tin." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Rwot te kobba ni, ‘Nen doŋ acako miyo Cikon kede lobo mere oko i ciŋi; cak doŋ gamo lobo mere bed megi, me ibed i lobo mere’." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Cikon karacel kede jo mere te mukere lweny i komwa i Jakaj," 
Deuteronomy2:33 Rwot Obaŋawa te miye i ciŋwa wan ote loye oko karacel kede awobe mere kede lwakkere luŋ. 
Deuteronomy2:34 I kare-nono wan omao boma mere luŋ, ote jwero jo i bomagi luŋ, co kede mon kede itino; mom oweko ŋattoro odoŋ." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Wan ote tero lim akwo keken ame oyako me doko megwa, karacel kede jami ocele ame oyako i boma luŋ ame omao." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Mom tye boma moro atek a rik ogero malo i wi kidi ame mayo oloowa, cakere i Areor ame tye i ŋet luŋ me Arnon kede dok cakere i boma ame tye i luŋ, tuno kede naka i Gilgal, Rwot Obaŋawa omiogi luŋ i ciŋwa." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kadi bed amannono, lobo a jo Ammon rik mom inoko wunu ceggi, kadi en ame tye i dog kulo me Jabok onyo bomagi moro ame tye i lobo obedo kidikidi, kede kan ame Rwot Obaŋawa ogenowa iye luŋ." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Wan rik ote lokere dok malo i yo a woto Bacan; eka Og abaka me Bacan karacel kede jo mere luŋ te mukere bino lweny i komwa i Edrei. 
Deuteronomy3:2 Cite Rwot te kobba ni, ‘Kur ilwore, pien atyeko doŋ miye oko i ciŋi, karacel kede jo mere luŋ kede lobo mere; ibino time kite ame rik itimo kede Cikon abaka me a jo Amor, ame rik bedo i Kecbon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Rwot Obaŋawa rik daŋ te miyo Og abaka me Bacan i ciŋwa kittono, karacel kede jo mere; rik ote nekogi tuno waŋ ame ŋattoro acel mom odoŋ baŋe akwo." 
Deuteronomy3:4 I kare-nono wan omao boma mere luŋ, mom tye boma moro ame odoŋ ame mom omao i baŋgi, boma pyerabicel twal, lobo me Argob luŋ ame yam tye i te loc a Og, i Bacan." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Boma magi luŋ rik onwoŋo ocelo i cellogo atek ame ocuŋ oguŋ naka malo, kun tye kede aceg dogcel karacel kede arii mege, medo kede lwak pacci atitino apol ata ame mom ocecelo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Wan rik ote jwero jo iye luŋ kite ame rik otimo kede Cikon abaka me Kecbon; ojwero jo i boma luŋ, co kede mon kede itino." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ento lim akwo ame oyako i boma apapat, wan otero odoko megwa." 
Deuteronomy3:8 I kare-naca rik ote kwanyo lobo-nono oko kittono, i ciŋ obakki aryo me a jo Amor ame rik otye loka Jordan, cakere i luŋ me Arnon wot tuno kede naka i kidi me Kermon." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Jo Cidon lwoŋo Kermon ni Cirion, cite jo Amor olwoŋo ni Cenir)." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Rik ote mayo boma luŋ ame tye i lobo otiŋere opette, kede lobo Gilead luŋ kede Bacan tuno kede naka i Caleka kede Edrei, ame gin pacci a rik tye i te loc a Og i lobo Bacan." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Pien Og abaka me Bacan en ame rik onwoŋo odoŋ kene i akina jo me Repa a rik odoŋ. Nen ba, itanda mere rik onwoŋo obedo itanda nyonyo, pwod tye i Rabba a jo Ammon. Borrere onwoŋo romo futi apar wie adek kede nucu, eka laccere te bedo futi abicel ka opimo i futi me nino ducu.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Kare ame doŋ lobo man odoko megwa i kare-nono, amio baŋ jo Reuben, kede jo Gad lobo ame ocakere i Areor, ame tye i dog luŋ me Arnon, karacel kede nucu lobo Gilead ame obedo kidikidi kede boma adoŋo luŋ ame tye iye." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Eka lobo Gilead odoŋere, kede lobo me Bacan luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i te loc a Og, ame obedo lobo me Argod luŋ, ote miyo baŋ nucu atekere a Manace. (Lobo me Bacan-nono luŋ olwoŋo ni lobo a jo Repa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jair ame obedo jo a Manace rik te tero lobo luŋ me Argob, ame en Bacan, tuno naka i waŋ apokki a jo Gecur kede me a jo Maacat, te cako nyiŋ pacci atino i nyiŋe kene ni Kavotjair, kite a pwod tye kede naka tin.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Eka ate miyo lobo me Gilead baŋ Makir," 
Deuteronomy3:16 eka baŋ jo Reuben kede jo Gad rik ate miyo lobo ame ocakere i Gilead te wot naka i luŋ me Arnon, kun luŋ en ame obedo waŋ apokki mere tuno naka i kulo Jabok, ame obedo waŋ lobo a jo Ammon." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Rik te miye daŋ Araba, kun Jordan en ame obedo waŋ apokki mere, cakere i nam me Kineret, tuno kede naka i nam me Araba, ame en Nam me Kado, en lobo ame tye i kor kidi me Piciga, ame tye tutuŋ kide." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Dok rik acikowu i kare-nono kun akobo ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋawu doŋ otyeko miyowu lobo man oko me bed megwu. Jowu luŋ a tek i lweny bino ruko jami lwenygi kato kede loka ca i nyim omegowu, ame gin jo Icrael." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Cite monwu kede itinowu atino kede limwu akwo, (pien aŋeo ni itye wunu i lwak lim apipim), gin bino doŋ i boma ame doŋ aminowu-ni," 
Deuteronomy3:20 tuno wan a Rwot doŋ omio omegowu ka weo, kite ame omiowu kede ka weo-ni, ame gin daŋ doŋ onwoŋo lobogi ame Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyogi loka Jordan; icennere wun doŋ ibino dwogo wunu kun ŋat acel acel dwogo i lobo mere a doŋ amiowu-ni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 I kare-naca rik aciko Yocwa ni, ‘Yin doŋ ityeko neno i waŋi ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawu otyeko tiyo i kom obakki aryo ca; Rwot dok bino timo kittono i kom loc luŋ ame ibino tuno wunu iye ka ikato wunu loka ca." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Kur ilwor wunugi, pien Rwot Obaŋawu en ame tye ka lweny pirwu.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “I kare-naca rik abin abako doga baŋ Rwot kun akobo ni," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Rwot Obaŋawa, nen yin pwod icako nyuto ditti kede twer me ciŋi acaka baŋ amironi. Mom tye Obaŋa moro i polo onyo i lobo ame twero tiyo tic apek meicel acalo magi!" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Tima kica iwek awot loka awot anen lobo ame tye loka Jordan, lobo obedo kidikidi aber wok ca, karacel kede Lebanon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Ento rik akemo te mako Rwot i koma pirwu, mom te ye winyo koppa. Rwot te kobba ni ‘Mano doŋ romo; kur imed kobo koppono baŋa." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Wot iyit malo i wi kidi me Piciga, me itiŋ waŋi inen tutuŋ to kede i tutuŋ anyorodi, kede i tutuŋ anyarolum, kede i tutuŋ kide, me inen lobo-nono," 
Deuteronomy3:28 icik Yocwa, icukoro cunye kun imie teko: pien en aye bino kato loka ca kun telo wi lwak man en bino miyogi oleo lobo ame ibino neno-nono.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Mannono en omio wan obedo i luŋ ame otikere i Bet-peor. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Aman doŋ ba, wun jo Icrael, gwok wunu icwil luŋ kede gin luŋ ame ociko, ame atye ka pwonyowu kede; myero icob wunugi me ibed wunu kwo, iwot ile wunu lobo ame Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwu tye amiyowu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Kur imed wunu kopporo i kom kop ame acikowu kede-ni, dok daŋ kur ibol wunu moro oko iye. Gwok wunu cik a Rwot Obaŋawu luŋ kite ame amio kede baŋwu." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Rik ineno i waŋwu gin ame Rwot otimo i Baal-peor. Rwot Obaŋawu rik obino oneko jo luŋ ame woro Baal i Peor i akina lwak. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Cite wun luŋ ame imedde wunu moko i kom Rwot Obaŋawu, en pwod itye wunu kwo luŋ naka atot tin." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Nen ba, doŋ atyeko pwonyowu icwil luŋ kede gin ame Rwot Obaŋawu ocika kede, me icob wunugi i lobo ame iceggi wunu leyo me bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Gwok wunu dok daŋ icob wunu, pien mano en ame bino bedo ryekowu kede ŋec a wun itye wunu kede i nyim rok ocele, ame ka gin owinyo icwil magi luŋ, gin bino kobo ni, ‘Ateni, twon rok adwoŋ wok-ki kara ryek ba, dok daŋ gin jo a ŋeo piny.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Pien mom dok tye twon rokkoro ocele adwoŋ ame obaŋagi bedo ceggi kedgi kite acalo Rwot Obaŋawa bedo ceggi kedwa i kare luŋ ame okok baŋe. 
Deuteronomy4:8 Dok mom daŋ tye twon rokkoro adwoŋ ame tye kede icwil kede gin ame ociko baŋgi atira a rom i cik ame tin aketo i nyimwu-ni. 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Ento nen aber ni igwokere wunu atek, Kur imi wii wil i kom gin ame ineno wunu. Kur imigi rweny oko i cunywu pi kare me kwowu luŋ. Tit wunu pire baŋ itinowu kede baŋ ikwaewu me gin daŋ ŋe," 
Deuteronomy4:10 kite ame rik icuŋ wunu kede i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu i Koreb, i nino ame Rwot rik okobba iye ni, ‘Cok lwak luŋ i nyima, me amigi owiny koppa, me opwony lwora i kare luŋ ame gin obino bedo kede kwo i wi lobo, me wek gin daŋ pwony kede itinogi." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Rik i te bino wunu cuŋ aceggi i te kidi, kun mac tye awaŋ i kidi, leb mac otuno malo i polo, i piny acol icuc, kede pol ocule acula ikuna.’" 
Deuteronomy4:12 Rwot rik te kop kedwu i dye mac. Rikite winyo wunu dwon keken kun mom ineno wunu ginnoro; dwon keken en ame owinyere. 
Deuteronomy4:13 En rik te tittiwu ni, cikere mere ame en ociko ni myero icob wunu, ame en cik apar en ocoogi i kiddi apada aryo." 
Deuteronomy4:14 I kare-nono Rwot rik te cika ni apwonywu kede cik luŋ kede gin ame ociko luŋ, me wek iwot igwok wunu i lobo ame iwot wunu gamo ca me bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Myero igwokere wunu atek ba, Kite acalo rik mom ineno wunu cal ginnoro i kare ame Rwot rik kobo kedwu i dye mac a lyel," 
Deuteronomy4:16 pi mannono, myero kur ikel wunu cannoro i komwu kenwu pi tiyo wunu cal ginnoro ame ipao wunu apaa pirwu kenwu, kadi kit callogo ame iporo wunu i cal kom ginnoro keken, ico onyo dako." 
Deuteronomy4:17 Onyo ame iporo wunu i lee moro ame tye i wi lobo, onyo winyo moro ame twarre i bwome malo i yamo," 
Deuteronomy4:18 onyo ginnoro ame lak alaka i lobo, onyo reccoro ame bedo i pii ame tye i te lobo." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Ka ce itiŋo waŋwu malo ite neno wunu ceŋ kede dwe kede lwak acer apipim, ame gin luŋ obedo mony me polo, kur imi waa tamwu terwu wot ryebere piny i nyimgi worogi, Rwot Obaŋawu opokogi baŋ rok luŋ ame tye i te polo acalo jami me awora," 
Deuteronomy4:20 ento Rwot rik oyerowu te kwanyowu oko i Miciri, ame rik cal i ot alyet ame oteto iye nyonyo, me ibed wunu jo mere ikome, kite ame itye wunu kede i kare man." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Dok daŋ rik akemo omako Rwot ikoma pirwu, te kwon ni an mom abino ŋolo kulo Jordan, mom abino tuno i lobo aber ame Rwot Obaŋawu tye ka miyowu me bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy4:22 An ata i lobo man kun mom aŋolo kulo Jordan, ento wun ibino wot wunu loka, i lobo aber ca i te gamo wunu bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Gwokere wunu ba, me wiwu kur wil oko i cikere a Rwot Obaŋawu ame en rik ocikere kede kedwu. Kur iti wunu cal ginnoro ame opao apaa ame cal i kom ginnoro ame yam Rwot Obaŋawu ociko ni kur itim wunu." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Pien Rwot Obaŋawu en mac ame waŋo piny, en Obaŋa ame nyek." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Ka doŋ iri wunu kuno ame inywalo wunu itinowu kede ikwaewu, ka ce iballe wunu pi tiyo calloro ame opao apaa ame cal i ginnoro, kede timo ginnoro ame nen arac i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu, me iroke wek akemo make;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 an tin alwoŋo polo kede lobo me bedo cadenna i komwu, ni ibino ru to wunu luŋ i lobo ame iwot wunu ŋolo Jordan me wot leyo bedo megwu. Mom ibino ri wunu iye kare alac, ento obino ru jwerowu oko iye." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Dok Rwot bino keketowu oko atata i akina rok papat, welwu ame bino doŋ i akina orok kan ame Rwot aryemowu iwot wunu iye, bino dok piny." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ibino woro wunu kit obaŋe apol atata kuno, obaŋe ame otio i yen kede kiddi, gin ame otio i ciŋ, a mom neno, a mom winyo kop, a mom daŋ cemo, akadi ŋweyo ginnoro." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ibino doŋ yenyo wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, ibino nwoŋe wunu daŋ ka ce iyenyo wunu kede cunywu luŋ kede tipowu luŋ." 
Deuteronomy4:30 I cennere doŋ ka piny oloowu kun jami magi luŋ doŋ otimere i komwu, ibino lokere wunu dwogo cen baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, ite daŋ winyo wunu koppere. En mom bino wekowu, dok daŋ mom bino tyekowu oko. Wie mom bino wil i cikere mere ame rik ocikere kede baŋ kwariwu, ame rik ekwoŋo baŋgi," 
Deuteronomy4:31 Pien Rwot Obaŋawu, en Obaŋa ame akica." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Koŋ ipeny wunu pire i kare a doŋ okato oko i ŋec, kare ame rik mom ru onywalowu, cakere i kare Obaŋa oketo iye dano i wi lobo; cak penyo pire i agikki piny tuŋ cel tuno kede tuŋ ocele; inen ka ce yam koŋ twon ginnoro adwoŋ calo man otimere, onyo yam koŋ owinyo pire." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Tye rokkoro ame yam koŋ owinyo dwon obaŋagi kun kobo i dye mac, acalo wun ame yam koŋ iwinyo wunu eka dok te bedo kow?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Onyo yam koŋ tye obaŋa moro ame otemo kwanyo rokkoro me bedo mege kene i akina rok ocele kun temo cuny rokkono i yore apol, kede anyuttogo, kede taŋo mogo me awura, kede lweny kede ciŋ atek, kede bad ame oryeo, kede twon lworo adwoŋ, ame rom i gin ame Rwot Obaŋawu otimo i kom lobo Miciri kun waŋ oneno kede waŋwa?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Magi luŋ rik onyuto baŋwu wek iŋe wunu ni Rwot en Obaŋa; mom dok tye Obaŋa moro ocele. 
Deuteronomy4:36 En omio wun iwinyo wunu dwone i polo me epwonywu wek eyik kitewu; dok daŋ onyuttiwu maccere adwoŋ i lobo, dokite winyo wunu daŋ koppere i dye mac." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Pien en rikomaro kwariwu eka te yero ikwaegi, ame gin onywalo, rik te kwanyogi oko i lobo Miciri pi teko mere adwoŋ kun en ikome tye kedwu," 
Deuteronomy4:38 kun ryemo i nyimwu rok adoŋo dok atek a katowu oko me wek ekelwu i lobogi, me emiwu lobogi bed megwu, kite ame tye kede naka atot tin." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Myero doŋ tin iŋe wunu dok iketo wunu cunywu ni Rwot en Obaŋa malo i polo kede piny i lobo; mom dok tye Obaŋa moro ocele. 
Deuteronomy4:40 Pi mannono myero imak wunu icwillere, kede gin ame en ociko luŋ ame tin an acikowu kede, me wek nyimwu kede me itinowu ame bino lubo ŋewu bed acil, me iperakino wunu kare alac i lobo ame Rwot Obaŋawu tye ka miyowu me bed megwu atwal.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 I kare-nono Muca te poko boma adek i yo tutuŋ kide, loka Jordan," 
Deuteronomy4:42 me wek ŋat oneko nek riŋ lar kuno; me wek ŋat a mom oneko awottere me akaka, kun onwoŋo amone moro gire mom i akinagi i kare okato, wek ka en oriŋo i boma moro i akinamagi, en bino laro kwo mere:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 Gin boma-nogo rik obedo Bejer ame tye i tim, i lobo opette, pi jo Reuben, Ramot i Gilead pi jo Gad, kede Golan i Bacan pi jo Manace." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Man en cik ame rik Muca oketo i nyim jo Icrael. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Magi gin kop me caden, icwil, kede kop ame rik ociko ducu, ame Muca okobo baŋ jo Icrael i kare a doŋ gin oya oko i Miciri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 a doŋ otye loka Jordan, i luŋ ame otikere i Bet-peor, i lobo Cikon abaka a jo Amor ame rik bedo i Kecbon ame rik Muca kede Icrael oloo i kare ame gin doŋ oya oko i Miciri," 
Deuteronomy4:47 Gin rik otero lobo-nono obedo megi karacel kede lobo a Og abaka me Bacan. Magi gin obakki aryo me a jo Amor ame rik onwoŋo bedo loka Jordan tuŋ kide. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Lobo-nono rik obedo lobo luŋ ame ocakere i Areor ame tye i ŋet luŋ me Arnon, tuno kede i kidi me Cirion (ame en Kermon)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 karacel kede Araba luŋ ame tye i kor kidi me Piciga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Muca olwoŋo jo Icrael te kobbigi ni, “Wun jo Icrael, winy wunu cik ducu kede gin ame ociko ducu ame akobo tin kun iwinyo wunu. Pwony wunu dok daŋ igwokere wunu me cobogi." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Rwot Obaŋawa rik ocikere kedwa i Koreb. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Rwot rik mom oketo cikere man kede kwariwa, ento ocikere kedwa, wan luŋ ame pwod tin otye kan kun okwo-ni." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Rwot rik okobo kedwu waŋ i waŋ i te kidi, i dye mac." 
Deuteronomy5:5 An rik onwoŋo acuŋ i akina Rwot kede wun i kare-naca, omio mom ite yito wunu malo i wi kidi.” En rik okobo ni," 
Deuteronomy5:6 “An a Rwot Obaŋani ame rik akwanyi oko i lobo me Miciri, i ot me opii." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Kur dok ibed Obaŋa moro ocele kono an keken. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “Kur iti cal ginnoro ame ipao piri keni, kadi cal ginnoro ame tye malo i polo, onyo ame tye piny i wi lobo, onyo ame tye i pii ame tye piny i te lobo;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 kur iryebere piny i nyimgi, kur iworgi; pien an a Rwot Obaŋani, an Obaŋa ame anyek; aketo can i kom ikwae a jo ame daga pi bal a kwarogi naka tuno i kom lwagi me adek kede me aŋwen i kom ikwaegi," 
Deuteronomy5:10 ento anyuto marra a mom lokere baŋ jo tutumia kede tutumia ame mara, ame mako cikka." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “Kur ilwoŋ nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋani nononono; pien Rwot bino miyo kop loo ŋat alwoŋo nyiŋe nononono. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Po pi nino me cabit, ikwer bed acil, kite a rik Rwot Obaŋani ociki kede." 
Deuteronomy5:13 I tic tic atek pi nino abicel, kun itio ticci ityeko luŋ;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 ento nino me abiro en cabit a Rwot Obaŋani. Nino-nono kur igud ticcoro, kadi yin ikomi, onyo wodi, onyo nyari, kadi opiini onyo aŋecani, onyo twonni onyo kanani, onyo dyaŋŋi moro, onyo arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu; wekopiini kede aŋecani owe daŋ bala yin." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Myeroipo ni yin daŋ yam ibedo opii i lobo Miciri, Rwot Obaŋani en a rik obin okwanyi oko i kuno ni igwok nino me cabit." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “Wor pappi kede totti, kite a Rwot Obaŋani ociki kede, me iperakino i lobo, dok ibed kun nyimi cil, i lobo ame Rwot Obaŋani bino miyi." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “Kur inek. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “Kur daŋ icod cot. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “Kur daŋ ikwal ginnoro. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “Kur daŋ ikob kop goba i kom ŋattoro. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “Kur daŋ ibed paro dako a ŋattoro, kur ipar ot a ŋattoro kadi poto mere, onyo aŋeca mere, onyo twonnere, onyo kana mere, onyo kadi ginnoro ducu ame tye baŋe." 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Rwot rik oko bo magi luŋ baŋwu wun luŋ kun icokere wunu karacel i te kidi. En rik okobo i dwon aloŋo i dye mac, kede pol, kede pol oculle acula ekuna, mom dok te medo iye kopporo ocele. Rik en te coyo kop man luŋ i kom kiddi apada aryo, te miyogi baŋa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Kare ame rik iwinyo wunu dwon ame opelo i dye piny acol kun mac tye ka waŋ i kidi, otel me atekerewu kede odoŋewu te bino baŋa." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Gin rik te kobo ni, ‘Nen ba, Rwot Obaŋawa doŋ onyuttiwa kwogo mere kede dittere, dok daŋ otyeko winyo dwone i dye mac. Tin doŋ wan oŋeo ni Obaŋa twero kop kede dano, eka dano-nono pwod dok te medde bedo kwo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Doŋ piŋo myero omiye me to oko aman, pien twon mac adwoŋ ca amito waŋowa oko? Ateni, abino to oko ka ce omedde winyo dwon Rwot Obaŋawu kun kobo kedwa tyen me aryo," 
Deuteronomy5:26 pien mom tye ŋattoro ame tye kede kom ame yam koŋ owinyo dwon Obaŋa akwo kun kobo i dye mac eka, pwod dok te medde bedo kwo, kite a wan owinyo kede." 
Deuteronomy5:27 Yin wot aceggi me iwiny kop luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawa bino kobo; yin ite kobbiwa kop luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawa bino kobbi; wan obino winyo ote daŋ tiyo’. 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Rwot rik te winyo kop ame wun ikobo wunu baŋa, Rwot te kobba ni, ‘Atyeko winyo kop ame lwak okobo baŋi. Kop ame gin okobo luŋ, gin okobo kakare." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kono kom gin omedde bedo kede kodi cunnyono kare ducu, cuny me lwora kede me gwoko cikka luŋ, kono ber; i nyimgi kede me itinogi kono obedo acil nakanaka," 
Deuteronomy5:30 Wot ikobbigi ni, “Dok wunu doŋ i kemawu.”" 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ento yin cuŋ i ŋeta kan, an abino titti cik luŋ kede icwil, karacel kede gin aciko luŋ, ame yin ibino pwonyogi kede, me gin wot cobgi i lobo ame amiyogi me bedo meggi’." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Pi mannono, gwokere wunu icobogi kite ame Rwot Obaŋawu ociko kede, kur igak wunu i ciŋwu tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Lub wunu ka yo luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawu ocikowu ni ilub wunu; me ibed wunu kwo, dok nyimwu daŋ bed acil, dok iperakino wunu i lobo ame ibino wunu gamo me bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Magi en cik, icwil kede gin ame Rwot Obaŋawu ociko ni apwonywu kede, me iwot icob i lobo ame iwot wunu gamo me bedo megwu loka ca." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Pi kare me kwowu luŋ, wun karacel kede itinowu kede ikwaewu, ibino lworo wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, kun igwoko wunu icwillere luŋ kede cikere ame acikowu kede. Mannono bino miyo iperakino wunu kare alac." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Pi mannono winy ba, yin icrael, gwokere me cobogi, me nyimi bed acil, dok daŋ inya apol meicel, kite ame rik Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwu rik ociki kede, i lobo ame cak kede moo kic mol amola iye." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Winy ba, yin Icrael. Rwot Obaŋawa en Rwot acel." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Mar Rwot Obaŋani kede cunyi ducu, kede tiponi luŋ kede tekoni luŋ." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Cik magi luŋ aciki kede tin-ni, myero imi bed i cunyi;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 dok daŋ ibino pwonyo itinoni atek meicel. Kop kop i komgi ka itye paco, ka itye iwot iyo, ka ibuto kede ka iya doŋ malo i kabuto," 
Deuteronomy6:8 Twegi i ŋut ciŋi, obed me anen; twe daŋ i tur nyimi." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Cogi daŋ i kom yen me doggola odi, kede i dogcel." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Rwot Obaŋawu bino kelowu i lobo ame rik okwoŋo pire baŋ kwariwu Iburaim, kede Icaka kede Yakobo ni ebino miyowu, lobo ame tye iye boma abeco meicel ame wun mom igero wunu;" 
Deuteronomy6:11 gedo iye luŋ opoŋ iye jami abeco meicel ame mom wun en iketogi wunu iye. Akoŋ apipim daŋ tye iye ame doŋ okunyo oko ame wun mom ikunyo wunu, potti olok kede me jeituni daŋ tye iye apipim ame wun mom ipito wunu. Doŋ ba, ka ce ibino camo wunu ite yeŋ wunu," 
Deuteronomy6:12 myero igwokere wunu, wiwu kur wil oko i kom Rwot ame okwanyowu i lobo Miciri, i ot me opii." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Lwor wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, ti wunu ticcere, ti wunu kede nyiŋe ka ce ikwoŋo wunu kwoŋoro." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Kur ilub wunu Obaŋa mogo ocele, ame obedo me a rok luŋ omano laŋetwu." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Ka ce ibino timo wunu kittono, akemo bino mako Rwot Obaŋawu i komwu, te tyekowu oko i wi lobo. Pien Rwot Obaŋawu ame tye i akinawu, en." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Kur iom wunu yi Rwot Obaŋawu, Obaŋa ame nyek kite a rik iomo wunu kede yie i Maca." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Ketto cunywu meicel igwoko cik a Rwot Obaŋawu luŋ kede koppere me caden, kede icwil luŋ, ame en ocikowu kede." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ti wunu gin ame tye ateni dok daŋ ame ber i nyim Rwot, me nyimwu bed cil, me iwot idony wunu i lobo aber ame Rwot Obaŋawu okwoŋo pire ni ebino miyo baŋ kwariwu, iwot igam wunu bed megwu." 
Deuteronomy6:19 En bino ryemo okworwu oko i nyimwu, kite ame Rwot okobo." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “I kare i nyim ka atinni bino penyi ni, ‘Kara kop me caden te koppere ŋo, karacel kede icwil luŋ kede gin ame ociko ame Rwot Obaŋawu ocikowu iye-ni?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Yin ibino kobbe ni, ‘Wan rik obedo opii a Parao i Miciri, Rwot rik te kwanyowa oko i kuno kede ciŋe atek." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Rwot rik onyuto anyuttogo kede taŋo mogo me awura, ame doŋodoŋo dok alit meicel i kom jo Miciri kede i kom Parao kede i kom jo ode luŋ kun wan oneno kede waŋwa." 
Deuteronomy6:23 En rik te kwanyowa oko i kuno, me kelowa kan, wek emiwa lobo ame rik ekwoŋo pire ni emiyo baŋ kwariwa." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Rwot rik ocikowa ni myero wan ocob icwil magi luŋ, myero daŋ olwor Rwot Obaŋawa me obed aber nakanaka, me en gwokwa obed kwo, kite ame otye kede-ni." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ka ce ogwokere icobo cik magi luŋ i nyim Rwot Obaŋawa, kite ame en ocikowa kede, obino bedo jo ame kitewa atira’." 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Ka doŋ Rwot Obaŋawu bino kelowu i lobo ame idonyo wunu iye, me wot gamo wunu bedo megwu, kun ryemo rok apol oko i nyimwu, jo Kitti, jo Girgac, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc, gin luŋ rok kany wie aryo adoŋodoŋo, dok ame otek okatowa oko," 
Deuteronomy7:2 ka ce Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyogi i ciŋwu, ite loyo wunugi, myero ijwergi wunu luŋ acalo gin me kwer. Kur icikere wunu kedgi, kur daŋ ibed wunu kede kica moro baŋgi," 
Deuteronomy7:3 Kur inyomere wunu kedgi, kur imi anyirawu baŋ awobegi, dok kur daŋ inyommi wunu awobewu anyiragi." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Pien gin bino balo wi awobewu oko iluba, ote lunyo woro obaŋa mogo ocele; mannono bino miyo akemo mako Rwot te ru tyekowu oko." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ento myero itimgi wunu kit man: mumuko wunu keno me yalo jogigi oko, ret wunu kiddigi ame ocibo me awora piny, toŋu Acerimgi oko, waŋ wunu calgi ame opao apaa oko kede mac." 
Deuteronomy7:6 “Pien wunu ibedo wunu jo acil; wun ibedo wunu jo a Rwot Obaŋawu. Rwot Obaŋawu otyeko yerowu i akina rok luŋ ame tye i lobo me ibed wunu jo mere en ikome. 
Deuteronomy7:7 Mar a Rwot rikomoko i komwu, te yerowu, mom pi welwu ame pol kato me a rok ocele, wun en ame onwoŋo doŋ inok wunu meicel i kom rok ocele luŋ." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Ento pien Rwot Obaŋawu rikomarowu, te gwoko kwoŋŋere a rik ekwoŋo baŋ kwariwu, en omio en okwanyowu kede teko me ciŋe, te lakorowu oko i ot me opii i ciŋ Parao, abaka me Miciri," 
Deuteronomy7:9 Myero doŋ iŋe wunu ni Rwot Obaŋawu, en Obaŋa ame genne, ame gwoko cikere mere, dok daŋ gwoko marrere a mom lokere baŋ lwagi jo tutumia ame mare, dok daŋ mako cikkere luŋ." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Ento culo kwor i kom jo ame dage, kun nekogi oko. En mom bino weko ŋat a dage, en bino culo kwor i kome." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Pi mannono myero igwokere wunu i cobo cikkere, kede icwillere, kede gin ame ociko, ame acikowu kede tin." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Ka ce iwinyo wunu cik magi, ite mako wunu kun daŋ icobo wunu, Rwot Obaŋawu daŋ bino gwoko cikere mere, karacel kede marrere a mom lokere ame rik ekwoŋo pire baŋ kwariwu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 En bino marowu dok bino miyowu gum, bino miyo welwu medde, dok daŋ bino miyo gum i kom itinowu ame ibino nywalo kede i kom gin ame bino cek i pottiwu, i kom kalwu, kono olok, kede moowu; karacel kede i kom itino dok kede i kom itino rommi, i lobo ame rik en okwoŋo pire baŋ kwariwu ni ebino miyowu." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Obino miyowu gum ame kato rok ocele ducu; ico moro onyo dako moro mom bino bedo oraŋa i akinawu, onyo i akina limwu akwo." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Rwot bino kwanyo kit two luŋ i akinawu. Two moro arac mom bino poto i komwu acalli me Miciri ame rik ikanyo wunu. Rwot bino miyo kodi two-nono poto i kom jo luŋ ame dagowu. 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nek wunu jo luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyo i ciŋwu. Kica kur makwu i komgi, dok daŋ kur ilwor wunu obaŋegi; pien gin bino doko kumma me cikowu." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Aco ka ce yam ibedo paro i cunyi ni, ‘Rok magi doŋodoŋo katowa oko; atwero ryemogi niŋo?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Kur ibed i lworo moro i komgi, ento wii myero kur wil i kom gin ame Rwot Obaŋawu yam otimo i kom Parao kede i kom jo Miciri luŋ," 
Deuteronomy7:19 Poyo kite ame otemogi kede kun wun ineno wunu kede waŋwu, karacel anyuttogo kede taŋo me awura, kede teko me ciŋ kede bade ame oryeo, ame Rwot Obaŋawu yam okwanyowu kede i kuno. Rwot Obaŋa bino timo kittono i kom rok luŋ ame ilworogi-nono." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Dok daŋ Rwot Obaŋawu bino coro lwak pipino apipim i akinagi, tuno waŋ ame otyeko jo ame onwoŋo odoŋ, ame oponniwu oko." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Kur imi wunu koyo onyere i komwu, pien Rwot Obaŋawu tye i akinawu, en twon Obaŋa adwoŋ meicel." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Rwot Obaŋawu bino ryemo rok magi i nyimwu momot; mom itwero tyekogi wunu oyotoyot, naka mio leyi me tim nya apol meicel te yelowu." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ento Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyo rok magi luŋ i ciŋwu, bino babanogi oko, tuno waŋ ame ityekogi wunu." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Bino daŋ miyo obakkigi i ciŋwu, eka ite miyo wunu nyingi rwenyo oko i wi lobo. Mom tye moro i akinagi ame bino cuŋ i nyimwu; tuno ka ityekogi wunu ducu." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Waŋ wunu cal obaŋegi oko ame opao apaa i mac. Kur ipar wunu pi ryal kede jabu ame tye i komgi, kur daŋ iter wunu me miyo doko megwu, naka mio gin doko kumma me mokowu; pien mannono obedo gin me kwer baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kur ikel wunu ginnoro me kwer i udiwu, ame mio idoko wunu jo oceno calo gin. Myero ikwer wunu oko, cunywu daŋ ca oko atwal, pien gin obedo gin ame myero jwer oko ducu." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Gwokere wunu, icob wunu cik luŋ ame amiyowu tin, me ibed wunu kwo dok inya wunu, iwot idony wunu i lobo ame Rwot rik okwoŋo ni ebino miyo baŋ kwariwu, igam wunu bed megwu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Poyo wunu twon wot abor ame Rwot Obaŋawu otelowu iye pi mwakki pyeraŋwen ame tin otum okoni. En onwoŋo tye amiyowu idoko wunu jo amwol, kun etemowu, me ene gin ame tye i cunywu, ka ce ibino wunu mako cikkere onyo pe." 
Deuteronomy8:3 En om idoko wunu jo ame mwol kittono, en te miyo kec nekowu, te miyowu camo manna ame mom rik iŋeo wunu, akadi kwariwu daŋ rik mom ŋeo. En otimo mannono me iŋe wunu ni dano mom bino bedo kwo ka i kwon keken, kono ka i kop ducu ame ya i dog Obaŋa." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Rukwu rik mom oyeyeca i komwu, tyenwu daŋ mom gire okwokwota, i mwakki pyeraŋwen luŋ ame ibedo wunu kede i tim." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Ŋe wunu ni kite acalo apap pwonyo wode, amannono daŋ Rwot Obaŋawu pwonyowu." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Pi mannono, myero igwok wunu cik a Rwot Obaŋawu luŋ kun ilubo wunu yo mere dok daŋ ilwore wunu." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Pien Rwot Obaŋawu tye aterowu aber, lobo ame opoŋ i kulli me pii amol, akoŋ apipim, kede pi i akukunya mollo i luŋ kede i kor kiddi," 
Deuteronomy8:8 lobo ame ceko ŋano cayiri, olok kede oduro kede okwer pomegranat, lobo ame moo jeituni kede moo kic dwoŋ iye ata," 
Deuteronomy8:9 lobo ame ibino wunu camo iye cam adwoŋ aboŋo ginnoro ame remowu. En lobo ame gweŋe iye obedo nyonyo, ame okunyo iye mola, i lobo ame obedo kidikidi." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ibino cem wunu ite yeŋ wunu, ite poyo wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, pi lobo aber ame en omiowu." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Gwokere wunu ba, me wiwu kur wil oko i kom Rwot Obaŋawu, kun mom imako wunu cikkere, kede gin ame en ociko, kede icwillere ame acikowu kede tin," 
Deuteronomy8:12 naka mio ka doŋ iyeŋ wunu, kun daŋ doŋ igero wunu udi abeco ame ibedo wunu iye;" 
Deuteronomy8:13 kare ame dokwu kede rommiwu doŋ onya apol, karacel kede ryalwu kede jabuwu ame nwoŋo doŋ bup meicel, dok jami luŋ ame tye i ciŋwu doŋ dwoŋ atata," 
Deuteronomy8:14 cunywu te cako yeyea, wiwu te wil oko i kom Rwot Obaŋawu ame rik okwanyowu i lobo Miciri, i ot me opii." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Obaŋawu ame rik otelowu i dye twon tim alac dok iyiliyili, ame twole a kwiri rac kede yit rik tye iye apipim; i lobo ame oryo pii onwoŋo dwoŋ iye meicel. Rwot Obaŋawu ame rik te miyo pii mollo pirwu kun ya i lela;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 en a daŋ rikomiowu manna me acama, cam ame kwariwu rik mom oŋeo. En otimo mannono me wek emiwu idok wunu jo amwol, etem cunywu, me wek i agikki mere etimwu ber." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Gwokere wunu ba, naka mio ikobo wunu i cunywu ni, ‘Tekona kede twer me ciŋa en omio anwoŋo lonyo man.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Myero ipo wunu i kom Rwot Obaŋawu, pien en omii teko me nwoŋo lonyo, me wek emok cikere mere ame rik ekwoŋo baŋ kwariwu, kite ame tye kede atot tin." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ka ce wiwu bino wil oko i kom Rwot Obaŋawu, ite cako wunu lubo kite obaŋe mogo ocele, kun itiyigi wunu dok daŋ iworogi wunu, akobbiwu kannaler ni, ibino wunu to itum wunu ducu." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Ibino to itum wunu oko calo rok ame Rwot tye ka tyeko oko i nyimwu, pien mom iwinyo wunu kop a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Winy wunu ba, wun jo Icrael. Tin ibino wunu kato loka Jordan, me wot ryemo rok adoŋodoŋo dok atek katowu oko, i bomagi luŋ a daŋ doŋodoŋo kun ocecelo atek naka malo i polo," 
Deuteronomy9:2 rok adwoŋ dok ame jo mere bocoboco, ame gin jo Anak ame iŋeo wunu, ame yam daŋ doŋ iwinyo wunu pirgi oko ni, ‘Ŋa kara atwero cuŋ i nyim ikwae Anak?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Pi mannono, myero tin doŋ iŋe wunu ni, ŋat ame tye awot inyimwu acalo mac ame waŋo piny, en Rwot Obaŋawu; en ikome bino tyekogi oko, te loyogi oko i i nyimwu; mannono bino miyo iryemogi wunu oko, ite miyogi wunu ru to oko, kite a Rwot ocikowu kede." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Ka doŋ Rwot Obaŋawu otyeko ryemogi oko i nyimwu, kur ikob wunu i cunywu ni, ‘Pien pi kita an ikoma ame obedo atira, en omio Rwot okela me gamo lobo man bedo mera’, kun kono pi ballogo areco ame rok ocel ca obedo tiyo, en omio Rwot tye aryemogi oko i nyimwu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Mom pi kitewu atira onyo pi cunygi ame cil en omio iwot wunu gamo lobo-naca me bedo megwu, cite pi ballogo areco ame rokkaca luŋ obedo timo en omio Rwot Obaŋawu tye ka ryemogi oko i nyimwu, dok daŋ me emok gin ame ekwoŋo baŋ kwariwu Iburaim, kede baŋ Icaka, kede baŋ Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 “Pi mannono, myero iŋe wunu ni, Rwot Obaŋawu mom amiyowu lobo man aber-ri, me bedo megwu pi kitewu atira; pien wun ibedo wunu jo ame ŋutwu nwaŋ." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Myero ipoyo wunu, dok daŋ wiwu kur wil i kom kite ame ibedo miyo wunu akemo mako kede Rwot Obaŋawu i tim. Cakere i nino ame iya wunu kede i Miciri naka tuno kede i kabedo man, ibedo wunu jem i kom Rwot." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Kadi naka i Koreb, imio wunu akemo omako Rwot, ame te miyo yi Rwot waŋ meicel i komwu, ame te tamo pi tyekowu oko." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Kare ame an rik awoto malo i wi kidi me wot gamo kiddi apada, kiddi apada me cikere ame rik Rwot ocikere kede kedwu, an rik ate ri i wi kidi pi nino pyeraŋwen, i ceŋ kede iwor kun mom acamo kadi mato ginnoro." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Rwot rik te miya kidi apada aryo ame Obaŋa en ocoo i ciŋe, kun ocoo i komgi kop luŋ ame rik Rwot obedo kobo i wi kidi kede i dye mac, i nino ame rik lwak ocokere iye." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kare ame doŋ nino pyeraŋwen otyeko tum, iwor kede iceŋ. Rwot rik te miya kiddi apada aryo, ame gin obedo kiddi me cikere." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Rwot te doŋ kobba ni, ‘Ya i kan oko, iru wot piny, pien joni a rik ikwanyo i lobo me Miciri oballe doŋ oko. Gin oweko cik a rik acikogi kede oko oyotoyot, olunyo tiyo atin twon ame otwako atwaka pirgi kengi’." 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Rwot dok te medde kobba ni, ‘An doŋ atyeko neno jo man, nen ba, gin obedo jo ame ŋutgi nwaŋ." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Koŋ doŋ iweka gira kena, me atyekgi oko, awe nyiŋgi oko i wi lobo, an abino miyi idoko rok atek dok adit akatogi oko.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 An rik ate ya oko i wi kidi, ate lokere bino piny kun mac tye alyel i kidi, kiddi apada aryo me cikere onwoŋo tye amako i ciŋa." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Kare ame abolo waŋa, aneno itye wunu itimo wunu bal i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu; anwoŋo itio wunu cal atin twon ame otwako atwaka, kun iweko wunu oyotoyot cik a rik ocikowu kede." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Mannono omio amako kiddi apada aryo i ciŋa aryo luŋ, ate retogi piny, ŋinido oko kun ineno wunu," 
Deuteronomy9:18 An ate buta aryeba cuny i nyim Rwot nino pyeraŋwen iceŋ kede iwor kite a rik koŋ atimo con ca, kun mom acamo kadi mato ginnoro, pi bal luŋ ame onwoŋo itimo wunu, kun itimo wunu gin a nen arac i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu, ame omio akemo omake." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Pien lworo onwoŋo omaka pi akemo a Rwot kede twon cwercuny ame onwoŋo en tye kede i komwu, ame en tamo pi tyekowu oko. Cite Rwot rik dok te winya i karenono," 
Deuteronomy9:20 Akemo daŋ rikomako Rwot i kom Aron, te daŋ yikere me neke oko, ento an rik atedaŋ kwayo pi Aron i kare-naca." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Rik daŋ ate kwanyo gi-timo balwu oko, waŋo i mac, ame en atin twon a rik itio wunu. Rik ate odo rerego oko ayom, tuno ka doŋ calo apua; ate onyo apua mere nono i pii ame mollo i wi kidi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Medo i kom mannono, rik daŋ imio wunu akemo omako Rwot i Tabera kede i Maca kede i Kibirotatava," 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kare ame rik Rwot ocwaowu kun iya wunu i Kadec-barnea kun kobo ni, ‘Wot wunu malo iwot igam wunu lobo ame atyeko miyowu me bedo megwu’, wun rikitejem wunu oko i kom gin a Rwot Obaŋawu ociko, mom ibedo wunu igen i kome, mom daŋ iwinyo wunu koppere." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ibedo wunu jem i kom Rwot cakere i nino ame rik aŋeowu iye. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Mannono omio rik abuto piny aryeba cuny i nyim Rwot nino pyeraŋwen, iceŋ kede iwor, pien Rwot rik okobo ni emito doŋ tyekowu oko." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Rik ate kwayo Rwot ni, ‘Tim ber, ama Rwot, kur ityek joni oko; pien gin obedo megi. Yin rik ilakorogi kede tekoni, ite kwanyogi i lobo me Miciri kede twero me ciŋi," 
Deuteronomy9:27 Po i kom omironi Iburaim, Icaka kede Yakobo; kur ipar pi nwaŋ ŋut a rok man, onyo pi timgi areco onyo pi balgi," 
Deuteronomy9:28 me wek jo i lobo ame ikwanyowa iye kur obed kobo ni, “Pien Rwot onwoŋo mom romo terogi i lobo ame rik ociko me miyogi, dok daŋ onwoŋo rik en dagogi, en omio en okwanyogi me wot nekogi oko i tim.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Pien gin obedo joni, gin megi yin i komi, ame doŋ ityeko kwanyo oko i teko adwoŋ karacel kede badi ame iryeo’." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “I kare-nono Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, ‘Muk dok kiddi apada aryo, tyeŋgi obed ame calli mega me agege ca, ite bino baŋa malo i wi kidi. Ti daŋ canduk me bao." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Abino coyo i komgi kop ame rik koŋ aco i kom kiddi apada me agege ca, ame rik iŋiŋido oko ca, eka ite ketogi i canduk.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 An daŋ rik ate tiyo canduk, kun atio i bao okuto alwii, ate daŋ muko kiddi apada aryo, ate daŋ tyeŋo ame rom aroma i maca acon ca, ate doŋ yito malo i wi kidi kun amakogi i ciŋa."
