Deuteronomy29:13 me tin en miwu idok wunu jo mere, en bed Obaŋawu, kite ame en rik ocikowu kede, kede kite a rik okwoŋo kede baŋ kwariwu, baŋ Iburaim, baŋ Icaka, kede baŋ Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Kwoŋ man me cikere, an mom acikere ka i jo ame tye kan keken," 
Deuteronomy29:15 cite acikere naka i jo a mom ocuŋ kedwa kan, karacel kede jo ame ocuŋ kedwa kan aman i nyim Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Iŋeo wunu aber kite ame wan obedo kede i lobo me Miciri kede kite ame obedo beo kede i dye rok apapat ame obeo wunu i akinagi. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Ineno wunu jami mogo me kwer ame tye baŋgi, cal jogi me yen kede kiddi, me ryal kede me jabu ame onwoŋo tye i akinagi." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Gwokere wunu ba, naka mio lo moro, onyo dako moro, onyo jo me doggola moro, onyo me atekere moro ame tye i akinawu, ame cunye tin ca olokere oko i kom woro Rwot Obaŋawu, me wot gire woro obaŋe a rokkaca; naka mio lwit yattoro a nywalo kwir ame nyige kec i akinawu." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ŋat ame ka owinyo kop ame okwoŋo i cikere man, lamo winyo i kome kene kun ko bo i cunye ni, ‘An gira ginnoro mom bino timere i koma, kadi cunya bed nwaŋ’. Mannono bino miyo ajwero jo luŋ oko, jo abeco kede areco." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Rwot mom bino time kica; akaka ennono akemo a Rwot kede nyeko ame en tye kede, bino duny i kom dano-nono, te miyo cen luŋ ame ocoo i buk man bedo i kome, Rwot te jwayo nyiŋe oko piny i te polo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Rwot bino yero dano-nono oko i akina atekere luŋ me a jo Icrael, me eket can apek i kome en kene, kun lubo kit cen luŋ ame tye i cikere, ame ocoo i buk man me cik." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Eka ikwaewu ame bino lubowu kede itinowu ame tye i newu, kede orok ame bino ya i lobo mogo ame tye kannabor, bino neno twoni can luŋ ame opoto i lobo-nono kede two mogo apek ame Rwot omio omako lobo-nono." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Lobo-nono obino balo oko kede mac kede kado, kun odoŋ iye gwen calufa ame mac olio, lobo a mom ocoo iye ginnoro, a ginnoro mom odoŋo iye akadi lum daŋ mom otu iye. Lobo ame oballe atek, ame rom aroma i Codoma kede Gomora, kede Adma kede Jeboim, ame Rwot rik obalo atek i kare ame iniga kede akemo omake." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Rok luŋ bino kobo ni, ‘Pino kara Rwot otimo lobo-ni kit man? Twon akemo arom man kara ŋit otimere pino ba?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Jo bino gamo ni, ‘Otimo pien jo-nono okwero lubo cikere a Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi rikomoko kedgi i kare ame okwanyogi i lobo me Miciri," 
Deuteronomy29:26 eka gin ote lunyo wot woro obaŋe mogo ocele kun daŋ oryebere i nyimgi, obaŋe mogo ame yam gin mom oŋeo dok daŋ mom rikomiogi me awora." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Mannono en omio akemo omako Rwot i kom lobo man, te kela iye cen luŋ ame ocoo i buk man." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Rwot te puto lwitgi oko i lobogi kun iniga, cwercuny kede twon akemo adwoŋ meicel omako, te bologi oko i lobo ocele, kite ame tye kede anaka atot tin.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Rwot Obaŋawa tye kede muŋŋere ame obedo mege en keken, cite gin ame doŋ oyabo oko, nwoŋo doŋ megwa atwal, kede me ikwaewa me wan ocob kop luŋ ame tye i cik man." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Doŋ ka ce gum magi luŋ kede cen ame atyeko keto i nyimwu-ni bino timere i komwu, ka ce ipoo wunu iye i kare ame itye wunu i akina rok luŋ apapat, kan ame Rwot Obaŋawu bino ryemowu, terowu iye," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ka ce ibino ŋut wunu, ite dwogo wunu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, wun karacel kede ikwaewu, ite winye wunu i kop luŋ ame acikowu iye tin, kun iwinye wunu i cunywu luŋ kede tipowu luŋ." 
Deuteronomy30:3 Kica bino mako Rwot Obaŋawu i komwu, te dwoggo gumwu baŋwu; en bino dok cokowu luŋ i akina rok luŋ ame en rik okeketowu iye." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Jowu luŋ ame onwoŋo odwiro kagimogo abor meicel, Rwot Obaŋa bino cokogi oko i kuno; en bino omogi gire oko i kuno." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Rwot Obaŋawu bino kelowu i lobo a rik kwariwu ogamo obedo megi, me wun igam wunu bed megwu. Rwot bino miyo jami apipim nya baŋwu kun daŋ welwu bup kato me a kwariwu oko." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Rwot bino miyo ibedo wunu jo olirre i cunygi karacel kede ikwaewu, ame bino miyo imaro wunu Rwot Obaŋawu kede cunywu ducu kede tipowu ducu, me ibed wunu kwo." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyo cen magi luŋ mako okworwu kede jo ame wunowu. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Wun dok ibino winyo wunu kop a Rwot, ite mako wunu cikere luŋ ame acikowu kede tin." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyo jami apipim nya baŋwu i ginnoro ame ciŋwu ogudo, itino ame inywalo wunu, kede itino limwu akwo kede cam ame cek i pottiwu, pien yi Rwot dok bino bedo ayom me miyo jami nya baŋwu, kite a rik yie obedo kede ayom i kom kwariwu," 
Deuteronomy30:10 ka ce iwinyo wunu koppere dok daŋ imako wunu cikkere luŋ karacel kede icwillere luŋ ame ocoo i buk man me cik, ka ce iŋut wunu, ite dok wunu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu kede cunywu ducu kede tipowu ducu." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Pien cik ame acikowu kede tin-ni, mom gire tek wok, dok daŋ mom tye kannabor wok i baŋwu." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Mom gire tye i polo twal, ame kono mi ikob wunu ni, ‘Ŋa kara ame bino wot malo i polo me wot ommiwa, me owiny ote daŋ cobo?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Mom daŋ gire tye loka tuŋ ca twal, ame kono mi ikob wunu ni, ‘Ŋa kara ame bino ŋolo nam kato tuŋ ca, me wot kelliwa, me owiny ote daŋ cobo?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ento koppono kom ceggi acega kedwu, koppono gire tye i dogwu kede i cunywu, ame mio itwero wunu cobo gire." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Nen ba, tin doŋ atyeko keto i nyimwu kwo, kede gin aber, to kede gin arac." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ka ce ibedo wunu owiny cik a Rwot Obaŋawu luŋ ame acikowu kede tin-ni, imare wunu dok daŋ ilubo wunu yo ame en mito kun daŋ imako wunu cikkere luŋ kede icwillere luŋ kede gin ame en ociko luŋ; ibino bedo wunu kwo kun welwu nya medde ameda. Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyowu winyo i lobo ame iwot wunu donyo iye me gamo bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ento ka ce cunywu olokere oko teŋe, eka mom ite winyo wunu, ento ite lokere wunu ryebere i nyim obaŋe mogo ocele kun iworogi wunu," 
Deuteronomy30:18 tin doŋ atucciwu oko ni, ibino wunu to oko; mom ibino perakino wunu kare alac i lobo ame iwot wunu iye loka Jordan, ame iwot donyo wunu iye me wot gamo bedo megwu." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Tin alwoŋo polo kede lobo me bedo caden i komwu, me moko ni an doŋ aketo i nyimwu kwo kede to, gum kede cen; pi mannono myero iyer wunu kwo wek wun karacel kede ikwaewu ibed wunu kwo," 
Deuteronomy30:20 kun imaro wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, iwinyo wunu koppere, dok daŋ imoko wunu i kome, mannono bino miyo ibedo wunu kwo dok daŋ iperakino wunu i lobo, ame rik Rwot okwoŋo pire baŋ kwariwu Iburaim, Icaka kede Yakobo, ni abino miyogi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Muca rik te medde kobo kop magi baŋ jo Icrael. 
Deuteronomy31:2 En okobbigi ni, “An mwaka me ditta tin doŋ oromo mia acel kede pyeraryo nono; an gira mom doŋ aromo telowu. Rwot doŋ otyeko kobba ni, ‘Yin mom dok ibino ŋolo Jordan ikato tuŋ ca’." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Rwot Obaŋawu i kome en ame bino wot telo nyimwu; en bino tyeko rok magi luŋ oko i nyimwu me ile wunu lobogi bed megwu. Yocwa en ame bino wot kedwu acalo atelwu, kite ame Rwot rik okobo kede." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Rwot bino timogi kite ame rik otimo kede Cikon kede Og, obakki a jo Amor karacel kede lobogi, i kare ame en rik otyekogi iye." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Rwot bino miyogi i ciŋwu, wun ibino timogi wunu kun ilubo wunu cik luŋ ame atyeko cikowu kede." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Myero icuŋ wunu atek ame cunywu nwaŋ. Kur ilworgi wunu, cunywu daŋ kur poti pirgi, pien Rwot Obaŋawu tye kedwu i kabedo luŋ ame ibino wot wunu iye. En mom bino bolowu, dok daŋ mom bino wekowu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Muca rik te lwoŋo Yocwa bino kobbe i nyim lwak luŋ ni, “Yin myero icuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ; pien yin ibino tero jo man i lobo ame Rwot rik okwoŋo pire baŋ kwarigi ni, ebino miyogi, yin ibino miyogi ogamo lobonaca bedo meggi." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Rwot ikome en ame bino telo nyimi; en bino gwok i, mom bino boli, dok daŋ mom bino weki ata. Kur ibed alwor, cunyi daŋ kur poti.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Muca te coyo cik man, te miyo baŋ olamdog ame gin obedo ikwae a Levi, ame tino canduk me cikere a Rwot, karacel kede baŋ odoŋe a jo Icrael." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Muca te cikogi ni, “Iyi agikki me mwaka abiro abiro, i kare me kwero ecuban me gonye, i mwaka ame ociko me jalo bannyi," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ka jo Icrael luŋ obino me woro Rwot Obaŋawu i kabedo moro ame en bino yero, ibino kwano wunu cik man kun jo Icrael luŋ winyo." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mi jo Icrael luŋ cokere karacel, co, mon, itino atino kede orok ame bedo i akinawu, i bomawu luŋ, me wek gin owiny cik a Rwot, dok daŋ opwony lworo Rwot Obaŋawu, dok ogwokere daŋ me cobo kop luŋ ame tye i cik man," 
Deuteronomy31:13 me ikwaegi ame yam mom ŋeo daŋ winy, ote pwonyo lworo Rwot Obaŋawu pi kare luŋ ame ibino bedo wunu kede i lobo ame iwot wunu iye loka Jordan, me wot gamo bedo megwu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Rwot dok te kobbi Muca ni, “Nen ba, nino me toni doŋ ceggi acega; lwoŋ Yocwa, me icuŋ wunu i kema me rwatte, me acike.” Eka Muca kede Yocwa te wot cuŋ i kema me rwatte." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Rwot rik te nen i kema me rwatte kun nen i pagi me pol; pagi me polloro te cuŋ i ŋet doggola me kema. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Nen ba, yin doŋ iceggi wot weo karacel kede kwarini; i ŋe ennono, rok man bino doko alaya pi woro obaŋe mogo ocele ame kun otimo tim me alaya baŋgi, i lobo ame gin owot bedo iye i akinagi, eka ote weka oko, ote turo cikere ame rik acikere kede kedgi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Mannono bino miyo akemo maka i komgi i kare-naca, an daŋ ate wekogi oko, mom dok ote medde neno waŋa, ate daŋ nekogi oko ducu. Ayela kede can bino bedo dwoŋ meicel i komgi, ame bino miyo gin kobo i kare-naca ni, ‘Ayela magi luŋ obino i komwa pien Obaŋawa mom tye i akinawa.’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Ateteni abino kanne gira oko i kare-naca, ame gin mom dok obino neno waŋa pien gin otimo tim areco, gin olunyo lokere baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Pi mannono ba, aman co wer man, me ipwony kede jo Icrael; migi omak wer man, me bed cadenna i kom jo Icrael." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Pien i kare ame abino terogi i lobo ame cak kede moo kic dwoŋ iye meicel, ame rik akwoŋo me miyo baŋ kwarigi, gin obino camo cem iye ote yeŋ, ote daŋ cwe, gin obino lokere woro obaŋe mogo ocele, ote lunyo caya kun daŋ oturo cikerena." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Eka i kare ame ayela kede can opo to i komgi, wer man bino bedo caden i nyimgi pien ikwaegi bino bedo wero wer man kun mom rwenyo. An doŋ onwoŋo aŋeo gin ame tye i cunygi kun mom ru oterogi i lobo ame rik akwoŋo me miyogi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Muca rik daŋ te coyo wer man i nino-naca ikome, te daŋ cako pwonyo i jo Icrael." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Rwot doŋ te ciko Yocwa wot a Nuni kun kobo ni, “Cuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ, pien yin ibino tero jo Icrael i lobo ame rik akwoŋo me miyogi; an abino bedo kedi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Kare ame Muca doŋ otyeko coyo kop luŋ me cik man i buk naka iyi agikki mere," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Muca rik te ciko jo Levi ame gin otiŋ canduk me cikere a Rwot ni," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Gam wunu buk man me cik, wot iket wunu iŋet canduk me cikere a Rwot Obaŋawu, me bed kuno acalo caden i komwu." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Pien an aŋeo jemwu kede nwaŋ a ŋutwu; koŋ inen i kare ame an pwod atye kwo, wun ibedo wunu jem i kom Rwot, kara doŋ jemwu bino bedo adwoŋ rom mene i kare ame an doŋ ato oko?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Mi odoŋe luŋ me atekerewu ducu cokere karacel baŋa, kede otel a lwak, me akob kop magi kun gin awinyo, me alwoŋ polo kede lobo caden i komgi." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Pien aŋea ni ka doŋ ato oko, wun ibino balle wunu oko, kun igak wunu, iweko wunu yo ame acikowu iye oko. Eka icennere, ayelayela bino cako poto i komwu, pien nwoŋo i bedo timo wunu ginnoro arac i nyim Rwot, kun tic ame itio wunu mio akemo make.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Muca rik te kobo kop ame tye i wer man naka tyeko ducu, kun lwak jo Icrael luŋ ame ocokere karacel winyo." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Cik wunu yitwu, wun polo luŋ ka akobo kedwu; wun lobo daŋ winy wunu kop ame aya i doga." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Pwony mera myero ony calo kot, koppa myero ton calo toyo, acalo kot ame cwe i kom lum alyabu, dok acalo kot ame aŋido i kom modo," 
Deuteronomy32:3 Pien abino rabo nyiŋ Rwot, abino tito dit Obaŋawa.”" 
Deuteronomy32:4 “En Kidi ame ticcere luŋ roccoro mom iye, pien i yo mere luŋ, en ŋolo kop atira, En Obaŋa ame genne, a mom i balloro, Obaŋa ame kite atira, a mom leŋere," 
Deuteronomy32:5 Gin doŋ oballe oko i nyime, gin doŋ mom itino mere pi roc a tye i komgi; gin doŋ jo ogom ame kitegi oballe oko," 
Deuteronomy32:6 Wun iculo wunu Rwot kittono, wun jo amiŋ ame ryekogi pe? Mom en obedo papawu ame oketowu? Mom en a rik ocweowu, te miyowu bedo tye?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Koŋ ipoyo wunu kop me kare acon, tam wunu gin otimere i mwakkinaca luŋ; peny wunu papawu me titiwu, kede odoŋewu ame gin daŋ kobbiwu." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Kare ame En Amalo Meicel omio lobogi baŋ rok apapat, kare ame en popoko jo luŋ, en opoko wan lobo a rok ducu, kun lubo wel itino Obaŋa." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ento dula Rwot ame en opoko obedo jo mere; me re ame en opoko pire en ikokome obedo Yakobo.” 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Ento rik onwoŋe i tim, kakannoro arac, a ŋattoro daŋ mom iye; ogure dyere, te gwoke, kun litte calo ton waŋe." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Kite ame cur cukoro kede cuny itino mere i ode, teteŋo bwome malo i wigi, yaro bwome, makogi kede, te tinogi i bwome." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Rwot kene en a rik obedo telle iyo, obaŋa a rokkoro ocele onwoŋo mom tye baŋe," 
Deuteronomy32:13 Omio en oyito malo i lobo kan obedo kidikidi en te camo gin ocek i poto; te miye daŋ doto moo kic i lela, kede moo ame mollo i lela atek;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 cak dok awac kede cak dyegi, dwolo itino rommi kede me a nyogi rommi, dok me Bacan kede dyegi, karacel kede ŋano aber meicel kede pig olok aber ame imato kono mere.”" 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Ento Jecurun ocwe atek, te ero gweyo oko; icwe atek ame komi pek, icamo atek; eka ite weko Obaŋa ame oketi oko, ite daŋ cayo kidi ame olari oko." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Gin te bedo miyo nyeko make pi obaŋe mogo a wele kun oroke i timmogo me kwer, omio akemo make." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Oyalo jogi ame mom obedo obaŋa, obaŋe mogo ame yam gin mom oŋeo, obaŋe mogo anyen ame obino icen, a rik mom opoto cuny kwarigi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Wiwu owil oko i kom Kidi ame obedo papawu, mom daŋ ipo wunu i kom Obaŋa ame omiowu kwo." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Kare ame Rwot rik oneno man, cunye ocaogi oko, pien awobe mere kede anyira obedo roke," 
Deuteronomy32:20 Omio en te kobo ni, ‘Abino wumo waŋa oko mom dok oneno, me koŋ anen gin ame bino timere i komgi, pien gin obedo lwagi jo ame oballe oko, itino ame mom ogen." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Gin omio nyeko omaka pi woro gigi mogo a mom obaŋa, gin obedo roka pi gigi mogo a konygi pe. Pi mannono an doŋ abino miyo nyeko makogi pi yero rok a mom rok ikome, abino miyo rokkoro amiŋ en arokogi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Pien akemona doŋ ocwinyo mac oko, maccono bino waŋ naka i te Cŋol piny, kun waŋo lobo kede ginnoro luŋ a tye iye, dok daŋ bino cwinyo mac i te acakki kiddi luŋ.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:23 “ ‘Abino coko kit raccoro luŋ ayido i komgi, aterona luŋ bino tum i komgi." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Kare a doŋ kec omiogi odoko goro, ame doŋ lyeto me two otyekogi oko, karacel kede edeke moro ame kwirrere gwa, abino doŋ cwayo leyi me tim mwodogi oko, karacel kede leyi ame lak alaka ame kwirgi tye." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ka gin tye oko, pala romo bino nekogi, ka otye i ot, lworo bino cirogi oko, awobe kede anyira bino tum oko, itino ame dot kede odoŋe a wigi i lwar." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Kono akobo ni, Abino keketogi oko kannabor, abino miyo nyingi rwenyo oko i akina jo," 
Deuteronomy32:27 ento alworo ni okwor bino bedo roka, ka ce gin odwanyo gin otimere kun okobo ni, Wan gire en ame oloo, mom Rwot, Rwot gire mom otimo ginnoro kadi acel’.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Pien gin obedo orok ame ryekogi rwenyo oko, ame niaŋ i te kop loogi oko," 
Deuteronomy32:29 Kono gin onwoŋo ryek, kono gin oniaŋ te kop man, kono gin oŋeo gin ame bino timere i komgi." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Dano acel twero ryemo jo tutumia i yore aŋo, onyo jo aryo twero miyo jo tutumia apar riŋo i yore aŋo, ka ce Kidigi mom owekogi oko, dok Rwot mom ojalogi i ciŋgi?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Pien kidigi mom rom i Kidiwa, akadi okworwa daŋ twero ye amannono." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Pien olokgi okelo i Codoma, kun daŋ oya i potti olok me Gomora; piggi tye iye kwir, etakgi daŋ kec;" 
Deuteronomy32:33 koŋogi obedo kwir twol, kwir a codocodo ager meicel." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Magi-nono luŋ mom en gin ame akano baŋa, kun omwomwono oko i ka kano limma?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Twer me culo kwor kede culogi pi balgi tye i wia, kuro ka kare ame tyengi bino cer iye; pien nino ame can abino kede i komgi doŋ ceggi acega, cangi-nono abino oyotoyot." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Pien Rwot bino miyo jo mere loo kop, dok kica bino make i kom omiro mere, ka oneno ni tekogi moro doŋ mom, ame ŋattoro mom doŋ odoŋ, ame opii onyo a mom opii." 
Deuteronomy32:37 En bino kobo ni, ‘Obaŋagi kara tye kwene, kede kidi ame yam gin oriŋo olaro," 
Deuteronomy32:38 ame camo dwolgi me mot oŋolo, dok ame mato yino me mot amatagi? Myero gin oya malo me okonywu, myero gin ogwokwu.’" 
Deuteronomy32:39 ‘Tin doŋ myero iŋe wunu ni, an kena en ame abedo Obaŋa, mom dok tye obaŋa moro ocele kono ka an keken. An en aneko nek, dok an en a mio kwo; an en a wano dano, dok an en a daŋ a caŋo; gin a doŋ tye i ciŋa, mom tye ŋat a dok twero laro." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Pien an atiŋo ciŋa malo i polo, eka ate kwoŋ ni, Kite ame an abedo kede kwo nakanaka-ni," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ka apako pala romona me meny, eka ate ryeyo ciŋa me cobo kop ame aŋolo, abino culo kwor i kom okworra, dok abino keto can i kom jo ame daga." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Abino miyo aterona mer kede remo pala romona bino camo riŋo, remo a jo ame oneko, kede ame omako kede riŋo kom okwor ame yer wigi olot aboco.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Pak wunu jo mere, wun rok ducu; pien en bino culo kwor me remo omiro mere, en bino culo kwor i kom okworrere, kun kwanyo kede bal i kom lobo a jo mere.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Muca rik te bino kobo kop ame tye i wer magi luŋ kun kwano ame lwak luŋ awinyo, en karacel kede Yocwa wot a Nuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Kare ame Muca doŋ otyeko kobo kop magi luŋ baŋ jo Icrael luŋ," 
Deuteronomy32:46 en okobbigi ni, “Keto wunu cunywu imako kop magi luŋ, kop ame tin amoko kedwu-ni, me icik wunu itinowu daŋ i kop man, me gin daŋ gwokere me cobo kop luŋ ame tye i cik man." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Pien man mom obedo kopporo a konyere mom baŋwu, pien otiko kwowa i kome, ame bino miyo iperakino wunu i lobo ame iwot wunu iye loka Jordan, me wot gamo bedo megwu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 I nino-nono ikome, Rwot rik te kobbi Muca ni," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Yit i wi kidi man me Abarim, kidi me Nebo, ame tye i lobo me Moab, ame otemere kede Jeriko, me inen lobo me Kanaan ame amiyo baŋ jo Icrael me bedo megi." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Ibino to doŋ i wi kidi ame iyito-nono, ite wot nywako kabedo kede kwariwu; kite ame ominni Aron oto kede i wi kidi me Kor, te wot nywako kabedo kede kwari mere;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 pien ituro cikka oko, i nyim jo Icrael i dog pii me Meriba i Kadec i tim me yin, ikwero nyuta i nyim jo Icrael ni an acil," 
Deuteronomy32:52 Pien ibino neno lobo-nono i kannabor, cite mom ibino wot donyo i lobo ame abino miyo baŋ jo Icrael.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Kare ame Muca dano Obaŋa mom ru oto, en olammi jo Icrael winyo," 
Deuteronomy33:2 kun kobo ni, “Rwot rik obino kun ya i wi Cinai, kun ya i Ceir naka i komwa; kun caro wi kidi me Paran calo ceŋ ame adonyo, obino i joacil tutumia i tutumia, kun leb mac tye alyel i ciŋe tuŋ cem," 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ateteni, en rik, onwoŋo maro jo mere, en onwoŋo gwoko jo mere acil luŋ i ciŋe; mannono en omio gin bedo lubo yori, kun yin ipwonyogi," 
Deuteronomy33:4 kare ame Muca omio cik pirwa, me bedo gi-alwak a Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Mannono rik te miyo Rwot doko abaka i Jecurun, kare ame ocoko otel a lwak karacel, kede atekere luŋ me Icrael.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 “Obaŋa myero omi Reuben bed kwo, kurto, myero kur mi wel jo mere jwik oko,”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Gin ame en okobo i kom Juda ene: “Ama Rwot, winydwon Juda, kele paco baŋ jo mere. Yin ikomi lweny pire, konye lweny i kom okworrere.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Aco i kom Levi en okobo ni, “Mi baŋ Levi Tumim meri, kede Urim meri baŋ ŋat ame lwori, ame yin rik iomo cunye i Maca, en ŋat arik ipyem kede i dog pii me Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 En ŋat a rik okobo kop i kom pappere kede tottere ni, ‘Mom aparogira pirgi’; pien okwero daŋ omego mere, itine mere ikome daŋ cunye ocao oko," 
Deuteronomy33:10 Gin bino pwonyo Yakobo i gin ame iciko, kun daŋ pwonyo Icrael kede cikki; gin bino waŋo odok akur i nyimi, kede mot aŋola ame owaŋo alutu i wi kenoni me lam," 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ama Rwot, mi gum i kom jo mere, dok daŋ igam gin ame en otio, nyon pyer okworrere piny, karacel kede jo a dage, me gin kur dok ya malo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Aco i kom Benjamin en okobo ni, “Ŋat ame Rwot maro, en bedo i laŋete kun bedo kede kuc; Rwot gwoke kare ducu, kun bedo i akina kiddi mere.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Aco i kom Yucepu en te kobo ni, “Myero Rwot mi gum i lobo mere, kede mot abeco ame ya i polo, kede en ame bino pi pii atut ame opoŋ ite lobo piny," 
Deuteronomy33:14 kede gigi mogo abeco ame cek pi ceŋ kede gigi mogo abeco ame cek pi dwe acel acel," 
Deuteronomy33:15 kede cammogo abeco ame cek i wi kiddi mogo ame operakino kede jami acek abup i wi tur a ri nakanaka," 
Deuteronomy33:16 kede mot abeco ame oya i lobo kede jami luŋ iye, kede winyo a ŋat a rik obedo i yat obuŋere, Rwot myero mi gummono luŋ joye i wi Yucepu kede i ataddi wi ŋat ame oyero i akina omego mere," 
Deuteronomy33:17 Atin twonnere me kao tye kede kwogo tuŋe calli me a twon jobi me tim, en bedo coro rok luŋ i tuŋe-nono, tuno kedgi luŋ i agikki me lobo; jo-nono gin jo Epraim tutumia apar, jo-nono gin jo a Manace tutumia i tutumia.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Aco i kom Jabulon en te kobo ni, “Cunyi myero bed yom, yin Jabulon, ka iwot oko; kede yin Icakar daŋ i kemani," 
Deuteronomy33:19 Gin bino lwoŋo rok ocele i wi kidigi, kan ame gin mio iye mot oŋolo ame tye kakare, pien gin bino coko lim i nam oko, kede kit lonyo luŋ ame okanne i kwoyo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Aco i kom Gad en te kobo ni, “Rwot myero mi winyo bed i kom ŋat a nyao waŋ lobo a Gad Gad buta piny calo eŋatu, kun kikilo bad lee kede wie." 
Deuteronomy33:21 En oyero lobo aberrere pire kene, i kan ame onwoŋo owekke iye lobo atel me mony; en te wot baŋ otel wi lwak kun notte karacel Icrael me cobo kop a Rwot oŋolo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Aco i kom Dan en te kobo ni, “Dan obedo atin eŋatu, ame kirre i ŋwec kun ya i Bacan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Aco i kom Naputali en te kobo ni, “Naputali wee, Rwot omii gum, me ibed twon alonyo me winyo a Rwot nam daŋ myero bed megi giri kede lobo me tuŋ anyarodi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Aco i kom Acer en te kobo ni, “Rwot myero mi Acer bed atin a kome gum kato itino ducu en bed ŋat omaro meicel i akina omego mere en bed ŋat a lwoko tyene kede moo," 
Deuteronomy33:25 Acer, dogcel me paconi myero obed nyonyo kede mola, tek komi myero medde ameda ito.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Yin Jecurun, ŋattoro be mom acalo Obaŋa, ame ŋweco baro polo me bino konyi, kun beo i kwogo mere i dye pol." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Obaŋa ame rik tye con i con-ni en ame kabedoni, kare luŋ ciŋe tye piny me tiŋi malo, En oryemo okwor oko i nyimi, kun kobo ni, ‘Tyekgi oko,’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Mannono omio Icrael obedo i kuc, ikwae a Yakobo te bedo gigi aboŋo ayela moro, lobo ame kal kede koŋo olok dwoŋ iye ata; kan ame toyo totona i polo bido lobo." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Yin Icrael, ŋa kara a yie yom calo yin, yin rok ame Rwot rik olaro Rwot en obedo kwot me geŋereni, kede pala romoni ame omii iloo piny, Okwori bino miye kengi baŋi, tyeni bino nyono kabedogi luŋ, ame tye i wi atenni kiddi.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Muca rik te ya i bar me Moab, wot i wi kidi me Nebo, i wi atenni me Piciga malo, ame otikere kede Jeriko. Rwot te nyutte lobo luŋ, cakere i Gilead tuno naka i Dan," 
Deuteronomy34:2 kede Naputali luŋ, kede lobo Epraim kede Manace, lobo me Juda luŋ tuno kede naka i nam me tuŋ to," 
Deuteronomy34:3 Negeb kede lobo ame obedo bar, ame en aye luŋ me Jeriko, ame obedo boma me otit, tuno kede naka i Joar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Rwot te kobbi Muca ni, “Man en lobo ame rik akwoŋo pire baŋ Iburaim, baŋ Icaka, kede baŋ Yakobo, ni abino miyo baŋ ikwaegi. An doŋ amii ineno kede waŋi, cite yin mom ibino tuno iye kuno,”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Muca ame obedo amiro a Rwot, rik te to kuno i lobo me Moab, kun lubo gin ame Rwot onwoŋo okobo;" 
Deuteronomy34:6 rik ote yike kuno i luŋ ame tye i lobo Moab ame otikere i Ber-peor, cite mom tye ŋattoro ame ŋeo kan ame oyike iye-nono naka atot tin." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Kare ame en to, onwoŋo doŋ mwaka me dittere romo mia acel kede pyeraryo; waŋe onwoŋo mom ru ocoro, dok daŋ onwoŋo pwod twon lomoro ame teko mere mom ru odok cen." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Jo Icrael rik te koke i bar me Moab pi nino pyeradek; eka nino me koke kede kumo pire rik doŋ te tum. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Pien Muca rik onwoŋo oketo ciŋe i kom Yocwa wot a Nuni omio cuny me ryeko rik te poŋ i kome; mannono te miyo jo Icrael bedo winye, te daŋ bedo tic kite a Rwot rik ociko kede Muca." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Cakere i kare-naca mom dok tye adwarpinnyoro ame oya i akina jo Icrael ame rom kede Muca, ame Rwot rik ŋeye kede waŋ i waŋ." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Mom tye ŋattoro a dok cal kede ka itamo pi anyut, taŋo me awura ame Rwot rikomio en obedo tiyo i Miciri, baŋ Parao kede omiro mere luŋ kede lobo mere luŋ," 
Deuteronomy34:12 kede dok ka itamo pi twoni gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo, dok daŋ iyiliyili, ame en obedo tiyo kun jo Icrael luŋ neno kede waŋgi." 
Joshua1:1 I ŋe to a Muca ame obedo amiro a Rwot, Rwot okobbi Yocwa wot a Nuni, amiro a Muca ni," 
Joshua1:2 “Amirona Muca doŋ oto oko; pi mannono yin aman doŋ ya iwot Jordan-ni, yin karacel kede jo man luŋ, me idony wunu i lobo ame an amiyogi, gin jo Icrael." 
Joshua1:3 Kabedo acel acel ame tyenwu bino nyono nwoŋo doŋ atyeko miyowu oko kite a rik aciko kede baŋ Muca," 
Joshua1:4 Cakere i tim kede i Lebanon kan, tuno naka i twoŋ kulo adwoŋ me kulo Efurate, lobo a jo Kitti luŋ naka dok kede i Nam Adwoŋ ame tye tutuŋ to, mano luŋ bino bedo lobowu." 
Joshua1:5 Mom gire tye ŋattoro kadi acel ame bino cuŋ i nyimi pi kare me kwo meri luŋ. Abino bedo kedi arom aroma i kite a rik abedo kede Muca; mom abino boli, dok mom abino weki ata." 
Joshua1:6 Cuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ pien yin ibino miyo jo man leo lobo ame rik akwoŋo pire baŋ kwarigi ni abino miyogi. 
Joshua1:7 Yin myero ka icuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ meicel, kun daŋ igwokere i cobo cik luŋ kite a rik amirona Muca ociki iye; kur igak iye oko i te dok i ciŋi tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam, me wek nyimi bed a myero i jami luŋ i kabedo luŋ ame iwoto iye." 
Joshua1:8 Buk cik-ki koppere mom bino rwenyo i dogi, ento bino bedo i cunyi dyeceŋ kede dyewor, me wek igwokere icobo kop luŋ kite ame ocoo kede i yie. Mannono bino miyo yori bedo aber, eka nyimi te bedo a myero i jami luŋ." 
Joshua1:9 Mom aciki? Yin cuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ. Kur ibed alwor, cunyi daŋ kur poti, pien Rwot Obaŋani tye kedi i kabedo luŋ ame ibino wot iye.”" 
Joshua1:10 Yocwa te ciko otel a lwak ni," 
Joshua1:11 “Bebea wunu i dye gony, icik wunu jo ni, ‘Yik wunu pekewu me dwoko lao iyo, pien odoŋ i nino adek keken ibino wunu ŋolo Jordan, me iwot i gam wunu lobo ame Rwot Obaŋawu omiowu me bedo megwu.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Yocwa te kobo baŋ jo a Reuben, jo a Gad kede nucu atekere a Manace, ni mano," 
Joshua1:13 “Poyo wunu kop ame rik Muca amiro a Rwot ocikowu kede ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyowu ka weo, dok bino miyowu lobo man.’" 
Joshua1:14 Monwu, itinowu kede limwu luŋ bino doŋ i lobo ame Muca rik omiowu i ŋe Jordan, ento co luŋ i akinawu ame tek i romo bino kato loka kun omako jami lweny otelo kede nyim omegowu, me wot konyogi;" 
Joshua1:15 naka waŋ ame Rwot omio weo baŋ omegowu, bala wun, dok gin daŋ ogamo lobo ame Rwot Obaŋawu amiyogi. Wun ite doŋ dwogo wunu i lobo ame omiowu, ite bedo wunu iye, en lobo ame Muca amiro a Rwot omiowu i ŋe Jordan tuŋ kide." 
Joshua1:16 Gin te dokki Yocwa ni, ‘Ginnoro luŋ ame icikowa iye, wan obino tiyo; dok kannoro luŋ ame ibino cwalowa iye, wan obino wot." 
Joshua1:17 Kite a rik owinyo kede Muca i kopporo luŋ, obino daŋ winyo megi kittono; Rwot Obaŋani en a myero ka bed kedi, kite a rik obedo i Muca.’" 
Joshua1:18 Ŋattoro keken ame bino jem i gin iciko eka mom te winyo koppi, i ginnoro luŋ ame icike iye, dano-nono obino neko aneka. Yin myero ka icuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ.”" 
Joshua2:1 Yocwa wot a Nuni te oro jo aryo i muŋ wot roto piny kun gin oya i Cittim, ocikogi ni, “Wot irot wunu lobo, cite akato mere Jeriko.” Gin owoto eka ote tuno i ot alaya moro a nyiŋe Rakab, gin te buta kuno." 
Joshua2:2 Jo te kobbi rwot me Jeriko ni, “Nen ba, jo mogo me Icrael obino kan tin dyewor me roto lobo.”" 
Joshua2:3 Rwot me Jeriko te cwayo kwena baŋ Rakab kun kobo ni, “Kel jo ame obino baŋi, ame odonyo i odi, pien gin obino me roto lobo luŋ.”" 
Joshua2:4 Ento dako-naca onwoŋo otero jo aryo-nu te kanogi oko; eka en te dok iye ni, “Ateni, co mogo onwoŋo obino baŋa, cite an onwoŋo mom aŋeo kan ame gin oya iye." 
Joshua2:5 I kare ame onwoŋo doŋ oceggi cego dogcel me boma ame piny doŋ iribiribi, jo-nono te kato oko, mom dok aŋeo kan ame gin owoto iye. Ryem wunu yorgi oyotoyot, ibino wunu makogi oko.”" 
Joshua2:6 En onwoŋo oterogi malo i wi ot, te wumogi kede tole nino ame ocano acaŋa malo i iw ot." 
Joshua2:7 Jo-nono te ryemo yorgi iyo a dok tutuŋ Jordan, naka i pi i acecep. I kare ame jo oryemo yorgi okato oko, ote ru cego dogcel oko." 
Joshua2:8 Kare ame gin mom ru obuto, dano-nu te bino baŋgi i wi ot," 
Joshua2:9 te kobo baŋ jo-nono ni, “An aŋeo ni Rwot doŋ omiowu lobo man, dok daŋ lworo doŋ omakowa i komwu, jo luŋ ame tye i lobo-ni komgi doŋ oonyo koyo oko pirwu," 
Joshua2:10 Pien wan owinyo kite ame Rwot odwono kede pii me Nam arema i nyimwu, i kare ame iya wunu i lobo Miciri, karacel kede gin ame itimo wunu i kom obakki aryo me a jo Amor ame onwoŋo tye i ŋe Jordan, Cikon kede Og, ame ijwero wunu kom luŋ aluŋa." 
Joshua2:11 Tekki owinyo, koyo te ru oonyere oko i komwa, ame ŋattoro mom odoŋ kadi acel ame cunye onwoŋo tek. Mano kom otimere pirwu, pien Rwot Obaŋawu en Obaŋa ame tye malo i polo kede piny i lobo." 
Joshua2:12 Aman doŋ ba, kwoŋ wunu baŋa i nyim Rwot ni, kite acalo an atimowu ber, wun daŋ ibino timo wunu ot a pappa ber, kun imio wunu anennoro ame moko kwoŋwu," 
Joshua2:13 me igwok wunu kwo a pappa kede totta kede omegona kede amegona kede jo luŋ ame tye baŋgi, ilarwa wunu kur oto.”" 
Joshua2:14 Jo-nu te dokke iye ni, “Twara kwowa en arweny akaka megwu! Ka ce mom ikobo wunu kopporo i kopwa-ni, wan obino terowu aber dok i gen i kare ame Rwot bino miyowa lobo man.”" 
Joshua2:15 En doŋ te cwayogi piny iwaŋ dirica kun cwaogi kede tol; pien ode onwoŋo okubere i cel me boma, en onwoŋo bedo iyi cel." 
Joshua2:16 Ocikogi ni, “Koŋ iwot wunu i wi kiddi, me jo a ryemo yorwu kur cop i komwu; pon wunu kuno nino adek, ituno ka jo oryemo yorwu odwogo, eka ite doŋ wot wunu giwu.”" 
Joshua2:17 Jo-nu te dokke iye ni, “Wan mom obino bedo i balloro i kwoŋ ame imiowa okwoŋo ka ce mom itimo man." 
Joshua2:18 Nen ba, i kare ame wan obino bino i lobo man, myero inen ni itweo tol arema i waŋ dirica kan ame icwaowa iye-ni, dok daŋ myero imi jo-ni luŋ bed i ot baŋi: pappi, totti, omegoni, amegoni, kede jo luŋ ame tye i ot a pappi." 
Joshua2:19 Ka ce dano moro odonyo oko i odi eka te wot i waŋayo, remo mere obino bedo gire i wie, wan giwa mom obino bedo i balloro; ento ka ciŋ ŋattoro ogudo dano moro ame tye i ot baŋi, remo mere bino bedo i wiwa." 
Joshua2:20 Ento ka ikobo kopporo i kopwa-ni, wan giwa mom obino bedo i balloro i kwoŋ ame imiowa okwoŋo.”" 
Joshua2:21 En te dok iye ni, “Koŋ doŋ bed kite ame ikobo wunu.” Ocikogi, eka gin te wot; en te tweyo tol arema iwaŋ dirica." 
Joshua2:22 Gin oya i kuno ote wot i wi kiddi. Gin te bedo kuno nino adek, naka waŋ ame jo oryemo yorgi odok cen, pien jo ame oryemo yorgi onwoŋo obedo yenyogi i yo luŋ, mom ote nwoŋogi." 
Joshua2:23 Jo aryo-nu te doŋ dwogo piny i wi kiddi, ote ŋolo kulo, bi no baŋ Yocwa wot a Nuni; gin te titte kop luŋ ame otimere i komgi." 
Joshua2:24 Gin okobbi Yocwa ni, “Ateni, Rwot otyeko miyo lobo luŋ i ciŋwa, dok daŋ medo kede manno, jo luŋ ame bedo i lobonono cunygi doŋ oto oko pirwa.”" 
Joshua3:1 Yocwa opuk ka ibayi te ya oko i Cittim karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ. Gin obino i Jordan ote buto kuno kun mom ru oŋolo kulo. 
Joshua3:2 Kare ame nino adek doŋ okato otel a lwak te bebea i gony," 
Joshua3:3 kun gin cikogi ni, “Ka ineno wunu canduk cikere a Rwot Obaŋawu ame olamdog ame gin jo Levi tye adyelo, ya wunu oko i kabedowu ite lubo wunu yore," 
Joshua3:4 me iŋe wunu yo ame ilubo wunu, pien yam mom ru ibeo wunu kan con. Kadi amanno, myero akinawu kede canduk cikere lagoro.”" 
Joshua3:5 Yocwa dok te ciko jo ni, “Lonyere wunu kenwu, pien diki Rwot bino tiyo tic me awura i akinawu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Yocwa dok te ciko daŋ olamdog ni, “Tiŋ wunu canduk cikere, me ikat wunu i nyim lwak.” Gin daŋ ote tiŋo canduk cikere, ote telo kede nyim lwak." 
Joshua3:7 Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Tin abino cako miyi dit i nyim lwak jo Icrael, me gin ŋe ni, kite a rik abedo i Muca, abino bedo kedi daŋ kittono." 
Joshua3:8 Ibino ciko olamdog ame otiŋo canduk cikere ni, ‘Ka ituno wunu i ŋet pii me Jordan, myero koŋi cuŋ wunu i kulo Jordan.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Yocwa te ciko lwak jo Icrael ni, “Bye wunu kan me ibin iwiny wunu kop a Rwot Obaŋawu.”" 
Joshua3:10 Yocwa dok te tittigi ni, “Man bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni Obaŋa akwo tye i akinawa, dok daŋ mom bino weko ryemo yo jo Kanaan i nyimwu, kede jo Kitti, jo Kivi, jo Periji kede jo Girgac, jo Amor karacel kede jo Jebuc." 
Joshua3:11 Nen wunu ba, canduk cikere a Rwot me wi podo luŋ bino telo nyimwu i ŋolo kulo Jordan." 
Joshua3:12 Pi mannono, aman yer wunu jo apar wie aryo i kom atekere apar wie aryo me Icrael, kun iyi atekere acel acel ya iye dano acel." 
Joshua3:13 Doŋ i kare ame tyen olamdog ame otiŋo canduk cikere a Rwot, ame en Rwot me wi podo luŋ, bi no cuŋ i pii me Jordan, pii me Jordan bino cuŋ oko kun mol, eka pii ame onwoŋo amol abino i malo te cokere karacel.”" 
Joshua3:14 Eka lwak te ya i kemagi me ŋolo kulo Jordan kun olamdog tiŋo canduk cikere telo nyim lwak. 
Joshua3:15 Kare ame olamdog otiŋo canduk cikere otuno i kulo Jordan, eka tyengi te lutte i pii i ŋet kulo, pien kulo Jordan onwoŋo poŋ lapakino atata kare luŋ naka i kare ame jo tye akayo kal-gu," 
Joshua3:16 pii ame onwoŋo amollo abino i malo te cuŋ oko, te cokere karacel i bim malo kanabor i Adam, ame en boma a tye i ŋet Caretan, kede pii ame onwoŋo amol adok piny tutuŋ Nam me Araba, ame en Nam me kado, ginnoro luŋ te cot oko; jo doŋ te ŋolo i kan otemere i Jeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Kare ame jo Icrael luŋ onwoŋo aŋolo kulo kun owoto gigi kan otwo, olamdog ame otiŋo canduk cikere a Rwot onwoŋo ocuŋ kan otwo i dye Jordan, naka ka rok luŋ doŋ oŋolo Jordan." 
Joshua4:1 Kare ame rokgi-nono luŋ doŋ oŋolo Jordan, Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni," 
Joshua4:2 “Yer jo apar wie aryo i akina lwak, kun iyi atekere acel acel ya iye dano acel, myero icikgi ni," 
Joshua4:3 ‘Kwany wunu gweŋe apar wie aryo i dye Jordan kan, i kakan ame tyen olamdog ocuŋ iye ikokome, ye wunu iwot wunu kede loka, wot iket wunu kan ame tin ibino buto wunu iye.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Yocwa te lwoŋo jo apar wie aryo i kom lwak jo Icrael ame onwoŋo yam en oyero con, dano acel acel i atekere acel acel;" 
Joshua4:5 te dok kobbigi ni, “Kat wunu i nyim canduk cikere a Rwot Obaŋawu i dye Jordan. Ŋat acel acel myero tiŋ gweŋ acel i wi gwoke, kun lubo kite ame wel atekere a jo Icrael tye kede," 
Joshua4:6 me wek man bed anen i akinawu. Ka itinowu bino penyowu i kare i nyim ni, ‘Kara gweŋe-nu te koppere ŋo baŋwu?" 
Joshua4:7 Wun ibino tittigi ni, pii me Jordan rik obin ocot oko i nyim canduk a Rwot, kare ame wan oŋolo Jordan, pii me Jordan ocot oko. Pi mannono gweŋe-nu bino bedo me poyo wi jo Icrael nakanaka.’ ”" 
Joshua4:8 Jo Icrael te daŋ tiyo kite ame Yocwa okobbigi; gin te kwanyo gweŋe apar wie aryo i dye Jordan kite acalo wel atekere a jo Icrael tye kede, kite a Rwot ociko kede Yocwa. Gin oyeo ote wot kede loka kan ame gin obuto iye, eka ote cibogi piny kuno." 
Joshua4:9 Yocwa te cano gweŋe apar wie aryo-nono cuŋ i dye Jordan kakan ame tyen olamdog ame otiŋo canduk cikere onwoŋo ocuŋ iye. Gweŋe-nono tye kuno naka atot tin. 
Joshua4:10 Pien olamdog ame rik otiŋo canduk cikere rik ocuŋ i dye Jordan naka ka lwak doŋ ocobo gin ducu ame rik Rwot ociko Yocwa ni kobbigi otim, kun lubo kop luŋ a rik Muca ociko kede Yocwa. Jo te ru kato oko loka." 
Joshua4:11 Kare ame jo luŋ doŋ okato loka oko, canduk cikere a Rwot kede olamdog te kato doŋ i nyim lwak." 
Joshua4:12 Jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu atekere a Manace te kato loka i nyim jo Icrael kun gin omako jami lweny kite a rik Muca ocikogi kede." 
Joshua4:13 Jo onwoŋo ceggi romo tutumia pyeraŋwen ame okato loka i i nyim Rwot kun oyikere i jami lweny me wot lweny i bar me Jeriko. 
Joshua4:14 Nino-nono Rwot omio Yocwa dit i nyim jo Icrael luŋ, gin daŋ, ote lwore kite a rik gin olworo kede Muca pi kare luŋ me kwo mere." 
Joshua4:15 Rwot dok te kobo baŋ Yocwa ni," 
Joshua4:16 “Cik olamdog ame otiŋo canduk cikere me ya oko i Jordan.” 
Joshua4:17 Yocwa te ciko olamdog ni, “Biye wunu, iya wunu oko i Jordan.”" 
Joshua4:18 Olamdog te tiŋo canduk cikere a Rwot te ya oko i Jordan; kare ame tyen olamdog onyono kan otwo, pii me Jordan te dok gire kakare, te poŋ lapakino atata kite a yam con." 
Joshua4:19 Jo rik te ya oko i Jordan i nino dwe apar me dwe me agege, gin te bedo koŋ i gonygi i Gilgal, i waŋ apokki me Jeriko i tuŋ kide." 
Joshua4:20 Yocwa te cano gweŋe apar wie aryo arik okwanyo i Jordan ca i Gilgal. 
Joshua4:21 Eka te kobbi jo Icrael ni, “Ka waŋŋoro ikwaewu bino penyo pappigi ni, ‘Kara gweŋe-nu te koppere no?’" 
Joshua4:22 Wun ibino wunu miyogi oŋeo ni, ‘Icrael rik obin oŋolo Jordan man ame otwo.’" 
Joshua4:23 Pien Rwot Obaŋwu rik omio pii me Jordan odwono pirwu naka wun ikato wunu loka, kite a Rwot Obaŋawu rik otimo i kom Nam Arema, ame daŋ obin odwono oko pirwu naka ka wun ikato wunu loka," 
Joshua4:24 me rok luŋ me wi podo ŋe ni, Rwot ciŋe tek meicel; me gin obed i lworo baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu nakanaka.”" 
Joshua5:1 Kare ame rwode luŋ me jo Amor rik tye i ŋe Jordan tuŋ to, karacel kede rwode a jo Kanaan luŋ rik tye i dog nam, owinyo ni Rwot omio pii me Jordan odwono pi jo Icrael naka ka gin okato loka, komgi doŋ te onyo koyo oko, mom doŋ ote bedo i tekcunyoro pi lworo jo Icrael." 
Joshua5:2 I kare-nono Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Yik pala gweŋ, me dok imed liro jo Icrael tyen me aryo.”" 
Joshua5:3 Yocwa te rabo pala me gweŋ, te liro kede jo Icrael i Gibea-kaaralot." 
Joshua5:4 Gin omio Yocwa dok omedo lirogi ene: pien co luŋ ame onwoŋo oya i Miciri, ame onwoŋo romo lweny, gin luŋ rik oto oko iyo, i tim, kun gin doŋ onwoŋo oya oko i Miciri." 
Joshua5:5 Kadi bed rik jo luŋ ame oya i Miciri rik olirogi, cite jo luŋ mom onywalo i yo i itim, i kare ame gin oya oko i Miciri, mom onwoŋo olirogi." 
Joshua5:6 Pien jo Icrael obedo wowota i tim pi mwakki pyeraŋwen, tuno waŋ ame rok luŋ, co luŋ ame romo lweny, oto oko pi kwero winyo dog Rwot. Rwot rik onwoŋo okwoŋo baŋgi ni mom ebino ye gin neno lobo ame en rik ekwoŋo pire baŋ kwarigi ni ebino miyowa; lobo ame opoŋ i cak kede moo kic dwoŋ iye meicel." 
Joshua5:7 Doŋ itinogi ame en omio me leyo kakargi, en ame Yocwa rik olirogi, pien rik onwoŋo mom ru olirogi, rik mom olirogi iyo." 
Joshua5:8 Kare ame liro rokkono luŋ doŋ otum, gin te bedo i gonygi kannono tuno wan ame jo ocaŋ." 
Joshua5:9 Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Tin doŋ akwanyo lewic me Miciri oko i komwu.” Mannono te miyo olwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Gilgal naka atot tin." 
Joshua5:10 I kare ame jo Icrael pwod tye i Gilgal, gin okwero ecuban me Kato, i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen otyeno, i bar me Jeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Orwo mere a doŋ otyeko kwero ecuban me Kato, i nino-nono ikoome, gin te cako bilo gin ame ocek i lobo-nono, ogati a tobi mom iye kede kai ame ocelo." 
Joshua5:12 I kare ame gin doŋ ocamo gin ame ocek i lobo-nono, odiko mere ocele manna te gik oko; jo Icrael mom dok te medde nwoŋo manna, i mwaka-nono gin doŋ te camo cam ocek i lobo Kanaan." 
Joshua5:13 Kare ame Yocwa onwoŋo tye ceggi i Jeriko, otiŋo waŋe malo te neno dano moro ame onwoŋo omako pala lweny i ciŋe kun tye ocuŋ i nyime. Yocwa te wot naka atot baŋe, te penye ni, “Yin itye tuŋ baŋwa onyo ca tuŋ baŋ okworwa?”" 
Joshua5:14 En te dok iye ni, “Pe gire; cite aman abino acalo atel wi mony a Rwot.” Yocwa te ryebere piny, te wore, te penye ni, “Kara Rwotta mito ciko amiro mere niŋo?”" 
Joshua5:15 Atel-wi mony a Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Gony amuk i tyeni oko, pien kan i cuŋ iye-nono obedo kan acil.” Yocwa daŋ te timo kittono." 
Joshua6:1 I kare-nono onwoŋo rik ocego Jeriko atek meicel, anaka oko mere, me ŋattoro kur donyo oko dok dano daŋ kur dony i yie." 
Joshua6:2 Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Nen, doŋ amio Jeriko oko ciŋi, karacel kede rwottere kede jo luŋ atek i lweny." 
Joshua6:3 Jo luŋ ame romo lweny bino dorre mano boma man tyen acel; ibino bedo timo wunu kittono pi nino abicel. 
Joshua6:4 Olamdog abiro bino mako apel abiro me tuŋ rommi kun owoto kede i nyim canduk. I nino me abiro mere ibino dorre imanno wunu boma man tyen abiro kun olamdog kuto apel. 
Joshua6:5 Kare ame gin okuto tuŋ romo kun ri nakanaka, oyot ka iwinyo wunu opel kun kok kittono, lwak luŋ bino putte i woo kun owo i twon dwonnogo aloŋo; cel me Jeriko bino ŋoye piny luŋ, jo luŋ bino wot iye kun ŋat acel acel tiko nyime atir.”" 
Joshua6:6 Yocwa wot a Nuni te lwoŋo olamdog, te kobbigi ni, “Tiŋ wunu canduk cikere, olamdog abiro mak apel abiro me tuŋ nyogi rommi owot kede i nyim canduk cikere a Rwot.”" 
Joshua6:7 Dok te kobbi lwak ni, “Dorre wunu iwot wunu anyim, iwot iman wunu boma kun jo ame omako jami lweny telo nyim canduk a Rwot.”" 
Joshua6:8 Olamdog abiro te mako apel abiro me tuŋ nyogi rommi telo kede nyim Rwot kun okuto owoto kede anyim, karacel kede canduk cikere a Rwot ame alubo yorgi, kite a rik Yocwa ociko kede lwak." 
Joshua6:9 Jo ame omako jami lweny onwoŋo otelo nyim olamdog ame tye akuto apel eka jo ame odoŋ cen te lubo ŋe canduk kun apel kok nakanaka. 
Joshua6:10 Ento Yocwa dok te ciko lwak ni, “Mom ibino wo wunu, dwonwu daŋ mom myero winyere kadi acel, dok daŋ mom ibino wunu kop kadi acel, tuno i nino ame abino cikowu iye ni doŋ iwo wunu, en amio ite doŋ wo wunu.”" 
Joshua6:11 En doŋ te miyo canduk a Rwot cako mano boma, kun mano tyen acel keken, eka gin gigi te dok i gonygi buto iye." 
Joshua6:12 Yocwa dok te dilo i bayi, olamdog te tiŋo canduk a Rwot." 
Joshua6:13 Olamdog abiro te mako apel abiro me tuŋ rommi telo kede nyim canduk a Rwot kun okuto apel nakanaka owoto kede anyim; jo ame omako jami lweny onwoŋo otelo nyimgi, eka jo ame odoŋ cen te lubo canduk a Rwot, kun apel kok nakanaka." 
Joshua6:14 I nino me aryo daŋ gin te dorre mano boma tyen acel keken, gin gigi te dok i gonygi. Gin te bedo mano boma kittono pi nino abicel." 
Joshua6:15 I nino me abiro mere gin te dilo con atek ame piny pwod awalakino; gin te bedo dorre mano boma i kite acellaca tyen abiro. I nino-nono keken en ame gin omano iye boma tyen abiro. 
Joshua6:16 Tyen me abiro mere, i kare ame olamdog doŋ okuto apel. Yocwa te kobbi jo ni, “Wo wunu doŋ, pien Rwot doŋ omiowa boma oko." 
Joshua6:17 Boma kede jami luŋ a tye iye obino jalo luŋ baŋ Rwot me aneka. Rakab ame alaya keken, kede jo luŋ a tye i ot baŋe, en ame bino bedo kwo; pien en a rik okano jo ame ocwao me roto piny." 
Joshua6:18 Ento wun myero igwokere wunu i kom jami ame doŋ otyeko jalo me aneka, kur dok ikwany wunu ginnoro i kom jami ame doŋ ijalo wunu oko me aneka pi Obaŋa, naka mio gony a jo Icrael doko me aneka luŋ, te kela ayela i komwu." 
Joshua6:19 Ento ryal, kede jabu kede jami luŋ me mola kede me nyonyo, gin luŋ gi-a Rwot acil gin luŋ obino tero i ka kano lim a Rwot.”" 
Joshua6:20 Jo doŋ te wo, opel te kok. Tekki jo winyo apel okok, jo luŋ te putte i woo kun owo i twon dwonnogo aloŋo, eka cel te ŋoye piny luŋ, jo luŋ te donyo i boma kun ŋat acel acel tiko nyime atir, gin te gamo boma-nono oko," 
Joshua6:21 Gin te neko jami luŋ ame tye i boma anaka co kede mon, itino kede odoŋe, dok kede rommi kede kana, gin luŋ ote tyekogi oko i pala lweny." 
Joshua6:22 Yocwa te kobbi jo aryo a rik oroto lobo ni, “Wot wunu naka i ot alaya ca, iwot ikel wunu dako-nono oko, kede jo luŋ ame tye baŋe.”" 
Joshua6:23 Awobe aryo a rik oroto piny te daŋ wot kittono i ot alaya, ote donyo iye, kelo Rakab kede pappere, kede tottere, kede omego mere kede jami mere luŋ a rik tye baŋe; gin okelo wati mere luŋ ote ketogi oko i ŋe gony a jo Icrael." 
Joshua6:24 Eka ote waŋo boma-nono oko i mac, karacel kede jami luŋ ame tye iye; ryal, jabu, kede jami me mola kede nyonyo keken en ame gin oketo i ka kano lim me ot a Rwot." 
Joshua6:25 Yocwa te gwoko kwo a Rakab ame alaya, kede jo me ot a pappere kede jo luŋ a rik tye baŋe. Dako-nono gire te bedo iyi Icrael naka atot tin, pien en okano orot piny ame rik Yocwa ocwao me roto Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Yocwa rik te miyogi kwoŋ i karenaca kun okobo ni, “Dano moro ame bino ya te dok gero boma man me Jeriko, myero cen oko i nyim Rwot. “Bino cano acakki tere kun nwoŋo wode me kao koŋ oto, aco dog cellere en bino guro nwoŋo cogo mere koŋ oto.”" 
Joshua6:27 Rwot rik obedo i Yocwa kittono, nyiŋe orwo i lobo nono luŋ." 
Joshua7:1 Ento jo Icrael mom obedo ogen i kom jami a rik doŋ otyeko jalo pi Rwot, pien Akan wot a Karmi, wot a Jabdi, wot a Jera, me atekere a Juda, obin okwanyo jami mogo ame rik doŋ ojalo oko; omio akemo omako Rwot atek i kom jo Icrael." 
Joshua7:2 Kare ame Yocwa tye i Jeriko ocwao jo me wot Ai, ame ceggi kede Bet-awen, ame tye tuŋ kide me Betel, ocikogi ni, “Wot irot wunu piny.” Jo-nu rik te roto Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Kare ame gin odwogo baŋ Yocwa, gin okobbe ni, “Myero kur imi jowa luŋ wot kuno, mi ka jo a romo tutumia aryo onyo tutumia adek en ame wot lweny i kom jo Ai. Kur iwek jowa luŋ lolle me wot kuno, pien jo-nono mom pol wok.”" 
Joshua7:4 Mannono te miyo jo ame ceggi romo tutumia adek oya i akina lwak te wot kuno, cite gin te wot riŋo oko i nyim jo Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Jo Ai rik te neko jo mogo i akinagi ame ceggi romo pyeradek wie abicel; dok daŋ ote ryemogi cakere i dog cel naka tuno i Cebarim, eka ote nekogi oko i luŋ. Koyo te onnyere atek i cuny jo, kom jo te kwil bala pii." 
Joshua7:6 Yocwa te ye yeco boŋŋi mere oko, te rette piny aryeba cuny i nyim canduk a Rwot, te ri kannono naka otyeno, en karacel kede otel a jo Icrael, kun daŋ oonyo apua i wigi." 
Joshua7:7 Yocwa te kobo ni, “Aman Rwot OBAŊA, piŋo kara ikelo jo man kan i ŋe Jordan, me bino miyowa i ciŋ jo Amor me tyekwa oko? Kono rik giwa oye bedo loka i ŋe Jordan!" 
Joshua7:8 Ama Rwot, kara doŋ akob ŋo ba, kun doŋ jo Icrael oloko ŋegi oko baŋ okworgi!" 
Joshua7:9 Pien ka jo Kanaan kede jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo man bino winyo, gin bino gurowa, eka ote miyo nyiŋwa rwenyo oko i wi lobo; kara yin doŋ ibino tamo gin aŋo pi twon nyiŋi ame dwoŋ wok-ki?”" 
Joshua7:10 Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Ya malo, piŋo kara irette piny aryeba cuny?" 
Joshua7:11 Icrael otimo bal; gin oturo cikka ame acikogi kede, gin okwanyo jami mogo i kom jami ame rik doŋ ojalo oko baŋa. Gin okwalo kwo, okobo kop me goba, eka ote keto jami-nono i akina jamigi." 
Joshua7:12 Pi mannono Icrael mom twero cuŋ kadi acel i nyim okworgi; gin oloko ŋegi baŋ okworgi pien gin doŋ olokere odoko gin ame myero jal me aneka. Mom abino medde bedo kedwu, ka mom ikwanyo wunu gin ame ojalo baŋa oko i akinawu." 
Joshua7:13 Ya doŋ malo imi jo lonyere, ite kobbigi ni, ‘Lonyere wunu kenwu pi diki, pien Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, “Jami ame ojalo baŋa tye i akinawu, wun jo Icrael. Mom itwero cuŋ i nyim okworwu tuno waŋ ame ikwanyo wunu jami ame rik ojalo baŋa oko i akinawu.”" 
Joshua7:14 Pi mannono, diki odiko obino kelowu ceggi kun ibino wunu atekere atekere; doŋ atekere ame Rwot okwanyo bino bino ceggi kun obino i doggola i doggola; eka doggola a dok Rwot okwanyo te bino ceggi kun obino i ot i ot; ot a dok Rwot okwanyo te bino ceggi kun obino dano acel acel." 
Joshua7:15 Ŋat ame Rwot okwanyo ame tye kede jami ame onwoŋo ojalo baŋa, obino waŋo awaŋa kede mac, kun owaŋe karacel kede jami luŋ ame en tye kede, pien en oturo cik a Rwot, dok en otyeko timo tim me lewic iyi Icrael.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 Yocwa rik daŋ te dilo ibayi te kelo jo Icrael ceggi kun kelogi atekere atekere; rik ote kwanyo atekere a Juda. 
Joshua7:17 Yocwa dok te kelo jo me atekere a Juda, eka ote kwanyo doggola a Jera, ote dok kelo doggola a Jera ceggi, kun okelogi acel acel, eka ote kwanyo Jabdi." 
Joshua7:18 Dok ote kela jo me doggola a Jabdi acel acel, ote kwanyo Akan wot a Kamri, wot a Jabdi, wot a Jera ame tye i atekere a Juda." 
Joshua7:19 Yocwa te kobbi Akan ni, “Woda, mi kwogo baŋ Obaŋa a jo Icrael, dok daŋ ipake, me ititta amanni gin ame doŋ itio; kur imuŋa.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akan te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Me ateni, an abalo baŋ Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael; gin ame rik atimo ene;" 
Joshua7:21 i kare ame rik aneno boŋo moro aber ame oya i Cinar kun tye i akina jami ame oyako, kede cekel me ryal mia aryo, kede jabu moro ame pekkere romo cekel pyerabic, ate cako bedo i miti komgi, omio ate kwanyogi oko. Nen ba, tye ayikogi piny i lobo i kemana, ryal daŋ tye i tergi piny kuno.”" 
Joshua7:22 Yocwa doŋ te cwayo kwena, gin te ŋwec i kema mere; nen ba, gin te nwoŋo tye okano i kema mere, kun ryal tye i tere piny." 
Joshua7:23 Gin te kwanyo oko i kema, ote ke lo baŋ Yocwa kede baŋ jo Icrael luŋ, gin te keto piny i nyim Rwot." 
Joshua7:24 Yocwa kede jo Icrael luŋ te tero Akan wot a Jera kede ryal, kede boŋo kede jabu kede itino awobe kede anyira, kede twoni kane kede rommi, kema mere kede jami mere ducu, ote tero i luŋ me Akor." 
Joshua7:25 Yocwa te kobo ni, “Piŋo kara ikelo can i komwa? Rwot bino keto can i komi tin.” Jo Icrael luŋ te na napo en kede gweŋe." 
Joshua7:26 Gin te coko gweŋe apipim yido i kome ame pwod tye naka atot tin. Twon akemo ame rik onwoŋo omako Rwot te kwe oko. Mannono omio ote lwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni, “Luŋ me Akor”, naka atot tin." 
Joshua8:1 Rwot okobbi Yocwa ni, “Kur ilwor, cunyi daŋ kur poti, ya, iwot Ai, ter jo luŋ a romo lweny. Nen ba, atyeko doŋ miyo Rwot me Ai i ciŋi karacel kede jo mere luŋ kede boma mere kede lobo mere." 
Joshua8:2 Gin ame ibino timo i kom Ai kede rwottere, bino bedo a rom aroma i en ame itimo i kom Jeriko kede rwottere; ento jami mere ame iyako wunu kede limmere akwo ibino tero wunu me bedo megwu. Wot ikan wunu jo mogo imi pon i ŋe boma.”" 
Joshua8:3 Yocwa te ya karacel kede jo luŋ me romo, me wot Ai. Rik te yero jo atek i lweny tutumia pyeradek, te cwayogi wot dyewor." 
Joshua8:4 Ocikogi ni, “Nen ba, wun ibino pono wunu i ŋe boma, myero kur ibed wunu abor meicel i boma. Wun luŋ myero ibed ame iyikere wunu." 
Joshua8:5 Aco an karacel kede jo luŋ ame tye baŋa, wan obino wot aceggi acega i boma. Ka ce gin bino donyo me lweny kedwa bala riki, wan obino ŋwec oko i nyimgi." 
Joshua8:6 Gin bino donyo me ryemowa, pien gin bino kobo ni, ‘Gin dok tye ariŋowa bala riki.’ Wan obino riŋogi kittono," 
Joshua8:7 wun doŋ ite ya wunu i kan ame ipono wunu iye, ite mako wunu boma oko; pien Rwot Obaŋawu bino miyo boma-nono i ciŋwu." 
Joshua8:8 Ka doŋ ityeko mako wunu boma, myero iwaŋ wunu oko, kun itimo wunu kite a Rwot okobo. Nen ba, an doŋ atyeko cikowu.”" 
Joshua8:9 Yocwa te cwayogi, eka gin te wot kan amyero gin wot pon iye, gin te wot bedo i akina Betel kede Ai kun obedo tuŋ to me Ai, ento Yocwa te buto i akina lwak i dyeworrono." 
Joshua8:10 Yocwa rik te dilo i bal, te ŋiyo jo, te doŋ wot i Ai karacel kede odoŋe a jo Icrael kun en telo nyim jo." 
Joshua8:11 Jo luŋ a romo lweny a rik tye baŋe owoto; gin rik ote wot a ceggi i boma, ote guro kemagi tuŋ anyarodi me Ai, kun luŋ tye i akinagi kede Ai." 
Joshua8:12 En te kwanyo jo aceggi romo tutumia abic, te miyogi pono i akina Betel kede Ai, i tuŋ to me boma." 
Joshua8:13 Gin rik te ryeyo mony kittono; mony adwoŋŋere rik te bedo i tuŋ anyarodi, eka mony i cennere te bedo tutuŋ to me boma. Ento Yocwa rik te buto i luŋ i dyeworrono." 
Joshua8:14 I kare ame rwot me Ai oneno man, en karacel kede jo mere, ame gin jo me boma-nono, gin rik te ru wot oko odiko con i luŋ ame tye tutuŋ Araba me wot lweny i jo Icrael; cite en mom oŋeo ni okwor tye opono i ŋe boma," 
Joshua8:15 Yocwa kede jo Icrael te bwologi calo jo ame oloo, ote riŋo kun odok tutuŋ tim." 
Joshua8:16 Jo Ai te lwoŋo jo luŋ i boma me ryemogi; pi ryemo Yocwa omio oterogi teŋe kannabor i boma. 
Joshua8:17 Lo moro ame ico rik mom te doŋ i Ai kede i Betel, ame mom owoto ryemo jo Icrael, gin oweko bomagi twolo ote ryemo jo Icrael." 
Joshua8:18 Rwot te ciko Yocwa ni, “Rye toŋ aliro ame tye i ciŋi-nu tuŋ Ai, pien abino miyo Ai i ciŋi.”" 
Joshua8:19 Jo ame opono rik te ru ya oyotoyot i kabedogi; oyot ame Yocwa oryeo ciŋe malo, gin te ru donyo i boma, ote mako oko, ote daŋ ru waŋo oko." 
Joshua8:20 Kare ame jo Ai oneno ŋegi, nen yito me boma doŋ tye aduny malo i polo. Ka riŋo te loyogi oko tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, pien jo ame rik oriŋo tuŋ tim olokere oko i kom jo ame rik aryemogi." 
Joshua8:21 Kare ame Yocwa kede jo Icrael doŋ oneno ni jo ame rik opono doŋ omako boma oko, dok daŋ yito me boma daŋ tye aduny malo, gin te lokere dwogo cen neko jo Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Jo ocele daŋ te ya i boma bino i komgi, jo Icrael doŋ te gurogi dyere, man tuŋŋi, jo ocele tuŋ ca. Jo Icrael te nekogi ame moro mom obwot, mom daŋ olwi." 
Joshua8:23 Cite Rwot me Ai ote mako akwo tero baŋ Yocwa. 
Joshua8:24 Kare ame jo Icrael doŋ otyeko neko jo luŋ me Ai i dye bar kan ame onwoŋo gin oryemogi iye, kun gin luŋ doŋ otum oko i pala lweny ame moro mom obwot, jo Icrael luŋ te dok i Ai, te wot tyekogi oko i pala lweny." 
Joshua8:25 Jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i Ai oto i ninonono, co kede mon, welgi rik romo tutumia apar wie aryo." 
Joshua8:26 Yocwa mom odwoko ciŋe piny ame rik eryeo malo kun toŋ aliro tye iye, naka ka oneko jo luŋ ame bedo i Ai." 
Joshua8:27 Lim akwo keken kede jami luŋ ame oyako i boma-nono en ame jo Icrael otero me bedo megi kun olubo kop a Rwot ame rik eciko kede Yocwa. 
Joshua8:28 Yocwa rik daŋ te waŋo Ai kittono, te balo ame te miyo wi odur yido iye atata naka atot tin." 
Joshua8:29 Rik en te ŋabo rwot me Ai i kom yat naka otyeno; kare ame ceŋ doŋ amito poto, Yocwa te ciko ni kwany kome doŋ oko i kom yat, me bol kan ame odonyo kede i boma. Gin te coko gweŋe apipim yido i kome, ame pwod tye kuno naka atot tin." 
Joshua8:30 Yocwa te canni Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael keno lam i wi kidi me Ebal," 
Joshua8:31 kite ame Muca amiro a Rwot rik ociko kede jo Icrael, acalo ocoo i buk me cik a Muca ni, “Keno lam ame oyiko i kidi ame mom opao, ame dano moro daŋ mom otiŋo nyonyo moro me tiyo.” Gin te miyo iye mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny." 
Joshua8:32 Dok daŋ i nyim jo Icrael kuno, en rik te medo coyo cik a Muca. I kom kidi kite a rik Muca ocoo kede ikokome." 
Joshua8:33 Jo Icrael luŋ, wele ame bedo i akinagi karacel kede anywali me Icrael, odoŋe, otel kede oŋolkopgi ocuŋ tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi i ŋet canduk i nyim olamdog ame gin jo Levi ame otiŋo canduk me cikere a Rwot, kun nucugi tye i nyim kidi me Gerijim kede nucugi i nyim kidi me Ebal, kite acalo Muca amiro a Rwot rik ogeo ciko ni myero gin lammi jo Icrael winyo." 
Joshua8:34 Icennere ote kwano kop me cikkono luŋ, kop me gum kede kop me ceno jo, kite ame ocoo kede i buk me cik." 
Joshua8:35 Mom tye kopporo ame Muca rik ociko a mom Yocwa okwano i nyim cokere a jo Icrael luŋ, karacel kede mon kede itino kede orok ame bedo i akinagi." 
Joshua9:1 Kare ame obakki luŋ ame onwoŋo rik tye i ŋe Jordan, lobo ame obedo kidikidi kede lobo ame tye piny i dog Nam Adwoŋ ame otikere kede Lebanon, jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Periji, jo Kivi kede jo Jebuc owinyo," 
Joshua9:2 gin ocokere karacel kede cuny acel me lweny i kom Yocwa kede jo Icrael. 
Joshua9:3 Ento jo Gibeon ka owinyo, gin ame Yocwa otimo i kom Jeriko kede Ai," 
Joshua9:4 gin ote ŋolo megi ryeko. Gin oyiko peke me konyogi iyo, ote keto icao ame oti meicel i wi kanegi, kede opoko koŋo a daŋ oti oko, kun oyec dok daŋ okwo akwoa." 
Joshua9:5 Gin te ruko daŋ amuke ame oti i tyengi kun daŋ odadapo, kede boŋŋigi daŋ oti oko; pekegi luŋ onwoŋo otwo dok daŋ opuro atek." 
Joshua9:6 Gin rik te wot baŋ Yocwa i gony ame onwoŋo tye i Gilgal, gin te kobbe karacel kede co ocele me Icrael ni, “Wan obino i lobo abor meicel, aman doŋ cikere wunu kedwa kede cikkogo.”" 
Joshua9:7 Ento jo Icrael te kobbi jo Kivi ni, “Aŋar ca ibedo wunu iyi akinawa, kara enno ote ote cikere kedwu niŋo ba?”" 
Joshua9:8 Gin te gamo kop a Yocwa ni, “Wan giwa obedo omironi.” Yocwa te penyogi ni, “Kara doŋ ibedo wunu jo mene? Iya wunu ce i tuŋ kwene?”" 
Joshua9:9 Gin te dokke ni, “Wan omironi oya i kuŋ abor meicel pi nyin Rwot Obaŋawu, pien wan owinyo pire karacel kede ginnoro luŋ ame en otimo i Miciri," 
Joshua9:10 karacel kede ginnoro luŋ ame en otimo i kom obakki aryo me a jo Amor a rik onwoŋo tye i ŋe Jordan. Cikon abaka ame bedo Kecbon, kede Og abaka ame bedo i Bacan ame yam bedo i Aciterot." 
Joshua9:11 Odoŋe kede jo luŋ ame bedo i lobowa ocikowa ni, ‘Mak wunu peke me iwot wunu iyo, wot irwatte wunu kedgi, kobbigi ni, “Wan omirowu, aman doŋ cikere wunu kedwa kede cikkogo.” ’" 
Joshua9:12 Ogatiwa ene; i kare ame okwanyo i udiwa me acamawa iyo, i nino ame wan oya kede i paco, onwoŋo gire pwod lyet; aman koŋ inen, doŋ otwo oko daŋ opuro oko." 
Joshua9:13 Opoko koŋwa-ni daŋ onwoŋo pwod nyen i kare ame opiko koŋwa iye; nen aman doŋ ototoa oko; boŋŋiwa kede amuke me tyenwa daŋ doŋ oyeyeca oko pi wot abor meicel.” 
Joshua9:14 Jo te camo pekegi kun mom koŋ openyo Rwot. 
Joshua9:15 Yocwa te yiko kop me bedo kedgi i kuc, kun daŋ cikere kedgi, me wekogi bedo; otel a lwak te kwoŋ baŋgi." 
Joshua9:16 Kare ame nino pwod okato adek keken, a gin doŋ ocikere kedgi oko, jo Icrael te winyo ni gin tye cok kedgi dok daŋ obedo i akinagi." 
Joshua9:17 Jo Icrael te cako wot ote tuno i bomagi i nino me adekkere. Bomagi onwoŋo Gibeon, Kepira, Beerot kede Kiriat-yearim," 
Joshua9:18 Cite jo Icrael mom te nekogi pien otel a lwak onwoŋo okwoŋo baŋgi i nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael; man omio lwak oŋuŋura i kom otelgi. 
Joshua9:19 Otel luŋ te kobbi lwak luŋ ni, “Wan otyeko kwoŋ baŋgi i nyin Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, doŋ pi man no myero kur igudgi wunu." 
Joshua9:20 Gin ame obino timo i komgi ene, wan obino wekogi obedo kwo, me akemo kur pot i komwa pi kwoŋ ame wan okwoŋo baŋgi.”" 
Joshua9:21 Odoŋe ocikogi ni, “Wek wunugi obed kwo.” Mano te miyo gin doko obar yen kede otwom pii a lwak luŋ, kite ame otel obedo kobo kede i komgi." 
Joshua9:22 Yocwa olwoŋogi te kobbigi ni, Piŋo kara ibwola wunu ni, “Wan otye kannabor meicel kedwu,” kun ibedo wunu i akinawa?" 
Joshua9:23 Pi mannono doŋ ocenowu oko, jo ocele i akinawu bino bedo obar yen, kede otwom pii pi ot Obaŋa." 
Joshua9:24 Gin te dokki Yocwa ni, “Pien onwoŋo otitti omironi atira kite ame Rwot Obaŋawu ociko kede amiro mere Muca me miyowu lobo-ni luŋ, kede rwenyo jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo ame tye i nyimwu. Mannono okelliwa lworo meicel i komwa kede i kom kwowa, en omio ote timo kittono." 
Joshua9:25 Aman doŋ ba, wan giwa otye i ciŋi; yin doŋ tim kite ame ineno ni ber dok daŋ oporre me atima i komwa.”" 
Joshua9:26 Gin ame en doŋ te timo ene, en olarogi i ciŋ jo Icrael; gin mom te nekogi." 
Joshua9:27 Cite i nino-nono en te miyogi doko omwod yen kede otwom pi i a lwak kede me keno lam a Rwot, tuno naka atot tin, i kabedo ame en oyero." 
Joshua10:1 I kare ame Adoni-jedek rwot me Jerucalem owinyo kite ame Yocwa omako kede Ai, eka te neko jo luŋ aluŋa, kun timo Ai kite ame otimo kede Jeriko kede rwottere; kede ka dok owinyo kite ame jo ame bedo i Gibeon oyiko kop me bedo i kuc i jo Icrael, kun gin obedo i akinagi," 
Joshua10:2 lworo omakogi meicel. Pien Gibeon rik boma adit ame rom aroma i boma ame Rwot bedo iye, dok daŋ onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel kato Ai oko, dok co iye luŋ daŋ onwoŋo jo atek." 
Joshua10:3 Mano te miyo Adoni-jedek rwot me Jerucalem ocwao kwena baŋ Oam rwot me Kebron, Piram rwot me Yarmut, Yapia rwot me Lakic, kede Debir me Eglon kun kobbigi ni," 
Joshua10:4 “Biye ikonya wunu, me olweny i kom jo Gibeon, pien gin oyiko kop me bedo i kuc baŋ Yocwa kede jo Icrael.”" 
Joshua10:5 Eka rwode abic me jo Amor, rwot me Jerucalem, rwot me Kebron, rwot me Yarmut, rwot me Lakic kede me Eglon te cokere karacel, ote wot i monygi luŋ, wot guro Gibeon, lweny i kome." 
Joshua10:6 Jo Gibeon te cwayo kwena baŋ Yocwa i gony me Gilgal, kun kobbe ni, “Kur ikwany ciŋi oko i kom omironi, ru bino baŋwa, ilarwa, ikonywa, pien rwode a jo Amor luŋ ame bedo i lobo obedo kidikidi ocokere i komwa.”" 
Joshua10:7 Yocwa karacel kede jo me lweny te ya i Gilgal i jo luŋ ame tek i lweny. 
Joshua10:8 Rwot ociko Yocwa ni, “Kur ilworgi, pien atyeko doŋ miyogi oko i ciŋi; mom tye lo moro ame bino cuŋ i nyimi.”" 
Joshua10:9 Yocwa te ru bino oko i komgi, kun oya i Gilgal te wot dyewor benebene." 
Joshua10:10 Rwot te babaŋogi oko i nyim jo Icrael, gin te nekogi atek i Gibeon, ote ryemogi i yo ame dok malo tutuŋ Bet-koron; gin te nekogi naka i Ajeka kede Makkeda." 
Joshua10:11 I kare ame gin tye ariŋo oko i nyim jo Icrael, kun oluŋere i luŋ me Bet-koron, Rwot te cocoro twoni gweŋe mogo adoŋodoŋo i komgi ame oya i polo tuno naka i Ajeka twal, gin te to oko. Wel jo ame pee oneko obedo bup meicel kato en ame jo Icrael oneko i pala lweny." 
Joshua10:12 I kare-nono Yocwa te kop i Rwot i nino ame Rwot omio iye jo Amor i ciŋ jo Icrael; en te kop kede kun jo Icrael winyo, ni, “Yin ceŋ koŋ icuŋ i Gebeon, kede yin dwe daŋ cuŋ i luŋ me Aijalon.”" 
Joshua10:13 Ceŋ daŋ te cuŋ karacel, dwe daŋ olirakino kakare ituno ka rokwa oculo kwor i kom okworgi. Man mom ocoo i buk a Jacar? Ceŋ obir i dye polo, kun mom poto oyotoyot pi nino ame buco romo acel twal." 
Joshua10:14 Mom ru onen nino moro a rom i nino-nono cakere con tuno kede naka i kare man, ame Rwot owinyo iye dwon dano; pien Rwot olwenyo pi Icrael." 
Joshua10:15 Yocwa te dwogo karacel i jo Icrael luŋ i gony me Gilgal. 
Joshua10:16 Rwode abic te riŋo wot pono i gorogoro kidi me Makkeda. 
Joshua10:17 Jo te titti Yocwa ni, “Rwode abiccono onwonogi opono i gorogoro kidi i Makkeda.”" 
Joshua10:18 Yocwa te dok iye ni, “Lor wunu kiddi adoŋo oko i dog gorogoro, ket wunu jo i ŋete me gwokgi." 
Joshua10:19 Cite wun kur ibed wunu kuno, wun ryem wunu okworwu, lweny wunu i jo ame odoŋ cen kur imigi odony i bomagi; pien Rwot Obaŋawu otyeko miyogi i ciŋwu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Kare a doŋ jo Icrael onekogi atek meicel, gin doŋ te tum oko, jo ame obwot i akinagi olaro boma mogo ame ocelo atek." 
Joshua10:21 Jo luŋ te dwogo i kuc baŋ Yocwa i gony i Makkeda; mom tye dano moro ame oŋamo doge i kom dano moro me Icrael. 
Joshua10:22 Kare ame man doŋ otum, Yocwa te ciko jo ni, “Yab wunu doŋ dog gorogoro kidi, me iwot wunu rwode abiccono oko i gorogoro i kelgi wunu baŋa.”" 
Joshua10:23 Gin daŋ te timo amannono, ote wotto rwode abic ca oko i gorogoro, ote tero baŋ Yocwa; otero rwot me Jerucalem, rwot me Kebron, rwot me Yarmut, rwot me Lakic kede rwot me Eglon." 
Joshua10:24 Kare ame gin doŋ okelo rwode abiccono baŋ Yocwa, Yocwa te lwoŋo co luŋ me Icrael, te ciko otel wi mony a rik owoto kede ni, “Bye wunu kan, me ibin icib wunu tyenwu i ŋut rwode magi.” Gin daŋ te bino cibo tyengi i ŋutgi." 
Joshua10:25 Yocwa te kobbigi ni, “Kur ibed wunu alwor, cunywu daŋ kur poti, cuŋ wunu atek kun cunywu nwaŋ, pien Rwot bino timo kittono i kom okworwu luŋ ame ilweny wunu kedgi.”" 
Joshua10:26 Icennere Yocwa dok te cocobogi nekogi oko, te ŋabo komgi i wi yen abic, komgi te ri i wi yen naka otyeno." 
Joshua10:27 Kare ame ceŋ doŋ mito poto, Yocwa te ciko ni myero kwany komgi oko i kom yen, bol i gorogoro kiddi ame rik gin opono iye; ote coko gweŋe adoŋodoŋo yido i dog gorogoro kidi-nono, ame daŋ pwod tye kuno naka onyoni." 
Joshua10:28 I nino-nono Yocwa te mayo boma me Makkeda, te neko jo luŋ karacel kede rwottere i pala lweny; ojwero jo luŋ a tye iye ame moro mom obwot. Otimo rwot Makkeda kite a rik otimo kede rwot me Jeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Yocwa te ya oko i Makkeda karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ, te kato i Libina te wot lweny i jo Libina." 
Joshua10:30 Rwot dok te miyo jo-nono karacel kede rwodegi i ciŋ jo Icrael, gin te nekogi luŋ i pala lweny, moro mom obwot. Otimo rwot me Libina kite ame rik otimo kede abaka me Jeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Yocwa te dok ya oko i Libna karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te kato i Lakic; gin te wot guro oko, ote lweny i komgi." 
Joshua10:32 Rwot te miyo Lakic i ciŋ jo Icrael; i nino me aryo gin te mayo Lakic oko. Gin te neko jo iye luŋ i pala lweny, kite ame otimo kede i kom Libna." 
Joshua10:33 Oram ame obedo rwot me Gejer te bino konyo jo Lakic, Yocwa te neke oko karacel i jo mere luŋ, naka moro mom obwot." 
Joshua10:34 Yocwa dok te kato karacel i jo Icrael luŋ, oya oko i Lakic ote wot Eglon. Gin oguro ote daŋ lweny i komgi." 
Joshua10:35 Gin te mako Eglon i ninonono, ote neko jo iye luŋ i pala lweny. I nino-nono ojwero jo luŋ iye, kite ame rik otimo i kom Lakic." 
Joshua10:36 Yocwa karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te ya oko Eglon, te wot i Kebron, ote wot lweny i komgi." 
Joshua10:37 Gin ogamo ote jwero jo luŋ i pala lweny, kede rwottere, boma mere luŋ, kede jo mere, moro mom odoŋ, kite ame otimo kede Eglon, ojwero luŋ, anaka jo ame bedo iye." 
Joshua10:38 Yocwa te doŋ dwogo cen i Debir karacel i jo Icrael luŋ, te ero lweny kedgi," 
Joshua10:39 te gamo oko karacel kede abaka mere, kede boma mere luŋ. Gin te neko jo iye luŋ i pala lweny, ote daŋ jwero jo luŋ ame bedo iye, moro mom obwot kite ame rik otimo i kom Kebron, Libna kede obakki mege, en a daŋ otimo i kom Debir kede rwottere." 
Joshua10:40 Yocwa rik te loyo lobo luŋ kittono, lobo obedo kidikidi, kede Negeb, lobo i piny kede lobo otiŋere malo, karacel kede rwodegi luŋ; mom oweko moro odoŋ, ento orweo jami ame iye luŋ aluŋa, kite ame Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael onwoŋo ociko." 
Joshua10:41 Yocwa oloogi cakere i Kadec-barnea tuno kede naka i Gaja, kede i lobo me Gocen luŋ tuno kede i Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Yocwa omako rwodegi luŋ karacel kede lobogi daŋ, pien Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael olwenyo pi jo Icrael." 
Joshua10:43 Icennere Yocwa te dwogo doŋ i gony ame tye i Gilgal karacel i jo Icrael luŋ. 
Joshua11:1 Kare ame Jabin rwot me Kacor owinyo, ocwao kwena baŋ Yabab rwot me Madon, kede baŋ rwot me Cimron, kede rwot me Akcap," 
Joshua11:2 kede rwode luŋ i lobo obedo kidikidi ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ anyarodi, kede i Araba tuŋ anyarolum kede Kinerot, i lobo i piny, kede i Naptor-dor tuŋ to," 
Joshua11:3 kede baŋ Kanaan ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ kide, kede tuŋ to, jo Amor, jo Kitti, kede jo Periji, karacel kede jo Jebuc ame bedo i lobo obedo kidikidi, kede jo Kivi ame tye i Kermon i lobo me Micpa." 
Joshua11:4 Gin te bino i monygi luŋ, twon monnyoro adwoŋ meicel, ame pol calo kwoyo me dog nam, kun otye aguragura kede gadigadi lweny apol ata." 
Joshua11:5 Obakki luŋ te cokere karacel, ote bino guro gonygi i ŋet pii me Merom me gin olweny i jo Icrael." 
Joshua11:6 Rwot ociko Yocwa ni, “Kur ilworgi, pien diki i kodi cawa-ni abino miyogi luŋ baŋ jo Icrael kun doŋ onekogi oko; ibino wunu ŋoŋolo odoŋe aguraguragi, dok ibino wunu waŋo gadigadi oko i mac.”" 
Joshua11:7 Yocwa karacel kede jo mere luŋ me lweny te ru bino oko i komgi i ŋet pii me Meron eka ote poto oko i komgi. 
Joshua11:8 Rwot te miyogi i ciŋ jo Icrael ame te nekogi, te daŋ ryemogi tuno naka i Cidon Adwoŋ kede i Micerepotmaim, dok tuŋ kide tuno naka i luŋ me Micpa; te neko jo luŋ, moro mom obwot." 
Joshua11:9 Yocwa daŋ te timo kite ame Rwot ocike kede; oŋoŋolo odoŋe aguraguragi te daŋ waŋo gadigadigi oko i mac. 
Joshua11:10 I kare-nono Yocwa doŋ te dwogo cen, te gamo Kajor, te neko rwottere oko i pala lweny, pien Kajor rik onwoŋo boma adit, kabedo ame rik loo i lobonono luŋ." 
Joshua11:11 Gin te neko jo iye luŋ i pala lweny, kun ojwero luŋ aluŋa, ame ŋattoro awe mom odoŋ iye, eka ote waŋo Kajor oko i mac." 
Joshua11:12 Yocwa rik te mayo boma a rwode-nogo luŋ, karacel kede rwodegi te nekogi oko i pala lweny kun jwerogi luŋ aluŋa, kite ame Muca amiro a Rwot onwoŋo rik ociko." 
Joshua11:13 Cite mom owaŋo boma moro ame onwoŋo ogero i wi tur, kono Kajor keken, en ame Yocwa owaŋo." 
Joshua11:14 Jami ayaka luŋ me boma-nono ducu, kede lim akwo, jo Icrael otero me bedo megi. Cite co luŋ gin oneko oko i pala lweny, tuno ka otyekogi, moro awe mom oweko odoŋ." 
Joshua11:15 Kite a rik Rwot ociko kede amiro mere Muca, Muca daŋ ociko Yocwa kittono, Yocwa te daŋ tiyo. I kom gin luŋ a Rwot rik ociko i Muca, mom tye moro ame Yocwa oweko a mom ocobo." 
Joshua11:16 Yocwa rik te mayo lobo-nono luŋ, lobo ame obedo kidikidi, Negeb luŋ, lobo Gocen, lobo a piny," 
Joshua11:17 cakere i kidi Kalak ame otiŋere odok tuŋ Ceir tuno kede i Baal-dag i luŋ me Lebanon i te kidi Kermon. Omako rwode luŋ, ococobogi, te nekogi oko," 
Joshua11:18 Yocwa obedo lweny i rwode-nono luŋ pi kare alalac. 
Joshua11:19 Boma moro oporo kop me kuc i jo Icrael obedo pe, kono ka Kivi keken ame onwoŋo obedo i Gibeon; omakogi luŋ i lweny." 
Joshua11:20 Pien mano rik obedo tic a Rwot me miyo cunygi bedo nwaŋ ibino lweny i kom jo Icrael, me wek jwergi oko luŋ, kur timgi kica, ento tyekgi oko kite a rik Rwot ociko i Muca." 
Joshua11:21 I kare-nono Yocwa te bino weyo jo Anak oko i lobo obedo kidikidi i Kebron, Debir, Anab, kede lobo Juda luŋ ame obedo kidikidi, kede lobo Icrael luŋ ame obedo kidikidi. Yocwa ojwerogi luŋ, karacel kede bomagi luŋ." 
Joshua11:22 Mom tye ŋattoro ame odoŋ i lobo a jo Icrael i kom jo Anak, gin odoŋ ka i Gaja, i Gat kede i Acidod." 
Joshua11:23 Yocwa rik te mayo lobo luŋ kittono, kun lubo kop luŋ ame rik Rwot ociko baŋ Muca. Yocwa te miyo jo Icrael te doko megi kite ame opoko kede atekere atekere. Icennere doŋ lobo te kwe, lweny daŋ doŋ te bedo mom." 
Joshua12:1 Magi gin rwode ame rik tye i lobo ame rik jo Icrael oloo, eka ote leyo lobogi i ne Jordan tuŋ kide, anaka i luŋ me Aŋon tuno kede i kidi me Kermon, karacel kede Araba tuŋ kide luŋ:" 
Joshua12:2 Cikon abaka a jo Amor ame onwoŋo bedo Kecbon, kun loccere cakere i Areor ame tye i dog luŋ me Amnon, kede dok cakere i dye luŋ tuno kede i kulo me Jabok, ame en wan lobo a jo Ammon, man nucu lobo me Gilead," 
Joshua12:3 kede dok cakere i Araba tuno i nam me Kinerot tuŋ kide, kede tuŋ Bet-yecimot tuno kede i nam me Araba, ame en Nam me Kado dok kede ŋtutuŋ anyarolum tuno kede i kidi me Piciga." 
Joshua12:4 Kede dok abaka me Baca, en ŋat acel i akina jo odoŋ i kom jo Repa, ame bedo i Aciterot kede Edrei," 
Joshua12:5 kun loo kidi me Kermon, kede Caleka kede Bacan luŋ tuno kede i waŋ lobo a jo Gecur kede Maaka, kede nucu lobo Gilead tuno kede i waŋ lobo a Cikon abaka ame bedo Kecbon." 
Joshua12:6 Muca amiro a Rwot te miyo lobo-nono luŋ baŋ jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu atekere a jo Manace, me bedo megi." 
Joshua12:7 Magi gin rwode ame lobo-nono ame Yocwa karacel kede jo Icrael oloo i ŋe Jordan tuŋ to, cakere i Baal-gad me Lebanon tuno i kidi me Kalak ame otiŋere odok tuŋ Ceir; doŋ daŋ Yocwa te miyo lobogi-nono baŋ atekere me Icrael, me bedo megi, kun wopo kite ame onwoŋo opokkigi kede," 
Joshua12:8 i lobo ame obedo kidikidi, i lobo a piny i Araba, i lobo ame otiŋere, i tim kede i Negeb, lobo a jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Periji, jo Kivi kede jo Jebuc:" 
Joshua12:9 rwot me Jeriko, rwot me Ai, ame tye i ŋet Betel;" 
Joshua12:10 rwot me Jerucalem, rwot me Kedron," 
Joshua12:11 rwot me Yarmut, rwot me Jerucalem," 
Joshua12:12 rwot me Eglon, rwot me Gejer," 
Joshua12:13 rwot me Debir, rwot me Geder;" 
Joshua12:14 rwot me Korma, rwot me Arad;" 
Joshua12:15 rwot me Libna; rwot me Adullam," 
Joshua12:16 rwot me Makkeda, rwot me Betel;" 
Joshua12:17 rwot me Tappuak, rwot me Keper;" 
Joshua12:18 rwot me Apek, rwot me Lacaron;" 
Joshua12:19 rwot me Madon, rwot me Kajor;" 
Joshua12:20 rwot me Cimron-meron, rwot me Akcap;" 
Joshua12:21 rwot me Taanak, rwot me Megido;" 
Joshua12:22 rwot me Kedec, rwot me Yokneam i Karmel;" 
Joshua12:23 rwot me Dor i Napat-dor, rwot me Goyim i Galilaya;" 
Joshua12:24 rwot me Tirja: gin luŋ rwode pyeradek wie acel. 
Joshua13:1 I kare ame Yocwa doŋ oti, ame mwaka me dittere doŋ bup, Rwot okobbe ni, “Nen ba, yin doŋ iti, dok mwaka me ditti doŋ bup, ento lobo ame myero bed megwu pwod odoŋ abup." 
Joshua13:2 Lobo ame pwod odoŋ ene: lobo me Priciti luŋ kede me a jo Gecur luŋ," 
Joshua13:3 cakere i kulo me Cikor ame tye tuŋ kide me Miciri, dok kede tuŋ anyarodi, tuno naka i waŋ lobo me Ekron; magi luŋ okwano baŋ jo Kanaan. Rwode a jo Piriciti tye abic, me Gaja, Acidod, Acikelon, Gat, kede Ekron; kede lobo a jo Ayi." 
Joshua13:4 Aco i tuŋ anyarolum tye lobo a jo Kanaan luŋ, kede Meara ame obedo me ajo Cidon tuno kede naka i Apek, kato i waŋ lobo a jo Amor," 
Joshua13:5 kede lobo a jo Gebal, kede Lebanon luŋ i tuŋ kide, cakere i Baal-gad ame tye i te kidi me Keromon, i dog yo ame woto Kamat;" 
Joshua13:6 jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo ame obedo kidikidi, cakere i Lebanon wot kede i Micrepot-maim; mano Cidon luŋ. An ikoma abino ryemogi i nyim jo Icrael; ento yin pok lobo baŋ jo Icrael obed megi gin oleo, kite ame aciki kede." 
Joshua13:7 Pi mannono, aman yin doŋ myero ipok lobo man baŋ atekere aboŋwen, kede baŋ nucu me atekere a Manace, obed megi.”" 
Joshua13:8 Jo Reuben kede jo Gad karacel kede nucu me atekere a Manace ocele otyeko nwoŋo lobo ame gin bino leyo me bedo megi ame rik Muca omiogi loka Jordan tuŋ kide, kite a rik Muca amiro a Rwot omiogi:" 
Joshua13:9 cakere i Areor ame tye i dog luŋ me Amon, kede boma ame tye i dye luŋŋono, karacel kede lobo luŋ me Medeba, ame otiŋere, opette, tuno naka i Dijon;" 
Joshua13:10 kede boma a Cikon abaka a jo Amor, ame en obedo abaka me Kecbon, tuno i waŋ lobo a jo Ammon;" 
Joshua13:11 kede Gilead, kede lobo a jo Gecur kede jo Maaka, kede kidi Kermon luŋ, kede Bacan luŋ tuno kede i Caleka;" 
Joshua13:12 kede lobo abaka Og luŋ ame loo lobo Bacan kun bedo i Aciterot kede Edrei; en kene ame rik odoŋ i akina jo Repa. Muca onwoŋo oloo magi, te daŋ mayo lobogi oko." 
Joshua13:13 Cite jo Icrael rik mom oryemo jo Gecur kede jo Maaka. Jo Gecur kede jo Maaka pwod bedo i akina jo Icrael naka atot tin. 
Joshua13:14 Atekere a jo Levi keken en ame Muca rik mom omio dul lobo moro me bedo megi; gin ame obedo megi, obedo mot ame owaŋo i mac baŋ Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, kite ame rik okobbe kede." 
Joshua13:15 Muca rik omio lobo me alea baŋ jo Reuben kun lubo doggolagi. 
Joshua13:16 Lobogi rik ocakere i Areor ame tye i dog luŋ me Amon, kede boma ame tye i dye luŋ nono kede lobo luŋ i ŋet Medeba, ame otiŋere, opette;" 
Joshua13:17 karacel kede Kecbon kede boma mere ducu ame tye i lobo otiŋere, opette; Dibon, Bamot-baal, Bet-baal-meon," 
Joshua13:18 Yakac, Kedemot, Mapaat," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriataim, Cibma kede Yeret-cakar i wi kidi me luŋ nono," 
Joshua13:20 kede Bet-peor, kor kidi me Piciga, kede Bet-yecimot," 
Joshua13:21 gin boma luŋ me lobo ame otiŋere, opette, kede lobo a Cikon abaka me Amor luŋ ame rik obedo abaka me Kecbon, ame Muca oloo karacel kede otel me Midian, Evi, Rekem, Cur, Kur, kede Repa, ame gin obedo rwode a jo Cikon ame bedo i lobo-nono." 
Joshua13:22 Balaam wot a Beor ame obedo emuroko, jo Icrael oneko oko i pala lweny i akina jo ocele luŋ ame oneko." 
Joshua13:23 Waŋ lobo a jo Reuben obedo Jordan, mano en onwoŋo waŋ lobogi. Man lobo ame jo Reuben ogamo me bedo megi karacel i bomagi kede paccigi kun lubere i doggolagi." 
Joshua13:24 Muca rik omio lobo baŋ jo me atekere a jo Gad me bedo megi, kun lubere i doggolagi." 
Joshua13:25 Lobogi rik obedo Yajer, kede boma ducu me lobo Gilead, karacel kede nucu lobo a jo Ammon, tuno i Areor, ame tye tuŋ kide me Rabba," 
Joshua13:26 kede cakere i Kecbon tuno i Ramat-micpe kede Betonim, kede dok cakere i Makanaim tuno kede i lobo Debir," 
Joshua13:27 kede Bet-aram, Bet-nimra, Cukot kede Japon, ame tye i luŋ a en dul lobo odoŋ luŋ ame Cikon abaka me Kecbon rik loo, kun waŋ lobo mere obedo Jordan, tuno i agikki nam me Kineret i tuŋ pinnyere, ame tye loka Jordan tuŋ kide." 
Joshua13:28 Man en lobo ame jo Gad onwoŋo me bedo megi, karacel i bomagi, kede paccigi, kun lubere i doggolagi." 
Joshua13:29 Muca rik dok te miyo lobo baŋ nucu atekere a jo Manace me bedo megi; opoko baŋ nucu atekere a jo Manace kun lubere i doggolagi. 
Joshua13:30 Lobogi ocakere i Makanaim kun mako Bacan luŋ, kede kan ame Og abaka me Bacan rik loo luŋ, kede boma luŋ me Jair ame tye i Bacan, boma pyerabicel," 
Joshua13:31 karacel kede nucu me lobo Gilead, kede Aciterot kede Edrei, ame gin boma ame tye i Bacan i kan ame rik Og loo; magi rik opoko baŋ jo a Makir wot a Manace pi nucu a jo Makir, kun lubere i doggolagi." 
Joshua13:32 Magi gin lobo ame Muca opoko i bar me Moab, loka Jordan tuŋ kide me Jeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Ento atekere a jo Levi, Muca mom opokigi lobo moro me bedo megi; Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael en gin ame gin rik onwoŋo me bedo megi, kite a rik okobbigi." 
Joshua14:1 Magi gin lobo ame jo Icrael onwoŋo i lobo me Kanaan me bedo megi, ame alamdog Eliejer kede Yocwa wot a Nuni, karacel kede odoŋe me doggola a kwarigi me atekere a jo Icrael opoko baŋgi." 
Joshua14:2 Gin opoko me bedo megi kun okwanyo kede kwir, kite ame Rwot rik ociko kede Muca, pi atekere aboŋwen kede nucu." 
Joshua14:3 Pien onwoŋo rik Muca otyeko miyo lobo baŋ atekere aryo kede nucu loka Jordan me bedo megi; ento mom omio lobo moro i akinagi me bedo me a jo Levi. 
Joshua14:4 Pien jo a Yucepu rik obedo atekere aryo, jo Manace kede jo Epraim. Jo Levi rik mom opokkigi lobo me bedo megi, cite omiogi ka boma keken me bedogi kede bar me kwayo dokgi kede kit limgi ocele." 
Joshua14:5 Jo Icrael opoko lobo kite ame rik Rwot ociko kede Muca. 
Joshua14:6 Icennere jo Juda te bino baŋ Yocwa i Gilgal. Kaleb wot a Jepunne me a jo Keniji okobbe ni, “Iŋeo kop a rik Rwot okobo baŋ Muca dano Obaŋa i Kadec-barnea i komi kede i koma," 
Joshua14:7 Rik onwoŋo mwakana tye pyeraŋwen i kare ame amiro a Rwot oora me ya i Kadec-barnea me wot roto piny, eka ate dwogo en kop ame rik tye i cunya." 
Joshua14:8 Omegona ame rik owoto kedgi omio koyo oonyere i kom jo; cite an alubo Rwot Obaŋana kede cunya luŋ. 
Joshua14:9 I nino-naca rik Muca te kwoŋ kun kobo ni, ‘Ateteni, lobo ame tyeni onyono bino bedo meri ame ibino nwoŋo me bedo megi atwal karacel kede ikwai, pien ilubo Rwot Obaŋana kede cunyi luŋ.’" 
Joshua14:10 Aman koŋ doŋ inen, Rwot gire ogwoka pwod atye kwo, kite ame rik okobo, koŋ inen, aman doŋ odoko mwaka pyeraŋwen wie abic cakere i kare ame Rwot okobo kop baŋ Muca, kun Icrael pwod tye awot i tim; aman koŋ doŋ inen, mwakana doŋ oromo pyeraboro wie abic." 
Joshua14:11 An pwod atek tuno naka tin, ame tekona pwod rom aroma i tekona i kare ame Muca ooranaca pwod daŋ woto kede kwogo." 
Joshua14:12 Aman doŋ mia lobo obedo kidikidi-ni ame Rwot rik okobo pire i nino-naca. Pien rik iwinyo i nino-naca kite ame jo Anak tye kede kuno, kun otye i boma adoŋodoŋo ame ocelo atek. Gwok onyo Rwot bino bedo keda, mio aryemogi oko kite a Rwot okobo.”" 
Joshua14:13 Yocwa te lamo winyo, i kom Kaleb wot a Japunne, te miyo Kebron me bedo lobo ame en onwoŋo me bedo mege." 
Joshua14:14 Kittono daŋ Kebron te doko lobo ame Kaleb wot a Japunne me a jo Keniji onwoŋo me bedo mege tuno naka atot tin, pien en olubo Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael kede cunye ducu." 
Joshua14:15 Nyiŋ Kebron rik onwoŋo Kiriat-arba; Arba-ni rik onwoŋo dano moro adwoŋ meicel i akina jo Anak. Lobo doŋ te kwe, lweny daŋ te bedo pe." 
Joshua15:1 Lobo ame opokki atekere a Juda kede kwir, kun lubere i doggolagi, ogik tuŋ anyarolum i waŋ lobo me Edom, i agikki tim me Jin tuŋ anyarolum." 
Joshua15:2 Waŋ lobogi tuŋ anyarolum ocakere i agikki me nam me Kado, i gul nam ame nen i tun anyarolum." 
Joshua15:3 Eka te dok malo tuŋ anyarolum, i tur me Akrabim, te kato Jin, yito kede naka i Kadec-barnea tun anyarolum, i ŋet Kejron, naka i Addar, te dok wirre doŋ tun Karka;" 
Joshua15:4 te kato Acimon, naka i ŋet kulo me Miciri, te wot gik i nam. Man bino bedo waŋ lobo ame tye tuŋ anyarolum." 
Joshua15:5 Wan lobo i tutuŋ kide obedo nam me Kado, naka tuno kede i agikki me Jordan. Waŋ lobo tun anyarodi ocakere i gul nam ame tye i agikki me Jordan;" 
Joshua15:6 waŋ lobo te kato naka i Bet-kogla, tutuŋ anyarodi me Bet-araba; te wot tuno naka i kiddi a rik Boan wot a Reuben ocibo." 
Joshua15:7 Eka dok te wot Debir kun cakere i luŋ me Akor, medde kede tun anyarodi, te dok lokere dok tun Gilgal ame tye i nyim tur me Adummim, i luŋ tutuŋ anyarolum; waŋ lobo te dok kato naka i pi i Encemec te gik i Ecrogel;"
