Joshua15:8 eka waŋ lobo te dok kato i luŋ me Jerucalem. Waŋ lobo te yito i wi kidi ame otiŋere i luŋ me Kinnom, tuŋ to, tuno kede i agikki me luŋ me Repaim, i tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Joshua15:9 Waŋ lobo dok te kato kun cakere i wi kidi tuno kede i akoŋ me Neptoak, i kuno dok te kato naka i boma ame tye i kidi me Epron. Waŋ lobo dok te wirre dok tutuŋ Baala, ame en Kiriat-yearim." 
Joshua15:10 Waŋ lobo dok te mano i tuŋ to me Baala te wot tuno i kidi Ceir, kun kato naka i Kir i kidi tuŋ anyarodi me kidi me Yearim, ame en Kecalon, te dok piny tuŋ Bet-cemec, kun beo i ŋet Timna." 
Joshua15:11 Waŋ lobo dok te wot i kor kidi tutuŋ anyarodi me Ekron, kun dok manne dok i Cikkeron, te wot tuno i kidi me Baala, kato Yabneel, kun gik i nam." 
Joshua15:12 Waŋ lobo i tuŋ to olubo dog Nam Adwoŋ. Man en waŋ lobo ame oguro Juda kun lubo doggola. 
Joshua15:13 Kite a rik Rwot ociko kede, Yocwa opokki Kaleb wot a Jepunne lobo mere i akina jo Juda, Kiriat-arba, ame en Kebron; Arba rik obedo pappa Anak." 
Joshua15:14 Kaleb oryemo itino Anak adek i kuno, Cecai, Akiman kede Talmai ikwae Anak." 
Joshua15:15 Cakere i kuno te wot lweny i kom jo ame bedo i Debir; nyiŋ Debir rik onwoŋo Kiriatceper," 
Joshua15:16 Kaleb te kobo ni, “Ŋat ame bino lweny i kom Kiriat-ceper, te mayo, abino miye nyara Akca me bedo dako mere.”" 
Joshua15:17 Ontiel wot a Kenaj omin a Kaleb te mayo, eka en te miye nyare Akca me bedo dako mere." 
Joshua15:18 Ka nyako obino baŋe, en odio cware me kwayo poto baŋ pappere; en te ya i wi kana mere, Kaleb te kobbe ni, “Imito kara ŋo?”" 
Joshua15:19 En te dok iye ni, “Mia mottoro, kite acalo yin doŋ iketa i lobo me Negeb, mia akoŋŋoro.” Kaleb te miye akoŋ i malo kede en i piny." 
Joshua15:20 Man en lobo ame jo Juda onwoŋo me bedo megi, kun lubo doggolagi," 
Joshua15:21 Boma a Juda i tuŋ anyarolum agikki mere ceggi i waŋ lobo a jo Edom, gin rik ene: Kabjeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kina Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedec, Kajor, Itanan," 
Joshua15:24 Jip, Telem, Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 Kajorkadata, Keriot-kejeron, ame en Kajor," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Cema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Kacergadda, Kecmon, Bet-pelet," 
Joshua15:28 Kacarcual, Beerceba, Bijiotia," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, lim, Ecem," 
Joshua15:30 Ettolad, Kecil, Korma," 
Joshua15:31 Ciklag, Madmanna, Cancanna," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Cilkim, Ain gin kede Rimmon; boma luŋ pyeraryo wie aboŋwen kede pacci ame i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:33 I lobo ame tye tuŋ piny tye Ectaol, Cora, Acna," 
Joshua15:34 Jonoa, En-gannim, Tappua, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adullam, Coko, Ajeka," 
Joshua15:36 Caaraim, Aditaim, Gedera, Gederotaim; boma luŋ apar wie aŋwen kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:37 Cenen, Kadaca, Migdalagad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mijpe, Yoktcel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakic, Bockat, Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Kabbon, Lakmam, Kitlic," 
Joshua15:41 Kederot, Bet-dagon, Naama kede Makkeda; boma luŋ apar wie abicel kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:42 Libina, Eter, Acan," 
Joshua15:43 Ipta, Acna, Nejib," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akijib, kede Mareca; boma luŋ aboŋwen kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron karacel kede boma mege luŋ kede pacci mege; 
Joshua15:46 cakere i Ekron wot kede i nam, boma luŋ ame tye i ŋet Acidod kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:47 Acidod karacel kede boma mege luŋ, kede pacci mege; Gaja karacel kede boma mege luŋ kede pacci mege, tuno naka i kulo me Miciri kede i dog Nam Adwoŋ." 
Joshua15:48 I lobo ame obedo kidikidi, Camir, Yattir, Coko," 
Joshua15:49 Danna, Kiriat-canna, ame en Debir," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Ectemo, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gocen, Kolon kede Gilo; boma luŋ apar wie acel kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:52 Arab Duma Ecan," 
Joshua15:53 Jamim, Bet-tappuak, Apeka," 
Joshua15:54 Kumta, Kiriat-arba, ame en Kebron, kede Cior; boma luŋ aboŋwen kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Jip, Yutta," 
Joshua15:56 Jejreel, Jokdeam, Janoak," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibea kede Timna; boma luŋ apar kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:58 Kalkul, Bet-cur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Bet-anot kede Eltekon; boma luŋ abicel kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriat-baal, en Kiriat-yearim, kede Rabba; boma luŋ aryo kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:61 Eka i tim te bedo iye, Bet-araba, Middin, Cekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibcan, boma me Kado kede En-gedi; boma luŋ abicel kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:63 Cite jo Juda onwoŋo mom romo ryemo jo Jebuc, ame gin jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, mannono omio jo Jebuc pwod bedo karacel kede jo Juda i Jerucalem naka atot tin." 
Joshua16:1 Lobo ame opoko i baŋ i kwae a Yucepu me bedo megi ocakere i Jordan i ŋet Jeriko, ame tye tuŋ kide me pii me Jeriko, te kato i tim, kun oya i Jeriko owoto naka i lobo obedo kidikidi tuno naka i Betel." 
Joshua16:2 Icennere dok te ya i Betel, te wot Luj, kato naka Atarot, ame en lobo a jo Arki." 
Joshua16:3 Eka te dok kato piny tuŋ to tuno kede i lobo a jo Japelit, te kato naka i lobo me Bet-koron Tuŋ Piny naka i Gejer, eka te gik i nam." 
Joshua16:4 Manace kede Epraim ame gin jo a Yucepu gin onwoŋo lobo me bedo megi. 
Joshua16:5 Lobo ame opokki jo Epraim kun lubere i doggolagi, onwoŋo tye kit man: waŋ lobogi i tuŋ kide obedo Ararot-addar wot kede Bet-koron Tuŋ Malo." 
Joshua16:6 Cakere i kuno waŋ lobo te wot i nam, kun weko Mikmetat i tuŋ anyarodi; eka i tuŋ kide, wan lobo te dok mano i tuŋ Taanat-cilo, te kato i ŋete tuŋ kide, wot kede i Janoak." 
Joshua16:7 Eka i Janoa te kato Atarot kede Naara, tuno naka i Jeriko kun gik i Jordan." 
Joshua16:8 Cakere i Tappuak, waŋ lobo te wot tuŋ to tuno i kulo Kana, kun gik i nam. Man en lobo ame jo Epraim onwoŋo me bedo megi, kun lubo doggolagi," 
Joshua16:9 karacel kede boma luŋ ame oweko pi jo Epraim i dye lobo ame Manace onwoŋo me bedo megi, boma-nogo luŋ kede paccigi luŋ ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua16:10 Cite mom oryemo jo Kaanan ame bedo i Gejer; mannono omio jo Kanaan obedo i akina jo Epraim tuno naka atot tin, cite gin odoko opii kun otio tic apek." 
Joshua17:1 Eka dok ote bolo kwir me pokki atekere a Manace lobo, pien en rik onwoŋo obedo atin kao a Yucepu. Eka ote poko Gilead kede Bacan baŋ Makir ame pappa Gilead, atin kao a Manace, pien en rik obedo lo atek i lweny," 
Joshua17:2 Eka ote doŋ bolo kwir me poko lobo pi jo me atekere a Manace ame odoŋŋere, kun lubere i doggola i doggola kit man: jo Abiejer, jo Kelek, jo Acriel, jo Cekem, jo Keper, jo Cemiga; magi gin otino a Manace wot a Yucepu ame co mege, kun lubere i doggola i doggola." 
Joshua17:3 Jelopekad wot a Keper, wot a Gilead, wot a Makir, wot a Manace, rik onwoŋo mom tye itino awobe, kono ka anyira keken. Nyin anyira mere ene: Malka, Noa, Kogla, Mirika, Tirija." 
Joshua17:4 Gin obino baŋ alamdog Elieajar kede Yocwa, wot a Nuni kede otel, ote kobo ni, “Rwot rik ociko Muca ni myero miwa onwoŋo lobowa i akina omegowa.” Rik daŋ ote miyogi nwoŋo lobogi i akina omego a pappagi kite ame Rwot onwoŋo ociko." 
Joshua17:5 Kittono kwir rik te miyo Manace nwoŋo lobo apar, medo i kom lobo me Gilead kede Bacan ame onwoŋo tye loka Jordan;" 
Joshua17:6 pien anyira a Manace daŋ onwoŋo lobogi me bedo megi karacel awobe mere. Lobo me Gilead ote poko baŋ jo a Manace odoŋŋere. 
Joshua17:7 Lobo a Manace onwoŋo ocakere i Acer te wot naka i Micmetat ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ kide me Cekem; eka waŋ lobo te dok kato tutuŋ anyarolum baŋ jo ame bedo i En-tapuak. 
Joshua17:8 Lobo me Tappuak rik me a jo Epraim. 
Joshua17:9 Cakere i kuno waŋ lobo te dok piny tuno naka i kulo me Kana. Boma i kan ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ anyarolum me kulo i akina boma a Manace luŋ, rik obedo me Epraim. Icennere waŋ lobo a jo Manace te kato tutuŋ anyarodi me kulo kun gik i nam;" 
Joshua17:10 kun lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum obedo me Epraim eka en ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi te bedo me a Manace, kun nam en ame opokogi; me tutuŋ anayarodi orwatte kede Acer, eka me tutuŋ kide te rwatte i me Icakar." 
Joshua17:11 Dok daŋ i lobo a jo Icakar kede Acer, Manace onwoŋo otero Bet-cean kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, Ibleam kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, Ibleam kede pacci ame tye i ŋete karacel kede jo ame bedo Dor kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, jo ame bedo En-dor kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, jo ame bedo Taanak kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, jo ame bedo Meggido kede pacci ame bedo i ŋete, eka me adek te bedo Napat." 
Joshua17:12 Cite jo Manace mom oryemo jo i boma magi, pien jo Kanaan ocerre acera i bedo i lobo-nono." 
Joshua17:13 Cite i kare ame jo Icrael doŋ odoko atek, gin te miyo jo Kanaan tiyo tic apek me opii opii mom te ryemogi luŋ." 
Joshua17:14 Ikwae a Yucepu rik te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Piŋo kara imio an abolo kwir acel keken dok daŋ imia anwoŋo dul lobo acel keken aco kun wan opol meicel, cakere con Rwot omia winyo, naka atot onyoni?”" 
Joshua17:15 Yocwa te dokkigi iye ni, “Ka ce wun i pol wunu meicel, wot wunu i buŋ me iwot ilwer wunu kabedowu kuno pirwu kenwu, i lobo a jo Periji, kede jo Repa, pien lobo ame obedo kidikidi me Epraim diŋ meicel pirwu.”" 
Joshua17:16 Ikwae a Yucepu te kobo ni, “Lobo ame obedo kidikidi mom gire romowa, dok jo Kanaan luŋ ame bedo i bar, gin luŋ tye i gadigadi me nyonyo naka jo ame bedo i Bet-cean kede i pacci ame tye i ŋete, karacel kede jo ame bedo i luŋ me Jejreel.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yocwa te dok baŋ jo doggola a Yucepu, baŋ jo Epraim kede baŋ jo Manace ni, “Wun ipol wunu meicel dok daŋ itek wunu; mom obino pokkiwu lobo i kwir acel keken," 
Joshua17:18 ento lobo ame obedo kidikidi bino bedo megwu, pien kadi obedo buŋ, ibino lwero wunu te bedo megwu naka i agikki mere; pien ibino ryemo wunu jo Kanaan oko iye kadi bed gin tye kede gadigadi me onyonyo dok daŋ otek.”" 
Joshua18:1 Icennere lwak jo Icrael te cokere i Cilo, eka ote guro kema me rwatte kun onwoŋo doŋ oloo lobonono." 
Joshua18:2 I kare-nono onwoŋo pwod odoŋ atekere abiro i akina jo Icrael ame mom ru onwoŋo lobo ame opokkigi. 
Joshua18:3 Mannono omio Yocwa okobbi jo Icrael ni, “Kara ibino bedo wirre wunu naka awene me wot gamo lobo ame yam Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwu omiowu?" 
Joshua18:4 Mia wunu jo adek iyi atekere acel acel me an aorgi, owot ololoŋo lobo-ni luŋ kun ocoo kop luŋ i kom dul lobo acel acel kite a myero pok kede, eka gm te dwogo kede baŋa." 
Joshua18:5 Gin bino poko lobo-nono i dul abiro, kun Juda medde gire bedo i mege ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum, kede doggola a Yucepu daŋ i megi ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Joshua18:6 Ibino tito wunu kop i kom lobonono i dul abiro, eka ite kelo wunu kop ame icoo wunu iye-nono baŋa kano An doŋ abino bolo kwir pirwu i nyim Rwot Obaŋawu kan." 
Joshua18:7 Jo Levi mom tye dul lobo moro i akinawa pien gin ame gin onwoŋo me bedo megi en aye bedo olamdog baŋ Rwot; aco Gad kede Reuben kede nucu me atekere a Manace doŋ otyeko nwoŋo lobogi oko me bedo megi loka Jordan i tutuŋ kide, ame Muca amiro a Rwot rik omiogi.”" 
Joshua18:8 Jo-naca rik daŋ te cako wotgi; Yocwa te ciko jo-nono ni myero oco kop i kom lobo-nono, kun kobbigi ni, “Wot iloloŋo wunu lobo man, ico wunu kop i kome, eka ite dwogo wunu baŋa. Abino bolo kwir pirwu i Cilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Jo-nono daŋ te wot, ote coyo kop i kom lobo-nono i buk, kun ocoo boma i boma i dul abiro; eka gin doŋ te dwogo baŋ Yocwa i gony ame tye i Cilo." 
Joshua18:10 Yocwa te kwanyo kwir pirgi i nyim Rwot i Cilo; Yocwa te poko lobo daŋ baŋ jo Icrael kuno, kun mio atekere acel acel dullere." 
Joshua18:11 Kwir me atekere a Benjamin te kwanyere kun lubere i doggola i doggola. Lobo ame kwir onwoŋo tye i akina atekere a Juda kede Yucepu. 
Joshua18:12 Waŋ lobogi i tuŋ anyarodi ocakere i Jordan, eka te kato i kor kidi i tutuŋ anyarodi me Jeriko, te kato i lobo ame obedo kidikidi i tuŋ to, kun gik i tim me Bet-awen." 
Joshua18:13 Eka i kuno waŋ lobo te kato i Luj kun beo i tutuŋ anyarolum naka i kor kidi me Luŋ, ame en Betel; eka waŋ lobo te dok kato i Atarot-addar, i wi kidi ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum me Bet-koron Tuŋ piny." 
Joshua18:14 Waŋ lobo te dok lokere, mano i tutuŋ to, te wirre dok i tuŋ anyarolum, kun ya i wi kidi riye aria i tutuŋ kide, ame otikere i Bet-koron, te wot gik i Kiriat-baal ame en Kiriat-jearim, ame obedo boma atekere a Juda. Man obedo tuŋ to," 
Joshua18:15 Eka i ŋete tutuŋ anyarolum te cakere i agiki me Kiriatjearim; cakere i kuno te dok kato Epron i akon me Neptoak. 
Joshua18:16 Cakere dok i kuno waŋ lobo te wot naka i agikki kidi ame otikere i luŋ a woto Kinnom, i agikki me luŋ me Repaim tutuŋ anyarodi; te dok piny i luŋ me Kinnom, tutuŋ anyarolum me kor kidi a jo Jebuc, te dok medde piny naka i En-rogel," 
Joshua18:17 Te wirre i kuno dok tutuŋ anyarodi tuno naka i En-cemec; cakere i kuno te wot Gelimot ame tye i nyim tur me Addumim; te dok wot tuno naka i wi kidi a Boan wot a Reuben ocibo. 
Joshua18:18 Eka i kuno te dok kato tutuŋ anyarodi kun mano kor kidi me Betaraba, dok kede piny i Araba." 
Joshua18:19 Eka te wot kato tutuŋ anyarodi me kor kidi me Bet-kogla. Waŋ lobo te doŋ gik i gul nam ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi me nam me Kado i agikki Jordan tuŋ anyarolum. Man waŋ lobo me tutuŋ anyarolum. 
Joshua18:20 Waŋ lobo mere me tutuŋ kide obedo Jordan. Man en lobo atekere ame jo Benjamin onwoŋo kun lubere i doggola i doggola, kede waŋ lobogi luŋ i yore i yore." 
Joshua18:21 Boma luŋ ame obedo me atekere a jo Benjamin kun lubere i doggogola i doggola gin ene: Jeriko, Bet-kogla, Emek-kejiji," 
Joshua18:22 Bet-araba, Jemaraim, Betel," 
Joshua18:23 Avim, Para, Opra," 
Joshua18:24 Keperammoni, Opni, kede Geba; boma luŋ apar wie aryo kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, Rama, Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 Mijpa, Kepira, Moja," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Irpeel, Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 Cela, Elep, Jebuc, ame en Jerucalem, Gibea kede Kiriat-jearim; boma luŋ apar wie aŋwen kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi. Magi en lobo ame atekere a jo Benjamin onwoŋo kun lubere i doggola i doggola." 
Joshua19:1 Kwir ame obolo me aryo opoto i kom Cimeon, pi jo a Cimeon kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede. Lobogi ame kwir okwanyo onwoŋo tye iye atekere a Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Lobo ame kwir okwanyo ame onwoŋo gin obedo i Beer-ceba, Ceba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Kacar-cula, Bala, Ejem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Betual, Korma;" 
Joshua19:5 Jaglag, Bet-markebot, Kacar-cuca," 
Joshua19:6 Bet-leboat, kede Caruken; boma luŋ apar wie adek kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi;" 
Joshua19:7 En-rimmon, Eter kede Acan; boma luŋ aŋwen kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi:" 
Joshua19:8 karacel kede pacci ame oguro boma magi tuno naka i Baalat-beer, Rama, ame tye Negeb. Man en lobo ame atekere a Cimeon rik onwoŋo kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede," 
Joshua19:9 Lobo ame atekere a Cimeon onwoŋo rik obedo dul lobo a Juda; pien me dul a Juda rik onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel pirgi; pi mannono omio jo Cimeon onwoŋo lobo me bedo megi i akina lobogi. 
Joshua19:10 Kwir ame obolo me adek obedo me atekere a Jabulon kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede. Wan lobogi rik owoto naka Carid. 
Joshua19:11 Eka i kuno waŋ lobo te dok tutuŋ to, kun kato kede i Mareal tuno naka i Dabbecet kede i kulo ame tye tutuŋ kide me Jokneam;" 
Joshua19:12 Cakere dok i Carid, odok tutuŋ kide ame woto tuŋ kide tuno naka i waŋ lobo me Kicilot-tabor. Eka te ya i kuno te wot Daberat kato kede naka malo i Japia." 
Joshua19:13 Ya i kuno okato tutuŋ kide, tuno kede naka i Gatkeper, kato Et-kajin; te dok kato naka Rimmon, te wirre wot tutuŋ Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Eka i kuno, waŋ apokki ame tye tuŋ anyarodi, te dok wirre dwogo cen i Kannaton, te wot gik i luŋ me Iptael," 
Joshua19:15 kede i Kattat, Naalal, Cimron, Idala, kede Beterekem; boma luŋ apar wie aryo kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:16 Man en lobo ame atekere a Jabulon onwoŋo kun lubo kite a doggolagi tye kede. Boma magi kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi. 
Joshua19:17 Kwir ame obolo me aŋwen obedo me Icakar, pi atekere Icakar kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede." 
Joshua19:18 Lobo mere onwoŋo ogwaro Jejreel, Kecullot, Cunem," 
Joshua19:19 Kaparaim, Sion, Anakatat," 
Joshua19:20 Rabbit, Kicion, Ebej," 
Joshua19:21 Remet, Engannim, Enkadda, Bet-pajej," 
Joshua19:22 Waŋ lobo daŋ ogudo Tabor kede Cakajuma, kede Bet-cemec, waŋ lobo mere te gik Jordan; boma luŋ apar wie abicel kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:23 Man en lobo ame atekere Icaka onwoŋo kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede, boma magi kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:24 Kwir ame obolo me abic opoto i kom atekere Acer kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede. 
Joshua19:25 Lobo mere onwoŋo ogwaro Kelkat, Kali, Beten, Akcap," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelek, Amad, kede Mical. Eka me tutuŋ to te wot gudo Karmel kede Cikor-libnat," 
Joshua19:27 te dok wirre tutuŋ kide te wot i Bet-dagon te wot gudo daŋ Jabulon kede luŋ me Ipteal ame tye tuŋ malo me Bet-emek kede Negel, Eka te dok medde tutuŋ anyarodi tuno i Kabul," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron, Rekob, Kammon, Kana, kun woto anaka i Cidon Adwoŋ." 
Joshua19:29 Waŋ lobo te dok wirre dok Rama kun tuno i boma me Turo ame ocelo atek; waŋ lobo te dok wirre wot Koca, te gik i nam. Makalab, Akjib," 
Joshua19:30 Umma, Apek kede Rekob; boma luŋ pyeraryo wie aryo kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:31 Man en boma ame atekere Acer onwoŋo kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede, boma magi kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:32 Kwir ame obolo me abicel opoto i kom atekere a Naputali pi atekere a Naputali kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede. 
Joshua19:33 Waŋ lobo mere ocakere i Kelep, kun cakere i kworo me Jaanannim, kede i Adami-nekeb, kede i Jabneel, wot kede anaka i Lak-kum, kun gik i Jordan." 
Joshua19:34 Waŋ lobo te wirre i kuno dok tutuŋ to, tuno naka Ajnottabor, eka i kuno te wot i Kukkok, kun gudo Jabulon i tutuŋ anyarolum, i tuŋ to me Acer, eka i tuŋ kide te gudo Juda kan ame otuno Jordan." 
Joshua19:35 Boma ame ocelo atek obedo Jiddim, Jer, Kammat, Rakkat, Kineret," 
Joshua19:36 Edama, Rama, Kacor," 
Joshua19:37 Kadec, Ed-rei, Enkajor," 
Joshua19:38 Yiron, Migdalel, Korem, Betanat kede Bet-cemec; boma luŋ apar wie aboŋwen kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:39 Man lobo ame atekere a Naputali onwoŋo kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede, boma kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:40 Kwir ame obolo me abiro opoto i kom atekere a Dan kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede. 
Joshua19:41 Waŋ lobo mere onwoŋo ogwaro Jora, Ectaol, Ir-cemec," 
Joshua19:42 Car-alabin, Aijalon, Itla," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timna," 
Joshua19:44 Elteke, Gibbeton, Baalat," 
Joshua19:45 Jeud, Bene-berak, Gat-rimmon," 
Joshua19:46 kede Mejarkon kede Rakkon karacel kede lobo ame tye i nyim Yopa. 
Joshua19:47 Kare ame amao lobo a jo Dan oko, gin owoto anyim, ote wot lweny i kom Lecem, kare ame gin doŋ omako, gin oneko jo iye i pala lweny, gin te gamo bedo iye. Gin te cako nyiŋ lobo-nono ni Dan, bala nyiŋ kwarogi Dan." 
Joshua19:48 Man en lobo ame atekere a Dan onwoŋo kun lubo kite ame doggolagi tye kede. Boma kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi. 
Joshua19:49 Ka jo Icrael doŋ otyeko poko lobo i dul apapat me bedo megi; gin daŋ ote pokki Yocwa wot a Nuni mege i akinagi. 
Joshua19:50 Gin olubo cik a Rwot, omie boma ame en okwao, ame en Timnat-cerak ame tye i lobo a jo Epraim ame obedo kidikidi; gin dok ogero boma-nono ote bedo iye." 
Joshua19:51 Magi en lobo ame Eleajar alamdog kede Yocwa wot a Nuni karacel kede odoŋe me doggola atekere a jo Icrael opoko i kwir i Cilo i nyim Rwot, i doggola kema me rwatte. Lobo rik ote poko tum kittono." 
Joshua20:1 Rwot ociko Yocwa ni," 
Joshua20:2 “Kobbi jo Icrael ni, ‘Yer wunu boma mogo me larre ame rik akobo pirgi baŋwu kun amio Muca kobo," 
Joshua20:3 me wek dano ame oneko ŋattoro kun mom oŋeo onyo mom oneko me akaka, en twero riŋo laro kuno. Boma-nogo bino bedo kan ame ibino larre wunu iye i ciŋ ocul kwor me remo." 
Joshua20:4 En bino riŋo i boma moro acel i akina magi, te wot cuŋ i doggola me dogcel me boma-nono, eka te tito koppere baŋ odoŋe me bomanono; gin bino tere i boma te wot miye kabedo, en doŋ te bedo kedgi." 
Joshua20:5 Ka ce acul kwor me remo oryemo yore, mom obino miyo lon oneko dano-ni baŋe, pien nwoŋo rik mom gire oneko me akaka, pien rik mom onwoŋo dage con." 
Joshua20:6 En myero bed i boma-nono tuno waŋ ame en ocuŋ i nyim lwak pi ŋolo koppere, tuno ka alamdog adwoŋ me kare-nono oto. Icennere anek doŋ twero dok i boma mere ame yam eriŋo iye.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Gin rik te poko boma magi: Kadec ame tye Galilaya, i lobo a jo Naputali ame obedo kidikidi, kede Cekem i lobo Epraim ame obedo kidikidi, kede Kiriat-arba ame en Kebroni, i lobo a jo Juda ame obedo k idikidi." 
Joshua20:8 Aco i ŋe Jordan loka i tuŋ kide gin te yero Bejer ame tye i tim i lobo otiŋere opette me atekere a Reuben, kede Ramat ame tye i Gilead iyi atekere a Gad, kede Golan ame tye i Bacan iyi atekere a Manace." 
Joshua20:9 Magi gin boma ame ociko pi jo Icrael luŋ, kede pi orok ame bedo i akinagi, me wek ka ŋattoro oneko dano kun mom oneko me akaka, twero riŋo iye, me ocul kwor me remo kur neke oko, tuno ka en ocuŋ i nyim lwak." 
Joshua21:1 Eka odoŋe ame loo doggola a kwaro a jo Levi te bino baŋ Eleajar alamdog kede Yocwa wot a Nuni kede baŋ odoŋe ame loo doggola a kwari a jo Icrael," 
Joshua21:2 gin te kobo baŋgi jo Cilo i lobo Kanaan, ni, “Rwot rik ociko kun omio Muca okobo ni myero miwa boma me bedowa kede bar ame tye i ŋetgi me kwayo dokwa.”" 
Joshua21:3 Pi mannono, gin a Rwot ociko omio jo Icrael opokki jo a Levi lobo magi i akina megi ame gin onwoŋo." 
Joshua21:4 Kwir ame obolo opoto i kom doggola a Kokat. Pi mannono jo Levi ame onwoŋo obedo i kwae Aron alamdog ikokome kwir omiogi onwoŋo boma apar wie adek i baŋ atekere a Juda, Cimeon, kede Benjamin." 
Joshua21:5 Aco jo me doggola a Kokat odoŋŋere te nwoŋo boma tomon i baŋ doggola me atekere Epraim, atekere a Dan kede i baŋ nucu atekere a Manace." 
Joshua21:6 Kwir omio jo Gercon onwoŋo boma apar wie adek i baŋ doggola me atekere Icakar, atekere Acer, kede atekere a Naputali, kede i baŋ nucu atekere a Manace ame tye i Bacan." 
Joshua21:7 Jo Merari kun lubo doggolagi, gin onwoŋo boma apar wie aryo i baŋ atekere a Reuben, atekere a Gad, kede atekere a Jabulon." 
Joshua21:8 Boma magi kede bar me kwatgi, jo Icrael omio i kwir baŋ jo Levi, kite ame Rwot ociko kede Muca." 
Joshua21:9 I akina atekere a Juda kede atekere a Cimeon gin omio boma magi ame otuco nyiŋgi," 
Joshua21:10 ame ikwae Aron en otero, ame obedo doggola acel i akina jo Kokat ame rik jo Levi, pien kwir rik ogeo poto i komgi." 
Joshua21:11 Rik omiogi Kiriat-araba, Araba obedo papa Anak, ame en Kebron, i lobo a jo Juda ame obedo kidikidi, karacel kede bar me kwat luŋ ame oguro." 
Joshua21:12 Cite potti luŋ ame tye i boma-nono kede pacci ame tye i ŋete onwoŋo omio baŋ Kaleb wot a Japunne me bedo mege. 
Joshua21:13 Eka baŋ ikwae Aron alamdog ote miyo Kebron, ame en boma ame anek laro, kede bar me kwattere, Libina kede bar me kwattere." 
Joshua21:14 Jattir kede bar me kwattere, Ectemoa kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:15 Kolok kede bar me kwattere, Debir kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:16 Ain kede bar me kwattere, Jutta kede bar me kwattere, Betceme kede bar me kwattere, boma magi aboŋwen i baŋ atekere aryo." 
Joshua21:17 Eka i baŋ Benjamin ote miyo Gibeon kede bar me kwattere. 
Joshua21:18 Geba kede bar me kwattere, kede Almon kede bar me kwattere; boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:19 Boma olamdog ame gin ikwae Aron te bedo gin luŋ boma tomon wie adek kede bar me kwatgi. 
Joshua21:20 Aco jo Kokat odoŋŋere, ame gin jo me doggola a jo Levi, boma luŋ ame kwir rik omako pirgi rik oya i kom me atekere Epraim." 
Joshua21:21 Gin rik omiogi Cekem, boma ame anek laro, kede bar me kwattere i lobo Epraim ame obedo kidikidi, Gejer kede bar me kwattere." 
Joshua21:22 Kibjaim kede bar me kwattere, Betkoron kede bar me kwattere, boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:23 Eka i kom me atekere a Dan ote miyo Elteke, kede bar me kwattere." 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon kede bar me kwattere, Gatrimmon kede bar me kwattere, Gibbeton kede bar me kwattere, boma luŋ aŋwen," 
Joshua21:25 Eka dok i kom me nucu atekere a Manace ote miyo Taanak kede bar me kwattere kede Gat-rimmon kede bar me kwattere, ducu boma aryo." 
Joshua21:26 Boma me doggola a jo Kokat odoŋŋere rik te bedo ducu tomon kede bar me kwatgi. 
Joshua21:27 Aco boma a jo Gercom, ame obedo doggola acel i akina jo Levi, megi omio i kom me nucu atekere a Manace, omiogi Golen ame tye i Bacan kede bar me kwattere, boma ame anek laro, kede Be-ectera kede bar me kwattere, boma aryo." 
Joshua21:28 Eka i kom me atekere Icakar te miyo Kicion kede bar me kwattere, Daberat kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmut kede bar me kwattere, En-gannim kede bar me kwattere; boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:30 Eka dok i kom me atekere Acer ote miyo Mical kede bar me kwattere, Abdon kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:31 Kelkat kede bar me kwattere, Rekob kede bar me kwattere, boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:32 Eka dok i kom me atekere a Naputali ote miyo Kedec ame tye i Galilaya, kede bar me kwattere, boma ame anek laro, Kammatdor kede bar me kwattere, kede dok Kartan kede bar me kwattere, boma adek." 
Joshua21:33 Boma a jo Gercon, kun lubo kite a doggolagi tye kede, te bedo ducu apar wie adek kede bar me kwatgi." 
Joshua21:34 Baŋ jo Levi odoŋŋere, ame gin jo me doggola a Merari, gin omiogi i kom me atekere a Jabulon, omiogi Jokneam kede bar me kwattere, Karta kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:35 Bimna kede bar me kwattere, Naalal kede bar me kwattere; boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:36 Eka ibaŋ atekere a Reuben ote miyo Bejer kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot kede bar me kwattere, karacel kede Mepat kede bar me kwattere; boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:38 Eka dok i kom me atekere a Gad ote miyo Ramot ame tye i Gilead kede bar me kwattere, boma ame anek laro, Maanaim kede bar me kwattere," 
Joshua21:39 Kecbon kede bar me kwattere, Jajer kede bar me kwattere, gin ducu ote bedo boma aŋwen." 
Joshua21:40 Aco boma ame omio baŋ jo a Merari, ame en doggola a Levi odoŋŋere, kun lubo kite a doggolagi tye kede, boma luŋ ame kwir omako pirgi obedo apar wie aryo." 
Joshua21:41 Boma a jo Levi luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i akina lobo ame obedo me a jo Icrael, gin luŋ rik oromo boma pyeraŋwen wie aboro kede bar me kwatgi," 
Joshua21:42 Boma acel acel i kom magi onwoŋo tye kede bar me kwattere i ŋete kannono; mannono onwoŋo tye pi boma magi luŋ. 
Joshua21:43 Mano en kite ame Rwot omio kede jo Icrael lobo luŋ ame rik ekwoŋo me miyo baŋ kwarigi; i kare ame gin doŋ ogamo odoko megi, gin obedo iye." 
Joshua21:44 Rwot doŋ te miyogi weo tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi kite ame rik okwoŋo kede baŋ kwarigi. Dano moro acel i akina okwor luŋ mom ocuŋ i nyimgi, pien Rwot onwoŋo doŋ omio okworgi luŋ i ciŋgi." 
Joshua21:45 I kom cikere luŋ abeco ame Rwot rik ociko baŋ doggola Icrael mom tye dano moro acel iye ame oweko a mom ocobo; gin luŋ obin ocobere. 
Joshua22:1 Yocwa ocwano jo Reuben, jo Gad, kede nucu me atekere a Manace," 
Joshua22:2 okobbigi ni, “Ityeko wunu doŋ gwoko kop luŋ ame Muca amiro a Rwot rik ocikowu kede, dok daŋ iwinyo wunu koppa luŋ i kom kop luŋ ame acikowu iye." 
Joshua22:3 Pi kare magi luŋ mom iweko wunu omegowu, naka tuno i kare-ni, ento ibedo gwokere wunu meicel i lubo gin ame Rwot Obaŋawu ociko." 
Joshua22:4 Aman doŋ Rwot Obaŋawu omio weo baŋ omegowu kite ame rik ociko kede; pi mannono, myero doŋ ilokere idok wunu pacowu i lobo ame obedo megwu ame rik Muca amiro a Rwot omiowu loka i ŋe Jordan." 
Joshua22:5 Cite myero igwokere wunu atek ilubo kop luŋ ame ociko kede cik ame Muca amiro a Rwot ocikowu kede, ni myero imar wunu Obaŋawu dok imok wunu i kome kun itio wunu baŋe i cunywu luŋ kede tipowu luŋ.”" 
Joshua22:6 Yocwa olammigi gum, te cwayogi wot; gin te wot i paccigi." 
Joshua22:7 I kare-nono onwoŋo Muca doŋ otyeko miyo lobo i i Bacan baŋ nucu atekere a Manace; ento nucu mere ocele, Yocwa en a doŋ omio lobo i ŋet omegogi ame tye tuŋ to me Jordan. Kare ame Yocwa ocwaogi me wot i paccigi, olammigi gum," 
Joshua22:8 kun kobbigi ni, “Dok wunu i pacciwu kede lim abup, kede dok ecipan, karacel kede ryal, jabu, mola, nyonyo, kede ruk apipim; pokki wunu omegowu lim ame iyako wunu i baŋ okworwu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu me atekere a Manace te dok i paccigi; gin te pokere oko i baŋ jo Icrael i Cilo ame onwoŋo tye i lobo me Kanaan, kun gin owoto i lobo me Gilead ame obedo lobogi i komgi, ame obedo megi pi cik a Rwot ame emio Muca okobo." 
Joshua22:10 Kare ame gin otuno i lobo ame ceggi kede Jordan, ame tye i lobo Kanaan, jo Reuben, kede jo Gad, kede nucu me atekere a Manace te cano keno lam a ceggi i ŋet Jordan, keno lam ame dwoŋ meicel." 
Joshua22:11 Kare ame jo Icrael owinyo pire, gin okobo ni, “Koŋ inen wunu, jo Reuben kede jo Gad karacel kede nucu me atekere a Manace doŋ ocano keno lam i waŋ lobo me Kanaan, i lobo ame tye i ŋet Jordan ame dok tutuŋ baŋ jo Icrael.”" 
Joshua22:12 Ka jo Icrael owinyo, lwak jo Icrael luŋ ocokere karacel i Cilo me wot lweny i komgi." 
Joshua22:13 Jo Icrael te koŋ cwalo Finekaci wot Eleajar alamdog baŋ jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu atekere a Manace i lobo Gilead," 
Joshua22:14 karacel kede rwode apar ame oya i atekere acel acel dano acel kun dano acel ya i atekere acel me Icrael, gin lunnono ŋat acel acel onwoŋo obedo adwon ame loo doggola a kwarigi ame onwoŋo tye i akina atekere Icrael." 
Joshua22:15 Gin te bino baŋ jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu atekere a Manace i Gilead, eka gin te kobbigi ni," 
Joshua22:16 “Lwak a Rwot luŋ okobo ni, ‘Man kara kodi gin aŋo ame itimo wunu me turo cikerewu kede Obaŋa a jo Icrael-li, me lokere wunu tin, dok oko i lubo Rwot, eka ite lunyo cano wunu ke no lamwu kenwu me jem i kom Rwot?" 
Joshua22:17 Bal ame otimo i Poer mom doŋ oromowa ame daŋ mom ru olonyere iye naka tin, dok ame daŋ omio too edeke opoto i akina lwak a Rwot?" 
Joshua22:18 Piŋo kara wun tin dok ilokere wunu oko i lubo Rwot? Nen ba, ka ce wun tin ijem wunu i kom Rwot, diki akemo bino mako Rwot i kom lwak luŋ me Icrael." 
Joshua22:19 Doŋ ba, amanni ka ce lobowu mom cil, kat wunu loka ca i lobo a Rwot kan ame kema me rwatte ocuŋ iye, me wek iwotinwon wunu lobowu i akina wa; myero mom ka ijem wunu i kom Rwot onyo kur imiwa wunu odok jo ojem pi cano keno lam pirwu kenwu, ame pat dok i keno lam a Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Joshua22:20 Akan wot a Jera mom rik okwero bedo agen i kom gin ame ojalo baŋ Rwot, eka te miyo akemo a Rwot poto i kom lwak me Icrael? Mom en keken obin oto pi ballere.’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu atekere a Manace te dok iye baŋ odoŋe a loo doggola a kwari a jo Icrael ni" 
Joshua22:22 “Won Twer, Obaŋa Rwot! Won Twer, Obaŋa Rwot! En [ŋeo; en mio jo Icrael daŋ ŋeo: Ka ce] onwoŋo wan ojem onyo oturo cikerewa kede Rwot, myero doŋ kur wekwa tin," 
Joshua22:23 pi cano keno lam me lokere oko teŋe kun oweko lubo Rwot; onyo ka ce wan onwoŋo otimo kittono kun oyalo: i mot awaŋa, onyo mot moko kwon onyo mot me kweyo cuny, Rwot ikome myero ocul." 
Joshua22:24 Pe gire, wan otimo pien onwoŋo otye i lworo i kare me anyim ikwaewu twero penyo ikwaewa ni, ‘Gin aŋo ame ilaro wunu i baŋ Rwot, ame Obaŋa a jo Icrael?" 
Joshua22:25 Pien Rwot omio Jordan obedo waŋ lobo ame poko kinwa kede wun, wun jo Reuben, kede jo Gad; wun i mom wunu i ginnoro ame opoko pirwu i Rwot.’ Mano bino miyo ikwaewu mio ikwaewa weko woro Rwot oko." 
Joshua22:26 Mano en omio wan okobo ni, ‘Wek ocaŋ keno lam aman, mom me waŋo mot awaŋa onyo me miyo mot oŋolo’," 
Joshua22:27 cite me bedo caden i akina wan kede wun, kede dok akina ikwaewa ame bino lubowa, ni wan otio tic a Rwot i nyime kun otio i motwa me awaŋa, kede mot aŋola kede mot kweyo cuny; me wek ikwaewu kur kob baŋ ikwaewa i kare a tye anyim ni, ‘Wun i mom wunu i ginnoro ame opoko pirwu i Rwot.’" 
Joshua22:28 Tamwa rik onwoŋo tye ni, ‘Ka ce obino kobo man baŋwa onyo baŋ ikwaewa i kare ame tye i nyim, wan obino kobo ni, Koŋ inen wunu keno lam ame rom aroma i me a Rwot me kwariwa otio, mom me miyo mot awaŋa, onyo mot oŋolo, ento me bedo caden i akina wan kede wun.’" 
Joshua22:29 Wan kom mom oromo jem i kom Rwot, eka ote lokere tin kwero lubo Rwot pi cano keno lam me mot awaŋa, mot moko kwon, onyo me mot aŋola, ame pat dok i keno lam a Rwot Obaŋawa ame ocuŋ i nyim kema me rwatte.”" 
Joshua22:30 I kare ame Finekaci alamdog karacel kede rwode a lwak, kede odoŋe a loo doggola kwari a jo Icrael, ame onwoŋo tye kede owinyo kop a jo Reuben, jo Gad, kede nucu atekere a Manace, oyomoro cunygi aber." 
Joshua22:31 Finekaci wot Eleajer alamdog te dokki jo Reuben, kede jo Gad, kede jo Manace ni, “Tin doŋ oniaŋ ni Rwot kara tye i akinawa, pien wun kara mom ituro wunu cikerewu i Rwot, aman doŋ ilaro wunu jo Icrael i ciŋ Rwot.”" 
Joshua22:32 Finekaci wot Eleajer alamdog kede rwode te ya oko i baŋ jo Reuben, jo Gad ame onwoŋo tye i lobo Gilead, gin te dok i lobo me Kanaan baŋ jo Icrael, gin te dwogo kop baŋgi." 
Joshua22:33 Kopgi te yomoro cuny jo Icrael; jo Icrael te pwoyo Obaŋa, mom dok ote medde kobo kopporo me lweny i komgi, me babalo lobo ame jo Reuben jo Gad bedo iye." 
Joshua22:34 Jo Reuben kede jo Gad te cako nyiŋ keno lammono ni, Caden, kun gin kobo ni, “Pien obedo caden i akinawa ni Rwot en Obaŋa.”" 
Joshua23:1 Kare ame doŋ kare okato alalac ame Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo jo Icrael we oko i kom okworgi luŋ ame omanogi, kun Yocwa doŋ otyeko ti oko, mwaka mere doŋ bup." 
Joshua23:2 Yocwa olwoŋo jo Icrael luŋ, odoŋegi, odoŋe a loo lwak, oŋolkopgi kede odoŋe tic, eka te kobbigi ni, “An doŋ ati oko, dok mwakana daŋ doŋ bup." 
Joshua23:3 Wun doŋ ityeko neno wunu gin ducu ame Rwot Obaŋawu otimo i kom rok magi luŋ, pien Rwot Obaŋawu olwenyo pirwu." 
Joshua23:4 Nen doŋ atyeko poko rok odoŋ-ŋi oko kede kwir baŋ atekerewu me bedo megwu, karacel kede rok ocele ame doŋ atyekogi oko, cakere i Jordan tuno kede naka i Nam Adwoŋ tuŋ to," 
Joshua23:5 Rwot Obaŋawu bino corogi oko cen i nyimwu, eka te ryemogi oko i waŋwu, wun ibino gamo wunu lobogi, kite a rik Rwot Obaŋawu ocikere kede baŋwu." 
Joshua23:6 Pi mannono, myero icuŋ wunu atek meicel me gwoko kede tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame ocoo i buk me cik a Muca, kun mom ilokere wunu iye teŋe i ciŋ tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam," 
Joshua23:7 me kur irubere wunu oko i rokkogo ame odoŋ i akinawu kan-ni; kur daŋ ilwoŋ wunu nyiŋ obaŋegi, onyo kwon i nyiŋgi, onyo tic baŋgi, kadi ryebere piny i nyimgi." 
Joshua23:8 Cite myero imok wunu i kom Rwot Obaŋawu kite ame ibedo wunu timo tuno naka tin. 
Joshua23:9 Pien Rwot Obaŋawu oryemo rok adoŋo atek oko i nyimwu, aco wun mom tye ŋattoro ocuŋ i nyimwu tuno naka tin." 
Joshua23:10 Dano acel i akinawu ryemo jo tutumia, pien Rwot Obaŋawu en a lwenyo pirwu, kite ame en rik ociko." 
Joshua23:11 Pi mannono myero igwokere wunu kenwu, mar wunu Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Joshua23:12 Pien ka ce idok wunu cen, eka ite ribere wunu i rok magi ame oweko odoŋ i akinawu, ite nyomere wunu kedgi kun inyomo wunu anyiragi, gin daŋ nyomo anyirawu," 
Joshua23:13 myero iŋe wunu ateni ni Rwot Obaŋa mom bino medde ryemo rok magi i nyimwu; ento gin bino doko kumma kede owic me cikowu me goyowu i laŋetwu, kede okuto me cobo wanwu, ituno ka otyekowu oko i lobo man aber-ri ame rik Rwot Obaŋawu omiowu." 
Joshua23:14 “Nen ba, an doŋ aceggi wot kan ame lobo luŋ woto iye, wun giwu doŋ iŋeo wunu i cunywu kede i tipowu ni mom tye koporo acel i akina gin abeco ame Rwot Obaŋawu ociko i komwu ame oweko a mom ocobere; gin luŋ ocobere gire oko pirwu, mom tye moro acel i akinagi ame mom ocobere." 
Joshua23:15 Doŋ kite acalo Rwot Obaŋa ocobo gin abeco luŋ ame en okobo i komwu, Rwot daŋ bino kelo gin areco luŋ i komwu tuno waŋ ame otyekowu oko iweŋ i lobo man aber ame Rwot Obaŋawu omiowu." 
Joshua23:16 Ka ce ibino turo wunu cikere a Rwot ame en ocikowu kede, eka ite wot wunu tic baŋ obane mogo ocele kun iryebere wunu piny iworogi wunu, mano bino miyo Rwot yie waŋ i komwu, eka ite ru to wunu oko i lobo man aber ame en omiowu.”" 
Joshua24:1 Yocwa rik dok te coko atekere luŋ me Icrael i Cekem, eka te cwano odoŋe, odoŋe a loo lwak, oŋolkop kede odoŋe tic a jo Icrael; gin luŋ ote bino cuŋ i nyim Obaŋa." 
Joshua24:2 Yocwa te kobbi jo luŋ ni, “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, ‘Kwariwu kare acon rik obedo loka kulo Efurate. Tera pappa Iburaim kede Nakor gin obedo tic baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele." 
Joshua24:3 An ate kwanyo kwarowu Iburaim i loka Kulo, eka ate tele beo kede i lobo Kanaan luŋ, ate daŋ miyo ikwae nya apol. Rik amie Ica ka;" 
Joshua24:4 eka ate miyo baŋ Icaka, Yakobo kede Ecau, Ecau rik ate miyo lobo Ceir ame obedo kidikidi me bedo mege, cite Yakobo kede ikwae te wot i Miciri." 
Joshua24:5 Rik ate cwayo Muca kede Aron i Miciri, ate ŋolo kop i kom Miciri kede gin luŋ ame rik atimo i akinagi kuno; icennere ate kwanyowu oko i kuno." 
Joshua24:6 Rik ate kwanyo kwariwu oko i Miciri, eka ite bino wunu naka i nam; jo Miciri te ryemo kwariwu i gadigadi me romo karacel kede wegi aguragura, tuno naka i Nam Arema." 
Joshua24:7 Kare ame gin okok baŋ Rwot, Rwot omio colpiny obedo tye i akinawu kede jo Miciri, eka te miyo pii nam dwono i komgi, te mwonyogi oko. Waŋwu daŋ oneno gin ame atimo i Miciri, eka ite bedo wunu i tim pi kare alac." 
Joshua24:8 Rik dok ate kelowu i lobo a jo Amor, ame rik tye i ŋe Jordan tuŋ ocele gin rik te lweny kedwu, cite an rik ate miyogi i ciŋwu, omio ite gamo wunu lobogi oko bedo megwu, ate daŋ lwerogi oko i nyimwu," 
Joshua24:9 Balak wot a Jipor abaka me Moab te dok tinere lweny i kom jo Icrael, en te cwayo kwena lwoŋo Balaam wot a Beor me bin cenwu oko," 
Joshua24:10 cite an gira mom ate winyo Balaam; omio en te lunyo lammiwu winyo, ate larowu oko i ciŋe." 
Joshua24:11 Wun rik ite ŋolo wunu Jordan bino i Jeriko, jo me Jeriko te lweny i komwu karacel kede jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kanaan, jo Kitti, jo Girgac, jo Kivi kede jo Jebuc; gin luŋ ate miyogi i ciŋwu." 
Joshua24:12 Rik dok ate cwayo lwak pipino apipim i nyimwu, ame te ryemogi i nyimwu, obakki aryo me a jo Amor; mannono rik mom otimere pi pala lwenywu onyo pi aterowu." 
Joshua24:13 Amiowu lobo ame mom itio wunu ticcoro pire, kede boma luŋ ame mom igero wunu, wun ite bedo wunu kuno; ite camo wunu nyig olok kede me jeituni ame mom gu ipito wunu.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Pi mannono, aman doŋ lwor wunu Rwot, eka ite tic wunu baŋe i cunywu acil kede gen; cwa wunu teŋe obaŋe mogo ame kwariwu otio baŋgi loka kulo Efurate i Miciri, eka ite tic wunu baŋ Rwot." 
Joshua24:15 Aco ka ce mom iye wunu tic baŋ Rwot, yer wunu doŋ tin-ni ŋat ame wun imito wunu tiye, ka obaŋe ame kwariwu otio baŋgi i kare ame gin pwod tye i lobo ame tye loka kulo Efurate onyo obaŋe a jo Amor ame ibedo wunu i lobogi; ento an kede oda, wan obino tic baŋ Rwot.”" 
Joshua24:16 Eka jo rik te gamo ni, “Kom mom twerre kadi acel wan iweko Rwot, eka ote tiyi obaŋe mogo ocele;" 
Joshua24:17 pien Rwot Obaŋawa en ame okwanyowa kede kwariwa me ya i lobo Miciri, i ot me opii, ame rik otimo anyuttogo adoŋo ca i nyimwa, kun gwokowa i yo luŋ ame obeo iye, kede i akina jo luŋ ame obeo i kingi." 
Joshua24:18 Rwot rik oryemo jo-nono luŋ i nyimwa, ame gin jo Amor ame rik bedo i lobo-nono, pi mannono wan daŋ obino tic baŋ Rwot pien en obedo Obaŋawa.”" 
Joshua24:19 Ento Yocwa dok te kobbi jo ni, “Wun mom itwero tiyi wunu Rwot; pien en obedo Obaŋa acil; en Obaŋa ame nyek; en mom bino timowu kica i timwu me turo cik onyo i balwu," 
Joshua24:20 Ka ce iweko wunu Rwot eka ite cako wunu tic baŋ obaŋe ocele, bino miyo en lokere te timowu rac, bino tyekowu oko kadi bed yam koŋ otimowu ber.”" 
Joshua24:21 Lwak te kobbi Yocwa ni, “Pe gire, ento wan giwa obino tiyi i Rwot.”" 
Joshua24:22 Yocwa dok te kobbi lwak ni, “Wun giwu doŋ ibedo wunu cadenwu kenwu ni wun doŋ ityeko yero wunu Rwot, me tic baŋe.” Lwak dok te gamo ni, “Wan ocaden.”" 
Joshua24:23 Yocwa te kobbigi ni, “Aco doŋ bol wunu oko kit obaŋa luŋ ame orok ame tye i akinawu, eka ite loko cunywu i kom Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael.”" 
Joshua24:24 Lwak te gamo dog Yocwa ni, “Wan obino tiyi Rwot Obaŋawa, dok daŋ obino winyo kopere.”" 
Joshua24:25 Mannono te miyo Yocwa moko cikere i lwak i ninonono, te keto icwil kede cik apol pirgi i Cekem." 
Joshua24:26 Yocwa te coyo kop magi i buk me cik Obaŋa; eka te kwanyo twon gweŋŋoro adwoŋ, te cibo cuŋ kuno i te kworo ame tye i kabedo acil ame tye pi Rwot." 
Joshua24:27 Yocwa dok te kobbi lwak ni, “Nen wunu ba, gweŋ man en ame bino bedo caden i komwa, pien en owinyo kop a Rwot luŋ ame en okobo i komwa; pi mannono, en bino bedo caden i komwu me kur ibwol wunu Obaŋawu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Yocwa rik doŋ te ciko lwak, ŋat acel acel te dok i lobo mere ame rik omie." 
Joshua24:29 A doŋ magi luŋ otum Yocwa wot a Nuni, amiro a Rwot te doŋ to oko kun onwoŋo mwaka me dittere oromo mia acel kede apar." 
Joshua24:30 Gin rik te yike i lobo mere ame rik omie i Timnat-cerak i lobo me Epraim obedo kidikidi, ame tye tuŋ anyarodi me kidi me Gaac." 
Joshua24:31 Jo Icrael rik otiyi Rwot i kare a Yocwa luŋ, kede i kare odoŋe luŋ a rik lubo Yocwa, oweko pwod kwo dok daŋ oŋeo ginnoro ame Rwot otio pi Icrael." 
Joshua24:32 Cogo kom Yucepu ame rik jo Icrael okelo i Miciri ca, obin oyiko i Cekem i dul lobo ame rik Yakobo owilo i baŋ awobe a Kamor ame obedo pappa Cekem, kun oculo iye lim aromo mia acel; lobo-nono rik te doko me ikwae a Yucepu atwal." 
Joshua24:33 Eleajar wot a Aron daŋ te to oko, ote yiko kome i Gibea, ame obedo boma a wode Finekaci, ame rik opokke i lobo me Epraim obedo kidikidi." 
Judges1:1 Kare ame Yocwa doŋ otyeko to, jo Icrael openyo Rwot ni “ŋa ce ame bino geyo twaro lweny pirwa i kom jo Kaanan?”" 
Judges1:2 Rwot te gamo ni, “Juda en ame bino geyo wot kuno; nen ba, atyeko doŋ miyo lobo-naca oko i ciŋe.”" 
Judges1:3 Juda te kobo baŋ ominnere Cimeon ni, “Biye owot kedi i lobona ame opoka kede kwir, me owot olweny i kom jo Kaanan; an daŋ abino wot kedi i lobo ame rik opokki kede kwir.” Cimeon daŋ te wot kede," 
Judges1:4 Juda rik te wot kuno, eka Rwot te miyo jo Kaanan kede jo Periji i ciŋgi; gin rik te loyo jonaca tutumia tomon i Bejek." 
Judges1:5 Gin orwatte kede Adoni-bejek i Bejek, ote daŋ lweny kede, ote loyo jo me Kaanan kede jo me Periji," 
Judges1:6 Adoni-bejek rik te riŋo oko, ento gin te ryemo yore, ote make ŋolo twoni ciŋe kede twoni tyene oko," 
Judges1:7 Adoni-bejek te kobo ni, “Rik obakki pyerabiro ame aŋolo twoni ciŋgi kede twoni tyengi bedo depo ŋid cam ame oony piny i te mejana; gin ame rik an atimo i komgi, Rwot daŋ oculo kittono i koma.” Gin rik te tere i Jerucalem, te daŋ wot to kuno." 
Judges1:8 Jo me Juda rik olwenyo i kom Jerucalem te mako oko, ote neko jo iye i pala lweny, ote waŋo boma mere oko i mac." 
Judges1:9 Icennere doki, jo Juda dok te wot lweny i kom jo Kaanan ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo obedo kidikidi, kede i Negeb, kede i lobo ame tye piny i te kidi." 
Judges1:10 Jo Juda dok te wot lweny i kom jo Kaanan ame bedo i Kebron, ame nyiŋe rik con onwoo olwoŋo ni Kiriat-arba, gin te loyo Cecai, Akiman kede Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Gin oya i kuno ote wot lweny i kom jo ame bedo i Debir. (Nyiŋ Debir aconnere onwoŋo Kiriat-ceper.) 
Judges1:12 Kaleb te kobo ni, “Ŋat ame bino lweny i kom Kiriat-ceper, te mayo, abino miye nyara Akeca me bedo dako mere.”" 
Judges1:13 Otniel wot a Kenaj, ame obedo omin a Kaleb atidi mere, en ame te mayo, eka Kaleb te miye nyare Akeca me bedo dako mere." 
Judges1:14 Kare ame nyako-nono owoto baŋ cware, en odio cware me kwayo poto baŋ pappere; en te ya oko i wi kana mere, Kaleb te penye ni, “Imito kara ŋo ba?”" 
Judges1:15 En te gamo ni, “Mia mottoro; kite acalo yin doŋ iketa i lobo me Negeb, mia akoŋŋoro ba.” Kaleb te miye akoŋ ame tye malo kede en ame tye tuŋ piny." 
Judges1:16 Ikwae a dano me Keni, ame onwoŋo obedo or Muca, owoto karacel i jo Juda kun ya i boma me otit naka i tim me Juda, ame tye i Negeb i ŋet Arad. Gin rik te wot bedo kuno karacel kede jo turgi." 
Judges1:17 Juda rik owoto karacel kede ominnere Cimeon, ote wot loyo jo Kaanan ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Jepat, te jwero oko luŋ acalo gin me kwer. Mannono rik te miyo lwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Korma." 
Judges1:18 Juda dok te mako Gaja kede lobo mere, Acikelon kede lobo mere, karacel kede Ekron kede lobo mere." 
Judges1:19 Rwot rik onwoŋo obedo i jo Juda, omiogi omao lobo luŋ obedo kidikidi odoko megi, cite jo ame onwoŋo rik bedo i lobo obedo babar ryemo oloogi oko, pien onwoŋo jo-naca tye i gadigadi lweny me nyonyo." 
Judges1:20 Rik ote miyo Kebron baŋ Kaleb kite ame Muca rik ociko, kede; en rik te ryemo ikwae Anak adek i kuno." 
Judges1:21 Ento jo a Benjamin rik mom oryemo jo Jebuc ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem; mannono en omio jo Jebuc pwod bedo karacel kede jo Benjamin i Jerucalem naka tin. 
Judges1:22 Jo me ot a Yucepu daŋ rik te wot lweny i kom Betel Rwot daŋ rik te bedo kedgi. 
Judges1:23 Jo me ot a Yucepu rik te cwayo kwena roto Betel, (Nyiŋ bomanono rik con onwoŋo olwoŋo ni Luj.)" 
Judges1:24 Orot-piny rik te neno dano moro ame bino kun ya i boma, gin te kobbe ni, “Tim ber inyuttiwa yo ame woto i boma, wan daŋ obino timmi ber.”" 
Judges1:25 Dano-nono rik te nyuttigi yo ame woto i boma; gin rik te neko jo ame bedo i boma-nono oko i pala lweny, cite ote weko dano-naca kede jo me doggola mere luŋ wot." 
Judges1:26 Lo-naca rik te wot i lobo a jo Kitti, te wot gero paco mere kuno, te cako nyiŋe ni Luj; mannono pwod nyiŋ kabedo-nono naka atot tin." 
Judges1:27 Manace rik mom oryemo jo ame bedo i Bet-cean karacel kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, akadi i Taanak kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, akadi jo ame bedo i Dor kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, akadi jo ame bedo i Ibleam kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, akadi jo ame bedo i Megido kede pacci ame tye i ŋete; ento jo Kaanan ocerre acera me bedo i lobo-nono." 
Judges1:28 Cite i kare a jo Icrael dok odoko atek, gin te miyo jo Kaanan tic atek me opii opii, mom ote ryemogi luŋ." 
Judges1:29 Epraim rik mom oryemo jo Kaanan ame onwoŋo bedo i Gejer; cite jo Kaanan gire omedde bedo i akinagi i Gejer. 
Judges1:30 Jabulon rik mom oryemo jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Kitron, akadi jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Nakalol; ento jo Kaanan obedo i akinagi, ote doko opiigi kun otio tic atek me opii opii." 
Judges1:31 Acer rik mom oryemo jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Akko, akadi jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Cidon, akadi jo Arab, onyo me Akjib, onyo me Kelba, onyo me Apik, onyo me Rekob." 
Judges1:32 Ento jo Acer obedo i akina jo Kaanan ame gin onwoŋo obedo wegi lobo-nono, pien jo Acer rik mom oryemogi." 
Judges1:33 Naputali rik mom oryemo jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Betcemec, akadi jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Bet-anat, ento gin obedo i akina jo Kaanan ame onwoŋo obedo wegi lobo-nono. Kadi amannono, jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Bet-cerec kede i Bet-anat odoko opiigi kun otio tic atek me opii opii." 
Judges1:34 Jo Amor rik te diyo jo a Dan atek, ote dwokogi cen i lobo obedo kidikidi; gin mom oyegi me wot i lobo obedo babar." 
Judges1:35 Jo Amor rik te cerre acera me bedo i kidi me Kerec, i Aijalon, kede i Caalbim, ento jo me ot a Yucepu rik te bedo diyogi atek, ote doko opiigi kun otio tic atek me opii opii." 
Judges1:36 War; lobo a jo Amor te ya i tur ame woto Akarabim, i Cela kun dok kede malo." 
Judges2:1 Amalaika a Rwot rik oya i Gilgal, te wot i Bokim, te kobo ni, “Rik akwanyowu oko i Miciri, ate kelowu naka i lobo ame rik akwoŋo pire ni abino miyo baŋ kwariwu. Rik akobo ni, ‘Mom abino turo cikerena kedwu atwal," 
Judges2:2 wun daŋ myero kur icikere wunu kede jo moro ame bedo i lobo man; myero imumuko wunu kenogi me yalo jogi oko.’ Ento wun giwu mom iwinyo wunu gin ame aciko. Man kara doŋ ŋo ame itimo wunu nie? 
Judges2:3 Mannono omio an doŋ akobo ni, An doŋ mom abino ryemogi i nyimwu; ento gin doŋ bino doko okworwu, obaŋegi bino doko kumma me cikowu.”" 
Judges2:4 Kare ame amalaika a Rwot okobo koppono ducu baŋ jo Icrael, jo luŋ te belle oko i koko." 
Judges2:5 Gin te cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Bokim; eka gin te yalo Rwot kuno i gin oŋolo. 
Judges2:6 Kare ame Yocwa rik doŋ otyeko ciko jo Icrael, ŋat acel acel rik te wot, kun ŋat man dok i lobo mere ame eleo, me wot gamo bedo mege." 
Judges2:7 Jo Icrael rik otiyi Rwot i kare a Yocwa luŋ kede i kare odoŋe luŋ ame rik Yocwa oweko pwod kwo, jo ame rik onwoŋo oneno tic adoŋodoŋo luŋ ame Rwot otimo pi Icrael." 
Judges2:8 Yocwa wot a Nuni, amiro a Rwot, oto ame mwaka me dittere romo mia acel kede tomon." 
Judges2:9 Gin rik ote yike i lobo mere ame rikomie i Timnatkerec, i lobo me Epraim obedo kidikidi, ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi me kidi me Gaac." 
Judges2:10 Lwagi jo-nono luŋ rik te to oko, te wot nywako kabedo kede kwarigi; eka lwagi jo ocele te dok pelo lubogi, ame mom rik oŋeo Rwot, akadi tic ame Rwot rik otio pi jo Icrael." 
Judges2:11 Jo Icrael rik dok te cako timo gin a nen arac i nyim Rwot, ote woro gigi Baal," 
Judges2:12 kun oweko gigi woro Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi, ame rik okwanyogi i lobo me Miciri, ote lunyo woro gigi obaŋe ocele i akina obaŋe a jo ame omanogi ote ryebere piny i nyimgi; gin te bedo roko Rwot miyo akemo mako." 
Judges2:13 Gin oweko Rwot oko, ote lunyo woro gigi obaŋe mogo ame olwoŋo ni Baal kede Aciterot." 
Judges2:14 Mannono rik te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, eka te jalogi i ciŋ oyak, ame gin te bedo yako jamigi. Rwot te daŋ dok jalogi oko i te twer okworgi ame onwoŋo omanogi, ame te miyogi doko jo a mom dok romo cuŋ i nyim okworgi." 
Judges2:15 Kannoro luŋ ame rik gin owoto iye, ciŋ Rwot mom orwenyo i komgi, me timogi rac, kite ame rik en okwenyooro kede con, kede dok kite a Rwot rik okwoŋo kede baŋgi con. Man omiogi obedo i twon lyeto moro agwa meicel." 
Judges2:16 Rwot rik dok te cako miyogi oŋolkop ame te larogi i ciŋ jo ame onwoŋo obedo yako jamigi. 
Judges2:17 Kadi bed amannono, gin rik mom obedo jo ame winyo kop oŋolkopgi; pien gin gigi omedde timo tim me alaya baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele kun oryebere piny i nyimgi. Gin oweko yo ame rik kwarigi obedo lubo oyotoyot, gin gigi mom obedo winyo cik a Rwot kite ame kwarigi obedo winyo kede." 
Judges2:18 I kare luŋ ame Rwot rik miogi oŋolkop, Rwot bedo konyo oŋolkopgi-nono, eka te bedo larogi i ciŋ okworgi i kare luŋ ame oŋolkopporo-ni oloo kede jo Icrael. Pien kica onwoŋo omako Rwot i komgi pi bedo cucuragi i kom jo ame onwoŋo wunogi kun diogi atek." 
Judges2:19 Cite i kare naca luŋ ka ce oŋolkopgi dok oto oko, gin dok olokere odok cen i timo timmogo areco ame kato me a kwarigi oko, kun olubo obaŋe mogo ocele, oryebere piny i nyimgi, oworogi. Gin rik mom oweko kodi timgi-nono moro, akadi kittoro luŋ ame gin rik obedo lubo pi nwaŋ ŋutgi." 
Judges2:20 Mannono rik te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, eka Rwot te kobo ni, “Pien jo man doŋ okalo wi cikere ame rik aciko baŋ kwarigi, dok daŋ okwero-gu winyo koppa oko," 
Judges2:21 mom dok abino medde ryemo rokkoro i nyimgi, i kom rok apapat ame rik Yocwa oweko i kare ame en to," 
Judges2:22 me ati kedgi me temo cuny jo Icrael, anen ka ce gin bino gwokere me lubo yo a Rwot kite ame kwarigi obedo lubo kede onyo mom.”" 
Judges2:23 Mannono rik te miyo Rwot weko rok apapattono luŋ doŋ kun mom oryemogi awaŋe acel, dok daŋ mom omiogi i ciŋ Yocwa." 
Judges3:1 Magi gin rok ame Rwot oweko odoŋ me eti kedgi me temo jo Icrael, gin jo Icrael luŋ rik mom ru tye kede ŋeccoro me lwenyoro i Kaanan." 
Judges3:2 En onwoŋo owekogi pi kop man keken, me wek lwagi jo Icrael luŋ ŋe lweny, me epwonygi kede lweny, akato mere jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo mom ru tye kede ŋeccoro iye." 
Judges3:3 Rokkono gin ene: rwode a jo Piriciti abic, kede jo Kaanan luŋ, kede jo me Cidon, kede jo Kivi ame rik onwoŋo bedo i wi kidi me Lebanon, cakere i kidi me Baalkermon tuno kede naka i dog yo ame woto Kamat." 
Judges3:4 Gin onwoŋo tye me temo jo Icrael, me wek ŋe ka ce jo Icrael twero winyo cik a Rwot ame rik emio Muca ociko baŋ kwarigi." 
Judges3:5 Mannono te miyo jo Icrael bedo i akina jo Kaanan, jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc." 
Judges3:6 Jo Icrael rik te cako nyomo anyiragi me bedo mongi, kun gin daŋ omio awobe a jo-nono nyomo anyiragi. Gin te cako woro daŋ obaŋegi." 
Judges3:7 Jo Icrael rik te timo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot, kun wigi wil oko i kom Rwot Obaŋagi, oworo gigi Baal kede Aciterot." 
Judges3:8 Mannono rik te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, eka te jalogi oko i ciŋ Kucan-ricataim, abaka me, Mecopotamia. Jo Icrael rik te bedo i te twer a Kucan-ricataim mwakki aboro." 
Judges3:9 Cite i kare ame jo Icrael okok baŋ Rwot, Rwot rik te miyo jo Icrael dano a myero largi, ame rik daŋ te larogi. Dano-nono rik en Otniel wot a Kenaj, ame obedo omin a Kaleb atidi mere." 
Judges3:10 Cuny a Rwot rik obino i kome, en te bedo ŋolo kop a jo Icrael. En rik obin owoto olwenyo i kom Kucan-ricataim, abaka me Mecopotamia, eka Rwot te miye i ciŋe, en te loyo Kucan-ricataim." 
Judges3:11 Mannono rik te miyo lobo we pi mwakki pyeraŋwen. Icennere Otniel wot a Kenaj te to oko. 
Judges3:12 Jo Icrael rik dok te timo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot, Rwot rik te miyo teko baŋ Eglon, abaka me Moab me lweny i kom Icrael, pien gin onwoŋo otimo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot." 
Judges3:13 Eglon rik te coko jo Ammon, kede jo Amalek, te wot lweny i kom jo Icrael loyo oko, gin rik te mayo boma me otit oko." 
Judges3:14 Jo Icrael rik dok te bedo i te twer a Eglon, abaka me Moab pi mwakki apar wie aboro." 
Judges3:15 Ento i kare ame jo Icrael okok baŋ Rwot, Rwot rik te miyo jo Icrael dano a myero largi, ame en Ekud wot a Gera, ame obedo dano me atekere a Benjamin; rik en lo ame acam. Jo Icrael rikomio en otero mot baŋ Eglon abaka me Moab." 
Judges3:16 Ekud rik te tiyo pala lwennyere ame bit ryoryo, ame borrere kato futi acel oko. Ekud rik te rwako pala mere-nono iyi boŋo mere, i eme tuŋ cem," 
Judges3:17 en rik te wot miyo mot baŋ Eglon abaka me Moab. Eglon rik onwoŋo obedo twon lo moro ocwe meicel. 
Judges3:18 Kare ame Ekud rik doŋ onwoŋo otyeko miyo mot oko, en rik te cwayo jo ame onwoŋo oyeo mot teŋe," 
Judges3:19 ento en i kare ame owoto otuno i te kidi ame opao apaa ame rik onwoŋo tye ceggi i Gilgal, en olokere odok cen baŋ abaka, te kobbe ni, “Atye i kopporo me imuŋ ame ocwaa kede baŋi, abaka.” Abaka te juko jo ni “Liŋ wunu.” Odoŋe luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo baŋe te wot oko." 
Judges3:20 Ekud te bino baŋe kun abaka obedo kene iyi icika mere aŋic, ame tye malo i wi ot. Ekud te kobo ni, “An atye kede kwena ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa, ame akelo baŋi.” Abaka te ya oko malo i wi kommere." 
Judges3:21 Ekud te ryeyo ciŋe me tuŋ cem, te woto pala romo mere i eme tuŋ cem, te cobo kede yie," 
Judges3:22 pala te donyo naka i yie, eka moo te mwono lak pala oko, pien en mom onwoŋo owoto pala lweny i yie; cet te mollo oko." 
Judges3:23 Ekud te ya oko i kuno kato oko, te cego doggola me icika a tye malo i wi ot, te daŋ tweyo doggola oko." 
Judges3:24 Kare ame en doŋ owoto oko, amiro abaka te bino; ka gin oneno doggola me icika ame tye malo i wi ot tye ame otweo oko, gin obedo tamo ni, “En tye akonnyere i ot atidi aŋic-ca.”" 
Judges3:25 Gin te bedo kuro naka waŋ ame piny oloogi; kare ame gin oneno ni en mom oyabo doggola ot i malo, gin okwanyo agony ote gonyo kede doggola; gin te nwoŋo rwotgi obuto i dye ot kun doŋ oto oko." 
Judges3:26 I kare ame onwoŋo gin pwod tye ka gal ca, Ekud olwi, te riŋo gire oko, te kato naka i ŋe kidi ame opao apaa ca, te riŋo gire wot laro Ceira." 
Judges3:27 Kare ame en doŋ otuno kuno, en okuto apel i lobo me Epraim ame obedo kidikidi, jo Icrael rik te wot kede, kun oya i lobo obedo kidikidi, en telo wigi." 
Judges3:28 En okobbigi ni, “Lub wunu yora, pien Rwot otyeko miyo okworwu, jo Moab i ciŋwu.” Gin owoto karacel kede, ote wot mako waŋ kwaŋ me Jordan oko pi geŋo jo me Moab, mom ote ye ŋattoro ŋolo kulo." 
Judges3:29 Kare-nono gin te neko jo Moab ame buco romo tutumia tomon, ame moro mom obwot, kun gin luŋ obedo twoni jo mogo atek meicel." 
Judges3:30 I nino-nono rik jo Icrael te loyo jo Moab oko kittono, gin te bedo i te loc a jo Icrael, lobo te dok we pi mwakki pyeraboro." 
Judges3:31 Gat ame dok te bino lube, rik te bedo Camgar wot Anat, ame rik oneko jo Piriciti mia abicel kun neko kede ecipet me leko twoni. En daŋ rik olaro jo Icrael." 
Judges4:1 Kare ame Ekud oto oko, jo Icrael dok te timo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot," 
Judges4:2 Rwot rik te miyogi i ciŋ Jabin, abaka me Kaanan, ame rik oloo loccere i Kajor. Atel wi monnyere rik nyiŋe Cicera, ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Karoceta-goyim." 
Judges4:3 Jo Icrael rik dok te kok baŋ Rwot; pien en rik onwoŋo tye kede gadigadi mia aboŋwen me nyonyo, en te bedo wuno jo Icrael meicel pi mwakki pyeraryo twal." 
Judges4:4 I kare-nono dako ame obedo adwarpiny, a nyiŋe Debora ame en rik obedo dako a Lappidot, en a rik onwoŋo aŋolkop a jo Icrael." 
Judges4:5 En rik onwoŋo bedo i te otit a Debora, ame onwoŋo tye i akina Rama kede Betel, i lobo obedo kidikidi me a jo Epraim; jo Icrael rik woto baŋe kuno pi ŋolligi kop." 
Judges4:6 Debora rik te cwayo kwena lwoŋo Barak wot Abinoam ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Kedec i lobo a jo Naputali, eka te kobbe ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael ociki ni, ‘Wot icok joni i Kidi me Tabor, kun ikwanyo jo tutumia apar iyi atekere a Naputali kede iyi atekere a Jabulon." 
Judges4:7 An abino miyo Cicera ame obedo atel mony a Jabin bino rwatte kedi i dog kulo me Kicon, karacel kede gadigadi mere, kede monynyere luŋ; abino miye i ciŋi.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Barak rik te kobbi Debora ni, “Ka ce iwot keda, abino wot, ento ka mom iwot keda, an daŋ mom abino wot.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora te dok iye ni, “An abino wot kedi gire; cite myero ineni yo ame iwot iyenono mom ibino nwoŋo iye kwogo moro. Rwot bino miyo Cicera i ciŋ dako.” Debora rik te ya wot gin kede Barak naka i Kadec." 
Judges4:10 Barak te lwoŋo jo Jabulon kede jo Naputali i Kadec; jo tutumia apar rik te lubo yore; Debora daŋ te wot kede. 
Judges4:11 I kare-nono Keber, ame en dano me Keni, onwoŋo opokere oko i jo Keni, ame rik obedo ikwae a Kobab, ame obedo or Muca. En rik onwoŋo oguro kema mere teŋe kannabor ame ceggi kede kworo ame rik tye i Jaanannim, ame ceggi i Kadec." 
Judges4:12 Kare ame otitti Cicera ni Barak wot a Abinoam doŋ otyeko wot oko i kidi me Tabor," 
Judges4:13 Cicera rik te cwano wegi gadigadi nyonyo mere luŋ, ame gin rik romo tutumia abonwen, kede jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe, cakere i Karoceta-goyim naka i kulo Kicon." 
Judges4:14 Debora te kobbi Barak ni, “Ya doŋ malo, pien tin en nino ame Rwot omio iye Cicera i ciŋi. Rwot en ame bino telo nyimi.” Mannono te miyo Barak cako yitto piny i wi kidi me Tabor karacel kede jo tutumia apar ame onwoŋo lubo yore." 
Judges4:15 Rwot rik te babaŋo Cicera oko i nyim Barak, karacel kede wegi gadigadi mere luŋ, kede monynyere daŋ luŋ, te miyo nekogi oko luŋ i pala lweny; cite Cicera rik te pye oko i wi gadigadi mere, te riŋo i tyene." 
Judges4:16 Barak te ryemo yo gadigadi kede monygi naka i Karoceta-goyim; mony a Cicera luŋ rik ote neko oko i pala lweny, ŋattoro acel i akinagi mom odoŋ." 
Judges4:17 Ento Cicera te riŋo kede tyene naka i kema a Yayeri, ame obedo dako a Keber, dano me Keni; pien onwoŋo kuc tye i akina Jabin, abaka me Kajor kede jo me ot a Keber, ame obedo dano me Keni." 
Judges4:18 Yayeri te kato oko me jolle, te kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, wirre ilar baŋa kan, kur ilwor.” Cicera daŋ te wirre wot baŋe i kema mere, en te wumo kome oko kede boŋo moro." 
Judges4:19 Cicera te kwaye ni, “Tim ber koŋ imia pii moro amati, pien oryo pii obwoa oko.” Yayeri te yabo dog ocoe me cak, te miye mato, eka te wumo kome oko." 
Judges4:20 Cicera te kobbe ni, Cuŋ i dog ke ma, Ka ce ŋattoro obino te penyi ni, “Dano moro tye kan? Yin kobbe ni, ‘Pe gire’.”" 
Judges4:21 Cite Yayeri, dako a Keber te kwanyo teke guro kema, te kwanyo daŋ anyul mako i ciŋe, te cedde momot wot baŋe, te wot goyo teke i nyime tuŋ cel, naka teke odonyo, piny i lobo, pien onwoŋo Cicera onino meicel pi olo. Cicera te to oko kittono." 
Judges4:22 Cite nen ba, i kare ame Barak onwoŋo tye aryemo yo Cicera, Yayeri odonyo oko me wot jolle, eka te kobbe ni, “Biye, me anyutti ŋat ame iyenyonono.” Barak daŋ te wot iyi kema, te nwoŋo kom Cicera tye obuto piny i kema kannono, ame oto kun teke tye ogurre i nyime." 
Judges4:23 Mannono kite ame Obaŋa rik oloo kede Jabin, abaka me Kanaan i nino-nono i nyim jo Icrael." 
Judges4:24 Jo Icrael rik te medde diyo Jabin, abaka me Kanaan atek ateka, tuno waŋ ame gin otyeko oko iweŋ." 
Judges5:1 Debora gin kede Barak wot Abinoam rik te mwoco wer oko i nino-nono ni," 
Judges5:2 “Otel mony otelo wi Icrael, jo omiye gigi kengi kengi; pwo wunu Rwot!" 
Judges5:3 “Winy wunu ba, wun obakki, ter wunu yitwu ba, wun oloc; an abino wer baŋ Rwot, abino mwoco wer i dwon amit baŋ Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael." 
Judges5:4 “Rwot, i kare ame rik ibino i Ceir, i kare ame iya i lobo me Edom, lobo rik oyeŋere, kot daŋ ocwe i polo, ee ta, kot ocwe i pol." 
Judges5:5 Kiddi luŋ oyeŋere i nyim Rwot Cinai i tuŋ ca daŋ oyeŋere i nyim Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael. 
Judges5:6 “I kare a Cangar wot Anat, kede i kare a Yayeri, gudo oliŋ aboŋo jo awoto iye, jo dok lunyo ciro i yo atitino." 
Judges5:7 Jo abedo i caro mom bino bedo tye iyi Icrael, tuno waŋ ame yin Debora ibino, yin ibino acalo toto iyi Icrael." 
Judges5:8 I kare ame oyero obaŋe mogo anyen, aco lweny doŋ onwoŋo ceggi acega, Kwottoro onyo toŋŋoro rik onwoŋo nen ateni, i akina jo Icrael tutumia pyeraŋwen?" 
Judges5:9 Tamma te ŋwec i kom otel wi mony me Icrael, ame omiye gigi kengi kengi i akina jo Icrael. Pwo wunu Rwot." 
Judges5:10 “Wer wunu koppere ba, wun jo ame bedo i wi kana arema, wun jo ame bedo i kom opar me wel, kede wun jo ame woto i dye yo." 
Judges5:11 Dwon ower i ka twomo pii gin otye ka pako kede loc a Rwot kuno, gin opako loc a jo obedo i caro i kom okworgi iyi Icrael. I nino-nono jo a Rwot omol oluŋere piny naka i dogcel me boma." 
Judges5:12 “Debora wee, co oko, co oko! Co oko, co oko, me icak wer! Ya malo Barak me itel wi opiini ame iyako, ya malo yin wot Abinoam." 
Judges5:13 I kare-nono, jo a ŋeye ame odoŋ te cako mol; jo a Rwot omol me wot lweny pire i kom jo atek." 
Judges5:14 Jo Epraim oya te wot bedo i luŋ, kun olubo yori yin Benjamin kede watini; otel wi mony me Makir ociro owoto piny, omak abiro loc oya i megi i Jabulon." 
Judges5:15 Oloc a jo Icakar obino karacel kede Debora, kede jo Icakar ame geno Barak, gin ogwarre i yore luŋ. Ento jo me atekere a Reuben, cunygi mom obedo yom iye." 
Judges5:16 Piŋo kara rik ibedo iyi anok rommi, me winyo nyamulere ame okuto iyo rommi? jo me atekere a Reuben cunygi mom obedo ayom iye." 
Judges5:17 Gilead rik odoŋ loka Jordan; kara piŋo Dan rik obedo mere i mel? Acer te bedo mere mot i dog nam, kun otworo toke i waŋ kwaŋŋere." 
Judges5:18 Jabulon obedo lwak ame ojalo kwogi i to; Naputali daŋ amannono, i bar obedo tutur." 
Judges5:19 “Obakki rik obino, ote lweny; obakki me Kanaan olwenyo, i Taanak, kede i ŋet pii me Megido mom ote nwoŋo ryalloro me ayaka." 
Judges5:20 Acer me polo daŋ olwenyo, gin olwenyo i kom Cicera, kun olubo kite a gin wirre kede." 
Judges5:21 Kulo me Kicon ager-ri oterogi oko, i wi biamwonyi ager, Kicon ager-ri. Wot kede teko yin tipona!" 
Judges5:22 “Ogweŋ tyen aguraguragio moro piny kun opye okirre malo, aguraguragi pye kirre malo." 
Judges5:23 “Amalaika a Rwot te kobo ni, ‘Cen Meroj oko, cen jo a bedo iye atek meicel, pien gin okwero riŋo i duru a Rwot me konyo Rwot i komjo atek.’" 
Judges5:24 “Yayer i myero mi winyo adwoŋ meicel. Yayeri dako a Keber, ame obedo dano me Keni, kome i winyo a kato mon luŋ a bedo i kema." 
Judges5:25 Okwae pii, en olunyo miye cak, okele cak opoto i gwata moro me kwogo." 
Judges5:26 Ciŋe omako teke me guro kema, ciŋe tuŋcem te tiŋo anyul atic; te goyo wi Cicera tuco pel." 
Judges5:27 Oŋoye, te rette oko piny, obuto piny ilwe ka tyene, te ŋoye, rette piny i ka tyene, kan ame en oŋoye iye-nono te daŋ rette iye piny to oko." 
Judges5:28 “Dako oroo waŋe i waŋ dirica, tota a Cicera ociko waŋe kun neno i waŋ ot. Piŋo kara gadigadi mere oru meicel? Piŋo kara agruagura mere ogal meicel me mor bino?" 
Judges5:29 Monnere adito, aryek i ŋete ogamo doge, en daŋ te nwoŋo pire kene ni," 
Judges5:30 ‘Mom opoko jami ame oyako? dano acel acel tero nyako acel onyo aryo; boŋo ame ŋwaŋwara ame oyako pi Cicera, boŋo ame ŋwaŋwara, ame okekedo, boŋŋi aryo ame okekedo me abola i ŋuta acalo gin oyako.’" 
Judges5:31 “Ama Rwot, kono okworri luŋ otum kittono! Cite jo ame mari bed calo ceŋ ame pello i lyeto mere.” Lobo rik koŋ dok te we pi mwakki pyeraŋwen." 
Judges6:1 Jo Icrael rik dok te cako timo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot, Rwot dok te miyogi i ciŋ jo Midian pi mwakki abiro." 
Judges6:2 Ciŋ jo Midian rik te cirogi oko, ame te miyogi yiko ka ponogi iyi aduyi ame onwoŋo tye i akina kiddi kede gorogoro, kede i kabedo mogo ame ogeŋo atek pi lworo jo Midian." 
Judges6:3 Pien i kare luŋ ka jo Icrael ocoo kotigi doŋ piny, jo Midian kede jo Amalek, kede jo tuŋ kide, gin luŋ omukere, obino olwenyo i komgi." 
Judges6:4 Gin obino ote guro gonygi i ŋet jo Icrael, ote bedo balo cam i pottigi tuno naka i Gaja ame ceggi kedgi, kun mom oweko cammoro doŋ me konyo jo Icrael, akadi romo, onyo twon, onyo kana." 
Judges6:5 Pien gin ka obino, obino kede limgi akwo, kede kemagi, kun obino apipim calo bonyo a mom romo kwanne, karacel kede inagagi; gin ka obino, obalo lobo oko." 
Judges6:6 Jo Midian rik te miyo jo Icrael bedo jo moro a piny meicel kittono; jo Icrael rik te kok baŋ Rwot. 
Judges6:7 I kare ame jo Icrael okok baŋ Rwot pi peko a jo Midian," 
Judges6:8 Rwot rik te cwayo adwarpiny baŋ jo Icrael. Adwarpiny te kobbigi ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, yam atelowu me ya i Miciri, ate kwanyowu oko i ot me opii." 
Judges6:9 Rik, alarowu i ciŋ jo Miciri, karacel kede i ciŋ rok luŋ ame obedo wunowu ate daŋ ryemogi oko i, nyimwu, ate lunyo miyowu lobogi." 
Judges6:10 Rik ate kobbiwu ni ‘An a Rwot Obaŋawu; myero kur iwor wunu obaŋe a jo Amor, ame ibedo wunu i lobogi.’ Cite wun ikwero wunu winyo koppa oko.”" 
Judges6:11 I kare-nono amalaika a Rwot rik te bino bedo i te kworo ame tye i Opra, ame onwoŋo obedo mea a Yowaci ame obedo dano a jo Abiejer, kun onwoŋo rik wode Gideon tye adino ŋano i ka biyo olok, me ekan oko pi lworo jo Midian." 
Judges6:12 Amalaika a Rwot rik te nen baŋe, te kobbe ni, “Rwot tye kedi, yin twon lo atek me lweny.”" 
Judges6:13 Gideon te kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, koŋ akwai ba, kara ka Rwot tye kedwa, piŋo kop magi luŋ dok opoto i komwa? Kara ticcoro me awura ame kwariwa bedo tittiwa pire-ni tye kwene? Gin okobo ni, Rwot en ame rik okwanyowa i lobo me Miciri. Ento aman doŋ Rwot obolowa oko, omiowa doŋ i ciŋ jo Midian.”" 
Judges6:14 Rwot te lokere baŋe kobbe ni, “Wot ilar jo Icrael i ciŋ jo Midian i twon teko meri adwoŋ wokkono. Mom aori bo?”" 
Judges6:15 En te kobbe ni, “Tim ber, Rwot, an atwero laro jo Icrael i yore aŋo? Nen ba, atekerena en ame doŋ goro okato kare i akina jo Manace, dok an abedo cogo i doggolawa.”" 
Judges6:16 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Ento an abino bedo kedi, ibino neko jo Midian calo ineko dano acel keken.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideon te kobo ni, “Aco ka doŋ ayomoro cunyi, koŋ inyutta doŋ ginnoro ame nyuto ni yin en ikobo kedanono," 
Judges6:18 Tim ber kur iya i kan, tuno waŋ ame abino baŋi, akelo motta aketo i nyimi.” En te gamo ni, “Abino kuri tuno waŋ ame idwogo.”" 
Judges6:19 Gideon odok i ode, te wot tedo atin dyel, kede capat a tobi mom iye ame otedo i moko kwon a romo gwata adek. Eka te keto riŋo i dita, te onyo pige i tabo, te tero i te kworo, keto i nyime." 
Judges6:20 Amalaika Obaŋa te kobbe ni, “Kwany riŋo kede capat a tobi mom iye, me iketgi i wi lela man, ite onyo pig riŋo i komgi.” Gideon daŋ te timo kittono." 
Judges6:21 Amalaika a Rwot te cwayo abiro mere ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋe, te miyo wie gudo riŋo kede capat a tobi mom iye, mac te ya i kom lela-nono, te waŋo riŋo kede capat a tobi mom iye oko. Amalaika a Rwot te doŋ rwenyo oko i baŋe," 
Judges6:22 Gideon te niaŋ ni mannono kara onwoŋo obedo amalaika a Rwot; en doŋ te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, ato oko omayin! Pien aman doŋ aneno amalaika a Rwot waŋ i waŋ.”" 
Judges6:23 Cite Rwot te kobbe ni, “Kuc obed baŋi, kur ilwor, mom gire ibino to.”" 
Judges6:24 Gideon te cano keno lam kuno pi Rwot, te cako nyiŋe ni, Rwot en kuc, keno lammaca pwod tye ocuŋ i Opra, ame obedo me ajo Abiejer naka atot tin." 
Judges6:25 I dyeworrono Rwot rik te kobbe ni, “Kwany twon a pappi, twon me aryo mere ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo abiro, muk keno lam a pappi me yalo Baal oko, toŋ daŋ yat Acera oko ame tye i ŋete." 
Judges6:26 Eka i te cano keno lam a Rwot Obaŋani i ka pononi kan, kun icano i gweŋe ame ocano i yore. Kwany twon me aryo-ca ite ŋolo me mot awaŋa, kun iwaŋo i yen ame ocicibo i ka woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera, ame ibino toŋo.”" 
Judges6:27 Gideon daŋ te timo kittono, otero jo apar i akina omiro mere, te wot timo kite ame Rwot ocike kede; cite pi lworo jo turgi karacel kede jo me paco-nono, omio en mom oti mo dyeceŋ, ento otimo dyewor." 
Judges6:28 Kare ame jo me paco-nono odonyo oko odiko con, nen ba, gin onwoŋo keno lam a Baal omukere oko, kede Acera ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete daŋ otoŋo oko, dok daŋ owaŋo twon twon me aryo i keno lam ame ocano kuno." 
Judges6:29 Gin te bedo penyere kengi kengi ni, “Man ŋa kara ame otimo gin-ni?” I kare ame gin obedo yenyo kun opepenyo, gin doŋ te kobo ni, “Gideon wot a Yowaci en ame otimo gin-ni.”" 
Judges6:30 Jo me paco-nono te kobbi Yowaci ni, “Kel wodi oko kan me onek oko, pien en otyeko muko keno lam a Baal oko, dok daŋ otoŋo jo a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete oko piny.”" 
Judges6:31 Ento Yowaci te kobo baŋ jo luŋ ame onwoŋo oryeye me lweny i kome ni, “Wun ibino wunu me lweny pi Baal bo? Wun icuŋ wunu pire? Ŋat ame bino lweny pire obino neko oko odiko-ni. Ka ce en obedo obaŋa, wek en lweny pire kene, pien keno lammere doŋ otyeko muko oko.”" 
Judges6:32 Mannono omio ocako nyiŋ Gideon i nino-nono ni, Jerubaal, ame te koppere ni, “Wek Baal en ame lweny i kome,” pien omuko keno lammere oko." 
Judges6:33 Jo me Midian kede jo Amalek karacel kede jo me tuŋ kide, ote bino karacel ŋolo kulo Jordan, ote bino guro kemagi i luŋ me Jejreel." 
Judges6:34 Cuny a Rwot rik te bino i kom Gideon, en te cako kuto apel, te lwoŋo jo Abiejer bino lube." 
Judges6:35 En dok te cwayo kwena baŋ jo Manace luŋ, gin daŋ ote lwoŋogi bino lube. Dok te cwayo kwena baŋ jo Acer, kede jo Jabulon kede Naputali; gin daŋ te wot kuno me wot rwatte kede." 
Judges6:36 Gideon te kobbi Obaŋa ni, “Ka ce ibino laro jo Icrael kede ciŋa kite a rik ikobo." 
Judges6:37 Nen ba, an aketo lao romo piny i laro me dino kal; ka ce toyo bino luk ka i kom yer romo keken kun piny luŋ otwo atwoa, mannono bino miya aŋeo ni yin ibino laro jo Icrael kede ciŋa, kite a rik ikobo.”" 
Judges6:38 Rik daŋ te timere kittono. Kare ame en oya ibayi, odwidwinyo toyo i kom yer romo, toyo mere te poŋ yi bakuli," 
Judges6:39 Gideon dok te kobbi Obaŋa ni, “Kur imi akemo maki i koma. Tima kica akob doŋ icel keken. Koŋ iwek dok amed temo icel i kom lao romo-ni. Tim ber dok imi yer romo keken en ame bed otwo atwoa, cite kabedo luŋ ame en tye iyeni, toyo luk iye.”" 
Judges6:40 Obaŋa dok te timo kittono dyeworrono. Pien toyo onwoŋo oluk i kabedo luŋ ame yer romo tye iye, cite lao keken en onwoŋo otwo." 
Judges7:1 Eka Jerubaal, ame en Gideon, karacel kede jo a rik tye tye baŋe, te dilo i bayi, ote wot guro gonygi i ŋet pii me Karod. Gony a jo Midian onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi tutuŋ anyarodi, i luŋ ame tye i ŋet kidi More." 
Judges7:2 Rwot te kobo baŋ Gideon ni, jo ame tye baŋi-ni pol meicel, ame ka abino miyo jo Midian i ciŋe kede lwak jo-ni luŋ, bino miyo jo Icrael wakere i koma, ni mannono, “Ciŋa gira en olara.”" 
Judges7:3 Pi manono, kobbi lwak ni, “Ŋat ame lwor dok ame kome amyel, myero en dok gire paco.” Gideon daŋ te temogi kittono, eka jo tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo rik te dok paco, te doŋ jo tutumia apar." 
Judges7:4 Rwot te kobo baŋ Gideon ni, “Jo pol meicel; tergi i pii, me awot atemgi koŋ kuno. Ŋat ame an abino kobbi ni, ‘Dano man bino wot kedi’, bino daŋ wot kedi; cite ŋat ame abino kobbi ni, ‘Dano man mom bino wot kedi’;”" 
Judges7:5 En te tero lwak kan apii tye iye eka Rwot te kobbe ni, “Ŋat ame bino gamoro pii kede lebe ka amato, kite ame gwok gamoro kede ka ama to pii, dano-nono ibino poko pat; ibino daŋ timo kittono i kom dano acel acel ame bino rumo piny me mato pii.”" 
Judges7:6 Wel jo ame te mato pii i ciŋgi kun ogamoro kede lebgi bala gwok, te romo mia adek, cite jo ocele mege luŋ te rumo aruma me mato pii." 
Judges7:7 Rwot te kobbi Gideon ni, “Abino larogi kede jo mia adek ame omato pii kun gamoro i lebgi bala gwok, ate miyo jo Midian i ciŋwu. Mi jo ocele mege-ni luŋ dok gigi pacogi.”" 
Judges7:8 Gideon te gamo opoko pii oko i ciŋ lwak karacel kede apelgi; eka te cwayo jo Icrael ocele mege-ni luŋ dok oko i gony kun ŋat acel acel dok i kema mere, jo mia adek keken en ame te doŋ baŋe. Gony a jo Midian onwoŋo tye piny i luŋ." 
Judges7:9 I dyeworrono Rwot te kobbi Gideon ni, “Ya malo iwot ilweny i kom jo i gony, pien atyeko miyogi oko i ciŋi." 
Judges7:10 Aco ka ilworo me wot piny baŋgi kuno, wot i gonygi wun amironi Pura." 
Judges7:11 Ibino winyo gin ame gin akobo, mannono bino miyo inwoŋo tekcuny me cobogi i gonygi.” Gideon daŋ te wot gin kede amiro mere Pura naka i dog gony a jo Midian tuncel, kan ame olwenygi buto iye." 
Judges7:12 Jo Midian kede jo Amalek kede jo luŋ ame oya i tuŋ kide oryeo kemagi i luŋ kun opette calo bonyo a mom kwanne. Inagagi daŋ onwoŋo mom kwanne, calo kwoyo me dog nam." 
Judges7:13 Kare ame Gideon otuno kuno, lomoro onwoŋo tye atitto lekkere baŋ awottere, kun titte ni, “Nen ba, an aleko lekkoro ni aneno aŋina ogati moro me cayiri opoto i gony me Midian eka te bedo lor bino i kema, te napo reto oko piny kun loko yie ataro.”" 
Judges7:14 Awottere te dokke iye ni, “Man gire pala lweny a Gideon wot a Yowaci, dano me Icrael; en gire ennono i kome. Obaŋa gire doŋ otyeko miyo jo Midian karacel kede monnyere luŋ i ciŋe.”" 
Judges7:15 Kare ame Gideon doŋ otyeko winyo kite ame otito kede lek, kede kite ame ogonyo kede te koppere, en oworo Obaŋa. En te lokere dwogo cen i gony ajo Icrael, te kobo ni, “Ya wunu malo, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo mony a jo Midian luŋ i ciŋwu.”" 
Judges7:16 Gideon te poko jo mia adekkono i dul adek, te keto apel i ciŋgi gin luŋ karacel kede opoko pii mogo ame yigi nono, kun mac rao tye i yigi luŋ," 
Judges7:17 En te kobbigi ni, “Nen wunu, ite timo wunu daŋ gin ame an atimo. Kare ame an doŋ atuno ceggi i ŋet gony, tim wunu gin ame an ati mo." 
Judges7:18 Ka an akuto apel karacel kede jo ame tye baŋa, wun kut wunu apel i twok gony luŋ kun daŋ iredo wunu ni, ‘Pi Rwot kede pi Gideon.’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gideon karacel kede jo mia a rik onwoŋo tye baŋe te wot aceggi i ŋet gony i cuny dyewor ame jo ca pwod aketo okur-piny aketa, gin te cako kuto apelgi oko kun oneneko opokki ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋgi." 
Judges7:20 Eryoŋet adek luŋ te daŋ kuto apelgi kun daŋ oneneko opokki oko, kun omako mac rao i ciŋgi tuŋcam, eka i ciŋgi tuŋcem te bedo iye apel me akuta, ote daŋ wo kun oredo ni, “Pala lweny pi Rwot kede pi Gideon!”" 
Judges7:21 Gin luŋ ote cuŋ oko karacel kun ŋat man cuŋ kakare i ŋe gony. Mon ame onwoŋo tye i gony te ero ŋwec kun okok. 
Judges7:22 Kare ame okuto apel mia adek luŋ. Rwot omio mony a jo Midian oloko pala lwenygi i kom owotegi kede i kom monygi luŋ. Mony rik te riŋo naka i Bet-cita, ame tye i yo tutuŋ Jejera, tuno kede naka i waŋ lobo me Abel-mekola, ame tye i ŋet Tabat." 
Judges7:23 Eka rik ote lwoŋo jo Icrael i Naputali, kede i Acer, kede i Manace luŋ, gin te bino ryemo yo jo Midian." 
Judges7:24 Gideon te cwayo kwena i lobo me Epraim luŋ obedo kidikidi kun kobo ni, “Biye wunu, me ibin ilweny wunu i kom jo Midian, ikurgi wunu i waŋ kwaŋ luŋ tuno kede naka i Bet-bara, kede i Jordan.” Rik daŋ ote lwoŋo jo luŋ me Epraim, gin te bino mako waŋ kwaŋ luŋ, tuno kede naka i Bet-bara, kede i Jordan." 
Judges7:25 Gin rik te mako rwode a jo Midian aryo, Oreb kede Jeeb. Gin te neko Oreb i kidi me Oreb, eka Jeeb gin te neko i ka biyo olok a Jeeb. Man gin otimo i kare ame gin ryemo jo Midian. Gin rik te kela wi Oreb kede wi Jeeb baŋ Gideon loka Jordan." 
Judges8:1 Jo Epraim te kobbi Gideon ni, “Itimowa kara kit man piŋo ba? Nen yin mom ilwoŋowa i kare ame iwoto i lweny i kom jo Midian.” Gin te da i wie atek meicel." 
Judges8:2 Gideon te kobbigi ni, “Kara aman an atimo ŋo ame otwero poro kedwu? Mom rayo olok a jo Epraim obedo ber ame kato en ame Abiejer opwono oko?" 
Judges8:3 Nen, Obaŋa omio rwode me Midian i ciŋwu, Oreb kede Jeeb. Kara doŋ gin aŋo ame an atwero timo ame otwero poro kedwu?” I kare ame en okobo man, akemogi doŋ te cako kwe oko." 
Judges8:4 Gideon te kato loka Jordan, en karacel kede jo mia adek ame onwoŋo tye baŋe, kun onwoŋo gin ool meicel, cite onwoŋo pwod otye oryemo yo jo Midian." 
Judges8:5 Omio en te kobbi jo Cukot ni, “Tim wunu ber imi wunu ogati baŋ jona-nie, pien gin ool meicel, dok atye aryemo yo Jeba kede Jalmuna, ame gin rwode me Midian.”" 
Judges8:6 Rwode me Cukot te gamo ni, “Jeba kede Jalmuna doŋ imako oko bo, ame miowa omio ogati baŋ monnyi-nie?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideon te gamo ni, “Aco doŋ do, cite ka Rwot bino miyo Jeba kede Jalmuna i ciŋa, abino pwopwodo komwu kede okuto alal me tim kede okuto laŋo.”" 
Judges8:8 En rik te kato oko i kuno te kato naka i Panuel, te daŋ kwayogi kite acellono. Jo me Panuel daŋ te kobbe kite ame jo me Cukot onwoŋo okobbe." 
Judges8:9 En te kobbi jo Panuel ni, “Inino ame abino dwogo kan i kuc, abino muko twon gedo moro ocuŋ kan i guŋ-ŋi oko.”" 
Judges8:10 I kare-nono onwoŋo Jeba kede Jalmuna tye i Karkor, karacel kede monygi ame welgi romo tutumia apar wie abic. Man jo ame onwoŋo odoŋ i kom mony luŋ ame onwoŋo oya i tutuŋ kide; pien jogi onwoŋo doŋ oneko oko ame romo tutumia acel kede pyeraryo, ame rik gin onwoŋo jo me lweny." 
Judges8:11 Gideon te wot lubo yo ame jo a bedo i kema lubo ame tye tutuŋ kide me Noba kede Jogbeka, en te wot lweny i monygi, pien monygi onwoŋo obedo otworo tokgi ata aboŋo jo moro ame kuro piny." 
Judges8:12 Jeba kede Jalmuna rik te riŋo oko, eka en te ryemo yorgi, te mako rwode aryo me Midiannono oko, Jeba kede Jalmuna, te miyo monygi luŋ bedo ame komgi doŋ oto oko." 
Judges8:13 Gideon wot a Yowaci te doŋ dwogo i lweny kun lubo yo i tutuŋ malo ame woto i Kerec. 
Judges8:14 En te mako atin awobi moro me Cukot, te pepenyo en, awobi-nono te coye nyiŋ rwode kede odoŋe luŋ me Cukot, ame gin luŋ oromo pyerabiro wie abiro." 
Judges8:15 Gideon te wot baŋ jo Cukot, te kobbigi ni, “Neno wunu doŋ Jeba kede Jalmuna ame rik iŋala wunu pirgi-nie, kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Jeba kede Jalmuna doŋ imako oko bo, ame miowa omio ogati baŋ joni ame ool wokkono?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Gideon te mako odoŋe me bomanono, te jako okuto alal kede me laŋo, te bedo pwodo kede jo me Cukot." 
Judges8:17 Dok te muko daŋ twon gedogi ame onwoŋo ocuŋ i guŋ i Penuel, te daŋ neko jo me boma-nono oko." 
Judges8:18 Gideon te kobbi Jeba kede Jalmuna ni, “Ane kara jo ame rik ineko wunu i Tabor?” Gin te gamo ni, “Kite ame yin ibedo kede-nono, en kite ame gin daŋ rik otye kede; rik ocalli itino abaka moro.”" 
Judges8:19 Gideon te dok iye ni, “Jonnaca rik obedo omegona ame onywako kedgi toto; daŋ kite a Rwot tye kede kwo-ni, kono rik mom inekogi, kono an daŋ mom anekowu.”" 
Judges8:20 Gideon te kobbi Jeter wode me kao ni, “Ya malo inekgi oko.” Ento atin awobi ca mom gire te woto pala mere; pien en onwoŋo alworo, kite acalo rik en pwod atin awobi." 
Judges8:21 Jeba kede Jalmuna te kobbi Gideon ni, “Yin doŋ ya ikomi inekwa oko, pien kite ame ico tye kede, teko me kome daŋ tye kittono.” Gideon te ya neko Jeba kede Jalmuna oko, te gonyo mola me cal dwe ame rik onwoŋo tye i ŋut inagagi." 
Judges8:22 Jo Icrael doŋ te kobbi Gideon ni, “Yin doŋ bed alocwa, yin karacel kede wodi kede ikwai, pien yin ilarowa i ciŋ jo me Midian.”" 
Judges8:23 Gideon te kobbigi ni, “An gira mom abino bedo alocwu, woda daŋ mom bino bedo alocwu; Rwot en ame bino bedo alocwu.”" 
Judges8:24 Gideon te kobbigi ni, “Koŋ akwawu ba, ŋat acel acel myero otim ber omia mola yit ame eyako.” (Pien okworgi ame gin olwenyo i komgi onwoŋo rik tye kede jabu ame gin oruko i yitgi, pien gin rik obedo jo Icmael.)" 
Judges8:25 Gin te gamo ni, “Wan oye miyi gire.” Gin te peto boŋo piny, ŋat acel acel te bolo iye mola me yit ame eyako." 
Judges8:26 Pek a jabu me yit ame ekwao-naca te romo cekel tutumia acel kede mia abiro-nono kun nwoŋo mom oribo iye mola me cal dwe, kede mola aruka ame ryeny aryenya kede boŋŋi ame obedo amaramar ame rik onwoŋo rwode me Midian ruko, dok daŋ mom oribo iye mola ame onwoŋo gin tweo i nut inagagi." 
Judges8:27 Gideon rik te twakogi me epod, te keto i paco mere i Opra; jo Icrael rik te bedo timo tim me alaya kuno, eka te lokere doko kumma me ciko Gideon kede ode luŋ." 
Judges8:28 Obaŋa rik te loyo jo Midian kittono i nyim jo Icrael, naka mom dok ote medde tiŋo wigi atwal. Lobo rik dok te we pi mwakki pyeraŋwen i kare a Gideon." 
Judges8:29 Jerubaal wot a Yowaci rik te wot bedo i ode. 
Judges8:30 Gideon rik onwoŋo tye kede itino awobe pyerabiro, ame obedo itino mere ikokome, pien monne rik pol."
