Judges8:31 En daŋ onwoŋo tye kede dako ame obedo aŋeca, ame rik bedo i Cekem; dako-naca rik te nywalle atin awobi, ame en te cako nyiŋe ni Abimeriki." 
Judges8:32 Gideon wot a Yowaci rik doŋ te to oko ame doŋ onwoŋo oteggo aber abera, eka ote yike i lyel a pappere Yowaci, ame onwoŋo tye i Opra, me a jo Abiejer." 
Judges8:33 Kare ame Gideon doŋ oto, jo Icrael rik dok te lokere oko i timo tim me alaya baŋ Baal, ote miyo Baal-berit bedo obaŋagi." 
Judges8:34 Jo Icrael mom dok te po i kom Rwot Obaŋagi ame rik olarogi i ciŋ okworgi tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi. 
Judges8:35 Gin daŋ mom ote nyuto cunnyoro me mar i kom otino a Jerubaal (ame en Gideon) pi ginnoro luŋ aber ame en rik otimo i kom jo Icrael. 
Judges9:1 I kare-nono Abimeriki wot a Jerubaal rik te wot i Cekem baŋ ŋeo mere, te wot kobbigi luŋ karacel kede jo luŋ me doggola a tottere, ni," 
Judges9:2 “Kob wunu kop kun jo Cekem luŋ awinyo, ni, ‘Mene ame ber i tuŋ baŋwu, ka itino a Jerubaal luŋ en ame oloowu onyo ŋat acel en ame oloowu?’ Myero daŋ ipo wunu ni an abedo atin meremowu ikome.”" 
Judges9:3 Neo mere te kobo kop magi luŋ pire kun jo me Cekem luŋ awinyo. Cuny jonnaca rik te lokere oko me lubo Abimeriki pien gin okobo ni, “En obedo ominwa.”" 
Judges9:4 Gin te miyo Abimeriki lim me ryal a romo pyerabiro-nono, ame okwanyo i ot Baal-berit; en te bedo wilo i jo a konygi pe, ame kitegi obedo atata, me wek gin bed jo a lube." 
Judges9:5 En rik te dok paco i ot a pappere ame tye i Opra, te neko omego mere oko, ame obedo itino a Jerubaal, oneko gin pyerabiro luŋ i kom gweŋ acel keken; ento awobi a Jerubaal atidi mere Yocam, rik te bwot, pien en onwoŋo opono gire oko." 
Judges9:6 Jo luŋ me Cekem rik te wot cokere karacel, kede jo me Bet-millo luŋ, ote wot keto Abemiriki me bedo abaka i Cekem i ŋet kworo ame kidi ocibo me awora tye i ŋete." 
Judges9:7 I kare ame okobbi Yocam kop man, en owoto, te wot cuŋ malo i wi kidi me Gerijim, te redo atek kun kobbigi ni, “Wun jo me Cekem, koŋ iwinya wunu, me Obaŋa winy kwacwu." 
Judges9:8 I nino moro yen ociro me wot wiro ŋattoro i akinagi me bedo abakagi. Gin rik te kobo baŋ jeituni ni, ‘Lowa ba.’" 
Judges9:9 Cite jeituni rik te gamo ni, ‘Abino weko twon moo i koma-ni oko, ame oworo kede obaŋe kede dano, eka ate wot yeŋere i wi yen malo?’" 
Judges9:10 Yen dok te kobbi oduro ni, ‘Yin giri bin ilowa.’" 
Judges9:11 Cite oduro te kobbigi ni, ‘Kite ame alim kede wok-ki awek oko, kede nyigga abeco wok-ki, ate wot bedo yeŋere i wi yen malo kuca?’" 
Judges9:12 Yen dok te kobbi olok ni, ‘Yin giri bin ilowa.’" 
Judges9:13 Cite olok te kobbigi ni, ‘Awek piga ame yomoro cuny Obaŋa kede dano-ni oko, eka ate wot bedo yeŋere i wi yen malo kuca?’" 
Judges9:14 Yen luŋ te doŋ kobbi abelwinyo ni, ‘Yin giri bin ilowa.’" 
Judges9:15 Abelwinyo te kobbigi ni, ‘Ka ce iwira wunu i moo me loc, me wek abed abakawu i cuny me ateni, bye inwoŋ wunu ka larre i tipona; aco ka ce mom amannono, mac myero ya i kom abelwinyo owan yen cedar luŋ me Lebanon.’" 
Judges9:16 “Doŋ pi mannono ba, ka rik itimo wunu kede cuny me gen cunywu daŋ cil i kare ame iketo wunu Abimeriki me bedo abakawu, dok daŋ ka rik itimo wunu tim aber i kom Jerubaal karacel kede ode, ame itio wunu gin ame romo tic a rik en otio ca," 
Judges9:17 pien pappa rik olwenyo pirwu, ojalo kwo mere te larowu i ciŋ jo Midian," 
Judges9:18 nen, am an tin wun itwarre wunu me lweny i kom ot a pappa, ineko wunu itino mere pyerabiro i wi gweŋ acel, eka ite keto wunu Abimeriki ame obedo atin a dako aŋeca, me bedo abaka ame loo jo i Cekem, pien en obedo okeowu," 
Judges9:19 ka ce tin wun iŋeo wunu ni rik itimo wunu kede cuny me gen kun cunywu daŋ cil i kom Jerubaal karacel kede jo me ode, myero ibed wunu kede lelo i kom Abimeriki, en daŋ bed kede lelo i komwu." 
Judges9:20 Aco ka ce mom amannono, myero mac ya i kom jo Cekem kede jo me Bet-millo me wan Abimeriki oko.”" 
Judges9:21 Yocam rik te ŋwec gire oko, laro kome, te wot naka i Beer, te wot bedo kuno pi lworo ominnere Abimeriki." 
Judges9:22 Abimeriki te loyo jo Icrael mwakki adek. 
Judges9:23 Icennere Obaŋa te cwayo cuny arac i akina Abimeriki kede jo Cekem, te cako timo timmogo me apala i kom Abimeriki," 
Judges9:24 me wek tim me gero ame en rik otimo i kom itino a Jerubaal pyerabiro ca obed i wi Abimeriki, me tim me romo omego mere odok gire i wie pi nekogi, kede i wi jo Cekem, pien gin en ame omeddi Abimeriki teko me neko omego mere." 
Judges9:25 Jo Cekem rik te keto jo mogo buto i yo me kure i wi kidi. Jo-nono rik te yako jo ame bedo i yo-nono, rik ote kobbi Abimeriki koppere oko." 
Judges9:26 I kare-nono Gaal wot Ebed rik te dak i Cekem karacel i wati mere; jo me Cekem rik dok te cako keto gengi i kome. 
Judges9:27 I nino moro gin rik te wot i poto, ote wot pwono nyig olokgi i poto, ote nyono, biyo, ote yiko ecuban. Gin ote wot i ot obaŋagi, ote cem, ote mate daŋ kun oyeto Abimeriki." 
Judges9:28 Gaal wot Ebed te kobo ni, “Abimeriki en ŋa? Wan jo Cekem kono wan obedo jo aŋo, ame mio wan obedo tic pire? Wot a Jerubaal kede Jebul ame rik obedo awaŋe mom gin obedo tic baŋ jo Kamor ame obedo kwaro it jo Cekem? Ŋo ame mio wan dok obedo tiye?" 
Judges9:29 Kono ce jo man onwoŋo tye i ciŋa, kono akwanyo Abimeriki oko. Kono onwoŋo akobbe ni, ‘Med monnyi me obin onenne kedi.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 I kare ame Jebul, ame rik en obedo rwot me boma-nono owinyo kop a Gaal wot Ebed, akemo omako meicel." 
Judges9:31 En te cwayo kwena baŋ Abimeriki i Aruma kun kobbe ni, “Nen ba, Gaal wot Ebed karacel kede wati mere obino kan i Cekem; aman gin ocako tugo lwak me kan me lweny i komi." 
Judges9:32 Pi mannono ba, yin karacel kede jo ame tye baŋi, myero iwot wunu dyewor, iwot ibut wunu, ikur wunugi i yo poto." 
Judges9:33 Eka odiko con ame ceŋ pwod adonnyo adonya yin myero iya con, me iwot ilweny i kom boma-nono. Kare ame en karacel kede jo ame tye baŋe obino me lweny kedi, yin doŋ itwero timogi kite ame ineno.”" 
Judges9:34 Abimeriki te ya dyewor karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe, gin te wot buto kuro jo me Cekem kun opoko monygi aŋwen." 
Judges9:35 Gaal wot Ebed rik te wot cuŋ i dogcel me boma-nono, Abimeriki karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe, te ya i kan ame rik gin opono iye." 
Judges9:36 Kare ame Gaal onenogi, okobbi Jebul ni, “Neno koŋ jo ka aciro i wi kiddi malo!” Jebul te gamo ni, “Yin dok iloko tipo me kiddi doko jo.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaal dok te medo kobo ni, “Koŋ inen, koŋ inen jo tye aciro i dyere me lobo i malo ca, kun mony ocele ciro bino i tutuŋ yo me te kworo Atyet ca.”" 
Judges9:38 Jebul te daŋ kobbe ni, “Kara dogi ame iduro-nono tin tye kwene? Yin ame ikobo ni, ‘Abimeriki odoko ŋanono omiowa obedo tiye? Mannono mom jo ame yin icao-ni?’ Aco koŋ doŋ iwot ilweny kedgi.”" 
Judges9:39 Gaal rik te wot kun otelo wi mony me Cekem, te wot lweny i kom Abimeriki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeriki te cako ryeme, en te riŋo oko laro kome. Jo apol te bedo rereta kun owawano jo apol ata naka i dogcel me donyo i boma." 
Judges9:41 Abimeriki te bedo i Aruma, Jebul te ryemo Gaal kede wati mere oko, mom dok te miyogi bedo i Cekem." 
Judges9:42 Orwo mere ocele jo te wot i poto, ote daŋ bino titto koppere baŋ Abimeriki," 
Judges9:43 Abimeriki te tero jo mere, te pokogi i dul adek, gin te wot buto kuro jo i potti. En te neno jo tye abino adonyo i boma, en te ya lweny i komgi, te nekogi oko." 
Judges9:44 Abimeriki karacel kede dul mony ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe, te mwomere anyim i ŋwec naka i dogcel me donyo i boma-naca kun dul mony aryo ocele mwomere i megi dok kede i kom jo ame onwoŋo tye i potti, eka ote nekogi oko." 
Judges9:45 I nino-nono luŋ Abimeriki te bedo lweny i kom jo i boma, en te mayo boma-nono oko, te neko jo iye oko, te daŋ mumuko udi iye oko luŋ, te onyo kado iye." 
Judges9:46 Kare ame jo ame bedo i gedo me Cekem ocuŋ iguŋ malo owinyo koppere, gin te donyo iyi icika ame ogolle i te ot jok El-berit." 
Judges9:47 Eka rik ote titti Abimeriki ni jo luŋ ame bedo i gedo me Cekem ame ocuŋ iguŋ malo, tye ocokere karacel." 
Judges9:48 Abimeriki rik te wot i wi kidi me Jalmon, karacel kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye baŋe. Abimeriki te mako lee me toŋo yen i ciŋe, te cako totoŋo rido ryoŋo i wi gwoke, te wot kobbi jo ame rik tye baŋe ni, “Gin ame ineno wunu an atio, wun daŋ ru timo wunu kittono.”" 
Judges9:49 Mannono te miyo ŋat acel acel i akinagi lwero riddo mere lubo kede yo Abimeriki. Gin te wot yido riddogi-nono i wi icika ame onwoŋo ogolo ite ot jok El-berit, ote waŋo i cika-nono oko kede mac; mannono te miyo jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i gedo me Cekem ocuŋ iguŋ cato oko, co kede mon ame ceggi romo tutumia acel." 
Judges9:50 Abimeriki dok te wot lweny i kom Tebej, te guro gonnyere kun otiko kede Tebej, ote daŋ mako oko," 
Judges9:51 Twon gedo moro atek, ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ rik onwoŋo tye i dye boma-nono, co kede mon rik te riŋo laro kuno, ote cegere gigi oko i yie. Gin te wot naka malo i wi gedo-nono." 
Judges9:52 Abimeriki te wot i gedo ocuŋ mali i gunnono, te wot lweny iye." 
Judges9:53 Dako moro te boyo twon anya-kidi rego, te napo i wi Abimeriki tuco cogo me adammere oko." 
Judges9:54 Abimeriki te ru lwoŋo awobi ame onwoŋo otiŋo jami lwennyere ni, “Kom dako keken en oneke.” A wobi mere te cobbe pelo apela, te to oko." 
Judges9:55 Kare ame jo Icrael oneno ni Abimeriki doŋ oto oko, gin daŋ te ket oko, kun ŋat acel acel dok i paco mere." 
Judges9:56 Obaŋa te culo bal ame Abimeriki otimo i kom pappere kittono, pi neko omego mere pyerabiro." 
Judges9:57 Obaŋa te daŋ dwoko tim a jo Cekem areco luŋ i wigi, koppa a Yocam wot a Jerubaal ame rik ocenogi kede te cobere kakare i komgi." 
Judges10:1 Icennere, ŋat ame dok Obaŋa te miyo ya me laro jo Icrael i ŋe Abimeriki te bedo Tola wot a Pua, ame obedo wot a Dodo, dano me Icakar. En onwoŋo rik bedo i Camir, i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim." 
Judges10:2 En rik te ŋolo kop a jo Icrael pi mwakki pyeraryo wie adek. En te to oko, ote yike i Camir." 
Judges10:3 Jair ame obedo dano me Gilead te dok lube. En rik te ŋolo kop a jo Icrael pi mwakki pyeraryo wie aryo. 
Judges10:4 En onwoŋo rik tye awobe pyeradek, ame gin luŋ oriŋo i kanegi pyeradek. Gin onwoŋo daŋ tye i paccigi ame romo pyeradek, ame olwoŋo ni Kavot-jair tuno kede naka atot tin. Paccigi-nono onwoŋo tye i lobo me Gilead." 
Judges10:5 Jair rik te to oko, ote yiko kome i Kamon." 
Judges10:6 Jo Icrael dok te medo timo tim ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, ote cako woro Baal kede Aciterot, ame obedo obaŋe a jo Curia, jo Cidon, jo Moab, jo Ammon, kede me a jo Piriciti. Gin gigi ote weko woro Rwot oko." 
Judges10:7 Mannono te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, te jalogi oko i ciŋ jo Piriciti kede jo Ammon." 
Judges10:8 I mwaka-nono jo-nono rik te bedo ŋinyo jo Icrael kun owunogi atek. Jo-nono rik te bedo wuno jo Icrael pi mwakki apar wie aboro twal, jo Icrael luŋ ame onwoŋo tye loka Jordan, i lobo a jo Amor ame onwoŋo tye i Gilead." 
Judges10:9 Jo Ammon rik te ŋolo Jordan me wot lweny i kom Juda, kede Benjamin, kede i kom jo me doggola Epraim; mannono rik te miyo jo Icrael bedo i twon cannoro a mom kobere." 
Judges10:10 Jo Icrael rik dok te kok baŋ Rwot kun okobo ni, “Wan doŋ otyeko balo baŋi, pien wan oweko Obaŋawa oko, ote lunyo woro Baal.”" 
Judges10:11 Rwot te kobbi jo Icrael ni, “Rik mom alarowu i ciŋ jo Miciri, kede i baŋ jo Amor, jo Ammon, kede jo Piriciti?" 
Judges10:12 Cidon kede jo Amalek, kede jo Moab daŋ rik owunowu, i kare ame ikok wunu baŋa, alarowu i ciŋgi." 
Judges10:13 Kadi bed amannono, wun giwu iweka wunu oko, ite lunyo woro wunu obaŋe mogo ocele; pi mannono mom dok abino medde larowu kadi acel." 
Judges10:14 Wun doŋ ter kokowu baŋ obaŋe ame rik iyero wunu-naca; gin myero larwu i kare ame itye wunu i can.” 
Judges10:15 Jo Icrael te kobbi Rwot ni, “Wan giwa doŋ otyeko balo, yin myero itim ginnoro keken ame ineno ni ber baŋi ento myero itim ber ilarwa tin.”" 
Judges10:16 Gin rik te bolo kite obaŋe ocele luŋ ame onwoŋo rik tye baŋgi, ame obedo me orok, ote cako woro Rwot, eka Rwot yie te waŋ atek pi can a jo Icrael." 
Judges10:17 Jo Ammon rik dok te lwoŋere, ote wot ruko jami lwenygi, ote wot guro gonygi i Gilead, jo Icrael daŋ te cokere, ote wot guro gonygi i Mijipa." 
Judges10:18 Otel a jo Gilead te kop i akinagi kengi kengi ni, “ŋa ce ame bino cako ero lweny i kom jo Ammon? Danonono bino doko aloc ame loo jo ame bedo i Gilead luŋ.”" 
Judges11:1 I kare-nono onwoŋo Jeputa ame obedo dano me Gilead, onwoŋo twon lo moro atek meicel i lweny, cite en onwoŋo obedo atin a dako ame alaya Papa a Jeputa onwoŋo i Gilead." 
Judges11:2 Dako a Gilead daŋ te nywalle itino awobe. Kare ame awobe a dako-nono odoŋo, gin te ryemo Jeputa oko, kun okobbe ni, “Yin mom ibino leyo ginnoro i ot a papawa me bedo megi, pien yin ibedo atin a dako ocele.”" 
Judges11:3 Jeputa oriŋo te wot gire oko i lobo me Tob pi lworo omego mere. Jo mogo ame rik kitegi mom beco te cokere baŋ Jeputa, en te wot kedgi yako jami a jo ocele." 
Judges11:4 Ame kare pwod okato anonokkoro keken, jo Ammon te ero lweny i kom jo Icrael oko." 
Judges11:5 Kare ame jo Ammon ocako lweny i kom jo Icrael, odoŋe me Gilead te wot i lobo me Tob, me wot kela Jeputa." 
Judges11:6 Gin okobbi Jeputa ni, “Bye ibed atel wi monywa me owot olweny i kom jo Ammon.”" 
Judges11:7 Cite Jeputa te kobbi odoŋe me Gilead ni, “Rik mom idaga wunu ite ryema wunu oko i ot a papawu? Kara piŋo tin dok ibino wunu baŋa kun itye wunu kede peko?”" 
Judges11:8 Odoŋe te kobo baŋ Jeputa ni, “Mannono en gin omio tin dok olokere obino baŋi, me iwot kedwa, me owot olweny i kom jo Ammon, me ibed ŋat ame loo jo ame bedo i Gilead luŋ.”" 
Judges11:9 Jeputa te kobbi odoŋe a me Gilead ni, “Ka ce idwoka wunu paco pi lweny i kom jo Ammon, ka ce Rwot omiogi i ciŋa, an abino bedo adwoŋ ame loowu.”" 
Judges11:10 Odoŋe me Gilead te kobbi Jeputa ni, “Rwot bino bedo acaden i akinawa; wan obino timo kite ame ikobo-nono ikome.”" 
Judges11:11 Jeputa rik daŋ te cako wot kede odoŋe me Gilead, lwak te kete bedo ŋat ame loogi kede atel wi monygi. Jeputa rik te kobo koppere luŋ i nyim Rwot i Mijipa." 
Judges11:12 Jeputa te cwayo kwena baŋ abaka a jo Ammon kun kobo ni, “Kara abalo ŋo baŋi ba, omio yin ibino me lweny i kom lobona nie?”" 
Judges11:13 Abaka a jo Ammon rik te gamo kop okwena a Jeputa ni, “Pien i kare ame jo Icrael bino i lobo me Miciri, gin rik omao lobona oko, cakere i Arnon tuno anaka i kulo me Jabok kato kede a naka i Jordan; tin doŋ myero idwokka lobona kede kuc.”" 
Judges11:14 Jeputa dok te cwayo kwena baŋ abaka a jo Ammon," 
Judges11:15 kun kobo ni, “Jeputa okobo ni, ‘Icrael gire rik mom omao lobo a jo Moab, kadi lobo a jo Ammon," 
Judges11:16 ento gin gigi i kare ame rik obino i Miciri, gin rik obedo i dye tim tuno naka i nam Arema, eka gin te kato i Kadec," 
Judges11:17 Icrael rik te cwayo kwena baŋ Edom kun kobo ni, “Tim ber imiwa obe i loboni.” Cite abaka me Edom rik gire te kwero oko. Gin dok te cwayo kwena baŋ abaka me Moab, en daŋ mom te ye. Mannono rik te miyo Icrael bedo gire i Kadec." 
Judges11:18 Gin rik te dupo doŋ beo i dye tim kun omano lobo me Edom kede Moab amana, gin te tuno tutuŋ kide me lobo Edom. Gin te wot guro kemagi loka kulo Arnon tuŋcel. Cite gin gigi rik mom odonyo i lobo me Moab." 
Judges11:19 Jo Icrael rik dok te cwayo kwena baŋ Cikon abaka a jo Amor, ame rik paco mere tye i Kecbon, kun kobbe ni, “Tim ber imiwa obe i loboni”." 
Judges11:20 Ento Cikon rik mom te bedo kede gennoro i kom jo Icrael me miyogi beo i lobo mere, Cikon rik te coko jo mere luŋ karacel, ote wot guro kemagi i Jakaj, te lweny i kom jo Icrael." 
Judges11:21 Obaŋa a jo Icrael te miyo Cikon karacel kede Lwakkere luŋ i ciŋ jo Icrael, omio ote loyogi oko. Mannono te miyo jo Icrael gamo lobo a jo Amor luŋ bedo megi, ame gin obedo jo a rik onwoŋo bedo i lobo-nono." 
Judges11:22 Gin te gamo lobo a jo Amor luŋ, cakere i kulo me Arnon tuno anaka i kulo Jabok kede dok cakere i tim tuno naka i Jordan." 
Judges11:23 Rwot Obaŋa rik te ryemo jo Amor kittono, kun ryemogi i nyim jo Icrael. Aman wun jo Ammon imito wunu gamo lobogi-nono me bedo megwu?" 
Judges11:24 Wun mom ibino wunu gamo wunu lobo ame obaŋawu Kemoc omiowu me bedo megwu? Pi mannono, lobo luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawa oryemo jo iye i nyimwa, wan obino gamo bedo megwa." 
Judges11:25 Aman wun itamo wunu ni ikato wunu Balak wot a Jipor, abaka me Moab? Rik en koŋ otubere i jo Icrael? Aŋar onyo rik olwenyo kedgi?" 
Judges11:26 I kare ame rik Icrael bedo i Kecbon kede i pacci luŋ omano laŋete, karacel kede i Aroer kede pacci luŋ omano laŋete, karcael kede pacci luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i dog kulo me Arnon pi mwakki mia adek twal, piŋo kara rik mom imao wunu i kare-naca?" 
Judges11:27 Pi mannono, an gira mom atimo balloro baŋi, yin en ame itimo rac me ero lweny i koma. Rwot en ame Aŋolkop, myero en tin ŋol kop ame tye i akina Icrael kede Ammon.’ ”" 
Judges11:28 Cite abaka a jo Ammon mom gire te keto cunye i kwena ame Jeputa ocwaye. 
Judges11:29 Cuny a Rwot rik te bino i kom Jeputa, en te wot beo i dye Gilead kede i Manace, te kato i Mijipa me Gilead, ote ya i Mijipa me Gilead kato anaka i kom jo Ammon." 
Judges11:30 Jeputa rik te kwon baŋ Rwot kun kobo ni, “Ka ce ibino miyo jo Ammon i ciŋa," 
Judges11:31 ŋat ame bino donnyo i doggola moro me oda me bino rwatte keda i kare ame adwogo a kun doŋ aloo jo Ammon, dano-nono bino bedo mea Rwot, abino miyo dano-nono me mot awaŋa.”" 
Judges11:32 Jeputa rik dok te kato loka baŋ jo Ammon me wot lweny kedgi, Rwot daŋ te miyogi i ciŋe." 
Judges11:33 En rik te nekogi cakere i Aroer tuno kede i lobo ame ceggi kede Minit, pacci adito mege pyeraryo, tuno kede anaka i Abelkeramim kun nekogi atek meicel. Obaŋa rik te miyo jo Icrael loyo jo Ammon kittono." 
Judges11:34 Jeputa rik doŋ te dok cen i paco mere i Mijipa. Nen ba, i kare ame en abino, nyare obino me rwatte kede kun amyel ame ayeŋo ajaa. Nyare-nono onwoŋo tye en kene aboŋo ominnere moro, akadi aminnere." 
Judges11:35 Kare ame en oneno nyare, oyeco boŋŋi mere kenekene, kun kobo ni, “Oido, nyara! Idwoka piny meicel, man yin doŋ idoko gin ame okelo peko adwoŋ meicel i koma. Nen an onwoŋo doŋ atuco doga oko baŋ Rwot, ame mom dok atwero loko gin ame akwoŋo.”" 
Judges11:36 Nyare te kobbe ni, “Apap wee, ka doŋ ityeko tuco dogi oko baŋ Rwot, myero doŋ itim i koma gin ame dogi otyeko kobo, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko cuŋ kwor i kom jo Ammon ame gin okworri.”" 
Judges11:37 Dok te medo kobbi pappere ni, “Koŋ imi gin man timere pira, koŋ iweka pi dwete aryo, me koŋ awot aloloŋo wi kiddi, awot akok, akum pi tidina, an karacel kede anyira wadwa.”" 
Judges11:38 Pappere te gamo ni, “Wot giri.” En te cwayo nyare wot pi dwete aryo. Nyare kede owote mere te wot kok atek i wi kiddi kun okumo pi tidi mere." 
Judges11:39 Kare ame dwete aryo doŋ otum oko, en odwogo paco baŋ pappere, pappere te time kite ame rik okwoŋo kede. Nyannono onwoŋo mom ru oŋeye kede ico moro kadi acel. Mannono doŋ te lokere doko kit gin ame otimo iyi Icrael;" 
Judges11:40 anyira a jo Icrael doŋ woto mwaka i mwaka me wot kumo pi nyaka a Jeputa, ame obedo dano me Gilead. Gin rik kumo nino aŋwen i mwaka acel acel." 
Judges12:1 Jo Epraim rik te lwoŋere, ote wot ruko jami lwenygi, ote kato loka Jordan, naka i Japon, ote wot kobbi Jeputa ni, “Piŋo kara iwoto me wot lweny i kom jo Ammon kun mom ilwoŋowa owoto karacel kedi? Wan owaŋi oko i odi.”" 
Judges12:2 Jeputa te gamo doggi ni, “An karacel kede jona yam onwoŋo odagere atek kede jo Ammon; kare ame an alwoŋowu, wun mom ilarowa wunu i ciŋgi." 
Judges12:3 Kare ame aneno ni mom itwero wunu lara, an rik doŋ ate jalo koma, ate kato loka ca i kom jo Ammon, eka Rwot te miyogi i ciŋa. Kara piŋo tin dok ibino wunu baŋa me romo keda?”" 
Judges12:4 Jeputa rik te coko jo Gilead luŋ, te lweny i kom jo Epraim; jo Gilead te loyo jo Epraim oko, pien onwoŋo jo Epraim okobo ni, “Wun jo Gilead ame ibedo wunu i akina jo Epraim kede Manace, wun ibedo wunu jo Epraim ame rik iriŋo wunu ilaro wunu komwu.”" 
Judges12:5 En omio jo Gilead te mako dog kulo Jordan oko, me geŋo jo Epraim. Doŋ ka ŋattoro i kom jo Epraim ame ariŋo oko okobo ni, “Weka wunu awot leka-ca”, jo Gilead penye ni, “Yin i dano me Epraim?” Ka en ogamo ni “Pe gire”," 
Judges12:6 gin kobo ni, “Aco koŋ ikob ni Sibolet”, en daŋ te kobo ni “Cibolet”, pien en mom twero lwoŋo kakare. Gin omake ote neke oko i dog kulo me Jordan. Jo Epraim rik te to i nino-nono ame romo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie aryo." 
Judges12:7 Jeputa obedo aŋol kop a jo Icrael pi mwakki abicel. Kare ame Jeputa ame obedo dano me Gilead oto, oyike i paco mere i Gilead." 
Judges12:8 Icennere aŋol kop a jo Icrael te bedo Ibijan ame en dano me Beterekem," 
Judges12:9 En rik onwoŋo tye kede awobe mere pyeradek, kede anyira mere daŋ pyeradek, ame en rikomio onyomogi luŋ iyi atekere ocele. Awobe mere daŋ te nyommigi anyira me atekere ocele. En rik oŋolo kop iyi Icrael pi mwakki abiro." 
Judges12:10 Kare ame Ibijan oto, oyike i Beterekem." 
Judges12:11 Ŋat a rik dok te lube acalo aŋol kop a jo Icrael te bedo Elon ame obedo dano me Jabulon. En oŋolo kop a jo Icrael mwakki tomon. 
Judges12:12 Kare ame Elon dano me Icrael oto, oyike i Aijalon i lobo a jo Jabulon." 
Judges12:13 Icennere, aŋol kop a jo Icrael te bedo Abudon wot a Kilel ame obedo dano me Piraton." 
Judges12:14 En rik onwoŋo tye kede awobe mere pyeraŋwen kede ikwae pyeradek, ame gin luŋ rik oriŋo kede kanegi pyerabiro. En rik te ŋolo kop a jo Icrael pi mwakki aboro," 
Judges12:15 Abudon wot a Kilel ame obedo dano me Piraton dok te to oko, ote yike i Piraton, i lobo a jo Epraim, i lobo a jo Amalek ame obedo kidikidi." 
Judges13:1 Jo Icrael rik dok te medo timo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot, Rwot rik te miyogi i ciŋ jo Piriciti pi mwakki pyeraŋwen." 
Judges13:2 Lo moro rik onwoŋo tye i Jora, ame en dano me atekere a Dan ame nyiŋe Manoa. Dako mere rik onwoŋo oraŋa, onwoŋo mom tye kede atinnoro." 
Judges13:3 Amalaika a Rwot onen baŋ dakonono te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, yin ibedo oraŋa ame mom itye kede atinni moro, ento ibino yac, ibino nywalo atin awobi." 
Judges13:4 Pi mannono, myero igwokere kur imat koŋo olok, akadi kit kono moro ame mero dano, kur daŋ icam ginnoro ame cik ogeŋo," 
Judges13:5 pien ibino yac, ibino nywalo atin awobi. Lyedi mom biŋo gudo wie pien en bi no bedo atin akwera ame tye pi Obaŋa cakere i yic, en dok bino cako laro jo Icrael i ciŋ jo Piriciti.”" 
Judges13:6 Dako-nono te wot titto koppono baŋ cware ni, “Dano Obaŋa obino baŋa kun waŋe nen calo waŋ amalaika Obaŋa, iyiliyili meicel. Mom apenyo kan ame en oya iye dok daŋ mom otuca nyiŋe;" 
Judges13:7 cite en okobba ni, ‘Nen ba, ibino yac, ibino nywalo atin awobi, pi mannono, kur imat koŋo olok, akadi kit koŋo moro ocele ame mero dano, pien atinnono bino bedo atin akwera ame tye pi Obaŋa cakere i yic tuno kede i nino me to mere.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Manoa rik te kwayo Rwot kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, tim ber imi dano Obaŋa ame rik icwao ca dwog baŋwa, me bin pwonywa i gin a myero oti i kom awobi ame wan obino nywalo.”" 
Judges13:9 Obaŋa rik daŋ te winyo kwac a Manoa, amalaika mere te dok dwogo baŋ dako a Manoa i poto, kun cware onwoŋo mom tye kede kuno." 
Judges13:10 Dako te riŋo oyotoyot baŋ cware, te wot kobbe ni, “Dano ame rik koŋ obino baŋa ca, aman dok onen baŋa.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa te ya wot lubo dako mere, kare ame otuno baŋ dano-nono, openye ni, “Yin ibedo dano ame rik okobo kede dako man?” En te gamo ni, “An ennono.”" 
Judges13:12 Manoa te kobo ni, “Ka kop ame ikobo bino cobere kakare, atinnono myero bed kede kit kwo aŋo dok daŋ en myero ti tic aŋo?”" 
Judges13:13 Amalaika a Rwot te kobbi Manoa ni, “Myero dako gwokere i ginnoro luŋ ame doŋ atyeko kobo baŋe." 
Judges13:14 En myero kur cam ginnoro ame oya i kom olok, kur daŋ mat koŋo olok, akadi kit koŋo moro ocele ame mero dano, onyo ginnoro ame cik ogeŋo. En myero lub ginnoro luŋ ame rik acike iye.”" 
Judges13:15 Manoa te kobbi amalaika a Rwot, ni, “Tim ber, koŋ amii igal anonok ba, anekki koŋ atin dyelloro.”" 
Judges13:16 Cite amalaika a Rwot te kobbi Manoa ni, “Kad i bed imia agal, cite mom abino camo cemwu. Aco ka ce iyiko motoro me awaŋa, myero imi baŋ Rwot.” (Pien Manoa onwoŋo rik mom ŋeo ni en obedo amalaika a Rwot.)" 
Judges13:17 Manoa te penyo amalaika a Rwot ni, “Nyiŋi kara ŋa ba, me wek ka kop ame ikobo ocobere kakare, omi kwogo baŋi?”" 
Judges13:18 Amalaika a Rwot te kobbe ni, “Pino kara ipenyo nyiŋa, aco kun nyiŋa obedo me awura meicel?”" 
Judges13:19 Manoa rik te tero atin dyel karacel kede mot me moko kwon, te wot yalo i Rwot i wi lela, baŋ Rwot ame tio gin awura." 
Judges13:20 Kare ame leb mac olyel owikino malo i polo kun ya i kom keno lam, amalaika a Rwot te yito malo i kom mac i keno lammono, kun Manoa kede dako mere tye aneno. Gin te rette piny aryeba cuny." 
Judges13:21 Amalaika a Rwot mom dok te nen baŋ Manoa kede dako mere. Mannono en ame te miyo Manoa niaŋ ni en kara onwoŋo obedo amalaika a Rwot. 
Judges13:22 Manoa te kobo baŋ dako mere ni, “Ateni, wan gire oto oko, pien wan oneno Obaŋa.”" 
Judges13:23 Cite dako mere te kobo ni, “Kono onwoŋo Rwot oyikere me nekowa, kono gire mom ogamo mot awaŋawa kede mot me moko kwon ame omie, dok daŋ kono mom onyuttiwa kop magi luŋ, akadi tucciwa kop acalo magi.”" 
Judges13:24 Kare ame dako-nono onywalo wode, ocako nyiŋe Camcon. Awobi-nono rik te doŋo kun Rwot mie winyo." 
Judges13:25 Cuny a Rwot rik te cako tic oko i kome i Gony a Dan ame onwoŋo rik tye i akina Jora kede Ecitaol. 
Judges14:1 Camcon rik te wot naka i Timna, te wot neno nyako moro kuno ame obedo nya jo Piriciti." 
Judges14:2 Kare ame en odwogo paco, otitto koppere baŋ pappere kede tottere ni, “Aneno nyako moro i Timna ame obedo nya jo Piriciti; nyomma wunu en me bed dakona.”" 
Judges14:3 Cite pappere kede tottere te kobbe ni, “Nyannoro doŋ mom bo i akina anyira a wattini, onyo i akina rokwa luŋ, ame mio yin dok iwoto nyomo dakoni i baŋ jo Piriciti a mom lirre-nono?” Ento Camcon te kobbi pappere ni, “Nyomma gira nyannono, pien oyomoro cunya meicel.”" 
Judges14:4 Pappere kede tottere onwoŋo mom oŋeo ni koppere oya i baŋ Rwot, kun onwoŋo tye ka yenyo kare moro me lweny i kom jo Piriciti, ame gin en a rik i kare-nono obedo loyo jo me Icrael." 
Judges14:5 Camcon rik te wot i Timna karacel kede pappere kede tottere. Kare ame gin otuno i potti olok ame onwoŋo tye i Timna, atin eŋatu moro te mor i kome." 
Judges14:6 Cuny a Rwot te bino i kome kede tek, te miyo en yeyeco atin eŋatunono oko kite ame dano yeyeco kede atin dyel, kun onwoŋo gire mom omako ginnoro i ciŋe. En rik mom te tucci pappere onyo tottere gin ame etimo." 
Judges14:7 I kare ame gin tye kuno, en olato baŋ nyannaca, ame te yomoro yi Camcon meicel." 
Judges14:8 I ŋe kare anonok, en te dok baŋ nyannaca me wot moko nyomgi, en koŋ te gak me wot neno kom eŋatu a rik ca, cite nen ba, kic apipim onwoŋo tye oŋinne i kom eŋatu-nono kun moo kic daŋ tye iye." 
Judges14:9 En te toto moro mako i ciŋe, te wot kede kun camo. Kare ame en otuno baŋ pappere kede tottere, en omiogi daŋ moro aduno, gin daŋ te camo; cite en mom okobbigi ni etoto i kom eŋatu ame oto." 
Judges14:10 Papa a Camcon te wot doŋ baŋ nyako-naca, Camcon te tedo arama kuno, pien mannono en gin ame rik awobe timo." 
Judges14:11 Kare ame lwak me kuno onene, gin okelo jo ocele pyeradek me bino galo waŋe." 
Judges14:12 Camcon okobo baŋgi ni, “Koŋ apenywu i kocca moro ni ba; ka ce itwero gonnya wunu tere a mom ru nino abiro me arama-ni otum, kun ŋat ogonyo-nono ogonyo kakare, abino miyowu boŋŋi camanini pyeradek kede boŋŋi abeco me aruka i nino adoŋo daŋ ame romo pyeradek." 
Judges14:13 Cite ka gonyo tere oloowu oko, wun ibino miya wunu boŋŋi camanini pyeradek, kede boŋŋi abeco me aruka i nino adoŋo daŋ ame romo pyeradek.” Gin te kobbe ni, “Aco koŋ doŋ i kob koccinono wan owiny.”" 
Judges14:14 En te kobbigi ni, “I kom amwod jo oya iye cam. I kom atekom oya iye twon ginnoro alim.” Gin te tyeko nino adek kun mom oromo gonyo tyen koc a Camcon." 
Judges14:15 I nino me aŋwennere gin te kobbi nyako ame Camcon anyomo ni, “Bibito cwari me tucciwa tyen koccono, me kur owaŋ i oko kede mac, yin karacel kede ot a pappi. Ilwoŋowa wunu kan me bino yako wunu jamiwa bo?”" 
Judges14:16 Nyako ame onwoŋo Camcon anyomo te wot kok i nyim Camcon kun kobo ni, “Yin gire idaga, mom imara kadi acel; koŋ inen yin ikobbi jo me turwa koc, aco kono mom itucca tere.” En te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, an mom akobbi pappa kede totta, itamo ni atwero titti?”" 
Judges14:17 En te bedo kok i nyime pi nino kany wie aryo ame aramagi ori kede. I nino me kany wie aryo mere, en te titte tere oko, pien en onwoŋo doŋ odie meicel. Nyannono te wot kobbi jo me turgi koccono oko." 
Judges14:18 I nino me abiro, jo me boma-nono rik doŋ te kobo baŋ Camcon kun ceŋ mom ru opoto ni, “Ŋo a dok lim kato moo kic? Ŋo a kome tek kato eŋatu?” Camcon te kobbigi ni, “Kono mom ibedo pur wunu iroana, kono mom igonyo wunu te kocca.”" 
Judges14:19 Cuny a Rwot rik te bino i kome kede tek. En te wot i Acikelon, te wot neko jo pyeradek, te yako jamigi, te miyo boŋŋigi abeco me aruka i nino adoŋo baŋ jo ame ogonyo te koccere; en te doŋ dok paco i ot a pappere kun akemo ociro oko," 
Judges14:20 Aco nyako ame Camcon rik onwoŋo anyomo ote lunyo miyo baŋ awottere ame onwoŋo olwoke. 
Judges15:1 Ame kare pwod okato anokkoro keken, kare me kayo ŋano, Camcon owoto me wot limo nyako ame enyomo kun otero daŋ atin dyel. En okobo ni, “Abino donyo baŋ dakona iyi icika.” Cite pappa a nyako mom te ye ni en dony." 
Judges15:2 Papa a nyako te kobo ni, “An onwoŋo doŋ atamo ni yin ikwerre oko, omio an ate miye baŋ awotti oko, ame rik onwoŋo olwoki. Aminnere atidi ber kate oko, tim ber iluny doŋ tero akakare.”" 
Judges15:3 Camcon te kobbigi ni, “Man doŋ balloro gire mom bi no bedo i wia ka ce atimo ginnoro arac i kom jo Piriciti.”" 
Judges15:4 Camcon te wot mako ekwe mia adek, te daŋ kwanyo rao; en te bedo lolokogi kun mio yib man tikere kede me awottere, te tweyo rao i yibgi kun gin luŋ doŋ otweogi aryo aryo." 
Judges15:5 Camcon te cwinyo mac i kom rao, te weko ekwe riŋo kede i potti ŋano a jo Piriciti ame mom ru okakao. Mac te wano arita luŋ ame onwoŋo otwetweo kede ŋano luŋ ame onwoŋo mom ru okao, anaka potti olok-gi kede me jeituni." 
Judges15:6 Jo Piriciti te kobo ni, “Ŋa kara otimo man?” Jo te kobo ni, “Camcon, ame obedo or lo moro me Timna, pien en omio nyako ame rik onwoŋo en anyomo baŋ awottere ame onwoŋo rik olwoke.” Mannono te miyo jo Piriciti bino waŋo nyannono oko kede mac karacel kede pappere." 
Judges15:7 Cite Camcon te kobbigi ni, “Ka ce gin itimo wunu ene, akwoŋo akwoŋa ni abino culo kwor i komwu, en amio cunya te cayo koppere.”" 
Judges15:8 En te cocobogi oko, te nekogi meicel, en te wot bedo i akina lela me Etam ame obarre." 
Judges15:9 Jo Piriciti rik te bino guro kemagi i Juda, gin te cako lweny i Leki." 
Judges15:10 Jo Juda te kobo ni, “Piŋo kara ibino wunu me lweny i komwa?” Gin te gamo ni, “Wan obino tweyo Camcon, me wek wan daŋ otime kite ame otimowa kede.”" 
Judges15:11 Jo Juda tutumia adek te wot i lela me Etam ame obarre, ote kobbi Camcon ni, “Yin mom iŋeo ni jo Piriciti en ame tye ka loyowa? Kara man ŋo ame yin itimo i komwa-nie?” Camcon te gamo doggi ni, “Kite ame gin rik otima kede, en ame an daŋ atimogi kede.”" 
Judges15:12 Gin te kobbe ni, “Wan obino tweyi, miyi i ciŋ jo Piriciti.” Camcon te kobbigi ni, “Koŋ ige kwoŋ wunu baŋa ni mom wun en ibino neka wunu.”" 
Judges15:13 Gin te gamo ni, “Pe gire; wan otweyi atwea keken, owot miyi i ciŋgi.” Gin te tweye kede tol aryo anyen, ote kele oko i lela." 
Judges15:14 Kare ame en otuno i Leki, jo Piricitite bino me bino rwatte kede kun owoo i redo. Cuny a Rwot rik te bino i kome kede tek, tol ame onwoŋo rik otweo i ciŋe te doko calo tol tworo ame mac owaŋo, te cako cocota oko i ciŋe." 
Judges15:15 En te cop i cogo moro me itinyo kana ame mom ru operakino wok, te cwayo ciŋe kwanyo, eka te neko i jo tutumia twal." 
Judges15:16 Camcon te kobo ni, “Cogo itinyo kana, omio kom jo oradde awu awu, cogo itinyo kana, omia aneko jo tutumia.”" 
Judges15:17 Kare ame en doŋ otyeko kobo koppere, obolo cogo itinyo kana i ciŋe piny; te cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Ramat-leki." 
Judges15:18 Oryo pii te cako cire atek meicel, en te cako bako doge baŋ Rwot kun kobo ni, “Nen, yin doŋ ityeko miyo ciŋ amironi oloo twon lweny adwoŋ kit man; doŋ myero oryo pii en amia ato, kun mia apoto i ciŋ jo ame mom oliro?”" 
Judges15:19 Obaŋa te miyo wan kan atwolo yabere i kom kidi ame tye i Leki, pii te mollo iye. Kare ame en doŋ otyeko mato, cunye doŋ te dwogo, te dok limo teko. Mannono omio ocako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni, En-akore, pwod tye amannono naka atot tin." 
Judges15:20 Camcon obedo aŋolkop a jo Icrael pi mwakki pyeraryo, i kare a jo Piriciti." 
Judges16:1 Nino moro Camcon owoto i Gaja, en te wot neno alaya moro kuno, te wot buto baŋe." 
Judges16:2 Kop man rik te winyere oko baŋ jo me Gaja, ni, “Camcon obino kan.” Jo Gaja te guro kabedo-nono oko, ote bedo ki ye dyewor benebene i dogcel me boma. Gin obedo liŋ aliŋa dyeworrono luŋ kun omuno amuŋa ni, “Koŋ okur wunu piny ru, ote doŋ neke.”" 
Judges16:3 Cite Camcon te buto gire kuno naka i cuny dyewor, te ya oko i kuno, te wot mako dogcel me boma-nono kede pagi mere aryo luŋ, te telo puto oko luŋ naka kede arii me cego, te yeyo i wi gwoke, tero naka i wi kidi ame tye i nyim Kebron." 
Judges16:4 I ŋe man en dok te cako mito dako moro ame onwoŋo tye i luŋ me Corek, ame nyiŋe Delila." 
Judges16:5 Rwode a jo Piriciti te bino baŋ dako-nono, ote kobbe ni, “Tim ber ibwolliwa lonnono, me inen kan ame teko mere adwoŋ wok-ki tye iye, kede yo aŋo a myero oloc kede, ame twero miyo wan otwee ote loye oko, Wan luŋ ŋat acel acel bi no miyi ryal tutumia acel kede mia acel.”" 
Judges16:6 Delila te cako kobbi Camcon ni, “Tim ber imia aŋe kan ame tekoni adwoŋ wok-ki tye iye kede yo aŋo ame otwero tweyi kede eka ote loyi oko.”" 
Judges16:7 Camcon te kobbe ni, “Ka ce otwea kede toli anyen kany wie aryo, ame mom ru otwo, abino doko agoro calo dano moro keken.”" 
Judges16:8 Rwode a jo Piriciti te kelle toli anyen me atera kany wie aryo, amom ru otwo, Delila te tweyo kede Camcon." 
Judges16:9 I kare-nono onwoŋo en tye kede jo ame en omio opono iyi icika mere me kiye. En te kobbi Camcon ni, “Camcon, neno jo Piriciti obino oko i komi!” Cite en gire te codo toli oko luŋ bala uci boŋo ka mac ogudo. Mannono mom te miyo kan ame teko mere tye iye ŋeye." 
Judges16:10 Delila te kobbi Camcon ni, “Koŋ inen doŋ kite ame ituko kede, ikobba giri kop me goba. Tim ber ikobba kite ame myero tweyi kede.”" 
Judges16:11 En dok te kobbi Delila ni, “Ka ce otwea i toli anyen ame mom ru otio kedgi, abino doko goro acalo dano moro keken.”" 
Judges16:12 Delila dok te kwanyo tol anyen, te tweye kede, eka te kobbe ni, “Camcon, neno jo Piriciti obino oko i komi!” Jo onwoŋo tye opono icika mere me kiye. En te codo toli oko i bade bala uci." 
Judges16:13 Delila dok te kobbi Camcon ni, “Koŋ inen pwod imedde giri tuko kede atuka naka aman, ikobba giri dok kop me goba. Tim ber ikobba kite ame myero twei kede.” Camcon te kobbe ni, “Ka ce imako dog yer wia abiro-ni, ikedo i kom boŋo ame it ye ka cweyonono, ite rido kede yat, abino doko goro calo dano moro keken.”" 
Judges16:14 Mannono omio i kare ame en onino, Delila omako dog yer wie abiro ca, te kedo oko i kom boŋo ame onwoŋo en tye ka cweyo. En te kobbi Camcon ni, “Camcon neno jo Piriciti tye abino i komi!” Camcon te co oko i wan nino, te putogi luŋ karacel kede yer wie ame onwoŋo okedo karacel kede i wi boŋo ame onwoŋo nyannono obedo cweyo." 
Judges16:15 Delila dok te kobo ni, “Kara doŋ itwero kobo nino, ni, ‘Amari’, kun iyi ateni cunyi mom gire i koma? Nen aman doŋ ibedo tuko keda atuka odoko tyen adek twal kun mom ikobba kan ame twon tekoni adwoŋ wok-ki tye iye.”" 
Judges16:16 Kare ame nya-nu obedo didde nino i nino kun die atek meicel, omio cunye daŋ te mito to." 
Judges16:17 En doŋ te yabbi Delila kop i cunye ducu, te kobbe ni, “Lyedi mom ru ogudo wia; pien an abedo dano akwera ame tye pi Obaŋa cakere iyi totta. Doŋ ka kono lyel yer wia, te kona ya oko i koma, ate doŋ doko ŋat agoro, ate doko calo dano moro keken.”" 
Judges16:18 Kare ame Delila doŋ oneno ni en otyeko yabbe kop i cunye luŋ, en ocwao kwena olwoŋo rwode a jo Piriciti kun kobbigi ni, “Koŋ dok ibin wunu tyen acel keken, pien doŋ otyeko yabba kop luŋ i cunye.” Rwode a jo Piriciti daŋ te bino i limgi i ciŋgi." 
Judges16:19 Delila te miyo Camcon nino i tyene, te lwoŋo lo moro bino lyelo dog yer wie abiro ca oko. Delila te cako ti mo bala wuwuno en, teko mere te ya oko i kome." 
Judges16:20 Delila te kobbe ni, “Camcon, neno jo Piriciti tye abino i komi.” Camcon te co oko i wan nino kun tye atamo ni, “Abino donyo oko kite a yam abedo timo, ate tenogi oko teŋe.” En onwoŋo mom ŋeo ni Rwot doŋ otyeko we ke oko." 
Judges16:21 Jo Piriciti te make, ote kokolo waŋe oko, ote tere naka i Gaja. Gin te tweye kede jegere me mola. En te bedo rego kai i buc." 
Judges16:22 Yer wie ame rik olyelo cate cako lot. 
Judges16:23 I kare-nono rwode me Piriciti te cokere karacel me miyo motgi baŋ Dagon, ame obedo obaŋagi, kede dok me bedo kade lelo i nyime. Pien gin onwoŋo okobo ni, “Obaŋawa doŋ omio akworwa Camcon i ciŋwa.”" 
Judges16:24 Ka lwak jo Piriciti onene, opako obaŋagi kun kobo ni, “Obaŋawu doŋ omio akworwa Camcon i ciŋwa, lo ame onwoŋo obalo lobowa oko, oneko jowa apol meicel.”" 
Judges16:25 Kare ame cunygi doŋ yom atek, gin te kobo ni, “Lwoŋ Camcon me bin tuk tuko moro i nyimwa ogal kede waŋwa.” Rik daŋ ote lwoŋo Camcon i ot buc, en te bedo tuko i nyimgi. Gin te weke cuŋ i akina pagi aryo." 
Judges16:26 Camcon te kobbi awobi ame onwoŋo apeye ni, “Koŋ iwek ciŋa me aboŋ pagi ame teko a ot ocuŋ i komgini, me koŋ ajeŋere i komgi.”" 
Judges16:27 I cawanono onwoŋo jo pol atek i ot, co kede mon; rwode a jo Piriciti luŋ onwoŋo rik daŋ tye kuno, aco i wi ot malo onwoŋo tye iye co kede mon ame romo tutumia adek, ame onwoŋo tye aneno tuko ame Camcon atuko." 
Judges16:28 Camcon rik te kok baŋ Rwot kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, tim ber ipo pira, tim ber imia tekkom tyen acel-li doŋ keken, ama Obaŋa, me acul kwor i kom jo Piriciti pi waŋa acel keken.”" 
Judges16:29 Camcon te mako pagi aryo ame onwoŋo tye i dye ot, ame teko me ot luŋ ocuŋ i komgi, te luŋo teko mere luŋ i komgi kun ciŋe tuŋcam omako pagi acel, eka me tuŋcem te mako pagi ocele." 
Judges16:30 Camcon te kobo ni, “Wek doŋ ato karacel kede jo Piriciti.” En doŋ te telle i teko mere luŋ, ot te rette oko piny i kom rwode luŋ kede jo luŋ ame rik tye iye. Man te miyo jo ame en oneko i kare me to mere obedo abup ame kato jo ame en oneko con i kare me kwo mere." 
Judges16:31 Omego mere kede jo me doggolagi luŋ te bino kwanyo kome, ote tero wot yiko i akina Jora kede Ecitaol, i lyel a pappere Manoa. En rik obedo aŋolkop a jo Icrael pi mwakki pyeraryo nono." 
Judges17:1 Rik tye lo moro i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim, nyiŋe Mika." 
Judges17:2 En rik okobbi tottere ni, “Cekel me ryal tutumia acel kede mia acel ame rik okwalo i baŋi ca, ame rik ikobo ni iceno dano pire ca kun ikobo ame an awinyo, limmono tye baŋa, an en onwoŋo akwanyo.” Tottere te kobbe ni, “Rwot omii winyo, woda,”" 
Judges17:3 En te dwoko cekel me ryal tutumia acel kede mia acel ca baŋ tottere. Tottere te kobo ni, “An doŋ atyeko jalo ryal man oko baŋ Rwot kun amie pi woda, gin ame oya i ciŋa, me tiyo cal apaa kede cal atwaka. Pi mannono ba, aman doŋ an abino dwoko oko baŋi.”" 
Judges17:4 Mannono omio i kare ame en odwoko limmono baŋ tottere, tottere okwanyo ryal ame romo cekel mia aryo, te miyo baŋ atet ryal, ame te tiyo kede cal apaa kede cal atwaka. Callono te bedo i ot a Mika." 
Judges17:5 Mika rik onwoŋo tye kede ot me woro obaŋa, en te tiyo epod kede terapim, te daŋ keto wode acel me bedo alamdoggere." 
Judges17:6 I kare-nono onwoŋo jo Icrael mom tye kede abaka moro; dano acel acel onwoŋo timo gin ame en oneno ni ber baŋe. 
Judges17:7 I kare-nono onwoŋo tye atin awobi moro me Beterekem i Juda, ame en dano me atekere a Juda, ame en rik Alevi; en daŋ onwoŋo rik bedo kuno." 
Judges17:8 Dano-nono rik te ya oko i Beterekem i Juda, me wot bedo kannoro ame ebino nwoŋo iye kabedo. I kare ame en owoto, otuno i lobo obedo kidkidi me Epraim, i ot a Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika te penye ni, “Kara yin iya i kwene?” En te dokke ni, “An abedo Alevi me Beterekem i Juda, doŋ an atye awot kannoro keken ame abino nwoŋo iye kabedo.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika te kobbe ni, “Yin doŋ bed keda kan, yin ibino bedo pappa kede alamdogga, an abino miyi ryal aromo cekel apar mwaka i mwaka, kede boŋŋi me arukani; dok daŋ abino gwoki.”" 
Judges17:11 Dano-nono te ye bedo baŋ Mika; atin awobi-nono te doŋ doko calo ŋat acel i akina awobe mere. 
Judges17:12 Mika te keto dano me atekere Alevi-nono me bedo alamdoggere, en doŋ te bedo i ode." 
Judges17:13 I kare-nono Mika te kobo ni, “Aman doŋ aŋeo ni Rwot bino bedo keda aber, pien dano ame Alevi en a doŋ obedo alamdogga.”" 
Judges18:1 I kare-nono onwoŋo jo Icrael mom tye kede abaka; dok daŋ i kare-nono onwoŋo atekere a jo Dan tye ka yenyo lobo me alea me bedo megi, me obedo iye, pien gin onwoŋo rik mom ru onwoŋo lobo moro me bedo megi i akina jo Icrael." 
Judges18:2 Mannono rik te miyo jo Dan cwayo jo abic aryek i akina atekeregi luŋ, jo ame oya i Jora kede jo ame oya i Ecitaol, me wot roto lobo kede ŋiyo aber. Gin te kobbigi ni, “Wot irot wunu lobo.” Gin te wot i lo bo a jo Epraim ame obedo kidkidi i ot a Mika ote wot buto kuno." 
Judges18:3 I kare ame gin tye i ot a Mika, gin oŋeo dwon Alevi atidi ca oko; gin olokore baŋe ote kobbe ni, “Yin kara ŋa okelli kan? Ŋo kara ame yin itimo kan? Tic aŋo ame yin itio kan?”" 
Judges18:4 En te kobbigi ginnoro luŋ ame Mika otimo baŋe i yore i yore, kun kobo ni, “En aye cula kun an atio baŋe acalo alamdog.”" 
Judges18:5 Gin te kobbe ni, “Tim ber koŋ doŋ ipeny Obaŋa, me oŋe ka wotwa-ni bino cobere aber.”" 
Judges18:6 Alamdog te kobbigi ni, “Wot giwu kede kuc. Rwot gire tye aciko waŋe i wotwu-nono.”" 
Judges18:7 Jo abiccono te ya wot oko, ote tuno i Laic, ote neno jo ame onwoŋo tye kuno, kite ame gin bedo kede mot bala jo me Cidon ame bedo gigi mot, kun wigi owil oko i ginnoro luŋ, dok daŋ mom tye ginnoro me lobo ameremogi, gin olonyo atek; gin onwoŋo tye kannabor i jo Cidon, dok mom daŋ onotte i jo moro ocele." 
Judges18:8 Kare ame gin otuno baŋ omegogi i Jora kede i Ecitaol, omegogi openyogi ni, “Idwogo wunu kede amut aŋo?”" 
Judges18:9 Gin te dok iye ni, “Ya wunu oko me owot wunu i komgi pien wan oneno lobo ca, nen ba, lobo mere mwonya meicel. Mom ibino timo wunu ginnoro pire? Kur daŋ dok iŋiŋinya wunu me wot kuno, me iwot idony wunu iye, igam wunu bed lobowa." 
Judges18:10 Ka iwoto wunu kuno, ibino nwoŋo wunu jo moro kuno ame bedo kun wigi owil oko i ginnoro luŋ. Lobo mere lac; Obaŋa otyeko miyo lobo-nono oko i ciŋwu, kan ame ginnoro luŋ ame tye i lobo tye iye.”" 
Judges18:11 Eka jo Dan mia abicel ame orukere i jami lweny te ya oko i Jora kede i Ecitaol," 
Judges18:12 ote wot, wot guro gonygi i Kiriat-jearim i Juda. Pi kop man omio nyiŋ kabedo-nono olwoŋo ni Gony a Dan naka atot tin. Nen ba, kabedonono tye i ŋet Kiriat-jearim tutuŋ to." 
Judges18:13 Gin te kato oko i kuno, ote wot i lobo a jo Epraim obedo kidkidi, ote tuno i ot a Mika." 
Judges18:14 Jo kany a rik owoto roto lobo me Laic ca te kobbi omegogi ni, “Wun iŋeo wunu ni epod, terapim, cal ame opao apaa kede ame otwako atwaka tye i udi man? Pi mannono, aman koŋ doŋ itam wunu gin ame ibino timo wunu.”" 
Judges18:15 Gin te gak wot kuno, ote tuno i ot Alevi moro ame onwoŋo tye i paco a Mika, gin te penye ka ce en tye aber." 
Judges18:16 Jo Dan mia abicel ca ame orukere oko i jami lwenygi ca, onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i dogcel me paco a Mika;" 
Judges18:17 kun jo kany a rik owoto oroto lo bo ca okato malo, ote wot kwanyo cal ame opao apaa, epod, terapim, kede cal ame otwako atwaka. Alamdog onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i dogcel me paconono karacel kede jo mia abicel ame orukere i jami lwenygi," 
Judges18:18 Kare ame jo-ni owoto i ot a Mika, ote wot kwanyo cal ame opao apaa, epod, terapim karacel kede cal ame otwako atwaka, alamdog openyogi ni, “Kara mannono ŋo ame itimo wunu-nono?”" 
Judges18:19 Gin te kobbe ni, “Liŋ iti, wum dogi oko kede ciŋi, me ibin iwot kedwa, me iwot ibed acalo pappawa kede alamdogwa. Itamo ni ber yin ibedo alamdog i ot a dano acel, onyo ka ibedo alamdog a doggola acel luŋ ame tye iyi atekere moro me Icrael?”" 
Judges18:20 Cuny alamdog te doko ayom oko; te kwanyo epod, terapim, kede cal ame opao apaa te wot oko kedgi kun en tye i dye lwak." 
Judges18:21 Gin rik olokore ote cako wotgi kittono, kun omio itinogi, kede limgi akwo karacel kede jamigi luŋ telo nyimgi," 
Judges18:22 Kare ame gin doŋ owoto abobor i ot a Mika, jo ame onwoŋo udigi ceggi kede me a Mika oriŋo kede duru, ote ryemo jo Dan mako oko iyo," 
Judges18:23 Gin te redo baŋ jo Dan, eka jo Dan te dok lokere kobbi Mika ni, “Ŋo kara atimmi, omio ibino i lwak jo arom man?”" 
Judges18:24 En te gamo ni, “Nen wun ikwanyo wunu obaŋana ame atio, itero wunu daŋ alamdogga oko, ite wot wunu kedgi oko, kara an doŋ adoŋ i gin aŋo ba? Ŋo kara ame omio wun dok ipenya wunu ni, ‘Ŋo kara atimmi!’ ”" 
Judges18:25 Cite jo Dan te gamo ni, “Kur be imi dwoni winyere i akinawa kan, naka mio wegi akemo mogo ŋit mukere i komwu, eka te neki oko karacel kede jo me odi luŋ.”" 
Judges18:26 Jo Dan gigi te medde iwotgi anyim. Kare ame Mika oneno ni jo Dan tek meicel kate oko, en olokere odok cen i paco mere." 
Judges18:27 Jo Dan te wot oko i jami ame Mika onwoŋo otio, karacel kede alamdoggere, naka i Laic, baŋ jo ame onwoŋo bedo gigi mot, kun wigi owil oko i ginnoro luŋ, ote wot nekogi oko i pala lweny, ote waŋo daŋ bomagi oko." 
Judges18:28 Jo moro a kono riŋo me larogi te bedo mom, pien gin onwoŋo bor i jo Cidon dok daŋ onwoŋo mom onotte kede jo moro ocele. Gin onwoŋo tye i luŋ ame ceggi kede Bet-rekob. Jo Dan dok te gero boma-nono i wi en acon, ote bedo iye," 
Judges18:29 ote cako nyiŋe ni Dan, bala nyiŋ kwarogi Dan, ame rik Icrael onywalo. Cite nyiŋ boma-nono aconnere onwoŋo Laic." 
Judges18:30 Jo Dan rik te miyo cal apaa-naca bedo meggi kengi; Yonacan akwar Gercom, ame obedo wot a Muca, karacel kede ikwae, gin te bedo olamdog i atekere a Dan, tuno naka i kare ame otero iye jo me lobonono iyi opii." 
Judges18:31 Cal apaa ame Mika rik otio-naca rik ote cibo bedo kuno pi kare luŋ ame onwoŋo ot Obaŋa tye i Cilo. 
Judges19:1 I kare-nono onwoŋo Icrael mom ru tye kede abaka moro. Alevi moro ame onwoŋo rik bedo kannoro a tye teŋe i lobo a jo Epraim obedo kidikidi, rik onwoŋo otiŋo nyannoro me Beterekem i Juda." 
Judges19:2 Kare ame dako mere otubere kede, oya oko i baŋe, te dok i ot a pappere i Beterekem i Juda, te wot rik kuno pi dwete aŋwen," 
Judges19:3 cware te wot wopo yore kuno, me ewot ekob kede mot edwoggo paco. En owoto karacel kede omiro mere kede kane aryo, ote tuno paco a papa a cege. Kare ame papa a dako onene, obino me jole kun cunye yom." 
Judges19:4 Ore, ame obedo papa a dako mere, te miye bedo kuno nino adek. I kare-nono luŋ gin te bedo cam kede mat kun daŋ en buto kuno." 
Judges19:5 I nino me aŋwennere, gin te dilo ibayi, ote yikere me wot, ento papa a nyako te kobbi cwar nyare ni, “Koŋ icut wunu kwonnoro aduno me medo teko, eka ite cako wotwu.”" 
Judges19:6 Jo aryonono te bedo cam kun daŋ omatte, papa a nyako te dok kobbi dano-nono ni, “Tim ber tin dok ibut koŋ kan me iyomoro cunyi.”" 
Judges19:7 Kare ame dano-nono oya malo me wot, papa a cege te bedo diye, te miyo en dok buto kuno." 
Judges19:8 I nino me kannyere, en doŋ te dilo ibayi me cako wot, ento papa a cege te kobo ni, “Koŋ ibed inwoŋ teko, ikur koŋ cem kwe.” Gin aryo luŋ dok ote bedo cam." 
Judges19:9 Kare ame dano man kede cege kede amiro mere oya malo me wot, ore ame obedo papa a cege te kobbe ni, “Koŋ inen piny doŋ ceggi yuto, tim ber dok ibut wunu kan. Koŋ inen piny doŋ owumere oko, but kan me iyomoro cunyi, diki doŋ ite ya ibayi me wot paco.”" 
Judges19:10 Cite wode-nono mom dok te ye buto kuno, en oya te cako wot oko, te tuno kan ame otikere kede Jebuc (ame en Jerucalem). En onwoŋo tye kede kane mere aryo ame otweo gi-bedo i wigi, dako mere daŋ onwoŋo tye baŋe." 
Judges19:11 Kare ame gin doŋ ceggi kede Jebuc, piny doŋ onwoŋo ocako wumere oko, amiro te kobbi adwoŋere ni, “Biye owirre i boma a jo Jebuc kan, me obut iye.”" 
Judges19:12 Cite adwoŋere te gamo ni, “Wan gire mom obino wirre i boma orok, ame gin mom obedo jo Icrael, wan obino wot atir naka i Gibea.”" 
Judges19:13 En te kobbi amiro mere ni, “Biye owot i kabedo moro i akina magi, me owot obut i Gibea onyo i Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Gin rik te kato i wotgi, ceŋ te poto oko a doŋ gin ceggi i Gibea, ame obedo me a jo Benjamin," 
Judges19:15 Gin rik te wirre kuno, ote buto i Gibea. Gin te donyo i boma-nono, ote wot bedo piny i dye boma kuno, pien ŋattoro mom oterogi i ode me wot buto iye." 
Judges19:16 Nen ba, adwoŋoro te bino kun onwoŋo adwogo i tic i poto mere otyeno. Dano-nono onwoŋo tuŋe tye i lo bo Epraim ame obedo kidikidi; en onwoŋo bedo i Gibea, kun wegi lobonono i kome obedo jo Benjamin." 
Judges19:17 En otino waŋe malo te neno lonnaca obedo piny i dye boma kannaler. Adwoŋŋono te penye ni, “Iwot kara kwene?”" 
Judges19:18 En te dok iye ni, “Wan oya i Beterekem i Juda, odok cen i lobo Epraim obedo kidikidi, ame tye teŋe kannabor, kan ame an onwoŋo aya iye. Rik awoto i Beterekem i Juda, aman doŋ adok tuna; doŋ mom tye ŋattoro ame otera i ode." 
Judges19:19 Wan otye kede reŋ kal kede cam a kanewa, karacel kede ogati me koŋo ame romowa, an kede aŋecani kede atin awobi ame tye kedwa-ni, mom dok tye ginnoro ocele ame wan omito.”" 
Judges19:20 Adwoŋŋaca te gamo ni, “Kuc obed kedwu, an abino miyowu gin ame imito wunu luŋ, cite myero kur ibut wunu i dye boma kan.”" 
Judges19:21 En doŋ te terogi i ode, te wot miyo kane cam. Gin te lwoko tyengi, ote cam, ote mat." 
Judges19:22 I kare ame gin tye ayomoro cunygi, nen ba, jo mogo ame gin jo areco me boma-nono, te guro ot oko romo irit; gin te cako go yo doggola kun okobbi adwoŋ ca, ame obedo won ot, ni, “Kel lo ame obino i odi-nono oko me obut kede.”" 
Judges19:23 Won ot te kato baŋgi oko, te kobbigi ni, “Pe amannono, omegona, myero kur itim wunu tim araccono, pien dano man doŋ odonyo oko i oda, myero kur itim wunu tim araccono i kome." 
Judges19:24 Nen ba, nyara ame mom ru oŋeye kede ico en tye kan karacel keda kede aŋeca mere, wek acwaiwugi oko kan aman-ni. Wagi wunu me itimgi kite ame wun ineno wunu ni ber baŋwu, aco dano man myero kur itim wunu tim arac wok-ki i kome.”" 
Judges19:25 Cite jonnono gire te kwero winyo koppere oko. Alevi te waya aŋeca mere cwayo baŋgi oko, gin te buta kede kun oloke odoko gi-tukogi naka piny oru. I kare ame piny doŋ owalakino oko, gin te weke, ote wot gigi oko." 
Judges19:26 I kare ame ceŋ doŋ amito donyo, dako-nono te wot rette i doggola adwoŋ ca, ame cware onwoŋo tye i ode, te buto kannono naka odiko." 
Judges19:27 Cware te ya odiko, te yabo doggola me ottono, kun mito cako wottere. I cawa-nono en te neno kom dako mere tye obuto piny i doggola me ottono, kun ciŋe tye opoto i doggola." 
Judges19:28 En te kobbe ni, “Ya malo, me owoti.” Cite mom te winyo kopporo ame odokke. En te tiŋe kete i wi kana, te cako wot oko me dok i paco mere," 
Judges19:29 Kare ame en odonyo i ode, en okwanyo pala, te ŋiŋido kom dako mere oto-nono, te poko i dul apar wir aryo, te cwayo i lobo a jo Icrael luŋ." 
Judges19:30 Jo luŋ ame oneno okobo ni, “Kodi gin acalo man yam mom ru otimere, dok yam mom ru onen, cakere i kare ame jo Icrael oya kede i Miciri, tuno kede naka tin; myero koŋ tam koppere, por, ote kobo ginnoro iye.”" 
Judges20:1 Jo luŋ me Icrael te kato oko, kun oya i Dan, tuno naka i Beerceba, medo kede lobo me Gilead. Lwak luŋ te cokere i Mijipa baŋ Rwot kun otye kede cuny acel." 
Judges20:2 Rwode a lwak luŋ me atekere luŋ ame obedo me a jo Icrael, ocuŋ i akina lwak Obaŋa ame ocokere. Jo luŋ onwoŋo romo co tutumia aŋwen, jo ame lwenyo i pala romo kun gin luŋ obedo olweny ame woto i tyengi." 
Judges20:3 Jo Benjamin onwoŋo owinyo oko ni jo Icrael owoto i Mijipa. Jo Icrael rik te kobo ni, “Koŋ iporriwa wunu kite ame tim man arac wok-ki otimere kede.”" 
Judges20:4 Alevi ame onwoŋo oneko cege-nono te kobo ni, “I nino moro onwoŋo awoto i Gibea ame obedo boma a jo Benjamin, an karacel kede cega, me wot buto kuno." 
Judges20:5 Jo moro ame gin obedo jo me Gibea te bino i koma, ote guro ot ame onwoŋo an atye iye dyeworrono kun onwoŋo gin mito neka oko; gin te wayo dakona tetek, naka te to i ciŋgi." 
Judges20:6 An ate kela kom dakona ame oto-nono, ate ŋiŋido oko, ate cwayo dul kome-nono romo lobo luŋ ame jo Icrael oleo me bedo megi; pien gin onwoŋo otimo tim me ipyeda kede me coco iyi Icrael." 
Judges20:7 Nen wunu ba, wun jo Icrael, wun luŋ mi tamwu iye dok ipor wunu koppere i kan.”" 
Judges20:8 Lwak luŋ te twarre a waŋe acel kun kobo ni, “Wan luŋ ŋattoro mom bi no wot i kema mere, ŋattoro daŋ mom bino dok tuŋe." 
Judges20:9 Gin ame aman wan obino timo i kom jo Gibea ene: wan obino wot me lweny i komgi, kun okwanyo jo kede kwir," 
Judges20:10 obino kwanyo jo apar i kom mia acel i kom atekere me Icrael luŋ, kede jo mia i kom jo tutumia acel acel, kede jo tutumia i kom jo tutumia apar apar, me gin wot kelli lwak cam, me gin ka obino, obin ocul kwor i kom Gibea a jo Benjamin, pi bal luŋ areco ame gin otimo i kom Icrael.”" 
Judges20:11 Jo Icrael luŋ rik te cokere me lweny i kom boma-nono kittono, kun gin luŋ oribere i cunygi acel keken." 
Judges20:12 Atekere luŋ me Icrael te cwayo jo romo lobo atekere a jo Benjamin luŋ kun okobo ni, “Kodi tim arac aŋo ame otimere i akinawu-nie?" 
Judges20:13 Aman myero wun imi wunu jonnono i ciŋwa, jo me Gibea otimo tim arac wokkono, me onekgi oko, omi gin arac ya oko i akina jo Icrael.” Cite jo Benjamin mom te winyo kop omegogi, ame gin jo Icrael." 
Judges20:14 Jo Benjamin te ya oko i bomagi ote bino cokere i Gibea, me wot lweny i kom jo Icrael." 
Judges20:15 I nino-nono jo Benjamin te kwano jo ame oya i bomagi, ame omako pala me romo, jo te romo tutumia pyeraryo wie abicel, kun nwoŋo mom omedo iye jo ame bedo i Gibea ikome, ame welgi okwano oromo mia abiro, ame oyero jo mere ayera." 
Judges20:16 I kom magi luŋ onwoŋo tye iye jo mia abiro ame oyero, ame gin luŋ obedo ojaracam. Ŋat acel acel i akinagi onwoŋo ciŋe iwac meicel ame mom bao gweŋ te celo piny nono." 
Judges20:17 Aco jo Icrael luŋ kun nwoŋo mom okwano iye jo Benjamin, welgi oromo tutumia mia aŋwen, ame omako pala lweny. Gin luŋ rik obedo jo ame onwoŋo doŋ ona oko i lweny." 
Judges20:18 Jo Icrael rik te ya oko wot i Betel, ote wot penyo Obaŋa ni, “Ŋa i akinawa ame myero ge wot lweny i kom Benjamin?” Rwot te gamo ni, “Myero Juda en a ge wot.”" 
Judges20:19 Jo Icrael te ya idiko te wot guro kemagi i Gibea. 
Judges20:20 Jo Icrael te wot lweny i kom jo Benjamin. Jo Icrael te ryeye i tyen me lweny i komgi i Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Jo Benjamin te katto oko i Gibea, i nino-nono gin te neko jo Icrael ame romo tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo." 
Judges20:22 Ento jo Icrael cunygi obedo tek, ote dok ryeye i tyen me lweny kakan ame rik gin koŋ oryeye iye i nino me agege ca." 
Judges20:23 Jo Icrael te wot malo ote wot kok i nyim Rwot naka otyeno; ote dok penyo Rwot ni, “Odok owot olweny i kom omegowa, ame gin jo Benjamin?” Rwot te kobo ni, “Wot ilweny wunu i komgi.”" 
Judges20:24 Jo Icrael te noko jo Benjamin aceggi inino me aryo mere. 
Judges20:25 Jo Benjamin te katto oko i Gibea i nino me aryo mere, gin dok te neko jo tutumia apar wie aboro i kom jo Icrael, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame lwenyo kede pala," 
Judges20:26 Mony a jo Icrael luŋ dok te wot i Betel, ote wot kok iye. Gin te bedo piny kuno i nyim Rwot. I nino-nono gin te ri kec naka otyeno ote yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny." 
Judges20:27 Jo Icrael te dok medo penyo Rwot, pien canduk me cikere a Rwot onwoŋo tye kuno i kare-nono," 
Judges20:28 kun Finekaci wot Eleajar, ame obedo wot Aron tio i nyime i kare-nono. Gin dok te penyo Rwot ni, “Dok omedde wot lweny i kom omegowa, jo Benjamin, onyo owek doŋ lweny oko?” Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Wot wunu, pien diki abino miyogi i ciŋwu.”" 
Judges20:29 Jo Icrael te wot miyo jogi pono oko, kun oguro Gibea oko." 
Judges20:30 Gin dok te wot lweny i kom jo Benjamin i nino me adekkere; gin oyikere me lweny i kom Gibea kite ame gin obedo yikere kede tyen me acel kede me aryo ca. 
Judges20:31 Jo Benjamin te dok katto oko i kom jo Icrael, ote wot kedgi teŋe naka i ŋe boma, kun lubere i kite acon ca; gin dok te cako neko jo mogo i waŋayo, i yo ame woto i Betel kede i en ocele ame woto i Gibea, naka i bar daŋ. Jo Icrael ame oto te romo pyeradek." 
Judges20:32 Jo Benjamin te kobo ni, “Gin omukere i ŋwec oko i nyimwa kite acon ca.” Ento jo Icrael te kobo ni, “Koŋ oriŋ wunu oko, me otergi kannabor i boma, i yo kuka,”" 
Judges20:33 Jo Icrael luŋ te doŋ ya oko i kabedogi, ote ryeye oko i Baaltamar; eka jo Icrael ame onwoŋo opono mege te twarre oko i kabedogi ame onwoŋo tye i ŋet Geba tuŋ to." 
Judges20:34 Jo tutumia apar ame onwoŋo oyero ayera i kom jo Icrael luŋ te bino i kom Gibea, lweny te kur a mom kobere; cite jo Benjamin onwoŋo mom ŋeo ni twon cannoro adwoŋ meicel doŋ ceggi acega me tuno i komgi." 
Judges20:35 Rwot te mi yo Icrael loyo jo Benjamin oko I nino-nono jo Icrael te neko jo Benjamin ame romo tutumia pyeraryo wie abic kede mia acel nono, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame lwenyo kede pala." 
Judges20:36 Jo Benjamin te neno ni doŋ otyeko loyogi gire oko. Jo Icrael rik te jer teŋe wekki jo Benjamin kabedo, pien gin onwoŋo geno jo ame onwoŋo opono, ame onwoŋo gin oketo me kuro Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Jo ame onwoŋo opono-naca te cunyere bino oko i kom Gibea. Jo ame onwoŋo opono te wot neko jo ame rik tye i boma luŋ kede pala lweny. 
Judges20:38 Jo Icrael kede jo ame onwoŋo opono, onwoŋo omoko i akinagi anyut, anyutgi-nono onwoŋo tye ni mannono, ka yito me mac oduny owikino malo i boma." 
Judges20:39 Jo Icrael myero doŋ dwog cen me bino lweny i kom jo Benjamin. Jo Benjamin te cako lweny, ote neko jo Icrael pyeradek, kun okobo ni, “Ateni, nen otye ka nekogi i nyimwa kite ame obedo timogi kede i lweny me agege.”" 
Judges20:40 Cite i kare ame gin a rik omoko ocako nen i boma, i kare ame yito doŋ owikino malo calo pagi, jo Benjamin olokere te neno ŋegi, gin te neno yito tye owikino malo i polo i boma luŋ," 
Judges20:41 Jo Icrael te doŋ lokere dwogo cen, kun koyo doŋ onwoŋo oonyere atek i kom jo Benjamin, pien gin oneno ni twon can a adwoŋ doŋ tye ceggi acega me tuno i komgi." 
Judges20:42 Mannono te miyogi lokki jo Icrael ŋegi oko, kun oriŋo tuŋ tim, lweny doŋ te loyogi oko, jo Icrael ame onwoŋo adwogo i bomagi te nekogi oko." 
Judges20:43 Gin te jwero Benjamin reto oko piny kun komgi oto doŋ oradde atata, cakere i Noka wot kede naka kan ame otikere i Gibea i tuŋ to." 
Judges20:44 Jo Benjamin tutumia apar wie aboro twal, ame gin luŋ obedo jo ame tek i lweny, gin luŋ rik ote nekogi oko." 
Judges20:45 Jo ame odoŋ te lokere riŋo tuŋ tim, tuno naka i kidi Rimon, jo tutumia abic i akinagi rik dok ote neko oko i waŋayo. Jo Icrael te ryemo yogi atek naka i Gidom, ote dok ne ko jo tutumia aryo." 
Judges20:46 Mannono te miyo jo Benjamin luŋ ame oneko i nino-nono te romo tutumia pyeraryo wie abic, ame gin jo onwoŋo lwenyo i pala i akina jo luŋ atek i lweny." 
Judges20:47 Cite jo mia abicel te lokere riŋo gigi tuŋ tim ata naka i wi kidi me Rimon, gin te bedo i wi kidi me Rimon pi dwete aŋwen." 
Judges20:48 Jo Icrael doŋ te lokere dwogo cen i kom jo Benjamin, ote nekogi i pala lweny, jo kede leyi kede jami luŋ ame onen i nyimgi. Boma luŋ ame gin onwoŋo, gin owaŋo oko kede mac." 
Judges21:1 Jo Icrael rik onwoŋo okwoŋo i Mijipa ni, “Dano moro i akinawa mom bi no miyo dano moro me Benjamin nyomo nyare.”" 
Judges21:2 Lwak rik te bino i Betel, ote bedo kuno i nyim Obaŋa naka otyeno. Gin te cwayo dwongi baŋ Obaŋa kun okok atek," 
Judges21:3 okobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael, piŋo kop man otimere iyi Icrael, ame tin omio ateke re acel orwenyo oko iyi Icrael?”" 
Judges21:4 Orwo mere lwak te ya ibayi, te cano keno lam kuno, ote miyo iye mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny." 
Judges21:5 Lwak jo Icrael te kobo ni, “Atekere mene iyi Icrael ame rik mom owoto i kare ame wan ocokere baŋ Rwot?” Pien gin rik onwoŋo okwoŋo kwoŋ adwoŋ meicel i nyim Rwot i kom dano ame rik mom owoto i nyim Rwot, i Mijipa, kun gin okobo ni, “Obino neko dano-nono oko.”" 
Judges21:6 Kica rik te mako jo Icrael i kom omingi Benjamin, ote kobo ni, “Atekere acel me Icrael waŋe doŋ orwenyo oko i akina jo Icrael i kare man." 
Judges21:7 Kara ŋo ame myero otim wunu me wek onwoŋ mon pi jo odoŋ, kite acalo wan doŋ yam okwoŋo oko i nyim Rwot ni, mom obino miyogi onyomo nyarwa moro-ni?”" 
Judges21:8 Gin te kobo ni, “Atekere mene ame rik mom owoto i nyim Rwot i Mijipa?” Pien tye dano moro ame rik onwoŋo mom owoto i cokere i gony, ame oya i Jabec-gilead." 
Judges21:9 Pien i kare ame okwano jo, mom onwoŋo dano moro ame oya i baŋ jo ame bedo i Jabec-gilead." 
Judges21:10 Mannono te miyo lwak cwayo twoni co atek i lweny tutumia apar wie aryo kuno, kun ocikogi ni, “Wot inek wunu jo ame bedo i Jabec-gilead oko kede pala romo, anaka mongi kede itinogi." 
Judges21:11 Gin ame ibino timo wunu ene: mon luŋ ame doŋ oŋeye kede co kede co luŋ oŋeye kede mon, ibino neko wunu oko acalo gin me kwer.”" 
Judges21:12 Gin rik te nwoŋo anyira ame romo mia aŋwen a mom ru oŋeye kede co i akina jo ame bedo i Jabec-gilead. Gin te ke lo anyira-nono i gony i Cilo, onwoŋo tye i lobo a jo Kanaan." 
Judges21:13 Lwak te cwayo kwena baŋ jo Benjamin ame onwoŋo bedo i wi kidi me Rimon, ote wot rabbigi pi kop me kuc." 
Judges21:14 Jo Benjamin te dwogo i kare-nono, ote miyogi anyira ame rik mom oneko i akina mon me Jabec-gilead; cite mannono mom te romogi ducu." 
Judges21:15 Kica omako lwak i kom jo Benjamin, pien Rwot onwoŋo otio gin ame mio atekere acel me Icrael rwenyo oko." 
Judges21:16 Odoŋe a lwak te kobo ni, “Gin aŋo ame myero otim wunu pi jo ame mon oremo, kite ame oneko kede mon me Benjamin oko-ni?”" 
Judges21:17 Gin te kobo ni, “Gi-alea moro myero bed tye pi jo Benjamin ame obwot, me mom jwa nyiŋ atekere moro oko iyi Icrael." 
Judges21:18 Cite wan mom otwero miyogi anyirawa me bedo mongi.” Pien jo Icrael rik onwoŋo okwoŋo ni, “Cen myero mak ŋat ame omio nyare baŋ dano moro me Benjamin.”" 
Judges21:19 Mannono te miyogi kobo ni, “Neno wunu ba, ecuban a Rwot ame bedo mwaka i mwaka tye i Cilo, ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi me Betel, kun Cilo nwoŋo tye tutuŋ to me yo agera ame ya i Betel woto i Cekem, kede tutuŋ anyarolum me Lebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Gin te ciko jo Benjamin kun okobo ni, “Wot ipon wunu i potti olok, ikur wunu kuno," 
Judges21:21 dok daŋ ikio wunu piny; ka ibino neno wunu anyira me Cilo obino me wot i myel, ŋat acel acel myero ya te mako dako mere i akina anyira me Cilo, eka te wot kede i lobo Benjamin." 
Judges21:22 Ka ce papagi onyo omegogi okelo kokogi baŋwa, wan obino kobbigi ni, ‘Tim wunu ber, imigi wunu doŋ baŋwa, pien wan rik mom okelo mon ame romogi i kare me lweny, wun daŋ mom imiogi wunu; ame kono omio tin wun daŋ ibedo wunu kede roc.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Jo Benjamin rik daŋ te timo kittono, ote tero mongi ame oromogi aroma, ame gin omako i akina anyira ame onwoŋo gin omyel. Gin te wot dok cen i lobo ame obedo meggi, ote dok gegero bomagi, ote bedo iye." 
Judges21:24 Jo Icrael te doŋya oko i kuno i kare-naca, kun ŋat acel acel dok iyi atekere mere kede i doggola mere. Gin te ya oko i kuno kun ŋat acel acel dok i lobo mere." 
Judges21:25 Jo Icrael rik onwoŋo mom ru tye kede abaka moro i kare-nono, dano acel acel onwoŋo gire timo gin ame en oneno ni ber baŋe." 
Ruth1:1 I kare moro ame onwoŋo oŋolkop en a loo jo Icrael, kec rik onwoŋo opoto i lobogi, lo moro me Beterekem i Juda rik te wot oko i lobo me Moab, te wot bedo kuno, en kede dako mere, kede awobe mere aryo." 
Ruth1:2 Nyiŋ dano-nono rik Elimereki, nyiŋ dako mere Naume, eka nyiŋ awobe mere aryo-nono te bedo Malon kede Kilion. Gin rik onwoŋo obedo jo me Eprata; turgi rik tye i Beterekem, ame tye i Juda. Gin rik owoto i lobo me Moab ote wot bedo kuno." 
Ruth1:3 Ento Elimeleki ame obedo cwar Naume rik te to oko, Naume te doŋ awobe mere aryo." 
Ruth1:4 Awobe mere-nono rik te nyomo anyira me Moab; nyiŋ ŋat acel rik Orupa, nyiŋ ŋat ocele Luci. Gin rik te bedo kuno mwaka ame buco romo tomon;" 
Ruth1:5 eka Malon kede Kilion te to oko gin aryo luŋ, man te miyo Naume doŋ kene aboŋo awobe mere kede cware." 
Ruth1:6 Naume rik te cako ya oko i lobo me Moab karacel i mon awobe mere aryo, me dok cen, pien i Moab kuno, en onwoŋo owinyo ni Rwot olimo jo mere, omiogi cam." 
Ruth1:7 Mannono te miyo en ya oko i kabedo ame onwoŋo rik en tye iye, kun ya i mon awobe mere aryo-ca; gin rik ote cako wotgi kun olubo yo ame woto i lobo me Juda." 
Ruth1:8 Ento Naume rik te kobbi mon awobe mere aryo-ca ni, “Wun wot wunu giwu, ŋat acel acel myero dok baŋ tottere. Rwot myero timwu ber, kite ame wun daŋ itimo wunu i kom jona oto-ca kede i koma," 
Ruth1:9 Rwot myero miwu inwoŋ wunu ka weo, ŋat acel acel i ot a cware!” En te motogi kede amot me mar kun noto lemgi, gin luŋ ote mwoco koko oko i dwon aloŋo;" 
Ruth1:10 ote kobbi Naume ni, “Pe gire amannono, wan myero odok kedi baŋ joni.”" 
Ruth1:11 Cite Naume dok te kobo ni, “Dok wunu cen anyirana, kara iwot wunu keda piŋo ba? Dok atye kede itino awobe moro i yia bo, ame bino doko cogwu?" 
Ruth1:12 Dok wunu cen anyirana, tim ber iwot wunu, pien an doŋ gira ati oko, ame mom dok aromo nwoŋo ico. Akadi kono onwoŋo akob ni atwero nwoŋo ico, ate daŋ nwoŋo moro dyewor atin-ni, ate nywalo itino awobe," 
Ruth1:13 itwero kuro wunu naka ka gin odoko jo adoŋo? Ibino bedo wunu aboŋo nyomere? Pe amannono anyirana, nen ba, abedo i keckom meicel pirwu, pi kite ame ciŋ Rwot opwoda kede-ni." 
Ruth1:14 Gin luŋ dok ote medo mwoco koko i dwon aloŋo; eka Orupa te doŋ moto tattere kede amot me mar kun noto leme me cike, ento Luci ocerre i yore atwal.”" 
Ruth1:15 Naume te kobbi Luci ni, “Nen nyeki doŋ odok gire cen baŋ jo mere kede baŋ obaŋe ame en woro; yin daŋ dok cen iwot ilub nyeki.”" 
Ruth1:16 Cite Luci te kobbe ni, “Tim ber kur ibed kobba ni kono apokere kedi, onyo ni adok cen, kur alub yori; pien kan ame yin iwot iye, an daŋ abino wot iye; kan ame ibino buto iye, an daŋ abino buto iye; joni en ame daŋ bino bedo jona; dok Obaŋani en ame daŋ bino bedo Obaŋana." 
Ruth1:17 Kan ame ibino to iye, en ame an daŋ abino to iye, obino daŋ yika kuno. Myero Rwot mi ginnoro arac meicel timere ikoma ka ce aweki, to keken en a myero pok kinwa kedi.”" 
Ruth1:18 Kare ame Naume oneno Luci doŋ omoko tammere me wot kede, mom dok omedo kobbe ginnoro." 
Ruth1:19 Mannono omio gin aryo luŋ owoto naka ka otuno i Beterekem. Kare ame gin doŋ otuno i Beterekem, jo i paco-nono luŋ owoo i kop i komgi; kun mon kobo ni, “Man Naume ene?”" 
Ruth1:20 Naume te kobbigi ni, “Kur dok ilwoŋa wunu ni Naume, lwoŋa wunu doŋ ni Mara, pien Won Twer Ducu otimo i koma tim me keckom okato kare." 
Ruth1:21 I Kare ame awoto onwoŋo apek, ento Rwot en odwogo an ciŋa nono. Kara ŋo ame mio dok ilwoŋa wunu ni Naume, ame kun Rwot owuna wok-ki, Won Twer oyimo twon cannoro apek i koma?”" 
Ruth1:22 Naume rik odok turgi kittono, gin kede ci-wode Luci, nyako me Moab, i kare ame rik en dok turgi, kun ya i lobo me Moab. Gin rik otuno i Beterekem i kare ame ocako kayo cayiri." 
Ruth2:1 Naume rik onwoŋo tye kede wat a cware ame rik en lo alonyo me doggola Abimeleki a nyiŋe Boaj. 
Ruth2:2 Luci nya jo Moab rik te kobbi Naume ni, “Wek awot i poto, awot ararao cayiri i yo dano moro ame bino paro pira.” En te dokke ni, “Woti nyara.”" 
Ruth2:3 En daŋ rik te wot rarao cayiri i yo ne jo akac; en rik te cop i poto a Boaj ame obedo dano me doggola Elimereki. 
Ruth2:4 Cite nen ba, i kare ame Boaj obino kun oya i Beterekem, okobbi jo akac ni, “Rwot obed kedwu!” Gin te dok iye ni, “Rwot omi gum.”" 
Ruth2:5 Boaj te penyo aticcere ame onwoŋo adwoŋ kac ni, “Kara man nyaka a ŋa nie?”" 
Ruth2:6 Adwoŋ a loo tic me kac te gamo ni, “Man nya jo Moab, ame obino i Naume i lobo me Moab." 
Ruth2:7 En onwoŋo okwaa ni, ‘Tim ber, iweka ararao cayiri kun adedepo i yo ŋe okac i akina arita. Mannono en omio en obino, te cako ibayi tuno koni, kun mom daŋ owe kadi acelloro.’ ”" 
Ruth2:8 Boaj te kobbi Luci ni, “Koŋ iwiny ba nyara, kur dok iwot ira cayiri i poto moro ocele, kur iwek poto-ni, ento myero ibed ceggi anyirana." 
Ruth2:9 Mi waŋi mok i poto ame gin tye akayo-ni, yin lub yorgi. An doŋ atyeko ciko awobe ni myero kur gudi. Ka ce oryo pii ociri, wot imat pii i gulli ame awobe otwomo.”" 
Ruth2:10 Luci te ryebere kun kulo wie piny, te kobbe ni, “Piŋo kara ibedo i cuny me kica i koma, ame omio yin iparo pira, kun an abedo arok ata?”" 
Ruth2:11 Cite Boaj te dokke ni, “Ginnoro luŋ ame ibedo timo baŋ tatti, cakere i kare ame cwari oto iye, otitta luŋ, kede kite ame iweko kede pappi kede totti, karacel kede lobo ame onywalli iye, eka ite bino i rok ame yam mom iŋeo." 
Ruth2:12 Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael ame yin ibino ilaro te bwome, myero oculli pi gin ame itio, Rwot omi inwoŋ giri motti ame oromi!”" 
Ruth2:13 Luci te gamo ni, “Ibedo kede twon kica moro meicel i koma, rwotta; pien ikweo doŋ cunya ikobo kop me kica baŋ anecaŋi, kadi kono an gira mom onwoŋo abedo ŋat acel i akina anecaŋi.”" 
Ruth2:14 I cawa me cam, Boaj olwoŋo Luci ni, “Bye kan, ibin icem, ilut ogatini i koŋo olok.” Mannono omio en owoto, te wot bedo i ŋet jo okao kac; Boaj te cwaye cayit i ame ocelo acela. En te camo naka oyeŋ, te weko mogo doŋ adoŋa." 
Ruth2:15 I kare ame en oya me wot rarao cayiri, Boaj ociko awobe mere ni, “Wek wunu en ra naka en ame tye i akina arita, kur ijuke wunu." 
Ruth2:16 Kwanye wunu mogo daŋ i kom en ame doŋ otweo oko, ite jalle wunu me ara mere, kur ijuke wunu.”" 
Ruth2:17 Luci rik te rayo cayiri naka ceŋ iyul. Kare ame en odino cayiri ame en orao, obuco romo debe aryo twal." 
Ruth2:18 En rik te ye yo dok kede paco; te nyutti tattere cayiri ame erao, te daŋ miye cam ame ekelo, ame onwoŋo ecamo te loye oko," 
Ruth2:19 Tattere te penye ni, “Tin kara irao cayiri kwene ba? Itio tin kwene? Gum obed i kom ŋat ame oparo piri-nono.” En te titti tattere ŋat ame etio baŋe, kun kobbe ni, “Lo ame atio baŋe tin, nyiŋe Boaj.”" 
Ruth2:20 Naume te dokki ci-wode ni, “Rwot ame kica mere tye pi jo akwo kede jo oto, myero mi dano-nono winyo!” Naume dok te kobbe ni, “Dano-nono obedo watwa aceggi meicel.”" 
Ruth2:21 Eka Luci, nya jo Moab te kobbi Naume ni, “Medo dok i kom mannono, en okobba ni, ‘Yin ibino bedo i ŋet oticca, tuno ka okao cayirina otum.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Naume te kobbe ni, “Mannono ber, nyara, myero ibed wot anyira mere, me ŋattoro kur gud komi i poto ocele.”" 
Ruth2:23 Mannono te miyo Luci bedo kede anyira a Boaj kun rarao cayiri, tuno ka kayo cayiri kede ŋano otum kun bedo baŋ tattere." 
Ruth3:1 Tattere Naume dok te kobbe ni, “Nyara, mom myero anwoni odi, me wek ibed aber?" 
Ruth3:2 Boaj ame onwoŋo ibedo anyira mere-ca, mom bedo watwa? Tin otyeno en bino pyeto cayiri mere i laro dino kal." 
Ruth3:3 Pi mannono, yin myero ilwokere, ite wirre kede moo, ite ruko boŋŋini abeco mege, me iwot i laro kuno; ento kur imi en neni tuno ka en doŋ otyeko cam kede mat." 
Ruth3:4 Ento i kare ame en doŋ otyeko bu to oko, yin myero inen kan ame en obuto iye, yin iwot kuno ite wot elo boŋo ituŋ tyene, eka yin ite buto piny kaci-naca; en bino titti gin a myero iti.”" 
Ruth3:5 Luci te gamo ni, “Abino timo gin ame ikobo-nono luŋ.”" 
Ruth3:6 Luci rik daŋ te wot i laro me dino kal, te wot timo daŋ kite ame tattere otitte kede-nono." 
Ruth3:7 Kare ame Boaj doŋ ocemo oko, omate daŋ oko, ame doŋ yie yom, en obuto piny i ŋet cayiri ame ocoko karacel. Luci te libere wot elo boŋo i tuŋ tyene, te buto piny." 
Ruth3:8 I cuny dyewor ico te po, te lokere, te nwoŋo dako moro tye obuto piny tuŋ tyene!" 
Ruth3:9 En openye ni, “Yin iŋa?” En te dok iye ni, “An aŋecani Luci ennnono; yar ba lak boŋoni iwum kede aŋecani, pien yin ibedo wat a cwara aceggi.”" 
Ruth3:10 Boaj te kobbe ni, “Rwot myero omi gum, nyara; kica ame doŋ inyuto baŋa me agikki-ni pire tek meicel kato me agege oko, pien yin mom iyero dano moro i akina awobe atino, akadi ame acan onyo alonyo." 
Ruth3:11 Doŋ ba, nyara, tin kur doŋ ibed kede lworo moro, gin ame ipenyo, abino timogi luŋ piri, pien owotena luŋ i pacowa, gin luŋ ŋeo ni yin ibedo twon dako moro aber meicel." 
Ruth3:12 Iyi ateni, an abedo wat a cwari ame ceggi, cite tye ŋat ocele ame dok ceggi meicel kata oko." 
Ruth3:13 Koŋ yin doŋ ibut kannono dyewor man, cite diki odiko, ka ce en dano-nono bino laki, kopporo pe, en laki, aco ka mom oye laki, acalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, an abino laki. But piny naka ka piny oru.”" 
Ruth3:14 Mannono omio Luci obuto piny tuŋ tyene naka odiko, cite te dilo odiko con, ame piny pwod ribiribi. Boaj te cike ni, “Myero ŋattoro kur ne ni dako obino i laro kan.”" 
Ruth3:15 Te kobbe ni, “Kel boŋo ame iruko-nono, iyar yie.” Luci daŋ te yaro yie, Boaj te juko cayiri i gwata pimo moko tyen abicel, te cibo i wie, en te wot kede paco." 
Ruth3:16 Kare ame en otuno paco baŋ tattere, tattere openye ni, “Dwari obedo nino, nyara?” En te titte jami luŋ ame Boaj otimo baŋe," 
Ruth3:17 kun kobbe ni, “Cayiri man ame romo gwata pimo moko abicel, en omio baŋa, pien en okobo ni, ‘Mom myero idok baŋ tatti ciŋi-nono.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Tattere te kobbe ni, “Nyara, kon doŋ ikur, wek inen kite ame kop man bino wot kede, pien dano-naca mom bino bedo mot, en bino tyeko koppono oko tin.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boaj rik te ya wot i dogcel me boma, te wot bedo kuno. Nen ba, watgi ame onwoŋo ceggi meicel i cwar Luci kate ca, ame onwoŋo en okobo pire baŋ Luci, te bino beo kato akata. Boaj te kobbe ni, “Omina, bye ibed piny kan koŋ,” en daŋ te bino bedo piny." 
Ruth4:2 En te yero odoŋe apar me bomagi-nono, te kobbigi ni, “bed wunu piny kan,” gin daŋ te bedo piny." 
Ruth4:3 En te kobbi wattere ame ceggi i cwar Luci kate-ni, ni, “Naume ame odwogo i lobo me Moab ca tye acato dul lobo moro ame yam obedo me ominwa Elimereki." 
Ruth4:4 Mannono omio an atamo ni myero koŋ atitti, kun akobo ni, Yin myero iwil, kun jo ame obedo kan-ni tye, karacel kede odoŋewa-ni. Ka ce ilakoro, myero ilakoro; ento ka ce mom ibino lakoro, yin myero ititta, me aŋe, pien mom dok tye dano moro ocele i nyimi ame myero lakoro kono ka yin, eka an ate lubi.” En te ye ni ebino lakoro." 
Ruth4:5 Boaj dok te kobo ni, “I nino ame ibino wilo iye poto i baŋ Naume-nono, en ame daŋ ibino lako iye Luci, nya jo Moab, ame obedo dako alyel, me wek imi nyiŋe cuŋ i dul lobo mere a en rik oleo.”" 
Ruth4:6 Wattere-naca te dok iye ni, “An mom atwero lako pira, mio abino balo dul lobona ame aleo oko. Yin doŋ lakoro, an doŋ ajalli twerra me lako.”" 
Ruth4:7 Man en gin ame rik otimo i kare acon iyi Icrael a mako lakoro dul lobo onyo loko dul lobo i en ocele: me moko kop, dano acel gonyo amukkere oko, te miyo baŋ ŋat ocele; mannono en ame rik obedo caden iyi Icrael." 
Ruth4:8 Man omio i kare ame dano aceggi i cwar Luci-ca okobbi Boaj ni, “Yin wil,” en ogonyo amukkere oko," 
Ruth4:9 Boaj te kobbi odoŋe karacel kede lwak luŋ ni, “Wun doŋ tin ibedo wunu caden ame moko ni an doŋ tin atyeko wilo jami luŋ ibaŋ Naume ame onwoŋo yam obedo me Elimereki kede mea Kilion, kede mea Malon." 
Ruth4:10 Luci, nya jo Moab ame onwoŋo dako alyel Malon, daŋ doŋ atyeko lako oko me bedo dakona, me wek ami nyiŋ ata cuŋ i kom dul lobo mere, me kur we nyiŋ ata oko i akina omego mere, kede i paco ame rik onywale iye. Wun doŋ tin idoko wunu caden.”" 
Ruth4:11 Eka jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i dogcel me boma, karacel kede odoŋe, te kobo ni, “Wan ocaden, Rwot myero mi dako ame abino i odi-nono obed bala Lakeri kede Lea, ame gin aryo keken otiŋo wi ot Icrael malo. Rwot myero mi ibed atek i Eprata, dok mi nyiŋi rwo i Beterekem," 
Ruth4:12 odi daŋ bed a rom i ot Perej, ame rik Tamali onywalo baŋ Juda, pi itino ame Rwot bino miyi i dako man ame pwod tidi-ni.”" 
Ruth4:13 Boaj rik doŋ te tero Luci wot bedo dako mere, te bedo kede, Rwot te miyo en gamo yic, eka te nywalo wode." 
Ruth4:14 Mon te kobbi Naume ni, “Tin myero pwo Rwot ame mom oweko yin ibedo aboŋo watti ame ceggi kedi. Nyiŋe myero mi rwo iyi Icrael!" 
Ruth4:15 En bino bedo ŋat ame dwoggo cunyi dok daŋ bino gwoki i kare me tio; pien ci-wodi ame mari, ame pire litti akato awobe abiro, en onywalo.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naume te tiŋo atinnono, te pyelo i kore, eka te doko apidi mere." 
Ruth4:17 Mon wadgi te cako nyiŋe kun okobo ni, “Onywalli Naume atin ico.” Gin te cako nyiŋe ni Obed. En ame obin obedo papa a Yece, ame obedo papa a Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Ikwae a Perej ene: Perej onywalo Kejeron," 
Ruth4:19 Kejeron te nywalo Aram, Aram te nywalo Aminadab," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadab te nywalo Nacon, Nacon te nywalo Calamon," 
Ruth4:21 Calamon te nywalo Boaj, Boaj te nywalo Obed," 
Ruth4:22 Obed te nywalo Yece, eka Yece te nywalo Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Rik onwoŋo tye lo moro Ramataim-jopim i lobo Epraim ame obedo kidikidi, nyiŋe Erukana wot a Jerokam, wot Eliku, wot a Toku, ame obedo wot a Jupi ame obedo jo Epraim," 
1Samuel1:2 Dano-nono rik onwoŋo tye kede mon aryo; nyiŋ ŋat acel Anna, eka en ocele nyiŋe te bedo Penina. Penina rik tye kede itino, cite Anna rik mom tye kede atinnoro." 
1Samuel1:3 Dano man rik ya i paco mere woto i Cilo mwaka i mwaka me wot woro Rwot me mony kede yale i mot aŋola. Kuno rik onwoŋo tye iye awobe a Eli aryo, Kopuni kede Finekaci, ame gin rik onwoŋo tio tic me olamdog," 
1Samuel1:4 Kare luŋ ka Erukana rik yalo Rwot kede mottere, en pokki dako mere Penina mere kede me awobe mere kede anyira mere daŋ." 
1Samuel1:5 Kadi bed en rik onwoŋo maro Anna, cite i kare me poko mot, en mio Anna mege en kene, pien Rwot onwoŋo otweo ot nyodo mere oko, mom onwoŋo nywal." 
1Samuel1:6 Nyeke rik i kare luŋ onwoŋo bedo roko doge meicel kun mie cwercuny pien Rwot onwoŋo otweo ot nyodo mere oko, mom onwoŋo nywal." 
1Samuel1:7 Mannono rik te bedo timere mwaka i mwaka; i kare luŋ ame Anna woto malo i ot a Rwot, nyeke bedo roko doge. Mannono rik te bedo miyo Anna kok, kun mom daŋ cemo," 
1Samuel1:8 Nino-moro acel cware Erukana te penye ni, “Anna, kara ibedo kok piŋo ba? Piŋo kara ikwero cem? Dok piŋo kara cunyi mom yom? An mom akato itino awobe apar oko i tuŋ baŋi?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Kare moro ame gin doŋ otyeko cam kede mat i Cilo, Anna te ya oko malo. I kare-nono onwoŋo Eli alamdog tye obedo i wi kommere i ŋet akara me doggola ot a Rwot." 
1Samuel1:10 Anna onwoŋo cunye tye awaŋ atek, en te cako kwayo Obaŋa kun kok atek meicel." 
1Samuel1:11 En te kwoŋ kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot me mony, ka ce ibino ye neno can ame aŋecani tye kede, eka ite po pira, kun wii mom wil i koma, ite miya atiŋ awobi, an abino dwoke gira iciŋ Rwot pi kare luŋ me kwo mere, dok lyedi daŋ mom bino gudo yer wie.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Kare ame en pwod tye amedde kede kwaccere i nyim Rwot, Eli obedo neno doge." 
1Samuel1:13 Anna onwoŋo rik tye akwayo Obaŋa i cunye kun del doge en ame yeŋere, cite dwone onwoŋo mom winyere; omio Eli te tamo ni en onwoŋo obedo dako ame onwoŋo omer." 
1Samuel1:14 Eli te kobbe ni, “Ibino mer pi kare a rom mene? Wek ba mero me koŋo gik oko.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Cite Anna te gamo koppere ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa, pe gire amannono, an a dako ame cwercuny ocira oko. An gira mom amato koŋo olok, akadi kit koŋo moro ocele ame mero jo. An atye ayabo kop i cunya i nyim Rwot." 
1Samuel1:16 Kur itam ni an abedo dako ame kite rac, pien pi kare man luŋ an abedo kobo gin ame cunya paro kede cwercuny ame atye kede.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Eli te kobo ni, “Wot giri kede kuc, Obaŋa me Icrael oye kwacci ame iketo i nyime.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Anna te gamo ni, “Obaŋa myero omi itam pira i cuny me kica kare ducu.” En doŋ te ya wot oko, te cako cam, te daŋ doŋ cako bedo kede yomcuny." 
1Samuel1:19 Gin rik ote ya ibayi, ote woro Rwot, ote doŋ lokere dok cen i pacogi i Rama. Erukana te ribere kede dako mere Anna, Rwot te po pi Anna." 
1Samuel1:20 Ame kare mom ru okato abor, Anna oyac, te nywalo atiŋ awobi, eka te cako nyiŋe ni Camwiri pien en okobo ni, “Akwae gira ibaŋ Rwot.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Erukana kede ode luŋ rik dok te wot malo i Cilo, me wot miyo motgi me mwaka i mwaka baŋ Rwot, kede cobo kwoŋŋere." 
1Samuel1:22 Cite Anna mom gire te wot, pien en okobo baŋ cware ni, “Kare ame doŋ aryemo atiŋ oko i cak, abino ru tere oko, me en wot nen i nyim Rwot, te bedo kuno doŋ atwal.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Cware Erukana te kobbe ni, “Tim gin ame ineno ni ber, koŋ ikur kare ame doŋ iryeme oko icak, Rwot gire en a myero mii koppere cobere kakare.” Mannono rik te miyo Anna doŋ gwoko atinnere, tuno waŋ ame en oryeme i cak." 
1Samuel1:24 Kare a doŋ otyeko ryeme i cak, otere malo i Cilo, kun tero daŋ twon me mwaka adek, kede moko kwon ame romo gwata adek, kede koŋo olok iyi opoko. En otere i ot a Rwot i Cilo, kun atiŋ pwod tidi."
