1Samuel1:25 Gin te wot neko twonnaca oko, ote kelo atiŋ baŋ Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Anna te kobo ni, “Rwotta we! Acalo pwod itye kwo-ni, an abedo dako ame rik bin cuŋ i nyimi kan kun akwao Rwot." 
1Samuel1:27 Pien atiŋ man akwao akwaa i baŋ Rwot; en doŋ otyeko winyo kwacca ame rik aketo i nyime. 
1Samuel1:28 Pi mannono, an doŋ atyeko jale oko baŋ Rwot, pi kare luŋ ame en bino bedo kede kwo, atyeko doŋ jale oko baŋ Rwot.” Gin rik te woro Rwot kuno." 
1Samuel2:1 Anna daŋ rik te kwayo Obaŋa kun wero ni, “Cunya yom atek i kom Rwot; tekona doŋ dwoŋ meicel i kom Rwot. Kop aŋale doŋ donnyo i doga i kom okworra, pien cunya doŋ yom i larre meri." 
1Samuel2:2 “Mom tye ŋattoro a dok cil calo Rwot, ŋattoro gire mom, kono yin keni; kidi moro mom tye ame rom Obaŋawa." 
1Samuel2:3 Kur dok imedde wunu kop i twon awaka kopporo me awaka myero kur dok donnyo i dogwu pien Rwot obedo Obaŋa Won ŋec, en ame pimo ginnoro luŋ ame dano tio." 
1Samuel2:4 Akud atero ajo tek doŋ oturo oko, jo agoro en a dok olunyo rukere kede teko," 
1Samuel2:5 Jo a yam yeŋ odoko jo ame tio pi nwoŋo cam, aco jo a yam kec neko, kec mom dok nekogi. Oraŋa onywalo itino abiro, wegi itino apol doŋ onyobere oko," 
1Samuel2:6 Rwot en ame neko, dok daŋ en ame dwoggo kwo i kom dano en ame tero bino naka i Ceol, dok en adaŋ dwoggo kwo," 
1Samuel2:7 Rwot en ame mio can, dok daŋ en ame mio lonyo, en ame dwoko dano piny, en a daŋ tiŋo dano malo." 
1Samuel2:8 Rwot kwanyo acan oko iyi apua; kwanyo ŋat a piny oloo oko i wi odur, te miyogi bedo karacel oloc, ote leyo daŋ kom me loc. Pien pagi luŋ ame tiŋo lobo obedo me a Rwot, en ocibo polo ocuŋ i wigi," 
1Samuel2:9 En gwoko tyeŋ jo ame kitegi atira, ento jo ame kitegi reco, en bino weko oko i piny acol; pien dano mom loo loc pi twerrere," 
1Samuel2:10 Jo ame lwenyo i kom Rwot obino ŋiŋido atitino, en bino mor i komgi calo kot i wi polo, Rwot bino ŋolli lobo luŋ aluŋa kop, en bino miyo teko baŋ abaka mere, bino medo teko aloccere ame owiro kede moo.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Erukana te doŋ dok i paco mere i Rama. Wode te doŋ i Cilo me tic i nyim Rwot, kun Eli alamdog en ame nene." 
1Samuel2:12 I kare-nono onwoŋo awobe a Eli obedo jo a mom beco; gin onwoŋo mom paro gigi pi Rwot. 
1Samuel2:13 I kare-naca olamdog onwoŋo rik tio i lwak kit man: Ka ce ŋattoro omio mottere ame oŋolo baŋ Rwot, i kare ame riŋo nwoŋo pwod tye awalo i keno, amiro alamdog bino kun omako acob riŋo i ciŋe, ame lake okaro adek." 
1Samuel2:14 En rwako acob riŋonono i tako, onyo i tabo, onyo i cupulia, onyo i gulu, doŋ riŋo luŋ ame acob riŋo bino cobo, te woto kelo oko, bino bedo me alamdog. Gin rik te bedo timo kittono i Cilo i kom jo Icrael luŋ ame woto kuno." 
1Samuel2:15 Medo i kom mannono, kare ame mom ru owaŋo dwol amiro alamdog bino baŋ ŋat ame ayalo Obaŋa i mot aŋola, te kobo ni, “Mia riŋo alamdog me abula, pien en mom bino gamo riŋo ame otedo i baŋi, kono ka en ame numo keken.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Ka ce danonono okobbe ni, “Koŋ iwek owaŋ dwol oko, eka ite tero giri adwoŋ acalo imito,” en kobo ni, “Pe gire amannono, yin myero imia oko aman; ka ce yin ikwero, abino kwanyo tetek.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Mannono te miyo bal awobe a Eli-nono bedo adwoŋ meicel i nyim Rwot. Pien gin obedo tero mot ame oyalo kede Rwot calo gin a mom pire dit. 
1Samuel2:18 Camwiri obedo tic i nyim Rwot kun onwoŋo pwod tidi; rik en tweo epod me camanini i pyere. 
1Samuel2:19 Tottere rik onwoŋo kwoye kanyi atidi mwaka i mwaka, te tero baŋe i kare me wot yalo Obaŋa i mot aŋola me mwaka i mwaka kun woto karacel kede cware Erukana." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli kare luŋ rik lamo winyo i kom Erukana kede cege, kun kobo ni, “Obaŋa omi inwoŋ dok itino ocele i kom dako man pi atiŋ ame en ojalo baŋ Rwot”; eka gin doŋ te dok paco turgi." 
1Samuel2:21 Rwot rik dok te limo Anna, te yac, te nywalo itino awobe adek kede anyira aryo. Wode Camwiri te doŋo mere i nyim Rwot." 
1Samuel2:22 I kare-nono rik doŋ onwoŋo Eli oteggo atek meicel. En obedo winyo gin ame awobe mere onwoŋo bedo tiyo i kom jo Icrael luŋ, karacel kede kite ame rik gin obedo buta kede mon ame tio i dog kema me rwatte." 
1Samuel2:23 En rik te kobbigi ni, “Piŋo kara ibedo timo wunu kodi tim man? Pien an abedo winyo i baŋ lwak luŋ gin arac ame ibedo wunu timo." 
1Samuel2:24 Wek wunu kodi timmono bedi itinona. Kop ame jo a Rwot obedo lalo romo kabedo luŋŋono, mom obedo kop aber." 
1Samuel2:25 Ka ce dano obalo baŋ dano wadgi, Obaŋa bino poko akinagi, ento ka dano obalo baŋ Rwot, ŋa ame dok bino bako doge pire?” Cite gin gigi mom ote winyo kop a papagi; pien Rwot onwoŋo doŋ mito ni enekgi oko." 
1Samuel2:26 Camwiri rik te medde doŋo, kun Rwot pwoc, jo daŋ pwoc." 
1Samuel2:27 Dano Obaŋa moro rik te bino baŋ Eli te kobbe ni, “Rwot okobo ni mannono, ‘An rik anyutte kena baŋ jo me ot a kwarowu i kare ame gin onwoŋo tye i Miciri, kun gin onwoŋo opii i ot a Parao." 
1Samuel2:28 Rik ate yere iyi akina atekere luŋ me Icrael me en bed alamdogga, me wot waŋo odok akur i kom keno lamma, kun ruko epod i nyima. Rik ate miyo baŋ ot a kwarowu motta luŋ ame owaŋo i mac, ame ya i baŋ jo Icrael." 
1Samuel2:29 Kara piŋo dok mot ame oŋolo me yala, mot ame omia ame rik aciko pire, wun dok iparo wunu ni kono gin luŋ obedo megwu? Kara pi ŋo yin Eli dok iworo itinoni akata oko, kun imiogi ocwe i dul i dul ame mwonya meicel ame ya i kom mot a jona Icrael?’" 
1Samuel2:30 Pi mannono ba, Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, ‘Rik aciko ni jo me odi kede me ot a kwarowu Aron bino tiyo ticgi i nyima nakanaka,’ cite aman Rwot otuco ni, ‘Mannono doŋ awuko gira oko, pien jo ame mia kwogo, an daŋ abino miyogi kwogo, aco jo a mom bino keto kwogo i koma, an daŋ mom abino keto cunya i komgi." 
1Samuel2:31 Nen ba, kare tye abino, ame abino turo iye tekoni kede teko me ot a kwaroni, ame te miyo adwoŋŋoro oti mom te nen i odi." 
1Samuel2:32 Kare ame can doŋ opoto i komi, nyeko bino maki i kom jo Icrael pi lonyo luŋ ame gin bino nwoŋo, kun dano moro oti mom bino nen i odi atwal." 
1Samuel2:33 Danoni moro ame abino weko doŋ i ŋet keno me lam, koko bino miyo waŋe coro oko, kun cunye ton atek; karacel kede jo luŋ ame obino nywalo i odi, obino neko oko i pala lweny." 
1Samuel2:34 Ka ce itinoni aryo luŋ Kopuni kede Finekaci bino to i nino acel, mannono en ame bino nyutti ni mannono luŋ bino timere." 
1Samuel2:35 Dok an abino keto alamdogga ame genne, ame bino tiyo ticcere kun cobo tamma kede mitta ducu. An abino miyo doggola mere cuŋ atek kun tio nakanaka i nyim abakana ame ayero," 
1Samuel2:36 Dok jo luŋ ame bino doŋ i odi, bino bino baŋe me bako doggi pi cente moro, onyo kwoŋŋoro, kun okobo ni, “Tim ber, iketwa i kabedo me olamdog, me onwoŋ kwonnoro me acama.” ’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 I kare-nono Camwiri onwoŋo tio tic a Rwot i te loc a Eli. Kop a Rwot onwoŋo mom doŋ winyere wok i kare-nono, anyuttogo acalo lek onwoŋo mom doŋ timere atata." 
1Samuel3:2 I kare-nono waŋ Eli onwoŋo doŋ ocako coro oko, mom doŋ neno piny aber. En onwoŋo rik tye obuto piny i kan ame en rik onwoŋo buto iye kare ducu," 
1Samuel3:3 kun tara Obaŋa pwod tye a lyel, Camwiri onwoŋo tye obuto piny i ot a Rwot kan ame rik canduk Obaŋa bedo iye." 
1Samuel3:4 Rwot te lwoŋo ni, “Camwiri! Camwiri! Camwiri!” en te gamo ni, “An atye ene!”" 
1Samuel3:5 En te riŋo baŋ Eli, te kobbe ni, “An ene, adwoŋ, pien ilwoŋa.” Ento Eli te kobo ni. “An gira mom alwoŋi, koŋ dok iwot ibuti.” Camwiri daŋ te dok wot buto." 
1Samuel3:6 Rwot dok te medo lwoŋo ni, “Camwiri! Camwiri!” en dok te ya wot baŋ Eli, te kobo ni, “An ene, adwoŋ, pien ilwoŋa.” Ento Eli dok te kobo ni, “An gira mom alwoŋi, atinna; koŋ dok iwot ibuti.”" 
1Samuel3:7 I kare-nono Camwiri onwoŋo mom ru ŋeo Rwot, dok daŋ kop a Rwot onwoŋo mom ru oyabere baŋe." 
1Samuel3:8 Rwot dok te medo lwoŋo Camwiri tyeŋ me adekkere. En dok te ya wot baŋ Eli, te kobo ni, “An ene, adwoŋ, pien ilwoŋa.” Eli doŋ te niaŋ ni Rwot doŋ onwoŋo tye alwoŋo awobi-nono." 
1Samuel3:9 Omio Eli te kobbe ni, “Wot ibuti, ka ce en dok olwoŋo, yin gam ni, ‘Kob keda Rwot, pien an amironi atye awinyo’.” Camwiri daŋ te dok wot buto piny i kakare." 
1Samuel3:10 Rwot te bino cuŋ i laŋete, te lwoŋo kite ame en koŋ obedo lwoŋo kede con ca, ni, “Camwiri! Camwiri!” Camwiri doŋ te gamo ni, “Kobbi, pien amironi tye awinyo.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Rwot te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Nen ba, an aceggi timo ginnoro iyi Icrael ame bino miyo jo luŋ ame bino winyo, komgi bino to oko inoŋ." 
1Samuel3:12 I kare-nono abino cobo ginnoro luŋ ame rik akobo i kom ot a Eli, cakere iyi ageyi mere naka iyi agikki mere," 
1Samuel3:13 An doŋ atyeko kobbe ni aceggi keto can i kom ode atwal, pien itino mere obedo yeto Obaŋa, cite en gire mom ojukogi." 
1Samuel3:14 Pi mannono, an doŋ atyeko kwoŋ baŋ jo me ot a Eli ni mom tye mottoro ame obino ŋollo me yala, ame bino kwanyo bal i kom ot a Eli atwal.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Camwiri te buto tuno naka odiko, eka te cako yabo doggola me ot a Rwot, Camwiri onwoŋo lworo tito gin ame onyutte-nono baŋ Eli," 
1Samuel3:16 Cite Eli olwoŋo Camwiri te kobbe ni, “Camwiri atinna.” En te gamo ni, “An ene, adwoŋŋa.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli te penye ni, “En otitti kop aŋo? Kur imuŋŋa kop ame en okobbi. Obaŋa myero mi koppere pot i komi, kede akato mannono oko, ka ce imuŋo kopporo acel i kom kop luŋ ame Obaŋa otito baŋi.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Camwiri daŋ te titte kop luŋ kun mom muŋŋe moro. Eli te gamo ni, “Mannono gire kop a Rwot, myero en tim gin ame en oneno ni ber baŋe.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Camwiri rik te medde doŋo kun Rwot tye kede, dok mom tye koppere moro ame mom ocobere." 
1Samuel3:20 Jo Icrael luŋ, cakere i Dan tuno naka i Beer-ceba, rik te ŋeyo ni Camwiri doŋ otyeko moko me bedo adwarpiny a Rwot." 
1Samuel3:21 Rwot rik dok te medde nen i Cilo, pien en rik onyutte gire kene baŋ Camwiri i Cilo, kun kobbe kop a Rwot. Kop a Camwiri rik te bino baŋ jo Icrael luŋ." 
1Samuel4:1 I kare-nono jo Icrael rik te wot lweny i jo Piriciti. Jo Icrael rik te guro gonygi i Eben-ejer, kun jo Piriciti guro gonygi i Apek." 
1Samuel4:2 Jo Piriciti te ryeye i tyeŋ me lweny i jo Icrael. Kare ame lweny doŋ okur, jo Piriciti rik te loyo jo Icrael oko, ote neko jo ame ceggi romo tutumia aŋwen i bar me lweny." 
1Samuel4:3 Kare ame mony doŋ otyeko dwogo cen i gonygi, odoŋe a jo Icrael te kobo ni, “Piŋo kara Rwot omio jo Piriciti tin oloowa? Myero owot okel wunu canduk me cikere a Rwot i i Cilo baŋwa kan, me en bed i akinawa, olarwa i ciŋ okworwa-ni.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Lwak rik te cwayo jo i Cilo me wot kelo canduk me cikere a Rwot me mony i kuno, Rwot ame bedo i wi lukerubi. Awobe a Eli aryo, Kopuni kede Finekaci, onwoŋo rik daŋ owoto kuno karacel kede canduk me cikere Obaŋa." 
1Samuel4:5 I kare ame canduk me cikere a Rwot otuno i gony, jo Icrael luŋ te wo atek meicel, ame te miyo lobo daŋ mor." 
1Samuel4:6 Kare ame jo Piriciti owinyo dwon jo ame awo, gin te kobo ni, “Kara woo a tye i gony a jo Eburania ca dokkono?” Kare ame gin oŋeo ni okelo canduk me cikere a Rwot i gony," 
1Samuel4:7 lworo omakogi meicel, pien gin obedo kobo ni, “Obaŋagi obino i gonygi.” Gin te ero koko ni, “Oneno can doi! Pien kodi gin acalo man mom ru yam otimere," 
1Samuel4:8 Oneno can doi! Ŋa ame bino larowa iciŋ obaŋa mogo atek wok-ki? Magi gin obaŋe ame rik ouno jo Miciri i lwak can a kitegi papat i tim. 
1Samuel4:9 Di wunu cunywu, nyon wunu piny atek calo co, wun jo me Piriciti, me kur idok wunu opii a jo Eburania, kite ame gin yam daŋ obedo kede opiiwu. Nyon wunu piny atek calo co me ilweny wunu kedgi.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Jo Piriciti rik daŋ te lweny, ote loyo jo Icrael oko jo Icrael te riŋo oko kun ŋat acel acel riŋo naka i paco mere. Rik oneko jo apol meicel i lwennyono, pien oneko jo Icrael iye tutumia pyeradek twal, ame gin jo ame onwoŋo woto i tyengi." 
1Samuel4:11 Canduk me cikere Obaŋa daŋ omao oko; awobe a Eli aryo, Kopuni kede Finekaci, daŋ oneko oko." 
1Samuel4:12 Lo moro ame obedo dano me Benjamin rik te riŋo oko i lweny naka i Cilo i nino-nono, kun en oyeyeco boŋŋi mere oko, ojuko wie daŋ i lobo." 
1Samuel4:13 Kare ame en otuno kuno, onwoŋo Eli obedo i wi kom i ŋet yo, kun waŋe neno yo, pien cunye onwoŋo tye ka poto apota pi canduk Obaŋa. Dano-nono otuno i boma otitti Eli gin otimere, jo luŋ i boma te wo i koko." 
1Samuel4:14 Kare ame Eli owinyo koko-nono, en okobo ni, “Wo ca dok kono?” Dano-nono te ru kato oyotoyot baŋe, te titte gin otimere." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli onwoŋo doŋ mwaka me dittere oromo pyerabonwen wie aboro, waŋe daŋ onwoŋo doŋ ocoro oko, ame mom doŋ romo neno piny." 
1Samuel4:16 Dano-nono te kobbi Eli ni, “An a dano ame oya i ka lweny kuca; an ariŋo i ka lweny tin.” Eli te penye ni, “Kara obedo niŋo i kuno, atinna?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Ŋat okelo kop te gamo ni, “Jo Icrael otyeko ŋwec oko i nyim jo Piriciti, dok daŋ oneko jo atek meicel; awobeni aryo, Kopuni kede Finekaci daŋ oto oko, dok canduk me cikere Obaŋa daŋ omao oko.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Kare ame dano-nono okobo kop i kom canduk me cikere Obaŋa, Eli orette ataro i wi kom ame onwoŋo en obedo iye i ŋet dogcel me boma; ŋut Eli te tur oko, te daŋ to oko, pien onwoŋo doŋ en dano oteggo kun kome pek. En obedo aŋolkop a jo Icrael pi mwakki pyeraŋwen." 
1Samuel4:19 Ci-wode, ame obedo dako a Finekaci, onwoŋo rik yac ame onwoŋo doŋ ceggi nywal. Kare ame en owinyo ni canduk Obaŋa doŋ omao oko, dok ni kwaro mere kede cware daŋ oto oko; en onyono piny te nywal oko, pien rem onwoŋo ogoe i cawa-nono," 
1Samuel4:20 I kare ame en doŋ ceggi to, mon ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete kuno okobbe ni, “Kur ilwor, pien inywalo atiŋ awobi.” Cite en mom ogamo doggi, mom daŋ oketo cunye iye." 
1Samuel4:21 En te cako nyiŋ atiŋ ni, Ikabod, kun kobo ni, “Kwogo doŋ otyeko ya oko i baŋ jo Icrael!” pien canduk Obaŋa doŋ omao oko kede dok pi kwaro mere kede cware." 
1Samuel4:22 Dok te kobo ni, “Kwogo doŋ otyeko ya oko i baŋ jo Icrael, pien canduk Obaŋa doŋ omao oko.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Kare ame jo Piriciti doŋ otyeko mayo canduk Obaŋa, gin otiŋo i Eben-ejer, ote tero naka i Acidod." 
1Samuel5:2 Icennere dok ote kobo oko i kuno, ote tero naka i ot me cal jokgi Dagon, ote wot cibo i ŋet cal Dagon." 
1Samuel5:3 Orwo mere, i kare ame jo Acidod oya odiko con, gin onwoŋo cal Dagon orette aryeba cuny i nyim canduk a Rwot. Gin te tiŋo cal Dagon dwoko kakare." 
1Samuel5:4 Cite i kare ame gin dok oya odiko ocele, gin onwoŋo cal Dagon orette dok aryeba cuny i nyim canduk a Rwot, kun wie kede bade ryoryo oŋun oko, opoto piny i doggola; Dagon doŋ tye odoŋ ka i dul kome ocele mege keken." 
1Samuel5:5 Man en gin omio olamdog a Dagon karacel kede jo lung ame donyo i ot a Dagon, mom nyono arii me doggola a Dagon ame tye Acidod, naka atot tin." 
1Samuel5:6 Ciŋ Rwot rik te bedo apek meicel i kom jo Acidod, te miyogi twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, te daŋ goyo Acidod kede lobo mere luŋ i too ame kwokwoto kom jo." 
1Samuel5:7 Kare ame Acidod oneno kite ame piny tye kede, gin te kobo ni, “Canduk Obaŋa myero kur bed i akinawa kan, pien ciŋe pek meicel i komwa kede i kom Dagon ame obedo obaŋawa.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Mannono omio ote cwayo okwena me coko rwode me Piriciti luŋ karacel kun okobo ni, “Kara obino timo wunu gin aŋo i kom canduk Obaŋa a jo Icrael?” Gin te kobo ni, “Myero ter canduk Obaŋa a jo Icrael i Gat.” Rik ote daŋ tero canduk Obaŋa a jo Icrael kuno." 
1Samuel5:9 I kare ame gin doŋ otyeko tero kuno, ciŋ Rwot dok te cako poto i kom jo me boma-nono, te miyogi doko jo ababaŋ. Rwot te wuno jo me boma-nono meicel i too me akwota kom i kom itino kede i kom jo adoŋo." 
1Samuel5:10 Mannono rik te miyogi dok cwayo canduk Obaŋa iyi Ekron. Cite i kare ame canduk Obaŋa otuno i Ekron, jo me kuno te ero koko ni, “Nen koŋ gin dok odwoggo canduk Obaŋa a jo Icrael baŋwa kan me neko wa karacel kede jowa.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Gin te cwayo okwena me coko rwode a jo Piriciti luŋ karacel, kun okobo ni, “Cwa canduk Obaŋa a jo Icrael oko, me odwok kakare, me kur bed nekowa karacel kede jowa luŋ.” Pien lworo me kare luŋ onwoŋo doŋ obabaŋo jo i boma-nono luŋ. Ciŋ Rwot onwoŋo obedo pek atek kuno," 
1Samuel5:12 jo a mom oto, obedo goyogi kede too ame kwokwoto kom jo, koko a jo me boma nono rik te tuno naka malo i polo." 
1Samuel6:1 Canduk Obaŋa obedo i lobo a jo Piriciti dwe abiro. 
1Samuel6:2 Icennere jo Piriciti te lwoŋo olamdog kede otyet, te kobbigi ni, “Kara obino timo wunu gin aŋo i kom canduk a Rwot? Tittiwa wunu gin a myero odwok kede canduk a Rwot kakare.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Gin te kobo ni, “Ka ce idwoko wunu canduk Obaŋa a jo Icrael, myero kur icwa wunu nono, cite myero inen ni idwoko wunu kede mottoro me kwanyo balwu. Mannono bino miyo icaŋ wunu, ite ŋeyo wunu gin omio en mom okwanyo ciŋe i komwu.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Gin te penyo ni, “Kit aŋo a myero odwok kede me mot?” Gin te dok iye ni, “Cal akwota kom abic ame otio i jabu, kede cal oyoo kany ame oporo wel rwode a jo Piriciti, pien kit two acellono onwoŋo omakowu luŋ karacel kede rwodewu." 
1Samuel6:5 Doŋ pi mannono, myero iti wunu cal akwota kom kede cal oyoo ame tye ka tyeko lobowu oko-ni, ite miyo wunu kwogo baŋ Obaŋa me Icrael; atot onyo bino miyo en jwiko teko me ciŋe i komwu kede i kom obaŋewu." 
1Samuel6:6 Piŋo kara imio wunu cunywu bedo anwaŋ bala rik jo Miciri kede Parao ame rik omio cunygi obedo nwaŋ? Kare ame Rwot olokogi odoko gi-tuko mere, gin mom oweko jo Icrael owoto, eka gin te ya gigi oko?" 
1Samuel6:7 Aman doŋ iwot ikwany wunu, i yik wunu gadigadi anyen kede megi dok aryo ame ociro, a mom ru orio kol i ŋutgi, ite tweyogi wunu i nyim gadigadi, me wagi. Cite roce myero iter wunu paco, kur obed karacel kede totogi." 
1Samuel6:8 Kwany wunu canduk a Rwot, ite keto wunu i wi gadigadi; ket wunu cal ame otio i jabu i canduk ocele ame tye i ŋete, ame ibino dwoko wunu baŋe me mot me kwanyo balwu. Cwa wunu doŋ wot oko." 
1Samuel6:9 Koŋ ibed neno wunu yore. Ka ce owoto atira i lobogi naka i Bet-cemec, nwoŋo Obaŋagi en a rik okelo twon can adwoŋ wok-ki i komwa; aco ka mom otimere amannono, obino ŋeyo ni mom ciŋe gire en ame obedo pwodowa, ento otimere i komwa pi gum arac.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Jo-nono daŋ te timo kittono, gin okwanyo megi dok aryo ame onwoŋo pwod ociro, ote tweyo miyo waya gadigadi, kun ocego itinogi oko i ot." 
1Samuel6:11 Gin te cibo canduk a Rwot i wi gadigadi, ame oketo iye canduk ocele kede cal oyoo kede cal akwato kom." 
1Samuel6:12 Dok te wot atira i yo ame dok tutuŋ Bet-cemec, kun olubo gudo adwoŋŋere keken. Gin owoto kun okok, naka mom gigi ogak tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam; rwode me a jo Piriciti te bedo lubo yorgi naka i waŋ apokki me Bet-cemec." 
1Samuel6:13 Onwoŋo jo Bet-cemec tye akayo ŋanogi i luŋ. I kare ame gin otiŋo wangi malo, gin oneno canduk, cunygi te bedo ayom meicel." 
1Samuel6:14 Gadigadi rik te bino naka i poto a Yocwa me Bet-cemec, te cuŋ iye kuno. Twon kidi moro adwoŋ onwoŋo tye kuno; gin te babaro gadigadi oko me yen, ote yalo Rwot i dok me mot awaŋa." 
1Samuel6:15 Jo Levi rik te tiŋo canduk a Rwot kede en ocele ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete, ame rik cal jabu tye i yie, ote cibogi i wi twon kidi adwoŋŋono. Jo Bet-cemec te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa kede mot ocele i nino-nono." 
1Samuel6:16 A doŋ rwode me Piriciti kany ca oneno, gin odok cen naka paco i Ekron i nino-nono." 
1Samuel6:17 Magi gin cal akwota kom ame otio i jabu ame jo Piriciti odwoko acalo motgi me kwanyo balgi baŋ Rwot: acel pi Acidod kede acel pi Gaja, acel pi Acikelon, acel pi Gat, kede acel, pi Ekron." 
1Samuel6:18 Gin ocwalo daŋ cal ame otio kede jabu, kun poro wel boma a jo Piriciti luŋ ame rwode kany ca onwoŋo loo, boma luŋ ame ocelo atek kede pacci a mom ocelo. Twon kidi adwoŋ ame ocibo iye canduk Obaŋa, tye kuno acalo caden i poto a Yocwa me Bet-cemec naka atot tin." 
1Samuel6:19 Rwot rik te neko jo me Bet-cemec mogo oko, pi ŋiyo yi canduki a Rwot. En oneko jo pyerabiro i akinagi, jo te bedo kede kumo, pien Rwot oneko jo atek meicel." 
1Samuel6:20 Jo me Bet-cemec te kobo ni, “Ŋa kara ame twero cuŋ i nyim Obaŋa ame cil-li? Kara en bino ya i baŋwa te wot baŋ ŋa?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Gin rik te cwayo kwena baŋ jo me Kiriat-jearim, kun okobo ni, “Jo Piriciti doŋ odwoggo canduk a Rwot oko. Biye iom wunu me iter wunu baŋwu kuno.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Jo me Kiriat-jearim te bino omo canduk a Rwot, ote tero i ot Abinadab ame onwoŋo tye i wi kidi. Gin te kwero wode Eleajar, me bedo ŋat ame gwoko canduk a Rwot." 
1Samuel7:2 Cakere i kare ame canduk a Rwot ocako bedo kede i Kiriat-jearim, kare koŋ dok te kato alalac, mwakki ame buco romo pyeraryo twal, jo Icrael te cako dwogo baŋ Rwot kede kumo." 
1Samuel7:3 Camwiri dok te kobbi jo luŋ me ot Icrael ni, “Ka ce doŋ idwogo wunu baŋ Rwot kede cunywu luŋ, bol wunu doŋ obaŋe orok oko ame tye baŋwu karacel kede cal Acera ducu, ite keto wunu cunywu doŋ i kom Rwot, kun iwore wunu en keken, bino miyo en larowu oko i ciŋ jo me Piriciti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Mannono te miyo jo Icrael bolo cal Baal luŋ karacel kede cal Acera luŋ, ote doŋ woro ka Rwot keken." 
1Samuel7:5 Camwiri dok te kobbigi ni, “Cok wunu jo Icrael luŋ karacel i Mijipa, an abino kwayo Rwot pirwu.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Gin daŋ te cokere i Mijipa, ote twomo pii onyo piny i nyim Rwot, gin te kanyo kec i nino-nono kuno kun okobo ni, “Wan doŋ otyeko balo i nyim Rwot.” Camwiri te ŋolli jo Icrael kop i Mijipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Kare ame jo Piriciti owinyo ni jo Icrael ocokere i Mijipa, rwode a jo Piriciti te wot lweny i kom jo Icrael. Jo Icrael ka owinyo koppere, gin obedo kede lworo i kom jo Piriciti." 
1Samuel7:8 Jo Icrael te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Kur iwek koko pirwa i nyim Rwot Obaŋawa, me en larwa i ciŋ jo me Piriciti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Camwiri te kwanyo atiŋ romo ame pwod dot, te yalo kede Rwot acalo mot ame owaŋo alutu." 
1Samuel7:10 I Kare ame Camwiri tye ka miyo mottono baŋ Rwot, jo Piriciti te nokogi aceggi acega me cako lweny i kom jo Icrael. Cite i nino-nono Rwot te miyo polo mwoc atek meicel i kom jo Piriciti, ame te miyogi odoko aba baŋ, te miyo jo Icrael ryemogi oko i nyimgi." 
1Samuel7:11 Jo Icrael te ya oko i Mijipa, ote wot ryemo yo jo Piriciti, ote nekogi atek naka i Bet-kar." 
1Samuel7:12 Camwiri te kwanyo kidi, te cibo cuŋ i akina Mijipa kede Jecana, te cako nyiŋe ni, Eben-ejer, pien en okobo ni, “Rwot obedo konyowa naka kan”." 
1Samuel7:13 Gin te loyo jo Piriciti oko kittono, jo Piriciti mom dok te medde donyo i lobo ajo Icrael. Rwot rik te bedo lweny i kom jo Piriciti i kare a Camwiri luŋ." 
1Samuel7:14 Boma luŋ ame rik onwoŋo jo Piriciti omao oko i baŋ jo Icrael, odwokogi luŋ baŋ jo Icrael, cakere i Ekron tuno kede naka i Gat. Jo Icrael rik te laro lobogi oko i ciŋ jo Piriciti. I kare-nono kuc daŋ onwoŋo tye i akina jo Icrael kede jo Amor." 
1Samuel7:15 Camwiri rik te bedo aŋolkop a jo Icrael pi kare me kwo mere luŋ. 
1Samuel7:16 En rik onwoŋo bedo wowota i akina Betel, kede Gilgal karacel kede Mijipa mwaka i mwaka, kun ŋolli jo Icrael kop i kabedo-nono luŋ." 
1Samuel7:17 I kare luŋ en rik dok cen i Rama, pien tuŋe onwoŋo tye kuno. En daŋ rik ŋolo kop a jo Icrael kuno; dok daŋ rik ocano keno lam me yalo Rwot i Rama." 
1Samuel8:1 I kare ame Camwiri doŋ oti oko, en oketo awobe mere me bedo oŋolkop a jo Icrael." 
1Samuel8:2 Wode me kao rik nyiŋe Joel, me aryo nyiŋe Abija. Gin rik ŋolo kop i Beer-ceba." 
1Samuel8:2 Wode me kao rik nyiŋe Joel, me aryo nyiŋe Abija. Gin rik ŋolo kop i Beer-ceba." 
1Samuel8:3 Cite kite awobe mere rik te pokere oko kede mege, gin ote lunyo gak i meggi i yo me mito lim, omio gin bedo mito ka lim keken kun mom oŋolo kop kakare." 
1Samuel8:4 Odoŋe me Icrael te cokere karacel, ote wot baŋ Camwiri i Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 ote kobbe ni, “Nen ba, yin doŋ iti giri oko, cite kite awobeni dok opokere oko kede megi; tim ber doŋ ikettiwa abaka ame bino Joyowa calo rok ocele.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Cito kopgi-nono mom te yomoro cuny Camwiri i kare ame gin okobo ni, “Miwa abaka me loyowa.” Camwiri rik te kwayo Rwot." 
1Samuel8:7 Rwot te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Winy kop a lwak i ginnoro luŋ ame gin okobbi; pien gin mom okweri, gin olunyo kwera an ikoma me bedo abakagi." 
1Samuel8:8 Cakere i nino ame akwanyogi kede i Miciri, tuno kede atot tin, gin obedo kwera kun oworo gigi obaŋe mogo ocele, gin otye ka timo daŋ kittono i komi kun lubo ginnoro luŋ ame gin obedo timo i koma." 
1Samuel8:9 Aman doŋ ba, yin winy kopgi, gin acel a myero inen ni itimo ene, myero ikwenyorogi kun inyuttigi kite ame abaka ame bino loyogi bino bedo kede.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Camwiri rik te kobo kop a Rwot luŋ baŋ jo ame onwoŋo tye akwaye ni migi abaka. 
1Samuel8:11 En okobbigi ni, “Man en kite ame abaka ame aloyowu-nono bino bedo kede. En bino tero awobewu te wot ketogi i wi gadigadi mere me lweny kede me bedo wegi aguragura mere, kun oriŋo i nyim gadigadi mere." 
1Samuel8:12 Dok en bino keto odoŋe mere me mony, ame loo jo tutumia kede ame loo jo pyerabic, kede jo ocele mere me puro poto mere kede kayo kaccere, kede otet jami lweny, kede jami me kom gadigadi mere." 
1Samuel8:13 En bino tero anyirawu me wot bedo orub moo a ŋwece kur, oted cam kede oted ogati." 
1Samuel8:14 Pottiwu abeco mege, kede potti olok, kede me jeituni, en bino miyo baŋ omiro mere." 
1Samuel8:15 En bino gamo acel me apar me kalwu kede me olokwu, te miyo baŋ odoŋe ame loo ticcere kede baŋ omiro mere." 
1Samuel8:16 En bino gamo omirowu kede aŋecawu kede dokwu, kede kanewu abeco mege, bino miyogi obedo oti tic i baŋe." 
1Samuel8:17 En bino tero acel me apar me rommiwu, kede me dyegiwu, wun daŋ ibino bedo wunu opii mere." 
1Samuel8:18 I kare-naca ibino kok wunu i kom abakawu ame wun en iketo wunu pirwu kenwu, cite Rwot mom bino winyo kokowu i kare-naca.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Jo gire te kwero winyo kop a Camwiri oko kun okobo ni, “Pe amannono! Wan gire myero obed kede abaka ame loowa," 
1Samuel8:20 me wan daŋ obed acalli rok ocele. Wek abaka gire en a loowa, kun en kato i nyimwa me telowa, dok daŋ me en lweny pirwa.”" 
1Samuel8:21 I kare ame Camwiri doŋ otyeko winyo kop luŋ ame lwak oko bo, en odwogo koppere baŋ Rwot." 
1Samuel8:22 Rwot dok te medo kobbi Camwiri ni, “Winy kopgi, kettigi abaka.” Camwiri doŋ te kobbi lwak ni, “Wot wunu doŋ, kun ŋat acel acel dok cen i boma mere.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Rik onwoŋo tye lo moro me Benjamin ame nyiŋe Kic, ame obedo wot a Abiel ame wot a Jeror, wot a Bekorat, wot Apia, ame onwoŋo en dano me Benjamin ame twon alonyo meicel." 
1Samuel9:2 Dano-nono rik tye kede wode ame nyiŋe Caulo, awobi ame odoŋo amwonya meicel. Ŋattoro onwoŋo mom dok tye i akina jo Icrael ame onwoŋo mwonya akato en. Dok en onwoŋo odoŋo lanyo jo ducu, cakere i wi gwoke dok kede malo." 
1Samuel9:3 Doŋ i kare moro ame onwoŋo kane a Kic papa a Caulo orwenyo. Kic okobbi wode Caulo ni, “Kwany amiro acel, iya iwot wunu kede, iwot iyeny wunu kane.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Gin rik te wot beo i lobo a jo Epraim ame obedo kidikidi, ote beo daŋ i lobo Calica, cite mom ote nwoŋogi kuno." 
1Samuel9:5 Kare ame gin otuno i lobo me Jup, Caulo te kobbi amiro mere ame onwoŋo tye baŋe ni, “Biye odok doŋ cen paco, naka mio pappa weko paro kana oko, te dok cako parowa.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Amiro merenono te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, dano Obaŋa moro tye i boma man, en obedo dano ame jo woro meicel, gin ame en kobo luŋ cobere kakare. Koŋ owot kuno, kare ocele en twero kobbiwa kop i kom wotwa-ni”." 
1Samuel9:7 Caulo te kobbi amiro mere ni, “Cite ka wan owoto kuno obino terre ŋo? Pien ogati ame onwoŋo tye i caowa doŋ otum oko, mottoro ocele mom tye a myero oter baŋe. Ŋo ce ame wan doŋ otye kede?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Amiro-nono te dokki Caulo ni, “Cente moro anonok odoŋ baŋa kan an abino miyo baŋ dano Obaŋa, me en nyuttiwa yo”." 
1Samuel9:9 (Iyi Icrael i kare aconnaca, ka dano woto penyo kop i baŋ Obaŋa, en kobo ni, “Biye owot baŋ ŋat aneno”; pien ŋat ame aman wan olwoŋo ni adwarpiny, gin onwoŋo olwoŋo ni ŋat aneno.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Caulo te kobbi amiro mere ni, “Ikobo kop aber, biye owoti.” Gin te wot i boma kan ame dano Obaŋa bedo iye." 
1Samuel9:11 I kare ame gin tye akwaro tur me wot i boma, gin orwatte kede itino anyira ame onwoŋo awot twomo pii, ote penyogi ni, “Ŋat aneno tye kan?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Anyira-nono te kobbigi ni, “En tye; nen ba, en ca tye i nyimwu. Ru wot wunu, en pwod obino i boma aman-ni, pien tin jo ayalo Obaŋa i mot aŋola i wi kidi." 
1Samuel9:13 Kare ame ibino donyo wunu i boma, ibino ru nwoŋe wunu oko oyotoyot, kun nwoŋo en mom ru owoto i wi kidi me wot cam; pien jo mom bino cam tuno ka en doŋ otuno pien en myero koŋ kwa winyo i kom mot yalo Obaŋa, eka jo ame olwoŋo te doŋ cako camo. Wun wot wunu malo, ibino nwoŋe wunu oyotoyot.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Caulogi te medde i wotgi naka i boma, Ame gin doŋ tye adonyo i boma, gin te neno Camwiri oko kun tye abino i nyimgi, awot i wi kidi." 
1Samuel9:15 I kare ame rik onwoŋo pwod odoŋ nino acel me bino a Caulo, Rwot onyuto tammere baŋ Camwiri kun kobo ni," 
1Samuel9:16 “Diki i kodi cawa-ni, abino cwayo dano moro ame oya i lobo me Benjamin, yin ibino wire kede moo me bedo aloc a jo Icrael. En bino laro jona i ciŋ jo Piriciti; pien doŋ atyeko neno can a jona oko, kokogi doŋ otuno baŋa.”" 
1Samuel9:17 I kare ame Camwiri oneno Caulo, Rwot okobbe ni, “Dano ame onwoŋo akobbi pire-nono ene! En aye bino loyo jona.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Caulo te wot baŋ Camwiri i dogcel me boma, te kobo ni, “Nyutta ba ot a ŋat aneno?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Camwiri te kobbe ni, “An a ŋat aneno; tel yo me wot i wi kidi malo, pien tin yin ibino cam karacel keda, eka odiko ate doŋ weki wot kun daŋ atitti kop luŋ ame tye i cunya." 
1Samuel9:20 Aco kop i kom kanewu ame onwoŋo orwenyo i nino adek a doŋ okato, kur doŋ imedde paro pirgi, pien doŋ onwoŋogi gire oko. Kara gin aŋo ame jo Icrael amito wok-ki? Mom ginnono luŋ megi giri karacel kede jo me ot a pappi?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Caulo te dok iye ni, “An gira a dano me Benjamin, ame atekerewa en a doŋ coko i kom atekere luŋ me Icrael. Dok doggolawa daŋ kom aduno moro i kom doggola luŋ ame tye iyi atekerewa. Kara omio yin dok ikobo keda kittono kono?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Camwiri te tero Caulo, kede amiro mere naka i ot cam, te miyogi kabedo me dito i nyim jo ame olwoŋo, ame onwoŋo romo jo pyeradek nono." 
1Samuel9:23 Camwiri te kobbi ŋat a rik atedo ni, “Kel iner ame woki amii ca, ame akobbi ni iket pat ca.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Atedo te kwanyo amuru kede epurukuc, te cibo i nyim Caulo. Camwiri te kobo ni, “Nen koŋ gin ame woki agwoko oketo oko i nyimi; cami, pien woki onwoŋo ogwoko piri naka ka caa ame ociko oromo, me icam karacel kede wele.” Caulo te cam karacel kede Camwiri i nino-nono," 
1Samuel9:25 Kare ame gin doŋ oya oko i wi kidi odwogo i boma, kabuto onwoŋo tye ame oyiko oko pi Caulo i wi ot, Caulo te buto ni no oko," 
1Samuel9:26 Kare ame piny pwod yabere ayaba, Camwiri te wot baŋ Caulo malo i wi ot, te lwoŋe kun kobo ni, “Ya malo, me alwoki iwoti.” Caulo daŋ te ya malo, gin aryo luŋ ote wot iyo, en karacel kede Camwiri." 
1Samuel9:27 Kare ame gin onwoŋo tye aluŋere piny i luŋ, ame gin doŋ otuno iyi agikki me boma, Camwiri okobbi Caulo ni, “Koŋ ikobbi amironi kat anyim. Ame amiro doŋ otyeko wot oko anyim, yin koŋ icuŋ kan anonok, me ami iŋe kop Obaŋa.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Camwiri te kwanyo adomo me moo, te onyo i wi Caulo, te noto leme kun kobo ni, “Rwot doŋ otyeko kwerri me ibed aloc ame loo jo mere Icrael. Yin ibino loyo jo a Rwot, ibino larogi i ciŋ okworgi ame omano ŋetgi. Man en gin ame bino nyutti ni Rwot doŋ otyeko kwerri me bedo aloc ame loo jo ame obedo jo mere:" 
1Samuel10:2 kare ame yin ibino pokere keda tin, ibino rwatte kede jo aryo i ŋet lyel a Lakeri, ame tye i lobo a jo Benjamin, i Jelija. Gin bino kobbi ni, ‘Kane ame ibedo yenyo-nono doŋ onwoŋogi oko, aman doŋ pappi mom dok tye aparo pi kane, tye doŋ aparowu, kun kobo ni, “Abino timo kara gin aŋo ba pi woda?” ’" 
1Samuel10:3 Ibino medde wunu i wotwu i kannono tuno naka i te kworo me Tabor, eka co adek ame awot i Betel ka woro Obaŋa te rwatte kedwu kuno, kun ŋat acel otiŋo itino dyegi adek, ŋat acel omako ogati adek, ŋat acel oyeo opoko koŋo olok," 
1Samuel10:4 Gin bino moti te miyi ogati aryo, ame yin daŋ ibino gamo i baŋgi." 
1Samuel10:5 I ŋe mannono, ibino tuno i Gibea-eloim, kan ame cel a mony me Piriciti tye iye; eka i kuno, i kare ame doŋ idonyo wunu i boma, ibino rwatte kede lwak odwarpiny ame bino i nyimi kun oya i wi kidi, ogoyo naŋa, ajaa, nyamulere kede opuk, otelo kede nyimgi, kun daŋ orabo kop Obaŋa." 
1Samuel10:6 Cuny a Rwot te bino kede tek i komi, eka yin daŋ ite cako rabo kop karacel kedgi, ite lokere doko dano apat." 
1Samuel10:7 Doŋ ba, ka anyut man luŋ bino timere i komi, yin doŋ tim ginnoro luŋ ame orwatte i nyimi, pien nwoŋo Obaŋa doŋ tye kedi." 
1Samuel10:8 Yin ibino telo nyima me bino i Gilgal; winy ba, an abino bino baŋi me miyo mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny. Ibino kuro nino abiro, tuno waŋ ame abino tuno baŋi me nyutti gin a myero iti.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Kare ame en olokere me pokere i Camwiri, Obaŋa omie cuny apat; anyuttono luŋ te timere i nino-nono." 
1Samuel10:10 Kare ame gin otuno i Gibea, nen ba, en orwatte kede lwak odwarpiny ecipan; cuny Obaŋa te bino i kome kede tek, en te cako rabo kop Obaŋa i akinagi." 
1Samuel10:11 Jo ame onwoŋo rik ŋee ka oneno kite ame en tye ka rabo kede kop Obaŋa karacel odwarpiny, gin ocako kop i akinagi kengi kengi ni, “Ŋo kara a dok otimere i kom wot a Kic? Caulo daŋ doŋ odoko ŋat acel i akina odwarpiny bo?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Dano moro me kuno te kobo ni, “Papagi kara ŋa?” Man doŋ te doko carakop ni, “Caulo daŋ doŋ odoko ŋat acel i akina odwarpiny bo?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Kare ame en doŋ otyeko rabo kop acalo adwarpiny, owoto ka woro Obaŋa malo i wi kidi." 
1Samuel10:14 Omin papa a Caulo te penyo Caulo kede amiro mere ni, “Iwoto wunu kwene?” En te kobo ni, “Onwoŋo owoto yenyo kane. Kare ame oneno ni mom otwero nwoŋogi, wan ote wot baŋ Camwiri.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Omin papa a Caulo dok te kobo ni, “Tim ber ititta gin ame en okobbiwu.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Caulo te kobbi omin pappere ni, “En otittiwa aboŋo akalakala moro ni kane doŋ otyeko nwoŋo oko.” Aco kop ame mako loc ame Camwiri onwoŋo okobo, en mom okobo kopporo iye." 
1Samuel10:17 Camwiri rik te miyo jo luŋ cokere baŋ Rwot i Mijipa. 
1Samuel10:18 En te kobbi jo Icrael ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni mano, ‘Rik akwanyo jo Icrael i lobo Miciri, alarogi i ciŋ jo Miciri kede i ciŋ oloc ocele luŋ ame rik onwoŋo obedo wunowu." 
1Samuel10:19 Cite wun tin ityeko kwero wunu Obaŋawu ame larowu i can kede kit ayelayela luŋ; wun doŋ ikobo wunu ni, “Pe amannono gire! Kettiwa abaka me loyowa.” Aco biye doŋ icuŋ wunu i nyim Rwot, kun iryeye wunu atekere atekere, doggola i doggola.’ ”" 
1Samuel10:20 Camwiri te kela atekere luŋ me Icrael aceggi, kwir te kwanyo atekere a Benjamin." 
1Samuel10:21 En dok te kelo atekere a Benjamin aceggi kun kelogi doggola i doggola, kwir dok te kwanyo doggola a Matri. En dok te kela jo me doggola a Matri, kun miogi obino acel acel, eka kwir te kwanyo Caulo wot a Kic. I kare ame obedo yenye, mom ote nwoŋe." 
1Samuel10:22 Mannono omio ote penyo Rwot ni, “Dano-nono onwoŋo obino kan ateni?” Rwot te gamo ni, “Nen ba, en tye opono i akina jami.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Gin te riŋo ome i kuno. Kare ame en ocuŋ i akina lwak, nen ba, dano mere onwoŋo odoŋo meicel ame lanyo jo luŋ, cakere i wi gwoke dok kede malo." 
1Samuel10:24 Camwiri te kobbi lwak luŋ ni, “Ineno wunu doŋ ŋat ame Rwot oyerriwu? Mom tye ŋattoro ame cal kede i akina jo luŋ. Jo luŋ te wo i redo ni, ‘Kom abaka bed ayot nakanaka.’ ”" 
1Samuel10:25 Camwiri te titti lwak twer abaka kede kite ame en bino loyogi kede. En te coyo koppono luŋ i buk, te keto i nyim Rwot. Camwiri doŋ te cwayo lwak luŋ wot oko kun ŋat acel acel dok paco mere." 
1Samuel10:26 Caulo daŋ te dok tuŋe i Gibea. Jo mogo ame tek meicel i lweny ame Obaŋa onwoŋo ogudo cunygi te wot karacel kedgi. 
1Samuel10:27 Cite jo mogo ame kitegi mom beco te kobo ni, “Lo-ni twero larowa i yore aŋo?” Gin te bedo caye, mom daŋ ote tero mottoro baŋe. Cite Caulo gire te medde bedo mere i kuc." 
1Samuel11:1 Kare ame dwe acel doŋ okato, Nakac ame atekere mere obedo jo Ammon, owoto karacel kede monnyere, te wot guro boma me Jabec-gilead oko; eka jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i Jabuc te kobo ni, “Tim ber icikere kedwa, wan ote doko omironi.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Cite Nakac ame atekere mere obedo jo Ammon te gamo ni, “An aye cikere kedwu kit man, ni abino kolo waŋwu wun luŋ me tuŋ cem, me aket lewic i kom jo Icrael luŋ.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Odoŋe me Jabec te gamo ni, “Koŋ imiwa kare me nino abiro, me ocwal okwena i lobo me Icrael luŋ. Ka ce ŋattoro ame twero larowa mom tye, wan obino miye giwa i ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel11:4 I kare ame okwena otuno i Gibea i paco a Caulo, gin otito koppono kun lwak winyo, jo luŋ te wo i koko." 
1Samuel11:5 I kare-nono onwoŋo Caulo tye adwogo i poto kun lubo twoni mere me pur. Caulo te kobo ni, “Ŋo kara ame otimere? Piŋo jo akoko?” Ote titte kop i kom jo me Jabec." 
1Samuel11:6 I kare ame en owinyo koppono, Cuny Obaŋa te bino i kome kede tek, te miyo twon akemo moro adwoŋ meicel make." 
1Samuel11:7 En te kwanyo twoni me purrere aryo, te totoŋo, ŋiŋido atitino, te miyo okwena wot bebea kede i lobo me Icrael luŋ, kun kobo ni, “Dano ame mom bino lubo yo Caulo kede Camwiri, obino timo twoni purrere kittono!” Twon lworo adwoŋ meicel te mako jo pi Rwot, te miyo jo luŋ bino i cuny acel." 
1Samuel11:8 Caulo te kwano jo i Bejek, jo Icrael luŋ te romo tutumia adek, jo Juda tutumia pyeradek." 
1Samuel11:9 Gin te kobbi okwena ame onwoŋo obino ni, “Wot ikob wunu baŋ jo me Jabec ni, ‘Diki ka ceŋ doŋ odoko alyet, obino larowu.’ ” Kare ame okwena owoto te tito kop man baŋ Jabec, yigi obedo yom atek." 
1Samuel11:10 Mannono te miyo jo me Jabec kobo ni, “Dik i wan giwa doŋ obino miye kenwa i ciŋwu, wun doŋ ite timo wunu gin ame ineno wunu ni ber i komwa.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Orwo mere Caulo te poko mony i dul adek; gin te ciro wot i dye gony a jo Ammon ibayi, ote cako neko jo Ammon naka dyeceŋ. Jo ame obwot te ket atata kun mom itwero nwoŋo jo aryo ame odoŋ tye karacel." 
1Samuel11:12 Kare ame man otum, jo te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Jo mene ame yam okobo ni, ‘Caulo en ame bino loyowa?’ Kel jonnono me onekgi oko.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Cite Caulo te gamo ni, “Tin mom obino neko dano moro, pien Rwot tin olaro jo Icrael.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Camwiri te kobbi lwak ni, “Biye owot wunu i Gilgal me owot omok wunu doŋ abakawa odoco.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Jo luŋ te ciro wot i Gilgal. Gin te yalo Obaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny kuno. Caulo kede jo Icrael luŋ te bedo kede twonyomcuny adwoŋ meicel kuno. 
1Samuel12:1 Camwiri te kobbi jo Icrael luŋ ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ atyeko winyo kopwu ducu i ginnoro luŋ ame ikobba wunu; atyeko doŋ kettiwu abaka me loyowu." 
1Samuel12:2 Doŋ ba, nen wunu abaka tye ka telo wiwu; an doŋ ati oko, wia daŋ doŋ obuko lwar; dok daŋ nen wunu awobena tye karacel kedwu. An abedo tic kedwu cakere i kare me tinona naka atot tin." 
1Samuel12:3 An doŋ en atye-ni, kob wunu ginnoro arac ame atimo i nyim Rwot kede i nyim aloccere ame en okwero. Agamo twon aŋa? Onyo kana aŋa ame agamo? Onyo tye ŋattoro ame yam acero? Onyo tye ŋattoro ame yam abedo buro? Onyo tye ŋattoro ame yam agamo limmoro i baŋe i muŋ me wumo wana, me kur aŋolkop kakare? Kob wunu kopporo ducu i koma, an abino dok iye baŋwu.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Gin te gamo ni, “Yin giri yam mom icero ŋattoro i akinawa, mom daŋ iburo ŋattoro dok daŋ mom gire i gamo gi-a ŋattoro.”" 
1Samuel12:5 En te kobbigi ni, “Rwot gire en ame obedo caden i komwu, karacel kede aloccere ame en okwero, ame moko ni, tin wun mom inwoŋo wunu ginnoro i ciŋa.” Gin te gamo ni, “En obedo acaden.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Camwiri dok te kobbi lwak ni, “Rwot ame rik oyero Muca kede Aron, te kwanyo kwariwa oko i lobo Miciri, en ame obedo acaden." 
1Samuel12:7 Pi mannono myero doŋ icuŋ wunu mot aman, me apid kedwu i nyim Rwot i kom ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot otimo pirwu kede pi kwariwu pi larowu i can apapat." 
1Samuel12:8 I kare ame Yakobo owoto i Miciri, jo Miciri te bedo wunogi; kwariwu rik te kok baŋ Rwot, Rwot te cwayo Muca kede Aron, ame gin te wot kwanyowu oko i Miciri, te miyogi bedo i kabedo man." 
1Samuel12:9 Cite gin rik wigi te wil oko i kom Rwot Obaŋawu; en te jalogi oko i ciŋ Cicera ame onwoŋo obedo atel mony a Jabin, abaka me Kajor, kede i ciŋ jo Piriciti, kede i ciŋ abaka me Moab; ame te lweny i komgi." 
1Samuel12:10 Gin te kok baŋ Rwot kun okobo ni, ‘Wan doŋ otyeko balo, pien wan oweko Rwot oko, ote lunyo woro Baal kede Acera-gu. Cite aman myero doŋ ilarwa i ciŋ okworwa, wan doŋ obino wori, yin keken.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Rwot rik dok te cwayo Jerubaal, kede Barak, kede Jeputa, kede Camwiri, te larowu iciŋ okworwu tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi; wun dok ite bedo wunu aboŋo ayela moro." 
1Samuel12:12 I kare ame wun dok ineno wunu ni Nakac abaka a jo Ammon obino me lweny i komwu, ikobba wunu ni, ‘Pe gire amannono! Abaka myero bed tye ame loowa, kun nwoŋo Rwot Obaŋawa en ame obedo abakawu.’" 
1Samuel12:13 Doŋ ba, aman wun doŋ nen wunu abakawu ame iyero wunu, ame onwoŋo ipenyo wunu pire. Rwot en doŋ otyeko cwayo abaka me loyowu," 
1Samuel12:14 Ka ce ibino lworo wunu Rwot kun iwore wunu, iwinyo wunu koppere, ame mom ŋem wunu i kom cik a Rwot; dok ka ce wun karacel kede abakawu ame loowu bino lubo yo Rwot Obaŋawu, ibino bedo wunu aber." 
1Samuel12:15 Cite ka mom iwinyo wunu kop a Rwot, ilunyo jem wunu i kom cik a Rwot, ciŋ Rwot mom bino rwenyo i komwu kede i kom abakawu me timowu rac." 
1Samuel12:16 Pi mannono ba, aman doŋ cuŋ wunu mot, me inen wunu gin adwoŋ ame Rwot bino timo kun ineno wunu kede waŋwu." 
1Samuel12:17 Man mom kare me kayo ŋano? An abino kwayo Rwot me cwa kot ocwe kun mwomwoca; mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu dok ineno wunu kite ame balwu dwoŋ kede, bal ame itimo wunu i nyim Rwot me kwayo abaka pirwu kenwu.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Camwiri daŋ te kwayo Rwot, Rwot te cwayo kot cwe kun mwomowca i nino-nono. Jo luŋ te bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel i kom Rwot kede i kom Camwiri." 
1Samuel12:19 Lwak luŋ te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Kwa pi omironi baŋ Rwot Obaŋani, me kur oto, pien gin arac ame otimo-ni, me kwayo pi abaka pirwa kenwa, omio omedo balwa ameda.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Camwiri te kobbi lwak ni, “Kur ilwor wunu; bal magi luŋ wun doŋ itimo wunu oko, cite myero kur iwek wunu lubo Rwot, cite myero iwor wunu Rwot kede cunywu ducu." 
1Samuel12:21 Kur ilokere wunu, ilub wunu gigi mogo atata ame mom konyo, a mom daŋ twero laro ŋattoro, pien gin obedo gigi mogo a konygi pe." 
1Samuel12:22 Pien Rwot mom bino bolo jo mere ata, pi nyiŋe adwoŋ keken, pien Rwot gire en a rik oneno ni ber emiwu ibed wunu jo mere." 
1Samuel12:23 Kadi amannono, an gira mom abino timo balloro i nyim Rwot me kwero kwaye pirwu; dok daŋ abino pwonyowu me lubo yo aber, ame tye atira." 
1Samuel12:24 Myero ilwor wunu Rwot, kun iwore wunu kede cunywu ducu kun mom ileŋere wunu; myero itam wunu pi twoni gigi mogo adoŋo ame en otimo pirwu." 
1Samuel12:25 Aco ka imedde wunu timo gin arac, en bino miyo oweowu luŋ aluŋa, wun karacel kede abakawu.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Mwaka a Caulo me dittere onwoŋo rik doŋ oromo… i kare ame en cako loc; en te loyo jo Icrael pi mwakki… kede aryo. 
1Samuel13:2 Caulo rik te yero jo Icrael tutumia adek; jo tutumia aryo te bedo baŋ Caulo i Mikmac i lobo me Betel ame obedo kidikidi, jo tutumia acel te bedo baŋ Yonacan i Gibea i lobo a jo Benjamin." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonacan rik te loyo jo Piriciti i cel a mony me Piriciti ame rik tye i Geba; jo Icrael te winyo pire. Caulo te kuto apel romo lobo luŋ kun kobo ni, “Wek jo Eburania winy.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Jo Icrael luŋ owinyo ka okobo ni Caulo oloo mony a jo Piriciti ame rik onwoŋo tye iyi celgi, dok daŋ nyiŋ jo Icrael doŋ odoko a ŋwe meicel baŋ jo Piriciti. Gin rik te lwoŋo lwak me wot baŋ Caulo i Gilgal." 
1Samuel13:5 Jo Piriciti te cokere me wot lweny i kom jo Icrael, gadigadigi onwoŋo tye tutumia pyeradek, wegi aguragura tutumia kanyape, kede mony ame pol calo kwoo me dog nam. Gin obino ote wot guro gonygi i Mikmac, i yo tutuŋ kide me Bet-awen." 
1Samuel13:6 Kare ame jo Icrael doŋ oneno ni doŋ oridogi kan adiŋ, pien onwoŋo doŋ odiogi meicel, jo te doŋ popona oko i gorogoro kede iyi acoc, kede iyi akina gweŋe, anaka i lyele-gu kede i burrogo me pii." 
1Samuel13:7 Jo mogo te ŋolo kulo Jordan, ote wot i lobo Gad kede Gilead. Caulo onwoŋo rik pwod tye i Gilgal, jo luŋ te wot baŋe kuno kun komgi amyel amyela." 
1Samuel13:8 En okuro pi nino abiro, ame en kare a rik Camwiri ociko; cite Camwiri rik gire mom owoto i Gilgal, lwak te cako wot baŋ Caulo." 
1Samuel13:9 Mannono te miyo Caulo kobo ni, “Kel wunu mot awaŋa kede mot kweyo cuny baŋa kan.” En ikome te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa." 
1Samuel13:10 Tekki en tyeko ticcere me yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa, nen ba Camwiri te pelo oko; Caulo te wot rwatte kede, te daŋ mote." 
1Samuel13:11 Camwiri te penye ni, “Ŋo ame yin itimo?” Caulo te gamo ni, “Kare ame aneno ni jo doŋ ocako ket oko i baŋa, dok yin daŋ mom ibino i nino ame rik onwoŋo iciko, kun jo Piriciti tye ocokere i Mikmac," 
1Samuel13:12 omio an ate tamo ni, ‘Jo Piriciti bino cako lweny i koma i Gilgal kan, kun mom ru ataŋo ciŋa akwao Rwot.’ Mannono te miya diye miyo mot awaŋa.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Camwiri te kobbi Caulo ni, “Nen, itimo tim me miŋo. Mom igwoko cik a Rwot Obaŋani ame en ociki kede. Pien kono tin Obaŋa omoko locci me loyo jo Icrael nakanaka." 
1Samuel13:14 Ento locci mom dok bino cuŋ; Obaŋa doŋ otyeko yero ŋat ame bino timo gin ame cunye mito. Rwot doŋ otyeko keto dano-nono me bedo aloc ame loo jo mere, pien yin mom igwoko gin ame Rwot ociki iye.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Camwiri te ya oko i Gilgal, te wot Gibea ame tye i lobo a jo Benjamin. Caulo te kwano jo ame rik onwoŋo odoŋ baŋe, te romo jo mia abicel." 
1Samuel13:16 Caulo kede wode Yonacan, karacel kede jo ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe, te bedo i Geda ame tye i lobo a jo Benjamin; cite jo Piriciti rik onwoŋo oguro kemagi i Mikmac." 
1Samuel13:17 Oyak te bino i gony a jo Piriciti kun obino i dul adek, dul acel odonyo i yo tutuŋ Opra, ame woto i lobo me Cual," 
1Samuel13:18 dul ocele odonyo i tutuŋ Bet-koron, eka dul ocele te dok tutuŋ waŋ lobo ame neno luŋ me Jeboim, piny i yo ame woto i tim." 
1Samuel13:19 I kare-nono onwoŋo mom tye ŋattoro ame atet i lobo me Icrael luŋ, pien jo Piriciti onwoŋo okobo ni, “Naka mio jo Eburania teto pala me romo, onyo toŋigi pirgi kengi.”" 
1Samuel13:20 Ento ŋat acel acel i akina jo Icrael rik woto baŋ jo Piriciti me wot rabo lak kweri dyaŋ, onyo kidima onyo lee, onyo pala me kac." 
1Samuel13:21 Rik oŋolligi aryo me adek me cekel pi rabo kweri dyaŋ kede kidima, eka dok acel me adek pi rabo lee kede pi como toŋ ecipet." 
1Samuel13:22 Mannono te miyo i kare me lweny, pala me romo onyo toŋ mom nen i ciŋ ŋattoro ame onwoŋo tye baŋ Caulo kede Yonacan. Cite Caulo kede wode Yonacan onwoŋo tye kede meggi." 
1Samuel13:23 Jo a rik onwoŋo tye i cel a mony a jo Piriciti te ciro naka i luŋ kan ame yo beo iye ŋet Mikmac. 
1Samuel14:1 I nino moro acel Yonacan wot a Caulo te kobbi atin awobi ame onwoŋo rik tiŋo jami me lwennyere ni, “Biye, me owot loka ca i kom mony ame tye i cel a jo Piriciti.” Cite en gire onwoŋo mom okobbi pappere." 
1Samuel14:2 Caulo onwoŋo rik bedo iyi agikki paco me Gibea i te okwer pomegranat ame rik onwoŋo tye i Migron. Jo ame rik onwoŋo tye karacel kede, onwoŋo tye mia abicel," 
1Samuel14:3 karacel kede Akija wot Akitub, omin a Ikabod, wot a Finekaci, ame obedo wot a Eli, ame rik onwoŋo en alamdog a Rwot i Cilo, ame ruko epod. Lwak daŋ onwoŋo mom oŋeo ni Yonacan owoto oko." 
1Samuel14:4 I yo moro adiŋ ame beo i akina kiddi, kan ame Yonacan obedo yenyo iye yo me kato kede i kom mony a jo Piriciti, onwoŋo tye iye kidi ame ocegere tuŋ cel kede en ocele ame ocegere tuŋ ocele. Nyiŋ kidi acel rik olwoŋo ni Bojej, kede nyiŋ en ocele Cene." 
1Samuel14:5 Kidi acel tye tuŋ cam i nyim Mikmac, en ocele onwoŋo tye tuŋ cem i nyim Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonacan te kobbi atin awobi ame onwoŋo otiŋo jami lwennyere ni, “Biye, me owot i kom mony a jo a mom olirre-ni, gwok onyo Rwot twero tiyo ginnoro pirwa kuno, pien mom tye ginnoro ame geŋo Rwot laro jo, kadi kede jo apol onyo anok.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Atiŋ jami lwennyere te kobo ni, “Tim ginnoro luŋ ame cunyi okwanyo; nen ba, an atye karacel kedi, gin ame cunyi okwanyo nwoŋo mega daŋ doŋ tye kittono.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Yonacan te dok kobo ni, “Nen ba, wan obino wot naka baŋ jo ca, ote wot nyutte kenwa baŋgi." 
1Samuel14:9 Ka ce gin bino kobbiwa ni, ‘Koŋ ikur wunu, naka ka wan obino baŋwu’, wan obino cuŋ mot kan ame otye iye, mom obino wot malo baŋgi." 
1Samuel14:10 Cite ka gin bino kobo ni, ‘Biye wunu malo baŋwa kan’, wan daŋ obino wot malo kuno, pien nwoŋo Rwot doŋ otyeko miyogi oko i ciŋwa. Mannono en ame bino bedo gin ame nyuttiwa.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Gin aryo luŋ rik ote nyutte kengi baŋ mony a jo Piriciti ame onwoŋo tye i cel, jo Piriciti te kobo ni, “Neno wunu koŋ, jo Eburania ca tye abino ca, otye odonyo iyi aduu ame yam gin opono iye.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Jo ame onwoŋo tye i cel te lwoŋo Yonacan kede atiŋ jami lwennyere kun okobo ni, “Biye wunu malo kan, me obin onyuttiwu ginnoro kan.” Yonacan te kobbi atiŋ jami lwennyere ni, “Biye ilub yora, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko miyogi oko i ciŋ jo Icrael.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Yonacan te daŋ cako yito malo kun kokoba i ciŋe kede tyene, atiŋ jami lwennyere daŋ lubo yore. Jo Piriciti te bino rette piny i nyim Yonacan kun atiŋ jami dopogi lubo kede yore." 
1Samuel14:14 Man en nek me agege ame Yonacan kede atiŋ jami lwennyere oneko kede jo Piriciti, gin oneko jo pyeraryo bala dano ame opuro poto mere i kweri dyaŋ yore acel keken i poto me eka acel." 
1Samuel14:15 Twon lworo adwoŋ meicel rik te mako jo Piriciti ame onwoŋo tye i gony, kedejo ame onwoŋo tye i dye bar, karacel kede mony ame onwoŋo tye i cel, anaka oyak daŋ komgi omyel. Lobo daŋ rik te yenere, jo te bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel." 
1Samuel14:16 Okurpiny a Caulo ame onwoŋo rik tye i Gibea, ame onwoŋo tye i lobo a jo Benjamin te nenogi oko; nen ba, lwak jo Piriciti onwoŋo tye aloloka atata kun odok tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi." 
1Samuel14:17 Caulo te kobbi jo ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe ni, “Kwan wunu jo me onen na ame oya oko i baŋwa.” Kare ame okwano jo, ote nwoŋo ni Yonacan karacel kede atiŋ jami lwennyere mom tye." 
1Samuel14:18 Caulo te kobo baŋ Akija ni, “Kel canduk Obaŋa kan.” Pien i kare-naca canduk Obaŋa onwoŋo woto karacel i jo Icrael." 
1Samuel14:19 I kare ame Caulo tye akop kede alamdog, woo onwoŋo tye amedde ameda i gony a jo Piriciti, omio Caulo te kobbi alamdog ni, “Koŋ iwek doŋ bedi.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Eka Caulo karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe te cokere karacel wot i mony. Nen ba, dano acel acel i akina jo Piriciti te cako cobo awottere i pala lwennyere, kun jo luŋ odoko ababaŋ." 
1Samuel14:21 Jo Eburania ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋ jo Piriciti con, ame rik onwoŋo owoto kedgi i gonygi, gin daŋ ote lokere dwogo cen baŋ jo Icrael ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋ Caulo kede Yonacan." 
1Samuel14:22 Jo Icrael ame rik onwoŋo opono i akina kiddi ame tye i lobo a jo Epraim daŋ ote timo kittono. Kare ame gin daŋ owinyo ni jo Piriciti tye ka riŋo oko, gin daŋ oryemo yorgi atek meicel kun olwenyo kedgi." 
1Samuel14:23 Rwot rik te laro jo Icrael i nino-nono; lweny rik te kato naka i Bet-aven. 
1Samuel14:24 I nino-nono jo Icrael rik te bedo arac meicel, pien Caulo okwoŋo kwoŋ i kom jo kun kobo ni, “Cen myero mak ŋat ame bino cem kun piny mom ru oyuto, ame nwoŋo an pwod atye aculo kwor i kom okworra.” Mannono rik te miyo jo bedo a mom obilo ginnoro i doggi." 
1Samuel14:25 Jo luŋ te ciro i buŋ, gin te nwoŋo moo kic tye kuno." 
1Samuel14:26 I kare ame jo doŋ otuno i buŋ kuno, gin te nwoŋo moo kic tye aton piny. Cite ŋattoro mom te gudo, pien jo onwoŋo obedo lworo kwon ame Caulo okwono." 
1Samuel14:27 Cite Yonacan onwoŋo mom owinyo i kare ame pappere ciko jo kun kwoŋo akwoŋa, mannono omio en te cwayo abiro mere ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋe, te rwako i pedo kic, te tero i doge kede ciŋe; waŋe te doko atek oko." 
1Samuel14:28 Ŋat acel i akina lwak te kobo ni, “Pappi onwoŋo ociko jo atek meicel kun kwoŋo akwoŋa ni, ‘Cen myero mak ŋat ame ocemo i nino a tin.’ ” Kec onwoŋo doŋ ociro jo oko." 
1Samuel14:29 Yonacan te gamo ni, “Pappa okelo ayela oko i lobo. Nen kite ame waŋa doŋ odoko atek kede pi bilo ka moo kic aduno." 
1Samuel14:30 Mom onwoŋo twero bedo ber akato, kono ka ce tin jo onwoŋo ocamo gin ame gin oyako i baŋ okworgi kite ame yigi mito? Koŋ inen aman mom ru oneko jo Piriciti apol.”" 
1Samuel14:31 I nino-nono ote neko jo Piriciti cakere i Mikmac tuno kede i Aijalon. I kare-nono kec onwoŋo doŋ ociro jo oko," 
1Samuel14:32 jo te cako mwomere i kom lim ame oyako, ote mako rommi, twoni, kede roce, ote nekogi oko, jo te cako mwodo oko anumu kun ocamo anakaremo mere." 
1Samuel14:33 Jo te kobbi Caulo ni, “Nen ba, jo tye aturo cik a Rwot, pi mwodo riŋo anumu kun omedo kede remo.” Caulo te gamo ni, “Ituro wunu cik, cor wunu twon kidi adwoŋŋere baŋa kan.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Caulo dok te kobo ni, “Keketa wunu iyi akina jo, iwot ikobbigi wunu ni, ‘Ŋat acel acel myero kel twonnere kede romo mere, bin nek kan, te camo. Kur dok itim wunu bal i turo cik a Rwot pi mwodo riŋo medo kede remo.’ ” Mannono te miyo dano acel acel i akina lwak, bino kun kela twonnere dyeworrono, te bino neko kuno." 
1Samuel14:35 Caulo te cano keno lam pi Rwot; mannono rik obedo keno lam me agege ame en ocano pi Rwot. 
1Samuel14:36 Caulo te kobo ni, “Olub wunu yo jo Piriciti dyewor-ri me owot oyakgi wunu ka piny oru. Kur owek wunu ŋattoro i akinagi doŋ.” Gin te gamo ni, “Yin tim gin ame ineno ni ber.” Cite alamdog te kobo ni, “Koŋ onok wunu Obaŋa aceggi.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Caulo te cako penyo kop i baŋ Rwot ni, “Myero alub yo jo Piriciti? Ibino miyogi i ciŋ jo Icrael?” Cite i nino-nono Obaŋa mom odokke iye kadi acel." 
1Samuel14:38 Caulo te kobbi otel wic lwak ni, “Wun otel a lwak luŋ, biye wunu kan, me iŋe wunu dok daŋ inen wunu kite ame bal tin obino kede." 
1Samuel14:39 Pien kite ame Rwot bedo kede kwoni, Rwot ame laro jo Icrael, kadi ka bal man tye i kom woda Yonacan, en myero to gire.” Cite ŋattoro i akina lwak mom te dok i koppere-nono." 
1Samuel14:40 En te kobbi jo Icrael luŋ ni, “Wun ibino bedo wunu tuŋcel eka an kede woda Yonacan ote bedo tuŋcel.” Lwak te kobbi Caulo ni, “Yin tim gin ame ineno ni ber.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Caulo te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, piŋo kara tin mom igamo dog amironi? Ka ce roc man tye i koma onyo i kom woda Yonacan, mi Urim. Aco ka bal man tye i kom joni Icrael, mi Tumim.” Kwir rik te mako Yonacan kede Caulo, kun lwak mom iye," 
1Samuel14:42 Caulo dok te kobo ni, “Dok ibol kwir i kom an kede woda Yonacan.” Kwir te doŋ mako Yonacan." 
1Samuel14:43 Caulo te kobbi Yonacan ni, “Kobba gin ame itimo.” Yonacan te cako titte kun kobo ni, “An abilo moo kic aduno kun agweto kede abiro ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋa. An gira doŋ ene, an abino to.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Caulo te kobo ni, “Obaŋa myero otim ginnoro arac meicel i koma, yin gire myero ito, Yonacan.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Lwak te kobbi Caulo ni, “Yonacan ato oko ateteni, en ame en okelo twon loc adwoŋ rom man iyi Icrael-li? Mom gire bino timere kittono. Kite ame Rwot tye kwo-ni, yer wie moro acel keken mom gire bino poto piny, pien obedo tic karacel Obaŋa i kare man.” Lwak rik te bino laro Yonacan kittono, naka omio mom te to," 
1Samuel14:46 Caulo rik mom doŋ te ryemo yo jo Piriciti te dok cen; jo Piriciti daŋ te dok i kabedogi. 
1Samuel14:47 Kare ame Caulo doŋ odoko abaka ame loo jo Icrael, en obedo lweny i kom okworrere luŋ ame omano ŋete tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi. Olwenyo i jo Moab, jo Ammon, jo Edom kede i kom obakki me Joba, karacel kede i kom jo Piriciti. Tuŋ a en olokere iye keken, en loo okworrere oko," 
1Samuel14:47 Kare ame Caulo doŋ odoko abaka ame loo jo Icrael, en obedo lweny i kom okworrere luŋ ame omano ŋete tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi. Olwenyo i jo Moab, jo Ammon, jo Edom kede i kom obakki me Joba, karacel kede i kom jo Piriciti. Tuŋ a en olokere iye keken, en loo okworrere oko," 
1Samuel14:48 En dok te bedo lweny atek meicel, te loyo jo Amalek, eka te laro jo Icrael oko i ciŋ jo ame onwoŋo bedo yakogi." 
1Samuel14:49 Itino a Caulo awobe onwoŋo tye Yonacan, Icwi kede Malkicua; eka anyira mere aryo te bedo Merab ame en nyako me agege kede Mikal ame en nyako atidi." 
1Samuel14:50 Nyiŋ dako mere onwoŋo Akinoam, ame obedo nyaka Akimaj. Eka nyiŋ adwoŋ ame telo wi monyere te bedo Abuneri wot a Ner, ame obedo papa a Caulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kic papa a Caulo kede Ner papa Abuneri, onwoŋo obedo awobe Abiel." 
1Samuel14:52 Lweny rik obedo agwa meicel i kom jo Piriciti i kare a Caulo luŋ. Caulo rik ka oneno dano moro ame kome tek onyo ame tek i lweny, en kelo danonono bedo baŋe." 
1Samuel15:1 Camwiri rik te kobbi Caulo ni, “Rwot rik obin ocwaa me wiri kede moo, me ibed abaka ame loo jo mere Icrael; pi mannono myero tin iwiny kop a Rwot." 
1Samuel15:2 Rwot me mony okobo ni, ‘Abino keto can i kom Amalek pi gin ame yam gin otimo i kom Icrael, pien yam gin ocako lweny i kom Icrael i kare ame gin oya i Miciri." 
1Samuel15:3 Wot ilweny i kom jo Amalek, ilwergi oko acalo gin me kwer karacel kede jamigi luŋ. Kica kur maki i komgi, nek co kede mon, itino atino karacel kede en apwod dottege, twoni kede rommi, inaga kede kane.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Caulo te lwoŋo jo, te kwanogi i Telaim. Jo ame onwoŋo woto i tyengi oromo tutumia mia aryo kede jo me Juda tutumia apar." 
1Samuel15:5 Caulo rik te wot i boma a jo Amalek, te wot kiyogi i luŋ." 
1Samuel15:6 Caulo te kobbi jo me Keni ni, “Ya wunu oko i akina jo Amalek, iwot wunu piny, me kur atyekwu karacel, kedgi, pien rik inyuto wunu cuny me kica baŋ jo Icrael luŋ i kare ame gin oya i Miciri.” Mannono te miyo jo Keni ya oko i akina jo Amalek." 
1Samuel15:7 Caulo te loyo jo Amalek cakere i Kavila tuno Cur, ame tye tutuŋ kide me Miciri." 
1Samuel15:8 En te mako Agag, abaka me Amalek tero akwo, ento jo luŋ en te jwerogi oko i pala romo acalo gin me kwer." 
1Samuel15:9 Ento Caulo karacel kede lwak mom te ye neko Agag, kede romi kede twoni abeco mege, kede kit lim ocele ame ocwe, kede itino rommi. Gin te lunyo jwero ka gigi ame ocao kede en ame konygi mom." 
1Samuel15:10 Kop a Rwot te bino baŋ Camwiri ni, “Cunya ocwer meicel pi miyo Caulo bedo abaka," 
1Samuel15:11 pien en doŋ odoko oko cen, mom dok tye ka luba, dok daŋ mom ocobo cikka.” Akemo te mako Camwiri atek, en te kok baŋ Rwot dyewor benebene," 
1Samuel15:12 Camwiri te dilo ibayi me rwatte kede Caulo odiko. Jo te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Caulo obino i Karmel, te cibo ginnoro me po pire kuno, eka te lokere kato anyim, te wot i Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Kare ame Camwiri obino baŋ Caulo, Caulo okobbe ni, “Rwot omii winyo; an atyeko co bo cik a Rwot.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Camwiri te penye ni, “Kara koko rommi kede me a twoni a dok awinyo-ni kono?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Caulo te gamo ni, “Okelogi i baŋ jo Amalek, pien jo oweko rommi abeco kede twoni me aŋola me yalo Rwot Obaŋani; cite en ocele mege luŋ ojwero oko acalo gin me kwer.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Camwiri te kobbi Caulo ni, “Aco liŋ! Abino titti gin ame Rwot okobba tin dyewor.” Caulo te gamo ni “Titta do.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Camwiri te kobbe ni, “Kadi bed yin inene keni acalo ŋat atidi, cite mom yin ilo atekere luŋ me Icrael? Rwot oyerri me bedo abaka a jo Icrael." 
1Samuel15:18 Rwot rik te cwayi i ticcere kun kobbi ni, ‘Wot ijwer obalo luŋ me Amalek acalo gin me kwer, ilweny kedgi tuno waŋ ame ityekogi oko iweŋ.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Piŋo kara dok ikwero winyo kop a Rwot? Piŋo imwomere i jami ayaka, ite timo gin arac i nyim Rwot?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Caulo te kobbi Camwiri ni, “An gira awinyo kop a Rwot, awoto i tic ame Rwot ocwaa iye, akelo Agag, abaka a jo Amalek, dok daŋ ajwero jo Amalek acalo gin me kwer." 
1Samuel15:21 Ento lwak otero jami ame oyako, rommi kede twoni, kede jami abeco mege ame onwoŋo ojalo me aneka, gin otero me bed gin me aŋolo me yalo Rwot Obaŋani i Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Camwiri te kobo ni, “Rwot mito mot awaŋa kede me aŋola akato kite ame en mito ni jo winy kede gin a en ociko? Nen ba, winyo kop a Rwot ociko kato mot aŋola oko; ciko yit i koppere kato dwol rommi oko." 
1Samuel15:23 Pien jem rom aroma i bal me tyet, dok nwan a ŋut rom aroma i turo cik kede woro jogi. Pien yin ikwero winyo kop a Rwot, en daŋ doŋ okweri oko me bedo abaka.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Caulo te kobbi Camwiri ni, “An doŋ abalo; aturo cik a Rwot kede koppi, pien an alunyo lworo lwak dok daŋ awinyo kopgi." 
1Samuel15:25 Doŋ pi mannono ba, tim ber, i tima kica i balla, me odok kedi, awot awor Rwot.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Camwiri te kobbi Caulo ni, “An gira mom abino dok cen karacel kedi, pien yin ityeko kwero kop a Rwot, omio Rwot daŋ doŋ okweri oko me bedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Camwiri te doŋ lokere me cako wottere oko, Caulo te yoro lak iorrere i kome, eka te yec oko." 
1Samuel15:28 Camwiri te kobbe ni, “Rwot tin doŋ oyeco loc a jo Icrael oko i baŋi, omio baŋ awotti ame en dano aber kati oko." 
1Samuel15:29 Pien Won Kwogo me Icrael mom kobo goba, mom daŋ loko tamere, pien en mom obedo dano ame mio en dok loko tamere.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Caulo te kobo ni, “An doŋ abalo, cite myero aman imia woro i nyim odoŋe a jona, kede i nyim jo Icrael, me idok cen karacel keda, me awot awor Rwot Obaŋani.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Camwiri te lokere lubo Caulo, Caulo te woro Rwot." 
1Samuel15:32 Camwiri te kobo ni, “Kel Agag, abaka a jo Amalek baŋa kan.” Agag te bino baŋe kun kome oto inoŋ. Agag te kobo ni, “Ateteni, lit ato doŋ gire okato oko.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Camwiri te kobo ni, “Kite acalo jami lwennyi rik omio mon odoŋ korgi nono, totti daŋ kore bino doŋ nono i akina mon.” Camwiri te totoŋo Agag, ninido oko i nyim Rwot i Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:34 Camwiri te doŋ dok cen i Rama, aco Caulo te wot i paco mere i Gibea." 
1Samuel15:35 Camwiri mom dok te neno Caulo naka Caulo oto. Cite Camwiri rik te kumo pire i kare ame en doŋ oto. Rwot cunye te cwer atek pi miyo Caulo bedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael. 
1Samuel16:1 Rwot okobbi Camwiri ni, “Kara ibino bedo kumo pi Caulo kare arom mene, kun an doŋ atyeko kwere oko me bedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael? Pik moo i adomo, me iwoti. Abino ori baŋ Yece ame obedo dano me Beterekem, pien doŋ atyeko nwoŋo abaka i akina awobe mere.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Camwiri te gamo ni, “Kara atwero wot niŋo ba? Ka ce Caulo bino winyo, en bino neka oko.” Rwot dok te kobbe ni, “Ter roa, ite wot kobo ni, ‘An abino yalo Rwot kede mot aŋola.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Lwoŋ Yece daŋ bin i yalo Rwot, an abino nyutti ŋo a myero iti. Ibino wiro ŋat ame an abino tuco nyiŋe baŋi.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Camwiri rik daŋ te tiyo gin ame Rwot ociko, owoto i Beterekem. Odoŋe me boma-nono te bino rwatte kede kun komgi myel, ote penye ni, “Binoni-ni ber onyo rac?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Camwiri te gamo ni, “Ber gire; abino yalo Rwot; lonyere wunu kenwu, me ibin iwot wunu keda i ka yalo Rwot.” En Camwiri ikome te lonyo Yece kede awobe mere, te lwoŋogi bino i ka yalo Obaŋa." 
1Samuel16:6 Kare ame gin doŋ obino, Camwiri oneno Eliab, te tamo ni, “Ateteni, ŋat ame Rwot bino kwero me bedo abaka doŋ tye i nyime.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Cite Rwot te kobbi Camwiri ni, “Yin kur inen ber a kome onyo borrere, pien atyeko kwere oko. Rwot gire mom neno kite ame dano neno kede; pien dano neno kom ame nen i oko, ento Rwot neno mere cuny dano.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Yece dok te lwoŋo Abinadab te miye beo i nyim Camwiri, Camwiri te kobo ni, “Akadi man daŋ Rwot gire mom oyero.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Yece dok te miyo Cama beo i nyim Camwiri, Camwiri dok te kobo ni, “Akadi man daŋ Rwot gire mom oyero.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Yece te miyo awobe mere abiro beo i nyim Camwiri. Camwiri te kobbi Yece ni, “Rwot gire mom oyero moro i akina magi.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Camwiri te penyo Yece ni, “Itinoni, awobe luŋ tye kan?” Yece te gamo ni, “Pwod odoŋ moro acel ame en cogo en tye akwayo rommi.” Camwiri te kobbi Yece ni, “cwa dano wot kele; pien wan mom obino bedo piny naka waŋ ame en obino kan.”" 
1Samuel16:12 En te cwayo dano me wot kele. En onwoŋo obedo awobi amerema, kun waŋe nen aber, dok daŋ mwonya meicel. Rwot te kobo ni, “Ya doŋ iwire kede moo, pien man doŋ en ennono.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Camwiri te kwanyo adomo ame moo tye i yie, eka te wirre i nyim omego mere; Cuny a Rwot te bino i kom Daudi kede teko, cakere i nino-nono wot kede anyim. Camwiri te ya oko i Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 I kare-nono Cuny a Rwot te doŋ ya oko i kom Caulo eka cen arac ame oya i baŋ Rwot te cako yele. 
1Samuel16:15 Amiro mere te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, cen arac ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa ayeli meicel." 
1Samuel16:16 Adwoŋwa, myero imi wan omironi ame otye i nyimi i caa-ni, owot oyeny lo moro ame adiro i goyo naŋa; me wek i kare ame cen arac ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa tye i komi, en bino goyo naŋa te miyi bedo aber.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Caulo te kobbi omiro mere ni, “Aco doŋ yenya wunu ŋat ame adiro i goyo naŋa, ikel wunu baŋa.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Ŋat acel i akina awobe-nono te kobo ni, “Nen ba, an aneno wot a Yece ame obedo dano me Beterekem, ame en adiro meicel i goyo naŋa; en dano ame kome tek, a ŋeo lweny, ryek i kop, dok daŋ en dano anen amwonya meicel, Rwot daŋ tye kede.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Koppono te miyo Caulo oro jo baŋ Yece, kun okobbe ni, “Cwa wodi Daudi baŋa, ame en akwat romi.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Yece te kwanyo kana ame oyeo ogati kede opoko koŋo olok, kede atin dyel, te miyo wode Daudi terogi baŋ Caulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Daudi te bino baŋ Caulo, te daŋ cako ticcere oko. Caulo rik te mare atek meicel, en te doko atiŋ jami lwennyere." 
1Samuel16:22 Caulo te cwayo kop baŋ Yece kun kobbe ni, “Wek Daudi doŋ bed i ticcere baŋa kan, pien aneno ticcere oyomo cunya.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Doŋ kare luŋ ka cen arac ame ya i baŋ Obaŋa tye i kom Caulo, Daudi kwanyo naŋa te goyo kede ciŋe: eka Caulo te doko aber, ame kome yot, kun cen arac oya oko i kome." 
1Samuel17:1 I kare-nono jo Piriciti te coko monygi karacel me lweny; gin ocokere i Coko, i lobo a jo Juda, ote guro kemagi i akina Coko kede Ajeka, i Epec-dammim." 
1Samuel17:2 Caulo karacel kede jo Icrael te cokere, wot guro kemagi i luŋ me Ela. Gin te ryeye i tyeŋ me lweny i kom jo Piriciti." 
1Samuel17:3 Jo Piriciti te cuŋ i wi kidi tuŋ cel kun jo Icrael daŋ cuŋ i wi kidi ame tye tuŋ ocele, eka luŋ te poko akinagi." 
1Samuel17:4 Lo moro atek te donyo i gony a jo Piriciti ame nyiŋe Goliac, dano me Gat, ame en onwoŋo dano odoŋo malo, borrere romo futi aboŋwen kede nucu." 
1Samuel17:5 En onwoŋo oruko tok mola i wie, kun koti mola ame ororopo aropa tye i kore; koti mola-nono onwoŋo pekkere mito romo ratili mia acel kede pyerabic." 
1Samuel17:6 Eka iyi abela tyene te ruko iye mola, kun daŋ okakaca i toŋ aliro me mola i wi gwoke." 
1Samuel17:7 Bol toŋŋere mito rom aroma kede yat me cweyo boŋo; aco leb toŋŋere romo ratili apar wie aboŋwen; kun ŋat omako kwottere telo yo. 
1Samuel17:8 En ocuŋ te redo i wi mony a jo Icrael ame onwoŋo oryeye i tyeŋ ni, “Piŋo ibino wunu me romo kun iryeye wunu i tyeŋ? An mom abedo dano me Piriciti? Wun mom ibedo wunu omiro a Caulo? Yer wunu danowu acel, me en bin baŋa kan." 
1Samuel17:9 Ka ce en twero lweny keda te neka, wan obino bedo omirowu; aco ka an aloc ate neke oko, wun ibino bedo wunu omirowa, ibino tic wunu pirwa.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Dano me Piriciti-nono te kobo ni, “An tin acao mony a jo Icrael oko, koŋ imia wunu dano me alweny kede.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Kare ame Caulo kede jo Icrael luŋ owinyo kop man tipo komgi te po meicel, ote bedo kede twon lworo adwoŋ a mom kobere." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi rik onwoŋo obedo wot a lo moro me Eprata i Beterekem, ame nyiŋe Yece, ame onwoŋo tye kede awobe mere aboro. I kare a Caulo onwoŋo en doŋ oti oko, mwaka me dittere onwoŋo doŋ bup." 
1Samuel17:13 Awobe a Yece adek adito mege onwoŋo owoto i lweny karacel kede Caulo; nyiŋ awobe mere adek adito ame onwoŋo owoto i lweny ene: Eliab, ame obedo atiŋ kao, ŋat olube te bedo Abinadab, eka me adekkere te bedo Cama." 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi en onwoŋo obedo cogo. Jo adek adito mege onwoŋo olubo Caulo," 
1Samuel17:15 ento Daudi onwoŋo bedo wirre woto baŋ Caulo, dok paco i Beterekem me wot kwayo rommi a pappere." 
1Samuel17:16 Dano me Piriciti-nono onwoŋo obedo cuŋ i nyim kittono odiko kede otyeno pi nino pyeraŋwen twal. 
1Samuel17:17 Yece te kobbi wode Daudi ni, “Kwany debe aryo me ŋano ame oceloni karacel kede ogati apar-ri pi omegoni, iru terogi baŋ omegoni i gony." 
1Samuel17:18 Ter daŋ cak omakere aluluŋ tomon baŋ atel wi monygi me jo tutumia. Nengi ka otye aber, ite kelo ginnoro i baŋgi ame nyuto.”" 
1Samuel17:19 I kare-nono onwoŋo Caulo kede omego mere-naca karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ onwoŋo tye i luŋ me Eka, kun otye olweny i jo me Piriciti." 
1Samuel17:20 Daudi te dilo ibayi, te weko rommi baŋ ŋattoro me gwokogi, okwanyo jami, te wot kite ame Yece ocike kede. En te tuno i gony i kare ame jo tye awot ryeye i tyeŋ me lweny, kun owo woo me lweny." 
1Samuel17:21 Jo Icrael kede jo Piriciti te ryeye i tyeŋ, kun mony man gaye i mony wadgi." 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi rik te weko jami i ciŋ agwok jami, en daŋ te kato wot ryeye i tyeŋ, te moto omego mere." 
1Samuel17:23 I kare ame en pwod tye akop omego mere, nen, lo atek me Piriciti, ame obedo dano me Gat, a nyiŋe Goliac, te kato dok i nyim mony a jo Piriciti, te kobo kop ame ebedo ko bo con ca. Daudi te winyo koppere-nono." 
1Samuel17:24 Jo luŋ me Icrael ka oneno danonono, gin oriŋo oko i nyime, ote bedo kede twon lworo adwoŋ meicel." 
1Samuel17:25 Jo Icrael te kobo ni, “Ineno wunu dano ame obino-ni? En obino me cayo jo Icrael. Ŋat ame bino neko dano-nono, abaka bino miyo lwak lim abup meicel, te daŋ dok miye nyare, kun mio daŋ pappere kede jo me ode luŋ mom dok gelo ocolo iyi Icrael.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Daudi te penyo jo ame onwoŋo tye ocuŋ iŋete ni, “Gin aŋo ame obino timo i kom dano ame bino neko dano me Piriciti-ni, te kwanyo lewic oko i kom jo Icrael? Dano me Piriciti a mom oliro-ni kara obedo na, ame mio en cao mony Obaŋa ame kwo?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Jo te dokke i kite acellono ni, “Obino timo kittono i kom ŋat ame bino neke.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Eliab ame obedo ominnere adwoŋ owinyo ka Daudi tye akop i jo-nono, akemo te make atek i kom Daudi, te kobbi Daudi ni, “ŋo kara okelli kan? Rommi anonok ca iweko i tim baŋ ŋa? An aŋeo ni yin ayia, dok cunyi daŋ opoŋ i tam areco pien yin ibino kan me neno lweny.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi te gamo ni, “Ŋo kara ame aman an dok atimo arac? Mom akobo kop keken?”" 
1Samuel17:30 En te weko ominnere oko, te lokere baŋ ŋat ocele, te kop kede daŋ kittono, jo daŋ te dok dokke kite ame koŋ odokke kede con." 
1Samuel17:31 Jo ame owinyo kop a Daudi-nono te dok kobo koppono baŋ Caulo. Caulo te cwayo kwena lwoŋe. 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi te kobbi Caulo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, myero cuny ŋattoro kur poti pira, an amironi abino wot lweny i dano me Piriciti.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Caulo te kobbi Daudi ni, “Yin gire mom iromo wot lweny i dano me Piriciti, pien yin pwod ibedo awobi, aco en doŋ olwenyo bor, cakere i kare me tidi mere.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Daudi te kobbi Caulo ni, “An amironi, abedo akwarommi a pappa, yam ka eŋatu onyo nu moro ager obino te mako atiŋ romo moro i akina rommi," 
1Samuel17:35 aryemo yore ate neko oko, ate laro romo-nono oko kun akwanyo i doge. Ka ce otirre me lweny keda, amako yer tike, ate goyo neko oko." 
1Samuel17:36 Amironi doŋ otyeko neko eŋatu kede ŋuu ager; dano me Piriciti a mom oliro-ni daŋ bino bedo calo moro i akinagi, pien ocao mony Obaŋa ame kwo," 
1Samuel17:37 Rwot ame rik olara i ciŋ eŋatu kede i ciŋ ŋuu ager, bino daŋ lara i ciŋ dano me Piriciti-ni.” Caulo doŋ te kobbi Daudi ni, “Woti, Rwot obed kedi!”" 
1Samuel17:38 Caulo te rukki Daudi jami me lwennyere; orwako tok me mola i wie, te daŋ rwako koti mola ame ororopo aropa i kome." 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi te tweyo pala me romo i pyere, i kom rukkere me mola, te temo wot, wot te bedo tek, pien onwoŋo en mom oporo con. Daudi te kobbi Caulo ni, “Mom atwero wot i jami magi, pien mom aporo con.” Daudi te gonyogi oko i kome." 
1Samuel17:40 En te kwanyo abiro mere mako i ciŋe, te wot depo atyeŋ abic alilia i kulo, te ketogi iyi cao mere me kwat ame onwoŋo tye baŋe. Atindio daŋ onwoŋo tye i ciŋe, en te wot noko dano me Piriciti ca aceggi." 
1Samuel17:41 Dano me Piriciti daŋ te nyigo baŋ Daudi, kun lo atiŋo kwottere otelo yo," 
1Samuel17:42 Kare ame dano me Piriciti obolo waŋe oneno Daudi, obwone oko; pien onwoŋo en gire pwod awobi ame komerema, dok nen amwonya meicel." 
1Samuel17:43 Dano me Piriciti-nono te kobbi Daudi ni, “An adoko gwok bo, omio yin ibino baŋa kede abiro?” En dok te ceno Daudi kede nyiŋ jogi mere." 
1Samuel17:44 Te kobbi Daudi ni, “Koŋ ibin baŋa, me ami komi baŋ winy a twarre malo kede leyi me tim.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi te kobbi dano me Piriciti-nono ni, “Yin ibino baŋa kede pala lweny kede toŋ, kede toŋ aliro; cite an abino baŋi kede nyiŋ Rwot me mony, Obaŋa me mony a jo Icrael, ame yin doŋ ityeko cayo." 
1Samuel17:46 Tin Rwot bino miyi i ciŋa, abino goyi ate ŋolo ŋuti oko, ate daŋ miyo kom jo oto me mony a jo Piriciti baŋ winy a twarre malo kede leyi me tim, me lobo luŋ ŋe ni Obaŋa kara tye iyi Icrael," 
1Samuel17:47 dok me jo luŋ ame ocokere kan-ni ŋe ni Rwot kara mom laro jo kede pala lweny onyo kede toŋ; pien lweny man obedo gire me a Rwot, en bino miyowu i ciŋwa.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Kare ame dano me Piriciti-nono oya obino baŋ Daudi, ame en doŋ ceggi me rwatte kede, Daudi oriŋo oyotoyot i ka rwattegi me lweny, me wot rwatte i dano me Piriciti-nono." 
1Samuel17:49 Orwako ciŋe iyi icao mere, te kwanyo atyeŋ, te keto iyi atiŋdio, te bayo, te celo nyim dano me Piriciti-nono. Atyeŋ te donyo oko i tur nyime, en te rette aryeba cuny." 
1Samuel17:50 Mannono te miyo Daudi loyo dano me Piriciti-nono oko, kun loc kede atindio karacel kede atyeŋ. En oloo i dano me Piriciti, te neko oko, pala lweny onwoŋo gire pe i ciŋ Daudi." 
1Samuel17:51 Daudi oriŋo te wot cuŋ i kom dano me Piriciti-nono, te kwanyo pala lwennyere, te woto oko iyi akure, te ŋolo kede ŋute, neke oko. Kare ame jo me Piriciti oneno ni danogi atek oto oko, gin te cako riŋo oko." 
1Samuel17:52 Lwak jo Icrael karacel kede Juda te twarre kede woo kun oryemo kede jo Piriciti naka tuno i Gat, kede i dogcel me Ekron. Jo Piriciti ame owawano te rereta i yo cakere i Caraim tuno naka i Gat kede i Ekron," 
1Samuel17:53 Jo Icrael rik te doŋ dwogo cen i yo ryemo jo Piriciti, gin te yako gony a jo Piriciti," 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi te kwanyo wi dano-nono kelo i Jerucalem; cite jami me lwennyere, en te keto i kema mere." 
1Samuel17:55 I kare ame rik Caulo oneno Daudi kun woto lweny i dano me Piriciti, en openyo Abuneri, a loo mony ni, “Abuneri wee, atin awobi-nu obedo wot aŋa?” Abuneri te gamo ni, “Kite ame itye kwo-ni ama abaka, mom aŋeo gire.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Abaka te kobbe ni, “Koŋ ipeny nyiŋ papa awobi-nono.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Kare ame Daudi doŋ odwogo i neko Goliac. Abuneri otere i nyim Caulo, kun en omako wi Goliac i ciŋe." 
1Samuel17:58 Caulo te penye ni, “Awobi nie, nyiŋ papi ŋa?” Daudi te gamo ni, “An abedo wot amironi Yece, ame en dano me Beterekem.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Kare ame Daudi otyeko doŋ kop i Caulo, Yonacan te cako bedo i mar adwoŋ i cunye i kom Daudi, Daudi daŋ te cako mare oko; Yonacan te marre doŋ atek ateka, kite ame en mare kede kene." 
1Samuel18:2 I nino-nono Caulo te tero Daudi, mom doŋ te ye ni en dok cen i ot a pappere." 
1Samuel18:3 Yonacan te cikere gin kede Daudi, pien onwoŋo mare atek meicel, kite ame en mare kede kene," 
1Samuel18:4 Yonacan te gonyo jor i kome, te miyo baŋ Daudi, karacel kede jami lwenyere, naka pala me romo mere kede akud atero, kede del me pyere," 
1Samuel18:5 Kannoro luŋ ame Caulo rik ocwao iye Daudi, en woto, dok daŋ en cobo ticcere ducu kakare; mannono te miyo Caulo kete i tic me loyo cirikale me mony. Kete i tic me loyo cirikale te yomoro cuny lwak luŋ karacel kede omiro a Caulo daŋ." 
1Samuel18:6 I kare ame onwoŋo gin adwogo paco, kun Daudi doŋ odwogo oko i neko dano me Piriciti, mon i boma me Icrael luŋ, te ciro bino i wer kede myel, me jolo abaka Caulo, kun oyeŋo ajaa, dok daŋ owero werrogo me yomcuny, ogoo daŋ i tummogo apapat." 
1Samuel18:7 Mon te myel kun oleo wer alea ni, “Caulo neko mere jo tutumia, aco Daudi oneko mere jo tutumia apar.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Akemo te mako Caulo atek meicel, pien werrono onwoŋo mom oyomoro cunye, en te kobo ni, “Daudi omio tutumia apar twal, aco an ote miya tutumia acel keken; kara man ŋo a doŋ odoŋ, mom doŋ gamo loc keken?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Cakere i nino-nono, Caulo te doŋ cako neno Daudi i waŋ arac meicel." 
1Samuel18:10 Orwo mere cen arac ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa te bino oko i kom Caulo awaŋe acel. En te bedo po i kop apoa i ode kun Daudi gire go naŋa i kite me nino ducu. I kare-nono Caulo onwoŋo omako toŋŋere i ciŋe," 
1Samuel18:11 en te bayo Daudi kede toŋ, pien onwoŋo otamo ni, “Acobo adiyo i kor apama.” Ento Daudi te wirre oko teŋe tyeŋ aryo twal." 
1Samuel18:12 Caulo te bedo lworo Daudi, pien Rwot onwoŋo tye kede, kun doŋ oweke en Caulo oko," 
1Samuel18:13 Mannono te miyo Caulo kwanye oko i nyime, te miye bedo atel wi mony ame loo jo tutumia; en te bedo telo lwakkere kan ame ore iye luŋ," 
1Samuel18:14 ginnoro luŋ ame en otio cobere kakare, pien Rwot onwoŋo tye kede." 
1Samuel18:15 Kare ame Caulo oneno ni en tye ka cobo ticcere aber meicel, Caulo te donyo lwore oko." 
1Samuel18:16 Ento jo Icrael karacel kede jo Juda luŋ onwoŋo maro Daudi, pien gin oneno kite ame en woto kede i lweny dwogo kede cen." 
1Samuel18:17 Caulo dok te kobbi Daudi ni, “Nyara adwoŋŋere Merab ene, abino miyi me bedo cegi; yin myero ka ibed atek pira, ilweny lweny a Rwot luŋ.” Pien Caulo onwoŋo otamo ni, “Ciŋa gira mom myero gude, myero en gire to i ciŋ jo Piriciti.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Daudi te gamo dog Caulo ni, “An adoko ŋa, adwoŋ, kede kwarina, karacel kede jo me doggola a pappa iyi Icrael, ame mio an adoko cwar nyaka abaka twal?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Cite kare ame kono mi iye Merab nyaka a Caulo baŋ Daudi, ote dok lunyo miyo Adriel nyomo, ame en dano me Mekola." 
1Samuel18:20 I kare-nono Mikal nyaka a Caulo onwoŋo maro Daudi, kopgi-nono te winyere oko baŋ Caulo, te daŋ yomoro cunye." 
1Samuel18:21 Caulo te tamo i cunye ni, “Wek amie, me en bed kumma me cike, me en to gire i ciŋ jo Piriciti.” Mannono te miyo Caulo kobo baŋ Daudi tyen me aryo ni, “Tin doŋ ibino doko cwar nyara.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Caulo te ci ko omiro mere ni, “Kobbi wunu Daudi imuŋ ni, ‘Cuny abaka yom i komi meicel. Omiro mere luŋ daŋ mari. Yin doŋ myero inyom nyaka abaka,’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Omiro abaka te daŋ kobo koppono luŋ baŋ Daudi. Daudi te kobbigi ni, “Wun itamo wunu ni nyomo nyaka abaka obedo gin ayot, aco kun ineno wunu ni an acan, dok mom-gu aŋeye.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Omiro a Caulo te dwoki Caulo kop ni, “Daudi okobo kit man, kit man,”" 
1Samuel18:25 Caulo te kobbigi ni, “Wun ibino kobbi wunu Daudi ni, ‘Abaka gire mom amito limmoro me nyom, kono ka del kom co a jo Piriciti mia acel keken me culo kwor i kom okworrere.’ ” Caulo onwoŋo otamo ni jo Piriciti bino neko Daudi oko." 
1Samuel18:26 Kare ame omiro mere otito kop man baŋ Daudi, koppere daŋ te yomoro cuny Daudi me bedo cwar nyaka abaka. Ame kare ame ociko mom ru oromo," 
1Samuel18:27 Daudi oya, te wot i jo mere, te wot neko jo Piriciti mia aryo, Daudi te kelo del komgi me co, te wot miyo baŋ abaka kun moro mom orem, me edok cwar nyaka abaka. Caulo te miyo Daudi nyomo nyare Mikal." 
1Samuel18:28 Kare ame Caulo oneno, oniaŋ ni Rwot kara tye i Daudi, dok daŋ ni lwak luŋ me Icrael mare," 
1Samuel18:29 Caulo te medde ameda i lworo Daudi. Mannono te miyo Caulo bedo akwor a Daudi i kare ducu," 
1Samuel18:30 Doŋ kare ducu ka rwode a jo Piriciti obino i lweny i kom jo Icrael, Daudi en ame makogi ame loo omiro a Caulo oko. Mannono te miyo nyiŋ Daudi rwo meicel." 
1Samuel19:1 Caulo te kobo baŋ wode Yonacan karacel kede baŋ omiro mere luŋ ni myero gin onek Daudi oko. Cite Yonacan wot a Caulo onwoŋo rik maro Daudi meicel. 
1Samuel19:2 Yonacan te kobbi Daudi ni, “Pappa Caulo mito neki oko; pi mannono myero igwokere ba odiko myero ipon kakannoro adiŋ." 
1Samuel19:3 An abino wot cuŋ i ŋet pappa i poto kan ame yin itye iye; abino kop kede piri, ka ce abino niaŋ ginnoro, abino titti.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Yonacan te kobo kop aber i kom Daudi baŋ pappere Caulo, kun kobbe ni, “Yin myero kur itim balloro i kom amironi Daudi, pien en mom ru obalo ginnoro baŋi, dok pien gin ame en otio okonyi atek meicel." 
1Samuel19:5 Koŋ inen en ojalo kwo mere te neko dano me Piriciti, omio Rwot okelo loc adwoŋ meicel baŋ jo Icrael luŋ. Yin rik ineno i waŋi, cunyi daŋ te bedo ayom iye. Piŋo kara dok imito timo bal i kom dano ame mom i bal, me neko Daudi aboŋo tere?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Caulo mom te winyo kop a Yonacan, te kwoŋ ni, “Kite acalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, mom abino neke,”" 
1Samuel19:7 Yonacan te lwoŋo Daudi, te titte kopporo luŋ. En te dok kelo Daudi baŋ Caulo, te bedo i nyime kite a yam con." 
1Samuel19:8 Lweny rik dok te cakere, Daudi te wot lweny i jo Piriciti, te neko jo apol meicel i akinagi; ame mannono te miyogi riŋo oko i nyime." 
1Samuel19:9 Cen arac ame oya i baŋ Rwot te dok dwogo i kom Caulo, i kare ame en onwoŋo obedo i ode, kun omako toŋŋere i ciŋe, Daudi onwoŋo tye agoyo naŋa." 
1Samuel19:10 Caulo dok te bedo i tam me cobo Daudi i toŋŋere diyo i kor apama, cite Daudi te ŋeyo gin ame en atamo oko, omio Caulo te cobo kor apama nono. Daudi te riŋo rwenyo oko i nyime."
