1Samuel19:11 I dyeworrono Caulo te cwayo okwena me wot kuro Daudi i ode, me ebin enek oko odiko. Cite Mikal dako a Daudi te titte ni, “Ka ce yin mom igwoko kwo meri dyewor atin-ni, diki obino neki oko.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Mikal te cwayo Daudi i waŋ dirica, Daudi te riŋo rwenyo oko." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikal te kwanyo cal Obaŋa ame opao apaa, te pyelo i wi tanda a Daudi, te keto aten wic me yer dyegi, teno kede wie, ame te wumo oko kede boŋo." 
1Samuel19:14 I kare ame Caulo ocwao kwena me omo Daudi, Mikal te kobbigi ni, “Kome lit.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Caulo dok te cwayo okwena me omo Daudi, kun cikogi ni, “Wot itiŋe wunu kede itanda mere ikele wunu baŋa kan, me aneke oko.”" 
1Samuel19:16 I kare ame okwena obino, gin onwoŋo ni cal ame opao apaa en ame tye i wi tanda kun aten wic me yer dyegi en ame oketo i ka wie," 
1Samuel19:17 Caulo te penyo Mikal ni, “Piŋo kara ibwola kit man, ite weko akwora wot, rwenyo oko?” Mikal te dokki Caulo ni, “En okoba ni, ‘Weka awoti, me kur aneki.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Daudi oriŋo te bwot oko kittono, en owoto baŋ Camwiri i Rama, te titte ginnoro luŋ ame Caulo otimo i kome. Eka en Daudi kede Camwiri ote wot bedo i Nayot." 
1Samuel19:19 Jo te titti Caulo ni, “Daudi tye i Nayot i Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Caulo dok te cwayo kwena me wot omo Daudi, cite gin te neno lwak odwarpiny ame tye arabo kop Obaŋa kun Camwiri en ame onwoŋo tye acalo atelgi, cuny Obaŋa rik te bino daŋ i kom okwena a Caulo, gin daŋ te cako rabo kop Obaŋa acalo odwarpiny." 
1Samuel19:21 Kare ame otitti Caulo kop man, en dok te cwayo okwena ocele; gin daŋ ote cako rabo kop Obaŋa acalo odwarpiny. Caulo dok te cwayo okwena tyeŋ me adekkere; gin daŋ dok te cako rabo kop Obaŋa acalo odwarpiny." 
1Samuel19:22 Icennere, en ikome doŋ te wot, i Rama, te tuno i twon akoŋŋoro atut meicel, ame tye i Ceku, te penyo ni, “Camwiri kede Daudi tye kwene?” Ŋattoro te kobbe ni, “Gin tye i Nayot i Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 En te ya i kuno, te wot naka i Nayot i Rama; cuny Obaŋa daŋ rik te bino i kome, en te cako rabo kop acalo adwarpiny kun woto, naka en otuno kede i Nayot i Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 En daŋ te gonyo boŋo mere oko i kome, te doŋ cako rabo kop Obaŋa acalo adwarpiny i nyim Camwiri, te buto onoro i nino-nono luŋ kede dyewor daŋ. En omio jo okobo ni, “Caulo daŋ tye i akina odwarpiny bo?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Daudi rik te riŋo oko i Nayot i Rama, te bino kobbi Yonacan ni, “An kara atimo gin aŋo? Gin aŋo ce ame aroco iye? Dok gin aŋo ame abalo i nyim pappi, ame omio en mito neka?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonacan te kobbe ni, “Mom gire twero timere. Yin gire mom ibino to. Nen ba, pappa mom timo ginnoro kadi acel a mom oko ba, kadi dwoŋ onyo tidi moro, kara ŋo omio pappa dok omuŋŋa kop man? Mom gire tye amannono.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Daudi te kobbe ni, “Pappi ŋeo aber ni an doŋ ayomoro cunyi oko; mannono omio en tamo ni, ‘Myero Yonacan kur ŋe kop man, naka mio cunye bino waŋ.’ Ento kop me ateni, kite a Rwot tye kwo-ni, dok yin daŋ itye kwo-ni, akina an kede to doŋ odoŋ aduno moro keken.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Yonacan te kobbi Daudi ni, “Ginnoro luŋ ame yin ibino kobba, an abino timo piri.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi te kobbi Yonacan ni, “Nen ba, diki dwe bino por, doŋ bedo i ŋet abaka i dog cam myero kur loa; cite myero koŋ awot apon i bar naka tuno i nino me adekkere otyeno." 
1Samuel20:6 Ka ce pappi openya, yin ibino kobbe ni, ‘Daudi okwaa atek ni myero koŋ ewot i pacogi i Beterekem; pien kare me yalo Obaŋa i mot aŋola ame doggolagi timo mwaka i mwaka bino bedo kuno.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Ka ce en bino gamo ni, ‘Ber gire’, an abino bedo ame cunya okwe; cite ka ineno ni akemo omako, ibino ŋeyo ni en doŋ otyeko moko oko i cunye me timo gin arac." 
1Samuel20:8 Doŋ pi mannono ba, myero itera aber, pien yin doŋ ityeko cikere keda i nyiŋ Rwot. Cite ka ce tye balloro ame ati mo, yin ikomi myero ineka. Kara piŋo omio yin dok itera baŋ pappi?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonacan te kobo ni, “Ginnoro gire mom twero timere i komi! Kono onwoŋo rik an aŋeo ni pappa otyeko moko tammere me timo gin arac i komi, kono rik mom akobbi?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi te kobbi Yonacan ni, “Ŋa ame bino miya aŋeo ka pappi odokki kop agwa?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonacan te kobo ni, “Koŋ ibiye owot i bar kuca.” Gin aryo luŋ ote wot i bar." 
1Samuel20:12 Yonacan te kobbi Daudi ni, “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael myero bed caden! Nen ba, diki i kodi caa-ni onyo i nino me adekkere, ka doŋ atyeko ŋeyo tam a pappa, abino cwayo kop amii iŋeo ka ce tammere tye aber i komi." 
1Samuel20:13 Ento ka aniaŋ ni pappa mito timi rac, ce mom amii iŋeo, mom acwai iwoto i kuc, Rwot myero doŋ otima kittono onyo ame kato mannono oko. Rwot obed kedi kite ame yam obedo i pappa." 
1Samuel20:14 Ka ce pwod akwo, myero inyut mar a Rwot a mom lokere i koma." 
1Samuel20:15 Mar meri kom jo me oda myero kur cot kadi acel, ento obed nakanaka, i kare ame Rwot bino jwero okwor a Daudi oko i lobo," 
1Samuel20:16 myero kur mi nyiŋ Yonacan rweny oko i ot a Daudi.” 
1Samuel20:17 Yonacan te miyo Daudi kwon tyeŋ me aryo i kite ame en omare kede; pien en onwoŋo rik mare atek kite ame en marre kede kene. 
1Samuel20:18 Yonacan te kobbe ni, “Diki dwe apor, pappa bino penyo jo piri, pien kommi bino doŋ nono." 
1Samuel20:19 Aco i nino me adekkere, en bino penyo jo piri atek meicel; yin wot ibed i kabedo ame rik ipono iye i kare ame olaro kop man; wot ibed kuno i ŋet gweŋe ame ocoko karacel ca." 
1Samuel20:20 An abino bayo atero i ŋete kuno tyen adek bala ŋat ame acelo ginnoro. 
1Samuel20:21 I ŋe mannono an abino cwayo atiŋ awobi kun akobbe ni, ‘Wot iyeny atero’, ka ce iwinyo akobbi awobi-nono ni, ‘Neno atero tye i ŋeti tuŋŋi, kwanyi’, yin myero ibin, pien kite a Rwot tye kwo-ni, nwoŋo ginnoro arac mom bino timere i komi." 
1Samuel20:22 Cite ka iwinyo akobo ni, ‘Neno atero tye i nyimi kuca’, yin myero iwot oko, pien nwoŋo Rwot doŋ otyeko cwayi ni iwot tene." 
1Samuel20:23 Aco i kom kop luŋ ame wan doŋ otyeko kobo kedi, Rwot gire tye i akinawa nakanaka.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Daudi rik daŋ te pono i bar, i kare ame dwe doŋ opor oko, abaka obedo i dog cam," 
1Samuel20:25 Abaka obedo i kommere kite ame en onwoŋo bedo kede kare ducu, i kom ame ceggi apama; Yonacan te bedo i nyime, kun Abuneri obedo i ŋet abaka, ento kabedo a Daudi te doŋ nono." 
1Samuel20:26 Caulo gire mom te kobo ginnoro i nino-nono, pien en onwoŋo tye atamo ni, “Ginnoro myero timere i kom Daudi, en gire mom cil, ateteni, en gire mom cil.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Cite i nino me aryo mere, ame en nino ame lubo nino ame dwe opor iye, kabedo a Daudi dok te doŋ nono. Caulo te penyo wode Yonacan ni, “Piŋo kara wot a Yece mom obino i ka cam a woro kede tin?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonacan te gamo ni, “Daudi okwa atek meicel ni myero koŋ ewot turgi i Beterekem." 
1Samuel20:29 En okobo ni, ‘Myero koŋ awoti, pien jo me odwa bino yalo Obaŋa i mot aŋola turwa kuno, doŋ omegona ociko ni myero an daŋ abed tye kuno. Doŋ ka an ayomoro cunyi, myero iyeya awoti, me awot anen omegona.’ Mannono en gin omio en mom obino me bino cam karacel abaka.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Akemo te mako Caulo meicel i kom Yonacan, te kobbe ni, “Yin ibed atin a dako ame wie rac, dako ame ajem. An mom doŋ atyeko ŋeyo ni yin doŋ iyero wot a Yece me kela lewic i komi keni kede i kom totti?" 
1Samuel20:31 Pien ka ce wot a Yece pwod tye kwo i lobo, yin karacel kede locci mom bino moko kadi acel. Pi mannono, yin myero icwal dano wot kele baŋa kan, pien en gire myero to oko.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Yonacan te kobbi pappere Caulo ni, “Ŋo kara ame omio aneke? Gin aŋo ame en otimo?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Caulo te baye kede toŋ kun mito ni ecobe oko; mannono te miyo Yonacan ŋeyo ni pappere doŋ otyeko moko tammere me neko Daudi oko," 
1Samuel20:34 Yonacan te ya oko i dog cam kun okudo twon akemo agwa meicel, en mom te camo cammoro i nino me aryo me dwe-nono, pien pappere omie lewic." 
1Samuel20:35 Orwo mere, Yonacan te wot i bar kan ame onwoŋo en rik ocikere gin kede Daudi iye, kun woto karacel kede atin awobi." 
1Samuel20:36 En te kobbi awo bi mere ni, “Riŋ iwot ikwany atero ame abayoni.” Kare ame awobi oŋweco, en te bayo atero i nyime," 
1Samuel20:37 kare ame awobi otuno kan ame Yonacan onwoŋo obao iye atero, Yonacan olwoŋo awobi te kobbe ni, “Atero gire tye i nyimi kuno.”" 
1Samuel20:38 Yonacan dok te lwoŋo awobi kobbe ni, “Ru wot, buny abunya, kur igal ba.” Awobi a Yonacan te puto atero dwogo kede baŋ adwoŋŋere." 
1Samuel20:39 Cite awobinono mom oŋeo ginnoro kadi acel; Yonacan kede Daudi keken en ame oŋeo kopgi-nono," 
1Samuel20:40 Yonacan te miyo jami mere baŋ awobi, te kobbe ni, “Dwokgi doŋ paco.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Kare ame awobi doŋ owoto oko, Daudi te ru wotte i ŋet gweŋ ame onwoŋo ocoko karacel, te ryebere piny tyen adek; gin te motte kun onoto lemgi kengi kengi, gin luŋ ote mwoco koko oko, tuno ka Daudi doŋ oliŋ kene." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonacan te kobbi Daudi ni, “Wot giri kede kuc, pien wan aryo ducu onwoŋo okwoŋo i nyiŋ Rwot kun okobo ni, ‘Rwot bino bedo i akinawa wan kedi, kede i akina ikwaa kede ikwai nakanka’.” Daudi te ya wot, Yonacan te dok i boma." 
1Samuel21:1 Daudi te wot tuno i Nob, baŋ Akimereki alamdog; Akimereki te bino me jolo Daudi kun kome amyel amyela, eka te penye ni, “Piŋo kara itye keni aboŋo ŋattoro?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi te kobbi Akimeleki alamdog ni, “Tye kop ame abaka ocika iye kun kobba ni, ‘Myero ŋattoro kur ŋe kop ame acwayi iye-ni kede kop ame atyeko ciki iye.’ An atyeko cikere me rwatte kede awobe kannonyo." 
1Samuel21:3 Kara aman ŋo ame tye i ciŋi i caa-ni? Mia ogati abic onyo ginnoro keken ame tye kan.” 
1Samuel21:4 Alamdog te kobbi Daudi ni, “Ogati me nino ducu-ni, mom tye moro ame odoŋ i ciŋa i caa-ni, ogati acil keken en ame tye; ka ce awo benono mom obuto i mon.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi te kobo ni, “Me ateni, mon kare ducu pokere kedwa oko ka ce wan owot kannoro; awobe gwoko komgi bedo acil, kadi bed wan otye i wot me kare ducu; kara mom tin doŋ komgi myero bed acil meicel?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Mannono te miyo alamdog miye ogati acil; pien ogati moro ocele onwoŋo mom tye kuno, kono ka ogati me aketa i nyim Obaŋa keken, en ame didik okwanyo i nyim Rwot, me ote leyo kakare i en alyettere i nino ame okwanyo iye-nono." 
1Samuel21:7 Dano moro onwoŋo tye kuno i nino-nono, ame en dano acel i akina omiro a Caulo, ame cikgi me kwer pwod diye me bedo i nyim Rwot; nyiŋe onwoŋo Doeg, ame en dano me Edom, adwoŋ ame loo okwat a Caulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Daudi dok te kobbi Akimeleki ni, “Toŋŋoro onyo pala moro mom tye baŋi kan? Pien an mom akelo pala romona, naka jami me lwennya luŋ, pien tic abaka onwoŋo mitte me oyot.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Alamdog te kobo ni, “Pala romo a Goliac, ame obedo dano me Piriciti a rik inek i luŋ me Ela ca, tye kan kun oboo kome oko kede bono, oketo i ne epod. En ennu, ka imito tero, teri; pien moro ocele doŋ mom, mannono keken en ame tye baŋa kan.” Daudi dok te kobo ni, “Moro acalli mannono doŋ mom tye; aco mia.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Daudi te ya i nino-nono, te lwi wot oko i baŋ Caulo, te wot baŋ Akic, rwot me Gat." 
1Samuel21:11 Omiro Akic te kobbe ni, “Man mom Daudi ame obedo abaka me lobo-ni? Yam mom owere kun oleo werrere alea, omyelo kede ni, ‘Caulo neko mere jo tutumia, aco Daudi oneko mere jo tutumia apar.’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Daudi rik te kano kopgi-nono i cunye, eka te bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel i kom Akic abaka me Gat." 
1Samuel21:13 Lworo te miye loko kite mere oko i nyimgi, te doko ababaŋ acalo apoa i ciŋgi, te bedo cicio kika me dogcel, kun lao doge tye amol i tike." 
1Samuel21:14 Akic te kobbi omiro mere ni, “Koŋ inen wunu ba, wun ityeko neno wunu ni dano man gire opo oko; kara omio dok ikele wunu baŋa kono?" 
1Samuel21:15 Pien jo opo mom baŋa bo, en omio wun ikelo wunu man ni bin nyut apoa mere i nyima? En dano-ni daŋ bino donyo naka i oda?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Daudi te ya oko i kuno, te lwi wot i gorogoro me Abullam. Kare ame omego mere kede jo luŋ me ot a pappere owinyo, gin owoto baŋe kuno," 
1Samuel22:2 karacel kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik can orido, jo ame onwoŋo tye kede bannyi, kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik tye kede cwercuny, gin luŋ ocokere baŋe; en te doko atel wigi. Co ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe buco romo mia aŋwen." 
1Samuel22:3 Daudi te ya i kuno wot i Mijipe me Moab. En te wot kobbi abaka me Moab ni, “Tim ber iye pappa kede totta bed baŋi tuno ka abino ŋeyo ŋo ame Obaŋa bino timo pira.”" 
1Samuel22:4 En te weko pappere kede tottere baŋ abaka me Moab, gin rik te bedo baŋe pi kare luŋ ame Daudi obedo i ka-pono mere i akina kiddi." 
1Samuel22:5 Adwarpiny Gad rik te kobbi Daudi ni, “Kur ibed kan ame ipono iye-nono, ya oko me iwot i lobo me Juda.” Mannono te miyo Daudi wot i buŋ me Keret." 
1Samuel22:6 I kare-nono Caulo te winyo ni onwoŋo Daudi karacel kede jo ame tye baŋe. Caulo onwoŋo tye obedo i te yat Gibea, i kabedo ame otiŋere malo, kun omako toŋŋere i ciŋe, kun omiro mere luŋ tye ocuŋ i laŋete." 
1Samuel22:7 Caulo te kobbi omiro mere ame onwoŋo tye Ocuŋ i laŋete-nono ni, “Wun jo me Benjamin, koŋ iwiny wunu ba koppa, wun itamo wunu ni wot a Yece bino miyo ŋat acel acel i akinawu potti kede poto olok? En bino miyo wun luŋ idoko wunu otel a jo tutumia kede otel a jo mia," 
1Samuel22:8 en omio wun luŋ iporo wunu kop i komani? Mom tye ŋattoro i akinawu ame otucca ni woda otyeko cikere kede wot a Yece. Dok mom daŋ tye ŋattoro i akinawu ame cunye waŋ pira, onyo ame otucca ni woda otyeko tugo omirona me timo ginnoro arac i koma, ni myero gin liba, kite ame tye ka timere kede i kare-ni.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Eka Doeg, dano me Edom ame onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i ŋet omiro mere, te dokke iye ni, “An rik aneno wot a Yece ka bino i Nob, baŋ Akimeleki wot Akitub," 
1Samuel22:10 Akimeleki rik te penyo Rwot pire, te miye cam, dok te miye daŋ pala romo a Goliac, ame obedo dano me Piriciti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Abaka rik te cwayo dano wot lwoŋo Akimeleki, alamdog, wot Akitub karacel kede jo me ot a pappere luŋ, ame gin olamdog me Nob. Gin luŋ rik daŋ ote bino baŋ Caulo." 
1Samuel22:12 Caulo te kobo ni, “Yin wot Akitub, koŋ iwiny ba.” Akimeleki te gamo ni, “An ene, adwoŋŋa.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Caulo te penye ni, “Piŋo kara iporo wunu kop i koma, yin karacel kede wot a Yece, eka ite miye daŋ cam kede pala me romo, ite daŋ penyo-gu Rwot pire, ame omio en doŋ obino me lweny i koma, tye ka liba, kite ame tye ka timere kede i kare-ni?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Akimeleki te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, ŋa kara i akina omironi ame agen calo Daudi, cwar nyaka abaka, dok atel wi jo me gwoko kwoni, ame en dano me awora i odi?" 
1Samuel22:15 Man tin tyen me agege an me penyo Obaŋa pire bo? Pe gire amannono Abaka myero kur bed i tammoro iye i koma onyo i kom jo luŋ me ot a pappa; pien an gira mom aŋeo kopporo kadi acel i kom kop man,”" 
1Samuel22:16 Abaka te kobo ni, “Ateteni, yin Akimeleki ibino to, karacel kede jo me ot a pappi luŋ.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Abaka te ciko jo ame gwoke, ame onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i laŋete ni, “Lokere inek wunu olamdog a Rwot oko; pien gin oribere i Daudi. Gin onwoŋo ŋeo ni Daudi doŋ olwi oko, cite gin mom otucca.” Ento omiro abaka mom te ryeyo ciŋgi me neko olamdog a Rwot." 
1Samuel22:18 Caulo te kobbi Doeg ni, “Yin lokere i kom olamdog inekgi oko.” Doeg ame obedo dano me Edom, te lokere i kom olamdog, nekogi oko; ka ame Caulo oneko i nino-nono oromo pyeraboro wie abic, ame gin luŋ onwoŋo oruko epod me camanini." 
1Samuel22:19 Boma olamdog ame onwoŋo tye i Nob, en te neko jo iye luŋ i pala lweny; co kede mon, jo atino kede en a pwod dottege, twoni, kane, kede romi, onekogi luŋ i pala lweny." 
1Samuel22:20 Ento dano acel i akina awobe Akimeleki wot Akitub, ame nyiŋe Abiatar, rik te lwi lubo yo Daudi," 
1Samuel22:21 En te wot kobbi Daudi ni, “Caulo otyeko neko olamdog a Rwot oko.”" 
1Samuel22:22 Daudi te kobbi Abiatar ni, “An rik onwoŋo aŋeo oko i i nino-naca, i kare ame aneno Doeg ame obedo dano me Edom tye kuno, aniaŋ oko ni bino titti Caulo. An en ame akelo to man i kom jo me doggola a kwarowu," 
1Samuel22:23 Doŋ yin myero ibed keda kan, kur ilwor; pien ŋat ame mito neka nwoŋo daŋ mito neki; ka ibedo baŋa kan ibino bedo aber.”" 
1Samuel23:1 I kare-nono rik ote kelo kop baŋ Daudi ni, “Neno jo Piriciti tye alweny i kom jo Keila, gin otye oyako kal i laro.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Daudi te penyo Rwot ni, “Awot alweny i kom jo Piriciti?” Rwot te kobbi Daudi ni, “Wot ilweny i kom jo Piriciti, ilar jo Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Ento jo a Daudi te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, wan otye kede lworo i Juda kan; mom twero bedo rac meicel ka owoto me wot lweny i kom jo Piriciti i Keila?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Daudi dok te medo penyo Rwot tyen me aryo. Rwot te kobbe ni, “Ya iwot naka i Keila, pien abino miyo jo Piriciti i Ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Daudi kede jo mere te wot i Keila. Gin te wot lweny i jo Piriciti, ote neko jo meicel, ote mayo dokgi dwogo kede. Daudi rik te laro jo ame bedo i Keila kittono." 
1Samuel23:6 I kare ame Abiatar wot Akimeleki oriŋo baŋ Daudi i Keila, en obino kede epod i ciŋe," 
1Samuel23:7 Kare ame Caulo owinyo ni Daudi tye i Keila, en okobo ni, “Obaŋa doŋ omie i ciŋa; pien en doŋ odonyo i boma ame tye kede aceg doge atek karacel kede arii mere kun daŋ ocelo oko atek.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Caulo te lwoŋo jo luŋ me lweny, me wot i Keila, owot ogur Daudi oko karacel kede jo mere." 
1Samuel23:9 Daudi onwoŋo ŋeo ni Caulo tye ka piro kop arac i kome, omio en te kobo baŋ Abiatar alamdog ni, “Kel epod baŋa kan.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Daudi te cako kwayo Obaŋa ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, an atyeko winyo ni Caulo doŋ otyeko moko tammere me bino i Keila, me bino tyeko boma man oko pira." 
1Samuel23:11 Jo me Keila bino miya i ciŋe? Caulo tye abino kan ateni kite ame awinyo kede nie? Ama Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, tim ber imia aŋe.” Rwot te kobbi Daudi ni, “En tye abino ateni?”" 
1Samuel23:12 Daudi dok te penyo ni, “Jo me Keila bino miya i ciŋ Caulo karacel kede jona?” Rwot te gamo dog Daudi ni, “Gin bino miyi baŋe.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Man te miyo Daudi ya oko i Keila karacel kede jo mere ame buco romo mia abicel. Gin te wot kan ame oromo wot iye. Ote kobbi Caulo ni Daudi otyeko lwi oko i Keila, omio Caulo mom dok te wot kuno," 
1Samuel23:14 Daudi te bedo pono i akina kiddi i kabedo apapat i tim, i lobo ame obedo kidikidi, i tim me Jip. Caulo te bedo yenye nino ducu, cite Obaŋa mom te miye i ciŋe." 
1Samuel23:15 Daudi onwoŋo pwod tye kede lworo, pien Caulo doŋ obino oko me neke. I kare-nono Daudi onwoŋo tye i tim i Korec, i tim me Jip." 
1Samuel23:16 Yonacan wot a Caulo te ya wot baŋ Daudi Korec, te wot jiŋo cunye i nyiŋ Obaŋa." 
1Samuel23:17 Yonacan okobbe ni, “Kur ilwor, pien ciŋ pappa Caulo mom gire bino gudi. Yin ibino bedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael, an abino lubi; pappa Caulo doŋ ŋeo kop man.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Gin aryo luŋ ote dok cikere i nyim Rwot. Daudi te doŋ gire i Korec, Yonacan te dok paco." 
1Samuel23:19 Jo me Jip rik te wot baŋ Caulo i Gibea, ote kobbe ni, “Daudi gire tye pono iyi akina kiddi mogo ame tye i Korec, i wi kidi me Keila, ame tye i ŋet Yecimon tutuŋ anyarolum." 
1Samuel23:20 Kite ame itye kede mit me bino kuno-ni, cob mitti-nono, adwoŋ. Wan obino miyo Daudi ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Caulo te kobo ni, “Rwot myero miwu winyo, pien kica omakowu i koma." 
1Samuel23:22 Wot wunu, koŋ dok imed niaŋ wunu iye odoco. Wot iŋe wunu ka pono mere, dok daŋ inen wunu, kede ŋat ame onene kuno; pien otyeko kobba ni en ryek meicel." 
1Samuel23:23 Doŋ pi mannono ba, wot ikie wunu, inen wunu ka-pono mere luŋ ame en pono iye, ite doŋ dwogo wunu baŋa i kop luŋ me ateni. An doŋ ate bino wot karacel kedwu; ka ce en onwoŋo tye i lobo-nono, abino yenye i kabedo luŋ i akina atekere luŋ ame tye i Juda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Gin te ya wot i Jip kun otelo nyim Caulo. I kare-nono Daudi kede jo mere onwoŋo tye i tim me Maon, i luŋŋoro otwo, i ŋet Yecimon tutuŋ anyarolum." 
1Samuel23:25 Caulo kede jo mere te wot me wot yenye. Daudi te winyo oko, en te wot oko piny i kidi, i tim me Maon. Kare ame Caulo owinyo, oryemo yo Daudi, tim me Maon." 
1Samuel23:26 Caulo te manno ŋet kidi tuncel, kun Daudi kede jo mere manno ŋet kidi-nono i tuŋ ocele. Daudi onwoŋo tye acunyo wot oyotoyot me erweny gire oko i baŋ Caulo. I kare ame Caulo kede jo mere onwoŋo tye aguro Daudi kede jo mere me emakgi," 
1Samuel23:27 dano moro te bino baŋ Caulo, te kobbe ni, “Ru bino oyot, pien jo Piriciti doŋ tye ocako yako lobowa oko.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Caulo te dok oko cen i ryemo yo Daudi, te wot lweny i kom jo Piriciti; mannono te miyo jo cako nyiŋ kabedonono ni, kidi me pokere." 
1Samuel23:29 Daudi te doŋ ya oko i kuno, te wot pono i kidi me En-gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Kare ame Caulo doŋ odwogo oko i ryemo yo jo Piriciti, otitte ni, “Daudi tye i tim me En-gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Caulo te yero jo tutumia adek i akina jo me Icrael luŋ, te wot kedgi me wot yenyo Daudi karacel kede jo mere i nyim Kidi me dyegi tim." 
1Samuel24:3 Caulo rik te tuno kan ame onwoŋo tye iye gorogoro kun anok rommi tye i ŋet yo. En te wot donyo i gorogoro-nono me wot konyere kun Daudi karacel kede jo mere daŋ onwoŋo tye i tyelo iyie kuno. 
1Samuel24:4 Jo a Daudi te kobbi Daudi ni, “Tin en nino ame rik Rwot okobo pire baŋi ni, ‘Nen ba, abino miyo akworri i ciŋi, ibino time kite ame yin ineno ni ber baŋi.’ ” Daudi te ya malo, te libere wot ŋolo lak jor a Caulo." 
1Samuel24:5 Icennere cuny Daudi te cwer atek pi ŋolo lak jor a Caulo. 
1Samuel24:6 Daudi te ko bo baŋ jo mere ni, “Rwot mom ye ni atim kodi tim man i kom adwoŋŋa, ame Rwot oyero me bedo abaka, me ryeyo ciŋa i kome, kun en obedo ŋat a Rwot oyero.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Daudi te juko jo mere kun kobbigi kittono, mom te yegi cako lweny i kom Caulo. Caulo te ya i gorogoro, te wot gire oko." 
1Samuel24:8 I ŋe ennono, Daudi daŋ te ya i gorogoro, kato oko, te lwoŋo Caulo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, abaka wee!” Kare ame Caulo obolo waŋe i ŋee, Daudi oryebere piny, owore." 
1Samuel24:9 Daudi te kobbi Caulo ni, “Piŋo kara ibedo winyo kop a jo ame kobo ni, ‘Neno Daudi yenyi me timi rac?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Tin doŋ yin ineno kite ame Rwot onwoŋo omii kede i ciŋa i gorogoro; jo mogo okobo ni aneki oko, cite an ate weki mom aneki. An akobo ni, ‘An gira mom abino ryeyo ciŋa i kom adwoŋŋa, pien en obedo dano ame Rwot oyero.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Koŋ inen ba, pappa, nen lak jori i ciŋa. Kite ame aŋolo kede lak jori, cite mom ate neki, myero doŋ iŋe dok daŋ inen ni an mom atye kede tammoro arac i komi i cunya. An gira mom abalo ginnoro baŋi, kadi bed yin imito neka." 
1Samuel24:12 Rwot myero ŋol kop i kin an kede yin, Rwot myero ocul kwora i komi, cite an gira ciŋa mom bino gudo komi." 
1Samuel24:13 Kite acalo carakop a jo acon kobo kede ni, ‘Gin arac ya i baŋ jo areco’; cite an gira ciŋa mom bino gudo komi." 
1Samuel24:14 Kara abaka me Icrael tye ayenyo ŋa ba? Kara iryemo yo ŋa? Iryemo yo gwok oto bo onyo me a kiridep? 
1Samuel24:15 Pi mannono, Rwot myero ŋol kop i kin an kede yin, onen, opid pira, olara i ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Kare ame Daudi doŋ otyeko kobo kop magi luŋ baŋ Caulo, Caulo ogamo ni, “Man dwoni ene, woda Daudi?” Caulo te mwoco koko oko." 
1Samuel24:17 Eka te kobbi Daudi ni, “Yin kiteni atira kata oko; nen yin idwoko aber baŋa, aco kun an adwoko arac baŋi." 
1Samuel24:18 Tin yin doŋ inyuto kannaler kite ame ibedo tima kede ber kun mom ineka i kare ame Rwot omia kede i ciŋi. 
1Samuel24:19 Pien dano ka onwoŋo akworrere, twero weko en woto aboŋo timo ginnoro i kome ateni? Pi mannono, Rwot myero gire oculli kede gin aber, pi gin ame itimo i koma tin." 
1Samuel24:20 Aman doŋ aniaŋ ni yin ibino bedo abaka, dok loc a jo Icrael bino moko atek i kare me locci." 
1Samuel24:21 Doŋ pi mannono ba, yin myero ikwoŋ baŋa i nyiŋ Rwot ni mom ibino tyeko ikwaena ame bino luba, dok daŋ ni mom ibino jwayo nyiŋa oko i ot a pappa.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Daudi daŋ rik te kwoŋ kittono daŋ Caulo. Caulo doŋ te lokere dok paco, Daudi kede jo mere te dok gigi i ka-ponogi i kidi." 
1Samuel25:1 Camwiri rik te to oko, jo Icrael luŋ te cokere kumo pire, ote yike i ode i Rama. Daudi dok te ya wot i tim me Paran." 
1Samuel25:2 Lo moro rik onwoŋo tye i Maon kuno, ame onwoŋo tye kede ticcere i Karmel. Dano-nono onwoŋo rik olony atek; onwoŋo tye kede rommi tutumia adek kede dyegi tutumia acel. En rik bedo mworo yer rommi mere i Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Nyiŋ dano-nono rik Nabal, eka nyiŋ cege te bedo Abigail. Dako mere-nono rik ryek atek, dok daŋ mwonya meicel, aco cware onwoŋo ger, kun kwo mere daŋ rac; en onwoŋo obedo dano me doggola a jo Kaleb." 
1Samuel25:4 Daudi rik te winyo ni Nabal tye amworo yer rommi mere. 
1Samuel25:5 Daudi te cwayo awobe apar baŋe kun cikogi ni, “Wot wunu i Karmel, iwot wunu baŋ Nabal, iwot ikobbe wunu ni, an amote." 
1Samuel25:6 Ibino moto wunu dyera-nono ni, ‘Kuc obed i komi dyera, kuc obed i kom odi, kuc obed i kom joni luŋ." 
1Samuel25:7 Awinyo ni itye kede jo ame mworo yer rommi. I kare-ni okwatti yam onwoŋo tye baŋwa, wan giwa mom otimo ginnnoro arac i komgi, ginnoro daŋ mom oremogi i kare luŋ ame gin obedo i Karmel." 
1Samuel25:8 Yin koŋ ipeny awobeni, gin bino titti. Doŋ pi mannono ba, awobena myero nwoŋ winyo i nyimi, pien gin obino i nino me ecuban. Tim ber imi gin ame it ye kede baŋ omironi kede baŋ atinni Daudi’.”" 
1Samuel25:9 I kare ame awobe a Daudi otuno kuno, gin okobo kop magi luŋ baŋ Nabal i nyiŋ Daudi, gin te liŋ kuro koppere." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabal te kobbi omiro a Daudi ni, “Daudi kara en ŋannono ba? Wot a Yece kono obedo ŋannono? I kare man tye omiro apol meicel ame tye ka ya tetek i baŋ odonegi," 
1Samuel25:11 Myero en akwany ogati kede pii kede riŋo ame aneko pi omwor yer rommina, eka ate miyo baŋ jo ame mom aŋeo kan ame gin oya iye?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Awobe a Daudi te lokere dok oko cen, ote wot titti Daudi kop man ducu." 
1Samuel25:13 Daudi te kobbi jo mere ni, “Ŋat acel acel omyero twe pala mere i pyere.” Daudi daŋ te tweyo pala mere i pyere, eka jo ame romo mia aŋwen te lubo yo Daudi kun jo mia aryo doŋ kuro jamigi." 
1Samuel25:14 Ento ŋat acel i akina awobe okobbi Abigail dako a Nabal ni, “Nen ba, Daudi onwoŋo ooro okwena i tim me bino moto adwoŋwa, ento en te da i wigi." 
1Samuel25:15 Aco jo-naca rik otimowa ber meicel, omio wan mom obedo kede peko moro, ginnoro daŋ rik mom orwenyo i baŋwa, i kare ame onwoŋo wan otye i bar, i kare luŋ ame wan obedo wot kedgi." 
1Samuel25:16 Gin rik obedo celwa dyewor kede dyeceŋ, i kare luŋ ame wan obedo kedgi kun okwao rommi." 
1Samuel25:17 Doŋ pi mannono ba, yin myero iŋe kop man, itam gin a myero i tim iye, pien Daudi doŋ omoko tammere me timo gin arac i kom adwoŋwa kede i kom jo me ode luŋ, pien en kwo mere mom ber, ame dano moro mom twero kop kede.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Abigail te ru kwanyo ogati mia aryo kede opoko koŋo olok aryo, kede riŋo rommi abic ame doŋ otedo oko, kede bel ame ocelo ame romo dita abic, kede etak olok otwo ame romo mia acel kede aŋina oduro ame romo mia aryo, te cano jami-nono luŋ i wi kane," 
1Samuel25:19 Abigail te kobbi awobe mere ni, “Wun tel wunu yo, an abino lubowu icen.” Cite en mom okobbi cware Nabal." 
1Samuel25:20 I kare ame en oyito i wi i kana mere te wot, en otuno kaa ame yo ogogona iye kun beo i te kidi. Daudi daŋ onwoŋo tye abino i nyime kede jo mere; Abigail te rwatte kedgi." 
1Samuel25:21 Daudi te kobo ni, “Ateni, an kom ate gwoko jami a dano mannono i tim, kun daŋ moro i akinagi mom orwenyo, cite en te culla i rac pi gin aber." 
1Samuel25:22 Obaŋa myero otima kittono onyo akato mannono oko, ka ce diki odiko aweko ico moro acel odoŋ i kom jo luŋ ame tye baŋe.”" 
1Samuel25:23 A doŋ Abigail oneno Daudi, en te ru pye oko piny i wi kana mere, te ryebere piny i nyim Daudi kun kulo wie piny." 
1Samuel25:24 Oryebere piny i ka tyene, te kobo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, wek bal man obed i wia an kena; tim ber iye aŋecani kob kedi kun iwinyo koppere." 
1Samuel25:25 Adwoŋŋa, myero cunyi kur bed i parroro i kom Nabal ame obedo dano ame kwo mere mom ber ca; pien kite ame nyiŋe tye kede, en daŋ tye amannono. Nyiŋe Nabal, miŋo doŋ buto baŋe. An rik mom aneno awobe ame yin icwalo." 
1Samuel25:26 Doŋ ba, adwoŋŋa, kite a Rwot tye kede kwo-ni, dok yin daŋ itye kwo-ni, kite acalo ineno ni Rwot ogeni me mom bedo kede roccoro me onyo remo, iwek culo kworri i ciŋi yin ikomi; myero okworri kede jo luŋ ame mito timo gin arac i komi obed calo Nabal." 
1Samuel25:27 Aman doŋ myero igam mot ame an aŋecani akeli, me wek mi baŋ awo beni." 
1Samuel25:28 Tim ber itima kica i kom balla, pien Rwot bino miyi ot atek ateteni, pien yin it ye ka romo i lweny a Rwot; balloro gire mom obino nwoŋo i komi i kare me kwoni luŋ." 
1Samuel25:29 Ka ce jo obino me lubo yori kun omito neki, kwoni gire obino kano oko karacel i kwo a jo akwo kun Rwot Obaŋani en agwoko; aco kwo okworri, Obaŋa bino bayo oko kannabor kite ame obao kede atindio." 
1Samuel25:30 Ka Rwot otyeko timo ginnoro luŋ aber i komi kite ame en rik okobo i komi dok daŋ doŋ otyeko keti me bedo aloc ame loo jo Icrael," 
1Samuel25:31 mom dok tye ginnoro ame bino kelli cwercuny, akadi peko me tam arac me onyo remo aboŋo te kop onyo culo kworri yin i komi. Adwoŋŋa, ka Rwot doŋ otyeko timi ber, myero ipo pira.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Daudi te gamo dog Abigail ni, “Myero pwo Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael ame ocwali me rwatte keda tin." 
1Samuel25:33 Myero pwo Rwot pi ryekoni, gum obed i komi, pien tin yin igwoka me kur abed kede roccoro me onyo remo kede culo kwor an i koma kun aculo kwor an i koma." 
1Samuel25:34 Ateteni, kite acalo Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael tye kwo-ni, ame ogena timo gin arac, ame kono onwoŋo yin mom iru yutte bino rwatte keda, kono diki odiko ico moro acel keken mom odoŋ baŋ Nabal.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Daudi doŋ te gamo jami ame onwoŋo Abigail okelo baŋe, eka te kobbe ni, “Wot giri tuŋi kede kuc; nen ba, an doŋ atyeko winyo koppi, aye kwacci.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigail te bino baŋ Nabal; nen ba, Nabal onwoŋo tye acamo arama i ode, arama ame calo me abaka. Cuny Nabal onwoŋo yom meicel, pien onwoŋo omer atek; mannono te miyo Abigail mom te kobbe ginnoro tuno naka odiko." 
1Samuel25:37 Odiko ame koŋo doŋ oket oko i wi Nabal, dako mere te doŋ titte koppono luŋ, cuny ico te to inoŋ, te doko acalo kidi." 
1Samuel25:38 I ŋe nino apar, Rwot te goyo Nabal neko oko." 
1Samuel25:39 Kare ame Daudi owinyo ni Nabal doŋ otyeko to oko, en okobo ni, “Rwot myero pwo pi culo waŋ apala ame Nabal opala kede, dok daŋ ogena me mom timo balloro. Rwot doŋ odwoko gin arac ame Nabal otimo i wie kene. Daudi te cwayo okwena me wot yamo Abigail, me dok dako mere.”" 
1Samuel25:40 Kare ame omiro a Daudi obino i Karmel baŋ Abigail, gin okobbe ni, “Daudi oorowa baŋi, ni myero oteri baŋe, me iwot ibed dako mere.”" 
1Samuel25:41 En oya malo te ryebere piny, te kobo ni, “Nen ba, an aŋecani, an alwok tyen omiro adwoŋŋa ducu.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abigail te ru ya oko, te yito i wi kana mere cako wot kun aŋeca mere abic daŋ woto karacel kede; en te lubo yo okwena a Daudi, te doko dako a Daudi." 
1Samuel25:43 Daudi te nyomo daŋ Akinoam me Jejreel, gin aryo luŋ ote doko monne." 
1Samuel25:44 Caulo onwoŋo doŋ otyeko miyo nyare Mikal baŋ Paloti wot a Laic, dano me Galliam; nyare ame rik koŋ obedo dako a Daudi." 
1Samuel26:1 Jo me Jip rik te bino baŋ Caulo, ote kobbe ni, “Daudi tye opono i wi kidi me Kakila, ame tye i ŋet Yecimon tutuŋ kide.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Mannono te miyo Caulo ya wot i tim me Jip karacel kede jo me Icrael ame oyero tutumia adek, me wot yenyo Daudi." 
1Samuel26:3 Caulo rik te wot guro gonnyere i wi kidi me Kakila ame tye i ŋet yo tuŋ kide me Yecimon; ento Daudi gire te medde i bedo mere i tim," 
1Samuel26:4 Daudi te cwayo orot, gin te niaŋ ni Caulo onwoŋo obino ateni." 
1Samuel26:5 Daudi te ya bino kan ame Caulo oguro iye gonnyere, te neno kan ame Caulo onwoŋo obuto iye gin kede Abuneri wot a Neri, ame rik en atel mony a Caulo, Caulo onwoŋo rik tye obuto i dye gony kan ame ogeno, kun mony obuto ogure dyere." 
1Samuel26:6 Daudi te penyo Akimereki dano me Kitti karacel kede Abicai ame obedo omin a Joab, wot a Jerua ni, “Ŋa ame bino wot keda naka i gony a Caulo?” Abicai te dok iye ni, “An abino wot kedi kuno.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Daudi te wot baŋ mony kuno dyewor gin kede Abicai. En te nwoŋo Caulo tye obuto onino oko i kabuto mere kun toŋŋere tye ogure piny tuŋ wie. Abuneri kede lwak onwoŋo tye obuto ogure dyere. 
1Samuel26:8 Abicai te kobbi Daudi ni, “Tiŋ doŋ Obaŋa omio akworri oko i ciŋi; wek doŋ atuce i toŋ pelo naka i lobo tyen acel keken, mom dok abino nwoyo me aryo mere.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Ento Daudi te kobbi Abicai ni, “Kur ineke; pien ŋa kara ame twero ryeyo ciŋe me gudo ŋat ame Rwot oyero, eka balloro mom te bedo i kome?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Daudi te kobo ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kede kwo-ni, Rwot gire en ame bino goye, onyo nino mere me to bino tuno, onyo en bino wot ilweny, te wot to iye." 
1Samuel26:11 Rwot mom ye ni ciŋa myero gud ŋat a Rwot oyero; ento yin myero iput toŋ ame tye tuŋ wie-nu, kwany daŋ opoko pii mere, me wan owot giwa.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Daudi te tero toŋ kede opoko pii ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ wi Caulo, gin te wot gigi oko. Mom tye ŋattoro ame onenogi, akadi ŋeyo, ŋattoro daŋ mom omedo i co i waŋ nino; gin luŋ onwoŋo onino oko, pien Rwot onwoŋo omiogi onino atek meicel." 
1Samuel26:13 Daudi rik te wot naka loka tuŋ ca, te wot nyedde tene i wi kidi, kun akinagi olagoro atek ateka." 
1Samuel26:14 Daudi te redo kun lwoŋo mony kede Abuneri wot a Neri kun kobo ni, “Abuneri, yin mom igamo doga bo?” Abuneri te gamo ni, “Yin iŋa ame ilwoŋo abaka-ni?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Daudi te kobbi Abuneri ni, “Yin mom itwon ico? Ŋa kara dok ame rom kedi iyi Icrael? Kara ŋo ame dok ogeŋi gwoko adwoŋŋi abaka? Pien dano moro obino naka baŋwu kuno me neko abaka, ame obedo adwoŋŋi-nono." 
1Samuel26:16 Kodi tim ame itimo-nono mom ber. Kite a Rwot tye kede kwe-ni, wun luŋ iporre wunu to oko, pien mom igwoko wunu adwoŋwu, ame Rwot oyero. Aco aman koŋ inen kan ame toŋ abaka kede opoko pii mere tye iye, ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ wie.”" 
1Samuel26:17 Caulo te niaŋ i dwon Daudi oko, te kobo ni, “Man dwoni ene, woda Daudi?” Daudi te dok iye ni, “Dwona ennono adwoŋŋa.”" 
1Samuel26:18 En te kobo ni, “Piŋo kara adwoŋŋa tye ka ryemo yora? Ŋo ce ame atimo ba? Ciŋa kara otimo bal aŋo?" 
1Samuel26:19 Aman doŋ ba, adwoŋŋa, myero iwiny koppa an amironi. Ka ce Rwot en ame otugo cuny me lweny i koma, myero doŋ eye gamo mot; aco ka ce jo en otimo, myero cen makgi oko i nyim Rwot, pien gin i kare man otyeko ryema oko ni an kur anwoŋ ginnoro i kom gin a Rwot poko, kun okobo ni, ‘Wot iwor obaŋe mo go ocele." 
1Samuel26:20 Aman doŋ remona myero kur ony piny teŋe kannabor i Rwot; pien abaka me Icrael obino me neka calo ŋat ame dwaro atakara i wi kidi.’ ” 
1Samuel26:21 Caulo te kobo ni, “An doŋ atimo bal, dwog doŋ, ama woda Daudi, pien mom dok abino timo ginnoro arac i komi, pien tin yin imio kwona obedo ginnoro me wel i nyimi; nen ba, an atimo tim me mino, arwenyo meicel.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Daudi te gamo ni “Toŋŋi ene, ama abaka! Mi ŋattoro acel i akina awobeni bin om." 
1Samuel26:23 Rwot gire culo ŋat acel acel kun lubo kite mere atira ame genne; pien Rwot onwoŋo doŋ tin omii oko i ciŋa, cite an mom aye ryeyo ciŋa i kom ŋat a Rwot oyero." 
1Samuel26:24 Nen ba, kite acalo kwoni obedo ginnoro me wei i nyima tin kwona myero daŋ bed me wei kittono i nyim Rwot, myero en lara i kom cannoro ducu.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Caulo dok te gamo dog Daudi ni, “Gum obed i komi, woda Daudi! Yin ibino tiyo jami apol kun daŋ icobogi kakare.” Daudi doŋ te wot oko, Caulo te lokere dok i kabedo mere." 
1Samuel27:1 Daudi okobo i cunye ni, “Waŋŋoro ol apoto i ciŋ Caulo te neka oko; mom tye ginnoro ocele aber ame myero atim ame kato lwi wot bedo i lobo a jo Piriciti, me cuny Caulo doŋ ya oko i koma, kur dok medde yenya i lobo me Icrael, mannono bino miyo abwot i ciŋe.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Daudi te ya oko, te wot ŋolo waŋ lobo, en karacel kede jo mere mia abicel ame onwoŋo tye baŋe, gin te wot baŋ Akic wot a Maok, Rwot me Gat." 
1Samuel27:3 Daudi karacel kede jo mere te bedo baŋ Akic i Gat, kun ŋat acel acel bedo i jo me ode; Daudi onwoŋo tye kede monne aryo, Akinoam me Jejreel, kede Abigail me Karmel, ame obedo dako a lyel Nabal." 
1Samuel27:4 Kare ame otitti Caulo ni Daudi doŋ oriŋo oko i Gat, en mom dok omedde yenye." 
1Samuel27:5 Daudi te kobbi Akic ni, “Ka ce ineno ni ayomoro cunyi, tim ber imia kannoro, i boma moro acel ame tye i loboni, me abed iye. Piŋo kara an amironi dok abedo i boma ame yin ibedo iye?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Mannono rik te miyo Akic miye Jiklag i nino-nono. Mannono omio cakere i kare-naca tuno i kare-ni Jiklag tye i ciŋ abaka me Juda. 
1Samuel27:7 Daudi rik te bedo i lobo a jo Piriciti pi kare ame romo mwaka acel kede dwete aŋwen. 
1Samuel27:8 I kare-nono Daudi kede jo mere te wot yako lobo a jo Gecur, jo Giriji kede me a jo Amalek, pien jo-ni en onwoŋo obedo wegi lobo-naca cakere con. Gin te wot tuno naka i Cur i waŋ lobo me Miciri." 
1Samuel27:9 Daudi te neko jo me lobo-nono oko kun mom weko moro akwo, akadi ico onyo dako. En te tero rommi, twoni, kane, inaga kede ruk apol, te dok kede baŋ Akic." 
1Samuel27:10 Kare ducu ka Akic openye ni, “Man jo mene ame iyako tin-ni?” Daudi gamo ni, “Ayako jo Negeb me Juda,” onyo ni, “Ayako Negeb ame obedo me a jo Jerameel,” onyo ni, “Ayako Negeb ame obedo me a jo Ken.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Daudi mom te weko lo moro onyo dako moro akwo i Gat, pien onwoŋo otamo ni, “Naka mio gin bino kobo kop i komwa, kun okobo ni, ‘Daudi otimo kit man.’ ” Mannono doŋ onwoŋo odoko kite pi kare luŋ ame en obedo kede i lobo a jo Piriciti," 
1Samuel27:12 Akic te bedo geno Daudi kun tamo ni, “En doŋ omio jo turgi dage atek, mannono bino miyo en doŋ bedo amirona nakanaka.”" 
1Samuel28:1 I kare-nono jo Piriciti te coko monygi me wot lweny i kom jo Icrael. Akic te kobbi Daudi ni, “Myero iŋe ni yin karacel kede joni luŋ ibino wot karacel keda i mony.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi te kobbi Akic ni, “Ber atek, yin ibino ŋeyo gin ame an amironi twero tiyo.” Akic dok te kobbi Daudi ni, “Ber atek, yin ibino bedo agwok kwona pi kare me kwoni luŋ.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Camwiri onwoŋo doŋ oto oko, jo Icrael luŋ te kumo pire, ote yike i Rama, ame obedo paco mere. Caulo onwoŋo doŋ otyeko ryemo ajoka luŋ i lobo mere." 
1Samuel28:4 Jo Piriciti rik te cokere bino guro gonygi i Cunem; Caulo daŋ te coko jo Icrael luŋ, ote wot guro gonygi i Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Kare ame Caulo oneno mony a jo Piriciti, lworo te make oko, cunye te cako myel atek ateka." 
1Samuel28:6 Kare ame Caulo openyo Rwot, Rwot mom odokke ginnoro, akadi i lek, onyo kede i Urim, onyo kede kop odwarpiny." 
1Samuel28:7 Caulo te kobbi omiro mere ni, “Yenya wunu dako moro ame obedo ajoka, me awot baŋe, awot kon apenye.” Omiro mere te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, ajoka moro tye i En-dor.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Caulo te wot ruko boŋo mere apat, te wot kede jo mere aryo, kun doŋ olokere apat, Gin te tuno baŋ dako-naca dyewor. Caulo te kobbe ni, “Mi koŋ tiponi lwoŋa ŋat ame abino tucci nyiŋe.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Dako-nono te kobbe ni, “Yin iniaŋ aber gin ame Caulo otimo, kite ame en oryemo kede kit ajoka luŋ i lobo mere. Piŋo yin dok it ye ka ciko kwona kede kumma, me kella to?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Ento Caulo te kwoŋ baŋ dako-nono i nyiŋ Rwot kun kobo ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kwo-ni, cannoro mom bino poto i komi pi kop man.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Dako-nono te penye ni, “Kara ŋa ame imito ni alwoŋi?” En te gamo ni, “Lwoŋŋa Camwiri.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Kare ame dako oneno Camwiri, oredo i dwon aloŋo kun kobbi Caulo ni, “Piŋo kara ibwola? Yin kara ibedo Caulo.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Abaka Caulo te kobbe ni, “Kur ilwor; ineno no?” Dako-nono te kobbi Caulo ni, “Aneno obaŋa moro tye adonnyo i piny.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Caulo dok te penye ni, “Callere kono cal nadi?” En te gamo ni, “Dano moro oti tye abino kun adonnyo i piny ame owumere kedejor.” Caulo te ŋeyo ni Camwiri ennono; en te ryebere piny te wore." 
1Samuel28:15 Camwiri te kobbi Caulo ni, “Piŋo kara ilola me dwoggo an dok oko?” Caulo te gamo ni, “Atye kede twon can adwoŋ meicel, pien jo Piriciti okelo mony me bino lweny i koma, Obaŋa daŋ oweka oko, pe doŋ dokka i kopporo kadi acel, kadi i kop odwarpiny onyo i lek. Mannono en gin omio alwoŋi me titta gin a myero atim.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Camwiri te kobbe ni, “Kara piŋo dok ipenya kun Rwot doŋ oweki oko, odoko doŋ akworri?" 
1Samuel28:17 Rwot doŋ otimo i komi gin ame rik en omio akobbi; Rwot doŋ otyeko yeco loc oko i ciŋi, omio oko baŋ awotti Daudi," 
1Samuel28:18 Pien yin mom iwinyo kop a Rwot, mom imio akemo mere agwo ocobere i kom jo Amalek; mannono en omio Rwot tin otimo kop man i komi. Medo i mannono, Rwot bino miyo jo Icrael karacel kede yin i ciŋ jo Piriciti." 
1Samuel28:19 Yin karacel kede awobeni, diki ibino bedo wunu baŋa; dok Rwot bino miyo mony a jo Icrael i ciŋ jo Piriciti.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Caulo te ru rette oko piny, te buto piny ilada, kun lworo ociro oko, pi kop ame Camwiri okobbe. I caa-nono teko moro onwoŋo doŋ mom i kome, pien en onwoŋo mom ocamo ginnoro dyeceŋ kede dyewor." 
1Samuel28:21 Ajoka te bino baŋ Caulo, kare ame en oneno ni lworo omio kome oto oko, te kobbe ni, “Nen ba aŋecani awinyo koppi, ate keto kwona i ciŋa, ate winyo kop ame ikobo baŋa." 
1Samuel28:22 Aman yin daŋ tim ber iwiny koppa, adwoŋ, me aket kwonnoro aduno i nyimi, me icam inwoŋ teko me wot iyo.”" 
1Samuel28:23 En te kwero oko kun kobo ni, “Mom abino cam.” Ento omiro mere karacel kede dako nono te diye atek; en te winyo doŋ kopgi. En doŋ te ya piny bedo i wi tanda." 
1Samuel28:24 Dakonono onwoŋo rik tye kede roa ocwe atek i ot; en te ru neko oko oyotoyot, te juko moko, te rubo tedo kede ogati a tobi mom iye." 
1Samuel28:25 En oketo i nyim Caulo karacel kede omiro mere, gin te camo. Gin te ya wot oko dyeworrono." 
1Samuel29:1 Jo Piriciti te coko monygi karacel i Apek. Aco jo Icrael onwoŋo oguro gonygi i ŋet akoŋ me Jejreel. 
1Samuel29:2 I kare ame rwode a jo Piriciti tye ka ciro kun owoto jo mia kede tutumia, Daudi kede jo mere onwoŋo ocoko tere karacel kede Akic." 
1Samuel29:3 Otel mony a jo Piriciti te penyo ni, “Jo me Eburania-ni atimo kara ŋo kan?” Akic te dokki otel mony a jo Piriciti ni, “Man en Daudi amiro a Caulo abaka a jo Icrael, ame aman doŋ otyeko bedo baŋa kan pi kare alac. Cakere i kare ame en opoto iye i kora tuno naka atot tin, mom ru anwoŋo balloro baŋe.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Ento akemo te mako otel a jo Piriciti i kome, gin te kobbe ni, “Cwa dano-nono dok cen, me en dok i lobo ame rik imie; en mom bino wot karacel kedwa i mony, naka mio i dye lweny kuno, en lokere doko akworwa. Pien dano man dok twero ribere adwoŋŋere i yore aŋo? Mom wi jowa ame tye kan-ni en ame en twero tic kede?" 
1Samuel29:5 Mom man en Daudi ame owero kun oleo werrere alea ni, ‘Caulo oneko mere jo tutumia. Aco Daudi oneko mere jo tutumia apar.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Akic te lwoŋo Daudi kobbe ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kwo-ni, yin ibedo dano ame an ageno, ame an i tuŋ baŋa onwoŋo ber ka yin iwoto keda i mony dok daŋ idwogo karacel keda, pien mom anwoŋo ginnoro arac tuŋ baŋi cakere i kare ame ibino iye baŋa tuno naka tin. Cite rwode mom oye ni iwoti." 
1Samuel29:7 Pi mannono, yin doŋ dok cen; wot giri kede kuc, me cuny rwode na kur waŋ i komi.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Cite Daudi te penyo Akic ni, “Kara ŋo kono ame an atimo? Bal aŋo ame inwoŋo i koma cakere i nino ame an ageo kede tic baŋi tuno naka tin, ame geŋa wot lweny i kom okworri, adwoŋŋa?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akic te dok iye ni, “An aŋeo aber ni yin mom itye kede balloro i nyima, yin iromi amala ika Obaŋa; kadi bed amannono, otel mony a jo Piriciti okobo ni, ‘En mom bino wot kedwa i lweny’." 
1Samuel29:10 Aman doŋ yin ya odiko-ni, karacel kede joni ame iloo, ame ibino kedi; ge wunu wot odiko con ame ceŋ pwod adonnyo adonya.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Mannono te miyo Daudi ya odiko con karacel kede jo mere, me dok cen i lobo a jo Piriciti. Ento jo Piriciti te wot naka i Jejreel." 
1Samuel30:1 I kare ame Daudi otuno i Jiklag i nino me adekkere, onwoŋo jo Amalek oyako Negeb ote kato Jiklag. En onwoŋo gin oloo Jiklag oko, ote waŋo oko kede mac." 
1Samuel30:2 Gin onwoŋo oyako mon luŋ ote tero akwo, mon adoŋo kede atino. Mom oneko moro kadi acel, gin te wot gigi oko." 
1Samuel30:3 I kare ame Daudi karacel kede jo mere otuno i boma, gin onwoŋo doŋ owaŋo oko kede mac, dok daŋ oyako mongi kede itinogi awobe kede anyira, otero oko acalo opii." 
1Samuel30:4 Daudi karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe, ote mwoco koko oko, ote kok nakanaka waŋ ame doŋ ool atek ame mom doŋ oromo koko," 
1Samuel30:5 Mon a Daudi aryo ca onwoŋo daŋ otero oko acalo opii, Akinoam me Jejreel, kede Abigail dako a lyel Nabal me Karmel." 
1Samuel30:6 Daudi te doŋ bedo i twon can adwoŋ meicel; pien lwak onwoŋo tye ame amito nape oko kede gweŋ pi cwer cuny ame onwoŋo ŋat acel acel tye kede pi awobe mere kede anyira mere. Ento Daudi te nwoŋo tekcuny i baŋ Rwot Obaŋa mere. 
1Samuel30:7 Daudi te kobbi Abiatar alamdog, wot Akimeleki ni, “Kella epod kan.” Abiatar te kela epod baŋ Daudi." 
1Samuel30:8 Daudi te penyo Rwot ni, “Aryem yo mony man? Atwero makogi i yo?” Rwot te dokke ni, “Ryem yorgi, ibino makogi oko iyo, dok daŋ ibino laro joni oko,”" 
1Samuel30:9 Daudi te ya wot kede jo mia abicel ame onwoŋo rik tye baŋe. Gin te tuno i acalo me Becor, kan ame jo mia aryo odoŋ iye; jo ame onwoŋo ool atek ame mom doŋ oromo ŋolo kulo me Becor." 
1Samuel30:10 Ento Daudi kede jo mia aŋwen te medde ryemo yo jo-nono. 
1Samuel30:11 Gin te nwoŋo dano moro me Miciri i tim, ote kele baŋ Daudi; gin te miye ogati camo, ote daŋ miye pii mato," 
1Samuel30:12 ote daŋ miye oduro ame otwo aduno kede etak olok otwo aryo. Kare ame en doŋ atyeko camo, cunye doŋ te dwogo, pien onwoŋo en mom ocamo ginnoro akadi mato ginnoro pi nino adek kede dyewor adek." 
1Samuel30:13 Daudi te penye ni, “Yin ibedo dano aŋa? Dok iya kara i kwene?” En te gamo ni, “An awobi me Miciri, abedo amiro a dano me Amalek; adwoŋŋa oweka oko kan, pien two onwoŋo omaka nino adek okato aŋec." 
1Samuel30:14 Wan onwoŋo oyako Negeb a jo Kereb kede me a jo Juda, kede Negeb a jo Kaleb, dok daŋ owaŋo Jiklag oko i mac.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi te penye dok ni, “Itwero tera baŋ monnyaca?” Dano-nono te kobo ni, “Yin myero ikwoŋ baŋa i nyiŋ Obaŋa, ni mom ibino neka dok daŋ mom ibino miya i ciŋ adwoŋŋa, an ate teri baŋ monnyaca.”" 
1Samuel30:16 I kare ame en otere kuno, gin onwonogi oket atata i lobogi-nono luŋ, kun ocam, omatte dok daŋ omyel, pi yomcuny me lwak jami ame onwoŋo gin oyako i lobo a jo Piriciti kede i lobo a jo Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Daudi te nekogi atek cakere otyeno ka na abeo-nu, tuno naka orwo mere otyeno. Ŋattoro acel keken i akinagi mom obwot kono ka awobe mia aŋwen ame oyito i wi kanagi te riŋo oko." 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi te mayo ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo jo Amalek oyako, karacel kede monne aryo." 
1Samuel30:19 Ginnoro mom orwenyo kadi acel, akadi awobi moro onyo nyako moro i ginnoro luŋ a rik oyako moro mom orwenyo, Daudi odwoggogi luŋ." 
1Samuel30:20 Daudi daŋ te mayo aŋa ka dyegi kede rommi kede dokgi luŋ; jo te cwayo dokkono i nyime kun oryemo, okobo ni, “Man en jami ame Daudi oyako.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Daudi te tuno baŋ jo mia aryo ca ame rik ool atek ca, ame mom doŋ oromo lubo yo Daudi, ame onwoŋo owekogi i kulo me Becor; gin jo-nono rik ote wot me wot rwatte i Daudi karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe. Kare ame Daudi doŋ onokogi aceggi, en omotogi." 
1Samuel30:22 Eka jo luŋ a kitegi reco karacel kede jo mogo ame konygi mom ame onwoŋo tye i akina jo ame owoto i Daudi, te kobo ni, “Pien jo-nono mom owoto kedwa, mom obino miyogi ginnoro i kom gin ame wan oyako, ŋat acel acel i akinagi myero ter ka dako mere kede itino mere owot kede.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Cite Daudi te kobo ni, “Mom myero itim wunu amannono, omegona, man obedo gin ame Rwot omiowa, dok en daŋ a rik ogwokowa, te miyo mony ame onwoŋo obino i komwa i ciŋwa." 
1Samuel30:24 Ŋa ame twero ye tamwu-nono i kop man? Pien jo ame mom owoto i lweny, ame odoŋ ka gwoko jami bino nwoŋo jami arom aroma i ŋat owoto.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Cakere i kare nono Daudi te miyo mannono doko cik atwal, ame jo Icrael lubo naka atot tin." 
1Samuel30:26 I kare ame Daudi otuno i Jiklag, en ocwao jami mogo ame eyako baŋ owote mere, ame gin odoŋe me Juda, kun kobbigi ni, “Man en mot ame acwayiwu ame oya i kom gin ame oyako i baŋ okwor a Rwot.”" 
1Samuel30:27 En ocwao baŋ odoŋe ame bedo i Betel, i Ramot ame tye i Negeb, i Yattir," 
1Samuel30:28 i Aroer, i Cipmot, Ectemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 Rakal, i boma luŋ me a jo Jerakmeel, i boma a jo Keni luŋ," 
1Samuel30:30 Korma, Boracan, Atak," 
1Samuel30:31 Kebron karacel kede i kabedo luŋ ame yam Daudi kede jo mere maro wot iye. 
1Samuel31:1 I kare-nono jo Piriciti te lweny i kom jo Icrael; jo Icrael rik te mukere i ŋwec oko i nyim jo Piriciti, kun kom jo ame oneko oradde atata i kidi me Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Jo Piriciti te ryemo yo Caulo kede awobe mere, ote neko Yonacan kede Abinadab, kede Malkicua, ame gin obedo awobe a Caulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Lweny onwoŋ odio Caulo atek meicel, wegi atero mogo rik te nwoŋe, gin te cele wawano en atek meicel kede atero," 
1Samuel31:4 Caulo te kobbi atiŋ jami lwennyere ni, “Wot pala romoni ituca kede pelo, me jo-ni a mom oliro komgi me co-ni kur bin coba, ote loka doko gi-anywaragi.” Cite atiŋ jami lwennyere mom te ye, pien onwoŋo tye kede lworo. Mannono te miyo Caulo kwanyo pala lwennyere, te rette iye en kene." 
1Samuel31:5 Kare ame atiŋ jami lwennyere oneno ni Caulo doŋ oto oko, en daŋ te rette i kom pala lwennyere, te to oko karacel kede." 
1Samuel31:6 Mannono en kite ame Caulo oto kede karacel kede awobe mere adek kede atiŋ jami lwennyere, kede jo mere, gin luŋ oto i nino acellono." 
1Samuel31:7 I kare ame jo Icrael a rik tye i ŋe luŋ tuŋ ca karacel kede jo ocele ame onwoŋo tye i loka Jordan, kare ame gin luŋ oneno ni jo Icrael oriŋo oko, dok Caulo kede awobe mere daŋ oto oko, gin oya i bomagi luŋ ote riŋo oko. Jo Piriciti te bino bedo iye." 
1Samuel31:8 Orwo mere ocele, i kare ame jo Piriciti obino me gonyo ruk a jo ame oneko, gin onwoŋo Caulo kede awobe mere adek oto i kidi me Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Gin te toŋo wi Caulo oko, ote gonyo daŋ jami lwennyere oko, ote cwayo okwena rabo koppere baŋ jogi luŋ karacel kede baŋ jo luŋ ame tye i lobo me Piriciti." 
1Samuel31:10 Gin te keto jami lwennyere i ot jok Aciterot, gin te guro kom Caulo i cel me Betcen." 
1Samuel31:11 Ento i kare ame jo me Jabec-Gilead owinyo gin ame jo Piriciti otimo i kom Caulo," 
1Samuel31:12 jo luŋ ame tek i lweny, oya ote wot dyeworrono benebene, ote kwanyo kom Caulo kede kom awobe mere oko i kor cel me Betcan, gin te dwoggo i Jabec, ote waŋo komgi kuno." 
1Samuel31:13 Gin te kwanyo cogo komgi, ote yiko i te yat i Jabec, eka ote kanyo kec pi nino abiro." 
2Samuel1:1 Kare ame Caulo doŋ oto oko, ame Daudi doŋ oloo jo Amalek, te dwogo tyeko nino aryo i Ciklag." 
2Samuel1:2 Orwo mere lo moro te bino ame oya i gony a Caulo, kun boŋo mere oyeyeca, dok daŋ ojujuko wie kede lobo. Kare ame en otuno baŋ Daudi, en oryebere piny i nyime pi wore," 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi te penye ni, “Yin kara iya i kwene ba?” En te dok iye ni, “An kom abwot abwota i gony a jo Icrael.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Daudi dok te penye ni, “Koŋ doŋ ititta gin ame otimere kuno; obedo ni ŋo ba?” En te gamo ni, “Monywa ogweo ŋwec oko i lweny, cite oneko daŋ jo apol meicel; Caulo kede wode Yonacan daŋ oto oko.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Daudi dok te penyo awobi-nono ni, “Kara yin iŋeo niŋo ni Caulo kede wode Yonacan oto oko?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Awobi-nono te gamo ni, “An onwoŋo atye i wi kidi me Gilboa, ate neno Caulo kun tye ojeŋere i kom toŋŋere, kun gadigadi lweny kede wegi aguragura ame aryemo yore doŋ ceggi acega." 
2Samuel1:7 Kare ame Caulo obolo waŋe i ŋee, en onena, te lwoŋa. An ate gamo ni, ‘An ene.’" 
2Samuel1:8 En te penya ni, ‘Kara yin iŋa?’ An ate gamo ni, ‘An a dano me Amalek.’" 
2Samuel1:9 En te kobba ni, ‘Tim ber ibin idopa oko, pien rem ociro oko kun kwona pwod tye.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Mannono te miya wot doppe oko, pien onwoŋo doŋ aniaŋ ni mom twero kwo, kite ame onwoŋo doŋ otyeko rette piny oko-ni. An doŋ ate kwanyo tokkere me kwogo ame onwoŋo tye iwie, kede ogul ame tye i bade, en akelogi baŋi kan, adwoŋŋa?”" 
2Samuel1:11 Daudi te mako boŋŋi mere, te yeyeco oko; jo a rik tye baŋe, te daŋ timo kittono." 
2Samuel1:12 Gin te kumo kun okok, dok daŋ ori kec pi Caulo, kede wode Yonacan, tuno naka otyeno kede pi jo Icrael, ame gin obedo lwak a Rwot, pien jo apol meicel i akinagi onwoŋo oneko oko i lweny." 
2Samuel1:13 Daudi te dok penyo awobi ame okelle kop ni, “Yin kara iya ikwene ba?” En te gamo ni, “An atin arokkoro ame bedo i akinawu, ame abedo dano me Amalek.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi te kobbe ni, “Piŋo yin mom ibedo kede lworo me ryeyo ciŋi neko ŋat ame Rwot oyero?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Daudi te lwoŋo ŋat acel i akina awobe mere, te kobbe ni, “Nek lo-nu oko.” Awobinono te cobe, te neke oko." 
2Samuel1:16 Daudi te kobbi ato ni, “Remoni bed giri i wii; pien yin iŋolo kop i komi keni, pi kobo ni, ‘Atyeko neko ŋat ame Rwot owiro kede moo’.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Daudi te cako wero wer man kun koko kede Caulo kede wode Yonacan," 
2Samuel1:18 dok daŋ te ciko ni myero pwony kede jo Juda. Kop man ote coyo i buk a Yacar. Werrere-nono woto kit man: 
2Samuel1:19 “Ama wun jo Icrael, kwogowu oneko i wi kidi malo! Twoni jo atek meicel doŋ obuto oko piny!" 
2Samuel1:20 “Myero kur tit pire i Gat, myero daŋ kur lal koppere i dye boma me Acikelon, me anyira me Piriciti kur lel, kede anyira a jo a mom woro Obaŋa daŋ kur lel," 
2Samuel1:21 Obaŋa myero kur mi kot kede toyo gud kidi me Gilboa pii a tye piny i te lobo daŋ kur kato oko, Pien kwot a jo atek opoto piny kuno i lewic, kwot a Caulo doŋ okwor atek, mom oweo i moo." 
2Samuel1:22 “Akud atero a Yonacan onwoŋo lyet calo mac apoka, pala lweny a Caulo yam onwoŋo gwa meicel, gin luŋ yam mom dwogo nono aboŋo remo i komgi, dwol twoni jo atek yam mom rwenyo i komgi." 
2Samuel1:23 “Caulo kede Yanacan yam twon jo moro ba! kite ame yam amarogi kede! Gin yam onywako kwo karacel, tuno naka i to, Jo mere yam dwir kato cur oko, dok otek okato eŋatu oko." 
2Samuel1:24 “Mon me Icrael, kok wunu Caulo! ame yam omiowu irukere wunu meicel i dok odeo rukwu kede jabu." 
2Samuel1:25 “Twoni co atek i lweny obuto oko piny, i dye lweny ba! “Yonacan oneko, obuto piny i wi kidi malo." 
2Samuel1:26 Cunya owaŋ meicel piri, ominna Yonacan; onwoŋo yam iyomoro cunya meicel; kite onwoŋo imara kede, koba tek, kato kite a man mar kede jabu." 
2Samuel1:27 “Twoni co atek i lweny obuto oko piny ba! Jami lwenygi te doŋ kun oket atata!” 
2Samuel2:1 I kare ame man doŋ otum, Daudi te penyo Rwot ni “Awot abed i boma moro me Juda?” Rwot te kobbe ni, “Ee, woti.” Daudi dok te penyo ni, “Awot i boma mene?” Rwot te kobbe ni, “Wot i Kebron.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Mannono te miyo Daudi wot malo kuno karacel i monne aryo, Akinoam me Jejreel, kede Abigail ame rik koŋ obedo dako a lyel Nabal me Karmel." 
2Samuel2:3 Daudi otero daŋ jo mere ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe, kun tero ŋat acel acel kede jo me ode; gin te bedo i paco moro ame tye i Kebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Jo me Juda te bino kuno, te wiro Daudi kede moo me bedo abaka a jo me ot a Juda. Kare ame Daudi owinyo ni jo me Jabec, i Gilead, en a rik oyiko Caulo." 
2Samuel2:5 Daudi ocwao okwena baŋgi kun kobbigi ni, “Rwot myero miwu winyo, pien inyuto wunu woro i kom adwoŋwu. Caulo, iyike wunu!" 
2Samuel2:6 Aman myero Rwot doŋ nyut marrere a mom lokere kede gen i komwu! An daŋ abino timowu ber pi gin ame itimo wunu. 
2Samuel2:7 Aman doŋ ba, myero imi ciŋwu bed iwac, ibed wunu jo atek, pien adwoŋwu Caulo doŋ oto oko; jo me ot a Juda doŋ owira kede moo me bedo abakagi.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Abuneri wot a Neri, ame onwoŋo obedo atel wi mony a Caulo, onwoŋo otero Ic-bocet wot a Caulo oko owoto kede naka loka i Makanaim." 
2Samuel2:9 Eka i kuno, te ke te me bedo abaka ame loo Gilead, jo Acur, Jejreel, Epraim, kede Benjamin, naka Icrael luŋ." 
2Samuel2:10 Ic-bocet wot a Caulo, onwoŋo rik mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraŋwen, i kare ame en doko abaka ame loo Icrael, en rik te loc pi mwakki aryo. Cite atekere a Juda onwoŋo gigi lubo Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Kare ame Daudi rik obedo kede abaka ame loo atekere a Juda i Kebron, onwoŋo oromo mwakki abiro kede dwete kanyape." 
2Samuel2:12 Abuneri wot a Neri kede omiro Ic-bocet wot a Caulo te wot i Gibeon kun oya i Makanaim. 
2Samuel2:13 Eka Yoab wot a Cerua kede omiro a Daudi te daŋ wot rwatte kedgi kuno, ote obedo oko piny ŋat acel i ŋete eka ŋat ocele daŋ te bedo i ŋet atapara tuŋ ocele." 
2Samuel2:14 Abuneri te kobbi Yoab ni, “Mi awobe atino ya malo, me otuk i nyimwa.” Yoab te gamo ni, “Migi oya malo do.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Gin te ya malo, ote kato tuŋ ca kun okwanogi, jo apar wie aryo te kato pi Benjamin kede Ic-bocet wot a Caulo, kede jo apar wie aryo i amiro a Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Ŋat acel acel te mako wi akwottere, te cobo akwottere-nono oko i laŋete kede pala lweny, eka gin aryo luŋ ote rette piny awaŋe acel. Mannono te miyo cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Poto ame onekere iye ame tye i Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:17 Lweny rik te bedo agwa meicel i nino-nono; omiro a Daudi te loyo Abuneri oko, karacel kede jo Icrael." 
2Samuel2:18 Awobe a Cerua adek onwoŋo tye kuno, Yoab, Abicai, kede Acael. Acael onwoŋo dwir atek calo amor me tim." 
2Samuel2:19 En rik te ryemo yo Abuneri atek; i kare ame en oryemo yore-nono, mom gire ogak kadi acel, tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam." 
2Samuel2:20 Abuneri te lokere neno ŋee, te kobbe ni, “Man yin, Acael?” En te gamo ni, “An ennono do.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abuneri te kobbe ni, “Aco koŋ doŋ igak tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam, me imak ŋat acel i akina awobe, ima jami mere oko.” Cite Acael mom te ye gak kadi acel i lubo yo Abuneri." 
2Samuel2:22 Abuneri te dok medo kobbi Acael ni, “Wek lubo yora bedi, gak oko teŋe; piŋo kara omio imito ni aneki? Abino tiŋo waŋa malo me neno ominni Yoab i yore aŋo ba?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Cite en gire te kwero oko; mannono te miyo Abuneri cobo yie pelo apela kun cobo i ecipet me toŋŋere. Acael te rette piny kuno, te daŋ to oko kannono. Doŋ ŋat acel acel ame otuno kan ame onwoŋo en oto iye, koŋ cuŋ oko mot." 
2Samuel2:24 Eka Yoab kede Abicai te ryemo yo Abuneri. I kare ame ceŋ doŋ onwoŋo ceggi acega i poto, gin te tuno i tur me Amma, ame onwoŋo tye i nyim Gia, i yo ame woto dok i tim me Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:25 Jo me Benjamin te cokere karacel baŋ Abuneri, ote ribere oko acalo mony acel, gin te cuŋ karacel malo i wi turroro." 
2Samuel2:26 Abuneri te redo baŋ Yoab ni, “Myero wan obed lweny nakanaka bo? Mom iŋeo ni agiki mere bedo arac meicel? Ibino kara juko joni awene, me owek ryemo omegogi?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoab te kobbe ni, “Acalo Obaŋa tye kow-ni, kono mom ikobo, kono jona gire omedde ryemo yo omegogi naka odiko.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Mannono te miyo Yoab kuto apel, jo luŋ te cuŋ oko; mom dok ote medde ryemo yo jo Icrael akadi lweny kedgi." 
2Samuel2:29 Abuneri kede jo mere luŋ te wot dyeworrono benebene, kun obeo i dye Araba, ote ŋolo Jordan, gin te bedo wot otyeno nono luŋ, ote tuno naka i Makanaim." 
2Samuel2:30 Yoab te dok cen i ryemo yo Abuneri; eka ikare ame en doŋ ocoko jo luŋ karacel, en te nwoŋo ni omiro a Daudi apar wie aboŋwen mom tye, medo i kom Acael." 
2Samuel2:31 Cite jo a Daudi onwoŋo oneko jo Abuneri mia adek kede pyerabicel, ame gin obedo jo Benjamin." 
2Samuel2:32 Yoab kede jo mere te tiŋo kom Acael, ote wot yiko i lyel a pappere ame onwoŋo tye i Beterekem. Gin doŋ te bedo wot dyewor benebene, piny te wot ruyigi i Kebron." 
2Samuel3:1 Lweny rik te ri kare alac meicel i akina jo me ot a Caulo kede jo me ot a Daudi; Daudi te bedo medde ameda ibedo atek kun jo me ot a Caulo mede ameda idoko agoro. 
2Samuel3:2 Daudi rik te nywalo awobe magi i Kebron: wode me kao rik te bedo Amunon ame tottere rik Akinoam me Jejreel; 
2Samuel3:3 awobi olube te bedo Kileab, ame obedo wot a Abigail, ame koŋ obedo dako a lyel Nabal me Karmel; wode me adekkere te bedo Abicalom, ame tottere onwoŋo Maaka nyaka a Talmai, abaka me Gecur;" 
2Samuel3:4 wode me anwennere te bedo Adonia ame tottere obedo Kagit; me abiccere te bedo Cepatia, ame tottere obedo Abiatal;" 
2Samuel3:5 eka me kanyape te bedo Itream, ame tottere obedo Elga, dako a Daudi. Itino awobe-ni luŋ Daudi onywalogi i Kebron." 
2Samuel3:6 I kare ame lweny onwoŋo pwod tye i akina jo me ot a Caulo kede jo me ot a Daudi, Abuneri onwoŋo tye awot medde bedo lo ateka meicel i akina jo a Caulo," 
2Samuel3:7 Nino moro acel Ic-bocet, wot a Caulo, openyo Abuneri ni piŋo obuto aŋeca, ame onwoŋo obedo ci-pappere Caulo, a nyiŋe Ricpa, nyaka Aya." 
2Samuel3:8 Akemo te mako Abuneri meicel pi peny a Ic-bocet, omio te kobbe ni, “Yin itamo ni an abedo wi gwok bo i ot a Juda? I kare-ni luŋ an abedo kede woro baŋ jo me ot a Caulo ame obedo pappi, kede baŋ omego mere, naka baŋ owote mere, dok mom amiowu i ciŋ Daudi; ento yin tin icako kelo kop i koma pi dako." 
2Samuel3:9 Obaŋa myero mi ginnoro tima, ka ce mom acobo gin a yam Rwot okwono pire baŋ Daudi," 
2Samuel3:10 me kwanyo loc oko i ot a Caulo, te miyo kom me loc baŋ Daudi, me loyo Icrael kede Juda, cakere i Dan tuno kede i Beer-ceba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Ic-bocet onwoŋo mom dok twero kobbe kopporo kadi acel, pien onwoŋo lwore." 
2Samuel3:12 Abuneri te cwayo kwena baŋ Daudi i Kebron kun kobo ni, “Ŋa kara ame bi no loyo lobo man? Yin myero iye cikere keda me an akonyi, ami Icrael luŋ dwog i te locci.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi te kobo ni, “Mannono gire ber, an gire abino cikere kedi, cite i kare ame ibino nena myero inen ni ikelo Mikal nyaka a Caulo baŋa, en omio ite nena.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Daudi te cwayo okwena baŋ Ic-bocet wot a Caulo kun kobbe ni, “Mia cega Mikal ame rik anyomo i del kom co a jo Piriciti mia acel.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Mannono te miyo Ic-bocet cwayo jo wot game oko i baŋ cware Palutiel wot a Laaie. 
2Samuel3:16 Cite cware Palutiel rik daŋ te wot kede karacel kun kok naka Bakurim. Abuneri te kobbe ni, “Yin doŋ myero inen ni idok cen.” En doŋ te dok oko cen." 
2Samuel3:17 Abuneri rik te poro kop odoŋe me Icrael, kun kobbigi ni, “I kare okato wun ibedo mito wunu Daudi ni myero bed abakawu," 
2Samuel3:18 Aman doŋ myero itim wunu, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko kwon baŋ Daudi kun kobo ni, ‘Abino miyo amirona Daudi en ame laro jona i ciŋ jo Piriciti kede i ciŋ okworgi luŋ’.”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abuneri dok te kop i jo Benjamin, eka te doŋ wot i Kebron me wot kobbi Daudi ginnoro luŋ ame jo Benjamin kede jo Icrael oye timo." 
2Samuel3:20 Abuneri te wot i jo pyeraryo baŋ Daudi i Kebron, Daudi te yiko arama pi Abuneri karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe," 
2Samuel3:21 Abuneri te kobo baŋ Daudi ni, “An doŋ aya awot, abino wot coko jo Icrael luŋ karacel akelo baŋi yin adwoŋŋa, Daudi. Gin bino cikere kedi me bedo abakagi. Mannono bino miyo doŋ iloo ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo cunyi mito.” Daudi doŋ te cwayo Abuneri wot; en te wot gire i kuc." 
2Samuel3:22 Icennere omiro a Daudi karacel kede Yoab te dwogo kun oya i ka yako rok ocele, ame okelo jami apol meicel a gin oyako. Ento Abuneri onwoŋo mom tye baŋ Daudi i Kebron, pien onwoŋo Daudi ocwao Abuneri owoto gire oko kun omie owoto gire i kuc." 
2Samuel3:23 I kare ame Yoab karacel kede mony a rik tye baŋe odwogo, jo te kobbi Yoab ni, “Abuneri wot a Neri obino baŋ abaka, eka abaka te weke wot kun daŋ mie gire woto kede kuc.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Yoab te wot baŋ abaka, te kobbe ni, “Gin aŋo kara ame yin itimo? Koŋ inen, Abuneri obino baŋi; piŋo kara yin dok iweko en owoto? Aman en doŋ owoto gire oko." 
2Samuel3:25 Yin iŋeo ni Abuneri wot a Neri obino baŋi me bino bwoli, me eŋe kite ame yin iwiwira kede tuŋŋi kede tunni, kede ginnoro luŋ ame yin itio.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Kare ame Yoab doŋ oya i nyim Daudi, en ocwao jo me wot omo Abuneri; gin te dwogo en cen i ŋet bur pii me Cira, ento Daudi onwoŋo mom oŋeo ginnoro iye." 
2Samuel3:27 I kare ame Abuneri odwogo i Kebron, Yoab otere teŋe i ŋet cel me wot kop kede i muŋ. En te wot cobo yie oko kuno, te neke oko, pi remo ominnere Acael." 
2Samuel3:28 I kare ame Daudi owinyo kop man icennere, en okobo ni, “An karacel kede locca mom gire obino bedo kede balloro nakanaka i nyim Rwot pi remo Abuneri wot a Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Remo mere gire myero dok i wi Yoab, kede i wi jo me ot a pappere luŋ; ŋattoro myero kur rweny i ot a Yoab ame two remo omako, onyo dobo, onyo ame abwoc, onyo ame oneko i pala lweny, onyo ame kec en oneko, man myero bed timere i ode kare ducu.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Yoab kede ominnere Abicai te neko Abuneri oko kittono, pien onwoŋo rik oneko omingi i lweny ame obedo i Gibeon." 
2Samuel3:31 Daudi te kobbi Yoab kede jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋ Yoab ni, “Yeyeco wunu boŋŋiwu oko, ruk wunu boŋŋi me cola, me ikok wunu Abuneri.” Abaka Daudi te wot kun lubo canduk ame oketo iye kom ato." 
2Samuel3:32 Gin te yiko kom Abuneri i Kebron; abaka Daudi te mwoco koko oko i dog lyel Abuneri, jo luŋ daŋ te kok oko." 
2Samuel3:33 Abaka Daudi okoko Abuneri kun kobo ni, “Piŋo kara Abuneri oto calo lo amiŋ?" 
2Samuel3:34 Koŋ inen ciŋi-gu mom gire otweo, tyeni daŋ mom gire otweo kede jegere; nen yin giri ito calo lo ame poto i nyim otim tim areco.” Jo luŋ dok te medde kok pi Abuneri." 
2Samuel3:35 Jo luŋ te wot baŋ Daudi me cuko cunye ni myero en ocam cem kun cen mom ru opoto, cite Daudi te kwoŋ akwoŋa kun kobo ni, “Obaŋa myero mii ginnoro timere i koma, ka ce abilo ogati onyo ginnoro keken kun cen mom ru opoto.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Jo luŋ oneno gin ame otimere-nono, te daŋ yomoro cunygi; kite ame ginnoro luŋ ame abaka timo yomoro kede cuny jo luŋ." 
2Samuel3:37 Mannono omio jo luŋ oniaŋ i nino-nono ni abaka gire onwoŋo mom omito ni nek Abuneri wot a Neri. 
2Samuel3:38 Abaka te kobo baŋ omiro mere ni, “Wun iŋeo wunu ni aloc kede twon lo moro adwoŋ meicel tin oto iyi Icrael?" 
2Samuel3:39 An tin agoro, kadi bed owira kede moo me bedo abaka; jo mago ame gin obedo itino a Ceruya, otye agwa meicel i koma. Rwot gire myero cul Yoab pi tim arac kun lubo ballere.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Kare ame Ic-bocet wot a Caulo owinyo ni Abuneri otyeko to oko i Kebron, lworo omake atek, jo Icrael luŋ te bedo ame cunygi oŋabere aŋaba." 
2Samuel4:2 Ic-bocet onwoŋo rik tye kede jo aryo ame telo wi eryoŋet aryo ame woto i yak; ŋat acel nyiŋe Baana, ŋat ocele nyiŋe Rekab, awobe a Rimmon, dano me Benjamin ame turgi tye i Beerot, pien Beerot daŋ okwano baŋ jo Benjamin." 
2Samuel4:3 Jo Beerot onwoŋo oriŋo i Gittaim, gin te bedo gigi kuno naka atot tin." 
2Samuel4:4 Yonacan wot a Caulo onwoŋo tye kede wode ame komo akoma. I kare ame okelo kop me to a pappere kede Caulo kun okelo i Jejreel, onwoŋo en doŋ tye i mwaka abic me dittere. Apidi mere te tiŋe ŋwec kede oko; i kare ame apidi onwoŋo tye aŋwec i myelkom, te weke rette oko piny, te doŋ doko aŋwalo. Nyine Mepibocet." 
2Samuel4:5 Awobe a Rimmon me Beerot, Rekab kede Baana, gin ocako wot ote tuno i ot a Ic-bocet a ceŋ lyet atek, ote onwoŋo Ic-bocet tye pwod aryeye i kabuto mere dyeceŋ." 
2Samuel4:6 Nen ba, icaanono onwoŋo dako ame tye apyeto ŋano nino omako waŋe oko, te daŋ nino gire oko; Rekab kede ominnere Baana te cedde donyo i ot." 
2Samuel4:7 Kare ame gin odonyo baŋ Ic-bocet i ot, kan ame onwoŋo en obuto iye i wi tanda mere i ot buto, gin te cobe neke oko, ote ŋolo ŋute oko. Gin otiŋo wie ote wot kede dyewor benebene, kun olubo yo me Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Gin te kela wi Ic-bocet baŋ Daudi i Kebron. Gin te kobbi abaka Daudi ni, “Man en wi Ic-bocet wot a Caulo, akworri ame onwoŋo mito neki, Rwot tin doŋ oculo kwor adwoŋwa, abaka, i kom Caulo kede itino mere.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Cite Daudi te kobbi Rekab kede ominnere Baana, ame gin obedo itino a Rimmon me Beerot ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kwo-ni, Rwot ame olara i cannoro luŋ," 
2Samuel4:10 i kare ame rik lo moro okobba ni, ‘Nen ba, Caulo doŋ oto oko,’ kun tamo ni ekela amut aber, an amake, ate neke oko i Ciklag; maci-naca en ame rik obedo mot ame an amie pi kop ame en okelo." 
2Samuel4:11 Kara doŋ jo areco ame neko dano ame kite atira i ode kono, i wi tanda mere-gu, mom abino mito remowu, ate nekowu oko i wi lobo?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Daudi te kobbi awobe mere ni nekgi oko, ote daŋ nekogi oko, ote ŋolo ciŋgi kede tyengi, ote ŋabogi i ŋet atapara me Kebron. Cite gin te wot yiko wi Ic-bocet i lyel Abuneri i Kebron." 
2Samuel5:1 I kare-nono atekere me Icrael luŋ te bino baŋ Daudi i Kebron, ote bino kobbe ni, “Nen ba, wan acel kedi.”" 
2Samuel5:2 I kare okato Caulo onwoŋo abakawa; yin en a rik itelo jo Icrael me wot i lweny, dok daŋ idwoggogi paco; Rwot rik te kobbi ni, “Yin ibino kwayo jona Icrael dok daŋ ibino bedo aloc a jo Icrael.”" 
2Samuel5:3 Mannono en omio odoŋe luŋ me Icrael obino baŋ abaka i Kebron. Abaka Daudi te cikere kedgi i Kebron i nyim Rwot, gin te daŋ wiro Daudi kede moo me bedo abaka me Icrael." 
2Samuel5:4 Daudi onwoŋo doŋ mwaka me dittere oromo pyeradek i kare ame en doko abaka, en te bedo aloc pi mwakki pyeraŋwen." 
2Samuel5:5 Oloo jo Juda i Kebron mwakki abiro kede dwete kanyape, te dok loyo jo Icrael medo i Juda ducu pi mwakki pyeradek wie adek, kun en bedo i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel5:6 I kare-nono abaka Daudi kede jo mere te ya me wot lweny i Jerucalem i kom jo me Jebuc, ame gin rik obedo wegi lobo-naca. Jo Jebuc otamo ni Daudi gire mom romo loyo bomagi, omio gin te kobo ni, “Yin gire mom itwero kato kan, otowaŋ kede oŋwalo romo gire ryemi oko.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Cite Daudi te mayo Cion oko, ame obedo ka ponogi atek, paco-nono te doŋ doko Gony a Daudi." 
2Samuel5:8 I nino-naca Daudi okobbi jo mere ni, “Tye ŋattoro iyi akinawu ame cunye dag jo Jebuc bala an? Ŋat amito loyogi myero lub yo me bur pii, me wot lweny i kom otowaŋ kede oŋwalo.” Mannono en omio okobo ni, “Otowaŋ kede oŋwalo mom bino donyo i ot a Rwot.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Daudi te bedo i ka ponogi atekkono, te cako nyiŋe ni, Gony a Daudi. Daudi te gero boma-nono i cel mano amana, cakere i Millo dok kede i yie." 
2Samuel5:10 Daudi te doŋ medde ameda ibedo twon lo moro adit, pien Rwot Obaŋa me mony obedo bedo kede." 
2Samuel5:11 Kiram abaka me Turo te cwayo kwena baŋ Daudi, kun miogi otero bao cedar, kede opac, kede opaa kidi me gedo, ame gin te geri Daudi ot." 
2Samuel5:12 Daudi te niaŋ ni Rwot doŋ otyeko moke me bedo abaka me Icrael, dok daŋ ni doŋ omio loccere obedo malo meicel pi jo mere Icrael." 
2Samuel5:13 I kare ame Daudi oya i Kebron te wot i Jerucalem, en omedde coko mon ocele, mon anyoma kede en aŋeca mege; te daŋ medde nywalo awobe kede anyira." 
2Samuel5:14 Nyiŋ itino ame en onywalo i Jerucalem ene: Cammua, Cobab, Natan, Culeman," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibkar, Elicua, Nepeg, Yapia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elicama, Eliada kede Elipelet." 
2Samuel5:17 Kare ame jo Piriciti otyeko winyo ni otyeko wiro Daudi kede moo me bedo abaka me Icrael, gin luŋ ote ciro wot malo kuno me wot yenyo Daudi; cite Daudi rik te winyo oko, te wot i ka-pono ame ogero atek." 
2Samuel5:18 I kare-nono jo Piriciti obino te keketa i lula me Repaim. 
2Samuel5:19 Daudi te penyo Rwot ni, “Awot alweny i kom jo Piriciti? Ibino miyogi i ciŋa?” Rwot te kobbi Daudi ni, “Woti; pien an abino miyo jo Piriciti i ciŋi, ateteni.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Daudi te wot i Baal-peracim, te daŋ wot loyogi oko kuno. Daudi te kobo ni, “Rwot doŋ oemo dye okworra i nyima, kite ame pii mol yeco kede yore.” Omio ote cako nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Baal-peracim." 
2Samuel5:21 Jo Piriciti rik te weko cal jogigi kuno, eka Daudi kede jo mere te terogi oko." 
2Samuel5:22 Jo Piriciti dok te dwogo tyen me aryo mere, ote dok keketa i lula me Repaim." 
2Samuel5:23 Kare ame Daudi openyo Rwot, Rwot okobbe ni, “Kur iwot malo kuno, yin man amana, iwot i ŋegi, me ilokere wunu i komgi awulo kan ame abata pol iye." 
2Samuel5:24 Ka ibino winyo tyen jo awot amor awinyere malo i wi abata, myero inyutte wunu, pien Rwot nwoŋo doŋ otelo nyimi oko me wot neneko mony a jo Piriciti oko.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi te timo kite ame Rwot onwoŋo ocike kede, te neko jo Piriciti, cakere i Geba tuno naka Gejer." 
2Samuel6:1 Daudi dok te coko jo Icrael luŋ ame oyero, jo tutumia pyeradek." 
2Samuel6:2 Daudi te ya karacel kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye, kun oya i Baal-juda, me wot kelo canduk Obaŋa i kuno, canduk ame olwoŋo i nyiŋ Rwot me mony, ame bedo malo i wi okerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Gin te cibo canduk i gadigdai anyen, kun okwanyo i ot a Abinadab, ame onwoŋo bedo i wi tur malo; Ujja kede Akic, ame gin obedo awobe a Abinadab, gin te loro gadigadi anyen aŋwen ame onwoŋo canduk Obaŋa tye iye," 
2Samuel6:4 kun Akic en ame telo yo i nyim canduk. 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi kede jo luŋ me ot Icrael te tuko atek meicel i nyim Rwot, kun owero ogoo opuk, naŋa, bul, ajaa kede mola me agoa." 
2Samuel6:6 Kare ame gin otuno i ŋet laro a Nakon, Ujja oryeo ciŋe i kom canduk Obaŋa, eka te kwako kede ciŋe, pien twoni onwoŋo ogatte." 
2Samuel6:7 Akemo te mako Rwot i kom Ujja, eka te neke oko kuno, pien oryeo ciŋe i kom canduk Obaŋa; Ujja te to i ŋet canduk Obaŋa," 
2Samuel6:8 Cuny Daudi te waŋ, pien Rwot oneko Ujja akemo; mannono te miyo lwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Perej-ujja, tuno naka atot tin." 
2Samuel6:9 I nino-nono lworo omako Daudi atek i kom Rwot. Omio en okobo ni, “Kara canduk a Rwot bino bedo baŋa i yore aŋo ba?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Omio Daudi obedo kede lworo me tero canduk a Rwot i gony a Daudi; en te lunyo tero teŋe i ot Obed-edom ame obedo dano me Gat. 
2Samuel6:11 Canduk a Rwot te ri i ot Obed-edom me Gat dwete adek; Rwot te miyo winyo i kom Obededom karacel kede jo luŋ me ode. 
2Samuel6:12 Rik ote kobbi abaka Daudi ni, “Rwot doŋ omio winyo i kom jo me ot Obed-edom kede jami mere luŋ, pi canduk Obaŋa.” Omio Daudi te omo canduk Obaŋa oko i ot Obed-edom, te kelo i gony a Daudi i yomcuny." 
2Samuel6:13 Kare ame jo oyeo canduk a Rwot ocako wotgi, kun pwod obolo tyengi tyen kanyape keken, Daudi oyalo Rwot i twon ocwe." 
2Samuel6:14 Dok te myel i nyim Rwot atek meicel; Daudi onwoŋo otweo ka epod me camanini i pyere. 
2Samuel6:15 Mannono en kite ame Daudi karacel kede jo luŋ me Icrael otero kede canduk a Rwot kun owo, okuto tuŋ rommi." 
2Samuel6:16 Kare ame canduk a Rwot otuno i gony a Rwot, Mikal nyaka a Caulo oroo waŋe i dirica, te neno Daudi tye akirre i myel i nyim Rwot; en te caye i cunye." 
2Samuel6:17 Gin te cwayo canduk a Rwot i ot, ote keto kakare iyi kema ame onwoŋo Daudi rik oguro pire. Daudi te yalo Rwot kede mot awaŋa, kede mot me kweyo cuny i nyim Rwot kuno." 
2Samuel6:18 Kare ame Daudi doŋ otyeko yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny, en olamo winyo i kom lwak i nyim Rwot me mony." 
2Samuel6:19 En te poko baŋ ŋat acel acel ogati acel, dul riŋo aduno, kede aŋina olok otwo acel, en opoko baŋ jo luŋ, co kede mon me Icrael luŋ. Eka jo doŋ te keketa kun ŋat acel acel dok i ode." 
2Samuel6:20 Daudi te dwogo paco, me bino lamo gum i jo me ode. Cite Mikal nyaka a Caulo te ŋolle i kome, te kobbe ni, “Abaka me Icrael tin oketo kwogo i kome kene be! Tin en ogonyo boŋo i kome oko i nyim aŋeca omiro mere, kun lanne, weko kome nono i nyim jo calo dano moro ame wie oballe.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi te kobbi Mikal ni, “An onwoŋo amyel gira i nyim Rwot ame oyera me leyo kaka pappi kede jo me ode ducu, me keta bedo aloc a jo mere Icrael. Mannono omio an gira pwod abino medde myel i nyim Rwot." 
2Samuel6:22 Abino medde bedo lo moro ayot meicel ame kato man oko, yin giri ibino medde caya, cite aŋeca ame yin ikobo pirgi-nono, gin bino keto kwogo i koma.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikal nyaka a Caulo mom te nywalo atinnoro naka oto. 
2Samuel7:1 I kare ame Daudi doŋ obedo i ode kun Rwot doŋ otyeko miye weo oko i kom okworrere ame onwoŋo omanne dyere," 
2Samuel7:2 en okobo baŋ adwarpiny Natan ni, “Nen ba, an atye abedo i ot ame ogero i bao cedar, cite canduk tye bedo i kema.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nacan te kobbi abaka ni, “Wot iti giri ginnoro luŋ ame tye i cunyi, pien Rwot gire tye kedi.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Cite i dyeworrono ikokome, kop a Rwot te bino baŋ Natan kun kobbe ni," 
2Samuel7:5 “Wot ikobbi amirona Daudi ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni, Yin imito gera ot me bedona?" 
2Samuel7:6 Cakere i kare ame akwanyo jo me Icrael i lobo Miciri, tuno naka tin, an mom ru abedo gira i ottoro; abedo kobere gira akoba kun abedo i kema." 
2Samuel7:7 I kabedo luŋ ame abedo wot iye i jona Icrael, mom gira apenyo atelloro ame onwoŋo aketo me telogi ni kono ogerra ot me bao cedar.’" 
2Samuel7:8 Aman doŋ yin myero ikobbi amirona Daudi ni, ‘Rwot me mony okobo ni, Rik an akwanyi iyi elet kun yin akwa rommi, me idok aloc a jona Icrael." 
2Samuel7:9 Abedo bedo kedi i kabedo luŋ ame ibedo wowowta iye, atyeko okworri-gu luŋ i nyimi; dok daŋ abino miyo nyiŋi rwo meicel, ame rom aroma i nyiŋ jo adito me lobo." 
2Samuel7:10 Abino yero kabedo a jona Icrael, ate miyogi bedo kuno kun mom dok oyelogi; jo moro areco daŋ mom dok bino bedo wunogi bala kite a yam con." 
2Samuel7:11 Cakere i kare ame aketo aŋolkop me loyo jona Icrael, jo a kitegi reco obedo wunogi nakanaka, cite man mom dok bi no timere i komgi; abino miyogi doŋ owe oko i kom okworgi luŋ. Medo i mannono, Rwot dok okobo ni, ebino miyo ikwai bedo adwoŋ meicel." 
2Samuel7:12 Ka kare me bedoni i lobo doŋ otum, yin ibino nywako kabedo karacel kede kwarini, an dok abino miyo wodi moro ame yin inywalo ya, te lubi; an abino moko loccere." 
2Samuel7:13 En wodi-nono bino gero ot pi nyiŋa, abino moko kom loccere bedo atwal." 
2Samuel7:14 An abino bedo pappere kun en bedo woda. Ka ce en obalo ginnoro, an abino pwode kite ame apap goo kede wode kede can ame abino keto i kome bino bedo arom aroma i can a jo keto i kom itinogi," 
2Samuel7:15 cite mom abino kwanyo mara a mom lokere i kome, kite ame rik akwanyo kede i kom Caulo, ame rik abin akwanyo i nyimi." 
2Samuel7:16 Odi kede locci bino cuŋ atek i nyima i kare luŋ; locci bino moko atwal.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Natan te kobo kop magi luŋ baŋ Daudi kede ginnoro luŋ ame onyuto baŋe. 
2Samuel7:18 Daudi doŋ te wot bedo i nyim Rwot, te kobo ni, “An kara abedo ŋa ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, jo me oda obedo ŋo, ame omio yin itiŋa malo kit man-ni?" 
2Samuel7:19 Aco kadi bed amannono, man kom pwod ginnoro atitidi moro baŋi. Ama Rwot Obaŋa; nen yin doŋ ityeko kobo kop i komjo me ot amironi, jo me kare a pwod lac ata ame tye i nyim, inyutta-gu lwagi jona ame tye i nyim, ama Rwot Obaŋa." 
2Samuel7:20 Kara ŋo me dok atwero kobo baŋi ba? Pien yin giri iŋeo amironi, Ama Rwot Obaŋa!" 
2Samuel7:21 Pien pi gin ame yin giri iciko, ame lubere kede gin oya i cunyi keni, omio yin itimo twoni jami magi adoŋodoŋo, me amironi ŋe." 
2Samuel7:22 Pi mannono ba, yin giri idwoŋ meicel, Ama Rwot Obaŋa; pien mom dok tye ŋattoro ocele a cal kedi, dok mom daŋ tye obaŋa moro ocele kono yin keken, ka oporo kede gin ame wan owinyo kede yitwa." 
2Samuel7:23 Kara rokkene dok ame tye i wi lobo ame calo joni Icrael, ame yin Obaŋa iwoto baŋgi me wot lakorogi, me gin bed joni? Yin giri imio nyiŋi orwo atek, itio twoni jami mogo adoŋodoŋo dok ame iyiliyili meicel pirgi, kun iryemo rok ocele oko i nyimgi karacel kede obaŋegi." 
2Samuel7:24 Yin giri pi mitti keni Ama Rwot, imoko joni Icrael me bedo joni atwal; eka yin ite doko Obaŋagi." 
2Samuel7:25 Doŋ ba Ama Rwot Obaŋa, aman yin doŋ myero imok atwal kop ame ikobo i kom amironi kede i kom jo me ode, eka ite timo kite ame ikobo-nono." 
2Samuel7:26 Jo gire bino medde dworo nyiŋi nakanaka kun okobo ni, ‘Rwot me momy en Obaŋa me Icrael.’ Ot amironi Daudi bino moko gire i nyimi." 
2Samuel7:27 Dok daŋ Ama Rwot me mony, Obaŋa a jo Icrael, yin giri doŋ inyutta an amironi kop man oko, kun ikobo ni, ‘Abino gero ot piri’; omio an amironi anwoŋo tek cuny me keto kwac man i nyimi." 
2Samuel7:28 Doŋ aman ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, yin giri ibedo Obaŋa, dok daŋ kop ame ikobo bedo ateni, yin doŋ iciko pi gin aber ri baŋ amironi," 
2Samuel7:29 Aman doŋ tim ber, Ama Rwot Obaŋa imi gum i ot amironi Daudi, me medde bedo atwal i nyimi; pien yin giri doŋ ikobo oko, gum ame yin imio, bino miyo gum bedo i ot amironi Daudi nakanaka.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Ame man doŋ otum oko, Daudi oloo jo Piriciti i lweny, te cako daŋ doŋ loyogi, te miyo twergi gik oko i lobo-nono." 
2Samuel8:2 Daudi dok te loyo jo Moab i lweny, en te miyogi buto piny i lobo, te pimogi kede tol, eka te neko aryo me adek oko i komgi, te weko ka acel me adek i komgi. Jo Moab te doŋ cako bedo i te loccere kun daŋ oculo ocoro baŋe." 
2Samuel8:3 Daudi dok te loyo abaka me Coba, ame nyiŋe Adadejer wot a Rekob, i kare ame en woto dwoggo loccere i ciŋe, me loyo lobo ame tye i ŋet kulo me Eufrate," 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi rik te mayo i baŋe wegi aguragura tutumia acel kede mia abiro, kede cirikale a woto i tyengi tutumia pyeraryo. Daudi te ŋoŋolo odoŋe aguragura luŋ ame onwoŋo wao gadigadi lweny, cite te weko ame romo wayo gadigadi lweny mia acel keken." 
2Samuel8:5 Kare ame jo Curia me Damaciko obino me konyo Adadejer, abaka me Coba, Daudi te neko jogi tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo." 
2Samuel8:6 Daudi rik te keto cel a mony i lobogi, iŋet Damaciko jo Curia doŋ te bedo ite loc a Daudi, kun daŋ omio ocoro baŋe. Rwot te bedo miyo Daudi loyo lobo luŋ ame en cobo mony i komgi." 
2Samuel8:7 Daudi te mayo lwak kwot apipim ame otio i jabu ame onwoŋo tye baŋ omiro abaka Adadejer, te terogi luŋ i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel8:8 Abaka Daudi daŋ omao lwak mola adwoŋ meicel i boma me Belak kede me Berotai, ame gin obedo boma ame onwoŋo tye ite loc abaka Adadejer." 
2Samuel8:9 Kare ame Toi abaka me Kamat owinyo ni Daudi oloo mony a Adadejer luŋ,"
