2Samuel8:10 en ocwao wode Yoram baŋ abaka Daudi, me wot mote, dok daŋ pwoc pi lweny loyo Adadejer oko; pien Adadejer yam onwoŋo obedo lweny gin kede Toi tyen apol meicel. Yoram te wot kun tero jami ame otio i ryal, i jabu kede mola," 
2Samuel8:11 Jami-nono luŋ Daudi te jalo baŋ Rwot, anaka ryal, kede jabu ame oya i baŋ rok ocele luŋ ame en oloo," 
2Samuel8:12 ame oya Edom, Moab, i baŋ jo Ammon, jo Piriciti, jo Amalek, karacel kede jami ame oyako i baŋ Adadejer wot a Rekob, abaka me Coba." 
2Samuel8:13 Daudi omio nyiŋe orwo. Kare ame en odwogo, oneko jo Edom tutumia apar wie aboro i luŋ me Kado." 
2Samuel8:14 Oketo cel me mony oromo lobo me Edom luŋ, jo Edom luŋ te doŋ bedo i te loccere. Rwot te bedo miyo Daudi loyo lobo luŋ ame en cobo mony i komgi." 
2Samuel8:15 Mannono te miyo Daudi loyo Icrael luŋ; obedo ŋolo kop atira kun daŋ neno ni jo luŋ otye ka tic kedgi aber. 
2Samuel8:16 Yoab wot a Ceruya onwoŋo obedo atel wi monyere; Yekocafati wot Akilud te bedo aco kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame otimere; 
2Samuel8:17 Jadok wot Akitud kede Akimelek i wot Abiatar te bedo olamdog; Ceraya te bedo arannere; 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi te bedo adwoŋ ame loo jo Keret kede jo Pelet; eka awobe a Daudi te bedo daŋ olamdog. 
2Samuel9:1 Daudi te penyo jo ni, “Tye ŋattoro ame pwod adoŋ kwo, ame obedo dano me doggola a Caulo, me wek atime kica pi Yonacan?”" 
2Samuel9:2 I kare-nono onwoŋo rik tye amiro moro ame obedo dano moro me doggola a Caulo, nyiŋe Jiba, rik ote lwoŋo dano-nono bino baŋ Daudi, abaka te penye ni, “Yin i Jiba?” En te gamo ni, “Ee adwoŋ, an ennono.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Abaka te dok penye ni, “Mom dok tye ŋattoro me doggola a Caulo ame odoŋ, me anyut kica Obaŋa baŋe?” Jiba te kobbi abaka ni, “Wot a Yonacan gire pwod tye kwo; ame obedo dano ame oŋwalo i tyene.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Abaka te dok penye ni, “Kara aman en tye kwene?” Jiba te kobbi abaka ni, “En bedo i ot a Makir wot a Ammiel, i Lo-debar.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Abaka te cwayo okwena, te wot kele oko i ot a Makir wot a Ammiel, i Lo-debar," 
2Samuel9:6 Mepibocet wot a Yonacan, wot a Caulo, te bino baŋ Daudi, te ryebere piny wore. Daudi te lwoŋe ni, “Mepibocet.” En te ye ni, “Nen, an amironi ene.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi te kobbe ni, “Kur ibed kede lworo; pien abino timi kica pi pappi Yonacan; abino dwoko potti luŋ ame yam obedo mea kwaroni Caulo baŋi; dok daŋ ibino cam keda i meja acel nino ducu.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Mepibocet te dok ryebere piny, te ko bo ni, “Kara an abedo gin aŋo, ama adwoŋŋa, an ame arom i gwok oto-ni, daŋ dok iporre paro pira?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Abaka dok te lwoŋo Jiba ame rik obedo amiro a Caulo, te kobbe ni, “Jami luŋ ame rik onwoŋo mea Caulo kede mea jo me doggola mere luŋ, amiogi luŋ baŋ adwoŋŋi Mepibocet." 
2Samuel9:10 Doŋ yin karacel kede itinoni kede omironi, ibino purre potti mere-nono; gin ame ocek i yigi ibino kelo baŋe, me wot adwoŋŋi onwoŋ ginnoro me acama; cite Mepibocet wot adwoŋŋi bino cam keda i meja acel nino ducu.” Jiba rik onwoŋo tye kede itino mere awobe apar wie abic, kede omiro mere pyeraryo nono." 
2Samuel9:11 Jiba te dokki abaka ni, “An amironi, abino tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame yin abaka ityeko cika iye.” Mannono daŋ te miyo Mepibocet bedo cam i meja abaka, acalo ŋat i akina itino abaka." 
2Samuel9:12 Mepibocet onwoŋo rik tye kede atinnere ame onwoŋo pwod tidi, ame nyiŋe Mika. Jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i ot a Jiba te doko omiro a Mepibocet." 
2Samuel9:13 Mepibocet te bedo i Jerucalem pien onwoŋo cemo i meja abaka nino ducu. En onwoŋo oŋwalo i tyene ryoryo. 
2Samuel10:1 Ame man doŋ otum oko, abaka a jo Ammon te to oko, wode Kanun te doko abaka, leyo kakare." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi te kobo ni, “An abino bedo aber wan i Kanun wot a Nakac, kite ame yam pappere daŋ obedo keda aber.” Daudi te cwayo omiro mere baŋe me wot kweyo cunye; omiro a Daudi te wot i lobo a jo Ammon." 
2Samuel10:3 Ento odoŋe a jo Ammon te kobo baŋ adwoŋgi Kanun ni, “Yin itamo ni Daudi ocwao okwena me kweyo cunyi ateni, me miyo pappi kwogo. Daudi mom ocwao omiro mere me bino roto kede ŋiŋio bomawa, me wek ema oko?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Mannono te miyo Kanun mako omiro a Daudi, te lyelo yer tikgi tun cel oko, daŋ te ŋoŋolo boŋŋigi oko i kwon dudgi, eka te doŋ cwayogi wot." 
2Samuel10:5 I kare ame kop man owinyere baŋ Daudi, en ocwao jo me wot rwatte kedgi, pien lewic onwoŋo omako omiro merenono meicel. Abaka okobbigi ni, “Koŋ doŋ ibed wunu i Jeriko, tuno waŋ ame yer tikwu olot, eka ite doŋ dwogo wunu.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Kare ame jo Ammon oneno ni nyingi doŋ ŋwe aŋwea baŋ Daudi, gin ocwao okwena me wot paŋo jo lweny me Curia ame bedo Bet-rekob kede jo Curia ame bedo Joba, ote paŋo cirikale awot i tyengi pyeraryo, abaka me Maaka kede jo mere tutumia acel, kede jo me Tob tutumia apar wie aryo." 
2Samuel10:6 Kare ame jo Ammon oneno ni nyingi doŋ ŋwe aŋwea baŋ Daudi, gin ocwao okwena me wot paŋo jo lweny me Curia ame bedo Bet-rekob kede jo Curia ame bedo Joba, ote paŋo cirikale awot i tyengi pyeraryo, abaka me Maaka kede jo mere tutumia acel, kede jo me Tob tutumia apar wie aryo." 
2Samuel10:7 Kare ame Daudi owinyo kop man, en ocwao Yoab kede monyere luŋ ame onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny." 
2Samuel10:8 Jo Ammon te dorre wot oko, ote wot ryeye i tyeŋ me lweny i nyim dogcel me donyo i boma. Aco jo Curia me Joba kede me Rekob, kede jo Tob, kede jo me Maaka onwoŋo tye gigi kengi i bar kannaler." 
2Samuel10:8 Jo Ammon te dorre wot oko, ote wot ryeye i tyeŋ me lweny i nyim dogcel me donyo i boma. Aco jo Curia me Joba kede me Rekob, kede jo Tob, kede jo me Maaka onwoŋo tye gigi kengi i bar kannaler." 
2Samuel10:9 Kare ame Yoab oneno ni mony tye i nyime kede i ŋee, en okwanyo ocirikale mogo me Icrael abeco meicel, te canogi i, nyim jo Curia." 
2Samuel10:10 Jo odoŋŋere luŋ te miyogi i ciŋ ominnere Abicai, ame te canogi i nyim jo Ammon." 
2Samuel10:11 En te kobbi ominnere ni, “Ka ce ineno ni jo Curia amito loya oko, yin myero ibin ikonya; cite ka an abino neno ni jo Ammon amito loyi oko, an abino bino me konyi." 
2Samuel10:12 Yin myero ka ibed ame cunyi nwaŋ, me onyut cowa pi rokwa kede pi boma Obaŋawa; Rwot gire myero otim gin ame en oneno ni ber baŋe.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Yoab karacel i jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe te doŋ wot anyim me wot lweny i kom jo Curia; jo Curia te mukere oko i ŋwec i nyimgi. 
2Samuel10:14 Kare ame jo Ammon oneno ni jo Curia oriŋo oko, gin daŋ ote mukere gigi oko i ŋwec i nyim Abicai, ote donyo oko iyi boma. Yoab te dwogo doŋ oko cen i ka lweny i kom jo Ammon, te wot i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Cite i kare ame jo Curia oneno ni jo Icrael oloogi oko, gin luŋ ote cokere karacel." 
2Samuel10:16 Abaka Adadejer te cwayo okwena wot kelo jo Curia ame onwoŋo tye loka i ŋe kulo Eufrate; gin rik te wot Kelam kun Cobak, atel wi mony abaka Adadejer, en ame telo nyimgi." 
2Samuel10:17 I kare ame kop man owinyere baŋ Daudi, en ocoko jo Icrael luŋ karacel, te wot ŋolo kulo Jordan, te wot Kelam. Jo Curia te canne kuno, i tyen i nyime, me lweny kede; lweny daŋ te doŋ ere oko." 
2Samuel10:18 Jo Curia te dok mukere oko i ŋwec i nyim jo Icrael; Daudi te neko jo Curia mia abiro ame riŋo i gadigadi kede wegi aguragura tutumia pyeraŋwen, te cobo daŋ Cobak, atel wi monygi oko, ame te to daŋ oko kuno." 
2Samuel10:19 Kare ame obakki luŋ ame onwoŋo tye doŋ i te loc abaka Adadejer oneno jo Icrael ologi oko, gin doŋ te cako poro kop me bedo i kuc i jo Icrael. Gin doŋ te bedo ite locgi. Mannono te miyo jo Curia bedo i lworo me medde konyo jo Ammon." 
2Samuel11:1 I kare ame oro geye agea, ame kare ame obakki maro ero iye lweny, Daudi ocawo Yoab, kun woto omiro mere, kede jo Icrael luŋ; gin te wot yako jo Ammon, ote daŋ mako boma me Rabba oko, Daudi onwoŋo odoŋ i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel11:2 I nino moro acel otyeno, i kare ame Daudi oya i kabuto mere, te bedo wowota i wi ot abaka, en obolo waŋe i wi ot kuno te neno dako moro ame onwoŋo tye alwoko kome; dako-naca onwoŋo mwonya meicel." 
2Samuel11:3 Daudi te cwayo lo moro me wot koŋ niaŋ i kom dako-nono. Lo moro te kobo ni, “Mannono gire Batceba nyaka a Eliam, dako a Uria, ame obedo dano me atekere a jo Kitti.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Daudi to oro okwena, ame te wot kwanye oko i kuno, ote kele baŋe, en te buto kede. Eka Batceba te dok tuŋe. I kare-nono dako onwoŋo pwod olwoko two dwe mere alwoka," 
2Samuel11:5 Icennere dako oniaŋ ni eyac, en te cwayo kop baŋ Daudi ni yie tye." 
2Samuel11:6 Daudi te cwayo kop baŋ Yoab ni, “Koŋ icwal Uria me Kitti bin baŋa.” Yoab daŋ te cwayo Uria baŋ Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Kare ame Uria obino baŋe, Daudi open ye ka ce Yoab tye aber, kede karacel kede kite ame lwak tye kede, kede kite ame lweny tye ka wot kede." 
2Samuel11:8 En doŋ te kobbi Uria, ni “Koŋ iwot iwe paco tuŋi.” Uria daŋ te ya oko lot abaka. Daudi te cwayo mot lubo yore." 
2Samuel11:9 Cite Uria gire te buta i doggola me ot abaka kun buto karacel omiro adwoŋŋere luŋ; mom naka gire te tuno tuŋe. 
2Samuel11:10 Kare ame okobbi Daudi ni, “Uria gire mom owoto tuŋe.” Daudi okobbi Uria ni, “Koŋ inen yin pwod idwogo adwoga i kannabor; piŋo kara mom iwoto tuŋi?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria te kobbi Daudi ni, “Jo Icrael kede jo Juda tye teŋe i lweny, kun canduk a Rwot daŋ tye baŋgi kuno; adwoŋŋa Yoab kede omiro mere tye ka buta oko i bar; kara atwero wot nino tuŋa, ate wot cam, mate, kun abuto daŋ kede cega? Kite ame itye kede kwo-ni, dok kwoni daŋ pwod tye-ni, mom abino timo kodi tim man.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Daudi te kobbi Uria ni, “Tin koŋ doŋ ibed kan iwe iye, eka diki ate bino cwayi dok cen.” Uria te ri i Jerucalem i nino-nono kede orwo mere." 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi olwoŋe, te wot cem kede, te pite daŋ i koŋo atek, cite en gire odok i kabuto mere baŋ omiro abaka; mom gire owoto tuŋe." 
2Samuel11:14 Odiko mere, Daudi te coyo waraga baŋ Yoab, te miyo Uria tero." 
2Samuel11:15 Kop ame en ocoo iyi waraga ene: “Ket Uria kan ame lweny tye alyet iye, eka yin ite dwogo giri oko cen me cobe neke oko.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Doŋ i kare ame Yoab tye ka guro boma, en te keto Uria kan ame en niaŋ ni okwor iye tek i lweny." 
2Samuel11:17 Jo me boma-nono te kato lweny i kom Yoab, ote neko omiro a Daudi mogo oko; Uria ame obedo dano me Kitti daŋ ote neko oko." 
2Samuel11:18 Yoab te cwayi Daudi kop kun titte kite ame lweny owoto kede; 
2Samuel11:19 en okobbi akwena ame en ocwao ni, “Ka doŋ ityeko titti abaka kop ducu i kom lweny," 
2Samuel11:20 ka ce abaka yie owaŋ te penyi ni, ‘Piŋo kara omio iwoto wunu ceggi acega i boma me wot lweny iye? Wun onwoŋo mom iŋeo wunu ni gin twero celowu i wi cel malo?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ŋa ame rik obin oneko Abimeleki wot a Jerubecet? Mom dako moro keken en a rik obao twon anya kidi moro adit i wi cel malo te cele kede, ame te miyo en to i Tebej? Piŋo kara omio wun iwoto wunu aceggi acega i cel?’ Yin myero doŋ ikobbe ni, ‘Amironi Uria, dano me Kitti, daŋ oto oko’.”" 
2Samuel11:22 Akwena-nono doŋ te wot titti Daudi kop ducu ame Yoab ore kede. 
2Samuel11:23 Akwena te kobbi Daudi ni, “Okwor olwenyo i komwa atek meicel, gin obino i komwa i dye bar, wan dok ote dwokogi i ŋwec naka i dogcelgi." 
2Samuel11:24 I kuno wegi atero te cako cecelo omironi kun obao aterogi i wi cel malo; mannono te miyo neko omironi mogo oko; amironi Uria daŋ ote neko oko.” 
2Samuel11:25 Daudi te kobbi akwena ni, “Myero iwot ikobbi Yoab ni, ‘Kur dok ibed paro gin ame otimere-nono, pien pala lweny gire mom yero, poto tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, yin myero imedde lweny i kom boma-nono, tuno waŋ ame imao oko.’ Cukoro cunye ba.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Kare ame dako a Uria owinyo ni cware doŋ oneko oko, en okoko cware." 
2Samuel11:27 Ame en doŋ otyeko kare mere me kwero cola, Daudi te cwayo okwena, te wot kele doŋ i ode, te doŋ doko dako mere; dako-nono te nywale atin awobi. Cite gin ame onwoŋo Daudi otimo-nono mom oyomoro cuny Rwot." 
2Samuel12:1 Rwot rik te cwayo Natan baŋ Daudi. Natan obino baŋe te kobbe ni, “Yam tye jo moro aryo ame gin luŋ bedo i boma acel, acel onwoŋo alonyo, acel onwoŋo acan." 
2Samuel12:2 Alonyo onwoŋo tye kede lwak rommi, dyegi kede dok apipim;" 
2Samuel12:3 cite acan onwoŋo mom tye kede ginnoro, kono ka akale romo keken, ame onwoŋo daŋ en owilo awila. En owilo te kelo tuŋe, te pito doŋo i ciŋe kun bedo karacel itino mere. Romo mere-nono onwoŋo camo ŋid cammere, mato pii i kopo mere, buto-gu i kore; onwoŋo doŋ tye acalo nyare." 
2Samuel12:4 I kare moro welo moro te coro alonyo, alonyo mom te ye kwanyo lee moro i akina limmere me tedo welo mere; akaka mege en dok te wot omo romo acan-ca, en ame te neki welo mere.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Akemo te mako Daudi meicel i kom dano ame okobo kop i komenono, en te kobbi Natan ni, “Kite ame Rwot tye kede kwo-ni, kodi dano ame otimo timmono porre to!" 
2Samuel12:6 En myero cul waŋ gin ame etero-nono tyen aŋwen twal, pien otimo kittono kun kica mom daŋ mako.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Natan te kobbi Daudi, ni “Yin ibedo dano-nono. Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, ‘An ayeri me bedo abaka ame loo Icrael, alari i ciŋ Caulo;" 
2Samuel12:8 an ate lunyo miyi ot adwoŋŋi i ciŋi, mon adwoŋŋi daŋ amiogi luŋ baŋi, ate daŋ miyo jo Icrael kede jo Juda. Ka ce man onwoŋo pwod nok anoka baŋi onwoŋo pwod dok atwero meddi en apol a rom mannono." 
2Samuel12:9 Piŋo kara yin doŋ icao kop a Rwot, ite timo tim arac i nyime? Koŋ inen yin ineko Uria dano me Kitti, i pala lweny, yin ite tero dako mere bedo cegi, kun yin imio pala lweny a jo Ammon oneke oko." 
2Samuel12:10 Nen ba, aman pala romo mom doŋ bino rwenyo i odi, pien yin icaa, ikwanyo dako a Uria, dano me Kitti, me bedo cegi.’" 
2Samuel12:11 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, abino doŋ miyo timmogo areco bino i komi kun amio ya gire i odi; abino kwanyo monni oko i baŋi kun yin daŋ ineno, ate lunyo miyo baŋ awotti, en bino buto kede monni i waŋ ceŋ." 
2Samuel12:12 Pien yin rik itimo man imun, cite an abino miyo man timere iwaŋ cen i nyim jo Icrael luŋ.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Daudi te kobbi Natan ni, “An doŋ atyeko timo bal i kom Rwot.” Natan te kobbi Daudi ni, “Rwot doŋ otyeko jwayo balli oko; mom doŋ ibino to." 
2Samuel12:14 Kadi bed amannono, pi tim man ame yin itimo, ame cimo atira ni yin doŋ icao giri Rwot oko, atin ame onywalo-nono bino to oko.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Natan te wot gire oko tuŋe. Rwot te goyo atin ame dako a Uria onywalo baŋ Daudi, two te mako oko." 
2Samuel12:16 Daudi te bedo bako doge baŋ Rwot pi atinnono, te kanyo kec; odonyo icika mere te wot buto piny i dye ot naka piny oru." 
2Samuel12:17 Adwoŋ ame loo ode obino te cuŋ i laŋete kun mito ni en ya malo; cite mom otwerre, naka en daŋ mom ocamo ginnoro karacel kedgi." 
2Samuel12:18 I nino me abiro mere, atin te doŋ to oko. Omiro a Daudi te bedo kede lworo me titte ni atin doŋ otyeko to oko; pien gin onwoŋo okobo ni, “Koŋ inen i kare ame atin onwoŋo pwod kwo, wan okobo kede, cite mom oye winyo kopwa; kara wan dok otwero kobbe nino ni atin doŋ oto oko? Naka mio en twero timo ginnoro arac i kome kene.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Kare ame Daudi oneno ni omiro mere tye amuŋo kengi kengi, en oniaŋ ni atin doŋ oto oko; en te penyo omiro mere ni, “Atin doŋ otyeko to oko?” Gin te gamo ni, “Oto oko.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Daudi doŋ te ya oko malo i dye ot, te lwoko kome, wiro kede moo, te loko ruk onwoŋo tye i kome oko. En oya te wot i ot a Rwot, te wore; oya i kuno te wot doŋ atira naka i ode. En openyo cem, ote miye camo." 
2Samuel12:21 Omiro mere te penye ni, “Man dok kodi gin aŋo ame yin itimo nie? Ikoko atin kun ikanyo kec i kare ame en pwod tye kwo, cite i kare ame atin oto, yin ite ya malo cako cem.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Daudi te kobo ni, “Kare ame onwoŋo atin pwod kwo, akoke kun daŋ akanyo kec; pien onwoŋo akobo ni, ‘Ŋa kara aŋeo ka Rwot onwoŋo mom twero tima kica, te weko atin bedo kwo?’" 
2Samuel12:23 Cite aman en doŋ oto oko; ŋo ame omio dok amedde kanyo kec? Atwero dok miyo en dwogo cen? An en ame abino lube kuno, cite en mom dok bino dwogo cen baŋa.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Daudi te doŋ cako kweyo cuny dako mere Batceba; en odonyo baŋe, te wot buto kede; Batceba te nywalo atin awobi, Daudi te cako nyiŋe Culeman, Rwot te bedo kede mar i kom atinnono." 
2Samuel12:25 Rwot te cwayo kop baŋ adwarpiny Natan, te wot cako nyiŋ atinnono ni Jedidia, pien Rwot omare." 
2Samuel12:26 I kare-nono Yoab te bedo lweny i kom Rabba, ame en boma a jo Ammon, en te mayo boma adwoŋ ame abakagi onwoŋo bedo iye." 
2Samuel12:27 Yoab te cwayo kwena baŋ Daudi kun kobo ni, “Atyeko lweny i kom Rabba, amao daŋ boma me pii oko," 
2Samuel12:28 Yin myero doŋ icok jo ame odoŋ luŋ karacel, me ibin igur boma-nono, imak oko; naka mio an en ame amako boma-nono, ote doŋ lwoŋo kede nyiŋa.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Mannono te miyo Daudi coko lwakkere, te wot i Rabba, te wot lweny i kome, mako oko." 
2Samuel12:30 En te kwanyo tok kwogo abakagi me jabu oko i wie; pekkere onwoŋo romo ratili mia acel; gweŋŋoro me wel onwoŋo tye i yie. Tokkono ote keto i wi Daudi. Daudi te daŋ kelo jami ame oyako i boma-nono adwoŋ meicel. 
2Samuel12:31 Dok te daŋ kelo jo me kuno, te ketogi i tic, kun otio kede ocumeno, cururu me nyonyo, lee me nyonyo, dok daŋ otio tic atek me goyo matafali. Daudi obedo timo kittono i kom boma a jo Ammon luŋ. En doŋ te dwogo cen i Jerucalem karacel kede lwakkere." 
2Samuel13:1 Abicalom wot a Daudi onwoŋo rik tye kede aminnere ame mwonya meicel, nyiŋe Tamali; wot a Daudi ocele a nyiŋe Amunon rik te cako bedo kede mit i kome." 
2Samuel13:2 Mit adwoŋ meicel ame onwoŋo en tye kede i kom aminnere Tamali omio en oŋoye oko i kabuto ni kome lit; pien Tamali onwoŋo rik mom ru oŋeye kede lo moro, ame mio buto kede bedo tek meicel baŋ Amunon." 
2Samuel13:3 Cite Amunon onwoŋo rik tye kede awottere ame nyiŋe Jonadab, wot a Cimea, ame obedo omin a Daudi. Jonadab onwoŋo obedo lo moro ame ryek meicel." 
2Samuel13:4 En openyo Amunon ni, “Ama wot abaka piŋo kara yin nino ducu odiko, inen calo dano a kome mom yot? Piŋo kara mom ikobba?” Amunon te kobbe ni, “Mit en ame odia i kom Tamali, ame obedo amin ominna Abicalom.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadab te kobbe ni, “Yin myero ibut oko piny i wi tandani ite bedo acalo ŋat a kome lit; doŋ ka pappi obino, me bino neni, yin myero ikobbe ni, ‘Mi aminna Tamali bin mia ogati moro me acama, en bin yik cammono baŋa kan, ate camo kun en omako i ciŋe." 
2Samuel13:6 Amunon te daŋ buta piny, te bedo acalo ŋat a kome lit. Kare ame abaka obino me nene, Amunon okwao pappere ni, “Tim ber imi aminna Tamali bin teda capattoro baŋa kan, me acam kun en mako i ciŋe.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Daudi te cwayo kop baŋ Tamali kun kobo ni, “Wot i ot ominni Amunon, iwot iyike ginnoro me acama kuno.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Mannono te miyo Tamali daŋ te wot naka i ot ominnere Amunon, kan ame onwoŋo en obuto iye. Tamali te juko moko, te tedo kede capat baŋe kuno. En otedo ogati," 
2Samuel13:9 te toko tero baŋe, cite en gire te kwero camo oko. Amunon te kobbe ni, “Koŋ imi jo luŋ ya oko i baŋa, owot oko.” Jo daŋ te ya gigi oko i baŋe." 
2Samuel13:10 Amunon te doŋ kobbi Tamali ni, “Aco kella doŋ cam tyelo kan, me acam kun yin imako i ciŋi.” Tamali te tero capat ame etedonono naka iyi cika tyelo baŋ ominnere Amunon." 
2Samuel13:11 Cite i kare ame en doŋ okelo baŋe aceggi, me en cam, Amunon oyoro ciŋe te kobbe ni, “Biye, abut kedi aminna.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamali te kobbe ni, “Pe amannono ominna, kur imaka tetek; pien kodi tim man mom gire timere iyi Icrael. Kur itim tim me miŋe-ni ba ominna.”" 
2Samuel13:13 Kara an abino yeyo kodi lewicci adok kede tuŋ kwene ba? Nen, yin daŋ ibino bedo ŋat acel i akina omiŋo ame tye i Icrael. Tim ber ipeny abaka pira, aniaŋ ni en gire bino miya baŋi.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:14 Cite Amunon mom oye winyo koppere kadi acel; kite acalo en onwoŋo tek kato Tamali oko, omake tetek, te buto kede." 
2Samuel13:15 Amunon dok te cako doŋ dago Tamali atek meicel; kite ame en odage kede kato kite ame onwoŋo en rik koŋ okwoŋo mare kede oko. Amunon te kobo ni, “Aco doŋ cuny ya, iwot oko.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Cite Tamali te gamo ni, “Pe amannono ominna; pien tim man arac, me cwaya oko tetek, rac kato en ame doŋ itimo oko i koma.” Cite Amunon mom oye winyo koppere kadi acel." 
2Samuel13:17 En olwoŋo awobi mere ame onwoŋo tio baŋe, te kobbe ni, “Cwa dako-ni i nyima teŋe, ite cego doggola oko.”" 
2Samuel13:18 I kare-nono onwoŋo en oruko twon gomici moro abor naka piny kun daŋ bade boco, pien mannono en kit ruk a rik anyira abaka a mom ru oŋeye kede co ruko. Mannono daŋ te miyo amiro Amunon cwaye oko, te cego doggola oko." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamali te juko wie kede buru, te yeyeco ruk i kome oko, okwako wie, te wot kun akoko." 
2Samuel13:20 Ominnere Abicalom te penye ni, “Ominni Amunon ce obuto kedi? Aco doŋ lin giri, aminna; en obedo ominni; kur doŋ ibed i parroro i gin a en otimo.” Mannono te miyo Tamali bedo kene aboŋo cware i ot ominnere Abicalom." 
2Samuel13:21 Kare ame abaka Daudi owinyo kop magi ducu, akemo omako meicel." 
2Samuel13:22 Cite Abicalom mom te kobo kopporo baŋ Amunon, kadi aber onyo arac; pien Abicalom onwoŋo doŋ ocako dago ominnere Amunon pi buto aminnere Tamali tetek." 
2Samuel13:23 Kare ame mwaka aryo doŋ okato, Abicalom obedo i jo ame mworo yer i kom rommi i Baal-kajor, ame ceggi kede Epraim; en olwoŋo awobe abaka luŋ me wot kuno." 
2Samuel13:24 Abicalom owoto baŋ abaka, te wot kobbe ni, “Nen ba adwoŋ, an amironi atye kede omwor yer rommina. Tim ber, yin abaka karacel kede omironi, ibin wunu kuno.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Cite abaka te kobbe ni, “Pe amannono atinna, ka wan luŋ owoto, obino miyi peko.” Abicalom te medo diye atek, cite en mom te ye wot, ento te lunyo lamme ka winyo." 
2Samuel13:26 Abicalom te dok medo kwayo ni, “Tim ber, ka yin mom iwot, imi ominna Amunon doŋ wot kedwa.” Abaka te penye ni, “Kara omio yin imito ni en wot kedwu kono?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Cite Abicalom te medo diye, omio en te miyo Amunon kede awobe abaka luŋ wot karacel kede." 
2Samuel13:28 Abicalom te ciko omiro mere ni, “Nenu ka Amunon omato koŋo ame cunye doŋ yom; ka akobbiwu ni, ‘Cobe wunu’, kur ilwor wunu, neke wunu oko; wun ti wunu gin ame aciko. Di wunu cunywu, bed wunu atek.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Omiro Abicalom te timo Amunon kite ame Abicalom ocikogi kede. Awobe abaka luŋ te ya oko malo, ŋat acel acel te yito i wi kana mere ŋwec oko." 
2Samuel13:30 Ame gin mom ru otuno paco, kop te tuno baŋ Daudi oko, ni “Abicalom oneko awobe abaka luŋ, ame moro i akinagi mom obwot.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Abaka oya malo, te yeyeoo ruk i ko me oko, te buto piny i lobo; awobe mere ame onwoŋo tye baŋe kuno, te daŋ yeyeco ruk i komgi oko." 
2Samuel13:32 Cite Jonadab, wot a Cimea ame obedo ominna Daudi, te kobo ni, “Adwoŋŋa myero kur tam ni doŋ otyeko neko awobe mere luŋ, pien Amunon gire keken en ame oto. Man en gin ame onwoŋo Abicalom oyiko con, cakere i kare ame Amunon obuto aminnere Tamali tetek." 
2Samuel13:33 Doŋ ba, adwoŋŋa abaka, myero kur dok ibed paro ni awobe ni luŋ doŋ oto oko; pien Amunon gire kene en ame oto.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Abicalom te ŋwec gire oko. Awobi ame onwoŋo tye akuro piny te tiŋo waŋe malo, te neno jo apol meicel tye aciro abino i tutuŋ yo ame woto Koronaim, ame tye i ŋet kidi." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadab te kobbi abaka ni, “Gin ame amironi okobo, ocobere gire oko, awobeni obino doŋ oko.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Oyotoyot ame en doŋ otyeko kop, awobe abaka te tuno oko; gin luŋ ote mwoco koko oko. Abaka karacel kede omiro mere luŋ te daŋ kok atek meicel." 
2Samuel13:37 Abicalom te riŋo naka baŋ Talmai wot Amikud, ame abaka me Gecur, Daudi te bedo kumo pi wode pi kare alac meicel." 
2Samuel13:38 Mannono kite ame Abicalom oriŋo kede i Gecur, te wot bedo kuno pi mwakki ame romo adek." 
2Samuel13:39 Icennere abaka te cako bedo kede mit me wot baŋ wode Abicalom; pien cunye onwoŋo doŋ okwe oko pi Amunon, kite ame onwoŋo doŋ oto kede oko-ni." 
2Samuel14:1 Yoab wot a Jeruya rik te niaŋ oko ni abaka doŋ ocako paro pi Abicalom. 
2Samuel14:2 Yoab te cwayo kwena i Tekoa, ote wot kelo dako moro i kuno ame onwoŋo ryek atek, en te kobbe ni, “Por bedo acalo dano moro ame tye i twon kumo moro adwoŋ meicel, ruk boŋo me cola i komi; kur daŋ iwirre kede moo moro. Myero ibed kom acalo dako moro ame okumo pi dano mere oto pi kare alac meicel." 
2Samuel14:3 Wot kittono i nyim abaka, iwot ikobbe kit man.” Yoab doŋ te cako porre kop ame emito ni en wot kobbi." 
2Samuel14:4 Kare ame dako me Tekoa-nono owoto baŋ abaka, en oryebere, te buto piny aryeba cuny i nyim abaka, te woro abaka, kun kobbe ni, “Konya ba, Ama abaka.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Abaka te penye ni, “Peko aŋo ame itye kede?” En te gamo ni, “An abedo dako to, adwoŋŋa, cwara oto oko." 
2Samuel14:6 Nen ba, an onwoŋo atye kede awobe aryo, doŋ nino moro acel gin te cako da kengi i poto, kun ŋattoro ame dwekgi mom tye; aŋat acel te goyo awottere neko oko." 
2Samuel14:7 Aman dok wattina luŋ owiro wigi i koma kun okobba ni, ‘Miwa wodi ame oneko ominnere ca me wan daŋ oneke oko pi kwo ominnere ame en oneko’. Aco mannono bino miyo gin oneko ŋat a kono le jami oko, ame en doŋ tol acel keken ame alego kede; cwara daŋ te doŋ nono aboŋo nyiŋe, akadi ŋattoro mere moro ame odoŋ i wi lobo.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Abaka te kobbi dako-nono ni, “Aco yin doŋ dok giri paco tuŋi, an abino cwayo cik ame mako kop i komi.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Dako me Tekoa-nono te dok kobbi abaka ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa, abaka, bal me ginnoro luŋ ame ibino timo, myero bed gire i wia kede i wi jo me doggola a pappa; balloro myero gire kur gud abaka kede kom me loccere.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Abaka te gamo ni, “Ka ce ŋattoro otemo yelli, myero ikelle baŋa: abino miyo caco kakari atwal.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Dakonono dok te kobo ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa, abaka, tim ber ikwon i nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋani, me wek lo aculo kwor meremo owek doŋ culo kwor kede remo, me kur nek woda.” Abaka te gamo ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kwo-ni, yer acelloro keken i wi atinni mom bino poto piny.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Dako te dok kobo ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa, abaka, tima ber doŋ akobbi kopporo acel keken.” Daudi te gamo ni, “Aco kobbi.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Dako-nono te kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, kara piŋo yin dok ibedo kede tam me timo kodi timono i kom jo a Rwot? Pien kop ame ikobonono, mio abaka ŋolo kop i kome kene, ka ce abaka mom twero ye ŋat ame en oryemo dwogo paco." 
2Samuel14:14 Wan luŋ gire obino to oko, wan orom aroma kede pii ame ony piny, ame mom dok romo twomere, cite Obaŋa gire mom bino kwanyo kwo a ŋat ame yenyo yo, me wek dano ame oryemo kur bed ŋat ame oryemo atwal." 
2Samuel14:15 Doŋ ba, adwoŋŋa, an abino me kobo kop man baŋi, pien jo obedo miya bedo ŋat a lwor; an aŋecani ate tamo ni myero abin atit kop man baŋi, gwok onyo itwero ye timo gin ame akwai iye." 
2Samuel14:16 Pien abaka bino winyo, te lara i ciŋ ŋat ame mito nekowa oko, an kede woda, me ekwanywa oko i lobo ame Obaŋawa omio baŋ jo mere me bedo megi." 
2Samuel14:17 An amironi, onwoŋo atamo ni kop ame yin adwoŋŋa ibino kobo, bino miya awe; pien yin irom aroma kede amalaika Obaŋa, ipoko gin arac kede gin aber. Rwot Obaŋani, ogwoki, obed kedi!”" 
2Samuel14:18 Abaka te kobbi dako-nono ni, “Tim ber ikob kop ateni i kop ame apenyi iye-ni.” Dako te gamo ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa abaka, penya?”" 
2Samuel14:19 Abaka te penye ni, “Yoab daŋ oribere kedi i kop man ducu?” En te gamo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, abaka, kite ame itye kede kwo-ni, an mom dok atwero witi kop i kom kop ame ipenyo. Amironi Yoab en ame okobo gin ame myero abin ati kede gin ame myero akobbi." 
2Samuel14:20 Amironi Yoab otimo man wek ekel alokaloka i kop ame otimere. Cite ryeko adwoŋŋa rom aroma i ryeko amalaika Obaŋa, en ŋeo jami luŋ ame timere i wi lobo.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Abaka doŋ te kobbi Yoab ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ aye timo gin ame imito. Wot iom atin Abicalom idwogo paco.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Yoab te ryebere buta piny, aryeba cuny, te woro abaka, te daŋ lamme winyo. Yoab te kobo ni, “Tin doŋ amironi oŋeo ni ipwoe, pien iye winyo kwaccere.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Yoab te doŋ ya wot naka i Gecur, te wot kelo Abicalom i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel14:24 Abaka te kobo ni, “En myero koŋ bed kene i ode; en myero kur bin i nyima.” Mannono te miyo Abicalom bedo i ode en kene, mom daŋ te wot i nyim abaka." 
2Samuel14:25 I kare-nono onwoŋo mom tye ŋattoro iyi Icrael luŋ ame opwoo ni kome ber a kato kom Abicalom; Abicalom onwoŋo ber odoco, geye kom i tyene tuno kede anaka i wie malo." 
2Samuel14:26 Ka ce abaka en a rik olyelo yer wie, en pimo i mijan kun tio i kidi ame abaka omoko ni ti kede; doŋ rik ka onwoŋo yer wie olot atek ame wonnere daŋ winyo ni pek, ka opimo, pekkere romo ratili abic. En rik lyelo wie iyi agikki mwaka acel acel." 
2Samuel14:27 En onwoŋo tye awobe adek kede nyako acel ame nyiŋe Tamali. Tamali daŋ rik onwoŋo twon nyako moro aber meicel. 
2Samuel14:28 Abicalom rik te bedo mwaka aryo twal kun mom tuno i nyim abaka kadi acel. 
2Samuel14:29 Icennere en te cwayo kwena baŋ Yoab, me wot tere i nyim abaka, cite Yoab mom gire te bino baŋe. En dok te medo cwayo kop tyen me aryo, cite Yoab mom daŋ dok te bino." 
2Samuel14:30 Abicalom doŋ te kobbi omiro mere ni, “Wot iwaŋ wunu poto a Yoab oko, pien tye gire ceggi acega kede mega, aman cayiri tye iye.” Omiro mere te daŋ wot wawaŋo poto-nono oko." 
2Samuel14:31 Yoab te wot baŋ Abicalom, te donyo naka baŋe i ot, eka te penye ni, “Piŋo kara omironi owaŋo potona?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abicalom te gamo doge ni, “Koŋ inen, an abedo cwayo kwena baŋi ni myero ibin baŋa kan me acwai baŋ abaka iwot ipenye ni, ‘Ŋo kara omio an aya i Gecur oko ate bino kan? Mom onwoŋo gire twero bedo ber an rik ibedo kuno.’ ” Abicalom dok te medo ni, “Aman doŋ amito ni imia awot i nyim abaka; ka ce balloro tye i koma, en myero neka oko.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Mannono te miyo Yoab wot baŋ abaka te wot titte koppono, abaka te lwoŋo Abicalom. Abicalom te bino baŋ abaka, te ryebere piny i nyime, abaka te mote kun noto leme." 
2Samuel15:1 A doŋ man okato, Abicalom te nwoŋo gadigadi mere kede aguragura mere ame en ikome loo, kede ocirikale pyerabic ame woto kede kun telo yo." 
2Samuel15:2 I kare-naca en te bedo ya kare luŋ idiko con woto cuŋ i ŋet yo i dogcel me boma. Ka ce dano moro obino ame mito wot neno abaka pi tero kop me pyemmere moro i nyime, Abicalom lwoŋo dano-nono te penye ni, “Yin kara iya i paco mene?” Dano-nono te kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, an aya i akina jo Icrael, iyi atekere a ŋadi.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Abicalom kobbe ni, “Nen ba, kokoni tye kakare, cite mom tye ŋattoro ame abaka oketo me winyo koppi.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abicalom dok te medo kop ni, “Kono kom onwoŋo an aŋol kop a jo Icrael! Kono jo ame tye i koko onyo pido i kom owotegi bino bota, an kono aŋolo kop a jo atira.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Doŋ kare i kare ka ce dano moro obino te ryebere i nyime, en cwalo ciŋe, make, te mote kun noto leme." 
2Samuel15:6 En te bedo timo amannono baŋ jo luŋ ame bino baŋ abaka ni bin ŋol kopgi; mannono omio en oloo tam a jo apol me Icrael. 
2Samuel15:7 Kare ame doŋ mwaka aŋwen okato oko, Abicalom okwao abaka ni, “Ti ma ber iweka awot acob kwoŋŋa ame yam akwoŋo baŋ Rwot, i Kebron." 
2Samuel15:8 Pien i kare ame a tye i Gecur i Aram, rik abin akwoŋo ni, ‘Ka ce Rwot bino miya adok cen i Jerucalem, an abino woro Rwot’.”" 
2Samuel15:9 Abaka te kobbe ni, “Apee wot giri kede kuc.” En te ya wot naka i Kebron." 
2Samuel15:10 Cite Abicalom te cwayo kwena i muŋ i akina atekere luŋ me Icrael kun kobbigi ni, “Ka ce iwinyo wunu apel okok, wun myero ikob wunu ni, ‘Abicalom doŋ odoko abaka oko i Kebron.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 En rik te wot i Kebron i jo mia aryo ame en olwoŋo i Jerucalem me wot bedo acalo wele mere; jo-nono onwoŋo mom otye kede tammoro ocele, daŋ onwoŋo mom otye kede ŋeccoro i kom gin a timere." 
2Samuel15:12 I kare ame Abicalom onwoŋo tye ka miyo mottere me yalo Obaŋa, en ocwao kwena i Gilo, wot lwoŋo Akitopel, ame obedo ami-tam a Daudi, ame en dano me Gilo. Yik me mayo loc a Daudi te bedo medde doko atek meicel kun wel jo Abicalom medde ameda." 
2Samuel15:13 Dano moro te kelli Daudi kop kun kobbe ni, “Aman tam a jo luŋ doŋ tye i kom Abicalom.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Daudi te kobbi omiro mere luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe i Jerucalem ni, “Ya wunu, me oŋwec, olwi wunu oko; naka mio yo moro bino loyowa oko me bwot i ciŋ Abicalom; ru wot wunu oyotoyot, naka mio en bino makowa i waŋayo, te timo gin arac i komwa, eka te rweyo jo i boma oko i pala lweny.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Omiro abaka te kobbe ni, “Nen ba, omironi doŋ tye ame oyikere oko me tiyo gin ame abaka bino moko.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Abaka doŋ te ya oko, kun woto karacel kede jo me ode luŋ. En oweko monnere ame aŋeca tomon, me gwoko paco." 
2Samuel15:17 Abaka te wot kun jo luŋ lubo yore; gin te wot cuŋ koŋ i ot me agikki. 
2Samuel15:18 Omiro mere luŋ te kato kun obeo i ŋete; jo Keret kede jo Pelet luŋ, kede jo mia abicel, ame gin luŋ obedo jo ame oya i turgi Gat te lube, gin daŋ ote kato anyim i nyim abaka." 
2Samuel15:19 Abaka te penyo Ittai, dano me Gat ni, “Piŋo kara yin daŋ iwot kedwa? Yin dok cen iwot ibed wun abaka, pien yin giri arok, dok daŋ yin ariŋ ayela ame oŋweco aŋweca i lobo mere." 
2Samuel15:20 Yin pwod en ibino aworo awora ora-ni, ŋo ame mio yin dok icako loŋo piny keda kun daŋ an mom aŋeo kan ame awot iye? Yin dok cen, ter daŋ omegoni, Rwot myero nyut marrere a mom lokere kede gennere i komi.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Cite Ittai te kobbi abaka ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kede kwo-ni, dok yin adwoŋŋa, abaka, daŋ itye kwo-ni, kan ame yin adwoŋŋa, abaka bino bedo iye, ka ito onyo ikwo, an amironi daŋ abino bedo kuno.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Daudi te kobbi Ittai ni, “Aco doŋ wot ikat anyim.” Ittai dano me Gat te kato anyim karacel kede jo mere luŋ anaka itinogi kede mongi." 
2Samuel15:23 Jo luŋ te mwoco koko oko i dwon aloŋo i kare ame jo a Daudi ciro bea baŋgi, abaka te wot ŋolo luŋ me Kidron, jo luŋ te ciro kato tutuŋ tim." 
2Samuel15:24 Abiatar obino, Jadok daŋ dok te bino, kun bino karacel jo Levi ame odyelo canduk me cikere Obaŋa; gin te cibo canduk cikere Obaŋa piny, tuno ka jo luŋ doŋ oya oko i boma." 
2Samuel15:25 Abaka te kobbi Jadok ni, “Dwok canduk me cikere Obaŋa cen i boma. Ka ce Rwot opwoa, en pwod dok bino miya adwogo cen, ate dok neno naka kan ame en bedo iye." 
2Samuel15:26 Cite ka en okobo ni, An doŋ cunya mom yom i komi, nen ba, an gira doŋ ene, en gire myero tim i koma gin ame en oneno ni ber baŋe.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Abaka te dok kobbi Jadok alamdog ni, “Aco yin doŋ dok cen kede kuc, yin kede Abiatar, karacel kede itino awobewu aryo, wodi Akimac, kede Yonacan wot Abiatar." 
2Samuel15:28 Nen ba, an pwod abino wot bedo i dog kulo ame tye i ŋet tim, kun akuro kop i baŋwu.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Mannono te miyo Jadok kede Abiatar dyelo canduk Obaŋa dwoko cen naka i Jerucalem; gin daŋ doŋ te bedo kuno. 
2Samuel15:30 Cite Daudi te wot malo i wi kidi me Jeituni kun kok, tyene nono, dok daŋ owumo wie oko. Jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye baŋe te daŋ wumo wigi oko, ote medde i wotgi kun gin luŋ okoko." 
2Samuel15:31 Eka ote miyo Daudi ŋeyo ni Akitopel daŋ onwoŋo tye i akina jo ame oyiko kop i kome kede Abicalom. Daudi te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, tim ber ilok ryeko ame Akitopel mio odok ŋat amiŋo.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Kare ame Daudi otuno i wi kidi kan ame oworo iye Obaŋa, nen ba, Kucai dano me Arki te bino rwatte kede kun oyeyeco boŋo i kome oko, onyo kwoyo i wie," 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi te kobo ni, “Ka ce imedde wot keda, ibino doko twon yeccoro apek meicel baŋa." 
2Samuel15:34 Ento ka idok cen i boma, ite wot kobbi Abicalom ni, ‘An doŋ abino bedo gira amironi kite ame rik koŋ abedo kede amiro a pappi, aman doŋ an megi, mannono bi no miyo ilo tam Akitopel pira.’" 
2Samuel15:35 Jadok kede Abiatar ame gin olamdog biŋo nwoŋo tye kuno. Yin myero itittigi ginnoro luŋ ame iwinyo i paco abaka. 
2Samuel15:36 Nen ba, itinogi awobe aryo daŋ tye baŋgi kuno, Akimac wot a Jadok kede Yonacan wot Abiatar; itwero oro awobe-nono me kela kop ducu ame iwinyo.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Mannono te miyo Kucai ame obedo awot a Daudi bino i boma i kare ame Abicalom onwoŋo doŋ adonyo i Jerucalem. 
2Samuel16:1 Kare ame Daudi pwod okato wi kidi anonok, Jiba ame obedo amiro a Mepibocet orwatte kede kun tye kede kane aryo ame otweo kome me bedo i komgi kun oyeo ogati ame romo mia aryo, etak olok otwo mia acel, nyig yen mia acel kede ocoe me koŋo olok acel." 
2Samuel16:2 Abaka Daudi te penye ni, “Kara ikelo magi luŋ me ŋo ba?” Jiba te gamo ni, “Kane akelo me wot a jo me ot abaka, aco ogati kede nyig yen akelo me acama awobe kede koŋo me amata a jo ame ol oko i tim.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Abaka te kobo ni, “Kara doŋ Mecibocet akwar adwomŋ Caulo kono tye kwene?” Jiba te gamo ni, “En odoŋ i Jerucalem, pien tye atamo ni tin doŋ jo Icrael bino dwoko loc a kwaro mere Caulo i ciŋe.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Abaka te kobbi Jiba ni, “Nen ba, ginnoro luŋ ame yam mea Mepibocet aman doŋ megi.” Jiba te gamo ni, “An gira abedo amironi, berra myero medde nen i nyim, adwoŋŋa.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Kare ame abaka Daudi otuno i Bakurim, wat a Caulo moro ame nyiŋe Cemei, wot a Gera, obino me bino rwatte kede, kun tye aceno Daudi acena." 
2Samuel16:6 En te bedo babao-gu Daudi kede omiro mere i gweŋe. Aco kono i caa-nono onwoŋo daŋ jo a Daudi luŋ tye; jo mere atek i lweny daŋ onwoŋo tye ogurre dyere. 
2Samuel16:7 Cemei obedo cene kun kobo ni, “Wot teŋe lo-ni, wot teŋe lo-ni, yin aony remo a jo, yin lo a konyi pe-ni!" 
2Samuel16:8 Rwot doŋ oculo kwor meremo a jo ot a Caulo luŋ i komi, yin ŋat ame ileo loccere. Rwot aman doŋ otyeko miyo locci oko i ciŋ wodi Abicalom. Can doŋ i wii giri, pi bedo onyo remo a jo.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Abicai wot a Jeruya te kobbi abaka ni, “Adwoŋŋa, piŋo kara ibedo weko gwokkoro oto oko-ni abedo ceni? Wek awot baŋe kuno me awot aŋol nute oko,”" 
2Samuel16:10 Cite abaka Daudi te kobo ni, “Ilaro wunu kara ŋo keda wun itino a Jeruya? Ka ce en tye acena pien Rwot en okobbe ni myero en cena, na doŋ ame twero penye ni, ‘Piŋo kara itye itimo kittono?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Daudi dok te kobbi Abicai kede omiro mere luŋ ni, “Koŋ inen wunu ka woda ame an anywalo mito neka; kara doŋ dano-ni ame obedo dano me Benjamin-ni kono? Weke wunu gire, wek en medde i ticcere me cena, pien Rwot en okobo ni en cena." 
2Samuel16:12 Gwok onyo Rwot bino neno can ame atye kede te miya gummoro ya akaka cen ame ocena kede tin-ni.” 
2Samuel16:13 Daudi kede jo mere te medde gigi i wotgi. Cemei daŋ te bedo lubogi kun en beo i kor kidi, ame aceno Daudi, ababaogi i gweŋe dok daŋ kikiro apua tuŋ baŋgi." 
2Samuel16:14 Abaka Daudi karacel kede jo a rik tye baŋe te tuno i Jordan kun doŋ ool atek; gin te weo koŋ kuno. 
2Samuel16:15 Abicalom karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te wot kede i Jerucalem kun Akitopel daŋ tye karacel kedgi. 
2Samuel16:16 Kare ame Kucai awot a Daudi ame egeno atek, ame en dano me Arki, obino baŋ Abicalom, en okobbi Abicalom ni, “Kom abaka bed ayot! Kom abaka bed ayot!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abicalom te penye ni, “Man en kite ame yin igeno kede awotti Daudi? Kara pi ŋo mom iwoto wun awotti?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Kucai te gamo ni, “Pe gire amannono. An atye pi ŋat ame Rwot oyero, ame jo man oyero, dok ame jo Icrael luŋ oyero. An abedo me a dano-nono kun abedo baŋe." 
2Samuel16:19 Dok yin itamo ni myero an dok ati baŋ na? Mom myero an ati baŋ wode? Kite ame abedo tic kede baŋ pappi, abino daŋ tic baŋi kittono.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Abicalom doŋ te penyo Akitepel ni, “Koŋ doŋ imia tammi. Itamo ni myero wan otim gin aŋo?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Akitopel te kobbi Abicalom ni, “Wot ibut i mon a pappi ame oweko me gwoko paco; mannono bino miyo jo Icrael luŋ winyo ni yin doŋ idoko akwor a pappi ateteni, mannono bino miyo jo a lubi medde bedo i tekcuny.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Gin doŋ te guro kema pi Abicalom oko i wi ot abaka. Abicalom te doŋ cako buto i mon a pappere kun jo luŋ aneno. 
2Samuel16:23 I kare-naca onwoŋo tam ame Akitopel mio, olubo aluba acalo tam ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa. Daudi kede wode Abicalom obedo lubo amannono." 
2Samuel17:1 Akitopel te dok kobbi abaka ni, “Wek ayer jo tutumia apar wie aryo dyewor-ri, me awot aryem yo Daudi iwor amanni." 
2Samuel17:2 Abino tuno baŋe nwoŋo en pwod ool dok wie daŋ pwod ocuŋ oko. Lworo bino babaŋo en oko, eka jo mere luŋ te ŋwec oko. An doŋ abino neko ka abaka keken," 
2Samuel17:3 ate dwogo jo mere luŋ baŋi bala atera ame otero baŋ cware. Dano acel keken ame yin imito neko, jo doŋ te bedo gire kede kuc.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Tammere-nono te yomoro cuny Abicalom kede odoŋe luŋ me Icrael. 
2Samuel17:5 Abicalom te kobo ni, “Koŋ dok ilwoŋ wunu Kucai dano me Arki, me owiny wunu dok koppere.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Kare ame Kucai otuno, Abicelom okobbe ni, “Man en tam ame Akitopel omiowa, itamo ni myero oti kede? Aco ka pe ber, yin kobbi.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Kucai te kobbi Abicalom ni, “Tam ame tin Akitopel omio-ni mom ber.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Te dok medde kobo ni, “Yin iŋeo aber ni pappi kede jo ame tye baŋe ca, gin obedo jo ame tek meicel i lweny, dok daŋ gin obedo jo ager calo ŋuu ame omako itino mere tim. Dok pappi en ŋat a tye i ŋec adwoŋ meicel i kom lweny; en mom twero buto karacel i lwak dyewor." 
2Samuel17:9 Aman ca en doŋ tye opono oko i burroro onyo i kabedo moro apat. Doŋ ba, ka ce Daudi bino neko jo moro i lweny me agege, ŋat ame bino winyo keken, bino kobo ni, ‘Oneko jo Abicalom.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Man bino miyo kadi ŋat atek i lweny, ame cunye ocwiny calo cuny eŋato, bino doko ŋat ame lwor; pien jo Icrael luŋ ŋeo ni pappi obedo twon lo moro atek meicel, dok jo ame tye baŋe obedo jo atek i lweny." 
2Samuel17:11 Doŋ tam ame an amio ene, ni myero jo Icrael luŋ, cakere i Dan naka i Beer-ceba cokere baŋi, kun doŋ opol acalo kwoyo me dog nam, dok myero yin ikomi iwot kedgi i lweny." 
2Samuel17:12 Mannono bino miyo wan onwoŋo Daudi kannoro keken ame en tye iye, wan ote corre i kome karacel calo toyo ame corre piny i lobo. Mannono bino miyo en karacel kede jo luŋ ame tye baŋe, moro mom bino bwot." 
2Samuel17:13 Ka ce en odonyo i boma moro, jo Icrael bino kelo toli, ote wayo kede cel me bomanono reto piny kun mom oweko gweŋŋoro acel doŋ kuno.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abicalom karacel kede jo Icrael ducu te kobo ni, “Tam a Kucai ber kato me Akitopel oko.” Pien Rwot onwoŋo omoko oko ni mom obino lubo tam aber ame Akitopel omio, me Rwot mi Abicalom en a luny poto i can." 
2Samuel17:15 Abicai te kobbi Jadok kede Abiatar, ame gin luŋ obedo olamdog, ni, “Akitopel omio tam baŋ Abicalom kede baŋ odoŋe me Icrael kit man, ento an amio tamma kit man.”" 
2Samuel17:16 Aman wun doŋ myero icwal wunu kwena oyot baŋ Daudi kun ikobbe wunu ni, “Tin myero kur ibut i dog kulo tunŋi, myero ikanyakino idokoro tuŋ ca; me kur nek abaka oko karacel kede jo luŋ ame tye baŋe!”" 
2Samuel17:17 Yonacan kede Akimac onwoŋo obedo i En-rogel kun okuro kop, pien gin onwoŋo otye i lworo ni kur myero nengi ka odonyo i boma. Atin nyako moro onwoŋo tye ame bedo tero kop baŋgi, eka gin te wot titti Daudi." 
2Samuel17:18 Awobi moro rik te nenogi oko, te wot titti Abicalom. Man omio gin aryo luŋ ote ru lwi, yutte oyotoyot, ote wot i ot a lo moro ame tye i Bakurim. Dano-nono onwoŋo tye kede bur pii i dyekallere, gin te wot lutte iyi bur piinono." 
2Samuel17:19 Dako a lonnono te wot kwanyo awum wi pii te wot wumo i wi bur pii oko, te moyo kal iye, ame ŋattoro mom romo neno." 
2Samuel17:20 Kare ame omiro Abicalom obino i ottono, gin openyo dako ni, “Akimac kede Yonacan kono?” Dako te gamo ni, “Jonnono odokoro loka tuŋ ca oko.” Kare ame gin oyenyogi kwe, gin odok cen i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Kare ame gin doŋ odok oko, Yonacan-gi te doŋ yitto oko iyi akoŋ, ote wot tito kop luŋ baŋ Daudi. Gin otitte gin ame onwoŋo Akitopel oyiko me timo i kome kun kobbe ni, “Ru ya oko iwot iŋol kulo idokoro tuŋ ca, pien Akitopel otyeko miyo tam kit man.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Daudi kede jo mere te doŋ cako ŋolo kulo Jordan. I kare ame piny ru onwoŋo gin luŋ doŋ odokoro tuŋ ca oko. 
2Samuel17:23 Kare ame Akitopel oneno ni mom olubo tammere, otweo kom bedo i kom kana mere, te ya dok oko tuŋe, i boma me turgi. I kare ame en doŋ otyeko yiko jami mere ducu aber, odeye, te to daŋ oko. Rik ote yike i lyel a pappere." 
2Samuel17:24 I kare ame Abicalom karacel kede jo mere tye aŋolo kulo Jordan, onwoŋo Daudi otuno oko i Makanaim." 
2Samuel17:25 I kare-nono onwoŋo Abicalom oketo Amaca obedo atel mony akaka Yoab. Amaca onwoŋo obedo wot a lo moro ame nyiŋe Itra, dano me Icmael, ame onwoŋo onyomo Abigal nyaka a Nakac, am in a Jeruia, totta Yoab." 
2Samuel17:26 Jo Icrael kede Abicalom te wot guro gonygi lobo Gilead. 
2Samuel17:27 Kare ame Daudi doŋ otuno i Makanaim, Cobi wot a Nakac, ame onwoŋo oya i boma me Rabba, i lobo a jo Ammon, kede Makir wot a Ammiel ame onwoŋo oya i Lo-debar, kede Barjillai dano me Gilead, ame onwoŋo oya i Rogelim." 
2Samuel17:28 Gin okelo gi-buto, wali lwok, kede guli; ote kelo daŋ giacama; ŋano, cayiri, moko bel ocelo, oraŋa, ŋor," 
2Samuel17:29 moo kic, cak awac, rommi, kede cak dyaŋ opoto. Gin onwoŋo oŋeo ni Daudi kede jo mere kec bino neko, oryo pii bino cirogi dok obino ol iwot i tim." 
2Samuel18:1 Abaka Daudi rik te kelo jo mere luŋ karacel, te popokogi i dul apapat, en ame tye iye jo tutumia kede en ame tye iye jo mia, kun keto daŋ otelgi." 
2Samuel18:2 En omio acel me adek obedo i te loc a Yoab, acel me adek i te loc Abicai wot a Jeruia omin a Yoab, kede acel me adek i te loc Ittai me Gat. Abaka te kobo baŋ lwak ni, “An daŋ abino wot kedwu.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Cite lwak te gamo ni, “Yin gire mom ibino wot. Ka ce wan oriŋo onyo gin oneko nucu jowa, oko, gin gire mom bino paro wok. Yin irom kede jo tutumia apar ame tye i akinawa. Pi mannono ba, yin myero idoŋ i boma kan, kun icwalliwa ka kony.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Abaka te kobbigi ni, “An abino timo gin ame wun ineno wunu ni ber.” Daudi doŋ te cuŋ i ŋet dogcel kun monnyere ciro kato mia mia kede tutumia tutumia." 
2Samuel18:5 En te ciko Yoab kede Abicai kede Ittai ni, “Amito i tim wunu ber pira, kur itim wunu ginnoro i kom woda Abicalom.” Jo luŋ owinyo kare ame Daudi ci ko otel magi luŋ pi Abicalom." 
2Samuel18:6 Mony a Daudi te doŋ ciro wot i tim me wot lweny i kom jo Icrael. Gin te lweny kedgi i buŋ me Epraim. 
2Samuel18:7 Mony a Daudi te loyo jo Icrael oko kuno. Lweny obedo arac meicel i nino-nono, oneko iye jo ame romo tutumia pyeraryo twal." 
2Samuel18:8 Lweny onwoŋo olal oromo lobo-nono luŋ. Jo ame buŋ en oneko obedo adwoŋ akato jo ame oneko i pala lweny. 
2Samuel18:9 Abicalom te rwatte atura i jo a Daudi. En onwoŋo tye i wi kana mere, kana mere te coro te kworo ame oculle acula, wi Abicalom te moko oko i akina jaŋ kworo, te doŋ kannono kun alyero alyera i dye yamo ata. Kana ame onwoŋo obedo i wie-ni omedde mere kede ŋwec anyim." 
2Samuel18:10 Dano moro onene te titti Yoab ni, “Aneno Abicalom kun tye alyero alyera i akina jaŋ kworo kuca.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Yoab te gamo kop a danonono, kun penye ni, “Ikop nino? Inene ateteni? Piŋo mom ilebo alyer ireto piny? Yomcunnyere kono omio ami cekel me ryal apar kede del tweyo pyer.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Cite dano-nono te gamo ni, “Kadi bed onwoŋo imia cekel me ryal tutumia, onwoŋo mom aromo ryeyo ciŋa i kom wot abaka. Wan luŋ onwoŋo owinyo ka abaka cikowu wun luŋ, yin kede Abicai kede Ittai ni, ‘Tim wunu ber pira, kur itim wunu ginnoro i kom woda Abicalom.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Kono onwoŋo an akwero bedo i woro i gin abaka ociko, ate neko Abicalom, abaka kono owinyo koppere oko; pien mom tye ginnoro ame mom abaka winyo. Yin ikomi kono iteno ciŋi iye oko.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Yoab te kobo ni, “Kop kedi abalo kare-nono.” Yoab te kwanyo toŋi adek, te tutuco kede etao Abicalom. Abicalom onwoŋo tye alyero i akina jaŋ kworo kun pwod kwo." 
2Samuel18:15 Awobe apar ame onwoŋo mako jami lwenye a Yoab te cokere i kom Abicalom dopo gigi oko. 
2Samuel18:16 Yoab doŋ te kuto apel me juko monnyere, gin doŋ te dwoggo oko cen i ryemo yo jo Icrael." 
2Samuel18:17 Gin okwanyo kom Abicalom ote bolo i burroro atut, ame onwoŋo tye i buŋ, ote coko gweŋe yido i kome. Jo Icrael luŋ te ŋwec oko, kun ŋat acel acel dok paco mere." 
2Samuel18:18 I kare ame Abicalom pwod kwo, en onwoŋo ogero ginnoro ame ocuŋ calo pagi me po pire i luŋ ame olwoŋo ni Luŋ abaka, pien onwoŋo en okobo ni, “An mom atye kede woda moro ame twero miyo jo medde poyo nyiŋa.” En te cako nyiŋ pagi me po pire-nono kede nyiŋe, omio naka atot tin pwod olwoŋo pagi mere-nono ni Abicalom." 
2Samuel18:19 Akimac wot a Jadok te kobbi Yoab ni, “Wek ariŋ ater kop man aber-ri baŋ abaka, me awot akobbe ni Rwot doŋ olarre oko i ciŋ okworrere.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Yoab te gamo ni, “Pe gire; tin mom ibino tero kopporo baŋ abaka. Ibino tero nino ocele, cite mom tin, pien wot abaka oto oko.”" 
2Samuel18:21 En Yoab te kobbi amiro mere ame onwoŋo obedo dano me Eciopia ni, “Yin wot ikobbi abaka gin ame ineno otimere.” Dano-nono te ryebere piny i nyime, te cako ŋwec oko." 
2Samuel18:22 Akimac wot a Jadok te dok medo penyo Yoab ni, “Gin atimere myero timere, ye wek an daŋ ariŋ alub dano ca.” Yoab te kobbe ni, “Piŋo kara cunyi apupuka meicel me wot atinna. Nen ba, mom tye mottoro ame ibino nwoŋo iye.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Akimac dok te medo kobo ni, “Gin a timere myero gire timere, an myero awotti.” Yoab te doŋ kobbe ni, “Aco ŋweci.” En te cako ŋwec oko kun lubo yo bar ame dok i luŋ me Jordan, en te lanyo dano me Eciopia oko i ŋwec." 
2Samuel18:24 Ame Akima otuno, onwoŋo Daudi tye obedo piny i dyere me dogcel ame woto i boma, i dyere me dogcel i yie kede en i oko mere. Akurpiny onwoŋo tye malo i wi ot ame tye i wi apama me dogcel. Akurpiny te tiŋo waŋe neno dano moro ame tye ariŋo en kede iyo." 
2Samuel18:25 Akurpiny olwoŋo abaka te kobbi abaka. Abaka te ko bo ni, “Ka en tye kene, tye amut ame en okelo.” Akimac te medde anyim ame doŋ ceggi acega i boma." 
2Samuel18:26 Akurpiny te dok neno dano ocele kun daŋ tye ariŋo en kene, en te redo baŋ ŋat akuro dogcel kun kobbe ni, “Neno koŋ dano ocele dok tye ariŋo en kene.” Abaka Daudi te gamo ni, “Mannono daŋ tye kede amut ame en okelo.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Akurpiny te kobo ni, “Lo otelo yo ca ŋweco bala Akimac wot a Jadok.” Abaka te kobo ni, “Akimac dano aber, en okelo amut aber.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Akimac te redo kun kobbi abaka ni, “Jami ducu owoto aber.” En te ryebere piny i nyim abaka kun nyime gudo lobo, te kobo ni, “Pwoo Rwot Obaŋani, ame omio yin abaka iloo jo ame onwoŋo ojem i komi.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Abaka Daudi te penye ni, “Woda Abicalom tye aber?” Akimac te kobo ni, “Kare ame Yoab ora an amironi, awinyo twon wo adwoŋ meicel, cite mom aŋeo ŋo ame otimere.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Abaka te kobbe ni, “Aco koŋ doŋ bin icuŋ kan.” En te wot cuŋ kan ame onyutte." 
2Samuel18:31 Dano me Eciopia te tuno, en te kobo ni, “An akelo amut aber baŋ adwoŋŋa abaka! Rwot tin doŋ otyeko lari oko i ciŋ jo luŋ ame onwoŋo ojem i komi.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Abaka te penyo dano me Eciopia ni, “Woda Abicalom tye aber?” Dano me Eciopia-nono te gamo ni, “Kono gin ame otimere i kom Abicalom timere i kom okworri luŋ kede jo luŋ ame jem i komi.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Cuny abaka te poto ni luc; te ya yitto oko malo iyi icika ot ame tye i wi apama i dogcel malo, te wot kok kuno. Kare ame en tye akok, okobo ni, “Oidoi, ama woda Abicalom! Woda Abicalom doi! Kono onwoŋo an en alunyo to akaka woda! Woda Abicalom doi!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Yoab rik te winyo ni abaka Daudi tye akoko wode Abicalom, kun kumo atek meicel pire." 
2Samuel19:2 Man omio i nino-nono yomcuny me locgi olokere odoko kumo baŋ mony a Daudi luŋ, pien lwak onwoŋo owinyo ni abaka tye akoko wode." 
2Samuel19:3 Jo te libere aliba me dok i boma, kun olibere acalo jo ame olwi alwia i lweny." 
2Samuel19:4 Abaka owumo wie oko te kok i dwon aloŋo ni, “Oidoi, woda doi! Ama woda Abicalom! Ama woda Abicalom!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Yoab te wot donyo i ot baŋ abaka te kobbe ni, “Tin imio lewic omako omironi luŋ ame olaro kwoni, kede kwo itinoni awobe kede anyira, karacel kede kwo a monni ducu." 
2Samuel19:6 Yin kare imaro jo ame dagi, ite lunyo dago jo ame mari. Man tin doŋ inyuto giri kannaler ni odoŋe kede omironi luŋ mom kara iparo giri pirgi kadi acel. Aneno oko ni kono woki Abicalom tye kwo kun wan luŋ oto, kono cunyi yom a mom kobere." 
2Samuel19:7 Doŋ aman ba, myero iwot idwoggo cuny joni, ikob kedi i kica. Ka ce yin mom iwoto, an akwoŋo akwoŋa i nyiŋ Rwot ni, diki odiko, dano moro acel i akina jo-ni mom dok bino nwoŋo tye baŋi. Man doŋ bino bedo twon cannoro adwoŋ meicel ame bino timere i komi ame kato kit cannoro luŋ a yam otimere i komi cakere i kare me tinoni tuno kede naka tin.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Abaka te ya wot bedo i ŋet dogcel me boma. Jo mere luŋ te winyo ni en onwoŋo tye obedo i dogcel, gin luŋ ote, bino baŋe kuno. Jo Icrael onwoŋo oriŋo gigi oko luŋ, kun ŋat acel acel dok paco mere." 
2Samuel19:9 Atekere me Icrael luŋ onwoŋo doŋ ocako laro kop kengi kengi i kabedo ducu kun okobo ni, “Abaka Daudi en ame rik olarowa i ciŋ okworwa. En a daŋ rik olarowa i ciŋ jo Piriciti. Aco aman en oriŋo oko i lobowa pi riŋo Abicalom." 
2Samuel19:10 Dok en Abicalom ame rik wan owiro kede moo ni bed abakawa, otyeko neko oko i lweny. Kara doŋ aman ŋo ame geŋowa poro kop me dwoggo abaka Daudi?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Gin ame jo Icrael obedo laro i akinagi te winyere baŋ abaka Daudi; omio en te cwayo kop baŋ olamdog, Jadok kede Abiatar kun kobbigi ni, “Kobbi wunu odoŋe a jo Juda ni, Piŋo kara wun idoŋ wunu cen me timo ginnoro me dwoggo abaka cen i ode? Aco kop a jo Icrael be doŋ otyeko tuno oko baŋ abaka." 
2Samuel19:12 Wun en ibedo wunu wat abaka aceggi, wun ibedo wunu cogo mere kede riŋo kome ame inywako wunu remo; piŋo kara wun en ame dok idoŋ wunu cen me dwoko abaka cen?”" 
2Samuel19:13 Daudi te tittigi daŋ me kobbi Amaca ni, “Yin mom ibedo wat abaka ame inywako wunu kede remo? En okwoŋo akwoŋa ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋa mere myero mi ginnoro timere i koma ka ce mom eketi ibedo a lo mony akaka Yoab.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Abaka Daudi rik te loyo tam a jo Juda luŋ, gin luŋ ote bedo i cuny acel. Lwak luŋ te doŋ cwayo kop baŋ abaka kun okobo ni, “Dwog giri oŋ, yin karacel kede omironi luŋ.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Mannono te miyo abaka cako dwogo cen naka i Jordan, jo Juda ame oya i Gilgal te wot rwatte kede kuno. Gin onwoŋo obino me bino omo abaka dwoko cen naka loka Jordan." 
2Samuel19:16 I kare acellono daŋ, Cemei wot a Gera, ame obedo dano me Benjamin, ame oya i Bakurim, owoto oyotoyot karacel i jo Juda i Jordan me wot rwatte abaka Daudi." 
2Samuel19:17 En obino i jo Benjamin ame romo tutumia acel. Jiba ame obedo amiro a jo me ot a Caulo, obino daŋ awobe mere apar wie abic kede omiro mere pyeraryo; gin luŋ oyutte oyotoyot, ote wot i Jordan naka i nyim Daudi." 
2Samuel19:18 Gin oŋolo kulo Jordan i kan acecep, me wot omo jo abaka, kede pi tiyo ginnoro luŋ ame abaka bino mito ni gin oti. I kare ame abaka rik doŋ onwoŋo tye ayikere me ŋolo kulo Jordan, Cemei wot a Gera owoto te wot rette i nyime." 
2Samuel19:19 En te kobbi abaka ni, “Timma ber adwoŋŋa, kur ikan balla i cunyi, kur daŋ ipo i ginnoro luŋ ame atimo arac i komi i kare ame iya i Jerucalem. Kur ikangi luŋ i cunyi, ama adwoŋŋa." 
2Samuel19:20 An aniaŋ ni atimo bal, man en gin omio tin an en ageo bino baŋi me bino joli i akina jo luŋ me ot a Yucepu.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Abicai wot a Jeruya te gamo ni, “Cimei gire myero nek oko, pien en rik oceno ŋat ame Rwot oyero.”" 
2Samuel19:22 Cite Daudi te kobo ni, “Alaro kara ŋo kedwu ba, wun itino a Jeruya, ame omio tin idoko wunu calo okworra-ni? Tin myero dok nek dano me Icrael? Pien an mom ru aŋeo bo ni an doŋ tin abaka me Icrael?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Abaka Daudi te doŋ kobbi Cimei ni, “Yin gire mom ibino to.” En te kwon akwoŋa baŋ Cemei me moko koppere." 
2Samuel19:24 Mepibocet, akwar Caulo te daŋ bino me bino jolo abaka. En obino kun mom olwoko tyene, oweko yer tike iyak ata mom daŋ olwoko boŋŋi mere, cakere i kare ame abaka Daudi oriŋo iye tuno ka en odwogo cen i kuc." 
2Samuel19:25 Doŋ i kare ame en oya i Jerucalem me bino rwatte abaka, abaka openye ni, “Mepibocet we! Kara piŋo rik mom iwoto keda?”" 
2Samuel19:26 En te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, kite ame iŋeo kede ni an amironi an aŋwalo, amirona en obola i mac. An akobbe ni, ‘Tweya kom i wi kana, me ayit i wi kana awot wan abaka.’" 
2Samuel19:27 En okobo kop me goba i koma i nyimi, yin adwoŋŋa, aco kun yin icalo amalaika Obaŋa baŋa. Yin giri myero doŋ itim gin ame yin ineno ni ber." 
2Samuel19:28 Pien jo me ot a pappa luŋ onwoŋo myero yin abaka inek luŋ, cite yin dok ilunyo keta an i akina jo ame cemo i mejani. An mom dok atye kede ginnoro ocele ame myero ayik kede nyiŋa baŋi yin abaka.”" 
2Samuel19:29 Abaka Daudi te gamo ni, “Piŋo pwod dok imedde titta kop i komi? An doŋ atyeko moko oko ni, yin kede Jiba, ibino poko wunu potti a Caulo ame tye luŋ i akinawu.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mepibocet te gamo ni, “Wek en gire ter luŋ, kite ame yin doŋ ityeko dwogo oko paco i kuc-ci.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Barijillai dano me Gilead daŋ obino kun oya i Rogelin me bino omo abaka tero loka Jordan. 
2Samuel19:32 Barjillai rik doŋ onwoŋo twon lo moro ame oti meicel, mwaka me dittere onwoŋo doŋ tye pyeraboro. I kare ame abaka onwoŋo tye i Makanaim, en omio abaka cam, pien en rik obedo twon lo moro ame alonyo meicel." 
2Samuel19:33 Abaka okobbe ni, “Biye iwot keda i Jerucalem, an abino wot gwoki tuŋa kuno.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Cite Barjillai te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, kara pwod dok adoŋ i mwaka adi me bedo kwo, ame mio dok awoto kedi i Jerucalem?" 
2Samuel19:35 Mwaka me ditta doŋ oromo pyeraboro twal, mom doŋ tye ginnoro ame twero kayo leba. Ginnoro luŋ ame acamo onyo amato, moro mom tye ame kao leba. Winyo wer a jo wero daŋ doŋ loa-gu oko. Mom myero dok awot kuno me wot miyi peko nono." 
2Samuel19:36 An abino Iwoki anonok keken, ateri loka Jordan. Ŋo kara ame mio yin dok iromo cula kede twon mot ame rom mannono." 
2Samuel19:37 Tim ber iwek an adok paco me awot ato iŋet lyel a pappa kede mea totta. Nen, amirona Kiman ene; itwero wot kede, me iwot itim baŋe gin ame yin ineno ni ber.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Abaka Daudi te gamo ni, “Kimam bi no wot loka karacel keda; abiŋo timo baŋe gin ame yin ineno ni ber. Dok daŋ ginnoro keken ame yin imito ni atim piri, abino timo.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Daudi kede jo mere luŋ te ŋolo kulo Jordan. En te moto Barjillai kun noto leme, te lamme gum. Barjillai te doŋ dok tuŋe," 
2Samuel19:40 Abaka te wot naka Gilgal kun Kimam doŋ woto karacel kede; jo Juda luŋ karacel kede nucu a jo Icrael otere naka kuno. 
2Samuel19:41 Jo Icrael luŋ te wot baŋ abaka Daudi, ote kobbe ni, “Adwoŋ, kara piŋo omio omegowa ame gin jo Juda, okwali ote ŋolo kedi kulo Jordan, yin karacel kede jo me odi kede joni luŋ?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Jo me Juda te gamo ni, “Wan otimo mannono, pien abaka obedo watwa ame ceggi meicel. Piŋo kara omio akemo omakowu i kop man? En owilliwa cam bo, onyo ca omiowa mottoro?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Jo Icrael dok te gamo ni, “I kom abaka wan otye i dul aromo apar twal, i kom Daudi daŋ wan giwa oloowu oko. Piŋo kara omio wun icaowa wunu? Wan mom en arik ocako poro kop me dwogo abakawa paco?” Cite kop a jo Juda te bedo agwa akato kop a jo Icrael." 
2Samuel20:1 Lo moro ame rik kite rac rik onwoŋo tye kuno, ame nyiŋe Ceba. En rik onwoŋo obedo wot a Bikri dano me atekere a Benjamin. En rik te ero kuto apellere kun redo kede ni, “Wan giwa mom otye kede dulloro ame obedo megwa i kom Daudi. Wan giwa mom obino notte itimo ginnoro pi wot a Yece! Ŋat acel acel myero dok gire i kema mere, wun jo Icrael!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Mannono te miyo jo Icrael luŋ weko Daudi oko, ote wot gigi oko kun olubo Ceba wot a Bikri. Cite jo Juda omedde lubo abakagi aboŋo alokaloka moro i cunygi, cakere i Jordan tuno naka i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Daudi te dok i paco mere i Jerucalem. En te kwanyo mon apar ame rik eweko me kuro paco, te terogi i ottoro ame ogwoko agwoka. En te wekogi bedo kuno pi kare me kwogi luŋ calo mon ame coggi oto kun pokkigi cam kede jami ame gin mito, cite mom omedo buto kedgi acalo monne." 
2Samuel20:4 Abaka Daudi te kobbi Amaca ni, “Lwon jo Juda bin baŋa kan kun nino adek mom ru okato, yin daŋ myero ibed tye i akinagi.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amaca te wot lwoŋogi; te gal kuno kun mom ogwoko kare ame rik abaka ociko. 
2Samuel20:6 Daudi te kobbi Abicai ni, “Ceba wot a Bikri bino yelowa atek akato Abicalom. Yin myero iru kwanyo omirona iryem kede yorgi, me en kur nwoŋ boma moro ame ocelo atek, ame te miyo en bedo yelowa.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Mannono te miyo Yoab, jo Keret, jo Pelet ked jo luŋ ame rik tek i lweny lubo Abicai. Gin oya i Jerucalem, ote ryemo yo Ceba, wot a Bikri." 
2Samuel20:8 I kare ame gin doŋ otuno i gwen adwoŋ ame tye i Gibeon, Amaca orwatte kedgi. I caa-nono onwoŋo Yoab oruko boŋo me mony ame otweo i del, kun pala lwennyere iyi akure tye i pyere. Kare ame en onwoŋo tye ka wot, pala lwenyere te poto oko i pyere." 
2Samuel20:9 En Yoab te moto Amaca kun penye ni, “Itye aber ominna?” Yoab te mako yer tik Amaca kede ciŋe tuŋ cem me enot leme." 
2Samuel20:10 Cite Amaca onwoŋo mom oneno pala lweny ame onwoŋo Yoab omako i ciŋe. Yoab te cobo yie, cin yie te wukere oko. Amaca te to oko kun mom dok omedo cobe iryo. Yoab kede ominnere Abicai te doŋ ryemo yo Ceba." 
2Samuel20:11 Dano acel i akina jo a Yoab ocuŋ i ŋet kom Amaca te kobo ni, “Ŋat a tye pi Yoab kede Daudi myero lub Yoab.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Kom Amaca onwoŋo obuto i ŋet yo kun apwodde i remo mere. Doŋ jo luŋ ame rik beo kannono, ka oneno kome, cuŋ koŋ oko. Dano a Yoab ka oneno ni jo luŋ ame neno kom Amaca cuŋ oko, otiŋe oko i ŋet yo, te tere teŋe i bar; en te wumo kome oko kede boŋo." 
2Samuel20:13 Kare ame doŋ otyeko kwanyo kome oko i ŋet yo, jo luŋ doŋ te lubo Yoab kun oryemo yo Ceba wot a Bikri." 
2Samuel20:14 Ceba onwoŋo obeo ocoro dye lobo atekere me Icrael luŋ, te tuno naka i Abel ame tye i ŋet Bet-maaka. Jo a Bikri luŋ ocokere karacel ote lube." 
2Samuel20:15 Jo a Yoab otuno kuno te wot guro boma me Abel ame tye i ŋet Bet-maaka, ame onwoŋo Ceba tye iye; gin te cako toro lobo i kom cel me boma-nono kun ocoro kede apama cel boma-nono me mukere oko," 
2Samuel20:16 Dako moro aryek te cako redo i boma kun kobo ni, “Koŋ iwiny wunu koppa ba! Winy wunu koppa ba! Kobbi wunu Yoab kato kan me abin akob kede koŋ.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Yoab te wot, baŋe. En te penyo Yoab ni, “Yin ennono Yoab?” Yoab te gamo ni, “An ennono.” Te kobbe ni, “Koŋ iwiny koppa an aŋecani ba.” Yoab te gamo ni, “An atye awinyo.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Dako-nono te kobo ni, “Tye caro kopporo acon ame jo rik tio kede ame kobo ni, ‘Koŋ wot peny iyi Abel’; mannono rik te miyo jo poro kop te tum aber." 
2Samuel20:19 Bomawa-ni obedo boma adwoŋ mecel, en boma ame kuc dwoŋ iye atek dok daŋ genne iyi Icrael; aco koŋ inen ka yin imito boma ame en totta a jo Icrael. Ŋo kara ame omio imito balo lobo a Rwot?”" 
2Samuel20:20 Yoab te gamo ni, “Mannono gire gin ame mom aromo timo. An gira mom atye kede tammoro me balo boma kadi lobo man." 
2Samuel20:21 Mannono gire mom kop ateni kadi acel. Cite ba, tye lo moro ame oya i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim ame nyiŋe Ceba, wot a Bikri en onwoŋo ocako jem i kom abaka Daudi. Wun myero imi wunu dano man baŋa me aya gira oko i boma man.” Dako-nono te kobbi Yoab ni, “Nen ba, wan obino bayo wi danono no baŋi kuno, beo iwi cel malo.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Dako-nu te bebea i akina lwak luŋ i tyeko mere. Gin te ŋolo ŋut Ceba wot a Bikri oko, ote bayo wie i wi cel malo, naka baŋ Yoab. Yoab te kuto apel oko, jo luŋ te ya oko i boma-nono, kun ŋat acel acel dok paco mere. Yoab te dok cen i Jerucalem baŋ abaka Daudi." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoab onwoŋo obedo atel wi mony luŋ me Icrael; Benaya wot a Yekoyadi te bedo adwoŋ ame loo jo Keret kede jo Pelet. 
2Samuel20:24 Aduram te bedo a loo tic awak. Yekocafati wot Akilud te bedo aco kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame otimere. 
2Samuel20:25 Ceva te bedo arannere. Jadok kede Abiatar te bedo olamdog; 
2Samuel20:26 kede lo moro me a jo Yair, a nyiŋe Ira, en daŋ onwoŋo obedo alamdog a Daudi." 
2Samuel21:1 I kare ame Daudi tye i loc kec obedo tye pi mwakki adek twal ame okolle akola. Mannono rik te miyo Daudi penyo Rwot pire. Rwot te kobbe ni, “Bal me onyo remo tye i wi Caulo kede jo me ode, pien gin oneko jo Gibeon.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Mannono te miyo abaka Daudi lwoŋo jo Gibeon. Jo Gibeon onwoŋo rik mom obedo jo Icrael, cite gin onwoŋo obedo jo Amor odoŋŋege ame jo Icrael rik onwoŋo ocikere me mom timo ginnoro i komgi. Cite Caulo pi mittere adwoŋ me gwoko jo Icrael kede Juda omio onekogi oko," 
2Samuel21:3 Daudi okobbi jo Gibeon ni, “Gin aŋo amyero atim pirwu? Abino culo kwor meremo i yore aŋo, me ilam wunu gum i kom jo a Rwot?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Jo Gibeon te gamo ni, “Kop ame tye i akinawa kede Caulo onyo kede jo ode mom obedo gin amito ryal onyo jabu, dok daŋ wan mom myero onek dano moro me Icrael.” Daudi dok te penyogi ni, “Kara doŋ imito wunu ni atim gin aŋo pirwu?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Gin te gamo ni, “Caulo rik otimowa lit kun mito tyekowa luŋ ame dano moro kadi acel mom odoŋ iyi Icrael." 
2Samuel21:6 Doŋ pi mannono ba, yin myero imiwa awobe mere abiro me owot odegi i nyim Rwot i Gibeon i wi kidi a Rwot.” Abaka te gamo ni, “Abino miyogi baŋwu.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Cite abaka opo pi kwoŋ ame rik ekwoŋo gin kede Yonacan wot a Caulo i nyim Rwot, omio en oweko Mepibocet wot a Yonacan odoŋ." 
2Samuel21:8 Abaka Daudi rik te kwanyo awobe aryo ame gin obedo itino a Rijpa nyaka Aya, ame en rik onywalo baŋ Caulo nyiŋgi Armoni kede Mepibocet. Dok te kwanyo awobe abic ame gin obedo itino a Merab nyaka a Caulo, ame en rik onywalo baŋ Adriel, wot a Barjillai ame obedo dano me Mekola." 
2Samuel21:9 Abaka te miyo jonnono i ciŋ jo Gibeon; gin te deyogi oko i kidi i nyim Rwot. Gin abiro luŋ oto karacel. Onekogi i nino ame rik ogeo iye kac, i kare ame ocako kayo iye cayiri." 
2Samuel21:10 Rijpa nyaka Aya te kwanyo boŋo kwero cola wot peto i wi kidi kuno pire, en te bedo kuno cakere i kare ame kec ocakkere acaka tuno naka i kare ame kot ocwe i polo, ocorre i komgi. En rik mom oye winyo moro ogudo komgi dyeceŋ, akadi lee moro me tim dyewor." 
2Samuel21:11 Kare ame Daudi owinyo gin ame Rijpa dako aŋeca a Caulo otio," 
2Samuel21:12 en owoto te wot omo cogo kom Caulo kede mea wode Yonacan i baŋ jo Jabec-gilead. Jo Jabec-gilead rik akwalo kom Caulogi i dye boma me Bet-can kan ame onwoŋo rik jo Piriciti oŋabogi iye i nino ame gin oneko iye Caulo i kidi me Gilboa. 
2Samuel21:13 Daudi te kwanyo cogo kom Caulo kede mea wode Yonacan, te daŋ coko cogo kom jo abiro ame onwoŋo odeo." 
2Samuel21:14 Daudi te yiko cogo kom Caulo kede Yonacan i lyel a Kic papa a Caulo, ame onwoŋo tye i Cela i lobo a jo Benjamin. Ginnoro luŋ ame rik abaka ociko, jo otio. I ŋe mannono Rwot doŋ te ye kwac a jo pi lobogi." 
2Samuel21:15 Lweny ocele rik te erre i akina jo Piriciti kede jo Icrael. Daudi te wot i jo mere, ote wot lweny i kom jo Piriciti. Daudi te lweny atek meicel i lweny kuno." 
2Samuel21:16 Twon lo moro ame en dano acel ame oya iyi atekere a jo a komgi pek, ame nyiŋe Icbi-benob, ame onwoŋo tye i toŋ mola ame pekkere romo ratili aboŋwen kede nucu, dok ame onwoŋo tye i pala mere me romo anyen i pyere, te mito neko Daudi oko." 
2Samuel21:17 Cite Abicai wot a Jeruya te bino konye oko. En olwenyo i dano me Piriciti-nono te neko oko. Jo a Daudi te ciko Daudi kun okwoŋo akwoŋa ni Daudi mom dok bino medo wot kedgi i lweny, pien naka bino miyo en ame obedo tara me Icrael to oko." 
2Samuel21:18 A doŋ man otum oko, lweny dok te ere i kom jo Piriciti i Gob. Cibecai dano me Kuca te neko twon lo moro ame en dano acel ame oya iyi atekere a jo a komgi pek a nyiŋe Cap." 
2Samuel21:19 Lweny ocele dok te ere i kom jo Piriciti i Gob, ame Elkanan wot a Jair-oregim ame obedo dano me Beterekem te neko iye Goliac dano me Gat, ame rik bol toŋŋere mito rom aroma i yat cweyo boŋo." 
2Samuel21:20 Lweny ocele rik dok te bedo tye i Gat, kan ame rik tye iye twon lo moro odoŋo malo kun kome pek. Anyira ciŋe onwoŋo tye kanyape i ciŋe acel acel, anyira tyene daŋ kanyape i tyene acel acel, gin luŋ doŋ te bedo pyeraryo wie aŋwen. En rik dano ame oya iyi atekere a jo ame komgi pek." 
2Samuel21:21 Kare ame en rik obino, en ocako ŋalo jo Icrael, Yonacan wot a Cemei omin a Daudi te neke oko." 
2Samuel21:22 Daudi kede jo mere te neko jo a komgi pek aŋwen, ame gin obedo jo ame oya iyi atekere a jo ame komgi pek me Gat." 
2Samuel22:1 Man en wer ame Daudi owero baŋ Rwot i kare ame Rwot olare i ciŋ okworrere luŋ kede i ciŋ Caulo," 
2Samuel22:2 En owero kit man: “Rwot en obedo ka larrena atek meicel. 
2Samuel22:3 Obaŋana en tek kato kidi twon kidi atek meicel ka alaro baŋe ginnoro mom doŋ guda. En geno koma calo kwot; en ka-larrena atek meicel ame ariŋo alaro. En a gire lara, en a daŋ gwoka, en lara i timmogo me byemi." 
2Samuel22:4 An gira acwalo dwona baŋi yin Rwot, yin en a myero paki, yin ame ilara i ciŋ okworra." 
2Samuel22:5 “Pien biamwonyi me to onwoŋo doŋ ogura oko dyere, biamwonyi me to onwoŋo doŋ ocorre oko i koma." 
2Samuel22:6 Tol me Ceol onwoŋo doŋ olida ame ka weo pe, kun owic ata daŋ doŋ tye oterre oko i nyima." 
2Samuel22:7 “An gira rik acwalo dwona baŋ Rwot i kare ame atye i peko, an gira acwalo dwona baŋ Obaŋana. En owinyo dwona i ode, kokona owinyere i yite." 
2Samuel22:8 “I kare-nono lobo oyenere te wirre, acakki te polo daŋ oyeŋere kun myel ikikir pien akemo onwoŋo omako Rwot," 
2Samuel22:9 Yito oduny malo kun donyo i wume, twon maccoro alyet te donyo i doge kede lodi mac okur atek." 
2Samuel22:10 Odio polo odwoko piny, en te binopiny; kun piny col icuc i te tyene piny." 
2Samuel22:11 En otwarre obino piny kun obedo i ŋe okerubi; yamo te ru riŋo kede oko piny. 
2Samuel22:12 En te miyo piny acol wume oko ipuk; eka pol apek obedo pii keken te doko kema mere. 
2Samuel22:13 Tuŋ nyime onwoŋo ler alera, kun lodi mac okur ya iye." 
2Samuel22:14 Dwon Rwot te mwoc i polo, dwon Ŋat Amalo Meicel te winyere." 
2Samuel22:15 Obao atero mere, okworrere te ket atata; omio lutkot owil, co te ket i ŋwec." 
2Samuel22:16 Pii i dye nam opokere, tere te nen; acakki me te lobo te doŋ olaŋara, i kare ame Rwot juko okworrere, kun weo me wume kuto komgi." 
2Samuel22:17 “Rwot ocwao bade i polo te mako ciŋa, en te waya oko i twon pii moro atut." 
2Samuel22:18 En te lara oko i ciŋ jo atek ame daga, i ciŋ okwor ame onwoŋo mom aromo loyo." 
2Samuel22:19 I kare ame atye kede can, gin ocako lweny i koma, ento Rwot gire te gwoka." 
2Samuel22:20 Rwot olara, okela kan alac, pien cunye onwoŋo yom i koma." 
2Samuel22:21 “Rwot omia mot me pwoya a rom aroma i kitena atira, omia winyo pien yia gire ler." 
2Samuel22:22 An abedo gira lubo gin a Rwot mito; mom ru atimo ginnoro arac ame poka kede Obaŋana. 
2Samuel22:23 Pien gin ame en ociko luŋ tye i nyima, dok daŋ mom ru akwero lubo icwillere moro." 
2Samuel22:24 En oneno ni an a mom i balloro, agwokere gira i timo gin arac." 
2Samuel22:25 Mannono omio Rwot oneno ni kitena atira, pien en oneno ni an yia gire ter." 
2Samuel22:26 “Yin i Rwot ame inyutte keni baŋ jo a genne ni yin igenne dok daŋ inyutte keni baŋ jo a yigi ler ni yin yi ler. 
2Samuel22:27 Jo a kitegi beco, yin inyutte baŋgi ni iber, eka baŋ jo a yigi col ite nyutte baŋgi ni itek." 
2Samuel22:28 Yin giri ilaro jo a mwolle i nyimi, ento iciko waŋi i kom wegi abwone me iwagi idwogogi piny." 
2Samuel22:29 “Yin giri ibedo tarana ame menya, ama Rwot, Obaŋana gire en amenyo piny acol ame tye iye." 
2Samuel22:30 Yin en imia teko me loyo okworra kadi ocokere me lweny keda; Obaŋana gire en a mia teko me pye kalo cel. 
2Samuel22:31 Gin ame Obaŋa-ni timo ber meicel; gin a Rwot ociko cobere kakare. En tye acalo kwot ame geno kom jo luŋ ame riŋo laro baŋe. 
2Samuel22:32 “Ŋa kara ame dok obedo Obaŋa, mom Rwot keken? Ŋa ame dok tek calo kidi, mom Obaŋawa keken?" 
2Samuel22:33 Obaŋa-ni en ame obedo ka-larrena ame ageno, en a mia awoto i kuc." 
2Samuel22:34 En mio tyena bedo calo tyen atil, en mia acuŋ atek i wi kiddi malo." 
2Samuel22:35 En a pwonya i kite me lweny ame mio atwero telo akud atero me mola. 
2Samuel22:36 Yin doŋ ityeko miya kwot me larre, kony ame imia omio adoko twon lo moro adwoŋ," 
2Samuel22:37 Imio kakara obedo alac, omio tyena mom ocer." 
2Samuel22:38 Aryemo okworra ate nekogi oko, akumo i komgi aboŋo weo naka ka gin otum," 
2Samuel22:39 Aonyogi luŋ piny ame mom dok oromo ya co oradde atata i te tyena piny. 
2Samuel22:40 Pien yin imia teko me lweny, imia aloo okworra oko." 
2Samuel22:41 Imio okworra omukere oko i nyima ote lokka ŋegi; joamedaga doŋ atyeko okol weŋ. 
2Samuel22:42 Otemo yenyo ŋat a myero konygi, cite mom onen, okok-gu baŋ Rwot, cite mom ogamo dwongi." 
2Samuel22:43 Aŋinyogi apwot calo apua, ajejebogi odoco calo coto ame onyonyono i dye yo." 
2Samuel22:44 “Yin en a rik ilara i baŋ jo ojem ite gwoka acalo aloc i wi rok apapat; jo a yam mom aŋeo doŋ tye i te locca. 
2Samuel22:45 Rok ocele bino ryebere piny i nyima, ka owinyo kop i koma, ocako wora." 
2Samuel22:46 Gin luŋ oonyo tonigi piny, ote wotte i ka-ponogi i myelkom." 
2Samuel22:47 “Rwot akwo ame en kidi atek me larrena myero pwo! Obaŋana en a gire lara. Myero rab pi dittere! 
2Samuel22:48 Obaŋana en omia aculo kworra; en omio rok luŋ odok piny i te locca," 
2Samuel22:49 dok okwanya oko i ciŋ okworra. Yin en a rik itiŋa malo i wi okworra yin a rik ilara i ciŋ obyemi. 
2Samuel22:50 “Man omio an gira abino pwoyi akina orok, dok abino wero wer me pako nyiŋi ama Rwot." 
2Samuel22:51 Obaŋa gire mio twon loc adwoŋ meicel baŋ abaka mere; en nyuto mar a mom lokere baŋ ŋat a en oyero, baŋ Daudi kede baŋ ikwae waŋ i waŋ.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Man en kop ame Daudi okobo me agikki. Daudi wot a Yece rik obedo dano ame Obaŋa omoi obedo twon lo moro adwoŋ, en ŋat a rik Obaŋa a Yakobo oyero me bedo abaka; en daŋ a rik obedo lo adiro i cako wer a jo Icrael. Daudi rik okobo ni," 
2Samuel23:2 “Cuny Obaŋa mia akobo koppere, koppere gire tye I leba." 
2Samuel23:3 Obaŋa a jo Icrael doŋ otyeko kobo kop oko, Agwok jo Icrael okobba ni. Ŋat ame loo jo kun terogi arorom, ame loo loccere kun lworo Obaŋa," 
2Samuel23:4 rom aroma i ceŋ ame ryeny odiko ame polloro mom tye kede kot ame mio lum tu i lobo. 
2Samuel23:5 Mannono mom kite ame ikwaena bino bedo kede i nyim Obaŋa? Pien en otyeko cikere keda i cikere ame perakino atwal, oyiko iye kop ducu aber ame ginnoro mom romo balo. En bino medde konya kun yomoro cunya i gin luŋ ame amito." 
2Samuel23:6 Cite jo luŋ a mom woro Obaŋa calo okuto ame obolo oko; pien mom oromo kwanyogi ciŋ nono. 
2Samuel23:7 Ŋat ame gudo komgi myero ti nyonyo onyo bol toŋ; gin luŋ obino wanogi oko kede mac.” 
2Samuel23:8 Man en nyiŋ jo a Daudi ame rik onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny: Yocebbacebet, dano me Takemon, en rik obedo atel a jo adek. En rik obin olwenyo kom i toŋ keken i kom jo mia aboro, te daŋ nekogi luŋ awaŋe acel." 
2Samuel23:9 I akina jo adekkaca, ŋat ame lube onwoŋo obedo Eleajar wot a Dodo, wot Akoki. En rik onwoŋo tye baŋ Daudi i kare ame gin oŋalo jo Piriciti ame ocokere karacel me lweny i kom jo Icrael. I kare ame jo Icrael olokere odok cen," 
2Samuel23:10 en onyono piny atek acalo ico, te lweny i jo Piriciti tuno waŋ ame ciŋe ojony atek, kun ciŋe gire otwo atwoa i kom pala romo mere. Rwot te miyogi loyo jo Piriciti atek meicel i nino-nono. I kare ame Eleajar doŋ otyeko lweny oko, jo Icrael odok kuno me wot doŋ gonyo ka ruk i kom jo ame oneko." 
2Samuel23:11 Ŋat a rik lubo Eleajar obedo Camma wot Agee, dano me Arar. Jo Piriciti onwoŋo ocokere karacel i Leki, kan ame rik tye iye poto moro me ŋor. Jo Icrael rik te mukere oko i ŋwec i nyimgi." 
2Samuel23:12 Cite en gire te doŋ i dye poto-nono kun gwoko, eka te neko jo Piriciti oko. Rwot te miye loyo jo Piriciti atek meicel i nino-nono." 
2Samuel23:13 Ame kare me kac doŋ onwoŋo ceggi, jo adek i akina jo pyeradek adoŋo owoto baŋ Daudi i gorogoro kidi me Adullam, kun onwoŋo mony a jo Piriciti mogo oguro gonygi i luŋ me Repaim." 
2Samuel23:14 I kare-nono onwoŋo Daudi tye i ka-pono mere ame egeno, kun mony a jo Piriciti mogo tye i Beterekem." 
2Samuel23:15 Daudi onwoŋo tye kede mit adwoŋ meicel i cunye, omio en okobo ni, “Kono ŋattoro kom twero kella pii amata ame tye iyi akoŋ i dog cel me Beterekem.”" 
2Samuel23:16 Jo adek ca ame onwoŋo gin luŋ obedo jo atek meicel i lweny, ote yeco yogi kengi i dye gony a jo Piriciti, ote wot twomo pii iyi akoŋ i dog cel me Beterekem, ote tero baŋ Daudi. Cite Daudi mom te mato; en te lunyo onyo oko piny i nyim Rwot acalo koŋo olok me yalo Rwot," 
2Samuel23:17 kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, mom gire atwero mato pii man! Ka ce amato, nwoŋo rom aroma ame amato remo a jo man adek ame ojalo kwogi, ote wot.” Mannono omio en gire mom omato pii-nono. Man en gin a rik jo adekkaca otimo." 
2Samuel23:18 Abicai omin a Yoab wot a Jeruya rik obedo atel a jo pyeradek ca. En daŋ rik olwenyo kom i toŋ keken i kom jo mia adek, te neko oko luŋ; mannono te miyo nyiŋe cako rwo atek i akina jo pyeradek ca." 
2Samuel23:19 En a doŋ rik obedo twon lo moro a ŋeye akato luŋ i kom jo pyeradek ca. En rik obedo atel wigi, cite en mom otuno i rwom a jo adek ocele ca." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi, dano me Kabjeel, rik obedo twon alwennyoro a ŋeye meicel; en otimo gigi mogo ame pirgi dito meicel. En oneko itino awobe aryo, ame onwoŋo rik obedo twoni jo alwenyo meicel i Moab." 
2Samuel23:21 Dok en rik odonyo piny i bur i kare me pee, te wot neko iye eŋatu. Dok oneko daŋ twon lo moro me Miciri ame neno onwoŋo ber atek. Dano-naca onwoŋo rik tye kede toŋŋere i ciŋe, cite Benaya te wot baŋe ka i lut keken, te wot yuto toŋŋere i ciŋe-naca oko, ocobe kede te neko oko." 
2Samuel23:22 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi otimo magi, omio en daŋ obedo twon lo moro a ŋeye meicel ame rom aroma i jo adek ocele ca." 
2Samuel23:23 En daŋ te bedo twon lo moro ame omio kwogo i akina jo pyeradek ca, cite en mom otuno i rwom a jo adek ocele ca. Daudi okete me loyo ocirikale ame gwoke." 
2Samuel23:24 Jo ocele ame onwoŋo tye i akina jo pyeradekkaca, nyingi ene: Acael omin a Yoab; Elkanan wot a Dodo me Beterekem;" 
2Samuel23:25 Camma me Karod, Elika me Karod;" 
2Samuel23:26 Kelec me Pelet; Ira wot a Ikec me Tekoa; 
2Samuel23:27 Abiejer me Anatot, Mebunai me Kuca;" 
2Samuel23:28 Calmon me Akoki, Marai me Netopa;" 
2Samuel23:29 Kaleb wot a Bana me Netopa, Ittai wot a Ribai, me Gibea i lobo a jo Benjamin;" 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya me Piraton, Iddai ame oya i lula me Gaac;" 
2Samuel23:31 Abiolbon me Araba, Ajmawet me Bakurim;" 
2Samuel23:32 Eliakaba me Calbon, awobe a Yacen, kede Yonacan;" 
2Samuel23:33 Camma dano me Arar, Akiam wot a Carar me Arar;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elipelet wot Akacbai me Maaka kede Eliam wot Akitopel me Gilo; 
2Samuel23:35 Kejro me Karmel, Parai me Arabi;" 
2Samuel23:36 Igal wot a Natan me Joba, Bani me Gad;" 
2Samuel23:36 Igal wot a Natan me Joba, Bani me Gad;" 
2Samuel23:37 Jelek a jo Ammon, Nakarai me Beerot, ame obedo amak jami lweny a Yoab wot a Jeruia;" 
2Samuel23:38 Ira me Itri, Gareb me Itri;" 
2Samuel23:39 Uria ame obedo dano me atekere a jo Kitti gin luŋ jo pyeradek wie abiro. 
2Samuel24:1 Akemo rik dok te mako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, omio te cupo Daudi i komgi. Rwot okobbi Daudi ni, “Wot ikwan wel jo Icrael kede me a jo Juda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Abaka te kobbi Yoab ame obedo atel wi monnyere ni, “Wot wunu i akina atekere luŋ me Icrael, me iwot ikwan wunu wei jo, cakere i Gad tuno kede naka i Beer-ceba. Amito ŋeyo wel jo ducu.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Cite Yoab te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, Rwot Obaŋa-ni myero med wel jo ame tye-ni tyen mia acel ocele, kun yin pwod ikwo ame twero neno kede waŋi. Kara pino yin abaka imito kwano wel jo?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Cite abaka te diyo Yoab kede otellere me winyo koppere; gin te ya i nyim abaka oko, me wot kwano wei jo Icrael." 
2Samuel24:5 Gin oŋolo kulo Jordan ote cako kwano wel jo i Aroer, kede i boma ame tye i dye luŋ, ame otikere kede Gad. I kuno gin te dok tutuŋ Jajer," 
2Samuel24:6 ote kato naka i Gilead, kede Kadec, i lobo a jo Kitti. Gin te kato i Dan, eka i Dan kuno gin te wirre wot Cidon." 
2Samuel24:7 Gin te wot tuno i cel atek me Turo naka i boma luŋ ame onwoŋo obedo mea jo Kivi kede mea jo Kanaan, eka ote kato doŋ naka i Negeb me Juda, kun obeo i Beer-ceba." 
2Samuel24:8 I kare ame gin doŋ otyeko bebea i lobo luŋ, gin doŋ te dok cen i Jerucalem, i ŋe dwete aboŋwen kede nino pyeraryo nono." 
2Samuel24:9 Yoab te doŋ titti abaka wel jo ame okwano. Wel jo ame romo lweny iyi Icrael onwoŋo oromo tutumia mia aboro, eka me Juda te bedo tutumia mia abic." 
2Samuel24:10 Kare ame Daudi doŋ otyeko kwano wel jo oko, cunye dok te cako waŋ. En te kobbi Rwot ni, “Atimo bal a mom kobere i gin ame atimo. Tim doŋ ber, ama Rwot, ikwany balla oko, an amironi; pien atimo tim me miŋo meicel.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Kare ame Daudi oya odiko, Rwot okobbi Gad adwarpiny, ame onwoŋo obedo aranpiny a Daudi, ni," 
2Samuel24:12 “Wot ikobbi Daudi ni, ‘Amie tam adek ame en myero eyer acel i akinagi, me atim.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 Gad te wot baŋ Daudi, te titte gin ame Rwot okobo; openye ni, “Imito ni kec en a myero pot i loboni te ri pi mwakki adek? Onyo yin en a myero ibed ŋwec aŋweca pi dwete adek kun iriŋo okworri? Onyo imito ni too edeke en a myero pot i loboni pi nino adek? Aco yin koŋ doŋ itam ite titta kop ame myero adwok baŋ Rwot.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Daudi te kobbi Gad ni, “Atye doŋ i twon cannoro adwoŋ meicel; cite mom aye ni dano en a myero ket can i koma. Rwot gire en a myero ket can i komwa, pien en obedo akica meicel.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Rwot te cwayo too edeke i kom jo Icrael geye odiko tuno kede naka i kare ame rik eciko. Lwak jo aromo tutumia abiro te to, cakere i Dan tuno kede naka i Beer-ceba."
