2Samuel24:16 Kare ame amalaika a Rwot oryeo ciŋe me balo Jerucalem, Rwot oloko tammere oko me keto can i kom jo, omio te kobbi amalaika ame onwoŋo aneko jo ni, “Wek doŋ bedi! Oromo doŋ.” Amalaika onwoŋo tye i ŋet laro dino kal Arauna, dano me Jebuc." 
2Samuel24:17 Kare ame Daudi oneno amalaika ame oneko jo, en okobbi Rwot ni, “An gire en ame atimo bal, atimo gin arac. Kara jo man do tye ane no can nono. Tim ber iluny goya an keken kede jo me oda.”" 
2Samuel24:18 I nino-nono ikome Gad owoto baŋ Daudi te wot kobbe ni, “Wot malo kuca, me iwot ican keno lam me yalo Rwot i laro dino kal Arauna.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Daudi owinyo gin ame Rwot omio Gad okobbe, te wot kuno." 
2Samuel24:20 Kare ame Arauna obolo waŋe, oneno abaka kede omiro mere tye abino baŋe. Arauna owoto baŋe, te wot ryebere piny i nyime wore," 
2Samuel24:21 Eka te penyo abaka ni, “Adwoŋŋa abaka, kara ibino kan piŋo ba?” Daudi te gamo ni, “Abino wilo laro dino kaili, me acan iye keno lam me yalo Rwot, me too edeke ya oko i kom jo.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna te gamo kop abaka ni, “Yin giri kwany gin ame yii amito keken me iyal i Rwot; nen twoni me yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa ene, apwod me dino kal kede lodi me ŋut twoni itwero tic kedgi akaka yen.”" 
2Samuel24:23 Arauna te miyo jami-nono luŋ baŋ abaka kun kobo ni, “Rwot Obaŋani myero yie bed ayom i kom motti.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Cite abaka Daudi te gamo ni, “Mom amannono gire, an myero acul lim pirgi. An mom abino yalo Rwot Obaŋana kede mot a mom aculo ginnoro pire.” Abaka te wilo laro dino kal kede twoni, i cekel pyerabic me ryal." 
2Samuel24:25 Daudi te cano keno lam me yalo Rwot kuno, eka te waŋo iye mot awaŋa kede mot kweyo cuny. Rwot doŋ te gamo kwaccere te miyo too edeke gik oko iyi Icrael." 
1Kings1:1 Abaka Daudi onwoŋo doŋ oteggo meicel ame mwaka me dittere doŋ bup, ame mom doŋ twero winyo lyeto moro i kome kadi bed wumere kede olaŋgit apol ata." 
1Kings1:2 Man omio omiro mere adoŋo okobo ni, “Adwoŋwa abaka, wek oyenyi nyannoro a pwod opoŋ apoŋa me okel baŋi, me en bin bed ŋat a gwoki. En bino buto i laŋeti, atotya koŋ mi komi bed amomor.”" 
1Kings1:3 Gin rik te bedo yenyo nyannoro amwonya i lobo me Icrael luŋ, ote nwoŋo nyako ame olwoŋo ni Abicaki, ame obedo nya jo Cunam, ote kelo baŋ abaka." 
1Kings1:4 Nyannono onwoŋo rik mwonya meicel. En doŋ te bedo agwok abaka kun daŋ konye i tic ducu, cite abaka mom naka oloke odoko dako mere." 
1Kings1:5 Adonia wot a Daudi ame Kagit onywalo rik te mukere i wie kene me doko abaka. En oyiko gadigadi mere i wie kene, wegi aguragura karacel kede jo pyerabic ame ŋweco telo nyime." 
1Kings1:6 Pappere rik mom ru otimo ginnoro ame waŋo cunye, mom daŋ openye kadi acel i kom gin ame etimo. En kono rik onwoŋo obedo awo bi ame mwonya meicel, dok en obedo awobi ame olubo Abicalom." 
1Kings1:7 En oporo kop kede Yoab wot a Jeruya karacel kede Abiatar ame obedo alamdog, gin te ye lube kede konye cobo mittere," 
1Kings1:8 Cite jo magi obedo pe i yik Adonia: Jadok alamdog, Benayo wot a Yekoyadi, Natan ame obedo adwarpiny, Cemei, Rei, karacel kede ocirikale ame gwoko Daudi." 
1Kings1:9 Adonia rik te ŋolo rommi me yalo Obaŋa, kede twoni, kede leyi ocele ame ocwe, kun timo man i ŋet kidi me Twol, ame onwoŋo tye i ŋet En-rogel. En olwoŋo iye omego mere luŋ ame obedo itino a Daudi kede jo abaka luŋ adoŋo mege me Juda," 
1Kings1:10 cite en mom olwoŋo Natan adwarpiny, kede Benayo kede ocirikale ame onwoŋo gwoko Daudi, kede ominnere Culeman." 
1Kings1:11 Natan te kobbi Batceba tota a Culeman ni, “Yin ce mom iwinyo wunu ni Adonia wot a Kagit odoko abaka kun adwoŋwa Daudi mom oŋeo ginnoro iye?" 
1Kings1:12 Aman ba, yin myero ibin me amii ryeko me laro kwoni kede kwo a wodi Culeman." 
1Kings1:13 Myero yin iru wot baŋ abaka Daudi, iwot ikobbe ni, ‘Adwoŋŋa abaka, mom rik ikwoŋo baŋa, an aŋecani, ni wodi Culeman en ame bino loc kakari, kun en bedo i wi kommi me loc? Kara piŋo Adonia en ame dok abaka’." 
1Kings1:14 Doŋ i kare ame yin pwod itye ikop wun abaka an abino pello baŋe ate moko koppi.” 
1Kings1:15 Mannono te miyo Bateba neno abaka iyi icika mere me buto. Abaka onwoŋo doŋ oteggo meicel, kun Abicaki nya jo Cunam, konye i tic ducu." 
1Kings1:16 Batceba oryebere piny oworo abaka, abaka te penye ni, “Imito ŋo ba, dakona?”" 
1Kings1:17 En te gamo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, yin rik ikwoŋo baŋa an aŋecani, i nyim Rwot Obaŋani, kun ikobo ni wodi Culeman bino loc kakari, kun en bedo i kommi me loc." 
1Kings1:18 Aco koŋ inen, Adonia doŋ odoko abaka oko, kadi bed yin adwoŋŋa mom iŋeo ginnoro iye." 
1Kings1:19 En doŋ aman oŋolo twoni me yalo Obaŋa kede leyi mogo ocwe karacel kede rommi apol ata, dok en olwoŋo iye awobeni luŋ, Abiatar alamdog kede Yoab atel wi mony; cite Culeman en gire mom olwoŋo." 
1Kings1:20 Aco aman, yin abaka, wan jo Icrael luŋ doŋ tye i komi me kobbigi ŋat ame bino leyo kakari, ame bino bedo i kom me locci." 
1Kings1:21 Naka bino miyo ka kareni doŋ oromo, yin adwoŋŋa, me wot weo karacel i kwarini, an kede woda Culeman ote lokowa doko wegi bal.”" 
1Kings1:22 Ame en onwoŋo pwod tye akop abaka, Natan adwarpiny te daŋ pello oko baŋgi." 
1Kings1:23 I kare ame omio abaka oŋeo ni Natan daŋ obino, Natan okato i nyim abaka, eka te ryebere i nyim abaka kun nyime gudo piny." 
1Kings1:24 En te kobbi abaka ni, “Adwoŋŋa abaka, yin en ikobo ni Adonia bino loc kakari kun bedo i kommi me loc?" 
1Kings1:25 Pien en doŋ owoto gire oko, oŋolo twoni me yalo Obaŋa kede leyi ocele ocwe, karacel kede rommi apol atata, dok daŋ olwoŋo iye awobe abaka ducu, kede Yoab atel wi mony, kede Abiatar alamdog. Aman gin doŋ otye ocem dok daŋ omatte i nyime, kun oredo ni, ‘Kom abaka Adonia bed ayot nakanaka!’" 
1Kings1:26 Cite en gire mom olwoŋa an amironi, kede Jadok alamdog, kede Benayo wot a Yekoyadi karacel kede wodi Culeman." 
1Kings1:27 Adwoŋ, man yin itimo, en ame mom daŋ ititiwa wan omironi ŋat ame aleyo kakari acalo abaka kun bedo i wi kom me loc?”" 
1Kings1:28 Abaka Daudi te kobo ni, “Koŋ ilwoŋ wunu Batceba dwog baŋa kan.” Batceba te dwogo, te bino cuŋ i nyim abaka." 
1Kings1:29 Abaka Daudi te kwoŋ i nyime kun kobo ni, “Acalo Rwot ame olaro kwona i kit can luŋ tye kwo-ni," 
1Kings1:30 kite ame rik doŋ atyeko kwoŋ kede baŋi i nyim Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, kun akobo ni wodi Culeman bino leyo kakara, dok en bi no bedo i wi kom me loc kakara, tin doŋ abino cobo kwoŋŋanono oko,”" 
1Kings1:31 Batceba te ryebere piny i nyime kun nyime gudo piny, te woro abaka kun kobo ni, “Myero Obaŋa mi kom adwoŋŋa abaka bed yot nakanaka!”" 
1Kings1:32 Abaka Daudi te kobo ni, “Lwoŋ wunu Jadok alamdog, Natan adwarpiny, kede Benayo wot a Yekoyadi.” Jo-nono te bino cuŋ i nyim abaka." 
1Kings1:33 Abaka te kobbigi ni, “Ter wunu omirona, iwot wunu karacel kedgi, me iwot imi wunu woda Culeman bed i wi kana na i kome, miye wunu eriŋ kede, itere wunu i Gikon." 
1Kings1:34 Jadok alamdog kede Natan adwarpiny te wot wirre kede moo me bedo abaka me Icrael kuno; eka ite kuto wunu apel kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Kom abaka Culeman bed ayot nakanaka!’" 
1Kings1:35 Wun doŋ ite ya wunu i kuno dwogo, kun wun ilubo wunu yore, en te bino bedo i wi komma me loc. An doŋ atyeko kete me bedo aloc iyi Icrael kede Juda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benayo wot a Yekoyadi te gamo kop abaka ni, “Obed amannono gire! Rwot Obaŋani myero mi mok amannono!" 
1Kings1:37 Kite a rik obedo kedi, myero daŋ dok bed i Culeman kittaca, mi loccere bed atek akato me adwoŋŋere Daudi.”" 
1Kings1:38 Eka Jadok alamdog, Natan adwarpiny kede Benayo wot a Yekoyadi, kede jo Keret, kede jo Pelet, te wot kelo Culeman bedo i wi kana a Daudi, te cako riŋo kede. Gin te tere kede naka i Gikon." 
1Kings1:39 Kare ame gin otuno kuno, Jadok alamdog te kwanyo moo ame onwoŋo tye i adomo iyi kema a Rwot, te wiro kede Culeman. Gin te kuto apel, jo te wo ni, “Kom abaka Culeman bed ayot nakanaka!”" 
1Kings1:40 Jo luŋ te ciro lubo yore, kun okuto alete, dok olelo meicel, ame dwongi amor ayeŋo lobo ayeŋa." 
1Kings1:41 Woogi te winyere baŋ Adonia kede wele mere, kun gin doŋ otyeko aramagi at yeka. Kare ame Yoab owinyo koko apel, en openyo ni, “Woo a dok awinyere malo amala i boma ca kono?”" 
1Kings1:42 I kare ame en pwod tye akop, Yonacan wot Abiatar alamdog te tuno oko. Adonia te kobbe ni, “Kato i ot, pien yin gire i dano aber, ikelo amut aber.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonacan te gamo kop Adonia ni, “Pe gire, abaka Daudi otyeko keto Culeman me bedo abaka oko." 
1Kings1:44 Abaka omio Jadok alamdog, kede Natan adwarpiny, kede Benayo wot a Yekoyadi, jo Keret kede jo Pelet otere i Gikon, kun ŋweco i kana a pappere Daudi." 
1Kings1:45 Aman doŋ Jadok alamdog kede Natan adwarpiny otyeko wirre oko kede moo me bedo abaka i Gikon. Gin doŋ oya i Gikon kuno, obino ame alelo meicel, ame omio woo doŋ dwoŋ atek i boma. Woo ame iwinyo wunu ca, megi ennono." 
1Kings1:46 Culeman doŋ tye obedo oko i wi kom me loc. 
1Kings1:47 Aman omiro abaka luŋ doŋ tye apwoyo Daudi, kun okobbe ni, ‘Obaŋani myero mi nyiŋ Culeman rwo atek akato megi oko.’ Abaka Daudi tye akulo wie piny i wi tanda mere." 
1Kings1:48 Dok en okobo daŋ ni, ‘Myero mi pwoc baŋ Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael ame tin omio atinna acel i akina itinona obedo i wi komma me loc kun an ikoma daŋ aneno kede waŋa.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Lworo te ma ko wele Adonia luŋ, ote ya wot oko, kun ŋat acel acel mako yo mere en kene." 
1Kings1:50 Adonia daŋ te ya oko i kannono kun lworo ociro oko i kom Culeman, te wot atir mako tuŋ ame tye i keno me lam." 
1Kings1:51 Culeman rik te winyo ni Adonia lworo ociro oko i kome, dok daŋ ni tye ame omako tuŋ me keno lam pi laro kwo mere, kun kobo ni, “Abaka Culeman myero koŋ ge kwon baŋa ni mom ebino neka an amiro mere i pala lweny.”" 
1Kings1:52 Culeman te kobo ni, “Ka ce en onyuto oko kannaler ni en edano aber, yer wie acelloro gire mom bino poto piny, cite ka onwoŋo ni en tye ka timo timmoro a mom ber, en gire bino to.”" 
1Kings1:53 Abaka Culeman te cwayo jo wot ome i keno lam. En te bino woro abaka Culeman. Culeman te kobbe ni, “Wot giri tuŋssi.”" 
1Kings2:1 Kare ame abaka Daudi doŋ ceggi to, ociko wode Culeman kun kobbe ni," 
1Kings2:2 “An doŋ aceggi wot i wot ame jo luŋ i wi lobo woto kede. Yin myero icuŋ atek acalo ico. 
1Kings2:3 Gwok gin a Rwot Obaŋani ociko, kun ilubo gin a en mito, igwoko icwillere, cikkere, kede gin ame en ociko, kede kop ame en okobo luŋ, kite ame ocoo kede i buk cik a Muca, me ibed aber i jami ducu ame itio, i kabedo ducu ame ibino wot iye." 
1Kings2:4 Ka ce itimo mannono, Rwot bino gwoko gin ame rik eciko baŋa, kun kobo ni, ‘Ka ce ikwai bino bedo jo a kitegi beco, kun ogenne i tiyo gin ame an amito i cunygi ducu kede tipogi luŋ, aloc me Icrael bino ya i komgi nakanaka.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Yin iŋeo aber gin ame rik Yoab wot a Jeruya otimo i koma, gin ame en otimo i kom otel wi mony a jo Icrael aryo, Abuneri wot a Neri kede Amaca wot a Jeter. Yin ipo kite ame en rik obin onekogi kede i kare me kuc, me culo kwor me remo a jo a gin oneko i kare me lweny. En rik oneko jo a mom i bal, ame en te miyo bal me remo a jo-nono guda." 
1Kings2:6 Pi mannono ba, yin doŋ myero iti i kome kede ryekoni, cite myero kur iwek two me pyen en a neke." 
1Kings2:7 Cite itino a Baŋillai dano me Gilead myero ibed kedgi aber meicel, igwokgi daŋ kun imiogi obedo i akina jo ame cemo i wi mejani; pien gin daŋ rik orwatte keda aber amannono i kare ame ariŋo ominni Abicalom." 
1Kings2:8 Cimei wot a Gera, dano me Benjamin, ame oya i Bakurim daŋ pwod tye baŋi. En rik ocena atek meicel i nino ame awoto i Makanaim, cite i kare ame rik en dok orwatte keda i kulo Jordan, ate cikere baŋe i nyiŋ Rwot ni mom abino neke i pala lweny." 
1Kings2:9 Cite yin doŋ myero kur iweke ame mom itimo ginnoro i kome. Yin giri iŋeo gin a myero itim i kome, cite myero inen ni en oto.”" 
1Kings2:10 Daudi te doŋ to oko, te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, ote yiko kome i paco mere." 
1Kings2:11 Daudi onwoŋo oloo jo Icrael pi mwakki pyeraŋwen, kun en ogeo loc i Kebron pi mwakki abiro kede pyeradek wie adek i Jerucalem." 
1Kings2:12 Culeman doŋ te bedo i wi kom loc a pappere, loccere te medde bedo atek meicel." 
1Kings2:13 Adonia wot a Kagit te wot baŋ Batceba tota a Culeman. Batceba te penye ni, “Ibino baŋa i kuc?” En te gamo ni, “Ee, abino i kuc.”" 
1Kings2:14 Adonia te medo ni, “Tye kopporo ame amito kobo baŋi.” Batceba te gamo ni, “Kop aŋo-nono kara?”" 
1Kings2:15 En te gamo ni, “Yin iŋeo ni an en a myero rik abed abaka, dok daŋ jo Icrael luŋ onwoŋo agenno ni an en ame abino loyogi. Cite man dok olunyo lokere oluktuke, ominna en ame dok odoko abaka, pien mannono onwoŋo oya ibaŋ Rwot." 
1Kings2:16 Doŋ aman an atye i ginnoro acel ame amito kwayo baŋi; tim ber kur ikwer.” Batceba te kobo ni, “Aco kob do.”" 
1Kings2:17 Adonia te kobo ni, “Tim ber ikwaya abaka Culeman, aŋeo ni en mom bino kwerri; amito ni en mia Abicaki, nya jo Cunam me bed cega.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batceba te gamo ni, “Mannono gire ber, an abino cwalo kwacci i nyim abaka.”" 
1Kings2:19 Batceba te wot baŋ abaka Culeman, me wot kop kede abaka Adonia. Abaka ka onene, oya malo jole, te ryebere piny i nyime; eka te dok bedo piny i kom me loccere, te miyo kom ocele pi tottere. Tottere te bedo i laŋete tuŋ cem." 
1Kings2:20 Tottere te kobo ni, “Atye kede kwaecoro acel anonok ame amito keto i nyimi; tima ber kur ikwer ba.” Abaka te gamo ni, “Koŋ ikobba awiny do, totta; pe abino kwero.”" 
1Kings2:21 En te kobo ni, “Tim ber imi Abicaki nya jo Cunam baŋ ominni Adonia me bed dako mere.”" 
1Kings2:22 Abaka Culeman te gamo kop a tottere ni, “Piŋo kara ikwao Abicaki nya jo Cunam pi Adonia? Kwaye daŋ doŋ loc do, pien en obedo ominna adwoŋ, dok daŋ Abiatar alamdog kede Yoab wot a Jeruya ocwake.”" 
1Kings2:23 Abaka Culeman te kwoŋ akwoŋa i nyiŋ Rwot ni, “Obaŋa myero mi ginnoro timere i koma ka ce mom amio oneko Adonia pi kwaccere-nono." 
1Kings2:24 Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko moka oko me bedo i wi kom loc a pappa Daudi. Dok Rwot ogwoko gin a rik eciko baŋ pappa, te miyo loc i ciŋa kede i ciŋ ikwaena, kite a rik ociko. Doŋ pi mannono, acalo Rwot tye kwoni, obino neko Adonia oko tin.”" 
1Kings2:25 En te cwayo Benayo wot a Yekoyadi, te wot cobe neke oko." 
1Kings2:26 Abaka Culeman te kobbi Abiatar alamdog ni, “Yin myero iwot oko i paconi i Anatot; pien yin onwoŋo myero neki oko. Cite mom abino neki i kare-ni, pien yam ibedo tiŋo canduk a Rwot Obaŋa i nyim pappa Daudi, dok daŋ inywako kede peko mere ducu ame obedo poto i kome.”" 
1Kings2:27 Culeman te ryemo Abiatar oko i tic me bedo alamdog a Rwot, ame man te miyo kop a Rwot cobere kakare, ame rik ekobo i Cilo i kom jo Eli kede ikwae." 
1Kings2:28 I kare ame Yoab owinyo gin ame otimere, kite acalo en rik onwoŋo obedo dano acel ame ocwako Adonia kun mom cwako Culeman, en oŋweco atir i kema a Rwot, te wot mako tuŋ keno lam me elar kwo mere." 
1Kings2:29 I kare ame Culeman owinyo ni Yoab oŋweco i kema a Rwot, tye kuno omako tuŋ keno lam pi laro kwo mere, Culeman ocwao Benayo wot a Yekoyadi ni wot cobe neke oko," 
1Kings2:30 I kare ame Benayo otuno baŋ Yoab i kema a Rwot, en okobbi Yoab ni, “Abaka ociko ni yin myero iya oko i kannono.” Cite Yoab te gamo ni, “An gira mom aya. An abino gira to kan.” Benayo te dwokki abaka kop kun kobbe gin ame Yoab okobo." 
1Kings2:31 Abaka te kobo ni, “Wot itim kit ame en okobo-nono. Cobe ineke oko ite yike. Mannono bino miyo bal me remo a jo ame en oneko aboŋo bal mom dok bedo i wia kede i wi jo me ot a pappa." 
1Kings2:32 Rwot bino dwoko bal me remo a jo ame rik eneko naca i wie, pien en rik onekogi kun pappa Daudi mom oŋeo ginnoro iye. En rik oneko jo aryo ame onwoŋo obedo jo abeco a kitegi atira kate oko, adwoŋ Abuneri wot a Neri ame onwoŋo obedo atel wi mony a jo Icrael, kede adwoŋ Amaca wot a Jeter ame onwoŋo atel wi mony a jo Juda." 
1Kings2:33 Bal me remo a jo-nono bino dok i wi Yoab kede ikwae luŋ. Cite Daudi kede ikwae kede jo me ode, kede kom me loccere, Rwot bino miyo iye kuc nakanaka.”" 
1Kings2:34 Benayo te wot i kema a Rwot, te wot cobo Yoab neko oko; eka ote yike i ode ame onwoŋo tye i dye tim." 
1Kings2:35 Abaka te keto Benayo bedo atel wi mony akaka Yoab kede Jadok me bedo alamdog akaka Abiatar. 
1Kings2:36 Abaka rik te lwoŋo Cemei te kobbe ni, “Yin myero iger odi i Jerucalem kan, dok myero ibed kan kun mom iya iye; kur iwot kannoro ocele kadi acel." 
1Kings2:37 Pien i nino ame yin ibino ya iye i kan, eka ite ŋolo luŋ me Kidron, myero iŋe oko i nino-nono ni ibino to; remoni giri bino dok i wi.”" 
1Kings2:38 Cemei te kobbi abaka ni, “Gin ame ikobo gire ber; an abino tiyo gin ame yin abaka ikobo.” Cemei daŋ te bedo i Jerucalem kannono pi kare alalac." 
1Kings2:39 Cite i ŋe mwaka adek, opii a Cemei aryo te lwi riŋo gigi oko naka baŋ Akic wot a Maaka, ame onwoŋo obedo abaka me Gat. I kare ame okobbi Cemei ni opii mere tye i Gat." 
1Kings2:40 Cemei oya oko te tweyo kom bedo i wi kar; a mere i kom kana, te wot naka i Gat baŋ Akic, pi wot yenyo opii mere. En te wot nwoŋogi kuno, te dwoggogi paco." 
1Kings2:41 I kare ame Culeman owinyo ni Cemei owoto naka i Gat twal te dwogo," 
1Kings2:42 abaka ocwao jo baŋe te wot lwoŋe, eka te penye ni, “Rik mom amii ikwoŋo akwoŋa i nyiŋ Rwot ni myero kur iya i Jerucalem, kun aciki atek ni i nino ame ibino ya iye i kan ite wot kannoro ocele, myero iŋe i nino-nono ni ibino to? Dok yin mom rik igamo ni kop ame an akobo tye aber, yin ibino lubo?" 
1Kings2:43 Kara piŋo mom dok icobo kwonni ame rik ikwoŋo baŋ Rwot kede gin ame an aciki iye?” 
1Kings2:44 Abaka dok te medo kobbi Cemei ni, “Yin giri iŋeo atira i cunyi tim areco ame rik ibedo timo baŋ pappa Daudi. Pi mannono ba, Rwot bino miyo timmi-naca luŋ dok gire i wii." 
1Kings2:45 Aco an gira Obaŋa bino miya winyo, bino miyo kom loc a Daudi medde gire bedo atek nakanaka i nyime.”" 
1Kings2:46 Abaka te doŋ miyo Benayo wot a Yekoyadi tere oko, te wot cobe neke oko. Mannono te miyo loc a Culeman medde doŋ bedo atek meicel." 
1Kings3:1 Culeman te nyomo nyaka a Parao abaka me Miciri, mannono te miyo en notte oko gin kede abaka me Miciri. En okelo nyannono i paco a Daudi, tuno waŋ ame en ogero ode, kede ot a Rwot, kun daŋ doŋ ogero cel oguro Jerucalem luŋ." 
1Kings3:2 Jo rik onwoŋo pwod yalo Obaŋa i wi kiddi malo, pien ottoro rik onwoŋo pwod mom ame ogero pi Rwot." 
1Kings3:3 Culeman rik obedo ŋat ame maro Rwot, kun lubo cik a pappere Daudi, cite en rik onwoŋo ŋolo mot me yalo Obaŋa dok daŋ waŋo odok akur, i kabedo me woro Obaŋa ame onwoŋo tye malo i wi kiddi." 
1Kings3:4 Kare moro abaka Culeman owoto i Gibeon me wot yalo Obaŋa kuno, pien maci-naca en a rik obedo ka woro Obaŋa adwoŋŋere. Culeman onwoŋo rik yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa tutumia acel i wi keno lam kuno." 
1Kings3:5 Kare ame en tye i Gibeon kuno, Rwot onen baŋe dyewor i waŋ lek te kobbe ni, “Peny gin ame imito ni myero ami baŋi.”" 
1Kings3:6 Culeman te gamo ni, “Yin doŋ ityeko nyuto twon mar meri adwoŋ a mom lokere baŋ amironi pappa Daudi, pien en rik obedo ŋat a genne i tiyo gin ame yin imito, dok kite onwoŋo tye atira, kun yie daŋ ler i komi. Dok yin imedde nyutte twon mar adwoŋ a mom lokere-ni, imie-gu wode ame aman en ame tye ka loc kakare." 
1Kings3:7 Doŋ ba, ama Rwot Obaŋana, yin doŋ imia an amironi adoko abaka akaka pappa Daudi, kadi bed an pwod atin atidi moro, ame mom ru aŋeo loc." 
1Kings3:8 An doŋ atye i akina joni ame yam iyero, ame gin obedo rok adwoŋ meicel, welgi bup atek ame mom romo kwanne pi polgi." 
1Kings3:9 Tim ber doŋ imia an amironi cuny me ryeko me loyo lwakki, me aŋe poko gin aber kede gin arac. Kara ŋa ame romo loyo rokki adwoŋ wok-ki?”" 
1Kings3:10 Kwac a Culeman-ni te yomoro cuny Rwot atek. 
1Kings3:11 Obaŋa te gamo ni, “Pien ikwao man, kun mom iparo piri keni ite penyo ni kono ami iperakino kare alac, onyo ni amii lonyo, onyo ni kono aneko okworri oko, ento ilunyo kwayo ni amii cuny me ryeko ame twero miyi iŋeo gin atye atira," 
1Kings3:12 an abino timo kittono. Nen ba, amii doŋ ryeko kede diro adwoŋ meicel a kato jo luŋ ame otelo nyimi kede jo luŋ ame bino lubi; mom tye ŋattoro ame bino bedo aryek calo yin." 
1Kings3:13 Abino daŋ miyi gin ame mom ikwao: ibino bedo twon alonyo a mom twerre, kun daŋ owori atek, ame mom tye abaka moro ame bino pore kedi pi kare luŋ me kwoni." 
1Kings3:14 Dok daŋ ka ibino tiyo gin ame an amito, kun igwoko icwilla, kede cikka, kite ame pappi Daudi obedo timo, abino medo kare me kwoni daŋ bedo abubup.”" 
1Kings3:15 Culeman te co oko i waŋ nino, te nwoŋo ni eleko. Kare ame en odok i Jerucalem, en owoto te wot cuŋ i nyim canduk me cikere a Rwot, te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa kede mot kweyo cuny; te daŋ tedo arama pi omiro mere luŋ." 
1Kings3:16 Mon aryo ame onwoŋo obedo olaya obino te cuŋ i nyim abaka Culeman. 
1Kings3:17 Dako acel i akinagi te kobo ni, “Ama adwoŋŋa, an kede dako-ni obedo i ot acel; doŋ i nino acel an ate nywalo atinna kun en tye i ot." 
1Kings3:18 I ŋe nino adek ame an doŋ atyeko nywal oko, en daŋ dok te nywal, kun wan onwoŋo otye kenwa i ottono. Ŋattoro ocele gire onwoŋo mom tye, kono wan aryoni keken." 
1Kings3:19 Doŋ atin a dako-ni te to oko dyewor pien en onwoŋo obuto i kom atin. 
1Kings3:20 En te ya i cuny dyewor ame an anino oko, te kwanyo atinna oko i laŋeta, te wot pyelo i laŋete, en te lunyo kwanyo mege oto ca kelo pyelo i laŋeta." 
1Kings3:21 Kare ame aco odiko me doto atinna, anwoŋo atin oto oko; cite amedo ŋiyo atinnono aber ame piny doŋ ler, anwoŋo ni mannono mom obedo atin ame onwoŋo an anywalo.”" 
1Kings3:22 Ento awottere te gamo ni, “Pe gire, atin akwo-ni gire mera, en oto gire megi.” Dako okwoŋo kop te gamo ni, “Pe gire atin oto en a megi, en akwo-ni gire mera.” Mannono kite ame gin oporo kede kopgi i nyim abaka." 
1Kings3:23 Abaka te kobo ni, “Koŋ inen, ŋat acel acel tye akobo ni, ‘Atin akwo-ni mera, en oto ca megi’; kun wun luŋ daŋ dok akwero akwera ni, ‘Pe gire, atinni gire oto oko, mera gire en akwo.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Aco doŋ koŋ ikella wunu pala, “Ote daŋ kelo pala baŋ abaka." 
1Kings3:25 Abaka te kobo ni aco bar yi atin akwo-nu oko aryo, mi nucu baŋ ŋat acel kede nucu ocele baŋ ŋat ocele.”" 
1Kings3:26 Dako ame onwoŋo atinnere kwo te gamo ni, “Pe gire amannono, adwoŋŋa, mi atin akwo-nu baŋ dako-nu, kur inek.” En okobo amannono pien cunye onwoŋo oton atek pi atinnere. Cite ŋat ame mege onwoŋo oto oko te gamo ni, “Ee, wan ducu obino kec, pok yi atinnono gire oko.”" 
1Kings3:27 Abaka te kobo ni, “Mi atin-nu baŋ dako ame ogeo kop, kur inek, pien dako-nono en toto atin.”" 
1Kings3:28 Jo Icrael luŋ te winyo kite ame abaka oŋolo kede koppono. Jo luŋ te cako lworo abaka atek meicel, pien gin oniaŋ ni ryeko Obaŋa tye i yie, en omio oŋolo kop kakare." 
1Kings4:1 Abaka Culeman onwoŋo obedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael luŋ. 
1Kings4:2 Magi en jo onwoŋo loo tic apapat i te loccere. Ajaria wot a Jadok onwoŋo obedo alamdog. 
1Kings4:3 Elikorep kede Akija, ame gin luŋ onwoŋo obedo awobe a Cica, onwoŋo obedo orani; eka Yekocafati wot Akilud te bedo aco kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame otimere." 
1Kings4:4 Benayo wot a Yekoyadi te bedo atel wi mony; kun Jadok kede Abiatar te bedo olamdog. 
1Kings4:5 Ajaria wot a Natan te bedo amitam baŋ abaka. 
1Kings4:6 Akicarte te bedo alo jo ame tio i paco abaka, kun Adoniram wot Abda te bedo alo tic eroni." 
1Kings4:7 Culeman oketo daŋ gabuna apar wie aryo me loyo lobo apapat iyi lobo me Icrael luŋ. Omiogi tic me coko cam pi abaka kede jo me ode luŋ, kun ŋat acel acel i akinagi mio cam dwe acel i mwaka acel." 
1Kings4:8 Nyiŋ jo-nono ene kede nyiŋ kabedo ame onwoŋo gin loo: Ben-kur ame onwoŋo loo lobo me Epraim obedo kidikidi. 
1Kings4:9 Ben-deker ame onwoŋo loo boma magi, Makaj, Calbim, Bet-cemec kede Elon-bet-kanan;" 
1Kings4:10 Ben-keced ame onwoŋo loo boma me Arubot, Coko kede lobo me Keper luŋ;" 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadab ame onwoŋo onyomo nyaka a Culeman a nyiŋe Tapat, en onwoŋo loo lobo me Dor luŋ." 
1Kings4:12 Bana wot Akilud ame onwoŋo loo boma me Tanak, Megiddo, kede lobo luŋ me Bet-cean ame tye i ŋet boma Jaretan ame tye i luŋ me Jejreel, tuno kede naka iyi Abel-mekola kede Jokmeam." 
1Kings4:13 Ben-geber onwoŋo loo boma ame obedo me a jo a Jair wot a Manace, kede lobo me Argob ame tye i Bacan ame tye iye pacci adoŋo pyerabicel twal ame ocecelo oko i cel apama ame ogero atek, dok acegi i dogcelgi daŋ obedo me mola." 
1Kings4:14 Akinadab wot a Iddo, onwoŋo loo boma me Makanaim." 
1Kings4:15 Akinaj rik daŋ onwoŋo onyomo nyaka abaka Culeman ame nyiŋe Bacemat, en onwoŋo loo lobo Naputali," 
1Kings4:16 Bana wot a Kucai onwoŋo loo lobo me Acer kede paco me Bealot. 
1Kings4:17 Yekocafati me Parua, ame onwoŋo loo lobo me Icakar." 
1Kings4:18 Cimei wot a Ela, onwoŋo loo lobo me Benjamin." 
1Kings4:19 Geber wot a Uri, onwoŋo loo lobo me Gilead ame rik koŋ Cikon abaka a jo Amor oloo kede Og abaka me Bacan. Ŋat ocele daŋ onwoŋo tye ame loo lobo me Juda luŋ." 
1Kings4:20 Jo Juda kede Icrael rik onwoŋo pol atek ame rom kede kwoyo me dog nam. I kare a Culeman gin obedo ame cunygi yom kun ocemo oyeŋ dok daŋ omatte. 
1Kings4:21 Culeman omedde mwonyo loc ocele luŋ i te loccere, cakere i kulo me Efurate tuno naka i loba a jo Piriciti, kede naka i waŋ lobo me Miciri. En obedo loyogi kun gin oculo ocolo baŋe pi kare me kwo mere luŋ." 
1Kings4:22 Nina acel acel rik omio Culeman moko kwon apwottere ame roma puku mia acel, kede moko kwon ocele puku mia aryo," 
1Kings4:23 twoni olobakino apar, dok pyeraryo, rommi mia acel, kun nwoŋo mom okwano iye aderi, atil, apali kede gwen ame opito aber." 
1Kings4:24 En onwoŋo loo loba luŋ ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ anyarodi me kulo Efurate, cakere i Tipica tuno kede naka i Gaja. En onwoŋo loo obakki luŋ ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ anyarodi, dok daŋ onwoŋo en bedo i kuc i loba luŋ amano loba mere." 
1Kings4:25 Jo Juda kede jo Icrael luŋ obedo i kuc i kare me kwo mere luŋ, cakere i Dan tuno kede naka i Beerceba, kun jo me ot acel acel tye olokgi kede odurogi." 
1Kings4:26 Culeman rik onwoŋo tye aguragura tutumia pyeraŋwen iyi awi mere pi gadigadi mere, kede cirikale ame riŋo aguragura tutumia apar wie aryo." 
1Kings4:27 Gabuna mere apar wie aryo ame rik onwoŋo loo lobo apapat me Icrael obedo miyo cam baŋe, kun ŋat acel acel miyo kit cam luŋ ame omito aboŋo rem, dok mio i dwe mere ame opoke." 
1Kings4:28 Ŋat acel acel i akinagi daŋ rik mio cayiri kede reŋ kal ame omito me acama aguragura kan ame omito iye, kede pi aguragura ocele ame otio kedgi." 
1Kings4:29 Obaŋa onwoŋo omio Culeman ryeko kede ŋec atut meicel. Tammere onwoŋo malo ame mom roma akoba. 
1Kings4:30 Culeman onwoŋo ryek ame ryeko mere kato kit ryeko oryeko luŋ ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ kide kede me oryeko me Miciri luŋ. 
1Kings4:31 Ryeko mere onwoŋo kato me a jo luŋ; onwoŋo ryek ame kato Etan dano me Ejira oko, kede Keman, kede Kallol, kede Darda, ame gin luŋ obedo awobe a Makal. Nyiŋe orwo atek i loba luŋ ame rik onwoŋo amano loba mere." 
1Kings4:32 En obedo ŋat acel ame ocako carokop ame romo tutumia adek kede wer ame kato tutumia acel oko. 
1Kings4:33 En okobo kop i kom yen, kun cako i kom yat cedar ame tye i Lebanon tuno kede i kom ogudo ame tu doŋo i kor apama; okobo daŋ kop i kom leyi me tim, kede i kom winy, kede i kom gin ame lak alaka, naka i kom rec-gu." 
1Kings4:34 Obakki me rok apapat me wi podo luŋ owinyo pi ryeko a Culeman, ote cwayo jo me wot winyo kop i kom ryeko mere." 
1Kings5:1 Kare ame Kiram abaka me Turo owinyo ni jo Icrael otyeka wiro Culeman kede moo me bedo abaka akaka pappere Daudi, en ocwao kwena baŋe. Man otimere pien Kiram onwoŋo rik maro Daudi con." 
1Kings5:2 Culeman te dwokki Kiram kop kit man: 
1Kings5:3 “Yin iŋeo aber ni gero at a Rwot Obaŋa obin oloo pappa Daudi oko, pien obedo lweny kare i kare okworrere ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete. En onwoŋo mom romo gero ot tuno waŋ ame Obaŋa omie eloo okworrere luŋ." 
1Kings5:4 Cite aman doŋ Rwot Obaŋana otyeko gire miya kuc i kabedo luŋ. Okworra moro doŋ pe, dok daŋ mom atye kede peko moro kadi acel." 
1Kings5:5 Mannono omio doŋ atamo ni myero ager at woro Rwot Obaŋana, kite ame Rwot rik ociko kede baŋ pappa Daudi kun koba ni, ‘Wodi ame abino keto me leyo locci en ame bino gero orpira.’" 
1Kings5:6 Man omio doŋ akwai me cwayo joni i Lebanon me owot otonna yen cedar. Jona daŋ bino wot tic karacel kedgi, an abino culo ocara a joni kite ame yin ibino moko. Yin iŋeo aber ni mom tye ŋattoro i akina jona ame ŋeo toŋo yen aber acalo jo Cidon.”" 
1Kings5:7 Kare ame abaka Kiram owinyo kop a Culeman, olelo meicel, te koba ni, “Tin gire myero pwo Rwot pi miyo Daudi awobi aryek-ki me loyo twon rok adwoŋ wok-ki!”" 
1Kings5:8 Kiram te dwokki Culeman kop kun kobo ni, “Atyeko winyo kwena ame icwao, daŋ doŋ atye ame atere oko me tiyo gin ame ikobo, abino miyi yen cedar kede bao me ciprec." 
1Kings5:9 Abino miyo jona kwanyo yennono i Lebanon kelo naka i nam; i dog nam kuno, gin dok bino tweyogi karacel ote keto i nam me kwaŋ i wi pii calo boda naka kan ame ibino mitogi iye. Ka doŋ otuno kuno, jona bino gonyogi oko, eka joni te gamo. Gin ame yin ibino timo pira ene, yin ibino miyo jo me odacam.”" 
1Kings5:10 Abaka Kiram te cako cwalo bao apipim me yen cedar kede ciprec baŋ abaka Culeman kite ame onwoŋo en amito. 
1Kings5:11 Abaka Culeman te cako cwayo ŋano a nyige ame romo puku tutumia pyerabicel me acama a jo mere, kede moo jeituni ame oodo ame romo debe tutumia pyeraŋwen. En obedo miyo man luŋ mwaka i mwaka." 
1Kings5:12 Obaŋa te miyo ryeko baŋ Culeman kite ame rik ociko. Kuc obedo tye i akina Kiram kede Culeman, gin te keto cikere i akinagi." 
1Kings5:13 Abaka Culeman te cako rayo jo iyi Icrael luŋ pi tiyo tic atek; jo luŋ ame orono te romo tutumia pyeradek. 
1Kings5:14 En te cwalogi i Lebanon, kun cwao jo tutumia apar dwe i dwe. En onwoŋo opokogi i dul adek, kun dul man woto bedo kuno dwe acel te dok dwogo bedo i paccigi dwete aryo. En onwoŋo oketo Adoniram me loyo jo ame orono-nono luŋ," 
1Kings5:15 Culeman onwoŋo daŋ dok tye i jo ocele ame romo tutumia pyerabiro ame ticgi obedo me yeyo kityec ducu kede jo ocele daŋ tutumia pyeraboro ame ticgi obedo payo kiddi i lobo obedo kidikidi. 
1Kings5:16 Medo i kom jo-nono onwoŋo daŋ dok tye jo ocele ame romo tutumia adek kede mia adek ame onwoŋo abaka oketogi me loyo lwak ame onwoŋo tio tic. 
1Kings5:17 Jo te muko twoni kiddi adoŋo ame opao aber kite ame onwoŋo abaka ociko, me gero acakki te ot Obaŋa." 
1Kings5:18 Mannono en kite ame ogedo a Culeman, kede ogedo me Kiram, karacel kede jo Gebal obedo tiyo kede ticgi me payo bao kede kiddi me gero ot Obaŋa." 
1Kings6:1 Culeman rik te cako gero ot a Rwot, i mwaka me aŋwen me loccere ame en onwoŋo loo kede jo Icrael, i dwe me aryo, ame olwoŋo ni Jib. I kare-ni onwoŋo doŋ okato mwaka mia aŋwen kede pyeraboro twal cakere i kare ame jo Icrael onwoŋo oya kede i lobo Miciri." 
1Kings6:2 Ot ame abaka Culeman ogero-nono onwoŋo bor me yie romo futi pyeraboŋwen, kun lac me yie tye futi pyeradek, eka borrere me malo te bedo futi pyeraŋwen wie abic." 
1Kings6:3 Icika ame tye tutuŋ doggola me donyo, i nyim icika adwoŋŋere, borrere onwoŋo romo futi pyeradek ame rom aroma i lac me icika acil, kede laccere futi apar wie abic." 
1Kings6:4 Dirica onwoŋo popol i ottono, kun otio kede purem ame orwakere i kor apama, ame tuŋ a nen i oko diŋ, eka en ame nen iyi ot te bedo alalac." 
1Kings6:5 En dok te miyo gero gedo ocele i ŋe ottono kun ogero mannono i dyere, kun icika adwoŋŋere kede icika ame tye tyelo ame en icika acil meicel tye iye. I kom gedo i oko-nono en dok te gero iye icika ocele atitino ame okubere i wi wadgi, kun mom oweko kannono odoŋ ame twolo a mom ogero iye ici ka." 
1Kings6:6 Icika i pinyere onwoŋo lacgi tye futi abiro kede nucu pi acel acel; icika i dyere lacgi te bedo futi aboŋwen pi acel acel; eka icika imalo te bedo futi apar kede nucu pi acel acel. Cakere i piny wot malo, obedo jwiko dit a kor apama me wek ot i malo cuŋ i kom apama i piny aboŋo dok rwako arii ocele iyi apama." 
1Kings6:7 I kare me gedo, obedo tic i kiddi ame onwoŋo doŋ otyeko yiko oko i ka muko kiddi. Man omio i kare ame otye ka gero ot Obaŋa dwon ginnoro me nyonyo ame otio kede i toŋo onyo i payo jami mom owinyere kuno acalo anyul onyo lee." 
1Kings6:8 Doggola me donyo iyi icika atitino i pinnyege onwoŋo tye i tutuŋ anyarodi me ot Obaŋa, kun rwom tye me yito iyi icika i udi i dyere kede dok en ame kato i adekkere ame tye malo." 
1Kings6:9 Mannono en kite ame rik en ogero kede ot Obaŋa naka otum. Otio apama me wi ot ame mio ot bedo ŋie, otio apama-nono kede yen ame oririo aria kede bao me cedar ame opeto i wi yen me Cedar." 
1Kings6:10 Gedo ocele-naca omano ot luŋ, icika atitino mege ame oryeye i yore adek-ki, en ipiny kede en i dyere kede en i malo, ame bocogi cakere i dye ot piny tuno i wi ot malo romo futi abiro kede nucu pi ot acel acel kun okukuba i kom bao cedar ame oririo aria." 
1Kings6:11 I kare-nono Rwot te kobbi Culeman ni," 
1Kings6:12 “Kop a mako ot ame igero-ni, ka ce yin ibedo lubo icwilla kun itio gin ame aciko dok daŋ igwoko cikka luŋ, itio daŋ kedgi, abino cobo i komi kop a rik aciko baŋ pappi Daudi." 
1Kings6:13 Dok abino bedo baŋ jona Icrael kun mom aya i akina jona Icrael kadi acel.” 
1Kings6:14 Culeman rik te gero ot Obaŋa naka tyeko. 
1Kings6:15 I kor apama i yi ot en ocacano iye bao cedar cakere i piny naka i kom apama me wi ot ame mio ot bedo aŋic; aco piny i dye ot ote cano iye bao me cipre. 
1Kings6:16 Aco icika i tyelo ame olwoŋo ni Kabedo Acil Meicel, en te gero i bao cedar, cakere piny i dye ot naka malo i kom apama me wi ot ame mio ot bedo aŋic; borrere onwoŋo romo futi pyeradek." 
1Kings6:17 Aco icika adwoŋŋere ame tye i nyim Kabedo Acil Meicel, borrere onwoŋo romo futi pyerabicel." 
1Kings6:18 Bao cedar ame onwoŋo tye i ottono, onwoŋo odedeo komgi kede cal opoko kede cal ature ame ogoro i komgi. Yi ot luŋ onwoŋo ocano iye bao cedar, ame kom kiddi ame ogero i ot mom twero nen." 
1Kings6:19 Eka tyelo ote gero iye icika acil me keto canduk me cikere a Rwot. 
1Kings6:20 Kabedo acillono onwoŋo borrere tye futi pyeradek kede borrere me malo daŋ futi pyeradek, kun omwono kome oko i jabu ame olio aber. Dok ote tiyo keno lam daŋ i bao me cedar." 
1Kings6:21 Culeman omwono yi ot Obaŋa oko i jabu ame olio aber, te ŋolo dye ot i nyor me jabu ame en orio i nyim kabedo acil meicel ame tye tyelo ame onwoŋo daŋ omwono oko i jabu." 
1Kings6:22 Yi ot Obaŋa luŋ onwoŋo omwono oko i jabu karacel i keno lam ame onwoŋo tye i kabedo acil ame tye i tyelo. 
1Kings6:23 Abaka rik te miyo payo cal okerubi aryo, kun opao i yat jeituni, ote ketogi i kabedo acil meicel ame tye tyelo; okerubi acel acel onwoŋo borrere tye futi apar wie abic." 
1Kings6:24 Bwomgi me tuŋ cel keken onwoŋo romo futi abiro kede nucu, tuŋ ocele daŋ abiro kede nucu; mannono omio ya i lanni bwomgi tuŋ cel tuno tuŋ ocele romo futi apar wie abic." 
1Kings6:25 Bor okerubi acel acel onwoŋo tye futi apar wie abic, kun bwome daŋ tye futi apar wie abic. Gin aryo luŋ onwoŋo bocogi rorom, komgi daŋ rorom." 
1Kings6:26 Bor a ŋat acel acel onwoŋo tye futi apar wie abic. 
1Kings6:27 En te cibo okerubi-nono i dye ot ame tye tyelo, kun ŋat acel acel ocuŋ i ŋet awottere ame bwomgi oyarre ayara, bwom ŋat acel acel tuŋ cel ogudo kor apama tuŋ cel kede bwom a ŋat acel tuŋ ocele ogudo kor apama tuŋ ocele, eka lanni bwomgi me dyere te rwatte i dye ot." 
1Kings6:28 Kom okerubi onwoŋo omwono oko kede jabu. 
1Kings6:29 Kom ot luŋ ote deyo i cal okerubi, kede cal otit kede ature ame ogogoro i kom icika i yie kede icika i oko daŋ." 
1Kings6:30 Dok omwono dye ot daŋ oko i jabu, kun otimo man iyi icika ame tye tyelo kede i en ame tye oko daŋ." 
1Kings6:31 Kika me doggola me donyo i kabedo acil onwoŋo tye aryo ame otio i bao me yat jeituni, kun arii me doggolanono luŋ kede akaragi, acel acel onwoŋo tye kede twoke abic." 
1Kings6:32 Kika aryo luŋ ame otio i bao me yat jeituni-nono onwoŋo odeo komgi kede cal okerubi kede cal otit, kede cal ature ame ogogoro i komgi. Cal ame ogogoro-nono luŋ onwoŋo omwono oko luŋ i jabu." 
1Kings6:33 Aco kika me doggola ame donyo iyi icika adwoŋŋere karacel kede akara mere onwoŋo otio i bao me yat jeituni, kun omio twoke tye aŋwen." 
1Kings6:34 Dok ote tiyo kika aryo ame twero dolle oko, kun otio magi-nono i bao me yat cipre." 
1Kings6:35 Odeo daŋ kome oko i cal okerubi, cal yat otit kede cal ature ame ogogoro i komgi, ote mwono komgi luŋ i jabu ame olilio acil meicel." 
1Kings6:36 Dyekal onwoŋo ogero tuŋ nyim ot Obaŋa, ame ote guro oko kede cel ame otio i kiddi ame opao ocano i yore adek, kede bao me yat cedar yore acel." 
1Kings6:37 Culeman ocako gero acakki me te ot a Rwot i mwaka me aŋwen me loccere, i dwe me aryo ame olwoŋo ni Jib." 
1Kings6:38 Eka i mwaka me apar wie acel, i dwe me aboro, ame olwoŋo ni Bul, en ame tic me ot a Rwot te tum iye, kun otum aber i kite ame rik oyiko ni myero ti kede. Gedo mere otero mwakki abiro." 
1Kings7:1 Culeman dok te gero ode en ikome, ame ticcere otero mwakki apar wie adek twal te tum." 
1Kings7:2 En ogero ot ocele ame olwoŋo ni Buŋ me Lebanon. Borrere onwoŋo romo futi mia acel kede pyerabic, eka laccere te bedo futi pyerabiro wie abic, borrere me malo te bedo futi pyeraŋwen wie abic. Pagi me ottono onwoŋo tye oryeye i yore adek, ame i yore acel acel tye iye pagi me yat cedar apar wie abic, kun arii me bao cedar obuto i wigi malo." 
1Kings7:3 Icika atitino i malo daŋ ogero i yen cedar, ame oririo obuto i wi pagi pyeraŋwen wie abic, ame oryeye i yore adek ca, kun i yore acel acel tye iye pagi apar wie abic." 
1Kings7:4 Bao me purem me waŋ dirica daŋ oryeo i yore adek kun dirica acel acel otikere awottere. 
1Kings7:5 Doggola luŋ kede dirica luŋ twokgi onwoŋo tye aŋwen aŋwen, kun dirica otikere kede dirica wadgi, ame oryeye daŋ i yore adek." 
1Kings7:6 Dok te gero ot ocele ame pagi tye iye apopol; borrere onwoŋo romo futi pyerabiro wie kany, eka laccere te bedo futi pyeraŋwen wie kany, kun i doggola me donyo i tuŋ nyime tye iye ot ocele atidi ame wie obuto i wi pagi." 
1Kings7:7 Dok te gero icika ocele ame kommere me loc bedo iye ame olwoŋo daŋ ni Ot ŋolo kop, ame en kan ame Culeman ŋolo iye kop. Ottono daŋ onwoŋo ocano bao cedar me wumo apama mere, cakere i dye ot piny tuno kede naka i kom apama i malo iyi ot." 
1Kings7:8 Culeman dok te gero ot ocele me bedo mere. En ogero mannono i kit gedo acellono, kun ogero i dyekal ocele i ŋe ot ŋolo kop. En daŋ dok te gero kit ot acellono pi dako mere, ame obedo nyaka abaka me Miciri, ame rik en onyomo." 
1Kings7:9 Udi magi luŋ, anaka ot a Rwot, cakere iyi acakki tergi piny naka i wigi malo, onwoŋo ogerogi luŋ i kiddi mogo ame welgi malo meicel, kun opaogi aber i kite ame onwoŋo rik amito ikokome; ŋegi kede yigi luŋ onwoŋo oyiko aber meicel, kun oyiko kede ocumeno." 
1Kings7:10 Iyi acakki te udi onwoŋo ogero i kiddi adoŋo, dok ame oyiko aber meicel, kiddi ocele onwoŋo romo futi apar wie aryo, kede en ocele ame romo futi apar wie abic." 
1Kings7:11 I wi kiddi me acakki te ot ote keto iye kiddi ame welgi malo meicel, kun opaogi dokopimo ditogi i kite ame amito ikokome, karacel kede bao me cedar." 
1Kings7:12 I cel ame onwoŋo omano dyekal adwoŋ ocano iye kiddi ame opao i yore adek, eka ote tiyo bao cedar i wigi; dyekal me yie ame omano ot a Rwot, kede ot atidi ame tye i doggola me donyo i ot a Rwot daŋ ogero amannono." 
1Kings7:13 Abaka Culeman ocwao kwena i Turo, ote kelo lomoro ame nyiŋe Kiram, ame onwoŋo adiro i tic me mola." 
1Kings7:14 Pappere onwoŋo rik obedo dano ame oya i Turo, en daŋ onwoŋo rik obedo lo ame adiro meicel i tic me mola, cite i kare-nono onwoŋo doŋ oto oko. Tottere rik onwoŋo oya iyi atekere a Naputali. Kiram rik obedo twon lo moro aryek meicel dok daŋ onwoŋo doŋ ocwiny atek i tiyo jami luŋ ame otio i mola. En oye gamo tic ame Culeman rik olwoŋe pire, tic me loyo tic luŋ ame otio i mola." 
1Kings7:15 En otio pagi me mola aryo, kun acel acel borrere romo futi pyeraryo wie abiro, lac a kore te bedo futi apar wie aboro ka opimo i tol; yigi onwoŋo twolo, inoŋŋere onwoŋo buco romo inci adek." 
1Kings7:16 En dok te twako tok mola aryo me aketa i wigi, kun acel acel borrere romo futi abiro kede nucu." 
1Kings7:17 Dok te tiyo gin obedo bwobwo, ame okedo i nyor; otio gin aryo, acel pi tok me aketa i wi pagi acel kede acel pi en ocele." 
1Kings7:18 En te tiyo dok cal okwer pomegranat yore aryo ame omano tok me aketa i wi pagi acel acel kun bedo i wi gin obedo bwobwo ame owumo tok me aketa i wi pagi. 
1Kings7:19 Tok me aketa i wi pagi-nono rik onwoŋo odeo luŋ i cal kalaŋweka ame bocogi romo futi abicel abicel. 
1Kings7:20 Ginnoro oluŋere bala gulu pii onwoŋo oketo i wi pagi aryo luŋ. Cal okwer pomegranat luŋ onwoŋo tye mia aryo pi pagi acel acel, kun ocanogi i yore aryo i dog obwo nyor i kom tok me aketa i wi pagi." 
1Kings7:21 Kiram rik te keto pagi aryo-nono i nyim icika ame tye i doggola ame donyo i ot Obaŋa; oketo acel tuŋ anyarolum te cako nyiŋe ni Jakin, eka te keto en ocele tuŋ anyarodi, te cako nyiŋe ni Boaj." 
1Kings7:22 Otio cal kalaŋweka i wi pagi aryo luŋ. Mannono en kite ame rik otyeko kede tic i kom pagi. 
1Kings7:23 Kiram dok te tiyo dero pii me mola oluŋere aluŋa ame tuttere romo futi abiro kede nucu, lac me yie futi apar wie abic, ya i doge tuŋ cel tuno naka i doge tuŋ cel; eka laccere mano kore luŋ te bedo futi pyeraŋwen wie abic." 
1Kings7:24 I lak doge i piny ote ryeyo iye cal opoko mano amana, ame kan oryeo iye nono romo futi pyeraŋwen wie abic. Cal opoko-nono oryeo i yore aryo. I kare ame otio dero pii me mola, otio daŋ cal opoko i kome cutu." 
1Kings7:25 En otero dero gwoko pii-nono te wot cibo i ŋe cal twoni me mola apar wie aryo, kun ocuŋ adek adek: adek oneno tuŋ anyarodi, adek oneno tuŋ anyarolum, adek oneno tuŋ to, kede adek te neno tutuŋ kide, ŋegi luŋ odok i te dero." 
1Kings7:26 Inoŋ a kom dero-nono onwoŋo romo inci adek; doge ote tiyo bala dog kopo, ame rom aroma i tur kalaŋweka. Dero gwoko pii-nono onwoŋo twero donyo iye pii ame romo debe tutumia aŋwen." 
1Kings7:27 Kiram dok te tiyo gadigadi me mola apar. Gadigadi acel acel onwoŋo borrere romo futi abicel, laccere daŋ futi abicel, eka borrere me malo te bedo futi aŋwen kede nucu." 
1Kings7:28 Gadigadinogo rik otio kit man; opeto mola apada arorom i ŋete luŋ, kun gin luŋ okubere kede arii me mola." 
1Kings7:29 I kom mola apada-nogo onwoŋo ogogoro i komgi cal eŋatu, kede cal twoni, kede cal okerubi. Arii me mola daŋ onwoŋo odeo doggi i cal nyor ame odwalo malo i wi cal eŋatu kede cal twoni, dok daŋ odwadwalo en ocele i tyengi." 
1Kings7:30 Gadigadi acel acel onwoŋo tye kede tyene me mola aŋwen kede arii me mola aryo me notogi aryo aryo. Itwoke aŋwen ducu te bedo iye akwak tako lwok ame tye iyi gadigadi. Akwakkono luŋ onwoŋo odeo komgi i cal nyor ame odwalo i komgi. 
1Kings7:31 I doge onwoŋo tye iye ginnoro ame oluŋere aluŋa, kun ocuŋ malo i wi gadigadi ame borrere romo futi acel kede nucu, cakere i kom gadigadi dok kede malo. Doge ogurre agura kun tuttere ya i doge dok i tere piny romo futi aryo. Odeo doge-nono kede callogo ame ogogoro iye." 
1Kings7:32 Okot tyengi onwoŋo tye futi aryo ka ocuŋ acuŋa; gin aŋwen luŋ otye i te mola apada kun arii mola okukubogi onotogi kede kom gadigadi. 
1Kings7:33 Okot tyengi otio arom aroma okot me gadigadi lweny; jami komgi luŋ obedo mola ame olio alia. 
1Kings7:34 Akwak mola onwoŋo tye i te gadigadi acel acel, ame gin luŋ okubere oko kede kom gadigadi." 
1Kings7:35 I wi gadigadi acel acel onwoŋo otio iye ginnoro ame oluŋere aluŋa, ame borrere romo inci aboŋwen, dok akwak tako lwok iyi gadigadi kede mola apada luŋ okubere oko i kom gadigadi." 
1Kings7:36 I kom akwak luŋ kede mola apada, ogogoro iye cal okerubi kede cal eŋatugu karacel kede cal otit-gu, kannoro ame oneno ni cal romo goye iye, ote daŋ dok dedeo oko kede cal nyor ame odwalo i ŋetgi." 
1Kings7:37 Kiram otio kodi gadigadi-nono apar. Gin luŋ onwoŋo ororom dok daŋ ocacal. 
1Kings7:38 Kiram daŋ dok te tiyo tako lwok apar, kun acel acel tye pi gadigadi acel acel. Tako lwok acel acel laccere onwoŋo romo futi abicel dok oromo onyo iye pii ameromo debe pyeraboro." 
1Kings7:39 En te ryeyo gadigadi abic tutuŋ anyarolum me ot a Rwot, kede abic tutuŋ anyarodi, eka dero me gwoko pii en te miyo cuŋ i gul ot tutuŋ anyarolum ame dok tutuŋ kide." 
1Kings7:40 Kiram dok te tiyo tako jobo buru apol, atok buru kede becen lwok. Kiram te tyeko tic abaka luŋ i kom ot a Rwot." 
1Kings7:41 Jami ame en otio ene: pagi aryo, tok me aketa i wi pagi daŋ aryo, ame oluŋere calo gulu, kede bwo daŋ aryo me wumo wi tok ame oketo i wi pagi." 
1Kings7:42 Cal okwer pomegranat mia aŋwen pi bwo aryo-nu, eka te ryeyogi i lak bwo acel acel kun ryeogi i yore aryo, me wumo wi tok ame oketo i wi pagi aryo ca." 
1Kings7:43 Dok te tiyo daŋ gadigadi apar kede tako lwok apar ame oluto iyi gadigadi. 
1Kings7:44 Te tiyo daŋ dero gwoko pii acel, kede cal twoni apar wie aryo ame ocibo dero gwoko pii i ŋegi." 
1Kings7:45 Jami magi luŋ ame rik Kiram otio pi abaka Culeman, gin luŋ rik otio i mola ame olilio komgi apwot meicel." 
1Kings7:46 Abaka rik omio orio: magi luŋ i bar me kulo Jordan kan ame lobo me cweyo gulu tye iye i akina Cukot kede Jaretan. 
1Kings7:47 Jami ame otio-nono luŋ Culeman mom omio opimogi pien onwoŋo pol meicel; mannono omio pek a mola ame otiogi kede mom ŋeye. 
1Kings7:48 Mannono en kite ame rik Culeman otio kede jami luŋ ame tye i ot a Rwot, gin jami-nono ene: keno lam me jabu, meja me jabu pi ogati aketa i nyim Rwot," 
1Kings7:49 acib tara me jabu ame olio aber, ame oryeo i nyim kabedo acil ame tye i tyelo, kun kany tye tutuŋ anyarolum kede kany tutuŋ anyarodi; kede cal ature apipim, karacel kede boi kwanyo mac, ame gin luŋ otiogi i jabu;" 
1Kings7:50 kede ikopo apopol, makac apopol, tako lwok daŋ apopol, tako me waŋo odok akur kede weer me lodi mac, ame gin luŋ daŋ otiogi i jabu ame olio aber; kede pata me aketa i kika me doggola ame donyo iyi icika i tyelo, ame en kabedo acil meicel, kede me aketa i kika me doggola ame donyo iyi icika adwoŋŋere me ot Obaŋa." 
1Kings7:51 Man en kite ame rik tic luŋ ame abaka Culeman otio i kom ot a Rwot otum kede. Culeman te daŋ kelo jami luŋ a rik pappere Daudi ojalo baŋ Rwot iye; okelo ryal, jabu, kede jami ocele acalo tabbi, cupa, kopo, te kanogi luŋ i ot kano lim a Rwot." 
1Kings8:1 Culeman rik te lwoŋo odoŋe me Icrael, odoŋ atekere, kede odoŋe ame loo doggola a kwarigi, me bino baŋe i Jerucalem, me bino kwanyo canduk cikere a Rwot ame rik onwoŋo tye i paco a Daudi ame olwoŋo ni Cion." 
1Kings8:2 Jo Icrael luŋ te bino cokere baŋ abaka Culeman i kare me kwero ecuban, i dwe me Etanim, ame en dwe me abiro." 
1Kings8:3 I kare ame odoŋe luŋ me Icrael obino, olamdog doŋ te tiŋo canduk cikere a Rwot," 
1Kings8:4 kun jo Levi konyogi. Gin te tero candukkono kede kema me rwatte karacel kede jami acil luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye i kema. 
1Kings8:5 Abaka Culeman karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te cokere karacel i nyim canduk kono, kun oŋolo lwak rommi kede twoni apipim, ame welgi mom ŋeye, dok daŋ mom romo kwanne, me yalo Rwot." 
1Kings8:6 Olamdog te doŋ tiŋo canduk me cikere a Rwot tero naka i kabedo mere iyi icika acil ame tye i tyelo i ot a Rwot, ame en kabedo acil meicel, ote wot keto piny kuno i te bwom okerubi." 
1Kings8:7 Bwom okerubi ame oyarre te wumo candukkono oko karacel kede ludi luŋ me tiŋe. 
1Kings8:8 Ludi onwoŋo rik boco meicel, ame ka ŋattoro ocuŋ i kabedo acil i nyim kabedo acil meicel ame tye i tyelo, twero neno wigi, ento pe twero nen i oko; ludi-nono pwod tye kuno naka atot t in." 
1Kings8:9 Ginnoro ocele onwoŋo rik mom i candukkono, kono ka kiddi apada ame rik Muca okelo kuno i te kidi me Cinai, kan ame Rwot rik ocikere iye i jo Icrael i kare ame gin oya i Miciri." 
1Kings8:10 I kare ame olamdog oya i kabedo acil, pol obino te poŋ ot a Rwot oko." 
1Kings8:11 Mannono omio olamdog mom dok romo tiyo ticgi i ot a Rwot pi pollono, pien kwogo a Rwot onwoŋo doŋ opoŋ iyi ot oko." 
1Kings8:12 Abaka Culeman te cako kwayo Obaŋa kun kobo ni, “Rwot doŋ okelo cen i polo, ento en oyero gire bedo i pol acol icuc." 
1Kings8:13 Agerri doŋ twon ortoro amalo meicel, me bedo kabedoni nakanaka.”" 
1Kings8:14 Abaka Culeman te doŋ lokere neno lwak, eka te lamo winyo i kom jo Icrael luŋ, kun jo tye ame ocuŋ gigi mot." 
1Kings8:15 Abaka te kobo ni, “Pwo wunu Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael! Pien en ikome omio gin a rik eciko i doge baŋ pappa Daudi ocobere, ame en rik okobo ni," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Cakere i kare ame akwanyo jona Icrael i lobo Miciri, mom ru ayero boma moro iyi atekere me Icrael luŋ me gero ottoro iye, kan ame amito ni wora iye; ento an ayero Daudi me loyo lwakka Icrael.’ ”" 
1Kings8:17 Culeman te medde kobo ni, “I kare-naca pappa Daudi obedo kede tam i cunye me gero ot me woro Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael." 
1Kings8:18 Cite Rwot en ame rik te juko pappa kun kobbe ni, ‘Itimo ber me bedo kede tam me gero ot me wora," 
1Kings8:19 ento mom yin en ame ibino gerra ot, wodi ame ibino nywalo en ame bino gero ot me wora.’" 
1Kings8:20 Nen Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo gin a rik eciko ocobere oko; pien en omio an aleo kaka pappa Daudi acalo abaka me Icrael, kite ame Rwot ociko-naca, dok daŋ doŋ atyeko ot me woro Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
1Kings8:21 Dok daŋ atyeko keto ka gwoko canduk a Rwot i ode-naca, canduk ame tye iye kiddi apada aryo me cikere ame rik Rwot ocikere kede i kwariwa, i kare ame kwanyogi i lobo me Miciri.”" 
1Kings8:22 Culeman te ya wot cuŋ i nyim keno lam kun lwak jo Icrael luŋ tye aneno, te taŋo ciŋe malo i polo," 
1Kings8:23 okwao Rwot kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael, mom dok tye Obaŋa moro ocele ame cal kedi, akadi malo i polo onyo piny i wi lobo, ame gwoko cikere mere calo yin, yin ame inyuto marri baŋ omironi luŋ ame lubi kede cunygi luŋ." 
1Kings8:24 Ibedo lubo ginnoro luŋ ame rik ititti pappa Daudi; gin ame yin rik ikobo kede dogi, aman doŋ yin ikomi icako miyo cobere oko, dok daŋ tye acobere luŋ kakare." 
1Kings8:25 Ama Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael doŋ ityeko giri lubo ginnoro luŋ ame rik ikobo baŋ pappa Daudi ni, ‘Mom gire ibino bedo aboŋo akwarri moro i wi kom me loc me Icrael, tekki ikwaeni bino bedo jo ame kitegi beco, kun otio gin ame an amito, kite ame yin ibedo tiyo kede-ni.’" 
1Kings8:26 Ama Obaŋa me Icrael, tim ber aman doŋ imed moko koppi-naca ba, ame rik ikobo baŋ pappa Daudi, me bed kit ame rik ikobo kede." 
1Kings8:27 “Ento Obaŋa bino bedo piny i lobo kan ateni? En ame kadi polo twal mom daŋ romme-nie, kara doŋ ot ame ogero-ni twero romme niŋo?" 
1Kings8:28 Kadi amannono ba, tim ber iwiny kwacca, an amironi, abako doga Ama Rwot Obaŋa, tim ber iwiny kokona kede kwacca ame akelo i nyimi tin-ni." 
1Kings8:29 Tim ber inen ot man dyewor kede dyeceŋ, kabedo man ame yin iyero me bedo kan ame myero jo wori iye. Tim ber iwiny kwacca ame akelo i nyimi i ot man." 
1Kings8:30 Winy kwacca kede kwac a joni Icrael ka ce gin okwao i ot man. Winy ba, Ama Rwot, i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo dok daŋ i timwa kica i kom balwa." 
1Kings8:31 “Ka ce ŋattoro otimo balloro baŋ dano wadgi, eka ote kele kan i nyim keno lam me en kwoŋ iye," 
1Kings8:32 Ama Rwot, tim ber iwiny i kabedoni i polo ite ŋolo kop iyi akina omironi. Mi can pot i kom abalo, kun imio ŋat a kopporo mom i kome lo kop." 
1Kings8:33 “Ka ce okwor a joni Icrael oloogi oko pi balloro ame gin obalo i nyimi, ka ce oŋut ote dwogo baŋi, ote bino paki i ot man, kun obako doggi baŋi," 
1Kings8:34 tim ber iwiny kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i wi polo. Tim joni kica i kom balgi ite dwoggogi i lobo a rik imio baŋ kwarigi. 
1Kings8:35 “Ka ce joni Icrael otimo balloro baŋi eka ite keto can i komgi, kun itwonogi kot oko, icennere gin te ŋut, ote dwogo kwayi i ot man kun daŋ opako nyiŋi," 
1Kings8:36 tim ber iwiny kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i wi polo. Tim ber itim omiro-ni kica i kom balgi ame gin obedo joni Icrael. Pwonygi me bedo i kit kwo ame yin imito, mi kot cwe i loboni, ame rik imio baŋ joni Icrael me bedo lobogi doŋ atwal." 
1Kings8:37 “Ka ce kec opoto i lobo onyo two edeke onyo ceŋ alyet otwoo kal oko, onyo oner oko, onyo kit kudi mogo ocele en ocamo; onyo ka okwor oero lweny i kom joni, onyo ka two moro ocele en ame opoto i akinagi," 
1Kings8:38 tim ber iwiny kwacgi. Ka ce ŋattoro keken i akina joni Icrael ame cunye ocwer obino ocwalo kwaccere baŋi i ot man, onyo jo Icrael luŋ ocwalo kwacgi baŋi," 
1Kings8:39 tim ber iwiny kwacgi. Winy kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i wi polo, timgi kica, ite timo gin ame ineno ni porre pire onyo pirgi, i kom gin ame gin okwao. Yin keni giri iŋeo gin ame tye i cuny dano acel acel; pi mannono, yin timmi ŋat acel acel gin ame ineno ni porre pire," 
1Kings8:40 me joni Icrael bed kede lworo i komi i kare luŋ ame gin tye i lobo ame rik imio baŋ kwarigi. 
1Kings8:41 “Ka ce arokkoro ame mom obedo dano me Icrael owinyo piri," 
1Kings8:42 kede pi gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo ame ibedo timo baŋ joni Icrael, eka te bino i ot man pi bino wori, kun oya i lobo aber," 
1Kings8:43 tim ber iwiny kwaccere i kabedoni ame tye malo i wi polo. Tim ber iti gin ame en okwai pire, me jo me wi podo luŋ ŋei ote bedo kede lworo i komi ame rom aroma kede joni Icrael. Mannono bino miyo gin ŋeo ni ot an agero kan piri-ni en ame obedo kan ame myero wori iye." 
1Kings8:44 “Ka ce yin iciko joni me wot lweny okworgi, ka ce gin okelo kwacgi i nyimi i kan ame gin tye iye kuno, kun nyimgi oneno kabedo ame yin en iyero, kede ot ame an agero piri-ni," 
1Kings8:45 tim ber iwiny kwacgi, i kabedoni ame tye malo i wi polo, ite miyogi loyo okworgi oko." 
1Kings8:46 “Ka ce joni Icrael opoto i bal i nyimi, pien mom tye dako moro kadi acel a mom timo bal, eka akemo te maki i komgi, ite miyo okworgi loyogi oko, te daŋ terogi oko acalo opii i lobo moro ocele ame tye kan abor onyo ame tye kan aceggi;" 
1Kings8:47 cite ka ce i kare ame gin tye kuno cunygi te kolo piny, ote ŋut, ote kwayi kun otuco balgi i nyimi, kun oye ni kitegi oballe oko pi gin arac ame gin obedo timo, tim ber iwiny kwacgi, Ama Rwot." 
1Kings8:48 Ka ce i kare ame gin otye i lobo ame oterogi iye acalo opii, gin te ŋut kun oŋut ateteni i cunygi ducu, ote kwayi i kuno kun tuŋ nyimgi oneno lobo man ame yin rik imio baŋ kwarigi, kede kabedo man ame yin giri en iyero, kede ot ame an agero piri-ni," 
1Kings8:49 tim ber iwiny kwacgi, i kabedo ni ame tye malo i polo, ite timogi kica i kom balgi." 
1Kings8:50 Timgi daŋ kica pi jem i komi, imi jo ame oterogi iyi opii bed kedgi aber." 
1Kings8:51 Gin obedo joni ame yin rik ikwanyo i lobo me Miciri, kun iwotogi i kom mac alyet." 
1Kings8:52 “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, tim ber i kare ducu iwiny kwacca kede kwac a joni Icrael i kabedo ducu ame gin tye iye, kur iwir waŋi teŋe ka ce gin okok baŋi." 
1Kings8:53 Yin yam doŋ iyerogi oko i akina rok ocele me wi podo, me gin bed joni ikome, kite ame rik yin imio amironi Muca okobo i kare ame rik ikwanyo kwarigi i Miciri, Ama Rwot Obaŋa.”" 
1Kings8:54 I kare ame Culeman doŋ otyeko kwayo Rwot, en oya oko i nyim keno lam, kan ame en onwoŋo orumo iye kun otino ciŋe malo i polo." 
1Kings8:55 En oya malo te cako lamo winyo i kom lwak luŋ ame onwoŋo ocokere kaci-naca, kun redo i dwon aloŋo ni," 
1Kings8:56 “Myero pwo Rwot ame omio jo mere Icrael kuc, kite ame en rik ociko kede. Kopporo luŋ ame en rik ociko, mom tye moro iye ame mom ocobere kite a rik en okobo baŋ amiro mere Muca." 
1Kings8:57 Rwot Obaŋawa myero medde bedo kedwa kite ame en rik obedo kede kwariwa; en myero kur ya i baŋwa onyo wekwa ata; 
1Kings8:58 en myero miwa obed jo ame winyo kun otio gin ame en mito, dok daŋ ogwoko cikere kede ginnoro luŋ ame en rik ociko onyo okobo baŋ kwariwa." 
1Kings8:59 Dyeceŋ kede dyewor Rwot Obaŋawa myero poyo kwacca ame akelo i nyime-ni luŋ. Myero nino i nino en kony jo Icrael kede abakagi, kun timo gin a mitte." 
1Kings8:60 Mannono bino miyo rok luŋ me wi podo ŋeo ni Rwot kene en obedo Obaŋa, Obaŋa moro ocele doŋ pe." 
1Kings8:61 Rwot myero miwu ibed wunu jo ame geno Rwot Obaŋawu i cunywu luŋ, kun itio wunu gin ame en mito dok daŋ igwoko wunu cikkere luŋ, kite ame itye wunu ka timo i kare man.”" 
1Kings8:62 Abaka kede jo Icrael luŋ a rik tye kuno te yalo Rwot. 
1Kings8:63 Culeman oyalo Rwot i mot me kweyo cuny, twoni tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo, kede rommi tutumia mia acel i pyeraryo nono. Abaka karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ akwero ot a Rwot kittono." 
1Kings8:64 I nino-nono daŋ abaka okwero iye dyekal ame tye i nyim ot Obaŋa. En oyalo Rwot kuno i mot awaŋa, kede mot me moko kwon kede mot me dwol leyi ame oya i kom mot me kweyo cuny, pien keno lam me mola ame onwoŋo tye i nyim ot Obaŋa onwoŋo mom romo yalo mot magi luŋ iye." 
1Kings8:65 Culeman kede jo Icrael luŋ te kwero ecuban; gin te bedo i nyim Rwot Obaŋawa nino abiro. Jo Icrael ame onwoŋo okwero ecubannono onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel, jo luŋ ame onwoŋo oya i dog yo ame woto Kamat tuno kede naka i kulo me Miciri." 
1Kings8:66 I nino me kany wie adekkere, Culeman te cwayo doŋ lwak dok i paccigi. Jo luŋ te pwoyo abaka, ote wot i paccigi kun cunygi yom atek meicel pi jami abeco luŋ ame Rwot otimo pi amiro mere Daudi kede lwakkere luŋ ame gin jo Icrael." 
1Kings9:1 Kare ame Culeman doŋ otyeko gero ot a Rwot, kede ot abaka, kede udi ocele luŋ ame rik en amito," 
1Kings9:2 Rwot dok omedo nen baŋe tyen me aryo mere, kite ame rik koŋ onen kede baŋe i Gibeon ca." 
1Kings9:3 Rwot okobbe ni, “Atyeko doŋ winyo kwacci luŋ ame ikwao. Atyeko lonyo ot ame igero-ni me bedo kabedo acil kan ame jo bino wora iye nakanaka. Wia mom bino wil iye kadi acel." 
1Kings9:4 Aco yin ba, ka ce yin ibino tic baŋa kite ame pappi Daudi obedo timo, kun yii ler dok daŋ atira, ce ibedo tiyo gin ame aciko luŋ, kun igwoko daŋ cikka luŋ," 
1Kings9:5 an abino moko locci i Icrael bedo atwal, kun a gwoko gin a rik aciko baŋ pappi Daudi kare ame akobbe ni, ikwae en ame bino loyo jo Icrael nakanaka." 
1Kings9:6 Ento ka ce yin onyo ŋattoro iyi akina ikwai ogak oko iyo apat kun mom dok luba dok daŋ mom tio gin ame aciko, mom daŋ mako cikka ducu, eka ite kobo wunu oko baŋ obaŋe ocele kun daŋ dok iworogi wunu," 
1Kings9:7 an abino kwanyo jona Icrael oko i lobo ame rik amiogi. Ot man ame doŋ atyeko lonyo obedo acil me wora-ni daŋ abino weko ata, dok abino miyo jona Icrael doko gin ame rok luŋ lolo i doggi, kun oceko kop i komgi." 
1Kings9:8 Ot man bino doko twon wi oburroro oyido ibim, ame jo luŋ ame bino beo i ŋete bino wuro awura kun ojwiye kengi kengi okobo ni, ‘Ŋo kara omio Rwot otimo lobo man kede ot man kit man ba?’" 
1Kings9:9 Jo ocele bino kobo ni, ‘Pien jo Icrael oweko Rwot Obaŋagi oko ata, ame rik okwanyo kwarigi i lobo me Miciri, gin gigi dok olunyo kobo baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele, kun oworogi dok daŋ otio tic pirgi. Mannono en omio Rwot oketo twon can agwa wok-ki i komgi.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Gero ot Obaŋa kede me abaka oterri Culeman mwakki pyeraryo twal me tumo 
1Kings9:11 Abaka Kiram me Turo en obedo miyo Culeman bao me cedar kede bao cipre luŋ karacel kede jabu ame onwoŋo en mito. Kare ame tic me gedo doŋ otum, Culeman omio Kiram pacci ame romo pyeraryo twal i lobo me Galilaya." 
1Kings9:12 Cite i kare ame Kiram oya i Turo te bino i pacci-nono, en onwoŋo ni pacci ame omie-nono mom yomore cunye." 
1Kings9:13 En te kobbi Culeman ni, “Ominna, man en kit pacci ame yin imia?” Man omio kan ame rik omio Kiram-nono luŋ pwod olwoŋo ni Kabul naka atot tin, ame te koppere ni, “Konygi mom.”" 
1Kings9:14 Kiram onwoŋo rik ocwayi Culeman jabu ame pekkere romo tan abic ame romo poŋo lori adittere me kare-ni. 
1Kings9:15 Abaka Culeman obedo rono jo arona i tic me gero ot Obaŋa kede mere, kede Millo, karacel kede cel me Jerucalem. Otio daŋ amannono i kare ame gero pacci me Kajor, Megido kede me Gejer." 
1Kings9:16 Parao abaka me Miciri onwoŋo rik owoto olwenyo i kom boma me Gejer te mako oko, eka te waŋo bomagi-nono oko. Doŋ kare ame Culeman onyomo nyare, en te miyo boma-nono acalo mot ame omio i kare me nyomere," 
1Kings9:17 eka Culeman te dok gero. Culeman orono daŋ jo pi gero boma ame olwoŋo ni Bet-Koron Apiny," 
1Kings9:18 kede Baalat, kede Tamar, ame tye i tim i lobo me Juda," 
1Kings9:19 kede boma luŋ ame rik ogwoko iye cam a Culeman, kede boma luŋ ame ogwoko iye gadigadi me mony kede boma a wegi aguragura, kede kit gedo ocele luŋ ame en rik omito ni ger i Jerucalem, i Lebanon, kede i lobo luŋ ame en onwoŋo loo." 
1Kings9:20 Jo ame en obedo rono i tic me gedo obedo jo luŋ ame odoŋ i kin jo Periji, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc, ame gin mom obedo jo Icrael." 
1Kings9:21 Ikwaegi ame rik jo Icrael mom oneko i kare ame gin gamo lobogi me bedo meggi, gin en ame Culeman obedo rono i tic kite ame pwod otye ka ronogi i tic naka atot tin." 
1Kings9:22 Culeman mom otio i jo Icrael ikokome acalo opii; gin obedo ocirikale, odoŋe a loo tic apapat, kede odoŋe me mony, kede odoŋe me gadigadi lweny, kede oŋwec aguragura abaka." 
1Kings9:23 Odoŋe ame loo tic apapat me gedo ame rik Culeman oketo rik romo mia abic kede pyerabic. Jo-ni en ame obedo loyo tic luŋ ame Culeman otio. 
1Kings9:24 Kare ame dako a Culeman ame obedo nya jo Miciri odak oko i ode ame Culeman ogerre, Culeman te dok gero Millo." 
1Kings9:25 Culeman rik te bedo yalo Rwot tyen adek i mwaka acel, kun yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny i wi keno lam ame en ocano me yalo Rwot. En daŋ obedo waŋo mot a ŋwece kur me yalo Rwot. Mannono kite ame en rik otyeko kede tic me gero ot a Rwot." 
1Kings9:26 Abaka Culeman daŋ rik otio mel apipim i paco me Ejion-geber ame ceggi kede Elat i dog nam Arema, i lobo Edom." 
1Kings9:27 Abaka Kiram rik te cwayo jo mere ame gin odiro i nam, gin te wot tic i mel ame otio-nono kun otio karacel i jo a Culeman." 
1Kings9:28 Gin rik te wot i melenogo naka i Opir ote wot kelo jabu i kuno, ame pekkere onwoŋo buco romo tan apar wie abic; romo poŋo lori adito me kare-ni adek gin te kelo jabu-nono luŋ baŋ abaka Culeman." 
1Kings10:1 Kare ame abaka a dako me Ceba owinyo nyiŋ Culeman orwo atek, en obino baŋe me bino teme kede pennyere mogo atek meicel." 
1Kings10:2 En otuno i Jerucalem kede jo ecipan ame gwoke, kede inaga apipim ame oyeo jami mogo ame ŋwecgi kur, kede jabu adwoŋ atata, kede gweŋe alilia me wel. Kare ame en otuno baŋ Culeman, en otitte kop luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i cunye." 
1Kings10:3 Culeman te dok i pennyere luŋ; mom tye moro kadi acel ame tuco oloo abaka. 
1Kings10:4 Kare ame en doŋ oneno ryeko a Culeman luŋ, kede ot ame en ogero," 
1Kings10:5 kede cam ame obedo tedde, kede lwak jo ame otio baŋe, kede boŋŋi mogo me wel ame omiro mere ruko, kede jo ame mie koŋo olok, karacel kede mot ame en yalo kede Obaŋa, wi abaka me Ceba te cuŋ oko." 
1Kings10:6 En te kobbi abaka Culeman ni, “Gin ame abedo winyo i komi kede i kom ryekoni i kare ame pwod atye i lobona, tye kara ateni!" 
1Kings10:7 Cite an onwoŋo mom aye, tuno ka tin doŋ aneno kede waŋa. Nen ba, kop ame onwoŋo awinyo i komi kara onwoŋo aduno moro; ryekoni kede lonyoni dwon kara atek meicel ame kato kit ame onwoŋo okobba kede oko." 
1Kings10:8 Monni komgi i gum okato kare! Omironi luŋ komgi i gum meicel, me cuŋ i nyimi kare luŋ kun owinyo kop me ryeko ame ya i dogi!" 
1Kings10:9 Rwot Obaŋani myero pwo atek meicel, pien onyuto yomcunye i komi pi keti bedo abaka me Icrael! En gire doŋ omaro jo Icrael atwal, en omio en oketi me bedo abakagi, me yin ilogi aber kun itio gin ame tye atira, dok iŋolo kop kakare.”" 
1Kings10:10 Abaka a dako me Ceba te miyo Culeman jabu ame pekkere buco romo tan abic, ame romo poŋo lori adittere me kare-ni, kede odokkogo ame ŋwecgi kur apipim, kede gweŋe me wel apipim. Odok a ŋwecgi kur ame abaka a dako me Ceba omio baŋ Culeman onwoŋo dwoŋ atek ame kato en ocele luŋ ame yam abaka Culeman onwoŋo." 
1Kings10:11 Medo i kom mannono, mele ame abaka Kiram okelo, kede bao mogo me yat ame olwoŋo ni almug, kede jabu i Opir, karacel kede gweŋe alilia me wel apipim." 
1Kings10:12 Bao-nono abaka Culeman te tic kedgi me pagi i ot a Rwot kede i ot abaka. Otio daŋ i naŋa kede naŋa opuk pi jo ame wero. Man en yen abeco meicel ame rik okelo i lobo me Icrael, ame moro mom dok omedo bino atwal naka atot tin." 
1Kings10:13 Abaka Culeman te miyo baŋ abaka a dako me Ceba jami luŋ ame en rik omito, omie ginnoro luŋ ame en rikopenyo, kun medo iye gin ame en omio ame lubo lonyo mere. Eka abaka a dako me Ceba kede jo mere te doŋ dok i lobo mere me Ceba." 
1Kings10:14 Abaka Culeman rik onwoŋo jabu abup meicel ame kato tan pyeraryo wie abic i mwaka cel acel. 
1Kings10:15 Man onwoŋo mom okwano iye en ame bino i baŋ ocatwil me paco kede me lobo a jo a oko, kede en ame ya i baŋ obakki me lobo Arab, kede en ame gabuna mere ame loo lobo apapat mio." 
1Kings10:16 Culeman rik daŋ otio kwode adoŋo ame romo mia aryo, kun otiogi luŋ kede jabu ame oteto anyul; kwot acel acel odonyo iye jabu ame pekkere buc romo ratili apyeraryo," 
1Kings10:17 En otio daŋ kwode atino ame romo mia adek, kun daŋ otiogi luŋ i jabu, ame kwot acel acel odonyo iye jabu ame pekkere buco romo ratili abicel. Abaka rik te ketogi luŋ i ot olwoŋo ni, Buŋ me Lebanon." 
1Kings10:18 Abaka Culeman dok otio daŋ kom loc adwoŋ, i lak lyec, te mwono kome luŋ i jabu ame olio aber." 
1Kings10:19 Kom loccono rik tye kede citep abicel, kun i ŋeye tye iye cal wi twon. I ŋeye tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi ote keto iye atenciŋ, kun cal eŋatu aryo ocuŋ i ŋet bad kom me teno ciŋ," 
1Kings10:20 dok daŋ tye cal eŋatu ocele apar wie aryo ame ocuŋ i agikki citep abicel ca, tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi. Pe tye kommoro ame abaka moro otio a cal i kommono." 
1Kings10:21 Ikopo abaka luŋ rik otio i jabu keken, kede jami luŋ ame rik otio kedgi i Buŋ me Lebanon, gin luŋ rik otio i jabu ame olio aber meicel. Ginnoro ame otio i ryal mom nen i akinagi kadi acel, pien i kare a Culeman ryal onwoŋo obedo ginnoro a mom otamo pire." 
1Kings10:22 Abaka rik daŋ tye i lwak mel ame woto Tarcic karacel kede mel a Kiram. Mel me Tarcic rik onwoŋo dwogo paco i mwaka adek adek, kun okelo jabu kede ryal, kede lak lyec, karacel ayom kede abim." 
1Kings10:23 Abaka Culeman rik obedo twon abaka moro ame alonyo dok aryek ame kato obakki ocele luŋ. 
1Kings10:24 Jo me wi podo luŋ obedo kede mit me bino baŋe, me bino winyo kit ryeko ame Obaŋa onwoŋo omie." 
1Kings10:25 Ŋat acel acel a rik bino baŋe, kelo mot a kitgi papat, acalo, jami ame otio i ryal, kede en ame otio i jabu, kede boŋŋi me aruka, kede odok murra, kede gin a ŋwece kur, aguragura kede kanne adoŋo mege; man rik timere mwaka i mwaka. Culeman rik ocoko gadigadi lweny karacel kede olweny ame riŋo aguragura." 
1Kings10:26 En rik onwoŋo doŋ tye i gadigadi lweny ame romo tutumia acel kede mia aŋwen karacel kede wegi aguragura ame romo tutumia par wie aryo. Mogo i akinagi rik bedo i boma apapat ame ogwoko iye gadigadi, kun en ocele bedo baŋ abaka i Jerucalem." 
1Kings10:27 I kare me loc a Culeman, ryal rik doŋ odoko ginnoro a pire mom dit i Jerucalem calo gweŋ, kun daŋ bao me cedar dwoŋ atata i Jerucalem calo olam ame tye i bar me Cepela." 
1Kings10:28 Culeman rik onwoŋo aguragura mere iya i lobo me Miciri kede i Kue; ocatwil abaka rik gamogi i Kue i wel ame nwoŋo omoko oko. 
1Kings10:29 Gadigadi ame ya i Miciri rik acel acel romo cekel me ryal mia abicel, eka aguragura acel acel te bedo cekel me ryal mia acel kede pyerabic. Ocatwil abaka te dok catogi oko baŋ obakki a jo Kitti kede me Curia." 
1Kings11:1 Culeman rik te bedo maro anyira a rok ocele apol atata. Medo i kom nyaka abaka me Miciri, en dok obin onyomo anyira a jo Kitti, kede anyira a jo Moab, anyira a jo Edom, kede anyira a jo Ammon, kede anyira a jo Cidon." 
1Kings11:2 Kadi bed Rwot rik ociko ni myero jo Icrael kur nyomere i rok ocele, pien bino miyogi ocako woro obaŋe ocele, cite Culeman onyomogi." 
1Kings11:3 Culeman rik onyomo anyira obakki mia abiro kede mon aŋeca mia adek. Monnere-nono te miyo abaka lokki Obaŋa ŋee," 
1Kings11:4 man omio i kare ame en doŋ oti, mon owae te tere wot woro obaŋe mogo ocele. En mom dok omedde geno Rwot Obaŋa mere kede cunye ducu kite ame pappere Daudi obedo timo." 
1Kings11:5 En obedo woro obaŋa a dako me Cidon ame olwoŋo ni Aciterot, kede jok ipyeda ame nyiŋe Milkom me a jo Ammon." 
1Kings11:6 En obedo tiyo gin ame Rwot mom mito, kun daŋ mom ocuŋ atira i gin ame etio calo kit ame rik pappere Daudi obedo timo." 
1Kings11:7 Culeman rik te gero kabedo moro me woro jok ame ipyeda, ame olwoŋo ni Kemoc ame obedo me a jo Moab; en ogero i wi kidi ame tye tutuŋ to me Jerucalem; kede dok ka woro jok ame nyiŋe Molek ame obedo me a jo Ammon ame ipyeda." 
1Kings11:8 En rik te bedo timo amannono baŋ monne luŋ ame enyomo i rok ocele, kun yalo obanegi kede leyi ame oŋolo, dok wannigi odok akur." 
1Kings11:9 Akemo te mako Rwot i kom Culeman, pien onwoŋo mom dok geno Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael kede cunye ducu, Obaŋa ame rik onen baŋe tyen me aryo twal-li," 
1Kings11:10 dok ame rik daŋ ocike kun kobbe ni myero kur lub obaŋa moro ocele, dok en mom omako cik ame Rwot ocike kede-nono." 
1Kings11:11 Man omio Rwot okobbi Culeman ni, “Kit acalo tim man doŋ obalo cunyi oko, dok daŋ mom igwoko cikerena kede icwilla, kun daŋ mom ilubo gin ame aciko, amoko doŋ ateteni me gamo loc oko i ciŋi ate miyo baŋ amironi." 
1Kings11:12 Kadi bed amannono, pi amironi Daudi, mom abino timo man i kare ame yin pwod itye kwo, cite abino timo i kare ame wodi doŋ tye i loc." 
1Kings11:13 Cite mom abino gamo loc luŋ i ciŋe; ento abino weko atekere acel me Icrael doŋ i te loccere, mannono atimo pi amirona Daudi kede pi Jerucalem ame en boma ame doŋ atyeko yero me bedo mega.”" 
1Kings11:14 Rwot te miyo okwor bino i kom Culeman, ocwao Adad ame en dano me Edom, dok en rik dano ame oya i ot loc me Edom." 
1Kings11:15 Pien i kare ame Daudi rik onwoŋo tye i Edom, Joab adwoŋ ame loo mony owoto kuno me wot yiko kom jo ame onekogi i lweny, en rik te neko co luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i Edom." 
1Kings11:16 Joab kede jo Icrael ducu rik te bedo kuno dwete abicel tuno ka gin oneko co luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i Edom. 
1Kings11:17 Cite Adad rik te ŋwec oko i Miciri, kun ŋweco karacel omiro a pappere mogo ame gin jo Edom. I kare ame en ŋweconaca onwoŋo en pwod tidi." 
1Kings11:18 Gin rik oya i Midian, ote wot naka i Paran, kan ame jo mogo te wot karacel kedgi naka i Miciri. Gin te wot naka baŋ Parao abaka me Miciri, abaka te miyo Adad lobo kede ot buto, kun daŋ mie cam." 
1Kings11:19 Abaka me Miciri te cako maro Adad atek meicel, ame te miyo Adad nyomo amu mere, ame obedo a min a dako mere adwoŋ ame nyiŋe Tapenec," 
1Kings11:20 Dako-nono te nywalle atin awobi ame nyiŋe Genubat, ame Tapenec te miyo doŋo i ot abaka kun bedo karacel awobe abaka me Miciri." 
1Kings11:21 Ento i kare ame kop otuno baŋ Adad i Miciri ni Daudi doŋ oto oko, Joab atel wi monnyere daŋ oto oko, en okobbi abaka me Miciri ni, “Weka doŋ adok gira paco i lobowa ikome.”" 
1Kings11:22 Cite abaka me Miciri te penye ni, “Piŋo kara imito dok paco turwu. Ŋo ce ame mom inwoŋo i kan?” En ogamo ni, “Yin koŋ iweka an awoti.” En doŋ te dok paco turgi." 
1Kings11:23 Obaŋa dok te miyo Rejon wot Eliada doko akwor a Culeman. Rejon onwoŋo rik orino ariŋa i baŋ adwoŋŋere ame onwoŋo obedo Adadejer, abaka me Joba," 
1Kings11:23 Obaŋa dok te miyo Rejon wot Eliada doko akwor a Culeman. Rejon onwoŋo rik orino ariŋa i baŋ adwoŋŋere ame onwoŋo obedo Adadejer, abaka me Joba," 
1Kings11:24 eka te doko atel wi oyak ame en obedo coko. Man otimere i kare ame Daudi oloo Adadejer, te neko jo Curia ame onwoŋo onotte kede. Rejon karacel kede jo mere te wot bedo i Damaciko, eka ote kete bedo abaka me Damaciko." 
1Kings11:25 En obedo akwor a jo Icrael pi kare luŋ ame Culeman pwod kwo. 
1Kings11:26 Ŋat ocele ame dok odoko akwor a Culeman obedo Jeroboam ame en rik obedo dano acel i akina omiro a Culeman. Jeroboam onwoŋo obedo wot a Nebat ame obedo dano me Jereda i lobo me Epraim. Tottere onwoŋo dako to ame nyiŋe Jerua. 
1Kings11:27 En ocako lokere me bedo akwor a Culeman pi kop man. Culeman rik onwoŋo ogero Millo, en te culo dog cel me paco kan atwolo oko." 
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam lo ame onwoŋo obedo atic atek, doŋ i kare ame Culeman oneno ni en tye atiyo tic atek meicel, omie dit me loyo tic ame orono iye jo arona i kom jo me ot a Yucepu luŋ, ame gin jo a Manace kede jo Epraim luŋ." 
1Kings11:29 I nino moro acel ame onwoŋo Jeroboam tye ka wot kene iyo kun oya i Jerucalem, en orwatte kede adwarpiny ame nyiŋe Akija i dye tim, kun oya i Cilo. Akija onwoŋo oruko boŋo mere anyen." 
1Kings11:30 Akija te gonyo boŋo mere anyen oko ikome, te yeyeco oko atitino i dul apar wie aryo." 
1Kings11:31 En te kobbi Jeroboam ni, “Gam boŋŋi ame ayeyeco atitino-ni, apar, iter obed meri, pien Rwot okobo ni, ‘Abino gamo loc oko i ciŋ Culeman, ate miyo atekere apar i ciŋi." 
1Kings11:32 Culeman bino medde loyo atekere acel, ame man atimo pi po pi amirona Daudi kede pi Jerucalem, ame boma ame ayero me bedo bomana i kom lobo me Icrael luŋ." 
1Kings11:33 Atimo man pien Culeman otyeko weka oko, ocako doŋ woro Aciterot, ame obedo jok ame jo Cidon woro, kede jok ame olwoŋo ni Kemoc amejo Moab woro, kedeen ame olwoŋo ni Milkom ame jo Ammon woro. En aman mom doŋ luba dok mom daŋ doŋ tio gin ame an amito, mom daŋ doŋ mako cikka kede icwilla luŋ, kite ame rik amirona Daudi obedo timo." 
1Kings11:34 Mom abino kwanyo loc luŋ iciŋ Culeman, dok abino weko en koŋ bedo i kom loc pi kare luŋ me kwo mere pi amirona Daudi ame rik ayero dok ame obedo gwoko cikka kun tio gin ame an amito." 
1Kings11:35 Abino kwanyo loc oko i ciŋ wode, ate miyi loyo atekere apar." 
1Kings11:36 Abino miyo wot a Culeman doŋ atekere acel, me wek i kare luŋ akwar amirona Daudi obed i kom loc i nyima i Jerucalem, i boma ame ayero me bedo ka wora." 
1Kings11:37 “ ‘Abino miyo yin Jeroboam idoko abaka me Icrael, abino miyi iloo lobo ame cunyi mito luŋ." 
1Kings11:38 Ka ce ibino winyo cikka, ite tiyo gin ame an amito, kite ame amirona Daudi obedo timo, an bino bedo kedi kare luŋ. Abino miyo yin en iloo jo Icrael dok daŋ abino miyo ikwai en ame bedo i loc kakari kite ame atimo kede baŋ Daudi." 
1Kings11:39 Pi bal ame Culeman otimo, abino keto can i kom ikwae a Daudi, cite cannono mom bino ri nakanaka.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Culeman te temo neko Jeroboam oko, ento Jeroboam te lwi riŋo gire oko i Miciri baŋ Cicak, abaka me Miciri, te wot bedo gire kuno naka Culeman oto." 
1Kings11:41 Kop ocele luŋ odoŋŋere i kom Culeman kede gin ame en otio a mom ocoo kan, otyeko coyo luŋ i buk me kwo a Culeman." 
1Kings11:42 En obedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael luŋ i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeraŋwen. 
1Kings11:43 En oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, oyiko kome i paco a pappere Daudi. Wode Rekoboam te cako loc a kakare." 
1Kings12:1 Rekoboam rik te wot i Cekem kan ame onwoŋo jo luŋ ocokere iye me kete i kom me bedo abaka. 
1Kings12:2 Jeroboam wot a Nebat owinyo pire i kare ame en onwoŋo pwod tye i Miciri, kan ame en rik oŋweco iye pi riŋo abaka Culeman; en oya oko i kuno te dwogo oko." 
1Kings12:3 Jo Icrael onwoŋo ocwao kwena me wot lwoŋe, eka Jeroboam karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ ame ocokere te kobbi Rekoboam ni," 
1Kings12:4 “Pappi Culeman rik otio kedwa agwa meicel kun mio obedo yeyo yec apek okato kare. Ka ce yin ibino dwoko yec ame en onwoŋo oketo i komwa bedo ayot kun ijwiko tic me opii opii ame adwoŋŋi rik oketo i komwa, wan obino bedo omironi ame winyo dogi.”" 
1Kings12:5 Rekoboam te gamo ni, “Koŋ idok wunu, iwot ityek wunu nino adek ite dwogo wunu baŋa kan.” Lwak te dok oko cen." 
1Kings12:6 Abaka Rekoboam te cako penyo tam i baŋ jo oteggo ame rik obedo tic i pappere acalo omi-tam, kun en penyogi ni, “Tam aŋo ame imia wunu me dok ipeny a lwak?”" 
1Kings12:7 Gin te kobbe ni, “Ka ce yin iye winyo kop a lwak man tin kun itio gin a twero konyogi, myero imwolle i nyimgi ka idok ipenygi; mannono bino miyogi bedo omironi nakanaka.”" 
1Kings12:8 Cite Rekoboam mom oketo cunye i tam ame odoŋ oteggo-nono omie. En dok owoto oyenyo jo mere apat me miye tam, owoto baŋ olwagi mere." 
1Kings12:9 En openyogi ni, “Tam aŋo ame imia wunu me dok i peny a lwak ame okwaa ni myero ajwik yecgi dok ayot?”" 
1Kings12:10 Gin te gamo ni, “Yin myero ikobbigi kit man ni, ‘Nyako ciŋa acel dwoŋ kato pyer pappa oko." 
1Kings12:11 Pappa rik omiowu yec apek meicel, mega bino bedo apek ame kato me a pappa oko. Pappa rik pwodowu i del, cite an abino pwodowu i gin ame lit bala kwir yib yit’.”" 
1Kings12:12 I ŋe nino adek, Jeroboam karacel kede jo Icrael te dwogo baŋ abaka Rekoboam, kite ame rik ocikogi kede, kun kobo ni, “Dwog wunu baŋa kan i ne nino adek.”" 
1Kings12:13 Abaka te cako dok i peny a lwak kede gero, kun mom oye lubo tam ame odoŋe oteggo omie." 
1Kings12:14 En okobbi lwak kite ame olwagi mere omie kede tam, kun kobbigi ni, “Pappa rik omiowu iyeo wunu yec apek, an abino medo bedo apek ame kato mege. Pappa rik pwodowu kede del, cite an abino pwodowu i gin ame lit bala kwir yib yit.”" 
1Kings12:15 En abaka okwero winyo kop a lwak pien Rwot ikome en omio otimere amannono, me wek kop ame rik eciko baŋ Jeroboam cobere kakare, kite ame rik emio Akija dano me Cilo okobo kede baŋ Jeroboam wot a Nebat." 
1Kings12:16 I kare ame jo Icrael oneno ni abaka mom oye winyo kokogi, gin luŋ ote redo ni, “Wan giwa mom otye kede dulloro ame obedo megwa i kom Daudi. Wan giwa mom obino nwoŋo ginnoro i baŋ Yece. Dok giwu i kemawu, wun jo Icrael! Nen doŋ odi keni yin Daudi!” Jo Icrael doŋ te cako ket oko, kun ŋat acel acel dok i paco mere." 
1Kings12:17 Rekoboam te doŋ loyo Icrael ame onwoŋo bedo i Juda. 
1Kings12:18 Abaka Rekoboam te cwayo Adoram, ame onwoŋo rik en adwoŋ ame loo tic me eroni, cite jo Icrael luŋ te nanapo en i gweŋe, ote neke oko. Man omio abaka Rekoboam te ru ya yito oko i wi gadigadi lwennyere, te riŋo oko i Jerucalem." 
1Kings12:19 Cakere i kare-nono jo Icrael doŋ te jem oko i kom oloc ame ya i ot a Daudi naka atot tin. 
1Kings12:20 Kare ame jo Icrael owinyo ni Jeroboam doŋ otyeko dwogo, gin ocwao kwena te wot lwoŋe, en te bino baŋ jo ame onwoŋo ocokere, eka jo te kete me bedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael ducu. Mom tye ŋattoro ame doŋ omedde lubo jo me ot a Daudi kono ka jo me atekere a Juda keken." 
1Kings12:21 Kare ame Rekoboam odwogo i Jerucalem, en ocako coko jo ame oyero ame romo tutumia acel kede pyeraboro iyi atekere a Juda kede Benjamin me wot lweny i kom jo Icrael me dwoggo jo luŋ i te loc a Rekoboam wot a Culeman." 
1Kings12:22 Cite kop a Rwot te bino baŋ dano Obaŋa ame nyiŋe Cemayo, kun kobbe ni," 
1Kings12:23 “Wot ikobbi abaka Rekoboam me Juda, wot a Culeman, kede jo luŋ me doggola a Juda, kede me doggola a Benjamin, kede baŋ jo ocele luŋ ni," 
1Kings12:24 ‘Rwot okobo ni myero kur iwot ilweny wunu i kom omegowu ame gin obedo jo Icrael. Ŋat acel acel myero dok cen i paco mere, pien gin ame otimere-nono. Rwot en ame omio otimere.’ ” Gin luŋ ote winyo kop a Rwot, ote dok oko cen, kun ŋat acel acel dok i paco mere kite ame onwoŋo okobo." 
1Kings12:25 Jeroboam te wot bedo i boma me Cekem, i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim, en koŋ te wot bedo kuno; te dok ya i kuno te wot bedo i boma me Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Jeroboam te cako lwodo kop i cunye ni, “Loc be bino dok oko i ot a Daudi." 
1Kings12:27 Ka ce jo man omedde wot yalo Obaŋa i ot a Rwot i Jerucalem, cuny jo man bino lokere oko i kom adwoŋgi Rekoboam abaka me Juda, gin bino neka oko ote lokere gigi dok baŋ Rekoboam.”" 
1Kings12:28 Mannono te miyo abaka Jeroboam cako poro kop i jo, te tiyo cal itino twoni aryo me jabu, eka te kobbi lwak ni, “Wot i Jerucalem doŋ ocirowu oko, koŋ inen anaka cene. Nenu wunu doŋ obaŋewu enu, wun jo Icrael, gin en a rik okwanyowu i lobo me Miciri.”" 
1Kings12:29 Rekoboam te keto cal twon acel i Betel kede en ocele i Dan. 
1Kings12:30 Man rik te miyo jo Icrael poto i bal pi wot woro twon ame tye i Betel kede en ame tye i Dan twal. 
1Kings12:31 En dok te gero udi me woro Obaŋa i wi kiddi malo, te daŋ keto olamdog kun kwanyogi i akina jo ata, cite mom i akina jo Levi." 
1Kings12:32 En te keto nino me ecuban bedo i nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me aboro ame rom aroma kede en ame tye i Juda. En te cako yalo cal twoni ame en otio te keto i Betel, kun yalogi kede mottere. En te keto daŋ olamdog i kabedo me woro Obaŋa ame en ogero i wi kiddi malo, kun keto mogo daŋ i Betel." 
1Kings12:33 En owoto i keno lam ame tye i Betel i nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me aboro, ame en nino ame onwoŋo cunye oyero me bedo nino me ecuban, en te wot i keno me lam me waŋo odok akur." 
1Kings13:1 Dano Obaŋa ame en ocao rik te ya i Juda, te wot naka i Betel, en otuno i kare ame onwoŋo Jeroboam ocuŋ i ŋet keno lam me yalo Obaŋa odok akur." 
1Kings13:2 Dano-nono te cako kobo kop Obaŋa agwa i kom keno lam me woro jogi, kun kobo ni, “Yin keno lam, keno lam we, Rwot okobo ni ba, ‘Obino nywalo atinnoro i doggola a Daudi ame nyiŋe Yocia. En ame bino ŋolo olamdog me ka woro jogi ame tye i wi kiddi malo, ame gin jo ame yalo jogi odok akur i komi, en bino ŋologi acalo mot i komi, bino waŋo cogo jo i komi.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 En te miyo gin a nyuto daŋ oko i nino-nono, kun kobo ni, “Man en gin a nyuto ni man obedo kop a Rwot; ‘Nen ba, keno lam bino mukere oko, buru ame tye i wie daŋ bino wukere oko piny.’ ”"
