2Kings19:26 Man omio jo ame bedo kuno mom doŋ tye kede teko, cunygi doŋ bedo poto apota, lewic daŋ doŋ ocirogi oko. Orom aroma i lum ame tye i poto, ocalo lum alyabu, onyo orom aroma i doo ame otu i wii ot, ame yamo alyet me oro onero." 
2Kings19:27 “Cite an aŋeo kop ducu i komi, aŋeo ginnoro luŋ ame yin itio, kede kabedo luŋ ame yin iwoto iye, karacel kede daani i koma." 
2Kings19:28 Atyeko doŋ winyo kop i kom akemoni, awinyo daŋ kop i kom wakereni oko; pi mannono abino rwako golona i umi, abino keto daŋ tol i dogi, abino dwoki cen i yori, kun ibeo i yo ame rik ibino kede.”" 
2Kings19:29 Icaya te kobbi abaka Kejekia ni, “Man en gin ame bino nyuto gin ame bino timere. I mwaka ni kede i mwaka ame bino lubo man, ibino camo wunu cam ame otu kene, ento i mwaka me adekkere ibino coyo wunu koti, ite daŋ kayo wunu, ibino pito wunu olok, ite daŋ camowunu nyige." 
2Kings19:30 Jo ame bino bwot te doŋ i ot a Juda, bino bedo acalo yat ame oguro lwite piny, te nyako nyige." 
2Kings19:31 Pien jo bino doŋ i Jerucalem kede i wi kidi me Cion. Man bino timere pien Rwot tye i mit adwoŋ iye. 
2Kings19:32 “Man en kop ame Rwot okobo i kom abaka me Acuria: En mom bino donyo i boma man kadi acel, mom daŋ bino bayo atero moro iye. Mom tye ocirikale moro ame omako kwot, ame bino tuno i ŋet boma, mom daŋ obino toro lobo moro me guro." 
2Kings19:33 En bino dok cen i ŋee, kun lubo yo ame rik ebino kede, en gire mom bino donyo i boma man. Man en kop a Rwot ikokome." 
2Kings19:34 An abino lweny pi boma man ate gwoko me kelo kwogo i koma kede i kom amirona Daudi.” 
2Kings19:35 Amalaika a Rwot rik te wot i gony a jo Acuria i dyeworrono, te wot neko ocirikale tutumia mia acel kede pyeraboro wie abic. Orwo mere odiko con, kom jo oto onwoŋo doŋ oradde atata." 
2Kings19:36 Cenakarib, abaka me Acuria te dok paco, wot bedo i Nineve." 
2Kings19:37 I nino moro ame en rik onwoŋo tye akwac i ot obaŋa mere Nicrok, awobe mere Adramelek kede Carecer te neke oko i pala me romo, gin te Iwi gigi oko i lobo Ararat. Wode Ecar-kaddon te leyo kakare." 
2Kings20:1 I kare-nono two onwoŋo omako abaka Kejekia, ame onwoŋo en doŋ ceggi to. Adwarpiny Icaya wot Amoj rik te wot limme, te kobbe ni, “Rwot okobo ni yin doŋ myero icik jo ame bedo baŋi oko i kop me odi, pien mom ibino caŋ, ento ibino to.”" 
2Kings20:2 Kejekia te loko nyime neno apama, te kwayo Rwot," 
2Kings20:3 kun kobo ni, “Tim ber, Ama Rwot, ipo kit ame abedo tic kede baŋi kun ageni icunya ducu, dok atimo gin ame tye atira i nyimi.” En te mwoco koko oko kun cunye cwer meicel." 
2Kings20:4 A kun Icaya mom ru oya i dyekal abaka, Rwot dok te medde kobbi Icaya ni," 
2Kings20:5 “Wot ikobbi Kejekia ame en abaka ame loo lwakka ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋa a kwarowu Daudi okobo ni, etyeko doŋ winyo kwacci, dok daŋ eneno pig waŋi; nen ba, abino cano twoni oko; i nino me adekkere ibino wot i ot a Rwot." 
2Kings20:6 Dok ebino miyo ibedo i lobo pi mwakki apar wie abic. Ebino larri karacel kede boma man i ciŋ abaka me Acuria, dok ebino medde gwoko boma man, pi kelo kwogo i kome kede i kom amiro mere Daudi.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Icaya te kobo ni, “Kella anina oduro otwo, me wot mwon i waŋ odeke abaka me caŋ oko.”" 
2Kings20:8 Kejekia te penyo Icaya ni, “Kara gin aŋo ame bino nyuto ni Rwot bino caŋa dok daŋ abino wot i ot a Rwot i nino me adekkere?”" 
2Kings20:9 Icaya te gamo ni, “Man en anen ame bino nyuto ni Rwot bino cobo gin ame eciko: tipo cen myero wot anyim tyen apar onyo dok cen tyen apar i ya i kom gi-poro ceŋ Akab?”" 
2Kings20:10 Kejekia te dok gamo ni, “Bedo yot ka bor atipo omedde anyim tyen apar;”" 
2Kings20:11 pe amannono gire, myero odok cen tyen apar iya i kom gi-poro cen Akaj." 
2Kings20:12 I kare-nono abaka me Babulon, Merudak-baladan wot a Baladan, owinyo ni abaka Kejekia rik kome lit, en te cwayo okwena me tero waraga baŋe karacel kede mot." 
2Kings20:13 Kejekia rik te jolo okwena mere naca kede yomcuny, te nyuttigi lonyo mere kun daŋ miogi oneno ot me limmere, gin oneno jabu, ryal, gigi mogo ame nwecgi kur, moo mogo me wel, ot me kano jami lwennyere luŋ, kede ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ot me kano jami mere. Mom tye ginnoro a en mom onyuto baŋgi ame onwoŋo tye i ode kede i lobo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i te loccere," 
2Kings20:14 Cite adwarpiny Icaya rik te bino baŋ abaka Kejekia, te penye ni, “Jo-ni kara oya i kwene? Dok kop aŋo ame gin okobo?” Kejekia te gamo ni, “Gin oya i lobo abor meicel, oya i Babulon twal.”" 
2Kings20:15 Icaya dok te penye ni, “Gin aŋo ame gin oneno i odi?” Kejekia te gamo ni, “Gin oneno jami ducu ame tye i oda; mom tye ginnoro ame tye i udi me kano lim ame mom anyuttigi.”" 
2Kings20:16 Icaya te kobbi abaka Kejekia ni, “Koŋ doŋ iwiny kop ame Rwot okobo." 
2Kings20:17 Nen ba, kare tye abino, ame jami ducu ame tye i odi, jami luŋ ame kwarowu yam obedo kano tuno naka tin, obino terogi luŋ i Babulon. Mom tye ginnoro ame bino doŋ kadi acel." 
2Kings20:18 Dok itinoni mogo obino tero iyi opii, ote royogi oko, ote wot tic i paco abaka me Babulon.”" 
2Kings20:19 Abaka Kejekia te niaŋ ni kuc bino bedo i kare mere aboŋo alokaloka moro, omio en te kobbi Icaya ni, “Kop a Rwot ame ekobo-nono gire ber.”" 
2Kings20:20 Kop i kom Kejekia ame odoŋŋere luŋ, teko mere, kite ame en rik okunyo kede akon kede yo pii, te tero pii i boma, ginnoro luŋ ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom oloc me Juda." 
2Kings20:21 Kejekia oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere. Wode Manace te leyo kakare. 
2Kings21:1 Manace ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere romo apar wie aryo, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyerabic wie abic. Nyiŋ tottere Kepjiba." 
2Kings21:2 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun bedo timo tim me kwer ame rok luŋ ame Rwot oryemo oko i nyim jo Icrael rik obedo timo." 
2Kings21:3 En daŋ omio ogero ka woro jogi i wi kiddi malo, ame rik pappere Kejekia omio omumuko oko. Ogero keno lam me a Baal, oguro daŋ yat Acera te dok cako woro kit jami apapat ame tye i polo, kun tio pirgi." 
2Kings21:4 Ocano daŋ keno lam i ot a Rwot, kan ame rik Rwot okobo iye ni, “Abino miyo Jerucalem bedo kabedo me wora.”" 
2Kings21:5 En ocano daŋ keno lam apipim me woro jami apapat ame tye i polo, kun canogi i dyekal aryo ame tye i ot a Rwot." 
2Kings21:6 Owaŋo daŋ wode acalo mot me yalo jok, kun daŋ tyeto tyet, ŋio yi dyegi, penyo daŋ okor tipo kede ajoka. En obedo timo tim areco apol apola ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun mio akemo mako Rwot." 
2Kings21:7 Dok cal jok apaa, cal Acera ame obedo jok a dako ame en omio opao otero-gu i ot a Rwot ame rik Rwot ikome okobo pire baŋ Daudi kede baŋ Culeman ni, “I ot man, kede i Jerucalem ame rik an ayero i akina atekere luŋ me Icrael, en ame bino bedo kan ame owora iye nakanaka." 
2Kings21:8 Mom dok abino miyo tyen jo Icrael loŋo piny atata kun ya i lobo ame rik an amio baŋ kwarigi, ka ce gin obedo gwokere kun otimo ginnoro luŋ i kite ame rik acikogi kede, dok obedo lubo cik luŋ ame rik amirona Muca ocikogi kede.”" 
2Kings21:9 Gin gigi rik mom ote winyo kadi acel, dok Manace rik daŋ te miyogi medo timo tim areco ame kato me a rok luŋ ame rik Rwot orweo i nyim jo Icrael." 
2Kings21:10 Rwot te cako kop, kun mio omiro mere ame obedo odwarpiny en akobo koppere baŋ jo Icrael ni," 
2Kings21:11 “Pien Manace abaka me Juda obedo timo tim magi areco me ipyeda, kun timo gin ame kato en ame jo Amor obedo timo oko, ame gin jo ogeo bedo kuno, dok daŋ omio jo Juda obedo timo bal i cal jogi mere;" 
2Kings21:12 mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, akelo twon timmoro arac meicel i kom Jerucalem kede i kom Juda, ame ŋat acel acel ame bino winyo pire, yite bino mwoc oko." 
2Kings21:13 Dok abino ryeyo tol i Jerucalem, tol ame rik koŋ apimo i Camaria, abino neno ka ocuŋ atira i birigi ame rik koŋ apimo kede ot Akab; dok abino weyo Jerucalem odoco kite ame dano weo kede cani, te wumo oko piny." 
2Kings21:14 Jona ame odoŋŋege abino bolo oko i ciŋ okworgi, gin bino doko acalo leyi me acama okworgi, kun oyakogi," 
2Kings21:15 pien gin obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyima, kun omio akemo obedo maka cakere i kare a kwarigi oya i Miciri tuno kede naka atot tin.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Medo i kom mannono, Manace obedo onyo remo a jo apol ata ame mom i balloro, cakere i Jerucalem tuŋ cel tuno naka tuŋ ocele. En omedo man i kom bal ame en omio jo Juda obedo timo, en miyogi timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot." 
2Kings21:17 Kop i kom Manace odoŋŋere luŋ, ginnoro luŋ ame rik en otio, kede kit bal luŋ ame en otimo ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom oloc, ote yiko kome i poto ame tye i ŋet ode, i poto a Uja." 
2Kings21:18 Manace oto te weo karacel i kwari mere, ote yiko kome poto ame tye i ŋet ode, i poto Uja. Wode Amon en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Kings21:19 Amon ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraryo wie aryo, en obedo loc mwakki aryo kun bedo i Jerucalem. Nyiŋ tottere Meculemet, ame obedo nyaka a Karuj, dano me Jotba." 
2Kings21:20 Amon obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot kite ame pappere Manace obedo timo kede. 
2Kings21:21 En obedo lubo kite a pappere luŋ, dok obedo woro anaka cal jogi ame rik pappere obedo woro kun tio pirgi." 
2Kings21:22 En oweko woro Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwari mere, kun mom daŋ timo gin ame Rwot mito." 
2Kings21:23 Omiro mere rik te poro kop i kome i muŋ, ote wot neke oko i ode." 
2Kings21:24 Jo me lobo-nono rik te neko jo luŋ ame oporo kop me neko abaka Amon, gin te keto wode Yocia leyo kakare." 
2Kings21:25 Kop i kom Amon odoŋŋere ducu, ginnoro luŋ ame rik en otio, ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom oloc me Juda," 
2Kings21:26 Oyiko kom Amon i lyel ame tye i poto a Uja. Wode Yocia en ame te leyo kakare. 
2Kings22:1 Yocia ocako bedo aloc kun mwaka me dittere oromo aboro, en te bedo loc pi mwakki pyeradek wie acel kun bedo i Jerucalem. Nyiŋ tottere Yedida, ame obedo nyaka Adaya dano me Bojkat," 
2Kings22:2 Yocia obedo timo gin ame nen atira i nyim Rwot; en obedo lubo kite a kwaro mere Daudi luŋ kun mom wiwira atata. 
2Kings22:3 I mwaka me apar wie aboro me loc abaka Yocia, en ocwao Capan wot Ajalia, ame obedo wot a Meculam, ame arannere i ot a Rwot, kun kobbe ni," 
2Kings22:4 “Wot naka baŋ Kilkia ame en alamdog adwoŋ, me en kwan wel jami luŋ ame jo okelo i ot a Rwot, ame okur doggola orao i baŋ jo," 
2Kings22:5 me mi limmono luŋ baŋ jo ame loo tic me ot a Rwot, me yiko kan ame oballe," 
2Kings22:6 ame gin jonnono obedo opac, kede jo ame gedo i kidi, me gin ti kede me wilo bao, kede wilo kiddi ame opao me yiko ot oballe." 
2Kings22:7 Ento myero kur bed penyogi kop i kom lim ame omio jo-naca pien gin jo ame genne i tic i lim ame omiogi.” 
2Kings22:8 Kilkia ame obedo alamdog adwoŋ te kobbi Capan aran abaka ni, “Atyeko nwoŋo buk cik i ot a Rwot.” En te miyo bukkono baŋ Capan, eka Capan te kwano." 
2Kings22:9 Capan, aran abaka te tero bukkono baŋ abaka, te kobbi abaka ni, “Omironi doŋ okwanyo lim luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot, ote miyo daŋ oko baŋ jo ame loo tic me ot a Rwot.”" 
2Kings22:10 En dok te kobbi abaka ni, “Kilkia alamdog adwoŋ omia bukkoro.” Capan te cako kwano bukkono kun abaka a winyo." 
2Kings22:11 Kare ame abaka owinyo kop ame okwano i buk me cik, en oyeyeco boŋŋi mere oko." 
2Kings22:12 Abaka te ciko Kilkia, alamdog adwoŋ, kede Akikam wot a Capan, kede Akobor wot a Mikaya, Capan aran kede Acaya amiro abaka, kun kobo ni," 
2Kings22:13 “Wot ipeny wunu Rwot pira, pi lwak kede pi lobo me Juda luŋ, pi kop i buk man ame onwoŋo-ni; pien akemo a Rwot kara doŋ olyeto meicel i komwa, pien kwariwa mom obedo lubo gin ame tye i buk man, kun otimo kite ame ocoo kede kop i komwa i buk man.”" 
2Kings22:14 Mannono te miyo Kilkia alamdog adwoŋ, Akikam kede Akobor, Capan, Akaya wot baŋ adwarpiny a dako a nyine Kulda, dako a Calum wot a Tikiva, ame obedo wot a Karkac, agwok boŋŋi abaka, onwoŋo i kare-nono bedo i Jerucalem i kabedo moro i Jerucalem kuno tuŋ ocele. Gin owoto kuno ote wot kop i dako nono," 
2Kings22:15 en te kobbigi ni, “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni ikobbi wunu ŋat ame oorowu baŋa ni," 
2Kings22:16 Rwot okobo ni ebino keto can i kom kabedo man kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo iye, pi cobo kop luŋ ame ocoo i buk cik ame abaka me Juda doŋ otyeko kwano." 
2Kings22:17 Pien gin doŋ okwera oko, ote bedo waŋo odok akur baŋ cal jogi, kun oroka kede me akemo maka i kom gin ame gin obedo tiyo i ciŋgi; mannono omio akemona doŋ bino lyeto agwa meicel i kom kabedo man ame mom dok romo kwe kadi acel." 
2Kings22:18 Aco baŋ abaka me Juda ame oorowu me bino penyo Rwot, wun ibino kobbe wunu ni, Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni kop i kom kop ame iwinyo," 
2Kings22:19 pien i kare ame yin iwinyo kop ame rik akobo i kom kabedo man kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo iye, ni bino doŋ nono acalo gin oceno, yin iru ŋut oko i cuny, ite mwolle-gu i nyim Rwot, dok ite yeyeco daŋ boŋŋi i komi oko; mannono omio Rwot daŋ owinyo kwacci, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
2Kings22:20 Nen ba, an abino dwoki iwoto weo karacel i kwarini, ibino to ote yiki daŋ i kuc, waŋi mom bino neno twon tim arac ame abino kelo i kom kabedo man.” Gin doŋ te dwoko kop baŋ abaka." 
2Kings23:1 Abaka te cwayo kwena baŋ odoŋe luŋ me Juda kede me Jerucalem, gin luŋ ote cokere baŋe." 
2Kings23:2 Abaka te wot malo i ot a Rwot, kun woto i jo luŋ me Juda, kede jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem, olamdog kede odwarpiny, jo luŋ adoŋo kede en atino, en te kwano kop luŋ ame tye i buk cik ame onwoŋo i ot a Rwot. En okwano kun lwak luŋ awinyo," 
2Kings23:3 Abaka te wot cuŋ i ŋet pagi te cikere i nyim Rwot ni ebino lubo Rwot, ebino mako cikere luŋ, kede kop me caden luŋ, kede icwillere daŋ luŋ. En ocikere ni ebino lubo magi luŋ i cunye ducu kede tipo mere luŋ, kun etimo jami ducu ame ocoo i buk cik. Jo luŋ te cikere karacel kede." 
2Kings23:4 Abaka te ciko Kilkia alamdog adwoŋ, kede olamdog ame tye i dul me aryo, kede okur doggola, me kelo jami tic luŋ ame tye i ot a Rwot ame rik otio pi Baal kede pi Acera, kede pi jami apapat ame tye i polo. En te wano jami-nono luŋ i ŋe Jerucalem, i luŋ ame tye i ŋet kulo me Kidron, te coko buru mere luŋ tero naka i Betel." 
2Kings23:5 En te cako ryemo olamdog ame oloc me Juda rik oketo me waŋo odok akur baŋ jogi i ka woro jogi ame tye i kiddi malo i ŋet pacci adoŋo luŋ me Juda, kede en ame omano Jerucalem ducu, karacel kede jo luŋ ame rik waŋo doko akur baŋ Baal, owor cen kede dwe, kede owor jami apapat ame tye i polo." 
2Kings23:6 En te kwanyo daŋ Acera oko i ot a Rwot, te tero oko i ŋe Jerucalem, naka i luŋ me Kidron, te wot waŋo oko kuno, te didino oko apwot calo kwoyo, te onyo kan ame oyiko iye kom jo ata." 
2Kings23:7 Dok te mumuko daŋ udi a jo ame timo tim me alaya pi woro jogi ame onwoŋo rik tye okubere i kom ot a Rwot, kan ame onwoŋo mon cweo iye boŋo pi Acera." 
2Kings23:8 En dok te kwanyo olamdog i boma ocele luŋ me Juda, te babalo daŋ ka waŋo odok akur baŋ jogi luŋ, cakere i Geba, tuno naka i Beerceba. En omumuko ka woro jogi me tim ame onwoŋo rik tye i dogcel me paco a Yocwa, ame rik en adwoŋ ame loo boma me Jerucalem, ame rik onwoŋo tye i dogcel me boma tuŋ cam." 
2Kings23:9 Ento olamdog luŋ ame onwoŋo yalo jogi i wi kiddi malo mom obino i nyim keno lam a Rwot ame onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem, ento gin obedo camo ogati ame mom orubo tobi i akina owotegi." 
2Kings23:10 En dok obabalo daŋ Topet ame rik tye i luŋ awobe a Kinnom, me ŋattoro kur dok med waŋo iye wode onyo nyare me yalo jok Molek." 
2Kings23:11 Abaka te daŋ mumuko cal aguragura luŋ ame yam obakki me Juda ojalo me woro ceŋ, ame onwoŋo rik tye i doggola me donyo i ot a Rwot, i ŋet icika a Natan-melek, lo moro ame rik tio i ot abaka, ame tye i dyekal a Rwot; owaŋo daŋ gadigadi luŋ ame obedo mea ceŋ." 
2Kings23:12 Keno lam luŋ ame rik tye i wi icika mogo ame tye malo i wi ot Akaj, ame rik obakki me Juda otio, kede keno lam ame rik Manace ocacano i dyekal aryo me ot a Rwot, en omumukogi luŋ, orereto piny, te ŋiŋinyo oko atino, te jobo kwoyo mere wot onyo i luŋ me Kidron." 
2Kings23:13 Abaka te babalo daŋ ka woro jogi luŋ ame rik tye tuŋ kide me Jerucalem, i tutuŋ to me kidi me bal ame rik Culeman abaka me Icrael ogero pi Aciterot, jok ipyeda a jo Cidon, kede pi Kemoc, jok ipyeda a jo Moab, kede pi Milkom, jok ipyeda a jo Ammon." 
2Kings23:14 En dok te puputo pagi luŋ me woro jogi kun ŋiŋido atino meicel, te toŋo yen ame ocibo i ka woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera, te lunyo kelo cogo kom dano yido kakargi." 
2Kings23:15 En omuko daŋ keno lam ame rik onwoŋo tye i Betel, i ka woro jok ame rik Jeroboam wot a Nebat ogero ame rik mio jo Icrael opoto ibal. Yocia te didino kiddi ame rik onwoŋo ocano i keno lammaca oŋinyo apwot calo buru, te waŋo daŋ Acera iye oko." 
2Kings23:16 I kare ame Yocia olokere, oneno lyel apipim i wi kidi malo, te miyo wot kwanyo cogo kom jo luŋ ame i lyellaca luŋ, te bino waŋogi oko i wi keno lam babalo oko, kun cobo gin ame dano Obaŋa onwoŋo okobo, ame rik en okobo pire con." 
2Kings23:17 Yocia te dok penyo jo ni, “Kidi ame aneno ocuŋ igun malo i nyima ca rik ogero kara me po pi ŋa ba?” Jo me kannono te gamo ni, “Macinaca obedo lyel a dano Obaŋa ame rik obino kan kun oya i Juda te bino rabo pi gin ame yin tin imio ocobere-ni i kom keno lam me Betel.”" 
2Kings23:18 Yocia te kobo ni, “Wek mannono bedi, ŋattoro kur kwany cogo kome.” Jo daŋ te weko cogo mere bedo, ŋattoro mom te gudo kadi acel, karacel kede cogo kom adwarpiny ame rik oya i Camaria." 
2Kings23:19 Yocia te kwanyo daŋ ka woro jogi luŋ ame tye i Camaria, i kabedo ame tye i wi kidi malo, kun oroko kede Rwot omio akemo make," 
2Kings23:20 En te neneko daŋ olamdog luŋ me ka woro jogi ame rik onwoŋo tye kuno i wi keno lam me woro jogi, eka te waŋo cogo kom jo i komgi. Abaka Yocia te doŋ dok cen i Jerucalem." 
2Kings23:21 Abaka te ciko lwak luŋ kun kobbigi ni, “Kwer wunu ecuban me Kato a Rwot Obaŋawu, kite ame ocoo kede i buk man me cikere.”" 
2Kings23:22 Pien onwoŋo mom dok rik okwero kodi ecubannono kadi acel cakere i kare oŋolkop ame obedo ŋolli jo Icrael kop, akadi naka i kare obakki me Icrael, kede me obakki me Juda;" 
2Kings23:23 Cite i mwaka me apar wie aboro me loc a Yocia en ame dok ote kwero iye ecuban me Kato a Rwot i Jerucalem. 
2Kings23:24 Medo i kom mannono, Yocia oryemo daŋ okor tipo oko, kede emuroko, terapim, cal jogi ame opao apaa, karacel kede timmoro luŋ me ipyeda ame onwoŋo timere i Juda kede i Jerucalem; mannono en otimo me wek kop ame ocoo i buk ame Kilkia alamdog onwoŋo i ot a Rwot mok kite ame ocoo kede i bukkaca." 
2Kings23:25 Mom tye abaka moro ame oporo kede i akina obakki luŋ ame otelo nyime. Mom tye moro i akinagi ame olokere baŋ Rwot i cunye ducu, kede tipo mere ducu, kede teko mere ducu kun lubo cik a Muca luŋ calo en; dok poro kede." 
2Kings23:26 Kadi bed amannono, twon akemo a Rwot ame onwoŋo doŋ olyeto agwa meicel-li mom gire odok cen kadi acel, akemo mere ame onwoŋo olyeto i kom jo Juda pien Manace onwoŋo rik obedo roke meicel." 
2Kings23:27 Rwot te kobo ni, “Abino miyo Juda daŋ rwenyo oko i waŋa kite ame akwanyo kede Icrael, abino daŋ boloboma man me Jerucalem oko ame rik ayero, karacel kede ot ame rik akobo pire ni bino bedo me wora.”" 
2Kings23:28 Kop i kom Yocia odoŋŋere ducu, ginnoro luŋ ame yam en otio ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom oloc me Juda," 
2Kings23:29 I kare mere en ame Parao Neko, abaka me Miciri, owoto kede baŋ abaka me Acuria naka i dog kulo me Efurate, Abaka Yocia rik te wot me wot rwatte kede; cite i kare ame Parao Neko onene, oneke oko i Megido." 
2Kings23:30 Omiro mere te tiŋo kome i Megido, kun otino i gadigadi ote tero i Jerucalem, ote wot yiko kome i lyellere en ikome. Lwak te yero Yekoakaj ame obedo wode en Yocia ote wirre kede moo me bedo abakagi. En doŋ te leyo kaka pappere." 
2Kings23:31 Yekoakaj ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraryo wie adek, eka te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi dwete adek keken. Nyiŋ tottere Kamutal, ame obedo nyaka a Jeremia me Libna." 
2Kings23:32 Yekoakaj obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun lubo kite tim luŋ ame yam kwari mere obedo timo." 
2Kings23:33 Parao Neko rik te tweye kede jegere i Ribla i lobo me Kamat, me en kur dok bed loc i Jerucalem en te ŋolo cul me ryal ame pekkere romo ratili tutumia abiro, mia abic kede me jabu ame pekkere romo ratili pyerabiro wie abic." 
2Kings23:34 Parao Neko te keto Eliakim wot a Yocia bedo abaka kun leo kaka pappere Yocia, eka te loko nyiŋe oko ni Yekoyakim. Ento Yekoakaj en te tero oko naka i Miciri, te daŋ wot to kuno," 
2Kings23:35 Yekoyakim te miyo ryal kede jabu ame oŋolo baŋ Parao, kun onwoŋo orao i baŋ jo me lobo mere kite ame Parao ociko. En orao ryal kede jabu i baŋ jo ame bedo i lobonono, kun ŋat acel acel culo wel ame oŋolle me amia baŋ Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Yekoyakim ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo wie abic, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie acel. Nyiŋ tottere Jebida, ame obedo nyaka a Pedaya me Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun lubo kite tim luŋ ame kwari mere obedo timo." 
2Kings24:1 I kare mere en Yekoyakim en ame rik Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, obino kede i kom Juda, eka Yekoyakim te doko amiro mere pi mwakki adek; i ŋe mannono Yekoyakim te jem oko i kome." 
2Kings24:2 Rwot te cwayo lwak mony a jo Kaldaya me bino lweny i kom Juda, kede mony a jo Curia, kede mony a jo Moab, kede mony a jo Ammon; Rwot ocwao mony magi luŋ i komgi me bino jwerogi oko luŋ kite ame rik en omio omiro mere odwarpiny okobo." 
2Kings24:3 Ateni mony man obino i kom Juda pi cik a Rwot, me miyo waŋgi rwenyo oko i nyime pi bal a Manace, kun lubo kite bal luŋ ame Manace rik obedo timo," 
2Kings24:4 dok daŋ pi remo a jo a mom i bal ame en obedo onyo nono; pien en omio remo a jo a mom i bal oony atek meicel i Jerucalem luŋ ame Rwot onwoŋo mom twero timo kica iye. 
2Kings24:5 Kop i kom Yekoyakim odoŋŋere ducu, kede ginnoro luŋ ame en rik otimo ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom oloc me Juda." 
2Kings24:6 Yekoyakim oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere. Wode Yekoyakin en ame te leyo kakare. 
2Kings24:7 Abaka me Miciri mom dok omedo ya i lobo mere, pien abaka me Babulon onwoŋo doŋ otyeko mayo lobo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye i ciŋe, cakere i luŋ me Miciri tuno naka i kulo Eufrate." 
2Kings24:8 Yekoyakin ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere oromo apar wie aboro, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi dwete adek keken. Nyiŋ tottere Nekocita ame obedo nyaka Elnatan me Jerucalem." 
2Kings24:9 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun lubo kite tim luŋ ame pappere onwoŋo obedo timo." 
2Kings24:10 I kare-nono omiro a Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, obino iye i Jerucalem, eka monnyere te guro boma me Jerucalem oko." 
2Kings24:11 Abaka Nebukadnejar me Babulon owoto i Jerucalem i kare ame omiro mere ogure oko," 
2Kings24:12 Yekoyakin te ye miye gire kene i ciŋ abaka me Babulon; en kede tottere, kede omiro mere, rwode mere, kede odoŋe ame loo paco mere. Abaka me Babulon te tere oko acalo opii i mwaka me aboro me loccere," 
2Kings24:13 te tero daŋ lim luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot, kede en ame onwoŋo tye i ot kanolim abaka, eka te totoŋo jami ame onwoŋo rik otio i jabu a rik tye i ot a Rwot, oŋido luŋ atino, jami luŋ ame rik Culeman, abaka me Icrael otimo kite ame rik Rwot okobo kede." 
2Kings24:14 Otero daŋ luŋ i Jerucalem iyi opii, anaka rwode luŋ, twoni jo atek i lweny ducu; en oyako jo ame romo tutumia apar, kun yako anaka odoŋe me tic apapat, anaka otet-gu ducu. Dano moro mom odoŋ kadi acel, kono ka jo ame can doŋ onwoŋo orido okato kare en ame odoŋ i lobo-nono." 
2Kings24:15 En te tero jo magi oko i opii i Babulon: abaka Yekoyakin, tottere, mon abaka, odoŋe abaka ame onwoŋo loo tic apapat, kede rwode ame rik jo me lobo mere; okwanyogi luŋ i Jerucalem te terogi i Babulon." 
2Kings24:16 Lwak opii apol ata ame abaka me Babulon otero tye iye twoni jo atek meicel i lweny ame romo tutumia abiro, kede acel, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame doŋ oteggo ame romo lweny." 
2Kings24:17 Abaka me Babulon te dok keto Matania omina a Yekoyakin me bedo abaka, eka te daŋ loko nyiŋe oko ni Jedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Jedekia ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo wie acel, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie acel. Nyiŋ tottere Kamutal, nyaka Jeremia me Libna." 
2Kings24:19 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun lubo ginnoro luŋ ame Yekoyakin obedo timo." 
2Kings24:20 Pien akemo omako Rwot omio otuno kan ame en doŋ mom romo kanyo, Rwot te bolo Jerucalem kede Juda oko tene, kun kwanyogi oko i nyime." 
2Kings25:1 Abaka Jedekia rik te cako jem oko i kom abaka me Babulon. I mwaka me aboŋwen me loccere, i dwe me apar, i nino dwe apar, en ame Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon obino iye ikom Jerucalem, kun bino karacel i monnyere luŋ, te bino guro Jerucalem oko; ote daŋ toro lobo guro oko irit." 
2Kings25:2 Boma te bedo ame oguro kittono naka i mwaka me apar wie acel me loc abaka Jedekia. 
2Kings25:3 I nino dwe aboŋwen me dwe me aŋwen onwoŋo kec doŋ orido jo atek meicel ame cam mom doŋ romo nen pi jo ame tye i boma. 
2Kings25:4 Jo te muko apama cel me boma oko, eka abaka kede monnyere te lwi ciro oko dyewor, kun obeo i dogcel ame tye i akina cel aryo me boma, ame tye i ŋet poto abaka, kadi bed rik jo Kaldaya onwoŋo oguro boma oko. Gin te wot lubo yo ame dok tutuŋ Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Cite mony a jo Kaldaya rik te ryemo yo abaka, ote bino make i bar me Jeriko twal, monnyere te ket weke kene." 
2Kings25:6 Mony me Kaldaya te make kele naka baŋ abaka me Babulon i Ribla, kan ame ote ŋolle iye kop." 
2Kings25:7 Gin te cako neko awobe mere i nyime kun en aneno kede waŋe, ote lokere i kome woto waŋe oko, ote tweye kede jegere tere i Babulon." 
2Kings25:8 I dwe me abic me nino dwe abiro, ame obedo mwaka me apar wie aboŋwen me loc a Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, i nino-nono Nabujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka me Babulon, owoto i Jerucalem." 
2Kings25:9 En te waŋo ot a Rwot oko karacel kede ot abaka, kede udi luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem; en owaŋo udi adoŋo luŋ kede mac." 
2Kings25:10 Mony a jo Kaldaya luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋ adwoŋ a jo ame gwoko abaka, gin omuko apama cel me Jerucalem oko." 
2Kings25:11 Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka te tero jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik oweko i Jerucalem, medo kede jo ame rik okwero abaka me Babulon, karacel kede lwak ocele luŋ, gin luŋ oterogi oko acalo opii." 
2Kings25:12 Cite en rik te weko jo mogo ame ocan doŋ kuno, me gin bed jo ame gwoko poto olok kede opur i kweri dyan." 
2Kings25:13 Jo Kaldaya rik te tuturo pagi aryo luŋ me mola ame rik onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot, kede gadigadi atitino, kede dero pii me mola ame rik tye i ot a Rwot, gin oturo ote ŋinyo atino, ote tero i Babulon." 
2Kings25:14 Gin otero tako jobo buru apol, atok buru, makac, tako me waŋo odok akur, karacel kede jami luŋ ame onwoŋo otio i mola ame rik otio kedgi i ot a Rwot," 
2Kings25:15 kede weer me lodi mac, kede becen. En otero jami luŋ me jabu acalo jabu, kede jami luŋ me ryal en otero acalo ryal." 
2Kings25:16 Aco kop a mako pagi aryo, kede nam acel, kede gadigadi atitino ame rik Culeman otio me ot a Rwot, mola ame odonyo i komgi dwoŋ meicel ame pekkere mom romo pimmere." 
2Kings25:17 Pagi acel acel borrere tye futi pyeraryo wie abiro. I wie malo onwoŋo oketo iye tok me mola ame borrere romo futi anwen kede nucu. I kom tok ote dok keto iye boo kede cal okwer pomegranat, kun gin luŋ otio i mola oguro tok dyere. Pagi me aryo daŋ onwoŋo rom aroma kede awottere, tye daŋ i tokkere kede bwo mere me mola." 
2Kings25:18 Adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka otero daŋ Ceraya, ame onwoŋo obedo alamdog, kede alube Jepania, kede okur doggola me ot a Rwot adek." 
2Kings25:19 Dok te tero daŋ adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo mony i dye boma karacel kede jo abic ame obedo omemba me cokere abaka ame rik onwoŋo tye i boma; kede aran adwoŋ me mony ame rik obedo ŋat ame coko jo pi lweny; kede jo pyerabicel ame obedo jo me lobonono ame gin onwoŋo tye i boma. 
2Kings25:20 Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka, omakogi te terogi naka i Ribla baŋ abaka me Babulon." 
2Kings25:21 Abaka me Babulon te nekogi oko luŋ i Ribla i lobo me Kamat. Mannono en kite ame rik okwanyo kede jo Juda i lobogi ote terogi iyi opii. 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon rik te keto Gedalia wot Akikam, ame obedo wot a Capan me loyo jo odoŋ i lobo me Juda, jo ame rik en oweko kuno." 
2Kings25:23 Kare ame otel wi mony ame tye i kabedo apapat i lobo me Juda luŋ owinyo ni abaka me Babulon otyeko keto Gedalia me bedo aloc, gin obino baŋ Gedalia karacel i jo megi magi i Mijipa: Icimael, wot a Netania, Yokanan wot a Karea, Ceraya wot a Tankumet, dano me Netopa, kede Jaajania wot a Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia te kwoŋ i nyimgi kede i nyim jogi, kun kobo ni, “Kur ibed wunu kede lworo pi odoŋe ame loo tic ame obedo jo Kaldaya; wun myero ibed wunu i lobo man kun itio wunu pi abaka me Babulon, ibino bedo giwu aber aboŋo peko moro.”" 
2Kings25:25 Cite i dwe me abiro, Icimael wot a Netania, ame obedo wot a Elicama ame en dano acel me doggola aloc obino i jo, apar te bino cako lweny i kom Gedalia, ote daŋ neko oko, kun oneko Ojudaya kede jo Kaldaya ame onwoŋo rik tye baŋe i Mijipa." 
2Kings25:26 Jo luŋ doŋ te ya wot oko i Miciri pi lworo jo me Kaldaya; jo atino kede en adoŋo luŋ owoto oko anaka odoŋe ame telo wi mony. 
2Kings25:27 I mwaka me pyeradek wie abiro me bedo a Yekoyakin, abaka me Juda iyi opii i Babulon, i dwe me apar wie aryo, nino dwe pyeraryo wie abiro, en ame Evil-merodak, abaka me Babulon otimo iye kica baŋ Yekoyakin abaka me Juda, te gonyo oko i buc, i mwaka ame en: Evil-merodak ogeo iye loc." 
2Kings25:28 En te bedo kop i kica meicel baŋ Yekoyakin, omie twon kommoro adwoŋ meicel ame loo kom obakki luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋe i Babulon." 
2Kings25:29 En omio Yekoyakin ogonyo boŋo me buc oko i kome. En rik te bedo cam nisno i nino karacel abaka pi kare me kwo mere luŋ. 
2Kings25:30 Kop a mako ginnoro me konyere mere, abaka rik te bedo miye gi-konyere mere ducu naka ka kwo mere otum." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam obedo papa a Ceji, Ceji obedo papa a Enoci, Enoci obedo papa a Kenan," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan obedo papa a Maalalel, Maalalel obedo papa a Jared," 
1Chronicles1:3 Jared obedo papa a Enoka, ame obedo papa a Metucela, Metucela ame obedo papa a Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 ame obedo papa a Nua, Nua onwoŋo tye awobe adek: Cem, Kam kede Yafeci." 
1Chronicles1:5 Awobe a Yafeci obedo Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Mecek kede Tirac," 
1Chronicles1:6 Awobe a Gomer obedo: Acikenaj Ripa kede Togarma. 
1Chronicles1:7 Awobe a Javan obedo: Elica, Tarcic, Kittim, kede Dodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Awobe a Kam obedo Kuc, Miciri, Put, kede Kanaan," 
1Chronicles1:9 Awobe a Kuc obedo: Seba, Kavila, Cabta, Raama, kede Cabteka. Awobe a Raam obedo: Ceba kede Dedan," 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuc rik te bedo i wode ame nyiŋe Nimolodi, ame en rik dano ame ogeo bedo twon lo moro atek me wi lobo." 
1Chronicles1:11 Miciri te nywalo awobe magi Lud, Anam Lekab, Naptuk," 
1Chronicles1:12 Patruc, Kacluk kede Kaptor (man gin jo ame jo Piriciti oya i komgi.)." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaan te nywalo awo be magl: Cidon obedo atinnere me kao, Ket te lube," 
1Chronicles1:14 kede Jebuc, Amor kede Girgac," 
1Chronicles1:15 Kivi, Arki, Cin," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad, Cemar, kede Kemat (itekere awobeni rikk daŋ olwoŋogi kede nyiŋgi-nono.)" 
1Chronicles1:17 Awobe a Cem te bedo Elam, Acur, Arpakcad, Lud, Aram, Kul, Geter, kede Mecek (awobeni daŋ obedo kwaro a jo ame olwoŋo daŋ i nyiŋgi-nono)" 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakcad te nywalo Cela papa Eber," 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber te nywalo awboe aryo: acel nyiŋe Peleg (pien i kare mere jo i wi lobo onwoŋo opokere), nyiŋ ominnere te bedo Yokotani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Ikwae a Yokotani te bedo jo Almodad, Celep, Kacarmavet, Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Adoram, Ujal, Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obal, Abimael, Ceba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Kavila, kede jo Yobab." 
1Chronicles1:24 Ikwae a Cem tuno kede i kom Abram onwoŋo tye kit man: Cem, Arpakcad, Cela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber, Peleg, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Cerug, Nakor, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abram ame daŋ olwoŋo ni Iburaim. 
1Chronicles1:28 Iburaim onwoŋo tye kede awobe aryo: Icaka kede Icmael. 
1Chronicles1:29 Awobe Icmael rik te doko odoŋ me wi iekere apapat apar wie aryo: Nebayot ame obedo wode me kao, kede Kedar, Adbeel, Mibcam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Micima, Duma, Macca, Kadad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Napic, kede Kedema," 
1Chronicles1:32 Iburaim daŋ onwoŋo tye kede dako aŋeca ocele ame, te nywalle awobe abicel, aŋeca-nono nyiŋe onwoŋo Ketula: Jimran, Yokcan, Medan, Midian, Icibak, kede Cua, Yokocan te nywalo awo be aryo: Ceba kede Dedan," 
1Chronicles1:33 Midian onwoŋo tye awobe abic: Epa, Eber, Kanok, Abida, kede Eldaa." 
1Chronicles1:34 Icaka wot Iburaim onwoŋo tye awobe aryo: Ecau kede Icrael. 
1Chronicles1:35 Awobe Ecau ene: Elifaji, Rewel, Jeuc, Jalam kede Kora," 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifaji obedo kwaro a jo me itekere magi: Teman, Omar, Jepo, Gatam, Kenaj, Timna, kede Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 Rewel en kwaro a jo me Itekere magl: Nakat, Jera, Camma, kede Mijja." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ceir rik onywalo awobe magi: Lotan, Cobal, Jibeon, Ana, Dicon, Ejer kede Dican," 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotan onwoŋo tye awobe aryo: Kori kede Komam, Lotan onwoŋo tye kede aminnere a nyiŋ Timna," 
1Chronicles1:40 Cobal onwoŋo onywalo awobe magi: Alvan, Manakat, Ebal, Cepo, kede Onam, Jibeon te nywalo awo be aryo: Aiya kede Ana," 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana obedo papa a Dicon, Dicon te nywalo awobe magi: Kamran, Eciban, Itran, kede Keran," 
1Chronicles1:42 Ecer te bedo papa awobe magi: Bilan, Javan, Jakan, Awobe Dican te bedo Uji kede Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Magi gin obakki ame olo lo bo me Edom con i kare ame jo Icrael mom ru obedo kede abaka moro: Bela wot a Beor, ame nyiŋ boma mere adwoŋ onwoŋo olwoŋo ni Dinkaba," 
1Chronicles1:44 Kare ame Bela oto, Jobab wot a Jera me Bojra oleo tyene." 
1Chronicles1:44 Kare ame Bela oto, Jobab wot a Jera me Bojra oleo tyene." 
1Chronicles1:45 Kare ame Jobab oto, Kucam ame oya i lobo a jo Teman oleo tyene." 
1Chronicles1:45 Kare ame Jobab oto, Kucam ame oya i lobo a jo Teman oleo tyene." 
1Chronicles1:46 Kare ame Kucam oto, Kadad wot a Bedad, a rik olwenyo te loyo jo Midian ame tye i Moab, en te leyo tyene; nyiŋ boma mere adwoŋ rik olwoŋo ni Avit." 
1Chronicles1:47 Kare ame Kadad oto, Camla me Macireka oleo kaka re, te doko rwot kakare." 
1Chronicles1:48 Kare ame Camla oto, Caul me Rekobat ame tye i ŋet kulo me Epurate, odoko rwot kakare." 
1Chronicles1:49 Kare ame Caulo oto, Baalkanan wot a Akbor oleo kakare, odoko rwot." 
1Chronicles1:50 Kare ame Baal-kanan oto, Kadad oleo kakare, odoko rwot, nyiŋ boma mere adwoŋ onwoŋo olwoŋo ni Pai dako mere onwoŋo nyiŋe Meketabel, ame obedo nyaka Matred, ame nyaka Mejaab." 
1Chronicles1:51 Kare ame Kadad oto, rwode magi en ate loyo lobo me Edom: Timna, Alwa, Yeter," 
1Chronicles1:52 Olibama, Ela, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenaj, Teman, Mibjar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiel, kede Iram." 
1Chronicles2:1 Icrael rik tye kede awo be mere apar wie aryo; Reuben, Cimeon, Levi, Juda, Icakar, Jabulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Yucepu, Benjamin, Naputali, Gad kede Acer." 
1Chronicles2:3 Juda onwoŋo rik tye kede awobe mere luŋ abic: Dako mere Bateua, nyako me Kanaan onywalo awobe adek: Er, Onam kede Cela, Awobi mere adwoŋ Er onwoŋo obedo atin a kite rac, omio Rwot te neke oko," 
1Chronicles2:4 Ci-wode Tamali te nywalle awobe aryo: Perej kede Jera. 
1Chronicles2:5 Perej onwoŋo tye awobe aryo; Kejeron kede Kamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Ominnere Jera rik te nywalo awo be abic; Jimri, Etan, Keman, Kalkol, kede Dara," 
1Chronicles2:7 Wot a Karmi obedo Akar, ame obedo dano obin okelo peko i kom jo Icrael pi turo cik me gin ame rik onwoŋo doŋ otyeko jalo baŋ Rwot;" 
1Chronicles2:8 eka wot Etan te bedo Ajalia. 
1Chronicles2:9 Kejeron rik onwoŋo onywalo awobe adek: Jerameel, Ram, kede Kelubai," 
1Chronicles2:10 Jo me ot a Ram, cakere i kome tuno kede i kom Ye ee te bedo kit man: Ram onywalo Amminadab, Amminadab onywalo Nacon, ame obedo twon lo moro a neye meicel i kom atekere a Juda," 
1Chronicles2:11 Nacon te nywalo Calma, Calma te nywalo Boaj," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaj onywalo Obed, Obed te nywalo Yece," 
1Chronicles2:13 Yece onywalo iti no awo be abiro: Eliab obedo wode me kao, eka joni te lube, Abinadab, Camma," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanel, Raddai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ojem, kede Daudi." 
1Chronicles2:16 En rik onywalo daŋ anyira aryo: Jeruja kede Abigail. Jeruja nyaka a Yece te nywalo awobe adek: Abicai, Joab, kede Acael." 
1Chronicles2:17 Eka aminnere Abigail te nywalo Amaca, ame pappere obedo dano me Icrael a nyiŋe Jeter." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaleb wot a Kejeron rik te nyomo Ajuba, eka gin te nywalo nyako a nyiŋe Jeriot. Itinogi awobe te bedo: Jeeer, Cobab, kede Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Kare ame Ajuba oto, Kaleb te dok nyomo Eprat, eka gin te nywalo awobi ame nyiŋe Kur." 
1Chronicles2:20 Kur te nywalo Uri, eka Uri te nywalo Bejalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 I kare ame Kejeron doŋ oromo mwaka pyerabicel nono, en te nyomo nyaka a Makir, amina a Gilead. Nyannono te nywalle awobi ame nyiŋe Cegub," 
1Chronicles2:22 Cegub te nywalo Jair, ame rik onwoŋo obedo i boma mege ame romo pyeraryo wie adek i lobo me Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ento Gecur kede Aram rik te mayo boma ame romo pyerabicel twal i kuno kun me Jair kede Kenat daŋ tye iye, karacel kede boma ocele ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi. Jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik bedo kuno onwoŋo rik obedo ikwae a Makir, ame rik obedo papa a Gilead," 
1Chronicles2:24 I kare ame Kejeron doŋ otyeko to, wode Kaleb te lako dako mere Eprat, eka te nywalo awobi ame nyiŋe Acur, ame en nat a rik obin onwoŋo boma me Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Jerameel, wot a Kejeron me kao rik te nywalo itino awobe kany: Wode me kao nyiije Ram, eka jo ocele te bedo: Buna, Orem, Ojem, kede Akija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameel rik daŋ tye i dako ocele ame nyiŋe Atara, ame obedo toto Onamo" 
1Chronicles2:27 Ram wode me kao rik onywalo itino awobe adek: Maaj, Jamin, kede Eker," 
1Chronicles2:28 On am onywalo itino awobe aryo: Cammai kede Juda, eka Cammai daŋ te nywalo awobe aryo: Nadab kede Abicur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abicur te nyomo dako a nyiŋe Abikail, ame te nywalo Aban kede Molid," 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab ominna a Abicur te nywalo awobe aryo: Celed kede Appaim, ento Celed te to ame mom ru onywalo atinnoro." 
1Chronicles2:31 Appaim te nywalo Ici, Ici te nywalo Cecan, eka Cecan te nywalo Alai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Jada ominna a Cammai te nywalo awobe aryo: Jeter kede Yonatan, ento Jeter te to ame mom ru onywalo atinnoro," 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonatan te nywalo awobe aryo; Pelet kede Jaja. Joni luŋ obedo ikwae a Jerameel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Cecan rik te nywalo ka anyira keken. En onwoŋo tye kede amiro mere ame obedo dano me Miciri, ame nyiŋe Jara," 
1Chronicles2:35 ame en rik te miyo nyomo nyare acel. Gin te nywalo atin awobi ame nyiŋe Attai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Attai te nywalo Nacan, Nacan te nywalo Jabad," 
1Chronicles2:37 Jabad te nywalo Eplal, eka Eplal te nywalo Obed." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed te nywalo Yeku, Yeki, te nywalo Ajaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 Ajaria te nywalo Kalej, Kalej te nywalo Eleaca," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleaca te nywalo Cicmai, Cicmai te nywalo Callum," 
1Chronicles2:41 Callum te nywalo Jekamia, eka Jekamia te nywalo Elicama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Wot a Kaleb me kao, a nyiŋe Meca, ame obedo ominna a Jerameel, rik onywalo Jip, Jip te nywalo Mareca ame obedo papa a Kebron," 
1Chronicles2:43 Kebron te nywalo itino awobe aŋwen: Kora, Tappua, Rekem, kede Cema," 
1Chronicles2:44 Cema onywalo Rakam ame obedo papa a Jorkeam, Bekem ominna a Cema te nywalo Cammai," 
1Chronicles2:45 Cammai ame obedo papa a Maon, Maon ame obedo papa Betjur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaleb rik onwoŋo daŋ tye i dako aŋeca nyiŋe Epa, ame rik daŋ te nywalle awobe ocele adek: Karan, Moja kede Gajej, Karan te nywalo wode ame nyiŋe daŋ Gajej." 
1Chronicles2:47 Lo a nyiŋe Jadai rik te nywalo itino awo be abicel: Regem, Jotam, Gecen, Pelet, Epa, kede Caap." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaleb rik daŋ dok tye i dako aŋeca ocele ame nyiŋe Maaka, ame te nywale awobe ocele aryo: Caap papa a Madmanna, kede Ceva papa a Makbena kede Gibea," 
1Chronicles2:49 Medo i kom itino magi, Kaleb onwoŋo daŋ tye i nyare ame nyiŋe Akeca." 
1Chronicles2:50 Jo-nu luŋ obedo ikwae a Kaleb. Awobi a Kaleb me kao ame dako mere Eprat onywalo obedo Kur. Kur te nywalo Cobal ame obedo papa a Kiriat-jearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 kede Calma papa a Beterekem, kede Kareb papa a Betgader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Cobal papa a Kiriat-jearim onwoŋo daŋ tye kede awobe mere ocele, ame nat acel i akinagi obedo Karoe, ame nucu a jo Menuot oya iye," 
1Chronicles2:53 jo me doggola a Kiriat-jearim ducu obedo jo Itri, jo Put, jo Cumat kede jo Micra. Jo Jora kede jo Ecitoal daŋ oya i komjo man." 
1Chronicles2:54 Calma papa a Beterekem obedo kwaro a jo Netopa, Atrot-bet-joab kede nucu a jo Manakat, kede jo Kora." 
1Chronicles2:55 Jo me doggola a jo ame odiro i tic me araŋ ame obedo boma me Jabej ene: jo Tira, jo Cimea kede jo Cuka. Magi-nono gin jo Keni ame oya i kom Kammat, papa a jo me ot a Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Magi gin itino ame Daudi onywalo i Kebron kun lubere i ditogi: Wode me kao obedo Amunon, ame tottere obedo Akinoam me Jejreel; nat olube te bedo Daniel, ame tottere obedo Abigail me Karmel;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Magi gin itino ame Daudi onywalo i Kebron kun lubere i ditogi: Wode me kao obedo Amunon, ame tottere obedo Akinoam me Jejreel; nat olube te bedo Daniel, ame tottere obedo Abigail me Karmel;" 
1Chronicles3:2 me adekkere te bedo Abicalom, ame tottere obedo Maaka nyaka Talmai, abaka me Gecur; me Aŋwennere te bedo Adonia, ame tottere obedo Kagit;" 
1Chronicles3:3 me abiccere te bedo Cepatia, ame tottere obedo Abital; me abiccellere te bedo Itream, ame tottere obedo Egla." 
1Chronicles3:4 Itino awo be abiro-ni luŋ Daudi onywalogi i Kebron, kan ame en okwono loc iye pi mwakki abiro kede dwete kanyape. Icennere en te bedo aloc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeradek wie adek." 
1Chronicles3:5 En rik te medo nywalo itino apol kuno. Dako mere Batceba ame obedo nyaka Ammiel rik te nywalle itino magi kuno: Cimea, Cobab, Natan, kede Culeman." 
1Chronicles3:6 Man daŋ dok nyiŋ awobe mere aboŋwen ocele: Ibkar, Elicama, Elipelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nepeg, Yapia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elicama, Eliada, kede Elipelet." 
1Chronicles3:9 Magi gin itino ame mom okwano iye itino a mon aŋeca. En daŋ rik tye i nyare ame nyiŋe Tamali. 
1Chronicles3:10 Ikwae a Culeman ene: Rekoboam Abija, Aca, Jekocapat," 
1Chronicles3:11 Joram, Akajia: Joac," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amajia, Ujjia, Jotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 Akaj, Kejekia, Manace," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amon, kede Jocia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Jocia rik tye kede awobe mere aŋwen: Jonanan, Jekoiakim, Jedekia, kede Callum," 
1Chronicles3:16 Jekoiakim onwoŋo tye kede awobe aryo: Jekonia kede Jedekia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Magi en itino a Jekonia ame rik obin otere iyi opii i Babulon En rik onwoŋo tye kede itino abiro: Cealtiel 
1Chronicles3:18 Malciram, Pedaia, Cenajjar, Jekamia: Kocama, kede Nedabia," 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaia onwoŋo tye kede awobe aryo: Jerubbabel kede Cimei. Jerubbabel daŋ doŋ te nywalo itino aryo: Mecullam kede Kanania, kede nyare acel ame nyiŋe Celomit." 
1Chronicles3:20 En onwoŋo daŋ dok tye itmo awobe ocele ame romo abic: Kacuba, Okel, Berecia, Kacadia kede Jucab Keced." 
1Chronicles3:21 Kanania onwoŋo tye kede awobe aryo: Pelatia kede Jecaya. Jecaya te bedo papa a Repaya ame rik obedo papa a Arnan, ame obedo papa Obadia, Obadia papa a Cekania" 
1Chronicles3:22 Cekania onwoŋo tye kede wode acel ame nyiŋe Cemaya, kede ikwae abic: Kattuc, Igal, Baria, Nearia, kede Capat." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia rik te nywalo itino awobe adek: Elioenai, Kijkia, kede Ajrikam." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai onwoŋo tye kede itmo awobe abiro: Kodavia Eliacib Pelaya, Akkub, Jokanan Delaya kede Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Magi gin ikwae a Juda: Perej, Kejeron, Karmi, Kur, kede Cobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Cobal te bedo papa a Reaya, ame obedo papa a Jakat, Jakat ame obedo papa a Akumai kede Lakad, ame gin obedo kwaro a jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Jora," 
1Chronicles4:3 Awobe Etam ene: Jejreel, Icima, kede Idbac, nyiŋ amingi onwoŋo Kajjelelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Panuel rik te bedo papa a Gedor, eka Ejer te bedo papa a Kuca, Magi en ame rik obedo itino a Kur, ame obedo atin a Eprata me kao ame obedo dako a Beterekem." 
1Chronicles4:5 Acur ame obedo papa a Tekoa onwoŋo tye kede mon aryo: Kela kede Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Dako mere Naara onwoŋo onywalo itino awobe: Akujjam, Keper, Temeni, kede Kaakactari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Dako mere Kela te nywalo awobe adek: Jeret, Ijar, kede Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koj te bedo papa Anub kede: Jobeba, ame gin obedo kwari a jo ame oya i kom Akarel wot a Karum." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koj te bedo papa Anub kede: Jobeba, ame gin obedo kwari a jo ame oya i kom Akarel wot a Karum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Rik onwoŋo tye lo moro ame nyiŋe Jabej, ame en rik dano ame oworo meicel i doggolagi. Tottere onwoŋo rik ocake nyiŋe ni Jabej pien nywalle rik obedo atek meicel." 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabej rik te kwayo Obaŋa me Icrael ni, Mia gum, ama Obaŋa, imia abed i lobo alac. Bed keda kun igwoka i ginnoro luŋ ame twero miya rem. Obaŋa daŋ te miye gin ame ekwao-nono." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kaleb ame onwoŋo obedo ominna Cuka, rik tye i wode acel ame nyiŋe Makir. Makir rik te nywalo Ecton," 
1Chronicles4:12 ame te nywalo itino awobe adek: Betrapa, Pacea, kede Tekinna, ame obedo papa a Nakac. Ikwae a jo man obedo i Reka," 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenaj te nywalo awobe aryo: Otiniel, kede Ceraya, Otiniel daŋ te nywalo awobe aryo: Katat kede Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai rik te bedo papa a Opra, Ceraya papa a Joab papa a Geracim, ame onwoŋo olwoŋo kittono pien gin rik obedo jo ame odiro meicel." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kaleb wot a Jepunne rik tye kede rtmo awobe adek: Iru, Ela, kede Naam, Ela rik te bedo papa a Kenaj," 
1Chronicles4:16 Eka lo ame olwoŋo ni Jekallelel rik te bedo kede iti no awo be aŋwen: Jip, Jipa, Tiria, kede Acarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ejra daŋ rik te bedo itino awobe awŋen: Jeter, Mered, Eper, kede Jalon, Mered te nyomo Bitia nyaka Parao abaka me Miciri eka gin te nywalo atin a nyako ame nyiŋe Miriam, kede awobe aryo Cammai kede Iciba, ame obedo papa a Ecitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mered rik daŋ dok te nyomo nyako ocele iyi itekere a Juda ame te nywalo itino awobe adek; Jered ame papa a Gedor, Keber ame obedo papa a Coco, kede Jekutiel ame obedo papa a Janoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Lo a nyiŋe Kodia te nyomo aminna a Nakam ame rik te bedo papa a Garm dano me Keila, kede Maacat, dano me Ecitemoa," 
1Chronicles4:20 Eka lo ame olwoŋo ni Cimon rik te bedo awobe aŋwen: Amunon, Rinna, Benanan, kede Tilon, Ici te bedo itino awo be aryo: Jeket kede Benjoket." 
1Chronicles4:21 Cela rik obedo dano acel ame oya i akina awobe a Juda. Itino mere awobe rik tye iye Er, ame obedo papa a Leca; Laada papa a Mareca; ame gin obedo jo ame rik gin luŋ ocwe boŋo camanini, ame onwoŋo obedo i boma me Betacibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 kede Jokim, kede jo ame onwoŋo bedo i boma me Cojeba; kede Joac, kede Carap ame rik onyomo nyako me Moab, abaka te bedo kede i Beterekem." 
1Chronicles4:23 Jo man rik te bedo jo ame cweo gulu kun obedo karacel abaka acalo oticcere i boma me Netaim kede Gedera. 
1Chronicles4:24 Cimeon rik onywalo itino awobe abic: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Jera kede Cau!." 
1Chronicles4:25 Caul te nywalo Callum, ame obedo papa a Miocam, ame obedo papa a Micma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Micma te nywalo Kammuel, ame obedo papa Jakur; Jakur ame obedo papa a Cimei," 
1Chronicles4:27 Cemei rik te nywalo awobe abicel kede anyira daŋ abicel, cite omego mere rik mom tye kede itino apol, omio jo me doggola mere daŋ mom te bedo apol bala jo me doggola a Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Jo man rik te bedo i boma magi: Beerceba, Molada, Kajarcual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bila, Ejem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betul, Korma, Jiglak," 
1Chronicles4:31 Betmar cabot, Kajarcucim, Betbiri kede Caaraim," 
1Chronicles4:32 Gin daŋ dok obedo i kabedo ocele kany: Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tocen, kede i Acan," 
1Chronicles4:33 karacel kede pacci luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi, Man en gin ame gin ogwoko ame mako kop me Tekwaro kede kabedo ame gin obedo iye." 
1Chronicles4:34 Man en nyiŋ odoŋ ame onwoŋo tye acalo otel me doggolagi Mecobab, Jamlek. Joca, wot a Amajia," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, Jeku wot a Jocibia, ame rik obedo wot Ceraya, ame obedo wot Aciel." 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, Jeku wot a Jocibia, ame rik obedo wot Ceraya, ame obedo wot Aciel." 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jecokaya, Acaya, Adiel, Jocimiel, Benaya." 
1Chronicles4:37 Jija wot a Cipi, ame rik obedo wot a Allon. Allon wot Jedaya, wot a Cimri, kede Cimri wot a Cemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Jo me doggola magi rik te medde nya," 
1Chronicles4:39 omio gin te medde wot naka tutuŋ Gedar, ote wot mano Iurj ame tye tutuŋ kide luŋ pi moyo ka-kwatgi." 
1Chronicles4:40 Gin te nwoŋo ka kwayo romigi aber meicel kuno, kan ame lum onwoŋo olot iye atek, lobo mere lac, dok jo moro daŋ mom iye ame twero miyogi obedo kede ayela, Pien jo ame rik ogeo bedo kuno onwoŋo obedo jo me Kam." 
1Chronicles4:41 I kare abaka Kejekia, jo ame ocoo nyiŋgi malo-nu owoto i Gedar, te wot babalo kema kede udi a jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik bedo kuno, Gin te wot ryemo jo ame rik bedo iye oko, gin doŋ ote bedo kuno, pien ka kwayo romigi onwoŋo lac meicel kuno," 
1Chronicles4:42 Jo ocele ame romo mia kany, ame obedo jo me itekere a Juda, te dok i megi tuturj piny me Edom naka i wi kidi me Ceir, kun jo magi en ame telogi: Pelatia, Nearia, Repaya kede Ujjiel, ame gin luŋ obedo itino a Ici," 
1Chronicles4:43 Gin te neko jo Amalek luij ame rik oriŋo te bwot, eka gin doŋ ote bedo gigi kuno naka atot tin." 
1Chronicles5:1 Magi gin ikwae a Reuben ame obedo atin kao Icrael. Ento pi timo tim me ipyeda me buto i cipappere, omio en orwenyo dittere oko me bedo atin kao, ote lunyo miyo dittere baŋ Lucepu, nyiŋe mom doŋ te donyo i buk me Tekwaro acalo atin kao," 
1Chronicles5:2 Kadi bed itekere a Juda obedo atek meicel ame aloc me Icrael luŋ te ya iye, cite dit me bedo atin kao obedo i wi Lucepu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Reuben ame obedo wot Icrael me kao rik tye kede awobe aŋwen: Kanok, Pallu, Kejeron kede Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Aco awo be a Joel ene, Cemaya, ame wode Gog; Gog ame wode Cimei," 
1Chronicles5:4 Aco awo be a Joel ene, Cemaya, ame wode Gog; Gog ame wode Cimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 Cimei ame wode Mika; Mika ame wode Reaya; Reaya ame wode Baal," 
1Chronicles5:6 Baal ame wode Beera. Abaka me Acuria ame nyiŋe Tiglat-pilecer rik obin omako Beera oko te tero oko iyi opii, kun onwoŋo en ame rik obedo atel a jo Reuben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Wati mere ame lubere i doggola i doggola i kare ame ocoo nyiŋ jo a Reuben piny, gin ene: Jeyel, Jekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela wot Ajaj, ame papa a Cema, ame oya i doggola a Joel. Atekere man rik obedo i Aroeor i lobo ame tye tutuŋ malo me Nebo kede Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela wot Ajaj, ame papa a Cema, ame oya i doggola a Joel. Atekere man rik obedo i Aroeor i lobo ame tye tutuŋ malo me Nebo kede Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Gin rik onwoŋo tye kede lwak lim abup meicel i lobo Gilead, mannono omio gin obedo i lobo luŋ adok tutuŋ tim ame tye tutuŋ kide tuno kede naka i ŋet kulo Epurate." 
1Chronicles5:10 I kare a Caulo gin rik obedo lweny i kom jo Kagrit, ame gin te nekogi oko i lweny; eka gin te cako bedo i lobogi ame tye tutuŋ kide me Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ikwae a Gad rik obedo i lobo Bacan tuno kede naka i Caleka, kun otenne i jo Reuben." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel en ame rik ogeo bedo adwoŋgi ame neye, te bedo doŋ i Bacan," 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel en ame rik ogeo bedo adwoŋgi ame neye, te bedo doŋ i Bacan," 
1Chronicles5:13 Watigi ocele ame olubere i ot i ot ene: Maeulam, Ceba, Jorai, Jaean, Jia kede Eber." 
1Chronicles5:14 Jo man rik obedo ikwae Abikail, wota a Kuri, wot a Jaroa, wot a Gilead, wot a Micael, wot a Jeci, wot a Jado, wot a Buj," 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki wot Abdiel, akwar Guni, en rik atel me atekere man," 
1Chronicles5:16 Gin rik obedo i Gilead, kede i Bacan, i paco luŋ ame tye i ŋetgi kuno, kede i lobo luŋ ame onwoŋo obedo me kwayo limgi i Caron." 
1Chronicles5:17 Man en jo ame rik ocoo nyiŋgi i buk me nyiŋ kwari a jo Icrael i kare me loc abaka Yocam me Juda kede Jeroboam, abaka me Icrael." 
1Chronicles5:18 I kom atekere a Reuben, Gad, kede nucu me atekere Manace ame onwoŋo bedo tuŋ kide, onwoŋo rik tye iye twoni jo atek i lweny, ame opwonyo meicel i tic kede kwot, pala romo kede bayo atero, ame romo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie aŋwen, kede mia abiro kede pyerabicel nono," 
1Chronicles5:19 Gin rik te cako lweny i kom Jetur, Napic, kede Nodab, ame gin luŋ obedo jo me itekere a Kagri." 
1Chronicles5:20 Gin rik obedo jo ame geno Rwot, omio gin ocwao kwacgi baŋ Obaŋa me konyogi i lweny, Obaŋa daŋ te winyo kwacgi, te miyogi loyo jo-nono oko karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo rik oribere kedgi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Gin rik te yako jami magi i baŋ okworgi-nono, inaga ame romo tutumia pyerabic, rommi tutumia mia aryo kede pyerabic, kede kana tutumia aryo. Oyako daŋ cirikale ame romo tutumia mia acel," 
1Chronicles5:22 ote neko daŋ lwak jo apol meicel, pien monygi rik obedo mony a Rwot. Gin rik te bedo i lobo-nono tuno naka i kare ame oterogi kede iyi opii." 
1Chronicles5:23 Jo me Manace ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ kide te bedo i lobo me Bacan, tuno kede i Baal-kermon, Cenir, kede i kidi me Kermon." 
1Chronicles5:24 Magi nyiŋ jo ame rik obedo odoŋe me atekere me doggola a kwarigi: Eper, Ici, Eliel, Ajriel, Jeremia, Odavia, kede Jadiel. Gin luŋ rik obedo twoni jo ame tek meicel i lweny, ame neye meicel i doggola a kwarigi." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ento jo rik te cako timo bal i kom Obaŋa a kwarogi, kun oweko wore oko ote lunyo woro obane a rok ocele ame obanagi onwoŋo oryemo oko i lobo-nono." 
1Chronicles5:26 Mannono te miyo Obaŋa tugo cuny Pul abaka me Acuria ame olwoŋo daŋ ni Tiglat-pilecer, terogi oko iyi opii. En otero atekere a Reuben, Gad kede atekere a Manace ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ kide, te terogi i Kala, Kabor, Kara, kede i kulo me Gojan, gin te bedo kuno tuno naka atot tin." 
1Chronicles6:1 Levi rik onwoŋo tye kede itino awobe adek: Gercon, Kokat kede Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kokat rik te bedo itino awobe aŋwen; Amuram, Ijar, Kedron, kede Ujiel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amuram rik te bedo awobe aryo: Aron kede Muca, karacel kede nyako ame nyiŋe Miriam. Aron te nywalo awobe aŋwen: Nadab, Abiku, Elejar kede Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Ikwae Eleajar te bedo lubere kit man: Eleajar onywalo Finekaci, Finekaci te nywalo Abicua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abicua te nywalo Bukki, Bukki te nywalo Uji," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uji te nywalo Jerakia, Jerakia te nywalo Merayo," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayo te nywalo Amaria, Amaria te nywalo Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Akitub te nywalo Jadok, Jadok te nywalo Akimaj," 
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaj te nywalo Ajaria, Ajaria te nywalo Yokanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yokanan te nywalo Ajaria, ame en nat a rik otio tic Obaŋa i ot Obaŋa ame Culeman ogero i Jerucalem," 
1Chronicles6:11 Ajaria te nywalo Amaria, Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Akitub dok te nywalo Jadok, Jadok te nywalo Callum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Callum te nywalo Kilkia, Kilkia te nywalo Ajaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Ajaria te nywalo Ceraya, Caraya te nywalo Yekojadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 Abaka Nebukadnejar rik te tero Yekojadak oko iyi opii karacel kede jo ocele me Juda kede Jerucalem, ame Rwot omie me atera iyi opii." 
1Chronicles6:16 Levi rik onwoŋo tye kede itino awo be adek: Gercon, Kokat kede Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ŋat acel acel i akina awobe man rik tye kede itino awo be. Gercon rik obedo papa a Libni kede Cemei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kokat te bedo papa a Amuram, Jjar, Kebron kede Ujie!." 
1Chronicles6:19 Merari te bedo papa a Makli kede Muci," 
1Chronicles6:20 Ikwae a Gercon ene: Gercom onywalo Libna, Libni te nywalo Jakat, Jakat te nywalo Jima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Jima te nywalo Joa, Joa te nywalo Ido, Ido, te nywalo Jera, Jera te nywalo Jeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ikwae a Kokat ene: Kokat onywalo Aminadab, Aminadab te nywalo Kora, Kora te nywalo Acir," 
1Chronicles6:23 Acir te nywalo Elkana, Elkana te nywalo Ebiacap. Ebiacap te nywalo Acir," 
1Chronicles6:24 Acir te nywalo Takat, Takat te nywalo Uriel, Uriel te nywalo Ujia, Ujia te nywalo Cau!." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ikwae Elkana: Elkana onywalo awobe aryo: Amacar kede Akimot," 
1Chronicles6:26 Akimot te nywalo Elkana, Elakana te nywalo Jopai, Jopai te nywalo Nakat," 
1Chronicles6:27 Nakat te nywalo Eliab, Eliab te nywalo Jekoram, Jeroram te nywalo Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Camwiri rik onywalo awobe aryo: awobi adwoŋ nyiŋe Joel, eka en atidi te bedo Abija." 
1Chronicles6:28 Camwiri rik onywalo awobe aryo: awobi adwoŋ nyiŋe Joel, eka en atidi te bedo Abija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ikwae a Merari te bedo e ne: Merari onywalo Makli, Makli te nywalo Libni, Libni te nywalo Cemei, Cemei te nywalo Uja." 
1Chronicles6:30 Uja te nywalo Cimea, Cimea te nywalo Kagia, eka Kagia te nywalo Acaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Magi gin jo ame Daudi rik oketo me loyo tic me wer i kare me woro i Jerucalem, i kare ame doŋ otyeko tero canduk me cik kuno." 
1Chronicles6:32 I kare ame Culeman mom ru ogero ot woro Obaŋa, gin rik obedo tiyo ticgi kun oleo alea i kema me rwatte, gin obedo tiyo ticgi kun olubo kite ame rik ocikogi kede." 
1Chronicles6:33 Magi gin jo ame obedo tiyo ticcono karacel kede awobegi: Jo ame oya i doggola a Kokat, gin ene: Keman wot a Joer, ame en rik atel wer, Joel wot a Camwiri," 
1Chronicles6:33 Magi gin jo ame obedo tiyo ticcono karacel kede awobegi: Jo ame oya i doggola a Kokat, gin ene: Keman wot a Joer, ame en rik atel wer, Joel wot a Camwiri," 
1Chronicles6:34 Camwiri wot Elkana, Elkana wot a Eliel, Eliel wot a Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Toa wot a Jup, Jup wot a Elkana, Elkana wot a Makat, Makat wot a Macai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Macai wot a Elkana, Elkana wot a Joel, Joel wot Ajaria, Ajaria wot a Jepania," 
1Chronicles6:36 Macai wot a Elkana, Elkana wot a Joel, Joel wot Ajaria, Ajaria wot a Jepania," 
1Chronicles6:37 Jepania wot a Takat, Takat wot Acir, Acir wot Ebiacap, Ebiacap wot a Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Kora wot Ijar, Ijar wot a Kokat, Kokat wot a Levi, eka Levi te bedo wot Icrael." 
1Chronicles6:39 Acap rik obedo atel wer i dul me aryo. Ikwae mere rik tye kit man: Acap obedo wot a Berekia, Berekia te bedo wot a Cimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 Cimea te bedo wot a Micael, Macael te bedo wot a Baceya, Baceya te bedo wot Malcija." 
1Chronicles6:41 Malcija wot Etini, Etini wot a Jera, Jera wot Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaya wot Etan, Etan wot Jima, Jima wot a Cimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Cimei wot a Jakat, Jakat wot a Gercon, Gercon wot a Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Etan ame oya iyi doggola a Merari rik te bedo atel wer i dul me adek. Ikwae onwoŋo tye kit man: Etan obedo wot a Kici, Kici wot a Abdi, Abdi wot a Malluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 Malluk wot a Kacabia, Kacabia wot Amajia, Amajia wot a Kilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Kilkia wot Amji, Amji wot a Bani, Bani wot a Cemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 Cemer wot a Makli, Makli wot a Muci, Muci wot a Merari, Merari wot a Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Omegogi ame obedo jo Levi rik daŋ opokkigi tic apapat i kema ame obedo ot me woro Obaŋa. 
1Chronicles6:49 Ento Aron kede awobe mere, gin en a rik mio mot awaŋa i wi keno lam, dok daŋ owano odok a ŋwece kur i wi keno lam, Gin rik oloo tic luŋ i kabedo Acil Meicel, kede mot ame omio me kwanyo bai i kom jo me Icrael, gin rik otio man luŋ kun olubo gin ame rik Muca amiro Obaŋa ocikogi kede." 
1Chronicles6:50 Awobe Aron ene: Aron onywalo Eleajar ame obedo papa a Finekaci, eka Finekaci te nywalo Abicua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Abicua te nywalo Bukki, Bukki te nywalo Uji, Uji te nywalo Jerakia," 
1Chronicles6:52 Jerakia te nywalo Merayot, Merayot te nywalo Amaria, Amaria te nywalo Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 Akitub te nywalo Jadok, eka Jadok te nywalo Akimaj." 
1Chronicles6:54 Man en lobo ame rik omio baŋ ikwae Aron kede kwir, ame opokkigi kun lubere i doggola i doggola. Jo me doggola a Kokat en ame rik ogeo, kun megi tye kit man," 
1Chronicles6:55 Gin rik omio lobo me Kebron ame onwoŋo tye i Juda, karacel kede bar me kwattere." 
1Chronicles6:56 Ento potti luŋ karacel kede pacci luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ŋet bomagi-nono rik omio luŋ baŋ Kaleb wot a Jepunne. 
1Chronicles6:57 Itino Aron rik ote pokkigi lobo magi, ame obedo lobo me alara onek: Kebron kede bar me kwattere, Jattir kede bar me kwattere, Libna kede bar me kwattere, Ecitemoa kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:58 Kilen kede bar me kwattere, Debir kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:59 Acan kede bar me kwattere, kede Bet-cemec i bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:60 I lobo a jo Benjamin rik daŋ ote miyogi iye boma magi kede bar me kwat iye: Geba kede bar me kwattere, Alemet kede bar me kwattere, karacel kede Anatot kede bar me kwattere. Man te miyo wel boma ame omiogi luŋ bedo apar wie adek, me bedo a jo me doggolagi luŋ." 
1Chronicles6:61 Aco jo me doggola a Kokat odonere te nwoŋo boma apar ame okwanyo i kwir i kom lobo a nucu atekere a Manace," 
1Chronicles6:62 Aco jo me doggola a Gercom rik ote miyogi boma apar wie adek ame okwanyo iyi akina lobo jo Icakar, Acer, Naputali kede i kom lobo a jo Manace ame tye i Bacan," 
1Chronicles6:63 Rik daŋ ote miyo boma apar wie aryo baŋ jo me doggola Merani, kun okwanyo i akina lobo a jo Reuben, Gad, kede Jabulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Man en kit a rik jo Icrael omio kede jo Levi pacci me bedogi karacel kede bar me kwatgi ducu. 
1Chronicles6:65 Rik daŋ omiogi boma ocele i lobo a jo Juda, Cimeon, kede Benjamin, kun opokigi kede kwir, Man otimo i kom boma luŋ ame ocoo nyiŋgi malo." 
1Chronicles6:66 Jo me doggola a Kokat ocele mege rik omio boma me bedo gi kede kakwattege i akina lobo a jo Epraim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Omiogi boma magi me larre a jo oneko nek: Cekem kere bar me kwatere ame tye i lobo obedo kidikidi, Gejer, kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jok-meam kede bar me kwattere, Bet-koron kede bar me kakwattere," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalon kede bar me kwattere karacel kede Gat-Rimmon kede bar me kwattere. 
1Chronicles6:70 Eka i kom lobo a jo Manace ame onwoŋo bedo tuŋ to ote miyogi boma me Aner kede bar me kwattere karacel kede Bileam kede bar me kwattere. 
1Chronicles6:71 Aco baŋ jo me doggola a Gercom rik ote miyo boma magi kede kakwatgi, I kom lobo a jo Manace ame onwoŋo bedo turj kide omiogi boma magi: Golan ame tye i Bacad kede ka kwattere, kede Acitaron kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:72 Eka i kom lo bo ajo Icakar ote miyogi boma magi: Kedec kede ka kwattere, Daberat kede kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot kede bar me kwattere kede Anem kede bar me kwattere. 
1Chronicles6:74 I kom lobo a jo Acer ote miyogi boma magi: Macal kede bar me kwattere, Abdon kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:75 Kukok kede bar me kwattere, kede Rekob i bar me kwattere." 
1Chronicles6:76 I kom lobo a jo Naputali ote miyogi boma magi: Kadec ame tye i Galilaya kede bar me kwattere, Kamon kede bar me kwattere, kede Kiriataim kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:77 Jo me doggola a Merari ame odonnege rik ote miyo boma magi kede kakwatgi. I lobo ajo Jabulon rik omiogi boma magi: Rimono kede bar me kwattere, kede Tabor kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:78 I kom lobo a jo Reuben ame tye tuŋ anyarolum me kulo Jordan ine Jeriko rik omiogi boma magi: Bejer kede bar me kwattere, Jajar kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot kede bar me kwattere, kede Mepat kede bar me kwattere." 
1Chronicles6:80 Aco i kom lobo atekere a Gad ote miyogi boma magi: Ramot ame tye i Gilead kede bar me kwattere, Makanaim kede bar me kwattere," 
1Chronicles6:81 Kecbon kede bar me kwattere karacel kede Jajer i bar me kwattere. 
1Chronicles7:1 Icakar onwoŋo rik tye kede otino awobe aŋwen: Tola, Pua, Jacub, kede Cimron," 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola rik te nywalo otino awobe kanyape: Uji, Repaya, Jeriel, Jakmai, Ibicam, kede Cemuel. Gin rik obedo odon atekere me doggola a jo Tola, dok gin rik obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny. I kare abaka Daudi wel ikwaegi onwoŋo romo tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo kede mia kanyape." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uji rik tye awobi acel ame nyiŋe Ijraya, W ode-nono rik te nywalo awobe aŋwen: Micael, Obadia, Joel, kede Icaya, gin daŋ rik obedo odon atekere me doggolagi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uji rik tye awobi acel ame nyiŋe Ijraya, W ode-nono rik te nywalo awobe aŋwen: Micael, Obadia, Joel, kede Icaya, gin daŋ rik obedo odon atekere me doggolagi." 
1Chronicles7:4 Gin rik onwoŋo onyomo mon apol meicel ame omio otinogi daŋ te bedo apol meicel, ame omio wei ikwaegi romo tutumia pyeradek wie kanyape, ame man onwoŋo okwano ka jo ame romo lweny," 
1Chronicles7:5 Wel jo luŋ me doggola Icakar ame ocoo nyingi kun lubere i doggola me ot a kwarrigi, rik oromo tutumia pyeraboro wie abiro, kun nwoŋo okwano ka jo ame romo lweny." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamin rik onwoŋo tye kede itino awobe adek: Bela, Becer, kede Jediael." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela rik te nywalo awobe kany: Egbon, Uji, Ujiel, Jerimot, kede Iri. Gin daŋ rik obedo atekere me doggolagi, kun daŋ obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny, I kom ikwaegi rik tye iye jo a romo lweny tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo kede pyeradek wie aŋwen, ame rik ocoo nyingi i buk me nyiŋ kwarigi." 
1Chronicles7:8 Becer rik tye kede awobe aboŋwen: Jemira, Yowaci, Eliejer, Eleoenai, Omri, Jeremot, Abija, Anatot, kede Alemet." 
1Chronicles7:9 Wel ikwaegi luŋ ame ocoo piny tye iye jo ame romo lweny tutumia pyeraryo kede mia aryo. 
1Chronicles7:10 Jedialel rik tye kede wode acel ame nyiŋe Bilan, Bilan te nywalo awobe abiro: Jeuc, Benjamin, Ekud, Cenana, Jetan, Tarcic, kede Akicakar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Gin daŋ rik obedo odon me atekere i doggola dok daŋ obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny. I kom ikwaegi rik tye iye jo ame romo lweny ame romo tutumia apar wie abiro kede mia aryo. 
1Chronicles7:12 Cupim kede Kupim rik obedo awobe a Ir, eka Kucim te bedo wot Aker." 
1Chronicles7:13 Naputal rik onwoŋo tye kede awo be aŋwen: Jajel, Guni, Jajer, kede Calum, Gin rik obedo ikwae a Bila." 
1Chronicles7:14 Dako a Manaci ame aŋeca ame obedo nya jo Aram rik onywale otino awobe aryo: Acriel kede Makir. Makir obedo papa a Gilead. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makir rik te nyommi Kupim dako, te daŋ nyommi Cupim mege. Nyiŋ aminnere rik onwoŋo Maaka, Wot a Makir me aryo mere nyiŋe Jelopekad; Jelopekad te nywalo ka anyira keken." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka ame obedo dako a Makir rik te nywale awobe aryo, ame ote cako nyiŋgi ni Perec kede Cerec, Perec te nywalo awobe aryo Ulam kede Rakem," 
1Chronicles7:17 Eka Ulam te nywalo wode Bedan, Magi luŋ obedo ikwae a Gilead wot a Makir, akwar Manaci." 
1Chronicles7:18 Amina a Gilead ame nyiŋe Kamolecet ame onywalo awobe adek: Icod, Abiejer, kede Maklak." 
1Chronicles7:19 Cemida rik tye awo be aŋwen Akian, Cekem, Liki, Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Magi gin ikwae Epraim. Epraim onywalo wode Cutela, Cutela te nywalo wode Bered, Bered te nywalo wode Takat, Takat te nywalo wode Eleada, Eleada te nywalo wode Takat," 
1Chronicles7:21 Takat te nywalo wode Jabad, eka Jabad te nywalo wode Cutela, Epraim rik onwoŋo daŋ tye dok awobe ocele aryo, Ejer kede Elead, ame rik obin onekogi oko i kare gin otemo kwale dok a jo ame bedo i Gat." 
1Chronicles7:22 Papagi Epraim rik te bedo kumo pirgi pi kare alac, omego mere te bi no me bino kweyo cunye." 
1Chronicles7:23 Epraim rik dok te medo ribere kede cege, eka te yac nywalo atin awobi, Gin te cako nyiŋe Beria, pi tim arac ame onen i odgi." 
1Chronicles7:24 Epraim rik daŋ onwoŋo tye kede nyare ame nyiŋe Cera, ame en a rik ogero boma me Bet-koron ame tye tuŋ piny kede en ame tye tuŋ malo, karacel kede boma me Ujen-cera." 
1Chronicles7:25 En rik onwoŋo daŋ tye i wode ame nyiŋe Repa, ame ikwae te bedo kit man: Repa onywalo wode Recep, Recep te nywalo wode Tela, Tela te nywalo wode Takan," 
1Chronicles7:26 Takan te nywalo wode Ladan, Ladan te nywalo wode Amikud, Amikudi te nywalo wode Elicama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Elicama te nywalo wode Nuni, Nuni te nywalo wode Yocwa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Lobo ame gin omao me bedogi tye iye Betel kede pacci luŋ i tjete, kede i tutuŋ kide te bedo Naaran, eka tutuŋ to te bedo Gejer kede pacci luŋ i ŋete," 
1Chronicles7:29 Ikwae a Manace rik te gamo boma magi kede pacci luŋ i ŋetgi: boma me Bet-cean, Taanak, Megido, kede boma me Dor, karacel kede pacci luŋ i ŋetgi. Man en kan ame ikwae a Yucepu wot Icrael obedo iye." 
1Chronicles7:30 Magi gin ikwae Acer. En rik onwoŋo tye kede awobe aŋwen: Imna, Iciva, Icivi kede Beria, kede amingi Cera," 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria te nywalo awobe aryo, Keber kede Malciel, Malciel ame obedo papa a Birjait." 
1Chronicles7:32 Keber rik tye kede itino awobe adek: Japlet, Comer, kede Kotam, karacel kede nyako acel ame nyiŋe Cua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Japlet rik daŋ onywalo itino awobe adek: Pacak, Bimal, kede Acivat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ominnere Comer rik daŋ onywalo awobe adek: Roga, Jekubbak, kede Aram," 
1Chronicles7:35 Omingi Kotam daŋ onwoŋo onywalo itino awobe aŋwen: Jopa, Imna, Celec kede Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Aco awobe a Jopa te bedo: Cua, Karneper, Cual, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bejer, Kod, Camma, Cilcak, Itiran, kede Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Awobe a Jeter te bedo: Jepunne, Picpa, kede Ara," 
1Chronicles7:39 eka awobe a Ulla te bedo: Arak, Kanniel, kede Rijia," 
1Chronicles7:40 Jo man luŋ rik obedo ikwae Acer. Gin rik obedo odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarigi, kun daŋ gin obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny, dok otel a neye meicel. I komgi rik tye iye jo ame romo lweny tutumia pyeraryo wie abicel." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamin rik obedo pappi itino awobe kany. Gin ene kun lubere i mwaka me ditogi: Bela, Acibel, Akara," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noka, kede Rapa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela te bedo papa awobe man: Adar, Gera, Abikud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abicua, Naaman, Akoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Cepupan, kede Kuram," 
1Chronicles8:6 Magi gin itino awo be a Ekud ame gin obedo jo me doggola a kwarogi, me ajo ame onwoŋo bedo i Geba, ame rik daŋ ote bino terogi oko iyi opii i Manakat." 
1Chronicles8:7 Gin ene: Naaman, Akija kede Gera, ame olwoŋo daŋ ni Keglam, ame rik obedo papa a Ujja kede Akikud," 
1Chronicles8:8 Cakaraim rik obin onywalo itino awobe i lobo me Moab i kare ame en doŋ otyeko ryemo monne aryo oko, Kucim kede Baara," 
1Chronicles8:9 En onyomo Kodec te nywalo kede itino awo be abiro: Jobab, Jibia, Meca, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:9 En onyomo Kodec te nywalo kede itino awo be abiro: Jobab, Jibia, Meca, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuj, Cacia, kede Mirma. Itino mere luŋ rik te bedo odoŋe atekere me doggolagi," 
1Chronicles8:11 En rik daŋ onywalo itino awobe ocele aryo i dako mere Kucim: Abitub kede Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpaal rik te nywalo awobe adek: Eber, Micam, kede Cemed. Cemed en ame rik te gero boma me Ono kede Lod, karacel kede pacci luŋ ame omano ŋetgi." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria kede Cema rik obedo odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarogi ame rik obin obedo i boma me Aijalon, eka ite ryemo daŋ jo ame rik bedo i boma me Gat oko," 
1Chronicles8:14 Awobe a Beria rik ene: Akio, Cacak, Jeremot," 
1Chronicles8:15 Jebadia, Arad, Eder," 
1Chronicles8:16 Micael, Icipa, kede Joka." 
1Chronicles8:17 Awobe a Elpaal ene: Jebadia, Mecullam, Kijki, Keber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Icimerai, Ijilia, kede Jobab," 
1Chronicles8:18 Icimerai, Ijilia, kede Jobab," 
1Chronicles8:19 Aco awobe a Cemei te bedo: Jakim, Jikiri, Jabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Jilletai, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraya, kede Cimrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 Awobe a Cacak te bedo: Icipan, Eber, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Jikiri, Kanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Kanania, Elam, Antotija," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ipideya, kede Penuel." 
1Chronicles8:26 Awobe a Jerokam te bedo: Camcerai, Cekaria, Atalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jarecia, Elija, kede Jikiri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Magi gin jo ame rik obedo jo adito, odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarigi. Man gin jo ame rik obedo i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeyel rik obin onwoŋo boma me Gibeon te daŋ bedo kuno, Dako mere rik nyiŋe Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 eka wode me kao te bedo Abdon. Awobe mere ocele te bedo: Jur, Kic, Baal, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Akio, Jeker," 
1Chronicles8:32 kede Miklot, ame obedo papa a Cimea. Ikwae a joni rik obedo i Jerucalem i ŋet jo ocele me doggola apapat." 
1Chronicles8:33 Papa a Kic obedo Neri, eka Kic te bedo papa a Caulo. Caulo rik onywalo itino awo be aŋwen: Yonacan, Malkicua, Abinadab, kede Ecibaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonacan rik te bedo papa a Meribbaal, ame obedo papa a Mika," 
1Chronicles8:35 Mika rik onywalo awobe aŋwen: Riton, Melek, Tarea, kede Akaj," 
1Chronicles8:36 Akaj rik obedo papa a Jekoadda, ame rik obedo pappi itino awobe adek: Alemet, Ajimavet, kede Jimri. Jimri rik te bedo papa a Moja," 
1Chronicles8:37 eka Moja te bedo papa a Binea, Binea te nywalo wode Rapa, Rapa te nywalo wode Eleaca, Eleaca te nywalo wode Ajel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Ajel rik te nywalo itino kanyape: Ajirikam, Boceru, Icmael, Cearia, Obadia, kede Kanah." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ecek ominna Ajel te nywalo itino awo be adek: Ulam, Jeuc, kede Elipelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Awobe Ulam rik te bedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny dok ame odiro meicel i bayo atero, Awobe me re kede ikwae rik onwoŋo pol atek, gin luŋ rik oromo mia cel kede pyerabic, Jo man luŋ rik obedo jo me iterkere a Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Rik ocoo nyiŋ jo Icrael luŋ i buk me nyiŋ kwaro, kun ocoogi i doggola i doggola, doŋ man en kite ame rik ocoo kede i buk obakki me Icrael. Jo Juda luŋ rik obin otero oko iyi opii i Babulon pi balgi me kwero geno Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles9:2 Doŋ i akina jo ame te geyo dwogo me bino bedo i lobo ame rik opokkigi, obedo jo Icrael, olamdog, jo Levi, kede jo ame tio i ot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles9:3 Jo mogo me Juda, jo Benjamin, jo Epraim kede jo Manace te wot bedo i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles9:4 I akinagi rik tye iye Utai wot Ammikud, Ammu wot a Omri, Omri wot a Imri, Imri wot a Bani, ame oya i i kom itino a Perej wot a Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Dok i kom jo me Cilo, te bedo iye; Atin kao ame nyiŋe Acaya, kede itino mere." 
1Chronicles9:6 Aco i kom awobe a Jera te bedo iye: Jeuel, kede wati mere. Jo luŋ a rik obedo i Jerucalem rik romo mia abicel kede pyeraborjwen," 
1Chronicles9:7 Aco jo ame oya iyi atekere a Benjamin obedo iye jo magi: Callu wot a Mecullam, ame rik obedo wot a Kodavia, Kodavia ome obedo wot a Kacenua." 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibneya wot a Jerokam. Ela wot a Ujju, ame obedo akwar jo Miciri. Mecullam wot a Cepatia, ame rik obedo wot a Rewel, ame obedo wot a Ibnija," 
1Chronicles9:9 Jo me itekere a Benjamin a rik onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem rik romo mia aborjwen kede pyerabic wie abicel, kun jo ame nyingi tye kani obedo odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarigi." 
1Chronicles9:10 Olamdog ame obedo i Jerucalem ene: Jedaya, Jekoyarib, kede Jacin." 
1Chronicles9:11 Ajaria wot a Kilkia ame rik obedo atel adwoŋ me ot a Rwot. Kilkia wot a Mecullam, Mecullam wot a Jadok, Jadok wot a Merayot, Merayot wot Akitub kede en Akitub." 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaya wot a Jerokam, ame obedo wot a Packur, Packur ame obedo wot a Malelia. Maacai wot Adiel, ame obedo wot a Jajera, ame obedo wot a Mecullam, ame obedo wot a Mecillemit, kede Immer ame obedo papa a Mecillemit." 
1Chronicles9:13 Olamdog ame rik obedo otel ame onwoŋo loo tic i ot Obaŋa rik romo tutumia acel, mia abiro kede pyerabicel nono. Jo man rik obedo jo ame tye kede ŋec atut i ticcoro luŋ ame onwoŋo otio i ot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles9:14 Jo Levi ame obedo i Jerucalem ame Cemaya wot a Kaccub ame obedo wot Ajirikam; Ajirikam wot a Kacabai, ame obedo wot a Merari," 
1Chronicles9:15 kede Bakbakkar, Kerec, Calal, kede Mattatia ame obedo wot Acan." 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadia wot a Cemaya, wot a Gelal ame obedo wot a Jedutun, kede Berakia wot Aca, ame obedo wot a Elkana ame rik bedo i Netopat." 
1Chronicles9:17 Jo ame rik obedo ogwok doggola ene: Callum, Akub, Talmon, Akiman kede watigi. Atelgi rik obedo Callum," 
1Chronicles9:18 gin onwoŋo obedo ogwok doggola abaka me tuŋ kide, naka atot tin, Magi gin ogwok dogcel me gony a jo Levi," 
1Chronicles9:19 Callum wot a Kore, Kore wot a Ebiacap, karacel kede owote mere, ame gin obedo jo me doggola a kwarogi Kora. Gin jo Kora onwoŋo rik gin en ame loo tic me gwoko doggola me kema, kite ame rik kwarogi onwoŋo obedo jo ame loo ke ma a Rwot, ogwok doggola ame donyo i ke ma a Rwot." 
1Chronicles9:20 Kare moro Finekaci wot Eleajar onwoŋo obedo nat ame loogi, Rwot rik obedo bedo kede i kare-naca." 
1Chronicles9:21 Aco Jekaria wot a Mecelemia rik obedo agwok doggola me kema me rwatte. 
1Chronicles9:22 Jo ame rik oyero me gwoko doggola kede dogcel, rik romo mia aryo kede apar wie aryo. Jo man rik ocoo nyiŋgi i buk me Tekwaro kun olubo i paco i paco ame gin onwoŋo bedo iye. Abaka Daudi kede Camwiri anen piny, en ame rik oketo jo man i tic ame mito gen." 
1Chronicles9:23 Mannono omio gin kede ikwae obedo ame loo tic me gwoko dogcel me ot a Rwot, ame en ot me kema, kun gin otye acalo okur piny." 
1Chronicles9:24 Dogcel onwoŋo tye aŋwen, me tuŋ kide, kede tuŋ to, me tuŋ anyarodi kede tuŋ anyarolum, rik onwoŋo oketo dano ame gwoko dogcel acel acel." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ogwok dogcel-li rik watigi ame bedo i akina paco rik konyogi kun oleo alea i ne ni no abiro abiro. 
1Chronicles9:26 Ogwok aŋwen-ni rik bedo kuno i kare luŋ, kun olo icika atino mege, kede ot kano lim Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles9:27 Udi me butogi rik tye i ŋet ot Obaŋa kuno pien gin rik ogwok ot Obaŋa, kun oyabo doggola ni no luŋ odiko." 
1Chronicles9:28 Jo ocele i akina jo Levi rik obedo jo ame gwoko jami me tic, Gin rik kwano kare ducu ka awot tic kedgi kede ka adwogogi," 
1Chronicles9:29 Jo ocele rik oketo i tic me loyo jami me ot Obaŋa, jami tic acil luŋ, moko kwon aprottere, kono olok, moo, odok a ŋwece kur, kede gin a rjwece kur." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ento jo mogp i akina awobe olamdog, en ame rik obedo jo ame rubo gin a ŋwece kur." 
1Chronicles9:31 Alevi moro ame nyiŋe Mattitia, ame obedo wot a Callum me kao, dano me doggola a Kora, en ame rik obedo nat ame loo tic me tedo ogati ame opapado me yalo Obaŋa, pien en rik onwoŋo obedo lo a genne." 
1Chronicles9:32 Watigi ocele ame obedo jo me doggola a Kokat, rik obedo jo ame loo tic me ogati ame oketo i nyim Rwot; gin rik oyiko cabit i cabit." 
1Chronicles9:33 Jo mogo me doggola a jo Levi, rik obedo jo ame ower i ot Obaŋa. Odoŋe ame loo doggola ame wero-nono rik obedo i udi mogo atitino ame tye i ŋet ot Obaŋa, kun mom doŋ omiogi ticcoro ocele, pien gin rik otio kare luŋ dyecen kede dyewor." 
1Chronicles9:34 Jo ame nyingi tye malo-nu, en ame obedo otel me doggola a jo Levi, kun lubo lwakigi. Gin rik obedo otel ame bedo i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeyel rik obin onwoŋo boma me Gibeon te daŋ bedo kuno, Dako mere rik nyiŋe Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 eka wode me kao te bedo Abdon. Awobe mere ocele te bedo: Jur, Kic, Baal, Nadab, Neri," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Akio, Jekaria, kede Miklot," 
1Chronicles9:38 ame obedo papa a Cimea. Ikwae a joni rik obedo i Jerucalem i ŋet jo ocele me doggola apapat. 
1Chronicles9:39 Papa a Kic obedo Neri, eka Kic te bedo papa a Caulo. Caulo rik onywalo itino awobe aŋwen: Yonacan, Malkicua, Abinadab, kede Ecibaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonacan rik te bedo papa a Meribaal, ame obedo papa a Mika," 
1Chronicles9:41 Mika rik onywalo awobe aŋwen: Piton, Melek, Tarea, kede Akaj." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akaj rik te bedo papa a Jarak, ame rik onywalo awobe adek: Alemet, Ajimavet kede Jimri. Jimri rik te bedo papa a Moja," 
1Chronicles9:43 eka Moja te bedo papa a Binea, Binea te nywalo wode Rapa, Rapa te nywalo wode Eleaca, Eleaca te nywalo wode Ajel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Ajel rik te nywalo itino kanyape: Ajirikam, Boceru, Icmael, Cearia, Obadia kede Kanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 I kare-nono jo Piriciti te lweny i kom jo Icrael; jo Icrael rik te mukere i ŋwec oko i nyim jo Piriciti, kun kom jo ame oneko oradde atata i kidi me Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Jo Piriciti te ryemo yo Caulo kede awobe mere, ote neko Yonacan kede Abinadab, kede Malkicua, ame gin obedo awo be a Caulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Lweny anwoŋo odio Caulo atek meicel, wegi atero mogo rik te nwoŋe, gin te cele wawano en atek meicel kede atero." 
1Chronicles10:4 Caulo te kobbi atin jami lwennyere ni, “Wot pala romoni ituca kede pelo, me jo a mom oliro-ni kur bin coba, ote loka doko gi-anywaragi.” Cite atin jami lwenyere mom te ye, pien onwoŋo tye kede lworo. Mannono te miyo Caulo kwanyo pala lwennyere, te rette iye en kene." 
1Chronicles10:5 Kare ame atin jami lwennyere oneno ni Caulo doŋ oto oko, en daŋ te rette i kom pala lwennyere, te to oko karacel kede." 
1Chronicles10:6 Mannono en kite ame Caulo oto kede karacel kede awobe mere adek, jo me ode oto karacel."
