1Chronicles10:7 I kare ame jo Icrael a rik tye i luŋ tuŋ ca oneno ni monygi orino oko, dok Caulo kede awobe mere daŋ oto oko, gin oya i bomagi luŋ ote riŋo oko, Jo Piriciti te bino bedo iye." 
1Chronicles10:8 Orwo mere ocele, i kare ame jo Piriciti obino me gonyo ruk a jo ame oneko, gin onwoŋo Caulo kede awobe mere adek oto i kidi me Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Gin te toŋo wi Caulo oko, ote gonyo daŋ jami lwenyere oko ote cwayo okwena rabo koppere baŋ jogi luŋ karacel kede baŋ jo luŋ ame tye i lobo me Piriciti." 
1Chronicles10:10 Gin te keto jami lwennyere i ot jok Aciterot, gin te guro wi Caulo i ot woro jokgi ame olwoŋo ni Dagon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ento i kare ame jo me Jabec-Gilead owinyo gin ame jo Piriciti otimo i kom Caulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 jo luŋ ame tek i lweny, oya ote wot dyeworrono benebene, ate kwanyo kom Caulo kede kom awobe mere oko ote tero i Jabec. Gin te yiko cogo komgi i te yat i Jabec, eka ote kanyo kec pi nino abiro." 
1Chronicles10:13 Caulo oto pien okwero bedo nat ame genne en onwoŋo mom geno Rwot, dok en otemo wot baŋ okor tipo a jo oto me wot penyo tamgi," 
1Chronicles10:14 kun mom geno Rwot me tele, Mannono omio Rwot oneke oko te miyo loccere i cin Daudi wot a Yece." 
1Chronicles11:1 I kare-nono atekere me Icrael luŋ te bi no baŋ Daudi i Kebron ote bino kobbe ni, “Nen ba, wan acel kedi." 
1Chronicles11:2 I kare okato Caulo onwoŋo abakawa; yin en a rik itelo jo Icrael me wot ilweny, dok daŋ idwogogi paco; Rwot rik te kobo ni, ‘Yin ibino kwayo jona Icrael dok daŋ ibino bedo aloc ajo Icrael.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Mannono en omio odoŋe luŋ me Icrael obino baŋ abaka i Kebron, Abaka Daudi te cikere kedgi i Kebron i nyim Rwot, gin te daŋ wiro Daudi kede moo me bedo abaka me Icrael, kite ame Rwot rik ociko kede baŋ Camwiri." 
1Chronicles11:4 Daudi karacel kede jo mere luŋ rik te wot i Jerucalem, ame en Jebuc, kan ame jo Jebuc onwoŋo bedo iye," 
1Chronicles11:5 Jo me Jebuc te kobbi Daudi ni, “Yin gire mom ibino kato kan.” Kadi bed amannono, Daudi te mayo bomagi atek ame olwoŋo ni Ci on oko ame doŋ olwoŋo i nyiŋe ni, boma a Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi te ko bo ni, “Ŋat ame bino geyo neko dano me Jebuc bino bedo atel wi monya.” Eka Joab wot a Jeruya en ate geyo telo wi mony, omio en te doko atel wi mony." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi te bedo i ka-ponogi atekkono, te cako nyiŋe ni, Gony a Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Daudi te gero bomanono manno amana, cakere i M illo dok kede iyie. Joab te doŋ yiko kan ocele ame odon i boma nono." 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi te doŋ medde ameda ibedo twon lo moro adit pien Rwot Obaŋa me mony obedo bedo kede. 
1Chronicles11:10 Man en nyiŋ jo a Daudi ame rik onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny, Gin karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ, okonye me bedo abaka, kite ame Rwot rik ociko, dok daŋ ote gwoko loccere bedo atek." 
1Chronicles11:11 Dano me acel i akinagi rik obedo Yecebbacebet, dano me Takemon, en rik obedo atel a jo adek. En rik obin olwenyo kom i keken i kom jo mia adek te daŋ nekogi luŋ awane acel." 
1Chronicles11:12 I akina jo adekkaca, nat ame lube onwoŋo obedo Eleajar wot a Dodo, wot Akoki." 
1Chronicles11:13 En rik onwoŋo tye gin i Daudi i Pac-damim i kare ame jo Piriciti ocokere kuno me lweny. I kare ame jo Icrael ca ko ŋwec oko i nyim jo Piriciti en onwoŋo tye i poto kalloro," 
1Chronicles11:14 en te nyono piny atek acalo ico, te lweny i jo Piriciti tuno wan ame ciŋe ojony atek kun ciŋe gire otwo atwoa i kom pala romo mere. Rwot te miyogi loyo jo Piriciti atek meicel." 
1Chronicles11:15 Jo adek i akina jo pyeradek adoŋo owoto baŋ Daudi igorogoro kidi me Adullam, kun onwoŋo mony a jo Piriciti mogo oguro gonygi i luŋ me Repaim." 
1Chronicles11:16 I kare-nono onwoŋo Daudi tye i ka-pono mere ame egeno, kun mony a jo Piriciti mogo tye i Beterekem." 
1Chronicles11:17 Daudi onwoŋo tye kede mit adwoŋ meicel i cunye, omio en te ko bo ni, “Kono nattoro kom twero kella pi amata ame tye i akorj i dog cel me Beterekem.”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Jo adek ca ame onwoŋo gin luŋ obedo jo atek meicel i lweny, ote yeco yogi kengi i dye gony a jo Piriciti, ote wot twomo pii iyi akon i dog cel me Beterekem, ote tero baŋ Daudi, Cite Daudi mom te mato; en te lunyo onyo oko piny i nyim Rwot acalo kono olok me yalo Rwot," 
1Chronicles11:19 kun kobo ni, “Ama Obaŋana, mom gire atwero ma to pii man! Ka ee amato, nwoŋo rom aroma ame amato remo a jo man adek ame ojalo kwogi, ote wot.” Mannono omio en gire mom omato pii-nono. Man en gin a rik jo adekkaca otimo." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abicai omin a Yoab wot a Jeruya rik obedo atel a jo pyeradek ca, En daŋ rik olwenyo kom i toŋ keken i kom jo mia adek, te neko oko luŋ; mannono te miyo nyiŋe cako rwo atek i akina jo pyeradek ca," 
1Chronicles11:21 En a doŋ rik obedo twon lo moro a tjeye akato luŋ i kom jo pyeradek ca, en rik te bedo atel wigi, cite mom otuno i rwom a jo adek ocele ca." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi, dano me Kabjeel, rik obedo twon alwennyoro a neye meicel; en otimo gigi mogo ame pirgi dito meicel. En oneko itino awobe aryo, ame onwoŋo rik obedo twoni jo alwenyo meicel i Moab, Dok en rik odonyo piny i bur i kare me pee, te wot neko iye eŋatu," 
1Chronicles11:23 Dok oneko twon lo moro me Miciri ame neno onwoŋo ber atek. Dano-naca onwoŋo rik tye kede tonnere i ciŋe, cite Benaya te wot bane ka i lut keken, te wot yuto tonnere i ciŋe-naca oko, ocobe kede te neke oko." 
1Chronicles11:24 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi otimo magi," 
1Chronicles11:25 Omio en daŋ obedo a rom aroma i jo adek ocele ca, En daŋ te bedo twon lo moro ame omio kwogo i akina jo pyeradek ca, cite en mom otuno i rwom a jo adek ocele ca, Daudi okete me loyo ocirikale ame gwoke." 
1Chronicles11:26 Jo ocele ame onwoŋo tye i akina jo pyeradekkaca nyingi ene: Acael omin a Yoab; Elkanan wot a Dodo me Beterekem; 
1Chronicles11:27 Camma me Karod, Kalec me Pelet;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira wot a Ikec me Tekoa; Abiejer me Anatot," 
1Chronicles11:29 Mebunai me Kuca, Calmon me Akoki," 
1Chronicles11:30 Marai me Netopa; Kaleb wot a Bana me Netopa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Ittai wot a Ribai, me Gibea i lo bo jo Benjamin; Benaya me Piroton;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Iddai ame oya i luŋ me Gaac; Abialon me Araba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Ajmawet me Bakurim; Eliakaba me Calbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 awobe a Yacen, kede Y onacan;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Camma dano me Arar, Akiam wot a Carar me Arar;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Elipelet wot Akacbai me Maaka kede Eliam wot Akitepel Gilo; 
1Chronicles11:37 Kejro me Karmel, Parai me Arabi;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel ominna Natan, Mibar wot a Kagri" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel ominna Natan, Mibar wot a Kagri" 
1Chronicles11:39 Jelek a jo Ammon, Nakari me Beerot, ame obedo amak jami lweny a Y oab wot a Jerua;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira me Itri, Gareb me Itri;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria ame obedo dano me atekere a jo Kitti; Jadad wot a Alai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina wot Acija ame rik en atel i atekere a Reuben dok onwoŋo tye kede owote mere ame romo pyeradek," 
1Chronicles11:43 Kanan wot a Maaka, kede Jocapat ame en dano me Mitan," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ujia ame dano me Acitera, Ca ma kede Jeyel awobe a Kotam dano me Aroer," 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediael wot a Cimri, kede Joka ame obedo omina Cimri ame gin jo me Tij," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel dano me Makava kede Jeribail, kede Jocavia, ame gin luŋ obedo awobe a Elanaam kede Itama ame obedo dano me Moab," 
1Chronicles11:47 kede Jaciel ame obedo dano me Mejoba. 
1Chronicles12:1 Magi gin jo ame ogeo wot baŋ Daudi i Jiklag i kare ame en mom romo wot kannoro kadi acel i kuc pi Iworo Caulo wot a Kic, Gin tye i akina jo ame onwoŋo ŋeo lweny atek ame obedo konye i kare me weny," 
1Chronicles12:2 gin luŋ obedo jo me atekere a Benjamin, ame obedo atekere a Caulo. Gin rik oneo bayo atero kede kidi me atirjdio, kun oneo bayo i turj cam kede tuŋ cem." 
1Chronicles12:3 Otel rik obedo Akieja kede Yowaci ame obedo awobe a Cemak, ame obedo dano me Gibea; kede dok Jejiel, Pelet, ame obedo awobe a Ajimavet; Beraka, kede Yeko, ame obedo jo me Anatot;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Icimaya dano me Gibeon ame en dano acel i akina twoni jo pyeradek ca ame rik onwoŋo ŋeo lweny wok ca, en onwoŋo rik adwoŋ ame loo jo pyeradekkaca; Jeremia, Jakajiel, Yokanan Jabad dano me Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Elujail, Jerimot, Bealia, Cemaria, Cepatia dano me Karup;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana, Icia, Ajarel, Joejel kede Jacobeam dano me Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 kede Joela kede Jebadia ame gin luŋ obedo itino a Jerokam dano me Gedor. 
1Chronicles12:7 kede Joela kede Jebadia ame gin luŋ obedo itino a Jerokam dano me Gedor. 
1Chronicles12:8 Twoni jo ame onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny i akina jo me atekere a Gad owoto baŋ Daudi i ka pono mere atek i tim," 
1Chronicles12:9 gin onwoŋo obedo jo ame ŋeo lweny i kwot kede toŋ, kun waŋgi nen calo waŋ iŋatu dok odwir meicel calo atil ame bedo i wi kidi. Jo-nnono gin ene: Ejer ame en obedo rik atelgi, me aryo te bedo Obadia, me adekere te bedo Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:10 me aŋwennere te bedo Micimana, me kannyere te bedo Jeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 me kannyape mere te bedo Atai, me abiro mere te bedo Eliel," 
1Chronicles12:12 me aboro mere te bedo Y okanan, me abonwennere te bedo Elijabad," 
1Chronicles12:13 me aparrere te bedo Jeremia, me apar wie acel te bedo Makibanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Jo ocele i akina jo-ni rik obedo otel wi mony ame lo jo tutumia, kede jo ocele i akinagi ame lo jo mia." 
1Chronicles12:15 Jo-ni en ame rik obin oŋolo kulo Jordan i dwe me agege, i kare ame rik pii onwoŋo opoŋ meicel i kulo Jordan naka i wi tela malo, ote ryemo jo ame rik bedo i dog kulo ducu tuŋ kide kede tuŋ to." 
1Chronicles12:16 Jo mogo me Benjamin kede Juda rik dok te wot baŋ Daudi i ka pono mere. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi rik te wot bangi me wot rwatte kedgi, te kobbigi ni, “Ka ee ibino wunu bota acalo owotena me bino konya, abino jolowu i yomcuny; ento ka ee ibino dota wunu baŋ okworra, kadi bed an gira mom at ye kede balloro, Obaŋa a kwarina myero nenwu te jukowu.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Cuny Obaŋa rik te bino i kom Amacai, ame rik obedo atel a jo pyeradek ca, te kobo ni, “Wan giwa obedo joni, ama Daudi; wan giwa obino bedo kedi, yin wot a Yece! Kuc, kuc gire obed kedi, kuc daŋ obed i komjo ame konyi. Pien Obaŋani gire en akonyi!” Daudi te jologi, te miyogi bedo otel me wi monnyere." 
1Chronicles12:19 Jo mogo me atekere a Manaci rik te wirre lubo Daudi i kare ame en obino i jo Piriciti me bino lweny i kom Caulo. Kadi bed amannono en mom te konyo jo Piriciti pien odoŋe a jo Piriciti mogo rik te yiko kop i kome, ote miyo ryeme oko, kun okobo ni, “Ka ce oye en odok cen baŋ adwonnere Caulo, en bino lokere te timowa lit.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Magi gin jo Manace ame rik owirre olubo yore i kare ame en woto i Jiklag: Adna, Jojabad, Jediael, Miceal, Jojabad, Eliku, kede Jilletai, Jo man luŋ rik onwoŋo obedo odoŋe ame telo wi mony ame loo jo tutumia i Manace." 
1Chronicles12:21 Gin rik te konyo Daudi me telo monyere i kare me lweny oyak, pien gin rik obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny," 
1Chronicles12:22 Jo rik te bedo bino ni no i nino kun omedde i kom mony a Daudi, mannono te miyo mony a Daudi bedo mony atek meicel." 
1Chronicles12:23 Man en wel lwak mony ame orukere i jami lweny ame rik obino baŋ Daudi i Kebron me konye dwoko loc a Caulo i ciŋe kite ame Rwot rik ociko. 
1Chronicles12:24 Jo Juda ame rik obino kun orukere i jami lweny, kun omako kwot kede toŋ rik romo tutumia abicel kede mia aboro." 
1Chronicles12:25 Jo Cimeon ame rik onwoŋo obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny rik oromo tutumia abiro kede mia acel. 
1Chronicles12:26 Jo Levi onwoŋo romo tutumia aŋwen kede mia kanyape. 
1Chronicles12:27 Jo me ot Aron ame olubo Yekoyadi rik oromo jo tutumia adek kede mia abiro," 
1Chronicles12:28 Eka Jadok, awobi ame onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny te bi no otel wi mony ame romo pyeraryo wie aryo, ame oya kedgi ot a pappere ikome." 
1Chronicles12:29 Jo Benjamin ame obedo itekere a Caulo ikome, rik obino iye jo ame romo tutumia adek, jo apol i kom jo me atekere a Benjamin rik omedde cwako Caulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Jo Epraim ame obino, rik romo tutumia pyeraryo twal kede mia aboro, kun gin luŋ onwoŋo obedo twoni jo ame neye meicel dok ame tek meicel i lweny i atekeregi," 
1Chronicles12:31 Jo Manace arik obino rik romo tutumia apar wie aboro, ame man rik obedo jo ame oyero ayera me wot keto Daudi bedo abaka." 
1Chronicles12:32 Jo Icakar a rik obino rik obedo otel ame romo mia aryo kun atel acel acel tye kede jo mere, Man rik obedo jo ame onwoŋo ŋeo gin ame jo Icrael myero ti kede kare ame myero ti iye." 
1Chronicles12:33 Jo Icrael ame obino rik romo tutumia pyerabic twal, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame ŋeo lweny meicel, dok opwonyere atek meicel me lweny i jami ducu ame olwenyo kede, dok obino daŋ ame doŋ oruko jami lwenygi oko. Gin rik obino i cunygi acel me konyo Daudi." 
1Chronicles12:34 Jo Naputali ame obino rik tye iye otel ame romo tutumia acel kede jo tutumia pyeradek wie abiro ame orukere oko i jami me lweny, kun omako kwodegi kede tonigi." 
1Chronicles12:35 Jo Dan ame obino rik romo tutumia pyeraryo wie aboro kede mia kanyape, kun gin luŋ obino ame doŋ oyikere oko me lweny," 
1Chronicles12:36 Jo Acer ame obino rik romo tutumia pyeraŋwen, gin daŋ onwoŋo obino ame doŋ oyikere me lweny," 
1Chronicles12:37 Jo Reuben, jo Gad kede nucu me atekere a Manaci ame obino i loka Jordan, rik obino ame romo tutumia mia acel i pyeraryo wie aryo, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame opwonyo me lweny i jami me lweny luŋ." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ocirikale magi luŋ, ame onwoŋo doŋ oyikere oko me lweny owoto i Kebron, kun otye kede cuny me keto Daudi bedo abaka me Icrael. Jo Icrael odonnege daŋ onwoŋo tye i cuny acellono, gin daŋ onwoŋo omito ni Daudi bed abakagi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Gin rik te bedo baŋ Daudi kuno pi nino adek, kun ocemo dok daŋ omatte, pien omegogi ame onwoŋo rik tye kuno onwoŋo oyikere pirgi." 
1Chronicles12:40 Dok jo ame onwoŋo ceggi kedgi ame oya i atekere a jo leakar, Jabulon kede Naputali gin daŋ onwoŋo obino i lwak cam adwoŋ meicel ame oketo i wi kane, kede inaga, kane adono mege kede twoni, kun okelo daŋ moko kwon adwoŋ meicel anina oduro, kede etak olok otwo, kono olok, kede moo. Okelo daŋ dok kede romi me acama, Man luŋ otimere me nyuto yomcuny ame jo lerael luŋ onwoŋo tye kede i lobogi." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi te yiko kop kede odoŋe ame telo wi mony, odoŋe ame loo jo tutumia kede odoŋe ame loo jomia." 
1Chronicles13:2 En te kobbi lwak jo Icrael ducu ni, “Ka ce wun iye wunu, dok daŋ Rwot Obaŋawa oye, myero wan ocwal kwena baŋ omegowa ame tye i lo bo me Icrael luŋ, karacel kede baŋ olamdog kede jo Levi ame bedo i boma a rik omiogi kede bargi me kwat me gin obin ocokere banwa kan," 
1Chronicles13:3 me wek owot okel canduk Obaŋa ame rik obin oweko oko tene i kare ame Caulo tye i loc.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Jo luŋ te ye tammere-nono pien onwoŋo ber. 
1Chronicles13:5 Daudi rik te coko jo Icrael ducu karacel cakere i wan apoki me Miciri i Cikor tuno kede naka i yo ame woto i Kamat. En ocoko joni ducu karacel pi wot kelo canduk Obaŋawa, i Kiriat-jearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te wot i boma me Baala, ame daŋ olwoŋo ni Kiriat-jearim, ame tye i Juda me wot omo canduk Obaŋa ame olwoŋo i nyiŋ Rwot ame bedo malo i wi okerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Gin te cibo canduk Obaŋa i gadigadi anyen, kun okwanyo i ot Abinadab, ame onwoŋo tye i wi tur malo, Uja kede Akuc te bedo kolo twoni ame awayo," 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi karacel kede jo Icrael te bedo tuko atek meicel i nyim Rwot, kun owero, ogoo opuk, naŋa, ajaa, mola me agoa kede apel." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kare ame gin otuno i ŋet laro a Kidon, Uja oryeo ciŋe i kom canduk Obaŋa, eka te kwako kede ciŋe, pien twoni onwoŋo ogate." 
1Chronicles13:10 Akemo te mako Rwot i kom Uja te neke oko kuno, pien oryeo ciŋe i kom canduk Obaŋa; en te to oko i ŋet canduk Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles13:11 Cuny Daudi te wan, pien Rwot oneko Uja akemo; mannono te miyo lwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Perec-uja, tuno naka atot tin." 
1Chronicles13:12 I nino-nono lworo omako Daudi atek i kom Rwot. Omio en te kobo ni, “Kara canduk a Rwot bino bedo baŋa i yore ano ba?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Omio Daudi obedo kede lworo me tero canduk a Rwot i paco mere; eka te lunyo tero tene i ot Obededom me Gat. 
1Chronicles13:14 Canduk Obaŋa te ri i ot Obed-edom pi dwete adek; Rwot te miyo winyo i kom Obed-edom karacel kede jo luŋ me ode. 
1Chronicles14:1 I Kiram abaka me Turo te cwayo kwena baŋ Daudi, kun miogi otero bao yat cedar kede opac kede opaa kidi me gedo, gin te geri Daudi ot." 
1Chronicles14:2 Daudi te niaŋ ni Rwot doŋ otyeko moke me bedo abaka me Icrael, dok daŋ ni doŋ omio loccere obedo malo meicel pi jo mere Icrael." 
1Chronicles14:3 Daudi rik dok te medde nyomo mon ocele i Jerucalem; te daŋ mede nywalo awobe kede anyira," 
1Chronicles14:4 Nyiŋ itino ame en onywalo i Jerucalem ene: Cammua, Cobab, Nacan, Culeman," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibkar, Elicua, Elipelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nepeg, Japia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elicama, Beliada, kede Elipelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 I kare ame jo Piriciti owinyo ni otyeko wiro Daudi kede moo me bedo abaka me Icrael, gin luŋ te ciro wot malo kuno me wot yenyo Daudi; cite Daudi rik te winyo oko, te wot me wot lweny i komgi." 
1Chronicles14:9 Onwoŋo jo Piriciti obino omao luŋ me Repaim oko," 
1Chronicles14:10 Daudi te penyo Rwot ni, “Awot alweny i kom jo Piriciti? Ibino miyogi i ciŋi.” Rwot te kobbi Daudi ni, “Woti; pien an abino miyo gire jo Piriciti i cini.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Daudi te wot i Baal-perajim, te daŋ wot loyogi oko kuno, Daudi te kobo ni, “Rwot doŋ oemo dye okworra i nyima, kite ame pii mol yeco kede yore.” Omio ote cako nyiŋ nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Baal-perajim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Jo Piriciti rik te weko cal jogigi kuno, Daudi te ciko ni myero warjgi oko." 
1Chronicles14:13 Jo Piriciti dok te dwogo tyen me aryo mere, ote dok bino mayo luŋ me Repaim oko," 
1Chronicles14:14 Kare ame Daudi doŋ openyo Rwot, Rwot okobbe ni, “Kur iwot malo kuno, yin man amana, iwot i negi, me ilokere wunu i komgi awulo kan ame abata pol iye." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ka ibino winyo tyen jo awot am or awinyere malo i wi abata, myero iyutte wunu, pien Rwot nwoŋo doŋ otelo nyimi oko me wot neneko mony a jo Piriciti oko,”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Daudi te timo kite ame Rwot ocike kede, te neko jo Piriciti, cakere i Gibeon tuno kede naka i Gejer," 
1Chronicles14:17 Nyiŋ Daudi te rwo romo lobo ducu, Rwot te miyo lworo ma ko rok luŋ i kom Daudi." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi ogero udi mere i paco mere. En te gero daŋ ot ocele me keto canduk Obaŋa te cako guro kema kuno pire. 
1Chronicles15:2 Daudi dok te kobo ni, “Jo me Levi keken en ame bino tiŋo canduk Obaŋa, pien Rwot en oyerogi pi tino candukkere kede pi tic bane atwal.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Daudi te coko jo luŋ i Jerucalem, me kela canduk a Rwot i kabedo mere ame doŋ etyeko yiko," 
1Chronicles15:4 Daudi te coko daŋ ikwae Aron karacel kede jo Levi," 
1Chronicles15:5 Eka i kom jo me doggola a Kokat, Uriel te telo jo ame romo mia acel i pyeraryo," 
1Chronicles15:6 kom jo me doggola a Merari, Acaya te telo jo ame romo mia aryo i pyeraryo." 
1Chronicles15:7 I kom jo me doggola a Gercom, Joel te telo jo ame romo mia acel i pyeradek." 
1Chronicles15:7 I kom jo me doggola a Gercom, Joel te telo jo ame romo mia acel i pyeradek." 
1Chronicles15:8 I kom jo me doggola Elijapan, Cemaya te telo jo ame romo mia aryo," 
1Chronicles15:9 I kom jo me doggola a Kebron, Eliel te telo jo ame romo mia aboro," 
1Chronicles15:10 I kom jo me doggola a Ujiel, Aminadab te telo telo jo ame romo mia acel apar wie aryo." 
1Chronicles15:11 Daudi te lwoŋo Jadok kede Abiatar ame gin olamdog, kede jo magi ame gin obedo jo me Levi: Uriel, Acaya, Joel, Cemaya, Eliel, kede Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:11 Daudi te lwoŋo Jadok kede Abiatar ame gin olamdog, kede jo magi ame gin obedo jo me Levi: Uriel, Acaya, Joel, Cemaya, Eliel, kede Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:12 En te kobbigi ni, “Wun ibedo wunu odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwariwu iyi atekere a jo Levi, Wun myero ilonyere wunu kenwu ibed wunu acil. Wun karacel kede omegowu, me wek ikel wunu canduk me cik a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael i kabedo ame doŋ atyeko yiko pire." 
1Chronicles15:13 I kare me agege ca, Rwot Obaŋawa rik obin otugere i komwa, pien wun onwoŋo ipe wunu i akinawa me tiŋo candukkere kite ame onwoŋo an amito.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Mannono te miyo olamdog kede jo Levi lonyere kengi pi kela canduk a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael. 
1Chronicles15:15 Jo Levi te cako tiŋo canduk Obaŋa, kun odyelo i bollere i wi gwokgi, kite ame rik Rwot ociko kede baŋ Muca." 
1Chronicles15:16 Daudi te ci ko odoŋ atekere me doggola a jo Levi me poko tic me wer apapat baŋ omegogi mogo me wek gin wer werrogo me yomcuny kun ogoo naŋa kede opuk, kede mola agoa." 
1Chronicles15:17 Mannono te miyo jo Levi yero Keman wot a Joel; kede ominnere Acap wot a Berekia; kede omegogi. I kom jo me doggola a Merari ote yero jo magi, Etam wot a Kucaya." 
1Chronicles15:17 Mannono te miyo jo Levi yero Keman wot a Joel; kede ominnere Acap wot a Berekia; kede omegogi. I kom jo me doggola a Merari ote yero jo magi, Etam wot a Kucaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Ote dok yero jo magi i akina omegogi me konyogi wek gin obed jo me wer i dul me aryo: Jekaria, Jajiel, Cemiramot, Jekiel, Uni, Eliab, Benaya, Maceya, Matitia, Elipeleku kede Mikineya, karacel kede ogwok doggola, Obed-edom kede Jeyel." 
1Chronicles15:19 Ower magi te bedo jo ame go tum ame otio kede mola, Keman, Acap kede Etan;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Jekaria, Ajiel, Cemiramot, Jekiel, Uni, Eliab, Maceya kede Benaya; joni rik obedo ogo naŋa kun olubo kite me goc Alamot." 
1Chronicles15:21 Ento Matitia, Elipeleku, Mikneya, Obed-edom Jeyel kede Ajajia te bedo jo ame telo wer kun ogo nana opuk i kite me goc a Ceminit." 
1Chronicles15:22 Rik ote yero Kenania me bedo atel wer a jo Levi, pien en rik obedo dano me adiro meicel i wer." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia kede Elkana rik ote miyo tic me gwoko doggola me canduk Obaŋa. 
1Chronicles15:24 Eka olamdog magi ote yero me bedo okut apel i nyim canduk Obaŋa, Cebania, Jocapat, Netanel, Amacai, Jekaria, Benaya kede Eleajar; joni luŋ rik obedo olamdog, Eka Obed-edom kede Jekia te daŋ bedo ogwok doggola me canduk a Rwot." 
1Chronicles15:25 Mannono te miyo Daudi kede odoŋe me Icrael kede otel wi mony ame lo jo tutumia te cako wot me wot omo canduk me cikere a Rwot i ot Obed-edom kun cunygi yom atek. 
1Chronicles15:26 Gin te yalo Rwot i twoni abiro kede nyogi rommi daŋ abiro, pien Rwot Obaŋa onwoŋo tye ka konyo jo Levi ame onwoŋo tye atino canduk cikere a Rwot." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daudi onwoŋo oruko boŋo camanini ame otio aber meicel, kite ame onwoŋo jo Levi ame otiŋo canduk karacel kede ame awer orukere kede, kede atelgi Kennaa, Daudi onwoŋo daŋ otweo pyere kede epod me camanini," 
1Chronicles15:28 Mannono en kite ame Daudi karacel kede jo luŋ me Icrael otero kede canduk cikere a Rwot, kun owo i yomcuny okuto tuŋ rommi kede apel, ogoo daŋ mola agoa, dok owero i dwoŋ aloŋo i nana, kede opuk." 
1Chronicles15:29 I kare ame canduk a Rwot otuno i paco a Daudi Mikal nyaka a Caulo oroo wane i dirica, te neno Daudi tye kirre i myel i nyim Rwot i yomcuny; en te caye i cunye." 
1Chronicles16:1 Gin te cwayo canduk a Rwot i ot, ote ke to kakare iyi kema ame onwoŋo Daudi rik oguro pire, Daudi te yalo Rwot kede mot awaŋa, kede mot me kweyo cuny i nyim Rwot kuno." 
1Chronicles16:2 I kare ame Daudi doŋ otyeko yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny, en olamo winyo i kom lwak i nyim Rwot me mony." 
1Chronicles16:3 En te poko baŋ ŋat acel acel ogati acel, kede dul riŋo aduno, kede anina olok otwo acel; en opoko baŋ co kede mon me Icrael luŋ." 
1Chronicles16:4 Daudi rik te keto jo Levi mogo me bedo otel woro a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael i nyim canduk cikere Obaŋa kun owero wer me pwoye kede pake. 
1Chronicles16:5 Oketo Acap me bedo adwoŋ ame loogi kun Jekaria lube. Ogo nana kede nana opuk te bedo Jeyel, Cemiramot, Jekiel, Matitia, Eliab, Benaya, Obededom kede Jeyel. Acap te bedo ago tum," 
1Chronicles16:6 eka olamdog aryo te bedo okut apel kun okuto tere i te re i nyim canduk cikere Obaŋa, Benaya kede Jakajiel." 
1Chronicles16:7 Man en nino me agege me Daudi ogeo miyo kede tic me wero wer pwoyo Obaŋa baŋ Acap kede owote mere ame obedo jo Levi. 
1Chronicles16:8 Pwo wunu Rwot, irab wunu nyiŋe; titti wunu rok ducu tic ame en otio!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot, itit wunu tic me aura ame en otio!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Ket wunu kwogo i kom nyiŋe acil; jo ame woro Rwot myero be i yomcuny! 
1Chronicles16:11 Yeny wunu kony i baŋ Rwot, wore wunu nakanaka." 
1Chronicles16:12 Po wunu i kom tic me aura luŋ ame en otio, i kom tic me tano kede kop ame en onolo." 
1Chronicles16:13 Wun ikwae Iburaim, ame ibedo wunu omiro mere, wun ikwae a Yakobo, ame en oyerowu," 
1Chronicles16:14 Rwot en Obaŋawa; gin a en ociko tye pi lobo luŋ," 
1Chronicles16:15 Wie mom wil kadi acel i kom cikere mere, i kom kop ame en ociko i kom jo tutumia i tutumia me kare luŋ." 
1Chronicles16:16 I kom cikere mere ame en ocikere kede Ibraim, i kom kop ame en ociko baŋ Icaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 En rik omoko odoko ocik baŋ Yako bo, cikere ame bino ri nakanaka," 
1Chronicles16:18 En okobo ni, “Abino miyo lo bo me Kanaan banwu, obed megwu ame ileo wunu.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 I kare ame rik welgi pwod nok, kun gin pwod orok ame bedo lobo Kanaan," 
1Chronicles16:20 ame gin pwod oloŋ-piny i lobo apapat, kun oya i loc man okobere i en ocele." 
1Chronicles16:21 Obaŋa rik mom oye rokkoro owunogi; ogwokogi kun juko obakki ocele ni," 
1Chronicles16:22 “Kur itim wunu ginnoro i kom jona ame ayero, kur igud wunu odwarpinnya.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Wer wunu baŋ Rwot, wun jo me lobo ducu, rab wunu nino ducu ni en olarowu." 
1Chronicles16:24 Rab wunu pi kwogo mere baŋ rok ducu, kede tic ame en otio me aura baŋ jo luŋ," 
1Chronicles16:25 Rwot dwon meicel, myero pake meicel, myero Iwore akato obane ocele luŋ," 
1Chronicles16:26 Pien obaŋe a rok ocele obedo cal apaa keken, ento Rwot oketo polo." 
1Chronicles16:27 Kwogo kede twer luŋ tye bane, teko kede lelo tye kan ame en bedo iye." 
1Chronicles16:28 Pak wunu Rwot, wun rok ducu ame tye i lobo, pak wunu kwogo mere kede teko mere," 
1Chronicles16:29 Pak wunu nyiŋ Rwot ame obedo me kwogo; kel wunu motwu bane i ot me wore. Wor wunu Rwot i bono acil; 
1Chronicles16:30 komwu myero myel i nyime, wun jo me lobo ducu, lobo gire oketo ocuŋ atek odoco, mom dok romo yenere kadi acel." 
1Chronicles16:31 Lel wunu, wun polo kede lobo; titti wunu rok ducu ni Rwot en abaka." 
1Chronicles16:32 Mor ba, yin nam kede jami luŋ ame tye iyi, yin poto daŋ lel ba kede jami luŋ ame tye iyi," 
1Chronicles16:33 Yen ame tye i buŋ luŋ bino wer i yomcuny, i nyim Rwot i kare ame en abino me ŋolo kop i lobo." 
1Chronicles16:34 Pwo wunu Rwot, pien en ber; marrere a mom lokere perakino atwal." 
1Chronicles16:35 Kobbe wunu ni, “Larwa ba, Ama Obaŋawa ame larowa, cokwa karacel me ilarwa i baŋ orok, me wek omi pwoc baŋi, ote pako nyini acil." 
1Chronicles16:36 Pak wunu Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael! pake wunu waŋ i waŋ!” Iwak luŋ te gamo ni, “Amen,” ote pako Rwot." 
1Chronicles16:37 Daudi rik te miyo Acap karacel kede owote mere ame gin jo Levi me bedo jo ame tio tic i nyim canduk me cikere a Rwot nino ducu i kabedo ame rik oketo iye canduk cikere a Rwot. 
1Chronicles16:38 Obed-edom wot a Jedutun kede owote mere pyeraabicel wie aboro ame gin luŋ obedo jo me doggola mere me bedo jo ame konyogi, kun Obed-edom kede Koca obedo jo ame gwoko doggola." 
1Chronicles16:39 Jadok alamdog karacel kede owote mere ame daŋ obedo olamdog te bedo otel woro i kema a Rwot ame onwoŋo tye malo i wi kidi i Gibeon," 
1Chronicles16:40 gin onwoŋo omio mot awaŋa me yalo Rwot i wi keno lam nino ducu odiko kede otyeno, kun olubo cik ducu ame ocoo i buk me cik a Rwot ame rik ociko baŋ jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles16:41 Jo ocele ame onwoŋo tye kuno daŋ obedo Keman kede Jedutun kede owotegi ame rik oyerogi kun tuco nyingi pi miyo pwoc baŋ Obaŋa; pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka. 
1Chronicles16:42 Keman kede Jedutun onwoŋo daŋ lo tic me kuto apel kede me goyo wer kun goo i mola agoa apapat, i wer acil. Jo me doggola a Jedutun rik obedo jo ame gwoko doggola ke ma." 
1Chronicles16:43 Lwak luŋ doŋ te ket dok paco, kun ŋat acel acel dok tune, Daudi daŋ te dok tuŋe me wot la mo winyo i kom jo me ode." 
1Chronicles17:1 I kare ame onwoŋo Daudi doŋ bedo i ode, en okobo baŋ adwarpiny Natan ni, “Nen ba, an at ye abedo i ot ame ogero i bao cedar, cite canduk a Rwot tye bedo i kema.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natan te kobbi Daudi ni, “Wot iti giri ginnoro luŋ ame tye i cunyi, pien Rwot gire tye kedi.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Cite dyeworrono ikokome, kop a Rwot te bino baŋ Natan kun kobbe ni," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Wot ikobbi amirona Daudi ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni, Mom yin en ibino gero ot me bedona." 
1Chronicles17:5 Cakere i kare ame akwanyo jo me Icrael i lobo Miciri tuno naka tin, an mom ru abedo gira i ottoro; abedo kobbere gira akola kun abedo i kema," 
1Chronicles17:6 I kabedo luŋ ame abedo wot iye i jona Icrael, mom gira apeny atelloro ame onwoŋo aketo me telogi ni kono ogera ot me bao cedar.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Aman doŋ yin myero ikoba amirona Daudi ni, Rwot me mony okobo ni, ‘Rik an akwanyi i elet kun yin akwa rommi, me idok aloc a jona Icrael." 
1Chronicles17:8 Abedo bedo kedi ikabedo luŋ ame ibedo wowota iye, atyeko okworri-gu luŋ i nyimi; dok daŋ abino miyo nyini rwo meicel, ame rom aroma i nyiŋ jo adito me lobo." 
1Chronicles17:9 Abino yero kabedo a jona Icrael, ate miyogi bedo kuno kun mom dok oyelogi; jo moro areco daŋ mom dok bi no bedo wunogi bala kite a yam con." 
1Chronicles17:10 Cakere i kare ame aketo oŋolkop me loyo jona Icrael, jo a kitegi reco obedo wunogi nakanaka, cite man mom dok bino timere i komgi; abino miyogi doŋ owe oko i kom okworgi luŋ. Medo i mannono, Rwot dok okobo ni ebino miyo ikwai bedo adwoŋ meicel." 
1Chronicles17:11 Ka kare me bedo ni i lobo doŋ otum, yin ibino nywako kabedo karacel kede kwarini, an dok abino miyo wodi moro ame yin inywalo ya, te lubi, an abino moko loccere." 
1Chronicles17:12 En wodi-nono bino gero ot pi nyina, abino moko loccere bedo atwal." 
1Chronicles17:13 An abino bedo pappere kun en bedo woda, Cite mom abino kwanyo mara a mom lokere i kome, kite ame rik akwanyo kede i kom Caulo, ame ami ileo kakare." 
1Chronicles17:14 Odi kede locci bino cuŋ atek i nyima i kare luŋ; locci bino moko atwal.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Natan te kobo kop magi luŋ baŋ Daudi kede ginnoro luŋ ame onyuto bane. 
1Chronicles17:16 Daudi doŋ te wot bedo i nyim Rwot, te kobo ni, “An kara abedo ŋa ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, jo me oda obedo ŋo, ame omio yin itiŋa malo kit man-ni?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Aco kadi bed amannono, man kom pwod ginnoro atitidi moro bani, Ama Rwot Obaŋa; nen yin doŋ ityeko ko bo kop i kom jo me ot amironi, jo me kare a pwod lac ata ame tye i nyim, inyuta-gu lwagi jona ame tye i nyim, Ama Rwot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles17:18 Kara ŋo ame dok atwero kobo bani ba! Pien yin giri ineo amironi, Ama Rwot Obaŋa!" 
1Chronicles17:19 Pien pi gin ame yin giri ici ko, ame lubere kede gin ame oya i cunyi keni, omio yin itimo twoni jami magi adoŋo doŋo, me amironi ŋe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Pi mannono ba, yin giri idwon meicel. Ama Rwot Obaŋa; pien mom dok tye ŋattoro ocele a cal kedi, dok mom daŋ tye Obaŋa moro ocele kono yin daŋ keken, ka oporo kede gin ame wan owinyo kede yitwa." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kara rokkene ame dok tye i wi lobo ame calo joni Icrael, ame yin Obaŋa iwoto bangi me wot lakorogi, me gin bed joni? Yin giri imio nyirji orwo atek, itio twoni jami mogo adono dono dok ame iyiliyili meicel pirgi, kun iryemo rok ocele oko i nyim joni ame rik i lakaro i Miciri." 
1Chronicles17:22 Yin giri pi mitti keni Ama Rwot, imoko joni Icrael me bedo joni atwal; eka yin ite doko Obaŋagi." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Doŋ ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, aman doŋ yin myero imok atwal kop ame ikobo i kom omironi kede i kom jo me ode, eka ite timo kite ame ikobo-nono." 
1Chronicles17:24 Jo gire bino mede dworo nyini nakanaka kun okobo ni, ‘Rwot me mony en Obaŋa me Icrael.’ Ot amironi Daudi bino moko gire i nyimi pi kare luŋ." 
1Chronicles17:25 Dok daŋ yin giri doŋ inyutta an amironi kop man oko, kun ikobo ni, ‘Abino gero ot piri’; omio an amironi anwoŋo tek cuny me keto kwac man i nyimi." 
1Chronicles17:26 Doŋ aman ba, Ama Rwot, yin giri ibedo Obaŋa dok daŋ kop ame ikobo bedo ateni, yin doŋ iciko pi gin aber-ri baŋ amironi." 
1Chronicles17:27 Aman doŋ tim ber, Ama Rwot, imi gum i ot amironi Daudi me medde bedo atwal i nyimi. Pien yin giri doŋ ikobo oko, gum ame yin imio, bino miyo gum bedo i ot amironi Daudi nakanaka.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ame man doŋ otum oko, Daudi oloo jo Piriciti i lweny, te miyo twergi gik oko i lobo-nono. En te mayo daŋ Gat kede pacci ame tye i ŋele I ciŋ jo Piriciti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Daudi dok te loyo jo Moab i lweny, gin doŋ te cako bedo i te loccere kun daŋ oculo ocoro baŋe." 
1Chronicles18:3 Daudi dok te loyo abaka me Coba, ame nyiŋe Adadejer, ame tye i yo tutuŋ Kamat, i kare ame en owoto cibo kidi me po pire i ŋet kulo me Eufrate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi te mayo i bane gadigadi lweny tutumia acel kede wegi aguragura tutumia abiro, kede ocirikale ame woto i tyengi tutumia pyeraryo. Daudi te ŋoŋolo odoŋe aguragura luŋ ame onwoŋo wao gadigadi lweny, cite te weko ame romo waya gadigadi lweny mia acel keken." 
1Chronicles18:5 I kare ame jo me Curia me Damaciko obino me konyo Adadejer, abaka me Coba, Daudi te neko jogi tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo." 
1Chronicles18:6 Daudi te keto cel a mony i lobogi i ŋet Damaciko, jo Curia doŋ te bedo i te loc a Daudi kun daŋ omio ocoro bane. Rwot te bedo miyo Daudi loyo lobo luŋ ame en co bo mony i komgi." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi te mayo lwak kwot apipim ame otio kede jabu ame onwoŋo tye baŋ omiro abaka Adadejer, te terogi luŋ i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Abaka Daudi daŋ omao lwak mola adwoŋ meicel i boma me Tibat kede Kun, ame gin obedo boma ame onwoŋo tye ite loc abaka Adadejer. Magi en mola ame rik Culeman otio i dero pii me mola kede pagi, kede takki mola ame rik otio kedgi i ot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles18:9 I kare ame Toi abaka me Kamat owinyo ni Daudi oloo mony Adadejer abaka me Coba luŋ," 
1Chronicles18:10 en ocwao wode Yoram baŋ abaka Daudi, me wot mote, dok daŋ me pwoye pi lweny loyo Adadejer oko, pien Adadejer onwoŋo yam obedo lweny kede Toi tyen apol meicel. Yoram te wot kun tero jarm ame otio i ryal, i jabu kede mola." 
1Chronicles18:11 Jami-nono luŋ Daudi te jalo baŋ Rwot, anaka ryal, kede jabu ame oya i baŋ rok ocele luŋ ame en oloo, ame oya Edom, Moab, kede baŋ jo Ammon, jo Piriciti, kede i baŋ jo Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abicai wot a Jeruya te dok neko jo Edom tutumia apar wie aboro i luŋ me Kado. 
1Chronicles18:13 En te keto cel me mony romo lobo Edom luŋ, jo Edom luŋ te bedo i te loc a Daudi. Rwot te miyo Daudi loyo lobo luŋ ame en cobo mony i komgi." 
1Chronicles18:14 Mannono te miyo Daudi te loyo jo Icrael luŋ; obedo ŋolo kop atira kun daŋ neno ni jo luŋ otye ka tic kedgi aber. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoab wot a Ceruya onwoŋo obedo atel wi monyere; Yekocafati wot Akilud te bedo aco kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame otimere; 
1Chronicles18:16 Jadok wot Akitud kede Akimeleki wot Abiatar te bedo olamdog; Cabica te bedo arannere; 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi te bedo adwoŋ ame loo jo Keret kede jo Pelet; eka awobe a Daudi te bedo odoŋe ame loo ticcere en abaka. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ame man doŋ otum oko, Nakac abaka a jo Ammon te to oko, wode Kanum te doko abaka, leyo kakare." 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi te kobe ni, “An abino bedo aber wan i Kanun wot a Nakac, kite ame yam pappere daŋ obedo keda aber.” Daudi te cwayo omiro mere bane me wot kweyo cunye pi to a pappere. I kare ame gin otuno i lobo a jo Ammon baŋ abaka Kanun," 
1Chronicles19:3 odoŋe a jo Ammon te kobo baŋ adwoŋgi Kanun ni, “Yin itamo ni Daudi ocwao kwena me kweyo cunyi ateni, me miyo pappi kwogo. Daudi mom ocwao omiro mere me bino roto kede ŋiŋio bomawa me wek ema oko?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Mannono te miyo Kanun mako omiro a Daudi, te lyelo yer tikgi tuŋ cel oko, te ŋoŋolo boŋŋigi oko i kwon dudgi, eka te doŋ cwayogi wot." 
1Chronicles19:5 I kare ame kop man owinyere baŋ Daudi, en ocwao jo me wot rwatte kedgi, pien lewic onwoŋo omako omiro mere-nono meicel. Abaka okobbigi ni, “Koŋ doŋ ibed wunu i Jeriko, tuno wan ame yer tikwu olot, eka ite dwogo wunu.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 I kare ame jo Ammon oneno ni nyiŋgi doŋ ŋwe aŋwea baŋ Daudi, Kanun kede jo Ammon te cwayo lim me ryal ame romo million abiro kede tutumia mia aboro me parjo gadigadi lweny kede wegi aguragura i baŋ jo Mecopotamia, karacel kede en i lobo Aram-maaka, kede i Joba." 
1Chronicles19:6 I kare ame jo Ammon oneno ni nyiŋgi doŋ ŋwe aŋwea baŋ Daudi, Kanun kede jo Ammon te cwayo lim me ryal ame romo million abiro kede tutumia mia aboro me parjo gadigadi lweny kede wegi aguragura i baŋ jo Mecopotamia, karacel kede en i lobo Aram-maaka, kede i Joba." 
1Chronicles19:7 En rik te paŋo gadigadi lweny tutumia pyeradek wie aryo, abaka me Maaka te daŋ rik bino kede monnyere, ote wot guro gonygi i ŋet Medeba. Jo Ammon daŋ rik te cokere karacel kun oya i bomagi ducu, ote yikere me lweny." 
1Chronicles19:8 I kare ame Daudi owinyo kop man, en ocwao kede Y oab monnyere luŋ ame onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny," 
1Chronicles19:9 Jo Ammon te dorre wot oko, ote wot ryeye i tyen me lweny i nyim dogcel me donyo i boma me Rabba, Aco obakki ocele ame rik obino me konyogi te ryeye kengi i bar kannaler." 
1Chronicles19:10 Kare ame Y oab oneno ni mony tye i nyime kede i ŋee en okwanyo ocirikale mogo me Icrael abeco meicel te canogi i nyim jo Curia. 
1Chronicles19:11 Jo odoŋŋere luŋ te miyogi i cin ominnere Abicai, ame te canogi i nyim jo Ammon." 
1Chronicles19:12 En te kobbi ominnere ni, “Ka ee ineno ni jo Curia armto loya oko, yin myero ibin ikonya; cite ka an abino neno ni jo Ammon amito loyi oko, an abinob ino me konyi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Yin myer o ka ibed ame cunyi nwan, me onyut cowa pi rokwa kede pi boma Obaŋawa, Rwot gire myero tim gin ame en oneno ni ber bane.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Y oab karacel i jo ame onwoŋo tye bane te doŋ wot anyim me wot lweny i kom jo Curia; jo Curia te mukere oko i ŋwec i nyimgi. 
1Chronicles19:15 Kare ame jo Ammon oneno ni jo Curia oriŋo oko, gin daŋ ote mukere gigi oko i ŋwec i nyim Abicai, ote donyo oko iyi boma, Yoab te dwogo doŋ oko cen i ka lweny i kom jo Ammon, te wot i Jerucalem," 
1Chronicles19:16 Cite i kare ame jo Curia one no ni jo Icrael oloogi oko, gin rik te cwayo kwena, wot kelo jo Curia ame onwoŋo tye i ne kulo Eufrate, gin rik te wot kun Cobak, atel wi mony abaka Adadejer en ame telo nyimgi." 
1Chronicles19:17 I kare ame kop man owinyere baŋ Daudi, en ocoko mony me Icrael luŋ karacel ote wot ŋolo kulo Jordan, gin te wot canne i nyimgi kuno, I kare ame Daudi doŋ oryeo monnyere oko i nyim jo Curia lweny daŋ doŋ te ere oko," 
1Chronicles19:18 Jo Curia te dok mukere oko i ŋwec i nyim jo Icrael; Daudi te neko jo Curia tutumia abiro ame riŋo i gadigadi kede wegi at yene tutumia pyeraŋwen, ote neko daŋ Cobat atel wi monygi oko," 
1Chronicles19:19 I kare ame jo ame onwoŋo tye doŋ i te loc abaka Adadejer oneno ni jo Icrael ologi oko, gin doŋ te cako poro kop me bedo i kuc i Daudi, Gin doŋ te bedo i te loccere," 
1Chronicles19:20 Mannono te miyo jo Curia bedo i lworo me medde konyo jo Ammon. 
1Chronicles20:1 I kare ame oro geye agea, ame en kare ame obakki maro ero iye lweny, Yoab otelo wi mony a jo Icrael ote wot cobo mony i lobo a jo Ammon. Dok ote wot guro boma me Rabba daŋ oko ento Daudi onwoŋo odon i Jerucalem. Yoab olwenyo i kom Rabba te loyo oko," 
1Chronicles20:2 Daudi rik te kwanyo tok kwogo me jabu i wi obaŋagi; pekkere onwoŋo romo ratili pyerabiro wie abic, gweŋŋoro me wel onwoŋo daŋ tye i yie ame ote keto i wi Daudi. Daudi daŋ te kela jami ame oyako i boma-nono adwoŋ meicel." 
1Chronicles20:3 Dok te daŋ kelo jo me kuno te ketogi i tic, kun otio kede ocumeno, cururu me nyonyo, kede lee me nyonyo, Daudi obedo timo kittono i kom boma a jo Ammon luŋ. En doŋ te dwogo cen i Jerucalem karacel kede lwakkere." 
1Chronicles20:4 Icennere lweny rik dok te erre i kom jo Piriciti i Gejer. Man en kare ame rik Cibbecai dano me Kuca oneko iye twon lo moro a nyiŋe Cipai, ame en rik dano ame oya i atekere a jo komgi pek. Gin rik te loyo jo Piriciti oko." 
1Chronicles20:5 Lweny ocele rik dok te ere i kom jo Piriciti, Man en kare ame Elkanan wot a Jair oneko iye Lami ame obedo omin a Goliac dano me Gat, ame rik bol tonnere mito rom aroma i yat cweyo boŋo." 
1Chronicles20:6 Lweny ocele rik dok te bedo tye i Gat, kan ame rik tye iye twon lo moro odono malo kun kome pek. Anyira ciŋe onwoŋo tye kanyape i ciŋe acel acel, anyira tyene daŋ kanyape i tyene acel acel, gin luŋ doŋ te bedo pyeraryo wie aŋwen. En rik dano ame oya i atekere a jo ame komgi pek." 
1Chronicles20:7 En rik onalo jo Icrael, Yonacan wot a Cemei omin a Daudi te neke oko." 
1Chronicles20:8 Daudi kede jo mere te neko jo-nono oko, ame gin luŋ obedo jo ame oya i atekere a jo a komgi pek me Gat." 
1Chronicles21:1 Catan rik te mito ke lo can i kom jo Icrael omio te cupo Daudi me kwano wei jo Icrael. 
1Chronicles21:2 Mannono te miyo Daudi kobbi Yoab kede odoŋe luŋ ame onwoŋo telo wi monnyere ni, “Wot i atekere luŋ me Icrael, me iwot ikwan wunu wei jo, cakere i Beer-ceba tuno kede naka i Dan. Amito ŋeyo wei jo ducu.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Cite Yoab te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, Rwot Obaŋani myero med wei joni ame tye-ni-tyen mia acel ocele, kun yin pwod ikwo ame pwod itwero neno kede waŋi, kite ame gin doŋ dwon wok-ki! Aman gin lwakki luŋ mom megi, mom gin luŋ obedo omironi, Kara piŋo yin abaka imito kwano wei jo doki? Piŋo imito kela bai i kom jo Icrael?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Cite abaka te diyo Yoab me winyo koppere; en te ya oko i nyim abaka, te wot kwano wei jo Icrael kun mano lobo me Icrael ducu, te dwoogo kede cen naka i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yoab te titti abaka wei jo ame okwano Wei jo ame romo lweny iyi Icrael onwoŋo romo million acel kede tutumia mia acel, eka me Juda te bedo tutumia aŋwen kede pyerabiro." 
1Chronicles21:6 Ento Yoab rik mom okwano wei jo Levi kede jo Benjamin, pien cunye onwoŋo mom yom i kom cik abaka-nono." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ento cuny Obaŋa mom rik te bedo ayom i kom gin ame onwoŋo otimo-nono, omio en te ke to can i kom jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles21:8 Daudi te cako bako doge baŋ Obaŋa kun ko bo ni, “Ati mo twon bai a mom kobere i gin ame atimo. Tim doŋ ber, Ama Rwot ikwany balla oko, an amironi; pien ati mo tim me mino meicel.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Rwot te kobbi adwarpiny Gad, ame onwoŋo obedo araŋ-piny a Daudi ni," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Wot ikobbi Daudi ni, ‘Amie tam adek ame en myero eyer acel i akinagi, en atim.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Gad te wot baŋ Daudi, te titte gin ame Rwot okobo; openye ni," 
1Chronicles21:12 “Imito ni kec en a myero pot i loboni te ri pi mwakki adek? Onyo yin en i bed ŋwec arjweca pi dwete adek kun irino okworri? Onyo imito ni too edeke ame obedo pala lweny a Rwot poti i loboni pi nino adek, kun amalaika a Rwot jwero jo i lobo a jo Icrael. Aco yin doŋ itam ite timo gin ame myero adwok baŋ Rwot.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Daudi te kobbi Gad ni, “At ye i twon cannono adwoŋ meicel; cite mom aye ni dano en amyero ket can i koma. Rwot gire en myero ket can i komwa, pien en obedo akica meicel.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Rwot te cwayo too edeke i kom jo Icrael geye odiko tuno kede naka i kare ame rik ociko. Lwak jo ame romo tutumia pyerabiro twal te to," 
1Chronicles21:15 Obaŋa rik te cwalo amalaika me balo Jerucalem oko ento i ka re ame en doŋ onwoŋo mito balo oko, Rwot te loko tammere oko me keto can i kom jo, omio te kobbi amalaika ame onwoŋo oneko jo ni, “Wek doŋ bedi! Oromo doŋ.” Amalaika onwoŋo tye i ŋet laro dino kai Aruna, dano me Jebuc." 
1Chronicles21:16 Daudi te neno amalaika ame onwoŋo aneko jo tye ocun i akina lobo kede polo, kun omako pala me romo i ciŋe me neko kede jo me Jerucalem. Daudi karacel kede odoŋe me Icrael, ame gin luŋ onwoŋo oruko bono cola, gin luŋ ote ony piny aryeba cuny." 
1Chronicles21:17 Daudi okobbi Obaŋa ni, “Kom an a rik amio cik ni myero kwan wei jo? An gire en ame atimo bai, atimo gin arac. Kara jo man do tye aneno can nono. Tim ber, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, iluny goya an keken karacel kede jo me oda, ento iwek jo man bedi.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 I nino-nono ikome amalaika a Rwot te kobbi Gad me wot kobbi Daudi ni, “Wot malo kuca, me iwot ican keno lam me yalo Rwot i laro me dino kai Aruna dano me Jebuc.”" 
1Chronicles21:19 Daudi te winyo gin ame Rwot omio Gad okobbe, en te wot kuno." 
1Chronicles21:20 En onwoŋo Aruna kede awobe mere aŋwen tye adino nano. I kare ame Aruna obolo waŋe, oneno amala ika a Rwot, awobe me re aŋwen te riŋo wot pono oko." 
1Chronicles21:21 Kare ame Aruna oneno abaka Daudi tye abino en owoto bane te wot ryebere piny i nyime wore. 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi te kobbe ni, “Mia laro dino kaili awili, me acan keno lam me yalo Rwot, me too edeke ya oko i kom jo. An abino culli wei ame iŋolo luŋ pire.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Aruna te gamo dog abaka ni, “Yin giri kwany gin ame imito, Ama adwoŋŋa; nen twoni aŋwen me yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa ene, kede apwod me dino kai itwero tic kedgi akaka yen, kede dok nano me mot me moko kwon. An amiogi bani luŋ nono.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Cite abaka Daudi te gamo ni, “Mom amannono gire, an myero acul lim pirgi, Mom abino gamo giri moro me yalo Rwot, an mom abino yalo Rwot Obaŋana kede mot a mom aculo ginnoro pire.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Daudi te wilo laro dino kai kede twoni i baŋ Aruna; kun mie cekel me jabu mia abicel ame opimo. 
1Chronicles21:26 En te cano keno lam me yalo Rwot kuno, eka te wano iye mot awaŋa kede me kweyo cuny. Rwot te gamo kwaccere ame en okwao, kun cwao mac i polo i kom mot awaŋa ame tye i wi keno lam." 
1Chronicles21:27 Rwot te kobbi amala ika me dwoko pala mere i yi akuro. 
1Chronicles21:28 I kare ame Daudi oneno ni Rwot otyeko gamo kwaccere i laro me dino kai Aruna, dano me Jebuc, en te medde yalo Rwot i mottere ducu kuno," 
1Chronicles21:29 Pien kema a Rwot ame rik Muca otio i tim, kede keno lam me mot awaŋa onwoŋo rik pwod tye kabedo me woro Obaŋa malo i wi kidi ame tye i Gibeon;" 
1Chronicles21:30 Cite Daudi onwoŋo rik mom romo wot kuno me wot woro Obaŋa iye, pien onwoŋo rik tye ka Iworo pala romo ame amalaika a Rwot onwoŋo amako i ciŋe." 
1Chronicles22:1 Mannono omio Daudi okobo ni, “Ot me woro Rwot Obaŋa bino bedo gire kan. Keno lam me waŋo mot a jo Icrael daŋ bino bedo kan.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Daudi rik te ciko ni myero cok orok ducu ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo me Icrael karacel. En rik te miyogi tic, tic me payo godi, tic me payo kidi abeco me gero ot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles22:3 En dok te kano daŋ nyonyo apipim me tiyo cumal me goyo kika bao me dogcel, kede me tweyo bao, karacel kede mola daŋ adwoŋ ata ame mom oromo pi mo pekere," 
1Chronicles22:4 Jo Turo kede Cidon te kelli Daudi bao Cedar apipim, ame welgi daŋ mom romo kwane kadi acel pi dworjgi." 
1Chronicles22:5 Pien Daudi onwoŋo obedo tamo ni, “Woda Culeman pwod tidi, ijeccere daŋ pwod nok, doŋ ot ame en bino gero pi Rwot myero bed me kwogo okato kare, ame pire myero rwo atek i wi lobo luŋ. En omio an myero ayikke jami luŋ me gero ottono.” Mannono omio Daudi oyiko jami me gero ot Obaŋa adwoŋ meicel kun mom ru oto." 
1Chronicles22:6 En olwoŋo wode Culeman, te cike me gero ot a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
1Chronicles22:7 Daudi okobbi wode ni, “Atinna, an onwoŋo abedo lwodo kop i cunya ni kono agero ottoro me woro Rwot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ento Rwot obino baŋa te kobba ni, ‘Yin doŋ ityeko onyoo remo a jo apol meicel dok daŋ ibedo lweny kare luŋ; pi mannono yin mom ibino gero ottoro me wora pi remo adwoŋ meicel ame inyoo i nyima i lobo." 
1Chronicles22:9 Nen ba yin ibino nywalo atin awo bi, abino miyo en bedo i kuc, pien abino miyo okworrere ame tye i ŋete bedo kede kuc kun mom oyele. Nyiŋ wodenono obino lwoŋo ni Culeman, pien i kare me loccere abino miyo kuc baŋ jo Icrael karacel kede weo." 
1Chronicles22:10 En bi no gero ot me wora. En bino bedo woda, an abino bedo pappere, Abino moko kom me loccere bedo iyi Icrael atwal.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 “Doŋ pi mano ba, atinna, Rwot Obaŋani myero bed kedi, me ityek tic me gero ot a Rwot Obaŋani, kite ame en rik okobo kede baŋa," 
1Chronicles22:12 Rwot Obaŋani myero mi ryeko kede niaŋ atut me ilo jo mere kun ilubo cikere ame en omi i kare ame en doŋ omi dit me loyo jo Icrael. 
1Chronicles22:13 Ka ee igwokere ilubo cik ducu ame Rwot rik ociko baŋ Muca pi jo Icrael, ibino limo winyo. Bed atek ame cunyi nwaŋ. Kur ilwor; cunyi daŋ kur poti." 
1Chronicles22:14 Nen an doŋ atyeko yelle atek meicel, ayiko lwak jami-ni me gero ot a Rwot, ayiko jabu ame romo tan tutumia aŋwen kede ryal ame buco romo tan tutumia pyeraŋwen me gero ot a Rwot. Medo i kom mannono ayiko daŋ mola kede nyonyo ame dwoŋ atata, mom twero pimere kadi acel. Ayiko daŋ bao kede kiddi apipim, ento yin myero daŋ dok imed en ocele i komgi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Jo me ticci gire tye apipim. Tye jo me payo kiddi, jo me gedo, opac kede kit odiro apapat ame welgi mom romo kwanne, ame gin luŋ obedo jo ame kwiri meicel i ticgi," 
1Chronicles22:16 kun otio tic i jabu, ryal, mola, kede nyonyo. Cak doŋ tic oko atinna. Rwot myero bed kedi.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Daudi dok te ciko odoŋe me Icrael luŋ me konyo wode Culeman, kun kobbigi ni," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Myero Rwot Obanawu bed kedwu, omiwu kuc i kabedo ducu. En omio aloo jo ame yam bedo i lobo man luŋ, aman doŋ gin tye i te locwa kede i te loc a Rwot." 
1Chronicles22:19 Aman doŋ myero iketo cunywu me tic baŋ Rwot Obanawu i cunywu ducu kede tipowu ducu, Cak wunu gero ot acil me woro Rwot Obaŋa me iket wunu canduk me cikere a Rwot iye kede jami acil luŋ ame iworo wunu i Rwot.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 I kare ame Daudi doŋ onwoŋo oti atek meicel, oketo wode Culeman obedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles23:2 Daudi te coko odoŋe a jo Icrael luŋ kede olamdog karacel kede jo Olevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 En te kwano jo Olevi luŋ ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeradek dok kede malo. Welgi luŋ te romo tutumia pyeradek wie aboro. 
1Chronicles23:4 Abaka Daudi te kobo ni, “Jo tutumia pyeraryo wie aŋwen i akinagi bi no bedo jo ame tio tic i ot a Rwot, eka jo tutumia abicel te bedo jo ame gwoko kop i kom gin ame otimere kede oŋolkop." 
1Chronicles23:5 Jo tutumia aŋwen bino bedo ogwok doggola, kede jo tutumia aŋwen bino bedo jo ame wero wer me pako Rwot, kun otio jami luŋ ame onwoŋo otio me wer.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi opokogi i dul adek kun lubo doggola a kwarigi ame obedo awobe a Levi: Gercom, Kokat kede Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gercom rik onwoŋo tye awobe aryo, Ladan kede Cimei." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladan onwoŋo tye awobe adek, Jekiel ame obedo adwoij ame loogi, Jetam kede Joel." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladan onwoŋo tye awobe adek, Jekiel ame obedo adwoij ame loogi, Jetam kede Joel." 
1Chronicles23:9 Joni adek-ni en ame rik obedo odoŋe atekere me doggola a Ladan, Cemei rik onwoŋo daŋ tye awo be adek, Celomot, Kajiel, kede Karon." 
1Chronicles23:10 Awobe a Cimei aŋwen te bedo Jakat, Jina, Jeuc kede Beria, Man nyiŋ awobe aŋwen-nono kun lubere i dito me nywalogi." 
1Chronicles23:11 Omio Jakat ame obedo adwoŋ ame loogi eka Jija te lube. Ikwae a Jeuc rik mom te bedo apol mano omio rik okwanogi acalo jo me doggola acel. 
1Chronicles23:12 Kokat rik onwoŋo tye awobe aŋwen, Amuram, Ijar, Kebron kede Ujiel," 
1Chronicles23:13 wode me kao Amuram rik obed papa Aron kede Muca, Aron kede ikwae rik ote miyo tic me kwero jami acil meicel, gin obedo jo ame tio tic me wano odok a ŋwece kur me woro Rwot atwal, kun otio bane, dok olamo winyo i kom lwak i nyiŋe," 
1Chronicles23:14 Ento awobe a Muca, ame obedo dano Obaŋa, rik daŋ okwanogi i kom jo Levi," 
1Chronicles23:15 En rik onwoŋo tye awobe mere aryo, Gercom kede Eliejer." 
1Chronicles23:16 Awobe a Gercom, adwoŋ ame loogi rik obedo Cebuel." 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliejer rik tye ka awobi acel keken ame nyiŋe Rekabia, ento en Rekabia rik te nywalo awobe apol meicel." 
1Chronicles23:18 Ijar wot a Kokat rik tye i wode ame nyiŋe Celumit, en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo doggolagi," 
1Chronicles23:19 Kebron wot a Kokat me adekkere rik onwoŋo tye awobe aŋwen, ame ŋat a rik loogi nyiŋe Jeria, Amaria te lube, eka Jekajiel kede Jekamean," 
1Chronicles23:20 Ujiel wot a Kokat me aŋwennere rik tye awobe aryo Mika gin kede Icaya. 
1Chronicles23:21 Merari rik onywalo awobe aryo, Makali kede Muci, Makali rik daŋ te nywalo awobe aryo, Eleajar kede Kic," 
1Chronicles23:22 ento Eleajar te to kun mom onywalo atin awobi moro kono ka anyira keken. Ento awobe a Kic rik te nyomo anyira mere-nono. 
1Chronicles23:23 Muci wot a Merari ame obedo awobi me aryo rik te nywalo awobe adek, Makali, Eder, kede Jeremot." 
1Chronicles23:24 Magi en ame rik obedo ikwae a Levi kun lubere i doggola me ot a kwarigi, gin aye rik obedo odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarigi ame ocoo i buk me Tekwaro kun ocoo nyiŋ nat acel acel. Ŋat acel acel i kom ikwae a Levi ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo dok kede malo onwoŋo doŋ tye kede tic ame en tio i ot me woro Rwot." 
1Chronicles23:25 Daudi rik onwoŋo okobo ni, “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael doŋ omio kuc baŋ jo mere, en i kome doŋ bino bedo i Jerucalem atwal." 
1Chronicles23:26 Pi mannono, jo Levi mom dok bi no medde tiŋo kema a Rwot, akadi jami ame otio kedgi iye.”" 
1Chronicles23:27 Pi kop a Daudi ame eko bo me agikki mere jo Levi rik ocoogi me doko jo ame tio i ot Obaŋa ka mwaka me ditagi doŋ oromo pyeraryo nono. 
1Chronicles23:28 Gin rik okonyo olamdog ame obedo ikwae Aron kede ticgi i ot a Rwot, kun ogwoko daŋ dyekal kede icika atitino ame tye i ŋet ot Obaŋa, olonyo jami luŋ bedo acil dok daŋ otio kit tic ocele ame tye i at Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles23:29 Dok daŋ okonyo tic me ogati ame oketo i nyim Rwot kede moko kwon ame otio kedgi me mot me yalo Obaŋa, kede capat areppere a tobi mom iye, kede moko kwon ame otedo kede ogati i tako nyonyo me yalo Obaŋa, kede mot me moko kwon ame orubo i moo, dok daŋ gin en ame gwoko gi-pimo jami ame oyalo kede Obaŋa i ot a Rwot." 
1Chronicles23:30 Gin rik ocuŋ i nyim Rwot nino ducu odiko kede otyeno kun opake dok daŋ opwoc," 
1Chronicles23:31 kede i kare ducu ame oyalo Rwot i mot awaŋa i cerj cabit, i kare me por a dwe, kede i nino adoŋo dono ame opo pirgi, gin ocuŋ i nyim Rwot kare ducu kittono. Cik rik onwoŋo tye ame nyuto kit wel jo Levi a myero ti i dul acel i kare me woro Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles23:32 Gin daŋ en a rik ogwoko kema me rwatte kede kabedo acil, dok okonyo daŋ omegogi, ame obedo awobe Aron i ticgi i ot a Rwot." 
1Chronicles24:1 Magi en dul ame ikwae Aron oya iye, Aron rik onwoŋo tye awobe aŋwen: Nadab, Abiku, Eliajar, kede Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 Ento Nadab kede Abiku rik te to oko con ame pappagi pwod kwo kun daŋ pwod ope kede itino, mannono te miyo omegogi Eliajar kede Itamar doko olamdog." 
1Chronicles24:3 Abaka Daudi rik te poko ikwae Aron dul i dul kun lubo kit tic ame gin otio. Jo ame okonye kede ticcono obedo Jadok ame en dano acel i akina ekwae Eleajar, kede Abimeleki ame obedo akwar Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ikwae Eleajar rik opoko i dul apar wie abicel, kun ikwae Itamar ote poko i dul aboro; otimo kit man pien odoŋe me atekere me doggola acel acel ame oya i kom ikwae Eleajar rik onwoŋo pol kato me ominnere Itamar oko," 
1Chronicles24:5 Kite acalo rik odoŋe me ot Obaŋa kede odoŋe me telo woro onwoŋo tye i kom ikwae Eleajar kede Itamar, omio opokogi kede bo lo kwir." 
1Chronicles24:6 Cemaya wot a Natanel en ame rik obedo araŋ a jo Levi me coyo nyiŋ, Ocoogi kun joni tye: abaka, rwode adoŋo, Jadok alamdog, kede Ebimereki wot Abiatar, kede odoŋe atekere ame oya i ot a kwarigi ame gin olamdog kede me doggola a jo Levi. Gin rik obedo kwanyo kwir kun oleo alea, ikwae Eleajar yero eka ikwae Itamar te daŋ yero megi." 
1Chronicles24:7 K wir me doggola pyera aryo wie aŋwen luŋ rik te poto kit man: kwir me agege opoto i kom Jekoarib, me aryo te poto i kom Jedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 me adek te poto i kom Karim, me aŋwen te poto i kom Ceorim;" 
1Chronicles24:9 me abic te poto i kom Malkija, me kanyape te poto i kom Mijamin;" 
1Chronicles24:10 me abiro te poto i kom Kakoj, me aboro te poto i kom Abija;" 
1Chronicles24:11 me aboŋwen te poto i kom Yecua, me apar te poto i kom Cekania;" 
1Chronicles24:12 me apar wie acel te poto i kom Eliacab, me apar wie aryo te poto i kom Jakim;" 
1Chronicles24:13 me apar wie adekkere te poto i kom Kuppa, me apar wie aŋwen te poto i kom Jecebeab;" 
1Chronicles24:14 me apar wie abic te poto i kom Bilga, me apar wie abicel te poto i kom Imer;" 
1Chronicles24:15 me apar wie abiro te poto i kom Kejir, me apar wie aboro te poto i kom Kapijej;" 
1Chronicles24:16 me apar wie aborjwen te poto i kom Petakia, me pyeraryo te poto i kom Jekejikel;" 
1Chronicles24:17 me pyeraryo wie acel te poto i kom Jakin, me pyeraryo wie aryo te poto i kom Gamul;" 
1Chronicles24:18 me pyeraryo wie adek te poto i kom Delaya, Eka me pyeraryo wie aŋwen te poto i kom Maajia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Joni rik occogi i tic i ot a Rwot kun lubo cik ame kwarogi Aron rik oketo pirgi, kite ame Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael rik ocike kede." 
1Chronicles24:20 Magi nyiŋ odoŋe atekere me doggola ocele mege ame oya i kom Levi: i kom ikwae Amuram rik oyero Cebuel; i kom i kwae a Cebuel rik oyero Jedeya. 
1Chronicles24:21 I kom ikwae a Rekabia kwir opoti i kom Icaya; 
1Chronicles24:22 i kom ikwae a Ijar kwir te poto i kom Celumot, i kom kwae a Celumot kwir te poto i kom Jakat;" 
1Chronicles24:23 i kom ikwae a Kebron ote yero Jeria, kede Amaria, kede Jekajiel kede Jekameam," 
1Chronicles24:24 i kom ikwae a Ujiel ote yero Mika, i kom ikwae a Mika ote yero Camir." 
1Chronicles24:25 Omin a Mika ame en Icaya, i kom ikwae Icaya ote yero Jekaria." 
1Chronicles24:26 I kom ikwae a Merari ote yero Makali kede Muci. I kom ikwae a Jajia ote yero Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 I kom ikwae a Merari obedo Jajia, Beno, Cokam, Jakur, kede Ibri," 
1Chronicles24:28 I kom ikwae a Mekali ote yero Eleajar ame rik obin onywalo wode moro. 
1Chronicles24:29 I kom ikwae a Kic ote yero Jeramel. 
1Chronicles24:30 I kom ikwae a Muci ote yero Makali, Eder kede Jerimot. Magi gin ikwae a jo Levi kun lubere i goggola a kwarrigi." 
1Chronicles24:31 Joni daŋ en ame rik obedo odoŋe atekere me doggola a kwarigi ame rik obolo kwir karacel kede omegogi atino, kite ame omegogi ame obedo ikwae Aron obolo kede kwir i nyim abaka Daudi, Jadok, Abimelek i, kede odoŋe atekere ame oya i ot a akwarrigi ame gin olamdog kede me doggola a jo Levi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi karacel kede odoŋe atekere a jo Levi te yero jo me doggola a jo magi me bedo otel woro: Acak, Keman kede Jedutun, Rik oyerogi me kobo kop Obaŋa kun otio opuk kede naŋa kede mola me agoa. Nyiŋ jo ame rik oyero i tic man kede ticgi ene:" 
1Chronicles25:2 i kom awo be Acap obedo Jakur, Yucepu, Nekania kede Acarela, Acap en ame rik obedo nat a telogi i wer kun ko bo kop Obaŋa ka ee abaka okobbe." 
1Chronicles25:3 I kom awobe a Jedutun obedo Gedalia, Jeri, Jecaya, Cimei, Kacabia, kede Matitia, gin luŋ awobe kanyape. Pappagi en ame rik obedo atelgi kun daŋ kobo kop Obaŋa dok tio kede nana opuk, dok daŋ wero wer me pako kede pwoyo Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles25:4 I kom awo be a Keman obedo Bukia, Matania, Ujiel, Cebuen, Jerimot, Kanania, Kanani, Eliata, Gidalti, Romam-tiejer, Jocebekaca, Maloti, Kotir kede Makajiot." 
1Chronicles25:5 Obaŋa rik omio Keman ame obedo adwarpiny abaka itino awobe apar wie aŋwen kede anyira adek, kite ame en rik ociko kede ni ebino miyo Keman teko." 
1Chronicles25:6 Joni luŋ rik obedo jo ame wero wer i kit tum apapat, kede naŋa kede opuk me konyo woro i ot Obaŋa, kun papagi en ame obedo atelgi. Acap kede Jedutun, kede Keman rik obedo jo ame tio tic kun olubo gin ame abaka ocikogi." 
1Chronicles25:7 Jo man kede omegogi ame obedo jo Levi ame rik onwoŋo opwonyogi i wer i ot a Rwot, gin luŋ rik odiro meicel. Welgi luŋ rik romo mia aryo i pyeraboro wie aboro." 
1Chronicles25:8 Tic a jo man rik opoko kede kwir, kun gin luŋ oterogi a rom aroma, kadi jo atino onyo jo adoŋo, jo ame doŋ opwonyere oko kede jo ame pwod apwonyere apwonya." 
1Chronicles25:9 Kwir me agege rik te poto i kom Yucepu me doggola Acap, me aryo te poto i kom Gedalia, kun daŋ omego mere kede awobe mere tye iye, gin ducu jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:10 me adekkere te poto i kom Jakur, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin ducu jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:11 me aŋwennere te poto i kom Ijri kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:12 me kanyere te poto i kom Netania, kun awobe mere kede omego mere luŋ tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:13 me abicellere te poto i kom Bukia, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:14 me abiro mere te poto i kom Jacarela, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo par wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:15 me aboro mere te poto i kom Jecaya, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:16 me aboŋwennere te poto i kom Matania, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:17 me tomon te poto i kom Cimei, kun awo be mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:18 me apar wie acellere te poto i kom Ajarel, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:19 me apar wie aryo mere te poto i kom Kacabia, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:20 me apar wie adekkere te poto i kom Cubael, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:21 me apar wie aŋwennere te poto i kom Matitia, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:22 me apar wie abiccere te poto i kom Jeremot, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:23 me apar wie abicellere te poto i kom Kanania, kun awo be mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:24 me apar wie abiro mere te poto i kom Jocebekaca, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:25 me apar wie aboro mere te poto i kom Kanani, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:26 me apar wie abonwennere te poto i kom Maloti, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:27 me pyeraryo mere te poto i kom Eliata, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:28 me pyeraryo wie ace Here te poto i kom Kotir, kun awo be mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:29 me pyeraryo wie aryo mere te poto i kom Giddalti, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:30 me pyeraryo wie adekkere te poto i kom Makajiot, kun awo be mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:31 me pyeraryo wie aŋwennere te poto i kom Romamtiejer, kun awobe mere kede omego mere tye iye, gin luŋ jo apar wie aryo." 
1Chronicles26:1 Man en kite ame rik opoko kede tic a jo ame gwoko doggola ot Obaŋa. I kom jo me doggola a Kora rik oyero iye Mecelemia wot a Kore, ame obedo dano ame oya i kom ikwae Acap." 
1Chronicles26:2 Mecelemia rik onwoŋo tye kede awobe abiro: Jekaria, Jediael, Jebadia, Jatniel," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elam, Jekokanan, kede Elieko-enai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Rik daŋ onwoŋo tye lo ame olwoŋo ni Obed-edom ame rik Obaŋa omio gum te nywalo awo be abiro: Cemaya, Jekojaba, Joa, Cakar, Netanel," 
1Chronicles26:5 Ammiel, Icakar, kede Peulletai." 
1Chronicles26:6 Wot Obed-edom me kao, Cemaya, rik onwoŋo tye kede awobe mere ame gin luŋ obedo jo a pirgi tek i doggolagi, pien gin luŋ rik onwoŋo obedo jo ame kwirri atek." 
1Chronicles26:7 Nyiŋgi ene: Otini, Repael, Obed, Eljabad, Eliku, kede Cemacia. Awobe aryo ame nyingi ogiko rik onwoŋo dok tye i mot amala me diro ame kato me omegogi luŋ." 
1Chronicles26:8 Jo ame oya i ot Obed-edom rik onwoŋo romo pyerabicel wie aryo, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame opwonyo aber meicel pi tic man." 
1Chronicles26:9 Aco jo me ot a Mecelemia rik onwoŋo romo apar wie aboro ame opwonyo pi tic man. 
1Chronicles26:10 I kom jo me doggola a Merari, rik oyero Koca ame onwoŋo tye awo be mere aŋwen: Cimri en ame rik papagi oketo me bedo atelgi, kadi bed en rik mom onwoŋo obedo atin kao," 
1Chronicles26:11 Kilika, Tebalia, kede Jekaria. Koca kede awobe mere kede omego mere ame rik oyero me kuro ot Obaŋa, rik oromo apar wie adek." 
1Chronicles26:12 Ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa rik onwoŋo opoko i dul i dul, kun dul acel acel tye kede atelgi, rik opokkigi tic i ot Obaŋa kite ame rik opoko kede baŋ omegogi ame obedo jo Levi ame tio i ot a Rwot." 
1Chronicles26:13 Gin luŋ rik obolo kwir me neyo doggola me ot Obaŋa ame dul acel acel myero kur, kwir rik obolo arorom kun mom opoko ni jo me goggola moro-ni dwon onyo tidi." 
1Chronicles26:14 Kwir me gwoko doggola ame tye tutuŋ kide te poto i kom Celemia. K wir a wode Jekaria, ame en rik ami tam ame kare luŋ mio tam aber, mere rik te poto pi gwoko doggola ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum," 
1Chronicles26:15 Eka kwir Obededom te poto me gwoko doggola ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi. Awobe mere rik ote pokkigi tic me gwoko ot kano jami. 
1Chronicles26:16 Kwir a Cupim kede Koca te poto me gwoko doggola ame tye tutuŋ to, kede doggola ame Celeket ame tye i yo ame dok malo, Tic me gwoko doggola rik onwoŋo opoko baŋ jo i dul i dul, kun wel jo ame gwoko nino acel acel tye kit man:" 
1Chronicles26:17 Jo abicel en ame kuro doggola ame tye tuŋ kide i nino acel acel, jo aŋwen en ame rik kuro doggola ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum nino acel acel jo aŋwen en ame rik kuro doggola ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, jo aryo aryo en ame rik kuro ot kano jami," 
1Chronicles26:18 I ot ame tere peru ame tye tuturj to onwoŋo tye jo aŋwen en ame kuro kun obedo i ŋet yo kede jo aryo ame obedo i ot ame tere peru," 
1Chronicles26:19 Man en kit ame rik opoko kede tic baŋ omego me doggola a Kora kede me doggola a Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 I akina jo Levi rik oketo Akija me bedo adwoŋ ame gwoko udi me kano lim ame tye i ot Obaŋa, kede udi me kano lim me me mot ame ojalo baŋ Rwot." 
1Chronicles26:21 Laban, ame rik obedo dano me doggola a Gercon, onwoŋo rik obedo kwaro a jo me doggola apol apapat, ame iyi akinagi tye iye jo me doggola a Jekiel." 
1Chronicles26:22 Awobe a Jekiel aryo, Jetam kede ominnere Joel, gin rik obedo odoŋe ame gwoko udi me kano lim ame onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot kede udi me kano jami," 
1Chronicles26:22 Awobe a Jekiel aryo, Jetam kede ominnere Joel, gin rik obedo odoŋe ame gwoko udi me kano lim ame onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot kede udi me kano jami," 
1Chronicles26:23 Rik daŋ opoko tic baŋ jo Amuram, jo Ijar, jo a Kebron, kede jo Ujiel." 
1Chronicles26:24 Cebuel ame obedo akwar Gercom wot a Muca en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame lo tic me gwoko udi me kano lim. 
1Chronicles26:25 Omego mere rik ene: i akina ikwae Eliejer rik tye wode Rekabia ame obedo papa a Jecaya, ame wode Joram, ame obedo pappa Jikri ame wode Celomot." 
1Chronicles26:26 Celomot karacel kede jo me ode luŋ rik gin obedo jo ame gwoko udi kano mot luŋ ame abaka Daudi ojalo baŋ Obaŋa, kede mot ame odoŋe atekere ame loo doggola acel acel ojalo kede en ame otel mony ame loo jo tutumia ojalo kede en ame otel mony ame loo jo mia ojalo karacel kede en ame otel mony adoŋo ojalo." 
1Chronicles26:27 G in rik ojalo mot ame oya i kom gin ame oyako i lweny me yiko ot a Rwot. 
1Chronicles26:28 Celumot karacel kede jo me ode luŋ rik gin obedo jo ame gwoko udi me kano mot luŋ ame ojalo me tic i ot Rwot, medo kede mot ame adwarpiny Camwiri okelo, kede en ame abaka Caulo wot a Kic okelo, kede en ame Abuneri wot a Ner okelo, kede en ame Yoab wot a Jeruya okelo." 
1Chronicles26:29 I kom ikwae Ijar, rik oyero Kanania kede awobe mere me tiyo tic ocele iyi akina jo Icrael, kun gin obedo acalo rwode kede oŋolkop." 
1Chronicles26:30 I kom ikwae a Kebron rik ote yero Kacabia karacel kede wati mere tutumia acel kede mia abiro ame gin luŋ odiro meicel i neno tic a jo Icrael ame tye tutuŋ to me kulo Jordan, kun oneno tic a Rwot kede tic abaka daŋ," 
1Chronicles26:31 Jerija en ame rik obedo adwoŋgi akina ikwae a jo Kebron luŋ. I mwaka me pyeraŋwen nono me loc a Daudi, rik ote bedo yenyo kite ame ikwae a Kebron tye kede, rik ote nwoŋo jo amw odiro meicel i lweny i doggola man ame onwoŋo bedo i Jajer i lobo me Gilead." 
1Chronicles26:32 Daudi te yero Jerija kede jo ame odiro meicel i komgi ame romo tutumia aryo kede mia abiro ame gin luŋ obedo odoŋe atekere ame loo doggola a kwarigi me bedo jo ame ne no tic i lobo a jo Reuben, kede Gad kede me nucu atekere a jo Manace, kun oneno tic Obaŋa kede me abaka." 
1Chronicles27:1 Man en nyiŋ odoŋe atekere me Icrael me doggola a kwarigi, kede odoŋe ame onwoŋo obedo otel me mony, ame loo jo tutumia kede en ame loo jo mia, kede odoŋe ame rik tio baŋ abaka kun oloo kop ducu ame mako jo ame bino baŋ abaka kede en ame ya i bane. I dwe acel acel ame tye i mwaka acel dul apapat ame tye iye jo tutumia pyeroaryo wie aŋwen en ame rik bedo i tic man, kun otye kede atelgi me dwe nono." 
1Chronicles27:2 Magi en nyiŋ jo ame rik obedo otel me dwe acel acel: Jocobeam wot a Jabdiel en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul me agege ame onwoŋo daŋ tio i dwe me agege; 
1Chronicles27:3 en rik obedo akwar Perej, kun telo mony ame tio i dwe me agege." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai ame obedo akwar Akoki en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me aryo, ame tio i dwe me aryo." 
1Chronicles27:5 Benaya wot a Yekoyadi alamdog, en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me adek, ame tio i dwe me adek." 
1Chronicles27:6 En ame rik daŋ obedo atel a jo pyeradek ame gin luŋ obedo twoni jo atek meicel, en onwoŋo dano acel i ak inagi. Wode Amijabed en ame rik leo kakare acalo adwoŋ ame loo dullere-nono." 
1Chronicles27:7 Acael ame obedo omin a Yoab, en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me aŋwen, ame tio i dwe me aŋwen. Wode Jebadia en ame rik leo kakare acalo adwoŋ ame loo dullere-nono." 
1Chronicles27:8 Camut ame obedo akwar Ijar en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me abic, ame tio i dwe me abic," 
1Chronicles27:9 Ira wot Ikec ame obedo dano me Tekoa en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me kanyape, ame tio i dwe me kanyape," 
1Chronicles27:10 Kelej ame obedo dano me Epraim, ame oya i Pelet en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me abiro, ame tio i dwe me abiro," 
1Chronicles27:11 Cibekai ame obedo dano me doggola a Jera, me atekere a Juda ame oya i boma me Kuca, en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame rik telo dul mony me aboro, ame tio i dwe me aboro," 
1Chronicles27:12 Abiejer ame obedo dano me atekere a Benjamin ame onwoŋo oya i Anatot en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me aboŋwen, ame tio i dwe me aboŋwen." 
1Chronicles27:13 Makarai ame onwoŋo oya i Netopa, dano me doggola a Jera, en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me tomon, ame tio i dwe me tomon," 
1Chronicles27:14 Benaya ame obedo dano me atekere Epraim ame onwoŋo oya i Piraton, en onwoŋo obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me apar wie acel, ame tio i dwe me apar wie acel." 
1Chronicles27:15 Keldai ame obedo dano me doggola Otniel ame onwoŋo oya i Netopa en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo dul mony me apar wie aryo, ame tio i dwe me apar wie aryo." 
1Chronicles27:16 Man en nyiŋ jo ame rik loo atekere apapat me Icrael: Eliejer wot a Jikri en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Reuben; Cepatia wot a Maaka en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Cimeon; 
1Chronicles27:17 Kacabia wot a Kamuel en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere jo Levi; Jadok en ame rik loo jo Aron; 
1Chronicles27:18 Eliku ame rik nat acel i akina omego a Daudi en ame rik loo atekere ajo Juda; Omri wot a Mikael en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Icakar; 
1Chronicles27:19 Jeimaya wot Obadia en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere ajo Jabulon; Jeremot wot Ajriel en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Naputali; 
1Chronicles27:20 Kocea wot Ajajia en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Epraim; Joel wot a Pedaya en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo nucu atekere a jo Manace; 
1Chronicles27:20 Kocea wot Ajajia en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Epraim; Joel wot a Pedaya en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo nucu atekere a jo Manace; 
1Chronicles27:21 Eddo wot a Jekaria en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo nucu atakere a jo Manace ocele ame onwoŋo tye i Gilead; Jaciel wot Abuneri en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Benjamin; 
1Chronicles27:22 Ajarel wot a Jerukam en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo atekere a jo Dan: Magi en aye odoŋe ame onwoŋo loo atekere luŋ me Icrael. 
1Chronicles27:23 Daudi rik onwoŋo mom okwano wel jo ame mwaka me ditogi mom ru oromo pyeraryo, pien Rwot rik onwoŋo ociko ni ebino miyo jo Icrael bedo apol meicel acalo acer ame tye i polo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoab wot a Jeruya en ame rik ogeo kwano jo Icrael, cite rik mom te tyeko ducu, Obaŋa rik oketo can i kom jo Icrael pi wel jo ame okwano naca, naka omio welgi mom obin ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom abaka Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Magi en nyiŋ jo ame rik onwoŋo loo jami abaka: Ajimavet wot Adiel en ame rik loo udi me kano lim abaka; Yonacan wot a Ujjia en ame rik loo udi me kano lim ame tye i akina pacci adoŋo kede en atino kede en ame tye i udi adono ame ocuŋ igun malo; 
1Chronicles27:26 Ejri wot a Kelub en ame rik loo jo ame tio tic me pur i poto; 
1Chronicles27:27 Cimei ame rik obedo dano me Rama en ame rik obedo nat ame loo potti olok; Jabdi ame rik obedo dano me Cipim en ame rik loo kono olok ame okano i udi me kano korjo olok. 
1Chronicles27:28 Baal-kanan ame obedo dano me Geder en ame rik obedo nat ame loo yen Jeituni kede olam ame rik tye i bar me Cepela; eka Yowaci en ame te loyo ot ame okano iye moo jeituni," 
1Chronicles27:29 Citrayi ame obedo dano me Caron en ame rik obedo ŋat ame loo dok ame rik okwao i Caron; Capat wot Adlai en ame rik loo dok luŋ ame okwao i luŋ apapat. 
1Chronicles27:30 Obil ame obedo dano me Icmail en ame rik obedo nat ame loo inaga luŋ; Jedeya ame obedo dano me Meronot en a rik obedo nat ame loo kana luŋ. Jajij me Kagri en ame rik obedo nat ame loo rommi kede dyegi luŋ," 
1Chronicles27:31 Magi en nyiŋ jo luŋ ame rik gwoko jami abaka Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonacan ame obedo okeo a Daudi en ame rik obedo ami-tam pien en rik obedo loo ame niannere tut meicel, dok en ame rik obedo araŋ. En kede Jekiel wot a Kakmoni en ame rik loo kop i kom pwonyere awo be abaka." 
1Chronicles27:33 Akitopel rik obedo ami-tam baŋ abaka, eka Kucai me Arki te bedo awot abaka." 
1Chronicles27:34 I kare ame Akitopel oto, Yekoyada wot a Benaya kede Abiatar en ame te leyo kakare, Y oab en ame rik obedo adwoŋ ame loo mony abaka Daudi." 
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi rik ociko odoŋe me Icrael luŋ me cokere karacel i Jerucalem. Mannono te miyo odoŋe ate ke re ducu, odoŋe ame loo tic apapat ame rik otio i te loc abaka, odoŋe ame loo mony, ame loo jo tutumia karacel kede en ame loo jo mia, odoŋe luŋ ame gwoko jami kede lim abaka luŋ kede awobe mere, karacel kede odoŋe ame loo paco abaka, kede twoni jo atek i lweny, karacel kede jo luŋ ame odiro meicel i lweny." 
1Chronicles28:2 Daudi te ya malo, cun i nyimgi, te kobbigi ni, “Wun jo luŋ me lobowa, omegona karacel kede jona, winy wunu koppa, Rik an abedo i tam icunya me gero ot kan ame canduk me cikere a Rwot twero bedo iye, kede kan ame obino keto iye kom me teno tyen Obaŋawa, Atyeko doŋ yiko kite a myero ger kede ot me woro Obaŋa," 
1Chronicles28:3 ento Obaŋa ogeŋa oko kun kobo ni, ‘Yin mom ibino gero ottoro me wora pien yin ibedo alweny ame ityeko onyo re mo a jo adwoŋ meicel." 
1Chronicles28:4 Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael yam oyera karacel kede jo me doggola a kwarona me bedo loyo jo Icrael nakanaka. En yam oyero atekere me Juda me bedo atekere ame loc me Icrael ya iye, eka i kom atekere me Juda, en oyero ot a pappa, iyi akina awobe a pappa en te kwanya me bedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael ducu," 
1Chronicles28:5 En yam omia itino awobe apol meicel, ento i kom awobe nanono en otyeko yero Culeman me bedo i kom me loc a Rwot kun loo jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles28:6 “Rwot okobba ni, ‘Wodi Culeman en ame bino gero ot me wora. An atyeko yere me bedo woda, an abino bedo pappere." 
1Chronicles28:7 Abino miyo loccere moko atwal ka ee en oketo cunye atek me lubo cikka luŋ kede gin ame aciko ducu, kite ame am an en tye ka timo kede i kare-ni.’ ”" 
1Chronicles28:8 Doŋ aman ba, an acikowu i nyim jo Icrael ducu kede i nyim Obaŋawa, wun myero igwok wunu dok daŋ ibed yenyo wunu ignnoro luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawu ocikowa iye, me wek imedde wunu bedo wegi lobo man aber-ri, dok daŋ ibed kobo wunu akoba i cirj ikwaewu ame bi no bulowu acalo gin ame gin oleo i banwu, me wek bed timere amano nakanaka." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Aco yin woda Culeman, aciki ni myero ibed ame ineo Obaŋa a pappi, kun itio bane kede cunyi ducu kede cuny ayom. Pien Rwot nio cuny jo ducu, en rjio ginnoro luŋ ame dano tye ayiko i cunye kede ginnoro luŋ ame en mito. Ka ee yin ibino bane, en gire bino gami; ento ka ee iya oko i bane en bino weki ata nakanaka." 
1Chronicles28:10 Myero ine aber ni Rwot doŋ otyeko yeri me gero ot me wore. Doŋ pi mano myero ibed atek acalo ico ikokome me icak ticcono oko.” 
1Chronicles28:11 Daudi te miyo Culeman cal ame ogoo ame nyuto kite a myero ger kede ot Obaŋa luŋ, ame tye iye cal ot atidi ame tye i doggola me donyo i ot Obaŋa, kede cal udi iye luŋ, kede cal udi kano lim kede cal ici ka amala luŋ, kede cal me udi atitino ducu ame tye iye, karacel kede cal me icika ame kom me kica myero bed iye." 
1Chronicles28:12 Dok te miye cal ame nyuto dyekal luŋ ame tye i ŋet ot a Rwot kite ame rik en otamo kede, icika me udi atino ame omano ot ducu kede udi me kano lim luŋ ame tye i ot Obaŋa karacel kede udi me kano lim me mot ame otyeko jalo baŋ Rwot." 
1Chronicles28:13 Daudi dok te nyutte daŋ kite a myero tic olamdog kede jo Levi bed kede, onyutte kit tic apapat a myero gin ti i ot a Rwot; kede jami luŋ ame gin bino tic kede i ot a Rwot ame myero gin gwoki." 
1Chronicles28:14 Onyutte daŋ k it ame myero pim i jabu kede ryal me tiyo jami me tic luŋ," 
1Chronicles28:15 pek me jabu a myero pim me tiyo gi-cibo tara me jabu acel acel, kede pek me jabu myero pim me tiyo tara me jabu acel acel, kede ryal a myero pim me tiyo gi-cibo tara acel acel kede tara mere kun lubo kite ame otio kede gi-cibo tara acel acel i ot woro Rwot," 
1Chronicles28:16 kede jabu a myero pim me tiyo meja me jabu ame oketo iye ogati i nyim Rwot, kede ryal a myero pim me tiyo meja me ryal acel acel." 
1Chronicles28:17 Dok onyuto daŋ kite a myero pim kede jabu ame olio aber me tiyo acob riŋo, becen acel acel, ikopo acel acel kede bakuli acel acel, kede kite a myero pim kede ryal pi bakuli acel acel," 
1Chronicles28:18 kede kite a myero pim kede jabu ame olio aber me tiyo keno me waŋo odok akur, kede me tiyo gadi gadi okerubi ame bino yaro bwomgi wumo kede canduk me cikere a Rwot." 
1Chronicles28:19 Man luŋ en onyuto kannaler kite ame onwoŋo ocoye kede i buk ame Rwot ocoo i ciŋe, ame nyuto kite ame tic myero tiye kede luŋ." 
1Chronicles28:20 Daudi te kobbi wode Culeman ni, “Bed ico ame cunyi nwan me icak tic oko, Kur ilwor, cunyi kur poti; pien Rwot Obaŋa ame obedo Obaŋana, tye kedi. En mom bino weki ata, en bino bedo kedi tuno ka tic ame myero iti i ot a Rwot otum." 
1Chronicles28:21 Nen ba, olamdog ame atyeko poko dul i dul karacel kede Olevi pi tic a myero gin ti i ot Obaŋa; jo ame odiro i tic apapat ame tye kede miti i cunygi bino nywako ticcono karacel kedi. Lwak luŋ karacel kede odoŋe ame telogi, gin luŋ obino winyo koppi.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Abaka te kobbi lwak luŋ ame ocokere ni, “Woda Culeman en obedo nat ame Obaŋa doŋ otyeko yero, cite en pwod tidi dok mom tye kede ŋec oromo. Ento tic me atia dwon meicel pien paco adwoŋ-ŋi mom bino bedo me a dano ento me a Rwot Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles29:2 Pi mannono, omio an atemo i tekona ducu me yiko jami luŋ pi ot a Rwot Obaŋana. Atyeko yiko jabu me tiyo jami me jabu, ryal me tiyo jami me ryal, mola me tiyo jami me mola, nyonyo me tiyo jami me nyonyo, bao me tiyo jami me bao, kun amedo iye daŋ lwak kiddi me wei apimpim, kede kiddi ocele atitino mege me amwona i kom jabu, kede kiddi gedo mogo apapat me wei, ame mogo i akinagi tar mogo mimila meicel." 
1Chronicles29:3 Medo i kom jami a doŋ otyeko coko-nono pi ot man acil, pi mit adwoŋ meicel ame at ye kede i kom ot Obaŋana, omio amio daŋ jabuna kede ryalla ikoma, a yam akano me gero ot Obaŋa,"
