1Chronicles29:4 Amio jabu ame olio acil ame pekkere romo talanta tutumia adek kede ryal ame pekkere talanta tutumia abiro me puyo kor apama me icika ot a Rwot," 
1Chronicles29:5 kede pi jami luŋ ame odiro bino tiyo, jabu me tiyo jami me jabu, kede ryal me tiyo jami me ryal. Aman doŋ, ŋa i akinawu ame oye miyo mot kun mio i yomcuny ame tin en okwerre kene i nyim Rwot kan?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Eka odoŋe atekere ame loo doggola a kwarrigi kede odene atekere ame loo atekeregi kede odoŋe ame telo wi mony me jo tutumia kede en ame telo jo mia karacel kede odoŋe luŋ ame loo tic abaka te ye miyo mot me gero ot Obaŋa," 
1Chronicles29:7 Gin omio jami magi me gero ot Obaŋa, jabu ame romo talanta tutumia abic kede lim ocele me jabu ame romo talanta tutumia apar, kede ryal ame romo talanta tutumia apar kede mola ame romo talanta tutumia apar wie aboro, kede nyonyo ame romo talanta tutumia mia acel." 
1Chronicles29:8 Jo ame onwoŋo tye i kiddi atitino me wei omiogi i ot kano lim ame tye i ot a Rwot, ame Jekiel, Alevi ame obedo dano me doggola a Gercom onwoŋo gwoko." 
1Chronicles29:9 Lwak rik te bedo miyo motgi kite ame yigi mito kun omio daŋ i yomcuny gin ame gin oyero, pien gin omio motgi baŋ Rwot kede cunygi luŋ. Abaka Daudi daŋ cunye te bedo ayom meicel." 
1Chronicles29:10 Daudi rik te pwoyo Rwot i nyim lwak luŋ ame ocokere kuno, kun kobo ni, “Pwoc myero bed bani, yin Rwot Obaŋa a kwarowa Icrael wan i waŋ," 
1Chronicles29:11 Dito kede teko, kwogo kede loc, kede woro obed gire megi, Ama Rwot pien jami luŋ ame tye i polo kede, i lobo, gin luŋ obedo megi, yin gire Ama Rwot, Ama Rwot, yin ame ibedo abaka ame loo jami luŋ aluŋa." 
1Chronicles29:12 Lonyo kede kwogo ya j bani, dok yin en ame iloogi ducu, Twer kede teko, gin luŋ tye i cini, dok yin ame imio dito kede teko baŋ jo luŋ," 
1Chronicles29:13 Aman doŋ wan opwoi, yin Obaŋawa, kun opako nyini me kwogo atek meicel." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Man omio an kede jona mom gire otwero miyi ginnoro, pien jami luŋ obedo mot ame oya i bani, doŋ gin ame wan omio bani obedo gire gin ame onwoŋo oya i cirji," 
1Chronicles29:15 Yin ineo, Ama Rwot ni wan ocalo welo ame bedo wot awota i kare me kwowa i lo bo kite ame rik kwariwa obedo timo. Nino ame wan obedo kede i lo bo calo tipo, mom otye i kabedowa i lobo kan," 
1Chronicles29:16 Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, lwak jami man adwoŋ wok-ki ame wan otyeko miyo me gero ot acil me wori, gin luŋ gire oya i cirji, gin luŋ obedo megi." 
1Chronicles29:17 An aneo ni yin Obaŋana itemo cuny dano acel acel dok ipwoo nat ame cunye ler. An atyeko miyo jami man luŋ bani i cuny aler ateteni, dok daŋ atyeko neno i wana ni jo meri ame ocokere kan-ni omio daŋ motgi i cuny ayom meicel, kun nat acel acel kwanyo gin ame yie omito." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ama Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwa Iburaim kede Icaka kede Yakobo, mi kodi cuny kede tam acalo mannono omedde bedo atek i cuny joni nakanaka, kun imiogi daŋ obedo jo ame ogeni." 
1Chronicles29:19 Dok mi woda Culeman obed i cuny me mako cikki i cunye ducu, kede gin ame iciko, kede icwil, kun tio jami ducu, dok daŋ me en ger ot me wori ame an doŋ atyeko yiko jami pire-ni.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Daudi te kobo baŋ lwak luŋ ame ocokere ni, “Pwo wunu Rwot Obaŋawu.” Lwak ame ocokere luŋ te cako pwoyo Rwot Obaŋa a kwarogi, gin te ryebere pmy, ote woro Rwot kede abaka daŋ." 
1Chronicles29:21 Orwo mere, gin te cako ŋolo motgi me yalo Rwot, ote daŋ yale kede mot awaŋa. Gin oyale i mot me twoni tutumia acel, nyogi rommi tutumia acel, itino rommi tutumia acel kun daŋ omio mot amata ame oyik o pi mot awaŋa acel acel, kede mot ocele apipim ame omio pi jo Icrael luŋ." 
1Chronicles29:22 I nino-nono gin rik te bedo i twon yomcuny adwoŋ meicel i kare ame gin onwoŋo otye ocam dok daŋ omatte i nyim Rwot. Gin te keto Culeman wot Daudi tyen me aryo me bedo abakagi, kun owire kede moo me bedo aloc pi Rwot, ote daŋ wiro Jadok kede moo me bedo alamdog Obaŋa." 
1Chronicles29:23 Culeman doŋ te leyo tic a pappere Daudi, kun bedo i wi kom loc a Rwot. En rik te bedo aloc ame kome i gum atek, kun jo Icrael luŋ winyo koppere." 
1Chronicles29:24 Odoŋe luŋ, twoni jo atek i lweny, karacel kede awobe abaka Daudi luŋ te cikere me woro abaka Culeman." 
1Chronicles29:25 Rwot te miyo nyiŋ Culeman bedo malo meicel baŋ jo Icrael luŋ, dok te miyo Culeman bedo i twon kwogo adwoŋ meicel i loccere ame kato obakki luŋ ame yam onwoŋo oloo jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles29:26 Daudi wot a Yece rik oloo jo Icrael kittono. 
1Chronicles29:27 En rik oloo jo Icrael pi mwakki pyerarjwen twal. En obedo aloc i Kebron pi mwakki abiro, eka te loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeradek wie adek." 
1Chronicles29:28 Daudi oto ame onwoŋo doŋ oteggo atek meicel, kun twon alonyo moro a mom kobere, dokjo woro meicel, eka wode Culeman te leyo kakare acalo abaka." 
1Chronicles29:29 Kop i kom kwo a Daudi cakere i tere naka iyi agikki mere tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro araŋ-piny Camwiri, kede me adwarpiny Natan, kede i me araŋ-piny Gad." 
1Chronicles29:30 Gin luŋ onyuto kite ame en oloo kede loccere, kede kite ame rik en tek kede, ginnoro luŋ ame otimere i kome, i kom jo Icrael, kede i kom loc me lobo ocele luŋ." 
2Chronicles1:1 Culeman wot a Daudi te moko loccere bedo atek meicel, kun Rwot Obaŋa mere mie winyo ame te miyo en bedo twon lo moro adwoŋ meicel." 
2Chronicles1:2 Culeman rik te kop i jo Icrael luŋ, kun kobo odoŋe ame onwoŋo telo wi mony, odoŋe ame loo jo tutumia kede en ame loo jo mia, oŋolkop kede odoŋe ocele luŋ me Icrael, karacel kede odoŋe me Icrael ame loo doggola a kwarigi," 
2Chronicles1:3 Culeman rik te ciko ni lwak luŋ myero wot kede i ka woro Obaŋa ame tye i wi kidi i Gibeon; pien kema me rwatte Obaŋa, ame Muca amiro Obaŋa rik otio i tim onwoŋo rik pwod tye kuno." 
2Chronicles1:4 Ento Daudi rik onwoŋo okwanyo canduk Obaŋa i Kiriat-jearim, okelo i kabedo ame rik en oyiko pire, pien en rik onwoŋo oguro kema pire i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles1:5 Medo i mannono daŋ keno lam me mola ame rik Bejajel wot a Uri, ame obedo wot a Kur, rik otio, onwoŋo daŋ pwod tye i Gibeon kuno i nyim kema a Rwot. Culeman karacel kede lwak luŋ rik te wot woro Obaŋa kuno," 
2Chronicles1:6 Culeman rik te wot cuŋ i nyim Rwot kuno i nyim keno lam me mola, ame rik onwoŋo tye i nyim kema me rwatte; en te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa ame romo tutumia acel i wi keno lam kuno," 
2Chronicles1:7 Kare ame en tye i Gibeon kuno, Obaŋa te nen baŋe i dyeworrono te kobbe ni, “Peny gin ame imito ni myero ami baŋi,”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Culeman te gamo ni, “Yin doŋ ityeko nyuto twon marri adwoŋ a mom lokere baŋ amironi pappa Daudi, ityeko daŋ doŋ keta me bedo abaka kakare." 
2Chronicles1:9 Ama Obaŋa, mi kop ame rik iciko baŋ pappa Daudi ocobere doŋ oko aman, pien yin doŋ ityeko keta me bedo abaka ame loo rok adwoŋ meicel, ame pol calo apua me lobo." 
2Chronicles1:10 Tim ber tin doŋ imia ryeko kede ŋec, me aŋe loyo rok man, pien ŋa kara ame romo loyo rokki adwoŋ wok-ki?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Obaŋa te gamo ni, “Pien iyero man mom ikwao lim, lonyo kwogo akadi kwayo ni myero mi inek jo ame dagi oko, dok daŋ mom ikwao ni myero ami iperakino kare alac, cite ite lunyo kwayo ka ryeko kede ŋec, me wek ilo jona ame an doŋ atyeko keti me bedo abakagi," 
2Chronicles1:12 ryeko kede ŋec doŋ atyeko miyo oko baŋi. Abino daŋ miyo twon lonyo adwoŋ kede lim adwoŋ a mom twerre, kun daŋ jo wori atek, ame mom tye ŋattoro i akina oloc ame otelo nyimi ame yam koŋ obedo calo yin, dok daŋ mom tye moro i akina oloc ame bino lubi ame bino nwoŋo gin a yin inwoŋo.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Culeman doŋ te ya oko i nyim kema me rwatte, i wi kidi i Gibeon te wot i Jerucalem. En doŋ te bedo loyo jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles1:14 Culeman rik ocoko gadigadi lweny karacel kede olweny ame riŋo aguragura. En rik onwoŋo tye i gadigadi lweny tutumia apar wie aŋwen karacel kede wegi aguragura tutumia apar wie aryo, Mogo i akinagi rik bedo i boma apapat ame ogwoko iye gadigadi, en ocele bedo baŋ abaka i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles1:15 Abaka rik te miyo ryal kede jabu doko gin a pire mom dit i Jerucalem calo gweŋ, kun bao me cedar dwoŋ atata i Jerucalem calo olam ame tye i bar me Cepela," 
2Chronicles1:16 Culeman rik onwoŋo aguragura mere i ya i lobo me Miciri kede i Kuc; ocatwil abaka rik wilogi i Kuc i wel ame onwoŋo doŋ omoko oko. 
2Chronicles1:17 Gadi gadi ame ya i Miciri rik acel acel romo cekel me ryal abicel, eka aguragura acel acel te bedo me ryal mia acel kede pyerabic. Ocatwil abaka te dok catogi oko baŋ obakki a jo Kitti kede me Curial." 
2Chronicles2:1 Culeman rik te cako tamo pi gero ot me woro Rwot, kede ot abaka." 
2Chronicles2:2 Culeman rik te yero jo ame romo tutumia pyeraboro ame ticgi obedo me payo kiddi i lobo obedo kidikidi, kede jo tutumia adek kede mia abicel ame loo ticgi." 
2Chronicles2:3 Culeman rik te cwayo kop baŋ Kuram, abaka me Turo, kun kobo ni, “Kite ame rik ibedo kede pappa Daudi kun icwaye bao cedar me gero ode, tim ber ibed keda daŋ kittono." 
2Chronicles2:4 Nen ba, an doŋ ayikere me gero ot me woro Rwot Obaŋana ame abinojalo baŋe me yale odok ame orubo i gin a ŋwece kur kede ogati ame obino keto bedo i nyime kare luŋ, kede dok me yale i mot awaŋa odiko kede otyeno, i nino me cabit luŋ, i por dwe kede i nino adoŋo luŋ ame Rwot Obaŋawa oketo, ame rik en ociko pi jo Icrael me agwoka nakanaka." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ot ame abino gero-nono bino bedo twon ot adwoŋ meicel, pien Obaŋawa dwoŋ kato Obaŋa ocele luŋ." 
2Chronicles2:6 Ento ŋa kara ame twero gero ot pi Obaŋa, kun kadi polo ame tye malo meicel, mom twero romme me bedo? Kara doŋ an abedo ŋa ame atwero gero ot pire-ni? Atwero gero ka kan ame myero waŋ iye odok akur i nyime keken." 
2Chronicles2:7 Pi mannono ba, amito icwaya lo ame adiro i tic me jabu, ryal, mola, nyonyo, kede i boŋo ame obedo amaramar kede en arema, kede en abululu bululu, kun daŋ opwonyo i goro kom jami, me en bin ti karacel kede otic ame odiro ame tye baŋa i Juda kede i Jerucalem, ame rik pappa Daudi omiogi baŋa." 
2Chronicles2:8 Cwaya daŋ yen me Lebanon, bao cedar kede cipre, kede bao algum, pien aŋeo ni omironi ŋeo toŋo yen ame tye i Lebanon. Dok daŋ omirona bino bedo karacel kede megi," 
2Chronicles2:9 me wek otoŋŋa bao adwoŋ meicel, pien ot ame agero-ni bino bedo adwoŋ dok me aura meicel." 
2Chronicles2:10 An abino miyo ŋano ame romo puku tutumia pyerabicel kede cayiri ame romo puku tutumia pyerabicel kede koŋo olok debe tutumia pyeraŋwen kede moo jeituni debe tutumia pyeraŋwen me kony joni ame bino toŋo yen.” 
2Chronicles2:11 Kuram abaka me Turo te dok iye i waraga ame ocoo baŋ Culeman kun kobo ni, “Pien Rwot maro jo mere omio oketi me bedo abaka me loyogi.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Kuram dok te kobo ni, “Myero gire pwo Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, ame rik otio polo kede lobo, ame omio Daudi wode aryek, ame tye kede niaŋ atut kede diro adwoŋ meicel, ame doŋ otyeko yikere me gero ot pi Rwot, karacel kede ode en ikome." 
2Chronicles2:13 “An doŋ acwayi lo ame adiro ame tye kede ŋec atut meicel, nyiŋe Kuramabi," 
2Chronicles2:14 wot a dako oya i atekere me Dan, pappere dano me Turo. En ŋeo tic i jabu, ryal, mola, nyonyo kede kiddi, bao, boŋo amaramar kede en obedo bululu bululu kede en arema, karacel kede boŋo camanini aber. En ŋeo daŋ tic ducu me goro coc i kom jami, twero lubo kit calloro keken me tic ame omie. En myero ti karacel kede joni ame odiro ame obedo tic baŋ adwoŋŋa ame en pappi Daudi." 
2Chronicles2:15 Pi mannono ba, yin doŋ myero icwayiwa ŋano kede cayiri, moo kede koŋo olok ame ityeko doŋ cikere me miyo." 
2Chronicles2:16 Wan obino toŋo kit yen ducu ame yin imito arpe tye i Lebanon. Obino tweyogi luŋ karacel ote bologi i pii me kwakwaŋa i wi pii calo boda naka i Yopa, eka yin doŋ ite omogi tero i Jerucalem.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Culeman te cako kwano wel jo luŋ ame obedo rok ocele ame bedo i lobo me Icrael, ame rom aroma kede en ame pappere Daudi rik koŋ otimo. Rik ote nwoŋo ni welgi romo jo tutumia mia acel kede pyerabic wie adek, kede mia abicel." 
2Chronicles2:18 En oyero jo tutumia pyerabiro i akinagi me bedo jo ame ticgi obedo me yeyo kit yec ducu, kede jo tutumia pyeraboro me muko kiddi i lobo ame obedo kidikidi, kede jo tutumia adek kede mia abicel me bedo odoŋe ame loo tic, me cukoro cuny jo me tiyo ticgi." 
2Chronicles3:1 Culeman rik te cako gero ot a Rwot i Jerucalem i wi kidi me Moria, kan ame rik Rwot onyutte iye baŋ pappere Daudi, kan ame rik Daudi en oyero, i laro dino kal a Oman dano me Jebuc." 
2Chronicles3:2 En ocako gero i dwe me aryo, i mwaka me aŋwen me loccere." 
2Chronicles3:3 Man en kite ame rik en opimo kede ot Obaŋa: bor me yie onwoŋo romo futi pyeraboŋwen kun lac me yie tye pyeradek. 
2Chronicles3:4 Icika ame tye tuŋ tuŋ doggola me donyo, i nyim icika ame tye i dye ot, borrere onwoŋo romo futi pyeradek ame rom aroma i lac me icika acil; borrere me malo te bedo futi mia acel i pyeraboro. Yie ote mwono oko i jabu ame olio aber." 
2Chronicles3:5 I kor apama icika adwoŋŋere en ocacano iye bao cipre, eka te mwono kom bao-nono oko i jabu aber, kun ogogoro iye cal yen otit kede nyor." 
2Chronicles3:6 Yi ot onwoŋo odeo amwonya meicel kede gweŋe alilia me wel ame omwomwono i kom jabu, Jabu mere onwoŋo obedo jabu ame okelo i Parvaim." 
2Chronicles3:7 En omwono yi ot Obaŋa luŋ i jabu, karacel kede arii mege, arii me doggola mere luŋ, kor apama, kede doggola mere luŋ; dok te goro daŋ cal okerubi i kor apama." 
2Chronicles3:8 Culeman te daŋ dok tiyo kabedo acil meicel; borrere romo futi pyeradek ame rom aroma i lac me ot, kede laccere futi pyeradek. Omwono daŋ kome oko kede jabu aber ame pekkere romo talanta mia abicel." 
2Chronicles3:9 Pek me jabu me cumal ame otio kede me mwono jabu i ottono, oromo cekel pyerabic; en te mwono daŋ icika i malo luŋ i jabu." 
2Chronicles3:10 I kabedo acil meicel, en omio oketo iye okerubi aryo ame opao i yat, ote daŋ mwono komgi oko i jabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Bwom okerubi luŋ ame oyare ayara onwoŋo romo futi pyeradek, acel acel borrere onwoŋo romo futi abiro kede nucu. Wi bwom okerubi acel onwoŋo gudo kor ot, kun bwom acel tuŋ ocele onwoŋo ogudo kor ot tuŋ ocele, wi bwom okerubi i dyere mege onwoŋo ogudo wi bwom okerubi wadgi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Bwom okerubi ocele tuŋ cel ame borrere tye futi abiro kede nucu wie tye ogudo kor ot, kun bwome ocele ame daŋ tye futi abiro i nucuni ogudo me awottere me agege-ca." 
2Chronicles3:13 Bwom okerubi magi ame oyarre ayara onwoŋo borgi romo futi pyeradek. Gin luŋ onwoŋo otye ocuŋ acuŋa i tyengi kun nyimgi oneno icika ot adwoŋŋere. 
2Chronicles3:14 Boŋo me icika ote kwoyo iye boŋo obedo bululu bululu kede en amaramar kede en arema, karacel kede boŋo camanini aber, kun okwogo meicel i cal okerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 I nyim ot en te tiyo iye pagi aryo ame borgi romo futi pyerabic wie aryo, kun otio i wigi tok ame borgi tye futi abiro kede nucu." 
2Chronicles3:16 En dok te tiyo nyor acalo tigo me ŋut te keto i wi pagi aryo luŋ, te dok tiyo cal okwer pomegranat mia acel, te ketogi i kom nyor." 
2Chronicles3:17 En ocibo pagi man i nyim ot Obaŋa, acel tuŋ cem kede en ocele tuŋ cam. En te cako nyiŋ en ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ anyarolum ni, Jakin, kede en ame onwoŋo tye tuŋ anyarodi te cako nyiŋe ni Boaj." 
2Chronicles4:1 Otio keno lam me mola, ame borrere romo futi pyeradek, laccere daŋ futi pyeradek; borrere me malo futi aparwie abic." 
2Chronicles4:2 Dok te tiyo dero pii me mola oluŋere aluŋa ame tuttere romo futi abiro kede nucu, lac me yie futi apar wie abic, ya i doge tuŋcel tuno naka i doge tuŋ cel, eka laccere mano kore luŋ te bedo futi pyeraŋwen wie abic." 
2Chronicles4:3 I lak doge i piny ote ryeyo cal opoko mano amana ame kan ame oryeo iye-nono romo futi pyeraŋwen wie abic; cal opokonono oryeo i yore aryo. I kare ame otio dero pii me mola, otio daŋ cal opoko i kome cuto." 
2Chronicles4:4 En otero dero gwoko pii-nu te wot cibo i ŋe cal twoni me mola apar wie aryo, kun ocuŋ adek adek: adek oneno tuŋ anyarodi, adek oneno tuŋ to, adek oneno tuŋ anyarolum, kede adek te neno tutuŋ kide, ŋegi luŋ odok i te dero." 
2Chronicles4:5 Inoŋ a kom dero-nono onwoŋo romo inci adek; doge ote tiyo bala dog kopo, ame rom aroma i tur kalaŋweka. Dero gwoko pii-nono onwoŋo twero donyo iye pii ame kato debe tutumia abicel." 
2Chronicles4:6 Dok te tiyo tako lwok apar, oketo abic tutuŋ anyarolum, kede abic tutuŋ anyarodi. Gin onwoŋo obedo me lwoko jami ducu ame otio kedgi i mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa; dero pii oketo me lwok olamdog." 
2Chronicles4:7 Dok te tiyo acib tara me jabu apar kite ame onwoŋo ociko te ketogi daŋ i ot Obaŋa, kun keto abic tutuŋ anyarolum, kede abic tutuŋ anyarodi." 
2Chronicles4:8 Dok te tiyo meja apar, oketogi daŋ i ot Obaŋa, oketo abic tuŋ anyarolum, kede abic tuŋ anyarodi, dok te tiyo becen me jabu mia acel." 
2Chronicles4:9 Te daŋ yiko dyekal olamdog, kede dyekal adwoŋŋere, kede kika me dyekal, kun mwono kom kika luŋ kede mola;" 
2Chronicles4:10 te keto dero pii cuŋ i gul ot tutuŋ anyarolum ame dok tutuŋ kide. 
2Chronicles4:11 Kuram dok te tiyo ta ko jobo buru apol kede atok buru anaka becen-gu. Mannono en kite ame Kuram otyeko kede tic i kom ot Obaŋa pi abaka Culamen. 
2Chronicles4:12 Otio pagi aryo, tok aryo ame oluŋere aluŋa calo gulu ame ote keto i wi pagi, kede boo aryo me wumo kom tok aryo ame oluŋere aluŋa ame bedo i wii pagi aryo ca." 
2Chronicles4:13 Otio daŋ cal okwer pomegranat mia aŋwen pi boo aryo luŋ, kun cal okwer pomegranat oryeo i yore aryo i kom boo acel acel me wumo wi tok aryo ame oluŋere aluŋa ame bedo i wi pagi aryo ca." 
2Chronicles4:14 Dok otio daŋ gadigadi atitino apar, tako mola apar ame oluto i gadigadi atitino-nono," 
2Chronicles4:15 kededero gwoko pii acel, kede twoni apar wie aryo me bedo i te derogwoko pii." 
2Chronicles4:16 Tako jobo buru kede atok buru, kede acob riŋo kede jami luŋ ame mitte me tic, jami magi ame Kuramabi otiogi pi abaka Culeman, me tic i ot a Rwot onwoŋo obedo me mola ame otio komgi apwot meicel." 
2Chronicles4:17 Abaka rik otio jami magi luŋ i bar me kulo Jordan, kan ame lobo me cweyo gulu tye iye i akina Cukot kede Jereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Culeman rik otio jami magi apol meicel ame mola ame odonyo i komgi mom opimo pekkere. 
2Chronicles4:19 Mannono en kite amerik Culeman otio kede jami luŋ ame tye i ot Obaŋa: keno lam me jabu, meja me cano ogati ame oketo i nyim Rwot," 
2Chronicles4:20 acib tara, kede tara me jabu ame olio aber apipim ame myero bed lyel i nyim kabedo acil ame tye tyelo kite ame ociko kede;" 
2Chronicles4:21 kede cal ature apipim kede tara daŋ apipim kede boi kwanyo mac, gin luŋ otio i jabu ame olio aber Meicel." 
2Chronicles4:22 Otio daŋ makac apopol, becen, tabo me waŋo odok akur kede weer me lodi mac, ame gin luŋ otiogi i jabu ame olio aber; kede pata me aketa i kika me doggola ame donyo iyi kabedo acil meicel ame tye tyelo, kede me aketa i kika me donyo iyi icika adwoŋŋere me ot Obaŋa, gin luŋ daŋ otio i jabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Man en kite ame rik tic luŋ ame abaka Culeman otio i kom ot a Rwot otum kede. Culeman te daŋ kelo jami luŋ ame rik pappere Daudi ojalo baŋ Rwot iye; okelo ryal, jabu, kede jami ocele luŋ acalo, tabbi, cupa, kopo, te kanogi luŋ i ot kano lim a Rwot." 
2Chronicles5:2 Culeman rik te lwoŋo odoŋe me Icrael, odoŋ atekere kede odoŋe ame loo doggola a kwarigi me bino baŋe i Jerucalem me bino kwanyo canduk cikere a Rwot ame rik onwoŋo tye i paco a Daudi ame olwoŋo ni Cion." 
2Chronicles5:3 Jo Icrael luŋ te bino cokere baŋ abaka Culeman i kare me kwero ecuban, ame onwoŋo poto i dwe me abiro." 
2Chronicles5:4 I kare ame odoŋe luŋ me Icrael obino, Olevi doŋ te tiŋo canduk cikere a Rwot." 
2Chronicles5:5 Gin te tero candukkono kede kema me rwatte karacel kede jami acil luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye i kema; olamdog kede Olevi te kelogi luŋ. 
2Chronicles5:6 Abaka Culeman karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te cokere karacel i nyim candukkono, kun oŋolo lwak rommi kede twoni apipim, ame welgi mom ŋeye, dok daŋ mom romo kwanne, me yalo Rwot." 
2Chronicles5:7 Olamdog te doŋ tiŋo canduk me cikere a Rwot tero naka i kabedo mere iyi icika acil ame tye tyelo i ot a Rwot, ame en kabedo acil meicel, ote wot keto piny kuno ite bwom okerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Bwom okerubi ame oyarre te wumo candukkono oko karacel kede ludi luŋ me tiŋe. 
2Chronicles5:9 Ludi onwoŋo rik boco meicel ame ka ŋattoro ocuŋ i kabedo acil i nyim kabedo acil meicel ame tye tyelo, twero neno wigi, ento pe twero nen i koo, ludinono pwod tye kuno naka atot tin," 
2Chronicles5:10 Ginnoro ocele onwoŋo rik mom i candukkono, kono ka kiddi apada aryo ame rik Muca oketo kuno i te kidi me Koreb, kan ame Rwot rik ocikere iye i jo Icrael i kare ame gin oya i Miciri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Olamdog ducu ame onwoŋo tye kuno onwoŋo doŋ otyeko lonyere oko, kun mom oparo pi dul ticgi. I kare ame olamdog oya i kabedo acil," 
2Chronicles5:12 jo Levi luŋ ame gin onwoŋo ower wer onwoŋo ocuŋ i ŋet keno lam tutuŋ kide. Acap, Kanan, Jedutun kede awobegi karacel kede omegogi gin luŋ oruko boŋŋi me camanini abeco mege, omako daŋ tum me agoa kede naŋa karacel i naŋa opuk. Olamdog mia acel kede pyeraryo ame okut apel ocuŋ kedgi karacel." 
2Chronicles5:13 Doŋ onwoŋo obedo tic okut apel kede ower, me neno ni dwongi oribere karacel i pako kede pwoyo Rwot, kede ka owero wer i dwoŋ aloŋo, kun okuto apel kede tum karacel kede jami ocele luŋ me wer ame otio kedgi i pako Rwot. Gin te wer ni, “Pien en gire ber, marrere a mom lokere perakino atwal.” I caa-nono pol te bino poŋ ot a Rwot oko," 
2Chronicles5:14 Mannono omio olamdog mom dok romo tiyo ticgi i ot a Rwot pi pollono; pien kwogo a Rwot onwoŋo doŋ opoŋ iyi ot oko. 
2Chronicles6:1 Abaka Culeman te cako kwayo Obaŋa kun kobo ni, “Rwot doŋ oyero gire bedo i pol acol icuc." 
2Chronicles6:2 Agerri doŋ twon ottoro amalo meicel, me bed kabedoni nakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Abaka te doŋ lokere neno lwak eka te lamo winyo i kom jo Icrael luŋ, kun jo tye ame ocuŋ gigi mot," 
2Chronicles6:4 en te kobo ni, “Pwo wunu Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael! Pien en ikome omio gin a rik eciko baŋ pappa Daudi ocobere, ame en rik okobo ni," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Cakere i kare ame akwanyo jona Icrael i lobo Miciri, mom ru ayero boma moro i atekere me Icrael luŋ me gero ottoro iye, kan ame amito ni wora iye, dok mom ayero abaka moro me loyo jona Icrael;" 
2Chronicles6:6 ento doŋ atyeko yero Jerucalem me bedo kan ame myero wora iye, dok ayero Daudi me loyo lwakka Icrael." 
2Chronicles6:7 I kare-naca pappa Daudi obedo kede tam i cunye me gero ot me woro Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael. 
2Chronicles6:8 Cite Rwot en ame rik te juko pappa kun kobo ni, “Itimo ber me bedo kede tam me gero ot me wora," 
2Chronicles6:9 ento mom yin en ame ibino gerra ot, wodi ame yin ibino nywalo en ame bino gero ot me wora.”" 
2Chronicles6:10 Nen Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo gin a rik eciko ocobere oko; pien en omio an aleo kaka pappa Daudi acalo abaka me Icrael, kite ame rik Rwot ociko-naca, dok daŋ doŋ atyeko gero ot me woro Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
2Chronicles6:11 Dok daŋ atyeko keto canduk a Rwot i ode-naca, ame tye iye kidi apada aryo me cikere ame rik Rwot ocikere kede i jo Icrael.’ ”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Culeman te ya wot cuŋ i nyim keno lam kun lwak jo Icrael luŋ tye aneno, te taŋo ciŋe malo i polo." 
2Chronicles6:13 Culeman onwoŋo otio tuti me mola ame borrere romo futi abiro kede nucu laccere futi abiro kede nucu, borrere me malo futi aŋwen kede nucu, te cibo i dyekal; en te cuŋ i wie. En dok te rumo coŋe piny i nyim lwak jo Icrael luŋ ame onwoŋo ocokere karacel, te te taŋo ciŋe malo i polo," 
2Chronicles6:14 Okwao Rwot kun kobo ni, “Ama Obaŋa a jo Icrael, mom dok tye Obaŋa moro ocele ame cal kedi, akadi malo i polo onyo piny i wi lobo, ame gwoko cikere mere calo yin, yin ame inyuto marri baŋ omironi luŋ ame lubi kede cunygi luŋ," 
2Chronicles6:15 Ibedo lubo ginnoro luŋ ame rik ititti pappa Daudi; gin ame yin rik ikobo kede dogi, aman doŋ yin i komi icako miyo cobere oko, dok daŋ ocobere luŋ kakare." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ama Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael, doŋ ityeko giri lubo ginnoro luŋ ame rik iciko baŋ pappa Daudi ni, ‘Mom gire ibino bedo aboŋo akwarri moro i wi kom loc me Icrael, tekki ikwaeni bino bedo jo a kitegi beco, kun otio gin ame an amito, kite ame yin ibedo tiyo kede-ni.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Ama Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, tim ber aman doŋ imed moko koppinaca ba, bed ame rik ikobo baŋ pappa Daudi, me kite ame rik ikobo kede." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ento Obaŋa bino bedo piny i lobo kan karacel i dano ateni? En ame kadi polo twal daŋ mom rommenie, kara doŋ ot ame agero-ni twero romme ni ŋo?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kadi amannono ba tim ber iwiny kwacca an amironi, abaka doga baŋi, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, tim ber iwiny kokona kede kwacca ame aketa i nyimi tin-ni." 
2Chronicles6:20 Tim ber inen ot man dyewor kede dyeceŋ, kabedo man ame yin iyero me bedo kan ame myero jo wori iye. Tim ber iwiny kwacca ame aketo i nyimi kan i ot man." 
2Chronicles6:21 Winy kwacca karacel kede kwac a joni Icrael ka ce gin okwao kun nyimgi neno ot man, Winy ba, Ama Rwot, i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo, dok daŋ itimwa kica i kom balwa." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Ka ce ŋattoro otimo balloro baŋ dano wadgi, eka ote kele kan i nyim keno lam ni myero en kwoŋ iye," 
2Chronicles6:23 tim ber iwiny i kabedoni i polo ite ŋolo kop i akina omironi. Mi can opot i kom obalo, kun idwoko timere i wie; mi ŋat a kopporo mom i kome lo kop, kun itime ber ame oromo kite atira." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Ka ce okwor a joni Icrael oloogi oko pi balloro ame gin obalo i nyimi, ka ce oŋut ote dwogo baŋi, ote bino paki i ot man kun obako doggi baŋi," 
2Chronicles6:25 tim ber iwiny kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo. Tim joni kica i kom balgi, ite dwoggogi i lobo a rik omio baŋ kwarigi." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Ka ce joni Icrael otimo balloro baŋi, eka ite keto can i komgi, kun itwonogi kot oko, icennere gin te ŋut, ote dwogo kwayi kun nyimgi ne no ot man, kun daŋ opako nyiŋi," 
2Chronicles6:27 tim ber iwiny kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo. Tim ber itim omironi kica i kom balgi, ame gin obedo joni Icrael. Pwonygi me bedo i kit kwo ame yin imito, mi kot ocwe i loboni, ame rik imio baŋ joni Icrael me bedo lobogi doŋ atwal." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ka ce kec opoto i lobo, onyo two edeke, onyo ceŋ otwo kai oko, onyo oner oko, onyo bonyo, onyo kit kudi moro ocele en ame ocamo; onyo ka okwor oero lweny i kom joni, te gurogi oko i bomagi, onyo ka two moro ocele ame opoto i akinagi," 
2Chronicles6:29 tim ber iwiny kwacgi. Ka ce ŋattoro keken i akina joni Icrael ame cunye ocwer obino ocwalo kwaccere baŋi, kun nyime one no ot man, onyo jo Icrael luŋ ocwalo kwacgi baŋi," 
2Chronicles6:30 tim ber iwiny kwacgi. Winy kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo timgi kica, ite timo gin ame ineno ni porre pire on yo pirgi i kom gin ame gin okwao. Yin keni gire ineo gin ame tye i cuny dano acel acel; pi mannono, yin timmi ŋat acel acel gin ame ineno ni porre pire," 
2Chronicles6:31 me jo Icrael bed kede lworo i komi kare luŋ ame gin tye i lobo ame yin rik imio baŋ kwarigi. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Ka ce arokkoro ame mom dano me Icrael owinyo piri, kede pi gigi mogo adonodono ame yin ibedo ti mo baŋ joni Icrael, eka te bino i ot man pi bino worri kun oya i lobo abor," 
2Chronicles6:33 tim ber iwiny kwaccere i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo. Tim ber iti gin ame en okwao pire, me jo me wi polo luŋ ŋei ote bedo kede lworo i komi ame rom aroma kede joni Icrael. Mannono bino miyo miyo gin ŋeo ni ot ame an agero kan piri-ni en ame obedo kan ame myero wori iye." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Ka ce yin iciko joni me wot lweny okworgi, ka ce gin okelo kwacgi i nyimi i kan ame gin otye iye kuno, kun nyimgi oneno kabedo man ame yin en iyero, kede ot man ame an agero piri-ni," 
2Chronicles6:35 tim ber iwiny kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo, ite miyogi loyo okworgi oko." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Ka ce joni Icrael opoto i bal i nyimi, pien mom tye dano moro kadi acel ame mom timo bal, eka akemo te maki i komgi, ite miyo okworgi loyogi oko, te daŋ terogi oko acalo opii, i lobo moro ocele ame tye kannabor onyo ame tye kan aceggi;" 
2Chronicles6:37 cite ka i kare ame gin tye kuno cunygi te kolo piny, ote ŋut, ote kwayi kun otuco balgi i nyimi, kun oye ni kitegi oballe oko pi gin areco ame gin obedo timo, tim ber iwiny kwacgi Ama Rwot." 
2Chronicles6:38 Ka ce i kare ame gin tye kuno i lobo ame oterogi iye acalo opii, gin te ŋut, kun oŋut ateteni i cunygi ducu, ote kwayi i kuno kun nyimgi oneno lobo man ame yin rik imio baŋ kwarigi, kede kabedo man ame yin giri en iyero kede ot man ame an agero piri-ni," 
2Chronicles6:39 tim ber iwiny kwacgi i kabedoni ame tye malo i polo, ite timogi kica i kom balgi." 
2Chronicles6:40 Aman doŋ ba, Ama Obaŋa, cik waŋi dok iter daŋ yiti i kwac luŋ ame obino kwayo i kabedo man." 
2Chronicles6:41 Ya doŋ malo, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, me iwot i ka weoni, yin karacel kede canduk me tekoni. Mi olamdog meri Ama Rwot Obaŋa, oruk ruk me larre, mi joni acillel i yomcuny pi berri." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ama Rwot Obaŋa, kur ikwer winyo kop a abakani ame iyero! Po pi marri a mom lokere i kom amironi Daudi.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Kare ame Culeman doŋ otyeko kwaccere, mac oya i polo te bino waŋo mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa karacel kede mot ocele luŋ, kwogo a Rwot te poŋ yi ot Obaŋa oko," 
2Chronicles7:2 Mannono te miyo olamdog mom doŋ romo donyo i ot a Rwot, pien kwogo a Rwot onwoŋo doŋ opoŋ yi ot oko," 
2Chronicles7:3 I kare ame jo Icrael luŋ oneno mac ame oya i polo obino piny, kede kwogo a Rwot ame opoŋ iyi ot Obaŋa, gin oryebere piny kun nyimgi gudo lobo i dyekal ame opepeto iye kiddi, ote woro Rwot kun opwoc, okobo ni, “Pien en gire ber, marrere a mom lokere perakino atwal.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Abaka kede lwak luŋ a rik tye kuno te yalo Rwot. 
2Chronicles7:5 Abaka Culeman oyalo Rwot i twoni tutumia pyeraryo wie aryo, kede rommi tutumia acel, i pyeraryo nono. Abaka karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te kwero ot a Rwot kittono." 
2Chronicles7:6 Olamdog te cuŋ i kabedogi, kede jo Levi, kun omako jami me wergi, me pako Rwot, kite ame rik abaka Daudi oyiko me miyo pwoc baŋ Rwot, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino atwal. Mannono onwoŋo rik obedo timo kare ducu ame Daudi pako iye Obaŋa kun gin okonye i wergi, Lwak jo Icrael luŋ onwoŋo ocuŋ okemere kede olamdog ame akuto apel." 
2Chronicles7:7 Culeman dok te kwero dye dyekal ame tye i nyim ot Obaŋa. En oyalo Rwot i mot awaŋa kuno, kede dwol me mot me kweyo cuny, pien keno lam me mola ame onwoŋo mom romo keto mot awaŋa kede mot me moko kwon kede dwolo me yalo Rwot." 
2Chronicles7:8 I kare-nono Culeman karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te kwero ecuban, nino abiro. Jo Icrael ame okwero ecuban-nono onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel jo luŋ ame oya i dog yo ame woto Kamat tuno kede naka i kulo me Miciri." 
2Chronicles7:9 I nino me kany wie adekkere, gin te bedo kede cokere adwoŋ; pien gin obedo kwero keno lam nino abiro twal kede ecuban nino abiro daŋ." 
2Chronicles7:10 I nino me pyeraryo wie adek me dwe me abiro en ame rik Culeman ocwao iye lwak me dok i paccigi. Lwak odok i paccigi kun cunygi yom atek meicel pi jami abeco luŋ ame Rwot otimo pi amiro mere Daudi kede Culeman kede lwakkere luŋ ame gin jo Icrael. 
2Chronicles7:11 Mannono en kite a Culeman otyeko kede tic me gero ot a Rwot kede ot abaka; tic luŋ ame rik en oyiko me atia i ot a Rwot kede i ode en ocobo aber meicel. 
2Chronicles7:12 Rwot dok omedo nen baŋe tyen me aryo mere dyewor, kun kobbe ni, “Atyeko doŋ winyo kwacci, atyeko doŋ yero kabedo man pira me bed acalo ot me yala kede mot," 
2Chronicles7:13 Ka ce acego polo oko a kot doŋ mom cwe, onyo ka aciko ni bonyo myero cam cam ame tye i lobo tyek oko, onyo ka ce acwao two edeke i kom lwak ka," 
2Chronicles7:14 ka ce lwakka ame olwoŋogi kede nyiŋa omwolle, eka ote kwaya kun owora dok daŋ oweko timo tim areco, an dok abino winyo kwacgi i polo, ate weko balgi, dok abino kwanyo gin ame tye ka balo lobogi oko." 
2Chronicles7:15 Cakere tin abino ciko waŋa dok abino tero yita me winyo kwac ame obino kwayo i kabedo man," 
2Chronicles7:16 Pien tin doŋ atyeko yero jo man, dok daŋ atyeko lonyo oko bedo acil, me nyiŋa bed iye nakanaka; waŋa kede cunya bino daŋ bedo kuno nakanaka." 
2Chronicles7:17 Aco yin ba, ka ce ibino tic baŋa kite ame pappi Daudi obedo timo, ce ibedo tiyo gin ame aciko luŋ, kun igwoko daŋ cikka luŋ, kede gin ame aciko," 
2Chronicles7:18 an Obaŋani abino moko locci bedo nakanaka kun agwoko gin a rik aciko baŋ pappi Daudi, kare ame akobbe ni, ikwae en ame bino loyo Icrael nakanaka." 
2Chronicles7:19 “Ento ka ce ibino gak wunu oko i yo apat, kun mom dok iluba wunu, dok daŋ mom itio wunu gin ame aciko, eka ite kobo wunu oko baŋ obaŋa moro ocele kun daŋ dok iworogi wunu," 
2Chronicles7:20 an abino kwanyowu oko i lobo ame rik amiowu. Dok mom daŋ abino ciko waŋa i kom ot man ame doŋ atyeko lonyo doko acil me wora-ni; dok abino miyo doko gin ame rok luŋ lolo i doggi, kun oceko kop i kome." 
2Chronicles7:21 Jo luŋ ame bino beo i ŋet ot man adwoŋ wok-ki, obino wuro awura kun ojwiye kengikengi, okobo ni, ‘Do kara omio Rwot otimo lobo man kede ot man kit man ba?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Jo ocele bino kobo ni, ‘Pien jo Icrael oweko Rwot Obaŋagi oko ata, ame okwanyo kwarigi i lobo me Miciri, gin gigi dok olunyo kobo baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele kun oworogi dok paŋ otio tic pirgi. Mannono en omio Rwot oketo twon can agwa wok-ki i komgi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Gero ot Obaŋa kede me abaka oteri Culeman mwakki pyeraryo twal me tum. 
2Chronicles8:2 Culeman dok te cako roco boma mogo ame rik abaka Kuram omiogi baŋe, te miyo jo Icrael bedo iye," 
2Chronicles8:3 Culeman dok te wot i Kamat-joba, te wot mayo oko." 
2Chronicles8:4 En dok te gero Tadmor ame tye i tim kede boma luŋ me kano cam ame en ogerogi i Kamat. 
2Chronicles8:5 En ogero daŋ Bet-koron Amalo kede Bet-koron Apiny, te celo boma oko i cel atek, te daŋ keto iye doggola ame ocego atek." 
2Chronicles8:6 Ogero daŋ Baalat, kede boma luŋ me kano cam ame rik en tye kedgi, kede boma me gwoko gadigadi me mony, kede boma a wegi aguragura, kede kit gedo luŋ ame Culeman rik omito gero i Jerucalem, kede i Lebanon, kede i lobo ame en loo luŋ." 
2Chronicles8:7 Jo ame obedo rono i tic me gedo obedo jo luŋ ame odoŋ i kom jo Kitti, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kivi, kede jo Jebuc ame gin mom obedo jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles8:8 Ikwaegi ame rik jo Icrael mom oneko i kare ame gin gamo lobogi me bedo meggi, gin en ame Culeman obedo ronogi i tic kite ame pwod otye ka ronogi kede i tic naka atot tin." 
2Chronicles8:9 Ento Culeman mom otio i jo Icrael i kokome acalo opii; gin obedo ocirikale, odoŋe ame loo tic apapat, kede odoŋe me mony odoŋe me gadigadi lweny, kede oŋwec aguragura abaka." 
2Chronicles8:10 Odoŋe ame loo tic apapat me gedo ame rik Culeman oketo rik romo mia aryo kede pyerabic. Jo-ni en ame obedo loyo lwak. 
2Chronicles8:11 Culeman te kwanyo nyaka a Parao i paco a Daudi tero i ot ame en ogero pire, kun kobo ni, “Dakona mom bino bedo i ot a Daudi abaka me Icrael, pien kabedo luŋ ame doŋ canduk a Rwot obedo iye-ni odoko kabedo acil.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Culeman te bedo yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa i wi keno lam ame en ocano me yalo Rwot i nyim icika ot ame tye i doggola," 
2Chronicles8:13 En obedo yalo Rwot i mot kite ame omito me nino acel acel, kun luba cik a Muca i cabit luŋ, kede por dwe, i nino adoŋo adek ame ociko i mwaka acel acel, ame obedo kare me ecuban me Ogati a Tobi Mom iye, kare me ecuban me cabit abiro, kede kare me ecuban me Gonye." 
2Chronicles8:14 Kite ame rik pappere Daudi ociko, en oketo olamdog i dul apapat i dog ticgi, kede Olevi i dog ticgi me pako Obaŋa kede me konyo olamdog, kun lubo tic me nino acel acel. Opoko daŋ tic ogwok doggola luŋ kun pokogi i dul i dul i doggola acel acel, kite ame Daudi dano Obaŋa rik onwoŋo ociko." 
2Chronicles8:15 Gin daŋ obedo lubo cik ame abaka rik ociko kede olamdog kede Olevi, mom oweko moro kadi acel ame mako kopporo luŋ ame ociko kede ame mako kano lim." 
2Chronicles8:16 Culeman rik te tyeko ticcere luŋ kittino, cakere i nino ame oketo iye acakki te ot a Rwot tuno kede i nino ame otum iye. Ot a Rwot rik te tum kittono." 
2Chronicles8:17 Culeman rik dok te wot naka i Ejion-geber ame ceggi kede Elat ame tye i dog nam, i lobo Edom." 
2Chronicles8:18 Abaka kuram rik te cwayo jo mere kede mel baŋ Culeman; en ocwao jo ame odiro i nam, gin te wot naka i Opir karacel kede omiro a Culeman, ote wot kelo jabu i kuno, pekkere onwoŋo buco romo tan apar wie abicel, ote kelo baŋ a baka Culeman." 
2Chronicles9:1 I kare ame abaka adako me Ceba owinyo nyiŋ Culeman orwo atek, en obino baŋe i Jerucalem me bino teme kede penyere mogo atek meicel. En obino kede jo cipan ame gwoke, kede inaga apipim ame oyeo i jami mogo a ŋwecgi kur, kede jabu adwoŋ atata, kede gweŋe alilia me wel. Kare ame en otuno baŋ Culeman, en otitte kop ducu ame onwoŋo tye icunye." 
2Chronicles9:2 Culeman te dok i penyere luŋ; mom tye moro kadi acel ame tuco oloo Culeman. 
2Chronicles9:3 Kare ame en doŋ oneno ryeko a Culeman luŋ, kede ot ame en ogero, kede cam ame obedo tedde," 
2Chronicles9:4 kede kabedo ocele adoŋo doŋe, kede lwak jo ame tio baŋe, kede boŋŋi ame gin ruko me wel, kede jo ame mie koŋo olok, karacel kede mot ame en yalo kede Rwot, wi abaka me Ceba te cuŋ oko." 
2Chronicles9:5 En te kobbi abaka Culeman ni, “Gin ame abedo winyo i komi kede i kom ryekoni i kare ame pwod atye i lobona, tye kara ateni!" 
2Chronicles9:6 Cite an onwoŋo mom aye, tuno ka tin doŋ aneno kede waŋa. Nen ba, kop ame onwoŋo awinyo i kom ryekoni adwoŋ kara onwoŋo aduno moro; ryekoni kede lonyoni dwoŋ kara atek meicel ame kato kit ame onwoŋo okobba kede oko." 
2Chronicles9:7 Monni komgi i gum okato kare! Omironi luŋ komgi i gum meicel, me cuŋ i nyimi kare luŋ kun owinyo kop me ryeko ame ya i dogi!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Rwot Obaŋani myero pwo atek meicel, pien onyuto yomcunye i komi pi keti me bedo abaka akakare en Rwot Obaŋani! Pien Rwot Obaŋani omaro jo Icrael atwal dok omito ni gin omok atek meicel, en omio en oketi me bedo abakagi, me yin ilogi aber kun itio gin a tye atira, dok iŋolo kop kakare.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Abaka a dako me Ceba te miyo Culeman jabu ame pekkere buco romo tan abic, kede odokkogo ame ŋwecgi kur apipim kede gweŋe alilia me wel apipim. I kare-nono onwoŋo mom tye odokkoro a ŋwece kur ame rom i en ame abaka me Ceba omo baŋ Culeman-nono." 
2Chronicles9:10 Medo i kom mannono, omiro a Kuram kede omiro a Culeman, ame onwoŋo okelo jabu i Opir, okelo daŋ bao mogo me yat ame olwoŋo ni algum, karacel kede gweŋe ame lilia me wel apipim." 
2Chronicles9:11 Bao-nono abaka Culeman te bedo tic kedgi me citep i ot a Rwot kede i ot abaka. Otio daŋ i naŋa kede naŋa opuk pi jo ame wero; ame moro a rom kedgi rik mom ru onen i lobo me Juda luŋ. 
2Chronicles9:12 Abaka Culeman te miyo abaka adako me Ceba jami luŋ ame rik omito; omie ginnoro luŋ ame en openyo, kun omedo iye gin amerrom i gin ame en okelo baŋe. Eka abaka adako me Ceba kede jo mere te doŋ dok i lobo mere me Ceba." 
2Chronicles9:13 Abaka Culeman rik nwoŋo jabu abup meicel ame kato tan pyeraryo wie abic twal i mwaka acel acel. 
2Chronicles9:14 Man nwoŋo mom okwano iye en ame bino i baŋ ocatwil me paco kede me lobo a aoko, kede me en ame ya i baŋ obakki me lo bo Arab, kede en ame gabuna mere ame loo lobo apapat kelo baŋe." 
2Chronicles9:15 Culeman rik daŋ otio kwode adoŋo ame romo mia aryo, kun otio gin luŋ kede jabu ame oteto anyul; ame kwot acel acel odonyo iye jabu ame buco romo ratili pyeraryo." 
2Chronicles9:16 Dok te tiyo daŋ kwode atino mege mia adek kun daŋ otio gin luŋ i jabu, dok daŋ otetogi kede anyul, ame kwot acel acel odonyo iye jabu ame pekkere buco romo ratili apar. Abaka rik te ketogi luŋ i ot ame olwoŋo ni. Buŋ me Lebanon." 
2Chronicles9:17 Abaka Culeman dok otio daŋ kom loc adwoŋ, kun otio i lak lyec, te mwono kome luŋ i jabu ame olio aber." 
2Chronicles9:18 Kom locono rik tye kede citep abicel, kede kom jabu me teno tyen, ame okubo i kom kommono. I ŋete tuni kede tuni ote keto iye atenciŋ, kun cal eŋatu aryo ocuŋ i ŋet bad kom me teno ciŋ," 
2Chronicles9:19 dok daŋ tye iŋatu ocele apar wie aryo ame ocuŋ i agikki citep abicel-ca, tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi. Mom tye kommoro ame abaka moro otio a cal i kommono." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ikopo abaka luŋ rik otio i jabu keken, kede jami luŋ ame rik otio kedgi i Buŋ me Lebanon, gin luŋ rik otio i jabu ame olio aber meicel. I kare a Culeman ryal onwoŋo obedo ginnoro ame mom otamo pire." 
2Chronicles9:21 Abaka daŋ rik tye i lwak mel ame woto Tarcic karacel kede mel a Kuram. Mel me Tarcic rik onwoŋo dwogo paco i mwaka adek adek kun okelo jabu, ryal, kede lak lyec, karacel ayom kede abim." 
2Chronicles9:22 Abaka Culeman rik obedo twon abaka moro ame alonyo dok ryek ame kato obakki ocele luŋ. 
2Chronicles9:23 Obakki me wi podo luŋ obedo kede mit me bino baŋe, me bino winyo kit ryeko ame Obaŋa onwoŋo omie." 
2Chronicles9:24 Ŋat acel acel ame rik bino baŋe, kelle mot a kitgi papat, acalo jami ame otio i ryal kede en ame olio i jabu, kede boŋŋi me aruka, odok murra kede gin a ŋwece kur, aguragura kede kanne adoŋo mege; man rik timere mwaka i mwaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Abaka Culeman rik onwoŋo doŋ tye kede aguragura ame romo tutumia aŋwen iyi awi mere, kun tye i gadigadi lweny karacel kede jo ame riŋo kedgi ame romo tutumia apar wie aryo. Mogo i akinagi rik bedo i boma ame ogwoko iye gadigadi kun en ocele bedo baŋ abaka i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles9:26 En rik oloo obakki luŋ cakere i Efurate tuno kede i lobo a jo Piriciti, kede i waŋ lobo me Miciri." 
2Chronicles9:27 I kare-naca abaka rik omio ryal odoko ginnoro a pire mom dit ame twero nwoŋere baŋ jo luŋ i Jerucalem calo gweŋ, kun daŋ bao cedar dwoŋ atata i Jerucalem calo olam ame tye i bar ame Cepela," 
2Chronicles9:28 Culeman rik onwoŋo aguragura mere i lobo Miciri kede i loba ducu. 
2Chronicles9:29 Kop ocele luŋ odoŋŋere i kom Culeman kede gin ame en otio, cakere i acakki tuno kede i agikki mere, ame mom ocoo kan, otyeko coyo luŋ i buk me Tekwaro ame adwarpiny Natan ocoo, dok daŋ tye i akina kop Obaŋa ame Akija dano me Cilo otyeto, kede i buk ame mako kop i kom gin ame Iddo aran-piny oneno ame mako kop i kom Jeroboam wot a Nebat." 
2Chronicles9:30 Culeman obedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael luŋ i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeraŋwen. 
2Chronicles9:31 En oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, oyiko kome i paco a pappere Daudi. Wode Rekoboam te cako loc kakare." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rekoboam rik te wot i Cekem kan ame jo luŋ ocokere iye me kete i kom me bedo abaka. 
2Chronicles10:2 Jeroboam wot a Nebat owinyo pire i kare ame en onwoŋo pwod tye i Miciri kan ame en rik oriŋo iye pi riŋo abaka Culeman, en te ya oko i kuno te dwogo oko." 
2Chronicles10:3 Jo Icrael onwoŋo ocwao kwena me wot lwoŋe, eka Jeroboam karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ ame ocokere te kobbi Rekoboam ni," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Pappi rik otio kedwa agwa meicel. Aman doŋ ba, yin myero idwok tic apek ame pappi rik omiowa, kede yec apek ame en oketo i komwa, odok piny, wan obino bedo omironi.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rekoboam te gamo ni, “Koŋ idok wunu iwot ityek wunu nino adek, ite dwogo wunu baŋa kan.” Lwak te dok oko ceŋ." 
2Chronicles10:6 Abaka Rekoboam te cako penyo tam i baŋ jo oteggo ame rik obedo tic i pappere acalo omi-tam, kun en penyogi ni, “Tam aŋo ame imia wunu me dok i peny a lwak?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Gin te kobbe ni, “Ka ce kica bino maki i kom jo man, ite kweyo cunygi kun i kobbigi kop abeco, gin bino bedo omironi nakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Ento en mom oketo cunye i tam ame jo oteggo-nono omie. En dok te cako penyo tam i baŋ olwagi mere ame onwoŋo bedo kede. 
2Chronicles10:9 En openyogi ni, “Kara tam aŋo ame imia wunu me dok i peny a lwak, ame okwaa ni, myero ajwik yecgi dok ayot?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Gin te gamo ni, “Yin myero ikobbigi kit man ni, ‘Nyako ciŋa acel dwoŋ kato pyer pappa oko." 
2Chronicles10:11 An abino timo kit man: Pappa yam omiowu yec apek meicel, mega bino bedo apek akato me a pappa oko, Pappa rik pwodowu i del, cite an abino pwodowu i gin ame lit bala kwir yib yit.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 I ŋe nino adek, Jeroboam karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te dwogo baŋ abaka Rekoboam, kite ame rik ocikogi kede, kun kobo ni, “Dwog wunu baŋa kan i ŋe nino adek.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Abaka te cako dok i peny a lwak kede gero, kun mom oye lubo tam ame odoŋe oteggo omie." 
2Chronicles10:14 En okobbi lwak kite ame olwagi mere omie kede tam, kun kobbigi ni, “Pappa rik omio iyeo wunu yec apek, an abino medo bedo apek ame kato mege. Pappa rik pwodowu kede del, ento an abino pwodowu i gin ame lit kato kwir yib yit oko.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 En abaka rik okwero winyo kop a lwak pien Rwot ikome en omio otimere amannono, me wek kop ame rik eciko baŋ Jeroboam wot a Nebat ocobere kakare kite ame rik emio Akija dano me Cilo okobo kede baŋ Jeroboam wot a Nebat." 
2Chronicles10:16 I kare ame jo Icrael oneno ni abaka mom oye winyo kokogi gin te kobbi abaka ni, “Wan giwa mom otye kede dulloro ame obedo megwa i kom Daudi. Wan giwa mom obino nwoŋo ginnoro i baŋ wot a Yece. Dok giwu i kemawu, wun jo Icrael! Nen doŋ odi keni yin Daudi!” Jo Icrael doŋ te cako ket oko, kun ŋat acel acel dok i paco mere." 
2Chronicles10:17 Rekoboam te doŋ loyo ka jo Icrael ame onwoŋo bedo i Juda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Abaka Rekoboam te cwayo Adoram adwoŋ ame onwoŋo rik loo tic me eroni, cite jo Icrael ote nanapo en i gweŋe ote neke oko. Man omio abaka Rekoboam te ru ya oko yito i wi gadigadi lwennyere, te riŋo naka i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles10:19 Cakere i karenono jo Icrael te cako jem oko i kom oloc ame ya i ot a Daudi naka atot tin. 
2Chronicles11:1 Kare ame Rekoboam odwogo cen i Jerucalem, en ocako coko jo ame oyero ame romo tutumia acel kede pyeraboro iyi atekere a Juda kede Benjamin me wot lweny i kom jo Icrael me dwoggo jo luŋ i te loc a Rekoboam." 
2Chronicles11:2 Cite kop a Rwot te bino baŋ dano Obaŋa ame nyiŋe Cemaya, kun kobbe ni," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Wot ikobbi Rekoboam wot a Culeman, ame obedo abaka me Juda, kede jo luŋ me doggola a Juda kede me doggola a Benjamin ni," 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Rwot okobo ni myero kur iwot ilweny wunu i kom omegowu ame gin obedo jo Icrael. Ŋat acel acel myero dok i paco mere, pien gin ame otimere-nono Rwot en ame mio timere.’ ” Gin luŋ ote winyo kop a Rwot ote dok oko cen, kun ŋat acel acel dok i paco mere, Mom dok ote wot lweny i kom Jeroboam." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rekoboam obedo i Jerucalem, ogero boma ame ocecelo me mony i Juda." 
2Chronicles11:6 En ogero Beterekem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bet-jur, Coko, Adullam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gat, Mareca, Jip," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim, Lakic, Ajeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Jora, Aijalon, kede Kebron, gin luŋ boma ame ocecelo atek ame onwoŋo tye i Juda kede i Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:11 En oyiko cellere luŋ obedo atek, oketo odoŋe mony i yigi, te kano iye cam, moo kede koŋo olok," 
2Chronicles11:12 Te daŋ keto kwode kede toŋi i boma luŋ, ame te miyogi bedo atek meicel. Mannono kite ame Juda kede Benjamin obedo kede i te loccere." 
2Chronicles11:13 Olamdog kede jo Levi ame rik onwoŋo tye iyi Icrael luŋ, te bino baŋe luŋ, bino bedo i ŋete." 
2Chronicles11:14 Jo Levi onwoŋo oweko bar me kwatgi oko kede kan ame gin onwoŋo obedo iye, ote wot i Juda kede i Jerucalem, pien Jeroboam kede awobe mere onwoŋo oryemogi oko i tic me bedo olamdog a Rwot." 
2Chronicles11:15 Jeroboam te keto olamdoggere ame en oyero me tic i ka woro jogi ame tye malo i wi kiddi, kede me tic baŋ jogi me tim ame calo nyogi dyegi, kede baŋ cal twoni ame en otio," 
2Chronicles11:16 Jo ame rik onwoŋo cunygi tye i woro Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael olubo yo olamdog a Rwot, kun oya i atekere luŋ me Icrael, owoto i Jerucalem me wot yalo Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi," 
2Chronicles11:17 Gin te miyo loc me Juda bedo atek meicel, mannono te miyo Rekoboam wot a Culeman bedo atek abono ginnoro ayele pi mwakki adek, pien gin onwoŋo obedo lubo kite a Daudi kede Culeman pi mwakki adekkono." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rekoboam te nyomo Makalat nyaka a Jerimot wot a Daudi. Tota a Makalat obedo Abikairi nyaka Eliab wot a Yece. 
2Chronicles11:19 Makalat te nywalo itino awobe magi baŋ Rekoboam: Jeuc Cemaria, kede Jakam." 
2Chronicles11:20 Icennere dok te nyomo Maaka nyaka Abicalom ame te nywalle Abija, Atai, Jija, kede Celomit." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rekoboam rik onwoŋo maro Maaka nyaka Abicalom kato monnere luŋ karacel kede mon aŋeca. En rik onyomo mon apar wie aboro kede mon aŋeca pyerabicel twal; onywalo awo be pyeraryo wie aboro kede anyira pyerabicel. 
2Chronicles11:22 Rekoboam rik te keto wode Abija ame obedo wot a Maaka me bedo ŋat ame loo omego mere luŋ, pien rik onwoŋo mito kette me bedo abaka." 
2Chronicles11:23 En obedo tic i ryeko, opoko awobe mere mogo i dul lobo apapat ame tye i Juda kede Benjamin; oketogi i boma ame ocecelo atek, kun miogi cam adwoŋ, dok daŋ te nyommigi mon luŋ." 
2Chronicles12:1 I kare ame loc a Rekoboam doŋ omoko aber, kun medde ameda daŋ i bedo atek, en karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ te cako weko lubo cik a Rwot oko," 
2Chronicles12:2 I mwaka me abiccere me loc a Rekoboam, abaka Cicak me Miciri ocobo mony i kom Jerucalem, pien gengi onwoŋo doŋ oya oko i kom Rwot." 
2Chronicles12:3 En obino i gadigadi me lweny ame romo tutumia acel kede mia aryo karacel kede ocirikale ame riŋo aguragura tutumia pyerabicel. Aco jo ame obino kede kun oya i Miciri, welgi onwoŋo mom romo kwanne kadi acel; obino jo Libia, jo Cukkim, kede jo Eciopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 En te mayo boma luŋ ame ocecelo atek me Juda te tuno naka i Jerucalem. 
2Chronicles12:5 Adwarpiny Cemaya te wot baŋ abaka Rekoboam kede rwode me Juda, ame rik onwoŋo ocokere i Jerucalem pi Cicak, te kobbigi ni, “Rwot okobo ni, ‘Wun doŋ ityeko weka wunu oko, mannono omio an daŋ awekowu i ciŋ Cicak.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Rwode me Icrael kede abaka te mwolle kengi, ote kobo ni, “Rwot gire tye kakare.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Kare ame Rwot oneno ni gin omwolle kengi, en te kobbi Cemaya ni, “Pien gin doŋ otyeko mwolle kengi, mom doŋ abino tyekogi. Gin bino bwot abwota; mom doŋ abino onyo akemona luŋ i kom Jerucalem, kun atio kede Cicak." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kadi bed amannono gin bino bedo amiro a Cicak, me oŋe apokapoka a tye i tic baŋa kede tic baŋ oloc me lobo apapat ame tye i wi podo.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Cicak, abaka me Miciri rik te bino cobo mony i kom Jerucalem. En rik te yako jami luŋ ame onwoŋo okano i ot kano jami a Rwot, kede en ame onwoŋo tye i ot kano jami abaka. En oyako jami luŋ, kun yako anaka kwode-gu, ame rik Culeman otio i jabu," 
2Chronicles12:10 Abaka Rekoboam rik dok te tiyo kwode ocele kaka en ame Cicak oyako; en otio kwode me mola, te miyogi i ciŋ odoŋe a jo ame onwoŋo gwoko doggola ot abaka." 
2Chronicles12:11 I kare luŋ ka rik abaka awot i ot a Rwot, jo ame gwoke ŋat acel woto i kwot i ciŋe, ate dok dwoko kakare i otgi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Kare ame en doŋ omwolle kene, akemo a Rwot te doŋ ya oko i kome, ame te miyo mom ote tyeko lobo mere oko; medo i kom mannono, kwo daŋ onwoŋo tye aber i Juda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Mannono te miyo Rekoboam moko loccere atek i Jerucalem, te daŋ bedo loc kuno, Rekoboam ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere doŋ romo pyeraŋwen wie acel; en te bedo loc i Jerucalem, i boma ame rik Rwot oyero i akina atekere luŋ me Icrael ni myero bed kan ame obino wore iye. En obedo loc kuno pi mwakki apar wie abiro. Nyiŋ tottere obedo Naama, ame obedo nya jo Ammon." 
2Chronicles12:14 En rik obedo timo tim arac, pien en mom obedo keto cunye me penyo gin ame Rwot mito ni etim." 
2Chronicles12:15 Kop i kom Rekoboam luŋ, cakere iyi ageyi naka i agikki, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame adwarpiny Cemaya ocoo, kede en ame Iddo aranpiny ocoo. Lweny rik obedo tye i akina Rekoboam kede Jeroboam kare luŋ." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rekoboam oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, oyiko kome i paco a Daudi. Wode Abija en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles13:1 I mwaka me apar wie aboro me loc a Jeroboam, en ame Abija ocako loyo kede jo Juda," 
2Chronicles13:2 En obedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki adek. Nyiŋ tottere onwoŋo Mikaya, ame obedo nyaka Uriel, dano me Gibea." 
2Chronicles13:3 Lweny rik obedo tye i akina Abija kede Jeroboam. Abija rik te wot i lweny kun tye kede jo atek meicel i lweny ame romo tutumia aŋwen ame oyero ayera. Jeroboam rik te ryeyo monyere me lweny kede, kun tye kede jo me lweny ame romo tutumia aboro, ame gin luŋ obedo jo atek meicel i lweny ame daŋ obedo jo ame oyero ayera." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abija te wot cuŋ i jo mere i wi kidi me Jemaraim ame tye i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim, te kobo ni, “Yin Jeroboam kede jo Icrael luŋ, winy wunu koppa!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Mom ce iŋeo wunu ni Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael onwoŋo otyeko miyo tic me loyo jo Icrael nakanaka i ciŋ Daudi kede ikwae, i cikere ame omoko kede kado?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Koŋ inen, Jeroboam wot a Nebat, amiro a Culeman wot a Daudi, rik otimjere me jem i kom adwoŋŋere." 
2Chronicles13:7 Jo mogo a kitegi reco, ocokere baŋe te jem i kom Rekoboam wot a Culeman i kare ame Rekoboam onwoŋo pwod tidi, tammere daŋ onwoŋo pwod goro, ame mom romo kwero tamgi." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Koŋ inen, aman doŋ imito wunu mayo loc a Rwot oko i ciŋ ikwae a Daudi, pien wun ipol wunu meicel, dok daŋ itye wunu i cal twoni me jabu aryo ame Jeroboam otio pirwu me bedo obaŋewu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Mom doŋ iryemo wunu olamdog a Rwot oko, ame obedo ikwae Aron, kede Olevi, eka ite keto wunu olamdog kenwu calo rok ame tye i lobo apapat? Ŋattoro keken ame obino te bino kwerre kene atin twon onyo nyogi romi abiro, dano-nono doko alamdog a gigi-mogo ame mom obedo obaŋa kadi acelloro." 
2Chronicles13:10 Aco wan giwa, Rwot en obedo Obaŋawa, mom ru daŋ oya giwa i baŋe. Wan otye kede olamdog ame tio baŋ Rwot, ame gin obedo ikwae Aron, kede Olevi ame konyogi." 
2Chronicles13:11 Gin oyalo Rwot odiko kede otyeno, kun oyale i mot awaŋa, kede odok a kur, dok daŋ ocano ogati i nyim Rwot i meja ame otio i jabu ame olio aber meicel, ogwoko daŋ acib tara, me wek maccere bed lyel otyeno luŋ, Mannono wan otimo me gwoko cik a Rwot Obaŋawa, cite wun ityeko ya wunu oko i baŋe." 
2Chronicles13:12 Nen ba, Obaŋa gire tye kedwa, kun telo nyimwa, olamdog tye kede apel ame okuto me lwoŋo jo me bino lweny kedwu, Ama, wun ikwae Icrael, myero kur ilweny wunu i Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa a kwariwu; pien mom gire itwero wunu loye.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Jeroboam onwoŋo otyeko cwayo dul mony ocele owoto opono oko anyim, me lokere i komgi i tuŋ ŋegi. Monnyere rik onwoŋo tye i nyim jo Juda, kun jo ocele tye opono oko i ŋe omony me Juda." 
2Chronicles13:14 I kare ame jo Juda oneno, gin onwoŋo ni okwor tye i nyimgi kede i ŋegi; gin te cako kok baŋ Rwot, kun olamdog kuto apel." 
2Chronicles13:15 Jo Juda te cako wo i redo me lweny. I kare ame gin oredo, Obaŋa te miyo Abija kede jo juda loyo Jeroboam kede jo Icrael!" 
2Chronicles13:16 Jo Icrael te cako mukere i ŋwec oko i nyim jo me Juda, Obaŋa te miyogi i ciŋ jo Juda." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abija kede jo mere te nekogi atek meicel; jo Icrael ame te to i akina olweny ame onwoŋo oyero ayera te romo tutumia mia abic. 
2Chronicles13:18 Mannono en kite ame oloo kede jo Icrael i kare-naca, jo me Juda oloogi pien gin onwoŋo ojeŋere i kom Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abija te ryemo yo Jeroboam, te wot mayo boma a jo Icrael mogo oko i baŋe, omao Betel kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, Jecana kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, Epron kede pacci ame tye i ŋete." 
2Chronicles13:20 I kare Abija luŋ, Jeroboam mom dok onwoŋo teko moro kadi acel ame romme lweny. Rwot ogoe, te to oko," 
2Chronicles13:21 Cite Abija omedde ameda i bedo atek, Onyomo mon apar wie aŋwen; gin te nywalle itino awobe pyeraryo wie aryo, kede anyira apar wie abicel." 
2Chronicles13:22 Kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame Abija obedo tiyo ame mom ocoo kan gin ame en obedo kobo, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk adwarpiny Iddo." 
2Chronicles14:1 Abija oto, te wot weo karacel kede kwari mere, ote yiko kome i paco a Daudi. Wode Aca en ame te leyo kakare, I kare mere luŋ lobo koŋ owe kun kuc tye iye pi mwakki apar." 
2Chronicles14:2 Aca rik obedo timo gin ame nen aber kede atira i nyim Rwot Obaŋa mere. 
2Chronicles14:3 En okwanyo keno lam me woro jogi orok oko, dok te mumuko ka woro jogi ame tye i wi kidi, kede gweŋe ame ocibo i ka woro jogi kun daŋ toŋo yen luŋ ame oguguro i ka woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera." 
2Chronicles14:4 En te ciko jo Juda ni myero ocak woro Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi, dok daŋ myero olub cikkere kede gin ame en ociko luŋ." 
2Chronicles14:5 Dok daŋ omumuko ka woro jogi luŋ ame rik tye i boma luŋ i Juda kede keno lam me waŋo odok a kur luŋ. I kare mere daŋ kuc obedo tye i Juda. 
2Chronicles14:6 En te gero boma ame ocecelo i Juda, pien lobo onwoŋo tye kede kuc. En mom olwenyo kadi acel i kare me loccere luŋ, pien Rwot omio kuc obedo tye i kare mere." 
2Chronicles14:7 En okobbi jo Juda ni, “Oger wunu boma magi oko, ote guro wunu oko apama cel, kun daŋ ogero iye udi mogo ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ, ame doggolagi tye kede kika ame ocegogi atek; lobe-ni gire pwod megwa, pien wan obedo timo gin ame obaŋawa mito, kun obino baŋe kare luŋ, omio en omiowa kuc tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi.” Gin te gero, ote daŋ lony atek meicel." 
2Chronicles14:8 Aca rik onwoŋo tye i mony ame romo tutumia mia adek ame onwoŋo oya i Juda, wegi kwode kede toŋi, kun otye kede ocirikale me mony ame oya i Benjamin, ame romo tutumia mia aryo kede pyeraboro ame tye i kwode kede atero; jo-no luŋ rik onwoŋo obedo jo ame tek meicel i lweny." 
2Chronicles14:9 Jera, dano me Eciopia, obino me obino lweny i komgi, kun tye kede ocirikale me lweny ame romo million acel, kede gadigadi me lweny mia adek; gin te bino naka i Mareca." 
2Chronicles14:10 Aca te wot lweny kede, kun gin doŋ oryeye me lweny oko i luŋ me Jepata i Mareca." 
2Chronicles14:11 Aca te cwayo koko mere baŋ Rwot Obaŋa mere, kun kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, mom tye gire ŋattoro ame rom kedi ame twero konyo jo agoro i lweny i jo atek. Konywa, Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, pien wan ojeŋere i komi, wan obino i nyim jo man adwoŋ wok-ki kede nyiŋi. Ama Rwot, yin gire ibedo Obaŋawa; kur iye dano oloi.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Rwot te miyo Aca kede jo Juda, loyo jo Eciopia oko, jo Eciopia te mukere oko i ŋwec," 
2Chronicles14:13 Aca kede monnyere te ryemo yorgi naka i Gerar; jo Eciopia te to luŋ ame moro mom te doŋ kadi acel, pien onwoŋo doŋ onyobere oko i nyim Rwot kede monnyere, Jo Juda te yeye i lwak jami ayaka apipim." 
2Chronicles14:14 Gin te jwero jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i boma luŋ ame tye i ŋet Gerar, pien onwoŋo Rwot omio lworo omako jo i kuno. Gin te yako jami i boma-nogo luŋ, pien jami ayaka onwoŋo dwoŋ atek i yigi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Gin te cobo mony i kom okwattogo ame onwoŋo bedo i kema ame rik tye kede dok, ote tero rommi apipim kede inaga daŋ. Gin doŋ te dok i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Cuny Obaŋa te bino i kom Ajaria wot Obed," 
2Chronicles15:2 omio en te wot rwatte kede Aca, te kobbe ni, “Tim ber iwiny koppa, yin abaka Aca, karacel kede wun jo Juda kede Benjamin luŋ. Rwot bedo kedwu ka ce wun daŋ ibedo wunu baŋe. Ka ce ibedo wunu yenye, ibino nwoŋe wunu, ento ka ce iya wunu oko i baŋe, en daŋ bino kwerowu oko." 
2Chronicles15:3 Jo Icrael obedo aboŋo Obaŋa me ateni pi kare alac, kun olamdog ame pwonygi daŋ mom, dok cikkoro daŋ pe;" 
2Chronicles15:4 cite i kare ame gin tye kede peko adwoŋ, ka gin olokere baŋ Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael, kun omito dok baŋe, gin onwoŋe." 
2Chronicles15:5 I kare-nono luŋ onwoŋo ŋattoro i akinagi mom tye kede kuc me wot kannoro onyo me dwogo paco pien ayelayela onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel baŋ jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo luŋ. 
2Chronicles15:6 Apokapoka onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel, rok onwoŋo lwenyo i rok, kun boma man lwenyo i boma ocele, pien Obaŋa onwoŋo obedo yelogi kede kite me can apapat." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ento wun myero ibed wunu kede cuny ame tek! Kur inyobere wunu pien obino culowu pi gin ame itio wunu.” 
2Chronicles15:8 Kare ame Aca owinyo kop luŋ ame adwarpiny Ajaria wot Obed orabo, cunye odoko atek, en te cako kwanyo cal jogi luŋ ame ipyeda ame onwoŋo tye i lobo Juda kede Benjamin, kede i boma luŋ ame onwoŋo en omao i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim, te yiko keno lam a Rwot ame rik onwoŋo tye i doggola me donyo i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles15:9 En te coko jo Juda kede jo Benjamin luŋ kede jo ame onwoŋo oya i Epraim, Manace, kede Cimeon, ame onwoŋo bedo i akinagi, pien jo apol meicel onwoŋo odak oko baŋe pien gin oneno ni Rwot tye ka tic kede." 
2Chronicles15:10 Gin luŋ ocokere i Jerucalem i dwe me adek, i mwaka me apar wie abic me loc Aca." 
2Chronicles15:11 Gin te yalo Rwot kede mot i ninonono, kun motgi-nono okwanyo i kom jami ame yam gin oyako ote kelo; gin oyale i twoni mia abiro kede nyogi rommi tutumia abiro." 
2Chronicles15:12 Gin dok te cikere i nino-nono me woro Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi, kun owore i cunygi luŋ, kede tipogi luŋ;" 
2Chronicles15:13 dok daŋ ni ŋattoro keken ame mom bino woro Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael, obino neko oko, kadi atin onyo dano adwoŋ, ico onyo dako," 
2Chronicles15:14 Gin te kwoŋ baŋ Rwot kun oredo i dwoŋ aloŋo, ame owo awoa, daŋ okuto apel kede bilo." 
2Chronicles15:15 Jo Juda luŋ cunygi te bedo ayom i kwoŋŋono, pien gin onwoŋo okwoŋo kede cunygi ducu, ote daŋ cako wore kun otye i mit adwoŋ meicel, Rwot daŋ te gamogi, te miyogi, kuc i kabedo luŋ ame omanogi." 
2Chronicles15:16 Abaka Aca te ryemo anaka tottere oko i dittere me bedo tota abaka, pien onwoŋo en otio cal jok ame ipyeda a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera. Aca ototoŋo cal jokkono oko, te wot waŋo oko i ŋet kulo me Kidron." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kadi bed en mom omumuko ka woro jogi ame tye i wi kiddi malo; cite en omedde keto gennere i kom Rwot pi kare me kwo mere luŋ," 
2Chronicles15:18 En okelo mot a rik pappere otyeko jalo baŋ Rwot karacel kede mege ame en ojalo, acalo jabu, ryal kede jami ocele, te ketogi i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles15:19 Lweny te dok koŋ bedo pe tuno kede naka i mwaka me pyeradek wie abic me loccere. 
2Chronicles16:1 I mwaka me pyeradek wie abicel me loc Aca, Baaca abaka a jo Icrael owoto te wot cobo mony i kom jo Juda, en te mako boma me Rama, te daŋ celo oko me geŋo jo wot i Juda baŋ abaka Aca kede jo Juda me wot kannoro ocele," 
2Chronicles16:2 Aca te kwanyo ryal kede jabu ame rik tye i ot kano lim a Rwot, kede en ame onwoŋo tye i ot kano lim abaka, te cwayo baŋ Ben-adad, abaka me Curia, ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Damaciko, kun kobbe ni," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Tim ber iye ocikere kedi, kite ame rik kwarona kede kwaroni otimo, Nen ba, an acwayi ryal kede jabu. Tim ber iwot itur cikereni oko i Baaca abaka me Icrael, me en bin kwany monnyere oko.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Ben-adad daŋ te winyo gin ame Aca okobbe, te cako cwayo odoŋe ame telo monnyere me ero wot lweny i kom pacci mogo me Icrael, eka te mayo Ijon, Dan, Abel-Maim, kede boma luŋ me kano cam i lobo Naputali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Kare ame Baaca owinyo, oweko celo Rama oko, t i ccere te daŋ gik oko," 
2Chronicles16:6 Abaka Aca te wot i jo Juda luŋ, te wot weko gweŋe me Rama kede bayi luŋ, ame Baaca obedo tic kedgi me celo Rama, eka te lunyo celo i Ceba kede Mijipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 I kare-nono Kanani, aran-piny, te bino baŋ Aca abaka me Juda, te kobbe ni, “Pien yin ilunyo keto genni i kom abaka me Curia akaka keto genni i kom Rwot Obaŋani, omio mony abaka me Curia obwot oko i ciŋi." 
2Chronicles16:8 Mony a jo Eciopia kede me a jo Libia mom rik onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel, kun daŋ otye kede gadigadi apipim kede wegi aguragura daŋ? Kadi bed amannono, pien yin ibedo kede gen i kom Rwot, omio Rwot omiogi i ciŋi." 
2Chronicles16:9 Pien Rwot neno kabedo luŋ i wi lobo, me wek elweny pi jo ame mom i balloro i cunygi i kome. Kan doŋ yin itimo tim me miŋo meicel, pien cakere amanni wot kede anyim yin ibino bedo lweny alwenya.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Akemo te mako Aca meicel i kom aranpiny, omake te kete i ot kol kun otweo tyene kede tol, pien cunye onwoŋo owaŋ i kome pi kop man. Dok te keto can i kom jo mogo i akina lwak i kare acellono." 
2Chronicles16:11 Kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame Aca otimo a mom ocoo kan, cakere iyi ageyi naka i agikki, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom oloc me Juda kede Icrael." 
2Chronicles16:12 I mwaka me pyeradek wie aboŋwen me loccere, two moro rik te mako tyene, two-nono te medde atek meicel, kadi amannono, i kare ame en two-nono mom daŋ aporo pi lokere baŋ Rwot ento te wirre ka baŋ daktal." 
2Chronicles16:13 Aca oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, en oto i mwaka me pyeraŋwen wie acel me loccere," 
2Chronicles16:14 Oyiko kome i lyel ame rik en i kome okunyo pire kene i paco a Daudi. Gin opyelo kome i gin ame rik oyiko me yike, kun oketo iye kite odok a ŋwecgi kur apapat ame odiro a yiko moo wir oyiko; gin dok te kuto twon mac adwoŋ meicel me nyuto worogi i kome." 
2Chronicles17:1 Wode Yekocafati en ame te leyo kakare en Aca, en te yikere doŋ atek meicel i lweny i jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles17:2 En oketo monnyere luŋ i boma ame ocecelo luŋ ame tye i Juda te daŋ keto mony i kabedo luŋ ame tye i Juda kede i boma luŋ ame tye i lobo me Epraim ame rik pappere Aca omao. 
2Chronicles17:3 Rwot obedo gwoko Yekocafati, pien obedo lubo kite a pappere ame rik koŋ ogeo bedo kede; en gire mom obedo woro Baal," 
2Chronicles17:4 En obedo keto gire gennere i kom Obaŋa a pappere, kun daŋ lubo cikkere luŋ, En mom obedo lubo kite a jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles17:5 Mannono omio Rwot te moko loccere atek meicel, kun jo me Juda luŋ kelo mot baŋ Yekocafati; en te doko twon alonyo meicel, kun daŋ jo wore atek," 
2Chronicles17:6 En obedo lo a cunye tek meicel i lubo gin a Rwot mito; dok daŋ omumuko ka woro jogi luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i wi kiddi, tek kwanyo daŋ jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera oko i Juda." 
2Chronicles17:7 I mwaka me adek me loccere en ocwao rwode mere magi me wot pwony i boma luŋ me Juda: Ben-kail, Obadia, Jekaria, Netanel kede Mikaya;" 
2Chronicles17:8 ocwao daŋ Olevi magi owoto karacel kedgi: Cemaya; Netania, Jebadia, Acael, Cemiramot, Yekonatan, Adonija, Tobija, kede Tobadonija, karacel kede olamdog magi: Elicama kede Jekoram." 
2Chronicles17:9 Jo man te bedo pwony i Juda, kun otye i buk me cik a Rwot; gin owowota i boma me Juda luŋ kun opwonyo jo." 
2Chronicles17:10 Loc apapat luŋ ame onwoŋo omano Juda te cako bedo kede lworo oko i kom Rwot, mom dok ote tiŋere me lweny i Yekocafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Jo mogo me Piriciti te kelli Yekocafati ryal adwoŋ meicel karacel kede mot ocele mege; jo Arab daŋ te kelle nyogi rommi tutumia abiro, i mia abiro kede nyogi dyegi tutumia abiro i mia abiro." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yekocafati te medde ameda i doko twon lo moro adwoŋ meicel. En te gero kabedo ame ocecelo atek kede boma me kano jami i Juda luŋ. 
2Chronicles17:13 En ogero daŋ kagi-mogo ame romo kano jami adwoŋ meicel i Juda. En onwoŋo tye ocirikale atek meicel i lweny i Jerucalem. 
2Chronicles17:14 Welgi ame okwano kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi onwoŋo tye kit man: Otel wi mony ame onwoŋo telo jo tutumia me doggola a Juda onwoŋo obedo: Adna, atel wi mony, kede twoni jo ame tek i lweny ame romotutumia mia adek." 
2Chronicles17:15 Me aryo te bedo Yekokanan, atel wi mony, kede twoni jo atek i lweny ame romo tutumia mia aryo kede pyeraboro nono," 
2Chronicles17:16 Eka me adek te bedo Amacia wot a Jikri, ame omiye kede me tic me ot a Rwot ame onwoŋo daŋ tye kede twoni mere atek i lweny ame romo tutumia mia aryo." 
2Chronicles17:17 Eka i doggola a Benjamin, te bedo Aliada, ame en obedo twon lo moro atek meicel i lweny, kun tye ocirikale ame tek i lweny ame romo tutumia mia aryo, ame gin luŋ otye i kwot kede atero." 
2Chronicles17:18 Me aryo te bedo Yekojabad ame onwoŋo tye ocirikale ame oterre oko i jami lweny, ame romo tutumia mia acel kede pyeraboro nono." 
2Chronicles17:19 Jo magi onwoŋo obedo jo ame tio pi abaka, medo kede i kom mony ame abaka oketo i boma ame ocecelo atek i Juda luŋ." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yekocafati rik onwoŋo tye kede lonyo adwoŋ meicel, kun daŋ jo woro meicel; en te cako yiko kop me nyommi wode nyaka Akab." 
2Chronicles18:2 Kare ame mwaka okato anonok, Yekocafati te wot baŋ Akab i Camaria, Akab rik te jole aber meicel kede jo ame onwoŋo owoto kede; onekke rommi kede twoni apipim, Akab te cako kobbe ni myero owot ocak lweny i kom boma me Ramot-gilead." 
2Chronicles18:3 En te penyo Yekocafati ni, “Ibino wot kedwa me wot lweny i kom Ramot-gilead?” En te gamo ni, “Jamina luŋ obedo megi, an amegi, jona daŋ megi. Wan obino bedo kedwu i lweny.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Yekocafati te kobo baŋ abaka me Icrael ni, “Koŋ ige penyo Rwot, me owiny ŋo ame en bino kobo.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Abaka me Icrael te cako coko odwarpiny luŋ karacel, ame romo jo mia aŋwen twal, te kobbigi ni, “Awot alweny i kom Ramot-gilead onyo kur awot kuno?” Odwarpiny te gamo ni, “Woti; pien Obaŋa bino miyo i ciŋi yin abaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Cite Yekocafati te dok kobo ni, “Adwarpinnyoro ocele ame obedo me a Rwot mom tye kan, me koŋ dok openy?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Abaka me Icrael te gamo ni, “Otye kede lo moro ocele ame olwoŋo ni Mikaya ame otwero penyo kop a Rwot i baŋe, en obedo wot a Imla; cite an cunya mom mito dano-nono kadi acel, pien en kom mom ru otyeto kopporo aber pira, kare luŋ tyeto kop a mom ber keken.” Yekocafati te gamo ni, “Pe amannono abaka, wek kur ikob amannono.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Abaka me Icrael te lwoŋo adwoŋŋoro me mony te kobbe ni, “Wot ilwoŋo Mikaya wot a Imla ru bino oyotoyot.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 I caa-nono onwoŋo abaka me Icrael kede Yekocafati abaka me Juda tye obedo i wi komgi me loc, kun oruko boŋŋigi me kwogo, ote bedo kede i laro moyo kal ame onwoŋo tye i ŋet dogcel me donyo i boma me Camaria, kun odwarpiny luŋ tye atyet i nyimgi." 
2Chronicles18:10 Jedekia wot a Kenaana otio cal tuŋ lee me nyonyo, te kobo ni, “Rwot okobo ni, ‘Yin ibino coro jo Curia i tuŋ acalo magi tuno waŋ ame ijwerogi ducu.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Odwarpiny luŋ te tyet kittono, kun ŋat acel acel kobo ni, “Woti i Ramot-gilead me iwot ilo; Rwot bino miyo gire i ciŋi, yin abaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Lo ame onwoŋo owoto lwoŋo Mikaya, obino te kobbi Mikaya ni, “Nen ba, kop odwarpiny luŋ cukoro ka cuny abaka; mi koppi daŋ bed ame rom aroma kede megi ame cukoro cuny abaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Mikaya te gamo ni, “Kite a Rwot tye kede kwo-ni, gin ame Obaŋana bino kobo, en ame an abino kobo.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Kare ame en doŋ obino baŋ abaka, abaka okobbe ni, “Mikaya we, owot olweny i kom jo me Ramot-gilead onyo kur owoti?” Mikaya te gamo ni, “Wot kuno me iwot ilo lweny; obino miyogi i ciŋi.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Ento abaka dok te kobbe ni, “An abino ciki tyen adi ni myero ikobba ka kop ateni keken i nyiŋ Rwot?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaya dok te kobo ni, “Anene jo Icrael tye oket atata i wi kiddi calo rommi ame akwatgi mom; dok Rwot daŋ okobo ni, ‘Adwoŋ ame loo jo man gire mom tye, wek ŋat acel acel odok gire paco mere i kuc’.”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Abaka me Icrael te kobo baŋ Yekocafati ni, “An mom onwoŋo akobbi ni Mikaya mom twero tyeto kopporo aber i koma koŋo ka en arac keken?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya dok te gamo ni, “Koŋ doŋ iwiny kop a Rwot: Aneno Rwot tye obedo i wi kom me loccere kun mony me polo luŋ tye ocuŋ i ciŋe me tuŋ cam kede tuŋ cem," 
2Chronicles18:19 Eka Rwot te kobo ni, ‘Ŋa ame bino bwobwolo Akab abaka me Icrael me wot to i Ramot-gilead?’ Jo luŋ te bedo kobo kop apapat." 
2Chronicles18:20 Cuny Acil te bino anyim, te bino cuŋ i nyim Rwot, te kobo ni, ‘An abino bwobwolo en.’ Rwot te penye ni, ‘Ibino bwolle i yore aŋo?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 En te gamo ni, ‘An abino wot kuno, ate wot miyo cuny arac me goba bed iyi odwarpinnyere luŋ.’ Rwot te kobo ni, ‘Yin ibino bwobwolo en, ibino cobo tici gire; wot doŋ oko kuno, me iwot itim kittono.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Doŋ aman ba, Rwot doŋ otyeko keto cuny arac me goba iyi odwarpinyi-ni, Rwot okobo kop arac i komi.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Jedekia wot a Kenaana owoto baŋ Mikaya te bapo leme kede ciŋe, kun kobo ni, “Cuny a Rwot oya i baŋa i yore aŋo te kobo baŋi kop kedi?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya te gamo ni, “Nen ba, ibino neno man i nino ame ibino wot pono iyi icika i tyelo.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Abaka me Icrael te kobo ni, “Mak wunu Mikaya idwok wunu baŋ Amon, ame gabuna me boma kede Yowaci wot abaka;" 
2Chronicles18:26 me iwot ikobbigi wunu ni, ‘Abaka okobo ni, Ket wunu dano man i buc, mie wunu ecam cam ame obuc camo, kun imie wunu ogati kede pii keken tuno wan ame an adwogo paco kede kuc.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya te gamo ni, “Ka ce idwogo paco i kuc, mom Rwot oko bo keda.” Dok te medo ni, “Wun lwak luŋ myero iwiny wunu!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Abaka me Icrael kede Yekocafati abaka me Juda te wot i Ramot-gilead. 
2Chronicles18:29 Abaka me Icrael te kobo baŋ Yekocafati ni, “An aruko boŋo apat acalo dano moro ata, ate wot kede i lweny, ento yin myero iruk rukki me loc.” Abaka me Icrael te ruko boŋo mere apat; gin te wot lweny." 
2Chronicles18:30 Abaka me Curia onwoŋo ociko odoŋe ame loo gadigadi mere ni, “Kur ilweny wunu i kom ŋattoro ocele kadi dwoŋ onyo tidi, cite myero ilweny wunu abaka me Icrael.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Doŋ i kare ame odoŋe aloo gadigadi oneno Yekocafati, gin okobo ni abaka me Icrael ene. Gin te cako lweny kede oko, Yekocafati te mwoco koko oko, Rwot te konye daŋ oko. Obaŋa te miyogi weke oko," 
2Chronicles18:32 pien i kare odoŋe ame loo gadigadi oniaŋ ni en mom obedo abaka me Icrael, gin te doŋ weko ryemo yore oko." 
2Chronicles18:33 Ento lo moro te telo atero mere bayo ata, te celo abaka me Icrael; atero mere te poto i akina nyonyo geŋo kore kede nyonyo ocele me geŋo kome ame onwoŋo calo pok rec. Abaka te kobbi lo ame onwoŋo aryemo gadigadi mere ni myero lokere dok kede cen pien owane oko." 
2Chronicles18:34 Lweny rik te bedo agwa meicel i nino-nono, abaka me Icrael te bedo jeŋere kene i kom gadigadi mere kun nyime oneno jo Curia tuno otyeno; eka te to oko ame ceŋ apoto." 
2Chronicles19:1 Yekocafati abaka me Juda te dok gire aber nak i paco mere i Jerucalem. 
2Chronicles19:2 Yeko wot a Kanani ame obedo aran-piny rik te wot baŋe me wot rwatte kede, te kobbe ni, “Itwero konyo otim tim areco, kun daŋ imaro giri jo ame dago Rwot? Pien yin giri itimo mannono, akemo doŋ omako Rwot oko i komi," 
2Chronicles19:3 Kadi bed amannono, tye gigi mogo abeco ame yin itimo, pien yin ityeko puputo yen ame oguro me woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera oko i lobo, dok daŋ itemo keto cunyi itiyo gin ame Obaŋa mito.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Yekocafati onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem; cite owoto i akina jo, ya i Beerceba wot kede naka i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim eka te miyo cuny jo dok i kom Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi." 
2Chronicles19:5 En te keto oŋolkop i boma acel acel ame ocelo atek, en otimo man i lobo me Juda luŋ," 
2Chronicles19:6 eka te kobbi oŋolkop ni, “Myero igwokere wunu i tic ame itio wunu, pien mom iŋolo wunu kop pi dano, ento pi Rwot; en tye karacel kedwu i kare ame nwoŋo iŋolo wunu kop." 
2Chronicles19:7 Doŋ ba, myero ibed wunu kede lworo i kom Rwot, kun iketo wunu cunywu meicel i gin ame itio wunu, pien Rwot Obaŋawa mom mito ni bal ŋolo kop kakare, akadi leŋere i ŋolo kop, onyo gamo lim me wil i muŋ.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Aco i Jerucalem Yekocafati te keto iye Olevi mogo, olamdog kede odoŋe atekere ame loo doggola acel acel iyi Icrael luŋ, me bedo oŋolkop pi Rwot, kede tyeko pyemmogo i akina jo. Jo man luŋ onwoŋo otyeko kopgi i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles19:9 En te cikogi ni, “Bed wunu i lworo i kom Rwot i dog ticwu, dok daŋ myero iti wunu i cunywu ducu, kun igenne wunu." 
2Chronicles19:10 Ka ce ominwu moro ame bedo i boma moro me Juda okelo pido mere i nyimwu ame mako onyo remo, cik Obaŋa, icwil onyo gin ame Obaŋa ociko, wun myeroipwony wunugi aber, me kur okel balloro i komgi i nyim Rwot, me akemo Obaŋa kur pot i komwu, kede i kom omegowu. Ibino timo wunu amannono me kur ikel wunu roccoro." 
2Chronicles19:11 Nen ba, Amaria ame obedo alamdog adwoŋ en ame bino loyowu i kopporo luŋ ame obedo me a Rwot, Jebadia wot Icmael, gabuna ame loo Juda, en ame bino loyo kopporo luŋ ame mako abaka; aco Olevi bino konyowu acalo orani me coyo kop luŋ ame jo pido. Ti wunu ticwu i tekcuny, Rwot myero bed i jo a cunygi atira.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Icennere jo Moab kede jo Ammon karacel kede jo mogo me Meun te bino ero lweny i kom Yekocafati. 
2Chronicles20:2 Jo mogo owoto baŋ Yekocafati te ero kobbe ni, “Lwak mony ecipan tye aciro loka nam tuŋ ca, kun oya Edom me bino lweny kedi; nen, aman doŋ otuno oko i Kajajon-tamar.” (Man en nyiŋ En-gedi ocele mere.)" 
2Chronicles20:3 Lworo omako Yekocafati, eka te ya wot penyo Rwot, en te ciko ni jo myero cak kanyo kec i Juda luŋ." 
2Chronicles20:4 Jo luŋ te cokere karacel, ote kwayo kony i baŋ Rwot. Jo me boma luŋ ame tye i Juda obino me bino kwayo Rwot ni konygi." 
2Chronicles20:5 Yekocafati te ya cuŋ i nyim lwak me Juda kede Jerucalem ame onwoŋo ocokere i ot a Rwot, i nyim dyekal anyen," 
2Chronicles20:6 te cako kwayo Obaŋa ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwa, mom yin ibedo Obaŋa ame ibedo malo i polo? Mom yin en ame iloo rok luŋ ame tye i te loc apapat ame tye i wi podo? Teko kede twer tye gire i ciŋi, ame mom tye ŋattoro ame romo cuŋ i i nyimi," 
2Chronicles20:7 Mom yin ibedo Obaŋawa ame rik oryemo jo ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo man i nyim joni Icrael, ite miyo me bedo lobo ikwae a dyeri Abram twal?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Gin obedo iye, ote gero kabedo me wori iye, kun okobo ni," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Ka ce ginnoro arac otimere i komwa, acalo lweny, onyo lweny ame obino me cobo kop ame yin iŋolo i komwa, onyo too edeke onyo kec, wan obino cuŋ i nyimi i nyim ot man, me wori i ot man, kun obako dogwa baŋi pi can ame opoto i komwa, yin ibino winyo ite larowa.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 Aco aman koŋ inen jo Ammon, jo Moab kede jo me kidi Ceir, ame yin rik mom iye ni jo Icrael cob mony i komgi i kare ame gin obino i lobo me Miciri, ame gin daŋ te wekogi doŋ kun mom ojwerogi." 
2Chronicles20:11 Koŋ inen kite ame gin doŋ abino me bino culowa iryemowa i lobo ame obedo megi ame yin Obaŋa ame rik imiowa me bedo megwa," 
2Chronicles20:12 Ama Obaŋawa, mom ibino ŋolligi kop? Pien wan giwa mom otye kede teko me lweny i lwak mony adwoŋ a rom man ame tye ka bino me bino lweny kedwa ca. Wan aman mom oŋeo gin ame myero otim, cite waŋwa tye i komi yin.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Jo me Juda luŋ, karacel kede otinogi kede mongi onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i nyim Rwot." 
2Chronicles20:14 Cuny Obaŋa te bino i kom Alevi moro i nyim lwak kannono, Alevi-nono nyiŋe onwoŋo Jakajiel wot a Jekaria, ame obedo wot a Benayo, wot a Jeyel wot a Mattania en onwoŋo Alevi me doggola Acap," 
2Chronicles20:15 En te kobo ni, koŋ icik wunu yitwu, wun jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem, kede abaka Yekocafati, Rwot okobo ni, “Kur ilwor wunu, cunywu daŋ kur poti i kom twon mony adwoŋ woku, pien lweny gire mom obedo megwu, ento me Obaŋa." 
2Chronicles20:16 Diki wot ilweny wunu kedgi, nen ba, gin abino kun obedo malo i wi tur me Jij; ibino nwoŋo wunugi kan ame luŋ ogik iye, i tutuŋ kide me tim eme Jeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Wun mom ibino lweny wunu; wun wot ite wot cuŋ wunu i kabedowu mot, wun inen wunu kite ame Rwot tye ka loyo kede lweny pirwu, wun jo me Juda kede Jerucalem. Kur ilwor wunu, cunywu kur poti; diki myero iwot ilweny wunu kedgi, Rwot gire bino bedo kedwu.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Yekocafati te ryebere piny kun nyime gudo lobo, jo Juda kede Jerucalem luŋ te oonyere piny i nyim Rwot, kun owore," 
2Chronicles20:19 Eka jo Levi me doggola a Kokat kede me doggola a Kora te ya malo pako Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael i dwoŋ aloŋo meicel. 
2Chronicles20:20 Orwo mere, gin te dilo ibayi, ote wot naka i tim me Tekoa, Kare ame gin tye doŋ awot. Yekocafati te cuŋ kun kobo ni, “Wun jo Juda kede Jerucalem, winy wunu koppa! Myero iye wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, bino miyo icuŋ wunu atek; ye wunu kop odwarpinnyere, bino miyo iloo wunu.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 I kare ame en doŋ otyeko penyo tam i baŋ lwak, en te yero jo ame myero wer wer me pako Rwot, kun oruko rukgi acil otelo kede nyim mony, ame ower ni, “Pwo wunu Rwot, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino atwal.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Kare ame gin ogeo wero wer me pako Rwot, Rwot omio mony opono me kuro mony a jo Ammon, Moab kede me a jo me Kidi Ceir, ame onwoŋo obino me bino lweny i kom jo Juda, te babaŋogi oko." 
2Chronicles20:23 Pien omio jo Ammon kede jo Moab ocako lweny i kom jo me Kidi Ceir, ote jwerogi oko luŋ. I kare ame gin doŋ otyeko jo me Ceir luŋ, gin dok te cako nekere kengi kengi." 
2Chronicles20:24 Kare ame jo Juda oyito malo kan ocuŋ iguŋ me neno okwor, ame onwoŋo tye i tim, gin obolo waŋgi kun ame mony onwoŋo tye iye apipim; gin te neno kom jo oto tye oradde atata piny i lobo ame moro mom obwot kadi acel." 
2Chronicles20:25 Kare ame Yekocafati kede lwakere obino me bino yako jamigi, gin te nwoŋo dok adwoŋ meicel, kede jami, boŋŋi, gigi mogo me wel, ame gin te bedo coko tuno ka doŋ mom oromo yeyo. Coko jami ayaka oterigi nino adek twal, pien jami onwoŋo dwoŋ okato kare." 
2Chronicles20:26 I nino me aŋwennere, gin te wot cokere i luŋ me Pwoc, gin te bedo pwoyo Rwot kuno; omio nyiŋ kaci-naca pwod olwoŋo ni luŋ me Pwoc naka atot tin."
