2Chronicles20:27 Gin luŋ doŋ ote dok oko cen, jo Juda kede jo Jerucalem luŋ, kun Yekocafati en ame telo yo. Owoto i Jerucalem ame olelo meicel, pien Rwot omiogi olelo pi loyo okworgi." 
2Chronicles20:28 Gin te bino i Jerucalem, kun ogoo naŋa kede naŋa opuk, okuto daŋ apel naka i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles20:29 Loc apapat me lobo te bedo i lworo meicel i kom Rwot ka gin owinyo ni Rwot olwenyo okwor a jo Icrael. 
2Chronicles20:30 Mannono te miyo lobo ame tye i te Yekocafati bedo mot aboŋo ayela moro, pien Obaŋa mere omie weo i kabedo luŋ ame omano ŋet lobo mere." 
2Chronicles20:31 Yekocafati rik te loyo lobo Juda kittono. Mwaka me dittere onwoŋo romo pyeradek wie abic kare ame en doko aloc me Juda; en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki ame romo pyeraryo wie abic. Nyiŋ tottere Ajuba ame obedo nyaka a Cilki. 
2Chronicles20:32 En te bedo lubo kit a pappere Aca, kun mom ya iye kadi acel, en obedo tiyo gin ame nen aber baŋ Rwot." 
2Chronicles20:33 Ka woro jogi ame onwoŋo tye i wi kiddi malo, mom gire obin omumuko; cuny jo onwoŋo mom ru tye i kom Obaŋa akwarigi." 
2Chronicles20:34 Kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame Yekocafati obedo timo, cakere i ageyi naka i agikki, gin luŋ tye ocoo i tekwaro a Yeko wot a Kanani, ame tye i buk obakki me Icrael." 
2Chronicles20:35 Icennere Yekocafati abaka me Juda te ribere gin kede Akajia, abaka me Icrael, ame obedo timo timmogo areco." 
2Chronicles20:36 En te ribere kede i payo mellogo ame woto i Tarcic, ote daŋ dok payo mellogo i Ejion-geber." 
2Chronicles20:37 Eliejer wot a Dodavaku me Mareca te rabo kop Obaŋa i kom Yekocafati, kun kobo ni. “Pien iribere wun kede Akajia, Rwot bino rwobo gin ame itio oko.” Mel luŋ te tur oko, ame mom dok oromo wot i Tarcic." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yekocafati te to wot weo karacel i kwari mere, ote yiko kome karacel i kwari mere i paco a Daudi. Wode Jekoram en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles21:2 En rik onwoŋo tye kede omego mere ame gin luŋ obedo awobe a Yekocafati, abaka me Juda: Ajaria, Jekiel, Jekaria, Ajaria, Mikael, kede Cepatia." 
2Chronicles21:3 Papagi rik omio mot adoŋodoŋo, omiogi ryal, jabu, jami mogo abeco me wel, kede boma mogo ame ocecelo atek i Juda; ento loc te miyo baŋ Jekoram, pien onwoŋo obedo wode me kao." 
2Chronicles21:4 Kare ame Jekoram doŋ oleo kom me loc a pappere, ame loccere daŋ doŋ omoko atek, en oneko omego mere luŋ i pala lweny, karacel kede rwode mogo me Icrael." 
2Chronicles21:5 En ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeradek wie aryo, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki aboro." 
2Chronicles21:6 Dako mere rik obedo nyaka Akab, mannono omio en te bedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot kite ame Obakki me Icrael obedo timo, kun lubo gin ame jo me ot Akab obedo timo." 
2Chronicles21:7 Ento Rwot mom te mito tyeko ot a Daudi pi cikereame rik ecikere kede gin kede Daudi kede dok pien rik doŋ etyeko ciko oko ni ebino miyo ikwae en ame bedo i wi kom me loc nakanaka. 
2Chronicles21:8 I kare mere en ame jo Edom ojem kede i kom loc me Juda, eka ote keto abakagi kengi." 
2Chronicles21:9 Mannono rik te miyo Jekoram ya wot loka karacel kede odoŋe me monnyere, kede odoŋe ame loo gadigadi lwennyere luŋ, eka te ya dyewor cako lweny i kom jo Edom ame onwoŋo ogure oko dyere karacel kede odoŋe ame onwoŋo loo gadigadi me lwennyere." 
2Chronicles21:10 Cakere i kare-nono tuno kede tin, jo Edom te doŋ bedo loye kengi kun ojem ajema i loc me Juda. I kare-nono daŋ boma me Libina daŋ ojem kede i kom loccere, pien onwoŋo en oweko Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa a kwari mere." 
2Chronicles21:11 Medo i kom mannono, en onwoŋo ogero ka woro jogi i wi kiddi i lobo obedo kidikidi me Juda, eka te miyo jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem kwero lubo cik a Rwot, dok te miyo Juda daŋ gak oko." 
2Chronicles21:12 En te nwoŋo waraga ame oya i baŋ adwarpiny Elia, ame ocoye, kun kobo ni, “Rwot Obaŋa a pappi Daudi okobo ni, Pien yin mom ibedo lubo gin ame pappi Yekocafati obedo timo, akadi lubo en ame Aca abaka me Juda obedo lubo," 
2Chronicles21:13 cite yin giri ite bedo lubo kite obakki me Icrael, dok daŋ ite miyo jo Juda kede jo Jerucalem kwero winyo cik a Rwot, kite amejo me ot Akab omio jo Icrael okwero kede winyo cik a Rwot, dok daŋ ineko-gu omegoni i kokome me ot a pappi, ame onwoŋo kitegi beco kati yin oko," 
2Chronicles21:14 nen ba, Rwot bino miyo can apek meicel poto i kom joni, itinoni, monni, kede i kom jamini luŋ," 
2Chronicles21:15 dok yin i komi daŋ two arac meicel bino maki, kun omako naka ciŋ yi luŋ, tuno waŋ ame amontenni luŋ owukere oko pi two-nono ame mom bino weki kare akadi nino moro acel.”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Rwot te tugo akemo a jo Piriciti kede me a jo Arab ame ceggi i jo Eciopia, gin te cako lweny i kom Jekoram," 
2Chronicles21:17 Gin te bino lweny i kom Juda, ote daŋ mayo oko, ote yako jami luŋ ame gin onwoŋo i ot abaka, kun oyako daŋ anaka awobe mere kede monnere, ote weko ka wode acel keken doŋ. Yekoyakaji ame obedo wode me cogo." 
2Chronicles21:18 A doŋ magi luŋ otimere, Rwot te goyo Jekoram, omio too arac a mom can opoto i cin yie." 
2Chronicles21:19 Kare ame en obedo yelle i too-nono pi mwakki aryo, two-nono te miyo amontennere wukere oko, te to oko i twon rem adwoŋ meicel. Jo mere mom okuto maccoro i lyellere me nyuto woro baŋe kite ame rik otimo i me a kwari mere." 
2Chronicles21:20 Mwaka me dittere doŋ onwoŋo oromo pyeradek wie aryo i kare ame en cako loc, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki oboro; ŋattoro mom gire oparo to mere. Gin te yiko kome i paco a Daudi, cite mom i lyel ame oyiko iye obakki." 
2Chronicles22:1 Jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem te yero Akajia, wode me cogo te bedo abaka kakare; pien mony a jo ame rik obino i gony karacel kede jo Arab rik onwoŋo oneko awobe mere adoŋo luŋ, Mannono te miyo Akajia wot a Jekoram, abaka me Juda doko abaka." 
2Chronicles22:2 Mwaka Akajia me dittere onwoŋo doŋ oromo pyeraŋwen wie aryo i kare ame en ocako loc, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka acel. Nyiŋ tottere rik onwoŋo Atalia, ame rik obedo akwar Omri." 
2Chronicles22:3 En daŋ obedo lubo kite a jo me ot Akab, pien tottere en ame rik obedo miye tam me timo tim areco." 
2Chronicles22:4 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kite ame jo me ot Akab obedo timo; pien i kare ame pappere oto gin jo me ot Akab en ame te bedo jo ame mie tam naka omie opoto." 
2Chronicles22:5 En owinyo tamgi, te wot gin kede Joram wot Akab, abaka me Icrael me wot lweny i kom Kajael me Curia i Ramot-gilead. Jo Curia te wano Jekoram," 
2Chronicles22:6 Joram te dwogo cen i boma me Jejreel me wot twoye kuno, iyi awano ame owane kede i Rama i kare me lwenyi i Kajael, abaka me Curia. Akajia wot a Jekoram abaka me Juda rik te wot limo Joram wot Akab i Jejreel, pien onwoŋo two." 
2Chronicles22:7 Obaŋa onwoŋo doŋ otyeko yiko ni Akajia myero to i yo wottere me wot limo Joram, Pien i kare ame en otuno kuno, en owoto gin kede Joram me wot rwatte i Yeko wot a Nimci, ame onwoŋo Obaŋa doŋ otyeko miya twer me jwero jo me ot Akab." 
2Chronicles22:8 Doŋ i kare ame Yeko rik onwoŋo tye acobo kop ame Obaŋa oŋolo i kom jo me ot Akab, en orwatte i rwode mogo me Juda kede itino omego Akajia, ame tio baŋ Akajia, eka te nekogi oko." 
2Chronicles22:9 En te bedo yenyo Akajia, eka te wot make i Camaria kan ame rik onwoŋo opono iye, ote kele baŋ Yeko ame te neke oko. Gin ote yiko kome, pien okobo ni, “En obedo akwar Yekocafati, ame rik obedo timo gin ame Rwot mito i cunye ducu.” Mom onwoŋo doŋ tye dano moro me ot Akajia ame onwoŋo romo loc." 
2Chronicles22:10 I kare ame Atalia tota Akajia oŋeo ni wode doŋ oto oko, en te ne ko jo luŋ me ot abaka, ame gin jo me doggola a Juda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ento wot Akajia ame olwoŋo ni Yowaci en ame te bwot, rik onwoŋo daŋ oneke oko, cite Yekoceba nyaka abaka Jekoram ame amin Akajia te kwale oko i akina awobe abaka ame rik onwoŋo otye aneko, te wot kane oko karacel kede apidi mere iyi ici ka mere me buto. Yekoceba nyaka abaka Jekoram, dako a Yekoyadi alamdog okane kittono, omio Atalia mom te neke," 
2Chronicles22:12 Yekoceba te bedo gwoko Yowaci pi mwakki kanyape, kun kano i ot a Rwot, ento i kare-nono Atalia en onwoŋo tye acalo abaka a dako." 
2Chronicles23:1 Cite i mwaka me abiro mere, Yekoyadi te diyo cunye, te cikere odoŋe ame onwoŋo loo mony, ame rik telo jo mia mia: Ajaria wot a Jekoram, Icmael wot a Yekokanan, Ajaria wot Obed, Maceya wot Adaya, kede Elicapat wot a Jikri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Gin te wot mano lobo Juda luŋ, kun ocoko jo Levi i boma luŋ me Juda, kede odoŋe atekere me Icrael ame loo doggola a kwarigi, gin luŋ te bino i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Lwak luŋ ame ocokere te cikere kede abaka i ot Obaŋa. Yekoyadi te kobbigi ni, “Nen wunu wot abaka! Myero iye wunu en bed aloc kite ame Rwot otyeko kobo i kom ikwae a Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Gin ame ibino timo wunu en: wun olamdog kede Olevi ka kare me ticwu oromo iceŋ cabit, acel me adek i komwu bino kuro dogcel," 
2Chronicles23:5 acel me adek i komwu te kuro dog ot abaka; acel me adek te kuro dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Acakki te ot; jo ocele mere luŋ bino bedo i dyekal me ot a Rwot. 
2Chronicles23:6 Mom ibino ye wunu dano moro donyo i ot a Rwot, koŋo ka olamdog kede Olevi ame tye i dog tic. Gin otwero donyo pien gin obedo jo acil, cite lwak ocele mere luŋ bino lubo gin ame Rwot ociko." 
2Chronicles23:7 Olevi bino guro abaka dyere kun ŋat acel acel omako jami me lwennyere i ciŋe. Dano moro keken ame bino donyo i ot obino neko oko. Ibino bedo wunu baŋ abaka i kabedo luŋ ame en bino wot iye.” 
2Chronicles23:8 Jo Levi kede jo Juda luŋ te lubo ginnoro luŋ ame Yekoyadi alamdog ocikogi iye. Ŋat acel acel i akinagi okelo jo mere baŋe, jo ame bino giko ticgi i ceŋ cabit; kede jo ame bino cako ticgi i nino me cabit, pien Yekoyadi alamdog mom ogonyo jo me ya i dog ticgi." 
2Chronicles23:9 Alamdog Yekoyadi te miyo baŋ odoŋe ame loo mony toŋi, kwode adoŋo, kede en atino ame rik onwoŋe obedo me abaka Daudi, kun ogwoko i ot Obaŋa." 
2Chronicles23:10 En oketo jo ame gwoko abaka, omiogi ocuŋ kun ŋat acel acel mako jami lwennyere i ciŋe, kun oguro ot dyere cakere i tuŋ anyarolum tuno kede naka tuŋ anyarodi, ame oguro keno lam kede ot daŋ." 
2Chronicles23:11 Yekoyadi doŋ te cako kelo Yowaci wot abaka, te keto tok kwogo i wie ote miyo daŋ buk me cik ame mako kop i kom loc acalo abaka, Yekoyadi kede awobe mere te onyo moo i wie me kwere bedo abaka, ote tuco doŋ kannaler ni en obedo abaka. Jo te redo ni, “Kom abaka bed ayot nakanaka!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Kare ame Atalia owinyo woo a jo ame ariŋo, kun opako abaka, en owoto baŋgi kuno i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles23:13 Kare ame en obolo waŋe kuno, oneno abaka tye ocuŋ i ŋet pagi, i doggola me donyo, kun odoŋe mony kede okut apel oguro abaka. Lwak luŋ onwoŋo tye awinyo kede yomcuny, kun okuto apel. Atalia te cako yeco boŋo oko i kome, te mwoc koko kun kobo ni, “Tim me erupe! Tim me arupe!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yekoyadi alamdog te kelo odoŋe mony ame onwoŋo telo mony, te kobbigi ni, “Ter wunu dako-nu okobe wunu kede i akina ocirikale; ka ŋattoro mito laro kwo mere myero inek wunu oko i pala romo. Pien alamdog onwoŋo mom mito ni neke i ot a Rwot.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Jo te cako mako dako-nono, ote tero oko, kun obeo kede i doggola ame aguragura donyo iye, ote tuno kede naka i ot abaka, ote neke oko kuno." 
2Chronicles23:16 Yekoyadi te cikere karacel i lwak luŋ kede abaka ni gin obino bedo jo a Rwot. 
2Chronicles23:17 Lwak luŋ te ya oko i kannono, ote ciro wot i ot a Baal, ote wot mumuko, ote reto oko piny; ote ŋiŋinyo daŋ keno lam luŋ karacel kede cal jogi ame onwoŋo tye kuno, oŋiŋido luŋ atitino, ote neko daŋ Matan ame rik obedo alamdog a Baal; oneke i nyim keno lam a Baal." 
2Chronicles23:18 Yeko yadi te doŋ keto jo me gwoko ot a Rwot, kun miyogi i ciŋ olamdog a jo Levi kede Olevi ame rik Daudi opokkigi tic me gwoko ot a Rwot, kun gin en a waŋo mot awaŋa ame oyalo kede Rwot, kite ame ocoo kede i cik a Muca, kun owero wer i yomcuny kite ame rik Daudi oyiko kede." 
2Chronicles23:19 En te keto okur dogcel me kuro dogcel me ot a Rwot, me neno ni ŋattoro ame mom cil i yore moro mom odonyo." 
2Chronicles23:20 En doŋ te kwanyo odoŋe ame loo mony, rwode, gabuna ame loo lwak karacel kede jo luŋ me lobo-nono; gin luŋ ote cako lwoko abaka me tero i paco mere; oya kede i ot a Rwot, kun odorre obedo kede i dogcel i malo, ote wot naka i ot abaka. Abaka te wot bedo piny i wii kommere me loc." 
2Chronicles23:21 Mannono omio jo me lobo-nono luŋ obedo kede yomcuny, boma daŋ te kwe mot i kare ame oneko Atalia i pala lweny." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yowaci odoko abaka kun mwaka me dittere oromo abiro, eka te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeraŋwen. Nyiŋ tottere rik onwoŋo Jibia, ame turgi tye i Beerceba." 
2Chronicles24:2 En obedo tiyo gin ame tye atira i nyim Rwot pi kare me kwo alamdog Yekoyadi luŋ," 
2Chronicles24:3 Yekoyadi onyome mon aryo, ame te nywalle itino awobe kede anyira." 
2Chronicles24:4 Icennere Yowaci te moko tammere me yiko ot a Rwot. 
2Chronicles24:5 En te coko olamdog kede jo Levi, te kobbigi ni, “Wot wunu i boma a jo Juda luŋ, iwot ira wunu lim ibaŋ jo Icrael luŋ me yiko ot Obaŋawu mwaka i mwaka; buny wunu ticcere abunya.” Cite Olevi mom te bunyo kite ame okobbigi," 
2Chronicles24:6 Abaka te lwoŋo Yekoyadi alamdog adwoŋ, te penye ni, “Piŋo kara mom imio Olevi orao lim i baŋ jo ame bedo i Juda kede i Jerucalem kite ame rik Muca amiro a Rwot ociko ni myero raa i baŋ jo Icrael me tic me kema me caden?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Pien awobe Atalia, dako ame obedo timo gin arac ca, onwoŋo rik oturo ot Obaŋa; dok otio-gu i jami luŋ ame rik ojalo baŋ Rwot, ame tye i ot a Rwot, i woro Baal." 
2Chronicles24:8 Mannono te miyo abaka ciko ni myero ti canduk me coko lim, ote tiyo keto oko i ŋet doggola me donyo i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles24:9 Rik ote rabo koppere romo lobo Juda kede Jerucalem luŋ ni myero kel lim ame omio pi Rwot ame rik Muca amiro a Rwot ocako rayo i baŋ jo i tim. 
2Chronicles24:10 Mannono te yomoro cuny lwak luŋ kede rwodegi, omio gino luŋ ote kelogi limgi bolo i canduk tuno ka jo luŋ omio." 
2Chronicles24:11 Dok kare luŋ ka Olevi okelo canduk lim baŋ otic abaka adoŋo mege, ka ce gin oneno ni lim dwoŋ meicel iye, aran abaka kede atic alamdog adwoŋ kwanyo limmono oko iyi canduk ote dwoko canduk i kakare. Man gin obedo timo nino i nino, omio gin te rayo lim adwoŋ meicel." 
2Chronicles24:12 Abaka kede Yekoyadi rik mio limmono baŋ otic ame loo tic me ot a Rwot, gin te paŋo kede jo ame gedo i kiddi karacel kede opa-bao me yiko ot a Rwot, kun en ocele ogelo i jo ame tio i nyonyo kede mola me yiko ot a Rwot" 
2Chronicles24:13 Mannono rik te miyo otic tic atek meicel, naka ote yiko ot a Rwot aber odoco, atek kite ame rik tye kede con." 
2Chronicles24:14 Kare ame gin otyeko tic me yiko ot a Rwot, gin te dwoko lim odoŋ baŋ abaka kede Yekoyadi, ame ote tiyo kede jami me ot a Rwot; otimo jami me tiyo tic apapat kede jami me tic i waŋo mot me yalo Rwot bakuli me waŋo odok akur, kede jami ocele ame otio i jabu kede ryal. Gin doŋ te bedo yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa didik pi kare me kwo a Yekoyadi luŋ." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ento i kare ame Yekoyadi doŋ oti atek, ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo mia acel kede pyeradek twal, en te to oko kun doŋ ocato meicel." 
2Chronicles24:16 Oyiko kome i paco a Daudi i kan ame oyiko iye obakki, pien en obedo timo gin aber pi jo Icrael, pi Obaŋa kede pi jo ode." 
2Chronicles24:17 Kare ame Yekoyadi doŋ oto, rwode me Juda obino baŋ abaka, ote ryebere piny wore; abaka te winyo kopgi." 
2Chronicles24:18 Gin te cako kwero Rwot oko, ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi, ote lokere woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera kede cal jogi. Bal man te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kom Juda kede Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles24:19 Kadi bed amannono, en koŋ te medde cwalo baŋgi odwarpiny me temo dwokogi baŋe, Odwarpiny obedo tucigi balgi, cite gin gigi te kwero winyo oko." 
2Chronicles24:20 Obaŋa te cwayo cunnyere i kom Jekaria wot a Yekoyadi alamdog; en te ya cuŋ i nyim jo, te kobbigi ni, “Obaŋa okobo ni, ‘Piŋo kara ikwero winyo wunu cik a Rwot, ame omio mom itwero nwoŋo wunu gum? Pien ikwero wunu Rwot, omio an daŋ akwerowu oko.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Gin te poro kop i keme, abaka te miyogi nape oko i gweŋ, ote neke oko i dyekal me ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles24:22 Abaka Yowaci omio oneke, mom opo gire tim aber me kica ame rik Yekoyadi papa a Jekaria otimo baŋe. Kare ame Jekaria ato, okobo ni, “Rwot myero nen gin otimere te culo kworrere.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Iyi agikki mwaka-nono, mony a jo Curia obino me bino lweny i kom abaka Yowaci, Gin obino i Juda kede i Jerucalem ote jwero rwode a lwak luŋ, ote cwalo jami ame gin oyako luŋ baŋ abaka me Damaciko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Kadi bed mony a jo Curia obino olweny anonok, cite Rwot omiogi oloo twon mony adwoŋ meicel, pien jo Icrael onwoŋo okwero Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi. Mannono en kite ame Rwot oŋolo kede kop i kom Yowaci." 
2Chronicles24:25 Kare ame mony doŋ oya oko i baŋ Yowaci, kun owane atek meicel, omiro mere te poro kop i kome, ote wot neke oko i kabuto mere pi remo a wot a Yekoyadi alamdog, En te to oko, ote yiko kome i paco a Daudi, cite mom oyike i lyel ame oyiko iye obakki." 
2Chronicles24:26 Jo ame oporo kop i kome obedo Jabad ame tottere Cimeat nya jo Ammon, Yekojabad wot a Yowaci, wot a dako a nyiŋe Cimirit, nya jo Moab," 
2Chronicles24:27 Kop i kom awobe a Yowaci, kede kop ame odwarpiny obedo kobo i kome, kede kite ame en oyiko kede ot Obaŋa, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk ame gonyo kop ame tye i buk obakki. Wode Amajia en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amajia ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo wie kany en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeraryo wie aboŋwen. Tottere rik nyiŋe Yekoadan ame turgi onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem. 
2Chronicles25:2 En obedo timo gin ame tye atira i nyim Rwot, cite mom i cunye ducu." 
2Chronicles25:3 I kare ame loccere doŋ otyeko moko, en oneko omiro mere oko ame rik oneko pappere." 
2Chronicles25:4 Cite mom oneko itino a jo ame rik oneko pappere, kite ame ocoo kede i buk a Muca, kan ame Rwot rik ociko iye ni, “Papa atin mom obino neko pi bal a wode, atin daŋ mom obino neko pi bal a pappere; ento ŋat acel acel obino neko pi ballere en i kome.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amajia te coko jo me Juda, en te ketogi i doggola, kun lubere i doggola a kwarigi ite loc otel mony ame loo jo tutumia kede mia pi jo Juda kede jo Benjamin luŋ. En okwano jo ame mwaka me ditogi doŋ oromo pyeraryo dok kede malo, en te nwoŋo ni jo ame oyero ame romo lweny, ame romo mako toŋ kede kwot, oromo tutumia mia adek nono." 
2Chronicles25:6 En dok te paŋo daŋ mony ocele ame tek meicel i lweny ame romo tutumia mia acel iyi Icrael, kun paŋogi i ryal, ame pekkere romo tan aŋwen." 
2Chronicles25:7 Cite dano Obaŋa rik te bino baŋe te kobbe ni, “Ama abaka, kur iwot i mony me Icrael, pien Rwot mom tye i jo me Icrael, jo me Epraimmi luŋ." 
2Chronicles25:8 Aco ka yin itamo ni mannono bino miyo ibedo atek i lweny, Obaŋa bino miyo okwori loi oko; pien Rwot tye kede teko ame twero miyo iloo lweny onyo oloi oko,”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amajia te penyo dano Obaŋa ni, “Kara doŋ ryal me tan aŋwen ame atyeko miyo baŋ mony me Icrael-li kono?” Dano Obaŋa te gamo ni, “Rwot twero dok miyi en ocele adwoŋ ame kato mannono oko,”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Amajia te miyo mony ame oya Epraim obino baŋe dok oko turgi. Cunygi te waŋ meicel i kom jo Juda, ote dok paco ame akemo ocirogi oko." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amajia rik te diyo cunye tero monnyere, te wot naka i luŋ me Kado, te neko jo me Ceir ame romo tutumia apar." 
2Chronicles25:12 Mony a jo Juda te mako daŋ jo ocele akwo ame romo tutumia apar, ote terogi i wi kidi malo ote corogi piny i wi kidi malo kuno; gin luŋ ote rette ŋinyere oko atitino." 
2Chronicles25:13 Cite omony me Icrael ame Amajia onwoŋo okwero ni kur wot kedgi i lweny, eka te dwogo oko cen, te wot cako lweny i kom boma mogo me Juda, cakere i Camaria tuno kede naka i Bet-koron ote neko jo ame romo tutumia adek, ote daŋ yako jami adwoŋ meicel." 
2Chronicles25:14 A doŋ Amajia odwogo oko i neko jo Edom, en onwoŋo odwogo kede jogi ajo Ceir, te cako worogi acalo obaŋe mere kun yalogi kede mot apapat." 
2Chronicles25:15 Mannono omio akemo omako Rwot i kom Amajia, te cwayo adwarpiny baŋe, ame te kobbe ni, “Piŋo kara omio dok icako woro obaŋe a rok ocele a mom laro jogi i ciŋ-nie?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Cite i kare ame onwoŋo en tye akop kede abaka te juke ni myero liŋ oko, kun penye ni, “Wan oketi me bedo ami-tam baŋ abaka bo? Piŋo kara omio imito ni neki?” Adwarpiny daŋ te liŋ, kun kuŋ okobo ni, “Aŋeo ni Obaŋa doŋ otyeko moko tamere me neki oko pi gin ame itimo-nono kede pi kwero winyo tamma.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Amajia abaka me Juda te dok penyo tam i baŋ jo, eka te cwayo kwena baŋ Yowaci wot a Yekoyakaji, ame obedo wot a Yeko, abaka me Icrael, kun kobbe ni, “Biye me obin orwatte i lek, me otemere koŋ.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Cite abaka Yowaci te dwoko kop baŋ Amajia, abaka me Juda ni, “Okuto moro ame onwoŋo tye i buŋ me Lebanon rik ocwalo kwena baŋ yat cedar me Lebanonon, kun kobbe ni, ‘Mia nyari me anyommi woda.’ Lee moro me Lebanon te beo kuno nyono okuto oko piny." 
2Chronicles25:19 Yin ikobo ni, ‘Nen doŋ atyeko loyo Edom oko’, aman doŋ icako wakere meicel. Ento aman doŋ kono koŋ ibedo paco. Piŋo kara itye ka roko jo ononono me kelo can i komi keni kede i kom joni?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Cite Amajia te kwero winyo koppere-nono oko, pien onwoŋo obedo yik Obaŋa, me wek emigi i ciŋ okworgi, pien gin ocako woro obaŋe a jo Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Man omio Yowaci, abaka me Icrael te ya oko karacel i jo mere, te wot rwatte gin Amajia i bar lweny me Betcemec ame tye i Juda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Ote loyo mony Amajia oko, ŋat acel acel te riŋo oko i paco mere," 
2Chronicles25:23 Yowaci abaka me Icrael te mako Amajia abaka me Juda, wot a Yowaci, ame obedo wot Akajia, i Bet-cemec, en te ya i kannono kato naka i Jerucalem, te wot muko cel me Jerucalem oko, ame borrere romo yadi mia aryo twal, cakere i dogcel me Epraim naka i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Gul." 
2Chronicles25:24 En te yako jabu kede ryal luŋ ame en onwoŋo i ot Obaŋa, karacel kede jami luŋ me ottaca, ame rik ikwae Obededom gwoko; kede en ame onwoŋo tye i ot kano lim abaka, te tero luŋ i Camaria. En omako daŋ jo adoŋo mogo ame otwero lakoro, te tero oko." 
2Chronicles25:25 Kare ame Yowaci wot a Yekoyadi, abaka me Icrael doŋ otyeko to, Amajia wot a Yowaci, abaka me Juda pwod omedde bedo kwo pi mwakki ame romo apar wie abic." 
2Chronicles25:26 Kop ocele luŋ i kom Amajia, gin ame en obedo tiyo, cakere i ageyi naka i agikki, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk Obakki me Juda kede me Icrael." 
2Chronicles25:27 Cakere i kare ame jo oweko Rwot, jo mogo rik te poro kop i muŋ i kom Amajia, kun omito neke oko i Jerucalem, en te lwi, riŋo oko i boma me Lakic, cite okworrere te cwayo dano lubo yore kuno, ame te wot neke oko." 
2Chronicles25:28 Gin te tiŋo keme aguragura kelo bino yiko i Jerucalem karacel i kwari mere, i paco a Daudi." 
2Chronicles26:1 Jo me Juda luŋ te kwero wode Ujia me bedo abaka kakare, kun mwaka me dittere onwoŋo oromo apar wie abicel." 
2Chronicles26:2 I ŋe to a pappere Ujia ogero Elot te dwoko i te loc a jo Juda. 
2Chronicles26:3 Ujia onwoŋo rik tye i mwaka apar wie abicel i kare ame en cako loc, en te bedo loc pi mwakki pyerabic wie aryo, kun bedo i Jerucalem. Nyiŋ tottere Yekolia me Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles26:4 En obedo tiyo gin ame nen atira i nyim Rwot, kun lubo gin ame pappere Amajia obedo tiyo." 
2Chronicles26:5 En obedo tiyo gin ame Obaŋa mito, pi kare me kwo a Jekaria luŋ, pien rik onwoŋo obedo pwonye i kite me lworo Rwot. Doŋ i kare-nono luŋ ame en obedo tiyo gin ame Rwot mito, Obaŋa obedo miye winyo." 
2Chronicles26:6 En owoto, te wot ero lweny i kom jo Piriciti, te wot turo apama dogcel me Gat, Jabne kede me Acidod; en te gero boma ocele mege i ŋet Acidod kede i kabedo ocele i lobo a jo Piriciti," 
2Chronicles26:7 Obaŋa obedo konye lweny i kom jo Piriciti, kede jo me Arab ame onwoŋo bedo i Gurbaal, kede dok i kom jo Meun." 
2Chronicles26:8 Jo Ammon rik te bedo gelo ocorogi baŋ Ujia, nyiŋe te rwo winyere naka i Miciri twal, pien en onwoŋo doŋ tek meicel." 
2Chronicles26:9 Medo kede mannono, Ujia ogero daŋ gedo mogo ocuŋ iguŋ malo i Jerucalem i ŋet dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Gul, kede dogcel ame olwoŋo ni luŋ, kede i ŋet kona cel, te daŋ celogi luŋ atek meicel." 
2Chronicles26:10 Te daŋ dok gero gedo mogo ocuŋ iguŋ malo i tim, te kunyo daŋ bur pii apol, pien en onwoŋo tye kede lim akwo adwoŋ meicel, i Cepela kede i bar daŋ, dok onwoŋo tye daŋ opur potti kede opur i poto olok i lobo obedo kidikidi kede i lobo ame ceko cam, pien onwoŋo maro pur." 
2Chronicles26:11 Ujia rik daŋ tye kede mony ame ocirikale mere romo lweny kun otye i dul i dul kite ame aran Jeye okwanogi kede kun Maceya, atel mony, ame gin luŋ otye i te loc a Kanania, ame ŋat acel i akina odoŋe ame loo mony abaka." 
2Chronicles26:12 Odoŋe mony ame onwoŋo telo mony me doggola a kwarigi ame gin twoni jo atek meicel i lweny, onwoŋo romo tutumia aryo kede abicel nono." 
2Chronicles26:13 I te locci onwoŋo tye ocirikale ame romo tutumia adek kede abiro, i mia abic nono, ame romo konyo abaka me lweny i okworrere." 
2Chronicles26:14 Ujia rik te tiyo kwode, toŋi, tok, koti nyonyo, akud atero, kede atiŋdio pi ocirikale mere luŋ." 
2Chronicles26:15 Aco i Jerucalem odiro te tiyo gin ame twero baye kede atiŋdio adoŋo mege i gedo ocuŋ i guŋ malo kede i wi apama cel malo i kona ducu. Nyiŋe te rwo atek winyere kannabor meicel; pien Obaŋa obedo konye i yore me awura meicel, ame te miyo en doko atek meicel." 
2Chronicles26:16 Cite i kare ame en doŋ odoko atek, te cako wakere oko ame te miyo en kelo can i kome kene, En odonyo i ot a Rwot me wot waŋe odok akur i wi keno lam me waŋo odok." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ajaria alamdog te lubo yore kuno, kun woto olamdog a Rwot pyeraboro, ame gin luŋ obedo jo atek meicel." 
2Chronicles26:18 Ote juko abaka Ujia cuŋ, ote kobbe ni, “Yin mom itye kede twer me waŋo odok akur baŋ Rwot, mannono obedo tic olamdog ame obedo ikwae Aron, ame okwerogi pi ticcono. Yin myero iya oko i kabedo acil, iwot oko; yin itimo bal, dok Rwot Obaŋa mom bino pwoyi pi gin ame itimo-nono.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Akemo te mako Ujia. En onwoŋo omako tabo me waŋo odok akur i ciŋe, doŋ i kare ame akemo omake i kom olamdog, dobo te cako corre oko i tur nyime i nyim olamdog kannono, i ot a Rwot, i ŋet keno lam me waŋo odok akur." 
2Chronicles26:20 Ajaria alamdog adwoŋ kede olamdog ocele luŋ te neno ni dobo doŋ ocorre oko i tur nyime. Gin te ru core, cwaye teŋe oko. En daŋ te bunyo wot oko oyotoyot, pien Rwot otyeko keto can i kome oko." 
2Chronicles26:21 Abaka Ujia te doŋ bedo adobo naka i to mere; kite acalo en doŋ onwoŋo adobo, en doŋ onwoŋo bedo i ode kene, kun mom dok twero donyo i ot a Rwot, Wode Yocam en ame onwoŋo doŋ loo ode, kun daŋ loo lobo-nono." 
2Chronicles26:22 Doŋ kop ocele luŋ i kom Ujia ame mom ocoo kan, cakere iyi ageyi naka i agikki, adwarpiny Icaya wot Amoj ocoo luŋ." 
2Chronicles26:23 En oto, te weo karacel i kwari mere, ote yiko kome karacel i kwari mere i poto me yiko obakki, pien jo okobo ni, “Pien en obedo adobo.” Wode Yocam en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yocam ocako loc kun mwka me dittere tye pyeraryo wie abic, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie abicel. Nyiŋ tottere Yeruca ame obedo nyaka a Jadok," 
2Chronicles27:2 En obedo tiyo gin gin ame tye atira i nyim Rwot, kun timo ginnoro luŋ ame pappere Ujia rik obedo timo; cite en gire mom oturo cik me donyo wot tic i ot a Rwot, Cite lwak pwod omedde timo tim a mom atira." 
2Chronicles27:3 En ogero doggola i malo me ote a Rwot, dok daŋ otio tic atek meicel i gero apama cel i tur ame olwoŋo ni Opel." 
2Chronicles27:4 Medo i mannono, en ogero daŋ boma apapat i lobo obedo kidikidi i Juda, te daŋ gero celloro atek kede gedo ocuŋ i guŋ i wi kiddi kan ame yen ocule iye." 
2Chronicles27:5 En olwenyo abaka a jo Ammon te loyogi oko. Jo Ammon te miye ryal ame romo tan aŋwen, ŋano ame romo puku tutumia pyeradek kede cayiri daŋ puku tutumia pyeradek. Gin te bedo culle kit jami acellono i mwaka ame lubo mannono kede i mwaka me adek." 
2Chronicles27:6 Yocam te doko twon lo moro atek meicel, pien obedo winyo Rwot Obaŋa mere." 
2Chronicles27:7 Kop i kom Yocam odoŋŋere luŋ, lweny ame en olwenyo luŋ, kite ame en obedo kede, ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tyeocoo i buk obakki me Icrael kede Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 En ocako bedo aloc kun mwaka me dittere tye pyeraryo wie abic, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie abicel." 
2Chronicles27:9 Yocam oto, te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, ote yiko kome i paco a Daudi. Wode Akaj en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles28:1 Akaj ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere tye pyeraryo nono, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie abicel. En mom obedo timo gin a tye atira i nyim Rwot Obaŋa mere kite ame kwaro mere Daudi rik otimo." 
2Chronicles28:2 Ento obedo lubo gin ame oloc me Icrael obedo timo. En otio cal jogi atwaka me a Baal; 
2Chronicles28:3 obedo waŋo daŋ odok akur i luŋ a woto i Kinnom, dok owaŋo daŋ awobe mere acalo mot me yalo jok, kun lubo kit tim me kwer ame rik rok luŋ ame yam Rwot oryemo i nyim jo Icrael obedo timo." 
2Chronicles28:4 En obedo yalo jogi kun waŋo daŋ odok akur i ka woro jogi ame tye i wi kiddi malo kede i wi tur malo anaka atot i te yen obuŋere-gu. 
2Chronicles28:5 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa mere omie i ciŋ abaka me Curia, ame te lweny kede loye oko, te yako jo mere apol meicel tero oko acalo opii naka i Damaciko, Rik dok ote miye iciŋ abaka me Icrael ame olwenyo kede daŋ te loye oko, te neko jo mere atek meicel;" 
2Chronicles28:6 Peka wot a Remalia oneko mony a jo Juda ame romo tutumia mia acel kede pyeraryo i nino acel keken, kun gin luŋ onwoŋo jo atek meicel i lweny, pien gin onwoŋo okwero woro Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi." 
2Chronicles28:7 Eka twon lo moto atek meicel i lweny a nyiŋe Jikri, dano me Epraim te neko Maceya wot abaka kede Ajirikam, adwoŋ ame loo paco abaka, kede Elnaka ame obedo adwoŋ ame lubo abaka i loccere." 
2Chronicles28:8 Jo Icrael oyako mon kede itino i baŋ omegogi ame romo tutumia mia aryo, ote terogi oko calo opii naka i Camaria, kun daŋ oyako jami adwoŋ meicel." 
2Chronicles28:9 Adwarpiny a Rwot a nyiŋe Obed ame onwoŋo bedo i Camaria kuno, owoto te wot rwatte i mony ame onwoŋo adwogo i Camaria, te kobbigi ni, “Nen ba, Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwu, akemo onwoŋo omako i kom jo Juda eka te miyogi i ciŋwu, cite wun dok inekogi wunu i twon akemo okato kare." 
2Chronicles28:10 Aman dok imito wunu diyo wunu jo Juda kede Jerucalem, co kede mon, me bedo acalo opiiwu, Wun mom itimo wunu balloro wun i komwu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Aman myero iwiny wunu koppa, iwek wunu jo ame iyako wunu i baŋ omegowu ite kela wunu acalo opii-ni dok cen, pien akemo omako Rwot meicel i komwu.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Rwode aŋwen me a jo Epraim daŋ cunygi ocwer i kom gin ame mony otimo, Ajaria wot a Jekokanan, Berekia wot a Mecilemot, Jekijikia wot a Callum, kede Amaca wot a Kadlai." 
2Chronicles28:13 Gin daŋ okobbigi ni, “Kur ikel wunu jo ame iyako wunu-nono kan, pien iyikere wunu me miyowa tiŋo aliŋa i nyim Rwot medo dok i kom bal wa kede rocwa ame doŋ otye kede-ni. Rocwa doŋ dwoŋ meicel, akemo agwa daŋ doŋ omako Rwot oko i kom Icrael.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Mannono te miyo mony weko jo ame oyako oko karacel kede jami i nyim rwode kede lwak ame onwoŋo ocokere. 
2Chronicles28:15 Eka rwode ame wokki otuco nyiŋgi-ca te bino tero jo ame onwoŋo oyako, jo mogo i akinagi ame onwoŋo tye onoro, gin te miyogi ruko boŋŋi, ame okwanyo i kom jami ame oyako, omiogi oruko boŋo, omiogi amuk, ote daŋ miyogi cam kede ginamata, dok owirogi daŋ kede moo. Gin te tiŋo jo ame onwoŋo goro i akinagi i wi kane, ote terogi naka baŋ jogi i Jeriko, boma ame otit dwoŋ iye. Jo Icrael te doŋ dok i Camaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 I kare-nono abaka Akaj ocwao kwena baŋ abaka me Accuria me bino konye," 
2Chronicles28:17 Pien jo Edom onwoŋo ocobo mony i kom jo Juda, ote loyogi oko, ote yako jo tero oko acalo opii," 
2Chronicles28:18 Aco jo Piriciti daŋ onwoŋo ocobo mony i kom boma me Cepela, kede Negeb me Juda, Gin omao boma me Bet-cemec, Aijalon, Cederot, kede me Coko i pacci luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete, Timna kede pacci luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete, karacel kede Gimjo kede pacci luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ŋete, gin te bedo iye." 
2Chronicles28:19 Akaj abaka me Icrael en omio Rwot odwoko jo Juda piny, pien en obedo timo tim me carocaro i Juda, kun daŋ mom bedo igen i kom Rwot." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tiglat-pilecer, abaka me Accuria te bino lweny kede, te time lit akaka miye kony me medo teko mere." 
2Chronicles28:21 Pien Akaj onwoŋo okwanyo lim i ot a Rwot, kede i ot abaka karacel kede i udi a rwode te miyo abaka me Acuria; ento mom te nwoŋo konyoro iye kadi acel." 
2Chronicles28:22 Kare ame can orido Akaj, gennere i kom Rwot omedde ameda i dok piny. Kom en Akaj acellono!" 
2Chronicles28:23 Pien en gire obedo yalo obaŋe a jo Damaciko, ame onwoŋo oloe-nono, kun kobo ni, “Pien obaŋe obakki me Curia okonyogi, an abino bedo yalogi i mot me gin daŋ konya.” Ento olunyo ka kelo can i kome kene kede i kom jo Icrael luŋ." 
2Chronicles28:24 Akaj te coko jami luŋ ame otio kede i ot a Rwot, te ŋinyo jami ame otio kedgi i ot Obaŋa-nono luŋ atitino. Eka te cego doggola ot a Rwot, te tiyo keno lam romo iyi Jerucalem luŋ." 
2Chronicles28:25 I boma ducu me Juda en te tiyo iye ka waŋo odok akur me yalo obaŋe ocele kun mio akemo mako Rwot Obaŋa a kwari mere. 
2Chronicles28:26 Kop ocelle i kom Akaj ame mom ocoo kan, gin ame en obedo timo kede kite ame en obedo bedo kede, cakere i ageyi tuno kede naka i agikki, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk obakki me Juda kede me Icrael." 
2Chronicles28:27 Akaj oto, te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, gin te yiko kome i boma, i Jerucalem, Gin mom otero kome i lyel ame oyiko iye kom obakki me Icrael. Wode Kejekia te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles29:1 Kajekia ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraryo wie abic, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyeraryo wie aboŋwen. Nyiŋ tottere obedo Abija, ame obedo nyaka a Jekaria." 
2Chronicles29:2 En te bedo timo gin ame tye atira i nyim Rwot, kun lubo ginnoro luŋ ame rik kwaro mere Daudi obedo timo." 
2Chronicles29:3 I mwaka me agege me loccere, i dwe me acel, en te yabo doggola me ot a Rwot luŋ, te daŋ yikogi oko." 
2Chronicles29:4 En te kelo olamdog kede jo Levi te cokogi karacel i dyekal tutuŋ kide," 
2Chronicles29:5 te kobbigi ni, “Winy wunu koppa wun jo Levi! Aman myero ilonyere wunu oko, ite lonyo wunu daŋ ot a Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwu, me bed acil, Cok wunu ginnoro luŋ a mom cil i kabedo man acil, iter wunu oko," 
2Chronicles29:6 Pien kwariwa rik mom doŋ geŋo Rwot, eka ote bedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot Obaŋawa; gin rik ote weko woro Rwot oko, kun owiro waŋgi teŋe i kabedo ame oworo iye Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:7 Gin ocego daŋ doggola luŋ me donyo i ot a Rwot, ote neko mac tara luŋ iye, kun mom doŋ owaŋo iye odok akur, akadi yalo Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael i mot awaŋa i kabedo acil." 
2Chronicles29:8 Mannono te miyo Rwot oonyo akemo mere i kom jo Juda kede Jerucalem, omiogi doŋ odoko gin ame mio lworo, wur, kede acae, kite ame itye ka neno wunu kede waŋwu nie." 
2Chronicles29:9 Mannono omio obin oneko kwariwa i lweny, monwa kede itinowa, ote mako tero oko acalo opii." 
2Chronicles29:10 Aman an amoko tamma ni myero ocikere wan i Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, me kur dok medde bedo kede akemo agwa wok-ki i komwa." 
2Chronicles29:11 Itinona, kur dok ibed bedo wunu abeda ba; pien Rwot otyeko yerowu me bedo oticcere ame tio i nyime, kun iwaŋe wunu odok akur.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Jo Levi magi te ya malo, Makat wot a Macai, Joel wot Ajaria, ame obedo jo me doggola a Kokat; jo me doggola a Gercom te ya, Joa wot a Jimma, kede Eden wot a Joa;" 
2Chronicles29:12 Jo Levi magi te ya malo, Makat wot a Macai, Joel wot Ajaria, ame obedo jo me doggola a Kokat; jo me doggola a Gercom te ya, Joa wot a Jimma, kede Eden wot a Joa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 jo me doggola Elijapan te ya, Cimri kede Jeuel; jo me doggola Acap te ya, Jekaria kede Mattania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 jo me doggola a Keman te ya Jekuel kede Cemei, eka jo me doggola a Jedutun te ya, Cemaya kede Ujiel." 
2Chronicles29:15 Gin ocoko omegogi, ote lonyere kengi gin doŋ te cako donyo i ot kite ame onwoŋo abaka ociko kun lubo kop a Rwot, me wot lonyo ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:16 Olamdog te donyo naka iyi icika i tyelo ame tye i ot Rwot me wot lonyo, gin te kelo oko jami luŋ areco a mom cil, ame gin onwoŋo i ot a Rwot; Olevi te yeyo luŋ tero naka i luŋ me kulo Kidron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Gin ocako lonyo ot a Rwot i nino dwe acel me dwe me agege, gin te tyeko i nino dwe aboro me dwe-nono, Ticgi doŋ te tum odoco me yiko ot a Rwot i nino dwe apar wie abicel me dwe acellono kun nwoŋo olonyo naka doggola luŋ me donyo i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:18 Gin te dwoko kop baŋ abaka Kejekia ni, “Wan doŋ otyeko lonyo ot a Rwot luŋ, olonyo anaka keno lam me waŋo mot me Rwot, jami tic luŋ, meja me keto ogati i nyim Rwot kede jami ticcere luŋ." 
2Chronicles29:19 Dok jami tic luŋ ame rik abaka Akaj obolo oko i kare ame en rik onwoŋo mom geno Rwot i kare me loccere, otyeko yiko dok daŋ olonyo oko luŋ, aman gin luŋ doŋ tye i nyim keno lam me yalo Rwot.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Abaka Kejekia te dilo ibai, te loko odoŋe ame loo boma karacel, te wot kedgi i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:21 Gin te kelo twoni abiro, nyogi rommi abiro, itino nyogi rommi abiro kede nyogi dyegi abiro me mot me bal ajo me Juda luŋ ame tye i te loc abaka kede me kabedo acil. En te ciko olamdog ame obedo ikwae Aron me cako yalo Rwot i mottono i wi keno lam a Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:22 Gin doŋ te neko twoni oko, olamdog te gamo remogi wot coro i kom keno lam; dok ote neko nyogi rommi, ote coro remogi daŋ i kom keno lam." 
2Chronicles29:23 Eka ote doŋ kelo nyogi dyegi me mot me bal baŋ abaka kede baŋ lwak ame ocokere me woro Rwot, ame gin luŋ ote keto ciŋgi i komgi." 
2Chronicles29:24 Olamdog te nekogi, ote yalo Rwot i remogi pi mot me bal i wi keno me lam pi kwanyo bal a jo Icrael luŋ, pien abaka onwoŋo ociko ni myero yal Rwot i mot awaŋa karacel kede mot me bal pi jo Icrael luŋ." 
2Chronicles29:25 Abaka Kejekia te miyo jo Levi cuŋ i ot a Rwot kun omako ajaa, naŋa kede naŋa opuk, ame olubo cik a Daudi kede me a Dan aran-piny abaka, karacel kede me a a Natan adwarpiny. Cik man onwoŋo obedo cik Obaŋa ame en okobo baŋ odwarpinyere." 
2Chronicles29:26 Jo Levi onwoŋo omako kit tum apapat ame rik Daudi wero kede eka olamdog te cuŋ kuno kun omako apel. 
2Chronicles29:27 Abaka Kejekia te doŋ ciko ni myero cak yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa i wi keno lam. Kare ame ocako yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa, ote daŋ cako wero wer me pako Rwot kun daŋ okuto apel kun daŋ ogoo tummogo me wer ame rik Daudi abaka me Icrael wero kede." 
2Chronicles29:28 Lwak luŋ te cako woro Rwot kun ower tye awer, okut apel daŋ akuto apel, mannono te bedo timere naka ka mot awaŋa me yalo Rwot owaŋ otum." 
2Chronicles29:29 Kare ame yalo Rwot doŋ otum, abaka karacel kede lwak, ame onwoŋo tye baŋe te ryebere piny woro Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:30 Abaka Kejekia karacel kede rwode mere te kobbi Olevi ni myero ocak pako Rwot kede wer ame rik Daudi owero me pako Rwot dok karacel kede wer Acap aran-piny. Gin te cako wer i yomcuny, ote ryebere piny woro Obaŋa." 
2Chronicles29:31 Kejekia te kobbi lwak ni “Aman doŋ ityeko kwerre wunu kenwu me bedo jo a Rwot, biye wunu doŋ ceggi me ikel wunu motwu i ot a Rwot, kun ikelo wunu daŋ motwu me pwoc.” Lwak daŋ te kelo motgi kun omedo daŋ motgi me pwoyo Rwot, jo mogo ame cunygi omito daŋ okelo mot awaŋa me yalo Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:32 Mot awaŋa ame lwak okelo te romo twoni pyerabiro, nyogi rommi mia acel, karacel kede itino nyogi rommi mia aryo; magi luŋ onwoŋo okelo me mot awaŋa me yalo Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:33 Mot ocele ame okelo rik te romo twoni mia abicel kede rommi tutumia adek. 
2Chronicles29:34 Kite acalo wel olamdog rik onwoŋo nok meicel ame mom romo yaŋo mot awaŋa ducu, omio omegogi ame obedo jo Levi obedo konyogi naka ka tic otum, olamdog ocele mege te dok lonyere kengi. Pien i kare-naca jo Levi onwoŋo cunygi atira ame kato olamdog i yore me lonyere kengi," 
2Chronicles29:35 Medo i kom twon mot awaŋa ame rik onwoŋo dwoŋ atek, dwol me mot me kweyo cuny daŋ onwoŋo tye, kede dok koŋo olok me mot awaŋa." 
2Chronicles29:36 Kejekia karacel kede lwak cunygi te lelo meicel pi gin ame Rwot otimo pi lwak. Pien gin ame otimere otimere oyotoyot meicel. 
2Chronicles30:1 Kejekia rik te cwayo kwena baŋ jo Icrael luŋ kede baŋ jo Juda, te daŋ coyo waraga cwayo baŋ jo Epraim kede jo Manace, kun kobbigi ni myero gin luŋ bin i ot a Rwot ame tye i Jerucalem, me obin okwer ecuban me Kato me woro Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
2Chronicles30:2 Abaka kede rwode mere karacel i jo luŋ ame onwoŋo ocokere i Jerucalem onwoŋo otyeko moko tamgi me kwero ecuban me Kato i dwe me aryo," 
2Chronicles30:3 gin onwoŋo rik mom oromo kwero i kare ame ociko pien wel olamdog ame olonyere kengi onwoŋo mom pol, dok lwak daŋ onwoŋo mom ru ocokere i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles30:4 Abaka kede lwak ame onwoŋo ocokere te neno ni yikgi-nono tye aber. 
2Chronicles30:5 Mannono omio gin te moko me rabo koppere romo lobo Icrael luŋ, cakere i Beerceba tuno naka i Dan ni myero kwer ecuban me kato i Jerucalem me woro Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael pien jo onwoŋo mom obedo kwero nino man kun welgi pol atek kite ame onwoŋo ociko." 
2Chronicles30:6 Mannono te miyo okwena ket romo lobo me Icrael luŋ karacel kede Juda kun otero waraga ame oya i baŋ abaka kede rwode, kite ame abaka ociko kun okobbi lwak ni, “Wun jo Icrael myero idwog wunu cen baŋ Rwot Obaŋa a kwarowu Iburaim, Icaka kede Yakobo, me en dwog baŋ jo ame odoŋ ame obwot i ciŋ obakki me Acuria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Myero kur ibed bala kwariwu kede omegowu ame rik okwero geno Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi ame te miyo Obaŋa miyo lobogi doko wi obur kite ame itye ka neno wunu kede waŋwu," 
2Chronicles30:8 Aman myero kur dok ibed wunu jo ame ŋutgi nwaŋ kite ame kwariwu rik obedo timo, ento myero imi wunu kwowu i ciŋ Rwot, me ibin wunu i kabedo man acil-li ame en doŋ otyeko lonyo oko atwal, ite woro wunu Rwot Obaŋawu, me ka ce ibino dwogo wunu cen baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, akemo mere agwa ya oko i komwu." 
2Chronicles30:9 Pien ka ce ibino dwogo wunu ceŋ baŋ Rwot, jo ame otero omegowu kede itinowu iyi opii bino bedo i kica i komgi; gin te dwogo i lobo man, Pien Rwot Obaŋawu ber dok daŋ akica, en gire bino timowu kica ka ce idwogo wunu baŋe.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Okwena te wot rimo boma luŋ ame tye i lobo ajo Epraim kede Manace tuno kede naka i lobo a jo Jabulon; cite jo te bedo nyerogi anyera, kun ocaogi dok daŋ oŋalogi aŋala." 
2Chronicles30:11 Jo anok meicel i lobo a jo Acer, Manace kede i lobo ajo Jabulon en ame rik te ye i mwolo me bino i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles30:12 Obaŋa onwoŋo obedo tiyo tic i Juda, omio jo onotte i cuny acel ote tiyo gin ame Obaŋa mito ame abaka kede rwodegi okobbigi." 
2Chronicles30:13 Lwak jo apipim te cokere i Jerucalem pi cokere adwoŋ meicel i dwe me aryo me bino kwero ecuban me Ogati a Tobi Mom iye. 
2Chronicles30:14 Gin ocako tic i Jerucalem kuno, ote mumuko keno lam luŋ ame onwoŋo tye kuno, aco keno lam luŋ me waŋo odok akur luŋ ote mumuko wot onyo i luŋ me kulo Kidron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Gin te neko itino rommi me Kato i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe me aryo, Lewic te mako olamdog kede Olevi ame onwoŋo mom olonyere kengi, gin doŋ te cako lonyere kengi, ote kelo mot awaŋa me yalo Rwot i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles30:16 Gin doŋ te cako, tiyo ticgi me kare luŋ kun olubo cik a Muca dano Obaŋa; olamdog te bedo tiyo tic me kikiro remo ame agamo i ciŋ jo Levi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Pien onwoŋo tye jo apol i akina jo ame onwoŋo mom olonyere kengi. Mannono en omio Olevi en oneko itino rommi me Kato pi ŋat acel acel ame onwoŋo mom olonyere me bed acil pi Rwot. 
2Chronicles30:18 Jo apipim iyi akina lwak, akato mere jo oya i lobo a jo Epraim, Manace, Icakar kede Jabulon onwoŋo mom olonyere kengi; cite ote bedo camo cam me ecuban me Kato i yore apat i en ame ociko, Pien abaka Kejekia onwoŋo okwao Obaŋa pirgi kun kobo ni, “Ama Obaŋa aber, tim ŋat acel acel ame omiye i cunye luŋ me woro Obaŋa kica," 
2Chronicles30:19 Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a kwarigi; kadi bed en mom olubo cik me kabedo acil ame mako lonyere.” 
2Chronicles30:20 Rwot te winyo kwac a Kejekia, mom te timo ginnoro arac i kom lwak." 
2Chronicles30:21 Jo Icrael ame rik onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem kuno te kwero ecuban me Ogati a Tobi Mom iye pi nino abiro, kun cunygi yom atek. Jo Levi kede olamdog obedo pako Rwot nino i nino, kun owero wer me pako Rwot i twergi luŋ," 
2Chronicles30:22 Abaka Kejekia te cukoro cuny jo Levi ame onwoŋo onyuto dirogi i tic me woro Rwot. Jo te camo cam me kwero ecuban pi nino abiro kun daŋ oyalo Rwot i mot me kweyo cuny, dok daŋ opwo Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi." 
2Chronicles30:23 Lwak luŋ te moko tamgi me medde i kwero ecuban pi nino abiro ocele, eka daŋ ote cobo tamgi-nono kun cunygi yom atek." 
2Chronicles30:24 Kejekia abaka me Juda onwoŋo omio lwak twoni tutumia acel kede rommi tutumia abiro me mot me yalo Rwot, aco rwode onwoŋo omio lwak twoni tutumia acel kede rommi tutumia apar. Olamdog ame olonyere i kare-nono obedo apol meicel." 
2Chronicles30:25 Lwak luŋ me Juda, olamdog, jo Levi kede lwak luŋ ame onwoŋo oya i lobo a jo Icrael, orok ame oya i lobo a jo Icrael karacel kede orok ame onwoŋo bedo i akina jo Juda obedo kede lelo meicel." 
2Chronicles30:26 Mannono te miyo yomcuny bedo adwoŋ meicel i Jerucalem pien cakere i kare a Culeman wot a Daudi abaka me Icrael, ginnoro acalo mannono onwoŋo mom dok otimere i Jerucalem kadi acel." 
2Chronicles30:27 Olamdog kede Olevi te ya lammi lwak gum, dwongi kede kwacgi te winyere baŋ Obaŋa malo i polo." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kare ame man ducu otum, lwak jo Icrael luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye kuno te ciro wot i boma luŋ ame tye i Juda, ote wot mumuko gweŋe ame ocibo i ka woro jogi, kun daŋ otoŋo yen luŋ ame oguguro i ka woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera, ote daŋ mumuko ka woro jogi ame tye malo i wi kiddi kede keno lam i kabedo luŋ ame tye i lobo a jo Juda, Benjamin, Epraim kede me a jo Manace, tuno ka doŋ ojwero luŋ, Jo luŋ ame onwonooya i lobo a, jo Icrael te doŋ dok i bomagi kun ŋat acel acel dok i paco mere ikome." 
2Chronicles31:2 Kejekia te poko doŋ olamdog kede jo Levi dul i dul, kun lubo kit tic ame gin tio. Tic olamdog kede jo Levi onwoŋo obedo me yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa kede mot me kweyo cuny, tic i dogcel me kema a Rwot karacel kede tic me miyo pwoc kede pako Obaŋa." 
2Chronicles31:3 Gin ame abaka omio ame okwanyo i kom jami mere ikome obedo leyi me mot awaŋa me yalo Rwot odiko kede otyeno, kede me yalo Rwot i ceŋ cabit kede i por dwe karacel kede i nino me ecuban adoŋo ame ociko ni kwer, kite ocoo kede i cik a Rwot." 
2Chronicles31:4 Abaka te ciko jo ame bedo i Jerucalem ni myero gin omi dul ame ociko ni myero mi baŋ olamdog kede baŋ Olevi, me gin omiye odoco me cobo gin ame ociko ame tye i cik a Rwot." 
2Chronicles31:5 Tekki gin ame abaka ociko-ni koppere owinyere baŋ jo i kabedo luŋ, jo te miyo jami adwoŋ meicel; omio kal ogeo cek me wi mwaka, koŋo olok, moo, moo kic, kede kit jami luŋ ame oya i pottigi, ote daŋ dok miyo acel me apar me jami luŋ adwoŋ meicel." 
2Chronicles31:6 Jo Icrael kede jo Juda ame bedo i boma luŋ ame tye i lobo me Juda te kelo acel me apar me dok kede rommi karacel kede mot ocele ame onwoŋo gin ojalo oko baŋ Rwot Obaŋagi, ote yidogi karacel dul i dul." 
2Chronicles31:7 Gin ocako coko motgi-nono yido karacel dul i dul i dwe me adek, ote bino tyeko ticcere i dwe me abiro." 
2Chronicles31:8 Kare ame abaka Kejekia kede rwode mere obino te neno jami ame ocoko oyido dul apapat, gin opwoo Rwot, ote daŋ pwoyo jo me Icrael." 
2Chronicles31:9 Abaka Kajekia te penyo olamdog kede Olevi kop i kom mot ame oyido ibimmono. 
2Chronicles31:10 Ajaria alamdog adwoŋ, dano me doggola a Jadok te gamo koppere ni, “Pien cakere i kare ame lwak ocako kelo motgi i ot a Rwot wan obedo nwoŋo cam ame romowa, ocemo oyeŋ, en ame odoŋere daŋ tye dwoŋ ata, man otimere pien Rwot omio jo mere gum, en omio aman wan otye kede jami ame odoŋ dwoŋ rom man.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Abaka Kejekia te ciko ni myero yik icika mogo me gwoko i ot a Rwot, ame daŋ ote ru yiko oko." 
2Chronicles31:12 Gin te weko mottono luŋ kede acel me apar karacel i ginnoro luŋ ame ojalo baŋ Rwot, ote tero wot gwoko aber iyi icika ame oyiko-naca. Adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loogi luŋ onwoŋo obedo Alevi ame nyiŋe Konania, kun ominnere Cimei en ame lube." 
2Chronicles31:13 Jo ame abaka Kejekia, kede Ajaria alamdog adwoŋ ame loo ot a Rwot, onwoŋo oketo me konyo Konania kede alubbe Cimei neno tic, obedo, Jekiel, Ajajia, Nakat, Acael, Jerimot, Jojabad, Eliel, Icimakia, Makat kede Benaya." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore wot Alevi a nyiŋe Imna, akur dogcel me tutuŋ kide en ame onwoŋo loo mot ame omio baŋ Rwot pi ber a yic, dok daŋ en ame poko mot ame ogwoko pi Rwot kede mot acil meicel." 
2Chronicles31:15 Aco i boma ocele ame olamdog bedo iye, jo magi onwoŋo tye ka konye iye, kun gin luŋ obedo jo a genne meicel i ticgi, gin ene: Eden, Miniamin, Yecua, Cemaya, Amaria, kede Cekania. Gin onwoŋo poko omegogi cam, opoko luŋ arorom baŋ jo adoŋo kede atino, kun olubo dul tic ame gin tio;" 
2Chronicles31:16 Gin mom opoko kun olubo kite ame oco kede jo, kun olubo doggola kwarigi kono ka baŋ jo ame ditogi oromo pyeradek dok kede malo, jo luŋ ame donyo i ot a Rwot kite ame ticgi me nino acel acel tye kede me wot ticgi ame opokigi i dulgi," 
2Chronicles31:17 Olamdog rik ocoo kun olubo i doggola a kwarigi, cite me Olevi rik ocako i kom jo ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo kun lubo tic ame gin tio i dulgi." 
2Chronicles31:18 Olamdog rik ocoo karacel itinogi ame pwod tino, mongi, awobegi kede anyiragi; kun ocoo lwak luŋ, pien gin rik ogwokere meicel me bedo jo acil." 
2Chronicles31:19 Aco i kom ikwae a Aron, olamdog ame rik bedo i lobogi ocele ame tye i ŋet bomagi; rik oyero jo mogo ayera i boma acel acel gin te bedo opok jami baŋ dano acel acel ame obedo alamdog kede Alevi ame doŋ otyeko coyo nyiŋe oko i buk." 
2Chronicles31:20 Kejekia te bedo timo amano i lobo Juda luŋ; en obedo timo gin aber ame tye atira, kun daŋ geŋo Rwot Obaŋa mere." 
2Chronicles31:21 Ticcoro luŋ ame en otio i kom tic me ot a Rwot ame lubere i cik kede ginnoro luŋ ame ociko en otio i cunye ducu kun woro Obaŋa mere, omio ticcere te daŋ cobere aber meicel." 
2Chronicles32:1 A doŋ man otum kede tic ame Kejekia obedo tiyo ame nyuto gennere i kom Rwot, Cenakerib abaka me Acuria owoto me wot lweny i kom boma luŋ me Juda, monnyere te guro kemagi guro boma ame onwoŋo ocecelo atek meicel kun tamo ni myero elogi obed i te loccere." 
2Chronicles32:2 Kare ame Kejekia oneno ni Cenakerib obino me bino lweny i kom Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles32:3 en oyiko kop i rwode mere kede jo ame tek i lweny, me toro pii akon luŋ ame onwoŋo tye oko i ŋe boma, Gin daŋ ote konye," 
2Chronicles32:4 Lwak jo apol meicel te cokere, ote toro waŋ pii akoŋ kede kulo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i kabedo luŋ, kun okobo ni, “Piŋo kara omio oweko obakki me Acuria nwoŋo pii adwoŋ adwoŋa ka gin bino tuno kan?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 En ocako tic agwa te gero apama cel luŋ ame onwoŋo doŋ orette oko piny, te dok gero gedo mogo ocuŋ iguŋ i wicel malo, te daŋ dok gero cel ocele i ŋeye oko. En te miyo Millo ame tye i paco a Daudi doko kabedo atek meicel. En te daŋ dok tiyo jami lweny kede kwode apipim." 
2Chronicles32:6 Te keto odoŋe mony ocwiny me loyo lwak, ocokogi luŋ karacel i dyekal alac ame tye i dogcel, te cako cukoro cunygi kun kobbigi ni," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Cuŋ wunu atek kun cunywu nwaŋ. Kur ibed wunu alwor, cunywu daŋ kur poti i nyim obakki me Acuria karacel i monnyere luŋ ame tye baŋe; pien ŋat ame kate oko tye baŋwa." 
2Chronicles32:8 Monnyere obedo dano adana ame geŋo tekogi, cite wan Rwot Obaŋawa en ame tye baŋwa me konyo dok me lweny pirwa.” Kop ame Kejekia abaka me Juda okobo-nono omio cuny jo odwogo." 
2Chronicles32:9 Icennere doki Cenakerib abaka me Acuria kede monnyere ame onwoŋo tye aguro boma me Lakic, ocwao okwena i Jerucalem baŋ Kejekia abaka me Juda kede lwak luŋ me Juda ame onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem, kun kobbigi ni," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Cenakerib abaka me Acuria okobo ni, ‘Itye wunu kara ka geno ŋo ba, ame omio pwod igurre giwu agura i Jerucalem?’" 
2Chronicles32:11 Myero i ŋe wunu ni Kejekia tye ka rwenyowu arwenya, kun mito ni kec kede oryo pi nekwu, i koppere ame en tye ka kobbiwu ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋawa bino larowa i ciŋ abaka me Acuria.’" 
2Chronicles32:12 Mom en Kejekia acellono rik omuko kabedo me woro Obaŋa-nono ame tye malo kede keno lam me yale, eka te ciko jo Juda kede Jerucalem ni, ‘Ibino woro wunu Obaŋa i nyim keno lam acel keken, dok daŋ bino waŋo wunu motwu me yalo Obaŋa ye?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Wun ce mom iŋeo wunu gin ame an kede kwarina otimo i kom rok luŋ me lobo ocele? Ane koŋ rik obaŋe a rok me lobo ocele naca lar lobogi i ciŋa? 
2Chronicles32:14 Kara mene i akina obaŋe a rok ame kwarina rik ojwero odoco, ame obin olaro jo mere i ciŋa? Kara doŋ ŋo ame omio wun itye ka tamo wunu ni Obaŋawu twero larowu i ciŋa?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Aman doŋ ba, myero kur imi wunu Kejekia bwolwu onyo rwenywu kittono. Kur iwiny wunu koppere. Mom gire tye obaŋa a rokkoro onyo me aloccoro ame yam koŋ olaro jo i ciŋa onyo i ciŋ kwarina. Doŋ iyi ateni Obaŋawu gire mom romo larowu kadi acel i ciŋa.”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Abaka Cenakerib te medde i kop areco i kom Rwot Obaŋa kede i kom amiro mere Kejekia. 
2Chronicles32:17 Cenakerib te coyo waraga kun cao kede Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, ame kobo kop arac i kome ni, “Obaŋa a Kejekia gire mom bino laro jo mere, bino daŋ bedo ame rom aroma obaŋe a rok apapat me lobo ocele ame mom olaro jogi i ciŋa.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Gin te redo i kop man i dwoŋ aloŋo kun oredo i leb Eburania baŋ jo Jerucalem ame onwoŋo tye i wi cel malo me gin dok alwor ote nyobere oko, me gin te mayo bomagi oko." 
2Chronicles32:19 Gin te bedo kobo kop i kom Obaŋa me Jerucalem i kite ame okobo kede kop i kom obaŋe a rok ocele me wi lobo, ame dano en otiogi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Abaka Kejekia kede adwarpiny Icaya wot Amoj te kwayo Obaŋa kun ocwao kokogi malo i polo," 
2Chronicles32:21 Rwot te cwayo amalaika, ame te bino jwero twoni jo atek i lweny otel wi mony, kede odoŋe ocele luŋ i gony abaka me Acuria, Mannono te miyo en dok cen i lobo mere i twon lewic adwoŋ meicel. En te wot naka i ot obaŋa mere, eka awobe mere mogo akina itino mere te neke oko i pala lweny." 
2Chronicles32:22 Mannono en kite Rwot olaro i Kejekia kede jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem i ciŋ Cenakerib abaka me Acuria kede i ciŋ okworgi luŋ, te doŋ miyogi wee tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi." 
2Chronicles32:23 Jo apol meicel te kelo motgi baŋ Rwot i Jerucalem, kede jami mogo me wel baŋ Kejekia abaka me Juda, mannono te miyo en bedo twon lo moro a malo meicel i nyim rok luŋ cakere i kare-nono wot kede anyim." 
2Chronicles32:24 I kare-nono two omako Kejekia ame onwoŋo doŋ ceggi to, en te kwayo Rwot; Rwot te winyo kwaccere, kun mie gin ame nyuto." 
2Chronicles32:25 Cite Kejekia mom te timo ginnoro ame lubere i gin aber ame otimo baŋe, pien en obedo kede awaka i cunye. Mannono te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kome karacel i jo Juda kede jo Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles32:26 Cite Kejekia kede jo me Jerucalem te dok mwolle kengi i kom awaka ame onwoŋo tye i cunygi, mannono te miyo Rwot mom oketo cannoro i komgi i kare a Kejekia luŋ." 
2Chronicles32:27 Kejekia rik onwoŋo doŋ olony atek kun daŋ jo woro atek meicel. En onwoŋo ogero ot me kano limmere, ogero icika me keto ryal, jabu, gweŋe mogo me wel, gigi mogo a ŋwecgi kur, kwode, kede me keto jami tic apapat ame welgi malo meicel." 
2Chronicles32:28 Medo i kom mannono, en ogero daŋ udi gwoko cam, kan ame okano iye kal, koŋo olok, kede moo; ogero daŋ ka gwoko dokkere apol ata kede ka gwoko rommi mere." 
2Chronicles32:29 Pien Obaŋa omie jami adwoŋ meicel, omio en ogero boma mogo ame otike en ikome, kede dok, kede rommi ame tye baŋe apipim." 
2Chronicles32:30 En Kejekia acel-li rik daŋ otoro waŋ pii i tuŋ malo, kan ame pii ame ya i kulo Gikon mol iye, eka te yabo yo pii dok tuŋ to me paco a Daudi. Kejekia rik Obaŋa omio winyo meicel i kom ginnoro luŋ ame en otio." 
2Chronicles32:31 Doŋ kop i kom okwena a rwode me Babulon, ame rik ocwao baŋe me bino penyo kop i kom anyut ame Obaŋa onyuto i lobo mere Obaŋa oweke etimo jami luŋ pire kene me teme, wek eŋe ginnoro luŋ ame tye i cunye." 
2Chronicles32:32 Kop i kom Kejekia ame odoŋŋere luŋ, gin abeco ame en otio ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i kom gin Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Icaya adwarpiny wot Amoj ame tye i buk Obakki me Juda kede Icrael." 
2Chronicles32:33 Kejekia oto te wot weo karacel i kwari mere, ote yiko kome i lyel ame tye malo i wi kidi, i akina ikwae a Daudi. Jo me Juda kede Jerucalem luŋ te nyuto worogi baŋe i kare me to mere. Wode Menace te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manace ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere oromo apar wie aryo, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki pyerabic wie abic." 
2Chronicles33:2 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun bedo timo tim me kwer ame rok luŋ ame Rwot oryemo oko i nyim jo Icrael rik obedo timo." 
2Chronicles33:3 En dok omio ogero ka woro jogi i wi kiddi malo, ame rik pappere Kejekia omio omumuko oko. Ogero daŋ keno lam me woro Baal, te dok cicibo daŋ yen i ka woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera, kun daŋ woro ceŋ, dwe kede lwak acer apipim ame tye i polo, dok daŋ tio baŋgi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Ocano daŋ keno mogo me lam i ot a Rwot, kan ame rik Rwot okobo iye ni, “Abino miyo Jerucalem bedo kabedo me wora.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 En ocano daŋ keno lam apipim me woro ceŋ, dwe kede lwak acer ame tye malo i polo, kun canogi i dyekal aryo ame tye i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles33:6 Owaŋo daŋ wode acalo mot me woro jok i luŋ a wot a Kinnom, kun daŋ tyeto tyet; ŋiyo yi dyegi; penyo okor tipo kede ajoka. En obedo timo tim areco apol apola ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun mio akemo mako Rwot." 
2Chronicles33:7 Dok cal jok apaa ame en opao, otero-gu i ot a Rwot ame rik Rwot ikome okobo pire baŋ Daudi kede baŋ Culeman ni, “I ot man kede i Jerucalem ame rik an ayero i akina atekere luŋ me Icrael, en ame bino bedo kan ame owora iye nakanaka." 
2Chronicles33:8 Mom dok abino miyo jo Icrael ya i lobo man ame rik an amio baŋ kwarigi, ka ce gin obedo gwokere kun otimo ginnoro luŋ i kite ame rik acikogi kede, dok obedo lubo cik, icwil kede ginnoro luŋ ame rik amio Muca ocikogi iye.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manace rik omiogi omedo timo tim areco ame kato me arok luŋ ame rik Rwot orweo oko i nyim jo Icrael. 
2Chronicles33:10 Kadi bed Rwot obedo kwenyoro Manace kede jo mere, cite gin gigi mom owinyo koppere." 
2Chronicles33:11 Mannono omio Rwot ocwao mony abaka me Accuria, ame te bino mako Manace i golo, ote tweye kede jegere me mola, ote tere naka i Babulon." 
2Chronicles33:12 I kare ame en tye kede rem, odoko amwol meicel i nyim Obaŋa a kwari mere, te bako doge baŋ Rwot Obaŋa mere me time kica." 
2Chronicles33:13 En okwao Obaŋa, Obaŋa te winyo kwaccere, te daŋ ye, eka te miye dok i Jerucalem acalo aloc, Manace doŋ te ŋeyo ni Rwot kare obedo Obaŋa." 
2Chronicles33:14 Icennere, en te gero apama cel me paco a Daudi i oko mere ame tye tutuŋ to me Gikon, i luŋ, te gero wot kede naka i dogcel me Rec, kun gero mano kidi me Opel, en ogero apama cel i kannono okato malo meicel. En dok te keto odoŋe ame loo mony i boma luŋ ame ocecelo atek a tye i lobo me Juda." 
2Chronicles33:15 En okwanyo daŋ obaŋe a rok ocele luŋ kede cal jogi i ot Obaŋa, te mumuko daŋ keno lam me jogi luŋ ame rik ecano i wi kidi, kan ame ot Obaŋa tye iye, kede en a tye i Jerucalem; okwanyogi luŋ te terogi wot bolo i ŋe boma," 
2Chronicles33:16 Oyiko daŋ keno lam me yalo Rwot, te yalo Rwot iye i mot me kweyo cuny kede mot me pwoyo Rwot, eka te ciko jo Juda me woro Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles33:17 Kadi bed amannono, jo pwod omedde tero motgi i kabedo mogo me woro, ame tye i wi kididi malo, cite oyalo ka Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael keken." 
2Chronicles33:18 Kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame Manace otimo ame mom ocoo kan, kwaccere baŋ obaŋa mere, kop Obaŋa me Icrael ame oraŋ-piny okobo baŋe, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom obakki me Icrael." 
2Chronicles33:19 Aco kop i kom kwaccere, kite ame Obaŋa owinyo kede koko mere, ballere luŋ ame en otimo, kede kite ame gennere oya kede i kom Obaŋa, kan ame en ogero iye ka woro jogi i wi kiddi malo eka te cicibo iye cal jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera kede cal jogi ocele mege, i kare ame mom ru omwolle kene i nyim Obaŋa, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me tekwaro ame tito kop i kom Oraŋ-piny." 
2Chronicles33:20 En oto te weo karacel i kwari mere, oyiko kome i ode. Wode Amon en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeraryo wie aryo. 
2Chronicles33:22 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kite ame pappere Manace obedo timo kede. Amon obedo yalo cal jogi luŋ ame pappere Manace rik otio kun daŋ worogi." 
2Chronicles33:23 En naka mom omwolle kene kadi acel i nyim Rwot kite ame pappere Manace rik omwolle kede, en gire obedo medo bal ameda," 
2Chronicles33:24 Omiro mere te poro kop i kome i muŋ ote wot neke oko i ode. 
2Chronicles33:25 Jo me lobo-nono te neko jo luŋ ame oporo kop me neko abaka Amon, gin te keto wode Yocia leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yocia ocako bedo aloc kun mwaka me dittere oromo aboro, en te bedo loc pi mwakki pyeradek wie acel, kun bedo i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles34:2 en obedo timo gin ame nen atira i nyim Rwot; obedo daŋ lubo kite a kwaro mere Daudi luŋ, kun mom wiwira atata." 
2Chronicles34:3 I mwaka me aboro me loccere ame en pwod awobi, en ocako woro Obaŋa a kwaro mere Daudi; eka i mwaka me apar wie aryo me loccere, en te cako tiyo tic me lonyo Juda kede Jerucalem bedo acil, kun mumuko ka woro jogi luŋ ame tye i wi kiddi malo, ototoŋo daŋ yen luŋ ame ocicibo i ka woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera, karacel i cal jogi apaa kede me atwaka." 
2Chronicles34:4 Omumuko daŋ keno lam me yalo Baal luŋ ame ocop i nyime, te mumuko daŋ keno lam me waŋo odok akur ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi, kun ŋiŋinyo atitino cal jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera karacel i cal apaa kede me atwaka luŋ, ŋiŋinyo oko apwot calo apua, te jobo onyo i lyel a jo ame rik obedo yalogi i mot." 
2Chronicles34:5 Owaŋo daŋ cogo kom olamdog i kom keno lam ame rik gin oyalo iye jogi, en te lonyo Juda kede Jerucalem kittono." 
2Chronicles34:6 En te timo daŋ amannono i boma luŋ ame tye i lobo a jo Manace, Epraim, Cimeon, tuno kede naka i lobo a jo Naputali; kede i wi oburgi ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi kuno." 
2Chronicles34:7 Omumuko keno lam piny, odidino cal jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera te ŋinyo oko apwot calo buru karacel kede cal jogi, te mumuko daŋ keno lam luŋ i lobo a jo Icrael kan ame onwoŋo gin yalo iye jogi odok akur. En doŋ te dok i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 I mwaka me apar wie aboro me loccere, ame en doŋ otyeko lonyo lobo mere kede ot Obaŋa, en ocwao Capan wot Ajalia, Maceya, gabuna me boma, kede Joa wot a Joac, ame obedo aran, ocwaogi me wot yiko ot a Rwot Obaŋa mere." 
2Chronicles34:9 Gin owoto baŋ Kilkia ame en alamdog adwoŋ ote miye lim ame onwoŋo lwak okelo i ot a Rwot, ame Olevi kede okur doggola onwoŋo orao i baŋ jo Manace, Epraim, jo Icrael luŋ ame odoŋ, jo Juda luŋ kede jo Benjamin kede jo ame bedo Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Gin te miyo limmono baŋ otic ame loo tic me ot a Rwot; eka otic ame onwoŋo tye atic ot a Rwot te miyo me yiko kan ame oballe, me roc odoco." 
2Chronicles34:11 Gin omio limmono baŋ opac kede ogedo me wilo kiddi ame opao, yen me tweyo wi ot, kede arii me gero udi luŋ ame yam obakki me Juda oweko oballe." 
2Chronicles34:12 Jonono te tiyo ticgi i cunygi ducu. Olevi ame oketo loyogi obedo Jakat, kede Obadia, ame gin jo me doggola a Merari eka ote keto Jekaria kede Mecuram, ame gin Olevi me doggola a Kokat, me loyo tic luŋ me ot a Rwot. Jo Levi ame onwoŋo odiro i goyo jami apapat me wer," 
2Chronicles34:13 oketogi me loyo oye yec, dok gin daŋ anyuto tic baŋ jo ame tio tic apapat; jo Levi ocele mege onwoŋo obedo ococ, rwode ame neno tic kede okur doggola ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles34:14 Kare ame onwoŋo gin tye akwanyo lim ame okelo i ot a Rwot okelo oko, Kilkai alamdog adwoŋ te nwoŋo buk cik a Rwot ame omio baŋ jo Icrael, kun mio baŋ Muca." 
2Chronicles34:15 Kilkai alamdog adwoŋ te kobbi Capam aran ni, “Atyeko nwoŋo buk cik i ot a Rwot;” en te miyo bukkono baŋ Capam." 
2Chronicles34:16 Capam te tero buk baŋ abaka, te kobbe kop i kom tic ni, “Omiro ni tye atiyo tic luŋ ame yin iciko ni gin ti." 
2Chronicles34:17 Gin doŋ okwanyo lim luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot, ote miyo daŋ oko baŋ jo ame loo tic kede otic me ot a Rwot.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 En dok te kobbi abaka ni, “Kilkia alamdog adwoŋ omia bukkoro.” Capam te kwano bukkono kun abaka awinyo." 
2Chronicles34:19 Kare ame abaka owinyo kop ame okwano i buk me cik, en oyeyeco boŋŋi mere oko," 
2Chronicles34:20 Abaka te ciko Kilkia alamdog adwoŋ, kede Akikam wot a Capan kede Abudon wot a Mikaya, Capam aran kede Acaya amiro abaka, kun kobo ni," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Wot ipeny wunu Rwot pira, pi lwak kede pi lobo me Juda luŋ, pi kop i buk man ame onwoŋo-ni, pien akemo a Rwot kara doŋ olyeto meicel i komwa, pien kwariwa mom obedo lubo gin ame tye i buk man, kun otimo kite ame ocoo kede kop i komwa i buk man.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Mannono te miyo Kilkia alamdog, Akikam kede Abudon, Capam kede Akaya wot baŋ adwarpiny a dako a nyiŋe Kulda dako a Calum wot a Tikiva, ame obedo wot a Karkac, agwok boŋŋi abaka ame i kare-nono onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem i kabedo moro i Jerucalem kuno tuŋ ocele. Gin owoto kuno ote wot kop i dako-nono kop i kom gin ame otimere." 
2Chronicles34:23 En te kobbigi ni, “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni ikobbi wunu ŋat ame oorowu baŋa ni," 
2Chronicles34:24 Rwot okobo ni ebino keto can i kom kabedo man kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo iye, pi cobo kop luŋ me ceno dano ame ocoo i buk cik ame doŋ otyeko kwano kun abaka me Juda winyo." 
2Chronicles34:25 Pien gin doŋ okwera oko, ote bedo waŋo odok akur baŋ cal jogi, kun oroka kede me akemo maka i kom ginnoro luŋ ame gin obedo tiyo i cingi; mannono omio akemona doŋ bino lyeto agwa meicel i kom kabedo man, ame mom dok romo kwe kadi acel." 
2Chronicles34:26 Aco baŋ abaka me Juda ame oorowu me bino penyo Rwot, wun ibino kobbe wunu ni Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni kop i kom kop ame cwinyo," 
2Chronicles34:27 pien i kare ame yin iwinyo kop ame rik akobo i kom kabedo man kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo iye, yin iru ŋut oko i cunyi ite mwolle-gu i nyima, dok iyeyeco daŋ boŋŋi i komi oko; mannono omio an Rwot daŋ awinyo kwacci, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
2Chronicles34:28 Nen ba, an abino dwoki iwoto weo karacel i kwarini, ibino to ote yiki daŋ i kuc, waŋi mom bino neno twon tim arac ame abino kelo i kom kabedo man.” Gin doŋ te dwoko kop baŋ abaka." 
2Chronicles34:29 Abaka te cwayo kwena, ote coko odoŋe luŋ me Juda kede me Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles34:30 Abaka te wot malo i ot a Rwot kun woto i jo luŋ me Juda kede Jerucalem, olamdog kede Olevi, jo luŋ adoŋo kede otino, en te kwano kop luŋ ame tye i buk cik ame onwoŋo i ot a Rwot. En okwano kun lwak luŋ awinyo." 
2Chronicles34:31 Abaka te cuŋ i kabedo mere te cikere i nyim Rwot ni ebino lubo Rwot, ebino mako cikere luŋ, kede kop me caden luŋ, kede ecwillere daŋ luŋ. En ocikere ni ebino lubo magi luŋ i cunye ducu kede tipo mere luŋ, kun etimo jami ducu ame ocoo i buk man." 
2Chronicles34:32 En te ciko jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem kede i Benjamin i kare-nono ni gin myero lub cikere-nono. Jo ame bedo i Juda kede i Jerucalem te bedo timo ginnoro luŋ kite ame tye kede i cikere a Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi. 
2Chronicles34:33 Yocia te kwanyo ginnoro luŋ ame obedo me kwer i kabedo luŋ ame tye i lobo a jo Icrael, eka te miyo jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i lobo me Icrael calo woro Rwot Obaŋagi. Gin naka mom oloki Rwot Obaŋa a kwarigi ŋegi kadi acel i kare a Yocia luŋ." 
2Chronicles35:1 Yocia te kwero ecuban me Kato i Jerucalem, omio oneko romo me Kato i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe me agege." 
2Chronicles35:2 En oketo olamdog i dog ticgi, te daŋ cukoro cunygi me tiyo ticgi i ot a Rwot." 
2Chronicles35:3 En te kobbigi jo Levi ame gin obedo opwony a jo Icrael luŋ dok ame gin obedo jo acil baŋ Rwot, ni, “Ket wunu canduk acil i ot ame Culeman wot a Daudi abaka me Icrael rik ogero pire; mom dok ibed yeyo wumo i wi gwokwu, Aman doŋ ti wunu tic a Rwot Obaŋawu kede tic a jo mere Icrael." 
2Chronicles35:4 Yikere wunu i doggola a kwariwu i dul i dul, kun ilubo wunu gin ame Daudi abaka me Icrael ociko karacel kede en ame wode Culeman ociko." 
2Chronicles35:5 Cuŋ wunu i kabedo acil, cuŋ wunu kun ilubo wunu doggola a kwariwu, kun iyikere wunu me konyo omegowu kede jo Obaŋa ocele mere, kun dul acel acel tye kede jo ame etiko." 
2Chronicles35:6 Nek wunu rommi me kato, lonnyere wunu kenwu, yik wunu gin amite pi omegowu, me ilub wunu kop a Rwot ame Muca ociko.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Abaka Yocia te miyo mot me Kato pi lwak luŋ ame onwoŋo tye, omio itino rommi kede itino dyegi tutumia pyeradek nono, kede twoni tutumia adek; magi luŋ en okwanyo i kom limmere en ikome." 
2Chronicles35:8 Rwode mere daŋ te miyo lwak mot ame cunygi omito, kun omio daŋ olamdog kede Olevi. Kilkia, Jekaria kede Jekiel, ame gin onwoŋo odoŋe ame loo tic i ot a Rwot, gin omio olamdog itino rommi kede me dyegi tutumia aryo kede mia abicel, kede twoni mia adek, me mot me kato." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konania daŋ, kede Cemaya, kede omego mere Natanel, Kacabia, Jeyel, kede Jojabad, ame gin obedo otel a jo Levi gin omio Olevi itino rommi kede me dyegi tutumia abic kede twoni mia abic, me mot me Kato." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kare ame doŋ otyeko yiko jami luŋ, olamdog ocuŋ kakargi, kun Olevi daŋ ocuŋ kakargi i dul i dul kite ame abaka ociko." 
2Chronicles35:11 Ote doŋ neko rommi me Kato. Olamdog te kikiro remogi i kom keno lam kun Olevi tye ayaŋo rommi ame oneneko. 
2Chronicles35:12 Gin te popoko leyi me mot awaŋa, kun omio doggola acel acel megi, me gin yal i Rwot kite ame ocoo kede i buk a Muca. Gin opoko twoni daŋ kittono;" 
2Chronicles35:13 obulo riŋo rommi me Kato i mac kun olubo gin ame ociko, ento mot acillere ote tedo ateda i gulli, kede cupulia, ote tero oyotoyot wot poko oko baŋ lwak." 
2Chronicles35:14 Icennere gin doŋ te yiko megi kede me olamdog, pien olamdog ame obedo ikwae Aron onwoŋo tye i tic adwoŋ meicel ame diogi naka iwor tic me waŋo mot kede dwol me yalo Rwot. Mannono omio Olevi oyiko megi kede me olamdog ikwae Aron." 
2Chronicles35:15 Ower ame obedo ikwae Acap onwoŋo daŋ tye kakargi kite ame Daudi ociko. Ikwae Acap, Keman, kede me a Jedutun, aran-piny abaka, kede okur dogcel luŋ: gin onwoŋo mom twero ya i dog ticgi, pien omegogi jo Levi onwoŋo tye ayiko cam me Kato pirgi." 
2Chronicles35:16 Mannono omio woro me kwero ecuban me Kato a Rwot oyikere aber i nino-nono karacel kede yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa i wi keno lam; gin luŋ rik oyikere kun lubo gin ame abaka Yocia ociko. 
2Chronicles35:17 Jo Icrael ame onwoŋo tye i nino-nono te kwero ecuban me Kato kede ecuban me ogati a tobi mom iye pi nino abiro. 
2Chronicles35:18 Kwero ecuban me Kato kittono rik onwoŋo mom doŋ timere iyi Icrael, cakere i kare adwar-piny Camwiri; mom tye abaka moro iyi akina obakki me Icrael ame okwero ecuban me Kato kite ame abaka Yocia okwero kede, kun kwero karacel olamdog, Olevi jo Juda kede jo Icrael luŋ ame onwoŋo tye, medo kede jo ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles35:19 Ecuban me Kato man okwero i mwaka me apar wie aboro me loc a Yocia. 
2Chronicles35:20 Kare ame man luŋ otum, ame Yocia doŋ oyiko ot a Rwot oko. Neko abaka me Miciri, owoto owao monnyere me wot lweny i Karkemic ame tye i ŋet kulo Efurate. Yocia otemo ŋolle i kome," 
2Chronicles35:21 cite en te cwayo kwena baŋ Yocia kun kobbe ni, “Abaka me Juda we, imito ni wan otim gin aŋo, ŋat man i kom awottere? An gira tin mom abino me lweny kedi, cite me lweny okworra; Obaŋa otyeko koba ni myero ecuny wot. Myero kur item pyem Obaŋa ba, pien en tye keda, naka mio en jweri oko,”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Kadi bed amannono, Yocia mom oye winyo koppere, en orukere acalo dano moro ata, te wot me wot lweny kede. En okwero winyo kop a Neko oko ame onwoŋo obedo kop Obaŋa ikokome, en omedde i wottere me wot lweny kede i bar me Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Kare ame lweny doŋ ocakere, won atero moro te celo abaka Yocia oko, abaka te kobbi omiro mere ni, “Kwanya wunu itera wunu teŋe pien owana atek meicel.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Omiro mere te tiŋe oko i wi gadigadi mere ote kete i wi gadigadi ocele mere ote tere naka i Jerucalem. Yocia te to oko ote yiko kome i lyel a kwari mere. Jo Juda luŋ kede jo Jerucalem te bedo kumo pire. 
2Chronicles35:25 Adwarpiny Jeremia te cako wer me koko abaka Yocia, ower a co kede en a mon pwod wero wer man naka tin ka ce opo pi Yocia. Omia man odoko cik i yi Icrael; wer me koko Yocia-ni tye ocoo i buk me Koko." 
2Chronicles35:26 Kop i kom Yocia odoŋŋere luŋ, ginnoro luŋ abeco ame yam en otio kun lubo gin ame ocoo i cik a Rwot," 
2Chronicles35:27 gin ame en otio cakere iyi ageyi naka iyi agikki, ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk Obakki me Icrael kede Juda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Jo te yero Yekoakaj wot a Yocia ote kwere me bedo abakagi akaka pappere kun bedo i Jerucalem. 
2Chronicles36:2 Yekoakaj ocako loc kun mwaka me dittere doŋ oromo pyeradek wie adek, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi dwete adek." 
2Chronicles36:3 Abaka Neko me Miciri te ryeme oko i Jerucalem en te ŋolo cul me ryal ame pekkere romo ratili tutumia abiro, kede mia abic, kede cul me jabu ame pekkere romo ratili pyerabiro wie abic i wi Juda." 
2Chronicles36:4 Abaka Neko te keto ominnere Eliakim me loyo Juda kede Jerucalem, eka te loko nyiŋe oko ni Yekoyakim. Ominnere Yekoakaj en te tero oko naka i Miciri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yekoyakim ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo wie abic, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie acel. En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot Obaŋa." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon rik te bino cako lweny i kome ame te make tweye oko kede jegere, te tere naka i Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnejar te daŋ tero jami mogo me tic i ot a Rwot i Babulon, te wot ketogi i paco mere i Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:8 Kop i kom Yekoyakim odoŋŋere ducu, timmogo me kwer ame en obedo timo, kede koppogo ame onwoŋo i kome ame mom ocoo kan, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk Obakki me Icrael kede Juda. Wode Yekoyakim en ame te leyo kakare." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yekoyakim ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo aboro, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem dwete adek kede nino apar keken, En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot." 
2Chronicles36:10 I kare me oro abaka Nebukadnejar ocwao omiro mere me wot kele i Babulon, kun okelo daŋ jami mogo abeco me tic i ot a Rwot. Ote lunyo keto ominnere Jedekia me bedo abaka ame loo Juda kede Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles36:11 Jedekia ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo wie acel, en te bedo loc i Jerucalem mwakki apar wie acel." 
2Chronicles36:12 En obedo timo gin anen arac i nyim Rwot Obaŋa mere. En mom oye bedo amwol baŋ Jeremia adwarpiny, ame obedo kobbe kop ame oya ibaŋ Rwot." 
2Chronicles36:13 En daŋ ojem i kom Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon, ame rik onwoŋo omie ekwoŋo akwoŋa kun ekwoŋo i nyiŋ Obaŋa; en odoko apala ame mom doŋ twero ŋut me lokere dok baŋ Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
2Chronicles36:14 Olamdog adoŋo luŋ karacel kede lwak luŋ onwoŋo doŋ ogak oko odoco, ame otimo doŋ timmogo me kwer calo rok ocele, kun daŋ obalo doŋ ot a Rwot ame Rwot onwoŋo olonyo me bedo kabedo acil i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles36:15 Rwot Obaŋa akwarigi obedo cwayo okwena baŋgi me kwenyorogi tere i tere, pien kica onwoŋo omako i kom jo mere kede i kom kabedo mere." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ento gin gigi ote nywaro okwena Obaŋa anywara ame ocao-gu koppere, ojwiogu odwarpiny ajwia, naka omio akemo omako Rwot otuggere i kom jo mere agwa meicel ame mom dok tye yo moro me juko." 
2Chronicles36:17 Mannono omio Rwot okelo abaka me Kadaya me bino lweny kedgi, ame te neko awobegi i pala lweny, kun nekogi kun nekogi naka i kabedo acil, ame kica mom omako kadi acel i kom awobi, kadi i kom nyako a mom ru oŋeye ico, i kom adwoŋ oti onyo en ame oteggo meicel. Rwot omiogi luŋ i ciŋ abaka me Kalidaya." 
2Chronicles36:18 En te yako jami luŋ ame rik onwoŋo otio kedgi i ot Obaŋa, jami adoŋo kede en atino, jami ame rik okano i ot kano lim a Rwot kede en ame onwoŋo tye i ot kano lim abaka karacel kede me a rwode mere, jami magi luŋ en oyako te tero naka i Babulon," 
2Chronicles36:19 Gin te waŋo ot Obaŋa, paco abaka, kun omumuko apama cel me Jerucalem, obabalo daŋ jami mogo me wel ame onwoŋo tye iye." 
2Chronicles36:20 Jo ame obwot i lak pala romo, en otero luŋ i Babulon acalo opii, gin te wot bedo kuno acalo omiro mere kede me ikwae tuno naka i kare ame loc a jo Pacia omoko atek." 
2Chronicles36:21 Mannono omio kop a Rwot ame rik emio Jeremia okobo ocobere kakare, ni, “Lobo bino doŋ yie nono pi mwakki pyerabiro me culo kare me kwero nino me cabit ame rik onwoŋo mom obedo kwero.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 I mwaka me agege me loc abaka Kuro me Pacia, i mwaka-nono en ame Rwot obin otugo iye cunye en abaka Kuro me cwalo cik romo lobo mere luŋ kun daŋ mio ocoo acoa me kwan rom lobo mere luŋ. Man otimere me kop a rik Rwot omio Jeremia okobo cobere kakare, Koppere-nono rik ocoo ni." 
2Chronicles36:23 “Man en gin ame Kuro abaka me Pacia okobo. Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa me polo doŋ otyeko keta me bedo aloc me wi podo luŋ, dok omia tic me gero ot pire i Jerucalem i Juda. Doŋ Rwot Obaŋa myero bed i ŋat acel acel i kom jo mere luŋ ame tye i akinawu; omi en wot i Jerucalem kuno.”" 
Ezra1:1 I mwaka me agege me loc abaka Kuro me Pacia, i mwaka-nono en ame Rwot obin otugo iye cunye en abaka Kuro me cwalo cik romo lobo mere luŋ, kun daŋ mio ocoo acoa me kwan i lobo mere luŋ, Man otimere me kop a rik Rwot omio amiro mere adwarpiny Jeremia okobo cobere kakare, Koppere-nono rik ocoo ni." 
Ezra1:2 “Man en gin ame Kuro abaka me Pacia okobo, Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa me polo doŋ otyeko keta me bedo aloc me wi podo luŋ, dok omia tic me gero ot pire i Jerucalem i Juda," 
Ezra1:3 Doŋ Obaŋa myero bed i ŋat acel acel i kom jo mere luŋ ame tye i akinawu; omi ŋat acel acel owot i Jerucalem ame tye i Juda, me wot ger ot a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, ame obedo Obaŋa ame oworo i Jerucalem." 
Ezra1:4 Ajudaya acel acel ame odoŋ i kabedo moro keken ame en tye iye, myero nwoŋ kony i ciŋ jo ame ebedo iyi akinagi. Myero migi kony me jami magi: ryal, jabu, jami apapat, leyi, kun mom okwano iye mot ocele ame gin omio pi ber a cunygi pi ot Obaŋa ame tye i Jerucalem.”" 
Ezra1:5 Eka otel me atekere a Juda kede me atekere a Benjamin, olamdog kede jo Levi, kede ŋat acel acel ame Obaŋa onwoŋo oloko cunye me dok i Jerucalem, te cako yikere me wot gero ot a Rwot i Jerucalem," 
Ezra1:6 Jo ame rik gin obedo i akinagi luŋ te konyogi kede jami mogo me amaka, ame otio i ryal, kun omiogi daŋ jabu, jami mogo ocele, leyi apapat, kede jami mogo me wel apipim, kede mot me amia i Rwot." 
Ezra1:7 Abaka Kuro rik daŋ te miyogi jami mogo me tic i ot a Rwot ame rik abaka Nebukadnejar oyako i Jerucalem te bino keto i ot me woro Obaŋe mere. 
Ezra1:8 Abaka Kuro ogamo jami magi i ciŋ Mitredat, adwoŋ ame rik loo lim abaka. En omio dano-nono okwano jami luŋ, kun mio baŋ Cecibajar aloc me Juda," 
Ezra1:9 Jami ame rik okwano welgi ene: becen me jabu pyeradek, becen me ryal tutumia acel, tabo me waŋo odok akur pyeraryo wie aboŋwen," 
Ezra1:10 tabo me jabu pyeradek, tabo me ryal mia aŋwen apar nono kede jami ocele apapat tutumia acel." 
Ezra1:11 Jami luŋ ame okwano ame otio i jabu kede ryal rik oromo tutumia kany kede mia aŋwen nono, Jami magi luŋ rik Cecibajar otero luŋ i Jerucalem i kare ame odwoko jo ame rik tye iyi opii i Babulon i Jerucalem." 
Ezra2:1 Magi gin jo me Juda ame rik oya iyi opii i Babulon kan ame rik abaka Nabukadnejar oterogi iye acalo opii, Gin luŋ odwogo i Jerucalem kede i Juda, kun ŋat acel acel dok cen i boma me turgi." 
Ezra2:2 Otel ame owoto kedgi ene: Jerubabel, Yecua, Nekemia, Ceraya, Reelaya, Mordekai, Bilcan, Micpar, Bigvai, Rekum kede Bana. Man en wel jo Icrael ame odwogo iyi opii," 
Ezra2:3 Jo me doggola a Paroc rik tye tutumia aryo, mia acel kede pyerabiro wie aryo," 
Ezra2:4 Jo me doggola a Cepatia te bedo mia adek kede pyerabiro wie aryo," 
Ezra2:5 Jo me doggola Arak, mia abiro kede pyerabiro wie abic," 
Ezra2:6 Jo me Pakat-moab, ame obedo jo me doggola a Yecua kede Yoab, te bedo tutumia aryo, mia aboro kede apar wie aryo," 
Ezra2:7 Jo me doggola a Elam te bedo tutumia acel, mia aryo kede pyerabic wie aŋwen," 
Ezra2:8 Jo me doggola a Jattu te bedo mia aboŋwen kede pyeraŋwen wie abic.
