Ezra2:9 Jo me doggola a Jakkai te dwogo mia abiro kede pyerabicel nono," 
Ezra2:10 Jo me doggola a Bani te bedo mia abicel kede pyeraŋwen wie aryo," 
Ezra2:11 Jo me doggola a Bebai odwogo mia abicel kede pyeraryo wie adek," 
Ezra2:12 Jo me doggola Ajigad te dwogo tutumia acel, mia aryo kede pyeraryo wie aryo," 
Ezra2:13 Jo me doggola Adonikam te dwogo mia abicel kede pyerabicel wie abicel. 
Ezra2:14 Jo me doggola a Bigvai te dwogo tutumia aryo, kede pyerabic wie abicel." 
Ezra2:15 Jo me doggola Adin odwogo mia aŋwen kede pyerabic wie aŋwen," 
Ezra2:16 Jo me doggola Ater ame obedo dano me doggola a Kejekia te bedo pyeraŋwen wie aboro," 
Ezra2:17 Jo me doggola a Bejai odwogo mia adek kede pyeraryo wie adek," 
Ezra2:18 Jo me doggola a Jora te bedo mia acel kede apar wie aryo," 
Ezra2:19 Jo me doggola a Kacum odwogo mia aryo kede pyeraryo wie adek. 
Ezra2:20 Jo me doggola a Gibbar odwogo pyeraboŋwen wie abic. 
Ezra2:21 Jo ame rik kwarigi bedo i Beterekem odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie adek. 
Ezra2:22 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Netopa odwogo pyerabic wie abicel. 
Ezra2:23 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Anatot odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aboro. 
Ezra2:24 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Ajimavet odwogo pyeraŋwen wie aryo. 
Ezra2:25 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Kiriatjearim, Cepira, kede i Beerot odwogo mia abiro kede pyeraŋwen wie adek." 
Ezra2:26 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Rama kede i Geba odwogo mia abicel kede pyeraryo wie acel. 
Ezra2:27 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Mikmac odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aryo," 
Ezra2:28 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Betel kede i Ai odwogo mia aryo kede pyeraryo wie adek. 
Ezra2:29 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Nebo odwogo pyerabic wie aryo. 
Ezra2:30 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Magbic odwogo mia acel kede pyerabic wie abicel. 
Ezra2:31 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Elam ocele mere odwogo tutumia acel, mia aryo kede pyerabic wie aŋwen." 
Ezra2:32 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Karim odwogo mia adek kede pyeraryo," 
Ezra2:33 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Lod, Kadid, kede i Ono, odwogo mia abiro kede pyeraryo wie abic," 
Ezra2:34 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Jeriko odwogo mia adek kede pyeraŋwen wie abic. 
Ezra2:35 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Cena odwogo tutumia adek, mia abicel kede pyeradek." 
Ezra2:36 Magi en ame obedo jo me doggola olamdog ame odwogo iyi opii: Ikwae a Jedaya me doggola a Yecua odwogo mia aboŋwen kede pyerabiro wie adek," 
Ezra2:37 Jo me doggola Immer odwogo tutumia acel kede pyerabic wie aryo. 
Ezra2:38 Jo me doggola a Pacur odwogo tutumia acel, mia aryo, kede pyeraŋwen wie abiro." 
Ezra2:39 Jo me doggola a Karim odwogo tutumia acel kede apar wie abiro. 
Ezra2:40 Magi en ame obedo jo Levi ame odwogo iyi opii: Jo me doggola a Yecua kede me a Kadmiel ame obedo ikwae Odavia te bedo pyerabiro wie aŋwen," 
Ezra2:41 Jo Levi ame rik gin ower, ame obedo ikwae Acap odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aboro," 
Ezra2:42 Jo Levi ame rik obedo ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa, ame obedo ikwae a Callum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub, Katita, kede ikwae a Cobai odwogo mia acel kede pyeradek wie aboŋwen." 
Ezra2:43 Magi en ame obedo jo ame odwogo iyi opii i akina jo ame rik tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa: jo me doggola a Jika, Agaba, Tabaot," 
Ezra2:44 jo me doggola a Keroc, Ciaka, kede Padon," 
Ezra2:45 jo me doggola a Lebana, Agaba, kede Akub," 
Ezra2:46 jo me doggola Agab, Camlai, kede Kanan," 
Ezra2:47 jo me doggola a Giddel, Gakar kede Reaya," 
Ezra2:48 jo me doggola a Rejin, Nekoda, kede Gajam," 
Ezra2:49 jo me doggola a Ujja, Pacea kede Becai," 
Ezra2:50 jo me doggola Acina, Meunuim, kede Nepicim," 
Ezra2:51 jo me doggola a Bakbuk, Akupa kede Karkur," 
Ezra2:52 jo me doggola a Bajlut, Mekida, kede Karica," 
Ezra2:53 jo me doggola a Barkoc, Cicera kede Tema," 
Ezra2:54 jo me doggola a Nejia kede Atipa. 
Ezra2:55 Magi obedo jo ame odwogo Iyi opii i akina ikwae omiro ame rik tio baŋ Culeman: jo me doggola a Cotai, Acoperet, Peruda" 
Ezra2:56 jo me doggola a Jaala, Darkon, kede Gidel," 
Ezra2:57 jo me doggola a Cepatia, Kattil, Pokeret-Kajebaim kede Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Wel jo luŋ ame rik tio ticcogo apek i ot a Rwot kede ikwae omiro, ame rik tio baŋ abaka Culeman ame odwogo iyi opii rik romo mia adek kede pyeraŋwen wie aryo." 
Ezra2:59 Magi daŋ obedo jo ame oya i Tel-mela, Tel-karica, Kerub, Addan, Immer; gin onwoŋo mom otwero nyuto doggola a kwarigi ame gin oya iye ame twero cimo kannaler ka ce gin obedo jo Icrael." 
Ezra2:60 Obino jo a Delaya, Tobia, kede jo a Nekoda; gin luŋ mia abicel kede pyerabic wie aryo." 
Ezra2:61 Medo i kom mannono, ikwae olamdog magi daŋ obino: jo me doggola a Kabaya, Kakkoj, kede me a Bariillai ame rik onyomo dako mere i akina anyira a Barjillai me Gilead, rik daŋ ote cako lwoŋe kede nyiŋ papa a cegenono." 
Ezra2:62 Otemo yenyo nyiŋ jo man ka ce onwoŋo tye i buk ame ocoo iye nyiŋ kwaro a jo Icrael, cite mom ote nwoŋo, omio ote kwanyo nyiŋgi oko i kom olamdog, ote dwoko i akina jo ocele ame mom obedo olamdog," 
Ezra2:63 Gabuna rik te miyogi ŋeyo ni kite acalo gin ame nyuto ni gin obedo ikwae olamdog mom tye-ni, gin doŋ mom bino medde camo cam ame omio baŋ Obaŋa, tuno ka alamdoggoro tye ame romo penyo tam Obaŋa, kun tio Urim kede Tumim." 
Ezra2:64 Lwak luŋ ame rik odwogo iyi opii rik romo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie aryo, mia adek kede pyerabicel nono," 
Ezra2:65 kun mom okwano iye omirogi kede aŋecagi ame rik tye tutumia abiro, mia adek kede pyeradek wie abiro, karacel kede ower a co kede a mom ame rik romo mia aryo nono," 
Ezra2:66 Aguragura ame gin odwogo kede rik romo mia abiro kede pyeradek wie abicel, kede kane adoŋo mege ame romo mia aryo kede pyeraŋwen wie abic," 
Ezra2:67 kede inaga mia aŋwen kede pyeradek wie abic, kede dok kane ocele tutumia abicel, mia abiro kede pyeraryo nono." 
Ezra2:68 Kare ame jo man otuno i ot a Rwot, ame rik tye i Jerucalem, odoŋe atekere mogo rik te miyo mot ame cunygi okwanyo me konyo tic me gero ot Obaŋa i kakare aconnaca ikokome." 
Ezra2:69 Gin omio gin ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋgi, kun ŋat acel acel mio gin ame eromo miyo, Gin te miyo iyi cao ticcono jabu ame pekkere romo dari tutumia apar wie abicel, mia abic kede pyeraryo nono, kede ryal ame pekkere romo cekel tutumia acel kede apar wie abiro, kede boŋŋi me aruka olamdog ame romo mia acel." 
Ezra2:70 Olamdog kede jo Levi, karacel kede jo ocele mogo rik te bedo i Jerucalem, kene i ŋete, eka ower, ogwok doggola ot a Rwot kede jo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot a Rwot, kede jo Icrael odonnege luŋ, te doŋ bedo i bomagi." 
Ezra3:1 Kare ame dwe me abiro doŋ oromo, ikwae a jo Icrael onwoŋo doŋ tye obedo oko i bomagi. Gin luŋ rik ote bino cokere i i Jerucalem i cuny acel," 
Ezra3:2 eka Yecua wot a Yekojadak, karacel kede olamdog owote mere, kede Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel karacel kede wati mere, ote cako gero keno lam me yalo Obaŋa a jo Icrael, me ocak yalo iye Obaŋa i mot awaŋa kite ame ocoo kede i buk a Muca ame obedo dano Obaŋa," 
Ezra3:3 Kadi bed gin rik onwoŋo tye kede lworo i kom jo ame rik onwoŋo bedo i lobo-nono, cite gin ogero keno lam kakare ame rik onwoŋo tye iye con. Gin rik dok te cako yalo Rwot iye i mot awaŋa, kun oyale odiko kede otyeno." 
Ezra3:4 Gin te bedo kwero ecuban me gonye kite ame rik onwoŋo ocoo kede piny, ote daŋ bedo yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa i wel ame ociko me nino acel acel." 
Ezra3:5 Medo i kom mannono, gin dok te bedo miyo mot aŋola ame owaŋo alutu nino i nino kede mot ame oyalo i kare me por dwe kede en ame oyalo i Rwot i kare me ecuban adoŋo mege ame ociko pirgi luŋ, kede mot ame dano acel acel mio baŋ Rwot kite ame cunye mito." 
Ezra3:6 Kadi bed jo Icrael rik mom ru ocako gero ot a Rwot, cite gin ocako yalo Rwot i mot awaŋa i nino dwe acel me dwe me abiro." 
Ezra3:7 Jo Icrael rik te miyo lim baŋ opaa kiddi kede opaa bao, kun omio daŋ cam kede gigi mogo me amata, kede moo me acwala baŋ jo Cidon kede jo Turo me wilo yen cedar i Lebanon, ame rik omio beo i nam naka i Jopa. Man rik otimo pi twer ame Kuro abaka me Pacia omiogi." 
Ezra3:8 I dwe me aryo me mwaka me aryo ame gin odwogo kede i Jerucalem kan ame rik ot Obaŋa tye iye, en ame gin ogeo iye tic. Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel kede Yecua wot a Yekojadak, kede jo ocele mege, karacel olamdog kede jo Levi, kede jo luŋ ame rik odwogo iyi opii, gin luŋ ocako ticcono. Jo luŋ ame mwaka me ditogi oromo pyeraryo wot kede malo, oketogi me loyo tic ame i ot a Rwot." 
Ezra3:9 Yecua kede awobe mere kede wati mere, Kadmiel kede awobe mere, ame gin jo me doggola Odavia, gin luŋ rik onotte karacel i loyo tic ame otio i ot a Rwot, kun oribere karacel i jo me doggola a Kenadad, ame gin daŋ obedo jo Levi." 
Ezra3:10 Kare ame ogedo ocako gero acakki te ot a Rwot, olamdog ame oruko rukgi i komgi ote bino cuŋ i nyim, kun omako apel me akuta, kede jo Levi me doggola Acap, kun omako ajaa. Gin te cako pako Obaŋa kite ame rik Daudi, abaka me Icrael ocikogi kede." 
Ezra3:11 Gin te bedo wero wer me pako Rwot kun oleo alea, opake kede dok daŋ opwoc kede ni, “Pien en gire ber, pien marrere a mom lokere bedo nakanaka i kom jo Icrael.” Jo luŋ te wo kun ŋat acel acel redo i dwon aloŋo, pako kede Rwot, pien acakki me te ottere doŋ oketo oko," 
Ezra3:12 Olamdoggogo oteggo kede jo Levi kede odoŋe atekere ame rik onwoŋo oneno ot Obaŋa me agege, gin luŋ okok atek i kare ame otye ka gero acakki te ot a Rwot anyennere-nono. Cite i caa-nono jo ocele gire onwoŋo tye awo kede yomcuny." 
Ezra3:13 Man omio kare-nono mom onwoŋo tye ŋattoro ame twero poko dwon me koko kede dwoŋ me yomcuny, pien wo onwoŋo dwon okato kare ame winyere i kannabor meicel." 
Ezra4:1 Kare ame okwor a jo Juda kede Benjamin owinyo ni jo Icrael ame odwogo iyi opii tye ka gero ot a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael," 
Ezra4:2 gin owoto baŋ Jerubabel kede baŋ odoŋe ame loo doggola a kwarigi, ote wot kobbigi ni “Wan daŋ omito nywako kedwu tic me gero ot a Rwot. Wan daŋ oworo Obaŋa ame wun iworo wunu, wan obedo yale kede mot aŋola con meicel cakere i kare ame abaka Ecaraddon me Acuria ocwaowa me bino bedo kan.”" 
Ezra4:3 Eka Jerubabel, kede Yecua kede odoŋe ame loo doggola a kwarigi te gamo kopgi ni, “Wan mom oye ni wun ikonywa wunu kede tic me gero ot a Rwot Obaŋawa. Wan obino gero ot pire kenwa, kite ame abaka Kuro me Pacia ocikowa kede.”" 
Ezra4:4 Jo ame rik onwoŋo bedo i lobogi, te dok cako balo cuny jo Juda, kun omiogi lworo me medde i ticgi," 
Ezra4:5 owilogu oticcogo adoŋo ame mio abaka tam me mi juk ticgi oko, Man obedo timere i kare me loc a Jerubabel tuno naka i kare a Dario, abaka me Pacia." 
Ezra4:6 Eka i acakki me loc Akacuwera, jo ame bedo i lobo-nono te kelo pido ame ocoo acoa i kom jo ame bedo i Juda kede i Jerucalem." 
Ezra4:7 I kare me loc Atakerec, jo magi, Bicilam kede Mitireda kede Tabeel karacel kede owotegi ocele, gin luŋ ocoo waraga baŋ Atakerec, abaka me Pacia. Waraga man rik ocoo i leb Aram me wek ote gonyo agonya i kare me kwano." 
Ezra4:8 Medo i kom mannono, Rekum ame obedo akony gabuna kede Cimicai ame rik obedo aran te coyo waraga man baŋ Atakerec, abaka me Pacia, kun okobo kop i kom Jerucalem." 
Ezra4:9 Waraga man oya ibaŋ Rekum, akony gabuna kede Cimicai, aran, ame gin ocoo karacel owotegi luŋ, oŋolkop, gabuna luŋ, odoŋe ocele me abumente, kede jo Pacia, jo Erek, jo Babublon kede jo Elam ame obedo Cuca," 
Ezra4:10 karacel kede lwak luŋ ame Ocinappar, twon aloc atek meicel rik okwanyo i lobogi, te bino miyogi bedo i lobo me Camaria ducu kede i lobo luŋ ame tye loka kulo me Euprate," 
Ezra4:11 Man doŋ en kop ame tye i waraga ame gin ocoo baŋ Atakerec. “Baŋ abaka Akacwera, wan omironi ame tye loka kulo me Euprate, wan luŋ omoti." 
Ezra4:12 Doŋ aman wan omito ni yin adwoŋwa iŋe ni Ojudaya ame rik odwogo i bani kuno baŋwa kan, aman gin owoto oko i Jerucalem. Gin aman ocako gero boma me jem ca, ame en boma me timo timmogo areco. Gin aman doŋ tye agero apama cel ame daŋ doŋ ceggi tum oko." 
Ezra4:13 Yin adwoŋ myero iŋe ni ka ce boma ni ogere otum, ame apama mere doŋ otum odoco, jo iye mom doŋ bino medde gelo ocoro, lim me lakoro jami ame bino i lobogi kede en ame gin cwao i lobo ocele, akadi kit lim ocele luŋ ame gin culo iyi cao abumente, mannono bi no miyo lim ame bino i cao abaka dok oko piny." 
Ezra4:14 Doŋ kite acalo wan obedo jo ame kwo i ciŋi yin adwoŋ, pe bedo ber ka wan oliŋ aliŋa aboŋo titti, kun wan oneno kite ame otye ka nywari kede," 
Ezra4:15 me imi yeny koppere i bukkogo ame kwarini yam obedo coyo iye kop otimere. Wan oŋeo ni ce imio otimo amannono, ibino niaŋ ni boma man yam con obedo boma me jem kede me timo tim areco, ame obedo yelo wi obakki apol meicel kede me oloc ocele, dok daŋ ibino niaŋ ni ayela obedo timere i boma man cakere con. Mannono en ame omio rik ote babalo en boma-nono oko," 
Ezra4:16 Wan oniaŋ ni ka ce boma man bino gerre tum, ame apama mere doŋ otum odoco, yin gire mom dok ibino nwoŋo ginnoro i lobo luŋ ame tye tuŋ loka kulo Euprate.”" 
Ezra4:17 Abaka rik te dok i waraga-nono kit man: “Baŋ Rekum, akony gabuna, kede Cimicai, aran, kede owotewu luŋ ame bedo i Camaria, kede i lobo ocele luŋ ame tye loka kulo Euprate. Amotowu ducu." 
Ezra4:18 Doŋ waragawu ame icwao wunu baŋa, otyeko kwano luŋ i nyima kun ogonyo aber." 
Ezra4:19 Atyeko ciko me yenyo kop ame ikobo wunu, aman daŋ doŋ atyeko ŋiyo buke luŋ, onwoŋo ni boma-nono cakere con onwoŋo obedo boma ame jo iye maro jem i kom obakki, jem kede ayela apapat obedo timere iye." 
Ezra4:20 Dok aniaŋ ni obakki mogo ame tek meicel obedo loyo Jerucalem kede lobo ducu ame tye loka kulo Euprate, kun daŋ orao ocoro kede kit lim ocele ame donyo iyi cao abumente." 
Ezra4:21 Man omio doŋ myero iket wunu cik me jo-nono juk gedogi-nono oko tuno waŋ ame cikka okato oko. 
Ezra4:22 Myero inen ni itimo wunu man oyot, pe myero mi lim ame bino i cao abaka bale.”" 
Ezra4:23 I kare ame okwano waraga man ame oya i baŋ abaka Atakerec i nyim Rekum kede Cimecai, aran kede owotegi luŋ, gin ote ya oyot wot baŋ Ojudaya ame tye i Jerucalem ote wot juko ticgi oko kun odiogi kede tek acalo jo ame tye kede twer." 
Ezra4:24 Tic i kom ot Obaŋa ame tye i Jerucalem koŋ te cuŋ oko; tic ocuŋ naka i mwaka me aryo me loc a Dario, abaka me Pacia." 
Ezra5:1 I kare-nono odwarpiny magi te cako rabo kop Obaŋa baŋ Ojudaya me Juda kede me Jerucalem, kun otito i nyiŋ Obaŋa me Icrael ame en onwoŋo loogi; odwarpinnyono ene: Kagai kede Jekeria wot Iddo." 
Ezra5:2 I kare ame Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel kede Yecua wot a Yekojadak owinyo kop ame gin orabo-nono, gin dok te cako gero ot Obaŋa ame tye i Jerucalem, odwarpiny aryo-nono daŋ te cako konyogi." 
Ezra5:3 I kare-nono en ame Tattenai gabuna me lobo ame tye loka kulo Euprate, kede Cetar-bojenai, karacel kede oloc wadgi obino kede baŋgi te penyogi ni, “Ŋa omiowu twer me gero ot man kede me keto jami iye?”" 
Ezra5:4 Gin dok te penyo nyiŋ jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye i ka konyo tic me gero ot Obaŋa. 
Ezra5:5 Ento Obaŋa onwoŋo tye aneno otel Ojudaya, mannono omio odoŋe me Pacia-nono mom ojuko ticgi, tuno waŋ ame koŋ ocwao kop baŋ abaka Dario, dok tuno ka en doŋ odwoggo kop baŋgi i waraga." 
Ezra5:6 Man en kop ame Tattenai gabuna me lobo ame tye loka kulo Euprate, kede Cetar-bonjenai karacel kede owotegi ocwao baŋ abaka a Dario," 
Ezra5:7 kun ocoo kop luŋ i waraga kit man: “Baŋ abaka Dario, kuc obed kedi." 
Ezra5:8 Adwoŋ, wan omito miyi ŋeyo ni wan owoto naka i Juda, ote tuno naka i ot Obaŋa adwoŋ, Wan onwoŋo otye ka gero ottaca, kun otye agero kede twoni kiddi adoŋo meicel kede bao ame oririo i wi apama ot cel luŋ. Ticcere jo tye atiyo i twon diro meicel, dok tye awot aber meicel." 
Ezra5:9 Wan openyo otel me tic me gedo-nono ŋat ame omiogi twer me medde kede gedogi kede keto jami iye. 
Ezra5:10 Openyo daŋ nyiŋ jo ame onwoŋo tye atic i gedo-nono ame mio oromo titti jo ame onwoŋo tye atelo ticgi-naca. 
Ezra5:11 Gin ogamo kopwa ni gin gigi obedo omiro Obaŋa ame oketo polo kede lobo, dok gin otye ka gero ot a Rwot ame rik ogero con i kare abaka moro me Icrael ame rik onwoŋo obedo twon lo moro atek meicel." 
Ezra5:12 Cite kwarigi rik te miyo akemo mako Obaŋa me polo i komgi, ame te miyogi i ciŋ abaka Nebukadnejar me Babulon, i ciŋ jo Kaldaya; gin te babalo ot a Rwot oko, ote daŋ tero jo oko iyi opii i Babulon." 
Ezra5:13 Icennere i mwaka me agege me loc abaka Kuro me Babulon, en ame en omio iye cik ni myero dok cak tic me gero ot Obaŋa man." 
Ezra5:14 Dok daŋ ni en Kuro acellono rik omio baŋ Cecibajar aloc ame en oketo me loyo Juda jami luŋ ame otio i jabu kede ryal, ame rik abaka Nebukadnejar oyako i ot Obaŋa i Jerucalem ote tero wot keto i ot woro obaŋe me Babulon." 
Ezra5:15 Abaka rik omio jami-nono baŋe kun kobbe ni myero en ter i ot Obaŋa ame tye i Jerucalem, te cikke ni myero en ger ot Obaŋa kakare ame rik onwoŋo tye iye con." 
Ezra5:16 Mannono rikte miyo Cecibajar bino cako gero acakki te ot Obaŋa i Jerucalem, doŋ cakere i kare-naca tuno kede i kare-ni jo tye gero ot man, cite mom ru gire otum." 
Ezra5:17 Man omio wan okwai, yin adwoŋ, me temo yenyo i buke mogo acon me inen ka ce rik abaka Kuro ociko ateni ni myero ger ot man me yin ite miyowa ŋeyo tammi i kom gedo man.”" 
Ezra6:1 Abaka Dario rik dok te miyo cik ni yeny kop man i Babulon i buke ame ogwoko iye kop otimere ame tye i ot kano gin kodi buke-nono, ame ote daŋ yenyo." 
Ezra6:2 Ento rik ote nwoŋo buk ame ocoo iye koppono i boma me Ikbatana ame tye i Media, kun kop ame ocoo iye tye kit man:" 
Ezra6:3 “I mwaka me agege me loc a Kuro, en Kuro omio cik ni dok ger ot Obaŋa ame rik koŋ onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem, me bed kan ame oyalo iye Obaŋa i mot apapat me awaŋa kede me aŋola. Borrere malo myero bed futi pyeraboŋwen, laccere daŋ futi pyeraboŋwen." 
Ezra6:4 Apama myero bed me kiddi ame ocano i yore adek kede bao yore acel i wigi malo, lim me cul me tic man bino ya iyi cao abumente." 
Ezra6:5 Jami me jabu kede me ryal ame rik abaka Nebukadnejar oyako i ot Obaŋa i Jerucalem te kela i Babulon myero daŋ mi dwok oko cen i ot Obaŋa ame tye i Jerucalem, kun acel acel i akinagi odwoko i kabedo mere ikome. Myero iketgi i ot Obaŋa.”" 
Ezra6:6 Dario te dok kit man: “Baŋ Tattenai, gavuna me lobo ame tye loka kulo Euprate. Cetar-bojenai kede oloc wadwu luŋ ame tye kuno," 
Ezra6:7 Wun myero ijer wunu teŋe, iwek wunu tic me gero ot Obaŋa wot anyim aboŋo ridde iye; wek wunu oloc Ojudaya kede odoŋe atekeregi medde gigi i ticgi me gero ot Obaŋa kakare acon." 
Ezra6:8 Medo i kom mannono, an aketo cik ame mako gin ame myero wun iti wunu i kom odoŋe atekere Ojudaya i ticgi me gero ot Obaŋa. Myero cul jo man oyot pi gin luŋ ame mitte, kun limmere ya iyi cao abumente ame orao i baŋ lo luŋ ame tye loka kulo Euprate." 
Ezra6:9 Ginnoro ocele luŋ ame mitte acalo twoni, rommi, itino rommi me yalo Obaŋa me polo i mot awaŋa, onyo naŋo, kado, kede kono olok, akadi moo ame olamdog me Jerucalem mito; wun myero imi wunu jami-nono luŋ baŋgi aboŋo keŋ," 
Ezra6:10 me gin obed miyo baŋ Obaŋa me polo mot me kweyo cunye kare luŋ, kun okwao pire kede pi awobena, me komwa bed ayot." 
Ezra6:11 Dok amedo keto cik ocele ni, ka ŋat a mom olubo cik man obino turo bao ame orio i wi ode oko, ote wito wie bedo abit, ote rwake iye. Ode bino doko wi odur." 
Ezra6:12 Obaŋa ame rik oyero Jerucalem me bedo kan ame myero wore iye myero oret abaka moro keken onyo rok ame mom bino lubo cik man, kun otemere me balo ot Obaŋa ame tye kuno. An Dario en aketo cik man. Cik man myero lub aber odoco.”" 
Ezra6:13 Kare ame gabuna Tattenai, Cetarbonjenai kede oloc wadgi owinyo kop ame abaka Dario ocwao baŋgi, gin oru timo oyot gin ame en ociko luŋ." 
Ezra6:14 Odoŋe atekere Ojudaya te medde i ticgi me gedo aber meicel, kun lubo kop ame odwarpiny Kagai kede Jekeria wot Iddo orabo. Gin te tyeko gedo me gero ot Obaŋa kite ame Obaŋa me Icrael ociko, kun gin olubo cik abaka Kuro kede abaka Dario kede abaka Atakerec oketo, ame gin luŋ obedo obakki me Pacia." 
Ezra6:15 Gero ot man otum i nino dwe adek me dwe me Adar, i mwaka me abicel me loc abaka Dario." 
Ezra6:16 Eka jo Icrael, olamdog, Olevi, kede jo ocele mege luŋ ame rik odwogo iyi opii te kwero ot Obaŋa i twon yomcuny adwoŋ meicel." 
Ezra6:17 I kare me kwero-nono gin omio twoni mia acel, nyogi rommi mia aryo, itino rommi mia aŋwen me aŋola, kede nyogi dyegi apar wie aryo me aŋola me mot me bal a jo Icrael luŋ, kun acel acel tye pi atekere acel acel." 
Ezra6:18 Dok ote keto daŋ olamdog kede Olevi i dog ticgi me tic baŋ Obaŋa i Jerucalem, kite ame ocoo kede i buk a Muca." 
Ezra6:19 Eka i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe me agege, jo Icrael ame odwogo iyi opii te kwero ecuban me Kato." 
Ezra6:20 Olamdog luŋ kede Olevi luŋ onwoŋo doŋ otyeko lonyere oko kengi, gin luŋ onwoŋo doŋ odoko jo acil, en omio gin doŋ te neko itino rommi me kwero ecuban me Kato, kun oneko pi jo luŋ, pi olamdog kede pirgi gin kengi." 
Ezra6:21 Jo Icrael luŋ ame odwogo iyi opii obedo camo cam me kwero ecuban me Kato karacel, kede ŋat acel acel ame doŋ otyeko weko tim me kwer a jo ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo-nono te notte kedgi me woro Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
Ezra6:22 Gin te bedo kwero ecuban me ogati a tobi mom iye pi nino abiro, kun otye kede yomcuny; pien Rwot onwoŋo doŋ oyomoro cunygi, dok onwoŋo daŋ omio cuny abaka me Acuria odwogo i komgi, ame omio okonyogi tics me gero ot Obaŋa, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael." 
Ezra7:1 Icennere, ame kare doŋ okato alalac, i kare ame Atakerec abaka me Pacia, rik onwoŋo tye lo moro ame nyiŋe Ejira, ame kwari mere tye kit man: Ejira obedo wot a Ceraya, Ceraya wot Ajaria, Ajaria wot a Kilkia," 
Ezra7:2 Kilkia wot a Callum, Callum wot a Jadok, Jadok wot Akitub, Akitub wot Amaria," 
Ezra7:3 Amaria wot Ajaria, Ajaria wot a Merayot," 
Ezra7:4 Merayot wot a Jerakia, Jerakia wot a Uji, Uji wot a Bukki," 
Ezra7:5 Bukki wot Abicua, Abicua wot a Finekaci, Finekaci wot Eleajar, eka Eleajar te bedo wot Aron ame obedo alamdog adwoŋ." 
Ezra7:6 Ejira rik obedo apwony cik ame ŋeo cik a Muca atek meicel, cik ame rik Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael omio baŋ Muca. Winyo Obaŋa rik onwoŋo tye i kome, omio abaka rik mie jami luŋ ame en okwao i baŋe, Ejira rik te ya i Babulon wot Jerucalem," 
Ezra7:7 kun woto karacel kede jo Icrael mogo ame i akinagi tye iye olamdog kede Olevi, ower wer i ot Obaŋa, jo ame gwoko doggola ot Obaŋa, kede jo mogo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa, Man otimere i mwaka me abiro me loc Atakerec, abaka me Pacia." 
Ezra7:8 Gin rik oya i Babulon i nino dwe acel me dwe me agege. 
Ezra7:9 Obaŋa obedo konyogi, omio gin te tuno i Jerucalem i nino dwe acel me dwe me kany." 
Ezra7:10 Ejira rik onwoŋo ojalo kare mere luŋ i pwonyo cik a Rwot, kun daŋ tiyo kite ame cik kobo, dok daŋ pwonyo cik kede icwil luŋ baŋ jo Icrael." 
Ezra7:11 Abaka Atakerec rik omio waraga baŋ Ejira, alamdog, apwony cik ame opwonyere meicel i cik a Rwot kede gin ame Obaŋa ociko, baŋ jo Icrael. Waraga ame omie ocoo kit man:" 
Ezra7:12 “Waraga man oya i baŋ Atakerec abaka obakki luŋ baŋ Ejira, alamdog, apwony cik Obaŋa me polo." 
Ezra7:13 Aman an doŋ atyeko keto cik i lobo ame an aloo luŋ, mi jo Icrael luŋ, olamdog, Olevi ame mito, myero yeyigi me wot kedi i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:14 An abaka karacel kede jo abiro ame mia tam, ocwai me iwot iyeny kop i kom Jerucalem kede Juda, inen ka jo tye alubo cik Obaŋa kuno kite ame otyeko miyo kede i ciŋi." 
Ezra7:15 Ibino tero mot me jabu kede me ryal ame an karacel kede jo ame mia tam mito miyo baŋ Obaŋa me Icrael, ame ot me wore tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:16 Myero daŋ iter ryal kede jabu luŋ ame irao i lolo me Babulon luŋ karacel kede mot ame jo Icrael, kede olamdoggi okwoŋo pire kengi me miyo kite a cunygi omito pi ot Obaŋagi ame tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:17 “Myero daŋ iti wunu i lim man aber, iwil wunu kede twoni nyogi rommi kede itino rommi, kede moko kwon kede mot amatagi, eka ite yalo kede Obaŋa i wi keno lam ame tye i ot Obaŋawu ame tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:18 Ryal kede jabu ame odoŋere itwero tic wunu kede i yore ame itamo wunu ni ber, cite myero iti wunu kede i yore ame Obaŋawu mito," 
Ezra7:19 Jami luŋ ame omi me tic i ot Obaŋawu i Jerucalem myero iwot imi wunu ducu i nyim Obaŋawu. 
Ezra7:20 Ginnoro ducu ame ibino mito pi ot Obaŋawu, ibino nwoŋo i kom lim abumente." 
Ezra7:21 “An abaka Atakerec aketo cik man, kun aciko kede okan lim me lobo luŋ ame tye loka kulo Euprate me miyo jami luŋ oyot baŋ Ejira, alamdog ame obedo acoo cik Obaŋa me polo; myero mi baŋe jami luŋ ame en omito," 
Ezra7:22 tuno ka oromo ryal ame pekkere romo talanta mia acel, kede naŋo puku mia aŋwen, kede koŋo olok debe mia aryo, moo debe mia aryo, kede kado ame en bino mito." 
Ezra7:23 Ginnoro luŋ ame mitte pi ot Obaŋa me polo myero inen wunu ni ocobere kite ame omito kede, naka imio wunu akemo make i koma kede ikwaena ame bino loc iŋea." 
Ezra7:24 Dok daŋ kur imi wunu jo magi cul ocoro: olamdog, jo Levi ower, ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa, jo atio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa, kede jo ocele mege ame tio tic apapat i ot Obaŋa." 
Ezra7:25 “Dok yin Ejira, kite acalo Obaŋani omio yin itye kede ryeko, myero yin iketo oŋolkop atino kede en adoŋo mege, me gin bed jo ame ŋolo kop a jo luŋ ame tye loka kulo Euprate, jo luŋ ame ŋeo cik Obaŋawu; dok jo a mom ŋeo daŋ myero ipwonygi me ŋeyo." 
Ezra7:26 Jo luŋ ame mom woro cik Obaŋawu kede cik abaka, myero ru keto can apek i komgi, acalo can me to, ryemogi oko i lobo, yako jamigi luŋ, onyo keto i ot kol.”" 
Ezra7:27 Ejira okobo ni, “Pak wunu Rwot Obaŋa a kwarowa! En omio abaka cuny acalo man, me keto kwogo i kom ot a Rwot ame tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:28 Pi mar mere a mom lokere ame en oketo i koma omio en omio abaka opwoa, karacel kede oticere adoŋo luŋ, kede jo ame mie tam. Obaŋa omia tekcuny, te miya loko tam otellego me Icrael me wot keda.”" 
Ezra8:1 Magi en odoŋ atekere me Icrael ame onwoŋo loo doggola a kwarigi ame rik onwoŋo tye i yi opii i Babulon eka te dwogo karacel kede Ejira i Jerucalem i kare ame Atakerec onwoŋo abaka; 
Ezra8:2 Gercom obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Finekaci, Daniel obedo atel wi jo me doggola Itamar. Katuc wot a Cekania, obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Daudi." 
Ezra8:2 Gercom obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Finekaci, Daniel obedo atel wi jo me doggola Itamar. Katuc wot a Cekania, obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Daudi." 
Ezra8:3 Jekaria obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Paroc, ame rik obino kede jo me doggolagi ame romo mia acel kede pyerabic, wel jogi oŋeo pien onwoŋo ocoo piny." 
Ezra8:4 Eliekoenai, wot a Jerakia, obedo atel wi jo me doggolagi mia aryo." 
Ezra8:5 Cekania wot a Jakajiel obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Jattu; en onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi mia adek. 
Ezra8:6 Ebed wot a Yonacan, obedo atel wi jo me doggola Adiŋ, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi pyerabic." 
Ezra8:7 Jecaya wot Atalia, obedo atel wi jo me doggola Elam, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi pyerabiro." 
Ezra8:8 Jebadia wot a Miceal, obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Cepatia, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi pyeraboro." 
Ezra8:9 Obadia wot a Jekiel, obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Yoab, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi mia aryo kede apar wie aboro." 
Ezra8:10 Celomit wot a Jocipia, obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Bani, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi mia acel kede pyerabic nono." 
Ezra8:11 Jekaria wot a Bebai, obedo atel wi jo me doggola a Bebai, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi pyeraryo wie aboro." 
Ezra8:12 Jokanan wot a Kakatan, obedo atel wijo me doggola Ajigad, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi mia acel kede apar." 
Ezra8:13 Otel ame obino icen karacel kede jogi ame romo pyerabicel obedo Elipelet, Jeuel kede Cemaya, ame gin luŋ obedo otel wi jo me doggola Adonikam." 
Ezra8:14 Eka Utai kede Jacur te bedo otel me doggola a Bigvai, ame onwoŋo tye kede jo me doggolagi pyerabiro." 
Ezra8:15 Acoko jo-nono luŋ karacel i dog kulo ame mol dok tutuŋ boma me Akaya, obedo kuno nino ame romo adek. Kare ame abedo ŋiyo jo luŋ karacel kede olamdog, mom onwoŋo dano moro ame obedo dano me doggola a jo Levi." 
Ezra8:16 Man omio acwalo kop alwoŋo otel magi: Eliejer, Ariel, Cemaya, Elnatan, Jarib, Elnatan, Natan, Jekaria kede Meculam, karacel kede Joyarib kede Elnatan ame gin aryo-ni rik obedo jo ame tye i ŋec atut meicel." 
Ezra8:17 An rik ate cwayo jo man baŋ Iddo, adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo jo ame bedo i Kacipia, kun a kobbigi gin ame myero owot okob baŋ Iddo kede owote mere ame rik onwoŋo tye i Kacipia ame gin rik obedo jo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot woro Obaŋa. En ocikogi ni myero wot kobbigi ocwal jo ame bino tic i ot Obaŋa ame tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra8:18 Pi kica a Rwot Obaŋawa omio gin jo-naca ocwayiwa Cerebia, ame rik en obedo twon lo moro aryek meicel i tic, Alevi me doggola a Mali; en obino kede jo me doggolagi-nono apar wie aboro, kun awobe mere daŋ tye iye." 
Ezra8:19 Dok ote cwayiwa daŋ Kacabia kede Jecaya, ame obedo jo me doggola a Merari, ame obino kede jo me doggolagi-nono pyeraryo nono, kun awobegi daŋ tye iye." 
Ezra8:20 Medo i kom jo-nono, gin ocwayiwa daŋ jo ocele mia aryo kede pyeraryo nono, ame gin luŋ obedo jo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot woro Obaŋa, jo ame rik Daudi kede omiro mege adoŋo omio ni myero kony jo Levi kede ticgi. Gin luŋ rik otuco nyiŋgi." 
Ezra8:21 Kare ame otye i dog kulo me Akaya kuno, arabo kop me kanyo kec, wek omwolle kenwa i nyim Obaŋawa, kun okwae me telowa kede gwokowa i wo twa, wan karacel kede itinowa, kede jamiwa luŋ," 
Ezra8:22 Pien lewic rik omaka me kwayo abaka me miyowa ocirikale kede wegi aguragura me gwokowa i yo i kom okworwa, pien an rik onwoŋo atyeko kobbe ni Obaŋawa mio gum baŋ jo luŋ ame gene, ento akemo make, dok daŋ keto can i kom jo luŋ ame ya oko i baŋe." 
Ezra8:23 I kare-nono wan ote kanyo kec, kun okwae me gwokowa i wotwa, en daŋ te winyo kwacwa." 
Ezra8:24 I akina olamdog rik ate yero Cerebia kede Kacabia, kede dok odoŋe ocele apar," 
Ezra8:25 eka ate pimo ryal kede jabu, jami tic, kede mot luŋ ame abaka, jo amie tam, kede jo Icrael luŋ omio me tic i ot a Rwot; apimo ate miyo luŋ baŋ olamdog," 
Ezra8:26 Jami ame amiogi ene: ryal ame pekkere romo talanta mia abicel kede pyerabic, jami ame otio i ryal mia acel ame pekgi romo talanta mia acel, kede jabu ame pekkere romo talanta mia acel," 
Ezra8:27 kede tabbi ame otio i jabu pyeraryo nono, ame acel acel i akinagi pekkere romo ratili apar kede tabbi me mola aryo ame ber dok cil, ame welgi rom aroma i me jabu." 
Ezra8:28 An rik ate kobbigi ni, “Wun ibedo wunu jo acil i nyim Rwot, kede jami man luŋ daŋ cil; ryal kede jabu daŋ obedo mot ame ŋat acel acel oyero gire kene te miyo baŋ Rwot Obaŋa a kwariwa," 
Ezra8:29 Gwok wunu aber naka ka gin luŋ otuno i Jerucalem. I kuno obino pimogi luŋ i nyim alamdog adwoŋ, kede jo Levi karacel odoŋe ame loo doggola akwariwa, ame tye i Jerucalem, kun opimo icikka ame tye i ot a Rwot.”" 
Ezra8:30 Mannono te miyo olamdog kede jo Levi cako gwoko ryal kede jabu ame opimo, kede jami luŋ me tic ame omiogi, ote tero luŋ wot keto i ot Obaŋawa ame tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra8:31 Wan ocako ya i dog kulo me Akava me wot i Jerucalem i nino dwe apar wie aryo me dwe me agege. Rwot Obaŋawa obedo bedo kedwa kun gwokowa i ciŋ okworwa ame a cobo mony i komwa, kede en ame obedo libowa iyo," 
Ezra8:32 Kare ame otuno i Jerucalem, owe koŋ pi nino ame romo adek." 
Ezra8:33 I nino me aŋwennere ote wot i ot a Rwot Obaŋawa ote pimo ryal kede jabu, kede jami tic ote miyogi luŋ i ciŋ Meremot, wot a Uria, ame en rik obedo alamdog, Jo ocele ame onwoŋo daŋ tye kede obedo Eliajar wot a Finekaci kede jo Levi aryo, Jojabad wot a Yecua, kede Noadia wot a Binnui." 
Ezra8:34 Okwano jami luŋ, ote pimo pekgi, ote daŋ coyo oko piny." 
Ezra8:35 I kare-nono jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo odwogo iyi opii i Babulon oyalo Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael kede mot awaŋa. Gin oyalo Rwot kede twoni apar wie aryo pi jo Icrael luŋ, nyogi rommi pyeraboŋwen wie abicel, itino rommi pyerabiro wie abiro, kede dyegi apar wie aryo ame omio me kwanyo bal i komgi. Leyi magi luŋ gin oyalo i Rwot me mot awaŋa," 
Ezra8:36 Gin otero kop ame rik abaka ocoo te miyogi, ote wot miyo baŋ oloc kede gabuna ame abaka oketo me loyo lobo ame tye loka kulo Euprate; gin te bedo miyo kony baŋ lwak kede ot a Rwot." 
Ezra9:1 I kare ame doŋ otyeko tiyo tic magi luŋ otellogo i akina otel me Icrael obino baŋa ote kobba ni jo Icrael, olamdog kede jo Levi mom opokere kengi i kom jo ame bedo i lobo-nono, mom oweko timo timgi me ipyeda. Mom opokere i jo Kanaan, jo Ammon, jo Moab, kede jo Miciri, akadi i jo Kitti, jo Periji, jo Jebuc kede jo Amor." 
Ezra9:2 Ojudaya obedo nyomo anyira a rok ocele me bedo mongi, mannono te miyo jo acil ame gin obedo jo Obaŋa rubere oko kede jo ocele. Bal man ame onwoŋo mom nyuto gen a lwak i kom Obaŋa-ni, jo ogeo wie obedo rwode." 
Ezra9:3 Kare ame awinyo kop man, ayeyeco rukka oko karacel kede tambara me tweyo wia, ate daŋ puputo yer wia kede yer tika oko, ate bedo piny ame akemo otuŋa oko," 
Ezra9:4 Abedo kuno tuno naka otyeno caa ame oyalo iye Obaŋa, jo te cako cokere baŋa gura dyere, jo luŋ ame komgi onwoŋo omyel pi kop Obaŋa me Icrael ame ekobo i kom bal a jo ame odwogo iyi opii." 
Ezra9:5 I kare ame caa me yalo Obaŋa otyeno doŋ oromo, an ate ya oko i kan ame onwoŋo koyo oonyere ikoma wok-ca, kun pwod aruko gira rukka ame oyeyeca, karacel kede itambara me tweyo wia, ate rumo tyna piny kwayo Rwot kun aryeo ciŋa malo baŋ Rwot Obaŋana." 
Ezra9:6 Ate doŋ cako kobbi Rwot ni, “Ama Obaŋana, lewic ocira oko ame mom aromo tiŋo waŋa malo i nyimi. Balwa tye ame doŋ olwobere alwoba i wi wadgi, kun borrere doŋ katowa oko; rocwa doŋ ogudo polo oko." 
Ezra9:7 Cakere i kare a kwariwa tuno kede naka i kare man, wan obedo rimo roc adwoŋ meicel; pi bal ame wan obedo timo-nono omio wan jo Icrael karacel obakkiwa kede olamdog, omiowa luŋ i ciŋ obakki orok ame te nenekowa kede pala me lweny, ote yako jamiwa, ote daŋ terowa oko i lobo ocele calo opii; mannono omiowa twon lewic adwoŋ tuno kede naka i kare-ni." 
Ezra9:8 Ento aman pi kare anonokkoro, yin Rwot Obaŋawa inyuto kica ni baŋwa, imio jo ocele i akinawa obwot te bino bedo i lobo man acil kun bedo gigi kede kuc. Yin dok imio waŋwa oyabere ite miyowa gum me dok yiko kwowa kun wan opii." 
Ezra9:9 Wan rik onwoŋo otye acalo opii, cite yin mom iwekowa ata i kare ame wan opii, Mar meri a mom lokere obedo tye i komwa, ite miyo obakki me Pacia bedo kede kica i komwa, ite yewa dok yiko kwowa kun ogero otti ame onwoŋo doŋ oballe oko, dok daŋ ite ye gwokowa kan i Juda kede Jerucalem." 
Ezra9:10 “Kara doŋ aman wan otwero kobo ŋo ba, ama Rwot Obaŋawa, en ame doŋ kop man luŋ otimere-ni? Pien wan doŋ okwero lubo gin ame iciko oko luŋ," 
Ezra9:11 ame rik iciko kun imio omironi odwarpiny okobbiwa. Gin rik okobbiwa ni lobo ame wan owot gamo bedo megwa, obedo lobo ame jo iye mom cil; jo ame bedo kuno luŋ cakere i tuŋŋi tuno kede tuŋ ocele opoŋ ka i tim mogo me ipyeda keken." 
Ezra9:12 Gin ocikowa daŋ ni myero kur onyomere kede jo ame bedo kuno, kur otim ginnoro me konyogi bedo i kuc kede nwoŋo lonyo me obed jo atek, ote camo jami abeco ame tye i lobo-naca, ote wekki ikwaewa me aleagi atwal." 
Ezra9:13 A doŋ ityeko keto can apapat i komwa pi balwa kede rocwa, wan pwod oŋeo ni yin Obaŋawa iketo can a mom romo kit bal ame wan otimo, dok-gu iye jo mogo odoŋ kite ame otye kede aman-ni." 
Ezra9:14 Wan myero obed medde turo cikki, kun onyomere kede jo ame tye ka timo tim man me ipyeda-ni? Akemo mom bino maki i komwa ite tyekowa oko ducu, ame ŋattoro mom dok romo doŋ kadi bwot?" 
Ezra9:15 Ama Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, yin gire iŋolo kop kakare, pien imio jo mogo i akinawa obwot te doŋ kite ame otye kede i kare-ni. Nen, wan en otye i nyimi kede rocwa i komwa, pien mom tye ŋattoro ame romo cuŋ i nyimi pi balwa-nono.”" 
Ezra10:1 I kare ame Ejira tye ka kwayo Obaŋa-nono, kun tuco bal, ame akok akoka, dok arette piny i nyim ot Obaŋa, lwak jo apipim, co kede mon kede itino, ocokere baŋe kun oya iyi Icrael luŋ, ote kok atek meicel." 
Ezra10:2 Cekania wot a Jekial, me doggola a Elam, te kobbi Ejira ni, “Wan oturo cik Obaŋawa, ote nyomo anyira orok ame bedo kan me bedo monwa, kadi bed wan otimo bal man cite jo Icrael pwod tye kede gen." 
Ezra10:3 Aman wan myero koŋ dok ocikere kede Obaŋawa ni mannono wan obino miyo mon magi luŋ kede itinogi wot oko, Wan obino timo gin ame yin adwoŋwa karacel kede jo ame woro gin ame Obaŋa ociko okobbiwa, Wan obino timo kun olubo gin ame Obaŋa ociko," 
Ezra10:4 Ya doŋ malo, pien mannono obedo ticci, wan oyikere oko me tic karacel kedi; bed atek me itimo oko.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ejira doŋ te ya malo, te miyo odoŋe ame loo olamdog kede jo Levi karacel kede jo Icrael ducu kwoŋ ni obino timo gin ame doŋ otyeko kobo ducu, Jo luŋ te kwoŋ kittono." 
Ezra10:6 Ejira te doŋ ya oko i nyim ot Obaŋa, te wot naka iyi cikka a Jekokanan wot a Eliacib, te wot bedo kuno dyewor acel kun mom camo ginnoro, mom daŋ mato ginnoro; pien i kare-nono onwoŋo tye ka kumo atek pi tim a jo ame odwogo iyi opii eka ote cako turo cik a Rwot." 
Ezra10:7 Rik ote rabo kop romo jo luŋ ame odwogo iyi opii ame tye i Juda kede i Jerucalem ni jo luŋ myero cokere i Jerucalem," 
Ezra10:8 kun omedo ni ka ŋat a mom obino i Jerucalem i akina me nino adek, rwode kede odoŋe atekere bino miyo ogamo jami mere oko ote daŋ ryeme oko i akina jo ame odwogo iyi opii," 
Ezra10:9 Jo luŋ me Juda kede Benjamin te cokere i Jerucalem i nino adek keken; gin ocokere kuno i nino dwe pyeraryo nono, dwe me aboŋwen. Jo luŋ obedo i dyekal i nyim ot Obaŋa, kun komgi amyel amyela pi koppono, kede dok pi kot ame onwoŋo tye acwe atek meicel." 
Ezra10:10 Ejira alamdog te ya malo kobbi lwak ni, “Wun ituro wunu cik pi nyomo monwu i baŋ rok ocele, mannono omio imedo wunu bal atek i wi jo Icrael." 
Ezra10:11 Aman doŋ myero ituc wunu balwu baŋ Obaŋa a kwariwu, eka ite timo wunu gin ame en mito. Pokere wunu oko i kom rok luŋ ame tye ka bedo i lobowa dok daŋ myero iryem wunu mon ame inyomo wunu i baŋ orok oko.”" 
Ezra10:12 Lwak luŋ te gamo koppere kede dwon aloŋo kun owo ni, “Myero gire timere amannono, wan myero otim gin ame ikobo.”" 
Ezra10:13 Dok ote medo ni, “Cite jo pol meicel, dok kot daŋ tye acwe atek. Pe bedo yot wan me bedo cuŋ i dyekal kannaler kit man. Man mom tic ame twero cobere i nino acel onyo aryo, pien polwa oturo cik man." 
Ezra10:14 Myero odoŋe ame loowa en ame cuŋŋi lwak luŋ; jo luŋ ame onyomo mon orok ame tye i bomawa ducu myero bin i nino kede caa ame ociko, kun obino karacel kede odoŋe ame loogi kede oŋolkop me bomagi-nono. Man bino miyo akemo Obaŋa ame omake i komwa wok-ki pi bal man kwe oko.”" 
Ezra10:15 Jo luŋ te ye tam ame okelo-nono kono ka Yonacan wot Acael kede Jajeya wot a Tikiva en okwero kun Mecullam kede Cebbetai, ame gin jo Levi cwakogi." 
Ezra10:16 Jo luŋ ame odwogo iyi opii te timo amannono, Ejira alamdog te yero jo i akina jo ame loo doggola a kwarigi, kun lubo kite ame doggola acel acel tye kede, te coyo daŋ nyiŋ ŋat acel acel piny. I nino dwe acel me dwe me apar, gin te bedo piny me koŋ yenyo tyen kop man," 
Ezra10:17 eka i nino dwe acel me dwe me agege me mwaka anyen, en ame tic me yenyo tyen kop a jo ame onyomo mongi i baŋ orok otum iye." 
Ezra10:18 Magi gin nyiŋ olamdog ame onwoŋo onyomo mongi i baŋ orok: I kom awobe me doggola a Yecua wot a yekojadak kede omego mere onwoŋo tye iye: Maceya, Eliajer, Jarib, kede Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Gin luŋ ocikere ni obino ryemo mongi oko, gin te yalo Obaŋa kede nyok romo acalo motgi me walakino i roc." 
Ezra10:20 I kom jo me doggola a Immer te bedo iye Kanani kede Jebadia. 
Ezra10:21 I kom jo me doggola a Karim te bedo iye: Maceya, Cemaya, Jekiel, kede Ujia." 
Ezra10:22 I kom jo me doggola a Pacur te bedo iye: Elioenai, Maceya, Icimael, Netanel, Jojabad, kede Elaca." 
Ezra10:23 Jo Levi ame onyomo mongi i baŋ orok ene: Jojabad, Cimei, Kelaya ame nyiŋe ocele Kelita, Petakia, Juda kede Eliejer." 
Ezra10:24 I kom ower Eliacib kene en ame onyomo dako mere i baŋ orok, Aco i kom jo ame gwoko doggola ot Obaŋa te bedo: Callum, Telem, kede Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Eka i kom jo ocele te bedo jo magi: I kom jo me doggola a Paroc tye Ramia, Ijjia, Malkija, Mijamin, Eliajar, Malkija, kede Benayo." 
Ezra10:26 I kom jo me doggola a Elam te bedo Matania, Jekaria, Jekiel, Abdi, Jeremot, kede Erica." 
Ezra10:27 I kom jo me doggola a Jattu tye Elioenai, Eliacib, Matania, Jeremot, Jabad, kede Ajija." 
Ezra10:28 I kom jo me doggola a Bebai te bedo Jekokanan, Kanania, Jabbai, kede Atilai," 
Ezra10:29 I kom jo me doggola a Bani te bedo: Mecullam, Malluk, Adaya, Jacub, Ceal, kede Jeremot." 
Ezra10:30 I kom jo me doggola a Pakat-moab te bedo: Adna, Celal, Benayo, Maceya, Matania, Bejalel, Binnui, kede Manace," 
Ezra10:31 I kom jo me doggola a Karim te bedo Eliejer, Icija, Malkija, Cemaya, Cimeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Malluk, kede Cemaria." 
Ezra10:33 I kom jo me doggola a Kacum te bedo Matenai, Mattata, Jabad, Eliepelet, Jeremai, Manace kede Cimei." 
Ezra10:34 I kom jo me doggola a Bani tye iye Madai, Amuram, Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benayo, Bedeya, Celuki," 
Ezra10:36 Vania, Meremot, Eliacib," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Mattenai, kede Jacu," 
Ezra10:38 I kom jo me doggola a Binnui te tye iye Cimei," 
Ezra10:39 Celemia, Natan, Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makenadebai, Cacai, Carai," 
Ezra10:41 Ajarel, Celemia, Cemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Callum, Amaria kede Yucepu." 
Ezra10:43 I kom jo me doggola Nebo te bedo Jeyel, Mattitia, Jabad, Jebina, Jaddai, Joel, kede Benaya." 
Ezra10:43 I kom jo me doggola Nebo te bedo Jeyel, Mattitia, Jabad, Jebina, Jaddai, Joel, kede Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Jo magi luŋ onwoŋo rik onyomo anyira orok. Gin rik te ryemogi oko karacel kede itinogi. 
Nehemiah1:1 Man obedo kop a Nekemia wot a Kakalia. I dwe me Kiclevi, i mwaka me pyeraryo me loc abaka Akacwera, an Nekemia onwoŋo atye i boma adwoŋ me Cuca." 
Nehemiah1:2 Kanani ame obedo ŋat acel i akina omegona obino baŋa kede jo mogo ame en oya kedgi i Juda, an ate penyogi kop i kom Ojudaya ame odwogo iyi opii karacel kede kite ame Jerucalem tye kede." 
Nehemiah1:3 Gin te kobba ni jo i kuno ame odoŋ, ame odwogo ceŋ i lobogi, tye kede peko adwoŋ meicel, kun lewic makogi okato kare, dok ni apama cel me Jerucalem orete oko piny, dok kika dogcel luŋ mac daŋ owaŋo oko," 
Nehemiah1:4 I kare ame awinyo kop man abedo piny ate cako koko oko. Abedo kumo pi kare alac kun mom acamo ginnoro, Amedde kwayo Obaŋa me polo kun akobo ni," 
Nehemiah1:5 “Ama Rwot Obaŋa me polo yin ibedo twon Obaŋa adwoŋ meicel dok ame iyiliyili. Yin gire igwoko gin ame iciko dok mar meri mom lokere baŋ jo ame mari, kun olubo gin ame iciko." 
Nehemiah1:6 Nena ba, ama Rwot, yab yiti iwiny kwacca an amironi ame akelo i nyimi dyeceŋ kede dyewor pi omironi ame gin obedo jo Icrael. Atuco balwa i nyimi, ame wan jo Icrael obalo i nyimi. Nen ba, an karacel kede jo luŋ me ot a kwarina otyeko balo i nyimi." 
Nehemiah1:7 Wan obedo timo gin arac meicel i nyimi, kun daŋ mom omako cik meri luŋ. Okwero lubo icwilli kede gin ame rik iciko baŋ amironi Muca." 
Nehemiah1:8 Tim ber ipo kop ame rik ikobo baŋ Muca ni, ‘Ka ce mom ibedo wunu ame igena wunu, abino keketowu oko i akina orok." 
Nehemiah1:9 Cite ka ibino ŋut wunu ite lokere wunu dwogo baŋa, ite gwoko wunu gin ame aciko kun daŋ iketo wunu i tic, abino dwogowu cen i kabedo kan ame atyeko yero me bedo kan ame obino wora iye, kadi bed onwoŋo itye wunu iyi agikki me lobo.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Ama Rwot, man obedo omironi ame gin joni ikokome. Yin en ame rik ilakorogi i twon tekoni adwoŋ kede ciŋi atek." 
Nehemiah1:11 Tim ber, ama Rwot, icik yiti iwiny kwacca kede kwac omironi ocele luŋ ame cunygi tye i komi, Tim ber tin imia gum, me dano man bed kede kica i koma.”" 
Nehemiah2:1 I kare-nono onwoŋo an en aloo tic me miyo koŋo olok i meja abaka. Doŋ i nino moro acel, i dwe me Nican, i mwaka me pyeraryo nono me loc abaka Atakerec, i kare ame en abaka onwoŋo tye acem, an ate tero koŋo olok i nyime. Yam onwoŋo mom ru onena i nyime kun waŋa oballe," 
Nehemiah2:2 omio en abaka te penya ni, “Piŋo kara waŋi oballe, kun inen dano ame kome yot? An atamo mom tye ginnoro ocele kono cunyi en a mom yom.” Lworo te maka meicel," 
Nehemiah2:3 ate gamo doge ni, “Kom abaka gire bed ayot! Kara waŋa mom twero nen i can i yore aŋo kun boma ame oyiko iye kom kwarina calo doŋ wi odur, dok kika me dogcel me boma luŋ mac owaŋo oko?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Abaka te penyo ni, “Kara aman doŋ yin ikwaya ni kono atimo ŋo piri?” Mannono omio an ate cwalo kwacca baŋ Obaŋa me polo," 
Nehemiah2:5 ate kobbi abaka ni, “Ka ce cuny adwoŋŋa twero bedo yom i koma, kun an amironi ayomoro cunyi, kono iye an awoto i lobo me Juda, ame en boma ame oyiko iye kom kwarina, me awot ager dok odoco.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Abaka te cako penya, kun onwoŋo agoŋŋere tye obedo i laŋete, ni, “Wotti-nono bino teri kare ame rom mene, dok ibino dwogo awene?” An ate titte kare, en te ye kede yomcuny ni myero an awot." 
Nehemiah2:7 An dok ate kwayo abaka ni myero mia waraga me ater baŋ oloc adoŋo ame tye loka kulo Euprate me gin ye an abed i lobogi tuno ka atuno i Juda," 
Nehemiah2:8 Dok ate kwaye daŋ ni myero en mia waraga me atera baŋ Acap, ame en onwoŋo obedo adwoŋ ame gwoko buŋ abaka, me en ye miya bao apol me tiyo kika me dogcel me boma kede me ot ame an abino bedo iye, Abaka te miya gin ame akwao luŋ, pien Obaŋana obedo konya." 
Nehemiah2:9 Abaka te miyo odoŋe mogo me mony karacel kede aguragura wot keda, ate wot naka i lobe ame tye loka kulo Euprate; ate miyo waraga ame abaka ocoo baŋ oloc adoŋo me kuno," 
Nehemiah2:10 Cite i kare ame Canbalat, dano me Koron, kede Tobia, dano me Ammon ame obedo amiro, owinyo ni dano moro tye ame obino pi tic pi jo Icrael, akemo omakogi meicel." 
Nehemiah2:11 Awoto naka i Jerucalem ate wot bedo kuno nino adek. 
Nehemiah2:12 I dyewor, an karacel kede jo mogo anonok ate ya wot oko, kun onwoŋo mom ru atitti ŋattoro gin ame Obaŋa oketo i cunya ni atim i Jerucalem. Mom awoto i lee moro ocelo kono ka en ame rik an ariŋo kede keken." 
Nehemiah2:13 Awoto dyewor ame piny pwod col, kun abeo i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Luŋ, naka waŋ pii ame olwoŋo ni me Too kede i dogcel me wi odur. I kare-nono onwoŋo atye aŋiŋio apama cel me boma ame onwoŋo orette oko piny kede kika dogcel luŋ ame onwoŋo owawaŋo oko i mac." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ate dok lokere dok tutuŋ dogcel me waŋ akon kede Kut abaka. Cite lee ame abedo i wie mom te nwoŋo kannoro ame etwero beo iye. 
Nehemiah2:15 An ate doŋ lunere piny kun abeo i luŋ kuno aninio apama cel dyeworrono, Alokere adwogo kede nea i yo ame ogeo wot kede, ate donyo i boma i dogcel me Luŋ." 
Nehemiah2:16 Rwode mom omedo ŋeyo kwene ame onwoŋo awoto iye kede gin ano ame abedo tiyo kuno. I kare-nono onwoŋo mom ru amio kop man oŋeye baŋ Ojudaya, olamdog, jo adoŋo, rwode, akadi jo ocele ame bino tiyo tic man." 
Nehemiah2:17 An doŋ ate kobbigi ni, “Ityeko neno wunu peko ame wan otye kede, Jerucalem doŋ odoko calo wi odur, kun kika me dogcellere luŋ owan oko. Biye wunu, me ibin oger wunu apama cellere, me okwany wunu lewic i wiwa oko.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ate tittigi kite ame Obaŋa obedo konya kede, kede gin ame abaka okobba. Lwak te gamo ni, “Ocak wunu doŋ ticcere oko.” Gin doŋ te cako yikere oko me tic," 
Nehemiah2:19 Cite i kare ame Canballat, Tobia kede Arabboro ame nyiŋe Gecem owinyo gin ame wan otimo, gin ocako nyerowa kun ocaowa acaa, ote kobo ni, “Man ŋo ame itimo wunu nie? Wun icako wunu jem i kom abaka bo?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 An ate gamo doggi ni, “Obaŋa me polo bino konyowa, wan omiro mere obino cako tic me gedo; cite wun mom itye wunu kede giwu moro akadi twerroro, onyo ginnoro me poyowu i Jerucalem.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Man en kite ame rik ogero kede apama cel me Jerucalem, Alamdog adwoŋ Eliacib kede owote mere ame obedo olamdog, gin ogero dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Romo, ote kwero oko pi tic acil, ote daŋ tiyo kika mere oko ducu; apama ame gin ogero-nono otuno naka kan ocuŋ iguŋ malo ame olwoŋo ni me Mia, kede dok naka kan ame ogero cuŋ iguŋ malo ame olwoŋo ni Kananel." 
Nehemiah3:2 Jo me Jeriko te gero megi lubo olamdog. Eka Jakur wot a Imri te gero mege lubogi. 
Nehemiah3:3 Jo me doggola a Kacena te gero megi cako i dog cel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Rec. Gin orio bao mere luŋ, ote keto daŋ kika mere luŋ kede bolti luŋ kede arii me cego." 
Nehemiah3:4 Meremot wot a Uria ame wot a Kakkoj te gero mege lubogi. Mecullam wot a Barakia ame wot a Mecejabel te lubogi. Jadok wot a Bana te gero mere lubogi. 
Nehemiah3:5 Jo ame bedo i boma me Tekoa te gero luba Jadok. Cite jo mogo ame doŋodoŋo me bomagi mom oye tiyo tic ame opokkigi. 
Nehemiah3:6 Joyada wot a Pacea, kede Mecullam wot a Becodeya te cako megi i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel Acon. Gin ogero apama mere ote riyo bao mere ducu, ote keto daŋ kika mere luŋ kede bolti luŋ, kede arii me cego luŋ." 
Nehemiah3:7 Jo olubogi te bedo Melatia, dano me Gibeon, Jadon, dano me Meronot, kede jo ame bedo i Gibeon kede Mijpa, ame gin luŋ rik otye i lobo ame onwoŋo tye loka kulo Euprata i te loc a gabuna me kuno," 
Nehemiah3:8 Ujjiel wot a Karkaya, atet jabu te gero mege lube; en ogero apama mere naka i kom apama alaccere." 
Nehemiah3:9 Repaya wot a Kur, ame onwoŋo loo nucu me dictrik me Jerucalem, te gero mege." 
Nehemiah3:10 Jedaya wot a Karunap te lubo Repaya, kun yika apama cel ame onwoŋo tye i nyim ode. Eka Kattuc wot a Kacabneya te lube." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malkija wot a Karim te yiko mege lubo Kattuc, kun yiko gin kede Kaccub wot a Pakat-moab, ote yiko daŋ kan ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ ame olwoŋo ni ka tedo ogati." 
Nehemiah3:12 Eka Callum wot a Kallokec, ame onwoŋo loo nucu dictrik me Jerucalem tuŋ ocele te gero mege lubogi, kun anyira mere konye." 
Nehemiah3:13 Karum kede jo ame bedo i boma me Janoa te cako yiko apama cel i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Luŋ. Gin oyiko kika me dogcel kede bolti mere luŋ, kede arii me cego, ote yiko apama ame borrere romo yadi mia abic tuno kede naka i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me wi odur." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malkija wot a Rekab, aloc me dictrik me Bet-akkerem te gero mege cako kede dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me wi odur. Oyiko kika me dogcel luŋ, kede bolti mege ducu, kede arii me cego." 
Nehemiah3:15 Callum wot a Kolkoje, aloc me dictrik me Mijpa te cako yiko apama cel i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Waŋ akoŋ. En owumo wie oko, te daŋ keto kika mege luŋ kede bolti mere luŋ karacel kede arii me cego ducu, En ogero apama me celo Kut me Cela ame tye i poto abaka, kato kede naka piny i rwom me wot piny i paco a Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Nekemia wot Ajibuk, aloc me nucu dictrik me Bet-jur te yiko mege tuno kede naka i nyim lyel a Daudi, kede kut ame okunyo akunya kede udi me bedo a jo atek i lweny." 
Nehemiah3:17 Jo magi ame gin obedo jo Levi, gin daŋ okonyo tic me yiko apama cel me Jerucalem. I akinagi Rekum wot a Bani en ame te yiko apama ame olubo me a Nekemia. Eka Kacabia aloc me nucu dictrik me Keila, te yiko en ame olube, kun yiko pi jo me dictrik mere luŋ." 
Nehemiah3:18 Bavvai wot a Kenadad, aloc me nucu dictrik me Keila, te yiko en ame olubo mea Kacabia." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ejer wot a Yecua, aloc me Mijpa te lube, kun yiko apama ame tye i nyim kan ame oyito iye i ot me kano jami me mony, tuno kede naka i kona cel." 
Nehemiah3:20 Baruk wot a Jabbai te yiko apama ame olubo mege, naka i doggola me donyo i ot Eliacib, alamdog adwoŋ." 
Nehemiah3:21 Meremot wot a Uria ame wot a Kakkoj te yiko dul ame olubo mea Baruk, tuno kede i agikki ot a Eliacib." 
Nehemiah3:22 Olamdog magi daŋ okonyo tic me yiko apama cel me Jerucalem. Olamdog ame onwoŋo bedo i bar i ŋet Jerucalem en ame te yiko apama cel ame olubo. 
Nehemiah3:23 Benjamin kede Kaccub te yiko en ame olubo me a jo-naca, apama ame onwoŋo tye i nyim udigi, Ajaria wot a Maceya ame wot Anania te yiko en ame olubo mege-nono, apama ame onwoŋo tye i nyim ottere en Ajaria," 
Nehemiah3:24 Binnui wot a Kenadad en olubo mannono, cakere i nyim ot Ajaria tuno naka i kona." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palal wot a Ujia te yiko en olubo mege-nono, cakere i kona, kede kan ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ, ame otikere i ot abaka ame tye tuŋ malo i dyekal akur piny. Pedaya te yiko apama cel ame olubo mannono," 
Nehemiah3:26 karacel kede otic ame tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa ame bedo i Opel; gin oyiko megi naka dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Pii ame tye tuŋ kide tuno kede i ot okato malo iguŋ me kuro ot Obaŋa. 
Nehemiah3:27 Jo me Tekoa te yiko apama cel ame olubo mea a Pedayagi, man obedo dulgi me aryo, apama cel ame otikere i twon ot okato malo iguŋ me kuro ot Obaŋa tuno naka i kom apama cel Opel." 
Nehemiah3:28 Olamdog te yiko apama cel ame olubo mannono, kun alamdog acel acel yiko apama cel ame tye i nyim ode, ocako yiko i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Aguragura." 
Nehemiah3:29 Jadok wot a Immer te yiko en olubo megi-nono, ame onwoŋo daŋ tye i nyim ode. Cemaya wot a Cekania, akur dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me tuŋ kide." 
Nehemiah3:30 Kanania wot a Celemia, kede Kanun wot a Jalap me kanyape te yiko en olubo; man obedo dul me aryo ame gin oyiko. Mecullam wot a Berekia te yiko en olubo mea Kananiagi, ame onwoŋo tye i nyim kan ame en bedo iye," 
Nehemiah3:31 Malkija, atet jabu te yiko apama cel ame olubo mannono, wot kede naka i ot a jo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa kede i ot ocatwil, ame onwoŋo tye i ŋet dogcel okurpiny ceggi icika ame tye malo i kona," 
Nehemiah3:32 Atet jabu kede ocatwil te yiko apama cel ame onwoŋo tye i akina icika ame tye i kona naka i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Rommi. 
Nehemiah4:1 Kare ame Canballat owinyo ni wan Ojudaya ocako gero apama cel me Jerucalem, akemo omako meicel te cako cayowa." 
Nehemiah4:2 Eno caowa i nyim omego mere kede i nyim mony me Camaria, kun kobo ni, Man Ojudaya agoro-ni tye atimo ŋo kan? Jo man romo timo no? Gin otamo ni yalo Obaŋa twero miyogi otyeko ticgi-nono i nino acel? Gin dok oromo nwoŋo kiddi anyen i kom man oyido i wi odurir-ame mac doŋ otyeko balo?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia, dano me Ammon, rik daŋ onwoŋo ocuŋ i ŋete kuno; en daŋ te kobo ni, “Jo-nono twero gero apama acalladi? Ekwe amwa-ni ka obeo i wi apama celgi daŋ twero reto oko piny!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 An Nekemia ate cako kwayo Obaŋawa, kun akwae ni, “Ama Obaŋawa, koŋ iwiny kite ame gin tye acayowa kede. Tim ber imi acaegi-nono dok gire i wigi; mi oyak jo yakgi oko, tergi i lobo ame obino bedo iye acalo opii." 
Nehemiah4:5 Kur iwum balgi kadi acel, kur daŋ imi balgi rweny i wigi; pien gin oroki kun omito ni akemo maki i nyim ogedo.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Wan giwa ote medde i gedowa naka ka apama luŋ oromere irit, kun borrere malo tye i nucu me maca acon ca Man otimere pien jo luŋ rik onwoŋo tye i cuny me tic." 
Nehemiah4:7 Cite i kare ame Canbali at kede Tobia, kede jo Arab, jo Ammon, kede jo Acidod owinyo ni ticwa tye awot anyim apwot apwota i gero apama me Jerucalem, dok ni ocako doŋ cuculo kan ame onwoŋo omumuka oko, akemo omakogi atek meicel." 
Nehemiah4:8 Gin te cako yiko kop i muŋ me bino cobo mony i kom Jerucalem, me obabalo cuny jo iye oko." 
Nehemiah4:9 Cite wan rik ote kwayo Obaŋawa, ote daŋ keto okur piny me kurogi dyeceŋ kede dyewor." 
Nehemiah4:10 Jo me Juda te cako kobo ni, “Teko a jo ame yec ociro doŋ ocako dok oko piny, Aco ka bedo amannono, yugi pwod dwoŋ meicel; man omio mom oromo tic i kom apama cel.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Okworwa onwoŋo tye atamo ni wan mom obino nenogi, dok daŋ mom obino ŋeyo gin ame atimere i komwa, tuno ka gin doŋ otuno oko baŋwa, otye doŋ onekowa kun obalo ticwa oko." 
Nehemiah4:12 Kare luŋ Ojudaya ame onwoŋo bedo i akina okworwa obedo bino baŋwa tyen ame romo apar twal, kun otittiwa gin ame okworwa tye ka yiko i komwa." 
Nehemiah4:13 Mannono omio ate tero jona, kun gin luŋ omako jami lweny acalo pala, toŋi, kede atero, ote wot ketogi bedo i ŋe apama cel, kun obedo i doggola i doggola, kan ame mom ru ogero otum." 
Nehemiah4:14 Atiŋo waŋa malo ate ya malo, kobbi jo adoŋo kede rwode, kede lwak luŋ ni, “Kur ibed wunu kede lworo moro i kom okworwa. Po wunu ka i kom Rwot, ame en dit atek, dok daŋ iyiliyili a mom kobere, me ite lweny wunu atek pi omegowu, itinowu awobe kede anyira, kede pi monwu kede pacowu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Okworwa rik te ŋeyo ni wan otyeko ŋeyo yikgi i komwa oko, ote niaŋ ni Obaŋa otyeko balo yikgi oko. Wan luŋ doŋ ote lokere dok ceŋ i ticwa me gero apama, kun ŋat acel acel dok i dog mege." 
Nehemiah4:16 Cakere i kare-nono nucu me lwak ame onwoŋo atye kede en ame te bedo tic, kun nucugi bedo okur piny ame tye kede jami lwenygi i cingi, acalo toŋi, kwode, atero, kede koti nyonyo me geno korgi, Otel te bedo cuŋ atek i ŋe jo Juda luŋ," 
Nehemiah4:17 ame onwoŋo tye agero apama cel me Jerucalem. Ŋat acel acel ame onwoŋo yeo jami me gedo, mako gin ame eyeo i ciŋe acel, kun jami lweny tye i ciŋe tuŋ ocele;" 
Nehemiah4:18 dok ŋat acel acel i akina ogedo daŋ onwoŋo tye kede pala romo mere i pyere. Akut apel rik onwoŋo bedo i ŋeta. 
Nehemiah4:19 An onwoŋo akobbi odoŋe, rwode kede lwak luŋ ni, “Tic dwoŋ ame omio wan luŋ okeketa atata, ame ŋat acel acel mom ceggi awottere ame nwoŋo daŋ tye agero apama cel." 
Nehemiah4:20 Doŋ ka ce iwinyo wunu apel okok, bin icokere wunu kan ame apel okok iyenono. Obaŋa bino lweny pirwa.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Mannono omio nino i nino, cakere ibai tuno ka acer doŋ odonnyo otyeno, nucu a lwak nwoŋo tye i tic me gero apama cel, kun nucuwa tye akuro piny i toŋŋi i ciŋgi." 
Nehemiah4:22 I kare-nono onwoŋo doŋ akobbi lwak ni wan luŋ karacel kede jo ame konyowa luŋ myero wan ducu obed i Jerucalem dyewor, me okur boma dyewor, kun otio tic dyeceŋ." 
Nehemiah4:23 An onwoŋo abuto kede boŋona i koma, karacel kede owotena, omirona kede jo ame gwoka, Wan luŋ onwoŋo obuto i toŋiwa i ciŋwa." 
Nehemiah5:1 I kare-nono jo apol meicel, co kede mon, te cako koko agwa i kom Ojudaya owotegi." 
Nehemiah5:2 Jo ocele onwoŋo tye ame kobo ni, “Wan opol meicel i odwa myero onwoŋ kal me acama me obed kwo.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Jo ocele onwoŋo kok i, “Wan doŋ otyeko jeŋo pottiwa oko, kede poto olok, kede udiwa me nwoŋo cam pi kec.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Jo ocele mere kok ni, “Koŋ inen, wan doŋ otyeko koporo lim me culo ocoro abaka me pottiwa kede poto olokwa," 
Nehemiah5:5 Aco kono riŋo komwa rom gire aroma kede riŋo kom omegowa, itinowa daŋ rom aroma itinogi; koŋ inen wan otye ka diyo itinowa awobe kede anyira me doko opii, anyirawa ocele doŋ tye acalo opii; wan mom doŋ otye kede yo moro me konyere, pien pottiwa kede poto olokwa, gin luŋ ogamo oko i baŋwa.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Akemo omaka meicel i kare ame awinyo kokogi kede kop a lwak. 
Nehemiah5:7 Abedo lwodo kop man i cunya, ate nwoŋo ni bal tye i wi odoŋe, kede rwode, eka ate kobbigi ni, “Nen, itye ka nwoŋo wunu agoba, kun ŋat man nwoŋo i kom awottere.” An ate lwoŋo cokere adwoŋ me tyeko kop man," 
Nehemiah5:8 ate kobbi lwak ni, “Wan obedo timo gin ame oromo timo, wan obedo wilo omegowa ame obedo Ojudaya, jo ame onwoŋo ocatte kengi baŋ orok. Koŋ inen, aman dok wunu itye ka diyo omegowu me catte kengi, me dok ote catogi baŋwa!” Lwak te liŋ aliŋa, gin ame kono okob te loyogi oko." 
Nehemiah5:9 An ate kobbigi ni, “Gin ame itye ka timo wunu-nono mom gire ber kadi acel. Wun myero ibed wunu jo ame lworo Obaŋawa, kun itimo wunu gin ame en mito, me wek orok ame obedo okworwa, kur nwoŋ ginnoro ame myero gin ocawa iye." 
Nehemiah5:10 Koŋ inen wunu, an karacel kede watina kede omirona, otye ka miyo jo koporo lim kede kal i baŋwa. Aman doŋ myero owek wunu cuny me nwoŋo agoba oko, kur doŋ openy wunu." 
Nehemiah5:11 Tin myero doŋ odwokkigi wunu pottigi i ciŋgi, poto olokgi, poto jeitunigi kede udigi ducu, Ginnoro luŋ ame ibedo gamo wunu i baŋgi acalo agobawu, lim, kal, koŋo olok, onyo moo, myero doŋ iŋol wunu oko i wigi.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Lwak luŋ te gamo ni, “Wan obino timo kite ame ikobo, obino dwoko jami luŋ baŋgi, dok daŋ mom obino medde gamo ginnoro i baŋgi.” An ate lwoŋo olamdog, jo luŋ te kwoŋ i nyimgi, ni obino lubo gin ame doggi okobo." 
Nehemiah5:13 An ate lamere kun ayeŋo boŋona akobo ni, “Ŋat ame mom bino lubo kwoŋ man, myero Obaŋa ryem oko i ode, kede i dog ticcere, kite ame ayeŋo kede boŋona-ni. Myero ryem danonono oko i kabedo mere, me kakare doŋ gire nono.” Lwak ame onwoŋo ocokere te gamo ni, “Ameri”, ote pako Rwot. Gin te bedo lubo gin ame doŋ otyeko ciko-nono." 
Nehemiah5:14 Medo i kom mannono, cakere i kare ame oketa iye, me bedo gabunagi i Juda, pi mwakki apar wie aryo luŋ, cakere i mwaka me pyeraryo me loc Atakerec tuno kede i mwaka mere me pyeradek wie aryo, an karacel kede watina mom giwa obedo gamo i baŋgi cam ame onwoŋo myero agam i baŋgi pi ticca acalo gabuna." 
Nehemiah5:15 Owotena ame ogeo bedo gabuna i lobogi-nono onwoŋo obedo miyo jo peko atek pi gamo cam kede koŋo olok nino i nino, kede dok cekel me ryal pyeraŋwen. Omirogi daŋ rik obedo miyo jo peko kittono. Cite an mom abedo timo kittono, pien onwoŋo alworo Obaŋa," 
Nehemiah5:16 An alunyo luŋo tekona luŋ i gero apama cel me Jerucalem, mom apenyo lobo moro me bedo acalo mega. Omirona luŋ onwoŋo bedo ka i tic me gero apama cel." 
Nehemiah5:17 Aco kono an onwoŋo acamo kede jo ame romo mia acel kede pyerabic i mejana, ame gin luŋ obedo Ojudaya kede rwodegi, kun man nwoŋo mom akwano iye orok ame bino baŋa i lobo ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetwa." 
Nehemiah5:18 I kare-nono rik onwoŋo aneko twon acel nino i nino, rommi abeco kanyape, kede gwen, dok i ŋe nino apar apar amio jo koŋo olok adwoŋ meicel. Kadi bed rik atimo man ducu, cite mom agamo lim ame onwoŋo myero mia acalo gabuna, pien jo onwoŋo tye kede peko meicel." 
Nehemiah5:19 Tim ber, ama Obaŋa, ipo pi ginnoro luŋ ame atimo pi jo man, itim gin aber pira." 
Nehemiah6:1 Kare ame Canballat kede Tobia, kede Gecem, dano me Arab, kede okwor Ojudaya ocele mege owinyo ni wan doŋ otyeko gero apama cel me Jerucalem, kun mom dok tye kannoro ame doŋ twolo, kono onwoŋo mom ru oketo kika me dogcel i dogcel luŋ," 
Nehemiah6:2 Canballat kede Gecem te cwayo kop baŋa ni myero awot arwatte kedgi i paco moro i bar me Ono. Man onwoŋo yik ame gin onwoŋo tye kede me temo timarac," 
Nehemiah6:3 An rik ate dwokkigi kop kun akobbigi ni, “An atye atiyo ticcoro ame pire tek meicel ame mom atwero wot kuno kadi acel. Mom abino weko ticca-nono cuŋ ate wot kuno me wot rwatte kedwu.”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Gin te bedo cwayo kwena baŋa pi tyen ame romo aŋwen twal, kun an daŋ adwokk igi kop acellono." 
Nehemiah6:5 Canballat dok te cwayo kop baŋa tyen me kannyere, kun omio amiro mere en ame okelo waraga ame mom orwako i baaca." 
Nehemiah6:6 Kop ame ocoo i yie onwoŋo tye kit man: “Kop tye ka winyere i baŋ rok ame bedo i ŋetwu, dok Gecem daŋ okobo kop acellono, ni mannono, yin karacel kede Ojudaya imito wunu jem; dok ni mannono en omio itye wunu ka gero apama cel me Jerucalem. Dok daŋ tye ka winyere ni yin imito kette keni me bedo abaka," 
Nehemiah6:7 dok daŋ ityeko doŋ yiko odwarpinnyogo oko me wot rabo pire i Jerucalem ni yin doŋ ibedo abaka me Juda, Aman ana ŋeo ni kop man bino tuno baŋ abaka adwoŋ, kite ame okobere kede-nono; man omio an atamo ni myero wan koŋ orwatte kedi me wek onyam koppere kedi.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 An ate dwokke kop kun akobbe ni, “Kop ame yin ikobo-nono luŋ mom tye moro iye ame tye ateni. Nen calo yin giri iyikogi ayika piri keni.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Gin onwoŋo otye ka yenyo yo me poto cunywa, kun otamo ni ka lworo omakowa, wan obino doko goro, eka tic te loyowa oko, Cite aman doŋ yin Rwot, tim ber acuŋ atek." 
Nehemiah6:10 I kare-nono onwoŋo Cemaya wot a Delaya, ame obedo wot a Meketabel mom doŋ romo donyo oko i ode, Doŋ i kare ame an awoto limme, en te kobba ni, “Yin karacel kede an myero owot opon oko i kabedo acil i ot Obaŋa, ote cego doggola oko ducu, pien gin abino me bino neki oko, Gin gire abino neki oko dyewor.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 An agamo doge kun akobbe ni, “Itamo ni kodi an-ni daŋ myero ariŋ oko? Itamo ni ŋat acalo an-ni twero wot i ot Obaŋa pi laro kwona? An gira mom abino wot i ot Obaŋa.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 I kare ame alwodo koppere-nono i cunya, aniaŋ ni Obaŋa mom onwoŋo okobo kede, cite Tobia kede Canballat onwoŋo owile oko me bita." 
Nehemiah6:13 Gin onwoŋo owile pi koppono, pien gin onwoŋo mito ni an abed lwor, ate cako timo tim me lworo ame mia atimo bal, eka gin doŋ ote cako miya nyiŋ arac, ote nwoŋo yo me caya." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ama Obaŋana, po pi gin ame Tobia kede Canballat otimo, me iket can i komgi. Po daŋ pi adwarpiny a dako Noadia kede odwarpiny ocele ame onwoŋo mito miya lworo." 
Nehemiah6:15 Tic me gero apama cel me Jerucalem rik te tum oko i nino dwe pyeraryo wie abic, i dwe me Elul." 
Nehemiah6:16 Kare ame okworwa ame orok a bedo i ŋetwa owinyo, lworo omakogi, ote niaŋ ni piny doŋ oloogi, pien ŋat acel acel onwoŋo ŋeo ni Obaŋa en obedo konyowa i ticwa-nono naka i tummere." 
Nehemiah6:17 Medo i kom mannono, i kare-nono Ojudaya onwoŋo obedo coyo waraga baŋ Tobia kun Tobia daŋ coyigi," 
Nehemiah6:18 Jo apol me Juda onwoŋo gene, pien onwoŋo okwoŋere kedgi, dok daŋ onwoŋo obedo orgi, pien onyomo nyaka a Cekania wot Arak, Dok wode Jekokanan onwoŋo onyomo nyaka a Mecullam wot a Berekia," 
Nehemiah6:19 Jo rik bedo titta pi gin abeco ame Tobia otimo, dok daŋ obedo tero baŋ Tobia ginnoro luŋ ame owinyo an akobo. Mannono omio en obedo cwaya waraga me poto cunya." 
Nehemiah7:1 Kare ame doŋ otyeko yiko apama cel otum, ame aketo doŋ kika i doggi ducu, kun ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa, ower, kede jo Levi daŋ doŋ oketo oko," 
Nehemiah7:2 aketo jo aryo me loyo boma me Jerucalem; aketo omina Kanani, kede Kanania, me bedo ŋat ame loo cel luŋ me Jerucalem, pien en onwoŋo obedo dano ame genne atek, dok lworo Obaŋa kato jo apol." 
Nehemiah7:3 Acikogi me mom yabo dogcel me Jerucalem idiko con ame ceŋ mom ru okato malo, dok myero daŋ oceg oko con, ote tweyo daŋ doge oko kun okur pwod tye i ticgi. Acikogi daŋ me keto okurpiny i kom jo ame bedo i Jerucalem ikome, kun ŋat acel acel omio kabedo mere i nyim ode en ikome." 
Nehemiah7:4 Boma onwoŋo yie lac, cite jo ame onwoŋo bedo iye onwoŋo mom pol wok, dok udi ame ogero iye onwoŋo daŋ mom ru pol." 
Nehemiah7:5 Obaŋa te miya tam me coko odoŋe luŋ kede rwode ducu, karacel kede jo ducu, me akwan welgi kun acoo piny i doggola i doggola. Rik ate nwoŋo buk ame ocoo iye wel jo ame ogeo dwogo iyi opii, kun ocoo i doggola i doggola, gin ame onwoŋo ene:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Magi gin jo me Juda ame rik oya iyi opii, kan ame rik abaka Nebukadnejar me Babulon oterogi iye acalo opii. Gin luŋ odwogo i Jerucalem kede i Juda kun ŋat acel acel dok ceŋ i boma me turgi." 
Nehemiah7:7 Otel ame owoto kedgi ene: Jerubabel, Yecua, Nekemia, Ajaria, Ramia, Nakamani, Bilcan, Miciperet Bigvai, Rekum kede Bana. Man, en wel a jo Icrael ame odwogo iyi opii." 
Nehemiah7:8 Jo me doggola a Paroc rik tye tutumia aryo, mia acel kede pyerabiro wie aryo," 
Nehemiah7:9 Jo me doggola a Cepatia te bedo mia adek kede pyerabiro wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:10 Jo me doggola Arak mia abicel kede pyerabic wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:11 Jo me Pakat-moab, ame obedo jo me doggola a Yecua kede Yoab, te bedo tutumia aryo, mia aboro kede apar wie aboro." 
Nehemiah7:12 Jo me doggola Elam te bedo tutumia acel, mia aryo kede pyerabic wie aŋwen." 
Nehemiah7:13 Jo me doggola a Jattu te bedo mia aboro kede pyeraŋwen wie abic. 
Nehemiah7:14 Jo me doggola a Jakkai te dwogo mia abiro kede pyerabicel nono. 
Nehemiah7:15 Jo me doggola a Pinnui te dwogo mia abicel kede pyeraŋwen wie aboro. 
Nehemiah7:16 Jo me doggola a Bebai odwogo mia abicel kede pyeraryo wie aboro. 
Nehemiah7:17 Jo me doggola Ajigad te dwogo tutumia aryo, mia adek kede pyeraryo wie aryo." 
Nehemiah7:18 Jo me doggola Adonikam te bedo mia abicel kede pyerabicel wie abiro. 
Nehemiah7:19 Jo me doggola a Bigvai te bedo tutumia aryo, kede pyerabicel wie abiro." 
Nehemiah7:20 Jo me doggola Adin te dwogo mia abicel, kede pyerabic wie abic." 
Nehemiah7:21 Jo me doggola Ater, ame obedo dano me doggola a Kejekia te bedo pyeraboŋwen wie aboro." 
Nehemiah7:22 Jo me doggola a Kacum te dwogo mia adek, kede pyeraryo wie aboro." 
Nehemiah7:23 Jo me doggola a Bejai odwogo mia adek kede pyeraryo wie aŋwen. 
Nehemiah7:24 Jo me doggola a Karip odwogo mia acel kede apar wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:25 Jo me doggola a Gibeon odwogo pyerabonwen wie abic. 
Nehemiah7:26 Jo ame rik kwarigi obedo i Beterekem kede i Netopa odwogo mia acel kede pyeraboro wie aboro. 
Nehemiah7:27 Jo ame kwarigi obedo Anatot odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aboro. 
Nehemiah7:28 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Bet-ajimavet odwogo pyeraŋwen wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:29 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Kiricit-jearim, Cepira, kede i Beerot odwogo mia abiro kede pyeraŋwen wie adek." 
Nehemiah7:30 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Rama kede i Geba odwogo mia abicel kede pyeraryo wie acel. 
Nehemiah7:31 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Mikmac odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:32 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Betel kede Ai odwogo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie adek. 
Nehemiah7:33 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Nebo ocele mere odwogo pyerabic wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:34 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Elam ocele mere odwogo tutumia acel, mia aryo kede pyerabic wie aŋwen." 
Nehemiah7:35 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Karim odwogo mia adek kede pyeraryo nono. 
Nehemiah7:36 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Jeriko odwogo mia adek kede pyeraŋwen wie abic. 
Nehemiah7:37 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Lod, Kadid kede i Ono, odwogo mia abiro kede pyeraryo wie acel." 
Nehemiah7:38 Jo ame kwarigi obedo i Cena odwogo tutumia adek, mia aboŋwen kede pyeradek nono." 
Nehemiah7:39 Magi en ame obedo olamdog ame odwogo iyi opii; ikwae a Jedaya, me doggola a Yecua, odwogo mia aŋwen kede pyerabiro wie adek." 
Nehemiah7:40 Jo me doggola Immer odwogo tutumia acel kede pyerabic wie aryo. 
Nehemiah7:41 Jo me doggola a Pacur odwogo tutumia acel, mia aryo kede pyeraŋwen wie abiro." 
Nehemiah7:42 Jo me doggola a Karim odwogo tutumia acel kede apar wie abiro. 
Nehemiah7:43 Magi en ame obedo jo Levi ame odwogo iyi opii: Jo me doggola a Yecua kede me a Kadmiel ame obedo ikwae Odavia te dwogo pyerabiro wie aŋwen. 
Nehemiah7:44 Jo Levi ame rik ower, ame obedo ikwae Acap odwogo mia acel kede pyeraŋwen wie aboro." 
Nehemiah7:45 Jo Levi ame rik obedo ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa, ame obedo ikwae a Callum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub, Katita kede ikwae a Cobai, odwogo mia acel kede pyeradek wie aboro." 
Nehemiah7:46 Magi en ame obedo jo ame rik odwogo iyi opii i akina jo ame rik tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa: jo me doggola a Jika, Acupa, Tabaot," 
Nehemiah7:47 jo me doggola a Keroc, Cia, Padon," 
Nehemiah7:48 jo me doggola a Lebana, Agaba, kede Calmai," 
Nehemiah7:49 jo me doggola a Kanan, Giddel, kede Gakar," 
Nehemiah7:50 jo me doggola a Reaya, Rejin kede Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 jo me doggola a Gajam, Ujja, kede Pacea," 
Nehemiah7:52 jo me doggola a Becai, Meunim, kede Nepucecim," 
Nehemiah7:53 jo me doggola a Bakbuk, Akupa, kede Karkur," 
Nehemiah7:54 jo me doggola a Bajilit, Mekida, kede Karica," 
Nehemiah7:55 jo me doggola a Barkoc, Cicera, kede Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 jo me doggola a Nejia kede Atipa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Magi en ame odwogo iyi opii i akina ikwae omiro ame rik tio baŋ Culeman: jo me doggola a Cotai, Acoperet, kede Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 jo me doggola a Jaala, Oarkon, kede Gidel," 
Nehemiah7:59 jo me doggola a Cepatia, Kattil, Pokeret-kajebaim kede Amon." 
Nehemiah7:60 Wel jo luŋ ame rik tio ticcogo apek i ot a Rwot, kede ikwae omiro ame rik tio baŋ Culeman, ame odwogo iyi opii rik romo mia adek kede pyeraŋwen wie aryo." 
Nehemiah7:61 Magi en ame obedo jo ame oya i Tel-mela, Tel-karica, Kerub, Addon, kede Immer; gin mom otwero nyuto doggola a kwarigi ame gin oya iye, ame twero cimo kannaler ka ce gin obedo jo Icrael." 
Nehemiah7:62 Obino jo a Delaya, Tobia, kede jo a Nekoda; gin luŋ jo mia abicel kede pyeraŋwen wie aryo." 
Nehemiah7:63 Medo i kom mannono, ikwae olamdog magi daŋ obino: jo me doggola a Kobaya, Kakkoj, kede me a Barjillai ame rik onyomo dako mere i akina anyira a Barjillai me Gilead, rik daŋ ote cako lwoŋe kede nyiŋ papa a cege-nono." 
Nehemiah7:64 Otemo yenyo nyiŋ jo man ka ce rik onwoŋo tye i buk ame ocoo iye nyiŋ kwaro a jo Icrael, cite mom ote nwoŋo, omio ote kwanyo nyiŋgi oko i kom olamdog." 
Nehemiah7:65 Gabuna rik te miyogi ŋeyo ni kite acalo gin ame nyuto ni gin obedo ikwae olamdog mom tye-ni, gin doŋ mom obino medde camo cam ame omio baŋ Obaŋa, tuno ka alamdoggoro tye ame romo penyo tam Obaŋa kun tio Urim kede Tumim." 
Nehemiah7:66 Lwak luŋ ame rik odwogo iyi opii, rik romo tutumia pyeraŋwen wie aryo, mia adek kede pyerabicel nono," 
Nehemiah7:67 kun mom okwano iye omirogi kede aŋecagi ame rik tye tutumia abiro, mia adek kede pyeradek wie abiro, karacel kede ower a co kede en a mon ame romo mia aryo kede pyeraŋwen wie abic." 
Nehemiah7:68 Aguragura ame gin odwogo kede rik romo mia abiro kede pyeradek wie abicel, kede kane adoŋo mege ame romo mia aryo kede pyeraŋwen wie abic," 
Nehemiah7:69 kede inaga mia aŋwen kede pyeradek wie abic, kede dok kane ocele tutumia abicel, mia abiro kede pyeraryo nono." 
Nehemiah7:70 I kare-nono odoŋe mogo i akina odoŋe ame rik loo doggola a kwarigi te miyo lim me konyo tic. Gabuna adwoŋ me kuno te miyo jabu ame pekkere romo darik tutumia acel, kede becen pyerabic, kede boŋŋi me aruka olamdog mia abic kede pyeradek nono." 
Nehemiah7:71 Odoŋe ocele ame loo doggola a kwarigi te miyo jabu ame pekkere romo darik tutumia aryo nono, kede ryal ame pekkere romo mina mia aryo nono." 
Nehemiah7:72 Eka jo ocele te miyo jabu ame pekkere romo darik tutumia pyeraryo nono, ryal ame pekkere romo mina tutumia pyeraryo nono, kede boŋŋi me aruka olamdog ame romo pyerabicel wie abiro." 
Nehemiah7:73 Olamdog kede jo Levi, ogwok doggola ot a Rwot, ower, karacel kede jo ocele mege, jo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot a Rwot, karacel kede jo Icrael luŋ ame rik bedo i bomagi." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kare ame dwe me abiro oromo, onwoŋo jo Icrael luŋ doŋ tye obedo oko i bomagi. Lwak luŋ rik te cokere i cuny acel i dyekal i nyim dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Pii; gin ocokere kuno i nino dwe acel me dwe-nono. Gin te penyo Ejira alamdoŋ, ame apwony cik Obaŋa, cik ame rik Rwot omio baŋ jo Icrael, kun mio baŋ Muca, ni myero en kel buk me cikkono." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ejira daŋ te kelo buk me cikkono i nyim jo ame ocokere, ame rik onwoŋo tye iye co, mon, kede itino adito ame romo winyo kop aber kede niaŋ." 
Nehemiah8:3 En te cako kwano cikkono baŋgi, kun ocuŋ i nyim dogcel ame olwoŋo ni nyim dogcel me Pii. En ocako kwano odiko tuno naka dyeceŋ, kun jo luŋ, co, mon kede itino tye aciko yitgi odoco me winyo cik ame tye i bukkono." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ejira onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i wi tuti me bao ame onwoŋo oyiko me bino kwano cik a Rwot i nino-nono. Jo magi onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i ŋete i ciŋe tuŋ cem: Mattitia, Cema, Anaya, Uria, Kilkia, kede Maceya; eka jo magi te cuŋ i ŋete i ciŋe tuncam: Pedaya, Micael, Malkija, Kacum, Kacibaddana, Jekaria kede Mecullam," 
Nehemiah8:5 Ejira oyabo buk cik kun jo luŋ tye aneno, pien en onwoŋo ocuŋ malo i wi bao kan ame jo luŋ romo nene aber. Kare ame en oyabo buk, jo luŋ oya malo," 
Nehemiah8:6 Ejira te geyo pwoyo Rwot, kun kobo ni, “Pwoc obed baŋ Rwot, ame en Obaŋa adwoŋ meicel!” Jo luŋ te tiŋo ciŋgi malo kun okobo ni, “Amen! Amen!” Gin luŋ ote rumo coŋgi piny woro Obaŋa, kun nyimgi gudo piny." 
Nehemiah8:7 Jo doŋ te ya malo cuŋ i kakargi, kun Olevi magi gonnyigi cik me wek oniaŋ iye aber: Yecua, Bani, Cerebia, Jamin, Akkub, Cabetai, Kodia, Maceya, Kelita, Ajaria, Jojabad, Kanan kede Pelaya," 
Nehemiah8:8 Gin okwano kop i buk cik Obaŋa, kun ogonyo tere baŋ lwak, jo te niaŋ aber kop luŋ ame okwannigi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Kare ame jo doŋ otyeko winyo ginnoro luŋ ame cik mito ni gin obed timo, koppere otugo cunygi, gin luŋ ote cako kok oko, Mannono te miyo Nekemia, Ejira kede Olevi ame rik obedo gonyo cik baŋ lwak, te kobbi lwak ni, “Tin en nino acil baŋ Rwot Obaŋawa, myero kur ikum wunu iye, akadi koko," 
Nehemiah8:10 Wun dok wunu paco iwot ikwer wunu nino man, kun icamo wunu moo, imato wunu koŋo amit; mi wunu cam baŋ jo ame mom tye kede ginnoro ame oyiko. Pien man en nino acil baŋ Rwotwa, myero kur ibed wunu kede kumo moro iye. Yomcuny ame Rwot mio bino meddiwa teko.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Jo Levi te bedo juko jo me liŋ mot, kun okobo ni, “Liŋ wunu mot, pien nino man obedo nino acil; kur ikum wunu.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Jo luŋ doŋ te cako wot paco, wot cam kede matte, kun onywako camgi kede matgi i jo ocele, ame cunygi yom atek, pien oniaŋ kop ame obedo kwano baŋgi, gonyegi, ote bedo iye. Man dok obedo tyen me agege ame jo obedo kede i gonye, pien cakere i kare a Yocwa wot a Nuni tuno kede i nino-nono, jo Icrael onwoŋo mom doŋ lubo cikkono, nino-nono yomcuny obedo adwoŋ meicel." 
Nehemiah8:13 Orwo mere odoŋe atekere ame loo doggola a kwarigi, karacel kede olamdog, kede jo Levi, owoto baŋ Ejira, me owot oni odoco gin ame cik mito ni jo tim," 
Nehemiah8:14 Gin te cop i kakannoro ame ocoo i buk cik ame kobo ni, Rwot yam ociko ca ŋi mannono jo Icrael myero bed i gonye i kare me kwero ecuban ame okwero i dwe me abiro," 
Nehemiah8:15 Mannono omio gin te cwayo kwena me rabo pire i boma luŋ kede i Jerucalem luŋ, kun okobbi jo ni, “Wot wunu malo i wi kiddi, me iwot itoŋ wunu jaŋ yen apapat obuŋere, me ibin ikud wunu kede gonye kite ame ocoo kede i buk me cik.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Jo luŋ te wot toŋo jaŋ yen, ote bino gero kede gonye, kun ŋat acel acel gero mege kene i dyekal me ode, i dyekal me ot a Rwot, i dyekal ame tye i nyim dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Pii, kede en ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Epraim," 
Nehemiah8:17 Lwak luŋ ame rik onwoŋo odwogo iyi opii ogero obedo oko i bomagi. Lwak luŋ rik te cokere i cuny acel i dyekal i nyim dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Pii; gin ocokere kuno i nino dwe acel me dwe-nono, Gin te penyo Ejira alamdog, ame apwony cik Obaŋa, cik ame rik Rwot omio baŋ jo Icrael, kun mio baŋ Muca, ni myero en kel buk me cikkono." 
Nehemiah8:18 Cakere i nino me agege ame gin ogeo bedo kede i gonye tuno kede i nino me agikki mere, gin obedo kwano dul i buk me cik Obaŋa, Gin okwero ecuban me gonye pi nino abiro, eka i nino me aboro mere gin te bedo kede cokere adwoŋ, kite ame tye kede i buk cik." 
Nehemiah9:1 I nino dwe pyeraryo wie aŋwen me dwe acellono, jo Icrael dok ocokere karacel, kun okanyo kec, oruko boŋo cola, dok ojuko wigi kede kwoyo me nyuto cwercunygi pi balgi." 
Nehemiah9:2 I kare-nono onwoŋo jo Icrael opokere oko i kom orok. Gin ocuŋ acuŋa ote ca ko tuco balgi ame gin karacel kede kwarigi obedo timo. 
Nehemiah9:3 Pi caa ame romo adek twal, gin ocuŋ acuŋa kun jo okwano kop ame tye i buk me cik a Rwot Obanagi, eka dok pi caa adek ocele gin te bedo tuco balgi, ote woro daŋ Rwot Obanagi." 
Nehemiah9:4 Jo ame ocuŋ malo kan ame jo Levi cuŋ iye, obedo Yecua, Bani, Kadmiel, Cebania, Bunni, Cerebia, kede Kanani. Gin okwao Obaŋagi kun okwao kede dwon aloŋo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Jo Levi magi: Yecua, Kadmiel, Bani, Kacabnia, Cerbia, Odia, Cebania kede Petakia, en ame okobbi jo me kwayo Obaŋa, kun okobo ni, “Ya wun malo, me ipak wun RWOT, Obaŋawu; pake wunu tin kede waŋ i waŋ, Jo luŋ myero pak nyiŋi me kwogo, ama Rwot; kadi bed pak ame dano paki kede mom ginnoro kadi acel.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Ejira te cako kwayo Obaŋa kun kobo ni, “Yin gire, ama Rwot, en ibedo Rwot; yin gire en ame itio polo kede lwak acer luŋ iye. Itio daŋ lobo kede nam, kede jami luŋ ame tye i yigi; gin luŋ otye kede kwo piri; ginnoro luŋ ame tye malo i polo rumo piny wori," 
Nehemiah9:7 Ama Rwot Obaŋa, yin en ame rik iyero Abram, yin en ikwanye i lobo me Ur i Babulon, yin en ame iloko nyiŋe ni Iburaim." 
Nehemiah9:8 Yin rik inwoŋo ni en obedo ŋat ame geni i cunye luŋ, yin rik icikere kede. Rik iciko ni ibino miyo baŋ ikwae lobo me Kanan, kun imiogi daŋ lobo a jo Kitti, kede jo Amor, lobo a jo Periji, Jebuc kede me a jo Girgac. Yin ibin icobo gin ame iciko-nono luŋ, pien yin igenne." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Yin rik ineno kite ame owuno kede kwariwa i Miciri, rik iwinyo kokogi i Nam Arema." 
Nehemiah9:10 Yin rik itimo anyuttogo kede taŋo me awura meicel i nyim Parao, omiro mere, kede jo luŋ me kuno, pien yin onwoŋo iŋeo kite ame en owuno kede joni, I kare-naca nyiŋi te cako rwo tuno kede naka tin." 
Nehemiah9:11 Yin rik imio pii i dye nam oyabere oko i nyimgi, imiogi obeo kan otwo iwec. Jo ame oryemo yorgi ite miyo mwonyere oko i pii, kite ame gweŋ donyo kede piny i te pii." 
Nehemiah9:12 Dyeceŋ rik ibedo telogi kede pagi me pol, kun dyewor imenyo nyimgi kede pagi me mac," 
Nehemiah9:13 I kidi me Cinai, yin rik ite yitto piny baŋgi, rik ite kop kedgi kuno; eka ite miyogi cik ikokome kede pwony me ateni." 
Nehemiah9:14 Icikogi ni myero ogwok nino me cabit bed acil, imio amironi Muca omiogi cik kede icwil luŋ." 
Nehemiah9:15 Kare ame kec onekogi, yin imiogi cam ame oya i polo, kare ame oryo pii ocirogi imiogi pii i kom kidi, Yin rik icikogi ni myero owot ogam lobo-naca, ame rik iciko me miyogi." 
Nehemiah9:16 “Cite gin kwariwa rik ote cako bedo opala ame ŋutgi nwaŋ, kun okwero lubo cik meri luŋ." 
Nehemiah9:17 Gin okwero lubo oko, kun wigi wil oko i kom gin itimo; wigi owil-gu oko i kom taŋo ame rik itimo. Ŋutgi obedo a nwaŋ ote yero atelgi kengi, me dwokogi cen iyi opii i Miciri. Cite yin giri ibedo Obaŋa ame timo kica; yin akica dok mar meri dwoŋ, akemo mom maki oyot. Pi kicani adwoŋŋono omio cunyi mom ocaogi."
