Nehemiah9:18 Kadi bed gin otimo cal jok ame calo atin twon, Miciri, ote cako woro ni en obedo Obaŋa ame okwanyogi kadi gin obedo timo twoni timmogo areco me anywar i komi" 
Nehemiah9:19 pi kicani adwoŋ, yin gire mom ibin iwekogi i tim ata, Pagi me pol ame rik telogi dyeceŋ mom oya i baŋgi pagi me mac ame rik mennyigi yo mom daŋ oya i baŋgi dyewor." 
Nehemiah9:20 Yin gire imedde miyogi Cuny meri aber me pwonyogi, kun daŋ imiogi manna me acama, kede pii me amata nakanaka." 
Nehemiah9:21 Pi mwakki pyeraŋwen luŋ ame gin otyeko i tim, yin ibedo miyogi ginnoro luŋ ame gin mito; boŋŋigi naka mom omedo i yec i komgi, tyengi-gu mom daŋ okwot kadi acel." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Yin rik imiogi oloo rok kede loc apapat, kede lobo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi. Omao lobo me Kecbon, ame rik abaka Cikon loo, kede Bacan daŋ ame rik Og loo." 
Nehemiah9:23 Imio ikwaegi onya atek meicel, ame calo acer me polo, imiogi otuno i lobo ame rik iciko pire baŋ kwarigi ni myero gin owot ogam bed megi." 
Nehemiah9:24 Mannono omio ikwaegi owoto i lobo-naca ote gamo bedo megi, yin ibin imiogi oloo jo me lobonaca oko, imio jo me Kanaan kede obakkigi i ciŋgi, me gin otimgi kite a yigi mito." 
Nehemiah9:25 Gin rik te mayo twoni boma mogo ame ocelo atek, ote gamo lobo ame ceko cam meicel, kede udi ame jami abeco opon yigi, kede akoŋŋogo ame doŋ okunyo oko, ogamo naka potti jeituni, kede me yen ame nyako nyiggi anaka me olok-gu. Gin ocamo jami iye, oyeŋ, ote cako cwe meicel, cunygi obedo ayom meicel i twoni jami abeco ame imiogi." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Kadi amannono, gin obin ojem ote kwero winyi oko; gin te cako loko ŋegi i kom cikki. Oneko odwarpiny ame kwenyorogi, ame tittigi me lokere dwogo baŋi. Gin obedo timo twoni tim areco meicel me nywari," 
Nehemiah9:27 Mannono omio yin ite jalogi oko i ciŋ okworgi, okworgi te bedo timogi lit. Kare ame peko doŋ odiogi, gin te cako kok baŋi, yin rik ite winyo kokogi kabedoni i polo. Kica omaki atek i komgi ite cwayo jo me larogi, ame te larogi i ciŋ okworgi." 
Nehemiah9:28 Cite i kare ame gin doŋ tye kede kuc, dok ote timo bal i nyimi, yin dok ite jalogi i ciŋ okworgi, okworgi te dok cako loyogi. Kadi amannono, i kare ame gin oŋut ote kok baŋi, yin pwod imedo winyogi i kabedoni i polo, pi kicani yin ibedo larogi tyen apol meicel." 
Nehemiah9:29 Yin ibedo kwenyorogi me olokere ocak lubo cikki, cite gin ote bedo wakere awaka kun mom olubo cikki, gin obedo turo cikki, aco kono en obedo yo me kwo. Gin gigi ote kwero oko, kun omedde bedo opala, a ŋutgi nwaŋ." 
Nehemiah9:30 Yin ibedi diyo cunyi i komgi pi mwakki apol meicel, ibedo cwayo Cuny meri i kom odwarpiny me kwenyorogi, cite joni omedde bedo calo jo ame yitgi odiŋ. Mannono omio yin ijalogi oko i ciŋ jo me lobo-nono." 
Nehemiah9:31 Kadi bed amannono, pi kica meri adwoŋ, yin mom ijalogi atwal, mom ijwerogi oko i lobo, pien yin gire ibedo Obaŋa ame akica meicel." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Doŋ ama Rwot Obaŋawa, ame dwoŋ dok tek meicel, Obaŋa ame iyiliyili, ame igwoko cikkereni, dok ame marri mom lokere, kur imi can ame obedo neno obed gin ame pire mom tek baŋi, can ame wan luŋ kede obakkiwa, olocwa, olamdogwa, odwarpinywa, karacel kede kwariwa obedo neno, can ame obedo neno cakere i kare obakki me Acuria tuno kede naka tin." 
Nehemiah9:33 Yin gire iketo can i komwa kakare, yin gire ibedo timo gin ame nyuto genni i komwa, cite wan obedo timo gin arac i nyimi," 
Nehemiah9:34 Kwariwa, obakkiwa, olocwa, olamdogwa mom olubo cikki, mom-gu ociko yitgi i gin iciko, akadi tero yitgi i kop ame ibedo kwenyorogi kede." 
Nehemiah9:35 Obakki mom obedo tic baŋi i loc ame imiogi, kadi i gum adwoŋ ame imiogi i lobo alac ame ceko cam, gin mom oweko timo gin arac kadi acel." 
Nehemiah9:36 Nen, aman doŋ wan odoko opii, i lobo ame rik imio baŋ kwariwa, me ocam mot abeco ame ya iye. Nen, wan doŋ otye iye acalo opii." 
Nehemiah9:37 Gin ame ya iye luŋ doŋ kato akata i ciŋ obakki ame iketo me loyowa, pien wan otimo bal. Gin doŋ loo anaka komwa kede dokwa, gin twero timo ginnoro acalo omito, wan doŋ otye i twon peko meciel.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Pi gin ame obedo timere-nono, omio wan tin oketo cikere atek odoco, kun ocoo acoa, Olocwa, Olevi, kede olamdog en ame bino keto ciŋgi i cikere-nono." 
Nehemiah10:1 Jo ame te keto ciŋgi iye te bedo Nekemia, gabuna, wot a Kakalia, Jedekia," 
Nehemiah10:2 Ceraya, Ajaria, Jeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pacur, Amaria, Malkija," 
Nehemiah10:4 Kattuc, Cebania, Malluk," 
Nehemiah10:5 Karim, Meremot, Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Ginneton, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Ginneton, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mecullam, Abija, Mijamin," 
Nehemiah10:8 Majia, Bilgai, kede Cemaya. Jo magi luŋ obedo olamdog," 
Nehemiah10:9 Jo Levi ame oketo cingi te bedo Yecua wot Ajania, Binnui me doggola a Kenada, Kadmiel," 
Nehemiah10:10 karacel kede omegogi Cebania, Odia, Kelita, Pelaya, Kanan," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rekob, Kacabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Jakkur, Cerebia, Cebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Odia, Bani, Beninu," 
Nehemiah10:14 Otel a lwak ame oketo cingi obedo. Paroc, Pakat-moab, Elam, Jattu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Bunni, Ajigad, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonija, Bigvai, Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Kejekia, Ajur," 
Nehemiah10:18 Odia, Kacum, Bejai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Karib, Anatot, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpiac, Mecullam, Kejir," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mecejabel, Jadok, Jadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Kanna, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Kocea, Kanani, Kacub," 
Nehemiah10:24 Kalokec, Pila, Cobek," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rekum, Kacabina, Maceya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Akia, Kanan, Anan," 
Nehemiah10:27 Malluk, Karim, Bana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Wan jo Icrael, olamdog, Olevi, ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa, ower, jo ame tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa, kede jo ocele luŋ, ame pi woro cik Obaŋawa opokere oko kenwa i akina orok ame bedo i lobowa; wan karacel kede monwa, itinowa, ame oteggo ame romo doŋ niaŋ kede ŋeyo," 
Nehemiah10:29 wan luŋ oribere kede owotewa ame telowa i kwoŋ kede i ceŋ ka ce oturo kop ame ocikere iye, kun okwoŋo ni obino lubo cik Obaŋawa ame rik en omio baŋ Muca amiro mere, te miyo baŋwa. Wan ocikere me lubo kede tiyo gin ame Rwot Obaŋawa ocikowa iye; dok ocikere daŋ me lubo cikkere luŋ kede icwillere." 
Nehemiah10:30 Mom obino nyomere kede orok ame bedo i lobowa. 
Nehemiah10:31 Ka ce gin bino kelo ginnoro me acata baŋwa i ceŋ cabit onyo i nino moro acil, wan gire mom obino wilo gigi-nono. I mwaka me abiro mom obino dok puro pottiwa ame onwoŋo ojeŋo baŋwa, dok daŋ obino jalo banya luŋ ame okoporo-nono." 
Nehemiah10:32 Mwaka acel acel wan obino miyo acel me adek me cekelwa me konyo tic me woro i ot Obaŋawa. 
Nehemiah10:33 Wan obino miyo ogati ame oketo i nyim Rwot, moko kwon me yalo Rwot nino i nino, leyi me awaŋa alutu nino i nino, mot acil ame omio i ceŋ cabit, kede iyi ecuban me por dwe, kede me ecuban ocele mege, kede mot ocele acil, kede leyi ame oyalo Obaŋa pi kwanyo bal i kom jo Icrael, karacel i gin ame mitte luŋ me tic i ot Obaŋawa." 
Nehemiah10:34 Wan jo luŋ me Icrael, olamdog, Olevi, wan otyeko bolo kwir me neno kite ame obino kelo kede yen i ot Obaŋawa, kun lubo doggola a kwariwa. Obino kela i kare ame wan oyiko, mwaka i mwaka, me awaŋa i wi keno lam a Rwot Obaŋawa, kite ame ocoo kede i buk cik." 
Nehemiah10:35 Wan otyeko miye me tero i ot a Rwot Obaŋawa mwaka i mwaka kit cam luŋ ame ogeo cek i pottiwa, kede nyig yen luŋ ame ogeo nyak i yenwa ame ocamo." 
Nehemiah10:36 Dok daŋ obino tero baŋ olamdog ame tio tic i ot Obaŋawa itino kao awobe ame wan ogeo nywalo, atin twon, atin nyok romo kede me dyel ame ogeo nywalo, kite ame ocoo kede i buk cik." 
Nehemiah10:37 Obino daŋ tero baŋ olamdog i ot Obaŋawa mwaka i mwaka moko ame ogeo rego, kede motwa ocele mege acalo koŋo olok, moo, kede kit yen ducu me aketa iyi icika me kano jami. Dok obino daŋ tero baŋ jo Levi acel me apar me gin oya i pottiwa, pien mannono obedo ticgi me rayo i akina pacciwa." 
Nehemiah10:38 Olamdog ame obedo ikwae Aron ikokome bino bedo tye i kare ame jo Levi gamo acel me apar. Jo Levi bino tero acel me apar ame gin ogamo i ot Obaŋawa, iyi icika ame okano iye." 
Nehemiah10:39 Pien jo Icrael kede jo Levi bino tero mot me moko kwon, koŋo olok, kede moo iyi icika ame okanogi iye, kan ame jami me tic i kabedo acil bedo iye, kan ame olamdog ame tye i tic, ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa kede ower bedo iye. Wiwa mom bino wil kadi acel me gwoko ot Obaŋawa." 
Nehemiah11:1 I kare-nono otel a lwak onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem, jo ocele mere luŋ rik te bolo kwir me kwanyo dano acel i kom jo apar apar me bedo i boma acil me Jerucalem, kun jo aboŋwen odoŋ bedo i boma ocele mege." 
Nehemiah11:2 Lwak te pwoyo jo luŋ ame omiye pirgi kengi me bedo i Jerucalem. 
Nehemiah11:3 Magi en nyiŋ jo adoŋo me Juda ame obedo i Jerucalem. Ento i boma luŋ me Juda, dano acel acel onwoŋo bedo i lobo mere, i bomagi. Jo onwoŋo bedo kuno, onwoŋo tye olamdog, Olevi, kede jo ame onwoŋo tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa, karacel kede ikwae omiro a Culeman." 
Nehemiah11:4 Aco jo me itekere a Juda kede me a Benjamin ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem ene, kun geye kede jo me atekere a Juda: Ataya wot a Ujjia ame obedo wot a Jekaria wot Amaria, wot a Cepatia, wot a Makalalel, ame gin luŋ obedo ikwae a Perej," 
Nehemiah11:5 Maceya wot a Baruk, ame obedo wot a Kolkoje, wot a Kajaya, wot Adaya, wot Joyarib, wot a Jekaria, ame gin luŋ obedo ikwae a Cela." 
Nehemiah11:6 Ikwae a Perej ame obedo i Jerucalem, rik welgi romo mia aŋwen kede pyerabicel wie aboro, kun gin luŋ obedo jo ame tye aber meicel." 
Nehemiah11:7 Eka jo me itekere a Benjamin te bedo Callu wot a Mecullam, ame obedo wot a Joel, wot a Pedaya, wot a Kolaya, wot a Maceya, wot Itiel, wot a Jecaya;" 
Nehemiah11:7 Eka jo me itekere a Benjamin te bedo Callu wot a Mecullam, ame obedo wot a Joel, wot a Pedaya, wot a Kolaya, wot a Maceya, wot Itiel, wot a Jecaya;" 
Nehemiah11:8 kede dok Gabbai kede Callai, ame gin obedo wati a Callu. Gin luŋ rik welgi romo mia aboŋwen kede pyeraryo wie abiro." 
Nehemiah11:9 Ŋat ame loogi onwoŋo obedo Joel wot a Jikri, kede Juda wot Acenua en onwoŋo obedo adwoŋ ame lubo ŋat ame loo boma." 
Nehemiah11:9 Ŋat ame loogi onwoŋo obedo Joel wot a Jikri, kede Juda wot Acenua en onwoŋo obedo adwoŋ ame lubo ŋat ame loo boma." 
Nehemiah11:10 Magi en olamdog ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem: Jedaya wot a Joyarib, kede Jakin," 
Nehemiah11:11 Ceraya wot a Kilkia kede dano ame onwoŋo obedo wot a Mecullam, wot a Jadok, wot a Merayot, wot Akitub ame rik en ŋat ame loo ot Obaŋa," 
Nehemiah11:12 karacel kede omegogi ame rik tio tic i ot Obaŋa, gin luŋ rik welgi romo mia aboro kede pyeraryo wie aryo; Adaya wot a Jerokam, wot a Pelaya, wot Amiji, wot a Jekaria, wot a Pacur, wot a Malkija," 
Nehemiah11:13 karacel kede omegogi ame obedo otel me doggola a kwarigi gin luŋ rik oromo mia aryo kede pyeraŋwen wie aryo; kede dok Amacai wot Ajarel, wot Ajai, wot Mecillemot, wot Immer." 
Nehemiah11:14 Jo me doggola-ni rik tye iye jo ame romo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie aboro, ame gin luŋ obedo jo ame tek meicel i lweny. Adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loogi ducu onwoŋo obedo Jariel wot Aggedolim." 
Nehemiah11:15 Magi en jo Levi ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem: Cemaya wot a Kacub, ame obedo wot Ajirikam, wot a Kacabia, wot a Bunni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Cabbetai kede Jojabad, ame gin onwoŋo obedo odoŋe ame loo jo Levi ame onwoŋo tio oko i dyekal me ot Obaŋa;" 
Nehemiah11:17 Mattania wot a Mika, ame obedo wot a Jabdi, wot Acap, En rik obedo ŋat ame telo wer i kare me miyo pwoc baŋ Obaŋa, Pakbukia onwoŋo obedo ŋat ame lubo Mattania wot a Mika, kede Abda wot a Cammua, wot a Galal ame obedo wot a Jedutun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Jo Levi luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem, i boma acil, rik welgi romo mia aryo kede pyeraboro wie aŋwen." 
Nehemiah11:19 Magi en ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem: Akkub, Talmon kede watigi ame welgi luŋ romo mia acel kede pyerabiro wie aryo." 
Nehemiah11:20 Jo ocele luŋ me Icrael, olamdog odoŋŋege kede jo Levi, rik bedo i boma ocele me Juda, kun ŋat acel acel bedo i lobo mere ame rik opokke," 
Nehemiah11:21 Jo ame rik tio ticcogo apek i ot Obaŋa rik bedo i Jerucalem kan ame olwoŋo ni Opel, kun odoŋe ame loogi bedo Jiba kede Gicpa." 
Nehemiah11:22 Alo jo Levi luŋ ame rik bedo i Jerucalem rik obedo Uji wot a Bani, wot a Kacabia, wot a Mattania, wot a Mika, ame gin luŋ obedo jo me doggola Acap, ame doggola mere rik obedo ower i ot Obaŋa," 
Nehemiah11:23 Pien cik abaka rik onwoŋo tye ame mako ower i ot Obaŋa, kite ame doggola acel acel myero le kede ticgi me telo wer nino i nino." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petakia wot a Mecejabel, ame obedo dano me doggola a Jera, me atekere a Juda, ame en rik awaŋ abaka me Pacia i kop ame mako lwak." 
Nehemiah11:25 Jo apol rik onwoŋo bedo i akina myere, kun obedo ceggi kede pottigi me pur. Jo me atekere a Juda rik bedo i Kiriat-arba, Dibon kede i Jekajel kede i pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Nehemiah11:26 Dok daŋ obedo i boma me Yecua, Molada, Bet-pelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 kede i Kajaracual kede i Beerceba, kede i pacci ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Nehemiah11:28 Obedo daŋ i Jiklag, kede i Mekona, kede i pacci ame tye i ŋetgi," 
Nehemiah11:29 kede i En-rimon, i Jora, Jarmut," 
Nehemiah11:30 Janoa, Adullam, kede i pacci ame tye i ŋetgi, Dok obedo daŋ i Lakic kede i akina potti ame tye i ŋetgi kede i Ajeke karacel kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi. Man cimo ni jo me Juda rik obedo i lobo ame tye i akina Beerceba wot kede naka i luŋ a Kinnom, ame tye i ŋet Jerucalem." 
Nehemiah11:31 Jo me atekere a Benjamin rik te bedo i boma magi: Geba, Mikmac, Aija, Betel, kede pacci ame tye i ŋetgi," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatot, Nob, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Kajor, Rama, Gittaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Kadid, Jeboim, Neballat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod kede Ono, kede i luŋ otet." 
Nehemiah11:36 Jo Levi mogo ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Juda obin omedo i kom jo Benjamin. 
Nehemiah12:1 Magi en olamdog kede jo Levi ame rik odwogo iyi opii i Babulon karacel kede Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel, kede alamdog adwoŋ Yecua. Gin ene: Ceraya, Jeremia, Ejira," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Malluk, Kattuc," 
Nehemiah12:3 Cekania, Rekum, Meremot." 
Nehemiah12:4 Iddo, Ginnetoi, Abija," 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamin, Madia, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Cemaya, Joyarib, Jedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Callu, Amok, Kilkia, kede Jedaya. Magi en ame rik obedo olamdog ame loo owotegi i kare adwoŋi Yecua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Jo Levi ene: Jo me agege-ni obedo jo ame rik loo tic me telo wer me pwoyo Obaŋa i ot Obaŋa, Yecua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Cerebia, Juda, kede Mattania," 
Nehemiah12:9 Eka Bakbukia, Unno kede owotegi te cuŋ tikere kedgi i ot woro Obaŋa." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yecua rik obedo papa a Joyakim, Joyakim te nywalo Eliacib, Eliacib te nywalo Joyada;" 
Nehemiah12:11 Joyada te nywalo Yonacan, eka Yonacan te nywalo Jaddua." 
Nehemiah12:12 I kare ame Joyakim rik onwoŋo tye acalo alamdog adwoŋ, jo magi en ame onwoŋo tye acalo odoŋe ame loo doggolagi i kom olamdog, Meraya, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Ceraya, Kanania, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Jeremia;" 
Nehemiah12:13 Mecullam, ame onwoŋo loo doggola Ejira, Jekokanan, ame onwoŋo loo doggola Amaria;" 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonacan, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Malluki, Yucepu, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Cebania;" 
Nehemiah12:15 Adna, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Karim, Kelkai, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Merayot;" 
Nehemiah12:16 Jekaria, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Iddo, Mecullam, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Ginneton;" 
Nehemiah12:17 Jikri, ame onwoŋo loo doggola Miniamin, Piltao ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Moadia;" 
Nehemiah12:18 Cammua, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Bilga, Yekonacan, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Cemaya;" 
Nehemiah12:19 Mattenai, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Joyarib, Uji, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Jedaya;" 
Nehemiah12:20 Kallai, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Callai Eber, ame onwoŋo loo doggola Amok;" 
Nehemiah12:21 Kacabia ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Kilkia, kede Netanel, ame onwoŋo loo doggola a Jedaya." 
Nehemiah12:22 Jo me doggola a jo Levi kede me doggola olamdog adoŋo rik obedo coyo piny i kare ame olamdog adoŋo magi onwoŋo tye i kom: Eliacib, Joyada, Jokanan kede Jaddua. Coyo nyiŋ man obin ogik oko i kare me loc a Dario, abaka me Pacia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Odoŋe ame loo doggola a jo Levi rik ocoo nyiŋgi piny i buk adwoŋ me Tekwaro, kede naka i kare a Jokanan, ame obedo akwar Eliacib," 
Nehemiah12:24 Odoŋe ame onwoŋo loo jo Levi ene: Kacabia, Cerebia, Yecua, kede Binnui, kede Kadmiel kede owotegi, gin onwoŋo obedo jo ame pako Obaŋa, kun oleo alea kite ame abaka Daudi, dano Obaŋa onwoŋo oyiko kede." 
Nehemiah12:25 Aco Mattania, Bakbukia, Obadia, Mecullam, Talmon, kede Akkub onwoŋo obedo ogwok dogcel, kun ogwoko udi me kano jami ame onwoŋo tye i doggola me ot Obaŋa," 
Nehemiah12:26 Man obedo timere i kare a Joyakim wot a Yecua, akwar Yekojadak, kede i kare a Nekemia, ame obedo gabuna, kede dok i kare Ejira, alamdgo ame obedo apwonycik Obaŋa." 
Nehemiah12:27 I kare me kwero apama cel me Jerucalem, okelo Olevi luŋ i kan ame gin onwoŋo obedo iye, gin luŋ okelogi i Jerucalem, me obin okwer kare man i yomcuny kede pwoc adwoŋ meicel baŋ Obaŋa, kun owero wer, ogoo naŋa, ajaa kede naŋa opuk." 
Nehemiah12:28 Jo Levi ame onwoŋo obedo ower luŋ te cokere i kabedo luŋ bino i Jerucalem, kun oya i kabedogi luŋ ame onwoŋo oguro Jerucalem, naka i pacci me Netopa," 
Nehemiah12:29 kede i Bet-gilgal, Geba, kede i Ajimavet." 
Nehemiah12:30 Olamdog kede jo Levi koŋ ogeo lonyere pirgi kengi eka ote lonyo lwak, kede dogcel luŋ, kede apama cel." 
Nehemiah12:31 Rik ate coko rwode luŋ me Juda i wi cel malo, ate keto jo dul aryo me wot mano boma kun omio pwoc baŋ Obaŋa, Dul me agege ociro i wi cel malo, kun odok tutuŋ dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me wi odur;" 
Nehemiah12:32 kun Kocaya lubo ŋegi karacel kede nucu oloc me Juda. 
Nehemiah12:33 Olamdog magi ame onwoŋo tye akuto apel, te ciro lubogi: Ajaria, Ejira, Mecullam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juda, Benjamin, Cemaya kede Jeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 karacel kede awobe mogo ame obedo awobe olamdog, te daŋ lubogi kun okuto apel; i akinagi onwoŋo tye iye Jekaria wot a Yonacan, ame obedo wot a Cemaya, wot a Mattania, wot a Mikaya, kede Jakkur me doggola Acap;" 
Nehemiah12:36 wati mere en Jekaria te ciro lube, Cemaya, Ajarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netanel, Juda, kede Kanani. Gin luŋ onwoŋo omako kite jami mogo me wer ame rik abaka Daudi, dano Obaŋa, goo, Ejira ame apwony cik Obaŋa en onwoŋo otelo nyim dul man." 
Nehemiah12:37 I dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Pii, gin owoto otiko nyimgi atira, kun oyito malo owoto i paco a Daudi, ote kato paco a Daudi oko, ote dok lokere i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Pii, ame tye tuŋ to." 
Nehemiah12:38 Dul me aryo te ciro dok tutuŋ cam; an ate lubogi kede nucu a lwak, kun ociro i wi cel malo, Wan owoto okato kan kan ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ ame olwoŋo ni Ka tedo Ogati, tuno kede kan ame olwoŋo ni dogcel Alac." 
Nehemiah12:39 Ote beo i ŋet dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Epraim, tuno kede naka i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel Acon, kede en ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Rec, kede i ot okato malo iguŋ ame olwoŋo ni Kananel, kede me Mia, ote tuno naka i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel me Rommi; ote wot giko wotwa i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni dogcel Okur piny." 
Nehemiah12:40 Mannono en kite ame lwak ame onwoŋo opokere dul aryo kun omio pwocgi baŋ Obaŋa otuno te cuŋ kede i ot Obaŋa. Aco an onwoŋo atye karacel kede nucu odoŋe a lwak, kede" 
Nehemiah12:41 olamdog magi, kun gin omako apelgi i cingi: Eliakim, Maceya, Miniamin, Mikaya, Elioenai, Jekaria, kede Kanania;" 
Nehemiah12:42 kede Maceya, Cemaya, Eleajar, Uji, Yekokanan, Malkija, Elam, kede Ejer. Ower te bedo wer, kun Jejrakia en ame tye acalo atelgi." 
Nehemiah12:43 I nino-nono lwak te yalo Obaŋa kede mot adwoŋ meicel, kun olelo daŋ atek meicel, pien Obaŋa en omio cunygi obedo yom. Mon karacel kede itino daŋ cunygi obedo ayom meicel i nino-nono, Yomcuny ame onwoŋo jo tye kede i Jerucalem obedo winyere kan abor meicel." 
Nehemiah12:44 I nino-nono rik ote yero jo ame loo icika ame ogwoko iye jami ame jo mio me konyo tic i ot Obaŋa, acalo cam ogeo cek me wi mwaka, kede acel me apar me jami luŋ, ame ocoko iye dul ame cik mito ni myero mi me konyo olamdog kede jo Levi, kun lubo wel potti ame tye i boma atino. Jo Juda rik te bedo i twon yomcuny adwoŋ meicel i kom olamdog kede jo Levi ame obedo tic." 
Nehemiah12:45 Gin obedo tiyo tic ame Obaŋa omiogi, kede tic me lonyo lwak bedo acil. Ower kede ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa daŋ obedo tiyo ticgi kite ame rik Daudi kede wode Culeman ociko," 
Nehemiah12:46 Pien i kare ame Daudi gin kede Acap, rik onwoŋo tye adwoŋ ame loo wer; i kare-naca onwoŋo ower wero wer me pako Obaŋa kede me pwoyo Obaŋa." 
Nehemiah12:47 Aco i kare a Jerubabel kede i kare a Nekemia, jo Icrael luŋ onwoŋo mio motgi nino ducu me konyo jo ame wero i ot Obaŋa kede me konyo jo ame gwoko doggola ot Obaŋa. Lwak daŋ obedo miyo motgi mogo pi jo Levi, jo Levi daŋ te bedo miyo en ame rik omito pi ikwae Aron, ame gin obedo olamdog." 
Nehemiah13:1 I kare ame onwoŋo otye ka kwano cik a Muca malo i nyim lwak, gin ocop i dul ame kobo ni jo Ammon onyo jo Moab mom bino donyo i cokere Obaŋa;" 
Nehemiah13:2 pien gin rik mom ojolo jo Icrael i yo i kwon kede pii, i kare ame gin obino kun oya i Miciri, ento gin olunyo paŋo Balaam me bino cenogi, Cite Obaŋa rik te lunyo loko cennere naca doko gum." 
Nehemiah13:3 Kare ame jo owinyo okwano cik man, gin te cako pokere i jo luŋ ame obedo ikwae orok ame onwoŋo tye i akinagi." 
Nehemiah13:4 I kare ame kop man mom ru otimere, Eliacib alamdog, ame rik onwoŋo oketo me loyo icika me ot Obaŋa, omako dyere gin kede Tobia." 
Nehemiah13:5 En rik te yiko twon icika moro alac pi Tobia, icika ame rik koŋ onwoŋo ogwoko iye mot me moko kwon, odok luban, karacel kede jami ame otio kedgi i ot Obaŋa, kede acel me apar me kal, koŋo olok kede moo ame rik omio baŋ jo Levi, ower, kede baŋ ogwok doggola ot Obaŋa kite ame tye kede i cik, karacel kede gin ame omio baŋ olamdog." 
Nehemiah13:6 I kare ame gin man timere, onwoŋo an Nekemia mom atye i Jerucalem, pien i mwaka me pyeradek wie aryo me loc Atakerec, abaka me Babulon, an rik onwoŋo awoto oko baŋ abaka, A doŋ kare koŋ dok okato anonok, an rik ate kwayo i baŋ abaka," 
Nehemiah13:7 ate bino i Jerucalem, I kare-nono ate roto bal ame Eliacib onwoŋo otimo i kom Tobia, pi yikke icika acel me bedo mere i dyekal ame tye i ot Obaŋa," 
Nehemiah13:8 Akemo omaka atek meicel, omio ate bolo jami a Tobia luŋ ame onwoŋo tye iyi icika-naca," 
Nehemiah13:9 An ate miyo cik ni myero lony icika-naca bed acil; eka ote cako dwoko iye jami luŋ ame otio kedgi i ot Obaŋa, karacel kede mot me moko kwon kede me odok luban." 
Nehemiah13:10 Dok aroto daŋ ni jo Levi wi jo doŋ owil oko i komgi, mom dok omiogi dul ame onwoŋo ociko ni lwak myero mi baŋgi. Mannono te miyo jo Levi kede ower, ame onwoŋo tio tic, te ya wot oko, kun ŋat acel acel dok ceŋ i poto mere." 
Nehemiah13:11 An ate da atek i wi odoŋe ame onwoŋo loo lwak, pi miyo weko ot Obaŋa ata, Ate cako coko jo Levi luŋ kede ower dwokogi ceŋ i dog ticgi." 
Nehemiah13:12 Jo me Juda luŋ te cako kelo acel me apar me kalgi, kede koŋo olokgi, kede moo iyi icika me kano jami," 
Nehemiah13:13 Dok ate keto jo i man i tic me gwoko jami ame okano i ot kano jami: Celemia, ame onwoŋo obedo alamdog, Jadok aran, kede Pedaya ame onwoŋo obedo Alevi. Dok ate keto daŋ Kanan wot a Jakur, ame obedo wot a Matania, me bedo dano ame konyogi, pien onwoŋo rik jo luŋ ŋeo aber ni jo ame eketo-nono obedo jo ame ogen. Gin rik te bedo tiyo tic me poko jami baŋ omegogi." 
Nehemiah13:14 Po pira, Ama Obaŋana, i kom tic man ame atio, kur ijwa tic abeco luŋ ame doŋ atyeko tiyo me yiko ot a Rwot Obaŋana, kede me yiko tic me wore." 
Nehemiah13:15 I kare-nono daŋ ate bedo neno ni jo apol me Juda tye ka biyo koŋo olok i ceŋ me cabit, kun jo ocele tye ka weko kal, koŋo olok, nyig olok, nyig oduro kede jami ocele apapat ame gin otweo i ŋe kana ote tero naka i Jerucalem, kun man daŋ otimo i ceŋ me cabitgi. Rik ate kwenyorogi daŋ i nino ame gin onwoŋo tye ka cato cam." 
Nehemiah13:16 Jo Turo mogo daŋ ame rik bedo i boma, obedo kela i Jerucalem rec kede kit jami ocele apapat me acata, ote catogi i ceŋ cabit baŋ jo Juda, kede i Jerucalem," 
Nehemiah13:17 Mannono te miyo akemo maka atek meicel i kom odoŋe me Juda, ate penyogi ni, “Man tim arac aŋo ame itye ka timo wunu-nie, ame itye ka pyedo wunu kede ceŋ me cabit?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Kwariwa mom rik koŋ otimere kit man? Mom man en omio Obaŋawa kelo tim man areco-ni i komwa kede i kom boma man? Nen, wun pwod dok itye wunu ka medo akemo Obaŋa i kom jo Icrael pi bedo pyedo ceŋ me cabit.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 An rik ate miyo cik ni i cabit ducu, i kare ame piny doŋ ceggi yuto, myero ceg dogcel luŋ, kun mom dok oyabo kadi acel, tuno ka nino me cabit doŋ okato. Eka ate keto jona mogo me kuro dogcel, me gin nen ni mom oyeo ginnoro otero i boma i nino me cabit." 
Nehemiah13:20 Man omio tyen acel onyo aryo ocat wil kede jo ame cato jami ame kitegi papat obuto oko i ŋe boma me Jerucalem. 
Nehemiah13:21 Cite akwenyorogi, kun apenyogi ni, “Piŋo kara ibuto wunu i ŋet apama me cel? Nen ba, ka ce imedde timo wunu kittono, mom abino wekowu kadi acel.” Cakere i kare-nono, gin mom dok ote dwogo ceŋ i cen me cabit." 
Nehemiah13:22 Eka ate ciko jo Levi ni myero gin olonyere kengi, ote wot kuro dogcel luŋ, me ogwok nino me cabit bed acil. Po pira, Ama Obaŋa a man daŋ, itim ber iweka koŋ abed kwo pi twon mar meri adwoŋ a mom lokere." 
Nehemiah13:23 I kare-nono daŋ rik ate neno Ojudaya mogo tye ame onyomo anyira me Acidod, Ammon kede me Moab, odoko mongi," 
Nehemiah13:24 Mannono omio nucu me itinogi onwoŋo doŋ kobo leb jo Acidod, kun mom dok otwero kobo leb jo Juda, cite okobo ka leb rok ocele." 
Nehemiah13:25 Man daŋ omio awoto i komgi agwa meicel, ate cako cenogi kun opwodo jo mogo i akinagi, dok daŋ opuputo yer wi jo mogo; amiogi okwoŋo i nyiŋ Obaŋa, kun akobo ni, “Wun mom ibino miyo wunu anyirawu baŋ awobegi, dok daŋ mom ibino nyommi wunu awobewu anyiragi, akadi pi wun ikomwu." 
Nehemiah13:26 Mom Culeman rik obalo pi bedo nyomo kodi monnono? I kom rok apapat me wi podo, onwoŋo mom tye abaka moro ame cal kede, dok daŋ rik Obaŋa mere mare. Obaŋa omio en obedo abaka ame loo jo Icrael; kadi bed amannono, anyira orok ame en obedo nyomo omio twon jo ame rom mannono opoto oko i bal." 
Nehemiah13:27 Wun imito wunu ni wan owinywu, otim tim arac wok-ki, ote turo cik a Rwot Obaŋawa, kun onyomo wunu anyira arok ocele me bedo monwa?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Dano moro acel i akina ikwae a Yekoyadi, wot Eliacib, alamdog adwoŋ, onwoŋo onyomo nyaka a Canbalat ame en dano me Koron, an rik ate ryemo dako mere-nono oko i baŋe." 
Nehemiah13:29 Po pirgi, Ama Obaŋana, pien gin obalo nyiŋgi oko me bedo olamdog, dok daŋ obalo cikere ame onwoŋo tye i akina yin kede olamdog, kede jo Levi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Mannono en kite ame alonyo kede jo Icrael i kom ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo obedo me orok, ate miyo tic olamdog kede jo Levi moko, kun ŋat acel acel tio ticcere." 
Nehemiah13:31 Dok ate yiko kite me kelo yen me waŋo mot me yalo Obaŋa, i kare ame myero kel iye, kede kite me kelo cam ogeo cek me wi mwaka. Tim ber ipo pi timo gin aber pira, Ama Obaŋana." 
Esther1:1 Man obedo gin ame otimere i kare abaka Akacuwera, ame rik obedo abaka ame oloo loccere cakere India tuno kede naka Eciopia, kun loo dul lobo apapat ame romo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie abiro." 
Esther1:2 I kare-naca i kare ame abaka Akacuwera onwoŋo tye obedo i wi kom me loccere i boma adwoŋ me Cuca. 
Esther1:3 I mwaka me adekkere me loccere, en ocako tedo arama pi rwode mere kede odoŋe luŋ ame loo tic apapat, kede odoŋe ame telo wi mony i Pacia kede i Media, odoŋe ame oworo kede oloc adoŋo ame tye i dul lobo apapat i te loccere," 
Esther1:4 En obedo nyuto lonyo kede kwogo ame tye i loccere, dit kede woro ame lwak mie, pi kare alac ame romo nino mia acel kede pyeraboro twal." 
Esther1:5 Kare ame kare-nono luŋ doŋ otum, abaka ocako tedo arama pi jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i boma adwoŋ me Cuca, otedo arama pi jo atino kede jo adoŋo. Arama-nono ori pi nino abiro, obedo i dyekal me galo waŋ ame tye i ŋet ot abaka." 
Esther1:6 Dyekallere rik onwoŋo odeo i cuka atar kede en obedo bululu bululu ame oŋabo malo kede tol ame owio i boŋo camanini, kede tol ocele ame obedo amaramar, ame orwako iyi atem me ryal, ame oŋabogi i kom pagi ame otio i kiddi apwot me wel; gi-bedo a lwak onwoŋo otio i jabu kede ryal. Dok kan ame ocicibogi iye onwoŋo okwogo meicel, kun omwono kiddi atitino kede en atar, kede gin ocele ame ryeny aryenya, karacel kede kiddi mogo me wel." 
Esther1:7 Gi-amata luŋ jo obedo mato kede ikopo me jabu ame kitegi papat; aco koŋo olok obedo oonyo abup meicel ame nyuto lonyo abaka. 
Esther1:8 Koŋo olok jo obedo mato kun olubo cik, mom tye ŋattoro ame onwoŋo odio adia me mato koŋo; pien abaka onwoŋo ociko odoŋe luŋ ame loo tic me paco mere me timo gin ame ŋat acel acel omito." 
Esther1:9 Vaciti ame obedo agoŋ abaka onwoŋo daŋ rik otedo arama pi mon i paco abaka Akacuwera. 
Esther1:10 I nino me abiro me arama-nono, i kare ame abaka onwoŋo tye amatte ame cunye yom, en olwoŋo jo ame oroo oko abiro, ame gin rik obedo omiro mere ame tio baŋe, Mekuman, Bijita, Karibona, Bigeta, Abagita, Jetar, kede Karikac." 
Esther1:11 En ocikogi ni myero owot okel agoŋŋere Vaciti i nyime, kun oruko tokkere me kwogo, me ebin enyutte baŋ jo ame rokgi papat, me rwode mere nen berrere, pien en onwoŋo obedo dako ame neno mwonya meicel." 
Esther1:12 Cite agoŋŋere Vaciti te kwero winyo kop abaka oko ame omiro mere: ame oroo oko okelo baŋe. Mannono te miyo cuny abaka waŋ atek, akemo te ciro oko." 
Esther1:13 Abaka te cako kop oryeko ame ŋeo kop i kom kare apapat, pien mannono onwoŋo obedo gin ame abaka timo kare luŋ; kare luŋ en penyo kop baŋ jo luŋ ame ŋeo cik kede kite me ŋolo kop." 
Esther1:14 Jo ame onwoŋo ceggi kede onwoŋo obedo Karicena, Cetar, Adimata, Tarcic, Merec, Maricena, kede Memukan, magi gin oloc abiro me Pacia kede Media, ame tye kede twer me bino i nyim abaka i kare moro keken, gin obedo jo ame tye i rwom amalo ame ceggi abaka, ame abaka romo winyo kopgi." 
Esther1:15 En te penyogi ni, “Kite ame cik tye kede, ŋo ame myero tim i kom agoŋ Vaciti, pien en okwero winyo kop abaka Akacuwera ame jo ame oroo oko okobbe?”" 
Esther1:16 Memukan te kobo kop i nyim abaka, kun oloc apapat daŋ tye ni, “Agonni Vaciti mom otimo bal baŋ abaka keken, cite naka baŋ oloc luŋ me dul lobo apapat, karacel kede jo luŋ i te loc abaka Akacuwera." 
Esther1:17 Kodi tim agoŋ abaka-ni bino winyere baŋ mon luŋ, te miyogi gin daŋ cako cayo coggi, gin bino kobo ni, ‘Abaka Akacuwera onwoŋo ociko ni ter agoŋŋere Vaciti i nyime, cite en gire te kwero wot oko.’" 
Esther1:18 Cakere tin-ni, mon luŋ me Pacia kede Media ame owinyo gin ame dako abaka otimo bino bedo rabo koppere baŋ oloc abaka, ame te miyo acae kede akemo bedo adwoŋ meicel." 
Esther1:19 Doŋ ka ce abaka neno tamma ni ber, myero en cwa cik ame ya i baŋe, ame myero coo i akina cik me Pacia kede Media ame mom dok oromo loko; cik ame kobo ni agoŋŋere Vaciti myero kur doŋ nen i nyime atwal. Abaka myero doŋ mi dittere baŋ dako ocele ame ber kate." 
Esther1:20 Ka ce cik ame abaka oketo-nono obino rabo pire roma lobo ame en loo luŋ, kite ame dittere tye kede-ni, bi no miyo mon luŋ woro coggi, jo ame rwomgi malo kede jo ame rwomgi piny.”" 
Esther1:21 Tam man te yomoro cuny abaka kede oloc luŋ, abaka te timo kite ame Manukan otamo kede;" 
Esther1:22 en te cwayo waraga i dul lobo mere luŋ ame en loo, kun ocoo i nukuta ame jo me dul lobo moro-ni ŋeo, dok ocoo baŋ rok acel acel i lebgi, Ocoo kittono me wek dano acel acel obed rwot me ode, kun kobo leb ame rokkere kobo." 
Esther2:1 Icennere i kare ame akemo abaka Akacuwera okwe, en ocako po pi Vaciti kede gin ame en otimo, karacel kede cik ame omoko i kome." 
Esther2:2 Otic abaka ame tio baŋe te kobbe ni, “Myero yeny nyannoro a mom ru oŋeye ico pi abaka." 
Esther2:3 Abaka myero yer odoŋe mogo me ketgi i dul lobo apapat ame tye i te loccere, me gin cok kodi anyira-nono luŋ i ot a mon ame tye i boma adwoŋ me Cuca, me gin bed i te loc a Egai, lo ame oroo oko ame loo mon abaka; myero migi moo a ŋwece kur me wiregi." 
Esther2:4 Doŋ nyannoro i akinagi ame bino yomoro cuny abaka myero dok agoŋ abaka me awora kaka Vaciti.” Kop man te yomoro cuny abaka, omio en te timo kittono." 
Esther2:5 I kare-nono onwoŋo tye Ajudaya moro i Cuca, dano-nono nyiŋe onwoŋo Mordekai; en obedo wot a Jair, wot a Cimei, wot a Kic, dano me Benjamin," 
Esther2:6 ame rik onwoŋo otero i Jerucalem acalo opii, kun otere karacel kede jo ocele ame i akinagi rik tye iye Yekonia abaka me Juda, ame gin jo ame rik abaka Nebukadnejar otero oko i opii." 
Esther2:7 En Mor dekai onwoŋo opito Adaca, ame en Ecita, ame obedo nyako omin pappere, pien pappere kede tottere onwoŋo doŋ mom. Nyako-ni onwoŋo ber dok mwonya meicel; i kare ame tottere kede pappere oto. Mordekai ogame acalo nyare ikome." 
Esther2:8 Doŋ i kare ame abaka omio cik, ote rabo pire i lobo luŋ, i kare ame otye ka coko anyira luŋ i telo Cuca, boma adwoŋ, kan ame Egai gwoko iye mon, Ecita daŋ rik ote tero i paco abaka, ote daŋ keto kan ame Egai gwoko iye mon." 
Esther2:9 Ecita te yomoro cunye meicel, eka te wayo tammere oko i kome; mannono te miyo en ru pokki Ecita moo mere me wir kede cammere, te daŋ yero aŋeca abiro i paco aba ka me konye, eka te kete i kabedo aber meicel ame ogwoko iye mon abaka, karacel kede aŋeca abiro-ca me konye." 
Esther2:10 Ecita mom onyuto rokkere, akadi wati mere daŋ, pien Mordekai onwoŋo ocike ni myero kur kobi." 
Esther2:11 Doŋ kare ducu Mordekai woto i ŋe cel me paco a mon me eŋe kite ame Ecita tye kede, karacel kede gin ame tye ka timere i kome." 
Esther2:12 Nyako acel acel rik woto baŋ abaka Akacuwera ka kare mere oromo, i ŋe bedo dwete apar wie aryo kun owinyo cik ame onwoŋo oketo pirgi gin mon. Man rik obedo kare me yiko bergi bedo amwonya meicel, kun owirre kede moo murra dwete abicel, eka dok pi dwete abicel ocele ote bedo wirre kede kit moo ocele apapat ame mon wire kede." 
Esther2:13 I kare me wot anyira-ni baŋ abaka, rik omio nyako acel acel tero gin ame cunye mito wot kede i paco abaka, kun ya kede i ka gwoko mon." 
Esther2:14 Nyako acel acel woto otyeno te dwogo odiko kun woto doŋ i ka gwoko mon namba aryo, ame tye i te loc a Cacigaj, ame obedo dano abaka ame oroo oko ame gwoko aŋeca abaka; nyako ame owoto oko baŋ abaka mom dok dok kuno tuno ka en oyomoro cuny abaka, eka ote doŋ lwoŋe alwoŋa i nyiŋe." 
Esther2:15 A doŋ kare me wot Ecita baŋ abaka oromo, Ecita ame obedo nyaka Abikail, omin papa a Mordekai, ame rik ogame acalo nyare, en mom openyo ni mie ginnoro. En openyo ka Egai, agwok mon abaka ame oroo oko, te lubo tammere. Ecita owao tam a jo luŋ ame onene, omio gin luŋ opwoc." 
Esther2:16 I kare ame otero Ecita baŋ abaka Akacuwera i paco mere, i dwe me apar, ame mannono obedo dwe ame olweoŋo ni Tebet, i mwaka me abiro me loc abaka Akacuwera," 
Esther2:17 abaka omaro Ecita atek meicel ame kato anyira ducu ame otero i nyime. Ecita te bedo kede gum i nyim abaka, dok abaka te pwoye ame kato anyira ocele luŋ, Abaka te kwanyo tok kwogo keto i wi Ecita me bedo agoŋ abaka me awora akaka Vaciti." 
Esther2:18 Abaka te tedo twon arama adwoŋ meicel pi oloccere kede odoŋe wi ticcere, ame arama mere onwoŋo otedo me woro Ecita. Dok te miyo weo baŋ jo luŋ ame tye i dul lobo luŋ ame en loo, kun poko daŋ mot apapat kite ame lonyo mere tye." 
Esther2:19 Kare ame dok ocoko anyira a mom ru oŋeye kede co, kar acel tyen me aryo, Mordekai onwoŋo tye obedo i doggola me cel abaka." 
Esther2:20 I kare-nono onwoŋo Ecita mom ru onyuto kopporo i kom wati mere onyo rokkere, kun lubo cik a Mordekai ame rik ociko kede; en obedo winye kite ame rik winye kede i kare ame pite." 
Esther2:21 I nino moro Mordekai onwoŋo tye i dok tic abaka. I karenono akemo omako jo aryo, Bigitan kede Terec, ame gin jo ame onwoŋo oroo oko; jo man rik onwoŋo obedo ogwok doggola me ot abaka, gin te bedo yenyo yo me neko abaka Akacuwera oko." 
Esther2:22 Mordekai rik te giporo imungi-nono oko, eka te tito oko baŋ Ecita agoŋ abaka, Ecita te kobo koppono oko baŋ cware, kun kobo nyiŋ Mordekai." 
Esther2:23 I kare ame obedo yenyo kop man ote nwoŋo ni obedo kop ateni, rik ote neko jo aryo ame oroo-nono oko, kun odeogi adea. Kop man ote coyo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito gin ame otimere, ocoo i nyim abaka." 
Esther3:1 I kare ame kop magi doŋ otyeko timere, abaka Akacuwera omedo rwom Aman wot a Amedata, dano me Agag, omie dit me loyo oloc ocele luŋ ame nwoŋo tye i te loccere." 
Esther3:2 Cakere i karenono otic abaka onwoŋo ryebere piny wore kite ame abaka ociko kede. Ento Mordekai onwoŋo mom ryebere piny me wore. 
Esther3:3 Mannono omio otic ocele ame tio i te loc abaka openyo Mordekai ni, “Piŋo yin itye ka turo cik abaka?”" 
Esther3:4 Gin obedo penye kittono nino i nino, cite Mordekai mom owinyo kopgi. Man omio gin otito kop man baŋ Aman, me neno ka ce Mordekai twero loyo kop, pien Mordekai onwoŋo okobbigi ni en ebedo Ajudaya." 
Esther3:5 Kare ame Aman oniaŋ ni Mordekai kara onwoŋo mom ryebere piny wore, akemo omako atek meicel." 
Esther3:6 Aman te tamo ni pe myero enek Mordekai kene; kite acalo en doŋ otyeko niaŋ ni Mordekai obedo Ajudaya, en te tamo ni myero enwoŋ yo moro me neko Ojudaya luŋ ame tye i te loc abaka Akacuwera." 
Esther3:7 I dwe me agege, ame obedo dwe ame olwoŋo ni Nican, i mwaka me apar wie aryo me loc abaka Akacuwera, rik ote cako bolo kwir ame olwoŋo ni Pur i nyim Aman; otimo amannono me yenyo nino mene kede dwe mene ame ber me cobo yik Aman, kwir te poto i kom dwe me apar wie aryo, ame obedo dwe ame olwoŋo ni Adar." 
Esther3:8 Aman te kobbi abaka Akacuwera ni, “Tye rokkoro ame olal oromo dul lobo apapat ame yin iloo kun otye i akina jo, Rokkono cikgi pat meicel ame mom rwatte kede me a rokkoro kadi acel, dok daŋ mom ogwoko cikki, yin abaka, Man omio mom tye konnyoro kadi acel ame mio yin iwekogi obedo kwo." 
Esther3:9 Doŋ ka ce yin abaka iye, koŋo iketo cik me nek rokkono oko luŋ, an abino culo lim me ryal ame pekkere romo tan mia adek kede pyerabiro wie abic baŋ jo ame loo tic abaka, me gin ket i ot kano lim abaka.”" 
Esther3:10 Abaka te kwanyo atem i ciŋe te miyo Aman, wot a Amedata, dano me Agag, ame obedo akwor Ojudaya." 
Esther3:11 Abaka te kobo ni, “Lim luŋ obino miyi, rokkono daŋ atyeko miyi, itwero timogi kite ame yin imito.”" 
Esther3:12 Rik ote lwoŋo orani abaka luŋ i nino dwe apar wie adek me dwe me agege, gin te coyo cik kite ame Aman ocikogi kede luŋ, ocoo baŋ odoŋe ame loo dul lo bo apapat kede baŋ oloc ame loo rok apapat, kun ocoo i dul lobo acel acel, dok otio kede nukuta ame jo me dul lobo moro-ni ŋeo, dok ocoo baŋ rok acel acel i lebgi. Waraga-nono rik ocoo i nyiŋ abaka ote mwono doge kun odio atem abaka i kom odok ame omwono kede." 
Esther3:13 Rik ote miyo oter-waraga riŋo i waraga i dul lobo apapat ame tye i te loc abaka Akacuwera ni myero nek Ojudaya tyek oko luŋ, nek jo atino kede jo adoŋo, mon kede itino i kor, myero nekgi luŋ i nino acel, i nino dwe apar wie adek me dwe me apar wie aryo, ame olwoŋo ni Adar, dok myero yak jamigi oko." 
Esther3:14 Kit waraga-ni myero pok i dul lobo acel acel me wek koppere lal rom jo, me jo yikere pi nino ame ociko." 
Esther3:15 Oterwaraga te ru wot oyotoyot tero waraga pi lubo cik abaka, cikkono daŋ onwoŋo omio oŋeye i boma adit me Cuca, Abaka karacel kede Aman te bedo piny mato koŋo, cite jo ame tye i boma me Cuca obedo kede twon wur adwoŋ meicel." 
Esther4:1 I kare ame Mordekai oŋeo gin ame otimere, oyeco boŋo mere oko te ruko boŋo cola, te daŋ jukere kede buru, te wot i dye boma, kun akoko atek meicel i dwon aloŋo." 
Esther4:2 En owoto naka i dogcel abaka; cik onwoŋo mom ye dano ame oruko boŋo cola me donyo i cel abaka. 
Esther4:3 I kare-nono, i dul lobo acel acel ame cik abaka onwoŋo doŋ owinyere iye oko, omio Ojudaya luŋ obedo kede twon kumo adwoŋ meicel. Gin okanyo kec, okok, okumo, jo apol i akinagi oruko boŋo cola kun daŋ ojukere kede buru." 
Esther4:4 I kare ame aŋeca kede amiro a Ecita oroo otito kop man baŋ Ecita, cuny Ecita ocwer atek meicel. En te cwayo boŋŋi me aruka baŋ Mordekai, kun kobo ni myero gony boŋo cola oko i kome, cite Mordekai mom oye gamo boŋŋi ame Ecita ocwao." 
Esther4:5 Ecita te lwoŋo Atak, ame en dano acel i akina omiro abaka ame oroo, ame rik onwoŋo omio baŋe me bedo dano ame en ooro; en te cwaye baŋ Mordekai me wot niaŋ ŋo ame otimere dok ŋo omio otimere kittono." 
Esther4:6 Atak te wot baŋ Mordekai i dye bar alac me boma adwoŋ, i nyim dogcel abaka." 
Esther4:7 Mordekai te titte ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo otimere i kome kede wel lim ame Aman ocikere me culo iyi ot kano lim abaka pi neko Ojudaya. 
Esther4:8 Mordekai omie daŋ waraga ame ocoo iye cikkono ame opoko i Cuca pi neko Ojudaya, ni en wot nyut baŋ Ecita, te daŋ medo niaŋe, dok myero cike me wot bako doge baŋ abaka, me abaka tim rokkere kica." 
Esther4:9 Atak te wot kobbi Ecita kop luŋ ame Mordekai otitte. 
Esther4:10 Ecita te kop gin kede Atak, te dok cwaye baŋ Mordekai kun kobbe ni," 
Esther4:11 “Otic abaka luŋ karacel kede rok luŋ ame tye i dul lobo apapat i te loc abaka, gin luŋ oŋeo ni ka ce ŋattoro owoto i nyim abaka, kun donyo i dyekal ame tye i yie kun mom olwoŋo, dano-nono kadi bed dako onyo ico myero nek oko; mannono obedo cik acel ame okwako kit jo luŋ, tuno ka abaka otiŋo abiro me loccere malo ni en myero kwo. Cite an mom ru olwoŋa me wot i nyim abaka pi nino pyeradek twal.”" 
Esther4:12 Rik ote wot kobbi Mordekai kop ame Ecita okobo 
Esther4:13 Mordekai te cwayogi dok baŋ Ecita, kun kobo ni, “Kur itam ni pien itye i paco abaka mio yin ibino bwot ame kato Ojudaya ocele mege." 
Esther4:14 Pien ka ce yin mom ikobo kopporo i kare acalo man, larre Ojudaya bino ya i kan ocele, cite yin karacel kede jo me ot a pappi luŋ ibino to wunu oko. Ŋa a ŋeo ka ce yin mom idoko agoŋ abaka pi miyo kony i kare acalo man?”" 
Esther4:15 Ecita te kobbigi me dwokki Mordekai kop ni," 
Esther4:16 “Wot icok Ojudaya ducu ame tye i Cuca karacel, me gin ocak kanyo kec pira, kur ocam ginnoro dok daŋ kur omat ginnoro pi nino adek, dyeceŋ kede dyewor. An karacel kede aŋecana luŋ daŋ obino kanyo kec kite ame wun itye wunu ka kanyo kede. Icennere an abino wot baŋ abaka kadi bed cik okwero, ka ce ato, kopporo gire mom, wek ato.”" 
Esther4:17 Mordekai te wot timo ginnoro luŋ ame Ecita ociko ni myero etim. 
Esther5:1 I nino me adek, Ecita oruko rukkere me kwogo te wot cuŋ i dyekal i yie ame tye i paco abaka, ame otikere i ot adwoŋ me cokere abaka, Abaka onwoŋo tye obedo i wi kommere me loc i dyekal me paco mere, kun opimere i dogcel me paco." 
Esther5:2 Kare ame abaka oneno Ecita kun ocuŋ i dye ot, cunye obedo ayom i kome, te tiŋo abiro loccere me jabu ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋe tutuŋ baŋ Ecita. Ecita te wot mulo wi abiro loccere-nono." 
Esther5:3 Abaka te penye ni, “Kop aŋo ba, agoŋŋa me awora? Ikwayo ŋo? Obino gire miyi gin ame ikwayo, akadi nucu me locca.”" 
Esther5:4 Ecita ogamo kop abaka ni, “Adwoŋ, ka ce itwero ye, koŋo yin kede Aman ibino wunu iyi cammoro aduno ame ayiko pirwu tin.”" 
Esther5:5 Abaka te kobo ni, “Ru kelo Aman kan, me otim gin ame Ecita amito-ni.” Mannono te miyo abaka kede Aman wot i cam ame Ecita oyiko pirgi." 
Esther5:6 I kare ame gin onwoŋo tye amato koŋo olok, abaka okobbi Ecita ni, “Gin aŋo imito ni atim piri? Obino gire miyi. Ikwayo ŋo? Kadi bed nucu locca, bino gire cobere.”" 
Esther5:7 Cite Ecita te kobo ni, “Gin amito ame akwayi iye eŋe:" 
Esther5:8 Ka ce ayomoro cunyi, adwoŋ, abaka, dok ka ce itwero miya gin amito, te daŋ cobo gin akwao, akwao ni yin abaka kede Aman diki ibin icam wunu cam ame abino yiko pirwu, eka diki-nono ate timo gin ame abaka okobo.”" 
Esther5:9 I nino-nono Aman te dok ame cunye yom atek meicel. Cite i kare ame Aman oneno Mordekai i dogcel abaka, mom oya malo, mom daŋ onyuto woro baŋe kadi acel, akemo omake meicel i kom Mordekai." 
Esther5:10 Kadi bed amannono, en odio cunye te wot paco, en te cwayo kwena, ote lwoŋo owote mere kede dako mere Jerec." 
Esther5:11 Aman te cako boko kop i kom kite ame lonyo mere dwoŋ kede, kun kwano anaka wel awobe mere, rwom apapat ame abaka obedo miye me wore, kede kite ame omie kede twero ame kato oloc wadgi luŋ kede omiro abaka daŋ ducu." 
Esther5:12 Dok te medde i boko koppere ni, “Kadi naka agoŋ me awora Ecita, en daŋ mom ye ŋattoro woto gin abaka me wot camo cam, ame eyiko, kono ka an keken. Diki doki en olwoŋa me wot wan abaka." 
Esther5:13 Kadi bed amannono, magi-nono luŋ mom ru aneno konnyoro iye kadi acel, ka ce pwod amedde neno Ajudaya moro a nyiŋe Mordekai-nu tye bedo i dogcel abaka.”" 
Esther5:14 Dako mere Jerec kede owote mere luŋ te kobo ni, “Mi yik yat me deyo jo ame borrere romo futi pyerabiro wie abic, me diki odiko ikobbi abaka ni myero de Mordekai iye; me iwot ame cunyi yom i cam ame oyiko pirwu wun abaka.” Tam man oyomoro cuny Aman, ento miyo yiko yat me deyo dano." 
Esther6:1 I dyeworrono abaka mom onino, en te ciko ni myero kel buke me po gigi mogo abeco ame jo mogo obedo timo, ote kelo buk me Tekwaro bino kwano i nyim abaka." 
Esther6:2 Rik ote cop kannoro ame ocoo iye kite ame rik Mordekai otuco kede kop i kom jo aryo ame oroo, Bigitana kede Terec, ame rik obedo ogwok doggola abaka, ame rik oyenyo yo me neko abaka Akacuwera oko." 
Esther6:3 Abaka te penyo ni, “Woro aŋo onyo dit aŋo ame obin omio Mordekai pi gin ame en otimo-ni?” Omiro abaka te gamo ni, “Mom gire rik omie ginnoro.”" 
Esther6:4 Abaka te penyo ni, “Tye dano moro i ot?” I caa-nono onwoŋo Aman pwod adonyo adonya i dyekal i oko mere ame tye i paco abaka, me bino kobbi abaka pi deyo Mordekai i yat deyo jo ame doŋ etyeko yiko pire." 
Esther6:5 Mannono te miyo omiro abaka kobbe ni, “Aman tye ocuŋ kuno.” Abaka te kobbigi ni, “Kobbe wunu ekato.”" 
Esther6:6 Aman te bino baŋ abaka, abaka te kobbe ni, “Ŋo ame myero otim baŋ dano ame abaka oyikere me woro?” Aman te kobo i cunye kene kene ni, “Man ka ŋa ame abaka amito woro ame kata oko-ni?”" 
Esther6:7 Aman te kobbi abaka ni, “Dano ame abaka mito woro," 
Esther6:8 myero kel ruk me kwogo ame abaka i kome ruko, kede aguragura ame abaka riŋo kede, dok rwakke daŋ tok kwogo." 
Esther6:9 Ruk me kwogo kede aguragura myero mi i ciŋ aloc abaka me awora a kato oloc ocele luŋ, me en ruki, dano ame abaka mito woro te wot kede i dye boma kannalac, kun dano-nono nwoŋo obedo i wi aguragura, en te bedo nyute baŋ lwak kun kobo ni, ‘Man en gin ame obino timo i kom dano ame abaka mito keto kwogo i kome.’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Abaka te kobbi Aman ni, “Ru cunyo wot, ter boŋo me kwogo kede aguragura kite ame ikobo kede, ite wot timo kittono i kom Mordekai ame obedo Ajudaya ame bedo i dogcel abaka. Ti jami luŋ ame ikobo, kur wek moro iye kadi acel.”" 
Esther6:11 Aman te tero ruk me kwogo kede aguragura, te wot timo kittono i kom Mordekai ame obedo Ajudaya ame bedo i dogcel abaka. En orukki Mordekai rukkere te miye riŋo kede aguragura i dye boma kannalac, kun en rabo kop i kome ni, “Man en gin ame obino timo i kom ŋat ame abaka mito keto kwogo i kome.”" 
Esther6:12 Mordekai te dok i dogcel abaka. Aman te ru wot oko i paco mere, kun akumo ame owumo wie oko." 
Esther6:13 Aman te titti dako mere Jerec kede owote mere luŋ ginnoro luŋ ame otimere i kome. Oryeko mere ame mie tam kede dako mere te kobo ni, “Ka ce Mordekai ame aman doŋ rwommere malo kato megi-ni obedo Ajudaya, mom doŋ itwero pyem kadi acel, yin doŋ ibino dok adoka piny.”" 
Esther6:14 I kare ame gin onwoŋo pwod tye akop, akwena abaka te ru bino oko, ame kobo ni amito ni eru tero Aman oyotoyot iyi arama ame Ecita oyiko." 
Esther7:1 I nino-nono abaka kede Aman te wot iyi arama ame Ecita oyiko. 
Esther7:2 I nino me aryo mere, i kare ame gin onwoŋo otye omato koŋo, abaka dok te penyo Ecita ni, “Agoŋŋa Ecita, ŋo ame imito ni atim piri? Obino miyi. Ikwayo ŋo? Akadi nucu me locca, bino gire cobbere.”" 
Esther7:3 Ecita te gamo ni, “Ka ce ayomoro cuny abaka, dok ka ce abaka ye, myero tim ber kur neka, dok myero kur nek daŋ rokka." 
Esther7:4 Pien wan doŋ ocatowa oko, an kede jona, ni myero nekwa oko, myero tyekwa ducu ni weŋ. Kono onwoŋo ocatowa acata me bedo opii, co kede mon, kono mom kopporo, pien can ame onwoŋo oneno, onwoŋo mom aromo poro kede rwenyo a lim abaka twal.”" 
Esther7:5 Abaka Akacuwera te kobbi Ecita ni, “Mannono ŋannono, en tye kwene, en dano ame timo kittono?”" 
Esther7:6 Ecita te gamo ni, “Akworwa ame dagowa-nono obedo lo-ni aracci, Aman.” Lworo te mako Aman arac meicel i nyim abaka kede agoŋŋere." 
Esther7:7 Abaka te ya i dog camo arama kede akemo adwoŋ meicel, te wot oko i dyekal ame tye i ŋet ot abaka, cite Aman odoŋ cen me kwayo Ecita ni myero time kica kur neke, pien en onwoŋo oneno ni abaka doŋ oyikere me timo gin arac i kome." 
Esther7:8 Kare ame abaka odwogo, eka te donyo i ot kan ame onwoŋo gin tye acamo arama iye, en onwoŋo Aman orumo aruma i ŋet twon kommoro adwoŋ kan ame Ecita obedo iye. Abaka te kobo ni, “En mito timo tim me anywar i kom agoŋŋa me awora kun aŋa aneno, kun daŋ timo i oda-gu?” Kare ame abaka okobo koppere-nono, ote ru tweyo waŋ Aman oko oyotoyot." 
Esther7:9 Amiro abaka acel ame oroo, ame nyiŋe Karbona, ame onwoŋo gwoko abaka, i caa-nono te kobo ni, “Medo i kom mannono, yat adea ame Aman onwoŋo oyiko pi Mordekai ame koppere en a rik omio abaka obwot-ti tye i paco Aman, yat ame borrere tye futi pyerabiro wie abic twal.”" 
Esther7:10 Abaka te kobo ni, “Ŋabe i kom yattere-nono.” Mannono omio ote ŋabo Aman i kom yat deyo jo ame en rik oyiko me deyo Mordekai, Akemo abaka te doŋ kwe." 
Esther8:1 I nino-nono abaka te miyo ot Aman baŋ agoŋŋere Ecita. Mordekai te doŋ bino i nyim abaka, pien Ecita onwoŋo otitte wat ame tye i akinagi kede Mordekai." 
Esther8:2 Abaka te kwanyo atem ame onwoŋo okwanyo i ciŋ Aman te miyo baŋ Mordekai, Ecita te miyo Mordekai dit me loyo ot Aman." 
Esther8:3 Ecita dok te medde kop kede abaka; en oryebere piny i nyim abaka, te cako bako doge kun kok i pig waŋe, ni myero juk yik Aman dano me Agag oko, me neko Ojudaya." 
Esther8:4 Abaka te tiŋo abiro me loccere me jabu tutuŋ baŋ Ecita. 
Esther8:5 Ecita te doŋ ya malo cuŋ acuŋa i nyim abaka. Ecita te kobo ni, “Ka ce abaka ye, dok ka ayomoro cuny abaka, kono ico waraga ijuko waraga Aman dano me Agag, wot Amedata oko, pien en onwoŋo oyiko kop me neko Ojudaya luŋ ame tye i te locci, yin abaka." 
Esther8:6 Kara atwero diyo cuny niŋo me neno can ame abino i kom rokka kede i kom jo me doggolana?” 
Esther8:7 Abaka te kobbi Ecita gin kede Mordekai ame obedo Ajudaya ni, “Nen doŋ atyeko miyo ot Aman oko baŋ Ecita, dok daŋ atyeko doŋ deyo Aman oko kun oŋabo i yat ame deyo jo, pien onwoŋo mito neko Ojudaya." 
Esther8:8 Doŋ kop ame dok i kom Ojudaya, wun itwero wunu coyo waraga kite ame imito wunu, kun icoo wunu kede nyiŋa, ite diyo wunu atem abaka i kom odok ame omwono kede, pien cik ame ocoo i nyiŋ abaka dok odio atem abaka i kom odok ame omwono kede mom otwero loko.”" 
Esther8:9 Rik ote lwoŋo orani abaka i caanono, i dwe me adek, ame obedo dwe ame olwoŋo ni Civan, i nino dwe pyeraryo wie adek, rik ote coyo cik a mako Ojudaya kun ocoo kop ducu ame Mordekai ociko ni coo. Ocoo baŋ odoŋe ame loo lwak, oloc me dul lobo apapat, karacel kede baŋ oloc ame loo i dul lobo apapat cakere India tuno kede Eciopia, kun ocoo i dul lobo apapat ame romo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie abiro, kun ocoo baŋ dul lobo acel acel i nukuta ame gin ŋeo, dok i lebgi ikome." 
Esther8:10 Waraga man rik ocoo i nyiŋ abaka Akacuwera ote mwono atem abaka i kom odok ame omwono kede. Oter-waraga ame riŋo aguragura en otero waraga, kun oriŋo aguragura adwir meicel, ame otio kedgi i tic abaka, ame onywalo i ot pito aguragura me loc." 
Esther8:11 Waraga man omio twer baŋ Ojudaya ame tye i boma acel acel me cokere karacel pi gwoko kwogi i baŋ okworgi, dok daŋ otwero nekogi, otwero tyeko onyo jwero monnyoro keken, onyo dul lobo moro keken ame obino me lweny i komgi, kede itinogi kede mongi, kun daŋ omito yako jamigi." 
Esther8:12 I nino acel keken, nino dwe apar wie adek, me dwe me apar wie aryo, ame obedo dwe ame olwoŋo ni Adar, i dul lobo apapat ame tye i te loc abaka Akacuwera." 
Esther8:13 Waraga me cikkono ame ocoo-nono myero pok i dullobo acel acel acalo cik, me wek rab koppere rom jo duc, me wek Ojudaya bed ame otere oko me culo kwor i kom okworgi ame bino mito nekogi." 
Esther8:14 Okwena te yito i wi aguraguragi adwir wok-ca, ame rik otio kedgi ka i tic abaka, ote ru riŋo oko oyotoyot me cobo cik abaka. Cikkono daŋ rik ote poko i boma adit i Cuca." 
Esther8:15 Mordekai te ya oko i nyim abaka kun oruko ruk me loc obedo bululu bululu kede en atar, kun oruko daŋ tok kwogo me jabu i wie, kede jor ame okwoo i boŋo camanini aber meicel, kede en obedo amaramar, kun jo luŋ i boma adwoŋ tye awoo i yomcuny adwoŋ meicel." 
Esther8:16 Ojudaya te bedo ilelo, yomcuny, pwoc kede woro." 
Esther8:17 I dullobo acel acel kede i boma acel acel ka cik abaka kede koppere otuno iye, Ojudaya bedo i yomcuny kede lelo adwoŋ okato kare, otedo arama, ote daŋ bedo i weo. Man omio jo apol i akina rok ocele omiye kengi ni gin daŋ obedo Ojudaya, pien lworo Ojudaya onwoŋo ocirogi oko." 
Esther9:1 Doŋ i dwe me apar wie aryo, ame obedo dwe ame olwoŋo ni Adar, i nino dwe apar wie adek me dwe-nono, i kare ame kop abaka kede cikkere doŋ oceggi keto i tic, ame en nino acellono en obedo nino ame okwor Ojudaya rik tye kede gen me cako loyo Ojudaya, ento ame dok obin olokere odoko nino ame Ojudaya myero cak loyo iye okworgi." 
Esther9:2 Ojudaya obedo cokere karacel i bomagi i dullobo acel acel ame onwoŋo tye i te loc abaka Akacuwera me neko jo ame onwoŋo oyikere me timogi rac. Ŋattoro mom onwoŋo romo cuŋ i nyimgi, pien lworo onwoŋo omako rok apapat ducu i komgi." 
Esther9:3 Oloc luŋ me dul lobo apapat kede odoŋe a lwak kede oloc ame loo dul lobo apapat kede odoŋe ocele ame loo tic abaka, gin daŋ obedo konyo Ojudaya, pien i ot abaka rik onwoŋo olworo Mordekai atek meicel," 
Esther9:4 dok nyiŋe te rwo atek romo dul lobo luŋ ame tye i te loc Akacuwera; twer ame Mordekai tye kede te medde ameda i bedo atek meicel. 
Esther9:5 Mannono te miyo Ojudaya neko okworgi luŋ aluŋa, kun onekogi kede pala romo; obedo ŋolo ŋutgi calo dyaŋ, kun otimogi kite ame yigi omito." 
Esther9:6 I boma adwoŋ me Cuca. Ojudaya oneko dok otyeko jo ame romo mia abic twal," 
Esther9:7 dok oneko daŋ Pareandata, Dalpon, kede Acapata," 
Esther9:8 Porata, Adalia, kede Aridata," 
Esther9:9 Parmacata, Aricai kede Yaicata," 
Esther9:10 ame gin luŋ oromo apar, dok gin luŋ obedo awobe Aman wot Amedata, ame obedo akwor Ojudaya. Cite gin mom oyako gigi moro." 
Esther9:11 Wel jo ame oneko i nino-nono. Ikome i boma adwoŋ me Cuca rik onyuto baŋ abaka. 
Esther9:12 Abaka te kobbi agoŋŋere me awora Ecita ni, “I boma adwoŋ me Cuca Ojudaya oneko co ame romo mia abic, dok daŋ oneko awobe Aman apar oko. Kara doŋ ŋo ame ŋit ca otimo i dul lobo ocele mere ame tye i te locca! Kara gin aŋo doki ame myero atim piri? obino giri miyi. Ŋo ame dok ikwayo? Obino gire cobo piri.”" 
Esther9:13 Ecita te gamo ni, “Ka ce adwoŋŋa abaka, ye ni ber, myero yeyi Ojudaya ame tye i Cuca medde timo kite ame otimo kede tin-ni. Awobe Aman apar-ca myero ŋab komgi i kom yat me deyo jo.”" 
Esther9:14 Abaka daŋ te ciko ni myero man timere kittono; cik man rik ote miyo i boma me Cuca, omio ote ŋabo kom awobe Aman apar i kom yat me deyo jo." 
Esther9:15 Ojudaya ame tye i boma me Cuca dok te medo cokere karacel i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe me Adar, ote dok medo neko co ocele ame romo mia adek i boma me Cuca. Cite mom oye yako gigi mogo." 
Esther9:16 Ojudaya ame onwoŋo tye i boma ocele mege daŋ te cokere karacel me gwoko kwogi i dul lobo apapat. Gin rik ote neko okworgi oko a co ame romo tutumia pyerabiro wie abic; mannono te miyogi dok nwoŋo weo i kom okworgi ame onwoŋo dagogi. Cite gin mom oyako gigi moro. 
Esther9:17 Man gin ame gin otimo i nino dwe apar wie adek me dwe me Adar, gin rik te weo i nino dwe apar wie aŋwen, ote miyo nino-nono bedo nino me kwero ecuban kede me yomcuny." 
Esther9:18 Cite Ojudaya ame onwoŋo tye i boma me Cuca ocokere karacel i nino dwe apar wie adek kede i nino dwe apar wie anwen, omio gin doŋ te weo i nino dwe apar wie abic, kun omio nino-nono bedo ni no me kwero ecuban kede yomcuny." 
Esther9:19 Mannono omio Ojudaya luŋ ame tye i akina pacci, ame tye i boma apapat, gwoko nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me Adar acalo nino me bedo i yomcuny, nino me kwero ecuban kede nino me weo, dok obedo nino ame gin ocwao iye kit mot apapat ame cunygi okwanyo i akinagi kengi kengi." 
Esther9:20 Mordekai te coyo jami magi luŋ piny, te cwayo waraga baŋ Ojudaya luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i dul lobo apapat ame tye i te loc abaka Akacuwera, jo ame tye kannabor kede en ame tye kan aceggi," 
Esther9:21 kun cikogi ni myero gin ogwok nino dwe apar wie aŋwen kede nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me Adar mwaka i mwaka," 
Esther9:22 acalo nino ame Ojudaya onwoŋo iye weo iciŋ okworgi, dok acalo dwe ame obin oloko cangi odoko yomcuny, kumo olokere odoko weo. Ocikogi ni myero gin olok nino-nono obed nino me kwero ecuban kede nino me yomcuny, dok obed nino me cwayo mot apapat ame cunygi okwanyo luŋ i akinagi kengi kengi kede mot baŋ ocan." 
Esther9:23 Ojudaya te ye timo kite ame onwoŋo ocako kede, kun oye lubo kite ame Mordekai ocoyigi kede." 
Esther9:24 Pien Aman dano me Agag, wot Amedata, ame obedo akwor Ojudaya luŋ onwoŋo oyenyo yo me jwero Ojudaya oko, dok daŋ onwoŋo doŋ otyeko bolo kwir ame olwoŋo ni Pur me jejebo kede jwero Ojudaya odoco." 
Esther9:25 Cite i kare ame Ecati owoto i nyim abaka, abaka omio ocoo waraga ame kobo ni tim araccono i kom Ojudaya myero lokere dok i wie gire, dok daŋ ni en kede awobe mere myero ŋabgi i kom yat me deyo jo." 
Esther9:26 Mannono omio gin olwoŋo nino man ni Purim, kun oya i kom kwir ame olwoŋo ni Pur. Doŋ pi kop luŋ ame rik ocoo i waraga, kede pi can ame gin oneno pi kop man, kede gin ame obin otimere i komgi," 
Esther9:27 Ojudaya oye kop man kun omoko ni gin ikomgi kede ikwaegi kede jo luŋ ame bino ye notte kedgi, gin obino gwoko nino aryo-ni kite ame ocoo kede, kun ogwoko i kare ame rik ociko-nono ikome mwaka i mwaka aboŋo keŋ." 
Esther9:28 Nino aryo-ni gin obino poyo kun ogwoko naka i kare a lwagi jo me kare luŋ, obino gwoko i doggola ducu i dul lobo apapat kede i boma luŋ, dok Ojudaya myero kur wek kwero nino magi me Purim, kwero nino magi myero kur gik naka i kare ikwaegi luŋ." 
Esther9:29 Ecita agoŋ abaka me awora, nyaka Abikail, kede Mordekai ame obedo Ajudaya, te coyo waraga, kun omoko waraga me aryo i kom Purim." 
Esther9:30 Waraga-nono rik ocwao baŋ Ojudaya luŋ, ocoo i dul lobo apapat ame romo mia acel kede pyeraryo wie abiro ame tye i te loc abaka Akacuwera, kun ocoo i kop me kuc kede ateni," 
Esther9:31 ni mannono nino me Purim myero gwok i kare ame ociko i kome, kite ame Mordekai ame obedo Ajudaya kede Ecita agoŋ me awora ociko kede Ojudaya, dok kite ame gin onwoŋo ociko kede pirgi kengi kede pi ikwaegi ame mako kop i kom kanyo kecgi kede kumogi." 
Esther9:32 Cik ame Ecita agoŋ abaka me awora ociko omoko cik man me Purim ote coyo me agwoka i buk. 
Esther10:1 Abaka Akacuwera oketo tic me eroni i lobo kede i dog nam. 
Esther10:2 Doŋ ginnoro luŋ ame Akacuwera otio pi teko mere kede twerrere, kede kit kwogo luŋ ame en omio baŋ Mordekai, i rwom luŋ ame obedo medo baŋe, gin luŋ tye ocoo i buk me Tekwaro ame tito kop i kom obakki me Media kede Pacia." 
Esther10:3 Pien Mordekai ame obedo Ajudaya en onwoŋo lubo abaka Akacuwera, dok daŋ en onwoŋo twon dano adwoŋ meicel i akina Ojudaya, kun daŋ jo apol meicel i akina jo mere mare meicel, pien obedo yenyo yo me miyo jo mere bedo aber, kun daŋ kobo kop me kuc i akina jo mere luŋ." 
Job1:1 Rik tye lo moro i lobo me Uji ame nyiŋe Yubu; en rik obedo dano ame mom i balloro, dok cunye atira. En rik onwoŋo lworo Obaŋa, dok kwero tim luŋ areco." 
Job1:2 En onwoŋo tye awobe abiro kede anyira adek. 
Job1:3 Rommi mere onwoŋo tye tutumia abiro, kane tutumia adek, twoni pur tutumia acel, megi kane mia abic, kun daŋ tye omiro mere apipim. En onwoŋo twon lo moro adwoŋ meicel ame kato jo luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye tutuŋ kide i kare-naca." 
Job1:4 A wobe mere rik onwoŋo tedo arama i udigi kun oleo alea, ŋat acel acel onwoŋo tye kede nino ame en tedo iye arama te lwoŋo omego mere luŋ iye, kun olwoŋo amegogi adek ca iye." 
Job1:5 Kare i kare ka nino me camo aramagi doŋ otum oko. Yubu cwao kwena lwoŋogi, eka te tiyo tic me lonyogi. En ya malo ibai, te yalo Obaŋa i mot awaŋa kun timo man pi ŋat acel acel i akinagi, pien Yubu rik onwoŋo tamo ni onyo ca awobe mere obalo balloro i kom Obaŋa i cunygi, Yubu rik bedo timo man kare ducu." 
Job1:6 Doŋ i nino moro acel omalaika Obaŋa obino i nyim Rwot, kun Catan daŋ tye i akinagi." 
Job1:7 Rwot te penyo Catan ni, “Yin kono iya i kwene?” Catan te gamo ni, “An aya rimo piny i wi lobo, kun awiwira gira iye kuno, adok tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi.”" 
Job1:8 Rwot dok te kobbi Catan ni, “Tye ginnoro ame itamo i kom amirona Yubu? Mom tye dano moro ame cal kede i wi lobo. En obedo dano ame mom i balloro dok cunye atira. Lworo Obaŋa, dok daŋ kwero tim luŋ areco.”" 
Job1:9 Catan te gamo koppere ni, “Yubu lworo Obaŋa nononono ateni?" 
Job1:10 Mom yin imio cel oguro kome oko tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi karacel kede jo luŋ me ode kede jami luŋ ame en tye kede? Yin ibedo miyo gum omake i kom jami luŋ ame en tio, limmere akwo-gu nya medde ameda i wi lobo." 
Job1:11 Koŋ irye ciŋi aman igud jami luŋ ame en tye kede-nono, me inen kite ame ico bino ceni kede!”" 
Job1:12 Rwot te kobbi Catan ni, “Aco doŋ koŋ, an doŋ atyeko jalo jami luŋ ame en tye kede i te twerri cite kur igude en ikome.” Catan doŋ te ya oko i nyim Rwot." 
Job1:13 I nino moro acel onwoŋo awobe mere kede anyira mere tye acem i ot, awobi adwoŋ, kun daŋ otye omato koŋo olok kuno" 
Job1:14 Akwena moro te bino baŋ Yubu, te kobbe ni, “Twonini onwoŋo woki tye apur kun kane daŋ tye acem i ŋetgi kuno;" 
Job1:15 jo moro me Caba te bino mako omironi neko oko i pala lweny ote kolo twoni kede kane tero oko. An kena en ame abwot me bino titti koppere.” 
Job1:16 Ame en onwoŋo pwod akop, dano ocele dok te pello te kobbi Yubu ni, “Obaŋa ocwao lutkot ocelo rommi kede omironi oneko oko luŋ, an kena en ame abwot me bino titti koppere.”" 
Job1:17 Ame en pwod akop ŋat ocele dok te pelo, te kobo ni, “Jo mogo me Kaldaya obino i dul adek ote mako omironi neko oko luŋ i pala lweny, ote yako inaga luŋ tero gigi oko, an kena en abwot me bino titti koppere.”" 
Job1:18 Ame en pwod tye akop, dano ocele dok te pelo, te kobo ni, “Awobeni kede anyirani woki tye acem i ot omingi adwoŋ, kun daŋ omato koŋo olok;" 
Job1:19 twon yamo moro adwoŋ meicel te bukoro i kom ot luŋ, kun oya i tuŋ tim, ot te rette oko i kom itinoni, aman gin luŋ oto oko, an kena en ame abwot me bino titti koppere.”" 
Job1:20 Yubu oya malo te yeco boŋŋi mere i kome oko, te lyelo daŋ yer wie oko, orette piny te woro Obaŋa," 
Job1:21 kun kobo ni, “Rik adonyo nono iyi totta, abino daŋ dok i lobo nono. Rwot en omia dok en a daŋ okwanyo. Nyiŋ Rwot myero gire pak.”" 
Job1:22 I kom gin otimere-ni luŋ, Yubu naka mom obalo kadi acel, akadi ŋolli obaŋa kop ni otimo ginoro arac." 
Job2:1 Doŋ nino moro ocele omalaika Obaŋa obino me bino cuŋ i nyim Rwot, kun Catan daŋ tye i akinagi me bino cuŋ i nyim Rwot." 
Job2:2 Rwot te penyo Catan ni, “Yin kono iya i kwene?” Catan te gamo ni, “An aya rimo piny i wi lobo, kun awiwira gira iye kuno, adok tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi.”" 
Job2:3 Rwot dok te kobbi Catan ni, “Tye ginnoro ame itamo i kom amirona Yubu? Mom tye dano moro ame cal kede i wi lobo. En obedo dano ame mom i balloro, dok cunye atira; en lworo Obaŋa dok daŋ kwero tim luŋ areco. Cunye gire pwod ler i koma kadi bed imia awune aboŋo ginnoro ame en obalo.”" 
Job2:4 Catan te kobbi Rwot ni, “Del pi del! Dano twero jalo jami mere luŋ ame etye kede pi laro kwo mere." 
Job2:5 Koŋ irye ciŋi igud cogo mere kede riŋo kome me inen kite ame ico bino cenni kede.” 
Job2:6 Rwot te kobbi Catan ni, “Aco koŋ doŋ, an atyeko jale i te twerri, cite kur igud kwo mere.”" 
Job2:7 Catan doŋ te ya oko i nyim Rwot te wot cako ticcere me wuno Yubu i lwak burrogo areco meicel cakere i cuny tyene piny tuno naka i wie malo. 
Job2:8 Yubu te kwanyo abaltak me gwenyo kome, te wot bedo i buru." 
Job2:9 Dako mere te kobbe ni, “Yin pwod ilido iye-ni me bedo i cuny aler i kom Obaŋa? Yet Obaŋa ame doŋ ito.”" 
Job2:10 Cite en te gamo dog dako mere ni, “Koppi kom rom aroma i kop ame ya i dog mon amiŋ. Wan myero obed gamo ka gin aber keken i ciŋ Obaŋa mom ogamo gin arac daŋ?” I can man luŋ Yubu naka mom otimo balloro i kop a ya i doge." 
Job2:11 Kare ame owote a Yubu adek owinyo kop pi can man ame opoto i kom Yubu-ni, ŋat acel acel i akinagi obino baŋ Yubu, kun man ya i kan ame ebedo iye. Jonnono nyiŋgi ene: Erifaji dano me Teman, Bildad, dano me Cua, kede Jopar dano me Namat. Gin oyiko wotgi baŋ Yubu karacel, me wot nyuto cwercunygi baŋe kede kweyo cunye." 
Job2:12 Kare ame gin obolo waŋgi i kome kun pwod otye kannabor, mom oŋee, gin luŋ ote mwoco koko oko i dwon aloŋo, ote daŋ yeyeco boŋŋigi oko i komgi; ote juko kwoyo onyo i wigi malo." 
Job2:13 Gin te bedo baŋe kuno pi nino abiro, dyewor kede dyeceŋ, kun ŋattoro i akinagi mom oŋamo doge me kobbe kopporo pien gin onwoŋo oneno ni en tye kede twon rem adwoŋ meicel." 
Job3:1 Icennere Yubu en ame te geyo ŋamo doge kun ceno kede nino ame rik onywale iye. 
Job3:2 Yubu obedo koko kun kobo ni," 
Job3:3 “Nino ame rik onywala iye kono orwenyo oko, do ber, karacel kede dyewor ame rik oyaca i ye,”" 
Job3:4 Nino-naca kono odoko acol icuc! Wi Obaŋa ame tye malo kono owil oko iye, kono lero moro mom omenyo kadi acel!" 
Job3:5 Mutu kede colpiny kono omao nino-nono oko, pol kono doŋ obedo iye colpiny ocido icuc kono omio obedo iyiliyili." 
Job3:6 Dyewor oyaca iye kono doŋ ocido odoco, ame mom doŋ oromo bedo i yomcunnyoro iye, i akina ninne luŋ a tye i mwaka, me ŋol doŋ nyiŋe oko i akina nino ame tye i dwete luŋ." 
Job3:7 Dyeworrono kono mom onywalo iye atinnoro, meredo me yomcuny kur winyere iye." 
Job3:8 Wegi ceŋ kono oceno nino-nono oko, jo ame odiro i lwoŋo twon twol a ŋeo paŋere meicel." 
Job3:9 Acer luŋ ame ryeny i dyeworrono myero odok acol oko, myero dyeworrono kur lero kwe kono mom doŋ oneno ru-piny atwal." 
Job3:10 Pien rik mom ocego dog ot nywal a totta oko, mom daŋ oŋena neno ayela ame tye i kwo." 
Job3:11 “Piŋo kara rik mom ato oko kare ame onywala? Piŋo kara rik mom adonyo iyi totta keken ate to oko? 
Job3:12 Piŋo kara rik omio tyen ojola? Piŋo tuno aryo twal oye ni adotgi? 
Job3:13 Kono gire nyo atye abuto piny mot, kono nyo abuto gira piny, kono nyo awe gira oko," 
Job3:14 kono nyo atye gira karacel obakki kede omi-tam adoŋodoŋo me lobo ame rik ogegero udi mogo adoŋodoŋo pirgi," 
Job3:15 Kono atye gira karacel i rwode ame rik tye i jabu, ame ryal rik oyido i udigi ayida." 
Job3:16 Kono nyo oyika gira oko calo atin abwoggi calo itino ame mom oneno waŋ ceŋ," 
Job3:17 Ayela otim tim areco gik oko kuno, jo ame ol tye gigi oweo kuno," 
Job3:18 Obuc bedo gigi doŋ mot karacel kuno, kun mom dok owinyo dwon odoŋe a loogi i tic." 
Job3:19 Jo adoŋo kede atino luŋ tye kuno, opii i kuno nwoŋo doŋ ogonyo oko i te loc adwoŋŋere." 
Job3:20 “Piŋo Obaŋa medde menyo ŋat a tye i can; dok piŋo en mio ŋat a tye i ton cuny adwoŋ medde bedo kwo? 
Job3:21 Kodi jonnono kuro to, cite to mom bino baŋgi, gin obedo yenyo atek meicel akato lonyo ame okano." 
Job3:22 Dok ka ocop i kom lyel olelo meicel, kun cunygi yom okato kare." 
Job3:23 Piŋo Obaŋa medde menyo ŋat ame yo doŋ orwennye oko, dano ame doŋ otyeko guro oko i cel." 
Job3:24 Pien cucurana doŋ calo kwon ame acamo, aomo cunya doŋ bino tere i tere calo pii aony." 
Job3:25 Pien gin ame alworo en a dok bino i koma, gin ame mia twon lworo adwoŋ en ame poto i koma," 
Job3:26 Cunya mom gire pye mot, akadi liŋ mot, mom awe kadi acel, ayela bino teretere.”" 
Job4:1 Erifaji dano me Teman te kobbi Yubu ni," 
Job4:2 “Ka ce adio cunya me kop kedi, cunyi bino waŋ? Ento ŋa ame twero liŋ nakanaka ame mom okobo kopporo?" 
Job4:3 Nen ba, Yubu, yin yam ipwonyo jo apol meicel, imio ciŋ jo agoro onwoŋo teko." 
Job4:4 Koppi yam omio ŋat a kome a myel omedde cuŋ, dok imio jo ame coŋgi onwoŋo goro odoko atek odoco." 
Job4:5 Cite aman otuno i waŋeni mom doŋ iromo diyo cunyi, ogudi, omio cunyi doŋ oŋabere aŋaba." 
Job4:6 Lworo ame itye kede i kom Obaŋa, mom romo rwenyo par i cunyi? Ler a cunyi mom romo miyi ibedo kede gen?" 
Job4:7 “Itwero po pi dano moro a mom i bal ame oto, ka ce ibolo waŋi i kare okato aŋec?” Onyo i kom jo moro a kitegi atira ame omio waŋgi orwenyo oko i akina jo turgi?" 
Job4:8 Aco kite ame an aŋeo kede jo ame puro bal, te coyo koti me ayela nwoŋo daŋ can a rom, acalo gin ocek pi ticcere-nono." 
Job4:9 Yamo me weo Obaŋa en ame nekogi, awura me akemo mere en a tyekogi," 
Job4:10 Mor eŋatu, dwon eŋatu ager meicel, lak itino eŋatu otutura oko." 
Job4:11 Twon eŋatu atek to oko ka leyi emak me amwoda mere pe, itino a min eŋatu ke keta oko atata." 
Job4:12 “Kop man okwila akwila, yita ogiporo i kare ame amuŋo amuŋa." 
Job4:13 Obino kun tye i akina tam, i lek me dyewor, i caa ame nino mit kede wok-ki." 
Job4:14 Twon lworo moro adwoŋ omaka, koma te ero myel oko, cogona luŋ te cako daŋ yeŋere oko." 
Job4:15 Tipo moro te wito beo i waŋa, yer koma te ya luŋ irii," 
Job4:16 Icennere te cuŋ doŋ mot, cite callere te loya oko. Onwoŋo kono atye aneno cal ginnoro, kun piny oliŋ iti, icennere ate winyo dwon ame kobo ni," 
Job4:17 ‘Dano a to oko-ni twero bedo ame kite atira i nyim Obaŋa i yore aŋo? Dano twero bedo cil i nyim Ŋat Okete?’ 
Job4:18 Aco kono mom geno omiro mere ikome, omalaika mere-gu en nwoŋo bal i komgi." 
Job4:19 Kara doŋ jo ame komgi obedo lobo ata-ni kono, ame acakki tergi tye i kwoyo, ame jwero yot kato jwero nyenye oko-ni?" 
Job4:20 Cakere odiko tuno naka otyeno nwoŋo doŋ otyekogi oko, orwenyo atwal ame ŋattoro mom dok paro pirgi." 
Job4:21 Dano gire calo kema ka oputo teke mere, to oko aboŋo ryeko moro.”" 
Job5:1 “Koŋ doŋ ilwoŋ ba, tye ŋattoro ame twero gamo dogi? Kara tin ilokere baŋ ŋa ba, i akina jo acil?" 
Job5:2 Ateteni, akemo mio amiŋo to oko, nyeko neko ŋat a mom i ŋeccoro." 
Job5:3 Waŋa otyeko neno amiŋo ame ocuŋ atek, cite aceno kan a en bedo iye oyot meicel." 
Job5:4 Yo moro me bwot mom tye pi itino mere, itino mere oneko oko i dogcel, ame ŋattoro a konyogi mom tye." 
Job5:5 Cem ame en okao jo a kec neko camo ata, gin okwanyo oko akadi tye i akina okuto, jo ame mitgi dwon okato kare laro lonyo mere." 
Job5:6 Pien can gire mom ya i piny iyi apua, ayela daŋ mom tu i lobo;" 
Job5:7 ento dano gire onywalo pi ayela kite ame mac kir kede malo. 
Job5:8 “Aco kono an gira, kono ayenyo kony i baŋ Rwot, kono atero pekona baŋ Obaŋa," 
Job5:9 ame tio gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo ame tato tere tek, gigi mogo me awura ame pol ata." 
Job5:10 En mio kot cwe i lobo, cwalo pii i potti." 
Job5:11 Jo a piny en keto i kabedo i malo, tiŋo jo akumo bedo i kabedo aber." 
Job5:12 Tamoryeko me goba en balo oko, cobo ticgi te loyogi oko." 
Job5:13 En mio oryeko moko iyi owic me ryekogi en mio yik a jo a tamgi ogom balle oyotoyot. 
Job5:14 Piny odoko colligi kun ceŋ pwod tye, owoto ityamtyam i cuny dyeceŋ bala dyewor." 
Job5:15 Cite en laro itino kic oko i doggi, laro daŋ jo a piny oloo i ciŋ jo atek." 
Job5:16 Mannono omio ocan tye kede gen, otim jo cucu mio doggi oko." 
Job5:17 “Ŋat ame Rwot juko tye kede winyo, pi mannono, kur ica pwony a Won Twer Ducu ba," 
Job5:18 Pien en ka owani tweo waŋ kan cwano oko, en twero goyi cite daŋ caŋi oko." 
Job5:19 En bino lari i kom ayela apapat abicel, ginnoro arac mom doŋ twero gudo komi kadi i tyen me abiro mere." 
Job5:20 I kare me kec en bino larri oko, mom ito, i lweny en lari i teko a leb pala lweny," 
Job5:21 En bino gwoki i lyeto a kop ame ya i dog jo, bino miyo mom ilworo ka obino i komi." 
Job5:22 I kare me to kede me kec, yin ibino nyero giri anyera, mom daŋ ibino lworo lee moro ame tye i wi lobo." 
Job5:23 Pien yin ibino cikere i gweŋe ame tye i tim, leyi me tim daŋ bino bedo kedi i kuc." 
Job5:24 Ibino ŋeyo ni kemani tye aber, ibino roto awiini, ginnoro mom bino rwenyo iye." 
Job5:25 Ibino daŋ ŋeyo ni ikwai bino bedo apol, kun itino ame oya i komi pol calo lum i tim." 
Job5:26 Ibino to ame doŋ iteggo, kun komi pwod tek, calo bel ame otero wot dino i laro ka kare mere oromo." 
Job5:27 Nen ba, kop man wan otyeko yenyo tere, onwoŋo ni tye gire ateni. Winy ite mako daŋ me konyi.”" 
Job6:1 Yubu te gamo koppere ni," 
Job6:2 “Kono onwoŋo otwero pimo akemona, dok daŋ oromo pimo can opoto i komani i mijan, do ber!" 
Job6:3 Pien pekkere kono okato pek a kwoyo me dog nam oko, mannono en omio onwoŋo akobo kop atata." 
Job6:4 Won Twer Ducu doŋ ocobo koma oko atero mere, kwirgi olal otuno naka i cunya twal;" 
Job6:5 Obaŋa doŋ okado koma luŋ i lworo mere, Kana me tim kok ka ce tye i lum? Twon kok ka cemmere tye i nyime?" 
Job6:6 Cam abot twero camere aboŋo kado? Pig toŋ gweno kan atarrere-ni bille amit? 
Job6:7 Cunya okwerogi, mom mito agudgi kadi acel; gin luŋ calo cam ame lemo cunya." 
Job6:8 “Kono onwoŋo Obaŋa twero miya gin ame akwao; dok kono onwoŋo romo miya gin ame amito; 
Job6:9 kono Obaŋa oye neka oko, kono oyaro ciŋe te miyo waŋa rwenyo oko atwal." 
Job6:10 Kono otimere amannono kono cunya okwe, kono alelo meicel, kadi bed rem mom weka kare moro me weo pien an onwoŋo mom akwero kop a Ŋat Acil." 
Job6:11 Tekona kara rom mene, ame mia akuro nono? Kwona kara bino gik iŋo ba, me adi cunya?" 
Job6:12 Koma tek calo kidi bo? Riŋo koma calo mola bo? 
Job6:13 Iyi ateni, an doŋ mom aromo konyere kena, ginnoro luŋ a myero konya doŋ oya oko i koma." 
Job6:14 “Ŋat ame kwero timo awottere kica, nwoŋo mom doŋ lworo Won Twer Ducu." 
Job6:15 Omegona, wegi adote calo pii i kulo, ame ka opoŋ, pii mere mol te two oko," 
Job6:16 orom aroma i pii ocido orubere kede pee, kan ame pee oya i wi kidi pono iye." 
Job6:17 I kare me oro orwenyo oko, ka piny lyet mom onen," 
Job6:18 Owot iyo weko yo me yenyogi, ocoro dye tim ote rwenyo oko." 
Job6:19 Owot ame oya i Tema bedo yenyogi, jo ame oya i Ceba bedo keto gengi iye." 
Job6:20 Gengi-nono kelligi cwercuny, lewic en a lunyo makogi ka otuno kuno," 
Job6:21 Wun aman doŋ irom wunu i kulli-nono baŋa, ineno wunu can opoto i koma, lworo te makowu," 
Job6:22 Onwoŋo akwao ni imia wunu mottere bo? Onyo akwao ru ijuk lonyowu icul wunu i muŋ me laro kwona? 
Job6:23 Akwao ni ilara wunu i ciŋ okworra bo? Onyo ni ilakoro wunu an i ciŋ jo ame wuna? 
Job6:24 “Pwonya wunu, me aliŋ iti, nyutta wunu bal ame atimo." 
Job6:25 Kop a ŋat ame genne tek meicel! Kara ajukewu konyo dano niŋo? 
Job6:26 Itamo ni itwero juko wunu kop ame akobo? Aco kop a ŋat ame piny oloo calo yamo," 
Job6:27 Iromo bolo wunu kwir i kom otino kic, kede loko owotewu doko gin me acata?" 
Job6:28 “Tim wunu ber inena wunu, mom abino kobo kopporo me goba i nyimwu." 
Job6:29 Tim wunu ber, iwek tima wunu kittono ba, lok doŋ tamwu ba, pien kop mom romo loya." 
Job6:30 Tye kopporo ame akobo me goba? Mom aromo poko kop ame kela can bo?” 
Job7:1 “Kwo a dano i lobo rom i kare ame dano obedo kede i mony, kare me kwo mere rom aroma i kwo apakaca," 
Job7:2 Rom aroma opii ame mito bedo i tipo, rom aroma apakaca ame cunye bedo i kom ocara mere." 
Job7:3 Amannono doŋ, an otyeko miya dwete apol me bedo abeda, dyewor me kanyorem daŋ doŋ omoko oko pira." 
Job7:4 Ka abuto piny aparo pi kare ame abino ya iye, cite piny mom mito ru, abedo pwodde apwoda naka piny iter." 
Job7:5 Kudi kede cila onwoŋo omwone amwona i koma, del koma two te cako belle i tut." 
Job7:6 Nino acel acel dwir kato yat cweyo boŋo oko, nino acel acel kato weka i canna." 
Job7:7 “Po ru kwona rom aroma kede yamo, mom dok abino nwoŋo yomcunnyoro kadi acel." 
Job7:8 Ŋat ame onena mom dok bino nena, ibino ciko waŋi me nena cite mom ibino nwoŋa." 
Job7:9 Kite ame pol ket kede, mom te nen, amannono daŋ, ŋat ame donyo piny i lyel mom dok dwogo oko i lobo." 
Job7:10 Mom dok dwogo tuŋe kadi acel, ode daŋ mom dok romo ŋeye." 
Job7:11 “Pi mannono ba, mom abino liŋ, abino kop pien rem ocira oko, myero akobbi pien atye kede akemo." 
Job7:12 An abedo nam bo, onyo twon nyaŋ adwoŋ me kulo, omio yin imito ni ber kura akura?" 
Job7:13 Ka akobo ni, ‘Kabutona bino kweyo cunya,’ onyo ni, ‘Rem koma bino kwe oko ka abuto piny,’" 
Job7:14 ento yin ibedo ryaryaŋo koma i lek atata, imio lworo bedo maka pi anyuttogo ame abedo neno dyewor," 
Job7:15 mannono omio amito ru kono odea adea, tika doŋ ato, kato bedo i rem kit man," 
Job7:16 Mom amito abed bedo kit man, mom amito ni abed kwo nakanaka, Weka gira abedi, pien kare me kwona calo yamo." 
Job7:17 Dano kara gin aŋo, omio pire litti wokkono, dok omio yin ibedo keto cunyi i kome." 
Job7:18 Piŋo kara ibedo lime kare luŋ, kun daŋ ibedo teme teretere." 
Job7:19 Ibino bedo nena kittono naka awene, kun mom iloko waŋi teŋe? Wekka koŋ kare moro me mwonyo lao ba." 
Job7:20 Ka ce abolo, nwoŋo atimo kara ŋo i komi, yin agwok jo? Piŋo kara ibedo bayo toŋŋi i koma kare ducu? Piŋo kara adoko twon yeccoro apek meicel baŋi?" 
Job7:21 Piŋo kara mom itwero tima kica i kom balla? Piŋo mom ijwao balla oko? Pien aman doŋ abino buto piny lobo, ibino yenya cite ibino nwoŋo mom doŋ atye.”" 
Job8:1 Bildad dano me Cua te cako gamo kop a Yubu kun kobo ni," 
Job8:2 “Kara ibino bedo kobo kop man naka awene ba, kun koppi calo twon yamo moro akodo atek meicel?" 
Job8:3 Obaŋa mom ŋolo kop atira bo? Onyo Won Twer Ducu mom timo gin atye kakare? 
Job8:4 Ka ce itinoni obedo timo balloro baŋe, en doŋ otyeko miyogi ite loc a balgi-nono." 
Job8:5 Ka ce ibino woro Rwot, kun icwao kwacci baŋ Won Twer Ducu;" 
Job8:6 ka ce yi cil, dok cunyi daŋ atira, en gire bino ya malo me konyi, en bino culli, bino miyo kabedo aber piri." 
Job8:7 Kadi bed rik con i kare ame icako, kwo acaka rik jamini nok, itwero pwod bedo i jami adwoŋ meicel i agikki me kwoni." 
Job8:8 “Tim ber koŋ ipeny kwariwa, me koŋ itam gin ame obedo timere i kom kwariwa," 
Job8:9 pien wan pwod otoco, mom oŋeo ginnoro, dok kare me kwowa i lobo man lokere calo tipo." 
Job8:10 Gin mom obino pwonyi ote kobbi koppogo, pien gin otye kede niaŋ atut meicel." 
Job8:11 “Aladu doŋo kan ame coto mom iye? Ogada doŋo aber kan ame pii mom iye? 
Job8:12 Gin two oyot meicel akato ginapita ocele ka pii pe, akadi pwod odoŋo adoŋa, kun daŋ mom otoŋo tergi." 
Job8:13 Mannono en gin ame timere i kom jo ame mom paro pi Obaŋa, gen ame ŋat a kwia Obaŋa tye kede ke nono." 
Job8:14 Gennere cot oko calo uci, gennere rom aroma kede boo otyatyam." 
Job8:15 Ka ojeŋere i kom ode mom romo cuŋ, ka ocwao ciŋe omako, mom daŋ romo cuŋ atek." 
Job8:16 Calo ginapita ame doŋo i kare ame ceŋ lyet, ame potgi lot wumo poto oko." 
Job8:17 Lwitgi dwalle i kom gweŋe, gin bedo i akina gweŋe." 
Job8:18 Ka oputogi oko i kakargi, kabedogi-nono kwerogi oko, kun okobo ni, ‘An yam mom ru anenowu.’" 
Job8:19 Mannono en gin ame timere i kom jo a mom paro pi Obaŋa, ka gin oya i lobo, jo ocele leo kakargi oko." 
Job8:20 “Nen ba, Obaŋa gire mom kwero ŋat a mom i balloro dok daŋ mom konyo jo areco." 
Job8:21 En gire pwod bino miyo inyero, ibino daŋ redo gire i yomcuny." 
Job8:22 Lewic bino ciro jo ame dagi oko, kema a jo areco bino rwenyo oko.”" 
Job9:1 Yubu te gamo kop a Bildad ni," 
Job9:2 “Aŋeo ni kop ame ikobo tye kakare, cite dano twero loyo kop i nyim Obaŋa i yore aŋo?" 
Job9:3 Ka ce ŋattoro mito pyem kede, Obaŋa twero penyo peny tutumia acel twal, nwoŋo dano mom ru odok i moro acel iye." 
Job9:4 Obaŋa ryek meicel i cunye, dok teko mere daŋ dwoŋ meicel. Ŋa a yam koŋ oero lweny kede te loye?" 
Job9:5 En kobo kidi oko i kakargi kun gin mom oŋeo, kare ame en tye alolokogi akemo." 
Job9:6 En mio lobo yeŋere, eka te ya oko i kakare, en yeŋo anaka acakki te lobo luŋ." 
Job9:7 En ka ociko ceŋ, ceŋ mom donnyo, en twero wumo waŋ acer oko dyewor mom te ryeny." 
Job9:8 En opeto polo gire kene, te wot i wi pii nam atwagere." 
Job9:9 En otio gin ame olwoŋo Ajaraŋuu kede lwak acer abiro ocokere karacel, kede acer ocele ame olwoŋo ni Lyer-nino kede en ocele mere ame bedo i tuŋ anyarolum." 
Job9:10 En tio gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo ame tato tere tek, gigi mogo me awura ame pol atata." 
Job9:11 Koŋ inen, en ka obeo i ŋeta, mom aromo neno, woto naka kato kun mom aŋeo." 
Job9:12 En twero kwanyo ginnoro keken a yie mito aboŋo ŋattoro ame geŋe, mom tye ŋattoro ame romo penye ni, ‘Itimo ŋonnono?’" 
Job9:13 “Obaŋa gire mom juko akemo mere, jo ame rik konyo Rakab ryebere piny i nyime wore." 
Job9:14 Kara doŋ an aromo gamo koppere i yore aŋo, kun ayero kop ame myero apid kede i nyime?" 
Job9:15 Kadi balla moro mom, mom gira aromo gamo doge, an myero ka akwa aŋolkop tima kica." 
Job9:16 Ka ce rik ogamo doga i kare ame alwoŋe, kono mom aye ni en onwoŋo obedo winyo koppa." 
Job9:17 Pien en obukoro i koma meicel calo yamo, bedo-gu medo bur i koma ameda aboŋo tyen kopporo."
