Job9:18 Mom weka kare moro me weo, kun mio cunya bedo waŋ awaŋa." 
Job9:19 Ka lweny me nyuto teko, myero inen gire Obaŋa! Ka ce akobo ni apide, ŋa kara ame twero lwoŋe?" 
Job9:20 Kadi balla moro mom, kop ame ya i doga romo miyo kop loa, kadi bed an anen ni a mom i balloro, en nyuto oko ni an gire agak." 
Job9:21 An gira balla moro mom, mannono omio mom aparo, mom amito ni kono amedde bedo kwo." 
Job9:22 Ducu rom aroma, mannono omio an akobo ni, ‘Obaŋa jwero luŋ, jo a mom i bal kede jo obalo!’" 
Job9:23 Ka ce can opoto ame te kelo to atura, i kom ŋat a mom i bal, en nyero can ame opoto i komenono anyera." 
Job9:24 Obaŋa omio lobo iciŋ otim tim areco, en wumo waŋ oŋolkop oko, ka ce mom en, kara ŋa a doŋ wumo?" 
Job9:25 “Kare me kwona doŋ dwir kato anwec oko; otwarre doŋ atwara, kun mom oneno ginnoro aber." 
Job9:26 Kare me kwona doŋ acunyo ŋwec acunya calo cur a lyao piny me yuto gi-acama mere. 
Job9:27 Ka akobo ni, ‘Wia gire bino wil oko i kom pekona, cunya te bedo ayom ame abwonyo kare luŋ." 
Job9:28 Pwod dok abedo kede lworo pi twon rem ame abeo iye, pien atamo ni mom ibino tera acalo ŋat a mom i balloro.’" 
Job9:29 Nen, ibino ŋolo kop loa, kara dok abedo lolle i tic piŋo?" 
Job9:30 Mom doŋ konyo ginnoro kadi acel kadi bed alwokere kede pee, kun alwoko ciŋa-gu i cabun agwa meicel," 
Job9:31 pwod gire ibino bola i bur, boŋŋina i koma te kwera oko." 
Job9:32 “Obaŋa gire mom obedo dano calo an, ame mio an agamo doge, kono obedo dano kono opido kede oko." 
Job9:33 Mom tye ŋattoro ame twero ŋolo kop i akinawa ame romo keto ciŋe i komwa wan aryo luŋ," 
Job9:34 Mom tye ŋattoro ame romo geŋe keto can i koma, ame twero geŋo twon lworo adwoŋ ame atye kede i kome," 
Job9:35 ame mio akobo kop aboŋo lworo, an mom anenne kena kittono kadi acel.”" 
Job10:1 “Adag gira doŋ kwona, mom abino weko koko kadi acel, abino gira kop, pien cunya kec meicel." 
Job10:2 Abino kobbi Obaŋa ni, Kur iŋol kop loa ba, kobba gin omio itye ka pyem keda," 
Job10:3 Nen aber baŋi ka itye ka wuna, kun icao kede tic ame yin komi itio, eka ite lunyo pwoyo tim otim areco?" 
Job10:4 Waŋi rom i me a dano bo? Ineno kite ame dano neno kede jami? 
Job10:5 Kare me kwoni daŋ rom kede me a dano bo? Mwaka me rini i lobo rom kede me a dano," 
Job10:6 en omio yin itye ka yenyo bal i koma-ni me wek inwoŋ balla," 
Job10:7 Yin iŋeo ni balla moro mom, kun daŋ iŋeo ni mom dok tye ŋattoro ame twero lara i ciŋi." 
Job10:8 Yin en a yam icwea kede ciŋi, aman dok ilokere i koma me neka oko." 
Job10:9 Po ni yam icwea i lobo; aman dok idwoka iyi apua bo? 
Job10:10 Mom rik ionya oko calo cak, ite miya makere calo cak opoto?" 
Job10:11 Yin gire en iburo koma i del koma kede riŋo, ite kokubo koma i ler kede cogo." 
Job10:12 Imia kwo kede mar a mom lokere, ibedo gwoka, imia abedo kwo." 
Job10:13 Kadi bed ibedo gwoko kop magi i cunyi, aŋeo ni man obedo gin ame yin en iyiko." 
Job10:14 Ka ce an abalo, yin gire nwoŋo ineno oko, cite mom iye weko balla kadi acel." 
Job10:15 Can i wia ka ce atimo ginnoro arac! Ka ce balla moro mom, mom daŋ atwero tiŋo wia malo pien lewic ocira gira oko, pien atye ka neno can ame tye i koma." 
Job10:16 Ka ce aporo tiŋo wia malo, yin nwoŋo itye ikiya calo eŋatu, kun itio ticcogo me awura i koma." 
Job10:17 Nen itye ka medde ameda me lweny i koma, akemoni i koma daŋ tye medde kare luŋ, itye ka cwayo mony apapat i koma." 
Job10:18 “Piŋo kara imia adonyo oko iyi totta? Kono rik ato gira ame ŋattoro mom ru onena, do ber," 
Job10:19 Kono rik ikwanya iyi totta naka i lyel, ate bedo calo ŋat a mom obedo tye." 
Job10:20 Kare me kwona i lobo mom gire aduno moro? Koŋ iweka ba, me abil yomcuny aduno moro ba," 
Job10:21 kun mom ru awoto kan ame mom dok abino dwogo iye cen, i lobo me mutu kede colpiny," 
Job10:22 i lobo ame col icuc dok jami iye ojebere atata, kan ame lero ceŋ rom aroma i colpiny.”" 
Job11:1 Jopar dano me Namat te gamo ni," 
Job11:2 “Twon kop apol ame iduro-nono mom ogamo? Kop apol apola en a nyuto ni dano tye atira bo? 
Job11:3 Itamo ni koppi-nono twero miyo jo liŋ aliŋa? Koppi ame inywaro i jo anywaranono mom romo miyo omi lewic? 
Job11:4 Pien yin ikobo ni, ‘Pwonnya gire ber odoco, Obaŋa gire neno ni an acil.’" 
Job11:5 Cite kono Obaŋa onwoŋo twero kop kedi, kono oŋamo doge te kobbi kop i cunye!" 
Job11:6 Kono onwoŋo oyabbi i muŋ apol me ryeko! Pien ŋeccere tut meicel. Myero iŋe ni can ame Obaŋa oketo i komi mom oromo poro kede bal ame yin ibalo. 
Job11:7 “Yin iromo ŋeyo ginnoro luŋ i kom Obaŋa? Iromo ŋeyo twerroro luŋ ame Won Twer Ducu tye kede? 
Job11:8 Tye malo meicel calo polo, kara yin itwero timo ŋo iye? Tut kato lyel me Ceol oko, yin iromo ŋeyo ŋo iye?" 
Job11:9 Borrere kato lobo oko, laccere te kato nam oko." 
Job11:10 Ŋa ame twero geŋo Obaŋa ka ce en obino te mako dano? Ka ce olwoŋo dano i ka ŋolo kop, ŋa ame romo juke?" 
Job11:11 Pien en ŋeo jo ame konygi mom, ka ce en oneno bal myero en kur tam pire?" 
Job11:12 Dano amiŋ twero doko dano aryek ka kana me tim onywalo dano? 
Job11:13 “Ka ce iyiko cunyi obedo atira, ibino taŋo ciŋi baŋ ikwae;" 
Job11:14 ka ce bal tye i ciŋi, bol doŋ oko teŋe kannabor, timmoro arac luŋ myero kur doŋ bed i udini." 
Job11:15 Ibino gire doŋ tiŋo wi malo aboŋo balloro i komi, mom doŋ ibino bedo kede lworo moro, dok daŋ ibino bedo kede tekcuny." 
Job11:16 Wii bino wil oko i kom peko ame ibeo iye, ibino po iye calo pii ame doŋ omol oko." 
Job11:17 Ibino doŋ bedo i kwo acil calo ceŋ aryeny i cuny dyeceŋ, kadi bed iwinyo ni itye i piny acol, cite pwod bino nen calo ka ibai." 
Job11:18 Ibino bedo ame cunyi opye, pien nwoŋo itye kede gen, Obaŋa bino gwoki, ibino we giri mot i kuc." 
Job11:19 Ibino buto piny aboŋo ŋattoro ame mi lworo, jo apol bino mito ni kono obedo calo yino" 
Job11:20 Ento wan jo areco bino balle meicel, yo me bwot bino loyogi oko, obino doŋ paro to keken.”" 
Job12:1 Yubu dok te gamo koppere ni," 
Job12:2 “Ateteni, wun gire itye wunu kede ŋec, ryeko luŋ aluŋa bino to kedwu," 
Job12:3 Cite an daŋ atye kede ŋec atut calo wun, wun gire mom iloa wunu. Kara ŋa a mom ŋeo kodi jaminie?" 
Job12:4 An doŋ adoko gi-anyera owotena, an ame yam alwoŋo Obaŋa eka te gamo koppa, an ŋat a kitena atira, a balla-gu mom, adoko gi-anyera a jo." 
Job12:5 Jo ame komgi i gum cao jo ame komgi kec, ocoro jo ame tyengi ocer acera." 
Job12:6 Kuc gire tye i kema oyak, dok jo ame mio akemo mako Obaŋa tye gigi aber, jo ame obaŋagi obedo tekogi." 
Job12:7 “Koŋ ipeny leyi, gin bino pwonyi, peny daŋ winy me polo, gin bino titti." 
Job12:8 Jami ame lak alaka i lobo bino pwonyi, rec me nam bino tucci." 
Job12:9 Gin luŋ oŋeo aber ni Rwot en otio man," 
Job12:10 En loo jami luŋ, en daŋ a mio dano acel acel wee" 
Job12:11 Yit dano mom ŋeo poko kop ame okobo, kite ame dano bilo cam kede doge." 
Job12:12 Dano ka oteggo ryek, perakino i lobo mio dano bedo kede ŋec atut." 
Job12:13 “Obaŋa tye kede ryeko kede twer daŋ, tye daŋ i ŋec atut kede tam atut." 
Job12:14 Ot ame en oreto piny, ŋattoro mom dok romo gero, ŋat ame en ocego i ot, ŋattoro mom yabo," 
Job12:15 Ka en mom omio kot ocwe, pii i lobo dwono oko, aco ka omio ocwe, pii poŋ lapakino atata i lobo." 
Job12:16 En tek dok daŋ ryek, abwol jo kede jo obwolo daŋ obedo mege." 
Job12:17 Omi-tam adoŋo en tero oko onoro, en mio oŋolkop doko omiŋo." 
Job12:18 En gonyo jo ame obakki otweo i buc, en lunyo tweyo boŋŋi i pyer obakki," 
Job12:19 En tero olamdog daŋ onoro, kun reto wegi twer piny." 
Job12:20 En two dog jo ame ogeno oko, kun rwenyo ŋec atut ame odoŋe tye kede oko." 
Job12:21 En mio jo cao rwode, dok mio jo atek doko agoro," 
Job12:22 En mio muŋ i kan acol nen oko kannaler, dok mio kan acol icuc doko aler oko," 
Job12:23 Twero miyo rokkoro-ni doko twon rok adwoŋ meicel, dok twero daŋ jwero oko, twero miyo rokkoro-ni doko rok atek dok twero wekogi ata," 
Job12:24 En kwanyo ŋec otel a lwak oko, miogi owoto i tim ata, kan ame yo pe iye," 
Job12:25 Miogi oboŋo yo aboŋa aboŋo lero moro, kun ogatte calo jo omer koŋo.”" 
Job13:1 “Nen ba, an atyeko neno magi luŋ, awinyo dok daŋ aniaŋ." 
Job13:2 Gin ame wun iŋeo wunu, an daŋ aŋeo, wun gire mom iloa wunu." 
Job13:3 Cite amito ni kono akobo koppa baŋ Won Twer Ducu, amito akob koppa-ni wan Obaŋa." 
Job13:4 Aco wun iwumo wunu kop ateni kede goba, wun luŋ ibedo wunu daktal ame konywu mom," 
Job13:5 Onwoŋo myero iliŋ wunu aliŋa, mannono bino miyo inen wunu calo jo aryek." 
Job13:6 Koŋ doŋ iwiny wunu gin ame an akobo, cik yitwu i pidona." 
Job13:7 Ibino kobo wunu kop goba pi Obaŋa, kun ibedo bwolo wunu jo abwola?" 
Job13:8 Wun ibino dworo wunu Obaŋa, kun ipido wunu pire?" 
Job13:9 Itamo ni ibino bedo wunu aber ka ce en ocako ŋiyowu? Itamo ni itwero bwole wunu kite ame ibwolo wunu kede dano? 
Job13:10 En gire bino jukowu, ka ce itye wunu kede apokapoka i cunywu," 
Job13:11 Kwogo mere mom myelo komwu, mom mio lworo makowu ce?" 
Job13:12 Carokop ame ikobo wunu calo buru, kop ame ipido wunu goro calo lobo ame ŋidde oko-ni." 
Job13:13 “Koŋ iliŋ wunu, me ate kop, me gin ame mito bino i koma bin," 
Job13:14 Abino camo tona i doga, ate jalo kwona oko," 
Job13:15 An mom doŋ atye kede gennoro, en gire bino neka, kadi bed amannono, pwod abino kobo kop." 
Job13:16 Tekcunya en ame bino miya aloo kop i kom kitena i nyime, pien dano a mom ŋeo Obaŋa mom tuno i nyime." 
Job13:17 Ter yitwu iwiny wunu koppa aber meicel, me gin akobo dony i cunywu," 
Job13:18 Nen, atyeko doŋ yiko pidona oko, aŋeo ni abino loyo kop," 
Job13:19 Ŋa ce ame bino pyem keda kuno? Ka ce tye, abino liŋ gira aliŋa naka ka ato." 
Job13:20 “Ama Obaŋa, tim ber itim pira jami aryo keken, me kur daŋ arweny i nyimi;" 
Job13:21 kwany doŋ ciŋi oko i koma ba, dok kur imi koma bed myel pi lwori," 
Job13:22 ne mannono, ite doŋ lwoŋa me agam dogi, onyo iye an akob kedi, yin ite gamo koppa," 
Job13:23 Rocca kede balla tye ce adi? Tim ber inyutta balla kede cikki ame aturo. 
Job13:24 Piŋo kara doŋ iponna oko? Piŋo itye ka tera calo akworri? 
Job13:25 Imito miyo lworo mako pot boke ame yamo akolo, onyo ryemo yo cuŋ kal otwo?" 
Job13:26 Pien ityeko coyo kop akec meicel i koma, kun ipidda pi bal luŋ ame atimo i kare me tinona." 
Job13:27 Irwako tyena oko iyi kol, itye ka nena i kabedo luŋ ame awoto iye, itye ka pimo kan a tyena onyono ducu." 
Job13:28 Imio doŋ arom aroma kede gin otop, onyo boŋo ame nyenye otutuco.”" 
Job14:1 “Dano ame dako onywalo kare me kwo mere nok, dok ayela mere dwoŋ," 
Job14:2 En bino calo atura te ner oko, mom medde ri nakanaka, ento rwenyo oko calo tipo." 
Job14:3 Piŋo yin daŋ dok iciko waŋi i kom kodi dano-nono, ame imito kele i nyimi me ŋolle kop?" 
Job14:4 Ŋa ame twero miyo gin acil ya i kom en a mom cil? Mom tye ŋattoro kadi acel. 
Job14:5 Pien kare me kwo mere doŋ omoko oko, yin doŋ iŋeo dwete ame iŋolle, kare ame kwo mere bino gik iye doŋ imoko oko, ame mom dok romo kato." 
Job14:6 Koŋ ilok waŋi teŋe, me iwekke kare ba, me en tyek kare mere i kuc acalo atic ame tio pi ocara." 
Job14:7 “Tika yat kadi otoŋo oko pwod bedo kede gen, pien pwod dok twero lot, bedo lot nakanaka mom gik." 
Job14:8 Kadi bed lwite woto kun ti oko lobo, kun iciki mere oto oko piny," 
Job14:9 ento ka oŋweo ŋwec pii doko atek oko, jaŋe te cako jany calo yat a pwod opito apita." 
Job14:10 Ento dano to te buto piny atwal, ka weo me kwo mere oya, agikki mere daŋ ennono." 
Job14:11 Kite ame pii tum kede oko i nam, kede kulo ame pii iye dwono te two oko," 
Job14:12 amannono daŋ, dano buto piny atwal mom dok te ya, mom dok co tuno ka polo doŋ bino bedo pe, mom daŋ otwero coyo te co i waŋ nino mere." 
Job14:13 Kono ikana oko i lyel me Ceol, kono ber; kana kuno naka ka akemoni doŋ okato oko; kono imoko karena me bedo kuno, ite bino po pira doki!" 
Job14:14 Ka dano oto oko, pwod dok bino bedo kwo? I kare me ticca luŋ an abino bedo kuro gire, tuno ka kare me gonya i doge oromo." 
Job14:15 Ka ce ilwoŋa, abino gamo dogi, yin gire ibino mito neno tic me ciŋi atek." 
Job14:16 Icennere yin doŋ ibino bedo neno kan ame awoto iye, cite mom ibino bedo neno balla." 
Job14:17 Ibino tweyo balla oko iyi icao, ibino wumo wi rocca luŋ." 
Job14:18 “Cite kidi rette piny, te ŋidde oko, gweŋ daŋ otwero kobo oko i kakare," 
Job14:19 pii daŋ naŋo gweŋe tyeko oko, alele kot daŋ molo lobo oko; yin daŋ amannono, ibalo gen a dano tye kede oko," 
Job14:20 Ibedo loye nakanaka, tuno ka en oto, imio waŋe balle, ite doŋ ryeme oko," 
Job14:21 Itino mere bino doko jo me awora kun en doŋ mom ŋeo, okwanyo ditogi oko, kun en mom niaŋ ginnoro iye." 
Job14:22 En bedo winyorem ame tye kome keken, kun bedo kumo pire kene.”" 
Job15:1 Erifaji dano me Teman dok te gamo ru," 
Job15:2 “Dano aryek bedo gamo kop a tere mom, kun bedo kako ka yamo ame ya i tuŋ kide keken?" 
Job15:3 Bedo pyem nono kop ame konnyere pe, onyo i kop ame en mom romo timo ginnoro iye?" 
Job15:4 Nen imiyo jo akwero lworo Obaŋa oko, dok itye ka geno jo me lwodo kop i cunygi i nyim Obaŋa oko," 
Job15:5 Pien balli tye ka miyo dogi bedo alim, itye ka yero kop ame oryeko a bwolo jo tio kede," 
Job15:6 Koppi gire en ame tye ka ŋolli kop, mom an, kop ame ya i dogi en a tye acalo caden i komi." 
Job15:7 “Yin en ogeo nywali bo? Onyo ca onywali con, ame Obaŋa mom ru oketo kidi?" 
Job15:8 Yam ibedo winyo gin Obaŋa tye ayiko ce? Onyo yin itamo ni yin keken iryek? 
Job15:9 Ŋo ame yin iŋeo ame wan mom oŋeo aber? Ŋo ame yin iniaŋ iye aber, wan mom oŋeo aber?" 
Job15:10 Ŋat a wie obuko lwar kede ŋat oteggo, gin luŋ otye i akinawa, ame gin jo ame mwakagi bup kato me a pappi oko." 
Job15:11 Kop ame Obaŋa kweo kede cunyi mom romi bo, onyo koppere ame en kobo mot amota-ni?" 
Job15:12 Piŋo kara cunyi tye ka wayi teri teŋe? Piŋo waŋi oballe? 
Job15:13 Piŋo akemo tye ka maki i kom Obaŋa, kun imio kodikoppono donnyo i dogi?" 
Job15:14 Dano kara obedo gin aŋo ame mio twero bedo acil? Onyo ŋat ame dako onywalo twero bedo ŋat a kite atira i yore aŋo? 
Job15:15 Nen ba, Obaŋa mom geno jo mere acil, akadi polo-gu mom cil nyime kadi acel." 
Job15:16 Kara doŋ dano kono, en ame dano oballe calo doŋ gin ame kwer-ri, dano ame bal mitte calo pii amata-ni?" 
Job15:17 “Winy koppa me anyutti, gin ame aneno daŋ abino titti oko," 
Job15:18 karacel kede gin ame jo aryek kobo, gin ame kwarigi mom okano acalo gin me i muŋ," 
Job15:19 ame lobowu rik omio baŋgi gin kengi; ame arokkoro mom beo i akinagi. 
Job15:20 Atim tim arac pwodde i rem kare luŋ me kwo mere, pi mwakki luŋ ame omio ŋat a mom i kica," 
Job15:21 En bedo winyoredo mogo ame winyo lik, kare me kuccere en ame ayak bino kede i kome," 
Job15:22 En mom twero ye ni dok ebino ya i kan acol, pien en ŋeo ru otye ka libe i pala me neke," 
Job15:23 En bedo rimo piny pi yenyo cam, kun penyo ni, ‘Tye kara kwene ba?’ En ŋeo ni to doŋ tye akure akura," 
Job15:24 Peko kede can bedo myelo kome kare luŋ, oloc calo abaka ame oyikere me lweny." 
Job15:25 Pien en oryeo ciŋe me lweny Obaŋa, oyiye ni eromo lweny i Won Twer Ducu," 
Job15:26 kun riŋo apala apala me wot lweny kede, i twon kwottoro apek meicel." 
Job15:27 Moo onwoŋo owumo kome oko, pyere daŋ onwoŋo moo keken." 
Job15:28 En obedo bedo i boma mogo ame oweko i wi obur, kun bedo i udi ame dano mom opore bedo iye, udi ame doŋ tye ka pi wi obur." 
Job15:29 En mom bino bedo alonyo kadi acel, lim atye i ciŋe mom bino perakino, dok mom bino cuŋ atek acalo yat ame lwite odonyo piny lobo," 
Job15:30 En mom bino bwot kadi acel colpiny, en bino rom aroma i yat ame lyeto mac otwo pote oko, kede yat ame yamo oonyo ture oko." 
Job15:31 En myero kur gen bwo ŋor, kun bwole kenekene, pien bwo ŋor en ame obino cule kede." 
Job15:32 Obino cule oko, kun kare me culle mom ru oromo, bino bedo calo yat ame pote mom olot." 
Job15:33 Dok bino bedo calo olok ame nyige oony oko, onyo jeituni ame ture oony oko kun mom ru ocek," 
Job15:34 Pien jo a mom ŋeo Obaŋa rom aroma i dako oraŋa, mac waŋo kema a ŋat ogamo lim owile kede i mun oko," 
Job15:35 Gin oyaco tim me bal ote nywalo can, obedo yiko kop goba i cunygi.”" 
Job16:1 Yubu dok te gamo ni," 
Job16:2 “Atyeko winyo kodikoppono apol meicel, wun luŋ ibedo wunu okwe cuny ame medo ka cwercuny," 
Job16:3 Kop ame obedo yamo ata-ni twero gik bo? Onyo ŋo atugo cunywu omio ibedo gamo wunu doga? 
Job16:4 An daŋ onwoŋo atwero kop bala wun, kono onwoŋo wun itye wunu kite ame atye kede-ni; onwoŋo atwero kobo kop apol meicel i komwu, kun ayeyeŋo wia i komwu," 
Job16:5 dok onwoŋo atwero kobo kop me cukoro cunywu; rem i komwu onwoŋo twero kwe oko pi kop alim ame akobbiwu. 
Job16:6 “Ka ce an akobo kop, rem i koma mom kwe; ka aliŋ, rem i koma bedo aberber bo?" 
Job16:7 Ateni, Obaŋa doŋ otyeko tekona odoco, ojwero jona ducu," 
Job16:8 En doŋ otyeko maka oko, odoko daŋ acaden me nyuto balla; jonya-ni doŋ odoko akworra oko, kobo doŋ koppere me caden i nyima." 
Job16:9 Yie okwera, akemo te miye kikilo an calo lee, okao lake meicel i koma, okworra yabo waŋgi i koma calo dano opako toŋŋere me neko lee." 
Job16:10 Jo oŋamo doggi i koma, ote doŋo lema apala apala, ocokere karacel me lweny koma." 
Job16:11 Obaŋa doŋ otyeko miya i ciŋ jo a mom ŋec, obola i ciŋ jo areco," 
Job16:12 Onwoŋo abedo gira mot, cite en ocanya piny te dada oko, omaka i ŋuta te ŋiŋido an atitino. En obedo cobo koma i toŋŋere," 
Job16:13 wegi atero mere ogura oko dyere, Oryeko aŋalurana oko aboŋo kica, te onyo pig epiona oko piny." 
Job16:14 Onukino keto can i koma meicel, kun riŋo i koma calo cirikale." 
Job16:15 Ate lunyo kwoyo doŋ puko me arukana, tekona luŋ doŋ te buto iyi apua amwa-ru." 
Job16:16 Koko doŋ omio waŋa obok pee, aco pyen waŋa doŋ ocido icuc," 
Job16:17 kadi bed mom adwaro kolo kadi acel, dok balloro gire mom i kwacca." 
Job16:18 “Yin lobo we, tim ber kur iwum remona, wek kokona kur nwoŋ kannoro me weo," 
Job16:19 Kadi bed aman acadenna tye i polo, dok ŋat ame cuŋ pira tye malo." 
Job16:20 Owotena doŋ caa acaa, pig waŋa cwer i nyim Obaŋa," 
Job16:21 ni kono en epido pira, ka acuŋ nyime, kite ame dano laro kede pi awottere." 
Job16:22 Pien ka kare me kwona doŋ otum, abino wot kan ame mom dok abino dwogo iye.”" 
Job17:1 “Cunya doŋ goro meicel, kwona doŋ ceggi tum, lyel doŋ tye akura akura." 
Job17:2 Ateni, wegi anywar doŋ ogura oko dyere, waŋa tye ka neno kite ame akemogi lyetto kede i koma." 
Job17:3 “Yin ikorui myero icuŋŋa, kara ŋa i kuno ame romo cuŋŋa?" 
Job17:4 Kite acalo yin mom iyabo tamgi me oniaŋ, pi mannono mom ibino miyogi oloa," 
Job17:5 Ŋat ame kobo kop me erupe i kom owote mere, me enwoŋ ginnoro i kom jamigi, waŋ itino mere bino rwobere oko." 
Job17:6 “En omio nyiŋa doŋ odoko me aceka a jo, an doŋ adoko dano a jo ŋulo lao i nyime." 
Job17:7 Kumo omio waŋa doŋ ocido oko, dul koma luŋ doŋ calo tipo." 
Job17:8 Man omio jo ame cunygi atira owuro meicel, ŋat a mom i balloro cako mwomere i kom jo a mom ŋeo Obaŋa." 
Job17:9 Cite ŋat a kite atira medde mere i kite mere, ŋat a balloro mom i cunye teko mere medde ameda." 
Job17:10 Ento wun luŋ, koŋ ibin wunu, mom gire abino nwoŋo dano moro aryek." 
Job17:11 “Karena doŋ okato oko, gin ame cunya mito, a yam ayiko doŋ oturo oko," 
Job17:12 Gin loko dyewor doko dyeceŋ, kun okobo ni, ‘Lero ceŋ ceggi i piny acol.’" 
Job17:13 Ka ce aneno lyel me Ceol acalo oda, ka ce apeto kabutona i colpiny," 
Job17:14 ka akobbi i lyel ni. ‘Yin ibedo pappa’, kede kudi ni, ‘Yin i totta onyo aminna’," 
Job17:15 kara doŋ gen ame atye kede-nono tye kwene? Ŋa ame bino neno gin ame atye i gen iye-nono? 
Job17:16 Bino wot keda naka i lyel piny bo? Obino yito piny iyi apua karacel bo?” 
Job18:1 Bildad dano me Cua te gamo dok kun kobo ni," 
Job18:2 “Ibino yenyo kop me akoba naka awene? koŋ itam ba, eka ote cako dok kop kedi," 
Job18:3 Piŋo itye ka terowa calo leyi? Piŋo itye ka nenowa calo jo amiŋ? 
Job18:4 Yin ame akemo mio ikikilo komi calo eŋatu-ni, myero wek lobo doŋ nono piri bo? Onyo myero kob kidi oko i kakare?" 
Job18:5 “Nen ba, tara a jo areco obino neko oko, acara maccere mom bino menyo piny." 
Job18:6 Mac iyi kema mere bino nen ribiribi, tara ame oŋabo i wie malo bino to oko." 
Job18:7 Bayo awottere bino jwik oko gin ame en ikome eyiko en a bino rete piny. 
Job18:8 Owic bino mako tyene, onyo bino poto i bur ame ociko me mako lee," 
Job18:9 Boo bino mako opuny tyene, en bino moko i owic," 
Job18:10 Obino cike kede tol i lobo piny, obino cike owic i waŋayo." 
Job18:11 Lworo bino make tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, bino lubo yore i kabedo luŋ." 
Job18:12 Kec bino nuye oko, can-gu nwoŋo tye akure akura tekki agatte." 
Job18:13 Two bino babalo del kome oko, too arac meicel bino ŋuŋuno del kome oko." 
Job18:14 Obino waye oko i kema mere ame yam egeno, ote tere baŋ abaka ame jo luŋ lworo." 
Job18:15 Jami a mom mege en ame bino bedo i kema mere, obino onyo gwen calufa paco mere." 
Job18:16 En bino bedo calo yat ame lwite otwo oko, kun jaŋe daŋ oner oko." 
Job18:17 Mom dok obino po pire i lobo, mom daŋ obino kobo nyiŋe dye yo," 
Job18:18 Obino core i kannaler, ocwae kannacol, kun oryeme oko i wi podo." 
Job18:19 Atinnere onyo akware mom bino bedo tye i akina jo mere, ŋattoro mom bino doŋ akwo kan a yam en bedo iye." 
Job18:20 Gin otimere i kome bino miyo lworo mako jo i tuŋ to, lworo bino mako jo i tuŋ kide daŋ." 
Job18:21 Paco a jo a mom ŋeo Obaŋa gire bedo amannono, ŋat a kwia Obaŋa gire bedo kodi kabedo-nono.”" 
Job19:1 Yubu dok te gamo kop, kun kobo ni," 
Job19:2 “Ibino bedo wuna wunu naka awene ba, kun ibedo olo wunu koma i kop atata?”" 
Job19:3 Aman doŋ iŋala wunu odoko tyen apar twal, lewic mom makowu ce me bedo tima wunu rac?" 
Job19:4 Kadi bed an arwenyo ateni, balla gire bino maka an kena." 
Job19:5 Ka ce ibedo dwore wunu kenwu i koma, kun ikobo wunu ni rem ame oketo i koma-ni cimo ni an abal," 
Job19:6 myero iŋe wunu ni Obaŋa en omio kop loa, en oburo koma oko kede boo mere." 
Job19:7 Nen ba, kadi bed akok ni oneka oko, mom ogamo doga, kadi ared areda i lwoŋo, ŋat a ŋolo kop atira bedo pe," 
Job19:8 En gire ocega yo oko ame mom aromo kato, en omio yoe luŋ akono abe iye odoko acol icuc." 
Job19:9 En otyeko kwanyo kwogona oko, te kwanyo tok kwogo daŋ oko i wic." 
Job19:10 En doŋ otura odoco, atum doŋ aber, oputo gen ame atye kede oko calo yat oputo," 
Job19:11 Omio akemo omake meicel i koma, te tera acalo okworrere." 
Job19:12 Monnyere luŋ ociro karacel i koma, otoro lobo ogura kede dyere, ote guro gonygi guro kemana oko." 
Job19:13 “En omio omegona doŋ tye kannabor meicel, jo a yam ŋea doŋ opokere deka oko." 
Job19:14 Watina kede owotena a yam mara, gin luŋ doŋ obola oko;" 
Job19:15 wele mogo a yam obedo i oda doŋ wigi owil oko i koma; aŋecana luŋ doŋ nena calo welo moro ata, onena doŋ acalo arokkoro," 
Job19:16 Ka alwoŋo amirona mom doŋ gamo doga, myero abak doga abaka baŋe." 
Job19:17 Dakona mom doŋ mito ŋweyo doga, omegona ame odonyo kedgi acel mom doŋ mito ŋweyo ŋwec koma." 
Job19:18 Naka itino atino doŋ caa acaa, ka aya malo, gin okobo kop arac i koma." 
Job19:19 Owotena a yam mara atek daŋ doŋ obola oko, jo mogo a yam an amaro doŋ olokere oko i koma." 
Job19:20 Riŋo koma kede del koma doŋ omakere ipa i cogona, del doga keken en a doŋ odoŋ." 
Job19:21 Owotena, kica myero makwu i koma ba, pien Obaŋa doŋ omio ciŋe ogudo koma oko." 
Job19:22 Piŋo itye ka lubo wunu yora calo Obaŋa? Piŋo riŋo koma mom romowu? 
Job19:23 “Kop ame akobo-ni kono onwoŋo ocoo oko piny, do ber! Kono onwoŋo ocoo oko bukkoro!" 
Job19:24 Kono ogoro kom alam nyonyo kom kidi, ote mwono me bed iye atwal." 
Job19:25 Pien aŋeo ni ŋat a lakoro an tye kwo, waŋŋoro bino cuŋŋa i wi lobo." 
Job19:26 Kare ame del koma doŋ oballe oko, kit man-ni, abino gire neno Obaŋa aboŋo del koma-ni." 
Job19:27 Abino nene en ikome kun en tye ocuŋ i ŋeta, Cunya dok opoto meicel!" 
Job19:28 Ka ce ikobo wunu ni, ‘Kara obino ryemo yore nino?’ kede ni, ‘Te kop ikokome nwoŋere baŋe;" 
Job19:29 myero ilwor wunu pala romo, pien akemo en a kela lweny pala romo, me iŋe wunu ni ŋolo kop tye.’ ”" 
Job20:1 Jopar dano me Naamat te gamo ni," 
Job20:2 “Mannono omio agam koppi, tima kica ka atamo ni myero ce mom adio cunya." 
Job20:3 Abedo winyo kop ame mom romo kannyere, kit ame aniaŋ kede, omio abedo tamo i cunya kite me dok iye." 
Job20:4 Mom ce iŋeo ni cakere con meicel, i kare ame oketo dano i lobo," 
Job20:5 ni lelo a lo atimo tim arac mom ri kare alac, dok yomcuny a dano a mom ŋeo Obaŋa bedo me kare anonokkoro?" 
Job20:6 Kadi en odoŋo abor naka i polo twal, kadi bed wie ogudo pol," 
Job20:7 en bino to atwal calo cettere, jo ame rik onene bino penyo ni, ‘En kara tye kwene?’" 
Job20:8 Bino rwenyo oko calo lek, mom dok te nwoŋere, obino ryeme oko calo gin onyuto i waŋ lek dyewor." 
Job20:9 Jo ame onene mom dok bino medo nene atwal, naka kan a en bedo iye mom daŋ bino nene." 
Job20:10 Otino mere bino yenyo kony i baŋ ocan, lonyo mere bino ya oko i ciŋe te doŋ oko i lobo." 
Job20:11 Cogo mere bino nwoŋo pwod tek ata calo me awobi, cite obino yike i teko mere-nono iyi apua." 
Job20:12 “Kadi bed timo gin arac lim doge calo kic, kadi bed ekan i te lebe," 
Job20:13 ‘kadi mom emito ŋulo oko, cite medde gwoko i doge," 
Job20:14 cite cam i yie bedo lokere i ciŋ yie kuno, te lokere doko akec calo kwir twol.’" 
Job20:15 En mwonyo lonyo mere donyo yie, icennere te dok noko oko, Obaŋa cwaogi oko i yie." 
Job20:16 En bino naŋo kwir a codocodo, leb ororo en a bino neke," 
Job20:17 En mom bino medde neno kulo moro, kulli ame moo kic mol iye amola kede cak opoto." 
Job20:18 En bino dwoko gin ame en onwoŋo pi ticcere oko, mom bino mwonyo donyo i yie; mom bino yomoro cunye i ginnoro ame oya i cattere," 
Job20:19 Pien odio ocan te wekogi ata, omao ot ame en mom ogero." 
Job20:20 “Pien en owor meicel, mom twero weko ginnoro a cunye omito." 
Job20:21 Mom twero camo cam te weko doŋ, mannono omio gummere mom bino perekino." 
Job20:22 I kare ame en tye i jami mere a rome, nwoŋo pwod mito en ocele, peko bino bino i kome i teko mere luŋ" 
Job20:23 Obaŋa bino coro akemo mere agwa i kome, bino miyo cwe i kome calo kot akaka cammere, te poŋ yie doŋ odoco," 
Job20:24 En bino riŋo ariŋa i lak nyonyo me lweny, atero mola bino cele pel apela" 
Job20:25 Bino donyo i kome te pelo i yo ŋec, lebe aryeny aryenya bino donyo i remo itao mere, twon lworo adwoŋ meicel bino make." 
Job20:26 Piny acol icuc tye akuro lim akana mere akura, mac a mom dano en okuto bino waŋe oko, gin odoŋ i kema mere obino jwero odoco." 
Job20:27 Polo bino yabo ballere kannaler, lobo bino twarre i kome me pide." 
Job20:28 Pii bino tero jami ode oko, bino wayo, tero oko i nino ame akemo omako Obaŋa," 
Job20:29 Man en gin ame Obaŋa opokki i lo arac, gin ame Obaŋa ociko ni myero en le me bedo mege.”" 
Job21:1 Yubu dok te gamo ni," 
Job21:2 “Winy wunu koppa aber, ikwe wunu cunya i mannono," 
Job21:3 Di wunu cunywu, me akeb kedwu, me imedde wunu nywara ka doŋ atyeko kop," 
Job21:4 Itamo wunu ni atye ka kok i kom dano bo? Ŋo amona diyo cunya? 
Job21:5 Koŋ inena wunu, lworo bino makowu, ibino mako wunu dogwu pira." 
Job21:6 Ka aparo pire, cunya poto meicel, koyo daŋ te onyere oko i koma," 
Job21:7 Piŋo jo areco bedo kwo, kun daŋ tekogi medde ameda?" 
Job21:8 Itinogi doko jo adito kun pwod okwo, ikwaegi daŋ doŋo kun gin oneno." 
Job21:9 Udigi bedo i kuc aboŋo lworo moro, lut Obaŋa mom gudogi." 
Job21:10 Twonigi atepo bedo nywal anywala kun tekogi mom dok piny, megi dokgi daŋ mom bwogo." 
Job21:11 Itinogi ciro calo rommi, ka owot tuko." 
Job21:12 Owero ajaa kede opuk, cunygi yom ata ka okuto nyamulere." 
Job21:13 Karegi luŋ opoŋ i gum keken, naka odonyo piny i lyel me Ceol i kuc." 
Job21:14 Gin okobbi Obaŋa ni, ‘Ya oko i baŋwa! Wan mom omito ŋeyo gin ame yin imito." 
Job21:15 Won Twer Ducu kara obedo ŋa, ame myero owore-nono? Dok onwoŋo ŋo ka wan okwae?’" 
Job21:16 Kara mom gumgi-nono tye pirgi kengi, an mom aromo gamo tam a jo areco kadi acel." 
Job21:17 “Tara a jo areco obedo neko pi kare aŋo? Ame can te poto i komgi? Ame Obaŋa te, miyogi bedo kede rem?" 
Job21:18 Eka ote bedo calo reŋ kal ame yamo kolo, onyo acalo cuŋ kal ame yamo kolo?" 
Job21:19 Wun ikobo wunu ni Obaŋa kano rocgi pi itinogi. Myero en culgi gin ikomgi, me oniaŋ iye." 
Job21:20 Myero gin onen can ame opoto i komgi kede waŋgi, myero gin daŋ obil akemo a Won Twer Ducu." 
Job21:21 Kara ŋa ame gin dok paro i kom kwacgi ame odoŋ i ŋegi, ka dwete me bedogi i lobo doŋ ogik oko?" 
Job21:22 Ŋa ame twero pwonyo Obaŋa me bedo aryek, kun en ŋolli jo a tye malo i polo kop?" 
Job21:23 Jo mogo ame pwod tekogi dwoŋ ata, ame otye aber i kuc," 
Job21:24 kun komgi moo keken, dok amurogi oŋwel olil alila," 
Job21:25 ento jo ocele to ame cwercuny ociro oko, kun mom obilo ginnoro aber me lobo." 
Job21:26 Obuto piny iyi apua, kun kudi omwono komgi oko." 
Job21:27 “Nen ba, an aŋeo tamwu, kede yikwu me timo gin arac koma." 
Job21:28 Wun ibedo penyo wunu ni, ‘Ot adwoŋ kara tye kwene? Kema a yam jo areco bedo iye tye kwene?’" 
Job21:29 Mom ibedo penyo wunu jo ame beo iyo, mom ibedo gamo wunu koppogo ame gin ko bo iyo," 
Job21:30 ame kobo ni dano arac otwero weko i nino me can, dok ni otwero laro oko i kare me akemo," 
Job21:31 Ŋat ame twero yabo kite luŋ kannaler, dok ŋa a twero cule pi gin ame en otimo?" 
Job21:32 Ka-ce okano kome i bur, jo bedo kuro lyellere akura," 
Job21:33 Lobo ame tye i luŋ mitte meicel, jo luŋ ciro lubo yore, lwak jo-atelo nyime mom kwanne," 
Job21:34 Kara doŋ wun itwero kweyo wunu cunya i kop a tere mom? I kom kop ame ibedo gamo wunu luŋ, mom tye ginnoro iye kadi acel kono goba keken!”" 
Job22:1 Erifaji me Teman dok te gamo ni," 
Job22:2 “Dano twero konyo Obaŋa i yore moro? Iyi ateni, ŋat aryek konyere kene." 
Job22:3 Ka ce kiteni atira, mannono twero miyo Won Twer Ducu bedo i yomcunnyoro. Onyo en twero nwoŋo ginnoro ka ce balloro mom i komi?" 
Job22:4 Itamo ni en tye ka juki pien ilwore, me wek ecak ŋolli kop oko?" 
Job22:5 Balli mom dwoŋ atek bo? Balli ka agikki mere mom. 
Job22:6 Pien imio omegoni ocikere nononono, dok igonyo boŋo oko i komgi ote doŋ onoro," 
Job22:7 Mom imio pii amata baŋ jo ool, itwono jo ame kec oneko kwon me acama," 
Job22:8 Jo atek keken en onwoŋo tye kede lobogi, kun jo ame jo pwo keken en a bedo iye." 
Job22:9 Mon a coggi oto iryemo woto cingi nono, ituro-gu bad itino kic oko." 
Job22:10 Mannono omio owic tye oguri oko dyere, twon lworo adwoŋ te ru maki oko," 
Job22:11 leroni odoko acol oko, omio mom iromo neno piny, pii te mol mwonyi oko." 
Job22:12 “Obaŋa mom tye malo i polo? Koŋ inen acer ame tye malo kuno kite ame beco kede. 
Job22:13 Mannono omio itye ka kobo ni, Obaŋa kara ŋeo ŋo? Dok ni itwero ŋolo kop i kan acol bo?" 
Job22:14 Pol ocido wumo kome oko, ame mio en mom twero neno piny. En woto naka i lak polo." 
Job22:15 Pwod itwo giri atwoa i yo acon, yo ame jo otim tim areco bedo lubo?" 
Job22:16 Rik obin occogi oko kun karegi mom ru oromo, acakki tere ame gin ocibo pii omolo oko." 
Job22:17 Gin okobbi Obaŋa ni, ‘Ya oko i baŋwa’, dok ni, ‘Ŋo ce ame Won Twer Ducu twero timo i komwa?’" 
Job22:18 Kadi amannono, en mio jami abeco poŋ i udigi, an mom aromo gamo tam a jo areco kadi acel." 
Job22:19 Jo a kitegi atira neno i yomcuny, jo a mom i balloro nyerogi apala apala," 
Job22:20 kun okobo ni, ‘Omio doŋ nyiŋ okworwa orwenyo oko i wi lobo, gin ame gin oweko mac owaŋo oko.’ ”" 
Job22:21 “Note Obaŋa, me ibed i kuc, bino miyo gin aber bino i ciŋi." 
Job22:22 Gam pwonnyere, gwok kop a en okobbi i cunyi." 
Job22:23 Ka ce idwogo baŋ Won Twer Ducu kun ibedo mwol nyime, ka ce mom iye kite a mom atira obedo i kemani luŋ," 
Job22:24 ka ce iketo jabu piny iyi apua, kede jabu me Opir i akina gweŋe i cuny kulo," 
Job22:25 dok ka Won Twer Ducu en a tye acalo jabuni, kede ryalli ame imaro meicel," 
Job22:26 cunyi bino bedo yom i kom Won Twer Ducu, ite tiŋo waŋi malo baŋ Obaŋa." 
Job22:27 Yin ibino kwaye, en bino winyo kwacci, yin ite cobo kwoŋ a rik ikwoŋo." 
Job22:28 Ginnoro luŋ ame ibino timo bino cobere aber, nyimi bino bedo aler." 
Job22:29 Pien Obaŋa dwoko jo ame wakere piny, cite en laro jo amwol." 
Job22:30 En laro jo a mom i balloro, en bino lari pien ciŋi cil.”" 
Job23:1 Yubu dok te gamo ni," 
Job23:2 “Kokona tin daŋ pwod kec, kadi cur ocira oko, ciŋe pwod onua oko." 
Job23:3 Kono onwoŋo aŋeo kan ame myero anwoŋe iye, ame twero miyo awoto naka kan a en bedo iye, do ber," 
Job23:4 Onwoŋo atwero pido koppa i nyime, ate rado koppa luŋ i nyime." 
Job23:5 Onwoŋo atwero winyo kite ame en twero gamo kede koppa, ate niaŋ gin ame en bino kobba." 
Job23:6 En kono opyem keda i twerrere luŋ? Pe gire, en kono oketo cunye i winyo koppa." 
Job23:7 Ŋat ame kite atira onwoŋo oromo laro kede kop kuno, aŋol koppa kono omio aloo kop atwal." 
Job23:8 “Nen, an awoto anyim, cite en mom tye kuno, adok-gu ceŋ, mom atwero nwoŋe," 
Job23:9 Ayenye naka i ciŋa tuŋ cam, mom atwero nene, alokere tuŋ cem daŋ, ento mom aneno," 
Job23:10 Cite en ŋeo yo ame an alubo, ka ce en otema, abino wok odoco calo jabu," 
Job23:11 Tyena doŋ omoko oko i yore, abedo lubo yore keken kun mom agak teŋe." 
Job23:12 Mom aweko gwoko cik ame en ociko kede doge, kop luŋ ame en okobo akanogi luŋ i cunya calo lonyo." 
Job23:13 En mom lokere, kara ŋa ame romo loko tammere? Gin ame en mito, en ame en tio," 
Job23:14 En gire bino cobo gin ame en oyiko pira, kodi jami acalo mannono tye apol i cunye." 
Job23:15 Mannono mio koyo onyere i koma meicel i nyime, ka atamo pire lworo maka meicel." 
Job23:16 Obaŋa omio cunya opoto meicel, Won Twer Ducu omio koyo oonyere i koma meicel." 
Job23:17 Pien colpiny orida doŋ oko, piny acol icuc owumo waŋa oko.”" 
Job24:1 “Piŋo kara Won Twer Ducu en a gwoko kare me ŋolo kop, doŋ pino jo ame ŋec, mom neno nino mere-nono?" 
Job24:2 Dano tye ka koko bo apok waŋ kio oko, omao dok a jo ocele ote cako kwayo." 
Job24:3 Oryemo kana otino kic, omio dako a cware oto jeno twonnere baŋgi," 
Job24:4 Ocan daŋ pono apona, pien oryemogi oko i yoe adoŋo," 
Job24:5 Koŋ inen doŋ owoto i ka tic, kun orom aroma i kana me tim, oyenyo cam me acamagi i tim ata, pi itinogi ame nwoŋo kec ociro." 
Job24:6 Obedo rayo camgi araa i potti a jo, odedepo daŋ nyig olok a jo areco." 
Job24:7 Obuto komgi nono dyewor luŋ, i kare me koyo daŋ mom otye i ginnoro me geno komgi." 
Job24:8 Kot ame ya i wi kiddi pwodogi, ote kwako kor gweŋ keken pien ka gwokere nwoŋo pe," 
Job24:9 Tye daŋ jo akwanyo otino kic oko i kor totogi, dok daŋ ogamo otino ocan me ajeŋa i banya," 
Job24:10 Owoto onoro aboŋo boŋo moro i komgi, owutte arita kal apek meicel kun kec ocirogi oko," 
Job24:11 Obedo biyo moo jeituni i potti a jo areco, obedo nyono olok i bar kun oryo ocirogi oko," 
Job24:12 Twaro a jo oto winyere kun pello i tuŋ boma, dano owane kok ni kono okonye, kadi amannono Obaŋa gire paro pi winyo kwacgi." 
Job24:13 “Tye daŋ jo mogo ame dag neno lero, ame mom ŋeo tic i lero, olworo tiyo tic kede oko," 
Job24:14 Anek ya iwor me wot neko ocan kede ŋat a piny oloo, dyewor en nwoŋo tye acalo akwo." 
Job24:15 Acod cot daŋ kuro piny doko iribiribi, kun kobo ni, ‘Ŋattoro mom bino nena; eka te geno waŋe oko.’" 
Job24:16 Dyeceŋ gin obedo cegere acega i ot, kun mom oneno waŋ ceŋ, ento dyewor ote bedo turo udi a jo." 
Job24:17 Pien piny acol icuc bergi calo odiko, colpiny a jo lworo-ni, gin omaro meicel." 
Job24:18 “Wun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Pii gire mollogi oko oyotoyot, lobogi oceno doŋ oko, apakaca moro mom yenyo tic i poto olokgi.’" 
Job24:19 Ceŋ kede lyeto meo pii oko, amannono daŋ, abalo rwenyo oko i lyel." 
Job24:20 Wi jo te wil oko i komgi i dye boma, kun ŋattoro mom dok poyo nyingi kadi acel." 
Job24:21 “Owuno mon oraŋa, a mom onywal meicel, mom daŋ otimo ginnoro aber baŋ mon a coggi oto." 
Job24:22 Ento Obaŋa i teko mere medde me miyo wegi twer perakino, oya malo kun cunygi doŋ oya oko me bedo kwo." 
Job24:23 En gwokogi kun daŋ konyogi, kun ciko waŋe i gin ame gin timo." 
Job24:24 Otinogi malo kare anok ote rwenyo oko, oner ote two oko calo doo, oŋolo wigi oko calo kal." 
Job24:25 Ka ce mom amannono, ŋa atwero nyuto ni an agoba, kun cimo ni gin ame akobo mom tye kakare.”" 
Job25:1 Bildad dano me Cua te gamo ni," 
Job25:2 “Loc obedo me Obaŋa, dok en daŋ olworo alwora, en a mio kuc bedo tye malo polo." 
Job25:3 Wel monnyere romo kwanne? Jo mene ame ceŋ Obaŋa mom menyogi? 
Job25:4 Kara dano doŋ twero bedo a kite atira i yore aŋo i nyim Obaŋa? Dano ame dako onywalo twero bedo acil i yore aŋo? 
Job25:5 Koŋ inen, akadi dwe-gu mom ryeny acil i nyime, naka acer daŋ amannono." 
Job25:6 Kara doŋ dano kono bino bedo niŋo ba, en ame dano obedo kudi ata-ni?”" 
Job26:1 Yubu dok te gamo ni," 
Job26:2 “Kite ame ikonyo kede ŋat ame twerrere mom! Kite ame ikonyo kede ciŋ dano ame teko daŋ mom iye! 
Job26:3 Kite ame ikonyo kede ŋat a ryeko mere mom, kun ititte ŋec me ateni apol ata." 
Job26:4 Ŋa obedo konyi i kop luŋ ame ibedo kobo, dok kit cuny ame itye kede-nono ŋa omi?" 
Job26:5 “Tipo a jo ame tye piny i te lobo kom myel amyela, pii kede jami luŋ a tye iye tye kede lworo." 
Job26:6 Lyel me Ceol tye yie nono i nyim Obaŋa, kan a jo oto bedo iye mom tye kede ginnoro me wumo wie," 
Job26:7 En oryeo piny i tuŋ to, i dye yamo ata, mom daŋ oŋabo lobo i kom ginnoro," 
Job26:8 Tweo-gu pii malo i kom pol ocido icuc, pol mom yec kadi acel i tere pi pek a pii." 
Job26:9 En wumo waŋ dwe oko, eka te yaro pollere oko." 
Job26:10 En otyeko coyo gin aluluŋ i wi pii, i waŋ apokki ame poko lero kede kan acol icuc." 
Job26:11 Pii luŋ ame tye i polo ocuŋ iye, ka en ojukogi, gin owuro meicel." 
Job26:12 En mio pii nam liŋ mot pi teko mere, pi ryeko mere omio en ogoo Rakab." 
Job26:13 Weo me doge omio polo oyabere te nen acil, enocobo twon twol aŋeo paŋŋere meicel." 
Job26:14 Koŋ inen, mannono kom pwod lak gin ame en tio, wan kom pwod owinyo calo kop ame omuŋo amuŋa. Cite ka teko mere omwoc calo kot, ŋa a romo niaŋ iye.”" 
Job27:1 Yubu te medde dok i koppere, kun kobo ni," 
Job27:2 “Kite ame Obaŋa tye kede kwo-ni, ame okwanyo twer ame an atye kede, kede Won Twer Ducu ame omio cunya kec wok-ki," 
Job27:3 ka ce pwod wee me” kwo tye i koma, dok cuny Obaŋa daŋ pwod tye i wuma," 
Job27:4 kop me goba mom bino doonyo i doga, mom daŋ abino bwolo ŋattoro kadi acel." 
Job27:5 Mom abino ye kadi acelni kopwa tye kakare, myero ato ame mom aloko kita kadi acel." 
Job27:6 Abino lido kitena atira, kun mom aweko kadi acel, aŋeo atira i cunya-ni mom atye kede nino moro i kwona ame lewic twero maka iye." 
Job27:7 “Mi okworra luŋ obed calo otim tim areco, dok jo ame mito lweny i koma bed calo jo a kitegi reco." 
Job27:8 Kara ŋat a mom ŋeo Obaŋa tye kede gen aŋo; ka Obaŋa doŋ omio waŋe orwenyo oko, ame en doŋ okwanyo kwo mere oko?" 
Job27:9 Ce ni Obaŋa bino winyo koko mere, ka ce en opoto i peko moro?" 
Job27:10 Cunye bino bedo ayom i kom Won Twer Ducu? En bino kwayo Obaŋa kare luŋ? 
Job27:11 Abino pwonyowu kop i kom twer Obaŋa, mom abino kano ginnoro ame Won Twer tye kede." 
Job27:12 Nen ba, wun luŋ doŋ ityeko neno wunu kede waŋwu, kara piŋo dok iloko wunu odoko gin a konnyere mom?" 
Job27:13 “Man en gin ame Obaŋa opokki lo arac, dok en gin ame owun jo nwoŋo i baŋ Won Twer Ducu." 
Job27:14 Ka ce itino mere onya, onekogi oko i pala lweny ikwae daŋ mom bedo i cam ame romogi," 
Job27:15 Jo ame en oto oweko kwo, too edeke neko oko, mongi mom kokogi." 
Job27:16 Kadi bed en dwoŋ i lim meicel calo kwoyo, dok boŋŋi mere oyido rom mene;" 
Job27:17 en twero loko gire, cite jo a kitegi atira en abino ruko, jo a balloro mom i komgi en abino poko limmere," 
Job27:18 Ot ame en ogero bino bedo calo boo otyetyem, onyo peru ame akur winyo i poto ogomo," 
Job27:19 Donyo i kabuto kun pwod olony, cite mom te medde bedo kittono, en bino co i waŋ nino nwoŋo lonyo doŋ mom." 
Job27:20 Lworo te onyere i kome calo abwal pii; dyewor yamo ajuru te bino tere oko," 
Job27:21 Yamo oya i tuŋ kide bino tiŋe te tere oko, kun kwanye oko i kabedo mere," 
Job27:22 Bino kodo i kome aboŋo kica, te miyo en riŋo adwimme bwot i ciŋe." 
Job27:23 Yamo te ŋur calo ŋat a bapo ciŋe i yore, dok acalo ŋat ame tye ajwiye i yore.”" 
Job28:1 “Ateni, bur ame okunyo ryal iye tye, kede kan olio iye jabu." 
Job28:2 Nyonyo okunyo i lobo, mola ya i kom gweŋe." 
Job28:3 Dano yenyogi aboŋo paro pi piny acol, obedo yenyo naka i agikki lobo, oyenyo gwen i mutu ame col icuc." 
Job28:4 Okunyo bur i luŋ kan a jo mom beo iye, jo ame woto i yo wigi wil oko i komgi, oŋabogi malo kan a jo mom iye ote bedo lyero kuno," 
Job28:5 Aco lobo en ame ceko cam me acama, kun i tere piny omumuko oko calo gin amuko i mac." 
Job28:6 I akina gweŋe tye iye gwen capir, kede apua ame ya iye jabu." 
Job28:7 “Yo nono acut mom ŋeo, dok ocecu daŋ mom ru oneno." 
Job28:8 Dok tyen leyi me tim ame wakere wok-ki mom ru onyono, eŋatu daŋ mom ru obeo iye." 
Job28:9 “Dano cwao ciŋe naka i kidi atek wok-ki, muko naka twoni kiddi mogo adoŋodoŋo i tergi piny," 
Job28:10 Tuco yo pii beo i akina kiddi, kun waŋe bit i ginnoro luŋ me wel." 
Job28:11 Culo yo pii daŋ oko eka pii i kulo mom te mol, en kelo gin okano kannaler oko." 
Job28:12 “Ento ryeko kara nwoŋere kwene? Dok niaŋ atut bedo kwene ba? 
Job28:13 Dano gire mom ŋeo yome wot iye, dok daŋ mom nwoŋere i lobo a jo akwo," 
Job28:14 Kut nam kobo ni, ‘Mom gire tye baŋa’, nam daŋ ni mom tye baŋe." 
Job28:15 Lim abup meicel daŋ mom romo wilo, mom tye ginnoro ame oromo wilo kede." 
Job28:16 Akadi jabu me Opir daŋ mom oromo poro kede, mom daŋ tye kit gweŋŋoro me wel ame oromo poro kede." 
Job28:17 Jabu kede gilaci mom daŋ twero bedo aroromo kede, mom daŋ oromo loko tigo ŋut me jabu ame olio aber meicel." 
Job28:18 Mom oromo poro i tigo moro me wel, arema onyo atar, wel me wilo ryeko malo kato me jami luŋ me wel." 
Job28:19 Gwen topaj ame nwoŋere Eciopia mom oromo poro kede naka jabu ame olio acil odoco daŋ mom oromo wilo kede. 
Job28:20 “Kara ryeko doŋ ya i kwene ba? dok niaŋ atut bedo kwene? 
Job28:21 Okanne meicel ame wan ŋattoro mom romo neno, dok owumere ame winy a twarre malo mom romo neno." 
Job28:22 Lyel a jo oto kede to kobo ka ni, ‘Wan owinyo ka kop i kome keken.’" 
Job28:23 ‘Obaŋa en a ŋeo yo me wot iye, dok daŋ ŋeo kabedo mere.’" 
Job28:24 Pien en neno naka iyi agikki me lobo, en neno jami luŋ a tye piny i te polo." 
Job28:25 Kare ame en rik omoko iye kite ame peko a yamo myero bed kede, kun nyuto kan ame pii me nam myero gik iye," 
Job28:26 kare ame en rik oketo iye cik a mako kot, kun nyuto kit yo ame kot a mor myero lubi," 
Job28:27 en rik oneno te tito pire, oŋio odoco, te doŋ moko ni myero bed tye.”" 
Job28:28 Obaŋa te kobbi dano ni, “Nen ba, bedo i lworo i kom Rwot en a mio ryeko, luŋŋi tim arac yo en a kelo niaŋ atut.”" 
Job29:1 Yubu omedde i koppere kun kobo ni," 
Job29:2 “Lobo wirre ateni, kono kom onwoŋo atye kite a rik atye kede con ca, i kare ame rik Obaŋa gwoka iye ca;" 
Job29:3 kare ame tara mere bedo lyel i wia malo, ame rik lero Obaŋa bedo mennya yo ka awot i piny acol." 
Job29:4 “I kare-naca rik atye aber meicel, mar Obaŋa mom rwenyo i kemana," 
Job29:5 i kare ame Won Twer Ducu pwod tye baŋa, otinona daŋ pwod bedo i ŋeta;" 
Job29:6 ame ka rik tyena ogudo piny olwoko i cak, ame moo rik mol amola calo pii a wukere i lela." 
Job29:7 Kare ame ka awoto i dogcel ka ŋolo kop, ka ayiko kabedona i dye boma ka poro kop," 
Job29:8 awobe ka onena owoto oko teŋe, jo adoŋo ya malo te cuŋ acuŋa;" 
Job29:9 aco rwode koŋ liŋ oko, kun oketo cingi i doggi," 
Job29:10 dwon jo adoŋo lin oko, lebgi te moko oko i dangi." 
Job29:11 Ŋat owinyo kop i koma, cako lwoŋa ni, akome gum, ka onena i waŋe te doŋ moko amoka." 
Job29:12 Pien rik alaro ocan ka ce akok, karacel itino kic ame jo a konyo mom." 
Job29:13 Jo luŋ ame mito to kwaya winyo, rik amio mon ame coggi oto wero pi yomcuny." 
Job29:14 Rik arukere i kite atira ame buro koma oko, ŋolo kop atira rik calo jor kede tok ame mom rwenyo i baŋa." 
Job29:15 An rik acalo waŋ me neno piny baŋ jo a waŋgi oto, dok rik acalo tyen me wot baŋ jo oŋwalo," 
Job29:16 Rik daŋ atye acalo apap baŋ ocan, acwako naka pido a lo a mom aŋeo." 
Job29:17 Alwenyo i tekona luŋ i jo a kitegi mom atira, abedo laro jo i cingi oko calo ŋat omao lee i dog eŋatu." 
Job29:18 Rik ate tamo ni abino to i pacona, kun nino me kwona i lobo pol calo kwoyo," 
Job29:19 dok rom aroma i yat ame lwite obakere atata i ŋet kulo, ame toyo mom rwenyo i jane dyewor luŋ," 
Job29:20 kun kwogona tye kite acel kare ducu, dok tekona mom dok piny." 
Job29:21 “Jo yam ka owinyo koppa, liŋ oko mot, kun otero yitgi me winyo tam ame amiyogi." 
Job29:22 Ka an doŋ akobo gin mom dok gamo koppa, koppa rik tye calo kot ame oony i komgi." 
Job29:23 Rik okuro koppa calo jo ame kuro kot, ogamo tam i baŋa calo jo ame mato pii kot me iporo." 
Job29:24 Ka abwonyo, gin mom ye ni abwonyo, obedo neno waŋa naka, kun mom omito ni cunya waŋ." 
Job29:25 An a rik anyuttigi yo a myero olub kun an abedo calo rwotgi, an abedo calo abaka ame tye i akina monnyere, calo ŋat ame kweo cuny jo a koko danogi i oto.”" 
Job30:1 “Cite aman an doŋ adoko gi-anyera a jo ame ageo nennigi waŋ ceŋ, ame papagi rik aneno acalo jo apiny meicel, ame mom daŋ aromo porogi i gwogi ame gwoko rommina." 
Job30:2 Kony aŋo ame onwoŋo aromo nwoŋo i teko me cingi, gin jo ame teko me komgi doŋ otum oko-ni?" 
Job30:3 Peko me kec oridogi meicel kede can, omiogi ogweno gigi mogo otwo i tim ata," 
Job30:4 obedo pwopwono pot awaca kede pot yennogo me buŋ, dok ocamo anaka lwit yen." 
Job30:5 Otye ka ryemogi oko i akina jo, ocele, jo cokogi bala jo ame acoko akwo," 
Job30:6 Obedo doŋ i akina burre mogo ame tye i luŋ, kede burrogo ocele, naka iyi aduu." 
Job30:7 Okok i buŋ calo leyi, gin luŋ ocokere karacel te okuto." 
Job30:8 Gin obedo itino a jo amiŋ ame mom ŋeo kan oya iye, jo ame rik oryemo oko i lobowa." 
Job30:9 “Aman doŋ an adoko gi-aweragi, nyiŋa doŋ mom rwenyo i doggi." 
Job30:10 Cunygi owuka oko, mom omito noko ŋeta kadi acel, onyeto lao i nyima aboŋo lworo moro." 
Job30:11 Pien Obaŋa otyeko tekona odoco, omio adoko amwol oko, omio gin doŋ mom oromo jukere kengi ka otye i nyima." 
Job30:12 Owotegi tye otware i koma i ciŋa tuŋ cem, otye ka ryema oko teŋe, otye oyenyo yo me neka oko." 
Job30:13 Otwoda doŋ dyere aboŋo yo moro me put, otye ka medo can i koma ameda, aboŋo ŋattoro ame twero jukogi." 
Job30:14 Okato i koma calo jo abeo i dogcel alac meicel, ote bedo lora ni kuŋ kuŋ i wi odur." 
Job30:15 Lworo te lunyo lokere i koma an, kwogona te rwenyo oko calo gin a yamo okolo, kuc onwoŋo atye kede daŋ te rwenyo calo pol." 
Job30:16 “Aman doŋ cunya poto apota, kare me can doŋ otuno oko i koma." 
Job30:17 Koma doŋ bedo mwoda amwoda dyewor, rem doŋ mom weka kare kadi acel." 
Job30:18 Omako boŋona i teko meicel, orida doŋ calo ŋut kanyina." 
Job30:19 Obaŋa doŋ obola oko piny i coto, acalo doŋ apua onyo buru." 
Job30:20 “An akok baŋi, ento yin mom igamo doga, ka acuŋ-gu i nyimi, mom iparo pira." 
Job30:21 Idoko doŋ ager agera i koma, iwuna meicel i ciŋi atek." 
Job30:22 Itiŋa malo i yamo, ariŋo doŋ iye calo gadigadi, yamo doŋ lolla i piny kun kot amor amora." 
Job30:23 An gire aŋeo ni ibino tera naka i to, i ot ame jo akwo luŋ rwatte iye." 
Job30:24 “Kadi amannono, ŋat orette piny i wi odur myero kur rye ciŋe? Ŋat a tye i peko myero mom kok ni konye bo?" 
Job30:25 An rik mom akok pi dano a tye i can bo? Cunya mom ocwer pi ocan bo? 
Job30:26 Rik ka ayenyo gin aber, gin arac en a lunyo bino, ka atye akuro lero, piny dok wumere awuma." 
Job30:27 Cunya doŋ bedo poto apota kun mom koŋ kwe, kare me can doŋ obino oko me bino rwatte keda." 
Job30:28 Arimo piny i boŋo cola, cite ŋattoro mom kweo cunya, aya-gu malo i ka cokere ate koko kony." 
Job30:29 Ekwe en a doŋ tye acalo omegona, udu te bedo calo owotena." 
Job30:30 Del koma doŋ cido acol icuc te bwatte oko, lyeto doŋ waŋo cogona awaŋa." 
Job30:31 Opukka doŋ odoko me goyo wer me koko, nyamulere winyere doŋ calo dwon ŋat akok.”" 
Job31:1 “Atyeko doŋ cikere oko waŋa, kara dok atwero bolo i kom nyan a mom oŋeye i co i yore aŋo?" 
Job31:2 Kara doŋ gin aŋo ame Obaŋa bino pokka malo i polo? Gin aŋo ame aromo nwoŋo me bedo mega i baŋ Won Twer Ducu? 
Job31:3 Can mom poto i kom ŋat a kite mom atira bo? Peko moro mom poto i kom atim tim arac bo? 
Job31:4 Obaŋa mom neno kite ame abedo kede luŋ bo? En mom kwano ginnoro luŋ ame an atimo? 
Job31:5 “Ka ce yam abedo kobo kop goba, kun koma mit me wot bwolo jo," 
Job31:6 myero pima i mijan me pimo jami kakare, me Obaŋa ŋe ni cunya ler." 
Job31:7 Ka ce yam agak oko i yo ame myero alubi, kun cunya mito timo gin ame waŋa oneno, dok ka ce toŋŋoro me bal tye i ciŋa," 
Job31:8 jo ocele en ame myero can gin ame an acoo, cam ame tye ka doŋo i potona myero put oko." 
Job31:9 “Ka ce cunya onwoŋo atera kom dako moro, ka abedo liba dako awota doggola mere," 
Job31:10 dakona myero wot reggi lo ocele kal, jo ocele en a myero but kede," 
Job31:11 Pien mannono kono obedo twon bal arac meicel, bal ame oŋolkop en a myero ŋol cannere," 
Job31:12 pien mannono twero bedo rom i mac a waŋ nakanaka, ame onwoŋo twero waŋo cam ocek i potona luŋ." 
Job31:13 “Ka ce akwero winyo pido opiina onyo me aŋecana, ka ce gin okelo koko moro i koma," 
Job31:14 ka abino timo ŋo ka Obaŋa oya me ŋolo kop i koma? Ka en bino penyo koppere, abino gamo doge nino?" 
Job31:15 Mom ŋat oketa i yi totta en a daŋ oketo opiina? Mom ŋat acellono en ocweo wan luŋ iyi totowa? 
Job31:16 “Yam atwono acannoro ginnoro ame en onwoŋo amito, onyo amio dako moro a cware oto okuro piny nono?" 
Job31:17 Onyo ca abedo camo cema kena, kun atin kiccoro mom obilo?" 
Job31:18 Aco an Obaŋa obedo gwoka kun pwod atidi calo pappa, en obedo tela cakere iyi totta." 
Job31:19 Rik aneno ŋattoto ame can boŋo ociro, onyo acannoro a mom tye i gi-wumere ame mom ate konyo?" 
Job31:20 Ka ce en yam mom okwao winyo moro pira i cunye, kun amie boŋo apek alyet ame otio i yer romo." 
Job31:21 Ka ce yam awuno ŋattoro a mom i bal, kun ageno ni oŋolkop i dogcel bino miyo aloo kop." 
Job31:22 Ka ce yam atimo amannono, wi gwoka myero mukere oko i te weta, bada myero putte oko i waŋ nyor." 
Job31:23 Pien an onwoŋo alworo can oya i baŋ Obaŋa, onwoŋo mom atwero tiŋo waŋa me neno kwogo mere." 
Job31:24 “Rik aluŋo genna luŋ i kom lim bo? onyo ca rik aloko lim odoko ka larrena? 
Job31:25 Ka ce rik cunya yom pien lonyona onwoŋo bup, onyo pien lim onya i ciŋa." 
Job31:26 Ka ce rik aneno ceŋ kun aryeny, onyo dwe kun woto i twon kwogo mere adwoŋ," 
Job31:27 eka ote wayo tamma me cako worogi i muŋ, kun aryeo ciŋa amotogi." 
Job31:28 Magi-nono daŋ nwoŋo myero bed bal ame oŋolkop en a myero ŋol can pirgi, pien onwoŋo atwero bedo agoba baŋ Obaŋa ame tye malo." 
Job31:29 “Ka ce yam alelo alela i kare ame akworra opoto i can, onyo anatte gira aŋata i kare ame gin arac opoto i kome;" 
Job31:30 aco doga gira yam mom otimo balloro i kome, pien mom alamere ni kono okwanyo kwo mere oko." 
Job31:31 Ka ce jo i kemana mom openyo ni, ‘Ŋa atye kuno ame mom ocamo riŋo oyen?’" 
Job31:32 Mom tye arokkoro ame obuto i dye boma ata, an ayabi jo ame woto i yo oda." 
Job31:33 Mom abedo muŋo i jo gin arac ame atimo, kun akano balla i cunya." 
Job31:34 Pien an onwoŋo abedo lworo lwak atek meicel, rik mom abedo liŋ aliŋa kun mom adonyo oko i oda, pi lworo acae a jo me doggola moro." 
Job31:35 Kono onwoŋo tye ŋattoro ame winyo koppa! An en doŋ aketo ciŋa oko-ni, ‘Won Twer Ducu myero doŋ gam doga.’ Kono akwora onwoŋo ocoo kop edota kede acoa." 
Job31:36 Kono onwoŋo gire mom orwenyo i wi gwoka, kono abedo yon kede ayona calo tok kwogo." 
Job31:37 Kono atitte ginnoro luŋ amako kwona, kono abino i nyime calo rwot." 
Job31:38 “Kono lobbna yam obedo kok i koma, dok waŋ kia luŋ iye daŋ okok i koma karacel," 
Job31:39 kono yam abedo camo gin ocek iye aboŋo culo ginnoro pire, ate miyo-gu wegi mere to oko," 
Job31:40 dok ate miyo okuto tu iye akaka ŋano, kede onyekmon akaka kal.” Kop a Yubu doŋ ogik oko kan." 
Job32:1 Jo adek-ki mom dok omedde gamo doŋ Yubu, pien en oŋeo gire ni kite atira." 
Job32:2 Mannono te miyo akemo mako Eliku wot a Barakel, dano me Buj, me doggola a Ram oko. Akemo onwoŋo omake i kom Yubu ni pien en tye ka dwore kene ni koppere en atira, akato Obaŋa." 
Job32:3 Akemo daŋ onwoŋo omake i kom owote a Yubu adek ca, pien gamo kop a Yubu oloogi oko, omio oweko Obaŋa pwod nen acalo abal." 
Job32:4 Eliku obedo liŋ kare alac kun mom gamo dog Yubu pien gin luŋ onwoŋo odito okate oko. 
Job32:5 Cite i kare ame Eliku oneno ni jo adek-ki mom doŋ agamo kop a Yubu, akemo te make oko." 
Job32:6 Eliku wot a Barakel me Buj te cako gamo kop ni, “An kono pwod atidi, cite wun doŋ ibedo wunu jo adoŋo, mannono omio woki an abedo kede lworo, mom adio cunya me titiwu gin ame aŋeo," 
Job32:7 An abedo kobo ni, ‘Wek jo oteggo kob kopgi, jo a mwakagi bup kobo kop me ryeko.’" 
Job32:8 Cite cuny ame dano tye kede, ame obedo wee a Won Twer Ducu, en a mio dano niaŋ kop." 
Job32:9 Mom jo oteggo en aryek, mom daŋ jo oteggo en a niaŋ gin a tye kakare." 
Job32:10 Mannono akobbiwu ni, ‘Winy wunu koppa; weka wunu an daŋ anyuttiwu tamma.’" 
Job32:11 “Nen ba, an abedo diyo cunya winyo kop ikobbo wunu, abedo ciko yita winyo kop me ryeko, kun atye ka yenyo kop me akoba." 
Job32:12 An onwoŋo ajalo tamma luŋ baŋwu, nen ba, ŋattoro i akinawa mom oloo Yubu." 
Job32:13 Gwokere wunu ba, me kur ikob wunu ni, inwoŋo wunu ryeko, Obaŋa gire en a myero loc, mom dano." 
Job32:14 Kop ame en obedo kobo mom onwoŋo okobo baŋa, mannono omio mom abino gamo koppere i kodikop ame ibedo kobbe wunu." 
Job32:15 “Doggi te two oko, mom ogamo doge kadi acel, kop a myero okob te loyogi oko." 
Job32:16 An myero abed diyo cunya kun akurogi ame gin oliŋ aliŋa, pien gin luŋ ocuŋ kuno kun mom dok ogamo kopporo?" 
Job32:17 An daŋ kon doŋ abino culo kop, an daŋ myero doŋ akob gin ame aŋeo." 
Job32:18 Pien an daŋ kop dwoŋ i cunya atek meicel, mom doŋ aromo diyo cunya kadi acel." 
Job32:19 Nen ba, cunya doŋ calo koŋo olok ame owumo wie oko, calo ocoe anyen ame amito yec oko." 
Job32:20 Mito akobi omi obed aber, myero anam doga, agam kop." 
Job32:21 Mom abino leŋere kadi acel baŋ ŋattoro, mom daŋ abino pako ŋattoro." 
Job32:22 Pien an mom aŋeo pako jo, kono nyo ŋat ocwea oneka oko con.”" 
Job33:1 “Aman doŋ ba, adwoŋ Yubu winy koppa, ter yiti iwiny kop akobo luŋ." 
Job33:2 Nen an doŋ acako kop oko, leba doŋ ocako lebo kop oko." 
Job33:3 Koppa nyuto ni cunya ler, gin aŋeo, leba bino kobo kite aŋeo kede ikokome." 
Job33:4 Cuny Obaŋa en oketa gira, weo a Won Twer Ducu en omia weo me kwo," 
Job33:5 Gam koppa ka ce itwero, rye koppi luŋ i yore i yore i nyima, nwoŋ ka cuŋŋi," 
Job33:6 Nen ba, an arom aroma kedi nyim Obaŋa, an daŋ ocwea i lobo." 
Job33:7 Nen ba, kur komi myel pi lwora, ciŋa mom bino nuyi okato kare." 
Job33:8 “Ateteni, yin gire ikobo kop i yita, atyeko doŋ winyo kop ame ikobo luŋ." 
Job33:9 Yin ikobo ni yin icil, dok rocci moro mom, ni yin icil odoco, dok balloro momi komi," 
Job33:10 Dok Obaŋa bedo yenyo kop i komi, dok tye ka teri acalo akworrere;" 
Job33:11 en doŋ orwako tyeni oko iyi kol, kun neno kabedo luŋ ame yin iwoto iye." 
Job33:12 “Nen ba, an atwero gamo mannono, ni yin mom ikobo kakare." 
Job33:13 Obaŋa dwoŋ kato dano oko, Piŋo yin imito pyem kede kun ikobo ni, ‘En gire mom bino gamo koppa moro ame an akobo’?" 
Job33:14 Pien Obaŋa kobo koppere i yore apapat, kadi bed dano mom niaŋ iye." 
Job33:15 Bino i waŋ lek, iyi anyuttogo ame nen dyewor, i caa ame nino mit kede wok-ki, kun nino oyuto waŋgi i kabutogi." 
Job33:16 Mannono en kare ame en muno kede i yit dano onino, kwenyorogi i yore ame mio komgi myel," 
Job33:17 me dano lokere wek timo gin arac, wakere mere daŋ gik oko," 
Job33:18 en a laro tipo a dano i lyel, gwoko kwo mere me mom neke i pala lweny." 
Job33:19 “En goo dano daŋ i rem i kabuto mere, kun mio kome mwode kare ducu," 
Job33:20 ame mio cunye mom mito cem, mittere me cam te rwenyo oko." 
Job33:21 Cako jony tuno ka riŋo i kome orwenyo oko ducu, cogo mogo i kome a yam mom nen cako doŋ guŋo oko." 
Job33:22 Kwo mere nwoŋo doŋ ceggi acega i lyel, dok nwoŋo daŋ ceggi acega i ciŋ anek jo." 
Job33:23 “Ka ce amalaika nwoŋo mom tye ame ocuŋ pire, ame tye i akina omalaika tutumia i tutumia, ame ticgi me noto dano kede Obaŋa, me nyutti dano gin aber ame myero etim," 
Job33:24 amalaika mere-nono twero time kica kun kobo ni, ‘Larre, me en kur wot piny i lyel, en doŋ otyeko nwoŋo gin me lakoro kwo mere." 
Job33:25 Mi riŋo kome roc dok anyen calo me atin, dwogo teko mere obed kite ame rik tye kede a pwod en awobi.’" 
Job33:26 Dano-nono doŋ cako kwayo Obaŋa, Obaŋa te gamo kwaccere, dano doŋ twero bino i nyim Obaŋa i yomcuny. Dano doŋ cako tito kite ame elarre kede baŋ jo." 
Job33:27 En wero wer i nyim jo kun kobo ni, ‘An rik abalo, ate gak weko timo gin a tye kakare oko, cite Obaŋa mom oketo can i koma a romi gin atimo.’" 
Job33:28 En olakoro kwona mom owoto piny i lyel, pwod oye an amedde bedo kwo kun aneno lero." 
Job33:29 “Nen ba, Obaŋa timo jami magi luŋ, en bedo lolle i dano kittono kare i kare," 
Job33:30 me wek ekwany kwo mere oko i lyel, me dano nen ceŋ me kwo." 
Job33:31 “Ter yiti, Yubu, me iwiny koppa, liŋ mot me akob koppa." 
Job33:32 Ka ce itye kede kopporo ame imito kobba, kobi, pien bino miyo abedo i yomcuny ka aniaŋ ni i mom i balloro." 
Job33:33 Ka ce kopporo pe, yin doŋ winy koppa, liŋ mot, me apwonyi kede ryeko.”" 
Job34:1 Eliku dok te kobo ni," 
Job34:2 “Winy wunu koppa, wun jo aryek, cik wunu yitwu iwiny wunu, wun jo ame tye kede ŋec;" 
Job34:3 pien dano temo kop kede yite, kite ame en bilo kede cam i doge." 
Job34:4 Myero oyer wunu gin ame tye kakare, myero omok wunu mene ame tye aber." 
Job34:5 Aman Yubu doŋ otyeko kobo ni, ‘An balla moro mom, cite Obaŋa ogamo twer ame atye kede oko;" 
Job34:6 bur ame tye i koma mom romo caŋ, kadi bed mom abalo ginnoro.’" 
Job34:7 Tye ŋattoro ocele acalo Yubu, ame mato acac calo pii," 
Job34:8 ame nywako yo otim tim areco, dok woto karacel i jo areco?" 
Job34:9 Pien en otyeko kobo ni, ‘Bedo tiyo gin ame yomoro cuny Obaŋa, mom gire konyo dano i ginnoro.’" 
Job34:10 “Pi mannono ba, winy wunu koppa wun jo ame tye i niaŋ atut, Obaŋa mom twero timo gin arac kadi acel, Won Twer Ducu mom timo ginnoro a mom tye kakare." 
Job34:11 En keto can i kom dano a rom i bal ame en otimo, dok en tero dano acel acel kun lubo kit kwo mere." 
Job34:12 Ateni Obaŋa gire mom romo timo ginnoro arac, Won Twer Ducu mom twero ŋolo i yore a mom atira." 
Job34:13 Ŋa omio lobo obedo i te loccere, dok ŋa omio wi podo luŋ obedo i te twerrere?" 
Job34:14 Kono en te kwanyo weo mere oko i lobo, te miyo yamo mere a jo wao cokere luŋ baŋe," 
Job34:15 ginnoro luŋ akwo te to awaŋe acel, dano te dok oko iyi apua." 
Job34:16 “Ka ce itye wunu i niaŋ atut, winy wunu kop man, winy wunu kop ame akobo." 
Job34:17 Ŋat ame mom mito ni ŋol kop atira twero bedo aloc? Yin itwero ŋolo kop loo dano a kite atira ame tye i twer," 
Job34:18 ŋat a twero kobbi abaka ni, ‘Yin konnyi pe’, onyo baŋ aloccoro ni, ‘Yin i dano arac;" 
Job34:19 ame mom dworo rwottoro, onyo ame mom paro pi alonyo kato acan, pien gin luŋ obedo tic me ciŋe?’" 
Job34:20 Dano twero to i kare moro keken, Obaŋa twero goyo rokkoro-ni i cuny dyewor te miyogi rwenyo oko, twoni jo atek ote daŋ tero oko kun ciŋ dano moro mom ogudo." 
Job34:21 “Pien waŋe mom rwenyo i kom gin ame dano timo, en neno kan ame en woto iye luŋ." 
Job34:22 Mom tye mutu moro onyo kan acol icuc, ame otim tim areco romo pono iye." 
Job34:23 Obaŋa mom oketo kare pi dano moro, me wot i nyime wek eŋolle kop." 
Job34:24 En turo dito a wegi twer aboŋo yenyo kop i komgi, eka te keto jo ocele me leyo kakargi." 
Job34:25 Pien nwoŋo en ŋeo ticgi luŋ, twero retogi i dyewor acel keken twergi te gik oko," 
Job34:26 En pwodogi i nyim lwak, pi gin areco ame gin otimo," 
Job34:27 pien nwoŋo gin ogak ote weko lube oko, kun mom dok oparo kadi acel pi timo gin ame en mito" 
Job34:28 mannono mio gin omio koko ocan winyere baŋ Obaŋa en te winyo koko a jo ame owuno. 
Job34:29 “Ka ce Obaŋa oliŋ gire mot, ŋa a twero kobo ni en otimo bal? Ka ce en okanne gire oko, ŋa a romo nene? Rokkene onyo ŋa ame romo nene?" 
Job34:30 Gin gire mom oromo geno dano a mom lworo Obaŋa me bedo aloc, onyo me bedo owic me ciko lwak." 
Job34:31 “Tye ŋattoro ame yam koŋ okobo baŋ Obaŋa ni, ‘An onwoŋo agak oko, cite mom dok abino nwoyo timo bal.’" 
Job34:32 Pwonya i gin ame an mom ru aneno, ka ce yam atimo bal, mom dok abino nwoyo timo?" 
Job34:33 Myero en ket can i komi ame opori, pien rik ikwero oko?" 
Job34:34 Pien yin gire a myero iyer, mom an. Yin myero itit gin ame iŋeo." 
Job34:35 Jo ame niaŋ atut kede oryeko ame owinyo koppa, gin luŋ obino kobba ni, ‘Yubu tye ka kobo koppere atata aboŋo ŋeccoro, kop ame akobo luŋ mom tye iye ginnoro me ryeko.’" 
Job34:36 Kono obedo temo Yubu kittono naka iyi agikki, kono ber, pien tye ka gamo kop acalo otim tim areco," 
Job34:37 Tye dok amedo tim me jem i kom ballere, tye-gu ababapo ciŋe nononono i akinawa, tye ka miyo koppere me anywar i kom Obaŋa medde ameda.”" 
Job35:1 Eliku dok te medde i koppere ni," 
Job35:2 “Pwod itye ka tamo ni koppi en a tye kakare? Yin itye ka kobo ni, ‘Twer ame itye kede ennono i nyim Obaŋa,’" 
Job35:3 omio itye ka kobo ni, ‘Kara nwoŋo atimo ŋo i komi? An akati i yore a ŋo ka ce an onwoŋo abedo timo bal?’" 
Job35:4 An abino gamo koppi kit man, karacel kede owoteni daŋ." 
Job35:5 Koŋ itiŋ waŋi inen polo, koŋ inen pol ame tye malo meicel kati oko-ni." 
Job35:6 Ka ce ibalo, gin aŋo ame nwoŋo yin itimo i kom Obaŋa? Dok ka balli doŋ omedde dwoŋ meicel, ŋo ame nwoŋo yin itimo i kome?" 
Job35:7 Ka ce kiteni atira, nwoŋo imie gin aŋo kono? Onyo ŋo ame nwoŋo ogamo i baŋi?" 
Job35:8 Gin arac ame itimo gudo dano wadwu ame cal kedi, kiteni atira daŋ konyo dano." 
Job35:9 “Jo cako koko pien nwoŋo doŋ owunogi meicel, ocako lwoŋo ni myero konygi pien ciŋ wegi twer nwoŋo doŋ ocirogi oko," 
Job35:10 Cite mom tye ŋattoro ame koŋ penyo ni, ‘Obaŋa ame oketa kara tye kwene ba, ame mio jo wero naka dyewor," 
Job35:11 ame pwonyowa kato leyi ame tye i wi lobo, ame miowa obedo aryek akato winy ame twarre malo?’" 
Job35:12 Gin okok baŋe i kuno, cite en mom gamo doggi, pi wakere a jo areco," 
Job35:13 Obaŋa gire mom winyo koko ame tere mom, Won Twer Ducu mom gire paro apara pire," 
Job35:14 Kara doŋ yin kono ka ikobo ni mom inene, ka ikobo ni pidoni tye i inyime, yin itye ka kuro!" 
Job35:15 Yin itamo ni Obaŋa ka akemo omako mom keto can i kom dano bo, dok en mom gire paro pi bal wok." 
Job35:16 Yubu ŋamo doge i kop atata, duro-gu kop aboŋo ŋeccoro.”" 
Job36:1 Eliku omedde i koppere, kun kobo ni," 
Job36:2 Di cunyi anonok me koŋ anyutti, pien pwod atye i gin a myero akob akaka Obaŋa." 
Job36:3 Abino tic i ŋec ame atye kede luŋ me nyuto ni ŋat ocweowa timo gin a tye atira. 
Job36:4 Me ateni, kop ame akobo-ni goba mom iye, ŋat a tye i ŋec aber odoco tye kedi." 
Job36:5 “Nen ba, Obaŋa tye kede twer, dok en mom cao ŋattoro, en tye kede twer ame ocuŋ i kom ŋec atut ame tye kede." 
Job36:6 En mom weko jo areco bedo kwo nakanaka, cite jo ame owuno en miogi twerogi a myero obed kede." 
Job36:7 Waŋe mom rwenyo i kom jo a kitegi atira, en ketogi ka loc calo obakki, gin te bedo malo kuno nakanaka." 
Job36:8 Cite ka otweogi kede jegere, ote ridogi oko i tol me awuna wuna," 
Job36:9 eka en te tittigi ticgi, kede rocgi, ni gin otye ka wakere." 
Job36:10 En mio yitgi yabere me winyo pwony, en te cikogi ni myero owek timo bal." 
Job36:11 Ka ce gin owinyo koppere ote cako wore, otyeko karegi odoŋ i yomcuny, kun otye aber," 
Job36:12 Cite ka ce gin okwero winyo koppere, oto i pala lweny, kun oto-gu aboŋo ŋeccoro." 
Job36:13 “Jo ame kop Obaŋa mom tye i cunygi, okano akemo i cunygi, ka ce en otweogi, gin mom okok baŋe." 
Job36:14 Kodi jonnono to con kun pwod otino, kun oto daŋ i lewic." 
Job36:15 Obaŋa laro jo owuno i can opoto i komgi-nono, en tio i can opoto i komginono me yabo waŋgi." 
Job36:16 “En omio iya oko i can, en oteri kan alac ame ginnoro mom tye iye ame dii, dok icamo iye gin amio keken." 
Job36:17 Cite aman itye ka nwoŋo kit cannoro luŋ ame oketo i kom otim tim areco, aman can ame oketo i komi doŋ omaki oko." 
Job36:18 Doŋ myero igwokere ba, me akemo kur mi idok anywar, can apek ame oketo i komi me lakoro yin kur mi igak oko," 
Job36:19 Koko gire mom romo kwanyo can i komi, kadi bed iket teko rom mene." 
Job36:20 Kur ibed paro dyewor, ame en kare ame omio nyiŋ rok apol rwenyo oko i wi lobo." 
Job36:21 Gwokere ba, kur ilokere idok itimo bal, pien mannono en okelo peko i komi." 
Job36:22 “Nen ba, teko Obaŋa dwoŋ meicel, ŋa kara obedo apwony a rom aroma kede?" 
Job36:23 Ŋa a yam koŋ obedo telo Rwot, onyo ŋa ame twero kobbe ni, ‘Yin itimo bal?’" 
Job36:24 “Myero ipo pi pake pi ticcere, ame cakere con jo obedo pake pire i wer." 
Job36:25 Jo luŋ doŋ oneno gin ame en otio, cite mom tye ŋattoro ame niaŋ iye aber." 
Job36:26 Nen ba, Obaŋa dwoŋ meicel ame wan mom oromo neyo, dok mwaka ame en ori kede mom romo kwanne." 
Job36:27 “Pien en mio pii duny i piny i lobo, te dok ton calo kot," 
Job36:28 ame ya i pol corre piny i lobo, te ony adwoŋ meicel i kom jo," 
Job36:29 Tye dano moro ame twero niaŋ kite ame pol oyarre kede, onyo kite ame kot mor kede i pol?" 
Job36:30 Nen ba, en mio lutkot meny tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, te wumo wi kiddi oko." 
Job36:31 Mannono kite ame en pito kede rok luŋ, kun miogi cam adwoŋ meicel." 
Job36:32 En mako lutkot i ciŋe, te ciko ni cel kan ame en amito ni cel ikokome." 
Job36:33 Mor a kot tito pi bino mere, i twon ryeko kede akemo pi bal.”" 
Job37:1 “Man daŋ poto cunya meicel, etaona dipere bala amukere oko i kakare." 
Job37:2 Koŋ iwiny wunu kite ame dwone amor kede, kede kite ame kop a donnyo doge tye ka ŋur kede," 
Job37:3 En mio romo te polo luŋ, kun lutkottere meny menyo kabedo luŋ." 
Job37:4 Icennere dwone te cako mor, dwone mor aloŋo i twon kwogo meicel, en mom juko meny a kot kare." 
Job37:5 “Dwone mor i yore me awura meicel, dok en timo twoni gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo ame wan mom oromo niaŋ iye." 
Job37:6 En twero ciko pee ni myero corre piny i lobo onyo ciko kot ni corre piny adwoŋ meicel. 
Job37:7 En twero juko tic a dano oko, me wek jo luŋ ŋe ni en etye etic." 
Job37:8 Leyi luŋ dok i ka ponogi, ote doŋ bedo gigi i gorogoro." 
Job37:9 Yamo ajuru kodo kun ya i ode, eka yamo akeketa te kelo koyo anic meicel." 
Job37:10 Ewura dog Obaŋa mio pii makere doko pee, eka te miyo makere atek ikaŋ." 
Job37:11 En mio pii cokere adwoŋ i pol, eka lutkot doŋ te cako meny iye kuno," 
Job37:12 gin te bedo wirre tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi kun Obaŋa telogi iye, me cobo ginnoro luŋ ame Obaŋa ocikogi ni myero oti, wi lobo luŋ kan ame dano twero bedo iye." 
Job37:13 En timo mannono pi keto can i kom dano onyo pi konyo lobo mere, onyo pi nyuto marre." 
Job37:14 “Yin Yubu myero iwiny kop man, koŋ icuŋ mot me ipar pi tic Obaŋa me awura." 
Job37:15 Yin iŋeo kite ame Obaŋa miogi kede cikkere, eka te miyo lutkot meny i pol menyo piny?" 
Job37:16 Yin iŋeo kite ame en omio pol ocuŋ kede kakargi? Mannono obedo tic me awura meicel, tic a ŋat a ŋeccere malo okato kare." 
Job37:17 Yin gire mom iŋeo ginnoro kono ka lyeto keken ka boŋoni oobere, ka yamo ame kodo i tuŋ anyarolum omio lobo okwe." 
Job37:18 Yin iromo konyo Obaŋa i ryeyo pol, ame te bedo atek calo mola ame otwako?" 
Job37:19 Koŋ ipwony wunu gin ame wan obino kobo i nyime, wan mom oromo pido nyime pi kwiya pinywa." 
Job37:20 Myero bin kobbe ni an abino kop? Dano twero kobo pire kene ni neke oko? 
Job37:21 “Aman ceŋ tye acaro waŋwa acara, tye aryeny acil meicel ame mom romo anena, polo tye anen acil pien yamo otero pol oko." 
Job37:22 Lero a ceŋ tye aryeny acil calo jabu i tuŋ anyarolum, kwogo Obaŋa omio lworo ocirowa oko." 
Job37:23 En Won Twer Ducu ame wan mom oromo noko ŋete, teko mere dwoŋ atek i ŋolo kop atira, dok kite daŋ atira odoco ame mom romo wuno ŋattoro." 
Job37:24 Mannono omio dano lwore, en mom paro pi jo ame yeyea ni oryek.”" 
Job38:1 Rwot te gamo dog Yubu yamo ajuru ni," 
Job38:2 “Man kara ŋa ame mito ni ewum tamma nie, kun kono en mom ŋeo ginnoro kadi acel?" 
Job38:3 Twe pyeri i del ikiŋ calo amony, yikere gamo penya ame apenyi kede." 
Job38:4 “Yin rik itye kwene i kare ame acibo acakki me lobo? Koŋ ititta, ka ce yin iŋeo ni itye i niaŋ atut." 
Job38:5 Kara ŋa omoko kite ame laccere kede borrere myero bed kede? Yin gire iŋeo man aber! Ŋa ame oryeo tol me pimo? 
Job38:6 Pagi me tergi ocuŋ i kom no? Ŋa ocibo kidi me gwiccere," 
Job38:7 kare ame acer luŋ me odiko wero karacel, dok itino Obaŋa luŋ redo yomcuny." 
Job38:8 “Ŋa ame twero cego pii nam doggola, kare ame doŋ oyeco yo mere oko i ot nyodo mere i lobo." 
Job38:9 I kare ame rik amio pol oburo kome oko calo boŋo, kun pol ocido icuc owumo kome oko?" 
Job38:10 I kare ame anyuto ka gikkere, ate cego oko i kika kede arii nyonyo," 
Job38:11 ate kobo ni, ‘Ibino tuno kan, cite mom ibino kato, tugere-ni ame iwakere kede awaka wok-ki bino gik oko kan.’" 
Job38:12 “Yam koŋ iciko odiko me cako ticcere, cakere i kare ame icako bedo kwo, onyo inyutti ru-piny kabedo mere?" 
Job38:13 Yam koŋ iciko ru-piny me yabere romo kabedo luŋ i wi podo, me wek jo areco teŋere oko i ka ponogi?" 
Job38:14 Ru-piny mio jami ducu nen oko kannaler, calo boŋo aruka ame calo gulu ame okekedo i rani apapat tye iye." 
Job38:15 Ler a piny a jo areco te rwenyo oko i baŋgi, ciŋgi ame ogoo kede jo te giko ticgi oko." 
Job38:16 “Yam koŋ iwoto naka kan a nam ocakere iye, onyo itemo koŋ wot i tyeni i te pii piny?" 
Job38:17 Yam koŋ onyutti doggola me to bo, onyo yam koŋ ineno doggola me kan acol icuc?" 
Job38:18 Yin iŋeo kite ame wi podo luŋ lac kede? Koŋ doŋ ikob do ka ce iŋeo mannono luŋ? 
Job38:19 “Yo ame woto kan a lero bedo iye tye kwene? Ane kan ame piny ocido icuc bedo iye? 
Job38:20 Itwero nyuttigi kan a myero gin wot gik iye, onyo itwero nyuttigi yo dokgi ceŋ i kabedogi?" 
Job38:21 Aŋeo ni yin gire iŋeo, pien yin iteggo, i kare-naca onwoŋo doŋ onywali oko." 
Job38:22 “Yam kon idoŋo i ot kano pee aŋic? Onyo ineno ot kano pee apekkege 
Job38:23 ame pwod ogwokogi me kuro kare me ayela, pi kuro kare me lweny?" 
Job38:24 Ane yo ame woto kan ame opoko iye lero i kabedo apapat, onyo kan ame oketo iye yamo me tuŋ kide i kabedo ducu?" 
Job38:25 “Kara ŋa a yam oyeco yo ame kot corre kede i lobo, kede yo me mwoc a lutkot?" 
Job38:26 Ŋa a mio kot cwe kan a jo mom bedo iye, kede i tim ata kan ame dano moro mom iye?" 
Job38:27 Ŋa a mio kot bido lobo otwo ame ginnoro mom iye, ame te miyo lum cako tu iye?" 
Job38:28 “Papa a kot daŋ tye? Ŋa onywalo toyo ce? 
Job38:29 Pii omakere calo pee oya iyi ŋa? Ŋa onywalo pee acalo toyo ame oya i polo? 
Job38:30 Pii makere doko atek calo gweŋ, naka pii me nam daŋ makere oko." 
Job38:31 “Itwero tweyo acer ame olwoŋo ni lyer-nino, onyo itwero gonyo tol ame otweo acer ocokere karacel?" 
Job38:32 Itwero miyo acer luŋ bedo tye i kakargi ikokome, onyo itwero telli acer ame olwoŋo ni ajaraŋuu kede itino mere yo?" 
Job38:33 Yin iŋeo cik ame otio kede i polo? Itwero moko cik pirgi i lobo kan? 
Job38:34 “Itwero miyo dwoni winyere naka i polo, me pii adwoŋ corre i komi wumi oko?" 
Job38:35 Yin itwero oro lutkot ni wot memenya, kan imito, eka en daŋ te ye, kun ogamo ni, ‘An ene adwoŋ?’" 
Job38:36 Ŋa oketo ryeko i pol, onyo ame omio ŋico tye kede niaŋ atut?" 
Job38:37 Ŋa aryek ame romo kwako pol, onyo ŋa a romo leŋo dog opoko me pii me polo te miyo kot cwe," 
Job38:38 apua te lokere doko coto, lobo te makere karacel atek ateka." 
Job38:39 “Yin iromo dwaro riŋo me acama pi eŋatu, onyo itwero miyo itino eŋatu yen," 
Job38:40 kun gin tye okudde i gorogorogi, onyo ka gin obusto mot kun okuro lee me amakagi?" 
Job38:41 Kara ŋa a mio agak cammere, ka ce itino mere tye akok baŋ Obaŋa kun otye orimo piny pi yenyo cam?”" 
Job39:1 “Yin iŋeo kare ame dyegi abedo i wi got nywal iye? Yam koŋ ineno min atilloro tye anywal? 
Job39:2 Yin iŋeo kare ame gin tyeko, kun iŋeo kare me nywalgi ikokome?" 
Job39:3 Iŋeo kare ame gin nyoye kede piny colo itinogi, eka ote nywalo iye otinogi?" 
Job39:4 Itinogi doŋo i bar kun komgi yot, kare ame oya i baŋgi owoto atwal mom dok odwogo baŋgi." 
Job39:5 “Ŋa omio kane me tim loye kengi? Ŋa a miogi twer me rimo piny kite a yigi mito? 
Job39:6 An atyeko miyogi tim otwo me bedo acalo pacogi, kede lobo obedo kadokado me bedogi." 
Job39:7 Gin gigi mom owinyo woo moro a tye i boma, ŋattoro ame burugi me tiyo tic daŋ pe." 
Job39:8 Wi kiddi malo tye acalo bar me camgi, kan ame gin oyenyo iye ginnoro keken ame oromo camo." 
Job39:9 “Jobi twero ye tic piri? Itamo ni twero buto dyewor luŋ iyi awiini? 
Job39:10 Itwero tweyo i tol kweri dyen ite miyo pur, onyo romo loko poto a tye i luŋ kun lubo kede yori?" 
Job39:11 Ibino keto genni i kome pi teko mere adwoŋ wok-ki, onyo ibino miyo en tio tici luŋ?" 
Job39:12 Igeno ni en bino dwogo, dok en bino kelo kal i laro?" 
Job39:13 Bwom udo lelea, i twon awaka adwoŋ meicel, cite lacgi mom rom kede me ocecu ame akica-ni." 
Job39:14 Pien udo weko toŋe i lobo, eka lyeto a lobo en ate bedo obo komgi," 
Job39:15 En mom dok po ni dano twero nyono oko i tyengi, onyo ni lee tim daŋ twero nyono." 
Job39:16 Bedo ager agera baŋ itino mere calo mom mege, en mom bedo kede lworo moro ni ticcere romo kec nono," 
Job39:17 Pien Obaŋa twone ryeko oko, dok daŋ mom odute mottoro me niaŋ atut." 
Job39:18 Ka en oya me ŋwec, en nyero aguragura kede ŋat a riŋo kede." 
Job39:19 “Twer ame aguragura tye kede-ni yin imie bo? Yer aboco wok i ŋute yin imie bo? 
Job39:20 Yin en imiogi otwarre calo bonyo? Gin oredo redo moro ame winyo lik," 
Job39:21 Ojebo wot i luŋ i tekkom kun owakere awaka, omwomere gigi amwoma me wot i lweny." 
Job39:22 Kop i kom lworo gin onyero anyera, kun cunygi mom poto, mom tye pala lwennyoro ame miogi oloko ŋegi me dok ceŋ." 
Job39:23 Jami lweny a jo a ŋwec kedgi owoto kede yeŋere ame awo awoa, ame toŋŋigi awil awila calo mac." 
Job39:24 Omukere i ŋwec anyim i twon akemo meicel, mom oromo cuŋ mot ka okuto apel." 
Job39:25 Ka owinyo koko apel, gin oredo ni, ‘Ee do!’ Gin oŋweo lweny i kannabor meicel, owinyo-gu mor kede redo odoŋe mony i teŋe." 
Job39:26 “Ryekoni en omio olwit twarre malo bo, eka te yaro bwome kemo tutuŋ anyarolum?" 
Job39:27 Yin en iciko cur bo, ni twarre malo, eka te gero ode i wi kiddi malo?" 
Job39:28 En bedo dok i wi kidi malo, dok buto daŋ kuno, wi kidi oculle acula ni en doko ka pono mere," 
Job39:29 En doŋ te bedo ŋoloro piny i kuno me yenyo gi-acama mere, waŋe bit meicel me neno jami i kannabor," 
Job39:30 Itino mere doto remo, en mom rwenyo i kan a gin oto tye iye.”" 
Job40:1 Rwot te dok penyo Yubu ni," 
Job40:2 “Arot bal a jo twero pyem Won Twer Ducu? En ŋat ame pyem Obaŋa-nono koŋ doŋ gam doge do!” 
Job40:3 Yubu te gamo dog Rwot ni," 
Job40:4 “Nen ba, an kom mom a ginnoro i nyimi, kara abino gamo koppi niŋo ba? Mom atwero ŋamo doga me kop kedi." 
Job40:5 Akobo doŋ icel-li keken mom dok gira abino kop, mom dok aromo medde kadi acel.” Lee aryo adoŋo onyuto teko Obaŋa" 
Job40:6 Rwot dok te gamo kop a Yubu yamo ajuru ni," 
Job40:7 “Twe pyeri i del ikiŋ calo amony, yikere me gamo penya ame apenyi kede." 
Job40:8 Itye ka nyuto ni an atimo bal? Imito ŋolo kop loya, me inyut ni koppi yin tye kakare?" 
Job40:9 Yin daŋ badi cal kede me Obaŋa bo? Yin daŋ dwoni twero mor calo mege? 
Job40:10 “Ka amannono, koŋ doŋ irukere i kwogoni kede ditti, me twerri kede woroni nen." 
Job40:11 Wuk doŋ akemoni agwa oko i kom jo, nen jo luŋ owaka, me imi wakeregi gik oko." 
Job40:12 Nen ŋat acel acel a wakere, me idie idwoke piny, dok inyon jo areco oko piny kan a gin ocuŋ iye." 
Job40:13 Yikgi luŋ piny i kwoyo, wum waŋgi oko piny i lyel." 
Job40:14 Mannono bino miyo an aniaŋ ate cako paki, ate ye ni yin iromo loyo lweny piri keni." 
Job40:15 Koŋ inen emir ame aketo calo yin, en camo lum calo twon." 
Job40:16 Nen koŋ kite ame pyere tek kede, kede kite ame ler yie nwaŋ kede." 
Job40:17 Yibe ocuŋ malo calo yat cedar, ler amuru mere okubere karacel." 
Job40:18 Cogo mere tek calo nyonyo me mola a yie twolo, tyene te rom aroma arii me mola." 
Job40:19 “En obedo tic Obaŋa me agege, ŋat ame ocwee en a myero ŋol kop i kome." 
Job40:20 Okelo cam baŋe i wi kidi malo, kan ame leyi me tim tuko iye." 
Job40:21 En buto piny i te okutti ame tye i dog kulo, en pono i te ogada ame tye i coto." 
Job40:22 Pien tipo okutti kede tipo ŋet i dog kulo, tipogi-nono wumo kome." 
Job40:23 Nen ba, kadi bed pii i kulo amol atek ame atagere ataga, en mom lworo, en bedo a cunye opye kadi pii i kulo Jordan Opoŋ naka i nyime." 
Job40:24 Tye ŋattoro ame romo make i golo, onyo ame twero tuco wume atuca owiccere moro te make?”" 
Job41:1 “Itwero waya twon nyaŋ me pii a ŋeo panere wok-ki, onyo iromo tweyo lebe kede tol?" 
Job41:2 Itwero rwako tol i wume, onyo tuco itinyo mere kede golo?" 
Job41:3 Itamo ni en bino kwayi atek meicel? En romo kwayo kede mwolo? 
Job41:4 En bino cikere kedi, me wek yin itere, ewot ebed opiini atwal?" 
Job41:5 Ibino tuko kede kite ame ituko kede i winyo? Onyo ibino tweye oko i tol me en bed yomoro cuny anyirani? 
Job41:6 Eryoŋet ocik rec bino laro wel me wilo? Gin bino poke oko i akina ocat wil? 
Job41:7 Ibino cocobo pyennere kede golli abittege, onyo ibino cobo wie kede biti me cik." 
Job41:8 Koŋ igud kome icelloro me inen, mom dok ibino nwoyo, dok wi mom bino wil i kom lwenyere kedi." 
Job41:9 “Nen ba, ŋat ame tamo ni eromo timo ginnoro nwoŋo obwolle gire kene, ka oneno waŋe keken bino nyobere oko." 
Job41:10 Mom tye ŋattoro a dok ger calo en, ame romo diyo cunye me tugge i kakare. Ŋa kara ame romo cuŋ i nyime?" 
Job41:11 Ŋa ame twero cako lweny kede eka te bwot? Mom gire tye ŋattoro i wi podo luŋ. 
Job41:12 “Wek koŋ akobbi kop i kom tyen twon nyaŋ a ŋeo pannere wok-ca, kede twon teko adwoŋ ame en tye kede, kede kite ame Obaŋa ocweo kede kome." 
Job41:13 Ŋa a romo woto rukkere i kome? Onyo ame romo tuco koti mola mere? 
Job41:14 Ŋa a twero miyo en ŋamo doge? Lake oromo yi doge luŋ ame neŋo lik. 
Job41:15 Ŋee oryeo iye kwode yore i yore, gin luŋ okubere karacel kun otek calo gwen." 
Job41:16 Acel acel i akinagi ceggi acega awottere, ame yamo mom romo kato i akinagi." 
Job41:17 Gin luŋ ononota oko, ŋat man awottere, omakere ame poko i akinagi mom twerre." 
Job41:18 Ka ogweo, lao doge ryeny aryenya calo ceŋ, waŋe obok pee calo ceŋ ka pwod adonnyo adonya odiko." 
Job41:19 Leb mac meny kato i doge calo mac rao, kun kir i doge calo mac otyer." 
Job41:20 Yito duny donyo i wume, calo yito adonyo i gulu." 
Job41:21 Ewura me weo mere twero kuto mac i milo, kun leb mac a lyel kato i doge." 
Job41:22 Ŋute tek meicel, ame ŋat orwatte kede lworo ciro oko." 
Job41:23 Riŋo kome ocikere acika karacel, ocikere atek ikiŋ ame mom romo dwinyere." 
Job41:24 Cunye tek calo kidi, tek meicel calo nyonyo." 
Job41:25 Ka ce en otwarre malo, twoni jo atek doko alwor, lworo miogi onyobere odoco." 
Job41:26 Kadi cob kome i pala lweny, mom donyo kadi acel, kadi cob kome i toŋ, onyo atero onyo toŋ abit meicel." 
Job41:27 Bano nyonyo calo ren kal, aco mola te calo yat otop." 
Job41:28 Atero mom romo miyo en mukere i ŋwec, atiŋdio i baŋe calo lum otwo." 
Job41:29 Abiro en neno calo ogada, ka jo omio toŋe abit ocobo kome en nyero anyera." 
Job41:30 Piny yie bit calo tako abit, ka awot tuco coto adyaka atuca." 
Job41:31 En mio pii i kut yenyo calo pii ame awalo i keno; mio pii i nam yenyo bwoo atar kia calo bwo moo ame ayenyo iyi gulu. 
Job41:32 Ka atagere i wot yore nen atar kia miyo kut buko atar kia calo lwar i wic. 
Job41:33 Mom tye ŋattoro ame rom kede i wi lobo-ni luŋ, en keken obedo gin ame mom tye kede lworo moro." 
Job41:34 Jami luŋ tye piny i tere, en abaka ame loo kit ginnoro luŋ a wakere.”" 
Job42:1 Yubu te gamo dog Rwot ni," 
Job42:2 “An aŋeo ni yin iromo tiyo ginnoro luŋ; gin ame yin iyiko ni iti cobere. 
Job42:3 Yin ikobo ni, ‘Man kara ŋa ame mito ni ewum tamma nie, kun kono en mom ŋeo ginnoro kadi acel?’ An gire rik akobo gin ame mom aniaŋ iye, akobo kop i kom gigi mogo me awura meicel, ame an mom aŋeo." 
Job42:4 Rik akobbi ni, ‘Winy koppa, me akobi; yikere me gamo penya ame apenyi kede.’" 
Job42:5 Rik awinyo piri awinya, cite aman doŋ aneni kede waŋa:" 
Job42:6 omio doŋ acaye kena meicel, ate ŋut kun abukkere apua kede buru.”" 
Job42:7 Kare ame Rwot doŋ otyeko kobo kop magi luŋ baŋ Yubu, Rwot te kobbi Erifazi dano me Teman ni, “Akemo omaka meicel i komi kede i kom owoteni aryo-nu, pien mom ikobo wunu kop me ateni i koma kite ame amirona Yubu obedo kobo kede." 
Job42:8 Aman doŋ ba, myero ikwany wunu twoni abiro kede nyogi rommi abiro, iwot wunu kede baŋ amirona Yubu, me iwot iyala wunu i mot awaŋa pirwu; amirona Yubu bino kwaya pirwu; pien abino winyo kwaccere, mom abino keto lewic i komwu ame rom i kop ame ibedo kobo wunu i koma, Pien wun mom ibedo kobo wunu kop ame tye kakare i koma kite ame amirona Yubu obedo kobo kede.”" 
Job42:9 Mannono omio Erifaji dano me Teman, kede Bildad dano me Cua, kede Jopar dano me Naamat te wot timo gin ame Rwot okobbigi; Rwot daŋ te gamo kwac a Yubu."
