Job42:10 Rwot odwoko gum a Yubu i kare ame en otyeko kwayo Rwot pi owote mere; Rwot omio Yubu jami abup ame doko maca me agege ca tyen aryo. 
Job42:11 Jo luŋ a rik onwoŋo ŋec con, kede omego mere, amego mere te bino baŋe, gin luŋ ote bino cam karacel kede i ode. Gin luŋ ote nyuto baŋ Yubu cuny me kica i kome, kun daŋ okweo-cunye pi gin arac ame Rwot onwoŋo omio otimere i kome. Ŋat acel acel i akinagi te miye dul lim ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋe kede atem me jabu." 
Job42:12 Rwot te miyo gum baŋ Yubu i kare man icennere-ni ame kato me agege oko; en onwoŋo tye kede rommi ame romo tutumia apar wie aŋwen, inaga tutumia abicel, twoni pur tutumia acel, megi kane tutumia acel." 
Job42:13 Awobe mere onwoŋo tye abiro kede anyira daŋ dok adek. 
Job42:14 Nyiŋ nyako me agege Yemima; me aryo Kejia; me adek Keren-kappuk; 
Job42:15 i kom anyira luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye i lobo i kare-naca, mom tye moro ame onwoŋo ber akato anyira a Yubu; papagi rik te miyogi lobo me alea acalo megi i akina omegogi." 
Job42:16 I ŋe mannono Yubu dok te medde perakino i lobo pi mwakki ame romo mia acel kede pyeraŋwen, ame te neno ikwae tuno kede naka i me aŋwennere." 
Job42:17 Yubu te to ame doŋ oteggo atek, dok mwaka mere bup meicel." 
Psalms1:1 Ŋat a mom winyo tam a jo areco tye kede winyo, a mom koporo kite obalo, a mom bedo karacel i wegi aŋale;" 
Psalms1:2 ento maro gire cik a Rwot; ame bedo lwodo i cunye dyeceŋ kede dyewor," 
Psalms1:3 Dano-nono calo yat ame odoŋo i ŋet kulo, ame nyako nyige i kare mere ikome, dok pote daŋ mom ner, ginnoro luŋ ame en timo cobere kakare." 
Psalms1:4 Cite otim tim areco mom tye kittono, gin ocalo cuŋ kal ame yamo kolo oko." 
Psalms1:5 Mannono omio otim tim areco mom bino cuŋ i kare me ŋolo kop; dok obalo mom bino ribere i jo a kitegi atira. 
Psalms1:6 Pien Rwot gwoko jo ame kitegi atira, i yogi luŋ; cite yo ame jo areco lubo terogi i can." 
Psalms2:1 Piŋo orok tye ka poro kop me jem? Piŋo rok tye ka poro kop a tere pe? 
Psalms2:2 Rwode me lobo doŋ otere oko, oloc tye ka poro kop karacel, i kom Rwot kede ŋat ame en oyero, kun okobo ni," 
Psalms2:3 “Ocod wunu nyorgi ame otweowa kede oko, okwer wunu locgi oko.”" 
Psalms2:4 Rwot tye ka nyero anyera i wi kom loccere i polo, en tye ka ŋalogi aŋala." 
Psalms2:5 Tye ka kop kedgi akemo, Twon akemo mere agwa omio lworo omakogi, kun en kobbigi ni," 
Psalms2:6 “An doŋ atyeko keto abakana, i wi kidina acil me Cion.”" 
Psalms2:7 Abino rabo cik a Rwot, ame en otyeko kobba, kun kobo ni, “Yin ibedo woda, ame tin doŋ anywali." 
Psalms2:8 Kwaa, an abino miyi rok luŋ me bedo megi, dok lobo luŋ daŋ bino bedo megi." 
Psalms2:9 Ibino loyogi abiro nyonyo, ibino ŋidogi oko atitino acalo gulu.”" 
Psalms2:10 Aman doŋ ba, wun oloc, bed wunu aryek, wun oloc me lobo, ka okwenyorowu, winy wunu." 
Psalms2:11 Tiyi wunu Rwot, kun ilwore wunu, komwu myero myel kun irumo wunu coŋwu i nyime, naka mio akemo make, ite to wunu oko i yo; pien akemo make oyot meicel. Jo ame riŋo laro baŋe tye kede winyo." 
Psalms3:1 Ama Rwot, okworra doŋ pol nadi! Jo apol apola doŋ tye acako lweny keda;" 
Psalms3:2 Jo apol apola doŋ tye akobo kop i koma ni, “Obaŋa mere gire mom romo konye.”" 
Psalms3:3 Ento yin Rwot, yin ibedo kwot me geŋo koma, yin ibedo kwogona, yin en imia atiŋo wia malo." 
Psalms3:4 An akok i dwon aloŋo baŋ Rwot, en gamo doga i kabedo mere acil ame tye i wi kidi malo," 
Psalms3:5 An abuto piny ate nino oko, dok aco, pien Rwot en agwoka." 
Psalms3:6 An mom alworo jo tutumia apar, ame ogura oko dyere me lweny keda." 
Psalms3:7 Biye, Ama Rwot! Lara doŋ ba, Ama Obaŋana! Yin gire en iromo doŋo lem okwora luŋ, yin gire en iromo turo lak otim tim areco." 
Psalms3:8 Tic me laro jo obedo me Obaŋa; gum ame yin imio obed i kom joni luŋ! 
Psalms4:1 Gam doga, Ama Obaŋa ka ce akok baŋi, pien yin gire en igwoka. I kare ame onwoŋo atye kede peko, yin en ibino me bino konya. Kica myero doŋ maki ba i koma, dok iwiny daŋ kwaca." 
Psalms4:2 Ama wun jo ni, cunywu bino bedo anwaŋ pi kare ame rom mene ba? Ibino bedo lubo wunu tam a konnyere mom kede kop me goba naka awene?" 
Psalms4:3 Poyo wunu ni Rwot doŋ otyeko yero jo ame wore me bedo mege en ikome; dok en winyo kwacca ka ce akok baŋe. 
Psalms4:4 Kadi bed akemo omakowu, myero kur ipot wunu i bal; jal wunu karewu me paro kop man i cunywu, bed wunu kenwu mot dyewor i dog itandawu." 
Psalms4:5 Yal wunu Rwot i mot abeco odoco, dok myero igen wunu Rwot." 
Psalms4:6 Jo apol kobo ni, “Ŋa a bino miyowa oneno gin aber! Ama Rwot, tiŋ waŋi inenwa i waŋ me kica ba!”" 
Psalms4:7 Nen yin doŋ imia atye i yomcuny adwoŋ meicel, ame kato me a jo ame tye icam kede koŋo abup." 
Psalms4:8 An abuto piny i kuc ate nino daŋ oko, pien yin gire, Ama Rwot, en imia abedo aboŋo ginnoro ame alworo." 
Psalms5:1 Cik yiti iwiny koppa, Ama Rwot, winy daŋ curra." 
Psalms5:2 Ter yiti winy kokona, abakana kede Obaŋana, pien an atye ka kwayi." 
Psalms5:3 Yin gire en iwinyo dwona odiko, Ama Rwot; Odiko ayiko mot me yali, ate bedo kuro." 
Psalms5:4 Yin Obaŋa ame cunyi mom tim arac; mom iye nywako kabedo gin arac," 
Psalms5:5 Jo awakere mom romo cuŋ i nyimi; idago jo luŋ ame timo tim arac. 
Psalms5:6 Yin ijwero jo ame kobo kop goba oko; Rwot dago oony remo a jo kede obwol joo 
Psalms5:7 An gire abino donyo i odi, pi marri adwoŋ ame mom lokere, abino wori i odi acil, kun aryebere piny i nyimi i twon lworo adwoŋ." 
Psalms5:8 Tim ber itela, Ama Rwot, me atim gin a tye atira i nyimi, mi yo ame imito alub ocuŋ atira i nyima, pien okworra tye pol." 
Psalms5:9 Pien kop ame okworra kobo ateni mom iye, cunygi opoŋ ka itam me neko jo, dwongi obedo lyel a wie olaŋara, lebgi gin bwolo kede jo." 
Psalms5:10 Dwok balgi i wigi, migi can pire, Ama Rwot, tur yikgi-nono oko; ryemgi oko i nyimi, pien balgi dwoŋ meicel, pien gin ojem i komi." 
Psalms5:11 Cite mi jo ame riŋo laro baŋi bed kede lelo, migi ower wer me yomcuny nakanaka; dok yin myero igwokgi, me jo ame mari bed i twon yomcuny adwoŋ i komi." 
Psalms5:12 Pien imio gum baŋ jo ame kitegi atira, Ama Rwot, kicani wumo kome oko calo kwot." 
Psalms6:1 Ama Rwot, tim ber kur ijuka akemo, kur daŋ igoa kun akemo omaki." 
Psalms6:2 Kica myero omaki i koma, Ama Rwot, pien aloc doŋ oko, Ama Rwot, caŋa, pien cogo koma doŋ goro meicel." 
Psalms6:3 Kwona daŋ opoŋ i can. Kara doŋ yin ibino ri kare arom mene, Ama Rwot?" 
Psalms6:4 Biye ilara, Ama Rwot, tim ber ilar kwona pi marri a mom lokere." 
Psalms6:5 Pien mom opo piri i lobo a jo oto; dok ŋa a twero paki piny i lyel me Ceol? 
Psalms6:6 Kumo doŋ ocira oko, dyewor pig waŋa nwoŋo odyako kabutona oko, koko doŋ omio aten wia dyaka adyaka," 
Psalms6:7 Cwercuny doŋ omio waŋa mito balle oko tye doŋ adoko agoro pi okworra luŋ," 
Psalms6:8 Wot wunu teŋe i nyima, wun otim tim areco, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko winyo kokona." 
Psalms6:9 Rwot doŋ otyeko winyo kite ame abako kede doga, en doŋ otyeko ye kwacca." 
Psalms6:10 Lewic bino mako okworra luŋ, cwercuny te cirogi oko; obino lokere odok cen, lewic te makogi oyotoyot." 
Psalms7:1 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, an gire ariŋo alaro baŋi, larra i ciŋ okworra ame aryemo yora, me ikonya," 
Psalms7:2 naka mio gin kikilo an oko calo eŋatu, kun owaa otera teŋe aboŋo ŋattoro ame romo lara i ciŋgi." 
Psalms7:3 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, ka ce atimo man, ka ce an atimo balloro," 
Psalms7:4 ka ce atimo balloro baŋ awota pi culo gin arac ame en otimo i koma, onyo ka ce ayako jami akworra aboŋo tyen kopporo." 
Psalms7:5 Mi okworra ryem yora maka oko i yo, migi oreta piny oneka oko, oweka piny kuno ame doŋ ato oko." 
Psalms7:6 Tim ber iya doŋ malo akemo, Ama Rwot, ya ilweny okworra ame obino i koma agwa wok-ki; ya doŋ malo, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, pien yin en iciko pi nino me ŋolo kop." 
Psalms7:7 Mi lwak rok luŋ cokere baŋi guri dyere, me yin icak loyogi kun ibedo i kabedoni malo." 
Psalms7:8 Rwot gire en a ŋolo kop a rok luŋ, ŋol doŋ koppa, Ama Rwot, kun icuŋ i kiteni atira, dok kun ilubo kite ame cunya ler kede." 
Psalms7:9 Tim ber imi tim a jo areco gik oko, cite myero imi jo a kitegi atira mok atek, yin Obaŋa ame kiteni atira, ame iŋio cuny jo kede tamgi." 
Psalms7:10 Kwot me geŋo koma tye baŋ Obaŋa, en laro jo ame cunygi atira." 
Psalms7:11 Obaŋa en aŋolkop ame ŋolo kop kakare, en Obaŋa ame mio kop loo jo a kitegi reco nino ducu." 
Psalms7:12 Ka ce dano mom oŋut, Obaŋa bino pako pala me lwenyere; en doŋ otyeko telo tol atero mere oko;" 
Psalms7:13 Jami lwenyere areco meicel, en doŋ atyeko yiko oko luŋ, owaŋo doŋ leb atero mere oko i mac," 
Psalms7:14 Nen ba, atim tim arac, tamo tam arac i cunye, tim arac te doŋ bedo do ŋo i cunye, te cako kobo kop me goba baŋ jo." 
Psalms7:15 Kunyo twon burroro atut, en ikome dok te rette i bur ame ekunyo-nono," 
Psalms7:16 Timere araccono lokere dok i wie kene, dok timere me bwami daŋ lokere waŋe." 
Psalms7:17 An gira abino pwoyo Rwot pien kite atira dok daŋ abino wero wer me pako nyiŋ Rwot, ame en Ŋat Amalo Meicel." 
Psalms8:1 Ama Rwot, yin i Rwotwa, nyiŋi rwo meicel i wi lobo luŋ, Pak ame opaki kede pi kwogoni tuno malo i polo," 
Psalms8:2 kun itino atino kede itino ame pwod dot en awero, Ityeko gero cel atek odoco me geŋo okworri, me ilo okworri kede jo ame lwenyo i komi." 
Psalms8:3 Ka aneno polo ame yin ikomi itio, dwe kede acer-gu ame yin iketo i kabedogi," 
Psalms8:4 dano kara obedo gin aŋo, omio yin ibedo tamo pire, dano ata-ni obedo gin aŋo omio yin ibedo paro pire?" 
Psalms8:5 Kadi amannono, yin icwec apat meicel, ame yin keken en iloe, iketo tok kwogo kede me woro i wie." 
Psalms8:6 Yin imio en obedo dwo ame loo jami luŋ ame iketo, imio jami luŋ obedo i te twerrere," 
Psalms8:7 rommi luŋ kede dok luŋ, karacel kede leyi me tim luŋ," 
Psalms8:8 winy ame twarre malo, kede rec ame bedo i pii, karacel kede kit jami luŋ ame bedo i nam." 
Psalms8:9 Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, nyiŋi dwoŋ nadi i wi lobo luŋ!" 
Psalms9:1 Abino pwoyo Rwot kede cunya ducu, abino rabo pi jami luŋ me awura ame en otio." 
Psalms9:2 Cunya bino bedo yom kun alelo meicel piri, abino gira wer kun apako nyiŋi, Yin Amalo Meicel." 
Psalms9:3 Okworra bino lokere dok cen, a me komgi myel amyela ote rereta to oko i nyimi." 
Psalms9:4 Pien yin iŋolo koppa atira i wi kom locci, kan ame bedo iye aŋolkop ame ŋolo kop kakare." 
Psalms9:5 Yin ityeko juko rok, dok ijwero jo areco oko, yin doŋ ijwao nyiŋgi oko atwal i wi lobo," 
Psalms9:6 Okworra doŋ oto otum oko atwal, bomagi daŋ doŋ ikeketo oko luŋ, mom doŋ opo, pirgi kadi acel." 
Psalms9:7 Cite Rwot gire bedo i wi kom me loc nakanaka, en doŋ otyeko keto kom me ŋolo koppere oko," 
Psalms9:8 En loo lobo i kite atir, en bino ŋolo kop a rok luŋ arorom." 
Psalms9:9 Rwot en kan atek ame laro jo ame piny oloo, kan atek me alara i kare me can." 
Psalms9:10 Jo ame ŋeo nyiŋi bedo kede gen i komi, pien yin gire mom ikwero jo ame wori, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms9:11 Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot ame loo Cion! Rab wunu pi gin ame en otio baŋ rok luŋ! 
Psalms9:12 En acul kwor meremo a jo ame oneko, po daŋ pirgi, wie mom wil i kom koko a jo ame can opoto i komgi." 
Psalms9:13 Kica myero omaki i koma, Ama Rwot! Koŋ inen can ame jo a daga oketo i koma, Yin en ilara i kom to," 
Psalms9:14 me awer wer me paki i yore ducu, i kabedo me ŋolo kop i nyim jo me Jerucalem, dok daŋ alel pi kite ame ilara kede." 
Psalms9:15 Rok apapat doŋ orette oko i bur ame gin i komgi okunyo, tyengi omoko oko i owic ame gin ociko," 
Psalms9:16 Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo nyiŋe oŋeye oko, pi ŋolo kop atira otim tim areco moko dok iyi owic ame gin ikomgi ociko." 
Psalms9:17 Otim tim areco luŋ bino donyo piny i lyel me Ceol, naka rok luŋ ame okwero Obaŋa." 
Psalms9:18 Pien wi Obaŋa mom bino wil i kom ocan, dok gen ame ocan tye kede mom bino to nono." 
Psalms9:19 Ya malo, Ama Rwot! Kur imi dano loi. Cok rok luŋ i nyimi me iŋol kopgi." 
Psalms9:20 Mi lworo makgi, Ama Rwot! Myero gin oŋe ni gin obedo dano adana." 
Psalms10:1 Piŋo kara icuŋ kannabor abora, Ama Rwot? Piŋo kara ibedo pono apona i kare me ayela?" 
Psalms10:2 Otim tim areco tye ka diyo ocan kun owakere meicel, migi omok kengi i gin ame gin oyiko." 
Psalms10:3 Dano arac wakere pi tam arac ame tye i cunye, dano owor inwoŋo lim yeto Rwot kun daŋ cao acaa." 
Psalms10:4 Dano arac mom paro pi woro Obaŋa, en wakere i cunye kun kobo ni, “Obaŋa gire mom.”" 
Psalms10:5 Yo ame en lubo ocuŋ atira i kare luŋ, en mom paro pi ŋolo koppi, pien bor kede abora, en yeyea ni etek i nyim okworrere luŋ." 
Psalms10:6 En bedo tamo i cunye ni, “Ginnoro gire mom bino corra teŋe; cannoro daŋ gire mom bino poto i koma pi kare me kwona luŋ.”" 
Psalms10:7 Kop i doge opoŋ i ceno jo, bwolo jo kede wuno jo, en kobo kop arac kede bal." 
Psalms10:8 En bedo libo jo i akina pacci, neko jo a mom i balloro ka pono mere." 
Psalms10:9 En ciko waŋe i kom jo ame can orido, pono imuŋ, kun kio jo calo eŋatu, En pono oko me wek emak ocan, en mako ocan ka ce omio odonyo iyi boo mere." 
Psalms10:10 Jejebo jo ame can orido, te diyogi oko piny, pien teko okworgi onwoŋo loo meggi oko," 
Psalms10:11 En bedo tamo i cunye ni, “Wi Obaŋa gire owil oko, en omio waŋe oko, mom gire romo nena.”" 
Psalms10:12 Ya malo, Ama Rwot, rye ciŋi malo, Ama Obaŋa; wii kur wil i kom jo ame tye kede can," 
Psalms10:13 Piŋo atim tim arac cao Obaŋa, kun kobo i cunye ni, “Yin gire mom ibino pwoda?”" 
Psalms10:14 Yin giri ineno, dok iŋeo can kede cwercuny ame dano tye kede, i kare luŋ iyikere me miyo kony. Dano a mom romo konyere kene, miye i ciŋi pien yin giri en ikonyo itino kic." 
Psalms10:15 Tim ber itur bad jo areco, kede otim tim areco, yeny balgi luŋ, tuno ka mom doŋ inwoŋo moro," 
Psalms10:16 Rwot en abaka ame perakino waŋ i waŋ, rok luŋ bino to oko i lobo mere." 
Psalms10:17 Ama Rwot, yin gire ibino winyo kwac a jo ame mwol, yin ibino miyo cunygi bedo atek, ibino ciko yiti i kwacgi." 
Psalms10:18 Ibino ŋolo kop atira pi itino kic kede jo ame owuno, me wek jo me lobo man mom dok okel lworo." 
Psalms11:1 An gira alaro baŋ Rwot, kara ŋo omio yin dok ikobba ni, “Lwi oko calo winyo me iwot ibed i wi kiddi malo," 
Psalms11:2 Koŋ inen kite ame jo areco atelo kede akud aterogi, oketo doŋ aterogi oko i kom tol atero, me ocel jo a cunygi ler i colpiny," 
Psalms11:3 Ka ce acakki me te ot doŋ oballe oko, dano a kite atira twero timo gin aŋo”?" 
Psalms11:4 Obaŋa tye i ode acil, kom loc Obaŋa tye malo i polo; en neno jo luŋ ame tye i lobo, dok ŋeo gin ame gin tio luŋ," 
Psalms11:5 Pien Rwot temo jo a kitegi atira kede jo areco, en dago ŋat ame maro timo tim me byemi." 
Psalms11:6 En bino coro loti mac kede gweŋ calufa i kom jo areco bino pwodogi i yamo oro alyet meicel. 
Psalms11:7 Pien Rwot kite atira, en maro daŋ tim atira, jo a cunygi ler bino neno waŋe." 
Psalms12:1 Konya Ama Rwot, pien ŋattoro doŋ mom ame geni, pien jo ame geŋo doŋ oto otum oko i akina joo" 
Psalms12:2 Nen ŋat acel acel tye ka kobo kop goba baŋ awottere, kop i doggi lim calo kic, aco cunygi nwoŋo okaro aryo." 
Psalms12:3 Rwot myero ŋol leb ame lebo kop amit wokkono oko, kop ame ya i dog ame mio dano wakere wok-ki," 
Psalms12:4 jo ame kobo ni, “Obino loyo kop i kop a ya i dogwa, lebwa gire tye me konyowa, kara ŋa ocele ame dok tye acalo adwoŋwa?”" 
Psalms12:5 “Pien gin oyako ocan, dok jo ame kec neko tye ka cucura, mannono omio abino doŋ ya malo, ‘Rwot okobo, Abino doŋ gwokogi kite ame gin mito.’ ”" 
Psalms12:6 Gin ame Rwot ociko, ber, calo ryal ame olio acil i mac, ame olio tyen abiro twal." 
Psalms12:7 Gwokwa aber, Ama Rwot, Gwok joni me kare luŋ nakanaka." 
Psalms12:8 Otim tim areco tye wirre tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, kun oyenyo jo, kite ame jo tye ka pwoyo kodi timmono apwoa-ni." 
Psalms13:1 Ama Rwot, wii kara bino bedo wil i koma naka awene? Wii doŋ owil oko i koma atwal bo? Ibino bedo ponna apona kun mom aneni naka awene ba?" 
Psalms13:2 Myero akany rem i cunya naka awene ba? Kun cunya cwer kare luŋ. Akworra bino bedo loya naka awene? 
Psalms13:3 Koŋ itam ite dokka iye, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, yab waŋa me kur anin nino me to;" 
Psalms13:4 naka mio akworra kobo ni, “Atyeko doŋ loye”; naka mio akworra lelo pien an doŋ apoto oko." 
Psalms13:5 Cite an ageno gira marri a mom lokere, abino lelo gira pi larre ame ya i baŋi." 
Psalms13:6 Abino wero wer me pako Rwot, pien onyuto berrere adwoŋ i koma." 
Psalms14:1 Amino bedo tamo i cunye ni, “Obaŋa gire mom.” Gin luŋ oballe oko, gin luŋ otimo tim me kwer, ŋat a timo gin aber pe," 
Psalms14:2 Obaŋa neno jo luŋ ame tye piny i te polo, kun neno ka ce tye ŋattoro ame timo ginnoro luŋ i ryeko, kun timo gin ame Obaŋa mito." 
Psalms14:3 Gin luŋ doŋ ogak oko teŋe, gin ducu oballe oko, ŋat a timo gin aber pe, moro acelloro doŋ mom." 
Psalms14:4 Gin otim tim areco-nono ce mom otye kede ŋeccoro, gin jo ame camo dano calo ogati-nono, kun daŋ mom olwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot?" 
Psalms14:5 Gin bino bedo kede twon lworo adwoŋ meicel kuno, pien Rwot konyo lwagi jo ame kitegi atira." 
Psalms14:6 Wun imito wunu balo yik acan, cite Rwot en obedo kan ame en laro." 
Psalms14:7 Kono larre a jo Icrael oya i Cion, kono ber! Kare ame Rwot bino dwoko iye gum a jo mere baŋgi, Yakobo bino lelo, Icrael bino bedo i yomcuny." 
Psalms15:1 Ama Rwot, ŋa kara ame bino bedo i kemani? Ŋa abino bedo i wi kidini acil?" 
Psalms15:2 Dano ame kwo mere ber, dok ame timo tic atira, ame kobo kop me ateni i cunye ducu;" 
Psalms15:3 ame mom bedo coko dog jo wadgi i kop ame ya i doge, dok mom timo ginnoro i kom owote mere, akadi balo nyiŋ dano wadgi." 
Psalms15:4 Dano ame waŋe balle i kom jo a mom woro Obaŋa, ento woro jo ame lworo Rwot, ame lido kwoŋ ame ekwoŋo nakanaka kadi tye i can," 
Psalms15:5 ame mom mito agoba moro i kom lim ame en konyo kede jo, dok mom ye gamo lim ame owilo ijo i muŋ pi dwoko kop i wi dano a mom i balloro. Dano ame timo jami magi mom obino coro teŋe." 
Psalms16:1 Gwoka, Ama Obaŋa, pien an gira alaro baŋi, Akobo baŋ Rwot ni, “Yin gire ibedo rwota;" 
Psalms16:2 an mom a ginnoro aboŋo yin.” 
Psalms16:3 Jo acil ame tye i lobo, gin obedo jo me awora, ame oyomoro cunya meicel." 
Psalms16:4 Jo ame yero kit obaŋa moro ocele cwercunygi medde ameda; an mom amito onyo remo acalo mot amata me yalogi, room daŋ abino tuco nyiŋgi kadi acel." 
Psalms16:5 Rwot en obedo dul ame opokka, yin imia ginnoro luŋ amito, kwona luŋ tye i ciŋi." 
Psalms16:6 Waŋ lobona opoto kan ame yomoro cunya; anwoŋo doŋ lobo aber ame opokka me bedo mega. 
Psalms16:7 Apwoo Rwot ame omia ryeko; cunya daŋ pwonya naka dyewor. 
Psalms16:8 Nino luŋ Rwot mom bino rwenyo i nyima, pien en kare luŋ tye i ŋeta tuŋcem, ginnoro mom bino cora teŋe." 
Psalms16:9 Mannono omio cunya yom, kun alelo meicel; koma daŋ bino bedo i kuc." 
Psalms16:10 Pien yin gire mom ibino ye ni adony piny i lobo a jo oto, dok mom ibino weko komjo ame geni tuno piny i bur." 
Psalms16:11 Yin imia aŋeo yo me kwo; i nyimi tye twon lelo adwoŋ meicel, ŋeti tuŋcem tye iye yomcuny ame perakino waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms17:1 Winy kokona, Ama Rwot, pien koppa tye atir, cik yiti iwiny kwacca, ame aya i doga kun goba mom iye." 
Psalms17:2 Tim ber imia aloo kop, yin en ineno gin ame tye atira." 
Psalms17:3 Ka ce iŋio cunya, ka ce ilima dyewor, kadi bed itema kede diro, mom gire ibino nwoŋo ni atimo timmoro arac, kop ame ya i doga daŋ mom tye iye balloro." 
Psalms17:4 Aco kop a dok i kom tic a dano, an alubo kop ame ya i dogi, mom alubo tim otim tim me byemi atwal," 
Psalms17:5 An alubo yoni keken, tyena mom ru ocer teŋe kadi acel." 
Psalms17:6 An akok gira baŋi, Ama Obaŋa, pien ibino gamo doga, cik yiti iwiny koppa." 
Psalms17:7 Nyut marri a mom lokere i yore me awura, yin en ame ilaro jo ame yenyo ka larre, i ciŋ okworgi, i ŋeti tuŋcem." 
Psalms17:8 Gwoka kite ame igwoko kede toŋ waŋi, kana i tipo me bwomi," 
Psalms17:9 i ciŋ jo areco ame yako limma, ame gin twon okworra atek meicel, ame ogura dyere." 
Psalms17:10 Kica moro doŋ mom i cunygi, pien ocule oko, okobo kop ame owakere awaka." 
Psalms17:11 Obedo libba i kabedo ducu, aman doŋ ogura oko dyere, waŋgi ocikere acika i koma meretta piny." 
Psalms17:12 Ocalo doŋ eŋatu owor ame cunye apupuka apuka, me mako gi-acama mere, ocalo atin eŋatu ame tye opono me libo jo." 
Psalms17:13 Ya malo, Ama Rwot, me irwatte okworra, lweny kedgi me ilogi oko. Lar kwona i ciŋ jo areco, kede pala me lwennyi." 
Psalms17:14 Lara i ciŋgi kede twerri, Ama Rwot, lara i ciŋ jo ame doŋ onwoŋo jami ame cunygi mito oko i kwo man. Migi oyeŋ i gin ame yam ikano pirgi; mii itinogi nwoŋ adoŋ okato kare; mii moro doŋ pi ikwaegi daŋ," 
Psalms17:15 Aco an gira, abino ciko waŋa komi, kun kitena atira; ka aco i waŋ nino, neno calli bino miya yomcuny." 
Psalms18:1 Amari gira, Ama Rwot, pien yin en ibedo tekona," 
Psalms18:2 Rwot gire en obedo ka larrena atek meicel, en tek kato kidi oko, Obaŋana obedo twon kidi moro atek odoco, ka alaro baŋe ginnoro mom doŋ guda. En geŋo koma calo kwot; en ka larrena atek meicel ame ariŋo alaro." 
Psalms18:3 An gira acwalo dwona baŋi, yin Rwot, yin en a myero paki, yin en ilarra i ciŋ okworra." 
Psalms18:4 Pien biamwonyi me to onwoŋo doŋ ogura oko dyere, biamwonyi me to onwoŋo doŋ ocorre oko i koma." 
Psalms18:5 Tol me Ceol onwoŋo doŋ olida ame ka weo pe, kun owic a to daŋ doŋ tye oterre oko i nyima." 
Psalms18:6 An gira acwalo dwona baŋi, Ama Rwot ka atye i peko, an gira acwao dwona baŋi me konya, yin Obaŋa, En winyo dwona i ode, kokona owinyere i yite." 
Psalms18:7 I kare-nono lobo oyeŋere te wirre, acakki te kiddi daŋ oyeŋere kun myel i kirkir, pien akemo onwoŋo omako Rwot." 
Psalms18:8 Yito oduny malo kun donyo wume, twon maccoro alyet te donyo doge, kede lodi mac okur atek." 
Psalms18:9 Odio polo odwoko piny, en te bino piny; kun piny col icuc i te tyene piny." 
Psalms18:10 En otwarre obino piny kun obedo i ŋe okerubi; yamo te ru riŋo kede oko piny. 
Psalms18:11 En te miyo piny acol wumere oko ipuk; eka pol apek obedo pii keken te doko kema mere. 
Psalms18:12 Tuŋ nyime onwoŋo ler alera, pee kede lodi mac okur te ya i pollere-nono." 
Psalms18:13 Dwon Rwot te mwoc i polo; dwon ŋat Amalo Meicel te winyere; pee kede lodi mac okur te corre piny. 
Psalms18:14 Obao atero mere, okworrere te ket atata; omio lutkot owil, co te ket i ŋwec." 
Psalms18:15 Pii i dye nam opokere, tere te nen; acakki te lobo te doŋ olaŋara; i kare ame Rwot ojuko okworrere, kun weo me wume kuto komgi." 
Psalms18:16 Rwot ocwao bade i polo, te mako ciŋa, en te waya en te waya oko i twon pi moro atut." 
Psalms18:17 En te larra oko i ciŋ jo atek ame daga; i ciŋ okwor ame onwoŋo mom aromo loyo. 
Psalms18:18 I kare ame atye kede can, gin ocako lweny i koma, ento Rwot gire te gwoka." 
Psalms18:19 Rwot olarra okela kan alac, pien cunye onwoŋo yom i koma," 
Psalms18:20 Rwot omia mot me pwoya arom aroma i kitena atira, omia winyo pien yia gira ler." 
Psalms18:21 An abedo lubo gira gin a Rwot mito, mom ru atimo ginnoro arac ame poka kede Obaŋa." 
Psalms18:22 Pien gin ame en ociko luŋ tye i nyima, dok daŋ mom ru akwero lubo icwillere moro." 
Psalms18:23 En oneno ni an a mom i balloro, agwokere gira i timo gin arac." 
Psalms18:24 Mannono omio Rwot omia mot me pwoya, pien oneno ni kitena atira dok oneno ni an yia ler." 
Psalms18:25 Yin Rwot ame inyutte keni baŋ jo a genne ni yin igenne, dok daŋ inyutte baŋ jo a yigi ler ni yin yii ler." 
Psalms18:26 Jo a kitegi beco yin inyutte baŋgi ni iber, eka baŋ jo a yigi col ite nyutto baŋgi ni yin itek." 
Psalms18:27 Yin giri ilaro jo ame mwolle i nyimi; ento iciko waŋi i kom wegi abwone me iwagi idwoggogi piny. 
Psalms18:28 Yin giri ibedo tarana ame menya, Ama Rwot, Obaŋana gire en a menyo piny acol ame atye iye" 
Psalms18:29 Yin en imia teko me loyo okworra; kadi ocokere me lweny i koma; Obaŋana gire en amia teko me pye kalo cel. 
Psalms18:30 Gin ame Obaŋa-ni timo, ber meicel, gin a Rwot ociko cobere kakare. En tye acalo kwot me geŋo kom jo luŋ; ame riŋo laro baŋe." 
Psalms18:31 Ŋa kara ame dok obedo Obaŋa, mom Rwot keken? Ŋa ame dok calo kidi, mom Obaŋawa keken?" 
Psalms18:32 Obaŋa-nono en ame ruka kede teko, en a mia awoto i kuc." 
Psalms18:33 En mio tyena bedo calo tyen atil; en ame mia acuŋ atek i wi kidi malo," 
Psalms18:34 En a pwonya i kite me lweny; ame mia atwero telo akud atero me mola. 
Psalms18:35 Yin doŋ ityeko miya kwot me larre, kony ame imia omio adoko twon lo moro adwoŋ," 
Psalms18:36 Imio kakara obedo alac; omio tyena mom ocer. 
Psalms18:37 Aryemo okworra ate makogi oko; akumo i komgi aboŋo weo naka ka gin otum. 
Psalms18:38 Aonyogi luŋ piny ame mom dok oromo ya; co oradde atata i te tyena piny. 
Psalms18:39 Pien yin imia teko me lweny, imia aloo okworra oko," 
Psalms18:40 Imio okworra omukere oko i nyima ote loka ŋegi; jo ame daga doŋ atyeko oko iweŋ. 
Psalms18:41 Otemo yenyo ŋat a myero konygi, cite mom onen; okok-gu baŋ Rwot, cite mom ogamo doggi." 
Psalms18:42 Aŋinyogi apwot calo apua ame yamo akolo, ajejebogi odoco calo coto ame onyonyono i dye yo." 
Psalms18:43 Yin en a rik ilara i baŋ jo ojem; ite gwoka calo aloc i wi rok apapat; jo a yam mom aŋeo doŋ i te locca. 
Psalms18:44 Tekki owinyo kop i koma ote cako wora oko; rok ocele luŋ obino te ryebere piny i nyima. 
Psalms18:45 Gin luŋ oonyo toŋigi piny, ote wote i ka-ponogi i myelkom" 
Psalms18:46 Rwot akwo en kidi atek me larrena, myero pwoc! Obaŋana en a gire lara. Myero rab pi dittere." 
Psalms18:47 Obaŋana en omio aculo kworra, en omio rok luŋ odok i te locca," 
Psalms18:48 dok okwanya i ciŋ okworra, yin en a rik itiŋa malo i wi okworra, yin a rik ilara i ciŋ obyemi." 
Psalms18:49 Man omio an gira abino pwoyi akina orok; dok abino wero wer me pako nyiŋi, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms18:50 Obaŋa gire mio twon loc adwoŋ meicel baŋ abaka mere; en nyuto marrere a mom lokere baŋ ŋat a en oyero, baŋ Daudi kede baŋ i kwae waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms19:1 Polo kede jami iye nyuto kwogo Obaŋa, polo nyuto tic ame en otio kannaler." 
Psalms19:2 Nino acel acel rabo kwogo Obaŋa baŋ nino a lube, dyewor acel acel daŋ kobbi dyewor ocele." 
Psalms19:3 Mom tye dwonnoro ame winyere, mom gire okobo kopporo kadi acel;" 
Psalms19:4 aco ennono dwongi winyere aloŋo i wi podo luŋ, kop ame gin kobo tuno naka iyi agikki piny. Obaŋa oketo kema me bedo a ceŋ malo kuno," 
Psalms19:5 ame pelo iye calo anyom ame oya i ode; cobo wottere i yomcuny calo twon lo moro atek meicel. 
Psalms19:6 Ya i polo tuŋ cel, te wot naka tuŋ ocele; mom tye ginnoro ame lyeto mere mom gudo." 
Psalms19:7 Cik a Rwot ber, dok tye atira, roco kwo a dano doko anyen; gin ame Obaŋa ociko genne gire, mio ŋat a mom i ŋeccoro doko ŋat a ryek." 
Psalms19:8 Pwony a Rwot atira, yomoro cuny dano; cik a Rwot ber odoco, niaŋo dano aber," 
Psalms19:9 Lworo Rwot ber, perakino gire atwal; cik a Rwot luŋ ateni, dok bedo arom aroma kare luŋ." 
Psalms19:10 Pire tek kato jabu oko, kadijabu ame olio acil rom mene; dok alim kato kic oko, kadi bed en a pwod aton atona i pedo kic," 
Psalms19:11 Medo i mannono, gin en a kwenyoro an amironi; ŋat ame gwoko cikki nwoŋo mot adwoŋ." 
Psalms19:12 Ŋa kara ame romo ŋeyo ballere kene? Lara i bal luŋ ame opono. 
Psalms19:13 Gwoka i kom bal ame ya pi awaka, kur iwek loa, bino miyo abedo aboŋo balloro i koma, dok kun mom atimo twon balloro adwoŋ." 
Psalms19:14 Mi kop ame ya i doga, kede tammoro luŋ ame tyei cunya, obed gin ame yin ipwoo, Ama Rwot, yin i ka-larrena, dok yin daŋ en ilara." 
Psalms20:1 Rwot myero gam dogi i kare ame itye i peko, nyiŋ Obaŋa a Yakobo myero gwoki." 
Psalms20:2 En myero cwayi kony i kabedo mere acil, en myero cwaki i Cion!" 
Psalms20:3 Myero en po pi motti luŋ ame imio, dok daŋ ogam i yomcuny mot awaŋani ame iyale kede." 
Psalms20:4 En myero mii gin ame cunyi mito, dok cob ginnoro luŋ ame cunyi mito tiyo." 
Psalms20:5 Wan myero owo i wer me lelo pi locci, oŋab benderawa malo i nyiŋ Obaŋawa. Rwot myero mii ginnoro luŋ ame ikwao pire," 
Psalms20:6 Aman doŋ aŋeo ni Rwot konyo abaka ame en oyero, en bino gamo doge i polo mere acil; bino miyo en loo lweny." 
Psalms20:7 Jo mogo geŋo gadigadi lweny kede aguragura, ento wan ogeno Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Psalms20:8 Gin bino rette gire oko piny, cite wan obino ya ote cuŋ atek," 
Psalms20:9 Mi abaka loo lweny, Ama Rwot; gam dogwa ka ce olwoŋi." 
Psalms21:1 Amironi abaka lelo pi tekoni, Ama Rwot; kony ame imie yomoro cunye nadi!" 
Psalms21:2 Yin doŋ imie gin ame cunye mito, dok mom ikwero kwaccere." 
Psalms21:3 Iŋolo wie i mot abeco meicel, iketo tok kwogo me jabu i wie." 
Psalms21:4 En okwai ni imie kwo ame daŋ ite miye, imie kwo ame perakino waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms21:5 Kwogo mere dwoŋ meicel pi kony ame imie, imie kwogo kede loc," 
Psalms21:6 Yin doŋ imie gum atwal, cunye yom pien yin itye kede." 
Psalms21:7 Pien amironi abaka geŋo Rwot; pi mar a mom lokere ame Ŋat Amalo Meicel tye kede i kome, ginnoro gire mom bino core teŋe." 
Psalms21:8 Ciŋi bino gudo kom okworri luŋ, ciŋi me tuŋ cam bino mako jo luŋ ame dagi." 
Psalms21:9 Ibino lokogi odoko calo keno ame mac alyel iye, i nino ame ibino nen iye. Akemoni bino miyo inekogi oko, mac bino, waŋogi oko," 
Psalms21:10 Ibino tyeko ikwae luŋ i lobo, karacel kede itino mere i akina jo." 
Psalms21:11 Ka ce gin oyikere me timo ginnoro arac i komi, akadi oyikere me timo tim me idwali, yikgi mom bino cobere." 
Psalms21:12 Pien ibino miyogi omukere oko i ŋwec, ateroni bino pimo nyimgi ikokome." 
Psalms21:13 Odwori pi tekoni, Ama Rwot! Wan obino wer kun opako twerri." 
Psalms22:1 Obaŋana, Obaŋana iweka piŋo? Piŋo kara itye kannabor abora keda ame mom iromo lara, mom itye ka winyo cura bo?" 
Psalms22:2 Ama Obaŋana, akok dyeceŋ cite mom igamo doga, akok dyewor daŋ, cite mom anwoŋo kare moro me weo." 
Psalms22:3 Aco kono yin Obaŋa ame cil, i bedo i wi kom loc ame jo Icrael paki apaka." 
Psalms22:4 Kwariwa rik geni, gin ogeni, yin ite larogi." 
Psalms22:5 Gin rik ocwao kwacgi baŋi, omio ote larre, gin rik ogeni, omio mom obedo icwercunnyoro." 
Psalms22:6 Cite an kom arom aroma i kudi ata, mom dano, ame jo ŋalo kun ocao acaa." 
Psalms22:7 Jo luŋ ame nena, yeta ayeta, ocima i lebgi, dok oyeŋo wigi i koma kun okobo ni," 
Psalms22:8 “En geŋo Obaŋa, wek Obaŋa lare, Rwot myero lare, pien Rwot pwoc.”" 
Psalms22:9 Aco kono yin en a rik imio onywala yin en a daŋ igwoka i kor totta ame pwod adot. 
Psalms22:10 An abedo jeŋere i komi cakere ameonywala, cakere i kare ame onywala yin en ibedo Obaŋana." 
Psalms22:11 Kur ibed bor keda, pien can ceggi acega, aco kono mom tye ŋattoro aromo konya." 
Psalms22:12 Okwor doŋ ogura oko dyere calo twoni ager, ogura doŋ oko atek calo twoni atek me Bacan;" 
Psalms22:13 otye ka ŋamo doggi alac i koma, calo eŋatu ager ame tye ka koko," 
Psalms22:14 An doŋ acalo pii ame oonyo oko piny, cogo koma doŋ ogwegweta oko i kabedo ducu; cunya doŋ omeye oko calo odok kic, amontenna doŋ ojebere oko;" 
Psalms22:15 Tekona otwo doŋ calo tako gulu, leba daŋ doŋ omoko oko i dano abuto doŋ piny iyi apua calo dano oto." 
Psalms22:16 Nen jo doŋ ogura dyere calo gwogi, otim tim areco apipim doŋ ogura dyere; ocobo ciŋa kede tyena." 
Psalms22:17 Atwero kwano cogo me koma luŋ, ociko waŋgi i koma kun onena i keo meicel;" 
Psalms22:18 Opoko boŋŋina i akinagi, obolo kwir pi boŋŋina." 
Psalms22:19 Cite yin myero kur ibed abor keda, Ama Rwot, yin en ikonya, ru lara ba!" 
Psalms22:20 Lar tipona i pala romo, lar kwona i teko a gwogi." 
Psalms22:21 Lara i dog eŋatu, kede tipona i kom tuŋ twoni ager," 
Psalms22:22 Abino dworo nyiŋi baŋ omegona, abino paki i akina lwak ocokere." 
Psalms22:23 Wun jo luŋ ame woro Rwot, pake wunu, wun jo a Yakobo luŋ, ket wunu kwogo i kome, wun jo Icrael ducu, lwore wunu." 
Psalms22:24 Pien en mom ocaowu, mom okwero can a jo a can opoto i komgi, en mom orwenyo oko i baŋgi, en winyo kokogi ka okok baŋe." 
Psalms22:25 Abino paki i akina lwak ocokere karacel, abino cobo gin ame aciko i nyim jo ame wore," 
Psalms22:26 Jo a can opoto i komgi bino cem te yeŋ atek, jo ame yenyo Rwot bino pako Rwot," 
Psalms22:27 Myero ibed giri kwo aber nakanaka, Jo me wi podo luŋ bino po pi Rwot, ote lokere bino baŋe; doggola me rok apapat, gin luŋ obino wore." 
Psalms22:28 Pien loc obedo me Obaŋa, en loo tok luŋ aluŋa." 
Psalms22:29 Jo a wakere luŋ me wi podo bino ryebere i nyime, jo ame to te dok iyi apua daŋ bino ryebere i nyime," 
Psalms22:30 Lwagi jo me kare luŋ bino tic baŋe, jo bino rabo pi Rwot baŋ lwagi jo ame lubogi," 
Psalms22:31 kun otito pi larrere baŋ jo ame mom ru onywalogi, ni Rwot laro jo mere." 
Psalms23:1 Rwot en akwatta, ginnoro mom bino remma." 
Psalms23:2 En mia abuto iyi elet aber, en telo nyima naka i dog pii aŋic." 
Psalms23:3 En roco kwona doko anyen, en telo nyima mia alubo yo me kite atira, pi keto kwogo i nyiŋe." 
Psalms23:4 Kadi bed atye ka beo i luŋŋoro acol icuc, mom abino lworo ginnoro, Ama Rwot, pien yin gire itye keda, lutti kede abironi me kwat mio cunya bedo atek." 
Psalms23:5 Yin iketo cam me acamana i wi meja, kun okworra tye aneno. Yin iwirowa kede moo, kun ikopona opoŋ ikwic." 
Psalms23:6 Ateteni, berri kede kicani, bino bedo i koma pi kare luŋ me kwona, dok abino bedo i ot a Rwot nakanaka." 
Psalms24:1 Lobo luŋ kede jami luŋ a tye iye obedo me a Rwot, wi podo luŋ kedejo luŋ ame bedo iye." 
Psalms24:2 En onwoŋo oketo lobo i dye nam, kun acakki tere tye i dye pii me nam atut." 
Psalms24:3 Ŋa ame romo yito malo i wi kidi a Rwot? dok ŋa ame romo cuŋ i kabedo mere acil? 
Psalms24:4 Dano ame kite atira dok ame yie cil, amom ketto cunye i gin a mom atira, dok mom kwoŋo kwonnoro me goba goba." 
Psalms24:5 Rwot bino miyo dano-nono gum, dok Obaŋa ame lare bino kwanyo kop i wie." 
Psalms24:6 Mannono en jo ame woro Obaŋa, gin jo ame bino i nyim Obaŋa a Yakobo," 
Psalms24:7 Wun dogcel luŋ, yabere wunu ba alac odoco, doggola luŋ acon daŋ myero yabere oko, me abaka won kwogo bin dony iye." 
Psalms24:8 Kara abaka me kwogo-nono en ŋa ba? En obedo Rwot atek ame loo twer ducu, Rwot ame loo ducu i lweny." 
Psalms24:9 Wun dogcel luŋ, yabere wunu ba alac odoco, doggola luŋ acon daŋ myero yabere oko, me abaka won kwogo bin dony iye." 
Psalms24:10 Kara abaka won kwogo-nono en ŋa ba? En Rwot me mony, en obedo abaka won kwogo." 
Psalms25:1 Atiŋo kwona amio baŋi, Am Rwot," 
Psalms25:2 An gira ageni, Ama Obaŋana, kur imi lewic maka, kur imi okworra bed ŋala." 
Psalms25:3 Ama Rwot, kur imi lewic mak jo ame kuri, ento mi lewic mak jo ame kweri nononono." 
Psalms25:4 Rwot, mia aŋe yoni, pwonya kop i kom yoni ducu." 
Psalms25:5 Tela me lubo ateni, kun ipwonya, pien yin Obaŋa ame lara, ageni nino ducu." 
Psalms25:6 Pien kicani, Ama Rwot, po pi marri a mom lokere, ame ibedo bedo kede cakere con." 
Psalms25:7 Kur dok ipo pi bal ame atimo i kare me tinona, kur daŋ ipo pi rocca luŋ, po pira pi marri a mom lokere, pi berri giri, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms25:8 Rwot ber, dok cunye ler, mannono omio en pwonyo obalo me ŋeyo yo," 
Psalms25:9 En telo jo ame mwol i gin atira, kun pwonyogi me ŋeyo yo mere." 
Psalms25:10 Mar a mom lokere kede gen, dwoŋ meicel i yo a Rwot luŋ, pi jo ame lubo cikere mere, karacel kede koppere me caden." 
Psalms25:11 Pi ber a nyiŋi, Ama Rwot, wek balle oko pien dwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms25:12 Dano ame lworo Rwot, Obaŋa bino pwonye me ŋeyo yo a myero elub," 
Psalms25:13 En ikome bino bedo i lonyo kare luŋ, dok itino mere bino leyo lobo." 
Psalms25:14 Rwot mako dyere i jo ame wore, en miogi oŋeo cikere mere," 
Psalms25:15 Aciko waŋa kare luŋ i kom Rwot, pien en a gonyo tyena ka omoko i bwo." 
Psalms25:16 Lokere idwog baŋa me inyutta berri pien atye doŋ kena kun can orida oko. 
Psalms25:17 Kwany cwercuny luŋ ame tye i cunya, dok ilara i peko luŋ ame atye kede." 
Psalms25:18 Tam pi can kede peko ame atye kede, me ite weko balla luŋ," 
Psalms25:19 Tam pi wel okwor ame atye kede, dok inen kite ame gin daga kede agwa meicel." 
Psalms25:20 Gwok kwona, dok ilara, Ama Rwot; kur imi ket lewic i koma, pien an gira ariŋo alaro baŋi." 
Psalms25:21 Myero ler a cunya kede cunya ame tye atira gwoka, pien an gira ageni." 
Psalms25:22 Lakoro jo Icrael, Ama Rwot, i kom peko luŋ ame gin otye kede." 
Psalms26:1 Ŋol koppa, Ama Rwot, pien abedo timo gin a tye atira, abedo geno Obaŋa kare luŋ, kun mom agatte kadi acel." 
Psalms26:2 Ŋia aber odoco, dok itema, tem cunya kede tamma luŋ." 
Psalms26:3 Pien a tye ka neno mar a mom lokere ame i tye kede, dok a tye ka timo ginnoro luŋ i gen adwoŋ." 
Psalms26:4 Mom anywako kabedo i jo ogoba, mom daŋ anotte obwol jo." 
Psalms26:5 Adag ribere otim tim areco, dok mom daŋ abino nywako kabedo i jo a kitegi reco." 
Psalms26:6 Alogo gira ciŋa oko me nyuto ni a mom i balloro, me awot aman keno lammi, Ama Rwot," 
Psalms26:7 kun awero wer me pwoyi i dwon aloŋo, dok atito pi ticcoro luŋ me awura ame yin itio," 
Psalms26:8 Ama Rwot, an amaro bedo i odi, kede kabedo ame kwogoni bedo iye." 
Psalms26:9 Kur imia arweny oko karacel obalo, kur imi kwona orweny oko i jo ame onyo remo a jo," 
Psalms26:10 jo ame ciŋgi mom keŋ timo gin arac, ame caogi opoŋ i lim ame owilogi kede i muŋ," 
Psalms26:11 Cite an gira, cunya cil i kare luŋ, lakoro an, dok kica myero maki i koma," 
Psalms26:12 Tyena ocuŋ kanopirre apira, abino pako Rwot naka i dye lwak ocokere luŋ." 
Psalms27:1 Obaŋa en obedo tarana, dok en a daŋ lara; kara doŋ ŋa ame abino lworo? Rwot en obedo kan atek me gwoko kwona; kara doŋ ŋa ame myero alwor?" 
Psalms27:2 Ka ce jo areco mito lweny i koma me neka, kun okobo kop arac i koma, okworra kede omonena, obino gatte ote rette oko piny." 
Psalms27:3 Kadi mony luŋ gura dyere, mom abino bedo i lworo moro i cunya; kadi bed ocak lweny i koma, pwod gire abino bedo kede gen pi Rwot." 
Psalms27:4 Tye gin acel keken ame akwao i baŋ Rwot, mannono keken en ame amito; amito ni abed gira i ot a Rwot, pi kare luŋ me kwona, me abed neno ber a Rwot, dok abed penye i ode kuno me tela." 
Psalms27:5 Pien i kare me peko, en bino kanai ode, en bino wuma oko i kema mere, bino ciba malo i wi kidi." 
Psalms27:6 Mannono bino miyo abedo gira malo, i wi okworra ame ogura dyere; abino yalo Rwot i mot i kema mere, kun aredo i yomcuny meicel. Abino wero wer kun apako Rwot i dwon amit." 
Psalms27:7 Winy kokona, Ama Rwot, ka akok baŋi, kica myero maki i koma, me igam doga." 
Psalms27:8 Yin ikobo ni, “Bin baŋa.” Agamo i cunya ni, “Abino bino baŋi, Ama Rwot.”" 
Psalms27:9 Kur iponna oko, Ama Rwot. Kur iryema an amironi kede akemo, yin ame yam ibedo konya. Kur ibola oko ba, kur iweka ata, Ama Obaŋana ame lara." 
Psalms27:10 Pien pappa kede totta oweka oko ata, cite Rwot gire bino gwoka." 
Psalms27:11 Pwonya me aŋe yoni, Ama Rwot; tela i yo ame tur kede popony mom iye, kur iweka i ciŋ okworra," 
Psalms27:12 Kur ijala i ciŋ omonena; pien ocaden ame ogoba tye ka ŋuno goba i koma, kop doŋ adonnyo i doggi agwa meicel." 
Psalms27:13 An pwod aye ni abino neno ber a Rwot, i lobo a jo akwo," 
Psalms27:14 Kur Rwot; cuŋ atek kun cunyi nwaŋ, myero ikur Rwot." 
Psalms28:1 An acwao kwacca baŋi, Ama Rwot, yin ibedo kidina atek ame gwoka, kur icul yiti oko, Ama Rwot, pien ka yin iliŋ aliŋa, abedo arom aroma i jo ame oyiko i bur." 
Psalms28:2 Winy kwacca ame abako kede doga baŋi, ka akoko kony i baŋi, kun ataŋo ciŋa malo i nyimi, kun nyima oneno kabedoni acil meicel." 
Psalms28:3 Kur itera karacel i jo akitegi reco, ame gin obedo jo ame timo tim areco, ame kobo pi kela kuc baŋ owotegi, kun cunygi col meicel." 
Psalms28:4 Culgi ame rom aroma i ticgi, dok ame rom aroma i tim arac ame gin timo, culgi a rom aroma i tic ame ciŋgi otio, culgi i cul ame oporre pirgi." 
Psalms28:5 Pien gin mom oparo pi tic a Rwot otio, onyo pi gin ame en oketo, mannono omio en bino turogi oko, mom dok ote ya malo atwal." 
Psalms28:6 Rwot myero pwo, pien en owinyo dwona, ame abako i doga baŋe." 
Psalms28:7 Rwot en tekona kede kwot me geŋo koma, an gira agene; omio en konya, cunya te bedo ayom meicel, an apwoe kede wer me pake." 
Psalms28:8 Rwot en obedo teko a jo mere, dano mere ame owiro kede moo laro baŋe." 
Psalms28:9 Lar lwakki, Ama Rwot, dok imigi gum, tim ber ibed akwatgi dok igwokgi nakanaka." 
Psalms29:1 Tit wunu pi Rwot, wunu, gin akwo luŋ i polo, rab wunu pi kwogo mere kede teko mere luŋ." 
Psalms29:2 Rab wunu pi kwogo me nyiŋe, wore wunu kun iruko wunu ruk acil." 
Psalms29:3 Dwon Rwot mor winyere naka i pii; Obaŋa me kwogo tye ka mwoc calo kot, dwone tye ka winyere naka i wi nam adoŋo," 
Psalms29:4 Dwon Rwot tye i teko meicel; kwogo dwoŋ i dwone nadi. 
Psalms29:5 Dwon Rwotturo anaka yen cedar, dwone turo yen cedar me Lebanon." 
Psalms29:6 En mio Lebanon takoro cala roya, Cirion takoro calo atin jobi." 
Psalms29:7 Dwon Rwot mio lutkot meny, calo mac a lyel." 
Psalms29:8 Dwon Rwot yeŋo anaka tim, dwone yeŋo tim me Kadec." 
Psalms29:9 Dwon Rwot mio atil nywal oko, dwone ruto yen i tim luŋ piny, jo luŋ i ot ame wore te wo ni, “Kwogo bed baŋ Obaŋa.”" 
Psalms29:10 Rwot en ame looanaka pii luŋ ame tye i nam, en bedo i wi kom loc nakanaka acalo abaka," 
Psalms29:11 Rwot myero mi jo mere teko, Rwot myero mi jo mere gum me bedo i kuc." 
Psalms30:1 Apak i gira, Ama Rwot pien ikonya, dok mom imio okworra olelo i koma," 
Psalms30:2 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, rik akok baŋi me ikonya, nen doŋ ityeko miya acaŋ oko." 
Psalms30:3 Nen yin ikwanyo tipona i Ceol twal, imia dok akwo i akina jo ame doŋ odonyo piny i lyel." 
Psalms30:4 Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot, wun jo mere acil, pwoc wunu pi nyiŋe acil." 
Psalms30:5 Pien akemo mere mom ri nakanaka, cite berrere bedo pi kare me kwowa luŋ, Ka ce abedo i cwercuny dyewor, odiko nwoŋo atye alelo alela." 
Psalms30:6 Man omio an i kare ame atye aber meicel akobo ni, “Ginnoro gire mom bino corra teŋe.”" 
Psalms30:7 Pi berri, Ama Rwot, imia acuŋ atek calo twon kidi atek: i kare ame ipono oko i nyima, cunya opoto." 
Psalms30:8 An gira rik akok baŋi, Ama Rwot, dok abako doga baŋi kun akwai ni," 
Psalms30:9 “Kara tona twero miyi kony aŋo, ka ce an doŋ adonyo oko piny i lyel? Apua me lobo bino paki bo? dok bino rabo pi kiteni atira." 
Psalms30:10 Ama Rwot, winy kokona, kica omaki i koma, Ama Rwot, yin myero ibed ŋat ame konya.”" 
Psalms30:11 Iloko kumona odoko lelo, imia agonyo boŋo cola oko i koma, ite lunyo ruka kede yomcuny." 
Psalms30:12 Me tipona bed paki kun mom liŋ, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, abino pwoyi nakanaka." 
Psalms31:1 An alaro baŋi, Ama Rwot, kur imi lewic maka; lara pi kiteni atira." 
Psalms31:2 Cik yiti iwiny koppa, Ama Rwot, ru lara oyot meicel. Bed kidi atek me larrena, cel atek me lara." 
Psalms31:3 Yin en ibedo kidina kede cel atek me gwoka, Ama Rwot, tela dok igwoka pi nyiŋi." 
Psalms31:4 Gonya iyi boo ame ociko kan adiŋ pira, pien yin ibedo ka larrena." 
Psalms31:5 Amio kwona i ciŋi, Ama Rwot, yin gire ilakoro an, Ama Rwot Obaŋa ame genne." 
Psalms31:6 Yin idag jo ame woro cal jogi a konygi mom, an gira ageni, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms31:7 Abino lelo kun cunya yom pi marri a mom lokere, pien yin ineno can ame atye kede, dok iŋeo pekona." 
Psalms31:8 Dok mom imia i ciŋ okworra, imia kabedo alac me bedona." 
Psalms31:9 Kica myero omaki i koma, Ama Rwot, pien atye i can, koko daŋ omio waŋa ocido oko, tipona kede koma doŋ oballe oko." 
Psalms31:10 Pien abedo bedo i cwercuny kare luŋ me kwona, kun mwaka i mwaka atye ka cur acura. Tekona otum oko pi peko ame abedo beo iye, cogona luŋ daŋ onyoŋere oko," 
Psalms31:11 Jo ame daga doŋ bedo ŋala aŋala, owotena-gu nyera anyera, jo ame ŋea doŋ lwora alwora, jo ame nena i dye yo riŋo gigi oko." 
Psalms31:12 An doŋ arom aroma i dano oto, wi jo doŋ owil i koma oko, calo tako gulu ame obolo i wi odur." 
Psalms31:13 Nen atye ka winyo jo tye amuŋo i nyiŋa, lworo doŋ ogurra oko dyere. Oyubere doŋ oko pira, otye ka poro kop me neka." 
Psalms31:14 Cite an gira ageni, Ama Rwot, akobo ni, “Yin en ibedo Obaŋana.”" 
Psalms31:15 Kare me kwona gire tye i te twerri, lara i ciŋ okworra kede i ciŋ jo ame wuna." 
Psalms31:16 Nen amironi i waŋ me kica, Ama Rwot, lara pi marri a mom lokere," 
Psalms31:17 Kur imi lewic maka, Ama Rwot, pien an gira akok baŋi, mi lewic mak otim tim areco, migi oto owot i Ceol liliŋ." 
Psalms31:18 Mi leb jo akobo kop goba to oko, ame kobo kop areco me acae, kun owakere kede i kom jo a kitegi atira." 
Psalms31:19 Ber ame ikano pi jo ame lwori dwoŋ nadi, gin ame itimo me awura pi jo ame riŋo laro baŋi dwoŋ nadi i nyim jo luŋ." 
Psalms31:20 Yin igwokogi i kabedo i nyim, kan ame itye iye, ilarogi i ciŋ jo ame tye ka poro kop i komgi, igwokogi aber i odi, i kom leb abit ame jo yelogi kede." 
Psalms31:21 Rwot myero pwo, pien onyuto marrere a mom lokere baŋa i yore me awura, i kare ame rik ogura dyere calo boma ame oguro." 
Psalms31:22 I twon lworo adwoŋ a rik atye kede ate kobo ni, “Oryema doŋ teŋe meicel nyimi.” Cite yin rik iwinyo kwacca ame abako kede doga baŋi, i kare ame akok baŋi me konya." 
Psalms31:23 Wun jo ame geno Rwot, mar wunu Rwot, Rwot gwoko jo ame genne, cite jo ame opala, en culogi can oromogi odoco," 
Psalms31:24 Cuŋ wunu atek kun cunywu nwaŋ, wun jo luŋ ame geŋo Rwot." 
Psalms32:1 Tye kede winyo, jo a doŋ otimogi kica i kom timgi areco, ame owumo balgi oko." 
Psalms32:2 Tye kede winyo, dano ame Rwot mom okwano balloro i kome, dok ame goba moro mom i cunye," 
Psalms32:3 Ka ce akwero tuco balle, koma balla oko, kadi bed acur ceŋ iyul." 
Psalms32:4 Pien iketo can i koma dyeceŋ kede dyewor, tekona te tum oko odoco, kite ame ikuna rwenyo kede i oro," 
Psalms32:5 Aye doŋ tuco balla i nyimi, ginnoro luŋ arac ame atimo mom amuŋŋi. An rik akobo ni, “Abino tuco balla baŋ Rwot, yin ite tima kica i kom balla.”" 
Psalms32:6 Pi mannono, jo luŋ ame woro Obaŋa, myero gin luŋ ocwa kwacgi baŋi, i kare ame gin tye kede can, ame alele kot atek mito mwonyogi oko, pi mannono mom bino tuno i komgi," 
Psalms32:7 Yin en ibedo ka ponona, yin en igwoka ka peko tye, igurra oko dyere kun ilara." 
Psalms32:8 Abino pwonyi kun anyutti yo me aluba, abino miyi ryeko, dok waŋa mom bino rwenyo i komi." 
Psalms32:9 Kur ibed calo aguragura onyo kana a mom ŋeo ginnoro, ame myero twe doge kede wie, me lub gin ame imito." 
Psalms32:10 Jo areco rwatte kede peko adwoŋ meicel, cite jo a geŋo Rwot en gwokogi kede marrere a mom lokere," 
Psalms32:11 Myero ilel wunu kun cunywu yom i Rwot, wun jo a kitewu atira; red wunu pi yomcuny ame itye wunu kede, wun jo luŋ ame cunywu atira." 
Psalms33:1 Lel wunu i Rwot, wun jo a kitewu atira! Pake wunu, wun jo ame winyo koppere!" 
Psalms33:2 Pak wunu Rwot i naŋa opuk, wer wunu wer me pake i naŋa a tollere tye apar twal." 
Psalms33:3 Pake wunu i wer anyen, go wunu naŋa me pake i diro meicel, kun iwero wunu i dwon aloŋo." 
Psalms33:4 Pien kop a Rwot okobo tye kakare, dok en agen meicel i ticcere luŋ," 
Psalms33:5 Rwot maro kite atira kede ŋolo kop atira, mar a Rwot a mom lokere tye adwoŋ meicel i lobo," 
Psalms33:6 Kop a Rwot en omio lobo okette, jami iye luŋ weo mere en omio obedo tye." 
Psalms33:7 En ocoko pii i nam luŋ karacel bala pii i yi cupa, okano nam atut oko calo gin okemo ot kano jami." 
Psalms33:8 Jo me wi lobo luŋ myero wor Rwot, myero jo luŋ ame bedo i wi podo bed i lworo i nyime." 
Psalms33:9 Pien en okobo ka kop, lobo te kette, en ociko acika keken, jami luŋ te bedo tye." 
Psalms33:10 Rwot balo yik a rok apapat oko, en mio tam a jo ocele mom cobere," 
Psalms33:11 Cite gin ame Rwot oyiko perakino waŋ i waŋ, gin ame en otimo i ciŋe bedo me kare luŋ," 
Psalms33:12 Rok ame Obaŋa en a Rwotgi, tye i winyo, jo ame en oyero me bedo jo mere ikome." 
Psalms33:13 Rwot neno piny i polo, en neno jo luŋ aluŋa," 
Psalms33:14 En noloro piny i wi kom me loccere, neno jo luŋ ame bedo i wi lobo." 
Psalms33:15 Rwot gire en ame oketo cuny jo luŋ, en neno ginnoro luŋ ame gin tio." 
Psalms33:16 Abaka mom larre pi lwak mony ame en tye kede, acirikale mom larre pi twon teko mere adwoŋ." 
Psalms33:17 Aguragura me lweny mom obedo gi-agena i lweny, mom romo laro dano kadi acel, pi twon teko mere adwoŋ wok-ki." 
Psalms33:18 Nen ba, wan Rwot gire mom rwenyo i kom jo ame wore, jo ame tye kede gen pi marrere a mom lokere," 
Psalms33:19 me elar tipogi oko i to, dok egwokgi obed kwo i kare me kec." 
Psalms33:20 Tipowa tye ka kuro Rwot, en obedo akonywa kede kwot me geŋo komwa." 
Psalms33:21 Wan giwa, cunywa yom pire, pien wan otye i gen i kom nyiŋe acil." 
Psalms33:22 Ama Rwot, mi marri a mom lokere bed i komwa, pien wan otye kede gen piri yin keken." 
Psalms34:1 Abino pwoyo Rwot kare luŋ, wer me pake mom bino rwenyo i doga." 
Psalms34:2 Tipona wakere pi Rwot, jo a tye i can myero winy te lelo." 
Psalms34:3 Rab wunu pi dit a Rwot karacel keda, me opak wunu nyiŋe karacel." 
Psalms34:4 Akwao Rwot, en te gamo doga, en te kwanyo lworo luŋ ame onwoŋo atye kede." 
Psalms34:5 Nene wunu, me waŋwu ryeny, me lewic kur dok medde makowu," 
Psalms34:6 Jo ame tye i can kok baŋ Rwot, Rwot te larogi i peko luŋ ame otye kede." 
Psalms34:7 Omalaika a Rwot gwoko jo luŋ ame lworo Rwot, dok larogi i cannoro luŋ." 
Psalms34:8 Koŋ item, me inen ber a Rwot yin ikomi, jo ame laro baŋe tye i yomcuny." 
Psalms34:9 Myero iwor wunu Rwot, wun jo mere ame gene, pien jo ame wore, ginnoro mom remo." 
Psalms34:10 Kadi atin eŋatu buto kec, dok jami apol remo, cite jo ame geno Rwot, mom tye ginnoro aber ameremogi." 
Psalms34:11 Biye wunu itinona, me iwiny wunu koppa, abino pwonyowu kite me woro Rwot," 
Psalms34:12 Ŋa i akinawu ame mito kwo? Imito perakino i lobo kun cunyi yore? 
Psalms34:13 Gwok lebi kur kob ginnoro arac, kede dogi kur ibwol jo." 
Psalms34:14 Ya oko i gin arac, ti gin aber, yeny kuc, ilub yore." 
Psalms34:15 Waŋ Rwot mom rwenyo i kom jo a kitegi atira, ciko yite me winyo kokogi." 
Psalms34:16 Rwot dag neno jo ame timo gin areco, mio nyiŋgi rwenyo oko i wi lobo." 
Psalms34:17 Ka ce jo a kitegi atira okok ni konygi, Rwot winyo kokogi, en te larogi oko i peko ame gin otye kede." 
Psalms34:18 Rwot ceggi acega i jo ame tyei cwercuny, en laro jo ame cunygi ton." 
Psalms34:19 Can ame poto i kom jo a kitegi atira pol atek, cite Rwot larogi iye luŋ." 
Psalms34:20 Rwot gwoko anaka cogo i komgi luŋ, moro acel akinagi mom tur." 
Psalms34:21 Timo tim arac en a bino neko otim bal, dok jo ame dago jo a kitegi atira, kop bino loyogi." 
Psalms34:22 Rwot lakoro kwo omiro mere, kop mom bino loyo jo ame laro baŋe." 
Psalms35:1 Ama Rwot, pid kede jo ame pida, dok ilweny kede jo ame lwenyo keda," 
Psalms35:2 Mak kwot adwoŋŋere kede ginnoro me geŋo komi; me iya malo ikonya. 
Psalms35:3 Wot koŋ doŋ toŋŋi oko, me lweny i kom jo ame ryemo yora, kobbi cunya ni, “An en alari.”" 
Psalms35:4 Mi lewic mak jo ame mito neka, mi jo ame poro kop arac i koma, olokere odok cen i twon lewic adwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms35:5 Migi obed calo cuŋ kal ame yamo kolo, i kare ame omalaika a Rwot tye aryemogi." 
Psalms35:6 Mi yogi acol icuc dok apwot apwota, kare ame omalaika a Rwot aryemogi." 
Psalms35:7 Ociko boogi kan adiŋ pira aboŋo balloro ame onwoŋo i koma, okunyo-gu bur me tyeko kwona nononono." 
Psalms35:8 Mi can tugi atua, kun mom oŋeo kadi acel, migi omok i boogi ame ociko kan adiŋ pira, migi orette oto okoi bur ame okunyo pira," 
Psalms35:9 Cunya te bedo ayom meicel i Rwot, abino lelo meicel pi lara ame en olara kede." 
Psalms35:10 Cogo koma luŋ bino kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, ŋa kara ame cal kedi? Yin ame ilaro jo agoro, i ciŋ dano ame tek loc atek ateka, ilaro ŋat agoro kede ŋat ame piny oloo, i ciŋ jo ame yako jamigi.”" 
Psalms35:11 Ocadennogo me goba ya malo, ote bedo pepenyo an i gin ame an akwia." 
Psalms35:12 Ocula i rac pi gin aber ame an atimo; cunya cwer atek meicel. 
Psalms35:13 Cite an i kare ame komgi lit, abedo ruko boŋo cola, dok abedo minne i kec pirgi. Abedo kwayo Obaŋa kun akula wia piny," 
Psalms35:14 calo ŋat ame akumo pi awottere onyo ominnere, dok abedo wot atata calo ŋat a koko tottere, kun akumo ame akulo wia piny." 
Psalms35:15 Ento gin ka onena, ogatte, gin ocokere me nyera, ocokere karacel me lweny i koma, naka oŋwalo a yam mom aŋeo, obedo yeta kun mom oliŋ kadi acel." 
Psalms35:16 Gin luŋ omedde nywara anywara kun daŋ ocaa, ame okao lakgi atek odoco." 
Psalms35:17 Ama Rwot, kara ibino bedo nena anena naka awene ba? Lara oko i ciŋgi ba, lar kwona i ciŋ eŋatu." 
Psalms35:18 Mannono bino miyo apwoi i akina lwak jo ocokere karacel, abino paki i akina lwak adwoŋ." 
Psalms35:19 Kur imi okworra bed lelo i koma, kun gin obedo otim tim areco, kur imi jo ame daga aboŋo ginnoro ame atimo, bed mimio waŋgi ikoma atata." 
Psalms35:20 Pien gin mom okobo kopporo me kuc, ento gin obedo kobo kop me lweny i kom jo a bedo mot i wi lobo, gin obedo paro kop me bwolo jo keken," 
Psalms35:21 Oŋamo doggi alac me kobo kop i koma, kun okobo ni, “Aa! Aa! Wan doŋ otyeko neno kede waŋwa.”" 
Psalms35:22 Ama Rwot, yin doŋ ityeko neno, kur ibed liŋ aliŋa! Ama Rwot, kur ibed bor keda." 
Psalms35:23 Ya malo, me ibin ikonya, Ama Obaŋana kede rwotta, cuŋ pira," 
Psalms35:24 Kwany kop oko i wia, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, kite acalo yin kiteni atira, me kur imigi olel i wia." 
Psalms35:25 Kur imigi obed kobo i akinagi kengi kengi ni, “Aa! Doŋ onwoŋo gin ame cunywa mito.” Kur imigi obed kobo ni, “Wan doŋ otyeko mwonye oko,”" 
Psalms35:26 Mi lewic mak jo ame nyero canna, babaŋogi oko, Ama Rwot. Mi ale twodgi ducu, gin jo luŋ ame wakere i koma," 
Psalms35:27 Mi jo ame mito ni an alo kop bed i yomcuny, kun okobo kare ducu ni, “Rwot gire dwoŋ meicel, cunye bedo yom ka omiro mere tye i kuc.”" 
Psalms35:28 Abino rabo pi kiteni atir, dok abino pako nyiŋ i dyeceŋ luŋ." 
Psalms36:1 Tim me turo cik bedo i cuny dano arac, kan atut, lworo moro i kom Obaŋa mom tye i cunye kadi acel." 
Psalms36:2 En bwolle kene ni ballere mom obino neno, dok ni ballere mom oromo nwoŋo, dok daŋ mom oromo kwero," 
Psalms36:3 Kop ame ya i doge reco, dok me goba keken, en mom doŋ romo timo timmoro i ryeko dok aber," 
Psalms36:4 En paro pi timo gin arac, kadi i kare ame obuto i wi tanda mere, en lubo yo areco ducu." 
Psalms36:5 Ama Rwot, marri a mom lokere tuno naka i polo, dok kiteni atira, tuno naka i pol," 
Psalms36:6 Kiteni atira calo kiddi Obaŋa, ŋolo koppi atira calo nam atut, yin gire en ame ilaro dano kede lei, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms36:7 Marri a mom lokere ber nadi, Ama Rwot! Itino a dano laro tipo mebwomi." 
Psalms36:8 Gin obedo i yomcuny pi jami adwoŋ ame tye i odi, yin en imiogi gi-amata ame ya i kuloni me yomcuny." 
Psalms36:9 Pien waŋ pii me kwo tye baŋi, lero ni en ame mio wan daŋ oneno lero." 
Psalms36:10 Medde nyuto marri a mom lokere baŋ jo ame ŋei, kede larri baŋ jo a cunygi atira." 
Psalms36:11 Kur iwek tyen jo ame wakere nyona, kur daŋ imi ciŋ jo areco ryema oko," 
Psalms36:12 Otim tim areco buto kuno aryeba cuny, ocobogi odiogi piny, mom dok otwero ya malo." 
Psalms37:1 Cunyi kur bed cwer pi jo a kitegi reco, nyeko moro kur maki, i kom otim tim areco." 
Psalms37:2 Pien gin bino two oko calo lum, obino ner calo pot yen." 
Psalms37:3 Gen Rwot dok iti tic aber, mannono bino miyo ibedo i lobo i kuc." 
Psalms37:4 Bed i yomcuny i Rwot, en bino miyi gin ame cunyi mito ducu." 
Psalms37:5 Mi kwoni i ciŋ Rwot, gene, en bino tiyo ticcere." 
Psalms37:6 En bino miyo berri ryeny calo ceŋ, kede kiteni atira calo ceŋ ame ryeny i cuny dyeceŋ." 
Psalms37:7 Bed mot i nyim Rwot, kure kun idio cunyi; cunyi kur bed cwer pi jo ame lonyo dwoŋ baŋgi, kadi i kom jo ame yiko tam areco i cunygi." 
Psalms37:8 Kur imi akemo maki, cunyi daŋ kur cwer; kur imi cunyi bed cwer, pien kela ka gin arac keken." 
Psalms37:9 Pien jo ame kitegi reco, obino nekogi oko, ento jo ame kuro Rwot bino leyo lobo." 
Psalms37:10 Odoŋ kare anonokkoro keken, jo a kitegi reco bino rwenyo atwal; kadi bed inen i kabedogi aber odoco, ibino nwoŋo ni gin doŋ pe kuno." 
Psalms37:11 Ento jo ame mwol, bino leyo lobo, obino bedo i yomcuny meicel, pi lonyo adwoŋ ame obino bedo kede." 
Psalms37:12 Otim tim areco poro kop i komjo a kitegi atira, dok okao lakgi atek i komgi." 
Psalms37:13 Ento otim tim areco, Rwot nyero anyera, pien en neno ni nino me ŋolo kop i komgi tye abino." 
Psalms37:14 Otim tim areco woto pala romogi, dok daŋ otelo akud aterogi, me neko ocan kedejo a piny oloo, me neko jo ame cunygi atira;" 
Psalms37:15 pala romogi-nono bino lokere cobo cunygi kengi, akud aterogi daŋ obino turo oko." 
Psalms37:16 Gin anok ame dano a kite atira tye kede, ber, kato lwak lonyo atye ata ame tye i ciŋ dano a kite rac." 
Psalms37:17 Pien ciŋ jo areco bino tur oko, ento Rwot bino gwoko jo akitegi atira." 
Psalms37:18 Rwot gwokojo ame mom i balloro, gin ame gin oleo bino perakino waŋ i waŋ," 
Psalms37:19 lewic mom bino makogi i kare me can, i kare me kec, gin bino bedo i can adwoŋ, i kare me kec gin bino bedo i cam adwoŋ." 
Psalms37:20 Cite jo a kitegi reco, gin bino to oko, jo ame dago Rwot, bino rwenyo oko, obino top calo lum i potti, obino ket oko calo yito," 
Psalms37:21 Dano arac koporo banya ento mom te culo, ento jo a kitegi atira okica, dok omio jo jamigi." 
Psalms37:22 Jo ame Rwot omio gum en ame bino leyo lobo, ento jo ame en oceno, bino to oko." 
Psalms37:23 Rwot gire en ame telo dano, en mio dano moko i yo aber ame yomo cunye." 
Psalms37:24 Kadi bed kodi dano-nono rette, ento pwod twero ya malo, pien Rwot en a mako ciŋe me peye." 
Psalms37:25 Rik an atin, ento aman doŋ ati oko, cite waŋa mom ru oneno ŋat a kite atira ame oweko ata, akadi itino mere kun tye akwayo cem akwa." 
Psalms37:26 En kare ducu ber, mio jami amia, dok daŋ jo koporo jami baŋe, itino mere daŋ doko jo ame dok kelli jo ocele gum." 
Psalms37:27 Ya oko i timo gin arac, tim gin aber, mannono bino miyo iperakino i lobo." 
Psalms37:28 Rwot maro ŋolo kop atira, en mom bino weko jo mere a gene ata. Jo a kitegi atira, Rwot bino gwoko nakanaka, cite itino a jo areco, Rwot bino neko oko." 
Psalms37:29 Jo a kitegi atira bino leyo lobo, eka ote bedo iye atwal." 
Psalms37:30 Jo a kitegi atira kobo kop me ryeko, okobo kop ame tye atira." 
Psalms37:31 Cik Obaŋagi mom rwenyo i cunygi, tyengi mom cer atata i yo ame gin lubo." 
Psalms37:32 Dano arac neno ŋat a kite atira, eka te yenyo yo me neke oko," 
Psalms37:33 Cite Rwot gire mom bino weko dano a kite atira poto i ciŋ okworrere, dok mom bino miyo oŋolo kop loc ka ce opidde." 
Psalms37:34 Gen Rwot, lub yo mere, en bino miyi bedo kede twer me leyo lobo, yin ibino neno kite ame jo areco to kede." 
Psalms37:35 Aneno dano ame kite rac ame apala okato kare, kun doŋo adoŋa calo yat me Lebanon." 
Psalms37:36 Nen ka dok abeo kan ame en tye iye iceŋ, anwoŋo doŋ pe kuno, kadi bed ayeny, mom atwero nwoŋo." 
Psalms37:37 Koŋ inen dano ame balloro mom i kome, dok inen dano ame cunye atira, pien dano ame kelo kuc, ikwae bino bedo apol." 
Psalms37:38 Cite otur cik obino tyekogi oko awaŋe acel, ikwae a jo areco obino neko oko." 
Psalms37:39 Rwot en a laro jo a kitegi atira, en obedo ka larregi i kare me peko." 
Psalms37:40 Rwot konyogi dok larogi, en larogi i ciŋ jo areco, te bedo kwo, pien gin oriŋo olaro baŋe." 
Psalms38:1 Ama Rwot, pe ijuka kede akemoni, kur daŋ ipwoda kede akemo." 
Psalms38:2 Pien ateroni ocoba meicel, teko me ciŋi odia oko piny." 
Psalms38:3 Mom tye dul koma moro ame tye aber pi akemoni, cogona daŋ tye ka rem arema pi balle." 
Psalms38:4 Pien balle dwoŋ okato kare, pekkere doŋ onua oko, calo yec a mom romo tiŋere," 
Psalms38:5 Waŋ bur i koma doŋ okwok aŋwe meicel, tuttere doŋ tye amollo amola pi miŋona," 
Psalms38:6 Aloye doŋ odoco, aryebere doŋ piny i lobo, dyeceŋ luŋ doŋ awoto ame akumo akuma." 
Psalms38:7 Pyera daŋ doŋ lyel alyela calo mac, koma doŋ mom yot kadi acel." 
Psalms38:8 Aloye doŋ odoco, koma doŋ onyoŋere meicel, acur doŋ acura pien cwercuny ocira oko," 
Psalms38:9 Ama Rwot, yin iŋeo gin ame amito ducu, curra doŋ mom obedo ginnoro ame yin ikwia," 
Psalms38:10 Itaona goye ni tutuk, kun tekona tye arwenyo arwenya, waŋa daŋ mom doŋ neno piny aber." 
Psalms38:11 Owotena kede jo ame bedo i ŋeta, ocuŋ joŋ teŋe pi bur ame tye i koma, watina daŋ cuŋ kannabor meicel" 
Psalms38:12 Jo ame yenyo kwona ociko owic pira, jo ame mito waŋa okobo kop me tyeko kwona, obedo poro kop arac i koma ceŋ iyul." 
Psalms38:13 Cite an gira abedo calo ŋat a yite odiŋ, mom awinyo kopgi, calo ŋat ame lebe oto, a mom ŋamo doge." 
Psalms38:14 Nen, an gira acalo ŋat a yite mom winyo kop, ame kopporo me juko dano mom donyo i doge." 
Psalms38:15 Cite an gira atye ka kuri, Ama Rwot, yin en ibino gamo kopgi, Ama Rwot," 
Psalms38:16 An ka akwao ni kono mom imiogi olelo i koma, kur imigi owakere i koma ka ce tyena ocer." 
Psalms38:17 Pien an nen calo aceggi poto, rem mom weka kare kadi acel." 
Psalms38:18 An aye ni abalo, cunya cwer pi bal ame abalo," 
Psalms38:19 Jo ame tye acalo okworra aboŋo ginnoro ame aballigi, gin otek okata oko, dok gin ame jo odaga nononononono opol meicel." 
Psalms38:20 Jo ame cula i gin arac pi gin aber, gin okworra pien an alubo gin aber." 
Psalms38:21 Kur iweka ba, Ama Rwot, kur ibed abor keda, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms38:22 Ru bino konya, yin giri en ilara, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms39:1 An akobo ni, abino gwoko kita, me wek kur atim balloro i kop ame ya i doga; abino liŋ gira aliŋa, i nyim jo a kitegi reco." 
Psalms39:2 Abedo calo ŋat a lebe oto kun aliŋ aliŋa, abedo gira mot kun mom akobo kopporo, kadi bed cwer cunya onwoŋo tye amedde ameda." 
Psalms39:3 Cunya onwoŋo doŋ lyet calo mac, par onwoŋo ocira oko, mac te cako lyel, ate doŋ cako kop aboŋo lworo." 
Psalms39:4 Akobo ni, “Mi aŋe agikkina, Ama Rwot. Kare ame imia doŋ odoŋ rom mene? Mia aŋe kite ame abino rwenyo kede," 
Psalms39:5 Koŋ inen, imio kare me kwona obedo acecek meicel, kare me kwona mom ginnoro kadi acel i nyimi. Ateteni dano acel acel gire calo yamo ata-ni." 
Psalms39:6 Nen jo luŋ wirre calo tipo, jo gire bedo lolle nono pi gin a konyere mom, dano bedo coko lwak lim adwoŋ ate kun mom ŋeo ŋat ame abino leyo." 
Psalms39:7 “Kara an pwod dok akuro ŋo, Ama Rwot?” An gira atye kede gen piri." 
Psalms39:8 Lara i kom balle ducu. Kur imi jo amiŋ bed nyera. 
Psalms39:9 Leba gira oto oko, pe aromo kobo kopporo, pien mannono gire yin en itimo." 
Psalms39:10 Kur dok imedde pwoda kede abironi, adoŋ me ciŋi doŋ mito neka oko." 
Psalms39:11 Yin ka igoo dano pi juke i ballere, nwoŋo doŋ ityeko ginnoro luŋ aber i baŋe, calo nyenye ame balo boŋo, ateteni, jo luŋ gire calo yamo ata-ni." 
Psalms39:12 “Winy kwacca, Ama Rwot, cik yiti iwiny kokona, kur iliŋ aliŋa ka akok baŋi. An abedo weloni ame mom ri baŋi an aloŋ piny calo kwarina luŋ." 
Psalms39:13 Wir waŋ inen teŋe, me koŋ abed yomcuny, kun mom ru aya oko i kwo me lobo man ate rwenyo oko atwal.”" 
Psalms40:1 Akuro gira Rwot kun adio cunya, en okulle piny baŋa te winyo kokona." 
Psalms40:2 En owota i twon burrono arac meicel, i twon coto moro anwaŋ meicel, te miya cuŋ i wi kidi malo, kun mia acuŋ atek odoco." 
Psalms40:3 Opwonya kede wer anyen, wer me pako Obaŋawa. Jo apol meicel bino neno, lworo te makogi, ote cako doŋ geno Rwot." 
Psalms40:4 Tye kede winyo dano ame geno Rwot, ame pe lokere baŋ jo ame wakere, ame mom lubo jo ogak oko i woro cal jogi." 
Psalms40:5 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, itimo gigi mogo me awura meicel, dok tammi luŋ tye i komwa, mom tye ŋattoro ame cal kedi. Kono onwoŋo an abedo rabo pirgi, kono onwoŋo pol meicel ame mom oromo kwano welgi." 
Psalms40:6 Yin gire mom imito gin ame oŋolo kede mot ame omio, ento ityeko yabo yita me awiny kop, Yii mom obedo yom i gin ame owaŋo alutu, kadi gin ame oŋolo pi bal." 
Psalms40:7 An ate kobo ni, “An ene doŋ abino; acalo yam ocoo i koma i buk adola." 
Psalms40:8 Amito cunya bed yom i tiyo gin, ame yin imito, Ama Obaŋana, cikki gire mom rwenyo i cunya.”" 
Psalms40:9 Atyeko rabo pi amut aber me larre, me yomcuny, i akina lwak ocokere karacel an gira mom aliŋ aliŋa kadi acel kite ame yin iŋeo kede, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms40:10 Pe akano kop i cunya i kom kite ame ilaro kede jo, abedo rabo pi kite ame ilaro kede jo kun ibedo ŋat a genne, atito daŋ pi marri a mom lokere kannaler, kede pi kite ame yin igenne kede, arabo pirgi luŋ i akina lwak ocokere karacel." 
Psalms40:11 Ama Rwot, kur itwona kicani, mii marri a mom lokere kede kiteni atira gwoka nakanaka." 
Psalms40:12 Pien gin arac ame ogura dyere welgi mom kwanne, balle doŋ dwoŋ ame onua oko, omio mom doŋ aromo neno piny, welgi pol meicel ame kato yer wia oko, cunya doŋ mom tek kadi acel." 
Psalms40:13 Ama Rwot, cunyi myero bed ayom me lara, ru lara, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms40:14 Mi lewic makgi dok ibabaŋogi oko, gin jo ame mito kwanyo kwona, migi olokere odok cen i twon lewic, gin jo ame mito timma rac." 
Psalms40:15 Mi twon lewic adwoŋ mak jo ame nyera, jo ame kobba ni, ber, ber." 
Psalms40:16 Cite myero imi jo luŋ ame wori bed i yomcuny, dok olel meicel piri; myero imi jo ame maro larreni, obedo kobo kare ducu ni, “Rwot gire dwoŋ.”" 
Psalms40:17 Aco an gira, an acan, dok piny oloa oko; cite Rwot gire paro pira. Yin gire en ame ikonya dok ilara, kur ibed gal, Ama Obaŋana." 
Psalms41:1 Tye kede winyo ŋat ame paro pi ocan, Rwot lare i kare ame en tye kede peko." 
Psalms41:2 Rwot gwoke mio en bedo kwo, obino lwoŋe ni ŋat a kome gum i lobo; yin mom ibino miye i ciŋ okworrere, me otime kite ame yigi mito." 
Psalms41:3 Rwot bino gwoke ka kome lit ame obuto piny i wi tanda, Rwot bino miyo en caŋ aber i kom two mere." 
Psalms41:4 Ento an, akobo ni, “Ama Rwot, kica myero maki i koma, caŋa pien an gira aroco i nyimi.”" 
Psalms41:5 Okworra kobo kop arac i koma, kun okobo ni “Kara en lonnono ato awene, me nyiŋe te rwenyo oko?”" 
Psalms41:6 Ka ce ŋattoro i akinagi obino me limma, kobo kop ame tere pe, kun cunye pupuka i kop me goba, ka ce en okato doŋ oko, cako kobo koppere kannaler," 
Psalms41:7 Jo ducu ame daga, bedo kwoto nyiŋa karacel, obedo tamo pi gin arac keken i koma," 
Psalms41:8 Gin okobo ni, “Two arac meicel doŋ omake, mom doŋ bino bwot kadi acel a mom oto.”" 
Psalms41:9 Kadi dyera ame ageno ikokome, ame onywako kede cem daŋ mito rwacca piny." 
Psalms41:10 Ento yin tima kica, Ama Rwot, tiŋa malo me wek acul kworra i komgi." 
Psalms41:11 Ka ce okworra mom oloa, abino ŋeyo ni cunyi tye i koma." 
Psalms41:12 Ento yin ikonya, pien cunya ler, iketa me bedo i nyimi nakanaka." 
Psalms41:13 Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael myero pwo, myero pake nakanaka! Amen, dok Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Kite acalo atil yenyo kede kulo ame piiamol iye, an daŋ amannono ayenyi cunya, Ama Obaŋa." 
Psalms42:2 Mit me neno Obaŋa ocira oko, amito neno Obaŋa akwo. Kara abino bino i nyimi awene ba, ate neno waŋi, Ama Obaŋa?" 
Psalms42:3 Pig waŋa doŋ tye acalo cemma, dyeceŋ kede dyewor benebene, kun jo tye ka penya teretere ni, “Obaŋani-nono kara tye kwene?”" 
Psalms42:4 Ka apoyo jami magi, cunya cwer atek meicel, ka apoyo kite a yam awoto karacel i lwak kun atelo wigi, ame ociro karacel naka i ot Obaŋa, kun lwak redo i yomcuny dok owero wer me pako Obaŋa, i kare me kwero ecuban adoŋo." 
Psalms42:5 Piŋo kara itye ka kumo akuma, yin tipona, piŋo kara itye ka cur i koma? Gen Obaŋa, pien pwod dok abino medde pake, en akonya dok en Obaŋana." 
Psalms42:6 Tipona doŋ tye ka kumo akuma, omio apo piri, cakere i lobo me Jordan kede me Kermon, cakere i wi kidi me Mijar." 
Psalms42:7 Nam atut lwoŋo nam atut wadgi, i mor pii acucurri, bi-amwonyi ni luŋ ame tagere ataga, omwonya gira doŋ oko." 
Psalms42:8 Dyeceŋ Rwot ciko marrere a mom lokere ryeny i koma, dyewor werrere mom rwenyo i cunya, kun akwao Obaŋa ame mia akwo," 
Psalms42:9 Akobo baŋ Obaŋa ame en ka larrena atek ni, “Piŋo kara wii owil oko i koma? Piŋo an atye ka wot ame akumo akuma, pien okworra tye ka wuna meicel?”" 
Psalms42:10 Nen calo doŋ a tye i twon burroro arac i koma, okworra bedo doŋ yeta ayeta, kun openya teretere ni, “Obaŋani-nono kara tye kwene?”" 
Psalms42:11 Piŋo kara itye ka kumo, yin tipona, piŋo kara itye ka cur i koma? Gen Obaŋa, pien pwod dok abino medde pake, en akonya dok en Obaŋana." 
Psalms43:1 Pid Pira, Ama Obaŋa, dok imia alo kop i nyim rok ame mom ŋei; lara i ciŋ jo areco ameogoba," 
Psalms43:2 Pien yin ibedo Obaŋa ame rik alaro baŋe, piŋo kara omio ibola oko? Piŋo an abedo wot ame akumo, akuma, pien okworra bedo wuna?" 
Psalms43:3 Cwal ba doŋ leroni kede atenini, me gin obin onyutta yo, me okela i wi kidina acil, kede i kan ame yin ibedo iye," 
Psalms43:4 Mannono bino miyo awoto i wi keno lam Obaŋa, baŋ Obaŋa ame en gin ayomoro cunya meicel ate bino paki kun agoo naŋa opuk, Ama Obaŋa, Obaŋana." 
Psalms43:5 Piŋo kara itye ka kumo, yin ti pona, piŋo kara itye ka cur, i koma? Gen Obaŋa, pien pwod dok abino medde pake, en akonya dok Obaŋana." 
Psalms44:1 Wan doŋ otyeko winyo yitwa, Ama Obaŋa, kwariwa daŋ otittiwa, ginnoro luŋ ame itimo i karegi, i kare ame doŋ okato oko aŋec." 
Psalms44:2 Yin rik iryemo rok ocele oko kede twerri, ite miyo joni bedo i lobogi calo yen ame opito, rik iketo can apek meicel i wi rok ocele, cite kwariwa te bedo bedo i kuc." 
Psalms44:3 Kwariwa rik mom ogamo lobo-naca i pala romogi, dok daŋ mom tekogi en ame omiogi oloo lweny, cite otimere pi tekoni kede pi twerri, dok pi waŋ me kica ame ibedo nenogi kede, pien cunyi onwoŋo yom i komgi." 
Psalms44:4 Yin ibedo abakana kede Obaŋana, yinen ayamiyubo loc pi Yakobo." 
Psalms44:5 Pi konnyi omio wan oryemo okworwa oko odok cen, pi nyiŋi omio wan onyono jo ame obino me lweny i komwa oko." 
Psalms44:6 Pien an gira mom ageno akud aterona, dok pala romona mom romo lara." 
Psalms44:7 Ento yin gire en ilarowa i ciŋ okworwa, ibabaŋo jo ame onwoŋo dagowa oko." 
Psalms44:8 Obaŋa omiowa obedo wakere kare luŋ, wan giwa obino medde pwoyo nyiŋi nakanaka." 
Psalms44:9 Nen, yin doŋ ibolowa oko, oyot doŋ ayota, nen doŋ iwoto karacel i monywa i lweny." 
Psalms44:10 Imiowa oloko okworwa ŋewa, okworwa te yako jami apol meicel." 
Psalms44:11 Imiowa doŋ odoko calo rommi me aneka, imiowa doŋ okeketa atata i akina orok." 
Psalms44:12 Nen, doŋ icato lwakki oko i wel apiny apinya, kun mom imito ni culli limmoro abup pirgi." 
Psalms44:13 Imio jo ame ceggi kedwa doŋ caowa acaa, jo ame ogurowa dyere doŋ nywarowa kun onyerowa anyera," 
Psalms44:14 Imio rok ocele doŋ bedo boko kop i komwa, odoko doŋ gi-anyera a jo i akina rok luŋ." 
Psalms44:15 Aparo doŋ pi lewic ame atye kede ceŋ iyul, lewic doŋ maka meicel," 
Psalms44:16 nyim jo ame yeta kede jo ame nywara, i nyim okworra ame daga." 
Psalms44:17 Magi luŋ otimere i komwa, kadi bed wan wiwa mom owil oko i komi, kadi wan mom oturo cikereni." 
Psalms44:18 Cunywa mom olokere me weki, mom daŋ oweko lubo yo ame yin imito," 
Psalms44:19 cite yin iwekowa oko kan ikwe bedo iye, ite miyo piny acol icuc wumowa oko." 
Psalms44:20 Ka ce wiwa onwoŋo owil oko i kom nyiŋ Obaŋawa, onyo ka ocako woro Obaŋa moro ocele," 
Psalms44:21 kono Obaŋa mom oŋeo oko? pien en ŋeo muŋŋoro luŋ ame tye i cuny dano. 
Psalms44:22 Piri obedo ka nekowa ceŋ iyul; okwanowa bala rommi me aneka. 
Psalms44:23 Ya ba malo, Ama Rwot, piŋo kara itye ka nino anina? Co doŋ oko! Pe ibwola oko, pe iwekwa oko atwal." 
Psalms44:24 Piŋo kara iponniwa oko? Piŋo wii owil oko i kom can ame otye kede, kun inenowa anena ka otye awunowa?" 
Psalms44:25 Nen wan doŋ orette oko piny i lobo, oryebere piny iyi apua, pien doŋ oloowa oko," 
Psalms44:26 Ya malo; ibin ikonywa, Larwa pi marri a mom lokere." 
Psalms45:1 Kop abeco keken en ame tyei cunya, koppa-nono akobo gira baŋ abaka, leba bit calo alam aran ame adiro i coc." 
Psalms45:2 Yin en ame iber meicel ikato jo ocele luŋ, kop ame ikobo luŋ opoŋ ka i kica keken, mannono omio Obaŋa doŋ omii gum ame perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms45:3 Twe pala romoni iyi amuruni, Ama yin i twon lo atek meicel, i kwogoni kede i twerri." 
Psalms45:4 Yon i ŋwec me loc pi kwogoni, me lweny pi ateni kede me gwoko kite ame tye atir, mii ciŋi me tuŋ cem otim gigi mogo ame mio jo lworo." 
Psalms45:5 Ateroni bit meicel, ka icelo i cuny okworri, rok luŋ rette oko i te locci." 
Psalms45:6 Kom me locci, yin Obaŋa, bino perakino odoco, abiro me locci, en abiro a yin iŋolo i kop atira; yin imaro kite atira, yii dag tim arac," 
Psalms45:7 Mannono omio Obaŋa, ame en Obaŋani, omi dit, en omii yomcuny meicel pi woro ame en owori kede, ame kato me owoteni oko." 
Psalms45:8 Rukki luŋ okikiro iye murra kede yat a ŋwece kur, kede kite moo ocele luŋ akur kede kacia amittere. Ipaconi ame okwogo i lak lyec, wer ogoo naŋa yomoro cunyi nadi." 
Psalms45:9 Anyira abaka daŋ tye i akina monni ame oworo, agoŋŋi tye ocuŋ i ciŋi tuŋ cem, kun oruko ruk ame okwogo kome i jabu me Opir." 
Psalms45:10 Koŋ iwiny nyara, ter yiti iwiny koppa, wi myero wil oko i kom rokki, kede i kom jo me doggola a kwaroni." 
Psalms45:11 Berri bino miyo abaka miti; kite acalo en doŋ tye acalo rwotti, myero iryebere i nyime." 
Psalms45:12 Jo Turo bino kelo mot adwoŋ meicel baŋi pi berri baŋ dano, olonyo me rok apapat bino kwayo kony i baŋi kun okelli kit limmoro ducu." 
Psalms45:13 Nyaka abaka orukkere meicel i cika mere, orukkere i boŋo ame okwogo meicel i jabu," 
Psalms45:14 Otere baŋ abaka, kun oruko boŋŋi ame raŋigi papat, ame anyira wadgi ame alwoke tye alubo yore," 
Psalms45:15 Oterogi i yomcuny adwoŋ kede lelo, i kare ame gin donyo i paco abaka." 
Psalms45:16 Akaka kwarini, bino bedo awobeni, ibino miyogi obedo oloc i wi lobo luŋ," 
Psalms45:17 Abino miyo odworo nyiŋi mwaka i mwaka i kare a lwagi jo me kare ducu, mannono bino miyo rok luŋ paki waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms46:1 Obaŋa en obedo ka larewa kede tekowa, kare luŋ tye ame oyikere me konyowa ka otye i peko," 
Psalms46:2 Mannono omio mom obino bedo kede lworo moro kadi acel, kadi bed alokaloka bed tye i lobo, kadi bed kiddi yeŋere i cuny nam," 
Psalms46:3 kadi pii i nam mor ame atagere ataga, kadi bed kiddi yeŋere pi pii ame oyenyo malo amala," 
Psalms46:4 Tye kulo moro ame pii amol iye yomoro cuny jo i boma Obaŋa, kabedo acil ame ŋat Amalo Meicel bedo iye." 
Psalms46:5 Obaŋa gire bedo iye kuno, omio mom romo rette kadi acel, Obaŋa bino ru konyo oko kun kare mom ru oromo." 
Psalms46:6 Rok luŋ komgi bino onyo koyo, loc apapat bino yeŋere; Obaŋa mio dwone winyere, lobo te meye oko." 
Psalms46:7 Rwot me mony tye kedwa; Obaŋa a Yakobo en ame obedo ka larrewa. 
Psalms46:8 Biye inen gin ame Rwot otio, kite ame en omio lobo odoko kede wi obur." 
Psalms46:9 En omio lweny ogik oko i wi lobo luŋ, oturo akud atero kede toŋŋi oko, owaŋo luŋ i mac." 
Psalms46:10 Bed wunu mot, dok iŋe wunu ni an abedo Obaŋa, an en aloo rok ducu, an en aloo wi podo luŋ." 
Psalms46:11 Rwot me mony tye kedwa; Obaŋa a Yakobo en obedo ka larrewa. 
Psalms47:1 Bap wunu ciŋwu, wun rok ducu, dwor wunu Obaŋa i woo me yomcuny." 
Psalms47:2 Pien Rwot, ame en ŋat Amalo Meicel, iyiliyili meicel, en dwoŋ meicel i wi lobo luŋ." 
Psalms47:3 Jo luŋ tye i te loccere, rok luŋ daŋ tye i te tyene piny." 
Psalms47:4 En oyerriwa lobo ame myero wan obed iye acalo megwa, man obedo kwogo a Yakobo ame en maro." 
Psalms47:5 Obaŋa doŋ oyito malo kun jo goo ijira meicel, en oyito malo kun jo kuto apel." 
Psalms47:6 Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot, wer wunu wer me pake, wer wunu wer me pako Abakawa, wer wunu wer me pake." 
Psalms47:7 Pien Obaŋa en obedo abaka me wi lobo luŋ, wer wunu wer me pake kede jabuli." 
Psalms47:8 Obaŋa loo rok ducu, Obaŋa bedo i kommere me loc acil." 
Psalms47:9 Oloc ame loo lwak me rok apapat tye acokere kun oribere karacel i jo Obaŋa, ame gin jo Iburaim. Pien rwode me wi lobo tye i ciŋ Obaŋa, odwore atek meicel." 
Psalms48:1 Rwot dwoŋ meicel, pi mannonomyero pake, i boma Obaŋawa." 
Psalms48:2 Kidi mere acil, ame ocuŋ malo i twon kwogo adwoŋ, yomoro cuny jo me wi lobo ducu. En kidi me Cion ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, boma abaka dwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms48:3 Obaŋa onyutte i udi mere atek, onyutte ni en obedo kan atek ame gwoko jo." 
Psalms48:4 Nen ba, obakki me wi lobo tye ocokere, gin obino ote cokere karacel." 
Psalms48:5 Kare ame gin oneno, ote bedo kede wur, lworo omakogi ote riŋo oko;" 
Psalms48:6 komgi te cako myel atek meicel kede rem ame calo dako amerem me nywal ogoo. 
Psalms48:7 Pien yin rik ibalo mel me Tarcic, i yo ame oya i tutuŋ kide." 
Psalms48:8 Kite ame onwoŋo owinyo kede, en ame doŋ otyeko neno kede waŋwa, i paco a Rwot me mony, i paco Obaŋawa, ame Obaŋa doŋ omio ocuŋ oko atek odoco." 
Psalms48:9 Wan obedo tamo kop i kom marri a mom lokere, Ama Obaŋa, i dye odi acil." 
Psalms48:10 Kite ame nyiŋi orwo kede, opaki daŋ amannono i wi lobo ducu, Ciŋi me tuŋcem tye iye twer me loc," 
Psalms48:11 mii kidi me Cion obed i yomcuny. Mi anyira me Juda bed i yomcuny, pi kite ame yin iŋolo kede kop." 
Psalms48:12 Wot wunu i dye Cion, iman wunu ducu, kwan wunu gedo luŋ ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ," 
Psalms48:13 nen wunu apama cellere aber, nen wunu udi adoŋo luŋ iye, me irab wunu pire baŋ lwagi jo ame bino lubowu;" 
Psalms48:14 ni man en obedo Obaŋa, en obedo Obaŋawa me waŋ i waŋ. En a bino telowa nakanaka." 
Psalms49:1 Wun rok luŋ, winy wunu kop man. Ter wunu yitwu, wun jo ame bedo i wi podo luŋ," 
Psalms49:2 jo ame tye i rwom amalo kede i rwom apiny, olonyo kede ocan karacel." 
Psalms49:3 Kop me ryeko bino donnyo i doga, tam ame ya i cunya, bino kelo niaŋ atut." 
Psalms49:4 Abino tero yita me winyo pwony me ryeko, koc kede litogi abino goyo agoa i naŋa opuk." 
Psalms49:5 Kara ŋo ame mio abedo kede lworo i kare me peko, ka omonena ame wuna agura oko dyere," 
Psalms49:6 ame gin jo ame geŋo lonyogi, kun owakere pi lwak lim ame tye i ciŋgi?" 
Psalms49:7 Ateteni, mom gire tye dano moro ame romo culo lim me lakere mere kene, onyo ame twero culo lim baŋ Obaŋa me wilo kwo mere." 
Psalms49:8 Pien lim me wilo kwo mere bup meicel, mom romme culo kadi acel." 
Psalms49:9 Mannono omio dano mom romo bedo kwo nakanaka, kun mom donyo piny i bur." 
Psalms49:10 En gire ŋeo aber ni anaka jo aryek daŋ to, amiŋo kede ŋat ame wie mom tio daŋ to amannono, oweko lim ame otye kede baŋ jo ocele." 
Psalms49:11 Lyel en ame doŋ te bedo pacogi me bedo atwal, bedo doŋ kabedogi waŋ i waŋ, kadi oweko lwak potti ikwaegi a rom mene me poyo nyiŋgi." 
Psalms49:12 Dano mom romo perakino i kwogo mere nakanaka, en rom aroma i leyi me tim ame to oko," 
Psalms49:13 Man en can ame poto i kom jo ame tye i gen me miŋo, agikki a jo ame tye i yomcuny pi dul jami ame otye kede." 
Psalms49:14 Lyel gire kurogi akura calo rommi, to en a bino bedo akwatgi. Gin bino wot atir naka i lyel, cil a komgi te rwenyo oko. Lyel en a bino bedo pacogi." 
Psalms49:15 Rwot gire bino lakoro kwona oko i teko a lyel, pien en bino gama baŋe." 
Psalms49:16 Lworo kur maki ka ce dano moro odoko alonyo, kadi bed kwogo me ode tye amedde ameda," 
Psalms49:17 Pien i kare me to mere mom bino tiŋo ginnoro woto kede kadi acel, kwogo mere mom bino lube piny i bur kuno," 
Psalms49:18 Kadi bed en twero tamo ni ebedo i yomcuny i kare me kwo mere, kadi bed jo pake ka ce en onwoŋo ginnoro aber pire kene," 
Psalms49:19 en pwod bino to te wot nywako kabedo i lwagi a kwari mere i lyel kun mom dok neno waŋ cen atwal. 
Psalms49:20 Dano mom romo perakino i kwogo mere nakanaka, en rom aroma i leyi me tim ame to oko." 
Psalms50:1 Ŋat ame Won Twer Ducu ame en Rwot Obaŋa, okobo kop, en lwoŋo jo me wi lobo ducu, cakere i tuŋ kide tuno kede tuŋ to," 
Psalms50:2 En tye ka ryeny acil meicel, kwogo mere tye ka ryeny i Cion," 
Psalms50:3 Obaŋawa tye ka bino, en mom bino liŋ, twon mac ager meicel tye ka telo nyime, yamo akodo agwa tye ogure oko dyere." 
Psalms50:4 En lwoŋo polo ame tye malo, dok lwoŋo lobo daŋ, me ecak ŋolo kop i kom jo mere." 
Psalms50:5 En kobo ni, “Cok wunu jona ame ogen, ikelgi wunu baŋa, jo ame ocikere keda i mot aŋola.”" 
Psalms50:6 Polo rabo kannaler ni Obaŋa kite atira, pien Obaŋa ikome en aŋolkop." 
Psalms50:7 “Winy wunu, wun jona, me ate kop, wun jo Icrael, abino kobo kop me caden i komwu, an Obaŋa ame abedo Obaŋawu." 
Psalms50:8 Pe ajukowu pi motwu ame iyala wunu kede, mot awaŋa ame iyala wunu kede tye me kare ducu i nyima." 
Psalms50:9 Mom abino gamo twonnoro ame i kelo wunu i pacowu, kadi nyok dyel ame ikelo wunu iyi anokwu." 
Psalms50:10 Pien leyi luŋ i tim obedo mega, naka lwak dok ame tye i wi kiddi luŋ." 
Psalms50:11 Aŋeo winy luŋ ame twarre malo, naka gin akwo luŋ ame bedo piny i lobo, gin luŋ obedo mega." 
Psalms50:12 “Ka ce onwoŋo kec neka, onwoŋo mom aromo kobbiwu, pien lobo kede jami luŋ ame tye iye mega," 
Psalms50:13 An acamo riŋo twoni bo, onyo ca amato remo dyegi?" 
Psalms50:14 Mi wunu baŋ Obaŋa mot me pwoye, dok icob wunu kwon ame ikwoŋo wunu baŋ Ŋat Amalo Meicel;" 
Psalms50:15 dok ikok wunu baŋa i kare ame itye wunu i peko, an abino larowu, eka ite keto wunu kwogo i koma.”" 
Psalms50:16 Cite baŋ atim tim arac Obaŋa kobbe ni, “Twer aŋo ame itye kede me mako cikka i wi, onyo me bedo kobo kop i kom cikarena?" 
Psalms50:17 Pien yin mom imito ni juki, mom iparo pi kop ame akobo." 
Psalms50:18 Ka ce ineno akwo, imako dyere kede, imako dyere i jo ame maro timo abor." 
Psalms50:19 “Kare luŋ iyabo dogi me kobo gin arac, dok iŋeo yiko kop me goba." 
Psalms50:20 Imaro bedo kobo kop arac i kom ominni, ibedo kwoto ominni ame onywalli kede acel." 
Psalms50:21 Ibedo timo jami magi kun an aliŋ aliŋa, yin onwoŋo ibedo tamo ni an daŋ arom kedi. Cite aman doŋ ajuki, kun anyutti balli luŋ." 
Psalms50:22 “Po wunu i man, wun jo ame wiwu wil oko i kom Obaŋa, naka mio an atyekowu oko, ŋat ame larowu te doŋ bedo pe."
