Psalms50:23 Ŋat ame kelo pwoc baŋa acalo mottere, dano-nono nwoŋo oworo meicel, ŋat ame kite atira dok lubo cikka, abino nyuto lar mera baŋe.”" 
Psalms51:1 Tima kica, Ama Obaŋa, tim ber ijwa balle oko berri a mom lokere." 
Psalms51:2 Lwok gin arac oko i koma, dok ilonya i kom balla." 
Psalms51:3 Pien an aŋeo gira balla, kare luŋ wia po i kom bal ame atimo," 
Psalms51:4 An gira atyeko balo baŋi, abalo baŋi yin ikomi, atyeko timo gin anen arac i nyimi wek kop ame yin iŋolo onyut ni kiteni atira, dok ka iŋolo kop, balloro mom mwoŋere iye." 
Psalms51:5 Nen ba, an rik onywala i bal, acako timo bal con ame pwod atye iyi totaa." 
Psalms51:6 Nen, yin imito kop ateni en ame ya iyi dano, pi mannono, myero ipwony cunya a mom nen me bedo ryek." 
Psalms51:7 Lama kede boke olwedo, me ate doko doŋ acil, lwoka, me abed atar akato pee oko." 
Psalms51:8 Mia abed i yomcuny adwoŋ kede lelo, mi cogo ame doŋ ituro oleli," 
Psalms51:9 Wum waŋi oko, kur inen balla, dok ijwa balla oko luŋ," 
Psalms51:10 Mi cunya bed acil, Ama Obaŋa, ket cuny anyen dok aler i yia." 
Psalms51:11 Kur iryema oko i nyimi, kur daŋ ikwany Cunnyi Acil oko i koma," 
Psalms51:12 Dwoggo yomcuny me larre baŋa, mia cuny ame mia alubo cikki," 
Psalms51:13 Bino miyo apwonyo obal me luba yo ame imito, obalo ote lokere dwogo baŋi." 
Psalms51:14 Lara i kom bal me to, Ama Obaŋa, yin ibedo Obaŋa ame lara, cite leba bino wero wer me larri kannaler." 
Psalms51:15 Yab doga oko, Ama Rwot, cite leba bino wero wer me paki." 
Psalms51:16 Pien yin giri cunyi mom yom i mot ame oyali kede, kadi ayali i mot awaŋa, mom gire romo yomoro cunyi." 
Psalms51:17 Mot ame Obaŋa pwoo obedo cuny ame ŋut, yin gire mom icayo ŋat a cunye cwer dok ŋut, Ama Obaŋa." 
Psalms51:18 Tim Cion ber pi ber a cunyi, dok iger apama cel me Jerucalem odoco." 
Psalms51:19 Ite cako doŋ jolo i yomcuny mot me yalli i kite atira, mot awaŋa, kede mot owaŋo alutu, ote daŋ doŋ cako yali kede twoni i wi keno lammi." 
Psalms52:1 Yin twon lo atek meicel i lweny, piŋo kara iwakere pi gin arac ame itimo i kom jo ame ŋeo Obaŋa? Yin ibedo poro kop me neko ka jo ceŋ iyul." 
Psalms52:2 Lebi bit calo lyedi, ticci obedo me kobo kop erupe." 
Psalms52:3 Imaro gin arac ame kato gin aber, kede kobo goba ame kato kobo kop ateni." 
Psalms52:4 Imaro kobo kop ame kelo can, yin lel ame maro kobo goba." 
Psalms52:5 Ento Obaŋa bino rwobi oko atwal, en bino maki te wayi oko i kemani, bino puto lwiti oko i lobo a jo akwo." 
Psalms52:6 Jo akitegi atira bino neno, lworo te makogioko, obino nyere kun okobo ni," 
Psalms52:7 “Neno dano a mom mito miyo Obaŋa bedo ka-lare mere, ento lunyo geŋo lim ame bup i ciŋe, kun geŋo ni limmere en ame bino larre.”" 
Psalms52:8 Ento an acalo yat jeituni ame doŋo i ot Obaŋa, ageno gira mar Obaŋa a mom lokere kare luŋ me kwona." 
Psalms52:9 Abino pwoyi nakanaka, Ama Obaŋa, pien man obedo ticci. Abino rabo nyiŋi pien ber, i nyim jo ame ŋeo Obaŋa." 
Psalms53:1 Amiŋo bedo tamo i cunye ni, “Obaŋa gire mom.” Gin luŋ oballe oko, gin luŋ otimo tim me kwer, ŋat atimo gin aber pe," 
Psalms53:2 Obaŋa neno jo luŋ ame tye piny i te polo, kun neno ka ce tye ŋattoro ame timo ginnoro luŋ i ryeko, kun timo gin Obaŋa mito." 
Psalms53:3 Gin luŋ doŋ ogak oko teŋe, gin luŋ oballe oko, ŋat atimo gin aber pe, moro acelloro doŋ mom." 
Psalms53:4 Gin otim tim areco-nono, ce mom otye kede ŋeccoro, gin jo ame camo dano calo ogati-nono, kun daŋ mom olwoŋo nyiŋ obaŋa?" 
Psalms53:5 Gin bino bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel kuno, twon lworo ame yam mom ru gin obedo kede. Pien Obaŋa bino keto cogo kom jo a mom ŋeo Obaŋa, obino miyo lewic makogi pien Obaŋa doŋ otyeko kwerogi," 
Psalms53:6 Kono onwoŋo larre a jo Icrael oya i Cion, do ber! Ka Obaŋa bino dwoko gum baŋ jo mere, jo a Yakobo bino lelo, jo Icrael bino bedo i yomcuny." 
Psalms54:1 Lara, Ama Obaŋa, pi nyiŋi, dok imia alo kop oko pi tweroni." 
Psalms54:2 Winy kwacca, Ama Obaŋa, cik yiti i winy kop ame ya i doga." 
Psalms54:3 Pien jo ame wakere obino me bino lweny keda, jo ager mito neka oko, gin gigi mom otamo pi Obaŋa." 
Psalms54:4 Nen ba, Obaŋa gire en akonya, Rwot en a gwoko kwona." 
Psalms54:5 En bino culo kwor i kom okworra i gin arac, tyekgi oko ducu yin Obaŋa pi kiteni atira." 
Psalms54:6 Abino yali kede mot ame cunya okwanyo, abino pwoyi, Ama Rwot, pien yin iber." 
Psalms54:7 Pien yin ityeko lara i kit peko luŋ ame abeo iye, me anen okworra ame doŋ aloo kede waŋa." 
Psalms55:1 Cik yiti iwiny kwacca, Ama Obaŋa, kur ipon oko ka abako doga baŋi." 
Psalms55:2 Winy koppa, dok i gam doga, peko ame atye kede doŋ oloo tekona oko," 
Psalms55:3 Woo okworra doŋ obalo cunya oko, pi kite ame jo areco wuno kede jo, Pien gin en ame kelo peko i koma, okudo akemo meicel i koma, oloka doŋ adoko amonegi." 
Psalms55:4 Cwercuny doŋ ocira oko, lworo me to daŋ doŋ ocira oko." 
Psalms55:5 Lworo kede myelkom daŋ doŋ omaka oko, tipo koma oto oko," 
Psalms55:6 Omio doŋ atye ka paro ni kono atye kede bwoma calo amam, kono atwarre awoto gira oko kan ocele me awe," 
Psalms55:7 Ateteni, kono awoto gira oko teŋe, kono awoto abedo gira i tim." 
Psalms55:8 Kono ayutte ayuta me wot nwoŋo ka weona, i dye yamo a kutu atek, kede i kom yamo ajuru me kot." 
Psalms55:9 Ama Rwot, bal yikgi oko, rub lebgi oko, pien atye ka neno tim me gero kede lweny keken en ame tye i boma," 
Psalms55:10 Dyeceŋ kede dyewor gin otye ka rimo piny, kun omano cel me boma, tim areco kede peko a kitgi apapat tye ka nen i ye," 
Psalms55:11 To tye ka nen i dye boma luŋ, awunawuna dwoŋ meicel i cuk, bwolo jo mom daŋ rwenyo iye." 
Psalms55:12 Kono okworra en a tye ka kobo kop arac i koma-nono, kono koŋ atemo diyo cunya, kono jo ame daga en a tye aka timo tim me anywar i komanono, kono atemo koŋ pono gira oko." 
Psalms55:13 Ento anwoŋo ni obedo yin, wadwa, yin ame wan owoto kedi acel, dok dyera me kare ducu." 
Psalms55:14 Yam oboko koppogo amit kedi karacel, i ot Obaŋa-gu owoto karacel." 
Psalms55:15 To myero nekgi oko gire; migi odonyo piny i lyel ame okwo; pien tim arac nywako kedgi kabedo. 
Psalms55:16 Cite an gira akok baŋ Obaŋa; Rwot gire bino lara. 
Psalms55:17 Odiko, dyeceŋ kede otyeno, an gira acwao kokona baŋe kun acur; en gire bino winyo dwona." 
Psalms55:18 En bino laro tipona mia abedo i kuc i kom lweny ame abedo lwenyo, pien jo apol meicel tye ka lweny i koma." 
Psalms55:19 Obaŋa ame abedo i wi kom loccere cakere con i con, bino winyo kokona, te miyogi bedo amwol; pien gin mom ogwoko cik, dok daŋ mom oworo Obaŋa kadi acel." 
Psalms55:20 Awotta ryeo bade me lweny i kom owote mere; kun turo cikere ame yam ecikere kede oko," 
Psalms55:21 Kop i doge onwoŋo pwot kato moo dyaŋ oko, cite lweny mom rwenyo i cunye; kop ame en kobo onwoŋo kweo cuny dano kato moo oko, cite ŋolo dano calo pala lweny," 
Psalms55:22 Ket yec apek luŋ i kom Rwot, cite en bino konyi, en mom ye ni jer jo a kitegi atira teŋe." 
Psalms55:23 Ento yin gire ibino retogi oko piny, Ama Obaŋa, i twon burroro atut meicel; gin jo ame oonyo remo a jo ocele, kede oket erupe i kom jo wadgi, mom obino perakino otuno i nucu me kare me kwogi. Cite an gira abino geni." 
Psalms56:1 Kica myero maki i koma, Ama Obaŋa, pien jo tye onyona oko piny; dyeceŋ luŋ amonena bedo wunna awuna." 
Psalms56:2 Okworra daŋ bedo nyona piny ceŋ iyul, pien jo apol lwenyo keda ame owakere awaka." 
Psalms56:3 Ka ce lworo omaka, an gira ageni, Ama Obaŋa." 
Psalms56:4 An ageno Obaŋa kun mom atye kede lworo moro kadi acel. Gin aŋo ame dano ata-ni twero timo i koma? 
Psalms56:5 Obedo riye i nyima ceŋ iyul, kun otamo tam me timo gin areco keken i koma," 
Psalms56:6 Ogurre karacel me liba, obedo neno ginnoro luŋ ame an atye ka timo. Kite acalo otye ka kuro kede kwena," 
Psalms56:7 doŋ pi mannono myero iculgi pi balgi; Ret jo man piny oko akemoni, Ama Obaŋa." 
Psalms56:8 Yin ibedo kwano ayelayela luŋ ame opoto i koma, kan pig waŋa doŋ oko iyi opoko Mom doŋ tye ocoo kop oko i kome i buk?" 
Psalms56:9 Mannono bino miyo okworra lokere dok cen, i nino ame abino cwalo iye koko na baŋi. Man an aŋeo gira ni Obaŋa tye pira," 
Psalms56:10 Ageno Obaŋa ame gin a en ociko yomoro cunya, apako Rwot ame gin a en ociko yomoro cunya;" 
Psalms56:11 ageno Obaŋa kun mom alworo ginnoro kadi acel. Gin aŋo kara ame dano twero timo i koma? 
Psalms56:12 Myero anen ni acobo kwonna ame akwoŋo baŋi, Ama Obaŋa; abino yali i mot me pwoc," 
Psalms56:13 Pien yin ityeko laro kwona i to, nen, ibedo gwoka omio mom acer arette piny. Omio abedo wot i nyim Obaŋa i waŋ ceŋ ame menyo ginnoro luŋ akwo." 
Psalms57:1 Kica myero maki i koma Ama Rwot, kica myero maki i koma pien ti pona larre baŋi, abino laro tipo me bwomi, tuno ka yamo kot ajuru ame neko jo okato." 
Psalms57:2 Akok baŋ Obaŋa Amalo Meicel, baŋ Obaŋa ame cobo mittere luŋ pira," 
Psalms57:3 En bino cwayo kony i polo me lara bino miyo lewic mako jo ame tye ka nyonyono an. Obaŋa bino cwayo marrere a mom lokere, en bino cwayo kite atira." 
Psalms57:4 Atye ka buto i akina eŋatu; ame owor meicel imwodo dano: lakgi bit calo leb toŋ kede atero; lebgi bit calo pala romo. 
Psalms57:5 Nyut ditti malo i polo, Ama Obaŋa, Mi kwogoni nen kannaler i lobo luŋ," 
Psalms57:6 Ociko boo me mako tyena, ento ti pona obwot abwota. Okunyo bur-gu pira me arette iye cite gin dok olunyo rette iye kengi." 
Psalms57:7 Cunya gire omoko oko i komi a mom dok lokere, Ama Obaŋa, cunya omoko oko i komi, abino wero wer me paki i dwon aloŋo," 
Psalms57:8 Co oko, yin tipona, naŋana kede naŋa opuk, daŋ myero yikere oko. An abino ero wer ibai." 
Psalms57:9 Abino wero wer me paki, Ama Rwot, i akina rok apapat; abino wero wer me paki i akina orok." 
Psalms57:10 Pien marri a mom lokere pire tek meicel naka baŋ jo ame tye i wi polo. 
Psalms57:11 Nyut ditti malo i polo, Ama Obaŋa, Mi kwogoni nen kannaler i lobo luŋ." 
Psalms58:1 Wun oloc atek itye wunu ka ŋolo kop kakare ateni? Itye ka ŋolli wunu jo luŋ kop atira? 
Psalms58:2 Pe gire, itye ka paro wunu kop arac i cunywu; dok itye ka timo wunu bal i lobo i tic ame itio wunu," 
Psalms58:3 Jo areco bedo rwenyo te lubo yo arac pi kare me kwogi luŋ ocako timo bal ame pwod onywalogi anywala kun okobo kop me goba. 
Psalms58:4 Kwirgi rom aroma kede me a twol yitgi odiŋ calo yit owuo," 
Psalms58:5 me kur owiny dwon emuroko onyo dwon jo atimo tim me jojok aryekkege. 
Psalms58:6 Ama Obaŋa, tur lakgi oko iyi doggi, dok myero iput lak itino eŋato ager oko, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms58:7 Migi orweny calo pii ame mol oko, nyongi calo lum ote two oko." 
Psalms58:8 Migi obed calo okoro koro ame woto kun lao mere doŋ i yo ŋee, calo atin ame obwogo abwoga ame mom oneno waŋ ceŋ." 
Psalms58:9 Myero tongi oko piny calo buŋ kun gin mom ru oŋeo, Obaŋa myero mi yamo kolgi tergi oko i twon akemo adwoŋ kun pwod okwo." 
Psalms58:10 Jo a kitegi atira bino bedo i yomcuny ka oneno culo kwor man, gin bino lwoko tyengi i remo a jo areco," 
Psalms58:11 Jo bino kobo ni, “Ateni ba jo a kitegi atira kara nwoŋo mot me pwoyogi; Obaŋa ame ŋolo kop i lobo kara tye ba.”" 
Psalms59:1 Lara i ciŋ okworra, Ama Obaŋa, gwoka i ciŋ jo ame bino me bino lweny i koma," 
Psalms59:2 lara i ciŋ otim tim areco, kede i ciŋ jo ame maro onyo remo a jo." 
Psalms59:3 Nen, gin obedo kiya me kwanyo kwona; jo ager ocokere karacel me lweny i koma. Mom tye ginnoro arac ame atimo, balla moro daŋ mom, Ama Rwot," 
Psalms59:4 Mom atimo ginnoro arac gira, gin oriŋo oyotoyot i ka ponogi." 
Psalms59:5 Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony, ya inen, ibin ikonya, Ama Obaŋa a jo Icrael. Co oko me iket can i kom rok luŋ; kur iwek ŋattoro kadi acel, i akina wegi erupe ame poro kop me timo gin arac." 
Psalms59:6 Otyeno luŋ gin odwogo ame ogweo calo gwogi, kun obebea i dye boma," 
Psalms59:7 Koŋ iwiny gin ame gin tye ka kobo! Kop i doggi bit calo pala romo. Gin obedo tamo tam i cunygi kun okobo ni, “Ŋa ame bino winyo gin ame wan okobo?”" 
Psalms59:8 Ento yin gire inyerogi anyera, Ama Rwot; yin gire icao rok magi luŋ acaa." 
Psalms59:9 Ama yin ame ibedo tekona, abino gira wero wer me paki, pien yin Obaŋa ibedo cel atek me larrena." 
Psalms59:10 Obaŋana bino rwatte keda i marrere a mom lokere, en bino miyo aneno okworra acalo jo ame doŋ atyeko loyo." 
Psalms59:11 Kur inekgi, naka mio jona wigi wil oko; keketogi atata pi tekoni, digi piny, Ama Rwot ame ibedo kwotwa." 
Psalms59:12 Myero imi makgi iyi awakagi, pien kop a ya i doggi tye iye bal, kopporo luŋ ame gin kobo tye iye bal. Pi ceno jo kede kobo goba," 
Psalms59:13 tyekgi oko akemoni, tyekgi oko luŋ aluŋa. Me jo luŋ ŋe ni Obaŋa en ame loo jo a Yakobo, tuno naka iyi agikki piny." 
Psalms59:14 Otyeno luŋ gin odwogo ame ogweo calo gwogi kun obe bea i dye boma," 
Psalms59:15 Obedo rimo piny pi yenyo cam, ka mom ru onwoŋo cam obedo ŋuŋura aŋura." 
Psalms59:16 Cite an abino wero wer me pako tekoni, idiko abino wero wer me pako marri a mom lokere, Pien yin en ibedo cel atek me gwoka, kede ka larena i kare me can." 
Psalms59:17 Ama Tekona, abino wero wer me paki, pien yin Obaŋa, ibedo cel atek me gwoka, Obaŋa ame onyuta marrere a mom lokere." 
Psalms60:1 Ama Obaŋa, ikwerowa doŋ oko, dok daŋ iloowa, akemo onwoŋo omaki i komwa, dwokwa i ciŋi ba, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms60:2 Imio lobo oyeŋere, imio obarre oko; yik kan ame obarre oko, pien mito rette oko." 
Psalms60:3 Imio joni oneno cannogo apek meicel; imiowa omato koŋo olok ame obalo wiwa oko. 
Psalms60:4 Yin doŋ iŋabo bendera malo pi jo ame wori, me larogi i lak atero ame obao." 
Psalms60:5 Me wek joni ame imaro larre, miwa oloo lweny i tekoni, dok igam daŋ dogwa." 
Psalms60:6 Obaŋa okobo kop i kabedo mere acil ni, “Abino poko Cekem oko i twon kwogo me loc, abino daŋ poko luŋ me Cukot." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead obedo mega, Manace daŋ mega; Epraim obedo tok nyonyo me geŋo wia, aco Juda te bedo abiro me locca." 
Psalms60:8 Ento Moab obedo becen me lwokka; abolo warona i kom Edom me nyuto ni aloc; abino redo redo me loc i wi jo Piriciti,”" 
Psalms60:9 Ŋa abino kela i boma ame ocelo i cel atek? Ŋa abino tella yo me wot i Edom? 
Psalms60:10 Yin mom ikwerowa oko, Ama Obaŋa? Nen yin mom doŋ iwoto karacel i monywa." 
Psalms60:11 Tim ber ikonywa me lweny i kom okworwa, pien kony ame dano en amio mom konyo ginnoro," 
Psalms60:12 Ka Obaŋa obedo lweny karacel kedwa, wan obino loyo, en gire ame bino nyono okworwa dio piny." 
Psalms61:1 Winy kokona, Ama Obaŋa, winy daŋ kwacca." 
Psalms61:2 Acwao kokona baŋi i agikki lobo twal, i kare ame cunya doŋ ogem agema. Tela, Ama Rwot, tera i wi kidi ame yito loa oko;" 
Psalms61:3 pien yin en ibed ka larrena, gedo ocuŋ iguŋ malo i nyim okworra." 
Psalms61:4 Weka abed i kemani nakanaka! Mia agwokere i te tipo me bwomi. 
Psalms61:5 Yin doŋ ityeko winyo kwoŋŋa luŋ, Ama Obaŋa, ityeko miya gin ame imio baŋ jo ame woro nyiŋi." 
Psalms61:6 Meddi abaka kare me bedo kwo i lobo, me en perakino nakanaka i kare a lwagi jo me kare luŋ." 
Psalms61:7 Tim ber imie ebed i wi kom me loc nakanaka i nyimi, Ama Obaŋa, marri a mom lokere kede kiti atira en a myero gwoke." 
Psalms61:8 Mannono bino miyo awero wer me pako nyiŋi, kun nino i nino acobo kwoŋŋoro luŋ ame akwoŋo i nyimi." 
Psalms62:1 An abedo mot kun ageno gira Obaŋa keken, pien larrena ya i baŋe." 
Psalms62:2 En kene en obedo kan atek me larrena, en cel atek ame gwoka; mom obino jera teŋe kadi acel." 
Psalms62:3 Wun luŋ ibino bedo wunu lweny i koma naka awene, mereta oko calo apama cel agoro?" 
Psalms62:4 Oyiko ka kop me kwanyo dano oko i rwommere me dit, cunygi yom ata i kobo kop me goba. Olammi jo gum i kop i doggi keken, kun nwoŋo oceno dano acena i cunygi." 
Psalms62:5 An abedo mot kun ageno gira Obaŋa keken, pien gen ame atye kede oya i baŋe." 
Psalms62:6 En kene en obedo kan atek me larrena, en cel atek me gwoka; mom obino jera teŋe kadi acel." 
Psalms62:7 Larrena kede kwogona luŋ ya i baŋ Obaŋa, en obedo twon kidi moro atek ame gwoka, dok en obedo ka larrena." 
Psalms62:8 Gen wunu Obaŋa kare luŋ, wun jo luŋ gene wunu i cunywu ducu; Obaŋa en obedo ka larrewa." 
Psalms62:9 Jo ame tye i rwom a piny calo yamo, Jo ame tye i rwom amalo mom genne kadi acel, ame ka ipimogi luŋ i mijan, otiŋere malo oyotoyot calo yamo." 
Psalms62:10 Kur iket wunu genwu i tic me mayo jami a jo tetek, kur igen tic me yako jo, pien konnyere mom; ka ce lim onya i ciŋi, kur iketo cunyi iye." 
Psalms62:11 Obaŋa okobo kop tyen me agege, tyen me aryo ate winyo koppere, ni Obaŋa en obedo won teko," 
Psalms62:12 dok ni yin gire, Ama Rwot, en ibedo won mar a mom lokere. Pien yin iculo ŋat acel acel ame oporo tic ame en otio." 
Psalms63:1 Ama Obaŋa, yin gire ibedo Obaŋana, kwona ducu ocuŋ piri; koma doŋ ool oko, calo atye i lobo otwo, oti ame pii pe iye." 
Psalms63:2 Mannono omio abedo yenyi kabedoni ducu acil, me neno tekoni kede kwogoni." 
Psalms63:3 Pien marri a mom lokere ber kato kwo oko, mannono omio an gira abino paki nino luŋ." 
Psalms63:4 Abino pwoyi pi kare me kwona luŋ, abino taŋo ciŋa baŋi me kwayi." 
Psalms63:5 Cunya yom meicel calo acamo moo, dok abino wero wer me paki kare ducu, kun adworo nyiŋi meicel yomcuny." 
Psalms63:6 Kadi abuto piny i wi tandana, wia mom bino wil i komi, abino lwado kop i komi naka dyewor benebene." 
Psalms63:7 Pien yin gire en ame ikonya, kwona ocuŋ i komi, en omio awero wer i yomcuny." 
Psalms63:8 An gira amoko i komi ikiŋ, yin ikwaka aber odoco i ciŋi tuŋcem." 
Psalms63:9 Ento jo ame mito neka, bino donyo piny i bur atut." 
Psalms63:10 Obino miyo pala me romo nekogi oko, obino doko cam ekwe ame bedo i tim." 
Psalms63:11 Ento abaka bino lelo kom Obaŋa, kede jo luŋ ame kwoŋo kede nyiŋe bino daŋ lelo, ento jo ame ogoba obino miyo liŋ oko." 
Psalms64:1 Cik yiti iwiny dwona, Ama Rwot, iwinyo kokona ame akelo baŋi; lara i ciŋ okwor ame mia lworo." 
Psalms64:2 Gwoka i ciŋ jo areco ame tye ka yikere i muŋ pira, kede i ciŋ lwak man ame kitegi reco," 
Psalms64:3 ame pako lebgi calo pala me romo, ame kop ame ya i doggi bit calo atero." 
Psalms64:4 Opono oko me celo jo a mom i balloro, ote ru celo oyotoyot aboŋo lworo moro kadi acel." 
Psalms64:5 Kare ducu gin oyikere ka me cobo yikgi areco, okobo kop kun oporo ka kop me dwalojo, ame otamo ni mom tye ŋattoro ame anenogi." 
Psalms64:6 Dok otamo ni mom tye ŋattoro ame twero yenyo bal i komgi te nwoŋo. Gin otamo ni gin oryeko meicel ame ŋattoro mom romo ŋeyo imuŋgi, pien imuŋ ame tye i cunygi obedo imuŋ ame opono kan atut meicel." 
Psalms64:7 Ento Obaŋa bino celogi kede atero mere, awano bino poto i komgi atura." 
Psalms64:8 Kop ame ya i doggi bino miyo ityekogi oko, jo luŋ ame nenogi, yeŋo wigi ayeŋa." 
Psalms64:9 Mannono bino miyo jo luŋ lworogi, gin te bedo rabo pi gin ame Obaŋa otio baŋ jo mere; ote bedo lwodo koppono i cunygi pi gin ame Obaŋa otimo-nono." 
Psalms64:10 Jo ame kitegi atira myero lel pi Rwot, dok myero oriŋ olar baŋe, Jo ame cunygi ler myero lel kun opwoo Obaŋa meicel." 
Psalms65:1 Myero gire paki i Cion, Ama Obaŋa, dok ginnoro luŋ ame okwoŋo pire myero mi baŋi." 
Psalms65:2 Yin gire en ame igamo kwac a jo luŋ, jo luŋ myero bin baŋi." 
Psalms65:3 Kadi bed bal diowa meicel, yin gire en ame ijwao oko ducu," 
Psalms65:4 Dano ame yin iyero ite kelo cok kedi, tye kede winyo me bedo i dyekalli acil. Gin abeco ame tye i odi, bino romowa, ame obedo kabedoni acil." 
Psalms65:5 Yin igamo kwacwa, ite larowa, kun itimo gin ame mio jo lworo meicel. Ama Obaŋa ame obedo Alarwa." 
Psalms65:6 Jo luŋ ame tye i wi podo geni, akadi jo ame tye kagi mogo aboco meicel, tekoni en ame omio kiddi ocuŋ kan ame gin otye iye, dok tekoni daŋ en ame tye ka gwokogi." 
Psalms65:7 Yin imio nam omor ager meicel liŋ oko, nam doŋ te kwe mot, jo ame onwoŋo awo te liŋ oko." 
Psalms65:8 Jo luŋ ame tye kannaboco meicel, gin luŋ ogoo ijira kun cunygi yom meicel, gin luŋ olworo neno ticci me awura, cakere i tuŋ to naka tuŋ kide." 
Psalms65:9 Yin ilimo lobo ite miyo kot cwe iye, cam abup meicel te cek i lobo. Pii dwoŋ meicel i kulo Obaŋa, dok yin Obaŋa en ame imio cam cek, pien mannono obedo gin ame yin en ame iyiko." 
Psalms65:10 Yin imio yo ame okunyo iye bidde ayom meicel, imio kot cwe iye adwoŋ meicel, eka ginapita luŋ ame tye iye, te doŋo daŋ a ber." 
Psalms65:11 Mwaka i mwaka, yin en imio gum baŋ jo luŋ, pi cam ame imio cekkigi, yo ame gadigadini lubo, moo dwoŋ iye meicel." 
Psalms65:12 Imio dok dwoŋ meicel i bar me kwayogi, anaka jo ame bedo i ŋet kiddi daŋ lelo." 
Psalms65:13 Dok rommi daŋ dwon meicel i bar ame okwaogi iye, dok kal daŋ oyido ibim i luŋ, gin luŋ olelo kun owero wer me yomcuny karacel." 
Psalms66:1 Wun jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo, wo wunu i yomcuny," 
Psalms66:2 kun idworo wunu nyiŋ Obaŋa, ipake wunu i werrogo me kwogo." 
Psalms66:3 Kobbi wunu Obaŋa ni, “Yin itio tic me awura meicel, twer ame yin itye kede dwoŋ meicel, ame mio okworri mwolle amwola i nyimi." 
Psalms66:4 Jo luŋ ame tye i lobo, wori, gin luŋ owero wer me paki, kun owero opako kede nyiŋi.”" 
Psalms66:5 Bye inen wunu gin ame Obaŋa otio, en tio gigi mogo ame iyiliyili meicel i akina dano," 
Psalms66:6 En omio pii i nam otwo oko imek, jo te beo i cuny kulo otwo kun owoto i tyengi. Wan rik ote bedo i yomcuny meicel i kome kuno," 
Psalms66:7 Twer ame en tye kede, omio en loo loccere nakanak, dok neno rok ducu, Jo ame wakere myero wek yiye nono nono." 
Psalms66:8 Pwo wunu Rwot Obaŋawa, wun rok ducu, wer wunu wer me pake, me jo winy." 
Psalms66:9 En ogwokowa omiowa pwod otye kwo, dok mom omio tyenwa ocer kadi acel." 
Psalms66:10 Yin gire doŋ ityeko temowa oko, Ama Obaŋa, itemowa kite ame otemo i ryal ame olio i mac." 
Psalms66:11 Yin en ame rik ikelowa naka iyi boo, eka ite cibo yec apek i wiwa me ayea." 
Psalms66:12 Rik ite miyo jo bedo nyono wiwa, owoto kun obeo i dye mac kede i dye pii, kadi bed amannono, yin gire en ame dok ite kelowa i kabedo alac me kuc." 
Psalms66:13 An abino bino i odi, kun akelo mot awaŋa me yali, abino cobo kwoŋŋa luŋ ame akwoŋo i nyimi." 
Psalms66:14 Ginnoro luŋ ame doŋ atyeko kobo, abino cobo, kede ginnoro luŋ ame acikere me timo i kare ame atye i can." 
Psalms66:15 Abino yali i rommi ocwe calo mot awaŋana, kede yito ame duny bino baŋi ame ya i kom nyogi rommi ame awaŋ, abino yali i mot me twoni, kede nyogi dyegi." 
Psalms66:16 Wun jo luŋ ame lworo Obaŋa, myero ibin iwiny wunu, an abino titiwu gin ame Obaŋa otimo pira," 
Psalms66:17 Rik acwao kwacca baŋe i dwon aloŋo, ate daŋ pako nyiŋe kede wer." 
Psalms66:18 Kono onwoŋo rik akano balle oko i cunya, kono Rwot gire mom owinyo kwacca kadi acel." 
Psalms66:19 Cite amito kobo kannnaler ni Obaŋa owiny kwaca, en ociko yite te winyo kwacca luŋ ame akelo i nyime," 
Psalms66:20 Obaŋa gire myero pwo, pien en gire mom okwero winyo kwacca, dok daŋ mom omio marrere a mom lokere oya i koma." 
Psalms67:1 Kica myero mak Obaŋa i komwa, dok miwa daŋ gum, kun nenowa daŋ i waŋ me kica," 
Psalms67:2 me jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo ŋe kite, dok teko mere me laro jo oŋeye baŋ rok ducu." 
Psalms67:3 Rok luŋ me wi lobo myero paki, Ama Obaŋa, rok luŋ myero gire paki." 
Psalms67:4 Mi cuny rok luŋ bed ayom, kun owero wer me pwoyi i yomcuny, pien yin iŋolo kop a rok luŋ arorom, dok yin daŋ en ame itye ka telo rok luŋ ame tye i wi lobo." 
Psalms67:5 Rok luŋ me wi lobo myero paki, Ama Rwot, rok luŋ myero gire paki," 
Psalms67:6 Cam doŋ ocek i lobo meicel, Pien Obaŋawa, Obaŋawa omiowa gum." 
Psalms67:7 Obaŋa omiwa gum, jo luŋ ame tye i lobo myero wore." 
Psalms68:1 Obaŋa myero ya malo, me mi okworerrera ket oko atata dok jo ame dage daŋ riŋ oko i nyime." 
Psalms68:2 Migi orweny oko i nyimi kite ame yito duny kede, kite ame odok kic me ye kede ka oketo i mac, mi jo a kitegi reco to daŋ kittono i nyimi, yin Obaŋa." 
Psalms68:3 Ento jo a kitegi atira, myero bed i yomcuny, migi olel i yomcuny i nyimi yin Obaŋa, mi yomcuny cirgi oko." 
Psalms68:4 Wer wunu baŋ Obaŋa, wer wunu wer me pako nyiŋe, yik wunu yo a ŋat ame kwano pol, Nyiŋe Rwot, dwore wunu, dok ibed wunu i yomcuny i nyime." 
Psalms68:5 Obaŋa ame bedo i kabedo mere acil, en ame obedo papo itino kic, kede ogwok mon a coggi oto," 
Psalms68:6 Obaŋa en ame mio acan paco mere me bedo, en telo jo ame tye i ot kol, terogi i kuc, ento jo ame maro jem en wekogi obedo i lobo otwo." 
Psalms68:7 Ama Obaŋa, i kare ame itelo wi lwakki, i kare ame iwoto kedgi i dye tim," 
Psalms68:8 lobo oyeŋere, kot te core piny kun ya i polo, pi nyiŋi, yin Obaŋa, anaka kidi me Cinai daŋ oyeŋere inyimi yin Obaŋa. Yin Obaŋa a jo Icrael." 
Psalms68:9 Yin rik imio kot adwoŋ meicel ocwe i lobo, Ama Obaŋa, i mio teko baŋ jo ame iyero i kare ame gin odoko agoro." 
Psalms68:10 Lwakki bedo iye acalo pacogi, dok imio teko baŋ jo ame piny oloo, Ama Obaŋa, mannono yin itimo pi berri giri." 
Psalms68:11 Rwot en omio cik, Mon ame tero amut aberi, pol meicel, kun okob ni," 
Psalms68:12 “Obakki karacel kede monygi tye ka riŋo oko,” mon ame odoŋ paco, poko jami ame oyako i lweny," 
Psalms68:13 kadi bed gin obuto iyi anok me buto a rommi, onen calo awele ame okwogo bwomgi kede ryal, dok ame yer komgi obedo lulum calo jabu." 
Psalms68:14 Kare ame Won Twer okeketo obakki i kuno oko, kot ocwe i pee i WI kidi me Calmon." 
Psalms68:15 Kidi me Bacan kara tek kit man, kidi me Bacan wie pol ladi!" 
Psalms68:16 Yin kidi ame wii aboco mere pol wok-ki, piŋo kara ineno piny i waŋ me nyeko, naka kidi ame Obaŋa oyero me bedo iye. Rwot gire bino bedo kuno nakanaka," 
Psalms68:17 Rwot obino kun ya i Cinai, woto i ode acil, obino i lwak gadigadi tutumia i tutumia." 
Psalms68:18 Oyito naka i wi kidi malo, kun coko lwak opii apol meicel woto kede, kun daŋ gamo mot ame jo mie, naka i baŋ jo ame yam jem i kome." 
Psalms68:19 Rwot Obaŋa bino bedo kuno. Rwot gire myero pwo, pien en nino i nino tiŋowa pekowa luŋ, Obaŋa gire en ame larowa." 
Psalms68:20 Obaŋawa gire en ame larowa Obaŋawa, en Rwot ame larowa i to." 
Psalms68:21 Ento Obaŋa bino goyo wi okworrere ŋiŋido oko, jo ame yer wigi boco, ame mom mito weko kitegi areco." 
Psalms68:22 Rwot ociko ni, “Abino dwoggogi i Bacan, abino kwanyogi oko i piny, kun awotogi i nam atut," 
Psalms68:23 me ibid tyenwu kede remo okworwu, me leb gwogiwu pipila me naŋo remo okworwu.”" 
Psalms68:24 Jo luŋ tye ka neno wotti, Ama Obaŋa, wotti, yin Obaŋana, ame ibedo Abakana, ame iwoto kede i odi acil," 
Psalms68:25 kun ower telo yo, okut bilo lubogi, kun i dyeregi tye iye anyira ame goo ajaa." 
Psalms68:26 “Myero ipwo wunu Obaŋa i dye lwak adwoŋ, wun ikwae a jo Icrael luŋ, myero ipwo wunu Rwot.”" 
Psalms68:27 Benjamin ame obedo atekere atidi meicel, en ame otelo yo, kun rwode a jo Juda tye iyeryoŋetgi karacel kede rwode a jo Jabulon kede me a Naputal." 
Psalms68:28 Nyut twerri, Ama Obaŋa, nyut tekki ame itio kede pirwa, Ama Obaŋa." 
Psalms68:29 I odi ame tye i Jerucalem, obakki kela motgi me bino yalli." 
Psalms68:30 Ama Obaŋa, juk leyi ager ame tye i akina aladu, twoni apipim kede roce a rok oceie, tuno ka gin oryebere piny i nyimi, ote miyi motgi me ryal, eketo jo ame maro lweny oko." 
Psalms68:31 Okwena adoŋo bino ya i Miciri, jo Eciopia bino taŋo ciŋgi kwao Obaŋa," 
Psalms68:32 Wer wunu wer me pako Obaŋa, wun oloc luŋ me lobo, wer wunu wer me pako Rwot." 
Psalms68:33 Wer wunu wer baŋ ŋat ame woto malo i polo, i pol acon meicel, winy wunu kite ame en tye ka redo kede i dwon aloŋo." 
Psalms68:34 Rab wunu pi teko Obaŋa, kwogo mere tye i kom Icrael, teko mere tye malo i polo." 
Psalms68:35 Obaŋa iyiliyili meicel i ode acil, en Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, ame mio teko kede twer baŋ jo mere. Wun myero ipwo wunu Obaŋa." 
Psalms69:1 Lara ba, Ama Obaŋa! Pien pii doŋ amito mwonya oko." 
Psalms69:2 Amoko doŋ oko i te coto piny, kan ame tyena mo romo nyono kadi acel; atuno doŋ i pii kan atut meicel, ame doŋ tye atagere kun corre i wia malo." 
Psalms69:3 Koko doŋ oola oko, dwona daŋ doŋ orwe oko; waŋa daŋ doŋ oballe oko, kun akuro Obaŋana," 
Psalms69:4 Jo ame daga nononono aboŋo ginnoro ame abalo, opol atek ame kato yer wia oko; jo ame tye ka coko doga nononono i kop me goba, otek meicel gin jo ame mito neka nono. Gin openya me dwoko gin ame mom akwanyo kadi acel." 
Psalms69:5 Ama Obaŋana, yin gire iŋeo miŋona luŋ, ginnoro luŋ ame an abalo, tye kannaler i nyimi." 
Psalms69:6 Kur imi lewic mak jo ame geni pira, Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony; kur imi ale twod jo ame yenyi pira, Ama Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
Psalms69:7 An doŋ akanyo ayet meicel piri, ame omio lewic doŋ ocira oko." 
Psalms69:8 Acalo doŋ arok i akina omegona, omegona ame onywala kedgi karacel, mom doŋ ŋea." 
Psalms69:9 Akemo omaka pi lit a odi, ayet ame jo yeti kede, poto naka i koma." 
Psalms69:10 Ka aporo mwolle kun akanyo kec, jo yeta ayeta." 
Psalms69:11 Ka ruko boŋo me kwero cola, adoko gin me lolo doggi." 
Psalms69:12 Jo ame bedo piny i dogcel, kobo nyiŋa meicel, jo ame mer i koŋo olok, ocako wergi kun owera kede." 
Psalms69:13 Cite an i tuŋ baŋa, Ama Rwot, akelo gira kwacca i nyimi, akelo gira i kare ame mitte ikokome, gam kwacca, Ama Obaŋa pi marri a mom lokere," 
Psalms69:14 Lara oko, Ama Obaŋa, pi konnyi adwoŋ me kur amok i coto; lara i ciŋ okworra ame daga, lara i pii atut meicel." 
Psalms69:15 Kur imi pii ame amol atek meicel tera oko, kur imi amwonyere oko i pii atut, dok daŋ kur imi adony piny i te bur." 
Psalms69:16 Gam doga, Ama Rwot, pien marri a mom lokere ber, lokere inena i waŋ me kica, kite ame kicani dwoŋ kede." 
Psalms69:17 Kur iponna oko, an amironi, tim ber igam doga, pien atye i can." 
Psalms69:18 Nyiggo baŋa, me ikonya, tim ber ikwanya oko ciŋ okworra." 
Psalms69:19 Yin gire iŋeo kite ame onywara kede luŋ, kede lewic areco luŋ ame gin omia, dok daŋ iŋeo okworra luŋ." 
Psalms69:20 Ayet ame gin yeta kede omio cunya oballe oko, omio doŋ atye acalo ŋat obolo tonnere piny oko. Ŋattoro akono kica make i koma, mom nen kadi acel, jo moro akono kwe cunya mom nen kadi acel." 
Psalms69:21 Akaka miya cem a myero acam, gin omia acamo cam ame oonyo iye kwir, ka apenyo pii me amata, gin olunyo miya koŋo awac." 
Psalms69:22 Mi mejagi ame tye i nyimgi, lokere dok owic me mokogi; ecubangi ame oyalo iye Obaŋa olokere odoko boo me mokogi." 
Psalms69:23 Mi waŋgi cid oko me kur onen piny; mi pyergi bed myel amyela. 
Psalms69:24 Cor akemoni luŋ i komgi, tyek akemoni agwa wokki komgi." 
Psalms69:25 Myero imi kemagi doŋ nono aboŋo ŋattoro ame bedo iye, kur imi ŋattoro bed iye kadi acel." 
Psalms69:26 Pien gin omedde wuno dano ame yin doŋ ityeko keto can i kome, dok omedde keto can ameda i kom ame yin doŋ ityeko keto awano i komgi." 
Psalms69:27 Medde keto can aketa i komgi pi balgi, kur ikwany kop i wigi kadi acel." 
Psalms69:28 Mi nyiŋgi jwa oko i buk a jo akwo, kur imi co nyiŋgi i buk a jo a kitegi atira." 
Psalms69:29 Cite an rem kede can ocira oko; Ama Obaŋa, tim ber ilara ite keta malo." 
Psalms69:30 An abino pako nyiŋ Obaŋa, kede wer; abino dworo nyiŋe kun apwoe." 
Psalms69:31 Pwocca-nono bino yomoro cunye ame kato twon oko, akadi twon ame tuŋe tye kede lwete." 
Psalms69:32 Tim ber imi jo ame owuno nen, bedo i yomcuny; wunjo ame woro Rwot, cunywu bino dwogo." 
Psalms69:33 Rwot gire winyo koko a jo ame piny oloo, dok daŋ cunye mom cao jo mere ame otweo i buc." 
Psalms69:34 Polo kede lobo ducu myero pake, nam kede ginnoro luŋ ame woto i tyene." 
Psalms69:35 Pien Obaŋa bino laro jo ame bedo i Cion, dok daŋ bino dok gero boma luŋ me Juda; omiro mere bino bedo kuno, ote gamo bedo meggi," 
Psalms69:36 Itino omiro mere bino leyo doko meggi, dok jo luŋ ame mare bino bedo iye." 
Psalms70:1 Ama Rwot, cunyi myero bed ayom me larra. Ru lara, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms70:2 Mi lewic makgi dok babaŋogi oko, gin jo ame mito kwanyo kwona, migi olokere odok cen i twon lewic, gin jo ame bedo timarac." 
Psalms70:3 Mi twon lewic adwoŋ mak jo ame nyera, jo ame kobba ni, Ber, ber, ber." 
Psalms70:4 Cite myero imi jo luŋ ame wori bed i yomcuny, dok olel meicel piri; myero imi jo ame maro larreni, kob kare ducu ni, “Rwot gire dwoŋ.”" 
Psalms70:5 Aco an gira, an acan, piny oloa oko; ru bino baŋa Ama Rwot! yin gire en ame ikonya dok ilara, kur ibed gal, Ama Obaŋana." 
Psalms71:1 An gira ariŋo alaro baŋi, Ama Abana; kur imi lewic maka ba;" 
Psalms71:2 Lara dok ikonya pi kiteni atira; cik yiti me iwiny kwacca, dok daŋ ilarra." 
Psalms71:3 Tim ber ibed kidi atek me larrena, dok ibed twon cel atek meicel me gwokka, pien yin en ibedo kidi kede cella ame ocel atek." 
Psalms71:4 Ama Obaŋana, tim ber ilara i ciŋ tim areco, lara i ciŋ jo a mom ŋolo kop kakare, dok ame gin jo ager meicel." 
Psalms71:5 Pien genna luŋ tye i komi, Ama Rwot, acako genni i kare ame pwod an atin," 
Psalms71:6 An rik acako bedo i gen i komi cakere ame rik pwod onywala anywala, yin daŋ en ame rik ikwanya iyi totta kan ame rik abuto iye. An gira abino medde paki kare ducu." 
Psalms71:7 An onwoŋo abedo gin ame jo apol wuro meicel, ento yin en ame ibedo ka larrena atek." 
Psalms71:8 Wer me paki mom rwenyo i doga, aketo kwogo i komi nino i nino." 
Psalms71:9 Tim ber kur ibola oko i kare ame doŋ atyeko ti; kur daŋ iweka ata i kare ame tekona doŋ odoko agoro," 
Psalms71:10 Pien okworra kare luŋ bedo poro kop i koma, jo ame mito neka, cokere karacel me poro kop i koma." 
Psalms71:11 Kun okobo ni, “Obaŋa doŋ otyeko weka oko ata; ryeme wunu me imake wunu oko, pien ŋattoro a myero lare mom doŋ tye.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ama Obaŋa, kur ibed abor keda; Ama Obaŋana, tim ber iru bino konya." 
Psalms71:13 Mi lewic mak jo ame tye ka dota, dok ame otyeko tekona oko; Mi jo caagi, dok lewic adwoŋ meicel daŋ makgi, gin jo luŋ ame mito keto can ikoma." 
Psalms71:14 Cite an gira abino medde bedo gen nakanaka, kun daŋ amedde paki apaka." 
Psalms71:15 Abino medde tuco ticcoro luŋ atira ame yin ibedo tiyo, abino tuco daŋ pi tic ame itio me lawk jo nino ducu, pien welgi dwoŋ meicel, ame kato ŋec ame an atye kede oko." 
Psalms71:16 Abino bedo rabo pi tic adoŋo me awura ame Rwot Obaŋa obedo tiyo, kiteni atira keken en ame an abino bedo pako." 
Psalms71:17 Ama Rwot Obaŋa, yin gire ibedo konya cakere i kare ame pwod atidi, pi mannono, pwod abino bedo tuco ticcogo me awura luŋ ame yin itio." 
Psalms71:18 Pi mannono ba, kadi ati ame lwar doŋ obuko i wia, kur iweka kadi acel, Ama Obaŋa, tuno ka atyeko rabo pi twerri baŋ lwagi jo me kare luŋ," 
Psalms71:19 Tekoni kede kiteni atira, doŋ otyeko tuno naka malo i polo, Ama Obaŋa. Yin doŋ ityeko timo jami mogo adoŋodoŋo meicel, kara ŋa ame oŋomo pori kede, Ama Obaŋa?" 
Psalms71:20 Yin en ame icwao can kede rem adwoŋ meicel baŋa, ento yin dok ibino miya teko; dok daŋ yin ibino wota oko piny i te bur atut, ibino wota idwogo an kannaler." 
Psalms71:21 Ibino miya abedo twon lo moro adit akato kit ame yam abedo kede con; dok daŋ ibino kweyo cunya. 
Psalms71:22 Dok daŋ abino paki kede naŋa opuk, pien yin ibedo Obaŋana ame genne, abino wero wer me paki, kun agoo naŋa opuk, Ama yin Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Psalms71:23 Abino redo atek meicel i yomcuny, i kare ame atye ka wero wer me paki; abino paki daŋ i tipona luŋ ame yin ityeko laro." 
Psalms71:24 Abino medde tuco ticcoro luŋ atira ame yin ibedo tiyo me konyo jo, cakere odiko naka otyeno, pien can kede lewic doŋ otyeko makogi oko, gin jo ame onwoŋo mito keto can i koma." 
Psalms72:1 Pwony abaka i ŋolo kop atira calo yin, Ama Obaŋa, dok imi wot abaka nywak kedi kiteni atira." 
Psalms72:2 Myero kite atira en ame loc i ŋolokop a joni i dok daŋ ŋolli ocan kop atira. 
Psalms72:3 Mi kiddi okel kuc baŋ joni, wii tur-gu okel kite atira," 
Psalms72:4 Abaka myero ŋol kop a jo ame tye i akina joni kakare, dok myero lar jo ame piny oloo, kun turo loc a jo ame wunogi oko." 
Psalms72:5 Mi loccere perakino acalo ceŋ kede dwe, pi runi kede runi," 
Psalms72:6 Mi jo jole acalo kot ame cwe i wi lum ame ojwero, acalo kot ame ŋido bido lobo otwo." 
Psalms72:7 Mi kite atira nya medde ameda i kare me loccere, kuc daŋ bed tye i lobo mere nakanaka, tuno i kare ame dwe doŋ mom tye," 
Psalms72:8 Mi lobo ame en loo cakere i dog nam tuŋŋi tuno kede tuŋ ocele, cakere i kulo adwoŋ tuno kede i agikki lobo," 
Psalms72:9 Mi okworrere bin ryebere piny i nyime me wore, jo a lwenyo i kome, bin mulo amula i nyime." 
Psalms72:10 Mi abaka me Tarcic kede abaka a jo ame bedo i cula nam bin gel ocorogi baŋe, dok obakki me Cebar kede me Eciopia, kel motgi baŋe." 
Psalms72:11 Obakki luŋ myero bin ryebere piny i nyime, dok rok luŋ daŋ myero bed jo ame tio ticcere." 
Psalms72:12 En maro ŋat me piny oloo ka ce okok baŋe, konyo daŋ ocan kede ŋattoro ame tye aboŋo ŋat ame konye." 
Psalms72:13 Pien kica mako i kom jo agoro kede i kom jo ame piny oloo, dok daŋ laro kwo a jo ame piny oloo," 
Psalms72:14 En lakoro kwogi i ciŋ jo ame wunogi kede otim tim me bwami, kwogi pire tek baŋe meicel." 
Psalms72:15 Mi kom abaka bed ayot nakanaka, dok imi mie jabu ame okelo i Ceba." 
Psalms72:16 Mi jo bed kwayo pire nakanaka, kun daŋ olamme winyo kare ducu, Mi cam cek adwoŋ meicel i lobo mere, naka i wi kiddi malo, mi ginnoro luŋ ame cek iye bed bala en ame cek i Lebanon, dok jo bed dwoŋ atek meicel i boma ame tye i te loccere, kun pol meicel calo lum." 
Psalms72:17 Mi nyiŋ abaka perakino nakanaka, mi nyiŋe bed rwo nakanaka kite ame ceŋ ri kede. Mi jo luŋ ka alamo gum, lam i nyiŋe, kun rok luŋ lwoŋe ni, lo a kome winy." 
Psalms72:18 Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael myero pwo, ame en keken en ame tio gin me awura." 
Psalms72:19 Nyiŋe me kwogo myero bed pako nakanaka, kwogo mere myero rom lobo luŋ aluŋa! Amen dok Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Kwac a Daudi wot a Yece ogik kan. 
Psalms73:1 Ateteni, Obaŋa gire ber baŋ jo a cunygi ler, i kom jo ame cunygi cil." 
Psalms73:2 Aco an, tyena otwomere ame onwoŋo doŋ aceggi poto, tyena onwoŋo doŋ ceggi acega i cer." 
Psalms73:3 I kare ame nyeko omaka i kom jo ame wakere, kede i kare ame aneno otim tim areco tye alony alonya." 
Psalms73:4 Pien gin gigi mom owinyo kit remmoro kadi acel, komgi yot dok daŋ pwot apwota." 
Psalms73:5 Gin mom ocalo jo ocele ame can bino poto i komgi, mom daŋ otye ka goyogi calo jo ocele." 
Psalms73:6 Mannono omio awaka en ame tye acalo tigo ŋutgi, tim me kolo te bedo acalo boŋogi me aruka." 
Psalms73:7 Yikgi me timo gin areco mollo amola i cunygi calo moo, tam me miŋo en ame dwoŋ i cunygi." 
Psalms73:8 Gin cwako gin arac i kop areco keken, cunygi yom ayoma i tim me wuno jo ocele," 
Psalms73:9 Naka Obaŋa ame tye malo twalli gin okobo kop arac i kome, kop a ya i doggi twero ketti jo ame tye i wi lobo cik." 
Psalms73:10 Mannono omio jo lunyo pakogi, kun jo ye kopporo luŋ ame gin kobo." 
Psalms73:11 Gin okobo i cunygi ni, “Obaŋa kara twero ŋeyo i yore aŋo; Obaŋa mara meicel, ŋeo ginnoro luŋ bo?”" 
Psalms73:12 Nen ba, mannono en kite ame ocan bedo kede, kun lonyo medde ameda i ciŋgi." 
Psalms73:13 Cite an ame abedo gwoko cunya bedo acil, kun daŋ alwoko balloro luŋ i ciŋa, an kom abedo yelle nono." 
Psalms73:14 Pien obedo yella nino ducu, kun daŋ opwoda nino i nino odiko." 
Psalms73:15 Kono onwoŋo akobo amannono, kono abwolo ikwai ame obino nywalo i kare me anyim." 
Psalms73:16 Ento atemo i tekona ducu me niaŋ gin omio man tye ka timere, anwoŋo ni tek ame mom aromo niaŋ iye," 
Psalms73:17 tuno naka i to acil ame oworo iye Obaŋa, ate doŋ niaŋ iyi imuŋ Obaŋa i kom otim tim areco." 
Psalms73:18 Ateteni, remo onwoŋo iketogi kan apwot meicel, ame obedo cer acera iye, omio gin luŋ ote poto oko i can." 
Psalms73:19 Gin luŋ rik ote tum oyotoyot meicel, can ame mio jo lworo rik te jwerogi tyekogi oko." 
Psalms73:20 Jo-nono gire calo lek ame ka dano ocoo i waŋ nino rwenyo oko i wie, ame ka ico i waŋ nino calgi rwenyo oko i wi kede tammi." 
Psalms73:21 I kare ame cunya ocwer meicel, ame akemo omio par ocira oko," 
Psalms73:22 onwoŋo adoko amiŋ ame mom aromo tamo ginnoro kadi acel, kun atimere i nyimi calo lee." 
Psalms73:23 Kadi bed amannono, an gira kare luŋ atye i ciŋi, yin imako ciŋa tuŋ cem." 
Psalms73:24 Yin en ame itela kede tam ame ibino miya, waŋŋoro i agikki ibino jola i kabedoni me kwogo," 
Psalms73:25 Kara ŋo ocele ame dok tye pira i polo, mom yin keken? Mom dok tye ginnoro i lobo kan ame an amito ame kati," 
Psalms73:26 Koma kede cunya twero doko agoro, cite yin Obaŋa en ame imia tekcuny, dok yin gire en ame ibedo gin ame opoka ame abino gwoko atwal." 
Psalms73:27 Nen ba, ŋat ame bor abora kedi, bino to oko, pien yin ibino jwero jo luŋ ame mom geni," 
Psalms73:28 Aco an gira, bedo ceggi kedi yin Obaŋa en ame berra, an gira ariŋo alaro baŋi, yin Rwot Obaŋana, me wek abedo rabo pi ticcoro luŋ ame yin itio." 
Psalms74:1 Ama Obaŋa, piŋo kara ibolowa oko atwal? Piŋo imio akemoni duny i kom rommini ame itye ka kwayo?" 
Psalms74:2 Po pi lwakki ame yam yin iyero pi lwakki cakere con, jo ame yam ilakoro oko i can me bedo megi yin ikomi, Po pi kidi me Ci on kan ame yam yin ibedo iye." 
Psalms74:3 Doki i kabedo man ame doŋ oballe oko odoco-ni; okworo otyeko balo ginnoro luŋ ame tye i odi. 
Psalms74:4 Okworo oredo kun owoo ilelo kan ame yam owori iye, oŋabo benderagi i doggola malo, ame nyuto ni kannono doŋ odoko meggi." 
Psalms74:5 Gin onen calo opaa bao ame tye ka toŋo yen i lee iyi buŋ," 
Psalms74:6 Bao luŋ ame, yam opao aber, otoŋo oko piny, obabalo oko i lee kede anyul." 
Psalms74:7 Ocwinyo mac, ote waŋo oko odi acil, Ama Obaŋa, opyelo-gu odi acil ame yam jo wori iye, kun omuko apama mere oreto oko piny." 
Psalms74:8 Okobo i cunygi kengikengi ni: Obino nekogi otyekogi oko ducu, obino daŋ waŋo kabedo acil ducu i lobowa, kan ame yam gin oworo iye Obaŋa." 
Psalms74:9 Anennoro ame yam poyo wiwa mom doŋ tye, adwarpinnyoro daŋ mom doŋ tye, dok daŋ mom tye ŋattoro i akinawa ame ŋeo kare ame can man bino ri kede," 
Psalms74:10 Ama Obaŋa, okwor bino bedo yeti naka awene ba? gin obino bedo cayo nyiŋi nakanaka bo?" 
Psalms74:11 Piŋo kara ikwero konyowa oko? Pi ŋo idolo ciŋi idwoko iŋei kaka ryeyo me konyowa? 
Psalms74:12 Aco kono yin Obaŋa ame ibedo abakana, cakere con meicel; yin en ibedo tiyo ticcogo me laro dano i wi lobo." 
Psalms74:13 Pi twer ame yin itye kede omio yin ipoko nam i dul aryo, ite nyonyobo wi leyi ame bedo i nam oko," 
Psalms74:14 Iŋiŋinyo daŋ wi Leviatan oko, ite bolo kome baŋ leyi ager me acamagi." 
Psalms74:15 Imio pii opelo iyi akoŋ kede i kulo, imio pii odwono oko i nam adoŋo." 
Psalms74:16 Yin daŋ gire en ame ilo dyeceŋ kede dyewor, dok yin en ame iketo cen kede dwe i kabedoni." 
Psalms74:17 Yin en imoko waŋ apokki me lobo, dok daŋ yin en ame iyiko kare me oro kede kare me cwir." 
Psalms74:18 Aman doŋ ba, Ama Rwot, koŋ ipoyo kite ame okworwa yeti kede, gin obedo jo amiŋ ame yeti nononono, kun mom olwori kadi acel," 
Psalms74:19 Kur ijal kwo a joni i ciŋ leyi ager, wii myero kur wil oko atwal i kom lwakki ame can odio." 
Psalms74:20 Poyo cikereni ame rik icikere kede kedwa, tim me byemi tye i kabedo luŋ acol ame tye i lobowa-ni," 
Psalms74:21 Kur imi lewic mak jo ame otye ka nyono oko piny, mi ocan kede jo ame piny oloo pak nyiŋi." 
Psalms74:22 Ya malo, Ama Obaŋa, ipid pidoni, wii kur wil i kom ayet ame jo amiŋ cai kede kare ducu," 
Psalms74:23 Wii kur wil i kom redo me akemo ame okworri redo kede atek wok-ki, woo okworri ame tye ka medde ameda kare i kare." 
Psalms75:1 Wan opwoi, Ama Obaŋa, wan giwa opwoi, wan odworo nyiŋi, kun orabo ticci me awura." 
Psalms75:2 Abino ŋolo kop atirai i lobo, i kare ame doŋ atyeko moko." 
Psalms75:3 Kadi bedo lobo bino yeŋere karacel i jo luŋ ame bedo iye, an abino miyo cuŋ atek ikiŋ kakare." 
Psalms75:4 Abino kobbi jo awakere ni myero owek wakere bedi, dok abino kobbi jo areco ni owek yeyea nononono." 
Psalms75:5 Abino kobbigi ni owek yeyea atek ateka nononono, dok daŋ owek kobo kop me anywar anywar." 
Psalms75:6 Pien ŋolo kop mom bino ya i tuŋ kide onyo i tuŋ to, dok daŋ mom bino ya i tutuŋ anyarolum, mom daŋ bino ya i tutuŋ anyarodi;" 
Psalms75:7 Obaŋa gire en ame ŋolo kop a jo luŋ en kene, dwoko jo okene piny, tiŋo jo okene atiŋa malo," 
Psalms75:8 Pien ikopo ame koŋo olok opoŋ apoŋa iye tye i ciŋ Rwot, koŋo ame onyobo aber, tye ka yenyo ayenya iye; en bino miyo jo areco luŋ ame tye i loba mato, obino mato tuno ka otyeko oko ducu." 
Psalms75:9 Cite an gira abino lelo alela nakanaka, abino wero wer me pako Obaŋa a Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Twer a jo areco ame yeyea no nonono, en bino giko oko, cite bino dwoko twer a jo a kitegi atira." 
Psalms76:1 Obaŋa ŋeye meicel i Juda, nyiŋe daŋ dwoŋ meicel kuno." 
Psalms76:2 Kema me bedo mere tye oguro Calem; kan ame en bedo iye tye i Cion. 
Psalms76:3 En otuturo atero mogo ame lebgi meny amenya kuno, otuturo anaka kwode, pala me romo, karacel kede jami ocele luŋ me romo." 
Psalms76:4 Kwogoni dwoŋ meicel, Ama Obaŋa dok twer ducu tye i ciŋi, kwogoni kede twerri kato me a kiddi luŋ ame perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms76:5 Omao jami lweny oko i ciŋ olweny ame kwiri, gin doŋ tye ka nino anina; mom tye ŋattoro i akinagi ame tye i jami me lweny i ciŋe." 
Psalms76:6 I kare ame ijukogi, Ama Obaŋa a Yakobo, wegi aguragura kede aguraguragi ote rereta piny wille oko." 
Psalms76:7 Ento yin ibedo iyiliyili meicel. Da kara ame romo cuŋ i nyimi, ka ce akemoni olyeto." 
Psalms76:8 Imio kop ame yin iŋolo oŋeye baŋ jo kun oya i polo, lworo te mako jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo, ote liŋ iti," 
Psalms76:9 i kare ame yin Obaŋa iya malo me ŋolo kop, me laro jo luŋ ame owuno i lobo." 
Psalms76:10 Akemo a jo lokere doko me paki, jo ame obwot i lweny obino kelogi obedo cok kedi." 
Psalms76:11 Kwoŋ wunu kwoŋwu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, ite daŋ cobo wunu mi wunu jo luŋ ame bedo i ŋete kel mot baŋe, pien en obedo Obaŋa ame myero lwor," 
Psalms76:12 En mio rwode a wakere doko amwol dok daŋ iyiliyili meicel baŋ obakki me lobo. 
Psalms77:1 Akok atek meicel baŋ Obaŋa, akok i dwon aloŋo baŋ Obaŋa, me en winy kokona." 
Psalms77:2 I kare ame atye i can, an ayenyo Obaŋa; dyewor luŋ an abedo taŋo ciŋa baŋe kun mom aol, cite mannono luŋ mom mio cunya kwe." 
Psalms77:3 Aparo pi Obaŋa, kun acur meicel; abedo lwodo kop i kome i cunya, ate doko agoro oko," 
Psalms77:4 Yin igeŋa nino oko, cunya-gu bedo myel amyela ame mom aromo kop." 
Psalms77:5 Cunya dok riŋo cen i kare ame okato, ate poyo mwakki mogo ame doŋ okato iŋec." 
Psalms77:6 Abedo tamo tam atut meicel dyewor, cunya lwodo kop kun apenyere kenakena ni:" 
Psalms77:7 “Obaŋa bino kwera nakanaka? kica mom bino make i koma kadi acel? 
Psalms77:8 Marrere ame mom lokere doŋ ogik oko bo? cikere ame en rik ocikere kede kedwa doŋ ogik oko bo? 
Psalms77:9 Onyo Obaŋa wie owil awila me tima kica bo? Onyo akemo mere doŋ oloc oko ame kica mom dok romo make?” 
Psalms77:10 Dok ate kobo ni, “Gin ame doŋ cwero cunya twatwal ene, Twer ame Obaŋa Amalo Meicel tye kede doŋ olokere oko.”" 
Psalms77:11 Abino poyo tic ame Obaŋa obedo tiyo; abino gire poyo ticcogo me awura ame itio mwaka okato. 
Psalms77:12 Abino lwodo kop i cunya kun aparo ticcoro luŋ ame yin itio, ate poyo ticci mogo adoŋdoŋo ame ibedo timo." 
Psalms77:13 Ama Obaŋa, ginnoro luŋ ame yin itimo cil, obaŋa mene adok dwoŋ calo Obaŋawa?" 
Psalms77:14 Yin ibedo Obaŋa ame tio ticcogo me owura, ityeko nyuto twerri oko kannaler oko i akina rok ducu." 
Psalms77:15 Yin rik ilakoro joni i tekoni, ame gin obedo ikwae a Yakobo kede me a Yucepu." 
Psalms77:16 Kare ame pii me nam oneni, Ama Obaŋa, kare ame pii me nam oneni, lworo omakogi, pii atut ame tye i nam te cako tagere oko." 
Psalms77:17 Pol ocoro pii piny; piny te mor i pol atek meicel, lutkot te meny menyo kabedo ducu." 
Psalms77:18 Lutkotti te mor i yamo ajuru, omor te menyo lobo luŋ, lobo te yeŋere, jo ame bedo iye daŋ komgi te myel." 
Psalms77:19 Yo ame yin ilubo onwoŋo beo i dye nam, yin rik ite ŋolo twon dye nam ame pii mere tut meicel; kadi amannono kan ame tyeni onyono onwoŋo mom romo nen." 
Psalms77:20 Rik itelli joni yo acalo ŋat akwayo rommi, kun imio Muca kede Aron gwokogi." 
Psalms78:1 Cik yitwu, iwiny wunu pwonnya, wun jona; cik yitwu iwiny wunu kop ame aya i doga." 
Psalms78:2 An abino pwonyowu i pwony me ryeko, abino tuco koppogo opono me kare acon," 
Psalms78:3 gigi mogo ame wan owinyo dok oŋeo, ame kwariwa rik otittiwa." 
Psalms78:4 Wun daŋ myero kur imuŋŋi wunu itinowu, cite myero ititi wunu lwagi jo me kare luŋ ame obino nywalo, gigi mogo me kwogo ame Rwot otimo, karacel kede twer ame en tye kede, kede gigi mogo me awura ame en otio." 
Psalms78:5 En rik omio cik baŋ jo Icrael, dok omio daŋ koppogo me caden baŋ ikwae a Yakobo, ame rik en ociko kede kwariwa, ni myero pwony kede otinogi;" 
Psalms78:6 me wek lwagi jo ame alubowa daŋ ŋe, itino ame mom ru onywalo, gin daŋ ka odoŋo ote tito baŋ itinogi." 
Psalms78:7 Mannono bino miyo gin daŋ obedo kede gen i kom Obaŋa, kun wigi mom wil oko i kom gin ame Obaŋa otimo ento olubo cik Obaŋa." 
Psalms78:8 Gin myero mom obed calo kwarigi, lwagi jo ame maro jem ame ŋutgi nwaŋ, ame rik gin obedo jo ame maro jem meicel, kun daŋ mom owinyo cik Obaŋa." 
Psalms78:9 Itino Epraim omako atero me lwenygi, ote loko ŋegi oko i kare me lweny." 
Psalms78:10 Gin rik mom ogwoko cikkeregi kede Obaŋa, ento okwero lubo cik a Rwot oko." 
Psalms78:11 Wigi owil oko i kom tic ame en otio, akadi taŋo mogo ame en obedo nyuttigi." 
Psalms78:12 Obaŋa rik otio ticcogo me awura i nyim kwarrigi, i lobo me Miciri, i bar me Joan." 
Psalms78:13 En rik omio pii opokere i dul aryo gin te beo i dyere, en omio pii ocuŋ tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi calo pem." 
Psalms78:14 Dyeceŋ en obedo telo nyimgi kede pol, eka dyewor te bedo mennyigi yo kede mac." 
Psalms78:15 En obaro kidi i dye tim, pii te wukere iye pirgi ni wol wol," 
Psalms78:16 Omio pii omolo i lela, pii iye te mol calo pii i kulo." 
Psalms78:17 Ento gin omedde ameda i timo bal i nyime, ojem-gu baŋ ŋat Amalo Meicel i tim," 
Psalms78:18 Obedo temo Obaŋa i cunygi, kun openyo cam ame cunygi mito." 
Psalms78:19 Obedo kobo kop arac i kom Obaŋa kun okobo ni: Obaŋa twero miyowa cam i tim kan? 
Psalms78:20 Kun kono enobaro kidi pii te molo iye, En twero miyowa cam-kan, kun mio daŋ riŋo baŋ jo mere?" 
Psalms78:21 I kare ame Obaŋa owinyo kopginono, akemo omake, omio te cwinyo mac me waŋo Yakobo, akemo mere te lyeto meicel i kom Icrael;" 
Psalms78:22 pien gin doŋ onwoŋo mom geno Obaŋa, dok mom ogeno ni Obaŋa tye kede teko me larogi." 
Psalms78:23 Kadi bed amannono en rik okobo kop baŋ pol ame tye i polo, doggola luŋ me polo te yabere oko;" 
Psalms78:24 Manna te corre piny iya iye me acamagi, Obaŋa omiogi cam ame oya i polo." 
Psalms78:25 Mannono omio dano te camo cam ame omalaika camo, Obaŋa te miyogi cam adwoŋ ame okato mitigi oko." 
Psalms78:26 En te cwayo yamo i polo ame oya i tuŋ kide, pi teko en dok te cwayo yamo ame oya i tutuŋ anyarolum," 
Psalms78:27 Omio riŋo oduny i wigi malo calo apua, kede winnyi apol meicel calo kwoyo me dog nam," 
Psalms78:28 Omiogi oony piny i dye kemagi, i kabedo luŋ ame gin obedo iyenono," 
Psalms78:29 Gin ocamo ote yeŋ, pien en omiogi gin ame cunygi onwoŋo mito." 
Psalms78:30 Cite i kare ame gin pwod pe ru ocobo mitigi, ame mom ru oyeŋ, ame riŋo ame ocamo-nono daŋ pwod tye i doggi," 
Psalms78:31 akemo te mako Obaŋa meicel i komgi, te neko jo mogo ame onwoŋo tek meicel i akinagi, ojwero twoni jo mogo ame en oyero ayera i akina jo Icrael." 
Psalms78:32 Kadi amannono, gin pwod omedde ameda i timo bal, mom oye kadi acel gigi mogo me awura ame en obedo timo." 
Psalms78:33 Mannono en omio karegi-naca okato oyotoyot calo yamo, kwogi te tum atuma ame mio jo lworo meicel." 
Psalms78:34 Kare ame en oneko jo mogo akinagi, jo odoŋ te cako yenye, oŋut ote yenyo Obaŋa cunygi ducu," 
Psalms78:35 Gin te cako poyo ni Obaŋa en obedo kan atek me alaragi, Obaŋa Amalo Meicel en obedo ŋat alakorogi." 
Psalms78:36 Cite kop ame gin kobo oduro ka goba keken, obedo kobo kop me goba i nyime." 
Psalms78:37 Cite gin onwoŋo mom mare i cunygi ducu, mom daŋ ogwoko cik Obaŋa." 
Psalms78:38 Cite pien Obaŋa akica, kica te make i kom lwakkere, en te weko balgi oko, mom te nekogi, en obedo juko akemo mere tyen apol meicel, mom oye ni akemo mere tugere ducu." 
Psalms78:39 Obaŋa te poyo ni gin obedo dano keken, ocalo yamo ame woto mom dok lokere dwogo cen," 
Psalms78:40 Gin obedo jem i kome tyen apol meicel, omio akemo obedo make i tim kuno," 
Psalms78:41 Obedo teme-gu teretere, kun oroko Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Psalms78:42 Wigi onwoŋo owil oko i kom teko mere, kede i kom kare ame gin olakorogi i kom ciŋ okworgi;" 
Psalms78:43 kare ame en otio gigi mogo me awura i Miciri, kede taŋo mogo ame en obedo timo i bar me Cion," 
Psalms78:44 En oloko pii odoko remo, omio jo i kuno mom romo mato pii i kulogi." 
Psalms78:45 Ocwao i akinagi lwaŋi apipim, ame te bedo kayogi, dok te cwayo daŋ ogwalogwali apipim me yelogi." 
Psalms78:46 Omio omor ocamo cam i potogi oko, bonyo daŋ te mwodo cam ame gin obedo lole kede oko." 
Psalms78:47 Omio pee oonyo olokgi oko piny, kede ŋico obalo olamgi oko," 
Psalms78:48 Omio daŋ pee oneko dokgi oko, lutkot daŋ ocecelo rommigi oko." 
Psalms78:49 Owuko akemo mere luŋ i komgi, omiogi can apek meicel, te cwayo lwak omalaika i akinagi me nekogi," 
Psalms78:50 Mom ojuko akemo mere kadi acel, mom oye laro kwogi i to, omio too edeke onekogi meicel." 
Psalms78:51 Oneko itino kao luŋ me Miciri, ame gin onywalo i tekogi me agege, i kema me Kam" 
Psalms78:52 En te telo jo mere calo rommi, otelo nyimgi i tim calo leyi me paco," 
Psalms78:53 Otelogi i kuc, kun mom tye ginnoro ame gin olworo, ento pii me nam te mwonyo okworgi oko." 
Psalms78:54 En te terogi naka i lobo mere acil, i wi kidi ame en olo pi teko mere," 
Psalms78:55 Oryemo rok ocele luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i nyimgi, en opokkigi lobo ame omiogi me alea me bedo meggi, te miyo atekere me Icrael bedo kema okworgi." 
Psalms78:56 Cite gin obedo temo Ŋat Amalo Meicel, kun daŋ ojem i kome, kun daŋ mom oye lubo koppere me caden," 
Psalms78:57 ento olokere oko teŋe ote bedo timo gin ame kwarigi obedo timo, obedo minne amina calo akud atero ame ogom." 
Psalms78:58 Pien obedo roke omio akemo omake, pi woro cal jogi i kabedo mogo ame otiŋere malo, obedo miyo nyeko make pi cal apaagi." 
Psalms78:59 I kare ame Obaŋa owinyo akemo omake meicel, cunye te wuko jo Icrael odoco." 
Psalms78:60 Obaŋa te weko kabedo mere oko ame tye i Cilo, kema ame rik en bedo iye i akina lwak," 
Psalms78:61 en te miyo tero candukkere me twer iyi opii, kede kema me kwogo mere i ciŋ okwor." 
Psalms78:62 Akemo omake meicel i kom jo mere ame en oyero, te jalogi oko me aneka i pala lweny," 
Psalms78:63 Omio mac owaŋo awobegi otyeko oko ducu, anyiragi mom doŋe winyo wer me nyom." 
Psalms78:64 Olamdog-gu ote neko oko i pala lweny, kun mongi mom doŋ kokogi." 
Psalms78:65 Rwot te co calo ŋat ame ocoo i nino, calo loo atek ame omer i koŋo olok ame tye ka redo." 
Psalms78:66 En te ryemo okworrere dwoko oko cen, te miyo twon lewiccoro a mom romo gik makogi," 
Psalms78:67 En te kwero kema a Yucepu oko, mom te yero atekere a jo Benjamin," 
Psalms78:68 En te yero atekere a jo Juda, kede kidi me Cion ame onwoŋo en maro," 
Psalms78:69 Te gero kabedo mere acil ocuŋ iguŋ calo polo, ocibo ocuŋ atek ikiŋ calo lobo." 
Psalms78:70 En te yero Daudi me bedo amiro mere, okwanyo Daudi i yo kwayo rommi." 
Psalms78:71 Olwoŋe i akina rommi ame pwod dot, me bino kwayo jo mere ame gin jo a Yakobo, okete me bedo abaka a jo me Icrael." 
Psalms78:72 Daudi te bedo kwayogi i cuny aler, dok otelogi daŋ i twon diro meicel." 
Psalms79:1 Ama Obaŋa, orok obino omao lobo a lwakki oko, obalo odi acil daŋ oko; omio Jerucalem doŋ odoŋ calo wi obur." 
Psalms79:2 Omio kom omironi ame oto baŋ winyo ame twarre malo me acamagi, omio daŋ kom joni acil baŋ leyi ame bedo i lobo me acamagi." 
Psalms79:3 Oonyo remogi piny calo pii i Jerucalem, ŋattoro ame odoŋ me yikogi mom tye." 
Psalms79:4 Wan doŋ odoko gi-anyera orok ame bedo i ŋetwa, jo ame oguraowa tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi oŋalowa dok daŋ ojwiowa ajwia." 
Psalms79:5 Ama Rwot, kara akemo bino bedo maki amannono naka awene ba? nyekoni bino miyo akemoni bino maki amannono nakanaka." 
Psalms79:6 Wuk akemoni-nono i kom jo ame mom ŋei, kede i kom oloccogo ame mom wori." 
Psalms79:7 Pien gin otyeko itino a Yakobo oko, omio lobowa odoko wi obur." 
Psalms79:8 Kur ipoyo bal a kwariwa ite culo kworrere i komwa, mi kica ru maki oko i komwa, pien idiowa doŋ meicel." 
Psalms79:9 Ama Obaŋa, konywa, yin ame ibedo ŋat ame larowa, pi kwogo me nyiŋi, larwa ba, gonywa i kom balwa piri." 
Psalms79:10 Piŋo kara imio orok kobo ni, “Obaŋani-nono kara tye kwene.” Cul kwor i kom orok kun wan oneno kede waŋwa, pi remo omironi ame gin oonyo." 
Psalms79:11 Ye gamo koko a jo ame tye i buc, gwok jo ame doŋ oŋolo kop me to i wigi, pi twer adwoŋ ame doŋ itye kede," 
Psalms79:12 Ama Obaŋa, cul kworwa tyen abiro twal, i kom jo ame bedo i ŋetwa, yetgi kede ayettoro luŋ ame yam gin ocai kede, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms79:13 Mannono bino miyo wan ame obedo joni kede rommini ame ikwao, obino pwoyi waŋ i waŋ, kun owero wer me psa ko nyiŋi." 
Psalms80:1 Cik yiti iwinywa, Ama yin akwat a jo Icrael, yin ame rik ibedo telo Yucepu acalo rommini. Yin ame ibedo i wi kom locci i kom okerubi ame ryeny menyo piny," 
Psalms80:2 i nyim atekere a jo Epraim, Benjamin, kede Manace. Nyut tekoni, me ilarwa." 
Psalms80:3 Dwogowa cen baŋi, Ama Obaŋa, mi waŋi oryeny omenywa me olarre," 
Psalms80:4 Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony, akemo bino bedo maki naka awene ba, Ama Obaŋa, i kom lwakki ame kwai." 
Psalms80:5 Yin rik imiowa ocamo pig waŋwa calo cam me acama, imiowa pig waŋwa poŋ ikopo moro ni omati." 
Psalms80:6 Imio jo ame bedo i ŋetwa obedo cayowa arac meicel, kun okworwa bedo nyerowa anyera kengi kengi." 
Psalms80:7 Ama Obaŋa me mony, dwokwa baŋi, mi waŋi oryeny omenywa, me olarre," 
Psalms80:8 Yin rik ikelo olok iya i Miciri, iryemo rok ocele oko eka ite pito." 
Psalms80:9 Rik iyiko lobo itere obedo aber me doŋi, lwite te donyo apol meicel piny." 
Psalms80:10 Tipo mere te wumo wi kiddi luŋ, jaŋe te buŋere wumo twoni yen cedar adoŋodoŋo meicel." 
Psalms80:11 Jaŋe te bunere tuno naka i nam, pote te tuno naka i kulo adwoŋ." 
Psalms80:12 Piŋo kara dok imuko apama mere oko, ame mio jo luŋ ame beo i ŋete pwono nyige?" 
Psalms80:13 Kul ame bedo i buŋa obalo atek meicel, dok leyi luŋ me tim daŋ camo." 
Psalms80:14 Koŋ dok ilokere ba, Ama Obaŋa me mony, bol waŋi piny i polo kuno, me koŋ inen," 
Psalms80:15 Tim ber ipar pi olokki, pien mannono obedo yatti ame yin en ipito." 
Psalms80:16 Gin owaŋo i mac ote toŋo daŋ oko piny, nengi akemo me oto oko," 
Psalms80:17 Ket ciŋi i kom joni ame iyero, igwokgi, obedo wot a dano ame yin en imioo oko atek piri." 
Psalms80:18 Mannono bino miyo mom dok olokere odok cen oweki, gwokwa obed kwo, wan obino woro nyiŋi," 
Psalms80:19 Ama Obaŋa me mony, dwokwa baŋi, mi waŋi oryeny omenywa, me olarre." 
Psalms81:1 Wer wunu baŋ Obaŋawa, ame obedo tekowa, i dwon aloŋo, red wunu i yomcuny baŋ Obaŋa a Yakobo." 
Psalms81:2 Wer wunu wer kun daŋ ibapo wunu atimo, goo wunu daŋ opuk amit meicel karacel kede naŋa opuk." 
Psalms81:3 Kut wunu apel i kare ame dwe pwod opor apora, kut wunu daŋ ka dwe doŋ omwonyo ogwal, kede i kare me kwero icubannogo adoŋo." 
Psalms81:4 Pien mannono en obedo cik a jo Icrael, gin ame Obaŋa a Yakobo rik ociko." 
Psalms81:5 En rik oketo odoko cik iyi atekere a Yucepu, i kare ame en owoto me wot lweny i kom jo Miciri. Awinyo dwonnoro ame yam mom aŋeo, kun kobo ni," 
Psalms81:6 “An rik atiŋo yec apek oko i wi gwoki, akwanyo dita me tic oko i ciŋi." 
Psalms81:7 Ikok baŋa i kare ame itye i can, an ate lari, agamo koppi i mor a piny kun an akanne oko i kabedo moro me imuŋ, atemi daŋ i dog pii me Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Winy wunu ba, wun jona, ka atye kajukowu, wun jo Icrael, kono onwoŋo itwero winyo wunu koppa." 
Psalms81:9 Obaŋa moro a mom ŋeye mom bino nwoŋere i akinawu, mom ibino ryebere wunu piny me woro obaŋa orok," 
Psalms81:10 An abedo Rwot Obaŋawu, ame rik akwanyowu i lobo me Miciri. Ŋam wunu dogwu alac, me an apitwu." 
Psalms81:11 “Cite jona rik mom te winyo koppa, jo Icrael onwoŋo mom doŋ paro kadi acel." 
Psalms81:12 Amio cunygi odoko anwaŋ te doko jo ame opala, jo ame timo gin ame cunygi omito." 
Psalms81:13 Kono jona onwoŋo rik winyo koppa, kono jo Icrael onwoŋo timo gin ame amito." 
Psalms81:14 Onwoŋo kono aloo okworgi oyotoyot, kono aryeo ciŋa awiro i kom okworgi ducu." 
Psalms81:15 Jo ame daga kono omwolle kengi i nyima, dok can ame opoto i komgi kono obedo atwal." 
Psalms81:16 Onwoŋo kono apitowu kede ŋano aber meicel, dok kono amiowu icamo wunu moo kic iyeŋ wunu.”" 
Psalms82:1 Obaŋa doŋ obedo oko i kommere icokere ame tye i polo, en tye ka ŋolo kop i akina obaŋe obaŋe ocele ame ogure dyere, kun kobo ni," 
Psalms82:2 “Mom ibino ŋolowunu kop kakare pi kare a rom mere, ŋolo kop ame odworo kede otim tim areco?" 
Psalms82:3 Ŋol wunu kop kakare pi jo agoro kede itino kic, mi wunu jo atye i can kede jo a piny olo bed itwero ame oromo kwoogi." 
Psalms82:4 Lar wunu jo agoro kede jo ame piny oloo, largi wunu oko i ciŋ jo areco.”" 
Psalms82:5 Mom otye kede ŋeccoro kadi niaŋŋoro, gin owoto gigi ata i piny acol; acakki me te lobo ducu tye ka yeŋere," 
Psalms82:6 An akobo ni, “Wun obaŋe, wun luŋ ibedo wunu itino a Ŋat Amalo Meicel;" 
Psalms82:7 kadi bed amannono, wun daŋ ibino to wunu acalo dano, ibino rette wunu piny acalo rwottoro ata.”" 
Psalms82:8 Ya malo, Ama Obaŋa, me iŋolli lobo kop; pien rok luŋ obedo megi." 
Psalms83:1 Ama Obaŋa, kur iliŋ iti ba, kur ibed mot ikuc kun iliŋ iti, Ama Obaŋa," 
Psalms83:2 Koŋ inen okworri tye kajem ajema; jo ame dagi, wigi doŋ odoko adoŋo oko." 
Psalms83:3 Otye ka yiko yikkkogo me imuŋ i kom rokki, otimo-gu tim me idwali i kom joni ame yin igwoko." 
Psalms83:4 Gin okobo kop i akinagi kengi kengi ni, “Bye wunu, me otyek wunu rok man oko; me nyiŋ jo Icrael kur dok po pire atwal.”" 
Psalms83:5 Gin luŋ gigi oporo kop man i cunygi acel, dok daŋ ocikere me lweny i komi." 
Psalms83:6 Gin jo Edom kede jo Icmael, jo Moab kede jo Agri." 
Psalms83:7 Jo Gebal, jo Ammon, kede jo Amalek, jo Piriciti kede jo ame bedo i Turo." 
Psalms83:8 Jo Acuria daŋ onwoŋo oribere kedgi, i kom ikwae a Lot gin en obedo dul mony atek meicel." 
Psalms83:9 Timgi kite ame rik itimo kede jo Midian, kite ame itimo kede Cicera, kede Jabin i ŋet kulo me Kicon," 
Psalms83:10 Ame rik inekogi oko i En-dor, ame rik odoko calo woyo dyaŋ ame oonyo i poto," 
Psalms83:11 Mi odoŋegi ame oworo bed calo Oreb kede Jeb, rwodegi te bedo acalo Jeba kede Jalmuna," 
Psalms83:12 ame rik gin okobo ni, “Ogam wunu bar kwat Obaŋa oko me bed megwa.”" 
Psalms83:13 Ama Obaŋana, migi obed calo apua ame yamo ajuru kolo, calo cuŋ kal ame yamo kolo te tero oko." 
Psalms83:14 Kite ame mac waŋo kede buŋ, kite ame mac waŋo kede wi kiddi ka obolo iye," 
Psalms83:15 yin daŋ myero ibin iryemgi oko amannono acalo twon yamo moro ame akodo atek, kun imio yamo ajuru ame akodo kodo ager ame myelo komgi." 
Psalms83:16 Mi lewic makgi, Ama Rwot, tuno ka gin ocako lwoŋo nyiŋi." 
Psalms83:17 Mi lewic makgi, dok imi cunygi bed poto apota nakanaka, migi oto, to me lewic." 
Psalms83:18 Migi oŋe ni yin keni en ame i Rwot, yin en ibedo Ŋat Amalo ame loo wii lobo ducu." 
Psalms84:1 Odi ber nadi, Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony." 
Psalms84:2 Mita me bedo kuno, oola doŋ oko, mita me bedo i dyekal a Rwot. Cunya kede koma luŋ wero wer me pako Obaŋa i yomcuny, wero wer baŋ Obaŋa ame kwo." 
Psalms84:3 Kadi aculegwec daŋ nwoŋo paco me bedo mere, alibi daŋ tye i ode ame en buto iye, tye kede kan ame myero ebol iye toŋe, Ceggi acega kom i keno lammi, Ama Rwot me mony, abakana dok Obaŋana." 
Psalms84:4 Jo ame bedo i odi tye kede winyo, kun obedo ka wero wer me paki kare ducu," 
Psalms84:5 Jo ame tekogi ocuŋ i kom tekoni, tye kede winyo, ame cunygi mito wot anyim naka i Cion." 
Psalms84:6 I kare ame gin obeo i luŋ me Baca ame otwo atwoa-ni, gin omio doko kan ame pii nwoŋere iye; kot ame geo cwe acwea mio pii poŋ iye meicel kabedo ducu." 
Psalms84:7 Tekogi medde ameda kare luŋ ame gin tye awot, Obaŋa ame loo obaŋe ocele ducu bino nen i Cion." 
Psalms84:8 Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony, winy kwaccca, cik yiti iwinya, Ama Obaŋa a Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Yin en ibedo kwotwa, Ama Obaŋa, nen wan abakani ame yin ityeko yero." 
Psalms84:10 Bedo i dyekalli kadi nino acel keken ber, kato bedo nino tutumia i kabedo ocele. Tika abedo akur doggola i ot Obaŋana, akaka bedo i kema a jo ame timo tim areco." 
Psalms84:11 Pien Rwot Obaŋa obedo cen kede kwot, en onyo kica mere i komwa, dok miowa obedo kede kwogo. En mom twero twono jo ame timo ginnoro luŋ i cuny aler, ginnoro luŋ aber." 
Psalms84:12 Ama Rwot me mony, jo ame geni tye kede winyo." 
Psalms85:1 Ama Rwot, kica yam omaki i kom loboni; imio jo a Yakobo obedo dok i kuc." 
Psalms85:2 Yin yam doŋ igonyo bal a lwakki oko, rik doŋ ijwa balgi luŋ aluŋa." 
Psalms85:3 Rik akemoni okwe doŋ oko komgi, rik iloko cunyi, akemoni alyet wok ca te doŋ kwe oko," 
Psalms85:4 Dok idwogowa baŋi, Ama Obaŋa ame larowa, cunyi myero kur doŋ bed waŋ i komwa." 
Psalms85:5 Akemo bino bedo maki i komwa nakanaka bo? Akemoni bino ri atwal naka i kare a jo me kare ducu? 
Psalms85:6 Mom ibino miyo cunywa dok dok i komi, me wan joni obed kede lelo i komi?" 
Psalms85:7 Nyuttiwa marri a mom lokere, Ama Rwot, dok ilarwa daŋe." 
Psalms85:8 Wek koŋ awiny gin ame Rwot Obaŋa bino kobo, pien en bino kobo kop me kuc baŋ jo mere, baŋ jo mere ame gene, ame lokere baŋe i cunygi ducu." 
Psalms85:9 Ateteni, en gire oyikere me laro jo ame wore, me kwogo bed i lobowa." 
Psalms85:10 Mar a mom lokere kede gen bino ribere karacel, kite atira kede kuc bino mote kun onoto lemgi." 
Psalms85:11 Gen ame dano tye kede bino tuno malo kun ya i lobo; kite atira bino bolo waŋe piny kun tye i pol. 
Psalms85:12 Nen ba. Rwot bino miyo gin ame ber, dok lobowa bino ceko cam." 
Psalms85:13 Kite atira bino telo nyim Obaŋa, me yubo yo pire." 
Psalms86:1 Winy kwacca, Ama Rwot dok iwiny doga, pien atye i can, dok amito ni ikonya." 
Psalms86:2 Gwok kwona, pien an amari kede cunya ducu, lar amirona ame gena." 
Psalms86:3 Yin ibedo Obaŋana, kica myero maki i koma, Ama Rwot, pien an akok gira baŋi keken ceŋ iyul." 
Psalms86:4 Mi cunya bed ayom, Ama Rwot, pien an gira acwao kwacca baŋi, kun akwao i cunya ducu." 
Psalms86:5 Pien yin giri iber, dok igonyo bal, Ama Rwot, pien marri a mom lokere dwoŋ baŋ jo ame kok baŋi." 
Psalms86:6 Cik yiti, Ama Rwot, iwiny kwacca, winy kokona ame abako kede doga baŋi." 
Psalms86:7 I kare ame atye kede peko, an gira akok baŋi, pien yin igamo kwacca." 
Psalms86:8 Mom tye ŋattoro ame rom kedi i akina obaŋe ocele, Ama Obaŋa, dok daŋ mom tye ticcoro ame rom i tic ame yin itio." 
Psalms86:9 Rok luŋ ame yin iketogi bino bino baŋi, ote bino ryebere piny i nyimi, Ama Rwot, ote daŋ pako nyiŋi." 
Psalms86:10 Pien yin idwoŋ dok itimo jami mogo me awura meicel, yin keni en ame ibedo Obaŋa." 
Psalms86:11 Pwonya me aŋe kite ame yin imito ni an abed kede, Ama Rwot, me alub atenini, yik cunya me alwori." 
Psalms86:12 Apwoi kede cunya ducu, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, dok abino keto kwogo i komi nakanaka," 
Psalms86:13 Pien marri a mom lokere dwoŋ meicel i koma, yin ilaro kwona i bur atut me Ceol." 
Psalms86:14 Ama Obaŋa, jo ame onywar oero lweny i koma, lwak jo areco ame timo tim me byemi mito neka, gin mom oparo piri kadi acel i ginnoro luŋ ame gin otimo." 
Psalms86:15 Ento yin i Rwot, ibedo Obaŋa ame akica, ame maro jo ducu, akemo mom maki oyot, dok marri a mom lokere kede genni dwoŋ meicel," 
Psalms86:16 Lokere inena, dok kica daŋ myero maki i koma, mia tek, dok daŋ ilara, pien an amironi, ame atio kite ame yam totta otio kede baŋi." 
Psalms86:17 Nyuta ginnoro, Ama Obaŋa, ame nyuto berri, me lewic mak jo ame daga, ka gin bino neno ni yin Rwot doŋ ityeko kweyo cunya, dok ikonya." 
Psalms87:1 Boma ame Rwot Obaŋa ogero tye ocuŋ iguŋ malo i wi kidi acil. 
Psalms87:2 Rwot maro dogcel luŋ me boma me Cion, ame kato kabedo ocele luŋ ame jo a Yakobo bedo iye." 
Psalms87:3 Yin boma Obaŋa we, gigi mogo me kwogo meicel jo kobo i komi." 
Psalms87:4 I akina jo ame ŋea, abino tuco nyiŋ Rakab kede Babulon; dok abino kobo kop i kom Piriciti, Turo kede Acuria. Gin okobo ni, “ŋadi onywalo kuno,”" 
Psalms87:5 Aco kop i kom Cion gin kobo ni, “Dano man kede maca onywalo iye”; pien ŋat Amalo Meicel en ame bino miyo Cion cuŋ ikiŋ." 
Psalms87:6 Pien Rwot bino coyo nyiŋ rok luŋ i bukkere, kun coo i yore i yore ni, “Man onywalo kuno, man daŋ onywalo kuno,”" 
Psalms87:7 Ower wer kede jo ame myelo daŋ kobo ni, “Akoŋ me piina luŋ daŋ tye baŋi.”" 
Psalms88:1 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, an akok baŋi nino i nino pi kony; anaka dyewor daŋ akok baŋi." 
Psalms88:2 Ye kwacca tun i nyimi, cik yiti iwiny kokona," 
Psalms88:3 Pien peko doŋ onua oko, omio kwona doŋ ceggi acega i to." 
Psalms88:4 An doŋ okwana i akina jo ame woto piny i bur; an a dano ame tekona moro doŋ mom," 
Psalms88:5 Acalo doŋ ŋat ame oweko i akina jo oto, acalo doŋ jo ame onekogi ote doŋ wekogi buto i lyelgi, atye doŋ i akinajo ame wii doŋ owil oko i komgi, pien doŋ atye kan abor ame mom romo akonya." 
Psalms88:6 Yin doŋ ityeko bola oko ite bur piny, kannacol dok atut meicel," 
Psalms88:7 Akemoni doŋ pek atek meicel i koma, amwonyere doŋ oko i bwo me akemoni." 
Psalms88:8 Imio owotena en ame odoko jo me lweny i koma, adoko doŋ twon ginnoro arac meicel i nyimi. Otwea aboŋo yo moro ame doŋ aromo ya kede malo." 
Psalms88:9 Waŋa doŋ oballe meicel pi kumo, an gira akok baŋi nino ducu, aryeo ciŋa ataŋo baŋi." 
Psalms88:10 Yin itio gigi mogo me awura pi jo oto bo? Tipo a jo oto dok ya malo me paki? 
Psalms88:11 Marri a mom lokere daŋ otito pire i lyel, onyo kiteni atira otito pire i lobo a jo oto?" 
Psalms88:12 Gigi mogo me awura ame yin itio ŋeye daŋ kannacollaca, onyo kony ame yin imio me laro dano bino nen i lobo ame wii jo wil oko iye?" 
Psalms88:13 Ama Rwot, an gira akobo baŋi me konya; nino ducu odiko acwalo kwacca i nyimi." 
Psalms88:14 Piŋo kara ibola oko, Ama Rwot? Piŋo ipona oko ame mom aromo neni?" 
Psalms88:15 Cakere ame atidi rem ocira oko ame doŋ aceggi to, abedo kanyo tim ame itimo i koma ame kella lworo, adoko doŋ agoro odoco." 
Psalms88:16 Akemoni doŋ owuma oko, lweny ame ibedo lweny kede ikoma omio lworo doŋ otyeko tekona oko," 
Psalms88:17 Ogura doŋ dyere calo abwal spii ame amol, ocorre i koma gin luŋ karacel." 
Psalms88:18 Imio doŋ owotena ame amaro kede jo ame ceggi keda owuna meicel, piny acol en ame doŋ tye acalo awotta." 
Psalms89:1 Abino wero wer me pako marri a mom lokere, Ama Rwot, abino rabo pi gen ame yin itye kede baŋ lwagi jo me kare luŋ." 
Psalms89:2 Pien aŋeo ni marri a mom lokere perakino nakanaka, gen ame itye kede daŋ tye ocuŋ ikiŋ calo polo." 
Psalms89:3 Yin ityeko kobo ni, “An doŋ atyeko cikere oko i ŋat ame ayero, akwoŋo daŋ doŋ oko baŋ amirona Daudi, kun akwoŋo ni," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Abino moko ikwai bedo nakanaka, dok abino gero kom me locci perakino nakanaka i kare alwagi jo me kare luŋ.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Polo myero pak gigi mogo ame yin itio me awura, Ama Rwot, dok daŋ myero ower wer me pako gen ame yin itye kede, icokere a jo meri acil." 
Psalms89:6 Kara ŋa ame dok tye i polo malo ame dok otwero poro kede Rwot? Ŋa i akina jo luŋ ame rom kedi, Ama Rwot?" 
Psalms89:7 Mom yin ibedo Obaŋa ame olworo i cokere a jo acil, yin idwoŋ meicel dok yin iyiliyili meicel ame ikato jo luŋ ame oguri tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi." 
Psalms89:8 Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony, ŋa ame twerrere rom i megi? Yin igenne i yore luŋ, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms89:9 Yin ilo naka bi-amwonyi me nam ame tagere, ka bi-amwonyi me nam otugere, yin imio liŋ oko," 
Psalms89:10 Yin rik inyono Rakab oko piny calo ŋat ame onyono kom dano ame oto, ikeketo okworri oko ducu pi tekoni." 
Psalms89:11 Polo kede lobo luŋ obedo megi; wii podo luŋ kede ginnoro luŋ ame tye iye, yin en iketogi." 
Psalms89:12 Yin en iketo lobo luŋ, i tuŋ malo kede i tuŋ piny, Tabor kede Kermon, pako nyiŋi meicel i yomcuny." 
Psalms89:13 Yin itye kede twer adwoŋ meicel; tekoni dwoŋ, ciŋi tuŋ cem otiŋere malo." 
Psalms89:14 Kite atira, kede ŋolo kop atira, tye piny i te kom me locci mar kede gen nen i kom ginnoro luŋ ame itimo," 
Psalms89:15 Jo ame ŋeo wer i dwon aloŋo tye kede winyo, ame woto i nyimi kun olubo kicani, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms89:16 Jo-nono bino bedo i yomcuny piri nino ducu, gin bino bedo dworo kiteni atira." 
Psalms89:17 Pien yin en ibedo kwogogi kede tekogi; pien pi berri mio tekowa medde ameda. 
Psalms89:18 Yin en ibedo kwotwa, Ama Rwot, yin ŋat acil me Icrael, imiowa abaka." 
Psalms89:19 I kare acon rik ibedo lok omironi i waŋ lek, kun ikobo baŋ jo ageni ni, “Aketo tok me kwogo i kom dano ame tye kede tek, amio ŋat ame ayero i akina lwak obedo i wi kom loc.”" 
Psalms89:20 Anwono Daudi ame obedo amirona, atyeko daŋ doŋ kwere okome bedo abaka," 
Psalms89:21 Tekona bino bedo i kome nakanaka, twer ame an abino miye, mio en bino bedo atek." 
Psalms89:22 Okworrere mom bino bwolle, otim tim areco mom bino loye." 
Psalms89:23 Abino nyono okworrere oko piny i nyime, jo ame dage, abino neko oko luŋ." 
Psalms89:24 Genna kede marra a mom lokere bino bedo i kome, abino miyo teko mere medde ameda me loyo okworrere i nyima." 
Psalms89:25 Abino miyo loccere medde naka i dog nam, tuŋ ocele bino tuno i kulo adwoŋ," 
Psalms89:26 En bino lwoŋo nyiŋa kun kobo ni, “Yin i Pappa, yin Obaŋana; yin en i bedo ka larrena atek ame ageno.”" 
Psalms89:27 Abino miyo en bedo acalo atin kao, twon abaka moro adwoŋ ame loo obakki luŋ me wi loboni." 
Psalms89:28 Marra a mom lokere abino gwoko pire nakanaka, dok cikerena ame aketo bino cuŋ ikiŋ pire." 
Psalms89:29 Abino miyo akware en ame bedo i wi kom me loc, dok abino moko kom me loccere bedo atwal calo polo." 
Psalms89:30 “Ka ce ikwae bino kwero lubo cikka oko, ote bedo kun mom olubo gin ame an aciko;" 
Psalms89:31 ka ce gin bino turo cikka, kun mom olubo cik ame amiogi," 
Psalms89:32 bino miyo apwodogi kede abiro pi balgi; can adwoŋ meicel bino poto i komgi. 
Psalms89:33 Cite mom abino kwanyo marra a mom lokere i kome, mom abino weko gwoko gen ame atye kede i kome." 
Psalms89:34 Mom abino turo cikerena kadi acel, mom daŋ abino loko kopporo ame yam doŋ atyeko kobo." 
Psalms89:35 Doŋ atyeko kwoŋ i nyiŋa acil icel keken, mom abino kobo kop me goba kadi acel baŋ Daudi." 
Psalms89:36 Ikwae bino bedo tye kare ducu, kom loccere bino perakino nakanaka calo ceŋ ame ryeny nyima." 
Psalms89:37 Bino moko atek ikiŋ calo dwe nakanaka, bino bedo atek calo polo ame opette malo.”" 
Psalms89:38 Cite aman yin ityeko kwero dok daŋ cunyi otyeko cayo, akemo omaki meicel i kom abaka ame iyero." 
Psalms89:39 Ituro cikereni ame rik icikere kede amironi, ibolo tokkere me loc oko i wie piny iyi apua." 
Psalms89:40 Apama luŋ ame onwoŋo tye me geŋŋe doŋ ityeko muko oko, cellere ame ogero atek iloko odoko wi obur." 
Psalms89:41 Jo ame beo i ŋete yako jami luŋ ame tye iye, odoko doŋ gin ame owote mere atye i ŋete ŋalo i jo aŋala." 
Psalms89:42 Imio okworrere en ame doŋ tye ka loye, imio cuny okworrere doŋ yom atek meicel." 
Psalms89:43 Nen ba, imio pala me romo mere odoko doŋ okuku oko, imio en dok mom romo cuŋ i nyim okworrere me lweny." 
Psalms89:44 Ikwanyo abiro me loc oko i ciŋe, kom me loccere daŋ icoro ireto oko piny." 
Psalms89:45 Imio kare me kwo mere odoko doŋ acecek meicel, imio lewic-gu doŋ ociro oko," 
Psalms89:46 Ibino pono pi kare arom mene, Ama Rwot? Ibino bedo pono amannono nakanaka bo? Kara akemoni bino bedo lyel calo mac naka awene ba?" 
Psalms89:47 Ama Rwot, po pi kare me kwo a dano, po ni yin ityeko keto dano pi to." 
Psalms89:48 Ŋa kara ame twero perakino kun mom obilo to? Ŋa ame twero laro kwo a dano i bur to? 
Psalms89:49 Kara marri a mom lokere me kare aconni doŋ tye kwene ba, gen ame yin itye kede ame rik ikwoŋo pire baŋ Daudi ni?" 
Psalms89:50 Ama Rwot, po kite ame jo tye ka cayo kede amironi; nen kite ame ayet arok luŋ doŋ ocira kede," 
Psalms89:51 Ama Rwot, nen kite ame okwor tye ka ŋalla kede, kede kite ame otye ka ŋalo abaka ame yin ityeko yero, kannono luŋ ame en woto iye." 
Psalms89:52 Rwot gire myero pwo nakanaka! Amen dok Amen! 
Psalms90:1 Yin gire i ka-larrewa, Ama Rwot, cakere con i con." 
Psalms90:2 Ame mom ru oketo kiddi, onwoŋo yin giri doŋ Obaŋa, kun lobo kede wi podo luŋ pwod mom, onwoŋo yin giri doŋ itye." 
Psalms90:3 Iloko dano doko apua, kun ikobo ni, “Dok giri iyi apua wun itino a dano.”" 
Psalms90:4 Mwaka tutumia rom aroma i nino aworo baŋi, onyo romo aroma i caa acel keken me dyewor." 
Psalms90:5 Ijwero dano oko, kun imiogi orwenyo calo lek, kun calo lum ame lot odiko." 
Psalms90:6 Odiko lot te doŋo, otyeno ner, te two oko," 
Psalms90:7 Akemoni ojwerowa otyekowa oko, wan cunyi odiowa meicel." 
Psalms90:8 Balwa luŋ tye i nyimi, anaka balwa luŋ ame ŋattoro mom ŋeo, gin luŋ tye kannaler i nyimi." 
Psalms90:9 Kare me kwowa iŋolo ogik acecek pi akemoni, kwowa rwenyo calo lwio." 
Psalms90:10 Kare me kwowa gik ka i mwakki pyerabiro nono, aco ka tekowa pwod tye te tuno pyeraboro nono, akadi bed amannono, mwakkinono luŋ bedo me can keken, dok daŋ mom ru tum, eka wan ote rwenyo oko." 
Psalms90:11 Ŋa kara ame niaŋ teko me akemoni? Ŋa kara ame niaŋ waŋ cunyi ame mio twero bedo kede lworo kakare? 
Psalms90:12 Pwonywa kwano kare me kwowa, me obed i cuny ame ryek." 
Psalms90:13 Lok cunyi, Ama Rwot! Tim omironi kica! Myero onen can pi kare arom mene ba?" 
Psalms90:14 Kwe cunywa oyot ba i mar meri a mom lokere, me ower i yomcuny pi kare me kwowa luŋ." 
Psalms90:15 Miwa obed i yomcuny ame rom aroma i can ame oneno, a rom aroma i mwakki ame obedo kede peko." 
Psalms90:16 Miwa wan omironi onen teko me ticci, me ikwaewa nen kwogoni." 
Psalms90:17 Rwot Obaŋa myero mi berrere obed i komwa; omok ticwa luŋ ame wan otio, omok ticcoro luŋ ame wan otio." 
Psalms91:1 Ŋat ame gwokere baŋ Ŋat Amalo Meicel, bedo i te tipo a Won Twer Ducu." 
Psalms91:2 Abino kobbi Rwot ni, “Yin i kalarrena kede cella, yin Obaŋana ame ageno.”" 
Psalms91:3 Pien en bino lari iyi owic ame ociko, kede i two areco meicel." 
Psalms91:4 En bino wumo komi oko kede bwome, eka ite larre i te yer me bwome, en obedo kwotti kede gi-geŋo kori, pien en genne." 
Psalms91:5 Mom ibino lworo ginnoro dyewor, akadi atero ame obao dyeceŋ," 
Psalms91:6 akadi too edeke ame mako jo dyewor, onyo can ame tyeko jo dyeceŋ." 
Psalms91:7 Jo tutumia twero rette i ŋeti, kede jo tutumia apar i ciŋi tuŋcem, cite mom bino timo ginnoro i komi." 
Psalms91:8 Yin giri ibino neno anena, kun ineno kite ame oculo kede kwor i kom jo areco." 
Psalms91:9 Pien yin imio Rwot obedo kalarreni, ŋat Amalo Meicel en obedo kabedoni." 
Psalms91:10 Ginnoro arac mom bino timere i komi, kit cannoro ducu mom daŋ bino noko ŋet kemani." 
Psalms91:11 Pien en bino ciko omalaika mere, me gwoki i kabedo luŋ ame iwoto iye." 
Psalms91:12 Gin bino gwoki, me gweŋ kur twom tyeni." 
Psalms91:13 Ibino nyono eŋatu onyo ororo kede tyeni, itino eŋatu onyo twol codocodo." 
Psalms91:14 Pien en doŋ omara odoco, abino lare; abino gwoke pien en doŋ oŋea." 
Psalms91:15 Ka en olwoŋa abino gamo doge, abino bedo kede i kare me can, abino lare dok daŋ abino keto kwogo i kome." 
Psalms91:16 Abino medo mwakki me kwo mere bedo apol me kweyo cunye, ate nyutte larrena." 
Psalms92:1 Pwoyo Rwot ber, wero wer me pako nyiŋi daŋ ber, Ama yin Amalo Meicel." 
Psalms92:2 Rabo pi marri a mom lokere odiko ducu, kede kobo kite ame igenne kede otyeno ducu, daŋ ber," 
Psalms92:3 kun orabo i naŋa kede gita, kun otye ka lubo dwon naŋa opuk." 
Psalms92:4 Pien ticci mia yomcuny, Ama Rwot, tic ame yin itio mia awero wer me lelo," 
Psalms92:5 Tic ame yin itio malo meicel, Ama Rwot, tammi daŋ tut meicel." 
Psalms92:6 Ŋat a tammere goro mom twero ŋeyo, lo amiŋ mom twero niaŋ iye." 
Psalms92:7 Mom twero ŋeyo ni kadi bed jo areco lot calo lum, onyo jo a timo tim areco bedo jo atek, pwod gire obino tyekogi odoco." 
Psalms92:8 Ento yin giri ibedo malo nakanaka, Ama Rwot," 
Psalms92:9 pien okworri gire bino rwenyo oko, otim tim areco luŋ obino keto atata," 
Psalms92:10 Yin imia atiŋo wia malo, kite ame jobi tiŋo kede wie malo, iweo-gu moo anyen i wia." 
Psalms92:11 An doŋ aneno gira i waŋa kite ame ireto kede okworra, dok daŋ awinyo kede yita koko a jo ame omito lweny keda." 
Psalms92:12 Jo a kitegi atira doŋo calo otit, odoŋo aboco calo yen cedar me Lebanon." 
Psalms92:13 Gin obedo i ot a Rwot calo yen opito, ame doŋo i dyekal Obaŋawa," 
Psalms92:14 ame nyako nyiggi naka i kare me tiogi, kare luŋ nwoŋo pige dwoŋ kun mom ner." 
Psalms92:15 Mannono me nyuto ni Rwot gire ŋolo kop atira, en obedo kidi me gwokerena, kan ame timmoro arac mom iye." 
Psalms93:1 Rwot gire tye aloc; en orukere kede kwogo; Rwot orukere, orukere kede tek. Lobo gire doŋ oketo ocuŋ ateko odoco, mom dok romo yeŋere kadi acel." 
Psalms93:2 Kom locci yam doŋ omoko oko con, yin ibedo giri nakanaka." 
Psalms93:3 Pii alele doŋ omor oko, Ama Rwot, pii alele doŋ omor, pii alele bedo mol iwolwol." 
Psalms93:4 Ento Rwot bedo malo i polo, en dwoŋ atek kato mor a pii, oko, dwon meicel kato biamwonyi me nam oko." 
Psalms93:5 Cikki mom dok lokere kadi acel, odi daŋ myero bed acil, Ama Rwot ame bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms94:1 Yin Obaŋa ame culo kwor, Ama Rwot, yin Obaŋa ame culo kwor, ryeny ba imeny piny!" 
Psalms94:2 Ama aŋolkop me lobo, ya ba malo, mi jo a wakere gin ame opore pirgi."
