Psalms94:3 Jo areco bino bedo yon naka awene, gin bino bedo yon naka awene ba?" 
Psalms94:4 Kop a ya i doggi luŋ obedo me acae keken, otim tim areco luŋ bedo wakere awaka," 
Psalms94:5 Gin odio joni, Ama Rwot, owuno jo ame obedo joni ikokome." 
Psalms94:6 Gin oneko mon ame coggi oto, kede jo ame bedo i lobogi, oneko daŋ anaka itino kic." 
Psalms94:7 Gin otamo ni Rwot gire mom nenogi, ni Obaŋa a Yakobo mom gire paro." 
Psalms94:8 Myero iniaŋ wunu ba, wun ame tamwu goro, Ibino doko wunu aryek awene, wun jo amin?" 
Psalms94:9 Ŋat ame oketo yit dano en a mom winyo kop bo? Ŋat ocweo waŋ dano en mom neno piny bo? 
Psalms94:10 Ŋat ame pwonyo orok mom romo goyogi bo? Ŋat ame omio jo ŋeo piny, en ikome ŋeccere mom bo?" 
Psalms94:11 Rwot gire ŋeo ginnoro luŋ ame dano tamo, en ŋeo ni tamgi luŋ calo yito," 
Psalms94:12 Ŋat ame yin igoo, tye kede winyo, Ama Rwot, kede ŋat ame yin ipwonyo kede cikki," 
Psalms94:13 me miye weo i kare me can, tuno waŋ ame doŋ okunyo bur a jo areco." 
Psalms94:14 Rwot gire mom bino weko jo mere ata, mom bino jalo jo ame obedo mere ikokome," 
Psalms94:15 pien oŋolkop bino dok ŋolo kop kakare, jo luŋ a cunygi atir te doŋ cako lubogi." 
Psalms94:16 Ŋa kara ame bino cuŋ tuŋ baŋa me lweny i kom jo areco? Ŋa kara ame bino cuŋ i ŋeta me bino lweny i kom otim tim areco? 
Psalms94:17 Kono Rwot mom okonya, kono ti pona mom onian dok i bur oliŋ iti," 
Psalms94:18 Kare ame atamo ni tyena ocer, yin onwoŋo itye ikonya kede marri, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms94:19 Kare ame par opoŋ i cunya, yin ikweo cunya ate bedo kede lelo," 
Psalms94:20 Itwero notte oloc areco, jo ame loko gin abalo kuc doko cik?" 
Psalms94:21 Ocokere karacel me neko ŋat a kite atira, oŋolli ŋat a mom i bal kop me to," 
Psalms94:22 Ento Rwot en obedo cel atek ame an agwokkere i yie, Obaŋana obedo kidi ame an ariŋo alaro," 
Psalms94:23 En bino wiro balgi-nono dwoko i komgi, en bino jwerogi oko pi timgi areco. Rwot Obaŋa bino jwerogi oko." 
Psalms95:1 Bye wunu, me ower wunu baŋ Rwot: me cunywa bed yom i kom teko me larrewa" 
Psalms95:2 Bin wunu i nyime kede pwoc; kun opake wunu kede wer me yomcuny. 
Psalms95:3 Pien Rwot Obaŋawa, en Obaŋa ame dwoŋ, en obedo Rwot adwoŋ ame kato jogi ducu," 
Psalms95:4 En gire loo wi podo ducu; cakere i piny tuno kede naka i wi kiddi malo," 
Psalms95:5 En loo gire anaka nam-gu ame en otio; pien ciŋe daŋ en ocweo lobo. 
Psalms95:6 Biye owore wunu, oguŋ wunu piny; orum wunu conwa i nyim Rwot oketowa," 
Psalms95:7 Pien en obedo Obaŋawa; wan obedo jo ame en gwoko, kede rommi ame kwo i ciŋe. Cik wunu yitwu iwiny wunu koppere tin," 
Psalms95:8 Kur imi wunu cunywu bed anwaŋ; acalo rik i Meriba kede i tim i Macca, i ni no ca." 
Psalms95:9 Kare ame kwariwu rik otema; gin rik opima ote neno ticca. 
Psalms95:10 Cunya rik te kwerogi pi mwakki pyeraŋwen; kun akobo ni, “Rok man obedo rok ame cunygi rac, dok gin mom otio gin ame amito.”" 
Psalms95:11 En omio rik akwoŋo i kare ame akemo omaka; ni gin mom bino donyo i loba ame abino miyogi iye weo. 
Psalms96:1 Wer wunu wer anyen baŋ Rwot; wer wunu baŋ Rwot, wun loba ducu!" 
Psalms96:2 Wer wunu baŋ Rwot, pak wunu nyiŋe; rab wunu nino ducu ni en olarowu." 
Psalms96:3 Rab wunu pi kwogo mere baŋ rok ducu, kede tic ame en otio me awura baŋ jo luŋ," 
Psalms96:4 Pien Rwot dwoŋ meicel, myero pake meicel; myero lwore akato obaŋe ocele luŋ." 
Psalms96:5 Pien obaŋe a rok ocele obedo cal apaa keken, ento Rwot oketo polo." 
Psalms96:6 Kwogo kede twer luŋ tye baŋe; teko kede lelo tye kan ame en bedo iye. 
Psalms96:7 Pak wunu Rwot, wun atekere ducu ame tye i lobo, pak wunu kwogo mere kede teko mere." 
Psalms96:8 Pak wunu nyiŋ Rwot ame obedo me kwogo; kel wunu motwu baŋe i ot me wore. 
Psalms96:9 Wor wunu Rwot i boŋo acil; komwu myero myel i nyime, wun jo me loba ducu." 
Psalms96:10 Titti wunu rok ducu ni Rwot en abaka, lobo gire doŋ oketo ocuŋ atek odoco, mom dok romo yeŋere kadi acel;" 
Psalms96:11 Lel wunu, wun polo kede lobo; mor ba, yin nam kede jami ducu ame tye i yie;" 
Psalms96:12 poto daŋ myero lel, kede jami luŋ ame tye iye! Yen ame tye i buŋ luŋ bino wer i yomcuny," 
Psalms96:13 i nyim Rwot, pien en abino, en abino me bino ŋolo kop i lobo. En bino ŋolli i jo luŋ kop atira en ŋolo kop kun luba ateni mere." 
Psalms97:1 Rwot gire tye aloc, jo me wi loba myero lel; lel wunu, wun dog nam luŋ," 
Psalms97:2 Pol kede kan acol icuc ogure dyere, loccere ocuŋ kite atira kede ŋolo kop kakare." 
Psalms97:3 Mac en a telo nyime, wano okworrere ame ogure dyere oko," 
Psalms97:4 Lutkottere menyo wi podo luŋ; lobo ka oneno, yeŋere." 
Psalms97:5 Kiddi te meye oko calo odok nyim Rwot, i nyim Rwot me lobo ducu." 
Psalms97:6 Polo tye ka rabo kite atira Obaŋa; jo luŋ tye ka neno kwogo mere. 
Psalms97:7 Lewic tye ka mako jo ame woro cal apaa, jo ame wakere pi cal jogi ame konygi mom, kite obaŋe ocele luŋ ryebere piny i nyime me wore." 
Psalms97:8 Jo me Cion owinyo te cako lelo oko, anyira me Juda te bedo i yomcuny, pi ŋolo koppi, Ama Rwot!" 
Psalms97:9 Rwot Won Twer Ducu, yin gire iloo lobo ducu, yin idwoŋ atek ikato kit obaŋe ocele luŋ." 
Psalms97:10 Obaŋa maro jo ame dago gin arac, en gwoko kwo a jo mere, en larogi i ciŋ jo areco." 
Psalms97:11 En menyo piny i jo a kitegi atira, miyo jo ame cunygi ler bedo yomcuny." 
Psalms97:12 Lel wunu i Rwot, wun jo a kitewu atira, myero ipwo wunu nyiŋe acil." 
Psalms98:1 Wer wunu wer anyen baŋ Rwot, pien en otio tic me awura! En doŋ otyeko loyo lweny oko, oloo pire kene i teko mere acil." 
Psalms98:2 Rwot doŋ otyeko rabo pi loccere, onyuto teko me larrere oŋeye baŋ rok luŋ." 
Psalms98:3 En obedo po pi marrere a mom lokere, kede gen ame en tye kede i kom jo me doggola Icrael." 
Psalms98:4 Jo me wi podo luŋ i kabedo ducu, otyeko neno loc a Rwot Obaŋawa! Wer wunu wer me yomcuny baŋ Rwot, wun lobo ducu, mwoc wunu wer me pako Rwot i yomcuny." 
Psalms98:5 Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot kun igoo wunu naŋa opuk, go wunu naka opuk amit meicel." 
Psalms98:6 Kut wunu apel kede bilo, red wunu i wer me yomcuny i nyim abakawa, en Rwot." 
Psalms98:7 Nam myero mor kede jami luŋ ame tye i yie, wi podo luŋ kedejo luŋ ame bedo iye." 
Psalms98:8 Pii i nam adoŋo myero cak bapo ciŋgi, kiddi myero wer wer me nyuto yomcunygi i nyim Rwot," 
Psalms98:9 pien en obino me bino loyo lobo, en bino loyo lobo kun ŋolo kop a jo luŋ atira dok arorom." 
Psalms99:1 Rwot Obaŋawa en abaka; kom rok luŋ myero omyel; en tye obedo i wi kom loccere ame tye i wi okerubi, lobo myero yeŋere." 
Psalms99:2 Rwot dwoŋ meicel i Cion, en tye malo meicel i wi rok luŋ." 
Psalms99:3 Jo luŋ myero wer wer me pako twon nyiŋi adwoŋ ame iyiliyili, en cil meicel." 
Psalms99:4 Abaka ame Won Twer Ducu, ame maro ŋolo kop atira, yin en ikelo ŋolo kop atira iyi Icrael, ikelo daŋ kite atira kede tero jo luŋ arorom." 
Psalms99:5 Pak wunu Rwot Obaŋawa; wore wunu i nyim kome me teno tyene En cil meicel! 
Psalms99:6 Muca kede Aron rik tye i akina olamdoggere, Camwiri daŋ rik tye i akina jo ame wore gin rik okok baŋ Rwot, eka te gamo doggi," 
Psalms99:7 En okobo kedgi i pagi me pol, gin obedo gwoko koppere me caden, kede icwillere ame en rik omiogi." 
Psalms99:8 Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, rik igamo dog joni, yin rik ibedo Obaŋa ame gonyo balgi, cite iculo kwor pi gin arac ame gin otimo." 
Psalms99:9 Pak wunu Rwot Obaŋawa, wore wunu i wi kidi mere acil; pien Rwot Obaŋawa cil meicel." 
Psalms100:1 Wer wunu i dwon me yomcuny baŋ Rwot, wun lobo ducu!" 
Psalms100:2 Ti wunu baŋ Rwot i yomcuny; bin wunu i nyime kede wer. 
Psalms100:3 Ŋe wunu ni Rwot en obedo Obaŋawa; en oketowa, wan obedo jo mere, wan obedo rommi mere ame en kwao." 
Psalms100:4 Dony wunu i dogcellere i wer me pwoc, dony wunu i dyekkallere kun ipake wunu, pwoc wunu, kun iketo wunu kwogo i nyiŋe!" 
Psalms100:5 Pien Rwot gire ber; marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka, ateni mere tye pi lwagi jo me kare ducu." 
Psalms101:1 Abino wero wer me paki, i kom mar kede ŋolo kop atir abino wero wer man baŋi, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms101:2 Abino temo keto cunya me lubo yo ame balloro mom iye. Ibino bino baŋa awene, Ama Rwot? Abino bedo ame cunya cil i oda." 
Psalms101:3 Mom abino lubo yo moro arac, adag jo ame timo bal, mom abino note kedgi kadi acel." 
Psalms101:4 Abino medde bedo ŋat ame genne nakanaka, mom abino bedo tamo pi timo gin arac." 
Psalms101:5 Ŋat ame maro wot kwoto owote mere abino wot wot neko oko, mom abino kanyo kadi acel kite a ŋat ame wakere, ame wie dwoŋ," 
Psalms101:6 Jo ame bedo i lobo kun ogeno Obaŋa, abino nenogi kede waŋ me kica, me gin daŋ obed karacel kede; ŋat ame lubo yo ame balloro mom iye, bino bedo ŋat ame tio baŋa." 
Psalms101:7 Dano ame agoba mom bino bedo i oda kadi acel, ŋat ame kobo kop me goba keken mom bino medde tic i nyima." 
Psalms101:8 Nino i nino abino tyeko jo a kitegi reco oko i lobo, abino miyo waŋ jo ame timo tim areco rwenyo oko i boma a Rwot." 
Psalms102:1 Winy ba kwacca, Ama Rwot; ye kokona owinyere baŋi!" 
Psalms102:2 Kur iponna oko ba, Ama Rwot, i kare ame can orida meicel, cik yiti iwiny koppa; ru gamo doga oyotoyot i kare ame akok baŋi!" 
Psalms102:3 Kare me kwona kato oyotoyot calo yito, cogona luŋ rem arema calo waŋ mac." 
Psalms102:4 Kedi olidolido cunya meicel calo lum ame otwo, omio wia doŋ wil oko cam ame myero acam," 
Psalms102:5 Pien curra doŋ winyere malo amala; riŋo koma doŋ otwo imek i kom cogona. 
Psalms102:6 Acalli doŋ acut ame bedo itim, acalo tula ame bedo i wii obur;" 
Psalms102:7 abuto ame waŋa okwekere akweka, acalo winyo ame bedo kene i wi ot malo." 
Psalms102:8 Okworra doŋ bedo kobo kop areco i koma ceŋ iyul, jo ame nywara doŋ tio i nyiŋa me ceno jo ocele." 
Psalms102:9 Nen doŋ buru en ame tye acalo cem ame acamo, pig waŋa doŋ rubere i ginnoro luŋ ame amato," 
Psalms102:10 Mannono timere pi lyeto me akemoni kede inigani, pien yin ikwanya ite bolla oko." 
Psalms102:11 Kwona doŋ calo tipo me otyeno; atwo doŋ calo lum. 
Psalms102:12 Ento yin ibedo i wi kom me loc nakanaka, Ama Rwot, lwagi jo me kare ducu poyo yin." 
Psalms102:13 Ibino ya kica te maki i kom Cion, kare doŋ oromo oko me nyuto beri baŋe; kare ame rik iciko pire doŋ otuno oko." 
Psalms102:14 Omironi ducu mare, kadi bed gedo iye doŋ obalo oko, kica makogi meicel i kome kadi bed doŋ calo apua." 
Psalms102:15 Rok ducu bino lworo Rwot, obakki luŋ ame tye i lobo bino lwore pi kwogo mere." 
Psalms102:16 Pien en Rwot bino gero Cion dok odoco, en bino nen kun nyuto kwogo mere." 
Psalms102:17 En bino winyo kwac a jo ame piny oloo, mom bino cayo kwac me bako dog ame okelo i nyime." 
Psalms102:18 Kop man myero co piny pi lwagi jo ame tye ayim, me wek jo ame mom ru onywalogi, wek gin obin opak Rwot," 
Psalms102:19 kun okobo ni, Rwot neno piny i kabedo mere acil ame tye malo, en neno wi lobo luŋ i polo kuno," 
Psalms102:20 me winyo cur a jo ame tye i ot kol, dok egony jo ame doŋ otyeko ŋolligi kop me to." 
Psalms102:21 Mannono twero miyo jo rabo nyiŋ Rwot i Cion, dok opak nyiŋe i Jerucalem," 
Psalms102:22 i kare ame lwak ocokere karacel, naka oloc apapat me woro Rwot." 
Psalms102:23 En oturo tekona oko con ame pwod atidi; ojwiko kare me kwona oko. 
Psalms102:24 An ate kobo ni, “Ama Obaŋana, kur ikwany kwona oko ame mom ru ati; yin ame kwoni perakino nakanaka.”" 
Psalms102:25 Yin en ame yam iketo acakki te lobo con meicel, polo daŋ en tic me ciŋi," 
Psalms102:26 Gin bino rwenyo odoco, ento yin ibino perakino; gin luŋ bino ti calo boŋo, yin ibino lolokogi calo koti, gin te rwenyo oko atwal;" 
Psalms102:27 ento yin ibedo ame kiti acel, mwakani mom bino gik," 
Psalms102:28 Ibino miyo itinowa, wan omironi bedo ikuc aboŋo peko moro; dok yin en ame ibino gwoko ikwaegi imio perakino i nyimi." 
Psalms103:1 Pwo Rwot, yin tipona, dul koma luŋ myero pak nyiŋ Rwot acil." 
Psalms103:2 Pwo Rwot, yin tipona; wi myero kur wil i kom mottoro luŋ abeco ame en omi," 
Psalms103:3 en gire en ame gonya i balle luŋ, dok daŋ en ame caŋo twona luŋ;" 
Psalms103:4 en ame laro kwona i bur me to, en ame ruka kede mar a mom lokere kede kica;" 
Psalms103:5 en mia jami abedo pi kare me kwona luŋ, dok daŋ roco kwona kare i kare calo cur." 
Psalms103:6 Rwot ŋolo kop kakare dok daŋ arorom, en ŋolo kop a jo ame owuno atira," 
Psalms103:7 En rik onyuto yikkkere luŋ baŋ Muca, omio jo Icrael oneno ticcogo me awura ame en otio." 
Psalms103:8 Rwot akica, dok timo jo ber, akemo mom mako oyot, dok marrere a mom lokere dwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms103:9 Akemo mom maka atwal, Iniga mere mom ri nakanaka," 
Psalms103:10 en mom timowa kun poro i kit bal ame wan otimo, dok daŋ mom culo kwor i komwa kun lubo kit bal ame wan otimo." 
Psalms103:11 Pien kite ame polo tye kede malo ame bor abora i lobo, marrere a mom lokere daŋ dwoŋ kittono i kom jo ame lwore." 
Psalms103:12 Kite acalo tuŋ kide bor abora i tuŋ to, amannono daŋ en kwanyo bal i komwa te cwalo oko kannabor." 
Psalms103:13 Acalo papal i tino bedo i kica i kom itinogi, amannono daŋ, kica mako Rwot i kom jo ame lwore." 
Psalms103:14 Pien ŋeo kakannoro luŋ i dul komwa; en ŋeo aber ni wan obedo apua keken. 
Psalms103:15 Aco kwo a dano mom perakino kare alac, rom aroma i me ature ame lot eka dok te oony oko." 
Psalms103:16 Ka yamo okodo rwenyo oko ducu, kabedo ame onwoŋo en bedo iye-nono mom doŋ te po pire kadi acel." 
Psalms103:17 Ento mar a mom lokere ame Obaŋa tye kede i kom jo ame lwore, perakino wan i waŋ, karacel kede kiti atira baŋ lwak jo me kare ducu." 
Psalms103:18 Baŋ jo ame gwoko cikere mere ame po me timo gin ame en ociko," 
Psalms103:19 Rwot ocibo kom me loccere i polo, en loo wi podo luŋ." 
Psalms103:20 Wun omalaika a Rwot, pak wunu Rwot, wun twoni jo mere atek, tim wunu gin ame en okobo, kun iwinyo wunu kopporo luŋ ame en kobo baŋwu." 
Psalms103:21 Wun mony a Rwot luŋ ame tye i polo, pake wunu, karacel kede wun oticcere ame tio gin ame en mito." 
Psalms103:22 Wun ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot oketo, pake wunu, i kabedo luŋ ame en loo, Pwo Rwot, yin tipona." 
Psalms104:1 Pwo Rwot, yin tipona; Ama Rwot Obaŋana, yin idwoŋ meicel! Yin irukere i kwogo kede woro;" 
Psalms104:2 lero owumo komi oko calo boŋo, iyaro polo kite ame tye kede-ni calo kema," 
Psalms104:3 Ŋa oyubo paconi malo iyi pii? Iloko polo odoko calo gadigadini, ame iŋweco kedgi i dye yamo," 
Psalms104:4 Iloko yamo odoko akwenani me aora, kun leb mac alyel tye acalo otic ame tye baŋi." 
Psalms104:5 Yin en a rik iketo lobo ocuŋ atek i kom acakki mere, ame mom twero yeŋere atwal." 
Psalms104:6 Iwumo oko i nam atut calo gin ame owumo i boŋo, kun pii daŋ ocuŋ iguŋ i wi kiddi malo." 
Psalms104:7 Ka ijukogi oriŋo oko; ka lutkotti omor, gin oŋweco oko." 
Psalms104:8 Omol i wi kiddi malo odok i luŋ piny, naka iyi akoŋ ame ityeko yiko pirgi." 
Psalms104:9 Iyiko pirgi waŋ apokki ame myero mom okati, me wek kur dok opoŋ lobo oko." 
Psalms104:10 Imio akoŋ doŋ kukunya dok iluŋ, kun omol i akina kiddi." 
Psalms104:11 Ieyi me tim luŋ mato pii nono, kane me tim daŋ konyere iye ka oryo ocirogi." 
Psalms104:12 Lwak winnyi luŋ ame twarre malo gero wudigi iye, ote bedo woo i koko i jaŋ yenni kuno." 
Psalms104:13 Imio kot ya i polo cwe piny i wi kiddi, jami abeco ame yin itio te poŋ lobo." 
Psalms104:14 Yin en imio lum lot me acama a dok, karacel kede ginapita ocele me tic a dano, me dano kur loba te nwoŋo cam iye." 
Psalms104:15 Me dano nwoŋo koŋo olok te yomoro cunygi, kede moo wir ame mio waŋgi nen aber, kede dok en cam ame miogi teko." 
Psalms104:16 Yen a Rwot nwoŋo pii adwoŋ ame romogi, yen cedar me Lebanon ame en Rwot opito," 
Psalms104:17 Lwak winnyi apol gero udigi i wii yen kunnu, araptela daŋ bedo i wi yen aboco kuno." 
Psalms104:18 Dyegi me tim bedo i wi kidi malo kuno; elec nwoŋo ka larregi i akina kiddi. 
Psalms104:19 Yin en a rik iketo dwe me poko kare, ceŋ ŋeo caaa mere me poto," 
Psalms104:20 Yin iketo colpiny ame imio bedo dyewor, mannonono en kare ame leyi i buŋ cako wotgi iye," 
Psalms104:21 Itino eŋatu dwaro leyi me amwoda i koko doggi, kun oyenyo camgi i baŋ Obaŋa." 
Psalms104:22 I kare ame cen doŋ odonyo oko; gin luŋ odok oko ceŋ i kabedogi i gorogoro 
Psalms104:23 Jo cako wot i ka ticgi, ote tic tuno naka otyeno," 
Psalms104:24 Ama Rwot, yin itio tic ame kite polladi! itiogi luŋ kede ryeko meicel, omio jami ame yin iketo dwoŋ meicel i lobo." 
Psalms104:25 Nen, nam adwoŋ tye ame okwako kabedo alac miecel jami ame yin iketo tye iye apol ame mom kwanne, gigi mogo akwo adoŋo mege karacel kede en atino tye iye kuno," 
Psalms104:26 Mellogo adoŋo daŋ beo iye kuno, karacel kede Leviatan ame en twon twolloro adwoŋ me kulo, daŋ tuko iye kuno," 
Psalms104:27 Jami magi luŋ oneno baŋi, gin luŋ omito ni migi cam i kare ame omitte ikokome." 
Psalms104:28 Ka ce imiogi gin okwanyo ote camo oko, ka iyaro ciŋi imiogi cam, gin yeŋ icam abeco." 
Psalms104:29 Ka ce yin iponnigi oko, gin waŋgi balle oko; ka ikwanyo weo me kwo oko i komgi, oto oko, ote dok i apua kun ame yam oya iye." 
Psalms104:30 Ka ce yin icwalo i yigi cunnyi ame miogi kwo, gin okwo, dok daŋ imio loba odoko anyen" 
Psalms104:31 Kwogo a Rwot myero gire pera kino nakanaka! Rwot myero bed i yomcuny pi gin ame en otio. 
Psalms104:32 Rwot neno lobo, lobo te yeŋere, ka ogudo kiddi, yito cako duny iye." 
Psalms104:33 Abino wero wer me pako Rwot pi kare me kwona luŋ, abino wero wer me pako Obaŋana pi kare ame pwod atye kwo," 
Psalms104:34 Kop ame anyuto i cunya, myero yomoro cuny jo, pien an gira alelo pire yin Rwot." 
Psalms104:35 Jo ame obalo myero tyek oko i lobo, me wek otim tim areco kur dok bed tye atwal. Pwo Rwot, yin tipona, pak wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms105:1 Pwo wunu Rwot, lwoŋ wunu nyiŋe, mi wunu tic ame otio ŋeye i akina rok ducu!" 
Psalms105:2 Wer wunu wer me pake, wer wunu baŋe, tit wunu ticcoro luŋ me awura ame en otio!" 
Psalms105:3 Ket wunu kwogo i kom nyiŋe acil; mi wunu cuny jo ame yenyo Rwot bed ayom! 
Psalms105:4 Yeny wunu Rwot karacel kede teko mere, bed wunu i nyime nakanaka." 
Psalms105:5 Poyo wunu pi ticcogo me awura ame en otio, taŋo mogo ame en otio, karacel kede ŋolo kop ame en oŋolo," 
Psalms105:6 Wun ikwae amiro mere Iburaim, wun itino a Yakobo ame en oyerowu." 
Psalms105:7 En obedo Rwot Obaŋawa; Kop ame en ŋolo, ŋolo i lobo ducu." 
Psalms105:8 En po i kom cikere mere nakanaka, i kom kop ame en ociko pi mwakki a lwagi jo me kare ducu," 
Psalms105:9 kom cikere ame en rik ocikere kede Iburaim, i kom kwoŋ ame rik en okwoŋo baŋ Icaka." 
Psalms105:10 Ame en te bino moko baŋ Yakobo doko acalo cik, baŋ Icrael me bed cikere ame perakino waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms105:11 Kun kobo ni, “An abino miyo lobo me Kanaan baŋwu, me bed lobowu ame ileo wunu me bedo megwu.”" 
Psalms105:12 I kare ame welgi pwod nonok, ame gin tye acalo wele ame mom oparo pirgi," 
Psalms105:13 ame obedo loŋo piny aloŋa i akina rok apapat, ame oya i loc man okobo baŋ rok ocele." 
Psalms105:14 En mom oye ŋattoro me wunogi, en ojuko obakki pirgi," 
Psalms105:15 kun kobo ni, “Kur igud wunu omirona ame atyeko yero, kur itim wunu ginnoro aracl kom odwarpinnya.”" 
Psalms105:16 I kare ame en omio kec opoto lobo, obalo camgi luŋ ame okwo kede." 
Psalms105:17 En onwoŋo ocwao dano con i nyimgi, ocwao Yucepu ame omio ocate acalo opii." 
Psalms105:18 Rik ote tweyo tyene oko i jegere atek, ote tweyo daŋ kol i ŋute;" 
Psalms105:19 tuno waŋ ame gin ame onwoŋo en okobo ocobere kakare, kop a Rwot oteme onwoŋo ni en tye atir." 
Psalms105:20 Abaka, ocwao kop ote gonye oko, oloc ame onwoŋo loo orok te doŋ wekke bedo kede kuc;" 
Psalms105:21 en te miye bedo adwoŋ ame loo ode, ŋat ame loo jami luŋ ame tye i ode," 
Psalms105:22 omie daŋ twer me pwonyo rwode ocele kite ame yie mito, kede me pwonyo odoŋe ame mie tam, i ryeko." 
Psalms105:23 Omio Icrael owoto i Miciri, Yakobo te doko welo ame bedo i lobo a jo Kam." 
Psalms105:24 Rwot te miyo lwakkere nywal nya apol meicel, te daŋ miyogi doko atek ame kato okworgi oko." 
Psalms105:25 Oloko cuny jo Miciri, te miyogi cako dago jo mere oko, gin te cako timo tim me idwali i kom omiro mere." 
Psalms105:26 Ocwao amiro mere Muca, karacel kede Aron ame en oyerogi." 
Psalms105:27 En otio anyuttogo i akinagi karacel kede taŋo i lobo me Kam. 
Psalms105:28 Ocwao colpiny te miyo lobo cido oko icuc, ento gin ote jem oko mom ote ye winyo koppere." 
Psalms105:29 Oloko pii i kulo te doko remo, te miyo rec luŋ ame tye iye to oko." 
Psalms105:30 Ogwalogwal apipim te corre i lobogi, naka i paco abakagi." 
Psalms105:31 Obaŋa okobo kop keken lwak lwaŋi apipim te corre i lobogi, karacel kede onyogo i lobogi luŋ," 
Psalms105:32 Omio pee olunyo corre lobogi akaka kot, kede lutkot ame te bedo meny amenya i lobogi luŋ," 
Psalms105:33 Ojwero olokgi kede odurogi luŋ, te daŋ tuturo yen i pottigi luŋ." 
Psalms105:34 Dok te kobo ka kop keken bonyo apipim te corre i lobogi; lwak itino bonyo ame welgi mom kwanne," 
Psalms105:35 gin te camo ginapita luŋ ame tye i lobogi, ocamo kit cammoro luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i lobogi." 
Psalms105:36 Oneko itino kaogi luŋ ame co, ame gin obedo itino ame gin ogeo i tekogi me agege." 
Psalms105:37 En te kwanyo jo Icrael kun omako ryal kede jabu, mom tye ŋattoro kadi acel i akina atekeregi ame ogatte." 
Psalms105:38 I kare ame gin oya, jo Miciri cunygi obedo ayom, pien lworo onwoŋo ocirogi doŋ oko i komgi." 
Psalms105:39 En oyaro pol malo i wi jo mere, dok omio mac me menyo piny i dyewor." 
Psalms105:40 Kare ame gin okwae omiogi aluru, ocwayigi kwon adwoŋ meicel iya i polo me gin cam romgi." 
Psalms105:41 Oyabo lela pii te cako kukunya iye; pii-nono te mol i dye tim calo pii me kulo," 
Psalms105:42 Pien en onwoŋo opoyo cikere mere acil kede amiro mere Iburaim. 
Psalms105:43 Mannono te miyo en telo jo mere i yomcuny, otelo jo mere ame en oyero kun gin tye awero wer," 
Psalms105:44 En te miyogi lobe a rok ocele, omiogi oleo cam ame tye i potti ame rok ocele en ame oyelle kede," 
Psalms105:45 Me i agikki mere lwakkere lub cikkere, kun ogwoko gin ame en ociko luŋ, Pak wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms106:1 Pak wunu Rwot! Pwo wunu Rwot, pien en ber; Pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms106:2 Ŋa ame twero kwano gin adoŋo luŋ ame Rwot otyeko timo? Ŋa ame twero pake i pak luŋ ame myero pake kede? 
Psalms106:3 Jo ame kitegi atira tye kede winyo, ame timo gin atye atira i kare ducu," 
Psalms106:4 Po pira, Ama Rwot, i kare me nyuto marri baŋ lwakki, konya an daŋ i kare ame ibino larogi iye;" 
Psalms106:5 mia an daŋ anywak kedgi gum ame iyiko pirgi, me an daŋ alel i yomcuny, me an daŋ abed i kwogo i akina joni ame iyero me bedo megi." 
Psalms106:6 Wan karacel i kwariwa, wan luŋ obalo, wan luŋ otimo bal, otimo tim areco," 
Psalms106:7 Kwariwa i kare ame gin tye i Miciri, mom obedo paro pi ticcoro me awura ame yin ibedo tiyo; mom daŋ opo pi marri a mom lokere ame onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel, cite gin olunyo jem i kom ŋat Amalo Meicel i kare ame gin otuno i Nam Arema." 
Psalms106:8 Kadi amannono en te larogi i keto kwogo i nyiŋe, me wek en mi teko mere adwoŋ ŋeye." 
Psalms106:9 En ojuko pii i Nam Arema te two oko, en te telogi beo kan atut calo obeo i dye tim," 
Psalms106:10 Mannono te miyo en larogi i ciŋ okworgi, en olarogi i teko okworgi." 
Psalms106:11 Pii te mwonyo okworgi oko, ŋattoro acel i akinagi mom te bwot." 
Psalms106:12 Mannono te miyo gin ye kop ame onwoŋo okobo; gin te cako wero wer me pake," 
Psalms106:13 Cite oyotoyot wigi te wil oko i tic ame en otio, mom oye kuro tam ame ya i baŋ Obaŋa." 
Psalms106:14 Ento olubo gigi mitgi ame tye i cunygi, ote bedo temo Obaŋa nakanaka i tim kuno." 
Psalms106:15 Obaŋa obedo miyogi gin ame gin okwao, cite ocwao too edeke i akinagi me pwodogi." 
Psalms106:16 I kare ame nyeko, omako jo i kom Muca kede i kom Aron ame Obaŋa oyero me telogi," 
Psalms106:17 lobo oŋamo doge te mwonyo Datan, te wumo jo Abiram ame ojem oko," 
Psalms106:18 Mac daŋ dok te cako lyel i akina jo ame ojem, maccono te waŋo otim tim areco oko," 
Psalms106:19 Gin otio pirgi kengi atin twon i Koreb, ote cako worogu cal jok ame otwako atwaka." 
Psalms106:20 Gin oloko Obaŋa ame obedo me kwogo i kom cal twon ame camo lum," 
Psalms106:21 wigi te wil oko i kom Obaŋa ame olarogi, ame otimo gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo pirgi i Miciri," 
Psalms106:22 otio gigi mogo me awura i wi lobo kan, kede gigi mogo ame neno iyiliyili i Nam Arema." 
Psalms106:23 Omio Obaŋa okobo ni ebino tyekogi oko, kono onwoŋo Muca dano ame en oyero onwoŋo room tye, ame rik te cuŋ i nyim Obaŋa, kun laro pi lwakkere, me wek Obaŋa juk cunye kur tyekgi oko." 
Psalms106:24 Gin rik te cayo lobo ame mio oko, kun mom otye kede iye kadi acel i kom gin ame Obaŋa oyiko." 
Psalms106:25 Gin te bedo ŋuŋura i kemagi kun mom owinyo kop ame Rwot kobbigi. 
Psalms106:26 Mannono omio Rwot otiŋo ciŋe malo te kwoŋ baŋgi, ni ebino miyogi oto oko i tim." 
Psalms106:27 Dok daŋ ebino keketo iikwaegi akina rok apapat, kun emiogi olal i wi lobo luŋ." 
Psalms106:28 Gin rik te ye woro jok Baal iyi Peor, kun ocamo riŋo ame oyalo i jo oto;" 
Psalms106:29 Mannono te miyo akemo mako Rwot i kom gin ame gin otimo-nono, too edeke te poto i akinagi." 
Psalms106:30 Fenekaci te ya cako kwayo Obaŋa, too edeke te jwik oko," 
Psalms106:31 Mannono omio ote kwanne en daŋ i akina jo a kitegi atira, kun opo pire i kare a lwagi jo me kare ducu." 
Psalms106:32 Gin omio akemo omako Rwot i dog pii me Meriba, mannono te miyo pwodo Muca pirgi;" 
Psalms106:33 gin omio cuny Muca obedo akec, eka te cako kobo koppogo ame onwoŋo myero mom ya i doge." 
Psalms106:34 Gin rik mom te neko rok ocele, kite ame Rwot onwoŋo ocikogi kede," 
Psalms106:35 ento gin te rubere oko i rok ocele, ote daŋ pwonyo timo gin ame gin timo." 
Psalms106:36 Gin te cako woro cal jogigi, ame te lokere doko owic me mokogi." 
Psalms106:37 Gin te bedo yalo cal jogi itino awobegi kede anyiragi, kun omio acalo mot me woro jogi:" 
Psalms106:38 Gin te onyo remo a jo apol ame mom i bal, oonyo remo awobegi kede me anyiragi, ame gin obedo ŋolo acalo mot me yalo cal jogi me Kanaan; pi remo a jo ame gin obedo oonyo-nono omio lobogi balle oko." 
Psalms106:39 Gin daŋ ote doko jo ame cik ogeŋo pi gin ame gin obedo timo, obedo timo tim me alaya alaya." 
Psalms106:40 Mannono te miyo akemo Obaŋa tugere i kom jo mere, en te cako dago jo ame eyero atek meicel," 
Psalms106:41 en te miyogi i ciŋ rok ocele, ame mannono te miyo jo ame onwoŋo dagogi cako loyogi." 
Psalms106:42 Okworgi te wunogi atek meicel, te diyogi dwokogi i te locgi." 
Psalms106:43 Obaŋa te bedo larogi kare i kare, cite gin omedde jem i kome kare-nono luŋ, mannono te miyo balgi medde dwokogi adwoka piny." 
Psalms106:44 Kica dok te make i komgi i kare ame can opoto i komgi, i kare ame en owinyo kokogi." 
Psalms106:45 En opo pi cikere mere pirgi, kica te make i komgi pi marrere a mom lokere ame dwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms106:46 Rwot te miyo jo bedo i kica i komgi, jo luŋ ame onwoŋo oterogi iyi opii," 
Psalms106:47 Larwa ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋawa cocokowa oko i akina rok ocele, me wek opwo nyiŋi acil, dok obed i kwogo me paki," 
Psalms106:48 Pwo wunu Rwot, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael, pwoc wunu waŋ i waŋ! Me jo luŋ kob ni, “Amen!” Pak wunu Rwot." 
Psalms107:1 Pwo wunu Rwot, pien en ber; pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms107:2 Jo ame Obaŋa olaro myero kob kittono, jo ame en olakoro i can," 
Psalms107:3 Man kop a jo ame ocokogi i lobo a rok ocele, i tuŋ kide kede i tuŋ to, ituŋ anyarodi kede i tuŋ anyarolum." 
Psalms107:4 Jo mogo i akinagi te bedo loŋo piny i dye tim otwo, kun mom oromo nwoŋo yo me i wot paco moro a myero obedo iye," 
Psalms107:5 Oryo pii ocirogi, kec daŋ onekogi, ote doko agoro oko naka i cunygi." 
Psalms107:6 Gin te kok baŋ Obaŋa i kare ame gin tye i peko-nono, omio ote larogi iyi ayela ducu;" 
Psalms107:7 Rwot te telogi i yo ame ocuŋ atir, tuno ka gin otuno i boma ame myero gin obed iye." 
Psalms107:8 Gin myero pwo Rwot pi marrere a mom lokere, pi tic me awura ame en otio pi dano." 
Psalms107:9 Pien en konyo ŋat ame oryo pii ociro, ŋat ame kec oneko en mio yeŋ i cammogo abeco." 
Psalms107:10 Jo mogo i akinagi obedo i mutu kede i pinny acol, onwoŋo otye acalo opii ame tye i can ame otweo kede jegele," 
Psalms107:11 Pien gin onwoŋo ojem i kom kop ame onwoŋo Rwot Obaŋa okobo okwero winyo tam a ŋat Amalo Meicel. 
Psalms107:12 Gin onwoŋo doŋ ool oko i tic atek ame obedo tiyo; oŋoye doŋ piny aboŋo ŋattoro ame konyogi," 
Psalms107:13 Gin te cako kok baŋ Rwot i kare ame otye i peko-nono, Rwot te larogi i cangi," 
Psalms107:14 te kwanyogi oko i colpiny kede mutu, te codo jegele ame onwoŋo otweogi kede oko a waŋe acel." 
Psalms107:15 Gin myero opwo Rwot pi marrere a mom lokere, pi tic me awura ame en otio pi dano." 
Psalms107:16 Pien en oturo kika me mola oko luŋ, te ŋoŋolo nyonyo me cego doggola poko i dul aryo." 
Psalms107:17 Jo mogo i akinagi obedo twoye meicel pi balgi, can adwoŋ meicel opoto i komgi pi gin areco ame gin obedo timo," 
Psalms107:18 Gin obedo kwero kit cammo ducu, onwoŋo doŋ oceggi acega i dogcel me to." 
Psalms107:19 Gin te kok baŋ Rwot i kare ame otye i cannono, Rwot te larogi i cangi." 
Psalms107:20 Rwot te caŋogi i kop ame en okobo akoba keken, eka te larogi oko i to." 
Psalms107:21 Gin myero pwo Rwot pi marrere a mom lokere, pi tic me awura ame en otio pi dano," 
Psalms107:22 Gin myero omi mot baŋ Rwot me pwoye, ote bedo rabo pi gin ame en otio i wer me yomcuny." 
Psalms107:23 Jo ocele i akinagi owoto i mel i dye nam, jo ame onwoŋo tio ticgi i nam adoŋo." 
Psalms107:24 Gin te neno gin ame Rwot obedo timo, gigi mogo me awura ame en otimo i nam atut." 
Psalms107:25 Pien en okobo ka kop keken, yamo ajuru te cako kodo, ame te miyo pii me nam tagere atek meicel." 
Psalms107:26 Mel ame onwoŋo tye i nam te tiŋere ame doŋ ceggi acega i polo, ote dok dwogo donyo oko piny ite nam atut, cannono te miyogi doko jo agoro oko i cunygi." 
Psalms107:27 Gin te cako cacapa atata kun ogate calo jo omer koŋo, kun mom doŋ otye kede ryeko moro kadi acel." 
Psalms107:28 Gin te kok baŋ Rwot i kare ame otye i cannono, Rwot te larogi i cangi." 
Psalms107:29 Rwot ojuko yamo ame onwoŋo akodo, pii i nam te kwe mot, bi-amwonyi te daŋ doŋ liŋ oko." 
Psalms107:30 Cunygi doŋ te bedo ayom pi kwe a pii i nam oterogi naka i waŋ kwan kan ame gin onwoŋo omito wot iye. 
Psalms107:31 Gin myero pwo Rwot pi marrere a mom lokere, pi tic me awura ame en otio pi dano" 
Psalms107:32 Myero gin oket kwogo i kom Rwot i akina lwak ame ocokere, dok daŋ myero opake i cokere odoŋe;" 
Psalms107:33 En oloko anaka pii i kulo-gu odoko tim ame otwo ikaŋ, ojuko anaka pii ame onwoŋo mollo piny iyi akoŋ, pii iyie te two oko." 
Psalms107:34 Lobo ame ceko cem atek meicel oloko odoko lobo ame obedo kadokado, man otimere pi bal a jo ame onwoŋo tye i lobo-nono." 
Psalms107:35 En oloko kan ame otwo ikaŋ odoko kan ame pii poŋ iye, Lobo ame otal atar kia, odoko kan ame pii mollo iye," 
Psalms107:36 En te miyo jo ame kec neko bedo kuno, gin te gero boma me bedogi iye;" 
Psalms107:37 Gin te coyo kotigi i potti, ote daŋ pito olok, camgi te cek abup meicel." 
Psalms107:38 Rwot te miyogi gum omio gin te nya atek miecel. Rwot mom oye ni wel dokgi myero dok piny. 
Psalms107:39 I kare ame oloogi, gin odoko goro, pi awuna ame owunogi kede, can kede cwercuny." 
Psalms107:40 Rwot te cayo rwodegi, te miyogi wot i dye tim ata kan ame yo moro mom iye." 
Psalms107:41 Ento en laro jo ame piny oloogi i cangi, medo wel jo me otgi bedo acalo lwak rommi." 
Psalms107:42 Jo ame cunygi ler, neno te yomoro cunygi, jo a kitegi reco te doŋ liŋ aliŋa," 
Psalms107:43 Ŋat aryeka myero keto cunye me niyo jami magi, myero jo tam pi mar a Rwot ame mom lokere." 
Psalms108:1 Cunya gire omoko i komi oko, Ama Obaŋa, cunya omoko i komi ame mom dok lokere, abino wero wer me paki i dwon aloŋo! Co oko, yin tipona!" 
Psalms108:2 Naŋana kede naŋa opuk daŋ myero yikere oko! Abino miyo piny yabere ibai! 
Psalms108:3 Abino wero wer me paki, Ama Rwot, i akina rok apapat; abino wero wer me paki i akina orok," 
Psalms108:4 Pien marri a mom lokere pire tek meicel, naka baŋ jo ame tye malo i polo, dok gen ame yin itye kede daŋ tuno naka malo i pol," 
Psalms108:5 Nyut ditti malo i polo, Ama Obaŋa, mi kwogoni nen kannaler i lobo luŋ," 
Psalms108:6 me wek joni ame imaro larre, migi oloo lweny i teko me badi, dok igam daŋ kwacca!" 
Psalms108:7 Obaŋa okobo kop i kabedo mere acil ni, “Abino poko Cekem oko i twon kwogo me loc, abino daŋ poko luŋ me Cukot." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead obedo mega, Manace daŋ obedo mega; Epraim obedo tok nyonyo me geŋo wia, aco Juda te bedo abiro me locca." 
Psalms108:9 Moab obedo becen me lwokka; abolo warona i kom Edom me nyuto ni aloc; abino redo redo me loc i wi jo Piriciti,”" 
Psalms108:10 Ŋa abino kela i boma ame ocelo i cel atek? Ŋa abino tella yo me wot iyi Edom? 
Psalms108:11 Yin mom ikwerowa oko, Ama Obaŋa? Nen yin mom doŋ iwoto karacel i monywa," 
Psalms108:12 Tim ber ikonywa me lweny i kom okworwa, pien kony ame dano en ame mio mom konyo ginnoro." 
Psalms108:13 Ka Obaŋa obedo lweny karacel kedwa, wan obino loyo, en gire en ame bino nyono okworwa dio piny." 
Psalms109:1 Ama Obaŋa, ame an apako, kur iliŋ mot!" 
Psalms109:2 Jo a kitegi reco kede ogoba, ocako kobo kop me goba i koma, okobo ka kop me goba keken i koma." 
Psalms109:3 Otye ka cwero cunya i balo nyiŋa, odaga dok ocako lweny i koma kom nononono, kun mom aballigi ginnoro kadi acel." 
Psalms109:4 Obedo dotta adota kadi bed an amarogi, kadi i kare ame nwoŋo an atye akwayo pirgi," 
Psalms109:5 Mannono omio gin ocula i gin arac i gin aber, odaga-gu kun an amarogi." 
Psalms109:6 Yer ŋat arac me pid kede, mi ŋattoro arac i nyim okworrere kel i nyim oŋolkop." 
Psalms109:7 Mi dote kop te loye, mi kwaccere ame ekwao bed acalo bal ame etimo." 
Psalms109:8 Jwik kare me kwo mere oko bed acecek; mi ŋat ocele en ame luny leyo jami mere abeco. 
Psalms109:9 Mi itino mere dok itino kic, kede dako mere dok dako a cware oto," 
Psalms109:10 Mi itino mere bed rimo piny kun okwao jami akwa, mi ryemgi oko i wi obur ame onwoŋo gin bedo iye." 
Psalms109:11 Mi lon a yam ekoporo jami mere oma jami mere oko luŋ, jo ame mom eŋeo oluny yako jami mere luŋ ame yam eyele kede." 
Psalms109:12 Kia myero kur mak ŋattoro i kome kadi acel, itino mere daŋ kur con ŋattoro." 
Psalms109:13 Mi ikwae luŋ to oko ducu, me nyiŋe rweny oko atwal i akina lwagi jo ame obino nywalo anyim." 
Psalms109:14 Rwot myero poyo bal a kwari mere daŋ, dok daŋ mom iye gonyo bal a tottere kadi acel." 
Psalms109:15 Mi Rwot opoyo balgi nakanaka, cite nyiŋe myero rweny oko atwal i lobo." 
Psalms109:16 Pien en rik mom oparo pi bedo kede kica, en rik obedo ryemo yo ocan kede jo ame piny oloo, karacel kede jo a cunygi cwer me aneka mere." 
Psalms109:17 En rik maro ceno jo, cennere-nono daŋ myero dok i wie, En onwoŋo mom mito lammi jo gum kadi acel, ŋattoro daŋ myero kur lamme gum." 
Psalms109:18 Ceno jo onwoŋo tye acalo koti mere ame en ruko, myero doŋ bid kome acalo pii, dok acalo moo ame bido cogo mere," 
Psalms109:19 Myero bed acalo boŋo ame en odwalo i kome; dok bed acalo del pyer ame en tweo i pyere nino ducu," 
Psalms109:20 Man kono en obedo kite ame Rwot pwodo kede jo ame pidda nononono, jo ame kobo kop arac i koma kun omito rwenyo kwena." 
Psalms109:21 Ento yin, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, lweny pira pi gwoko nyiŋi, dok ilara pi marri a mom lokere pien ber." 
Psalms109:22 Pien an acan ame piny oloo, cunya cwer meicel." 
Psalms109:23 Awot i rwenyo calo tipo me otyeno, yamo kola oko calo bonyo." 
Psalms109:24 Kanyo kec omio coŋa doŋ odoko agoro oko, koma doŋ riŋo mom iye," 
Psalms109:25 Adoko doŋ gi-aŋala a jo ame dota, ka onena, oyeŋo doŋ wigi ayeŋa." 
Psalms109:26 Konya, Ama Rwot Obaŋana, lara pi marri a mom lokere." 
Psalms109:27 Migi oŋe ni yin en itye ka lara; migi one ni yin Rwot en ame itimo man," 
Psalms109:28 Migi obedjo ame cena acena, ento kun imia gira gum, Mi ale twod jo ame lwenyo keda, me an amironi abed ame cunya yom." 
Psalms109:29 Mi jo ame dota, ruk lewic acalo boŋogi, mi lewic bo komgi oko calo boŋo me adwala i kom." 
Psalms109:30 Abino pwoyo Rwot meicel i dwon aloŋo, abino pake i akina jo ame ocokere." 
Psalms109:31 Pien en cuŋ i ŋet jo ame piny oloo i ciŋgi tuŋ cem, me larogi i ciŋ jo ame ŋolo kop me to i wigi." 
Psalms110:1 Rwot okobbi Rwotta ni, “Bed i laŋeta tuŋ cem, i kabedona me kwogo, ituno ka abino keto okworri piny i te tyeni.”" 
Psalms110:2 Rwot bino cwayo abiro me loccere kun ya i Cion, en bino miyo ilo loc i akina okworri." 
Psalms110:3 I nino ame ibino lweny okworri, joni bino miye amia kengi me wot lweny, i wi kidi acil. Calo toyo ame luk idiko con, awobeni daŋ bino bino baŋi kittono." 
Psalms110:4 Rwot doŋ otyeko kwoŋ oko, mom dok bino loko tammere, “Yin ibedo alamdog nakanaka, i kite a Melkijedek.”" 
Psalms110:5 Rwot tye i ciŋi tuŋ cem, en bino keketo obakki oko i nino ame akemo bino make," 
Psalms110:6 En bino ŋolo kop i akina rok ducu, bino miyo kom jo oto radde arada i bar me lweny; bino daŋ keketo rwode oko, kun miogi okeketa ata i wi lobo luŋ." 
Psalms110:7 En bino mato pii i kulo ame tye i ŋet yo, mannono bino miyo en tiŋo wie malo." 
Psalms111:1 Pak wunu Rwot. Abino pwoyo Rwot kede cunya ducu, i akina jo ame cunygi ler, i dye lwak ame ocokere karacel." 
Psalms111:2 Gin ame Rwot tio doŋodoŋo meicel. Jo luŋ ame ticcere-nono yomo cunygi, obedo keto cunygi me niaŋ iye." 
Psalms111:3 Ginnoro luŋ ame en tio tek dok me kwogo meicel, dok kite mere atira perakino waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms111:4 En mom mio wiwa wil i kom ticcere luŋ ame en tio me awura, Rwot ber dok akica." 
Psalms111:5 En mio cam baŋ jo ame wore, dok daŋ wie mom wil i kom cikere mere kadi acel." 
Psalms111:6 En onyuto teko me ticcere baŋ lwakkere, pien omiogi lobo a rok ocele me bedo meggi." 
Psalms111:7 Ticcoro luŋ ame en tio tye atira dok me ateni, dok cikkere luŋ obedo gin me agena," 
Psalms111:8 oketo me bedo atwal kun perakino nakanaka, myero lubgi luŋ i cuny aler kede ateni." 
Psalms111:9 En ikome oyiko yo me laro jo mere, ocikere kedgi cikere ame perakino nakanaka, Nyiŋe cil dok iyiliyili meicel." 
Psalms111:10 Dano cako bedo kede ryeko ka ce ŋeo Rwot; jo ame lubo gin ame en ociko bino bedo kede niaŋ aber, gin bino bedo pake nakanaka." 
Psalms112:1 Pak wunu Rwot. Dano ame lworo Rwot tye kede winyo, ame cunye yom i lubo cik a Rwot." 
Psalms112:2 I kwae bino bedo twoni jo atek i lobo, ikwae a ŋat ame cunye ler bino bedo kede winyo," 
Psalms112:3 Jo me ode bino lony kun otye i jami abup meicel, dok kite atira-nono bino perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms112:4 Ceŋ bino donyo, bino ryeny i colpiny pi jo ame cunygi ler; Rwot ber, akica, dok kite atira." 
Psalms112:5 Dano ame cunye yom ame mio ocan koporo jami baŋe, bino bedo aber; dano ame wie mom wil i kom cikkere mere." 
Psalms112:6 Pien dano ame kite atira mom obino coro teŋe, obino po pire nakanaka." 
Psalms112:7 En mom bedo kede lworo kadi owinyo kop arac ame cwero cunye, bedo ame cunye tek kun geŋo Rwot." 
Psalms112:8 En bedo ame cunye opye mot, kun mom lwor kadi acel, tuno ka oneno doŋ otyeko loyo okworrere." 
Psalms112:9 En poko jami mere baŋ ocan i yomcuny, kite atira perakino waŋ i waŋ, dano-nono bino bedo i twer kun daŋ olwore," 
Psalms112:10 Lo arac ka oneno, akemo cako mako oko; bedo kakao lake, ame cunye doŋ oballe oko; gen ame dano arac tye kede kec nono." 
Psalms113:1 Pak wunu Rwot. Wun omiro a Rwot, pake wunu, pak wunu nyiŋe, pak wunu nyiŋ Rwot." 
Psalms113:2 Nyiŋ Rwot myero pak nakanaka, cakere tin naka waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms113:3 Cakere i tuŋ kide tuno kede tuŋ to, myero pak nyiŋ Rwot iye ducu." 
Psalms113:4 Rwot tye malo i wi rok ducu, kwogo mere daŋ tye malo ame kato polo oko." 
Psalms113:5 Ŋa kara ame calli i Rwot Obaŋawa, ame bedo i kabedo mere ame tye malo," 
Psalms113:6 ame ŋolloro jami luŋ ame tye kannabor, i polo kede i lobo?" 
Psalms113:7 En tiŋo ocan malo kun kwanyogi piny iyi apua, tiŋo jo ame piny olo i wi obur," 
Psalms113:8 te miyogi bedo karacel i rwode, i akina oloc a lwakkere." 
Psalms113:9 En mio dako ame mom nywal nwoŋo paco mere, te miye doko toto otino apol meicel kun yie yom. Pak wunu Rwot." 
Psalms114:1 I kare ame jo Icrael ya i lobo me Miciri, i kare ame jo a Yakobo weko lobo ame jo mere loko leb apapat," 
Psalms114:2 Juda rik te doko acalo ot acil me woro Obaŋa, kun Icrael doko acalo loccere." 
Psalms114:3 Nam oneno te riŋo oko, kulo me Jordan te cuŋ oko kun mom mol," 
Psalms114:4 Kiddi te cako pyepyea calo nyogi rommi, kun kabedo luŋ obedo kidikidi pyepeya calo itino rommi," 
Psalms114:5 Ŋo kara otimi yin nam, omio yin iriŋo oko-ni? Ŋo otimi yin kulo me Jordan, omio icuŋ kun mom imol?" 
Psalms114:6 Piŋo wun kiddi ipyepyea wunu calo nyogi rommi? Wun lobo obedo kidikidi ŋo omio pyepyea wunu calo itino rommi? 
Psalms114:7 Yin lobo myero iyeŋere i nyim Rwotti, i nyim Obaŋa a Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 ame loko lela doko kan ame pii poŋ iye, kede kan obedo kidikidi doko akoŋ." 
Psalms115:1 Kwogo gire bed baŋi keken, Ama Rwot, kwogo myero pe bed megwa, pe myero bed megwa kadi acel, pi marri amom lokere kede pi atenini." 
Psalms115:2 Piŋo rok ocele bedo penyowa ni, “Obaŋagi kara tye kwene?”" 
Psalms115:3 Obaŋawa wan tye i polo, en timo ginnoro luŋ ame en mito," 
Psalms115:4 Cal jogi obedo gin ame otio i mola kede ryal, dok obedo gin ame jo en ame tio i ciŋgi kengi." 
Psalms115:5 Doggi tye cite mom okobo; waŋgi daŋ tye cite mom neno ginnoro. 
Psalms115:6 Yitgi tye ento mom winyo kop; wumgi daŋ tye ento mom ŋweo ginnoro," 
Psalms115:7 ciŋgi tye ento mom mulo ginnoro; tyengi daŋ tye ento mom owoto kadi acel dwongi daŋ mom mor winyere kadi acel. 
Psalms115:8 Jo ame tiogi rom aroma kedgi, dok jo ame keto gengi i komgi daŋ rom aroma kedgi." 
Psalms115:9 Wun jo Icrael, gen wunu Rwot! En konyowu dok tye acalo kwot me gwoko komwu." 
Psalms115:10 Wun jo me ot Aron, myero igen wunu Rwot! En konyowu dok tye acalo kwot me gwoko komwu," 
Psalms115:11 Wun jo luŋ ame lworo Rwot, gen wunun Rwot! En konyowu dok tye acalo kwot me gwoko komwu," 
Psalms115:12 Rwot pwod gire po i komwa, dok daŋ bino miyowa gum; en bino miyo gum baŋ jo me ot Icrael; en bino miyo gum baŋ jo me ot Aron;" 
Psalms115:13 en bino miyo gum baŋ jo ame lworo Rwot, jo atino kede jo adoŋo." 
Psalms115:14 Rwot myero mi inywal immede wunu, wun karacel kede itinowu!" 
Psalms115:15 Rwot myero miwu gum, Rwot ame oketo polo kede lobo." 
Psalms115:16 Polo obedo me Obaŋa gire, ento lobo en te miyo baŋ ikwae a dano." 
Psalms115:17 Jo ame oto, mom doŋ romo pako Rwot, akadi jo ame donyo piny i lobo kan ame olin iye aliŋa." 
Psalms115:18 Cite wan jo ame okwo obino pwoyo Rwot, cakere tin naka waŋ i waŋ. Pwo wunu Rwot." 
Psalms116:1 An amaro Rwot, pien en owinyo kokona, dok daŋ owinyo kwacca ame abako kede doga baŋe." 
Psalms116:2 Pien en ociko yite me winyo kwacca, mannono omio an abino kok baŋe pi kare luŋ ame pwod atye kwo." 
Psalms116:3 To ociko owiccere ogura kede dyere, rem me lyel daŋ omaka oko ikiŋ, can kede rem adwoŋ meicel ocira oko." 
Psalms116:4 Alwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot, kun akobo ni, “Ama Rwot, tim berilar kwona!”" 
Psalms116:5 Rwot akica dok kite atira; Obaŋawa timo jo kica. 
Psalms116:6 Rwot gwoko jo ame kwia piny, i kare ame rik odwoka piny, en olara." 
Psalms116:7 Dwog cen, yin tipona, me iwe, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko nyuto berrere baŋi." 
Psalms116:8 Rwot olaro tipona oko i to, omia aweo pig waŋa oko, omio tyena mom doŋ twomere i ginnoro." 
Psalms116:9 Atye ka wot i nyim Rwot, i lobo a jo akwo." 
Psalms116:10 Amedde bedo kede iye ikome kadi bed nyo akobo ni, “Can odia meicel”;" 
Psalms116:11 dok i kare ame onwoŋo atye kede lworo ame akobo ni, “Dano ducu mom genne kadi acel.”" 
Psalms116:12 Abino miyo gin aŋo baŋ Rwot, pi gin aber luŋ ame en otimo baŋa?" 
Psalms116:13 Abino pwoyo Rwot pi larena, abino pwoye kun alwoŋo nyiŋe," 
Psalms116:14 abino cobo kwoŋ ame yam akwoŋo baŋ Rwot, i nyim lwakkere luŋ kun ocokere." 
Psalms116:15 Ka ŋat ageno Rwot oto, pire tek meicel i nyim Rwot." 
Psalms116:16 Ama Rwot, an abedo amironi, atin a dako aŋecani, yin doŋ ityeko gonyo tol ame itwea kede." 
Psalms116:17 Abino miyi mot me pwoyi, dok abino kok baŋi kare luŋ." 
Psalms116:18 Abino co bo kwoŋŋa ame akwoŋo baŋ Rwot, i nyim lwakkere luŋ ame ocokere," 
Psalms116:19 i dyekal me ot a Rwot i nyimi i Jerucalem. Pak wunu Rwot. 
Psalms117:1 Pak wunu Rwot, wun rok ducu! Dwore wunu, wun jo me rok apapat!" 
Psalms117:2 Pien marrere a mom lokere dwoŋ meicel pirwa, dok kite atira daŋ perakino nakanaka. Pak wunu Rwot." 
Psalms118:1 Pwo wunu Rwot, pien en ber, marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka!" 
Psalms118:2 Jo Icrael myero kob ni, “Marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka.”" 
Psalms118:3 Jo me ot Eron myero kob ni, “Marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka.”" 
Psalms118:4 Jo ame lworo Rwot myero kob ni, “Marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka,”" 
Psalms118:5 I kare ame atye i can akok baŋ Rwot; Rwot ogamo kwacca te gonya oko," 
Psalms118:6 Rwot en akony mera, mom abino lworo ginnoro, ŋo kara ame dano twero tima kede?" 
Psalms118:7 Rwot gire tye i ŋeta me konya; abino neno jo ame daga i waŋ me loc," 
Psalms118:8 Laro baŋ Rwot, ber gire, kato geŋo dano," 
Psalms118:9 Laro baŋ Rwot, ber gire, kato geŋo rwode." 
Psalms118:10 Rok luŋ onwoŋo ogura oko dyere, ento amio nyiŋgi orwenyo oko i wi lobo i nyiŋ Rwot." 
Psalms118:11 Gin onwoŋo ogura oko dyere, gin onwoŋo ogura oko dyere, tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi; amio nyiŋgi orwenyo oko luŋ wi lobo, i nyiŋ Rwot." 
Psalms118:12 Onwoŋo ogura dyere calo kic, obino i koma oyotoyot calo mac ame awaŋo tim, ento amio nyiŋgi luŋ orwenyo oko i wi lobo i nyiŋ Rwot." 
Psalms118:13 Onwoŋo ocorra meicel ame doŋ aceggi rette piny, cite Rwot te konya oko," 
Psalms118:14 Rwot en ame mia teko, dok en tye acalo werra ame awero, en doŋ odoko ŋat ame lara." 
Psalms118:15 Koŋ iwinyo wer me yomcuny ame owero pi loc, ame jo tye awero i kema a jo a kitegi atira, kun owero ni, “Ciŋ Rwot me tuŋ cem lwenyo atek meicel," 
Psalms118:16 twer me ciŋe-nono omiowa olo lweny, ciŋ Rwot me tuŋ cem lwenyo atek meicel!”" 
Psalms118:17 Mom gire abino to, ento abino, bedo kwo, kun abedo tito gin ame Rwot otimo." 
Psalms118:18 Rwot doŋ otyeko pwoda arac meicel, cite mom gire oneka," 
Psalms118:19 Otimo mannono me wek eyabba doggola me kite atira, me adony iye ate wot pwoye." 
Psalms118:20 Mannono en dogcel ame donyo baŋ Rwot, jo ame kitegi atira bino beo iye." 
Psalms118:21 Apwoi, pien yin doŋ igamo kwacca, doŋ ityeko doko ŋat ame lara." 
Psalms118:22 Kidi ame ogedo okwero, en ame odoko kidi adwoŋ me gwic ot," 
Psalms118:23 Man en tic a Rwot, eno gin me awura baŋwa." 
Psalms118:24 Man en nino ame Rwot omiowa, myero okwer wunu nino man yomcuny adwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms118:25 Ama Rwot, tim ber ilarwa! tim ber imi ticwa luŋ cobere kakare!" 
Psalms118:26 Pwo wunu ŋat ame bino i nyiŋ Rwot! Wan olamo winyo i komi i ot a Rwot. 
Psalms118:27 Rwot en Obaŋa, en doŋ otyeko miyowa ceŋ. Dorre wunu i tyen kun imako wunu jaŋ yat i ciŋwu, wot iman wunu i keno me lam," 
Psalms118:28 An abino pwoyi, pien yin ibedo Obaŋana, abino dworo nyiŋi, yin Obaŋana." 
Psalms118:29 Pwo wunu Rwot, pien en ber marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms119:1 Jo ame mom tye i balloro, tye kede winyo, ame bedo kun lubo cik a Rwot!" 
Psalms119:2 Jo ame gwoko kop me caden ame en omio tye kede winyo, jo ame yenye kede cunygi ducu," 
Psalms119:3 jo ame mom timo ginnoro arac, cite obedo kun olubo yo ame Rwot mito." 
Psalms119:4 Yin doŋ ityeko miyowa pwonnyi yam con, kun imito ni olub kede diro." 
Psalms119:5 Mi tyena cuŋ atek i yo ame atye ka lubo, kun agwoko daŋ i cwilli." 
Psalms119:6 Ka abino keto cunya me lubo cikki lewic mom bino maka," 
Psalms119:7 Abino paki kun cunya ler, ka doŋ atyeko pwonyo cikki ame tye atira-ni." 
Psalms119:8 Abino gwoko gin ame yin iciko, tim ber kur cunyi ca oko ite weka ata." 
Psalms119:9 Awobi ame pwod tidi twero gwoko kite aber odoco i yore aŋo? Twero gwokere ka ce bedo kun lubo koppi. 
Psalms119:10 An ayenyi kede cunya ducu, Ama Obaŋa, kur imi agak oko i yo me lubo cikki," 
Psalms119:11 Atyeko kano koppi i cunya, me wek kur atim balloro i nyimi." 
Psalms119:12 An apwoi meicel, Ama Rwot; pwonya kede cikki." 
Psalms119:13 Abino kobo kede doga kannaler, kop ducu ame yam iciko kun yin ikomi en ame ikobo." 
Psalms119:14 Kop me cadenni ame inyuto yommoro cunya meicel, cunya yom iye calo lonyo adwoŋ ame alimo." 
Psalms119:15 Abino lwodo kop ame ipwonyo i cunya, ate keto cunya me lubo gin ame yin imito." 
Psalms119:16 Abino bedo i yomcuny i cik meri, wia gire mom bino wil i kom kop ame ikobo." 
Psalms119:17 Nyut marri baŋa an aticci, me wek abed kwo kun alubo koppi." 
Psalms119:18 Yab waŋa me anen piny, me anenjami me awura ame tye i cikki." 
Psalms119:19 An atye acalo welo i wi lobo kan, kur ikanna cikki moro kadi acel." 
Psalms119:20 Cunya bedo pukere apuka kare ducu, kun amito niaŋ kop ame i ciko." 
Psalms119:21 Yin ityeko juko jo ame opala, ame gin jo ame doŋ ityeko ceno, jo ame gak oko i lubo cikki." 
Psalms119:22 Kwany aŋalegi kede acaegi oko i koma, pien an abedo gwoko kop me caddenni," 
Psalms119:23 Kadi bed rwode ocokere karacel te bedo poro kop me timo gin arac i komi, cite an amironi pwod abino medde lwodo kop me cikki i cunya," 
Psalms119:24 Kop me cadenni yommoro cunya meicel, an anwoŋo tam abeco iya iye." 
Psalms119:25 Abuto piny iyi apua ame cwercuny ocira oko, roc kwona odoco kite ame yam iciko." 
Psalms119:26 Kare ame atucci ginnoro luŋ ame yam atio, yin igamo doga, pwonya kede cikki." 
Psalms119:27 Pwonya me aŋe yo ame myero alub kede pwonnyi, mannono bino miyo abedo lwodo kop i kom ticci ame doŋ ityeko tiyo." 
Psalms119:28 Cwercuny doŋ omio cunya oballe oko, mia teko, kite ame yam iciko." 
Psalms119:29 Kwanya oko me kur alub yo mogo a mom beco, cite myero ipwonya i cikki pi kicani." 
Psalms119:30 An doŋ atyeko yero me lubo yo ame gen tye iye, kun aketo cunya meicel i kom gin ame i ciko." 
Psalms119:31 An doŋ atyeko moko oko ikiŋ i kom kop me cadenni, kur iwek lewic maka." 
Psalms119:32 Abino bedo lubo cikki i mitkom, ka ce yin imedo niaŋa obedo atut." 
Psalms119:33 Pwonya, Ama Rwot, me aŋe kite me lubo cikki, mannono bino miyo agwoko naka iyi agikki." 
Psalms119:34 Mia aniaŋ cikki me wek agwoki, me alub i cunya ducu." 
Psalms119:35 Tela i yo me lubo cikki, pien yomoro cunya meicel," 
Psalms119:36 Mia abed i cuny me lubo kop me cadenni, me kur abed i cuny me nwoŋo ka lim," 
Psalms119:37 Kur imia abed neno jami atata ame konygi mom, mia abed i kwo me timo gin ame yin imito," 
Psalms119:38 Med moko gin ame iciko baŋa an amironi, ame ityeko ciko pire pi jo ame llwori." 
Psalms119:39 Kwany tim me acae oko ame mia lworo, pien cikki ducu beco." 
Psalms119:40 Nen ba, cunya bedo pukere apuka kom cikki, yin kiteni atira, myero imia kwo." 
Psalms119:41 Tim ber, Ama Rwot, imi marri a mom lokere bed koma, dok ilara kite ame yam iciko con;" 
Psalms119:42 mannono bino miyo agamo dog jo ame kobo kop agecegece i koma, pien an ageno koppi." 
Psalms119:43 Kur ikwany kop me ateni oko i doga, pien genna tye i kom cikki." 
Psalms119:44 Abino medde gwoko cikki kare ducu nakanaka, abino gwoko nakanaka," 
Psalms119:45 Abino beo i yo apwot kun atye i kuc, pien doŋ atemo lubo pwonnyi." 
Psalms119:46 Abino rabo kop me cadenni i nyim obakki, kun lewic mom maka kadi acel." 
Psalms119:47 Pien an anwoŋo yomcuny i cikki, ame cunya maro meicel," 
Psalms119:48 Aworo cikki meicel, dok daŋ amaro, abino lwodo kop me cikki cunya." 
Psalms119:49 Poyo koppi ame yam icikere kede baŋa, an amironi, ame yin imia acako bedo kede gen iye." 
Psalms119:50 Kadi atye i can, koppi kweo cunya, cikkereni mia akwo." 
Psalms119:51 Jo ame kwia Obaŋa nywara anywara, cite an, mom aweko gwoko cikki kadi acel." 
Psalms119:52 Ka atamo pi cikki ame yam ipwonya kede con, cunya kwe odoco, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms119:53 Cunya waŋ meicel i kom jo a kitegi reco, ame pe paro pi cikki," 
Psalms119:54 Cikki doŋ tye acalo wer ame awero, i ot ame abedo iye acalo arok ame bor abora i paco mere." 
Psalms119:55 Apo piri naka dyewor, Ama Rwot, dok daŋ alubo cikki," 
Psalms119:56 Mannono en gum ame an anwoŋo, omio atye ka gwoko kop ducu ame iciko." 
Psalms119:57 Yin en ame ibedo gin ame opokka, Ama Rwot, atyeko cikere me gwoko kopporo luŋ ame yin ikobo." 
Psalms119:58 Akwai i cunya ducu, Rwot me polo, kica myero maki i koma kite ame yam iciko." 
Psalms119:59 Ka aparo pi gin ame yin imito ni atim, alokere me lubo kop me cadenni;" 
Psalms119:60 Aru ya oyotoyot kun mom agal, ate cako lubo cikki oko," 
Psalms119:61 Kadi bed amok iyi owic a jo areco, wia mom wil i kom cikki kadi acel." 
Psalms119:62 I cuny dyewor, an aya malo me paki, pi cikki me ŋolo kop atira." 
Psalms119:63 An abedo awot a jo luŋ ame lwori, dok ame lubo gin ame i pwonyo." 
Psalms119:64 Lobo doŋ opoŋ i marri a mom lokere, Ama Rwot, pwonya kede cikki." 
Psalms119:65 Yin itye amironi aber, Ama Rwot, itio kede kun ilubo koppi." 
Psalms119:66 Pwonya me ŋolo kop atira, kun atye kede ŋec, pien an aye gin ame yin iciko." 
Psalms119:67 I kare ame mom ru iketo can i koma, onwoŋo doŋ agak oko, cite aman doŋ agwoko koppi," 
Psalms119:68 Yin gire iber, dok itimo daŋ gin aber; pwonya kede cikki." 
Psalms119:69 Jo ame mom ŋei, okobo kop me gobagoba i koma, cite an gira alubo cikki kede cunya ducu." 
Psalms119:70 Jo-nono cunygi omakere oko calo dwolo, cite an gira yia yom i cikki." 
Psalms119:71 Can ame rik opoto i koma-ca onwoŋo kara ber, pien okonya me pwonyo cikki." 
Psalms119:72 Cik ame ya i dogi ber baŋa, ame kato lwak jabu kede ryal apipim." 
Psalms119:73 Yin en icwea dok daŋ yin en igwoka, mia abed i niaŋ atut me wek apwony cikki." 
Psalms119:74 Jo ame lwori bino nena cunygi te bedo ayom, pien an abedo geŋo koppi." 
Psalms119:75 Ama Rwot, an aŋeo ni yin iŋolo kop kakare, dok daŋ iketo can i koma pi ateni ame yin itye kede," 
Psalms119:76 Mi marri a mom lokere bed oyikere me kweyo cunya, kite ame rik iciko kede baŋa, an amironi." 
Psalms119:77 Tima kica, iweka abed kwo, pien cikki en ame yomoro cunya." 
Psalms119:78 Mi lewic mak jo a mom ŋei, pien gin obedo bwola i kop me goba, aco an gira abino lwodo ka kop i kom kop ame ipwonyo keken i cunya." 
Psalms119:79 Mi jo ame lwori bin baŋa, me gin daŋ obin oŋe kop me cadenni," 
Psalms119:80 Balloro myero kur nwoŋere i cunya pi kwero cikki, me kur ibin imi lewic maka." 
Psalms119:81 Tipona ool oko me kuro larreni, Ama Rwot, an gira ageno kop meri." 
Psalms119:82 Waŋa doŋ oballe oko pi bedo neno gin ame iciko, omio apenyi ni, “Kara ibino kweyo cunya awene ba?”" 
Psalms119:83 Nen doŋ adoko calo ocoe me piko koŋo olok ame oweko i atuk, kadi amannono, wia gire mom owil i cikki." 
Psalms119:84 Kara an amironi abino bedo kuro naka awene ba? Kara ibino ŋolo kop a jo ame wuna awene ba? 
Psalms119:85 Jo ame mom ŋei yin Obaŋa, okunyo bur pira me apot iye, kun mom oparo gigi pi cikki." 
Psalms119:86 Cikki ducu tye kakare, ento gin olwenyo i koma i kop me gobagoba; konya ba." 
Psalms119:87 Onwoŋo doŋ oceggi kwanyo kwona oko i lobo, cite an mom aye weko gin ame ipwonyo." 
Psalms119:88 Tim ber ikonya, igwok kwona pi marri a mom lokere, me an daŋ agwok kop me caden ame yam yin ikobo." 
Psalms119:89 Koppi bedo nakanaka, Ama Rwot, tye ame icibo ocuŋ oko ikiŋ i polo," 
Psalms119:90 Kop atenini ame yin itye kede perakino waŋ i waŋ, i kare a lwagi jo me kare ducu, icibo lobo ocuŋ atek i kabedo mere." 
Psalms119:91 Jami ducu ocuŋ naka atot tin pi cikki, pien gin luŋ obedo omironi." 
Psalms119:92 Kono onwoŋo cikki mom yomoro cunya, kono nyo ato oko i canna," 
Psalms119:93 Wi mom bino wil i kom cikki kadi acel, pien gwoka omio pwod atye kwo." 
Psalms119:94 An a danoni, lara ba; pien an abedo lubo cikki keken." 
Psalms119:95 Jo a kitegi reco opono kun okia me neka, cite an atamo gira pi kop me cadenni." 
Psalms119:96 Doŋ atyeko neno ni jami i wi loboni luŋ kadi bed ber meicel tye kede agikkigi, ento cikki agikki mere mom." 
Psalms119:97 Nen ba, nen kite ame an amaro kede cikki! abedo lwodo kop i kom cikki i cunya ceŋ iyul." 
Psalms119:98 Cikki mia abedo ŋat aryek ame kato okworra oko, pien itye keda kare ducu," 
Psalms119:99 Atye i niaŋ atut ame kato me opwonyena oko, pien an abedo lwodo kop me cadenni i cunya kare i kare." 
Psalms119:100 Dok niaŋ ame an atye kede kato me a jo oteggo oko, pien an alubo gin ame yin iciko." 
Psalms119:101 An ajukere kena me wot timo gin arac, pien amito lubo kop atenini." 
Psalms119:102 Pe awire teŋe ate weko cikki oko, pien yin doŋ ityeko pwonya," 
Psalms119:103 Koppi ka an abilo anwoŋo lim meicel, lim i doga ame kato moo kic oko," 
Psalms119:104 Cikki pwonya i ryeko adwoŋ meicel, mannono omio adago lubo yo areco ducu." 
Psalms119:105 Koppi calo tara ame menyo kan ame an awoto iye, dok tye acalo ceŋ amenyo yo ame awot iye." 
Psalms119:106 Doŋ atyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ, dok daŋ amoko pire, me Jubo pwonyi ame tye atira." 
Psalms119:107 Peko ame atye kede omio rem ocira oko, gwoka me abed kwo, Ama Rwot, kite ame yam iciko." 
Psalms119:108 Gam motta me pak ame akelo baŋi, Ama Rwot, dok ipwonya kede cikki, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms119:109 Atye ame amako kwona i ciŋa kare luŋ, cite wia mom wil i kom cikki." 
Psalms119:110 Jo areco tye ociko owic me maka, cite an mom agak me weko lubo gin ame ipwonyo." 
Psalms119:111 Kop me cadenni obedo gin ame an aleo me bedo mega nakanaka, ateteni, kop me cadenni en ame mia lelo i cunya." 
Psalms119:112 Aketo cunya kare luŋ me lubo gin ame yin iciko, abino timo amannono nakanaka i agikki me kwona." 
Psalms119:113 Cunya dag jo ame tamo tamgi aryo, ento an amaro cikki," 
Psalms119:114 Yin en ibedo ka ponona kede kwot me geŋo koma, genna tye i kom kop ame ikobo" 
Psalms119:115 Ya wunu oko i ŋeta, wun otim tim areco, me abed kun alubo cik a Rwot Obaŋana." 
Psalms119:116 Konya acuŋ atek kite ame yam ibedo ciko me abed kwo, kur imi ket lewic i koma pi gen ame atye kede," 
Psalms119:117 Tiŋa malo, me abed i kuc, me aketo cunya me lubo cikki kare luŋ." 
Psalms119:118 Cunyi otyeko kwero jo ame gak teŋe i lubo cikki, pien ryeko ame gin tye kede mom konyo ginnoro kadi acel." 
Psalms119:119 Jo areco me wi lobo rom aroma i yugi, mannono omio an gira amaro kop me cadenni," 
Psalms119:120 Rino koma luŋ myel amyela pi lwori, ŋolo koppi daŋ tye ka miya lworo meicel." 
Psalms119:121 Atyeko timo gin ame tye atira dok kakare; kur iweka baŋ jo ame tye ka wuna," 
Psalms119:122 cuŋ pira, an aticci, pi kelli kuc, kur iwek jo ame mom ŋei bed wuna." 
Psalms119:123 Waŋa doŋ ojony oko me bedo kuro larreni, kede pi kite ame ibino cobo kede cikki ame tye atira." 
Psalms119:124 Ti keda an aticci pi marri a mom lokere, dok ipwonya kede cikki." 
Psalms119:125 An abedo amironi, mia abed kede niaŋ atut, me wek aŋe koppi me cadenni." 
Psalms119:126 Kare doŋ oromo oko, me tiyo ticci, Ama Rwot, pien cikki doŋ otyeko turo oko." 
Psalms119:127 Mannono omio an amaro cikki gira, amaro ame kato jabu, naka jabu ame olio aber." 
Psalms119:128 Mannono omio an alo kwona kun alubo cikki, adag gira timo tim areco luŋ." 
Psalms119:129 Koppi me caden luŋ tye me awura meicel, mannono omio alubo kede cunya ducu." 
Psalms119:130 Niaŋ tyen koppi yabo waŋ dano, mio ŋat amwol bedo kede niaŋ atut." 
Psalms119:131 Aŋamo doga, ate bedo omo cunya me weo, pien cunya tye i kom cikki," 
Psalms119:132 Lokere baŋa, dok itima kica, kite ame itimo i kom jo ame mari," 
Psalms119:133 Tella yo kite ame yam iciko, me balloro kur lo kwona." 
Psalms119:134 Lakoro an oko i ciŋ jo ame wuna, me alub gin ame ipwonyo." 
Psalms119:135 Nena an amironi, i waŋ me kica, dok ipwonya i cikki." 
Psalms119:136 Nen pig waŋa tye ka cwer kun aony irat calo pii, pien jo mom tye ka gwoko cikki." 
Psalms119:137 Yin giri kiteni atira, Ama Rwot, dok daŋ iŋolo kop atira." 
Psalms119:138 Iyero kop me cadenni, kun ilubokite atira, dok koppi luŋ obedo kop ateni." 
Psalms119:139 Miti ame an atye kede i kom cikki puko cunya apuka, pien okworra, wigi wil oko i kom koppi." 
Psalms119:140 Gin ame yin iciko, icobo luŋ, an amironi, cunya tye iye." 
Psalms119:141 An atidi dok daŋ oca meicel, kadi amannono an gira wia mom wil i cikki." 
Psalms119:142 Kiteni atira tye atir, dok daŋ perakino nakanaka, dok cikki daŋ tye ateni," 
Psalms119:143 Can kede cwercuny otum oko i koma, cite cikki en ame yomoro cunya." 
Psalms119:144 Kop me cadenni tye atira nakanaka, mia abed i niaŋ atut me abed kwo." 
Psalms119:145 Akok baŋi i cunya luŋ, gam doga, Ama Rwot, an abino gwoko cikki." 
Psalms119:146 Akok baŋi, tim ber ilara; me wek abed lubo kop me cadenni." 
Psalms119:147 Aya malo ibai ate kok baŋi me konya, an pwod atye kede gen i kom koppi," 
Psalms119:148 Aco waŋa te bedo twolo kun piny mom ru oru, me wek abed lwodo kop i kom cikkereni i cunya," 
Psalms119:149 Tim ber iwiny dwona, Ama Rwot, pi marri a mom lokere; locci ame tye atira rocco kwona," 
Psalms119:150 Jo ame wuna, tye doŋ ceggi acega kun otye i tam me timo gin arac i koma, gin mom oparo pi cikki kadi acel." 
Psalms119:151 Cite yin itye ceggi, Ama Rwot, cikki ducu obedo cik me ateni." 
Psalms119:152 Acako pwonyo kop i kom cadenni con meicel, pien yin ityeko ketogi me bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms119:153 Nen can ame atye kede dok ilara, pien wia mom wil i kom cikki." 
Psalms119:154 Pid pira, dok ilara, mia kwo kite ame yam iciko," 
Psalms119:155 Otim tim areco mom bino larre kadi acel, pien gin gigi mom oparo pi cikki." 
Psalms119:156 Ento kica meri dwoŋ meicel, Ama Rwot, imia akwo kite acalo yin iŋolo kede kop atira-ni." 
Psalms119:157 Okworra kede jo ame wuna pol meicel, cite an gira mom aweko lubo kop me cadenni." 
Psalms119:158 Ka aneno jo ame mom geni, cunya lema meicel, pien gin mom ogwoko cikki." 
Psalms119:159 Koŋ ipar kite ame an amaro kede kop ame ipwonyo, Ama Obaŋa, gwok kwona kite ame marri a mom lokere tye kede." 
Psalms119:160 Koppi luŋ ocuŋ iyi ateni, ŋolo kop atira ame yin iŋolo perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms119:161 Rwode wuna nononono aboŋo ginnoro ame abalo, cite an gira abedo kede lworo cunya pi koppi." 
Psalms119:162 Alelo gira alela i koppi, calo ŋat ame onwoŋo gin ame oyako abup meicel." 
Psalms119:163 Adag dok atyeko kwero kop me gobagoba, ento amaro gira cikki." 
Psalms119:164 An apaki tyen abiro nino acel, pien kop ame ikobo tye atira," 
Psalms119:165 Jo ame maro cikki bedo i kuc adwoŋ meicel, mom tye ginnoro atwero miyogi twomere." 
Psalms119:166 An gira ageno larre meri, Ama Rwot, dok daŋ atimo gin ame cikki mito ni atim." 
Psalms119:167 Kop me cadenni ame tye i cikki luŋ agwoko gira i cunya, amarogi atek meicel." 
Psalms119:168 Agwoko cikki luŋ karacel kede kop me caden, ame ipwonya kede, yin gire ineno ginnoro luŋ ame an atimo." 
Psalms119:169 Ye kokona otun i nyimi ba, Ama Rwot, mia abed kede niaŋ atut kit ame koppi tye kede." 
Psalms119:170 Ye kwacca ame abako kede doga baŋi tun i nyimi, lara kite ame yam iciko kede." 
Psalms119:171 An apaki kare ducu i kop ame ya i doga, me ipwonya kede cikki." 
Psalms119:172 Abino wero koppi awera kede doga, pien cikki luŋ tye atira." 
Psalms119:173 Yik ciŋi me konya, pien an atyeko yero me lubo cikki." 
Psalms119:174 Akuro kom ka larreni keken, Ama Rwot, dok gin ame yomoro cunya, obedo cikki." 
Psalms119:175 Mia abed kwo me wek amedde paki, me gin ame cikki pwonyo okonya." 
Psalms119:176 Atyeko gak oko teŋe calo romo ame orwenyo, yenya, an amironi, pien wia mom wil i kom cikki." 
Psalms120:1 I kare ame atye i can akok baŋ Rwot, me en gam doga, kun akok baŋe ni," 
Psalms120:2 “Lara ba, Ama Rwot, i ciŋ jo ame kobo kop me gobagoba, i ciŋ jo ame kop me goba keken en ame ya i doggi.”" 
Psalms120:3 Gin aŋo kara ame obino miyowu? Dok ŋo ocele ame obino timo i komwu, wun jo ame ogoba." 
Psalms120:4 Atero ame lebe bit meicel, ame obedo me olweny, kede loti mac ame okur alyet meicel!" 
Psalms120:5 Can iwia doi, pi bedo i Mecek acalo welo, kede pi bedo i akina kema a jo Kedar!" 
Psalms120:6 Abedo doŋ kare alac meicel, iyi akina jo ame dag kuc." 
Psalms120:7 An a dano ame amaro kuc, ento ka akobo kopporo me kuc, gin luŋ otwarre malo me lweny keken." 
Psalms121:1 Atiŋo waŋa malo, aneno lobo ame obedo kidikidi; kony ame an amitoni, kara bino ya i kwene?" 
Psalms121:2 Kony bino ya i baŋ Rwot, ame oketo polo kede lobo." 
Psalms121:3 En mom bino ye tyeni cer, ŋat ame gwoki mom bino nino kadi acel." 
Psalms121:4 Nen ba, ŋat ame gwoko jo Icrael, nino mom bino mako waŋe, dok daŋ mom bino nino atwal." 
Psalms121:5 Rwot, en ame gwoki, dok en tye acalo tipo me weoni, en tye i ŋeti i ciŋi tuŋ cem." 
Psalms121:6 Ceŋ mom bino waŋo komi dyeceŋ, akadi dwe daŋ dyewor." 
Psalms121:7 Rwot bino gwoki i kom ginnoro luŋ arac, en bino gwoko kwoni." 
Psalms121:8 Rwot bino gwoki i kabedo luŋ ame ibino wot iye, cakere i kare-ni naka waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms122:1 Cunya rik obedo ayom meicel i kare ame okobba ni, “Owot wunu i ot a Rwot!”" 
Psalms122:2 Obedo cuŋ acuŋa i tyenwa i dogcel me Jerucalem! 
Psalms122:3 Jerucalem, doŋ otyeko gero aber odoco, boma mere doŋ ocuŋ atek ikiŋ," 
Psalms122:4 Man en kan ame Rwot oyero ame atekere luŋ bino bino iye, kite ame rik ociko kede baŋ jo Icrael, gin bino bino me miyo pwoc i nyiŋ Rwot." 
Psalms122:5 Kom loc luŋ me ŋolo kop otyeko keto oko kuno, kom loc luŋ me ot a Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Kwa wunu Obaŋa pi kuc me Jerucalem! “Myero jo ame mari bed olonyo! 
Psalms122:7 Kuc myero bed tye i cel luŋ ame ogerri kede, dok kuc daŋ myero bed i wudi luŋ ame ocuŋ iguŋ malo!”" 
Psalms122:8 Pi omegona kede pi owotena omio akobo ni, “Kuc obed baŋwu!”" 
Psalms122:9 Pien ot a Rwot Obaŋawa tye kan, abino kwayo ni ibed wunu aber." 
Psalms123:1 Atiŋo waŋa malo baŋi, Ama Rwot, yin ame ibedo i wi kom me locci malo i polo." 
Psalms123:2 Nen ba, kite acalo omiro neno adwoŋgi, dok kite acalo aŋeca neno kede dako ame loo ot, ame en bedo baŋe, wan daŋ oneno baŋ Rwot Obaŋawa, tuno ka kica omake i komwa." 
Psalms123:3 Kica myero maki i komwa, Ama Rwot, kica myero maki i komwa, pien doŋ ocaowa okato kare." 
Psalms123:4 Tipo me kwowa doŋ ool oko pi kare alac meicel, pi aŋale a jo ame tye i kwo aber, pi acae a jo ame wakere." 
Psalms124:1 Jo Icrael myero kob ni, “Kono Rwot mom onwoŋo tye tutuŋ baŋwa," 
Psalms124:2 kono Rwot mom onwoŋo tye tutuŋ baŋwa, i kare ame okworwa cako lweny kedwa," 
Psalms124:3 kono okworwa omwonyowa oko akwo, kare ame akemo akworwa onwoŋo olyetto agwa meicel, me lweny i komwa;" 
Psalms124:4 kono alele kot ame amol agwa oterowa oko teŋe, kono bi-amwonyi me pii owumowa oko piny;" 
Psalms124:5 kono pii ame atagere ataga omol i wiwa malo.” 
Psalms124:6 Pwo wunu Rwot, ame mom omiowa baŋgi, acalo riŋo me amwoda baŋgi!" 
Psalms124:7 Wan obwot calo winyo ame obwot iyi owic adwar; pien owic ame ociko onwoŋo ocot oko, wan ote bwot oko." 
Psalms124:8 Konywa luŋ ya i baŋ Rwot, ame oketo polo kede lobo." 
Psalms125:1 Jo ame geno Obaŋa, rom aroma i kidi me Cion ame mom yeŋere, ento cuŋ atek ikiŋ karacel nakanaka." 
Psalms125:2 Kite acalo kiddi otyeko guro Jerucalem oko-ni, Rwot daŋ oguro jo mere oko dyere kittono, cakere i kare-ni naka waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms125:3 Abiro me loc a jo a kitegi reco mom bino loyo lobo ame omio baŋ jo a kitegi atira, me jo a kitegi atira mom rye ciŋgi, me timo gin areco." 
Psalms125:4 Tim ber baŋ jo a kitegi beco, Ama Rwot, kede baŋ jo a cunygi ler." 
Psalms125:5 Ento jo ame lubo yo ame ogom, Rwot bino terogi ribogi karacel otim tim areco, Kuc obed iyi Icrael." 
Psalms126:1 I kare ame Rwot odwoggowa cen i Cion, onwoŋo orom aroma i jo ame alak aleka," 
Psalms126:2 Icennere wan ote bedo nyero anyera, kun oredo i yomcuny, orok daŋ te cako kobo kop i komwa ni, “Rwot otyeko timo gigi mogo me awura meicel pirgi.”" 
Psalms126:3 Rwot onwoŋo otimo gigi mogo me awura meicel pirwa, omio cunywa yom." 
Psalms126:4 Dwokkiwa gumwa, Ama Rwot, calo pii ame tye i Negeb!" 
Psalms126:5 Jo ame co kotigi kede pig waŋgi, myero oka gin ame ocek potogi i yomcuny." 
Psalms126:6 Ŋat ame woto kun akok, kun omako koti ame en awot coyo, bino dwogo i paco mere kun aredo areda i yomcuny, kun kelo kai ame okao i poto mere." 
Psalms127:1 Ka ce Rwot mom en ogero ot, jo ame gero lolle nono, Ka ce Rwot mom ogwoko paco, akur paco-nono bedo ame waŋe okwekere akweka aboŋo nino nono." 
Psalms127:2 Kadi idil wunu ibai me wot itic, kadi idok wunu paco me wot weo mot meicel, kun icamo wunu cemwu ame cunywu tye i kom ticwu, mannono luŋ nono, mom romo konyowu kadi acel, pien Rwot mio baŋ jo ame en maro i kare ame nwoŋo gin onino oko." 
Psalms127:3 Nen ba, otino obedo mot ame yaa i baŋ Rwot, gin obedo nyig koti ame yaa i yic." 
Psalms127:4 Itino ame lo moro onywalo kun en pwod awobi, calo atera ame tye i ciŋ lo ame lwenyo." 
Psalms127:5 Ŋat ame cao atero mere opoŋ i kodi atero-nono, tye kede yomcuny, dano-nono lewic mom bino mako kadi acel, i kare ame en tye ka lok okworrere i dogcel." 
Psalms128:1 Dano ame lworo Rwot, tye kede winyo, ame tio gin ame en mito," 
Psalms128:2 Ibino camo cam ame oya i kom tic ame yin itio kede ciŋi; ibino bedo i yomcuny dok daŋ ibino bedo aber. 
Psalms128:3 Dako-ni bino bedo calo olok ame nyak meicel i odi; itinoni bino bedo acalo yat ame pote lot, kun obedo oguro mejani dyere." 
Psalms128:4 Nen ba, mannono en gum ame bino poto i kom dano ame lworo Rwot," 
Psalms128:5 Rwot myero mii winyo i Cion, myero en mii inen lonyo ame tye i Jerucalem, pi kare me kwoni luŋ," 
Psalms128:6 En myero mi inen ikwai kede ikwai, Kuc obed i kom Icrael!" 
Psalms129:1 Jo Icrael myero kob ni, “Gin oketo can i kom arac meicel cakere i tinona." 
Psalms129:2 Gin oketo can i koma arac meicel cakere i tinona, kadi amannono gin mom oloa kadi acel." 
Psalms129:3 Gin obedo liba i tuŋ ŋea, ote tima lit aboŋo kica.”" 
Psalms129:4 Rwot kite atira; en otyeko ŋolo tol a jo a kitegi reco oko. 
Psalms129:5 Myero jo ducu ame dago Cion, lewic makgi, ote dok oko cen." 
Psalms129:6 Gin myero bed acalo lum ame tye i wi ot malo, ame two oko kun mom ru odoŋo abor," 
Psalms129:7 ame ŋat ame anyaro mom daŋ nyaro poŋ ciŋe, ŋat ame atweyo daŋ mom nyaro poŋ kore," 
Psalms129:8 Kun jo ame abeo kannono daŋ mom twero kobo ni, “Winyo ame Rwot en amio obed i komwu! Okwayiwu winyo i nyiŋ Rwot!”" 
Psalms130:1 Akok baŋi i te nam atut, Ama Rwot, winy kokona ba, Ama Rwot!" 
Psalms130:2 Cik yiti iwiny kwacca ame abako kede doga baŋi. 
Psalms130:3 Kono yin ibedo gwoko bal wa agwoka aboŋo timowa kica, ŋa ame kono ocuŋ i nyimi, Ama Rwot?" 
Psalms130:4 Ento yin gire igonyo bal a jo, me jo bed i lworo i komi." 
Psalms130:5 An gira akuro Rwot, tipona daŋ kure, dok an atye kede gen pi koppere." 
Psalms130:6 Kwona ducu ocuŋ i kom Rwot, akure ame kato okur piny ame kuro naka odiko, akure ame kato okur piny ame kuro naka odiko." 
Psalms130:7 Wun jo Icrael, gen wunu Rwot! pien mar a mom lokere tye baŋ Rwot, larre me ateni tye baŋe daŋ." 
Psalms130:8 En bino lakoro jo Icrael, bino lakorogi i balgi luŋ." 
Psalms131:1 Ama Rwot, an gira mom atye kede mit adwoŋ meicel i cunya, dok waŋa daŋ mom neno gigi mogo ame malo meicel. Mom abedo keto cunya i kom gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo, dok ame awura okato kare." 
Psalms131:2 Atye gira ame cunya okwe, dok tipona daŋ okwe mot, calo atin ame oliŋ mot i kor tottere cunya gire tye okwe calo atin ame oliŋ mot." 
Psalms131:3 Wun jo Icrael we, gen wunu Rwot! cakere tin naka waŋ i waŋ." 
Psalms132:1 Po pi Daudi, Ama Rwot, kede pi cannoro luŋ ame yam en obedo kanyo;" 
Psalms132:2 kite ame rik en okwoŋo kede baŋ Rwot, kite ame en okwoŋo kede baŋ Won Twer Ducu a Yakobo, kun kobo ni," 
Psalms132:3 “Mom abino donyo i oda, akadi yito i wi tandana." 
Psalms132:4 Nino daŋ mom bino mako waŋa, dok mom daŋ abino miyo waŋa," 
Psalms132:5 tuno ka doŋ anwoŋo kabedo pi Rwot, kabedo a Won Twer Ducu ame obedo me a Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Nen ba, wan owinyo pire Eprata, onwoŋo tye i potti me Jaar." 
Psalms132:7 “Owot wunu kan ame en bedo iye, me owot owore wunu i ŋet ka teno tyene.”" 
Psalms132:8 Ya doŋ malo, Ama Rwot, me iwot i ka weoni, Yin karacel kede canduk me tekoni." 
Psalms132:9 Mi olamdoggi oruk ruk me kite atira, mi joni acillel i yomcuny." 
Psalms132:10 Ama Rwot Obaŋa, kur ikwer winyo kop a danoni ame iwiro kede moo! pi marri a mom lokere i kom amironi Daudi." 
Psalms132:11 Rwot rik okwoŋo kwoŋ me ateni baŋ Daudi, ame mom dok romo loko tammere iye me kobo ni, “Abino keto atin awobi acel i akina ikwai, me bedo abaka, en bino bedo i wi kom me locci." 
Psalms132:12 Ka ce ikwaini ducu bino gwoko cikerena, kede kop me caden ame abino pwonyogi kede, abino keto itinogi daŋ bedo i wi kom me locci, gin bino bedo i loc nakanaka.”" 
Psalms132:13 Rwot doŋ otyeko yero Cion, kun mito ni bed paco me bedo mere," 
Psalms132:14 En okobo ni, “Kan doŋ bino bedo ka weona nakanaka; an doŋ abino bedo kan pien cunya omito." 
Psalms132:15 Abino miye winyo, ate miye nwoŋo jami abup ame en mito, ocan luŋ ame tye iye abino miyogi ocamo kwon oyeŋ." 
Psalms132:16 Abino miyo olamdog ame tye iye ruko ruk me larre, jo mere acil bino redo i yomcuny." 
Psalms132:17 Abino yero ŋat acel i akina ikwae a Daudi me bedo abaka; doŋ atyeko tiyo tara pi danona ame atyeko wiro kede moo. 
Psalms132:18 Abino miyo lewic ciro okworrere oko, tok loccere keken en ame bino meny i wie malo.”" 
Psalms133:1 Koŋ inen ba, kite ame ber kede dok me yomcuny, kun notte tye i akina omego!" 
Psalms133:2 Calo moo akur ame oonyo i wie, ame mol bino piny naka i tik dano, dok calo moo ame rik omol i wi Aron obino piny naka i tike, ame omol te tuno naka i lak boŋo me arwa mere." 
Psalms133:3 Dok daŋ rom aroma i toyo ame tye i wi kidi me Kermon, ame totona piny i wi kidi me Cion! Pien kuno obedo kan ame Rwot ociko me lamo iye winyo, kede miyo kwo ame perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms134:1 Bye wunu, me ibin ipwo wunu Rwot, wun omiro a Rwot luŋ, ame cuŋ i ot a Rwot dyewor." 
Psalms134:2 Tiŋ wunu ciŋwu malo, itaŋ wunu i kabedo man acil, eka ite pwoyo wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms134:3 Rwot myero miwu winyo i Cion, Rwot ame oketo polo kede lobo!" 
Psalms135:1 Pak wunu Rwot, Pak wunu nyiŋ Rwot, pak wunu nyiŋe, wun omiro mere ducu," 
Psalms135:2 wun ame icuŋ wunu i ot a Rwot, i dyekal me ot Obaŋawa!" 
Psalms135:3 Pak wunu Rwot, pien en ber, wer wunu wer me pako nyiŋe, pien en akica!" 
Psalms135:4 Pien Rwot otyeko yero Yakobo me bedo mege en ikome, jo Icrael obedo lwakkere en ikome." 
Psalms135:5 Pien an aŋeo gira ni Rwot dwoŋ meicel, dok daŋ aŋeo ni Rwot loo cal jogi ducu ame olwoŋo ni Obaŋa," 
Psalms135:6 Ginnoro keken ame en Rwot mito, timo, i polo karacel kede i lobo, i nam kede i pii atut ame tye piny i te lobo." 
Psalms135:7 En ame mio pol tiŋere malo i agikki lobo, en ame mio lutkot meny, kot te cwe, en acwao yamo i ot kano jami mere, yamo te kodo." 
Psalms135:8 En ame rik oneko itino kao me Miciri, itino kao a dano kede me a leyi;" 
Psalms135:9 en daŋ rik otio taŋo kede gigi mogo me awura meicel i Miciri, kun pwodo kede Parao karacel kede omiro mere ducu." 
Psalms135:10 En daŋ rik oneko rok apapat apol meicel, oneko naka obakki mogo ame tek meicel." 
Psalms135:11 Cikon, abaka a jo Amor, kede Oga baka a jo Bacan, kede oloc ducu ame loo lobo apapat ame tye i Kanan." 
Psalms135:12 Omio lobogi oko me bedo me alea, omio me bedo me alea a jo mere Icrael." 
Psalms135:13 Nyiŋi gire perakino nakanaka, Ama Rwot, dok nyiŋi daŋ medde i rwo i kare a lwagi jo me kare ducu." 
Psalms135:14 Pien Rwot bino miyo jo mere loo kop, kica bino make i kom omiro mere," 
Psalms135:15 Cal jogi a rok apapat, obedo gin ame otio i ryal kede jabu, dok jo en ame otio kede ciŋgi kengi." 
Psalms135:16 Doggi tye cite mom okobo, waŋgi daŋ tye, cite mom oneno ginnoro." 
Psalms135:17 Yitgi tye, cite mom owinyo kop; wumgi daŋ tye, cite mom oweo kadi acel." 
Psalms135:18 Jo ame tiogi, rom aroma kedgi, dok jo ame keto gen i komgi daŋ rom aroma kedgi." 
Psalms135:19 Wun jo Icrael, gen wunu Rwot! Wun jo me ot Aron, myero igen wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms135:20 Wun jo me ot a Levi, gen wunu Rwot! Wun jo luŋ ame lworo Rwot, gen wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms135:21 Pwo wunu Rwot i Cion, pien en bedo i Jerucalem! Pwo wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms136:1 Pwowunu Rwot, pienenber, marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms136:2 Pwo wunu Obaŋa ame loo obaŋe ocele luŋ, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms136:3 Pwo wunu Rwot ame loo rwode luŋ, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms136:4 En kene ame tio gigi mogo me awura meicel, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms136:5 En oketo polo kede ryeko mere, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka," 
Psalms136:6 en opepeto lobo me wumo pii atut ame tye piny, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka," 
Psalms136:7 en oketo gigi mogo adoŋo ame ryeny menyo piny, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka," 
Psalms136:8 en oketo ceŋ me loyo dyeceŋ, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka," 
Psalms136:9 en oketo dwe kede acer me loyo dyewor, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka," 
Psalms136:10 en oneko itino kao awobe me Miciri, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:11 eka te kwanyo jo Icrael oko i akinagi, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:12 kun kwanyogi pi teko me bade kede ciŋe ame oryeo; pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka. 
Psalms136:13 En opoko nam arema aryo i dyere, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:14 te miyo jo Icrael kato i dyere naka loka tuŋ-ca; pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka; 
Psalms136:15 ento Parao kede monnyere te miyo mwony oko i Nam Arema pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka. 
Psalms136:16 En ame rik otelo lwakkere i dye tim, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:17 en ame oneko twoni obakki mogo adoŋo doŋo; pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka; 
Psalms136:18 en daŋ oneko obakki mogo ame rik ŋeye meicel, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:19 oneko Cikon, ame obedo abaka a jo Amor, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:20 oneko daŋ Og, ame obedo abaka a jo Bacan, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:21 omio lobogi oko me alea a lwakkere, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:22 omio me alea baŋ jo mere ame obedo jo Icrael; pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka; 
Psalms136:23 en ame rik opo pirwa i kare ame doŋ otye arac meicel, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:24 eka te larowa i ciŋ okworwa, pien marrere amom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms136:25 En ame mio cam baŋ ginnoro luŋ ame tye kwo, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:26 Pwo wunu Obaŋa me polo, pien marrere a mom lokere perakino nakanaka." 
Psalms137:1 Rik obedo piny i ŋet kulo me Babulon, ote kok kuno atek i kare ame opo pi Cion." 
Psalms137:2 Oŋabo naŋa opukwa malo, i kor yen ame tye i dog kulo kuno, lo ame onwoŋo omakowa me terowa iyi opii, openyowa ni myero owerrigi werroro," 
Psalms137:3 Jo ame odiowa openyowa me werrigi werroro me yomoro cunygi, kun okobo ni, “Werriwa wunu werrogo me Cion.”" 
Psalms137:4 Wan otwero wero wer a Rwot, i lobo a rok ocele i yore aŋo?" 
Psalms137:5 Jerucalem we, ka ce wia owil i komi, ciŋa me tuŋ cem myero mit oko!" 
Psalms137:6 Leba myero mok oko i dana, ka ce mom apo piri, ka mom atamo piri, yin Jerucalem, acalo gin ame yomoro cunya akato ducu!" 
Psalms137:7 Po pi kare ame Jerucalem oneno can iye, Ama Rwot, icul waŋe i kom jo Edom, Poyo kite ame onwoŋo gin kobo kede ni, “Mumuko wunu apama mere oko, mumuko irereto wunu piny, naka iyi acakki tere!”" 
Psalms137:8 Yin Babulon, yin ayak! Ŋat ame bino culo kworwa i komi, kede gin ame itimo i komwa, bino bedo i yomcuny!" 
Psalms137:9 Ŋat ame bino mako itinoni atino, te bedo reretogi i kom kidi, bino bedo i yomcuny!" 
Psalms138:1 Apwoi kede cunya ducu, Ama Rwot, awero wer me paki naka i nyim cal jogi." 
Psalms138:2 Aryebere piny i nyimi i odi acil, ate pako nyiŋi pi marri a mom lokere, pien yin igenne; Pien nyiŋi kede koppi loo jami ducu." 
Psalms138:3 Pien rik akok baŋi, yin igamo doga, rik ite medda tekcuny." 
Psalms138:4 Obakki luŋ me wi lobo bino paki, Ama Rwot, pien gin doŋ otyeko winyo kop ame yin ikomi ikobo." 
Psalms138:5 Gin bino wero wer pi gin ame yin Rwot itio, pien kwogo ame yin Rwot itye kede dwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms138:6 Kadi bed yin Rwot ibedo malo kannabor meicel, cite pwod iparo pi ocan ame mwol, ento jo ame wakere, yin iŋeogi oko i kannabor." 
Psalms138:7 Kadi bed awoto ame can ogura oko dyere, yin gire pwod igwoko kwona; iryeo ciŋi me juko akemo okworra, ite lara oko i ciŋi me tuŋ cem." 
Psalms138:8 Rwot bino cobo yik luŋ ame en tye kede pira; mar meri a mom lokere bedo nakanaka, Ama Rwot. Kur iwek gin ame yin itio i ciŋi ata." 
Psalms139:1 Ama Rwot, yin iŋia, ite daŋ ŋeya!" 
Psalms139:2 Yin iŋea kadi abedo piny onyo aya malo, yin gire iŋea; yin iniaŋ tam ame tye i cunya oko i kannabor." 
Psalms139:3 Yin iŋio kwona kede butona piny, iŋeo doŋ aber kite ame an abedo kede ducu," 
Psalms139:4 Kudi ame mom ru akobo kopporo, yin doŋ iŋeo koppa luŋ i yore i yore, Ama Rwot," 
Psalms139:5 Yin ityeko gura oko dyere tuŋ nyima kede i ŋea, ciŋi mom rwenyo i koma me gwoka,"
