Psalms139:6 Ŋec ame yin itye kede-nono, malo meicel i tuŋ baŋa, malo meicel, ame an mom aromo niaŋ iye kadi acel." 
Psalms139:7 Atwero wot kwene me pono i baŋi? Abino riŋo kwene me riŋo i nyimi? 
Psalms139:8 Kadi ayit malo i polo, yin itye kuno! Kadi abut piny i lyel, yin daŋ itye kuno!" 
Psalms139:9 Kadi atwarre awot malo calo ru-a piny, ate wot bedo i dog nammoro ame tye kannabor meicel," 
Psalms139:10 kuno daŋ ciŋi pwod bino tela, ibino bedo tye kuno me konya i ciŋi tuŋ cem," 
Psalms139:11 Ka ce akobo ni, “Colpiny en ame myero doŋ wuma, dok lero piny ame atye iye dok oko acol,”" 
Psalms139:12 colpiny daŋ mom tye acalo colpiny baŋi, i baŋi dyewor rom aroma dyeceŋ; pien colpiny rom aroma i lero baŋi." 
Psalms139:13 Pien yin en iyiko dul koma ducu, yin en ame icwea iyi totta." 
Psalms139:14 Abino paki, pien yin en ibedo gi-alwora kede me awura meicel! Itio tic me awura okato kare! Yin iŋea aber odoco;" 
Psalms139:15 yin iŋeo kite ame cogo koma okukuba kede luŋ, i kare ame ocwea iyi totta, i kare ame ocweo koma i muŋ i twon diro adwoŋ meicel, piny i te lobo." 
Psalms139:16 Ineno koma kede waŋi kun mom ru ocweo otum, dul koma acel acel tye ocoo oko i bukki, kun dul koma moro mom ru ocweo onwoŋo doŋ imoko kare me kwona oko." 
Psalms139:17 Tammi malo nadi, Ama Obaŋa! welgi gire mom romo kwanne kadi acel." 
Psalms139:18 Ka ce akobo ni akwano welgi, welgi pol kato kwoyo oko. Ka ce aco i waŋ nino, nwoŋo pwod atye baŋi." 
Psalms139:19 An onwoŋo amito ni kono ineko jo areco oko, Ama Obaŋa, me jo ame onyo remo a jo wadgi, rwenyo oko i baŋa," 
Psalms139:20 gin jo-nono obedo kobo kop areco i komi, Ama Rwot, otiŋere malo kun okobo kop arac ame balo nyiŋi." 
Psalms139:21 Ama Rwot, an mom adago jo ame dagi? Dok cunya mom okwero jo ame mito lweny i komi?" 
Psalms139:22 An adagogi i cunya ducu; gin tye acalo okworra. 
Psalms139:23 Ŋi kwona i diro, Ama Obaŋa, me iŋe gin ame tye i cunya, koŋ itema, me iŋe kan ame tam tye iye." 
Psalms139:24 Me inen ka atye ka umo ginoro ame rac, ite tela i yo ame parakino nakanaka." 
Psalms140:1 Lara i ciŋ jo areco, Ama Rwot, gwoka daŋ i ciŋ jo ame timo tim me byemi." 
Psalms140:2 Ame yiko koppogo areco i cunygi, dok omaro ero lweny tere i tere." 
Psalms140:3 Kop ame ya i doggi kec calo kwir a twol, kwir codocodo tye i te lebgi." 
Psalms140:4 Gwoka, Ama Rwot, gwoka i ciŋ otim tim areco, gwoka daŋ i ciŋ jo ame timo tim me byemi, gin doŋ otyeko yiko kop meretta." 
Psalms140:5 Jo awakere otyeko ciko owicgi kan adin pira, ociko owic kede tol kun omito maka kede, ociko owic i ŋet yo ducu ame kura akura." 
Psalms140:6 Akobo baŋ Rwot ni, “Yin ibedo Obaŋana”; cik yiti iwiny kwacca ame abako kede doga baŋi, Ama Rwot." 
Psalms140:7 Ama Rwot, ame obedo Rwotta, ka larrena atek ame an ageno, yin ibedo tok me wumo wia i kare me lweny," 
Psalms140:8 Ama Rwot, kur imi jo areco gin ame gin omito pe iye yikgi areco cobere." 
Psalms140:9 Kur imi jo ame lwenyo i koma loa mi kopgi areco ame gin onwoŋo, omito timo, dok i komgi." 
Psalms140:10 Mi loti mac alyet ocorre i komgi, owaŋgi! migi orette i bur atut meicel, ame mom dok oromo yaa." 
Psalms140:11 Mi jo ame kobo kop me balo nyiŋ owotegi, bed pe i lobo mi can ru neko jo a kitegi reco oko oyotoyot." 
Psalms140:12 Aŋeo ni Rwot pido pi jo ame ocan, dok ŋolo kop kakare pi jo a piny oloo." 
Psalms140:13 Ateteni, jo ame kitegi atira bino pwoyi, jo ame cunygi ler, bino bedo i nyimi." 
Psalms141:1 Akok baŋi, Ama Rwot, ru bino baŋa oyotoyot! cik yiti iwiny dwona ka akok baŋi," 
Psalms141:2 mi kwacca bed calo odok akur ame owaŋo i nyimi me yalli, kede ciŋa ame ataŋo baŋi bed acalo mot ame omio me yalli otyeno." 
Psalms141:3 Gwok doga, Ama Rwot, dok inen kite ame aŋamo kede doga me kop." 
Psalms141:4 Kur imia aketto cunya i timo gin arac, kwer ribere i jo areco i timo tim areco, dok kur abed wot i jo ame woto timo bal, kur imia aribere kedgi i camo cam amito ame gin omito." 
Psalms141:5 Mi ŋat a kite ber onyo goa i cuny me kica, cite kur iwek moo a lo arac gud wia kadi acel, pien an akwai gira kare ducu, atimo mannono, pien adag tim areco." 
Psalms141:6 Ka omiogi i ciŋ jo me ŋolo kop, gin bino cako ŋeyo ni kop a Rwot tye ateni." 
Psalms141:7 Cogogi obino keto atata i dog lyel, calo kidi ame ka dano obaro kikira atataa i lobo;" 
Psalms141:8 Ento an gira aciko waŋa i komi, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, ayenyo ka larre baŋi, kur iweka ame mom igwoka." 
Psalms141:9 Gwoka me kur amok iyi owic ame gin ocika kede, gwoka daŋ kur amok i boo otim tim areco." 
Psalms141:10 Mi jo areco mok i boogi ame gin ociko, ento an abwot ame ginnoro mom otima." 
Psalms142:1 Akok baŋ Rwot i dwona aloŋo akok i dwona aloŋo kun abako kede doga baŋe," 
Psalms142:2 Acwalo kokona i nyime i dwon aloŋo, kun atitte peko ame atye kede." 
Psalms142:3 Ka cunya doŋ odoko agoro oko, yin iŋeo gin ame myero atim. Okworra ociko owic pira, i yo ame an alubo kare ducu." 
Psalms142:4 Aloko waŋa aneno tuŋ cem, mom onwoŋo dano moro ame myero konya; mom anwoŋo kannoro ame odoŋ ame aromo riŋo alaro, mom daŋ aneno dano moro ame paro pira." 
Psalms142:5 Akok baŋi, Ama Rwot; an akobbi gira ni, yin en ibedo ka larrena, yin en ibedo gin ame opokka i lobo a jo akwo." 
Psalms142:6 Tim ber iwiny kokona; pien piny doŋ oloa meicel! Lara i ciŋ jo ame tye ka wuna, pien gin otek meicel okata oko." 
Psalms142:7 Kwanya oko i ot kol, me ami pwocca i nyiŋi. Jo ame kitegi atira, bino gura dyere, pien pi berri yin itio keda aber." 
Psalms143:1 Winy kwacca, Ama Rwot; winy kwacca ame abako kede doga i nyimi, pi gen ame yin itye kede, gam doga; kite acalo yin kiteni atira." 
Psalms143:2 Kur icak ŋolo kop i kom amironi; pien mom tye dano moro akwo ame kite atira i nyimi. 
Psalms143:3 Pien akwor tye ka ryemo yora, odia doŋ okato kare, omia doŋ abedo kannacol calo dano ame yam otyeko to con." 
Psalms143:4 Mannono omio cunya doŋ odoko agoro meicel, mom dok atye kede ginnoro i cunya kadi acel." 
Psalms143:5 Apo doŋ i kom kare mogo ame doŋ okato oko con, ate bedo lwodo kop i cunya i kom gigi mogo ame yin itimo, ginnoro luŋ ame yin itimo bino i tamma." 
Psalms143:6 Aryeo ciŋa kun ataŋo baŋi i kare me kwayi, keo me neni omio cunya two atowa calo lobo ame pii mom iye." 
Psalms143:7 Ama Rwot, ru ba gamo doga, cunya doŋ amito cot oko! Kur iponna oko ba, naka mia abedo calo jo ame awot donyo piny i lyel." 
Psalms143:8 Mia awiny pi marri a mom lokere odiko con, pien an genna tye i komi, Pwonya me lubo yo ame yin imito, pien an acwao kwacca luŋ baŋi." 
Psalms143:9 Lara ba, Ama Rwot, i ciŋ okworra! An doŋ atyeko riŋo alaro baŋi." 
Psalms143:10 Pwonya me timo gin ame yin imito, pien yin ibedo Obaŋana! Mi cunnyi aber en ame tela, i yo ame oporre arorom!" 
Psalms143:11 Gwok kwona ba, Ama Rwot, pi nyiŋi, kwanya oko i can i kiteni atira!" 
Psalms143:12 Pi marri a mom lokere, mi waŋ okworra rweny oko i akina turgi, nek okworra luŋ ityek oko ducu, pien an abedo amironi." 
Psalms144:1 Rwot ame obedo ka larrena tek, dok opwo, Rwot ame opwonyo ciŋa i lweny, karacel kede anyira ciŋa luŋ." 
Psalms144:2 En obedo ka larrena atek ame ogeno, en obedo cel atek ame apono iye, dok en ame daŋ lara, en tye acalo kwot me gwoko koma, ame ariŋo alaro baŋe. Rok luŋ tye i te loccere" 
Psalms144:3 Dano kara obedo gin aŋo ame mio ibedo tamo pire? dano amwa-ni obedo gin aŋo ame mio yin ibedo gwoke? 
Psalms144:4 Dano rom aroma i yamo me weo, kare me kwo mere daŋ calo tipo ame rweny oko-ni." 
Psalms144:5 Ama Rwot, wa polo i dwoggo piny, me iyito piny! gud kom kiddi me yito duny iye!" 
Psalms144:6 Mi lutkot meny, me okworri keketa oko i ŋwec, celgi ateroni me komgi radde atata." 
Psalms144:7 Rye ciŋi i malo kuno, lara, ikwanya oko i pii atut, lara i ciŋ orok," 
Psalms144:8 ame kop me goba keken en ame ya i doggi, ame ciŋgi me tuŋ cem kwoŋo ka kwoŋ me goba keken." 
Psalms144:9 Abino wero wer anyen baŋi, Ama Obaŋa, abino paki, kun agoo naŋa ame tollere tye apar," 
Psalms144:10 Yin en imio loc baŋ obakki, dok yin en ame rik ilaro amironi Daudi." 
Psalms144:11 Lara i lak pala lweny ame bit meicel, dok ilara i ciŋ okworra, ame kop me goba keken en ame ya i doggi, dok ame ciŋgi me tuŋ cem kwoŋo ka kwoŋ me goba." 
Psalms144:12 Mi itino awobewa bed calo ginapita ame doŋ otyeko doŋo oko, cakere i kare me tinogi, mi anyirawa bed calo pagi ame tye i gul me ot, ame otoŋo me gero paco abaka." 
Psalms144:13 Cam myero poŋ apoŋa i derewa, kun wit cam apapat tye iye; rommiwa myero nywal itino tutumia i tutumia, kede dok tutumia apar i bar me kwatwa." 
Psalms144:14 Dokwa daŋ myero nya apol meicel, yigi myero kur ony, moro i akinagi daŋ myero kur bed ame mom nywal, koko moro me can myero kur winyere i yo moro ame tye i bomawa." 
Psalms144:15 Jo ame kodi gummono bino poto i komgi, tye kede yomcuny! Jo ame Rwot obedo Obaŋagi, tye kede gum!" 
Psalms145:1 Abino wero wer me dwori, Ama Obaŋana kede Abakana, abino pako nyiŋi nakanaka." 
Psalms145:2 Abino pwoyi nino ducu, dok abino pako nyiŋi nakanaka." 
Psalms145:3 Rwot dwoŋ meicel, dok myero daŋ pake meicel, dwoŋŋere mom romo kobere kadi acel." 
Psalms145:4 Lwagi jo me kare i kare bino pako tic ame yin itio baŋ itinogi, kun otittigi ticcogo adoŋodoŋo ame yin itio." 
Psalms145:5 Cunya bino lwodo kop i kom ticcogo me awura ame yin itio, kede i kom kwogo me dwoŋ a locci." 
Psalms145:6 Jo bino rabo kop i kom ticcogo ame iyiliyili ame yin itio, an daŋ abino titto pi ditti." 
Psalms145:7 Gin bino miyo berri rwo meicel i kabedo ducu, kun daŋ owero i dwon aloŋo pi kiteni atira." 
Psalms145:8 Rwot akica dok maro dano, akemo mom mako oyot, dok marrere a mom lokere, dwoŋ meicel." 
Psalms145:9 Rwot ber baŋ jo ducu, dok kica make i kom ginnoro luŋ ame en oketo." 
Psalms145:10 Ginnoro luŋ ame yin itio, bino pwoyi, Ama Rwot, dok joni luŋ acil bino paki." 
Psalms145:11 Gin bino kobo kop i kom kwogo me locci, kun daŋ otito pi twer ame yin itye kede," 
Psalms145:12 me jo luŋ ŋe twer me ticci, kede kwogo adwoŋ ame tye i locci," 
Psalms145:13 Locci obedo loc ame perakino nakanaka, pi lwagi a jo me kare ducu, Rwot genne i ginnoro luŋ ame en kobo, dok daŋ kica mako ticcere luŋ ame en tio." 
Psalms145:14 Rwot mako jo ame mito rette piny, dok mio jo luŋ ame piny oloo ya malo." 
Psalms145:15 Jo luŋ ciko waŋgi i komi, yin imiogi cam i kare ame gin mito ikokome." 
Psalms145:16 Yin iyaro ciŋi, imio ginnoro akwo luŋ yeŋ." 
Psalms145:17 Tic a Rwot luŋ tye atira, ginnoro luŋ ame en timo mar mom rwenyo iye," 
Psalms145:18 Rwot ceggi acega baŋ jo luŋ ame kok baŋe, jo ame kok baŋe iyi ateni." 
Psalms145:19 En cobo miti a jo luŋ ame lwore, dok daŋ winyo kokogi, te larogi." 
Psalms145:20 Rwot gwoko jo luŋ ame mare, ento otim tim areco luŋ en bino nekogi oko." 
Psalms145:21 An abino pako gira Rwot kare ducu me ginnoro akwo luŋ pak nyiŋe nakanaka. 
Psalms146:1 Pak wunu Rwot. Pak wunu Rwot, yin tipona!" 
Psalms146:2 Abino pako Rwot pi kare me kwona luŋ, abino wero wer me pako Obaŋana kun pwod akwo," 
Psalms146:3 Kur ibed keto genwu i kom rwode, kur iket genwu i kom dano amwa-ni ame mom romo konyowu kede ginnoro." 
Psalms146:4 Ame ka kwo mere oya oko i kome dok oko i lobo, yikkere luŋ ame yam en oyiko te gik luŋ karacel kede i ninonono ikome." 
Psalms146:5 Dano ame nwoŋo kony i baŋ Obaŋa a Yakobo tye kede winyo, ame gennere tye i kom Rwot Obaŋa mere," 
Psalms146:6 ame oketo polo kede lobo kede nam, kede jami luŋ ame tye i yigi, ame gennere mom rwenyo kadi acel" 
Psalms146:7 ame ŋolo kop a jo ame owuno kakare, dok mio cam baŋ jo ame kec nekogi. Rwot gonyo jo ame otweo oko i ot kol," 
Psalms146:8 en yabo waŋ jo ame waŋgi oto, Rwot mio jo ame piny oloo ya malo, en maro jo ame kitegi atira." 
Psalms146:9 Rwot gwoko arok ame bedo i lobo a jo ocele, en konyo mon a coggi oto kede itino kic; ento yik a jo areco, en balo oko, mom te cobere." 
Psalms146:10 Rwot bino loc gire nakanaka, Obaŋani, yin Cion, perakino pi lwagi jo me kare ducu. Pak wunu Rwot!" 
Psalms147:1 Pak wunu Rwot. Pien wero wer me pako Obaŋa, ber, wero wer me pake, ber, pien en obedo akica," 
Psalms147:2 Rwot tye ka gero Jerucalem odoco; en coko jo Icrael ame yam okeketa atata dwokogi cen paco. 
Psalms147:3 Jo ame cunygi cwer, en caŋogi, dok daŋ tweo waŋ burgi." 
Psalms147:4 En moko wel acer ducu, dok daŋ cakki ŋat acel acel i akinagi nyiŋe." 
Psalms147:5 Rwotwa dwoŋ dok tek meicel; niaŋŋere tut a mom kobbere. 
Psalms147:6 Rwot tiŋo jo ame onyono piny malo, otim tim areco, en retogi piny i lobo." 
Psalms147:7 Wer wunu wer me pwoyo Rwot, wer wunu wer me pako Obaŋawa, kun igoo wunu agoa i naŋa opuk," 
Psalms147:8 En wumo polo oko kede pol, en yiko kot ame cwe i lobo, dok en mio lum doŋo i lobo obedo kidikidi." 
Psalms147:9 En mio leyi me tim camgi, dok pito daŋ itino agak ame kok baŋe," 
Psalms147:10 Teko aguragura mom en a yomoro cunye, akadi tyen dano ame aŋwec daŋ mom yomoro cunye;" 
Psalms147:11 Ento Rwot cunye yom i kom jo ame lwore, kede i kom jo ame geŋo mar a mom lokere," 
Psalms147:12 Pak Rwot, yin Jerucalem! Pak Obaŋani, Yin Cion!" 
Psalms147:13 Pien en ame mio nyony me cego doggolani bedo atek, dok en daŋ ame mio itinoni gum." 
Psalms147:14 En ame mio kuc bedo tye i waŋ apokki me loboni, dok en ame daŋ piti kede ŋano aber ame kato luŋ." 
Psalms147:15 En amio cikkere i lobo, koppere dwir meicel." 
Psalms147:16 En mio pee makere atar calo yer romo, dok keto bwo pee oko atata calo buru." 
Psalms147:17 En cwalo pee piny, calo kwon ame oŋiŋido, na ame twero cuŋ i ŋico ame en ocwao?" 
Psalms147:18 En a daŋ cwao koppere te miyo pee meye oko, miyo yamo kodo, pii te mol oko." 
Psalms147:19 En kobo koppere baŋ Yakobo, cikkere luŋ kede ginnoro luŋ ame en ociko, en tito baŋ jo Icrael." 
Psalms147:20 En mom obedo tic i rokkoro ocele kittono, mom tye rokkoro ocele ame ŋeo gin ame en ociko luŋ, Pak wunu Rwot." 
Psalms148:1 Pak wunu Rwot! Pak Rwot, yin polo, pake i malo kuno," 
Psalms148:2 Wun omalaika mere luŋ, pake wunu, kede wun dul monnyere daŋ, pake wunu!" 
Psalms148:3 Wun ceŋ kede dwe, pake wunu, wun acer ame ryeny, pake wunu!" 
Psalms148:4 Pake wunu, wun polo ame tye malo twal, pake wunu, wun pii ame tye malo i polo!" 
Psalms148:5 Ginnoro luŋ myero pak nyiŋ Rwot! Pien en ociko acika keken, gin te bedo tye." 
Psalms148:6 En te ketogi i kabedogi me bedo iye, waŋ i waŋ; en te moko waŋ apokkigi oko ame mom oromo kato." 
Psalms148:7 Wun jami luŋ ame tye i lobo, pak wunu Rwot, wun nyaŋ adoŋo me yi nam, kede wun nam atut adoŋodoŋo," 
Psalms148:8 wun mac kede pee, toyo kede ŋico, kede wun yamo ajuru ame kodo atek pi cobo gin ame en omito!" 
Psalms148:9 Pake wunu, wun kiddi kede lobo luŋ obedo kidikidi, wun yen luŋ ame nyako nyiggi kede yen cedar!" 
Psalms148:10 Wun leyi me tim kede dok luŋ, gin akwo ame lak alaka i lobo, karacel kede winy ame twarre malo!" 
Psalms148:11 Pake wunu, wun obakki me lobo karacel kede rok luŋ, wun rwode kede oloc luŋ me lobo." 
Psalms148:12 Awobe kede anyira karacel, jo oti kede jo atino!" 
Psalms148:13 Pak wunu nyiŋ Rwot, pien nyiŋe keken en ame dwoŋ alo luŋ; kwogo mere daŋ, kato polo kede lobo oko." 
Psalms148:14 En doŋ omio lwakkere odoko atek, en ame omio jo mere ducu myero pake, jo Icrael pire tekke meicel. Pak wunu Rwot." 
Psalms149:1 Wer wunu wer anyen baŋ Rwot, wer wunu wer me pake i cokere ajo acil!" 
Psalms149:2 Wun jo Icrael, cunywu myero bed ayom i kom Obaŋa ame oketowu, wun jo Cion, myero ibed wunu i yomcuny pi abakawu." 
Psalms149:3 Myero ipak wunu nyiŋe kun imyelo wunu amyela, dok myero igo wunu bul kede naŋa me pake." 
Psalms149:4 Pien Rwot cunye yom i kom lwakkere, en mio jo amwol kwogo i loyo lweny," 
Psalms149:5 Wun jo ame gene, natte wunu i kwogo, myero wer wer me yomcuny iyi aramagi." 
Psalms149:6 Myero ower wer me pako Obaŋa atek i dwon aloŋo, dok omak pala romo ame lebe bit ryoryo i ciŋgi," 
Psalms149:7 me culo kwor i kom rok ocel, kede dok me pwodo lwak a rok apol," 
Psalms149:8 me tweyo obakkigi oko kede jegere, kede tweyo jogi adoŋo ame oworo luŋ i nyor me nyonyo," 
Psalms149:9 kede ŋolo kop i komgi kite ame yam ocoo! Man en kwogo pi jo mere luŋ ame gene. Pak wunu Rwot. 
Psalms150:1 Pak wunu Rwot. Pak wunu Obaŋa kabedo mere acil; pake wunu daŋ i polo mere atek. 
Psalms150:2 Pake wunu, pi gigi mogo adoŋodoŋo ame en otio; pake wunu kite acalo en dwoŋ kede wok-ki!" 
Psalms150:3 Pake wunu, kun ikuto wunu apel pake wunu i naŋa kede naŋa opuk." 
Psalms150:4 Pake wunu ajaa kun daŋ imyelo wunu, pake wunu okeme kede nyamulere." 
Psalms150:5 Pake wunu i bul ame kok aloŋo, pake wunu atimo ame kok i dwon aloŋo meicel." 
Psalms150:6 Myero ginnoro akwo luŋ ame we, pak Rwot! Pak wunu Rwot!" 
Proverbs1:1 Magi carokop a Culeman, wot a Daudi, abaka me Icrael." 
Proverbs1:2 Carokop magi konyo dano me ŋeyo ryeko kede pwony aber, kede niaŋ koppogo ame te koppere tut meicel." 
Proverbs1:3 Dok twero pwonyo dano me bedo aryek i ginnoro luŋ ame en tio, kun kite atira, ŋolo kop atira, dok tero jo luŋ arom aroma." 
Proverbs1:4 Pwonyo ŋat a mom i ŋeccoro doko dano ame ŋeo piny, mio jo atino bedo jo ame ŋeo gwoko kitegi i gin ame otimo." 
Proverbs1:5 Konyo ŋat aryek me medo pwonyere mere, dok mio ŋat ame niaŋ atut ŋeo gin ame myero etim," 
Proverbs1:6 me niaŋ te kop me carokop kede gigi mogo ame okobo kop i komgi, kede kop a jo aryek, karacel kede icina mogo ame oceko," 
Proverbs1:7 Dano cako bedo kede ŋec, ka ce lworo Rwot, jo amiŋ mom paro pi bedo kede ryeko, dok okwero pwonyere oko." 
Proverbs1:8 Atinna, winy gin ame pappi pwonyi kede, kur daŋ ikwer winyo pwony a totti;" 
Proverbs1:9 pien pwonygi twero yubo kiti bedo aber, calo tok ame iketo i wii, onyo tigo ame iruko i ŋuti me miyi nen aber." 
Proverbs1:10 Atinna, ka ce jo areco obwoli, kur iye ba," 
Proverbs1:11 ka ce gin okobbi ni, “Biye iwot kedwa, me owot oki dano-moro onek oko olib lo a mom i bal onek oko," 
Proverbs1:12 me omwonygi akwo kite ame lyel mwonyo kede jo, omwonygi alutu kite ame to mwonyo kede dano," 
Proverbs1:13 Nen kit jami luŋ me wel bino doko megwa, jami ame oyako bino poŋ i udiwa oko;" 
Proverbs1:14 biye inotte kedwa, wan luŋ obino noto limwa karacel.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Atinna, kur inywak yo kedgi, kur ilub yorgi kadi acel." 
Proverbs1:16 Kodi jo-nono tyengi dwir me wot timo bal, komgi mit ata i onyo remo a jo." 
Proverbs1:17 Konyo kara ŋo me ciko tol, kun winyo ame iciko tye aneni?" 
Proverbs1:18 Kodi jo-nono obuto okio remogi kengi, gin olibo gigi kwogi kengi," 
Proverbs1:19 Mannono en kite a jo luŋ ame yako jami a jo tetek timgi miogi orwenyo kwogi. 
Proverbs1:20 Koŋ iwiny wunu ba lwoŋo a ryeko i dye yo; dwone loŋo aloŋa i cuk-gu: 
Proverbs1:21 naka atot i wi cel malo; naka i dogcel luŋ ame woto boma en kobo koppere iye ni," 
Proverbs1:22 “Kara ibino mito wunu bedo amiŋ kittono pi kare a rom mene wun jo ame mom i ŋeccoro? Ibino bedo lelo wunu i ŋalo jo naka awene ba, wun oŋal jo kede jo ame dag ŋec?" 
Proverbs1:23 Winy wunu koppa ka ce ajukowu; nen ba, an abino tito kop ame tye i cunya luŋ, abino miyowu iŋeo wunu tamma." 
Proverbs1:24 Pien an alwoŋowu, wun ite kwero wunu winyo oko, aryeo-gu ciŋa, cite ŋattoro mom oketo cunye iye." 
Proverbs1:25 Ikwero winyo wunu gin ame apwonyowu kede luŋ, mom iye wunu ni ajukwu kadi acel;" 
Proverbs1:26 Pi mannono ba, an abino nyerowu anyera ka can opoto i komwu, abino yetowu ayeta kare ame lworo doŋ ocirowu oko;" 
Proverbs1:27 kare ame lworo tye awunowu calo yamokot, ame can doŋ abino i komwu calo yamo ajuru, kun itye wunu i rem kede cwercuny adwoŋ," 
Proverbs1:28 Kare-nono en ame obino cako lwoŋa kede, cite mom gira abino gamo kadi acel; obino yenya atek meicel, cite mom gire obino nwoŋa," 
Proverbs1:29 Pien gin gigi mom omito bedo kede ŋec, dok mom oyero bedo kede lworo i kom Rwot." 
Proverbs1:30 Mom igamo wunu pwonnya moro kadi acel, kun mom iye wunu ni ajukwu kadi acel." 
Proverbs1:31 Mannono bino miyogi obilo adwoggi me yogi-nono, obino bedo i wi timgi areco-nono." 
Proverbs1:32 Pien jo a mom i ŋeccoro to pi lubo yo a mom omito, gin oto pi yomcunygi a mom oparo kede piny." 
Proverbs1:33 Cite ŋat ame bino winyo koppa, bino bedo i gin ame gwoke, bino bedo aber aboŋo ginnoro ame en lworo.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Atinna, ka ce iwinyo gin ame apwonyi kede, kun igwoko cikka luŋ i cunyi," 
Proverbs2:2 kun imio yiti bedo abit i winyo kop me ryeko, dok daŋ iketo cunyi me niaŋ;" 
Proverbs2:3 ka ce ibino kok pi niaŋ atut, kun icwalo kwacci pi bedo kede ŋec," 
Proverbs2:4 ka ce ibino yenyo calo ryal, kun iyenyo calo lonyo ame okano;" 
Proverbs2:5 mannono bino miyo iŋeo kop i kom lworo Rwot, dok daŋ ibino bedo kede ŋec i kom Obaŋa." 
Proverbs2:6 Pien Rwot gire en ame mio ryeko, ŋec kede niaŋ ya gire i kop ame en kobo." 
Proverbs2:7 En kano ryeko aber meicel pi jo ame cunygi atira, en bedo kwot ame gwoko jo a lube i cuny aler." 
Proverbs2:8 En gwoko jo ame ŋolo kop atira, gwoko daŋ jo ame omio kwogi i ciŋe." 
Proverbs2:9 Mannono bino miyo iniaŋ gin ame atira, kede tero jo arorom, ite lubo yo ame omito keken," 
Proverbs2:10 Pien ryeko bino donyo i cunyi, cunyi bino bedo yom me bedo kede ŋec." 
Proverbs2:11 Bedo kede ŋec atut bino gwoko kwoni, niaŋ aber bino gwoki." 
Proverbs2:12 Bino lari i yo me timo gin arac, kede i ciŋ jo ame dwanyo kop," 
Proverbs2:13 jo ame weko bedo i kite atira, kun omito wot i piny acol," 
Proverbs2:14 jo ame yigi yom i timo gin arac, jo ame lelo gigi alela i tim arac." 
Proverbs2:15 Gin jo ame mom genne kadi acel, ame lubo yo a mom atira," 
Proverbs2:16 Bino konyi me loyo tam a dako ame alaya, ame bwobwolo yin i kop amit me wayo tammi i kome," 
Proverbs2:17 dako ame weko cware ame enyomere kede a pwod tidi, kun wie wil oko i gwoko cikere Obaŋa mere;" 
Proverbs2:18 dako ame ka iwoto i ode nwoŋo iyenyo giri to, yo ame en lubo teri ka i lobo a jo oto," 
Proverbs2:19 Mom tye ŋattoro ame donyo baŋe te dok nwoŋo yo me dwogo cen akadi nwoŋo yo me dwogo i yo me kwo," 
Proverbs2:20 Pi mannono ba, myero ilub yo jo a kitegi atira, kur iya i yo a jo a kitegi atira." 
Proverbs2:21 Pien jo a cunygi atira bino bedo i lobowa, jo a cunygi ler bino bedo kuno." 
Proverbs2:22 Ento jo a kitegi reco waŋgi bino rwenyo oko i lobogi, wegi adote daŋ obino puputo oko acalo doo." 
Proverbs3:1 Atinna, myero wii kur wil i kom pwony ame apwonyi kede, kur imi cikka rweny oko i cunyi ba;" 
Proverbs3:2 pwonya-nono bino miyo ibedo i lobo pi mwakki apol, kun itye i kuc kede lonyo adwoŋ." 
Proverbs3:3 Kur iwek mar kede ateni ya oko i cunyi, tim ber itwegi i ŋuti, coogi kom i cunyi twal." 
Proverbs3:4 Mannono bino miyo Obaŋa kede dano pwoyi, dok obedo kede tam aber komi." 
Proverbs3:5 Gen Rwot kede cunyi ducu, kur ijeŋere i kom ryeko ame itye kede." 
Proverbs3:6 Po pi Rwot i ginnoro luŋ ame itio, en bino miyo yoni bedo apwot." 
Proverbs3:7 Kur ibed tamo piri keni ni iryek, cite myero ilwor Rwot, kun iweko timo gin arac." 
Proverbs3:8 Mannono bino bedo yat me juko rem i komi, kede gin ame meddi teko." 
Proverbs3:9 Nyut woroni baŋ Rwot i ginnoro luŋ ame itye kede, karacel kede cammi ame ogeo cek:" 
Proverbs3:10 mannono bino miyo deroni poŋ i cam adwoŋ, koŋo olok anyen bino bedo adwoŋ okato kare oko." 
Proverbs3:11 Atinna, pe myero ica pwony a Rwot ba, kur daŋ iol ka ce en bedo juki," 
Proverbs3:12 pien Rwot juko jo ame en maro, kite ame apap juko kede wode ame cunye tye i kome." 
Proverbs3:13 Ŋat ame tye kede ryeko tye kede yomcuny, karacel kede ŋat ame ŋeo ŋiyo te kop kakare," 
Proverbs3:14 Pien gin a ya iye aber kato en ame lim kelo oko; dok agoba mere bup kato me lonyo oko. 
Proverbs3:15 Gin luŋ obedo me wel akato tigo ŋut amimila oko, mom tye ginnoro ame imito ame otwero poro kede." 
Proverbs3:16 Perakino tye i ciŋe tuŋ cem, eka lonyo kede kwogo te bedo i ciŋe tuŋ cam." 
Proverbs3:17 Yo mere opoŋ i yomcuny, kuc daŋ dwoŋ iye atek." 
Proverbs3:18 En obedo yat me kwo baŋ jo ame omako atek, jo ame olido odoco olwoŋo ni wegi yomcuny." 
Proverbs3:19 Ryeko a Rwot en omio acakki te lobo ocibere; polo daŋ omoko atek odoco pi niaŋŋere atut; 
Proverbs3:20 pii i te lobo ocako kukunya pi ŋec a Rwot; pol daŋ ocako onyo pii i bolo pi ŋeccere. 
Proverbs3:21 Atinna, gwok ryeko aber kede ryeko ame mio igwokere i gin ame itio kur imigi orweny oko i baŋi ba," 
Proverbs3:22 pien bino miyo ibedo i kwo i cunyi, dok acalo rukkoro me kwogo ame iruko i ŋuti." 
Proverbs3:23 Bino miyo iwoto aboŋo ginnoro ame yeli, aboŋo twomere i ginnoro." 
Proverbs3:24 Mom ibino bedo kede lworo moro ka ibedo piny, ibino nino giri aber meicel ka ce ibuto." 
Proverbs3:25 Kur ibed kede lworo pi cannogo ame poto atura, onyo to ame poto i kom jo areco;" 
Proverbs3:26 pien Rwot mom bino rwenyo i ŋeti me gwoki, en bino gwoko tyeni mom moko i owic." 
Proverbs3:27 Kur ikwer timo gin aber baŋ jo ame yin myero ikony, ka ce yin itye kede twer me tiyo." 
Proverbs3:28 Kur ikobbi awoti ni, “Koŋ iwot ite dwogo adwoga, abino miyi diki,” aco kun gin ame en amitonono tye baŋi." 
Proverbs3:29 Kur ibed kede yikkoro me timo gin arac i kom awotti, aco, en bedo i ŋetti kun tye kede gen i komi." 
Proverbs3:30 Kur ipyem i ŋattoro aboŋo te kop, kun en mom otimo ginnoro arac i komi." 
Proverbs3:31 Kur nyeko maki i kom lo ame abyemi, kur daŋ ipotto kite moro kadi acel;" 
Proverbs3:32 pien Rwot dag jo ame kitegi ogom, cite en geno jo ame cunygi ler." 
Proverbs3:33 Rwot ceno paco a jo areco, ento mio gum i paco a jo a kitegi atira." 
Proverbs3:34 Rwot mom mito jo ame oŋale, ento en nyuto kica mere baŋ jo ame mwol." 
Proverbs3:35 En mio jo aryek nwoŋo kwogo, cite omiŋo en miogi lewic." 
Proverbs4:1 Itino, winy wunu gin ame papawu pwonyowu kede, keto wunu cunywu i winyo koppere, me iniaŋ wunu atut;" 
Proverbs4:2 gin ame an apwonyowu kede ber, myero kur iwek wunu lubo." 
Proverbs4:3 I kare ame rik an pwod atin atidi, ame pwod atye i ciŋ onywalla, kun pappa kede totta mara meicel," 
Proverbs4:4 pappa rik obedo pwonya kun kobba ni, “Mi kop ame an apwonyi kedeni kur rweny i cunyi; kur imi cikka rweny i cunyi ba, me ibed kwo." 
Proverbs4:5 Kur imi wi wil iye, kur daŋ iwek gin ame apwonyi kede rweny oko i cunyi. Nwoŋ ryeko kede niaŋ atut." 
Proverbs4:6 Myero ibed ŋat ame maro ryeko, pien bino gwoki; myero imare, pien bino gwoki aber." 
Proverbs4:7 Gin me agege ame myero ige nwoŋo, en ryeko; ketto cunyi daŋ me bedo kede niaŋ atut a kato jami ducu." 
Proverbs4:8 Mar ryeko, pien bino miyi ibedo twon lo moro adwoŋ meicel; ka ce ilido aber, bino miyo jo keto kwogo i komi." 
Proverbs4:9 Ryeko bino miyo inwoŋo kwogo aber, bino miyo inwoŋo twon kwogo adwoŋ meicel.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Atinna, myero iwiny koppa, dok daŋ imak i cunyi, me wek iperakino i lobo kare alac." 
Proverbs4:11 An atyeko pwonyi doŋ oko i yo me ryeko, atyeko nyutti doŋ yo aber me aluba." 
Proverbs4:12 Ginnoro gire mom bino riye i nyimi i kare ame itye ka wot; ginnoro daŋ mom bino twomo tyeni i kare ame iŋwec. 
Proverbs4:13 Gwok gin ame apwonyi kede atek, kur imi rwennyi; gwok aber meicel, pien mano en kwoni." 
Proverbs4:14 Kur ilub yo jo areco, dok daŋ kur ilub kite otimo tim areco," 
Proverbs4:15 Wek yo-nono, kur ilubi; pokere oko i yo-nono ite kato giri," 
Proverbs4:16 Pien gin gigi mom onino ka mom ru otimo ginnoro arac; nino remogi ka mom ru omio ŋattoro opoto i bal. 
Proverbs4:17 Timo gin arac yeŋogi calo cam, tim me byemi mittigi calo koŋo olok ame gin omato." 
Proverbs4:18 Ento yo a jo a kitegi atira ryeny medde ameda, ame ryeny atek tuno ka piny doŋ odoko aler," 
Proverbs4:19 Aco yo a jo areco col icuc calo dyewor; ka ce ogatte mom daŋ oŋeo gin odipogi. 
Proverbs4:20 Atinna, myero iketo cunyi i winyo gin ame apwonyi kede; tim ber iwiny kop ame an akobo," 
Proverbs4:21 kur imi rweny oko i tammi ba, gwok aber meicel i cunyi," 
Proverbs4:22 Pien kelo kwo baŋ jo ame onwoŋo, dok doko yat me caŋo komgi." 
Proverbs4:23 Gwokere i kom tam ame itamo i cunyi, pien kwoni ocuŋ ka i gin ame yin itamo," 
Proverbs4:24 Kur ibed kobo koppogo a mom atira, kopporo a mom tye kakare myero kur ya i dogi," 
Proverbs4:25 Cik waŋi cuŋ atira i kom gin ame tye i nyimi, kur ilok waŋi kannoro ocele." 
Proverbs4:26 Keto cunyi iyo ame iwot iye keken, mannono bino miyo gin ame itiyo ducu bedo atira." 
Proverbs4:27 Pe igak tuŋ cem onyo tuŋ cam; ento myero kur itim gin arac. 
Proverbs5:1 Atinna, keto cunyi me winyo kop me ryeko ame akobbi, cik yiti me winyo niaŋ atut ame atye kede," 
Proverbs5:2 me wek ibed ŋat ame ryek, me kop ame ya i dogi bed ame nianere." 
Proverbs5:3 Pien kop ame ya i dog dako ame alaya lim calo kic, koppere mit calo moo;" 
Proverbs5:4 ento i agikki mere doko kec calo ipio, bit calo pala bat." 
Proverbs5:5 Dako-nono bino teri naka ito; yo ame en lubo woto piny i lyel. 
Proverbs5:6 En gire mom paro pi lubo yo ame tero jo i kwo, en bedo lubo yo atata kun nwoŋo mom ŋeo ka elubo yo ame omito." 
Proverbs5:7 Doŋ ba, atinna, aman doŋ myero iwiny koppa, myero kur wi wil lubo kop ame akobo." 
Proverbs5:8 Yin myero ibed bor i dako ame alaya, kur daŋ itun i doggola me ode;" 
Proverbs5:9 naka bino miyo oworo jo ocele kakari, eka jo a mom okica te neki oko, kun kare me toni mom ru oromo;" 
Proverbs5:10 naka mio lo moro ata nya i lonyoni oko, eka gin ame ibedo tic atek pire, te kobo oko i udi a jo ocele." 
Proverbs5:11 Bino miyo icur atek i kare me toni, i kare ame riŋo komi doŋ ojuŋere oko;" 
Proverbs5:12 bino miyo ikobo ni, “Piŋo kara rik akwero winyo pwony ame opwonya kede, ate cayo daŋ juk ame ojuka kede?" 
Proverbs5:13 Mom abedo winyo gin ame opwonnya rik pwonya kede, akwero tero yita oko baŋgi." 
Proverbs5:14 Aco koŋ doŋ inen kite ame nyiŋa doŋ rac kede baŋ jowa luŋ ame ocokere karacel.” Gum ame ibino nwogo pi bedo kede dakoni keken 
Proverbs5:15 Mat pii me taŋini keken, kede pii ame molo i akoŋŋi." 
Proverbs5:16 Kur imi pii me taŋini mol oko teŋe, kur imi poŋ atata i dye yo." 
Proverbs5:17 Gwok bed meri yin keni, ento kur imi bed me konyo jo ocele." 
Proverbs5:18 Gum myero bed i kom dakoni, yii myero bed ayom i kom dakoni ame inyomo i kare me tinoni," 
Proverbs5:19 waŋ pii aber en dakoni amwonya ame kweo cunyi, ber a dakoni myero bed ame yomoro cunyi i kare ducu, marrere myero lo kwoni me kare luŋ." 
Proverbs5:20 Atinna, piŋo kara iweko dako ame alaya loo kwoni oko? Piŋo kara ber a dako ocele en ame dok yomoro cunyi?" 
Proverbs5:21 Pien Rwot neno kwo a dano acel acel, en neno kan ame en woto iye luŋ." 
Proverbs5:22 Bal a lo arac tye acalo owic me cike, bal ame en timo-nono en ame en dok moko iye," 
Proverbs5:23 En bino to pien mom romo jukere kene, pi twon miŋo adwoŋ ame en tye kede, mio en rwenyo oko." 
Proverbs6:1 Atinna, ka ce icikere me culo baŋya awotti, ka ce iye jeŋo giri moro pi ŋattoro a mom iŋeo;" 
Proverbs6:2 Kop ame ikobo-nono nwoŋo doŋ odoko owic piri, nwoŋo doŋ imoko oko kop ame oya i dogi," 
Proverbs6:3 Pi mannono ba, atinna, myero itim kit man, me ilarre, pien yin nwoŋo itye ite twero awoti-naca. Myero iru wot baŋe, me ibak dogi, me en gonyi oko." 
Proverbs6:4 Kur inin ba, kur imi waŋi ba;" 
Proverbs6:5 lar kwoni calo atil ame laro kwo mere i baŋ twon adwar oken, kite ame winyo twarre kede oko iyi tol adwar," 
Proverbs6:6 Yin awackom myero inen kite ame mori tio kede; nen gin ame gin tio aber me ibed aryek. 
Proverbs6:7 Gin tye kede rwottoro ame kwaogi, mom daŋ otye i kit atelloro ducu me loyogi," 
Proverbs6:8 gin yiko camgi kuro kare me oro, ocoko kit cam apapat i kare ame jo tye akayo kac," 
Proverbs6:9 Kara yin awackom ibino bedo buta abuta pi kare arom mene? Ibino co i waŋ nino awene ba? 
Proverbs6:10 Koŋ ibut inin giri do, dol ciŋi giri me iwe," 
Proverbs6:11 can bino poto i komi kite ame ayak poto kede i kom dano, kec bino poto i komi calo ŋat orukere oko me lweny." 
Proverbs6:12 Lo arac ame kwo mere mom ber, bedo rimo piny i kop me goba," 
Proverbs6:13 kun mimio waŋe atata, coo-gu piny i tyene, cicimo daŋ piny atata i nyako ciŋe." 
Proverbs6:14 Kodi dano-nono cunye col kun opoŋ i tam areco keken, atub jo kare luŋ." 
Proverbs6:15 Kodi dano-nono can poto i kome atura, te tur odoco a mom dok romo ya malo." 
Proverbs6:16 Rwot dag jami aromo abicel, tye jami abiro a Rwot mom mito atwal." 
Proverbs6:17 En dag lo ame bwono jo i waŋe, dago ŋat ame kobo kop me goba, kede ŋat ame neko jo a mom i balloro." 
Proverbs6:18 En dago lo a cunye opoŋ i tam me timo gin arac, kede ŋat ame ru yutte ayuta me wot timo gin a mom ber." 
Proverbs6:19 En dago acaden ame kobo kop me goba kare ducu, kede lo ame ticcere obedo me tubo omego." 
Proverbs6:20 Atinna, gwok cik ame pappi ociki kede, kur daŋ ikwer gin ame totti opwonyi kede." 
Proverbs6:21 Pwonygi-nono myero bed i cunyi kare ducu, tim ber itwe oko i ŋuti." 
Proverbs6:22 Pwonygi-nono bino bedo gin ame teli i wotti, dok bino gwoki kare luŋ ka ibuto piny, bino daŋ kop kedi ka doŋ ico i waŋ nino," 
Proverbs6:23 Pien cik tye acalo tara, aco pwony te bedo calo ceŋ, pwony me juko dano en obedo yo me kwo," 
Proverbs6:24 ame konyi me gwoki i kom mon a kitegi reco, kede mon ame kobo kop amit me waya tammi," 
Proverbs6:25 Kur imi ber a kodi monnono bwoli ba, akadi miyo nenogi wayo tammi." 
Proverbs6:26 Alaya omio ka ogati acel keken ote codo kede, ento codo dako a lo ocele twero balo kwo a dano ikome." 
Proverbs6:27 Dano twero kwanyo mac te keto i kore, eka mac mom te waŋo boŋo mere?" 
Proverbs6:28 Onyo dano twero wot i kom mac i keno, eka tyene mom te waŋ?" 
Proverbs6:29 Kodi cannono daŋ nen i kom lo ame woto buto i dako awottere; mom tye ŋattoro ame gudo dako awottere te bwot a mom cannono opoto i kome. 
Proverbs6:30 Jo mom cao akwo ka okwalo cam me acama, pi cobo mittere, kare ame kec nwoŋo oneko?" 
Proverbs6:31 Aco ka ce omako, en culo waŋe tyen abiro twal, culo waŋe i jami me ode luŋ." 
Proverbs6:32 Lo a timo codo cot obedo dano a wie mom tio, lo atimokodi timmono nwoŋo onekere kene." 
Proverbs6:33 Gin a dano-nono nwoŋo en awano kede lewic, lewiccere mom bino rwenyo atwal." 
Proverbs6:34 Pien nyeko mio dano ger atek, dano mere ka oero lweny mom jukere," 
Proverbs6:35 En mom ye ni cule kadi acel, akadi imi twon mot arom mene akemo mere mom kwe." 
Proverbs7:1 Atinna, myero wii kur will koppa, kan cik ame apwonyi kede luŋ calo lonyo a pire dit." 
Proverbs7:2 Myero kur wii wil i cikkono me ibed kwo, gwok gin ame apwonyi kede, kite ame igwoko kede, toŋwaŋi." 
Proverbs7:3 Kur imigi orweny i ciŋi ba, coogi kom i cunyi twal." 
Proverbs7:4 Kobbi ryeko ni, “Yin ibedo aminna”, aco niaŋ atut myero ilwoŋ ni twon awotti ame imaro." 
Proverbs7:5 Mannono bino konyi me gwoki i kom dako ame alaya, kede loyo tam a mon ame kobo kop amit me bwoli." 
Proverbs7:6 Pien i kare ame abolo waŋa oriŋo naka oko twal," 
Proverbs7:7 ate neno naka lwak awobe atino a mom i ŋeccoro kadi acel, waŋa te cop i kom awobi moro i akinagi kuno, awobi ame wie mom tio kadi acel." 
Proverbs7:8 En onwoŋo tye awot i yo i ŋet ot a dako-nono, en te lubo yo ame woto i ode," 
Proverbs7:9 wi otyeno ka ŋa beo-nu, iwor ame piny doŋ odoko acol oko." 
Proverbs7:10 Nen ba, dako moro te rwatte kede, kun orukere calo alaya ikokome, dok cunye onwoŋo opoŋ i kop amit me bwolo co." 
Proverbs7:11 En onwoŋo dako a mom a lewic kadi acel, ame woto atata, tyene mom mito bedo paco;" 
Proverbs7:12 irwatte kede i yo i caa-ni, ŋit dok ineno icuk, mom rwenyo iyi akari yo pi kuro co." 
Proverbs7:13 Ka oneno ico obino, poto i kome te donyo jwiyo leme, kun lewic mom i wie, te kobbe ni," 
Proverbs7:14 “An tin ayalo Rwot i mot aŋola, acobo daŋ cikere me kwoŋŋa oko;" 
Proverbs7:15 en woki doŋ atye ayenyi, ayenyi meicel, ber doŋ anwoŋi." 
Proverbs7:16 Atyeko doŋ peto cuka moro aber i kabutona, cuka ame raŋi mere mwonya meicel, ame akelo i Miciri." 
Proverbs7:17 Aonyo daŋ twon moo moro akur meicel i kabutona, akikiro moo murra kede cinaman-gu iye." 
Proverbs7:18 Bye owot oyomoro cunywa iye naka odiko; me ocob mitwa kede yomcunywa. 
Proverbs7:19 Cwara gire tin pe, owoto gire oko i weno kannabor." 
Proverbs7:20 En omako cao limmere owoto kede, en adwogo paco ame dwe doŋ oleŋere oko.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Dako-nono te bedo bwobwolo lo-nu kun wae momot i kop amit, naka te loyo tammere oko." 
Proverbs7:22 Oyotoyot ico te cako lubo yo dakonono oko, calo twon ame apeyo wot neko," 
Proverbs7:23 onyo twon apoli ame omoko i bwo, tuno waŋ ame atero ocobo emanyere pel, calo winyo ame ariŋo wot moko i tol; en mom ŋeo ni kodi timmono bino miyo erwenyo kwo mere." 
Proverbs7:24 Aman doŋ ba, wun itino, winy wunu koppa, keto wunu cunywu me winyo kop ame akobbiwu." 
Proverbs7:25 Cunywu myero kur bwolwu me lubo kodi kit a dako-nu, kur igak, ilub yore;" 
Proverbs7:26 pien dako-nu omio co apol oto; nen ba, twoni co ame en oneko pol ata." 
Proverbs7:27 Ot ame en bedo iye-nu obedo doggola me donyo piny i lyel; obedo yo ame tero jo naka i to. 
Proverbs8:1 Koŋ iwiny wunu kite ame ryeko tye alwoŋo kede, niaŋ atut daŋ amito ni winy dwone." 
Proverbs8:2 I wi tur luŋ ame tye i ŋet yo, en nwoŋo tye ocuŋ i dye yo luŋ;" 
Proverbs8:3 i dog cel me donyo i boma, en nwoŋo tye alwoŋo i ŋet doggola me boma ni," 
Proverbs8:4 “Wun jo, an alwoŋowu do, an alwoŋo jo luŋ aluŋa." 
Proverbs8:5 Wun jo a mom ryek, bed wunu jo oteggo ba, wun jo amiŋ, keto wunu cunywu ba," 
Proverbs8:6 Winy wunu kop abeco ame akobbiwu, kop luŋ ame an abino kobo obedo kop ame tye atira," 
Proverbs8:7 pien kop ateni keken en abino donnyo i doga, leba kwero kobo kop ame mom tye kakare." 
Proverbs8:8 Kop ame an akobo luŋ obedo kop ame tye atira, mom tye moro iye ame odwalle onyo ame ogom." 
Proverbs8:9 Koppa luŋ tye atira baŋ ŋat ame niaŋ atut, winyere aber baŋ jo ame tye i ŋec oromo." 
Proverbs8:10 Gam wunu gin ame an apwonyowu kede akaka gamo lim, yer wunu ŋec akaka yero lonyo." 
Proverbs8:11 Ryeko malo meicel kato gigi mogo me wel oko, mom tye ginnoro ame imito wunu ame oromo poro kede." 
Proverbs8:12 An aryeko ame atye i niaŋ atut meicel, atyeko nwoŋo daŋ ŋec dok aneo gwoko," 
Proverbs8:13 Ŋat a lworo Rwot, dag timo gin arac. An adag awaka, dworre ken, adag yo ame tero dano i timo gin arac, karacel kede kobo kop a mom atira." 
Proverbs8:14 Atye kede twer me yiko tam kede me keto i tic, atye i niaŋ atut kede teko." 
Proverbs8:15 An en akonyo oloc i ticgi me loc, an en amiogi oketo cik a tye atira." 
Proverbs8:16 Kit aloccoro luŋ me lobo nwoŋo kony i baŋa, karacel kede odoŋe luŋ me wi lobo." 
Proverbs8:17 An amaro jo ame mara, jo ame yenya i tekogi luŋ nwoŋa gire." 
Proverbs8:18 Lonyo kede kwogo nwoŋere baŋa, lonyo kede perakino, karacel kede kwo aber meicel." 
Proverbs8:19 Gin ame inwoŋo wunu i baŋa ber kato jabu oko, kadi jabu ame olio acil meicel, kato akadi ryal ame oyero ayera." 
Proverbs8:20 An alubo yo me kite atira, ame en yo ame oŋolo iye kop kakare," 
Proverbs8:21 amio lonyo baŋ jo ame mara, kun amio lim poŋ apoŋa i udi me kano limgi." 
Proverbs8:22 “Rwot ogeo keta i kare me cako ticcere, en ogeo tiya an ryeko." 
Proverbs8:23 I kare aconnaca rik ogeo keta an kena, con meicel ame mom ru oketo lobo." 
Proverbs8:24 An ageo bedo tye ame nam adoŋo daŋ pwod pe, pii me akoŋ daŋ onwoŋo mom ru ocako mollo oko." 
Proverbs8:25 An ageo bedo tye ame kiddi-gu daŋ pwod pe, lobo obedo tutur-gu daŋ pwod pe," 
Proverbs8:26 kare ame Obaŋa mom ru oketo lobo kede potti luŋ iye, akadi apua ame ogeo bedo tye i lobo." 
Proverbs8:27 I kare ame en keto polo onwoŋo an doŋ atye, ame egoo lain omano nam adwoŋ," 
Proverbs8:28 ame en mio polo cuŋ i kabedo mere malo, kun mio wan pii tutuca i nam adoŋo." 
Proverbs8:29 I kare ame en rik keto kan ame nam myero gik iye, me pii kur mol atata me balo cikkere, kede i kare ame keto acakki me te lobo ducu," 
Proverbs8:30 an onwoŋo daŋ atye, kun atye i ŋete acalo adiro me tic," 
Proverbs8:31 kun alelo atek meicel pi bedo i lobo ame en oketo, cunya daŋ onwoŋo yom meicel i kom otino a dano." 
Proverbs8:32 Doŋ aman ba, wun itinona, winy wunu koppa, jo ame lubo yora bedo jo a cunygi yom." 
Proverbs8:33 Winy wunu gin ame opwonyo me ibed wunu aryek, myero kur ikwer wunu pwonyere ba," 
Proverbs8:34 Jo ame winyo koppa bedo jo ame cunygi yom, nino i nino obedo kuro gigi dogcella, kun obedo i doggolana nino ducu." 
Proverbs8:35 Ŋat ame onwoŋa, nwoŋo doŋ onwoŋo kwo, cuny Rwot bino pwoye;" 
Proverbs8:36 ento ŋat ame pe onwoŋa, nwoŋo owane gire oko kene, ŋat ame daga nwoŋo maro to.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Ryeko doŋ ogero gire ode oko, en otyeko keto iye pagi a romo abiro." 
Proverbs9:2 Riŋo me arama mere daŋ doŋ oyaŋo oko, koŋo olok daŋ doŋ onyobo oko, jami luŋ doŋ tye oketo oko i wi meja." 
Proverbs9:3 En ocwao doŋ aŋeca mege me wot lwoŋo jo, i kabedo mogo ame otiŋere malo i boma." 
Proverbs9:4 “Biye wunu kan, wun jo a mom ŋeo ginnoro!” Aco baŋ jo ame wigi mom tio en kobo ni," 
Proverbs9:5 “Biye icam wunu kwon baŋa, imat wunu koŋo olok ame anyobo-ni," 
Proverbs9:6 Wek wunu miŋo bedi, me ibed wunu kwo, me ibed wunu jo ame tye kede niaŋ atut.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Ajuk won aŋale, oyeto ayeta, aco ajuk otim tim areco nwoŋo awano." 
Proverbs9:8 Kur ijuk won aŋale, pien bino dagi oko, juk ŋat ame ryek, en bino mari." 
Proverbs9:9 Pwony dano aryek, ryeko mere bino medde amedda, pwony ŋat a kite atira, ŋeccere bino medde ameda." 
Proverbs9:10 Dano cako bedo kede ryeko ka ce lworo Rwot, dano ame ŋeo Ŋat Acil bedo kede niaŋ atut." 
Proverbs9:11 Ryeko mio kare me kwoni medde ameda, mio mwaka me kwoni medde bedo abup." 
Proverbs9:12 Ka ce iryek, ryeko-nono bino konyi yin i komi, aco ka ce yin aŋale, aŋale bino kelli can," 
Proverbs9:13 Dako amiŋ da meicel, bedo twon alaya kun lewic gire mom mako." 
Proverbs9:14 En bedo i doggola mere kare luŋ, onyo i wi kom i kabedo ame otiŋere malo i boma," 
Proverbs9:15 kun lwoŋo jo luŋ ame beo i ŋete, ame nwoŋo gigi awot anyim wotgi," 
Proverbs9:16 “Biye wunu kan, wan jo a mom ŋeo ginnoro!” Aco baŋ jo ame wigi mom tio en kobo ni," 
Proverbs9:17 “Pii akwala mit meicel, ogati akwala ka icamo muŋ yomoro cunyi nadi.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Lo-nono nwoŋo mom ŋeo ni to tye kuno, mom ŋeo ni wele a dako-nono luŋ tye piny i lyel." 
Proverbs10:1 Carokop a Culeman. Awobi aryek yomoro cuny pappere, ento en amiŋŋere cwero cuny tottere." 
Proverbs10:2 Lonyo ame inwoŋo i yore arac konnyere pe, ento kite atira lari i to," 
Proverbs10:3 Rwot mom weko kec neko ŋat a kite atira, ento en kwero ŋat arac, pe nwoŋo gin ame yie mito." 
Proverbs10:4 Wackom kelo can, ento tiyo tic atek kelo lonyo." 
Proverbs10:5 Atin aryek coko cam oko i poto ka ocek, ento en ame nino anina i kare me kac, kelo lewic i kome kene." 
Proverbs10:6 Rwot mio gum baŋ ŋat a kite atira, ento kop ame atim tim arac kobo wumo timmere me kolo oko." 
Proverbs10:7 Ŋat a kite atira kome i gum pien opo pire, ento ŋat arac nyiŋe top, te rwenyo atwal." 
Proverbs10:8 Lo aryek i cunye mako cik, ento amiŋo ame kobo kop miŋomiŋo bino to." 
Proverbs10:9 Dano ame cunye ler mom lworo ginnoro, ento jo a kitegi ogom mom twero kanne atwal." 
Proverbs10:10 Ŋat ame mimio waŋe atata kelo ayela, ento ŋat ame juko dano kannaler kelo kuc." 
Proverbs10:11 Kop ame jo a kitegi atira kobo obedo waŋ pii me kwo, ento kop ame atim tim arac kobo wumo timmere me kolo oko." 
Proverbs10:12 Dagere kelo lweny, ento mar wumo kit bal ducu." 
Proverbs10:13 Ŋat aniaŋ kobo kop me ryeko, ento ŋat a wie mom tio mito ka lut." 
Proverbs10:14 Ŋat aryek bedo ŋat a tye kede ŋec oromo, ento ŋat amiŋ kobo kop ame kelo can i kome." 
Proverbs10:15 Alonyo geno lonyo mere acalo boma atek ame en riŋo laro, ento can tero acan i to." 
Proverbs10:16 Timo gin atira tero dano i kwo, ento tim arac medo bal ameda." 
Proverbs10:17 Ŋat awinyo pwony nwoŋo tye i yo me kwo, ento ŋat ame mom ye ni juke rwenyo arwenya." 
Proverbs10:18 Ŋat ame kano adage i cunye kobo kop goba, ŋat ame kwoto jo en amiŋo." 
Proverbs10:19 Kop apol apola bal mom rwenyo iye, ento ŋat aryek mom duro kop apol." 
Proverbs10:20 Ŋat a kite atira, kop i doge calo ryal ame olio, ento tam a ŋat arac konnyere nok meicel." 
Proverbs10:21 Kop a ŋat a kite atira pwonyo jo apol, ento omiŋo to i kwiya pinygi." 
Proverbs10:22 Gum ame Rwot mio, mio dano bedo alonyo, kun mom medo iye ginnoro akelo cwercuny," 
Proverbs10:23 Timo gin arac calo tuko baŋ amiŋo, ento tim me ryeko kelo yomcuny baŋ ŋat a niaŋ." 
Proverbs10:24 Gin ame ŋat arac lworo, en ame kelle peko, ento gin ame dano a kite atira mito, omie," 
Proverbs10:25 Yamo ager ka akodo, kolo dano arac oko, ento ŋat a kite atira moko gire atwal." 
Proverbs10:26 Awackom rom aroma i koŋo awac i dog, kede yito adonyo i waŋ, baŋ jo luŋ ameare tiyo ticgi." 
Proverbs10:27 Bedo i lworo i kom Rwot mio dano perakino, ento awaka a ŋat arac gik iŋwet," 
Proverbs10:28 Ŋat a kite atira cobo gennere i yomcuny, ento ŋat arac geno bwoo ŋor." 
Proverbs10:29 Rwot en ame ika larre atek, baŋ ŋat ame tio gin a atye atira, ento neko otim tim areco aneka." 
Proverbs10:30 Ŋat a kite atira bino bedo i kuc, ento jo areco obino puto oko i lobo." 
Proverbs10:31 Ŋat a kite atira kobo kop me ryeko, ento ŋat akobo kop me goba obino ŋolo lebe oko." 
Proverbs10:32 Ŋat ame kite atira kobo kop ame jo pwoo, ento ŋat arac kobo kop ogom cutu." 
Proverbs11:1 Rwot dag mijan me cero jo, ento en pwoo kidi ame pimo jami kakare." 
Proverbs11:2 Wakere kelo lewic, cite mwolo woto karacel i ryeko." 
Proverbs11:3 Lercuny en ame telo jo a cunygi atira, ento jo ame kitegi ogom to pi kitegi-nono." 
Proverbs11:4 Lonyo mom konyo ginnoro i kare me akemo Obaŋa, ento tim atira twero laro dano i kare me to." 
Proverbs11:5 Tim atira ame ŋat a mom i balloro timo mio yore cuŋ atira, ento atim gin arac poto pi timmere-nono." 
Proverbs11:6 Tim atira ame ŋat a cunye atira timo twero lare, ento abwol jo doko opii pi woro mere." 
Proverbs11:7 Gen ame ŋat arac tye kede to nono, jo a mom woro Obaŋa geno bwoo ŋor." 
Proverbs11:8 Ŋat a kite atira bwot oko i can, eka ŋat arac te lunyo leyo kakare." 
Proverbs11:9 Ŋat a mom woro Obaŋa balo awottere i kop i doge, ento bedo kede ŋec en ame laro jo a kitegi atira." 
Proverbs11:10 Ka ce ŋat a kite atira alonyo jo i boma luŋ lelo; ka jo a kitegi reco oto, jo luŋ wo i yomcuny." 
Proverbs11:11 Ka gum opoto i kom jo a kitegi atira, jo i boma luŋ bedo atek meicel; aco jo areco balo boma abala i kop ame gin kobo." 
Proverbs11:12 Ŋat ame mio awottere doko dano ayot i akina jo, wie mom tio; ento ŋat a niaŋ atut liŋ gire mot." 
Proverbs11:13 Ŋat ame rimo piny i kwokwoto jo, tuco i muŋ a jo ocele, ento ŋat ame agen i cunye, kano kop me i muŋ." 
Proverbs11:14 Ka ce atel mom, jo poto oko, ento kan ame omi-tam pol iye, kuc bedo i lobo-nono," 
Proverbs11:15 Ŋat ame cikere me culo banya amyere bino paro icen, ento ŋat a mom cuŋ i jo atata tye aber." 
Proverbs11:16 Dako ame akica jo woro, ento adwar kolo nwoŋo lonyo ame omao amaa." 
Proverbs11:17 Dano ame akica konyere kene, ento ŋat ager kelo awano i kome kene," 
Proverbs11:18 Jo ame timo gin a mom atira nwoŋo ocaragi a konnyere pe, ento jo ame timo gin atira nwoŋo ocara ikokome," 
Proverbs11:19 Ŋat olido bedo i kite atira bino kwo, ento ŋat ame ryemo yo gin arac bino to," 
Proverbs11:20 Rwot dag ŋat ame tammere ogom, ento cunye yom i kom jo ame balloro mom i kitegi." 
Proverbs11:21 Bed ame iŋeo ni atim gin arac mom bino bwot a mom oketo cannoro i kome, ento jo ame kitegi atira obino laro oko," 
Proverbs11:22 Dako amwonya meicel a mom ŋeo poko gin aber kede gin arac, rom aroma alem jabu ame oketo i um puno." 
Proverbs11:23 Jo a kitegi atira mito ka gin aber keken; ento gin ame jo areco mito kelo ka akemo. 
Proverbs11:24 Jo mogo ame mio limgi i yomcuny lony medde ameda, aco jo mogo ame odur lunyo dok medde ameda i bedo acan." 
Proverbs11:25 Ŋat ame cunye yom i konyo jo, lim medde i ciŋe, ŋat ame konyo jo ocele, jo daŋ konye." 
Proverbs11:26 Ŋat ame adur i cammere jo ceno acena, ento ŋat ame cato cam i ciŋe jo lam me gum." 
Proverbs11:27 Ŋat ame yenyo gin aber i cunye luŋ jo pwoo, gin arac gire bino i kom jo ame yenyo," 
Proverbs11:28 Ŋat ame oketo gennere i kom lonyo bino ner calo lum, ento ŋat a kite atira bino bedo aber calo pot yat adyaka." 
Proverbs11:29 Ŋat ame yelo jo me ode mom bino nwoŋo ginnoro, aco ŋat amiŋ bino bedo opii a ŋat aryek." 
Proverbs11:30 Kite atira obedo yat ame ya iye kwo, kwero lubo cik rwenyo kwo a dano arwenya." 
Proverbs11:31 Ka ce ŋat a kite atira nwoŋo mottere i lobo kan, kara doŋ jo areco kede obalo bino nwoŋo can a rom mene?" 
Proverbs12:1 Ŋat ame mito ni pwonye nwoŋo mito medo ŋeccere, aco ŋat a mom ye ni juke bedo dano amiŋ nakanaka," 
Proverbs12:2 Rwot pwoo ŋat ame kite ber, ento en ŋolo kop loo jo ame paro pi timo gin arac." 
Proverbs12:3 Dano mom cuŋ atek pi timo gin arac, ento ŋat a kite atira rom aroma i yat ame lwite mom putte." 
Proverbs12:4 Dako aber kelo kwogo i kom cware ento dako ame kelo lewic i kom cware calo bur ame balo cogo kom cware," 
Proverbs12:5 Ŋat a kite atira tamo tam aber, ento ŋat a kite rac mio tam ame bolo dano i mac." 
Proverbs12:6 Jo ame kitegi reco kobo kop ame kelo to, ento jo a kitegi atira kobo kop ame laro joo" 
Proverbs12:7 Ŋat arac ka oreto, agikki mere nwoŋo doŋ ennono, ento jo me ot a ŋat a kite atira pwod medde cuŋ." 
Proverbs12:8 Jo kobo kop aber i kom dano kun lubo kite ame ŋeccere tye kede, ento ŋat ame tammere ogom jo cao acaa." 
Proverbs12:9 Dano ame mwol, ame tio tic atek me nwoŋo gin me konyo kwo mere, ber kato at ame poro tyene i jo adoŋo kun tammere pe." 
Proverbs12:10 Ŋat a kite atira gwoko lee mere epito paco aber, ento jo a kitegi reco wuno leyigi aboŋo kica." 
Proverbs12:11 Apur atek nwoŋo cam abup, ento ŋat ame balo kare mere i gin ame konyere pe, wie mom tio." 
Proverbs12:12 Ŋat arac poto pi timo gin arac, ento ŋat a kite atira cuŋ i kiŋ aboŋo leŋere." 
Proverbs12:13 Ŋat arac moko kene i kop ame en kobo, ento ŋat a kite atira bwot i ayela ame poto i kome." 
Proverbs12:14 Dano yeŋ i gin aber pi kop oya i doge, gin ame dano tio lokere dok konye." 
Proverbs12:15 Ŋat amiŋ neno gin etimo luŋ ni beco, ento ŋat aryek winyo tam a jo ocele." 
Proverbs12:16 Ŋat amiŋ ka akemo omako ŋeye oyotoyot, ento ŋat aryek mom paro pi ayet ame oyete kede." 
Proverbs12:17 Ŋat ame kobo kop ateni tito gin otimere ikokome, ento acaden agoba kobo kop me goba keken." 
Proverbs12:18 Ŋat a niaŋŋere nok kobo koppogo aboŋo tamo, ame lit calo pala bat ame ocobo dano, cite kop ame ŋat aryek kobo caŋo dano acaŋa." 
Proverbs12:19 Kop goba mom ri kare alac, ento kop ateni ri nakanaka." 
Proverbs12:20 Jo ame yiko kop me timo gin arac cunygi opoŋ i kop goba, ento jo ame tye kede yik me timo gin aber cunygi yom." 
Proverbs12:21 Gin arac mom poto i kom ŋat a kite atira, ento ŋat arac bedo i lwak ayela meicel." 
Proverbs12:22 Rwot dag jo ame kobo kop me goba, ento cunye yom i kom jo ame ogen i ticgi." 
Proverbs12:23 Ŋat aryek kano kop ame en ŋeo, ento amiŋo bedo yabo miŋo mere baŋ jo ocele." 
Proverbs12:24 Ŋat ame tio tic atek doko aloc, ento caro mio dano doko opii." 
Proverbs12:25 Par okato kare geno dano bedo yomcuny, ento kop ame okobo kede kica kweo cunye." 
Proverbs12:26 Ŋat a kite atira leŋŋsi i gin arac yo, ento ŋat a kite rac, kite-nono rwenye arwenya." 
Proverbs12:27 Awackom mom nwoŋo gin emito, ento ŋat ame tio tic atek nwoŋo lim arome." 
Proverbs12:28 Kite atira obedo yo ame tero dano i kwo, ento miŋo obedo yo ame tero dano i to." 
Proverbs13:1 Atin aryek winyo gin ame pappere pwonye kede, ento ŋat ame aŋale mom ye ni juke." 
Proverbs13:2 Dano aber nwoŋo agoba i kop ame en kobo, ento abwol jo cunye mito ka tim me byemi." 
Proverbs13:3 Ŋat ame gwoko kop ame en kobo gwoko kwo mere, ento ŋat ame ŋamo doge i kop atata poto i can." 
Proverbs13:4 Awackom kadi bed i mit i kom ginnoro a rom mene mom gire twero nwoŋo, ento ŋat ame tio tic atek nwoŋo ginnoro luŋ ame cunye mito." 
Proverbs13:5 Dano a kite atira dago kop me goba, ento ŋat arac timo tim me lewic ame lane alana." 
Proverbs13:6 Kite atira gwoko ŋat a cunye atira, ento bal reto ŋat arac areta." 
Proverbs13:7 Jo mogo poro bedo olonyo kun gin ocan a mom twerre, ento jo ocele miye ni gin ocan kun otye i jami luŋ ame romogi." 
Proverbs13:8 Ŋat alonyo twero lakoro kwo mere i limmere, ento acan mom tye i yo moro me lakoro kwo mere." 
Proverbs13:9 Jo a kitegi atira calo tara ame lyel acil meicel, ento jo areco calo tara ame lyel ote neko oko." 
Proverbs13:10 Lo ame awaka dok daŋ apyem yelo jo nono, ento lo ame gamo tam ame omie doko ŋat aryek." 
Proverbs13:11 Lonyo ame bino ni wuk awaŋe acel rwenyo oko, ento ŋat ame lim bino i ciŋe momot limmere medde." 
Proverbs13:12 Gin ame dano geno ka mom onwoŋo kelo two i cunye ento gin a dano mito ka ocobere bedo calo yat me kwo. 
Proverbs13:13 Ŋat ame cao kop ame okobbe nwoŋo okelo can i kome kene, ento ŋat ame lubo gin ame ociko ni tim nwoŋo mot pire." 
Proverbs13:14 Pwony a jo aryek calo waŋ pi i me kwo, mio dano bwot i owic me to." 
Proverbs13:15 Ŋat ame wie tio jo bedo i geni kome, ento ŋat a mom agen nwoŋo doŋ tye i yo me to." 
Proverbs13:16 Ŋat aryek cobo ticcere i ŋec ame romo, ento amiŋo bedo nyuto miŋo mere baŋ jo ocele." 
Proverbs13:17 Akwena arac kelo peko i kom jo, ento akwena agenne kelo kuc." 
Proverbs13:18 Can kede cwercuny bino baŋ ŋat a mom ye ni pwonye, ento ŋat ame ye ni juke bedo ŋat a jo woro." 
Proverbs13:19 Mit a dano ka ocobere kweo cunye meicel, ento amiŋo mom ye weko gin arac." 
Proverbs13:20 Lo ame maro mako dyere i jo aryek doko ŋat aryek, ento ŋat a nywako yo i jo amiŋ bale abala." 
Proverbs13:21 Gin arac maro lubo yo jo ame obalo, ento jo a kitegi atira nwoŋo mot me jami abeco." 
Proverbs13:22 Dano aber wekki ikwae lim ame gin twero leyo, ento lonyo a jo ame obalo kobo i ciŋ jo a kitegi atira." 
Proverbs13:23 Lobo ame oweko owe kare alac ceko cem abup baŋ acan, ento jo a mom okica mao oko i baŋe i tim a mom atira." 
Proverbs13:24 Ŋat a mom goo atinnere nwoŋo mom maro, atin ame omaro, opwonyo. Ŋat a kite atira nwoŋo cam ame rome kare luŋ, ento dano arac kec neko kare ducu." 
Proverbs14:1 Mon aryek mio pacogi bedo paco aber a kuc tye iye, ento mon amiŋ turo pacogi atura." 
Proverbs14:2 Dano ame kwo mere ber ŋwoŋo lworo Rwot ento ŋat alubo yo a mom atira cao Rwot acaa. 
Proverbs14:3 Kop a ŋat amiŋ calo lut ame ogoe kede, ento ŋat aryek kobo kop ame gwoke agwoka." 
Proverbs14:4 Kan a mom opuro i kweri cam mom cek i ye abup, ento puro poto i kweri mio cam cek abup." 
Proverbs14:5 Acaden ame genne mom pido kop me goba, ento acaden agoba loko goba keken." 
Proverbs14:6 Won aŋale mom twero doko ŋat aryek, ento ŋat aniaŋ atut ŋeccere medde oyotoyot." 
Proverbs14:7 Ya oko i baŋ ŋat amiŋ, pien mom tye ginnoro ame iromo ŋeyo i baŋe." 
Proverbs14:8 Ryeko mio dano nwoŋo kite a myero ebed kede, ento miŋo bwolo dano abwola." 
Proverbs14:9 Ŋat amiŋ mom paro ginnoro ka otimo bal, ento ŋat a cunye atir kwao kica." 
Proverbs14:10 Yin iŋeo gin ame tye i cuny ka lim onyo kec, mom tye ŋattoro ame twero nywako kedi gin i cunyi." 
Proverbs14:11 Ot a ŋat a kite rac balle oko, ento paco a jo kitegi beco bedo gire aber," 
Proverbs14:12 Tye yo mogo ame dano tamo ni ber, kun kara obedo yo ame tero jo i to," 
Proverbs14:13 Dano twero nyero kun nwoŋo cunye mom yom, icennere te dok bedo kede kumo." 
Proverbs14:14 Ŋat a kite atira nwoŋo mottere pi kite-nono, ento ŋat a kite ogom nwoŋo mottere oporo gin ame en timo." 
Proverbs14:15 Ŋat amiŋ ye kop ducu, ento ŋat a wie tio koŋ ŋio jami i nyime," 
Proverbs14:16 Ŋat aryek gwokkere mom lutte i tim arac, ento amiŋo donyo ata kun mom koŋ tamo." 
Proverbs14:17 Won akemo agwa timo tim me miŋo, ento ŋat aryek bedo mere mot." 
Proverbs14:18 Jo amiŋ nwoŋo gin ame gin omito i yore me miŋo miŋo, ento jo aryek opokigi mot me ŋec oromo." 
Proverbs14:19 Jo areco rumo congi woro jo a kitegi ber, kede otim tim areco ocokere doggola a jo a kitegi atira pi kelo kwacgi." 
Proverbs14:20 Acan jo dago anaka jo i ŋete, ento olonyo tye owote mere apol ata." 
Proverbs14:21 Ŋat ame cao dano ocele nwoŋo abalo, ento ŋat ame kica mako i kom ocan tye kede yomcuny." 
Proverbs14:22 Jo ame paro pi timo gin arac rwenyo arwenya, ento jo ame paro pi gin aber bedo jo ame omaro dok ogeno." 
Proverbs14:23 Ticcoro luŋ atek tye iye goba, ento kop akopa kelo can." 
Proverbs14:24 Kwogo a jo aryek obedo ryekogi, ento mola ŋut ŋat amiŋ ame omio en ŋeye obedo miŋo mere." 
Proverbs14:25 Acaden laro kwo a dano ka okobo ateni, ento ŋat ame kobo kop me goba obedo won adote." 
Proverbs14:26 Lworo Rwot mio dano bedo kede gen adwoŋ, itino mere nwoŋo kan ame otwero laro." 
Proverbs14:27 Lworo Rwot en obedo waŋ pii me kwo, en a mio dano twero gwoko owic ato." 
Proverbs14:28 Jo apol ame abaka loo en ame mie kwogo, ento aloc a jo mere mom doŋ oto oko." 
Proverbs14:29 Ŋat ame mom ŋo oyotoyot tye kede twon ŋec adwoŋ meicel, ento ŋat ame akemo mako oyotoyot obedo twon amiŋo meicel." 
Proverbs14:30 Ka cuny dano tye ame opye mot kome daŋ bedo yot, ento akemo balo cogo kom dano." 
Proverbs14:31 Ŋat ame wuno acan nwoŋo ocao Obaŋa ame okete, ento ŋat ame kica mako i kom jo a mito kony nwoŋo woro Obaŋa," 
Proverbs14:32 Atim gin arac poto i gin arac ame etimo, ento ŋat a kite atira larre pi bedo dano a genne." 
Proverbs14:33 Ryeko bedo i cuny dano ame ŋeo gin a myero etim, ento ŋat amiŋ a mom ŋeo gin a myero etim cunye bedo nono." 
Proverbs14:34 Kite atira mio rok bedo rok ame oŋeo meicel, ento bal kelo lewic i kom rokkoro keken." 
Proverbs14:35 Amiro ame tio ticcere i ryeko, adwoŋŋere pwoc ento akemo make i kom amiro ame tio gin a kelo lewic." 
Proverbs15:1 Gamokop i mwolo kweo akemo a dano oko, ento dwon agwa medo akemo ameda." 
Proverbs15:2 Ŋat aryek kobo kop me pwonyo jo, ento amiŋo tiko wuko ka kop me miŋo keken." 
Proverbs15:3 Waŋ Rwot neno kabedo luŋ; en neno jo areco kede jo abeco. 
Proverbs15:4 Kobo kop i mwolo obedo calo yal me kwo, ento kop agwa kelo two cuny dano." 
Proverbs15:5 Amiŋo cao pwony a pappere, ento ŋat ame winyo pwony en dano aryek." 
Proverbs15:6 Lonyo dwoŋ i ot a ŋat a kite atira, ento can balo lim a bino i ciŋ ŋat arac oko." 
Proverbs15:7 Jo aryek kobo kop ame mio jo medde ŋeyo jami apol, ento kop a jo amiŋ mom pwonyo ŋattoro." 
Proverbs15:8 Rwot dag mot ame atim tim arac oŋolo me yale, ento cunye yom i kwac a ŋat a cunye ler." 
Proverbs15:9 Rwot dag tim a jo areco, ento en maro jo ame timo gin ame tye atira." 
Proverbs15:10 Ŋat ame kwero lubo yo a Rwot obino keto can adwoŋ i kome, ŋat a pe ye ni juke bino to." 
Proverbs15:11 Rwot ŋeo jami ducu ame tye piny i lyel, kara doŋ cuny dano kono?" 
Proverbs15:12 Won aŋale mom ye ni juke, mom daŋ woto baŋ jo aryek." 
Proverbs15:13 Ŋat ame cunye yom, yom cunye nen i waŋe, ento cwercuny mio waŋ dano bale oko," 
Proverbs15:14 Dano aryek cunye poŋ i mit me pwonyere, ento ŋat amiŋ paro kop me miŋomiŋo keken." 
Proverbs15:15 Dano ame owuno kare me kwo mere poŋ ican, ento ŋat ame cunye yom camo arama kare luŋ." 
Proverbs15:16 Ŋat ame tio kede lim anok kun lworo Rwot, bedo aber kato ŋat ame tio kede lim adwoŋ kun tye kede ayela." 
Proverbs15:17 Camo pot dek i jo ame imaro, ber kato camo twon riŋo amio i paco ame dagere dwoŋ iye." 
Proverbs15:18 Won akemo tubo jo, ento ŋat ame kanyo akemo kelo kuc." 
Proverbs15:19 Yo awackom culle acula okuto, ento ŋat a cunye ler, yore ler ata." 
Proverbs15:20 Atin aryek yomo cuny pappere, ento dano ame miŋ cao tottere acaa." 
Proverbs15:21 Ŋat a wie mom tio cunye bedo ayom i kop me miŋo miŋo, ento ŋat atye i niaŋ atut bedo i kwo atira." 
Proverbs15:22 Ŋat ame tio kene aboŋo winyo tam, yikkere mom cobere aber, ento ŋat a gamo tam a jo apol yikkere cobere." 
Proverbs15:23 Dok ipeny kakare kelo yomcuny, kede kobo gin ame nwoŋo amito i kare a mitte ber meicel." 
Proverbs15:24 Ŋat aryek lubo yo ame tere i kwo, ento weko yo ame tere piny i lyel." 
Proverbs15:25 Rwot turo udi a jo awakere oko, ento gwoko waŋ lobo a dako a cware oto." 
Proverbs15:26 Rwot dag tam a jo areco, ento kop a ŋat aber kobo yommoro cunye meicel." 
Proverbs15:27 Ŋat ame owor me nwoŋo agoba i yore a mom atira kelo ayela i kom jo me ode, ento ŋat ame dag lim ame owilo i jo i muŋ mom bino to." 
Proverbs15:28 Jo a kitegi atira koŋ tamokop kun pe ru odok iye, ento ŋat arac wuko kop arac aboŋo paro." 
Proverbs15:29 Rwot mom noko laŋet ŋat arac, ento winyo kwac a dano a kite atira." 
Proverbs15:30 Waŋ aber mio dano yomcuny, amut aber mio cuny dano gony." 
Proverbs15:31 Ŋat a winyo kop ame ojuke kede, bedo i akina jo aryek." 
Proverbs15:32 Ŋat ame mom ye pwony ajo nwoŋo ocaye kene, ento ŋat ame ye ni juke medde niaŋ i jami apol." 
Proverbs15:33 Bedo i lworo i kom Rwot en aye doggola me doko ryek, bedo i woro en aye doggola me bedo ŋat ame oworo." 
Proverbs16:1 Dano twero tamo pi gin a myero eti i cunye, ento Obaŋa en ame mio cobere." 
Proverbs16:2 Dano neno gin ame etio luŋ ni ber, ento Rwot pimo cuny dano." 
Proverbs16:3 Ket ticci luŋ i nyim Rwot, en bino miyo tammi cobere aber." 
Proverbs16:4 Rwot tye ked yik pi jami luŋ ame en oketo, ento gin ame en oyiko pi jo areco en to," 
Proverbs16:5 Rwot dago jo a wakere; ŋe atira ni kodi jo-nono mom bino bwot ame mom oketo cannoro i komgi. 
Proverbs16:6 Rwot weko bal a jo a genne, ame mare, dok bedo i lworo i kom Rwot mio dano geŋere i tim arac." 
Proverbs16:7 Ka ce kit a dano moro-ni yomoro cuny Rwot, en mio okworrere daŋ bedo kede kuc." 
Proverbs16:8 Bedo i jami anonok kun inwoŋo i yore aber, ber kato twon lim adwoŋ ame inwoŋo i yo a mom atira," 
Proverbs16:9 Dano yiko kit a kwo mere myero bed kede i cunye, cite Rwot en ame telle me cobo." 
Proverbs16:10 Abaka kobo gin ame Rwot en okobbe, mom timo balloro i kop ame eŋolo." 
Proverbs16:11 Rwot mito mijan kede ratili ame pimo jam i kakare, kidi pimo jami luŋ myero bed i te loccere." 
Proverbs16:12 Timo gin arac obedo gin me kwer baŋ rwode, pien loc cuŋ atek ka jo tye atimo gin atye atira." 
Proverbs16:13 Yi abaka bedo yom i kom jo ame kobo kop atira, gin maro jo ame kobo kop ateni." 
Proverbs16:14 Akemo ka omako abaka dano to, ento ŋat aryek kweo cunye." 
Proverbs16:15 Yomcuny abaka ka onen i waŋe, mio dano kwo, kica mere calo pol ame mio kot cwe i cwir." 
Proverbs16:16 Nwoŋo ryeko ber kato nwoŋo lonyo, yero niaŋ atut kato yero bedo i lim." 
Proverbs16:17 Jo a cunygi atira lubo yo a mom terogi itimo gin arac; ŋat ame gwoko kite bino laro kwo mere. 
Proverbs16:18 Awaka tero dano ican, abwone mio dano poto." 
Proverbs16:19 Bedo karacel ocan i cuny me mwolo, ber kato poko jami ayaka i jo a wakere." 
Proverbs16:20 Ŋat ame winyo gin ame opwonye kede bino bedo i kwo aber, dok ŋat ame geno Rwot tye kede yomcuny." 
Proverbs16:21 Ŋat aryek i cunye olwoŋo ni ŋat atye i niaŋ atut, dok ŋat akobo kop amit loo tam a jo apol." 
Proverbs16:22 Ryeko calo waŋ pii me kwo baŋ ŋat ame tye kede, ento miŋo pwodo wonnere." 
Proverbs16:23 Tam a ŋat aryek mio en kobo kop ame nwoŋo koŋ otamo aber, dok mio kop ame en kobo loko tam a jo apol." 
Proverbs16:24 Kop me kica lim calo kic, calo yat ame kweo cuny kede yat ame caŋo kom." 
Proverbs16:25 Tye yo mogo ame dano tamo ni ber, kun kara tero jo i to," 
Proverbs16:26 Mit me cam mio dano tio ticcere aber; kec en ame cukoro cunye. 
Proverbs16:27 Loo arac ame kwo mere mom ber yenyo yo me timo jo rac, dok kop ame en kobo lyet calo mac." 
Proverbs16:28 Ŋat a kite ogom kelo pyem keken, dok ŋat akwot jo tubo jo ame mare." 
Proverbs16:29 Atim tim me byemi bwolo jo abedo kede, gin ame en timo-nono tere i yo a mom ber." 
Proverbs16:30 Ŋat ame mimio waŋe atata nwoŋo tye i yik me timo gin arac, ŋat aliŋaliŋa mio gin arac timmere kun en aneno." 
Proverbs16:31 Perakino obedo mot ame omio baŋ jo a tye i kwo aber, lwar obedo tok kwogo me wic." 
Proverbs16:32 Ŋat ame akemo mako oyot ber kato twon lo atek, ŋat a loo tam i cunye ber kato ŋat ame man boma twal." 
Proverbs16:33 Obol kwir bolo kwir, ento adwoggi mere tye i cin Rwot." 
Proverbs17:1 Kwon aŋic ame ocamo i kuc, ber kato arama ame ocamo i ot a kuc mom iye." 
Proverbs17:2 Opii ame tio ticcere i ryeko, bino loyo atin adwoŋ me ot ame timo tim me lewic, dok bino nywako ginalea karacel i jo me ottono." 
Proverbs17:3 Jabu kede ryal otemo i mac, ento Rwot temo cuny dano." 
Proverbs17:4 Ŋat a maro timo gin arac ciko yite i kop a jo areco, agoba ciko yite i kop me goba." 
Proverbs17:5 Ŋat ame ŋalo acan nwoŋo oyeto Obaŋa ame okete, ŋat ame lelo gire alela ka can opoto i kom owotte mere, mom bino bwot a mom oketo can i kome." 
Proverbs17:6 Odoŋ oti nwoŋo kwogo pi ikwaegi, itino nwoŋo kwogo pi papagi." 
Proverbs17:7 Dano ame jo woro mom kobo kop me goba, dok daŋ mom maro winyo kop abeco ame amiŋo kobo." 
Proverbs17:8 Owil jo imuŋ geno timgi-nono calo jo a geno yen gwoko komgi atye i komgi, gin geno ni twero miyogi onwoŋo gum i kabedo luŋ." 
Proverbs17:9 Ŋat atimo kica baŋ ŋat otimo bal nwoŋo mito mer bed ŋye i akinagi, ento ŋat ame bedo poyo bal acon balo dyere ame tye i akinagi." 
Proverbs17:10 Ŋat a niaŋ atut, pwonyere ka ojuko, ame kato ŋat amiŋ ame opwodo lut tyen mia acel." 
Proverbs17:11 Atim tim arac maro jem kare ducu, timmere-nono mio ecop i kom lo moro ager te time lit." 
Proverbs17:12 Tika irwatte i ŋuu ager ame itino mere oneko oko, kato ame irwatte i ŋat amiŋ kun atimo tim me miŋo miŋo." 
Proverbs17:13 Ŋat ame dwoko gin arac pi gin aber, gin arac mom ya i ode." 
Proverbs17:14 Gin akelo lweny cakere momot calo pii ame ocako molo amola, pi mannono myero ijuk ame pwod ocakere acaka." 
Proverbs17:15 Rwot dag ŋat ame mio dano arac loo kop, kede ŋat ame mio kop loo ŋat a kite atira," 
Proverbs17:16 Konyo kara ŋo dano amiŋ me bedo i lim me wilo ryeko, kun koŋo mom tye i wic ame romme pwonyere?" 
Proverbs17:17 Awotti nyuto marrere kare luŋ, ominni bedo ŋat ame inywako wunu kede peko," 
Proverbs17:18 Ŋat ame wie mom tio jeŋo jami mere ata, pi culo baŋya a ŋat a mom eŋeo." 
Proverbs17:19 Ŋat ame maro timo bal, maro daŋ kelo pyem, ŋat ame mio doggola mere bedo malo amala yenyo to." 
Proverbs17:20 Ŋat ame tamo tam arac i cunye mom twero bedo i kwo aber, ŋat ame kobo kop a mom ber mom niaŋ poto i can." 
Proverbs17:21 Atin ame wie mom tio cwero cuny pappere, pappa a ŋat amiŋ mom bedo kede yomcuny kadi acel." 
Proverbs17:22 Yomcuny obedo twon yat aber meicel, me caŋo two, ento cwercuny mio dano mok amoka." 
Proverbs17:23 Dano arac gamo lim ame owile kede imuŋ, wek ebal ŋolo kop kakare." 
Proverbs17:24 Dano ame niaŋ keto cunyei gin ame medde ryeko, ento dano amiŋ bedo ata kun mom tamo ginnoro." 
Proverbs17:25 Atin ame wie mom tio cwero cuny pappere, dok mio tottere onywale bedo kede kumo i cunye." 
Proverbs17:26 Mom ber me keto can i kom dano a kite atira, pwodo jo ame oworo rac atek." 
Proverbs17:27 Ŋat atye i ŋec mom duro kop apol apola, ŋat ame niaŋ atut cunye pye mot." 
Proverbs17:28 Ŋat amiŋ ame liŋ gire aliŋa, otero calo dano aryek, ka ce en mom bedo duro doge atata, jo tamo ni en niaŋ kop apol." 
Proverbs18:1 Dano ame mom ribere i jo ocele, paro pire kene, daŋ mom maro ye gin a jo ocele kobo ni tye tira," 
Proverbs18:2 Amiŋo gire mom paro pi niaŋ jami, en paro pi nyuto tammere keken." 
Proverbs18:3 Tim arac kede acae nywako yo acel, alee twodo dano ame mom oworo." 
Proverbs18:4 Kop ame dano kobo calo pii atut, waŋ pii me ryeko calo pii kulo a kukunya." 
Proverbs18:5 Dworo ŋat arac mom ber, onyo balo ŋolo kop a ŋat a kite atira." 
Proverbs18:6 Kop a ŋat amiŋ kobo kelo pyem, kop ame en kobo lwoŋo lut i kome." 
Proverbs18:7 Kop ame amiŋo kobo en ame kelle to, kop ame lebe kobo en ame obedo owic me cike," 
Proverbs18:8 Kop akwot jo mit meicel, winyo mit calo mwonyo kwon obwol." 
Proverbs18:9 Ŋat ame kome wac i tic, rom aroma i ŋat ame balo jami abala." 
Proverbs18:10 Nyiŋ Rwot tye acalo twon gedo moro atek, ame dano a kite atira riŋo laro." 
Proverbs18:11 Alonyo geno lonyo mere me larre, lonyo mere calo boma atek ame en riŋo laro," 
Proverbs18:12 Dano wakere ka can pwod pe, ento bedo i woro en doggola me bedo a ŋat ame oworo." 
Proverbs18:13 Koŋ ige winyo aber kun mom ru idok i kopporo-ni, ka ce mom itimo amannono inyuto miŋoni dok ikelo lewic i komi keni." 
Proverbs18:14 Dano ka cunye tek twero diyo cunye ka two, ŋa kara ame twero konye ka cunye doŋ odoko goro." 
Proverbs18:15 Ŋat a wie tio twero doko ŋat a ŋeo jami, jo aryek tero yitgi i winyo kop ame meddigi pwonyere." 
Proverbs18:16 Miyo mot yabbi dano yo, mio en tuno i nyim jo adoŋo." 
Proverbs18:17 Ŋat ogeo pido i nyim okiko tamo ni koppere tye kakare, tuno ka omio ŋat epidde opepenyo en." 
Proverbs18:18 Bolo kwir en ame tyeko pyem, ka ce twoni jo aryo ocwiny tye apyem i okiko." 
Proverbs18:19 Konyo dano mio en doko cel atek ame gwok i, ento daa pokowu, mio en kwero miyi kony oko." 
Proverbs18:20 Dano yeŋ i gin aber pi kop oya i doge, kop ame lebe kobo lokere dok konye." 
Proverbs18:21 Akadi to onyo kwo bino pi kop a dano kobo, jo ame maro kobo kop meicel bilo adwogi me kopgi-nono." 
Proverbs18:22 Ŋat onwoŋo dako nwoŋo onwoŋo gin aber, Rwot nwoŋo doŋ opwoc," 
Proverbs18:23 Acan bako doge abaka ka akop, ento alonyo gamokop i dwon agwa," 
Proverbs18:24 Tye jo mogo ame bwolo owotegi abwola ni omaro, ento tye jo mogo ame ikin i kom owotegi kato omego oko." 
Proverbs19:1 Tika ibed acan ame genne, kato bedo i ŋat amiŋ ame kobo kop ogom," 
Proverbs19:2 Mom ber me bedo aboŋo ŋec, mac a lyel birabira mom ceko cem amit." 
Proverbs19:3 Ŋat amiŋ ka opoto i peko pi timmere me miŋo, cako koko-nono i kom Rwot." 
Proverbs19:4 Lonyo nyao dyere meicel, ento can ryemo dyere aryema." 
Proverbs19:5 Acaden agoba mom bwot a mom oketo cannoro i kome, akob kop goba mom bino bwot." 
Proverbs19:6 Jo apol mito ni ŋat a maro konyo jo pwoogi, dok jo maro mako dyere i ŋat ame maro miyo jo mot." 
Proverbs19:7 Ŋat acan omego mere luŋ dago, kara doŋ owote mere bino bedo kede abor rom mene? En ryemo yorgi i kop i doge keken, cite mom romo makogi kadi acel." 
Proverbs19:8 Ŋat ame tye i ryeko marre kene, ŋat ame gwoko niaŋ atut ame etye kede bedo aber." 
Proverbs19:9 Acaden agoba mom bwot a mom oketo cannoro i kome, akob kop goba bino to," 
Proverbs19:10 Amiŋo mom porre bedo i lwak jami apipim, opii daŋ mom porre loyo rwode." 
Proverbs19:11 Ŋat ame wie tio akemo mom mako oyotoyot, weko bal ame otimo i komi aweka kelo kwogo i komi." 
Proverbs19:12 Akemo abaka calo koko eŋatu, ento kica mere calo toyo ame luk i kom lum." 
Proverbs19:13 Atin amiŋ mio pappere to, dako a da calo kot ame ŋido nakanaka." 
Proverbs19:14 Ot kede lonyo itwero leyo i baŋ kwaroni, ento dako aryek Rwot en amio." 
Proverbs19:15 Wackom kom mio dano nino meicel, ŋat a nyap mato kec okato kare." 
Proverbs19:16 Agwok cik a Rwot gwoko kwo mere, ento ŋat ame cao acaa to oko." 
Proverbs19:17 Ŋat akica baŋ ocan nwoŋo omio moko kato baŋya baŋ Rwot, Rwot bino culle pi ticcere-nono." 
Proverbs19:18 Pwony otinoni con kun pwod otino, myero igwokere kur inekgi aneka." 
Proverbs19:19 Ŋat akemo mere gwa akemo mere kelo can i kome, pien ka ce ilare icel en bino mito ni dok ilare." 
Proverbs19:20 Bed ŋat ame gamo tam kun iwinyo gin ame opwonyi kede, me ibed ŋat aryek i anyim." 
Proverbs19:21 Dano bedo kede yik apol meicel cunye, ento gin ame Rwot mito en ame cobere." 
Proverbs19:22 Gin ame mitte i kwo a dano en cuny me mar, acan ber kato agoba." 
Proverbs19:23 Bedo i lworo i kom Rwot tero dano i kwo, ŋat ame lworo Rwot bedo a cunye opye mot, ginnoro arac mom twero gudo kome," 
Proverbs19:24 Awackom luto ciŋe i tabo, ento cwayo cam i doge loo oko." 
Proverbs19:25 Pwod won aŋale, jo amiŋ bino pwonyere, juk ŋat a niaŋ, en bino ŋeyo jami apol." 
Proverbs19:26 Atin a yenyo pappere i kolo dok ryemo tottere oko i paco, obedo atin a kelo lewic kede alane baŋ onywalle." 
Proverbs19:27 Atinna, ka ce ikwero winyo gin ame apwonyi kede, nwoŋo doŋ iweko pwony ame medo ŋecci oko." 
Proverbs19:28 Acaden a konyere pe, cao kop ame oŋolo kakare, jo areco maro timo bal calo balgi." 
Proverbs19:29 Wegi aŋale doŋ oŋolligi kop oko, omiŋo daŋ obino pwodo yo ŋegi." 
Proverbs20:1 Koŋo mio oyeti dok mat okato kare miyo dano yeto jo; ŋat ame omio mit me koŋo obwole nwoŋo mom ryek. 
Proverbs20:2 Akemo abaka rom aroma i koko eŋatu, ŋat ame mio akemo mako abaka nwoŋo mom paro pi kwo mere." 
Proverbs20:3 Ŋat a mom lutte kan a daa tye iye jo woro, ento amiŋo bedo gire da adaa." 
Proverbs20:4 Awackom mom puro poto mere kare ame kot tye, i kare me kac en geno piny nono." 
Proverbs20:5 Yik ame dano tye kede i cunye calo pii atut, ento dano ame tye i niaŋ atut twomo oko," 
Proverbs20:6 Dano twero rabo pi kica mere tyen apol ata, ento ŋa ame twero nwoŋo ŋat a genne?" 
Proverbs20:7 Ŋat ame genne ame cunye ler, ikwae tye kede gum kadi ka en oto." 
Proverbs20:8 Abaka ame bedo i wi kom me ŋolo kop, yeko gin arac luŋ." 
Proverbs20:9 Ŋat ame twero kobo ni, “Doŋ atyeko lwoko cunya doko acil; an doŋ acil odoco aboŋo balloro?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Rwot dag kidi me pimo jami a mom pimo jami kakare, kede gwata pimo jami ame cero jo." 
Proverbs20:11 Kadi atin nyuto kite oko i gin ame etio, ka gin a en etio ber dok atira." 
Proverbs20:12 Yit ame winyo kop kede waŋ ame neno piny, gin luŋ obedo tic a Rwot." 
Proverbs20:13 Kur imar nino anina naka mio idoko acan, yab waŋi me iti tic me ibed i cam abup." 
Proverbs20:14 Awil cucura baŋ acat jami ni, “Rac rac” ento kaojer teŋe te cako wakere." 
Proverbs20:15 Ka ce iŋeo gin ame ikobo, itye i gin me wel akato jabu kede gweŋ alilia." 
Proverbs20:16 Gam ruk a dano ka ce en ojeŋo pi baŋya a ŋat a mom eŋeo, make en i kome ka ce en onwoŋo ocuŋ a rok." 
Proverbs20:17 Kwon ame obwola abwola lim bala kic, ento i ŋe camo dogi poŋ i kwoyo." 
Proverbs20:18 Gamo tam mio yik a dano cobere; kur icak lweny ka yikki mom ba. 
Proverbs20:19 Ŋat a bedo rimo piny i kwokwoto jo, tuco i muŋ a jo ocele, pi mannono myero kur inotte wun i ŋat a kobo kop miŋomiŋo." 
Proverbs20:20 Ŋat a ceno pappere onyo tottere, kwo mere bino bedo calo tara ame tyel ote neko oko, piny te bedo acol icuc." 
Proverbs20:21 Lim ame dano oleo oyotoyot, gum mom iye i agikki mere." 
Proverbs20:22 Kur ikob ni, “Abino culo gin arac i gin arac,” kur Rwot, en ame bino konyi" 
Proverbs20:23 Rwot dag kidi me pimo jami ame mom pimo jami kakare, mijan me cero jo mom ber kadi acel." 
Proverbs20:24 Rwot en ame telo dano i kwo mere nino i nino, kara doŋ dano twero niaŋ kit a kwo mere tye kede i yore aŋo ba?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ŋat ame jalo jami mere baŋ Rwot kun nwoŋo mom koŋ otamo eka te tamo doŋ icen kun doŋ okwoŋo oko, dano-nono nwoŋo calo winyo ame omoko i tol." 
Proverbs20:26 Abaka aryek ŋeo yeko jo mere areco oko, eka te keto can i komgi." 
Proverbs20:27 Cuny dano en obedo tara a Rwot, menyo ginnoro luŋ ame nwoŋo opono iye." 
Proverbs20:28 Abaka ame genne kun daŋ maro jo mere, ri i loc, en ri i wi kommere me loc nakanaka ka ce kite atira." 
Proverbs20:29 Kwogo a dano a pwod tidi obedo teko mere, ento ber a dano oti tye i lwar i wie." 
Proverbs20:30 Adoŋ ame keto ret i kom dano kwanyo gin arac oko, lut daŋ loko kwo a dano bedo aber." 
Proverbs21:1 Rwot en ame loo cuny abaka, en loko kite a en mito calo pii ame otwero miyo mol tuŋŋoro keken." 
Proverbs21:2 Dano twero tamo ni gin ame en etio luŋ tye kakare, ento Rwot pimo cuny dano." 
Proverbs21:3 Timo gin atye atira kede ŋolo kop kakare, en ame Rwot pwoo kato yale kede mot aŋola." 
Proverbs21:4 Waŋ arac ame acae kede cuny a wakere, gin luŋ obedo bal, ento jo areco miogi obedo calo taragi me menyogi." 
Proverbs21:5 Yik ame otamo aber tero dano i nwoŋo jami abup, ŋat ame bunyo tiyo ginnoro oyotoyot bedo acan." 
Proverbs21:6 Lonyo ame onwoŋo pi kobo goba, duny oko calo awura, dok calo owic ame kelo to." 
Proverbs21:7 Tim me kolo a jo areco timo bologi i mac, pien gin okwero tiyo gin a tye kakare." 
Proverbs21:8 Wegi roc lubo yo ogom, ento kite a jo a cunygi ler tye arira." 
Proverbs21:9 Bedo i ot ocele kadi mom ber wok, ber kato nywako ot wun i dako ame maro da." 
Proverbs21:10 Ŋat a cunye maro timo gin arac, kica mom mako i kom dano wadgi." 
Proverbs21:11 Ka ce oketo can i kom won aŋale, ŋat a wie mom tio cako pwonyere, ento ŋat aryek ka ce opwonyo apwonya, waŋe yabere." 
Proverbs21:12 Dano a kite atira neno jo ame tye i udi a jo a timo tim arac, atim tim arac obino canyo oko piny." 
Proverbs21:13 Ŋat ame culo yite oko ka ce acan akok baŋe, kare ame en bino kok, jo daŋ bino culo yitgi oko i koko mere." 
Proverbs21:14 Mot omio imun baŋ ŋat a cunye owaŋ kweo cunye, lim me wilo dano i mun kweo twon akemo adwoŋ oko." 
Proverbs21:15 Ka ŋolo kop woto kakare, jo a kitegi atira bedo i yomcuny, entu jo otimo gin arac bedo i kumo." 
Proverbs21:16 Ŋat ame ya oko i yo me ryeko, bino nwoŋo ni etye ka nywako kabedo i lwak jo oto." 
Proverbs21:17 Ŋat ame maro yomoro ka cunye kaken, bino bedo twon acan amom twerre dok ŋat ame maro mato koŋo kede camo moo keken, mom twero doko alonyo kadi acel." 
Proverbs21:18 Atim tim arac i kom ŋat a kite atira wao can i kome kene, dok ŋat a mom genne wao can i kome pi wuno ŋat a cunye ler." 
Proverbs21:19 Tika ibed giri i tim ata, kato nywako kabedo kede dako ame maro da kede pido atata." 
Proverbs21:20 Lonyo akana abeco ame malo meicel doŋ i ot a lo aryek ento ŋat amiŋ balo mere abala. 
Proverbs21:21 Ŋat ame keto cunye me bedo dano a kite atira kun akica, bino nwoŋo kwo kede woro." 
Proverbs21:22 Ŋat aryek twero mayo boma ame twoni jo atek en a kuro, babalo celgi atek ame ogeŋo oko." 
Proverbs21:23 Ŋat ame gwoko kop ame ya i doge, geŋo ayela mom bino ikome." 
Proverbs21:24 Ŋat a wakere dok daŋ cao jo olwoŋo ni, “Won aŋale,” ame tio ticcere ducu awaka awaka," 
Proverbs21:25 Awackom to i mittere, pien ciŋe nwoŋo okwero mako tic oko." 
Proverbs21:26 Atim tim areco rio paro jami a jo ocele naka ceŋ iyul, ento ŋat a kite atira poko gin etye kede i cuny aler." 
Proverbs21:27 Rwot dag mot ame atim tim arac ŋolo me yale, kara doŋ ka en okelo motterenono i cuny a mom ber kono?" 
Proverbs21:28 Acaden agoba bino to, ento ŋat ame tamokoppere odoco kun mom ru okobo bino ri nakanaka." 
Proverbs21:29 Ŋat a timo tim arac mom lwor, ento ŋat a cunye ler koŋ tamo kite me bedo mere." 
Proverbs21:30 Ryeko mere, niaŋ atut, tam ame omio, gin luŋ mom ginnoro i nyim Rwot." 
Proverbs21:31 Aguragura oyiko cutu pi kare me lweny, ento loc tye gire i ciŋ Rwot." 
Proverbs22:1 Bedo i nyiŋ aber ber kato bedo kede lonyo adwoŋ; pwoc ame opwoyi kede ber kato kit limmoro ducu. 
Proverbs22:2 Alonyo kede acan gin acel, Rwot gire en oketogi luŋ." 
Proverbs22:3 Ŋat a wie tio neno peko a bino te geŋere, ento ŋat ame kwia piny medde mere anyim naka ka opoto i can." 
Proverbs22:4 Ŋat ame wor, ame lworo Rwot, bino nwoŋo lonyo, woro kede kwo perakino." 
Proverbs22:5 Okuto kede owic bedo i yo a jo a kitegi ogom, ŋat a gwokkere kene pe lubo yorgi." 
Proverbs22:6 Pwony atin con i yo ame en myero bin lubi, en mom dok bino ya i yo-nono ka doŋ oteggo." 
Proverbs22:7 Acan bedo i te loc alonyo, dok akwa-kwac bedo opii a ŋat edeno lim i baŋe." 
Proverbs22:8 Ŋat acoo koti me balo ŋolo kop kakare, bino nwoŋo can acalo gin ocek pi ticcere-nono, lut me akemo mere bino poto piny nono." 
Proverbs22:9 Ŋat a cunye yom i konyo jo bino nwoŋo gum, pien en nywako cammere kede ocan." 
Proverbs22:10 Ryem aŋal jo oko i akinawu, lweny kede ayet bino gik oko." 
Proverbs22:11 Ŋat ame cunye cil dok maro kobo kop me kica, dano-nono bino bedo awot abaka." 
Proverbs22:12 Rwot ciko waŋe i ŋec a dano tye kede, en kwero kop a jo a mom genne oko," 
Proverbs22:13 Anyapo kobo ni, “Eŋato gire tye oko, mio bino neka i dye yo ata.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Dog dako alaya calo twon bur atut, ŋat ame akemo omako Rwot i kome bino poto iye." 
Proverbs22:15 Miŋo boye i cuny atin ka pwod tidi, cite lut me pwony ryemo oko i cunye." 
Proverbs22:16 Ŋat ame wuno ocan pi medo lonyo mere, onyo ame mio mot baŋ olonyo, bino bedo twon acan." 
Proverbs22:17 Koŋ icik yiti iwiny kop me ryeko meicel, mi tammi bed i kop ame aŋeo ame apwonyi kede," 
Proverbs22:18 pien ibino bedo kede yomcuny ka ce imako a wi mom wil i ye, kun i kare luŋ mom orwenyo i dogi." 
Proverbs22:19 Man bino miyo iketo genni i kom Rwot; man en gin omio akobo oko baŋi tin. 
Proverbs22:20 Atyeko coyo kop apapat piri, gin pyeradek." 
Proverbs22:21 Koppono tye me miyi ŋeyo gin aber dok a tye ateni, man bino miyo idwoko kop kakare ka ce jo oori." 
Proverbs22:22 Kur ima ginnoro i baŋ acan, pien en mom romo timo ginnoro i komi, dok daŋ kur idi ŋattoro ame peko odio kai ŋolo kop." 
Proverbs22:23 Pien Rwot bino pido pirgi, te yako kwo ajo ame yako kwogi." 
Proverbs22:24 Kur imak dyere kede jo ame akemogi gwa, kur daŋ imar wot kedgi," 
Proverbs22:25 naka mio yin daŋ ikoporo kiteginono, eka ite moko i owic." 
Proverbs22:26 Kur ibed ŋat ame maro jiŋo jami mere atata, kun icun pi baŋya a jo ocele." 
Proverbs22:27 Pien ka ce gin me culo bino loyi, obino tero anaka itanda me butoni." 
Proverbs22:28 Kur ilok waŋ kiŋa me poko lobo, ame rik kwariwu oketo con." 
Proverbs22:29 Ineno dano ame adiro i ticcere? Dano-nono bino bedo atic ame tio i nyim abaka, en mom bino tic baŋ jo ocele." 
Proverbs23:1 Ka ce itye icam wun kede aloccoro, koŋ ipar pi ŋat a tye i nyimi-nono," 
Proverbs23:2 tem diyo miti mogo, kadi bed kec onwoŋo okuto mac i komi."
