Proverbs23:3 Kur imwony lao meicel i cammere a mit wokkono, pien cammono tye calo owic me ciki." 
Proverbs23:4 Kur ilol komi pi nwoŋo lonyo, bed ŋat aryek iwek ginnoro bedi." 
Proverbs23:5 Pien ka ibedo keto cunyi i kom lim, gire ya oko, twero ya oyot i kare moro keken, calo cur ame oyaro bwome te twarre gire wot oko malo." 
Proverbs23:6 Kur icam cam a ŋat awany, kur imwony lao meicel i cammere a mit wokkono." 
Proverbs23:7 Pien dano-nono rom aroma i ŋat ame kobbi ni, “Cami, mat on,” kun cunye akolo gin apat i komi." 
Proverbs23:8 Bino miyo iŋoko cam amittono iyii oko, kop amit ame ikobo me pwoye te to nono." 
Proverbs23:9 Kur ikob koppi baŋ lo amiŋ, pien bino cayo kop me ryeko ame ikobo-nono acaa." 
Proverbs23:10 Kur ilok waŋ kina me poko lobo a rik oketo con, kur daŋ idony i lobo a jo ame onywalgi oto oko;" 
Proverbs23:11 pien ŋat ame lakoro kodi jo-nono tek meicel, en bino pidi pirgi." 
Proverbs23:12 Bed ŋat ame keto cunye i gin ame opwonye kede, kun ciko yite i kop ame twero medo ŋecci." 
Proverbs23:13 Kur iwek pwonyo atin atidi, pien ka ilebo dude i lut mom twero to." 
Proverbs23:14 Ka ce ilebo dude i lut, ibino laro kwo mere mom donyo i lyel piny." 
Proverbs23:15 Atinna, ka ce ryeko tye i cunyi, an daŋ cunya bino bedo yom." 
Proverbs23:16 Abino lelo meicel, ka ce kop a ya i dogi mwonya." 
Proverbs23:17 Kur ibed i nyeko i kom obalo, ento myero imedde lworo Rwot kare luŋ," 
Proverbs23:18 Ateteni, gin oyiko pi kare me anyim gire tye abino, gen ame itye kede mom bino kec nono." 
Proverbs23:19 Winy ba, atinna, me ibed ryek, mi tammi bed i yo ame itye ka lubo." 
Proverbs23:20 Kur ibed i akina jo a mer i koŋo, akadi i akina oworo me riŋo," 
Proverbs23:21 pien omero kede jo owor bino doko ocan, nino anina bino kelligi ruko opeke." 
Proverbs23:22 Winy kop a pappi ame onywali, kur daŋ ica totti ka doŋ oti." 
Proverbs23:23 Wil kop me ateni, kur icat oko, wil ryeko, wil daŋ pwony kede niaŋ atut." 
Proverbs23:24 Papa a dano a kite atira bino lelo meicel, ŋat ame onywalo wode aryek, cunye bino bedo yom i kome." 
Proverbs23:25 Mi pappi kede totti bed i yomcuny, mi totti bed kede lelo." 
Proverbs23:26 Atinna, tim ber iwiny gin ame akobbi, kun waŋi neno gin ame an atimo." 
Proverbs23:27 Pien alaya obedo twon bur atut, dako alaya calo bur pii adidiŋ." 
Proverbs23:28 Ŋa ce a can opoto i kome? Ŋa atye cwercuny? Ŋa a da? Ŋa a tye i koko moro? 
Proverbs23:29 Ŋa ame burroro tye i kome kun mom tye ginnoro owane? Ŋa a waŋe obok pee? 
Proverbs23:30 Jo ame ri nakanaka i te koŋo, jo ame woto i bilo kit koŋo apapat." 
Proverbs23:31 Kur inen koŋo ka pwod rema, koŋo ame pwod yenyo ayenya i kopo, donyo i kom dano mot." 
Proverbs23:32 Kodi koŋo-nono kwirrere wuno dano calo kwir a twol, wuno dano calo kwir ororo." 
Proverbs23:33 Waŋi te cako neno gigi mogo a welo meicel, ite cako tamo gigi mogo a konygi mom." 
Proverbs23:34 Ibedo doŋ calo dano obuto i dye nam, calo dano obuto i wi pagi me mel malo." 
Proverbs23:35 Ibino cako kobo kop atata ni, “Jo ogoa cite mom gire owana, gin opwoda cite mom gire awinyo kadi acel. Koŋo kara bino ya i wia caa adi? Amito dok cako yenyo koŋo me amata.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Nyeko myero kur maki ikom otim tim areco, kur ipar ni kono ibedo kedgi;" 
Proverbs24:2 pien cunygi kolo timo tim me byemi, kopgi opoŋ i kop me timo jo rac." 
Proverbs24:3 Ryeko en amio ogero ot, niaŋ atut mio paco cuŋ atek;" 
Proverbs24:4 ŋec mio jami me wel, ame yomoro cuny durre meicel i ot." 
Proverbs24:5 Dano aryek tye i twer adwoŋ kato ŋat atek; ŋat a tye i ŋec oromo kato atekom oko. 
Proverbs24:6 Pien tel me ryeko twero miyo iloo lweny, dok omi-tam ka pol twero miyo jo loo pekogi ducu." 
Proverbs24:7 Koppogo me ryeko loo ŋat amiŋ oko, en mom ŋamo doge kadi acel ka jo tye aparo kop a pire tek." 
Proverbs24:8 Ŋat ame yiko yik me timo gin arac, olwoŋo ni won acupe." 
Proverbs24:9 Roto time me miŋo en bal, jo dag won aŋale." 
Proverbs24:10 Ka ce idoko agoro i kare me can, nwoŋo tekoni nok." 
Proverbs24:11 Lar jo ame atero me aneka; lar jo ame to obabaŋo oko," 
Proverbs24:12 Ka ce ikobo wunu ni, “Wan giwa yam mom oŋeo”; ŋat ame pimo cuny jo mom romo ŋeyo? Itamo ni ŋat ame ŋio gin atye i cunywa mom ŋeo? En mom bino culo dano acel acel kun lubo gin ame en otio?" 
Proverbs24:13 Atinna, cam moo kic, pien ber, moo kic ame cwer i pedo mit meicel." 
Proverbs24:14 Ŋe ni ryeko daŋ rom aroma i moo kic, ka ce inwoŋo, anyimmi doŋ ennono, gen ame itye kede mom bino kec nono." 
Proverbs24:15 Kur ibed buto i te ot a ŋat a kite atira, calo otim tim arac, kur itim timmoro me byemi i paco mere." 
Proverbs24:16 Pien ŋat a kite atira twero poto tyen abiro, cite ya oko malo, ento atim tim arac can reto oko atwal." 
Proverbs24:17 Kur ilel ba, ka okworri opoto, kur daŋ ibed i yomcuny ka ce akworri ogatte;" 
Proverbs24:18 naka mio Rwot neno cunye te waŋ, akemo mere te ya oko i kome." 
Proverbs24:19 Kur ibed i par pi jo a kitegi reco, nyeko kur maki i kom otim tim areco," 
Proverbs24:20 pien dano arac anyimmere pe, tara otim tim areco obino neko oko." 
Proverbs24:21 Atinna; lwor Rwot kede abaka, kur ikwer winyo ŋattoro akinagi;" 
Proverbs24:22 pien can ame ya i baŋgi bino poto oyotoyot; myero iŋe kite ame ŋat acel acel acel i akinagi bino jwero kede jo. 
Proverbs24:23 Magi daŋ obedo koppogo ame jo aryek okobo, Leŋere i ŋolo kop mom ber kadi acel," 
Proverbs24:24 Ŋat ame kobbi atim tim arac ni, “Yin balloro mom i komi,” jo me lobo apol bino ceno, rok luŋ bino dago." 
Proverbs24:25 Ento jo ame juko jo ame timo gin arac bino bedo gigi aber, dok gum bino bedo i komgi." 
Proverbs24:26 Ŋat ame gamo dogi i kop atira, rom aroma i ŋat ame kwako kori kun tye i mar adwoŋ." 
Proverbs24:27 Yik ticci oko con, tyek ticci me poto daŋ oko ducu, eka ite cako doŋ gero odi." 
Proverbs24:28 Kur ibed acaden i kom dano wadwu aboŋo te kop, kopporo me goba myero kur ya i dogi." 
Proverbs24:29 Kur ikob ni, “Abino time kite ame en otima kede, abino cule pi gin ame en otimo i koma.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Abeo i ŋet poto a dano a kome wac, i ŋet poto olok a ŋat a wie mom tio." 
Proverbs24:31 Nen ba, okuto onwoŋo ocule iye acula, kun tere piny owummere oko ayilayila, aco gweŋe me apama cellere orutte oko piny." 
Proverbs24:32 Aneno ate bedo lwodo koppere i cunya, nenona-nono opwonya." 
Proverbs24:33 Koŋ ibut inin giri do, dol ciŋi giri me iwe," 
Proverbs24:34 can bino poto i komi kite ame ayak poto kede i kom dano, kec bino poto i komi calo ŋat ame doŋ orukkere oko me lweny." 
Proverbs25:1 Magi en pwony a Culeman ame jo a Kejekia, abaka me Juda ocoo i buk," 
Proverbs25:2 Kwogo Obaŋa kano imun, ento kwogo obakki yabo imun kannaler," 
Proverbs25:3 Kite acalo polo bor ame mom itwero yito tuno iye-ni, dok lobo daŋ tut ame mom itwero kunyo ituco tere, amannono daŋ mom itwero tato tam a tye i cuny obakki." 
Proverbs25:4 Kwany cet ryal oko i kom ryal, atet twero teto bedo aber odoco;" 
Proverbs25:5 kwany jo areco oko i nyim abaka, kom loc abaka bino moko i kite atira." 
Proverbs25:6 Kur imiye keni me cuŋ i nyim abaka, onyo me cuŋ i kabedo me dito;" 
Proverbs25:7 pien bedo ber ka ocwaŋi ni, “Biye ibed kan”, kato ame ocwai acwaa teŋe i nyim oloc." 
Proverbs25:8 Gin ame doŋ ineno oko i waŋi, kur iru kelo i nyim okiko; kara ibino timo ŋo icennere ka awoti omii lewic?" 
Proverbs25:9 Lar koppi-nono wun awotti, wun aryo, dok kur iyab muŋ a ŋat ocele kannaler;" 
Proverbs25:10 naka mio ŋat ame owinyo mii lewic, nyini te bale oko atwal." 
Proverbs25:11 Kop ame okobo i kite ame mitte ikokome, rom aroma i cal jabu ame omwono i kom ryal." 
Proverbs25:12 Kop ame ŋat aryek juko kede ŋat a winyo kop, rom aroma atem me jabu onyo gi-kwogo me jabu." 
Proverbs25:13 Akwena ame genne calo pee aŋic i kare me kac, baŋ jo ame oore; en dwoggo cuny adwoŋŋere ame oore." 
Proverbs25:14 Ŋat ame wakere i mot ame en mom omio, rom aroma i pol kede yamo aboŋo kot." 
Proverbs25:15 Mwolo twero konyi me loyo tam aloc, kop amit mio iloo teko mere." 
Proverbs25:16 Ka ce inwoŋo moo kic, cam ame oromi keken, naka mio poŋ yii ite dok ŋoko oko." 
Proverbs25:17 Kur ibed lolo tuŋ awotti alola, naka mio ool kedi oko, te cako dagi." 
Proverbs25:18 Ŋat ame pido kop me goba i kom awottere, rom aroma i lut me romo, onyo pala bat, onyo atero abit meicel." 
Proverbs25:19 Geno ŋat a mom genne i kare me can, rom aroma i bedo i laki ame otop, onyo i tyeni ame oŋwalo." 
Proverbs25:20 Wero wer baŋ ŋat a cwercuny onuro oko, rom aroma i ŋat ame kwanyo boŋo i kome oko kun piny ŋic, dok daŋ rom aroma i kado ame oketo i wan bur," 
Proverbs25:21 Ka ce kec oneko amoneni, mie cam, ka oryo pii ocire, mie pii mati;" 
Proverbs25:22 Pien ka itimo amano, ibino yido loti mac i wie. Rwotbino culi pi timmono." 
Proverbs25:23 Yamo ame kodo i tun kide kelo kot, amannono daŋ kwoto jo kelo akemo." 
Proverbs25:24 Bedo i ot ocele akadi mom ber wok, ber kato nywako ot wun i dako ame maro da." 
Proverbs25:25 Amut aber oya i kannabor, rom aroma i pii aŋic ame omio baŋ dano ame oryo pii ociro," 
Proverbs25:26 Dano a kite atira ame ye atim gin arac timo gin arac, rom aroma akoŋ ame coto dwoŋ iye onyo waŋ pii a doŋ oballe." 
Proverbs25:27 Camo moo kic okato kare mom ber, pwoyo jo kare luŋ daŋ mom ber." 
Proverbs25:28 Dano ame mom romo loye kene rom aroma i boma ame oturo ote weko apama cellere luŋ pe. 
Proverbs26:1 Woro ŋat amiŋ, rom aroma i pee ame corre i kare me lyeto, onyo kot ame cwe i kare me kac." 
Proverbs26:2 Cen ame oceni kede nononono mom timo ginnoro i komi, calo aculegwec ame twarre te riŋo atata, dok rom aliboro ame twarre riŋo oko." 
Proverbs26:3 Aguragura mito go, kana mito twe doge, dano amiŋ daŋ mito agoa." 
Proverbs26:4 Kur idok i kop a ŋat amiŋ kun ilubo kittere me miŋo, naka mio yin daŋ dok ibedo a rom aroma kede." 
Proverbs26:5 Dok i kop a ŋat amiŋ kun ilubo kite me miŋo, naka mio en nenne kene ni eryek." 
Proverbs26:6 Dano ame oro ŋat amiŋ me tero kwena mere, nwoŋo tye aŋolo tyene kene, kun ayenyo can i kakare." 
Proverbs26:7 Carokop ame jo amiŋ kobo, rom aroma aŋwalo ame tyene ogem agema malo." 
Proverbs26:8 Dano ame pwoo ŋat amiŋ, rom aroma i ŋat ame tweo gweŋ i atindio atwea." 
Proverbs26:9 Carokop ame ŋat amiŋ kobo, rom aroma okuto ame coobo ciŋ amer koŋo." 
Proverbs26:10 Ŋat ame mio amiŋo moro ata, ticcere onyo amer koŋo, rom aroma i won atero ame wano jo luŋ." 
Proverbs26:11 Dano amiŋ ame medde ameda i miŋo mere, rom aroma i gwok ame lokere ŋano ŋokkere." 
Proverbs26:12 Ŋat ame wakere pi ryeko mere en kene, gen ame en tye kede goro kato me a ŋat amiŋ oko." 
Proverbs26:13 Anyapo kobo ni, “Eŋatu gire tye i dye yo! Eŋatu gire tye i dye gudo!”" 
Proverbs26:14 Awackom lokkere i kabuto mere, kite ame peta me doggola wire kede tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi," 
Proverbs26:15 Awackom luto ciŋe i tabo, ento cwalo cam i doge loo oko." 
Proverbs26:16 Awackom genne kene ni eryek, ame kato jo abiro ame twero dok i peny i ryeko." 
Proverbs26:17 Ŋat ame donyo i daa ame mom mege, rom aroma i ŋattoro ame mako gwokkoro ata kede yite." 
Proverbs26:18 Ŋat ame bwolo owote mere kun kobo ni, “An gire aratte arata”;" 
Proverbs26:19 rom aroma apoa ame bao dano i dog mac, onyo ame bao atero ame twero neko dano." 
Proverbs26:20 Yen ka pe, mac to oko, amannono daŋ, ka akwot jo pe, daa gik oko." 
Proverbs26:21 Ŋat a maro da, nyao lweny, rom aroma i miri onyo yen ame oonyo i mac okur." 
Proverbs26:22 Kop akwot jo mit meicel, winyo mit calo mwonyo kwon obwol." 
Proverbs26:23 Ŋat a kop i doge lim kun cunye col, rom aroma i pala ame opuo i kom gulu lobo, te ryeny aryenya." 
Proverbs26:24 Adag jo lokere aloka i kop i doge, kun kano goba i cunye;" 
Proverbs26:25 ka ce en okobo kopporo i kica meicel kur iye, pien okano gigi mogo a mom ber i cunye." 
Proverbs26:26 Kadi bed en kan adage ame tye i cunye, ento timmere arac bino nen oko kannaler i nyim lwak." 
Proverbs26:27 Akuny bur, rette i burrere-nono, aba-gweŋ gweŋŋere-nono dwogo cele." 
Proverbs26:28 Adag jo, dago ŋat ame emito bwalo, kop goba kadi mit kelo ka can keken." 
Proverbs27:1 Kur iwakere pi gin ame bino bedo diki, pien mom iŋeo gin ame bino timere i ninonono." 
Proverbs27:2 Jo ocele en a myero pwoi, pe myero ipwoye keni, welo moro en a myero pwoi, pe yin ikomi." 
Proverbs27:3 Gweŋ pek, kwoyo daŋ pek, cite ayela ame ŋat amiŋ kelo pek katogi luŋ," 
Proverbs27:4 Akemo gwa, iniga daŋ gwa meicel, cite nyeko rac katogi ducu." 
Proverbs27:5 Ŋat ame juki i waŋ ceŋ, ber kato ŋat ame marrere i komi bedo ka i cunye." 
Proverbs27:6 Awotti ame mari ka owaŋo cunyi pi mar ame en tye kede i komi, pwod itwero geno, cite akworri ka obolo ciŋe i ŋuti rac meicel." 
Proverbs27:7 Ŋat oyeŋ kwero naka kic ame lim wok-ki, ento ŋat ame kec oneko, kadi cam okwok mitte amita." 
Proverbs27:8 Ŋat ame oweko paco mere, te wot ata, calli winyo ame oya oweko ode oko." 
Proverbs27:9 Moo wir akur yomoro cuny dano, cite peko balo cuny dano abala." 
Proverbs27:10 Kur iwek awotti kede awot a pappi, kur iriŋ i ot ominni i kare me can, Awotti ame ceggi kedi ber, kato ominni ame tye kannabor." 
Proverbs27:11 Atinna, bed ŋat aryek me cunya bed yom, me wek gamokop a ŋat ame kobo kop arac i koma bed yot." 
Proverbs27:12 Ŋat a wie tio neno peko ame abino i nyime te geŋere, ento ŋat ame kwia piny medde ameda anyim naka ka opoto i can," 
Proverbs27:13 Gam ruk a dano ka ce en onwoŋo ojeŋo pi baŋya a ŋat ame mom eŋeo, make en ikome ka ce inwoŋo en ocuŋ arok." 
Proverbs27:14 Ŋat ame lammi awottere gum ibai kun redo kede areda, obino kobo ni en oceno awottere acena." 
Proverbs27:15 Dako ame daa nakanaka, calo kot ame nido naka ceŋ iyul." 
Proverbs27:16 Juko kodi dako-nono rom aroma i juko yamo, onyo jolo moo i cuny ciŋ." 
Proverbs27:17 Nyonyo rabo nyonyo wadgi, dano daŋ twenyo dano wadgi." 
Proverbs27:18 Agwok oduro camo nyige, ŋat ame gwoko adwoŋŋere, oketo kwogo i kome." 
Proverbs27:19 Kite acalo inenne keni i pii, amannono daŋ, gin i cunyi nyuto kiteni." 
Proverbs27:20 Lyel me yiko jo oto mom yeŋ, waŋ dano daŋ mom ol i neno piny." 
Proverbs27:21 Nyonyo acalo ryal kede jabu otemo i mac, kite a dano ŋeye i kite a jo pake kede," 
Proverbs27:22 Amiŋo kadi idin anyul onyo alek me odo kal, miŋo mere mom rwenyo i wie." 
Proverbs27:23 Myero iŋe kite ame rommi tye kede aber, kwa dokki i cunyi ducu," 
Proverbs27:24 pien lim mom perakino nakanaka, loc me lobo daŋ mom ri i doggola acel atwal." 
Proverbs27:25 Kare ame lum doŋ mom nen, lum anyen dok cako tu, ame lum i kor kiddi daŋ doŋ ocoko oko luŋ." 
Proverbs27:26 Yer rommi bino konyi me aruka, dyegi bino konyi me wilo poto;" 
Proverbs27:27 cak dyegi bino bedo adwoŋ ame romowu me amata, kun romo jo me odi kede aŋecani luŋ." 
Proverbs28:1 Atim gin arac ŋweco aboŋo ŋat ame aryeme, ento ŋat ame cunye atira, cunye tek calo eŋatu." 
Proverbs28:2 Lobo ka oballe, oloccere bedo apipim, cite ka aloccere niaŋ, dok tye kede ŋec oromo, lobo-nono medde bedo i kuc kare alac." 
Proverbs28:3 Acan ame wuno ocan wadgi, rom aroma i kot ame corre balo cam a jo luŋ." 
Proverbs28:4 Jo ame weko lubo cik a Rwot, pwoo otim tim areco, ento jo ame gwoko cik a Rwot tye acalo okworgi." 
Proverbs28:5 Jo areco mom niaŋ kop kom ŋolo kop atira, ento jo ame cunygi tye kom Rwot niaŋ iye odoco." 
Proverbs28:6 Tika ibed acan ame genne, kato bedo alonyo ame kobo kop ogom." 
Proverbs28:7 Ŋat ame gwoko cik bedo atin aryek, ento atin ame mako dyere i jo owor mio pappaere lewic." 
Proverbs28:8 Ka lonyo obino i ciŋi pi cero jo i mit me nwoŋo agoba, limmi-nono bino kobo oko iciŋ ŋat ame timo ocan kica." 
Proverbs28:9 Ka ce dano okwero winyo cik a Rwot oko, kwaccere daŋ bino bedo gin ame Rwot dag winyo." 
Proverbs28:10 Ŋat ame telo ŋat ame cunye ler iyo arac, bino rette i bur ame en okunyo; ento ŋat ame balloro mom i kome bino nwoŋo jami abeco." 
Proverbs28:11 Alonyo genne kene ni eryek, ento acan ame wie tio ŋeo tammere oko," 
Proverbs28:12 Ka ce dano a kite atira odoko aloc, jo ŋatte i twon yomcuny adwoŋ meicel, ento ka ŋat a kite rac odoko aloc, jo luŋ pono oko." 
Proverbs28:13 Ŋat ame kano ballere mom twero bedo aber, ento ŋat ame tuco mege oko, te weko, obino timo kica." 
Proverbs28:14 Ŋat ame lworo Rwot i kare luŋ tye kede winyo, ento ŋat ame cunye nwaŋ bino poto i can," 
Proverbs28:15 Aloc ame kite rac, ame jo mere ocan, calo eŋatu ame mor onyo ŋuu ame yenyo leyi me amwoda." 
Proverbs28:16 Aloc ame niaŋŋere nok, wuno jo meicel, ento ŋat ame dag lim ame onwoŋo i yo a mom atira bino ri kare alac." 
Proverbs28:17 Ka ce bal me remo a dano moro ocele onuo dano moro oko, dano-nono bino ŋwec oko atata tuno waŋ ame oto, ŋattoro myero kur konye." 
Proverbs28:18 Jo ame tio gin ame tye atira bino bwot, ento jo ame kitegi ogom bino poto i bur." 
Proverbs28:19 Ŋat ame puro poto mere abup, bino nwoŋo cam abup, ento ŋat ame balo kare mere i gin a konnyere pe, bino bedo i twon can adwoŋ." 
Proverbs28:20 Lonyo bino bedo adwoŋ baŋ ŋat ame genne, ento ŋat ame mito lony oyot mom bino bwot a mom oketo can i kome." 
Proverbs28:21 Leŋere i ŋolo kop mom ber, dano twero timo gin arac kom pi kwon aduno moro." 
Proverbs28:22 Dano ame adur mito ni elony oyot, cite mom niaŋ ni can bino poto i kome," 
Proverbs28:23 Ŋat ame juko dano wadgi obino pwoyo atek meicel icennere, kato ŋat ame bedo duro doge keken," 
Proverbs28:24 Ŋat ame mao gi-a pappere onyo mea tottere, te kobo ni, “Mannono gire mom bal”, obedo awot a ŋat ame neko jo." 
Proverbs28:25 Ŋat owor nyao lweny, ento ŋat oketo gennere i kom Rwot bino doko alonyo." 
Proverbs28:26 Ŋat ame genne kene, obedo dano amiŋ, ento ŋat ame timo tim me ryeko bino bwot." 
Proverbs28:27 Ŋat ame konyo ocan, lim mom bino rwenyo i ciŋe, ento ŋat ame waŋe wummere oko, bino coko lwak ceŋ apipim." 
Proverbs28:28 Ka ce dano arac ocako loc, jo luŋ pono oko, ento ka loccere ogik, jo a kitegi atira cako nya." 
Proverbs29:1 Ŋat ame ojuko kare luŋ kun mom ŋut, bino tur odoco a mom dok ya malo." 
Proverbs29:2 Ka jo a kitegi atira tye i loc, jo luŋ lelo, ento ka jo areco tye i loc, cur ciro jo oko." 
Proverbs29:3 Ŋat ame maro ryeko, yommoro cuny pappere, ento ŋat ame mako dyere olaya, balo limmere abala." 
Proverbs29:4 Lobo bedo aber ka abaka ŋolo kop atira, ento ka abaka maro lim ame owile kede i muŋ, lobo bale oko." 
Proverbs29:5 Ŋat ame pwoo owote mere nononono, ciko bwo ame tyene en i kome bino moko iye." 
Proverbs29:6 Ŋat arac moko i owic me ballere, ento ŋat a kite atira wero kun daŋ lelo," 
Proverbs29:7 Ŋat a kite atira ŋeo gin a myero tim pi ocan, ento ŋat a kite rac mom ŋeo ginnoro iye." 
Proverbs29:8 Wegi aŋale kelo arubaruba i akina jo i boma, ento ŋat aryek kweo akemo a jo akwea." 
Proverbs29:9 Ka ce dano aryeko opyem kede dano amiŋ, amiŋo no, te redo kede nyere aboŋo liŋ." 
Proverbs29:10 Jo ame maro neko owotegi dag ŋat a balloro mom i kome, otim tim areco mito neke aneka." 
Proverbs29:11 Amiŋo nyuto akemo mere kannaler ento ŋat ame ryek dio cunye mot. 
Proverbs29:12 Ka ce aloc maro winyo kop me goba, oticcere adoŋo luŋ bedo timo tim areco." 
Proverbs29:13 Acan kede ŋat ame wune gin luŋ acel, Rwot en ame omiogi wangi me neno piny." 
Proverbs29:14 Ka ce aloc ŋolo kop ocan, kun terogi arorom, loccere perakino kare alac." 
Proverbs29:15 Goyo atin kede juko, mio atin doko aryek, ento atin ame oweko ata mio tottere lewic." 
Proverbs29:16 Ka ce otim tim areco tye i loc, bal medde ameda, ento jo a kitegi atira neno kite ame gin poto kede." 
Proverbs29:17 Pwony atinni con, en bino miyi iwe, bino miyo cunyi bedo yom." 
Proverbs29:18 Kan ame dano moro pe iye ame niaŋo jo i gin Obaŋa mito, jo iye gak oko, ento ŋat ame gwoko cik tye ked winyo." 
Proverbs29:19 Kop me dog keken, mom romo pwonyo amiro, kadi bed en niaŋ, ento mom romo keto cunye iye." 
Proverbs29:20 Ŋat ame kobo kop oyot aboŋo koŋ tamo gin ekobo, gen ame en tye kede goro kato me a ŋat amiŋ oko," 
Proverbs29:21 Ŋat a pito amiro mere i jami luŋ geye i tino mere, amiro-nono bino doko ale jami mere icennere." 
Proverbs29:22 Won akemo tubo jo, dok won iniga mio bal bedo dwoŋ," 
Proverbs29:23 Awaka dwoko dano adwoka piny, ento mwolo mio dano doko ŋat a jo woro." 
Proverbs29:24 A wot a ŋat ame akwo nwoŋo mito nekere kene, en winyo kite ame alammi akwo gum arac cite mom twero tuco." 
Proverbs29:25 Lworo jo mio dano moko i owic, ento ŋat ame geno Rwot bedo kede kuc." 
Proverbs29:26 Jo apol mito ni oloc pwoogi; ento Rwot tero jo ducu arorom. 
Proverbs29:27 Jo a kitegi atira dag otim tim areco, otim tim areco daŋ dag jo a kitegi atira." 
Proverbs30:1 Magi en kop ame Agur wot a Jake okobo; Aol gira doŋ oko, Ama Obaŋa, aol gira doŋ oko." 
Proverbs30:2 Ateteni, an gira amiŋ meicel, ame mom aporre bedo dano, ŋec ame atye kede mom rom kede me a dano." 
Proverbs30:3 An mom opwonya kede ryeko moro; mom daŋ atye kede ŋeccoro i kom ŋat Acil. 
Proverbs30:4 Ŋa ame yam koŋ oyito malo i polo, te dok dwogo piny? Ŋa ame yam ocoko yamo luŋ te mako i cuny ciŋe? Ŋa ame yam oboo pii kede boŋo mere? Ŋa ame omio acakki me wi podo luŋ omoko? Nyiŋ dano-nono ŋa? Nyiŋ wode ŋa? Aniaŋ aber ni yin gire iŋeo!" 
Proverbs30:5 Kop luŋ ame Obaŋa okobo bedo ateni; en obedo kwot baŋ jo ame riŋo laro baŋe. 
Proverbs30:6 Myero kur dok imed kopporo i kom mege, naka mio en juki, ite bedo agoba." 
Proverbs30:7 Tye jami aryo ame an akwai iye; ame pe myero itwona kun mom ru ato. 
Proverbs30:8 Kwany oko i baŋa kobo kop me goba, kede bwolo jo, kur imia abed acan onyo alonyo, pita icam ame mitte ikokome;" 
Proverbs30:9 naka mia ayeŋ atek ateka ate kweri oko, kun akobo ni, “Rwot kara en ŋa?” Onyo adoko acan ate cako kwala kwo, ate balo nyiŋ Obaŋana." 
Proverbs30:10 Kur ibal nyiŋ amiro moro baŋ adwoŋŋere, naka mio en ceni bal te bedo i wii," 
Proverbs30:11 Tye jo ocele ame ceno papagi, mom daŋ olammi totogi winyo." 
Proverbs30:12 Tye jo ocele ame nenne kengi ni gin ocil, aco kun cilo pwod onwanne anwana i komgi." 
Proverbs30:13 Tye jo ocele ame lyerre meicel, kun otamo ni gin obedo jo amalo meicel." 
Proverbs30:14 Tye jo ocele ame lakgi odoko gi-lwenygi, lakgi tye acalo pala me romogi, me jwero ocan oko i lobo kede jo ame okonyo akonya ame tye i akina jo." 
Proverbs30:15 Edike tye kede anyira mere aryo ame gin luŋ okobo ni, “Mia, mia ba,” Tye jami adek a mom yeŋ kadi acel, tye jami aŋwen a mom kobo ni, “Doŋ oromo,”" 
Proverbs30:16 lyel me yiko jo, oraŋa a mom nywal, lobo otwo imek, ame mito pii kare luŋ, kede mac ame kare moro pe koŋ kobo ni, “Doŋ oromo.”" 
Proverbs30:17 Atin ame ŋalo pappere i waŋe, bwono tottere abwona kun mom winyo, winy me kulo bino woto toŋ waŋe oko, acut te camokome oko." 
Proverbs30:18 Tye jami adek ame malo meicel baŋa; tye jami aŋwen ame mom aniaŋ iye; 
Proverbs30:19 Yo ame cur beo iye malo i polo, yo ame twol lubo i wi lela, yo ame mel beo iye i dye nam adoŋo, kede kite ame ico bedo i nyako." 
Proverbs30:20 Dako ame alaya bedo kit man, en cemo te weyo doge oko, eka te kobo ni, “An gire mom atimo ginnoro arac.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Tye jami adek ame myelo kom lobo meicel, tye jami aŋwen ame lobo mom romo kanyo kadi acel:" 
Proverbs30:22 opii ka odoko abaka, kede amiŋo ka ocamo cem oyeŋ;" 
Proverbs30:23 kede dako a jo mom maro ka onyomere, kede aŋeca ka oleo kaka dako a yam loc." 
Proverbs30:24 Tye jami aŋwen i lobo ame mom dito kadi acel, ento gin oryek meicel:" 
Proverbs30:25 mori mom tek kadi acel, ento gin ogwoko camgi me acama i kare me oro." 
Proverbs30:26 Anyeri kidi obedo leyi a mom twero ginnoro kadi acel, ento gin bedo i gorogoro;" 
Proverbs30:27 bonyo mom tye abaka moro kadi acel, ento gin luŋ ociro i tyen ka owot;" 
Proverbs30:28 agwedegwede itwero mako i ciŋi, cite gin obedo naka i pacci obakki." 
Proverbs30:29 Tye jami adek ame woto i yore me aura meicel, tye jami aŋwen ame yon ayona i wot:" 
Proverbs30:30 eŋatu ame twergi dwoŋ meicel i akina leyi, ame mom lworo lee moro kadi acel i akina leyi luŋ;" 
Proverbs30:31 kede twon gweno ame yutte ayuta, karacel kede nyok dyel, kede abaka me yon i wot i nyim jo mere." 
Proverbs30:32 Ka ce yam imiŋ, ame ipakere keni ni imalo meicel, onyo ka ce yam cunyi opoŋ kede bal, myero koŋ dokicak neno odoco." 
Proverbs30:33 Pien puyo cak mio moo poto, twinyo wum atek ateka kelo remo, akemo agwa kelo daa." 
Proverbs31:1 Magi en tam a pirgi dito ame abaka Lemuel okobo, ame tottere onwoŋo opwonye kede." 
Proverbs31:2 Atinna, kop aŋo ba? Kop aŋo ba, nyodo? Kop aŋo ba, woda ame akwoŋo kwoŋ pire-nie?" 
Proverbs31:3 Kur ibal tekoni i kom mon, kur ibal kareni i kom jo ame turo obakki." 
Proverbs31:4 Mom gire ber baŋ obakki, atinna Lemuel, obakki gire mom porre mato koŋo, oloc daŋ mom oporre mato koŋo akec akeca," 
Proverbs31:5 naka mio mato wigi te wil oko i kom gin a cik okwako, wigi te wil oko i kom jo a can odio." 
Proverbs31:6 Mi koŋo akec baŋ ŋat ame doŋ ato oko, kede koŋo olok baŋ jo ame cwercuny ociro." 
Proverbs31:7 Migi omat wigi te wil oko i cangi, mom dok ote poo i kom pekogi." 
Proverbs31:8 Yab dogi pi jo a lebgi oto, pi jo ame oweko ata," 
Proverbs31:9 Yab dogi me iŋol kop atira, gwok gin ame myero tim i kom ocan, kede gin ame myero tim i kom jo ame mito akonya." 
Proverbs31:10 Ŋa ame twero nwoŋo dako aber odoco? Kodi dako-nono malo meicel, ame kato tigo me wel oko." 
Proverbs31:11 Cware geno atek, en gire mom bino bedo acan." 
Proverbs31:12 Dako-nono timo gin aber pire, cite mom gin arac, pi kare luŋ me kwo mere," 
Proverbs31:13 En yenyo ka yer rommi kede uci pamba, te tiyo ticcere i yomcuny." 
Proverbs31:14 Kodi dako-nono rom aroma i mel ocat wil, ame kelo cammere i kannabor." 
Proverbs31:15 En dilo ibai ame piny pwod col acola, te miyo jo ode luŋ cam," 
Proverbs31:16 En yenyo poto anyen te daŋ wilo oko, en pito poto olok i lim oya i ciŋe." 
Proverbs31:17 En obedo atic atek meicel, kome mit meicel i tic." 
Proverbs31:18 En ŋeo ka cato willere tye awot aber, tara mere mom to dyewor." 
Proverbs31:19 En wio uci te cweyo boŋo mere kene, en kwoo boŋo mere kene." 
Proverbs31:20 Dako-nono pokki ocan jami mere, konyo daŋ jo ame mito akonya." 
Proverbs31:21 En mom bedo i lworo moro i kare me koyo pi jo me ode, pien jo ode luŋ nwoŋo oruko boŋŋi alyet." 
Proverbs31:22 En kwoo boŋŋi me aruka mere en ikome, en ruko boŋo camanini aber kede en obedo amaramar." 
Proverbs31:23 Cware ŋeye kene i ka poro kop a pire tek, en neye kene ka obedo i akina odoŋe me bomagi." 
Proverbs31:24 En kwoo boŋŋi me acata, en cato del baŋ ocat wil." 
Proverbs31:25 En tek, jo daŋ wore meicel, en nyero, pien nwoŋo mom tye kede lworo moro i kom gin a tye anyim." 
Proverbs31:26 En kobo koppere luŋ i ryeko, kare luŋ pwonyo pwonnyere luŋ i kica," 
Proverbs31:27 En gwoko jo me ode luŋ aber, en mom bedo abeda kun mom atimo ginnoro." 
Proverbs31:28 Kare luŋ itino mere ya malo te pwoye, cware daŋ pwoc, kun kobo ni," 
Proverbs31:29 “Mon ocele timo jami abeco, ento yin ikatogi luŋ,”" 
Proverbs31:30 Tye timmogo amwonya ame bwolo jo, ber a kom daŋ konnyere pe; ento dako ame lworo Rwot myero pwoo." 
Proverbs31:31 Dako-nono myero pwoo pi gin a en timo, myero pwoc kan ame odoŋe poro iye kop a pire tek." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Man en kop arabkop, wot a Daudi, abaka me Jerucalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Konnyere pe, konnyere pe, man kit ame arabkop okobo kede Kwo gire konnyere pe! Konnyere kom pe atwal." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kony aŋo kara ame dano nwoŋo i tic atek luŋ ame en lolle iye, ame en lolle iye i te ceŋ piny kan?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Lwagi jo man kato, lwagi jo ocele dok bino, en lobo bedo mere kite acel kare luŋ" 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ceŋ donnyo te dok poto, te dok ru lokere dok oko cen kun ame woki edonnyo iye." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Yamo kodo dok tutuŋ anyarolum, eka te wirre dok tutuŋ anyarodi; yamo te bedo mano piny kittono nakanaka tuno ka okato, wirre amannono naka te dok dwogo cen kakare," 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Pii ame opoŋ i kulo luŋ mol woto i nam, cite nam mom poŋ gire; pii dok cen kan ame kulo ocakere iye, te dok cako mol i kuno dwogo i nam," 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Jami luŋ doŋ ool gire meicel, mom tye ginnoro ame dano romo kobo iye; waŋ dano mom yeŋi i gin ame eneno, yit dano daŋ mom yeŋ i gin ame cwinyo." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Gin ame yam tye, en ame daŋ bino bedo tye, kede gin ame yam otio, en ame daŋ obino tiyo; ginnoro anyen gire mom tye i te ceŋ piny kan," 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tye ginnoro ame otwero kobo ni, “Neno, man pwod nyen?” Yam gire obedo tye con, i kare okato ame wan pwod ope." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Jo gire mom tye ka po pi jami a yam otimere con, dok daŋ mom tye ŋattoro i akina jo ame bino lubogi, ame bino po i kom gin ame bino timere anyim." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 An arabkop, yam abedo abaka me Icrael i Jerucalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Abedo miyo wia tic kede ryeko me yenyo kede ŋeyo jami luŋ ame tye ka timere i te polo piny kano Obaŋa omio dano lolle i tic ame mom kelo yomcuny kadi acel. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Atyeko neno jami luŋ ame tye atimere piny i te ceŋ piny kan; gin luŋ aluŋa anwoŋo ni konygi pe; gin luŋ rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo," 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Yat ka ogom con mom dok romo twenyere, dok mom oromo kwano jami ame komgi pe onen." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Acako lwodo kop i cunya kena kun akobo ni, “An abedo twon dano moro aryek meicel, aryek akato oloc luŋ ame ogeo loc i Jerucalem. An atyeko beo i kite ryeko apapat, atye doŋ iŋec abup meicel.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Abedo miyo wia tic me ŋeyo ryeko, kede apoa, karacel kede miŋo. Atyeko niaŋ ni mannono daŋ konnyere mom; rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pien ka iryek atek ateka, ibedo daŋ ipar abup meicel, dok daŋ ka ŋeci dwoŋ admoŋa, ibedo daŋ i cwercuny adwoŋ." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Man omio akobo i cunya ni, “Koŋ dok atem ŋiyo gin ame olwoŋo ni yomcuny; koŋ ami cunya bed ayom.” Cite ate roto ni man daŋ konnyere mom," 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Man omio akobo ni nyero kara obedo tim me miŋo meicel, yomcuny konnyere gire mom." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Wia dok te cako tic, kun atamo ni kono koŋ dok atemo obo koma kede koŋo; kan onwoŋo adama pwod tye atela kede ryeko, kun atemo ŋiyo timmogo me miŋo, tuno ka atwero nwoŋo ginnoro aber ame dano romo timo i te polo piny kan, i kare me kwo mere anonok i lobo-ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Atyeko tiyo tic adoŋodoŋo meicel. Agero udina apol, apito daŋ poto olok apol." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Apuro pottina, ate tiyo daŋ twoni lekkogo adoŋodoŋo me galo waŋ ame ocelo oko i gweŋe apaa, ate pito i yigi kit yen apapat me acama." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Akunyo daŋ kuttogo me pii adoŋodoŋo, me aonya i te yen ame apito," 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Awilo opii apipim, en a co kede a mon, dok onwoŋo daŋ atye kede opii mogo ame onywalo i oda. Dok daŋ onwoŋo tye i ciŋa apipim, dyegi kede rommi onwoŋo pol atata, onwoŋo atye kedgi abup ame kato me oloc luŋ ame ogeo loc i Jerucalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Dok onwoŋo acoko ryal kede jabu adwoŋ meicel, karacel kede limmogo ame oya i baŋ obakki kede i baŋ gabuna me dul lobo acel acel. Rik daŋ atye i lwak ower a co kede a mon apol meicel, karacel i mon apol, kede ginnoro luŋ ame yomoro cuny dano." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Mannono omio adoko twon lo moro adwoŋ meicel ame kato jo luŋ ame ogeo bedo i Jerucalem; ryekona daŋ naka mom orwenyo. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo amito anwoŋo; rik mom akwero bedo i yomcuny, pien cunya onwoŋo yom atek i tic ame atio, motta onwoŋo ennono pi tic luŋ ame abedo lolle iye." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Icennere ate koŋ dok bedo tamo pi gin ame abedo tiyo kede lolle ame abedo lolle kede me tiyogi, nen ba, gin luŋ onwoŋo konygi mom; orom aroma i ryemo yo yamo; ate nwoŋo ni mom tye agoba moro ame dano twero nwoŋo i te ceŋ piny kano" 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Abedo miyo wia tic me ŋeyo ryeko kede apoa, karacel kede miŋo. Kara ŋo ame abaka oleo kaka obakki twero timo ame pat i gin ame jo otelo nyime obedo timo." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Aniaŋ ni ryeko ber kato miŋo, kite ame lero kato kede colpiny." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Lo aryek tye kede ŋec i kom gin ame etio, ento ŋat amiŋ tio mege i colpiny; dok aroto daŋ ni tye gin acel ame poto i komgi gin ducu." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Man omio akobo kena kena ni, “Koŋ inen gin ame poto i kom amiŋo bino poto daŋ i koma; kara doŋ Iŋo ame an anwono pi bedo kede ryeko adwoŋ adwona-ni?” Man omio akobo kena kena ni man daŋ konnyere kara mom." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Pien mom tye ginnoro ame mio jo po nakanaka pi ŋat aryek onyo pi amiŋo, pien aneno ni i kare ame tye i nyim, nwoŋo mom dok tye ŋattoro ame otwero po pire, Aryeko daŋ to i kite ame amiŋo to kede." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Mannono omio cunya okwero kwo meicel, pien ginnoro luŋ ame dano timo piny i te polo kan, gin luŋ omia ka cwercuny; pien gin luŋ orom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Mannono omio cunya okwero meicel ticcoro luŋ ame abedo lolle kede i te ceŋ piny kan, ka aneno ni gin luŋ abino weko baŋ ŋat ame bino leyo kakara." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Aco-gu mom neye ka ce danonono bino bedo ŋat aryek onyo amiŋ. Kadi bed en bino bedo kit dano aŋo, en gire bino bedo won jami luŋ ame an abedo lolle kedgi, kun aluno ryekona i komgi piny i te ceŋ kan. Man daŋ anwoŋo ni konnyere mom." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Man omio alokere aneno ŋea, cunya te ya oko i kom tic luŋ ame abedo lolle iye piny i te ceŋ kan," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 pien kare ocele dano ame obedo lolle i ryeko mere, i ŋeccere kede diro mere luŋ, weko gin ame ebedo lolle kede-nono oko, eka lo a mom ololle iye kadi acel en ame te bedo yomoro i cunye. Man daŋ anwoŋo ni konnyere mom, dok obedo twon ginnoro arac meicel." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kara doŋ ŋo ame dano nwoŋo pi lolle kede kanyakino i tic ame ebedo lolle kede piny i te ceŋ kan? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Pien pi kare me kwo mere luŋ nwoŋo en opoŋ i rem, dok ticcere daŋ kelle ka cwercuny. Cunye-gu mom limo weo dyewor. Man daŋ konnyere gire mom." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mom dok tye ginnoro ocele ame ber pi dano, kono ka ni en myero cam cem, matte, onwoŋ yomcuny pi lolle mere. Man daŋ aneno ni obedo gin ame Obaŋa en oyiko ni myero bed kittono," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 pien aboŋo en Obaŋa, ŋa ame romo cem onyo bedo kede yomcuny?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Pien Obaŋa mio ryeko, niaŋ atut kede lelo ban jo ame yomoro cunye; cite obalo, en miogi tic me bedo coko lim yido karacel me ote miyo ban jo ame yomoro cuny Obaŋa. Man daŋ konnyere mom, rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Pien jami luŋ tye kede karegi, jami luŋ ame timere i te polo kan tye kede karegi:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Tye kare me nywalo dano kede kare me to mere; tye kare me pito ginnoro-ni kede kare me puto dok oko; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 tye kare me neko dano kede kare me cano acaŋa; tye kare me reto ot piny kede kare me gero agera," 
Ecclesiastes3:4 tye kare me koko kede kare me nyero; tye kare me kumo kede kare me myel," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 tye kare me babao gweŋe teŋe kede kare me coko acoka; tye kare me kwakere kede kare ame mom me kwakere; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 tye kare me yenyo gin orwenyo kede kare me rwenyo mere; tye kare gwoko ogwoka kede kare bolo abola; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 tye kare me yeco boŋo ayeca kede kare me kwoyo akwoa; tye kare me liŋ aliŋa kede kare me bedo kop akopa; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 tye kare me maro dano kede kare me dago adaga; tye kare me lweny kede kare me kuc: 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Kony aŋo ame atic nwoŋo pi lolle mere? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Atyeko neno tic ame Obaŋa omio itino a dano me bedo yelle kede. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 En oketo jami luŋ abeco meicel i karegi ikokome; dok omio dano twero ŋeyo kare a doŋ okato oko kede kare ame pwod tye anyim, cite kadi bed amannono, dano mom romo roto gin ame Obaŋa otio cakere iyi ageyi naka i agikki mere." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Aniaŋ ni mom dok tye ginnoro ocele ame ber pi dano ame kato bedo i yomcuny, kun yomoro cunye i kare ame en pwod tye kwo;" 
Ecclesiastes3:13 dok daŋ dano myero cam cem, matte, kun yomoro cunye i gin ame ebedo lolle kede, pien magi-nono obedo mot ame Obaŋa en omie." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Aniaŋ ni gin ame Obaŋa timo perakino waŋ i waŋ; mom tye ginnoro ame dok otwero medo iye onyo ame otwero kwanyo akwanya iye. Obaŋa otimo amannono, me dano bed kede lworo i kome." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Gin ame aman tye, yam koŋ obedo tye con, gin ame bino bedo tye, yam koŋ obedo tye con; Obaŋa yenyo gin ame oryemo oko teŋe." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Medo i kom mannono, aneno ni i te ceŋ piny kan, timmogo areco en ame lunyo timere akaka tero jo luŋ arorom, akaka kite atira, tim areco en ame lunyo bedo tye." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Man omio akobo i cunya ni, Obaŋa bino ŋolo kop a jo akitegi atira kede me a jo a kitegi reco, pien en otyeko keto kare me jami ducu." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Dok ate kop i cunya ni Obaŋa tye atemo dano me nyuttigi ni gin orom aroma i leyi. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Pien to a dano kede to a leyi rom aroma, kite dano to kede en ame leyi daŋ to kede. Kwogi tye acel, dano mom kato lee kede ginnoro, pien jami luŋ konygi mom." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Gin luŋ owoto i kabedo acel, gin luŋ oya iyi apua, dok gin luŋ odok i iyi apua," 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ŋa kara ame ŋeo ka tipo a dano woto malo i polo, kun me a leyi woto piny i lobo?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Man omio aneno ni mom dok tye ginnoro ocele aber ame kato pi dano, kono ka dano ibedo kede yomcuny i ticcere, pien mannono keken en ame obedo gin ame otyeko pokke. Kara ŋa ame dok twero dwogo dano cen me bino neno gin ame bino timere i lobo i kare ame en doŋ pe iye?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Dok ate neno kite ame dano tye ka wuno kede dano wadgi piny i te ceŋ kan. Nen ba, aneno pig waŋ jo ame owuno tye aony irat, cite mom tye ŋattoro ame twero kweyo cunygi! Aco kono jo ame wunogi-nono tye i teko adwoŋ meicel ame ŋattoro mom tye ame twero konyogi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Man omio atamo ni jo ame oto gigi oko, jo-nono komgi i gum meicel ame kato jo ame pwod tye kwo." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 A doŋ kato magi-nono luŋ, en aye dano ame mom ru onywalo, ame waŋe mom ru oneno tim areco ame tye ka timere piny i te ceŋ kan." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Aneno daŋ ni gin omio jo tio tic atek i twon diro meicel, pien ŋat acel acel mito ni elo jo ocele i jami luŋ. Man daŋ konnyere pe, rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Amiŋo dolo ciŋe te miyo kome neno can tuno waŋ oto. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Tika ibed kede jami ame opoŋ ciŋi acel keken, kun itye i kuc i cunyi, kato ame ibedo lolle i jami ame opoŋ cini ryoryo, ame daŋ rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Tye dok gin ocele ame aneno ame konnyere mom i te ceŋ piny kan," 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Lo a mom tye kede dano mere moro, wode onyo ominnere, cite bedo lolle; tic aboŋo weo, dok daŋ waŋe mom koŋ yeŋ i lim a doŋ tye i ciŋe, cite mom koŋ penyere kene kene ni, “Kara pi ŋa ba ame an abedo lolle i tic pire-nie, ame geŋa bedo kede yomcunnyie?” Man daŋ aneno ni konnyere mom, obedo tic a mom kelo yomcuny kadi acel." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Jo aryo ber kato dano acel, pien gin romo tiyo ticcoro ame kelligi ginnoro abeber." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Pien ka ce gin opoto, ŋat acel bino tiŋo awottere malo. Ento ŋat ame tye kene, ka opoto, mom dok tye ŋattoro ame romo tiŋe malo, dano-nono tye kede can." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Dok medo kede mannono, jo aryo ka obuto karacel, komgi bedo amomor; kara dano acel twero nwoŋo lyeto i yore aŋo?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kadi bed akwor twero loyo ŋat ame tye kene, cite jo aryo bino loye oko. Tol ame owio i yore adek mom cot oyotoyot." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Awobi aryek kun acan ber kato abaka oti, amiŋ, ame mom don romo ye tam ame omie," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 kadi bed en onwoŋo oya i ot kol te doko aloc onyo onywale ame acan i lobo ame en loo-nono. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Aneno jo luŋ ame kwo ame tye piny i te ceŋ kan, karacel kede en awobi-nono ame bino leyo kakarenono;" 
Ecclesiastes4:16 aneno ni jo mere pol a mom kwanne, cite awobi-nono onwoŋo loogi luŋ. Kadi bed amannono, jo ocele ame bino Jubogi mom bino bedo kede lelo i kom awobi-nono. Ateteni, man daŋ konnyere mom, rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Gwokere ka iwoto i ot woro Obaŋa. Wot i nyim Obaŋa me wot winyo koppere ber kato jo ame yalo Obaŋa i motgi miŋomiŋo, kun mom oŋeo ni otye otimo gin arac." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Kur iru ŋamo dogi, kur daŋ imi cunyi myel i kobo gin ame tye i cunyi i nyim Obaŋa, pien Obaŋa tye i polo, ento yin itye i lobo. Pi mannono ba, myero kur idur kop apol apola." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Pien lek bino i tic apol meicel; dwon ŋat amiŋ duro kop adura. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ka ce kwoŋo kwoŋŋoro baŋ Obaŋa, myero iru cobo oyot, pien cuny Obaŋa mom yom i kom kop me miŋo. Myero icob gin ame ikwoŋo pire." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Ber ka ibedo ame mom ikwoŋo kwoŋŋoro, kato ame ikwoŋo eka mom ite cobo gin ame ikwoŋo." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Kur imi dogi mi ipot i bal, dok daŋ kur ikob i nyim akwena Obaŋa ni dogi rik ocer acera, Piŋo kara imio cuny Obaŋa waŋ i kop ame oya i dogi, eka te balo tic ame itio oko?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Pien ka lek medde ameda, kop a konygi mom durre adura, cite yin myero ibed kede lworo i kom Obaŋa." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kur ibed kede wur ka ce i loba moro-ni ineno oloc iye tye ka wuno ocan, kun mom daŋ oŋolo kopgi kakare, dok mom oterogi acalo dano; pien aloc adwoŋ iye tye kede aloc ocele adwoŋ katte ame tye ka nene, dok daŋ tye en ocele ame loogi ducu." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Cite akato ducu, abaka tye kede kony adwoŋ meicel i loba ame jo puro." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ŋat ame maro lim lim mom romo; ŋat ame maro lonyo daŋ agoba mom romo; man daŋ konnyere mom. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ka ce lim omedde i ciŋi, yo me keto mere daŋ nya medde ameda; Kara doŋ kony aŋo ame won limmono nwoŋo iye? Mom nwoŋo ka yomcuny me bedo neno anena?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Apakaca nino meicel kadi bed ocamo kwon aduno onyo abup; ento lim abup geno alonyo nino. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Tye twon timmoro arac meicel ame aneno tye ka timere piny i te ceŋ kan; dano moro-ni twero kano limmere te dok kelle peko," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 limmere-nono te rwenyo oko i yore a mom ber kadi acel. Aco kono won limmono nwoŋo tye kede wode, ginnoro mom nwoŋo odoŋ i ciŋe." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Kite ame rik en odonyo kede i yi tottere, en kite ame en dok bino dok kede. En rik obino onoro, bino dok daŋ onoro, kun mom tero ginnoro, aboŋo ginnoro ame oya i kom ticcere ame ebedo lolle kede," 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Man daŋ obedo twon timmoro arac meicel ame tye ka timere. Kite ame en rik obino kede i lobo, en ame en daŋ bino dok kede. Kara doŋ kony aŋo ame danonono onwoŋo me bedo lolle i yamo nono," 
Ecclesiastes5:17 kun obalo kare mere luŋ i piny acol, kun cunye cwer, dok akemo kede par ociro oko, dok kome-gu daŋ mom yot?" 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nen ba, gin ame an doŋ aneno ni tye aber ame porre me atima, en aye me camo cem kede matte, dano myero onwoŋ yomcuny pi lolle mere ame ebedo lolle kede i te ceŋ piny kan, pi kare me kwo mere anonok ame Obaŋa omie, pien mannono keken en ame obedo gin ame otyeko pokkere." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Dano ducu ame Obaŋa omio lonyo kede gum me bilogi, kede ye gamo gin ame opokke, kun nwoŋo yomcuny i gin ame ebedo lolle iye. Man obedo mot ame Obaŋa en omio." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pien dano-nono mom bino po wok i kom kare me kwo mere i lobo, pien Obaŋa omio en opoŋ i yomcuny i cunye i kare luŋ." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Tye dok tim ocele arac ame aneno piny i te ceŋ kan, ame odio dano meicel." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Obaŋa twero miyo dano moro-ni lonyo, lwak jami apipim, kede kwogo, kun mom dok tye ginnoro ame en mito ame nwoŋo mom tye baŋe, cite Obaŋa mom dok te miye gum me bilogi, ento dano moro ata en ame dok te lunyo bilo. Man daŋ konnyere mom meicel, dok obedo twon burroro ame lit meicel." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ka ce dano onywalo itino mia acel twal, te daŋ perakino i loba kare alac, ame mwakki ame en operakino kede i lobo bup atek, cite en dano-nono mom te bilo jami abeco me kwo man, eka mom daŋ dok ote yiko dano-nono, an aneno ni atin ame obwogo abwoga tye aber kato dano-nono oko." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Pien obino i yore a mom konyo te kato gire oko i piny acol, kan ame nyiŋe te rwenyo oko iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Medo i kom mannono, en gire mom oneno ceŋ, mom daŋ oŋeo ginnoro; ento owe gire aber ame kato dano ca oko." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Kadi bed dano naca onwoŋo perakino i lobo pi mwakki ame romo tutumia aryo twal, ce en mom obilo yomcuny me gin abeco i kwo man, atin ame obwogo abwoga loc gire oko, Mom gin aryo luŋ owoto i kabedo acel." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Lolle ame dano lolle kede luŋ tye pi yie, kadi bed amannono, mittere mom gik." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Kara kony aŋo ame ŋat aryek nwoŋo ame kato jo a mom ryek? Kara kony aŋo ame acan ame ŋeo kite ame myero ebed kede i akina lwak tye kede? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ŋat ame mio jami ame etye kede romme tye aber ame kato ŋat ame tammere mom cuŋ mot pi bedo paro jami atata, Man konnyere gire mom, rom aroma i ryemo yo yamo." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ginnoro luŋ ame timere i lobo, nwoŋo rik Obaŋa oyiko pire con, dok kite ame dano tye kede-ni daŋ gire ŋeye, kede kite ame en mom romo pyem Obaŋa ame tek kate oko." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Duro kop apol apola mom konyo ginnoro kadi acel. Kara gin aŋo ocele aber akato ame dano nwoŋo iye? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Kara ŋa ame ŋeo gin ame ber pi dano i kare me kwo mere anonok, ame konnyere-gu daŋ pe, dok ame en kato iye akata calo tipo? Kara ŋa ame twero kobbi dano gin ame bino timere piny i te ceŋ kan i kare ame en doŋ mom iye?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Nyiŋ aber kato twon moo wir moro me wel oko; nino me to ber kato nino me nywal oko. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Wot i ot ame jo tye akwero cola iye ber kato wot i ot ame acamo iye arama, pien man en kare ame kwo a jo luŋ gik iye, ame jo ame kwo wigi mom twero wil iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Cwercuny ber kato nyero, pien kadi bed mio waŋ dano bale, ento yabo tam a dano." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ŋat aryek cunye bedo i paco ame jo akwero iye cola, ento amiŋo cunye bedo i ot ame jo tye aceko iye kop me yomcuny." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ciko yiti i kop ame aryeko juki kede ber kato bedo winyo wer ajo amiŋ. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Jo amiŋ nyero gagak calo yen ame tye amwomwoca ite gulu; mannono daŋ konnyere gire mom," 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ateteni, ŋat aryek ka obedo wunu jo ocele doko amiŋ oko, kede wilo dano i muŋ balo dano aber oko," 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Agikki me ginnoro-ni ber kato acakki mere oko, ŋat ame mwol ber kato ŋat ame cunye opoŋ awaka." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Kur imi akemo maki oyotoyot, pien jo amiŋ en ame kano akemo i cunygi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Kur ipeny ni, “Piŋo kare okato ber kato kare-ni oko?” Pien kodi pennyono mom obedo peny iŋe ryeko," 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ryeko ber calo gamo ginalea, pien konyo jo ame wangi pwod neno cen." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Pien ryeko gwoko dano calo lim; bedo kede ŋec ber, pien ryeko gwoko kwo a dano." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Koŋ itam kop i kom tic Obaŋa, na ame romo twenyo gin ame en ogomo?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 I kare ame itye aber odoco, myero ibed ame cunyi yom, eka i kare me can ite bedo kede tam; pien Obaŋa en oketo yomcuny kede can, me dano mom ŋe gin ame bino timere i lobo i kare ame en doŋ mom iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 I kare me kwona ame konnyere mom-mi, atyeko neno jami luŋ; tye jo mogo ame kitegi atira, ame to daŋ kun kitegi atira, dok tye jo mogo ame kitegi reco, ame perakino i wi lobo kun mom weko timo gin arac." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Kur ibed ŋat a kite atira okato kare, kur daŋ ibedo ŋat ame ryek atek ateka. Piŋo kara omio ibalo kwoni nono?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Kur ibed lo arac okato kare, kur daŋ dok ibed amiŋo. Piŋo kara imiye me to ame kare-ni mom ru oromo?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Myero ilid man odoco, kun daŋ mom igweto ciŋi i maca, pien ŋat ame lworo Obaŋa bino bedo aber i yore-nono ducu." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ryeko mio ŋat aryek teko ame kato teko oloc apar ame loo boma. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ateteni, mom gire tye ŋattoro i wi lobo ame kite ber odoco, ame mom timo balloro kadi acel." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kur iye kop luŋ ame jo kobo, naka mio ibino winyo amironi ka ceni." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Yin iŋeo i cunyi ni tye kare mogo ame yin daŋ iceno jo ocele. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Atemo magi luŋ kun atio kede ryekona. Akobo ni, “Akobo ni abino bedo ŋat aryek”; cite onwoŋo mom aromo tuno iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Gin luŋ ame tye bor abora, piny twal, onwoŋo tye piny meicel. Ŋa kara ame romo tuno iye?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Aketo cunya me yenyo ryeko, kun atemo ribo jami ducu karacel me aniaŋ tere odoco, kede ŋeyo tim areco me miŋo, karacel kede miŋo ame ya pi wic oballe." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Dok anwoŋo dako moro ame marrere lit kato to oko, calo owic onyo boo, kun ciŋe ka ogudo komi calo nyor. Ŋat ame cunye tye i yomoro cuny Obaŋa en ame bwot i ciŋe, cite abalo en rido tero oko." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Arabkop okobo ni, “Nen ba, man en gin ame an anwoŋo, kun aporo kop acel acel kede awottere, me anwoŋ te kop a jami ducu;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 kop ame an abedo tamo i cunya kare luŋ, cite naka mom anwoŋo. Anwoŋo ka i co acel i kom jo tutumia, ento mom anwoŋo dako moro i kom jo-nono luŋ." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Nen ba, anwoŋo ka gin acel keken, anwoŋo ni Obaŋa gire oketo dano ame cunygi tye atire, cite dano te bedo roto tam apol apola.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ŋa kara ame calo lo aryek? Dok ŋa ame ŋeo gonyo te kopporo keken? Ryeko mio waŋ dano lilia meicel, cunye ame nwaŋ daŋ te cako lokere oko." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Myero ilub gin ame abaka ociko, kun cunyi mom poto pi kwoŋŋi acil ame ikwoŋo." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ya oko i nyim abaka, ka kop tye arac myero iru ya oko i nyim abaka, pien twero timo ginnoro keken ame cunye omito." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kop ame abaka okobo obedo kop me agikki, kara ŋa ame dok romo penyo abaka ni, “Kara itimo ŋo-nono ba?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ŋat ame gwoko cik mom twero rwatte i peko moro, dok ŋat aryek bino ŋeyo kare kede yo ame myero elub." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kop acel acel tye kede kare mere kede yo mere daŋ, kadi dano tye kede twon cannoro ame odie rom mene." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Pien en mom ŋeo gin ame bino bedo tye; kara doŋ ŋa ame twero titte kite ame bino timere kede? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Mom tye dano moro ame tye kede twer me gwoko tipo mere, onyo ame tye kede twer me geŋo to mere ka ce nino me to mere oromo. Mom gire tye yo moro me bwot i lwennyono, dok jo ame timo tim areco daŋ mom bino larre pi timgi areco-nono." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Man luŋ an aneno, kun amio tamma bedo i kom ginnoro luŋ ame tye ka timere piny i te ceŋ kan, kan ame jo ocele tye kede twer, kun jo ocele tye ka neno can i te twergi-nono." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Icennere dok ate neno otim tim areco ame oyiko i lyel; gin onwoŋo obedo timo timgi areco-nono i kabedo acil, cite jo daŋ pwoogi i boma ame gin rik obedo timo iye tim areco-nono. Man daŋ konnyere mom." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Jo bedo keto cunygi i timo tim areco pien kop ame oŋolo i kom otim tim areco mom oketo i tic oyotoyot. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kadi bed abalo tim tim arac tyen tutumia, kun daŋ pwod medde perakino i lobo, cite an aŋeo ni jo ame lworo Obaŋa bino bedo aber, pien gin otye kede lworo i nyime." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Cite jo ame timo tim areco mom gire bino bedo aber, mom daŋ obino perakino i lobo kare alac, pien gin mom tye kede lworo i nyim Obaŋa." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Gin ame tye ka timere i lobo kan obedo gin ame konnygi mom meicel. Nen, tye jo mogo ame kitegi atira, ame gigi mogo timere i komgi kite ame timere kede i kom otim tim areco, dok tye jo mogo ame otim tim areco, ame gigi mogo timere i komgi kite ame timere kede i kom jo a kitegi atira. An akobo ni man daŋ konnyere mom." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Man omio an akobo ni dano gire myero bed ka i yomcuny, pien mom dok tye ginnoro ocele aber pire piny i te ceŋ kan, kono ka camo cem kede matte, kun eyomoro i cunye, Pien man en gin ame bino bedo timere nakanaka i kare me lolle mere ame ebino lolle kede i te ceŋ piny kan, pi kare me kwo mere ame Obaŋa omie." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Kare ame amio wia ocako tic me neno ryeko, kede me neno gin ame tye ka timere i lobo kan, kite ame jo ocele bedo ame waŋgi okwekere akweka dyecen kede dyewor, omio aniaŋ i tic Obaŋa odoco, aniaŋ ni kadi bed dano yelle i yore aŋo me yenyo, mom twero niaŋ tic Obaŋa ame tye ka tiye i te ceŋ piny kan. Kadi bed lo moro aryek yiye ni en eŋeo, mom gire twero roto kadi acel." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Man luŋ akano i cunya kun atye ka ŋiyo luŋ, kite ame jo a kitegi atira kede jo aryek tye kede i ciŋ Obaŋa, karacel kede ticgi. Ka ce marrere ennono, onyo adage mere, dano gire mom ŋeo. Ginnoro luŋ i nyimgi konnyere mom," 
Ecclesiastes9:2 kite acalo tye gin acel ame poto i komgi gin ducu, poto i kom ŋat a kite atira kede i kom atim tim areco, i kom dano aber kede i kom dano arac, i kom ŋat a cik ogeno kede i kom ŋat a cikkoro mom ogeŋo, i kom ŋat a yalo Obaŋa i mot kede i kom ŋat a mom yalo Obaŋa kadi acel. Kite ame dano aber tye kede, en ame acan daŋ tye kede. Ŋat ame kwoŋo kwoŋ rom aroma i ŋat ame lworo kwoŋ." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Man en gin arac ame tye ka timere piny i te ceŋ kan, tye gin acel ame poto i kom jo luŋ. Cuny dano daŋ opoŋ i tim areco, apoa daŋ tye i cunygi i kare ame gin tye kwo; i ŋe mannono, gin doŋ woto oko baŋ jo oto." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ento ŋat ame kwo i lobo a jo ame tye kwo, tye kede gen, pien gwok akwo ber kato eŋatu oto." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pien jo akwo ŋeo ni gin obino to, cite jo oto mom ŋeo ginnoro, dok daŋ mom dok tye ginnoro pirgi. Wi jo wil oko i komgi." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Margi, adagegi, kede nyekogi doŋ oto oko, ginnoro mom dok tye pirgi i kom ginnoro luŋ ame tye ka timere piny i te ceŋ kan." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Wot icam giri cammi kun cunyi yom, imati daŋ koŋoni kun cunyi yom; pien Obaŋa otyeko pwoyo gin ame itio." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Myero rukki bed atar odoco i kare luŋ, kun moo mom rwenyo i yer wii." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Bil jami me kwo-ni cutu i dako ame imaro, i kare luŋ me kwoni a konnyere pe-ni, ame Obaŋa omii me bedo kede piny i te ceŋ kan, pien mannono en megi ame opokki me yomoro cuny i kare me kwoni pi tic ame ibedo lolle iye piny i te ceŋ kan." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ti gin ame ciŋi ocop iye kede tekoni luŋ, pien lyel ame iwot iye, tic onyo tam, onyo ŋec, onyo ryeko mom tye kuno." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Dok daŋ aneno ni piny i te ceŋ kan, jo adwir meicel mom en ame loo tuko, jo atek mom en a loo lweny. Jo aryek mom tye i jami ame romogi i kwo man, mom opwo jo ame odiro; cite gin ame timere i komgi lubo kare kede kit ame gum aber kede arac poto kede i kom dano acel acel." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mom tye ŋattoro ame ŋeo kare mere. Jo daŋ rom aroma i rec ame moko i bwo pi gum arac, kede winyo ame moko i tol. Ociko jo kede owic i kare arac, eka owic te poto i komgi atura." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Atyeko neno kodi ryeko man kun otimere piny i te ceŋ kan, ame nyuto kop i kom ryeko, ame an aneno ni obedo twon anennoro amalo meicel." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Boma moro atitidi onwoŋo daŋ tye iye jo anonok, twon abaka moro atek te bino me bino lweny iye, eka te guro daŋ oko, te gero twon celloro atek guro kede oko." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ento i yie kuno rik tye iye acannoro ame ryek, en ate laro bomagi-nono i ciŋ okwor pi ryeko mere. Cite ŋattoro mom te po pi acannono." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 An akobo gira ni ryeko gire ber kato tekkom oko, kadi bed jo cao ryeko acan ca, kun daŋ mom owinyo koppere." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kop a ŋat a ryek ame jo owinyo momot ber kato redo oloc i akina jo amiŋ. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ryeko ber kato jami lweny, cite bal acel balo gin abeco apol atata." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Lwaŋi oto mio moo wir a ŋwece kur doko aŋwe oko, amannono daŋ, miŋo aduno pek kato kwogo kede ryeko." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Cuny aryeko wiro wonnere dwoko tutuŋ cem, ento me amiŋo wiro wonnere dwoko tutuŋ cam." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Amiŋo kadi bed tye alat i yo, wie nwoŋo mom atic, en mio jo luŋ ŋeo ni en ebedo dano amiŋ." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ka ce akemo omako aloc i komi, kur i ya i kabedoni, kare ocele twero timi kica ka ce i bedo mot i twon bal adwoŋ ame onwoŋo timo." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Tye tim arac ame aneno piny i te ceŋ kan, ame aneno calo bal ame oya i baŋ aloc." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Jo amiŋ otye ka miyo kabedo me dito i loc, kun olonyo mom oparo pirgi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Aneno opii ame tye ka ŋwec aguragura, kun rwode tye awot i tyengi calo pii." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Akuny bur rette i bur ame ekunyo, twol kao ŋat ame maro tuco kor apama." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Apaa gweŋe, gweŋ wano; abar yen, yen wano." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ka leb lee okuku, eka mom ote rabo, ŋat ame atic kede myero ti kede i tekkom; cite ryeko konyo dano me tiyo i tic kakare." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ka ce ororo okao dano kun mom ru omio yattoro me miyo doko mwol, kony me miyo twollono doko amwol doŋ mom tye." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Kop ame ya i dog ŋat aryek mio jo pwoc cite kop ame ya i dog ŋat amiŋ neke aneka. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Kop ame geo ya i doge bedo kop me miŋo, eka te giko koppere calo ŋat a wie oballe." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Amiŋo duro kop apol apola, kadi bed ŋattoro mom ŋeo gin ame bino timere. Kara ŋa ame bino kobbi dano gin ame bino timere anyim." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Amiŋo lolle i tic ame olo kome aola, ame te miyo yo a woto tuŋe rwenye oko," 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Lobo ame abaka mere pwod awobi bino neno can, ame rwode mere dilo camo aramagi ibai." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Tye kede gum, lobo ame abaka mere obedo wot a ŋat ame oworo, ame rwode mere camo aramagi i kare aber arama me medo teko, cite mom me mito mero." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Wackom mio wi ot rwobere, ŋinnyere mio wi ot cwer." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Cam mio jo nyero, koŋo kelo yomcuny, lim mio dano nwoŋo gin emito luŋ," 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Kur icen abaka i cunyi, kur daŋ icen alonyo i wi tandani iyi iciskani; pien winyo ame twarre malo bino tero dwoni, onyo olikkoro twero tuco koppono oko." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ket lim meri i tic baŋ jo, ocele, waŋŋoro ibino nwoŋo ginoro iye." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ket lim ame it ye kede i tic i kabedo apapat, pien mom iŋeo kan ame gum arac twero maki iye." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ka kot doŋ dwoŋ meicel i pol, twero lo oko te corre i lobo. Yat kadi orette tutuŋ anyarolum onyo tutuŋ anyarodi, kan ame en orette iye en ame daŋ buta iye," 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ŋat ame bedo neno kit kodo a yamo mom coo koti piny, Ŋat ame keto cunye ineno kite ame polo owumere kede mom kao kac." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Kite acalo mom iŋeo kite ame tipo me kwo donyo kede i kom atin ame tye i yi tottere, amannono daŋ, dano mom romo ŋeyo tic Obaŋa ame oketo jami luŋ." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Co kotini odiko kede otyeno; pien mom iŋeo mene ame bino wok aber, ka ce man onyo maca, onyo ca gin luŋ obino bedo aber." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Lero me ceŋ ame bedo tye dyecen ber meicel, neno ceŋ daŋ ber abera," 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ka ce dano obedo kwo pi kare alalaca, cunye myero bed yom i kare-nono luŋ. Myero en ŋe ni mwakki me bedo mere i piny acol bino bedo abup meicel. Ginnoro luŋ ame bino timere konnyere mom." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Wun jo atino, bil wunu gin aber me karewu oko; mi cunywu bed yom i kare me tinowu. Tim wunu gin ame cunywu mito ame waŋwu oneno. Cite myero ipo wunu ni Obaŋa bino ŋolliwu kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame itimo wunu." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Wek par atata kede ginnoro luŋ ame balo yotkom, pien kare me tino kede kare me awobi daŋ obedo gin a konnyere mom." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Po daŋ pi ŋat oketi i kare me tinoni, kun kare arac mom ru obino, kun mwaka ame ibino kobo iye ni, “Cunya mom yom kadi acel i ginnoro luŋ;” mom ru onoko ceggi," 
Ecclesiastes12:2 kun ceŋ, lero, dwe, acer, mom ru odoko acol, dok kun pol daŋ mom ru owumo polo i ŋe cwe a kot;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 i nino ame jo ame kuro ot komgi bino myel kun jo a yam tek doŋ ogogoma oko, lak doŋ mom romo nyamo cem, pien nwoŋo daŋ doŋ otum oko iyi dogwu, waŋwu daŋ doŋ ocido oko, ame mom romo neno piny aber," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 ame del dogwu doŋ orwobere oko. I kare ame mom doŋ iromo winyo wunu koko a kidi rego, dok koko a winy keken daŋ coowu oko i waŋ nino, kun daŋ doŋ mom iromo winyo wunu dwon naŋa ame agoyo onyo dwon jo ame awer." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 I kare ame ibino lworo wunu kabedo luŋ ame otiŋere malo, kun ilworo wunu wot i yo oko. Yer wiwu bino nwoŋo doŋ okwor kia, ame doŋ Iwaye wunu awaa i wot, kun mituwu me mon doŋ otum odoco. Pien jo luŋ bino wot i pacogi ame obino bedo iye nakanaka, jo bino kok i dye yo." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Tol bino cot oko, tara jabu bino rette te tur oko, onyo gulu pii bino ŋidde oko, tol wayo pii i bur atut bino cot daŋ oko." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Komwu bino dok i yi apua, kan ame rik onwoŋo tye iye con, kun tipowu dok baŋ Obaŋa, kan ame rik oya iye." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Arabkop te kobo ni, mannono ducu konnyere gire mom, konnyere gire mom atwal." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Kite acalo Arabkop onwoŋo obedo dano aryek, en obedo pwonyo jo i gin ame tye kede ŋec atut. En otemo pimo carokop, oŋiogi te canogi i yore i yore," 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Arabkop otemo yenyo koppogo ame twero yomoro cuny jo, en te coyo gin ame tye ateni i cuny aler." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Kop a jo aryek bit calo ecipet onyo ocumal ame ogo i wi ot odonyo atek. Obaŋa ame en akwatwa adwoŋ ame omiogi koppere-nono luŋ. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Atinna, gwokere kur ibed lolo komi i koppogo ocele akato magi. Coyo buke mom bino gik, kwan atek ateka balo kom dano nono." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 I ŋe kobo kop ocele luŋ, koppa me agikki ene: Bed i lworo baŋ Obaŋa, dok daŋ myero ilub cikkere, pien mannono en gin a myero dano ti." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Pien Obaŋa bino ŋolo kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame dano otio, akadi gin otimere i muŋ aber onyo arac." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Wer a Culeman ame mit atek meicel kato wer luŋ. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Koŋ inotta ba lema kede doga, pien mar ame imara kede mit kato koŋo olok oko." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Moo wirri kur meicel, nyiŋi kom mom rwenyo i dog jo, mannono omio anyira luŋ mari." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Wek awot kedi kun owoto oyotoyot. Abaka okela doŋ naka iyi icika mere, Myero koŋ olel kun cunywa yom atek i komi, obino pako marri ame kato koŋo olok oko; jo gire marri kakare." 
SongOfSongs1:5 An acol kono, cite anen iye aber meicel, wun anyira me Jerucalem; acalo kom kema me cedar, aber kom calo boŋŋi me icika a Culeman." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Kur ibed nena wunu pi del komani, pien lyeto a ceŋ omio koma ocido oko. Akemo onwoŋo omako omegona meicel i koma, gin te miya tic me kuro poto olok, aco kun poto olokka bedo kene." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Koŋ doŋ ikobba ba, yin ame amari wok-ki, ikwao rommini kara kwene? Dyeceŋ gin we kwene? Pien pe myero imia abed calo arim piny, kun abebea akina rommi owoteni." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ka ce mom yin oŋeo, yin nyako amwonya meicel, koŋ yin ilub yo rommi, me iwot ikwa dyegini, i ŋet kema okwat." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Yin ibedo mega ame amaro, yin kom irom aroma i min aguragura, ame riŋo i gadigadi a Parao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Lemi neno ber atek, pien iketo iye gigi mogo me kwogo, ŋuti daŋ amannono, pien iruko iye tigo wel ame oyupo i tol." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Obino yiko gi-kwogo me jabu piri, kun odeo i tigo ame otio i ryal." 
SongOfSongs1:12 I kare ame abaka tye aweo i wi rwot oollere, moona a ŋwece kur te cako kuto atek meicel." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ŋat ame amaro-nono pire litta acalo icao murra ame mom rwenyo i laŋeta. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ŋat ame amaro-nono pire litta calo ature ame ŋwece kur meicel, ame turo i potti olok ame tye i En-gedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Koŋ inen ba, yin nyako ame amaro-ni, yin iber meicel; yin gire imwonya meicel, waŋi kom calo me amam." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Koŋ inen ba, yin lo-ni ame amaroni, yin iber meicel; ateteni, neni yomoro cunya okato kare." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Obino weo kedi i wi lum alyabu, yen me arii odwa obedo yen cedar, wi odwa opeto iye bao me ciprec." 
SongOfSongs2:1 An acalo ature ame tye i bar me Caron, onyo kalaŋweka a turo arema ame maro tu i luluŋ." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Nyan ame amaro-nono ka tye akina wadgi, calo tur kalaŋweka ame tye akina okuto" 
SongOfSongs2:3 Lo ame amaro-nono ka tye akina awobe wadgi, calo nanaci ame tye i akina yen i buŋ. Cunya yom meicel ka atye i te tipo mere, kome lim alima i doga." 
SongOfSongs2:4 En okela i ot ame ocamo iye arama mere, mar en obedo bendera ame en jola kede." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mia acam olok otwo, mia nanaci me adwoggo kede cunya; pien mar omio two omako oko!" 
SongOfSongs2:6 Ateno wia i ciŋe tuncam, kun ciŋe tuŋcem tye okwako kora," 
SongOfSongs2:7 Acikowu atek, wun anyira me Jerucalem, kun akwoŋo akwoŋa i nyiŋ leyi me tim." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Awinyo dwon dyera ame amaronono. Koŋ inen en doŋ tye abino, apye kom apyea i wi kiddikiddi malo kuno, akirre akira i wi kiddi malo" 
SongOfSongs2:9 Dyera ame amaro kirre calo amyem, onyo calo twon atil. Koŋ inen kite ame ocuŋ kede i ŋe celwa kuca, kun oroo waŋe i dirica aneno yi-ot, dok daŋ tye anena i waŋ dirica." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Dyera ame amaro-nono kobo keda, kun kobba ni, “Dyera acil ame amaro, ya owoti;" 
SongOfSongs2:11 nen kare me cwir doŋ okato oko, kot daŋ mom doŋ cwe." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ature doŋ ocako nen oko i lobo, kare me wer doŋ ene, koko awele doŋ ocako winyere oko i lobowa." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Oduro doŋ ocako nyak oko, olok daŋ ocako turo oko, turgi tye aduny akur meicel. Dyera acil, ame amaro, ya malo owoti." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Yin ibedo awelena ame okanne i kidi ame obarre, yin i awelena ame opono i wi atenni malo; koŋ imia anen waŋi ba, koŋ imia awiny dwoni ba, pien dwoni winyo mit meicel, waŋi daŋ cil atek." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mak wunu ekwe luŋ, mak wunu naka itinogi, pien gin obalo olokwa oko, aco kono olokwa doŋ oturo oko.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Dyera ame amaro-nono en doŋ mega, an daŋ a mege, en kwao rommi mere i akina kalaŋweka," 
SongOfSongs2:17 Dwog doŋ paco ba, yin dyera ame amaro, kun ikirre i ŋwec i wi kiddi malo, calo amyem onyo twon atil, tuno ka yamo me odiko doŋ ocako kodo aŋic, tipo daŋ doŋ orwenyo oko." 
SongOfSongs3:1 I kare ame abuto i wi tandana dyewor, abedo paro dyera ame amaronono; abedo yenyo, naka mom ate nwoŋo; alwoŋo, mom daŋ te gamo doga." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ate kobo ni, “Aman doŋ abino ya wot yenye i boma luŋ, abino yenye i yo kede bar-gu; an abino medde yenyo ŋat ame cunya maro-nono.” Cite ayenyo naka mom ate nwoŋo." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Okur-piny te ŋolle i koma, i kare ame onwoŋo gin tye alolono dye boma. An ate ŋolle penyogi ni, Ineno wunu dyera ame amaronie?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 I kare ame akatogi anonok i ŋea, ate cop i kom dyera ame amaronono oko, Akwako ŋute nakanaka kun mom aye ni wot dok kannoro, tuno ka akele naka i ot a totta, naka iyi icika imatta ame rik oyaca iye." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Acikowu atek, wun anyira me Jerucalem, kun akwoŋo akwoŋa i nyiŋ leyi me tim, kur itwar wunu marwa, tuno ka kare oromo." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ŋo ame tye ka bino i tuŋ tim cae, ame calo yito aduny, yito ame oya i murra kede odok a ŋwece kur ame owaŋo, ame kur calo gigi mogo a ŋwecgi kur ame ocat-wil cato?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Koŋ inen wunu ba, gin otiŋo itanda me tiŋo Culeman! Jo atek ilweny pyerabicel daŋ tye a lwoke, ame gin obedo twoni jo atek meicel iyi Icrael." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Gin luŋ odiro meicel i lweny i pala, dok daŋ ona meicel i lweny; ŋat acel acel tye otweo pala lwennyere i pyere, me kuro gin ame timere dyewor." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Abaka Culeman rik otio i itanda mere, kun otio i bao ame oya i yen me Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Yen ame tye acalo pagi mege, en rik otio kede ryal, ŋeye te bedo jabu, eka kom bedo mere te wumo oko i boŋo obedo amaramar, aco yie ote kwogo atek meicel, kun anyira me Jerucalem en okwogo kittono, pi mar ame onwoŋo tye i cunygi." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Wun anyira me Cion, wot wunu ba, koŋ inen wunu abaka Culeman. Nen wunu tok kwogo ame tottere oketo i wie, i nino me nyomere acil, i nino ame opoŋ i lelo." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Koŋ inen ba, yin nyako ame amaro-ni, yin iber meicel; yin gire imwonya meicel. Waŋi kom calo waŋ amam ka aneno i ŋe boŋo ame igeŋo i waŋi. Yer wi kom calo lwak dyegi, ame aciro aluŋere i luŋ me Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Aco laki te tar calo yer kom megi rommi atar, ame oya i kan ame olwokogi iye, kun gin luŋ ogoo ka rude keken, ame pwod omworo yer komgi amwora, dok atin a romo i akinagi daŋ mom orwenyo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Del dogi te rema pee calo uci arema, dogi neno ber atek, lemi te nen calo nucu okwer pomegranat, ka kom aneno i ŋe boŋo ame iwumo kede waŋi." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Aco ŋuti te nyedde malo aber calo gedo a Daudi ocuŋ malo iguŋ, ame ogero me kano jami lweny, ame oŋabo iye kwode abeco ame romo tutumia twal, ame gin luŋ obedo kwode olweny." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Tuŋino aryo luŋ bergi calo itino amor aryo, calo kom itino aryo ame obedo rude, ame tye acem i akina kalaŋweka oturu." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Abino bedo gira i wi kidi me odok murra, kede i wi tur me odok luban, tuno ka yamo me odiko doŋ ocako kodo aŋic, tipo daŋ doŋ orwenyo oko." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Mom tye dul komi moro ame aneno rac, ama dyera ame amaro yin gire iber odoco." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Aterana we, oya doŋ oko i Lebanon, owoti, owot karacel, wan aryo kedi, oya oko i Lebanon. Yitto doŋ piny i wi kiddi me Amana, yitto piny i wi kidi me Cenir kede me Kermon, oya oko i kan ame adu eŋatu tye iye apipim, oya oko i wi kiddi ame kwace odurie iye wok-ki." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Cunya doŋ gire megi, aminna, aterana, nenoni kede tigo i ŋuti-nu a doŋ omio cunya luŋ tye gire i ciŋi," 
SongOfSongs4:10 Marri oneka i mwonyo lao oko, ama aminna, aterana! marri kato gire koŋo olok oko, ŋwec mooni te kur ame kato kit ginnoro luŋ akur." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Aterana, dogi lim calo kic, moo kic kede cak tye gire i te lebi, ŋwec boŋŋini te kur calo ŋwec kidi me Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Yin gire ibedo potona, ama aminna, aterana, yin ibedo potona ame ocelo oko, yin ibedo akoŋ ame doŋ omwono doge oko pira." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Yin i potona ame okwer pomegranat doŋo iye, dok yen ocele abeco meicel nyak iye, ame ature iye kur atek dok moo yen iye daŋ kur," 
SongOfSongs4:14 kite moo apapat ame ŋweogi kur kede cinamon, kede kite yen apapat me odok luban, murra kede moo mogo ame ŋwecgi kur, kede kit yen ocele mege me wel." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Yin ibedo waŋ akoŋŋa, kulo ame ya iye pii me kwo, kulo ame pii mere mol i wi kidi me Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Cak doŋ kodo ba, yin yamo me anyarodi, biye ba, yin yamo me anyarolum! Kod ba i potona, me ŋwece cak duny i kabedo ducu. Dyera ame amaro myero gire doŋ bin i poto mere, me bin cam nyig yen abeco ame tye iye." 
SongOfSongs5:1 An gire doŋ abino oko i potona, ama aminna, aterana, akulo wia doŋ i depo murra kede gin a ŋwecgi kur, atye doŋ awadowado moo kic i pedo kic, amato doŋ koŋo olok kede cak. Cem wunu, wun jo ame marre, matte wunu atek, wun jo ame marre!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Abuto piny, cite cunya onwoŋo tye alwodo kop, Koŋ iwiny ba, dyera ame amaro tye agoyo doggola, kun kobba ni, “Yabba doggola ba, aminna ame amaro, awelena ame cil wok-ki; pien toyo omio wia doŋ ŋic aŋica, ekuna me dyewor omwono yer wia oko.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 An doŋ agonyo boŋo i koma oko, kara dok adwok bo? woki doŋ alwoko tyena oko, dok anyon piny bo?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Dyera ame amaro te cwayo ciŋe i waŋ kika, koma te po meicel." 
SongOfSongs5:5 An ate ya malo me yabo dyera, murra te cako totona i ciŋa, kun anyira ciŋa luŋ dyaka adyaka i murra, naka i kom bolti ame ocego i doggola." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ate yabbi dyera ame amaro doggola, cite ate nwoŋo dyera ame amaro owoto gire oko. Cunya onwoŋo opoto atek i kare ame en okobo keda; ayenyo, cite mom anwoŋo, alwoŋo daŋ, cite mom te gamo doga." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Okurpiny te cop i koma, i kare ame gin onwoŋo tye aloloŋo piny i boma; gin ogoa ote wana oko, gin te gamo boŋona oko, gin okurpiny ame kuro apama cel me boma." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Acikowu atek meicel, wun anyira me Jerucalem ka ce inwoŋo wunu dyera ame amaro, kobbe wunu ni two me mar odia meicel." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ŋa ce ame yin imaro wokkono? Yin nyako aber meicel i akina anyira luŋ-ŋi? Ŋa ame yin imaro akato jo luŋŋono, ame yin icikowa pire atek atekani?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Dyera ame amaro-nono rema dok kome nen amwonya meicel; ŋeye kene akadi tye i akina jo tutumia twal. 
SongOfSongs5:11 Yer wie calo jabu ame olio acil odoco, yer wie boco ame omimina amimin, eka te col icuc calo agak." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Waŋe calo waŋ awele, ame tye i ŋet kulo ame pii mere mol, nen acil calo awele ame okwaŋ i cak, onyo kidi moro me wel ame omwono aber." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Leme calo poto ame opito iye gigi mogo ame ŋwecgi kur, ame ŋwecgi duny akur akura. Lebe kom calo tur kalaŋweka, ame pige cwer calo pig odok murra." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Bade luŋ calo jabu, oruko ruk me wel meicel. Kome pwot calo lak lyec, ame okwogo kome i capir." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Tyene calo olil olutte apwot, ame ocibo i kom kidi ame okwogo komgi i jabu, Callere rom aroma i kidi me Lebanon, calo yen cedar ame oyero ayera." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Koppere winyo mit okato kare, kom ka ineno aman, cunyi daŋ romo teri oko i kome. Mannono en obedo dyera-nono, dok en obedo awotta, wun anyira me Jerucalem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 En ŋat ame imaro-nono kara owoto kwene? yin nyako aber meicel i akina anyira luŋ-ŋi? Olubo kara yo mene ba? Kobbiwa me okonyi yenyo. 
SongOfSongs6:2 Dyera ame amaro-nono olubo yo poto mere, kan ame yen a ŋwecgi kur tye iye. Owoto kwayo rommi mere i potti kuno, dok tye daŋ apwono tur kalaŋweka." 
SongOfSongs6:3 An abedo me a dyera ame amaronono, en daŋ mega; en kwao rommi mere i akina kalaŋweka." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Dyera we, yin iber meicel, icalo boma me Tirja, berri calo ber a Jerucalem, neni iyiliyili calo neno mony ame otiŋo benderagi." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Lok waŋi teŋe, kur ibed nena, pien tye ka yelo wia meicel. Yer wii kom calo lwak dyegi, ame aciro aluŋere i luŋ me Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Aco laki te tar calo yer kom megi rommi atar, ame oya i kan ame olwokogi iye, kun gin luŋ ogoo ka rude keken, dok atin a romo i akinagi daŋ mom orwenyo." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Lemi te nen calo nucu okwer pomegranat, ka kom aneno i ŋe boŋo ame iwumo kede waŋi." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Mon ame abaka onyomo anyoma tye pyerabicel nono, aŋeca tye pyeraboro nono, aco anyira mom romo kwanne kadi acel." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Awelena ame amaro tye i akinagi acel keken, en obedo nyako acel keken ame tottere onywalo, kite ber meicel, dok tottere maro atek. Anyira ocele ka onene, doŋ olwoŋe ni ayomcuny, mon anyoma kede aŋeca daŋ amannono, gin luŋ opake apaka." 
SongOfSongs6:10 “Man kara ŋa ame nen calo rupiny-nyie? Ame cil calo dwe, dok ryeny aryenya calo ceŋ-ŋie? Ame neno iyiliyili calo mony ame tiŋo benderagi-ŋie?”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Awoto tu piny i poto amaido, me wot neno kite ame oturo kede i luŋ kuno, awoto daŋ neno ka olok doŋ ocako lot oko, kede ka okwer pomegranat doŋ ocako turo oko." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Cite ame an mom ru aŋeo gin ame onwoŋo atimere, apo anwoŋo ni doŋ atye i wi gadigadi malo, kun abedo i ŋet aloc." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Dwog cen, dwog cen ba, yin nyako Culam, dwog ba cen, koŋ idwog cen me oneni. Pino kara imito neno wunu nyako me Culam, calo nyan ame amyel i nyim dul mony aryo twal?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Tyeni neno ber atek iyi amuk, ama, nyaka adwoŋ, Amuruni oŋwel calo tigo ŋut alilia, calo kom gin ame dano adiro en otio." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Peni calo tabu agura, ame koŋo olok mom rwenyo i yie. Yii calo ŋano ame ocoko oyido karacel, kun kalaŋweka oguro dyere." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Tunoni aryo luŋ, berrere calo itino amor aryo, calo itino aryo ame gin rude," 
SongOfSongs7:4 Aco ŋuti te nyedde malo aber calo gedo me lak lyec, ame ocuŋ iguŋ malo. Aco waŋi calo kulo me Kecbon, ame tye i dogcel me Bat-rabbim. Eka umi te nyedde calo ot ocuŋ malo iguŋ ame tye i Lebanon, ame otikere kede Damaciko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Wii kwogi meicel calo kidi me Karmel, yer wii te lot abeco calo boŋo obedo amaramar; neno yer wii-nono omio abaka odoko calo abuc." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Dyera we, pe iŋeo kite ame berri yomoro kede cunya, yin i nyako ame imio yomcuny ocira oko," 
SongOfSongs7:7 Yin kom icalo yat otit, tuno i kori daŋ te luŋere calo etak otit." 
SongOfSongs7:8 An akobo ni abino yito otit, ate mako jaŋe pwono nyige. Ama, tunoni kono kom obedo calo etak olok, kun weoni kur calo nanaci," 
SongOfSongs7:9 ame ka imuŋo i yita, awinyo calo mwonyo koŋo olok amit, ame ka imato donyo gire mot amota, kun kato gire mot i dog kede i akina lak." 
SongOfSongs7:10 An abedo me a dyera ame amaro mittere luŋ tye i koma," 
SongOfSongs7:11 Biye ba, yin dyerra ame amaro-ni, me ibin owot karacel i pottt kuca, me owot obut i akina myere," 
SongOfSongs7:12 ote dilo idiko con wot i potti olok, me owot onen ka olok doŋ ocako lot oko, ka ce turgi doŋ oyabere oko, kun okwer pomegranat doŋ oturo oko. Abino nyutti marra kuno." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ŋwec yat nywal tye aduny akur meicel, kit yen luŋ abeco ame oyero ayera tye i doggolawa, en aconnege kede en anyennege; gin luŋ agwokogi kannono ce yomoro cunyi, yin dyera ame amaro." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kono kom onwoŋo yin ibedo calo ominna, ame idoto cak i kor totta. Kono onwoŋo ka arwatte kedi, koŋ anoto lemi, kun ŋattoro gire mom romo caya." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Onwoŋo aromo teli, teri naka i ot a totta, naka atot iyi icika ame rik oyaca iye, Onwoŋo aromo miyi koŋo akur meicel i te mato, kede koŋo okwer pomegranat ame abio." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ateno wia i ciŋe tuncam, kun ciŋe tuŋcem okwa ko kora." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Acikowu atek meicel, wun anyira me Jerucalem, kur itwar wunu marwa, tuno ka kare oromo." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Maca ŋa ame tye abino tuŋ tim cae, ame ojeŋer i kom dyerrere ame emaro cae? An a rik acol i poto nanaci. Rem me nywal rik ogoo totti kuno i kare me nywali, en rik te bedo yelle i rem me nywal kuno." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Mia kur arweny i cunyi calo anen ame oruko i ŋut, acalo atem ame irwako i ciŋi pien mar tek calo to, nyeko te ger calo lyel, tyer calo leb mac, leb mac ame lyel atek meicel." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Kadi pii adwoŋ rom mene, mom gire romo kweyo mar, kadi alele opoŋ rom mene, mom romo mwonyo mar. Ka ce alonyo moro otemo wilo mar i limmere luŋ ame etye kede, jo bino cayo atek meicel." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Wan otye kede aminwa atidi mire, tuno mere mom ru ogulo. Ka ŋo ame obino timo pi aminwanono, i nino ame lo moro bino penyo?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Kono aminwa-nono onwoŋo tye acalo apama me cel, kono onwoŋo ogero apama cel ocele me ryal i kome; aco kono en onwoŋo tye acalo dogcel me boma, kono onwoŋo ocego oko i bao me cedar." 
SongOfSongs8:10 An rik abedo apama me cel, tunona onwoŋo calo gedo ocuŋ iguŋ malo; en onwoŋo doŋ nena caa luŋ, acalo ŋat ame kelo kuc." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Culeman rik tye i poto olokkere Baal-amon; en onwoŋo omio poto olokkerenono i ciŋ jo a gwoko; ame dano acel acel i akinagi culo baŋi lim me ryal tutumia acel pi olok ocek iye. 
SongOfSongs8:12 An tye i poto olokka, ame obedo mega an kena; yin Culeman giri itwero tero tutumia acel, eka jo ame gwoko te tero mia aryo." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Yin ame ibedo i potti-ni, owotena mito winyo dwoni; koŋ ikob me awiny dwoni ba," 
SongOfSongs8:14 Ru bino baŋa ba, yin dyera ame amaro, biye ibed calo amyem, onyo acalo atin atil, ame bedo i wi kiddi ame yen a ŋwecgi kur doŋo iye." 
Isaiah1:1 Man en gin ame Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Icaya wot Amoj i kom Juda kede Jerucalem i kare a Ujjia, Yocam, Akaj kede Kejekia ame gin obedo obakki me Juda." 
Isaiah1:2 Koŋ iwiny, yin polo, ter yitti yin lobo; pien Rwot doŋ okobo ni, “Apito itino awobe, amiogi odoŋo, ento gin doŋ ojem oko i koma," 
Isaiah1:3 Twara twon ŋeo ŋat ame loc kede kan ame adwoŋŋere mie iye cam; ento Icrael mom gire ŋeo, jona mom gire niaŋ.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Koŋ inen ba, rok man ocerre acera i bal, gin obedo jo ame bal gire onuogi oko, ikwae otim tim areco, itino ame kitgi doŋ oballe oko! Gin doŋ otyeko weko Rwot oko, ocao doŋ Ŋat Acil me Icrael oko, kun odok gigi cen atek ateka." 
Isaiah1:5 Piŋo kara pwod dok imito wunu ni medde goyowu? Dok piŋo imedde wunu ameda i jem? Nen bur doŋ odurre adura i dye wiwu ducu, cunywu daŋ doŋ goro agora." 
Isaiah1:6 Cakere i tyenwu piny tuno kede i wiwu malo, kannoro aber iye mom tye kadi acel, awaŋo kede bur odurre adura iye, ame burrogo iye pwod tye acwer acwera; kun mom obio tut iye, mom daŋ otweo waŋgi, akadi bido waŋgi kede moo." 
Isaiah1:7 Lobowu doŋ yie nono, bomawu doŋ owawaŋo oko mac: orok omao lobowu oko kun ineno wunu, lobowu doŋ odoŋ yie nono a calli lobo ame orok oyako." 
Isaiah1:8 Owekoboma me Cion odoŋ calo gony ame oweko i poto olok, dok calo gaŋo ame oweko poto okwer, calo doŋ boma ame mony otyeko guro oko." 
Isaiah1:9 Koŋo Rwot me mony mom owekkiwa jo moro odoŋ, kono wan obedo calo Codoma, kono nyo doŋ ocalo Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Winy wunu kop a Rwot, wun oloc me Codoma! Ter yitwu i pwony Obaŋawa, wun jo me Gomora! Rwot okobo:" 
Isaiah1:11 “Motwu ame oŋolo apipimmono kara konnyere ŋo baŋa? Rommiwu ame oŋolo me awaŋa doŋ opuo cunya oko, karacel kede dwol me limwu ocwe mege; cunya gira mom yom i kom remo akadi me rommi onyo me dyegi." 
Isaiah1:12 “Ka ibino wunu i nyima, Ŋa okobo ni inyonyono wunu dyekalla?" 
Isaiah1:13 Kur imedde kella wunu mot a konyere mom, yito odok akur odoko gin me kwer baŋa, Por a dwe, kede cabit, kede lwoŋo jo i cokere, mom atwero kanyo balwu i cokerewu adoŋo." 
Isaiah1:14 Por dwewu kede ecubaŋwu ame ociko pirgi, gin luŋ okwero gira cunya oko; odoko doŋ yec apek meicel baŋa, yeyogi doŋ oola gira oko." 
Isaiah1:15 Ka itaŋo wunu ciŋwu, abino wumo gira waŋa oko, mom anenowu; kadi bed ikwaa wunu tyen apol ata, mom abino winyo gira kwacwu; pien ciŋwu remo keken." 
Isaiah1:16 Koŋ ilwokere wunu, ibed wunu acil, cwa wunu timwu areco oko teŋe me kur dok bed nen i nyima," 
Isaiah1:17 ite daŋ weka wunu timo gin arac oko, pwony wunu timo gin aber. Lub wunu ŋolo kop atira, kony wunu jo ame owuno; lar wunu pi itino kic, pid wunu pi mon a coggi oto."
