Isaiah1:18 “Koŋ doŋ ibin wunu ba, me obin olar wunu kop karacel, kadi bed balwu doŋ rema arema, bino doko atar calo pee; kadi bed orema calo pala, bino doko calo yer romo." 
Isaiah1:19 Ka ce iye wunu kun itye wunu kede winy, ibino camo wunu gin abeco ame ocek i lobo." 
Isaiah1:20 Aco ka ikwero wunu kun daŋ ijem wunu, pala lweny bino tyekowu oko; pien man Rwot ikokome en okobo.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Kite ame boma ame yam genne doŋ odoko kede alaya, boma ame rik ŋolo kop atira dwoŋ iye! Dok kite atira daŋ onwoŋo tye iye, cite aman doŋ nek keken." 
Isaiah1:22 Ryalwu doŋ rom aroma i cet ryal, koŋo olokwu doŋ orubere oko i pii," 
Isaiah1:23 Olocwu doŋ odoko jo a jem, aco owotegi te bedo okwo. Ŋat acel acel i akinagi maro lim ame owile kede i muŋ, cunygi tye ka i mot. Gin mom olaro pi itino kic, pido a mon a coggi oto mom gire tuno i nyimgi." 
Isaiah1:24 Mannono omio Rwot, ame en Rwot me mony, Rwot ame en Won Twer me Icrael okobo ni, “Oromo doŋ, cunya doŋ bino kwe i kom jo a daga, abino culo kwor i kom okworra." 
Isaiah1:25 Abino loko ciŋa adwoggo i komi; abino twatwako cet ryalli oko, abino liyo, abino miyo kit raccoro luŋ gwarre i komi." 
Isaiah1:26 Abino dwoko oŋolkoppi kite a rik tye kede con, kede jo ame mii tam kite a rik tye kede iyi ageyi. I ŋe mannono, ote doŋ lwoŋi ni boma ame kite atira, boma ame genne.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Obino lakoro Cion pi ŋolo kop a jo luŋ arorom, jo iye ame oŋut obino lakorogi pi kitegi atira." 
Isaiah1:28 Cite jo ame jem kede obalo obino neko oko karacel, aco jo ame weko Rwot oko, obino daŋ jwero oko." 
Isaiah1:29 Pien lewic bino makowu i kworo ame ilelo wunu iye-nono; alee bino twodowu pi pottiwu ame opito kede yen ame doŋ ityeko yero wunu. 
Isaiah1:30 Pien wun ibino doko wunu acalli kworo ame pote oner, dok daŋ acalli poto ame pii pe iye." 
Isaiah1:31 Lo atek bino doko acalli lum otwo ka mac ogudo, kede ticcere daŋ acalli mac otyer; gin aryo luŋ obino waŋ karacel, kun mom dok tye ŋattoro ame neko mac." 
Isaiah2:1 Man en kop ame Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Icaya wot Amoj i kom Juda kede Jerucalem. 
Isaiah2:2 Man bino timere i kare ame tye anyim: kidi ame ot a Rwot tye iye bino cuŋ malo iguŋ ame kato kiddi ducu, borrere bino kato lobo luŋ obedo tutur; orok luŋ bino ciro woto kuno," 
Isaiah2:3 rok apol bino bino, te kobo ni, “Biye owot wunu i wi kidi a Rwot, i ot a Rwot Obaŋa a Yakobo; me en wot pwonywa i kite mere, me wan daŋ olub kite.” Pien cik bino ya i Cion, kun kop a Rwot ya i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah2:4 En bino ŋolo kop i akina rok apapat rok apol bino lubo gin a en omoko. Pala lwenygi obino teto me kweri dyaŋ toŋigi bino doko pala me lwero jaŋ olok; rokkoro gire mom dok bino tiŋo pala romo me lweny i rok ocele, mom daŋ dok obino pwonyo kite me romo." 
Isaiah2:5 Wun jo me ot a Yakobo, biye owot wunu kun lero a Rwot menyowa." 
Isaiah2:6 Pien yin iweko joni oko ata, ame en jo me ot a Yakobo, pien otyet oya i kide odurre iye meicel, kede emuroko ame calo jo Piriciti, gin doŋ twotwomo ciŋgi kede orok." 
Isaiah2:7 Ryal kede jabu dwoŋ meicel lobogi, lonyogi mom twero tum; aguragura daŋ dwoŋ meicel i lobogi, gadigadi lwenygi daŋ mom twero tum." 
Isaiah2:8 Cal jogi odurre meicel i lobogi, gin oworo gin ame ciŋgi otio, gin ame gin otio kengi kede ciŋgi." 
Isaiah2:9 Mannono gire omio doŋ okwanyo dit a dano oko, co doŋ odoko jo moro a piny meicel kur itimgi gire kica i bal man!" 
Isaiah2:10 Dony giri ba oko i lela, pon oko iyi apua, pi twon lworo adwoŋ i kom Rwot kede i kom kwogo me dittere." 
Isaiah2:11 Waŋ me abwone obino dwoko oko piny, awaka a co bino gire kwe oko. Obino pako ka Rwot keken i nino-nono." 
Isaiah2:12 Pien Rwot me mony tye kede nino mere, pi ginnoro luŋ ame wakere kede ame lyerre, pi ginnoro luŋ amalo, ame otiŋere malo;" 
Isaiah2:13 pi yen cedar luŋ me Lebaŋon, aboco mege a tye malo; pi kworo luŋ me Bacan;" 
Isaiah2:14 pi kiddi luŋ ocuŋ i guŋ malo kede pi lobo luŋ obedo tutur," 
Isaiah2:15 pi gedo luŋ abocoboco, kede pi cel me boma luŋ ogero atek;" 
Isaiah2:16 pi mel luŋ me Tarcic, kede pi yede luŋ abeco me anena." 
Isaiah2:17 Abwone gire bino kwe oko, awaka a co bino dok oko piny; obino pako ka Rwot keken i nino-nono." 
Isaiah2:18 Cal jogi luŋ obino jwero oko. 
Isaiah2:19 Jo bino donyo i gorogoro kiddi, kede i burrogo ame tye i lobo, pi twon lworo adwoŋ i kom Rwot kede i kom kwogo me dittere, ka en bino ya malo me miyo myelkom bino i lobo." 
Isaiah2:20 I nino-nono cal jogi me ryal kede me jabu, ame jo otio pirgi kengi me awora, gin bino bolo oko baŋ bubu kede baŋ olik," 
Isaiah2:21 ote donyo gigi i lela ame obarre, kede i akina kiddi okakaka, pi twon lworo adwoŋ i kom Rwot, kede i kom kwogo me dittere, ka en bino ya malo me miyo myelkom bino i lobo." 
Isaiah2:22 Wek dano ame weo tye i ume bedi, Konnyere kara ŋo ba?" 
Isaiah3:1 Pien, koŋ inen ba, Rwot, ame obedo Rwot me mony, tye ka kwanyo oko baŋ Jerucalem kede Juda, ginnoro luŋ ame kwogi ojeŋere iye, cam luŋ ame kwogi ojeŋere iye, kede pii daŋ ame kwogi ojeŋere iye;" 
Isaiah3:2 jo atek kede jo me mony, oŋolkop kede odwarpiny, otyet kede odoŋe," 
Isaiah3:3 otel jo pyerabic kede jo me awora, omi-tam kede emuroko aryekkege, kede oryeko me tiyo irizi." 
Isaiah3:4 Abino miyo awobe en ame bedo olocgi, itino atino en ame bino loyogi." 
Isaiah3:5 Jo bino bedo wuwuna kengi kengi, kun ŋat man wuno awottere, dano acel acel wuno dano wadgi; awobi bino nywaro adwoŋ, lo moro a piny meicel bino nywaro lo oworo." 
Isaiah3:6 I nino-nono dano bino mako ominnere i ot a pappere, kun kobo ni, “Yin itye kede ruk, yin ibino bedo alocwa, wi obur man bino bedo te locci”." 
Isaiah3:7 I nino-nono en bino kobo ni, “An gira mom abino bedo acaŋdano; ogati kede ginnoro me aruka gira pe i oda; pe gire ibino keta wuno me bedo ŋat ame loo lwak.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Pien Jerucalem mio jo buco rette, aco Juda doŋ opoto oko; Pien kop ame gin kobo kede gin ame gin timo tiko gire Rwot, gin ojem i kome kede i kom kwogo mere." 
Isaiah3:9 Kitegi me yero jo ayera bino bedo caden i komgi; gin orabo pi balgi calo Codom, mom gigi okano balgi. Gin bino neno can meicel! Pien gin okelo can i komgi kengi." 
Isaiah3:10 Tittii jo a kitegi atira ni, gin gigi obino bedo aber, pien gin obino camo gin ame oya i ticgi." 
Isaiah3:11 Jo a kitegi reco bino neno can meicel! Meggi bino bedo arac okato kare; pien gin ame ciŋgi otimo, en ame daŋ obino timo i komgi." 
Isaiah3:12 Itino ame wuno jona, mon en ame loogi: Ama jona, otelwu rwenywu arwenya, gin odwadwalowu oko i yowu." 
Isaiah3:13 Rwot doŋ gire obino oko, en ocuŋ me ŋolo kop i kom jo mere," 
Isaiah3:14 Rwot doŋ ocako piddi jo oko, ocako piddi odoŋe a jo mere kede olocgi. “Wun en ame icamo wunu poto olok, jami ame iyako wunu i baŋ ocan tye i udiwu," 
Isaiah3:15 Kara piŋo iŋiŋinyo wunu jona, kun irego wunu waŋ ocan oko?” Man kop a Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah3:16 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien anyira me Cion wakere, owoto ame onyedo ŋutgi anyeda, kun oneno jo i waŋ me alaya, ocwinyo wot acwinya i wi tyengi kun oyeyeŋo mola tyengi gito koko ogita." 
Isaiah3:17 Pi mannono, Rwot bino miyo wi anyira me Cion duduga, Rwot daŋ bino miyo komgi doŋ nono.”" 
Isaiah3:18 I nino-nono Rwot bino kwanyo mola me tyengi abeco oko, kede tigo otokome tur nyimgi, kede mola me cal dwe;" 
Isaiah3:19 mola ŋut ame ryeny aryenya, mola ŋut ciŋ, kede tambara me adwala i ŋut;" 
Isaiah3:20 boŋŋigi me atwea i wie, mola me bat, alid tweyo pyer, cupa moo wir, irizi me gwoko kom;" 
Isaiah3:21 atem me ciŋ, kede mola um;" 
Isaiah3:22 boŋŋigi abeco me aruka i nino adoŋo, gomicigi, boŋŋigi me wumere, kede cao ciŋ;" 
Isaiah3:23 rukkogo arerep, boŋŋi camanini, tambara adwala i wic kede tambara me geŋo waŋ." 
Isaiah3:24 Akaka moo akur bino bedo gin otop; akaka tambara pyer, bino bedo tol; akaka yer akeda, bino lyedo; akaka boŋŋigi mogo me wel, boŋo cola en ame bino bedo i pyergi; akaka nen amwonya, bino bedo lewic." 
Isaiah3:25 Cogwu bino to i pala lweny, jowu atekkege bino to i mony," 
Isaiah3:26 Kumo kede kokome can bino winyere i dogcellere, bino bedo acalo dako ame oyako jami mere luŋ, ame obedo piny i lobo." 
Isaiah4:1 I nino-nono mon abiro bino poto i kom ico acel ote kobbe ni, “Wan giwa obino camo cemwa kun daŋ oyenyo gi-arukawa i wiwa, cite yin myero itim ber ilwoŋwa i nyiŋi; kwany lewic i wiwa oko.”" 
Isaiah4:2 I nino-nono jaŋ yat ame Rwot en omio olot bino bedo aber, kun daŋ tye kede kwogo; gin ocek i lobo bino miyo jo Icrael odoŋŋege wakere kun daŋ otye kede kwogo." 
Isaiah4:3 Ŋat acel acel ame odoŋ i Cion kede ame bedo i Jerucalem obino lwoŋo ni nar acil, jo luŋ ame occo nyiŋgi ni myero bed kwo i Jerucalem," 
Isaiah4:4 i kare ame nwoŋo Rwot doŋ olwoko cilo i kom mon me Cion, kun daŋ doŋ otyeko lonyo remo oko i dye Jerucalem i cuny me ŋolo kop atira kede cuny me weyo gin arac oko." 
Isaiah4:5 Rwot doŋ te keto pol kede yito dyeceŋ, kede acara mac ame lyel dyewor, i wi kabedo ducu ame tye i wi kidi me Cion kede i wi jo ame ocokere iye; pien ginnoro ame otio calo oker bino geŋo wi kwogo mere luŋ." 
Isaiah4:6 Ginnono bino bedo me geŋo lyeto dyeceŋ, kede gi-geŋo yamo kede kot." 
Isaiah5:1 Wek koŋ awer baŋ ŋat ame amaro wer me mar i kom poto olokkere. Ŋat ame amaro rik onwoŋo tye kede poto olokkere, i lobo a ceko cem ame tye i wi kidi malo." 
Isaiah5:2 En oboto, oloko, te coko gweŋ iye oko, te pito iye olok abeco ame oyero ayera; te gero pem i dyere me gwoko, te daŋ kunyo bur me jolo pige. En te bedo kede gen ni bino nyako nyige abeco, cite te lunyo dok nyako nyige acalo me olok me tim." 
Isaiah5:3 Aman doŋ ba, wun jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, kede wun jo me Juda, tim wunu ber iŋol wunu kop, i akina an kede poto olokka." 
Isaiah5:4 Gin aŋo odoŋ ame onwoŋo myero atim i poto olokka, ame mom atimo? Kare ame an abedo kede gen ni bino nyako nyige abeco, piŋo dok nyige olunyo bedo nyig olok me tim?" 
Isaiah5:5 Aman koŋ iwek dok atittiwu, gin ame abino timo i kom poto olokka, Abino kwanyo cel iye okome wek balle oko, abino coro apama cellere oko piny, me leyi nyonyogi oko piny." 
Isaiah5:6 Abino jalo aweko balle oko, mom dok abino ŋolo jaŋe, akadi doyo tere, okuto kede ocokocok bino tu, te doŋo iye; abino daŋ ciko pol luŋ aluŋa, me kur dok omi kot cwe iye." 
Isaiah5:7 Pien poto olok a Rwot me mony, obedo lwak jo Icrael; kede jo me Juda. Gin luŋ obedo gin a en opito me yomoro cunye; en onwoŋo tye kede gen ni gin bino ŋolo kop atira, cite koŋ inen remo ame tye ka ony i akinagi; en onwoŋo tye i gen ni gin bino bedo jo akitegi atira, cite koŋ inen twon koko ame tye i akinagi." 
Isaiah5:8 Jo owor ame kubo udi i kom udi wadgi bino neno can, kede jo ame medo pottigi ameda tuno waŋ ame kannoro mom doŋ odoŋ i jo ocele, kun odoŋ doŋ kengi i lobo." 
Isaiah5:9 Rwot me mony okobo kun an awinyo, ni, “Ateteni, udi apol gire bino doŋ yigi nono, udi adoŋo, abeco bino doŋ aboŋo ŋattoro i yigi." 
Isaiah5:10 Poto olok me eka apar bino ya iye koŋo olok ame roma debe aryo keken, kede kotti pukki adek twal, bino ya iye debe aryo keken.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Jo ame dilo ibai me yenyo koŋ akeccege, jonono bino neno can, kede jo ame ri i ka koŋo naka idiŋ, tuno ka doŋ omer atek." 
Isaiah5:12 Iyi aramagi ogo iye opuk kede naŋa, ajaa, nyamulere, kun koŋo mom rwenyo iye; cite mom gigi oparo kadi acel pi tic ame Rwot otio, akadi bolo waŋgi i gin ame en otio i ciŋe." 
Isaiah5:13 Mannono omio jona owoto gire oko iyi opii, pi kwiya pinygi; jo ame oworo i akinagi tye ato kec, lwak jo apipim i akinagi oryo pii ociro gire oko." 
Isaiah5:14 Mannono omio lyel me yiko jo tye amwonyo lao meicel, kun oŋamo doge alac okato kare, kwogo a Jerucalem kede lwak iye apipim donyo gigi iye, jo ame wo iye kede jo a lelo daŋ." 
Isaiah5:15 Dit a dano doŋ okwanyo gire oko, co doŋ odoko jo moro apiny meicel; wan a yam obwono kede jo doŋ ogik oko," 
Isaiah5:16 Cite Rwot me mony gire dit meicel i ŋolo kop atira, Obaŋa Acil nyutte gire ni ecil i timo gin a tye atira," 
Isaiah5:17 Rommi bino cam i Jerucalem calo eletgi, dok ocwe kede dyegi bino cam i wi obur." 
Isaiah5:18 Jo ame wao kite arac i tol me goba bino neno can, ame wao bal calo tol ame wao gadigadi," 
Isaiah5:19 ame okobo ni, “Wek oru timo wunu, me en cuny ticcere acunya, me wan onen; me wek gin a Ŋat Acil me Icrael oyikome atia bin aceggi, me bin, me wan daŋ oŋe.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Jo ame lwoŋo gin arac ni ber, eka, ote lunyo lwoŋo gin aber ni rac, jo nono bino neno can, Akaka colpiny gin gigi olunyo loko doko lero, eka akaka lero gin te loko doko colpiny, gin akec, gin loko doko gin alim, eka gin alim gin te loko doko gin akec!" 
Isaiah5:21 Jo ame ryekogi tye i waŋgi kengi, bino neno can, jo ame nenne kengi ni gin oryek." 
Isaiah5:22 Omat koŋ adoŋo bino neno can, kede mon ame odiro i nyobo koŋo amit;" 
Isaiah5:23 ame mio ŋat obalo loo kop pi lim owilogi kede i muŋ, ame mom dwokki ŋat a mom i balloro jami mere." 
Isaiah5:24 Pi mannono ba, kite ame leb mac waŋo kede reŋ kal, kede kite ame lum otwo ony kede i leb mac, gin daŋ bino bedo acalo yat ame lwite otop oko onyo acalo yat ame ture two dunyo apua, pien gin okwero winyo cik a Rwot me mony, kun ocao kop ame Ŋat Acil me Icrael okobo." 
Isaiah5:25 Mannono omio akemo omako Rwot i kom jo mere, en te ryeyo ciŋe i komgi, nekogi oko; kiddi adoŋo te yeŋere, komgi oto te radde ata calo yugi i dye yo, Magi-nono luŋ mom gire okweo akemo mere, en gire pwod tye aryeyo ciŋe aryea i komgi." 
Isaiah5:26 En bino tiŋo bendera mere pi rok ame tye kannabor, bino lwoŋogi i agikki piny kun lwio alwia; nen, gin ca, oriŋŋo obino oyotoyot!" 
Isaiah5:27 Ŋattoro ame ool onyo ame ogatte mom gire tye i akinagi, ŋattoro ame nino omako waŋe onyo ame onino mom gire tye i akinagi, mom tye ŋattoro ame boŋo pyere ogony, amuk i tyen ŋattoro mom daŋ ocot." 
Isaiah5:28 Aterogi bit meicel, akud aterogi luŋ tye ame otelo atek meicel, ogwenere tyen aguraguragi calo lela, tyen gadigadigi wirre calo yamo ajuru." 
Isaiah5:29 Gin luŋ mor calo eŋatu, morgi calo me itino eŋatu; gin oŋur ote mako gin ame odwaro, ote tero gigi aboŋo ŋattoro ame laro i baŋgi." 
Isaiah5:30 Gin bino nur i kome i nino-nono, acalo nam ame amor. Aco ka ce ibolo waŋi i lobo, nen ba, ibino neno colpiny kede can keken, kun pol ogeŋo waŋ ceŋ oko." 
Isaiah6:1 I mwaka ame abaka Ujjia oto iye, rik aneno Rwot obedo i wi kommere me loc, kun tye odyede malo, dit meicel, lak boŋo mere oromo yi ot Obaŋa luŋ," 
Isaiah6:2 cerapi tye ocuŋ i ka wie malo, kun ŋat acel acel i akinagi tye kede bwome kanyape; aryo me geŋo waŋgi, aryo me geŋo tyengi, kede aryo me twarregi." 
Isaiah6:3 Gin onwoŋo tye awer kun ŋat acel acel gamo ni, “Rwot me mony cil, cil dok cil; wi podo luŋ opeŋ i kwogo mere.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Acakki me te doggola te yeŋere pi wer ame gin awero-nono, yito onwoŋo omwono yi ot oko," 
Isaiah6:5 An ate kobo ni, “Aneno can doi! Ato oko doi; pien an a dano ame kop a ya i doga mom cil; dok daŋ abedo i akina rok ame kop i doggi mom cil; aco waŋa oneno abaka, ame en Rwot me mony.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Eka ŋat acel i akina ocerapi te twarre bino baŋa, kun omako loti mac i ciŋe, ame en okwanyo i wi keno lam, kun okwanyo i boi kwanyo mac." 
Isaiah6:7 Oreo doge te kobo ni, “Nen ba, man doŋ oreo dogi, rocci doŋ okwanyo oko, balli doŋ oweko oko.”" 
Isaiah6:8 An ate winyo dwon Rwot kun kobo ni, “Abino kara oro ŋa? Ŋa kara ame bino wot pirwa?” An ate gamo ni, “An ene; ora.”" 
Isaiah6:9 En te kobo ni, “Wot i kobbi rok man ni, ‘Me winyo, ibino winyo wunu, ento mom ibino ni an wunu tere. Me neno, ibino bedo neno wunu, ento mom ibino ŋeyo wunu.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Mi rok man cunygi dok nwaŋ, yitgi diŋ oko, me gin kur nen kede waŋgi, yitgi daŋ kur winy, kur daŋ oniaŋ iye i cunygi me kur olokere odwog baŋa ate canogi oko.”" 
Isaiah6:11 An ate penyo ni, “Pi kare a rom mene, ama Rwot?” En te dok iye ni, “Naka waŋ ame boma luŋ, yigi odoŋ nono, aboŋo ŋattoro ame bedo i yigi, jo moro daŋ doŋ mom abedo i udi lobo doŋ tye nono aboŋo ginnoro kadi acel," 
Isaiah6:12 kun Rwot doŋ ocwao jo teŋe kannabor, wi obur ame oweko oradde atata i dye lobo." 
Isaiah6:13 Akadi bed acel me apar doŋ iye obino dok waŋo oko, calo kworo onyo opok, ame iciki mere odoŋ, kun doŋ otyeko toŋo kome oko piny.” Icika mere en a bedo koti acillere." 
Isaiah7:1 I kare ame wot a Yocam, wot a Ujjia, abaka me Juda, Rejin abaka me Curia, kede Peka wot a Remalia, abaka me Icrael, gin aryo luŋ rik obino i Jerucalem me lweny i kome, ento loyo romo te twerre." 
Isaiah7:2 Kare ame otito koppere baŋ ikwae a Daudi ni, “Jo Epraim doŋ oribere oko i jo Curia, cuny Akaj karacel kede jo mere te myel meicel kite ame yen yeŋere kede ka yamo akodo.”" 
Isaiah7:3 Rwot te kobbi Icaya ni, “Wot irwatte wun kede Akaj, yin karacel kede wodi Cear-yacub ” wot irwatte wunu kede i agikki me yo pii ame mol tero pii iyi atapara ame tye tuŋ malo, i yo adwoŋ ame woto i poto Alwok-boŋo," 
Isaiah7:4 ite kobbe ni, “Gwokere, bed mot, kur daŋ ilwor, cunyi daŋ kur poti pi iciki aryo ame owaŋ oko ame yitogi tye aduny-nyi.”" 
Isaiah7:5 Pien jo Curia kede jo Epraim kede wot a Remalia, gin oporo kop arac i komi, kun kobo ni," 
Isaiah7:6 “Owot olweny i kom Juda, omie ebed alwor meicel, me oma bed megwa, ote keto wot a Tabeel bedo abaka iye.”" 
Isaiah7:7 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Cobo tamgi bino loyogi oko, mom gire bino cobere." 
Isaiah7:8 Pien boma adwoŋ me Curia en Damaciko, dok ŋat adwoŋ i Damaciko en Rejin. (Ame mom ru mwaka pyerabicel wie abic okato obino ŋiŋinyo jo Epraim oko, ame bino miyo gin mom dok bino medde bedo rok.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Dok boma adwoŋ me Epraim en Camaria, ŋat adwoŋ i Camaria en Remalia. Ka ce mom ibino ye wunu, ateteni, mom gire ibino cuŋ wunu." 
Isaiah7:10 Rwot dok te kobbi Akaj ni," 
Isaiah7:11 “Peny anyuttoro i baŋ Rwot Obaŋani; kadi anyut ame tye piny i lyel twal onyo ame bedo malo i polo twal.” 
Isaiah7:12 Ento Akaj te kobo ni, “Mom gire abino penyo, mom aye temo Rwot.”" 
Isaiah7:13 En dok te kobo ni, “Aco koŋ iwiny wunu wun ikwae a Daudi. Lolo dano mom ru oromowu bo, ame omio wun dok lolo wunu kom Obaŋana daŋ-nie?" 
Isaiah7:14 Pi mannono ba, Rwot ikokome en ame bino miyowu anyut. Nyannoro ame mom ru oŋeye kede ico bino yac, te nywalo awobi, obino cako nyiŋe ni Emmanuel." 
Isaiah7:15 En bino mato cak awac kede moo kic ka doŋ ŋeo kwero gin arac kede yero gin aber. 
Isaiah7:16 Pien atin-nu mom ru ŋeo gin arac kede yero gin aber, lobo ame obakki mere aryo-nu, ame yin itye i twon lworo moro adwoŋ i komgi-nono bino doŋ nono." 
Isaiah7:17 Rwot bino miyo kare moro bino i komi kede i kom joni, kede i kom jo me ot a kwaroni ame yam mom ru onen cakere ame jo Epraim opokere i Juda, en bino kelo abaka me Acuria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 I kare-nono Rwot bino lwoŋo lwaŋi ame bedo i acakki kulo me Miciri, kede kic ame bedo i lobo me Acuria, kun lwoŋogi kede lwio." 
Isaiah7:19 Gin luŋ obino bino ote ony i luŋ atut, kede i akina lela ame obabara oko, kede i wi okuto luŋ, kede iyi elet ducu." 
Isaiah7:20 I kare-nono Rwot bino kelo dano moro i loka kulo Eufrate, ame en abaka me Acuria. En bino timowu lit calo dano ame olyelo yer wie kede yer kome luŋ." 
Isaiah7:21 I kare-nono dano bino gwoko roa kede megi rommi aryo," 
Isaiah7:22 cite pi cak adwoŋ meicel ame gin bino miyo dano-nono, dano-nono bino mato cak awac kede moo kic." 
Isaiah7:23 I kare-nono potti luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye iye tyen olok tutumia, ame poto acel acel wellere romo cekel me ryal tutumia, bino doko kabedo okuto kede ocokocok." 
Isaiah7:24 Jo bino wot akud atero kede atero kuno, pien okuto kede ocokocok bedo i luŋ;" 
Isaiah7:25 aco lobo luŋ obedo kidikidi ame yam onwoŋo opuro kede kweri, mom dok ibino wot wunu kuno pi lworo okuto kede ocokocok. Kuno bino doko kan ame dok cemo iye kengi; rommi kede dyegi bino wowota iye." 
Isaiah8:1 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Kwany kidi alaccere me ico yie i coc ame jo luŋ romo kwano, ‘Maer-calal-kac-baj.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2 Dok ate nwoŋo caden agenne, Uria alamdog kede Jekeria wot a Yeberekia, me bedo ocadenna." 
Isaiah8:3 Rik ate ribere kede adwarpiny a dako ame obedo dakona, en te yac, te nywalo atin awobi. Rwot te kobba ni, “Cak nyiŋe ni Maer-calal-kac-baj;" 
Isaiah8:4 pien kun mom ru atinnono ŋeo lwoŋo ni ‘Apap’ onyo ‘Aya’ obino gwaro lonyo a jo Damaciko karacel kede jami ayaka a jo Camaria ote tero i nyim abaka me Acuria.” 
Isaiah8:5 Rwot dok te kop keda kun kobo ni," 
Isaiah8:6 “Jo man doŋ okwero pii me Ciloa ame mol gire mot ote lunyo bedo lelo gigi i nyim Rejin kede i nyim wot a Remalia; 
Isaiah8:7 pi mannono, Rwot bino miyo pii me kulo Eufrate amol atek dok daŋ dwoŋ meicel corre i komgi, ame jen abaka me Acuria karacel kede kwogo mere luŋ, Pii-nono bino poŋ i kona me yo luŋ, kun mollapakino atata;" 
Isaiah8:8 bino mol kato i Juda, kun mol lapakino atata, kato anyim, bino poŋ malo ame kato naka i ŋut twal, Pien Obaŋa tye kedwa! En bino yaro bwome me gwoko lobo man.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Mwolle wunu, wun rok luŋ, cunywu myero poti; ter wunu yitwu, wun lobo luŋ ame tye kannabor; twe wunu pyerwu, kun cunywu daŋ poto, twe wunu pyerwu kun cunywu daŋ poto," 
Isaiah8:10 Por wunu kop karacel, cite ginnoro mom bino ya iye; kob wunu kop, ento mom gire bino cobere, pien Obaŋa tye kedwa." 
Isaiah8:11 Rwot okobba kit man pien ciŋe onwoŋo odia atek dok daŋ okwenyoro an ni kur alub kite a rok man, kun kobo ni," 
Isaiah8:12 “Kur ilwoŋ wunu ni poro kop i muŋ gin ame rok man lwoŋo obedo poro kop i muŋ, kur daŋ ilwor wunu gin ame gin lworo, koyo moro daŋ kur onyere i komwu." 
Isaiah8:13 Ento myero iŋe wunu ni Rwot me mony en gire cil; en a myero bed gin ame ilworo wunu, dok en a myero mi koyo onyere i komwu." 
Isaiah8:14 En bino doko kan acil, kede gweŋ ame gato jo, kede kidi me twomere a jo me doggola obakki aryo luŋ, me Juda kede me Icrael, dok en bino bedo owic kede kumma me ciko jo ame bedo i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Jo apol bino twotwoma iye; obino rette ote tutura oko; obino cikogi kede kumma ote moko.” 
Isaiah8:16 Jo ame owinyo kop ame an apwonyo myero gwok aber kur rweny. 
Isaiah8:17 Rwot opono gire oko mom dok nen baŋ jo mere, cite an gira abino kure kun atye kede gen i kome." 
Isaiah8:18 Nen ba, an kede itino ame Obaŋa doŋ omia, wan obedo anyut kede anen baŋ jo Icrael ame oya i baŋ Rwot me mony, ame kom loccere tye i wi kidi me Cion." 
Isaiah8:19 Ka ce gin okobbiwu ni, “Koŋ iwot ipeny wunu emuroko kede ojogi ame kabo ni, wee, wee, calo ŋat a dum aduma”, gin bino kobo ni, “Rok ocele daŋ myero peny obaŋegi; myero daŋ openy tipo a jo oto pi jo akwo.”" 
Isaiah8:20 Aco winy wunu pwony kede kop ame atuco baŋwu! Ateteni, kop ame gin okobo-nono, gin okobo pien pwod otye i piny acol, piny mom ru oruyigi." 
Isaiah8:21 Jo bino bebea i lobo kun otye i twon peko adwoŋ meicel, ame kec ocirogi oko. Gin bino putte akemo kun kec onekogi, ote cako ceno abakagi kede Obaŋegi." 
Isaiah8:22 Gin bino nayo waŋgi malo i polo, kun okulo wigi oŋoŋio naka te lobo piny, cite mom obino neno ginnoro, kono ka peko kede colpiny, twon mutu moro iyiliyili ame otye ka miyogi coro. Yo moro bino bedo pe me bwot i lobo acol icuc ame tye kede i twon rem adwoŋ." 
Isaiah9:1 Jo rik onwoŋo cao lobo Jabulon kede lobo Naputali, cite en bino miyo tuŋ nam, loka Jordan, Galilaya Orok doko me kwogo." 
Isaiah9:2 Rok a yam bedo i piny acol doŋ oneno lero adwoŋ; jo a yam bedo i lobo acol icuc ceŋ doŋ oryeny, omenyogi." 
Isaiah9:3 Yin doŋ imio rokwu onya, imedo daŋ doŋ yomcunygi; gin olelo i nyimgi, kite ame jo bedo i yomcuny kare me kac, kite ame jo lelo kede ka opoko gin oyako." 
Isaiah9:4 Pien kolgi apek, kede lut me pwodo wi gwokgi, kede biro a yam oburogi kede tetek i tic, yin doŋ iturogi oko, acalo i nino a jo Midian." 
Isaiah9:5 Pien amuk luŋ ame cirikale me jebo wot i dye lweny, kede boŋŋi luŋ ame ojejebo i remo, obino waŋogi oko i mac akaka yen." 
Isaiah9:6 Pien doŋ onywalliwa atin, omiowa atin awobi; obino keto twer me loc i ciŋe, aco nyiŋe obino cako kit man ni, “Ami-tam me awura, Obaŋa Won Twer, Papo ame perakino nakanaka, Aloc ame kelo kuc.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Aco medde me loccere kede kuc iye, ka gikkere bino bedo pe, wi kom loc a Daudi kede wi mege, me miyo moko kede me jiŋo bedo atek, i ŋolo kop atira kede i kite atira, cakere tin naka waŋ i waŋ. Mitkom a Rwot me mony bino miyo man cobere." 
Isaiah9:8 Rwot ocwalo kop i kom Yakobo, koppono bino poto i kom Icrael;" 
Isaiah9:9 jo luŋ bino ŋeyo, Epraim kede jo ame bedo i Camaria, ame gin owakere dok gin ocae i cunygi kun okobo ni," 
Isaiah9:10 “Matafali doŋ orereta oko piny, ento obino gero gire oko i gweŋ apaa; olam doŋ otoŋo oko, ento wan obino leyo kakargi oko i yen cedar.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Mannono omio Rwot tye amiyo okwor abino i komgi, tye daŋ atutugo omonegi." 
Isaiah9:12 Jo Curia i tuŋ kide kede jo Piriciti i tuŋ to omwomwonyo jo Icrael kun doggi oŋamere aŋama. Magi luŋ mom gire okweo akemo mere, ciŋge pwod tye ame oryeye aryea." 
Isaiah9:13 Cite jo mom gire odwogo baŋ ŋat oketo can i komgi, akadi cwalo kwacgi baŋ Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah9:14 Mannono omio Rwot oŋolo wi Icrael oko kede yibe, jaŋ otit kede ogada i nino acel." 
Isaiah9:15 Odoŋe karacel kede jo ame oworo gin obedo wi Icrael; eka odwarpiny ame pwonyo kop me goba te bedo yin Icrael; 
Isaiah9:16 pien otelo a rok man omiogi ogak oko, jo ame gin telo wigi tamgi oballe oko." 
Isaiah9:17 Mannono omio Rwot mom lelo i kom awobegi, kica daŋ mom mako i kom otino kic kede mom a coggi oto; pien ŋat acel acel i akinagi mon woro Obaŋa, dok gin luŋ obedo jo ame timo tim areco, kop aya i doggi luŋ obedo me mino keken. Magi luŋ mom gire okweo akemo a Rwot, ciŋe pwod tye ame oryeye aryea." 
Isaiah9:18 Pien tim areco waŋ calo mac, waŋ calo okuto kede ocokocok; gamoro agaba i buŋ, kun gin luŋ ominne i yito ame owikino malo." 
Isaiah9:19 Pi akemo a Rwot me mony, omio lobo tye ka waŋ i imac, jo iye doŋ odoko gin me awaŋa mac; mom tye ŋattoro iye ame weko ominnere doŋ." 
Isaiah9:20 Omaoi tuŋ cem cite kec nwoŋo pwod anekogi, ocamo tuŋ cam cite nwoŋo mom ru oromogi; ŋat acel acel camo riŋo kom wadgi," 
Isaiah9:21 Manace camo Epraim, Epraim camo Manace, gin aryo luŋ ocobo mony i kom Juda. Magi luŋ mom gire okweo akemo mere, ciŋge pwod tye ame oryeye aryea." 
Isaiah10:1 Jo ame keto cik a mom atira bino neno can, kede ocoo kop ame mio owuno jo," 
Isaiah10:2 ame mio ogeŋo ocan oko i ŋolo kop atira, dok ame mio omao jami ocan ame tye i akina jona, ame miogi oyako jami a mon a coggi oto, dok miogi daŋ oyako jami itino kic." 
Isaiah10:3 Kara ibino timo wunu ŋo ba i nino me keto can i komwu, i dye yamo ajuru ame bino ya i kannabor? Kara ibino riŋo wunu baŋ ŋa ba me konyowu? Kara en lonyowu-nono ibino weko wunu kwene?" 
Isaiah10:4 Yo moro gire bino bedo pe, kono ka ŋoye i akina obuc, onyo to atoa keken i akina jo ame oneko. Magi luŋ mom gire bino kweyo akemo a Rwot, ciŋge pwod tye ame oryeye aryea." 
Isaiah10:5 Jo Acuria obedo lut me nyuto akemona, kede abiro me nyuto inigana." 
Isaiah10:6 Abino cwalogi i kom rok okwero woro Obaŋa, abino cikogi owoto i kom jo ame akemo omaka i komgi, pi yako jamigi kede coko jamigi ame oyako ote jejebo piny i dye yo calo coto." 
Isaiah10:7 Ento jo Acuria gire onwoŋo mom oyikere me timo kittono, dok daŋ onwoŋo gire mom otamo i cunygi, ento tamgi onwoŋo tye ka me jwero rok apol, me miyo nyiŋgi rwenyo oko." 
Isaiah10:8 Pien en okobo ni, “Odoŋe me monnya luŋ mom obedo obakki?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno mom rom aroma kede Karkemic? Kamat mom rom aroma kede Arpad? Camaria mom rom aroma kede Damaciko? 
Isaiah10:10 Ciŋa doŋ ogudo kede loc me woro jogi ame cal jogigi opao apaa rik kato maca ame tye i Jerucalem kede i Camaria ca oko. 
Isaiah10:11 Mom abino timo Jerucalem kede jogi mere kite ame rik atimo kede Camaria kede cal jogi mere?” 
Isaiah10:12 Kare ame Rwot doŋ otyeko ticcere luŋ i wi kidi me Cion, kede i kom Jerucalem, en bino keto can i kom abaka me Acuria pi wakere mere ame oŋatte kede, kede pi wakere mere me bwono jo." 
Isaiah10:13 Pien en okobo ni, “Man otimere pi teko me ciŋa, kede pi ryekona, pien an atye kede ŋec oromo. Atyeko doŋ kobo waŋ lobo a rok apol, acoko doŋ lonyogi ame ayako oko, areto jo ame bedo i wi kom me loc calo twon gweno." 
Isaiah10:14 Ciŋa onwoŋo ocoko lonyogi yot meicel, kite a dano coko kede toŋ gweno i kor awonnere ocaco oko, acoko i lobogi luŋ kittono; naka ŋattoro gire mom otiŋo ciŋe, ŋattoro daŋ mom odwoko doge, akadi kok.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Lee wakere i kom ŋat ame atoŋŋe kede yen? Onyo ocumeno twero dworre i nyim ŋat atic kede? Lut mom twero tiŋo dano, dano en a tiŋo lut, abiro daŋ mom twero tiŋo dano malo, dano en ame tiŋo abiro malo." 
Isaiah10:16 Pi mannono, Rwot ame en Rwot me mony bino cwayo too ame jonyo jo ocwe i kom jo mere ocwe, dok bino cwinyo mac i te lonyogi, mac te naŋo oko luŋ." 
Isaiah10:17 Ceŋ a jo Icrael bino doko mac, Obaŋa a jo Icrael acil wok-ki bino doko calo leb mac; bino waŋo okuto kede ocokocok tyeko i nino acel." 
Isaiah10:18 Kwogo me buŋere kede lobo mere ame ceko cam atek, Rwot bino jwero kwo mere kede kome oko; bino bedo calo atwo ame ojony." 
Isaiah10:19 Yen ame bino doŋ i poto mere bino bedo anok meicel ame atin daŋ romo kwano. 
Isaiah10:20 I nino-nono jo Icrael odoŋŋege, kede jo me ot a Yakobo ame obwottege mom dok bino medde jeŋere i kom ŋat obedo pwodogi, ento gin bino jeŋere doŋ i kom Rwot, ame en obedo Obaŋa ame cil me Icrael, iyi ateteni." 
Isaiah10:21 Jo odoŋŋege bino dwogo cen baŋ Obaŋa Won Twer, ame gin jo a Yakobo ame odoŋŋege." 
Isaiah10:22 Pien kadi joni me Icrael bed apol a rom kede kwoyo me dog nam, jo anonokkoro keken i akina jo odoŋŋege en ame bino dwogo cen. Obaŋa doŋ omoko me jwerogi oko pien kite gire atira." 
Isaiah10:23 Pien Rwot, ame en Rwot me mony, bino jwerogi oko i lobo luŋ, kite ame en doŋ otyeko moko." 
Isaiah10:24 Mannono en omio Rwot, ame en Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Ama wun jona ame bedo i Cion, kur ilwor wunu jo Acuria ka ce gin pwodowu kede lut, kun otiŋo abirogi i komwu kite a rik jo Miciri otimo." 
Isaiah10:25 Pien odoŋ kare anonokkoro keken akemona bino gik oko, inigana te lunyo lokere i komgi, jwerogi oko." 
Isaiah10:26 Rwot me mony bino yeyeŋo lut i komgi, kite a rik ojwero kede jo Midian i ŋet kidi me Oreb; en bino ryeyo abiro mere i wi nam, te daŋ tiŋo malo kite a rik otimo kede i Miciri." 
Isaiah10:27 I nino nono yeccere bino ya oko i kori, lodi mere daŋ obino turo oko i ŋuti.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Okwor doŋ oya oko i Rimmon, otuno daŋ doŋ oko i Ayat; kun obedo i Migron, okano yecgi i Mikmac;" 
Isaiah10:29 odokoro kulo ote wot buto i Geba; Jo Rama komgi myel, jo Gibea a Caulo oriŋo oko." 
Isaiah10:30 Kuk wunu duru ba, wun jo Gallim! Ter Laical Gam wunu Anatot!" 
Isaiah10:31 Jo me Madmena tye aŋwec oko, kede jo ame bedo i Gebim pi laro kwogi," 
Isaiah10:32 Okwor onwoŋo doŋ tye i Nob i nino-nono, gin doŋ tye ayeyeŋo ciŋgi i kom kidi me Cion, ame en kidi me Jerucalem." 
Isaiah10:33 Nen ba, Rwot ame Rwot me mony, bino miyogi oreue piny bala jaŋ yen adoŋo; jo adoŋo iye luŋ obino ruto oko piny, moro mom bino doŋ ame ocuŋ malo." 
Isaiah10:34 Rwot bino toŋogi luŋ calo yen iyi buŋ, abino jwerogi oko luŋ i paŋa; akadi yen Lebaŋon, gin luŋ daŋ obino reto oko piny." 
Isaiah11:1 Atin yat anyen bino tuco kom iciki a Yece, jaŋe bino tuco i lwite." 
Isaiah11:2 Cuny a Rwot bino bedo i kome, cuny me ryeko kede me niaŋ, cuny me poro kop kede me teko cuny me ŋec kede me lworo Rwot," 
Isaiah11:3 cunye bino bedo yom i lworo Rwot. En mom bino ŋolo kop pi gin ame en oneno kede waŋe, akadi ŋolo kop pi kop ame en owinyo i yite," 
Isaiah11:4 cite en bino ŋolo kop ocan atira, dok bino ŋolo kop atira baŋ jo a mwol me lobo; en bino jwero lobo i lut me doge, jo areco en bino neko daŋ oko awura me doge." 
Isaiah11:5 Alid me tweyo pyere bino bedo kite atira, aco alid me tweyo yie bino bedo kite ame genne." 
Isaiah11:6 Epet bino nywako kabedo atin romo, kwac bino nywako kabuto kede atin dyel, roa kede eŋatu bino doŋo karacel, atin atidi en ame bino telogi." 
Isaiah11:7 Dyaŋ kede ŋuu ager meicel bino cem karacel, itinogi daŋ bino wuro karacel; obino pito eŋatu paco calo twon." 
Isaiah11:8 Atin adot bino tuko i dog ot a codocodo, atin a pwod oryemo aryema i cak, bino rwako ciŋe i ot ororo." 
Isaiah11:9 I wi kidina acil me Cion, timoro arac me nek onyo me awano mom bino nen iye, jo me lobo mere luŋ bino bedo jo ame ŋeo Rwot." 
Isaiah11:10 I nino-nono akwar Yece bino cuŋ calo bendera ame rok apol twero neno, orok luŋ bino penyo tam i baŋe, kan ame en bedo iye bino bedo me kwogo." 
Isaiah11:11 I nino-nono Rwot bino medo ryeyo ciŋe tyen me aryo me kwanyo jo mere ame odoŋ iyi Acuria, i Miciri, i Patroc, i Eciopia, i Elim, i Cinar, i Kamat kede i dog nam." 
Isaiah11:12 En bino tiŋo bendera malo pi orok, te coko jo Icrael ame oryemo; bino rayo jo Juda ame onwoŋo okeketa atata, i twok piny aŋwen luŋ," 
Isaiah11:13 Nyeko Epraim bino gik oko, jo a wuno Juda obino miyo waŋgi rwenyo oko; Epraim mom bino bedo kede nyeko i kom Juda Juda daŋ mom bino bedo wuno Epraim." 
Isaiah11:14 Gin bino mwomere i kor kidi a jo Piriciti tuŋ to, eka ote ribere karacel me yako jo i tutuŋ kide, Gin bino lweny i kom jo Edom kede Moab, aco jo Ammon bino bedo ite locgi." 
Isaiah11:15 Rwot bino miyo pii i jaŋ nam me Miciri dwono oko iweŋ, bino yeŋo ciŋe i wi kulo Eufrate, te miyo poko yi kulo i dul abiro, jo te ŋolo yie kun ginnoro mom dyako amukgi." 
Isaiah11:16 Yo gudo ame ya Acuria bino bedo tye, pi jo mere ame odoŋ, kite a rik otimere kede pi jo Icrael, i kare ame gin ya i lobo Miciri." 
Isaiah12:1 I nino-nono ibino wer wunu ni, “Abino pwoyi, ama Rwot, pien kadi bed rik yii owaŋ i koma, akemo ni doŋ okwe oko, yin ite kweyo cunya.”" 
Isaiah12:2 “Nen ba, Obaŋa gire en Alarra; abino genne, mom daŋ abino bedo kede lworo; pien Rwot Obaŋa en tekona, ame apako nyiŋe en ame doŋ odoko ŋat ame larra.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Ibino wunu twomo pii kede lelo i waŋ akoŋ me larre," 
Isaiah12:4 I nino-nono ibino wer wunu ni: “Pwo wunu Rwot, lwoŋ wunu nyiŋe; mi wunu orok ŋe ticcere, rab wunu pire, ŋe en Obaŋa ame nyiŋe malo meicel." 
Isaiah12:5 “Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot, pien otimo tim me kwogo adwoŋ meicel; mi wunu man ŋeye i wi lobo luŋ." 
Isaiah12:6 Go wunu ijira, wer wunu daŋ i yomcuny, wun jo ame bedo i Cion, pien Ŋat Acil obedo me Icrael tye i akinawu i twon twer adwoŋ meicel.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo baŋ Icaya wot Amoj i kom Babulon," 
Isaiah13:2 Tiŋ wunu bendera malo kannaler, lwoŋgi wunu kede dwonwu aloŋo; Yeŋ wunu ciŋwu me gin dony, i dogcel a jo me awora," 
Isaiah13:3 An Rwot ikoma doŋ aciko jona ame olonyere doŋ okome lweny alwoŋo doŋ jona atek i lweny, me miyo akemona cobo ticcere, jona ame awakare kun oŋatte aŋata," 
Isaiah13:4 Koŋ iwiny wunu woo ame tye i wi kiddi malo, ame calo lwak jo apipim! Koŋ iwiny wunu kite ame jo me loc kede me rok apapat tye amor kede kun ocokere karacel! Rwot me mony tye akwano monnyere pi lweny." 
Isaiah13:5 Gin oya i lobo abor meicel gin obino i agikki me te polo, Rwot karacel kede jami lwennyere, me jwero lobo luŋ oko," 
Isaiah13:6 Kok wunu, pien nino a Rwot doŋ ceggi acega; abino acalo to-piny oya i baŋ Won Twer Ducu!" 
Isaiah13:7 Mannono bino miyo ciŋ jo doko goro, koyo bino onyere i cuny dano acel acel, dok obino bedo ame cunygi oŋabere aŋaba." 
Isaiah13:8 Twon rem adwoŋ me lworo kede kumo bino makogi; gin bino minne i rem calo dako amerem me nywal ogoo. Ŋat acel acel bino neno awottere kun kome amyel; waŋgi bino obere calo mac. 
Isaiah13:9 Neno wunu ba, nino a Rwot tye abino. En ger, dok akemo kede twon iniga moro ager omako, me miyo lobo doŋ nono kede jwero wegi bal luŋ iye." 
Isaiah13:10 Pien acer me polo kede dulgi mom bino ryeny; ceŋ bino doko acol ame pwod odonyo adonya, dwe daŋ mom bino ryeny." 
Isaiah13:11 Abino keto can i wi podo pi timere arac, kede i kom jo areco pi balgi; abino giko awaka a jo ame lyerre oko, abino miyo wegi abwone a mom okica kwe oko." 
Isaiah13:12 Abino miyo co dokome wel meicel akato jabu ame olio acil oko, jo daŋ bino bedo me wel meicel akato jabu me Opir oko." 
Isaiah13:13 Pi mannono, abino miyo polo yeŋere, lobo daŋ bino yeŋere i kabedo mere, pi akemo a Rwot me mony, i nino me iniga mere ager meicel." 
Isaiah13:14 Dok bino bedo acalo aderi ame aryemo, onyo rommi ame ŋat acoko pe; ŋat acel acel bino dok baŋ jo mere, dok ŋat acel acel bino riŋo i lobo me turgi." 
Isaiah13:15 Ŋat ame obino nwoŋo, obino cobo pel, ŋat ame obino mako, bino to i pala romo." 
Isaiah13:16 Itinogi obino cacanyo piny te niŋida atitino kun oneno, obino yako udigi, ote daŋ buto i mongi tetek." 
Isaiah13:17 Nen ba, an doŋ atugo jo Magi me bino i komgi, rok a mom paro pi ryal jabu daŋ mom olelo gigi iye." 
Isaiah13:18 Aterogi bino neko awobe; kica mom bino makogi i kom atinnoro; itino gire mom bino conogi," 
Isaiah13:19 Aco Babulon ame kwogo mere dwoŋ kato me obakki ocele luŋ boma aber ame jo Kaldaya wakere iye wok-ki, bino bedo acalo Codoma kede Gomora i kare ame rik Obaŋa oreto oko." 
Isaiah13:20 Jo mom dok bino bedo iye, dano moro me Arab mom bino guro kema kuno, okwattoro daŋ mom bino miyo rommigi wuro kuno." 
Isaiah13:21 Ento leyi me tim bino buto kuno ekwe a kok bino poŋ i udigi; udu bino bedo kunu, kun jogi me tim daŋ myelo kunu." 
Isaiah13:22 Odyekodyek bino kok i udigi ocuŋ iguŋ malo, ekwe daŋ bino kok i udigi abeco me loc; Babulon mom bino ri, kare mere doŋ ceggi acega." 
Isaiah14:1 Rwot bino timo Yakobo kica, bino medo yero Icrael, te dwokogi i lobogi ikome, rok ocele bino notte kedgi, ote moko doŋ i kom ot a Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Rok apol bino lwoko Icrael tero i kabedogi, eka Icrael te lokogi doko opiigi kede aŋecagi i lobo a Rwot; jo ame rik makogi, gin obino mako doko opiigi ote loyo jo ame rik wunogi." 
Isaiah14:3 Kare ame Rwot bino miyogi weo i kom canwu kede i kom myel cunywu kede tic apek ame ibedo tiyo wunu," 
Isaiah14:4 ibino cako nywaro wunu abaka me Babulon kede wer man ni, “Koŋ inen kite ame awun jo doŋ okwe kede, kite ame kolo a won apala doŋ okwe kede inoŋ!" 
Isaiah14:5 Rwot doŋ oturo abiro a jo areco oko, karacel kede abiro oloc," 
Isaiah14:6 jo ame obedo pwodo orok kun otye i twon akemo, kun mom juko ciŋgi i komgi; jo ame obedo loyo rok kede iniga, kun mom weko yelogi." 
Isaiah14:7 Lobo luŋ doŋ okwe mot, oliŋ doŋ oko, jo iye doŋ mwoco ka wer keken." 
Isaiah14:8 Yen cipre cunygi lelo piri aco yen cedar me Lebanon kobo ni, ‘Cakere i kare ame odwoki kede piny, ŋattoro gire mom obino me toŋowa.’" 
Isaiah14:9 Aco lyel i piny kuca daŋ otugere oko, me rwatte kedi ka ibino, tye acoyo tipo ajo oto me bino joli, jo luŋ a yam obedo otel i wi lobo; obakki luŋ a yam oloo rok apapat omiogi luŋ oya oko i kom me locgi." 
Isaiah14:10 Jo luŋ bino kobo, kun okobbi ni, ‘Yin daŋ idoko agoro calo wan! yin daŋ idoko calo wan!’" 
Isaiah14:11 Kwogo daŋ doŋ okelo oko piny lyel, karacel kede dwon naŋani; dedek doŋ odoko i tanda me butoni, eka kudi te bedo gi-wumereni." 
Isaiah14:12 “Kite ame imukere kede i polo ite rette piny, yin Maralle, wot a Ru-piny! Kite ame otoni kede piny, yin ame irereto rok apapat!" 
Isaiah14:13 Yin ikobo i cunyi ni, ‘An abino yito malo i polo; abino cibo kom me locca malo i wi acer Obaŋa; abino bedo i wi kidi me cokere teŋe tutuŋ anyarodi;" 
Isaiah14:14 abino yito malo meicel, i wi pol malo, abino kette kena me bedo acalo Ŋat Amalo Meicel.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Ento yin doŋ okeli oko piny i lyel, i te bur kan ame tut meicel." 
Isaiah14:16 Jo ame neni bino ciko waŋgi i komi kun otamo kop i komi ni, ‘Man mom en ŋat ame rik omyelo kom lobo meicel, ame daŋ omio loc apol oyeŋere," 
Isaiah14:17 ame rik omio lobo odoko acalo tim otal, ame obedo tuturo boma iye oko ame mom rik ye ni obuccere we?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Obakki a rok apapat buta gigi piny i kwogo, kun ŋat acel acel buto i lyel ame oyike iye;" 
Isaiah14:19 aco yin doŋ oboli oko teŋe, ame bor abora i lyelli, calo atin abwogi ame jo okwero, ame owumo kome i jo oneko, jo ame ococobo i pala romo, jo ame donyo piny i gweŋ ame tye i te bur atut piny acalo kom dano oto ame onyono piny." 
Isaiah14:20 Yin mom ibino notte kedgi i ka yik, pien yin doŋ ibalo loboni oko, yin ineko joni oko. “Ikwae otim tim areco myero kono kur dok ocako nyiŋgi!" 
Isaiah14:21 Yik wunu ka neko itino mere pi roc a kwaroggi me kur oya ote dok leyo lobo, ote miyo boma dok radde atata i wi lobo.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Man kop a Rwot me mony: “Abino ya me lweny i kom jo Babulon, abino miyo nyiŋ jo rwenyo oko i Babulon, jo moro mom bino doŋ iye, akadi itino atino, onyo ikwae." 
Isaiah14:23 Abino miyo ecoc leo lobogi, dok daŋ atapara bino durre iye adura, abino weyo acil calo dako oweo ode acil kun ginnoro mom oweko iye.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Rwot me mony doŋ okwoŋo ni, “Kite ame doŋ atyeko yiko kede con, bino daŋ timere gire kittono, kite ame rik atimo kede bino daŋ doŋ timere kittono." 
Isaiah14:25 Abino gire turo jo Acuria i lobona obedo kidikidi oko, abino nyonogi piny i wi kidina; kol obino gonyo oko i kom jona yec daŋ obino kwanyo oko i wi gwokgi." 
Isaiah14:26 Man en gin ame ayiko ame mako wi lobo luŋ; dok man en ciŋa ame doŋ aryeo oko i wi rok luŋ.” 
Isaiah14:27 Pien Rwot me mony doŋ oyiko yikkere oko, ŋa kara ame dok bino loko? Ciŋe daŋ doŋ oryeye oko, ŋa kara ame dok bino dolo?" 
Isaiah14:28 Kop man rik Obaŋa okobo i mwaka ame abaka Akaj oto iye, kun kobo ni," 
Isaiah14:29 “Wun jo me Piriciti luŋ, kur ilel wunu ni pien lut ame rik obedo pwodowu doŋ otur oko, pien ororo bino ya i kom ikwae a twol, aco toŋe bino doko twol a twarre." 
Isaiah14:30 Rwot bino kwayo jo ocan i akina jo mere calo rommi en bino miyogi buto piny i kuc; aco yin abino neko ikwai oko i kec, joni ame odoŋere daŋ abino neko oko," 
Isaiah14:31 Kuk ba duru, yin dog boma, kok ba yin boma; wun jo Piriciti luŋ, mi wunu lworo cak onyo koyo i komwu ba! Pien okwor abino i tutuŋ anyarodi, mom tye moro i akinagi ame opokere kene," 
Isaiah14:32 Kara ibino kobo wunu ŋo ba, baŋ okwena a rokkono?” Ibino kobo wunu ni, “Rwot omio Cion ocuŋ atek, jo mere ame owuno oriŋo olarre iye.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo i kom Moab: Moab doŋ ogik oko; pien ojwero Ar i dyewor acel keken. Moab doŋ ogik oko; pien Kir daŋ ojwero dyewor acel keken. 
Isaiah15:2 Jo me Dibon doŋ owoto malo i ka woro jogigi me wot koko kuno; jo Moab akoko Nebo kede Medeba. Wi jo luŋ doŋ olyelo gire oko, yer tik daŋ olyelo oko luŋ." 
Isaiah15:3 Jo luŋ tweo pyergi i boŋo cola dye yo, kede i wi udigi kede i dye bomagi jo luŋ kok ame pig waŋgi ony i korgi." 
Isaiah15:4 Jo Kecbon karacel kede jo Eleale daŋ akoko, dwongi winyere kom kannabor i Yakaj twal; mannono omio olweny me Moab odoko alwor oko; cunygi doŋ myel amyela." 
Isaiah15:5 Cunya ton meicel pi Moab; oriŋ lweny iye doŋ riŋo i Joar naka i Eglat-celicia. Pien gin oyito tur me Lukit kun okobo i pig waŋgi; i yo ame woto tutuŋ Koronaim, gin okok pi kite a lobo otye ka jwero kede oko." 
Isaiah15:6 Luŋ i kulo me Nimrim pii doŋ odwono oko iye; lum doŋ oner oko, mom daŋ dok olot; ginnoro ame atu daŋ mom tye." 
Isaiah15:7 Mannono omio ginnoro luŋ ame yam gin onwoŋo karacel kede en ame yam okano gin luŋ otero oko loka kulo me Arabim. 
Isaiah15:8 Pien koko dwoŋ meicel, tye doŋ omano lobo me Moab luŋ; koko a jo doŋ otuno naka i Eglaim twal, koko otuno daŋ anaka i Beer-elim." 
Isaiah15:9 Pien pii me Dibon remo doŋ Opoŋ oko iye; kadi amannono pwod dok abino medo can ocele i kom Dibon, abino kelo daŋ eŋatu i kom jo ame obwot, kede i kom jo ame odoŋ i lobo me Moab." 
Isaiah16:1 Gin ocwao itino rommi baŋ oloc me lobo-nono, kun ocwao iya i Cela, obeo kede i yo me tim, otero i wi kidi me Cion." 
Isaiah16:2 Acalo winy ame teteno bwomgi, kede itino winy ame okeketo atata, anyira me Moab daŋ tye kittono kan ame oŋolo iye kulo me Arnon." 
Isaiah16:3 “Mi wunu tamwu iye, ŋol wunu kop kakare; mi tipowu bed acalo dyewor i cuny dyeceŋ; kan a jo ame oryemo opono iye, kur idot wunu ŋat ame oriŋo." 
Isaiah16:4 Wek wunu jo ame oryemo me Moab bed i akinawu; wun myero ibed wunu ka-larregi, i ciŋ jo ame otimogi lit. Kare ame jo a wunogi doŋ pe, ame kop me yak doŋ ogik oko, kede ŋat ame nyonogi piny doŋ orwenyo oko i lobo," 
Isaiah16:5 obino doŋ cibo kom me loc, kun ocibo i mar a mom lokere, ŋat a genne en ame bino bedo i wie i kema a Daudi ŋat a ŋolo kop dok amito ŋolo kop kakare, ŋat a kome mit i timo gin atye atira.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Wan owinyo pi awaka a Moab kite ame onwoŋo rik en wakere kede; wakere mere, lyere mere kede apala mere, wakere mere-nono luŋ gire goba keken." 
Isaiah16:7 Pi mannono, Moab myero koki, jo luŋ myero kok gire pi Moab. Gin myero kok atek pi anina olok otwo me Kir-karecet, ame doŋ tye i twon cannoro adwoŋ meicel." 
Isaiah16:8 Pien potti luŋ me Kecbon doŋ oballe oko, kede olok me Cibna; olok a yam koŋo mere mero rwode me rok apapat doŋ orette luŋ piny. Jaŋe ame yam tuno naka i Jajer, ame yam olak naka i tim twal; ame jaŋe atoco mere yam ojany atek, te kato naka atot i nam." 
Isaiah16:9 Mannono omio abino kok pi olok me Cibna, kite ame akok kede pi Jajer. Pig waŋa bino ony i komi yin Kecbon kede yin Eleale; pien woo me lweny owinyere i kom olokwu a yam ipwono wunu." 
Isaiah16:10 Lelo kede yomcuny doŋ okwanyo oko, i potti ame yam nyako olok meicel; wer daŋ mom dok owero i potti olok, woo moro daŋ dok mom dok winyere iye; nyono olok i bur biyo olok doŋ ogik oko, woo me pwono olok doŋ ogik oko." 
Isaiah16:11 Mannono omio cunya tugere koko pi Moab calo naŋa akok, cunya tugere daŋ pi Kir-kerec." 
Isaiah16:12 Dok ka Moab obedo ol nono me bedo wot i kabedo me woro jogi ame tye i wi kiddi malo, kun woto ka kwayo Obaŋa mere i kabedo mere acil, en mom bino twero kadi acel." 
Isaiah16:13 Man en kop ame Rwot rik okobo con i kom Moab. 
Isaiah16:14 Ento aman Rwot okobo ni, “Odoŋ doŋ mwaka adek, acalo mwaka apakaca, kwogo a Moab bino doŋ doko gi-acaa, akadi kono bed en tye kede lwak jo apipim; jo ame bino doŋ bino bedo anok meicel kun daŋ gin jo agoro keken.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Man en kop ame Obaŋa kokobo i kom Damaciko. Nen ba, Damaciko mom dok bino medde bedo boma, bino doŋ doko wi obur." 
Isaiah17:2 Boma mere doŋ bino doko tim atwal, bino doko me bedo a lim akwo, ame bino wuro kuno aboŋo ŋattoro ame miogi lworo." 
Isaiah17:3 Cel atek bino rwenyo gire oko Epraim, loc daŋ bino rwenyo oko i Damaciko; aco jo odoŋ me Curia bino bedo acalo kwogo ikwae Icrael. Man kop a Rwot me mony ikokome." 
Isaiah17:4 I nino-nono obino jwiko kwogo a Yakobo oko, moo i kome daŋ bino loo oko." 
Isaiah17:5 Bino bedo kite ame akaa kac depo kede kal ame pwod tye i poto, kun kao wit kal coko i ciŋe dok kite ame depo kede wit kal ame odoŋ i luŋ me Repaim." 
Isaiah17:6 Dok bino bedo kite ame dano depo kede nyig Jeituni, ame ginnoro anonok kom en ame doŋ iye, kun odoŋ ka aryo onyo adekkoro keken i midi mere malo, anwen onyo abiccoro keken en ate doŋ i ajaŋ yat ame nyak, man kop a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael ikokome." 
Isaiah17:7 I nino-nono jo bino ciko wangi i kom Acwecgi, wangi bino cun i kom ŋat Acil ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael;" 
Isaiah17:8 mom dok obino ciko waŋgi i kom keno me woro jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera ame gin otio kede ciŋgi, mom obino neno gin ame gin i komgi otio, kadi yen ame opito ka oworo jok Acera onyo keno me waŋo odok akur." 
Isaiah17:9 I nino-nono bomagi atek bino bedo calo wi obur a jo Kivi kede me a jo Amor, ame yam gin obin oya iye oko pi jo Icrael; kuno doŋ bino doŋ nono." 
Isaiah17:10 Pien wiwu doŋ owil oko i kom Obaŋa ame olarowu, dok daŋ mom ipo wunu i kom Kidi ame en kan ame iriŋo ilaro wunu; mannono omio kadi bed ipit gigi mogo a yomoro cuny, dok ipit wunu daŋ yennogo ame obedo me obaŋe mogo a wele," 
Isaiah17:11 kadi bed imigi wunu tu i nino ame opitogi iye, dok ite miyogi wunu turo oko odiko ame opitogi iye, cite mom ibino kayo wunu ginnoro i nino me can kede rem a mom gik." 
Isaiah17:12 Koŋ inen ba, kite ame rok apol woo kede acalo kot amor omwoc i woo kite ame nam mor kede." 
Isaiah17:13 Rok mor kite ame twon pii adwoŋ meicel mor kede cite en bino jukogi, gin te riŋo kannabor, obino ryemogi calo cuŋ kal ame yamo kolo i wi kidi malo, dok acalo apua ame awirre i nyim kot a bukoro." 
Isaiah17:14 Nen ba, twon lworo adwoŋ bino mako jo otyeno, ame piny mom ru oru, nwoŋo gin doŋ pe! Man en dul a jo ame yakowa, kede gin ame opokki jo ame maojamiwa." 
Isaiah18:1 Yin lobo ame tye loka kulo Eciopia, yin lobo ame kudi iyi ŋur calo yamo ajuru; ame ioro okwena me cumji i lobo ocele beo i kulo Nail, kun owoto i yee ame otio kede aladu ame kwan i wi pii!" 
Isaiah18:2 Dok wunu cen, wun okwena ame dwir, baŋ rok odoŋo aboco dok ame komgi pwot, baŋ rok olworo i kabedo luŋ, rok atek, ame gin oloc i lweny, ame kulli opoko lobogi i dyere." 
Isaiah18:3 Wun jo luŋ ame ibedo wunu i wi podo, wun jo ame bedo i lobo, ka ce otiŋo bendera malo i wi kidi, myero inen wunu! Ka ce okuto apel, myero iwiny wunu!" 
Isaiah18:4 Pien Rwot okobba ni, “Abino neno gira liliŋ i kabedona, bala lyeto me ceŋ ame ryeny dyeceŋ, bala pol ame kelo toyo i kare me kac.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Pien ame kare me pwono olok mom ru oromo, kun turre doŋ ocako ony oko, kun turre doŋ odoko nyig olok ame ocako doŋ cek oko." 
Isaiah18:6 Kom jo oneko luŋ obino weko oko ata, baŋ acut ame tye i wi kidi malo, kede baŋ leyi me tim. Acut bino camogi oko i dye oro, leyi me tim bino camogi oko i kare me koyo. Acut bino camogi oko i dye oro, leyi me tim bino camo komgi oko i kare me koyo." 
Isaiah18:7 I kare-nono rok ame odoŋo aboco dok ame komgi pwot, bino kelo mot baŋ Rwot me mony. Gin rok ame olworo i kabedo luŋ, rok atek, ame gin oloc i lweny, rok ame kulli opoko lobogi i dyere. Gin bino kelo motginono i wi kidi me Cion, kan ame oworo iye Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah19:1 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo i kom Miciri. Nen ba, Rwot tye awot i pol ame dwir meicel, kun bino i Miciri; cal jogi me Miciri komgi bino myel i nyime, cuny jo Miciri bino bedo myel amyela." 
Isaiah19:2 Abino tugo jo me Miciri i kom jo me Miciri wadgi, ŋat acel acel bino lweny ominnere, ŋat acel acel bino lweny awottere, boma bino lweny i boma ocele loc bino lweny i loc ocele." 
Isaiah19:3 Cuny jo Miciri bino two imek, abino turo tamgi ame gin omoko oko, gin bino wot penyo tam i baŋ cal apaa kede emuroko, i baŋ okor tipo kede ojogi." 
Isaiah19:4 Dok abino miyo jo Miciri i ciŋ rwot ame loccere gwa, abaka ame ger atek en ame bino loyogi. Man kop a Rwot me mony ikokome." 
Isaiah19:5 Dok pii me kulo Nail bino dwono oko, cuny kulo bino cwiny, te two oko;" 
Isaiah19:6 yo pii akunya bino doko aŋwe, jaŋ kulo Nail me Miciri bino doko anok te daŋ two oko, ogada kede aladu luŋ bino top oko." 
Isaiah19:7 Lobo ame tye i ŋet Nail luŋ bino taloko, i dog Nail ikokome; ginnoro luŋ ame ocoo i ŋet Nail bino two oko, bino rwenyo oko kun mom dok nen." 
Isaiah19:8 Ocik rec bino kumo ote daŋ kok, jo luŋ ame ciko rec i golo i kulo Nail; jo luŋ ame ciko bwogi i pii, gin luŋ obino nyobere oko." 
Isaiah19:9 Ocwer tol kede ocwe boŋo atar cunygi bino ya oko i ticgi. 
Isaiah19:10 Jo ame gin obedo twoni jo adoŋo i lobo, jonnono obino nyono oko piny, jo luŋ ame camo ocara, cunygi bino balle oko." 
Isaiah19:11 Oloc me Joan miŋ meicel; oryeko ame mio tam baŋ Parao, gin luŋ obino miyo tam me miŋo keken, Kara itwero kobo baŋ Parao iŋo, ni, “Kwarina luŋ obedo jo aryek, kwarina luŋ yam obedo obakki?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Kara doŋ joni aryekkono tye kwene? Koŋ doŋ imigi okobbi dok daŋ omi iŋe, gin ame Rwot me mony oyiko me timo i kom Miciri." 
Isaiah19:13 Oloc me Joan doŋ odoko jo amiŋ oko, oloc me Mempic doŋ obwolo oko; jo ame obedo otel iyi atekere mere ducu, gin omio jo Miciri orwenyo oko." 
Isaiah19:14 Rwot doŋ omiogi otye i cuny me adwale i cunygi: omio jo Miciri doŋ tagere i ginnoro luŋ ame otio, kite ame amer koŋo tagere kede i ka nokere." 
Isaiah19:15 Dano moro mom bino doŋ i Miciri mom tye ginnoro ame dano moro bino tiyo, kadi atel onyo dano moro ata, kadi ŋat abor calo jaŋ otit onyo acalo ogada." 
Isaiah19:16 I kare-nono jo Miciri bino bedo calo mon, kun komgi myel amyela pi ciŋ Rwot me mony ame en bino yeŋo i komgi." 
Isaiah19:17 Lobo me Juda bino miyo jo Miciri lworo; jo luŋ ame bino winyo nyiŋe bino bedo kede lworo pi kop ame Rwot me mony doŋ otyeko yikome timo i komgi. 
Isaiah19:18 I kare-nono boma abic bino bedo i lobo Miciri ame jo iye kobo leb jo Kanaan, dok daŋ okwoŋo kwoŋ i nyiŋ Rwot me mony. Boma acel i akinagi obino lwoŋo ni boma me Ceŋ." 
Isaiah19:19 I kare-nono keno lam a Rwot bino bedo i dye lobo me Miciri kede kidi ocibo ocuŋ atira me poyo Rwot, bino bedo i waŋ lobo mere." 
Isaiah19:20 Gin bino bedo acalo anen ame nyuto ni Rwot me mony tye i Miciri. Ka ce jo i kuno bino kok baŋ Rwot pi jo ame wunogi, en bino cwayigi ŋat ame bino larogi, ŋat ame bino laro pirgi te larogi." 
Isaiah19:21 Rwot bino nyutte kene baŋ jo Miciri. Jo Miciri bino ŋeyo Rwot i kare-nono, gin bino wore kun oyale kede mot aŋola kede mot awaŋa, dok daŋ obino kwoŋo kwoŋgi i nyiŋ Rwot ote daŋ cobo." 
Isaiah19:22 Rwot bino goyo lobo Miciri kun goo dok daŋ caŋo. Gin bino dwogo baŋ Rwot, Rwot bino winyo kwacgi dok daŋ bino caŋogi." 
Isaiah19:23 I kare-nono yo gudo bino ya i Miciri woto Acuria. Jo Acuria bino wot i Miciri, jo Miciri bino wot i Acuria, jo Miciri karacel kede jo Acuria, gin luŋ obino woro Obaŋa karacel." 
Isaiah19:24 I kare-nono jo Icrael bino bedo gin adek karacel, obino bedo i jo Miciri kede jo Acuria, gin bino miyo wi podo luŋ bedo kede winyo." 
Isaiah19:25 Jo ame Rwot me mony bino miyo gum, kun kobo ni, “Gum obed i kom jona me Miciri, kede i kom Acuria, ame gin obedo tic me ciŋa, kede i kom Icrael ame gin doŋ odoko jona an ikoma.”" 
Isaiah20:1 I mwaka ame atel wi mony adwoŋŋere ame Cargon abaka me Acuria ocwao obino i Acidod, te lweny i kome, mayo oko," 
Isaiah20:2 i kare-nono Rwot onwoŋo rik omio Icaya wot Amoj okobo koppere kun kobo ni, “Wot igony boŋo kwero cola oko i pyeri ite gonyo daŋ amuk oko i tyeni.” En daŋ te wot timo kittono, te daŋ wot onoro kun tyene daŋ nono." 
Isaiah20:3 Rwot te kobo ni, “Kite acalo Icaya amirona owoto onoro, kun tyene daŋ nono, pi mwakki adek twal, me nyuto gin ame bino timere i kom jo Miciri kede Eciopia," 
Isaiah20:4 abaka me Acuria bino daŋ timo kittono, en bino tero jo me Miciri oko iyi opii, kede jo me Eciopia daŋ, bino tero itino kede jo adoŋo, kun gin owoto onoro, ame tyengi daŋ nono, kwon nunygi daŋ tye nono, ame mannono bino kelo lewic i Miciri." 
Isaiah20:5 Mannono bino poyo komgi, lewic te makogi pi Eciopia ame yam gin ogeno, kede Miciri ame yam gin owakere pire." 
Isaiah20:6 I nino-nono jo ame bedo i dog nam bino kobo ni, ‘Koŋ inen wunu doŋ gin ame otimere i kom jo ame yam ogeno, ame yam wan oriŋo olaro baŋgi me konyowa, larowa i ciŋ abaka me Acuria. Kara wan doŋ obino bwot iŋo ba?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Man kop ame Obaŋa okobo i kom Babulon, ame en lobo a tye i dog nam. Kite ame yam ajuru mwomere kede i Negeb, tye cannoro ame bino kittono i tuŋ tim, kun oya i lobo ame iyiliyili meicel." 
Isaiah21:2 Obaŋa onyuta anyuttoro apek meicel, abwol jo gire bwolo jo abwola, abal lobo jwero jo i lobo oko. “Yin Elim wot ilweny malo, yin Media, gur ba doŋ boma oko! Abino giko kit cannoro luŋ ame Babulon okelo, abino miyo gik gire oko.”" 
Isaiah21:3 Paro gire omio rem ociro gira pyera oko; omio rem kom ocoba oko, acalo dako amerem nywal ogoo; odia doŋ piny ame mom aromo winyo ginnoro; apoyo koma doŋ apoa, ame mom doŋ aromo neno ginnoro." 
Isaiah21:4 Tam oloa gira doŋ oko, twon lworo moro adwoŋ meicel obalo gira wia oko; ame abedo paro pi piny acol me ka ŋa abeo-nu, ame dok olunyo kela ka myelkom." 
Isaiah21:5 Gin doŋ oyiko gire meja oko, opeto okeka daŋ doŋ oko, otye doŋ ocem kun daŋ omatte. Ya wunu malo ba, wun oloc, we wunu ba kom kwot kede moo." 
Isaiah21:6 Pien Rwot okobba ni, “Wot ikel wunu akurpiny, myero en titi gin ame eneno." 
Isaiah21:7 Ka en bino neno wegi aguragura ame riŋo aryo aryo, jo ame tye i wi kana kede jo ame tye i wi inaga myero en cik yite atek, dok enengi aber meicel.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Ŋat oneno te redo ni, “Ama Rwot, an acuŋ i wi pem malo dyeceŋ ducu, acuŋ gira i kakara dyewor benebene," 
Isaiah21:9 Nen wegi aguragura tye ariŋo aryo aryo.” Ote gamo doge ni, “Babulon orette oko, orette gire oko; cal jogi mere luŋ ame opao, oŋininyo gire oko piny.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Aco wun jona, ame odinowu ote pyetowu calo kal, gin ame awinyo i baŋ Rwot me mony, ame en Obaŋa me Icrael, en ame atittiwu." 
Isaiah21:11 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo ame otiko Duma: Ŋattoro tye alwoŋa i Ceir, kun penya ni, “Akurpiny, dyewor obedo iŋo? Akurpiny, dyewor obedo iŋo?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Akurpiny te gamo ni, “Piny doŋ oru oko, dyewor dok bino dwogo. Ka ce imito penya pire, itwero dok dwogo penya; itwero gire dwogo tyen me aryo.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo ame otiko lobo a jo Arab: Wun jo Dedan ame iciro iwoto wunu-ni, ibino buto wunu i dye okuto otwo atwoa ame tye i lobo a jo Arab." 
Isaiah21:14 Kel wunu pii baŋ jo ame oryo pii ociro, kel wunu cam baŋ oriŋ-ayela, wun jo me bedo i lobo me Tema." 
Isaiah21:15 Pien gin oriŋo pala me romo, pala ame doŋ owoto oko iyi akure, kede akud atero ame doŋ otelo oko, kede peko ame lweny kelo." 
Isaiah21:16 Pien man en kop ame Rwot okobba, ni, “Odoŋ doŋ mwaka acel keken, acalo mwaka me pakaca, kwogo me Kedar luŋ bino doko gi-acaa;" 
Isaiah21:17 dok jo atek me Kedar ame bino doŋ i akina jo ame celo atero, welgi bino bedo anok; pien Rwot ame en Obaŋa a jo Icrael doŋ okobo.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Man en kop ame orabo ame otiko luŋŋoro ame Obaŋa onyuto iye anyuttogo baŋ Icaya. Ŋo kara ame dok otimere, ame omio wun luŋ itye wunu malo i wi udiwu?" 
Isaiah22:2 Piŋo jo i boma luŋ tye aredo kede woo caa ducu, kun iŋatte wunu i yomcuny? Jo meri ame oto i lweny man, mom oneko i pala lweny, mom daŋ onekogi i lweny gire." 
Isaiah22:3 Rwodeni luŋ daŋ onwoŋo oŋweco gigi oko, omakogi ame gin mom ru olwenyo, Obin omako jo luŋ ame onwoŋo, akadi bed mogo rik onwoŋo oŋweco kun abor meicel." 
Isaiah22:4 Mannono omio an akobo ni, “Lok waŋwu teŋe, kur inena wunu, weka wunu akok atek pi cwer cuny ame atye kede, ŋattoro kur lolle me kweyo cunya, pien jona oto apol meicel.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Pien Rwot Obaŋa me mony tye kede nino mere, ame obedo nino me woo, nino me nyono jo piny, kede nino me babaŋo jo luŋ i luŋ ame rik en onyuto iye anyuttogo. Ame en nino me mumuko cel me boma oko dok jo bino redo iye atata i akina kiddi." 
Isaiah22:6 Mony ame oya Elam oryoŋo icao aterogi doŋ aryoŋa, aco mony oya Aram otweo aguraguragi i kom gadigadigi kun mony ame oya Kir tye ame doŋ otere oko i kwotgi." 
Isaiah22:7 Luŋwu abeco luŋ, gadigadi me romo doŋ oradde iye atata aco wegi aguragura tye ocuŋ oko i dog cel me boma," 
Isaiah22:8 Gin a yam Juda geŋere kede doŋ otyeko yabo oko. I kare-naca rik ineno wunu ot me Buŋ," 
Isaiah22:9 ineno wunu kite ame apama me paco a Daudi omumuka kede, inwoŋo wunu daŋ yore me coko pii atapara ame tye piny." 
Isaiah22:10 Ikwano wunu udi luŋ i Jerucalem, irereto wunu udi mogo piny me inwoŋ wunu gweŋe me gero cel atek," 
Isaiah22:11 ikunyo wunu daŋ atapara pii i akina cel aryo me jolo pii me atapara acon. Cite rik mom koŋ itamo wunu pi Obaŋa ame oyiko man con, dok ame omio otimere kittono." 
Isaiah22:12 I nino-naca Rwot Obaŋa me mony onwoŋo alwoŋowu me bino koko kede kumo, me bino lyelo yer wiwu kede rukoboŋo cola." 
Isaiah22:13 Aco koŋ inen kite ame inyero wunu kede i yomcuny, rommi kede dok omato pala mom twerre, nen riŋo kede koŋo mom rwenyo i dogwu. Itye ka kobo wunu ni, “Wek omatte wunu giwa, ocam wunu daŋ cem, pien diki oto giwa oko.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Rwot me mony onyutte kene baŋa kun kobba ni, “Areteni, mom gire obino timogi kica pi bal man, tuno waŋ ame gin oto i balginono.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa me mony en okobo." 
Isaiah22:15 Rwot Obaŋa me mony okobo ni, “Biye iwot baŋ Cebna, akan-jami, ame en a loo jami me ot abaka, iwot ipenye ni," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Tic aŋo ame yin itiyo kan? Dok ŋa ame tye baŋi kan, ame omio yin igolo lyeli piri keni-ni? Piŋo kara iboro lyelli keni i wi kiddi malo?" 
Isaiah22:17 Nen ba, Rwot bino boli oko teŋe kede tek, kadi bed yin ibedo twon lo atek rom kwene. En bino maki atek odoco." 
Isaiah22:18 En bino doli okuŋ calo odilo te boli teŋe i twon lobo moro alac meicel, ite daŋ to kuno. Ibino to kuno, iŋet gadigadini ame ijany kede woki. Yin ame kelo lewic i ot adwoŋŋi." 
Isaiah22:19 Abino kwanyi oko i ticci, ate dwoki cen irwom a piny.’ ”" 
Isaiah22:20 I nino-nono ka man bino timere, abino lwoŋo amirona Eliakim wot a Kilikia;" 
Isaiah22:21 abino miyo en rukoboŋŋini me tic kede delli me tweyo pyer kede itambara me tweyo wic, abino dwoko twerri luŋ i ciŋe. En bino bedo acalo apap baŋ jo me Jerucalem kede jo me Juda." 
Isaiah22:22 Abino miyo twer luŋ me ot a Daudi i wie. Abino miye agony me cego doggola ame en ka ocego ŋattoro mom dok twero yabo, dok ka oyabo ŋattoro mom dok twero cego." 
Isaiah22:23 Abino miyo en bedo atek acalo teke ame oguro ocuŋ atek, jo me ot a pappere luŋ bino nwoŋo kwogo pire." 
Isaiah22:24 Jo me ot a pappere kede watti mere luŋ bino bedo twon yeccoro apek meicel i wie, Gin luŋ obino ŋabere i kome calo kopo kede cupa ame oŋabo malo," 
Isaiah22:25 Ka man bino timere i ninonaca, teke ame yam onwoŋo oguro atek bino doko alogologo te rette oko piny. Mannono bino bedo agikki a ginnoro luŋ ame yam oŋabere i kome, Man en kop ame Rwot doŋ otyeko kobo." 
Isaiah23:1 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo ame otiko Turo. Kok wunu ba, wun mel me Tarcic, pien Turo doŋ odoŋ oko nono, aboŋo ottoro onyo waŋ kwaŋŋoro, Onyuttigi koppere i yo dwogogi i Kupro." 
Isaiah23:2 Cuŋ wunu ba mot, wun jo ame bedo i dog nam, wun ocatwil me Cidon. Okwena rik oŋolo nam, gin te bedo i wii pii adoŋodoŋo." 
Isaiah23:3 Lim ame gin rik onwoŋo obedo kal me Cikor, ame gin owilo i dog kulo Nail. Rik yin ibedo acatwil ame cato wil i rok apol." 
Isaiah23:4 Lewic myero maki, yin Cidon, pien nam okobo, ka bwot atek me dog nam daŋ okobo ni, “Rem me nywal mom gire ocana, mom daŋ anywal, mom daŋ apito atinnoro naka odoŋo, atin awobi onyo en anyako.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Kare ame kop man bino winyere i Miciri, cuny jo bino cwer atek meicel me winyo kop i kom Turo," 
Isaiah23:6 Wot ikat wunu naka i Tarcic, wot ikok wunu, wun jo ame bedo i dog nam!" 
Isaiah23:7 Man en boma ame yam malo meicel, en boma ame rik ocakere con meicel, en boma ame yam ocwao okwena oŋolo nam, me wot bedo i lobo mogo ocele." 
Isaiah23:8 Ŋa ame oyiko man i kom Turo, boma ame poko tok kwogo me loc, ame ocat willere rik obedo oloc, ame rik obedo jo a pirgi dito meicel i lobo?" 
Isaiah23:9 Rwot me mony en onwoŋo oyiko, me miyo wakeregi gik oko, me miyo jo ame oketo kwogo i komgi i lobo doko jo amwol." 
Isaiah23:10 Wot ipur wunu lobo, wun jo ame bedo i Tarcic, pien waŋkwaŋ me Turo mom doŋ tye," 
Isaiah23:11 Rwot doŋ oryeo ciŋe oko i wi nam, en doŋ oyeyeŋo kit loc apapat oko, Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo cik oko i kom Kanaan, ni myero tur ka bwottere atek oko," 
Isaiah23:12 En okobo ni, “Lelowu doŋ ogik oko, wun jo me Cidon, aman doŋ odiowu odoco, ame kadi ikat wunu i Kupro, kuno daŋ mom ibino nwoŋo wunu ka weo.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Koŋ inen wunu lobo ajo Kaldaya! Pe gire jo Acuria. Gin aye rok ame onwoŋo omoko ni Turo bino bedo me a leyi tim. Gin en ogero pem, oyido malo iguŋ kuno, ote mumuko udi adoŋodoŋo i kuno oko, ote daŋ miyo kuno doko wi obur." 
Isaiah23:14 Kok wunu ba, wun mele me Tarcic, pien ka larrewu atek doŋ oketo oko." 
Isaiah23:15 I kare-naca wi jo bino wil oko i kom jo Turo pi mwakki pyerabiro twal, ame rom aroma i kare me kwo abaka acel. Kare ame mwakki pyerabiro doŋ otum, Turo bino bedo acalo alaya ame owero ni," 
Isaiah23:16 “Kwany naŋa opuk ba, wot kede i dye boma, yin alaya ame wi jo owil oko komi-ni! Mi dwone kok amit meicel, wer daŋ wer apopol, me jo dok cak paro piri.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Kare ame mwakki pyerabiro doŋ otum, Rwot dok te bino limo Turo, te dok dwoke i ticcere. En dok bino tic i lobo apapat ame tye i wi podo, kun tio kedgi acalo alaya." 
Isaiah23:18 Agoba luŋ ame en bino nwoŋo icato willere-nono, mom bino gwoko, akadi kano me nono, ento en bino jalo oko me bedo gin acil baŋ Rwot, obino wilo i cam abup kede boŋŋi abeco pi jo ame tio ticgi i nyim Rwot." 
Isaiah24:1 Nen ba, Rwot bino miyo lobo doŋ nono, bino miyo doko wi obur, dok en bino loko lobo oluktuke, te keketo jo iye oko." 
Isaiah24:2 I kare-naca can alamdog bino bedo rom i me a jo ata; can opii bino bedo rom me adwoŋŋere; me aŋica bino medo rom i me imattere; me acatwil bino bedo rom i me awil; me ami-baŋya bino bedo rom i me akopbaŋya; me apid-baŋya bino bedo rom i me a ŋat a tye i baŋya. 
Isaiah24:3 Lobo gire bino doŋ nono aboŋo ginnoro, kun oyako jami iye luŋ; pien man en kop a Rwot doŋ otyeko kobo," 
Isaiah24:4 Lobo bino kumo, tekomere te rwenyo oko, wi podo luŋ bino nyobere, tekomere te rwenyo oko, polo kede lobo te nyoŋere oko." 
Isaiah24:5 Lobo doŋ oballe gire oko, pi jo ame bedo iye; pien jo doŋ oturo cik Obaŋa oko, mom olubo gin ame Obaŋa ociko, gin oturo daŋ cikere ame perakino atwal." 
Isaiah24:6 Mannono omio Obaŋa doŋ oceno lobo oko, jo iye tye aneno can pi rocgi; mannono en omio jo i lobo tye awaŋ, jo anokkoro keken en ame odoŋ." 
Isaiah24:7 Koŋo olok daŋ tye akumo, olok daŋ onyonere oko, jo luŋ a cunygi yom tye acucura." 
Isaiah24:8 Ajaa mogo ame kok aloŋo pi yomcuny doŋ oliŋ oko, wo a jo ame lelo daŋ oliŋ oko, yomcuny ame mio jo goo naŋa opuk daŋ doŋ pe." 
Isaiah24:9 Jo mom dok mato koŋo i wer i dog-gi; omat kono doŋ nwoŋo kec atata i doggi. 
Isaiah24:10 Jami i boma luŋ doŋ tye atata, udi iye luŋ ocecego oko me jo kur dony iye." 
Isaiah24:11 Jo mwoco koko i dye yo pi koŋo ame orwenyo oko; kit lelo luŋ doŋ ogik gire oko, yomcunyoro doŋ mom nen i wi lobo." 
Isaiah24:12 Boma doŋ oweko acalo wi obur, dogcel daŋ oŋiŋinyo oko atitino." 
Isaiah24:13 Bino daŋ bedo amannono i wi lobo i akina orok, bino bedo acalo jeituni ame doŋ odepo nyige oko, onyo acalo olok ame opwono nyige oko." 
Isaiah24:14 Jo woto dwongi, kun owero wer me yomcuny: woogi pi dit a Rwot winyere i tuŋ to," 
Isaiah24:15 Pi mannono wun jo me tuŋ kide, mi wunu kwogo baŋ Rwot; kede wun jo me dog nam, mi wunu kwogo i nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael." 
Isaiah24:16 Cakere i agikki piny wan owinyogi owero wer me pako Rwot, Ŋat Acil kwogo mere dwoŋ nadi! Ento an ate gamo ni, “Ajony ikokoro, Ajony ikokoro, Can i wia doi! Pien odot jo otany oko iyi adote, odot jo doto jo arac meicel.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Lworo kede bur, kede owic, bino makowu, wun jo ame bedo i lobo." 
Isaiah24:18 Ŋat oŋweco woo akelo lworo, bino poto i bur, ka ce en oyito oko i bur, bino moko i yi owic. Pien polo tye ame oyabere oko, acakki me lobo tye ayeŋere." 
Isaiah24:19 Lobo gire doŋ oŋinyere odoco, lobo doŋ obarre oko i dyere, lobo otagere atek meicel." 
Isaiah24:20 Lobo doŋ tagere bala amer kono yeyeŋa calo gano; ballere dwoŋ onue oko, orette ame mom dok twero ya," 
Isaiah24:21 I kare-nono Rwot bino keto can i kom mony me polo, i polo kuno, kede i lobo kan, i kom obakki me lobo." 
Isaiah24:22 Gin luŋ obino doko obuc, ote cokogi karacel i bur; obino cegogi oko i ot kol, ote keto can i komgi kun kare alalac doŋ okato." 
Isaiah24:23 Alee te twodo dwe oko, lewic daŋ te mako ceŋ oko; pien Rwot me mony bino bedo abaka i wi kidi me Cion, kede i Jerucalem, bino nyuto kwogo mere i nyim odoŋe mere." 
Isaiah25:1 Ama Rwot, yin Obaŋana; abino dwori, dok abino pako nyiŋi, pien yin itio tic me aura meicel, icobo gin a yam iyiko con, i gen kede ateni." 
Isaiah25:2 Ilokoboma odoko wi obur; anaka boma luŋ ame ocelo atek, udi orok daŋ odoko wi obur; mom dok obino gedo kakare atwal." 
Isaiah25:3 Mannono bino miyo rok atekkege keto kwogo i komi; boma a rok luŋ a mom i kica bino lwori. 
Isaiah25:4 Pien yin ibedo kan atek ame laro ocan, yin kan atek ame laro jo ame piny oloo, yin ka gwoko yamo, kot kede woo ka ceŋ lyet; pien ewura dog jo a mom i kica calo yamo kot ame bukoro iyi apama, onyo calo lyeto ka piny doŋ otwo." 
Isaiah25:5 Yin doŋ ijuko woo okwor; mannono omio wer a jo a mom i kica oliŋ, calo tipo me pol ame kweo lyeto." 
Isaiah25:6 Rwot me mony bino tedo arama pi rok luŋ i wi kidi me Cion, arama me riŋo mogo amio, kede me koŋo olok ocek amit meicel kede riŋo amio, ame moo cogo dwoŋ iye ata, kede koŋo olok ame olio aber te cek amit meicel." 
Isaiah25:7 Dok en bino yeyeco boŋo cola ame owumo i rok ducu, iwi kidi man, kede tambara ame gin obedo ruko i kare me kwero" 
Isaiah25:8 Rwot Obaŋa bino mwonyo to oko atwal, dok Rwot Obaŋa bino weyo pig waŋ jo ducu, te kwanyo lewic i wi jo mere oko i nyim jo luŋ i wi lobo; pien Rwot okobo." 
Isaiah25:9 I nino-naca obino kobo ni, “Nen ba, man en Obaŋawa ame obedo kuro me larowa, Man en Rwot ame obedo kuro; olel wunu doŋ i yomcuny pi kite a en olarowa kede.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Pien ciŋ Rwot bino we i wi kidi me Cion, aco Moab obino nyono piny i kabedo mere, kite ame dok nyono kede reŋ kal i bur opwoc." 
Isaiah25:11 Jo Moab bino ryeyo badgi iye kite ame lo a kwan ryeo kede bade me kwan; ento Rwot bino miyo awaka mere gik oko karacel kede dito me ciŋe. 
Isaiah25:12 Apama celgi ame ogero ocuŋ iguŋ malo-nu obino miyo dok oko piny, ote coro reto piny i lobo, naka iyi apua." 
Isaiah26:1 I nino-naca obino wero wer man i lobo me Juda, ni, “Wan otye kede boma atek odoco; Rwot en omio larre tye, cellere tye ame omane amana." 
Isaiah26:2 Yab wunu dogcel oko, me jo me rok a kitegi atira, ame genne, dony iye." 
Isaiah26:3 Ŋat ame tammere tye i komi, yin imio bedo i kuc me ateni, pien gennere tye i komi." 
Isaiah26:4 Ket gen i kom Rwot nakanaka, pien Rwot Obaŋa en twon lela atek a mom balle atwal." 
Isaiah26:5 Pien en odwoko piny jo ame yam bedo i boma otiŋere malo. En ocorogi piny, ocorogi piny i lobo, oretogi kom piny i apua." 
Isaiah26:6 Jo doŋ nyonogi i tyengi, tyen ocan, kede me jo ame piny oloo.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Yo a ŋat a kite atira lubo tur pe iye, yo mere-nono yin en iyiko." 
Isaiah26:8 Ama Rwot, wan okuri, i yo ame inyuto i cikki cunywa tye kom i nyiŋi, dok daŋ oparo piri meicel." 
Isaiah26:9 Oparo piri dyewor, tipona i yia dilo ibai me yenyi. Pien ka yin iŋolo kop lobo, jo ame bedo iye pwonyo kite atira." 
Isaiah26:10 Ŋat arac kadi bed tim ber, mom pwonyere me bedo dano a kite atira; en bedo timo tim a mom atirai lobo a jo a kite-gi atira, kun mom neno dit a Rwot." 
Isaiah26:11 Ama Rwot, badi gire tye otiŋere malo, cite okworri gire mom oneno. Mi lewic makgi, Ama Rwot. Migi onen mitkomi i kom joni. Mi mac ame iyiko pi kodi jo-nono tyekgi oko." 
Isaiah26:12 Ama Rwot, ibino miyowa obedo kede kuc, pien ticwa luŋ yin en itio pirwa." 
Isaiah26:13 Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, rwode ocele, a mom yin, yam oloowa, cite wan otuco ka nyiŋi keken." 
Isaiah26:14 Gin doŋ oto oko, mom dok obino bedo kwo! Gin doŋ odoko tipo, mom dok otwero ya malo! Yin ilimogi ite tyekogi oko, imio wi jo doŋ owil oko i komgi." 
Isaiah26:15 Ento yin giri doŋ imio rok man onya, Ama Rwot, yin giri doŋ imio rok man onya; yin giri doŋ imio jo oketo kwogo i komi; yin doŋ imio waŋ lobowa odoko alac." 
Isaiah26:16 Ama Rwot, wan olokere baŋi canwa; ka ce iketo can i komwa, wan okelo kwacwa i nyimi." 
Isaiah26:17 Ocalo dako ame tye ka minne irem, kun twetwenya i koko pi remmere, wan daŋ onwoŋo otye kittono i nyimi, Ama Rwot." 
Isaiah26:18 Wan obedo minne i rem, cite olunyo nywalo ka yamo. Mom tye loccoro ame wan oloo pi lobowa, mom tye ginnoro ame otio otyeko." 
Isaiah26:19 Joni oto bino dok kwo, komgi oto-nono bino dok cer. Wun jo ame bedo i yi apua, co wunu oko me iwer wunu pi yomcuny! Pien toyoni, en toyo me lero, pi mannono, yin, ibino miyo toyo bedo tye i lobo a jo a yam doŋ oto oko." 
Isaiah26:20 Bye idony wunu i tyelo wun jona, ite cego wunu doggola oko; pon wunu koŋ kuno pi kare moro anonok, tuno waŋ ame akemo a Rwot doŋ okato oko." 
Isaiah26:21 Pien, nen, Rwot tye abino kun ya i kabedo mere pi keto can i kom jo abedo i lobo pi balgi, remo ame oony i lobo bino nen kannaler, kun daŋ mom doŋ wumo kom jo oto." 
Isaiah27:1 I nino-naca, Rwot bino keto can i kom Leviatan, ame en twol a ŋeo paŋŋere meicel me laro kwo mere; Rwot bino keto can i kome i twon pala romo mere atek, abit meicel, dok bino neko ajaraŋuu ame bedo i nam." 
Isaiah27:2 I nino-naca, “Wer wunu wer i kom poto olok ame yomoro cuny." 
Isaiah27:3 Ame an Rwot en agwoko; aonyo pi iye kare luŋ! Agwoko dyeceŋ kede dyewor me ŋattoro kur bal, akemo gire mom omaka." 
Isaiah27:4 Kono okuto kede ocokocok tye iye an kono awoto alwenyo kedgi, ate waŋogi luŋaluŋa." 
Isaiah27:5 Onyo ka ce gin olaro baŋa, myero gin ocikere me bedo keda i kuc, myero gin ocikere me bedo keda i kuc.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Kare tye abino anyim ame Yakobo bino ryeyo lwite calo olok, Icrael bino turo, bino lot, nyige bino poŋ lobo oko." 
Isaiah27:7 Rwot ojwero Icrael kite a yam en koŋ ojwero kede jo ojwerogi? Onyo onekogi daŋ kite a yam en koŋ oneko kede jo ame onekogi? 
Isaiah27:8 Ama Rwot yin ipyem kedgi, ite ryemogi oko, kun icwaogi teŋe i yamo agwa me dogi i kare ame yamo me oro kodo." 
Isaiah27:9 Mannono bino miyo igonyo Yakobo i ballere man en ame bino bedo gin ame bino ya pi kwanyo ballere: ka en bino loko kiddi luŋ me keno lam odoko acalo gweŋ ame oluko apwot, kun jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera onyo keno lam me waŋo odok akur mom dok tye moro ame ocuŋ." 
Isaiah27:10 Pien boma ame ocelo atek doŋ oweko oko, kabedo mere doŋ oweko odoŋ nono calo tim ata; roce doŋ cemo gigi kuno, obuto gigi kuno kun ojwero pot ginnoro olot iye." 
Isaiah27:11 Kare ame jaŋe doŋ otwo, ote tuturo oko; mon te mwodo oko me kuto mac. Pien gin obedo rok a mom niaŋ, Obaŋa ame oketogi mom bino bedo kede kica moro i kormi Obaŋa ame ocweogi mom bino timogi ber." 
Isaiah27:12 I kare-naca Rwot bino dino kal cakere i kulo Eufrate tuno naka i kulo me Miciri; Rwot bino cokowu acel acel, wun jo Icrael." 
Isaiah27:13 Dok daŋ i ninonaca, obino kuto twon apelloro adwoŋ meicel, eka jo ame rik onwoŋo orwenyo i lobo me Acuria kede ame onwoŋo oryemo owoto i lobo me Miciri. Gin bino dwogo, ote bino woro Rwot i wi kidi acil, i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah28:1 Tok me wakere omero me lobo Epraim bino neno can, karacel kede ature amwonya meicel, ame en kwogo mere ame aner oko, ame tye malo i ŋet luŋ ame ceko cem meicel, ame obedo me a jo a koŋo oloo." 
Isaiah28:2 Nen ba, Rwot tye kede dano moro atek ame tye kede twer; ame calo yamo kot ame acwee i pee, ame jwero piny ajwera, dok ame calo twon yamo kot adwoŋ meicel, ame pii mere mol lapakino atata en bino reto jo piny kede tek kittono." 
Isaiah28:3 Tok wakere omero me lobo Epraim obino nyono oko i te tyen piny; 
Isaiah28:4 karacel kede ature amwonya meicel, ame en kwogo mere ame aner oko, ame tye malo i ŋet luŋ ame ceko cem meicel, bino bedo arom aroma i nyig oduro ame ogeo cek, kun kare me oro mom ru otuno; dano ka oneno, ru camo oko ka otuno i ciŋe." 
Isaiah28:5 I nino-nono Rwot me mony bino bedo acalo kwogo, kede alukana aber meicel, baŋ jo mere ame odoŋ;" 
Isaiah28:6 en bino bedo cuny me ŋolo kop atira baŋ ŋat ame ŋolo kop, dok en bino bedo teko baŋ ŋat ame juko lweny i dog cel me boma." 
Isaiah28:7 Dok jo man daŋ doŋ gatte agata pi koŋo olok, ogate agata pi mato koŋŋogo akec meicel; olamdog kede odwarpiny gatte agata pi mato koŋŋogo akec meicel, koŋo olok doŋ gire obalo wigi oko, ogatte doŋ agata pi mato koŋŋogo akec meicel. Mom doŋ omako aber gin ame Obaŋa tye ka nyuttigi, mom oŋolo kop kakare;" 
Isaiah28:8 pien wi meja duc opoŋ ka i ŋok, mom tye kakannoro ame ginnoro arac mom iye." 
Isaiah28:9 “En dok pwonyo ŋa? En dok etito koppere baŋ ŋa? Baŋ itino ame pwod oryemo aryema i cak bo? Baŋ jo ame pwod okwanyo i tuno bo? 
Isaiah28:10 Koppere luŋ tere mom, calo me atin ame apwonyo kop apwonya, iwinyo kan acel, kan acel.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Ateteni, Rwot daŋ bino kop i jo man, i leb a jo ame dumo aduma, kede i dog jo ame omyere;" 
Isaiah28:12 ame yam okobbigi ni, “Man en weo; mi wunu ŋat ame ool we; kun en tye kan”; cite gin gigi ote kwero winyo oko." 
Isaiah28:13 Mannono bino miyo kop a Rwot bino doko gin a tere pe baŋgi gin mom bino niaŋ koppere pien calo pwonyo atin atidi ame opwonyo momot i yore, tyeŋ i tyeŋ, me gin owot orette ataro, otutura me gin owot orette ataro, otutura oko, ote cikogi owic ame te makogi oko." 
Isaiah28:14 Winy wunu kop a Rwot, wun wegi aŋale ame loo rok man i Jerucalem!" 
Isaiah28:15 Pien wun ikobo wunu ni, “Wan daŋ ocikere giwa oko kede to, oporo kop oko kede lyel; ka ce twon can adwoŋ meicel obeo i komwa, mom gire bino gudowa; pien wan doŋ oloko goba odoko kaarrewa ogwokere giwa kede kop a mom ateni”;" 
Isaiah28:16 mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ aketo kidi me wel i Cion, kidi ame otemo owok doŋ oko, ame en aye bino bedo acakki tere. Ŋat ame ye mom gire bino bedo kede podo moro." 
Isaiah28:17 Abino miyo ŋolo kop atira bedo calo tol pimo ot, kun kite atira bedo birigi; pee bino mollo ka-larrewu me goba oko, pii daŋ bino poŋ i ka-gwokerewu oko.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Mannono bino miyo cikerewu kede to tur oko, kop ame iporo wunu kede lyel daŋ mom bino cuŋ; doŋ ka twon can adwoŋ bino beo i akinawu, cannono bino tetenowu piny." 
Isaiah28:19 Kare luŋ ame bino beo i akinawu, bino terowu oko, pien cannono bino bea dyeceŋ kede dyewor nino i nino, niaŋ i koppono bino kela lworo adwoŋ meicel." 
Isaiah28:20 Pien bino rom i dano ame otemo buto iyi tanda acecek meicel kun wumere kede olangit daŋ a mom twero rome kadi acel. 
Isaiah28:21 Pien Rwot bino ya malo kite ame rik otimo i wi kidi me Peracim, akemo bino make kite ame rik omake kede i luŋ me Gibeon; pi cobo ticcere; ticcere pat apata ba! pi cobo ticcere; ticcere welo ba!" 
Isaiah28:22 Aman doŋ wek wunu aŋale bed pe ba, me kur twewu atek ateka, pien awinyo ka Rwot Obaŋa me mony ciko pi jwero lobo luŋ oko," 
Isaiah28:23 Cik wunu yitwu, iwiny wunu dwona; ter wunu yitwu, iwiny wunu koppa," 
Isaiah28:24 Ŋat ame puro poto mere me coyo koti, en bedo pur nakanaka? En bedo boto poto kede loko nakanaka?" 
Isaiah28:25 Ka en doŋ otyeko teŋo oko, mom coo toke, pito kummin, te pito naŋo i yore i yore, kede cayiri daŋ kakare, karacel kede ŋano atino i laŋet poto?" 
Isaiah28:26 Pien Obaŋa mere pwonye aber kun niaŋe daŋ aber kite me tiyo. 
Isaiah28:27 Toke gire mom odino i yat dino bel, kummin daŋ mom oloro tyen gadigadi iye; toke gire oteŋo ateŋa kede lut, aco kummin odino kede apwod." 
Isaiah28:28 Kal kwon odino adina, cite mom atek ateka ame obabaro nyige oko, Ka aguragura wao tyen gadigadi beo iye, mom gire babaro nyige oko." 
Isaiah28:29 Man daŋ oya i baŋ Rwot me mony, en Rwot me awura i miyo tam, ryekomere dwoŋ okato kare oko." 
Isaiah29:1 Ariel oneno can nadi, Ariel ame en boma ame Daudi onwoŋo oguro kema mere iye! Wek wunu mwakki koŋ kat aryo adekkoro kun ibedo kwero wunu ecubaŋ apapat i karegi." 
Isaiah29:2 Cite abino wuno Ariel; koko kede kumo bino bedo tye iye, calo keno lam me waŋo leyi ame oŋolo me yala," 
Isaiah29:3 Abino guro kemana i ŋeti kun guri dyere, abino guri dyere i pemmogo ocuŋ malo iguŋ, abino toro lobo ayido i nyimwu calo cel." 
Isaiah29:4 Abino dwoki piny i te lobo twal, ibino kop i piny iyi apua, dwoni bino donyo i te lobo calo dwonjok, kopi bino winyere i weewee kun donyo iyi apua." 
Isaiah29:5 Cite okwori bino bedo apipim calo apua, kede jo a kica mom i cunygi bino bedo calo cuŋ kal a yamo kolo," 
Isaiah29:6 Eka cucut, i kare-nono, Rwot me mony te limi, kun mio kot mwomwoca, oyeŋo bedo tye, kede woo bedo dwoŋ, yamo ajuru, yamo kot, karacel kede maccoro ager meicel." 
Isaiah29:7 Lwak mony apipim me rok apapat ame lwenyo i kom jo me Ariel, jo luŋ ame lwenyo i komgi kede i kom kan atek me larregi, ame wunogi, gin luŋ obino doko calo lek, gin ame Obaŋa nyuto dyewor." 
Isaiah29:8 Kite a calo lo a kec aneko leko ni etye ka cam, eka te coo ame iye ginnoro mom iye. Onyo acalo lo orwo pii ociro leko ni atye emato pii, eka te co ame oryo pii ociro atek, kun mito mato pii; lwak rok luŋ lwenyo i kom kidi me Cion, daŋ bino bedo kittono." 
Isaiah29:9 Baŋere wunu kenwu me ibed wunu omino, Babalo wunu waŋwu kenwu me ibed wunu otowaŋ! Mer wunu, aboŋo koŋo; gagata wunu, aboŋo koŋo moro akec!" 
Isaiah29:10 Pien Rwot doŋ ocoro i komwu cuny me nino atek; owuno daŋ waŋwu oko, ame gin odwarpinywu; kede wiwu daŋ owumo oko ame gin jo a neno piny." 
Isaiah29:11 Gin Obaŋa nyuto baŋ odwarpiny luŋ doŋ odoko calo buk ame omwono doge oko i tu baŋwu. Ame ka omio baŋ dano moro ame ŋeo kwan kun kobbe ni, “Biye ikwan man”, en gamo ni, “Pe gira atwero kwano pien omwono doge oko,”" 
Isaiah29:12 Dok daŋ ka omio bukkono baŋ ŋat a kwia kwan, kun kobbe ni, “Biye ikwan man,” en gamo ni, “Pe gira atwero kwano.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Rwot te doŋ kobo ni, “Rok-ki kara noka ceggii doggi nono, owora daŋ i doggi nono, cunygi kara bor keda lworo ame gin lwora kede-ni kara cik a dano ame opwonyogi kede apwonya;" 
Isaiah29:14 pi mannono ba, dok abino timo gin me aura i kom rok man, gin me awura, dok me taŋo meicel; ame mio ryeko rweny i jo aryek oko.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Jo ame kanni Rwot tamgi oko kan atut, jo ame tio ticgi kan acok, jo-nono bino neno can, dok ame okobo ni, “Ŋa kara ame nenowu? Ŋa kara ame ŋeowu?”"
