Isaiah29:16 Koŋ inen kite ame wun iloko wunu kede jami oluktuke! Otwero poro acwe-gulu kede lobo cweyo gulu? Gin ame otio atia twero kobbi ŋat ocwee ni, “Pe gire yin icwea?” Onyo gin ocweo twero kobbi ŋat ocwee ni, “Mom gire iŋeo ginnoro?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Odoŋ kare anonok meicel eka Lebanon te doko poto ame ceko cem abup meicel, kun poto ame yam ceko cem meicel olokere odoko buŋ." 
Isaiah29:18 I nino-nono jo a yitgi odiŋ bino winyo kop i buk otowaŋ daŋ waŋgi bino yabere, kun oya i mutu kede colpiny." 
Isaiah29:19 Jo amwol bino dok nwoŋo yomcuny i Rwot, ocan bino lelo i Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Isaiah29:20 Pien jo a mom i kica gire bino bedo pe, wegi aŋale daŋ bino tum, oko, olib jo dyewor me timo tim areco obino miyo waŋgi rwenyo oko," 
Isaiah29:21 jo ame pi kopgi mio kop loo dano, ame ciko owic pi ŋat ame jukogi i dogcel me boma, ame cwao ŋat a kite atira teŋe pi koppogo a tere mom." 
Isaiah29:22 Mannono omio Rwot ame rik olaro Iburaim, okobo kop i kom ot a Yakobo ni, “Lewic mom dok bino mako Yakobo, waŋe mom dok bino balle," 
Isaiah29:23 Pien ka en bino neno itino mere, ame gin obedo tic me ciŋa, kun tye baŋe, gin bino miyo nyiŋa bedo me awora; gin bino ŋeyo ni Ŋat Acil a Yakobo gire cil, gin bino bedo kede lworo i kom Obaŋa me Icrael." 
Isaiah29:24 Jo ame gak oko i cunygi bino niaŋ, kede jo ame ŋunura daŋ bino ye pwonnyi.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Otino amejem bino neno can, “Rwot okobo. “Jo ame cobo tamgi, ame mom mega; dok ame notte kede rok ame cunya mom mito, me medo bal i kom bal;" 
Isaiah30:2 ame ocako wotgi me wot i Miciri aboŋo koŋ penyo tamma, wek olar baŋ Parao me gwokgi, dok oyeny ka pono i tipo me Miciri!" 
Isaiah30:3 Pi mannono ba, ka-gwokerewu i baŋ Parao bino lokere miowu lewic, dok tipo me ponowu i Miciri bino miyo alee twodowu," 
Isaiah30:4 Pien kadi bedo odoŋe mere tye Zoan, dok okwena mere tuno naka Kanec," 
Isaiah30:5 ŋat acel acel lewic bino mako, pi rok ame mom romo konyogi, ame mom onwoŋo iye konyoro akadi berroro, kono ka lewic kede acae.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Man en kop ame Obaŋa okobo i kom leyi me Negeb, I dye lobo ame tye i twon ayela kede can apek, kan ame min eŋatu kede twon ŋuu ya iye, karacel kede ororo kede twol a twarre, ame oyeo lwak lonyogi apipim i ŋe kane, kede lim akanagi i wi aruk inaga, kun otero baŋ rok ame mom romo konyogi." 
Isaiah30:7 Pien kony ame Miciri mio lam dok berroro mom iye, mannono omio acako nyiŋe ni, “Rakab ame tworo toke aboŋo ticcoro,”" 
Isaiah30:8 Aman doŋ wot igor coc i nyimgi kom kidi apada, ite daŋ coyo dok i buk, me bed tye pi kare ame tye i nyim, acalo caden ame bedo nakanaka." 
Isaiah30:9 Pien gin obedo jo ame jem ame ogoba, itino ame dag winyo kop a Rwot;" 
Isaiah30:10 ame kobbi jo ame neno piny ni, “Kur inen wunu,” kede baŋ odwarpiny ni, “Kur irabbiwa kop a tye atira; kobbiwa wunu kop abeco keken, kun irabo wunu daŋ kop me goba keken," 
Isaiah30:11 gak wunu iwek wunu yo oko, me kur omedde winyo pi Ŋat Acil me Icrael.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Mannono omio Ŋat Acil me Icrael okobo ni, “Pien icao wunu kop man, ite lunyo keto genwu i wuno jo kede bwologi kun ijeŋere wunu i kodi timwunono;" 
Isaiah30:13 mannono bino miyo balwu-nono bedo i komwu, acalo apama cel ocuŋ malo iguŋ ame obarre oko dok daŋ ceggi rette piny, ame mukere oko i rwop oyotoyot meicel." 
Isaiah30:14 Mukere mere rom aroma i to a gulu ame ocweo, ame oŋŋinyo aboŋo kica moro, eka tako moro mom te nen iye, ame dok romo kwanyo mac i keno onyo ame romo twomo pii iyi atapara.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo ame en Ŋat Acil me Icrael, “Dwog wunu cen, bed wunu mot, me ilarre wunu: ibino nwoŋo wunu teko i bedo mot kede gen.”" 
Isaiah30:16 Ento wun ikwero wunu oko, kun ikobo wunu ni, “Pe gire wan obino ŋwec giwa agu ragura”, mannono bino miyo iŋweco wunu oko, dok ni, “Obino ŋwec kedwu adwir adwira”, mannono bino miyo jo ame ryemo yorwu bino bedo jo adwir meicel." 
Isaiah30:17 Jo tutumia bino ŋwec pi lworo dano acel, wun luŋ ibino ŋwec wunu pi lworo okwor abic, tuno waŋ ame idon wunu calo yat bendera ame tye wi kidi, calo bendera ame tye i wi tur malo," 
Isaiah30:18 Kadi bed amannono, Rwot gire tye akuro ka nyuttiwu berrere, mannono omio en otiŋere malo pire kene pi timowu kica. Pien Rwot en Obaŋa ame ŋolo kop atira jo luŋ ame kure tye kede yomcuny." 
Isaiah30:19 Ateteni, wun jo Cion ame bedo i Jerucalem mom dok ibino kok wunu, kadi acel. Rwot gire bino timowu ber ka ce en owinyo kokowu en bino gamo dogwu ka en owinyo." 
Isaiah30:20 Kadi bed mi icam wunu ogati ame me can dok mi imat wunu pii kun owunowu, cite apwonywu mom dok bino pono kadi acel, ibino wunu gire neno apwony kede waŋwu." 
Isaiah30:21 Ka ce igak wunu tuŋ cem onyo tun cam, yitwu bino winyo dwon ame bino iŋewu, kun kobo ni, “Yo gire ene, lubi”." 
Isaiah30:22 Eka ite pyedo wunu cal jogiwu ame opao apaa kun omwomwono komgi kede jabu karacel kede calwu ame otwako atwaka, kun omwomwono komgi kede jabu, ite bobologi wunu oko bala gin me kwer, kun ikobo wunu ni, “Jer wunu teŋe!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Rwot bino miyowu kot pi kotti ame icoo wunu i potti kede cam ame cek i potti, bino cek aber dok abup meicel. I kare-nono dokwu bino cam i bar alac;" 
Isaiah30:24 eka twoniwu kede kanewu ame puro, gin bino camo cem ame orubo kede kado, ame ojobo ote pyeto kede odero." 
Isaiah30:25 Kulo me pii ame mol bino bedo tye i wi kidi ducu kede i wi tur ducu, i nino ame obino neko iye jo i kare ame gedo mogo ocuŋ malo iguŋ bino rette iye piny." 
Isaiah30:26 Dok dwe bino ryeny acil meicel kun caro piny calo ceŋ, aco ceŋ bino bedo a rom mannono tyen abiro, acalo lero me nino abiro, i nino ame Rwot bino tweyo iye waŋ kan owanne i kom jo mere, kede caŋo kan ame en owawano." 
Isaiah30:27 Nen ba, nyiŋ Rwot bino i kannabor kun akemo mere waŋ calo mac ame yito mere wikino malo oculle acula; kun iniga opoŋ yi doge oko, aco lebe calo mac ame tye ajwero piny oko;" 
Isaiah30:28 weo mere calo kulo ame amol olapakino atata, ame otuno naka i dwone malo; me yeko rok apapat kede odero me to kede pi keto i dog jo del ame miogi orwenyo oko." 
Isaiah30:29 Ibino bedo wunu kede wer acalo me dyewor me kwero ebucan a Rwot; cunywu daŋ bino bedo yom ame calo dano ame woto kun jo akuto nyamulere, me wot i wi kidi a Rwot, baŋ ŋat ame obedo Lela a jo Icrael." 
Isaiah30:30 Rwot bino miyo dwone me kwogo winyere, dok daŋ bino miyo bade nen ame en oryeo piny, kun tye kede twon akemo adwoŋ, kede leb mac ame jwero piny oko, karacel kede kot ame mwomwoca kun corre piny kede pee." 
Isaiah30:31 Twon lworo adwoŋ meicel bino mako jo Accuria, ka ce gin owinyo dwon Rwot, kun en pwodogi kede abiro mere." 
Isaiah30:32 Ajaa kede naŋa opuk bino kok kun lubere kede abiro acel acel ame Rwot bino goyogi kede; en bino lweny kedgi kun yeyeno bade me lweny. 
Isaiah30:33 Pien ka waŋo doŋ otyeko yiko oko con; doŋ otyeko yiko gire oko pi abaka; kannono dwoŋ dok daŋ lac meicel, kun mac kede yen tye dwoŋ ata; weo a Rwot ame mol calo gweŋ calufa ame olio i mac en ame moko mac iye." 
Isaiah31:1 Jo ame woto i Miciri pi yenyo kony bino neno can jo ame oketo gengi i kom aguragura, kede i kom gadigadi me lweny, pien tye apol, kede i kom wegi aguragura, pien otek meicel, ento mom otiŋo waŋgi malo baŋ Ŋat Acil me Icrael, akadi penyo tam a Rwot!" 
Isaiah31:2 Aco kono en ryek, dok kelo can arac meicel, mom dok dwoko kop ame en okobo cen, en gire bino ya malo i kom jo atye i udi otim tim areco, kede i kom okony jo ame timo bal." 
Isaiah31:3 Jo Miciri gire obedo dano mom obedo Obaŋa; aguragura daŋ kom ata-ni, mom gire obedo cuny. Ka Rwot oryeo bade, ami-kony bino gatte ni tyam tyam, aco ŋat akonyo bino rette oko piny, gin luŋ obino to oko karacel." 
Isaiah31:4 Pien Rwot okobba ni mannono. Kite ame eŋatu onyo atin eŋatu mor kede i kom lee ame emako ame kadi lwoŋ lwak okwat apipim i kome, kome gire mom myel ka owinyo dwongi dok daŋ lworo mom mako pi woogi, mannono en kite ame Rwot me mony abino kede piny me bino lweny i kom kidi me Cion kede i kom turrere." 
Isaiah31:5 Rwot me mony bino gwoko Jerucalem kite ame winyo lyero kede; en bino gwoko dok daŋ bino laro, en bino koyo Jerucalem, mio bwot oko." 
Isaiah31:6 Wun jo Icrael ba, myero idok wunu baŋ ŋat ame ijem wunu i kome agwa wok ca." 
Isaiah31:7 Pien i nino-nono ŋat acel acel bino bolo cal jokkere me ryal oko karacel kede cal jokkere me jabu ame onwoŋo itimo wunu bal iye pi tiyo kede ciŋwu. 
Isaiah31:8 “Pala lweny ame mom obedo me a dano, bino neko jo Acuria; pala lweny ame mom obedo me a dano bino jwerogi oko; gin bino riŋo pala lweny oko, awobegi obino diyo i tic atek." 
Isaiah31:9 Lworo bino miyo lelagi rwenyo oko, myelkom daŋ bino miyo odoŋegi weko bendera oko.” Rwot ame maccere tye i Cion, kede tanurrere tye i Jerucalem en okobo." 
Isaiah32:1 Nen ba, abaka bino loyo loc a kite atira, oloccere bino loc kun oŋolo kop atira." 
Isaiah32:2 Ŋat acel acel bino bedo calo kalarre ka yamo tye, dok acalo ka-gwokkere ka kot ocorre piny, acalo kulli me pii i kabedo otwo, dok acalo tipo kidi moro adwoŋ i lobo otwo imek." 
Isaiah32:3 Waŋ jo ame neno mom bino wumere, jo ame yitgi ogiporo, bino tero yitgi iye." 
Isaiah32:4 Jo ame timo jami oyotoyot, bino niaŋ iye ote ŋeyo aber, jo ame te lebgi odwale bino kop atira aboŋo peko moro." 
Isaiah32:5 Ŋat amiŋ mom dok obino kobo ni dano me awora, naka ŋat ame kite rac me kobo ni twon lo moro adwoŋ," 
Isaiah32:6 Pien amiŋo kobo kop me miŋo, tamere tye ka i timo bal; timere luŋ mom yomoro yi Obaŋa, kobo kop a mom ber i kom Rwot; medo ka kec baŋ jo ame kec oneko, jo oryo ciro en twono pii oko." 
Isaiah32:7 Ŋat ame kite rac, timere daŋ arac, en kelo ka tam me timo gin arac, balo ocan oko i koppere me goba, kadi kop a ŋat a can odio tye kakare." 
Isaiah32:8 Ento dano me awora kela daŋ tam ame oworo, en cuŋ i kite me woro." 
Isaiah32:9 Ya wunu malo wun mon ame tye kede kuc, winy wunu koppa; ter wunu yitwu, iwiny wunu kop ame akobo wun anyira ame mom paro ginnoro." 
Isaiah32:10 Nino ame odoŋ mom dok romo mwaka acel twal, komwu bino bedo po apoa wun mon ame mom paro ginnoro, pien nyig olok bino bedo pe, dok daŋ mom obino pwono nyig yen." 
Isaiah32:11 Komwu myero myel, wun mon ame tye kede kuc, komwu myero popoa wun ame mom iparo wunu ginnoro; gony wunu boŋo oko i komwu, ite tweyo wunu boŋo cola i pyerwu." 
Isaiah32:12 Bap korwu pi pottiwu ame yommoro cunywu, pi olok ame nyak atek meicel," 
Isaiah32:13 pi lobo a jona, ame okuto kede ococok tye adoŋo iye; kede pi udi luŋ ame yommoro cuny jo, ame tye i boma ame jo lelo iye." 
Isaiah32:14 Pien abaka bino ya oko i ode, boma a jo pol iye bino doŋ nono; kidi me Opel kede kan ocuŋ iguŋ malo me ŋiyo piny bino doko gorogoro atwal; kane me tim bino lelo pirgi, bino doko ka kwayo rommi kede dyegi," 
Isaiah32:15 tuno waŋ ame Obaŋa oonyo Cuny Acil i komwa kun ya i malo, ame tim me Lebaŋon doŋ odoko poto ame ceko cem abup meicel, kun poto ame yam ceko cem olokere odoko buŋ." 
Isaiah32:16 Ŋolo kop atira te bedo i tim, aco kite atira te bedo i poto a ceko cem." 
Isaiah32:17 Kite atira bino kelo kuc, dok kite atira bino kela daŋ bedo mot kede gen ame bedo nakanaka." 
Isaiah32:18 Jona bino bedo i kabedo me kuc kan ayela moro mom iye, ame ber me weo mot." 
Isaiah32:19 Pee bino corre, buŋ te onyo oko piny, boma daŋ bino rette oko piny." 
Isaiah32:20 Itye wunu kede yomcuny wun jo ame coo koti i dog kulo ducu, ame mio twoni kede kane lato gigi ata." 
Isaiah33:1 Ibino neno can yin ajwer jo, ame yin mom ojweri, yin won adote, kun ŋattoro mom ru oketo erupe i komi. Ka doŋ iweko jwero jo oko, obino daŋ jweri oko; kede ka doŋ iweko timmi me doto jo oko, yin daŋ obino keto erupe i komi." 
Isaiah33:2 Ama Rwot, timwa ber, wan okuri. Bed acalo bad wa piny a ru i piny a ru, larwa i kare me peko." 
Isaiah33:3 Rok ocele riŋo gigi oko pi winyo dwon jo awo, ka yin itiŋere malo, orok keketa oko;" 
Isaiah33:4 oyako jami calo omor ame camo cam i poto opyepyea iye calobonyo. 
Isaiah33:5 Rwot gire dit meicel, pien bedo malo; en bino miyo jo Cion luŋ ŋolo kop atira kun kitegi daŋ atira," 
Isaiah33:6 en bino miyo icuŋ wunu atek i karewu, bino miyo larre, ryeko kede ŋec bedo adwoŋ; gin ame pire tek baŋ jo mere en lworo Rwot." 
Isaiah33:7 Koŋ inen ba, kite ame jo mere a tek i lweny kok kede okwena me kuc kok kede cwercuny meicel." 
Isaiah33:8 Yo gudo luŋ doŋ odoŋ oko nono, ŋattoro ame woto iye doŋ mom tye. Nen cikere doŋ oturo oko, caden doŋ ocao acaa mom daŋ doŋ oparo pi dano." 
Isaiah33:9 Lobo gire doŋ oballe oko; alee otwodo Lebanon, tekomere doŋ tye arwenyo oko, Caron doŋ calo tim; aco Bacan kede Karmel pot yengi doŋ tye aony aonya." 
Isaiah33:10 Rwot okobo ni, “Aman doŋ abino ya oko, abino doŋ tiŋere malo; abino doŋ bedo dit." 
Isaiah33:11 Iyaco wunu reŋ kal, ite lunyo nywalo wunu cuŋ kal; weo me dogwu en ame bino bedo mac ame a bino tyekowu." 
Isaiah33:12 Rok luŋ bino doko calo buru mac odoŋ ka mac oto, acalo okuto ame otoŋo ote waŋo i mac.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Wun jo ame tye kannabor, winy wunu gin ame doŋ atimo, kede wun jo ame ceggi, myero iŋe wunu twer ame an atye kede." 
Isaiah33:14 Obalo ame tye i Cion, lworo doŋ omakogi oko, jo ame kwero Obaŋa komgi doŋ amyel amyela. “Ŋa i akinawa ame twero bedo i ŋet mac ame jwero jo? Ŋa i akinawa ame twero bedo i ŋet gin ame lyel nakanaka?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ŋat ame kite atira i nyim Obaŋa ame kobo kop ateni, ame cunye dag lonyo ame onwoŋo pi buro jo, ame taŋo gire ciŋe oko i gamo lim me wil i muŋ, ame culo yite oko iwinyo kop me onyo remo, ame mio waŋe oko i neno gin arac." 
Isaiah33:16 En bino bedo malo; ka geŋere mere bino bedo cel ame ocweo i lela; obino miye gire cammere, pii amata mere daŋ mom bino rwenyo." 
Isaiah33:17 Ibino neno wunu abaka kede waŋwu i kwogo mere; gin bino neno loba ame opette alac. 
Isaiah33:18 Cunyi bino lwodo kop i kom lworo adwoŋ meicel “Akwan wel kara tye kwene? Ara ocoro kara tye kwene? Akwan gedo ocuŋ igur; kara tye kwene ba?” 
Isaiah33:19 Mom dok ibino neno wunu rok ame oŋale, rok ame kopgi pat apata, ame mom itwero niaŋ wunu kopgi, okobo leb ame niaŋ iye tek." 
Isaiah33:20 Koŋ inen wunu Cion, boma ame ikwero wunu ecubanwu iye! Ibino neno wunu Jerucalem i waŋwu ame en paco okwe calo kema ame mom okobo, ame teke mege mom oputo, dok tollege daŋ mom cot," 
Isaiah33:21 Rwot bino nyuto kwogo mere kuno, kan ame kulli adoŋo kede en atino tye iye, kan ame mele ame okwaŋo i pol mom beo iye, yede me kwogo daŋ mom beo iye." 
Isaiah33:22 Pien Rwot en aŋol kopwa, en alocwa, Rwot en abakawa, en bino larowa," 
Isaiah33:23 Tol yeeni ogony oko; mom mako te yat cuŋ atek, mom daŋ otwero yaro boŋo iye wek yamo koli. Jami ayaka bino bedo apipim ame jo bino poko, naka oŋwalo daŋ bino nwoŋo moro." 
Isaiah33:24 Mom tye ŋattoro ame bedo i lobowa ame bino kobo ni, “An koma lit.” Jo ame bedo iye luŋ obino timo kica pi balgi." 
Isaiah34:1 Biye wunu ceggi wun rok luŋ, me icik yitwu iwiny wunu! Jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo, myero bin winy." 
Isaiah34:2 Pien akemo doŋ omako Rwot kom rok ducu, akemo ocire meicel i kom monygi, en doŋ ojalogi oko me ajwera i pala calo leyi." 
Isaiah34:3 Kom jogi ame oneko obino bolo ata, ŋwec kom jo-nono bino kuto aŋwec remogi bino mol i wi kidi," 
Isaiah34:4 Lwak mony me polo luŋ bino top oko, polo bino dolle oko calo buk odolo. Monygi luŋ bino rutte oko piny, kite ame pot olok ony kede piny, kite ame pot olam ony kede i kom yattere." 
Isaiah34:5 Pien palana me lweny omer oko i polo, pien abino piny me ŋolo kop i kom Edom kom jo ame doŋ omio me ajwera," 
Isaiah34:6 Rwot tye i pala lweny ame remo doŋ omwono lake oko, dwol doŋ dwoŋ i kome meicel, remo rommi kede dyegi, dwol aŋaluru me nyogi rommi. Pien Rwot bino ŋolo mot me yale i Bojra, kede twon nek adwoŋ meicel ame en bino timo iyi Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Jo bino rette calo twoni kede jobi Lobogi bino mato remo meicel, dwol bino miyo lobo bedo amio amia." 
Isaiah34:8 Pien Rwot tye kede nino me culo kwor, tye kede mwaka me lakoro Cion i ciŋ okworrere," 
Isaiah34:9 Kulli atye Edom bino lokere doko calo odok lam, lobo iye bino doko calo gweŋ Calfa, aco lobo-naca luŋ bino doka calo odok lam ame awaŋ." 
Isaiah34:10 Mac bino lyel dyeceŋ kede dyewor kun mom to, yito mere bino wikino malo nakanaka. Kare luŋ lobo bino doŋ nono, ŋattoro mom bino beo iye atwal." 
Isaiah34:11 Olwit kede ecoc bino leyo kannono tula kede agak bino bedo iye. Rwot bino ryeyo tol i kome te miyo rubere atata kede birigi ame mio doŋ nono aboŋo ginnoro," 
Isaiah34:12 Obino lwoŋo nyiŋe ni Loc gire mom kuno, jo adoŋo bino bedo pe iye," 
Isaiah34:13 Okuto bino doŋo i wi udi mere adoŋo, ayilayila kede ocokocok bino doŋo i kom apama cellere, ekwe kede udo bino bedo iye." 
Isaiah34:14 Leyi me tim bino rwatte odyekodyek cen acalo dyegi bino kok baŋ owotegi, min lee oti ame nen dyewor keken bino wot me yenyo ka weo kuno." 
Isaiah34:15 Tula bino gero ode kuno, bino bolo toŋe kuno bino beko daŋ kuno, bino coko itino mere karacel i te bwome kuno, Ogole daŋ bino cokere kuno, kun acel acel i akinagi tye kede cware." 
Isaiah34:16 Koŋ iyeny wunu i buk a Rwot: mom tye moro i akina magi ame bino rwenyo, mom tye moro ame bino bedo kene aboŋo cware. Pien Rwot doŋ ociko ni bed kittono, en ikome bino cokogi karacel." 
Isaiah34:17 En bolo kwir pirgi, en ikome en opokkigi lobo kun pimo kede tol. Bino doŋ bedo megi atwal, gin bino bedo iye waŋ i waŋ." 
Isaiah35:1 Lobo otwo kede tim bino lelo, ature bino turo iye calo kalaŋweka," 
Isaiah35:2 Ature bino bedo iye calo jo ame alelo kun owero i yomcuny meicel, kwogo mere bino bedo adwoŋ meicel calo kidi me Lebanon, bino bedo amwonya meicel calo potti me Karmel kede Caron. Gin bino neno kwogo a Rwot, kede twer ame Obaŋawa tye kede," 
Isaiah35:3 Mi teko baŋ jo ame badgi okwe mi jo a coŋgi goro dok atek. 
Isaiah35:4 Kobbi jo ame cunygi lwor ni, “Kur ilwor wunu, bed wunu atek! Nen ba, Obaŋawa bino lakorowu, en bino culo kwori kom okworwu. En abino me bino larowu.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Icennere waŋ otowaŋ te yabere oko, yit odiŋyit te yabere daŋ oko." 
Isaiah35:6 Jo oŋwalo te pye calo atil, jo a lebgi oto te wer i yomcuny. Pien pii bino kukunya i dye tim, kun kulli daŋ mol i dye lobo otal;" 
Isaiah35:7 kwoyo amimila bino doko kut, pii bino kukunya atata i lobo otwo ikaŋ. Lum kede ogada bino doŋo adwoŋ meicel, i kabedo a yam ekwe en abedo iye." 
Isaiah35:8 Yo gudo adwoŋ bino bedo kuno, yo ame obino cako nyiŋe ni, Yo Acil. Jo ame obalo mom bino lubo yonono, jo amiŋ mom bino miyo jo alubo yo-nono rwenyo." 
Isaiah35:9 Eŋatu moro mom bino bedo kuno, lee moro ager mom daŋ bino wot kuno, mom tye moro ame bino nen kuno, jo ame olakoro en ame bino lubo yo-nono." 
Isaiah35:10 Jo ame Rwot olakoro bino dwogo i Jerucalem, gin bino bino kede wer. Yomcuny aperakino atwal mom bino rwenyo i wigi, gin bino bedo i yomcuny kede lelo, cwercuny kede cucura bino ya oko i cunygi." 
Isaiah36:1 I mwaka me apar wie aŋwen me loc abaka Kejekia, Cennakerib abaka me Acuria owoto me wot lweny i kom boma luŋ me Juda, ame onwoŋo ocelo atek meicel, eka te daŋ makoboma-nono luŋ." 
Isaiah36:2 Abaka me Acuria te cwayo Rabcake baŋ Kejekia i Jerucalem, kun Rabcake ya i Lakic i twon mony adwoŋ meicel. Oticcere adoŋo te wot cuŋ i yo pii ame mol tero pii iyi atapara ame tye tuŋ malo, i yo adwoŋ ame woto i poto Alwok-boŋo." 
Isaiah36:3 Jo adek me Juda te bino me bino rwatte kede: Eliakim wot a Kilkia, ame rik obedo adwoŋ a loo ot abaka, kede Cebna, ame onwoŋo aran, kede Joa wot Acap ame rik en aco kop i kom ginnoro luŋ ame otimere." 
Isaiah36:4 Rabcake te kobbigi ni, “Kobbi wunu Kejekia ni, ‘Abaka adwoŋ ame en abaka me Acuria okobo ni, Gen ame itye wunu kede-ni ocuŋ kara i kom ŋo ba?" 
Isaiah36:5 Itamo ni kop me dog keken rom aroma i ryeko kede teko me lweny bo? Aman ame yin ijem i koma ni yin igeno ŋa? 
Isaiah36:6 Nen yin itye ka geno Miciri ame rom aroma i mako ogada ame tur oyot akaka mako abiro; ame tur cobo ciŋ ŋattoro keken ame ojeŋere i kome. Parao ame obedo abaka me Miciri daŋ tye kittono baŋ jo luŋ ame keto gengi i kome. 
Isaiah36:7 Ento ka ikobba ni, “Wan ogeno Rwot Obaŋawa”, kara mom en Obaŋa-nono en ame Kejekia rik omuko kabedo mere me abila ame tye malo kede keno lam, kun ciko Juda kede Jerucalem ni, “Myero gin wor Obaŋa i nyim keno man”?" 
Isaiah36:8 Aman doŋ tim ber ijeŋ ginnoro wun adwoŋŋa, abaka me Acuria: An abino miyi aguragura tutumia aryo ka ce yin itwero nwoŋo jo ame twero ŋwec kedgi," 
Isaiah36:9 Kara yin itwero juko aticcoro i akina otic adwoŋŋa i yore mene, ka ce yin pwod igeno Miciri pi gadigadi mere kede jo ame ŋweco agurgura?" 
Isaiah36:10 Medo i kom mannono, yin itamo ni an abino jwero lobo man aboŋo Rwot? Rwot okobba ni wot i lweny i kom lobo man, me ijwer jo iye luŋ’.”" 
Isaiah36:11 Eka Eliakim kede Cebna, kede Joa te kwayo Rabcake ni, “Tim ber i kob kedwa wan omironi i leb Aram pien wan oniaŋ iye. Kur ikob kedwa i leb me Juda ame jo ame tye i wi apama me cel twero winyo.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Rabcake te gamo kopgi ni, “Itamo ni adwoŋŋa ora me bino kobo kop man baŋ adwoŋwu kede baŋwu keken, kun mom akobo baŋ jo ame tye i wi apama cel malo ca? Aco kono, wun karacel kede gin jo-ni luŋ doŋ ibedo wunu jo ame bino camo cetewu kede mato lacwu?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Rabcake te putte malo, te redo ni, “Koŋ iwiny wunu kop abaka adwoŋ me Acuria!" 
Isaiah36:14 En okwenyoro wu ni myero kur imi Kejekia bwolwu, pien en gire mom bino larowu." 
Isaiah36:15 Kur imi wunu Kejekia wir tamwu me jeŋere i kom Rwot kun kobbiwu ni, Rwot gire mom bino miyo boma man i ciŋ abaka me Acuria," 
Isaiah36:16 Kur iwiny wunu kop a Kejekia. Abaka me Acuria okobo ni ŋat acel acel myero katto oko i boma me bin yik kop me kuc kede. En ebino miyo dano acel acel camo nyig olokkere en i kome, kede nyig oduro mere, kun daŋ mato pii mere ame en i kome ojolo;" 
Isaiah36:17 ituno ka abino terowu i lobo ocele ame rom aroma i lobowu, lobo ame ceko cem, koŋo olok dwoŋ iye, lobo ame ogati kede olok tye iye." 
Isaiah36:18 Gwokkere wunu, kur iye wunu Kejekia bwolwu ni Rwot bino larowu, Yam koŋ tye Obaŋa arokkoro ame olaro lobo mere i ciŋ abaka me Acuria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Kara gin obaŋe-nogo aman otye kwene? Obaŋa boma Kamat kede Arapad kede obaŋa me Ceparraim? Gin rik olaro Camaria i ciŋa? 
Isaiah36:20 I kom obaŋe magi luŋ, mene ame yam olaro lobogi i ciŋa? Kara ŋo ame omio yin itye ka tamo wunu ni Rwot twero laro Jerucalem?”" 
Isaiah36:21 Jo te liŋ aliŋa, kite ame onwoŋo abaka ocikogi kede ni myero kur ogam kopporo," 
Isaiah36:22 Icennere Eliakim wot a Kilkia, ame onwoŋo obedo adwoŋ ame loo ot abaka, kede Cebna, ame obedo aran, kede Joa wot a Acap, ame onwoŋo obedo aco kop luŋ i kom gin otimere, ote wot baŋ Kejekia kun oyeyeco boŋŋigi oko, ote titte kop ame Rabcake okobo." 
Isaiah37:1 I kare ame abaka Kejekia owinyo, oyeyeco boŋŋi mere, te rukoboŋo cola, te wot i ot a Rwot." 
Isaiah37:2 En te cwayo Eliakam, adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo ot abaka, kede Cebna, aran karacel kede olamdog adwoŋŋere baŋ Icaya wot Amoj, kun gin luŋ orukoboŋo cola." 
Isaiah37:3 Gin te wot kobbi Icaya ni, “Man en kop ame Kejekia okobo ni okobbi, ‘Tin en nino me can, me keto can i komwa dok me cwercuny okato kare. Aman wan orom aroma i dako ame nino me nywallere oromo, cite tekome colo atin mom tye." 
Isaiah37:4 Gwok onyo Rwot Obaŋani owinyo kop a Rabcake, ame adwoŋŋere, abaka me Acuria ocwae kede me bino ŋalo Obaŋa akwo. Rwot Obaŋani myero ket can i kom jo man ame okobo kop ame en otyeko winyo. Pi mannono ba, yin myero ikwa Rwot pi jo ame odoŋ.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Kare ame omiro abaka Kejekia otuno baŋ Icaya," 
Isaiah37:6 en okobbigi ni, “Wot ikob wunu baŋ adwoŋwu ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni myero kur ibed kede lworo moro pi kop ame iwinyo, ame omiro abaka me Acuria oyeta kede." 
Isaiah37:7 Nen ba, en abino miyo en winyo koppogo me anike, ame bino miyo en dok i lobo mere. An abino miyo oŋeke kede pala romo i lobo mere.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Rabcake te dok oko cen, te wot nwoŋo abaka me Acuria tye ka lweny i kom Libna; pien en onwoŋo doŋ owinyo oko ni abaka otyeko ya oko i Lakic." 
Isaiah37:9 Abaka rik te winyo kop i kom Tiraka, abaka me Eciopia, ni en onwoŋo tye ka bino me bino lweny kedgi. En rik te cwayo kwena baŋ Kejekia kun kobbe ni," 
Isaiah37:10 “Wot ikobbi wunu Kejekia abaka me Juda ni, ‘Kur imi Obaŋani ame igeno bwoli ni mom ebino miyo Jerucalem i ciŋ abaka me Acuria." 
Isaiah37:11 Nen ba, yin doŋ ityeko winyo gin ame abaka me Acuria otyeko timo i kom lobo luŋ. Iwinyo kite ame en orweogi odoco, kara yim doŋ ibino bwot i yore aŋo ba?" 
Isaiah37:12 Kwarina rik obin orweo boma me Gojan, Karan, Recep, te daŋ neko jo me Eden ame rik onwoŋo bedo i Telaccar, ento obaŋagi moro mom olarogi." 
Isaiah37:13 Kara obakki me boma magi tye kwene? Abaka me Kamat, kede Arpad, kede me Ceparvaim, kede me Ena karacel kede me Ivva, gin luŋ aman tye kwene?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Kejekia ogamo waraga i ciŋ okwena te kwano. En te wot kede i to a Rwot, te wot yaro waraga-nono i nyim Rwot." 
Isaiah37:15 Kejekia te kwayo Rwot ni," 
Isaiah37:16 “Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony, Obaŋa me Icrael, ame ibedo i wi kommi me kwogo a tye malo i wi okerubi; yin keni gire en ibedo Obaŋa, ame iloo kit lobo apapat luŋ me wi podo. Yin en iketo polo kede lobo." 
Isaiah37:17 Tim ber icik yiti iwinywa, ama Rwot, yab waŋi inenwa, dok daŋ iwiny kop luŋ ame Cennakarib ocwao me ŋalo Obaŋa akwo." 
Isaiah37:18 Iyi ateni, ama Rwot, wan oŋeo ni abaka me Acuria ojwero lwak apol kun mio lobogi doŋ nono," 
Isaiah37:19 dok daŋ owawaŋo obaŋegi oko i mac; pien gin mom onwoŋo obedo obaŋa ikome, ento cal apaa me yen kede gweŋe ame jo en otio." 
Isaiah37:20 Aman doŋ ba, ama Rwot Obaŋawa, larwa i ciŋ jo Acuria, me rok luŋ i wi podo ŋe ni yin giri en ibedo Obaŋa keni.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Icaya wot Amoj te cwayo kop baŋ abaka Kejekia kun kobbe ni, Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, Pien ityeko cwayo kwacci baŋa pi Cennakerib abaka me Acuria," 
Isaiah37:22 man en kop ame Rwot doŋ otyeko kobo i kome: Jo me Cion ocai calo nyako ame obwoni; Jo Jerucalem ocai, calo nyako oyeyeŋo wie i ŋei." 
Isaiah37:23 “Yin kara iŋalo ŋa, ŋa ame iyeto? Iwoto dwoni ikom ŋa ba, kun iŋao waŋi malo? Mom i kom ŋat acil me Icrael!" 
Isaiah37:24 Imio omironi oŋalo Rwot, dok ikobo ni, yin iyito malo i wi kiddi kun iyito i gadigadi me lweny, ituno naka i wi Lebanon twal; kun iwakere daŋ ni itoŋo yen cedar aboco ikuno oko, kede yen cipre abeco mege oko; dok daŋ ni ituno iyi buŋ kanabor, kan ame yen ocule iye acula." 
Isaiah37:25 Iwakere-gu ni ikunyo akoŋ, imato daŋ pii, dok tyeni omio pii kulli luŋ me Miciri odwono oko." 
Isaiah37:26 “Mom onwoŋo iŋeo ni rik ayiko man con? Aman doŋ atye ka cobo acoba, gin ame rik ayiko pire con, ni ibino reto boma luŋ ame ocelo atek, me imi dok wi oburo." 
Isaiah37:27 Man omio jo ame bedo kuno mom doŋ tye kede teko, cunygi doŋ bedo poto apota, lewic daŋ doŋ ocirogi oko. Orom aroma i lum ame tye i poto, ocalo lum alyabu, onyo orom aroma i doo ame tuu i wii ot, ame yamo alyet me oro onero." 
Isaiah37:28 “Cite an aŋeo kop ducu i komi, aŋeo ginnoro luŋ ame yin itio, kede kabedo luŋ ame yin iwoto iye, karacel kede daa-ni i koma." 
Isaiah37:29 Atyeko doŋ winyo kop i kom akemoni, awinyo daŋ kop i kom wakereni oko; pi mannono abino rwako golo i wumi, abino keto daŋ tol i dogi, abino dwoki cen i yori, kun ibeo kede Iyo ame rik ibino.”" 
Isaiah37:30 Icaya te kobbi abaka Kejekia ni, “Man en gin ame bino nyuto gin ame bino timmere. I mwaka ni kede i mwaka ame alubo man, ibino camo wunu cam ame otu kene, ento i mwakak me adekkere ibino coyo wunu koti, ite daŋ kayo wunu, ibino pito wunu olok, ite daŋ camo wunu nyige." 
Isaiah37:31 Jo ame bino bwot, te doŋ i ot a Juda, bino bedo acalo yat ame oguro lwite piny, dok daŋ obino nyako nyiggi." 
Isaiah37:32 Pien jo bino doŋ i Jerucalem kede i wii kidi me Cion. Man bino timmere pien Rwot me mony tye i mit adwoŋ meicel iye.” 
Isaiah37:33 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo i kom abaka me Acuria: “En mom bino donyo i boma man kadi acel, mom daŋ bino bayo atero moro iye, mom tye acirikale moro ame omako kwot, ame bino tuno i ŋet boma, mom daŋ obino toro lobo moro me guro." 
Isaiah37:34 En bino dok cen i ŋec, kun lubo yo ame rik ebino kede, en gire mom bino donyo i boma man, Man en kop a Rwot me mony ikokome." 
Isaiah37:35 An abino lweny pi boma man ate gwokome kelo kwogo i koma, kede i kom amirona Daudi.”" 
Isaiah37:36 Amalaika a Rwot rik te wot i gony a jo Acuria, te wot neko ocirikale tutumia mia acel kede pyeraboro wie abic. Orwo mere odiko con, kom jo oto onwoŋo doŋ oradde atata." 
Isaiah37:37 Cennakarib, abaka me Acuria te dok paco, wot bedo i Nineve." 
Isaiah37:38 I nino moro ame en rik onwoŋo tye akswayo obaŋa i ot obaŋa mere i Nicrok awobe mere Adramelek kede Carecer te neke oko i pala me romo, gin te lwi gigi wot oko i lobo Ararat. Wode Ecar-kaddon te leyo kakare acalo abaka." 
Isaiah38:1 I kare-nono two rik onwoŋo omako abaka Kejekia, ame onwoŋo en doŋ ceggi to. Adwarpiny Iacya wot Amoj rik te wot limme, te kobbe ni, “Rwot okobo ni yin doŋ myero icik jo ame bedo baŋi oko i kop me odi, pien mom ibino caŋ, ento ibino to oko.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Kejekia te loko nyime neno apama, te kwayo Obaŋa," 
Isaiah38:3 kun kobo ni, “Tim ber, Ama Rwot, ipo kit ame abedo tic kede baŋi kun ageni, icunya ducu, dok atimo gin ame tye atira i nyimi.” En te mwoco koko oko, kun cunye cwer meicel." 
Isaiah38:4 Rwot dok te medde kobbi Icaya ni," 
Isaiah38:5 “Wot ikobi Kejekia ni, Rwot Obaŋa akwarowu Daudi okobo ni, etyeko doŋ winyo kwacci, dok daŋ eneno pig waŋi; nen ba, ebino miyo dok ibedo i lobo pi mwakki apar wie abic," 
Isaiah38:6 Ebino larri karacel kede boma man i ciŋ abaka me Acuria, dok ebino medde gwokoboma man." 
Isaiah38:7 “Man en anen ame bino nyuto ni Rwot bino cobo gin ame eciko: 
Isaiah38:8 En bino coro tipo ceŋ dok cen tyen apar iya i kom gi-poro ceŋ Akac.” Tipo cen daŋ te dok oko cen tyen apar twal. 
Isaiah38:9 I kare ame Kejekia otyeko ya i two mere, en ocoo wer man me pako Obaŋa:" 
Isaiah38:10 Rik atamo ni abino ya i kwo man kun pwod atetek, atamo ni rik acwalla oko i lobo a jo oto, ate wot bedo kuno doŋ atwal, kun mom dok aneno ŋea." 
Isaiah38:11 Rik atamo ni mom dok abino neno Rwot, i lobo a jo ame kwo; dok mom daŋ abino neno ŋattoro, i akina jo luŋ ame bedo i wii lobo." 
Isaiah38:12 Kwona onwoŋo doŋ oputo, otero oko kannabor, calo kema akwat ame oputo oko, odolo acaloboŋo ame pwod acweyo acwea, ame oŋolo oko i kom yat cweyo boŋo; Rwot onwoŋo doŋ amiyo kwena gik oko, cakere odiko tuno iwor." 
Isaiah38:13 Akok dyewor benebene kun atye i twon rem adwoŋ meicel, onwoŋo atamo ni eŋatu gire tye atuturo cogona oko; Rwot onwoŋo doŋ amiyo kwona agik oko, cakere odiko tuno naka iwor." 
Isaiah38:14 Dwona onwoŋo doŋ winnyere calo me aculegwec onyo me owalo, onwoŋo doŋ akok calo amam. Waŋa onwoŋo doŋ okaŋ oko me neno malo, Rwot lara ba, atye doŋ arac meicel." 
Isaiah38:15 Kara ŋo ame dok atwero kobo ba? Pien okobo keda, dok en ikome omio man otimmere. Nino mom omako waŋa kadi acel dyewor, pi cwer cuny ame onwoŋo atye kede." 
Isaiah38:16 Rwot, an gira abino bedo kwo piri yin keken; kwona Ocuŋ i komi; caŋa me abed kwo," 
Isaiah38:17 Nen, cwer cuny adwoŋ ame onwoŋo atye kede, oya iye kuc; yin ilaro kwona i dog bur me to, pien ibolo balla luŋ iyo ŋei." 
Isaiah38:18 Pien mom dok tye ŋattoro ame tye i lobo a jo oto, ame twero paki kede pwoyi; jo ame donyo piny i lyel mom dok obedo i gennoro me lubo atenini." 
Isaiah38:19 Ŋat akwo en ame twero pwoyi, kite ame an tin apwoi kedeni; apap titi itino mere, kite ame yin igene kede," 
Isaiah38:20 Rwot yin giri ityeko lara oko! Wan obino goyo naŋa kun opaki kede, obino wero wer me paki i ot me wori, i kare me kwowa luŋ." 
Isaiah38:21 Icaya onwoŋo okobbi abaka ni myero luŋ oduro te mwono i waŋ odeke mere, me caŋ oko." 
Isaiah38:22 Abaka Kejekia te penye ni, “Kara gin aŋo ame bino nyusto ni an abino wot i ot a Rwot?”" 
Isaiah39:1 I kare-nono abaka me Babulon, Merudak-baladan, wot a Baladaŋ owinyo ni abaka Kejekia rik kome lit; en te cwayo kwena me tero waraga baŋe karacel kede mot, pien onwoŋo owinyo ni doŋ otyeko caŋ oko i two mere." 
Isaiah39:2 Kejekia rik te jolo kwena mere naca i yomcuny, te nyuttigi lonyo mere, kun daŋ miogi oneno ot me kano limmere, gin oneno jabu, ryal, gigi mogo a ŋwecgi kur, moo me wel, ot me kano jami lwennyere luŋ, kede ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i ot kano jami mere. Mom tye ginnoro ame en mom onyuto baŋgi ame onwoŋo tye i ode kede i lobo ame onwoŋo tye i te loccre." 
Isaiah39:3 Cite odwarpiny Icaya rik te bino baŋ abaka Kejekia, te penye ni, “Jo-ni kara oya ikwene? Dok kop aŋo ame gin okobo?” Kejekia te gamo ni, “Gin oya i lobo abor meicel, oya i Babulon twal.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Icaya dok te penye ni, “Gin aŋo ame gin oneno i odi?” Kejekia te gamo ni, “Gin oneno jami ducu ame tye i oda; mom tye ginnoro ame tye i udi me kano lim ame mom anyuttigi.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Icaya te kobbi abaka ni, “Koŋ doŋ iwiny kop a Rwot me mony okobo." 
Isaiah39:6 Nen ba, kare tye abino, ame jami ducu atye i odi, jami luŋ ame kwarowu yam obedo kano tuno kede naka tin, obino terogi luŋ i Babulon. Mom tye ginnoro ame bino doŋ kadi acel." 
Isaiah39:7 Dok ikwai mogo, obino royo oko, ote terogi wot tic i paco abaka me Babulon.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Abaka Kejekia te niaŋ ni kuc bino bedo tye i kare mere aboŋo alokaloka moro, omio en te kobbi Icaya ni, “Kop a Rwot ame ikobo-nono gire ber.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Kwe wunu cuny jona, kwe wunu cunygi! Man kop ame Obaŋawu okobo." 
Isaiah40:2 Cukoro wunu cuny jo me Jerucalem, kobbigi wunu ni, “Karegi me bedo opii doŋ otum oko, otyeko doŋ timogi kica i kom balgi luŋ. Can ame Rwot oketo i komgi doŋ bup, romo doŋ bal ame gin otimo tyen aryo twal." 
Isaiah40:3 Dwonnoro awinyere ame aredo ni, ‘Ger wunu yo pi Rwot, yik wunu gudo i tim pi Obaŋawa, yik wunu cuŋ atira i tim otal." 
Isaiah40:4 Luŋ ducu obino toro oko, kidi kede tur obino dwoko oko piny, kan ame ogonne obino miyo cuŋ atira, yo ame obedo popony obino piro oko." 
Isaiah40:5 Kwogo a Rwot bino nen kannaler, jo luŋ bino neno karacel, pien Rwot ikome doŋ otyeko kobo.’ ”" 
Isaiah40:6 Dwonnoro tye akobo ni, “Redi!” An ate gamo ni, “Kara ared niŋo ba?” Ginnoro luŋ a tye kede kom calo lum, kwogo mere luŋ rom i tur lum me tim." 
Isaiah40:7 Lum ner, ture te ony oko; ka weo a Rwot okuto iye, ateni, dano gire calo lum." 
Isaiah40:8 Lum ner, ture te ony oko; cite kop a Rwot okobo bedo nakanaka." 
Isaiah40:9 Yin Cion ame ikelo amut aber, yit ba i wi kidi malo, Yin Jerucalem ame irabo amut aber, med ba dwoni malo, med dwoni malo, kur ilwor. Kobbi jo ame bedo i boma me Juda ni, “Nen wunu ba Obaŋawu!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Nen wunu Rwot Obaŋawu tye abino kede teko, bade en ame loo loc pire; nen, mottere daŋ tye gire baŋe, jo ame olwenyo pirgi tye i nyime." 
Isaiah40:11 En bino kwayo rommi mere calo akwat, bino coko itino rommi mere i bade, en bino tiŋogi i kore, te peyo rommi ame dot momot." 
Isaiah40:12 Ŋa ame yam koŋ opimo pii cuny ciŋe, dok ame opimo polo kede ciŋe? Ŋa ocoko kwoyo me lobo iyi gi-pimo jami, onyo ame yam opimo kiddi mijan, kede kan obedo tutur i ratili?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ŋa ame yam koŋ obedo telo cuny a Rwot, onyo ame yam koŋ obedo miye tam acalo apwonnyere?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ŋa ame Rwot yam koŋ openyo tam i baŋe, onyo ame opwonye i ŋolo kop atira? Ŋa ame yam koŋ opwonye me medo ŋeccere, onyo ame onyutte yore me bedo i niaŋ atut?" 
Isaiah40:15 Nen ba, rok luŋ rom i pii oton icel iyi gulu, dok okwanogi acalo apua ame tye i mijan; nen, en tiŋo cula daŋ calo ginnoro atitidi." 
Isaiah40:16 Yen luŋ ame tye i buŋ me Lebaŋon, mom romo waŋo mot awaŋa; leyi iye daŋ nok, mom romo yalo Obaŋa." 
Isaiah40:17 Rok luŋ mom ginnoro gire i nyime, gin luŋ mom obedo ginnoro kadi acel i tuŋ baŋe," 
Isaiah40:18 Kara doŋ atwero poro Obaŋa kede ŋo ba, onyo atwero poro callere kede ŋo?" 
Isaiah40:19 Cal jok ame otwako atwaka, atet romo twako, ati jabu te mwono kome oko kede jabu, romo tiyo daŋ nyorrere kede ryal." 
Isaiah40:20 Ŋat ame can orido yero yat atek a mom top, yenyo apac ame adiro, me paye cal apaa, ame mom dok romo kwanyere i kan oketo iye." 
Isaiah40:21 Mom iŋeo wunu bo? Yam mom ru iwinyo wunu? Yam mom okobbiwu pire con bo? Mom ru iniaŋ wunu cakere i ageyi keto lobo? 
Isaiah40:22 Ŋat ame bedo i wi kommere malo en ame oketo, en bedo malo meicel i ŋe pol, jo ame bedo piny i lobo nen atitino calo kalalaŋ. En ryeo polo caloboŋo icika, dok yaro daŋ calo kema me bedo iye," 
Isaiah40:23 En mio oloc doko jo a konygi pe, rwode luŋ me lobo en dwoko piny iraba." 
Isaiah40:24 Gin kom calo ginapita ame pwod opito apita, ame pwod ocoo acoa kun pwod oryeo lwitgi aryea i lobo, ame ka Rwot ocwao yamo i komgi, oner oko; ka ce yamo ajuru ocorogi, kologi calo cuŋ kal." 
Isaiah40:25 Kara doŋ ibino pora wunu kede ŋo ba, ame an atwero bedo rom kede? Man peny ame Ŋat Acil openyo." 
Isaiah40:26 Tiŋ waŋwu malo me inen wunu; ŋa kara oketo jami magi? Ŋat ame kelogi oko calo mony, dok ŋeo welgi luŋ, dok daŋ lwoŋogi kede nyiŋgi, tekomere dwoŋ meicel; mannono omio mom tye moro i akinagi ame rwenyo." 
Isaiah40:27 Piŋo kara itye ka koko, yin Yakobo? Piŋo kara itye ka kobo ni Rwot mom neni, yin Icrael, kun ikobo ni Obaŋa mom tye ka paro piri?" 
Isaiah40:28 Mom iŋeo wunu? Yam mom ru iwinyo wunu? Rwot en Obaŋa ame bedo nakanaka, en gire oketo wi podo luŋ, En mom ol, mom daŋ doko agoro, Ŋeccere tut a mom twerre ame tato tere mom yot." 
Isaiah40:29 En mio teko baŋ jo agoro, dok daŋ medo teko baŋ ŋat ame tekomere odok piny," 
Isaiah40:30 Anaka awobe daŋ doko goro, otwero daŋ ol ame oromo rette piny;" 
Isaiah40:31 ento jo ame kuro Rwot, tekogi bino dwogo cen i komgi. Gin bino twarre malo i bwomgi calo cur, obino riŋo kun mom ool, obino wot nakanaka kun mom odoko jo agoro." 
Isaiah41:1 Liŋ wunu mot, iwiny wunu koppa, wun lobo ame tye i dog nam; wun rok ocele luŋ myero icak wunu cukoro wunu cunywu, myero icak bino wunu me okob wunu kop; wan luŋ onok wunugi aceggi me oŋol kop i akinawa." 
Isaiah41:2 Ŋa ame otugo ŋat ame oya i tuŋ kide, ame loo lweny i kabedo ame en woto iye ducu? Ŋa ame jalo rok apol i ciŋe, eka en te nyono obakki adoŋodoŋo i te tyene piny? Jami lwennyere miogi odoko calo apua, atero mere kologi calo cuŋ kal." 
Isaiah41:3 Ryemogi, te kato i nyimgi kede kuc, kun dwir atek, ame lokki tyene mom gudo piny." 
Isaiah41:4 Ŋa ame rik omio man otimere? Ŋa ame omio jo me kare luŋ otye kite ame aman tye kede-ni cakere i ageyi? An Rwot, rik onwoŋo atye con i ageyi, an Rwot Obaŋa, abino daŋ bedo tye i agikki piny." 
Isaiah41:5 Lobo a tye i dog nam otyeko neno gin ame atio, lworo omakogi, komgi te myel amyela; gin luŋ doŋ obino oko ceggi" 
Isaiah41:6 Ŋat acel acel bino konyo awotere, kun kobbi ominnere ni, “Di cunyi.”" 
Isaiah41:7 Apac cukoro cuny atet jabu, ŋat ame yiko kom cal anyul cukoro cuny ŋat ame goo agoa i kidi tet, kun kobo ni, “Gin ame omwononono ber”; gin te goyo callono ocumal me kur dok gwette." 
Isaiah41:8 Ento yin amirona, Icrael, in Yakobo ame doŋ atyeko yero ikwae Iburaim ame amaro;" 
Isaiah41:9 yin en ame rik akwanyi i agikki lobo, alwoŋi kom i gul kannabor meicel, kun akobbi ni, “Yin ibedo amirona, an doŋ ayeri, dok mom daŋ aboli teŋe.”" 
Isaiah41:10 Kur ilwor, an atye kedi, cunyi kur poti, pien an abedo Obaŋani; abino miyi teko, abino konyi, abino makki kede ciŋa tuŋcem ame mia aloo okworra." 
Isaiah41:11 Nen wunu ba, jo ame akemo omako i komwu, obino miyo lewic makogi; alee te twodogi; jo ame pyem kedwu, wun jona, obino doko calo gin a konnyere mom, ote to oko," 
Isaiah41:12 Ibino yenyo wunu jo ame lwenyo kedwu; cite mom ibino nwoŋo wunu, jo ame bino cobo mony i komwu: bino doko calo gin a konnyere mom," 
Isaiah41:13 Pien an a Rwot Obaŋawu, amako ciŋwu me tuŋcem; an en ame atye akobbiwu ni, “Kur ilwor wunu, an abino konyowu.”" 
Isaiah41:14 Kur ilwor Yakobo, kadi bed yin icalo kudi, kur ilwor wun jo Icrael, kadi bed igoro wunu meicel! An abino konyowu, Rwot okobo; ŋat ame bino lakorowu obedo Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Isaiah41:15 Nen ba, abino miyo idoko wunu acalo apwod me dino kal, apek, anyen ame dino kal aber meicel; ibino dino wunu kiddi ite ŋiŋinyo wunu oko, ibino miyo lobo obedo kidikidi doko calo cuŋ kal," 
Isaiah41:16 Ibino pyeto wunu, yamo te kolo oko, yamo kot ajuru te keketogi atata, Yin ibino bedo kede lelo i Rwot; ibino wakere wunu meicel pi Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Isaiah41:17 Ka ce ocan kede jo amito kony bino yenyo pi me amata, kun mom nen kadi acel, ame dwongi doŋ otwo imek, an Rwot abino winyo kwacgi, an Obaŋa me Icrael, mom abino wekogi ata." 
Isaiah41:18 Abino miyo pii molo i wi kiddi kan a yam pii pe iye, pii bino kukunya i dye luŋ piny; abino miyo pii poŋ i dye tim a yam otal ikaŋ, akon bino bedo tut i lobo otwo." 
Isaiah41:19 Abino miyo yen cedar doŋo i dye tim, kede okuto itiri, kede yen atino a ŋwecgi kur, kede jeituni; abino miyo yen buŋere i dye tim a yam yen pe iye, yen cipre karacel kede yen ocele apapat." 
Isaiah41:20 Jo bino neno man ote ŋeyo, Rwot Obaŋa Acil me Icrael en ame omio mannono otimere, ni en Rwot en atimo man, gin luŋ obino tamo mot ote niaŋ ni, Rwot en atimo man." 
Isaiah41:21 Rwot Obaŋa ame obedo abaka me Icrael okobo ni, “Wun obaŋe a rok ocele, kel wunu kop ame itye wunu kede, kel wunu pido mogo atek baŋa." 
Isaiah41:22 Bye inyuttiwa wunu gin ame bino timere anyim. Titti wunu lwak gin ame yam doŋ otimere oko, me koŋ tam; tittiwa wunu gin ame bino ya i kom gin ame otimere-nono, me wan daŋ oniaŋ iye ka ottimere." 
Isaiah41:23 Tittiwa wunu gin ame bino timere anyim, me wan oye ni wun kara ibedo wunu obaŋa. Koŋ itim wunu ginnoro aber onyo ginnoro arac, ame poto cunywa dok moi lworo makowa," 
Isaiah41:24 Wun kom mom i ginnoro wunu kadi acel, gin ame itimo wunu daŋ konnyere pe; jo ame worowu doko gin me kwer baŋa." 
Isaiah41:25 An doŋ ayero dano moro ame tye tun anyarodi; atuge me bino cobo mony i komwu i tun kide, en bino nyono loc luŋ ite tyene piny calo coto, calo acwe gulu ame nyono lobo mere; en bino lwoŋo nyiŋa." 
Isaiah41:26 Ŋa ame yam koŋ ottitiwa kop man con, me oŋe, onyo ame otito con ni man bino timere, me wan oye ni okobo kop ateni? Mom gire tye ŋattoro ame okobo, mom tye ŋattoro ame onyuto ginnoro iye, mom daŋ tye ŋattoro ame owinyo ka ikobo wunu." 
Isaiah41:27 An Rwot gire, en ame ageo titti jo Cion kop man, acwao daŋ akwena i Jerucalem me wot kobbigi amut aber." 
Isaiah41:28 Ento ka aŋio gin obaŋe-mogo, mom anwoŋo moro ame twero miyo tam ame twero gamo kop ame apenyo," 
Isaiah41:29 Gin luŋ konygi pe; mom tye ginnoro ame gin twero tiyo kadi acel, calgi calo yamo nono.”" 
Isaiah42:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen amirona ame an akonyo, ame ayero ame cunya yom i kome, Abino miyo cuny Acil bedo i kome, en bino kelo kit kwo atye atir baŋ jo luŋ." 
Isaiah42:2 En mom bino da, mom bino redo areda, mom obino winyo dwone i waŋa yo;" 
Isaiah42:3 en mom bino turo ogada okak, dok mom bino neko uci tara ame pwod aduny, en bino kelo kit kwo atye atir aber odoco." 
Isaiah42:4 En bino bedo kede gen nakanaka kun cunya mom poto tuno ka omio tim atira oromo wi podo luŋ, lobo a tye i dog nam tye akuro pwonnyere.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Rwot Obaŋa ame oketo polo, te ryeyo cuŋ atira, ame oyaro wi podo kede jami ame tye iye ducu, ame mio weo baŋ jo luŋ a bedo iye, kede kwo baŋ jo luŋ a woto iye, en okobo ni," 
Isaiah42:6 “An a Rwot, atyeko doŋ lwoŋi me moko kite atira, amako ciŋi dok daŋ abino gwoki, atyeko doŋ miyi gi-cikere baŋ orok, me bedo cen baŋgi." 
Isaiah42:7 Yin ibino yabo waŋgi, me imigi oya oko i ot kol ame otweogi iye, dok oya daŋ oko i colpiny ame obedo iye." 
Isaiah42:8 An nyiŋa Rwot, mom amio kwogona baŋ ŋattoro ocele, akadi pak mera baŋ cal ame opao apaa." 
Isaiah42:9 Nen gin me agege a rik atito doŋ otimere oko; aman dok akobbiwu gin ame nyen, kun gin mom ru ocako timere.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Wer wunu wer anyen me pako Rwot, pake wunu wun lobo ducu! Nam daŋ myero ŋur i mor kede jami luŋ ame tye iye, lobo a tye i dog nam daŋ kede jo luŋ a bedo iye." 
Isaiah42:11 Tim kede boma luŋ iye myero pak daŋ Rwot, jo luŋ me Kedar myero pake! Jo luŋ ame bedo i boma me Cela, myero wer i yomcuny i wi kiddi malo, kun owo i yomcuny." 
Isaiah42:12 Jo luŋ ame bedo i dog nam kannabor myero daŋ opak Rwot, kun omie kwogo," 
Isaiah42:13 Rwot woto i lweny calo dano atek meicel, akemo mere tugere calo dano me mony, en redo dok daŋ wo i dwon aloŋo meicel, en nyuto tekomere i kom okworrere." 
Isaiah42:14 Obaŋa okobo ni, “Aliŋ doŋ pi kare alac meicel, abedo diyo cunya kun mom agamo dog jona, ento aman kare doŋ oromo me cako yelle pirgi, myero doŋ acak omo cunya i weo calo dako ame acolle." 
Isaiah42:15 Abino balo lobo luŋ obedo kidikidi, kede kiddi luŋ, abino daŋ miyo ginnoro luŋ ame otu iye two oko; abino miyo kulo luŋ ame pii tye iye two ikaŋ, abino miyo pii dwono oko kabedo luŋ a pii ojolle iye." 
Isaiah42:16 Abino telo jo ame waŋgi oto, i yo ame gin mom oŋeo, ame yam gin mom ru obeo iye, an abino peyogi iye. Abino miyo colpiny ame owumogi doko lero, lobo obedo popony abino miyo doko apwot, Magi en gin ame an abino timo, mom gire abino wekogi ata." 
Isaiah42:17 Jo luŋ ame geno cal ame opao apaa, jo ame kobbi cal jogi ni, ‘Wun ibedo wunu Obaŋawa, obino dwokogi cen i twon lewic adwoŋ meicel.’ ”" 
Isaiah42:18 Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Winy wunu wun odingyit, yab waŋwu ba, wun otowaŋ, me inen wunu." 
Isaiah42:19 Tye ŋattoro ame waŋe oto calo waŋ amirona, onyo ame yite odiŋ kato me a dano ame aoro? Ŋa ame waŋe oto calo danona ame ojalle pira, onyo ame waŋe oto calo amirona an Rwot?" 
Isaiah42:20 Icrael neno jami apol meicel, cite mom gire keto cunye me neno aber, yite gire twolo, ame rome winyo kop, cite mom winyo ginnoro.”" 
Isaiah42:21 Rwot gire rik omito ni jo dwor cikkere, oket iye kwogo, pien en kite atira," 
Isaiah42:22 Cite man obedo rok ame doŋ otyeko yako, omao limgi oko gin luŋ doŋ otyeko ciko oko i bur, doŋ okanogi oko i ot kol; odoko doŋ gi-ayaka a jo aboŋo ŋattoro ame larogi, gin doŋ gi-ayaka aboŋo ŋattoro ame kobo ni, Dwok kakare!" 
Isaiah42:23 Ŋa i akinawu ame bino doŋ ciko yite winyo man, ame cakere aman wot anyim bino doŋ keto cunye me winyo aber?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ŋa omio Yakobo i ciŋ ŋat oyake, kede Icrael i ciŋ oyak? Mom mannono obedo Rwot ame wan obalo i nyime-ni? Mom en Rwot ame gin okwero lubo yo ame en mito-ni; Dok daŋ okwero winyo cikkere oko-ni?" 
Isaiah42:25 Mannono omio en ocoro lyeto me akemo mere i komwa, kede tekome mony; maccere olyel oromo yi Icrael luŋ, cite wan naka mom omedo niaŋ gin ame atimere, maccere owaŋowa cite wan giwa mom oparo kadi acel." 
Isaiah43:1 Aman doŋ Rwot ame oketi yin Yakobo, ame ocwei yin Icrael, okobo ni, “Kur ilwor, pien atyeko lakoro yin. An alwoŋi kede nyiŋi, yin ibedo mega." 
Isaiah43:2 Ka ibino beo i dye nam atut, an abino bedo kedi; pii me kulo mom bino mwonyi gire; kadi ibino beo i cuny mac, mom gire ibino waŋ, leb mac mom bino gudi." 
Isaiah43:3 Pien an a Rwot Obaŋani, an a Ŋat Acil me Icrael, ame lari. Abino miyo Miciri calo lim me lakoro yin, Eciopia kede Ceba bino bedo calo gin me wili." 
Isaiah43:4 Pien yin ibedo twon ginnoro me wel meicel baŋa, piri litta meicel, aketo kwogo i komi, dok amari, en omio amio jo me lakoro yin, kede rok apapat pi laro kwoni." 
Isaiah43:5 Kur ilwor, an atye kedi, abino kwanyo ikwai oko i tuŋ kide, abino dwoggo joni oko i tuŋ to." 
Isaiah43:6 Abino kobbi jo i tuŋ anyarodi ni, ‘Weke wunu doŋ’, kede jo me tutuŋ anyarolum ni, ‘Kur doŋ imedde wunu make’; wek awo bena kede anyirana dwog doŋ oko i kannabor, wekgi odwog doŋ oko i wi podo luŋ." 
Isaiah43:7 Gin obedo jona, aketogi me kela kwogo i koma.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Obaŋa okobo ni, “Kel jona i ka ŋolo kop, Waŋgi tye, cite mom oneno; yitgi tye, ento mom owinyo kop." 
Isaiah43:9 Kel rok luŋ karacel i ka ŋolo kop, mi jo luŋ cokere kuno, Ŋa i akinagi ame twero kobo man, ame twero nyuttiwa gin ame yam doŋ otimere oko con? Gin myero kel ocadengi me kwanyo kop i komgi, me ka gin owinyo kopgi, gin mok ni tye kakare." 
Isaiah43:10 “Wun jo Icrael, ibedo wunu cadenna; wun ibedo wunu omirona ame ayero, me iŋea wunu dok daŋ iye wunu an, iniaŋ wunu ni an abedo Obaŋa an kena, Mom dok tye obaŋa moro ocele kono an keken, cakere con moro mom obedo tye, dok mom daŋ bino bedo tye." 
Isaiah43:11 “An kena en abedo Rwot, mom dok tye moro ocele ame twero larowu," 
Isaiah43:12 An rik atito pire, alarowu, dok daŋ arabo pire, i kare ame obaŋa moro a welo mom tye i akinawu; wun ibedo wunu cadenna." 
Isaiah43:13 An Obaŋa, daŋ abino medde bedo Obaŋa nakanaka; mom dok tye ŋattoro ocele ame twero laro gin i ciŋa, mom tye ŋattoro ame twero geŋa tiyo ticca.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael ame larowu okobo ni, “Me larowu, an abino cwayo mony i kom jo Babulon; gin bino turo lodi me dogcel oko luŋ, woo a jo Kaldaya bino lokere doko kumo," 
Isaiah43:15 An abedo Rwot Obaŋawu ame cil, an en acweowu, wun jo Icrael, dok an abakawu.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Rwot en ame rik oyabo yo i dye nam, en omio yo obedo tye i dye twoni pii ager meicel." 
Isaiah43:17 En opeo twon mony atek meicel naka i to, lwak gadigadi lweny kede aguragura, Gin luŋ obuto piny ame mom dok oromo ya malo, onekogi, oto calo uci tara." 
Isaiah43:18 En Rwot okobo ni, “Myero wiwu doŋ wil oko i kom gin otimere con, kur ibed paro wunu gin ame yam doŋ otimere oko," 
Isaiah43:19 Wun myero doŋ icik waŋwu i kom gin anyen ame atimo, aman doŋ tye atimere. Pe ineno wunu ce? Abino tuco yo beo i dye tim, pii bino cako nen i tim kuno." 
Isaiah43:20 Anaka leyi me tim daŋ bino wora, ekwe kede udu bino paka; pien amio pii onen i dye tim ata, kede kulli i lobo otwo ikaŋ, me ami pii baŋ jona ame ayero." 
Isaiah43:21 Gin obedo rok ame an acweogi pira, me gin ower wer me paka.”" 
Isaiah43:22 Rwot okobo ni, “Aco yin gire rik mom iwora, yin Yakobo, yin rik onwoŋo doŋ iol keda oko, yin Icrael." 
Isaiah43:23 Rik mom doŋ iyala kadi acel kede rommini; rik mom iwora kede motti ame oŋolo. An daŋ rik mom abedo yeli pi mot me yala, mom daŋ abedo olokomi pi odok a ŋwece kur." 
Isaiah43:24 Mom rik iwilo odok a ŋwece kur pira, mom daŋ imia wunu ayeŋ i dwol me motwu ame oŋolo. Akaka mannono, ibedo miya wunu yeyo peko me balwu kun lolo wunu koma i balwu areco." 
Isaiah43:25 Aco ka bedo amannono, an en ame ajwao balwu, atimo amannono pi kite ame atye kede, an mom dok abino po pi balwu." 
Isaiah43:26 Poyo wia me olar kop karacel kedwu, kel kop ame nyuto ni yin itye atira," 
Isaiah43:27 Kwarowu me agege rik daŋ obalo, olocwu daŋ obalo bal i koma." 
Isaiah43:28 Mannono omio ababalo otel me kabedo acil oko, ajalo Yakobo me aneka, Icrael te doko gi-ayeta a jo.”" 
Isaiah44:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Winy ba, yin amirona Icrael, wun jona ame ayero, ikwae a Yakobo." 
Isaiah44:2 An a Rwot ame aketi, ame acwei i yi totti, an abedo konyi kare ame kwo cakere i komi. Kur ibed kede lworo, pien yin Yakobo ibedo amirona, yin Jecurun ame ayero." 
Isaiah44:3 Pien abino onyo pii i lobo ame otwo, ame pii pe iye, abino miyo pii cako mol i lobo otwo; abino onyo Cuny Acil i kom ikwai, dok abino miyo gum baŋ ikwai." 
Isaiah44:4 Gin bino bedo aber calo lum ame pii oromo, calo yen ame tye i ŋet kulo ame mol." 
Isaiah44:5 Jo mogo bino kobo ni, gin obedo jo a Rwot. Gin bino cako bino baŋ jo a Yakobo me notte kedgi. Jo ocele bino coyo nyiŋ Rwot i ŋut ciŋgi, obino lwoŋere kengi ni gin obedo jo ame tye i akina Icrael.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Rwot ame obedo abaka me Icrael, Rwot me mony ame laro jo me Icrael okobo ni, “An abedo me agege kede me agikki mere, mom dok tye obaŋa moro ocele kono an kena," 
Isaiah44:7 Tye ŋattoro ocele ame cal keda, ame twero tito yore i yore gin ame bino timere anyim. Koŋ en doŋ tittiwa odoco, cakere i ageyi nak i agikki mere?" 
Isaiah44:8 Kur ilwor wunu, komwu myero kur myel! An rik atittiwu oko con, kun anyuto jami ducu ame bino timere. Wun ibedo wunu cadenna, Tye dok Obaŋa moro ocele? Tye dok Obaŋa moro ame tek meicel ame an yam mom ru awinyo pire?”" 
Isaiah44:9 Jo luŋ ame tio cal jogi obedo jo ame konygi pe, dok cal jogi ame pirgi tekkigi-nono mom konyo ginnoro kadi acel. Jo ame woro cal jogi-nono obedo otowaŋ ame mom niaŋ; obino miyo lewic mako kodi jo-nono." 
Isaiah44:10 Ŋa ame tio cal jok, onyo ame twako cal me awora ame mom romo konyo ginnoro?" 
Isaiah44:11 Nen ba, obino miyo lewic mako jo luŋ ame WORO kodi callono. Jo ame tio gin callono obedo dano a dana. Gin luŋ myero ocokere, obin ocuŋ i ka ŋolo kop, lworo bino makogi, alee bino twodogi, gin luŋ." 
Isaiah44:12 Atet nyonyo tio ticcere kede mac. Teko ame tye i bade en ame tiŋo kede anyul me luŋo nyonyo, Kec neko, oryo pii ciro, eka tekomere te dok oko piny." 
Isaiah44:13 Aco apac geo pimo bao, kun ŋolo alam; cwero kede randa, te bedo pimo i gi-ticcere. En tio gire-nono acal kede dano ame daŋ ber meicel calo dano, me aketa i ot me woro." 
Isaiah44:14 En twero yero yat Cedar, onyo yero yattoro ame tye i buŋ i tim, te toŋo. Kare ocele pito yat cedar mere, te bedo kuro kot me doŋo." 
Isaiah44:15 Yattono icennere konyo dano acalo yen me awaŋa i mac, kun dul ocele bedo me tiyo cal jok. Dullere tuŋcel bedo me kuto mac me aoa, kede me tedo; dul ocele en doŋ te te tiyo kede cal jok me awora mere." 
Isaiah44:16 Dullere en kuto i mac, bulo kede riŋo me acama mere, ame te medde teko. Ka en tye aobo kome i maccono kobo ni, “Maccere malo meicel! Aobo koma rac wok!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Eka tuŋcel en tio kede cal jokkere me awora mere; en woro callere-nono, kun kwao ni, “Yin ibedo obaŋana, lara!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Kodi jo-nono miŋ meicel ame mom romo ŋeyo gin ame otimo. Waŋgi owumere oko ame mom oromo neno; tamgi daŋ oballe oko ame mom oromo niaŋ i gin a tye ateni. 
Isaiah44:19 Mom tye ŋattoro i akina oti cal jogi ame tamo, onyo ame tye kede ŋec, ame twero niaŋ te kobo ni, “Yat ame atio i cal jok-ki mogo awaŋo oko i mac, en ocele amyeno i kwon, abulo i riŋo ate camo oko; tuŋ ocele en ame ate tiyo kede cal jok me awora. An en doŋ atye ka woro dul yat.”" 
Isaiah44:20 En moko buru; tammere me miŋo omio en orwenyo odoco ame mom doŋ romo larre kene, mom daŋ romo niaŋ ni cal apaa ame emako i ciŋe mom gire obedo obaŋa kadi acel." 
Isaiah44:21 Rwot okobo ni, “Yin Yakobo koŋ ipoyo ba kop magi, myero ipo ni yin ibedo amirona. An rik aketi me bedo amirona, wia gire mom bino wil i komi, yin Icrael." 
Isaiah44:22 Aweo doŋ balli oko calo pol, kede tim luŋ areco ame ibedo timo aketo daŋ oko calo ekuna. Dwog doŋ cen baŋa, pien atyeko doŋ lakoro yin oko.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Red doŋ i wer me yomcuny, yin polo; pien Rwot doŋ otimo! Red wunu ba, wun kabedo ame tye piny! Red wunu ba, wun kiddi luŋ, kede yen luŋ ame tye i buŋ, i tim. Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko lakoro Yakobo, kwogo mere doŋ onen oko kom Icrael." 
Isaiah44:24 Rwot ame oketi, ocwei i totti, ame en Rwot ame lakoro yin okobo ni, “An abedo Rwot ame oketo jami ducu, aryeo polo an kena, kare ame atio lobo ŋattoro onwoŋo pe me konya." 
Isaiah44:25 Amio anyut ogoba odoko gin a konnyere pe, otyet amio odoko jo amiŋ; acoro jo aryek, adwoko cen, amiogi oŋeo ni ryeko mom ginnoro." 
Isaiah44:26 Amio kop ame omirona otito ocobere kakare, gin ame amio okwenana okobo, amio ocobere, Akobbi Jerucalem ni jo dok bino bedo iye kuno, kede boma me Juda ni dok obino gerogi, kan ame yam odoko wi obur bino dokoboma." 
Isaiah44:27 Aciko pie i nam atut kede i kulli ni myero odwon oko, pii daŋ te dwono oko," 
Isaiah44:28 Akobbi Kuro ni en bino loc kakara, ni en bino tiyo gin ame an amito ni tiye; en bino miyo ogero Jerucalem, dok bino miyo ocibo acakki te ot me wora.”" 
Isaiah45:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Kuro en a doŋ odoko abaka ame atyeko wiro kede moo, an doŋ atyeko kete me loyo rok apol, acwae me wot turo teko obakki, atye ka yabo nyime bedo aler a mom dok bino cegere.”" 
Isaiah45:2 Rwot te kobbi Kuro ni, “An ikoma abino telo nyimi, abino yiko yo piri bedo apwot, abino tuturo doggola me mola oko, ate tuturo daŋ nyonyo me dogcel oko." 
Isaiah45:3 Abino miyi lim ame okano kan adiŋ, kagi-mogo ame mom jo ŋeo kadi acel, me iŋe ni an Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael, an en a doŋ atyeko yeri." 
Isaiah45:4 Aketi me konyo amirona Yakobo, jo Icrael ame gin obedo jona, mannono en omio an ayeri, acakki nyiŋi anyen kadi bed yin mom iŋea." 
Isaiah45:5 An en abedo Rwot, mom dok tye moro ocele, Obaŋa moro ocele gire mom dok tye, kono an kena, abino miyi teko kadi bed ym mom iŋea." 
Isaiah45:6 Man atimo me jo luŋ ne ni an abedo Rwot kena, cakere i but lobo tuŋcel tuno tun ocele, mom dok tye obaŋa moro ocele kono an kena." 
Isaiah45:7 An en aketo lero kede colpiny, amio kuc bedo tye dok can daŋ bedo tye; an a Rwot en atiyo jami magi luŋ." 
Isaiah45:8 Abino onyo kite atira piny kun ya i polo, abino miyo cwe calo kot, lobo bino yabere me gamo larre, dok kite atira daŋ bino cakere i lobo, an a Rwot abino miyo man timere.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Dano ame pyem Obaŋa ame okete, bino neno can. Gulu twero pyem i ŋat ocwee? Lobo twero penyo acwe gulu gin ame en atiyo? Onyo gulu twero kobbi acwe gulu ni mom gire otic aber?" 
Isaiah45:10 Atin ame penyo pappere ni kara inywalo ŋo, atinnono bino neno can; onyo ame penyo tottere ni iremo rem me nywal i ŋo?" 
Isaiah45:11 Rwot ame obedo Ŋat Acil, ame oketo Icrael, okobo ni, “Wun mom iromo wunu penya kop i kom itinona, dok mom itye kede twerroro me kobba gin a myero ati," 
Isaiah45:12 An en atio lobo, aketo dano me bedo iye; aryeo polo kite ame tye kede ni pi tekona, an en a daŋ aciko jami luŋ me polo ni bed kite ame tye kede-ni." 
Isaiah45:13 An en aketo Kuro me moko kite atira, abino miyo en cobo ticcere luŋ kakare; en bino gero bomana, dok bino gonyo jona oko i opii, mom pi cul kadi pi mottoro ame abino miye.” Man kop a Rwot me mony okobo." 
Isaiah45:14 Rwot okobbi Icrael ni, “Lonyo luŋ me Miciri kede jami acata me Eciopia, gin luŋ bino dokomegi, kede jo Ceba ame obedo twoni jo abocoboco, gin luŋ bino bino baŋi te doko omironi, gin bino lubo yori kun otweogi oko kede jegere, gin bino ryebere piny i nyimi me wori, Gin luŋ obino mwolle i nyim kun okobo ni, ‘Yin gire en itye kede Obaŋa, yin keni, obaŋa moro ocele gire doŋ mom, kono en kene.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Ateni, yin gire ibedo Obaŋa ame pono oko, yin gire en ilaro jo, Ama Obaŋa me Icrael." 
Isaiah45:16 Lewic bino mako jo luŋ ame tio cal jogi, alee bino twodogi gin luŋ." 
Isaiah45:17 Cite jo Icrael Rwot gire bino laro oko, lar ame olarogi kede bino ri nakanaka; lewic gire mom bino makogi, alee mom bino twodogi kadi acel." 
Isaiah45:18 Pien Rwot gire en oketo polo, en gire en obedo Obaŋa! En ocako tic me keto lobo, te tyeko, en omio omoko atek odoco, En rik mom oketo lobo te weko kun tye atata, en oketo me bedo kan ame otwero bedo iye, En Rwot en ame okobo ni, “An a Rwot, moro ocele gire doŋ mom." 
Isaiah45:19 An gira rik mom akobo kop i muŋ, i lobo ame tye i piny acol, an gira rik mom akobbi ikwae a Yakobo ni, ‘Ibino yenya wunu i kan obedo atata, An abedo Rwot ame kobo kop ateni, anyuto gin ame tye kakare.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:20 Rwot okobo ni, “Cokere wunu karacel, me ibin wunu, biye wunu aceggi, wun jo me rok apapat ame ibwot wunu. Jo ame bedo tiŋo cal jogi ame opao apaa obedo jo a mom niaŋ kadi acel; obedo balo karegi i kwayo cal jok ame mom twero larogi kadi acel." 
Isaiah45:21 Biye inyut wunu kopwu i ka pido; me jo ame apido penyere kengi. Ŋa ame rik omio kop man oŋeye geye i kare acon? Mom an a Rwot, en a rik atimo? mom dok tye obaŋa moro ocele, kono an kena, an en a bedo Obaŋa a kite atira, ame laro jo, mom dok tye moro ocele kadi acel." 
Isaiah45:22 “Lokere ibin wunu baŋa, me alarwu, wun jo ame tye i wi podo luŋ! Pien an abedo Obaŋa, an kena." 
Isaiah45:23 An gira doŋ atyeko kwoŋ oko, kop ame oya i doga tye atira, koppono mom bino poto piny ame mom ocobere, ni, ‘Jo luŋ bino rumo congi i nyima, leb jo luŋ bino kwoŋo kwoŋ me wora’." 
Isaiah45:24 “Jo luŋ bino kobo ni, kite atira kede teko nwoŋsere ka baŋ Rwot; jo luŋ ame cunygi waŋ i kome, bino bino baŋe kun otye kede lewic." 
Isaiah45:25 Ikwae Icrael luŋ, bino loyo kop ote bedo kede kwogo i Rwot.”" 
Isaiah46:1 “Cal jogi a jo Babulon doŋ ceggi gik oko! Bel kede Nebo a yam oworo, aman doŋ odoko gi-ayea a leyi, aman doŋ odoko twon yec apek meicel ame olokom Leyi." 
Isaiah46:2 Gin luŋ doŋ okulo wigi piny, oguŋo karacel, cal jogi mom twero larre kengi; aco doŋ omakogi, aterogi iyi opii." 
Isaiah46:3 “Winy wunu ba koppa, wun ikwae a Yakobo, wun jo luŋ ame idoŋ wunu i ot a jona Icrael. An abedo gwokowu cakere i yi totowu, atiŋowu cakere i kare me nywalowu;" 
Isaiah46:4 An abedo Obaŋawu ame bino gwokowu, abino gwokowu naka iti wunu, abino bedo tiŋowu naka i kare ame wiwu doŋ i lwar. An en aketowu, dok abino daŋ gwokowu, abino konyowu, abino larowu." 
Isaiah46:5 “Kara ibino pora wunu kede ŋa ba? Tye ŋattoro ocele ame cal keda? 
Isaiah46:6 Jo ame juko lim ajuka iyi icaogi, ame pimo ryal i mijan, oculo atet jabu me tiyigi cal jok, gin te ryebere i nyime woro." 
Isaiah46:7 Otino ote ryoŋo i wi gwokgi, ocibo kakare, te cuŋ iye atwal, kun mom twero ya kene kabedo mere-nono, Ka jo ocwao kwacgi baŋe, en mom gamo, mom daŋ laro jo ame okwaenono i cangi." 
Isaiah46:8 “Po wunu i kop man wun obalo, koŋ itam wunu, ilwod wunu koppere i cunywu," 
Isaiah46:9 Poyo wunu gin ame rik otimere con, pien an abedo Obaŋa, an kena, mom dok tye moro ame cal keda." 
Isaiah46:10 Cakere con i ageyi, anyuto kite ame bino timere kede oko, naka kite ame bino gik kede. Akobo ni gin ame ayiko luŋ bino cobere, abino timo ginnoro luŋ ame ayiko me tiyo." 
Isaiah46:11 Abino lwoŋo dano calo acut i tuŋ kide; dano-nono bino ya i kannabor, me cobo gin ame doŋ atyeko yiko. An doŋ atyeko kobo, bino daŋ timere." 
Isaiah46:12 “Winy wunu koppa ba, wun jo ame cunywu nwaŋ, wun jo ame tamo ni loyo kop bor meicel kedwu." 
Isaiah46:13 Nino me loyo kop doŋ ceggi acega, mom doŋ bor kadi acel, mom doŋ abino gal me laro jo, abino laro Jerucalem, pi Icrael ame anwoŋo kwogona pire.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Yitto piny, ibin ibed piny iyi apua, yin Babulon ame mom ru iŋeye ico moro; bed kom piny i lobo aboŋo kom me loc, yin lobo me Kaldaya. Pien mom dok obino kobo ni, iyom a mom iromo tiyo ginnoro." 
Isaiah47:2 Kwany anya kidi me iregi i moko, gony itambara oko i wii, gony boŋo abor naka piny-nyu oko i komi me tyeni nen, be i kulo, idokoro tuŋ ca" 
Isaiah47:3 Komi me mon bino doŋ nono, komi a mom myero nen bino doŋ nen kannaler. An doŋ abino culo kwor, mom abino weko dano moro kadi acel." 
Isaiah47:4 Ŋat ame larowa nyiŋ Rwot me mony, en obedo Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Isaiah47:5 “Bed iliŋ mot, kun itye i piny acol, yin lobo me Kaldaya; pien mom dok obino lwoŋi ni, imat ame loo rok apol." 
Isaiah47:6 Akemo rik omaka i kom jona, amiogi obedo calo gin me kwer; amiogi i te locci, kica mom te makki i komgi kadi acel; kolli te bedo opek meicel baŋ jo oteggo." 
Isaiah47:7 Yin onwoŋo ikobo ni ibino loyo rok apol nakanaka, omio mom ite keto cunyi i kop magi, akadi po pi kite ame bino gik kede." 
Isaiah47:8 “Pi mannono ba, winy kop man, yin ame imaro yomcuny wokki yin ame itamo ni itye giri i kuc. Yin i kobo i cunyi ni mom dok tye ŋattoro a rom kedi, yin itamo ni mom itwero doko dako to, itinoni daŋ gire mom bino to." 
Isaiah47:9 Kit can aryo-nono luŋ bino poto i komi i nino acel, i dakika moro anonok; to itino kede doko dako to, gin luŋ bino rwomo rutte i wii karacel. Kadi bed iti i twoni timmogo me jojok, akadi ityet tyet arom mene." 
Isaiah47:10 Yin onwoŋo itamo ni itye giri i kuc i kom timmi arac, kun itamo ni ŋattoro gire mom tye ame neni, Ryekoni kede ŋec ame itye kede orwenyi arwenya, ibedo kobo i cunyi ni mom tye ŋattoro a rom kedi," 
Isaiah47:11 Cite gin arac bino poto i komi, ame tim-mi me jojok mom romo juko, Can bino poto i komi, ame mom romo kwanyere kadi acel; to bino poto i komi oyot, ame yin mom iŋeo." 
Isaiah47:12 Cuŋ atek ityet, yin medde ameda i timo tim me jojok, ame ibedo timo cakere i tinoni; atot onyo twero konyi i yore moro, onyo ca twero miyo jo lwori." 
Isaiah47:13 Tekoni otum oko kadi bed otye ka miyi tam meicel, koŋ gin doŋ obin olari, gin jo ame ŋeo poko polo, kede jo ame ŋio acer, jo ame i kare luŋ i por dwe anyen, otito gin ame bino timere i komi." 
Isaiah47:14 Nen ba, gin gire orom aroma i cuŋ kal, mac gire waŋogi oko; gin mom twero laro kwogi kengi, i kom teko a leb mac. Man mom obedo mac me aoa, mom daŋ mac ame otwero bedo i ŋete," 
Isaiah47:15 Jo ame ibedo yelle kedgi-nono tye kittono baŋi, ame ibedo balo kareni baŋgi cakere i tinoni. Gin luŋ obino weki ata, kun ŋat man mako yo mere ŋat ame bino lari mom tye.”" 
Isaiah48:1 Koŋ iwiny wunu man, wun ot a Yakobo, ame olwoŋowu i nyiŋ Icrael, ame ibedo wunu ikwae a Juda. Wun ikwoŋere wunu i nyiŋ Rwot, kun ituco wunu nyiŋ Obaŋa me Icrael, cite mom i ateni, onyo i yore aber." 
Isaiah48:2 Aco kono olwoŋere gin kengi ni gin jo me boma acil, dok ojeŋere i kom Obaŋa me Icrael, ame nyiŋe Rwot me mony," 
Isaiah48:3 “Rik atito gin ame bino timere oko con, koppere rik oya i doga, eka ate miyo ŋeye; amio daŋ oru tiye oko, te daŋ cobere." 
Isaiah48:4 Pien onwoŋo aŋeo ni cunywu nwaŋ, kun ŋutwu nwaŋ calo nyonyo, eka tur nyimwu te bedo calo mola," 
Isaiah48:5 en omio rik atittiwu koppere con, arabbiwu pire con kun mom ru otimere, me kur ikob wunu ni cal jogiwu en otimo, kun ikobo wunu ni cal apaawu kede cal atwakawu en okobo ni timere." 
Isaiah48:6 “Doŋ ityeko wunu winyo; aman doŋ myero inen wunu man ducu; mom ibino wunu rabo pire? Cakere aman wot kede anyim abino miyo iwinyo wunu gigi mogo anyen, gin okane ame mom iŋeo kadi acel." 
Isaiah48:7 Pwod amio timere aman, pe con; yam mom ru iwnyo wunu pirgi kadi acel, me kur ikob wunu ni yam gire iŋeogi con." 
Isaiah48:8 Yam mom ru iwinyo wunu, dok daŋ mom ru iŋeo wunu, cakere con yitwu onwoŋo mom ru oyabere, Pien onwoŋo aŋeo ni ibino bedo wunu ogoba, dok daŋ cakere i yic, wun onwoŋo ibedo wunu jo a jem." 
Isaiah48:9 “Abino miyo akemona koŋ gal pi nyiŋa, abino juko koŋ akemona pirwu mejo paka, me kur ajwerwu oko," 
Isaiah48:10 Nen ba, doŋ aliyiwu oko, cite mom acalo ryal; atemowu i mac tet agwa meicel." 
Isaiah48:11 Atimo pira kena, atimo pira kena, kara atwero weko obalo nyiŋa piŋo? Mom atwero jalo kwogona baŋ obaŋa moro ocele." 
Isaiah48:12 “Ter yiti iwiny koppa, yin Yakobo, wun jo Icrael ame an alwoŋo. An a en, an me agege, kede me agikki mere." 
Isaiah48:13 Ciŋa en ame oketo acakki te lobo, ciŋa tuŋcem en oryeo polo; ka alwoŋogi, gin luŋ oya karacel." 
Isaiah48:14 “Wun luŋ cokere wunu, me iwiny wunu, Ŋa i akinagi ame orabo ni man bino timere? Ŋat ame amaro bino cobo yikka i kom Babulon, en bino lweny i kom jo Kaldaya." 
Isaiah48:15 An gire, an i koma doŋ akobo, dok alwoŋe daŋ oko, an akele, nyime bino bedo aber." 
Isaiah48:16 Noka wunu aceggi, me iwiny wunu: cakere i ageyi, an mom akobo kopporo i muŋ, cakere i kare ame ocako timere, an onwoŋo atye kuno.” Aman doŋ Rwot Obaŋa oora kede Cunnyere Acil." 
Isaiah48:17 Rwot, ame en Ŋat Acil me Icrael, ame lakorowu i opii, okobo ni, “An a Rwot Obaŋawu, ame mito pwonyowu me wek ibed wunu aber, kun atelowu i yo ame myero iwot wunu iye." 
Isaiah48:18 Kono onwoŋo iwinyo wunu cikka! Kucwu kono omol calo pii i kulo, kono i loo wunu kop calo nam ame pii mere mol aboŋo weo," 
Isaiah48:19 aco ikwaewu kono calo kwoyo, jo ame oya i komwu kono dwoŋ calo apua; kono nyiŋgi mom orwenyo kadi acel, kono mom gire ojwaowu oko nyima.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Ya wunu oko i Babulon, iŋwec wunu jo Kaldaya, nyut wunu man i goyo ijira, rab wunu pire, cwal wunu koppere naka i agikki piny, kun ikobo wunu ni, “Rwot doŋ olakoro amiro mere Yakobo oko.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Kare ame en telogi i tim, oryo pii mom ocirogi; omio pii omollo pirgi kun yal lela, obaro lela pii te kirre oko." 
Isaiah48:22 “Kuc gire mom pi obalo”, Rwot okobo." 
Isaiah49:1 Winy wunu koppa, wun lobo ame tye i dog nam, cik wunu yitwu, wun rok ame oya i kannabor, Rwot olwoŋa ame pwod atye i yic, ocako nyiŋa kun pwod atye i kom totta." 
Isaiah49:2 En omio kop oya i doga bit calo pala lweny, en kana i tipo me ciŋe; en omio adoko atero ame opako lake abit, en okana oko iyi icao me atero mere." 
Isaiah49:3 En okobba ni, “Yin amirona, yin Icrael ame abino nwoŋo kwogo pire.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Cite an ate kobo ni, “Alole kom i tic nono, atyeko tekona kom nononono, aboŋo konnyoro”; kadi amannono, gin ame ber pira nwoŋere gire baŋ Rwot, Obaŋana gire bino cula pi gin ame atio," 
Isaiah49:5 Ame pwod mom ru onywala, “Rwot onwoŋo doŋ oyera oko, en oketa me bedo amiro mere ame bino dwoggo jo mere baŋe, me coko Icrael dwoggo baŋe, pien Rwot oketo kwogo i koma, Obaŋana en obedo tekona.”" 
Isaiah49:6 En Rwot-tono okobo ni, “Bedo amirona obedo gin ayot meicel, me tiŋo atekere a Yakobo apapat malo, kede dwogo jo Icrael ame agwoagwoko; an doŋ aketi me bedo cen baŋ orok, me ami larre tun i agikki wi podo luŋ.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Rwot ame Ŋat Acil me Icrael, ame en a daŋ lakoro jo Icrael, en okobo kit man baŋ ŋat ame ocao atek, ŋat ame rok apapat okwero oko, ame tye acalo amiro oloc: “Obakki bino neni te ya malo, oloc bino neni te ryebere piny; man bino timere pi Rwot, ame en agen, Ŋat Acil me Icrael, ame oyeri.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Rwot okobo ni; “Rik agamo dogi i kare me timo jo ber, rik akonyi i nino me larre, atyeko gwoki, ate miyi bedo acalo gi-cikere baŋ rok luŋ, abino miyo doŋ ibedo i loboni, ibino poko lobo ame aman odoko wi obur." 
Isaiah49:9 Abino kobo baŋ obuc ni, ‘Wot wunu doŋ oko,’ kede baŋ jo a tye kannacol ni, ‘Kato wunu kannaler.’ Gin bino calli i rommi ame cemo i ŋet yo ducu, ka cemgi bino bedo i wi tur luŋ ame yen pe iye," 
Isaiah49:10 Kec gire mom bino nekogi, akadi oryo pii mom bino cirogi, yamo alyet kede cem mom bino wunogi, pien ŋat ame kica omako i komgi en ame bino telogi, bino telogi naka i ŋet pii ame kukunya i piny." 
Isaiah49:11 Abino miyo yo beo i wi kiddina luŋ, obino tuco gudona woto malo." 
Isaiah49:12 Nen ba, jona bino ya i kannabor, kun oya i tuŋ anyarodi kede tuŋ to, jo ocel bino ya i lobo me Cuene.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Wer wer me yomcuny ba, yin polo, lel ba, yin lobo; mwoc wunu wer oko wun kiddi! Pien Rwot doŋ bino kweyo cuny jo mere, kica bino make i kom jo mere ame oneno can meicel." 
Isaiah49:14 Ento jo me Jerucalem okobo ni, “Rwot doŋ owekowa ata, wie gire doŋ owil oko i komwa.”" 
Isaiah49:15 Cite Rwot te gamo ni, “Dako wie twero wil i kom atinnere ame edoto, kica mom twero makke i kom wode ame enywalo? Kadi bed dano wie twero wil, cite an wia mom bino wil i komi." 
Isaiah49:16 Nen ba, yin Cion atyeko goro nyiŋi i ciŋa, apama celli tye i nyima kare luŋ." 
Isaiah49:17 Jo ame bino geri abino oyot meicel, jo ame omumuko yin bino ya oko i baŋi." 
Isaiah49:18 Tiŋ waŋi, inen kabedo luŋ; gin luŋ ocokere karacel obino baŋi, Rwot okobo ni, ‘Kite acalo an atye kwo, yin ibino rukogi calo gin me kwogo, ibino tweyogi i komi kite ame atera timo.’" 
Isaiah49:19 “Ateni, wi oburri doŋ odoŋ nono, loboni doŋ otyeko balle oko; cite aman doŋ bino bedo adiŋ meicel pi jo ame bino bedo kuno, jo ame yam omwonyi bino doŋ bedo kannabor." 
Isaiah49:20 Itinoni ame onywalo i opii, pwod dok ibino winyo kobo ni, ‘Kabedona diŋ meicel; myero dok meddiwa kabedo.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Ibino cako penyere keni i cunyi ni, ‘Ŋa kara onywallo jo man? Rik adoŋ nono aboŋo atinnoro, calo oraŋa, ote tera oko teŋe calo opii; kara ŋa a dokopito itino man? Koŋ inen, rik adoŋ an kena, kara itino man dok oya i kwene ba?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Rwot Obaŋa okobbi jo mere ni, “Nen ba, abino ryeyo ciŋa baŋ orok, abino tiŋo benderana baŋ rok apol; gin bino kelo awobeni kun okwako i korgi, obino tiŋo anyirani i wi gwokgi." 
Isaiah49:23 Obakki en a bino pito itinoni calo papagi, mongi en a bino bedo calo totogi. Gin bino ryebere piny i nyimi me wori, obino naŋo apua i tyeni, Mannono bino miyo iŋeo ni an a Rwot; lewic mom bino mako jo ame kura." 
Isaiah49:24 Otwero mayo jami ayaka i ciŋ jo atek, onyo otwero mayo jo ame omako calo pii i ciŋ ŋat ager?”" 
Isaiah49:25 Cite Rwot okobo ni, “Opii i ciŋ lo atek obino mayo gire oko; jami ayaka i ciŋ lo ager daŋ obino gamo gire oko; pien an abino pyem i jo ame pyem kedwu, abino laro itinowu oko." 
Isaiah49:26 Abino miyo jo ame wunowu camo riŋo komgi kengi, obino mer i remo komgi kengi calo koŋo olok. Mannono bino miyo jo luŋ ŋeo, ni an a Rwot ame Alarri. Ŋat Atek me a Yakobo ame lakoro yin.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Waraga ame rik aryemo kede totowu tye kwene, ame rik amie i kare ame aryeme? Kara rik acatowu baŋ ŋa, i akina jo ame onwoŋo atye banyagi? Nen ba, rik acatowu pi balwu, pi bedo turo wunu cik, en omio oryemo totowu." 
Isaiah50:2 Kara piŋo i kare ame rik abino, mom anwoŋo dano moro? Kare ame alwoŋo, piŋo ŋattoro mom ogamo doga? Ciŋa doŋ cecek bo, me lakorowu? Tekona mom tye bo, me larowu? Koŋ inen, nam odwono oko i kare ame ajuko, atwero loko kulli doko tim otwo, rece iye te doko acoo oko pi can pii, oto oko pi oryo pii." 
Isaiah50:3 Aromo miyo polo doko acol icuc, ate miyo bedo calo dano a kwero cola.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Rwot Obaŋa doŋ opwonya i kop ame myero akob, me aŋe kobo kop me medo teko baŋ dano ame ool. En coa nino luŋ odiko, me awiny gin ame en opwonya kede." 
Isaiah50:5 Rwot Obaŋa doŋ oyabo gire yita oko, mom ajem, mom daŋ alokke ŋea." 
Isaiah50:6 Alokki jo ame goa ŋea, kede lema baŋ jo ame telo yer tika; mom ageno waŋa i lewic kede i lao ame oŋulo iye." 
Isaiah50:7 Pien Rwot Obaŋa konya, omio alee gire mom otwoda; mannono omio akao laka kun waŋa tek calo lela, dok onwoŋo aŋeo ni mom obino keto lewic i koma; pien ŋat abino miya aloo kop tye ceggi keda." 
Isaiah50:8 Ŋattoro tye ame mito pida? Myero ocuŋ kede karacel i nyim okiko, Ŋa kara ame opido kede-nono? En myero bin i ŋeta kan." 
Isaiah50:9 Nen ba, Rwot Obaŋa konya, ŋa ame bino ŋolo kop loa? Nen ba, gin luŋ obino ti caloboŋo, nyenye bino camogi oko," 
Isaiah50:10 Ŋa i akinawu ame lworo Rwot, ame winyo kop ame amiro mere kobo? Ŋa ame woto i piny acol kun mom neno yo ame ewot iye, cite geŋo gire Rwot, kun jeŋere i kom Obaŋa mere?" 
Isaiah50:11 Nen ba, wun jo luŋ ame cwinyo mac, wunjo ame moko mac i kom yen! Wot wunu i lero mac ame icwinyo wunu, kun mac ame imoko wunu menyowu. Gin ame ibino nwoŋo wunu i baŋa ene: ibino buto wunu piny kun itye wunu twon rem adwoŋ meicel." 
Isaiah51:1 “Winy wunu koppa, wun jo ame mito larre, wun jo ame yenyo Rwot; koŋ ipar wunu pi lela ame rik okwanyowu iye, kede twon bur gweŋ atek ame rik okunyowu iye." 
Isaiah51:2 Koŋ ipar pi kwarowu, Iburaim, kede Cara ame obedo tatawu; Kare ame alwoŋo Iburaim onwoŋo mom tye atinnoro, cite an amie winyo, ate miye itino, amio ikwae odoko apol meicel." 
Isaiah51:3 “Pien Rwot bino kweyo cuny Cion, bino kweyo cuny kabedo mere luŋ ame obalo, tim iye bino bedo calo Eden, kun kan otwo ikaŋ bedo calo poto a Rwot yomcuny kede lelo bino bedo tye kuno, kun jo wero wer me pwoc kede me pak." 
Isaiah51:4 “Winy wunu koppa, wun jona, ter yitwu baŋa, wun rokka; pien abino miyowu cik, kede ŋolo kop atira ame bino bedo acalo cen baŋ orok." 
Isaiah51:5 An abino oyotoyot me bino larowu, kare me locca doŋ ceggi acega. An en abino loyo rok luŋ i koma, lobo luŋ ame tye i dog nam tye ka kura, gin otye kede gen ni abino larogi." 
Isaiah51:6 Koŋ itin waŋi inen polo, dok iŋoloro waŋi me inen lobo; pien polo ame ineno-nono bino ket oko calo yito, aco lobo bino ti oko caloboŋo, eka jo ame bedo iye te to calo ober; Cite larre ame an akelo bino perakino nakanaka, locca mom bino gik kadi acel." 
Isaiah51:7 “Winy wunu koppa, wun jo ame ŋeo kite atira, wun jo ame cikka doŋ tye i cunywu; cite myero kur ibed kede lworo ka cejo caowu, cunywu daŋ kur poti ka ce gin oyetowu." 
Isaiah51:8 Pien nyenye bino camogi iweŋ caloboŋo, okok bino mwodogi calo yer romo, ento locca mom bino gik kadi acel, larrena bino bedo pi jo me kare luŋ.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Co oko, co oko i waŋ nino, me iruk teko, yin ciŋ Rwot; co oko, kite ame ibedo timo con, i kare ame doŋ okato. Mom yin en a rik iŋoŋolo Rakab, eka ite cobo ajaraŋuu neko?" 
Isaiah51:10 Mom yin en a rik imio pii nam odwono, twon pii ame rik onwoŋo dwoŋ meicel; mom imio yo oyabere i dye nam atut atek, me jo ame olakoro kat loka tuŋ ca?" 
Isaiah51:11 Jo ame Rwot olakoro bino dwogo i Cion, gin bino bino kede wer. Yomcuny a perakino atwal mom bino rwenyo i wigi, gin bino bedo i yomcuny kede lelo, cwercuny kede cucura bino ya oko i cunygi." 
Isaiah51:12 “An, an gire abedo ŋat ame kweo cunyi: Piŋo kara ilworo dano ame to oko-ni, atin a dano ame oketo calo lum-mi?" 
Isaiah51:13 Kur wii wil oko i kom Rwot ame oketi, ame oryeo polo, dok daŋ ocibo acakki te lobo. Piŋo kara ibedo i lworo nakanaka nino i nino, pi akemo a dano ame wuno jo, ka ce en ocako ticcere me jwero jo? Kara a kemo a dano a wuno jo tye kwene?" 
Isaiah51:14 Ŋat ame abuc obino gonyo oyotoyot; mom bino to te donyo piny i Bur, cam daŋ mom bino remo." 
Isaiah51:15 “Pien an a Rwot Obaŋani, ame tugo pii i nam, te cako tagere ame amor amora; nyiŋa Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah51:16 Atyeko keto koppa i dogi, akani daŋ doŋ oko i tipo me ciŋa, aryeo polo, acibo acakki te lobo, akobo baŋ jo me Cion ni, ‘Wun ibedo wunu jona.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Co oko i waŋ nino, co oko, ya malo, yin Jerucalem, yin ame imato ikopo me akemo ame Rwot en omii imato luŋ ite cako tagere." 
Isaiah51:18 Mom tye ŋattoro ame twero peye, i akina itino mere luŋ ame en onywalo; mom tye ŋattoro ame twero mako ciŋe, i akina itino luŋ ame en opito." 
Isaiah51:19 Can aryo luŋ opoto i komi karacel, kara ŋa ame bino kweyo cunyi ba? Oyako loboni ote balo-gu oko, kec kede pala lweny opoto iye agwa; kara ŋa ame bino kweyo cunyi ba?" 
Isaiah51:20 Itinoni owiwila oko, obubuta doŋ kan ame yo ogigika iye luŋ, ocalo doŋ atil ame omoko i boo; akemo a Rwot doŋ owunogi oko, kede juk ame Obaŋani obedo jukogi kede." 
Isaiah51:21 Doŋ pi mannono ba, winy wunu kop man, wun jo ame owuno, wun jo ame omer, aco kun mom imer wunu i koŋo." 
Isaiah51:22 Rwot Obaŋani ame pido kop a jo mere okobo ni, “Nen ba, atyeko doŋ kwanyo oko i ciŋwu, ikopo ame mio itagere wunu, gulu me akemona, mom dok ibino medo mato wunu." 
Isaiah51:23 Abino doŋ miyo baŋ jo ame obedo wunowu, kun okobbiwu ni, ‘But wunu piny me wan okati’; omio iloko ŋewu doŋ odoko lobo me anyonagi, dok ŋewu doŋ onwoŋo tye acalo yo me alubagi.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Co oko, co oko i waŋ nino, ruk tekoni, yin Cion; ruk boŋŋini abeco mege, yin Jerucalem, boma acil, pien jo moro a mom olirre, kede jo ame cik ogeŋo, mom dok bino donyo baŋi." 
Isaiah52:2 Teŋ doŋ apua oko i komi me iya malo, yin Jerucalem ame yam ibedo opii, Gony doŋ tol oko i ŋutwu, wun jo me Cion ame yam ibedo wunu opii." 
Isaiah52:3 “Mom oculo limmoro me wilowu, mom daŋ ibino culo limmoro me lakorowu." 
Isaiah52:4 Yam iwoto ibedo wunu i Miciri acalo wele, icennere jo Accuria te wunowu aboŋo balloro." 
Isaiah52:5 Koŋ inen, aman dok otero jona i Babulon nono; otye ka ŋalo olocgi, jo tye ka cayo nyiŋa dyeceŋ benebene." 
Isaiah52:6 Pi mannono, ibino doŋ ŋeya wunu, ibino ŋeyo wunu ni an Obaŋa, ibino ŋeyo wunu ni an en akobo kedwu.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Tyene neno ber nadi i wi kidi, ŋat ame kelo amut aber, ame rabo amut aber me kuc, ŋat ame rabo pi larre, ame kobo baŋ Cion ni, “Obaŋani tye ka loc.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Koŋ iwiny, okur bomani tye ka olakino i wer, owero wer me yomcuny karacel; pien otye ka neno Rwot i waŋgi, kun tye ka dwogo i Cion." 
Isaiah52:9 Mwoc wunu wer oko, wun luŋ, wun wi odur me Jerucalem; pien Rwot doŋ okweo cuny jo mere oko, olakoro doŋ Jerucalem oko." 
Isaiah52:10 Rwot doŋ oyabo tekomere acil oko i nyim rok luŋ; jo luŋ i wi podo bino neno kite ame Rwot Obaŋawa olarowa kede. 
Isaiah52:11 Ya oko, ya oko, ya wunu oko i kuno, kur igud wunu ginnoro a mom cil, ya wunu oko i kuno me ilonyere wunu, wun jo ame tiŋo jami a Rwot." 
Isaiah52:12 Mom ibino ya wunu i myelkom, mom daŋ ibino riŋo wunu ariŋa, Rwot bino telo nyimwu, Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael bino bedo naka i ŋewu." 
Isaiah52:13 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, tic amirona tye awot apwot, obino wore ote tiŋe malo, en bino bedo dano amalo meicel;" 
Isaiah52:14 Jo ame onene obedo kede wur meicel; waŋe onwoŋo pat apata kede me a dano, cal kome daŋ onwoŋo mom rom kede me a dano." 
Isaiah52:15 En bino poyo kom rok apol kittono, obakki doggi bino two oko pien obino neno gin a yam mom otittigi pire, dok obino niaŋ i gin a yam mom ru owinyo pire.”" 
Isaiah53:1 “Ŋa, ŋa oye, kop man ame wan otito? Dok ŋa ame bad Rwot onyutte baŋe? Pien en odoŋo i nyime calo ginapita ame pwod adoŋo adoŋa, ame pwod aryeyo lwite aryea i lobo otwo." 
Isaiah53:2 En yam mom tye kede kommoro aber onyo kwogo, ame kono miwa ocik waŋwa i kome, ginnoro ame wao tam a dano onwoŋo mom tye baŋe kadi acel mom tye ginnoro ame twero miyowa obedo i tam i kome." 
Isaiah53:3 Jo ocae te kwere-gu oko, obedo kede cwercuny adwoŋ kede twon rem okato kare. En obedo calo dano ame jo owumo waŋgi oko i kome, Jo ocae, kun mom oparo pire kadi acel." 
Isaiah53:4 Ateteni, en okanyo can pirwa, oyeo remwa; cite wan obedo tamo ni Obaŋa en oketo can i kome, ogoe dok ote time cucu." 
Isaiah53:5 Ento rik ocobo pi balwa, owane pi timwa areco; can ame oketo i kome okelliwa kuc, pi go ye omio wan ocaŋ." 
Isaiah53:6 Wan luŋ onwoŋo orwenyo oko calo rommi, Ŋat acel acel onwoŋo okwanyo yo mere kene, ento Rwot doŋ oketo balwa luŋ i kome."
