Isaiah53:7 Rik owune, oketo can i kome, cite en gire mom oŋamo doge; acalo romo ame otero me aneka, dok acalo romo a liŋ i nyim onyar yerrere, kittono en mom oŋamo gire doge." 
Isaiah53:8 Owune, oŋolle kop, ote kwanye oko Ŋa kara oparo pi gin otimere i kome, ni okwanye oko i lobo a jo akwo, ogoe pi bal a rokwa?" 
Isaiah53:9 Oyiko lyellere karacel kede me otim tim areco, karacel kede alonyo i kare me to mere, kadi bed balloro onwoŋo mom a en otimo, lebe daŋ mom okobo goba.”" 
Isaiah53:10 Rwot gire a rik omito ni myero waŋe, en gire omio en obedo kede rem. I kare ame en bino miye iye kene acalo mot me bal, en bino neno ikwae, en bino medo kare me kwo mere. En bino Cobo gin a Rwot oyiko;" 
Isaiah53:11 en bino neno gin aber oya i cwercuny ame ebeo iye, mannono bino kweyo cunye. Pi ŋeccere, amirona ame kite atira, bino miyo okwano jo apol ni kitegi atira, en bino yeyo balgi." 
Isaiah53:12 Mannono bino miyo amie kabedo me woro i akina jo adoŋo, obino poko jami ayaka karacel i jo atek i lweny, pien en ojalo kwo mere i to, dok okwane karacel obalo; ento en oyeo bal a jo apol meicel, dok okwao Obaŋa pi obalo." 
Isaiah54:1 Mwoc wer, iredu i yomcuny, yin amerem nywal mom ogudi! Pien itino a dako ame oweko bino bedo apol, kato me a dako ame obedo kede cware, man kop a Rwot." 
Isaiah54:2 Dok imed nyayo kabedo me kemani bed alac, mi med doŋ ryeyo boŋo me celo kabedoni; kur iwek mogo doŋ, med tol kemani bed aboco, gur teke daŋ bed atek." 
Isaiah54:3 Pien waŋ loboni bino medde tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, ikwai bino leyo ka orok, dok obino poŋo boma luŋ ame tye nono," 
Isaiah54:4 Kur ilwor, pien lewic mom dok bino maki; kur imi alee twodi, pien mom obino miyo lewic maki. Pien wii bino wil oko i kom lewic a rik ibedo kede i tinoni, mom dok ibino poyo acae me bedo keni aboŋo cwari." 
Isaiah54:5 Pien Ŋat ocwei, en obedo cwari, nyiŋe Rwot me mony; Ŋat Acil me Icrael en a lakoro yin, olwoŋo ni Obaŋa me wi podo luŋ. Obaŋa bino laro Jerucalem i opii" 
Isaiah54:6 Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko lwoŋi oko, acalo dako ame oweko kene, kun tye i cwercuny, acalo nyako ame onyomo a pwod tidi, ka oryemo; Obaŋani en okobo." 
Isaiah54:7 Pi kare anok meicel rik aweki keni, ento abino dwoggo yin i kica adwoŋ meicel." 
Isaiah54:8 Rik akano waŋa oko i baŋi, i kare anok ame onwoŋo akemona dwoŋ meicel, ento abino nyuto marra baŋi nakanaka; man kop a Rwot, ame en ŋat alakoro yin okobo," 
Isaiah54:9 Pien man rom aroma i kare a Nua i baŋa, Kite acalo rik akwono i kare a Nua ni, pii mom dok bino medde poŋ ame balo lobo luŋ, aman doŋ akwoŋo ni mom dok abino bedo kede akemo i komi, mom daŋ abino dok juki." 
Isaiah54:10 Pien kiddi twero ya, tur daŋ otwero kobo oko kan ocele ento marra a mom lokere mom bino ya i komi, cikerena me kuc mom obino kobo teŋe. Mannono kop ame Rwot ame kica mako i koma-ni okobo." 
Isaiah54:11 Ama, yin boma ame ineno can, ame yamo kot okodo i komi i teko, yin ame mom okweo cunyi kadi acel, nen ba, abino mwono kiddini aber meicel, abino gero acakki teri kede kiddi me wel ame obedo bululu bululu" 
Isaiah54:12 kan ocuŋ malo iguŋ bino gero kiddi arema me wel aco dogcel, i kiddi amimila bala mac, eka apamani ate deyo i gweŋe alilia apapat." 
Isaiah54:13 Itinoni luŋ Rwot en abino pwonyogi, itinoni bino bedo aber meicel." 
Isaiah54:14 Kite atira bino miyo ibedo atek, mom obino wuni kadi acel, pien mom ibino bedo kede lworo moro pire, jo a wuni mom gire bino noko ŋeti," 
Isaiah54:15 Ka ce dano moro bino ero da kedi, mannono nwoŋo mom oya i baŋa; ŋattoro keken ame bino da kedi, dano-nono bino poto oko piri." 
Isaiah54:16 Nen ba, an doŋ aketo atet, ame bino buko loti mac, te teto i jami lweny me ticcere; dok aketo daŋ abalo lobo, me jwero jami ducu." 
Isaiah54:17 Mom tye gi-lwennyoro ame oteto pi lweny i komi, ame bino tiyo ticcere, dok daŋ ibino loyo kop luŋ ame obino kelo i komi. Man obedo gin ame omiro a Rwot bino nwoŋo loyo kopgi ya i baŋa, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Isaiah55:1 Biye wunu ba i pii, wun luŋ ame oryo ocirowu; ŋat ame limmere moro mom, myero bin wil, cam, Biye iwil wunu koŋo olok kede cak, aboŋo culloro kadi welloro ame oŋolo pire." 
Isaiah55:2 Piŋo kara ibalo limwu i kom gin a mom obedo ogati? Piŋo kara ityeko tekowu i kom tic ame mom romo yeŋowu? Ter yitwu baŋa, me icam wunu gin aber, lel wunu i cam ame amiowu." 
Isaiah55:3 Ter wunu yitwu, ibin wunu baŋa: winy wunu koppa, me tipowu bed kwo; abino cikere kedwu i cikere a perakino odoco, abino miyowu mar mera a mom lokere ame genne, ame rik aciko pi Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Nen ba, rik akete me bedo caden baŋ orok, atel kede ami-cik baŋ orok." 
Isaiah55:5 Nen ba, ibino lwoŋo rok apapat ame mom iŋeo wunu, rok apapat ame mom ŋeowu bino riŋo baŋwu, pi Rwot Obaŋawu, ame en Ŋat Acil me Icrael, pien en doŋ oketo kwogo i komwu." 
Isaiah55:6 Yeny wunu Rwot kun pwod twero nwoŋere, kok wunu baŋ Rwot kun en tye ceggi." 
Isaiah55:7 Atim tim arac myero wek timerenono oko; ŋat a cunye mom atira myero wek kit tammere-nono oko; myero en dwog baŋ Rwot, me en time kica, myero en dwog baŋ Obaŋawa, pien bino gonyo ballere luŋ." 
Isaiah55:8 “Pien tamma, mom tamwu, akadi yowu daŋ mom obedo yona”, Rwot okobo." 
Isaiah55:9 “Kite acalo polo otiŋere malo meicel ame kato lobo kittono daŋ yona tye malo ame kato yowu oko, tamma daŋ kato tamwu oko." 
Isaiah55:10 “Pien kite acalo kot kede pee corre piny kun ya i polo, mom dok twero dok kuno, ento bido lobo, mio ginapita tu, doŋo, mio koti baŋ acoc, kede cam baŋ jo ame camo." 
Isaiah55:11 Kop ame ya i doga daŋ bino bedo amannono; mom dok bino dwogo baŋa, cite bino tiyo gin ame amito ni ti, dok bino cobo gin ame acwae pire." 
Isaiah55:12 “Pien ibino wot wunu oko kede lelo, kun oterowu kede kucs; kiddi ame tye i nyimwu karacel kede tur luŋ, gin luŋ bino mwoco wer agwa meicel, kun yen luŋ me tim ba po ciŋgi." 
Isaiah55:13 Yen cipre en a bino tu akaka okuto, yen a nwecgi kur akaka ocokocok; mannono bino bedo gin me po nakanaka, ame mom twero rwenyo, me nyuto ni an Rwot en a rik atio.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Rwot okobo baŋ jo mere ni, “Myero iŋol wunu kop atira, dok itim wunu gin atira, pien aceggi larowu; larre ame alarowu kede ceggi doŋ nen kannaler." 
Isaiah56:2 Ŋat ame timo man tye kede winyo nadi, karacel kede dano ame omako atek odoco, ame gwoko cabit, kun mom balo, dok gwoko daŋ ciŋe mom timo gin arac.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Arokkoro ame doŋ obino oko baŋ Rwot myero kur kob ni, “Rwot gire bino poka oko i akina jo mere,” dok ŋat ame ooro oko kur daŋ kob ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ a yat otal.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko kobo oko ni, “Jo ame oroo oko ame gwoko ceŋ cabitta, ame yero gin ame yomoro cunya, ame lido cikerena odoco," 
Isaiah56:5 abino miyogi gin me po nyiŋgi, ame bino bedo i ot me wora kede i akina jona, ame ber kato bedo itino awobe kede anyira; abino miyogi nyiŋ me perakino atwal, ame mom twero rwenyo kadi acel." 
Isaiah56:6 “Orok ame doŋ obino oko baŋ Rwot, me tic baŋe, kun maro nyiŋe, dok me bedo omiro mere, jo luŋ ame gwoko ceŋ cabit, kun mom obalo, ame lido cikerena odoco," 
Isaiah56:7 jo-nono abino kelo i wi kidina acil, abino yomoro cunygi i ot me kwaya, Abino gamo mot awaŋagi kede motgi ame oyalo kede, abino gamo i wi keno me lamma; pien oda obino lwoŋo ni ot me kwac a rok luŋ.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Rwot Obaŋa ame ocoko jo Icrael ame oryemo okobo ni, “Dok abino coko jo ocele baŋa, amedo i kom jo ame doŋ atyeko coko.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Wun leyi luŋ me tim, biye imwod wunu, wun leyi luŋ me buŋ," 
Isaiah56:10 Okurpiny a jo Icrael waŋgi oto oko, gin luŋ mom otye kede ŋeccoro kadi acel; gin luŋ ocalo gwogi ame lebgi oto, mom doŋ oromo gweo; oleko lek kun obuto gigi oko, omaro nino keken." 
Isaiah56:11 Gwogi-nono owor meicel, mom oyeŋ kadi acel. Gin okwat a mom niaŋ, ŋat acel acel i akinagi kwanyo yo mere kene, ŋat man yenyo agoba mere kene kite a cunye mito," 
Isaiah56:12 Gin olwoŋere ni, “Biye me owot oom koŋo olok, biye okak arege me omer; diki dok onen, adwoŋ okato kare oko.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Ŋat a kite atira to, cite ŋattoro mom keto cunye iye; jo ame maro Obaŋa okwanyo oko, ŋattoro gire mom paro pirgi. Pien dano a kite atira nwoŋo okwanyo oko i can," 
Isaiah57:2 en donyo gire i kuc; jo ame woto i yo me kite atira, jo-nono tye a wee i kabutogi." 
Isaiah57:3 Cite wun, biye wunu ceggi baŋa kan, wun itino emuroko, ame acot onywalo kede i tim me carocaro." 
Isaiah57:4 Ŋa ce ame wun inywaro wunu-nono? Iŋamo dogwu alac alaca-nono pi ŋa? Wun mom ibedo wunu itino otim bal, itino ame onywalo pi kop me goba." 
Isaiah57:5 Wun ame mitwu mom kwe i te kworo, i te yen luŋ ame obuŋere, ame ineko itinowu i luŋ, i te gweŋe ame obabara?" 
Isaiah57:6 Gin ame opokki i akina gweŋe apwot i luŋ piny, gin, ginnaca luŋ megi; yin ionynyigi motti me amata, ikelo-gu motti me moko kwon. Cunya bino bedo yom pi kodi timmono?" 
Isaiah57:7 Iketo doŋ kabuto ni i wi kidi abor, otiŋere malo, yin doŋ iwoto kuno me wot yalo jok i motti," 
Isaiah57:8 Iketo daŋ cal jok i ŋe kika kede i ŋe yat doggola; pi weka oko, omio iyabo kabutoni. Idonyo iye, ite yaro bedo alac; icikere kedgi piri keni, imaro doŋ kabutogi, ineno gin me lewic," 
Isaiah57:9 Iwoto baŋ jok Molek kede moo, imedo mooni a ŋwece kur; ioro okwenani kannabor, icwalogi piny naka i Ceol." 
Isaiah57:10 Wot abor ooli meicel, cite mom ikobo ni, “Konnyere mom;” inwoŋo kwo anyen ame medo tekoni, omio mom iŋoye iyo," 
Isaiah57:11 Ŋa ame onwoŋo ilworo atek, ame myelo komi, ame omio ikobo kop goba, wii te doŋ wil oko i koma, ame mom doŋ itwero po pira? Mom atemo diyo cunya pi kare alac, ame omio mom ite bedo kede lworo moro i koma?" 
Isaiah57:12 Kodi kiteni ame ikobo ni atiranono, kede timmi luŋ abino yabo oko kannaler." 
Isaiah57:13 Ka ce iwoto dwoni i koko pi kony, gin cal jogini-nono myero konyi. Yamo bino kologi oko, ewura dog bino cwayogi teŋe. Ento ŋat ame riŋo laro baŋa bino bedo i lobo, dano-nono bino bedo i kidina acil." 
Isaiah57:14 Obino kobo ni, “Tor wunu, tor wunu, yik wunu yo, put wunu iciki luŋ i dye yo a jona.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Obaŋa ame malo, ame cil, ame bedo nakanaka i kabedo ame otiŋere malo, ame ri nakanaka okobo ni, “An abedo i kabedo ame otiŋere malo ame cil, dok abedo daŋ i ŋat amwol, a cunye cwer, dok ŋut, pi roco cuny jo ame mwol, jo ame cunygi cwer dok ŋut." 
Isaiah57:16 Pien mom abino bedo pyem nakanaka, mom abino kudo akemo kare luŋ, pien cuny dano oya i baŋa, an en amio weo me kwo." 
Isaiah57:17 Bal a jona me paro lim omio akemo omaka; omio agoogi, apono oko, kun akemo maka, cite gin omedde ameda i jem kun otimo gin a cunygi mito." 
Isaiah57:18 Atyeko doŋ neno kitegi, ento abino caŋogi; abino telogi, abino culogi i gin a kweo cunygi, abino kweyo cuny jo ame kumo pirgi." 
Isaiah57:19 Abino miyo kuc baŋ jo a tye kannabor kede kan aceggi, dok daŋ abino caŋo jona." 
Isaiah57:20 Ento jo areco calo nam ame tagere, ame mom koŋ twero pye mot, kun pii mere bedo kelo yugi kede coto." 
Isaiah57:21 Kuc gire mom pi obalo”, man kop ame Obaŋawa okobo." 
Isaiah58:1 Red atek, kur iliŋ, yab dwoni aloŋo calo apel, kobbi jona rocgi, tucci jo me ot a Yakobo balgi." 
Isaiah58:2 Aco kono gin yenya nino ducu, olelo daŋ gigi i ŋeyo gin ame an amito oti, otimere kom calo rok ame kitegi atira, ame mom weko lubo cik obaŋagi; openya-gu daŋ pi ŋolo kop atira, cunygi daŋ yom me bedo aceggi Obaŋa." 
Isaiah58:3 Jo penyo ni, “Piŋo kara wan obedo kanyo kec, kun yin mom ineno? Piŋo kara wan obedo mwolle kenwa i nyimi, kun yin mom iparo?” Koŋ inen i nino me kanyo kecwu, wun iketo ka cunywu i gin ame yomoro cunywu kun iburo wunu jo ame tio baŋwu." 
Isaiah58:4 Koŋ dok inen, kanyo kecwu tye iye daa kede lweny, kun daŋ icipocipo wunu jo adoŋ i ciŋ me kolo, Kodi kanyo kec ame itye ka kanyo wunu i kare-ni, mom bino miyo dwonwu winyere malo." 
Isaiah58:5 Itamo wunu ni mannono kite kanyo kec ame an amito, nino ame dano mwolle iye kene? Kanyo kec ame dano kulo wie piny calo ogada, peto boŋo cola, pworo buro iye, eka te buto iye? Mannono en ame wun itwero lwoŋo wunu ni kanyo kec, kede nino ame Rwot Obaŋawu cunye yom iye?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Kanyo kec ame an amito ene: gonyo tol me tim areco, gonyo kol oko i tyen opii, jo ame owuno wot i kuc, kede turo kit kol luŋ aluŋa tyen jo." 
Isaiah58:7 Nywako cam kede jo ame kec neko, kelo ocan ame paccigi pe i paconi; miyo boŋo aruka baŋ jo ame ineno woto onoro; dok daŋ myero kur irweny oko i waŋ watini." 
Isaiah58:8 Ceŋ bino pelo baŋi calo ru-piny, waŋ bur ame tye i komi bino caŋ oyot meicel. Kiteni atira bino telo nyimi, kwogo a Rwot en ame bino geŋo ŋei." 
Isaiah58:9 Dok daŋ ibino lwoŋo, Rwot te gamo dogi, ibino koko baŋe, en bino gamo ni, ‘An ene.’ “Ka ce ibino kwanyo kol oko i akinawu, cimo jo i nyako ciŋ, kede kobo kop arac," 
Isaiah58:10 Ka ce ibino jalo kwoni baŋ jo ame kec neko, dok daŋ icobo mit a jo ame owuno, bino miyo ceŋ pello piri i piny acol, piny acol icuc baŋi bino doko calo dyeceŋ," 
Isaiah58:11 Rwot bino telli i kare luŋ, en bino cobo mitti i jami abeco, bino miyo cogoni bedo atek; ibino bedo calo poto ame pii oromo aber meicel, ibino bedo calo pii ame akukunya kare luŋ, ame pii mere mom two kadi acel." 
Isaiah58:12 Wi oburri acon obino gero doki, ibino gero i kom acakki tere ame yam kwariwu ogero, obino lwoŋi ni yin ayik cel ame otur, ŋat ame yiko yo a yam oballe bedo aber." 
Isaiah58:13 “Ka ce itero ceŋ cabit acalo kabedo acil, iweko timo gin ame yomoro cunyi i ninona acil, ka ce itero cabit acalo nino me yomcuny, dok acalo nino a Rwot ame cil ame obedo me kwogo; ka ce imio kwogo kun mom ilubo yo-ni keni, akadi bedo yenyo gin ame yomoro cunyi, onyo kobo kop atata;" 
Isaiah58:14 cunyi bino bedo ayom i kom Rwot, ibino yon i gadigadi i wi tur malo, ibino yomoro cunyi i lobo ame rik kwaroni Yakobo oleo, pien Rwot doŋ okobo kop man en ikome.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Nen ba, bad Rwot mom odoko acek oko, ame mom doŋ romo laro jo, yite daŋ mom gire odiŋ, ame mom romo winyo kop;" 
Isaiah59:2 ento timwu arac opokowu oko kede Obaŋa, balwu omio waŋe doŋ owumere oko i komwu, mom romo neno." 
Isaiah59:3 Pien remo doŋ obalo ciŋwu oko, anyira ciŋwu Opoŋ ka i tim areco keken, dogwu kobo kop me goba, lebwu muno kop me timo tim areco." 
Isaiah59:4 Mom tye ŋattoro ame doto wadgi i kop ateni, mom tye ŋattoro ame pido pido ame tye kakare; jo luŋ jeŋere i kop a tere mom, kun okobo kop goba, oparo ka pi timo gin arac, ame kelo can." 
Isaiah59:5 Jo luŋ beko ka tim arac calo toŋ codocodo, ocikoboogi calo me otyetyem; ŋat ame ocamo tongi-nono to oko, aco ka onyono anyona, ororo ya iye." 
Isaiah59:6 Ento timgi-nono mom bino konyogi kadi acel, mom bino konyogi me aruka, akadi me wumere, Gin otio ka tic me timo bal, tim me byemi tye gire i ciŋgi." 
Isaiah59:7 Tyengi dwir ata me wot timo gin arac, oyute ayuta me wot onyo remo ajo a mom i bal; otamo ka tam me wot timo gin arac, yak kede balle a lobo tye i gudogi luŋ." 
Isaiah59:8 Okwia-gu yo me kuc, ŋolo kop atira mom tye i gudogi luŋ; ogogomo yogi luŋ, mom tye ŋattoro a beo iye ame bedo i kuc." 
Isaiah59:9 Mannono omio ŋolo kop atira bor abora kedwa, larre mom ru otuno baŋwa. Koŋ inen doŋ ba, akaka ceŋ, wan onwoŋo colpiny, akaka lero, wan owoto i piny acol icuc." 
Isaiah59:10 Oboboŋo doŋ kor apama calo otowaŋ, oboboŋo calo jo ame waŋgi mom ogatte kom a piny pwod ler calo dyewor, i akina jo a komgi tek, wan ocalo jo oto." 
Isaiah59:11 Nen doŋ oŋuŋura-gu calo leyi, obedo kok akoka calo amam, okuro ŋolo kop atira cite mom onwoŋo; okuro larre, cite bor abora kedwa," 
Isaiah59:12 Pien balwa doŋ odurre adura nyimi, rocwa en a doŋ obedo caden komwa; wan gire doŋ otyeko balo, wan oŋeo tim areco ame obedo timo." 
Isaiah59:13 Wan okalo wi cik, okwero-gu Rwot oko, oweko daŋ lubo Obaŋawa oko, kun okobo ka kop me wuno jo kede jem, ogamo kop goba i cunywa, ote kobo." 
Isaiah59:14 Aco ŋolo kop atira mom oye rwako ume, kite atira doŋ mom noko ŋetwa, ateni doŋ tye arimo piny i dye boma ata, ginnoro ame tye kakare mom doŋ nwoŋo yo me donyo." 
Isaiah59:15 Ateni mom doŋ tye atwal, ŋat ame kwero timo tim arac, miye kene i peko. Rwot oneno timmoro atira mom doŋ tye, pien ŋolo kop atira mom doŋ tye." 
Isaiah59:16 En oneno ni ŋattoro mom doŋ tye; owuro pien oneno ni ŋattoro mom doŋ tye ame twero laro pirgi. En ikome doŋ bino larogi i tekkere kene, kite atira bino miyo en cato atek." 
Isaiah59:17 En bino ruko kite atir calo nyonyo me geŋo kore, kede tok nyonyo me larre i wie, cuny me culo kwor bino bedo acaloboŋo aruka mere, akemo te boyo kome oko calo jor." 
Isaiah59:18 En bino culogi kite ame timgi tye kede, akemo baŋ omone mere, cul arac baŋ okworrere; cul arac baŋ lobo ame tye i dog nam." 
Isaiah59:19 Mannono bino miyo olworo nyiŋ Rwot cakere i tuŋ to, kede kwogo mere cakere i tuŋ kide; pien bino ru bino oyot calo pii amol ager, ame yamo a Rwot en akolo." 
Isaiah59:20 Rwot okobo baŋ jo mere ni, “An abino i Cion acalo ŋat ame lakorowu, wun jo a Yakobo ame oweko timo gin arac." 
Isaiah59:21 “Aco i tuŋ baŋa, man en obedo cikere ame acikere kedwu. Tekowu ame doŋ atyeko miyowu, kede koppa ame doŋ atyeko keto i dogwu, mom doŋ bino ya i dogwu, akadi i dog itinowu, onyo i dog ikwaewu, cakere tin naka waŋ i waŋ.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Ya malo ba, yin Jerucalem, pien cenni doŋ obino oko, kwogo a Rwot doŋ opelo, ocaro komi oko." 
Isaiah60:2 Nen ba, colpiny bino wumo lobo oko, mutu acol icuc bino wumo rok ocele oko, ento Rwot bino pelo te caro komi, obino neno kwogo mere i kome." 
Isaiah60:3 Orok bino bino i leroni, obakki bino bino i lero ceŋ ame opelio i komi." 
Isaiah60:4 Tiŋ waŋi malo, me iŋoloro koŋ piny, jo luŋ bino cokere karacel, te bino baŋi; awobeni bino ya i kannabor, anyirani obino tiŋo otino i kor." 
Isaiah60:5 Ibino neno, komi te ryeny aryenya, cunyi bino myel ite lelo; pien lim abup meicel me nam obino jwaŋo i ciŋi, lonyo a rok apol obino kelo baŋi," 
Isaiah60:6 Inaga ecipan bino wumi oko, itino inaga me Midian kede me Epa; anaka jo me Ceba luŋ bino bino baŋi, Gin bino kelo jabu kede luban, obino rabo pi jami abeco ame Rwot otimo." 
Isaiah60:7 Rommi luŋ me Kedar obino coko baŋi, nyogi rommi me Nebayot bino konyi; obino kelogi i wi keno lam me yala, ate gamogi, dok abino medo kwogo i kom oda me kwogo," 
Isaiah60:8 Man kara jo mene ame twarre calo pol-li, onyo calo amam ame dok i dog udigi?" 
Isaiah60:9 Pien lobo ame tye i dog nam bino kura, mele ame oya i Tarcic en ame bino telo yo, Mele-nogo bino kelo itinoni i kannabor karacel kede lonyo adwoŋ meicel, pi nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋani, ame en Ŋat Acil me Icrael, pien en doŋ oketo kwogo komi." 
Isaiah60:10 Orok bino gero apama me celli, obakkigi bino konyi i tic; pien i kare ame rik akemo omaka, agoi, cite pi ber a yie atyeko doŋ timi kica," 
Isaiah60:11 Dogcelli bino bedo twolo kare luŋ, mom obino cego dyeceŋ kede dyewor; me jo kel lonyo a rok luŋ baŋi, kun odorre dorre me kwogo karacel obakkigi." 
Isaiah60:12 Pien rok kede loc ame mom bino ye locci bino to; kodi rokkono luŋ bino balo lobogi odoco," 
Isaiah60:13 Kwogo me Lebanon bino bino baŋi, cipre kede yen abeco ocek, me miyo kabedona acil nen amwonya; dok daŋ abino miyo kabedo a tyena poŋi kwogo." 
Isaiah60:14 Itino a jo a yam owuni bino bino baŋ i aguŋo; kede jo luŋ ame yam obedo cayi obino ryebere piny i te tyeni; gin bino lwoŋi ni yin ibedo boma a Rwot, Cion ame obedo me a Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Isaiah60:15 Aco kono yam koŋ oweki ata, okweri oko, kun ŋattoro mom beo baŋi; abino miyi ibedo dit nakanaka, jo me kare luŋ bino lelo piri." 
Isaiah60:16 Ibino bedo doto cak a rok luŋ, ibino doto anaka tuno obakki. Ibino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot, an en a lari, dok an en a lakoro yin, an a Won Twero ame abedo Obaŋa a Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Akaka mola, an abino kelo jabu, akaka nyonyo, abino kelo ryal, akaka bao, abino kela mola, akaka gweŋ, abino kelo nyonyo, Abino miyo kuc en ame loi, akaka odoŋe a loo tic, kite atira en ame bino bedo nyamparani." 
Isaiah60:18 Tim me byemi mom dok bino winyere i loboni, kadi yak onyo balle a lobo i wan loboni. Ibino cako nyiŋ apama celli ni, Larre, aco dogcelli ibino lwoŋo ni, Pak." 
Isaiah60:19 Mom ceŋ en a dok bino menyi dyeceŋ, akadi lero a dwe dyewor; Rwot gire en a doŋ bino menyi nakanaka, Obaŋani en ame bino miyo ibedo kede kwogo." 
Isaiah60:20 Ceŋŋi mom dok bino poto, dwe daŋ mom bino rwenyo; pien Rwot en ame bino menyi nakanaka, kare me kumoni doŋ bino gik oko." 
Isaiah60:21 Joni luŋ bino bedo jo a kitegi atira, lobo doŋ bino dokomegi atwal; jaŋ yat ame an apito, tic ame an ikoma atio, me wek jo mia kwogo," 
Isaiah60:22 Doggola a jo mere ame nok atek bino doko atekere twal, ŋat ame jo mere tidi meicel bino doko twon rokkoro atek, An abedo Rwot; abino miyo timere oyot ka kare mere oromo." 
Isaiah61:1 Rwot Obaŋa doŋ ocwao cunye i koma, pien doŋ okwera, me ater amut aber baŋ jo ame owuno, Oora me caŋo jo ame cwercuny onuo, kede rabbi jo ame tye i opii ni obino gonyogi oko, kede baŋ jo ame otweo i buc ni obino yabigi doggola oko;" 
Isaiah61:2 dok arab pi mwaka ame Rwot bino timo iye jo ber, kede kare me culo kwor Obaŋawa: me kweyo cuny jo ame kumo." 
Isaiah61:3 Oora me miyo jo ame kumo Cion, me miyogi tok kwogo akaka buru, moo wir me yomcuny akaka kumo, ruk me pako Obaŋa akaka cuny ame goro. Obino lwoŋogi ni kworo me kite atira, yen ame Rwot opito, me wek mie kwogo." 
Isaiah61:4 Gin bino dok gero wi obur ame yam oballe con, obino dok gero oko kan ame rik oyayako, obino yikoboma luŋ ame onwoŋo oballe, i lobo onwoŋo oballe con meicel." 
Isaiah61:5 Orok bino cuŋ kun kwao rommiwu, gin daŋ en ame bino puro pottiwu kede poto olokwu;" 
Isaiah61:6 cite wun obino lwoŋowu ni olamdog a Rwot, jo bino kobo ni wun ibedo wunu otic Obaŋawa; ibino wunu camo lonyo a rok apol, ibino bedo wunu kede kwogo pi limgi-nono." 
Isaiah61:7 Akaka lewic obino miyogi abup kun odode adoda i wi wadgi, akaka alane ibino lelo wunu pi gin a doŋ bup i i ciŋwu, mannono bino miyo inwoŋo wunu lim abup i lobowu, ame ododoka adodok wiwadgi, ibino doŋ lelo wunu nakanaka." 
Isaiah61:8 Rwot okobo ni, “An amaro ŋolo kop atira, adag yak kede tim arac; abino culo waŋ can ame opoto komgi kakare, abino cikere kedgi i cikere ame perakino nakanaka." 
Isaiah61:9 Ikwaegi bino ŋeye atek i akina orok, nyiŋ jo ame oya i komgi bino rwo i akina rok luŋ; ŋattoro keken ame bino nenogi, bino niaŋ i komgi, ni gin obedo rok ame Rwot omio gum.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Jerucalem bino lelo meicel i Rwot, cunye bino bedo yom i kom Obaŋa mere; pien oruke kede boŋŋi me larre owume kede jor aber me kite atira, acalo anyom ame orukere aber tok kwogo, dok acalo ater a ame orukere ruk me wel." 
Isaiah61:11 Pien kite acalo jami apapat ru lobo, dok poto daŋ mio gin ame ocoo iye tu, amannono daŋ Rwot Obaŋa bino miyo kite atira, kede pak tu i nyim rok luŋ." 
Isaiah62:1 Mom gira abino liŋ pi Cion, mom daŋ abino weo pire en Jerucalem, tuno ka loccere doŋ ocaro piny calo lero a ceŋ, dok larrere daŋ doŋ omenyo piny calo mac." 
Isaiah62:2 Rok luŋ bino neno locci, yin Jerucalem obakki luŋ bino neno kwogoni; obino lwoŋi kede nyiŋ anyen ame Rwot i kome bino tuco." 
Isaiah62:3 Yin ibino bedo calo tok kwogo ame tye i ciŋ Rwot, ame nyuto dittere dok ibino bedo acalo tok kwogo ame nyuto loc Obaŋani." 
Isaiah62:4 Mom doŋ obino medde lwoŋi ni, “Boma a doŋ oweko,” loboni daŋ mom obino lwoŋo ni, “Dako ame oweko”, ento obino lwoŋi ni, “Dako ame cunya yom i kome”; kun loboni olwoŋo ni dako ame onyomo; pien Rwot cunye yom i komi dok en bino bedo calo cwar loboni," 
Isaiah62:5 Pien kite acalo awobi nyomo nyako, awobeni daŋ bino nyomi kittono, dok kit acalo anyom lelo pi atera, amannono daŋ Obaŋani bino lelo piri." 
Isaiah62:6 Yin Jerucalem ba, oketo okurpiny i wi celli malo; gin mom bino liŋ kadi acel dyeceŋ kede dyewor. Wun jo ame poyo Rwot, mom iwe wunu," 
Isaiah62:7 dok daŋ mom imie wunu kare me weo, tuno ka en omio Jerucalem odoko tek, omio odoko gin ame opako i wi lobo." 
Isaiah62:8 Rwot doŋ otyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ atek meicel, kun kwoŋo i bade me twer, ni, “Mom dok abino miyo kaili bedo me acama okworri, orok mom dok bino mato koŋo olok ame ilolle kede;" 
Isaiah62:9 ento jo ame okao bino camo te pako Rwot, jo ame opwono olok bino mato koŋo mere i dyekalla acil.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Be wunu, be wunu i dogcel, yik wunu yo pi lwak, Tor wunu, tor wunu gudo oko, kwakwanyo wunu gweŋe oko iye, tiŋ wunu bendera malo pi rok luŋ," 
Isaiah62:11 Koŋ inen wunu, Rwot doŋ orabo kop naka i agikki lobo ni, “Kobbi wunu boma me Cion ni, Nen ba, larreni doŋ tye abino; mottere tye gire baŋe, jo ame olwenyo pire tye is nyime.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Obino lwoŋo ni, Rok acil, Jo ame Rwot olakoro; dok daŋ obino lwoŋi ni, Boma ame Rwot omaro, ame mom oweko ata." 
Isaiah63:1 Man kara ŋa ame ya i Edommie, kede i Bojra ame oruko boŋŋi arema, ame oruko ruk me kwogo, kun yon i wot i twon tekomere adwoŋ cae? “An ennono, arabbo pi loyo kop, an atek, ame atwero laro jo.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Piŋo kara rukki rema, kun boŋŋoni calo me a ŋat a nyono olok?" 
Isaiah63:3 “An anyono olok an kena, kun ŋattoro ame oya rok ocele mom tye baŋa; ajejebogi akemo meicel; remogi okikira i boŋona meicel, omio rukka luŋ ocido oko," 
Isaiah63:4 Pien nino me culo kwor onwoŋo tye i cunya, mwaka me lakoro jona doŋ oromo oko." 
Isaiah63:5 Aŋoloro piny, ate nwoŋo ni mom tye ŋattoro ame twero konya, awuro meicel, cite mom tye ŋattoro ame twero miya teko; mannono omio ciŋa an ikoma en omio aloo loc, akemona en omio anwoŋo teko," 
Isaiah63:6 Akemo rik omio ajejebo rok piny, iniga omio amiogi okakomeicel, aonyo remogi piny i lobo.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Abino dok kwano mar a Rwot a mom lokere, abino doŋ rabo pi jami abeco ame Rwot otimo, kun lubere i ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot otimo pirwa, kede twon ber adwoŋ meicel ame en onyuto baŋ jo Icrael, ame en otimo pirgi kun lubo kica mere, kite ame twon marrere a mom lokere tye kede." 
Isaiah63:8 Pien en okobo ni, “Ateni, gin gire obedo jona”, itino ame mom bino bwola; en te doko Alargi." 
Isaiah63:9 I cangi luŋ, en daŋ oneno iye can; en ikome olarogi pe okwena moro kadi omalaika. En olakorogi i marrere kede i kica mere, en otiŋogi, te bedo byelogi nino i nino i kare acon," 
Isaiah63:10 Ento gin ojem, omio akemo omako Cuny Acil; mannono omio Rwot odoko akworgi, olokere te lweny kedgi." 
Isaiah63:11 Gin dok te po pi kare acon, i kare a Muca, amiro a Rwot, ote penyo ni, “Ŋat ame rik okwanyo okwat rommi mere i nam tye kara kwene? Ŋat a rik oketo Cuny Acil i akinagi tye kara kwene?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ŋat a rik omio ciŋe me kwogo, owoto i ŋet Muca tuŋ cem, ame omio pii opokere i dul aryo i nyimgi me miye nwoŋo nyiŋ ame perakino nakanaka, ame otelogi obeo i dye nam atut?”" 
Isaiah63:13 Mom ogatte kadi acel, calo aguragura ame woto dye tim," 
Isaiah63:14 Cunya Rwot omiogi weo, calo dok ame otuno i luŋ. Rik itelo joni kittono, me inwoŋ kede nyiŋ me kwogo. Kwac pi kica kede kony" 
Isaiah63:15 Kul waŋi inen piny i wi polo, ame en kabedoni acil me kwogo. Arimani kede twer tye kara kwene? Mar meri kede kicani tye kwene ba? Tim ber kur ikwerwa ba." 
Isaiah63:16 Pien yin gire ibedo Papawa, kadi bed Iburaim mom ŋeowa, dok Icrael daŋ mom ŋeo ni wan obedo ikwae; yin Rwot gire ibedo papawa, yin ibedo ŋat ame lakorowa cakere yam con." 
Isaiah63:17 Piŋo kara imiowa ogak oko i yoni, Ama Rwot? Piŋo kara imiowa odoko jo ame nwaŋ kun mom olwori? Dwog baŋwa pi jo ame tio piri, pi itekere luŋ ame obedo megi yin i komi." 
Isaiah63:18 Kabedoni acil obedo baŋ joni kare anok meicel, okworwa doŋ otyeko jejebo oko i tyengi," 
Isaiah63:19 Wan dok odoko calo jo ame yam mom iloo, ocalo doŋ jo ame mom olwoŋo kede nyiŋi." 
Isaiah64:1 Kono iyeco polo oko ite yitto piny! Kono omio kiddi oyeŋere i nyimi. 
Isaiah64:2 Kite acalo mac moko i yen, dok mio daŋ pii walo, me nyiŋi ŋeye baŋ okworri, dok rok luŋ daŋ komgi myel i nyimi!" 
Isaiah64:3 Kare ame rik itimo gigi mogo iyiliyili ame wan mom oromo tamo pire, rik yin ibino piny, kiddi te yeŋere i nyimi." 
Isaiah64:4 Cakere gire con meicel ŋattoro gire mom ogiporo, ŋattoro mom owinyo kede yite, ŋattoro daŋ mom oneno Obaŋa moro apat kono yin keni, Obaŋa ame tio tic luŋ pi jo ame kure." 
Isaiah64:5 Yin irwatte i ŋat ame tio tic atira i yomcuny, jo ame po piri i yoni luŋ, Nen ba, yin rik akemo omaki i komwa, cite wan omedde ameda i timo bal, obedo timo bal pi kare alac meicel, doŋ wan obino larre ateni?" 
Isaiah64:6 Wan doŋ odoko jo ame cik ogeŋo, ginnoro luŋ ame wan otimo ame wan oneno ni atira rom gire aroma i boŋo ame ocido oko i gigi mogo me kwer. Wan luŋ doŋ oner oko calo pot yat, timwa areco doŋ kolowa calo yamo," 
Isaiah64:7 Ŋattoro ame lwoŋo nyiŋi mom tye kadi acel, ame cukere kene me maki; pien doŋ ikanne giri oko i baŋwa, imiowa doŋ i ciŋ timwa areco me loyowa," 
Isaiah64:8 Kadi amannono, yin i Rwot gire ibedo Papawa; wan obedo lobo, yin en icweowa; wan luŋ obedo gin ame yin itio." 
Isaiah64:9 Kur imi akemo maki atek ate ka, Ama Rwot, kur daŋ ibed poyo balwa nakanaka, Koŋ inen, ipar, wan luŋ obedo joni," 
Isaiah64:10 Bomani acil luŋ doŋ odoko tim, Cion doŋ odoko tim oko, Jerucalem doŋ odoŋ kene ata." 
Isaiah64:11 Odwa acil, aber meicel, kan ame rik kwariwa paki iye, obin owaŋo oko i mac; kabedo luŋ ame rik yomoro cunywa doŋ odoko wi obur." 
Isaiah64:12 Ibino diyo cunyi i kom jami magi luŋ, Ama Rwot? Ibino liŋ aliŋa, kun iwunowa atek ateka?" 
Isaiah65:1 Rik ayikere me gamo kop a jo ame kwaa, cite naka mom okwaa gigi. Ayikere-gu ni gin myero nwoŋa, cite naka mom otemo yenya. Akobbigi ni, “An ene, an en kan,” akobo baŋ rok ame onwoŋo mom doŋ lwoŋo nyiŋa." 
Isaiah65:2 Abedo ryeyo ciŋa dyeceŋ benebene baŋ jo ame jem ajema, jo ame woto i yo a mom ber kadi acel, kun olubo gigi ryekogi kengi." 
Isaiah65:3 Gin bedo miyo akemo maka kare i kare, kun obedo miyo motgi me yalo jogi i potti, owaŋo-gu odok akur i kom matafali;" 
Isaiah65:4 obedo bedo-gu i lyel, eka dyewor ote bedo kabedo mogo me imun; obedo camo-gu riŋo puno, jami me tedogi luŋ tye iye pig riŋo leyi ame okwero." 
Isaiah65:5 Gin jo ame kobo ni, “Bed teŋe kuno, kur ibin baŋa, pien an opoka oko pi obaŋana.” Jo man kom calo yito i wuma, ocalo mac ame mom to kadi acel." 
Isaiah65:6 Nen ba, otyeko doŋ coyo i nyima ni, “An gire mom abino liŋ aliŋa, ento abino culo. Ateteni abino culogi gire, timgi areco karacel kede me a kwarigi, Rwot okobo;" 
Isaiah65:7 pien gin obedo waŋo odok akur i wi kiddi, obedo yetta-gu i wi tur luŋ; abino poro culgi oromogi, abino culogi pi balgi acon.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Rwot okobo ni, “Kite acalo koŋo olok nwoŋere kede i nyig olok, dok jo okobo ni, ‘Kur ibal oko, pien gum tye iye’, abino timo daŋ amannono pi omirona, mom abino tyekogi luŋ," 
Isaiah65:9 Abino miyo ikwae ya kom Yakobo, kede jo ame bino leyo wi kiddina luŋ ya i Juda; jona ame ayero bino leyo me bedo megi, omirona bino bedo kuno," 
Isaiah65:10 Caron bino doko ka kwayo rommi, luŋ me Akor bino bedo me buto a dok, bino bedo me a jona ame obedo yenya." 
Isaiah65:11 Ento wun ame doŋ ityeko weko wunu Rwot, ame wiwu doŋ owil oko i kom kiddina acil, ame yikomeja a jok me winyo, ame piko koŋo orubo poŋ ikopo pi jo amio gum," 
Isaiah65:12 wun ibino to wunu i pala lweny, wun luŋ ibino guŋu wunu aguŋa ka aŋolo ŋutwu, pien i kare ame alwoŋowu, ikwero gamo wunu oko, i kare ame an abedo kop, mom iciko wunu yitwu iye, ento ibedo timo wunu gin anen arac inyima, iyero wunu gin ame mom yomoro cunya.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Nen ba, omirona bino cem, cite wun kec bino nekowu; omirona bino mato pii, ento wun oryo pii bino cirowu; omirona bino lelo, cite wun obino miyo lewic makowu;" 
Isaiah65:14 yomcuny bino miyo omirona wero, ento wun wancuny bino miyo ikok wunu, cwercuny bino miyo iredo wunu i koko," 
Isaiah65:15 Nyinwu bino doŋ baŋ jona ame ayero calo gi-ceno jo, Rwot Obaŋa gire en abino nekowu; ento omiro mere, en bino lwoŋogi i nyiŋ apat." 
Isaiah65:16 Pi mannono, ka ce ŋattoro lamo gum i kome kene i lobo, bino lamo gum i kome kene i nyiŋ Obaŋa me ateni, dok ŋat ame bino kwoŋo kwoŋ i lobo man, bino kwoŋ i nyiŋ Obaŋa me ateni; pien wiwu doŋ bino wil oko i kom can ame ineno wunu con, bino doŋ rwenyo oko i wiwu.”" 
Isaiah65:17 Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Pien, nen ba, aketo polo anyen kede lobo anyen; mom dok obino po pi jami acon, mom daŋ bino riŋo i wi ŋattoro." 
Isaiah65:18 Cite myero cunywu bed ayom kun ilelo wunu nakanaka, i kom jami ame aketo-nono; pien, nen ba, Jerucalem ame aketo bino bedo me yomcuny, jo mere daŋ bino bedo kede lelo." 
Isaiah65:19 Abino lelo i Jerucalem, cunya bino bedo yom i kom jona; dwonnoro me koko mom dok bino winyere iye, akadi koko moro me can," 
Isaiah65:20 Atinnoro ame onywalo te ri kare anonok mom bino bedo tye iye, akadi adwoŋŋoro ame mom bino cobo kare mere kakare; atin bino to ame mwaka mere doŋ oromo mia acel, abalo ame mwaka mere bino romo mia acel, nwoŋo oceno acena." 
Isaiah65:21 Jo bino gero udigi ote daŋ bedo iye, obino puro poto olokgi ote daŋ camo nyige." 
Isaiah65:22 Mom obino gero udigi eka ŋat acele en ate bedo iye, mom obino puro poto olokgi eka ŋat ocele en a te camo. Jona bino perakino ame romo aroma i yat, jona ame ayero bino bilo tic me ciŋgi kare alac," 
Isaiah65:23 Ŋattoro i akinagi mom bino yelle i tic nono, akadi nywalo atin pi neno can; pien gin bino bedo itino a jo ame Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo gum, kun gumgi-nono kwako naka itinogi." 
Isaiah65:24 Ame mom ru gin olwoŋo, an abino gamo doggi, kun mom ru okobo kopporo, an abino winyo kopgi." 
Isaiah65:25 Epet kede atin romo bino cem karacel, eŋatu obino pito paco calo twon; twol bino camo apua. I wi kidina acil luŋ, awano onyo anek mom bino bedo tye iye.”" 
Isaiah66:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Polo obedo kom me locca, lobo te bedo kom me to na tyena. Kara kit ot aŋo ame itwero gero wunu pira? Kara ka weona twero bedo kwene?" 
Isaiah66:2 Jami magi luŋ ciŋa en otio, mannono omio jami magi luŋ obedo mega, Man en kit dano ame abino ciko waŋa i kome, ŋat ame mwol, ame ŋut i cunye, dok ame kome myel i kop ame an akobo." 
Isaiah66:3 “Ŋat ame neko twon, rom aroma i ŋat ame neko dano; ŋat ame mio romo acalo mot aŋola, rom aroma i ŋat ame turo ŋut gwok; ŋat ame yalo Obaŋa i mot me moko kwon, rom a aroma i ŋat ame mio remo a puno; ŋat ame waŋo luban acalo mot me po, rom aroma i ŋat ame woro cal jok. Jo magi doŋ oyero yogi kengi, olelo gigi alela i timgi me ipyeda." 
Isaiah66:4 An daŋ abino yero can aber pirgi, abino yero en ame miogi lworo; pien i kare ame rik alwoŋogi, ŋattoro mom ogamo doga, i kare ame akobo kedgi, ŋattoro mom owinyo koppa; cite gin otimo gin anen arac i nyima, oyero gin ame mom yomoro cunya.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Winy wunu kop a Rwot, wun jo ame komwu myel koppere, “Omegowu ame dagowu, ame oryemowu oko teŋe pi nyiŋa, doŋ okobo ni, ‘Koŋ iwek doŋ mi kwogo baŋ Rwot’; me koŋ onen yomcunywu; ento gin en ame obino miyo lewic makogi." 
Isaiah66:6 Koŋ iwiny wunu wo ame tye i boma, dwonnoro ame ya i ot Obaŋa! Dwon Rwot ennono, ame tye ka culo okworrere." 
Isaiah66:7 “Ame mom ru owinyo rem me nywal, en te nywal gire oko; kun rem me nywal mom ru ogoe, en onywalo atin awobi." 
Isaiah66:8 Ŋa ame yam koŋ owinyo kodi ginnono? Ŋa ame yam koŋ oneno kodi ginnono? Obino nywalo lobo i nino acel keken? Otwero nywalo rok luŋ i dakika moro keken? Pien i kare ame rem pwod ogoo Cion agoa, en te nywalo itino mere oko." 
Isaiah66:9 Itamo ni abino tero jona i kare me nywal eka mom ate miyo nywalogi? An ame amio jo nywal abino cego ot nyodo oko? Rwot okobo. 
Isaiah66:10 “Lel wunu karacel kede Jerucalem, cunywu bed ayom pire, wun jo luŋ ame imare wunu; lel wunu karacel kede yomcuny, wun jo luŋ ame kumo pire;" 
Isaiah66:11 me idot wunu tuno mere kwe cunywu, calo atin ame doto tuno a tottere, me imwonyomwonyo wunu cakkere i yomcuny, pien cak dwoŋ meicel i kore.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Pien Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino nyayo kuc baŋe calo kulo, kede lonyo orok calo kulo ame opoŋ meicel; ibino dote wunu, en te tiŋowu i laŋete, dok ibino tuko wunu i tyene." 
Isaiah66:13 Abino kweyo cunywu, calo atin ame tottere kweo cunye; cunywu bino kwe i Jerucalem" 
Isaiah66:14 Ibino neno wunu, cunywu te bedo yom; komwu bino bedo ayot calo lum a pwod alot alota; mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni, Rwot konyo jo ame tio pire ento akemo mere tye i kom okworrere." 
Isaiah66:15 “Pien ba, Rwot bino bino i mac, kun gadigadi mere luŋ dwir calo yamo ajuru; me coro akemo mere i komgi i twon iniga adwoŋ meicel, dok kun jukogi i leb mac." 
Isaiah66:16 Pien Rwot bino ŋolli jo kop me mac, en bino tyeko kop a jo luŋ i pala lweny; jo ame Rwot bino neko bino bedo apol.”" 
Isaiah66:17 Rwot okobo ni, “Jo ame olonyere kengi me wot i potti, kun lubo dano acel ame tye i dyere, ame camo riŋo puno kede gigi mogo me kwer kede oyoo, gin luŋ obino tum karacel awaŋe acel.”" 
Isaiah66:18 “Pien an aŋeo ticgi kede tamgi, an abino bino me coko rok luŋ ame kobo leb apapat karacel; gin bino bino te bino neno kwogona," 
Isaiah66:19 an abino keto anyut i akinagi. Iyi akinagi kannono, abino cwayo jo ame obwot baŋ orok, baŋ Tarcic, Put kede Lud, ame gin jo ame wao akud atero, baŋ Tubal kede Javan, baŋ lobo ame tye i dog nam kannabor, ame mom ru owinyo kite a nyiŋa orwo kede, akadi neno kwogona; gin bino rabo pi kwogona i akina orok." 
Isaiah66:20 Gin bino kelo omegowu i akina rok luŋ acalo mot me yalo Rwot, kun okelogi aguragura, gadigadi, alago, kanne kede inaga, naka i kidina acil ame tye i Jerucalem, kite ame jo Icrael kela kede motgi me moko kwon i tabo acil, i ot a Rwot." 
Isaiah66:21 Dok jo ocele i akinagi abino kwanyo me bedo olamdog kede jo Levi.” 
Isaiah66:22 “Pien kite acalo polo anyen kede lobo anyen ame abino tiyo, bino ri i nyima, Ikwaewu kede nyiŋwu daŋ bino ri kittono." 
Isaiah66:23 Por dwe, i por dwe, cabit, i cabit, jo luŋ bino i nyima me wora." 
Isaiah66:24 “Gin te wot me wot neno kom jo oto ame yam onwoŋo ojem i koma; pien kudi i kuno mom to, mac iye mom daŋ to, gin doŋ bino bedo gin ame yi jo luŋ okwero.” Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah1:1 Man kop a Jeremia wot a Kilikia, ame en dano acel i akina olamdog ame onwoŋo tye i Anatot i lobo a jo Benjamin." 
Jeremiah1:2 Kop a Rwot obino baŋe i mwaka me apar wie adek me loc abaka Yocia wot Amon, abaka me Juda." 
Jeremiah1:3 Kop a Rwot obino baŋe daŋ i kare abaka Yekoyakim wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda naka iyi agikki mwaka me apar wie acel me loc a Jedekia wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda, tuno kede naka i dwe me abic ame otero iye jo i Jerucalem oko iyi opii." 
Jeremiah1:4 I kare-nono kop a Rwot obino baŋa kun kobba ni," 
Jeremiah1:5 Kun mom ru acako keti iyi totti, onwoŋo doŋ an aŋei, dok kun mom ru onywali, onwoŋo doŋ akweri oko pi tiyo ticca; ayeri me bedo adwarpiny baŋ rok ducu." 
Jeremiah1:6 An ate gamo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa! Koŋ inen an mom aŋeo kop, pien pwod atidi." 
Jeremiah1:7 Cite Rwot dok te gamo ni, “Kur ikob ni, ‘An pwod atidi;’ pien ibino wot baŋ jo luŋ ame abino cwayi baŋgi, dok gin ame abino kobo ni ikobi, ibino gire kobo," 
Jeremiah1:8 Kur ilworgi, pien an atye kedi me konyi, man kop a Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Rwot te ru cwayo ciŋe gudo doga, te kobba ni, “Nen ba, doŋ atyeko keto koppa i dogi," 
Jeremiah1:10 Nen, tin doŋ atyeko keti me rabo kop Obaŋa baŋ rok apapat kede baŋ loc apapat, me puto kede mu ko amuka, me balo kede reto piny, me gero kede pito.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Kop a Rwot te bino baŋa kun penya ni, “Jeremia ineno ŋo?” An ate gamo ni, “Atye ka neno yao.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Rwot te kobba ni, “Ineno kara aber, pien atye ka neno koppa, amito ni ti ticcere cobi.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Kop a Rwot dok te dok bino baŋa tyen me aryo, kun penya ni, “Ineno ŋo?” An ate gamo ni, “Aneno gulu ame pii tye awalo i yie, kun doge owirre teŋe i tutuŋ anyarodi.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Rwot te kobba ni, “Gin arac bino ya i tutuŋ anyarodi ame bino poto i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo." 
Jeremiah1:15 Nen ba, an atye ka lwoŋo atekere apapat ame tye i te loc luŋ ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, Rwot okobo; gin luŋ obino bino, ŋat acel acel i akinagi te keto kom loccere i doggola me Jerucalem, kun oguro cellere oko me lweny i kome, me lweny i kom boma luŋ me Juda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Dok an abino ŋolo kop i kom jo me Juda pi timgi arac luŋ me kwera. Gin doŋ obedo waŋo odok a ŋwece kur baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele, kun daŋ oworo gin ame gin ame gin otio kede ciŋgi." 
Jeremiah1:17 Cite yin, myero idi cunyi iya malo me ikobbigi kop ducu ame abino ciki kede. Myero cunyi kur pot pirgi, naka mio abalo cunyi i nyimgi kuno." 
Jeremiah1:18 Nen ba, an tin abino miyo ibedo calo cel ame gero atek meicel, acalo pagi me nyonyo, dok acalo apama me mola, ame twero cuŋ i nyim jo me lobo man ducu, i ciŋ obakki me Juda oloccere, olamdoggere, karacel kede jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo man." 
Jeremiah1:19 Gin bino lweny kedi, cite mom obino loyi, pien an atye kedi me lari.” Man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Jeremiah2:1 Kop a Rwot obino baŋa kun kobba ni," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Wot irab kop man baŋ jo me Jerucalem, me gin owiny. Rwot okobo ni, Atye ka poyo kite a rik imiye kede baŋa i kare me tinoni, marri onwoŋo calo me atera, kite ame rik ibedo luba kede tim, i lobo a mom ocoo iye kotimoro," 
Jeremiah2:3 Icrael rik onwoŋo cil pi Rwot, acalo cam ogeo cek ame en okao. Jo luŋ ame camo odoko obal, gin arac poto i komgi, Man kop a Rwot ikokome.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Wun jo me ot a Yakobo, winy wunu kop a Rwot, kede jo luŋ me doggola a jo Icrael." 
Jeremiah2:5 Rwot okobo ni, “Gin aŋo arac ame rik kwariwu oneno atimo, ame te miyo weka oko, ote wot abor abora keda-ni, ote bedo lubo gigi mogo a konygi mom-mi? ame te miyogi daŋ doko jo a konygi mom-mi?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Mom daŋ doŋ openyo ni, ‘Rwot kara tye kwene ba, Rwot ame okwanyowa i lobo Miciri, ame obedo telowa i tim, lobo otal dok bur dwon iye, lobo ame otwo dok acol icuc, i lobo ame ŋattoro mom onwoŋo bea iye, kan ame jo mom bedo iye?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Rik ate kelowu i lobo ame ceko cam atek meicel, me iyomoro wunu cunywu i cam iye kede jami luŋ abeco ame tye iye. Cite i kare ame wun ituno wunu iye, wun ite balo wunu lobo-nono oko, te loko wunu gira doko gin me kwer." 
Jeremiah2:8 Olamdog daŋ mom openyo ni, ‘Rwot kara tye kwene?’ Wegi cik daŋ onwoŋo mom nea, oloc daŋ onwoŋo tye turo cik i koma, odwarpiny doŋ tyeto tyet nyiŋ Baal, ote bedo lubo gigi mogo ame konygi mom." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Mannono omio pwod atye ka penyowu, Rwot okobo, abino penyo naka ikwaewu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Koŋ idokoro nam ikat i dog kulo me Kupuro me inen, on yo koŋ icwa dano i Kedar me wot ŋi aber, koŋ inen ka ce kodi ginnono tye." 
Jeremiah2:11 Koŋ tye rokkoro ame oloko obaŋegi kadi bed gin woro obaŋa a mom obaŋa i kome Cite jona oloko kwogogi oko pi gin ame konnyere mom. 
Jeremiah2:12 Yin polo, wur kop man, koyo myero onyere i komi, kun lworo ociri oko, man kop a Rwot okobo," 
Jeremiah2:13 pien jona doŋ otyeko timo bal aryo areco, gin doŋ otyeko weka oko, kun an abedo akoŋ me pii me kwo, gin doŋ oluŋyo kunyo piigi kengi, piigi-nono obedo pii ame balle oko ame pii kare ocele dwono oko." 
Jeremiah2:14 “Icrael obedo opii bo? En obedo amiro ame onywalo paco bo? Kara en dok odoko lee me acama i yore aŋo? 
Jeremiah2:15 Eŋatu doŋ kok apol ata i kome, okok i dwongi aloŋo meicel. Omio lobo mere doŋ odoŋ oko nono, boma iye luŋ doŋ odoko wi obur, jo moro doŋ mom tye iye." 
Jeremiah2:16 Medo i kom mannono, jo Mempic kede jo Tapanac, doŋ otuco wii oko." 
Jeremiah2:17 Mom yin en ikelo can man i komi keni, pi weko Rwot Obaŋani, i kare ame yam en obedo telowu i tim?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Kara am an doŋ ŋo ame inwoŋo wunu pi wot i Miciri, me wot mato pii i kulo Nail? Onyo ŋo ame inwoŋo wunu pi wot i Accuria, me wot mato pii i kulo Epurate?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Balwu en ame bino pwodowu, gak weko Obaŋa en ame bino kela can i komwu me pwonyowu. Myero inen dok iŋe ni gin arac kede gin a kelo cwercuny, pi wun me weko Rwot Obaŋawu; lworo i kom Obaŋa mom doŋ tye i cunywu. Man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa me mony okobo." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Ituro wunu kol oko ŋutwu con meicel, icodo wunu daŋ nyor ame otweowu kede oko; ite kobo wunu ni, ‘Mom abino tic pire.’ Aco kono i wi kidi luŋ aluŋa, kede i te yen obuŋere ducu, ibedo ryebere wunu piny calo alaya." 
Jeremiah2:21 Aco an yam onwoŋo apitowu me bedo olok amittere, ame nyige luŋ beco odoco. Kara dok ilokere wunu i yore aŋo ba, en ame doŋ idoko wunu olok me tim oko-ni?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Kadi bed ilwok komwu i cabun agwa meicel, kadi ilwokere wunu i cabun ame bwo mere dwoŋ nwoŋo pwod atye ka neno cila me balwu. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Jeremiah2:23 Itwero kobo wunu nino ni, ‘Wan giwa mom ojebere i bal, mom giwa obedo lubo Baal’? Koŋ inen yo ame ibedo lubo wunu i luŋ ŋe gin ame ibedo wunu timo, icalo wunu atin inaga ame lubo yo mere kene," 
Jeremiah2:24 calo kana me tim ame doŋ ona gire me bedo i tim, ame wao yamo i wume kun nwoŋo amito twon! Ŋa ame twero juko miti mere? Jo luŋ ame yenye myero kur ol, gin bino nwoŋe i dwe mere i kome," 
Jeremiah2:25 Gwok tyeni kur iwot aboŋo amuk, gwok dwoni kur two oko pi oryo pii. Cite yin giri ikobo ni, ‘Konnyere gire mom, pien an doŋ amaro obaŋe ame wele, dok daŋ abino medde lubogi.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Kite acalo lewic mako akwo ka omako, lewic daŋ bino mako jo me ot Icrael kittono; gin ikomgi, obakkigi kede olocgi, olamdoggi kede odwarpingi," 
Jeremiah2:27 ame kobbi yat ni, ‘Yin ibedo pappa,’ dok kobbi gweŋ ni, ‘Yin en inywala’, pien gin doŋ oloka ŋegi, mom nyimgi, Ento i kare me can gin dokokobo ni, ‘Ya malo me ilarwa!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Kara obaŋewu-nono tye kwene obaŋewu ame wun i komwu itimo wunu-nono? Koŋ gin oya malo ka ce otwero larowu, i kare ame itye wunu kede peko; pien kite ame bomawu pol kede, obaŋewu daŋ pol kittono, wun jo Juda." 
Jeremiah2:29 Rwot okobo ni, Piŋo kara itye ka ŋuŋura i koma? Wun luŋ ijem wunu i koma." 
Jeremiah2:30 Pwodo itinowu ame yam apwodo mom okonyo kadi acel, kitegi mom oyikere; pala romowu en oneko odwarpinywu, calo eŋatu ame owor." 
Jeremiah2:31 Doŋ ba, wun jo me kare man, winy wunu kop a Rwot. An onwoŋo abedo calo tim bo baŋ jo Icrael? Onyo twon lobo moro acol icuc? Kara doŋ piŋo jona kobo ni, ‘Wan giwa obino bedo kite ame yiwa mito, wan mom dok obino dwogo baŋi?’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Wi nyako twero wil i rukkere me kwogo, onyo wi atera twera wil i gomici mere me nyom? Ento wi jona doŋ owil i koma oko, pi kare alac ame mom doŋ romo kwannere." 
Jeremiah2:33 “Wun doŋ odiro meicel yenyo dyere, me timo tim me alaya! Omio kadi baŋ mon areco, wun ipwonyogi me lubo kitewu." 
Jeremiah2:34 Dok bono ame iruko i komi, remo ocan a mom i bal tye iye; yam mom inwonogi otye oturo ot acalo okwo, kadi amannono, i kom kop magi luŋ," 
Jeremiah2:35 yin ikobo ni, ‘Balla moro mom; akemo mere gire doŋ otyeko ya oko i koma.’ Nen ba, abino ŋolli kop, pi kobo ni, ‘An gira mom atimo bal.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Piŋo kara itye ka wot atata, idok tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi! Jo Miciri bino miyo lewic maki, kite ame rik jo Acuria omio lewic omaki kede," 
Jeremiah2:37 Ibino ya i kuno me dwogo cen, kun ikwako wi i, pien Rwot otyeko kwero ja ame igeno-nono, dok gin pe twero miyo ibedo aber.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Ka ce lo moro oryemo cege oko, dako-nono daŋ te wot oko, en te wot gero lo ocele, cware me agege-ni pwod dok bino dok baŋe? Mom bino miyo lobo-nono balle miecel? Yin doŋ ityeko timo tim me alaya i co apol, pwod dok iromo dwogo baŋa?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Koŋ itiŋ waŋi malo me inen wi tur kan a tye nono ca! Kara ka kwene i kuno ame mom obuto kedi? I bedo kuro jo ame bu to kedi i ŋet yo ducu, calo Arab ame k uro jo i dye tim ata, Yin doŋ ityeko balo lobo oko, kede timmi me alaya alaya." 
Jeremiah3:3 Mannono en omio ojuko anaka kot oko, kot me cwir daŋ doŋ mom cwe; cite yin pwod imoro waŋi amora i tim me alaya, lewic-gu mom maki." 
Jeremiah3:4 Mom aman yin ilwoŋa ni, ‘Pappa, yin ibedo awota cakere itinona," 
Jeremiah3:5 Akemo bino make nakanaka, cunye bino waŋ naka i agikki?’ Nen ba, yin ikobo, cite yin doŋ ityeko timo kit bal luŋ ame itwero.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 I kare abaka Yocia, Rwot okobba ni, “Ineno gin ame Icrael ame mom gene obino timo, kite ame en obedo wot kede i kabedo luŋ obedo kidikidi, kede i te yen obuŋere luŋ, te bedo timo tim me alaya kuno?" 
Jeremiah3:7 An atamo ni ka en doŋ otyeko timo magi-nono luŋ, en bino dwogo baŋa: cite en naka mom odwogo aminnere Juda ame agoba-ni te daŋ neno timmere-nono." 
Jeremiah3:8 Kadi bed Juda oneno ni Icrael ame mom genne-ca obedo timo tim me alaya i nyima, en gin omio ate ryeme oko i nyima kun daŋ amie waraga me aryemo; cite en Juda ame agoba-ni mom obedo kede lworo moro, en daŋ owoto te wot timo tim me alaya alaya." 
Jeremiah3:9 Pien tim me alaya onwoŋo obedo gin ame yot meicel baŋe, omio en daŋ obalo lobo oko, kun bedo cot i gweŋe kede yen." 
Jeremiah3:10 Kadi bed magi luŋ otimere cite aminnere Juda ame ago ba-ca mom omedo i dwogo cen i cunye ducu, ento odwogo i nyima kede kome keken kun cunye tye kan ocele, man kop a Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Icrael ame mom genne-ni ballere nok ame kato me a Juda ame agoba-ni," 
Jeremiah3:12 Wot irab kop magi tutuŋ anyarodi, kun ikobo ni, Dwog ba cen, yin Icrael ame mom igenne-ni, man kop a Rwot. Mom abino neni i wan me akemo pien en akica, man kop a Rwot. Akemo mom bino bedo maka nakanaka," 
Jeremiah3:13 Myero iye ni ibalo, myero iŋe ni ijem i kom Rwot Obaŋani i te wot miye keni baŋ obaŋe orok i te yen obuŋere ducu, dok myero iye ni mom ibedo winyo koppa, man kop a Rwot;" 
Jeremiah3:14 Dwog wunu cen, wun itino ame mom genne, pien an en abedo adwoŋwu; abino kwanyowu, kun akwanyo dano acel i boma moro-ni, ŋat ocele i doggola moro-ni, eka ate kelowu naka i Cion." 
Jeremiah3:15 “ ‘Abino miyowu okwat ame yomoro cunya, ame bino pitowu i ŋec kede niaŋ." 
Jeremiah3:16 I kare ame doŋ inya imedde wunu i lobo, i kare-naca, Rwot okobo, gin mom dok bino kobo kop i kom canduk me cikere a Rwot. Mom dok bino ŋiŋŋo i cuny dano moro, mom daŋ obino poyo, mom daŋ ibino yiko wunu en ocele." 
Jeremiah3:17 I kare-naca obino lwoŋo Jerucalem ni obedo kom loc a Rwot, rok luŋ bino cokere iye kuno, i nyim Rwot i Jerucalem, mom dok obino medde bedo apala, kun olubo tam arac i cunygi." 
Jeremiah3:18 I kare-naca jo me ot a Juda bino ribere oko i jo me ot Icrael, eka gin luŋ karacel ote ya i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, ote wot i lobo ame rik omio baŋ kwarigi me alea me bedo meggi." 
Jeremiah3:19 Abedo tamo kite ame abino ketowu kede i akina itinorra, kun miogi lobo ame yomoro cunywu, lobo me alea aber ame kato me a rok ocele luŋ. Abedo tamo ni wun ibino lwoŋa wunu ru an abedo Papawu, dok mom ibino weko wunu lubba." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ateteni, dako a mom geno cware weko cware oko, amannono daŋ wun onwoŋo mom igena wunu, wun jo me ot Icrael, man kop a Rwot.’ ”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Dwon ŋattoro ame akok tye awinyere i wi tur kannaler malo, ikwae me Icrael tye kok kun obako doggi, pien otyeko gak oko i yoogi, wigi otyeko wil oko i kom Rwot Obaŋagi." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Dwog wunu doŋ baŋa, wun itino a mom tye kede gen, an abino caŋowu oko i kom genwu a mom tye-nono. “Nen ba, wan obino baŋi, pien yin ibedo Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ateteni, mom tye konnyoro ame romo nwoŋere i wi kidi malo, kan ame jo wo iye i wi kiddinono, Ateteni, larre a jo Icrael, tye baŋ Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Jeremiah3:24 “Cakere i kare me tinowa gin me lewic obedo camo ginnoro luŋ ame yam kwariwa obedo yelle kedgi, dyegigi kede rommigi, awobegi kede anyiragi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Wek doŋ obut piny i twon lewic ame otye kede-nono, me timmogo me lewic ame obedo timo owum komwa oko; pien wan otimo bal i nyim Rwot Obaŋawa karacel kede kwariwa daŋ cakere i kare me tinowa tuno kede naka tin. Wan okwero winyo dwon Rwot Obaŋawa.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Ka ce ilokere, idwogo wunu baŋa, wun jo Icrael Rwot okobo, myero idwog wunu baŋa. Ka ce ikwanyo wunu gin me kwer ame itimo wunu oko i nyima, eka mom ite bedo wiwira wunu awira," 
Jeremiah4:2 dok daŋ ka ikwoŋo wunu ni, ‘Kite ame Rwot tye kede kwo-ni,’ myero ikwoŋ wunu kun ilubo wunu ŋolo kop atira, kede cuny atira bino miyo rok luŋ nwoŋo gum baŋe, dok daŋ obino nwoŋo kwogo pire.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Rwot okobo baŋ jo me Juda kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem ni, “Pur wunu pottiwu a yam mom ipuro wunu, kur dok ipit camwu i akina okuto," 
Jeremiah4:4 Myero ilire wunu kenwu baŋ Rwot, lirre wunu i cunywu, wun jo me Juda kede jo me Jerucalem, naka mio akemo maka, te waŋ calo man, pi gin arac ame itimo wunu, mac me akemona-nono te wan ame ŋattoro mom romo neko.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Rab wunu kop i Juda, rab wunu i Jerucalem, kun ikobo wunu ni, “Kut wunu apel rom lobo luŋ, red wunu i dwon aloŋo kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Cokere wunu me owot wunu, i boma mogo ame ocecelo atek wok-ca!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Lub wunu yo ame woto i Cion. Lar wunu komwu, kur igal wunu, pien amito kela gin arac i tutuŋ anyarodi, kede twon can adwoŋ meicel ame bino tyeko piny oko." 
Jeremiah4:7 Eŋatu doŋ odonyo oko i ka pono mere, anek rok luŋ doŋ okato oko kannaler; oya doŋ oko i kabedo mere; me miyo lobowu doko wi obur, bomawu luŋ doŋ bino balle oko, kun jo moro mom tye ame bedo iye." 
Jeremiah4:8 Pi mannono ba, twe wunu boŋo kwero cola i pyerwu, kum wunu kun ikok wunu; pien akemo a Rwot agwa meicel, mom oya i komwa kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah4:9 “Rwot okobo ni, i nino-nono tekcuny bino rwenyo oko i baŋ obakki kede rwodegi; olamdog bino baŋere oko, kun odwarpiny tye ka wuro meicel.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 An ate kobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, koŋ inen, yin gire doŋ ibwolo lwak man ateteni, karacel kede jo me Jerucalem, kun ikobbigi ni, ‘Ibino bedo wunu aber i kuc’; aco kun pala romo doŋ otuno oko i kwogi ikokome.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 I kare-naca obino te kobbi lwak man karacel kede Jerucalem ni, “Yamo alyet tye oya i tim i tur malo kan ame yattoro mom iye kun kodo dok tutuŋ baŋ lwak a Rwot, mom me pyetogi calo kal, onyo me yeko gin arac oko i komgi;" 
Jeremiah4:12 Yamo ame abino-nono ger okato kare. Mannono an Rwot ikokoma en a doŋ a tye aŋolo kop i kom jonanono.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Nen ba, tye ka bino calo pol, gadigadi lwennyere luŋ calo yamo ajuru; aguragura mere dwir kato cur oko. Can i wiwa doi, pien oto otum wunu doŋ oko!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Wun jo me Jerucalem, myero ilwok wunu cunywu oko i timo tim areco, me wek ilarre wunu, Tamwu areco-nogo bino medde bedo i cunywu naka awene ba?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Pien dwon dano moro tye a rabo kop i lobo me Dan, kun tye ka tuco gin arac ame otye ka timo i wi kiddi me Epraim." 
Jeremiah4:16 Kwenyoro rok luŋ ni en tye ka bino, kobbi jo Jerucalem dan ni, “Okwor tye ka bino i lobo abor meicel; gin tye ka woo kun oredo atek i kom boma me Juda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Oguro doŋ Juda oko calo jo ame tye ka kuro poto, pien Juda onwoŋo ojem oko kome.” Man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Jeremiah4:18 Kitewu kede gin ame itimo wunu luŋ, en ame okelo can man i komwu Mannono en can ame oketo i komwu, cannere kec atek; otuno naka iyi itaowu ikokome." 
Jeremiah4:19 Rem doŋ ocira oko! Rem ocira oko! A waŋo koma calo mac! Oii doi Kannoro luŋ oguro itaona arem okato kare! Itaona agoye bala amito cot oko; mom aromo liŋ mot kadi acel; pien atye ka winyo koko apel, kede duru me lweny." 
Jeremiah4:20 Can tye ka lubere agwa agwa tere i tere, lobo luŋ aluŋa doŋ odoko wi obur, Kemana luŋ doŋ obalo oko oyot meicel, aco icika ote muko i dakika moro keken," 
Jeremiah4:21 Abino bedo neno lweny pi kare a rom mene, kun atye ka winyo koko apel?" 
Jeremiah4:22 “Pien jona miŋ, mom onea kadi acel; gin otino ame wigi mom tio, mom otye kede ŋeccoro kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Kare ame atiŋo waŋa aneno lobo, aneno ni oballe, odoko wi obur aboŋo ginnoro iye; dok acer kede dwe ame tye malo i polo," 
Jeremiah4:24 Dok ate tino waŋa neno kiddi, aneno gin luŋ otye ka yeŋere ayeŋa, kun kan obedo kidikidi luŋ tye awirre tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi." 
Jeremiah4:25 Dok ate tino waŋa lworo piny, mom ate neno ŋattoro kadi acel, winy luŋ ame twarre malo onwoŋo oriŋo oko tene." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ate dok ŋiyo lobo, nen, kan onwoŋo ceko cem meicel, onwoŋo doŋ odoko bar otal ikaŋ, kun boma iye luŋ doŋ obabalo oko, i nyim Rwot ame akemo onwoŋo omako." 
Jeremiah4:27 Pien Rwot okobo ni, “Lobo luŋ bino doŋ nono, cite mom abino miyo gik oko." 
Jeremiah4:28 Lobo bino kumo pi kop man, polo daŋ bino cido acol icuc; pien an doŋ atyeko kobo gin ame ayikere me timo, Mom aloko tamma, mom daŋ abino dok cen.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Jo i boma luŋ bino riŋo oko, ka owinyo woo a wegi aguragura kede wegi atero, obino donyo i buŋ acol meicel, mogo bino yito i wi kidi malo, jo luŋ bino weko boma doŋ nono, aboŋo ŋattoro ame bedo iyigi." 
Jeremiah4:30 Yin boma ame doŋ idoko wi oburri, pi ŋo kara itye ka ruko boŋo arema? Piŋo itye ka ruko ruk me kwogo ame otio i jabu, kun ijujuko waŋi kede raŋi ame nen amwonya? Itye ka yelle nono me yiko komi, cogi ame mari tye ka cayi acaa; otye ka yenyo yo me neki aneka." 
Jeremiah4:31 Atyeko winyo koko ame calo me a dako ame arem me nywal, kun tye i rem calo dako ame anywallo atinnere me kao. Cion tye ka koko kun mito weo, kun ryeo ciŋe malo, kobo ni, “Ato doi! Nen atye ka wille i nyim onek jo.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Wun jo me Jerucalem, koŋ iriŋ iloŋ wunu dye yowu luŋ, Ŋoloro wunu kabedo luŋ me inen wunu. Koŋ inen wunu kabedo luŋ ame yam jo cato iye jami, koŋ inen ka ce itwero neno wunu dano moro iye, ame ŋolo kop kakare, ame temo bedo ŋat a genne, me atim Jerucalem kica," 
Jeremiah5:2 Kadi bed gin kobo ni, “Kite ame Rwot tye kwo-ni, pwod dokokwoŋo kwon me gobagoba." 
Jeremiah5:3 Ama Rwot, yin mom imito neno ateni? Yin doŋ ityeko goyogi, cite gin mom owinyo rem; yin ityekogi oko, cite mom oye yikere. Waŋgi ocwiny kato gwen oko, okwero gigi ŋut oko.”" 
Jeremiah5:4 An dok ate kobo ni, “Magi obedo ocan keken, wigi mom tio kadi acel, pien mom oŋeo yo a Rwot, ame en cik Obaŋagi." 
Jeremiah5:5 Abino wot baŋ jo adoŋo ame tye kede twer, abino wot kop kedgi, pien gin oŋeo yo a Rwot, ame en cik Obaŋagi.” Cite anwoŋo ni gin luŋ orom aroma, gin luŋ oturo loc oko i ŋutgi, ocodo-gu nyor ame otweogi kede oko." 
Jeremiah5:6 Mannono omio eŋatu ame bino ya i buŋ bino nekogi oko, epet me tim bino tyekogi oko. Kwac bino kuro bomagi luŋ akura, ŋattoro keken ame bino ya iye me wot oko, kwac bino kikilo atitino; pien balgi doŋ dwon meicel, dok timgi me ya oko i baŋ Obaŋa tye ka medde ameda." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Atwero timowu kica i yore aŋo? Itinowu doŋ otyeko weka oko, otye doŋ ka kwon i nyiŋ gigi mogo ame mom obedo Obaŋa. Ka ce apitogi oyeŋ, ocako cot atata ociro karacel me wot i wudi olaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Onwoŋo opitogi oyeŋ atek, calo twon aguragura ame opito aber, inwono ŋat acel acel tye ka koko dako a wadgi." 
Jeremiah5:9 Mom atwero keto can i komgi pi timgi-nono? Dok mom aromo culo kworra i kom rok acalo man? Man kop ame Rwot okobo. 
Jeremiah5:10 “Wot ibe i akina olokkere me ibabalo oko, cite kur ibal luŋ aluŋa: lwelwero jangi oko, en mom obedo me a Rwot." 
Jeremiah5:11 Pien jo me ot Icrael kede jo me ot a Juda, onwoŋo mom doŋ genna kadi acel. Man kop a Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah5:12 Gin obedo kobo kop me goba i kom Rwot, dok daŋ okobo ni, “En gire mom bino timo ginnoro; cannoro gire mom bino poto i komwa, mom daŋ obino neno pala romo, kec daŋ mom bino poto baŋwa." 
Jeremiah5:13 Odwarpiny luŋ bino lokere doko yamo, kun kopporo doŋ mom i cunygi, Mannono en gin ame obino timo i komgi.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa me mony okobo ni, “Pien gin okobo kop man, nen ba, aloko koppa ame tye i dogi adoko mac, kun aloko jo man doko yen, mac bino wanogi oko." 
Jeremiah5:15 Nen ba, wun jo me ot Icrael, an akelo rokkoro i komwu i kannabor. Man kop a Rwot. Rokkere obedo rok atek meicel, dok obedo rok acon meicel, rok ame wun mom iŋeo wunu lebgi, dok mom iromo niaŋ wunu kop ame gin kobo." 
Jeremiah5:16 Wegi aterogi mom bao piny nono, gin luŋ obedo twoni jo atek meicel." 
Jeremiah5:17 Gin bino camo kalwu ame ikaa wunu, kede kit cam ocele luŋ, gin bino ca mo anyirawu kede awobewu; gin bino camo dyegiwu, rommiwu kede dokwu, obino camo olokwu kede odurowu; bomawu luŋ ame oceoelo ame igeno wunu wok-ku, gin abino babalo oko i pala romo.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Rwot okobo ni, “Akadi i kare naca daŋ mom abino tyekowu odoco." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ka ce jowu bino kobo ni, ‘Piŋo kara Rwot Obaŋawa otimo jami man luŋ i koo, mwa?’ wun ibino kobbegi wunu ni, ‘Kite acalo iweka wunu ite cako wunu tiyi obaŋe mogo ocele, amannono daŋ ibino tiyi wunu rok ocele i lobo a mom obedo megwu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Kob kop man baŋ jo me ot a Yakobo, rab koppere i Juda ni," 
Jeremiah5:21 “Winy wunu kop man, wun jo amiŋ ame wiwu mom tio-ni, ame tye kede waŋgi, cite mom neno ginnoro, ame tye i yitgi, cite mom winyo kop." 
Jeremiah5:22 Rwot openyowu ni, Wun mom ilwora wunu ce? Komwu mom myel i nyima bo? Aketo kwoyo obedo gin ame poko pii i nam, ame obedo wan apokki arac ame mom romo kate atwal; kadi bed pii i nam tagere rom kwene, mom romo loyo kadi acel, kadi pii mere mor rom mene, mom romo kato i wie malo." 
Jeremiah5:23 Cite jo man opala meicel, dok cunygi mito jem keken; olokkere tene, owe ka doŋ oko." 
Jeremiah5:24 Mom daŋ okobo i cunygi ni, ‘Myero obed kede lworo i kom Rwot Obaŋawa, ame mio kot cwe i kare mere ikome, kot me iporo kede kot me cwir, dok gwoko pirwa kare luŋ ame otyeko moko me kayo kac.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Balwu omio magi luŋ doŋ oya oko i baŋwu, balwu omio gin aber doŋ mom tye baŋwu." 
Jeremiah5:26 Pien jo ame timo tim areco tye i akina jona, obedo kiyo piny calo jo ame adwaro winy. G in ociko owicgi; owicgi-nono te mako jo." 
Jeremiah5:27 Udigi opoŋ iye kop me erupe, calo winy ame opoŋ dita; mannono omio doŋ odoko jo adoŋo ame olony," 
Jeremiah5:28 doŋ ocwe ame komgi lilia alili; Ka gikgi mom i timo gin arac, mom oŋolo kop atira kadi acel, mom okonyo itino kic, atot ya obed aber, dok kop ajo ame piny oloo mom opido atira," 
Jeremiah5:29 Mom aromo keto can i komgi pi timgi-nono? dok mom aromo culo kworra i kom rok acalo man? Man kop a Rwot okobo.” 
Jeremiah5:30 Gin me awura meicel ame mio jo lworo, doŋ otyeko timere oko i lobo." 
Jeremiah5:31 Odwarpiny doŋ tyeto kop me goba keken, olamdog daŋ doŋ timo gin ame yigi mito keken; jona daŋ mito ni bed timere amannono, kara doŋ ibino timo wunu ŋo ka ce agikki piny doŋ otuno?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Wun jo me Jerucalem, riŋ ilar wunu komwu, ya wunu oko i Jerucalem! Kut wunu apel i Tekoa, tin wunu bendera i Bet-akerem; pien can tye obino i tutuŋ anyarodi, cannere pek meicel." 
Jeremiah6:2 Wun jo me Cion, ibino wunu bedo calo elet amwonya meicel, me cem a leyi." 
Jeremiah6:3 Okwat i rommigi kede dyegigi bino bino me lweny i kome, obino guro kemagi ogure dyere, obino kwayo lim kuno, kun ŋat man kwao mere kene." 
Jeremiah6:4 “Yik lweny me ere oko i kome, ya wunu oko, me owot ocob mony i kome i cuny iceŋ!” “Can i wiwa doi, pien cen doŋ olenere oko, tipo me otyeno doŋ bocoboco!”" 
Jeremiah6:5 “Ya wunu me ocob wunu doŋ mony i kome dyewor, me obabalo wunu kabedo mere oko,”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Pien Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Toŋ wunu yennere oko piny; tor wunu lobo oman Jerucalem irit. Man en boma ame myero ket can i kome; pien ginnoro aber mom iye kono ka wuno jo keken." 
Jeremiah6:7 Kite acalo wan akoŋ gwoko pii mere bedo acil, Jerucalem daŋ gwoko timmere areco kittono; Tim me byemi kede nek mom rwenyo a mom owinyere iye, two kede awano kare luŋ mom rwenyo i waŋa." 
Jeremiah6:8 Wun jo me Jerucalem, myero iwek wunu kodi tim man bedi, naka mio abino ya awekowu oko; naka mio idoko wunu wi obur, lobo ame jo moro mom bedo iye.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Jo Icrael ame odoŋ obino kwanyo oko ducu, calo nyig olok ame opwono oko i jaŋe. Doŋ myero ilar jo ame iromo laro, calo apur ame depo nyig olokkere.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 An ate gamo ni, “Kara abino kwenyoro ŋa ba, me gin owiny? Koŋ inen yitgi doŋ odiŋ oko, mom doŋ oromo winyo koppa, nen ba, koppa a Rwot baŋgi, gin oŋalo aŋala, mom daŋ oketo cunygi iye kadi acel." 
Jeremiah6:11 Mannono omio akemo a Rwot doŋ oola oko; aol doŋ oko i kunno cunya. Cor doŋ akemoni-nono i kom itino ame tye i dye gudo, kede i kom awo be ame ocokere karacel daŋ. Co kede mon daŋ obino kwanyo otero oko, jo ame mwakagi doŋ bup kede jo oti atek ateka.”" 
Jeremiah6:12 Udigi obino miyo baŋ jo ocele, pottigi karacel kede mongi daŋ; pien abino ryeyo ciŋa aketo can i kom jo ame bedo i lobo-ni. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Pien cakere i kom jo atino tuno kede i kom jo adoŋo ŋat acel acel tye ame owor awora i nwoŋo lim i yore a mom atira; dok cakere i kom odwarpiny tuno kede i kom olamdog, ŋat acel acel mom genne kadi acel i tic ame en tio," 
Jeremiah6:14 Otye ka cego bur i kom jona a mom ocaŋo aber kun okobo ni, ‘Kuc, kuc’, aco kono kuccoro mom," 
Jeremiah6:15 Lewic mom makogi ka otimo tim me kwer. Lewic gire mom makogi kadi acel, waŋgi nwan ka otimo tim me lewic. Pi mannono, gin daŋ obino poto calo jo ame doŋ otyeko poto, kare ame abino keto can i komgi.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah6:16 Rwot okobo ni, “Cuŋ wunu kan ame yo akakara iye, me inen wunu, dok ipeny wunu yo aconnege, peny wunu kan ame yo aber tye iye, ite lubo wunu, me inwoŋ wunu wee kede kuc i cunywu, Cite gin ote gamo ni, ‘Wan giwa mom obino lubo.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Aketo okur-piny me kurowu, kun akobo ni, ‘Winy wunu koko apel!’ Cite gin te gamo ni, ‘Wan giwa mom obino winyo koko apel.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Doŋ pi mannono, winy wunu ba, wun rok luŋ, dok iŋe wunu, wun lwak, gin ame bino timere i komgi," 
Jeremiah6:19 Winy ba, yin lobo, atye ka kelo gin arac i kom jo man, adwoggi me gin arac ame yam gin obedo timo, pien gin mom obedo winyo koppa, kun daŋ okwero cikka oko." 
Jeremiah6:20 Piŋo kara otye ka kella odok luban i lobo Ceba, kede lum alim ame ŋwece kur i lobo ame tye kannabor? Mom abino gamo mot awaŋawu luŋ, akadi kit mot luŋ daŋ mom yomoro cunya." 
Jeremiah6:21 Pi mannono Rwot okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, abino cibo i nyim jo man gin ame dipogi te miyogi tagere; papo karacel kede awobe, owotegi kede jo ame bedo i ŋetgi, gin luŋ obino to oko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, rokkoro tye ame abino i tutuŋ anyarodi, rok atek ame obakki mere boco meicel, tye ka yubere me bino lweny i kannabor meicel." 
Jeremiah6:23 Omako aterogi kede tonigi i ciŋgi, oger meicel, daŋ dok mom otye kede kica i cunygi, woogi calo pii i nam ame amor; gin oriŋo aguragura, kun otye ame oterre oko pi lweny, gin abino me lweny i komwu wun jo Cion!”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Wan doŋ otyeko winyo kop magi i komgi, ciŋwa te kwe oko inoŋ ame mom romo timo ginnoro, cunywa doŋ tye ka cwer atek meicel, otye i rem ame rom aroma i dako amerem me nywal ogoo." 
Jeremiah6:25 Kur iwot wunu kadi acel i dye bar, kur daŋ iwot wunu i dye yo, pien okwor tye i pala me romo, lworo doŋ ogurowa tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi." 
Jeremiah6:26 Doŋ ba, wun jona, twe wunu boŋo cola i pyerwu, dok daŋ myero iŋeŋena wunu i buru; Kok wunu atek kite ame itwero koko wunu kede, ka atin ame onywalo acel keken oto: kok wunu koko agwa meicel pien otyek jo abino i komwa oyot meicel." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Atyeko keti i akina jona me bedo ŋat ame ŋiogi dok temogi, me nje dok inwoŋ kite ame gin bedo kede." 
Jeremiah6:28 Gin luŋ, gin opala ame omito jem keken, owoto kede jo ame maro kwoto jo; gin otek calo mola kede nyonyo, gin luŋ otimo tim me buyo jo." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mac i ka tet bukoro atek dok alyet meicel, maccono miyo nyonyo meye oko, cite ŋat ame aliyo-nono yelle nono, pien jo areco mom okwanyo ocwao teŋe." 
Jeremiah6:30 Jo bino lwoŋogi ni ryal ame otyeko kwero, pien Rwot okwerogi oko.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Kop a Rwot ame rik obino baŋ Jeremia kobo ni," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Cuŋ i doggola me ot a Rwot, me irab kop man kuno, kun ikobo ni, Wun jo luŋ me Juda ame donyo i doggola magi me wot woro Rwot, winy wunu kop a Rwot." 
Jeremiah7:3 Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Yik wunu kitewu kede ginnoro luŋ ame itimo wunu, an abino weko ibedo wunu i lobo man." 
Jeremiah7:4 Kur ibed geno wunu kop me gobagoba ame otye ka kobbiwu, ni, ‘Man ot a Rwot, man ot a Rwot, man ot a Rwot.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Pien ka ce iyiko wunu kitewu kede ginnoro luŋ ame itimo wunu ateteni, kun iŋolo wunu kop atira i akinawu kenwu kenwu," 
Jeremiah7:6 ka ce mom ibedo wuno wunu jo ame bedo i akinawu, itino kic, onyo mon to, kun mom daŋ ionyo wunu remo a mom i bal i kabedo man, dok ka ce mom ibedo woro wunu obaŋa mogo ocele ame twero miyo can poto i komwu," 
Jeremiah7:7 mannono bino miyo awekowu ibedo wunu i kabedo man, i lobo ame rik doŋ atyeko miyo con baŋ kwariwu me bedo megi atwal." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Nen ba, itye wunu ka geno koppogo me go ba ame konygi mom." 
Jeremiah7:9 Ibino kwala wunu kwo, neko jo, codo cot, kwono kwoŋ me gobagoba, yalo Baal i gin ame ŋwece kur, kun daŋ itye wunu ka woro obaŋa mogo ocele ame yam mom iŋeo wunu," 
Jeremiah7:10 eka dok ite bino wunu cun i nyima i ot man, ame olwoŋo i nyiŋa, eka ite kobo wunu ni, ‘Wan doŋ olarowa oko!’ Ento kun itye wunu ka medde itimo tim man me kwer?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Iloko wunu ot man ame olwoŋo kede nyiŋa-ni odoko aduu oyak bo? Nen ba, an Rwot ikoma doŋ atyeko neno ni tye kittono." 
Jeremiah7:12 Aman myero iwot wunu i kabedona ame rik tye i Cilo, kan ame rik koŋ ageo miyo bedo kan ame owora iye, me iwot inen wunu gin ame atyeko ti mo kuno pi tim areco a jona Icrael otimo." 
Jeremiah7:13 Aman doŋ ba, pien itimo wunu jami magi luŋ, dok i kare ame abedo kop kedwu tere i tere, wun mom iwinyo wunu koppa, i kare ame alwonowu, mom igamo wunu doga, man kop ame Rwot okobo," 
Jeremiah7:14 mannono omio abino timo i kom ot man ame olwoŋo i nyiŋa, dok ame igeno wunu-ni, kede i kom kabedo man ame rik amiowu kede kwariwu, gin ame atimo i kom Cilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Abino ryemowu oko i nyima, kite ame aryemo kede jo turwu ame obedo ikwae Epraim oko i nyima." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Aco yin Jeremia ba, myero kur ikwa pi jo man, kur daŋ itiŋ dwoni malo ni ikoko onyo ikwaya pirgi, kur daŋ item bako dogi baŋa pirgi, pien mom gira atye ka ci ko yita baŋi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Mom ce itye ka neno gin ame gin tye ka timo i boma luŋ me Juda kede i dye yo ame tye i Jerucalem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Itinogi rao yen, papo te kuto kede mac, kun mongi tye ka jebo moko me tedo ogati pi abaka a dako me polo; dok daŋ oyalo-gu obaŋa mogo ocele kede motgi me ama ta, me gin omi akemo maka," 
Jeremiah7:19 An en ame gin tye ka roko doge-nono? Man peny ame Rwot openyo, Mom gin i komgi en a doŋ obaŋere oko-nono?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Nen ba, abino coro akemona kede inigana piny i kom kabedo man, i kom dano kede i kom leyi, i kom yen ame tye i tim kede i kom cam ame ocek i potti; maccere bino waŋ ame mom oromo neko.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, “Med wunu mot awaŋawu i kom motwu ocele mege, me icam wunu riŋo." 
Jeremiah7:22 Pien i nino ame rik akwanyo kwariwu iye i lobo me Miciri, mom rik akobbigi kopporo i kom mot awaŋa kede mot ocele mege, mom daŋ acikogi pire." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ento rik acikogi ni, ‘Winy wunu koppa, an abino bedo Obaŋawu, dok wunu ibino bedo wunu jona; dok daŋ myero ilub wunu yo luŋ ame acikowu me lubo, me ibed wunu aber kun itye wunu kede kuc.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Cite gin rik mom oye lubo gin ame aciko, dok mom ociko yitgi me winyo koppa, cite obedo lubo gin ame cunygi mito, kun daŋ olubo gin ame yigi mito ame opoŋ i ti mo gin arac; ote bedo wot kun odok adoka cen, aboŋo wot anyim." 
Jeremiah7:25 Cakere i nino ame kwariwu oya kede i lobo me Miciri tuno kede tin, abedo cwayo baŋgi omirona ame obedo odwarpiny tere i tere, nino i nino;" 
Jeremiah7:26 cite gin gigi mom oye winyo koppa, akadi yabo yitgi me winyo koppa; ento ŋutgi en ame oluŋyo bedo anwaŋ. Gin te bedo timo gigi mogo areco ame kato kwarigi oko." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Doŋ yin myero iwot ikob kop magi luŋ baŋgi, cite gin gigi mom obino winyo koppi. Ibino lwoŋogi, cite gin mom obino gamo dogi." 
Jeremiah7:28 Yin doŋ ibino kobbigi ni, ‘Man en rok ame rik okwero winyo kop a Rwot Obaŋagi, dok daŋ rik mom oye ni yik balgi; kop me ateni doŋ orwenyo oko i baŋgi: mom doŋ winyere kadi acel i doggi.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 Lyel wunu yer wiwu me ibol wunu oko teŋe, cak woo wunu i koko i kabedo ame odoŋ nono i wi kiddi malo, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko kwero lwak man ame akemo omake i komgi-ni, dok otyeko daŋ doŋ wekogi oko!" 
Jeremiah7:30 “Pien jo Juda doŋ otyeko timo gin arac i nyima, dokoketo timgi me kwer i ot ame olwoŋo kede nyiŋa, me balo oko, man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah7:31 Gin otyeko gero kabedo mogo me woro jogi i luŋ a wot a Kinom ame olwoŋo ni Topet, me waŋo awobegi kede anyiragi i mac, ame an gira rik mom acikogi pire daŋ rik mom atamo pire kadi acel." 
Jeremiah7:32 Pi mannono ba, nino tye abino, ame mom dok obino medo lwoŋo kabedo-nono ni Topet, onyo ni luŋ a wot a Kinom, cite ni luŋ me neko jo, pien obino yiko jo i Topet, pien kabedo moro ocele nwoŋo doŋ mom, man kop a Rwot." 
Jeremiah7:33 Kom jo oto bino doko cam a winy ame twarre malo, kede me a leyi ame bedo i lobo; mom tye ŋattoro ame bino ryemogi iye." 
Jeremiah7:34 Abino giko oko i boma luŋ me Juda kede i dye yo luŋ me Jerucalem woo me yomcuny a jo, yomcuny ame anyom tye kede karacel kede me atera; pien lobo-nono bino doko wi obur ame tye nono.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “I kare-naca, co go kom obakki me Juda, cogo kom rwode, cogo kom olamdog, cogo kom odwarpiny kede cogo kom jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i Jerucalem obino kwanyo oko i lyel ote kela kannaler;" 
Jeremiah8:2 ote canogi i wan cen, dwe kede lwak acer luŋ ame tye i po lo, ame rik onwoŋo gin omaro dok daŋ obedo woro i karegi, ame rik gin obedo lubo, obedo yenyo ote bedo woro. Mom dok obino coko co go komgi-nono, dok mom obino yiko. Gin doŋ bino bedo kittono acalo cet dyaŋ ame oradde i lobo," 
Jeremiah8:3 Jo luŋ me rok man arac-ci ame obwottege, ame tye i lobo apapat ame yam aryemogi aterogi iye, gin luŋ obino mito ni kono oto gigi oko akaka bedo kwo, man kop a Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Yin Jeremia ibino kobo baŋgi ni Rwot okobo ni, Ka dano orette piny, mom dok ya malobo? Ka ce dano ogak oko, mom dok lokere dwogo cen bo?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Kara doŋ ŋo omio jona tye ka wot awota teŋe, kun omedde ameda i dok cen? Olido goba ikiŋ ame mom omito weko, okwero gigi dwogo oko cen." 
Jeremiah8:6 Abedo tero yita me winyo kopgi, cite mom okobo kop ame tye atira; mom tye ŋattoro ame ŋut i gin arac ame etimo kun penyo ni, ‘Ŋo kara ame atimo?’ Ŋat acel acel tye ka lubo yo ame cunye mito, calo aguragura ame tye ka riŋo adwir i lweny." 
Jeremiah8:7 Kadi etolo ame bedo malo i polo daŋ ŋeo kare mere me dwogo, awele, aculegwec kede ogoro, gin daŋ gwoko kare me binogi; cite jona mom ŋeo kadi acel cik luŋ ame yam Rwot omio." 
Jeremiah8:8 “Kara doŋ itwero kobo niŋo ni, ‘Wan giwa oryek, dok cik a Rwot daŋ tye baŋwa?’ Cite, nen ba, opwony cik a mom genne otyeko loko cik a Rwot luŋ odoko goba i cocgi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Obino miyo lewic maka jo aryek, cunygi bino poto ote makogi oko; nen ba, gin otyeko kwero kop a Rwot, kara doŋ ryeko aŋonnono ame gin dok tye kede?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Pi mannono ba, abino miyo mongi baŋ jo ocele, kede pottigi, baŋ jo oloogi i lweny, pien cakere i kom jo atino tuno kede i kom jo adoŋo, ŋat acel acel i akinagi owor awora inwoŋo lim i yore a mom atira; dok cakere i kom odwarpiny tuno kede i kom olamdog, ŋat acel acel mom genne kadi acel i tic ame en tio." 
Jeremiah8:11 Otye ka cego bur i kom jona ame mom ocano aber, kun okobo ni, ‘Kuc, kuc’, aco kono kuccoro mom." 
Jeremiah8:12 Lewic mom makogi ka otimo tim me kwer, Lewic gire mom makogi kadi acel, waŋgi nwaŋ ka otimo tim me lewic. Pi mannono, gin daŋ obino poto calo jo ame doŋ otyeko poto, kare ame abino keto can i komgi.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah8:13 Rwot okobo ni, “I kare ame onwoŋo myero acokgi iye, ocalo doŋ olok ame nyige moro mom iye, onyo oduro ame nyige mom, ame pote-gu oony oko luŋ, gin ame yam amiogi luŋ doŋ mom i ciŋgi.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Ŋo omio wan otye ka bedo mot? Ocokere wunu karacel me owot wunu i boma mogo ame ocecelo i cel atek, me wot oto wunu doŋ kuno. Pien Rwot Obaŋawa doŋ otyeko keto can i komwa kun mito ni wan oto oko, omiowa pii ame kwir tye iye ni wan omati, pien wan otimo bal i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah8:15 Obedo yenyo kuc, cite mom tye ginnoro aber ame nen, oyenyo kare ame myero ocan iye, cite oluŋyo cop ka i gin a kela lworo keken." 
Jeremiah8:16 “Weo me akemo okworwa winnyere i Dan twal, ka aguraguragi okok, lobo luŋ yeŋere, Gin obino me bino balo lobo odoco naka ginnoro luŋ iye, boma karacel kede jo luŋ ame bedo iye." 
Jeremiah8:17 Nen ba, atye ka cwayo twole i akinawu, ororo ame kwirrere mom romo geŋere kadi acel, twolle-nogo bino kayowu.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah8:18 Can ame atye kede doŋ mom romo can kadi acel, atye i two me cwercuny adwoŋ meicel i cunya." 
Jeremiah8:19 Koŋ doŋ iwiny koko a jona, ame winnyere doŋ i kabedo luŋ ni, “Rwot doŋ mom i Cion bo? Abaka me Cion doŋ mom iye bo?” Rwot ame obedo abakagi te gamo ni, “Piŋo kara gin obedo roka me akemo maka i cal joggigi, kede cal jogi a rok ocele?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Jo doŋ tye ka kobo ni, “Nen kare me kac okato oko, oro daŋ doŋ ogik oko, cite mom ru olarowa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Cunya tye ka rem calo bur tye iye, pien bur doŋ tye i kom jona, kumo pi can doŋ ocira oko, cunya doŋ tye ka poto atata," 
Jeremiah8:22 Yat me caŋo jo doŋ mom i Gilead be? Dakatalloro daŋ doŋ mom kuno Piŋo jona mom tye ka can i two ame gin tye kede? 
Jeremiah9:1 Kono onwoŋo wia obedo waŋ akon ame pii mollo iye, do ber, kun waŋa obedo akon ame pig wan cwer iye, kono akok dyeceŋ kede dyewor pi jona ame doŋ oneko oko." 
Jeremiah9:2 Kono onwoŋo tye kannoro i tim otwo ame en abedo iye, do ber, acalo gony ame jo awoto iyo twero bedo iye, kono aweko jona ate wot oko i tene baŋgi. Pien gin luŋ doŋ odoko ocod cot atata onywako wot kede wegi erupe." 
Jeremiah9:3 Ololoko doggi calo akud atero, goba en a doŋ onya i lobo akaka kop ateni; pien oya i bal okobere akoba i bal, kun daŋ mom doŋ onea, man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah9:4 Ŋat acel acel myero gwokere i kom awottere, dok myet o kur kob ni ageno ominnere, pien ŋat acel acel tye ka i cuny me mayo awottere calo Yakobo, dok dano mito ka rimo piny i nyiŋ awottere." 
Jeremiah9:5 Ŋat acel acel bwolo ŋat ame bedo i ŋete, mom tye ŋattoro ame kobo kop ateni, opwonyo doŋ lebgi ikobo ka goba; otimo bal ame mom doŋ oromo ŋut kadi oyelle niŋo." 
Jeremiah9:6 Omedde doŋ ameda iwuno joo kop go ba keken adoŋ odure caa ducu, okwero doŋ neya oko, man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah9:7 Mannono omio Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino liyogi calo nyonyo ate dok temogi, kara ŋo ocele ame dok aromo timo pi jona?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Lebgi calo atero ame kwir a neko jo tye i lebe, kobo goba keken, dog ŋat acel acel nwoŋo alebo kop am it amita baŋ awottere cite i cunye nwoŋo oyikere me yenyo yo me neko oko," 
Jeremiah9:9 An mom abino keto can i komgi pi gin ame gin otimo-nono dok mom atwero culo kworra i kom rok acalo man?” Man kop ame Rwot okobo. 
Jeremiah9:10 Jeremia okobo ni, “Myero doŋ acak kok pi kiddi dok akok daŋ pi elet ame tye tim, pien doŋ odoŋ nono, mom doŋ tye ŋattoro ame bea iye kuno, koko a dok daŋ mom doŋ winyere kuno; leyi kede winy doŋ oriŋo oko iye, owoto oko teŋe.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Rwot te kobo ni, “Abino miyo Jerucalem doko wi obur, kan ame ekwe bedo iye; abino miyo boma luŋ i Juda doŋ nono, aboŋo jo moro ame bedo i yigi.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Ŋa aryek meicel ame romo niaŋ kop man? Rwot okobo kop magi baŋ ŋa ce me en tuci? Piŋo kara lobo tye ame oballe oko dok odoŋ nono calo tim ame ŋattoro doŋ mom bea iye? 
Jeremiah9:13 Rwot te kobo ni, “Pien gin okwero winyo cikka ame amiogi, dok daŋ okwero winyo koppa dok mom olubo cikka i i gin ame gin tio," 
Jeremiah9:14 cite obedo gigi limo gin ame cunygi mito apala apa la, kun daŋ otye ka woro Baal kite ame kwarigi opwonyogi kede." 
Jeremiah9:15 Mannono omio Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni ‘Nen ba, abino pito jo man kede gin akec, dok abino miyogi omato pii ame kwir tye iye." 
Jeremiah9:16 Abino keketogi i akina arok ame gin mom oŋeo dok kwarigi daŋ yam mom oŋeo; abino cwayo pala me lweny lubo yorgi, tuno ka atyekogi oko ducu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Koŋ itam wunu ite lwoŋo wunu mon ame ŋeo wer koko, me gin bin, lwoŋ wunu mon ame odiro bin." 
Jeremiah9:18 Gin myero ru bino oyotoyot, me obin owo i koko i wiwa, me pig waŋwa ony piny, kun opoko waŋwa opoŋ i pii." 
Jeremiah9:19 Koŋ iwiny koko tye ka winyere Cion, ni, ‘Doŋ otum oko doi! Twon lewic adwoŋ doŋ omakowa, pien wan oweko lobowa oko, dok kan ame wan obedo iye doŋ orereto oko piny.’" 
Jeremiah9:20 Wun mon, winy wunu kop a Rwot, yab wunu yitwu me iwiny wunu kop ame aya i doge; pwony wunu anyirawu kede koko, ŋat acel acel myero pwony wadgi i wer lyel." 
Jeremiah9:21 Pien to doŋ tye obino oko i diricawa luŋ, odonyo doŋ naka i udiwa adoŋo, kun tye ka neko itino oko i dye yo, naka awobe ame tye i dye boma." 
Jeremiah9:22 Rwot okobo ni, ‘Kom jo oto bino rette piny calo cet dyaŋ ame oradde i poto, calo kal ame okac oweko i poto, ame ŋattoro mom dok romo cokogi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Rwot okobo ni, “Dano aryek myero kur wakere pi ryeko ame en tye kede, Dano atek i lweny daŋ myero kur wakere pi teko mere-nono. Lo ame alonyo daŋ myero kur wakere pi lonyo mere." 
Jeremiah9:24 Cite ŋat ame wakere myero wakere pira, pien enian dok daŋ enea, kun eneo ni an a Rwot ame tye ka nyuto mar a mom lokere i lobo, ŋolo kop atira kede kite atira; pien jami magi en ame yomoro cunya."
