Jeremiah9:25 “Nen ba, kare tye abino ame abino keto can i kom jo ame kadi olirogi ocalo jo a mom oliro," 
Jeremiah9:26 Abino keto can i kom jo Miciri, jo Juda, jo Edom, jo Amon, jo Moab, karacel kede jo luŋ ame bedo i tim otwo ame mworo yer wigi oko doŋ acegocego, Pien rok magi luŋ mom olirre, dok jo me ot Icrael luŋ daŋ mom olirre cunygi.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Wun jo me ot Icrael, winy wunu kop ame Rwot okobo baŋwu." 
Jeremiah10:2 Rwot okobo ni, “Kur ipwony wunu lubo kite orok, dok cunywu myero kur poti ka ce ineno wunu anyuttogo me polo, kadi bed orok ka oneno cunygi poto pirgi." 
Jeremiah10:3 Pien kite orok mom obedo kit me ateni. Yat i buŋ otono oreto oko piny, apac te payo oko i gi-ticcere." 
Jeremiah10:4 Dano te kwoggo kome i ryal kede jabu, oguro ocumali i kome kede anyul me cun atek, me kur rette piny," 
Jeremiah10:5 Cal obaŋegi-nono calo pagi yat ame ocibo i poto okwer, me ryemo winyo i poto, mom oromo kop kadi acel, otiŋo-gu atiŋa, pien mom romo wot pirgi kengi. Kur ilworgi wunu kadi acel, pien mom otwero timo ginnoro arac, dok daŋ mom otwero timo ginnoro aber," 
Jeremiah10:6 Mom tye obaŋa moro ame cal kedi, Ama Rwot; yin idwon atek, dok nyiŋi daŋ dwon i teko." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ŋa kara ame mom myero olwori, Ama Abaka a rok apapat? Pien mannono en gin a myero tim baŋi, yin gire iromo alwora. Mom dok tye ŋattoro ame cal kedi, i akina oryeko luŋ me rok apapat, kadi ite locgi luŋ." 
Jeremiah10:8 Jogi luŋ ame ryek odoko omiŋo ame wigi mom tio, cal obaŋa ame otio i baoni twero pwonyogi i ginnoro?" 
Jeremiah10:9 Cal jogigi okwogo kome i ryal ame okelo i Tarcic, kede jabu ame okelo i Upaj. Gin luŋ obedo gin ame opac otio, karacel kede tic otet jabu; rukgi rema kede en amaramar, gin luŋ obedo tic a jo ame odiro." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ento Rwot en obedo Obaŋa me ateni, en obedo Obaŋa ame kwo, Abaka ame perakino wan i wan. Ka akemo omako lobo yeŋere, dok mom tye rokkoro ame romo kanyo akemo mere.”" 
Jeremiah10:11 Wun myero ikobbigi wunu ni, “Obaŋa ame rik mom otio polo kede lobo bino gire to oko i wi lobo piny i te polo kan.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Rwot gire en oketo lobo i teko mere, dok en oketo lobo omio ocuŋ atek pi ryeko mere, en omio polo opette kite ame tye kede-ni pi ŋeccere." 
Jeremiah10:13 Ka ce dwone omor, pii i polo twaggere meicel, dok en mio ekuna duny kun ya i agikki piny. En mio lutkot wil ka kot acwe, dok mio yamo kodo kun ya i ot kano jami mere." 
Jeremiah10:14 Jo luŋ miŋ atek, dok daŋ mom otye kede ŋeccoro, cal jogi ame apac opao en a dok mie lewic, pien cal jogigi-nono mom obedo obaŋa, dok mom daŋ otye kede kwo kadi acel." 
Jeremiah10:15 Konygi moro mom, otiogi me acaa keken; i kare ame Rwot bino keto iye can i komgi, gin luŋ obino to oko." 
Jeremiah10:16 Obaŋa a Yakobo mom calo jogi magi, pien en obedo ŋat oketo jami luŋ, dok jo Icrael oyero me bedo mere, nyiŋe obedo Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah10:17 Wun ame doŋ ogurowu oko-ni, cok ba doŋ yecwu oko i lobo!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Pien Rwot okobo ni, “Aman doŋ abino ryemo jo ame bedo i loboni oko, dok abino kela can i komgi, can ame gin romo winyo littere.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Jerucalem bino kok ni, “Can i wia doi pi awano ame owana kede-ni! Wan burra-nono rac okato kare. Ateteni, man doŋ can ikokome, kanyo mere mom yot!”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Kemana doŋ otyeko balo oko, dok tol luŋ ame rik otwetweogi kede ococodo oko itinona doŋ oweka oko, gin luŋ doŋ omom. Mom tye ŋattoro ame dok romo guro kemana-nono, ŋattoro ame myero twe bono me icika mere doŋ mom." 
Jeremiah10:21 Man otimere pien okwat doŋ min amiŋa, mom doŋ openyo Rwot kadi acel, mannono omio gin mom otye aber, lim i ciŋgi-gu tye ka ket aketa." 
Jeremiah10:22 Winy kop, Nen kop tye abino! Twon ginnoro ame tye ka mor atek meicel, tye ka bino i tutuŋ anyarodi, me bino miyo boma luŋ ame tye Juda doŋ nono, bino doko kabuto ekwe." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ama Rwot, an gira aŋeo ni dano mom loo kwo mere kene; dano gire mom twero cun pire kene aboŋo yin, man mom twere baŋ dano ame temo loyo kwo mere kene," 
Jeremiah10:24 Ama Rwot, tim ber ipwonya, cite kur iwuna dok atek ateka, Kur ipwonya akemo, naka mio ineka oko atwal." 
Jeremiah10:25 Akemo myero omaki i kom rok a mom nei, kede i kom jo ame mom lwoŋo nyiŋi. Pien gin doŋ otyeko itino a Yakobo oko, olwero doŋ wie oko odoco, omio lobowa doŋ odoŋ oko nono." 
Jeremiah11:1 Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Winy kop ame mako cikere man, ite kobo koppere baŋ jo Juda, kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah11:3 Yin ibino kobbigi ni, Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Dano a mom olubo kop ame tye i cikere man doŋ atyeko ceno oko." 
Jeremiah11:4 Man en cikere ame yam aciko kede kwariwu i kare ame akwanyogi i lobo me Miciri, ame rik tye acalo mac me buko nyonyo. Rik acikogi ni myero owiny koppa, dok daŋ otim ginnoro luŋ ame acikogi iye. Mannono bino miyogi obedo jona kun an abedo Obaŋagi," 
Jeremiah11:5 kun acobo ginnoro luŋ ame rik akwono me timo, me miyo kwariwu lobo ame akwoŋo me miyogi, lobo ame cak kede moo kic dwoŋ iye meicel, kite ame tye kede naka tin-ni.” An ate gamo ni, “Koŋ doŋ bed kittono, Ama Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Rwot dok te kobbi Jeremia ni, “Wot irab kop man luŋ i boma luŋ me Juda kede i dye yo luŋ me Jerucalem. Kobbigi ni myero owiny cikere a Rwot dok daŋ myero olubi." 
Jeremiah11:7 I kare ame akwanyo kwariwu i lobo me Miciri, rik acikogi atek meicel, kun akwenyorogi tere i tere, kadi naka i kare-ni pwod atye ka timo. Rik acikogi ni myero owiny koppa." 
Jeremiah11:8 Cite gin gigi rik mom oye lubo, kadi ciko yitgi me winyo koppa, ento ŋat acel acel i akinagi obedo wot apala apala kun timo gin arac ame tye i cunye. Mannono en omio acobo kop luŋ ame tye i cikere man i komgi, ame rik acikogi ni myero gin otim, cite mom ote ye timo.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Rwot dok te medo kobba ni, “Jo Juda kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem tye ka jem i koma." 
Jeremiah11:10 Gin olokere odok cen i bal ame yam kwarigi okwero winyo koppa iye, ocako doŋ lubo obaŋe mogo ocele kun oworogi. Jo Icrael kede jo Juda otyeko turo cikerena kedgi, ame rik acikere kede i kwarigi." 
Jeremiah11:11 Mannono omio an Rwot atyeko moko me kela gin arac i komgi ame mom oromo bwot iye kadi acel, kadi bed gin okok baŋa, mom gira abino winyo kokogi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Jo Juda kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem te doŋ wot kok baŋ obaŋe ame gin otye ka yalo kede gigi mogo a ŋwecgi kur, cite mom obino bedo kede twerroro me larogi i kare me peko." 
Jeremiah11:13 Pien obaŋawu doŋ pol calobomawu, wun jo Juda dok keno lam ame iketo wunu me ti mo tim me lewic doŋ pol calo yo ame tye i Jerucalem. Keno lam ame iketo wunu me wano odok a ŋwece kur me yalo Baal." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Pi mannono, yin Jeremia myero kur ikwaa pi jo-ni, kur daŋ iwot dwoni ni ikoko onyo ni ikwaya akakargi, pien mom abino ci ko yita me winyo kopgi ka ce olwona i kare ame gin tye kede peko." 
Jeremiah11:15 Kara doŋ twer aŋo ame jona tye kede i oda, kun gin otye ka timo tim arac kit man-ni? Kwon atata kede bedo yala i mot anola twero kwanyo can ame kono pot i komgi? Mannono daŋ rommiwu yeyea?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Yam onwoŋo alwoŋowu ni, ‘Jeituni ame pote olot meicel, ame nyige onyak amwonya meicel’; ento abino waŋo pote oko i twon mac ame amor ager calo lutkot, dok abino lwero jaŋe daŋ oko luŋ." 
Jeremiah11:17 “An a Rwot me mony ame yam aketowu i lobo me Juda atyeko doŋ ko bo ni gin arac bino timere i komwu, pi bal ame jo me ot Icrael kede jo me ot a Juda otimo, kun oroka kede me akemo maka pi waŋo odok a ŋwece kur me yalo Baal.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Rwot oyabo kop man baŋa, ate ŋeyo; omio aŋeo gin arac ame gin oyikere me timo i koma," 
Jeremiah11:19 Cite an rik abedo calo atin romo ame mwol ame atero me aneka. An onwoŋo mom aŋeo ni gin tye ka poro kop arac i koma, kun okobo ni, “Otoŋ wunu yat onyak oret wunu oko piny, ojwer wunu tere oko i lobo a jo a pwod kwo, me wi lobo doŋ wil oko i kome.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Ama Rwot me mony, yin ame iŋolo kop atira, ame temo cuny dano kede tammere, tim ber icul kwor i komgi kun an aneno, pien an doŋ atyeko jalo kop luŋ i ciŋi." 
Jeremiah11:21 Pi mannono, omio Rwot otyeko ko bo kop i kom jo Anatot ame mito ŋe ko Jeremia, kun okobo ni, “Kur ibed rabo kop i nyiŋ Rwot kan, naka mio obino neki oko.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Mannono omio Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino keto can i komgi, awobegi bino to kun oneko aneka i pala romo; dok kec daŋ bino neko itino awobegi kede anyiragi." 
Jeremiah11:23 Ŋattoro i akinagi gire mom bino bwot. Pien abino miyo gin arac poto i kom jo me Anatot, ka mwaka me keto can i komgi oromo.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Ama Rwot, an akelo kokona i nyimi, anwoŋo ni yin gire kiteni atira, an gira myero apid koppa i nyimi. Kara piŋo jo areco bedo aber kun daŋ olony? kara piŋo daŋ wegi erupe cobo tiyo gin ame cunygi mito timo?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Yin en a yam ipito, eka lwitgi te cako donyo piny; odono te nyako nyiggi, Kare luŋ gin okobo kop aber komi, cite mom oparo piri i cunygi." 
Jeremiah12:3 Cite yin Rwot gire iŋea aber, yin inena dok daŋ itemo kite ame cunya tye kede i komi. Waagi acalo romo ame atero me aneka, ketgi kengi me kuro nino me nekogi." 
Jeremiah12:4 Lobowa bino bedo kumo pi kare a rom mene, kun lum iye luŋ otwo oko? Pien jo ame bedo i lobowa tye ka timo ka gin arac, omio leyi kede winy tye ka to oko, pien jo tye ka kobo ni, “En gire mom nenowa i kan ame wan obedo iye ducu.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Rwot okobo ni, “Jeremia we, ka ce iol oko i ŋwec kun i pyem icano, kara doŋ ŋwec pyem aguragura kono, ibino pyem iye niŋo? Ka ce irette piny i lobo ame kuc tye iye, kara doŋ ibino bedo nine i yen ame oculle acula ame tye i dog kulo me Jordan?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Pien kadi omegoni ame gin jo me ot a pappi ikokome, gin daŋ otye ka timo tim me erupe i komi, gin daŋ otye ka kok atek me lweny kedi. Yin myero kur igen kopgi, kadi bed okobbi kop aber rom mene.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “An doŋ atyeko weko oda oko, atyeko doŋ kwero jona ame yam ayero ni bed mega, An doŋ awiro marra oko, amiogi i cin okworgi." 
Jeremiah12:8 Jona ame ayero me bedo mega olokere oko i koma, calo eŋatu ame tye i buŋ, omor doŋ amora i koko i koma, mannono omio an daŋ adagogi." 
Jeremiah12:9 Mom doŋ jona-nono i tuŋ baŋa calo itukere. Mom winy wadgi lweny kede kare luŋ? Wot icok leyi me tim luŋ, kelgi me obin oribere i cam karacel." 
Jeremiah12:10 Okwat apol apola obalo poto olokka oko, onyonyono dul lobo ame opokka i tyengi, omio doŋ dul lobona ame opokka ame onwoŋo yomoro cunya, odoko doŋ tim aler alera," 
Jeremiah12:11 Gin doŋ omio odoŋ yie nono, odoko doŋ tim ame cona acona. Kabedo ducu iye doŋ tye nono, cite mom tye dano moro ame paro." 
Jeremiah12:12 Tur luŋ ame tye i tim, otyek piny doŋ obino oko i komgi, pien pala me lweny a Rwot jwero odoco, cakere i but lobo tuŋcel tuno kede tuŋ ocele, mom tye ginnoro akwo ame tye i kuc," 
Jeremiah12:13 Gin ocoo bel, okuto en ame te luŋyo nyak, obedo tiyo tic atek kun ool atek, cite mom onwoŋo ginnoro iye. Lewic bino makogi i gin ame ocek i pottigi, pi akemo ager ame onwoŋo omako Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Rwot okobo kop i kom otim tim areco luŋ ame bedo i ŋet jo mere Icrael ame tye ka balo lobo ame onwoŋo emio baŋ jo mere, ni, “Nen ba, abino kwanyogi oko i lobo a jona Icrael, dok abino kwanyo jo Juda oko ak inagi." 
Jeremiah12:15 Kare ame doŋ atyeko kwanyogi oko, kica dok bino maka i komgi ate dwokogi i lobogi kun ŋat acel acel dok i lobo ame rik opokke." 
Jeremiah12:16 Dok icennere ka kare oromo ame gin doŋ opwonyo kite a jona kun okwoŋo kede nyiŋa ni, ‘Kite ame Rwot tye kede kwo-ni’, i kite ame rik opwonyo kede jona me kwoŋ i nyiŋ Baal, gin bino rubere oko i jona ote doko atek i akinagi." 
Jeremiah12:17 Cite ka rokkoro i akinagi mom bino winyo koppa, abino kwanyo rokkono oko i akinagi ate tyeko oko ducu, man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Wot iwil bono camanini ame oruko i pyer, me itwe i pyeri cite kur ilut i pii kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 An daŋ ate lubo kop a Rwot, ate wot wilobono-nono, ate daŋ bino ruko i pyera." 
Jeremiah13:3 Rwot dok te kobba tyen me aryo mere ni," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Gony doŋ bono-nono oko i pyeri, ya iwot i dog kulo Epurate, wot ikan oko kunu iyi akina kiddi ame obarre.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 An daŋ ate ya wot, ate wot kano bono-nono i Epurate, kite ame Rwot ocika kede," 
Jeremiah13:6 Kare ame kare doŋ okato alalac. Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Aco dok i dok i dog kulo Epurate me iwot ikwany bono ame rik ikano kuno-ni,”" 
Jeremiah13:7 An daŋ dok ate wot i dog kulo Epurate ate wot kunyo bono ca kwanyo oko i kan ame onwoŋo akano iye. Ate nwoŋo boŋo naca doŋ oballe oko ame konnyere doŋ mom. 
Jeremiah13:8 Rwot dok te kop keda ni," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Abino daŋ balo awaka a jo Juda kittono karacel kede wakere a Jerucalem ame dwon meicel wok-ki. 
Jeremiah13:10 Jo man areco ame dag winyo koppa-ni, ame olubo ka tam ame ya i cunygi apala apala, dok obedo lubo gigi obaŋe mogo ocele, kun owo rogi dok daŋ otio pirgi. Abino miyogi obedo calobone-ni ame konyere doŋ mom." 
Jeremiah13:11 Kite acalobono pyer moko i pyer, amannono daŋ onwoŋo amio jo luŋ me ot Icrael kede me ot a Juda omoko amoka i koma me gin obed jo ame mio nyiŋa bedo aber i akina rok ocele dok omio opaka dokoketo kwogo i koma, cite gin gigi okwero winyo koppa oko, man kop a Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni, “Yin ibino kobbigi ni, ‘Kono olok bino poŋ gulo acel acel, gin bino gamo koppi ni, “Ce ni wan mom oŋeo ni kono olok bino poŋ i gulo acel acel?” ’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Yin dok ite kobbigi ni, ‘Nen ba, Rwot okobo ni ebino miyo jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo-ni mer i kono. Obakki ame bedo i kom loc a Daudi, olamdog, odwarpiny, karacel kede jo luŋ me Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah13:14 Abino cacanyogi piny, kun acanyo ŋat acel acel i kom wadgi, odoŋe kede awobegi karacel. Mom abino paro, mom abino koyo ŋattoro dok kica mom bino maka kadi acel ni mom myero anekgi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Cik yitwu iwiny wunu, kur iwakere wunu, pien Rwot doŋ okobo." 
Jeremiah13:16 Mi wunu kwogo baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, kun en mom ru omio piny ocido, ame tyenwu mom ru otwomere i ginnoro, colpiny ame tye i wi kiddi malo, kun en mom ru omio odoko twon mutu acol icuc en te loko lero-nono doko twon ginnoro acel odoco." 
Jeremiah13:17 Cite ka ce mom ibino winyo wunu koppa, abino kok liliŋ i cunya pi wakerewu, abino kok atek ame pig waŋa ryoryo tye aony piny aonya, pien jo a Rwot doŋ otero oko i opii." 
Jeremiah13:18 Kob baŋ abaka kede baŋ tottere ni, “Gin myero oya oko i komgi obin i kabedo i piny, pien kwogogi ame malo wokkono, doŋ oya oko i wigi obino piny." 
Jeremiah13:19 Boma a jo Negeb luŋ doŋ ocego oko, ame ŋattoro ame twero yabo mom tye, jo Juda luŋ doŋ otero oko acalo opii, gin luŋ aluŋa oterogi oko opii." 
Jeremiah13:20 “Koŋ itiŋ waŋi malo me inen, jo ame tye abino i tutuŋ anyarodi. Lwak jo apipim ame rik omiowuni kara aman tye kwene, lwak jowu abeco wok-ca?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Kara ibino kobo ŋo ka ce jo ame yam yin ipwonyo i komi ni gin bin bed owotewu, doŋ tye ka loyowu? Rem mom bino ciri oko, calo dako amerem me nywal ogoo." 
Jeremiah13:22 Dok ka ikobo i cunyi ni, ‘Piŋo kara kodi gin-ni otimere i koma Otimere pien balli doŋ dwon atek meicel, omio naka boŋo i pyeri oelo oko, ame mato ayet a jo doŋ ociri oko.’" 
Jeremiah13:23 Dano me Eciopia twero loko del ko me, akadi kwac aliŋaliŋa mere? Ka ce amannono, wun ame iŋa wunu ti mo gin arac keken-ni daŋ itwero pwonyere wunu me timo gin aber." 
Jeremiah13:24 Abino keketowu atata calo cun kai, ame yamo ame kodo i tim kolo te tero oko," 
Jeremiah13:25 Man en gin ame doŋ atyeko pokki, megi ame doŋ atyeko pimo oko piri, pien wii owil oko i koma, ite luŋyo geno goba, man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah13:26 An ikoma abino elobono i pyeri ate bolo i nyimi malo, komi me lweic te nen kannaler." 
Jeremiah13:27 Atyeko doŋ ŋe no gin me kwer ame itimo wunu, tim me cot kede koko me agoma yic, kede tim me alaya ame i bedo ti mo wunu i wi kiddi malo. Can i wi Jerucalem doi! Man kara bino bedo ri kare a rom mene ba, kun mom ru omiowu idoko wunu acil?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Man kop ame Rwot okobo baŋ Jeremia i kom can pii ame opoto i Juda, en okobo ni," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Juda tye ka kumo, dogcel iye luŋ tye ka tutura oko. Jo Juda luŋ obuto piny i lobo, i twon cwercuny adwoŋ meicel. Jo Jerucalem daŋ tye akok i dwon aloŋo meicel." 
Jeremiah14:3 Jo me awora iye tye ka cwayo oticgi me omo pii, gin woto kan ame pii awaa, ote lokere dok cen kun gi-geyo pii yigi nono, pien pii onwoŋo pe, Alee twodogi i twon lewic adwoŋ meicel, jo te dok paco ame owumo wigi oko." 
Jeremiah14:4 Pi lobo ame doŋ oballe oko, kite ame kot mom doŋ cwe kede i lobo, lewic doŋ tye ka mako opur meicel, owumo doŋ wigi awuma." 
Jeremiah14:5 Naka til i tim daŋ tye ka kwero itinogi ame pwod onywalo anyen, pien lum mom tye." 
Jeremiah14:6 Kana me tim doŋ ocuŋ i wi tur malo kan a lummoro mom iye, onamo doggi alac me mato yamo calo ekwe, waŋgi doŋ orwobere oko, pien lummoro me acamagi mom tye." 
Jeremiah14:7 “Kadi bed bal wa tye ka dotowa, Ama Rwot, tim ginnoro pi nyiŋi. Wan kare luŋ otye ka dok cen kun oya oko i baŋi, wan doŋ otyeko balo i nyimi," 
Jeremiah14:8 Ama Rwot, gen a jo Icrael tye komi, yin en ilarogi i kare ame peko opoto i komgi. Piŋo kara itye ibedo i lobowa calo orokkoro, onyo acalo dano ame woto awota ame tye ka yenyo kabuto?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Piŋo ibedo calo dano ame wie ocuŋ oko, acalo lo atek meicel i lweny cite mom twero laro ŋattoro? Aco ka bedo amannono, yin Rwot gire itye i akinawa, dok otye ka lwoŋowa kede nyiŋi; kur iwekwa ba.”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Rwot okobo kop i kom jo mere ni, “Gin gigi yam omaro wot kittono, mom oye bedo karacel. Mannono omio Rwot mom gamogi, aman en doŋ bino poyo balgi, te keto can i komgi pire.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Rwot rik te kobba ni, “Kur ikwa ni an akony lwak man obed aber." 
Jeremiah14:12 Kadi bed okany kec, cite an gira mom abino winyo kokogi; kadi bed oyala kede mot awaŋa kede mot me moko kwon, mom gira abino gamo kadi acel. Ento an abino nekogi oko i pala me romo, i kec kede too edeke.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 An ate gamo ni, “Nen ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, odwarpiny onwoŋo okobbigi ni, ‘Mom ibino neno wunu pala lweny, kec mom bino poto i lobowu ento abino miyowu kuc ikokome i kabedo man.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Rwot te kobba ni, “Odwarpiny tye ka rabo kop me goba kun otio kede nyiŋa: an gira onwoŋo mom acwaogi, mom daŋ acikogi, akadi kop kedgi. Gin otye ka rabbiwu pi anyuttogo me goba, kun otyeto tyet ame konnyere mom, dok obwolo jo abwola i tam ame tye i cunygi kengi." 
Jeremiah14:15 Mannono omio an a Rwot akobo kop i kom odwarpiny ame tye ka rabo kop kun otio i nyiŋa aco kun an mom acwaogi, ame kobo ni, ‘Pala lweny kede kec mom bino tuno i lobo man kadi acel’. Doŋ ba, pala lweny kede kec en abino neko kodi odwarpinnyono." 
Jeremiah14:16 Aco jo ame gin orabo koppono baŋgi, obino bologi oko i dye yo me Jerucalem, aboŋo ŋattoro ame myero yik komgi. Pala lweny kede kec en abino nekogi. Man bino timere i komgi gin luŋ anaka mongi, itinogi awobe kede anyira. Timgi areco-nono abino dwoko i komgi." 
Jeremiah14:17 “Yin ibino kobbigi kop man, ni, ‘Wek pig waŋa ony piny dyewor kede dyeceŋ, kur imi pig waŋa gik, pien jona ame amaro otyeko goyogi i twon bur adola arac meicel, owaŋo arac meicel," 
Jeremiah14:18 Ka ce awoto i dye tim, nen, anwoŋo kom jo oneko pala lweny dwoŋ atata! Dok ka awoto i boma, nen kite ame jo ame two two me kec pol kede! Pien odwarpiny kede olamdog tio ticgi i akina lwak luŋ, kun mom oŋeo ginnoro kadi acel.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Yin doŋ ityeko kwero Juda odoco? Cunyi doŋ dag neno Cion? Kara igoowa pino ba, ame mom doŋ oromo can-ni? Obedo ka yenyo kuc, cite ginnoro aber mom nen, oyenyo kare ame myero ocaŋ iye cite ocop ka i gin ame ke lo lworo keken." 
Jeremiah14:20 Ama Rwot, doŋ oniaŋ balwa, naka bal a kwariwa daŋ, pien wan luŋ otimo bal i nyimi." 
Jeremiah14:21 Kur cunyi balle oko i komwa, pi gwoko nyiŋi, dok daŋ kur ikel lewic i kom kom kwogo me locci; poyo ba, me kur itur cikereni oko kedwa." 
Jeremiah14:22 Tye obaŋa moro i akina obaŋe orok, ame romo miyo kot cwe? Onyo ca polo twero miyo kot ŋido i lobo? Mom yin en itio magi luŋ, Ama Rwot Obaŋawa? Wan giwa ogeni, pien yin en itimo jami magi luŋ." 
Jeremiah15:1 Rwot te kobba ni, “Kadi bed Muca kede Camwiri rik ocuŋ i nyima, mom atwero loko cunya i kom jo man kadi acel. Cwagi oko teŋe i nyima; migi owot oko teŋe!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Ka ce gin openyi ni, Kara owot kwene? Yin ibino gamo kopgi ni, Rwot okobo ni ba, Jo ame bino to i too edeke, to edeke bino neko, jo ame bino to i pala lweny, pala lweny bino neko, Jo ame kec bino neko, bino to i kec, jo ame obino tero oko i opii, bino wot i opii.”" 
Jeremiah15:3 Rwot okobo ni, “Abino keto onek a kitegi papat aŋwen pirgi, abino miyo pala lweny nekogi, gwogi bino kikilogi atitino, eka winy ame twarre malo kede leyi me tim te bedo me camo komgi odoco." 
Jeremiah15:4 Dok abino miyogi odoko gin me kwer ame jo luŋ i wi podo bino lworogi, pi gin ame Manace wot a Kejekia otimo i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Ŋa ame kica bino mako i komwu, wun jo me Jerucalem, onyo ŋa ame bino kumo pirwu? Kara ŋa ame doŋ bino cun, me penyo kite ame itye wunu kede?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Rwot okobo ni, wun gire ityeko kwera wunu oko, kare luŋ itye ka dok wunu adoka cen; mannono omio doŋ atyeko ryeyo ciŋa, aryeo ciŋa i komi ate nekowu oko; aol doŋ oko i loko tamma i komwu." 
Jeremiah15:7 Abedo pyetowu kede odero i dogcel, ame tye i lobowu luŋ, Anekowu atyekowu oko, wun jona, cite mom iye wunu weko yo ame itye wunu ka lubo." 
Jeremiah15:8 Amio wei to omedde ameda i lobowu, ame kato kwoyo ame tye i dog nam oko, Aneko awobewu oko ame komgi pwod tek, amio totogi obedo i twon can apek meicel. Amio cwercuny kede lworo omakogi atura meicel." 
Jeremiah15:9 Dako ame onywalo itino abiro cunye ogem oko doŋ, mom twero nwoŋo yo moro me wee: baŋe, ceŋ poto ame piny pwod ler alera, lewic omio odoko ayot oko. Jo odoŋ luŋ abino miyo to i pala lweny, i nyim okworgi, Man kop a Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Kwona tekkadi! Kara piŋo totta onywala? Nen kare luŋ atye ka lweny onyo daa i jo luŋ ame tye i lobo. Mom amio ŋattoro okoporo gira moro, an daŋ mom akoporo gi-a-ŋattoro, cite gin luŋ ocena acena." 
Jeremiah15:11 Ama Rwot, mi cen ame gin ocena kede-nono ocobere ka ce mom abedo timo gin ame tye atira i nyimi, dok daŋ mom abedo laro kop kedi pi okworra i kare ame gin onwoŋo tye kede peko, kede i kare ame gin tye i cwercuny!" 
Jeremiah15:12 Dano twero turo nyonyo, nyonyo ame okelo i tutuŋ anyarodi karacel kede mola?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Lonyowu kede ginnoro luŋ ame ikano wunu abino miyo bedo me ayaka, kun mom oculo ginnoro pirgi, pi balwu, ame doŋ otyeko lal oromo lobowu luŋ," 
Jeremiah15:14 Abino miyo itio wunu pi okworwu i lobo ame mom iŋeo wunu, pien akemo doŋ omio mac ocako lyel oko, mac ame bino waŋowu nakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Jeremia te kobo ni, “Ama Rwot, yin gire iŋeo jami ducu; po pira dok ikonya daŋ, cul kwor i kom jo ame mito neka. Kadi bed idio cunyi wok, kur iwekgi oneka oko, ŋe ni atye ka kanyo acae okato kare piri," 
Jeremiah15:16 kare ame ikobo keda, awinyo koppi ducu, koppi te doko gin ame kella yomcuny, kun alelo atek meicel i cunya; pien jo tye ka lwoŋa kede nyiŋi, Ama Rwot Obaŋa me mony." 
Jeremiah15:17 Rik mom abedo balo kare i jo ocele kun anyero i yomcuny, mom daŋ abedo i yomcunyoro kadi acel. Abedo bedo kena, pien ciŋi onwoŋo tye i koma, yin onwoŋo iketo akemo i cunya." 
Jeremiah15:18 Piŋo kara rem ame atye kede mom tye ka gik, bur i koma daŋ doŋ mom twero can, okwero doŋ can oko? Yin ce doŋ imito bedda calo waŋ pii ame bwolo jo abwola, calo pii ame kare ocele two oko-ni ce?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni, “Ka ce ilokere idwogo baŋa, abino gami, ite dok bedo cuŋ i nyima kare luŋ. Ka ce ibedo kobo kop abeco ame konygi tye, kun mom ikobo kop ame konygi mom, abino miyi ikobo kop ame kono an akob i koma, Gin bino lokere bino baŋi, cite yin myero kur idok baŋgi." 
Jeremiah15:20 Abino keti ibedo baŋ jo man calo twon celloro, ame ocelo atek i mola, gin bino lweny kedi, cite mom obino loyi kadi acel, pien an atye kedi, me konyi kede me lari." 
Jeremiah15:21 Abino lari i cin otim tim areco, kede me lakoro yin i cin jo ame kica mom i cunygi.” Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah16:1 Rwot dok te k obba ni. 
Jeremiah16:2 “Yin mom ibino nyomo dako moro, dok mom ibino bedo atin awobi moro onyo nyako moro i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah16:3 Pien Rwot okobo kop i kom itino awobe kede itino anyira ame obino nywalo i kabedo man, karacel kede i kom totogi kede papagi ame onywalgi i lobo man." 
Jeremiah16:4 En okobo ni gin bino to i twon two moro arac meicel. Mom obino kokogi dok daŋ mom obino yiko komgi. Komgi bino radde atata i kabedo luŋ calo cet dyaŋ. Pala lweny kede kec en abino nekogi, eka winy ame twarre malo kede leyi me tim en ate camo komgi.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Pien Rwot okobo ni, “Kur idony i ot ame otye ka kumo iye, kur daŋ iwot kan ame jo akoko iye, kur daŋ ikum pirgi, pien doŋ atyeko kwanyo kucca oko i baŋ jo mera, kede marra a mom lokere, karacel kede kicana." 
Jeremiah16:6 Jo adoŋo kede jo atino bino to i lobo man; mom obino yiko komgi, mom obino kumo pirgi, dok ŋattoro mom bino ŋoŋolo kome kene onyo lyelo wie pirgi." 
Jeremiah16:7 Mom tye ŋattoro ame bino nywako cam i ŋat akumo, me kweyo cunye pi dano ame oto; Dok mom tye ŋattoro ame bino miyo ginnoro me amata ame nyuto cuny me kica baŋ dano ame pappere onyo tottere oto." 
Jeremiah16:8 Kur idony i ot ame jo tye acamo iye arama, me cam kedgi kede matte karacel kedgi.”" 
Jeremiah16:9 Pien Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino giko woo luŋ me yomcuny i lobo man, i karewu, kun ineno wunu kede waŋwu. Dok abino giko daŋ dwon anyom kede dwon atera." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Kare ame doŋ ityeko kobo kop man luŋ baŋgi, eka gin te kobbi ni, ‘Piŋo kara Rwot orabo pi twoni tim magi areco ni me timere i komwa? Bal aŋo ce ame wan obalo? Bal aŋo ame wan obalo i kom Rwot Obaŋawa?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Yin ibino gamo kopgi ni, ‘Pien kwariwu rik oweka oko, ote bedo lubo obaŋe mogo ocele, kun otio baŋgi dok oworogi. Gin rik oweka oko dok daŋ okwero winyo kede lubo cikka." 
Jeremiah16:12 Cite wun doŋ itimo wunu gin arac meicel ame kato kwariwu oko, pien ŋat acel acel i akinawu obedo bedo apala apala kun lubo tammere arac dok kun kwero winyo koppa oko." 
Jeremiah16:13 Mannono omio abino kwanyowu oko i lobo man, ate bolowu i lobo moro ame wun karacel kede kwariwu mom yam iŋeo wunu. Ibino tic wunu baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele kuno, kun itio wunu dyeceŋ kede dyewor, pien kica moro mom bino maka i komwu.’" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Pi mannono, nen ba, tye nino mogo ame tye abino, ame mom dok obino kobo iye ni, ‘Kite acalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, Rwot ame okwanyo jo Icrael i lobo me Miciri’," 
Jeremiah16:15 ento ni, ‘Kite acalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, Rwot ame okwanyo jo Icrael i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi karacel kede i lobo ocele luŋ ame rik en oryemogi oterogi iye,’ Rwot okobo. Pien abino dwoggogi cen i lobogi ame rik amio baŋ kwarigi.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen, abino cwayo jo apol ame bino makogi calo rec; icennere dok abino cwayo jo apol ame bino dwarogi i kabedo luŋ calo leyi i wi kiddi i kabedo luŋ obedo kidikidi kede i akina lela obarre." 
Jeremiah16:17 Pien atye ka neno kite ame gin bedo kede luŋ; mom tye moro iye ame mom aneno, anaka balgi mom tye moro ame mom aneno." 
Jeremiah16:18 Abino culogi pi gin ame gin otimo arac kede pi balgi tye aryo, pien gin obalo lobona oko i cal jogigi ame rom aroma i kom jo oto nono. Gin doŋ otye ka timo timmogo me kwer adwoŋ okato kare i lobo ame obedo mega.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Ama Rwot, yin ame ibedo tekona kede twon celloro atek ame gwoka, kan ame alaro i kare ame atye i peko. Rok luŋ i kabedo ducu naka i agikki piny, gin luŋ obino baŋi, kun okobo ni, “Kwariwa yam oleo gigi mogo a konygi mom, gin me goba keken, gigi mogo ame konygi mom ame mom oromo nwoŋo iye ginnoro." 
Jeremiah16:20 Dano twero tiyo Obaŋa mere pire kene? Kodi ginnono mom obedo obaŋa kadi acel! 
Jeremiah16:21 “Mannono omio abino miyogi oŋeo icel doŋ keken, abino miyogi oŋeo tekona kede twerre, dok daŋ obino ŋeyo ni nyiŋa obedo Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 “Bal a jo Juda doŋ otyeko coyo oko piny kede alam nyonyo; otyeko daŋ doŋ goro oko i cunygi kede alam daimon ame lebe bit, kede i kom tuŋ keno lamgi," 
Jeremiah17:2 kun itinogi po i kom keno lamgi kede jok a dako ame olwoŋo ni Acera ame ocibo i ŋet yen luŋ ame obuŋere, i kabedo luŋ ame obedo kidikidi," 
Jeremiah17:3 i wi kiddi luŋ ame tye i bar kannaler. Lonyowu kede gin ame ikano wunu abino doko me ayaka acalo gin me culo balwu ame doŋ itimo wunu i lobowu luŋ. 
Jeremiah17:4 Ibino kwanyo cinwu i kom ginnoro luŋ ame yam arruowu me bedo megwu, dok abino miyowu itio wunu baŋ okworwu i lobo ame mom iŋeo wunu, pien akemo doŋ omio pi ocako lyel oko, mac ame bino waŋowu nakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Rwot okobo ni, “Cen myero mak ŋat ame keto gennere i kom dano wadgi, ame mio dano wadgi doko ka jeŋere mere, ame cunye ya oko i geno Rwot." 
Jeremiah17:6 Kodi dano-nono rom aroma i yat a tye i tim, dok dano-nono mom neno ginnoro aber ame bino baŋe. Bino bedo i tim kan ame otwo ikaŋ, i lobo obedo kadokado, kan ame jo mom bedo iye." 
Jeremiah17:7 Dano ame geno Rwot, tye kede winyo, ame gennere luŋ tye i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah17:8 Dano-nono rom aroma i yat ame opito kan a pii tye iye, ame cwalo lwite donyo piny i kulo, kare ame lyeto ocakere en mom bedo kede lworo moro, pote gire bedo adyaka kare luŋ, mom paro pi ceŋ ame ryeny kare luŋ aboŋo kot, pien en nyak gire kare ducu aboŋo gik.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 Goba dwoŋ i cuny dano ame kato ginnoro luŋ, kom gin araccono en a doŋ obalo dano meicel; ŋa ame twero niaŋ gin ame tye i cuny dano?" 
Jeremiah17:10 “An a Rwot aŋio tam a dano, dok atemo cuny dano, me miyo ŋat acel acel gin ame oporo kite mere, kun lubo adwoggi me gin ame en tio.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Calo atakara ame cokocoko itino ame en mom obeko i te bwome, ŋat ame lim nya i ciŋe i yore a mom atira, daŋ cal kittono; limmono ya oko i ciŋe i kare moro keken me kwo mere, i agikki en doko dano amiŋ." 
Jeremiah17:12 Kan ame oworo iye Obaŋawa calo kom me kwogo, ame ocuŋ malo i wi kidi cakere con i acakki." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ama Rwot, gen a jo Icrael tye i komi, jo luŋ ame ya oko i baŋi, lewic mako, jo luŋ ame ya oko i baŋi, nyiŋgi bino rwenyo oko acalo coc ame ocoo ikwo, pien gin otyeko weko Rwot oko, ame obedo akoŋ ame pii me kwo tye iye." 
Jeremiah17:14 Tim ber icana, me acaŋ doŋ oko, lara, me doŋ alare, pien an gira apaki yin keken." 
Jeremiah17:15 Nen jo bedo penya ni, “Kop a Rwot tono kara tye kwene? Koŋ imi bin ba!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 An gira mom abedo diyi me cwayo gin arac, mom daŋ abedo mito nino ame can apek myero pot iye, yin gire iŋeo mannono aber; ginnoro luŋ ame an abedo kobo, onwoŋo yin iwinyo luŋ." 
Jeremiah17:17 Kur ibed gin ame mia lworo, yin ibedo kan ame an alaro i kare arac." 
Jeremiah17:18 Mi lewic mak jo ame wuna, ento kur imigi omi lewic maka, mi cunygi poti, cite kur imi cunya an poti, mi nino arac bin i komgi, nekgi oko ducu i yore arac meicel." 
Jeremiah17:19 Rwot okobo baŋa ni, “Wot icun i dogcel a Benjamin, ame abaka me Juda donyo kede i boma dok daŋ kato kede oko ka oya i boma, kede i dogcel luŋ me Jerucalem," 
Jeremiah17:20 eka ite kobo ni, ‘Winy wunu kop a Rwot wun obakki me Juda kede wun jo me Juda luŋ, kede jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem ame bea i dogcel magi." 
Jeremiah17:21 Rwot okobo ni myero inen ni igwoko wunu kwowu, myero kur iye wunu yeccoro i nino me cabit, dok daŋ myero kur ikel wunu ginnoro i nino-nono kun ibeo wunu i dogcel me Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah17:22 Kur daŋ itin wunu ginnoro i udiwu iter wunu oko i nino me cabit, akadi tiyo ticcoro, cite myero ikwer wunu nino me cabit bed acil, kite ame rik aciko kede kwariwu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kadi amannono, gin gigi rik mom owinyo, mom daŋ ociko yitgi me winyo koppa, cite omio ŋutgi obedo ka anwaŋ, me mom owiny dok daŋ mom ogam pwonnyoro." 
Jeremiah17:24 “ ‘Cite ka wun iwinyo wunu koppa, eka mom ite yeyo wunu yeccoro beo wunu kede i dogcel luŋ me boma man i cen cabit, cite kwero wunu i nino-nono obedo acil kun mom daŋ itio wunu iye ticcoro," 
Jeremiah17:25 mannono bino miyo obakki ame bino bedo i wi kom loc a Daudi beo i dogcel magi, kun oriŋo i gadigadi kede aguragura, obino donyo karacel kede rwodegi, kede jo luŋ me Juda karacel kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem. Boma man doŋ luŋ jo bino bedo iye nakanaka." 
Jeremiah17:26 Jo bino bino kun oya i boma luŋ me Juda, kede kabedo luŋ ame oguro Jerucalem, i lobo me Cepela, i lobo obedo kidikidi, kede i Negeb, kun okelo mot awaŋa, kit mot ocele me amia baŋ Rwot, mot me moko kwon, odokkogo ame ŋwecgi kur, dok daŋ okelo mot me pwoyo Rwot i ot a Rwot." 
Jeremiah17:27 Cite ka mom iwinyo wunu koppa, mom igwoko wunu ceŋ me cabit obedo acil, cite iyeo wunu yec ite beo wunu kede i dogcel me Jerucalem i nino me cabit, abino moko mac i dogcellono luŋ, maccono te waŋo udi adoŋo me Jerucalem luŋ, maccono mom obino neko kadi acel.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo baŋ Jeremia," 
Jeremiah18:2 en okobo ni, “Jeremia ya iwot i ot acwe gulu, abino miyi iwinyo koppa i kare ame itye kuno.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 An daŋ ate ya wot i ot acwe gulu, ate nwoŋo en tye acweyo gulu mere i kom okot me cweyo gulu mere." 
Jeremiah18:4 Gulu lobo ame en tye acweyo-nono te balle oko i kare ame en tye acweyo, en te nyonyobo oko, te t iyo i gin ocele kite ame en amito." 
Jeremiah18:5 Rwot te kobba ni," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Wun jo me ot Icrael, ce ni an mom aromo timowu kite ame acwe gulu otimo cae? Wun jo ot Icrael, myero iŋe wunu ni kite ame lobo tye kede i ciŋ acwe gulu, wun daŋ itye wunu kittono i ciŋa." 
Jeremiah18:7 Ka ce i kare moro an akobo kop i kom rokkoro onyo i kom loccoro ni mannono abino puto, abino turo ate tyeko odoco," 
Jeremiah18:8 doŋ ka ce rok ame akobo kop i komgi-nono bino weko lubo yo ame onwoijo otye ka lubo, abino weko timo gin arac ame onwoijo ayikere me timo i komgi." 
Jeremiah18:9 Dok ka ce i kare moro an akobo kop i kom rokkoro onyo i kom loccoro ni mannono an abino pito ate daŋ gero doki," 
Jeremiah18:10 ka ce rokkono te dok timo bal i nyima, kun mom owinyo koppa, cunya bino ya oko i kom gin aber ame onwoŋo ayikere me timo i komgi." 
Jeremiah18:11 Aman doŋ ba, yin myero i kobbi jo me Juda kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem ni, an atye ka yiko gin arac pirgi, dok daŋ ayikere me keto can i komgi. Doŋ myero gin iye lokere, ŋat acel acel myero wek lubo yo arac ame yam elubo, dok myero iyik kwowu kede ticwu." 
Jeremiah18:12 “Cite gin te gamo ni, ‘Mannono kom konyere mom! Wan giwa obino lubo gin ame wan ikomwa otyeko yiko, dok ŋat acel acel daŋ bino timo tim me apala apala kite ame cunye tele kede’.”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni, “Koŋ ipepenyo i akina orok, kodi timmo yam koŋ otimere kare moro? Jo Icrael ame amaro, otimo twon ginnoro ame iyiliyili meicel." 
Jeremiah18:14 Tye kare moro ame itwero onwoŋo pee orwenyo i wi kiddi me Lebanon, onyo kulo ame pii mere ŋic ame mol kun ya i wi kidi, twero two imek kare moro?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Cite jona wigi owil oko i koma, owaŋo gin a ŋwece kur oyalo obaŋe mogo ocele. Orwenyo doŋ oko i yo ame otye ka lubo, oweko lubo yo acon oko, olubo doŋ yo mogo atitino, mom olubo yo gudo." 
Jeremiah18:16 Omio lobogi obedo gin ame mio jo lworo, obedo doŋ kan ame jo bino bedo cayo nakanaka kun ojwiye ka otuno iye. Ŋat acel acel ame beo iye bino bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, mio bedo yeno wie ayeŋa." 
Jeremiah18:17 Abino keketogi oko i nyim okworgi, calo apua ame yamo me tuŋ kide tye akolo. Abino nyuttigi ŋea, cite mom waŋa, i kare ame can opoto i komgi.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Gin te kobo ni, “Biye wunu, me obin opor wunu kop arac ikom Jeremia! Olamdog gire mom bino rwenyo i baŋwa i kare moro me pwonyowa, oryek o daŋ bino bedo miyowa tam, odwarpiny daŋ bino bedo rabbiwa kop. Biye wunu, obin opwode wunu i koppogo apek, mom myero omedde winyo koppere moro.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Jeremia te kwayo Obaŋa kun kobo ni, “Tim ber, Ama Rwot, iwiny kop ame atye ka kobo-ni, kede gin ame okworra tye ka kobo i koma." 
Jeremiah18:20 Gin aber oculo i gin arac bo? Aco koŋ inen, gin doŋ otyeko kunyo bur me kwanyo kwona. Po ba pi kite ame abedo cuŋ kede i nyimi kun akobo kop aber i komgi, me ikwany akemoni oko i komgi." 
Jeremiah18:21 Pi mannono myero imi kec nek itinogi; mi pala me romo nekgi, mi mongi doŋ nono aboŋo itino kede coggi. Mi two edeke nek coggi luŋ, kun awobegi ame pwod tino ococobo i pala romo i mony." 
Jeremiah18:22 Mi koko winyere i udigi, i kare ame icwao mony i komgi atura meicel! Pien gin doŋ otyeko kunyo bur me kwanyo kwona oko, dok daŋ ociko owic me maka." 
Jeremiah18:23 Kadi amannono, yin Rwot gire iŋeo ginnoro luŋ ame gin tye ka poro i koma me neka. Kur itimgi kica i balgi-nono, ti tic i komgi kare ame akemo omaki.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Wot iwil cupa ame acwe gulo ocweo kede lobo, kwany odoŋe ame loo lwak kede olamdog oteggo mege ame ori i tic," 
Jeremiah19:2 wot i jonnono naka i luŋ a wot a Kinom, kun idonyo wunu i dogcel me boma ame olwoŋo ni Abaltak, ite kobo kop ame abino kobbi-ni luŋ kuno." 
Jeremiah19:3 Ibino kobo ni, ‘Winy wunu kop ame Rwot okobo wunu obakki me Juda kede wun jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem. Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Nen an akelo gin arac i kabedo man ame ŋat acel acel ame bino winyo i yitgi, yit bino bedo mor amora kare luŋ." 
Jeremiah19:4 Pien jo otyeko weka oko, gin obalo kabedo man i waŋo gin a ŋwece kur me yalo obaŋe mogo ocele, ame akadi gin ikomgi, akadi kwarigi, akadi obakkigi yam mom ŋeo. Pien gin doŋ omio remo a jo a mom i bal oony meicel i kabedo man," 
Jeremiah19:5 dok daŋ ogero ka woro Baal i wi kiddi malo ame owaŋo iye itinogi awobe me yalo Baal acalo mot awaŋagi, ame an gira rik mom acikogi pire dok daŋ rik mom atamo pire kadi acel, mom daŋ amio cikkoro pire," 
Jeremiah19:6 pi mannono, nen ba, Rwot okobo ni nino tye abino ame kabedo mom dok obino medo lwoŋo kabedo man ni Topet, onyo ni luŋ a wot a Kinom, cite ni luŋ me neko jo." 
Jeremiah19:7 Dok i kabedo man, en ame abino balo iye yik a jo Juda kede jo Jerucalem. Abino miyo pala lweny neko jogi iye i nyim okworgi, kede i ciŋ jo ame mito nekogi. Kom jogi oto bino doko cam a winy ame twarre malo kede me a leyi ame bedo i lobo." 
Jeremiah19:8 Abino miyo boma man bedo gin ame mio jo lworo, kun kan ame jo ka otuno iye jwiye ajwia, ŋat acel acel ame bedo iye lworo mako, te bedo jwiye ajwia pi can ame opoto iye." 
Jeremiah19:9 Abino miyogi ocamo kom itinogi kede me anyiragi, kun ŋat acel acel camo kom dano wadgi i kare ame mony ogurogi kede i kare ame otye kede peko, kan adiŋ meicel, ame nwoŋo okworgi kede jo ame mito nekogi okelo i komgi’." 
Jeremiah19:10 “I kare-nono en ame ibino neko iye cupa i nyim jo ame onwoŋo owoto kedi," 
Jeremiah19:11 eka ite kobbigi ni, ‘Rwot me mony okobo ni, Abino turo rok man kede boma man kittono, kite a dano turo kede gin ame ocweo i lobo ame mom dok romo yikere. Jo bino yiko komjogi oto i Topet, pien kannoro ocele bino bedo mom me yiko jo." 
Jeremiah19:12 Rwot okobo ni, abino timo kabedo man kittono, karacel kede jo ame bedo iye, kun amio kabedo man bedo calo Topet." 
Jeremiah19:13 Udi me Jerucalem kede udi obakki me Juda, udi luŋ ame onwoŋo owaŋo gin akur i wigi me yalo ginnoro luŋ ame tye i akina mony me polo, dok daŋ oonyo iye mot amata baŋ obaŋegi ocele mege, bino balle oko calo kabedo ame tye i Toper’.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Jeremia doŋ te ya oko i Topet, kan ame Rwot onwoŋo ocwae iye me wot rabo koppere, eka te bino cuŋ i dyekal me ot a Rwot, te kobbijo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye kuno ni," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Nen ba, An akelo i kom boma man adwoŋ kede i kom boma atino mege luŋ ginnoro arac luŋ ame doŋ atyeko rabo pire i komgi, pien gin omio ŋutgi obedo anwaŋ, kun okwero winyo koppa oko.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 I kare-nono Packur wot a Immer, ame rik obedo alamdog adwoŋŋere ame loo ot a Rwot, owinyo ka Jeremia rabo kop magi." 
Jeremiah20:2 Packur rik te goyo Jeremia adwarpiny i caa-nono cutu, te make tweye oko i kol, te kette malo i yi dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel a Benjamin ame bedo malo i ot a Rwot." 
Jeremiah20:3 Orwo mere, i kare ame Packur ogonyo Jeremia i kol, Jeremia okobbe ni, “Rwot gire mom lwoŋi ni Packur, cite en lwoŋi ni Lworo tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi." 
Jeremiah20:4 Pien Rwot okobo ni, Nen ba, abino miyo yin ibedo gin ame yin ikomi ilworo, dok owoteni daŋ lworo. Pala lweny okworgi bino nekogi kun yin ineno. Abino miyo jo Juda luŋ i cin abaka me Babulon, en bino terogi oko acalo opii i Babulon, bino nekogi i pala romo." 
Jeremiah20:5 Medo i kom mannono, abino miyo lonyo luŋ ame tye i bomawu, ago ba moro luŋ ame inwoŋo wunu ame tye iye ginnoro luŋ iye ame pirgi littiwu kede kit lonyo apapat ame obakki me Juda okano, abino miyogi luŋ i ciŋ okworgi, ame bino mako oko ote yako tero oko i Babulon." 
Jeremiah20:6 Doŋ yin Packur karacel kede jo luŋ ame bedo i odi, obino terowu oko luŋ acalo opii. Ibino wot wunu i Babulon kan ame ibino to wunu iye kuno, ote yiko komwu daŋ kuno, yin karacel kede owoteni ame ibedo rabbigi kop me gobagoba.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Ama Rwot, yin doŋ ibwola, omio jo daŋ obwola, Yin itek ikata oko, daŋ doŋ ityek o loya oko, Adoko doŋ gi-anyera a jo nino i nino, jo luŋ doŋ yeta ayeta," 
Jeremiah20:8 Pien ginnoro luŋ ame akobo, akobo i dwon aloŋo, kun aredo atek ateka ni, “Tim me byemi! Lobo daŋ oballe oko!” Pien kare luŋ ka atito kop a Rwot, jo nyera anyera dok daŋ ocao-gu acaa," 
Jeremiah20:9 Ka ce akobo ni, “Mom dok abino lwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot, onyo ni mom dok abino kobo kopporo i nyiŋe”, cunya onwoŋo tye iye ginnoro acalo mac, ame tye okanne oko kom cogona, mom doŋ aromo jukere kadi acel, mom atwero diyo cunya-nono." 
Jeremiah20:10 Pien awinyo jo apol apola tye amuŋo, Lworo doŋ tye i kabedo luŋ! Gin okobo ni, “Okwere wunu doŋ oko! Okwere wunu doŋ oko!” Man kop ame awinyo owotena a ceggi keda tye akobo, kun otye ka neno kite ame abino poto kede. Dok daŋ okobo ni, “Gwok onyo obino bwolle abwola, mannono twero miyowa omake oko, ote culo kworwa i kome.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Ento yin i Rwot itye keda acalo lo atek i lweny, ame olworo, mannono bino miyo jo ame tye ka wuna twomere, mom daŋ obino loya, Lewic bino makogi meicel, pien yikgi mom bino cobere. Lewicgi-nono bino ri nakanaka, wi jo mom bino wil iye." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ama Rwot me mony ame temo kite a dano ka atira, ame neno cuny dano kede tammere. Mia anen kite ame iculo kede kwor i kom okworra, pien an doŋ atyeko miye gira i ciŋ i," 
Jeremiah20:13 Wer wunu wer me pako Rwot, pake wunu ba! Pien otyeko doŋ laro kwo a jo ame piny oloo, i cin otim tim areco." 
Jeremiah20:14 Nino ame rik onywala iye kono orwenyo oko, do ber! Gummoro kono mom te bedo atwal, i nino ame totta onywala iyenono!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Cen myero mak ŋat ame okelo amut aber baŋ pappa ni, “Onywalo atin awobi”, ame te miye bedo i yomcunynono." 
Jeremiah20:16 Dano-nono myero bed winyo koko odiko, kede duru i cuny dyeceŋ," 
Jeremiah20:17 pien en mom oneka ame pwod atye iyi totta, kono yi totta obedo lyel me yika, kono ot nyodo a totta obedo apek apek atwal." 
Jeremiah20:18 Piŋo kara adonnyo rik iyi totta, me rwatte i tic atek kede cwercuny, dok me bedo kede lewic pi kare me kwona luŋ." 
Jeremiah21:1 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo baŋ Jeremia i kare ame abaka Jedekia ocwao baŋ Packur wot a Malkia kede Jepania alamdog wot a Maceya, kun cikogi ni," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Penya Rwot pirwa, pien Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon amito cako lweny kedwa. Atot onyo ca Rwot bino timo tano moro me awura pirwa, te miyogi ya dokoko cen, kun oweko lweny kedwa.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Jeremia te kobbi jo ame onwoŋo ocwao baŋe ni," 
Jeremiah21:4 “Wot ikobbi wunu Jedekia ni Rwot okobo ni ebino wiro jami lweny luŋ ame tye i ciŋ monnyere luŋ ame itye ka lweny wunu kede abaka me Babulon, kede jo Kaldaya ame doŋ tye ka gurowu oko-ni i ŋe cel oko. Abino coko jami okworwu luŋ karacel i dye boma," 
Jeremiah21:5 An ikoma abino lweny kedwu, kun atio i tekona luŋ, ame akemo kede iniga omio ager calo eŋatu." 
Jeremiah21:6 Abino neko jo kede leyi luŋ ame bedo i boma man; abino miyo twon two edeke arac meicel en ame nek ogi. 
Jeremiah21:7 Icennere abino miyo Jedekia abaka me Juda karacel kede omiro mere, dok jo ame bedo i boma man ame obwot i two edeke, kec kede pala romo, i cin abaka Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, kede i cin okworgi ame mito nekogi aneka. En bino nekogi oko i pala lweny, Kica mom bino maka i komgi, mom abino paro pirgi kadi acel dok mom abino wekogi.”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Rwot dok te ciko Jeremia me kobbi lwak ni, “Nen ba, an a Rwot atyeko miyowu twero me yero yo me kwo kede ame tero dano i to." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ŋat ame bino bedo i boma obino ŋe ko oko i pala i lweny, ka mom oto i lweny, kec en abino neko onyo to edeke. Cite ŋat ame bino donyo oko te wot miye kene baŋ jo Kaldaya, ame tye aguro boma-ni i ŋe ŋel oko, dano-nono bino kwo, kwo mere bino bedo baŋe calo mot me lweny." 
Jeremiah21:10 Pien an Rwot atyeko ci ko waŋa doŋ oko i kom boma man, me timo iye gin arac, mom ginnoro aber. Abino miyo boma man oko i ciŋ abaka me Babulon ame bino waŋo oko kede mac." 
Jeremiah21:11 “Kobbi jo me ot abaka me Juda ni myero owiny koppa an Rwot," 
Jeremiah21:12 kobbigi ni gin jo me ot a Daudi myero, “Oŋol kop atira nino i nino, dok olar jo i ciŋ jo ame wunogi, olar ŋat ame omao jami mere, naka mio akemona lyel i komgi calo mac, te lyel ame nauoro mom romo neko, pi timgi areco.”" 
Jeremiah21:13 “Nen ba, an atye i kop i komwu, wun jo ame bedo i luŋ, naka yin kidi ame tye i bar. Man kop a Rwot okobo. Wun jo ame ikobo wunu ni, ‘Ŋa ame bino bino piny me bino lweny i ko mwa, onyo ni ŋa ame bino donnyo kan ame wan obedo iye?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Abino keto can i komwu, kun lubere i gin ame itimo wunu. Man kop a Rwot okobo. Abino cwinyo mac i bomawu luŋ, ame bino waŋo ginnoro luŋ ame tye i ŋete.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni, “Wot baŋ jo me ot abaka me Juda, iwot ikob kop man kuno, kob ni," 
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Winy ba kop a Rwot, yin abaka me Juda ame bedo i wi kom me loc a Daudi, kede omironi, nakajo ame bedo i dogcel man." 
Jeremiah22:3 Rwot okobo ni myero iŋol wunu kop kakare dok itim wunu gin atye atira, ilar wunu daŋ ame otye ka wuno i ciŋ jo ame tye ka mayo jamigi. Dok daŋ myero kur itim wunu ginnoro arac onyo timmoro me byemi i kom rokkoro ame bedo i akinawu, i kom itino kic kede i kom mon ame coggi oto, kur daŋ iony wunu remo a ŋattoro a mom i bal i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ka ce ibino lubo wunu kop man ateteni, bino miyo obakki ame bedo i wi kom loc a Daudi, ame riŋo aguragura kede gadigadi, karacel kede omirogi kede jogi, gin luŋ obino donyo i dogcel luŋ me ot man." 
Jeremiah22:5 Cite ka mom ibino ciko wunu yitwu me winyo kop man, an Rwot akwoŋo i nyiŋa kena kena ni, ot man bino doko wi obur.’" 
Jeremiah22:6 Pien Rwot ame okobo kop i kom jo me ot abaka me Juda okobo ni, “Wun itye wunu calo lobo me Gilead i tuŋ baŋa, icalo wunu wi kidi me Lebanon, kadi amannono, abino miyowu idoko wunu tim otwo ikaŋ, boma ame jo mom bedo iye." 
Jeremiah22:7 Abino yiko olweny ame bino tyekowu oko, ŋat acel acel bino mako jami me lwennyere. Gin jo-nono bino totoŋo yennogo me cedar abeco mege reto oko piny, ote waŋogi oko i mac." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Rok luŋ bino bea i ŋet boma man, ŋat acel acel i akinagi bino penyo awottere ni, ‘Piŋo kara Rwot otimo gin acalo man i kom boma man adwoŋ wokki?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Awottere bino gamo ni, ‘Pien gin oweko cikere ame rik ocikere i Rwot Obaŋagi oko, dok obedo woro obaŋe mogo ocele, kun daŋ otio pirgi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Kur ibed koko pi Yocia ame doŋ otyeko to oko ca, kur daŋ ikum pire; cite myero ikok atek meicel pi ijat a doŋ woto oko, pien mom dok bino dwogo kadi acel, me neno lobo ame onywale iye." 
Jeremiah22:11 Pien Rwot okobo kop i kom Calum wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda, ame obedo loc akaka pappere Yocia, ame onwoŋo doŋ otyeko ya oko i lobo man, en okobo ni, “En mom dok bino dwogo kan kadi acel." 
Jeremiah22:12 En bino to i lobo ame otere iye acalo opii, en mom dok bino neno lobo man kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 Ŋat ame gero ode kede tim a mom atira, tye kede can, dok gero ici ka mege imalo aboŋo gennoro, ame mio dano wadgi tio baŋe nono kun mom mio ocara mere." 
Jeremiah22:14 Dano ame kobo ni, “Abino gero twon oda moro adwoŋ meicel, kun amio icika luŋ iye i malo bedo alac odoco.” Ame keto waŋ dirica i ode, eka te peto bao cedar iyi ici ka me ot, te daŋ puyo apama mere oko i raŋi arema," 
Jeremiah22:15 hamo ni mannono bino miyi idoko abaka, pi gero odi kede yen me cedar? Pappi mom yam obedo i kuc adwoŋ meicel i lobo-ni, mom kare luŋ en obedo dano a genne dok ame ŋolo kop atira? En rik te bedo aber i yore luŋ." 
Jeremiah22:16 En obedo ŋolo kop ocan kede me a jo a piny olo kakare, omio en obedo aber. Mom mannono en ŋeyo Rwot?" 
Jeremiah22:17 Cite yin ibedo keto cunyi i komi keni, pi nwoŋo agoba i yore a mom ber, kun imito onyo remo a jo a mom i bal, iwuno jo kede timo tim me byemi. Man kop a Rwot." 
Jeremiah22:18 Mannono omio Rwot okobo kop i kom Yekoyakim, wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda ni, “Mom obino kumo pire, kun okobo ni, ‘Ominna doi!’ onyo ni, ‘Atinna doi!’ Mom obino kumo pire, kun okobo ni, Rwotta doi! onyo ni, ‘Abakana doi!’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:19 Obino yiko i kite ame oyiko kede gwok, obino telo atela tetek, ote wot bolo i ŋe cel oko." 
Jeremiah22:20 “Wot wunu i wi kidi me Lebanon, me iwot ikok wunu kuno, wot ikok wunu atek i lobo me Bacan; red wunu ilwoŋo i Abarim, pien jo ame yam imaro wunu luŋ doŋ otyeko oko," 
Jeremiah22:21 Rik akobo kedwu i kare ame lim dwoŋ i ciŋwu, cite wun giwu ite kwero wunu winyo koppa oko, Mannono en gin ame ibedo timo wunu cakere i tinowu, mom ibedo winyo wunu koppa." 
Jeremiah22:22 Yamo bino kolo okwatwu luŋ, mon ame marowu bino wot oko i opii, Lewic bino makowu, ale te twodowu, pi tim areco ame ibedo timo wunu," 
Jeremiah22:23 Ama wun jo ame bedo i Lebanon, ame ibedo wunu aboŋo lworo i akina yen cedar, ibino cur wunu atek meicel ka rem me can oere i komwu, rem ame rom aroma i me a dako amerem me nywal ogoo.”" 
Jeremiah22:24 Rwot okobo ni, “Kite ame atye kede kwo-ni, kadi bed Yekonia wot a Yekoyakim abaka me Juda, onwoŋo obedo atem me ŋut cin ame onwoŋo tye i ŋut ciŋa tuŋ cem, onwoŋo pwod aromo kwanyo oko i ŋut ciŋa" 
Jeremiah22:25 ate miyo baŋ jo ame mito neke, i cin jo ame en lworo, naka kadi i cin Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon kede ocirikale mere." 
Jeremiah22:26 Abino bayi i lobo ocele karacel kede totti ame onywali, kan ame mom rik onywali iye, ibino to daŋ kuno," 
Jeremiah22:27 Cite mom dok obino dwogo cen kadi acel i lobo man ame omito ni kono odwogo iye-ni.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Jeremia te kobo ni, “Man mom Yekonia ame cuny doŋ ocao oko-ni, ame doŋ calo tako gulu ame obolo ame mom doŋ tye ŋattoro amito-ni? Piŋo kara en kede itino mere obologi i lobo ame gin mom oŋeo, i ciŋ jo ame mom oŋeo?”" 
Jeremiah22:29 Yin lobo! Yin lobo! Yin lobo we! Winy ba kop a Rwot ame etye ka kobo. 
Jeremiah22:30 Rwot okobo ni, “Co kop ame otyeko doŋ ŋolo oko i kom dano man, en mom bino bedo kede atinnoro, gummoro mom bino bedo i kome kadi acel pi kare me kwo mere luŋ, Akware moro mom bino bedo kede gum me bedo iwi kom loc a Daudi, kun bedo dok aloc i Juda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Can i wi okwat ame keto dok neko rommina i bar kan ame okwaogi iye!”" 
Jeremiah23:2 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo kit man i kom jo ame kwao rommi mere, ame gin jona, En okobo ni, “Wun okwat ame iketo wunu rommina oko, ame iryemogi wunu icwaogi wunu teŋe, dok daŋ ikwero kwayogi wunu oko. Nen ba, abino ciko waŋa i komwu me keto can i komwu pi gin arac ame itimo wunu." 
Jeremiah23:3 Icennere abino coko rommina ame odoŋŋere, ame tye i lobo apapat ame rik aryemogi iye, ate dwoggogi cen kan iyi anokgi, ote nywal nya atek meicel." 
Jeremiah23:4 Abino keto okwat ocele me kwayogi, ame mio mom dok oromo lworo ginnoro. I kare-nono cunygi mom dok bino medde poto kadi acel, moro i aki ‘nagi daŋ mom bino rwenyo." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Nen ba, Rwot okobo ni, nino tye abino ame abino keto dok akwar Daudi ikokome i kom me loc. En bino loc i ryeko, kun daŋ tio gin atye atira, bino ŋolo kop kakare te miyo kuc bedo tye i lobo." 
Jeremiah23:6 Obino laro Juda i kare mere, dok jo Icrael bino bedo kede kuc. Nyiŋ ame obino lwoŋe kede ene: ‘Rwot ame olarowa.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Pi mannono, kare tye abino ame jo mom dok bino kobo ni, ‘Kite ame Rwot tye kwo-ni, Rwot ame okwanyo jo Icrael i lobo Miciri,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 ento ni, ‘Kite ame Rwot tye kwo-ni, Rwot ame okwanyo jo Icrael i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi kede i lobo luŋ ame rik eryemogi ecwaogi iye.’ Gin doŋ bino bedo i lobogi ikokome.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Jeremia okobo kop i kom odwarpiny ni, “Cunya otyeko balle oko, cogona luŋ tye ka myel amyela. Acalo doŋ ŋat omer, acalo ŋat ame kono olok oromo meicel, Mannono tye atimere i koma pi Rwot, kede pi koppere acil." 
Jeremiah23:10 Jo i lobo luŋ doŋ mom geno Rwot, kitegi doŋ oballe oko arac meicel, lobo tye akumo pien Rwot doŋ oceno oko, bar me kwat daŋ doŋ otwo imek. Tim a jo luŋ doŋ rac odoco, mom daŋ otio i twergi kakare." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Odwarpiny anaka olamdog daŋ mom doŋ geno Rwot; anwoŋogi-gu otye ka timo tim arac i ot me wora ikokome. Man kop ame Rwot okobo," 
Jeremiah23:12 Pi mannono ba, yo ame gin olubonono, bino bedo apwot dok acol meicel, obino ryemogi i yo-nono ote rette iye. An abino kelo can i komgi, ka mwaka me keto can i komgi oromo. An Rwot en akobo kop man." 
Jeremiah23:13 Aco odwarpiny me Camaria, anenogi otye ka timo tim me ipyeda, pien otye ka rabo kopgi i nyiŋ Baal, otelo jona Icrael arac, omio ogak oko," 
Jeremiah23:14 Man en kop ame Rwot akobo i kom odwarpiny me Jerucalem, ‘Anene ginnoro arac okato kare i komgi, otye ka cot kun okobo-gu goba i kabedo ducu, otye ka konyo otim areco medde ameda kede timgi, ame omio ŋattoro mom ye weko timmere araccono; gin luŋ doŋ ocalo Codoma i tuŋ baŋa, jo ame bedo iye calo jo Gomora.’" 
Jeremiah23:15 Mannono omio Rwot me mony okobo kop i kom odwarpiny ni, Nen ba, abino pitogi i kwir a yit, ate miyogi mato pii ame kwir tye iye; pien tim me mom geno Obaŋa olal oromo lobo luŋ, kun ya i baŋ odwarpiny me Jerucalem.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Rwot me mony okobbi jo Jerucalem ni, “Kur iwiny wunu kop odwarpiny ame rabbiwu kop, ote miyowu bedo i gen ame konnyere mom. Gin orabbiwu kop i kom amuttogo ame gin otamo atama kengi, ame mom Rwot en okobbigi." 
Jeremiah23:17 Otye ka kobo kare i kare baŋ jo ame cao kop a Rwot ni gin obino bedo aber, kede baŋ jo ame lubo gin ame gin omito apala apala ni ginnoro arac gire mom bino poto i komgi.”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Kara ŋa i akinagi ame ocuŋ cokere a Rwot, me neno kede winyo kop a Rwot? Onyo ŋa i akinagi ame owinyo dok olubo gin ame en okobo?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Koŋ inen akemo a Rwot doŋ obino oko calo yamo kot, ocako doŋ kodo oko calo yamo ajuru, bino mwoc i wi otim tim areco." 
Jeremiah23:20 Akemo a Rwot mom bino jukere, tuno wan ame en otio dok ocobo, ginnoro luŋ ame tye i tammere. Ibino niaŋ wunu iye aber odoco i kare ame pwod tye anyim." 
Jeremiah23:21 “An gira onwoŋo mom aoro odwarpiny, cite gin gigi omukere i ŋwec kengi, an rik mom akobo kedgi, cite gin otye ka rabo kop." 
Jeremiah23:22 Kono onwoŋo gin ocuŋ i cokerena me winyo koppa, kono gin orabo koppa ikokome baŋ jona, kono daŋ omiogi olokere oweko lubo yo arac, kun oweko timo gin arac ame otye ka timo." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Rwot me mony openyogi ni mom en obedo Rwot ame tye kan aceggi, cite mom kan abor?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Dano twero pono kannoro me imuŋ ame mom ŋeye me kur enen kome? Mom en obedo Obaŋa ame tye i kabedo luŋ i polo kede i lobo? 
Jeremiah23:25 En okobo ni etyeko winyo kopporo luŋ ame odwarpiny tye ka rabo gobagoba i nyiŋe, kun ŋat acel acel kobo ni, ‘Aleko lek! Aleko lek!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Kop goba bino medde bedo i cuny odwarpiny man ame ogoba-ni pi kare a rom mene, dok ame obedo rabo kop me goba ame tye i cunygi?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Gin otamo ni lekgi-nono ame obedo ko bo iyi akinagi bino miyo wi jona wil oko i koma, kite ame rik wi kwarigi owil kede i koma pi Baal." 
Jeremiah23:28 Adwarpiny ame oleko lek myero kob oko ni gin ekobo-nono eleko aleka, ento ŋat ame owinyo koppa ikokome myero bed ŋat a genne i kobo koppa-nono. Itwero poro reŋ kal kede kal ikokome?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Rwot dok te medde penyo ni, Mom koppa rom aroma kede mac kede anyul ame oninido gweŋ atitino?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Pi mannono, nen ba, cunya mom yom i kom odwarpiny ame kwa lo koppa i baŋ owotegi ote rabo ni kop ame okobbigi ennono." 
Jeremiah23:31 Nen ba, cunya mom yom i kom odwarpiny ame tio i lebgi me kobo doga nono ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni’," 
Jeremiah23:32 Nen ba, cunya mom yom i kom jo ame kobo lek me goba goba. Lekgi ame otye ka kobo gobagoba-nono tye ka miyo jona gak agaka karacel kede wakeregi. An gira onwoŋo mom acwaogi, mom daŋ acikogi ni myero gin owoti; pi mannono, gin gire mom okonyo jona kadi acel. Man kop ame Rwot okobo, Gin gire mom okonyo jona kadi acel. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Ka ce ŋat acel i akina jo man openyi, kadi obedo odwarpiny onyo alamdog, ni, ‘Kop aŋo apek ame Rwot okobo?’ Yin ibino gamo ni, ‘Wun en ame idoko wunu yec apek baŋ Rwot, pi mannono en okobo ni ebino bolowu oko,’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Ka ce adwarpiny onyo alamdog, on yo ŋattoro acel i akina jo man bino kobo ni, ‘Kop apek ame Rwot okobo ene’, abino keto can i kom dano-nono karacel kede jo me ode luŋ." 
Jeremiah23:35 Man en kop ame ŋat acel acel i akinawu bino kobo baŋ awottere onyo baŋ ominnere ni, ‘Rwot ogamo niŋo?’ Onyo ni, ‘Rwot okobo niŋo?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Mom dok ibino medde ko bo wunu kop man, ni, ‘Kop apek ame Rwot okobo ene’: pien kop apek ame ikobo wunu en kop a ŋat acel acel ko bo pire kene, Itye wunu ka dwadwanyo wunu kop a Rwot Obaŋa ame kwo, Rwot Obaŋa ame en Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah23:37 Ibino kobbi wunu odwarpiny ni, ‘Rwot ogamo koppi niŋo? Onyo ce Rwot okobo kop aŋo?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Ento ka gin okobo ni, ‘Peko me kop a Rwot.’ Yin ibino kobbigi ni, pien wun ikobo wunu kop man ni, ‘Kop apek a Rwot okobo ene’, yin ibino kobbigi ni, acikowu ni mom myero imedde kobo wunu kittono," 
Jeremiah23:39 doŋ pi mannono ba, abino tinowu malo ateteni ate bolowu oko teŋe i nyima. Wun karacel kede boma ame rik amio baŋwu kede baŋ kwariwu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Abino miyo jo caowu, kun lewic daŋ makowu wan i wan, lewic kede acae ame wi jo mom twero wil iye.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Rwot onyutta dita aryo ame nyig olam open yigi, kun tye i nyim ot me woro Obaŋa. Man otimere ame doŋ Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon otyeko tero Yekonia wot a Yekoyakim, abaka me Juda oko iyi opii, kun kwanyo i Jerucalem karacel kede otel me Juda, odoŋe ame loo tic apapat, karacel kede otel luŋ me Juda, gin luŋ oterogi i Babulon." 
Jeremiah24:2 Dita me agege onwoŋo tye iye nyig olam abeco mege, ame rom aroma i en ogeo cek, cite dita ocele onwoŋo tye iye nyig olam areco mege, en areco atek ate ka, ame mom romo acama kadi acel." 
Jeremiah24:3 Rwot te penya ni, “Ineno ŋo, Jeremia?” An ate gamo ni, “Nyig olam, en abeco mere meicel, kede nyig olam amereco okato kare, reco ame mom romo acama kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Rwot te kobba ni," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, Jona ame okwanyo i Juda ote tero iyi opii i Babulon-ca abino terogi calo nyig olam abeco mere-nu." 
Jeremiah24:6 Abino ci ko waŋa i komgi me timo gin aber i komgi, te dwogogi cen i lobo man, Abino miyogi obedo jo atek kun mom dok aturogi adwokogi piny. Abino pitogi calo yat eka mom dok ate putogi oko." 
Jeremiah24:7 Abino miyogi cuny me ŋeyo ni an a Rwot, dok gin obino bedojona, kun an abedo Obaŋagi, pien gin obino dwogo baŋa i cunygi ducu." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Cite Rwot okobo ni, ‘Aco Jedekia, abaka me Juda, rwode mege kede jo odoŋ, kede odoŋ i Jerucalem ame tye bedo i lobo man, kede jo ame bedo i lobo me Miciri, abino terogi calo nyig olam areco atek ateka-nu, ame mom oromo-gu camo kadi acel." 
Jeremiah24:9 Abino miyogi obedo gi-alwora me rok luŋ i wi lobo bino lworo, gi-acaa a jo, gilolo dog jo, dok jo bino kobo kop areco i komgi, kun daŋ otio i nyiŋgi acalo kop me ceno jo i kabedo luŋ ame abino ryemogi terogi iye." 
Jeremiah24:10 Abino cwayo pala romo i komgi, kede kec kede too edeke, tuno waŋ ame gin luŋ otum oko i lobo ame rik amio baŋgi kede baŋ kwarigi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:1 I mwaka me aŋwen me loc abaka Yekoyakim wot a Yocia abaka me Juda, Rwot okobbi Jeremia kop i kom jo luŋ me Juda, (Man onwoŋo mwaka me agege me loc a Nebukadnejar abaka me Juda.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Mwaka-nono en ame Jeremia okobo i jo me Juda luŋ kede jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem, kun kobbigi ni," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Aman doŋ odoko mwakki pyeraryo wie adek, kun cakere i mwaka me apar wie adek me loc a Yocia wot a Amon abaka me Juda tuno kede naka atot tin, Rwot obedo kop keda kun an daŋ atittiwu koppere tere tere, cite wun giwu ikwero wunu winyo wunu oko.”" 
Jeremiah25:4 Mom iwinyo wunu koppere, mom daŋ itero wunu yitwu me winyo, kadi bed Rwot obedo cwayo omiro mere luŋ ame obedo odwarpiny baŋwu teretere, ame rabbiwu ni," 
Jeremiah25:5 “Ŋat acel acel i akinawu myero doŋ lokere wek yo arac ame etye ka lubo dok daŋ owek timo gin arac, me ibed wunu i lobo ame Rwot rik omiowu kede kwariwu i kare acon me bedo megwu atwal." 
Jeremiah25:6 Kur dok ibed wunu lubo obaŋe mogo ocele, kun itiyi wunugi, dok iworogi wunu, kun daŋ iroka wunu imi wunu akemo maka i tic ame ibedo tiyo wunu. Mannono bino miyo mom atimo ginnoro arac i komwu." 
Jeremiah25:7 Aco nen mom ibedo winyo wunu koppa, me imi wunu akemo maka i tic ame ibedo tiyo wunu ame kelo ka can i komwu wun ikomwu." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Mannono omio Rwot me mony okobo ni, Pien wun ikwero wunu winyo koppa," 
Jeremiah25:9 nen ba abino cwayo i kom rok ducu ame bedo tutuŋ anyarodi, kede amirona Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon. Abino kelogi me bino lweny i kom lobo man kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo iye, kede i kom rok man luŋ ame oguro lobo-ni. Abino jwerogi odoco, dok abino miyo lworo mako jo i komgi, kun obedo jwiye ajwia. Abino miyo jo caogi nakanaka." 
Jeremiah25:10 Medo i mannono, abino giko i akinagi woo me yomcuny, woo me lelo, anaka dwon anyom karacel kede dwon atera. Ŋur a min kidi merego mom dok bino winyere iye, dok tara moro daŋ mom bino lyel iye." 
Jeremiah25:11 Lobo man luŋ bino doko wi obur kun jo mom iye. Rok man bino tic baŋ abaka me Babulon pi mwakki ame romo pyerabiro twal. 
Jeremiah25:12 A doŋ mwakki pyerabiro otum, an doŋ ate keto can i kom abaka me Babulon kede rok ame en loo naca, kede lobo me Babulon, pi balgi, ate miyo lobogi doŋ nono doŋ atwal." 
Jeremiah25:13 Kop luŋ ame atyeko kobo i kom lobo naca abino miyo cobere daŋ kittono i kome, kede kopporo luŋ ame doŋ otyeko coyo i buk man, ame Jeremia otyeko rabo i kom rok apapat." 
Jeremiah25:14 Pien rok apol kede obakki mogo adoŋo doŋo bino lokogi odoko opiigi, cite an abino culogi kun alubo ticgi kede gin ame gin otimo.”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, “Gam i ciŋa ikopo kono olok ame akemona opoŋ iye oko-ni, wot imi rok apapat luŋ ame acwai baŋgi matti." 
Jeremiah25:16 Gin bino mato ote cako gate oko, kun daŋ obaŋere oko pi lweny ame abino cwayo i komgi-nono.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Mannono omio ate gamo ikopo i cin Rwot ate mi yo rok luŋ ame Rwot ocwaa baŋgi mato. 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerucalem kede boma luŋ me Juda, obakki luŋ kede rwodegi, mannono te miyo lobo doko wii obur oko kun yigi nono, jo doŋ te cako jwiye kun owuro awura, ame otio i nyiŋ lobo-nono calo gin me ceno jo kite ame tye kede naka tin." 
Jeremiah25:19 Parao abaka me Miciri kede omiro mere rwode mere, kede jo mere luŋ," 
Jeremiah25:20 karacel kede ruk ocele luŋ ame bedo i akinagi; obakki luŋ me lobo Uj kede obakki luŋ me lobo Piriciti (Acikelon, Gaja, Ekron, kede jo Acidod ducu ame odoŋ):" 
Jeremiah25:21 kede jo ducu me Edom, Moab kede jo Ammon;" 
Jeremiah25:22 obakki ducu me Turo, obakki ducu me Cidon, kede obakki luŋ ame loo lobo ame tye i dog nam;" 
Jeremiah25:23 jo luŋ ame bedo i boma me Dedan, Tema, kede Buj; jo luŋ ame mworo yer wigi oko doŋ acegocego;" 
Jeremiah25:24 obakki ducu me Arabia kede rok apapat ame orubere aruba ame bedo i lobo otwo ikaŋ; 
Jeremiah25:25 obakki ducu me Jibri, Elap, kede Media;" 
Jeremiah25:26 obakki luŋ ame tye i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo ame tye kan aboco kede jo luŋ ame bedo cegicegi, kun gin luŋ olubere aluba i yore i yore, Rok apapat me loc apapat ame tye i wi podo ame bedo i lobo kan daŋ myero mati. Icennere doŋ abaka me Babulon te mato." 
Jeremiah25:27 “Rwot dok te kobba ni, ‘Kob baŋ lwak ni, Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni myero imat wunu atek, imer wunu okato kare ite nokere wunu, ite rette wunu piny ame mom dok iromo ya wunu atwal, pi lweny ame acwalo i akinawu.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 “Ka ce gin okwero gamo ikopo oko i ciŋi me mato, yin ibino kobbigi ni, ‘Rwot me mony okobo ni myero nen ni imato wunu!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Pien nen ba, acako timo gin arac i boma ame olwoŋo i nyiŋa. Wun itamo wunu ni itwero bwot wunu ame mom oketo can i komwu? Pe gire itwero bwot wunu ame mom oketo can i komwu pien atyeko doŋ yikere me cwayo mony oko i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i wi lobo. Man kop ame Rwot me mony okobo.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Doŋ ba yin Jeremia ibino rabo kop man luŋ i komgi, kun ikobbigi ni, “Dwon Rwot bino mor winyere i polo, en bino woto dwone i kabedo mere acil. Dwone bino mor atek meicel kom jo mere, bino redo calo jo ame tye a jejebo olok i tyengi, i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo." 
Jeremiah25:31 Dwone bino mor winyere naka agikki lobo piny, pien Rwot doŋ tye i kop ame en mito ŋolo i kom rok ducu. En bino ŋolo kop i kom jo luŋ, bino miyo oneko jo areco oko luŋ i pala me lweny, Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah25:32 “Rwot me mony okobo ni, Nen ba, abino ket can i kom rok ducu, kun aketo i kom rok acel acel. Dok yamo ajuru agwa meicel tye ka twarogi naka iyi agikki piny." 
Jeremiah25:33 “Jo ame Rwot bino neko i ninonono bino radde i kabedo ducu, cakere i but lobo tuŋcel tuno kede tuŋ ocele. Mom obino kumo kadi acel pi jo-nono, mom daŋ obino coko komgi, dok mom daŋ obino yiko komgi; kom jo oto bino radde atata i wi lobo calo cet dyaŋ." 
Jeremiah25:34 “Kok wunu ba ame iredo wunu areda, wun okwat, ŋenne wunu ba i buru wun okwa rommi, pien kare me nekowu kede me keketowu atata doŋ oromo oko, obino ŋolo ŋutwu calo ŋolo ŋut rommi ame ocwe," 
Jeremiah25:35 Kabedo moro me larre okwat bino bedo mom, akadi kan ame okwa rommi twero laro me bwot." 
Jeremiah25:36 Koŋ iwiny wunu koko okwat, winy wunu daŋ redo a jo ame kwao rommi! Pien Rwot tye ka balo ka kwatgi oko i twon akemo," 
Jeremiah25:37 omio anok rommigi ame onwoŋo tye i kuc odoŋ yigi nono, pi akemo a Rwot ame gwa meicel." 
Jeremiah25:38 Rwot doŋ calo eŋatu ame odonnyo i gorogoro mere, pien lobogi doŋ odoŋ yie nono, pi pala me romo a Rwot, kede pi twon akemo mere agwa.”" 
Jeremiah26:1 I mwaka ame Yekoyakim wot a Yocia ocako iye loc acalo abaka me Juda, Rwot okobbi Jeremia kop man, ni," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Rwot me mony okobo ni wot icuŋ i dyekal me ot a Rwot ite kobo kop man baŋ jo i boma luŋ me Juda ame bino me woro Obaŋa i ot a Rwot. Kobbigi kop luŋ ame atyeko cikki me kobo; pe iwek kopporo doŋ ame mom ikobo kadi acel. 
Jeremiah26:3 Kare okene gin twero winyo eka ŋat acel acel te weko lubo yo mere arac, me wek an daŋ aŋut i kom gin arac ame doŋ ayikere me tiyo i komgi pi timgi areco.”" 
Jeremiah26:4 Yin ibino kobbigi ni, “Rwot me mony okobo ni, ka ce mom ibino winyo wunu kop ame an akobo me lubo cikka ame an atyeko keto i nyimwu," 
Jeremiah26:5 ka ce mom ibino winyo wunu kop amirona ame gin odwarpiny ame abedo cwayogi baŋwu me bino oyotoyot, kadi bed wun mom iwinyo wunugi," 
Jeremiah26:6 bino miyo amio ot man bedo calo Cilo, dok abino ceno boma man oko, te bedo me ceno rok luŋ ame tye i wi lobo.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Olamdog kede odwarpiny karacel kede jo luŋ te winyo Jeremia tye akobo kop magi i ot a Rwot. 
Jeremiah26:8 I kare ame Jeremia doŋ otyeko ko bo kop man ducu ame Rwot ociko ni myero ekob baŋ lwak luŋ, olamdog kede odwarpiny karacel kede lwak luŋ ote makke oko, kun okobo ni, “Yin myero ito!”" 
Jeremiah26:9 Piŋo irabo kop i nyiŋ Rwot kun ikobo ni, “Ot man bino doko calo Cilo, dok boma man bino doŋ nono aboŋo jo moro abedo iye?” Jo luŋ te cokere guro Jeremia dyere i ot a Rwot." 
Jeremiah26:10 I kare ame rwode me Juda owinyo kop man gin oya i paco abaka ote bino i ot a Rwot ote wot bedo i wi komgi ame tye i dogcel, ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel Anyen ame tye i ot a Rwot." 
Jeremiah26:11 Olamdog kede odwarpiny te kobbi rwode kede lwak luŋ ni, “Dano man myero ŋolle kop me to pien en orabo kop arac i kom boma man kite ame wun luŋ iwinyo wunu kede yitwu.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Jeremia te kobbi rwode kede jo luŋ, kun kobo ni, “Rwot ocwaa me bino rabbiwu kop i kom ot man kede i kom boma man, kop luŋ ame wun doŋ ityeko winyo wunu." 
Jeremiah26:13 Doŋ pi mannono wun myero iyik wunu kitewu kede gin ame itio wunu, ite winyo wunu kop a Rwot Obaŋawu, mannono bino miyo Rwot cunye ya i timo gin arac ame doŋ otyeko kobo oko i komwu." 
Jeremiah26:14 Aco an, nen ba, an gira atye i cinwu, Tim wunu ginnoro luŋ ame ineno wunu ni ber i koma." 
Jeremiah26:15 Cite gin a myero iŋe wunu ateteni ene, ni ka ineka wunu, ibino onyo wunu remo a mom i bal, ame ballere te bedo i wiwu kede i kom boma man kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo iye, pien iyi ateni Rwot ocwaa baŋwu me kobo kop man luŋ kun iwinyo wunu kede yitwu.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Eka rwode kede jo luŋ te kobbi olamdog kede odwarpiny, ni, “Dano man mom porre ŋolle kop me to pien en okobo kop man baŋwu pi nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋawa.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Odoŋŋogo me lobo-nono te ye kop i lwak luŋ ame ocokere karacel, kun kobo ni," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika ame rik obedo dano me Morecet rik obin orabo kop i kare abaka Kejekia, ame rik obedo abaka me Juda, en rik okobo koppere baŋ jo luŋ me Juda kun kobo ni Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Obino puro Cion oko calo poto, aco Jerucalem bino doko wi obur, kidi me ot a Rwot, yen bino culle acula iye." 
Jeremiah26:19 Rik abaka Kejekia me Juda kede jo luŋ obin oneke oko? Mom abaka obin olworo Rwot te tiyo gin aber ame Rwot pwo, ame te miyo Rwot weko gin arac ame onwoŋo eyikere me timo i komgi oko? Cite wan oceggi kelo twon ginnoro arac meicel i komwa kenwa.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Dok tye dano moro ocele ame daŋ obin orabo kop i nyiŋ Rwot, Uria wot a Cemaya me Kiriat-jearim, En rik orabo kop i kom boma man kede i kom lobo man, ame koppere daŋ rik rom aroma i en ame Jeremia okobo." 
Jeremiah26:21 Kare ame abaka Yekoyakim, kede ocirikale mere luŋ, kede rwode mere luŋ owinyo kop magi, abaka omito ni myero enek dano-ni oko, cite i kare ame Uria owinyo, lworo omako te lwi wot oko i Miciri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Abaka Yekoyakim te cwayo jo okene mogo i Miciri, ocwao Elnatan wot a Acibor karacel kede jo mogo okene," 
Jeremiah26:23 gin te wot kela Uria i Miciri, ote tere naka baŋ abaka Yekoyakim, ote daŋ neko oko kede pala me lweny, ote tero kome wot yiko i kabedo ame oyiko iye jo ata." 
Jeremiah26:24 Cite ciŋ Akikam wot a Capan onwoŋo obedo gwoko Jeremia omio mom ote miye baŋ lwak me wot neke. 
Jeremiah27:1 I mwaka ame Jedekia wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda ogeo iye loc, Rwot okobbi Jeremia kop magi." 
Jeremiah27:2 Rwot okobba ni, “Wi tol, ti daŋ lodi ite tweyogi i ŋuti yin keni." 
Jeremiah27:3 Cwa kop baŋ abaka me Edom, abaka me Moab, abaka ikwae a jo Ammon, abaka me Turo kede abaka me Cidon, kun imio okwena ame obino i Jerucalem me bino limo Jedekia abaka me Juda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Kobbigi kop man ame myero gin wot kob baŋ odoŋegi ame loogi.” Myero gin wot kob ni, Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni," 
Jeremiah27:5 “An en aketo lobo kede dano kede Jeyi ame tye i wi lobo pi tekona adwoŋ meicel, dok daŋ amio baŋ ŋat ame yia mito kite ame cunya okwanyo." 
Jeremiah27:6 Aman doŋ atyeko miyo lobo magi luŋ i ciŋ Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, ame en obedo amirona, dok daŋ atyeko miye leyi luŋ me tim me konye." 
Jeremiah27:7 Rok luŋ bino tic baŋe kede baŋ itino mere kede baŋ ikwae, tuno ka kare me lonyo lobo mere oromo. I kare naca en ame rokkere bino doko rok ame tio baŋ rok apol apapat kede baŋ obakki mogo adoŋodoŋo, kun otio baŋgi acalo opii." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Ka ce rokkoro onyo loccoro mom bino tic baŋ abaka Nebukadnejar, ame abaka me Babulon, mom bino ye keto lodi abaka me Babulon i ŋutgi, an ikoma abino keto can i kom rokkono, kun anekogi i pala romo, i kec, kede too edeke, Man kop ame Rwot okobo, tuno wan ame amio abaka Nebukadnejar otyeko rokkono luŋ." 
Jeremiah27:9 Doŋ pi mannono ba, myero kur iwiny wunu kop odwarpinywu otyetwu, olek lek-gu, okor tipowu kede me emurokowu ame tye ka kobbiwu ni, ‘Wun gire mom ibino tic wunu baŋ abaka me Babulon.’" 
Jeremiah27:10 Pien gin tye ka rabbiwu kop me goba, ame adwoggi mere bino miyo okwanyowu oko i lobowu ote terowu oko i lobo abor, dok an abino ryemowu oko, eka ite to wunu oko." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ento rokkoro ame bino keto lodi me loc abaka me Babulon i ŋutgi eka te tic baŋ abaka naca, abino miyo bedo i lobogi ikokome, me opur iye, dok daŋ obedo iye. Man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Jeremia te kobo kit kop acellono baŋ abaka Jedekia ame obedo abaka me Juda, okobbe ni, “Miye wunu kenwu i te loc abaka me Babulon, ite tic wunu baŋe kede baŋ jo mere me ibed wunu kwo." 
Jeremiah27:13 Piŋo omio yin karacel kede joni ito wunu oko i pala me romo, i kec, kede too edeke kite ame Rwot okobo kede i kom rokkoro keken ame mom bino tic baŋ abaka me Babulon?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Kur iwiny kop odwarpiny ame tye ka kobbiwu ni, ‘Wun gire mom ibino tic wunu baŋ abaka me Babulon’, pien kopgi-nono kop me goba ame gin tye ka rabo baŋwu-nono." 
Jeremiah27:15 An gira mom acwaogi, gin tye ka rabo gigi kop me goba i nyiŋa ame adwoggi mere bino miyo aryemowu oko, ite to wunu oko, wun karacel kede odwarpiny ame tye ka rabbiwu koppono.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Mannono te miyo an kop baŋ olamdog kede baŋ jo mere luŋ, kun akobbigi ni, “Rwot okobo ni kur iwiny wunu kop odwarpiny ame tye ka rabbiwu kop, kun okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, jami ame otio kede i ot a Rwot oceggi doŋ dwoggo oko i Babulon’, pien kop ame gin orabbiwu-nono obedo kop me goba." 
Jeremiah27:17 Kur iwiny wunu kopgi; myero iti wunu baŋ abaka me Babulon me ibed wunu kwo. Piŋo kara imio wunu boma man odoko wi obur? 
Jeremiah27:18 Ka ce gin obedo odwarpiny ateteni, dok ka kop a Rwot tye i cunygi, wekgi wunu okwa Rwot me mony, me wek jami me tic ame oweko i ot a Rwot, kede en ame oweko i ot abaka me Juda, kede en ame tye i Jerucalem, kur doŋ ter i Babulon." 
Jeremiah27:19 Pien mannono en kop ame Rwot okobo i kom pagi luŋ, nam, kede akara me cibo tara, karacel kede jami ocele me tic i ot a Rwot ame pwod odoŋ i boma man," 
Jeremiah27:20 ame rik Nebukadnejar abaka mom otero, i kare ame en tero jo magi iyi opii kun kwanyogi i Jerucalem terogi i Babulon, Yekonia wot a Yekoyakim, abaka me Juda kede jo ame oworo luŋ me Juda kede me Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah27:21 Man en kop ame Rwot me mony okobo, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael i kom jami ame otio kedgi i ot a Rwot, ame pwod odoŋ i ot a Rwot, kede i ot abaka me Juda kede i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah27:22 Gin luŋ obino terogi oko i Babulon ote bedo kuno tuno waŋ ame dok apo pirgi, ate doŋ dwoggogi cen ate dwogo ketogi i kakakargi i kabedo man.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 I mwaka acellono, ame abaka Jedekia, abaka me Juda ogeo iye loc, i dwe me abic i mwaka me aŋwennere, Anania wot Ajur, adwarpiny ame onwoŋo oya i Gibeon, okobba kop i ot a Rwot kun olamdog kede jo luŋ tye awinyo, en okobo ni," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni en doŋ etyeko turo loc abaka me Babulon oko." 
Jeremiah28:3 I ŋe mwaka aryo, abino dwoggo jami ame otio kede i ot a Rwot i kabedo man, ame rik abaka Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon oyako i kabedo man te tero i Babulon." 
Jeremiah28:4 Abino daŋ dwoggo cen i kabedo man Yekonia wot a Yekoyakim, abaka me Juda karacel kede jo luŋ ame rik oterogi acalo opii kun okwanyogi i Juda ote terogi i Babulon, pien abino turo loc abaka me Babulon oko.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Adwarpiny Jeremia te kop gin kede adwarpiny Anania kun olamdog kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i ot a Rwot tye awinyo. Adwarpiny Jeremia okobo ni, “Amen!" 
Jeremiah28:6 Rwot myero gire tim amannono; myero en mi kop ame ikobo cobere kakare, te kela jami me tic i ot a Rwot ame aman tye i Babulon kede jo luŋ ame rik oterogi acalo opii cen i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah28:7 Cite akadi amannono myero iwiny kop magi ame ana atye ka kobo baŋi i caa ni, kun lwak luŋ daŋ tye awinyo." 
Jeremiah28:8 Odwarpiny me kare acon ame otelo nyimwa wan aryo ducu rik orabo kop i kom lweny, kec, kede too edeke ame bino poto i lobo apapat kede i kom loccogo adoŋodoŋo." 
Jeremiah28:9 Aco kop i kom odwarpiny ame orabo kop i kom kuc, i kare ame kop man doŋ ocobere jo doŋ te ŋeyo ni, Rwot kara onwoŋo ocwao adwarpinnyono.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Adwarpiny Anania te kwanyo lodi me ŋut dokoko i ŋut Jeremia te tuturogi oko. 
Jeremiah28:11 Anania te ko bo kop magi kun jo luŋ tye awinyo, en okobo ni, “Mannono en kite ame abino turo kede lodi me loc a a Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon i ŋut rok apapat kun mwaka aryo mom ru otum.” Ento Adwarpiny Jeremia te medde gire i wottere." 
Jeremiah28:12 Icennere ame adwarpiny Anania doŋ otyeko turo lodi me twoni oko i ŋut Jeremia, Rwot te kobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Wot ikobbi Anania ni Rwot okobo ni, Yin ityeko turo lodi ame otio i yen, cite an abino tiyo kakargi lodi me nyonyo." 
Jeremiah28:14 Pien Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael otyeko keto lodi me nyonyo i ŋut rok magi ducu me gin ti baŋ Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon, gin bino tic baŋe, pien atyeko miyo baŋe anaka leyi me tim.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Adwarpiny Jeremia te kobbi adwarpiny wadgi, Anania ni, “Winy ba, yin Anania, Rwot gire mom ocwai ento yin imio jo man obedo kede gen i kop me goba." 
Jeremiah28:16 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni, ebino kwanyi oko i wi lobo. Ibino to i mwaka-ni ikokome, pien ikobo kop me jem i kom Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Adwarpiny Anania te to oko i mwaka-nono ikokome, i dwe me abiro." 
Jeremiah29:1 Jeremia rik te coyo waraga i Jerucalem baŋ odoŋ atekere ame onwoŋo tye i akina jo ame onwoŋo tye iyi opii, kede baŋ olamdog, kede baŋ odwarpiny, kede baŋ jo luŋ ame rik Nebukadnejar oyako i Jerucalem te tero i Babulon acalo opii," 
Jeremiah29:2 Man otimere icen i kare ame onwoŋo doŋ abaka Yekonia kede tottere, kedejo ame oliro, rwode me Juda, kede me Jerucalem, kede jo ame odiro i tic apapat onwoŋo doŋ otyeko ya oko i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah29:3 Waraga man rik ocwao kun omio baŋ Elaca wot a Capan gin kede Gemaria wot a Kilkia, ame Jedekia ame abaka me Juda ocwao i Babulon baŋ abaka Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon. Kop ame tye i waraga-nono onwoŋo tye kit man:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael ocwao waraga man baŋ jo luŋ ame tye iyi opii, ame rik acwaogi iyi opii i Babulon kun akwanyogi i Jerucalem:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Ger wunu udi ite bedo wunu iye, pit wunu cam i potti me inwoŋ wunu gi-acama." 
Jeremiah29:6 Nyom wunu mon me inywal wunu itino awobe kede anyira; nyommi awobewu mon dok daŋ imi nyom anyirawu: nya imedde wunu kunu kun welwu mom dok piny. 
Jeremiah29:7 Cite myero nen ni ibedo wunu aber i boma ame aryemowu aterowu iye acalo opii. Kwa wunu Rwot pi bomanono, pien ka jo ame tye i boma-nono bedo aber bino miyo wun daŋ ibedo wunu aber." 
Jeremiah29:8 Pien Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, Kur imi wunu odwarpinywu kede okor tipowu ame tye i akinawu bwolwu, dok daŋ mom ibed winyo wunu lek ame gin oleko," 
Jeremiah29:9 pien mannono luŋ goba keken en ame gin tye ka rabbiwunono, kun orabo-gu i nyiŋa. An gira onwoŋo mom acwaogi. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah29:10 Rwot okobo ni, “Kare ame mwakki pyerabiro doŋ otum ame atyeko miyo pi Babulon, an abino limowu ate co bo gin a rik aciko baŋwu, ate dwogowu baŋa i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah29:11 Pien an aŋeo gin ame atyeko yiko pirwu, yik me ber bedowu, pe me timowu rac, yik ame tye pi anyimwu dok ame tye iye gen." 
Jeremiah29:12 I kare-naca ite bedo lwoŋo wunu nyiŋa, kun ibino wunu baŋa me bino kwaya, an abino winyo kwacwu." 
Jeremiah29:13 Ibino yenya wunu ite nwoŋa wunu; ka ce iyenya wunu kede cunywu ducu," 
Jeremiah29:14 ibino nwona wunu gire, an ate dwogo kucwu ate daŋ cokowu oko i akina rok ocele luŋ kede i kabedo luŋ ame rik aryemowu aterowu iye, ate dwogowu cen i kabedo man, ame rik akwanyowu iye me cwalowu iyi opii." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Pien wun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Rwot omiowa odwarpiny i Babulon,’" 
Jeremiah29:16 mannono omio Rwot okobo kop i kom abaka ame bedo i wi kom loc a Daudi kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i boma man, watiwu ame mom rik obin otero oko iyi opii." 
Jeremiah29:17 Rwot me mony okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, acwayo i komgi pala me romo, kec, kede too edeke, dok abino miyogi bedo calo nyig oduro ame otop, ame doŋ rac odoco, a mom romo camere."
