Jeremiah29:18 Abino ryemogi i pala lweny, i kec, kede too edeke, dok abino miyogi obedo gin ame rok ame tye i wi lobo apapat lworo, gin bino doko gin me ceno jo, gin a jo lworo, ame jo jwio ajwia kede gin ame ocao i akina rok ducu, i kabedo luŋ ame acwaogi iye," 
Jeremiah29:19 pien gin rik okwero winyo koppa ame abedo cwayo baŋgi tere i tere, kun amio omirona odwarpiny kobbigi, cite gin gigi ote kwero winyo oko. Man kop a Rwot okobo.’" 
Jeremiah29:20 Winy wunu kop a Rwot wun luŋ ame itye wunu acalo opii ame rik acwaowu i Babulon, kun akwanyowu i Jerucalem:" 
Jeremiah29:21 Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo kop i kom Akab wot a Kolaya kede Jedekia wot a Maceya ame tye ka rabo kop me goba baijwu, kun orabo-gu i nyiŋa ni. Nen ba, abino miyogi i cin Nebukadnejar, ame bino nekogi kun ineno wunu kede wanwu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Jo Juda luŋ ame tye acalo opii i Babulon bino tic i nyiŋgi me ceno jo kun okobo ni, ‘Rwot bino miyi ibedo calo Jedekia kede Akab ame abaka me Babulon obulogi abula i mac." 
Jeremiah29:23 Man en can ame obino keto i komgi pien gin otimo tim me miŋo iyi Icrael, gin ocodo mon owotegi, dok daŋ okobo kop me goba i nyiŋa, kun an mom acikogi gira. An en aŋeo, dok daŋ an en abedo acaden ame ŋeo gin a gin otimo. Man kop a Rwot okobo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Aco baŋ Cemaya ame obedo dano me Neklam, obino kobbe ni," 
Jeremiah29:25 “Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael. Yin ityeko cwayo waraga apol apola kede nyiŋi kun icwao baŋ jo ame tye i Jerucalem kede baŋ Jepania wot a Cemaya, ame obedo alamdog, kede baŋ olamdog ocele luŋ, kun ikobbigi ni," 
Jeremiah29:26 Rwot otyeko keti me bedo alamdog ocele luŋ, kun ikobbigi ni, Rwot otyeko keti me bedo alamdog akaka Yekoyada alamdog, me ilo ot a Rwot, kun iloo ŋat acel acel ame wie oballe ame rabo koppi i nyiŋ Rwot, me wek imakgi itwegi kede kol, kun daŋ irwako nyonyo i ŋutgi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Kara doŋ ŋo omoni juko Jeremia me Anatot i kare-ni ame tye ka rabbiwu kop? 
Jeremiah29:28 Pien en ocwao kop baŋwu i Babulon kan, kun kobo ni, Ibino ri wunu kare alac iyi opii; doŋ myero iger wunu wudi me bedowu, pit wunu daŋ cam i potowu me inwon wunu gi-acama.”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Jepenia alamdog rik te kwano waraga man kun Jeremia adwarpiny winyo. 
Jeremiah29:30 Rwot te kobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Cwal kop baŋ jo ame oterogi iyi opii, kobbigi ni, ‘Rwot okobo kop ikom Cemaya me Neklam, ni, pien Cemaya orabbiwu kop kun an gira mom acwae, omio ibedo wunu i gen nononono." 
Jeremiah29:32 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni, Nen ba, abino keto can i kom Cemaya me Neklam karacel kede ikwae, ŋattoro i akina jo mere mom bino doŋ akwo me neno gin aber ame abino tiyo i kom jona, pien en okobo kop ame kela jem i kom Rwot. Man kop a Rwot okobo’.”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo baŋ Jeremia, Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Co kop luŋ ame abedo kobbi-ni i buk. 
Jeremiah30:3 Nen ba, kare tye abino, ame abino dwoggo iye gum a jona Icrael kede Juda. Abino dwoggogi cen i lobo ame rik amio baŋ kwarigi, gin te bino bedo iye acalo meggi.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Magi en kop ame Rwot okobo i kom jo Icrael kede Juda: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Rwot okobo ni, Wan otyeko winyo koko a jo ame can opoto i komgi atura, koko a jo a lworo omako, ame mom tye i kuc." 
Jeremiah30:6 Aman koŋ ipenyere keni keni, dok ite tamo daŋ, ico twero nywalo atin? Piŋo dok atye ka neno co tye amako pyergi amaka, bala dako ame tye ka rem me nywal? Piŋo wan jo oballe oko?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Oi doi! Twon nino arac meicel tye abino, mom tye nino moro ame rom kede; Nino-nono en nino me can meicel baŋ ikwae a Yakobo; kadi bed amannono, obino larogi oko i can-nono gire.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Ka ce nino-nono oromo, abino turo lodi me loc oko i ŋutgi abino daŋ codo nyor oko ame otweogi kede." 
Jeremiah30:9 Cakere i karenono gin bino tic pi Rwot Obaŋagi kede Daudi abakagi ame dok abino miyogi.” 
Jeremiah30:10 Rwot okobo ni, “Yin amirona Yakobo, kur ilwori, akadi yin Icrael, cunyi kur poti. Nen ba, abino larri i kannabor meicel, ate laro ikwai i lobo ame aman gin tye iye acalo opii. Ikwae a Yakobo bino dwogo cen, ote bedo mot i kuc, mom tye ŋattoro ame bino miyogi lworo." 
Jeremiah30:11 Pien an atye kedwu me bino larowu, abino jwero rok ocele luŋ atyekogi oko, i akina jo ame akeketowu iye, cite wun mom abino tyekowu ducu, Abino pwodowu abeber, ento mom abino wekowu ame mom aketo can i komwu. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah30:12 “Rwot okobo ni, Awano ame aketo i komwu mom twero can, dok wan bur i komwu odet arac meicel." 
Jeremiah30:13 Mom tye ŋattoro ame oromo cun pirwu, dok yattoro me aketa i wan burwu daŋ mom, wan bur i komwu doŋ mom romo can." 
Jeremiah30:14 Jo ame marowu luŋ, wigi doŋ owil oko i komwu, mom doŋ oparo pirwu kadi acel; pien atimowu lit calo ibedo wunu okworra, aketo can agwa meicel i komwu aboŋo kica, pien balwu onwoŋo bal ame itimo wunu me akaka, dok bal ame itimo wunu daŋ dwon atek." 
Jeremiah30:15 Piŋo pwod ikok wunu pi awa no ame awanowu kede? Rem ame itye wunu kede mom romo cannere. Pien balwu onwoŋo bal me akaka gin arac ame itimo wunu dwoŋ meicel; mannono en omio aketo can man i komwu. 
Jeremiah30:16 Pi mannono, jo luŋ ame nekowu, gin daŋ obino nekogi, okworwu luŋ aluŋa obino mako oko otero acalo opii, jo luŋ ame yako jamiwu gin daŋ obino yako jamigi, kede jo luŋ ame wunowu, gin daŋ obino wunogi." 
Jeremiah30:17 Pien abino miyowu dok ibedo wunu jo ame komgi yot, wan bur i komwu daŋ bino can oko, pien gin olwonowu ni wun jo a doŋ obolo oko, Cion doŋ odoko gin ame ŋattoro mom paro pire.” Man kop a Rwot." 
Jeremiah30:18 “Rwot okobo ni, Nen ba, abino dwoko kuc i kema a jo Yakobo: kica bino maka i kan ame gin bedo iye; obino dok gero boma i kabedo mere acon, paco abaka bino dok kakare." 
Jeremiah30:19 Jo me kunu doŋ bino wero wer me pwoyo Obaŋa, gin bino bedo redo i wer me yomcuny, Abino miyogi onya, kun welgi mom dok piny, abino miyo jo worogi meicel." 
Jeremiah30:20 Itinogi bino bedo apol kite ame rik otye kede con, lwak jo iye bino cun atek i nyima, abino keto can i kom jo ame wunowu." 
Jeremiah30:21 Rwode ame bino loyogi, bino ya i akinagi, alocgi bino ya i akina rokgi. Abino lwoŋe, en bino bino baŋa, pien mom tye ŋattoro ame bino yiye kene me bino baŋa. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah30:22 Wun ibino bedo wunu jona, an abino bedo Obaŋawu.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Koŋ inen yamo kot ame Rwot omio akodo! Akemo mere calo yamo ajuru, bino mwoc i tuc iwi jo areco." 
Jeremiah30:24 Akemo a Rwot agwa meicel mom bino kwe, tuno wan ame doŋ ocobo gin ame eyikere me tiyo, Ibino niaŋ wunu man icennere, i kare ame pwod tye anyim." 
Jeremiah31:1 Rwot okobo ni, “I kare-naca abino bedo Obaŋa a jo me doggola Icrael luŋ, gin bino bedo jona.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Rwot okobo ni, “Jo ame obwot i lak pala lweny, kica obin opoto i komgi i tim, i kare ame jo Icrael tye ayenyo ka weo," 
Jeremiah31:3 An anyutte baŋgi i kannabor, abedo maro jo Icrael kare ducu i mar a mom lokere, mannono omio an amedo bedo agen i nyimi nakanaka." 
Jeremiah31:4 Dok abino pitowu odoco wun jo Icrael, ite Cuŋ wunu, dok ibino ruko wunu ruk me kwogo ite bino myel wunu i yomcuny," 
Jeremiah31:5 Dok ibino medde pito poto olokwu, i wi kiddi me Camaria, opit olokkono bino pito oko ducu, icennere gin bino camo nyige ame ocek." 
Jeremiah31:6 Pien nino tye abino anyim ame okurpiny bino lwoŋo iye, kun olwoŋo i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim ni, ‘Ya wunu, me owot wunu i Cion, baŋ Rwot Obaŋawa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Rwot okobo ni, “Wer wer me yomcuny i dwon aloŋo pi jo Icrael, ya ired wunu pien gin obedo rok adwoŋ meicel, i akina rok ducu. Rab wunu pi Rwot, dok ipake wunu, kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Rwot doŋ olaro jo mere oko, jo Icrael ame odoŋŋere.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Nen ba, abino kwanyogi oko i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, abino cokogi i kannabor meicel, ame tye iyi agikki piny. Otowaŋ kede onwalo bino bino karacel kedgi, mon ayac kede mon a doŋ gorogoro meicel, jo ame bino dwogo kan bino bedo adwoŋ meicel." 
Jeremiah31:9 Gin luŋ obino bino kun okoko, an abino telogi me dwokogi cen, kun akweo cunygi, abino miyogi obedo i ŋet kulo ame pii opoŋ iye, obino lubo yo ocuŋ atira kun mom otwomere i ginnoro; pien an abedo pappa a jo Icrael, jo Epraim en obedo itinona me kao." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Winy wunu koppa an a Rwot, wun rok ducu, rab wunu koppere i lobo ame tye kan aboco, rab wunu pire naka i dog nam luŋ. Ŋat ame rik okeketo jo Icrael, en a daŋ dok bino cokogi, bino gwokogi kite ame akwat gwoko kede rommi mere." 
Jeremiah31:11 Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko lakoro jo Icrael oko iyi opii, en olarogi i cin rok onwoŋo tek meicel katogi oko." 
Jeremiah31:12 Gin bino bino ote wer i dwon aloŋo i wi kidi me Cion, cunygi bino bedo ayom micel i kom gum ame abino miyogi, i kom kai, kono olok, kede moo, i kom rommi kede dok ame onywalo, Kwogi bino bedo aber meicel calo poto ame pii romo, mom dok obino bedo i cwercuny kadi acel." 
Jeremiah31:13 Anyira bino myel yomcuny adwoŋ meicel, jo oteggo kede awobe luŋ daŋ cunygi bino bedo ayom. Abino loko kokogi doko yomcuny, abino kweyo cunygi odoco, ate miyogi yomcuny akaka cwercuny." 
Jeremiah31:14 Abino miyo olamdog camo cam adwoŋ meicel dok abeco, jami abe co-no luŋ ame amiogi bino tyeko mitti a jona oko. Man kop a Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Rwot okobo ni, “Dwon tye ka winyere i Rama, koko kede twon kumo adwoŋ meicel. Lakeri tye ka koko itino mere, en okwero ni myero kur kwe cunye, pien itino mere doŋ pe.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Rwot okobo ni, “Wek wunu koko bedi, we pig wanwu doŋ oko. Pien ticcoro luŋ ame itio wunu obino culowu pire, gin bino dwogo cen i lobo ame okworgi oterogi iye." 
Jeremiah31:17 Itye wunu kede gen i kare ame tye anyim, Itinowu bino dwogo cen i lobogi ikokome. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah31:18 Awinyo ka jo Epraim tye akoko i cwercuny, kun okobo ni, ‘Rwot doŋ opwodowa calo dyaŋ ame mom opwonyo i pur, dwogowa cen me wan odok cen kakarwa, pien yin ibedo Rwot Obaŋawa." 
Jeremiah31:19 Pien i kare ame otyeko ya oko i baŋi, oŋut, i kare ame opwonyowa, ocako bedo i cuny me dwogo cen. Lewic omakowa meicel, dok alee otwodowa, pi bal ame wan otimo i kare ame pwod wan otino.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 “Epraim obedo atinna ame amaro? En obedo atin ame amaro kato itino ducu? Pien kare ducu ka atye ka kobo kop i kome, pwod amedde po pire meicel. Mannono omio cunya tye ka myel meicel pire, abino gire time kica ateteni. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Ket wunu ginnoro ame nyuttiwu yo, gur wunu alama mogo i yo me cimo yo, tam wunu atek meicel pi yo gudo, ame obedo yo ame rik iwoto wunu kede. Dwog wunu cen ba, wun jo Icrael, dwog wunu cen i bomawu ame yam iweweko wunu-ni." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ibino bedo wunu kala akala pi kare arom mene wun jo ame mom genne-ni? Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko keto ginnoro anyen i lobo, dako en ame gwoko ico.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, “Jo man dok bino kobo kop magi i lobo Juda kede i boma luŋ me Juda, i kare ame adwoggogi cen i kucgi. ‘Rwot myero mi gum i kom kidi acil me Jerucalem, kabedo acil ame en bedo iye.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Jo ame bedo i Juda kede i boma luŋ ame tye iye, okwat kede opur, kede okwa rommi ame bedo kuno, gin luŋ obino bedo karacel." 
Jeremiah31:25 Abino miyo jo ame ool limo teko, dok abino miyo jo ame kec ociro atek meicel camo cam ote yeŋ.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Mannono bino miyo jo kobo ni onino aber meicel dok i kare ame ocoo onwoŋo komgi yot atek. 
Jeremiah31:27 Rwot okobo ni, “Kare tye abino ame abino miyo dano kede lee bedo adwoŋ meicel i lobo a jo Icrael kede i lobo a jo Juda." 
Jeremiah31:28 Kare tye abino ame abino gwokogi i kare me pitogi kede miyogi doŋo malo kite ame rik agwokogi kede i kare me mukogi, me putogi, me turogi, me tyekogi kede i kare me keto can i komgi." 
Jeremiah31:29 I kare-naca gin mom dok obino medde kobo ni, ‘Kwariwa rik ocamo nyig olok awac, ame te dilo lak itino oko.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Ento dano acel acel bino to pi ballere en ikome. Amannono daŋ ŋat ame bino camo olok awac lake bino dil oko. 
Jeremiah31:31 “Rwot okobo ni, Kare bino romo, ame abino moko cikerena anyen kede doggola Icrael kede doggola a Juda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Mom dok abedo bala cikere a rik aketo i kom kwarigi ca, i nino ame rik amakogi i ciŋgi, ate kwanyogi oko i lobo me Miciri, cikerena ame gin obin oturo oko kadi bed an rik onwoŋo atye acalo cwargi. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah31:33 Doŋ man en cikere ame abino moko kede doggola Icrael ka kare naca okato. Abino keto cik i cunygi, ate coyo i yigi. An abino bedo Obaŋagi, gin ote bedo jona." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ŋattoro a pwonyo wadgi doŋ bino bedo mom, akadi ŋat ame kobbi ominnere ni, ‘Ŋe Rwot,’ pien gin luŋ obino ŋeya, geye i kom jo atino ame tye i akinagi, ituno i kom jo adoŋo. Pien abino timogi kica i kom timgi areco, mom dok abino poyo balgi.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Rwot okobo ni, “Ŋa ame omio cen me menyo dyeceŋ, ŋa ame omoko kite ame dwel kede acer menyo kede piny dyewor? Ŋa ame mio pii tugere i nam te cako mor? Ŋat otimo amannono luŋ nyiŋe obedo Rwot me mony.”" 
Jeremiah31:36 Rwot okobo ni, “An doŋ atyeko moko kite ame piny myero bed kede kare luŋ, ka ce gin ame amoko-nono twero lokere, ikwae Icrael daŋ bino lokere, mom dok ote bedo rok ame an ayero acalo mera atwal.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Rwot okobo ni, “Ka ce otwero pimo polo ame tye malo, dok ka ce otwero roto kite ame acakki me polo tye kede piny, mannono bino miyo an daŋ akwero jo Icrael, pi ginnoro luŋ ame gin otyeko timo.”" 
Jeremiah31:38 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, kare tye abino ame boma man dok obino gero odoco pi Rwot, kun ocako gero i kan ocuŋ iguŋ malo ame olwoŋo ni Kananel naka i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel me Gul." 
Jeremiah31:39 Obino pimo i tol naka i tur ame tye kannabor ame olwoŋo ni Gareb te gono dok piny i Goa. 
Jeremiah31:40 Luŋ luŋ ame rik oonyo iye kom jo oto kede buru, tuno kede naka i luŋ me Kidron, tuno kede i dogcel ame tye i kona ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel me Aguragura kato kede naka tuŋ kide, mannono luŋ bino bedo kabedo acil pi Rwot. Mom dok obino puto kadi acel akadi turo.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 I mwaka me apar me loc a Jedekia abaka me Juda, ame mannono rik onwoŋo obedo mwaka me apar wie aboro me loc a Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon, kop a Rwot rik obino baŋ Jeremia," 
Jeremiah32:2 I kare-naca onwoŋo mony abaka me Babulon tye ka guro Jerucalem, adwarpiny Jeremia rik ote cego oko i dyekal okur piny ame tye i paco abaka me Juda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Jedekia abaka me Juda onwoŋo rik otwee oko i buc, kun kobo ni, “Piŋo yin itye ka rabo kop kun ikobo ni Rwot okobo ni, Nen ba, an am iyo boma man oko i cin abaka me Babulon, en bino mayo oko," 
Jeremiah32:4 Jedekia abaka me Juda mom bino bwot iciŋ jo Kaldaya, obino miye oko ateteni i cin abaka me Babulon, ame en bino kop kede wan i wan, kun ŋat acel acel neno ton wan awottere." 
Jeremiah32:5 En bino tero Jedekia i Babulon, en bino bedo kuno tuno wan ame abino lime, kadi bed ilweny wunu i jo Kaldaya rom mene, mom gire ibino loyogi wunu.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremia okobo ni, “Kop a Rwot obino baŋa, kun kobo ni," 
Jeremiah32:7 Nen ba, Kanamel wot a Calum ame obedo neroni bino bino baŋi te kobbi ni, ‘Wil potona ame tye i Anatot, pien yin i watta ame itye kede twer me wilo.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 Oyotoyot Kanamel ame obedo atin nerona te bino oko baŋa, kite ame Rwot onwoŋo okoba kede, te kobba ni, ‘Wil potona ame tye i. Anatot i lobo a jo Benjamin, pien yin itye kede twer me wilo. Wil lobo-naca me bedo megi ame yin ilo’. An ate niaŋ ni kop ame onwoŋo awinyo kara onwoŋo obedo kop a Rwot ateteni." 
Jeremiah32:9 “An ate wilo poto i baŋ Kanamel, ame obedo atin nerona, poto ame onwoŋo tye i Anatot. Kare ame opimo lim me wilo poto-naca, onwoŋo ni wellere romo cekel me ryal apar wie abiro," 
Jeremiah32:10 Ate keto ciŋa i waraga me cikere, ote mwono doge oko, ote nwoŋo ocaden ame gin te pi mo lim i mijan," 
Jeremiah32:11 An ate tero waraga me cikere me wilwa-nono ame tito kit kare ame bino ri kede i ciŋa kede cik ame myero lub, kede kopi mere ame rom aroma kede ame mom omwono doge," 
Jeremiah32:12 ate wot miyo waragawa me cikere-nono baŋ Baruk wot a Neria ame obedo wot a Maceya, kun Kanamel atin nerona daŋ tye, kun ocaden ame oketo ciŋgi i waraga me cikere daŋ tye, karacel kede Ojudaya mogo ame rik tye obedo i dyekal okur-piny." 
Jeremiah32:13 An ate ciko Baruk i nyimgi kuno, kun akobo ni," 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael, okobo ni, Kwan waraga me cikere magi, en ame omwono doge kede en ame mom omwono doge, ite ke to iyi abino ame ocweo i lobo me wek gin ri kare alac," 
Jeremiah32:15 Pien Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, Udi kede potti kede olok-gu dok obino medo wilo i lobo man.’" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Kare ame doŋ atyeko miyo waraga me cikere magi baŋ Baruk wot a Neria, akwao Rwot, kun akobo ni," 
Jeremiah32:17 ‘Ama Rwot Obaŋa we! Yin giri en ame itio polo kede lobo kun itio kede tekoni adwoŋ. Mom tye ginnoro atek baŋi gire," 
Jeremiah32:18 yin ame inyuto mar a mom lokere baŋ jo tutumia i tutumia, dok yin daŋ iculo kwor pi bal onywal i kom ikwaegi ame bino i ŋegi. Ama Rwot Obaŋa ame tye kede twon twer kede teko adwoŋ meicel, ame nyiŋi obedo Rwot me mony," 
Jeremiah32:19 yin ame ibedo kede yik me awura, dok itio gigi mo go adonodono me awura. Yin ame waŋi yabere kare ducu i kom gin ame dano tio kun iculo dano acel acel ame lubo kite ame en tyekede, kede pi ticame en otio." 
Jeremiah32:20 Yin ame inyuto anyut kede gigi mogo me awura i lobo Miciri, tuno kede i kareni iyi Icrael kede i akina lwak luŋ, ame omio aman i kare-ni doŋ onei i kabedo ducu." 
Jeremiah32:21 Yin rik ikwanyo joni Icrael i lobo me Miciri i twoni anyuttogo adoŋodoŋo kede tano mogo me awura, i twon ciŋi atek meicel, ame kelo twon lworo adwoŋ twatwal;" 
Jeremiah32:22 yin rik ite miyogi lobo man, ame rik onwoŋo ikwonere pire baŋ kwarigi, lobo ame cak kede moo kic dwoŋ iye meicel." 
Jeremiah32:23 Gin rik te donyo i lobo man gamo bedo meggi. Gite gin rik mom ote winyo koppi akadi lubo cikki. Gin mom otimo ginnoro kadi acel i kom ginnoro luŋ ame rik icikogi iye. Mannono omio yin imio gin aracci luŋ opoto i komgi. 
Jeremiah32:24 Nen ba, mony tye abino me bino mako boma man oko pi peko me pala lweny, kec, kede too edeke omio boma man otye doŋ ka miyo oko iciŋ jo Kaldaya ame doŋ tye ka lweny kede. Gin ame rik yin ikobo doŋ obino me cobere, doŋ nen ba, yin itye giri ka neno." 
Jeremiah32:25 Kadi amannono, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, yin onwoŋo ikobba ni, “Wil po to kede lim, dok myero ibed ocaden i kare me wilo.” Kun kono yin itye ka miyo boma man oko i cin jo Kaldaya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Kop a Rwot obino baŋ Jeremia, kun kobbe ni," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Nen ba, an a Rwot Obaŋa a jo ducu, tye ginnoro ame tek baŋa?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Pi mannono ba, Rwot okobo ni, Nen ba, an atye amiyo boma man oko i ciŋ jo me Kaldaya, i cin abaka Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon. En bino mayo boma man oko." 
Jeremiah32:29 Jo Kaldaya ame tye ka lweny i kom boma man bino bino ote bino cwinyo mac i kom boma man, ote wano oko, kun owaŋo udi luŋ ame yam otye ka yalo iye Baal odok akur i wigi malo, karacel kede mot amata ame otye ka yalli obaŋe mogo ocele, me miyo akemo mako Rwot." 
Jeremiah32:30 Pien mom tye ginnoro ame jo Icrael kede jo Juda otimo aber kono ka timo bal keken cakere con i kare me tinogi; ikwae Icrael mom otimo ginnoro aber kadi acel, kono ka roka ame akemo maka i tic ame gin obedo tiyo." 
Jeremiah32:31 Boma man ocoo akemona kede iniga luŋ ame onwoŋo atye kede, cakere i kare me gero tuno kede naka tin, mannono omio amoko ni myero doŋ akwanyo oko i nyima," 
Jeremiah32:32 pien pi tim areco luŋ ame ikwae Icrael kede ikwae a Juda obedo timo me roka wek akemo maka. Gin ame obakkigi kede rwodegi obedo timo, gin ame olamdog kede odwarpiny obedo timo kede gin ame jo ame bedo i Jerucalem obedo timo." 
Jeremiah32:33 Gin doŋ olokka negi, kun owito nyimgi tene; kadi bed abe do pwonyogi tere i tere, gin gigi mom owinyo gin ame apwonyogi kede." 
Jeremiah32:34 Gin obedo timo tim me kwer i ot ame olwoŋo kede nyiŋa, me obal gigi oko." 
Jeremiah32:35 Ogero kabedo mogo i wi kiddi malo me woro Baal i luŋ a wot a Kinnon me miyo itinogi awo be kede anyira baŋ jok ame olwoŋo ni Molek, kadi bed rik an mom acikogi me timo amannono, kun daŋ mom otamo pire kadi acel, ni gin bino timo tim man me kwer, me miyo Juda po to i bal." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Aman doŋ ba, man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo i kom boma man ame wun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Otyeko miyo oko i cin abaka me Babulon pi pala lweny, kec, kede too edeke’." 
Jeremiah32:37 Nen ba, an abino coko jo man ducu i lobo apapat ame abino ryemogi cwayogi iye, iyi akemo kede twon iniga adwoŋ meicel ame onwoŋo omaka i komgi, abino dwoggogi i kabedo man ate miyogi bedo i kuc iye." 
Jeremiah32:38 Gin bino bedo jona, an abino bedo Obaŋagi." 
Jeremiah32:39 Abino miyogi obedo i cuny acel, kun kitegi acel me olwora kare ducu, mannono abino timo pirgi kede pi ber bedo ikwaegi ame bino lubogi." 
Jeremiah32:40 Abino ci kere kedgi cikere ame perakino nakanaka, mom dok abino loko tamma me timo gin aber i komgi; abino miyogi obedo kede cuny me lwora me kur dok oya oko i baŋa." 
Jeremiah32:41 Cunya bino bedo yom me timo gin aber pirgi dok abino miyogi oguro lwitgi i lobo man i twon gen adwoŋ, kun atimo i cunya ducu kede tipona ducu." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Pien Rwot okobo ni, Kite acalo akelo kede twon gin arac i kom jo man, abino daŋ kelo gin aber ame atyeko ciko pire i komgi kittono." 
Jeremiah32:43 Dok obino wilo potti i lobo man ame wun ikobo wunu ni doŋ odoko wi obur, kan ame dano kede leyi mom doŋ bedo iye; otyeko doŋ miyo oko i ciŋ jo Kaldaya." 
Jeremiah32:44 Potti dok obino wilo kede lim, jo bino daŋ coyo waraga me cikere ate keto cin iye, ote mwono daŋ doge oko kun ocaden tye, i lobo a jo Benjamin kede i kabedo luŋ ame oguro Jerucalem, karacel kede i boma luŋ me Juda, kede i boma luŋ ame tye i Negeb. Abino dwoggogi kucgi, man kop a Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Rwot dok te kobbi Jeremia tyen me aryo mere i kare ame onwoŋo en pwod tye i buc i ot ame tye i dyekal okur-piny, kun kobbe ni," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Rwot ame oketo lobo, Rwot ame ocweo te miyo moko atek, nyiŋe olwoŋo ni Rwot." 
Jeremiah33:3 En okobo ni, Lwona, an abino gamo dogi, dok abino titti twoni gigi mogo me i muŋ ame yam mom iŋeo." 
Jeremiah33:4 Pien Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo kop i kom udi ame tye i boma man, kede udi obakki me Juda ame yam orereto oko piny. Mom tye konnyoro ame olweny i lobo ame omony me Kaldaya oto." 
Jeremiah33:5 Jo Kaldaya tye abino me bino lweny i kom boma man me wek omi kom jo oto radde arada iye, jo ame akemona kede inigana bino miyo anekogi. Pien atyeko doŋ kano waŋa oko i kom boma man kun mom dok amito ni anen pi timmogo areco ame jo iye bedo timo." 
Jeremiah33:6 Nen ba, abino miyogi ocan ote bedo i yotkom, abino caŋogi ate nyuttigi twon lonyo kede kuc adwoŋ." 
Jeremiah33:7 Abino dwogo kuc me Juda kede me Icrael, dok abino gerogi adwokogi kit ame rik otye kede con." 
Jeremiah33:8 Abino lwokogi oko i kom bal luŋ ame yam gin otimo i koma, te timogi kica i balgi luŋ kede timgi me bedo jem i koma." 
Jeremiah33:9 Abino nwoŋo nyiŋ me yomcuny i boma man, dok daŋ rok luŋ ame tye i wi podo bino paka kun oketo kwogo i koma, ka gin owinyo pi gin aber luŋ ame atimo i kom jo me boma man, Gin luŋ obino bedo kede lworo kun komgi myel pi gin aber kede pi lonyo ame amio iye." 
Jeremiah33:10 “Rwot okobo ni, I kom kabedo man ame wun ikobo wunu ni odoko wi obur ame dano kede lee mom bedo iye, kede i boma luŋ ame bedo i Juda kede i yo atitino luŋ ame tye i Jerucalem ame jo mom doŋ bea iye, dok ame mom doŋ tye jo moro, akadi leyi moro ame doŋ bedo iye," 
Jeremiah33:11 dwon me yomcuny bino winyere iye, karacel kede dwon atera kede me anyom, dwon jo ame tye ka wer kun okelo motgi me pwoc i ot a Rwot, ame ower ni, ‘Pwo wunu Rwot me mony, pien Rwot ber, marrere a mom lokere perakino wan i wan!’ Pien abino dwoggo kuc me lobo man kite ame rik tye kede con, Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Rwot me mony okobo ni, I kabedo man ame doŋ odoko wi obur ame jo kede leyi doŋ mom iye, karacel kede boma luŋ ame tye iye, okwat ame tye akwayo rommigi bino dok bedo iye." 
Jeremiah33:13 I boma luŋ ame tye i lobo obedo kidikidi, i boma luŋ ame tye i Cepela, i boma luŋ ame tye i Negeb, i boma luŋ ame tye i lobo a jo Benjamin, i kabedo luŋ ame oguro Jerucalem, karacel kede i boma luŋ ame tye i Juda, rommi kede dyegi pwod dok bino bea iye i nyim dano ame tye akwanogi, man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Nen ba, kare tye abino, ame abino cobo iye ginnoro luŋ ame rik aciko baŋ jo me ot Icrael kede me ot a Juda." 
Jeremiah33:15 I kare-nono, kede i nino-nono ikokome abino keto dok akwar Daudi ikokome i kom me loc. En bino ŋolo kop kakare kun tio gin a tye atira me miyo kuc bedo tye i lobo." 
Jeremiah33:16 Ka karenono oromo jo Juda kede Jerucalem bino larre te bedo mot i kuc. Nyiŋ ame obino lwone kede ene: ‘Rwot ame olarowa.’ 
Jeremiah33:17 “Rwot okobo ni, Akwar Daudi mom bino rwenyo i wi kom loc me ot a Daudi," 
Jeremiah33:18 dok daŋ olamdog ame obedo jo Levi mom bino bedo aboŋo dano moro i nyima me miyo mot awaŋa kede wano mot me moko kwon kede me ŋolo leyi me yala kare i kare.” 
Jeremiah33:19 Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Rwot okobo ni ka ce itwero turo cikerena ame ocikere kede wan kede dyeceŋ kede en ame ocikere i dyewor, ame twero miyo dyeceŋ kede dyewor mom twero bino i kare ame doŋ otyeko moko oko pirgi," 
Jeremiah33:21 itwero daŋ turo cikerena wan i Daudi ame obedo amirona, ame te miyo en bedo aboŋo akware moro i wi kom me loccere, kede cikerena wan olamdog kede jo Levi me tiyo ticca." 
Jeremiah33:22 Kite ame mony me polo mom romo kwanne kede, dok kwoyo ame tye i dog nam mom daŋ oromo pimo, mannono en kite ame abino miyo kede ikwae a Daudi ame obedo amirona nya kede, karacel kede olamdog ame obedo jo Levi ame gin jo atio ticca.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Yin ce pe inian gin ame jo man tye ka kobo ni, ‘Rwot otyeko kwero Icrael kede Juda oko ame gin atekere ame yam en oyero?’ Mannono omio gin otye ka cayo jona acaa bala mom obedo rok." 
Jeremiah33:25 Doŋ Rwot okobo ni, Ka ce mom aketo cikerena kede ceŋ kede dwe, dok daŋ ka mom aketo cikkoro ame tye ka loyo polo kede lobo," 
Jeremiah33:26 mannono bino miyo akwero ikwae a Yakobo karacel kede Daudi amirona, dok daŋ mom abino yero akware moro me loyo ikwae Iburaim, Icaka, kede Yakobo, Pien abino dwoggo kucgi dok daŋ kica bino maka i komgi.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Man en kop ame obino baŋ Jeremia i kare ame Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon kede dul monnyere, karacel kede dul mony me rok apapat ducu ame tye ite loccere onwoŋo tye ka lweny i Jerucalem kede i boma luŋ ame onwoŋo ceggi kede." 
Jeremiah34:2 Kop ame Rwot okobo ene: “Rwot. Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, ‘Wot ikobbi Jedekia ame obedo abaka me Juda ni, Rwot okobo ni, Nen ba, an amio boma man i cin abaka me Babulon, en bino waŋo oko kede mac." 
Jeremiah34:3 Yin mom ibino bwot i ciŋe, cite obino maki ote miyi i ciŋe, ibino neno abaka me Babulon wan i waŋ, dok ibino kop wunu kede waŋ i waŋ; yin ite wot i Babulon.’" 
Jeremiah34:4 Kadi amannono myero iwiny kop a Rwot, yin abaka Jedekia, me Juda! Man en kop ame Rwot okobo i komi. ‘Yin mom obino neki i pala lweny." 
Jeremiah34:5 Ibino to giri i kuc, Kite acalo rik owaŋo gin a ŋwece kur pi kwariwu ame gin ogeo bedo obakki i nyimi, yin daŋ obino wano gin a ŋwece kur piri, jo te kumo piri kun okobo ni, “Abaka doŋ oto oko doi!” ’ Pien an Rwot akobo kop man.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Adwarpiny Jeremia te kobo kop magi luŋ baŋ Jedekia abaka me Juda, kun kobbe i Jerucalem," 
Jeremiah34:7 i kare ame dul mony abaka me Babulon tye ka lweny i kom Jerucalem kede i kom boma luŋ me Juda ame onwoŋo odoŋ, Lakic kede Ajeka; pien magi en ame onwoŋo obedo boma me Juda ame onwoŋo ocelo kede cel atek, ame onwotjo odoŋ." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kop a Rwot ame ekobo baŋ Jeremia i kare ame abaka Jedekia doŋ onwoŋo otyeko cikere oko i jo luŋ ame tye i Jerucalem, ni gin myero gony opii oko kun orabo pire kannabor," 
Jeremiah34:9 ni mannono ŋat acel acel myero gony Eburania wadgi oko ame onwoŋo tye baŋe acalo opii, ico onyo dako, me kur ŋattoro dok mi dano me Eburania wadgi bed opii mere." 
Jeremiah34:10 Jo luŋ te winyo kop ame abaka orabo-nono, rwode karacel kede lwak ame omoko cikere-nono te ye gonyo opiigi oko, ame co onyo mon, me gin kur medde bedo opiigi; gin owinyo cikkono ote gonyogi oko," 
Jeremiah34:11 Cite icennere gin dok te wot omo co kede mon ame onwoŋo gin ogonyo oko, ote dwoko dok ite locgi acalo opiigi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Rwot te kobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, Rik aketo cikerena kede kwariwu, ate kwanyogi oko i lobo me Miciri, i ot me opii, kun akobbigi ni," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Iyi agikki me mwaka abicel abicel, ŋat acel acel myero gony dano me Eburania wadgi oko ame onwoŋo yam ocato baŋe te bedo tic baŋe pi mwakki abicel; akobo ni myero igony wunu kodi dano-nono i tic ame yam en tio baŋwu’, cite kwariwu te kwero winyo oko, kun mom daŋ ociko yitgi me winyo koppa." 
Jeremiah34:15 I kare aceggini, wun iŋut wunu ite timo wunu gin atye atira i nyima pi rabo pi gonyo opii, ŋat acel acel baŋ wadgi, wun dok ite medo wunu cikere i nyima i ot ame olwoŋo i nyiŋa." 
Jeremiah34:16 Cite dok ite lokere wunu balo nyiŋa i kare ame wun dok iomo wunu co kede mon ame yam obedo opiiwu ame onwoŋo doŋ ityeko gonyo wunu oko, kun ilubo wunu mitgi, ite dwoggogi wunu dok i te locwu me bedo opiiwu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Pi mannono ba, mom iwinyo wunu kadi acel pi rabo pi gonyo omegowu kun ŋat acel acel gonyo ominnere kede awottere; pi mannono ba, an en a doŋ abino gonyowu oko me ito i pala lweny, too edeke, kede kec. Abino miyo ibedo wunu gin ame mio jo me loc apapat me lobo bedo kede lworo." 
Jeremiah34:18 Dok jo ame oturo cikerena, ame okwero lubo ginnoro luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i cikere-naca, abino miyo oŋologi calo atin twon me cikere ame gin oŋolo i dul aryo." 
Jeremiah34:19 Rwode me Juda, rwode me Jerucalem, jo ame oliro, olamdog kede jo luŋ me lobo-nono ame bedo i akina dul kom atin twon ame opoko aryo," 
Jeremiah34:20 abino miyogi i cin okworgi kede i ciŋ jo ame mito nekogi, Winy atwarre malo kede leyi en ame bino camo komgi ka oto." 
Jeremiah34:21 Jedekia abaka me Juda kede rwode mere obino miyo luŋ i cin okworgi kede i ciŋ jo ame mito nekogi, i ciŋ mony abaka me Babulon, ame yam kon onwoŋo oweko lweny kedwu oko." 
Jeremiah34:22 Nen ba, abino miyogi odwogo cen i kom boma man, ote lweny i kome ote mayo oko, ote waŋo daŋ oko i mac. Abino miyo boma luŋ ame tye i Juda doŋ nono aboŋo ŋattoro ame bedo iye.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 I kare ame Yekoyakim wot a Yocia obedo abaka me Juda, Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Wot i ot a Rekab iwot ikob kedgi i te kelogi i ot a Rwot, kelgi iyi icika moro acel ame tye i ot a Rwot, ite miyogi kono olok me omati.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Mannono omio ate wot kwanyo Jajania wot a Jeremia moro ocele ame obedo wot Abajinia, kede omego mere kede awobe mere luŋ karacel kede jo me ot a Rekab luŋ." 
Jeremiah35:4 Akelogi luŋ iyi icika ame tye i ot a Rwot, icika itino a Kanan wot a Igdalia ame en obedo dano Obaŋa ame icika mere onwoŋo ceggi i me a rwode ame tye i ŋet icika a Maceya wot a Calum, ame obedo agwok doggola me ot a Rwot." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ate cibo ikopo kede abino ame kono olok opoŋ yie i nyimgi, ate kobbigi ni, “Mat wunu.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Cite gin bino gamo ni, “Wan giwa mom obino mato kono olok, pien Jonadab wot a Rekab ame obedo kwariwa ocikowa ni, ‘Mom ibino mato wunu kono olok, akadi wun ikomwu onyo ikwaewu wan iwaŋ." 
Jeremiah35:7 Mom ibino gero wunu wudi; mom ibino coyo wunu koti; mom ibino pito wunu ginnoro akadi ibedo i poto olok. Ento ibino bedo wunu i kema i kare luŋ me kwowu, me iperakino wunu kare alac i lobo ame wun itye wunu iye acalo wele.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Wan owinyo kop a Jonadab ame obedo wot a Rekab ame obedo kwarowu i ginnoro luŋ ame en ocikowa iye, ni kur omat koŋo pi kare me kwowa luŋ, wan ikomwa monwa, awobewa, naka anyirawa," 
Jeremiah35:9 kun mom ogero udi me bedowa. Wan giwa mom otye kede poto olok akadi potti me ginnoro ocele; 
Jeremiah35:10 ento wan giwa obedo i kema kun otio ginnoro luŋ ame kwarowa Jonadab ocikowa iye. 
Jeremiah35:11 Cite i kare ame Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon obino me lweny i kom Jerucalem, wan okobo ni, ‘Bin, owot i Jerucalem pi lworo mony a jo Kaldaya kede me Curia.’ Mannono en omio i kare-ni wan otye obedo i Jerucalem.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Rwot dok te kobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, ‘Wot ikobbi jo me Juda kede jo ame bedo i Jerucalem ni, Mom ce itwero winyo wunu pwony ame apwonyowu kede, kede kop ame akobbiwu?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Cik ame Jonadab wot a Rekab ociko kede awobe mere, me mom mato kono olok, rik gin obin ogwoko, Gin naka mom omato kono olok tuno naka tin pien gin owinyo cik a kwarogi. An abedo kop kedwu tere tere cite wun mom iwinyo wunu koppa." 
Jeremiah35:15 Omirona luŋ ame obedo odwarpiny, gin luŋ an acwaogi baŋwu kun acwaogi tere tere, kun akobbigi ni, “Aman myero doŋ ilokere wunu, ŋat acel acel wek yo mere me timo gin arac, kun iyiko wunu tic ame itio wunu, dok daŋ mom ibino lubo wunu obaŋe mogo ocele me tic pirgi, ite bedo wunu i lobo ame amiowu kede baŋ kwariwu.”" 
Jeremiah35:16 Cite wun mom iye ci ko wunu yitwu akadi winya wunu. Awobe a Jonadab wot a Rekab gire ogwoko cik ame papagi ocikogi kede cite rok man okwero winye oko. 
Jeremiah35:17 Pi mannono ba, Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa me mony, Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Nen ba, an akelo gin arac ame doŋ atyeko rabo pire i kom jo Juda kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem, pien an akobo kedgi, ento gin okwero winyo oko, an alwoŋogi, okwero-gu gamo doga oko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Jeremia te kobo ni, “Cite jo me ot a Rekab, Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Pien gin owinyo cik a papagi Jonadab, ote lubo ginnoro luŋ ame en ociko baŋgi," 
Jeremiah35:19 pi mannono ba, Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni Jonadab wot a Rekab bino bedo kede akware moro ame cuŋ nyim Rwot kare luŋ.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 I mwaka me aŋwen me loc a Yekoyakim wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda, Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Kwany buk adola, ite coyo kop luŋ ame atyeko kobo i kom Icrael, i kom Juda kede i kom rok apapat luŋ cakere i kare ame akobo kedi, i kare a Yocia tuno kede naka tin." 
Jeremiah36:3 Gwok on yo jo me ot a Juda twero winyo gin arac ame ayikere me timo i komgi, ame twero miyo ŋat acel acel weko yo mere arac ame etye ka lubo, me atot ya atimgi kica i kom balgi kede i kom gin arac ame yam obedo timo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Jeremia te lwoŋo Baruk wot a Neria, Baruk te coc i buke adola, kun coo kop luŋ ame Jeremia tye akwano, ame rik Rwot onwoŋo okobo baŋ Jeremia." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jeremia te ci ko Baruk ni, “An doŋ otyeko geŋa oko me mom donyo i ot a Rwot," 
Jeremiah36:6 pi mannono yin myero iwot iye, eka i nino me kanyo kec, ibino kwano kop a Rwot ame ityeko coyo i buk adola-ni i kare ame akwano baŋi, ibino kwano i nyim jo kuno i ot a Rwot kun jo winyo, Ibino kwano daŋ ame jo Juda luŋ tye awinyo, jo ame obino i boma apapat." 
Jeremiah36:7 Gwok on yo kwacgi twero tuno i nyim Rwot, dok onyo ŋat acel acel bino weko yo arac ame etye ka lubo, pien akemo doŋ ociro Rwot oko, kede wancuny, ame Rwot doŋ otyeko rabo pire i kom jo mere.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruk wot a Neria te timo ginnoro luŋ ame adwarpiny Jeremia ocike me timo i kom kop me kwano kop a Rwot ame tye i buk adola i ot a Rwot. 
Jeremiah36:9 I mwaka me abic, i dwe me aboŋwen me loc abaka Yekoyakim wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda, jo luŋ me Jerucalem kede jo ame obino i boma apapat me Juda, ame obino i Jerucalem, gin luŋ ote rabo pi kanyo kec i nyim Rwot." 
Jeremiah36:10 I kare-nono Baruk te cako kwano kop a Jeremia i buk adola, kun lwak luŋ winyo i ot a Rwot, iyi icika a Gemaria wot a Capan ame obedo Aran, Icika mere onwoŋo tye ceggi i dyekal ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ malo i ŋet dogcel ame onwoŋo odonyo kede i ot a Rwot ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel Anyen." 
Jeremiah36:11 I kare ame Mikaya wot a Gemaria, wot a Capan owinyo kop a Rwot ame tye i buk adola," 
Jeremiah36:12 en te ru ya oko i paco a abaka, te wot donyo iyi icika aran abaka, en onwoŋo rwode luŋ tye ocokere kuno: Elicama aran, Delaya wot a Cemaya, Elnatan wot Akbor, Gemaria wot a Capan, Jedekia wot Anania, kede rwode ocele mege ducu." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaya te tittigi kop luŋ ame owinyo Baruk okwano i buk adola kun lwak ducu winyo. 
Jeremiah36:14 Rwode te oro Jekudi wot a Netania, wot a Celemia, wot a Kuci, me wot kobbi Baruk ni, “Kwany buk adola ame ikwano baŋ lwak ca, ibin kede kan.” Mannono te miyo Baruk wot a Neria kwanyo buk adola bino kede baŋgi." 
Jeremiah36:15 Gin te kobbe ni, “Bed piny me ikwan kop iye.” Mannono te miyo Baruk kwannigi kop ame tye i buk adola-nono." 
Jeremiah36:16 Kare ame gin owinyo kop ame okwano luŋ, ŋat acel acel olokere oneno awottere kun lworo ociro oko, gin doŋ te kobbi Baruk ni, “Wan myero omi abaka ŋe kop magi luŋ,”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Gin te penyo Baruk ni, “Tittiwa kite ame ico kede kop magi luŋ. Jeremia en ame obedo kwanni kop mogiluŋ kunyinicoo?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruk tegamo ni, “En obedo kobo kop magi baŋa, kun an acoo kede alam yino i buk adola.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Rwode te kobbi Baruk ni, “Wot ipon wunu oko, yin karacel kede Jeremia, myero ŋattoro kur ŋe kan ame wunu itye wunu iye.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Rwode doŋ te wot i paco abaka, ote keto buk adola-naca iyi icika Elicama ame obedo aran; gin te tito kop luŋ baŋ abaka." 
Jeremiah36:21 Abaka te ru cwayo Jekudi me wot kelo buk adolanono, Jekudi te kwanyo bukkono iyi ici ka Elicama, ame obedo aran, eka en Jekudi te kwano baŋ abaka, kede rwode luŋ ame onwoŋo ocuŋ i ŋet abaka kuno." 
Jeremiah36:22 Man onwoŋo doŋ dwe me aboŋwen ame obedo kare me cwir, abaka onwoŋo tye obedo i ode ame ebedo iye i kare me cwir, kun tye aoyo mac." 
Jeremiah36:23 I kare ame Jekudi kwano buk adola, en okwano te tuno i dul me adek onyo aŋwen, abaka te gamo bukkono ŋoŋolo oko i pala te bolo oko i mac. En oweko bukkono owan i mac i tuno ka otum." 
Jeremiah36:24 Akadi en onyo dano moro i akina omiro mere ame owinyo kop magi kun okwano, mom obedo kede lworo moro kadi acel, mom daŋ oyeco boŋŋigi me nyu to cwercunygi." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kadi bed Elnatan kede Delaya kede Gemaria otemo cuko cuny abaka ni kur waŋ buk adola, cite en gire mom oye winyo kopgi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Abaka te ciko Jeramel ame obedo wode en abaka kede Ceraya wot a Ajiriel kede Celemia wot Abdel me mako Baruk ame onwoŋo obedo aran kede Jeremia adwarpiny, cite Rwot okanogi gire oko." 
Jeremiah36:27 I kare ame abaka otyeko wano buk adola ame onwoŋo Baruk rik ocoo kun Jeremia kobbe gin ame ocoo, Rwot dok te kobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Kwany dok buk adola ocele ico iye kop luŋ ame rik icoo i buk adola me agege-ca, ame abaka Yekoyakim, abaka me Juda otyeko wano oko." 
Jeremiah36:29 Aco kop i kom Yekoyakim abaka me Juda, yin ibino kobo ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni piŋo kara iwano buk adola man, kun ikobo ni, “Piŋo ocoo iye ni abaka me Babulon bino bino gire ateteni te balo lobo man oko, te neko jo kede leyi luŋ ame tye iye?”" 
Jeremiah36:30 Mannono omio Rwot okobo kop i kom Yekoyakim abaka me Juda kit man, ni mannono akware moro mom dok bino bedo i wi korri me loc a Daudi, kome obino bolo ata, cen te bedo wano dyeceŋ, kede nico me pee dyewor." 
Jeremiah36:31 Abino keto can i kome kede i kom ikwae, kede i kom omiro mere pi balgi. Ginnoro luŋ arac ame atyeko kobo i komgi, abino miyo poto i komgi, kede i kom jo ame bedo i Jerucalem kede i kom jo luŋ me Juda, ame gin mom otye ka winyo nono.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Jeremia te dok kwanyo buk adola ocele, te miyo baŋ Baruk ni myero co, Baruk wot a Neria, ame daŋ te coyo kun Jeremia tye akobe kop luŋ ame onwoŋo rik tye i buk adola ame Yekoyakim abaka me Juda rik obin owaŋo i mac-ca, Jeremia omemedo daŋ koppogo ocele iye ame rom aroma i maca me agege-ca." 
Jeremiah37:1 Jedekia wot a Yocia, ame Nebukadnejar, oketo me bedo abaka me Juda, oloo loc akaka Konia wot a Yekoyakim," 
Jeremiah37:2 cite akadi en abaka onyo omiro mere, naka jo ame bedo i lobo mere mom oye winyo kop a Rwot ame rik en okobo baŋ adwarpiny Jeremia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Abaka Jedekia rik te cwayo Yekokal wot a Calemia, kede Jepania alamdog, wot a Maceya, ocwaogi baŋ Jeremia adwarpiny, kun kobbigi ni, “Kwa Rwot Obaŋawa pirwa.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 I kare-nono onwoŋo Jeremia pwod wowota i akina jo, pien onwoŋo mom ru okete i buc." 
Jeremiah37:5 I kare-nono daŋ mony a Parao onwoŋo obino kun oya i Miciri; i kare ame mony a jo Kaldaya ame onwoŋo tye ka guro Jerucalem owinyo kop i komgi, gin te ya oko i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah37:6 Rwot te kobbi Jeremia adwarpiny ni," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni yin ibino kobo baŋ abaka me Juda ame ocwai ni yin ibin ipeny kop i baŋa ni, ‘Nen ba, mony a Parao ame obino me konyi ceggi dokoko cen i Miciri, i lobo mere." 
Jeremiah37:8 Jo Kaldaya bino dwogo cen, te bino lweny i kom boma man, gin obino mako oko ote waŋo oko i mac." 
Jeremiah37:9 Rwot okobo ni, Kur ibed bwolle wunu kenwu, kun ikobo wunu ni, “Jo Kaldaya gire bino bedo kannabor kedwa,” pien gin gire mom obino bedo kannabor." 
Jeremiah37:10 Pien akadi bed ilo wunu, mony a jo Kaldaya luŋ ame obino me lweny kedwu, eka te doŋ jo ame owanne keken, kun ŋat acel acel tye i kema mere, gin jo-nono bino ya eka te bino wano boma man oko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah37:11 I kare ame mony a jo Kaldaya oya oko i Jerucalem, i kare ame mony a Parao obino," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia oya i Jerucalem te wot i lobo a jo Benjamin me wot gamo dul lobo ame opokke i akina jo turegi. 
Jeremiah37:13 Kare ame en onwoŋo tye i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel a Benjamin, adwoŋ ame loo ocirikale onwoŋo tye kuno, ame nyiŋe Irija, wot a Celemia, wot a Anania, en te mako adwarpiny Jeremia, kun kobo ni, “Yin itye ka lwi wot baŋ jo me Kaldaya.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremia te gamo ni, “Mannono kop me goba, an gira mom alwi awot baŋ jo me Kaldaya.” Cite Irija mom oye winyo koppere-nono, omake te tere baŋ rwode." 
Jeremiah37:15 Akemo te maka rwode atek meicel i kom Jeremia, ote goye, ote kete i buc i ot a Jonatan, ame obedo aran, pien onwoŋo oloko ottono odoko ot kol." 
Jeremiah37:16 I kare ame otero Jeremia i ot ame tye i bur piny, oweke kuno pi kare alac," 
Jeremiah37:17 abaka Jedekia te cwayo jo me bino ome, ote tere i nyime. Abaka te bedo penye en kene i muŋ i ode, en te kobo ni, “Tye kopporo ame Rwot okobbi?” Jeremia te gamo ni, “Kop tye.” Jeremia te kobbe ni, “Yin obino miyi oko i ciŋ abaka me Babulon.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremia dok te medo kobbi abaka Jedekia ni, “Gin aŋo arac ame an atimo baŋi, onyo baŋ omironi, onyo baŋ jo man, ame omio yin iketa i ot kol?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Odwarpinyi tye kwene: ame orabbi kop kun okobo ni, ‘Abaka me Babulon gire mom bino lweny i komi kede i kom lobo man?’" 
Jeremiah37:20 Aman doŋ ba adwoŋ abaka, akwai me winyo koppa. Tim ber iwiny kwacca ame amio baŋi i mwolo, me kur dok idwoka cen i ot a Jonatan ame obedo aran, naka mio abino to oko kuno.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Mannono te miyo abaka Jedekia miyo cik, ote keto Jeremia bedo i dyekal okur-piny, kun omio ogati nino acel acel; ogati ame ogamo i baŋ oted ogati i yo ame gin bedo iye tuno wan ame ogati doŋ mom tye i boma, Mannono te miyo Jeremia medde bedo kuno i dyekal okur-piny." 
Jeremiah38:1 I kare-nono Cepatia wot a Mattan, Gedalia wot a Pacur, Jucal wot a Celemia, kede Pacur wot a Malcia, onwoŋo owinyo kop ame Jeremia obedo kobo baŋ lwak luŋ, kun kobo ni," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Rwot okobo ni ŋat ame bedo i boma man bino to i pala lweny, kec, kede too edeke. Cite ŋat ame bino wot Kaldaya bino bedo kwo, en bino bedo i kwo mere acalo mot ame omie pi lweny, en te medde bedo kwo." 
Jeremiah38:3 Boma man gire obino miyo ateteni i ciŋ mony abaka me Babulon, eka te gamo oko.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Rwode te kobo baŋ abaka ni, “Dano man myero nek oko, pien tye ka miyo ocirikale ame odoŋ i boma man tye adoko agoro karacel kede jo ocele luŋ, pi kobo kodi koppono baŋgi. Pien dano-ni mom tye atic pi ber bedo a jo man, ento pi timogi rac.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Abaka Jedekia te kobo ni, “Nen ba, en tye gire i ciŋi, pien abaka gire mom romo timowu i ginnoro.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Mannono te miyo gin kwanyo Jeremia oko ote wot bolo i bur pii me Malkia, ame obedo wot abaka ame onwoŋo rik tye i dyekal okur-piny kuno. Otweo Jeremia i tol ote cwayo piny i pii. Gum aber pii onwoŋo pe i burrono, kono ka coto keken, eka Jeremia te moko oko i coto." 
Jeremiah38:7 I kare ame Ebed-melek dano me Eciopia ame obedo dano ame oroo ame rik bedo i ot abaka owinyo ni obolo Jeremia piny i bur pii, I kare-nono onwoŋo abaka tye obedo i dogcel ame olwoŋo ni Dogcel a Benjamin," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedmelek oya i ot abaka te wot baŋ abaka, te wot kobbe, ni," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Adwoŋŋa abaka we, jo man otimo bal i kom ginnoro luŋ ame gin otimo i kom Jeremia adwarpiny, pi wot bole iyi bur pii piny; kec bino neke oko kuno, pien ogati moro mom doŋ tye i boma.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Abaka te ciko Ebed-melek, ame obedo dano me Eciopia, ni, “Kwany jo adek i kan iwot kedgi me iwot iwa Jeremia oko i bur pii piny, kun en mom ru oto.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Mannono te miyo Ebed-melek wot karacel i jonnono i ot abaka, ote wot donyo i ot ame okano iye jami, ote wot kwanyo keto boŋŋi mogo ame onwoŋo tye kuno, ote wot cwayo i tol piny i bur baŋ Jeremia," 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebed-melek, dano me Eciopia te kobbi Jeremia ni, “Ket boŋŋi-nu i te bwoki ite keto tol i wigi.” Jeremia daŋ te timo amannono." 
Jeremiah38:13 Gin te wayo Jeremia oko i bur, ote kele kannaler. Jeremia doŋ te medde bedo i dyekal okur-piny." 
Jeremiah38:14 Abaka Jedekia te cwayo dano lwoŋo Jeremia adwarpiny Jeremia te wot baŋe i dogcel me adek me donyo i ot a Rwot. Abaka te kobbi Jeremia ni, “Amito penyi, tim ber kur imunna kopporo kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia te kobo baŋ Jedekia ni, “Ka ce akobbi, mom ibino moko tammi me neka oko? Dok ka ce ami tam, ibino ye winyo koppa?”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Abaka Jedekia te kwoŋo i muŋ baŋ Jeremia ni, “Kite acalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, Rwot ame tipo a jo tye i ciŋe, mom abino neki kadi acel, akadi miyi i cin jo man ame neki-ni.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Jeremia te kobbi Jedekia ni, “Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, ka ce ibino miye keni i cin rwode abaka me Babulon, kwoni mom bino rwenyo, dok boma man daŋ mom obino wano kede mac, dok yin kede jo me odi luŋ ibino bedo wunu kwo." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ento ka mom ibino miye keni i cin rwode abaka me Babulon, boma man obino miyo oko i ciŋ jo Kaldaya, gin bino waŋo oko kede mac, dok yin mom ibino bwot i ciŋgi.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Abaka Jedekia te kobo baŋ Jeremia ni, “Atye kede lworo pi Ojudaya mogo ame otyeko lwi wot baŋ jo Kaldaya, naka mio obino miya baŋgi, naka mio gin te bedo toja.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia te kobo ni, “Mom gire abino miyi baŋgi. Aman myero yin iwiny kop a Rwot ame akobbi, bino miyo bedo aber, kwoni mom bino rwenyo." 
Jeremiah38:21 Cite ka ikwero miye keni, man en anyut ame Rwot otyeko nyutta:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Nen ba, mon luŋ ame aman tye i ot abaka me Juda, onwoŋo otye ka tero oko baŋ rwode abaka me Babulon, kun okobbigi ni, ‘Owotewu ame igeno wunu ni, doŋ obwolowu oko, dok daŋ oloowu oko; aman ame tyeni doŋ omoko oko i coto-ni, gin oya oweki oko.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Monni karacel kede awobeni obino tero oko baŋ jo Kaldaya, yin ikomi daŋ mom ibino bwot icingi, ento me Babulon bino maki oko; boma man obino wano oko i mac.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Jedekia te kobbi Jeremia ni, “Kur imi ŋattoro ŋe kop man, dok yin gire mom ibino to," 
Jeremiah38:25 Ka ce rwode owinyo ni an akobo kedi, eka gin te bino baŋi me penyi ni, ‘Kobbiwa kop ame ikobo baŋ abaka, kur imuŋŋiwa ginnoro pien wan gire mom obino neki’," 
Jeremiah38:26 yin ibino kobbigi ni, ‘Amio kwacca baŋ abaka kede mwolo, ni myero kur cwaa dok cen i ot a Jonatan me wot to kuno.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Rwode luŋ rik te bino baŋ Jeremia, ote penye, en te dok i kopgi kite ame abaka onwoŋo ocike kede, Mannono te miyo gin weko kop kede oko, pien ŋattoro onwoŋo mom owinyo kopginono," 
Jeremiah38:28 Jeremia te medde bedo i dyekal okur-piny tuno i kare ame omao Jerucalem. 
Jeremiah39:1 I mwaka me aboŋwen me loc a Jedekia abaka me Juda i dwe me apar, Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon kede monnyere ducu obino me bino lweny i kom Jerucalem, te daŋ guro oko," 
Jeremiah39:2 I mwaka me apar wie acel me loc a Jedekia, i dwe me aŋwen, i nino dwe aboŋwen, en ame rik ote muko iye ŋel me Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah39:3 I kare ame otyeko mako Jerucalem rwode abaka me Babulon luŋ obino te bino bedo i dogcel ame tye i dyere: Nergal-carejer, Camugarnebo, Careekim, Rabcaric, Nergalearejer me Rabmag kede odoŋe abaka me Babulon ocele mege." 
Jeremiah39:4 I kare ame Jedekia abaka me Juda karacel kede ocirikale mere luŋ onenogi, gin te ya oko i boma dyewor, kun obeo i dogcel ame tye i akina ŋel aryo me boma i ŋe poto abaka; gin te wot lubo yo dok tutuŋ Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ento mony a jo Kaldaya te ryemo yorgi te mako Jedekia i bar me Jeriko; kare ame gin omake otere baŋ Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, Ribla i lobo me Kamat. Abaka te ŋolle kop." 
Jeremiah39:6 Abaka me Babulon te neko awobe a Jedekia Ribla kun en Jedekia tye aneno i waŋe, te daŋ neko jo adoŋo me awora luŋ, ame obedo jo me Juda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Te loyo wan Jedekia oko, ote tweye kede jegere, ote tere i Babulon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Jo Kaldaya te waŋo ot abaka oko karacel kede udi a jo, ote daŋ mumuko apama ŋel me Jerucalem oko." 
Jeremiah39:9 Adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo okur-piny, ame nyiŋe Nebujaradan, te tero jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik odoŋ i boma, kede jo ame yam owoto gigi kengi baŋ abaka me Babulon, karacel kede lwak ame onwoŋo odoŋŋere." 
Jeremiah39:10 Cite Nebujaradan adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo ogwok abaka te weko jo mogo ame onwoŋo rik ocan meicel, ame gigi moro onwoŋo mom doŋ kuno, te daŋ miyogi potti olok kede potti ocele mege i kare-nono." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, te miyo cik ame mako Jeremia, kun cwao koppere baŋ Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo ogwok abaka, kun kobbe ni." 
Jeremiah39:12 “Ter Jeremia iwot igwok aber, kur itim ginnoro arac i kome, cite myero itim ginnoro luŋ ame en mito ni myero itimme,”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Amannono daŋ Nabujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka, Nabucajiban ame obedo Rabcari, Nergal-carejer, ame obedo Rabmag, karacel kede odoŋe ame loo tic apapat me Babulon," 
Jeremiah39:14 ote cwayo kop ni myero wot kwany Jeremia oko i dyekal okur-piny, Gin te miye iciŋ Gedalia wot Akikam, wot a Capan, ni mannono myero tere paco, Mannono te miyo en wot bedo i akina lwak." 
Jeremiah39:15 Rwot rik okobbi Jeremia, kare ame onwoŋo en pwod tye i dyekal okur-piny, kun kobbe ni," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Wot ikobbi Ebedmelek dano me Eciopia, ni mannono Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, ‘Nen abino co bo ginnoro luŋ ame atyeko kobo i kom boma man me timo gin arac i kome, mom gin aber kadi acel, obino tyekogi i nino acel keken i nyimi.’" 
Jeremiah39:17 Cite abino lari yin i nino-naca, yin mom obino miyi iciŋ jo ame itye ka lworo nono." 
Jeremiah39:18 Pien ateteni, abino gire lari, ibino bedo kede kwo acalo mot ame inwoŋo pi lweny, pien yin ibedo genna.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 I kare ame Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo ogwok abaka otyeko gonyo Jeremia oko; i Rama, Rwot dokokobo kede Jeremia, Rik onwoŋo otwee oko kede jegere i kare ame omito tere i Babulon, karacel kede jo ocele mege ame oterogi acalo opii kun okwanyogi i Jerucalem kede Juda." 
Jeremiah40:2 Adwoŋ ame loo ogwok abaka otero Jeremia te wot kobbe ni, Rwot Obaŋani en ame orabo kop arac i kom kabedo man;" 
Jeremiah40:3 Rwot en omio doŋ otimere, en otimo kite ame onwoŋo ekobo. Pien wun onwoŋo ibala wunu baŋ Rwot, dok daŋ ikwero winyo wunu koppere, en omio gin man otimere i komwu." 
Jeremiah40:4 Aman doŋ ba, tin an doŋ agonyo jegere oko i ciŋi. Ka ce ineno ni ber yin iwot keda i Babulon, bin owoti, an abino gwoki aber, cite ka ineno ni mom ber yin iwot, kur ibin. Nen, lobo man luŋ tye i nyimi, wot kan ame cunyi okwanyo ni ber baŋi." 
Jeremiah40:5 Ka ce doŋ, yin myero idok baŋ Gedalia wot Akikam, wot a Capan, ame abaka me Babulon otyeko miyo me bedo aloc adwoŋ ame loo boma ducu a tye i Juda, iwot ibed wunu kede i akina lwak; onyo itwero wot giri kan ame ineno ni ber baŋi. Mannono te miyo adwoŋ ame loo ogwok abaka miye ginnoro me wilo cam acalo mot, te weke wot." 
Jeremiah40:6 Jeremia te wot baŋ Gedalia wot Akikam i Mijipa, te wot bedo karacel kede i akina lwak ame onwoŋo odoŋ i lobo-naca." 
Jeremiah40:7 Kare ame odoŋe ame loo mony ame pwod tye i kabedo apapat i lobo Juda karacel kede lwakgi, owinyo ni abaka me Babulon otyeko keto Gedalia wot Akikam me bedo aloc adwoŋ ame loo lobogi, dokokete me loyo jo ducu ame odoŋ, co kede mon kede itino, ame gin luŋ onwoŋo obedo jo ame ocan meicel ame mom otero iyi opii i Babulon," 
Jeremiah40:8 gin owoto baŋ Gedalia i Mijipa, jo ame owoto ene: Icmael wot a Netania, Yokanan wot a Karea, Ceraya wot a Tanumet, ame gin luŋ obedo ikwae Epai, dano me Netopa, Jejania dano me Maaka, gin luŋ owoto karacel kede jogi." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia wot Akikam, wot a Capan, te kwoŋ baŋgi karacel kede baŋ jogi, kun kobi ni, “Kur ibed wunu i lworo moro me tic baŋ jo Kaldaya, Bed wunu i lobowu, cite myero iti wunu pi abaka me Babulon, ibino bedo wunu gire aber aboŋo peko moro." 
Jeremiah40:10 Aco an, abino bedo i Mijipa, me acuŋ pirwu i nyim jo Kaldaya ame bino bino baŋwa. Aco wun, myero icok wunu koŋo olok, nyig yen kede moo, ite kano wunu i jami ame itye wunu kede, ite medde bedo giwu i bomawu, ame imao wunu.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Kite acellono, kare ame ame Ojudaya ame onwoŋo bedo i Moab kede i akina jo Ammon kede iyi Edom karacel kede i lobo ecele, owinyo ni abaka me Babulon oweko jo mogo odoŋ i Juda dok daŋ otyeko keto Gedalia wot Akikam, wot a Capan, acalo aloc adwoŋ me loyogi," 
Jeremiah40:12 mannono omio Ojudaya luŋ odwogo oko i lobo apapat ame rik oryemogi oterogi iye, ote bino i Juda baŋ Gedalia i Mijipa. Gin te coko kono olok kede nyig yen adwoŋ meicel." 
Jeremiah40:13 I ŋe mannono Yokanan wot a Karea kede otel wi mony ame tye i kabedo apapat i lobo-naca, obino baŋ Gedalia i Mijipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ote kobbe ni, “Yin itye ko ŋeyo ni Baalic, abaka a jo Ammon otyeko cwayo Icmael wot a Netania me bino neki oko?” Cite Gedalia wot Akikam mom te ye kopginono." 
Jeremiah40:15 Yokanan wot a Karea okobo i muŋ gin i Gedalia i Mijipa, ni, “Owoti, owot onek Icmael wot a Netania oko, ŋattoro gire mom bino ŋeyo. Piŋo en mito neki, ame te miyo Ojudaya ame tye oguri tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi te ket oko, mannono te miyo Ojudaya ame odoŋ to oko?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Ento Gedalia wot Akikam te kobbi Yokanan wot a Karea ni, “Mom myero itim tim man i kom Icmael, pien aniaŋ ni yin itye ikobo kop me goba i kome.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 I dwe me abiro, Icmael wot a Netania ame obedo wot a Elicama, ame en obedo dano acel me doggola aloc, ame en ŋat acel i akina otic abaka adoŋo mege, obino i jo apar baŋ Gedalia wot Akikam i Mijipa, I kare ame gin otyeko cam karacel kuno i Mijipa," 
Jeremiah41:2 Icimael wot a Netania karacel kede jo apar-ca, oya ote goyo Gedalia wot Akikam oko, ame obedo wot a Capan, kun ogoo kede pala me romo, ote daŋ neko oko, ame en dano ame onwoŋo abaka me Babulon oketo me bedo aloc ame loo lobo me Juda." 
Jeremiah41:3 Icimael te neko daŋ Ojudaya ame nwoŋo tye karacel i Gedalia i Mijipa kede ocirikale me Kaldaya ame onwoŋo tye kuno. 
Jeremiah41:4 Orwo mere, ame kop me to a Gedalia mom ru oŋeye," 
Jeremiah41:5 jo aboro te tuno kun oya i Cekem kede i Ci lo kede i Camaria, obino ame olyelo tikgi oko, dok daŋ oyeyeco boŋŋi i komgi oko, kun daŋ onoŋolo komgi. Obino kun okelo mot me moko kwon kede gin a ŋwece kur me amia i ot a Rwot." 
Jeremiah41:6 Jcimael wot a Netania te bino i Mijipa me bino rwatte kedgi, kun bino ame akoko. Kare ame orwatte kedgi, okobbigi ni, “Bye wunu baŋ Gedalia wot Akikam.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Kare ame gin odonyo i boma, Icimael wot a Netania karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo tye baŋe te nekogi oko, te bolo komgi i bur pii." 
Jeremiah41:8 Cite jo apar i akinagi okobbi Icmael ni, “Kur inekwa, pien wan otye kede udi kano jami ame otyeko kano iye ŋano, kai, moo jeituni, moo kic.” Mannono omio Icimael mom te nekogi karacel kede owotegi." 
Jeremiah41:9 Bur pii ame onwoŋo Icimael obolo iye kom jo ame eneko-ni, onwoŋo dwon dok lac meicel. Mannono obedo bur pii ame abaka Aca okunyo me gwoko kwo a dano, i kare ame Baaca, abaka me Icrael mito lweny i komgi. Icimael oonyo kom jo oto open burrono apoŋa." 
Jeremiah41:10 Icimael te mako jo ame odoŋ luŋ i Mijipa, te terogi, miyogi doko acalo opii mere, omako anyira abaka, kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik odoŋ i Mijipa ame Nebujaradan adwoŋ ame gwoko abaka rik omio iciŋ Gedalia wot Akikam, Icimael te cako wot kedgi me wot ŋolo kulo me kato loka baŋ jo Ammon." 
Jeremiah41:11 I kare ame Yokanan wot a Karea karacel kede odoŋe ame onwoŋo telo wi mony ame onwoŋo tye baŋe owinyo pi tim arac ame Icimael wot a Netania otimo," 
Jeremiah41:12 en okwanyo jo mere te wot lweny i kom Icimael wot a Netania. Gin owot omake i atapara adwoŋ ame onwoŋo tye i Gibeon. 
Jeremiah41:13 Kare ame jo onwoŋo tye baŋ Icimael, oneno Yokanan wot a Karea, kun odoŋe ame telo mony daŋ tye baŋe, cunygi obedo ayom meicel." 
Jeremiah41:14 Mannono te miyo jo ame onwoŋo Icimael tye ka tero ocala opii, ame okwanyogi i Mijipa te cako lokere oko me dok cen, ote wot baŋ Yokanan wot a Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Cite Icimael wot a Netania te lwi oko ibaŋ Yokanan karacel kede jo aboro ote wot naka i lobo a jo Ammon. 
Jeremiah41:16 Yokanan wot a Karea karacel kede odoŋe ame onwoŋo telo mony ame onwoŋo tye baŋe ote tero jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik Icimael wot a Netania otero acalo opii kun kwanyogi i Mijipa i kare ame en otyeko neko Gedalia wot Akikam, otero ocirikale, mon, itino, jo ame oroo; mannono gin jo ame Yokanan odwoggo cen kun omaogi i Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:17 Gin te wot bedo i Gerut-kiman ame tye i ŋet Beterekem, kun otye kede tam me wot i Miciri," 
Jeremiah41:18 pien onwoŋo otye ka lworo jo me Kaldaya, kite ame Icimael onwoŋo otyeko neko kede Gedalia wot Akikam, ame onwoŋo abaka me Babulon otyeko keto me bedo aloc adwoŋ ame loo lobo Juda." 
Jeremiah42:1 Odoŋe ame telo mony, kede Yokanan wot a Karea kede Ajaria wot a Kocaya, karacel kede jo luŋ ame kitegi papat, cakere i kom jo atino kede jo adoŋo ducu te bino ceggi," 
Jeremiah42:2 ote kobbi Jeremia adwarpiny ni, “Tim ber iwiny kwacwa ame obako kede dogwa i nyimi-ni! Cwal kwacwa baŋ Rwot Obaŋani pi jo man luŋ ame odoŋŋi, pien wan jo odoŋ welwa doŋ nok meicel, kite ame itye giri ka neno kede waŋi." 
Jeremiah42:3 Rwot Obaŋani myero nyuttiwa yo a myero olubi, kede gin ame myero oti,”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Jeremia adwarpiny te kobbigi ni, “Atyeko winyo kokowu; nen ba, abino kwayo Rwot Obaŋawu kite ame ikwao wunu kede, kite ame Rwot bino dokkiwu kede iye, abino titiwu. Mom abino muŋŋiwu ginnoro kadi acel.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Gin te kobbi Jeremia ni, “Rwot myero bed caden me ateteni dok ame genne i akinawa, ka ce mom otimo ginnoro luŋ, kun olubo kop ame Rwot Obaŋani ocwai me kobbiwa." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kadi bed gin aber onyo gin arac, wan giwa obino lubo kop a Rwot Obaŋawa ame wan otye ka cwayi baŋe-ni, me wek wan obed aber ka ce olubo kop a Rwot Obaŋawa.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Kare ame doŋ okato nino apar, Rwot te kop i Jeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Jeremia te lwoŋo Yokanan wot a Karea kede odoŋe luŋ ame loo mony ame onwoŋo tye baŋ Yokanan, karacel kede jo ocele luŋ, cakere i kom jo atino tuno kede i kom jo adoŋo," 
Jeremiah42:9 te kobbigi ni, “Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael ame icwa wunu baŋe me cwalo kwacwu i nyime, okobo ni," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Ka ce ibino medde wunu bedo i lobo man, abino gerowu icun wunu atek, ento mom abino rettowu piny; pien atyeko ŋut i kom gin areco luŋ ame atimo i komwu." 
Jeremiah42:11 Kur ilwor wunu abaka me Babulon, ame aman itye ka lworo wunu-ni; kur ilwore wunu, pien an atye kedwu me larowu i ciŋe." 
Jeremiah42:12 Abino timowu kica me en daŋ bed i kica i komwu te miyowu bedo i lobowu i kokomwu.’ 
Jeremiah42:13 Cite ka ikobo wunu ni, ‘Wan giwa mom obino bedo i lobo man’, kun ikwero wunu winyo kop a Rwot Obaŋawu," 
Jeremiah42:14 dok daŋ ikobo wunu ni, ‘Wan giwa obino wot i Miciri kan ame mom obino neno iye lweny, akadi winyo koko apel, kun kec daŋ mom nekowu iye," 
Jeremiah42:15 wan giwa obino wot bedo kuno’, winy wunu doŋ kop ame Rwot okobo, wun jo Juda ame idoŋ wunu-ni, Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni, Ka ce icako wunu wot me wot i Miciri, ite wot wunu bedo kuno," 
Jeremiah42:16 pala romo ame ilworo wunu-ni bino nekowu i Miciri kuno, karacel kede kec ame itye ka lworo wunu-ni, bino lubo yorwu atek meicel i Miciri kuno, ite to wunu oko kuno." 
Jeremiah42:17 Jo luŋ ame bino wot i Miciri te wot bedo kuno, bino to i pala lweny, kec, too edeke. Can ame akelo i komginono mom bino miyo dano moro doŋ i akinagi kadi acel, moro mom gire bino bwot." 
Jeremiah42:18 “Pien Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Kite ame akemo kede iniga rik acoro i kom jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, abino coro daŋ kittono i komwu ka ce iwoto wunu i Miciri. Ibino doko wunu gin me ceno jo, gin ame mio jo lworo, kede jo ame jo kobo kop agecegece i komgi. Mom dok ibino medde wunu neno kabedo man akadi acel." 
Jeremiah42:19 Rwot okobo kop man baŋwu wun jo ame odoŋ ni, ‘Myero kur iwot wunu i Miciri’, Myero iŋe wunu ateteni ni atyeko kwenyorowu tin," 
Jeremiah42:20 ni mannono wun ityeko gak wunu oko, kun imito ni kwowu rweny oko, Pien wun icwaa wunu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Tim ber ikwayiwa Rwot Obaŋawa, doŋ ginnoro keken ame Rwot Obaŋawa bino kobo baŋwa, wan giwa obino timo.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Doŋ tin an atyeko kobbiwu, cite wun mom iwinyo wunu kop a Rwot Obaŋawu i ginnoro luŋ ame en ocwaa me kobbiwu." 
Jeremiah42:22 Aman myero iŋe wunu ni ibino to wunu ateteni, kun ito wunu i pala lweny, kec, kede too edeke, i kabedo ame imito wunu wot iye-nono.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 I kare ame Jeremia doŋ otyeko kobo kop luŋ baŋ lwak ame ocokere, kop ame Rwot Obaŋagi oore me kobo baŋgi," 
Jeremiah43:2 Ajaria wot a Kocaya kede Yokanan wot a Karea kede wegi apala luŋ te kobbi Jeremia ni, “Yin itye ka kobo kop me goba lo-ni, Rwot Obaŋani mom okobo ni ibin ikob ni, ‘Kur iwot ibed wunu i Miciri’;" 
Jeremiah43:3 ento Baruk wot a Neria en ocupi me ko bo kop arac i komwa, me imiwa i ciŋ jo Kaldaya, me gin onekwa onyo oterwa oko i Babulon acalo opii.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Mannono te mi yo Yokanan wot a Karea kede odoŋe me mony kwero winyo kop a Rwot oko, mom ote ye bedo i lobo me Juda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ento Yokanan wot a Karea kede odoŋe me mony luŋ te kwanyo jo me Juda luŋ ame odoŋ ame onwoŋo odwogo me bino bedo iye, kun odwogo i akina rok apapat ame rik oryemogi, oterogi iye," 
Jeremiah43:6 co, mom, itino karacel kede anyira abaka. Gin otero jo luŋ ame rik Nabujaradan, adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo ogwok abaka me Babulon, onwoŋo oweko baŋ Gedalia wot Akikam, ame obedo wot a Capan. Otero daŋ Jeremia kede Baruk wot a Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Gin te wot naka i lobo me Miciri, pien gin rik okwero winyo kop a Rwot oko. Gin owoto i kabedo ame olwoŋo ni Tapanec." 
Jeremiah43:8 Kare ame gin tye i Tapanec, Rwot te kobbi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Kwany gweŋe mogo adoŋodoŋo i ciŋi, kun jo Juda tye aneno. Wot ikan oko ite lobo ame omwono i akina gweŋe ame ocano i yo ame odonyo kede i paco abaka me Miciri ame tye i Tapanec kuno." 
Jeremiah43:10 Kobbi jo Juda ni, ‘Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Nen ba, abino cwayo amirona Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, abino cibo i wi kom loc i lobo man, i wi gweŋ ame ayiko piny kan-ni, en bino yero kema me loccere i wigi." 
Jeremiah43:11 En abino me bino loyo lobo me Miciri. Can bino bedo apek meicel i kom jo Miciri, pien jo mogo ame oyiko ni bino to i too edeke, bino to i loo edeke, jo ocele ame oyiko ni myero ter iyi opii, obino tero oko acalo opii; jo ame myero to i pala lweny bino to i pala lweny." 
Jeremiah43:12 En bino moko mac i kom udi me woro kit obaŋe mogo apapat ame tye i Miciri, bino wano cal obaŋegi oko onyo bino tino mogo woto kedgi oko. En bino kwanyo jami areco oko i lobo me Miciri odoco kite ame akwatyero kede on yo go i kom boŋo mere, bino ya gire i Miciri te wot i kuc, aboŋo ginnoro ame ogude." 
Jeremiah43:13 En bino muko kidi ame ocibo me awora ame tye i Eliopolic, i lobo me Miciri, dok bino wano udi woro obaŋe mogo ocele me Miciri oko kede mac’.”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Rwot okobbi Jeremia kop i kom Ojudaya ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo me Miciri, i Migdol, i Tapanec, Mempic kede i Patroc, Rwot okobo ni," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni wun doŋ ityeko neno wunu gin areco luŋ ame amio opoto i kom Jerucalem kede i kom boma luŋ me Juda, Nen ba, kare-ni kuno pwod tye calo wi obur, aboŋo ŋattoro ame bedo iye," 
Jeremiah44:3 pien gin arac ame gin otimo, omio akemo omaka. Gin obedo wot wano gin a ŋwece kur baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele kun daŋ otio baŋgi, obaŋe mogo ame kadi gin onyo kwarigi yam mom oŋeo." 
Jeremiah44:4 Abebo cwayo baŋgi odwarpiny ame gin omirona tere tere, kun rabbigi ni, ‘Tim wunu ber kur itim wunu tim me ipyeda-ni ame an adago-ni!’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Cite gin gigi ote kwero winyo oko, mom ociko yitgi me winyo koppa, me olokere owek timo gin arac, dok daŋ owek waŋo gin a ŋwece kur baŋ obaŋe mogo ocele." 
Jeremiah44:6 Mannono omio rik ate coro akemona kede inigana i komgi, ate miyo lyeto atek meicel i boma me Juda, kede i dye gudo luŋ ame tye i Jerucalem, ate miyo doŋ oko kene acalo wi obur kit ame tye kede naka tinni." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Aman doŋ Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Piŋo kara itye ka timo wunu twon tim arac meicel-li i komwu kenwu. Wun imito wunu kelo can i kom mon kede co, i kom itino kede i kom itino a pwod toco, me ŋattoro kur doŋ i akina jo me turwu?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Piŋo itye ka miyo wunu akemo maka i tic ame itio wunu, wano odok a ŋwece kur baŋ obaŋe ocele i lobo me Miciri ame ibino wunu me bedo iye? Itye ka timo wunu man me ito wunu oko, me rok ame bedo i lobo man bed kobe kop arac i komwu, dok daŋ imito ni nyiŋwu bed me ceno jo?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Wiwu doŋ owil oko ce, i kom tim areco ame kwariwu obedo timo, tim areco ame obakki me Juda obedo timo, tim areco ame mongi obedo timo kede i kom tim areco ame wun ibedo timo wunu kenwu, kede i kom tim areco ame monwu obedo timo, ame gin obedo timo i lobo me Juda kede i dye yo luŋ ame tye i Jerucalem?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Gin mom oye mwolle kadi acel tuno naka tin, lworo daŋ mom omakogi, mom daŋ oye lubo cikka kede icwilla ame aketo i nyimwu kede i nyim kwariwu." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Pi mannono, Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, Nen ba, abino ci ko waŋa i komwu me timowu rac, me neko jo Juda ducu." 
Jeremiah44:12 Jo luŋ ame odoŋ i lobo Juda, ame onwoŋo omoko tamgi me bino i Miciri, gin luŋ abino nekogi oko. Gin bino to i lobo me Miciri kun oto i pala lweny, kec, cakere i kom jo atino tuno kede i kom jo adoŋo, gin luŋ bino to i pala lweny kede kec. Gin obino doko gin me aŋala a jo, gin ame mio jo lworo, dok obino bedo rok ame oceno jo i nyingi, kun jo kobo kop areco i komgi." 
Jeremiah44:13 Abino keto can i kom jo ame bedo i Miciri, kite ame aketo kede can i kom Jerucalem i pala lweny, kec, kede too edeke." 
Jeremiah44:14 Dano moro me Juda ame odoŋ, ame owoto me wot bedo i Miciri mom bino doŋ kadi acel, moro mom bino bwot akwo, dok moro mom bino dok i lobo me Juda, ame cunygi mito ni kono odok obedo iye; gin gire mom bino dok kuno, kono jo ame oriŋo ayela i lobogi keken en ame bino dok kuno.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Icennere jo ducu ame ŋeo ni mongi onwoŋo obedo yalo obaŋe mogo ocele odok a ŋwece kur, kede mon luŋ ame onwoŋo rik ocuŋ kaci-naca, lwak jo adwoŋ meicel ame onwoŋo ocokere jo luŋ ame bedo i Patroc i lobo me Miciri, te gamo kop a Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Kop ame ikopo baŋwa, kun ikobo i nyiŋ Rwot, wan mom obino winyo koppi." 
Jeremiah44:17 Cite wan obino timo ginnoro luŋ ame wan okwonere me timo, obino waŋo odok a ŋwece kur baŋ abaka a dako me polo, dok daŋ obino onnye mot me ama ta, kite ame yam otimo, wan karacel kede kwariwa, obakkiwa, kede rwodewa, kite ame otimo kede i boma luŋ me Juda kede i gudo luŋ me Jerucalem, pien i kare-naca rik otye i cam adwoŋ, lonyo daŋ onwoŋo dwon i cinwa, cite naka wan mom oneno ginnoro arac." 
Jeremiah44:18 Cite cakere i kare ame wan oweko wano odok a ŋwece kur baŋ aba ka a dako me po lo onyo mot amata baŋe, jami doŋ te rwenyo oko i cinwa, dok daŋ oto atek i pala lweny kede kec.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Mon te medde i kopgi kun okobo ni, “I kare ame wan otedo ogati i cal abaka a dako me polo, kun owanne odok akur, dok daŋ oonyo mot amata baŋe, cogwa onwoŋo oye, dok daŋ onwoŋo one no gin ame wan otye ka timo.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Jeremia te kobo baŋ lwak luŋ, co kede mon, kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo ogamo koppere kit man ni," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Kop i kom odok a ŋwece kur ame ibedo wano wunu i boma me Juda, kede i dye gudo me Jerucalem, wun karacel kede kwariwu, obakkiwu kede rwodewu, karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo bedo i lobo-naca, itamo wunu ni Rwot pe obin opo pire? Timwu-naca en rik mom otamo ginnoro iye?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Rwot doŋ mom romo kanyo timwu areco kadi acel, kede timmogo me kwer ame ibedo timo wunu. Mannono omio lobowu doŋ calo wi obur, odoŋ nono dok daŋ oceno oko, ŋattoro ame bedo iye mom tye, tuno kede naka tin." 
Jeremiah44:23 Mannono otimere pien wun ibedo waŋo wunu odok akur, dok daŋ ibalo wunu i nyim Rwot kun mom iwinyo wunu kop a Rwot kadi lubo cikkere kede icwillere kede gin ame en ociko, mannono omio gin arac man opoto i komwu kite ame tye kede naka tin.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Jeremia okobbi lwak luŋ karacel kede mon luŋ ni, “Winy wunu kop a Rwot, wun jo luŋ me Juda ame itye wunu i Miciri," 
Jeremiah44:25 Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, wun karacel kede monwu ityeko kobo wunu kede dogwu, ite daŋ cobo wunu gin ame ikobo wunu kede ticwu ni, ‘Wan giwa obino cobo kwonwa ateteni, ame wan doŋ otyeko kwono me wano odok akur baŋ abaka a dako me polo kede me onye mot amata.’ Pi mannono ba, mok wunu kwonwu, dok daŋ iti wunu gin ame ikwoŋo wunu!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Pi mannono ba, winy wunu kop a Rwot, wunjo luŋ me Juda, ame bedo i Miciri, Nen ba, atyeko kwoŋ oko kede twon nyiŋa adwoŋ meicel. An a Rwot, ni ŋattoro mom dok bino kwon i nyiŋa, dano me Juda ame aman tye i Miciri, kun ko bo ni, ‘Kite acalo Rwot Obaŋa tye kwo-ni.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Nen ba, an atye ka ciko waŋa i komgi me timogi rac, mom me timogi ber. Jo luŋ me Juda ame tye bedo i lobo me Miciri, obino neko oko i pala romo, kede kec, tuno wan ame gin otum oko ducu." 
Jeremiah44:28 Jo ame bino bwot i lak pala lweny, i Miciri, bino ya dok i lobo me Juda, kun welgi mom pol. Jo me Juda ame rik obino i lobo me Miciri me bino bedo iye, bino ŋeyo kop aŋa ame onwoŋo ateni, ka koppa onyo meggi." 
Jeremiah44:29 Man en ame bino bedo anyut ame ibino neno wunu, ni an abino keto can i komwu i kabedo man, me iŋe wunu ni koppa en ame bino bedo kop ateni i komwu pi gin arac ame itimo wunu." 
Jeremiah44:30 Rwot me mony okobo ni, Nen ba, abino miyo abaka me Miciri, ame en Kopra, i cin okworrere kede i cin jo ame mito neke, kite ame rik amio kede Jedekia, abaka me Juda i cin Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon, ame onwoŋo akworrere, dok daŋ onwoŋo tye kede mit me neke.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 I mawka me aŋwen me loc a Yekoyakim, wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda, en ame Baruk wot a Neria ocoo iye kop ame Jeremia okobo baŋe i yore i yore. Adwarpiny Jeremia okobo baŋ Baruk ni," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Rwot Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo kop man baŋi yin Baruk. 
Jeremiah45:3 Yin itye ka koko ni, ‘Can i wia doi! Pien Rwot otyeko medo cwercuny i kom rem ame atye kede; Aol doŋ oko i cur, mom atye i kare moro me weo kadi acel.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Rwot okobbi Jeremia ni, ‘Wot ikobbi Baruk ni, Nen ba, gin ame yam agero, atye doŋ amumuko oko areto oko piny, gin ame yam apito, aman doŋ acako puputo oko, Abino timo man i lobo ducu." 
Jeremiah45:5 Yin itye ka yenyo gigi mogo adonodono piri keni? Kur ibed yenyogi ba; nen ba, abino kela can i kom jo luŋ, ento yin abino miyi ibedo kwo, kwoni abino miyi calo mot ame inwoŋo i lweny, i kabedo luŋ ame ibino wot iye. Man kop ame an Rwot ikokome akobo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo baŋ Jeremia adwarpiny i kom rok ocele. 
Jeremiah46:2 Man en kop ame en okobo i kom Miciri, Rwot okobo kop i kom mony a Parao Neko, abaka me Miciri, ame yam Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon oloo oko i lweny i Karkemic, ame ceggi kede kulo me Epurate, i mwaka me aŋwen me loc a Yekoyakim wot a Yocia, abaka me Juda, kun kobo ni," 
Jeremiah46:3 Odoŋe me Miciri tye ka redo ni, “Ruk wunu nyonyo me geno komwu, dok iyik wunu daŋ kwodewu, me icak wunu wot i lweny!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Twe wunu kom me bedo i ŋe aguragura; wun wegi aguragura, bed wunu doŋ oko i wigi! Ryeye wunu doŋ oko i tyeŋ, kun iruko wunu tok nyonyo i wiwu! Pak wunu leb toŋiwu bed abit! Ruk wunu daŋ kotiwu me nyonyo i komwu!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Ŋo kara ame atye ka neno nie? Lworo ocirogi oko, olokere oko odok cen. Twoni jogi a tek i lweny tye doŋ awano i komgi, otye ka riŋo oko oyotoyot meicel; kun mom oneno negi kadi acel, lworo doŋ ogurogi tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi! Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah46:6 Lo adwir i ŋwec daŋ mom bino bwot; lo atek meicel i lweny daŋ mom bino bwot. Tutuŋ anyarodi i ŋet kulo me Epurate, otye ka twomere kengi kengi ote rette piny." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Man ŋa ame tye atinere calo pii ame tye i kulo Nail-li, calo kulo ame pii mere opoŋ olapakino atata?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Miciri en ame tye atiŋere calo pii i kulo Nail-lono, calo pii i kulo ame pii mere opoŋ olapakino atata. Miciri tye akobo ni, ‘Abino tiŋere ate wumo loba luŋ, abino babaloboma kede jo luŋ ame bedo iye.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Medde wunu ba anyim, wun aguragura, wun gadigadi lweny, lor wunu ba i ŋwec! Cwal olweny wot anyim; Jo me Eciopia kede jo Put ame mako kwot, jo me Lud ame odiro meicel i telo akud atero." 
Jeremiah46:10 Nino-nono bino bedo nino a Rwot me mony, bino bedo nino me culo kwor, nino ame en bino culo kede kwor i kom okworrere. Pala lweny bino cem i tuno ka otyeko jo luŋ, remo bino mwonne amwona i lebgi. Pien Rwot Obaŋa me mony tye ka miyo mottere acalo mot me yalo Obaŋa, i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi i ŋet kulo me Epurate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Wun jo i Miciri, wot wunu ba i Gilead, me iwot iyeny wunu yat me cano twowu kuno! Yen ame ibedo tic wunu kede doŋ konygi mom, mom doŋ romo canowu kadi acel." 
Jeremiah46:12 Rok ocele doŋ otyeko winyo pi lewic ame itye wunu kede, kokowu doŋ oromo lobo luŋ; pien olwenywu doŋ tye atwomere kengi kengi, ame jo otwomere, jo rette piny karacel.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo baŋ Jeremia adwarpiny i kom bino a Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon me bino lweny i kom lobo me Miciri: Rwot okobo ni," 
Jeremiah46:14 “Kob kop i Miciri, dok irab pire daŋ i Migdol; rab pire i Mempic, kede i Tapanec ni, ‘Cuŋ wunu atek ame iyikere wunu me lweny, pien pala lweny bino balo ginnoro luŋ ame itye wunu kede.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Piŋo kara Apic oriŋo owekowu oko? cal twoni ame itio wunu mom dok tye ocuŋ do? Pien Rwot oretogi oko luŋ piny. 
Jeremiah46:16 Lwak doŋ tye ka twomere kengi kengi ote rette piny, kun ŋat man kobbi awottere ni, ‘Ya malo me odok cen oyotoyot baŋ jo turwa, i lobo ame onywalowa iye, me obwot i lak pala okworwa.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Lwoŋ wunu nyiŋ Parao abaka me Miciri, lwoŋ wunu i nyiŋ anyen ni, ‘Ŋat awo meicel balo cawa nono.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 “Rwot okobo ni, kite ame atye kede kwo-ni, An a Rwot me mony. Acalli kidi me Tabor ame wie bor kato wi kiddi ducu, kede kidi me Karmel ame ocuŋ iguŋ malo i dog nam, teko a ŋat ame bino lweny i komwu tye kittono." 
Jeremiah46:19 Yikere wunu, bed ame itweo yecwu oko me wot iyi opii, wun jo ame bedo i lobo me Miciri. Pien Mempic bino doŋ yie nono, bino doko wi obur ame dano moro mom bedo iye." 
Jeremiah46:20 “Miciri calo roya ame ocwe aber meicel, cite lwani areco ame kao dok ame oya i tutuŋ anyarodi, tye ka lweny kede." 
Jeremiah46:21 Ocirikale mere ame opaŋo apaŋa kede lim daŋ tye kittono, gin daŋ ocwe ame komgi moo keken calo roya, odoko doŋ agoro ame tekogi mom. Nen ba, gin luŋ olokere oko i ŋwec ame mom doŋ oromo cuŋ, pien kare me keto can i komgi doŋ oromo, kare me gonyogi doŋ ennono." 
Jeremiah46:22 “Miciri tye ka riŋo oko kun kok calo twol, pien okworrere doŋ tye ka bino atek meicel, kun obino me lweny i kome kede lee, calo jo ame awot toŋo yen." 
Jeremiah46:23 Rwot okobo ni, Gin obino toŋo bunnere oko, kadi bed bunnono onwoŋo oculle arom mene, pien jo mere pol meicel, calobonyo ame welgi mom romo kwanne, welgi mom ŋeye kadi acel." 
Jeremiah46:24 Wun jo i Miciri, lewic be bino makowu, obino miyowu oko i cin jo ame oya i tutuŋ anyarodi.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael okobo ni, “Nen ba, nen atye ka kelo can i kom Amon, ame obedo obaŋa me Tebec, kede Parao kede Miciri, kede obaŋe mogo ocele kede i kom obakki mere, i kom Parao kede i kom jo luŋ ame gene." 
Jeremiah46:26 Abino miyogi i cin jo ame mito nekogi, i cin Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon, karacel kede oticcere adoŋo. Icennere jo dok bino bedo i lobo me Miciri, kite ame rik jo bedo iye i kare acon.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 Rwot okobo ni, “Yin amirona Yakobo, kur ilwori, akadi yin Icrael, cunyi kur poti; Nen ba, abino larri i kannabor meicel, kede ikwai i lobo ame aman gin tye acalo opii, Ikwae a Yakobo bino dwogo cen, ote bedo mot i kuc, mom tye ŋattoro ame bino miyogi lworo." 
Jeremiah46:28 Pien atye kedwu me bino larowu, abino jwero rok ocele luŋ atyekogi oko, iyi akina jo ame akeketowu iye, cite wun mom abino tyekowu ducu, Abino pwodowu abeber, ento mom abino wekowu ame mom aketo can i komwu. Man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 I kare ame Parao mom ru olwenyo i jo Gaja, Rwot okobbi Jeremia kop i kom jo Piriciti." 
Jeremiah47:2 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, okwor tye abino i tutuŋ anyarodi, abino calo pii ame otinere i kulo, kun mol karacel atek meicel. Bino jwero jami luŋ i lobo calo pii ame molo ginnoro luŋ ame tye i lobo, boma karacel kede jami luŋ ame tye iye, jo bino redo i koko meicel, jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo bino kok" 
Jeremiah47:3 Gin bino winyo tyen aguragura ame awo, karacel kede mor a gadigadi, karacel kede nur a tyen gadigadi, onywal mom doŋ bino lokere me neno itinogi, bino nwoŋo ciŋgi daŋ doŋ okwe oko," 
Jeremiah47:4 Mannono bino timere pien nwoŋo kare me tyeko jo Piriciti luŋ doŋ oromo oko kede me tyeko jo ame yam mio kony baŋ jo Turo kede Cidon. Pien Rwot ikome atyeko doŋ jo Piriciti oko, jo luŋ me dog nam me Kaptor ame yam odoŋ." 
Jeremiah47:5 Cwercuny adwoŋ meicel doŋ obino oko i kom jo Gaja, jo Acikelon doŋ oto otum oko doi. Jo Anak ame odoŋ, ibino kumo wunu pi kare arom mene ba?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Itye ka redo wunu ni, Pala me lweny a Rwot! Ibino bedo ŋoŋolo komwu naka awene ba? Dok ba cen iyi akureni, me ibed doŋ mot." 
Jeremiah47:7 Ibino kara we i yore aŋo ba, kun an a Rwot doŋ atyeko miye tic me atia? Ityeko miya tic me lweny i kom Acikelon, kede i kom jo ame bedo i dog nam.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋa a jo Icrael, okobo kop i kom Moab ni, Can i wi Nebo doi, pien odoŋ doŋ nono! Kiriataim lewic doŋ omako oko, pien doŋ omako oko, lewic doŋ omako cellere ame ocelo atek oko, pien oturogi doŋ oko piny;" 
Jeremiah48:2 Kwogo a Moab doŋ orwenyo oko. Okwor ame tye i Kecbon tye ka poro kop me timo gin arac i kom Moab, kun okobo ni, “Bye omi wunu rok me Moab doŋ rweny oko i wi lobo.” Yin boma me Medmen daŋ ibino lin oko iti, okwor bino ryemo jowu oko pala lweny." 
Jeremiah48:3 “Jo Koronaim tye ka redo ni, ‘To a piny doŋ obino oko, lobo doŋ odoŋ oko nono.’ ”" 
Jeremiah48:4 Ojwero doŋ Moab oko, koko doŋ tye awinyere i kannabor naka i Joar twal," 
Jeremiah48:5 Pien gin oyito i wi tur me Lukit, owoto malo kuno kun otye ka kok i pig waŋgi, kede i yo ame woto tutuŋ Koronaim, owinyo kite ame jo kok kede pi lobo a doŋ oballe oko." 
Jeremiah48:6 Rin wunu oko ba! Lar wunu kwowu! Riŋ wunu oyotoyot calo kana me tim! 
Jeremiah48:7 Wun jo Moab, yam igeno wunu celwu ame ocelo atek, kede lonyowu, cite aman doŋ obino terowu oko iyi opii; karacel kede kemoc ame obanawuni, obino tero daŋ karacel kedwu iyi opii, karacel olamdoggere kede rwode mere," 
Jeremiah48:8 Atur boma bino bino i kom boma ducu, mom tye boma moro ame bino bwot; luŋ karacel kede bar, obino balo oko, kite ame Rwot okobo kede." 
Jeremiah48:9 “Mi Moab bed ibwome ba, pien mito twarre oko; boma ame tye iye luŋ bino doŋ yigi nono, kun jo moro mom doŋ bedo iye." 
Jeremiah48:10 “Gat a mom tio tic a Rwot i cunye ducu doŋ otyeko ceno oko, ŋat a mom neko jo i pala me lweny doŋ otyeko ceno oko.”" 
Jeremiah48:11 Rwot okobo ni, Moab yam ocako bedo mot cakere yam con, dok daŋ mom yam otero jo mere oko iyi opii.
