Moab obedo calo kono olok ame aweko ni cek mot iyi gulu kun mom olilo, dok daŋ mom obedo loloko iyi gulu ocele. Omio mittere daŋ mom orwenyo, obedo bedo amit kite ame onwoŋo tye kede con." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Pi mannono, nen ba, kare tye abino, ame abino cwayo dano moro te onyo Moab oko piny calo kono olok ame oonyo, Obino oonyo kono olok iye oko piny ote daŋ neko gulu mere nido atino." 
Jeremiah48:13 Mannono bino miyo cuny jo Moab cwer atek i kom Kemoc ame obedo obaŋagi, kite ame jo me ot Icrael yam cunygi ocwer i kom Betel, ame gin obedo geno acalo obaŋagi." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Wun jo Moab, piŋo kara ibedo kobo wunu ni, ‘Wan obedo twoni jo atek meicel i lweny, wan obedo cirikale ame cunywa nwan?’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Ajwer jo Moab karacel kede boma luŋ ame tye iye doŋ obino oko; awobe abeco ame oyero ayera iye, otero doŋ oko me aneka, Man en kop ame Abaka ame nyiŋe Rwot me mony okobo," 
Jeremiah48:16 Can ame bino bino i kom jo Moab doŋ ceggi meicel, to piny ame abino i komgi tye doŋ abino oyotoyt." 
Jeremiah48:17 Kum wunu ba pi rokkono, wun jo luŋ ame itye wunu i ŋete, kede wun jo luŋ ame iŋeo wunu kop i kome. Kob wunu ni, ‘Oloo doŋ teko mere oko; kwogo mere kede teko mere mom doŋ tye.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Wun jo ame bedo i Didon, Bye wunu ba doŋ piny i kabedowu me kwogo, me ibin ibed wunu piny iyi apua. Pien atyek jo me Moab, tye abino me bino lweny i komwu, otyeko doŋ turo celwu ame ogero atek oko." 
Jeremiah48:19 Wun jo ame bedo iyi Aroer, Cuŋ wunu ba i ŋet yo me men wunu; peny wunu ŋat ame tye ka lwi, kede dako ame obwot, me tittiwu gin ame otimere." 
Jeremiah48:20 Lewic doŋ omako Moab oko, pien doŋ otyeko tur oko, kok wunu pire ba, Tit kop man i ŋet kulo me Arnon, ni Moab doŋ otyeko jwero oko, pien yie doŋ odoŋ nono." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Ŋolo kop doŋ ocakere oko i kom lobo ame obedo babar, obino i kom Kolon, Jakja, Mepat," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon, Nebo, Bet-diblotaim," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriataim, Betgamul, Bet-meon," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriot, Bojra kede boma ducu ame tye i lobo Moab, ame tye tene kannabor kede ame tye kan aceggi," 
Jeremiah48:25 Moab doŋ oninyo oko ateteni, teko mere doŋ otyeko oko, Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Mi wunu Moab mat kono mere oko, pien en otyeko jem i kom Rwot. Mannono bino miyo Moab bedo dyakere i ŋokkere, jo te bedo nyere kun daŋ cae." 
Jeremiah48:27 Yin Moab mom ipo kite ame ibedo ŋalo kede jo Icrael? Rik inwoŋogi i akina okwor bo, ame omio i kare ducu ka onwoŋo rik ikobo kop i komgi iyeŋo wii ayeŋa?" 
Jeremiah48:28 “Wun jo Moab, ya wunu oko i boma luŋ ame ibedo wunu iye! Wot ibed wunu i akina kiddi ame obar. Bed wunu calo awele ame gero wudigi i kor kidi ame oculle acula." 
Jeremiah48:29 Wan owinyo pi wakere a Moab, owinyo kite ame en tye awakere kede meicel, en tye ka wakere kun yeyea nononono, awakere kun otamo pire kene i cunye." 
Jeremiah48:30 Aneo kite ame en tye aŋalo kede jo, wakere mere nono goba keken, gin a en timo daŋ konyere mom." 
Jeremiah48:31 Mannono omio abino kok pi Moab, abino kumo meicel pi jo Moab, abino kumo daŋ pi Kir-kerec." 
Jeremiah48:32 Abino kok meicel pi jo Cibman, ame kato kite ame abino kok kede pi jo me Jajer Yin Cibman, ibino bedo calo yat olok, ame jaŋe boco meicel, ame jaŋe oŋolo nam te tuno naka i Jajer. Nyig yenwu ame nyak i oro, kede nyig olokwu, gin luŋ daŋ obino bologi oko." 
Jeremiah48:33 Yomcuny kede lelo doŋ orwenyo oko i lobo me Moab, okwanyo doŋ oko i lobo me Moab ame ceko cem wok-ki. Amio kono olok mom doŋ tye i bur ame onyonogi iye, mom doŋ tye jo moro ame nyono olok i yomcuny, redo me yomcuny mom dok winyere." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Jo Kecbon kede jo Eleale tye ka redo meicel, ame dwongi tye awinyere naka i Jakaj; jo ame tye i Joar daŋ tye awinyo dwongi, tye daŋ awinyere naka i Koronaim kede i Eglat-celicia, Pii me Nimrim daŋ doŋ otyeko two oko imek." 
Jeremiah48:35 Abino miyo jo Moab ame tye ka ŋolo leyi me yalo obaŋagi i wi kidi malo, dok ame tye awaŋo odok akur baŋgi, giko timgi-nono oko. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Mannono omio atye i kumo meicel i cunya pi Moab kede pi jo me Kir-kerec calo dano ame tye akuto nyamulere kun owero wer me lyel, pien lonyo kede jami luŋ ame yam otye kede doŋ orwenyo oko." 
Jeremiah48:37 Pien dano acel acel doŋ olyelo wie oko, jo luŋ omworo tikgi oko; cin jo luŋ doŋ bur keken, dok ŋat acel acel tye ka ruko bono cola i pyere." 
Jeremiah48:38 I wi udi luŋ ame tye i Lebanon anaka i dye bar luŋ, koko keken en ame tye awinyere iye; pien atyeko turo Moab calo gulu ame oneko ame ŋattoro mom doŋ paro pire." 
Jeremiah48:39 Oturo kara Moab nino ba! Kite ame gin tye akok kede! Kite ame Moab oloko kede ŋe i lewic! Moab doŋ odoko gi-ayeta a jo kede gin ame mio jo luŋ ame bedo i ŋete lworo.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo. 
Jeremiah48:40 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino miyo rokkoro riŋo adwir meicel calo cur, ote bino yaro bwomgi i kom Moab." 
Jeremiah48:41 Bomagi luŋ obino mako oko, apama celgi luŋ ame ogero atek obino daŋ mako oko. Jo me Moab luŋ ame tek i lweny, i nino-nono obino bedo alwor meicel calo dako ame tye arem me nywal." 
Jeremiah48:42 Obino neko jo Moab ducu, mom dok ote mede bedo rok, pien gin ojem i kom Rwot. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah48:43 Ama wun jo ame bedo i Moab, lworo, bur, kede owic tye gire nyimwu." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ka ŋat ame bino bwot i lworo, dano-nono bino poto i bur, ŋat ame bino yito oko iyi bur, bino moko iyi owic. Pien abino miyo jami magi bino kom Moab, ka mwaka me keto can i komgi oromo. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Oriŋ ayela ame doŋ goro meicel, bino yenyo ka weo i tipo me Kecbon. Aco kono en Kecbon ame en boma ame yam Cikon abaka obedo loc iye, tye awan oko i mac. Mac doŋ otyeko wano ka cun a jo Moab oko, kede wi kidi aboco ame yam olweny me Moab bedo iye," 
Jeremiah48:46 Can i wiwu doi, wun jo me Moab! Oneko jo ame yam woro Kemoc oko, awobewu daŋ otero oko iyi opii, anyirawu daŋ otero oko acalo opii," 
Jeremiah48:47 Cite i kare ame tye anyim, abino dwoko gum a jo Moab, bedo kite ame yam tye kede con.” Kop ame Rwot oŋolo i kom Moab ogik kan." 
Jeremiah49:1 I Rwot okobo ni, “Jo Icrael mom tye itino awo be bo? Jo moro mom doŋ tye ame myero le lobogi bo? Piŋo owe ko jo ame woro Milkom ogamo dul lobo me a jo me atekere a Gad oko me be bedo meggi, dok jogi tye ka bedo i boma luŋ ame iye kuno?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Pi mannono, nen ba, kare tye abino i nyim, ame abino miyo jo me Raba winyo koko me lweny, boma a jo Ammon luŋ, bino doko wi oburu, karacel kede pacci luŋ ame tye iye, obino wano oko i mac. Jo Icrael bino mayo lobogi oko, i baŋ jo ame yam omao baŋgi. Man kop a Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Kok wunu ba, wunjo me Kecbon: Pien bomawu me Ai doŋ odoŋ yie nono! Kok wunu ba, wun anyira me Raba! Twe wunu bono cola i komwu, kum wunu, ite bedo ŋwec wunu atata naka i wi cel-gu! Pien Milkom ame obedo obaŋawu, obino tero oko iyi opii, olamdoggere karacel kede rwode mere daŋ obino tero oko iyi opii." 
Jeremiah49:4 Piŋo kara itye iwakere wunu pi luŋ ame tye i lobowu, wun jo a mom genne-ni, Piŋo kara itye ka geno lonyowu ame ikano wunu, kun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Ŋa abino lweny i komwa?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Nen ba, abino miyo lworo makowu, i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i ŋetwu, dok obino ryemowu oko, ŋat acel acel bino riŋo kene me laro kwo mere kun mom dok tye ŋattoro ame bino coko oriŋ ayela karacel. Man kop ame Rwot me mony okobo.”" 
Jeremiah49:6 Cite icennere, abino dwoko gum a jo Ammon, Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah49:7 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Ryeko doŋ orwenyo oko i Teman bo? “Ryeko doŋ orwennyi omi-tam oko ba? Ryeko doŋ orwenyo oko luŋ bo?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Wun jo me Dedan, lokere wunu me iriŋ wunu oko, wot ipon wunu i bur adit meicel. Pien abino neko ikwae Ecau oko, pien kare me keto can i komgi doŋ oromo." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ka ce opwon olok obino baŋi, gin opwono olok ducu mom oweko moro doŋ i wi yat? Ka ce okwo obino dyewor, mom obino yako jami ame oromogi keken?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Ento atyeko ikwae Ecau ducu, abalo kabedo moro luŋ ame yam gin obedo iye, Man omio mom dok otwero nwoŋo kabedo moro me pono. Itino mere kede omego mere daŋ doŋ oneko oko, wati mere kede owote mere daŋ doŋ ajwero oko," 
Jeremiah49:11 Wek itino kicwu ame onywalgi oto oko-ni baŋa, an abino gwokogi, mon towu luŋ myero gena.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Rwot okobo ni, “Ka ce jo ame onwoŋo myero mom ket can i komgi otyeko keto can i komgi, wun ibino bwot wunu ame mom oketo can i komwu? Mom ibino bwot wunu ame mom oketo can i komwu, myero gire imat wunu ikopo me can," 
Jeremiah49:13 Pien doŋ atyeko kwoŋ an kena kena ni Boma me Bojra, bino doko twon ginnoro arac ame jo kobo kop i kome, dok ame owuro ame yie odoŋ nono, ame daŋ doŋ oceno oko; boma luŋ ame tye i ŋete bino doko wi oburu, Man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Atyeko winyo kop ame oya i baŋ Rwot, otyeko cwayo okwena me rabo pire baŋ rok ducu, kun okobo ni, “Cokere wunu karacel me ibin ilweny wunu i kom Edom. Yikere wunu me lweny ba!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Pien nen ba, Rwot bino miyowu idoko wunu agoro i akina rok, dok obino cayowu meicel." 
Jeremiah49:16 Wakere gire mom konyowu kadi acel, mom tye ŋattoro ame lworowu, wun jo ame ibedo wunu i akina kiddi ame obarre, kadi bed ibedo wunu i wi kidi malo kannabor meicel. Kadi bed ibedo wunu malo calo cur, abino dwoggowu oko piny. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edom bino doko gin ame mio jo lworo, ŋat acel acel ame bea i ŋete bino bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, ote bedo jwiye ajwia pi can ame opoto i kome." 
Jeremiah49:18 Kite ame rik oreto kede Codoma kede Gomora kede boma luŋ ame tye i ŋete, ŋattoro mom dok bino bedo kuno, ŋattoro daŋ mom bino bedo welo me kuno." 
Jeremiah49:19 Abino miyogi oriŋo oko oyotoyot, calo eŋato ame tye i bar me kwayo rommi, ame oya i buŋ ame yen oculle acula iye ame tye i dog kulo me Jordan, Abino keto ŋattoro keken ame cunya omito me loye. Ŋa kara ame rom keda? Ŋa ame twero lwoŋa me wot lweny kede?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Akwattene ame romo Cuŋ i nyima, pi mannono, myero iwiny gin ame Rwot otyeko yiko me timo i kom Edom, kede gin ame en otyeko yiko me ti mo i kom jo ame bedo i boma me Teman. Anaka jo atino mege abino miyo owaogi. Ateteni can ame bino poto i kom otinogi, bino miyo jo lworo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ka Edom opo to, morrere bino miyo lobo yeŋŋere, koko mere bino winyere naka i dog Nam Arema." 
Jeremiah49:22 Nen ba, okwor bino bino me bino lweny i kom Bojra, calo cur ame twarre malo i polo te lyao piny kun doŋ oyaro bwome oko. I nino-nono cuny olweny me Edom bino bedo alwor calo cuny dako amerem me nywal ogo.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Man en kop ame Rwot okobo kom Damaciko, “Jo ame bedo i boma me Kamat kede Arpap ale doŋ otwodogi oko, pien gin doŋ otyeko winyo amut arac; cunygi doŋ oŋabere aŋaba pi lworo, ocalo doŋ nam ame atagere, ame mom romo cuŋ mot." 
Jeremiah49:24 Jo Damaciko doŋ odoko agoro meicel, olokere me riŋo doŋ oko i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel. Rem kede cwercuny doŋ ocirogi oko, calo dako amerem me nywal ogo." 
Jeremiah49:25 Boma ame yam neye wok-ki, boma ame yam yomcuny dwon iye wok-ki, doŋ otyeko weko oko!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Pi mannono, awobe mere atino obino neko oko i dye boma, ocirikale mere luŋ daŋ obino jwero oko i nino-nono, Man kop ame Rwot me mony okobo." 
Jeremiah49:27 Abino moko mac i kom apama cel me Damaciko, maccono bino wano paco adwoŋ me Ben-adad oko.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Man en kop ame okobo i kom atekere me Kedar kede i kom loc luŋ me Kajor ame yam Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon olwenyo i komgi te loyogi oko, Rwot okobo ni, “Ya malo me iwot ilweny i kom jo Kedar! Wot inek atekere luŋ ame tye tutuŋ kide." 
Jeremiah49:29 Kemagi kede rommigi obino yako oko, karacel kede boma me icikagi, naka jami luŋ ame tye i kemagi. Inagagi bino wot nywal iciŋ jo ocele, jo bino redo ni, ‘Lworo doŋ ogurowu tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 Wun jo me Kajor, acikowu ni myero iriŋ iwot ipon wunu oko kannabor, pien Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, otyeko yikere me timo gin arac i komwu, otyeko doŋ poro kop oko i komwu." 
Jeremiah49:31 “Ya wunu, me iwot ilweny wunu i kom jo ame yam bedo mot i kuc aboŋo aye la moro, doggola me celgi mom tye, akadi arii mogo me geno, dogcelgi bedo olaŋara," 
Jeremiah49:32 Inagagi obino yako oko, dokgi daŋ obino yako oko, abino keto jo ame mworo yer wigi doŋ acogo, i kabedo luŋ ame tye i lobo, can ame abino kela i komgi, bino ya kabedo ducu." 
Jeremiah49:33 Kajor bino doko tim, kan ame ikwe keken en ame bedo iye, kan ame ŋattoro mom bedo iye kadi acel, dok ŋattoro daŋ mom bino wot kuno.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 I kare ame Jedekia abaka me Juda pwod cako loc acaka, Rwot okobbi Jeremia adwarpiny kop i kom Elam." 
Jeremiah49:35 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino neko wegi akud tero luŋ ame tye i Elam, ame gin jo ame omio lobo me Elam odoko atek." 
Jeremiah49:36 Abino miyo yamo kodo i twok lobo aŋwen luŋ bino i kom Elam, jo iye te ket i akina rok luŋ ame tye i lobo," 
Jeremiah49:37 Abino miyo lworo mako jo Elam meicel i nyim okworgi, kede i nyim jo ame mito neke, Abino kela gin arac i kom jo Elam, kede twon akemona agwa. Abino miyo pala me lweny lubo yorgi ate nekogi oko." 
Jeremiah49:38 Abino keto kom locca i Elam, ate neko abakagi kede rwodegi oko. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Cite icennere abino miyo gum a jo Elam. Man kop ame Rwot okobo.” 
Jeremiah50:1 Kop ame Rwot akobo baŋ Jeremia adwarpiny i kom Babulon, ame en lobo a jo Kaldaya, tye kit man:" 
Jeremiah50:2 “Tuc kop man baŋ rok ducu dok daŋ irab pire, Tin wunu bendera malo kannaler ite kobo wunu kop man, Kur ikan wunu kop man bed calo kop me imuŋ, cite myero irab wunu pire ni, ‘Babulon doŋ opoto oko! Bel ame obaŋa mere lewic doŋ omako oko, Merodak cunye doŋ oballe oko. Cal jogi mere luŋ, lewic doŋ omako oko, cal jogi mere ame otio atia i cin cunygi doŋ ojebere oko.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Pien rok ame oya i tutuŋ anyarodi, obino doŋ oko me bino lweny i kom Babulon. Gin bino miyo lobo me Babulon doko wi obur, ŋattoro mom bino bedo kunnu; akadi dano onyo lee bino riŋo oko i kuno." 
Jeremiah50:4 “Ka kare-naca otuno, jo Icrael kede jo Juda bino bino karacel kun obino ame okobo, ote bino yenyo Rwot Obaŋagi." 
Jeremiah50:5 Gin obino penyo yo me Cion, ote wot atira kunnu, Obino ko bo ni, ‘Bye wunu, me obin oribere wunu i Rwot, i ikere ame perakino nakanaka, ame wi jo mom bino wil iye.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Jona doŋ calo rommi ame orwenyo ame okwatgi ame miogi orwenyo, kun terogi i wi kidi, oya i wi kidi man, okobo i wi kidi man, omio wigi te wil oko i kom kan ame obedo iye." 
Jeremiah50:7 Jo luŋ ame nwoŋogi, nekogi aneka, okworgi daŋ kobo ni, ‘Wan giwa omom i bal, pien gin obalo baŋ Rwot, ame en kabedogi me ateteni, Rwot ame kwarigi obedo geno.’." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Wun jo Icrael, rin wunu oko i Babulon. Ya wunu oko i lobo a jo Kaldaya, me ibed wunu calo nyok dyel ame telo nyim dyegi." 
Jeremiah50:9 Nen ba, abino tugo twoni rokkogo atek apapat, me bino lweny i kom Babulon, abino tugogi i tutuŋ anyarodi, Gin bino ryeye i teyn me lweny i kom Babulon, ote daŋ mako oko, aterogi calo me olweny ame odiro meicel ame mom dok ciŋgi nono." 
Jeremiah50:10 Obino yako lobo a jo Kaldaya oko, jo ame oyako lobogi-nono, bino yako ginnoro luŋ ame cunygi omito. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Wun jo Babulon we, kadi bed cunywu bed yom, kun iwakere wunu calo roa ametye ka nyono, onyo acalo twon aguragura ame tye olakino i koko, wun jo ame yako jona." 
Jeremiah50:12 Lewic bino mako lobowu meicel, lobo ame onywalowu iye bino bedo i twon lewic adwoŋ meicel. Babulon bino doko rok atidi meicel i akina rok ducu, lobo mere bino doko tim ame otwo imek." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ŋattoro mom bino bedo i Babulon pi akemo a Rwot, lobo mere bino doko wi obur kun yie tye nono. Jo luŋ ame bino bea i ŋete bino wuro awura, lworo bino makogi meicel pi gin ame otimere-nono." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Wun jo luŋ ame omako akud atero, cun wunu doŋ oko i tyeŋ me lweny i kom Babulon, gure wunu dyere me ibae wunu aterowu ducu, pien en otimo bal i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah50:15 Red wunu i dwon aloŋo, i dwon me lweny, gur wunu boma oko, pien Babulon doŋ otyeko miye oko kene i cinwu. Cellere luŋ doŋ omuko oreto oko piny An Rwot en ame atye aculo kwor i kom Babulonnono, pi mannono myero icul wunu kwor i komgi, tim wunugi kite ame gin rik otimowu kede." 
Jeremiah50:16 Nek wunu jo ame coo koti luŋ i Babulon, kede jo ame mako pala me kac, i kare me kac, moro i akinagi myero kur doŋ. Pala me lweny ame jo tye alweny kede kuno, bino miyo arokkoro keken ame bedo i akinawu, lworo mako, te ya wot oko i lobogi." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Jo Icrael calo rommi ame eŋatu dwaro te ryemo miyo ket atata. Jo me Acuria yam koŋ ogeo lweny i komgi, aman dok Nebukadnajer abaka me Babulon omwomwodo cogo mere oko." 
Jeremiah50:18 Man omio Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa jo Icrael okobo ni: Nen ba, Abino keto can i kom abaka me Babulon karacel kede lobo mere, kite ame oketo kede can i kom abaka me Acuria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Abino dwoko jo Icrael oko cen i lobogi. Gin bino bedo camo cem ame cek i wi kidi me Karmel kede i lobo me Bacan, dok daŋ obino camo ginnoro luŋ ame cunygi mito ame ocek i lobo obedo kidikidi me Epraim kede i Gilead." 
Jeremiah50:20 I kare-naca kede i ninonaca, obino yenyo bal iyi Icrael, cite mom obino nwoŋo moro iye kadi acel, mom daŋ obino nwoŋo moro i Juda, pien abino timo jo ame odoŋ kica. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Wot ilweny wunu i kom jo Merataim, kede i kom jo ame bedo i Pekod. Wot inekgi wunu, ityekgi wunu oko, nen ni itimo wunu ginnoro luŋ ame acikowu me timo." 
Jeremiah50:22 Woo me lweny tye awinyere i lobo, twon to arac meicel doŋ obino oko." 
Jeremiah50:23 Anyul me lobo doŋ onidde oko atitino! Babulon doŋ odoko gin ame mio jo lworo i akina rok ducu! 
Jeremiah50:24 Babulon doŋ otyeko moko oko owic ame aciko pire, omoko kun onwoŋo mom ŋeo. Onwoŋo doŋ omoko oko iye, pien en onwoŋo olwenyo i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah50:25 Rwot doŋ otyeko yabo kan ame ekano iye jami lwennyere, okwanyo jami lwennyere okelo oko i twon akemo adwoŋ meicel, pien Rwot Obaŋa me mony tye kede gin ame emito timo, i kom lobo me Babulon." 
Jeremiah50:26 Bin icak wunu lweny i ko me i kom kabedo ducu; yab wunu dero kallere oko luŋ. Cok wunu jami mere ame iyako wunu iyid wunu ni bim, bala kai ame ocoko karacel. Jwer wunu lobo mere oko odoco, kur iwek wunu ginnoro doŋ iye kadi acel." 
Jeremiah50:27 Nek wunu twoni mere ducu, ter wunu iwot inek wunu oko luŋ, Can i wi jo Babulon doi! Pien karegi doŋ oromo oko! Kare me keto can i komgi doŋ oromo!" 
Jeremiah50:28 “Koŋ inen wunu oriŋ ayela ame obwot i lobo Babulon tye ka lwi riŋo oko, gin oriŋo i Cion, otye otito kite ame Rwot Obaŋawa oculo kede kwor pi gin ame yam Babulon otimo kede i kom ot me wore." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Lwon wunu wegi akud atero me bin lweny i kom Babulon. Cwa wunu jo luŋ ame ŋeo telo akud atero wot kunu, Wot igur wunu boma oko, kur imi wunu ŋattoro bwoti. Wot icul wunu kwor i kome, kun lubo gin ame yam en otimo, time wunu arom aroma i gin ame yam en otimo i kom jo ocele, pien yam otimo bal i kom Ŋat Acil me Icrael i twon awaka adwoŋ meicel." 
Jeremiah50:30 Pi mannono, awobe mere atino obino neko oko i dye boma, ocirikale mere luŋ obino daŋ tyeko oko i nino-nono. Man kop ame Rwot okobo," 
Jeremiah50:31 “Nen ba, an atye i kop i komwu wun jo ame wakere, pien karewu doŋ oromo oko, kare ame abino keto iye can komwu. Man kop ame Rwot me mony okobo." 
Jeremiah50:32 Jo ame wakere bino gatte te rette piny, kun ŋattoro ame tiŋogi malo mom tye, dok abino cwinyo mac i bomagi luŋ, maccono bino wano ginnoro luŋ ame tye i ŋetgi." 
Jeremiah50:33 “Rwot me mony okobo ni: Otye ka wuno jo me Icrael kede jo me Juda meicel. Jo ame omakogi te terogi acalo opii, olidogi doŋ atek odoco, kun mom oye ni owoti." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ŋat ame lakkorogi tek meicel; nyiŋe Rwot me mony. En ikome bino pido pirgi, me wek emi lobo bed i kuc, ento ekel can i kom jo me Babulon.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Rwot okobo ni, “Nek wunu jo Babulon! Nek wunu jo Kaldaya! Nek wunu rwode kede oryeko luŋ ame tye iye." 
Jeremiah50:36 Nek wunu otyet ame tyeto tyet me goba goba, me gin luŋ odok jo amin meicel. Nek wunu ocirikale me lweny, nek wunugi ityekgi ducu." 
Jeremiah50:37 Nek wunu aguraguragi, bal wunu daŋ gadigadi me lwenygi oko. Nek wunu rok a mony ocele luŋ ame tye i akinagi, me odok agoro calo mon. Bal wunu lonyo luŋ ame tye iye, yak wunu lonyo iye luŋ." 
Jeremiah50:38 Mi wunu can pii pot i lobogi, me pii two oko iye luŋ. Pien Babulon obedo lobo ame cal jogi dwon iye meicel, cal appa oloko jo odoko opoa." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Pi mannono ba, leyi me tim kede ekwe kede udo bino bedo i Babulon, ŋattoro mom doŋ bino bedo kunu atwal, pi kare a jo me lwagi ducu." 
Jeremiah50:40 Kite ame rik otimere kede i kare ame Obaŋa oreto kede Codoma kede Gomora karacel kede bomagi ducu, ŋattoro daŋ mom bino bedo kunu kittono, dano moro mom bino bedo iye acalo welo. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Nen ba, rokkoro tye abino i tutuŋ anyarodi, rok atek ame obakki mere pol meicel, tye ka yubere me bino lweny i kannabor meicel." 
Jeremiah50:42 Omako doŋ akud aterogi kede tonigi oko, rokkono ger meicel dok kica mom i cunygi. Woogi calo pii i nam ame amor, gin oriŋo aguragura, ame otere oko acalo dano ame akuro lweny akura, gin abino me bino lweny i komwu, wun jo Babulon." 
Jeremiah50:43 “Abaka me Babulon doŋ otyeko winyo kop i komgi oko, omio ciŋgi doŋ okwe oko inon, twon remmoro adwoŋ meicel doŋ oketo kome oko, tye ka rem calo dako ame rem me nywal ogo." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Nen ba, abino miyogi oriŋo oko oyotoyot, calo eŋatu ame tye i bar me kwayo rommi, ame oya i bun ame yen oculle acula iye, ame tye i dog kulo me Jordan. Abino keto ŋattoro keken ame cunye omito me loye. Ŋa kara ame rom keda? Ŋa ame twero lwoŋa me wot lweny kede? Akwattene ame romo cuŋ i nyima?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Pi mannono ba, myero iwiny gin ame Rwot otyeko yiko me timo i kom Babulon, kede gin ame en otyeko yiko me timo i kom lobo a jo Kaldaya. Anaka jo atino mege abino miyo owaogi. Ateteni, can ame bino poto i kom otinogi bino miyo jo lworo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ka Babulon opoto, morrere bino miyo lobo yeŋere, koko mere bino winyere i akina rok ducu.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino tugo cuny anek jo me bino i kom Babulon, kede i kom jo ame bedo i Kaldaya." 
Jeremiah51:2 Abino cwayo rok ame jwero Babulon oko calo yamo ame akolo ren kal, rokkono bino timogi cucu, te weko lobo doŋ nono, ka gin bino me lweny i koma kabedo luŋ, i nino ame abino keto iye can komgi." 
Jeremiah51:3 Kur imi wunu jo Babulon kare me celo aterogi, kur imigi wunu kare me riko koti lweny. Kur iwek wunu awcbegi moro doŋ akwo, tyek wunu monygi luŋ." 
Jeremiah51:4 Gin bino rette piny ame doŋ oto oko i lobo me Kaldaya, obino rette ame doŋ owanogi i dye gudu luŋ ame tye i boma." 
Jeremiah51:5 Pien a Rwot me mony, mom aweko jo Icrael kede jo Juda, kadi bed otimo bal adwoŋ meicel i lobo a jo Kaldaya, i kom an Ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Riŋ wunu oko i akina jo Babulon, ŋat acel acel myero lar kwo mere. Kur imi nekwu oko pi bal a jo me Babulon, pien en man en kare me culo kwor a Rwot, kare me keto can i kom Babulon ame rom aroma i gin ame en otimo." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulon onwoŋo tye acalo ikopo me jabu i cin Rwot, ame onwoŋo omio lobo luŋ tye ka mer amera, rok luŋ obedo mato koŋo olokkere, onwoŋo omio rok luŋ odoko opoa oko." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babulon doŋ orette oko oyotoyot, te tur oko. Kok wunu pire ba! Ter wunu yat owot iket wunu i wan burere ame oketo ikome, gwok onyo twero can." 
Jeremiah51:9 Rok ame bedo kuno okobo ni otemo konyo Babulon, cite otemo kwe, mom romo larre. Weke wunu doŋ, ŋat acel acel myero dok cen paco mere; pien Obaŋa ikome en a doŋ oŋolo kop i kome, otyeko doŋ jwero Babulon odoco." 
Jeremiah51:10 Rwot doŋ otyeko nyuto ni kopwa tye atira, biye wunu, obin orab wunu pire i Cion, gin ame Rwot Obaŋawa otimo." 
Jeremiah51:11 “Rab wunu aterowu! Kwany wunu kwodewu, wun jo Media! Rwot doŋ otugo cuny obakki me Media oko, pien yikkere tye me balo Babulon oko, pien mannono en kite ame en bino culo kede kwor, kwor pi gin ame jo me Babulon otimo i kom ode." 
Jeremiah51:12 “Twe wunu bendera cun ame nyuto ni lweny tye i kom cal me Babulon; cuk wunu cuny okur-piny kur bed alwor, pok wunu okur-piny oko i kabedo apapat, mi wunu jo ame opono bed kun okio piny. Rwot doŋ otyeko timo gin ame yam eyikere me timo, gin ame yam en okobo i kom jo ame bedo i Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:13 Wun jo Babulon ame itye wunu kede kulo meicel i lobowu, dok lonyo daŋ dwoŋ meicel i ciŋwu, agikkiwu doŋ ceggi, uci ame otudde i kom kwowu doŋ ocodo oko." 
Jeremiah51:14 Rwot me mony doŋ otyeko kwon i nyiŋe kene, en okwoŋo ni, Abino kelo lwak jo apipim calo bonyo, me bino lweny i kom Babulon, gin bino woo i dwon ame nyuto ni gin doŋ otyeko loyo lweny." 
Jeremiah51:15 “Rwot gire en oketo lobo kede teko mere, en ocibo lobo omio ocuŋ atek pi ryeko mere, en omio polo opette kite ame tye kede-ni pi ŋeccere." 
Jeremiah51:16 Ka ce dwone omor pii i polo twaggere meicel, dok en mio ekuna duny kun ya i agikki piny, En mio lutkot wil ka kot ocwe, dok mio yamo kodo kun ya i ot kano-jami mere." 
Jeremiah51:17 Jo luŋ min atek dok daŋ mom otye kede ŋeccoro, cal jogi ame apac opao en ame dok mie lewic, pien cal jogi-nono mom obedo obana, dok mom daŋ otye kede lworo kadi acel." 
Jeremiah51:18 Konygi moro mom, otiogi me acaa keken, i kare me keto can i komgi, gin luŋ obino to oko." 
Jeremiah51:19 Obaŋa a Yakobo mom calo cal jogi-nono, pien en obedo ŋat oketo jami luŋ, dok oyero jo Icrael me bedo jo mere. Nyiŋe Rwot me mony.”" 
Jeremiah51:20 Rwot okobo ni, “Yin ibedo anyuila kede jami me lwenya, atio kedi me ninyo rok luŋ atitino, dok atio kedi me babalo loc apapat," 
Jeremiah51:21 atio kedi me neko aguragura kede ŋat ame ŋweco kede; atio daŋ kedi me tuturo gadigadi kede jo ame ryemogi," 
Jeremiah51:22 atio kede me neko co kede mon, atio daŋ kedi me ŋe ko awobe kede anyira;" 
Jeremiah51:23 atio kedi me neko akwa rommi karacel kede rommi mere; dok atio kedi me neko apur karacel kede twoni ame en puro kede; dok atio kede me neko oloc adoŋo karacel kede otel mony apapat. 
Jeremiah51:24 “Abino culo kwor i kom Babulon kede i kom jo Kaldaya luŋ pi gin arac ame gin otimo i Cion, kun wun ineno wunu kede waŋwu. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Nen ba, yin Babulon ame itye calo kidi ame neko jo-ni, an atye kede kop i komi, yin ame ityeko lobo luŋ oko-ni; abino ryeyo ciŋa i komi ate maki ikwic, ate bedo lori piny i lobo, ate miyi doko calo kidi ame owaŋo." 
Jeremiah51:26 Mom obino kwanyo gweŋŋoro i komi kadi acel me bedo me gwic ot, mom daŋ obino kwanyo gweŋŋoro, me bedo me acakki te ot, ibino bedo calo tim ame yi jo ocao, Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Gur wunu bendera cuŋ i lobo me nyuto lweny! Kut wunu apel me rok luŋ winy! Yik wunu rok apapat me lweny i kom Babulon, lwon wunu loc apapat me bin lweny i kome, loc a jo Ararat, jo Mini kede loc a jo Ackenaj; ket wunu adwoŋ ame lo wi mony luŋ me lweny i kome. Kel wunu aguragura apipim calo bonyo." 
Jeremiah51:28 Yik wunu rok luŋ me lweny i kom Media, obakki me Media, oloc adoŋo, karacel kede odoŋe ame konyogi, kede lobo luŋ ame tye i te locgi." 
Jeremiah51:29 Lobo tye ka yeŋere meicel, dok jo iye rem ociro oko, pien Rwot doŋ tye acobo gin ame en oyiko, me timo i kom Babulon. En bino miyo Babulon doŋ yie nono aboŋo jo moro ame bedo iye." 
Jeremiah51:30 Olweny me Babulon doŋ ogiko lwenyoko, obedo doŋ abedo iyi celgi ame ocelo atek; tekogi doŋ otum oko, odoko doŋ mon ata; obedo doŋ ikuduru i dog mac, dog bomagi luŋ doŋ oturo oko." 
Jeremiah51:31 Jo ame ooro riŋo tere i tere, kun ŋat man rwatte i wadgi, me wot kobbi abaka me Babulon ni boma mere doŋ oturo oko i kabedo ducu." 
Jeremiah51:32 Okwor otyeko mako mel kede yede luŋ ame tye i dog kulo, dok daŋ ocwicwinyo lum oko kede mac, ocirikale me Babulon doŋ obabaŋa oko." 
Jeremiah51:33 Pien Rwot me mony ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael okobo ni; Okwo ceggi nyono Babulon oko calo laro me dino kal, kare me nyono piny pwod odoŋ anonok, kare mere bino tuno.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadnajer abaka me Babulon otima lit; onyona aboŋo kica. Omio boma odoŋ yie nono calo yi gulu, omwonya oko alutu calo twon lee moro ame bedo i pii. Odepo ginnoro luŋ ame cunye mito, te ŋoko en ame odounere oko." 
Jeremiah51:35 Tim me kole ame otimo i koma, kede i kom watina, myero gire dok i wi Babulon.” Jo ame bedo i Cion myero kob ni, “Remona myero dok i wi jo Kaldaya, pi watina ame gin oneko.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Pi mannono Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Nen ba, an abino pido pirwu, dok daŋ abino culo kworwu, abino miyo pii i nam me Babulon two oko, ate miyo wan akoŋ iye luŋ daŋ two oko." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babulon bino doko wi obur ame oyido ibim, kan ame ekwe bedo iye. Bino bedo twon kabedo moro arac ame mio jo lworo, kun ŋattoro mom bedo iye ka di acel." 
Jeremiah51:38 “Jo Babulon luŋ bino kok karacel bala iŋatu, dok obino ŋuŋura karacel calo itino eŋatu," 
Jeremiah51:39 kare ame gin owor wokkono abino teddigi arama, abino miyogi omato kono olok ote mer ame cunygi doŋ yom atata. Obino nino mom dok ote co atwal." 
Jeremiah51:40 Abino terogi calo itino rommi, calo nyogi dyegi onyo nyogi rommi ame atero awot neko." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Babulon ame obedo twon boma adwoŋ ame wii lobo luŋ pako-ni, doŋ omako oko! Babulon doŋ odokoboma ame omio rok i wi lobo luŋ lworo meicel." 
Jeremiah51:42 Pii nam doŋ ocore oko i kom Babulon, tugere me pii nam atagere kun mor tye awumo Babulon oko." 
Jeremiah51:43 Boma iye luŋ doŋ odoko gin ame mio jo lworo, tye doŋ acalo tim ame otwo ikaŋ, ame ŋattoro daŋ doŋ mom bed iye, dok ŋattoro daŋ mom bea iye." 
Jeremiah51:44 Abino keto can i kom Bel, ame obedo obaŋa me Babulon, dok abino kwanyo jami luŋ ame yam en omwonyo ame tye i doge. Rok luŋ mom dok bino medde ciro baŋe kite a yam con, apama cel me Babulon doŋ orette oko." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Wun jo Icrael, rin wunu, iya wunu oko i kuno! Ijat acel acel myero nen ni erino elaro kwo mere i akemo a Rwot agwa meicel!" 
Jeremiah51:46 Cunywu myero kur poti, dok kur daŋ ibed wunu i lworo i kom kop ame ityeko winyo wunu-ni. Mwaka i mwaka kop apapat winyere i kabedo ducu, kop ame owuno kede jo i lobo, kede kop i kom abaka ame tye alweny i kom abaka ocele." 
Jeremiah51:47 “Pi mannono ba, nen kare tye abino, kare ame abino keto iye can i kom jogi me Babulon. Lewic adwoŋ meicel bino mako lobo me Babulon luŋ, jo ame oneko iye, bino rette i dye boma." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ginnoro luŋ ame tye i wi polo kede en ame tye i wi lobo bino wero wer me yomcuny pi Babulon, pien Babulon bino poto i cin jo ame bino bino me lweny i komgi kun ya i tutuŋ anyarodi, Man en kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babulon myero doŋ rette, pien omio jo Icrael apol meicel oto, Babulon ikome en ame okelo to i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i wi lobo." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Wun jona ame itye wunu i Babulon, ame ibwot wunu abwota i lak pala me lweny, myero doŋ iya iwot wunu oko, kur dok ibed bedo wunu mot! Myero ipo wunu pi Rwot Obaŋawu, kadi bed itye wunu kannabor, wiwu myero po i kom Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah51:51 Kob wunu ni, ‘Omio lewic omakowa, pien owinyo kop acae ame ocaowa kede; odoko doŋ jo agoro meicel, pien orok doŋ omao kabedo acil oko ame tye i ot a Rwot.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 “Pi mannono ba, kare tye abino, ame abino ŋolo iye kop i kom jogi me Babulon, jo ame owaŋo bino bedo ŋuŋura i kabedo apol meicel ame tye i lobo me Babulon luŋ," 
Jeremiah51:53 Kadi bed Babulon yit malo naka i polo, kadi bed cel paco mere ame tye malo-nono atek meicel, pwod abino cwayo jo ame bino balo oko. Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Koŋ iwiny wunu koko ame tye awinyere i Babulon! Winy wunu can ame opoto i kom lobo a jo Kaldaya. 
Jeremiah51:55 Pien Rwot tye doŋ amiyo yi Babulon adoŋ nono, atyeko teko mere oko, te daŋ doŋ litj oko mot, Mony tye ka bino i kome oyotoyot calo pii me nam ame tye amor, obino me bino lweny i kome i twon wo adwoŋ meicel." 
Jeremiah51:56 Gin doŋ obino oko me bino kelo can i kom Babulon, ocirikale mere me lweny doŋ omako oko, akud aterogi daŋ doŋ onununo oko atitino, An a Rwot Obaŋa en ame aketo can i kom jo pi balgi, abino culo kwor i kom Babulon pi bal ame jo mere otimo." 
Jeremiah51:57 Abino miyo rwode mere mer oko, jo aryek iye, oloc adoŋo me lobo, odite ame telo mony karacel kede ocirikale. Gin luŋ obino nino oko atwal, mom dok obino co kadi acel. An abaka ame nyiŋa Rwot me mony doŋ atyeko kobo." 
Jeremiah51:58 “Rwot me mony okobo ni, Cel me Babulon alac wok-ki obino muko oreto oko piny, dol dog cellege ame ocuŋ malo i gun-ni, obino wano oko i mac. Tic ame rok ocele obedo tiyo iye bino to nono, rok apapat kom obedo yelle i tic atek ame bino wan oko i mac.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Ceraya wot a Deria, ame obedo wot a Maceya, rik obedo ŋat ame gwoko abaka Jedekia. I mwaka me aŋwen me loc a Jedekia abaka me Juda, Ceraya onwoŋo owoto i Babulon, adwarpiny Jeremia te kobbe koppogo ame myero en wot kede i Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia ocoo kop i kom can ame bino poto i kom Babulon i buk, kede koppogo ocele luŋ i kom Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:61 En okobbi Ceraya ni, “Ka ituno i Babulon, nen ni ikwano kop magi luŋ kite ame ocoo kede-ni baŋ lwak," 
Jeremiah51:62 Dok myero ikwa Rwot Obaŋa ni, ‘Ama Rwot, rik onwoŋo ikobo ni ibino tyeko kabedo man oko, ame ginnoro ame tye kede kwo mom dok bino bedo iye, dano onyo lee, te doŋ bedo tim otwo ikan atwal.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Ka doŋ ityeko kwano buk man baŋ lwak, twe gwen i kom buk man, ite bolo oko i dye kulo me Epurate," 
Jeremiah51:64 kun ikobo ni, ‘Man en kite ame Babulon bino mwonyere kede, kun mom dok kato oko atwal, pi can ame abino kela ate keto i kome.’ ” Kop ame Jeremia okobo te gik kan." 
Jeremiah52:1 Jedekia ocako loc ame mwaka me dittere oromo pyeraryo wie acel, en te cako loc i Jerucalem pi mwakki apar wie acel. Nyiŋ tottere Kamutal, nyaka a Jeremia me Libna." 
Jeremiah52:2 En obedo timo gin ame nen arac i nyim Rwot, kun lubo ginnoro luŋ ame pappere Yekoyakim obedo timo." 
Jeremiah52:3 Pien ake mo omako Rwot omio otuno kan ame doŋ mom romo kanyo, Rwot te bolo Jerucalem kede Juda oko tene, kun kwanyogi oko i nyime. Abaka Jedekia rik te cako jem oko i kom abaka me Babulon." 
Jeremiah52:4 I mwaka me aboŋwen me loccere, i dwe me apar, i nino dwe apar, en ame Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon obino iye i kom Jerucalem, kun bino karacel i monnyere luŋ, te bino guro Jerucalem oko; ote daŋ toro lobo guro oko irit." 
Jeremiah52:5 Jerucalem te bedo ame oguro oko kittono nakanaka i mwaka me apar wie acel me loc a Jedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 I nino dwe aboŋwen, me dwe me aŋwen, onwoŋo kec doŋ orido jo atek meicel ame cam mom doŋ romo nen pi jo i boma." 
Jeremiah52:7 Jo te muko apama cel me boma oko, eka abaka kede monnyere te lwi riŋo oko dyewor, kun obeo i dogcel ame tye akina cel aryo me boma, ame tye i ŋet poto abaka, kadi bed rik jo Kaldaya onwoŋo oguro boma oko. Gin te lubo yo ame dok tutuŋ Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Cite mony a jo Kaldaya rik te ryemo yo abaka ote bino make i bar me Jeriko twal, monnyere te ket wekke kene." 
Jeremiah52:9 Mony me Kaldaya te make kele naka baŋ abaka me Babulon i Ribla, kan ame ote ŋolle iye kop." 
Jeremiah52:10 Gin te cako neko awobe mere i nyime kun en aneno kede waŋe," 
Jeremiah52:11 ote lokere i kome loyo waŋe oko, ote tweye kede jegere tere i Babulon. Ote wot kette i ot can, kan ame en te bedo iye tuno naka i nino me to mere." 
Jeremiah52:12 I dwe me abic, i nino dwe apar, ame obedo mwaka me apar wie aboŋwen me loc a Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon, i nino-nono, Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka me Babulon, owoto i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah52:13 En te wano ot a Rwot oko kede ot abaka, kede udi luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i Jerucalem; en owaŋo udi adoŋo luŋ kede mac." 
Jeremiah52:14 Mony a jo Kaldaya luŋ ame rik onwoŋo tye baŋ adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka, gin te muko apama cel me Jerucalem oko." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka, te tero jo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik oweko i Jerucalem iyi opii, jo ame rik oya oko i baŋe te lokere baŋ abaka me Babulon, karacel kede lwak ocele luŋ, gin luŋ ote terogi oko iyi opii." 
Jeremiah52:16 Cite en rik te weko jo mo go ame ocan doŋ kuno, me gin bed jo ame gwoko poto kede opur i kweri dyaŋ." 
Jeremiah52:17 Jo Kaldaya rik te tuturo pagi aryo me mola ame rik onwoŋo tye i ot a Rwot kede gadigadi atitino, kede nam me mola ame rik tye i to a Rwot, gin oturo ote ŋinyo atino, ote tero luŋ i Babulon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Gin otero gulli apipim, atok mac, makac, tako me wano odok akur, karacel kede jami luŋ ame rik onwoŋo otio kedgi i ot a Rwot," 
Jeremiah52:19 kede wer me lodi mac, kede becen, En otero jami luŋ ame otio i jabu acalo jabu, kede en ame otio i ryal acalo ryal." 
Jeremiah52:20 Aco kop ame mako dero pii aryo kede nam acel kede gadigadi atitino ame rik Culeman otio me ot a Rwot, mola ame odonyo i komgi dwon meicel ame pekkere mom romo pimmere." 
Jeremiah52:21 Pagi acel acel borrere tye futi apyeraryo wie abiro. 
Jeremiah52:22 I wie malo onwoŋo oketo iye tok me mola ame borrere romo futi aŋwen kede nucu. I kom tok ote dok keto iye bao kede cal pomegranat, kun gin luŋ otio i mola oguro tok i dyere. Pagi me aryo daŋ onwoŋo rom aroma kede awottere, tye daŋ i tokkere kede boo mere me mola." 
Jeremiah52:23 Cal pomegranat onwoŋo romo pyeraboŋwen wie abicel, kun tye i neye luŋ, gin luŋ onwoŋo doŋ tye mia acel." 
Jeremiah52:24 Adwon ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka otero baŋ Ceraya, ame onwoŋo obedo alamdog adwoŋ, kede alubbe Jepenia, kede okur doggola me ot a Rwot adek." 
Jeremiah52:25 Dok te tero daŋ adwoŋ ame onwoŋo loo mony, karacel kede jo abic, ame obedo omemba me cokere abaka ame rik onwoŋo tye i boma, kede aran adwoŋ me mony, ame rik obedo ŋat ame coko jo pi lweny; kede jo pyerabicel ame obedo jo me lobo-nono, ame gin onwoŋo otye i boma." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka, omakogi te terogi naka i Ribla baŋ aba ka me Babulon." 
Jeremiah52:27 Abaka me Babulon te nekogi oko luŋ i Ribla, i lobo me Kamat. Mannono en kite ame rik okwanyo kede jo Juda i lobogi ote terogi iyi opii." 
Jeremiah52:28 Man en wei jo ame yam Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon omako te tero oko iyi opii: I mwaka me abiro otero Ojudaya ame romo tutumia adek kede pyeraryo wie adek." 
Jeremiah52:29 I mwaka me apar wie aboro me loccere en otero jo ame romo mia aboro kede pyeradek wie aryo, kun okwanyogi i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah52:30 I mwaka me pyeraryo wie adek me loccere, Nebujaradan, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame gwoko abaka otero Ojudaya ame romo jo mia abiro kede pyeraboŋwen wie abic. Wei Ojudaya luŋ ame oterogi iyi opii, ka oribogi karacel romo tutumia aŋwen kede mia abicel." 
Jeremiah52:31 I mwaka me pyeradek wie abiro, cakere i kare ame otero kede Yekoyakin abaka me Juda iyi opii, i dwe me apar wie aryo, i nino dwe pyeraryo wie abic, en ame Evil-Merodak, abaka me Babulon otimo iye Yekoyakin, abaka me Juda, kica. En ogonye oko i buc i mwaka ame en ocako iye loc." 
Jeremiah52:32 En te bedo kop kede kica meicel, te kette bedo i wi kom ame dwon akato ducu iyi akina kome ame rik oloc bedo iye i Babulon." 
Jeremiah52:33 Mannono omio Yekoyakin ogonyo bono me buc oko i kome. Cakere i nino-nono, en doŋ te bedo cam i wi meja abaka nino i nino pi kare me kwo mere luŋ." 
Jeremiah52:34 Abaka me Babulon rik te bedo miye lim me konye nino i nino kite ame en mi to, tuno ka en oto." 
Lamentations1:1 Jerucalem dok odoŋ nono nadi! Aco yam yo iye mom kwanne ba! Koŋ inen aman doŋ calo dako ame cware oto, kadi yam nyiŋe rwo meicel i akina orok, aco yam twon boma moro ame calo agoŋ i akina boma ocele luŋ, aman kom doŋ olokere odok opii." 
Lamentations1:2 Kok doŋ anaka dyewor-gu, pig waŋe bedo mol amola i leme; mom tye ŋattoro odoŋ kadi acel i akina jo a yam mare ame romo kweyo cunye, owote mere daŋ en a doŋ oketo erupe i kome, gin luŋ doŋ olokere odoko okworrere." 
Lamentations1:3 Jo Juda doŋ otero oko wot neno can i lobo ocele kede tiyo tic apek okato kare; aman doŋ gin bedo i akina orok ata, mom doŋ otye kede kannoro a myero owe iye, okworgi doŋ oridogi tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, mom doŋ otye kede yo moro me put." 
Lamentations1:4 Jo luŋ ame woto Cion tye ka kumo, pien mom doŋ tye ŋattoro ame bino pi kwero kare me ecuban a Rwot iye, mom doŋ tye ŋattoro ame woto i doggola ot Obaŋa olamdog iye cur doŋ ociro oko, anyira ame yam ower iye tye doŋ aneno can, aco en Cion ikome can doŋ oride atek meicel." 
Lamentations1:5 Loc daŋ tye i ciŋ okworrere, omone mere doŋ tye gigi aber pien Rwot oketo can i kom Cion pi balere a mom kwanne, itino mere atino daŋ doŋ otero-gu oko, me bedo opii okworgi ame oterogi." 
Lamentations1:6 Kwogo a boma me Cion luŋ doŋ mom tye kadi acel, rwode mere luŋ doŋ calo atil ame ariŋo odwar aryemogi, kun mom onwoŋo atelloro, aco kono doŋ ogoro meicel." 
Lamentations1:7 I kare me can kede cwercuny, Jerucalem doŋ ocako poyo jami mere luŋ me wel, ame rik etye kede i kare okato, I kare ame jo mere opoto i ciŋ okwor, kun mom tye ŋattoro ame konye i can ame opoto i kome, okworrere otiŋo waŋgi onene ote ŋalle aŋala." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerucalem otimo twon bal adwoŋ meicel, omio ojebere oko, mom daŋ cil kadi acel. Jo luŋ a yam wore doŋ cae acaa, pien oneno kome doŋ tye nono; nen en ikome daŋ doŋ tye acur acura kun wiro waŋe neno teŋe." 
Lamentations1:9 Gin ame en ojebere kede tye daŋ i lak boŋo mere, en yam mom otamo ni kwo mere bino gik i can kit man, mannono omio can opoto i kome lik meicel, ŋattoro ame kweo cunye-gu pe, “Ama Rwot, bol waŋi inen can ame orida wok-ki ba, okworra gire doŋ oloa oko.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Okwor doŋ oryeo ciŋgi oko, i kom jami mere abeco mege; en gire oneno rok apapat kun donyo i kabedo acil, aco gin jo ame yam Rwot ogeŋo ni kur dony i akina lwakkere." 
Lamentations1:11 Jo mere luŋ doŋ tye acur acura, kun oyenyo cam me acama, ocato jamigi abeco oko pi cam, atot ya onwoŋ dok teko. “Bol waŋi inen ba, Ama Rwot, pien doŋ ocaa meicel.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Wun luŋ ame ibeo ikato wunu-ni, koŋ inena wunu ba! Tye cwercunnyoro ame rom i cwercuny ame atye kede-ni, ame Rwot ogoa kede i ikare ame akemo mere olyeto agwa meicel-li?" 
Lamentations1:13 “En ocwao mac i malo i polo naka piny iyi cogona twal, ociko bwo piny me mako tyena, te reta piny ataro, oweka ata, kun awile oko dok rem daŋ ocira oko dyeceŋ luŋ." 
Lamentations1:14 “Balla luŋ onwoŋo doŋ otweo oko i kom kol, ame ocokogi, te tweyogi luŋ karacel i ciŋe, eka te rwakogi i ŋuta, mannono te miyo tekona tum oko, Rwot omia i ciŋ jo ame mom aromo cuŋ i nyimgi." 
Lamentations1:15 “Rwot ocao jona atek i lweny acaa, kun an daŋ atye i akinagi, ocwano lwak me bino cokere lweny i koma, me oŋiny awobena oko, Rwot ojejebo nya jo Juda calo ŋat ame nyono olok me biyo pige." 
Lamentations1:16 “Mannono en omio atye ka koko ame pig waŋa tye aony aonya, pien ŋat a kono kwe cunya mom tye kadi acel, ŋat ame kono koŋ dok mi cunya dok atek. Itinona doŋ onyobere oko, pien okworwa doŋ onuogi oko." 
Lamentations1:17 “Cion oryeo ciŋe, cite ŋattoro ame kweo cunye mom tye, Rwot yam olwoŋo okwor i kabedo luŋ me bino i kom Yakobo Jerucalem doŋ odoko boma ojebere oko i akinagi." 
Lamentations1:18 “Gin ame Rwot tye ka tiyo tye kakare, pien an onwoŋo ajem akwero winyo koppere. Doŋ pi mannono ba, wun rok luŋ myero iwiny wunu, nen wunu cwercuny ame atye kede; pien anyirana kede awobena, gin luŋ doŋ otero oko iyi opii." 
Lamentations1:19 “Alwoŋo jo ame mara, cite gin mom oye konya, olamdogga kede odoŋena oto luŋ i boma kun onwoŋo otye oyenyo cam me medo tekogi." 
Lamentations1:20 “Nen ba, Ama Rwot, pien can odia meicel, cunya doŋ ojebere arac meicel, etaona doŋ agoye ni tuktuk, pien abedo jem kare luŋ, Pala lweny tye alwero jo alwera dye yo, to tye daŋ naka iyi ot." 
Lamentations1:21 “Tim ber, iwiny ba curra, mom gire tye ŋattoro ame romo kweyo cunya. Okworra luŋ doŋ otyeko winyo pi can opoto i koma, cunygi yom meicel pien itima kittono, Mi doŋ nino ame rik irabo pire-ni bin oko me gin daŋ obed calo an." 
Lamentations1:22 “Mi bal luŋ ame gin otimo bin oko i nyimi; timgi kite ame tiima kede pi balla luŋ. Abedo doŋ cucura tyen apol meicel, cunya doŋ oto oko inon.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Rwot doŋ omio piny ocido oko icuc i Cion, pi akemo mere adwoŋ. Kwogo Icrael ame yam otuno naka i polo, en obolo oko piny. I kare ame akemo mere olyeto mom dok opoyo ni Cion yam obedo ka teno tyene." 
Lamentations2:2 Rwot ojwero udi ajo a Yakobo luŋ, aboŋo kica moro kadi acel. Otuturo kabedo a jo Juda luŋ ame ocecelo atek i twon akemo meicel, owaogi oretogi piny i twon lewic adwoŋ meicel, karacel olocgi kede rwodegi." 
Lamentations2:3 Odwoko teko a jo Icrael luŋ piny, i twon akemo agwa meicel okwero-gu konyogi oko, i kare ame okworgi doŋ tye i nyimgi, obedo waŋ i Yakobo calo mac ame alyel, kun waŋo jami luŋ i ŋete." 
Lamentations2:4 Olunyo telo-gu atero mere atek i ciŋe tuŋ cem, otikowa kede calo okworrere. Oneko jo luŋ a yam miowa owakere i yomcuny; i kema me Cion luŋ, owuko akemo mere agwa iye calo mac." 
Lamentations2:5 Rwot doŋ olokere i komwa calo akwor, ojwero jo Icrael oko, otyeko-gu udigi adoŋodoŋo oko luŋ, apama celgi a yam ocecelo atek doŋ odoko wi obur, onyao kumo kede koko odoko adwoŋ meicel iyi akina jo Juda." 
Lamentations2:6 Oreto gony oko piny calo gonyo ame oreto i poto. Kabedo a yam okwero iye ecuban adoŋo luŋ, omio odoko wi obur, Rwot doŋ ogiko kwero ecuban adoŋo kede cen cabit oko i Cion, akemo mere agwa wokkono omio cunye ocao abaka kede olamdog oko." 
Lamentations2:7 Rwot okwero gire keno lammere oko, okuno daŋ kebedo mere acil oko, ojalo udi mere adoŋodoŋo i ciŋ okworrere. Woo doŋ owinyere malo amala i ot a Rwot bala i kare me kwero ecuban adoŋo," 
Lamentations2:8 Rwot onwoŋo doŋ omoko tammere oko, me mumuko apama cel me Cion odok wi obur; en onwoŋo doŋ oryeo tol opimo oko, mom odolo ciŋe kadi acel naka otyeko; omio gedo mogo Ocuŋ iguŋ malo kede apama cel, obuto piny i wi obur karacel." 
Lamentations2:9 Dogcel luŋ doŋ odonyo oko piny i lobo, obabalo lodi me dogcel, otuturogi oko; abaka mere kede rwode mere tye doŋ i akina orok, cik Obaŋa nyiŋe doŋ mom winyere, odwarpiny mom doŋ neno anyuttoro oya i baŋ Rwot." 
Lamentations2:10 Aco odoŋe a jo Juda, bedo doŋ piny ikuduru aboŋo ŋamo doggi, wigi doŋ apua keken, boŋo cola mom rwenyo i komgi, Anyira me Jerucalem, kulo doŋ wigi neno piny keken." 
Lamentations2:11 Waŋa doŋ ojwet oko pi bedo weyo pig waŋa, cunya doŋ ojebere arac meicel akemo doŋ omio ataona bedo goye agoa, pien otye ka jwero jona oko, pien itino atino kede en i kor tye owille atata, i dye yo luŋ i boma." 
Lamentations2:12 Otye ka kok baŋ totogi kun okobo ni, “Cem kede koŋo olok kara tye kwene?” Kun owille i dye yo luŋ i boma, calo jo ame owaŋo, eka kwogi te tum okoi kor totogi." 
Lamentations2:13 Kara ŋit atwero kobbi ŋo ba, yin Jerucalem? Kara atwero pori kede gin aŋo ba? Gin aŋo a myero akob ni irom kede ame romo kweyo cunyi. Ama wun jo me Jerucalem? Can ineno wunu doŋ dwoŋ calo nam, ŋa kara ame romo yiko?" 
Lamentations2:14 Anyuttogo ame odwarpinywu yam obedo neno pirwu, obedo ka anyut me goba keken, mom otwero tuco balwu kadi acel, atot ya gumwu dwogi, kop ame gin bedo rabbiwu obedo goba ame rwenyowu arwenya." 
Lamentations2:15 Jo luŋ ame beo i dye yo bapo ciŋgi i wii; ojwiye kun oyeŋo wigi ocao Jerucalem; kun okobo ni, “Man mom boma ame rik okobo ni ber wok-ki, ame yomoro cuny jo me lobo luŋ?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Okworri luŋ ŋamo doggi alac i komi; ojwiye okao lakgi atek meicel, ote redo ni, “Ojwere doŋ oko! Man en kare ame wan yam obedo paro!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Rwot doŋ otimo gin ame rik eyiko, otyeko doŋ cobo gin emoko; kite ame yam oyiko kede con, ojwerowu kom aboŋo kica; omio okworwu olelo meicel i komwu, omio teko okworwu omedde atek ateka." 
Lamentations2:18 Kok ba i dwon aloŋo baŋ Rwot! Yin boma me Cion! Wek pig waŋi mol ba piny calo pii i kulo, kun mol dyeceŋ kede dyewor; ame mom iwe kadi acel, dok pig waŋi-gu bedo cwer acwera!" 
Lamentations2:19 Ya malo ibed mwoco koko dyewor, i cuny dyewor ame nino doŋ mit wok-ki. Ony kop i cunyi luŋ calo pii i nyim Rwot. Tan ciŋi ibak dogi bane, pi kwo itinowu, ame kec omio tye awille awila, i akara yo ducu i dye boma," 
Lamentations2:20 Tiŋ waŋi inen koŋ ba, Ama Rwot! Ŋa ame yam koŋ itimo kit man? Mon myero cam itinogi bo, itino ame myero gin gwok i twon mar adwoŋ? Myero nek olamdog kede odwarpiny i kabedo acil bo, Ama Rwot?" 
Lamentations2:21 Kom itino atino kede me a jo adoŋo, tye oba bala iyi apua dye yo ata; anyirana kede awobena oneko gire oko i pala lweny, inekogi-gu i kare ame akemo ocira oko, inekogi aboŋo kica moro kadi acel." 
Lamentations2:22 Ilwoŋo okworra i koma, bala obino kwero ecuban me nino adwoŋ, ogura dyere, omio lworo ociri oko omio i nino ame akemo omako Rwot, ŋattoro mom obwot akadi doŋ akwo; itino ame yam atino, ame apito, gin luŋ okworra oneko oko." 
Lamentations3:1 An dano ame doŋ abeo i can, ame Obaŋa goo i dano ka akemo omako." 
Lamentations3:2 En oryema te tera naka kan acol icuc, aboŋo lero moro kadi acel." 
Lamentations3:3 Ateteni, en ogoa meicel, obedo dok i koma i lut naka ceŋ iyul." 
Lamentations3:4 Obabalo riŋo koma kede del koma oko, te daŋ tuturo cogona oko." 
Lamentations3:5 Ogura te wumere oko i koma, kun cunye kec bala mwonya oko alutu." 
Lamentations3:6 En omia abedo kan acol, acalo jo a rik oto con." 
Lamentations3:7 Ogero apama cel ogura dyere, me kur alwi oko, kun otwea-gu oko twoni jegele mogo apek." 
Lamentations3:8 Kadi bed awot dwona ni konya, cite kokona mom romo winyere oko," 
Lamentations3:9 En gire ocego yo oko i kidi ame opao, omio doŋ awire awira calo twol ame otoŋo yibe." 
Lamentations3:10 En doŋ kura akura calo ajaraŋuu, calo eŋatu ame opono oko." 
Lamentations3:11 Okwanya oko i yona te wot kikilo an atitino, te doŋ weka ata ame konya moro pe." 
Lamentations3:12 Otelo akud atero mere atek, te pima kede atero mere." 
Lamentations3:13 Ocela atero mere naka i etaona twal, atero ame owoto iyi akuro." 
Lamentations3:14 An doŋ adoko gi-anyera orok luŋ, nyiŋa doŋ odoko me aweragi kare luŋ," 
Lamentations3:15 Omio akako kaŋo twon ginnoro akec meicel, omio ayeŋ adiltoŋ." 
Lamentations3:16 Omio amwodo kwoyo amwoda i alaka, te juku waŋa-gu kede buru." 
Lamentations3:17 Mom doŋ aparo pi kuc kadi acel, wia doŋ owil oko i kom gin ame olwoŋo ni yomcuny." 
Lamentations3:18 Mannono omio doŋ akobo ni, “Kwogo a yam atye kede doŋ ogik gire oko, mom doŋ atye kede gen me nwoŋo ginnoro i baŋ Rwot.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Po ba pi canna kede keckoma, karacel adiltoŋ kede epio ame abedo kako," 
Lamentations3:20 Abedo tamo pire i cunya didik, mom rwenyo i cunya kadi acel." 
Lamentations3:21 Pien kop man mom twero rwenyo i cunya, mannono omio pwod amedde bedo i gen." 
Lamentations3:22 Mar a Rwot a mom lokere, mom gire gik kadi acel, kica mere daŋ mom gik." 
Lamentations3:23 Obedo gigi anyen anyena ru-piny i ru-piny dok en genne meicel. 
Lamentations3:24 Akobo i cunya ni, “Rwot obedo dul ame opokka, pi mannono abino bedo kede gen pire.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Rwot ber baŋ jo luŋ ame kure, kede baŋ jo ame cunygi tye i kome." 
Lamentations3:26 Ŋat a kuro Rwot me bino lare, myero kur mot a cunye opye." 
Lamentations3:27 Bedo ber ka ce dano opwonyo diyo cunye kun pwod tidi, calo twon ame opwonyo i wayo kweri." 
Lamentations3:28 Ka ce Rwot omio can opoto i komi, myero ibed keni, kun iliŋ mot," 
Lamentations3:29 myero ibut aryeba cuny kun dogi ogudo apua, atot onyo ca pwod dok itwero bedo kede gen;" 
Lamentations3:30 myero ilok lemi baŋ ŋat ame mito bapi; me imat ayet calo pii," 
Lamentations3:31 Pien Rwot ka abolo dano, mom gire bolo oko atwal." 
Lamentations3:32 Kadi bed en mio can poto dano, cite kica daŋ dok mako, pien marrere a mom lokere dwoŋ meicel." 
Lamentations3:33 En gire mom keto can i kom dano nono, akadi waŋo yi ŋattoro nono." 
Lamentations3:34 Rwot gire mom cwaka kadi acel tim me nyono obuc luŋ me wi loba i te tyen piny," 
Lamentations3:35 kede me kwanyo twer ame dano tye kede oko, i nyim Ŋat Amalo Meicel," 
Lamentations3:36 akadi geŋo dano loyo pido mere, cuny Rwot mom yom iye," 
Lamentations3:37 Ŋa kara ame kobo kop keken gin emito te timere, ka ce mom Rwot en ociko ni timere?" 
Lamentations3:38 Mom gin abeco kede en areco luŋ, timere ka ce ŋat Amalo Meicel en okobo?" 
Lamentations3:39 Kara dano akwo bedo kok, piŋo, ka ce oketo can i kome pi ballere?" 
Lamentations3:40 Koŋ otem neno wunu kitewa, oŋi wunu daŋ kwowa, eka ote lokere wunu dok baŋ Rwot." 
Lamentations3:41 Otiŋ wunu cunywa kede ciŋwa baŋ Obaŋa malo i wi polo, kun okobo ni," 
Lamentations3:42 “Wan giwa obalo, daŋ doŋ ojem, yin mom yam itimowa kica i balwa." 
Lamentations3:43 “Ibino doŋ i koma oko akemo, itye iryemo yorwa, kun inekowa aboŋo kica moro." 
Lamentations3:44 Iwumere doŋ oko i pol acol, ame kwacwa mom romo katto." 
Lamentations3:45 Yin doŋ imiowa odoko calo yugi, i akina rok luŋ." 
Lamentations3:46 “Okworwa doŋ ŋamo doggi alac, ame oŋalowa dok oyetowa-gu ayeta," 
Lamentations3:47 Lworo doŋ obabaŋowa oko, karacel i to piny ame obino me jwerowa oko," 
Lamentations3:48 Pig waŋa doŋ mollo calo pil i kulo, pien jona doŋ oneko oko luŋ." 
Lamentations3:49 “Pig waŋa gire bino bedo cwer acwera, kun medde ameda aboŋo gik," 
Lamentations3:50 tuno waŋ ame Rwot ame tye malo i polo okulo waŋe oneno piny. 
Lamentations3:51 Waŋa doŋ bur keken, pi anyirana luŋ ame yam tye i bomana." 
Lamentations3:52 “Nen okworra doŋ dwara calo winyo aco kun mom aballigi ginnoro kadi acel. 
Lamentations3:53 Obola-gu i bur kun pwod akwo, eka ote nanapo an kede gweŋe." 
Lamentations3:54 Pii opoŋ i bur te mwonya oko, an ate kobo ni, ‘Doŋ ato oko doi!’" 
Lamentations3:55 “Alwoŋo nyiŋi, Ama Rwot, kun atye piny i bur;" 
Lamentations3:56 yin gire mom ite winyo kwacca. Kur icul yiti oko ba, Ama Rwot, ka akok baŋi ni ikonya." 
Lamentations3:57 Yin rik inoko ŋeta i kare ame alwoŋi, rik ite kobba ni, ‘Kur ilwor!’" 
Lamentations3:58 “Yin doŋ ipido pira, Ama Rwot, yin doŋ ilakoro kwona oko." 
Lamentations3:59 Yin gire ineno gin arac ame obedo timo i koma, Ama Rwot, yin giri ŋol koppa," 
Lamentations3:60 Ityeko neno kite ame gin oculo kede kworgi luŋ, kede kop arac luŋ ame gin obedo poro i koma." 
Lamentations3:61 “Yin iwinyo kite ame gin bedo ŋala kede, Ama Rwot, kede kop areco ame gin obedo poro i koma," 
Lamentations3:62 Jo ame lwenyo keda kobo kop, dok daŋ otamo tam i koma keken kare luŋ." 
Lamentations3:63 An doŋ adoko gi-aweragi kare luŋ, kadi ocuŋ acuŋa onyo obedo abeda." 
Lamentations3:64 “Yin en ibino culo kworra i komgi, Ama Rwot, kun iporo i gin ame gin otimo i koma." 
Lamentations3:65 Yin ibino miyogi odoko jo amiŋ, cen ame icenogi kede bino bedo i komgi." 
Lamentations3:66 Ibino ryemogi i twon akemo me nekogi, i piny i te polo kan, Ama Rwot.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Koŋ inen ba, kite ame jabuwa odoko acol kede, jabuwa a yam cil wok-ki olokere nadi! Kiddi ame rik ogero i ot Obaŋa doŋ tye okeketa atata, iyi akara yo luŋ aluŋa." 
Lamentations4:2 Koŋ inen awobe me Cion, a yam becogi oporo kede jabu, aman doŋ oporogi i gulo lobo, gin ame acwe gulu ocweo i ciŋe!" 
Lamentations4:3 Akadi ekwe ata-ni daŋ keto tuno i dog itino mere, te daŋ doto itinogi, aco anyira a jona doŋ ger atata ocalo doŋ udo ame bedo i tim." 
Lamentations4:4 Leb atin ame pwod dot, omoko oko i dane pi oryo pii; itino kwao cem me acama cite mom tye ŋattoro ame miogi." 
Lamentations4:5 Jo ame rik camo cam me yomcuny tye doŋ ata i dye yo ata, jo ame yam odoŋo kun oruko ka boŋo obedo amaramar, aman doŋ obuto kom i buru." 
Lamentations4:6 Pien can ame oketo i kom jowa, dwoŋ meicel ame kato can oketo i kom Codoma oko, ame rik oreto piny i dakika moro keken, kun ciŋ dano mom ogudo kadi acel." 
Lamentations4:7 Rwode mere rik cil calo pee, rik otar calo cak, komgi rik rema atek ame kato gweŋ me wel arema oko, komgi rik olutte abeco calo gweŋe capir olil." 
Lamentations4:8 Aman doŋ waŋgi ocido kato cuk bilo oko, jo mom doŋ ŋeogi ka obeo i dye yo, del komgi omino ame onatte oko i kom cogogi, del komgi doŋ otwo calo yat otwo." 
Lamentations4:9 Jo ame oneko i pala romo komgi i gum, kato jo ame kec tye ka neko, jo ame ojony ikokoro omok calo gen, pien cammoro ocek poto pirgi mom tye." 
Lamentations4:10 Mon ame okica ame maro itinogi, otedo itinogi ikokomgi, oloko daŋ odoko cam me acamagi, i kare ame can agwa opoto i kom jona." 
Lamentations4:11 Rwot doŋ onyuto akemo mere luŋ kannaler, ocoro akemo mere alyet i komgi, ocwinyo mac i Cion ame owaŋo acakki tere luŋ." 
Lamentations4:12 Obakki me wi lobo luŋ onwoŋo gire mom ye, akadi jo ame bedo i wi polo luŋ, ni mannono okworroro twero donyo i dog celloro me Jerucalem." 
Lamentations4:13 Mannono otimere pi bal adwarpinyege kede bal olamdog, ame obedo onyo remo a jo a kitegi atir, i akinagi i dye boma," 
Lamentations4:14 Gin otyatyama okato calo oto waŋ i dye yo, kun kono otyeko lille oko i remo ame ŋattoro mom romo mulo, kom boŋŋi ame gin oruko." 
Lamentations4:15 Jo doŋ redo areda i wigi ni, “Kat wunu kede kuca! Wun jo ame cik ogeŋo, Kat wunu kuca! kat wunu kuca! Kur igudwa wunu!” Gin doŋ te riŋo gigi oko, ote bedo wot atata i akina orok. I akina orok kuno jo doŋ te bedo kobo ni, “Mom dok obino bedo karacel kedwa kan kadi acel.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Rwot i kome en okeketogi atata, mom dok bino paro pirgi; mom onyuto woro moro baŋ olamdog odoŋe a lwak mom daŋ opwoogi." 
Lamentations4:17 Obedo ciko waŋwa nononono, kun mom tye jo moro ame romo konyowa. Obedo ciko waŋwa kun okuro rok, ame mom romo gire larowa." 
Lamentations4:18 Okworwa bedo wopo yorwa i kabedo luŋ omio mom dok oromo wot kannaler i dye yowa, agikkiwa doŋ ceggi acega, nino me kwowa doŋ okwano oko, pien kare me gikwa doŋ oromo oko," 
Lamentations4:19 Oryem yorwa dwir doŋ atek, akato acut ame twarre malo i polo, oryemowa naka i wi kiddi-gu, opono me kiyowa i dye tim ata," 
Lamentations4:20 Abaka ame Rwot oyero, ame pire onwoŋo littiwa calo kwowa, gin omako oko calo lee ame opoto i bur, en ŋat ame wan rik okobo pire ni, bino gwokowa i akina orok." 
Lamentations4:21 Lel wunu ba, bed wunu i yomcuny, wunjo Edom, wun jo ame bedo i lobo me Uji; cite ikopo me can daŋ bino beo baŋwa, ibino mer wunu kede ite cako gonyo boŋŋi i komwu oko." 
Lamentations4:22 Wun jo me Cion we, can ame oketo i komwu pi balwu doŋ ocobere oko, Rwot mom bino miyowu ibedo wunu atwal iyi opii. Ento wun jo me Edom, Rwot bino keto can daŋ i komwu pi balwu, en bino yaro balwu luŋ kannaler." 
Lamentations5:1 Ama Rwot, po ba i kom can ame opoto i komwa, lok waŋi me inen lewic ame otye kede." 
Lamentations5:2 Lobo ame rik oleo i baŋ kwariwa oloko doŋ odoko me a jo ocele, pacciwa doŋ odoko me orok." 
Lamentations5:3 Wan doŋ odoko itino kic ame papagi pe, kun totowa calo mon a coggi oto." 
Lamentations5:4 Nen pii ame omato-gu owilo awila, yen tedo daŋ owilo awila." 
Lamentations5:5 Oryemowa atek kun lodi-gu tye i ŋutwa, ool atek ame mom oromo miyowa kare moro me weo." 
Lamentations5:6 Ocikere i jo Miciri kede jo Acuria i ciŋwa, me wek onwoŋ cam me acama." 
Lamentations5:7 Kwariwa yam obalo, ote to daŋ oko, wan otye oneno can pi balgi." 
Lamentations5:8 Jo ame rom aroma opii en a doŋ loowa, ŋattoro ame twero larowa i ciŋgi mom tye." 
Lamentations5:9 Wan ojalo kwowa ka owot yenyo cam, pien okiowa akia i pala lweny." 
Lamentations5:10 Del komwa lyet kare luŋ calo keno tedo, pi lyeto me kec ame nekowa." 
Lamentations5:11 Omako mon tetek i Cion ote buto kedgi, kede anyira a mom ru oŋeye kede ico i boma me Juda." 
Lamentations5:12 Rwode doŋ otye ka guro i kom yat i ciŋgi, odoŋe a lwak mom doŋ oworo kadi acel." 
Lamentations5:13 Itino awobe doŋ odio tetek me rego kal, awobe woto ame ogate agata i yen apek ame oyeo i wi gwokgi." 
Lamentations5:14 Jo oteggo mom doŋ bedo i cokeregi i dog boma, awobe daŋ mom doŋ wero kadi acel." 
Lamentations5:15 Yomcunywa doŋ ogik gire oko, myelwa olokere odoko kumo." 
Lamentations5:16 Tok kwogo opoto piny i wiwa, bal omiowa oneno can nadi!" 
Lamentations5:17 Mannono omio cunywa ojebere oko, omio waŋwa doŋ ocido oko." 
Lamentations5:18 Pien kidi me Cion odoŋ nono, ekwe en ame doŋ bebea iye." 
Lamentations5:19 Ama Rwot, locci gire bedo nakanaka, kom kwogoni perakino waŋ i waŋ pi jo me kare luŋ." 
Lamentations5:20 Piŋo wii owil oko i komwa atwal, kara piŋo iwekowa ata pi kare a rom man twal?" 
Lamentations5:21 Dwogowa doŋ baŋi ba, Ama Rwot. Roc karewa-ni bed anyen me odwog bani kite a rik tye kede con!" 
Lamentations5:22 Doŋ ikwerowa oko atwal bo? Akemo doŋ omaki i komwa ame mom doŋ romo kwe bo? 
Ezekiel1:1 I nino dwe abic me dwe me aŋwen me mwaka pyeradek nono, onwoŋo an atye abedo i akina Ojudaya ame tye iyi opii i ŋet kulo me Cebar, i Babulon. Rik ate neno polo oyabere, ate neno gin ame Obaŋa onyutta." 
Ezekiel1:2 Mannono onwoŋo nino dwe abic me dwe me aŋwennono, me mwaka me abic, cakere i kare ame rik otero iye abaka Yekoyakin iyi opii." 
Ezekiel1:3 Rwot rik te kop keda an Ejekeri, ame rik an abedo alamdoggere, wot Abuji i lobo a jo Kaldaya, i ŋet kulo me Cebar, i kare-naca rik ate winyo teko a Rwot obino i koma." 
Ezekiel1:4 I kare ame atiŋo waŋa malo, nen ba, rik ate neno yamo kot ame akodo atek meicel kun bino i tutuŋ anyarodi, kot daŋ onwoŋo tye amemenya meicel kun pol obino adwoŋ meicel, kun mac ameny ipilpil tye anen tere tere, dok ginnoro iye tye aryeny calo mola." 
Ezekiel1:5 I akina pol, ate neno iye gigi mogo ame nen calo leyi aŋwen, Leyi-nono onwoŋo nen calo dano," 
Ezekiel1:6 ento acel acel i akinagi onwoŋo tye kede nyime aŋwen, kede bwome daŋ aŋwen." 
Ezekiel1:7 Tyengi onwoŋo ocuŋ atira, kun yi tyengi ame nyono piny calo me a roa. Leyi-nono onwoŋo komgi papara meicel calo kom mola ame ojwao." 
Ezekiel1:8 I te bwomgi aŋwen luŋ onwoŋo tye iye ciŋgi ame calo ciŋ dano, Leyi aŋwennono onwoŋo tye kede nyimgi kede bwomgi ame calo kit man:" 
Ezekiel1:9 Bwom le acel acel onwoŋo ogudo me awottere, ka onwoŋo owot, owoto atira kun mom otwero lokere kadi acel." 
Ezekiel1:10 Aco cal nyimgi, onwoŋo kom rom aroma i me a dano ka ineno i tutuŋ nyime, nyimgi ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ cem onwoŋo calo me eŋatu, nyimgi ame tye tutuŋ cam, onwoŋo calo me a twon, eka nyimgi ame tye tutuŋ ŋegi, te calli me a Cur." 
Ezekiel1:11 Mannono en kite ame nyimgi onwoŋo nen kede, Bwomgi onwoŋo tye ame oyarre ayara, i akina bwomgi aŋwennono, aryo iye onwoŋo tye ame ogudo awottere tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, eka bwomgi aryo ocele te yarre wumo komgi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Ŋat acel acel i akinagi onwoŋo woto atira, kun cuny ame telogi terogi iye kun mom olokere kadi acel." 
Ezekiel1:13 I akina leyi-nono, onwoŋo tye iye ginnoro ame nen calo mac ame alyel, calo mac rao ame awire tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, i akina leyi-nono, Maccere onwoŋo tye alyel acil meicel, dok i akina maccono onwoŋo lutkot daŋ tye ameny iye." 
Ezekiel1:14 Leyi aŋwennono, onwoŋo tye apyepyea tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi calo lutkot ame amennyono." 
Ezekiel1:15 I kare ame onwoŋo atye aneno leyi aŋwennono, ate daŋ neno okot ame tye piny i lobo i ŋet leyi aŋwennono, kun okot acel acel tye i ŋet leyi aŋwennono," 
Ezekiel1:16 Kite ame otio kede okottono, kede kite onwoŋo nen kede onwoŋo tye kit man: Gin aŋwennono luŋ onwoŋo tye cacal, kun acel acel i akinagi onwoŋo memenya calo gweŋ alilia, dok otiogi acalo okot ame tye iyi okot wadgi." 
Ezekiel1:17 Gin okot aŋwennono luŋ ka owot, owoto tuŋŋoro keken ame gin okemo kabedo aŋwen luŋ, kun owoto atira ame mom romo lokere tuŋŋoro ocele." 
Ezekiel1:18 I kom okot aŋwennono, onwoŋo tye iye kan ame otutuca calo waŋgi, kun oromo kom okot luŋ irit, dok daŋ tire mere onwoŋo tye." 
Ezekiel1:19 Doŋ ka leyi aŋwen-ca tye awot, okot aŋwennono daŋ woto i ŋegi. Ka leyi aŋwen-ca oya oko i lobo, okot daŋ woto i ŋetgi." 
Ezekiel1:20 Gin luŋ owoto kun ame cuny omito ni gin owot iye, kun okot daŋ ya woto kedgi, pien cuny ame telo leyi aŋwennono onwoŋo tye i kom okot aŋwennono." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ka leyi aŋwen-ca owoto, okot daŋ woto, ka gin ocuŋ okot daŋ cuŋ, ka gin oya i lobo, okot daŋ tiŋere malo ya karacel kedgi, pien cuny ame telo leyi aŋwen-ca onwoŋo tye i kom okot." 
Ezekiel1:22 Tutuŋ wi leyi aŋwennono malo, onwoŋo tye iye ginnogo ame opette, ame memenya calo gweŋ amimila, ame oyarre i wigi malo." 
Ezekiel1:23 I te gin opettenono, bwomgi onwoŋo tye oyarre iye atira, kun man tikere owadgi. Lee acel acel onwoŋo tye kede bwome aryo ame owumo kome." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ka gin tye awot, awinyo kite ame bwomgi tye awoo kede, kun calo pii ame tye amol atek. Winyere calo twon mony adwoŋ meicel ame aciro, onyo calo dwon Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu. Ka ce gin ocuŋ odolo bwomgi," 
Ezekiel1:25 dwonnoro te bino i ŋe gin ame opette ame tye i wi leyi aŋwennono, i kare ame gin ocuŋ mot, gin te dwoko bwomgi oko piny." 
Ezekiel1:26 I wi gin opette-malo-nono, i wi leyi aŋwen-ca, ginnoro onwoŋo tye iye calli i kom loc ame nen bululubululu calo capir, ginnoro onwoŋo tye ame obedo i wie, ame cal acala i dano." 
Ezekiel1:27 Cakere i pyere dok kede malo, aneno ginnoro ame tye amimila calo mola, calo mac ame omano kome luŋ, aco cakere i pyere dok kede piny, ate neno ginnoro acalo mac, kun amemenya i kabedo luŋ i ŋete kuno." 
Ezekiel1:28 Raŋi apapat onwoŋo tye anen i kom gin ame amennyono ame calo etaloka ame nen i polo ka kot obino, Mannono kite ame kwogo Obaŋa onen kede baŋa. Kare ame aneno, arette piny aryeba cuny, ate winyo dwonnoro ame tye akop." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ate winyo dwon ame kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, ya malo icuŋ i tyeni, me wek akob kedi.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 I kare ame en okobo keda, cuny a Rwot te poto oko i koma, te miya cuŋ kede tyena; ate winyo en medde i kop keda." 
Ezekiel2:3 En te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, an acwayi baŋ jo Icrael, ame gin obedo jo ame ojem i koma, gin karacel kede kwarigi otyeko timo bal i koma tuno kede naka i kare-ni." 
Ezekiel2:4 Dok gin obedo rok ame opala, ame otimo jami ducu opala opala, an acwayi baŋgi, yin ibino wot kobbigi ni, Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni," 
Ezekiel2:5 ‘Kadi bed gin obino winyo onyo obino kwero winyo, pien gin obedo jo ame jem, cite gin obino ŋeyo ni adwarpiny rik obedo tye i akinagi.’" 
Ezekiel2:6 Doŋ yin ba, wot a dano, myero kur ilworgi, kur daŋ ilwor kop ame gin kobo, kadi bed ocokocok kede okuto tye baŋi dok daŋ ibino bedo i wi yit; kur ilwor kopgi, cunyi daŋ kur poti kite ame gin neno kede, pien gin obedo jo a jem." 
Ezekiel2:7 Yin ibino kobo koppa baŋgi, kadi bed obino winyo onyo obino kwero winyo; pien gin obedo jo ame jem." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Ento yin wot a dano we, myero iwiny kop ame an akobbi, kur yin daŋ ibed ŋat a jem bala gin. Ŋam dogi icam gin ame ami.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Kare ame atino waŋa aneno malo, nen ba, aneno ciŋ ame oryeo baŋa, buk adola onwoŋo tye i ciŋ ame oryeo-nono." 
Ezekiel2:10 Dano-nono te yabo bukkono i nyima, bukkono onwoŋo ocoo yie kede ŋec, kop ame onwoŋo ocoo iye onwoŋo kop me kumo, kede kop me koko kede can." 
Ezekiel3:1 Obaŋa te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, ŋam dogi icam gin ame omii; cam buk adola-ni ite wot, iwot ikob kop iye baŋ jo me ot Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Mannone te miya ŋamo doga, en te keto iye buk adola-nono ni myero acami." 
Ezekiel3:3 En te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, cam buk adola-ni ame amio baŋi me iyeŋ kede.” An daŋ ate camo oko, te bedo alim meicel i doga calo moo kic." 
Ezekiel3:4 Obaŋa dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, woti, wot naka i ot a jo Icrael, me iwot ikob koppa baŋgi." 
Ezekiel3:5 Pien mom acwai baŋ rok ame lebgi pat onyo ame kobo tek, ento baŋ jo me ot Icrael." 
Ezekiel3:6 Mom acwai baŋ lwak jo apol ame rokgi papat ame kobo leb apapat, dok ame lebgi tek, ame yin mom iromo niaŋ i lebgi. Ateteni, kono onwoŋo acwai baŋ kodi jo-nono, kono gin owinyo koppi." 
Ezekiel3:7 Cite jo me ot Icrael mom bino winyo koppi; pien gin mom oye winyo koppa, pien jo luŋ me ot Icrael, wiigi tek meicel dok gin opala meicel i cunygi." 
Ezekiel3:8 Nen ba, an abino miyo nyimi bedo atek meicel me twomo nyimgi, dok daŋ tur nyimi bino bedo atek me twomo tur nyimgi." 
Ezekiel3:9 Abino miyo tur nyimi bedo atek meicel ame kato lela oko; myero kur ilworgi, cunyi daŋ kur pot ka ineno jo ame maro jem-mu.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 En dok te medo kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, myero igam kop luŋ ame abino kobbi i cunyi ducu, dok daŋ iketto cunyi me winyo." 
Ezekiel3:11 Wot naka baŋ jo ame tye iyi opii ame gin obedo joni, ite wot kobbigi ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni’; kadi bed gin owinyo onyo okwero winyo.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Cuny Obaŋa rik te tiŋa oko malo, ate winyo dwonnoro ame awinyere i ŋea, ame redo calo oyeyeŋ, kun oredoni, “Pak wunu kwogo a Rwot malo i polo.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Mannono onwoŋo dwon okot ame onwoŋo tye i ŋetgi ame onwoŋo tye awinyere aloŋo meicel calo oyeyeŋnono. 
Ezekiel3:14 Cuny Obaŋa te tiŋa oko malo te tera oko teŋe, awoto ame akemo ocira oko, kun teko a Rwot tye ame owuma oko." 
Ezekiel3:15 Awoto kan ame opii onwoŋo tye iye i Tel-abib, ame onwoŋo bedo i ŋet kulo me Kebar. Ate bedo kunno pi nino aŋwen, kun gin ame onwoŋo aneno olo tekona oko." 
Ezekiel3:16 I kare ame nino abiro doŋ otum oko, Rwot te kop keda." 
Ezekiel3:17 En te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, an atyeko keti me bedo akur-piny pi jo me ot Icrael; kare luŋ ka ibino winyo kop ame akobbi, yin ibino kwenyorogi," 
Ezekiel3:18 ka ce akobo kop baŋ otim tim areco ni, ‘Ibino to gire,’ ka ce yin mom ikwenyoro danonono, akadi kobo kopporo me kwenyoro dano-nono i kom gin arac ame en tye atimo, me wek en lar kwo mere, dano araccono bino to pi ballere; cite bal me remo mere bino bedo i wii." 
Ezekiel3:19 Cite ka yin ikwenyoro ŋat ame timo tim araccono, ento en mom te ye weko timmere araccono onyo i yo arac ame onwoŋo en tye alubo, en bino to pi ballere, cite yin ibino laro kwoni." 
Ezekiel3:20 Kite acellono, ka ce ŋattoro a kite atira oweko kite atira oko, eka te timo bal, an ate keto gin ame mie egate i nyime, en bino to, pien yin mom ikwenyoro en, en bino to pi ballere, ento kite mere atira, ame onwoŋo en obedo bedo kede con, mom obino pwoye kadi acel. Bal me remo mere bino bedo i wii." 
Ezekiel3:21 Aco ka yin ikwenyoro ŋat a kite atira me mom timo bal, eka mom te timo balloro, en gire bino bedo kwo, pien en owinyo akwenyakin ame yin ikwennyoro en kede; yin daŋ ibino laro kwoni.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Teko a Rwot onwoŋo tye i koma kuno, en te kobba ni, “Ya iwot i bar, an abino kop kedi kuno.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 An ate ya wot naka i bar; nen ba, ate nwoŋo kwogo Obaŋa tye kuno, ame rom aroma kede kwogo ame aneno i kulo me Kebar. An ate rette piny," 
Ezekiel3:24 cite cuny Obaŋa te donyo i koma, te maka oko, te miya ya malo cuŋ acuŋsssa, Rwot te kop keda kun kobo ni, “Wot icegere iyi odi." 
Ezekiel3:25 Doŋ yin wot a dano, en obino tweye oko kede tol, ame mom dok ibino romo wot i akina jo ocele." 
Ezekiel3:26 Abino miyo lebi moko oko i dani, ame bino miyo ibedo ŋat ame mom loko, a mom romo juko ŋattoro, pien gin obedo jo a jem." 
Ezekiel3:27 Cite i kare ame an abino kop kedi, abino miyo te lebi gony ite cako kop, eka ite kobbigi ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni’, kadi gin obino winyo onyo obino kwero winyo, pien gin obedo jo ame jem.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 Obaŋa okobba ni, “Yin wot a dano, kwany matafali, ite keto i nyimi, ite goyo cal boma me Jerucalem iye." 
Ezekiel4:2 Tor lobo igur dyere, i te cweyo cel guro matafali nono oko, ite toro lobo yido i nyimi, dok icwe daŋ cal gony omony, ket daŋ yen me tuco kor apama cel man luŋ." 
Ezekiel4:3 Kwany nyonyo apada ite keto acalo apama ame ogero i nyonyo i akina yin kede cal boma ame igo-nono, ite cuŋ kun nyimi oneno kuno; mi bed calo boma ame mony doŋ oguro oko, kun yin itye acalo ŋat ame oguro boma-nono. Man en ame bino cimmi jo Icrael gin ame bino timere i komgi." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Yin doŋ but piny i ciŋi me tutuŋ cem, an abino keto i komi can ame onwoŋo myero aket i kom jo Icrael; pi nino mia acel i pyeraboŋwen." 
Ezekiel4:5 Pien yin ibino yeyo can a jo Icrael i kare ame nwoŋo ibuto pinnyono, pien mannono en nino ame doŋ atyeko moko piri, ame rom aroma kede mwakki me keto can i komgi." 
Ezekiel4:6 Kare ame doŋ ityeko nino ame akobo, dok ibino buto piny tyen me aryo mere, cite man doŋ ibino buto i ciŋi tutuŋ cam, kun iyeo can a jo Juda, ibino buto kittono pi nino pyeraŋwen ame doŋ atyeko moko piri, ame nino acel acel rom aroma i mwaka acel acel." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ibino loko nyimi neno tutuŋ boma me Jerucalem ame mony doŋ otyeko turo, kun badi tye nono. Ibino rabo kop i kom boma-nono." 
Ezekiel4:8 Nen ba, abino tweyi oko kede tol ame mom iromo lokere kadi acel tuŋ ocele, tuno ka ityeko kare ame amoko me guro boma." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Kwany ŋano kede cayiri, oraŋa kede ŋor, kal karacel kede bel, pikgi luŋ i gulu acel, ite tedo acalo ogati. I kare ame ibino buto piny ibino buto kun ibuto i laŋeti, kare mere bino bedo ame romo nino mia adek i pyeraboŋwen, yin ibino bedo camo ogatinono." 
Ezekiel4:10 Cem ame yin ibino camo, obino pimo apima, ibino camo cam ame pekkere romo nucu ratili keken nino acel acel kun daŋ icemo icel keken nino acel." 
Ezekiel4:11 Pii ame yin ibino mato daŋ obino pimo apima. Ibino mato pii aduno, ame romo kopo aryo keken i nino acel acel, kun daŋ imato icel keken nina acel." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ibino camo calo ogati ame otedo i cayiri, kun icelo i nyimgi i kom cet a dano.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Rwot te kobo kop ni, “Mannono en kite ame rok me Icrael bino camo kede ogati a mom cil, i akina rok ocele ame abino ryemogi terogi iye.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 An ate gamo ni, pe amannono, Rwot Obaŋa! Nen ba, an anaka mom ru alille i ginnoro kadi acel. Cakere ame pwod atidi, mom ru acamo ginnoro ame oto kene, onyo ame lee tim oneko, riŋo moro me kwer daŋ mom ru otuno i doga." 
Ezekiel4:15 Rwot te kobba ni, “Nen ba, an abino miyi woo dyaŋ akaka cet a dano, en ame yin ibino tedo kede ogatini.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Medo i mannono, Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Nen ba wot a dano, abino miyo ogati rwenyo oko i Jerucalem. Jo me Jerucalem bino camo ogati ame opimo apima, dok obino camo lworo lworo; obino daŋ mato pii ame opimo apima, kun daŋ omato ame cunygi apoto apota." 
Ezekiel4:17 Abinsso timo man me wek ogati kede pii rweny oko i baŋgi, ŋat acel acel te cako ŋweco awottere ame cunye apoto apota, tekogi te tum oko pi balgi." 
Ezekiel5:1 “Yin wot a dano we, kwany pala lweny abit meicel, ti kede acalo lyedi, ilyel i wii kede tiki oko; dok ikwany mijan me pimo jami, ite popoko yer wii oko." 
Ezekiel5:2 Acel me adek me yerrono ibino waŋo i mac i dye boma, ka kare me guro boma doŋ otum; acel me adek me yerrono, ibino tero oko i ŋe boma, ite wot gogoa kede pala me romo; acel me adek me yerrono, ite keketo miyo yamo kolo oko, an abino ryemo yorgi i pala me romo." 
Ezekiel5:3 Kwany yer aduno, i te tweyo i lak boŋoni ame iruko." 
Ezekiel5:4 I kom yer aduno ame ikwanyo-nono, ibino tero mogo iye ite wot bolo i mac ite miyo waŋ oko, eka mac te ya i kom maccono te wot waŋo jo me ot Icrael luŋ." 
Ezekiel5:5 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Man en Jerucalem, an atyeko kete i dyere a rok apapat, kun lobo ocele ogure dyere." 
Ezekiel5:6 Cite en otimo tim me jem i koma, kun kwero winyo cikka, ame kato rok ocele mege, okwero daŋ gwoko icwilla ame kato lobo ocele ame ogure dyere, Jerucalem okwero gwoko icwilla karacel kede cikka." 
Ezekiel5:7 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Pien ibedo wunu tagere meicel ame kato rok ocele luŋ ame ogurowu dyere, kun mom igwoko wunu icwilla kadi lubo gin ame aciko, ento ibedo timo wunu gin ame rok ocele ame ogurowu dyere ociko ni itim wunu;" 
Ezekiel5:8 mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Nen ba, akadi an ikoma cunya doŋ mom mitowu, abino ŋolo kop i akinawu, kun rok ocele mege-ni neno kede waŋgi." 
Ezekiel5:9 Dok daŋ pi tim luŋ me kwer ame ibedo timo wunu, abino timo i komwu gin arac ame yam mom ru atimo, dok ame mom dok abino medo timo." 
Ezekiel5:10 Pi mannono ba, odoŋe bino camo awobegi, kun awobe daŋ camo odoŋegi i akinawu. Abino ŋolo kop i komwu, doŋ ŋattoro keken i akinawu ame bino doŋ, abino miyo yamo kolo tero oko teŋe." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Doŋ pi mannono, kite acalo an abedo Obaŋa ame kwo, pien wun ibala wunu oda acil, kun itimo wunu iye timmogo areco kede timmogo luŋ me kwer, abino toŋowu aretowu piny aboŋo kica." 
Ezekiel5:12 Acel me adek i akinawu too edeke en ame bino neko, karacel kede kec, kun gin luŋ oto i akinawu, acel me adek i akinawu obino neko aneka i pala lweny ame tye i ŋetwu, eka acel me adek i komwu, abino miyo yamo kologi terogi teŋe, an dok ate woto pala me romona ryemo kede yorgi." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Ibino kako wunu akemona meicel, tuno waŋ ame an doŋ aneno ni oromo. Kare ame man luŋ doŋ otyeko timere, ibino doŋ ye wunu ni an a Rwot, ame rik akobo kedwu akemo i kare ame onwoŋo wun mom igena wunu." 
Ezekiel5:14 Medo i kom mannono, abino miyo Jerucalem doko wi obur, kun bedo gin ame oyeto i akina orok ame ogurowu dyere, kede i akina jo luŋ ame bedo i ŋetwu." 
Ezekiel5:15 Ibino bedo wunu gin ame jo cao dok oyeto, gin ame mio jo lworo dok ame kwenyoro jo, i akina rok luŋ ame ogurowu dyere, i kare ame abino ŋolliwu kop i twon akemo kede iniga, kun agoowu alit meicel. An Rwot en ame akobo-nono." 
Ezekiel5:16 Abino miyo cam rwenyo oko i baŋwu, kec te nekowu meicel, mannono abino timo me wek ajwerwu oko. Dok abino cwayo kec i komwu tere i tere, ate miyo cam rwenyo oko i baŋwu atwal." 
Ezekiel5:17 Abino miyo kec kede leyi me tim bino i komwu me bino nekowu, ame bino neko itinowu oko. Too edeke, kede onyo remo bino beo iyi akinawu, dok daŋ abino cwayo pala romo me nekowu. Man kop ame an Rwot akobo.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Wot a dano we, lok nyimi inen tutuŋ kun ame kiddi me Icrael tye iye, me ite rabo kop i komgi." 
Ezekiel6:3 Rab kop i komgi ni, Wun kiddi me Icrael, winy wunu kop a Rwot Obaŋa! Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop i komwu wun kiddi kede lobo obedo kidikidi, kulli kede luŋ. En okobo ni, Nen wunu ba, an ikoma abino kelo pala lweny i komwu, abino babalo kabedo luŋ me woro jogi ame tye i wi kiddi malo." 
Ezekiel6:4 Abino mumuko keno lamwu wie te doŋ nono, kede keno lamwu me waŋo odok akur obino daŋ tuturo oko; jo ame bedo kuno, bino totoa oko i ŋet cal jogigi." 
Ezekiel6:5 Abino miyo kom jo Icrael ame oto bu buta piny i nyim cal jogigi, ate keketo cogo komwu i ŋet keno lamwu luŋ." 
Ezekiel6:6 I kabedo luŋ ame ibedo wunu iye, bomawu luŋ bino doŋ yigi nono, ka woro jogiwu ame tye i wi kiddi malo daŋ obino balo oko. Mannono bino miyo keno lamwu luŋ doŋ nono kun daŋ obalo oko, cal jogiwu obino tuturo oko ducu, keno lam me waŋo odok akur luŋ obino reto oko piny, dok ginnoro luŋ ame itio wunu obino jwero oko ducu." 
Ezekiel6:7 Jo ame oto bino rette piny i akinawu, mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Kadi bed amannono abino weko jo mogo i akinawu doŋ akwo. Jo ame odoŋ bino keketa i akina orok, i lobo apapat," 
Ezekiel6:9 kan ame obino bedo iye acalo opii. I kare ame gin tye kuno, gin bino po i koma, ote niaŋ ni an aketo can i komgi me miyogi lewic, pien gin okwero genna oko ote lunyo geno cal jogi. Gin obino doko twon ginnoro arac meicel, akadi ka gin onenne kengi, pi timmogo areco ame gin obedo timo, kede pi tim luŋ me kwer ame gin obedo timo." 
Ezekiel6:10 Pien i kare-naca gin obino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot; dok daŋ ni kop ame akobo ni abino keto can i komgi mom akobo nono nono.” 
Ezekiel6:11 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Bap wunu korwu, dok ibap wunu tyenwu daŋ piny, ite kobo wunu ni, Oi doi! Pi timmogo me kwer areco meicel ame jo me ot Icrael obedo timo; pien nen obino nekogi oko i pala lweny dok kec kede too edeke daŋ bino nekogi." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ŋat a tye kannabor to edeke en abino neko; ŋat ame tye kan aceggi obino neko aneka i pala lweny; ŋat ame odoŋ kec en ame bino neko. Mannono en kite ame abino luŋo kede inigana i komgi. 
Ezekiel6:13 Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot, i kare ame jogi ototoa tye obubuta piny i ŋet cal jogi, ame tye i ŋet keno lamgi, i kabedo luŋ obedo kidikidi, kede i wi kidi luŋ, i te yen luŋ ame obuŋere, i te kworo luŋ ame obuŋere, i kabedo luŋ ame gin oyalo iye cal jogigi, i mottogo ame nwecgi kur." 
Ezekiel6:14 Abino ryeyo ciŋa me lweny i komgi, ate miyo lobogi doko wi obur ame ŋattoro mom iye, i kabedo luŋ ame onwoŋo gin bedo iye, cakere i tim tuno naka i Ribla. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobba ni," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Wot a dano we, Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop i kom lobo me Icrael ni: Agikki doŋ ceggi! Agikki doŋ otuno oko, i kabedo luŋ i lobowu." 
Ezekiel7:3 Agikki doŋ otuno oko, i komwu, abino doŋ weko akemona tuno oko i komwu, te cako ŋolliwu kop kun lubo gin ame itimo wunu. Abino keto can i komwu pi ginnoro luŋ me kwer ame itimo wunu." 
Ezekiel7:4 Mom abino koyawu kadi acel, dok mom abino bedo i kica moro i komwu, ento abino keto can i komwu pi gin ame ibedo wunu timo, kun timwu me kwer tye i akinawu. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Abino miyo can bino i komwu kun lubere aluba! Nen ba, ocako doŋ bino oko." 
Ezekiel7:6 Agikki doŋ obino oko, agikki doŋ obino oko; otwarre doŋ oko i komwu. Koŋ inen doŋ tye abino."
