Ezekiel7:7 Can doŋ obino oko i komwu wun jo ame bedo i lobo-ni. Kare doŋ obino oko, nino mere doŋ ceggi acega, i nino ame woo me yomcuny mom dok bino bedo iye i wi kiddi, kono ka wo me lweny keken." 
Ezekiel7:8 Aman doŋ aceggi coro akemona i komwu, ate luŋo akemona i komwu luŋ, kun aŋolliwu kop ame poro gin ame itimo wunu. Abino keto can i komwu pi tim me kwer luŋ ame ibedo timo wunu." 
Ezekiel7:9 Mom abino koyowu kadi acel, dok daŋ kica mom bino maka i komwu. Abino keto can i komwu ame oporo kitewu, kun timwu me kwer tye i akinawu. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot ame ogoowu." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Nen ba, nino me can tye abino! Koŋ inen tye doŋ abino, can doŋ obino oko i komwu. Ŋolokop atira doŋ otuno oko, awaka doŋ dwoŋ meicel." 
Ezekiel7:11 Tim me kolo doŋ odoŋo atekate ka, odoko doŋ abiro me gin arac. Dano moro mom bino doŋ i akinagi kadi acel, naka lwak jami abup ame tye i ciŋgi, kede lonyogi, gin luŋ obino timogi arorom." 
Ezekiel7:12 Kare doŋ obino oko, nino mere doŋ ceggi acega. Owil wil myero kur leli, acat jami daŋ myero kur kumi, pien akemo a Rwot agudo lwak luŋ aluŋa." 
Ezekiel7:13 Pien acat jami mom bino dok i gin a doŋ etyeko cato, kun en pwod tye kwo. Akemo doŋ ogudo lwakgi luŋ, mom dok bino dok cen kadi acel, dok pi balgi, ŋattoro mom bino bedo kwo.”" 
Ezekiel7:14 Dano moro doŋ otyeko kuto apel oko, omio jo luŋ doŋ tye ame oterre oko, cite mom tye ŋattoro i akinagi ame bino wot i lweny, pien akemona bino gudo lwak luŋ." 
Ezekiel7:15 Lweny tye naka i dye gudo, too edeke, kede kec tye i udi luŋ. Jo ame tye i potti bino to i lweny, jo ame odoŋ i boma, kec kede too edeke en ame bino neko." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ka ce jo mogo obwot te lwi oko, gin bino bedo i wi kiddi malo, calo awele ame bedo i luŋ, gin luŋ obino kumo, kun ŋat acel acel kumo pi ballere." 
Ezekiel7:17 Jo luŋ ciŋgi bino doko agoro oko, kun coŋgi doŋ tye amyel amyela," 
Ezekiel7:18 Obino rukoboŋo kwero cola, kun lworo ocirogi oko. Lewic bino mako dano acel acel i akinagi, kun jo luŋ olyelo wigi oko." 
Ezekiel7:19 Dano acel acel bino bolo ryallere oko i dye gudo, jabugi bino doko acalo gin ame yigi okwero. Ryalgi karacel kede jabugi mom bino larogi kadi acel, iyi akemo a Rwot. Mom otwero camo kadi acel, dok daŋ mom twero miyogi oyeŋ. Pien jabu kede ryal en ame obedo miyogi poto i bal." 
Ezekiel7:20 Rik obedo wakere wakere a konygi mom, pi rukgi abeco. Gin te bedo tiyo cal jogi ame obedo me kwer, kede gigi mogo ame okwero i rukgi-nono. Mannono en omio abino miyo lonyogi doko gin ame yigi okwero." 
Ezekiel7:21 Abino miyo orok yako oko, karacel kede otim tim areco, eka ote babalo oko." 
Ezekiel7:22 An gira mom abino paro kadi acel i kare ame orok tye abalo ot me wora, i kare ame oyak tye aturo oda kun obalo." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Lobogi bino doko wi obur, pien lobo doŋ opoŋ i tim me onyo remo, tim me byemi daŋ doŋ dwoŋ meicel i boma." 
Ezekiel7:24 Abino kelo rokkogo areco meicel ate miyogi gamo udiwu oko. Teko a jo atek bino rwenyo oko, i kare ame abino miyo orokkogo, bino me bino balo kan ame iwora wunu iye." 
Ezekiel7:25 Kare ame cunygi doŋ odoko goro, jo bino koko kuc, cite mom bino nen kadi acel." 
Ezekiel7:26 Can bino bedo lubere aluba, kun amuttogo areco daŋ winyere tere i tere. Ibino wot wunu baŋ odwarpiny pi winyo gin ame Obaŋa onyuttigi, ento olamdog mom bino bedo kede cikkoro ame myero opwony kede lwak, kun odoŋe a lwak daŋ mom romo miyo tammoro kadi acel." 
Ezekiel7:27 Abaka bino kumo, koyo bino onyere oko i kom rwode, kun jo luŋ komgi myel amyela pi lworo, Abino keto can i komgi kun lubere i gin ame gin obedo timo, kun daŋ aŋolligi kop kite ame gin obedo ŋolli jo ocele kop. Mannono bino miyogi oŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 I nino dwe abic me dwe me abicel, me mwaka me abicel ame wan obedo kede iyi opii, odoŋe ame telo lwak ame onwoŋo tye iyi opii oya i Juda, onwoŋo tye obedo karacel kede i oda, oyotoyot teko a Rwot te bino poto i koma i caa-nono." 
Ezekiel8:2 Nen ba, atiŋo waŋa malo, ate neno ginnoro ame cal kede dano, cakere i pyere dok piny onwoŋo meny calo mac, eka cakere i pyere wot kede malo, nen calo mac amimila, cal mola." 
Ezekiel8:3 An ate neno cal ciŋ dano ame en ocwao baŋa te mako yer wia, Cuny Obaŋa te tiŋa malo, te wot keda naka i akina lobo kede polo. I kare ame atye kuno, Obaŋa te nyutta cal Jerucalem, kun atye i dogcel ame donyo i dyekal i dyere, ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, kan ame onwoŋo oketo iye cal jok ame onwoŋo mio nyeko mako Obaŋa meicel." 
Ezekiel8:4 Nen ba, kwogo Obaŋa me Icrael onwoŋo tye kuno, ame rom aroma i gin ame onyutta i dye bar." 
Ezekiel8:5 Obaŋa te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, koŋ itiŋ waŋi malo inen tutuŋ nayarodi.” An daŋ ate tino waŋa malo tutuŋ anyarodi, ate neno cal jokkoro ame mio nyeko mako Obaŋa tye i ŋet keno me lam ame tye i dogcel me donyo i boma." 
Ezekiel8:6 Obaŋa dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, ineno gin ame jo tye ka timo, twon timmoro me kwer adwoŋ meicel ame jo Icrael tye atimo kan, me ryemma oko cwalla teŋe kannacil? Cite pwod dok ibino medde neno twon timmogo me kwer ame doŋodoŋo meicel kato man oko.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Obaŋa dok te tera i doggola me dyekal. I kare ame abedo ŋiyo kunu, ate neno bur ame otuco i kor apama ot." 
Ezekiel8:8 En te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, koŋ imuk kor apama-nu.” Kare ame amumuko kor apama-nono, anwoŋo doggola tye iye." 
Ezekiel8:9 En dok te kobba ni, “Koŋ idony kunu iwot inen timmogo me kwer ame gin tye ka ti mo kan.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 An daŋ ate donyo, ate neno gin ame tye kuno, ate nwoŋo cal apapat tye ogoo i kor apama kunu, ame oromo kor apama luŋ. Cal i kor apama-nono onwoŋo tye iye cal twole apapat kede leyi mogo ame okwero, kede cal jogi mogo ame rik jo Icrael woro." 
Ezekiel8:11 Dok ate nwoŋo kuno odoŋe a jo Icrael ame romo pyerabiro kun cuŋ i nyim cal jogi-nono. Jajania wot a Capan onwoŋo daŋ tye ocuŋ i akinagi kunu. Ŋat acel acel i akinagi onwoŋo omako tako me waŋo gin a ŋwece kur i ciŋe, kun yito me odok akur ame gin awaŋo-nono tye aduny awikino malo calo pol." 
Ezekiel8:12 Obaŋa dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, ineno gin ame odoŋe a jo Icrael tye ka timo i muŋ kannacol kan? Gin luŋ ŋat acel acel tye ka woro jogi iyi icika ame cal jogi apapat tye iye. Gin otye ka kop kengi kengi ni, Rwot gire mom nenowa, cuny Rwot doŋ otyeko cayo lobo man oko.”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Pwod dok ibino medde neno twoni timmogo me kwer areco meicel akato man ame gin tye ka timo.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Rwot dok te kela i dog cel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi me ot a Rwot, ate nwoŋo mon ame akoko tye obedo kunu, kun okoko jok ame olwoŋo ni Tamuj." 
Ezekiel8:15 Rwot te penya ni, “Ityeko dok neno man, wot a dano? Pwod dok ibino medde neno twoni timmogo me kwer areco meicel akato man ame gin tye ka timo.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Rwot dok te terra i dyekal ame tye i ot a Rwot. Kunu ate neno jo ame mito romo pyeraryo wie abic, ame tye i ŋet doggola me ot a Rwot, iyi akina keno me lam kede kan ame odonyo kede i ot a Rwot. Gin jonono onwoŋo oloko ŋegi i ot a Rwot, kun nyimgi oneno tutuŋ kide, gin onwoŋo tye ka ryebere piny me woro ceŋ ame onwoŋo pwod tye adonyo adonya i tutuŋ kide." 
Ezekiel8:17 Rwot dok te penya ni, “Ineno dok man, wot a dano? Mom jo me ot a Juda neno ni timo kodi tim man yottigi ayota, gin te bedo timo tim me kwer kan, me miyo tim me byemi bedo adwoŋ meicel i lobo, kun oroka kede, omito ni akemo bed maka? Nen koŋ kite ame gin tye anywara kede atek okato kare." 
Ezekiel8:18 Mannono omio abino tic kedgi i twon akemo adwoŋ meicel, mom abino koyo ŋattoro kadi acel, dok kica daŋ mom bino maka i kom ŋattoro; kadi bed ored i twon koko moro aloŋo rom mene, mom abino ciko yita i komgi.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Icennere ate winyo dwon Obaŋa kun redo i dwon aloŋo ni, “Bye wunu aceggi, wun onek jo ame mito keto can i kom otim tim areco ame tye i boma man. Ŋat acel acel i akinawu myero kwany jami lwennyere, mak i ciŋe bin kede.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Nen ba, jo abicel te bino kun obino i tutuŋ dogcel, ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, kun ŋat acel acel omako jami lwennyere me neko jo i ciŋe, i akinagi, onwoŋo tye iye lo moro ame orukoboŋo camanini, kun omako ginnoro me coc i ciŋe. Gin luŋ ote donyo i dyekal me ot a Rwot ote wot cuŋ i ŋet keno lam me mola." 
Ezekiel9:3 I kare-nono onwoŋo kwogo Obaŋa a jo Icrael, ame ryeny atek wok-ki, oya oko i kom okerubi kan ame onwoŋo yam en bedo iye, kun woto cuŋ i doggola me ot a Rwot. Rwot te lwoŋo dano ame onwoŋo orukoboŋo camaninino no ame onwoŋo tye i ginnoro me coc i laŋete." 
Ezekiel9:4 Rwot te kobbe ni, “Wot ibe i dye boma me Jerucalem luŋ, me iwot iket alama i tur nyim dano acel acel ame tye kede cwer cuny, dok tye ka cucura i cunye pi timmogo me kwer ame otye ka timo i boma me Jerucalem.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Ate dok winyo Rwot Obaŋa kun tye ka kop i jo ocele mege, ni, “Wun daŋ wot ibebea wunu i boma ilub wunu yore, kun ineneko wunu jo. Kur iko wunu ŋattoro kadi acel, dok daŋ kur ibed wunu i kica moro i kom ŋattoro kadi acel." 
Ezekiel9:6 Nek wunu jo oti, awobe, anyira, mon kede itino atino, cite kur igud wunu ŋattoro ame otyeko keto alama i nyime. Wot icak ticwu-nono i kabedona acil.” Mannono omio gin te cako kede odoŋe ame onwoŋo tye i nyim ot a Rwot." 
Ezekiel9:7 Obaŋa dok te kobbigi ni, “Bal wunu ot me wora daŋ oko. Mi wunu kom jo oto rade aradi i dyekallere. Cak wunu doŋ wot oko.” Gin te cako wot, ote wot neko jo ame tye i boma." 
Ezekiel9:8 I kare ame gin tye ka neko jo kunu, an onwoŋo doŋ adoŋ kena. Arette piny aryeba cuny, ate redo i koko ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa we! Akemo doŋ omaki meicel i kom Jerucalem, omio imito ni inek jo Icrael luŋ ame odoŋ iye?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Obaŋa dok te gamo ni, “Bal ame jo me Icrael kede jo Juda otimo doŋ dwoŋ meicel. Remo a jo ame gin obedo neko, doŋ dwon meicel i lobo, dok daŋ otye ka balo ŋolo kop atira atek meicel i boma me Jerucalem, kun okobo ni, ‘Cuny Rwot doŋ ocao lobo man oko, dok Rwot daŋ mom dok neno ginnoro ame atimere iye.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Man omio an i tuŋ baŋa, mom doŋ abino koyo ŋattoro kadi acel, dok kica daŋ mom bino maka i komgi, abino culo kwor i komgi, i ginnoro luŋ ame yam gin otimo.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Dok ate ru neno lo moro ame orukoboŋo camanini, ame tye i ginnoro me coc i laŋete, kun dwoko kop baŋ Rwot ni, “Doŋ atyeko tiyo gin ame onwoŋo icika ni awot ati.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Dok ate neno ginnoro ame opette malo i wi okerubi, i wie malo kunnu, ate neno ginnoro daŋ acalli kom loc, ame otio i kidi capir ame obedo bululu bululu." 
Ezekiel10:2 Obaŋa te kobbi dano ame orukoboŋo camanini ni, “Wot idony naka i akina okot ame tye ka wirre-ni, dony i piny i te okerubi, ite juko cukbilo poŋ ciŋi, kun ijuko i akina okerubi, eka ite keketo atata i dye boma.” En te wot i nyima kun onwoŋo atye aneno." 
Ezekiel10:3 I kare-nono onwoŋo okerubi tye ocuŋ tutuŋ anyarolum, i kare ame dano-nono doŋ odonyo i ot, pol te bino wumo dyekal me ottono oko." 
Ezekiel10:4 Kwogo a Rwot te ya i kom okerubi, te wot naka i doggola me ot a Rwot. Pol onwoŋo owumo yi ot a Rwot oko, kede dyekal, kun kwogo a Rwot tye ameny amenya." 
Ezekiel10:5 Bwom okerubi onwoŋo tye amor awinyere naka i dyekal ame onwoŋo tye oko, kun ŋur calo dwon Obaŋa Won Twer Ducu ame tye ka kop." 
Ezekiel10:6 Kare ame Rwot ociko dano ame orukoboŋo camanini, ni, “Kwany mac i akina okot ame tye awirre i akina okerubi”, dano-nono owoto te wot donyo i akina okot te cuŋ i ŋet okot acel." 
Ezekiel10:7 Akerubi acel te ryeyo ciŋe i akina okerubi wadgi, kun cwao ciŋe i mac ame onwoŋo tye i akina okerubi, te gwaro maccono, keto i ciŋ dano ame orukoboŋo me camanini-ni, dano-no te gamo wot kede oko." 
Ezekiel10:8 Okerubi acel acel onwoŋo tye kede ginnoro i te bwome ame nen calo ciŋ dano. 
Ezekiel10:9 Dok ate neno okot aŋwen ame onwoŋo tye i ŋet okerubi, kun okot acel acel tye i ŋet okerubi acel acel. Okot acel acel onwoŋo memenya calo gweŋ alilia." 
Ezekiel10:10 Gin luŋ onwoŋo ocacal, dok okot acel acel nen calo gin ame tye iyi okot wadgi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Gin okot aŋwennono luŋ onwoŋo ka owot owoto tuŋŋoro keken ame nyimgi otiko i kabedo aŋwen luŋ, kun owoto atira ame nyimgi mom romo lokere tuŋ ocele, tuŋ ame okot ame otelo yo otiko, okot ocele mere doŋ luba aluba aboŋo lokere kadi acel i kare ame gin awottono." 
Ezekiel10:12 I kom okot aŋwennono luŋ, medo kede tiregi, onwoŋo tye kan ame otutuca calo waŋgi, kun oromo kom okot luŋ irit." 
Ezekiel10:13 Okot aŋwennono, an awinyo ka olwonogi ni okot ame wirre calo yamo ajuru." 
Ezekiel10:14 Okerubi acel acel onwoŋo tye kede nyime aŋwen, me agege onwoŋo nen calo nyim okerubi, me aryo mere te nen calo nyim dano, me adekkere te nen calo nyim eŋatu, eka me aŋwennere te nen calo nyim cur. Mannono en kite ame nyimgi onwoŋo nen kede." 
Ezekiel10:15 Okerubi te ya twarre oko malo i yamo, Magi gin leyi aŋwen ame yam aneno i ŋet kulo me Kebar." 
Ezekiel10:16 Ka okerubi ocako wot, okot daŋ woto karacel kedgi, ka okerubi oyaro bwomgi malo me twarre oko i lobo, okot daŋ mom ya i ŋetgi kadi acel." 
Ezekiel10:17 Ka ce gin ocuŋ mot, okot daŋ cuŋ mot, ka ce gin otwarre malo, okot aŋwen-ni daŋ twarre me wot kedgi, pien cuny leyi aŋwen-ca onwoŋo tye i kom okot." 
Ezekiel10:18 Kwogo a Rwot te ya oko i kom doggola me ot a Rwot te wot cuŋ malo i wi okerubi," 
Ezekiel10:19 okerubi te yaro bwomgi, te twarre oko i lobo, an onwoŋo atye anenogi i kare ame gin tye awot, kun owoto karacel okot i ŋetgi. Gin te wot cuŋ i doggola ame tye tutuŋ kide me ot a Rwot; kwogo a Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael onwoŋo tye i wigi malo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Magi gin leyi aŋwen ame yam anenogi i ŋet kulo me Kebar, kun Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael tye i wigi malo. An rik ate niaŋ ni gin obedo okerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Acel acel i akina leyi-nono onwoŋo tye kede nyime aŋwen bwome aŋwen, kun i te bwome acel acel tye iye ginnoro ame cal i ciŋ dano." 
Ezekiel10:22 Aco kite ame cal i nyimgi nen kede, nyimgi onwoŋo rom aroma i nyim leyi ame aneno i ŋet kulo me Kebar, gin luŋ ŋat acel acel onwoŋo woto ame otiko nyime atira." 
Ezekiel11:1 Cuny Obaŋa rik te tiŋa malo, te tera naka i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ kide me ot a Rwot. I kare ame atye kuno, i ŋet doggola me dogcel, ate neno jo pyeraryo wie abic, kun i akinagi onwoŋo tye iye Jajania wot Ajur, kede Pelatia wot a Benaya, ame onwoŋo obedo rwode ame loo lwak." 
Ezekiel11:2 Obaŋa te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, magi gin otim tim areco ame tye ka yiko kop imuŋ me timo gin arac i kom boma man." 
Ezekiel11:3 Gin okobo ni, ‘Kare ame obino gero i udi doŋ ceggi, boma man tye acalo gulu me tedo, aco waŋ acalo riŋo ame tye iye.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Pi mannono ba, wot a dano, myero irab kop i komgi.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Cuny a Rwot rik te poto i koma, te kobba ni, “Kob ni Rwot okobo ni, ‘Wun jo Icrael aŋeo gin ame gin itye ka kobo wunu, kede gin ame itye ka timo wunu i muŋ." 
Ezekiel11:6 Wun itye ka medde wunu ameda me neko jo apol ame tye i boma man, ame imio wunu kom jo oto doŋ oradde arada atata i dye gudo.’" 
Ezekiel11:7 “Doŋ Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni ba, Boma-ni doŋ odoko gulu me tedowu, cite kom jo ame ineneko wunu ite pyelo wunu i dye boma, obedo riŋo me atedawu. Myero iŋe wunu ni wun obino kwanyowu oko i dye boma." 
Ezekiel11:8 Yam ilworo wunu pala me lweny cite myero iŋe wunu ni abino kelo pala lweny i komwu. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo. 
Ezekiel11:9 Abino kwanyowu oko i dye boma ate terowu oko, wot miyowu i ciŋ orok." 
Ezekiel11:10 An doŋ atyeko ŋolliwu kop me to, obino nekowu oko i lweny, kun onekowu i pala lweny i lobowu ikokome. Man bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel11:11 Boma man mom bino medde bedo gulu me tedowu, dok wun daŋ mom ibino bedo wunu riŋo ame obino tedo iye. Abino keto can i komwu i kabedo ducu ame ibino bedo wunu iye i lobo me Icrael." 
Ezekiel11:12 Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot, pien wun mom ibedo lubo wunu cikka kede gin ame onwoŋo an aciko ni timi wunu, ento ibedo wunu lubo cik a rok ocele ame tye i ŋetwu.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Kare okato anonok keken, ame an pwod atye arabo kop Obaŋa, Pelatia wot a Benaya te rette piny to oko, An daŋ ate rette piny aryeba cuny, ate mwoco koko malo i dwon aloŋo kun akok ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, ibino doŋ tyeko jo me Icrael ame odoŋ oko?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Rwot te kop keda ni: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Wot a dano we, omegoni i kokome ame otero iyi opii, jo luŋ me ot Icrael, kede jo luŋ ame bedo i Jerucalem, otye ka kobo ni, ‘Gin doŋ otye kannabor meicel, ame mom doŋ oromo woro Rwot, kun en omiowa lobo man ni myero bed megwa’." 
Ezekiel11:16 Pi mannono, yin myero ikob kop ame an atye akobo-ni baŋ opi i wadwu: kadi bed atyeko kwanyogi cwayogi teŋe baŋ orok, kadi bed ake ketogi i lobo apapat, an onwoŋo aye ni gin owora i kabedo luŋ ame gin tye iye." 
Ezekiel11:17 Pi mannono ba, kobbigi kop man ame an Rwot atye ka kobo: ‘Abino rayowu oko i akina orok, kede i lobo apapat ame aketowu iye, ate miyowu lobo a jo Icrael.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Ka gin bino dok kunu, obino kwanyo ginnoro i kunu luŋ ame cilo tye iye, karacel kede ginnoro luŋ me kwer." 
Ezekiel11:19 Abino miyogi obedo i cuny acel, dok abino keto cuny anyen i yigi. Abino kwanyo cuny ame tek calo gweŋ oko i komgi ate miyogi cuny ame rom aroma i kom," 
Ezekiel11:20 me wek obed jo ame lubo cikka, kun otio gin ame an aciko. Gin bino bedo jona, an abino bedo Obaŋagi." 
Ezekiel11:21 Aco jo ame bino medde keto cunygi woro gigi mogo a mom cil kede gigi mogo me kwer, an abino keto can i komgi pi balgi. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Okerubi te cako yaro bwomgi me twarre malo kun okot daŋ tye i ŋetgi, kwongo Obaŋa me Icrael onwoŋo tye i wigi malo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Kwogo Obaŋa me Icrael te ya oko i dye boma me Jerucalem, te wot cuŋ i wi kidi ame tye tutuŋ to." 
Ezekiel11:24 An ate neno cuny Obaŋa tye ka tiŋa oko malo, te tera naka baŋ jo ame tye iyi opii, i lobo me Kaldaya. Gin ame onyutta-nono, te cako rwenyo oko i baŋa." 
Ezekiel11:25 An ate kobbi jo ame tye iyi opii ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot onyutta. 
Ezekiel12:1 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Wot a dano we, yin ibino iyi akina jo me ot ame maro jem, ame tye i waŋgi cite mom oneno ginnoro, otye kede yitgi, ento mom owinyo ginnoro," 
Ezekiel12:3 pien gin obedo jo me ot ame maro jem. Pi mannono ba, wot a dano, yikere itwe yecci acalo me ariŋ ayela, ite cako wot, kun joni neno, me wot i lobo ocele. Gwok onyo bino miyogi oniaŋ, kadi bed gin obedo jo ame maro jem, ibino cako wot-ti-nono i nyimgi dyeceŋ." 
Ezekiel12:4 Ibino tero yecci-nono dyeceŋ kun gin aneno, acalo yec ariŋ ayela; dok ibino wot i nyimgi kun gin anenni, kite ame jo woto kede me wot i lobo ocele i kare me riŋo ayela i lobogi." 
Ezekiel12:5 Dok ituc kor apama ame gin anenno, eka yin ite bea i kan ame ituco-nono." 
Ezekiel12:6 Ibino tiŋo yecci i wi bwoki kun gin aneno, eka ite yeyo dyewor, ibino tweyo waŋi oko ame mom iromo neno lobo ame ateri iye, pien aketi me bedo gin ame jo Icrael twero neno, ame twero nyuto gin ame bino timere.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 An ate timo ginnoro luŋ ame Rwot ocika ni atim. Akwanyo yecca, akelo oko dyecerj, kun atweo yecca calo ariŋ ayela, eka ate tuco kor apama, kun atuco kede ciŋa: ate cako wot dyewor, kun ayeo yecca i wi bwoka, ame gin daŋ otye onenno kede waŋgi." 
Ezekiel12:8 Odiko ocele Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Wot a dano we, jo Icrael ame maro jem-mi, mom openyi ni yin itye ka timo gin aŋo?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Yin myero igam kopgi kun ikobbigi kop man ame an a Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Kop man ame pire tek wok-ki, tiko rwot me Jerucalem, kede jo Icrael ame tye iye." 
Ezekiel12:11 Kobbigi ni mannono, gin ame itimo-ni, itimo me nyuttigi gin ame bino timere i komgi; obino terogi luŋ iyi opii i lobo ocele." 
Ezekiel12:12 Dok rwot ame tye i akinagi bino tiŋo yeccere i wi bwoke dyewor, te cako wottere dyewor kite ame yin itimo kede, en bino tuco kor apama, te donnyo iye, en bino tweyo waŋe oko, me wek kur enen lobo-nono i waŋe." 
Ezekiel12:13 Abino ryeyo bwona make oko, en te moko oko iyi owic ame aciko. Abino tere naka i lobo me Babulon, ame obedo lobo a jo Kaldaya, kadi amannono, en mom bino neno lobo-naca naka to iye kuno." 
Ezekiel12:14 Abino keketo jo luŋ ame yam gure dyere, jo ame mie tam, kede jo ocele ame yam gwoke i yore apapat, Abino miyo okworgi yenyogi meicel i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Gin obino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot, i kare ame akeketogi atata i akina rok ocele, kede lobo ocele." 
Ezekiel12:16 Cite abino weko jo mogo i akinagi bwot i leb pala lweny, i kec, kede i too edeke, me i kare ame gin tye i akina orok kuno, otuc gigi mogo me kwer ame yam obedo timo, dok daŋ oŋe ni an abedo Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Rwot dok te medde kop keda, kun kobba ni," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Wot a dano we, cam ogatini ame komi amyel amyela, dok imat pii daŋ i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, dok ame komi daŋ amyel amyela." 
Ezekiel12:19 Kobbi jo me lobo-nono kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo i kom jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, i lobo a jo Icrael: Gin obino camo camgi i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, dok obino mato pii ame cunygi apoto apota. Pien obino yako jami luŋ ame tye i lobogi, lobogi te doŋ nono; man bino timere pi tim me byemi ame gin obedo timo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Boma luŋ ame aman jo tye iye, obino jwero odoco, te doŋ acalo wi oburu, lobo te doŋ yie nono calo tim. Mannono bino miyogi oŋeo ni a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Wot a dano we, man kara carokop aŋo ame iwinyo i kom lobo me Icrael, ame jo Icrael maro kobo kede ni kare tye ka kato akata, dok ginnoro luŋ ame otye ka nyuttigi i waŋ lek, mom tye ka cobere kadi acel?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Pi mannono kobbigi kop man ame an a Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Abino miyo kobo kop man i kom carokop gik oko, jo mom dok bino medde kobo carokop iyi Icrael luŋ, Yin kobbigi ni, kare doŋ tye ceggi acega, ame ginnoro luŋ a yam onyuto bino cobere iye." 
Ezekiel12:24 Anyut me goba doŋ bino bedo mom, akadi tyettogo, ame obwolo kede jo abwola mom dok bino nen i akina jo me Icrael." 
Ezekiel12:25 An Rwot ikoma en ame abino kobo gin ame amito kobo, dok daŋ jo bino timo gin ame akobo, Kop man mom dok bino gal kadi acel; abino gire timo gin ame aciko ni abino timo pi kare me kwowu, wun jo ame maro jem.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel12:26 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Wot a dano we, nen jo me ot Icrael tye ka kobo gin ame otye ka nyutti-ni kede kop ame yin itye ka kobo, tye pi kare ame pwod bor meicel." 
Ezekiel12:28 Pi mannono ba, kobbigi kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Mom tye kopporo ame an akobo ame pwod dok bino gal, ento ginnoro luŋ ame an akobo bino doŋ timere. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Wot a dano we, rab kop i kom odwarpiny me Icrael, rab kop, ikob baŋ odwarpiny ame gin orabo kop ame otamo atama pirgi kengi kun okobo ni jo winy kop ame Rwot okobo, kun Rwot mom okobo, kobbigi owiny kop ame Rwot okobo," 
Ezekiel13:3 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Can bino poto i kom odwarpiny ame miŋ, ame lubo tam ame oya i cunygi kengi, kun nwoŋo mom oneno ginnoro kadi acel." 
Ezekiel13:4 Odwarpinywu onwoŋo rom aroma kede ekwe ame tye i boma mogo ame doŋ tye acalo wi obur, ama wun jo Icrael." 
Ezekiel13:5 Wun mom iwoto wunu kan ame omuko cel iye, mom daŋ igero wunu apama cel ame muko, wun jo Icrael; mannono en omio jo Icrael mom bino cuŋ kadi acel i kare me lweny i nino a Rwot." 
Ezekiel13:6 Anyut luŋ ame gin okobo ni onyuttigi obedo kop me goba. Gin ame gin tyeto daŋ obedo kop me goba keken. Gin bedo kobo ni, ‘Rwot okobo ni’, aco kono nwoŋo Rwot mom okobo, kun gin nwoŋo atamo ni Rwot myero mi gin ame gin okobo cobere." 
Ezekiel13:7 Anyut ame gin okobo ni oneno-nono, obedo goba, dok kopporo luŋ ame gin tyeto daŋ obedo goba, an gire nwoŋo mom akobbigi kopporo. Man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Atye i, kop i komwu, pien wun itye ka kobo kop me goba, dok anyut ame ikobo ni ineno wunu daŋ goba keken," 
Ezekiel13:9 An doŋ aceggi keto can i komwu, wun odwarpiny ame ineno wunu anyut me bwolo ka jo, dok ame ityeto wunu tyet me gobagoba. Ikwerogu coyo wunu nyiŋwu karacel i jona Icrael, mom gire ibino dok i lobowu kadi acel. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni a Rwot Obaŋa." 
Ezekiel13:10 Pien gin odwarpiny obedo miyo jona rwenyo kun okobo ni, ‘Kuc tye’, aco kono kuccoro mom. Dok ka jona ogero apama cel, odwarpiny bino puo oko i coka atar." 
Ezekiel13:11 Kobbi wunu jo ame puo apama kede raŋi atarrono ni, apamanono bino rette oko piny, kot bino cwe atek meicel, i twon pee adwoŋ a mom twerre, karacel i yamo kot ame abukoro okato kare, bino bukoro i kor apama-nono." 
Ezekiel13:12 Apama cellono bino mukere te rette oko piny, jo te penyowu ni kara coka ame yam ipuo wunu i kor apama-ni tye kwene.”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Abino miyo yamo kodo atek meicel i twon akemo adwoŋ meicel, dok abino miyo kot daŋ cwe adwoŋ meicel, kede pee, kun pee daŋ corre piny i twon akemona kede waŋcunnya, me muko apama cel reto oko piny." 
Ezekiel13:14 Abino muko apama cel ame opuo i raŋi atar areto oko piny, acakki tere te doŋ nono. Ka apama cellono orette oko piny, wun daŋ ibino to wunu oko ducu. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel13:15 Man en kite ame abino wuko kede akemona i kom apama cel, kede i kom jo ame opuo apama cel kede coka atar. Abino kobbiwu ni, ‘Apama cel doŋ mom tye, akadi jo ame yam opuo i coka atar daŋ mom tye," 
Ezekiel13:16 anaka odwarpiny me Icrael ame obedo rabo kop i kom Jerucalem, kun okobo ni onyuttigi anyuttogo ame nyuto kuc ame bino bedo iye, kun kono kuccoro mom. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.’" 
Ezekiel13:17 “Aman doŋ ba, yin wot a dano, koŋ dok icak loko waŋi inen anyirawu me Icrael, ame tye ka rabo kop ame gin otamo atama i cunygi; rab kop i komgi," 
Ezekiel13:18 i kobbigi kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Abino miyo can poto i kom mon ame kwoo lwit, ote tweyo i ŋut ciŋ jo, dok ame tye ka kwoyo boŋo me wumo wi jo, kun nwoŋo okwo lwit iye, pi jo adoŋo kede jo atino, kun olubo kit ame dano moro-ni tye kede. Man itye ka timo wunu me mito ni ibed wunu kede twer i kom kwo kede to i kom jona pi nwoŋo lim pirwu kenwu." 
Ezekiel13:19 Itye wunu ka pyeda i akina jona, pi cayiri ame poŋ ka gwata tok acel keken, kede pi ogati mogo atitino, kun ineko wunu ŋat ame onwoŋo myero mom to, ite weko wunu dano ame onwoŋo myero to, te bedo kwo, pi kopwu me gobagoba ame itye wunu ka kobo baŋ jona ame ciko yitgi me winyo kop me gobagobanono." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man: Nen ba, an adag lwit ame itye ka kwoyo wunu i komwu, me bedo kede twer i kom kwo a dano kede to mere. Abino codo lwitewu-nono oko i ŋut ciŋwu, ate weko tipo a jo ame onwoŋo ibedo gwoko wunu-nono wot oko ata kun mom atimo ginnoro i komgi." 
Ezekiel13:21 Abino yeco daŋ boŋo ame iwumo i wiwu oko, ate laro jona oko i ciŋwu, gin mom doŋ te medde bedo i te twerwu kadi acel. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Pien ibala wunu cuny jo ame kitegi atira i kop me nononono, kadi bed an mom onwoŋo abalo cunygi; icukoro wunu cuny jo areco ni myero gin omedde ameda i timgi areco me kur olar kwogi." 
Ezekiel13:23 Pi mannono ba, mom dok ibino medde wunu neno anyuttogo me goba, dok daŋ mom ibino tyet wunu tyettoro kadi acel, abino laro jona oko i ciŋwu. Man bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Jo mogo i akina odoŋe me Icrael rik te bino bedo piny i nyima," 
Ezekiel14:2 I kare-nono Rwot te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Wot a dano we, joni doŋ tye i cuny me woro calo jogi, omio gin otye ka miyo cal jogi tye ka rwennyogi arwenya me terogi i bal. Gin otye ka tamo ni an abino dokkigi i gin ame gin omito?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Pi mannono ba, yin myero ikob kedgi, ikobbigi kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo. Dano moro me Icrael keken ame tye kede cuny me woro cal jogi, kun daŋ omio calo jogi tye arwenye arwenya me tere i bal, eka dok te bino me bino penyo odwarpiny, an a Rwot i koma en ame abino bino baŋe me doke i kop man, pien en otimo lwak cal jogi apol meicel me awora mere." 
Ezekiel14:5 Jogi magi luŋ doŋ otyeko miyo cuny jo Icrael ya oko i koma, ageno ni ka abino gamo kopgi, abino miyo tamgi lokere dwogo i koma." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Pi mannono ba, kobbi jo me ot Icrael kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Myero iŋut wunu, iwek wunu woro cal jogi, me idwog wunu baŋa. Dok daŋ myero ilokere wunu iwek timo wunu timmogo me kwer, ame ibedo timo wunu," 
Ezekiel14:7 Pien dano moro keken me ot Icrael, onyo arokkoro ame tye i akina jo Icrael, ame pokere oko keda, cunye te bedo i kom woro cal jogi, kun mio cal jogi rwenye arwenya tere i bal kun an aneno, eka te dok bino baŋ adwarpiny me bino penyo kop i kome baŋa, aŋa Rwot ikome en ame abino gamo koppere." 
Ezekiel14:8 Abino kwero kit timmere-nono oko ate miyo en bedo anyut ame jo lolo i doggi, kun amio waŋe rwenyo oko i akina jo me turgi. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Ka ce obwolo adwarpinnyoro, te gamo kop gobagoba, mannono nwoŋo an Rwot en ame abwole-nono, Abino ryeyo ciŋ i kom adwarpinnyono, ate neko oko i akina jona Icrael." 
Ezekiel14:10 Adwarpiny karacel kede ŋat ame obino penyo kop i baŋe-ni, can ame abino keto i komgi bino bedo arorom," 
Ezekiel14:11 Abino timo man me jo Icrael kur dok rweny kun oya oko i baŋa, dok daŋ kur olille i balloro luŋ ame gin otimo. Ento gin luŋ obedo jona, kun an daŋ abedo Obaŋagi. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Wot a dano we, ka ce jo me lobo moro otimo bal i koma, kun oturo kede cikka, an abino ryeyo ciŋa, ate miyo cam rwenyo oko iye. Abino miyo kec poto, ame te miyo dano karacel kede leyi to oko iye." 
Ezekiel14:14 Kadi bedjo adekki: Nua, Danieri, karacel kede Yubu rik obedo iye, gin aber ame gin obedo timo, bino miyo gin olaro ka kwogi kengi. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ka ce acwao le moro ager me tim ame neko jo oko i lobo-nono, ame te miyo lobo-nono bale odoco ame ŋattoro mom doŋ romo beo iye pi lworo leyi," 
Ezekiel14:16 kadi bed rik jo adek-ki tye kuno, ateteni, kite ame an abedo kede Obaŋa ame kwo-ni, jo-nu onwoŋo romo laro ka kwogi kengi, cite lobonono onwoŋo gire myero doŋ nono aboŋo ŋattoro iye." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Onyo ka ce amio lweny opoto i lobo-nono, kun akobo ni okwor myero be i lobo-nono luŋ, kun oneko jo luŋ iye karacel kede leyi;" 
Ezekiel14:18 kadi bed jo-ni adek-ki onwoŋo rik tye kuno, kite acalo an abedo Rwot Obaŋa ame kwoni, joni onwoŋo mom romo laro itinogi, awobe kede anyira, kono ka kwogi kengi." 
Ezekiel14:19 Onyo kadi bed onwoŋo acwalo too edeke i lobo-nono, onyo awuko akemona iye i lwak remo, me neko jo iye luŋ karacel kede leyi." 
Ezekiel14:20 Kadi Nua, Danieri kede Yubu onwoŋo tye kunu, kite acalo an atye kwo-ni, jo-ni onwoŋo mom romo laro wodgi moro onyo nyargi moro ame tye kuno, gin onwoŋo oromo laro ka kwogi kengi, pi kitegi arita." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Pien man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Tye kit can areco aŋwen apapat ame abino cwayo i kom Jerucalem, abino cwayo i komgi to me pala lweny, kec, twoni leyi mogo ager meicel karacel kede too edeke, me neko jo luŋ iye karacel kede leyi." 
Ezekiel14:22 Ka ce ineno wunu ŋattoro obwot iye, me laro itino mere awobe kede anyira, eka gin te bino baŋwu, myero inen gin ame gin tye ka timo. Ibino neno kitegi kede ginnoro luŋ ame gin timo, mom ber kadi acel, mannono bino miyo iye ni can ame abino keto i kom Jerucalem tye kakare." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ibino ye, ka ce ineno kitegi kede gin ame gin timo tye areco meicel; Mannono bino miyo iŋeo ni gin ame atimo, atimo pi te kop ame tye kakare. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Rwot te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Wot a dano we, yat olok twero kato yattoro ocele i yore aŋo? Jaŋ olok ame tye i akina yen ocele iyi buŋ, kato owote mere i yore aŋo?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Itwero toŋo yattoro ite tiyo kede ginnoro? Jo twero toŋo yattere te payo kede teke me agura i kor apama me ŋabo ginnoro? 
Ezekiel15:4 Pe gire, yattere ber me acama a mac keken. Ka mac doŋ owaŋo tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, eka cukbilo mere en ame te doŋ, pwod dok twero konyo me timo ginnoro." 
Ezekiel15:5 Nen ba, kare ame yattono onwoŋo mom ru owaŋ, konnyere moro onwoŋo mom, kara ka mac doŋ owaŋo oko ame te doŋ ka cukbilo mere keken i dyere, itamo ni pwod dok romo konyo me timo ginnoro?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Mannoro omio Rwot me mony okobo ni, Kite ame amio mac owaŋo yat olok ame tye i akina yen i buŋ oko ni, abino miyo jo ame bedo i Jerucalem daŋ waŋ oko kittono." 
Ezekiel15:7 Waŋa mom bino rwenyo i kom Jerucalem, kadi bed dano moro ame tye iye obwot ame mac mom owaŋo, mac gire pwod bino waŋogi, mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot, i kare ame an doŋ aciko waŋa i komgi." 
Ezekiel15:8 Abino miyo lobo doko wi obur, pien gin mom obedo lubo cikka.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel16:1 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Wot a dano we, myero imi Jerucalem ŋe ginnoro luŋ me kwer ame en obedo timo." 
Ezekiel16:3 Kobbe kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Yin yam onywali i lobo me Kanan, kwaroni obedo dano me Amor, eka tatti te bedo nyako me Kitti," 
Ezekiel16:4 Aco kop i kom nywalli, i nino ame rik onywali iye, rik mom obin oŋolo peni, mom daŋ olwoko komi kede pii me komi bed acil, dok mom daŋ owiro komi kede kado, mom daŋ oboo komi kede boŋo." 
Ezekiel16:5 Mom tye ŋattoro kadi acel ame kica omako i komi me timo jami magi luŋ i komi, rik ote bolli kom abola i dye bar i nino ame onywali iye-nono, pien mar onwoŋo nok meicel i komi." 
Ezekiel16:6 “I kare ame akato i ŋeti, ate neno remo ame onywali kede omwono komi oko, an ate kobbi i kare ame remo pwod tye i komi-nono ni," 
Ezekiel16:7 ‘Bed kwo, doki idoŋ calo yat ame tye i dye bar.’ Rik daŋ ite doŋo, acalo twon yattoro abor meicel ite doko nyako adwoŋ; tunoni te cako poŋ, yer wii daŋ te cako lot, cite komi onwoŋo tye nono aboŋo boŋo moro iye." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Kare ame dok abeo i ŋeti, aneni, ate nwoŋo ni doŋ iteggo oko ame iromo amara; an ate yaro boŋona ame onwoŋo atye kede, ate wumo kede komi. Ateteni, an rik ate cikere kedi, yin ite doko mega, kun acikere atek ni abino mari.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel16:9 “An rik ate lwoko komi oko kede pii naka remo ame onwoŋo tye i komi, eka ate wiro komi kede moo." 
Ezekiel16:10 Alwako i komi twon boŋo moro abor ame odeo aber meicel, ate miyi daŋ amuk ame okwoo aber meicel, kede boŋo camanini me boyo wii, karacel kede boŋo me wumereni." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ate miyi daŋ ruko ruk me kwogo, arwako atem i ciŋi kede nyor i ŋuti." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ate rwako daŋ atem me um i umi, kede me yit daŋ i yiti ryoryo, ate miyi tok kwogo aber meicel." 
Ezekiel16:13 Mannono en kite ame yam ami irukere kede ruk me jabu kede ryal, boŋo ame iruko onwoŋo boŋo camanini aber odoco, kede aliri, karacel kede boŋo ame odeo aber meicel. Ibedo camo kwon ame omyeno i moko apwot meicel, kede moo kic, karacel kede moo yao. Idoŋo ame inen amwonya meicel, naka ite doko acalo abaka a dako." 
Ezekiel16:14 Berri onwoŋo owinyere meicel i akina rok apapat. Kwogo ame aketo i komi omio onwoŋo inen amwonya meicel.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo. 
Ezekiel16:15 “Cite yin ibedo geno berri, ite cako timo abor i jo luŋ ame beo i kan ame yin itye iye." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ikwanyo boŋŋini mogo ite gero i udi me woro jogi, ite kwogo komgi aber meicel, yin doŋ ite miye oko baŋ jo ducu, kun itimo kedgi abor calo alaya. Kodi gin ame ibedo timo-nono yam mom ru onen dok daŋ mom bino nen atwal." 
Ezekiel16:17 Ikwanyo daŋ jamini mogo ame otio kede jabu kede ryal ame onwoŋo amii, ite tiyo i cal dano, eka ite cako timo kedgi tim me cot." 
Ezekiel16:18 Ikwanyo boŋŋi mogo ame okwogo abeco meicel, ite wumogi kede, ite cako yalogi kede moona kede odok a ŋwece kur." 
Ezekiel16:19 Dok cam ame yam ami, ame icamo kwon ame moko okwonnere pwot meicel, moo yao kede moo kic, ento yin dok ite cako yalo kede jogi acalo gin a ŋwece kur me yomoro cunye.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Yin dok ite kwanyo awobeni kede anyirani, ame inywalo baŋa, ite wot miyogi acalo mot baŋ jogi. Yin onwoŋo itamo ni timmi me aborrono obedo ginnoro atitidi meicel baŋa?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Mannono en omio yin ibedo neko itinona, eka ite miyo waŋogi i mac me yalo jogi?" 
Ezekiel16:22 I timmoro luŋ me kwer ame ibedo timo, kede i tim me abor ame ibedo timo, wi mom opo pi kare me tinoni, kare ame rik komi tye nono aboŋo boŋo moro, kun remo ame onywali kede daŋ omwonne amwona i komi.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Ibino neno can nadi! Ibino neno can nadi! I kare ame doŋ ityeko timo tim magi luŋ," 
Ezekiel16:24 igero ici kani piri keni, dok igero kabedo mogo me woro cal jogi i ŋet yo." 
Ezekiel16:25 Kabedo luŋ ame otiŋere i ŋet yo, yin igero iye kabedo kan ame itwero nyuto iye berri acalo alaya. Imio jo luŋ ame beo kan ame yin itye iye-nono buto kedi, mannono omio imio tim me alayani onya omedde meicel." 
Ezekiel16:26 Dok daŋ ibedo timo tim me alaya karacel i jo Miciri ame gin obedo owoteni ame waŋgi tar, imio timmi me alaya onya omedde ameda kun iroka kede me akemo maka," 
Ezekiel16:27 Pi mannono nen ba, aryeyo ciŋa doŋ i komi me keto can i komi, dok daŋ abino kwanyo gummi mogo oko ame yam ami, ate miyi i ciŋ okworri ame owor ame gin jo me Piriciti, ame gin obedo jo ame dagi meicel, pien tim me abor ame ibedo timo mio lewic makogi meicel." 
Ezekiel16:28 Dok daŋ itimo tim me abor i jo Acuria, pien nen calo en ame ibedo timo i jo ocele ni mom ru oromi." 
Ezekiel16:29 Imio timmi me alaya onya omedde meicel, omio i timo naka ocatwil ame bedo i lobo a jo Kaldaya; kadi bed amannono, tim me alaya ame itimo kedgi gire mom ru oromi.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Mar doŋ omio cunyi odoko agoro oko, pien aneno ni tim ame ibedo timo doŋ, itimo aboŋo lewic kadi acel." 
Ezekiel16:31 Nen doŋ igero icika i ŋet yo luŋ kun igero-gu i kabedo mogo ame otiŋere malo, ame tye i ŋet yo ducu. Cite yin onwoŋo mom i bedo acalo alaya, pien onwoŋo mom itimo tim me abor pi mito lim." 
Ezekiel16:32 Yin i dako ame alaya, pien icodo cot baŋ rok ocele ame gin wele, akaka cobo mitti wun i cwari." 
Ezekiel16:33 Co mio mot baŋ mon ame olaya, cite yin megi, yin en ame dok ilunyo miyo mot baŋ cogi, me wilogi me obin baŋi i kabedo ducu, i caa moro keken." 
Ezekiel16:34 Mannono omio yin dok ipat apata i mon ame olaya. Mom tye ŋattoro ame onwoŋo odi me bedo alaya. Mom daŋ oculli ginnoro me bedo alaya, cite yin en ame dok ilunyo culo cogi ame miti, mannono omio yin dok kiti pat meicel, i timmi me alaya-nono." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Doŋ pi mannono ba, yin alaya, winy koŋ kop ame Rwot tye ka kobo.”" 
Ezekiel16:36 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Pien yin onwoŋo igonyo boŋo i komi me mon oko ite doŋ onoro i timi me alaya i nyim cogi ame mari, kede dok pi timmi luŋ me woro cal jogi, kede pi remo itinoni ame yin iyalo i cal jogi, mannono omio abino coko cogi luŋ ame mari, ame yam ibedo bedo kedgi i yomcuny; jo luŋ ame onwoŋo imaro kede jo ame onwoŋo idago." 
Ezekiel16:37 Abino cokogi i kabedo ducu gin luŋ ote bino gurri dyere, an ate yabo boŋo i komi me mon oko i nyimgi, me oneni odoco onoro ame dul komi moro me lewic mom odoŋ." 
Ezekiel16:38 Abino ŋolo kop i komi, kite ame aŋolo kede kop i kom mon ame pokere oko i coggi dok daŋ ote neko dano. Abino ŋolo kop i komi i twon akemo meicel, kun nyeko ocira oko, eka ite to oko." 
Ezekiel16:39 Abino miyi i ciŋ coggi ame onwoŋo mari, gin bino coro icika ni reto oko piny dok daŋ obino mumuko kabedo luŋ ame otiŋere malo, ame yam igero me woro cal jogi, gin bino gonyo boŋo oko i komi, ote mayo jamini mogo me wel daŋ oko i baŋi, eka ote weki doŋ onoro aboŋo boŋo moro i komi." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Gin bino kelo mony me bino lweny i komi, ote cecelo yin kede kiddi, ote daŋ ŋiŋido yin atitino i pala me lweny." 
Ezekiel16:41 Abino waŋo wudini oko kede mac, abino miyo kop ame aŋolo i komi cobere i nyim lwak mon apipim, abino miyo ijuko timmi me alaya oko, miyo mot baŋ cogi ame mari daŋ te gik oko." 
Ezekiel16:42 Mannono en kite ame abino cobo kede akemona i komi, eka nyeko ame atye kede i komi te doŋ ya oko. Abino doŋ bedo amwol kun akemo mom dok maka i komi atwal." 
Ezekiel16:43 Pien yin mom ibedo po gin ame otimere i komi i kare me tinoni, dok imio akemo obedo maka i tim magi luŋ ame ibedo timo; pi mannono, nen ba, abino culo kwor i komi pi gin ame itimo ducu, Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo. “Mom ibedo timo tim me tarwaŋ, kun imedo i kom timmi ocele luŋ me kwer?" 
Ezekiel16:44 Nen ba, jo luŋ ame kobo kop me carokop, bino kobo carokop man i komi, kun okobo ni, ‘Nyako cal i tottere imat daŋ cal i nyare.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Yin ibedo nyako ame totti i kome en ame onywali. En totti-nono onwoŋo okwero cware karacel itino mere luŋ. Yin irom aroma amegoni, ame gin daŋ okwero coggi karacel kede itinogi. Totti obedo dano me Kitti, eka pappi te bedo dano me Amor." 
Ezekiel16:46 Aminni adwoŋ, en Camaria ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, kun bedo karacel anyira mere, aminni atidi mere ame bedo tutuŋ anyarolum en Codom ame daŋ bedo karacel anyira mere." 
Ezekiel16:47 Yin rik mom ibedo lubo kitegi keken dok daŋ mom ibedo timo timmogo me kwer ame gin timo keken, cite kite ni yin, oballe oko odoco ame katogi i kare anokkoro keken.”" 
Ezekiel16:48 Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo, “Doŋ kite ame atye kede kwo-ni, aminni Codoma karacel kede amego mere, mom obedo timo gin ame yin karacel kede anyirani obedo timo." 
Ezekiel16:49 Nen ba, man en bal ame aminni Codoma obedo timo, En karacel kede anyira mere, gin luŋ obedo wakere meicel, pien gin onwoŋo otye kede cam abup ame ocamo loogi aloa, dok daŋ onwoŋo obedo mot kun otye kede kuc, cite gin okwero miyo kit konnyoro ducu baŋ ocan kede baŋ jo ame piny oloo." 
Ezekiel16:50 Gin onwoŋo obedo jo ame ŋwette meicel i nyima, kun daŋ obedo timo tim me kwer a kitegi papat; pi mannono ba, i kare ame aneno man, atyekogi oko i nyima." 
Ezekiel16:51 “Camaria mom otimo bal, ame romo nucu me bal ame yin ibedo timo, Yin ibedo timo gigi mogo me kwer adwoŋ meicel ame kato meggi oko, Omio yin imio amegoni dok nen acalo jo a kitegi atira pi tim me kwer luŋ ame yin ibedo timo." 
Ezekiel16:52 Aman yin doŋ myero iye lewicci giri, yin ikomi, pien balli doŋ rac meicel ame kato me amegoni ducu ame mio amegoni doŋ nen calo jo ame mom otimo balloro, kop ame tye i komgi doŋ doko abeber kato megi oko, yin myero iye lewicci, dok daŋ ikany acae ame jo cai kede, pien yin imio amegoni nen calo jo ame mom otimo balloro." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Abino dwoko gum a Codoma karacel kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, abino daŋ dwoko gum a Camaria karacel kede pacci ame tye i ŋete. Abino dwoko gummi yin i komi daŋ baŋi." 
Ezekiel16:54 Ibino kanyo acae, dok daŋ ibino yeyo lewic pi ginnoro luŋ ame yin itimo, ame mannono bino doko gin ame kweo cunygi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Aco kop i kom amegoni, Codoma kede pacci ame tye i ŋete, obino dok i lobo ame yam otye iye con, Camaria kede pacci ame tye i ŋete daŋ obino dok i lobo ame rik otye iye con, yin kede pacci ame tye i ŋeti daŋ ibino dok i gum ame yam itye iye con." 
Ezekiel16:56 I kare ame rik iwakere-ca, mom rik iloko nyiŋ aminni Codoma odoko gi-acekani," 
Ezekiel16:57 i kare ame timmi areco mom ru onen kannaler? Aman yin daŋ doŋ irom aroma kede, idoko doŋ gin ame jo Edom kede jo ame bedo i ŋetgi cao, jo Piriciti kede jo luŋ ame bedo i ŋetgi daŋ cai." 
Ezekiel16:58 Itye doŋ ka yeyo peko adwoŋ meicel pi ballogo me lewic kede gigi mogo apol meicel me kwer ame ibedo timo.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo. 
Ezekiel16:59 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Abino tic kedi kun alubo gin ame yam yin ibedo timo, pien yin rik icao kwoŋ ame rik ikwoŋo dok daŋ ituro cikere ame rik ocikere kede," 
Ezekiel16:60 cite an pwod abino po i cikerena ame rik acikere kedi kun yin pwod atin. Abino dok cikere kedi i cikere ame doŋ perakino atwal. 
Ezekiel16:61 Mannono bino miyo ipo kite ame ibedo bedo kede, eka lewic te maki ka atyeko kelo amini adwoŋ kede en atidi ate dwokogi baŋi acalo anyirani, cite mom pi cikere ame abin acikere kedi-ni." 
Ezekiel16:62 Abino dok moko cikerena kedi, eka ite ŋeyo ni an abedo Rwot." 
Ezekiel16:63 I kare ame abino weko balli luŋ ame yam itimo, ibino po pirgi, lewic te maki atek meicel ame mic mom dok iromo ŋamo dogi me kobo kopporo.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel17:1 Rwot okobo keda kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Wot a dano we, kob kop me temo wi dano, ame openyere kede ni koc, lit; dok ikob kop me carokop baŋ jo me ot Icrael," 
Ezekiel17:3 kun ikobbigi kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Yam tye twon curroro adwoŋ meicel, ame bwome bocoboco daŋ meicel, dok yaro bwome alac okato kare. Yer kome onwoŋo nen amwonya meicel, kun raŋi mere papat. Currono rik te twarre, wot i Lebanon, te wot turo wi yat cedar me Lebanon oko." 
Ezekiel17:4 Oturo cuny wi yat cedar ame tye i wi yat me agikki malo, te wot kede oko naka i lobo ocatwil, te wot keto i boma ocatwil kuno." 
Ezekiel17:5 Te dok wot kwanyo nyig yat aberrere i lobo a jo Icrael te wot pito i lobo amwonya meicel kan ame pii onwoŋo dwoŋ iye, me doŋ kuno. En opito yattono kite ame opito kede yen ame doŋo i ŋet kulo," 
Ezekiel17:6 yattono te doŋo, te lokere doko olok ame ojany atek kun obuŋere olyao naka piny. Jaŋ yattono te kemo tuŋ kan ame Cur tye iye, kun lwite tye kan ame yat ocuŋ iye. Mannono en kite ame yattono odoko kede olok ame jaŋe pol meicel, dok pote daŋ olot atek ame obuŋere meicel." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Ento rik daŋ dok onwoŋo tye twon curroro ocele ame dwoŋ meicel dok daŋ tye kede bwome ame bocoboco, kede yer bwome daŋ abocoboco. Nen ba, lwit yat olokki rik te lokere dok tuŋ kun ame currono tye iye, jaŋ olokkono daŋ te wiro wigi luŋ kun ame currono tye iye, kun ogeno ni bino miyogi pii. En rik okwanyo yatti i kan ame ogeo pito iye," 
Ezekiel17:8 te tero kan ame pii dwoŋ iye, dok ame lobo mere ber, me wek jany atek meicel dok daŋ nyak nyige adwoŋ te doko twon olokkoro a pire tek meicel.”" 
Ezekiel17:9 Rwot Obaŋa openyo peny man ni, “Yat man bino doŋo te bedo kannono nakanaka? Cur me agege-ca mom bino puto oko, te lwero jaŋe daŋ oko, me pote luŋ two oko? Puto yatti mom bino mito lo moro ame kome tek onyo lwak jo apol me puto i lwite luŋ." 
Ezekiel17:10 Nen ba, yatti ka onako ote tero kan ocele, ote pito, iye, twero bedo kuno nakanaka? Mom bino two oko ka ce yamo ame kodo i tutuŋ kide okodo, mom bino two oko i kan ame opito iye?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Rwot dok te kop keda kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Aman yin myero ikob baŋ jo man ame maro jem-mi, penygi ka ce oŋeo te kop me carokop man. Kobbigi ni abaka me Babulon obino i Jerucalem, te kwanyo abaka me Jerucalem oko karacel kede rwode me kuno te terogi luŋ baŋe i Babulon." 
Ezekiel17:13 En okwanyo atin me ot abaka acel te cikere kede kun mie ekwoŋo akwoŋa ni ebino gwoko cikere-nono. En omako daŋ jo adoŋo me Jerucalem te terogi oko," 
Ezekiel17:14 me rok doŋ bed mot, kun mom dok oyiyia nononono, dok daŋ ogwok cikkere me locgi cuŋ atek." 
Ezekiel17:15 Cite abaka me Juda ojem oko, te cwayo akwena i Miciri, me jo Miciri konye kede aguragura kede mony adwoŋ meicel. En bino loyo ateteni? Dano ame timo kodi tim man twero bwot?" 
Ezekiel17:16 En twero turo cikere mere eka dok te bwot? Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, ‘Kite acalo atye kwo-ni, abaka-nu gire bino to i Babulon, pien ocao kwoŋ ame rik ekwoŋo, dok oturo cikere ame rik en oketo iyi akina en kede abaka me Babulon, ame rik okete me bedo i wi kom me loc acalo abaka." 
Ezekiel17:17 Parao karacel kede lwak monnyere, kede lwak jo apol atata, mom bino konye i lweny, ka jo Babulon otoro lobo oguro cel oko, me onek lwak jo apipim ame onwoŋo bedo iye." 
Ezekiel17:18 Kite acalo en doŋ otyeko cayo kwoŋ ame ekwoŋo, dok daŋ oturo cikere ame rik ecikere kede, eka te timo jami magi luŋ, ateteni en gire mom bino bwot.’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Kite acalo an Obaŋa atye kwoni, abino gire keto can i kome pi kwoŋ ame rik en okwoŋo i nyima ame aman en doŋ otyeko cayo kede pi cikerena ame aman en oturo." 
Ezekiel17:20 Abino cikoboona me make, en bino moko iyi owic, eka ate tere i Babulon, ate cako ŋolo kop i kome kuno, pi timmere me erupe ame en obedo timo i koma." 
Ezekiel17:21 Jo mere me lweny ame oyero ayera obino neko oko i pala lweny, jo ame odoŋŋere, obino keto oko atata; mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot Obaŋa atyeko kobo kop man.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “An ikoma en ame abino kwanyo cuny yat cedar ame pwod toco mere, kun aturo i wie malo, an ikoma en a daŋ dok abino pito," 
Ezekiel17:23 abino pito i wi kidi abor meicel ame tye iyi Icrael; abino pito kuno me jany iye, dok daŋ onyak nyige adwoŋ meicel, odok twon yattoro adwoŋ ame kit leyi luŋ me tim bino we i tere, kede kit winyo luŋ bino te bino gero wudigi i jaŋe." 
Ezekiel17:24 Mannono bino miyo yen luŋ ame tye i tim ŋeo ni an atwero miyo yat ame odoŋo abor doko acecek, eka yat ame cecek te doko abor, dok atwero miyo yen ame dyaka two oko, eka ate miyo yen otwo dok adyaka. Man kop ame an Rwot ikoma akobo, dok daŋ abino miyo cobere.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Ŋo ame jo tye ka timo me bedo nwoyo kobo carokop man i kom i Icrael? Gin okobo ni, ‘Kwarowa rik ocamo nyig olok awac, omio lak otino odil oko.’" 
Ezekiel18:3 Doŋ kite ame an Rwot Obaŋa atye kede kwo-ni, mom dok ibino medde wunu kobo carokop man iyi Icrael atwal." 
Ezekiel18:4 Nen ba, kwo a jo luŋ tye i ciŋa, kwo a jo adoŋo kede kwo itino atino, gin luŋ tye i ciŋa. Ŋat ame timo tim me bal bino to." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Ka ce dano moro kite atira, dok timo gin ame tye atira, ame cik mito," 
Ezekiel18:6 ka ce dano-nono mom woro jogi a jo Icrael, dok daŋ mom camo lee moro ame oyalo i jogi, Ka ce kodi dano-nono mom balo dako awottere, dok daŋ mom ribere i dako mere kare ame two two me kwer," 
Ezekiel18:7 mom buro ŋattoro, dok daŋ mom yako gire jami a ŋattoro, kun dwoko jami a jo okoporo jami mere baŋgi, mio cam me acama baŋ jo a kec neko, kede boŋo me aruka baŋ jo ame woto onoro." 
Ezekiel18:8 Ka ce en mom mio lim me akopa pi nwoŋo agoba, Cunye dag timo gin arac, ento ŋolo kop kakare, kun tye kede gen i akina jo luŋ." 
Ezekiel18:9 En lubo cikka ducu, dok daŋ gwokere meicel kun timo ginnoro luŋ ame an aciko, dano-nono nwoŋo dano a kite atira, ateteni danonono bino bedo kwo.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Ka ce dano-nono onywalo wode ame ayak jo, onyo ame anek jo, kun timo gin ame pappere yam mom otimo kadi acel." 
Ezekiel18:11 En camo riŋo leyi ame oyalo i cal jogi, kun daŋ babalo mon owote mere," 
Ezekiel18:12 dok wuno jo ame ocan karacel kede jo ame piny oloo. En mom rwenyo i tim me yako jo, dok gin ame ojeŋo bote pi banya mom dwoko baŋ wegi mege kadi acel, kun obedo awor jogi, dok daŋ timo tim me kwer ame neno lik." 
Ezekiel18:13 Dok daŋ mio jo koporo banya baŋe pi nwoŋo agoba, Wode-nono gire mom bino bedo kwo, mom bino bedo kwo kadi acel. Pien nwoŋo en doŋ obedo timo jami magi man me kwer, bino miyo en to gire oko, remo me ballere te dok gire i wie." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Ka ce dano-nono onywalo wode, ame neno balloro luŋ ame pappere yam obedo timo, eka te bedo alwor kun mom timo kodi bal ame pappere obedo timo." 
Ezekiel18:15 Mom camo cam ame oyalo i cal jogi a jo Icrael, mom babalo mon owote mege," 
Ezekiel18:16 dok mom timo ginnoro arac i kom ŋattoro, pe daŋ yako gi a ŋattoro: mio cam me acama baŋ jo ame kec neko, kede boŋo me aruka baŋ jo ame woto onoro." 
Ezekiel18:17 Mom bedo kede mit me timo ginnoro arac, mom daŋ mio banya baŋ ŋattoro pi nwoŋo agoba, kun obedo ŋat ame gwoko cikka, dok lubo ginnoro luŋ ame an aciko ame daŋ te timo kite ame aciko kede, dano-nono gire mom bino to pi bal a pappere, en gire bino bedo kwo," 
Ezekiel18:18 Cite pappere bino to oko pi ballere kene, pien obedo buro jo, kun daŋ yako jami owote mere, dok daŋ timo jami ame mom nen aber i nyim jo." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Kadi amannono yin dok pwod ipenyo ni, ‘Piŋo kara awobi mom twero neno can pi bal a pappere?’ Atwero gamo pennyi-nono kit man, Ka ce awobi obedo ti mo gin ame cik mito, kun timo gin ame tye atira, dok daŋ obedo gwokere meicel me lubo gin ame aciko, en gire bino bedo kwo." 
Ezekiel18:20 Cite ŋat ame timo bal bino to oko. Mom obino keto can i kom awobi pi bal a pappere, dok daŋ mom obino keto can i kom adwoŋ pi bal a wode. Dano ame kite atira, bino nwoŋo bakacic ame otike en kene, pi tim atira ame en obedo timo, dok atim gin arac daŋ obino keto can i kome en kene, pi gin arac ame en otimo." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Cite ka atim tim arac olokere te weko bal luŋ ame yam etimo eka te cako lubo cikka, kun timo gin ame cik mito ame tye atira, kodi dano-nono gire bino bedo kwo, mom bino to kadi acel." 
Ezekiel18:22 Mom obino kwano balloro ame yam en otimo kadi acel i wie, pi tim atira ame en otimo bino miyo en bedo kwo," 
Ezekiel18:23 Hamo ni cunya yom i kom to abalo? Pe gire, an amito ni abalo ŋuti, owek timo bal, te lokere dwogo baŋa me ebed kwo." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Cite ka dano moro ame kite atira olokere oko te weko timo gin atira oko, eka te cako timo bal, kun timo daŋ timmogo luŋ me kwer ame atim tim arac onwoŋo timo, dano-nono gire bino to, Mom obino poyo timmoro atira ame en otimo, kadi acel. En bino to pi timmere me erupe kede pi bal ocele ame en obedo timo." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Cite wun jo Icrael itye ka kobo wunu ni, ‘Gin ame Rwot tye ka timo mom tye atira.’ Koŋ apenyowu wun jo Icrael. Gin ame an atye ka timo mom tye atira ateni? Mom gin ame wun itye ka timo wunu en ame mom tye atira?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ka ce lo moro ame kite atira olokere oko te cako timo bal, kun weko timo gin ame tye atira, en bino to pi ballere-nono. En gire bino to pi bal ame en otimo." 
Ezekiel18:27 Amannono daŋ, ka ce atim tim arac olokere oko te cako weko timo gin arac ame yam etimo, eka te cako timo gin ame cik mito ame tye atira, dano-nono gire bino laro kwo mere." 
Ezekiel18:28 En gire bino bedo kwo kun mom to kadi acel, pien en oparo kop i cunye, eka te cako weko bal luŋ ame yam etimo." 
Ezekiel18:29 Cite wun jo Icrael itye ka kobo wunu ni, ‘Gin ame Rwot tye ka timo mom tye atira.’ Ama wun jo me Icrael, itamo wunu ni gin ame an atye ka timo mom tye atira? Mom gin ame wun itye ka timo wunu en ame mom tye atira?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Pi mannono ba, an abino ŋolo kop i komwu wun jo me ot Icrael, kun aŋolli ŋat acel acel kop kun lubo gin ame en obedo timo. Myero iŋut wunu iwek timo wunu gin arac luŋ ame ibedo timo wunu, naka mio balwu mio itum wunu oko." 
Ezekiel18:31 Wek wunu doŋ timo bal luŋ ame yam ibedo timo wunu i koma, me icak wunu doŋ bedo i cuny anyen, karacel kede tam anyen daŋ. Piŋo kara imiye wunu me to, wun jo Icrael?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Pien an cunya mom yom i to a ŋattoro kadi acel. Doŋ pi mannono ba, myero ilokere wunu me ibed wunu kwo.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Ezekiel19:1 Cak wunu wer me kumo pi rwode me Icrael," 
Ezekiel19:2 wer wunu kun ikobo wunu ni: Totti onwoŋo tye kene nadi! en onwoŋo tye obuto i akina otino eŋatu, kun pito itino mere." 
Ezekiel19:3 Opwonyo atin acel i akina itino mere, en te doko acalo atin eŋatu, eka te pwonyo mako lee, te cako mako dano kuŋ mwodo oko." 
Ezekiel19:4 Rok apol te cako kuko duru i kome, ote kunyo bur me cikke. Gin te godde oko kede golo iyi bur, ote waye i golo-nono naka i Miciri." 
Ezekiel19:5 I kare ame tottere oneno ni ebalo kare mere nono, gen ame onwoŋo etye kede doŋ orwenyo oko, en dok te kwanyo atinnere ocele, te loko doko atin eŋatu." 
Ezekiel19:6 I kare ame atinnere-nono doŋ odoŋo, en te cako wot idwar kede eŋatu ocele mege; en te pwonyo kite me mako lee, te dok cako mako dano me amwoda mere." 
Ezekiel19:7 En te tuturo cellogo ame onwoŋo oguro atek, te keketo boma luŋ, miyo doko wi obur, ame temiyo jo ame bedo i lobonono bedo kede twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, ka en tye ka kok." 
Ezekiel19:8 Rok apapat te cako lweny i kome, ote ci ko owic me make i kabedo ducu, ote daŋ ryeyo boogi gure kede dyere, en te poto oko i bur ame onwoŋo gin okunyo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Gin te waye oko i bur kuno kede golo, te tere naka baŋ abaka me Babulon; otere ote wot ke te i ot can, me mom dok omedde winyo koko mere atwal i wi kiddi me Icrael." 
Ezekiel19:10 Totti yam calo yat olok, ame opito i poto olok ame tye i ŋet pii. Pien pii onwoŋo dwoŋ twatwal iye, omio jaŋe te tuco apol meicel, nyige daŋ te nyak adwoŋ meicel." 
Ezekiel19:11 Jaŋ olokkere onwoŋo tek meicel, omio i kare ame odoŋo, odoko abiro aloc. Olok man onwoŋo odoŋo abor meicel ame wie buco gudo polo borrere onwoŋo jo luŋ twero neno, karacel kede kite ame onwoŋo obuŋere kede." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ento jo rik te puto tyen olokkono oko i twon akemo meicel, ote reto piny i lobo. Yamo ame okodo i tutuŋ kide, te bino twoyo oko, nyige te oony oko piny, jaŋe ame onwoŋo tek wokki daŋ te twotwoa oko, kare ame otwo mac te waŋo oko." 
Ezekiel19:13 Aman dok onako opito i tim ame otwo ikaŋ, kan ame pii mom tye iye kadi acel." 
Ezekiel19:14 Mac omoko i kor olok piny, te lak waŋo jaŋe kede nyige oko ducu, Jaŋe mom doŋ bino bedo atek kadi acel, abiro aloc mom doŋ bino ya iye. Man wer me kumo ame doŋ olokere odoko wer ame owero kare i kare." 
Ezekiel20:1 I nino dwe apar, me dwe me abic, i mwaka me abiro, odoŋe mogo me Icrael obino baŋa me bino penyo kop i baŋ Rwot," 
Ezekiel20:2 Rwot te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Wot a dano we, kobbi odoŋe me Icrael, kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo. Man wun ibino wunu me bino penyo kop i baŋa bo? Kite acalo an Rwot Obaŋa atye kwo-ni, wun gire mom ibino wunu penyo kopporo baŋa kadi acel. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Wot a dano we, ibino ŋolligi kop? Ŋolligi doŋ kop do. Poyo wigi i kom timmogo me kwer ame kwarigi rik obedo timo." 
Ezekiel20:5 Kobbigi kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: I kare ame rik ayero iye jo Icrael, rik an akwoŋo baŋ ikwae a Yakobo. Anyutte baŋgi i Miciri, kun akwoŋo baŋgi akobo ni, ‘An a Rwot Obaŋawu.’" 
Ezekiel20:6 I kare-naca daŋ en ame rik ate cikere kedgi ni abino kwanyogi oko i Miciri ate terogi i lobo ame an doŋ atyeko yero pirgi, lobo ame cak kede moo kic dwoŋ iye meicel, lobo me kwogo atek meicel ame kato lobo ocele luŋ." 
Ezekiel20:7 Akobbigi ni myero obol cal jogi oko pien obedo gin me kwer, dok daŋ acikogi ni myero kur olille obaŋe mogo me Miciri ame obedo obaŋe me gobagoba, pien an en ame abedo Obaŋagi." 
Ezekiel20:8 Cite gin gigi ote jem oko, ote kwero winyo koppa oko, Gin luŋ ote kwero bolo cal jogi oko dok ote medde gigi ameda i woro obaŋe a jo Miciri ame mom obedo obaŋe me ateni ca. “En omio ate tamo ni myero aluŋ akemona kede inigana i komgi i dye lobo me Miciri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Cite mom ate timo gin ame atamo ni myero atim-nono, pien mannono onwoŋo twero miyo nyiŋa doko ayot i akina orok kan ame jo Icrael onwoŋo bedo iye. Pien an onwoŋo anyutte baŋ jo Icrael i akinagi kuno, kun akobo ni abino kwanyogi oko i lobo me Miciri." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Mannono omio rik ate kwanyogi oko i lobo me Miciri ate terogi i tim. 
Ezekiel20:11 I tim kuno ate miyogi cikka dok ate cikogi kun anyuttigi ginnoro luŋ ame an onwoŋo amito ni gin otim, ame ka ŋat olubo ginnono luŋ twero bedo kwo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Medo i kom mannono, rik ate miyogi daŋ nino me cabit ni gin myero ogwoki, kun bedo acalo anyut ame tye i akina an kede gin, me gin oŋe ni an a Rwot en alonyogi ote doko acil." 
Ezekiel20:13 Cite jo Icrael te medde jem gigi ajema i koma i tim; gin te kwero gigi lubo cikka oko, kun daŋ okwero timo gin ame acikogi iye; ame obedo gin ame ka dano olubo twero bedo kwo. Aco cabit ame onwoŋo amiogi ni myero ogwok, gin te balo odoco. “I kare ame gin tye i tim kuno ate tamo ni myero aluŋ akemona i komgi me ami wigi gik oko i wi lobo." 
Ezekiel20:14 Cite mom ate timo gin ame onwoŋo atamo, pien mannono onwoŋo twero miyo nyiŋa bale i akina orok ame onwoŋo onena i kare ame akwanyogi i lobo me Miciri." 
Ezekiel20:15 Medo i mannono, onwoŋo rik akwoŋo baŋgi akwoŋa i tim ni mom doŋ abino terogi i lobo ame onwoŋo atyeko miyo baŋgi, lo bo ame cak kede moo kic dwoŋ iye meicel, dok ame obedo lobo me kwogo atek meicel kato lobo ocele ducu." 
Ezekiel20:16 Rik akwoŋo kwoŋ man pien gin onwoŋo okwero lubo gin ame onwoŋo acikogi ni otim, kun daŋ mom olubo cikka, dok obalogu nino me cabit ame onwoŋo aciko ni gin ogwoki. Gin gigi omedde ameda i maro cal jogi ame onwoŋo gin oworo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kadi bed onwoŋo akwoŋo akwoŋa, cite pwod dok awekogi, mom ajwerogi, mom amio wigi ogik oko i tim." 
Ezekiel20:18 “Dok ate medde kobo baŋ itinogi i tim kuno ni myero kur olub cik ame yam kwarigi oketo; kur olub kitegi, dok daŋ myero kur olille i woro cal jogi." 
Ezekiel20:19 Akobbigi ni an a Rwot en abedo Obaŋagi, myero gin olub cikka, kun ogwokere i lubo gin ame an aciko ni myero gin otim." 
Ezekiel20:20 Dok myero ogwok cabit obed nino acil, me bed acalo anyut ame tye i akina an kede gin, me gin oŋe ni an a Rwot en abedo Obaŋagi." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Cite itinogi daŋ te medde jem ajema i koma; mom obedo lubo cikka, dok daŋ mom obedo gwokere i lubo gin ame onwoŋo aciko, ame ka ŋat ogwoko twero bedo kwo. Aco cabit ame onwoŋo amiogi ni myero ogwok i, gin te bedo balo gigi abala. “En omio ate tamo ni myero aony akemona i komgi kede inigana daŋ i komgi i kare ame gin tye i tim kunu." 
Ezekiel20:22 Cite mom ate ryeyo ciŋa me timo gin ame atamo ni myero atimmono, pien mannono onwoŋo twero miyo nyiŋa balle i akina orok, ame onwoŋo onena i kare ame akwanyogi i lobo me Miciri." 
Ezekiel20:23 Medo i mannono, rik daŋ akwoŋo baŋgi akwoŋa i tim kunnono ni mannono abino keketogi oko i akina rok apapat, kun aterogi i lobo apapat." 
Ezekiel20:24 Rik akwoŋo kwoŋ man pien gin okwero lubo cikka, dok daŋ okwero tiyo gin ame onwoŋo an aciko, dok obalo-gu nino me cabit ame onwoŋo aciko ni myero ogwok i, gin gigi omedde ameda i maro cal jogi ame onwoŋo papagi woro." 
Ezekiel20:25 Mede dok i kom mannono, rik dok ate miyogi cikkogo a mom beco, ate cikogi daŋ me tiyo gigi mogo ame mom twero miyogi obedo kwo." 
Ezekiel20:26 Amiogi oballe kengi i mot ame gin omio, kun amiogi oyalo cal jogi-nono itino awobegi me kao, acalo mot awaŋa. Atimo man me miyogi bedo i lworo adwoŋ meicel kede pi keto can i komgi; me gin oŋe ni an en ame abedo Rwot." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Pi mannono ba, yin wot a dano, myero ikob kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo baŋ jo Icrael: Man dok yo ocele ame kwariwu yam onywara kede, kun obedo timo kede tim me erupe i koma." 
Ezekiel20:28 Pien i kare ame akelogi i lobo ame rik akwoŋo ni abino miyogi, ka waŋgi ocop i lobo moro ame obedo kidikidi onyo yattoro ame pote obuŋere meicel, gin oloko kaci-naca doko ka miyo motgi. Gin omio akemo bedo maka pi motgi me awaŋa ame gin owaŋo karacel kede mot amata ame gin obedo onyo kuno." 
Ezekiel20:29 An apenyogi ni, ‘Kabedo mene ame obedo kidikidi ame iwoto wunu iye nono? Mannono en omio olwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nono ni Bama naka atot tin.’" 
Ezekiel20:30 Aman yin doŋ myero ikob baŋ jo me ot Icrael kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo. Wun daŋ pwod imito timo wunu kit bal ame kwarowu obedo timo? Ibino medde lile wunu kenwu kun iworo wunu cal jogi kede timo gigi mogo me kwer. 
Ezekiel20:31 Ka ce itye ka miyo motwu, kun iyalo wunu cal jogi itino awobewu acalo mot awaŋa, nwoŋo itye ka lille wunu kenwu i cal jogi ame iworo wunu nono tuno kede naka tin. Wun jo Icrael itamo ni pwod dok ibino medde wunu penyo kop i baŋa? Kite acalo an Rwot Obaŋa atye kwo-ni, mom gire ibino medde wunu penyo ginnoro i baŋa." 
Ezekiel20:32 “Gin ame iyiko wunu me timo i cunywu mom gire bino timere, en tam ame itye ka tamo wunu ni wun daŋ myero ibed wunu i rok ocele, acalo atekere ame tye i lobo apapat kun iworo wunu yen kede gweŋe." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Kite acalo an Rwot Obaŋa atye kwo-ni, ateteni, an gire abino bedo abakawu. Man bino cobere i ciŋa atek ame abino ryeyo i komwu kede akemo agwa ame abino coro i komwu." 
Ezekiel20:34 Abino kwanyowu oko i akina rok ocele kun acokowu i lobo apapat ame ikeketa wunu iye i ciŋa atek ame aryeo kede akemo ame atye ka coro i kom jo. 
Ezekiel20:35 Abino terowu i tim a rok ocele, i kare ame atye kedwu kuno, abino cako ŋolliwu kop waŋ i waŋ." 
Ezekiel20:36 Kite ame rik aŋolli kwarowu kop i tim i lobo me Miciri, mannono daŋ en kite ame abino ŋolliwu kede kop. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo." 
Ezekiel20:37 Abino miyowu ibeo wunu i te abiro kun ibeo wunu acel acel. 
Ezekiel20:38 Abino dwoko jo ame jem oko i akinawu kede jo ame timo bal i nyima; abino kwanyogi oko i lobo ame gin otye iye acalo wele, cite gin mom obino tuno i lobo me Icrael, mannono bino miyowu iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Aco wun jo me ot Icrael, Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man baŋwu. Ka ce wun mom iye winyo wunu koppa, cakere aman wot kede anyim myero ŋat acel acel wot wor cal jogi mere, ento nyiŋa acil wun mom ibino balo wunu kede motwu ame iyalo wunu i cal jogi." 
Ezekiel20:40 “Pien i wi kidina acil, ame en kidi me Icrael abor meicel, jo me ot Icrael luŋ, bino wora i lobo-naca. Gin luŋ aluŋa obino wora kuno. An abino jologi kuno, kuno en ame abino mito ni wun imi wunu ginnoro baŋa, kun imio wunu mot ame iyero wunu ayera, dok daŋ ame obedo mot acil." 
Ezekiel20:41 Mot a ŋwece kur me kweyo cunya, en ame ibino miya wunu i kare ame akwanyowu i akina orok kun acokowu i lobo apapat ame ikeketa wunu iye. Abino miyo ineno wunu ni an abedo Obaŋa acil i akina rok ocele kuno." 
Ezekiel20:42 Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot, i kare ame doŋ akelowu i lobo me Icrael, ame en lobo ame rik akwoŋo pire baŋ kwariwu." 
Ezekiel20:43 I kare ame itye wunu kuno, ibino poyo wunu kitewu, kede ginnoro luŋ ame ibedo timo wunu, kun ibala wunu kede komwu kenwu. Cunywu bino cwer pi gin arac luŋ ame ibedo timo wunu." 
Ezekiel20:44 Ibino ŋeyo wunu ni an a Rwot ka ce atio kedwu kun aparo pi nyiŋa, kun mom alubo kitewu areco, onyo timwu a mom beco, wun jo Icrael. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Wot a dano we, koŋ icik waŋi inen tutuŋ anyarolum eka ite rabo kop i kom tutuŋ anyarolum." 
Ezekiel20:47 Kobbi buŋ me Negeb ame tye i lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum, ni myero owiny kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: ‘Nen ba, abino cwinyo mac i komi te waŋo yen adyaka luŋ ame tye baŋi, kun waŋo daŋ yen otwo luŋ, maccono bino lyel nakanaka ame mom oromo neko, te wawaŋo nyim jo luŋ, cakere i tutuŋ anyarolum tuno kede tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Ezekiel20:48 Jo luŋ aluŋa bino ŋeyo ni an Rwot en ame acwinyo maccono. Ŋattoro mom bino neko maccono kadi acel.’ ” 
Ezekiel20:49 An ate gamo kop a Rwot ni, “Ama Obaŋa, jo luŋ tye ka kobo ni, an kare ducu akobbigi kop kun adupo adupa.”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Rwot rik te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Wot a dano we, cik waŋi inen tutuŋ Jerucalem. Rab kop i kom kabedo luŋ acil ame gin woro iye Obaŋa. Kwenyoro lobo me Icrael." 
Ezekiel21:3 Kobbi jo ni an a Rwot atye ka kobo kop man, ni, ‘Nen ba, an atye i kop i komwu, abino woto pala lwennya oko iyi akure mere, ate ŋoŋolo jo luŋ ame tye i akinawu, jo a kitegi atira, karacel kede jo areco." 
Ezekiel21:4 Pi mannono abino woto pala lwennya iyi akure ate cako ŋoŋolo i jo luŋ, jo a kitegi atira kede jo a kitegi reco, kun acako i tutuŋ anyarolum tuno kede naka tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Ezekiel21:5 Jo luŋ bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot doŋ atyeko woto palana oko iyi akure, mom dok abino rwako bedo iyi akure kadi acel." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Wot a dano we, om weo atut meicel ame itaoni amito yec ayeca pi cwercuny, kun gin jo-nono otye onenni." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ka ce gin openyi ni, ‘Pino kara iomo twon weo arac meicellono?’ yin ibino kobbigi ni, ‘Pien tye amut ame awinyo i kom gin ame bino timere. Ka ce gin ame bino timere-nono kare mere doŋ otuno, cuny ŋat acel acel bino doko agoro oko, ciŋ jo luŋ daŋ bino doko agoro oko, teko bino rwenyo oko i cuny dano acel acel. Coŋ jo luŋ bino myel amyela. Nen ba, kare-nono doŋ otuno oko, ginnoro gire doŋ bino timmere.’ ” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel21:8 Rwot dok te kobba ni," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Wot a dano we, rab kop, me ikobbi jo kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Pala lweny, otye ka rabo pala lweny, otye ka jwayo lebe meicel," 
Ezekiel21:10 otye ka rabo me neko jo, otye ka jwayo lebe me mimila bala lutkot! Mom tye ŋattoro ame twero geno kadi acel. Wun doŋ ityeko cayo wunu abiro oko, kede ginnoro luŋ ame otio i yat." 
Ezekiel21:11 Mannono en omio doŋ otye ka jwayo leb pala lweny, me doŋ cak tic kede, Otye ka rabo lebe kede jwayo me ote miyo baŋ anek jo." 
Ezekiel21:12 Wot a dano we, cak ba koko dok ikomi pi jona. Pien kop man otiko rwode luŋ me Icrael, gin luŋ karacel kede jona doŋ otyeko miyogi oko me aneka i pala, Pi mannono myero doŋ ibabapo amuroni ba," 
Ezekiel21:13 Pien otye ka temowu kara ŋo ame myero en doŋ tim, pien wun itye ko cayo wunu abiro oko.” Man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Pi mannono ba, wot a dano, myero irab kop acalo adwarpiny, eka ite bapo ciŋi me wek pala lweny me neko jo ame myero to bino doŋ piny me neko jo, kun bedo bino kare i kare. Pala lwennyere iyiliyili meicel dok bino neko jo atek meicel." 
Ezekiel21:15 Pala lwennyono bino miyo jona nyobere oko, eka jo apol te ŋoye piny i dogcelgi luŋ aluŋa. An doŋ atyeko miyo pala lweny ame meny amenya. Nen ba, otio pala lwennyono ame meny calo lutkot, dok otyeko jwayo lebe me neko joo" 
Ezekiel21:16 Cak doŋ ŋoŋolo jo oko, ŋoŋolo jo ame tye tuŋ cem kede en ame tye tuŋ cam, kannoro luŋ ame icoro." 
Ezekiel21:17 An daŋ abino bapo ciŋa, akemona doŋ te cako kwe. An Rwot ikokome en ame akobo-nono.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Rwot dok te kop keda kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Wot a dano we, ket alama moro ame nyuto yo aryo, ame abaka me Babulon twero bino kede pala lwennyere. Gin aryo luŋ obino ya i lobo acel. Ket dok alama moro ame cimo yo, ket kan ame yo okaro iye me wot i boma." 
Ezekiel21:20 Alama acel bino nyuto yo ame woto i boma a jo Ammon ame olwoŋo ni Raba, alama ocele bino nyuto yo ame woto i Juda naka i boma me Jerucalem ame ocecelo atek wok-ki." 
Ezekiel21:21 Pien abaka me Babulon ocuŋ kan ame yo okaro iye, i agikki kan ame yo aryo-nu okaro iye, me tiyo tic me tyettere kuno. En tye ka yeyeŋo atero mege, dok tye ka penyo kop i baŋ jok ame olwoŋo ni Terapim, dok daŋ tye ka ŋiŋio emany." 
Ezekiel21:22 Kwir a jo Jerucalem tye abino i ciŋe tutuŋ cem, kun tye ka kobbe ni myero ewot egur ikoŋŋogo a wigi oluk i dogcel luŋ me boma, dok etor lobo eyid egur cel oko, dok eger apama cel ame ocuŋ malo iguŋ egur boma oko, kun eŋamo doge ekok, dok eredo i dwon aloŋo." 
Ezekiel21:23 Cite jo me Jerucalem mom bino ye, kun otamo ni man tyet me goba. Man gin obino timo pi kwoŋ ame gin doŋ otyeko kwoŋere kede. Cite bino poyo wigi i kom balgi, dok bino nyuttigi ni obino makogi." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Pien imio otye ka poyo balwu, pien bal ame itye ka timo wunu mom twero kanne kadi acel ame omio ginnoro luŋ ame itye ka timo wunu balwu nen oko kannaler. Man omio wun doŋ itye wunu jo ame kop oloo, daŋ doŋ abino jalowu oko i ciŋ okwor." 
Ezekiel21:25 Aco wun otim tim areco ame pwod idoŋ wunu, karacel kede rwode me Icrael, kare me keto can i komwu tyen me agikki, ene doŋ otum oko." 
Ezekiel21:26 Man kop ame an Rwot akobo, Kwany wunu tok kwogo oko i wiwu, karacel kede itambara ame idwodwalo i wiwu. Mom tye ginnoro kadi acel ame bino bedo kite ame aman tye kede-ni. Loc ame oloo kede ocan, wegi loc obino dwogo oko piny." 
Ezekiel21:27 Abino babalo, abino babalo, abino balo boma gira oko. Cite mannono mom ru bino timere kadi acel, tuno waŋ ame ŋat ame doŋ amio twer me timo mannono doŋ abino." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Yin wot a dano we, myero irab kop, kun ikobo kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa atye ka kobo ni, kun akobo i kom jo me Ammon, kite ame gin tye ka nywaro kede jona Icrael. Kobbigi ni, ‘Pala me lweny doŋ otyeko woto oko me nekogi, otyeko jwayo lebe ame tye ka meny amenya, tye ka memenya calo lutkot." 
Ezekiel21:29 Kobbi jo Ammon ni, anyut ame gin otye ka neno-nono, obedo anyut me goba, dok kop ame otye ka tittigi i kop me anyim daŋ obedo kop me goba. Gin obedo otim tim areco ame karegi tye abino me keto can i komgi tyen me agikki mere. Pala lweny ceggi gudo ŋutgi." 
Ezekiel21:30 Dwok wunu pala lweny cen, rwak wunu pala lweny iyi akure mere. An abino ŋolliwu kop i lobo ame rik oketowu iye, i lobo ame rik onywalowu iye." 
Ezekiel21:31 Abino coro akemona i komwu kuno, ame mac me akemona bino kuto i komwu, eka ate miyowu i ciŋ jo ame ger meicel, dok ame odiro meicel i neko jo." 
Ezekiel21:32 Ibino doko wunu yen me awaŋa i mac, Remowu obino onyo piny i lobowu ikokome, wi jo luŋ te wil oko i komwu atwal, kun mom tye ŋattoro kadi acel ame dok po pirwu, Man kop ame Rwot ikokome okobo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Medo i kom mannono, Rwot rik dok te medo kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Yin wot a dano we, iyikere me ŋolo kop i kom boma ame remo a jo oonyo iye wok-ki? Koŋ doŋ itittigi ginnoro luŋ areco me kwer ame gin obedo timo." 
Ezekiel22:3 Tittigi kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa atye ka kobo ni, ‘Pien i onyo wunu remo a jowu apol meicel, dok daŋ pien iballe wunu oko pi woro cal jogi, mannono omio karewu wun daŋ tye doŋ abino." 
Ezekiel22:4 Bal me remo ame ionyo wunu doŋ tye i komwu, dok daŋ pi woro cal jogi ame wun en ame ipao wunu, omio daŋ ijebere wunu oko. Karewu daŋ doŋ tye ceggi acega, mwaka ame doŋ otyeko moko oko pirwu, doŋ otyeko tuno oko. Mannono omio amio rok apapat ame tye i lobo ocele tye ka cayowu kun oyetowu ayeta." 
Ezekiel22:5 Jo ame tye kan aceggi kede jo ame tye kannabor, bino yetowu wun jo ame nyiŋwu doŋ oballe pi bedo timo tim areco ame yiwu mito." 
Ezekiel22:6 “ ‘Nen ba, rwode luŋ me Icrael ame tye i akinawu, ŋat acel acel tio kede twer ame omie me onyo ka remo a joo" 
Ezekiel22:7 Jo luŋ aluŋa tye doŋ acayo pappagi kede totogi acaa. Orok ame bedo i akinawu otye ka wunogi meicel, karacel kede itino kic kede mon a coggi oto." 
Ezekiel22:8 Jami luŋ acil tye pira, itye wunu doŋ ka cayo acaa, dok ceŋ cabit ame otyeko yiko me wora, daŋ doŋ ibala wunu oko." 
Ezekiel22:9 I akinawu, tye jo ame coko dog owotegi pi onyo remo, jo ocele tye camo cam ame oyalo i cal jogi malo i ka woro jogi, eka te tye jo ocele ame gin ocobo ka mitgi areco keken." 
Ezekiel22:10 Tye jo ocele i akinawu ame buto i ci-papagi kede jo ocele tye buta i mon ame tye i two dwe kun omako daŋ tetek. 
Ezekiel22:11 Jo ocele timo tim me kwer me buto i mon owotegi, kun jo ocele buto anyira a dyeregi. Jo ocele i akinawu buto kom amegogi ame onywale kede, amegogi me papo." 
Ezekiel22:12 Jo ocele i akinawu gamo lim i muŋ pi onyo remo a joo jo ocele i akinawu ŋolo ni myero migi agoba i kom lim ame omio jo Icrael wadgi koporo, kun otye ka i mit me lony keken. Mom doŋ oparo pira kadi acel, man kop ame Rwot okobo." 
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Nen ba, mannono omio abino bapo ciŋa pi timwu me mayo jo pi nwoŋo agoba i yore a mom ber kadi acel, ame itye ka nwoŋo wunu kede i timwu me onyo remo a jo ame itye ka timo wunu." 
Ezekiel22:14 Itamo ni pwod ibino diyo wunu cunywu, onyo ibino timo wunu i teko me tiŋo ciŋwu malo i kare ame abino cako tic i komwu? An Rwot doŋ atyeko kobo, daŋ abino cobo." 
Ezekiel22:15 Abino keketowu atata i akina rok ocele, ite lal wunu i lobo apapat, ate miyo timwu areco-nono gik oko." 
Ezekiel22:16 Mannono bino miyo nyiŋa bale i akina rok ocele, cite wun i komwu ibino ŋeyo wunu ni ana a Rwot.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Wot a dano we, jo me ot Icrael doŋ calo cet lela i tuŋ baŋa. Ocalo doŋ ryal, kede mola abati kede nyonyo kede ricac ame orubo, ame oweko odoŋ i kare ame doŋ otyeko liyo acillere oko, otye doŋ acalo cete i keno me tet." 
Ezekiel22:19 Mannono omio an Rwot Obaŋa atye ka kobbigi kop man. Pien doŋ idoŋ wunu acalo cete, mannono omio doŋ abino cokowu i dye boma me Jerucalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Kite ame dano coko kede ryal, kede mola, kede nyonyo kede ricac, kede abati i keno me tet, me wek ekut mac me meyogi, mannono en kite ame abino timowu kede, kun acokowu i twon akemo kede iniga, ate ketowu kuno, ate meyowu oko." 
Ezekiel22:21 Abino cokowu i Jerucalem, ate kuto mac i terwu, ate miyo akemona meyowu oko." 
Ezekiel22:22 Abino meyogi oko i Jerucalem kite ame omeo kede nyonyo i keno me tet. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot en ame acoro akemona i komgi-nono.” 
Ezekiel22:23 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Wot a dano we, kobbi jo Icrael ni gin otye acalo lobo ame mom cil, onyo kot ame cwe i kare ame akemo tye." 
Ezekiel22:25 Rwodegi ame tye i akinagi calo eŋatu ame tye ka mor i koko, kun leyi ame oneko tye i nyimgi. Gin otye ka neko jo, dok daŋ omao lonyo a jo ame okano kede gigi mogo me wel, dok daŋ pi nek ame gin otye ka neko kede jo omio mon a coggi oto odoŋ apol meicel i akinagi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Olamdog ame tye iye otye ka turo cikka pi timo tim me byemi byemi, kun mom otye kede woro moro kadi acel i kom jamina acil. Mom oŋeo poko gin acil kede gin ame mom cil, dok daŋ mom otye ka pwonyo kop i kom gin ame cik ogeŋo kede en a cik mom ogeŋo, mom daŋ doŋ oparo pi cabit kadi acel. Tim ame gin tye ka timo-nono omio jo Icrael mom doŋ wora kadi acel." 
Ezekiel22:27 Rwode luŋ ame tye i Jerucalem orom aroma kede epet ame tye ka kikilo leyi ame gin oneko me acamagi, otye ka onyo remo a jo, kun oneko jo pi mito doko olonyo." 
Ezekiel22:28 Odwarpiny ame tye iye tye ka wumo kodi ballono luŋ calo ŋat ame opuo kor apama oko kede coka atar. Otye ka neno anyuttogo me gobagoba, dok daŋ otyeko kop i kom gin ame abino timere gobagoba, kun okobo ni, Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, kun nwoŋo Rwot gire mom okobbigi kopporo." 
Ezekiel22:29 Jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo, otye ka timo tim me cero jo kede yako jo. Otye ka wuno jo ame ocan kede jo ame mito akonya, karacel kede orok ame bedo i akinagi kun mom oparo pirgi kadi acel." 
Ezekiel22:30 Abedo yenyo dano moro i akinagi ame myero ger apama cel, kede tiro kan ame omuko, me atot ya lar lobo ka akemo omaka ame amito tyeko oko, atot ya awekgi, cite ŋattoro mom twero nen kadi acel." 
Ezekiel22:31 Mannono omio acoro akemona i komgi, amio mac me akemona onekogi oko; mannono atimo pi bal ame gin otimo, Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Wot a dano we, tye mon aryo ame totogi acel," 
Ezekiel23:3 ame gin luŋ otimo tim me alaya i Miciri; gin ocako bedo olaya i kare ame gin pwod anyira atino, omio co obedo jejebo tunogi oko, ote daŋ cako ŋeye oko kede co, kun mom ru onyomere." 
Ezekiel23:4 Nyako adwoŋ rik nyiŋe Okola, eka nyako atidi nyine te bedo Okoliaba. An rik ate nyomo gin luŋ, ote nywalo awobe kede anyira. Aco kop i kom nyiŋgi Okola rik nyine ocuŋ pi Camaria, eka Okoliaba te cuŋ pi Jerucalem." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Okoliaba omedde bedo alaya kun daŋ en tye acalo cega, en onwoŋo maro coge twatwal ame obedo jo Acuria," 
Ezekiel23:6 ocirikale ame rukoboŋo obedo amaramar, oloc adoŋo kede otel wi mony; joni luŋ rik obedo awobe ame pwod tino, ame mwonya meicel, dok daŋ gin luŋ rik orino kede aguragura." 
Ezekiel23:7 En dakona-ni rik gire ojalle i ciŋ joni pi timo tim me alaya alaya, ame jo-ni luŋ obedo jo ame oyero ayera me Acuria. En daŋ rik te lille oko i cal jogi a ŋat acel acel ame en maro." 
Ezekiel23:8 En mom oye weko timmere me alaya-nono, ame en obedo timo con i kare ame en pwod tye i Miciri, pien i kare ame en pwod tidi, co obedo buto kede te bale doŋ oko acalo nyako, kun obuto kede acalo alaya me cobo mitgi." 
Ezekiel23:9 Mannono omio ate jalle doŋ oko i ciŋ jo Acuria ame obedo coge ame en rik maro. 
Ezekiel23:10 Mannono omio gin te gonyo boŋo i kome oko te weke doŋ onoro, ote mako awobe mere kede anyira mere neko oko i pala lweny. Mannono te doko kop me aboka i akina mon, i kare ame doŋ otyeko ŋolle kop oko." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Aminnere Okolaba oneno gin man ame otimere i kome, cite en onwoŋo dok rac meicel ame kato aminnere-naca oko i timmere me maro co ocele kede tim me alaya alaya. En dok te medde bedo arac ame kato aminnere oko." 
Ezekiel23:12 En te medde maro jo Acuria, oloc adoŋo ame loo dul apapat, odoŋe ame telo mony, ocirikale ame orukere oko i jami me lweny, wegi aguragura ame gin obedo awobe ame nen amwonya meicel." 
Ezekiel23:13 An ate neno ni en daŋ doŋ otyeko bale oko, en daŋ dok tye ka lubo yo ocele ame aminnere onwoŋo tye ka lubo." 
Ezekiel23:14 “Cite en dok obedo medde ameda i tim me alaya, kun neno anaka cal co ame ogogo i kor ot, kede cal a jo Kaldaya ame opuo komgi i raŋi arema," 
Ezekiel23:15 kun daŋ otweo pyergi kede del, dok daŋ oboo wigi oko kede itambara aboco me boyo wic. Gin luŋ obedo cal jo ame tye i rwom me tic amalo; mannono onwoŋo obedo cal a jo Babulon, ame lobogi ikokome obedo lobo me Kaldaya." 
Ezekiel23:16 I kare ame en onenogi, cunye te cako myel amyela pirgi, te cwayo kwena baŋgi i Kaldaya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Jo me Babulon te bino cako buto kede, ote bale oko i timo tim me abor ame gin obedo timo i kome. I kare ame gin doŋ otyeko bale oko, en te ya i baŋgi kun cunye doŋ mom ber kadi acel." 
Ezekiel23:18 Kare ame en dok omedde timo tim me alaya alaya kannaler kun daŋ doŋ bedo onoro aboŋo boŋo i kome, an daŋ cunya te ya oko i kome doŋ, kite ame rik cunya oya kede i kom aminnere."
