Ezekiel23:19 Cite en gire pwod te medde i timmere me alaya alaya, kun wie mom wil i kom gin ame ebedo timo i kare ame pwod enyako, i tim me alaya ame en obedo timo i kare ame en pwod tye i Miciri." 
Ezekiel23:20 Cunye te bedo medde myel amyela i kom co ame emaro ame onwoŋo tye kuno ame komgi me co onwoŋo rom aroma i me akana, dok remogi me co onwoŋo rom aroma i me aguragura." 
Ezekiel23:21 Mannono en kite ame yin Okolaba ibedo bedo kede mit me carocaro ame ibedo timo ame pwod i nyako, i kare ame jo me Miciri bedo mumulo kede kori ote jebo tunoni oko kun onwoŋo pwod ogulo agula." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Doŋ pi mannono ba, yin Okoliaba, man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo i komi. Nen abino twarre i komi kede i kom cogi ame imaro, ame rik iya i baŋgi kun cunyi oballe oko, abino kelogi i kabedo ducu me bino lweny i komi." 
Ezekiel23:23 Abino kela cogi ame tye i Babulon kede en ame tye i Kaldaya luŋ, jo Pekod, jo Coa, jo Koa, kede jo Acuria ducu; ame gin luŋ obedo awobe abeco ame nen amwonya, oloc adoŋo ame loo dul mony apapat, odoŋe ame telo wi mony, kun gin luŋ ocirikale me lweny ame riŋo aguragura." 
Ezekiel23:24 Gin luŋ obino bino i komi, kun obino i tutuŋ anyarodi, i gadigadi me lweny kede gadigadi me tiŋo jami, karacel kede mony adwoŋ meicel. Gin luŋ obino bino me lweny i komi kun oguri oko dyere, kun otye i kwot kede tok nyonyo, abino miyogi twer me ŋolo kop i komi i kite ame gin ŋolo kede kop." 
Ezekiel23:25 Abino wiro akemona i komi me wek gin otimi cucu. Gin obino ŋolo wumi kede yiti luŋ, icennere ote doŋ neki oko kede pala lweny. Dok ote mako awobeni kede anyirani ote waŋo oko akwo kede mac." 
Ezekiel23:26 Gin bino gonyo boŋo oko i komi, ote kwanyo daŋ jamini luŋ me wel." 
Ezekiel23:27 Mannono en kite ame abino giko kede timmi me alaya alaya kede timi me maro co atata ame ibino kede iya i loba me Miciri. Mom dok ibino neno jo Miciri kadi acel, dok wii daŋ bino wil oko i komgi atwal.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino miyi i ciŋ jo ame yin idago, i ciŋ jo ame rik i baŋgi ame cunyi oballe oko." 
Ezekiel23:29 Gin bino timmi lit, pien gin odagi ote gamo giri moro luŋ ame ibedo yelle tic pire, ote daŋ gamo boŋoni oko ote weki doŋ onoro, kun komi me mon ame ibedo timo kede tim me alaya alaya doŋ nen kannaler. Timmi me carocaro kede timmi me alaya alaya," 
Ezekiel23:30 en ame omio man tye ka timere i komi, pien ibedo timo tim me alaya alaya i rok ocele, kun daŋ iballe oko pi woro cal jogigi." 
Ezekiel23:31 Yin ibedo lubo kite ame aminni obedo timo; mannono omio abino keto can ame aketo i kome i komi.” 
Ezekiel23:32 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Ibino mato ikopo ame aminni omato, ikopo-nono obedo twon ikopo ame lac dok daŋ yie tut meicel. Jo bino nyeri kun daŋ ocai meicel, pien ikoponi Opoŋ apoŋa ni kwic." 
Ezekiel23:33 Cwercuny bino meri oko, pien ikopo aminni Camaria obedo ikopo ame mio jo lworo, dok ame tyeko jo atyeka," 
Ezekiel23:34 Ibino mato gin ame tye iyie ityeko oko luŋ, eka ite puputo yer wi oko ducu ite ŋolo tunoni oko i kori, Pien an a Rwot Obaŋa doŋ atyeko kobo kop man.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Pi mannono Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Pien wi doŋ owil oko i koma, dok daŋ ityekobola oko i ŋei, yin myero doŋ ikany gin ame obino i komi pi timmi me carocaro kede me alaya alaya.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, itwero doŋ cako ŋolo kop i kom Okola kede Okoliaba, tittigi ginnoro luŋ areco me kwer ame gin obedo timo." 
Ezekiel23:37 Pien gin obedo cot, dok remo a jo omwonne amwona i ciŋgi, gin obedo timo abor i cal jogigi, dok daŋ oyalo cal jogi-nono itinogi awobe ame gin onywalo baŋa." 
Ezekiel23:38 Medo i kom mannono, gin dok otimo tim magi i koma: Obalo kabedo acil me wora i nino acellono, kun daŋ obalo nino me cabit ame aciko ni myero gin ogwoki." 
Ezekiel23:39 Pien ka gin otyeko yalo itino awobegi kede cal jogi, kun oneko acalo mot me awaŋa, i nino acel ame gin oneko iye awobegi-nono, en ame gin dok obino iye i kabedo acil ame owora iye me bino balo, Man en gin ame gin obedo timo i ot me wora," 
Ezekiel23:40 Dok daŋ ocwao okwena me lwoŋo jo ame tye kannabor, jo ame gin olwoŋo-nono daŋ te bino, Yin ilwoko komi oko acil pirgi, ite daŋ wiro waŋi kede moo, eka ite rukoboŋo me kwogo meicel i komi pirgi." 
Ezekiel23:41 Ite bedo iwi tanda me kwogo meicel, kun meja daŋ tye kannono ame opeto itambara iwie, ame oketo iye odok aŋwece kur ame obedo mega karacel kede moo." 
Ezekiel23:42 Woo a jo ame bedo gigi ata kun mom paro ginnoro onwoŋo winyere baŋe kuno, jo ame bedo woo-nono kun gin omero me nino ducu, ame okelogi itim ame otwo imek. Gin orio mola i ŋut ciŋ mon, kede tokkogo abeco i wiigi.”" 
Ezekiel23:43 An dok ate kobo ni, “Aman co mom doŋ tye ka timo tim me abor i twon dako ame alaya ame doŋ oti oko-ni?" 
Ezekiel23:44 Pien gin otye ka wot buta kede kite ame jo buto i mon ame olaya. Mannono en kite ame gin obedo wot kede baŋ Okola kede baŋ Okoliaba me timo tim me carocaro kede. 
Ezekiel23:45 Ento jo ame kitegi atira bino ŋolligi kop, gin mon ame bedo cot, kede mon ame tye ka neko jo, pien gin ocodo cot dok remo a jo tye omwonne amwona i ciŋgi.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Pien Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Kel mony adwoŋ meicel i komgi me imigi odok gin ame jo lworo kede gi-ayaka a jo." 
Ezekiel23:47 Mony bino cecelogi kede gweŋe, dok daŋ bino totoŋogi kede pala lweny; gin bino neko awobegi kengi karacel kede anyiragi i pala lweny ote daŋ wawaŋo udigi kengi." 
Ezekiel23:48 Mannono bino miyo agiko tim me carocaro oko i lobo, me wek mon luŋ nen gin ame otimere i komgi ote weko timo tim me carocaro, kite ame wun ibedo timo wunu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Bal me tim me carocaro ame ibedo timo wunu bino dok i wiwu, ibino wunu kanyo can pi balwu me woro jogi, mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot Obaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Rwot rik dok te kop keda i nino dwe apar me dwe me apar i mwaka me aboŋwen. 
Ezekiel24:2 En okobba ni, “Wot a dano we, co nyiŋ nino a tinni oko piny, co nyiŋ nine-ni ikokome. Abaka me Babulon otyeko guro Jerucalem oko i nino atin-ni." 
Ezekiel24:3 Kob kop man oko kannaler baŋ jo ame maro jemmi, kun ikobbigi i carokop i kom kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo, ni, “Ket guluni i keno, ket gulu i keno, ony pii iyie;" 
Ezekiel24:4 ket iye riŋo ame doŋ otyeko ŋoŋolo oko atitino, ket riŋo abeco-mege, riŋo amuru, kede riŋo me bade, bobolo daŋ iye cogo abeco ame iyero ayera, me poŋ gulu oko." 
Ezekiel24:5 Kwany riŋo romo aberrere i akina riŋo romo ocele mere, rwak yen i keno i te gulu, ted riŋo ame iketo iyi gulu-nono, karacel kede cogo ame daŋ ibobolo iye-nono.”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Can i wi boma ame obedo onyo remo a jo wok-ki, kede gulu ame nyali omako, ame nyali ikome mom romo kwanyere kadi acel. Kwany riŋo ame oŋiŋido atitino ame tye iye ni, kun ikwanyo acel acel, kwany ata kun mom iyero ayera." 
Ezekiel24:7 Pien remo a jo ame en obedo onyo pwod tye kuno, pien remo a jo ame en oneko oony naka i wii kiddi. En mom obedo neko jo kan ame remogi twero wumere oko kede kwoyo." 
Ezekiel24:8 En obedo timo man me tugo akemona, me acul kwor, mannono en omio amio remo a jo ame en obedo neko oonyo i wi kiddi kan ame mom romo wumere.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni: “Can i wi boma ame obedo onyo remo a jo wok-ki! An en abino turo, an en abino mwodo yen me tedo ayido adwoŋ meicel." 
Ezekiel24:10 Kella wunu yen, kut wunu doŋ mac, ted wunu riŋo aber, ite onyo wunu pige oko me cogo mere en ame waŋ." 
Ezekiel24:11 Ket wunu gulu ame yie nono i keno me bed alyet meicel, me moo iyie waŋ oko, dok cilo ame tye iye daŋ meye oko, nyali iye daŋ te tum oko." 
Ezekiel24:12 Abedo kom lolle nono, nyali ikome mac mom romo kwanyo kadi acel." 
Ezekiel24:13 Nyali ame tye iye-nono, rom aroma kede tim me carocaro ame ibedo timo wunu, Pien kono nyo doŋ ajwao cilo oko i komwu, cite cilo ikomwu anwoŋo ni mom romo kwanyere kadi acel, tuno ka aonyo akemona i komwu." 
Ezekiel24:14 An a Rwot doŋ atyeko kobo kop man; kop ame akobo-nono bino cobere, an ikoma abino timo. An mom abino dok cen kadi acel, dok daŋ mom abino koyo ŋattoro kadi acel, cunya mom bino ya i kom gin ame atyeko yiko, an gira abino ŋolliwu kop, kun alubo kitewu kede gin ame ibedo timo wunu, Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Rwot rik dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Wot a dano we, nen ba, an doŋ aceggi kwanyo ŋat ame yomoro cunyi ame imaro neno wok-ki, abino kwanyo oko i baŋi a doŋ acel keken. Cite mom ibino kumo pire, mom ibino koko, dok pig waŋi mom bino ton piny kadi acel." 
Ezekiel24:17 Kur icur atek, cite myero icur momot meicel; myero kur ikum pi dano ame doŋ otyeko to oko. Twe itambarani me tweyo wic i wii, ruk amuki daŋ i tyeni, kur iwum dogi, kur daŋ icam kwon a jo ame tye ka kumo.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Mannono omio akobo kop baŋ lwak odiko con eka otyeno dakona te to oko. Idiko mere ocele, ate timo kite ame onwoŋo ocika kede." 
Ezekiel24:19 Jo te penya ni, “Mom itwero tittiwa te kop me gin ame yin itye ka timo-nono?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 An ate kobbigi ni, “Kop a Rwot, Rwot okobo keda kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Kobbi jo me ot Icrael, ni an Rwot Obaŋa akobo ni, abino balo kabedona acil oko, ame obedo kabedo ame onwoŋo iwakere wunu pire, ame cunywu yom iye ka ineno wunu, dok ame kwowu ocuŋ iye. Dok itinowu awobe kede anyira ame iweko wunu cen i ŋewu, obino neko oko i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel24:22 Mannono bino miyo itimo wunu gin ame ineno wunu an atimo. Mom ibino miyo wunu dogwu, dok daŋ mom ibino camo wunu kwon ame jo akumo camo." 
Ezekiel24:23 Boŋowu me adwala i wiwu bino bedo i wiwu, kun amukwu daŋ tye i tyenwu; mom ibino kumo wunu, akadi koko, ento balwu bino miyo igobere wunu oko, kun ŋat man cucura baŋ wadgi." 
Ezekiel24:24 Mannono bino miyo an Ejekeri abedo anen baŋwu. Wun ibino timo wunu ginnoro luŋ ame an atimo. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni, ka ce man otimere, bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni Rwot en ame obedo Obaŋa.’" 
Ezekiel24:25 “Doŋ yin wot a dano we, i nino ame abino kwanyo iye gigi atek ame gin ogeno, gin ame miogi yomcuny kede kwogo, ame yomoro cunygi ka gin oneno, dok ame cunygi tye iye, kun daŋ okwanyo awobegi kede anyiragi," 
Ezekiel24:26 i nino-nono, dano moro obwot bino bino baŋi me kobbi amuttere." 
Ezekiel24:27 I nino-nono dogi bino yabere me kop kede ŋat ame obwottono, te lebi doŋ te gony atwal, mom dok ite medde bedo ŋat ame mom kobo, Mannono bino miyo yin ibedo anen baŋgi: gin te ŋeyo ni an abedo Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Wot a dano we, cak lokere tuŋ baŋ jo Ammon, me irab kop i komgi." 
Ezekiel25:3 Kobbi jo Ammon ni, Winy wunu kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa tye ka kobo; ‘Pien wun cunywu yom pi bale a oda acil, kede i kom lobo a jo Icrael kare ame onwoŋo oweko yie odoŋ nono calo wi obur, kede i kom jo me ot a Juda i kare ame gin doŋ oterogi oko iyi opii;" 
Ezekiel25:4 Mannono omio an amiyowu oko i ciŋ jo ame tye tutuŋ kide, me gin lowu. Gin bino guro kemagi i akinawu i i lobowu kuno, ote bedo iye. Gin bino camo nyig yen ame ocek i potowu, kun daŋ omato cakwu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Abino miyo Raba doko bar me kwayo inaga karacel kede boma a jo Ammon luŋ, doko ka buto a rommi kede dyegi. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot an Rwot akobo.’" 
Ezekiel25:6 “Man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa tye akobo, ‘Pien itye ka bapo ciŋwu kun ipyepyea wunu i yomcuny, ame icao wunu kede lobo a jo Icrael," 
Ezekiel25:7 pi mannono ba, an doŋ atyeko ryeyo ciŋa i komwu, abino miyowu oko i ciŋ rok ocele acalo gin me ayakagi. Abino miyo waŋwu rwenyo oko i akina rok ocele, kun ito wunu oko i wi lobo, Abino jwerowu oko odoco. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Pien jo Moab tye ka kobo ni jo me ot a Juda rom aroma kede rok ocele mere," 
Ezekiel25:9 mannono omio ocobo mony i kom boma mogo ame tye i tuŋ nyime ame tye daŋ acalo boma ame mio en bedo kede kwogo, kun omedo kede boma me Betjecimot, Baa-Imeon kede me Kiriataim." 
Ezekiel25:10 Abino miyogi luŋ medo kede jo Ammon i ciŋ rok ame tye tutuŋ kide; gin bino loyogi, eka mom dok ote medo po i komgi i akina rok apapat," 
Ezekiel25:11 dok abino ŋolo kop i kom Moab, Mannono bino miyogi oŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Rwot Obaŋa okobo keda ni, “Pien jo Edom oculo kwor i kom jo me ot a Juda agwa meicel, ame omio culo kworgi-nono okelo bal i wigi ame mom twero ya," 
Ezekiel25:13 mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni ebino ryeyo ciŋe i kom Edom, ete neko jo luŋ karacel kede leyi ame tye kuno, Abino miyo lobo me Edom doŋ nono acalo wi obur, cakere i boma me Teman tuno kede i boma me Dedan; obino neko jo iye i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel25:14 Jona Icrael en ame bino culo kwor i kom Edom pira, gin bino timo jo Edom lit kite ame akemona olyeto kede. Jo Edom bino ŋeyo kite ame culo kworra rac kede. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Pien jo Piriciti oculo kwor i kom jogi agwa meicel, kun onekogi i twon keccuny okato kare, pi adage ame obedo bedo i akinagi kare luŋ," 
Ezekiel25:16 mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, abino ryeyo ciŋa i kom jo Piriciti, ate miyo waŋ jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo kuno rwenyo oko i bar me Piriciti, ate daŋ dok neko jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i dog nam." 
Ezekiel25:17 Abino culo kwor i komgi agwa meicel kun agoogi i twon akemo okato kare. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot, i kare ame doŋ atyeko culo kwor i komgi.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 I nino dwe acel me dwe moro ame tye i mwaka me apar wie acel, Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Wot a dano we, pien jo Turo tye ka lelo i yomcuny i kom Jerucalem, kun oredo ni, ‘Koŋ ineno wunu dogcel a jo Icrael doŋ oturo oko, tye doŋ twolo pira, mannono bino miyowa dok odoko olonyo pien Jerucalem doŋ odoko wii obur’," 
Ezekiel26:3 mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Nen ba, an cunya mom yom kadi acel i komi, yin Turo, abino kelo rok apol meicel i komi, kite ame pii i nam yenyo kede bwo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Gin rokkono bino balo apama cel me Turo oko, ote daŋ rereto gedo mere ocuŋ iguŋ malo oko piny. Lobo ame ceko cem abino keketo lobo aber iye oko doŋ ka gweŋ keken i lobo me Turo." 
Ezekiel26:5 Turo doŋ bino bedo i dye nam, bino bedo kan ame ocik rec moo iye boogi. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa doŋ atyeko kobo. Turo bino doko kabedo me ayaka a rok ocele." 
Ezekiel26:6 Anyira mere ame tye i lobo a mom tye i dog nam, obino neko oko i pala lweny. Mannono bino miyogi oŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Nen ba, abino kelo abaka moro ame loo obakki ocele ducu i kom Turo, abaka ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, Nebukadnejar, ame obedo abaka me Babulon, kun en bino aguragura kede gadigadi, kede oryem aguragura, karacel kede lwak mony adwoŋ meicel." 
Ezekiel26:8 En bino neko anyirawu ame bedo i lobo a mom tye i dog nam i pala lweny, bino toro apama cel guro kede Turo oko, te toro lobo daŋ yido gurowu kede, ote tiyo kwode daŋ apol ata me kurowu." 
Ezekiel26:9 En bino nanapo apama celwu oko i twon ikoŋŋogo ame wigi aluktu, te daŋ rereto wudigi oko ame ocuŋ iguŋ malo, kun totoŋo kede le." 
Ezekiel26:10 Aguragura mere bino bedo apol meicel ame bino miyo apua me kan ame gin obeo iye, wumi oko, Redo oryem aguragura kede gadigadi me yeyo ter, kede gadigadi lweny, bino miyo apama me celli yeŋere, i kare ame gin bino donyo i dogcel luŋ me bomani, acalo boma ame doŋ otyeko balo." 
Ezekiel26:11 Tyen aguragura mere bino jejebo dye gudo luŋ ame tye i Turo. En bino neko joni oko i pala lweny, twoni paggi mogo adoŋodoŋo ame tye kuno, bino rette oko piny." 
Ezekiel26:12 Jo mere te yako lonyo luŋ ame tye baŋi, anaka jami luŋ ame icato wunu. Gin bino rereto apama celwu oko piny karacel kede udiwu ame imaro wunu. Gweŋe luŋ kede yen luŋ ame yam igedo wunu kede, karacel kede lobo, gin bino coko luŋ ote wot onyo i nam," 
Ezekiel26:13 Abino miyo wer ame iwero wunu gik oko, karacel kede dwon naŋawu ame igoo wunu." 
Ezekiel26:14 Abino miyo gwen keken en ame doŋ i bomawu kan ame ocik rec twero moyo iye boogi. Apama cel ame oreto piny mom dok obino gero kadi acel, pien an Rwot doŋ atyeko kobo. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel26:15 Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo i kom jo Turo: “Lobo ame tye i dog nam mom bino yeŋere i kare me retteni piny, i kare ame ŋat ame owaŋo tye acucura, ka ce otye ka neko jo atek meicel i dye boma?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Oloc luŋ me dye nam bino yitto oko piny i wi kom me locgi, ote gonyo boŋŋi me kwogo daŋ oko i komgi, karacel kede kanyigi, ote bedo piny i lobo kun komgi amyel amyela. Can ame bino poto i komgi, bino myelo komgi meicel pirwu, cawa ducu." 
Ezekiel26:17 Gin bino cako wero wer me kumo piri, kun owero okobbi ni, ‘Kara dok irwenyo niŋo ba i dye nam, yin boma ame yam iŋeye wok-ki, ame rik tek meicel i dye nam, yin karacel kede joni ame onwoŋo bedo iyii, ŋa ame dok omio kodi can man ame omyelo kom jo, opoto i koma atura wok-ki. Cannere omyelo kom jo luŋ ame bedo i dog nam." 
Ezekiel26:18 Aman omio nino me retteni piny, lobo luŋ ame tye i dog nam, komgi omyel. Koŋ inen lobo luŋ ame tye iyi nam, cunygi opoto meicel i kom turri’.”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “I kare ame doŋ amio idoŋ nono calo wi obur, calo boma mogo ame jo doŋ mom bedo iye, kare ame amio pii me nam doŋ obino owumi oko," 
Ezekiel26:20 abino doŋ cwayi piny i bur kan ame jo oto meicel tye iye, ate miyi bedo piny kuno, i akina jami mogo ame doŋ otyeko bale odoco, kun ibedo karacel i jo oto." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ka doŋ ituno kuno mom dok ibino lokere ineno ŋei idwogo cen i lobo a jo a pwod kwo, abino miyi ibedo twon anennoro ame iyiliyili meicel, ame mannono doŋ bino bedo agikkini. Kadi bed jo tem yenyi, cite mom gire dok otwero nwoŋi. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobba ni," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Aman doŋ ba, yin wot a dano we, cak doŋ were me kumo pi Turo," 
Ezekiel27:3 ite kobbi Turo ame bedo i dog nam, acatwil a rok apapat me dog nam apol meicel, kun ikobbe ni Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni: “Yin Turo ame onwoŋo iwakere wok-ki kun ikobo ni, ‘An aber odoco.’" 
Ezekiel27:4 Waŋ loboni tye i cuny nam, jo ame ogeri, ogeri aber, calo mel;" 
Ezekiel27:5 Gin otio i yen me kidi me Cenir me gerri, karacel kede yen Cedar me Lebanon." 
Ezekiel27:6 Aco pol me kwaŋi ote tiyo i yen ame oya i Bacan, bao mere ote tiyo i yen ame oya i dog nam ame tye i Kupuro, ame ote mwono kede lak lyec." 
Ezekiel27:7 Boŋo ame yamo kolo me kwaŋ, rik otio i boŋo camanini aber me Miciri, ame onwoŋo konyi acalo bendera, Boŋo me geŋo cen i kan ame jo bedo iye, rik ote tiyo i boŋo obedo bululu-bululu, kede en aremarema, ame oya i cula me Elica." 
Ezekiel27:8 Jo ame onwoŋo kwaŋi, obedo jo Cidon kede Arbad; jo lemere ame onwoŋo odiro meicel i kwaŋ onwoŋo daŋ tye baŋi kuno, kun gin tye acalo odiro i ryemo mel." 
Ezekiel27:9 Aco omwon mel odok, rik te bedo odoŋe me Gebal kede oryeko me kuno; mel luŋ iyi nam karacel kede okwaŋgi, onwoŋo tye baŋi kuno pi loloko jamini me acata." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Jo Pacia kede jo Lud kede jo Kut, rik tye i akina monnyi, kun gin daŋ doŋ otye acalo joni me konyi i lweny. Gin rik ŋabo kwodegi kede tokgi baŋi kuno, gin jo ame rik omio yin itye kede kwogo." 
Ezekiel27:11 Ocirikale ame oya i Arvad kede Kelek, onwoŋo gwoko apama me celli kun oguro oko ni rit, kede ocirikale me Gamad onwoŋo gwoko gedoni mogo adoŋodoŋo ocuŋ iguŋ malo. Gin daŋ onwoŋo oŋaŋabo kwodegi i kor apamani romo aroma irit. Gin en ame omio rik iber odoco." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Jo Tarcic rik cato wil kedi pien yin rik ilony i kit jami luŋ; ryal, nyonyo, bati, kede ŋidoŋido jami ocele rik yin iloloko kede jamigi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan, Tubal kede Mecek ocato wil kedi; gin rik ololoko jamini i dano me bedo opii karacel kede jami ame otio i mola." 
Ezekiel27:14 Aco jo Bet-ograma rik loloko jamini kede aguragura, aguragura me lweny kede kane adoŋo mege." 
Ezekiel27:15 Jo me rodec ocato wil kedi; lobe apol ame onwoŋo tye i dog nam rik tye acalo cuk me cato jamini yin rik inwoŋo i baŋgi lak lyec, kede yen abeco meicel." 
Ezekiel27:16 Jo Edom ocato wil kedi pi twon lonyo adwoŋ meicel ame onwoŋo yin itye kede; gin rik ololoko jamini kede emaradi, boŋi camanini aremarema, boŋi ame otio i kwogo meicel, boŋŋi camanini abeco meicel, giggi mogo me wel kede gweŋe mogo abeco atitino." 
Ezekiel27:17 Jo Juda kede jo Icrael ocato wil kedi; gin rik ololoko jamini kede ŋano, olok kede nyig yen ogeo cek, moo kic, moo, kede moo yen ecoma." 
Ezekiel27:18 Jo Damaciko ocato wil kedi pi jamini ame onwoŋo pol, pi jami ame onwoŋo pol meicel i ciŋi, pien yin onwoŋo itye i kit jami apapat luŋ, koŋo olok me Kelbon, yer romi atarrere," 
Ezekiel27:19 koŋo olok me Ujal; gin rik te bedo loko jamini kun oloko i nyonyo, kacia, karacel kede lummogo ame ŋwecgi kur." 
Ezekiel27:20 Jo me Dedan obedo cato wil kedi, kun ololoko jamini kede boŋŋi me wel ame opepeto i ŋe aguragura." 
Ezekiel27:21 Jo Arab kede oloc luŋ me Kedar, gin onwoŋo otye acalo ocatwil ame yomoro cunyi meicel, pien gin rik otye aber meicel i cato rommi, itino nyogi rommi kede dyegi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Ocatwil me Kebar kede me Raama, daŋ obedo cato wil kedi, gin obedo loloko jamini i kit odok apapat ame ŋwecgi kur, karacel kede gweŋe mogo me wel meicel, kede jabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Jo me boma me Karan, Kanek, Eden, Acur, kede Cilmad daŋ obedo cato wil kedi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Jo man obedo loloko jamini i boŋŋi mogo me wel ame gin oyero ayera, boŋŋi obedo bulubululu, ame okwogo i tic me diro meicel, kede dok opar ame oliliŋo abeco meicel, ame otweo i tol; gin obedo cat kedi i jami magi." 
Ezekiel27:25 Mele mogo me Tarcic, en ame rik bedo tero ocatwilli. “Mannono omio yin rik icalo twon mel i dye nam, ame oyeo twon yec apek meicel." 
Ezekiel27:26 Ka jo ame kwaŋi doŋ otyeko teri oko i dye nam, yamo ame kodo i tuŋ kide, turi doŋ i cuny nam kuno." 
Ezekiel27:27 Mannono te miyo lonyo ocatwilli, karacel kede jami ocele, jo ame kwaŋi kede oryem mel, jo ame mwono mel odok kede ocatwilli, ocirikale me lweny ame tye iyi karacel kede monnyi luŋ ame tye iyi i dye nam kuno, gin luŋ olwiny oko piny i dye nam kuno, i nino ame yin iballe iye odoco." 
Ezekiel27:28 Kare ame joni ame ŋeo kwaŋ oredo i koko, kokogi yeno lobo luŋ ame tye i dog nam," 
Ezekiel27:29 jo luŋ doŋ ya oko i mel weko mel kuno ata, oryem mel kede okwaŋ mel, cuŋ loka i dog nam," 
Ezekiel27:30 Gin luŋ ocako kumo i cwercuny meicel piri, kun oonyo kwoyo i dye wigi, kun daŋ oŋenne i buru." 
Ezekiel27:31 Ocido yer wigi oko piri, ote ruko boŋo kwero cola, cunygi nwoŋo kec meicel i kare me kumogi-nono," 
Ezekiel27:32 Owero daŋ wer me kumo piri, ote kumo piri, kun owero ni, ‘Ŋa ame yam koŋ ojwero acalo Turo, ame aman doŋ oliŋ oko iti i dye nam." 
Ezekiel27:33 I kare ame jamini obino i dye nam, cobo miti a jo apol meicel; obakki odoko olonyo, kun olony i jamini ame dwon meicel." 
Ezekiel27:34 Aman doŋ pii i dye nam omi i tur oko; ilwiny doŋ i cuny nam kan atut. Jamini luŋ karacel kede jo luŋ ame onwoŋo tio piri, gin luŋ oke i dye nam kuno." 
Ezekiel27:35 Jo luŋ ame bedo i dog nam, lworo omakogi meicel piri; kadi obakki ame loogi daŋ obedo i lworo meicel piri, kun waŋgi oballe meicel." 
Ezekiel27:36 Ocatwil luŋ ame tye i akina rok apapat, lworo omako okato kare, agikkini obedo me can meicel, dok daŋ mom otwero po pira atwal.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Rwot Okobo keda kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Wot a dano we, kob aloc me Turo kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo, ni, “Pien yin itye awaka meicel i cunyi, dok daŋ ikobo ni, ‘An abedo obaŋa, an abedo i wi kom me loc obaŋe, kun abedo i dye nam’, aco kono yin ibedo dano, mom Obaŋa, kadi bed yin itamo ni yin iryek calo Obaŋa," 
Ezekiel28:3 yin itamo ni yin iryek ikato Danieri oko, ame mom tye ginnoro ame yin iŋeo?" 
Ezekiel28:4 Yin itamo ni ryekoni kede niaŋŋi atut, en omio yin inwoŋo lwak lim adwoŋ, dok en omio yin icoko jabu kede ryal, ame doŋ ikano akana?" 
Ezekiel28:5 Pi dironi me cato wil, en ame omio limmi omedde adwoŋ meicel, mannono omio doŋ cako yeyea i cunyi ni itye i lim," 
Ezekiel28:6 Pi mannono ba, an Rwot Obaŋa doŋ atyeko kobo ni, pien yin itamo ni yin iryek calo Obaŋa moro," 
Ezekiel28:7 mannono omio an abino kelo jo mogo ame mom iŋeo me bino lweny i komi, akelo twoni rokkogo ame iyiliyili meicel, gin bino woto palagi me lweny, ote babalo kede jamini ame yin ikobo ni inwoŋo pi ryekoninono." 
Ezekiel28:8 Gin obino neki ote corri i lyel piny, ibino to i to ame jo oneko aneka to kede, i dye nam kuno." 
Ezekiel28:9 Pwod ibino medo kobo ni, ‘An abedo obaŋa,’ i nyim jo ame tye ka neki, kadi bedi yin ibedo dano mom Obaŋa, i ciŋ jo ame tye ka wawaŋi?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Ibino to calo gwok, i ciŋ rok ocele ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa doŋ atyeko kobo.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Medo i kom mannono, Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni." 
Ezekiel28:12 “Wot a dano we, ya malo me ikum pi abaka me Turo, ite kobbe kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: “Yin yam onwoŋo itye acalo anen me gin aber ame kato jami luŋ, kun daŋ itye i ryeko adwoŋ meicel, dok daŋ komi otiye amwonya meicel." 
Ezekiel28:13 Yin onwoŋo rik itye i poto me Eden ame obedo poto Obaŋa; kit gweŋe luŋ me wel onwoŋo tye acalo gi-wumereni. Gweŋe ame olwoŋo ni, tobaj kede jacipa, kabankel, berul, kede onik, capir, kancolt kede emeradi; rik omwono komi oko kede jabu, Jami-nono luŋ rik otio piri, otiogi luŋ i nino ame oketi kede." 
Ezekiel28:14 Rik ate keto omaraika kuno me gwoki; rik yin ibedo i wi kidina, an Obaŋa, kun ibebea i wi gweŋe mogo me mac." 
Ezekiel28:15 Kiti rik ber odoco i ginnoro luŋ ame yin itimo, cakere i nino ame aketi iye, icennere bal te cako nen i komi." 
Ezekiel28:16 I kare ame icako cato wil atek meicel, ite cako doko lo ame abyemi, ite doŋ timo bal; mannono omio an ate boli oko teŋe i wi kidina acalo gin ame doŋ oballe amaraikana te ryemi oko i kuno, i akina gweŋe me mac." 
Ezekiel28:17 Yin rik onwoŋo iwakere meicel pi komi ame otio amwonya, kodi timmi-nono te miyo ryeko rwenyi oko, Mannono omio ate boli oko i lobo, ate weki bedo acalo anen baŋ obakki ocele, me gin obed neni." 
Ezekiel28:18 Pi balli ame doŋ te bedo nya medde ameda, i cato willi ame mom atira, omio ibalo ka woroni acil oko, mannono omio ate miyo mac ya i akinani, maccono te waŋi oko, ate miyi doko buru i lobo i nyim jo luŋ ame rik oneni." 
Ezekiel28:19 Lworo omako jo luŋ ame rik ŋei i akina orok, pien agikkini obedo arac meicel, pien mom dok ibino bedo tye atwal.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Rwot rik dok te kop keda," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Wot a dano we, lokere koŋ dok inen Cidon, me irab kop i kome," 
Ezekiel28:22 kobbe kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: “Nen ba, an atye i kop i komi, yin Cidon, abino nyuto kwogona i akinani kuno. Jo bino ŋeyo ni an abedo Rwot, ka doŋ aŋolo kop iye, dok daŋ anyuto ni an acil iye." 
Ezekiel28:23 Pien abino miyo too edeke poto iye, abino miyo remo ony dye gudo iye luŋ, jo ame oneko bino bedo dye boma kuno, kun oneko jo mere i Pala lweny ame bino ya i kabedo ducu. Mannono bino miyo jo iye ŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel28:24 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Pe tye rokkoro ame tye i ŋet Icrael, ame yam obedo cayo jo Icrael, ame dok bino medde bedo acalo okuto kede ocokocok me waŋo jo Icrael. Gin bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot Obaŋa." 
Ezekiel28:25 “Pien an a Rwot Obaŋa akobo ni, I kare ame acoko jo Icrael i akina orok kan ame gin rik okeketa iye, ate daŋ nyuto i komgi ni an acil, kun rok ocele neno kede waŋgi, gin doŋ bino bedo i lobogi i komgi, ame rik amio baŋ amirona Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Gin bino bedo iye i kuc, obino gero wudigi, ote daŋ pito olokgi, Obino bedo i kuc, i kare ame doŋ atyeko ŋolo kop i kom jo i ŋetgi ame rik bedo cayogi. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot Obaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 I nino dwe apar wie aryo, i dwe me apar, me mwaka me apar, Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Wot a dano we, koŋ dok ilokere inen Parao abaka me Miciri, me irab kop i kome kede i kom jo Miciri luŋ;" 
Ezekiel29:3 rab kop, ikob kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: “Nen ba, an atye i kop i komi, yin Parao abaka me Miciri, yin twon twol iyiliyili ame buta i lum i dye nam, kun kobo ni, ‘Kulo Nail obedo mega; an en atio.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Abino keto golo i cwaki, abino miyo rec ame tye i dye piini momoka i pok komi; ate bino godi oko i dye nam, karacel i rec luŋ ame tye i dye nammi, ame omomoka i pok komi." 
Ezekiel29:5 Abino diwiri oko i dye tim, yin karacel kede rec luŋ ame omomoka i pok komi; ibino poto i dye tim kannaler, mom obino kwanyo komi me ayika. An doŋ atyeko miyi oko me acama, baŋ leyi me tim kede winy ame twarre malo." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Mannono bino miyo jo luŋ ame bedo i Miciri ŋeo ni an a Rwot. Pien jo Icrael rik obedo jeŋere i komi me konyogi, kun yin onwoŋo igoro calo lut ogada." 
Ezekiel29:7 Ka ce gin ojeŋŋere i komi, yin itur oko, ite daŋ wawaŋo wi bwokgi. Ka gin ojeŋere i komi, yin itur oko, ite miyo pyergi wanne onyo lokere." 
Ezekiel29:8 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Nen ba abino kelo pala me lweny i komwu, ame bino neko dano karacel kede leyi." 
Ezekiel29:9 Lobo me Miciri bino doko calo wi obur ame odoŋ kene, Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot. “Pien yin ikobo ni, ‘Kulo Nail obedo mega, an en atio’," 
Ezekiel29:10 mannono omio an atye acalo akworri, kede akwor a kulo Nail, dok abino miyo lobo me Miciri doŋ nono acalo wi obur ame doŋ oballe odoco, cakere i Migdol tuno kede naka i Cirene, te kato naka i waŋ apokki me Eciopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Mom tye dano moro onyo le moro ame bino beo iye. Mom obino bedo kuno pi mwakki ame romo pyeraŋwen twai. 
Ezekiel29:12 Abino miyo Miciri doko wi obur ame kato lobo luŋ ame tye acalo wi obur, dok boma iye luŋ daŋ bino doko acalo wi obur pi mwakki pyeraŋwen twal ame kato boma ocele luŋ ame tye acalo wi obur. Abino keketo jo Miciri luŋ i akina rok ocele, ame tye i lobo apapat." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Pien man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: I agikki me mwaka pyeraŋwen, abino coko jo Miciri i akina rok ocele kan ame onwoŋo gin okeketa iye," 
Ezekiel29:14 abino dwogo kuccere, ate dwokogi cen i lobo me Patroc, ame en lobo ame gin rik oya iye. Gin bino bedo kuno acalo rok ame goro meicel." 
Ezekiel29:15 I akina loc ocele luŋ, en ame doŋ bino bedo agoro okato kare, mom dok bino tiŋere kadi acel me loyo rok ocele, dok abino miyo welgi bedo anok meicel ame mom dok kato rok ocele." 
Ezekiel29:16 Jo Icrael mom dok bino jeŋere i komgi me konyogi. Can arac ame opoto i kom jo Miciri, bino poyo wi jo Icrael, me ŋeyo ni gin kara onwoŋo otimo bal me jeŋere i kom jo Miciri. Mannono bino miyo jo Icrael ŋeo ni an a Rwot Obaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 I nino dwe acel, me dwe me acel, i mwaka me pyeraryo wie abiro, Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Wot a dano we, abaka Nebukadnejar me Babulon, ocako lweny agwa meicel i kom Turo, omio ocirikale mere olwenyo lweny agwa meicel, ame omio wi ŋat acel acel tal oko, dok badgi daŋ jony oko, cite kadi amannono, kadi en abaka onyo monnyere, mom onwoŋo ginnoro kadi acel i Turo pi lweny ame gin olwenyo i komgi-nono." 
Ezekiel29:19 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Nen ba, abino miyo lobo me Miciri baŋ Nebukadnejar abaka me Babulon; en bino coko lonyo iye luŋ tero oko, bino yako jami luŋ ame tye i Miciri, bedo acalo gin me culo monnyere." 
Ezekiel29:20 Atyeko doŋ miye lobo me Miciri, acalo gin me cule pi tic ame en otio, pien gin otio tic ame kono an ikoma ati, man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel29:21 “I nino-nono abino miyo atel ya i Icrael, an ate miyo yin Ejekeri kobo kop i akinagi. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Rwot okobo keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Wot a dano we, rab kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: “Red ni, ‘Nino man rac nadi!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Pien nino doŋ ceggi acega, Nino a Rwot doŋ ceggi meicel; bino bedo nino ame pol bino cido iye icuc, nino me can baŋ rok apapat." 
Ezekiel30:4 Lweny bino bedo tye i Miciri, can adwoŋ meicel bino poto Eciopia, jo apol i Miciri obino neko oko; lonyo ame tye iye daŋ obino yako otero oko obino weko Miciri ame acakki tere doŋ oballe.”" 
Ezekiel30:5 I lwennyono daŋ obino neko iye ocirikale ame opaŋo apaŋa i Eciopia, i Put, i Lud, kede en ame opaŋo i lobo a jo Arab kede Libia, gin luŋ obino nekogi karacel i jona, kun onekogi i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel30:6 Rwot okobo kop man ni: “Jo ame konyo Miciri, obino neneko oko, monnyere ame wakere wok daŋ obino jwero oko; obino jwero cakere i Migdol tuno kede naka i Cirene, obino nekogi luŋ i akina-nono i pala lweny, man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel30:7 Lobo mere bino bedo acalo wi obur arac akato lobo ocele luŋ atye acalo wi obur, dok boma luŋ iye, bino doŋ nono arac meicel, akato boma ocele luŋ ame odoŋ yigi nono." 
Ezekiel30:8 Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot, i kare ame doŋ atyeko waŋo Miciri oko i mac, dok jo ame konye luŋ atyeko daŋ jwero oko." 
Ezekiel30:9 “I kare-nono okwena mogo ame dwir meicel bino ya i baŋa, te wot tuyo jo Eciopia atua, te miyogi lworo meicel, i nino ame doŋ otyeko jwero lobo me Miciri. Nen, nino-nono tye abino!”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: “Abino miyo lonyo a jo Miciri gik oko, abino miyo Nebukadnejar, abaka me Babulon en ame timo man." 
Ezekiel30:11 En karacel kede monnyere, ame gin obedo rok ame iyiliyili ame kato rok ocele luŋ, gin en ame obino kelogi me balo Miciri; gin bino woto pala me lwenygi i kom Miciri, ote miyo kom jo oto radde atata i kom jo Miciri," 
Ezekiel30:12 Abino miyo pii i kulo Nail dwono oko, ate cato lobo Miciri oko baŋ otim tim areco; abino miyo lobo Miciri doko wi obur, karacel kede jami luŋ ame tye iye, abino miyo orok en ame tio ticcono pira; an a Rwot doŋ atyeko kobo." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man: abino jwero calgi oko, ate daŋ tyeko cal apa i Mempic oko; rwottoro mom dok bino bedo tye i Miciri, mannono bino miyo amio jo Miciri bedo kede lworo." 
Ezekiel30:14 Abino miyo Patroc daŋ doŋ calo wi obur, dok abino waŋo Joan daŋ oko, abino timo tim me ŋolo kop i kom Tebej." 
Ezekiel30:15 Abino coro akemona i kom Pelucuim, ame obedo twon cel atek me Miciri, ate tyeko lonyo luŋ ame tye i Tebec," 
Ezekiel30:16 Abino waŋo lobo me Miciri oko; Pelucium bino bedo kede cwercuny adwoŋ meicel, boma me Tebec obino turo oko, pii alele te poŋ iye," 
Ezekiel30:17 Awobe atino me On kede me Pibecet, abino neko i pala lweny, aco mon, obino tero oko iyi opii." 
Ezekiel30:18 Aco i boma me Tekapine, i ninonono bino bedo acol icuc, abino turo loc a jo Miciri oko, dok ocirikale mere atek ame wakere, daŋ abino jwero oko. Pol bino wumo lobo Miciri oko, anyira mere ote tero daŋ oko iyi opii." 
Ezekiel30:19 Mannono en kite ame abino tiyo kede tic me ŋolo kop i kom Miciri. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot.” 
Ezekiel30:20 I nino dwe abiro me dwe me acel, i mwaka me apar wie acel, Rwot rik dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Wot a dano we, atyeko doŋ turo bad Parao abaka me Miciri; cite mom ru otweo kan oturrono me caŋ eka te doko dok atek ame dok romo mako jami lweny." 
Ezekiel30:22 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni; Nen ba, an atye i kop i kom Parao, abaka me Miciri, abino turo bade ryoryo ducu, tuŋ aber kede tuŋ a yam koŋ oturri; abino miyo pala me lweny poto oko i ciŋe." 
Ezekiel30:23 Abino keketo jo Miciri i akina rok ocele, ate miyogi lal i wi lobo luŋ," 
Ezekiel30:24 Abino meddi abaka me Babulon teko, ate miye pala me romona; cite bad abaka Parao ryoryo luŋ abino turo oko, en bino cur i nyim abaka me Babulon, calo dano ame owano atek meicel." 
Ezekiel30:25 Abino meddi abaka me Babulon teko, ento abino turo bad abaka Parao ryoryo luŋ te rette piny, mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an abedo Rwot. I kare ame doŋ atyeko miyo pala me lweny i ciŋ abaka me Babulon, en bino cako lweny kede i kom lobo me Miciri;" 
Ezekiel30:26 Abino keketo jo Miciri i akina rok ocele, ate miyogi lal i wi lobo luŋ, Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an abedo Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 I nino dwe acel me dwe me adek imwaka me apar wie acel, Rwot rik dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Wot a dano we, kobbi Parao, abaka me Miciri karacel kede lwakkere, ni, “Yin ce irom wunu i ŋa i dittinono?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Nen ba, an abino porri kede yen cedar me Lebanon, abino porri jaŋe abeco meicel karacel kede jaŋe me buŋ, karacel kede kite ame ibor kede. Yat ame bor ame wie otuno naka i pol malo." 
Ezekiel31:4 Pii tye iye ame mie edoŋo, i tere piny daŋ tye pii me kulo ame en mato, eka te miyo pii mere mol, i kabedo luŋ ame oguro kan ame opite iye-nono, te daŋ dok cwalli yen luŋ ame tye i buŋ pii mere-nono." 
Ezekiel31:5 Pien pii romo yattono aber, omio en doŋo aber ame kato yennogo ducu, dok jaŋe daŋ doŋodoŋo, dok daŋ bocoboco." 
Ezekiel31:6 Leyi luŋ ame twarre malo, gero wudigi i jaŋe, dok leyi me tim daŋ nywalo itinogi i tipo mere, dok rok adoŋo apapat me wi podo, we daŋ i tipo mere." 
Ezekiel31:7 Yattono ber nadi! Pien odoŋo abor kun jaŋe daŋ bocoboco. Lwite donyo daŋ atut piny i pii. 
Ezekiel31:8 Mom tye yat cedar moro i poto Obaŋa ame oromo poro kede, mom tye yattoro ocele ame jaŋe cal i yattonono. Mom daŋ otwero poro kadi acel olam, jaŋgi mom rwatte kadi acel; mom tye yattoro kadi acel i poto Obaŋa ame oromo poro kede berrere." 
Ezekiel31:9 An atio yattono aber odoco, i jaŋe ame obuŋere kukakuka. Yattoro luŋ ame tye iyi Eden poto Obaŋa, nene kero." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni: Pien yattoro odoŋo abor meicel ame wie otuno naka i pol twal, dok ocako daŋ wakere i cunye pi borrer e-nono," 
Ezekiel31:11 abino miye i ciŋ lo atek meicel i akina rok ocele; lo atekkono bino tic kede kun lubo kit ame raccere tye kede. Cunya doŋ okwero yattono oko. 
Ezekiel31:12 Rok ocele ame ger meicel, bino toŋei oko piny te weke kuno. Jaŋe bino rette i wi kiddi kede i luŋ luŋ, kome bino buto piny ame doŋ otutura oko. Rok ocele ame onwoŋo bedo i te tipo mere, bino ya daŋ te wot gigi oko." 
Ezekiel31:13 Winnyi luŋ ame twarre malo bino bedo i kom yat ame orette pinnyono, kun leyi me tim wowota i jane luŋ." 
Ezekiel31:14 Cakere aman doŋ, mom dok tye yattoro ame bino doŋo tuno i ka wi yattaca, kadi bed nwoŋo pii arome meicel, jaŋ yattoro mom dok bino gudo pol, kun wie tuno kan ame onwoŋo yattaca tuno iye. Yen luŋ daŋ doŋ bino to oko acalo dano, gin luŋ obino nywako kabedo i jo ame doŋ otyeko to ame doŋ tye i bur i lyel piny." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni, Ka doŋ bino donyo piny i lyel, abino miyo pii atut a tye piny kuno kumo pire, abino juko pii i kulo iye oko luŋ. Pii iye luŋ mom dok bino mol; abino miyo wi kidi me Lebanon cido oko icuc, eka yen luŋ iye te two oko." 
Ezekiel31:16 I kare ame abino cwaye piny lobo a jo oto, mor me rette mere bino yeŋo rok apapat, Yen luŋ ame tye i poto me Eden, yen luŋ ame oyero ayera ame nwoŋo pii ame romogi, ame tye i Lebanon, cunygi bino kwe i lobo ame tye piny." 
Ezekiel31:17 Gin daŋ obino donyo piny i lyel kuno karacel kede, baŋ jo ame otyeko neko i pala lweny. Jo luŋ ame onwoŋo bedo i tipo mere i akina rok apapat, bino to." 
Ezekiel31:18 Kara ŋa ame kwogoni cal kede, dok daŋ dit ame rom kedi i akina yen luŋ ame tye i poto me Eden? Yin daŋ doŋ ibino donyo piny i lobo a jo oto karacel i yen ocele me Eden, ite wot nywako kabedo i jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa, kede jo ame oneko aneka i pala lweny. “Man obedo Parao karacel kede lwakkere luŋ, man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 I nino dwe acel me dwe me apar wie aryo, i mwaka me apar wie aryo, Rwot rik dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Wot a dano we, cak wer me kumo pi abaka Parao, me Miciri, kun ikobbe ni: “Yin inenne keni ni yin ibedo eŋato i akina rok ocele, ento yin kom irom aroma i twon twolloro iyiliyili ame bedo dye nam, yin i kok i kulo kuno, dok ibedo lolo pii kede tyeni, ite babalo pii i kulo oko. Man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel32:3 Abino boloboona i komi kun atye i lwak rok apapat, gin bino wayi kede boo-nono, keli oko." 
Ezekiel32:4 Abino wayi aboli kan otwo, ate cacanyo yin piny i lobo, abino miyo winy luŋ ame twarre malo, karacel kede leyi luŋ me tim, gin luŋ obino bino i komi me cami." 
Ezekiel32:5 Abino babao riŋo komi i wi kiddi malo, karacel kede remoni ame acwer; kun komi otop bino poŋ yii luŋ." 
Ezekiel32:6 Abino bido lobo kede remoni, tuno kede naka i wi kiddi malo, yo luŋ bino poŋ i riŋo komi keken." 
Ezekiel32:7 I kare ame doŋ atyeko jweri oko, abino wumo daŋ polo oko, acer iye luŋ daŋ bino rwenyo oko; abino miyo pol wumo waŋ ceŋ oko, dwe daŋ mom bino menyo piny." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ginnoro luŋ ame menyo piny ame tye i polo, abino miyo colpiny wumogi oko, ate miyo loboni cido icuc, Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel32:9 Abino balo cuny rok apapat, i kare ame doŋ abino terri oko iyi opii i akina rok ocele, i lobo mogo ame yam mom ru iŋeo." 
Ezekiel32:10 Abino miyo lworo mako rok apapat i komi, kom obakkigi bino myel meicel piri, ka ce ayeyeŋo pala lwennya i nyimgi. Komgi bino bedo myel amyela cawa ducu, kun kom ŋat acel acel myel pi kwo mere, i nino ame yin ibino poto kede." 
Ezekiel32:11 Pien man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa otyeko kobo: Pala lweny abaka me Babulon bino bino i komi. 
Ezekiel32:12 Abino miyo pala lweny atek en ame neko joni, ame gin luŋ obedo twoni jo ame iyiliyili meicel i akina orok. “Gin bino miyo awaka a jo Miciri gik oko, lwak jo mere apol daŋ bino to oko." 
Ezekiel32:13 Abino jwero leyi iyie luŋ, leyi luŋ ame bedo i dog nam; mom dok tye ŋattoro ame dok bino medde yelogi, akadi leyi moro daŋ ame dok bino medde yelogi." 
Ezekiel32:14 Abino miyo pii iye doko acil meicel, eka pii i kulo te mol calo moo, Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel32:15 Kare ame abino miyo lobo me Miciri doko acalo wi obur, ame ginnoro luŋ ame bedo iye mom doŋ tye, kare ame abino neko jo luŋ ame bedo iye, mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel32:16 Wer me kumo man bino doko wer ame jo wero. Mon me rok apapat bino wero i kare me kumogi pi Miciri, i lwakkere luŋ. Gin bino wero wer man, man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 I nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me agege, i mwaka me apar wie aryo, Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Wot a dano we, koki, dok ikum pi lwak jo me Miciri, cwagi baŋ rok ocele ame tek meicel i lobo a jo oto, baŋ jo ame doŋ otyeko donyo piny i lyel:" 
Ezekiel32:19 ‘Ŋa ce ame yin ikato oko kede ber?’ “Dony piny iwot ibut i lyel a jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa. 
Ezekiel32:20 “Gin bino rette i dyere a jo ame oneko i pala lweny, pala lweny doŋ tye ame oyikere oko me neko jo Miciri." 
Ezekiel32:21 Rwode mogo adoŋo, karacel kede jo ame onwoŋo lwenyo karacel kedgi, tye ame akuro jolo jo Miciri akura, kun okobo ni, ‘Jo a mom ŋeo Obaŋa ame rik oneko i pala lweny, gin daŋ obino piny baŋwu, gin en tye obuto piny kan mot.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Jo Acuria daŋ tye kuno, ame lyel ocirikale mere tye ame ogure dyere, gin luŋ obedo jo ame oneko aneka i pala i lweny." 
Ezekiel32:23 Lyelgi tye piny meicel i lobo a jo ame oto. Ocirikale mere luŋ oneko aneka i lweny, lyelgi tye ame ogure dyere. Gin en ame rik omio lworo omako jo ame tye i lobo a jo ame kwo." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Jo Elam daŋ tye kuno, dok lyele ocirikale mere daŋ tye ame ogure oko dyere. Gin luŋ daŋ onekogi aneka i pala, i lweny, gin ote donyo piny i lobo a jo oto, kun otye acalo jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa. Gin daŋ rik omedo lworo meicel i lobo a jo akwo, gin daŋ otye i akina jo ame tye ayeyo lewicgi karacel i jo a doŋ otyeko donyo piny i lyel." 
Ezekiel32:25 “Otiyi i tanda mere tye i akina jo ame oneko aneka, dok lyel ocirikale mere tye ame ogure dyere. Gin daŋ luŋ obedo jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa. I kare me kwogi, onwoŋo gin daŋ tye i akina jo ame mio jo lworo, ento aman doŋ obuto piny mot, kun daŋ oyeo lewic karacel i jo a doŋ otyeko donyo piny i lyel. Gin daŋ oketogi, otye i akina jo ame oneko aneka i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Jo Mecek kede jo Tuban daŋ tye kuno, karacel kede lwakgi luŋ ame lyelgi tye oguro meggi dyere. Gin luŋ daŋ rik obedo jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa, ame onekogi aneka i pala lweny, I kare me kwogi i lobo, gin daŋ rik omedo lworo baŋ jo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Gin rik mom oyikogi i yik me kwogo acalo twoni jo mogo adoŋo ame okwoŋo to, ame owoto piny i lyel karacel i jami lwenygi, dok ame pala lwenygi tye ame opyelo piny tutuŋ wigi, dok kwotgi daŋ tye ame otweo i cogo komgi. Twoni jo atekkono rik olworogi meicel i lobo a jo akwo." 
Ezekiel32:28 Mannono omio yin daŋ obino tuturo yin oko ite wot daŋ piny i akina jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa, kede jo ame oneko aneka i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Jo Edom daŋ tye kuno, obakki mere karacel kede rwode mere. Gin rik obedo twoni jo atek meicel i kare me kwogi, cite aman gin doŋ otye obuto karacel i jo ame oto, kun mom oŋeo Obaŋa, ame rik oneko aneka i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Rwode me tutuŋ onyarodi luŋ daŋ tye kuno, karacel kede jo Cidon daŋ luŋ, ame gin luŋ odonyo piny i lyel a jo oto ame yeo lewicgi, pien i kare me kwogi, tekogi rik meddi jo lworo cite aman doŋ obuto piny karacel i jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa ame oneko aneka i pala lweny. Gin daŋ otye onywako lewicgi karacel i jo a doŋ otyeko donyo piny i lyel." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Kare ame Parao abaka me Miciri bino nenogi, cunye bino kwe pi to mere, kede pi to a lwakkere ame oneko aneka i pala lweny. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel32:32 Pien i kare me kwo mere, en obedo miyo jo ame kwo lworo, mannono omio obino pyele i akina jo ame mom ŋeo Obaŋa, karacel i lwak ame oneko aneka i pala lweny. Parao karacel i lwakkere luŋ.” Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel33:1 Rwot rik dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Wot a dano we, wot ikobbi joni gin ame atimere, ka ce amio lweny opoto i lobo moro-ni. Jo me lobo-nono bino kwanyo dano acel acel i akinagi te miye bedo akurpinygi." 
Ezekiel33:3 Ka ce en tye ka ne no okwor tye ka bino me bino lweny i komgi, en bino kuto apel me kwenyoro jo mere." 
Ezekiel33:4 Ka ce dano moro owinyo apel ame okuto, eka dano-nono mom te tamo pire, te miyo okwor bino, te make neke oko, bal me remo mere bino dok gire i wie." 
Ezekiel33:5 En owinyo koko apel ame okwenyoro en kede, cite mom te paro pire, mannono en omio bal me remo mere bedo gire i wie. Pien kono rik en owinyo akwenyakin ame okwenyoro en kede-nono, kono en olaro kwo mere." 
Ezekiel33:6 Cite ka akur-piny oneno okwor tye abino, mom te kuto apel, lwak mom te ŋeyo kop i kom okwor ame tye abino, ka ce okwor obin okwanyo ŋattoro i akina lwak, te wot neko oko pi ballere, bal a dano-nono bino bedo i wie, cite bal me to mere, bino bedo i wi akur-piny." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Doŋ pi mannono ba, yin wot a dano, an atyeko keti me bedo akur-piny a jo Icrael. Yin ibino kwenyorogi i gin ame an abino kobbi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ka ce akobo ni lonnoro arac bino to, eka ce yin mom ite kobbi lo araccono me kwenyoro en, me en cak weko kite araccono, eka lo arac cu te to i ballere; bal a danonono bino dok i wii," 
Ezekiel33:9 Cite ka yin ikwenyoro lo araccono me weko kitenono, eka en te kwero loko kite oko; en bino to i ballere, ento yin ibino laro kwoni." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Dok yin, wot a dano we, kobbi jo me ot Icrael kop man ame gin otye ka kobo; ni, ‘Timwa me turo cik kede balwa, tye gire i wiwa, omiowa otye ka doko agoro agora. Kara doŋ otwero bedo kwo niŋo?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Dok ikobbigi ni, Kite acalo an Rwot Obaŋa atye kwo-ni, cunya mom yom i to a lo ame timo gin arac, ento an amito ni atim tim arac, olokere owek timo tim araccono me ebed kwo. Wun jo me ot Icrael, lokere idwog wunu cen, lokere idwog wunu cen, iwek wunu kitewu areco, Kara piŋo omio imiye wunu i to kittono?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Yin wot a dano we, kobbi lwak ni, Ka ce lo a kite atira obalo, gin aber ame yam en obedo timo mom romo larre. Dok ka lo moro a kite rac oweko timo gin arac, mom obino keto cannoro i kome, dok ka ce lo moro a kite atira ocako timo bal, mom bino medde ri kare alac kun pwod kwo." 
Ezekiel33:13 Dok ka ce aciko lo moro ame kite atira, ni en gire bino bedo kwo, ka ce dano-nono obedo geno kite atira-nono, eka te cako timo bal, mom abino po i kom ginnoro aber ame yam en obedo timo kadi acel, en gire pwod bino to pi bal ame en otimo." 
Ezekiel33:14 Dok ka akwenyoro ŋat ame timo gin arac ni en bino to oko, ento en te lokere weko timo bal oko, te cako timo gin ame cik mito dok tye atira," 
Ezekiel33:15 me anennere, ka ce en ocako dwoko jami ducu ame yam en emao amaa i baŋ jo o ocele, kede gigi mogo ame yam ekwalo akwala, te doŋ weko timo bal oko, te doŋ timo gin ame mio dano kwo, ento en gire mom bino to, ento bino kwo." 
Ezekiel33:16 Cunya bino cayo balloro luŋ ame yam en otimo. En bino bedo kwo pien otimo gin ame tye atira dok aber. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Kadi bed amannono jowu tye ka kobo ni, ‘Gin ame Rwot tye ka timo mom tye kakare’; aco kun kitegi en ame mom beco." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ka ce en lo a kite atira oweko tim gin atye atira, eka te cako timo gin arac, en gire bino to." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ka ce lo a kite rac, oweko timo bal oko, eka te cako timo gin atye atira dok aber, dano-nono nwoŋo olaro kwo mere oko," 
Ezekiel33:20 Cite jo Icrael tye ka kobo ni gin ame an atye ka timo mom tye atira. Myero iŋe ni abino ŋolli wun jo me ot Icrael kop, kun alubo gin ame itimo wunu.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 I mwaka me apar wie aryo, ame doŋ otyeko terowa oko iyi opii, i nino dwe abic me dwe me apar, dano moro ame onwoŋo olwi i Jerucalem obino baŋa te bino kobba ni, “Bomawa doŋ otyeko mayo oko.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Otyeno ocele ame dano ame olwi-nono mom ru obino baŋa, awinyo teko a Rwot tye i koma. I kare ame dano-ni obino otuno baŋa odiko ocele, Rwot oyabo doga ate cako kop, te leba doŋ te gony atwal." 
Ezekiel33:23 Rwot okobo keda kun kobba ni," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Wot a dano we, jo me lobo man ame oballe oko-ni, otye ka kobo kare ducu ni, ‘Iburaim rik onwoŋo dano acel keken, ento rik ote miye kom lobo-ni luŋ. Nen wan otye opol, mannono mio loboni doŋ bedo megwa.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Pi mannono myero ikobbigi kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Wun icamo wunu riŋo imedo wunu kede remo, eka ite cako woro wunu cal jogi, dok ite onyo wunu remo a jo nono. Kara ŋo omio dok itamo wunu ni lobo man bino bedo megwu?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Wun igeno wunu pala me lwenywu, dok itimo wunu timmogo me kwer, kun ŋat acel acel i akinawu balo dako awottere. Kara ŋo omio itamo wunu dok ni lobo man obedo megwu?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Kob kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo baŋgi: Kite acalo an atye kede kwo-ni, ateteni jo ame tye i lobo man ame doŋ otyeko bale-ni, obino neko oko i pala lweny. Dok ŋat ame onwoŋo tye i poto mere, abino miyo leyi me tim en ame mwodo; aco jo ame tye i cellogo ame ocelo atek, kede iyi gorogoro, too edeke en ame bino nekogi." 
Ezekiel33:28 An abino miyo lobo man doŋ calo wii obur ame doŋ oballe odoco. Jo mogo atek iye ame wakere wok-ki, daŋ bino to oko. Wi kiddi luŋ ame tye iyi Icrael, bino doko calo wi obur, ame ŋattoro mom romo beo iye kadi acel." 
Ezekiel33:29 Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot, i kare ame doŋ atyeko miyo lobo odoko calo wi obur, kun doŋ oballe odoco, pi timmogo me kwer ame ibedo wunu timo." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Aco yin wot a dano we, joni tye ka kobo kop i komi, ka gin ocokere ka poro kopgi i ŋet cel me boma, onyo i doggola me udigi. Gin obino kop i akinagi kengi kengi, kun ŋat man kobbi awottere ni, ‘Bye, me koŋ obin owot owiny kop ame aman dok obino i baŋ Rwot.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Gin te ya bino baŋi, kite ame jo bino kede, gin te bedo i nyimi acalo jona, ote daŋ winyo kop ame yin itye ka kobo, cite mom ote keto gigi i tic; pien gin onyuto margi i doggi keken, ento cunygi tye ka i nwoŋo lim." 
Ezekiel33:32 Yin doŋ itye baŋgi acalo agony kop ame tye ka wero wer baŋgi me mar keken, kun wero ame dwone mit meicel, dok daŋ goo tum. Gin owinyo kop luŋ ame yin ikobo, cite mom oketo moro i akinagi i tic kadi acel." 
Ezekiel33:33 Cite ka kop ame yin ikobo luŋ ocobere, ka ce bino cobere, gin bino ŋeyo ni adwarpiny kara onwoŋo tye akinagi.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Rwot okobo keda kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Wot a dano we, rab kop arac i kom okwat me Icrael, rab kop baŋgi gin okwat, ikobbigi kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Ama wun okwat me Icrael ame onwoŋo itye ka pitte wunu kenwu nie! Mom okwat myero pit rommi?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Wun icamo wunu moo, iruko wunu yer rommi, ineko wunu rommi ame ocwe mege, cite mom ipito wunu rommi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Rommi ame goro mom imeddigi wunu teko, en ame two mege daŋ mom icaŋo wunu, dok en ame oŋwalo, mom itweo wunu kan ame otur. En ame orwenyo mege, daŋ mom iyenyo idwoggo wunu paco, mom iyenyo wunu rommi ame orwenyo kadi acel, dok iloogi wunu i gero meicel." 
Ezekiel34:5 Pien ŋat ame kwao rommi doŋ mom, omio rommi oket oko atata, leyi me tim nwonogi, te makogi mwodogi oko." 
Ezekiel34:6 Rommina doŋ okeketa oko, orimo doŋ piny atata i wi kiddi malo, dok inwoŋogi i kabedo luŋ ame obedo kidikidi. Rommina doŋ okeketa atata, i kabedo luŋ ame tye i wi lobo, mom tye ŋattoro a myero yenygi, onyo ame paro me nwoŋo kan ame gin otye iye." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Pi mannono ba, wun okwa rommi, winy wunu kop man ame Rwot okobo:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Kite acalo atye kwo-ni, pien rommina doŋ odoko me amwoda a leyi luŋ me tim, ame makogi te mwodogi oko, pien akwattoro nwoŋo doŋ mom; dok pien okwatta mom otemo yenyo rommina, ento okwat lunyo pitte ka kengi kengi, kun mom opito rommina kadi acel," 
Ezekiel34:9 pi mannono ba, wun okwat myero iwiny wunu kop man ame Rwot okobo:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni, Nen ba, an atye doŋ i kop i kom okwat, abino penyogi me culo rommina, ate giko ticgi doŋ me pito rommina oko; dok okwat daŋ mom bino medde pitte kengi. Abino mayo rommina oko i doggi, me kur bed acalo cam me acamagi." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Pien Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni: Nen ba, an, ikoma abino yenyo rommina, abino yenyo kan ame gin tye iye." 
Ezekiel34:12 Kite ame akwatyenyo kede rommi mere, ka ce mogo i akinagi okeketa oko owoto teŋe, mannono en kite ame abino yenyo kede rommina. Abino larogi oko i kabedo luŋ ame onwoŋo gin okeketa iye i nino ame pol onwoŋo dwoŋ, dok pol daŋ ooido icuc." 
Ezekiel34:13 Abino kwanyogi oko i akina rok apapat, i lobo luŋ ame gin tye iye, ate dwogogi en i lobogi. Abino pitogi i wi kiddi ame tye i lobo me Icrael, i ŋet akon, i kabedo luŋ ame jo bedo iye." 
Ezekiel34:14 Abino miyogi ocama i bar aber, i wi kiddi luŋ, ame tye iyi Icrael. Gin bino buta kuno kan ame luŋ aber me acamo a dok en ame tye iye, gin bino cem i bar amwonya meicel ame tye i wi kiddi me Icrael." 
Ezekiel34:15 An ikoma en ame bino bedo akwat ame kwao rommina," 
Ezekiel34:16 dok abino miyogi obuto piny, man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo. Abino yenyo rommi ame orwenyo dok abino dwoggo cen rommi ame oya owoto oko i akina owotegi, abino daŋ tweyo kan ame owane i komgi, dok rommi ame odoko agoro abino meddigi teko, rommi ocwe mege, kede en atekkege, abino medde gwokogi. Abino kwayogi aber meicel." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Aco wun rommina, winy wunu kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobbiwu: Nen ba, an aŋolo kop i akina rommi kede rommi, i akina nyok romo kede nyok dyel." 
Ezekiel34:18 Rommi ocele i akinawu mom camo lum aber romogi; dok onyonyono-gu lum ocele ame mom ocamo. Omato pii aber, ote daŋ dok nyonyono pi ocele ame mom omato." 
Ezekiel34:19 Itamo wunu ni ber, rommina me mwodo lum ame inyonyono wunu ityenwu, dok daŋ myero gin omat pii ame ibala wunu oko i tyenwu?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man baŋgi: Nen ba, an, an ikoma en ame abino ŋolo kop i akina rommi ocwe kede en ame mom ocwe." 
Ezekiel34:21 Pien itye ka coro wunu owotewu i ŋetwu kede badwu, kun daŋ icocobo wunu owotewu ame goro i tuŋwu, tuno ka imiogi wunu okeketa teŋe atata." 
Ezekiel34:22 An abino laro rommina kede dyegina, mom dok obino bedo me amwoda a leyi; dok an en abino ŋolo kop i akina romo kede romo wadgi." 
Ezekiel34:23 Abino miyo akwat acel en ame kwaogi, amirona Daudi, en ame bino pitogi; En ame bino bedo akwatgi ame kwaogi." 
Ezekiel34:24 An a Rwot abino bedo Obaŋagi, amirona Daudi en ame bino bedo Rwot i ak inagi. Man kop ame an Rwot akobo." 
Ezekiel34:25 “An abino cikere kedgi, cikere me kuc, ate miyo leyi ager bedo mom i lobo, me gin doŋ obed i kuc i tim, dok daŋ obut i kuc dyewor i buŋ." 
Ezekiel34:26 Abino miyogi gum, karacel i kabedo luŋ ame oguro kidina acil, abino cwayigi kot i kare ame mitte i kokome; kot ame abino miyogi-nono, bino bedo kot ame miogi gum." 
Ezekiel34:27 Yengi ame gin opito bino nyako nyiggi meicel, dok lobogi daŋ bino ceko cem adwoŋ meicel, gin bino bedo aber kun otye i kuc i lobogi. Gin bino ŋeyo ni an abedo Rwot, ka gin oneno doŋ atyeko turo nyonyo ame otweogi kede, me larogi i ciŋ jo ame gin tye i cimgi acalo opii." 
Ezekiel34:28 Rok ocele mom dok bino medde yakogi, dok leyi me tim daŋ mom bino medde mwodogi, obino bedo i kuc aboŋo ginnoro ame miogi lworo." 
Ezekiel34:29 Abino miyo pottigi ceko cam meicel, ate miyo kec doŋ rwenyo oko i lobogi. Rok ocele mom daŋ bino medde dok me yetogi." 
Ezekiel34:30 Gin bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot ame abedo Obaŋagi atye kedgi, dok gin jo Icrael obedo jona, man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel34:31 Wun ibedo wunu rommina, rommi ame an akwao, dok an abedo Obaŋawu. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Rwot rik dok te kop keda, kun kobba ni" 
Ezekiel35:2 “Wot a dano we, cak lokere dok irab kop i kom kidi me Ceir," 
Ezekiel35:3 kobbi kidi me Ceir kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, ‘Nen ba, an atye i kop i komi, yin kidi me Ceir, dok abino ryeyo ciŋa me lweny i komi, yin Ceir, abino miyi idoko wi obur ame doŋ oballe odoco." 
Ezekiel35:4 Abino miyo bomani luŋ doŋ yigi nono, yin doŋ ite doko acalo wi obur, mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel35:5 Pien yin ibedo bedo akwor a jo Icrael nakanaka, ite miyo nekogi oko kede pala lweny, i kare me keto can i komgi, tyen me agikki mere, pi balgi." 
Ezekiel35:6 Pi mannono ba, kite acalo an a Rwot Obaŋa atye kwo, abino cako yiki pi remo, dok remo bino medde ryemo yori, pien bal tye i komi pi remo, mannono en omio remo bino medde lubo yori." 
Ezekiel35:7 Abino balo kidi me Ceir oko te doŋ calo wi obur, abino jwero jo luŋ ame tye iye kede en ame bino iye." 
Ezekiel35:8 Abino miyo kom jo ame oneko radde arada ata i wi kidi, Kom jo ame oneko i pala lweny, bino rette i kabedo luŋ, bino bedo tye i lobo luŋ obedo kidikidi, anaka i luŋ daŋ." 
Ezekiel35:9 Abino miyi doŋ ibedo calo wi obur nakanaka, ŋattoro mom dok bino bedo bomani moro. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot.’" 
Ezekiel35:10 “Pien yin ikobo ni, ‘Rok magi aryo kede lobo magi aryo, apapat bino bedo mega, wan obino gamo bedo megwa,’ kadi bed Rwot onwoŋo tye kuno." 
Ezekiel35:11 Pi mannono ba, kite acalo an Rwot Obaŋa atye kwo-ni, abino tic kedwu, kun alubo akemo kede nyekowu, kede adagewu i kom jona. Gin bino ŋeyo ni an atye aketo can i komwu pi gin ame wun itimo wunu i komgi." 
Ezekiel35:12 Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot. Abedo winyo kop luŋ me apala ame ibedo kobo wunu i kom kiddi me Icrael, ame ibedo kobo wunu ni, Wi kiddi me Icrael doŋ tye acalo wi obur, doŋ otyeko miyo oko me ajwera." 
Ezekiel35:13 An atyeko winyo kopporo luŋ ame ibedo kobo arac i koma, kede kite ame ibedo wakere kede i koma," 
Ezekiel35:14 Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni: Abino miyi idoko wi obur, me jo i wi lobo luŋ te lelo pi gin otimere." 
Ezekiel35:15 Kite ame yin daŋ ibedo lelo kede i kom Icrael i kare ame odoŋ calo wi obur. An daŋ abino tic kedi kittono, wi kidi luŋ me Ceir kede lobo luŋ me Edom bino doŋ calo wi obur. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an abedo Rwot." 
Ezekiel36:1 “Yin wot a dano we, rab kop i kom kiddi me Icrael, kun ikobo ni, Ama wun kiddi me Icrael, winy wunu kop ame Rwot tye ka kobo," 
Ezekiel36:2 Man en kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo; pien omone a jo Icrael tye ka wakere kun okobo ni, ‘Lobo obedo kidikidi ame yam tye conni doŋ olokere obedo megwa.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Pi mannono myero irab kop kun ikobo gin ame an Rwot Obaŋa atye ka kobo, ni, Nen ba, pien jo luŋ ame oguri dyere, omio idoko wi obur, kun jo ocado i komi tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, omio ite doko gi-a rok ocele kun gin luŋ okobo kop arac i komi," 
Ezekiel36:4 Aman doŋ ba, yin wi kiddi me Icrael, winy kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa tye ka kobo, ame kobo baŋwu wun kiddi me Icrael kede lobo obedo kidikidi, kulo kede luŋ ducu me Icrael, baŋ kabedo luŋ ame yam doŋ oweko oballe oko, kun tye acalo wi obur, karacel kede boma luŋ me Icrael, ame rik rok ocele ame ogure dyere obedo yayako, ote daŋ doŋ loko doko gianyeragi." 
Ezekiel36:5 Man omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop agwa i twon akemo moro ame onwoŋo olyeto i kom rok ocele luŋ, kede i kom lobo me Edom luŋ, ame omio lobona odoko meggi, pirgi kengi, kun cunygi yom iye okato kare, dok daŋ okobo kop me acae iye. Me gin ogam bed meggi ote yayako jami ame tye iye." 
Ezekiel36:6 Pi mannono myero ikob kop i kom lobo me Icrael, kobbi kiddi iye karacel kede lobo obedo kidikidi, kulo karacel kede luŋ ducu iye, kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Nen ba, atye ka kobo nyeko ame omaka i twon akemo meicel, pien yin ineno can meicel pi anywar ame rok ocele obedo nywari kede." 
Ezekiel36:7 Mannono omio akwoŋo akwoŋa ni, rok luŋ ame tye i ŋeti ame oguri dyere, obino daŋ nywarogi kite ame gin daŋ obedo nywari kede." 
Ezekiel36:8 “Cite wun kiddi me Icrael, yen dok bino lot atek meicel i yiwu, ote daŋ nyako nyiggi, pi jo me Icrael. Pien gin ceggi acega me dwogo paco." 
Ezekiel36:9 Pien an atye tutuŋ baŋi, abino neno ni loboni dok opuro, dok daŋ opito cam iye." 
Ezekiel36:10 Abino miyo jo dok nya medde baŋi, ibino bedo i boma luŋ ame yam tye iyi Icrael, ite daŋ dok gero wunu kabedo luŋ ame yam obabalo." 
Ezekiel36:11 Abino miyo jo karacel kede dok, nya medde ameda. Welwu bino bedo abup ame kato en a yam con oko, dok itino wu daŋ bino bedo apol meicel. Abino miyo ibedo wunu kuno kite ame yam ibedo wunu con, kun ibedo wunu aber, ame kato kite ame yam itye ibedo wunu con, mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot." 
Ezekiel36:12 Abino kelo wun jona Icrael, ate miyowu bedo i lobo. Loboni bino bedo megwu, itinowu mom dok bino neno can iye kadi acel." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni: Pien jo tye ka lwoŋo kiddi ame tye Icrael ni, ‘Yin i kidi ame ineko jo, dok daŋ imao itino a jo.’" 
Ezekiel36:14 Cite cakere aman mom dok ibino neko itino a jo, dok daŋ mom ibino mayo itino a rok me Icrael. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel36:15 Dok daŋ mom ibino medde wunu winyo acae ame rok ocele caowu kede, dok daŋ mom ibino medde wunu yeyo lewic, ame rok ocele tye ka keto i komwu, dok daŋ mom ibino neko wunu itino a rok man, Man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Wot a dano we, i kare ame jo Icrael obedo i lobogi gin i komgi, gin obin obalo lobogi oko i kitegi, karacel kede gin ame gin tio, Gin ame gin rik timo i nyima, rik mom cil, rom a roma i dako ame tye atwoyo two me kwer." 
Ezekiel36:18 Mannono rik te miyo an coro akemona i komgi pi remo ame gin rik obedo onyo, pi cal jogi ame gin obalo kede lobogi." 
Ezekiel36:19 Rik ate keketogi atata i akina rok ocele, gin te lal i lobo apapat, i kabedo luŋ, kun lubere i kitegi kede gin ame gin obedo timo, en amio an daŋ aŋolligi kop kittono," 
Ezekiel36:20 Cite i kare ame gin doŋ otye i akina rok ocele, i kabedo luŋ ame onwoŋo gin tye iye, gin rik te bedo pyedo nyiŋa acil, pien jo rik tye ka kobo kop i komgi ni, ‘Jo man obedo jo a Rwot, cite gin dok obin oya oko i lobogi.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Cite an, nyiŋa acil litta meicel, ame gin jo Icrael obedo balo i akina rok kan ame gin onwoŋo otye iye." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Pi mannono myero ikob baŋ jo me ot Icrael, kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Gin ame an aceggi timo-ni, pe atimo pirwu wun jo me ot Icrael, cite an atimo pi nyiŋa acil, ame wun ibedo balo wunu i akina rok ocele kan ame onwoŋo itye wunu iye." 
Ezekiel36:23 I kare ame an abino nyutti rok ocele twon nyiŋa acil wok-ki, ame wun ibedo balo wunu i kare ame itye wunu i akinagi; bino miyo gin rok ocele ŋeo ni an abedo Rwot, ka ce gin oneno an atio kedwu me nyuto nyiŋa acil, kun gin oneno kede waŋgi. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel36:24 Pien an abino kwanyowu oko i akina rok ocele ate coko wu daŋ i akina rok apapat ame itye wunu iye, ate dwokowu cen i lobowu i komwu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Abino kikiro pii acil i komwu, wun doŋ ite doko wunu jo acil, wun jo ame yam ijebere wunu i cal jogi, karacel kede jami ducu ame yam omiowu i lille wunu." 
Ezekiel36:26 Abino miyowu cuny anyen, abino keto cuny anyen i yiwu, Abino kwanyo cuny ame tek calo gweŋe oko i yiwu ate miyowu cuny a dano ikokome." 
Ezekiel36:27 Abino keto cuny acil i yiwu, ate miyowu bedo jo ame lubo cikka, kun igwokere wunu i lubo gin ame an aciko." 
Ezekiel36:28 Ibino bedo wunu i lobo ame rik amio baŋ kwariwu, wun ibino bedo wunu jona, an abino bedo Obaŋawu," 
Ezekiel36:29 Abino larowu oko i kom lille ame ilile wunu kede. Abino miyo cam bedo abup, kec mom dok te medde bedo i lobowu." 
Ezekiel36:30 Abino miyo nyig yen nyak adwoŋ meicel, karacel kede cam ame cek i potowu, me kur dok ibed wunu i lewic me bedo wunu i kec i akina rok ocele." 
Ezekiel36:31 Mannono bino miyo ipoyo wunu kitwu areco, kede gin areco ame rik ibedo timo wunu ame mom, ber, ite caye wunu kenwu, pi bal ame ibedo balo wunu, kede gigi mogo me kwer ame ibedo timo wunu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Myero iŋe wunu ni gin ame an atimo, mom atimo pirwu. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo, Myero lewic makwu pi gin ame yam ibedo timo wunu, wun jo Icrael." 
Ezekiel36:33 “Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: I nino ame abino lwokowu iye i kom bal ame yam ibedo balo wunu, abino miyo jo cako bedo i boma luŋ, ote daŋ cako gero kagi mogo ame yam obabala." 
Ezekiel36:34 Lobo ame doŋ onwoŋo tye acalo wi obur, dok obino puro, kun mom dok medde bedo acalo wi obur, kite ame jo a rik beo iye bedo neno kede." 
Ezekiel36:35 Jo bino cako kobo ni, ‘Lobo man ame rik tye acalo wi obur-ri, aman dok calo poto me Eden; dok boma mogo ame yam oballe acalo wi obur, aman dok jo tye bedo iye, dok daŋ ocecelo oko i cellogo atek.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Mannono bino miyo rok ame odoŋ ame tye i ŋetwu, ŋeo ni an a Rwot, dok atyeko gero kagi mogo ame yam doŋ oballe oko, dok daŋ amio lobo mogo ame yam calo wi obur, odoko dok lobo ame ceko cam. Man kop ame an Rwot akobo, dok daŋ abino tiyo." 
Ezekiel36:37 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni: Abino daŋ miyo jo Icrael penya me miyo jogi nya calo rommi kede dyegi. Calo rommi kede dyegi ame omio me yalo Obaŋa, calo rommi ame onwoŋo oradde i Jerucalem i kare me ecubannogo adoŋo." 
Ezekiel36:38 Mannono en kite ame boma mogo ame yam obabala bino bedo kede, kun jo opoŋ yigi calo rommi kede dyegi. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Teko a Rwot onwoŋo tye ikoma, ame te miyo cuny a Rwot kela naka i dye luŋ, cogo otwo onwoŋo tye oradde atata i luŋŋono." 
Ezekiel37:2 Cuny a Rwot te miya mano kannono luŋ, ate neno cogo tye oradde kuno atata, dok cogo mere luŋ onwoŋo obedo cogo ame otwo." 
Ezekiel37:3 En te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, cogo magi dok twero lokere bedo kwo? An ate gamo ni, Ama Rwot Obaŋa, yin gire iŋeo.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 En dok te kobba ni, “Rab kop baŋ coggi magi, ikobbigi ni, Wun coggi ame otwo-ni, winy wunu kop a Rwot." 
Ezekiel37:5 Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man baŋwu, wun cogo: Nen ba, abino miyo weo me kwo bino i komwu, eka ite cako dok bedo wunu kwo." 
Ezekiel37:6 Abino miyo ler dok ryeye i komwu, kede riŋo daŋ dwogo i komwu, ate miyo del komwu daŋ bedo tye, eka ate miyowu weo me kwo, ite doŋ cako wunu bedo kwo. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Mannono te miyo an daŋ rabo kop kite ame onwoŋo ocika kede. Kare ame atyeko rabo kop, ate cako winyo dwonnoro tye ka wo i tek, cogo daŋ te cako ribere oko i kom owotegi, kun cogo man ribere i kom awottere." 
Ezekiel37:8 I kare ame atye aneno, ate neno ler okadde akada i komgi, riŋo daŋ te bino i komgi oko, del komgi daŋ te wumo komgi ipuk, cite weo me kwo onwoŋo pwod pe i komgi." 
Ezekiel37:9 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, rab kop baŋ weo, ikobbi weo kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Yin weo myero ibin i twok lobo aŋwen ducu, bye idony i kom jo man ame oneko-ni, me gin ocak bedo kwo.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 An daŋ ate rabo kop kite ame ocika kede, eka weo me kwo te bino donyo i komgi, gin te cako bedo kwo, ote ya cuŋ acuŋa i tyengi. Jo mere onwoŋo pol ame romo mony acel luŋ." 
Ezekiel37:11 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, cogo magi obedo jo Icrael luŋ. Nen gin otye kakoboni, ‘Cogo komwa, otwo gire doŋ oko, geŋwa moro doŋ mom; wan doŋ orom wunu aroma i jo oto.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Pi mannono myero irab kop, ikobbigi kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Nen ba, abino yabo lyelewu ate miyowu ya malo oko i lyelwu-nono, ama wun jona. Abino dwogowu paco i lobo a jo Icrael." 
Ezekiel37:13 Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot, ka ce ayabo lyel ame yam oyikowu iye, ate miyowu ya malo, wun jona." 
Ezekiel37:14 Abino keto Cuny Acil i yiwu, eka ite cako bedo wunu kwo, ate ketowu daŋ i lobowu ikome. Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot. An atyeko ciko ni abino timo, daŋ abino timo, Man kop ame Rwot okobo.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Wot a dano we, Kwany abiro moro me yat, ite coyo kome ni, ‘Pi loc a jo Juda’. Ite kwanyo dok abiro okene, ite coyo kome ni, ‘Loc a jo Icrael’." 
Ezekiel37:17 Kwany abiro aryo-nono imak i ciŋi, me gin aryo luŋ onen acalo abiro acel." 
Ezekiel37:18 Ka ce joni bino penyi ni, ‘Mom itwero nyuttiwa te kop me gin ame itimo-nono?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Yin myero ikobbigi ni, ‘Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni: Nen ba, an aceggi kwanyo abiro ame ocuŋ pi jo Icrael, ate keto karacel abiro ame tye pi jo Juda. I kom abiro aryonono, abino miyo doko abiro acel keken an ate mako i ciŋa.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 “Mak abiro aryo ame ico komginono i ciŋi, mi lwak nengi." 
Ezekiel37:21 Kobbi lwak kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Nen ba, abino kwanyo jo Icrael i akina rok ocele kan ame gin tye iye, abino cokogi i kabedo ducu ame gin tye iye, ate kelogi i lobogi i komgi;" 
Ezekiel37:22 abino miyogi odoko rok acel, i lobogi-nono, i wii kiddi me Icrael, dok abaka acel en a bino loyogi luŋ. Gin mom dok bino medde bedo rok aryo apapat, dok daŋ mom obino medde bedo i te loc aryo." 
Ezekiel37:23 Mom dok obino medde jebere kengi i cal jogi, akadi kit balloro ocele, abino larogi i yo luŋ ame yam gin opoto iye, kun otimo kit bal apapat, ate lonyogi bedo acil. Gin bino bedo jona, an abino bedo Obaŋagi." 
Ezekiel37:24 “Amirona Daudi en ame bino bedo abaka ame loogi; gin luŋ obino bedo akwat acel. Obino lubo ginnoro luŋ ame an aciko, kun daŋ ogwokere i lubo cikka." 
Ezekiel37:25 Gin bino bedo i lobo ame rik kwarigi obedo iye, ame rik amio baŋ amirona Yakobo. Gin karacel kede itinogi kede ikwaegi bino bedo kuno nakanaka, dok amirona Daudi en ame bino bedo rwot ame loogi atwal." 
Ezekiel37:26 Abino cikere kedgi cikere me kuc, cikerena kedgi-nono bino bedo cikere ame bedo nakanaka, abino miyogi winyo, ate miyogi nya, ate keto ot me wora i akinagi, ame bino bedo iye atwal." 
Ezekiel37:27 Kan ame an abino bedo iye, abino bedo i akinagi, an abino bedo Obaŋagi, gin obino bedo jona." 
Ezekiel37:28 Mannono bino miyo rok ocele ŋeo ni an a Rwot en ame alonyo jo Icrael, ka ce kabedona acil tye akinagi nakanaka.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Rwot dok te kop keda, kun kobo ni," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Wot a dano we, koŋ dok i lokere inen Gog, ame tye i lobo me Magog. En obedo aloc adwoŋ ame loo rok apapat ame tye i Mecek, kede Tubal. Rab kop i kome," 
Ezekiel38:3 kun ikobo kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Nen ba, an atye i kop i komi yin Gog, yin ame ibedo Rwot adwoŋ ame loo rok apapat ame tye i Mecek, kede i Tubal." 
Ezekiel38:4 Abino lokki ineno ŋei, ate rwako golo me rec i cwaki, ate wayi kede karacel i monnyi, kede aguragurani, kede oryem aguragurani, kun gin luŋ oruko jami me lweny, dok lwak jo adwoŋ meicel, dok gin luŋ omako nyony me geno kor kede kwode kede pala lwenyogo ame ameny amenya." 
Ezekiel38:5 Jo ame oya i Pacia, Eciopia, kede Libia, daŋ tye baŋi kuno kun gin luŋ daŋ otye i kwode kede tok nyonyo me geno wigi." 
Ezekiel38:6 Olweny luŋ ame oya i lobo me Gomer, kede en ame oya i Bet-togarma, ame tye kannabor meicel tutuŋ anyarodi, daŋ tye baŋi kuno, karacel kede jo ocele ame oya i rok apapat." 
Ezekiel38:7 “Bed ame itere oko, kun itye ame iyikere oko karacel i monnyi luŋ, ame ocokere baŋi, kun gin luŋ otye i te gwokki." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ka mwaka doŋ okato bubup, kare bino tuno ame abino cikke me tero olweny i lobo ame jo obedo bedo iye aboŋo gin ame miogi lworo acalo lweny cakere i kare ame odwogogi cen i lobogi i akina rok ocele, en bino cobo lweny i kom kiddi me Icrael, ame onwoŋo obedo acalo wi obur kare alac, jo mere rik ote kela akela i akina rok ocele, cite aman doŋ gin luŋ obedo aber i kuc." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ibino mol wunu calo yamo kot, kun icalo wunu pol ame owumo piny, yin karacel kede monnyi, kede jo ame oya i rok apapat ame tye baŋi." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni, I nino-nono kop bino bino i cunyi, ite cako paro pi timo timmogo areco i cunyi." 
Ezekiel38:11 Ibino cako moko tammi me cobo lweny i kom lobo ame konyere mom ame jo iye bedo mot i kuc, i kom boma mogo ame mom daŋ ocelo, dok ame mom daŋ tye kede gigi mogo me konyogi i kare me lweny." 
Ezekiel38:12 Ibino yako jami karacel kede jo ame bedo i boma mogo ame rik tye acalo wi obur, ame jo iye rik ocoko acoka i rok ocele, ame aman doŋ otye i leyi akwo karacel kede jami, ame jo mere bedo i cuny lobo." 
Ezekiel38:13 Ceba kede Dedan kede ocatwil Tarcic, kede luŋ ame tye iye, bino kobbi ni, ‘Ibino me bino yako jami? Icoko lwak jo a rom man me bino ye yo yec, me bino ye yo ryal kede jabu, me bino tero dok kede jami, me iyak jami abup meicel?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Pi mannono ba, wot a dano we, rab kop man ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo, ikobbi Gog ni, ‘I kare-nono ame jona Icrael bino bedo i kuc, yin ibino cako tugere keni," 
Ezekiel38:15 ite ya i kan ame itye iye i kannabor meicel i tutuŋ anyarodi, yin karacel kede jo apol ame oya i rok apapat, kun gin luŋ otye oriŋo aguragura, lwak mony adwoŋ dok ame tek meicel i lweny." 
Ezekiel38:16 Yin ibino bino wunu i komjona Icrael calo pol ame owumo piny; i kare ame mwaka doŋ okato alalac, an abino miyo ibino me bino lweny i kom jona, me rok ocele neka ce an abino tic kedi me nyuto ni an acil.’" 
Ezekiel38:17 “Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo: Man en ŋat ame rik an akobo kop i kome kare okato, kun amio omirona odwarpiny me Icrael kobo, ame gin obedo rabo kare alac, ni mannono an abino keli me bino lweny i komgi?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Cite i nino-nono, i kare ame Gog bino bino me lweny i kom Icrael, akemona bino tugere. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel38:19 Pien i kare-nono, ame nyeko nwoŋo omaka, dok akemona daŋ doŋ olyeto meicel, abino rabo kop, lobo me Icrael bino yeŋere meicel i kare-naca." 
Ezekiel38:20 Rec ame tye i nam, winy ame twarre malo, leyi ame bedo i tim, jami luŋ ame lak alaka i lobo, karacel kede jo luŋ ame nwoŋo tye i wi lobo, gin luŋ komgi bino myel meicel i nyima. Kiddi luŋ bino rutte oko piny, ateni kiddi daŋ bino rutte oko piny dok apama moro luŋ ame tye daŋ bino rette oko piny." 
Ezekiel38:21 Abino miyo kit lworo moro luŋ bino i kom Gog, dok ŋat acel acel bino tiŋo jami lwennyere me neko ominnere. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo," 
Ezekiel38:22 Abino cako ŋolo kop i kome i too edeke, kede to me pala lweny. Abino coro kot ager meicel, kede pee, kede mac, gweŋ kibiriti i kome karacel kede i kom monnyere, kede i kom rok ocele luŋ ame tye tutuŋ baŋe." 
Ezekiel38:23 Man bino miyo anyutti rok apol apapat twon tekona adwoŋ, kede kite ame acil kede. Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Yin wot a dano we, rab kop i kom Gog, ikobbe kop man ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo: Nen ba, an atye i kop i komi, yin Gog, yin i rwot adwoŋ ame loo rwode ame tye i Mecek kede i Tuban." 
Ezekiel39:2 Abino miyi ilokere ineno ŋei, ate cako ryemi wot anyim, ate keli i lobo ame tye kannabor, tutuŋ anyarodi, ate teri me wot cako lweny i kom kiddi me Icrael." 
Ezekiel39:3 Abino goyo akud ateroni oko i ciŋi tuŋ cam, ate miyo ateroni oony oko luŋ i ciŋi tuŋ cem." 
Ezekiel39:4 Ibino to i wi kiddi me Icrael kuno, yin karacel kede monnyi, kede rok ocele luŋ ame tye tutuŋ baŋi. Abino miyo kit winy apapat camo komi, leyi me tim daŋ bino mwodowu." 
Ezekiel39:5 Komwu bino radde i dye bar ata; pien an a Rwot Obaŋa doŋ atyeko kobo. 
Ezekiel39:6 Abino cwalo mac i wi kidi me Magog, karacel kede i kom jo ame bedo i kuc i lobo ame tye i dog nam; gin bino ŋeyo ni an abedo Rwot." 
Ezekiel39:7 “Abino miyo nyiŋa acil ŋeye i akina jona Icrael, mom dok abino ye ni bal nyiŋa kadi acel, dok rok ocele bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot, ŋat Acil me Icrael." 
Ezekiel39:8 Nen ba, nino ame akobo-nono, tye abino, abino miyo bino. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel39:9 “Jo ame bedo i boma luŋ me Icrael, bino wot, te wot coko jami lweny ame jo oweko. Gin bino moko mac, kun okuto i kwode akud atero, atero, pale, kede toŋ, ame maccere romo lyel pi mwaka abiro twal." 
Ezekiel39:10 Gin mom dok bino coko yen ame tye i dye poto, akadi toŋo en ame tye i buŋ, pien gin bino kuto macgi ka i jami me lweny keken. Gin bino yako jami a jo ame yam koŋ oyako daŋ jamigi, Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel39:11 “I nino-nono abino miyo Gog kabedo mere me yike iyi Icrael, i luŋ ame olwoŋo ni luŋ Owot ame tye tutuŋ kide me Nam me kado ame geŋo owot. Gog karacel kede monnyere luŋ obino yikogi kuno, eka luŋŋono ote doŋ lwoŋo ni, ‘Luŋ a mony a Gog.’" 
Ezekiel39:12 Jo Icrael bino bedo yiko komgi pi dwete a romo abiro twal, me wek lobogi bed lobo ame cil." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ŋat acel acel ame tye i lobo-naca bino konyo tic me yiko komgi, dok obino worogi pi tic man ame gin otio, dok abino nyuto kwogona iye. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa atyeko kobo." 
Ezekiel39:14 I kare ame dwete abiro doŋ otyeko tum oko, obino yero jo mogo me be bea i lobo-nono, me wek ka gin onwoŋo komjo mogo ame mom oyiko, oyik oko, me wek omi lobo bed acil." 
Ezekiel39:15 I kare ame jo-nono tye ka be bea i lobo, ka ce ŋattoro i kingi ocop i cogo kom ŋattoro, en keto ginnoro me nyuto ni cogo kom dano tye kannono, tuno waŋ ame okuny bur obino te kwanyo cogo kom danonono wot yiko i Luŋ me mony a Gog." 
Ezekiel39:16 Boma moro tye ame ceggi i kuno daŋ ame olwoŋo ni Kamona, mannono en kite ame gin bino lonyo kede lobogi bedo acil." 
Ezekiel39:17 “Aco yin wot a dano we, Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, Kob kop baŋ kit winy luŋ kede leyi me tim luŋ ni, ‘Cokere wunu i kabedo ducu, me ibin icam wunu arama me ecuban ame ayiko pirwu twon ecuban moro adwoŋ meicel, ame ayiko i wi kiddi me Icrael, kan ame ibino camo wunu iye riŋo, dok daŋ ibino mato wunu iye remo," 
Ezekiel39:18 Ibino camo wunu riŋo kom jo mogo ame onwoŋo tek meicel i lweny, ite daŋ mato wunu remo a rwode apapat me wi lobo ame gin luŋ obino nekogi calo itino rommi, onyo nyogi rommi kede nyogi dyegi onyo twoni dokkogo ame ocwe, kun gin luŋ otye acalo leyi ocwe me Bacan." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ibino camo wunu riŋo tuno wan ame yiwu doŋ oden, dok daŋ ibino mato wunu remo te merowu oko iyi ecuban ame an ayiko pirwu." 
Ezekiel39:20 I mejana ame ayiko pirwu-nono ibino yeŋ wunu i remo aguragura, onyo kom oryem aguragura, riŋo kom twoni jo mogo ame tek meicel i lweny, karacel kede riŋo kom ocirikale ducu.’ Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Mannono bino miyo aketo kwogona i akina orok, rok apapat luŋ te neno kop ame an aŋolo, kede ciŋa ame atimogi kede lit." 
Ezekiel39:22 Cakere i nino-nono wot kede anyim, jo Icrael bino ŋeyo ni an a Rwot Obaŋagi," 
Ezekiel39:23 Dok rok ocele bino ŋeyo ni rik oterogi iyi opii pi balgi kede timogo me idwali ame gin obedo timo i koma, an alokkigi ŋea, ate miyo okwor makogi, jo apol i akinagi ote neko oko i pala lweny." 
Ezekiel39:24 Abedo tic kedgi kun alubo kitegi ame mom cil, kede balgi, ate pono gira oko i waŋgi." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo kop man ni, ‘Aman doŋ abino dwoggo kuc a Yakobo, kica te maka i kom jo me ot Icrael luŋ, kun nyeko maka pi nyiŋa acil." 
Ezekiel39:26 Wigi bino wil oko i kom lewic ame onwoŋo gin tye kede, kede timmogo me idwali, ame gin obedo timo i koma, ka doŋ gin bino cako bedo i kuc i lobogi aboŋo ŋattoro ame miogi lworo." 
Ezekiel39:27 Abino dwoggogi cen i akina rok apapat ame gin tye iye, i lobo okworgi, kun atio kedgi me nyuto ni an acil i nyim rok ocele luŋ." 
Ezekiel39:28 Mannono bino miyo gin oŋeo ni an a Rwot Obaŋagi, pien acwaogi iyi opii akina i rok ocele, ate dok cokogi dwoggogi cen i lobogi ikomgi. Mom abino weko ŋattoro i akinagi doŋ i rok ocele." 
Ezekiel39:29 I kare ame abino onyo Cunya Acil i kom jo me ot Icrael, mom dok abino medde ponnigi kadi acel.’ Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 I nino dwe apar me mwaka anyen, i mwaka me pyeraryo wie abic, ame onwoŋo wan doŋ oterowa oko iyi opii, i mwaka me apar wie aŋwen, ame onwoŋo doŋ otyeko mako Jerucalem oko, i nino-nono ikome awinyo teko Obaŋa tye i koma," 
Ezekiel40:2 ame te kwanya tera oko teŋe i anyut ame Obaŋa onyutta-nono te tera naka iyi Icrael, te wot ciba i wi kidi moro abor meicel. I ŋea kuno ate neno gedo mogo ame oradde atata, ame nen caloboma."
