Ezekiel40:3 I kare ame anoko ceggi, ate neno lo moro ame kome nen calo mola ame ameny. Dano-nono onwoŋo omako tol kede ogada me pimo jami i ciŋe, kun tye ocuŋ i dogcel me boma." 
Ezekiel40:4 Dano-nono te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, koŋ doŋ inen kede waŋi, dok daŋ iwiny kede yiti, ite keto cunyi i kom ginnoro luŋ ame an abino nyutti, pien okeli kan ni mannono an abin anyuttigi. Myero ŋeli ni ikobo ginnoro luŋ ame ineno baŋ jo Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Nen ba, ginnogo ame aneno onwoŋo obedo ot Obaŋa ame cel ame ogero apama oguro oko dyere. Dano-nono te kwanyo ogada ame onwoŋo tye i ciŋe, ame borrere onwoŋo tye futi apar, eka te pimo kede apama cel. Borrere malo onwoŋo tye futi apar, kun lac a kor apama tye daŋ futi apar." 
Ezekiel40:6 Danonono te ya wot i doggola ame tye tutuŋ kide, En te wot malo kun woto kede rwom me dogcel, i malo kuno en te pimo dogcel me boma, ame borrere onwoŋo tye daŋ futi apar." 
Ezekiel40:7 Iyi doggola kuno onwoŋo tye icika adek adek tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi kede yo ame beo i akinagi. Icika acel acel borrere romo futi apar, laccere daŋ futi apar. Apama cel ame poko kin icika acel acel laccere onwoŋo tye futi aboro. Ka doŋ ikato icika adek adek-ca ite doŋ medo wot futi apar ocele ite tuno iyi icika moro alaccere ame tye i nyim ot Obaŋa." 
Ezekiel40:8 En te pimo icika alaccono te nwoŋo ni tye futi apar wie aryo. 
Ezekiel40:9 Kannono obedo tyelo iyi agikki dogcel tutuŋ dyekal me ot Obaŋa. Dit me kom apama me tuŋ yie onwoŋo romo futi aryo. 
Ezekiel40:10 Icika adek adek ame onwoŋo tye i dogcel me tuŋ kide tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, gin luŋ ditogi onwoŋo rorom apama cel ame onwoŋo opokogi daŋ onwoŋo rorom." 
Ezekiel40:11 Dano-nono dok te pimo lac me yo ame beo iyi dogcel, te nwoŋo ni romo futi pyeraryo wie aryo, eka lac me doggola ikome onwoŋo tye futi apar wie abicel." 
Ezekiel40:12 I nyim icika tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi onwoŋo tye iye apama moro acecek ame romo iŋcec pyeraryo. Lac icika magi onwoŋo tye futi apar apar, borgi daŋ futi apar apar." 
Ezekiel40:13 En dok te pimo lac me dogcel ari ame ya iyi icikaacel tuno kede iyi en ocele ame otemere kede, kun beo i doggolagi, onwoŋo tye futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:14 Te dok pimo ici ka alac ame tye i agikki mere, te nwoŋo ni laccere tye futi pyeradek wie aryo." 
Ezekiel40:15 Cakere i tuŋ nyim dogcel ame tye oko kan ame odonyo iye tuno iyi agikki ici ka alac ame tye tyeloborrere luŋ onwoŋo tye futi pyeraboro. 
Ezekiel40:16 Dirica onwoŋo tye iyi icika luŋ i apama cel ame i oko mere, kede i apama cel ame pokogi, kede icika alaccere daŋ. Dirica-nono onwoŋo nen atitino i oko, cite iyi ot onwoŋo lac. I apama cel ame poko icika onwoŋo ogoro iye cal yen otit." 
Ezekiel40:17 Dano-nono dok te tera i dyekal me ot Obaŋa ame tye i oko mere. I kor apama me dyekallono onwoŋo tye icika apapat ame romo pyeradek, kun icika acel acel okubere i wadgi, dok i nyim icika acel acel opepeto iye gweŋ apada ame omano dyekal amana." 
Ezekiel40:18 Gweŋ ame opepeto-nono obedo i ŋet dogcel ducu kun laccere rom i bor me dogcel. Man onwoŋo gweŋ ame opepeto i dyekal me tuŋ pinnyere. 
Ezekiel40:19 Dano-nono dok te pimo bor a piny cakere kede i nyim dogcel ame tye tuŋ piny tuno kede i nyim dogcel me dyekal i yie, te nwoŋo ni romo futi mia acel i pyeracel." 
Ezekiel40:20 En dok te telo nyima me wot tutuŋ anyarodi, kuno onwoŋo tye iye dogcel ame nyime oneno tutuŋ anyarodi, i dyekal me oko. En te pimo borrere kede de laccere." 
Ezekiel40:21 Icika atitino adek onwoŋo tye i yie tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, kun apama daŋ tye ame opopokogi. Lac kede bor icika kede me apama ame opokkigi kede me icika alaccere rom aroma i en ame tye i tuŋ kide. Bor a dogcel luŋ onwoŋo tye futi apyeraboro, kun laccere tye futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:22 Icika alaccere, dirica luŋ a tye iye, kede cal yen otit ame onwoŋo tye okwogo kede, onwoŋo daŋ rom aroma i en ame tye tutuŋ kide, dok rwom abiro apapat daŋ onwoŋo tye me yito malo naka i dogcel, eka icika alaccere te bedo i agikki mere kun otemere i dyekal." 
Ezekiel40:23 I nyim dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi onwoŋo tye iye doggola ocele mere ame kato i dyekal i yie, kite ame tye i maca ame tye tutuŋ kide. Danonono dok te pimo bor ame tye i akina dogcel aryo-nono luŋ, te nwoŋo tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel40:24 En dok te kwanya tera tutuŋ anyarolum. I kuno daŋ dok ate neno dogcel okene. En te pimo icika atino mege, kede apama ame opopokogi kede icika alaccere, te nwoŋo ni gin luŋ orom aroma i en ocele mege ame egeo pimo," 
Ezekiel40:25 Dirica daŋ onwoŋo tye iyi icika atitino ame onwoŋo tye i dogcel kite ame onwoŋo iyi maca ocele-ca, dogcellono daŋ borrere onwoŋo tye futi pyeraboro, laccere futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:26 Rwom abiro daŋ onwoŋo tye me yito malo i dogcel, icika alaccere daŋ te bedo agikki mere ame otemere i dyekal. Cal yen otit daŋ onwoŋo tye ame okwogo kene kor apama me yie, kede acel tuŋ cel." 
Ezekiel40:27 Dogcel ocele onwoŋo tye tutuŋ anyarolum ame kato i dyekal i yie. Dano-nono daŋ te pimo bor ame tye i akina dogcel aryo-nono luŋ, te nwoŋo ni tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel40:28 Dok te tera naka i dyekal ame tye i yie kun obeo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum. En te pimo dogcellono te nwoŋo ni rom aroma i en ocele-ca. 
Ezekiel40:29 Icika atitino ame tye i ŋete kede icika alaccere, karacel kede apama mere me yie kuno, onwoŋo rom aroma i en ocele-ca, dirica onwoŋo tye iyi icika mere atitino kede i icika alaccere; dogcellono daŋ borrere onwoŋo tye futi pyeraboro, laccere daŋ futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:30 Icika ocele daŋ onwoŋo tye i ŋete ame borgi futi pyeraŋwen, lacgi futi aboro." 
Ezekiel40:31 Icika alac ame onwoŋo tye iye onwoŋo otikere i dyekal alac ame onwoŋo tye oko, cal yen otit daŋ onwoŋo tye ame okwogo kede kor apama me yie. Rwom ame woto i dogcel onwoŋo tye aboro." 
Ezekiel40:32 En dok te tera naka i dyekal ame tye i yie tutuŋ kide, eka te pimo dogcel te nwoŋo ni laccere kede borrere rom aroma ked kede en ocele-ca." 
Ezekiel40:33 Icika atitino mere kede apama ame opokogi kede icika alaccere, lacgi kede borgi rom aroma i en ocele-ca. Dirica onwoŋo tye iyi icika mere atitino kede iyi icika alaccere; dogcellono daŋ borrere onwoŋo tye futi pyeraboro, laccere futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:34 Icika alac ame onwoŋo tye iye onwoŋo otikere i dyekal alac me oko. Cal yen otit daŋ onwoŋo tye ame okwogo kede kor apama me yie, acel tuŋ cel kede acel tuŋ cel; Rwom ame woto i dogcelli onwoŋo tye aboro." 
Ezekiel40:35 Dok te tera i dogcel ame tye tuŋ anyarodi. En opimo te nwoŋo ni borrere kede laccere rom aroma i en ocele-ca. 
Ezekiel40:36 Icika atitino mere, kede apama ame opopokogi kede icika alaccere, lacgi kede borgi onwoŋo daŋ rom aroma i en ocele-ca. Dirica onwoŋo tye iyi icika mere atitino; dogcellono daŋ borrere onwoŋo tye futi pyeraboro, laccere te bedo futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:37 Icika alac ame onwoŋo tye iye onwoŋo otikere i dyekal alac me oko, cal yen otit daŋ onwoŋo tye ame okwogo kede kor apama me yie, acel tuŋ cel, kede acel tuŋ cel. Rwom me yito malo dogcellidaŋ onwoŋo tye aboro." 
Ezekiel40:38 I dyekal i oko mere onwoŋo tye iye icika moro ame doggola mere woto iyi icika alaccere ame otikere i dyekal i oko. Mannono obedo kan ame rik olwoko iye riŋo leyi ame oneko me mot awaŋa ame owaŋo alutu. 
Ezekiel40:39 Iyi icika alac me dogcel onwoŋo tye iye meja aŋwen, aryo tuŋ cel, aryo tuŋ ocele. I meja magi en ame oneko iye leyi ame oyalo Obaŋa, kadi bed leyi ame oyalo Obaŋa calo mot awaŋa, onyo mot me kwanyo bal, onyo me walakino i roc, gin luŋ rik onekogi i maja magi." 
Ezekiel40:40 I ŋe icika-nono, i oko mere, daŋ onwoŋo tye iye meja aŋwen, aryo onwoŋo tye i dogcel me donyo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, aryo daŋ tuŋ ocele." 
Ezekiel40:41 Meja aŋwen onwoŋo tye iyi icika kede meja aŋwen onwoŋo tye oko, ame gin luŋ te bedo meja aboro; gin luŋ onwoŋo tye me neko leyi ame oyalo kede Obaŋa." 
Ezekiel40:42 Meja aŋwen onwoŋo tye me yiko mot ame myero wan alutu, ame gin meja-nono otio kede gweŋ ame opao, borgi malo onwoŋo tye iŋcec pyeraryo, lac me wie te bedo iŋcec pyeradek i twoke aŋwen ducu; jami luŋ ame rik otio kedgi me yalo Obaŋa-ni, gin luŋ rik obedo i wi meja magi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Golo mogo ame lacgi tye iŋcec aŋwen aŋwen, onwoŋo tye i lak mejanono luŋ, ame oromo aroma niirit. Rujo luŋ ame onwoŋo rik myero mi acalo mol, rik oketo i wi meja." 
Ezekiel40:44 Dano-nono dok te tera i dyekal ame tye i yie. Onwoŋo tye iye icika moro kuno i ŋet dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi; doggola mere okemo tutuŋ anyarolum. Icika ocele ame onwoŋo romo aroma i mannono onwoŋo daŋ tye i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum, kun kemo tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Ezekiel40:45 Dano-nono rik te kobba ni, icika ame kemo tutuŋ anyarolum onwoŋo tye pi olamdog ame tio ticgi i ot Obaŋa," 
Ezekiel40:46 kede icika ame onwoŋo kemo tutuŋ anyarodi, onwoŋo tye pi olamdog ame onwoŋo tio tic pi keno lam. Gin luŋ onwoŋo obedo ikwae a Jadok; gin keken i akina ikwae a Levi ame onwoŋo oyeyigi me wot tic i nyim Rwot ikokome." 
Ezekiel40:47 Dano-nono dok te pimo dyekal ame tye iyie, te nwoŋo borrere tye futi mia acel kede pyerabicel, laccere daŋ futi mia acel kede pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel40:48 En dok te tera i doggola ame donyo i ot Obaŋa. En te pimo doggola me donyo iye, te nwoŋo borrere tye futi aboro, laccere futi pyeraryo wie adek, eka lac apama mere te bedo futi abic." 
Ezekiel40:49 Icika ame tye i doggola onwoŋo borrere tye futi pyeradek wie aryo, eka laccere ŋolo dyere te bedo futi apar wie aboŋwen, kun rwom me yito malo daŋ tye ame romo apar. Pagi daŋ onwoŋo tye i ŋet kika, tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Dano-nono dok te tera iyi icika ame tye i dyere. En te pimo yo ame woto iye, te nwoŋo borrere tye futi apar," 
Ezekiel41:2 kun laccere tye apar wie abicel, lac apama te bedo futi aboro, tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi. En dok te pimo icika i dyere-nono, te nwoŋo borrere tye futi pyerabicel wie aŋwen, laccere futi pyeradek wie aryo." 
Ezekiel41:3 Te kato keda doŋ iyi icika me agikki mere, En te pimo yo ame woto iye, borrere onwoŋo tye futi adek, laccere futi apar, kun lac a kor apama tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi tye futi apar wie acel." 
Ezekiel41:4 En dok te pimo icika me agikki-nono ame laccere kede borrere onwoŋo tye futi pyeradek wie aryo, En dano-nono te kobba ni, “Man en ame doŋ obedo Kabedo Acil Meicel.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 En dok te pimo lac a kor apama me ot Obaŋa, te nwoŋo tye futi apar. I kor apama me ot Obaŋa-ni luŋ rwomere irit, onwoŋo tye iye icika mogo ati tino, ame lacgi onwoŋo tye futi abicel." 
Ezekiel41:6 Icika magi onwoŋo okubere akuba i wi wadgi adek adek, kun tye icika pyeradek pyeradek iyi acel acel. Lac a kor apama i malo mere woto kun doko atitidi, me wek pe mi peko baŋ apama ame tye piny." 
Ezekiel41:7 Rwom onwoŋo tye i oko mege me yito malo icika i malo mege ame tye i kor apama me ot Obaŋa. Pi icika magi ame tye i malo-ni, omio kor apama me ot Obaŋa nen i oko ame rom aroma naka malo. Mannono onwoŋo mio bedo yot meicel me yito malo i icika i dyere kede icika me agikki." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ate neno ni kabedo ame oguro ot Obaŋa otiŋere malo ame kato kabedo luŋ ame tye i ŋete i futi apar, kun rom aroma kede acakki me te icika ame tye i kom apama cel me ot Obaŋa, kabedo luŋ ame tye i ŋete i futi apar, kun rom aroma kede acakki me te icika ame tye i kom apama cel me ot Obaŋa." 
Ezekiel41:9 Lac a kor apama ame tye oko, me wudi atitino ame tye i kom apama cel me ot Obaŋa, onwoŋo tye futi aboro," 
Ezekiel41:10 tye daŋ kan ame onwoŋo oweko obedo a twolo, ame oguro ot Obaŋa, ame laccere onwoŋo tye futi pyeradek wie aryo," 
Ezekiel41:11 cakere i bur me mola a pii tuno kede i udi ame olamdog tio kede, yo onwoŋo tye acel ame woto iyi icika ame tye iyi apama cel me ot Obaŋa i tutuŋ anyarodi, kede yo acel ame tye ame woto iyi icika ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum, Bur me mol a pii ame tye i ŋet ot cel me ot Obaŋa, laccere onwoŋo tye futi aboro." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ot ame onwoŋo otikere i dyekal me ot Obaŋa, ame tye tutuŋ to, laccere onwoŋo tye futi mia acel apar wie aryo i kom futi mia acel i pyeraŋwen wie aŋwen. Lac a kor apama mere onwoŋo tye futi aboro." 
Ezekiel41:13 Dano-nono dok te pimo ot Obaŋa i oko mere, te nwoŋo borrere tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel, cakere i ŋe ot Obaŋa oko, ŋolo dyekal, kato naka tuŋ ocele, borrere daŋ onwoŋo tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel41:14 Acoborrere i tutuŋ nyime, kun omedo kede kan ame oweko twolo, onwoŋo daŋ tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel41:15 En dok te pimo tuŋ ocele mere ame odoŋ, karacel kede apama mere, te nwoŋo daŋ tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel. Icika ame tye i doggola me donyo i ot Obaŋa, icika adwoŋŋere, kede Kabedo Acil Meicel," 
Ezekiel41:16 onwoŋo ocano iye bao cakere i piny naka i waŋ dirica. Dirica-ni onwoŋo otwero cego oko. 
Ezekiel41:17 Apama me ot Obaŋa iyie cakere i piny wot kede naka malo kan ame doggola ogiki iye, onwoŋo tye iye callogo ame ogogo," 
Ezekiel41:18 cal okerubi, kede cal yen otit. Me agege onwoŋo tye cal yen otit, cal le te lubo, te bedo lubere amannono nakanaka romo." 
Ezekiel41:19 Okerrubi acel acel onwoŋo tye i nyime aryo, nyime ame cal i nyim dano onwoŋo tye tutuŋ kan ame cal yat otit tye iye, eka tuŋ ame cal atin eŋatu, te bedo tuŋ ocele ame daŋ yat otit tye iye, cal ame ogoo i kor apama-nono onwoŋo tye kittono romo kor apama luŋ." 
Ezekiel41:20 Cakere i dye ot tuno kede naka kan ame doggola ogik iye, yen me doggola me icika adwoŋŋere, borgi kede lacgi onwoŋo rorom." 
Ezekiel41:21 I nyim kabedo Acil Meicel, onwoŋo tye iye ginnoro ame nen calo," 
Ezekiel41:22 keno lam ame opao apaa i bao. En dano-nono te kobba ni, “Man en meja ame bedo i nyim Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Doggola onwoŋo tye ame woto iyi icika adwoŋŋere, kede doggola ocele ame woto i Kabedo Acil Meicel." 
Ezekiel41:24 Kika me doggola-nono onwoŋo tye aryo aryo karacel, ame kika mere dolle dok tuŋ cel, acel daŋ dolle dok tuŋ ocele." 
Ezekiel41:25 Kika me doggola-nono onwoŋo ogoro iye cal otit kede cal okerubi, kite ame ogoro kede i kor apama. Dok daŋ onwoŋo tye gin me cego ame owumo i bao i nyim icika ame tye i doggola i oko mere." 
Ezekiel41:26 Dirica daŋ onwoŋo tye i kor apama me ottono, kun kor apama daŋ okwogo i cal yen otit." 
Ezekiel42:1 Dano-nono dok te kwanya tera oko i dyekal ame icika atitino tye iye, naka ot ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Ezekiel42:2 Bor a ot ame ogero icika atitino-nono, ame onwoŋo tye tutuŋ anyarodi-nono, onwoŋo tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel, laccere futi pyeraboro." 
Ezekiel42:3 I ŋete tuŋ cel otikere i kabedo ame oweko twolo i ŋet ot Obaŋa ame laccere onwoŋo tye futi pyeradek wie aryo, eka tuŋ ocele te tikere i kan ame opepeto iye gweŋe ame tye i dyekal i oko. Ottere onwoŋo ogero ame okubere akuba i wadgi adek, kun en i malo mere tye cen ame kato en i tere." 
Ezekiel42:4 I nyim icika-nono onwoŋo tye iye yo ame beo i yie, ame borrere tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel, laccere te bedo futi apar wie abicel, kun doggola luŋ me donyo iyi icika tye tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Ezekiel42:5 Icika ame tye malo onwoŋo tino ame kato en ame tye malo kede en i pinnyere, pien baraja ame i nyimgi, omio kabedogi obedo diŋ akato en i tere, en i dyere-ni daŋ obedo tino akato en i piny-ny pi yo ame i nyimgi." 
Ezekiel42:6 Pien icika-nono onwoŋo okubere akuba i wi wadgi adek, kun pagi moro mom me konyogi, acalo pagi ame tye i dyekal i oko." 
Ezekiel42:7 Apama onwoŋo tye i oko, ame owoto karacel kede icika. En apamanono tye tutuŋ dyekal i oko, kun otikere icika ocele, borrere tye futi pyeraboro," 
Ezekiel42:8 pien ot icika ame tye i ŋet dyekal i okoborrere onwoŋo daŋ tye futi pyeraboro, kun en ame otikere i ot Obaŋa borrere onwoŋo tye futi mia acel i pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel42:9 I te icika-ni piny, i tutuŋ kide, onwoŋo tye iye doggola ame odonyo iye kun nwoŋo obeo i dyekal i oko," 
Ezekiel42:10 kan ame apama i oko ocakere iye. I tutuŋ anyarolum, ame otikere kede dyekal ame yie nono, kan otikere daŋ i gedo ocele-ca, onwoŋo daŋ tye iye icika mogo ame ogegero." 
Ezekiel42:11 I nyim icika-nogo onwoŋo tye iye yo me beo ame rom aroma i en ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi. Borgi kede lacgi onwoŋo dok otio a rom aroma i maca ocele-ca, anaka kit gedo mere luŋ, kun doggola luŋ ame tye iye daŋ rom aroma i macanaca." 
Ezekiel42:12 I te icika ame tye i tutuŋ anyarolum, doggola me donyo tye iye tutuŋ kide, kan ame odonyo i ye ame beo i yie, kun daŋ otikere apama." 
Ezekiel42:13 Dano-nono te kobba ni udi ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, kede udi ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum ame otikere kede dyekal yie nono odoŋ twolo, obedo icika ame cil, kan ame olamdog ame woto i nyim Rwot bino camo iye cam acil ame oyalo kede Rwot. Gin bino keto iye mot acil me yalo Rwot kuno, mot me moko kwoŋ, mot me kwanyo bal, kede mot me walakino i roc, pien kabedo-nono cil." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ka olamdog woto i kabedo acil, koŋ bino gonyo boŋŋigi ame oruko pi tic Obaŋa ote wekogi kuno, mom ote wot i dyekal ame tye oko ame tye pi lwak kun pwod oruko boŋŋi me arukagi, pien bonŋigi-nono nwoŋo cil. Gin bino ruko boŋg ocele, kun mom ru gin onoko icika ame obedo me a lwak ducu." 
Ezekiel42:15 I kare ame dano-nono otyeko pimo gin ducu ame tye iyi apama cel ame oguro ot Obaŋa i yie, en te tera oko kun obeo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ kide, en te wot pi mo ot Obaŋa i oko kuno." 
Ezekiel42:16 En te pimo i tutuŋ to, kun pimo kede ogada, te nwoŋo borrere tye futi mia aboro." 
Ezekiel42:17 En dok te lokere wot pimo cel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, te nwoŋo borrere daŋ tye futi mia aboro." 
Ezekiel42:18 Dok te lokere wot pimo en ame tye i tutuŋ anyarolum, borrere daŋ onwoŋo tye futi mia aboro." 
Ezekiel42:19 En dok te wot pimo en ame tye tutuŋ to, te nwoŋo borrere daŋ tye futi mia aboro," 
Ezekiel42:20 En opimo twoke aŋwennono luŋ, ame onwoŋo apama cel oguro oko dyere, ame borgi onwoŋo ducu rom aroma futi mia aboro i kom mia aboro. Apama cel onwoŋo tye me poko gin ame cil kede gin ame mom cil." 
Ezekiel43:1 Icennere dano-nono dok te kwanya oko i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, te tera naka iyi icika atitino ame tye i nyim dyekal ame yie nono ame tye i ŋet ot Obaŋa, naka i gedo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Ezekiel43:2 Nen ba, kwogo Obaŋa me Icrael te ya bino i tutuŋ kide, ŋur me bino mere onwoŋo calo pii ame amol atek. Kwogo mere rik te memenya meicel." 
Ezekiel43:3 Anyut ame onwoŋo onyutta-nono, onwoŋo rom aroma kede anyut ame rik aneno i kare ame en bino me bino baloboma me Jerucalem, dok onwoŋo daŋ rom aroma kede anyut ame aneno i ŋet kulo me Kebar. I kare ame aneno ate rette piny aryeba cuny." 
Ezekiel43:4 I kare ame kwogo a Rwot obino i ode, kun donyo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ kide." 
Ezekiel43:5 Cuny Rwot rik te tiŋa malo, te tera naka iyi dyekal i yie i nyim ot Obanga. Nen ba, atene no kwogo Obaŋa oromo yi ot Obaŋa oko." 
Ezekiel43:6 I kare ame dano-nono tye ocuŋ i laŋeta, awinyo ŋattoro tye akop keda, kun en dano-nono tye i ot Obaŋa." 
Ezekiel43:7 En dano-nono okobba ni, “Wot a dano we, man en kabedo ame kom me locca tye iye, kede kan ame kom me cibo tyene tye iye, kan ame abino bedo iye i akina jona Icrael nakanaka. Ka ce jo Icrael mom dok bino balo nyiŋa acil, gin onyo obakkigi, pi timgi me alaya, karacel kede i kom obakkigi ame oneko aneka." 
Ezekiel43:8 Ka ce obakkiwu mom ogero gweŋ me doggola me donyo i paccigi, kede yen me doggolagi, i ŋet en ame tye i ot me wora, ame te miyo apama keken en ame te poko akinawa. Gin obalo nyiŋa acil i timgi me kwer ame gin obedo timo, ame te miya jwerogi oko i kare ame akemo maka." 
Ezekiel43:9 Aman myero gin doŋ wek timgi me alaya-nono oko, dok daŋ okwany kom obakkigi ame oto oko i oda. Mannono bino miyo an abedo i akinagi nakanaka." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Doŋ yin wot a dano we, titti jo Icrael kop i kom oda, tittigi kite ame cal kede, kede yik ame tye pire, me lewic makgi pi balgi." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ka ce lewic omakogi pi ginnoro luŋ ame gin obedo timo, tittigi yik ame otye kede pi ot me wora, kite ame ogero kede, karacel kede cik ducu ame mako me wora. Coyigi kop ame itittigi-nono luŋ piny, ame mio gin oromo neno ked wangi kite ame oyiko kede, ote lubo cik ducu kakare." 
Ezekiel43:12 Man en cik ame mako ot me wora, rok luŋ ame tye i wi kidi ame ceggi i kan bino bedo acil meicel. Nen ba, man en cik amako ot me wora." 
Ezekiel43:13 “Man en kite ame bor kede lac a keno lam tye kede kun nwoŋo otio i gin ame opimo i ot me wora. I te keno lam piny, mano amana ni rit, tye iye gin me molo pii, ame laccere tye incec pyeraryo, borrere daŋ iŋcec pyeraryo kun i lake tye iye okot ame borrere tye iŋcece abicel." 
Ezekiel43:14 Borrere malo ya i tere piny tye futi adek, cakere i lake tuŋ atidi mere tuno kede i lake tuŋ adwoŋŋere, alaccere tye iŋcec pyeraryo i kom futi abiro." 
Ezekiel43:15 Wie malo kan ame owaŋo iye mot me yalo Obaŋa, tye daŋ futi abiro. Twoke aŋwen ducu tye malo ame kato kan ocele mege." 
Ezekiel43:16 Wi keno lammono i malo mere, twoke aŋwen ducu rorom kun twoke acel acel tye iŋcec pyeraryo." 
Ezekiel43:17 Dyere mere daŋ tye arorom, borrere tye futi pyeraryo wie adek, laccere daŋ amannono. Rwom ame oyito kede malo i wi keno lam tye tutuŋ kide.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 Rwot Obaŋa dok te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, magi en cik ame mako keno lam: Nino ame doŋ otyeko iye keno lam me waŋo mot awaŋa, kede me cocoro re mo me yalo Obaŋa iye," 
Ezekiel43:19 yin ibino miyo twon acalo mot me kwanyo bal, baŋ alamdog ame obedo dano me Levi, dok ame dano me doggola a Jadok, ame twero noko ŋeta me tic i nyima." 
Ezekiel43:20 Ibino kwanyo remo me twonnono aduno, ite totono i tuŋ keno lammono aŋwen ducu, kede i tuŋe aŋwen daŋ ducu, me dul enok lam i dyere. Mannono en kite ame ibino lonyo kede keno me lam me kwanyo bal i kome," 
Ezekiel43:21 Ibino daŋ kwanyo twon me kwanyo bal, eka ite cako waŋo i kabedo ame ciko pi tic ame dok i kom ot me wora, oko i ŋe kabedo acil." 
Ezekiel43:22 I nino me aryo mere, ibino miyo mot me nyok ame balloro mom i kome, acalo mot me kwanyo bal, eka ite lonyo kede keno lam ame rik olonyo kede i remo me twon." 
Ezekiel43:23 I kare ame doŋ ityeko tiyo tic me lonyo keno me lam, ibino doŋ cako yalo iye twon a mom i roccoro i kome, karacel kede nyok, romo ame okwanyo i akina rommi ame roccoro mom i komgi." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ibino miyo gin luŋ i nyim Rwot, alamdog te pwopworo kado i komgi, te doŋ waŋogi i keno me lam i nyim Rwot acalo mot awaŋa." 
Ezekiel43:25 Pi nino abiro ibino bedo miyo dyel acel acel i nino acel acel, acalo mot me kwanyo bal, kede dok twon, kede nyok romo, gin luŋ myero bed aboŋo roccoro i komgi." 
Ezekiel43:26 Gin bino tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom keno me lam pi nino abiro, eka keno me lam doŋ te lony bedo acil, ote doŋ kwero pi ticcoro." 
Ezekiel43:27 I kare ame doŋ nino abiro-ni otum, cakere i nino me aboro wot kede anyim, olamdog doŋ bino bedo waŋo mot awaŋa i wi keno lam, kede mot me kweyo cuny, an abino gamowu. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 En dok te tera naka i dogcel me kabedo acil, ame tye oko i tutuŋ kide. Dogcellono onwoŋo ocegere oko," 
Ezekiel44:2 En te kobba ni, “Dogcel man bino medde bedo ame ocegere oko kun mom oyabo, dok ŋattoro daŋ mom bino beo iye, pien Rwot ame obedo Obaŋa me Icrael onwoŋo obeo iye; mannono omio bino medde bedo ame ocegere acega." 
Ezekiel44:3 Aloc keken en ame twero bedo iye pi camo ogati i nyim Rwot. En bino donyo i dogcel kun beo iyi icika alac te daŋ donnyo oko kun beo i yo acellono.” 
Ezekiel44:4 Dano-nono te dok kwanya tera i nyim ot Obaŋa, kun beo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi. I kare ame otye kuno, aneno ot a Rwot, ate neno kwogo Obaŋa opoŋ apoŋa i yie, an ate rette oko piny aryeba cuny." 
Ezekiel44:5 Rwot te kobba ni, “Wot a dano we, keto cuny me neno ginnoro luŋ ame waŋi oneno kede me winyo ginnoro luŋ ame yiti owinyo, An akobbi cik kede icwil luŋ ame mako ot me wora, myero iniaŋ aber jo ame cik yeyigi me donyo i ot me wora, kede jo ame cik mom yeyigi me donyo i kabedo acil." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Kobbi jo Icrael ame maro jem-mi ni an Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael mom abino medde kanyo timgi mogo me kwer ame yam gin obedo timo. Gin yam obalo oda acil," 
Ezekiel44:7 pi miyo rok ame mom oliro komgi kede cunygi donyo iye, gin jo ame mom wora-nono odonyo i ot me wora i kare ame otye ayala i dwol kede remo ame obedo camma, yam obedo turo cikerena kun otimo tim me kwer." 
Ezekiel44:8 Gin yam mom obedo gwoko cik ame mako jamina acil, cite gin olunyo keto orok me loyo jami ame tye i oda acil." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Pi mannono an a Rwot Obaŋa, atititwu doŋ oko ni, mom tye arokkoro ame mom oliro kome kede cunye, i akina orok luŋ ame tye i akina jona Icrael ame bino donyo i kabedona acil." 
Ezekiel44:10 Jo Levi ame bino weka oko, ote gak i yo ocele, kun oworo cal jogi, i kare ame jo Icrael luŋ daŋ orwenyo, jo-nono bino kanyo can ame abino keto i komgi." 
Ezekiel44:11 Gin jo Levi en ame bino tiyo tic pira i kabedona acil, kun gin en ame loo dogcel luŋ me ot me wora, dok daŋ otio i ot me wora: Gin en ame bino ne ko leyi ame omio me mot awaŋa, karacel kede mot ocele ame omio pi lwak dok gin en ame bino bedo otic ame tio pi lwak." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ento gin en ame rik ocako tiyo tic pi jona me woro cal jogi, an doŋ atyeko kwoŋ pirgi ni gin obino kanyo can ame abino keto i komgi. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo." 
Ezekiel44:13 Gin mom obino noka ceggi me tic baŋa acalo olamdog dok daŋ mom obino noko gira moro acil, kede ginnoro ame cil meicel, cite gin obino yeyo lewicgi, pi timgi-mogo me kwer ame gin obedo timo." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kadi amannono an abino ketogi me loyo ot me wora, me tiyo tic ame tye iye, kede ginnoro luŋ ame myero oti iye." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Cite jo Levi ame gin obedo olamdog, ame gin obedo ikwae a Jadok, ame gin rik obedo gwoko kabedona acil i kare ame jo Icrael ogak oko, gin bino noka ote tic baŋa. Gin en ame bino tiyo tic pira, kun obino i nyima me bino yalla kede dwol kede remo." 
Ezekiel44:16 Gin bino bino i nyim mejana ote bino tic iye, kun daŋ otelo woro apapat ame owora kede ka jo obino wora." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ka gin odonyo i dogcel me dyekal ame tye i yie, gin bino ruko boŋo camanini; mom obino ruko rukkoro ame otio i yer romo i komgi, i kare ame gin tye ka tic i dogcelloro me dyekal ame tye i yei, kede i dyekal i kome." 
Ezekiel44:18 Obino daŋ ruko tok ame cil i yigi, kun daŋ oruko pale camanini i pyergi, Mom obino tweyo ginnoro ame mio kwok makogi kadi acel." 
Ezekiel44:19 Kare ame gin doŋ tye aya oko i dyekal ame tye i yie, me wot i dyekal i oko mere baŋ lwak, obino gonyo boŋŋi moro luŋ ame onwoŋo gin oruko i kare me tic, ote ketogi ducu iyi icika acil, gin doŋ ote ruko rukgi me kare ducu, naka mio lonyo lwak doko acil." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Alamdog mom bino lyelo yer wigi, dok mom obino weko yer wigi lot aboco. Gin obino ŋolo oko kare i kare me doŋ acegocego." 
Ezekiel44:21 Alamdoggoro mom bino mato koŋo olok i kare ame en awot i dyekal ame tye i yie. 
Ezekiel44:22 Alamdog mom bino nyomo dako ame cware oto, onyo dako ame cware oryemo, ento bino nyomo ka nyako ame mom ru oŋeye i lo moro, ame obedo nyako me Icrael, dok twero nyomo ka dako alamdog wadgi ame cware oto." 
Ezekiel44:23 Gin bino pwonyo jona i kom gin ame cil kede gin me kare ducu, dok daŋ bino nyuttigi kite me poko gin ame cik ogeŋo kede en ame mom cik ogeŋo." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ka ce pyemmoro tye, gin bino bedo acalo oŋolkop, gin bino ŋolo kop kun lubo kite ame an aŋolo kede. Gin obino gwoko cikka kede icwilla luŋ, kede ecuban luŋ ame an atyeko ciko pirgi. Dok daŋ obino gwoko nino me cabit bedo acil." 
Ezekiel44:25 Gin mom obino lille kengi pi wot i ŋet kom dano ame oto; cite pi adwoŋ onyo pi imat, pi wodi onyo pi nyari, pi ominni onyo pi aminni ame mom onyomo, mannono gin twero lille pirgi." 
Ezekiel44:26 I kare ame en doŋ otyeko lille, en bino kwano nino abiro pire kene, eka te doŋ bedo dano ame olony." 
Ezekiel44:27 I nino ame en bino wot iye i kabedo acil, i dyekal ame tye i yie, me wot tic i kabedo acil, en bino miyo mottere me kwanyo bal. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Gin mom obino bedo kede lobo moro me leyo me bedo acalo meggi, an en ame abedo acalo gin ame oleo, dok wun myero kur imigi wunu ginnoro me bedo acalo meggi iyi Icrael, an en ame doŋ abedo acalo gin ame gin oleo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Gin bino camo mot me moko kwon, mot me kwanyo bal, kede mot me walakino i roc; dok ginnoro luŋ ame otyeko jalo baŋ Rwot, bino bedo meggi." 
Ezekiel44:30 Kit cammoro luŋ me wi mwaka ame bino geyo cek, kede kit mottoro luŋ ame obino miyo i kom mot ame jo Icrael bino miyo, bino bedo me olamdog. Dok daŋ ibino miyo wunu baŋ olamdog ogati ame ogeo tedo, me wek gum obed i wudiwu." 
Ezekiel44:31 Alamdog mom bino camo winyo moro onyo lee moro ame oto kene, onyo ame lee moro ocele en ame oneko.”" 
Ezekiel45:1 “Ka ce itye wunu ka poko lobo baŋ atekere acel acel, myero iko dul lobo moro doŋ acil calo gin ame omio baŋ Rwot. Dul ame oweko-nono myero bed mairo apar i kom mairo aboro. Kan ame owekonono bino bedo lobo acil." 
Ezekiel45:2 I kan ame oweko-nono myero bed iye dul lobo moro ame tye acalo lobo me ot a Rwot, ame laccere kede aria mere myero bed futi mia aboro. Mano ŋete ducu myero wek iye kan ame laccere tye futi pyeraboro." 
Ezekiel45:3 I kom lobo ame okoo-nono, myero pim kannoro pok kene, ame borrere tye mairo apar i kom mairo aŋwen, ot me wora bino bedo kannono, kannono en ame obino gero iye kabedo acil ame kato ducu." 
Ezekiel45:4 Mannono en ame bino bedo kabedo acil i lobo ame otyeko poko pi olamdog ame tye i kabedo acil me wora, Udi me butogi bino bedo iye, karacel kede kabedo acil ame tye pi oda." 
Ezekiel45:5 Medo i kom mannono, myero daŋ dok bed dul lobo mogo ocele ame tye mairo apar i kom mairo aŋwen ame otyeko poko oko ocalo lobo a jo Levi ame tio tic ocele i ot me wora. Boma mogo bino bedo iye kuno me bedogi." 
Ezekiel45:6 “Dok daŋ myero wek dul lobo moro ame tye pi boma, borrere myero bed mairo apar i kom mairo aryo, Dul lobo-nono myero en ame lub dul lobo ame cil meicel, dok dul lobo-nono bino bedo me a jo Icrael luŋ." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Dok dullogo ocele daŋ myero pok kene pi aloc. Cakere i kom dul lobo acil kede boma, dul lobo-nono bino wot naka i nam tuŋ to kede naka i wan apokki ame tye tutuŋ kide. Cakere i tuŋ kide wot kede tutuŋ to, borrere bino bedo ame rom aroma i dul lobo ame opoko baŋ atekere moro me Icrael." 
Ezekiel45:8 Dul lobo man bino bedo me aloc ame loo jo Icrael, i lobo me Icrael, me wek en kur dok wun jo, ento wek dul lobo ocele odoŋŋere luŋ bed me atekere me Icrael." 
Ezekiel45:9 “Rwot Obaŋa dok okobo ni, ‘Wun oloc me Icrael, doŋ ibala wunu wok do! Wek wunu doŋ timwu me kolo kede me wuno jo. Tim wunu doŋ gin aber ame tye atira. Myero kur dok imedde ryemo wunu jona oko i lobogi.’ Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Ŋat acel acel i akinawu myero bed i mijan me pimo jami ame pimo jami kakare, kede gi-pimo jami ocele mege ame tye kakare." 
Ezekiel45:11 Gwata ame opimo i gin otwo, myero bed ame rom aroma i me pimo gin ame lio calo pii. Komere en ame bino bedo gi-pimo jami ame oporo i gin ocele ame opimo kede jami, pi mannono gin ame opimo i gin otwo myero bed rom i gin opimo i gin ame lio, ditogi myero bed arom aroma kede Komer." 
Ezekiel45:12 Kidi me pimo jamiwu bino bedo kit man: Gera pyeraryo rom aroma i cekel acel, cekel pyerabicel rom aroma i mina acel." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Man en kit mot me jami apapat ame ibino miyo wunu; ibino miyo wunu acel me pyerabicel me nano ame ikaa wunu," 
Ezekiel45:14 kede acel me pyerabicel me cayiri ame ikaa wunu, kede acel me mia acel me moo jeituni ame obio oya i kom nyig jeituni ame ocek i potoni." 
Ezekiel45:15 Ibino miyo romo acel i kom rommi mia ariyo ariyo, pi atekere luŋ Icrael. Man en mot me moko kwon ame ibino wunu kelo, mot awaŋa alutu kede mot me kweyo cuny, pi tiyo tic me kwanyo bal. Man kop ame an Rwot Obaŋa akobo." 
Ezekiel45:16 Jo luŋ me lobo me Icrael bino miyo mot man baŋ aloc ame tye iyi Icrael. 
Ezekiel45:17 Tic aloc obedo me miyo mot me leyi me awaŋa alutu, mot me moko kwon kede mot me amata i kare me ecuban, i kare me por adwe, i ceŋ me cabit ducu, kede i kare me ecuban adoŋo ducu ame ociko baŋ jo Icrael. En bino miyo mot me kwanyo bal, mot me moko kwon, mot me awaŋa alutu, kede mot me kweyo cuny, me tiyo tic me kwanyo bal i kom jo me Icrael." 
Ezekiel45:18 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, I nino me agege me dwe me agege, ibino kwanyo twonnoro ame tidi ame mom i roccoro i kome, ite lonyo kede kabedo acil." 
Ezekiel45:19 Alamdog bino kwanyo remo mogo i kom mot ame omio me kwanyo bal, te totono i yen me doggola me ot Obaŋa i twoke aŋwen me keno lam, kede iyen me dogcel ame donyo i dyekal ame tye i yie." 
Ezekiel45:20 Ibino timo kittono i nino me abiro me dwe noŋo, pi ŋattoro ame otimo bal a mom me akaka onyo ame otimo bal pi kwiya piny. Man bino miyo igwoko wunu ot a Rwot bedo acil abono bal." 
Ezekiel45:21 “I nino dwe apar wie aŋwen me dwe me agege, ibino cako wunu kwero ecuban me Kato. Jo luŋ bino camo kwon ame tobi mom iye pi nino abiro." 
Ezekiel45:22 I nino me agege ame ocako kwero iye ecubannono, alamdog adwoŋ bino yalo Obaŋa twon, acalo mot me kwanyo ballere en ikome kede me a lwak." 
Ezekiel45:23 I nino acel acel ame tye i nino abiro me kwero ecubannono, en bino yalo Rwot itino twoni abiro, itino rommi abiro, ame balloro mom i komgi, kun owaŋogi awaŋa alutu, dok daŋ bino yalo Rwot i nyok dyel acalo mot me kwanyo bal." 
Ezekiel45:24 Pi mot me atin twon acel acel kede nyok romo acel acel ame oyalo kede Rwot myero daŋ mottere me moko kwoŋ kede moo bed tye, moko kwoŋ ame romo gwata moko apar pi atin twon acel acel kede nyok romo acel acel, kede moo jeituni ame romo cupa apar." 
Ezekiel45:25 “I nino dwe apar wie abic me dwe me abiro, kede pi nino abiro ame nwoŋo akwero iye ecuban, aloc daŋ bino miyo mot me bal, mot awaŋa kede mot me moko kwon kede mot me moo ame rom aroma i maca ame omio pi kato.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, ‘Dogcel me dyekal ame tye i yie, ame tye tutuŋ kide, bino cegere acega pi nino abicel, ame en nino ame myero jo ti iye tic, ento i nino me cabit obino yabo bedo twolo, dok i kare me por a dwe daŋ obino yabo bedo twolo." 
Ezekiel46:2 Aloc bino donyo i dogcellono kun ya i dyekal i oko, beo i icika alac eka te wot cuŋ i ŋet yat me dogcel. Alamdog bino waŋo mot awaŋa mere kede mottere me kweyo cuny, eka en te ryebere i nyim Obaŋa i gweŋ ame ocano i dogcel. En doŋ bino donnyo oko, cite dogcel mom obino cego naka otyeno." 
Ezekiel46:3 Lwak bino woro Obaŋa i nyim doggola me donyo i dogcel i nyim Rwot i nino me cabit ducu, kede i kare me por a dwe." 
Ezekiel46:4 Mot awaŋa ame nwoŋo aloc omio baŋ Rwot i nino me cabit, bino bedo nyogi rommi abicel ame balloro mom i komgi kede nyok romo ame roccoro daŋ mom i kome." 
Ezekiel46:5 Mot me moko kwon ame omio karacel i nyok romo, bino bedo gwata moko apar, eka mot me moko kwon ame omio karacel i nyogi rommi, en bino miyo adwoŋ acalo en twero, kun mio daŋ i moo cupa apar pi moko kwon me gwata moko apar apar." 
Ezekiel46:6 I nino me por a dwe, en bino miyo atin twon ame balloro mom i kome, rommi abicel, kede nyok romo acel ame roccoro mom i komgi;" 
Ezekiel46:7 acalo mot me moko kwon, en bino miyo gwata apar, acel pi twon kede dok gwata apar pi nyok romo kede dok acalo etwero pi atin romo acel acel, kun daŋ mio moo cupa apar pi moko kwon me gwata apar apar." 
Ezekiel46:8 Aloc bino donyo i dogcel kun beo i icika alac ame tye iye; dok ka doŋ aya myero en dok be i yo acellono.’ 
Ezekiel46:9 “Ka lwak me lobo-nono tye ka bino i nyim Rwot pi kare me ecubannogo ame ociko pirgi, ŋat ame bino donyo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, me wot woro Obaŋa, bino kato oko kun beo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum; kede ŋat ame bino donyo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum, bino kato oko kun beo i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi. Mom tye ŋattoro ame bino dwogo cen i yo ame ewoto kede, dano acel acel bino wot atir anyim." 
Ezekiel46:10 Kare ame gin tye awot ka woro Obaŋa, aloc bino wot karacel kedgi, ka ce gin doŋ akato oko, en daŋ bino kato karacel kedgi." 
Ezekiel46:11 “I kare me ecuban ame ocikonono, kede i kare mogo ame ociko ni myero gwok, moko kwon ame oyalo i Rwot, atin twon bino bedo epa acel, kede en ame omio atin romo, bino bedo daŋ epa acel, aco moko kwon ame omio nyogi rommi, ŋat acel acel bino miyo kite ame en twero, kun mio kede moo daŋ cupa apar pi gwata moko apar apar." 
Ezekiel46:12 Ka ce aloc mito yalo Rwot kede mot ame cunye mito, akadi mot awaŋa, onyo mot me kweyo cuny acalo mot ame cunye okwanyo me yalo kede Rwot, obino yabbe doggola me yie ame tye tutuŋ kide; en bino yalo Rwot i mottere me awaŋa, onyo mot me kweyo cuny, kite ame en timo kede i nino me cabit. Ka doŋ en otyeko yalo Rwot, en bino donnyo oko ote cego dogcel oko." 
Ezekiel46:13 “En bino miyo atin romo me mwaka acel, ame roccoro mom i kome, acalo mot awaŋa me yalo Obaŋa nino i nino odiko. En bino timo mannono nino i nino kare ducu." 
Ezekiel46:14 Dok en bino miyo mot me moko kwon, karacel kede nino i nino, kun mio moko kwon me gwata acel i nucu, kede moo me cupa acel me jebo moko, acalo mot moko kwon me yalo Rwot. Man cik ame mako mot awaŋa ame omio kare i kare." 
Ezekiel46:15 Atin romo kede mot me moko kwon, kede moo, obino miyo kittono odiko kare ducu, acalo mot awaŋa ame owaŋo kare ducu." 
Ezekiel46:16 “Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, ‘Ka ce aloc mio mottoro me lobo mere baŋ wode moro i akina itino mere, lobo ame omio baŋ atinnono doŋ bino bedo mege ame en oleo.’" 
Ezekiel46:17 Aco ka aloc omio mot me lobo baŋ aticcere moro ame tye baŋe, lobo-nono pwod dok bino bedo mege ka ce mwaka me kuc doŋ otumo; lobo-nono pwod dok bino dok i ciŋ aloc, pien en kede itino mere keken ame bino tero lobo-nono atwal calo meggi." 
Ezekiel46:18 Aloc mom myero gam ginnoro ame obedo me a lwak. En myero mi lobo ame obedo mege en ikome baŋ itino mere, mannono bino miyo en mom wuno jona pi bedo gamo lobogi oko i baŋgi.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Dano-nono dok te kwanya kela i doggola me donyo i wudi atitino ametye i ŋet cel, ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum i ŋet dyekal ame tye iyie, kan ame tye iye wudi mogo acil ame tye pi olamdog. I kare ame otye kuno, en te nyutta kabedo moro ame tye tutuŋ to me icika atitino-nono, iyi agikki mere." 
Ezekiel46:20 En te kobba ni, “Man en kan ame olamdog bino tedo iye mot me walakino i roc, karacel kede mot me kwanyo bal, kede kan ame obino tedo iye, mot me moko okwon me wek ginnoro acil mom ter naka i dyekal ame tye oko, eka te lonyo lwak doko oko acil.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Dano-nono dok te kwanya kela i dyekal ame tye oko, eka te bedo wot keda i gul aŋwen ame tye i dyekaliaca luŋ," 
Ezekiel46:22 i gul aŋwennono luŋ, onwoŋo tye iye dyekaliogo atitino doki, ame bocogi futi pyerabicel aŋwen i kom futi pyerabic," 
Ezekiel46:23 Kabedo aŋwennono luŋ, onwoŋo ocecelo apama me gweŋ, kun kan ame okuto iye mac tye daŋ iye i ŋet apama." 
Ezekiel46:24 Dano-nono te kobba ni, “Magi obedo jokon kan ame jo ame tio i ot Obaŋa bino tedo iye mot ame lwak yalo kede Obaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Dano-nono dok te dwogo an cen naka i doggola me ot Obaŋa. Nen ba, ate neno pii kun tye amol kun donyo i piny ite doggola me ot Obaŋa mol dok tutuŋ kide, kun ame nyim ot Obaŋa oneno. Pii-nono onwoŋo tye amolo i tutuŋ anyarolum, dok beo i ŋet keno lam i tutuŋ anyarolum." 
Ezekiel47:2 Dano-nono te dok kwanya oko i kannono tera oko kun beo keda i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi, te tera naka i dogcel ame tye tutuŋ to. Ate nwoŋo pii tye akato oko kun beo i tutuŋ anyarolum." 
Ezekiel47:3 Dano-nono te medde i wot anyim kun dok tutuŋ kide ame omako lut me pimo piny i ciŋe. En te pimo pii ame amol yadi mia abic, te miya beo iyi pii-nono. Tut a pii-nono te tuno naka i um coŋa." 
Ezekiel47:4 En dok te pimo yadi mia abic ocele, pii doŋ, te mwonyo coŋa oko. Kare ame en dok opimo yadi mia abic ocele, pii dok te tuno naka i pyera malo." 
Ezekiel47:5 En dok te pimo yadi mia abic ocele, pii i kan ame en opimo-nono onwoŋo doŋ tut ame mom aromo beo iye. Pii iye onwoŋo doŋ tut meicel ame mom romo aŋola i tyen, ento mito doŋ kwaŋ akwaŋa." 
Ezekiel47:6 En te penya ni, “Wot a dano we, ineno man?” Dano-nono dok te dwoka cen i ŋet kulo," 
Ezekiel47:7 Kare ame atye adok cen, ate bedo neno yen apol meicel i ŋet kulo tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi." 
Ezekiel47:8 En te kobba ni, “Pii-ni mol woto tutuŋ kide, otuno naka i Jordan, te wot naka i Nam me kado, Kare ame otuno i Nam me kado, omio pii i nam me kado odoko amit," 
Ezekiel47:9 kun ame pii i kulo man tye ka mol, kit leyi luŋ ame bedo i pii kede rec bino bedo i iye adwoŋ meicel. Pii man mol woto kuno me wot miyo pii ame tye i Nam me kado bedo amit, dok ka tye ka mol mio kit jami luŋ bedo kwo." 
Ezekiel47:10 Ocik rec te cucuŋa i ŋet nam, ocik rec bino ciko bwogi cakere i Engedi tuno naka i Eneglaim, Kit rec apapat bino nwoŋere iye kite ame tye kede i Nam Adwoŋ." 
Ezekiel47:11 Cite pii ame tye i lake luŋ mom bino bedo amit Pii i kaginogo bino bedo me kado. 
Ezekiel47:12 I ŋet kulonono tuŋŋi kede tuŋŋi, yen apol meicel bino doŋo iye me acama. Potgi mom bino two dok nyiggi daŋ bino bedo tye kare luŋ, kun nyak dwe i dwe, pien pii ame gin omato ya i kabedo acil. Nyiggi bino bedo me acama kun potgi tye acalo me caŋo too.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Magi en waŋ apokki me lobo ame nyuto kite ame myero ipok kede lobo baŋ atekere apar wie aryo me Icrael, kun atekere a Lucepu ipokke mege ame kato me atekere ocele tyen aryo." 
Ezekiel47:14 Rik doŋ atyeko kwoŋ baŋ kwariwu me miyogi lobo man, doŋ lobo man ibino poko i akinawu arorom me bedo megwu." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Man en ame bino bedo waŋ lobo: I tutuŋ anyarodi, cakere i Nam Adwoŋ, i yo ame woto i Ketlon naka i dogcel me Kamat, tuno kede naka i Jedad," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berota, Cibraim, ame tye i waŋ apokki me Damaciko, kede Kamat, wot kede naka i Kajeratikon ame tye i waŋ apokki me Kauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Man mio waŋ apokki cakere i nam me Kajarenon ame tye tutuŋ kede Kamat anyarodi daŋ. Man en waŋ apokki me tutuŋ anyarodi. 
Ezekiel47:18 “Aco i tutuŋ to, waŋ lobo bino cakere i Kajaraenon ame tye i akina Kauran kede Damaciko, te beo i ŋet kulo Jordan i akina Gilead kede lobo me Icrael wot kede naka i nam ame tye tutuŋ kide, kato kede naka i Tamar. Man en waŋ apokki me tutuŋ kide." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Aco i tutuŋ anyarolum, waŋ lobo bino cakere i Tamar wot kede naka i pii me Meriba-kadec, te beo i ŋet luŋ me Miciri naka i Nam Adwoŋ. Man en waŋ apokki i tutuŋ anyarolum." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Aco i tutuŋ to, Nam Adwoŋ en ame bino bedo waŋ apoki naka i kan ame otikere kede Kamat. Man en ame bino bedo waŋ apokki me tutuŋ to." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Doŋ pi mannono, myero ipok lobo man i akinawu kite ame itekere me Icrael tye kede." 
Ezekiel47:22 Ibino poko lobowu wun ikomwu kede me a jo ocele ame bedo i akinawu ame onywalo itinogi i akinawu. Wun ibino terogi wunu acalo jo Icrael ikokome. Gin daŋ obino pokkigi lobo me bedo meggi i akina atekere me Icrael. 
Ezekiel47:23 Iyi akina atekere moro keken ame gin rok ocele-ni bino bedo iye, yin ibino pokkigi lobo me bedo meggi kuno. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel48:1 “Magi en nyiŋ atekere: Cakere i tutuŋ anyarodi, i waŋ lobo ame tye kuno, cakere i nam beo Ketlon naka i dogcel i Kamat, kato kede i Kajarenon, ame tye i waŋ apokki me Damaciko i tutuŋ anyarodi kede Kamat, ame ya i tutuŋ kide, dok kede tutuŋ to. Atekere acel obino pokke dul lobo mere acel, cakere i waŋ apokki ame tye i lobo me tutuŋ kide dok kede piny i waŋ apokki ame tye tutuŋ to, kun lubere kit man:" 
Ezekiel48:2 Dan bino tero dul lobo me agege, Acer te lube," 
Ezekiel48:3 Naputali te lubo Acer," 
Ezekiel48:4 Manaci te lubo Naputali. 
Ezekiel48:5 Epraim te lubo Manaci," 
Ezekiel48:6 Reuben te lubo Epraim. 
Ezekiel48:7 Eka Juda te lubo Reuben. 
Ezekiel48:8 “Lobo ame te lubo me atekere a Juda, cakere i tuŋ kide dok kede tuŋ to, bino bedo lobo ame ojalo pi Obaŋa. Lobo mere bino bedo arom aroma i en ame opoko baŋ atekere mere, ame laccere romo mairo apar, kede borrere daŋ romo aroma, mairo apar i kom mairo aboro. Ot me wora bino bedo i dyere me lobo-nono." 
Ezekiel48:9 Lobo ame ibino jalo baŋ Rwot, bino bedo mairo apar i kom mairo aboro." 
Ezekiel48:10 Man en ame bino bedo lobo acil i akina lobo ame opoko, olamdog en ame bino tero lobo acillono. Lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi kede anyarolum, borrere myero bed mairo apar, eka me tutuŋ kide kede tutuŋ to te bedo mairo aŋwen. Ot me woro Obaŋa myero ger i dye lobo man." 
Ezekiel48:11 Lobo acil-li bino bedo me olamdog, ame obedo ikwae a Jadok, gin obedo tic baŋa i gen meicel, kun mom onotte kede rokkogo me Icrael me timo gin arac, kite ame jo Levi mogo rik otimo." 
Ezekiel48:12 Man en ame bino bedo lobogi acil meicel ame opokkigi, ame olubo lobo ame jo Levi ocele bedo iye, loboni en ame bino bedo acil ame kato en ocele luŋ." 
Ezekiel48:13 Jo Levi myero mi ter lobo ame olubo me olamdog. Lobo ame amiyoginono borrere myero bed mairo apar, laccere mairo aŋwen," 
Ezekiel48:14 Gin mom bino cato lobo-nono onyo mom otwero loko dul lobo moro iye kede lobo ocele, akadi miyo baŋ ŋattoro, ocele, pien lobo man obedo lobo acil ame obedo me a Rwot." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Lobo ame odoŋŋere ame borrere tye mairo apar i kom mairo aryo, mom bino bedo lobo acil, lobo-nono bino bedo me tiyo kit jami ocele luŋ, ame dano moro keken twero timo iye. Jo twero bedo iye, dok daŋ otwero puro. Boma bino bedo i dye lobo-nono," 
Ezekiel48:16 lac a boma-nono kede borrere bino bedo yadi tutumia adek kede mia aryo i pyeraryo, tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi." 
Ezekiel48:17 Guro boma-nono dyere bino bedo iye lobo moro ame ginnoro mom iye, ame ya i lake tuŋ cel tuno kede i lake tuŋ ocele bino bedo yadi mia acel i pyerabic." 
Ezekiel48:18 Lobo ame odoŋŋere ame tye i ŋet lobo ame acil, borrere i tutuŋ kide bino bedo mairo aŋwen, kun me tutuŋ to daŋ mairo aŋwen. Cam ame bino ya i lobo-nono, bino bedo me a jo a tio i boma." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ŋattoro keken ame tio i boma, kadi bed en oya iyi atekere mene, iyi akina atekere me Icrael, danonono bino puro poto mere i dul lobo-ni." 
Ezekiel48:20 Lobo luŋ ame ibino jalo pi Rwot, borrere kede laccere luŋ bino bedo mairo apar apar, kun lobo ame boma tye iye, tye i yie kannono." 
Ezekiel48:21 “Lobo ame bino doŋŋere i ŋet lobo acil tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, kede lobo ame omio pi boma, bino bedo me aloc. Cakere i ŋet lobo acil, tuno kede i waŋ lobo ame tye tutuŋ kide, kede en ame tye tutuŋ to, kun cakere i lak kan ame mairo apar ogik iye, kannono luŋ bino bedo me aloc. Lobo acil karacel kede kabedo acil ame ot Obaŋa tye iye bino bedo i dyere," 
Ezekiel48:22 kede lobo ame tye iye jami me boma bino bedo i dye lobo ame obedo me aloc, atekere a jo Benjamin." 
Ezekiel48:23 “Aco atekere a jo Icrael ocele mege, cakere i tuŋ kide, wot kede tutuŋ to, lobogi bino lubere kit man: Me atekere a Benjamin en ame bino bedo me agege, kun gin otero dul lobo acel." 
Ezekiel48:24 Me atekere a Cimeon en ame te lubo me a Benjamin. 
Ezekiel48:25 Icakar en ame te lubo Cimeon. 
Ezekiel48:26 Me a Jabulon en ame te lubo Icakar. 
Ezekiel48:27 Me a Gad en ame te lubo me a Jabulon. 
Ezekiel48:28 I tutuŋ anyarolum i atekere ame apokki i jo Gad, waŋ lobo bino dok tutuŋ anyarolum kun cakere i Tamar tuno kede naka i kidi me Meriba-kadec, te dok tutuŋ anyarodi, kun beo i wan lobo me Miciri, naka i Nam Adwoŋ." 
Ezekiel48:29 Man en lobo ame bino popoko kin atekere me Icrael bedo meggi, magi en dul lobo apapat ame ibino pokkigi. Man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa okobo." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Man en kite ame dogcel me boma bino bedo kede cakere i tutuŋ anyarodi, ame kor apama mere myero bedo yadi tutumia adek kede mia aryo i pyeraryo," 
Ezekiel48:31 dogcel adek, ame dogcel acel acel ocako nyiŋ atekere me Icrael, dogcel a a Reuben, dogcel a Juda, kede dogcel a Levi," 
Ezekiel48:32 i tutuŋ kide ame apama cellere daŋ rom aroma i maca ocele-ca, nyiŋ dogcel tye iye kit man: Dogcel a Lucepu, Benjamin, kede Dan." 
Ezekiel48:33 I tutuŋ anyarolum, ame lac apama mere daŋ rom i en ocele-ca, tye iye dogcel cimeon, Icakar kede Jabulon.”" 
Ezekiel48:34 I tutuŋ to tye iye dogcel Acer, Gad kede Naputali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Bor apama luŋ, cakere i doggola tuŋ cel mano amana, naka i doggola tuŋ ocele, romo yadi tutumia apar wie aryo i mia aryo i pyeraboro. Nyiŋ boma-naca cakere kare-naca olwoŋo ni, “Rwot tye kan.”" 
Daniel1:1 I mwaka me adek me loc a Yekoyakim abaka me Juda, Nabukadnejar, abaka me Babulon obino me bino lweny i kom Jerucalem, eka te guro oko." 
Daniel1:2 Rwot te miyo en mako Yekoyakim abaka me Juda, te daŋ yako jami mogo ame otio kedgi i ot Obaŋa, En te tero jo ame emako wot keto i ot obaŋa mere, jami en te tero i ot kano lim me ot obaŋa mere." 
Daniel1:3 Abaka te ciko Acipenaj, ame obedo adwoŋ ame loo jo ame oroo oko ni myero kel jo mogo me Icrael, kel itino me ot abaka kede itino oloc ocele." 
Daniel1:4 Myero kel awobe ame komgi beco odoco aboŋo balloro, jo aryek i yore apapat luŋ, jo ame kwiri, dok ame tye i ŋec a rommigi tic i paco abaka. Acipenaj myero pwonygi kwano kede coyo leb jo Kaldaya." 
Daniel1:5 Abaka te ciko ni myero gin cam cem abeco kite ame en ecamo, kun gin camo kit cammono keken nino ducu, dok daŋ omat koŋo olok amittere ame en emato. Myero pwonygi pi mwakki adek, eka iyi agikki me mwaka me adek ote terogi i nyime." 
Daniel1:6 I akina jo-nono onwoŋo tye iye Danieri, Anania, Micael kede Ajaria, gin luŋ rik obedo jo me atekere a Juda," 
Daniel1:7 Adwoŋ ame loo jo ame oroo oko te cako nyiŋgi apat kit man: Danieri en te lwoŋo ni Beltecajar, Anania te lwoŋo ni Cadrak, Micael te lwoŋo ni Micaki eka Ajaria te lwoŋo ni Abednego." 
Daniel1:8 Cite Danieri te mo ko tammere me mom balle kene i camo cam abeco kun obedo me kwer tuŋ baŋe, onyo i mato koŋo olok ame abaka mato. Omio en te penyo adwoŋ ame loo jo ame oroo oko me ye tammere-nono, me kur eballe." 
Daniel1:9 Obaŋa te miyo adwoŋ ame loo jo ame oroo oko bedo kede kica i kom Danieri kun pwo tammere," 
Daniel1:10 cite en te kobbi Danieri ni, “Atye kede lworo i kom abaka, pien en ame oyero kit cam ame myero icam wunu kede koŋo ame myero imat wunu. I kare ame en oneno ni komwu mom yot calo kom awobe wadwu ame mwaka me ditogi rom aroma kede megwu, naka mio en abaka bino neka oko.”" 
Daniel1:11 Mannono te miyo Danieri wot baŋ agwok jami ame onwoŋo adwoŋ ame loo jo ame oroo oko oketo me loyo Danieri kede owote mere Anania, Micael, kede Ajaria," 
Daniel1:12 te kobbe ni, “Koŋ item omironi pi nino apar; miwa koŋ obed camo dek ape na keken kun omato ka pii." 
Daniel1:13 Eka koŋ ite neno komwa kun iporo kede kom awobe ame camo cem abeco ame rom aroma en abaka camo-ni I ŋe mannono yin doŋ itwero neno gin ame myero itim kede omironi.” 
Daniel1:14 En te winyo kwacgi i kop man, te temogi pi nino apar." 
Daniel1:15 I ŋe nino apar en oneno ni kom jo-ni onwoŋo nen amwonya dok daŋ ocwe ame okato awobe luŋ ame camo cem abeco ame abaka camo," 
Daniel1:16 Mannono te miyo agwokgi kwanyo cam abeco kede koŋo olok ame onwoŋo tye pirgi oko, te doŋ bedo miyogi camo dek apena keken." 
Daniel1:17 Obaŋa te miyo awobe aŋwen-ni bedo kede ŋec amala meicel, kun okwiri i kwan dok oryek atek meicel. Danieri onwoŋo ŋeo gonyo anyut apapat luŋ karacel kede lek ducu," 
Daniel1:18 I kare ame nino me agikki me kare ame rik abaka onwoŋo ociko ni tergi kede i nyime, adwoŋ ame loo jo ame oroo oko te terogi i nyim abaka Nebukadnejar." 
Daniel1:19 Abaka te kop kedgi, te nwoŋo ni i akinagi luŋ mom tye iye ŋattoro ame calli i Danieri, Anania, Micael, kede Ajaria, omio gin doŋ te bedo i nyim abaka." 
Daniel1:20 Doŋ i kom kopporo luŋ me ryeko kede me ŋecs ame abaka obedo pepenyogi iye, en onwoŋo ni gin otye aber iye meicel ame okato otyet kede okor tipo luŋ ame onwoŋo tye i te loccere." 
Daniel1:21 Danieri te medde bedo kuno tuno naka i mwaka me agege me loc abaka Kuro. 
Daniel2:1 I mwaka me aryo me loc abaka Nebukadnejar, abaka Nebukadnejar, oleko lek apapat; lekkono te miyo cunye jebere oko, nino daŋ te rwenyo oko i waŋe." 
Daniel2:2 Abaka te ciko ni myero lwoŋ otyet luŋ kede okor tipo karacel kede emuroko, dok myero lwoŋ daŋ jo Kaldaya me bi no gonyo lekkere. Gin te bino luŋ bino cuŋ i nyim abaka." 
Daniel2:3 Abaka te kobbigi ni, “Aleko lek ame aman omio cunya ojebere oko pi mito ni aniaŋ tere.”" 
Daniel2:4 Jo Kaldaya te kobbi abaka ni, “Ama abaka, komi gire bed ayot nakanaka! Koŋ itittiwa wan omironi lekki-nono, wan obino gonnyi tere oko.”" 
Daniel2:5 Abaka te gamo kop a jo Kaldaya ni, “Kop ame an akobo doŋ atyeko moko oko. Ka ce mom ibino miya wunu aŋeo lek ame alekonono, dok daŋ ite gonnya wunu tere, obino ŋiŋidowu atitino, udiwu daŋ ote rereto oko piny." 
Daniel2:6 Cite ka inyutta wunu lekkono ite daŋ gonnya wunu tere, ibino nwoŋo wunu mot kede bakacic i baŋa karacel kede kwogo adwoŋ meicel. Doŋ ba, myero inyutta wunu lek ame aleko dok daŋ igonnya wunu tere.”" 
Daniel2:7 Gin dok te gamo kop abaka tyen me aryo ni, “Tittiwa lekk i-nono, wan obino gonnyi tere oko.”" 
Daniel2:8 Abaka dok te gamo ni, “An aniaŋ ateni ni wun itye ka temo wunu medo kare ameda, pe iniaŋ wunu atira ni kop ame an akobo bedo kite ame akobo kede," 
Daniel2:9 Ka ce mom ibino miya wunu aŋeo lek ame aleko-nono, kop ame abino ŋolliwu tye ka acel keken aboŋo loko kadi acel. Wun onwoŋo iye wunu me bedo kobba wunu kop me goba keken kede koppogo ame medo ka bai keken ka kare olokere, Aman doŋ ba, myero ititta wunu lek ame aleko, mannono bino miyo aniaŋ ni itwero gonyo wunu lekkono.”" 
Daniel2:10 Jo Kaldaya te kobbi abaka ni, “Mom tye dano moro kadi acel i wi lobo luŋ ame twero cobo gin ame abaka amito; pien mom ru onen kadi acel abaka moro i akina twoni obakki atek ame yam koŋ openyo otyet, okor tipo onyo jo Kaldaya i kodi pennyono." 
Daniel2:11 Gin ame abaka openyo tek meicel ame mom tye dano moro ame twero nyutti abaka kono ka obaŋe ame mom bedo i akina dano.” 
Daniel2:12 Kop man omio akemo omako abaka, te doko ager meicel; omio te ciko ni myero nek oryeko luŋ me Babulon." 
Daniel2:13 Cik man doŋ ote cako rabo ni myero nek oryeko luŋ, ote bedo yenyo Danieri kede owote mere ni myero daŋ nekgi oko." 
Daniel2:14 Danieri te wot kop gin kede Ariok i ryeko meicel. Ariok onwoŋo obedo adwoŋ ame loo ocirikale ame gwoko abaka, ame onwoŋo owoto me wot neko oryeko me Babulon," 
Daniel2:15 En openyo Ariok ni, “Piŋo kara cik abaka gwa kit man?” Ariok te titti Danieri gin omio tye amannono." 
Daniel2:16 Danieri te wot i ot baŋ abaka, te kwayo ni abaka myero mie kare moro me wek egony lek abaka." 
Daniel2:17 Danieri te dok i paco mere, te wot miyo kop man neye baŋ owote mere Anania, Micael kede Ajaria," 
Daniel2:18 En te tittigi ni myero okwa Obaŋa me polo me tim kica yab imuŋŋono baŋgi me kur nekgi oko karacel oryeko luŋ me Babulon," 
Daniel2:19 Obaŋa te yabo imuŋ me lek abaka-nono oko baŋ Danieri dyewor i anyutta ame onyutte i waŋ lek. Danieri te cako pako Obaŋa me polo. 
Daniel2:20 Danieri okobo kit man: “Nyin Obaŋa myero pak nakanaka, pien ryeko kede twer tye baŋe." 
Daniel2:21 En ame loko caa kede kare, en a keto abaka, dok en a daŋ kwanyo abaka, en a mio ryeko baŋ jo aryek, en a daŋ ame mio ŋec baŋ jo aniaŋ." 
Daniel2:22 En nyuto gin opono odoco, dok nyuto imuŋŋoro ducu kannaler, en ŋeo ginnoro luŋ ame tye kannacol, lero bedo baŋe." 
Daniel2:23 An gira apwoi dok apaki, yin Obaŋa akwariwa pien yin imia ryeko kede teko, dok aman imia aŋeo gin ame okwai iye, pien yin imiowa oŋeo kop abaka.”" 
Daniel2:24 Mannono doŋ te miyo Danieri wot baŋ Ariok, ame dano ame onwoŋo abaka omio twer me neko oryeko luŋ me Babulon; en owoto te wot kobbe ni, “Kur inek oryeko me Babulon: tera i ot baŋ abaka, an abino gonnyi abaka lekkere.”" 
Daniel2:25 Ariok te ru tero Danieri i nyim abaka, te kobbi abaka ni, “Atyeko nwoŋo dano i akina opii ame oya i Juda, ame romo gonyo lekk i.”" 
Daniel2:26 Abaka te penyo Danieri ame nyiŋe ocele Belcajar ni, “Yin itwero miya aŋeo lek ame aleko dok daŋ itwero gonnya lekkono?”" 
Daniel2:27 Danieri te gamo kop abaka ni, “Mom tye oryeko moro, okor tipo, otyet onyo jo ame ryek i neno acer ame romo nyutti abaka kop me muŋ ame abaka openyo," 
Daniel2:28 cite Obaŋa moro tye i polo ame twero yabo imuŋ ducu, ame en doŋ otyeko miyo abaka Nebukadnejar oŋeo gin ame bino timere i kare me anyim. Doŋ lek ame ileko-nono kede anyut ame obino i wii i kare ame ibuto piny i wi tandani-nono ene:" 
Daniel2:29 I kare ame onwoŋo yin ibuto piny, ama abaka, tam apapat me gin ame bino timere i nyim te bino i wi, doŋ en ŋat ame yabo imuŋ kannaler te miyi ŋeyo gin ame bino timere." 
Daniel2:30 Aco an onyutta muŋ man me agony tere baŋ abaka, me abaka ne tam ame tye i cunye, cite mom pi nyuto ni an aryek akato jo luŋ." 
Daniel2:31 “Nen ba, Abaka, yin ineno twon calloro adwoŋ meicel. Callono onwoŋo dwoŋ atek dok ryeny atek meicel ame nennere kelo lworo i kom dano, callono obino te bi no cuŋ i nyimi." 
Daniel2:32 Callono otio wie i jabu ame olio acil, kore kede bade ote tiyo i jabu, eka amuru mere te bedo mola." 
Daniel2:33 Tyene te bedo me nyonyo, eka par tyene te rubere aruba ryoryo kede lobo." 
Daniel2:34 I kare ame onwoŋo i tye ka neno, gweŋŋoro te bare ŋide oko kun mom dano en ame oŋido, te rette i par tyen cal-ca tuŋ ame otio i nyonyo kede lobo, te ŋiŋido oko atitino." 
Daniel2:35 Mannono te miyo nyonyo, lobo mola, ryal, kede jabu ŋiŋiida oko atitino, te doko calo cuŋ kai i laro i kare me oro; yamo te bi no kologi oko teŋe ame mom dok otwero yenyogi ote nwoŋogi. Cite gweŋ ame onwoŋo orette i kom callono te doko twon kidi moro adwoŋ meicel ame oromo wi lobo luŋ." 
Daniel2:36 “Man en lek ame onwoŋo yin ileko. Aman doŋ myero agonnyi tere. 
Daniel2:37 Adwoŋ abaka, yin en ame ibedo abaka adwoŋ ame loo obakki ocele luŋ. Obaŋa me polo otyeko keti me bedo aloc adwoŋ dok en omii teko, twer, kede kwogo." 
Daniel2:38 En oketi me loyo jami luŋ ame bedo i lobo, me loyo dano, leyi kede winy. Yin ibedo wic ame otio i jabu." 
Daniel2:39 Icennere i ne locci, loccoro a mom rom i megi bino lubo megi ame abaka mere bino loyo lobo ducu, i ne mannono, loc me adekkere dok te cakere ame obedo me mola, ame bino loyo lobo ducu." 
Daniel2:40 Loc me aŋwennere dok bino cakere ame tek calo nyonyo, pien nyonyo tek meicel ame romo turo jami ducu, dok ŋiŋiido oko atitino; loccono bino jwero loc ocele luŋ ame ogeo bedo tye kite ame nyonyo tuturo kede jami." 
Daniel2:41 Doŋ kite acalo ineno kede par tyen cal-ca orubere aruba, nyonyo kede lobo, mannono cimo ni loccono bino pokere yie aryo. Cite teko mogo ame mio cuŋ atek acalo nyonyo bino bedo tye iye." 
Daniel2:42 Dok kite acalo lwet tyen caka onwoŋo tuŋcel nyonyo tuŋcel lobo, mannono cimo ni loccono bino bedo atek i kabedo mogo eka i kabedo ocele te bedo agoro meicel ame romo tur oko i kare moro keken." 
Daniel2:43 Kite acalo ineno kede, nyonyo orubere kede lobo ame obedo coto, jo i loccono bino rubere kun onyomere i akinagi kengi kengi, cite bedo karacel bino loyogi oko kite ame nyonyo mom twero notte karacel i coto." 
Daniel2:44 Dok i kare obakki-nono, Obaŋa me polo bi no keto loc ocele ame mom twero tur dok loccere daŋ mom obino weko i ciŋ ŋattoro ocele, Loc anyennono bino turo loc ocele mege kun ŋiŋiido atitino, eka te miyo locgi gik oko, en doŋ te cuŋ atwal," 
Daniel2:45 kite ame onwoŋo ineno ni gweŋŋoro omukere i kom kidi kun mom dano moro en omuko, eka te rette i kom nyonyo ŋiŋiido oko atitino, karacel kede mola, lobo, ryal kede jabu-gu. Twon Obaŋa moro adwoŋ meicel oyabbi abaka gin ame bino timere i kare a tye i nyim. Lek ame ileko tye ateni dok te koppere daŋ tye atira.”" 
Daniel2:46 Abaka Nebukadnejar te ru ya ryebere piny woro Danieri, te dok ciko ni myero kel mot me yale, kede odok a ŋwece kur." 
Daniel2:47 Abaka te kobbi Danieri ni, “Ateteni, Obaŋani obedo Obaŋa ame loo obaŋe ocele luŋ, dok Rwot ame loo obakki luŋ, en ayab muŋ ducu kannaler, pien en omio yin inyuto imuŋ man.”" 
Daniel2:48 Abaka te miyo Danieri woro mogo amalo meicel kede twoni mottogo adoŋo doŋo, te miyo en bedo aloc ame loo lobo me Babulon luŋ, kede adwoŋ ame loo oryeko luŋ me Babulon." 
Daniel2:49 Danieri te kwayo abaka, omio en te keto Cadrak, Micaki, kede Abednego, me bedo odoŋe ame loo lwak, kun oneno ginnoro luŋ ame otimere i lobo me Babulon. Cite Danieri te medde bedo i paco abaka." 
Daniel3:1 Abaka Nebukadnajer otio cal obaŋa moro me jabu, ame borrere onwoŋo tye futi pyeraboŋwen kede laccere futi aboŋwen. En te cibo callono cuŋ i bar me Dura, i lobo Babulon," 
Daniel3:2 Abaka te cwayo kop me lwoŋo odoŋe apapat, odoŋe ame loo lwak, odoŋe ame loo lobo apapat, omi-tam, ogwok lim, oŋolkop, adoŋo kede atino, kede jo adoŋo mogo me dul lobo apapat, me gin bin kwer ecuban me tiyo cal obaŋa abaka Nebukadnejar ame en omio otio-nono." 
Daniel3:3 Eka oloc adoŋo, odoŋe ame loo lwak, oloc me dul lono apapat, omi-tam, ogwok lim, oŋolkop, adoŋo kede atino, kede odoŋe ocele luŋ me dul lobo apapat te cokere karacel me bino kwero ecuban me cal obaŋa ame abaka Nebukadnejar otio te cibo cuŋ i bar me Dura. Gin luŋ ote bino cuŋ i nyim cal obaŋa ame abaka otio-nono." 
Daniel3:4 Gin te cako rabo koppere kun oredo i dwon aloŋo ni, “Wun rok apapat luŋ, lwak ame kobo leb apapat," 
Daniel3:5 ocikowu ni ka iwinyo wunu okuto bilo kede nyamulere, kun daŋ ogoo naŋa opuk, kede en ocele mege ame owero kede, wun myero iryebre wunu piny iwor wunu cal obaŋa ame otio i jabu ame abaka Nebukadnejar otyeko cibo cuŋ-ni;" 
Daniel3:6 ŋat a mom bino ryebere piny me woro cal obaŋa, obino ru bolo oko i mac alyel ager meicel.”" 
Daniel3:7 Mannono omio i kare ame jo owinyo bilo kede nyamulere okok, kun ogoo naŋa opuk kede kit tum ocele me wer, jo luŋ me rok apapat kede atekere apapat, ame kobo leb apapat, oryebere piny luŋ te woro cal obaŋa ame otio i jabu ame abaka Nebukadnejar ocibo ocuŋ i bar me Dura." 
Daniel3:8 I kare-nono jo Kaldaya mogo ame onwoŋo tye kede tam arac i kom Ojudaya te bino doto Ojudaya mogo. 
Daniel3:9 Gin okobo baŋ Nebukadnejar ni, “Ama abaka, komi gire myero bed ayot nakanaka!" 
Daniel3:10 Yin abaka onwoŋo imio cik ni ŋat acel acel ame owinyo bilo kede nyamulere okok, kun daŋ otye ka goyo naŋa opuk kede kit tum ducu me wer, myero ryebere piny wor cal obaŋa ame otio i jabu;" 
Daniel3:11 kun daŋ imedo ni ŋat a mom bino ryebere piny me woro cal obaŋa-nono obino bolo oko i twon mac ame alyel ager meicel. 
Daniel3:12 Doŋ ba adwoŋ, tye Ojudaya mogo ame yin iketo me loyo ginnoro luŋ ame timere i lobo me Babulon; Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego. Adwoŋ, jo man mom gire winyo koppi kadi acel; gin mom otimo ginnoro pi obaŋani apapat eme iworo kadi acel; woro cal obaŋani me jabu ame yin icibo i bar me Dura.”" 
Daniel3:13 Akemo te mako Nebukadnejar atek meicel, te ciko i gero ni myero kel Cadrak, Micak i, kede Abednego i nyime. Ote daŋ kelo jo man i nyim abaka." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadnejar te kobbigi ni, “Man kop ateni ni wun mom it ye ka tic wunu pi obaŋe ame an aworo, dok daŋ ikwero wunu woro cal obaŋa ama acibo ocuŋ i Dura?" 
Daniel3:15 Aman doŋ ka ityeko yikere wunu, me iryebere wunu piny woro wunu cal obaŋana ame atio, doŋ ber, ka iwinyo wunu okuto bilo kede nyamulere, kun daŋ agoyo naŋa opuk kede kit tum ducu me wer, cite ka mom iworo wunu, obino ru bolowu oko i twon mac a lyel ager. Kur itam wunu ni tye obaŋa moro ame dok romo larowu i ciŋa.”" 
Daniel3:16 Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego te gamo kop abaka ni, “Adwoŋ Nebukadnejar, wan mom oyikere me kobbi ginnoro ame dok i kop man," 
Daniel3:17 Ka ce tye amannono, Obaŋa ame wan oworo bi no larowa i twon mac a lyel ager, dok en bino larowa i ciŋi, yin abaka." 
Daniel3:18 Cite ka mom amannono, myero omi iŋe ni wan giwa mom obino woro obaŋeni akadi cal obaŋa me jabu ame yin icibo ocuŋ i Dura.”" 
Daniel3:19 Akemo te miyo Nebukadnejar doko doŋ ager meicel, ame waŋe doŋ onen arac okato kare i kom Cadrak, Micaki, kede Abednego. En te ciko ni myero mok mac kur atek ame kato me nino ducu tyen abiro twal." 
Daniel3:20 En te ciko twoni jo mogo ame komgi tek meicel me monnyere me tweyo Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego ote bologi i twon mac a lyel ager." 
Daniel3:21 Rik ote tweyo jo man oko, kun otye i rukgi luŋ i komgi, cati, kanyi, tok kede boŋŋi ocele mege ducu, ote bologi i twon mac alyel ager." 
Daniel3:22 Pien cik abaka onwoŋo olido odoco, dok mac daŋ onwoŋo lyet atek, omio leb mac alyel obukkoro, kom jo otero Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego," 
Daniel3:23 Jo-ni adek-ki Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego, obologi i cuny mac ame alyel ager meicel." 
Daniel3:24 Abaka Nebukadnejar icennere te wuro atek meicel, omio te ru ya oko malo, Eka te penyo jo ame mie tam ni, “Mom onwoŋo obolo jo adek ca i mac ame otweogi oko?” Gin te gamo peny abaka ni, “Mannono kakare, adwoŋ.”" 
Daniel3:25 Abaka te gamo ni, “An atye ka neno jo aŋwen ame mom otweo tye ka lat i dye mac, kun daŋ mom owane kadi acel; dano me aŋwennere tye ka nen acalo wot obaŋa moro.”" 
Daniel3:26 Nebukadnejar te wot i doggola me kan a mac tye iye, te lwoŋo ni, “Cadrak, Micak i, kede Abednego, omiro Obaŋa Amalo Meicel, kato wunu”, me ibin wunu kan." 
Daniel3:27 Eka oloc adoŋo mege, odoŋe ame loo lwak kede oloc me dul lobo apapat karacel kede jo ame mio abaka tam te cokere karacel, gin te neno ni mac gire mom owaŋo jo-nono; naka yer wigi mac mom oreo moro kadi acel, ruk i komgi daŋ mac mom ogudo, dok ŋwec mac daŋ mom ŋweye i komgi." 
Daniel3:28 Mannono omio Nebukadnejar okobo ni, “Myero pwo Obaŋa a Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego ame ocwao omalaika mere te laro omiro mere ame gene, ame te miyo cik abaka to nono, omio gin ojalo komgi i to akaka woro obaŋa moro ocele a mom Obaŋagi.”" 
Daniel3:29 Man omio an aketo cik aman ni, “Rokkoro, atekere onyo ŋattoro keken ame kobo kop arac i kom Obaŋa a Cadrak, Micaki kede Abednego, obino ŋiŋiido atitino, udigi daŋ obino rereto oko piny, pien mom gire tye obaŋa moro ocele ame twero laro dano i yore acalo man.”" 
Daniel3:30 Abaka te medo rwom a Cadrak. Micaki, kede me Abednego i lobo me Babulon." 
Daniel4:1 An Abaka Nebukadnejar, acoo waraga man baŋwu, wun lwak me rok ducu, atekere apapat ame kobo leb apapat i wi lobo, kuc myero medde ameda baŋwu!" 
Daniel4:2 Obedo ber an me nyuto baŋwu anyuttogo kede tano mogo ame Obaŋa Amalo Meicel otyeko timo i koma. 
Daniel4:3 Anyuttoro luŋ ame en nyuto doŋodoŋo nadi, taŋo ame en tio, teko mere dwoŋŋadi! Loccere obedo loc ame perakino waŋ i waŋ, loccere tye pi lwagi jo me kare luŋ." 
Daniel4:4 An abaka Nebukadnejar onwoŋo at ye abedo mot i oda, kun lim daŋ tye ka bino i ciŋa i pacona." 
Daniel4:5 Ate leko lek ame te miya lworo meicel; dok anyuttogo obino i wia ame te miyo wia balle oko. 
Daniel4:6 Omio aciko ni myero kel oryeko luŋ me Babulon i nyima me gin gonnya lek ame aleko-nono. 
Daniel4:7 Mannono te miyo otyet, okor tipo, kede jo Kaldaya kede jo ame tye i ŋec i kom neno acer te bino baŋa; an ate tittigi lek ame alekonono cite gonyo tere te loyogi oko," 
Daniel4:8 Icennere Danieri te bi no cuŋ i nyima, en dano ame nyiŋe ocele olwono ni Belcajar, ame nyiŋe nono rom aroma i nyiŋ obaŋana; en obedo dano ame cuny Obaŋa Acil tye i cunye. An ate titte lekka-nono kun akobo ni," 
Daniel4:9 Ama adwoŋ Belcajar, adwoŋ ame loo otyet luŋ, pien doŋ atyeko ŋeyo ni cuny Obaŋa Acil bedo iyi dok daŋ ni mom tye i muŋŋoro ame tekki, doŋ lek ame aleko ene, tim ber igonya tere." 
Daniel4:10 Anyuttogo ame obino i wia i kare ame abuto piny ene: Nen ba, aneno yattoro ame tye i dye lobo; yattono bor atek meicel." 
Daniel4:11 Yattono odoŋo te doko atek meicel, wie te tuno naka i polo twal, dok onwoŋo nen naka i agikki piny i kabedo ducu," 
Daniel4:12 Pote luŋ onwoŋo nen amwonya meicel dok nyige onwoŋo onyak apol meicel, onwoŋo obedo yat ame ginnoro luŋ akwo camo. Leyi me tim we i te tipo mere, dok winy ame twarre malo bedo i jaŋe luŋ, dok ginnoro luŋ akwo nwoŋo camgi iye." 
Daniel4:13 “Nen ba, i kare ame abuto i wi tandana anyuttoro obino i wia, aneno akur co pinnyoro ame obedo ŋat acil, kun bino piny ame oya i polo." 
Daniel4:14 Akurpinnyoro oredo i dwon aloŋo kun kobo ni. Toŋ yattono iret piny ite lwero jaŋe oko luŋ, me leyi ŋwec oko i tere kede winy daŋ twarre oko i jaŋe." 
Daniel4:15 Cite myero iwek ajuttere kede lwite ame odoŋ i lobo doŋ, eka ite tweyo oko abati abati me nyonyo kede me mola, me bed i dye lum alyabu i tim. Mi toyo ame ya i polo dyak i kome, dok wek obedo i akina leyi ame bedo i lum i lobo." 
Daniel4:16 Mi tammere lokere oko i tam a dano, me tam a lee en ame luny miye; en bed kittono pi mwakki abiro." 
Daniel4:17 Okur-piny en omoko cik man, kun olubo gin ame jo acil omoko, me wek i agikki mere gin ame tye kede kwo luŋ ŋe ni ŋat Amalo Meicel en ame loo loc a dano, dok tye kede twer me miyo baŋ ŋat ame yie omito, kun keto kadi ŋat ame rwommere piny rom mene me loyo lwak." 
Daniel4:18 Lek man en lek ame an abaka Nebukadnejar aneno. Doŋ ba, yin adwoŋ Belcajar, myero itucca lekkono, pien oryeko luŋ ame tye i te locca mom romo gonyo lekkono, cite yin gire itwero gonyo, pien cuny Obaŋa Acil tye iyii.”" 
Daniel4:19 Danieri ame nyiŋe ocele Belcajar te koŋ dok bedo kede podo meicel i cuny pi kare moro anonok, tipo kome te ya meicel pi tam ame en obedo tamo. Abaka te kobbe ni, “Belcajar, kur imi lek man onyo gonyo tere po tipo komi.” Belcajar te gamo ni, “Adwoŋ, myero lekki-nono obed pi jo ame dagi, te koppere obed pi okworri!" 
Daniel4:20 Yat ame onwoŋo ineno ame odotjo odoko atek kun wie ogudo polo, dok onwoŋo nen iyi agikki piny i kabedo ducu;" 
Daniel4:21 pote luŋ onwoŋo nen amwonya dok nyige onyak apol meicel, dok onwoŋo obedo yat ame ginnoro akwo luŋ camo; leyi me tim onwoŋo we i tipo mere." 
Daniel4:22 Yin en idoŋo idoko atekkono adwoŋ, abaka. Dwoŋŋi doŋ odoŋo otuno naka i polo, locci daŋ doŋ onya otuno naka i agikki piny." 
Daniel4:23 Abaka oneno akur-piny ame obedo ŋat acil kun bi no ame oya i polo ame aredo ni, ‘Toŋ yattono iret oko piny ite daŋ lwelwero oko, cite myero iwek ajuttere kede lwite doŋ piny i lobo, kun itweo oko abati abati me nyonyo kede me mola, me wek bed i dye lum alyabu i tim, Dok myero iwek toyo ame ya i polo dyak kome, kun en bedo i akina leyi ame bedo i tim, en myero bed kittono pi mwakki abiro.’" 
Daniel4:24 “Adwoŋ lek ame ileko-nono tye kit man: Mannono obedo cik a ŋat Amalo Meicel ame obino i kom adwoŋŋa, abaka," 
Daniel4:25 ni yin obino ryemi oko i akina dano, ibino bedo karacel kede leyi i tim; ibino camo lum calo twon, dok toyo ame ton i polo bino dyako komi, ibino ri kuno mwakki abiro, tuno ka iŋeo ni Ŋat Amalo Meicel en ame loo loc a dano, dok en tye kede twer me miyo loc i ciŋ ŋat ame yie omito." 
Daniel4:26 Doŋ kite acalo onwoŋo ociko ni myero wek ajut yat kede lwite, locci gire bino kuri ote dwoko i ciŋi cakere i kare ame yin doŋ iŋeo ni loc kara ya i polo." 
Daniel4:27 Doŋ ba adwoŋŋa, abaka, myero iye tam ame ami-ni; ŋut oko i kom bal ame ibedo timo, ite cako bedo i kwo me kite atira, kun iweko timo bal, dok daŋ kica myero maki i kom jo ame owuno, atot ya kare me locci medde, kun itye kede kuc kede weo ame oromo.”" 
Daniel4:28 Kop magi luŋ otimere i kom abaka Nebukadnejar. 
Daniel4:29 Iyi agikki me dwe me apar wie aryo, i kare ame en onwoŋo tye ka lat i wi ot me paco mere i Babulon," 
Daniel4:30 en abaka te kobo ni, “Koŋ inen ba kite ame boma me Babulon dwoŋ kede! Mom man an agero me bed boma me cimo kwogona, tekona kede twer ame an at ye kede?”" 
Daniel4:31 Ame abaka onwoŋo pwod tye akobo kop man, dwonnoro te katto i poto, ame kobo ni, “Abaka Nebukadnejar we, kop man otye akobbi ni locci doŋ okwanyo oko i ciŋi," 
Daniel4:32 obino ryemi oko i akina dano, ibino cako nywako kabedo kede leyi me tim yin ibino camo lum calo twon, mannono bino timere i komi pi mwakki abiro, tuno ka doŋ ityeko ŋeyo ni Ŋat Amalo Meicel loo loc a dano, dok en twero miyo loc baŋ ŋat ame emito.”" 
Daniel4:33 Oyot koppono te ru cobere oko i kom abaka Nebukadnejar. Rik ote ryeme oko i akina dano, te cako camo lum calo twon, toyo aya i polo te dyako kome oko, te miyo yer wie lot aboco calo yer kom cur, kun lwete doŋ calo lwet winy." 
Daniel4:34 I kare ame kare-nono doŋ otum, an Nebukadnejar, atino waŋa malo i polo, tipo koma doŋ te cako dwogo i koma, ate cako pwoyo Ŋat Amalo Meicel, kun apake dok amie kwogo, en ŋat ame bedo kwo nakanaka; pien loccere obedo loc ame perakino i waŋ, loccere tye pi lwagi jo me kare luŋ." 
Daniel4:35 Jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo mom gire ginnoro kadi acel; en timo gin ame cunye mito i kom lwak mony a tye i polo, karacel kede i akina jo ame bedo i lobo; mom tye ŋattoro ame twero mako ciŋe, onyo ame twero penye ni, “Itimo kara ŋo?”" 
Daniel4:36 I kare ame tipo koma odwogo iye i koma-nono ikokome, kwogo me locca kede woro, kede twerra ote daŋ dwogo oko baŋa. Jo ame mia tam kede jo ame owoto oyenya, ote dwoka dok i locca, rik dok ote medda twon dit ocele ame rik mom at ye kede con." 
Daniel4:37 Aman doŋ an Nebukadnejar, apako, adworo dok aketo kwogo i kom abaka me polo; pien ticcoro luŋ ame en tio tye atira dok yo mere tye atira. Jo ame wakere, en kwanyogi oko i ditogi te dwokogi piny." 
Daniel5:1 I kare ame Belcajar, abaka, otedo twon arama moro adwoŋ meicel pi jo adoŋo ame oworo ame welgi romo tutumia acel, en omato koŋo olok i nyimgi." 
Daniel5:2 I kare ame Belcajar obilo koŋo olok, en ociko ni myero kel ikopo luŋ ame otio i jabu kede ryal ame pappere Nebukadnejar rik okwanyo i ot Obaŋa i Jerucalem, me wek en abaka, jo adoŋo me awora, monne, mon aŋeca mat i koŋo." 
Daniel5:3 Eka ote ke lo i kopo luŋ ame otio i jabu kede ryal ame rik onwoŋo okwanyo i ot Obaŋa i Jerucalem; eka abaka, wele me awora, monne kede mon aŋeca te mato i koŋo." 
Daniel5:4 Gin omato kono olok ote cako pako obaije ame otio i jabu, ryal, mola, nyonyo, yen kede me kiddi." 
Daniel5:5 Oyotoyot anyira ciŋ dano moro te nen, te cako coc i kor apa ma ame tye i paco abaka, ame otikere i gi-cibo tara; abaka oneno ciŋ dano-nono i kare ame tye ka coc i kor apama." 
Daniel5:6 I caa-nono waŋ abaka te lokere oko, tam te miyo tipo kome ya, lworo omake te miyo coŋe cako myemyela atata." 
Daniel5:7 Abaka te woto koko i dwon aloŋo ni myero ru lwoŋo okor tipo, jo Kaldaya, kede oryeko i neno acer, me obin oniaŋe gin omio can opoto i kome. Abaka te kobbi oryeko me Babulon ni, “Ŋat ame bino kwano coc man eka te gonyo tere, obino miyo ruko boŋo obedo amaramar, kun daŋ ruko nyor me jabu i ŋute, en te bedo aloc me adek i loccani.”" 
Daniel5:8 Oryeko abaka luŋ te bino cite kwano coc kede gonyo tere te loyogi oko. 
Daniel5:9 Cuny abaka Belcajar te poto meicel, kome daŋ te cako balle oko, jo adoŋo ame oworo te wuro meicel." 
Daniel5:10 Kare ame agoŋ abaka owinyo kop abaka kede jo mere adoŋo ame oworo, en odonyo i ot kan ame otye acamo iye arama; en te kobo ni, “Kom abaka gire myero bed ayot nakanaka, Kur imi tam bed yelo wi i, kun wani balle k ittono." 
Daniel5:11 Pien i te loccini tye iye dano ame cuny obaŋe acil meicel bedo i yie. I kare ame pappi rik tye i loc, en rik onen oko kannaler acalo dano aryek ame niaŋ kede ryeko tye baŋe, kun ryeko mere rom aroma i ryeko ame obaŋe bedo kede. Abaka Nebukadnejar, ame obedo pappi rik omio en obedo adwoŋ ame loo otyet, ok or tipo, jo Kaldaya karacel kede oryeko ame ŋeo neno acer," 
Daniel5:12 pien en rik oneno ni en obedo dano ame tye kede cuny amala meicel, ŋec kede niaŋ atut me gonyo lek, tuco pennyogo me ryeko kede tyeko peko apapat, ame en dano-nono nyiŋe Danieri ame abaka rik ocake nyiŋe ocele ni Belcajar. Aman myero lwoŋ Danieri me en gonnyi.”" 
Daniel5:13 Rik ote daŋ ru kelo Danieri inyim abaka, abaka te kobbi Danieri ni, “Yin ibedo Danieri ame okobo-ni, ŋat acel i akina opii ame rik pappa okelo i Juda?" 
Daniel5:14 An atyeko winyo kop i komi ni cuny Obaŋa acil tye iyii, dok ni lero kede ŋec atut kede ryeko amalo meicel, yin itye kede," 
Daniel5:15 Aman onwoŋo okelo oryeko, kede okor tipo, baŋa kan ni obin okwan coc ame tye i kor-apama ca ote gonnya tere, cite gonyo gire oloogi oko," 
Daniel5:16 Cite an atyeko winyo ni yin itwero gonyo lek kede tyeko kit peko apapat. Doŋ aman ba, ka ce itwero kwano coc-cu ite gonnya tere, obino miyi iruko boŋo obedo amaramar, ite ruko nyor me jabu i ŋuti, yin ite ruko nyor me jabu, yin ite bedo aloc me adek i te locca-ni.”" 
Daniel5:17 Danieri te gamo kop abaka ni, “Gwok giri motti piri dok gin ame onwoŋo imito miya pi ticca myero imi baŋ ŋat ocele, kadi mom agamo ginnoro ame imia, an gira abino kwano coc-cu dok abino gonyo tere." 
Daniel5:18 Adwoŋ abaka, Obaŋa Amalo Meicel omio pappi Nebukadnejar obedo abaka ame loo lobo, omie daŋ dit kede kwogo kede twer ducu." 
Daniel5:19 Pi dit ame rik Obaŋa omie, omio rok luŋ ame kobo leb apapat ducu komgi omyel i nyime, kun owore meicel. Rik ka cunye omito ni enek ŋattoro, en neko; ka omito ni ewek dano moro bed kwo, daŋ weko kite ame cunye omito; ka omito ni emi dit baŋ ŋattoro daŋ mio, ka omito ni ekwany dano oko i dittere, daŋ timo kittono." 
Daniel5:20 Cite i kare ame en ocako yeyea calo ogwalogwal i cunye, cunye te doko anwaŋ oko, en te cako wakere oko, omio ote ryeme oko i wi kommere me loc, kwogo mere daŋ ote kwanyo oko," 
Daniel5:21 Rik ote ryeme oko i akina dano, ote miye bedo i cuny a lee bedo kede, en te cako bedo karacel kede kane me tim; en te bedo camo lum calo twon kun toyo ame ton i polo dyako kome, tuno ka en oniaŋni Obaŋa Amalo Meicel loo loc a dano, dok keto ŋat ame yie mito me loyo," 
Daniel5:22 Doŋ yin wode, Belcajar, mom imwolle i cunyi i nyime, kadi bed yin iŋeo magi luŋ," 
Daniel5:23 Ento yin icako yiye me lweny i kom Rwot me polo; dok ame otio kede i ode okelo i nyimi, eka yin kede jo adoŋo me awora, monni, kede aŋecani ite mato wunu koŋo olok; dok daŋ ipako wunu cal obaŋe ame otio i ryal, jabu, mola, nyonyo, yat kede kidi ame mom neno, mom winyo kop, mom ŋeo ginnoro, ento mom iworo Obaŋa, ŋat ame weoni tye i ciŋe, dok ame gwoki i yore ducu." 
Daniel5:24 “Mannono en omio Obaŋa ocwao ciŋ dano me coyo coc man," 
Daniel5:25 Doŋ coc ame ocoo-nono ene: MENE, MENE, TEKEL MENE, kede PARSIN," 
Daniel5:26 Te koppere Obaŋa otyeko moko kare ame locci bino ri kede oko dok onyuto ni agikki mere doŋ ceggi; 
Daniel5:27 Tekel, te koppere ni yin doŋ otyeko pimi oko i mijan, onwoŋo ni iyot meicel;" 
Daniel5:28 Peres, te koppere ni, locci doŋ otyeko poko oko omio baŋ jo Medi kede baŋ jo Pacia.”" 
Daniel5:29 Oyot Belcajar te miyo twer, ote ruko Danieri boŋo obedo amaramar, kede nyor me jabu i ŋute, eka ote rabo kop i ko me romo lobo luŋ ni en doŋ obedo aloc adwoŋ me adek i te loc me Babulon." 
Daniel5:30 I dyeworrono ikokome, ote neko abaka Belcajar oko," 
Daniel5:31 Dario dano me Medi te leyo loc, kun mwaka ame dittere romo pyerabicel wie aryo." 
Daniel6:1 Dario oneno ni twero bedo ber ka ce eketo oloc adoŋo ame romo mia acel kede pyeraryo oromo lobo ame en eloo luŋ; 
Daniel6:2 kede dok oloc ocele adek ame loogi ame gin twero miyo ripot me ticgi i nyimgi, kun Danieri tye i akina jo adekkono, me lim abaka kur rweny kannoro." 
Daniel6:3 Danieri te medde bedo dano ame neye meicel i akina owote mere luŋ kede i akina oloc ame gin oloo man otimere pi kit cuny ame rik en tye kede, omio Dario te yik o ni myero ekete obedo dano ame loo lobo ame en eloo luŋ." 
Daniel6:4 Mannono te miyo oloc adoŋo luŋ kede rwode te bedo yenyo yo ame myero nwoŋ kede bal i kome ame mako loc; cite yo moro me tero kokogi i kome, akadi nwoŋo balloro i kome te loyogi oko, pien en rik onwoŋo obedo dano ame genne meicel ame mom i roccoro onyo balloro," 
Daniel6:5 Jo-nono te doŋ kobo ni, “Mom obino nwoŋo yo moro me tero kokowa i kom Danieri kadi acel, tuno ka obeo i kom gin ame mako cik Obaŋa mere.”" 
Daniel6:6 Oloc adoŋo kede en ame lubogi te cako wot luŋ baŋ abaka Dario, ote wot kobbe ni, “Kom abaka. Dario gire bed ayot nakanaka!" 
Daniel6:7 Oloc luŋ ame tye i te locci, kede odoŋe ame loo lwak, rwode, omi-tam kede oloc ame loo dul lobo apapat; gin luŋ oye aboŋo ŋattoro ame oloko kop i akinagi ni abaka myero mok cik dok mi twer a mom oromo loko, ni ka ce obino nwoŋo ŋattoro ame tye ka woro obaŋa moro ocele onyo dano moro ocele ame mom abaka pi nino pyeradek, kodi dano-nono obino bolo oko i akina eŋatu." 
Daniel6:8 Doŋ ba adwoŋ, yin myero doŋ imok cikkono, imi coo me iket iye ciŋi me bed cik ame mom dok oromo loko, kun lubo cik a jo Medi kede me a jo Pacia, ame mom dok otwero loko.”" 
Daniel6:9 Mannono te miyo abaka Dario keto ciŋe me moko cikkono. 
Daniel6:10 I kare ame Danieri oŋeo ni cikkono doŋ otyeko keto ciŋ iye oko, en odok i paco mere te wot donyo iyi icika mere ame tye malo, te weko wan dirica luŋ ame tye tutuŋ Jerucalem bedo twolo; en te rumo coŋe piny kun kwao Obaŋa mere, en rik te bedo timo amannono tyen adek nino acel acel, kun pwoo Obaŋa mere, kite ame en onwoŋo timo kede kare ducu." 
Daniel6:11 Jo-nu te bino kite ame onwoŋo gin oyiko kede, ote nwoŋo Danieri tye ka kwayo Obaŋa mere kun bako doge i nyime." 
Daniel6:12 Gin luŋ ote wot doto Danieri baŋ abaka kun okobo ni, “Adwoŋ abaka! Mom rik iketo cik ame kwero woro obaŋa moro ocele kede dano moro ocele kun nino pyeradek mom ru okato, dok ni jo luŋ myero wori yin keken?
