Mom rik iciko ni ŋat oturo cikkono myero bol oko i akina eŋatu?” Abaka te gamo ni, “Cikkono pwod gire tye kittono kite ame cik a jo Medi kede jo Pacia tye kede, ame mom otwero loko,”" 
Daniel6:13 Gin luŋ ote gamo kop abaka ni, “Adwoŋ, Danieri moro ca, ame obedo dano acel i akina opii ame okelo i Juda, en mom winyi kadi acel adwoŋ, mom daŋ winyo cik ame iketo, cite en tye ka kwayo Obaŋa mere nino i nino tyen adek twal.”" 
Daniel6:14 Kare ame abaka owinyo kop man, cunye ocwer atek meicel, kun tye ka tamo yo me laro kwo a Danieri; te bedo yelle ceŋ iyul, kun tye ka yenyo yo me laro kwo mere." 
Daniel6:15 Jo-ni luŋ te bino baŋ abaka, kun onwoŋo ocikere acika, ote kobbi abaka ni, “Adwoŋ abaka, ŋe ni man obedo cik a jo Medi kede me a jo Pacia, ame cik ame abaka otyeko moko mom dok otwero loko kadi acel.”" 
Daniel6:16 Abaka te doŋ miyo twer, ote kelo Danieri wot bolo i akina eŋatu. Abaka te kobbi Danieri ni, “Obaŋa ame yin iworo myero omedde konyi.”" 
Daniel6:17 Rik ote kelo gweŋ ote bedo cego kede dog gorogoro ame eŋatu bedo iye oko, abaka te bino mwono oko kun dio atem me ciŋe iye kede me ciŋ jo mere adoŋo me awora, me kur lok ginnoro i kom kop a Danieri." 
Daniel6:18 Abaka te wot oko i ode, dyewor luŋ en te bedo kanyo kec, kun mom okelo ginnoro i nyime, ni no daŋ te rwenyo oko i waŋe." 
Daniel6:19 Odiko ame piny doŋ oyabere oko, abaka oya te wot oyotoyot i dog gorogoro eŋatu," 
Daniel6:20 I kare ame en doŋ ceggi i dog gorogoro kan ame Danieri onwoŋo tye iye, en oredo kun kok i dwon me cwercuny, te penyo Danieri ni, “Ama Danieri amiro Obaŋa Akwo, Obaŋani ame iworo kare luŋ-ŋi, okonyi, omio eŋetu mom otimo ginnoro i komi?”" 
Daniel6:21 Danieri te gamo kop abaka ni, “Adwoŋŋa, komi gire myero bed ayot nakanaka!" 
Daniel6:22 Obaŋana ocwao omalai ka te miyo dog eŋatu oko, omio mom otima ginnoro pien balla moro onwoŋo mom tye kadi acel i nyime, akadi i nyimi yin abaka, mom gire atimo ginnoro arac.”" 
Daniel6:23 Abaka te lelo atek meicel, te ciko ni myero ru kwanyo Danieri oko i akina eŋatu. Mannono te miyo kwanyo Danieri oko i akina eŋatu, kun awano moro mom tye i kome kadi acel, pien en onwoŋo ogeno Obaŋa mere." 
Daniel6:24 Abaka te miyo cik, ote kelo jo ame onwoŋo odoto Danieri luŋ bolo oko i gorogoro i akina eŋatu, okelogi karacel itinogi, kede mongi. I kare ame obologi eŋatu odarogi adara, te tuturo cogo komgi oko, ŋiŋido atitino." 
Daniel6:25 Abaka Dario te coyo waraga baŋ rok luŋ ame kobo leb apapat ame bedo i wi lobo, kun kobo ni, “Kuc omedde nya i akinawu." 
Daniel6:26 Atyeko keto cik i lobo luŋ ame an aloo, ŋat acel acel ame tye iye myero bed kede lworo dok daŋ owor Obaŋa a Danieri, pien en obedo Obaŋa ame kwo, dok perakino nakanaka, loccere mom oromo turo, dok loccere bino romo kabedo luŋ naka iyi agikki piny." 
Daniel6:27 En laro dano dok konyo dano daŋ, tio anyut kede gigi mogo me awura, i polo kede i lobo, en Obaŋa-nono ne olaro Danieri, i teko a lwak eŋatu.”" 
Daniel6:28 Mannono te miyo Danieri bedo aber meicel i kare me loc a Dario kede kare me loc abaka Kuro me Pacia. 
Daniel7:1 I mwaka me agege me loc a Belcajar abaka me Babulon, Danieri oleko lek, kun onyutte gigi mogo i kare ame en tye obuto piny i ka buto mere. En te coyo lekkere-nono oko piny, te daŋ kobo gin ame eleko-nono oko." 
Daniel7:2 Danieri okobo kit man: “Nen ba, dyewor i waŋ lek, onyutta yamo aŋwen i polo, ame tye ka kodo i twoke aŋwen ducu kun rurubo pii ame tye i twon nammoro adwoŋ meicel." 
Daniel7:3 Dok ate neno daŋ leyi mogo adoŋo aŋwen kun otye odonnyo i dye nam, kun acel acel i akinagi pat apata owote mere." 
Daniel7:4 Lee me agege onwoŋo cal eŋatu, kun bwome tye calo me a cur. I kare ame atye aneno, ote puto bwome oko, ote tiŋo lee-nono oko i lobo, ote miyo wot cuŋ i tyene aryo calo dano; ote miye cuny ame dano tye kede.”" 
Daniel7:5 Dok ate ru neno lee ocele me aryo mere, ame onwoŋo calo dubu. Tyene tuncel onwoŋo otiŋere malo, riŋo amara onwoŋo tye adek iyi doge i akina lake; rik ote kobbe ni, “Ya malo, imwod riŋo adwoŋ.”" 
Daniel7:6 Dok ate ru neno lee ocele mere ame calo kwac, ame bwome tye aŋwen i nee calo me a winyo; wie onwoŋo tye aŋwen twal; mannono onwoŋo tye kede twer me loc." 
Daniel7:7 I ŋe man i dyeworrono, dok ate ru neno lee ocele me aŋwennere. Twon lee moro ame neno iyiliyili, ame mio jo twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, dok tek okato kare oko; tye i twoni lakkogo me nyonyo; obedo mwodo riŋo leyi kun tuturo cogogi oko atitino, te nyonyono en odoŋŋere oko i tyene. En onwoŋo pat meicel i leyi ame ageo neno luŋ, tuŋe onwoŋo tye apar twal." 
Daniel7:8 Kare ame pwod atye ka paro kop i kom tuŋe apar-ri, tuŋe ocele atidi te dok donnyo i akina owote mere; kare ame tuŋe-nono odonnyo, tuŋe adek i akina maka me agege-ca oputte i tergi luŋ. Tuŋe-nono onwoŋo tye i waŋŋogo ame calo waŋ dano, kede dog ame tye ka kobo koppogo adoŋodoŋo." 
Daniel7:9 I kare ame atye aneno, dok ate neno kome me loc ame ocicibo, ŋattoro ame operakino meicel te bino i wik ommere, boŋo mere onwoŋo tar calo pee, yer wie te tar calo yer romo ame olwoko odoco, kommere onwoŋo lyel alyela calo leb mac, kun okottere calo mac ame tye ka waŋ." 
Daniel7:10 Kulo me mac te cako mol, kun mol ya i nyime kuno; jo tutumia i tutumia onwoŋo tye ka tic pire, kun jo tutumia apar tyen tutumia apar tye ocuŋ i nyime, dok onwoŋo otye ka ŋolo kop a jo, kun buke tye ame oyabere ayaba." 
Daniel7:11 I caa-nono abedo neno pien tuŋ lee onwoŋo tye ka kobo twoni koppogo adoŋodoŋo, kun akobo i dwon aloŋo meicel. I kare ame pwod atye anenonono, ote neko lee-nono oko, ote waŋo kome oko kede mac." 
Daniel7:12 Aco leyi ocele mege ca ote gamo locgi oko, cite kwogi kon ote weko bedo kwo pi kare moro anonok." 
Daniel7:13 I kare ame atye ka neno anyuttono, i dyeworrono, aneno anyuttogo acalo magi: Aneno dano moro ame calo wot a dano, ame abino i pol kun oya i polo, en te bino baŋ ŋat ame operakino meicel, otere naka i nyime." 
Daniel7:14 Rik ote miye loc, loc luŋ aluŋa kede kwogo ame tye iye, me rok luŋ ame kobo leb apapat, myero ti tic pire; loccere bino bedo loc ame pera-kino nakanaka, loccere mom bino gik kadi acel, dok loccere gire mom obino turo." 
Daniel7:15 “Aco an Danieri cunya onwoŋo oballe doŋ oko pi lek ame obino i wianono. 
Daniel7:16 An ate wot baŋ dano moro acel ame onwoŋo tye i akina jo ame tye kuno, me en niaŋa kop me ateni i kom lek man, En te titta, omia aŋeo kop me lek ame aleko luŋ." 
Daniel7:17 Leyi aŋwen adoŋo obedo obakki aŋwen ame bino loc i lobo," 
Daniel7:18 Ento jo acil ame obedo jo a Ŋat Amalo Meicel en ame bino gamo loccono, loccono te bedo meggi waŋ i waŋ." 
Daniel7:19 “Dok ate mito ni myero aŋe kop i kom lee aŋwen ame onwoŋo pat apata i leyi ocele-ca, ame onwoŋo iyiliyili meicel, kun tye i lake me nyonyo kede lwete luŋ me mola; ame omwodo rujo leyi, kun tuturo cogogi oko atitino, te nyono en odoŋŋere oko i tyene." 
Daniel7:20 Dok ate mito ŋeyo daŋ kop i kom tuŋ apar ame onwoŋo tye i wi lee-naca kede dok tuŋe ocele ame te dok donnyo iceni ame te miyo tuŋ adek me agege-ca mukere oko, tuŋe ame onwoŋo tye iye waŋŋogo kede doge ame te kobo koppogo adoŋodoŋo, dok ame onwoŋo nen calo dwoŋ kato owote mere oko ca." 
Daniel7:21 I kare ame onwoŋo pwod atye aneno, tuŋe-nono te cako lweny i jo acil," 
Daniel7:22 te daŋ loyogi oko, tuno waŋ ame ŋat operakino meicel-ca obino, en omio ote doŋ ŋolo kop a jo acil, ame gin obedo jo a ŋat Amalo Meicel, kare te romo, eka jo acil te doŋ gamo loc." 
Daniel7:23 Dano-nono te kobo ni, ‘Kop i kom lee me aŋwen, loc me aŋwen bino bedo tye i lobo, loccono bino bedo pat i loc ocele, loccono bino romo lobo luŋ, bino nyono oko i tyene, bino ŋido oko atitino." 
Daniel7:24 Aco tuŋ apar ca, i kom loccono obakki apar bino loyo loc iye; ŋat ocele dok bino donnyo i ŋegi, en bino bedo apat i me agege-ca, en bino turo loc obakki adek oko." 
Daniel7:25 En bino kobo kop arac i kom Ŋat Amalo meicel, bino wuno jo acil ame obedo jo a Ŋat Amalo Meicel, bino temo loko karegi me woro Obaŋa kede cik Obaŋa. Obino miyo jo acil i ciŋe, pi mwakki adek kede nucu," 
Daniel7:26 Cite okiko me ŋolo kop i kome bino bedo tye, loccere obino gamo oko, obino balo ote jwero oko naka i agikki mere." 
Daniel7:27 Doŋ teko kede twer a loc luŋ ame tye i lobo, obino miyo luŋ baŋ jo acil ame obedo jo a Ŋat Amalo Meicel. Locgi bino bedo loc ame pera-kino waŋ i waŋ, loc luŋ me lobo bino worogi kun tio pirgi.’" 
Daniel7:28 “Agikki me kop man tye kitti. An Danieri, tamma onwoŋo omio cunya opoto meicel, koma daŋ te balle oko, cite akano kop man i cunya.”" 
Daniel8:1 I mwaka me adek me loc abaka Belcajar, anyuttogo onen baŋa an Danieri i wan lek, kun doŋ atyeko neno maca me agege-ca oko." 
Daniel8:2 I kare ame aneno anyut ame onen baŋa i waŋ lekkono, aneno ni doŋ tye i boma me Cuca, ame tye i lobo me Elam; dok daŋ aneno ni onwoŋo atye i dog kulo me Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Atiŋo waŋa malo ate neno nyok romo ame ocuŋ i wi tela i dog kulo. Nyok romo-nono onwoŋo tye kede tuŋe aryo, tuŋe aryo-nono luŋ onwoŋo bocoboco, cite acel onwoŋo kato awottere oko; en aborrere onwoŋo otu icen." 
Daniel8:4 Aneno nyok romo-nono kun tye ka mwomere tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, ogeo mwomere tuŋ to, te mwomere tuŋ anyarodi, eka dok te mwomere tuŋ anyarolum; lee moro onwoŋo mom romo cuŋ i nyime, dok onwoŋo mom tye ŋattoro ame twero larogi i teko mere. En rik timo gin ame yie mito kun daŋ dwore gire kene." 
Daniel8:5 I kare ame pwod atye alwodo kop man i cunya, dok ate neno nyok dyelloro tye abino i tuŋ to, kun ŋolo dye lobo arii, ame tyene mom agudo piny, Nyok dyellono onwoŋo tye kede twon tuŋe acel keken i akina waŋe." 
Daniel8:6 Dyellono te wot baŋ romo ame tye kede tuŋe aryo-ca, ame onwoŋo aneno tye ocuŋ i wi tela i ŋet kulo ca, en te mwomere i kome i twon akemo adwoŋ meicel." 
Daniel8:7 Anene i kare ame en doŋ onoko romo-ca, akemo te miyo bedo ager meicel, omio te dipo nyok romo muko tuŋe aryo-ca oko, nyok romo onwoŋo mom tye kede teko me cuŋ i nyime. En te reto nyok romo oko piny, te bedo nyonyono, kun mom tye ŋattoro ame twero laro nyok romo i baŋe." 
Daniel8:8 Nyok dyel te doŋ yon atek meicel. Ento i kare ame onwoŋo en tek wokkono, twon tuŋe acel-ca te tur oko, eka akaka mannono oturrono te donnyo tuŋe ocele aŋwen ame nen i teŋe, ame otikere i yamo aŋwen ame onwoŋo tye akodo i polo." 
Daniel8:9 Dok ate neno tuŋe ocele atidi mere ocako donnyo i akina tuŋe acel i akina maka aŋwen-ca, eka te doŋo abor meicel kun oleŋere odok tutuŋ anyarolum kede tutuŋ kide, ame otikere i lobo me kwogo." 
Daniel8:10 Odoŋo abor atek meicel ame te tuno naka kan ame mony me polo tye iye, ame te bolo acerrogo oko piny, te daŋ nyonyono oko i tyene." 
Daniel8:11 En te doŋ yon okato kare naka i kom Aloc ame loo mony me polo; ogiko tic me yalo oko i mot awaŋa ame onwoŋo otimo kare ducu, dok te giko daŋ tic me wore oko, kun babalo kabedo acil ame rik owore iye oko," 
Daniel8:12 Rik ote miye mony me polo kede mot awaŋa me nino i nino pi bai, wi jo te wil oko i kop me ateni, tuŋŋono te bedo tic kun medde ameda i bedo atek." 
Daniel8:13 Dok ate winyo amalaika tye ka kop kede amalaika wadgi, awinyo ka acel gamo kop awottere ni, “Anyut ame onyuto i mot awaŋa me nino i nino myero ri pi kare ame rom mene, dok bal ame mio gigi mogo ame neno lik timere, myero mi pi kare a rom mene, karacel kede miyo ka woro Obaŋa me mony me polo bed me anyona piny i tyen?”" 
Daniel8:14 Awottere te gamo ni, “Tuno ka odiko kede otyeno doŋ okato ame romo tyen tutumia aryo kede mia adek nono; eka ote doŋ dwoko ot woro Obaŋa kakare.”" 
Daniel8:15 Kare ame an Danieri atyeko neno, amito ni myero aniaŋ iye; i caa-nono ŋattoro ame cal i dano te bino cuŋ i nyima." 
Daniel8:16 An ate winyo dwon ŋattoro ame tye ka kato i wi tela i ŋet kulo me Ulai, ame kobo ni, “Gabriel we, mi dano-nu niaŋ ayut ame eneno i wan lek.”" 
Daniel8:17 Dano-nono te bino aceggi keda kan ame onwoŋo acuŋ iye. Lworo omaka, omio ate rette piny aryeba cuny. Cite en te kobba ni, “Yin wot a dano, myero iniaŋ ni anyuttono mako kop i kom agikki me jami luŋ i lobo.”" 
Daniel8:18 Kare ame en tye ka kop keda, an ate cako nino atek meicel kun akula wia piny i lobo, en te maka miya ya cuŋ acuŋa kede tyena." 
Daniel8:19 En te kobba ni, “Nen ba, abino miyi iŋeo gin ame bino timere i kare ame akemo Obaŋa bino gik iye; pien koppere mako nino me agikki ame yam doŋ otyeko ciko pire con." 
Daniel8:20 Romo ame yin ineno ame tuŋe tye aryo, mannono obedo obakki aryo me Medi kede me Pacia." 
Daniel8:21 Aco nyok dyel obedo twon abaka atek me Grik; tuŋ odoŋo abor meicel i akina waŋe obedo abaka me agege. 
Daniel8:22 Tuŋ ame otur, eka aŋwen ocele te tu kakare, mannono loc aŋwen apapat ame bino leyo kakare, kun tekogi mom rom kede mege." 
Daniel8:23 “Kare ame doŋ loc obakki aŋwennono ceggi gik, ame balgi doŋ rac dok bup okato kare, abaka moro ame kwiri bino cako loc, ame obedo dano ame twero roto gigi mogo me ryeko," 
Daniel8:24 Abaka-nono bino bedo atek meicel, bino timo jami mogo ame mio jo lworo, dok jami luŋ ame en tio bino wot aber. En bino neko twoni jo ame tek i lweny karacel kede rok a jo acil." 
Daniel8:25 Pi ryeko mere ame calo ryeko apwo, en bino medde ameda i ryeko me bwolo jo, dok en bino bedo dworre kenekene i cunye. En bino neko jo apol meicel kun nwoŋo gin mom ocako lweny i komgi atura; bino cako lweny anaka i kom Aloc ame loo luŋ cite nen ba, obino rete piny kun ciŋ dano mom ogude." 
Daniel8:26 Anyut ame ineno i waŋ lek ame onyuto iye kop i kom mot awaŋa me odiko kede otyeno tye ateni, Cite myero igwok acalo kop me imuŋ i cunyi, pien bino tyeko kare alac kun gin ame onyutti-nono mom ru otimere.”" 
Daniel8:27 Ryeko onwoŋo orywenya oko two te maka, ate bu to kon piny pi kare abubup, icennere ate doŋ ya wot tiyo tic abaka, Ento abedo wuro gin ame aneno i waŋ lekkono meicel, dok naka mom aniaŋ gira iye." 
Daniel9:1 I mwaka me agege me loc a Dario wot Akacuwera, ame en anywalli me Medi, ame rik odoko abaka ame loo jo Kaldaya." 
Daniel9:2 I mwaka me agege me loccere, i kare ame an Danieri onwoŋo abedo kwano buke, anwoŋo kop ame yam Rwot omio adwarpiny Jeremia okobo gin ame myero koŋ ge timere kun Jerucalem pwod tye acalo wi obur; ate nwoŋo wei mwaka ame onyuto ni bino romo pyerabiro twal." 
Daniel9:3 Man omio alokere baŋ Rwot Obaŋa, ate cako kok baŋe kun abako doga akwae, dok daŋ ari kec, ame aruko boŋo cola dok daŋ ajuko koma kede buru." 
Daniel9:4 Abedo kwayo Rwot Obaŋana, kun atuco balwa i nyime akobo ni, “Ama Rwot, ame ibedo twon Obaŋa moro ame iyiliyili, ame gwoko cikere mere kede mar a mom lokere baŋ jo ame mare dok mako cikkere." 
Daniel9:5 Wan giwa otyeko balo i nyimi, dok otimo gin arac, obedo daŋ timo tim arac kun ojem i komi, olokere teŋe i luba cikki kede gin ame yam iciko." 
Daniel9:6 Okwero-gu winyo kop omironi odwarpiny, ame obedo kobo kopgi i nyiŋi baŋ obakkiwa, olocwa, kede baŋ kwariwa, kede dok baŋ jo luŋ me lobowa." 
Daniel9:7 Kite atira gire tye baŋi yin keken, Amaa Rwot, aco wan luŋ lewic doŋ omio waŋwa oballe oko, kite ame tye kede i kare-ni. Kite ame tye kede baŋ jo ame bedo i Juda, jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, kede i kom jo Icrael luŋ, jo ame bedo kan aceggi kede jo ame bedo kannabor i lobo ame yam iryemogi iye luŋ, pi timo tim me erupe ame gin obedo timo i komi." 
Daniel9:8 Lewic doŋ omio waŋwa oballe oko, Ama Rwot, waŋ obakkiwa, olocwa luŋ, kede waŋ kwariwa, pien wan luŋ otimo bal i nyimi," 
Daniel9:9 Rwot Obaŋawa akica dok daŋ weko bal pien wan ojem i kome," 
Daniel9:10 wan mom owinyo kop a Rwot Obaŋawa, kun olubo cikkere ame en omiowa ame omiro mere odwarpiny otittiwa." 
Daniel9:11 Jo Icrael luŋ oturo cikki, ote daŋ lokki ŋegi, kun mom owinyo koppi. Mannono omio cen kede kop me kwon ame ocoo i buk a Muca amiro Obaŋa ocoro i komwa, pien wan obalo i nyime," 
Daniel9:12 En otyeko moko koppere ame en rik okobo i komwa kede i kom olocwa, omio imiowa can adwoŋ meicel. Pien gin ame itimo i kom Jerucalem yam mom ru otimere kadi acel i lobo kan." 
Daniel9:13 Can man luŋ ame otyeko coyo i buk a Muca doŋ otyeko timere i komwa, cite kadi amannono, naka am an wan mom ru otemo yomoro cunyi i yore moro, mom oye weko bal wa ote cako lubo atenini." 
Daniel9:14 Man en omio Rwot onwoŋo oyiko can man oko pirwa, te daŋ miyo bino i komwa, Rwot Obaŋawa genne i ginnoro luŋ ame en tio, ento wan mom owinyo koppere." 
Daniel9:15 “Doŋ aman ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, ame rik ikwanyo joni i lobo me Miciri i twon tekoni adwoŋ, ame te miyo nyiŋi rwo naka atot tin, wan gire obalo i nyimi, dok daŋ otimo gin arac." 
Daniel9:16 Ama Rwot kite acalo yin gire igenne i gin ame itimo, tim ber ilok tammi, iwek akemo kede iniga ame itye kede i kom Jerucalem bedi, nen Jerucalem obedo boma acil. Jo luŋ ame tye i ŋetwa tye ka kobo kop arac i ko mwa kede i kom Jerucalem pi balwa kede me a kwariwa." 
Daniel9:17 Doŋ ba, Ama Rwot Obaŋawa, tim ber iwiny kwacca an amironi ame abako doga i nyimi. Tim ber, pi nyiŋi, imi kica omaki i kom ot me wori ame aman doŋ tye i wi obur." 
Daniel9:18 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, cik yiti iwiny koppa. Yab waŋi, inena, Ama Rwot, nen boma ame olwoŋo kede nyiŋi. Wan giwa mom otye ka bako dogwa baŋi me nyuto kite atira, cite pien yin kicani dwoŋ." 
Daniel9:19 Ama Rwot winy kwacca, Ama Rwot tim kica; Ama Rwot cik yiti ite daŋ timo ginnoro oko, Tim ber, kur dok igal, po piri Ama Rwot, pien bomani kede joni olwono kede nyiŋi.”" 
Daniel9:20 I kare ame a tye ka kop kun akwayo Obaŋa, atuco balla kede bal a jona, dok abako doga baŋ Rwot Obaŋana, pi wi kidi acil ame obedo me Obaŋana." 
Daniel9:21 I kare ame at ye ka kwayo Obaŋa kun akop, dano ame nyiŋe Gabriel ame onwoŋo koŋ ageo neno i waŋ lek iyi anyut me agege, te ru bino baŋa oyotoyot, kun ŋweco adwir meicel i caa me yalo Obaŋa i mot otyeno." 
Daniel9:22 En obino te bino kobba ni, “Danieri we, an abino me bino miyi ryeko kede niaŋ atut." 
Daniel9:23 Nen ba, i kare ame pwod igeo bako dogi abaka baŋ Obaŋa, kopporo okato ame oya i baŋ Obaŋa, ame aman an abino me titti koppono, pien Obaŋa mari meicel. Pi mannono ba, tam koppono me iniaŋ gin ame onyutti i waŋ lek." 
Daniel9:24 “Mwaka mia aŋwen kede pyeraboŋwen en ame obedo kare ame Rwot Obaŋa omoko pi jowu kede bomawu acil me tyeko bal oko me turo cik, me giko bal, kede me kwanyo bal oko i komwu, ote dok kela kite atira ame perakino nakanaka, me wek anyut kede kop odwarpiny ocobere kakare, kede dok wiro kabedo man acil akato ducu-ni kede moo," 
Daniel9:25 Doŋ amito iŋe dok iniaŋ aber ni cakere i kare ame cik me gero, dok Jerucalem owoto oko pi kuro bino a dano ame owiro kede moo, ame en aloc, mwaka pyeraŋwen wie aboŋwen bino kon kato. Obino dok gero Jerucalem odoco, kede yo luŋ ame tye iye, kun tye apama cel otoro atora, eka te ri pi mwakki mia aŋwen kede pyeradek wie aŋwen, cite obino gero i kare ame peko tye." 
Daniel9:26 I ŋe mwaka mia aŋwen kede pyeradek wie aŋwen, dano ame owiro kede moo obino neko oko, kun ŋat ocele mom dok leo kakare; mony ocele ame bino bi no kede alocgi bino turo boma oko, karacel kede kabedo acil. Agikki mere doŋ bino bedo calo abwal pii, lweny doŋ te erre agwa naka iyi agikki; mannono en ame obedo can ame yam Rwot ociko pire." 
Daniel9:27 Dano-nono bino moko cikkere i jo apol pi mwakki abiro; en bi no miyo tic me yalo Obaŋa gik koŋ oko pi mwakki adek kede nucu. Dano ame bino balo piny odoco-nono bino bino kun oboo kome i timmogo me kwer, tuno ka kare ame rik Obaŋa oyiko pire doŋ oromo.”" 
Daniel10:1 I mwaka me adek me loc a Kuro abaka me Pacia, rik obin onyuto kopporo baŋ Danieri ame nyiŋe ocele Beltecajar. Kop ame onyutte-nono onwoŋo tye ateni, dok okelo arubaruba adwoŋ meicel. Danieri oniaŋ koppono, te daŋ niaŋ gin ame onyutte." 
Daniel10:2 I kare-nono luŋ, an Danieri abedo kumo pi cabit adek twal." 
Daniel10:3 Mom acamo cammoro amit, mom acamo riŋo, akadi kono olok daŋ mom ogudo doga, mom daŋ awirre kede moo kadi acel pi cabit adekkono luŋ." 
Daniel10:4 I nino dwe pyeraryo wie aŋwen me dwe me agege, i kare ame onwoŋo atye acuŋ i ŋet kulo moro adwoŋ, ame en kulo Tigric," 
Daniel10:5 atiŋo waŋa malo, ate neno dano moro ame onwoŋo oruko boŋo camanini, kun otweo pyere kede del jabu me Upaj." 
Daniel10:6 Kom dano-nono onwoŋo calo kidi berul ame mimila amimil, tur nyime te calo lutkot ame tye ka meny, kun waŋe calo mac rao ame alyel, eka bade kede tyene luŋ te meny calo mola ame orudo meicel, dok kop ame en kobo ka iwinyo calo lwak jo apipim en awo-nono." 
Daniel10:7 Anyut ame onen-nono, an Danieri keken en ame aneno, jo ame rik tye keda mom oneno, cite komgi omyel atek meicel pi lworo, ote riŋo wot pono oko." 
Daniel10:8 Gin oweka adoŋ kena eka ate neno twon anyuttoro adwoŋ wok-ki. I kare ame aneno, tekona te tum oko ducu, ber a koma te lokere atek meicel, tekona te tum odoco." 
Daniel10:9 Dok ate winyo dwone kun en tye ka kop, i kare ame awinyo koppere, arette piny aryeba cuny, ate daŋ cako nino oko atek meicel." 
Daniel10:10 Nen ba, ciŋ ŋattoro te guda, te miya rumo aruma kun ciŋa kede cena luŋ tye amyel amyela." 
Daniel10:11 Dano-nono te kobba ni, “Danieri we, dano ame omaro cik yiti iwiny kop luŋ ame at ye ka kobo baŋi, ya malo icuŋ atira, pien an aman otyeko oora baŋi.” I kare ame en onwoŋo pwod tye ka kobo kop man baŋa, an aya malo ate cuŋ kun koma amyel amyela." 
Daniel10:12 En te kobba ni, “Kur ilwor, Danieri, pien cakere i nino me agege ame icako keto iye cunyi me niaŋ kop man kede mwolle keni i nyim Obaŋani, kop ame ibedo kobo luŋ owinyere, daŋ en koppi-nono en omio abino baŋi." 
Daniel10:13 Amalaika ame gwoko loc me Pacia obedo geŋa pi nino ame romo pyeraryo wie acel twal. Cite Maikol ame obedo ŋat acel i akina omalaika adoŋo, obino te bino konya, omio an ate weke kuno gin kede amala ika ame gwoko Pacia." 
Daniel10:14 Doŋ an abino me bino miyi ŋeyo gin aŋo ame bino timere i kom joni i kare ame pwod tye anyim, Pien anyut ame ineno nyuto gin ame bino timere i kare ame pwod tye anyim.”" 
Daniel10:15 Kare ame en otyeko kobo kop magi ducu baŋa, akulo wia piny eka leba te menne oko," 
Daniel10:16 Nen ba, dano moro ame cal acala i dano te gudo del doga, ate cako kop oko, An ate kobbe en dano ame ocuŋ i nyima-nono ni, “Adwoŋŋa, anyut ame aneno-nono omio adoko gira agoro oko, tekona doŋ mom." 
Daniel10:17 Kara doŋ an amironi atwero kop kedi niŋo yin adwoŋŋa? Pien tekona doŋ mom, dok weo daŋ doŋ mito loya oko.”" 
Daniel10:18 Ŋattoro ame cal i dano te dok mulo koma, tekona te dwogo." 
Daniel10:19 En te kobba ni, “Yin dano ame omaro atek meicel, kur ilwor, kuc obed baŋi; cuŋ atek ame cunyi nwaŋ.” Kare ame en okobo keda, adoko tek eka ate kobo ni, “Kob giri doŋ adwoŋŋa, pien doŋ imio tekona adwogo.”" 
Daniel10:20 En doŋ te kobo ni, “Yin iŋeo gin omio an abino baŋi? Aman an abino dok me wot lweny i kom aloc me Pacia. Ka doŋ atyeko lweny kede oko, aloc me Grik bino bino." 
Daniel10:21 Cite an abino me bino titti gin ame ocoo i buk ame tye iye kop me ateni, Mom tye ŋattoro ocele i ŋeta me konya lweny kono ka Maikol keken, ame obedo alocwu.”" 
Daniel11:1 Aco an, i mwaka me agege me loc a Dario ame obedo jo Medi, Maikol oya malo me konya kede miya tekcuny." 
Daniel11:2 “Aman an doŋ abino nyutti kop me ateni. Nen ba, obakki ocele adek dok bino ya i lobo me Pacia, eka me aŋwennere te doŋ bedo alonyo atek meicel ame kato gin ducu; kare ame en doŋ odoko atek pi lonyo mere, en bino cako tutugo jo luŋ me lweny i kom loc a jo Grik." 
Daniel11:3 Twon abaka moro adwoŋ meicel te dok cako loc, ame abino loyo loccere i twon loccoro agwa, kun timo gin ame yie mito." 
Daniel11:4 Kare ame en doŋ ocako loc kittono loccere bi no tur oko te pokere yie aŋwen twal; mom ikwae en a bino loc, dok mom bi no lubo kit loccere, pien loccere obino miyo luŋ baŋ jo ocele a mom ikwae kadi acel." 
Daniel11:5 “Abaka acel me tutuŋ anyarolum bino bedo atek, cite aloccere moro acel bino bedo atek ame kate oko, dok loccere bino bedo twon loc adwoŋ meicel." 
Daniel11:6 Icennere ka mwaka mogo doŋ okato, gin bino ribere oko; i kare-nono nyaka abaka ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum bino bino baŋ abaka ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi pi yenyo yo me kelo kuc; cite dako-nono teko mere bino tum oko, mannono bino miyo abaka kede ikwae bino ol kede oko, cunygi te caye oko, karacel kede omiro mere, otino mere, anaka cware kede ŋat ame oleo lobo mere." 
Daniel11:7 “I kare-nono wat a dako-nono bino ya te cako lweny i kom mony me Curia, te guro cel abaka ame tye tutuŋ to, bino donyo iye te lweny kedgi loyogi oko." 
Daniel11:8 En bino coko cal obaŋegi kede cal jogigi karacel kede jami me wei ame otio i ryal kede jabu, te terogi i Miciri; eka pi mwakki mogo en koŋ te bedo kun mom lwenyo i kom abaka me tutuŋ anyarodi." 
Daniel11:9 Icennere abaka ame oya i tutuŋ anyarodi te bino lweny i lobo abaka ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum, cite bino dok gire i lobo mere." 
Daniel11:10 “Awobe mere bino cako yikere me lweny, gin obino coko lwak adwoŋ meicel me lweny, monnyono bino wot lweny i kom okworgi, obino reto oko ote bea kato acalo alele pii amol ote wot naka i cel me boma ame ocelo atek." 
Daniel11:11 Akemo bino mako abaka me tutuŋ anyarolum meicel, bino kato oko te lweny abaka me tutuŋ anyarodi, bino cobo twon mony adwoŋ meicel, ote daŋ miyo mony ocele-ca i ciŋe," 
Daniel11:12 Ka doŋ otyeko neko lwak mony adwoŋ wokkono, en bino bedo i twon awaka adwoŋ meicel i cunye, En bino neko jo tutumia i tutumia, cite mom bino loc nakanaka." 
Daniel11:13 “Abaka me tutuŋ anyarodi bino dok paco te wot coko mony adwoŋ meicel ame kato maca me agege-ca oko, icennere i ne mwakki mogo en bino dwogo me bino lweny, kun tye i lwak mony adwoŋ meicel dok i jami lweny apipim." 
Daniel11:14 I kare-nono jo apol bino jem i kom abaka me Miciri, dok otim tim arac ame tye i akina jo me turwu bino yeyea ni oromo cobo anyut ame yin ineno i wan lek, cite mom gire obino twero kadi acel." 
Daniel11:15 Abaka me Curia bino bino te bino guro boma ame ocelo atek wokkaca, eka te mako oko. Ocirikale me tutuŋ anyarolum mom bino medde cuŋ i nyimgi, anaka jo atek meicel i lweny ame oyero ayera, pien mom obino bedo kede teko me cuŋ i nyimgi." 
Daniel11:16 Cite jo ame bino cobo mony i komgi-nono bino timogi cucu kite ame cunye omito, kun ŋattoro mom tye ame romo cuŋ i nyimgi. En bino cuŋ i lobo me kwogo, kun lobonono luŋ doŋ tye i te twerrere." 
Daniel11:17 “En bino yikere me bino kede teko, kun bino i mony me lobo mere luŋ, en bino cako yiko kop me kelo kuc, eka te daŋ miyo timere. En bino miye nyako ame dako onywalo me wek bin babalo loccere luŋ oko; cite mom bino twerre, mom daŋ medde wot anyim," 
Daniel11:18 Icennere en bino lokere me lweny i kom lobo ame tye tutuŋ dog nam, eka te loyo polgi; cite atel wi mony bino miyo awaka mere gik oko; ateteni, bino miyo lewic make," 
Daniel11:19 Abaka bi no doŋ lokere dok cen i cel me boma mere en ikome ame ocele atek, cite bino bedo gatte te rette oko piny, mom ote nwoŋo atwal." 
Daniel11:20 “Abaka ocele dok bino leyo kakare, abaka-nono bino cwayo araocoro beo i lobo mere me kwogo luŋ, cite bino tyeko kare anonok meicel ote neke oko, kun mom oneke i wi akemo onyo i lweny." 
Daniel11:21 “Dano moro ocele bino leyo kakare ame mom opore bedo abaka, en bino bi no atura te gamo loc oko i yore me ryeko." 
Daniel11:22 Obino ryemo mony oko i nyime, ote jwero jo oko ducu, naka alamdog adwoŋ daŋ obino neko oko." 
Daniel11:23 Cakere i kare ame en bi no cako cikere i rok ocele, en bi no tiyo ticcere kun bwobwolo jo i ryeko meicel, en bino doko atek kun tye i mony anonok meicel." 
Daniel11:24 En bino tuno i dul lobo ame olony meicel kun jo me lobo-nono mom ŋeo kadi acel, en bino timo gin ame kwari mere luŋ, naka kwari a kwari mere daŋ mom ru yam otimo. En bino poko i akina jo mere jami luŋ ame yam oyako. En bi no yikere me cako lweny i kom boma mogo ame ocecelo atek, ento bino timere pi kare moro anonok." 
Daniel11:25 “Teko mere kede tek cunye bino tugere me lweny i kom abaka me tutuŋ anyarolum ame tye kede twon mony adwoŋ meicel; abaka me tutuŋ anyarolum bino cako lweny kede i lwak mony adwoŋ dok atek meicel; cite mom gire obino cuŋ i nyime, pien obino bedo yiko koppogo me rete." 
Daniel11:26 Naka jo ame camo cammere abeco daŋ bino bedo i akina jo ame bino neke; monnyere daŋ obino jwero oko ducu, jo apol obino neko aneka." 
Daniel11:27 Gin obakki aryo-nono obino doŋ cako cam i meja acel kun tam i cunygi mom ber; ŋat acel acel i akinagi bino bwolo awottere i kop i doge kun cunygi tye atamo timo gin arac; cite gobagi-nono mom bi no konyogi, pien kare nwoŋo mom ru oromo ame doŋ otyeko moko oko." 
Daniel11:28 En bino dok cen i lobo mere i lwak jami adwotj meicel, cite pwod bino bedo kede mit me babalo cikere Obaŋa. En bi no timo gin ame cunye mito te dok i lobo mere." 
Daniel11:29 “En bino dwogo i kare ame ociko te dok tutuŋ anyarolum; cite mom dok bino bedo kite a rik obedo kede con ca," 
Daniel11:30 Pien lwak mony adwoŋ bino bino kede melle me bino lweny kede, lworo bino make eka te dok oko cen, en bino dok i twon akemo meicel eka te wot cako lweny i kom cikere Obaŋa. En bino dok cen te cako winyo tam a jo ame otyeko ya oko i cikere Obaŋa:" 
Daniel11:31 Monnyere mogo ame oya i baŋe bino bino i ot Obaŋa ote wot timo tim me ipyeda iye kede i apama cellere, eka ote kwanyo mot awaŋa ame owaŋo iye ducu. Gin te cako keto iye ginnoro me kwer ame balo cuny jo." 
Daniel11:32 En bino cako lwenyo lwenyo me ryeko i kom jo ame doŋ otyeko turo cikere Obaŋa: cite jo ame ŋeo Obaŋagi bino medde cuŋ atek ote daŋ loyo oko," 
Daniel11:33 Jo mogo i akina jo ame ryek bi no miyo jo apol niaŋ, kadi bed obino nekogi i pala me lweny karacel kede mac, onyo obino terogi oko acalo opii, kun daŋ oyako jamigi oko pi kare moro." 
Daniel11:34 Kare ame otye ka wunogi, gin bino nwoŋo kony anonokkoro. Dok jo ocele bino lubogi pi kop me ryeko ame obwologi kede." 
Daniel11:35 Jo mogo i akina jo ame ryek obino neko oko, Man bino timere me yek jo mogo areco oko, dok lony jo bed atar, tuno ka kare me agikki ame ociko doŋ oromo." 
Daniel11:36 “Abaka bino timo gin ame cunye mito, en bino kette me bedo malo ame loo gin luŋ ame olwono ni obaŋa, dok bino kobo koppogo me awura i kom Obaŋa ame loo obaŋe luŋ. En bino medde timo kittono tuno ka kare me keto can i kome doŋ oromo; pien gin ame Obaŋa doŋ otyeko moko bino timere." 
Daniel11:37 En mom bino paro pi obaŋe a kwari mere, akadi i kom woro jok ame mon maro wok-ki; mom gire bino paro pi obaŋa moro ocele, pien en bi no kette kene me bedo malo ame loo ginnoro luŋ." 
Daniel11:38 En bino lunyo woro obaŋa me cellogo ogero atek akaka woro magi, obaŋa ame kwari mere yam mom ŋeo. En bino woro obaŋa-nono i jabu kede ryal, kidi mogo me wel kede mottogo ame welgi malo." 
Daniel11:39 En bino geno cel ame ogero atek pi konnyogo ame obaŋa orok mie; jo ame ye dittere en bi no miyogi twon kwogo adwoŋ meicel kun miogi obedo oloc ame loo jo apol, dok bino poko lobo mere kun mio jo wilo awila." 
Daniel11:40 “Ame kare me agikki doŋ ceggi, abaka me tutuŋ anyarolum bino cako lweny i kome, cite abaka me tutuŋ anyarodi bino ru bino i kome calo yamo ajuru, kun bino i gadigadi, wegi aguragura, karacel kede lwak wel apipim. En bino donyo i lobo apapat, kun bea kato calo ale le pii amol." 
Daniel11:41 En bino tuno naka i lobo me kwogo. Jo tutumia apar twal obino neko oko, cite jo Edom, jo Moab kede jo Ammon bino bwot i ciŋe, eka ote doŋ." 
Daniel11:42 En bi no ryeyo ciŋe me lweny i kom lobo apol meicel, lobo i tutuŋ anyarolum daŋ mom bino bwot." 
Daniel11:43 En doŋ bino bedo aloc ame loo lonyo me jabu, ryal kede jami mogo me wel ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum; jo Libia kede jo Eciopia bi no lubo yore." 
Daniel11:44 Cite amut ame bino ya i tutuŋ kide kede tutuŋ anyarodi bino poto cunye, en te wot oko i twon akemo adwoŋ me wot neko jo apol meicel." 
Daniel11:45 En bino guro kema me loccere i akina nam kede kidi acil ame obedo kidi me kwogo; kadi bed amannono, kare me to mere gire bino romo ame ŋattoro mom bino konye.”" 
Daniel12:1 “I kare-nono Maikol bino, bino, ame en aloc adwoŋ ame loo rokwu. Kare me can bino bedo tye; can ame yam mom ru onen, cakere i kare ame rok luŋ cakere acaka tuno kede naka i kare-naca; i kare-naca obino laro rokwu; jo luŋ ame obino nwoŋo nyiŋgi ocoye i buk." 
Daniel12:2 Pol a jo ame oto ote yiko komgi piny i lobo bino ya malo, kun jo ocele ya te bedo i kwo ame perakino nakanaka, jo ocele bino ya i twon lewic adwoŋ kede acae ame perakino atwal." 
Daniel12:3 Jo ame ryek bino ryeny aryenya calo polo ame opette, kede jo ame loko jo apol doko jo a kitegi atira, bino meny amenya nakanaka calo acer." 
Daniel12:4 Doŋ yin Danieri, wun buk ame ocoo iye kop man oko, mwon doge oko, tuno ka kare me agikki doŋ oromo. Jo apol bino riŋo kun wirre tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi, dok daŋ bino medde.”" 
Daniel12:5 An Danieri ate tiŋo waŋa neno jo aryo ame ocuŋ, kun acel ocuŋ i dog kulo tuŋŋi, acel ocuŋ i dog kulo tuŋ-ca." 
Daniel12:6 An ate kobbi dano ame onwoŋo oruko boŋo camanini, ame onwoŋo tye malo i wi pii i kulo, ni, “Man bino tero kare ame rom mene tuno ka gin me awura magi bino giko timere?”" 
Daniel12:7 Dano ame onwoŋo oruko boŋo camanini ame onwoŋo tye malo i wi pii i kulo-nono, te tiŋo ciŋe ryoryo luŋ malo i polo, an ate winyo en ka tye ka kwoŋ, kun kwoŋo i nyiŋ ŋat ame bedo kwo nakanaka, ni mannono ginnono bino perakino pi mwakki adek kede nucu; dok ka kare me turo teko a jo acil doŋ otum, jami magi luŋ doŋ te cobe re luŋ." 
Daniel12:8 Awinyo gin ame en okobo cite mom aniaŋ iye, Mannono omio ate penyo ni, “Adwoŋŋa, agikki me jami magi luŋ bino bedo niŋo ba?”" 
Daniel12:9 En te gamo ni, “Yin medde kede woti Danieri, pien koppere pwod owumo oko, omwono oko tuno ka kare me agikki oromo." 
Daniel12:10 Jo apol meicel bino lonyere, obino doko atar, kun olony odoco. Cite jo areco bino medde timo gin arac, kun ŋattoro i akina jo areco mom tye ame niaŋ iye, cite jo aryek bino niaŋ." 
Daniel12:11 Don cakere i kare ame okwanyo iye mot awaŋa me nino i nino, eka ote keto iye ginnoro me kwer ame balo cuny jo, bino tero kare me nino tutumia acel kede mia aryo i pyeraboŋwen." 
Daniel12:12 Tye kede winyo ŋat ame kuro eka te tuno i nino tutumia acel, kede mia adek kede pyeradek wie abic." 
Daniel12:13 Aman yin giri medde kede wotti tuno ka nino me agikki oromo. Ibino nwoŋo weo, ibino cuŋ i kabedoni ame opokki kare me agikki.”" 
Hosea1:1 Kop a Rwot ame rik obino baŋ Kocea wot a Beeri, i kare obakki Ujjia, Yotam, Akaj kede Kejekia, ame gin onwoŋo obedo obakki me Juda, kede i kare abaka Jeroboam wot a Yoaci ame onwoŋo obedo abaka me Icrael." 
Hosea1:2 Kare ame Rwot ogeo kop baŋ Kocea, Rwot okobbi Kocea ni, “Wot i nyom nyako ame alaya me inwoŋ itino ame onywalo i tim me alaya, pien lobo odoko twon alaya pi kwero lubo Rwot”" 
Hosea1:3 Kocea te wot nyomo Gomer nyaka Didaim, eka te yac, te nywalo atin awobi." 
Hosea1:4 Rwot te kobbi Kocea ni, “Cak nyiŋe ni Jejreel, pien odoŋ kare anonok, abino keto can i kom ot a Yeko pi remo a Jejreel, dok abino miyo loc me ot Icrael gik oko." 
Hosea1:5 Dok daŋ i nino-nono abino turo akud atero Icrael oko i luŋ me Jejreel.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomer dok te yac, te nywalo atin nyako, Rwot te kobbi Kocea ni, “Cak nyiŋe Lo-rukama pien mom dok abino medde timo kica i ot Icrael, mom abino weko balgi kadi acel." 
Hosea1:7 Cite abino timo kica i ot a Juda, abino larogi pi tek a Rwot Obaŋagi; mom abino larogi kede akud atero, kadi i pala romo, onyo i mony, onyo kede aguragura, kadi wegi aguragura.”" 
Hosea1:8 Kare ame Gomer doŋ oryemo atin oko i cak, dok te yac, te nywalo awobi." 
Hosea1:9 Rwot te kobo ni, “Cak nyiŋe ni Lo-ammi, pien wun mom ibedo wunu jona, dok an daŋ mom abedo Obaŋawu.”" 
Hosea1:10 Cite wel a jo Icrael bino bedo acalli kwoyo me dog nam, ame mom pimere, dok a mom romo akwana; dok daŋ i kabedo ame rik okobbigi iye ni “Wun mom i jona wunu,” obino kobbigi iye ni, “Itino Obaŋa akwo.”" 
Hosea1:11 Jo me Juda kede jo me Icrael bino cokere karacel, ote keto ŋat acel ame telo wigi, eka gm te ya oko i lobo-nono, pien nino a Jejreel bino bedo nino adwoŋ meicel." 
Hosea2:1 Kob baŋ ominwu ni, “Ammi ” kede baŋ aminwu ni “Rukama”" 
Hosea2:2 Pyem i totowu, pyem wunu kede, pien en mom obedo cega, an daŋ gira mom abedo cware, me en mi timmere me alaya rweny oko i waŋe, dok mito co ocele rweny oko i akina tuno mere." 
Hosea2:3 Ka mom amannono, abino gonyo rukkere, ete doŋ onoro, abino miyo edoŋ nono calo nino a rik onywale iye, abino miyo ebedo calo lobo otwo, abino miyo oryo pi en aneke." 
Hosea2:4 Mom daŋ abino timo itino mere kica, pien gin obedo itino ame nywalo pi tim me alaya" 
Hosea2:5 Pien totogi obedo alaya, dako oyacogi otimo tim me lewic. Pien en okobo ni, “Abino wot baŋ coga” ame mia kwonna kede piina, yer romona, pambana, moona kede gi-amatana." 
Hosea2:6 Pi mannono abino cego yore oko kede okuto, eka ate gero cel gure kede oko, me kur dok enwoŋ yo me beo mere." 
Hosea2:7 En bino ryemo yo coge, cite mom bino makogi, en bino yenyogi cite mom gire bino nwoŋogi. Icennere en bino kobo ni, “An abino wot, abino dok baŋ cwara me agege, pien rik atye aber i kato i kare-ni”." 
Hosea2:8 En gire rik mom daŋ ŋeo, ni an a rik amie kal, koŋo olok kede moo, dok an daŋ amio ryal onya baŋe, kede jabu ame gin otio kede pi Baal." 
Hosea2:9 Pi mannono, ka kare oromo, abino twonne gira kalla oko, kede koŋo olokka ka kare mere oromo, abino daŋ gamo yer romona kede pambana, a rik egeno i kome olaŋara." 
Hosea2:10 Aman doŋ abino yabo lewiccere i nyim coge, ŋattoro mom bino lare i ciŋa." 
Hosea2:11 Abino miyo yomcunnyere luŋ gik oko, ecubannere, por dwe, cabittere, karacel kede ecubannere luŋ ame ociko pirgi." 
Hosea2:12 Abino babalo olok kede oduro mere oko, ame en onwoŋo kobo ni, “Magi motta ame coga omia.” Abino miyogi luŋ doko buŋ, leyi me tim bino camogi." 
Hosea2:13 Abino keto can i kome pi nino me ecuban a Baal, ame kere a en waŋo kede odok akur baŋgi, te rukere aber atemmere, kede wellere, te lubo kede yo coge, kun wie wii oko i koma. Man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Hosea2:14 Pi mannono, nen ba, abino bibito en, abino tere i tim abino kop kede i mwolo." 
Hosea2:15 Ate bino miye poto olokkere kuno, abino miyo luŋ me Akor doko doggola ame miyo jo bedo i gen. En te bino kop kede kuno calo kare ame en pwod nyako, dok acalo kare a rik en ya Miciri." 
Hosea2:16 “I kare-nono ibino lwoŋa ni, ‘Cwara’, man kop a Rwot ikokome, mom dok ibino lwoŋa ni ‘Baal mera.’" 
Hosea2:17 Pien abino kwanyo nyiŋŋogo me Baal oko i doge, jo mom dok bino lwoŋo nyingi kadi acel." 
Hosea2:18 I nino nono daŋ abino cikere pirwu, kun acikere i leyi me tim kede winy a twarre malo, kede gin ame lak alaka i wi lobo; dok daŋ abino turo akud atero, karacel kede pala lweny, kede mony i lobo; eka ate miyi buto piny i kuc." 
Hosea2:19 Abino nyomi doŋ ibedo mera atwal. Abino nyomi i kite atira, kede cuny aler, kede mar a mom lokere, karacel kede kica." 
Hosea2:20 Abino nyomi ibedo mera ateteni, dok daŋ ibino ŋeyo Rwot." 
Hosea2:21 “I nino-nono, man kop a Rwot ikokome, abino gamo kop a polo, eka gin te gamo kop a lobo;" 
Hosea2:22 eka lobo te gamo mea kal, koŋo olok kede mea moo, gin luŋ bino dok i kwaca Jejreel," 
Hosea2:23 eka ate coye me bedo mera kena i lobo-ni. Abino timo kica baŋ Lo-rukama eka ate kobo baŋ Lo-ammi ni, ‘Ibedo wunu jona,’ eka en te kobo ni, ‘Yin Obaŋana.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 Rwot dok te kobba ni, “Apee dok iwot imar dako ame tye i dyerre ame mare, dok en dako ame mito co ocele, imare kom kite ame Rwot maro kede Icrael, kadi bed jo Icrael lokere gigi baŋ cal jogi kun omaro aŋina olok ame otwo.”" 
Hosea3:2 Mannono omio awile i cekel apar wie abic me ryal, kede cayiri ame romo puku aŋwen kede nucu." 
Hosea3:3 Eka ate kobbe ni, “Myero iri baŋa pi kare alac kun mom itimo timmoro me alaya. Kur daŋ ibed ico moro ocele, an daŋ abino bedo amannono tuŋ baŋi.”" 
Hosea3:4 Pien jo Icrael bino ri kare alac aboŋo abaka, kadi aloccoro, aboŋo ginnoro me aŋola me yalo Obaŋa, kadi kidi moro ame ocibo me awora, aboŋo kit callogo me tyet." 
Hosea3:5 Icennere jo Icrael bino lokkere, te cako yenyo Rwot Obaŋagi, kede abakagi Daudi; gin obino dwogo baŋ Rwot kun otye i lworo kede dok pi berrere i kare ame tye anyim." 
Hosea4:1 Winy wunu kop a Rwot, wun jo Icrael; pien Rwot tye i gin ame emito da iye i kom jo abedo i lobo-ni. Pien cuny me ateni gire mom i loboni, akadi marroro daŋ mom, neccoro i kom Obaŋa daŋ mom." 
Hosea4:2 Gin a tye iye en kwoŋ, goba, nek, kwalo kwo, kede cot, jo iye mom ye ni jukgi, oneno nek a kolle akola." 
Hosea4:3 Pi mannono, lobo tye kumo akuma, jo luŋ a bedo iye doŋ onyonere oko, karacel kede leyi me tim, kede winy a twarre malo; naka akadi rec me nam daŋ oto oko." 
Hosea4:4 Cite dano moro myero kur da, dano moro daŋ kur dot awottere, pien ŋat ame an ada kede en yin alamdog." 
Hosea4:5 Ibino twomere dyeceŋ, odwarpiny daŋ bino twomere kedi dyewor, dok abino neko daŋ totti oko." 
Hosea4:6 Jona gire tye ka to atoa pi kwiya pinygi, pien yin ikwero pwonyere oko, omio an akweri doŋ oko me bedo alamdogga, Kite acalo yin doŋ wii owil oko i cik Obaŋani, an daŋ wia bino wil oko i kom itinoni." 
Hosea4:7 Gin ka welgi omedde, gin daŋ omedde balo baŋa; abino loko kwogogi bedo me lewic." 
Hosea4:8 Bal a jona odoko camgi, worogi omio gin mito ni jo tim gin arac," 
Hosea4:9 Cite abino miyo olamdog bedo calo jo ocele, abino keto can i komgi pi kitegino no, ate culogi pi timgi-nono," 
Hosea4:10 Gin bino cem, cite mom obino yeŋ, obino daŋ timo tim me alaya, cite mom obino gire nya; pien gin oweko Rwot oko, pi miye gigi i tim me alaya." 
Hosea4:11 Koŋo olok, kede koŋo olok anyennere, rwenyo tam a dano oko," 
Hosea4:12 Jona penyo tam kom i baŋ yat, abirogi kom en ame nyuttigi kop. Pien cuny me alaya doŋ orwenyogi oko, omio gin oweko obaŋagi oko, pi timo tim me alaya." 
Hosea4:13 Gin ŋolo motgi me yalo Obaŋa malo i wi kiddi gin waŋo gitumgi i wi tur malo, i te kworo, atego kede olwedo, ni pien tipogi ber. Mannono en gin omio anyirawu yam timo tim me alaya, aterawu daŋ codo cot." 
Hosea4:14 Mom abino keto can i kom anyirawu, kadi bed gin otye ka timo tim me alaya, kadi i kom aterawu kadi bed gin tye mito co ocele; pien co daŋ opokere oko kun obedo gigi baŋ olaya, dok omio motgi me yalo Obaŋa karacel olaya me ot jogi. Rok ame mom i tam poto gire oko," 
Hosea4:15 Kadi bed yin Icrael ibedo alaya, cite kur Juda daŋ dok abal. Kur iwot wunu i Gilgal, kur daŋ iwot wunu i Bet-awen; kur daŋ ikwoŋ wunu ni “Acalo Rwot tye kwo-ni.”" 
Hosea4:16 Icrael calli roya ame aole; Rwot aman dok twero pitogi, acalo atin romo ame okwao kan alac?" 
Hosea4:17 Epraim doŋ oribere oko i cal jogi, wek en gire koŋ bedi!" 
Hosea4:18 Lwak jo ame omero, omiye gigi oko i tim me alaya, gin omaro gin a kelligi lewic akato kwogogi." 
Hosea4:19 Yamo gire tye oridogi oko i bwome, lewic bino makogi pi motgi ame oŋolo-nono." 
Hosea5:1 Wun olamdog, koŋ iwiny wunu. Wun jo ot Icrael, ketto wunu cunywu, Cik yitwu, wun jo ot abaka, Pien kop ame oŋolo otikowu, pien wun ibedo wunu kumma ame ociko i Micpa, kede boo ame oryeo i wi Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Gin otyeko kunyo bur atut i Cittim, ento an abino keto can i komgi luŋ." 
Hosea5:3 An aŋeo Epraim, Icrael daŋ mom okanne i baŋa; aco aman yin Epraim idoko alaya oko, Icrael daŋ doŋ olille gire oko." 
Hosea5:4 Timgi areco-nono mom yegi odwogo baŋ Obaŋagi; pien cuny me alaya doŋ tye i yigi, omio mom oŋeo Rwot." 
Hosea5:5 Wakere Icrael bedo caden i nyime; Epraim bino twomere pi ballere, Juda daŋ bino twomere kedgi." 
Hosea5:6 Gin bino wot i leyi me aŋola, pi yenyo Rwot, cite mom obino nwoŋe, en doŋ oya oko i baŋgi." 
Hosea5:7 Gin mom obedo ogen baŋ Rwot, pien onywalo itinogi i jo ocele. Aman doŋ por dwe abino rweyogi oko gin karacel kede pottigi." 
Hosea5:8 Kut wunu bile i Gibea, kede opel i Rama. Kuk wunu duru i Bet-awen; wan olubi yin Benjamin!" 
Hosea5:9 Epraim bino doko wi obur, i nino me keto can i kome; amio kop ame abino timere atenini, oneye i atekere Icrael." 
Hosea5:10 Oloc me Juda odoko calo jo ame kobo gweŋ i wan apokki, abino coro akemona i komgi calo pii." 
Hosea5:11 Epraim doŋ odiogi meicel, mom oŋolo kop kakare, pien oketo cunygi i lubo gin a konyere mom." 
Hosea5:12 Cite an anaŋo ot Epraim bala nyenye atuco ot a Juda bala lut. 
Hosea5:13 Kare ame Epraim oneno two mere, eka Juda te neno waŋ burrere, omio Epraim owoto Acuria, te cwayo kwena baŋ abaka adit cite en gire mom ocaŋowu, kadi caŋo burwu." 
Hosea5:14 Ateni an acalo eŋatu baŋ Epraim, kede atin eŋatu baŋ Juda, Kom an, an ikoma abino kikilo yin, ate wot oko, abino wayi ateri oko, ame dano moro mom bino lari," 
Hosea5:15 Abino dok gira i kabedona, tuno ka gin oniaŋ balgi ote yenyo waŋa, gin bino yenya meicel i cangi." 
Hosea6:1 Biye wunu, odok wunu cen baŋ Rwot; pien en gire okikilowa, daŋ bino caŋowa; en daŋ gire opwodowa, daŋ bino tweyo waŋ burwa." 
Hosea6:2 I ŋe nino aryo en bino cerowa, i nino me adekkere en bino miyowa ocuŋ oko, me obed kwo i nyime." 
Hosea6:3 Oŋe wunu Rwot, oketto wunu cunywa i ŋeye; dwogo mere ate ni, calo ru piny a mom lokere; en bino baŋwa calo kot, acalo kot me cwir ame bino i lobo." 
Hosea6:4 Abino timi kara nadi, yin Epraim? Abino timi kara nadi, yin Juda? Marwu kom calli pol me odiko, calli toyo a mom niaŋ ony." 
Hosea6:5 Mannono omio amio odwarpiny owaŋogi oko, anekogi oko i kop me doga; kop ame aŋolo menyo piny," 
Hosea6:6 An amito gira mar a mom lokere, mom mot oŋolo me yalla, kede ŋeyo Obaŋa, mom mot awaŋa alutu me yalo Obaŋa" 
Hosea6:7 Ento gin oturo cikere calo Adam, gin otimo gin a mom atira i koma kuno," 
Hosea6:8 Gilead obedo boma ame otim tim areco dwoŋ iye, kan a tyen jo onyono luŋ, remo keken," 
Hosea6:9 Calo oyak ame libo dano, olamdog daŋ cokere karacel amannono; gin oneko jo i yo ame woto i Cekem, timgi-nono rac meicel." 
Hosea6:10 Aneno ginnoro iyiliyili meicel, i ot woro Obaŋa a jo Icrael; tim Epraim me alaya tye kuno, aco Icrael doŋ olille oko." 
Hosea6:11 Yin Juda daŋ, kare me kac doŋ onyuto oko." 
Hosea7:1 I kare ame dok abino miyo jona gum aber, i kare ame amito caŋo Icrael, bal Epraim te nen oko, kede tim areco a jo Camaria otimo. Pien gin obwolo jo, akwo turo ot, oyak jo, yako jo iyo." 
Hosea7:2 Cite mom daŋ oparo gigi ni an apo pi timgi areco luŋ. Timgi doŋ am an ogurogi dyere, tye daŋ doŋ i nyima." 
Hosea7:3 Gin oyomoro cuny abaka i timgi areco, oyomoro daŋ cuny oloc i gobagi." 
Hosea7:4 Gin luŋ ocodo cot, gin rom kom i keno alyet, ame ated ogati mere mom dok yiko mac iye, cakere a en orubo tobi kede moko tuno waŋ oyenyo, te kwot." 
Hosea7:5 I nino abakawa, lyeto me koŋo olok omio oloc luŋ otwoye, abaka te ryeyo bade karacel i wegi ayet." 
Hosea7:6 Pien yigi bedo alyet calo keno, pi kop a gin aporo; akemogi bedo mimira dyewor benebene, eka odiko te lyel malo calo mac arum." 
Hosea7:7 Gin luŋ doŋ olyet calo keno, orweo olocgi oko. Obakkigi luŋ oto oko, cite mom tye ŋattoro i akinagi a kok baŋa." 
Hosea7:8 Epraim doŋ orubere oko i akina orok; Epraim doŋ olokere calo capat a mom oloko. 
Hosea7:9 Rok ocele camo tekogi, cite en gire mom ŋeo; kadi lwar atar kwaŋ i wie, en gire mom ŋeo." 
Hosea7:10 Wakere Icrael en a nyuto ballere; cite gin gigi mom odwogo baŋ Rwot Obaŋagi, kadi yenye, kadi bed can man luŋ opoto i komgi." 
Hosea7:11 Epraim cal kede amam, miŋ, wiegu mom tio; aman okok baŋ Miciri, olunyo wot i Acuria." 
Hosea7:12 I yo moro luŋ a gin olokere iye, abino ciko boona me makogi, abino retogi piny calo winnyi a twarre; abino pwodogi pi timgi areco." 
Hosea7:13 Gin bino neno can, pien gin oya oko i baŋa, myero rwegi oko, pien gin ojem i koma! Kadi bed amito lakorogi cite gin okobo kop goba i koma." 
Hosea7:14 Ka gin okok baŋa, nwoŋo cunygi mom iye, gin cur gigi i koko i wi tandagi, oŋoŋolo komgi kengi i pala pi kal kede koŋo olok, kun ojem i koma," 
Hosea7:15 Kadi bed apwonyo badgi, amiogi obedo atek, cite gin gigi oyiko ka kop arac me atima i koma," 
Hosea7:16 Gin olunyo lokere dok baŋ Baal; gin rom aroma atero a celo piny nono, Olocgi bino to i pala lweny, pi lebgi adwir i ceno jo, Man bino miyo ocaogi i lobo Miciri." 
Hosea8:1 Kut bilo! Pien acut tye malo i wi ot a Rwot acil; en tye kuno pien gin oturo cikkerena, ojem daŋ i cikka," 
Hosea8:2 Gin oredo i koko baŋa ni, “Yin Obaŋawa, wan jo Icrael oŋei.”" 
Hosea8:3 Pien Icrael doŋ obolo gin aber oko, okwor bino ryemo yore." 
Hosea8:4 Gin oketo obakkigi aboŋo twerra, karacel kede oloc daŋ kun an mom aŋeo, Gin otio pirgi kengi cal jogi me ryalgi kede me jabugi, timgi-nono bino kelligi to," 
Hosea8:5 Yia dag atin twonni yin Camaria. Atye i twon akemo meicel i komgi. Bino kara ri kare a rom mene, jo Icrael te bedo doŋ aboŋo bal?" 
Hosea8:6 Pien ati tic ciŋ gire en otio; mom gire Obaŋa, atin twon me Camaria obino ŋiŋinyo oko." 
Hosea8:7 Pien gin ocoo yamo, ote kayo ajuru. Kal okwero ŋok oko i poto, moko mom aya iye, dok akadi kono onwoŋo onen, orok kono otyeko oko luŋ." 
Hosea8:8 Doŋ omwonyo Icrael gire oko, aman doŋ gin tye i akina orok, calo ginnoro a mom dok omito." 
Hosea8:9 Pien Icrael woto kede i Acuria, calo kana me tim ame woto kene; Epraim owilo owote mere awila." 
Hosea8:10 Kadi gin owot wilo jo i akina orok, abino dwoggogi cen oyotoyot. Mano bino miyo koŋ oweko onyo moo i wi obakkigi kede olocgi pi kare moro anonok." 
Hosea8:11 Pien jo Epraim otimo bal pi gero keno lam apol, omio keno lamgi-nogo odoko gin a terogi i bal," 
Hosea8:12 Aco kono acoo cikka tutumia apar twal pirgi, gin oneno gigi acalo gin a welo." 
Hosea8:13 Gin omedde gigi ameda me ŋolla leyi, ote camo gigi riŋo mere, cite cuny Rwot mom yom komgi. Aman doŋ Rwot bino po timgi areco, bino keto can i komgi pi balgi. Gin bino dok i Miciri." 
Hosea8:14 Pien Icrael wie doŋ owil oko i kom ŋat ocwee, eka te lunyo gero udi adoŋo; aco Juda te gero boma apol ame oguguro i cel; ento abino bolo mac i boma mege-nono, maccono bino waŋo udi mere adoŋo oko." 
Hosea9:1 Kur ilel ba, yin Icrael! yii kur bed yom calo rok ocele: pien yin iweko Obaŋani ite doko alaya, imaro gin oculi kede me bedo alaya, i laro luŋ me dino bel." 
Hosea9:2 Laro me dino bel kede bur koŋo olok, mom bino ya iye cem kede koŋo a romo pitogi, koŋo olok anyen bino remogi." 
Hosea9:3 Gin mom bino bedo i lobo a Rwot: ento Epraim bino dok i Miciri, gin obino camo cam a cik ogeŋo i Acuria." 
Hosea9:4 Mom obino onyo koŋo olok me yalo Rwot akadi yomoro cunye i gin ame gin ŋolo me yale. Camgi bino calo mea jo a kwero cola, ame bino balo jo luŋ ame camo pien camgi-nono bino bedo me juko kec keken, mom myero kel i ot a Rwot." 
Hosea9:5 Ibino timo wunu ŋo i nino me ecuban ociko pire, kede i nino me ecuban a Rwot?" 
Hosea9:6 Nen koŋ! Ka gin oriŋo oko i lobo ame okwor obalo, jo Miciri bino gamogi, Mempic bino bedo lyel me yikogi, Jamigi me ryal a yomoro cunygi, doo bino mayo oko, okuto bino tu i udigi." 
Hosea9:7 Kare me keto can doŋ obino oko, kare me culo bal doŋ obino; Icrael obino dwoko oko piny. Adwarpiny bino nen calo dano amiŋ, dano a tye i cuny Obaŋa bino nen bala opo oko, pi balwu kede adagewu ame dwoŋ meicel." 
Hosea9:8 Epraim libo jo Obaŋana, adwarpiny tye i yogi luŋ calo kumma, adage tye naka i ot Obaŋagi." 
Hosea9:9 Gin doŋ odonyo i bal okato kare oko, calo kare me Gibea. En bino poyo timgi areco, bino keto can i komgi pi balgi." 
Hosea9:10 Kare ame rik anwoŋo Icrael, rik kom calo ŋat ocop i kom olok i dye tim, Kare ame aneno kwariwu, rik kom calo aneno oduro anyen, ame pwod ogeo cek aceka. Ento gin rik ote wot i Baal-peor, ote miye kengi baŋ cal jok; omio gin odoko gin a me yi jo okwero, a rom aroma i gin a gin omaro." 
Hosea9:11 Kwogo Epraim bino ket oko, calo winy ame otwarre, pien mom dok obino nywal, kadi yac onyo gamo," 
Hosea9:12 Kadi bed gin pit itinogi, abino tyekogi oko luŋ ame moro mom doŋ. Gin bino neno can meicel, ka abino ya oko i baŋgi!" 
Hosea9:13 Aco itino Epraim kite aneno kede, obino neko calo leyi; Epraim bino cwayo itino mere me aneka." 
Hosea9:14 Migi ba, ama Rwot, gin aŋo kara ame ibino miyogi? Mi yigi bed ony aonya, dok tunogi daŋ two atwoa," 
Hosea9:15 Racgi luŋ aluŋa tye i Gilgal, cunya ogeo kwerogi i kuno, Pi gin ame gin obedo timo areco, abino ryemogi gira oko i oda. Mom dok abino marogi kadi acel; olocgi luŋ obedo jo ojem." 
Hosea9:16 Epraim rom i yat a doŋ oreto oko piny, lwite-gu daŋ doŋ oner oko, mom doŋ bino nyako nyige moro. Kadi bed gin nywal, abino neko itinogi ame omaro oko," 
Hosea9:17 Obaŋana bino bologi oko, pien gin okwero winyo koppere oko; gin bino bedo jo ame roroŋa akina orok." 
Hosea10:1 Icrael obedo calo olok ame nyak amwonya meicel, ame nyige cek meicel. Ka nyige omedo nyak atek, gin daŋ medo cano keno lamgi apol apola; ka lobo mere omedde bedo aber, gin daŋ omedo yiko kiddigi me awora bedo abeco." 
Hosea10:2 Cunygi tye opoŋ i goba; aman gin doŋ myero nen can pi balgi. Rwot ikome en a doŋ bino mumuko keno lamgi-nono dok en daŋ bino reto kiddigi oko ame gin ocibo me awora. 
Hosea10:3 Aman doŋ gin myero kob ni, “Abakawa gire pe, pien wan giwa mom olworo Rwot, kara abaka doŋ twero timo ŋo pirwa?”" 
Hosea10:4 Gin kom oduro doggi nono, ocikere i kwoŋŋogo me nono. Mannono gire miyo ŋolo kop durre adura, calo yat ame neko jo ame tu i poto ame opuro." 
Hosea10:5 Jo ame bedo i Camaria komgi myel, pi atin twon me Bet-awen. Jo mere bino kumo pire olamdoggere ame woro cal jokkono bino koke, pi kwogo mere ame oya oko baŋe." 
Hosea10:6 Obino gire tero oko i Acuria, me mot baŋ abaka adwoŋ. Obino miyo lewic mako Epraim, aco Icrael lewic bino mako pi cal jokkere." 
Hosea10:7 Abaka me Camaria bino gire rwenyo oko bala dul yat ame alelea i wi pii. 
Hosea10:8 Ka woro Obaŋa a tye i wi kidi me Awen, obino gire rwenyo oko kan ame Icrael timo bal iye. Okuto kede ocokocok bino tu i wi keno lamgi, gin bino kobbi kiddi adoŋo ni, “Wumwa wunu” kede kiddi atino ni, “Rette wunu i komwa.”" 
Hosea10:9 Yin Icrael ibedo bal cakere i kare me Gibea; cakere i kuno gin obedo medde ameda iye. Mony mom bino cobogi i Gibea kuno? 
Hosea10:10 An doŋ abino me pwodogi; orok bino cokere karacel komgi i kare ame apwodogi pi balgi aryo. 
Hosea10:11 Epraim calo roya ame opwonyo, ame maro dino bel, cite an aketo lodi i ŋute aber-ri. Aketo Epraim i waya kweri, Juda myero pur gire, Yakobo myero lok poto mere kene." 
Hosea10:12 Koti icoyo wunu myero bed tim me kite atira, eka adwoggi mere te bedo mar a mom lokere. Pur wunu poto anyen, pien man kare me yenyo Rwot, me en bin mi larre cwe i komwu bala kot." 
Hosea10:13 Rik ipuro wunu bal, omio ikao wunu kite a mom atira, icamo wunu adwoggi me bedo ogoba. Pien yin ibedo geno gadigadi me lwennyi, kede olwennyi ame tye ecipan," 
Hosea10:14 pi mannono, woo lweny bino ya i akina joni, ot ame tye i cel atek obino mumuko oko, calo kite a rik Calam omuko kede Bet-arbel i nino me mony, totti itino rik oŋiŋinyo oko atitino aracel itinogi." 
Hosea10:15 Mannono kite ame obino timowu kede, wun jo Icrael pi twon balwu areco meicel. Ka piny oru, abaka me Icrael obino neko oko." 
Hosea11:1 Kare ame Icrael pwod atin, amare, rik alwoŋo woda i ya i Miciri." 
Hosea11:2 Ento kare luŋ ame amedde lwoŋogi, gin medde jer ajera teŋe i baŋa; obedo gigi ŋolo leyi me yalo Baal, kun daŋ owaŋo odok akur baŋ cal jogi." 
Hosea11:3 Aco kono an en a rik apwonyo Epraim kede wot, rik atiŋogi kom i kora; cite gin gigi mom oŋeo ni an a rik acaŋogi." 
Hosea11:4 Rik abedo telogi i tol a dano, karacel kede tol me mar rik an arom i ŋat okwanyo tol doggi, dok daŋ aryebere piny ate keto cam i nyimgi." 
Hosea11:5 Gin bino dok cen i Miciri, Acuria en abino lunyo bedo abakagi, pien gin okwero dwogo baŋa." 
Hosea11:6 Pala lweny bino meny i bomagi luŋ, bino rweyo lodi me dogcelgi oko, dok daŋ bino nenekogi i celginogo." 
Hosea11:7 Jona doŋ omoko tamgi me ya oko i baŋa, pi mannono obino ketogi oko i kol, mom tye ŋattoro a dok bino kwanyogi," 
Hosea11:8 Atwero weki niŋo, yin Epraim? Atwero miyi dok baŋ ŋa, yin Icrael? Atwero miyi idoko calo Adma yore aŋo? Atwero tic kedi calo Cebim yore aŋo? Aloko doŋ cunya oko, awinyo doŋ ni atye i mar i cunya." 
Hosea11:9 Mom doŋ abino miyo akemona loa, mom dok abino medde rweyo jo Epraim, pien an abedo Obaŋa, mom a dano, an a Ŋat Acil i akinawu, mom abino bino me nekowu." 
Hosea11:10 Gin bino lubo yo Rwot, en bino mor calo eŋatu; ee ta, en bino mor gire, itino mere bino bino i tuŋ to kun komgi amyel amyela;" 
Hosea11:11 gin bino kun oya i Miciri ame komgi amyel amyela calo winy, dok daŋ acalo amam kun oya i Acuria, an abino dwokogi i pacogi, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Hosea11:12 Epraim doŋ ogura dyere i goba mere, aco ot Icrael bedo bwola abwola. Ento Juda, Obaŋa gire pwod ŋeo, en gire geno Ŋat Acil." 
Hosea12:1 Epraim dyegi, kwao yamo akaka dyegi, rio ryemo yo yamo dyeceŋ benebene; ticgi nyayo goba kede tim me byemi; gin ocikere i jo Acuria, dok otero-gu msoo i Miciri." 
Hosea12:2 Rwot tye i kop i kom Juda, en bino keto can i kom Yakobo a rom aroma i kite mere dok daŋ bino cule a rom i timere." 
Hosea12:3 Kare a en tye i yic, omako opuny tyen ominnere, kare a doŋ otego, oromo Obaŋa." 
Hosea12:4 Oromo amalaika, te loyo, obako doge baŋ amalaika i pig waŋe. Orwatte Obaŋa i Betel, Obaŋa te kop kede kuno," 
Hosea12:5 Rwot Obaŋa me mony, nyiŋe olwoŋo ni Rwot." 
Hosea12:6 “Pi mannono, yin daŋ dwogi, Obaŋani tye akonyi, lid mar kede ŋolo kop atira atek, kun ikuro Obaŋani kare luŋ.”" 
Hosea12:7 En acat-wil ame tye i mijan me cero jo i ciŋe, en maro wuno jo." 
Hosea12:8 Epraim okobo ni, “Nen an gira alonyo, anwoŋo limma gira i wia;” cite lonyo mere mom gire romo culo ballere ame ebalo." 
Hosea12:9 An a Rwot Obaŋani, cakere i lobo Miciri; abino miyi dok ibedo i kema, acalo i kare me kwero ecuban ociko pire." 
Hosea12:10 Rik akobo baŋ odwarpiny, an ame daŋ rik amio gigi mogo me anyut onya dok amiowu daŋ carakop kun amio baŋ odwarpiny," 
Hosea12:11 Ka ce balloro tye i Gilead, gin gire bino tum oko luŋ; ka ce gin yalo Obaŋa i twoni Gilead, keno lamgi bino doko calo gweŋe ococoko karacel i poto ame opuro." 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo rik oŋweco oko i lobo me Aram, Icrael otio tic kuno pi nwoŋo dako, en okwao romi wek enwoŋ dako." 
Hosea12:13 Rwot rik omio adwarpiny okwanyo Yakobo oko i Miciri, omio adwarpiny ogwoke." 
Hosea12:14 Epraim doŋ oroke atek meicel, pi mannono, Rwot mere bino weko remo me ballere i wie acae mere luŋ daŋ obino dwoko i wie." 
Hosea13:1 Epraim ka rik okobo, kom jo myel amyela; Epraim rik dit atek iyi Icrael; ento en okelo bal i kome pi Baal, te to oko." 
Hosea13:2 Aman balgi doŋ tye amedde ameda, dok otye ka twatwako callogo pirgi kengi, kede cal jogi me ryalgi ame otio diro, magi-nono luŋ aluŋa obedo tic otet. Gin okobo ni, “Yal wunu cal jogi magi.” Jo nonoto kom twon otwako." 
Hosea13:3 Pi mannono gin bino bedo calli ekuna me odiko calo toyo a ru ony oyotoyot, calo cuŋ kal ame yamo atek kolo oko i laro, onyo yito ame duny wan dirica." 
Hosea13:4 An a Rwot Obaŋani, cakere i lobo Miciri; mom tye Obaŋa moro ocele ame iŋeo, kono an keken, alarroro ocele mom dok tye, kono an keken," 
Hosea13:5 An en a rik aŋeowu i tim, i lobo ame can pii dwoŋ iye." 
Hosea13:6 Cite i kare ame gin ocemo te yeŋ, gin oyeŋ, ote ero yeyea i cunygi, mano te miyo wigi doŋ wil oko i koma." 
Hosea13:7 An rik arom i eŋatu baŋgi, calo kwac ame kiogi i ŋet yo." 
Hosea13:8 Abino ŋolle i komgi calo ŋu ager ame oneko itino mere, abino yeco korgi dado oko, abino mwodogi kuno calo eŋatu, kite a lee tim kikilogi kede." 
Hosea13:9 Aco yin Icrael, abino rweyi oko luŋ aluŋa; ŋa kara a twero lari?" 
Hosea13:10 Kara abakani tye atimo no? Koŋ elari ba kede jo me bomani luŋ. Kara oloc-ci kono tye atimo ŋo, ame ipenyo pirgi ni, “Mia abaka kede oloc?”" 
Hosea13:11 Rik ami abaka kun cunya mom yom, ate daŋ dok kwanye oko kun atye akemo." 
Hosea13:12 Tim Epraim areco luŋ ocoo oko piny, ballere luŋ tye okano," 
Hosea13:13 Rem acalo me nywal tye abino pire, cite en obedo atin amiŋ; Pien aman en mom tye otikere i yo nyodo." 
Hosea13:14 Myero alargi i twer a Ceol? Myero alakorogi i baŋ To? Yin To wee, edeke-ni kara tye kwene? Yin Ceol, can-ni kara tye kwene? Mom doŋ atye i kica moro i cunya." 
Hosea13:15 Kadi bed en nya atek calo ogada, yamo oro ame Rwot ocwao, bino bino kun oya i tim, waŋ pii mere akukunya bino two oko, akoŋŋere daŋ bino dwono oko; en bino mayo jami mere luŋ a yomoro cunye, ame yam en okano." 
Hosea13:16 Camaria bino neno can pi ballere, pien en ojem i kom Obaŋa mere; pala lweny en abino nekogi itinogi obino teteŋo piny, te ŋiŋida atitino, mongi ayac obino ryeryeko yigi oko." 
Hosea14:1 Yin Icrael, dok baŋ Rwot Obaŋani, pien doŋ igatte iyo-ni areco-nono." 
Hosea14:2 Wot wunu i kop me dogwu, idok wunu baŋ Rwot, wot ikobbe wunu ni, “Kwany balwa luŋ oko, me igam motwa aber, me okelli kop oya i dogwa." 
Hosea14:3 Acuria gire mom bino larowa, mom obino riŋo aguragura; mom dok obino kobo ni, ‘Obaŋawa’, baŋ gin ame wan otio i ciŋwa. Atin kic nwoŋo kica i baŋi.”" 
Hosea14:4 Abino miyo iyeegi agoro doko atek abino marogi pi ber a yia, pien akemona i komgi dok okwe oko." 
Hosea14:5 Abino doŋ bedo calo toyo baŋ jo Icrael; en bino turo calo kalaŋweka bino cwalo lwite piny calo Lebanon. 
Hosea14:6 Bino lot, te jany, berrere bino bedo calo me jeituni, eka ŋwece te bedo akur bala Lebanon." 
Hosea14:7 Jo ame bedo i tipo mere bino dwogo, bino nya meicel calo kal, bino turo calo olok, ŋwecgi bino bedo akur calo koŋo olok me Lebanon." 
Hosea14:8 Epraim wee! Kara cal jogi pwod konyi kede ŋo? An keken en ame abino gamo doge, dok daŋ agwoki. Abedo calo yat cipre ame pote mom ner, an en ame amii nyak." 
Hosea14:9 Ŋat ame ryek bino niaŋs jami magi; ka ce tamere tye, en bino ŋeyogi; pien yo a Rwot luŋ tye atira, jo a kitegi atira woto iye, cite obalo bedo twomere iye atwoma." 
Joel1:1 Kop a Rwot rik obino baŋ Joel wot Petuel. Wun jo oteggo winy wunu man ba, ciku yitwu, wun jo a bedo i lobo luŋ!" 
Joel1:2 Kodi gin acalo mannono yam koŋ onen i karewu, onyo i kare a kwarowu?" 
Joel1:3 Rab wunu pire baŋ itinowu, me itinowu daŋ rab pire baŋ itinogi, dok itinogi daŋ rab pire baŋ jo a lubogi," 
Joel1:4 Gin ame bonyo ogaŋgaji oweko odoŋ, bonyo ame olwoŋo ni acaocao ocamo oko; gin ame ocaocao oweko odoŋ, bonyo akolokwac ocamo oko; gin ame akolokwac oweko odoŋ, bonyo aluluk ocamo oko." 
Joel1:5 Wun jo amer i koŋo akec, co wunu, me ikok wunu, kuk wunu duru, wun jo luŋ ame mato koŋo, pien koŋo alim oŋolo oko i dogwu ame mom ru ibilo wunu." 
Joel1:6 Pien mony doŋ obino oko me lweny i kom lobona, mony atek a mom kwanne; lakgi cal i lak eŋatu, lakgi bocoboco calo mea min eŋatu." 
Joel1:7 Gin obalo olokka oko, odurona daŋ oŋiŋinyo oko; gin opapaco pokgi obalo oko; jaŋgi doŋ tar kia." 
Joel1:8 Kok bala nyako oruko boŋo co la, ame koko awottere a pwod onyomere kede anyoma." 
Joel1:9 Mot me moko kwon kede me amata me ya lo Obaŋa, gin luŋ oŋolo oko i ot a Rwot. Olamdog, ame gin otic a Rwot, tye akumo." 
Joel1:10 Potti doŋ yigi nono, lobo tye akumo aku ma, pien obalo kai oko, koŋo daŋ mom doŋ nen, moo daŋ doŋ mom," 
Joel1:11 Idoko wunu ababaŋ, wun opur, kuk wunu duru ba, wun ogwok olok, pi kai kede cayiri; pien cam doŋ oweo oko i potti." 
Joel1:12 Olok luŋ doŋ onen oko, oduro daŋ oballe gire oko, okwer, otit acama kede amalera, yen i potti luŋ oner gire oko; ginnoro luŋ amio dano yomcuny mom tye." 
Joel1:13 Wun olamdog, ruk wunu boŋo cola, ikok wunu, kuk wunu duru, wun otic i ke no lam. Biye wunu, ibut wunu i boŋo co la, wun otic Obaŋa, pien mot me moko kwon kede mot amata me yalo Obaŋa, gin luŋ mom doŋ nen i ot Obaŋawu." 
Joel1:14 Kwer wunu kare me kanyo kec ba! Lwoŋ wunu cokere adwoŋ ba! Cok wunu odoŋe luŋ, jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo, me gin bin i ot a Rwot Obaŋawu; me ikok wunu baŋ Rwot." 
Joel1:15 Oii, nino-ni doi! Pien nino a Rwot doŋ ceggi acega, bino a cal i to a piny luŋ aluŋa, ame oya ibaŋ Won Twer Ducu." 
Joel1:16 Nen, camwa obalo oko, kun wan one no, yomcuny kede lelo, gin luŋ doŋ orwenyo oko ot Obaŋawa." 
Joel1:17 Koti otuŋ gigi i dog lobo, yi twayi doŋ bedo nono aboŋo ginnoro, dero daŋ doŋ oballe oko, pien kai mom ocek." 
Joel1:18 Kite a leyi doŋ tye akokoka kede! Dok daŋ loloŋo piny aboŋo weo, pien ka kwayogi doŋ mom tye; anaka rommi doŋ ojony oko ikokoro," 
Joel1:19 Akok baŋi, yin Rwot, pien mac doŋ owaŋo elet me kwat oko, leb mac doŋ oweo yen luŋ a tye i tim." 
Joel1:20 Anaka leyi me tim daŋ kok baŋi, pien kulli me pie luŋ odwoŋo oko, dok mac doŋ owaŋo elet me kwayogi oko." 
Joel2:1 Kut wunu bilo i Cion, kuk wunu duru i wi kidina! Jo luŋ a bedo i lobo myero komgi myel, pien nino a Rwot doŋ ceggi acega." 
Joel2:2 Nino-nono gire colpiny ame col icuc, nino mere nino me pol kede mutu acol icuc. Mony adwoŋ dok atek meicel, obino ame omwono wi kidi bala colpiny; moro mom ru koŋ onen acalo ennono, dok daŋ mom gire bino nen atwal, i kwo a jo me kare luŋ ame bino lubowa." 
Joel2:3 Tuŋ nyim, mac tye anaŋo tim oko, aco tuŋ negi leb mac tye atwoyo oko. Aco lobo ame tye tuŋ nyimgi calo poto Eden, aco tuŋ negi calo tim odoŋ nono, ginnoro obwot baŋgi mom tye." 
Joel2:4 Gin onen calo aguragura, orino daŋ calo aguragura me lweny." 
Joel2:5 Gin opyepyea i wi kidi malo, morgi calo aguragura me romo, dok daŋ calo mor a leb mac, ame cal i rok atek meicel, ame oterre oko pi lweny." 
Joel2:6 I nyimgi, rok luŋ koyo doŋ oonyere oko i komgi, waŋ jo luŋ doŋ oballe oko." 
Joel2:7 Omwomere i ŋwec calo olweny atek meicel, oyito i wi cel calo cirikale. Ŋat acel acel kwanyo yo mere kene, kun mom dok gak i yo moro ocele." 
Joel2:8 Ŋattoro gire mom twomere awottere, ŋat acel acel woto i yo mere kene. Gin ocoro jami luŋ ame obaogi kede, mom ocuŋ gigi." 
Joel2:9 Omwomere i boma, oŋweco i wi cel, oyito i wi udi, odonyo i wan dirica calo okwo," 
Joel2:10 Ka gin awot lo bo yenere, polo daŋ yeyena. Ceŋ kede dwe doko acol icuc, acer daŋ mom dok ryeny, Dwoŋ Rwot" 
Joel2:11 mwoc winnyere nyim monnyere; monnyere tek nadi! Ŋat ame cobo kop ame en kobo, tek meicel. Pien nino a Rwot dit, dok daŋ onyo koyo i kom jo; ŋa kara a twero kanyo?" 
Joel2:12 “Kadi bed aman”, man kop a Rwot oko bo, “dwog wunu baŋa i cunywu luŋ, kun ikanyo wunu kec, ikok wunu, dok daŋ ikumo wunu; yec wunu cunywu, ento mom boŋowu.”" 
Joel2:13 Dwog wunu baŋ Rwot Obaŋawu, pien en gire akica dok daŋ atim jo ber, akemo mom make oyotoyot, marrere mom lokere gire, dok juko cunye oko i timo rac, ŋa kara a" 
Joel2:14 ŋeo ka ee mom dok bi no lokere, juko cunye, te weko gum doŋ i ŋee, mot me moko kwon kede me ama ta me yalo Rwot Obaŋawu?" 
Joel2:15 Kut wunu bilo i Cion! Kwer wunu kare me kanyo kec ba! Lwoŋ wunu cokere adwoŋ ba! 
Joel2:16 Cok wunu jo luŋ karacel. Mi wunu lwak lonyere oko ba! Cok wunu odone karacel ba! Kel wunu iti no atino, anaka itino a pwod tye i kor totogi. Anyom myero donnyo oko i ode, atera ya oko iyi ici ka mere." 
Joel2:17 Wek wunu olamdog ame gin otic Obaŋa koki, iyi akina gul me doggola kede keno lam, kun oko bo ni, “Rwot, tim joni kica ba, kur imi nyin joni dok me ciŋa i akina Orok. Pino kara rok ocele myero kob ni, ‘Obaŋagi kara tye kwene?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Omio nyeko te mako Rwot pi lobo mere kica te make i kom jo mere. 
Joel2:19 Rwot te dokki jo mere ni, “Nen acwayiwu kal, koŋo olok kede moo, bino miyo doŋ iyen wunu. Mom dok abino miyi idoko gi-ayeta i akina orok." 
Joel2:20 “Abino cwayo jo i tutun anyarodi i rjetwu tene kannabor, abino ryemogi oko i tim otwo, odoŋ nono; tuŋ nyimgi bino neno nam me tun kide, ŋegi bino neno nam me tuŋ to; ŋwec komgi otop bino kuto, pien gin otimo timmogo adoŋodoŋo." 
Joel2:21 “Kur ibed ilworo, yin lobo; bed i yomcuny kede lelo, pien Rwot doŋ otimo tim adoŋodoŋo." 
Joel2:22 Kur ibed wunu i lworo wun leyi me tim, pien lum anyen doŋ oradde ata i elet; yen doŋ tye anyak, oduro kede olok doŋ onyak amwonya meicel." 
Joel2:23 “Cunywu bed yom, wun jo me Cion, let wunu i Rwot Obaŋawu; pien ocwayiwu kot me cwir i kare mere i kome; omio kot ocwe adwoŋ meicel omio kot me cwir kede kot icennere, bala kot a rik con." 
Joel2:24 “Laro bino poŋ i kal me adina, bur koŋo kede me moo bino poŋ kwic." 
Joel2:25 Abino culo wan mwakki luŋ ame bonyo ocamo, acaocao, akolokwac, aluluk kede ogaŋgaji, twon monnyoro adwoŋ ame rik ocwao i akinawu." 
Joel2:26 “Ibino wunu camo kit cam luŋ, ame imito wunu ite yen wunu, ite doŋ pako wunu nyin Rwot Obaŋawu, ame otio gin awura baŋwu, Lewic mom bino mako jona." 
Joel2:27 Ibino ŋeyo wunu ni an kara at ye i Icrael, dok daŋ ni an a Rwot Obaŋawu, mom dok tye moro ocele. Lewic mom bino ma ko jona." 
Joel2:28 “Icennere abino coro Cuny Acil i kom jo luŋ; itinowu awobe kede anyira bino doko odwarpiny, jowu oteggo bi no le ko lek, awobewu adoŋo bino neno anyut." 
Joel2:29 I kare-nono abino coro Cuny Acil anaka i kom omirona a co kede a mon. 
Joel2:30 “Abino nyuto tano i polo kede i lobo, remo kede mac kede ekuna aduny bala yito." 
Joel2:31 Ceŋ bino cido acol icuc, dwe bino lokere doko remo, a mom ru nino a Rwot otuno, nino a Rwot dwoŋ dok daŋ iyiliyili meicel." 
Joel2:32 Icennere jo ducu ame bino lwoŋo nyin Rwot, obino larre; pien i wi kidi me Ci on kede i Jerucalem, jo obwot bino bedo kuno, acalo Rwot okobo, dok i akina jo odoŋ, bino bedo iye jo a Rwot olwoŋo." 
Joel3:1 “Pien nen, i nino-nono, i karenaca, ame abino dok miyo jo a Juda kede Jerucalem gum aber," 
Joel3:2 abino coko rok ocele luŋ akelogi i luŋ me Yekocafat. Abino pidigi kuno pi jona Icrael, ame gin mega, pien okeketogi atata i akina Orok, kun opoko daŋ lobona oko," 
Joel3:3 Obolo-gu kwir pi jona, awobi oloko kede alaya, aco nyako owilo kom i koŋo keken, ote mato gigi." 
Joel3:4 “Wun jo Tura kede jo Cidon, kede jo luŋ me Piriciti, wun kara ino wunu tuŋ baŋa? Ka ee tye ginnoro ame iculla wunu, an abino dwoko i wiwu timwu luŋ oyotoyot, dok daŋ piopio," 
Joel3:5 pien ikwanyo wunu ryalla kedejabuna, dok daŋ itero wunu jamina abeco, a pirgi litta, itero wunu i ot jogiwu." 
Joel3:6 Icato wunu Juda kede jo Jerucalem baŋ jo Grik, kun icwaogi wunu teŋe i waŋ lobogi." 
Joel3:7 Cite aman doŋ abino twarogi oya oko i kan ame icatogi wunu iye; abino dwoko gin ame itimo wunu i komgi i wiwu wun ikomwu. 
Joel3:8 Abino ca to anyirawu kede awobewu baŋ jo Juda, gin dok te catogi oko baŋ jo Ceba, ame gin rok ame tye kannabor; pien Rwot doŋ okobo.”" 
Joel3:9 Rab wunu kop man baŋ rok luŋ; yikere wunu pi lweny, cukoro wunu cuny jo atek meicel. Wek wunu jo me romo luŋ cokere karacel, me gin bin malo kano." 
Joel3:10 Tet wunu leb kweyi dyan odok pala me romo, kede pala ŋolo olok, odok toŋi; kadi ŋat agoro myero kob ni, “An atek.”" 
Joel3:11 Ru bi no wunu aceggi kan, wun rok luŋ omano kan, cokere wunu kenwu kuno. Cwa jo meri atek, ama Rwot." 
Joel3:12 Wek rok luŋ cokere kengi, me obin, oyito i luŋ me Yekocafat; pien abino bedo piny kuno me ŋolo kop, i kom rok luŋ omano kan." 
Joel3:13 Kwany wunu doŋ pala, pien cam doŋ ocek oko me akaa. Dony wunu iye, iwot inyon wunu, pien bur olok doŋ opoŋ oko. Abinni doŋ opon ame aony aonya, pien balgi dwoŋ meicel." 
Joel3:14 Lwak jo apipim doŋ ocokere i luŋ me moko tam! Pien nino a Rwot doŋ ceggi acega, i luŋ me moko tam," 
Joel3:15 Ceŋ kede dwe odoko col oko, acer daŋ doŋ okwero ryeny oko." 
Joel3:16 Dwoŋ Rwot mor i Cion, wi nyere i Jerucalem, polo kede lobo yenere, Ento i baŋ jo mere, Rwot en ka-larregi, en ka-bwot atek meicel baŋ jo Icrael." 
Joel3:17 “Mannono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni an a Rwot Obaŋawu, ame bedo i kidi acil me Cion. Jerucalem bino bedo acil. Orok mom dok bino bea iye." 
Joel3:18 “I nino-nono, koŋo alim bino mollo i kom kiddi, cak bi no mollo i wi tur ducu, pii bi no poŋ i kulli luŋ me Juda. Pii daŋ bino kukunya i ot a Rwot, te bido luŋ me Cittim." 
Joel3:19 Miciri bino doko wi obur, Edom bino doko tim odoŋ nono, pi kologi i kom Juda, pien gin oonyo remo a jo a mom i bal i kom lobogi-gu," 
Joel3:20 Aco i Juda, jo gire bino bedo iye nakanaka, Jerucalem daŋ obino bedo iye kare luŋ." 
Joel3:21 Abino culo kwor me remogi, mom obino weko jo ame obalo. Pien Rwot bedo i Cion.”" 
Amos1:1 Kop Amoc ame rik obedo dano acel i akina okwa-rommi me Tekoa, Kop a rik Obaŋa onyutte i kom jo Icrael i mwaka aryo ame lobo mom ru oyeŋere, i kare ame Ujjia onwoŋo abaka me Juda kede Yeroboam wot a Yoaci abaka me Icrael." 
Amos1:2 En okobo ni, “Rwot mor i Cion, dwone mor, winyere i Jerucalem; elet okwat bi no koko can, wi kiddi me Karmel bi no ner,”" 
Amos1:3 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Damaciko otimo bai apol, mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin odino Gilead kede nyonyo apek," 
Amos1:4 Pi mannono abino bolo mac i ot a Kajael, maccono bino waŋo udi adoŋo me Ben-adad oko," 
Amos1:5 Abino turo lodi dogcel me Damaciko oko, abino tyeko jo ame bedo i lobo me Awen oko, kede won abiro-loc me Bet-eden; aco jo Curia abino terogi i opii i Kir”, man kop a Rwot." 
Amos1:6 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Gaja otimo bai apol, mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin obelo rok acel luŋ, me wot miyogi i ciŋ jo Edom," 
Amos1:7 Pi mannono, abino bolo mac i cel me Gaja, maccono bino waŋo udi mere adoŋo oko," 
Amos1:8 Abino tyeko jo a bedo Acidod oko, kede won abiro loc me Acikelon abino dwoko ciŋa i kom Ekron, jo Piriciti odoŋŋere bino to ducu”, man kop a Rwot." 
Amos1:9 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Turo otimo bai apol, mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin omio rok acel luŋ baŋ jo Edom, kun mom opo gigi icikere me omego," 
Amos1:10 Abino bolo mac i cel me Turo, maccono bino waŋo udi mere adoŋo oko,”" 
Amos1:11 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Edom otimo bai apol; mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin oryemo omegogi i pala lweny, okwero kica gire ducu, cunygi bedo waŋ nakanaka, ogwoko inigagi at wal." 
Amos1:12 Abino bolo mac i kom Teman, maccono bi no waŋo udi me Bojra oko.”" 
Amos1:13 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Ammon otimo bai apol; mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin oryeko yi mon a yac me Gilead, pi medo waŋ lobogi kengi." 
Amos1:14 Abino mo ko mac i cel me Rabba, maccono bino waŋo udi mere adoŋo oko, nino-nono bino bedo woo me lweny, yamo ajuru bi no kodo atek meicel;" 
Amos1:15 abakagi obino tero oko iyi opii, en kede rwode mere karacel.” Man kop a Rwot." 
Amos2:1 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Moab otimo bai apol, mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin owaŋo cogo kom abaka me Edom, omio odoko buru." 
Amos2:2 Abino bolo mac i kom Moab, maccono bino waŋo udi adoŋo me Keriot oko; jo Moab bi no to i dye lweny a doŋ obaŋere oko, i akina woo kede koko me apel;" 
Amos2:3 abino kwanyo aloc oko i akinagi, abino nekogi karacel kede rwodegi ducu”, man kop a Rwot." 
Amos2:4 Rwot okobo ni, “Pien jo Juda otimo bal apol, mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin okwero cik a Rwot, mom ogwoko icwillere, jogi ame yam kwarigi oworo, orwenyogi oko i yo a Rwot." 
Amos2:5 “Abino bolo mac i Juda, maccono bino waŋo udi adoŋo me Jerucalem oko.”" 
Amos2:6 Rwot oko bo ni, “Pien jo Icrael otimo bal apol, mom doŋ abino kwanyo kop ame aŋolo i komgi; pien gin ocato dano a kite atira pi lim, kede dano a can orido atek pi amuk me tyen;" 
Amos2:7 gin onyono wi ocan piny iyi apua, ogeno jo a tye i can oko i yorgi; awobi kede pappere donyo baŋ nyako acel, me balo nyiŋa acil." 
Amos2:8 Gin obuto i ŋet keno ducu me lam, kom boŋŋi ame jo ojeŋo baŋgi; gin omato koŋo olok a jo ame otaŋo, i ot Obaŋagi." 
Amos2:9 “Aco koŋo an rik ajwero jo Amor oko i nyimgi, jo a rik odoŋo abocoboco bala yat cedar, jo a rik komgi tek bala opok; an rik ajwero nyiŋgi oko i malo, kede lwitgi a tye piny." 
Amos2:10 Dok rik akelowu ya i lobo me Miciri, atelowu i tim pi mwakki pyeraŋwen, me ile wunu lobo a jo Amor." 
Amos2:11 Rik daŋ amio jo oya i akina itinowu me bedo odwarpiny, jo akwera daŋ oya i akina awobewu. Mom tye amannono, wun jo Icrael?” Man kop a Rwotikokome." 
Amos2:12 “Ento wun imio wunu jo akwera omato koŋo, iciko wunu odwarpiny ni, ‘Kur rab kop Obaŋa.’" 
Amos2:13 Nen ba, abino diyowu piny i kabedowu, bala kite ame kal awidi dio kede gadigadi piny," 
Amos2:14 Ŋwec bino loyo lon adwir oko, lon atek, te ko mere bi no rwenyo oko i kome, twon lon atek, mom bi no laro kwo mere." 
Amos2:15 Amak akud atero mom bi na cun, lon a tyene dwir mom bino larre, kadi lon ariŋo aguragura daŋ mom bino laro kwo mere." 
Amos2:16 Lon a cunye nwaŋ i akina jo atek, bi no riŋo oko onoro i ninonaca”, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos3:1 Winy wunu kop ame Rwot okobo i komwu, wun jo Icrael, kom atekere luŋ ame rik okwanyo lobo me Miciri:" 
Amos3:2 “Wun keken en a doŋ aŋeowu, kom atekere luŋ ame tye i wi lobo; pi mannono, abino keto can komwu, pi balwu ducu." 
Amos3:3 Jo aryo twero nywako yo karacel, ka gin mom ocikere?" 
Amos3:4 Atin eŋatu twero kok i gorogoro mere, ka mom omako ginnoro?" 
Amos3:5 Winy twero moko i wi lobo, ka mom ociko i tol?" 
Amos3:6 Otwero kuku duru i boma, eka lworo mom le mako jo? Can twero poto i boma, ka Rwot mom en omio opoto?" 
Amos3:7 Rwot Obaŋa mom twero limo ginnoro, ka mom onyuto muŋŋere baŋ omiro mere odwarpiny." 
Amos3:8 Eŋatu doŋ omor; na a kome mom myel? Rwot Obaŋa doŋ okobo; na akwero rabo koppere?” 
Amos3:9 Rab wunu kop i udi adoŋo me Acuria, kede udi adoŋo me lobo Miciri ni, “Cokere wunu wi kidi me Camaria, koŋ inen wunu arubaruba adwoŋ ame tye iye, kede kit ame oburo kedejo iye.”" 
Amos3:10 Mom oŋeo tiyo gin aber, “Man kop a Rwot i kokome, gin okano gero kede kwo i udigi adoŋo.”" 
Amos3:11 Mannono omio Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Okwor bino guro lobowu dyere, bino dwoko tekoni oko piny; jami i udiwu adoŋo obino yako oko.”" 
Amos3:12 Rwot okobo ni, “Kit acalo akwat laro tyen lee aryo kede dul yite i dog eŋatu, jo Icrael ame bedo i Camaria daŋ obino larogi amannono, karacel i twok itanda kede dul gi-bedo." 
Amos3:13 “Winy wunu, ite rabo wunu kop i kom ot a Yakobo”, man kop ame Rwot Obaŋa, Obaŋa me mony okobo," 
Amos3:14 “ni mannono, i nino ame abino keto kede can i kom jo Icrael pi balgi, abino daŋ keto can i kom keno lam a tye i Betel; tuŋ keno lam obino muko oko, eka te peto oko piny." 
Amos3:15 Abino go yo ot buto me iporo kede ot me oro aketo oko; udi odeo i lak lyec obino reto oko piny, udi adoŋo bi no tum oko.”" 
Amos4:1 Man kop a Rwot ikokome. “Winy wunu kop man, wun wegi dok me Bacan, ame bedo i bad kidi me Camaria, wun ame iburo wunu ocan, idiogi wunu piny ka can oridogi, ame ikobbi wunu cogwu ni, ‘Kel, me omati.’" 
Amos4:2 Rwot Obaŋa a kite atira doŋ okwoŋo ni mannono, nen ba, kare tye abinniwu, ame jo bi no wayowu oko i golo, golo me ciko rec bino tyekowu ducu." 
Amos4:3 Ibino kato wunu i waŋcel ame oturo, kun ŋat acel acel woto atira nyim; obino bolowu oko iyi Armon.” Man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos4:4 “Biye wunu i Betel me itim wunu bal, biye wunu i Gilgal me imedde wunu i balwu. Kel wunu gin oŋolli Obaŋa nino i nino, kede acel me apar ine nino adek adek;" 
Amos4:5 Mi wunu mot pwoc me kwon a tobi tye iye, rab wunu pi motwu me bercuny, mejo winy; pien imaro wunu timo kittono, wun jo Icrael”, man kop a Rwot Obaŋa ikokome." 
Amos4:6 “Rik amio lakwu ogebere pi kec opoto i bomawu luŋ, kede can kwon i bomawu luŋ, ento rik mom idwogo wunu baŋa”, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos4:7 “Rik atwonowu kot, ame kare me kac pwod odoŋ dwete adek; amio kot ocwe i boma acel; ageno mom ocwe i boma ocele amio kot ocwe i poto acel, poto a kot mom ocwe iye otwo oko;" 
Amos4:8 omio boma aryo nyo adek ociro i boma acel pi mato pii, cite mom te romogi; ento rik mom idwogo wunu baŋa,” man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos4:9 “Rik atopo kalwu oko, amio omwato; abalo-gu pottiwu kede poto olokwu; bonyo ocamo odurowu kede jeitumwu; ento rik mom idwogo wunu baŋa”, man kop a Rwot ikokome," 
Amos4:10 “Rik acwao too arac i akinawu ame rom aroma i me Miciri, aneko awobewu i pala lweny; ayako aguragurawu oko; amio ŋwec gonywu oduny umwu aŋwe meicel ento rik mom idwogo wunu baŋa.” Man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos4:11 “Rik areto kabedo mogo i akinawu, bala i ka re a rik Obaŋa oreto kede Codoma kede Gomora, rik ite bedo wunu bala dog yen ame owoto i mac; ento rik mom idwogo wunu baŋa”, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos4:12 “Pi mannono, yin Icrael, abino timmi kit man; pien abino timo man i komi, myero iyikere me rwatte Obaŋani, yin Icrael.”" 
Amos4:13 Nen ba, ŋat ame ocweo kiddi kede ame oketo yamo, ame daŋ titti dano mere tammere, ame loko ru-piny doko piny acol, dok ame bea i wi lobo ame otiŋere malo, nyiŋe Rwot, Obaŋa me mony." 
Amos5:1 Winy wunu kop man ame akobo i komwu bala koko lyel, wun ot Icrael:" 
Amos5:2 “Orette piny mom dok bino ya, en nyako Icrael; oweke odoŋ kene i lobo mere, ŋattoro a tine malo mom.”" 
Amos5:3 Pien Rwot Obaŋa okobo ni, “Boma ame owoto i jo tutumia bino doŋ i jo mia, kede en owoto i jo mia, bino doŋ i jo apar, i ot a jo Icrael.”" 
Amos5:4 Pien Rwot okobo baŋ ot Icrael ni, “Yenya wunu Rwot, me ite bedo wunu kwo;" 
Amos5:5 ento kur iyeny wunu Betel kur daŋ idony wunu i Gilgal, kadi kato anaka i Beer-ceba; pien jo Gilgal obino tero oko opii, aco Betel agik gire oko.”" 
Amos5:6 Yeny wunu Rwot, me ite bedo wunu kwo, me kur twarre i ot a Yakobo bala mac, ame waŋ kun ŋattoro a neko i Betel mom tye." 
Amos5:7 Wun jo ame loko ŋolo kop atira doko gin akec, dok ame caco kite atira, bolo oko piny."
