Amos5:8 Ŋat otio Yuggi kede Lyer-nino i polo, ame loko piny acol doko odiko, dok ame loko dyeceŋ doko dyewor, ame lwoŋo pii me nam te onyo i wi lobo, nyiŋe Rwot;" 
Amos5:9 en ame omio oyako jo atek kun oturogi atura, en ame mio oyako ot ame tye i cel atek." 
Amos5:10 Gin odag ŋat a jukogi i dog boma, okwero ŋat a kobo kop ateni." 
Amos5:11 Pi mannono, pien inyono wunu ocan piny, kun igamo wunu kai i baŋgi tetek, ityeko gero wunu udi i gweŋ opao apaa, ento mom ibino bedo wunu iye, ityeko pito wunu potti olok a yomoro cunywu, ento mom ibino wunu mato koŋŋege." 
Amos5:12 Pien aŋeo kit ame balwu pol kede, rocwu dwoŋ meicel, wun jo ame wuno jo a kitegi atira, dok igamo wunu daŋ lim me wil, ame owilowu kede imuŋ, ame icwao wunu ocan teŋe i ka ŋolo kop i dog boma." 
Amos5:13 Pi mannono, ŋat a ryek myero liŋ oko i kodi kare-ni, pien kare-ni rac," 
Amos5:14 Ketto wunu cunywu itimo gin aber, mom itimo gin arac, me ite bedo wunu kwo, Mannono bino miyo Rwot Obaŋa me mony bedo kedwu, acalo ikobo wunu," 
Amos5:15 Kwer wunu gin arac, mar wunu gin aber, ŋol wunu kop atira i ka ŋolo kop i dog boma; gwok onyo Rwot Obaŋa me mony, bino timo kica baŋ jo a Yucepu ame odoŋ." 
Amos5:16 Pi mannono, Rwot Obaŋa me mony, en Rwot okobo ni, “Koko bino woo i dye boma ducu, i dye yo ducu jo bi no kok iye ni, ‘Oii! Oii!’ Gin bi no lwoŋo opur bino, me kwero cola, kede jo aŋeo wer me koko i lyel." 
Amos5:17 Koko bi no woo i poto olok ducu, pien abino kato i akinawu”, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos5:18 Ibino neno wunu can, wun jo a paro nino a Rwot. Imito wunu nino a Rwot piŋo? Nino-nono colpiny, mom lero;" 
Amos5:19 cal i ŋat a riŋo eŋatu, te rwatte i nuu ager meicel, onyo odonyo i ot, te jeŋere kor apama kede ciŋe, twol te kaye." 
Amos5:20 Nino a Rwot bino bedo colpiny, mom lero, bino bedo piny acol icuc ame ginnoro aryeny mom iye." 
Amos5:21 “Adag aramawu, yia okwerogi oko, cokerewu me woro mom yomoro cunya." 
Amos5:22 Kadi imia wunu mot awaŋa kede me moko kwon, mom abino gamogi gira; motwu me kweyo cuny, kede limwu ocwe, mom abino neno gira." 
Amos5:23 Kwany wunu woo me wer oko i baŋa; mom amito winyo dwoŋ tumwu. 
Amos5:24 Ento myero iwek wunu ŋolo kop atira mol bala pii, kede kite atira bala kulo ame mol nakanaka." 
Amos5:25 “Wun jo me ot Icrael, rik ikella wunu mot aŋola kede mot ocele mege pi mwakki pyeraŋwen i tim?" 
Amos5:26 Ibino wunu tiŋo abakawu Cakkut, kede Kaiwan ame obaŋawu me acer, cal jogi ame itio wunu pirwu kenwu." 
Amos5:27 Pi mannono, abino terowu iyi opii i ne Damaciko”, man kop a Rwot okobo, Rwot ame nyiŋe Obaŋa me mony." 
Amos6:1 “Bino neno can jo a tye i kuc i Cion jo a tye i wi kidi me Camaria ame bedo aboŋo lworo! Wot iman wunu koŋ rok adoŋo mege, ilimgi wunu, wun jo Icrael." 
Amos6:2 Kat wunu naka i Kalne, me inen wunu; ya wunu i kunnu, iwot wunu i Kamat adwoŋ, eka ite wot wunu doŋ i Gat a jo Piriciti. Gin beco kato loc magi oko? lobogi dwoŋ loo lobowu oko?" 
Amos6:3 Wun jo ame cwao nino arac teŋe, kun ikelo wunu kom loc me kole cok baŋwu?" 
Amos6:4 “Jo ame buta i wi tanda ame odeo i lak lyec, ame buto gigi ilada i wi gibedogi; ame camo itino rommi iyi anok, kede roce ame okwanyo iyi awi;" 
Amos6:5 ame wero wer nononono i dwoŋ tum, kede ame roto kit tummogo anyen pirgi kengi bala Daudi;" 
Amos6:6 jo ame mato koŋo olok iyi gwatti, dok ame wirre kede moo wir abeco meicel, cite mom gigi oparo pi rette a Yucepu." 
Amos6:7 Pi mannono, gin doŋ obino geyo telo nyim jo ame obino tero i opii, nyero a jo ame buto ilada-nu bi no gik oko.”" 
Amos6:8 Rwot Obaŋa doŋ okwoŋo i kwo mere kene, Rwot Obaŋa me mony oko bo ni, “Yia dago wakere a Yakobo, akwero udi mere adoŋo oko; abino miyo boma kede jami iye luŋ baŋ okwor.”" 
Amos6:9 Ka co apar bino doŋ i ot acel, gin bino to." 
Amos6:10 Dok ka wat a dano moro ame waŋo kome, obino pi kwanyo cogo i ot, ee openyo dano ame tye i gul ot ni, “Dano moro pwod odoŋ bani?” en bi no kwero oko ni, “Pe gire”; dok bi no kobo ni, “Liŋ, Mom myero otuc nyiŋ Rwot.”" 
Amos6:11 Pien nen ba, Rwot ociko, mio obino napo ot adwoŋ oŋinyo oko, ot atidi daŋ obino nininyo atitino." 
Amos6:12 Aguragura riŋo i wi lela? Nam opuro i kweri dyaŋ? Ento wun iloko wunu ŋolo kop atira odoko awola, nyiŋ me kite atira iloko wunu odoko gin akec;" 
Amos6:13 wun ame ilelo wunu pi Lo-debar, ame kobo ni, “Pi tekowa mom omio omao Kamaim pirwa kenwa?”" 
Amos6:14 “Pien nen ba, abino tugo rokkoro i komwu, wun ot Icrael” man kop a Rwot Obaŋa me mony; “gin bino diyowu piny cakere dog yo ame woto Kamat naka i kulo me Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 Rwot Obaŋa onyutta kit man: nen, en onwoŋo tye acweyo bonyo apipim i kare ame kai ame ocoo me aryo mere ocako tu; nen mannono doŋ kai me aryo ame otu kun nwoŋo doŋ otyeko kayo me abaka oko," 
Amos7:2 Kare ame bonyo doŋ onwoŋo otyeko camo gin otu i loba oko, akobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, tim kica doŋ! Yakobo bino cun nino kun en kom titidi moro?”" 
Amos7:3 Rwot te jukere i man; Rwot te kobo ni, “Mom doŋ bino timere.”" 
Amos7:4 Rwot Obaŋa onyutta kit man: nen, Rwot Obaŋa onwoŋo tye aciko ni ŋolli jo mere kop me mac; eka te twoyo pii atut ame tye piny, te dok kobo waŋo lobo oko." 
Amos7:5 An ate kobo ni, “Ama Rwot Obaŋa, wek bedi! Yako bo bino cun nino kun en kom titidi moro?”" 
Amos7:6 Rwot te jukere i man; Rwot te ko bo ni, “Man daŋ mom doŋ bino timere.”" 
Amos7:7 En dok te nyutta: nen, Rwot ocun i ŋet apama cel ame ogero kede birigi, kun omako birigi i ciŋe." 
Amos7:8 Rwot te penya ni, “Amoc, ineno no?” An ate gamo ni, “Birigi.” Rwot te kobo ni, “Nen ba, aketo birigi i dyere a jona Icrael; mom dok abino medo katogi akata." 
Amos7:9 Jo bino balo kabedo me abila Icaka ducu ame tye malo, wi tuti acil ducu me Icrael bino doko wi obur, dok abino twarre i kom ot a Yeroboam i pala lweny.”" 
Amos7:10 Amajia ame onwoŋo rik alamdog me Betel te cwayo kop baŋ Yeroboam abaka me Icrael kun kobbe ni, “Amoc opiro kop i ko mi i akina jo me ot Icrael; lobo mom romo kanyo koppere-nono luŋ." 
Amos7:11 Pien en Amoc oko bo ni, ‘Yeroboam bino to i pala lweny, Icrael obino tero oko iyi opii kun otere kan abor i lobo mere.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amajia dok te kobbi Amoc ni, “Yin araŋ-piny, wot oko, riŋ i lobo me Juda, iwot icam kwon kuno, dok irab kop Obaŋa daŋ kuno;" 
Amos7:13 ento kur dok imedde rabo kop Obaŋa i Betel, pien man en kabedo acil pi abaka, en ot Obaŋa me loc.”" 
Amos7:14 Amoc te dokki Amajia ni, “An gira mom adwarpiny, an mom atin adwarpiny. An akwat, kede apur olamme acama." 
Amos7:15 Rwot okwanya kun onwoŋo at ye alubo yo rommi, eka Rwot te cika ni, ‘Wot irab kop baŋ jona Icrael.’" 
Amos7:16 “Aman yin doŋ iwinyo kop a Rwot. Yin ikobo ni, ‘Kur irab kop i kom Icrael’, kur itit kopporo i kom ot Icaka." 
Amos7:17 Pi mannono, Rwot okobo ni, ‘Dakoni bi no doko alaya i boma, itinoni awobe kede anyira bino to i pala lweny, loboni obino poko kun opimo i tol; yin i komi ibino to i loba a mom cil, Icrael gire obino tero iyi opii ateteni kun otere kan abor i lobo mere.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Rwot Obaŋa onyutta kit man: nen, dita ame opoŋ iye nyig yen me oro," 
Amos8:2 Te kobba ni, “Amoc, ineno ŋo?” An ate gamo ni, “Dita ame opoŋ iye nyig yen oro me agikki.” Rwot te dokka iye ni, “Agikki doŋ obino i kom jona Icrael oko; mom dok abino medo katogi akata." 
Amos8:3 Wer me ot Obaŋa bino lokere doko koko i nino-nono”, man kop a Rwot Obaŋa; “kom oto bino radde ata; obino bologi oko i kabedo ducu kun oliŋ aliŋa.”" 
Amos8:4 Winy wunu kop man, wun ame nyono jo ame can orido piny, dok ame tyeko ocan me lobo," 
Amos8:5 ame ko bo ni, “Por dwe bino tuno awene, me ocat kal? cabit koŋo atum awene, me ocat ŋano, me olok gi-poro moko bed atidi, kede cekel bed adwoŋ, me obwol jo i ratili ame mom pi mo kakare;" 
Amos8:6 me owil ocan i lim kede ŋat a can orido pi amuk tyen, dok ocat daŋ kal ame obedo cucuŋ?”" 
Amos8:7 Rwot a myero Yakobo wakere pire okwoŋo ni, “Wia mom bi no wil atwal pi timgi luŋ," 
Amos8:8 Lobo luŋ mom bi no yeŋere pi kop man, kun jo ducu abedo iye koko can? Lobo luŋ mom bi no tiŋere bala kulo Nail, kun yeŋere, dok piny callo Nail me Miciri?”" 
Amos8:9 “Dok nino-nono ba”, man kop a Rwot Obaŋa okobo, “abino miyo ceŋ po to dyeceŋ, abino miyo piny doko acol kun ceŋ pwod tye." 
Amos8:10 Abino loko aramawu doko me kwero cola, kede werwu luŋ doko koko lyel, abino tweyo boŋo cola i pyer jo ducu, abino miyo wi jo luŋ tal, abino miyo bedo bala cola me atin onywalo acel keken, kede agikki mere bala nino me keckom.”" 
Amos8:11 “Nen ba, kare abino”, man kop a Rwot Obaŋa okobo, “ame abino cwayo kec i lobo; mom kec kwon, kadi me oryo pii, ento kec me winyo kop Obaŋa." 
Amos8:12 Jo bino rorona cakere i nam naka i nam ocele, cakere i tuŋ anyarodi naka tuŋ kide; jo bino wirre tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi pi yenyo kop a wot, ento mom obino nwoŋo." 
Amos8:13 “Inino-nono anyira abeco kede awobe bino wille pi oryo pii ame nwoŋo ocirogi. 
Amos8:14 Jo ame okwoŋo kede Acima me Camaria, kun okobo ni, ‘Acalo obaŋawu tye kwo, wun jo Dan’, kede ni, ‘Acalo yo me Beer-ceba tye kwo,’ gin bino rette piny, mom dok obino ya atwal.”" 
Amos9:1 Aneno Rwot kun ocun i ŋet keno me lam, te kobo ni, “Go wi yen kika, arii yeŋere, me rette oko i wi jo ducu, jo ame odoŋ abino nekogi i pala lweny; mom tye ŋattoro i akinagi ame bino riŋo, mom tye ŋattoro i akinagi ame bino bwot." 
Amos9:2 “Kadi bed gin okuny piny naka i Ceol, ciŋa bino wotogi oko i kuno; kadi bed gin oyit malo naka i polo, abino dwogogi oko i kuno piny." 
Amos9:3 Kadi bed gin opono i wi kidi me Karmel, abino yenyogi, abino kwanyogi oko i kuno; kadi bed gin kanne oko i waŋa ite nam piny, abino ciko twol ame bedo kuno kaogi." 
Amos9:4 Kadi bed tergi iyi opii nyim okworgi, abino ciko pala lweny kuno nekogi; abino ciko waŋa i komgi, pi timogi rac, mom me timogi ber.”" 
Amos9:5 Rwot Obaŋa me mony ogudo lobo te meye oko, mio jo luŋ ame bedo iye koko can, lobo luŋ tirjrjere malo bala kulo Nail, dok piny bala Nail me Miciri;" 
Amos9:6 en Obaŋa ame gero icika mere malo i polo, kun mio wi ode cuŋ i wi lobo; en Obaŋa ame lwoŋo pii me nam te onyo i wi lobo, nyiŋe Rwot." 
Amos9:7 “Wun mom irom wunu i jo Eciopia i tuŋ baŋa, wun jo Icrael”, Rwot okobo. “Rik mom akwanyo Icrael i ya lobo Miciri, kede jo Piriciti i ya i Kaputor, kede jo Curia i ya i Kir?" 
Amos9:8 Nen Rwot Obaŋa doŋ ociko waŋe i kom loc ame tye kede bal, abino wero oko i wi lobo; koŋo ka ot a Yakobo en a mom abino jwero ducu”, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Amos9:9 “Pien nen ba, abino ciko, abino yeko ot a Yakobo i akina rok luŋ bala kai ame oyeko i yi odero, ento nyig gweŋŋoro mom bino poto piny." 
Amos9:10 Obalo luŋ ame tye i akina jona, bino to i pala lweny, jona ame kobo ni, ‘Gin arac mom bi no tuno baŋwa, kadi rwatte kedwa’.”" 
Amos9:11 “I nino-nono abino gero odoco, gony a Daudi a rik orette, abino wumo kan atwolo oko, abino yiko kan orette, abino gero kit a rik tye kede kare acon;" 
Amos9:12 me wek gin olo jo Edom ame odoŋ, naka rok luŋ ame olwoŋogi i nyiŋa”, man kop a Rwot ame timo man." 
Amos9:13 “Nen ba, kare abino”, Rwot okobo, “ŋat ame puro bino nuko ŋat ame kao, ŋat ame nyono olok bino nuko aco koti; koŋo olok alim bino cwer i kiddi bino mollo i wi tur piny." 
Amos9:14 Abino dwoggo kuc baŋ jona Icrael, gin bino gero boma ame yam odoko wi obur, gin bi no bedo iye; gin bino pi to olok, obino mato koŋo mere, gin bino yiko pottigi, ote camo gin ocek iye." 
Amos9:15 Abino pitogi i lobogi, mom dok abino putogi, i ya lobo ame amiogi”, man kop a Rwot Obaŋawu." 
Obadiah1:1 Man en gin ame Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Obadia. Rwot Obaŋa me mony onyuto kop i kom Edom, Wan doŋ owinyo kop ame oya i baŋ Rwot, akwena daŋ doŋ ocwao oko baŋ orok, me kobo ni, “Ya wunu malo, ya wunu, me owot olweny wunu kede!”" 
Obadiah1:2 Rwot okobbi jo Edom ni, “Nen ba, abino miyo idoko wunu atitidi moro, i akina orok, ame jo luŋ bino cayowu atek meicel." 
Obadiah1:3 Awakawu ame onwoŋo tye i cunywu en ame obwolowu, wun jo ame ibedo wunu i akina kiddi ame obarre, wun jo ame kabedowu tye malo meicel, wun jo ame ikobo wunu i cunywu ni, ‘Ŋa kara ame bino dwokowa piny i lobo?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Kadi bed ibed wunu malo calo cur, kadi bed udiwu bed i akina acer, abino dwokowu gire oko piny i kuno.” Man kop a Rwot i kokome." 
Obadiah1:5 Ka ce okwo onyo oyak obino baŋwu dyewor, kadi bed gin oyakwu okato kare! gin mom obino kwalo ka gin ame oromogi keken? Ka ce opwon olok obino baŋwu, nyig olokkogo mom dok obino weko me adepa?" 
Obadiah1:6 Oyako Ecau meicel, oyenyo anaka jami mere ame en okano!" 
Obadiah1:7 Jo luŋ ame yam inotte wunu kedgi obwolowu abwola, gin oryemowu oko teŋe naka i waŋ lobo; jo ame yam ibedo kedgi i kuc doŋ oloowu oko; owotewu ame igeno wunu doŋ ociko owic i ka beowu, kun wun mom iŋeo wunu ginnoro iye," 
Obadiah1:8 I nino-nono mom abino tyeko jo aryek oko iyi Edom, kede jo ame niaŋ daŋ oko i kidi me Ecau? Man kop a Rwot ikokome," 
Obadiah1:9 Aco yin Teman, joni atekkege koyo bino onyere oko i komgi jo luŋ ame bedo i kidi me Ecau, pala lweny bino tyekogi oko," 
Obadiah1:10 Pi tim me kolo ame itimo i kom ominni Yakobo, lewic bino maki atek, yin daŋ ote ryemi oko atwal." 
Obadiah1:11 I nino ame rik icuŋ wunu iye teŋe ca, i nino ame rik wele mogo ocoko iye limmere oko ca, kun orok dodonya i dog cellere ote bolo kwir i kom Jerucalem, wun daŋ rik irom wunu kedgi." 
Obadiah1:12 Wun onwoŋo rik mom iporre wunu nyero i nino-nono, i kom omegowu ame onwoŋo rik piny oruyigi arac; onwoŋo rik mom iporre wunu lelo i kom Juda, i nino ame ojwerogi iye; onwoŋo rik mom iporre wunu wakere i nino me can." 
Obadiah1:13 Onwoŋo rik mom myero idony wunu i boma a jona, i nino ame gin onwoŋo tye kede can adwoŋ, rik daŋ mom myero inyergi wunu pi gin arac ame otimere i komgi, i nino ame gin onwoŋo tye kede can adwoŋ rik mom myero iyak wunu gigi moro, i nino ame gin onwoŋo tye kede can adwoŋ;" 
Obadiah1:14 Rik onwoŋo mom iporre wunu cuŋ kan ame yo okare iye, pi jo ame onwoŋo aŋwec me laro komgi, rik onwoŋo mom iporre mako wunu jo ame obwottege, ite miyogi wunu i ciŋ okworgi, i nino me can," 
Obadiah1:15 Pien nino a Rwot ceggi bino i kom rok luŋ aluŋa, Kite ame wun itimo wunu i komgi, wun daŋ obino timowu amannono, gin ame itimo wunu bino dok gire i wiwu." 
Obadiah1:16 Pien kite ame doŋ imatte wunu kede i wi kidina acil; rok luŋ omanowu daŋ bino mato; gin bino mato ote bedo gatte agata, obino doko acalo jo a yam pe, Jo Icrael obwottege obino tiŋo malo" 
Obadiah1:17 Ento jo ame obwot bino bedo tye i wi kidi me Cion, kuno bino bedo acil. Jo me ot a Yakobo bino leyo jamigi ikokome." 
Obadiah1:18 Jo me ot a Yakobo bino bedo mac, jo me ot a Yucepu te bedo leb mac, aco jo me ot Ecau te bedo reŋ kal: obino waŋogi otyekogi ducu, ame ŋattoro me ot Ecau mom bino bwot. Rwot doŋ otyeko kobo." 
Obadiah1:19 Jo me Negeb bino leyo kidi me Ecau, jo me Cepela te leyo lobo a jo Piriciti, gin bino leyo lobo Epraim kede lobo a jo Camaria, aco Benjamin bino leyo Gilead," 
Obadiah1:20 Jo Icrael ame gin opii i Kalak, gin bino leyo Kanaan wot kede anaka i Carepa, aco opii luŋ ame tye i Ceparad ame rik omako i Jerucalem, gin bino leyo boma luŋ a tye i Negeb," 
Obadiah1:21 Olar jo bino yito malo i wi kidi me Cion me loyo kidi me Ecau, aloc adwoŋ gire bino bedo Rwot." 
Jonah1:1 Kop a Rwot rik obino baŋ Yona wot Amittai kun kobbe ni," 
Jonah1:2 “Ya, iwot i boma adwoŋ me Nineve, iwot irabbigi kop i komgi, pien balgi doŋ otuno oko i nyima kan.”" 
Jonah1:3 Ento Yona te ya me lwi wot Tarcic, me erweny oko i nyim Rwot. En rik te wot naka Yoppa, te wot nwoŋo mel ame onwoŋo awot Tarcic; en te ŋolo tikitiki mere me wot, te donyo i mel me wot kedgi i Tarcic, me erweny oko i nyim Rwot." 
Jonah1:4 Cite Rwot te cwayo twon yamo moro adwoŋ meicel i nam, ame te miyo pii i nam tagere meicel, mel te mito tur oko." 
Jonah1:5 Okwaŋ mel te doko alwor oko, ŋat acel acel te ero kok baŋ obaŋa mere ote daŋ bobolo jamigi ame onwoŋo tye i mel i nam, me wek mel doŋ ayot. Ento Yona onwoŋo tye odonyo mere piny, iyi icika ame tye i yie twal, buto kuno, kun daŋ onino gire oko," 
Jonah1:6 Adwoŋ a loo mel te bino baŋe kobbe ni, “Lo-ni, yin inino anina aman piŋo? Ya malo ikwa obaŋani! Gwok onyo obaŋani bino tamo pirwa, me kur oto.”" 
Jonah1:7 Gin dok te ero kop kengi kengi ni, “Koŋ ibiye wunu, me obol wunu kwir, me oŋe ŋat ame omio gin arac-ci otimere i komwa.” Gin te bolo kwir, te mako Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Gin te penyo Yona ni, “Yin koŋ ikobbiwa ŋat ame omio gin arac-ci otimere i komwa? Yin itio tic aŋo? Dok iya ikwene? Yin i dano me lobo mene? Dok yin ibedo rok aŋo?”" 
Jonah1:9 Yona te kobbigi ni, “An a dano me Eburania; an abedo ŋat ame lworo Rwot Obaŋa me polo, ame oketo nam kede lobo.”" 
Jonah1:10 Jo-nono rik te bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, ote dok penye ni, “Kara man ŋo ame yin itimo?” Pien jo-nono onwoŋo ŋeo ni en onwoŋo tye alwi alwia me rwenyo oko i nyim Rwot, pien Yona onwoŋo otittigi." 
Jonah1:11 Gin dok te penye ni, “Kara man doŋ wan otimi nadi, me nam kwe oko pirwa?” Pien pii nam onwoŋo tye amedde ameda i taggere." 
Jonah1:12 En te kobbigi ni, “Tiŋa wunu, ibola wunu i nam, me wek pii nam kwe oko pirwu; pien aniaŋ ni pii nam-mi tye ataggere meicel i komwu pira.”" 
Jonah1:13 Cite gin koŋ dok te temo kwaŋ atek meicel me dok cen i wi tela, ento mom te twerre, pien pii nam onwoŋo amedde ameda i taggere atek meicel i komgi." 
Jonah1:14 Mannono te miyo gin kok baŋ Rwot kun okobo ni, “Okok baŋi, ama Rwot, tim ber kur imiwa oto pi kwo a dano man, kur imi remo a mom kede bal dok i wiwa; pien yin Rwot doŋ ityeko timo kite ame ineno ni ber baŋi.”" 
Jonah1:15 Gin doŋ te mako Yona bolo oko i nam gero a nam te gik oko," 
Jonah1:16 Jo-nono te bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel i kom Rwot, gin te yalo Rwot i mot aŋola, ote daŋ kwaŋ baŋe." 
Jonah1:17 Rwot te miyo twon reccoro adwoŋ meicel mwonyo Yona oko; Yona rik te tyeko nino adek iyi rec, dyewor kede dyeceŋ." 
Jonah2:1 Yona te kwayo Rwot Obaŋa mere kun tye iyi rec," 
Jonah2:2 kun kobo ni, “An rik akok baŋ Rwot i canna, en te gamo doga; akok kun atye iyi Ceol, yin ite winyo kwacca." 
Jonah2:3 Pien ibola kan atut, i cuny nam twal, pii ame mol te gura dyere, imio piini otagere, kun corre beo i wia." 
Jonah2:4 An ate kobo ni, ‘Oryema doŋ oko i nyimi; kara dok abino neno odi acil niŋo ba?’" 
Jonah2:5 Pii doŋ omwonya oko, pii atut ogura dyere, egiro tye okadde oko i koma." 
Jonah2:6 Alwiny piny ite kidi, akato piny kan atut ite lobo, lobo te cegga dogcellere oko atwal. Ento yin giri rik ite kwanyo kwona oko i Bur yin Rwot Obaŋana." 
Jonah2:7 I kare ame tipo koma oya, rik ate poyo Rwot; ate cwayo kwacca baŋi, naka i odi acil." 
Jonah2:8 Jo ame keto cunygi i kom jogi a konygi mom, oweko gigi Rwotgi oko, a marrere mom lokere." 
Jonah2:9 Cite an gira abino miyi motti me yali, kun amio i dwoŋ aber me pwoc, Gin ame akwoŋo, abino cobo. Rwot gire en ame laro jo!”" 
Jonah2:10 Rwot rik te koppi i rec, eka rec te ŋoko Yona oko i wi tela." 
Jonah3:1 Kop a Rwot rik dok te bino baŋ Yona tyen me aryo, kun kobo ni," 
Jonah3:2 “Ya, iwot i boma adwoŋ me Nineve, iwot irab iye kop ame an akobbi.”" 
Jonah3:3 Yona rik te ya wot Nineve kite ame Rwot ocike kede. I kare-nono onwoŋo Nineve rik obedo twon boma moro adwoŋ, ŋolo yie aria onwoŋo tero nino adek." 
Jonah3:4 Yona rik te cako wot i bomanono, owoto iye nino acel. En te cako redo kun kobo ni, “Odoŋ nino pyeraŋwen keken, obino reto Nineve oko.”" 
Jonah3:5 Jo me Nineve rik te ye Obaŋ gina; te rabo pi kanyo kec; gin luŋ ote ruko boŋo cola, cakere i kom jo adoŋo, ituno kede i kom jo atino." 
Jonah3:6 Kare ame kop man otuno baŋ abaka me Nineve, en oya oko i wi kommere me loc, te gonyo rukere me kwogo oko, eka te ruko boŋo cola, te bedo piny i buru." 
Jonah3:7 En te miyo rabo kop romo Nineve luŋ ni, “Pi cik abaka, karacel kede odoŋe mere me awora: Myero kur mi dano moro bil ginnoro, akadi lee moro onyo dok kede rommi myero kur ocem, kur daŋ omat pii." 
Jonah3:8 Ento jo luŋ kede leyi myero wummere i boŋo cola, ote kok atek baŋ Obaŋa, ŋat acel acel myero olokere, owek yo mere arac oko, karacel kede kolo mere." 
Jonah3:9 Ŋa kara a ŋeo ka mom dok bino lokere, juko cunye i kom akemo mere agwa, me kur oto?”" 
Jonah3:10 Kare ame Obaŋa oneno gin ame gin otio, kite ame gin olokere oweko yogi arac, Obaŋa ojuko cunye, te weko timo gin arac a rik ekobo ni ebino timo i komgi; mom doŋ te timo." 
Jonah4:1 Kop man rik te miyo cuny Yona waŋ meicel, akemo omake." 
Jonah4:2 En te kwayo Rwot kun kobo ni, “Akwai, yin Rwot, man mom gin a rik akobo i kare ame pwod atye i lobona? Mannono en gin omio rik a ru lwi me wot oko i Tarcic; pien onwoŋo aŋeo ni yin ibedo Obaŋa ame akica, ame timo jo ber, dok akemo mom maki oyot, mar meri a mom lokere dwoŋ meicel, dok daŋ ijuko cunyi oko i timo gin arac." 
Jonah4:3 Doŋ pi mannono ba, Rwot, aman doŋ tim ber ikwany kwona oko, pien twara ata kato ame abedo kwo.”" 
Jonah4:4 Rwot te gamo ni, “Itimo ber me bedo kede akemo?”" 
Jonah4:5 Yona te ya oko iyi boma, te wot bedo i ŋet boma tuŋ kide, te tiyo gonnyere pire kene kuno. En te bedo piny ite tipo mere, me koŋ enen gin ame bi no timere i kom boma." 
Jonah4:6 Rwot rik te miyo coga tu, te doŋo i ŋet Yona, me tipo mere geŋ wie, gwoke i cannere. Coga-nono rik te miyo cuny Yona bedo ayom meicel." 
Jonah4:7 Cite odiko i kare ame piny doŋ oru, Obaŋa te miyo kudi cobo coga-nono oko, te miyo ner oko," 
Jonah4:8 Kare ame ceŋ doŋ odonyo, Obaŋa omio twon yamo moro alyet meicel okuto kun bino i tuŋ kide, ceŋ te cako waŋo wi Yona, ame te miyo kome nyoŋere oko; en te kwayo ni myero eto oko, kun kobo ni, “Twora ato, kato ame abedo kwo.”" 
Jonah4:9 Ento Obaŋa te kobbi Yona ni, “Itimo ber me bedo kede akemo pi coga?” En te gamo ni, “Atimo ber me bedo kede akemo, akemo ame romma to.”" 
Jonah4:10 Rwot dok te kobo ni, “Kica omaki i kom coga ame yin mom itiyo ticcoro i kome, ame mom daŋ yin imio odoŋo, ame odoŋo gire i dyewor acel keken, dok te to daŋ i dyewor acel." 
Jonah4:11 An kica mom myero maka i kom Nivene ame en twon boma adwoŋ meicel, ame tye iye jo ame kato tutumia mia acel kede pyeraryo oko, ame mom ŋeo poko badgi tuŋ cem kede tuŋ cam, karacel kede dok apol ame tye iye?”" 
Micah1:1 Man en kop ame rik Rwot onyuto baŋ Mika ame obedo dano me Morecet, ame en onyutte i kom Camaria kede i kom Jerucalem, i kare a Yocam, Akaj, kede Kejekia, ame gin luŋ obedo obakki me Juda," 
Micah1:2 Wun rok ducu winy wunu ba, ter yiti ba, yin lobo kede ginnoro luŋ iye; me Rwot Obaŋa bed caden i komwu, kun en Rwot gire ko bo i ode acil." 
Micah1:3 Pien nen wunu ba, Rwot tye a ya oko i kabedo mere, en abino piny te wowota i wi kiddi ame tye i wi lobo." 
Micah1:4 Kiddi bi no meye oko i kan a en onyono, kun luŋ daŋ babara oko, calo odok kic ame tye i ŋet mac, calo pii ame corre piny kun ya i wi tur malo" 
Micah1:5 Man luŋ timere pien Yakobo okalo wi cik oko, kede pi bal a jo me Icrael. Yakobo okalo wi cik i yore aŋo? Mom Camaria en a nyuto? Kara jo me ot a Juda otimo bal aŋo? Mom Jerucalem en a nyuto?" 
Micah1:6 Mannono bino miyo aloko Camaria doko wi obur i dye tim kan ame opito iye olok; kiddi iye luŋ abino onyo oko piny i luŋ, ate miyo acakki me tere bedo wie nono." 
Micah1:7 Cal apaa me re luŋ obino ŋiŋido oko, ginnoro luŋ ame en omio onwoŋo obino waŋo i mac, abino daŋ babalo cal jogi mere luŋ; pien ocokogi i kom timo tim me alaya, abino dwokogi daŋ cen iyi ocara me timo tim me alaya." 
Micah1:8 Man bino miya akumo, ate kok; abino wot i tyena nono, kun awoto onoro; abino kok calo ekwe, abino kumo calo udo." 
Micah1:9 Pien wan ret a Camaria mom twero caŋ; otuno daŋ gire oko i Juda, tye kom doŋ i dogcel a jona, naka i Jerucalem." 
Micah1:10 Kur itit wunu pire i Gat, kur daŋ ikok wunu; wot iŋenne wunu iyi apua wun jo Bet-le-apra," 
Micah1:11 Kat wunu anyim, wun jo me Capir, kun it ye wunu onoro ame lewic makowu; aco wun jo me Janan, kur idony wunu oko; koko ame tye ka winyere i Bet-ejel nyuto ni ka-larrewu mom dok twero nwoŋere kuno." 
Micah1:12 Jo ame bedo i Marot tye akuro gin aber kun oparo meicel, pien gin arac doŋ obino piny kun oya i baŋ Rwot otuno naka i dogcel me Jerucalem." 
Micah1:13 Twe wunu aguragurawu i kom gadigadi lweny, wun jo me Lakic; wun en ame rik icako wunu kelo bal i kom jo me Cion, pien bal a jo Icrael gin rik ogeo neno i baŋwu." 
Micah1:14 Pi mannono ba, wun en ame ibino miyo wunu mot me pokere i welewu me Morecetgat; udi me Akjib bino bedo gin a bwolo jo baŋ obakki me Icrael." 
Micah1:15 Aco wun jo ame bedo i Mareca, abino dok kelo dano ame bi no loyowu; jo ame yam kela kwogo baŋ jo Icrael bino wot oko i Adullam." 
Micah1:16 Cid wunu yer wiwu oko, me bed otal pi itinowu ame yomoro cunywu; mi wiwu tal calo me acut, pien gin bino ya oko i banwu obino terogi oko iyi opii." 
Micah2:1 Jo ame paro pi timo gin arac bino neno can, ame oparo nakanaka i kabutogi! Ka piny oru, gin doŋ te keto i tic pien otye gigi i twer me timo." 
Micah2:2 Oparo potti a jo, ote daŋ gamo; oparo udi a jo, ote daŋ mayo, owuno dano ote gamo ode oko, owuno dano ote mayo anaka lobo ame en oleo." 
Micah2:3 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni, “Nen ba, at ye ka paro kop arac i kom jo me ot man, ame mom dok ibino woto ŋutwu iye, mom dok ibino bwono wunu jo pien kare-nono bino bedo rac atek." 
Micah2:4 I kare-naca jo bino cako wer agece agece i komwu, ote kok kun okumo atek meicel, kun okobo ni, ‘Wan doŋ otum giwa aber; lobo ame yam opokki jowa Rwot doŋ omio jo ocele, iwuro awura kite ame en ogamo kede i baŋwa: Olunyo poko pottiwa-nono baŋ jo oterowa iyi opii.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Pi mannono ba, mom ibino bedo wunu i ŋattoro i cokere a Rwot, ame bino bolo tol me pokkiwu lobo me apura." 
Micah2:6 “Kur irab wunu kop gin rabo kittono ŋattoro myero kur rab kop acalo mannono; lewic gire mom bino makowa.” 
Micah2:7 Myero kob kop man, wun jo me ot a Yakobo? Rwot mom dio cunye bo? Magi obedo ticcere bo? Koppa mom timo ber baŋ jo ame timo tim atira bo?" 
Micah2:8 Ento wun ibelle wunu i kom jona calo okwor; imao wunu borjo oko i kom jo ame bedo mot, kede i kom jo ame bea abea kun ogeno ni ginnoro mom gire bino timmere i komgi dok mom daŋ otye i tamoro me lweny." 
Micah2:9 Iryemo wunu mon a jona oko i udigi ame yomoro cunygi; ikwanyo wunu kwogona atwal i kom itinogi atino. 
Micah2:10 Ya, iwot wunu, pien kan mom obedo kabedo me weo, pi gigi mogo iye a mom cil, ame balo dano, ame kela twon balloro arac meicel." 
Micah2:11 Ka ee dano moro wowota atata, kun tye i cuny me goba, kun kobo ni, “Abino kobbi kop i kom koŋo olok kede koŋo arege”, kodi dano-nono en ame joni romo winyo koppere," 
Micah2:12 Ateteni, an abino coko wun luŋ, wun jo a Yakobo, abino coko jo Icrael ame odoŋ; abino miyogi obedo karacel calo rommi ame tye iyi anok, acalo lim akwo ame acem i bar, acalo lwak jo ame awo." 
Micah2:13 Ŋat ame bino yeco yo en bino telo nyimgi; gin bino turo dogcel ote kato gigi iye, ote wot gigi oko. Abakagi bino kato i nyimgi, kun Rwot telo yo." 
Micah3:1 An ate kobo ni, Winy wunu ba, wun otel wi jo a Yakobo kede wunu oloc me ot Icrael! Mom obedo ticwu me ŋeyo ŋolo kop atira?" 
Micah3:2 Wun ikwero wunu gin aber, ite maro wunu gin arac, wun ipapaco wunu del kom jona oko, ite daŋ dadaŋo wunu riŋo oko i kom cogogi;" 
Micah3:3 wun icamo wunu riŋo kom jona, kun iyaŋo wunu del komgi oko, ite tuturo wunu co go komgi ŋido atitino, ite totoŋo wunu calo riŋo ame tye i gulu, calo riŋo ame tye i cupulia." 
Micah3:4 Eka ite kok wunu baŋ Rwot, cite en gire mom bino gamo dogwu; i nino-naca en mom bino ye ni inen wunu waŋe, pien gin ame itimo wunu rac atek." 
Micah3:5 Man en kop ame Rwot oko bo kom odwarpiny ame rwenyo jona arwenya, ame rabo kop me kuc, ka ee otye i ginnoro me acama cite gin oero lweny i kom ŋat a mom keto ginnoro me acama i ciŋgi." 
Micah3:6 Mannono omio Rwot okobo ni ba, Ibino bedo wunu i piny acol icuc aboŋo neno anyuttoro, dok daŋ piny bi no doko acol aboŋo adwoggi me ginnoro ame ityeto wunu. Ceŋ bi no poto i wi odwarpiny, piny bino cido oko dyeceŋ." 
Micah3:7 Lewic bino mako jo ame neno piny, alee bino twodo otyet; gin luŋ obino miyo doggi oko, pien Obaŋa gire mom bino gamo kopgi moro." 
Micah3:8 Aco koŋo an gira, tekona dwoŋ ata, Cuny a Rwot daŋ tye i koma, karacel i ŋolo kop atira kede twer, me titti Yakobo roccere, kede me nyutti Icrael ballere." 
Micah3:9 Winy wunu man ba, wun otel me ot a Yakobo, kede wun oloc me ot Icrael, ame idag wunu ŋolo kop atira, kun idwadwanyo wunu kop luŋ a tye kakare," 
Micah3:10 wun ame igero wunu boma me Cion kede remo, kede Jerucalem daŋ i tim a mom ber." 
Micah3:11 Otel a jo Jerucalem ŋolo kop pi lim owilogi kede i muŋ, olamdog iye pwonyo pwony pi ocara odwarpiny daŋ tyeto tyet pi lim; cite pwod okobo ni ojeŋere i kom Rwot, kun okobo ni, “Rwot gire tye i akinawa, ginnoro arac gire mom bino gudo komwa.”" 
Micah3:12 Mannono omio Cion obino puro calo poto; aco Jerucalem bi no doko wi obur, kidi ame ot a Rwot ocuŋ iye yen bino oculle iye acula." 
Micah4:1 Man bino timere i kare ame tye anyim: kidi ame ot a Rwot tye iye bino cuŋ malo iguŋ ame kato kiddi ducu, borrere bi no kato lobo luŋ obedo tutur; rok luŋ bino ciro woto kuno," 
Micah4:2 rok apol bino bino, te kobi ni, “Biye owot wunu i wi kidi a Rwot, i ot a Rwot Obaŋa a Yakobo; me en wot pwonywa i kite mere, me wan daŋ olub kite.” Pien cik bino ya i Cion, kun kop a Rwot ya i Jerucalem." 
Micah4:3 En bino ŋolo kop i akina rok apapat, rokkoro atek ame tye kannabor, bi no lubo gin a en omoko, pala lwenygi obino teto me leb kweri dyaŋ, toŋigi bino doko pala me lwero jaŋ olok; rokkoro gire mom dok bino tino pala me lweny i rok ocele, mom daŋ dok obino pwonyo kite me romo." 
Micah4:4 Ento ŋat acel acel gire bi no bedo i te olokkere kede i te oduro mere, mom tye ŋattoro ame bi no miyogi obedo lwor; pien Rwot me mony doŋ okobo man en ikome." 
Micah4:5 Pien rok luŋ aluŋa, acel acel iye lubo nyiŋ obaŋagi cite wan giwa obino lubo nyiŋ Rwot Obaŋawa naka waŋ i waŋ." 
Micah4:6 Rwot okobo ni, I nino-naca abino coko oŋwalo, ate daŋ coko jo ame oryemo oko teŋe, kede jo ame an doŋ aketo can i komgi;" 
Micah4:7 eka oŋwalo en ate bedo jo obwot, jo ame onwoŋo oryemo teŋe te doko rok atek; Rwot en ame bi no loyogi i kidi me Cion, cakere tin naka waŋ i waŋ." 
Micah4:8 Aco yin pem ame icuŋ iguŋ malo ame gwoko rommi, yin tur a jo Jerucalem, locci acon ca bino dwogo, bino dwogo gire i ciŋi, ame en loc a jo me Jerucalem." 
Micah4:9 Piŋo kara aman dok iolakino koko? Abaka moro mom tye bani bo? Lo ami-tam oto oko bo, omio rem ociri wok-ki calo dako ame rem me nywal ogoo?" 
Micah4:10 Kany rem, icolle, wun jo me Jerucalem, calo dako ame arem me nywal; pien aman ibino wunu ya oko boma ite wot bedo wunu i tim; ibino wot wunu i Babulon. En Rwot bino larowu i kuno en bino lakorowu i cin okworwa," 
Micah4:11 Aman rok apol bi no cokere me lweny i komwu kun gin okobo ni, “Wek obabalo wunugi oko, me wan daŋ onen Cion waŋwa.”" 
Micah4:12 Cite gin gigi mom oŋeo tam a Rwot, gin gigi mom oŋeo yikkere, ni en ocokogi calo wit kal i laro" 
Micah4:13 Ya malo, me idingi wunu ba, wun jo me Cion, pien obino miyo tuŋwu doko nyonyo, ogweŋere tyenwu bi no doko mola; ibino nyono rok apol piny ite tyeni, ibino jalo limgi baŋ Rwot eka te bedo mea Rwot me wi podo luŋ." 
Micah5:1 Aman doŋ omio cel ogurowa oko dyere, okwor doŋ ogurowa oko, gin doŋ ocako bapo lem aloc me Icrael oko." 
Micah5:2 Ento yin Beterekem Eprata, yin ititidi moro me bedo i akina pacci a jo Juda, cite dano ame bino bedo aloc a jo Icrael bi no ya i bani kannono pira, dano ame bi no mere ocako winyere con meicel." 
Micah5:3 Mannono omio Rwot koŋ bino jalowu ata tuno ka kare oromo, tuno ka nyako ame rem me nywal ogoo doŋ onywal oko; omego mere en aloc odoŋ luŋ te doŋ dwogo oko baŋ jo Icrael." 
Micah5:4 En bino cun i tek a Rwot kun kwayo rommi mere, kede kwogo adwoŋ meicel ame ya i baŋ Rwot Obaŋa mere. Gin doŋ bino bedo i kuc, pren aman en doŋ bino bedo adwoŋ meicel naka i agikki me lobo." 
Micah5:5 Pien dano-nono bi no kelo kuc. Kare ame jo Acuria bino bino lobowa, kare ame tyengi bino nyono lobowa, wan obino cwayo okwat abiro me lweny i komgi, kun odone aboro en ame telo lwak:" 
Micah5:6 gin bino loyo lobo me Acuria i pala lweny, kede lobo me Nimulodi i pala lweny ame owoto doŋ oko iyi akure; gin bino larowa oko i cin jo Acuria kare ame gin obino i lobowa kare ame tyengi bi no nyono lobowa." 
Micah5:7 Icennere jo a Yakobo odoŋŋere bino bedo i akina rok apol apola, ame calo toyo ame oya i baŋ Rwot, ame calo kot ame oŋido i kom lum, ame mom kuro jo kadi acel, mom daŋ gire kuro itino a dano." 
Micah5:8 Eka jo a Yakobo odoŋŋere te bedo i akina rok apapat, ame calo eŋatu iyi akina leyi ame tye i buŋ, acalo atin eŋatu i akina rommi ocokere; ame ka obeo i akinagi nyonogi piny, kikilogi atitino, kun ŋattoro a larogi mom tye." 
Micah5:9 Ibino ti ŋo ciŋi malo i kom okworri, jo ame dagi luŋ ibino tyekogi oko," 
Micah5:10 Dok daŋ i nino-naca abino miyo aguragura rwenyo oko i akinawu, gadigadi lwenywu daŋ abino tyeko oko, Rwot okobo." 
Micah5:11 Boma luŋ ame tye i lobowu abino miyo rwenyo oko, ka ponowu luŋ ame tek daŋ abino mumuko oko," 
Micah5:12 Tic me emuroko daŋ abino kwanyo oko i ciŋwu, ajoka moro mom dok bino nen i lobowu;" 
Micah5:13 cal apaa daŋ abino miyo rwenyo oko, kede kiddi luŋ ame icibo wunu me awora mom dok ibino medde wunu ryebere piny i nyim gin ame ciŋwu en otio." 
Micah5:14 Abino puto yen Acerawu oko i akinawu, abino daŋ babalo bomawu luŋ," 
Micah5:15 Dok daŋ abino culo kwor i twon akemo kede iniga, kom rok luŋ ame rik mom owinyo koppa." 
Micah6:1 Winy wunu ba gin ame Rwot okobo: Ya wunu malo, ipid wunu i nyim kiddi, mi wunu lobo obedo kidikidi winy dwonwu," 
Micah6:2 Wun kiddi daŋ, winy wunu ba pyem a Rwot, kede wun acakki te lobo ame perakino waŋ i waŋ; pien Rwot tye kede pyemmoro i jo mere en bino pyem i jo Icrael." 
Micah6:3 “Kara atimo ŋo i komwu ba, wun jona? Aolo kara komwu i yore ano ba? Koŋ ikobba wunu," 
Micah6:4 Pien rik akwanyowu i lobo me Miciri, alakorowu i ot me opii; dok daŋ acwalo Muca i nyimwu me telowu, Aron kede Miriam." 
Micah6:5 Koŋ ipo wunu gin ame Balak abaka me Moab oporo, wun jona, kede gin ame Balaam wot a Beor odokke iye, kede dok gin ame rik otimere cakere i Cittim naka i Gilgal, me iŋe wunu tic ame Rwot otio me laro jo.”" 
Micah6:6 “Kara abino kelo ŋo i nyim Rwot, me aryebere i nyim Obaŋa ame tye malo? Myero awot i nyime i mot awaŋa, kun atero roa me mwaka acel?" 
Micah6:7 Cuny Rwot bino bedo ayom i kom rommi tutumia i tutumia kede kulli tutumia apar ame moo opoŋ yigi, myero ami atin ame an i koma anywalo pi bal ame tye i cunya?”" 
Micah6:8 Rwot gire doŋ onyutti gin aber, yin dano; ŋo kara ame Rwot mito i baŋi? Mom tiyo tic a tye atira kede maro kica, kede wot karscel Obaŋani, ame imwolle i nyime?" 
Micah6:9 Lworo Rwot obedo tim me ryeko meicel; en redo me lwoŋo boma, kun redo ni, “Winy wunu ba, wun atekere ame icokere wunu i boma!" 
Micah6:10 Wia twero wil i kom twon lonyo adwoŋ ame inwoŋo wunu i yore ame mom ber, ame okano i ot a lo arac, kede gi-pimo jami ame adag neno?" 
Micah6:11 Myero ami lo ame tye i mijan arac lo kop, kun daŋ tye icao me gwoko mijan me goba?" 
Micah6:12 Jowu ame olonnyege ger atek meicel, jo ame bedo kan daŋ ogoba atek, lebgi kela ka kop me go ba i doggi." 
Micah6:13 Mannono omio doŋ acako goyowu oko, kun amio bomawu luŋ doŋ nono pi balwu." 
Micah6:14 Ibino cem wunu, cite mom gire ibino yeŋ wunu, kec gire pwod bi no medde nekowu bala mom icemo wunu; ibino temo wunu kano jami, cite mom gire bino kanne, gin ame ikano wunu abino miyo oko baŋ pala lweny." 
Micah6:15 Ibino coyo wunu kano jami, cite mom ibino kayo wunu ginnoro; ibino nyono wunu jeituni, cite mom ibino wiro wunu komwu i moo mere; ibino biyo wunu olok, cite mom ibino mato wunu koŋo mere." 
Micah6:16 Pien ilunyo wunu lubo cik Omri, kede ticcoro luŋ me ot Akab, kun ilubo wunu tamgi i ginnoro ducu; ame omio doŋ idoko wunu calo jo ame oweko i wi obur, kun jo ame bedo baŋwu bedo jo me acaa; mannono bino miyo ikanyo wunu anywar a rok apapat.”" 
Micah7:1 Aneno can doi! Pien doŋ acalo bala kare ame doŋ otyeko coko nyig yen me oro oko, ame doŋ otyeko dedepo nyig olok oko, ame nyige moro me acama doŋ mom, nyig oduro moro a cunya mito ogeo cek doŋ mom." 
Micah7:2 Jo ame woro Obaŋa doŋ oto luŋ i lobo, ŋattoro ame cunye ler mom gire tye, Jo luŋ maro ka libo owotegi me aneka, inwoŋo ŋat acel acel tye adwaro ominnere kede boo." 
Micah7:3 Gin luŋ odiro meicel i timo gin arac; aco oloc kede oŋolkop, gin luŋ okwao ka lim me wilogi i muŋ. Twon lo adiro iloko tam a jo, tittigi ka tam arac ame tye i cunye; eka gin doŋ te yiko," 
Micah7:4 Ŋat ame aber i akinagi, calo ocokocok, aco ŋat a cunye ler i akinagi, calo okuto ame ocelo i poto. Nino ame okur pinygi yam orabo pire, nino me keto can i komgi doŋ otuno gire oko, aman daŋ kare me babaŋogi ceggi acega." 
Micah7:5 Kur iket genni i kom awoti, kur daŋ ibed kede gennoro i kom dyeri, myero igwok kop ame ya i dogi, naka baŋ ceggi ame inywako wunu kede kabuto;" 
Micah7:6 pien awo bi mom gire keto kwogo i kom pappere nyako daŋ pyem apyema tottere, eka ci-wod te pyem i tattere, okwor a dano gire obedo jo me paco mere." 
Micah7:7 Cite an gira abino neno Rwot, abino gira kuro Obaŋa ame lara, Obaŋana bino gire winyo koppa." 
Micah7:8 Kur ilel i koma ba, yin akworra; ka ee arette, abino dok ya; ka ee abedo kan acol, Rwot en ame bino bedo cen ame menya." 
Micah7:9 Abino gira kanyo ake mo a Rwot, pien an atimo bal i nyime, tuno waŋ ame apido koppa, ame en doŋ omia aloo kop, En doŋ te kela oko kannaler; ate doŋ neno lar mere." 
Micah7:10 Akworra daŋ bi no neno, lewic bino mako dako ame onwoŋo penya ni, “Kara ane en Rwot Obaŋaninono?” Abino ne ne kede waŋa ka otye ka nyone piny, acalo coto ame tye i dye yo." 
Micah7:11 Nino me gero cel me Jerucalem tye abino, I nino-naca obino jero waŋ lobo teŋe." 
Micah7:12 Jo bi no bino baŋwu i nino-naca, kun oya i Acuria, anaka i Miciri, ote ya i Miciri anaka i kulo Efurate, dok ote ya i nam naka i nam, kede i kidi naka i kidi," 
Micah7:13 Cite wi lobo luŋ gire bino doko wi obur pi jo ame bedo iye, pi gin arac ame gin oti mo." 
Micah7:14 Kwa joni kede lutti, ame gin obedo rommini ame opokki me bedo megi, ame bedo kengi i bun, i dye lobo ame opuro iye cam; kwagi i Bacan kede i Gilead, bala kite a rik koŋ timere kede con." 
Micah7:15 Bala kare ame rik iya wunu i Miciri, abino nyuttiwu gigi mogo me awura," 
Micah7:16 Orok bino ne no lewic te makogi, i kom twergi luŋ; gin bino wumo doggi oko kede ciŋgi, yitgi daŋ bi no din gire oko;" 
Micah7:17 gin bi no cako moko apua calo twol, acalo leyi ame mol amola i lobo; gin bino bino ame komgi amyel amyela, kun nwoŋo oya i ka-ponogi atek, gin bino cako bedo i twon lworo adwoŋ meicel, i kom Rwot Obaŋawa, gin bino bedo kede lworo piri." 
Micah7:18 Ŋa kara ame dok obedo Obaŋa calo yin, ame timo kica baŋ jo me re odoŋ i kom rocgi? Yin giri mom ikano akemo i cunyi nakanaka, pien cunyi giri yom i mar a mom lokere." 
Micah7:19 Kica gire bino dok maki i komwa, eka ite nyono balwa i te tyeni piny. Yin giri ibino dwiro balwa luŋ piny i te kut me nam." 
Micah7:20 Yin dok ibino nyuto genni kom Yakobo, kede mar a mom lokere kom Iburaim, kite ame rik ikwoŋo kede baŋ kwariwa i kare okato." 
Nahum1:1 Man en kop ame orabo i kom Nineve, ame Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Nakum; ame onwoŋo obedo dano me Elkoc." 
Nahum1:2 Rwot en Obaŋa ame nyek, dok daŋ en acul kwor, Rwot culo kwor, dok akemo mako meicel; Rwot culo kwor i kom okworrere, dok kano akemo mere pi jo ame dage," 
Nahum1:3 Akemo gire mom mako oyotoyot dok en tye kede twon teko adwoŋ meicel, en gire mom bino weko jo ame kop oloo, En beo i dye kot ame acwe i yamo ajuru, pol obedo apua me tyene," 
Nahum1:4 En juko nam, pii mere te kwo oko, en mio pii i kulli luŋ two oko. Potti me Bacan kede kidi me Karmel en mio daŋ two oko, kede ature me Lebanon daŋ ner oko," 
Nahum1:5 Kan ame en tye iye kiddi yeŋŋere, lobo obedo kidikidi daŋ meye oko; en mio lobo daŋ doŋ yie nono, wi podo luŋ kede jo a bedo iye," 
Nahum1:6 Ka ee en oŋo, ŋa ame twero cuŋ i nyime? Ŋa ame twero kanyo lyeto me akemo mere? Akemo mere ony calo mac, dok daŋ babaro le la oko." 
Nahum1:7 Rwot gire ber; en obedo kan atek me alara kare me can, dok en neo jo ame riŋo laro bane." 
Nahum1:8 En bino tyeko okworrere odoco i twon ale le ame mol i teko adwoŋ meicel, dok en bi no ryemo jo ame dage naka i piny acol." 
Nahum1:9 Gin ano kara ame iporo wunu me timo i kom Rwot? En bino tyeko oko odoco, mom gire bi no culo kwor iryo i kom okworrere." 
Nahum1:10 Obino rweyogi luŋ calo okuto okadde kede reŋ kai otwo ame mac owano, Lo moro mom rik obin otwarre akinawu," 
Nahum1:11 te poro kop arac i kom Rwot, te daŋ mi yo tam arac baŋ jo?" 
Nahum1:12 Rwot okobo ni, “Kadi bed jo Acuria tek dok welgi bup, obino miyo waŋgi rwenyo oko i wi lobo. Kadi bed yam awunowu mom dok abino medde wunowu." 
Nahum1:13 Aman doŋ abino turo kol Acuria oko i nutwu, dok abino miyo jegere ame otweowu kede cot oko,”" 
Nahum1:14 Man en cik ame Rwot omio i kom jo Acuria: “Nyiŋgi mom dok bino winyere abino miyo cal apaa kede cal atwaka rwenyo oko i ot obaŋagi, abino kunyo bur me yikogi, pien konygi doŋ pe.”" 
Nahum1:15 Koŋ inen ba tyen ŋat ame kela amut aber, ŋat ame rabo pi kuc nen ba tyene i wi kidi. Kwer giri ecubanni, yin Juda cob giri daŋ kwoŋŋi, pien obalo mom dok bino medde lweny i komi atwal, pien doŋ ojwerogi odoco." 
Nahum2:1 Ŋat ame ninido jami doŋ obino oko i komwu. Gwok wunu cel me boma; ŋi wunu ba yo; twe wunu daŋ pyerwu, yikere wunu ba me lweny." 
Nahum2:2 Pien Rwot doŋ adwokki Yakobo dittere ame rom aroma kede dit Icrael, pien oyak onwoŋo oyayako jamigi ote daŋ babalo jaŋ olokgi oko." 
Nahum2:3 Jo mere atek i lweny kwotgi rema, ocirikale mere ruko bomji obedo iremarema. Gadigadi lwenygi meny calo leb mac ka oryeogi i tyen, aguragura lwenygi rwomo ŋwec arwoma." 
Nahum2:4 Gadigadi lwenygi riŋo ata i dye yo, omwomere i ŋwec tuŋŋi i tuŋŋi i dye yo alac, omemenya ipilpil calo mac rao kun obedo iwilwil calo lutkot." 
Nahum2:5 Otel a lwak doŋ otyeko lwoŋo oko, gin owot ame ogatte agata, kun oyutte ayuta me wot i cel, ame kwot geŋo komgi daŋ doŋ oterre oko," 
Nahum2:6 Dogcel luŋ ame woto i kulo doŋ oyabere oko ot atek me bedo aloc akuro doŋ rette keken," 
Nahum2:7 Agoŋŋere otero oko iyi opii ame boŋo i pyere daŋ doŋ oyuo oko, kun anyira mere tye akoko ame okumo akuma calo amam, kun daŋ ocipocipo korgi adoŋ." 
Nahum2:8 Nineve calo pii dam ame otur, ame pii mere tye amol oko, Gin oredo ni, “Cuŋ ba! cuŋ ba!” ento moro i akinagi mom gire tye ame lokere dwogo cen." 
Nahum2:9 Yak wunu ryal ba! Yak wunu jabu ba! Lonyo me akana mom gire tum, naka jami me wel-gu." 
Nahum2:10 Nineve doŋ odoko wi obur luŋ aluŋa jami oballe keken a doŋ tye iye! Tipo kom jo iye doŋ orino oko kun coŋgi myel amyela, pyer jo luŋ daŋ doŋ rem arema dok wan jo luŋ doŋ nen myemye," 
Nahum2:11 Gorogoro eŋatu kara tye kwene, kan ame itino eŋatu cemo iye, kan ame eŋatu yam tero iye leyi ame emako, kan ame itino me re bedo iye aboŋo ŋattoro ame yelogi?" 
Nahum2:12 Twon eŋatu kikilo riŋo ame romo itino mere, dok daŋ mako lee ocele pi monne; adu mere luŋ poŋ i riŋo leyi ame emako, kun gorogoro poŋ i riŋo ame okikilo." 
Nahum2:13 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Nen ba, an abedo akworwu, abino waŋo gadigadi me lwenywu oko, te duny yito, pala lweny te tyeko itino eŋatuwu luŋ; abino miyo leyi ame icamo wunu rwenyo oko luŋ i wi lobo, dok dwon akwenawu mom bino medo winyere.”" 
Nahum3:1 Boma ame onyo remo bi no neno can, ame opoŋ iye go ba kede jami ayaka; ame mom giko tim me yak." 
Nahum3:2 Koŋ iwiny wunu kite ame abiro cot kede! Kite ame okot me gadigadi mor kede, winyu pye aguragura, kede ŋwec a gadigadi lweny." 
Nahum3:3 Nen koŋ kite ame wegi aguragura aŋwec kede ame pala romogi tye ameny ipilpil kede toŋŋigi ame aryeny aryenya! Lwak jo oneko tye oyido ibim ame komgi tye oradde atata! Jo tye ata amedde ameda ame jo doŋ tye agatte agata komgi! 
Nahum3:4 Man atimere pi tarwan a Nineve, dako ame alaya, ame yomoro cuny jo i timere me jojok, ame tye ka rwenyo rok apol pi timere me alaya, kun rwenyogi i timere me jojok." 
Nahum3:5 Rwot me mony oko bo ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ at ye ame atiki, abino elo boŋo i pyeri abolo i wi malo; abino miyo orok neni kun it ye onoro, ibino bedo kede lewic kun gin luŋ oneno," 
Nahum3:6 Abino juko komi i gigi mogo me kwer, abino timo tim me acaye i komi, abino miyo idoko gin ame yi jo okwero," 
Nahum3:7 Jo luŋ ame bino neni obino ŋwec oko kun okobo ni, Nineve doŋ odon yie nono, na kara ame bino koke? Abino kara nwono jo me kweyo cunye kwene ba?”" 
Nahum3:8 Yin iber ikato Tebe ame rik obedo i ŋet Nail ame pii onwoŋo oguro dyere kun gwoke calo cellere? 
Nahum3:9 Teko mere ame ka gikere mom, rik ocuŋ i kom Eciopia kede Miciri; Put kede Libfa daŋ rik okonye." 
Nahum3:10 Kadi amannono, rik obin otero oko, obin otero oko iyi opii itino mere rik ote ŋiŋinyo oko atitino iyi agikki wanayo luŋ; obin obolo kwir pi jo mere me awora, jo mere adono luŋ ote tweyo kede nyor." 
Nahum3:11 Yin daŋ ibino mer; ibino daŋ bedo ababaŋ, ibino yenyo yo me larre ciŋ okworri." 
Nahum3:12 Celli luŋ bino bedo calo oduro ame nyige pwod ogeo cek aceka, ame ka oyeŋo nyige ony piny i dog jo ame camo." 
Nahum3:13 Nen ba, jo me lwennyi luŋ calo mony baŋi, dogcel me loboni oyabo alac pi okwori; mac daŋ doŋ onaŋo lodi me dogcelli oko." 
Nahum3:14 Twom pii, pien okwor bino guro oko, yik celli bed atek; dony iburlobome inyon lobo, mak bao me goyo matafali!" 
Nahum3:15 Mac bi no jweri oko kuno, pala lweny bino nolli oko, bino iweri calo bonyo. Nya imedde giri calo bonyo, nya imedde ameda calo ocene!" 
Nahum3:16 Imedo doŋ ocat-willi odoko apol, ame kato acer i polo oko. Bonyo yaro bwome te twarre gire oko." 
Nahum3:17 Olocci pol calo ocene, odoneni pol calo lwak bonyo apipim ame tye aony i wi cel i kare me koyo; ka cen odonyo gin te twarre wot gigi oko, mom tye ŋattoro ame ŋeo kan a gin tye iye." 
Nahum3:18 Yin abaka me Acuriaokwatti be onino oko, joni ame oworo daŋ owe gigi oko. Joni tye olal atata i wi kiddi, kun ŋattoro acokogi karacel mom tye." 
Nahum3:19 Kan owano i komi mom twero can, waŋ bur i komi doŋ odet atek. Jo luŋ ame winyo kop ikomi obapo ciŋgi i wit. Ŋa kara ame timmi arac me kare luŋŋono mom ogudo kome?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Man en kop a pire dit ame rik Obaŋa onyuto baŋ Abakuk, Ama Rwot, abino kara kok baŋi pi kare a rom mene kun mom iwinyo kokona?" 
Habakkuk1:2 Onyo abino kok baŋi pi tim me byemi naka awene kun mom ilara? 
Habakkuk1:3 Piŋo kara imia aneno gin arac, kun daŋ aneno kit ame jo neno kede can? Tim me nek kede byemi en ame odurre i nyima, da kede lweny timere kare luŋ," 
Habakkuk1:4 Cik doŋ odoko gire agoro oko, ŋolo kop mom doŋ tye atira, Pien jo areco guro jo a kitegi atira i dyere, ŋolo kop atira doŋ te dwalle oko." 
Habakkuk1:5 Koŋ iŋiŋio wunu i akina orok, me inen wunu; wur wunu atek meicel. Pien at ye ka tiyo tic i karewu ame mom itwero ye wunu ka otittiwu," 
Habakkuk1:6 Pien nen, at ye ka tugo jo Kaldaya, ame gin obedo rok ager dok a komgi mit atek, rok ame dorre ŋolo twon kobo alac-ci aria, me mayo kan a mom megi." 
Habakkuk1:7 Gin onyo koyo i kom jo, dok nenogi iyiliyili meicel, gin oŋolo kop kun olubo tamgi kengi," 
Habakkuk1:8 Aguraguragi dwir kato kwac oko, dok daŋ oger okato epet me dyewor oko; wegi aguraguragi ŋweco kato akata kun owakere gigi awaka, Wegi aguraguragi nwoŋo oya i kannabor meicel, otwarre gigi i ŋwec calo cur ame amwomere me mako gi-acama mere," 
Habakkuk1:9 Gin luŋ obino me yenyo kolo, Iworo ca ko mako jo i nyimgi kun gin mom ru otuno, Jo mere coko opii bala acoko kwoyo," 
Habakkuk1:10 Oŋalo obakki aŋala, kun daŋ ocao olocgi acaa, Ka oneno cel me boma onyero anyera, pien gin oyido lobo karacel ote mayo boma oko." 
Habakkuk1:11 Gin okato gigi oyotoyot calo yamo gin obedo jo areco ame tek komgi en obedo obaŋagi. 
Habakkuk1:12 Ama Rwot Obaŋana, ame yin ŋat Acil, mom yin giri ibedo tye geye con i con? Wan gire mom obino to, Ama Rwot, yin gire ame iketogi me keto can i komwa yin gire ame imokogi me twenyowa, ama Agwokwa." 
Habakkuk1:13 Yin giri waŋi cil meicel ame mom iromo kanyo gin arac, dok daŋ mom itwero kanyo tim a mom tye kakare. Piŋo kara yin ibedo neno jo a mom ogen anena, aco kono jo areco tye amwonyo jo abeco, ame kitegi atira katogi kun yin iliŋ giri aliŋa?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Pien yin iketo dano acalo rec me nam, acalo gin ame lak alaka ame mom i ŋat a loogi." 
Habakkuk1:15 Jo bedo yutogi oko i golo, owaogi oko kede bwo, ocokogi iyi bwogi; eka ote bedo ŋatte gigi yomcuny." 
Habakkuk1:16 Gin oyalo obwogi, kun owaŋŋigi gin aŋwece kur calo obaŋagi; pien gin en ame omiogi otye aber, dok gin en ame omiogi odoko twon olonyo meicel." 
Habakkuk1:17 Gin myero medde ameda iwoto pala lwenygi, kun oneko kede oroko abono kica moro i cunygi?" 
Habakkuk2:1 An abino cuŋ i pem me kiyo piny, kun anyedde i wi pem malo, ame ayikere me winyo ŋo ame en bino kobba, kede gin ame en bino kobo kom kokona baŋe." 
Habakkuk2:2 Rwot te dokka iye kun kobo ni, “Aco co gin ame abino nyutti; co aber ame kwanne i kom got me coc, me wek nat ame kwano kwan oyotoyot." 
Habakkuk2:3 Gin ame anyutti-nono tye kede kare mere ame otiko, ginnono bi no cobere gire ateni; kare me cobere mere a ru tuno oko. Ka ee ineno ori, yin myero ikur, kare-nono abino ateteni, kare-nono mom gire bino gal." 
Habakkuk2:4 Nen ba, ŋat ame cunye mom ler bino keŋ cite ŋat ame kite atira bino kwo pi iyee ame en tye kede i kom Obaŋa." 
Habakkuk2:5 Kadi bed amannono, koŋo olok dwalo tam a dano; lo a wakere mom gire twero bedo mot, ŋat owor atek calo Ceol;” rom aroma kede to ame mom yeŋ. En coko rok luŋ pire en keken, en coko luŋ ibim baŋe acalo mege kene." 
Habakkuk2:6 Jo-nono luŋ mom bino ŋale kun onwenye koppogo akec, ame okobo ni, “Ŋat ame coko jami a mom mege bino neno can doi, ame ogogere i jami a jo ame ojeŋo, Pi kare a rom me ne ba?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Jo okoporo banya bani mom bino bunyo ya malo? Mom gin en ame bino co te miyo komi cako myel oko? Gin te donyo yako jamini oko. 
Habakkuk2:8 Pien yin iyako rok apol meicel, jo odoŋ luŋ bino yako jamini, pi remo a jo ame ineko kede pi kolo i kom lobo, kom boma luŋ kede i kom jo ame bedo iye." 
Habakkuk2:9 Lo a nwono agoba i yore me byemi bi no neno can, me gero ode malo calo winyo, me ginnoro arac mom gire gude!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Yikki-nono bino kelo lewic i kom jo me odi, neko jo apol omio ikelo giri can i komi keni." 
Habakkuk2:11 Pien anaka kiddi-gu bino kok i kor apama, eka yen i wi ot te daŋ gamo." 
Habakkuk2:12 Lo ame gero boma i neko jo bino neno can, ame boma mere cuŋ i kom bai!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Nen ba, man gire oya i yik a Rwot me mony, ni jo myero yelle kom ka i gin a bino waŋ oko, dok rok luŋ myero yeyelo komgi nononono." 
Habakkuk2:14 Pien lobo gire bino poŋ oko i ŋec i kom kwogo a Rwot, kite ame pii poŋ kede i nam," 
Habakkuk2:15 Lo ame mio owote mere kanyo akemo mere eka te miyogi doko calo jo omer i koŋo, en te bedo nenogi kun otye i lewic; dano-nono bino neno can!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Lewic en ame bino poŋ i wii akaka kwogo. Yin ame imatte giri, ite gatte! Ikopo ame tye i ciŋ Rwot tuŋ cem abino i komi, lewic daŋ abino i kom kwogoni." 
Habakkuk2:17 Tim me kolo ame itimo i kom Lebanon bino wumi oko; to a leyi bino kelli twon lworo adwoŋ meicel; pi re mo a jo kede tim me byemi ame itimo i kom lobo, kede i kom boma luŋ kede jo luŋ ame bedo iye." 
Habakkuk2:18 Cal apaa kara konyo ŋo ba, ka wonnere doŋ otyeko payo oko, onyo cal atwaka, apwony ame agoba? Pien atic keto gennere kom ticcere kene ka en opao cal apaa a mom kobo." 
Habakkuk2:19 Ŋat ame kobbi i gin ame en otio i yat ni ‘Co ba’, kede gweŋ a mom ko bo ni, ‘Ya ba malo’, dano-nono bino neno can! Ginnono twero yabo kopporo ame pwonyo jo? Nen ba, ginnono doŋ owumo oko i jabu kede ryal, dok daŋ mom gire we kadi acel." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ento Rwot gire tye i kabedo mere acil; wi podo luŋ myero liŋ mot i nyime.” 
Habakkuk3:1 Man en kwac adwarpiny Abakuk i dwon wer ame olwono ni Cigionot, en okwao Obaŋa kun kobo ni," 
Habakkuk3:2 Ama Rwot, doŋ at ye ko winyo kop i komi, dok daŋ an alworo ticci meicel. Dok imed tiyo ticci-nono i dye mwakki; mi jo ŋe i dye mwakki; po daŋ pi kica ka akemo omaki." 
Habakkuk3:3 Obaŋa oya i Teman i Edom, Ŋat acil oya i wi kidi me Paran. Kwogo mere owumo polo oko, dok daŋ onwoŋo opake i wi lobo ducu." 
Habakkuk3:4 Kwogo mere onwoŋo memenya acil meicel lero mere onwoŋo ya i cine, en kan ame okano iye teko mere." 
Habakkuk3:5 En ocwao two otelo nyime, omio too edeke olubo yore." 
Habakkuk3:6 Ka en ocuŋ, lobo yenere, ka en oneno jo, kom rok luŋ myel; turrogo ame onwoŋo operakino te ŋiŋida oko, tude mo go ame ori nakanaka, rwobere oko piny. Mannono kan ame yam en maro wot iye." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ate neno jo Kucan ame bedo i kemagi tye aneno can, bomji me icene a jo Midian te daŋ yeŋere," 
Habakkuk3:8 Akemo rik onwoŋo omaki i kom kulli bo, ama Rwot? Akemo rik onwoŋo omaki i kom kulli bo, iniga onwoŋo omaki i kom nam bo, kare ame onwoŋo irino aguragurani, i wi gadigadini me loc?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Iyiko doŋ akud ateroni oko, atero mere daŋ doŋ iketo oko kom tol. Imio pii i kulli opoko lobo oko." 
Habakkuk3:10 Kiddi onenni te ero yeyena oko, twon pii moro ager meicel te mol, kato; pii atut a tye i te lobo te mor oko, bwo mere te yenyo malo amala." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ceŋ kede dwe te lirakino kakargi, i kare ame lero me ateroni kato i kare ame toŋŋi meny ipilpil." 
Habakkuk3:12 Yin onwoŋo ibeo i dye lobo twon akemo, ijejebo rok luŋ piny i te tyeni i twon iniga." 
Habakkuk3:13 Yin onwoŋo iwoto me wot laro joni, me laro danoni ame iyero. Yin onwoŋo ininyo atel wii obalo oko, kun iweko kome doŋ nono cakere i eme naka i ŋute." 
Habakkuk3:14 Iwawano wi olwennyere kede atero, ame rik onwoŋo obino calo yamo ajuru, me keketo an oko, kun olelo gigi calo jo ame mito tyeko ocan i muŋ," 
Habakkuk3:15 Yin giri rik ibeo i dye nam aguragurani ame pii mere onwoŋo opoŋ kun amol ager meicel. 
Habakkuk3:16 Awinyo mannono luŋ koma te myel, del doga daŋ te myel pi winyo dwone; cogona daŋ te cako bedo bala gin ame atotopa oko, kun tyena twomere kengi kengi. Abino bedo mot kun akuro nino me can, ame bi no poto i kom jo ame bino me lweny i komwa." 
Habakkuk3:17 Kadi oduro mom cak turo, dok akadi olok daŋ mom nyak nyiggi, ginnoro daŋ mom nwoŋere i kom jeituni, kun potti daŋ mom oceko cam, rommi daŋ tum oko iyi anok, kun dyannoro daŋ mom iyi awi," 
Habakkuk3:18 an gira pwod abino lelo i Rwot, cunya pwod bino bedo ayom kom Obaŋana, Alarra." 
Habakkuk3:19 Rwot Obaŋa en tekona, en ame mio tyena bedo ayot calo tyen atil, en ame mio awoto malo i wi kiddi. Baŋ adwoŋ wer: me awera kede naŋa opuk-gu." 
Zephaniah1:1 Man en kop a Rwot ame rik obino baŋ Jepania wot a Kuci, wot a Gedalia, wot Amaria, wot a Kejekia i kare ame Yocia wot Amon onwoŋo abaka me Juda," 
Zephaniah1:2 “Abino jwero jami luŋ aluŋa, ame tye i wi lobo,” man kop a Rwot ikokome," 
Zephaniah1:3 “Abino jwero jo karacel kede leyi, abino jwero winy ame twarre malo, karacel kede rec ame bedo i namo Abino reto jo areco oko piny; abino tyeko jo oko i wi lobo”, man kop a Rwot ikokome." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Abino ryeyo ciŋa i kom Juda, kede i kom jo luŋ ame bedo Jerucalem; abino tyeko Baal odoŋ oko kabedo man, karacel kede nyiŋ olamdog me cal jogi; jo ame ryebere piny i wi ot malo," 
Zephaniah1:5 me woro mony me polo, jo ame ryebere piny te kwoŋ baŋ Rwot, aco kun dok okwoŋere i nyiŋ Milkom; karacel kede jo odok oko cen i lubo" 
Zephaniah1:6 yo Rwot, jo a mom yenyo Rwot akadi penyo tammere,”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Lin oko i nyim Rwot Obaŋa! Pien nino a Rwot doŋ ceggi acega; Rwot doŋ oyiko mot me aŋola oko, olonyo daŋ doŋ we le mere oko," 
Zephaniah1:8 I nino me miyo mot aŋola a Rwot, “Abino keto can i kom rwode kede itino aba ka, kede i kom jo ame ruko ruk a rok ocele." 
Zephaniah1:9 I nino-nono, abino keto can i kom jo luŋ, ame myelo kalo arii me doggola, karacel kede jo ame mio kolo kede goba dure i ot adwoijgi.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Rwot ikokome okobo ni, “I nino-nono koko bino winyere i Dogcel me Rec, aco duru bi no winyere i tun ocele me boma-nono, eka ginnoro te mor aloŋo meicel, kun ya i wi kidi malo." 
Zephaniah1:11 Kuk wunu duru ba, wunu jo a bedo i boma-nono i tutuŋ pinnyere! Pien ocatwil luŋ doŋ otum oko, jo a pimo ryal luŋ doŋ otyeko oko," 
Zephaniah1:12 Kare ame abino yenyo Jerucalem kede tara, abino keto can i kom jo ame bedo mot, bala koŋo olok ame doŋ ocek oko te pye mot, jo ame kobo i cunygi ni, ‘Rwot mom bino timo gin aber, dok daŋ mom bino timo ginnoro arac.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Jamigi obino yako oko, udigi bino doŋ yigi nono; kadi oger udigi, mom obino bedo iye; kadi opit olokgi, mom obino mato koŋo mere.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Twon nino a Rwot adwoŋŋere doŋ ceggi acega, nino-nono tye abino oyotoyot; nino a Rwottono koppere kec, lo atek kok kuno i dwoŋ aloŋo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Nino-nono obedo nino me akemo, nino me can kede me rem, nino me rjininyo jami kede balo, nino ame piny bino wummere mutu acol icuc, nino me pol kede me colpiny." 
Zephaniah1:16 Nino me koko apel kede me wo me lweny, kom boma mogo ame ocecelo atek, kede i kom cellogo ame ogero abocoboco." 
Zephaniah1:17 Abino miyo jo neno can meicel, ame te miyogi wot calo otowaŋ, pien gin otimo bai i nyim Rwot; obino kikiro remogi calo apua, aco komgi obino bolo calo cet dyan," 
Zephaniah1:18 Ryalgi kede jabugi mom gire bino larogi, i nino me akemo a Rwot. Mac me akemo me nyeko mere, bino waŋo wi lobo luŋ; bino miyo agikki bino me oyot, i kom jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo." 
Zephaniah2:1 Bye ibed wunu kede cokere, wun rok ame lewic mom makowu," 
Zephaniah2:2 kun mom ru oryemowu oko teŋe, calo cuŋ kal ame yamo kolo, kun twon iniga agwa meicel ame obedo me a Rwot, mom ru obino i komwu, kun nino me akemo a Rwot mom ru otuno i komwu," 
Zephaniah2:3 Yeny wunu Rwot, wun jo ame mwol ame bedo i lobo man, wun jo ame cobo gin ame Rwot ociko; yeny wunu kite atira, kede cuny me mwolo; gwok onyo bino miyo inwoŋo wunu ka gwokere, i ni no me akemo a Rwot." 
Zephaniah2:4 Pien Gaja bino doŋ nono, Acikelon bino doko wi obur; aco jo me Acidod obino ryemo oko dyeceŋ, eka Ekron ote puto oko." 
Zephaniah2:5 Ibino neno wunu can, wun jo ame bedo dog nam, wun rok Keret! Kop a Rwot otikowu, yin Kanaan, lobo a jo Piriciti; abino babalo yin oko i tuno ka idoŋ no no aboŋo ŋattoro." 
Zephaniah2:6 Aco yin dog nam, ibino doko elet, bar okwat kede anok me rommi." 
Zephaniah2:7 Dog nam bino doko me a jo odoŋ me ot a Juda, gin bino kwayo rommigi iye; dok gin bi no buto piny otyeno, i udi me Acikelon. Pien Rwot Obaŋagi bino paro pirgi, eka te dwokkigi kucgi." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Anywar a jo Moab doŋ awinyo oko, karacel kede ayet a jo Ammon, kite ame gin nywato kede jona, kun owakere i kom lobogi.”" 
Zephaniah2:9 Pi mannono, acalo at ye kwo-ni, “Rwot me mony”, Obaŋa me Icrael oko bo, “Moab bino doko calo Codoma, aco jo Ammon bi no doko calo Gomora, bino doko calo lobo ame ayilayila kede bur kado odurre iye atata, lobo ame oballe oko doŋ atwal. Jona ame odoŋŋege bi no yakogi, jo mogo ame obwot i akina rokka bino leyo kakargi.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Man en gin ame gin bino nwoŋo pi awakagi, pien gin oŋalo jo a Rwot me mony, dok daŋ owakere i komgi." 
Zephaniah2:11 Rwot bino bedo kedgi arac meicel, bino neko kit obaŋe luŋ me wi lobo kede kec, ŋat acel acel bino ryebere piny i nyime, i kan a en tye iye, i lobo a rok ducu ame tye i lobo." 
Zephaniah2:12 Wun jo me Eciopia daŋ, pala lweny abino nekowu oko." 
Zephaniah2:13 En dok bino ryeyo cine tutuŋ anyarodi, te lwero Acuria oko; dok daŋ bino miyo Nineve doko wi obur, ame otwo calo tim." 
Zephaniah2:14 Lim akwo bino buto iye i dyere, leyi me tim luŋ; acut kede ogoro bino cuŋ i wi pagi mere; tula bino kok i wan dirica, aco agak bino kok i wan arii me doggola pien yattere me cedar bino doŋ nono." 
Zephaniah2:15 Man en twon boma moro ame ŋatte meicel, ame onwoŋo rik bedo gire i kuc, boma ame onwoŋo ko bo ni, “An at ye, mom dok tye moro ocele.” Koŋ inen kite ame en odoko kede wi obur, kede gorogoro me leyi tim! Jo luŋ ame bea i ŋete, ojwiye kun oyeyerjo ciŋgi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Boma ame jem, ame oballe oko, dok ame buro jo, bino neno can!" 
Zephaniah3:2 En mom winyo kop a ŋattoro, ka ojuko, mom daŋ ye, En gire mom geno Rwot, mom daŋ noko Obaŋa me re aceggi." 
Zephaniah3:3 Rwode luŋ iye, obedo eŋatu ame mor: oŋolkoppege luŋ, gin epet dyewor: ame mom oweko ginnoro doŋ naka odiko. Aco odwarpinnyege, obedo jo a konygi mom," 
Zephaniah3:4 gin mom odwarpiny ikokome; olamdoggege obedo jo ame pyedo gin acil, otimo tim me byemi i kom cik." 
Zephaniah3:5 Rwot ame bedo iye kite atira, en gire mom timo ginnoro arac; odiko ducu en nyuto kite a en ŋolo kede kop atira; en mom ken kadi acelloro, ento jo areco kwia gigi lewic." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Atyeko doŋ jwero rok apol oko, celgi atek luŋ doŋ odoko wi obur; gudogi luŋ daŋ doŋ amio odoŋ nono, aboŋo jo moro ame woto iye; bomagi luŋ daŋ odoŋ nono, aboŋo ŋattoro ame bedo i yigi." 
Zephaniah3:7 Rik onwoŋo akobo ni, ‘Ateteni, en gire bino lwora, ka ajuko, en bino winyo doga; waŋe gire mom bino wumere, i kom kop luŋ ame acike iye.’ Ento gin gigi rik ote bedo medde ameda mitkom me balo ginnoro luŋ ame gin otio.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 “Pi mannono, koŋ doŋ ikura wunu”, man kop a Rwot ikokome, “tuno i nino ame abino ya iye malo calo caden. Pien amoko doŋ tamma me coko rok luŋ, kede loc apapat karacel, me awuk akemona i komgi, kede lyeto luŋ me inigana; pien mac me akemo me nyekona, bino waŋo wi lobo luŋ." 
Zephaniah3:9 “I kare-naca, abino ŋolo kop a jo ducu, me gin kob kop atira, me gin luŋ olwoŋ nyiŋ Rwot, dok daŋ oti baŋe i cuny acel." 
Zephaniah3:10 I ŋe kulo me Eciopia luŋ, jo ame kelo kwacgi baŋa ya iye, ame gin jona ame oket atata, gin bino kelo mot baŋa." 
Zephaniah3:11 “I nino-nono, mom dok abino miyowu lewic, pi timwu ame ijem wunu kede i koma, pien i kare-nono abino kwanyo i akinawu oko twoni jowu a yam ŋatte meicel, awakere, mom dok obino medo yon, i wi kidina acil," 
Zephaniah3:12 pien abino weko i akinawu, jo ame mwol, dok ame ocan. Gin bino yenyo ka larregi i nyiŋ Rwot," 
Zephaniah3:13 ame gin jo ame odoŋ iyi Icrael. Gin mom bino timo ginnoro arac, mom daŋ obino ko bo kopporo me goba, leb a rac a kobo kop me goba mom bi no bedo tye i doggi. Pien gin obino cem, ote buto gigi calo rommi, kun mom tye ŋattoro ame miogi lworo.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Wer giri i yomcuny, yin Cion; go ijira, yin Icrael. Lel giri, kun inatte meicel i cunyi ducu, yin nyako me Jerucalem." 
Zephaniah3:15 Rwot doŋ okwanyo kop a yam eŋolo i komi oko, en doŋ oryemo okworri oko, Abaka me Icrael, en Rwot, tye gire i akinawu; mom dok ibino medde lworo gin arac," 
Zephaniah3:16 I nino-nono, obino ko bo baŋ Jerucalem ni, “Kur ilwor ba, yin Cion; kur imi cini dok goro." 
Zephaniah3:17 Rwot Obaŋawu tye gire i akinawu, twon atek i lweny, ame mio oloo lweny, en bi no lelo i komi kun yie yom meicei, bino rocci idoko anyen pi marrere, bino ŋatte meicel i komi, kun wero i dwoŋ aloŋo, bala i nino me kwero ecuban." 
Zephaniah3:18 “Abino kwanyo can oko i komi, ame mio mom dok oyeti pire." 
Zephaniah3:19 Nen ba, i kare-nono abino tic i kom jo luŋ ame yam wuni. Abino laro jo oŋwalo, ate daŋ coko jo a yam oryemo oko, Abino loko lewicgi doko ginnoro me pak, nyiŋgi bino winyere i lobo luŋ." 
Zephaniah3:20 I kare-nono abino kelowu paco, i kare ame abino cokowu karacel; abino miyo nyiŋwu rwo kun daŋ opakowu, i akina jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo, I kare ame abino dwokkiwu kucwu, kun ineno wunu kede waŋwu”, man kop a Rwot." 
Haggai1:1 I mwaka me aryo me loc abaka Dario, i nino dwe acel me dwe me abicel, kop a Rwot rik obino baŋ Aggai adwarpiny, me en kop baŋ Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel ame onwoŋo rik aloc a jo Juda kede baŋ Yocwa wot a Yekojadak, ame obedo alamdog adwoŋ, ni," 
Haggai1:2 “Rwot me mony okobo ni, ‘Rok man kobo ni kare mom ru oromo me dok gero ot a Rwot odoco.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Kop a Rwot rik obino, kun mio Aggai adwarpiny en akobo, ni," 
Haggai1:4 “Man en kare a myero wun giwu ibed wunu i udiwu ame ogero wigi abeco kun ot man oballe oko?” 
Haggai1:5 Mannono omio Rwot me mony aman okobo ni. “Koŋ itam wunu kite ame ibedo wunu kede," 
Haggai1:6 Icoo wunu koti adwoŋ, ento ikaa wunu aduno; icamo wunu cite mom iyeŋ wunu; imato wunu, cite mom romowu, irukere wunu, cite mom tye ŋattoro ame kome bedo alyet; dok ŋat ame ca mo ocara, camo me aketa icao otutuca oko.”" 
Haggai1:7 “Rwot me mony okobo ni, koŋ itam wunu kile ame ibedo kede," 
Haggai1:8 Yit wunu malo i lobo obedo kidikidi, me iwot ikel wunu yen, iger wunu ot; me cunya bed yom, ate nyuto kwogona iye, Rwot okobo," 
Haggai1:9 Ibedo yenyo wunu abup, koŋ inen inwoŋo wunu aduno moro keken, eka i kare ame ikelo wunu paco, amio oket oko. Piŋo kara ba? Rwot me mony en okobo. Pien oda oballe oko, kun wun giwu, ŋat acel acel tye abolle abola i tic me ode keken." 
Haggai1:10 Mannono en gin omio polo i malo okwero coro toyo piny, lobo daŋ mom ceko cam." 
Haggai1:11 En omio an daŋ akobo ni, can pii myero bed tye i kom potti, i kom kiddi, i kom kal, i kom koŋo olok anyen, i kom moo, kede i kom ginnoro ducu ame doŋo lobo, kede i kom jo kede dok, kede i kom jami luŋ ame gin otio.”" 
Haggai1:12 Mannono omio Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel, kede Yocwa wot a Yekojadak, alamdog adwoŋ, karacel kedejo luŋ ame onwoŋo odoŋ, gin luŋ rik ote winyo kop a Rwot Obaŋagi, kede kop Aggai adwarpiny, kite ame Rwot Obaŋagi oore kede, Lwak rik te bedo kede lworo i nyim Rwot." 
Haggai1:13 Eka Aggai, akwena a Rwot te kop i lwak kun tittigi kop a Rwot, “An at ye kedwu, Rwot okobo,”" 
Haggai1:14 Rwot te tugo cuny Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel, aloc me Juda, kede Yocwa wot a Yekojadak, alamdog adwoŋ, karacel kede cuny jo ducu ame onwoŋo rik odoŋ; gin te bi no cako tic i ot a Rwot me mony, ame obedo Obaŋagi." 
Haggai1:15 Gin ocako tic i nino dwe pyeraryo wie aŋwen me dwe me abicel. 
Haggai2:1 I mwaka me aryo me loc abaka Dario, i nino dwe pyeraryo wie acel me dwe me abiro, kop a Rwot rik obino, kun mio Aggai adwarpiny en akobo ni," 
Haggai2:2 “Peny Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel, aloc me Juda, kede Yocwa wot a Yekojadak, alamdog adwoŋ, kede jo luŋ ame odoŋ, ni," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Tye ŋattoro ame odoŋ i akinawu ame rik oneno kwogo ame ot man rik tye kede i kare acon? Aman koŋo doŋ en neno nen iŋo? Aman mom doŋ nen calo ginnoro a konnyere pe? 
Haggai2:4 Kadi bed amannono, yin Jerubabel, myero doŋ aman ibed ame cunyi nwaŋ’, Rwot me mony en oko bo; bed ame cunyi nwaŋ yin Yocwa wot a Yekojadak, alamdog adwoŋ; kede wun jo luŋ ame bedo i lobo-ni, wun daŋ bed ame cunywu nwaŋ, Rwot okobo; ti wunu tic, pien an at ye kedwu, Rwot me mony en okobo," 
Haggai2:5 kite ame rik acikere kede kedwu i kare ame rik iya wunu i Miciri. Kur ilwor wunu, pien Cuny Acil ame obedo mega, bedo i akinawu." 
Haggai2:6 Pien Rwot me mony okobo ni, ‘Odoŋ icel keken, kare anonok akato, abino yeŋo polo kede lobo, nam kede lobo otwo;" 
Haggai2:7 abino daŋ yeŋo rok luŋ me wek lonyo a rok luŋ bin iye, ate miyo ot man poŋ i kwogo, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Haggai2:8 Ryal mega, jabu daŋ obedo mega, Rwot me mony en okobo." 
Haggai2:9 Kwogo a ot man icennere-ni, bi no kato me a maca me agege ca oko, Rwot me mony okobo; dok daŋ abino miyo kabedo man bedo kede kuc, man kop a Rwot me mony ikokome.’ ”" 
Haggai2:10 I dwe me aboŋwen, ni no dwe pyeraryo wie aŋwen, i mwaka me aryo me loc a Dario, kop a Rwot rik obino, kun mio Aggai adwarpiny en akobo, ni," 
Haggai2:11 “Rwot me mony okobo ni, koŋ ipeny wunu olamdog i kom cik man ni," 
Haggai2:12 ‘Ka ee dano moro otiŋo riŋo ame olonyo obedo acil i lak boŋo mere, ee lak boŋo-nono ogudo ogati, onyo dek, onyo koŋo olok, onyo moo, onyo kit cammoro ducu, gin ame ogudo-nono daŋ lony bedo acil?’ ” Alamdog te dok iye ni, “Pe gire.”" 
Haggai2:13 Aggai dok te penyo ni, “Ka ee dano moro ame odoko ŋat a cik ogeŋo pi gudo kom dano oto, ogudo ginnoro i akina jami magi, ginnono daŋ doko gin ame cik ogeŋo?” Alamdog te dok iye ni, “Doko gin a cik ogeŋo.”" 
Haggai2:14 Aggai te doŋ ko bo ni, “Tye daŋ kittono i kom jo man kede rok ame tye i nyima-ni, karacel kede ticcoro luŋ ame ciŋgi ogudo, Rwot okobo; mottoro luŋ ame gin omio kuno, gin lun obedo gin a mom cil." 
Haggai2:15 Koŋ itim wunu ber itam wunu gin ame bino timere, cakere tin wot kede anyim. Kare a rik mom ru icibo wunu kidi moro i wi wadgi i ot a Rwot," 
Haggai2:16 rik ibedo wunu ni ŋo? I kare-naca ka ŋat obino omo kal ame ocoko karacel, kun gen ni nwoŋo aromo dwoŋo pyeraryo, nwoŋo ka apar keken; ka ŋat obino twomo koŋo i bur olok, kun geno ni ebino twomo aromo opoko pyerabic, romo ka pyeraryo keken." 
Haggai2:17 Rik anekowu karacel kede camwu daŋ, amio camwu omwato, acoro-gu pee iye, ento rik mom idwogo wunu baŋa." 
Haggai2:18 Koŋ ipar wunu, cakere tin wot kede anyim, i nino dwe pyeraryo wie aboŋwen. Koŋ itam wunu i kare ame ogeo gero iye acakki me yekalu a Rwot;" 
Haggai2:19 koti pwod tye i dero? Olok, Oduro, okwer pomegranat, karacel kede jeituni ame mom ru onyak? Cakere doŋ tin wot kede anyim, abino miyowu gum.”" 
Haggai2:20 Kop a Rwot rik dok te bino baŋ Aggai tyen me aryo, i nino dwe pyeraryo wie aŋwen, kun kobbe ni," 
Haggai2:21 “Kobbi Jerubabel, aloc me Juda, ni," 
Haggai2:22 ‘An aceggi yeŋo polo kede lobo, dok daŋ abino reto kom me loc apol; aceggi daŋ tyeko teko me loc orok, ate daŋ rereto gadigadi me lwenygi oko karacel kede jo me riŋo kedgi, aguragura kede wegigi, ŋat acel acel bino to i pala lweny awottere." 
Haggai2:23 I nino-nono, Rwot me mony en oko bo, abino teri yin Jerubabel wot a Cealtiel, Rwot okobo, yin amirona, abino loki ibedo calo atemma me anen, pien an doŋ ayeri.’ Man kop a Rwot me mony ikokome.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Kop a Rwot rik owinyere baŋ adwarpiny Jekeria wot a Berekia, wot a Iddo, i dwe me aboro, i mwaka a Dario me aryo mere, kun kobo ni," 
Zechariah1:2 Akemo rik omako Rwot atek i kom kwariwu. 
Zechariah1:3 Pi mannono, kobbigi ni, Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Dwog wunu baŋa, an daŋ abino dwogo baŋwu, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Zechariah1:4 Kur ibed wunu bala kwariwu ame rik odwarpiny acon orabbigi kop ni, “Rwot me mony okobo ni, ‘Wek wunu kitewu areco kede ticwu areco-nu oko.’ Cite gin gigi rik mom ote winyo, daŋ mom ote keto cunygi i koma kadi acel, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Zechariah1:5 Kara gin kwariwu-nono am an otye kwene? Gin odwarpinnyaca koŋo, pwod obino bedo kwo nakanaka?" 
Zechariah1:6 Koppa kede icwilla ame rik aciko baŋ amirona odwarpiny, rik mom oŋuko kwariwu? Omiogi oŋut kun okobo ni, Rwot me mony doŋ otimo kite acalo rik oyiko ni ebino timowa kede pi kitewa kede timwa.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Kop a Rwot rik owinyere baŋ Jekeria wot a Berekia, wot a Iddo, i nino dwe pyeraryo wie aŋwen, dwe me apar wie acel, ame olwoŋo ni Cebat, i mwaka a Dario me aryo mere, kun ko bo ni," 
Zechariah1:8 “Aneno dano moro dyewor ame obedo i wi aguragura arema, kun onwoŋo ocuŋ iyi akina yen ame ŋwecgi kur, ame tye i luŋ; i yo ŋee tye iye aguragura apapat, arema mere, kede opilopilo, kede en atarrere." 
Zechariah1:9 An ate penyo ni, ‘Magi kara ŋo, adwoŋ?’ Amalaika moro ame rik akop keda te kobo ni, ‘Abino nyutogi baŋi.’" 
Zechariah1:10 Lo ame onwoŋo ocuŋ iyi akina yen akur te gamo, kun kobo ni, ‘Magi-nono jo ame Rwot ooro me loloŋo lobo luŋ.’" 
Zechariah1:11 Gin te gamo dog amala ika ame ocuŋ i akina yen akur, kun okobo ni, ‘Doŋ, otyeko loloŋo lobo oko, nen, lobo luŋ gire tye okwe.’" 
Zechariah1:12 Icennere amalaika a Rwot te kobo ni, ‘Ama Rwot me mony kara ibino bedo kare arom mene kun mom ru itimo Jerucalem kica, karacel kede boma me Juda, ame akemo doŋ omaki i komgi odoko mwakki pyerabiro twal-li?’" 
Zechariah1:13 Rwot te dokki amala ika ame onwoŋo akop kede kun kobbe kop abeco me kica," 
Zechariah1:14 omio amala ika ame obedo kop keda te kobba ni, ‘Rab kop man kun iredo areda ni, Rwot me mony oko bo ni; Nyeko ocira meicel pi Jerucalem kede pi Cion." 
Zechariah1:15 Akemo daŋ omaka meicel i kom rok ocele a bedo mot kede kuc; pien kare a rik akemo omaka anonok, gin rik omedo can ameda’" 
Zechariah1:16 Pi man ŋo ŋo Rwot okobo ni, ‘An doŋ adwogo i Jerucalem kun atye i kica adwoŋ obino gero oda iye, Rwot me mony okobo, obino ryeyo tol i Jerucalem me pimo." 
Zechariah1:17 Dok imed redo ni, Rwot me mony okobo ni; Gin abeco dok bino poŋ ipim i boma na luŋ, Rwot binc dok kweyo cuny Cion, bino daŋ dok yero Jerucalem.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Rik ate dok tiŋo waŋa malo neno piny, nen, aneno tuŋ leyi aŋwen!" 
Zechariah1:19 Apenyo amala ika ame onwoŋo akop keda ni, “Magi kara ŋo?” En te dokka iye ni, “Magi-nono tuŋ leyi ame rik okeketo Juda, Icrael kede Jerucalem.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Rwot te dok nyutta otet aŋwen, Eka ate penyo amala ika ni," 
Zechariah1:21 “Jo-ni kara obino timo ŋo?” En te dokka iye ni, “Magi-nono tuŋ leyi aŋwen ame rik okeketo i Juda, eka ŋattoro iye mom te tiŋo wie, Jo-ni obino me miyogi lworo, me reto tuŋ leyi orok luŋ piny, ame rik otiŋo tuŋgi malo i kom jo me Juda, me keketo oko.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Rik ate dok tiŋo waŋa malo neno piny, nen, lo moro ame onwoŋo omako tol me pimo piny i ciŋe!" 
Zechariah2:2 Apenye ni, “Yin kara iwot kwene?” En te gamo doga ni, “Awot pimo Jerucalem, wek anen kite ame laccere kede borrere tye kede,”" 
Zechariah2:3 Nen, amala ika ame onwoŋo akop keda te bino, cite amalaika ocele daŋ te bino me rwatte kede," 
Zechariah2:4 te kobbe ni, “Riŋ baŋ awobi-ca ikobbe ni, ‘Jerucalem bino bedo aboŋo celloro pi lwak jo apipim karacel kede lim akwo luŋ ame bino iye," 
Zechariah2:5 Pien an abino bedo acalli cellere me mac ogure i dyere, an abino bedo kwogo me re i dyere kuno, Rwot okobo.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:6 Ya, ya wunu oko, jo-ni, i lobo me tutuŋ anyarodi, Rwot okobo, pien rik akeketowu atata calo yamo aŋwen me polo, Rwot okobo." 
Zechariah2:7 Ya, ilwi wunu oko, iwot wunu i Cion ame obedo Babulon." 
Zechariah2:8 Pien ŋat ame ogudo komwu ogudo toŋ waŋ Rwot me mony. I kare ame en won kwogo onwoŋo oora baŋ rok apapat a rik oyakowu, en Rwot me mony okobo ni," 
Zechariah2:9 “Nen ba, an abino yeŋo ciŋa i wigi, gin bino doko gi-ayaka a jo a yam koŋ obedo opiigi, Mano bino miyo iŋeo ni Rwot me mony en oora." 
Zechariah2:10 Wer kun ilelo, yin Cion, pien nen, abino me bedo i akinawu," 
Zechariah2:11 Rok apol bino notte karacel i nino-nono, gin bino bedo jona, ibino ŋeyo wunu ni Rwot me mony oora baŋwu." 
Zechariah2:12 Eka Rwot te gamo Juda acalo dullere i lobo acil, bino daŋ dok yero Jerucalem.”" 
Zechariah2:13 Liŋ wunu oko i nyim Rwot, wun jo luŋ, pien en doŋ otugere oko kene i kabedo mere acil." 
Zechariah3:1 Rwot dok te nyutta Yocwa, alamdog adwoŋ, ame onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i nyim amalaika a Rwot, kun Catan tye ocuŋ i ciŋe tuŋ cem me pide." 
Zechariah3:2 Rwot te kobbi Catan ni, “Rwot myero juki, yin Catan! Rwot a rik oyero Jerucalem myero juki! Man mom dog yat ame okwanyo i mac?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yocwa onwoŋo tye ocuŋ i nyim amalaika kun tye oruko boŋŋi ame olille meicel. 
Zechariah3:4 Amalaika te kobbi jo ocuŋ i nyime ni, “Gony wunu boŋo olille oko i kome” Dok te kobbe ni, “Nen, atyeko doŋ kwanyo balli oko i komi, obino ruki kede boŋŋi me kwogo.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Dok ote kobo ni, “Mi dwal atambala acil i wie.” Gin te daŋ dwalo atambala acil i wie, ote daŋ ruke kede boŋŋi kun amalaika a Rwot ocuŋ i ŋete." 
Zechariah3:6 Amalaika a Rwot te kobbi Yocwa ni," 
Zechariah3:7 “Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Ka ce ibino wot kun ilubo yo mera dok daŋ igwoko dyekalla. Abino miyo twer me tuno baŋa i akina jo ame ocuŋ kan-nie." 
Zechariah3:8 Winy ba, Yocwa, alamdog adwoŋ, pien yin karacel kede owoteni ame bedo i nyimi, joni obedo anyut ame cimo gin a bino timere i nyim; nen, aman doŋ abino kelo amirona, en Jaŋe." 
Zechariah3:9 Pien nen, abino goro coccere i kom kidi acel ame tye i bute abiro, i kom kidi ame aketo i nyim Yocwa, Rwot ame mony okobo, dok abino kwanyo bal me lobo-nono i nino acel keken." 
Zechariah3:10 I nino-nono Rwot me mony okobo, dano acel acel akinawu bino lwoŋo awottere me bino bedo i te olokkere kede i te oduro mere.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Amalaika ame rik okobo keda, dok te bino baŋa tyen me aryo, te coya bala kite ame oco kede dano i waŋ nino." 
Zechariah4:2 Amalaika-nono te penya ni, “Ineno ŋo?” An ate dokke ni, “Nen, aneno gi-cibo tara ame kome luŋ obedo jabu, kede bakuli ame tye i wie, kede tara abiro ame ocibo i wie, kun tara acel acel ame ocibo i wie doge tye abiro." 
Zechariah4:3 Yen Jeituni aryo onwoŋo tye i laŋete, kun acel acel tye tuŋ cem me bakuli, kede en ocele tye tuŋ cam.”" 
Zechariah4:4 An ate penyo amalaika ame akop keda ni, “Magi kara ŋo, adwoŋ?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Amalaika ame okobo keda te dokka iye ni, “Yin mom iŋeo jami magi?” An ate gamo ni, “Mom gire aŋeo, adwoŋ.”" 
Zechariah4:6 En dok te gamo doga ni, “Man en kop a Rwot baŋ Jerubabel, ame okobo ni, Mom kede twer kadi teko, cite kede Cuny ame oya i baŋa, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Zechariah4:7 Yin iŋo kara, yin twon kidi adwoŋ? Yin ibino doko bar i nyim Jerubabel. En bino kelo kidi me atenni ot kun jo wo ni, ‘Gum, gum obed gire bane!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Kop a Rwot dok te medde bino baŋa kun kobba ni," 
Zechariah4:9 “Ciŋ Jerubabel doŋ ocano acakki te ot man; daŋ doŋ obino tyeko i ciŋe. Man bino miyo iŋeo ni Rwot me mony en oora baŋwu. 
Zechariah4:10 Pien ŋat ame cao nino me kop anok, bino lelo, dok daŋ bino neno birigi i ciŋi Jerubabel. “Magi abiro-ni gin waŋ Rwot ame loloŋo lobo luŋ.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Dok ate penye ni, “Kara yen Jeituni ame tye tuŋ cem kede tuŋ cam me gi-cibo tara ca kono obedo gin aŋo?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ate dok medo penye, tyen me aryo ni, “Kara jaŋ jerturu aryo-ni kono obedo gin aŋo, ame tye i ŋet paipo aryo me jabu a moo mollo i yigi-nue?”" 
Zechariah4:13 En te penya ni, “Yin mom iŋeo jami magi?” An ate gamo ni, “Mom gira aŋeo, adwoŋ.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Eka en te kobba ni, “Magi gin jo aryo ame owirogi kede moo ame gin cun i ŋet Rwot me lobo luŋ.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Dok ate tiŋo waŋa malo ate neno nen, buk adola ame twarre!" 
Zechariah5:2 Amalaika te penya ni, “Ineno kara ŋo?” An ate dokee ni, “Anene buk adola ame twarre; borrere romo futi pyeradek, eka laccere te romo futi apar wie abic.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Amalaika te kobba ni, “Man en kop ame ceno jo, ame woto i wi podo luŋ, pien ocoo tuŋ cel ni, jo luŋ ame kwala kwo obino ryemo oko cakere tin, dok ocoo tuŋ cel ni, jo luŋ ame kwoŋo kwon me goba goba obino ryemo daŋ oko cakere tin." 
Zechariah5:4 Abino doŋ cwayo buk ceno jo-nono wot oko, Rwot me mony okobo, bino donyo i ot akwo kede i ot a ŋat akworjo i nyiŋa goba goba; bino bedo i ode kun tyeko oko, anaka yen kede kiddi luŋ ame ogero kede.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Icennere amalaika ame obedo kop keda obino te kobba ni, “Tiŋ waŋi malo me inen gin ame tye ka kato oko-ni,”" 
Zechariah5:6 An ate penye ni, “Mano kara ŋonono?” En te gamo ni, “Man dwoŋo ame kato oko.” Dok te gamo ni, “Man balgi i lobo luŋ,”" 
Zechariah5:7 Nen, ote tirjo nyonyo moro apek ame onwoŋo owumo kede doge, dako moro onwoŋo tye obedo iyi dwoŋo!" 
Zechariah5:8 Amalaika te kobo ni, “Man bal.” Eka te juŋo dako dwoko iyi dwoŋo, te daŋ coro nyonyo apek-ca cego oko i doge," 
Zechariah5:9 Dok ate tiŋo waŋa malo, ate neno mon aryo tye atwarre abino kun yamo onwoŋo tye i bwomgi; gin onwoŋo tye i bwomgi bala mea araptela. Gin otirjo dwoŋo otero i akina lo bo kede polo." 
Zechariah5:10 An ate penyo amalaika ame akop keda ni, “Kara dwoŋo koŋo otero kwene?”" 
Zechariah5:11 En te dokka iye ni, “I lobo me Cinar, me gero ot pire; kare ame doŋ otyeko yiko obino cibo dwoŋo i kan a myero cuŋ iye kuno.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Dok ate tirjo waŋa malo ate neno gadigadi lweny aŋwen oya i akina kiddi aryo; kiddi-nono onwoŋo obedo kiddi me mola. 
Zechariah6:2 Gadigadi me agege tye iye aguragura arema, me aryo mere tye iye aguragura acol," 
Zechariah6:3 me adekkere tye iye aguragura atar, eka gadigadi me aŋwennere te bedo iye aguragura obedo abacabac kun tatar." 
Zechariah6:4 Apenyo amalaika ame onwoŋo tye akop keda ni, “Magi kara gin aŋo, adwoŋŋa?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Amalaika te dokka iye ni, “Magi awot baŋ yamo aŋwen me polo, kun nwoŋo koŋ ogeo cuŋ i nyim Rwot me loba luŋ." 
Zechariah6:6 Gadigadi ame tye i aguragura acol awot adok mere tutuŋ lobo me anyarodi, en atarrere adok tutuŋ to”," 
Zechariah6:7 aco en obedo abac abac awot adok tutuŋ lobo me anyarolum, gin atwarre aka to oko, gin orurua me cako wotgi oko me loloŋo lobo. Te doŋ cikogi ni, “Wotu, iloloŋo wunu lobo.” Gin daŋ te loloŋo lobo." 
Zechariah6:8 En olwoŋa te kobba ni, “Koŋ inen jo-ca ame wo to tutuŋ lobo me anyarodica okweo cunya i kom lobo ame tye tutuŋ anyarodi.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Kop a Rwot dok te bino baŋa ni," 
Zechariah6:10 “Kwany jo-ni i akina jo a yam otero i opii, Keldai, Tobia kede Yedaiya, ame gin jo a doŋ otuno kun oya i Babulon; wot kedgi i nino acel-lu i ot a Yocia wot a Jepania." 
Zechariah6:11 Gam ryal kede jabu i baŋgi, eka ite tiyo kede tok kwogo. Rwak tok kwogo abaka i wi Yocwa wot a Yekocadak, alamdog adwoŋ." 
Zechariah6:12 Titte ni, ‘Rwot me mony okobo ni, Nen dano a nyiŋe Jaŋe ene. En bino doŋo i kabedo mere, dok en bino gero ot a Rwot."
