Zechariah6:13 En ame bino gero ot a Rwot; en bino bedo i kwogo ame oporre pi abaka, bino bedo i wi kom loccere, te loc iye. Alamdog bino cun i ŋet kom loccere, niaŋere me kuc bino bedo i akinagi gin aryo luŋ.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Tok kwogo abaka-nu bino bedo i to a Rwot, me wek bedo gin me po baŋ Keldai, Tobia, Yedaiya kede Yocia wot a Jepania." 
Zechariah6:15 “Jo ame tye kannabor bino bino, bino konyo jo i gedo me gero ot a Rwot; mano bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni Rwot me mony en oora baŋwu. Man bino timere ka ce iketo wunu cunywu i winyo dwon Rwot Obaŋawu.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Kop a Rwot rik dok owinyere baŋ Jekeria i mwaka a Dario me aŋwennere, i nino dwe aŋwen, me dwe me aboŋwen ame olwoŋo ni Kiclev." 
Zechariah7:2 Jo me Betel onwoŋo rik oro Carejer kede Regem-melek karacel kede lwakgi me owot okwa kica i baŋ Rwot," 
Zechariah7:3 dok daŋ openy olamdog me ot a Rwot me mony karacel kede odwarpiny ni, “Myero akoki, akany kec i dwe me abic kite a rik abedo timo mwakki apol ata?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Kop a Rwot rik te winyere baŋa ni," 
Zechariah7:5 “Peny jo luŋ me lobo karacel kede odwarpiny ni, Kare ame rik ikanyo wunu kec dok daŋ ikumo wunu i dwe me abic kede me abiro pi mwakki pyerabiro ame okato, rik ikanyo wunu kec pira?" 
Zechariah7:6 Kare ame it ye icem wunu kede i kare ame it ye ka mat wunu, mom onwoŋo icem dok daŋ imatte wunu pirwu kenwu?" 
Zechariah7:7 Kare ame rik jo obedo i Jerucalem i kuc, karacel kede i boma ducu ame ceggi kede, kun daŋ jo bedo i Negeb kede i lobo apipiny, mannono mom en kop a rik Rwot otito i dog odwarpiny me kare acon?”" 
Zechariah7:8 Kop a Rwot owinyere baŋ Jekeria ni," 
Zechariah7:9 “Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Ŋol wunu kop kakare, tim wunu ber kede kica ŋat man baŋ ominnere," 
Zechariah7:10 kur ibur wunu dako a cware oto, atin kic, welo onyo acan; nattoro i akinawu kur yik ginnoro arac i cunye i kom ominnere.”" 
Zechariah7:11 Cite gin gigi okwero winyo doga ote cerre gigi ocera, kun oloko ŋegi, oculo daŋ yitgi oko me kur owiny kop." 
Zechariah7:12 Gin omio cunygi odoko atek bala lela, me kur owiny cik kede kop a Rwot me mony ame rik ocwao i Cuny mere Acil i dog odwarpiny me kare acon, Mannono omio twon akemo adwoŋ meicel obino baŋ Rwot me mony." 
Zechariah7:13 “Kite acalo rik alwoŋo eka gin te kwero winyo, amannono daŋ gin olwoŋo, an ate kwero winyo. Rwot me mony okobo." 
Zechariah7:14 Akeketogi oko i yamo ajuru i akina orok ame gin yam mom oŋeo. Mannono omio lobo ame rik gin oya iye oballe kun ŋattoro mom ŋoŋolo yie, lobo ame rik yomoro cunygi oballe oko.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Kop a Rwot me mony owinyere baŋa ni," 
Zechariah8:2 “Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Twon nyeko atek meicel omaka pi Cion, nyeko omaka i kom i twon akemo adwoŋ meicel." 
Zechariah8:3 Rwot okobo ni, Abino dwogo i Cion, abino bedo i dye Jerucalem; dok Jerucalem obino lwoŋo ni boma ame genne, dok kiddi a Rwot obino lwoŋo ni kidi acil." 
Zechariah8:4 Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Co oteggo kede mon oteggo bino dok bedo i dye yo me Jerucalem, ŋat acel acel bino mako lut ko mo mere pi tio." 
Zechariah8:5 Itino anyira kede awobe bino raude ata i dye yo boma kun otuko iye. 
Zechariah8:6 Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Ka ce man me awura i waŋ jo ame odoŋ i kare man, myero dok bed me awura i waŋa daŋ? Man kop a Rwot me mony okobo." 
Zechariah8:7 Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Nen abino laro jona ame tye tuŋ kide kede en ame tye tuŋ to." 
Zechariah8:8 Abino kelogi me bedo i dye Jerucalem, Gin bino bedo jona, an abino bedo Obarjagi, kun an abedo ame genne, dok ame kita daŋ atira.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, “Mi ciŋwu bed atek, wun ame i kare man ibedo wunu winyo kop magi i dog odwarpiny, cakere i kare ame ogeo cano acakki te ot a Rwot me mony, me wek ger ot a Rwot." 
Zechariah8:10 Pien i kare ame nino-nono rik mom ru oromo, rik onwoŋo mom oculo ocara a dano moro, onyo me a lee moro, anaka kuc daŋ rik mom baŋ ŋat ame kato oko onyo ame dwogo i yie pi okwor; pien rik amio ŋat acel acel mom mito awottere." 
Zechariah8:11 Cite aman doŋ mom abino tic i jo-ni odoŋ-ŋi bala kare acon, Rwot me mony oko bo." 
Zechariah8:12 Pien obino coyo koti kede kuc; olok bino nyak, lobo bino ceko cam, polo bino onyo toyo. Abino miyo jo-ni odoŋ-ŋi leo jamigi luŋ." 
Zechariah8:13 Acalo yam ibedo wunu nyiŋ ame orok ceno kede jo, wun doggola a Juda kede doggola Icrael, amannono daŋ abino larowu eka ite bedo wunu okel winyo baŋ jo ocele. Kur ilwor wunu, cite mi ciŋwu bed atek.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Pien Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, “Acalo rik doŋ ayiko me timowu rac, i kare ame kwariwu rik omio akemo omaka, cunya rik mom te kwe, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Zechariah8:15 Kittono daŋ i kare man doŋ ayiko me timo ber baŋ Jerucalem kede baŋ doggola a Juda, kur ilwor wunu." 
Zechariah8:16 Wun ibino wunu timo kit man: Ŋat acel acel myero kob kop ateni baŋ awottere, ŋol wunu kop ateni ame kelo kuc i ka ŋolo kop i dog pacowu." 
Zechariah8:17 Kur iyik wunu kopporo arac i cunywu, ŋat man i kom awottere. Kur imar wunu kwoŋ goba goba, pien mannono luŋ an adag gira, Rwot okobo.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Kop a Rwot me mony owinyere baŋa ni," 
Zechariah8:19 “Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, Kanyo kec me dwe me aŋwen, kede kanyo kec me dwe me abic, kanyo kec me dwe me abiro kede kanyo kec me dwe me apar bino doko kare me yomcuny kede lelo, kede kare me ecuban me yomcuny baŋ jo me Juda; pi mannono myero imar wunu ateni kede kuc." 
Zechariah8:20 “Rwot me mony okobo ni mansnono, ‘Rok apol pwod bino bino, anaka jo ame bedo i boma apol apola." 
Zechariah8:21 Jo ame bedo i boma acel bino wot i boma ocele kun okobo ni, “Oru wunu wot, me owot okwa Rwot timwa ber, oyeny wunu Rwot me mony; an awot.”" 
Zechariah8:22 Jo apol kede rok atek bino bino i Jerucalem pi yenyo Rwot me mony, kede kwayo Rwot me timgi ber." 
Zechariah8:23 Rwot me mony okobo ni mannono, I kare-nono jo apar ame oya i rok me leb apapat bino mako kanyi Ajudaya kun kobo ni, “Wekwa owot kedi, pien owinyo ni Obaŋa tye kedwu.” ’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Kop a Rwot otiko lobo Kadrak, en bino nworjo kabedo me re i Damaciko, Pien boma luŋ me Aram me a Rwot, acalo atekere me Icrael daŋ luŋ." 
Zechariah9:2 Kamat daŋ ame tye i waŋ apokki mere, Turo kede Cidon kadi gin ryek meicel." 
Zechariah9:3 Turo ogero cellere pire kene, ocoko ryal oyido calo kwoo kede jabu acalli coto i dye yo." 
Zechariah9:4 Cite, nen ba, Rwot bino yako jami mere oko, bino bolo lonyo mere luŋ i nam, aco en obino waŋe i mac." 
Zechariah9:5 Acikelon bino neno, lworo bino mako; Gaja daŋ bino neno, te minne i rem: Ekron daŋ amannono, pien lewic bino make i gennere. Abaka bino rwenyo oko i Gaja; Acikelon bino doŋ nono aboŋo jo." 
Zechariah9:6 Rok orubere aruba bino bedo i Acidod; abino giko wakere i lobo piriciti. 
Zechariah9:7 Abino kwanyo remo mere oko i doge, gi-kwer daŋ abino kwanyo oko i akina lake; en daŋ bino bedo jo odoŋ pi Obaŋawa; bino doko calo atekere a tye i Juda, Ekron bino doko calo jo Jebuc." 
Zechariah9:8 Icennere abino guro kema oda me gwoko, me ŋattoro kur bed be bea i ŋete; aloccoro a burogi mom dok bino donyo i akinagi, pien aman doŋ an i koma ame aneno i waŋa." 
Zechariah9:9 Lel atek, yin Cion! Go ijira, yin Jerucalem! Nen, abakani abino baŋi; en oloo kop, oloo daŋ lweny! En mwol, dok tye arino i kana, tye i wi atin kana a twon." 
Zechariah9:10 Abino tyeko gadigadi lweny oko i Epraim, ate tyeko aguragura lweny daŋ oko i Jerucalem; akud atero me lweny daŋ obino geŋo oko, en bino rabbi rok luŋ kop me kuc; loccere bino ya i nam naka i nam ocele, dok bino ya i Kulo naka tuno kan a lobo ogik iye." 
Zechariah9:11 Aco yin daŋ, pien pi remo me cikerena kedi, abino miyo joni ame otero iyi opii, ya oko i bur a pii mom iye," 
Zechariah9:12 Dok wunu i cel atek, wun obuc a tye i gen; tin aciko ni abino culowu kun adodo iryo," 
Zechariah9:13 Pien doŋ agomo Juda acalo akud aterona, Epraim doŋ amio obedo atero mere, Abino tugo itinoni, yin Cion, i kom itinowu, wun jo Grik abino tiŋi malo calo pala romo a ŋat atek." 
Zechariah9:14 Icennere Rwot bino nen i wigi malo, eka atero mere te meny bala lutkot; Rwot Obaŋa bino kuto opel, te wot i dye yamo ajuru me anyarolum," 
Zechariah9:15 Rwot me mony bino gwokogi, atyeŋ ame obao mom bino gudogi, gin bino nyono oko piny i te tyengi; gin bino mato remogi bala koŋo olok, bino yeŋogi bala becen opoŋ, bala gul keno lam ame ocoro iye remo." 
Zechariah9:16 I nino-nono Rwot Obaŋagi bino larogi, pien jo mere calo rommi; pien gin obino papara i barrere, acalo gweŋ alilia i tok kwogo me loc." 
Zechariah9:17 Eyo, kara berrere bino bedo rom mene! Kal bino miyo awobe cwe, koŋo olok anyen bino cweyo anyira." 
Zechariah10:1 Kwa wunu kot i baŋ Rwot, i kare me cwir, kwa wunu i baŋ Rwot ame mio pol doko apek, ame mio kot cwe baŋ jo, ame mio dek tu i poto a dano acel acel." 
Zechariah10:2 Pien cal jogi ko bo kop a tere mom otyet neno daŋ goba; jo a leko daŋ tito lek me goba, okweo cuny jo nono. Mannono omio jo rorona calo rommi; oneno can pien akwatgi mom." 
Zechariah10:3 “Akemona Iyet meicel i kom okwat, abino keto can i kom otel-wic; pien Rwot me mony paro pi romi mere, ame en ot a Juda, bino lokogi calo aguragura mere aber i lweny." 
Zechariah10:4 Kidi adwoŋ me gwic bino ya i akinagi, teke me guro kema daŋ bino ya i komgi, akud atero me romo daŋ bino ya i komgi, aloc luŋ daŋ bino ya i komgi." 
Zechariah10:5 Gin luŋ obino bedo calo jo atek i romo, kun onyono okwor piny i coto i dye yo; gin bino lweny pien Rwot tye kedgi, bino miyo lewic mako jo aŋwec aguragura." 
Zechariah10:6 “Abino miyo doggola a Juda doko atek, dok abino laro daŋ doggola a Lucepu. Abino dwogogi cen pien kica omaka i komgi, gin bino bedo calo jo a yam mom okwero, pien an a Rwot Obaŋagi, abino dok gamo kopgi." 
Zechariah10:7 Eka Epraim te doko calo lon atek i romo, cunygi bino bedo yom calo jo omato koŋo olok." 
Zechariah10:8 Itinogi bino nenogi te lelo, cunygi bino bedo yom i kom Rwot." 
Zechariah10:9 Kadi bed rik akeketogi i akina orok, cite gin bino po pira i lobo luŋ a tye kannabor, gin karacel itinogi obino kwo, obino dwogo." 
Zechariah10:10 Abino dwoggogi oko paco kun oya i lobo Miciri, abino cokogi daŋ oko i Acuria; abino kelogi i lobo Gilead kede Lebanon, tuno ka kabedo doŋ oremogi. Gin bino ŋolo dye nam me Miciri, obino goyo pii ame atagere i nam, kut luŋ i kulo Nail daŋ bino two." 
Zechariah10:11 Awaka a jo Acuria obino juko oko, abiro loc me Miciri bino rwenyo oko," 
Zechariah10:12 Abino miyogi obedo atek i Rwot, gin bino natte pi nyiŋe”, Rwot okobo." 
Zechariah11:1 Yab doggolani, yin Lebanon, mi mac waŋ yen cedarni oko!" 
Zechariah11:2 Kok ba, yin cipre, pien cedar doŋ orette oko piny, pien yen adoijo mege doŋ oballe oko! Koku ba, wun kworo luŋ me Bacan, pien bun oculle doŋ olwero oko!" 
Zechariah11:3 Koŋ iwiny ba koko okwat, pien kwogogi doŋ obalo oko! Koŋ iwiny ba mor eŋatu, pien ka ponogi luŋ i Jordan doŋ oballe oko." 
Zechariah11:4 Rwot Obaŋana okobo ni, “Yin myero idok ikwa rommi ame opito me aneka." 
Zechariah11:5 Jo ame wilogi nekogi, eka mom ote keto cannoro i komgi. Jo a catogi kobo ni, Rwot myero pwo, pien doŋ adoko alonyo; okwatgi kica daŋ gire mom makogi." 
Zechariah11:6 Pien kica gire mom dok bino maka i kom jo ame bedo i lobo-ni, Rwot okobo. Nen, abino miyo ŋat acel acel poto i ciŋ akwattere, dok ŋat acel acel bino poto iciŋ abaka mere; gin bino ŋinyo lobo, mom abino laro dano moro i ciŋgi.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Mannono omio an adoko akwa rommi ame jo awilo neko aneka. Eka ate kwanyo abiro aryo, acel ate cako nyiŋe Kica, en ocele ate cako nyiŋe Note. An ate kwayo gira rommi." 
Zechariah11:8 Rik ate rweyo okwattono adek i dwe acel, pien onwoŋo cunya doŋ mom romo diye i komgi, gin daŋ onwoŋo yigi okwera oko," 
Zechariah11:9 Omio ate kobo ni, “Mom gira abino bedo akwatwu. Rommi a myero to bino to; rommi a myero rwe oko, obino rweyo, me wek odoŋŋere, ŋat man cam riŋo kom awottere.”" 
Zechariah11:10 An ate kwanyo abirona ame nyiŋe Kica-ca, ate turo oko, kun aturo kede cikere ame rik acikere kede i rok luŋ." 
Zechariah11:11 Cikere-naca rik te tur oko i ninonono, ocat rommi ame obedo nena oŋeo ni mannono obedo kop a Rwot." 
Zechariah11:12 An ate kobbigi ni, “Ka ce ineno wunu ni ber, mia wunu ocarana; aco ka mom, wek wunu bedi.” Gin te pimo cekel pyeradek me ryal me ocarana." 
Zechariah11:13 Rwot te cika ni, “Bol i ka kano lim,” en lim ame gin ocula kede i wel aber wokkono. An ate tero cekel pyeradekkono bolo i ka kano lim a Rwot." 
Zechariah11:14 Icennere ate dok turo abiro me aryo, ame nyiŋe Notte-ca, kun aturo kede notte me omego i akina Juda kede Icrael." 
Zechariah11:15 Rwot te cika ni, “Yin dok igam jami tic okwat a mom konyo." 
Zechariah11:16 Pien nen, abino miyo akwattoro ya i lobo-ni ame mom bino paro pi rommi ame tye a to atoa, mom daŋ bino yenyo rommi ame amito rwenyo oko, dok daŋ mom bino caŋo rommi owanne mege, akadi pito rommi a komgi yot, cite bino mwodo riŋo a en ocwe mege, kun kikilo anaka ogweŋŋwere tyengi." 
Zechariah11:17 Akwatta a konnyere mom bino neno can be, ame weko rommi mere ata! Pala romo myero ŋol bade, cob daŋ waŋe me tuŋ cem! Myero mi bade luŋ kwe oko, waŋe me tuŋ cem daŋ to oko.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Kop a Rwot i kom Icrael: Rwot ame oryeo polo, dok ocibo acakki te lobo, ame ocweo cuny dano iyi dano, okobo ni," 
Zechariah12:2 “Nen aceggi miyo Jerucalem bedo ikopo ame mero rok luŋ ame tye i ŋete. I Juda daŋ okwor bino guro Jerucalem. 
Zechariah12:3 I ninonono abino miyo Jerucalem bedo kidi apek meicel baŋ rok luŋ; jo luŋ ame tiŋo bino wanne atek. Rok luŋ me lobo bino notte karacel me lweny kede. 
Zechariah12:4 I nino-nono, Rwot okobo, abino babano aguragura acel acel oko, eka ŋat aŋwec kede te po oko. Cite abino yabo waŋe i kom doggola a Juda i kare ame abino miyo aguragura orok luŋ wangi to oko." 
Zechariah12:5 Atekere a Juda bino kop i cunygi kengi kengi ni, ‘Jo ame bedo i Jerucalem tye i teko ame oya i baŋ Rwot me mony, ame Obaŋagi.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “I nino-nono abino miyo atekere a Juda bedo calo tako ame mac tye a lyel iye i akina yen, dok daŋ acalo mac rao a lyel i akina ŋano. Gin bino neko rok luŋ a tye i ŋetgi, ame tye i ciŋgi tuŋ cem kede tuŋ cam, cite Jerucalem jo bino bedo i ye kun tye kakare i Jerucalem." 
Zechariah12:7 “Rwot bino geyo miyo loc i kema a Juda, me kwogo me doggola a Daudi kede kwogo a jo ame bedo i Jerucalem mom myero mi bed malo i kato mea Juda." 
Zechariah12:8 I nino-nono Rwot bino geŋo jo ame bedo i Jerucalem kede kwot; i nino-nono dano ame goro meicel i akinagi bino doko calo Daudi, aco doggola a Daudi i nino-nono bino bedo calo ot Obaŋa, ame calo amalaika a Rwot a telo nyimgi." 
Zechariah12:9 I nino-nono abino yenyo yo me tyeko rok luŋ ame obino me lweny i kom Jerucalem. 
Zechariah12:10 “Abino onyo cuny me kica kede cuny me kwac i kom doggola a Daudi kede i kom jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, me wek ka gin oneno ŋat ame gin ocobo, gin okum pire, acalli ŋat ame kumo pi attinnere ame onywalo acel keken, dok me gin koke atek ateka, acalli ŋat ame koko atin kao." 
Zechariah12:11 I nino-nono kumo bino bedo dwon meicel i Jerucalem, acalli kumo pi Adad-rimmon i bar me Megiddo." 
Zechariah12:12 Lobo bino kumo kun doggola acel acel kumo kengi; jo me doggola a Daudi pat kun mongi daŋ kumo pat; jo me doggola a Natan pat kun mongi daŋ kumo pat; 
Zechariah12:13 jo me doggoa a Levi pat kun mongi daŋ kumo pat; jo me doggola a Cimei pat kun mongi daŋ kumo pat; 
Zechariah12:14 karacel kede doggola luŋ ame odoŋ, doggola acel acel bino kumo kengi kengi, kun mongi daŋ kumo kengi kengi." 
Zechariah13:1 “I nino-nono obino tuco akoŋ pi doggola a Daudi karacel kede pi jo ame bedo i Jerucalem, me lwokogi oko i bai kede i tim me caro caro." 
Zechariah13:2 “I nino-nono, Rwot me mony okobo, abino ŋolo nyiŋ cal jagi luŋ oko i lobo, me jo kur dok po pirgi; dok abino kwanyo daŋ odwarpiny karacel kede cen arac oko i lobo." 
Zechariah13:3 Ka ce nattoro dok bino nen acalo adwarpiny, pappere kede tottere ame onywale bino kobbe ni, ‘Mom ibino bedo kwa, pien ikobo kop me goba i nyiŋ Rwot.’ Pappere kede tottere ame onywale bino cobe pel ka ce en bino rabo kop acalo adwarpiny." 
Zechariah13:4 I nino-nono lewic bino mako adwarpiny acel acel pi anyuttere ame en rabo pire acalo adwarpiny, en mom bino ruko boŋo obedo yeyer me bwolo jo," 
Zechariah13:5 cite en bino kabo ni, ‘An gira mom adwarpiny, an abedo apur poto, pien poto man obedo mega cakere i tinona!’" 
Zechariah13:6 Ka ce nattoro bino penye ni, ‘Kara yo ŋei ame opwodo oryemo wok-ki kono?’ En bino dok iye ni, ‘Mannono luŋ waŋ abiro ame opwoda kede i ot owotena.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 “Mukere i kom akwatta, yin pala romo, i kom dano ame ocuŋ oluba, Rwot me mony okobo. Nek akwat, me rommi ket oko ata; abino wiro ciŋa i kom jo atino." 
Zechariah13:8 I lobo man luŋ, Rwot oko bo, aryo me adek obino ŋolo, te to oko, acel me adek en a bino doŋ." 
Zechariah13:9 Abino keto acel me adek-ku i mac, abino liyogi acalli ŋat a lio ryal, abino temogi kite ame otemo kede jabu. Gin bino lwoŋo nyiŋa, an abino winyo kopgi. Abino ko bo ni, ‘Gin jona’; gin daŋ bino kobo ni, ‘Rwot en Obaŋawa.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Nen ba, nino a Rwot tye abino, ame jami luŋ ame oyako i baŋwu obino poko i akinawu." 
Zechariah14:2 Pien abino coko rok luŋ karacel me lweny i kom Jerucalem. Gin bino mayo boma ote yako udi kun daŋ obuto i mon tetek; nucu jo me boma obino tero oko iyi opii; citejo ocele mere-ni mom obino jwayo oko i boma. 
Zechariah14:3 Icennere Rwot dok bino wot lweny i kom rokkono luŋ, acalo elwenyo kede i nino me lweny." 
Zechariah14:4 I nino-nono tyene bino cuŋ i wi kidi me Jeituni, ame tye i nyim Jerucalem tuŋ kide. Kidi me jeituni bino barre yie aryo, kun cakere i tuŋ kide dok kede tuŋ to; luŋ bino doŋ alac meicel. Kidi tuŋ cel bino dok tutuŋ anyarodi, eka tuŋ ocele te dok tutuŋ anyarolum." 
Zechariah14:5 Luŋ me kidina luŋ bino torre oko, pien luŋ kiddi bino tuno naka i ŋete. Ibino wunu riŋo acalo rik iriŋo wunu oyerjo i kare abaka Ujjia me Juda. Icennere Rwot Obaŋawu bino bino karacel kede jo mere acil luŋ." 
Zechariah14:6 I nino-nono nico kede koyo bino bedo pe. 
Zechariah14:7 Piny bino bedo bala iceŋ nakanaka, Rwot ŋeo man, kun gire mom dyeceŋ kadi dyewor, pien otyeno ceŋ bino ryeny." 
Zechariah14:8 I nino-nono pii akwo bino mollo kun ya i Jerucalem, nucu mere tuŋ cel bino mollo i nam me tuŋ kide, eka nucu mere ocele te mollo i nam me tuŋ to; bino daŋ timere amannono i oro, kite ame obedo timere kede i cwir." 
Zechariah14:9 I nino-nono Rwot bino doko abaka ame loo lobo ducu, en bino bedo abaka kene, kun nyiŋe kene en atye." 
Zechariah14:10 Lobo luŋ bino doko bar, cakere i Geba tuno naka i Rimmon ame tye tutuŋ anyarolum me Jerucalem, Cite Jerucalem bino dyedde gire kakare cakere i dogcel a Benjamin tuno anaka i dogcel acon, naka i dogcel me Gul kede dok cakere i pem me Kananel tuno anaka i bur nyono olok abaka." 
Zechariah14:11 Jo bino bedo iye, pien mom dok obino kwero ginnor o me aneka iye. Jerucalem bino doŋ bedo i kuc." 
Zechariah14:12 Man bino bedo too edeke ame Rwot bino pwodo kede rok luŋ ame olwenyo i kom Jerucalem: riŋo komgi bino top oko kun pwod ocuŋ i tyengi, waŋgi bino top oko iyi opoko waŋgi, lebgi bino top oko iyi doggi." 
Zechariah14:13 I nino-nono twon lworo moro ame oya i baŋ Rwot bino babaŋogi oko, ame te miyo ŋat acel acel tiŋo ciŋe i kom awottere kun goo awottere kede ciŋe." 
Zechariah14:14 Koŋ inen anaka, Juda daŋ bino lweny i kom Jerucalem. Gin bino coko lonyo a rok luŋ ame tye i ŋete, jabu, ryal, kede ruk apol meicel." 
Zechariah14:15 Kodi too edeke-nono bino poto daŋ i kom aguragura, leyi acalli kane, inaga, kane kede i kom leyi luŋ me gonnyono." 
Zechariah14:16 Ŋat acel acel ame obwot i kom rok luŋ ame onwoŋo obino me lweny i kom Jerucalem, bino wot i Jerucalem mwaka i mwaka me woro abaka, ame en Rwot me mony, kede kwero ecuban me gaŋo." 
Zechariah14:17 Ka ce atekere moro me wi podo mom bino wot i Jerucalem me woro Abaka ame en Rwot me mony, kot mom bino cwe baŋgi." 
Zechariah14:18 Ka ce atekere me Miciri mom owoto, mom onen kuno, too edeke ame rik Rwot owuno kede rok a mom owoto i Jerucalem kwero ecuban me gaŋo bino makogi," 
Zechariah14:19 Man en too edeke ame obino pwodo kede jo i Miciri kede rok luŋ ame mom bino wot kwero ecuban me gaŋo. 
Zechariah14:20 I nino-nono obino goro coc i kom olaŋ me aguragura ni, “Okwero obedo acil pi Rwot.” Gulli ame tye i ot Rwot bino bedo acalo tabo ame tye i nyim ke ŋo lam." 
Zechariah14:21 Gulli luŋ ame tye i Jerucalem kede Juda obino kwero bedo acil pi Rwot me mony, me wek jo luŋ ame ŋolo leyi me yalo Obaŋa bin kwany i akinagi, oted riŋo ame oyalo Obaŋa. Acat willoro mom dok bino nen i ot a Rwot me mony i nino-nono." 
Malachi1:1 Man en kop ame Rwot omio Malaki orabo baŋ jo Icrael 
Malachi1:2 Rwot okobo ni, “Nen an atyeko marowu.” Ento wun ikobo wunu ni, “Yin imarowa kara i yore aŋonnono?” Rwot te gamo ni, “Ecau gin kede Yakobo mom gin omego? Cite an amaro Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 ento ate kwero Ecau oko, Lobo Ecau ame obedo kidikidi amio odoŋ nono, aloko odoko me a leyi me tim,”" 
Malachi1:4 Ka ee jo Edom, ame gin obedo ikwae Ecau okobo ni, “Wan obabalo bomawa oko, ento wan dok obino gero bomawa ame obalo-nono.” Rwot me mony bino gamo ni, “Gin otwero gero, cite an dok abino reto oko piny, tuno waŋ ame olwoŋo lobogi ni lobo a jo ame obalo, kede dok ni, jo ame akemo doŋ omako Rwot i komgi atwal.”" 
Malachi1:5 Wun ikomwu ibino neno wunu man kede waŋwu, ite kobo wunu ni, “Rwot kara dit meicel, anaka i lobo ocele a mom obedo me Icrael!”" 
Malachi1:6 Rwot me mony okobbi olamdog ni, “Atin woro pappere, amiro daŋ woro adwoŋŋere. Doŋ ka ce an abedo papawu, piŋo kara mom iwora wunu? Dok ka ce an abedo adwoŋwu, piŋo kara mom ilwora wunu? Wun olamdog ame icaa wunu, dok ite penyo wunu ni, ‘Kara wan ocai i yore aŋo?’" 
Malachi1:7 Icaa wunu i miyo cammogo oballe i wi keno lam me yala, eka dok ite penyo wunu ni, ‘Kara wan obalo keno lam i yore aŋo?’ Pien itamo wunu ni meja a Rwot romo gire acaa." 
Malachi1:8 Ka ce imio wunu leyi ame waŋgi oto me mot aŋola me yala, itamo wunu ni mannono nwoŋo itimo wunu gin aber? Dok ka ce imio wunu en ame oŋwalo mege onyo ame two, mannono nwoŋo itimo wunu gin aber? Koŋ item miyo wunu kodi ennono baŋ olocwu; cunygi bino bedo yom i komwu? Gin bino pwoyowu?”" 
Malachi1:9 Rwot me mony okobo ni, “Wun olamdog koŋ ikwa wunu Obaŋa ni myero timwu kica, omi berrere onen i komwu, Obaŋa twero nyuto berrere i kom ŋattoro i akinawu kun wun itye wunu kede kodi mot man i ciŋwu?" 
Malachi1:10 Kono onwoŋo ŋattoro i akinawu ocego doggola me ot Obaŋa oko, me kur ibed wunu moko mac i wi keno lam me yala nononono! An gira cunya mom yom i komwu; mom abino gamo mottoro ame ikelo wunu." 
Malachi1:11 Pien nyiŋa dit atek i akina rok apapat, cakere i kide naka tuŋ to; i kabedo luŋ jo waŋa odok a ŋwece kur, kun daŋ omia mot aber odoco; pien nyiŋa dit atek i akina orok, man kop a Rwot me mony," 
Malachi1:12 Ento wun nwoŋo ipyedo wunu apyeda pitano ni meja a Rwot gire oballe, dok iromo miyo wunu iye cam ame wun icao wunu." 
Malachi1:13 Wun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Tic man oolo jo rom kwene!’ ite daŋ dok jwiya wunu, man kop a Rwot. Wun ikela wunu leyi ame omao tetek, onyo en ame oŋwalo mege, onyo ame two, magi-nono en ame wun ilunyo kelo wunu me motwu, Abino gamo kodi mottono i baŋwu?" 
Malachi1:14 Cen myero mak ŋat ame agoba, ame tye kede nyok romo i akina rommi mere, ame ocikere me miyo, eka te dok lunyo ŋolli Rwot en ame roccoro tye i kome. Pien an abedo Abaka adwoŋ meicel, ame nyiŋa olworo atek i akina orok,” man kop ame Rwot me mony ikokome okobo." 
Malachi2:1 “Aman doŋ ba, wun olamdog, cik man otikowu." 
Malachi2:2 Ka ce mom ibino winyo wunu, ka ce mom ibino mako wunu i cunywu pi keto kwogo i koma, an abino cwayo cen i komwu ate daŋ ceno jamiwu abeco oko; iyi ateni mere, atyeko doŋ cenogi gire oko, pien wun mom imako wunu i cunywu, man kop a Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi2:3 Nen ba, abino miyo mom dok inywal wunu, dok daŋ abino miyo badwu mito oko, dok abino juko waŋwu kede wee, wee mot aŋolawu ame imio wunu baŋa, ate ryemowu oko i nyima." 
Malachi2:4 Man-nono bino miyo iŋeo wunu ni cik man rik acwao pirwu, me cikerena kede Levi moki, man kop ame Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi2:5 Cikerena kede rik onwoŋo obedo cikere me miyo kwo, kede kuc, ate daŋ miyo gin luŋ baŋe; me en bed kede lworo; en daŋ rik te lwora kun woro nyiŋa." 
Malachi2:6 En onwoŋo pwonyo ka pwony me ateni keken, kun kopporo arac mom donnyo i doge. En obedo wot karacel keda i kuc kun tio gin ame tye atira dok daŋ omio jo apol oweko timo gin arac." 
Malachi2:7 Alamdog myero ogwok kop me ateni ame en neo i kom Obaŋa, jo myero wot baŋe me winyo pwonnyere, pien en obedo a kwena a Rwot me mony." 
Malachi2:8 Cite wun doŋ iweko wunu lubo yo-nono oko. Gin ame wun ipwonyo wunu tye ka tatago jo apol meicel, ibala wunu cikere a Levi oko, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi2:9 Mannono omio an amiowu idoko wunu jo ayot meicel, ame ocao i i nyim jo ducu, pien mom ilubo wunu yona, dok daŋ itye wunu kede apoka-poka i pwonywu.”" 
Malachi2:10 Wan luŋ mom papawa acel? Obaŋa acel mom en ame oketowa? Pino dok ŋat acel acel mom bedo ŋat a genne baŋ awottere, kun obalo wunu cikere ame rik kwariwa ocikere kede?" 
Malachi2:11 Jo Juda yam mom obedo jo ame genne; gin obedo timo tim me kwer iyi Icrael kede i Jerucalem. Gin obalo kabedo acil ame obedo me a Rwot, kabedo ame en maro, dok daŋ gin onyomo anyira a rok ame woro obana ocele." 
Malachi2:12 Rwot myero mi waŋ ŋat ame timo kodi tim man rweny oko i kema a Yakobo, me kur dok medde bedo kede acaden onyo ŋat ame gamo kop a Rwot, onyo ame kela mot baŋ Rwot me mony." 
Malachi2:13 Gin ocele ame dok itimo wunu daŋ ene. Iwumo wunu wi keno lam a Rwot kede pig waŋwu, ikok wunu dok daŋ icucura wunu, pien en mom dok keto cunye i kom motwu, mom daŋ gamo i baŋwu, akadi pwoyowu pire." 
Malachi2:14 Wun ipenyo wunu ni, “Kara piŋo omio en dok timo kittono?” Pien Rwot obedo acaden ame neo kop i kom cikerewu ame onwoŋo rik icikere wunu kede wun i dakoni, ame rik inyomere kede kun yin pwod awobi, ento yin doŋ ituro cikerewu oko, akadi bed en pwod tye acalo awotti, dok dakoni ame onwoŋo rik icikere kede i nyim Obaŋa." 
Malachi2:15 Mom Obaŋa omio yin idoko kom acel kede cuny daŋ acel, wun kede? Gin aŋo ame en Obaŋa mito i baŋwu? En mito ni ibed wunu itino ame wore. Pi mannono, myero igwokere wunu ba, ŋattoro kur tur cikere mere baŋ dako me re ame enyomo kun en pwod awobi," 
Malachi2:16 “Pien an adag keto nyom, Rwot Obaŋa me Icrael en okobo, adag daŋ ŋat ame timo kodi tim me kolo-nono baŋ cege, Rwot me mony okobo, Pi mannono, myero igwokere wunu ba, me ŋattoro kur bed ŋat a mom genne.”" 
Malachi2:17 Kopwu doŋ oolo kom Rwot oko, Aco wun dok ipenyo wunu ni, “Wan kara oolo kome i yore aŋonnono?” Wun lolo wunu kome pi kobo ni, “Jo luŋ ame timo gin arac, gin gire obedo jo abeco i nyim Rwot, yie daŋ yom i komgi.” Dok pi penyo ni, “Obaŋa ame ŋolo kop atira-nono kara tye kwene?”" 
Malachi3:1 Rwot me mony odok ipenywunono ni, “Neno wunu ba, acwayo aora i nyima, me en gera yo, me Rwot ame iyenyo wunu-nono bin oko oyotoyot i ode. Neno wunu ba, aor me cikere ame cunywu yom i kome-nono, abino doŋ oko." 
Malachi3:2 Ento na ame bino kanyo nino-nono ka en obino? Dok na ame bino cuŋ ka en onen? “Pien en bino bedo calo mac ame lio ryal, dok acalo cabun me biyo boŋo," 
Malachi3:3 En bino bedo piny me nolo kop acalo ŋat ame lio ryal bedo acil, en bino lonyo ikwae a Levi doko acil kun liogi acalo jabu kede ryal, tuno waŋ ame gin doŋ romo miyo mot baŋ Rwot i cuny aler." 
Malachi3:4 Mannono bino miyo mot ame jo Juda kede jo Jerucalem mio, bino dok yomoro cuny Rwot calo i kare acon kede i mwakki ame okato." 
Malachi3:5 “An doŋ abino nokowu aceggi, me ŋolliwu kop. Abino bedo acaden ame kobo kop oyotoyot i kom otim tim me jojok, i kom ocod cot, i kom okwoŋ kwoŋ me goba, i kom jo ame cero opakaca pi ocaragi, kede jo ame buro mon a coggi oto, itino kic, karacel kede jo ame cwao orok a bedo i akinagi teŋe kun mom olwora gigi, man kop a Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi3:6 “Pien an a Rwot ame mom dok alokere; pi mannono ba, wun ikwae a Yakobo, mom ru ajwerowu wun ducu." 
Malachi3:7 Cakere i kare a kwariwu, wun igak wunu oko i kom cikka, kun mom igwoko wunu. Dwog wunu doŋ baŋa, me an daŋ adwog baŋwu, Rwot me mony okobo. Ento wun dok ipenyo wunu apenya ni, ‘Wan kara obino dwogo i yore aŋo?’" 
Malachi3:8 Dano twero yako Obaŋa? Nen itye wunu ka yaka. Ento wun dok ipenyo wunu ni, ‘Kara wan oyaki i yore aŋo?’ Iyaka wunu i mi yo acel me apar karacel kede motwu." 
Malachi3:9 Oceno wun luŋ i cen, pien itye wunu ka yaka; rokwu luŋ tye ka yaka." 
Malachi3:10 Kel wunu acel me apar luŋ i ka kano cam, me cam bed tye i oda; me koŋ dok itema wunu kede, Rwot me mony okobo, koŋ inen wunu ka ce mom abino yabo waŋ dirica luŋ me polo pirwu, ate corriwu lwak jami apipim." 
Malachi3:11 Abino geno ginnoro luŋ ame balo cam i pottiwu, me gin kur tyek cam ame ocek i pottiwu; nyig olokwu ame tye i poto mom bino ony, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi3:12 Rok ocele luŋ te doŋ lwoŋowu ni wun rok a komwu gum, pien ibino bedo bedo wunu i lobo me yomcuny man kop ame Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi3:13 “Wun ikobo wunu kop areco i koma, Rwot me mony okobo. Cite wun dok ipenyo wunu ni, ‘Kara wan okobo kop aŋo i komi?’" 
Malachi3:14 Wun ikobo wunu ni, ‘Konyo kara ŋo me bedo woro Obaŋa? Gin aŋo aber ame wan onwoŋo pi bedo cobo gin ame en ociko onyo pi bedo wot i nyim Rwot me mony bala jo ame akwero cola?" 
Malachi3:15 Cakere i kare man wan olwoŋo jo ame wakere ni jo ame komgi gum. Pien jo ame timo gin arac bedo jo ame tye aber i jami ducu mom mannono keken; cite gin ka otemo Obaŋa, gin obwot gigi aboŋo ginnoro ame gudogi.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Jo ame lworo Rwot te bedo kop i akinagi kengi kengi; Rwot te ciko yite winyo gin ame gin akobo; ote coyo buk i nyim Rwot, me po i kom jo ame rik onwoŋo lworo Rwot kun daŋ otamo pire." 
Malachi3:17 Rwot me mony te kobo ni “Gin bino bedo jona, jo ame obedo mera an ikoma, i nino ame abino tic iye, kun atimogi kica kite ame dano timo kede kica baŋ wode ame wore." 
Malachi3:18 Mannono bino miyo dok ineno wunu apokapoka ame tye i akina jo ame kitegi atira kede jo areco, jo aworo Obaŋa kede jo ame mom woro Obaŋa." 
Malachi4:1 “Neno wunu ba, nino-nono tye abino kun wan calo tanur; jo a wakere luŋ kede jo atimo tim areco bino waŋ iye calo reŋ kal. I nino-nono obino waŋogi gin luŋ, ame mom abino weko akadi lwitgi onyo jaŋgi moro doŋ, Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi4:2 Ento pi wun jo ame wora, ceŋ me kite atira bino donyo pirwu kun caŋo jo kede bwome. Wun ibino wot wunu kun ipye wunu apyea calo roce ame ya iyi anok." 
Malachi4:3 Ibino nyono wunu otim tim areco piny i te tyenwu, pien i nino ame abino tic iye-nono, nwoŋo gin doŋ odoko buru ame tye piny, man kop a Rwot me mony okobo." 
Malachi4:4 “Poyo wunu cik amirona Muca, icwillere kede gin ame en ociko, ame rik an acike iye i Koreb, pi jo Icrael luŋ." 
Malachi4:5 “Nen ba, an abino cwayo adwarpiny Elia; en bino geyo bino kun nwoŋo nino a Rwot mom ru obino, ame en twon nino moro adwoŋ dok daŋ iyiliyili meicel." 
Malachi4:6 En Elia bino loko cuny odoŋe i kom itinogi kede cuny itino i kom odoŋegi naka mio abino ate nekogi oko acalo gin ame ojalo me aneka.” 
Matthew24:15 “Doŋ ka ibino neno wunu ginnoro me kwer ame balo cuny jo, a rik adwarpiny Daniel orabo pire, kun ocuŋ i kabedo acil (dano ame kwano myero niaŋ iye)," 
Acts2:16 ento man en gin a rik adwarpiny Joel okobo pire ni,"
